Genesis1:1 Atilin Pathen'in van le leiset aseme. 
Genesis1:2 Chuleh leiset chu agong umlou le agohkeo ahin; twi thuhtah chunga chun muthim akikhange. Chule Pathen lhagao chu twiho chunga chun alenglen ahi. 
Genesis1:3 Chuin Pathen'in, Vah umhen atile, vah chu aumtan ahi." 
Genesis1:4 Chuin Pathen'in vah chu amun, hichu pha asan: hichun Pathen'in vah chu muthima konin akhen tan ahi." 
Genesis1:5 Chuin Pathen'in vah chu sun asah in, muthim chu jan asah tai. Hitichun nilhah le jingkah chu ni masa ni ahitai." 
Genesis1:6 Chujouvin Pathen'in, Twilah-a chun vanlaijol hung umhen, chule hichun twiho chu twiho-a konin homkhenhen, ati." 
Genesis1:7 Hitichun Pathen'in vanlaijol chu asemin, vanlaijol noija um twiho chu vanlaijol chunga um twiho-a kon chun ahomkhenin ahi. Chuin chuti chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis1:8 Chuin Pathen'in vanlaijol chu van asah tai. Hitichun nilhah le jingkah chu ni nina ahitai. 
Genesis1:9 Chuin Pathen'in, Vannoi'a twi ho chu mun khatna kigom khom henlang, gamgo hung kisepdoh hen, ati. Chuin chuti chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis1:10 Chuin Pathen'in gamgo chu leiset asah-in, chule twi kigom khom hochu twikhanglen asah tai. Chuin Pathen'in hichu amun, pha asan ahi." 
Genesis1:11 Chuin Pathen'in, leisetnin hampa, achi nei hamkung, chule ama ama chi dungjuija aganei theiphung, aga sunga achi um leisetna hin hinsepdoh hen, ati. Chuin chuti chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis1:12 Chuin leiset nin hampa, chule ama ama chi dung juija ga, aga sunga achi um thingphung ganei ahin sodoh tan ahi. Chuin Pathen'in hichu amun pha asan ahi." 
Genesis1:13 Hiti chun nilhah le jingkah chu nithum ni ahitai. 
Genesis1:14 Chuin Pathen'in, Sun chu jana kona chomkhen dingin van'a vanlaijola vah ho umhen; chule hiho chu melchihna ho, phat bihho, chule nikhoho hetna dingin pangu hen." 
Genesis1:15 Chule hiho chu leiset chunga vah pedingin van'a vanlaijola vahho hiuhen ati. Chuin chuti chun aumtan ahi. 
Genesis1:16 Hiche chun Pathen'in vah lentah ni asemin; vah lenjo chu sun vaipo dingin, chule vah neojo chu jan vaipo dingin apansahtan ahi. Aman ahsi ho jong aseme." 
Genesis1:17 Pathen'in hiho chu leiset chunga vah peding van'a vanlaijola chu akoijin," 
Genesis1:18 Chule sun le jan chunga vaipo ding le muthima kona vah khendingin akoitan ahi. Chuin Pathen'in hichu amun pha asan ahi. 
Genesis1:19 Hiti chun nilhah le jingkah chu nili ni ahitai. 
Genesis1:20 Chuin Pathen'in, Twiho chun achat loh thei hinna nei ganhing tamtah hinsepdoh henlang, vachate jong leiset chung van'a vanlaijol onghom-ah leng leuhen, ati." 
Genesis1:21 Hiti chun Pathen'in ngapi lentah ho asemin, chule twijin ama ama chi dungjuija ninglhing setna ahinsepdoh achatloh thei hinna nei ganhing namkim le lhaving nei vacha namkim chu ama ama chi dungjui jin asemin ahi. Chuin Pathen'in hichu amun pha asan ahi." 
Genesis1:22 Chule Pathen'in amaho chu phatthei aboh-in, Chiphaovin lang pung theijun, twikhanglen twiho lo dimun, chule vachate jong leiset chunga punguhen, ati." 
Genesis1:23 Hitichun nilhah le jingkah chu ni ngani ahitai. 
Genesis1:24 Chuin Pathen'in, leisetnin ama ama chi dungjui cheh in hinna nei ganhing, gancha hon, akithol tho ganhing, chule leisetna gamsaho ama ama chi dungjui jin hin sepdoh hen ati. Chuin chuti chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis1:25 Chuin Pathen'in leisetna gamsa ama ama chi dung juijin, ganchaho ama ama achi dung jui cheh-un, leiset chunga akithol tho ganhing namkim ama ama chi dung jui cheh-in asemtan ahi. Chuin Pathen'in hichu amun pha asai." 
Genesis1:26 Chuin Pathen'in, Eihon eiho lim bangin, eiho bangtah-in mihem semu hitin; chule amahon twikhanglen na ngaho, vanlaijola vachate, ganchaho, chule leiset pumpi chung le leichunga akitholtho ganhing namkim chungah vaihomu hen, ati." 
Genesis1:27 Chuti chun Pathen'in ama lim bangin mihem asemin, aman amapa chu Pathen lim bangin asemin ahi; aman amani chu pasal le numei jin aseme." 
Genesis1:28 Chujou phatnin Pathen'in amani chu phatthei aboh-in, chule Pathen'in amani jah-a chun, Chipha lhonin, pung lhonin, vannoi leiset lodimsoh lhonin lang, nathun nunsah lhonin; chule twikhanglen na ngaho, vanlaijola vachate, chule leiset chunga vahle hinna nei ganhing jouse chungah thuneina neilhonin, ati." 
Genesis1:29 Chuin Pathen'in, Ven, vannoi leiset pumpi chunga amunei hampa jouse le, asunga amu um thingphung gathei jouse kapeh lhon ahin; hichu nangni dinga na an lhon hiding ahi." 
Genesis1:30 Chule leiset na gamsa namkim, vanlaijola vacha namkim, leiset chunga a-opma kithol ganhing namkim, hinna nei jouse dinga hampa louhing eng jouse a-an diuva kapeh ahitai, ati. Chuin chuti chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis1:31 Chuti chun athilsem namkim chu aven, chule veuvin, hichu aphalheh jengin ahi. Chuin nilhah le jingkah chu nigup ni ahitai." 
Genesis2:1 Chuti chun vanho le leiset, chule asunga um jouse chu akisem chaitan ahi." 
Genesis2:2 Chuin ani sagi nin Pathen'in athilsem anatoh chu achaijin; chule ni sagi nin athilsem anatoh jouse-a konin akicholdon ahi. 
Genesis2:3 Chuin Pathen'in nisagi ni chu phatthei aboh-in, asuthengtan ahi. Ajeh chu chuche nikho-a chu Pathen athilsem le athilbol anatoh jouse-a kicholdo-a ahi." 
Genesis2:4 Hiche hohi akisem laijuva van le leiset khanggui chu ahi; Pakai Pathen'in leiset le vanho asem nikho," 
Genesis2:5 Alei laija thingphung namkim leiset chunga aum masang, chule aleija hampa louhing namkim akedoh masang, (akisem laijuva van le leiset khanggui chu ahi.) Ajeh chu Pakai Pathen'in leisetna go ajuhsah hihlaijin, alei lhouding jong mi khatcha anaum hih laijin ahi." 
Genesis2:6 Ahin leisetna konin twimei ahungdohjin, chule leiset chung jouse achapkot jin ahi." 
Genesis2:7 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in tolla leivuija konin mihem asemin, anahhom sunga chun hinna hu alhakhumin ahile, hichun mipa chu hinna nei mihing ahung hitai." 
Genesis2:8 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in solama Eden'a chun honkhat asemin; aman sem mipa chu hikoma chun akoi tai. 
Genesis2:9 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in leisetna konin vetdinga hoitah, chule nehdinga tuitah theiphung namkim akedoh sah-in; chule honsung lailunga chun hinthing le ase apha hetna thing jong akedoh sah-in ahi." 
Genesis2:10 Chule hon chu chapkot dingin Eden'a kon chun vadunglen khat along doh-in; chule chua kon chun akikhenin vadung ka-li akiso tan ahi. 
Genesis2:11 Amasa pen chu amin Pishon ahin; hichu sana umna Havilah gam kolkhumin alongin ahi. 
Genesis2:12 Chule chuche Gama Sana chu aphan; chukoma chu bdellium le songgel jong aumin ahi. 
Genesis2:13 Vadung nina chu Gihon ahin; Ethiopia gam kolkhuma longa chu hiche hi ahi. 
Genesis2:14 Athumna vadung minchu Hiddekel ahin; Assyria gam solama longa chu ahi. Chule vadung lina chu Euphrates ahi. 
Genesis2:15 Chujouvin Pakai Pathen'in mipa chu aleilhou natong dingle angah dingin Eden hona chun akoitai 
Genesis2:16 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in mipa chu thupeh apen, Nangman honsunga thingga jouse chamlhat tah-a naneh thei ahi:" 
Genesis2:17 Amavang ase apha hetna thingga vang chu naneh louding ahi; ajeh chu hichu naneh ninileh thonlouva nangma nathi tei ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis2:18 Chule Pakai Pathen'in, Mipa hi achanga aum ding aphapoi, keiman ama dingin akithopi ding akilompi khat sempeh-ing kate, ati." 
Genesis2:19 Pakai Pathen'in leisetna konin gamsa jouse, chunga leng vachate jouse asemin; hicheng chu Adam'in amin asah dingin ahengah chun ahinpuijin ahi. Chuin Adam'in ganhing namkim amin asahbang cheh-in, aminu chu akisah dentai." 
Genesis2:20 Hiti chun Adam'in ganchaho, vanlaijola vachate, chule gamsaho jouse chu amin asahsoh keijin; ahivangin ama kithopi ding akilompi aumpon ahi." 
Genesis2:21 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in Adam chu a-imutmil sah-in ahile, ama a-imutan ahi. Chuin aman anahgu holah-a khat aladoh-in, hilaimun chu aphe-in ahuh bitnin ahi." 
Genesis2:22 Chujouvin Pakai Pathen'in mihempa-a kona alahdoh anahgu chun, numei khat asemin, amanu chu mihempa henga chun ahinpuijin ahi." 
Genesis2:23 Chuin Adam'in, Tuvangin hichehi keima gua kona gu, chule kaphe-a kona phe ahi. Amanuhi numei kisah ding ahi, ajehchu ama pasal'a kona kiladoh ahi, ati." 
Genesis2:24 Hijeh-a chu pasal'in anu le apa adalhah-a, ajia beh ding ahi; chule amani chu tikhat hilhon ding ahi." 
Genesis2:25 Chule mipa le a-inneipi chu ani lhonin sagoh keo ahilhonin, ahin ajahcha lhonpon ahi." 
Genesis3:1 Tun Pakai Pathen thilsem gamsaho jouse lah-a chun gul ajonchih penin ahi. Chuin aman numeinu jah-a, Pathen'in honsunga thingga khatcha jong naneh lhon lou ding ahi, tia aseijem? ati." 
Genesis3:2 Hichun numei nun gul jah-a, Keinin honsunga theiga ho kanethei lhonai;" 
Genesis3:3 Ahivangin hon lailunga um theiga vangkhu, Pathen'in, naneh lhon lou ding, tohjong natohkhah lhon louding ahi, achuti loule nathi lhonding ahi, tin aseije ati." 
Genesis3:4 Chuin gul chun numei nu jah-a, Nathi tahbeh lhon louding ahi;" 
Genesis3:5 Ajehchu hichu naneh lhon ni nileh namitlhon hahdoh ding, Pathen toh nabah lhona, apha ase nahet lhon ding ahi chu Pathen'in ahet ahi, tin aseitai." 
Genesis3:6 Chuin numei nu chun theiphung chu neh dinga aphat le, mitna dinga vetnom aum, chule mikhat chihsah nadinga dei umtah ahichu amuphatnin, amanun aga chu alouvin, anetan; chule a-inneipu jong chu apen ahile, amapan jong anetai." 
Genesis3:7 Chuin amani amitlhon ahung hahdoh tan, chule sagohkeu ahilhon ahelhon tai; chuin amanin theichang naho akilmat lhonin, vonin akivon lhontan ahi." 
Genesis3:8 Chuin ni ahung daijin amanin hona chun Pakai Pathen kholhah husa gin aja lhontan; chuin Adam le a-inneipi chu Pakai Pathen umna-a kon chun honsunga thinglah-a chun akisel lhontan ahi. 
Genesis3:9 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in Adam chu ahin kouvin, ajah-a, Hoija um nahim? ati." 
Genesis3:10 Chuin aman, Keiman honsunga nahusagin kajan, kasagoh keo kahijeh-in kakichan, kakisel ahi, ati." 
Genesis3:11 Chuin aman, Sagohkeo nahi kon naseipeh ham? Nehih-in tia kathupeh thingga chu naneh hitam? ati." 
Genesis3:12 Hichun mihem pan, Nangman kaumpi dinga neipeh numeinu hin thingga chu eipeh-a, kana neh ahitai, ati." 
Genesis3:13 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in numeinu jah-a, Nangman nabolhi ipi hitam ati. Chuin numeinu chun, gul'in eilhepma, kana neh ahitai, ati." 
Genesis3:14 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in gul jah-a chun, Nangman hitobanghi nabol jeh hin, ganchaho jouse chungle, jaova gamsa jouse chungvuma gaosap changa nahitai; Nangman na-oija lam najot ding, chule nahinlai sungse-a leivui naneh ding ahi." 
Genesis3:15 Chule nangma le numei nu kikah-a, chule nachilhah le amanu chilhah kah-a kidouna kakoi ding; chule aman nalu asuh chipma, nangman ama khotaljum nasuhchip ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis3:16 Aman numei nu jah-a chun, Keiman nalung gentheina le nanaovopna chu nasatah-a kapunsah ding; nangman nat thoh gim tah-a cha nahin ding; nalung ngaichat chu na inneipu-a ding hiding, chule aman nachunga vai ahomding ahi, ati." 
Genesis3:17 Chule aman Adam jah-a, Nangman na inneipi thu nangaija, nangman nanehlou ding ahi, tia kathupeh thingga chu naneh tah jehchun: Nangma jala leiset kigaosapmah ahitai; nangman nahin laisungse-a, gimtah-a na natoh-a aga naneh ding ahi." 
Genesis3:18 Chule nangma-a dinga ling le meithai seltholing ahin kedohsah ding; chule nangman loujaova hampa louhing naneh ding ahi. 
Genesis3:19 Nangma leisetna kona kiladoh nahin, leisetna nakilekit kahse-a namaija ulsa soh-a kona anneh naneh ding ahi. Ajehchu nangma leivui nahin, leivuija nakile kitding ahi, ati." 
Genesis3:20 Chuin Adam'in a-inneipi min chu Eve asahtai; ajeh chu amanu mihing jouse Nu ahi 
Genesis3:21 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in Adam le a-inneipi chu savunin sangkhol asempeh-in, avon pehtan ahi." 
Genesis3:22 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in, Vetan, mihem khu eiho lah-a khat bangin ase apha ahetthei tai. Chule tun, ijemtin akhut hinlhang dohhen lang, hing thingga jongkhu hinlou henlang, netaleh, tonsotna hingding ahitai, ati." 
Genesis3:23 Hijeh chun akilahdohna leiset chu laibot-a natong dingin, Pakai Pathen'in ama chu Eden hona konin asoldoh tan ahi." 
Genesis3:24 Chuti chun mipa chu anodoh-in; chule hinthing lampi chu ngahdingin Cherubim le akipei lele meikou chemjam chu Eden hon solama akoitan ahi. 
Genesis4:1 Chuin Adam chun a-inneipi Eve chu akitimat pin ahile, amanun nao avopmin, Cain ahingin, chule amanun, Pakaiya konin pasal khat kaneitai, ati." 
Genesis4:2 Chuin amanun anaopa Abel ahing kitnin ahi. Chuin Abel chu kelngoi vah-in apangin, ahin Cain vang chu loulhou natongin apangin ahi." 
Genesis4:3 Chuin khonung phasah-in, Cain'in alhosoh alouga chu ahin choijin, Pakai henga atohtan ahi." 
Genesis4:4 Chuin Abel jong chun akelngoihon asoh masapen lah-a athaopen chu ahin choijin ahi. Chuin Pakai chu Abel le athilto-a chun alung lhaijin ahi. 
Genesis4:5 Ahin Cain le athilto chunga vang alung lhai tapon ahi. Chuphat nin Cain chu alungsa talheh jengin, chule amai athim jengtan ahi." 
Genesis4:6 Chuin Pakaiyin Cain jah-a, Ibola nalungsat ham? Chule ibola namai thima ham?" 
Genesis4:7 Nangman phatah-a nabola ahile, nangma sanlouva naum dehding ham? Ahin phatah-a nabol lou vangle, chonsetnin kot bula nachang jinge. Chule angaichat chu nangma-a ding ahin, hijongle nangman ama chunga vai nahom ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis4:8 Chuin Cain'in anaopa Abel chu akihoulimpin; chuin ahitin ahi, amani gamlah-a aumpet lhonin, Cain chu anaopa Abel chunga achun, athat tai." 
Genesis4:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Cain jah-a, nanaopa Abel hoija umham? ati. Chuin aman, kahepoi; keima kanaopa ching beh kahim? ati." 
Genesis4:10 Chuin aman, Ipi nabol hitam? Nanaopa thisan aw chu leisetna konin kahengah ahung pengdoh-e." 
Genesis4:11 Chule tun nakhutna kona nanaopa thisan choplutna leisetna kona nangma kigaosap ma nahitai. 
Genesis4:12 Nangman lei nalaija na natoh tengle, nangma-a dinga ahina banga ga ahinsepdoh tahlou ding; nangma leiset chunga jamlele leh vahlele mi nahiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis4:13 Chuin Cain'in Pakai jah-a, Ka talen mat hi kathoh jou kal val ahitai." 
Genesis4:14 Vetan, nangman tunin leiset chunga konin neinodoh tan; chule nangma maikoh-a kona selmanga umding kahitai; chule keima leiset chunga ajamlele leh vahle-le kahiding ahitan; chule hung hiti ding ahi, keima eimu mu-a chun eithading ahitai, ati." 
Genesis4:15 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Hijeh chun koihile Cain that chan chu, ajat sagi-a achunga phu kilading ahi, ati. Chuin koiman ama amua atha louna dingin, Pakaiyin Cain chunga chun melchihna akoitan ahi." 
Genesis4:16 Chuin Cain Pakai angsunga konin apotdoh-in, Eden solama Nod Gama achengtai." 
Genesis4:17 Chuin Cain'in a-inneipi akitimatpin ahile, amanu agaijin Enoch ahingin ahi. Chuin aman khopi khat asemin, achapa min dungjuijin khopi chu Enoch asahtai" 
Genesis4:18 Chuin Enoch chun Irad ahingin; Irad chun Mehujael ahingin; Mehujael'in Methushael ahingin; chule Methushael'in Lamech ahingin, ahi." 
Genesis4:19 Chuin Lamech chun jini akipuijin: khatnu min chu Adah ahin, khat joh nu min chu Zillah ahi." 
Genesis4:20 Chuin Adah chun Jabal ahingin; ama chu pon in'a chenghole gancha vulteho bulpipa ahi. 
Genesis4:21 Chule anaopa min chu Jubal ahin; amachu saiging le gosem mut teho jouse bulpipa ahi. 
Genesis4:22 Chule Zillah'in jong Tubal-Cain ahingin; ama chu sum-eng le thih manchah semho hila pang ahi.Chule Tubal-Cain sopinu chu Naamah ahi. 
Genesis4:23 Chuin Lamech chun ajiteni jah-a chun, Adah le Zillah ka-aw ngai lhonin, nangni Lamech inneipi teni, kathusei ngailhonin. Ajehchu mikhat eimavo jeh-in kathatnin, chule gollhang khat eisuhkhah jeh-in kathatnin ahi." 
Genesis4:24 Cain chunga ajat sagi-a phu kilading ahile, tahbeh-a Lamech chunga sagi mun somsagi vei kilading ahi, ati." 
Genesis4:25 Chuin Adam'in a-inneipi chu akitimatpi kitnin ahile, amanun chapa khat ahingin, amin Seth asahtai. Ajehchu amanun, Cain'in atha Abel khel chun, Pathen'in chikhai ding khat eipetai, ati." 
Genesis4:26 Chuin Seth amatah jong chun chapa khat ahingin, amin Enosh asah tai. Hiche-a pat chun mihem ten Pakai min akoupan taovin ahi." 
Genesis5:1 Hichehi Adam khangguiho lekhabu ahi. Pathen'in mihem asemni chun, aman Pathen tobangin amachu asemin ahi." 
Genesis5:2 Aman amani chu Pasal le numei jin asemin; chuin phatthei aboh-in, chule amani asem nikho chun aminlhon chu Adam asah tan ahi." 
Genesis5:3 Chuin Adam kum jakhat le kum somthum alhinin, ama tobang le ama lim bangin chapa khat ahingin; amin Seth asahtan ahi." 
Genesis5:4 Chuin Seth ahin nungin Adam kum jaget ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:5 Chule Adam damsung hinkho chu abonchan kum jako le kum somthum ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:6 Chuin Seth kum jakhatle kum nga alhinin, Enosh ahingin ahi" 
Genesis5:7 Enosh ahin nungin Seth kum jagetle kum sagi ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:8 Chule Seth damsung hinkho chu abonchan kum jako le kum somleni ahin. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:9 Chuin Enosh kum somko alhinin, Cainan ahinge." 
Genesis5:10 Chuin Cainan ahin nungin, Enosh kum jaget leh kum somlenga ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:11 Chule Enosh damsung hinkho chu abonchan kum jakole kumnga ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:12 Chuin Cainan kum somsagi alhinin, Mahalalel ahinge." 
Genesis5:13 Chuin Mahalalel ahin nungin Cainan kum jaget le kum somli ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:14 Chule Cainan damsung hinkho chu abonchan kum jakole som ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:15 Chuin Mahalalel kum somgup le kum nga alhinin, Jared ahinge." 
Genesis5:16 Chuin Jared ahin nungin Mahalalel kum jaget le kum somthum ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:17 Chule Mahalalel damsung hinkho chu abonchan kum jaget le kum somko le kum nga ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:18 Chuin Jared kum jakhat le kum somgup le kumni alhinin, Enoch ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:19 Chuin Enoch ahin nungin, Jared kum jaget ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:20 Chuin Jared damsung hinkho abonchan kum jakole kum somgup le kumni ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:21 Chuin Enoch kum somgup le kumnga alhinin, Methuselah ahinge." 
Genesis5:22 Chuin Methuselah ahin nungin, Enoch kum jathum Pathen toh alhonlen, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:23 Chule Enoch hinkho damsung chu abonchan kum jathum le kum somgup le kum nga ahi. 
Genesis5:24 Chule Enoch chu Pathen toh analhon len; chuin ama aum tapoi: ajehchu Pathen'in ama alamang ahitai. 
Genesis5:25 Chuin Methuselah kum jakhat le kum somget le kum sagi alhinin, Lamech ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:26 Chuin Lamech ahin nungin Methuselah kum jasagi le kum somget le kumni ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:27 Chule Methuselah hinkho damsung chu abonchan kum jako le kum somgup toh kum ko ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:28 Chuin Lamech chu kum jakhatle kum somget le kumni alhinin, chapa khat ahinge." 
Genesis5:29 Chuin aman, Amahin Pakaiyin leiset agaosapma kona ikhutnuva inatoh le itohgim naova kona eilung monsah dingu ahi atin, amin Noah asahtai." 
Genesis5:30 Chuin Noah ahin nungin Lamech kum janga le kum somko le kum nga ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis5:31 Chule Lamech hinkho damsung chu abonchan kum jasagi le kum somsagi le kum sagi ahi. Chuin ama athitai. 
Genesis5:32 Chuin Noah kum janga alhinin, Shem, Ham chule Japheth ahingin ahi." 
Genesis6:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, leiset chunga mihemho ahung pun patnuva, amaho-a dinga chanute ahungpen phatnin," 
Genesis6:2 Pathen chapate chun mihem chanute amel hoithei lheh-u chu amuvin; chuin amahon adei deiju chu ji dingin akilah taovin ahi. 
Genesis6:3 Chuin Pakaiyin, Kalhagao a-itih-in mihemte toh boijing ponte, ajeh chu ama tahsa phe ahin; hijongle ahinkho chu kum jakhatle kum somni hiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis6:4 Chuche nikho laichun leiset chunga mihat ho aumun; chule hiche nung jong chun, Pathen chapate mihem chanute koma ahung tengule, amahon amaho dingchun chate ahinpeh jiuvin; amaho chu gollui laija mihat ho, chule mi minthangho ahiuvin ahi." 
Genesis6:5 Chuin Pathen'in leiset chunga mihem khan gitlouna anasalheh jenge ti le, tantih neilouva alunggil sunga athil ngaito jouse gitlouna jeng ahi chu amutan ahi." 
Genesis6:6 Chuin hichun Pathen'in leisetna mihem asem chu akisih sahtan; chule lungsung asuna lheh-in ahi. 
Genesis6:7 Chuin Pakaiyin, Keiman leiset chunga konhin kasemsa mihemhi sumanghel tange; mihem ahin, gamsa ahin, akithol tho ganhing ahin, chule vanlaijola leng vacha ahin; ajehchu amaho kanasem hi kakisih tai, ati." 
Genesis6:8 Ahivangin Pakai mitmun Noah chu lunglhaina ana changin ahi. 
Genesis6:9 Hichehohi Noah khangguiho chu ahi: Noah chu michondih tah le khanga miho lah-a nolnabei ahin, chule Noah Pathen toh analhon len ahi." 
Genesis6:10 Chule Noah'in chapa thum, Shem, Ham chule Japheth ahingin ahi." 
Genesis6:11 Leiset chu Pathen mitmun asedehtan, leiset chu hunamna-in adimset jeng tan ahi." 
Genesis6:12 Chuin Pathen'in leiset chu aven ahile, veuvin, hichu asedeh tan ahi; ajehchu tahsa jousen leiset chunga alampiu asuboh taovin ahi." 
Genesis6:13 Chuin Pathen'in Noah jah-a, Tahsaphe jouse kichaina chu ka-angsung ahung lhung tai; ajehchu amaho jeh-in leiset chunghi hunam adimtan; chule ven, keiman amahohi leiset toh kasuhmang thading ahitai." 
Genesis6:14 Nangman Gopher thingin Kong innei khat kisemin, kong sunga chun indanho semin, chule asung apo thingnaijin loijin." 
Genesis6:15 Chule hichehi nangman nasem dingdan agong chu ahi: Kong innei chu adung, tong jathum, avai tong somnga chule atun tong somthum hiding ahi." 
Genesis6:16 Nangman kong innei ja chu bangkot khat nasem ding, chule hichu achung lama kon tong khatna najoding; chule kong innei kot pi chu apanga nahon ding; chule dan noinung, dan nina, chule dan thumna nasem ding ahi." 
Genesis6:17 Chule ven, Keima, keimatah ngeijin vannoi'a hinna hunei tahsaphe jouse sumang dinga leiset chunga twisang kahin letsah ding; chule leisetna um jouse thigam ding ahi." 
Genesis6:18 Ahivangin nangma toh kakitepna kaphudoh ding; chule nangma nachapate, na inneipi, chule nachapate inneipite toh Kong'a nalut dingu ahi." 
Genesis6:19 Chule tahsaphe-a hing jouse-a kona ganhing namkim lah-a akoptocheh nangma toh hing khom dinga, Kong innei sunga chu anu khat le achal khatcheh nahinpuilut ding ahi." 
Genesis6:20 Vachate amaho jat dungjuija, ganchaho ama ama jat dungjui cheh-a, chule leisetna vah ganhing ama jat dungjui cheh-a, ajat jouse akopto cheh-a vah hing dinga nahenga hung diu ahi." 
Genesis6:21 Chule nangman nangma dinga nehthei an jouse nalah-a, chule nakoma nakhol khom ding; chule hichu nangma le amaho dinga an hiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis6:22 Chutichun Noah'in Pathen'in athu apeh jouse bangtah-in aboltan ahi. 
Genesis7:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Noah jah-a, Nangma le na-insung mite nabonchaovin Kong innei sunga hunglut nun; ajehchu hiche khangmite lah-a hin kamitmun nangma michonpha nahi." 
Genesis7:2 Sa theng jouse lah-a kona anu le achal to-sagi; chule sathenglou jouse lah-a kona anule achal to-ni cheh nangma toh umkhom dinga nalah ding; 
Genesis7:3 Vanlaijola leng vachate jong leiset chung pumpi-a achilhah-u aumjing nadinga, anu le achal to-sagi nalah ding ahi." 
Genesis7:4 Ni sagi joule keiman leiset chunga nisomli le jan somli go kajuhsah ding; chule keiman kasemsa ahingthei jouse leisetna kona kasuhmang ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis7:5 Chuin Noah'in Pakaiyin thu apeh jouse bangtah chun aboltan ahi. 
Genesis7:6 Chule leiset chunga twisanglet chun Noah kum jagup alhingtan ahi. 
Genesis7:7 Chuin Noah chu achapate toh, a-inneipi toh, chule achapate inneipiho toh twisang letding jeh chun kong innei sunga alut taovin ahi." 
Genesis7:8 Satheng lah-a kon, sathenglou lah-a kon, vachate lah-a kon, chule leiset na akitholtho ganhing jouse lah-a konin," 
Genesis7:9 Pathen'in Noah koma athupeh bangtah chun, anu le achal akopto cheh-in Noah koma kong innei sunga chun alut taovin ahi." 
Genesis7:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, ni sagi jouchun leiset chunga chun twi chu ahung lentan ahi." 
Genesis7:11 Noah hinkho kum jagup alhinna, alhani channa, nisom le nisagi ni, chuche nitah chun twipi thuhtah nah ho jouse-a ajaltan, chule van bangkot ho akihongtan ahi." 
Genesis7:12 Chule vannoi leiset chunga chun nisomli le jan somli go aju tan ahi. 
Genesis7:13 Chuche nitah chun Noah le Noah chapate Shem, Ham chule Japheth, chule Noah inneipi le achapate inneipi thum chu kong innei sunga chun alut taove." 
Genesis7:14 Amaho, chule gamsa jouse ama ama jat dungjui cheh-in, gancha jouse ama ama jat dungjui cheh-in, leiset na a-opma kitholtho ganhing jouse ama ama jat dungjui cheh, chule vacha namkim ama ama jat dung jui cheh-in alutsoh keijun ahi." 
Genesis7:15 Chuin hinnahu nei tahsaphe chengse chu akopto cheh-in, Noah henga kong innei sunga chun alut taove." 
Genesis7:16 Chuin Pathen'in ama thu apeh bangtah-in, alut chasun chu tahsaphe pojouse anu le apa akopcheh-in alutnun ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin kot chu akhah tan ahi." 
Genesis7:17 Chuin leiset chunga chun nisomli twisang alenin; chuin twi akhang cheh cheh-in, kong innei chu aletdoh-in, chule tolla konin akikhang doh tan ahi." 
Genesis7:18 Chule twi chu akhangin, chule leiset chunga chun hatah-in akhang tan; chuin kong innei chu twi chungah akitol len ahi." 
Genesis7:19 Chule leiset chunga twi chu nasatah-in akhang jengtan; chuin van noija lhangsang ho jouse chu achuptan ahi. 
Genesis7:20 Mol jouse chupmin, tong som le tong nga geijin twi chu akikhang tan ahi." 
Genesis7:21 Hichun leiset chunga vahle tahsaphe po jouse, vachate jong, ganchaho jong, gamsa hojong, tolla a-opma kithol ganhing hojong, mihem jouse jong athigam heltan ahi." 
Genesis7:22 Anah hom sunga hinna hunei, tolgoa umjouse athigam tan ahi." 
Genesis7:23 Hitichun leiset na cheng ahingthei jouse, mihem, gancha, a-opma kithol jouse, chule vanlaijola vachate abonchan leisetna konin akisumang tan ahi. Noah le kong innei sunga umho bouchu ahingin aumun ahi." 
Genesis7:24 Chuti chun ni jakhat le nisomnga geijin, leiset chunga twi avei denin ahi." 
Genesis8:1 Chuin Pathen'in Noah le Kong innei sunga aumpi hinna nei ganhing chengse le ganchaho abonchan ageldoh-in ahi. Hichun Pathen'in vannoi leiset na hui anunsah in ahile, twi chu akemsuh tan ahi." 
Genesis8:2 Twipi thuhtah nah-ho leh van bangkot hochu akikhahtan, chule van'a kona go hungju chu atang tan ahi." 
Genesis8:3 Chuin twiho chu leisetna konin tanglouvin akemsuh-in: chule ni jakhat le nisomnga jouvin twi chu akang tan ahi. 
Genesis8:4 Chuin lhasagi channa, nisom le nisagi nin kong innei chu Ararat molchunga chun akingatan ahi." 
Genesis8:5 Chuin lhasom channa geijin twi chu tanglouvin akemsuh suh-in; lhasom channa nimasa ni chun molvum chu akimutan ahi. 
Genesis8:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, nisomli jouvin Noah'in asem kong innei bangkot chu ahongin;" 
Genesis8:7 Chule va-ah khat alendoh sah-in ahile, leiset na kona twi chu akan kahsen alengle len ahi." 
Genesis8:8 Chuin leiset na twi chu kangtam ti hetna dingin ama-a konin vakhu khat alendoh sah kitnin ahi. 
Genesis8:9 Ahivangin leiset pumpi chunga twi aum nahlai jeh-in, vakhu chun akenga chuh-a kingah na ding mun amujoupon, ama heng lam Kong inneija chun ahung kile kittan ahi. Chuin aman akhut alhangdoh in vakhu chu Kong innei sunga chun alalut tai." 
Genesis8:10 Chuin ama ni sagi akhongai kitnin; chuin vakhu chu kong innei sunga konin alhadoh kitnin ahi. 
Genesis8:11 Chuin nilhah lamin vakhu chu ahenga ahung kile kitnin; chule veuvin, amuh-a Olive na kiloulha thah aumin ahi. Hichun Noah'in leiset na konin twi akangtai ti ahetan ahi." 
Genesis8:12 Chuin ni sagima akhongai be kitnin; chuin vakhu chu alendohsah kitnin ahile, ahengah ahung kilekit tapon ahi." 
Genesis8:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, kum jagup le kum khat na, lhamasa, chule ni masapen nichun leiset na konin twi chu akangtan ahi. Chuin Noah'in akong innei khuna chu ahohlhan, aven ahile, veuvin, leiset chunga twi chu akang tan ahi." 
Genesis8:14 Chuin alhani channa, nisomni le ni sagi ni chun tol chu agotan ahi." 
Genesis8:15 Chuin Pathen'in Noah jah-a hitin thu aseije," 
Genesis8:16 Kong innei sunga konin nangma, na inneipi, nachapate, chule nachapate inneipi te toh potdoh taovin." 
Genesis8:17 Naumpi hinna nei jouse, ganhing namkim, vacha ho, gancha ho, chule tolla vah jouse chu leiset chunga chilhah tamtah neiding, hinpha ding, chule pungjal dingin kong'a konin hinpuidoh tan, ati." 
Genesis8:18 Hichun Noah chu achapate, a-inneipi, chule achapate inneipite toh apotdoh taovin ahi." 
Genesis8:19 Gamsa jouse, a-opma kithol ganhing jouse, vachate jouse, chule leiset na akithol jouse chu, ama ama jat dung jui cheh-in kong innei ja konin apotdoh taove." 
Genesis8:20 Chuin Noah'in Pakaiya dingin maicham khat asemin; satheng jouse-a konle vacha theng jouse-a konin alan, maicham chunga govam thilton atoh tan ahi." 
Genesis8:21 Chuin Pakaiyin agimnam tuitah chu ajan, Pakaiyin alungthimin, keiman mihem jeh-in leiset gaosap kit taponge; ajehchu mihem lungsunga angaitona jouse hi achapana pat phaloupan ahitai; chule keiman kanabol banghin avelin hinna nei ganhing ho sumang taponge." 
Genesis8:22 Vannoi leiset aumlai chansea, muchi tu phat le chang-at phat, dap le sat, phalbi le nipi, sun le jan tang talou ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis9:1 Chuin Pathen'in Noah le achapate chu phatthei aboh-in, ajah uvah, Hin phaovin lang pungthei jun, chule leiset lodim soh-un." 
Genesis9:2 Chule leiset chunga gamsa jouse, vanlaijola leng vachate jouse, chule tolla vah ganhing jouse, twikhanglen na nga jouse chunga nangho ginna le kichatna umcheh ding ahi; amaho khu nangho khutna kapehdoh ahitai." 
Genesis9:3 Achatloh thei ganhing jouse nangho an ding ahi, anche louhing kapeh banga thil jouse kapeh nahiuve." 
Genesis9:4 Amavang sa chu ahinna puma, hichu athisan ahin, naneh lou dingu ahi." 
Genesis9:5 Chule thonlouva nahinnao thisan phu chu kalah ding; gamsa jouse khutna kon le, mihem khutna kona kalah ding; mitin sopi jouse khutna kona keiman mihem hinna phu chu kalah ding ahi" 
Genesis9:6 Koi hile mihem thisan so-a chu ama thisan jong mihemin asoding ahi. Ajehchu aman Pathen lim banga mihem asem ahi. 
Genesis9:7 Chule nangho, hinpha uvin, chule punguvin; leiset chunga hin chilhah tamtah hinguvin, chule asunga hin hapunin pungun, ati." 
Genesis9:8 Chuin Pathen'in Noah le aumpi achapate jah-a thu aseijin," 
Genesis9:9 Veuvin, keiman nangho le nangho nunga nachilhah teo toh kakitepna kaphutdetne;" 
Genesis9:10 Chule nangma toh uma hinna nei ganhing jouse, vachate, ganchate, chule leisetna naumpi gamsa chengse; Kong innei sunga kona hung potdoh jouse-a kona leiset chunga gamsa jouse toh kakitepna kaphutdetnin ahi." 
Genesis9:11 Chule keiman nangma toh kakitepna kaphudet ding; tahsaphe pojouse twisang letna avela kisumang kit talou ding; chule leiset sumang dinga jong twisang lenkit talou ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis9:12 Chuin Pathen'in, Hichehi keima le nangma chule nangma toh umkhom hinna nei ganhing jouse toh akhang akhanga dinga kakitepna melchihna ahi:" 
Genesis9:13 Keiman ka lhagui meilah-a kakoije, hichehi keima le leiset kah-a kitepna melchihna ahi." 
Genesis9:14 Chule hitiding ahi, Keiman leiset chunga meibol kahin kaisah teng, meilah-a chu lhagui kimuding ahin;" 
Genesis9:15 Chule keiman nangho le tahsaphe po hinna nei ganhing jouse toh kakitepna chu kageldoh ding; twi chu tahsaphe pojouse sumang dinga lenkit talou ding ahi. 
Genesis9:16 Chule lhagui chu meilah-a umding, Pathen le leiset chunga tahsaphe po hinna nei ganhing jouse toh tonsotna dinga kakitepna chu kageldohna dinga, hichu kahin vetding ahi, ati." 
Genesis9:17 Chuin Pathen'in Noah jah-a, hichehi keima le leiset chunga tahsaphe po jouse kikah-a kaphudoh kakitepna melchihna ahi, ati." 
Genesis9:18 Kong innei sunga kona potdoh Noah chapate chu Shem, Ham chule Japheth ahiuve: chule Ham chu Canaan pa ahi." 
Genesis9:19 Hiche hohi Noah chapate thumho chu ahiuvin; chule amaho-a kona hi leiset pumpi losoh-a uma ahi. 
Genesis9:20 Chuin Noah'in loulhou mi ahunghi panin, chule lengpilei abolin ahi." 
Genesis9:21 Chuin aman lengpitwi adonin ahile akhamtan; apon in sunga chun pon sillouvin aumtan ahi. 
Genesis9:22 Chuin Canaan pa Ham chun apa sagohkeu chu amun, inpo-a um asopiteni jah-a chun aseijin ahi." 
Genesis9:23 Chuin Shem le Japheth'in pon alalhonin, alengkou gela abang lhonin, anungtoi lhonin, apao sagohkeu chu pon aga khu lhonin; chule amailhon anung ngat lhonin, apao sagohkeu chu amulhon pon ahi." 
Genesis9:24 Chuin Noah alengpitwi khama konin ahung limdoh-in, achapa neojon abolna chu ahetan ahi." 
Genesis9:25 Chuin aman, Canaan chungah gaosap lhunghen, asopi teni henga soh ho soh hihen, ati." 
Genesis9:26 Chuin aman, Shem Pakai Pathen chu nunnom hen, chule Canaan chu asoh-in panghen." 
Genesis9:27 Pathen'in Japheth khantousah hen, chule ama Shem pon in ho-a chengding; chule Canaan chu asoh hiding ahi." 
Genesis9:28 Chuin twisanglet nungin Noah kum jathum le kum somnga ahing nalaijin ahi. 
Genesis9:29 Chule Noah hinkho abonchan kum jakole kum somnga ahi. Chuin ama athitan ahi. 
Genesis10:1 Hichehi Noah chapate Shem, Ham chule Japheth akhanggui lhah-u ahi: Twisanglet nung chun amahon chapate ahingun ahi." 
Genesis10:2 Japheth achapate chu, Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech chule Tiras ahiuve." 
Genesis10:3 Chule Gomer chapate chu, Ashkenaz, Riphath, chule Togarmah ahiuve." 
Genesis10:4 Chule Javan chapate chu, Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim chuleh Dodanim ahiuve." 
Genesis10:5 Hiteho-a kon chun twikol gama cheng chidang namdangho chu apao dungjui cheh le ama inko dungjui cheh, chule anam dung jui cheh-un ahung kikhen jal taovin ahi." 
Genesis10:6 Chule Ham chapate chu, Cush, Mizraim, Put chule Canaan ahiuve." 
Genesis10:7 Chule Cush chapate chu, Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, chuleh Sabtecha ahiuve. Chule Raamah chapateni chu, Sheba le Dedan ahilhone." 
Genesis10:8 Chuin Cush'in Nimrod ahingin; ama chu leiset chunga mi thahat tahkhat ahung hitan ahi. 
Genesis10:9 Ama chu Pakai mitmun gamleng hattah ahin; hijeh chun, Pakai mitmu-a gamleng hattah Nimrod bangin, tin akiseijin ahi." 
Genesis10:10 Chule alenggam kipatna chu Shinar gamsunga um Babel, Erech, Accad, chule Calneh ahi." 
Genesis10:11 Chuche gama kon chun Assyria gama alutnin, Nineveh, Rehoboth, chule Calah khopi asadoh-in," 
Genesis10:12 Chule Nineveh le Calah kikah-a chun Resen atungdoh-e; hichu khopi lentah ahi. 
Genesis10:13 Chuin Mizraim'in Ludim, Anamin, Lehabim, chule Naphtuhim," 
Genesis10:14 Pathrusim chule Casluhim, (ama-a kona chu Philistine te hungdoh ahi,) chule Caphtorim ahingin ahi." 
Genesis10:15 Chuin Canaan'in apeng masa pen Sidon ahingin, chuin Heth;" 
Genesis10:16 Jebus miho, Amor miho, Girgas miho," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv miho, Ark miho, Sin miho," 
Genesis10:18 Arvad miho, Zemar miho, chule Hamath miho ahingin ahi. Chule khonungin Canaan mite insungmi ho gamtinnah akithejal taovin ahi." 
Genesis10:19 Chule Canaan mite gamgi chu Sidon'a pat Gerar lang jonin Gaza geijin akilhunglut peh-in, Sodom lam jonin akilhungin, Gomorrah aphan, Admah ahinphan, chule Zeboiim ahopan, Lasha geijin akilhunglut peh-e." 
Genesis10:20 Hite hohi aphung aphung cheh, apao apao cheh, agam agam cheh, chule anam dol cheh-a Ham son ahiuve." 
Genesis10:21 Japheth upa, Eber chate pubulpi Shem jong chun chanute chapate ahingin ahi." 
Genesis10:22 Shem chapate chu, Elam, Asshur, Arphaxad, Lud, chule Aram ahiuve." 
Genesis10:23 Chule Aram chate chu, Uz, Hul, Gether chule Mash ahiuve." 
Genesis10:24 Chuin Arphaxad'in Shelah ahingin, chule Shelah'in Eber ahinge." 
Genesis10:25 Chuin Eber'in chapa ni ahingin: khatpa min chu Peleg ahi, ajehchu ama khanga vannoi leiset kikhen ahi; chule asopipa min chu Joktan ahi." 
Genesis10:26 Chuin Joktan'in Almodad, Shaleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah," 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimael, Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 Ophir, Havilah, chule Jobab ahinge: hichengse hi Joktan chapate ahiuve." 
Genesis10:29 Ophir, Havilah, chule Jobab ahinge: hichengse hi Joktan chapate ahiuve." 
Genesis10:30 Chule achennao gam chu Mesha'a patna Sephar lam jotna solam molsang chan ahi. 
Genesis10:31 Hichenghi hi aphung dung jui cheh-u, apao dung jui cheh-u, agamkai dung jui cheh-u, chule anam dung jui cheh uva Shem chapate chu ahiuve." 
Genesis10:32 Hicheng hi Noah chate insungmi, akhang dung juile anam dung juija ahiuve: chule amaho-a kona hi twisanglet nunga vannoi leiset na namtin hi kihom khena ahi." 
Genesis11:1 Chule vannoi leiset pumpi chun paokhat hamkhat athouvin ahi. 
Genesis11:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, amaho solama acheuvin ahile, Shinar gama phaicham khat amuvin; hia chun amaho acheng taovin ahi." 
Genesis11:3 Chuin amahole ama ho akihouvun, Hungun, eihon cheh dengu hitin, phatah in goutah-u hite, akitiuve. Chuin amahon song khelin cheh amangun, athoimatna khelin vahaibon amangun ahi." 
Genesis11:4 Chuin amahon, Hungun, eihon eiho dingin khopi khat le insang tah khat, aleh van ho sunphan sao hitin; chule iminu thansah-u hite, achuti louleh eiho vannoi leiset pumpi-ah kithecheh getnu hite, atiuve." 
Genesis11:5 Chuin mihem chate khopi leh insang sah chu ve dingin Pakai chu ahung kum lhan ahi. 
Genesis11:6 Chuin Pakaiyin, Veuvin, mihohi pumkhat le paokhat ahiuvin; chule hichehi amahon abol patnu ahitai: chule tu-a amahon boldinga alunggotnu chu imachan asuhtang loudiu ahi." 
Genesis11:7 Hungun, eiho kumsuh-u hitin, khatnin khat thusei ahetmo na diuvin, khu kom akhun apaovu gasucheh uhite, ati." 
Genesis11:8 Chuti chun Pakaiyin amaho chu chua kon chun vannoi leiset pumpi chungah akhenchehtan ahi. Chuin amahon akhopi sah-u chu adalha taove. 
Genesis11:9 Hijeh chun chukom mun chu Babel asah taove; ajehchu chukom munna Pakaiyin vannoi pumpi pao asuhcheh-a; chule chukoma kona chu Pakaiyin amaho chu vannoi leiset pumpi-a athecheh ahi. 
Genesis11:10 Hiche hohi Shem khanggui hochu ahiuve: Shem kum jakhat alhinin, twisanglet nung kumni jouvin Arphaxad ahingin ahi" 
Genesis11:11 Chule Arphaxad ahin nungin Shem kum janga ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:12 Chuin Arphaxad kum jathum le somthum le nga alhinin, Shelah ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:13 Chule Shelah ahin nungin Arphaxad kum jali le kum thum ahingin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:14 Chuin Shelah kum somthum alhinin, Eber ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:15 Chuin Eber ahin nungin Shelah kum jali le kum somthum ahing nalaijin, chanute le chapate ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:16 Chuin Eber kum somthum le kum li alhinin, Peleg ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:17 Chule Peleg ahin nungin, Eber kum jali le kum somthum ahing nalaijin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:18 Chuin Peleg kum somthum alhinin, Reu ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:19 Chule Reu ahin nungin Peleg kum jani le kum ko ahing nalaijin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi" 
Genesis11:20 Chuin Reu kum somthum le kum ni alhinin, Serug ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:21 Chule Serug ahin nungin Reu kum jani le kum sagi ahing nalaijin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:22 Chuin Serug kum somthum alhinin, Nahor ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:23 Chule Nahor ahin nungin Serug kum jani ahing nalaijin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:24 Chuin Nahor kum somni le kum ko alhinin, Terah ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:25 Chule Terah ahin nungin, Nahor kum jakhat le kum somleko ahing nalaijin, chapate le chanute ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:26 Chuin Terah kum somsagi alhinin Abram, Nahor, chule Haran ahingin ahi." 
Genesis11:27 Tun hicheng hi Terah khanggui ahi: Terah in Abram, Nahor chule Haran ahingin, chule Haran-in Lot ahingin, ahi." 
Genesis11:28 Chuin Haran chu apa Terah athi masangin apenna Chaldea gama Ur kho-a chun athitan. 
Genesis11:29 Abram le Nahor vang chun ji anei gel lhonin: Abram jinu chu amin Sarai ahin, Nahor jinu min chu Milkah ahin, Haran chanu ahi; amahi Milkah le Iscah hingah apalhon ahi." 
Genesis11:30 Ahivangin Sarai chu aching ahin, cha neilou ahi." 
Genesis11:31 Chuin Terah chun achapa Abram, atupa Haran chapa Lot, chule amounu Sarai, Abram inneipi chu apuijin, amaho chu Chaldea gama Ur'a konchun Canaan gama dingin ache taovin ahi. Chuin Amaho Haran alhungun, chukoma chun acheng taovin ahi." 
Genesis11:32 Chuin Terah hinkho chu kum jani le kum nga ahin; Terah Haran mun'a athitan ahi. 
Genesis12:1 Tun Pakaiyin Abram jah-a, Nagama kon, naphung chanpi ho-a kon, chule napa insunga konin potdoh inlang, keiman nangma kavetsah ding gama chun chen;" 
Genesis12:2 Chule keiman nangma nam lentah khatna kasemding, chule keiman nangma phatthei kaboh-a, namin kaloupisah ding; chule nangma phatthei boh chang nahiding, ahi." 
Genesis12:3 Chule nangma phatthei naboh ho chu keiman phatthei kabohding, chule na gaosap hochu kagaosap ding ahi; chule nangma-a kona leisetna insung jouse phatthei chang diu ahi, ati." 
Genesis12:4 Chuti chun Pakaiyin ajah-a aseibang chun Abram akipatdoh tan; chule Lot jong amatoh akilhonin ahi. Chule Haran'a kona akipatdoh chun Abram kum somsagi le kum nga ahitai. 
Genesis12:5 Chuin Abram'in a-inneipi Sarai, asopipa chapa Lot, alamdoh thil jouse, chule Haran'a peng amite jouse chu akipuijin; Canaan gam jonin akipat doh-un; chule Canaan gam chu ahung lhung taove." 
Genesis12:6 Chuin Abram'in gamsung chu Shechem gei, gangpi thing kena Moreh gei achonsoh-in ahi. Chuche laichun agama chun Canaan miho achengun ahi." 
Genesis12:7 Chuin Pakai chu Abram henga akilah-in, ajah-a, Hiche gamhi nachilhah te henga kapeh ding ahi, ati. Chuin aman ahenga hung kilah Pakai ding chun chukoma chun maicham khat asemin ahi." 
Genesis12:8 Chuin ama chukoma konchun Bethel solama Molsang khat na akichonin, Bethel lhumlam le Ai solam kah-a apon in asongin ahi; chukoma chun Pakai dingin maicham asemin, Pakai min akouvin ahi." 
Genesis12:9 Chuin Abram chu lhanglam jonin achepeh nalaijin ahi. 
Genesis12:10 Chuin gamsunga chun kel alhan: chule Abram Egypt gama cham dingin achesuh tan ahi; ajehchu gam sunga chun kel akhoh lheh jengin ahi. 
Genesis12:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Egypt gam alutding konin, a-inneipi Sarai jah-a, Tun vetan, nangma vetdinga numei melhoitah nahi ti kahei." 
Genesis12:12 Chuti ahijeh-a chu hung hiti ding ahi, Egypt mihon namu tenguleh, hiche hi a-inneipi ahi, atidiu; chule amahon keima eitha uva, nangma vang nahinghoi dingu ahi." 
Genesis12:13 Nangma vanga phatah-a kaum theina dingle, nangma jala kahinthei na dingin, anaonu kahi tin seijin, tia katao ahi, ati." 
Genesis12:14 Chuin ahitin ahi, Abram Egypt gam alhun phatnin, Egypt mihon numei chu amuvin, amel chu hoi asalheh jengun ahi." 
Genesis12:15 Pharoah semanghon jong amanu chu amuvin, chule Pharoah jah-a aseiphaovin ahi. Chuin numeinu chu Pharoah insunga apuilut taovin ahi." 
Genesis12:16 Chuin aman Abram chu amanu jal chun abol pha lheh-in ahi. Chule aman kelngoi, bongchal, sanganchal, soh pasal, soh numei, sangan nu, chule sangongsao aneitan ahi." 
Genesis12:17 Ahivangin Abram inneipi Sarai jeh chun Pakai chun Pharoah leh a-insung mite chu hise nasatah-in asugenthei tan ahi. 
Genesis12:18 Chuin Pharoah'in Abram chu akouvin, ajah-a, Kachunga nathil bol hi ipi hitam? Na-inneipi ahichu ipi dinga neisei peh lou ham?" 
Genesis12:19 Ipi dinga kanaonu ahi nati ham? Hijehchu ahi ka-inneipi dinga kana kipui lona chu; hijeh chun tun na inneipi hi ven, kipuijin lang chemang tan, ati." 
Genesis12:20 Chuin Pharoah'in ama chung changa chun amite chu thu apen; amahon amachu a-inneipi toh, anei chengse toh asolmang taovin ahi." 
Genesis13:1 Chuin Abram Egypt gama konin apotnin, a-inneipi, anei chengse, chuleh Lot toh lhanglam ajon taove." 
Genesis13:2 Chuin Abram chu gancha, dangka chule sana in ahao lheh jengin ahi." 
Genesis13:3 Chuin ama lhanglama kon chun Bethel geijin achepeh-in, Bethel le Ai kah-a atilla apon in sonna mun geichun achen;" 
Genesis13:4 Amasa-a maicham asem na mun chu ahung lhun tan ahi. Chukoma chun Abram Pakai minin ataovin ahi. 
Genesis13:5 Chule Abram toh lhonle Lot jong chun kelngoi hon, bonghon, chule pon in aneitan ahi." 
Genesis13:6 Chule amani chenkhom lhona dingin, agam chun adoltapon ahi: ajehchu aneilhon atam behseh jeh-in, amani achengkhom theilhon tapon ahi." 
Genesis13:7 Chuin Abram gancha ching hole Lot gancha chingho kah-a kinah na aumtan ahi. Chule chuche laichun gam sunga chun Canaan miho le Perizz miho achengun ahi. 
Genesis13:8 Chuin Abram'in Lot jah-a, Nahenga katao ahi, nangle kei kah-a, chule kagan ching te le nangma gan ching te kah-a kinah na umdahen, ajehchu eini sopikhat ihi." 
Genesis13:9 Gam apumpia namasanga um hilouham? Katao ahi, keima-a konin achomin umdoh tan; nangman veilam nakilhen leh, keima jetlama chengting; achuti louva nangma jetlama nache le, keima veilama cheng kate, ati." 
Genesis13:10 Lot akhodah-in, Jordan phaicham chengse chu aven ahile muntin chu twi anengin, (Pakaiyin Sodom le Gomorrah asuhmang masang ahin,) Zoar jotna geichun Egypt gam toh abangin, Pakai hon toh abangin ahi." 
Genesis13:11 Chujouvin Lot'in Jordan phaicham pumpi chu akilhenin, solam ngan achetan ahi. Chule amani khat chu khatna konin akikhen lhontan ahi." 
Genesis13:12 Abram chu Canaan gama chun achengin, Lot chu phaichama khopi ho-a chun achengin, chuin apon in chu Sodom lam ngan asongin ahi." 
Genesis13:13 Ahin Sodom miho chu Pakai mitmu-a khang giloutah leh chonsetah ahiuve. 
Genesis13:14 Chuin Abram'a kona Lot akikhendoh jouvin, Pakaiyin Abram jah-a, Tun khodah inlang, naum namun na kon chun sahlam, lhanglam, solam, chule lhumlam vetemin," 
Genesis13:15 Ajehchu nangman namu gam chengse apumpia nangma le nachilhahte tonsotna dinga kapeh ding ahi. 
Genesis13:16 Chule keiman nachilhah te leisetna leivuijat kahisah ding; chule mikhatnin leiset chunga leivui asimjouva ahileh nangma chilhahte jong kisimjou ding ahi. 
Genesis13:17 Kipat doh-in, hiche gam hi adung avai chonchan len, ajehchu keiman hichehi nangma kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
Genesis13:18 Chujouvin Abram'in apon in chu achonin, ache achen Hebron gama Mamre gangpi phaicham koma chun achengin, chule chukoma chun Pakai dingin maicham khat asemin ahi." 
Genesis14:1 Chuin Shinar lengpa Amraphel, Ellasar lengpa Arioch, Elam lengpa Chedorlaomer, chule namho lengpa Tidal alal laijuvin ahitin ahi." 
Genesis14:2 Hicheho hin Sodom lengpa Bera, Gomorrah lengpa Birsha, Admah lengpa Shinab, Zeboiim lengpa Shenaber, chule Zoar kiti Bela lengpa akisat piuvin ahi." 
Genesis14:3 Amaho abonun chi dillen pang Shiddim phaichama chun akikhomun ahi. 
Genesis14:4 Amahon kum somle kum ni Chedorlaomer anajenu ahin, kum som le kum thum channa-in akiphin taovin ahi." 
Genesis14:5 Chuin kum som le kum li alhin kum-in Chedorlaomer lengpan aumpi leng dang ho toh ahung konun, Ashteroth Karnaim gama Rephaim mite, Ham gama Juzim mite, Shaveh Kiriathaim gama Emim mite athat uvin," 
Genesis14:6 Chule Hor mite chu aum nau Seir Molsang gei le, gamthip gamgia um El Paran changei jin athat taovin ahi." 
Genesis14:7 Chuin amaho ahung kileuvin En-mishpat (hichu Kadesh ahi,) 'ah ahungun, Amalek mite gam pumpi le Hazezon-tamar-a cheng Amor mite chu athat kitnun ahi." 
Genesis14:8 Chuphat nin Sodom lengpa, Gomorrah lengpa, Admah lengpa, Zeboiim lengpa, chule Bela lengpa (Bela chu Zoar ahi;) chu akipat doh-un, amaho chutoh kisat dingin Siddim phaichama apangkhomun," 
Genesis14:9 Elam lengpa Chedorlaomer, namtin lengpa Tidal, Shinar lengpa Amraphel, chule Ellasar lengpa Arioch dounan, lengli chu leng nga chutoh akisat taovin ahi." 
Genesis14:10 Siddim phaichama chu vahaibon dimset ahin; hia chun Sodom lengpa le Gomorrah lengpa ajam nalam lhonna alhalut lhontan; chuleh amoh chengse chu molsang lamah ajam taovin ahi. 
Genesis14:11 Chuin amahon Sodom le Gomorrah neile gou jouse, chule aneh achah jouse apouvin, achemang taove." 
Genesis14:12 Chuin amahon Sodom'a cheng Abram sopipa chapa Lot jong chu anei chengse toh apuimang taovin ahi. 
Genesis14:13 Chuin asohcha khatnin Hebrew mi Abram jah-a chun thu ahung lhutnin ahi; hichepetna chu ama Eshcol le Aner sopipa, Amor mi hotoh Mamre gangpi phaicham koma chun achengun ahi. Chule amaho chu Abram toh thukhat kisa-a ahiuve." 
Genesis14:14 Chuin Abram'in asopipa gal hinga akaiju ajah phatnin, ama insunga pengcheh, hilthemsa cheh asohte jathum le somleget akipuijin, Dan geijin anung deltan ahi." 
Genesis14:15 Chuin jan-in amaho nokhum dingin amale asohte chu akihom khenun, chuin amaho chu athatnun, Damascus sahlama um Hobah chan geijin adelun ahi." 
Genesis14:16 Chuin aman neile gou jouse, asopipa Lot jong chu aneile gou chengse toh, chule numei hole miho jong chu ahin lepuikit tan ahi." 
Genesis14:17 Chuin aman Chedorlaomer le aumpi lengho chu atha jouva ahung kile kit phatnin, Sodom lengpa chu Abram lamto dingin Shaveh phaichama achen ahi (hichu leng phaicham ahi)." 
Genesis14:18 Chuin Shalem lengpa Melchizedec'in changlhah le lengpitwi ahin choijin ahi; ama chu chungnung pen Pathen Thempu ahi. 
Genesis14:19 Chule Aman Abram chu phatthei aboh-in, Van le lei neipa chungnung pen Pathen'a konin Abram phatthei changhen." 
Genesis14:20 Chule nagal mite nakhutna pedoh-a chungnung pen Pathen nunnom hen, ati. Chuin Abram'in amachu aneijouse hopsom-a hopkhat apen ahi." 
Genesis14:21 Chuin Sodom lengpan Abram jah-a, Miho chu keima neipen lang, thilkeo hochu nangma changtan, ati." 
Genesis14:22 Chuin Abram'in Sodom lengpa jah-a chun, Keima van le leiset neipa, chungnung pen Pakai Pathen henga kakhut kadop sang ahi." 
Genesis14:23 Keiman pat jang kengchot khao te jeng jong, nanga pou pou chu kalah louding ahi, atiloule, Keiman Abram kahao sahtai, tiget nin nate." 
Genesis14:24 Gollhang hon aneh mangu chule kalhonpi Aner, Eshcol, chule Mamre hiteho chu achan ding dol changu hen, ati." 
Genesis15:1 Hicheho nunghin Pakai thu chu Abram henga gaovin ahungin, ajah-a, Kicha hih-in, Abram, keima nalumdal le nakipa man lentah chu kahi, ati." 
Genesis15:2 Chuin Abram'in, Pakai Pathen, chabeija kaum dending namu nunga nangman keima ipi neipeh ding ham? Chule ka-insunga goulo dingla hiche Damascus mi Eliezar ahibouvin, ati." 
Genesis15:3 Chuin Abram'in, Vetan, nangman keima chi neikhaisah pon; chule Ven, ka-insunga penga chu kagou loding ahi, ati." 
Genesis15:4 Chuphatnin veuvin, Pakai thu chu ahenga ahung lhungin, ajah-a, Amachu nagoulo hilouding; amavang nangma taiguija penga bou chun nagou alo ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis15:5 Chuin ama chu inpolama apuidoh-in, ajah-a, Vanlam khu vetemin, ahsi khu nasimjou dingle simtemin, ati. Chuin aman ajah-a, Nachilhah jong hijat khu hiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis15:6 Chuin aman Pakai chu atahsan nin; chule aman hichu ama dingin chonphat na-in asimpeh tan ahi. 
Genesis15:7 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Keima hiche gamhi gouva nalo dinga Chaldea gam Ur khopi-a kona nahin puidohpa Pakai chu kahi, ati." 
Genesis15:8 Chuin aman, Pakai Pathen hiche kaloding chu iti kahet dingham? ati." 
Genesis15:9 Chuin aman ajah-a, Nangman kumthum lhingsa bongla khat toh, kumthum lhingsa kel-la khat toh, kumthum lhingsa kelngoichal khat toh, vakhu khat toh, vapal noukhat kahenga hinchoijin, ati." 
Genesis15:10 Chuin aman hicheng jouse chu ahin choijin, hiho chu ahapsatnin, hap langkhat le hap langkhat kingatton akoijin, ahin vachaho vang chu ahapsatpon ahi." 
Genesis15:11 Chule muthong ho chu ahung len uva sathilong chunga chu achuh ji tengule, Abram'in adel mangjin ahi." 
Genesis15:12 Chuin nisa alhum konin, Abram chunga imut milna achutan; chule veuvin, kichat umtah muthim nasatah-in ahinkhutan ahi." 
Genesis15:13 Chuin Pakaiyin Abram jah-a, Nachilhah te chu amaho gam hilou gamkhatna maljinna gaum diu; chule amahon amaho chu ajendiu; chule amahon amaho chu kum jali abolgenthei diu ahi tihi kichentah-in hen, ati." 
Genesis15:14 Chule keiman aga jenu nam jong chu athu-u katan ding; chule amaho chu khonungle neile gou ninglhing setna hung potdoh diu ahi. 
Genesis15:15 Chule nangma napu napa te henga lhamonga nache ding; chule nangma natehkem kei teng vuija naum ding ahi. 
Genesis15:16 Amavang khang li lhin nale amaho chu hikoma hung kile kit diu ahi: ajeh chu Amor mite khangitlouna abulhing hih laije, ati." 
Genesis15:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, Nisa alhumma, mu ahung thim phatnin, veuvin, lhummei khucheichoi le meisel al lenglung chu sahap sat ho kahlah-a kitolin ahi." 
Genesis15:18 Chuche nichun Pakaiyin Abram toh kitepna khat asemin, hitin aseije, Keiman nachilhahte henga hiche gamhi Egypt vadunga pat luilen, Euphrates vadunglen gei;" 
Genesis15:19 Ken mite, Keniz mite, Kadmon mite," 
Genesis15:20 Hit mite, Perizz mite, Rephaim mite," 
Genesis15:21 Chule Amor mite, Canaan mite, chule Jebus mite abonchauva kapeh ahitai, ati." 
Genesis16:1 Tun Abram inneipi Sarai'in amachu cha ahin peh pon ahi. Chule amanun Egypt mi amin Hagar kiti soh numei khat aneijin ahi. 
Genesis16:2 Chuin Sarai'in Abram jah-a, Tun vetan, Pakaiyin keima chahing dingin eiphaltapoi: nahenga katao ahi, amanu-a kona chapang kaneithei khatle, kasohnu koma galut nin ati. Chuin Abram'in Sarai thu chu angaitan ahi." 
Genesis16:3 Chuin Abram Canaan gama kumsom achen jouvin, Abram inneipi Sarai'in asohnu Egypt mi Hagar chu apuijin, a-inneipu Abram jidingin agapetan ahi." 
Genesis16:4 Chuin ama Hagar henga chun alutnin ahile, amanun nao avoptan ahi. Chuin amanun anaovop akihet phatnin, apinu chu anoisetan ahi." 
Genesis16:5 Chuin Sarai'in Abram jah-a, Kabolkhel hi nangma mopohna ahi: Kasohnu na-angsunga dingin kapein; chule aman anaovop akihet phatnin einoisetai. Pakaiyin nang le kei kah-a thu tanhen, ati." 
Genesis16:6 Ahin Abram 'in Sarai jah-a, Ven nasohnu nakhut na um ahi; nangman pha nasah bang chun achunga boltan, ati. Chuin Sarai'in amanu chu abolgenthei lhehjeng phatnin, amanu ama angsunga konin ajamtai." 
Genesis16:7 Chuin Pakai vantil'in amanu chu Shur jotna lampi pam, gamthipma twikhuh khat koma amudoh tan ahi." 
Genesis16:8 Chuin aman, Sarai sohnu Hagar, hoija hungkon nahi-a, chule hoija cheding nahim? ati. Chuin amanun, keima kapi nu Sarai angsunga kona jam-a kahi, ati." 
Genesis16:9 Chuin Pakai vantil chun amanu jah-a, napinu henga kilekitnin, chule akhut noija kipelutnin, ati." 
Genesis16:10 Chuin Pakai vantil chun amanu ajah-a, Keiman nachilhah hapuna kapunsah ding; atam behseh jeh uva simseng hilou dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis16:11 Chuin Pakai vantil chun amanu jah-a, Ven, nangma naovop nahin, chule chapa khat nahin ding ahi: Nangman amin Ishmael nasahding ahi, ajehchu Pakaiyin nakibol hesohna najahpeh tai." 
Genesis16:12 Chule amachu miphamo tah hiding; aman mijouse douna akhut alapding, chule ama douna-a mijousen akhut alapdiu ahi. Chule ama asopite jouse angsunga chengding ahi, ati." 
Genesis16:13 Chuin amanun akihoupi Pakai minchu, nangma eimu-a Pathen tin asah tai. Ajehchu amanun, keima eimu-a amachu keiman jong kamu hitam? ati." 
Genesis16:14 Chuche jeh chun chukom twikhuh minchu Beer-Lahai-Roi akisah tai. Veuvin, hichu Kadesh le Bered kah-a um ahi." 
Genesis16:15 Chuin Hagar'in Abram chapa khat ahinpehtan; chule Abram'in Hagar toh ahin achapa min chu Ishmael asahtai. 
Genesis16:16 Chule Hagar'in Abram dinga Ishmael ahinpeh chun, Abram kum somget le kum gup alhingtai." 
Genesis17:1 Chuin Abram kum somko le kumko alhinin, ahenga Pakai ahung kilah-in, ajah-a, Keima hat chungnung Pathen kahi, kamasanga kitah tah-in lamlhan lang, nangma chamkimin." 
Genesis17:2 Chule keiman keimale nangma kah-a kakitepna kasemdoh ding, chule nangma hapuna kapunsah ding nahi, ati." 
Genesis17:3 Chuin Abram'in tolla amai asulut tan ahi. Chuin Pathen'in amachu akihoupin, ajah-a," 
Genesis17:4 Keima thudol vang, ven, kakitepna chu nakoma aume, chule nangma nam tamtah pa nahi ding ahi." 
Genesis17:5 Namin jong Abram tia kikou talou ding, amavang namin Abraham tia kikou ding ahitai; ajehchu nangma namtin pa-a kasem nahitai." 
Genesis17:6 Chule keiman nangma hapuna kapunsah ding, chule nangma-a kona nam ho kasemdoh-a, chule nangma-a kona lengho hungdoh ding ahi." 
Genesis17:7 Keima nangma le nanunga nachilhah te-a dinga Pathen kahina dingin, keima le nangma kah-a, chule khonunga nachilhah te akhang akhanguva tonsot kitepna-a dinga kakitepna kaphudoh ding ahi." 
Genesis17:8 Chule keiman nakholjinna Kanaan gam pumpi hi, nangma le khonunga nachilhahte henga tonsotna nalo diuva kapeh ding; chule keima amaho Pathen kahiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis17:9 Chuin Pathen'in Abraham jah-a, Nangman kakitepna hi nanitding, nangma le khonunga nachilhah ten akhang akhanguva anit diu ahi." 
Genesis17:10 Keima le nangma chule nanunga nachilhahte kah-a nanitdiu kakitepna chu hiche hi ahi: Nalah uva pasal tapou chun chep atan cheh ding ahi. 
Genesis17:11 Chule nanghon natahsao nachep vunnu chu natan dingu; hichu keima le nangho kah-a kitepna melchihna hiding ahi. 
Genesis17:12 Chule nalah uva mi niget lhing tapou, nason nachilhah-a pasal tapou, na-in'a peng hihen, nachilhah hilou gamdang mi nasuma nachoh hijongle, pasal tapou chu chep kitan cheh ding ahi." 
Genesis17:13 Na-in'a peng hihen lang, nasuma nachoh hijong leh chep kitan teiding ahi; chule kakitepna chu tonsot kitepna-a dinga natahsaova umding ahi." 
Genesis17:14 Koi hijongle cheptan lou pasal chapang atahsa-a achepvun cheptan lou chu, chuche mipa chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi; amachun kakitepna asuhkeh ahi, ati." 
Genesis17:15 Chuin Pathen'in Abraham jah-a, Na-inneipi Sarai thudol vang, Nangman amin Sarai nati tahlou ding; amavang amin Sarah hijoding ahitai." 
Genesis17:16 Chule keiman amanu chu phatthei kabohding, chule tahbeh-a keiman nangma amanu-a kona chapa khat jong kapeh ding nahi. Keiman amanu phatthei kabohding, chule amanu namtin nu hung hiding; chule amanu-a kona mihemte lengho hungdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis17:17 Chuin Abraham'in tolla amai asulutnin, anuijin ahi, chule alungthimin, kum jakhat mi-a dinga cha peng ding ham? Chule kum somko mi Sarah'in cha ahin nahlai ding ham? ati." 
Genesis17:18 Chuin Abraham'in Pathen henga, aw! Ishmael chu namitmu-a hingding hingta vele, ati." 
Genesis17:19 Chuin Pathen'in, Na-inneipi Sarah'in tahbeh-a nangma chapa khat nahin peh ding, chule nangman amin Isaac nasah ding ahi. Chule kakitepna chu amale ama nunga achilhahte dinga tonsot kitepna hidinga kasuhdet ding ahi." 
Genesis17:20 Chule Ishmael thudol vang, keiman nathu kangaipeh ahitai: Ven keiman ama phatthei kaboh ahitan; chule achilhah tamtah kahisah-a, hapuna kapunsah ding ahi. Aman vaipi somleni ahin ding, chule keiman ama nam lentah-a kasemding ahi." 
Genesis17:21 Ahin kakitepna vang chu Sarah'in khovei tuphat teng ahinding Isaac toh kasuhdet ding ahi. 
Genesis17:22 Chuin amatoh akihou chai phatnin, Abraham koma konin Pathen achetoutan ahi." 
Genesis17:23 Chuin Abraham'in achapa Ishmael, chule a-insung peng jouse, chule suma achohtho jouse, Abraham'in a-insunga pasal tapou chu apuijin, Pathen'in ahenga aseibangin chuche ni lele chun atahsao achep vunu atanpeh tan ahi." 
Genesis17:24 Chule Abraham chu atahsa achepvun akitan chun kum somko le ko alhingtai. 
Genesis17:25 Chule achapa Ishmael chu atahsa achepvun akitan chun kum somlethum ahitai. 
Genesis17:26 Chuche nilele chun Abraham le achapa Ishmael'in chep atan lhon tan ahi. 
Genesis17:27 Chule a-insunga pasal jouse, a-in'a pengho le gamdang mi suma kichoho jong chun amatoh chep atan cheh-un ahi." 
Genesis18:1 Chuin ama Mamre gangpi kom aponbuh kotbul-ah sun nisat petna atoupet nin Pakai chu ahengah ahung kilah-in; 
Genesis18:2 Chuin ama akhodah-in avetna ahile, Veovin, akomtah-a chun mi thum ana dingun; chuin aman amaho chu amuphatnin, apon-inna konchun amaho lemdingin alhaijelin, tolla aboh khupmin, chibai aboh-in ahi." 
Genesis18:3 Chuin aman, Ka Pakai, tu-a hi namitmu-a lunglhaina kachana ahile; katao ahi, nasoh-a konin chepai hih-in." 
Genesis18:4 Nahenga katao ahi, twi themkhat beh hin kidomintin, chule nakengu kisilun lang, thingphung noija hin kicholdouvin," 
Genesis18:5 Chule nalungthimu akitha-ol theina dingin, changlhah themkhat beh nagalah peh uvinge; chujouteng nangho chepan naovin nate: ajehchu nasoh henga hunga nahi tangalun, ati. Chuin amahon, nasei bangin boltan, atiuve." 
Genesis18:6 Chuin Abraham pon insunga Sarah henga alhailut jel-in, ajah-a, Changbong phatah atena dimthum tenlang, hichu mehin lang, gangtah-in thuh chunga changlhah semin, ati." 
Genesis18:7 Chuin Abraham bonghon lama alhai jel-in, bongnou nouchet hoitah khat alan, hichu gollhang khat apen, aman hichu gangtah-in agasemin ahi." 
Genesis18:8 Chuin aman bongnoi ha le bongnoi chule bongnou sa asem chu achoijin, a-angsung uva aluipeh-in chule amahon anehpetnu chun, ama akomuva thingphung noija chun adingin ahi." 
Genesis18:9 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Na-inneipi Sarah hoija umam? atiuve. Chuin aman, Pon insunga khun aume, ati." 
Genesis18:10 Chuin aman, Keima nahenga hinkho phat chedung juija thonlouva kahung kile kitding ahi; chule ven, Sarah na-inneipin chapa khat ahinding ahi, ati. Chule Sarah'in anunglama pon in kotna konchun hichu anajan ahi." 
Genesis18:11 Tun Abraham le Sarah chu upatah le kum tamtah ahilhontan; chule numei hina ngaidol chu sarah chunga tanga ahitai. 
Genesis18:12 Chuti ahijeh chun Sarah chu alungthimin anuijin, katehset jounung sanga hi thanopna kanei ding ham? Ka pakai jongla tehse ahitan, ati." 
Genesis18:13 Chuin Pakaiyin Abraham jah-a, ibola na-inneipi Sarah'in, kitehta-a chapa kanei mongding ham? atia nuija ham?" 
Genesis18:14 Pakai dinga thil ahahsa behseh umam? Hinkho phat che dungjuija akitepsa phat tahle keima naheng-ah kahung kilekit ding, chule Sarah'in chapakhat ahinding ahi, ati." 
Genesis18:15 Chuin Sarah akichat jeh chun, akilepmin, keima kanuipoi, ati. Ahin aman, ahipoi, nanui naije, ati." 
Genesis18:16 Chuin miho chu chua konchun akipatdoh uvin, chule Sodom lam agahveuvin; chule Abraham'in amaho achenadiu lampia lhadoh dingin akilhonpin ahi." 
Genesis18:17 Chuin Pakaiyin, kathil bol ding hi Abraham koma kona ka-im dingham?" 
Genesis18:18 Abraham hi nam lentah le thahat tah hung hiding, chule vannoi leiset namjouse ama-a phattheiboh changdiu ahingalin?" 
Genesis18:19 Ajehchu achate le ama nunga a-insung mite chu thu apeh-a, Pakaiyin Abraham chungchanga athusei chu atohdoh nadinga, chonphatah le chondih tah-a na atoh uva, Pakai lamlhah ajui diu ahi ti keiman kahen ahi, ati." 
Genesis18:20 Chuin Pakaiyin, Sodom le Gomorrah pen awgin anasat behset jeh le, achonsetnao anasat behset jeh-in;" 
Genesis18:21 Tun keima chesuh ingting, chule apen awginu kaheng ahunglhun banga hi chonuvam, chonhih uvam gave inge; chuti ahilou jongle gahe-ing kate, ati." 
Genesis18:22 Chuin miho chu chua kon chun akiheijun, Sodom lam jonin achetauve. Ahivangin Abraham chu Pakai masanga ading jing nalaijin ahi." 
Genesis18:23 Chuin Abraham'in agah naijin, ahenga, michonpha ho chu migilou toh nasuhmang tha ding ham?" 
Genesis18:24 Ijem tin khopi sunga chun michonpha somnga umtale, hiche asunga um michonpha somnga jal chun hiche munchu khenlouvin nasumang jeng dem?" 
Genesis18:25 Hitobanga bolding chu nangma-a konin gamla hen; michonpha hochu migilou hotoh suhmangtha-a, michonpha hon migilou ho banga athohdiu nanga konin gamlahen; vannoi pumpi thutanpa chun adih-a thu atanlou ding ham? ati." 
Genesis18:26 Chuin Pakai chun, keiman Sodom khopi sunga michonpha somnga kamuleh, amaho jalchun khopi chu hoidohsah nange, ati." 
Genesis18:27 Chuin Abraham'in adonbutnin, Tun vetan, keima leivui le meivambou kahin, Pakai henga thusei dingin kana kipantai." 
Genesis18:28 Ijem tin michonpha somnga lah-a chun nga lhasam taleh, mi nga alhahsam jehchun nangman khopi chu nasumang jeng dem? ati. Chuin aman, keiman chua chu michonpha somli le nga kamule, sumang ponge, ati." 
Genesis18:29 Chuin aman ama jah-a, aseikitnin, Ijem tin chua chun somli kimu tale la, ati. Chuin aman, keiman somli ho jalchun sumang ponge, ati." 
Genesis18:30 Chuin aman ajah-a, Ka Pakai lunghang loujenin, keiman seikit inge, Ijemtin chua chun somthum bou kimu talela, ati. Chuin aman, keiman chua chu somthum kamule sumang ponge, ati." 
Genesis18:31 Chuin aman, Tun vetan, keima Pakai henga thuseidin kana kipantai; Ijemtin chua chun somni bou kimu talela, ati. Chuin aman, somni jalchun keiman sumang pongkate, ati." 
Genesis18:32 Chuin aman, aw! Pakai lunghang loujenin, khatvei seikit inge, chua chun somkhat sehbou kimu talela, ati. Chuin aman, Keiman somkhat jalchun sumang ponge, ati." 
Genesis18:33 Chuin Pakai chu Abraham toh akihouchai phatnin achena dinga achetan; chule Abraham a-in lama ahung kile tai. 
Genesis19:1 Chuin nilhah lamin vantil ni Sodom ahunglhung lhonin; chule Lot chu Sodom khopi kotpi bula chun anatouvin ahi. Chuin Lot'in amani chu amuphat nin alemdingin akipatdoh-in, chule tolla aboh khupmin;" 
Genesis19:2 Chuin aman, Veuvin tun, ka Pakai teni, katao ahi, nasoh in'a hunglut lhonin lang, jan khovah geijin gehlhonin, chule nakeng kisil lhonin lang, jingkah teng le matah-in thoulhonin natin, chekit lhon tan nate, ati. Chuin amanin, Ahipoi, keini jan khovah keija lamlena kaum lhon ding ahi, atilhone." 
Genesis19:3 Chuin aman aha ngeh behseh jeh-in, amani akihei lhonin, a-insunga alut lhontai. Chuin aman amani golvah abolpin, cholsolou changlhah akangin, aneuvin ahi." 
Genesis19:4 Ahivangin amaho alup masangun, khopi sunga miho, Sodom miho tah chu alen aneo, vengtinna kona mihem jousen in chu ahin umtaovin;" 
Genesis19:5 Chule amahon Lot chu ahin kouvun, ajah-a, Tujana nahenga hung miteni chu hoija umlhon tam? Kahenguva hinpui doh-un, amani chu jonpiuvinge, atiuve." 
Genesis19:6 Chuin Lot kotna konchun amaho henga apotdoh-in, kot chu anungkha-in," 
Genesis19:7 Ajah uva, Sopite, naheng uva katao ahi, chuti lomin khanggilou hih-un." 
Genesis19:8 Tun veuvin, pasal heloulaihel chanu ni kaneije; katao ahi, namit mu uva pha nasah bangtah uva naboldiuvin amani chu naheng uva hin puidoh peh uvinge; hiche teni chunga vanghin imacha bolhih-un; ajehchu amani ka-in lhalim noija hunglut ahilhone, ati." 
Genesis19:9 Chuin amahon, Kinung khinin, atiuve. Chuin amahon aseikitnun, Hiche mipa hi ahung pemlutnin, thutan din akigoi; tunvang amani chunga kabol sang uva nangma chunga phalou cheh-a kaboldiu ahi, atiuve. Chuin amahon mipa, Lot chu hatah-in ahin sonnun, kotkhah chu suhhong dingin ahin naitaove." 
Genesis19:10 Ahivangin miteni chun akhut ahin lhangdoh lhonin, Lot chu amani henga dingin insunga akailut lhonin, kot chu akhah taovin ahi." 
Genesis19:11 Chuin kot bula um miho chu alen aneo abonun amitnu achotsah lhonin; chutichun amahon kotkhah chu aholdoh jou tapouvin ahi. 
Genesis19:12 Chuin miteni chun Lot jah-a, Nangman hikoma hi insungmi dang naneijem? Namahpate, nachapate, nachanute, chule khopi sunga koihileh naneichan chu hiche mun'a konhin puidoh-in." 
Genesis19:13 Ajeh chu Pakai anga apen awgin chu anasa behseh jengtan, hijeh-a chu hiche munhi kasuhmang lhonding ahi; Pakaiyin hiche sumang dinga eihinsol lhon ahi, ati lhonne." 
Genesis19:14 Chuin Lot apotdoh-in, achanute kichenpi amah-pate henga achen, ajah uva, Kipat un, hiche mun'a konhin potdoh-un, Ajehchu Pakaiyin hiche khopi hi asuhmang ding ahi, ati. Ahivangin amachu amah-pate koma totna thusei abangbep tan ahi." 
Genesis19:15 Chuin jingkho ahung vah phatnin, Vantil teni chun Lot chu akinosah-in, ajah-a, Kipatdoh-in, hikoma um na-inneipi le nachanu teni kipuijin; achuti loule hiche khopi khangitlouna-a hin mantha tha getnin nate, ati." 
Genesis19:16 Chuin ama akhongai nalaijin, Pakaiyin ahepi jehchun miteni chun amakhut, a-inneipi khut chule achanu teni khut aman lhonin; apuidoh lhonin, khopi pamlama chun akoilhonin ahi." 
Genesis19:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanin amaho polama ahin puidoh honchun, ajah uva, Nakihinso nadiuvin jamun; nanung lamu vehih-un, chujongle phaicham mun khatcha ajong kingapa hih-un; molsang lama jamun, ajole mangthah getnun nate, ati." 
Genesis19:18 Chuin Lot'in amani jah-a, Ka Pakai, chuti chu hida hen." 
Genesis19:19 Vetan, namitmun nasoh hin namitmun lungsetna kachangin, chule nangman kahinkho neihuhdoh peh-in, nami khotona chu nadomsang tai; ahivangin molsang lama chun hoidohna din jamjou ponge, ajo thil gilou khatnin eihin phantin thilo getninge." 
Genesis19:20 Tun ven, hiche khopi khu jamlutna dingin anaijin, chule neocha jong ahi; hilama khun neijam sah-in, (hikhu neocha hilou ham?) chutile kahinna hinghoija umding ahi, ati." 
Genesis19:21 Chuin aman ajah-a, Vetan, hiche thudola jonghin na-ngehna kaphal peh-in, nangman nasei hiche khopi chu sumang ponge." 
Genesis19:22 Nangma kinonlang, khulama khun jamlut-in; ajeh chu khuchemun nalhun kahse-a imacha kabol theilou ahi, ati. Hijeh chun chuche khopi min chu Zoar akisah tai." 
Genesis19:23 Lot chu Zoar alut chun nisa leiset chunga asohdoh tai. 
Genesis19:24 Chujouvin Pakaiyin Sodom le Gomorrah chunga Kaat le meikong van'a Pakaiya konin ajuhsah tan ahi. 
Genesis19:25 Chuin aman chuche khopi teni, phaicham jouse, khopi sunga cheng jouse, chule leiset chunga kehdoh ho jouse abonchan asumangsoh keitan ahi." 
Genesis19:26 Ahivangin inneipi chun Lot nunga konin anunglam aven ahileh, chi khompi asohtan ahi." 
Genesis19:27 Chuin Abraham jingpi tah-in athouvin, Pakai angsunga adinna mun'a chun achen;" 
Genesis19:28 Chuin Sodom le Gomorrah lam, chule phaicham gamlam jouse chu aven; chule veuvin, hiche gam meikhu chu thih kisou jolna munna meikhu bangin akitung veng vung jengin ahi" 
Genesis19:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pathen'in phaicham khopi ho asuhmang chun, Pathen'in Abraham chu ageldoh in, Lot chenna khopiho asuhmang chun Lot chu akisuhmang ho lah-a konchun asoldoh-in ahi." 
Genesis19:30 Chuin Lot chu Zoar kho-a kon chun molsang lama achetouvin, achanu teni toh achengtai; ajehchu ama Zoar kho-a chending chu kicha-a ahi. Chuin ama achanu teni toh song ko-a acheng taovin ahi." 
Genesis19:31 Chuin apeng masa nuchun aneojonu jah-a, Ipahi atehtan, vannoi leiset dan ngaija ihenguva hung ding leisetna pasal khatcha jong aumtapoi." 
Genesis19:32 Hungin, ipahi lengpitwi donsah hitin, chuleh ipa chilhah manglouva i-umsah theina dingin luppi hite, ati." 
Genesis19:33 Chuin amanin chuche jan chun apalhon chu lengpitwi adonsah lhonin ahi. Chuin apeng masa nuchu ache lutnin, apa chu aluppin; ahin aman amanu itih-a ahunglup, chule itih-a athodoh ahepon ahi." 
Genesis19:34 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, apeng masa nuchun aneojonu jah-a, Vetan janhi jan chun kapa kaluppi tai. Tujanin jong einin lengpitwi donsah hitin; chule ipa chilhah manglouva i-umsah theina dingin, nangma lutnin lang galuppin, ati." 
Genesis19:35 Chuin amanin chuche jan chun apahon chu lengpitwi adonsah lhontan ahi. Chuin aneojonu chu akipatdoh-in, aga luppin; ahin aman amanu itih-a ahunglup, chule itih-a athodoh ahepon ahi." 
Genesis19:36 Chuti chun Lot chanu teni chun apalhona konin nao avopgel lhontai. 
Genesis19:37 Chuin apeng masa jonu chun chapa khat ahingin, amin Moab asahtai. Amachu tunikho geija Moab mite pa chu ahitai." 
Genesis19:38 Chuin aneojonu jong chun chapa khat ahingin, amin Ben-Ammi asahtai. Amachu tunikho geija Ammon miho pa chu ahitai." 
Genesis20:1 Chuin Abraham chua kon chun lhanglam gamah achesuh-in, Kadesh le Shur kikah-a achengin, chujouvin Gerar gama apemlutnin ahi." 
Genesis20:2 Chuin Abraham'in a-inneipi Sarah chu kanaonu ahi atin ahi. Chuin Gerar lengpa Abimelech chun mi asolin, Sarah chu agapui sah tan ahi." 
Genesis20:3 Ahin Abimelech henga chun ajan amangin Pathen ahungin, ajah-a, Vetan nangman nakipui numeinu jehchun nangma mithisa tobang nahitai; ajehchu amanu mikhat ji ahi, ati." 
Genesis20:4 Ahivangin Abimelech chun amanu chu anailut loulai ahin; chuin aman, Pakai nangman nam chonpha hojong nathajeng ding ham?" 
Genesis20:5 Aman kahenga, amanu hi kanaonu ahi, ati hilouham? Chule amanu jengin jong, amahi kasopipa ahi, ati ahi. Chule lung thengsel le khuttheng tah-a hichehi kanabol ahi, ati." 
Genesis20:6 Chuin Pathen'in ahenga amangin, Ahinai, hichehi lungdihtah pu-a nanabol ahi ti kahei. Ajehchu keima douna chonset nabol louna dinga keiman jong nangma kasuh tang nahi; hiche jeh-a chu keiman amanu chu katoh khah sah lou nahi." 
Genesis20:7 Chuti ahijeh chun tun mipa chu a-inneipi lepeh kittan; ajehchu ama themgao ahin, chule aman nangma taopeh-in natin, nangma nahinding ahi. Nangman amanu chu nalepeh kitlou vangleh, nangma thonlouva nathi teiding ahi, ti kihetnin, nangma le nenei chengse jong, atin ahi." 
Genesis20:8 Hiche jehchun Abimelech jingpitah-in athouvin, asohte jouse hiche thilho jouse hi aseipeh tan ahi. Chuin miho chu akichalheh jengun ahi." 
Genesis20:9 Chujouvin Abimelech'in Abraham chu akouvin, ajah-a, Kachunguva hi ipi bola nahi hitam? Chule nangma chunga ipi kasuhkhel uma, keima chungle kalenggam chunga chonsetna lentah hi nahin lhut lut hitam? Nangman kachunga bol louhel ding thil chu naboltai, ati." 
Genesis20:10 Chuin Abimelech'in Abraham henga, Ipi namu-a hiche thil hi nabol hitam? ati." 
Genesis20:11 Chuin Abraham'in, Hiche mun'a hin Pathen ginna him him umpontin, ka-inneipi jeh hin eithat nun nate tia kagel ahi." 
Genesis20:12 Chujongleh atahbeh-in amanu hi kasopinu ahi ngutnai; amanu hi kapa chanu ahin, hinla kanu chanu vang ahipoi; chua amanu ka-inneipi hung hia ahitai." 
Genesis20:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pathen'in kapa in'a kona eiva lesah chun, keiman amanu henga, hichehi kadinga khotona namusahna ding chu ahi; ichena muntina, amahi kasopipa ahi neiti ding ahi, tia kanasei ahi, ati." 
Genesis20:14 Chuin Abimelech'in Kelngoi, bongchal, chule soh pasal ho leh soh numei ho apuijin, Abraham chu apen, chule a-inneipi Sarah chu alepeh kittan ahi." 
Genesis20:15 Chuin Abimelech'in, Vetan, kagam hi namasanga aume; nadeina mun mun'a chengin, ati." 
Genesis20:16 Chuin aman Sarah henga, Ven, keiman nasopipa dangka sangkhat kapen ahi; vetan, nakoma umho jouse le midang jouse lah-a amapa hi nangma dinga mitkhuna ahi, ati. Chuti chun amanu chu themchan sah-in aumtai." 
Genesis20:17 Chuti chun Abraham Pathen henga ataovin ahile, Pathen'in Abimelech, a-inneipi, chule asoh numei ho chu adamsahtan ahi. Chuin amahon chate ahing taovin ahi." 
Genesis20:18 Ajehchu Abraham inneipi Sarah jala chu Pakaiyin Abimelech insunga naobu jouse anakha ahitai. 
Genesis21:1 Chuin Pakaiyin aseibang chun Sarah avilin, phatthei aboh-in, chule aseibang chun Pakaiyin Sarah chunga amolsotan ahi." 
Genesis21:2 Hitichun Sarah'in nao avoptan, Chule Pathen'in ahenga asei phattah chun Abraham ateh nungin chapa khat ahinpehtai." 
Genesis21:3 Chuin Abraham'in adinga hung peng, Sarah'in ahinpeh achapa min chu Isaac asah tan ahi." 
Genesis21:4 Chuin Pathen'in athupeh bangin Abraham'in achapa Isaac chu niget alhinin chep atan peh tan ahi. 
Genesis21:5 Chule achapa Isaac ahungpen chun Abraham kum jakhat alhingtan ahi.. 
Genesis21:6 Chuin Sarah'in, Pathen'in einui sahtan, chule koihileh aja jousen einuihu dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis21:7 Chuin amanun, Sarah'in naonoi hinchepsah inte, tin Abraham henga kon ana seithei jintem? Ahin ama ateh nungin keiman chapa khat kahin pehtai, ati." 
Genesis21:8 Chuin chapang chu ahung khang khangin anoichep abang tan ahi. Chuin Abraham'in Isaac noichep ban nikho chun golvah loupitah abolin ahi. 
Genesis21:9 Chuin Sarah'in Egypt mi Hagar'in Abraham ahinpeh achapa chun anuisat chu amun ahi. 
Genesis21:10 Hijeh chun amanun Abraham henga, Hiche soh numeinu le achapa hi nodohtan; ajehchu hiche soh numeinu chapa hin kachapa Isaac toh gou alokhom theilou ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis21:11 Chule achapa jalchun hichu Abraham mitmun lungnopmona tah ahitan ahi. 
Genesis21:12 Chuin Pathen'in Abraham jah-a, Chapang jal le soh numeinu jal chun lung nomotah-in umhih-in; ajehchu Isaac'a kona bou nachilhah kasim ding ahi." 
Genesis21:13 Chule keiman nasoh numeinu chapa-a kona jong namkhat kasem doh ding ahi, ajehchu ama nangma chilhah ahi, ati." 
Genesis21:14 Chuin Abraham jingpitah-in athouvin, changlhah le twipai khat alan, Hagar chu apen, hichu alengkouva akhaipeh-in, chapang chutoh amanu asoldohtai. Chuin amanu apotdoh-in, Beersheba gamthipma avahle letan ahi." 
Genesis21:15 Chuin twipai'a twi chu ahung beitan ahile, amanun chapang chu hambohnoi khatna akoitan ahi." 
Genesis21:16 Chuin amanu achen, gamla thim tah thalpi kap phahna bepma chun agatoutan ahi: ajehchu amanun, chapang thi chu muda inge ati ahi. Chuin amanu amajonna chun atouvin, hakan akaptan ahi." 
Genesis21:17 Chuin Pathen'in chapang aw chu ajan; van'a konin Pathen vantil chun Hagar chu ahin kouvin, ajah-a, Ipi nathoh lel ham, Hagar? Kicha hih-in, ajehchu chapangpa aumna-a kon a-awgin chu Pathen'in ajatai." 
Genesis21:18 Kipat doh-in, chapang chu kaithouvin, chule nakhutna tuh-in, ajehchu keiman amachu nam lentah khatna kasem ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis21:19 Chuin Pathen'in amanu mit avahsah-in ahile, amanun twikhuh khat amutan ahi. Chuin amanu achen, twipai'a chun twi athaldim-in, chapang chu adonsah tai." 
Genesis21:20 Chuin Pathen'in chapang chu aumpin; chule ama ahung khang khangin, gamthipma chun achengin, thalkap themtah ahung hitai." 
Genesis21:21 Chuin ama Paran gamthipma achengin; chule anun Egypt gama konin ajiding apui peh tan ahi. 
Genesis21:22 Chuche laichun ahitin ahi, Abimelech le asepai hon lamkai Phicol chun Abraham henga, Natohna jouse-a Pathen'in nang naumpi jinge." 
Genesis21:23 Hijeh chun tun, nangman keima le kachapate, chule kachapate chapate chunga dihlou tah-a na natoh louna ding le, keiman nangma kalungset bangahi keima chule nahung pemlutna gamhi lungsetna naneina dingin, hikoma hin Pathen minin kahenga kihahsel in, ati." 
Genesis21:24 Chuin Abraham'in, Kaki hahsel ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis21:25 Chuin Abimelech sohten twikhuh khat hunama alahpeh jeh uvin, Abraham'in Abimelech chu aphohtan ahi." 
Genesis21:26 Chuin Abimelech'in, Keiman hiche thil bola hi koi ahi kahepoi; nangman jong neiseipeh khah pon, chule tunia kajah tilou, kajakha hihbeh-e, ati." 
Genesis21:27 Chuin Abraham'in Kelngoile bongchal akaijin, Abimelech chu apen; anigel lhonin kitepna asemlhontai." 
Genesis21:28 Chuin Abraham'in kelngoihon lah-a konchun kelngoinou anu sagi atumin akoidoh-in ahi. 
Genesis21:29 Chuin Abimelech'in Abraham henga, Kelngoinou anu sagi atuma nakoidoh hi ipi tina ham? Ati." 
Genesis21:30 Chuin aman, Hiche twikhuh hi keima lai ahi ti hettohsah nadinga hiche kelngoinou anu sagi hi kakhutna kona nakilah ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis21:31 Hiche jeh chun aman chuche munchu chu Beersheba asahtai; ajehchu hikoma chun amani akihahsel gel lhona ahi. 
Genesis21:32 Chutichun amanin Beersheba mun'a chun kitepna asemlhontan ahi. Chujouvin Abimelech le asepaihon gal lamkai Phicol akipatdoh lhonin, Philistine gam lama akile lhontai." 
Genesis21:33 Chuin Abraham'in Beersheba'a chun thingphung khat aphutnin, chua chun Pakai tonsot Pathen min chu akoutan ahi." 
Genesis21:34 Chutichun Abraham Philistine gama nikho sottah akhopemin ahi. 
Genesis22:1 Chuin chucheng nung chun ahitin ahi, Pathen'in Abraham chu apatepmin, ahenga, Abraham, tin akouvin ahile; aman, Ven, hikoma kaume, ati." 
Genesis22:2 Chuin aman, Nachapa, nachapa changkhatseh, nangailut tah Isaac chu puijin lang, Moriah gama chen; chule chukom achun keiman kahilding molsang khatna amachu govam thilton gatoh-in, ati." 
Genesis22:3 Chuin Abraham jingpi matah-in athouvin, asangan chu agongin, aumpi gollhang ho mi nile achapa Isaac chu apuijin, chule govam thiltona ding thing a-eh-in, chuin akipatdoh-in, Pathen'in ahilna munlam jonchun achetan ahi." 
Genesis22:4 Chuin, anithum chanin Abraham akhodah-in ahile, amun chu gamla tah-a agahmun ahi" 
Genesis22:5 Chuin Abraham'in agollhang teni henga, hikoma hin nangni sangan toh ana um lhonin, keimale chapang hi khukoma khun gache lhoningting, Pathen kagahou lhonding, chuteng naheng lhona kahungkit lhonding ahi, ati." 
Genesis22:6 Chuin Abraham'in govam thilto ding thingchu alan, achapa Isaac aputsah-in; chule aman meile chemcha akhutna achoijin, chuin amani thakhat nin akilhon khom lhontai." 
Genesis22:7 Chuin Isaac'in apa Abraham henga, Hepa, atile, aman, Chapa hikoma kaume, ati. Chuin aman, Ven, mei le thing la aumnan, govam thilto ding kelngoi hoiba ham? ati." 
Genesis22:8 Chuin Abraham'in, Kachapa, govam thilto ding kelngoinou chu Pathen amatah-in hinpenante, ati. Chutichun amani thakhat nin achekhom lhonin ahi." 
Genesis22:9 Chuin Pathen'in ama ahilna mun chu alhung lhontan; Abraham'in maicham khat atungdoh-in, chule thing chu asetoh-in, chuin achapa Isaac chu akanin, maicham chunga chun alupsahtan ahi." 
Genesis22:10 Chuin Abraham'in akhut alhangin, achapa thana ding chun chemcha chu alatan ahi." 
Genesis22:11 Chuin Pakai Vantil'in van'a konin ahin samin, Abraham, Abraham, atin ahi. Chuin aman, Hikoma kaume, ati." 
Genesis22:12 Chuin aman, Chapang chunga chun nakhut lha hih-in, chujong le ama chu imacha lohih-in: ajehchu nangman nacha changkhat seh jong keima dinga itlouhela neipeh chu kamun, Pathen naginge ti tun kahetai, ati."
