Genesis22:13 Chuin Abraham akhodah-in aven ahile, anunglama chun kelngoichal khat nang lah-a aki-a oh amun ahi. Chuin Abraham achen, kelngoi chal chu agamanin, hichu achapa khelin govam thilto ding chun atohtan ahi." 
Genesis22:14 Chuin Abraham'in chumun chu Jehovah Jireh asahtai: chule tuni chan geihin, Pakai molsanga hichu kipeding ahi, tin akiseijing nalaijin ahi." 
Genesis22:15 Chuin Pakai Vantil'in aniveina-in van'a konin Abraham chu ahinkou kitnin," 
Genesis22:16 Ajah-a, Keima le keima-a kihahsel kahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije; Ajehchu nangman hiche hi nabola, chule nachapa, nachapa changkhat na-it louhel jeh-a;" 
Genesis22:17 Keiman phattheiboh na-a nangma phatthei kaboh ding, chule hapuna punsah na-a nachilhahte van'a ahsijat, twikhanglen kama neldi jat na kapunsah ding; chule nachilhahte chun amelmateu kotpiho alodingu ahi." 
Genesis22:18 Chule nangman kathu nangai tah jeh-a, nachilhahte akona vannoi leiset chitin namtin jouse phatthei boh changding ahiuve, ati." 
Genesis22:19 Chuti chun Abraham gollhang teni henga ahung kilen; chuin amaho akipat doh-un Beersheba lam jonin thakhatnin acheuvin; chule Abraham Beersheba'a achengtan ahi. 
Genesis22:20 Thil hicheng jouchun ahitin ahi, Abraham henga, Vetan, Milkah'in jong nasopipa Nahor dingin chate ahinpehtai, tin thu aseipeh-un ahi." 
Genesis22:21 Achapa peng masa chu Huz ahin, anaopa Buz ahin, chule Aram pa Kemuel," 
Genesis22:22 Chule Chessad, Hazo, Pildash, Jidlaph chule Bethuel ahi." 
Genesis22:23 Chule Bethuel'in Rebekah ahingin ahi. Hicheng get hi Milkah'in Abraham sopipa Nahor ahinpeh ahi. 
Genesis22:24 Chuin athaikemnu Reumah chun Tebah, Gaham, Thahash chule Maachah ahingin ahi." 
Genesis23:1 Chule Sarah chu kum jakhat le kum somni le kum sagi alhingtan ahi; hicheng hi Sarah hinkho kumho chu ahi. 
Genesis23:2 Chuin Sarah chu Kirjath-Arba'a chun athitan; hichu Canaan gama Hebron chu ahi. Chuin Abraham chu Sarah op ding le ka dingin ahungin ahi. 
Genesis23:3 Chuin Abraham amithilong masanga chun adingdoh-in, Heth chapate henga chun thu aseijin," 
Genesis23:4 Keimahi nalah uva um maljin le khopem bou kahi: kami thi hi kamit mu-a kona kavui doh theina dingin, gouva kanei dingin kivuina ding mun phabep khat neipeuvin, ati." 
Genesis23:5 Chuin Heth chapate chun Abraham adonbutnun, ajah-a," 
Genesis23:6 Ka pakai, nei ngaipeh temun: nangma kalah uva leng chapa loupitah nahi: kalhan hou nadei nalai tah-a namithi chu vuijengtan; namithi navuina dingin kalah uva hin koimachan kalhan nu pehdoh ding itpou vinge, atiuve." 
Genesis23:7 Chuin Abraham ading doh-in, chuche gam mite, Heth chapate anga chun akuntan ahi." 
Genesis23:8 Chuin amaho chutoh akihouvin, ajah uva, Kami thi kamitmu-a kona kavuiding nalungu ahile, neingaipeh-un, chule keima dingin Zohar chapa Ephron henga neithum peh-un," 
Genesis23:9 Nalah uva kivuina munna gouva kanei dingin, aman lhingset pedingin, aman anei alou bantah-a um Machpelah songko chu eipehen, ati." 
Genesis23:10 Chuin Ephron chu Heth chapate lah-a cheng ahi: chuin Hit mi Ephron chun Heth chate jahdingle khopi kul kotpi sunga lut jouse jahding chun Abraham chu adonbutnin," 
Genesis23:11 Ahipoi ka pakai, ngaitemin; louchu kapeh nahitan, chule asunga um songko jong chu kapeh tha nahitai; kamite chapate masanga hi nangma kapeh nahitai: namithi chu kivuitan, ati." 
Genesis23:12 Chuin Abraham chuche gam mite angsunga chun aboh khupmin ahi. 
Genesis23:13 Chuin aman chuche gam mite jah ding chun Ephron henga, Nangman neipeh ahile katao ahi, neingaipeh-in: keiman gamman ding chun nangma sum peng kate; hichu keija konin kilah-in, chule keiman chukoma chun kami thi chu vuijing kate, ati." 
Genesis23:14 Chuin Ephron'in Abraham chu adonbutnin, ajah-a," 
Genesis23:15 Ka pakai, kasei neingaipeh-in: gam chu dangka shekel jali man bep ahin, hichu nangle kei kah-a itah ham? Hiche jehchun namithi chu kivuitan, ati." 
Genesis23:16 Chuin Abraham'in Ephron thusei chu angaipeh-in; chule Abraham'in Heth chapate hetnin Ephron'in aseijat dangka shekel jali chu, chuche laija sumkol veihon amanjiu dungjui chun Ephron chu atepeh tan ahi." 
Genesis23:17 Chuin Mamre kom Machpelah gamsunga um Ephron loumun chu, alou le asunga um songko, chule louva um thing jouse, chule alou kimvela um thing jouse chu," 
Genesis23:18 Heth chate angsung le khopi kul kotpi sunga lut jouse mitmun Abraham nei dingin pehdoh-in aumtan ahi. 
Genesis23:19 Chujouvin Abraham'in a-inneipi Sarah chu Canaan gama Mamre (hichu Hebron ahi) jona um Machpelah lou munna songkoa chun avuitan ahi. 
Genesis23:20 Chuche lou munle asunga songko chu kivuina mun'a anei dingin, Abraham henga Heth chapate chun apedoh taovin ahi." 
Genesis24:1 Chuin Abraham chu a-upa lhehtan, akumjong atamlheh jengtan; chule Abraham chu Pakaiyin thil jouse-a phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
Genesis24:2 Chuin Abraham'in a-insunga asoh upapen, anei jouse chunga vaihompa henga chun, Nahenga katao ahi, nakhut chu kaphei noija koijin;" 
Genesis24:3 Chule Pakai, Van Pathen le lei Pathen min paning ting, kachenna Canaan mite chanute lah-ahi kachapa jiding napuipeh louna dingin nangma kihahsel sah inge." 
Genesis24:4 Ahin kagam lama, ka-inkote lah-a nache-a kachapa Isaac jiding nagapuijoh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis24:5 Chuin sohpa chun ahenga, Ijemtin numei chun hiche gamlama hin eihin juinom tahih le, nachapa hi nahungdoh na gamlama chu kalepuikit ngai jin tem? ati." 
Genesis24:6 Chuin Abraham'in amapa henga, Kachapa hi chulama nalepui louna dingin nangma chingthei jin." 
Genesis24:7 Pakai van Pathen, kapa in'a konle ka sopite gama kona eipuidohpa, chule kahenga, Hiche gamhi nachilhahte kapeh ding ahi; tia kihahsel pachun avantil namasanga solintin, chua kona chu kachapa jiding napuipeh ding ahi." 
Genesis24:8 Chule ijemtia numei chun najui nomlou tah-a ahile, hiche kihahsel na-a kona hi ongdoh-a nahi; kachapa vanghi chulama chu nalepui lou ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis24:9 Chuin asohpa chun apu Abraham phei noija chun akhut akoijin, chule chuche thudola chun ahenga akihahseltan ahi." 
Genesis24:10 Chuin asohpa chun sangongsao ho lah-a chun sangongsao som akipuijin akipatdoh tai; ajehchu apupa neile gou jouse chu akhutna uma ahi. Chuin akipatdoh-in, Mesopotamia gam, Nahor khopi jonin achetan ahi." 
Genesis24:11 Chuin nilhah lam, numei ho twi thal dinga apotdoh phat dontah chun, khopi pama twikhuh koma asangongsao hochu akolsah-in ahi." 
Genesis24:12 Chuin ama, Vo Pakai, kapu Abraham Pathen, nahenga katao ahi, tunin lolhinna neihinpen, chule kapu Abraham lungsetna musah-in." 
Genesis24:13 Vetan, twikhuh koma hin kadingin, chule hiche khopi miho chanute twithal dingin ahungdoh-ui;" 
Genesis24:14 Chule hiti hi hisah-in, nungah koikom hijongleh, Katao ahi, kadon dingin atwibel hin nemsah-in, kati-a, chule amanun, Donin, chule keiman nasangongsao hojong adondiu penange, tia seipen pen chu nasoh Isaac dinga nami got chu hijenghen. Chule nangman hichea kona chu kapu chunga hepina namusah-e ti kahet ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis24:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, chuche aseijou masang chun, veuvin, Abraham naopa, Nahor inneipi Milkah chapa Bethuel chanu Rebekah chun alengkouva twibel ahinpun, ahung potdoh-in ahi." 
Genesis24:16 Chule nungah nu chu amel ahoilheh jengin, nungah theng ahin, pasal koimachan akihetpi loulai ahi. Chuin amanu twikhuh-a chun akumlhan, atwibel chu athaldim-in ahung potdoh-in ahi." 
Genesis24:17 Chuin sohpa chu amanu chutoh kimuto ding chun alhaijelin, ajah-a, Katao ahi, natwi bela twi chu themkhat neidonsah-in, ati." 
Genesis24:18 Chuin amanun, Donin, ka pakai, ati. Chuin amanun gangtah-in atwibel chu akhutnin adomlhan, amapa chu adonsah tai." 
Genesis24:19 Chuin amapa chu twi adonsah jou phatnin, amanun, Nasangongsao hon jong adonkhop kahseovin, keiman twi thalpeh nange, ati." 
Genesis24:20 Chuti chun amanun atwibel chu gankonga chun asunglha loijin, twi thal dingin twikhuh lama chun alhaijel kitnin, asangongsao ho jouse ding chun athal pehtan ahi." 
Genesis24:21 Chuin mipa chun Pakaiyin ajina chu alolhinsah ding le alolhinsah lou ding hetna din, kidangsa tah-in amanu chu thipbeh chan avejing tan ahi." 
Genesis24:22 Chuin ahitin ahi, Sangongsao ho chun adonkhop phatnun, mipa chun sana bilba shekel keh gih le, amanun akhutna abu ding sana chao shekel som gih aladoh-in," 
Genesis24:23 Amanu henga, Koi chanu nahim? katao ahi, neisei peh-in; napa in'a keiho din gena ding mun umin tem? ati." 
Genesis24:24 Chuin amanun ajah-a, Keima Milcah'in Nahor dinga ahinpeh achapa Bethuel chanu kahi, ati." 
Genesis24:25 Chuin amanu chun ahenga aseiben, Changpol le gancha a-an ding anneh nengtah-in kaneijui, chule genading mun jong kaneijuve, ati." 
Genesis24:26 Chuin mipa chu akunin, Pakai chu ahou tan ahi." 
Genesis24:27 Chuin aman, Kapu chunga hepina le akitahna nungsun loupa Pakai kapu Abraham Pathen chu nunnom hen: keijeng jong hi Pakai chun lamdunga eipuijin, kapu sopite in geijin eipuilutai, ati." 
Genesis24:28 Chuin nungah nuchu alhaijelin, hiche ho chu anu insung mite agahiltai." 
Genesis24:29 Chule Rebekah chun sopi khat aneijin, chule amin Laban ahin; chuin Laban chu twikhuh lama mipa henga chun alhaijelin ahi." 
Genesis24:30 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman bilba le asopinu khutna chaochu amu-a, chule asopinu Rebekah'in, Mipa chun kakoma hitihin thu aseije, tia asei ajah phatnin; mipa koma chun ahungin ahile; veuvin, amapa chu twikhuh koma sangongsao holah-a chun adingin ahi." 
Genesis24:31 Chuin aman, Hunglutnin, nangma Pakai phatthei boh changpa, iti dana pama nadin ham? Ajehchu keiman in le sangongsao ho ding mun kagotsa ahitai, ati." 
Genesis24:32 Chuin mipa chu in'a chun ahung luttan ahi. Chuin Laban'in sangongsao thilho chu alhamlhan, sangongsao hoding changpol le gan an chu apen, chule ama keng le anungjui ho keng silna ding twi apen ahi." 
Genesis24:33 Chuin a-anga chun nehding an aluipeh-un; ahin amapan, Kaseiding dol kasei masangin neponge, ati. Chuin aman, Seitang em, ati." 
Genesis24:34 Chuin aman, Keima Abraham sohpa kahi." 
Genesis24:35 Chule Pakaiyin kapu Abraham chu nasatah-in phatthei aboh-in, ama milentah ahung hitai. Chule Pakaiyin amachu kelngoi hon le bong hon, dangka le Sana, soh pasal le soh numei ho, sangongsao ho le Sangan ho apen ahi." 
Genesis24:36 Chule kapu inneipi Sarah chun ateh nungin kapu dingin chapa khat ahinpeh-in; ama koma chun aman anei jouse apesoh keijin ahi. 
Genesis24:37 Chule kapun keima eikihahsel sah-in, Kachenna Canaan mite chanute lah-a kona hi kachapa jiding napui lou ding ahi." 
Genesis24:38 Amavang nangma kapa in lama, kasopite lah-a naga chea, kachapa jiding nagapui ding ahi, atin ahi." 
Genesis24:39 Chuin keiman kapu henga, Ijemtin numei chun eihin juinom tahih le, katin ahi." 
Genesis24:40 Ahin aman kahenga, amasanga kalamlhah jing Pakai chun avantil nalhonpi sah intin, nalampi chu alolhinsah ding; chule nangman kasopite le kapa insunga kona kachapa jiding napuiding ahi." 
Genesis24:41 Nangma kasopite heng nalhun teng le, hiche kihahsel na-a kona hi na-ondoh ding; chule amahon amanu nangma henga apehlou uva ahile, hiche kahahsel na-a kona hi na-ondoh ding ahi, atin ahi." 
Genesis24:42 Chule tuni luikhuh kahung lhunin keiman, Vo Pakai kapu Abraham Pathen, nangma tu-a hi kachena lampi hi nalolhinsah dinga ahile," 
Genesis24:43 Vetan, keima twikhuh kom ahin kading-e; chule hung hiti ding ahi, nungah theng chu twi thaldinga ahunga, chule keiman ahenga, Katao ahi, natwi bela twi donding themkhat neipen, kati-a," 
Genesis24:44 Chule amanun kahenga, Donin, keiman na sangongsao ho ding jong gathal nange, tia seija amanu chu kapu chapa dinga Pakaiyin agon numei chu hihen katin ahi." 
Genesis24:45 Chuin hichu kalung sunga kaseijou masangin, veuvin, Rebekah hin alengkouva twibel ahinpun, ahung doh-in; chule amanu twikhuh-a chun akumlhan, twi chu agathal tai. Chuin keiman ahenga, Katao ahi, twi neidon sah-in kati." 
Genesis24:46 Chuin aman gangtah-in alengkouva twibel chu adomlhan, Donin, keiman na sangongsao ho jong donsah inge, atin ahi. Chuti chun keiman twi chu kadonin, chule aman sangongsao ho jong adonsah tai." 
Genesis24:47 Chuin keiman ama chu kadongin, ajah-a, Koi chanu nahim? kati. Chuin amanun, Milcah'in Nahor'a dinga ahinpeh chapa Bethuel chanu kahi, ati. Chuin keiman amaija bilba kabapeh in, akhutna chao kabupeh-in ahi." 
Genesis24:48 Chuin kakunin, Pakai chu kahouvin, kapu sopipa chanu kapu chapa ji-a puipeh dinga lamdih-a eipuija Pakai kapu Abraham Pathen chu phatthei kabohtan ahi." 
Genesis24:49 Chule tun, jetlam ham, veilam hama kakihei thei na dingin, kapu chu lungsettah le dihtah-a naboldiu le neisei peh-un: nabol loudiu jongle neisei peh-un, ati." 
Genesis24:50 Chuin Laban le Bethuel'in adonbut lhonin, Hiche thil hi Pakaiya kon ahin; keihon ase, apha nahenga kaseithei pouve." 
Genesis24:51 Ven, Rebekah na-angsunga aume, kipuijin lang chen, chuleh Pakaiyin aseibang chun, napu chapa jiding hitahen, atilhone." 
Genesis24:52 Chuin ahitin ahi, Abraham sohpa chun athuseiju ajah phatnin, tolla aboh khupmin Pakai chu ahoutan ahi." 
Genesis24:53 Chuin Sohpa chun dangka kijep na, sana-a kijepna, chule ponsil ho aladoh-in, Rebekah chu apetan ahi. Aman asopipa leh anujong thil lutahtah apen ahi." 
Genesis24:54 Chuin amale aumpiho chun aneovin chule adonun, jankhovah keijin aumtaovin ahi. Chuin amaho jingkah-in athouvun, chule aman, Kapu henglama neisol taovin, ati." 
Genesis24:55 Chuin asopi pa le anun, Boinu hi ni chomkhat, nisombeh kaheng uvah umtadi hen; chujouteng leh che nante, atilhonne." 
Genesis24:56 Ahivangin amapan ahenguva, Pakaiyin kachena alolhinsah namu nungun, neikho ngaisah tahih-un; kapu henglama kache theina dingin neisoldoh taovin, ati." 
Genesis24:57 Chuin amahon, Keihon boinu kou ungting, ama dongnao vinge, atiuve." 
Genesis24:58 Chuin amahon Rebekah chu akouvun, ajah-a, Hichepa toh nalhonna nache ding ham? atiuve. Chuin amanun, Kache ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis24:59 Chuin amahon anaonu Rebekah le ajenlenu, chule Abraham sohpa le aloite chu alhadoh taove." 
Genesis24:60 Chuin amahon Rebekah chu phatthei aboh-un, ahenga, Nangma kasopinu-u nahi, nangma nelsang tamtah nu hunghin lang, chule nachilhahte chun amelmateu kotpi hinlouhen, atiuve." 
Genesis24:61 Chuin Rebekah chu asoh nungah hotoh akipat doh-un, sangongsao ho chunga chun atouvun, mipa chu ajuitaove. Chutichun sohpa chun Rebekah chu akipuijin, achetan ahi." 
Genesis24:62 Chuin Isaac chu Beer-lahai-roi twikhuh lampia konchun ahungin ahi; ajehchu ama lhanglam gama chu chenga ahi. 
Genesis24:63 Chuin Isaac chu nilhah lamin loujaova lunggel dingin ahung potdoh-in; chuin ama akhodah-in aven ahile, veuvin, sangongsao ho ahung kijotnun ahi." 
Genesis24:64 Chuin Rebekah akhodah-in, chuin Isaac chu amuphatnin, sangongsao chunga konin akumlhan ahi." 
Genesis24:65 Ajehchu amanun sohpa henga chu, loujaova eilamdot diuva hung khu koi ham? tia anadoh-a; chule sohpa chun, Kapu ahi, anati ahi. Hijeh chun aman ponlukhuh alan, akikhuh tan ahi." 
Genesis24:66 Chuin sohpa chun athilbol jouse chu Isaac aseipeh tan ahi. 
Genesis24:67 Chuin Isaac'in ama chu anu Sarah pon insunga chun apuilutnin, chule Rebekah chu akipuijin, chuin amanu a-inneipi ahitan; chule aman amanu chu angailu lheh-in ahi. Chuin Isaac chu anu thi nungin lhamongin aumtan ahi." 
Genesis25:1 Chuin Abraham'in ji khat akipui kitnin, amin Keturah ahi." 
Genesis25:2 Chule amanun amachu Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak chule Shuah ahinpeh-in ahi." 
Genesis25:3 Chuin Jokshan'in Sheba le Dedan ahingin, chule Dedan chapate chu Asshurim, Lethushim chule Leummim ahiuve." 
Genesis25:4 Chule Midian chapate chu, Ephah, Epher Hanoch, Abidah chule Eldaah ahiuve. Hichengse hi Keturah chate ahiuve." 
Genesis25:5 Chuin Abraham'in anei jouse chu Isaac apetan ahi. 
Genesis25:6 Chule ahin laijin Abraham'in athaikem chapate hojong thilpeh apen, chuin amaho chu achapa Isaac koma konin solamsang, solam gama asolmang tan ahi." 
Genesis25:7 Chule Abraham hinkho kum nikho ho chu kum jakhat le kum somsagi le nga ahi. 
Genesis25:8 Chuin Abraham'in alhagao alhadoh-in, ateh kemset, tehsetah, chule kum lhingsetnin athin; amite toh gopkhomin aumtan ahi." 
Genesis25:9 Chuin achapateni Isaac le Ishmael chun Hit mi Zohar chapa Ephron loumuna, Mamre koma Machpelah songkoa chun amachu avui lhontan ahi." 
Genesis25:10 Chuche loumun chu Abraham'in Heth chapate-a kona anachohdoh ahi. Chua chun Abraham chu a-inneipi Sarah toh akivuitan ahi. 
Genesis25:11 Chuin Abraham athi nungin ahitin ahi, Pathen'in achapa, Isaac chu phatthei aboh-in; chule Isaac chu Beer-lahai-roi twikhuh koma chun achengin ahi." 
Genesis25:12 Tun hiche hohi Abraham chapa, Ishmael Sarah sohnu, Egypt mi Hagar'in Abraham ahinpeh chilhah ho akhanggui chu ahi." 
Genesis25:13 Chule hiche ho hi akhanggui dungjui cheh uva Ishmael chapate min chu ahi. Ishmael cha apeng masa pen Nebaioth ahin, Abana Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Mishma, Dumah, Nassa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadar, Tema, Jetur, Naphish chule Kedemah ahiuve." 
Genesis25:16 Hichengse hi Ishmael chapate min chu ahin, chule hichengse hi akhopiu dungjui le akulpiu dungjuija amin; chule avaipiu dungjuijin leng som le leng ni chu ahiuve." 
Genesis25:17 Chule Ishmael hinkho kumho chu kum jakhat le kum somthum le sagi ahi. Chuin aman alhagao alhadoh-in athitan; chule amite toh gopkhomin aumtan ahi. 
Genesis25:18 Chule amaho chu Havilah'a patnin Shur geijin achengun, hichu Egypt solam Assyria jotna-a um ahi. Chuin ama asopite jouse mitmun athitan ahi." 
Genesis25:19 Chule hicheng hi Abraham chapa, Isaac khanggui hochu ahiuve: Abraham'in Isaac ahingin ahi." 
Genesis25:20 Chule Isaac'in Padan Aram gama Syria mi Bethuel chanu, Syria mi Laban sopinu Rebekah aji dinga akipui chun, kum somli alhing tai." 
Genesis25:21 Chule a-inneipi chin jehchun Isaac'in Pakai henga ataopeh-in ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin ataona asanpeh-in, a-inneipi Rebekah chun nao avoptan ahi." 
Genesis25:22 Chuin chapang teni chu asunga chun ahung kidel lhonin ahile, amanun, Hitiding ahi-a ahile, ibola hiti kahim? ati. Chuin amanu Pakai dong dingin achetai." 
Genesis25:23 Chuin Pakaiyin amanu henga, Nanaobu sunga hi nam ni uma ahin; chule na-oisunga kona hi hina chomcheh nei mini khendoh-a umding ahi; chule khatjo chu khatjoh sanga chu hatjo ding, chule a-upa johchun anaopa ajending ahi." 
Genesis25:24 Chuin amanu asophat alhin phatnin, veuvin anaobu sunga chun naosen ni anaumin ahi." 
Genesis25:25 Chule ahungpot masa chu asanin, samul pon bangin amulin; chule amin Esau asah-un ahi." 
Genesis25:26 Chuche jouchun anaopa ahungpotnin, akhutnin Esau khotal jum ahintuh-in; chule amin Jacob asah-un ahi. Rebekah'in amani ahinpeh chun Isaac kum somgup alhingtan ahi." 
Genesis25:27 Chutichun chapang teni chu ahung khangdoh lhonin; chule Esau chu sakap themtah mi gamlah mi ahin, Jacob vang chu mi-ummong pon in'a cheng ahi." 
Genesis25:28 Chuin asakap sa anehji jeh-in, Isaac chun Esau angailun, Rebekah'in vang Jacob angailun ahi." 
Genesis25:29 Khatvei hi Jacob'in annoi ahonin; chule Esau gama konin ahungin, agilkel lheh jengin ahi." 
Genesis25:30 Chuin Esau'in Jacob henga, Katao ahi, na annoi hon san peh chu neineh sah-in, ajehchu keima kel lih paiding kahitai, ati. Hijeh-a chu amin Edom kisah ahi." 
Genesis25:31 Chuin Jacob'in, Na-upat chu tunin neichoh sah-in, ati." 
Genesis25:32 Chuin Esau'in, Athipai ding kahitai, keima dinga upat hi ija phachom dingham? ati." 
Genesis25:33 Chuin Jacob'in, Tunin kahenga kihahsel in ati: chuin ama ahenga akihahselin, a-upat chu Jacob henga akijoh tai." 
Genesis25:34 Chujouvin Jacob'in Esau chu changlhah le bechimnoi chu apen; chuin aman anen adonin, chuin akipatdoh-in, achemang tan ahi. Hitichun Esau'in a-upat na chu iman ageltapoi." 
Genesis26:1 Chuin chuche gama chun Abraham nikho laija kellhah masa chu hilouvin, kel ahung lhatan ahi. Chuin Isaac chu Philistine lengpa Abimelech henga Gerar mun'a agachen ahi." 
Genesis26:2 Chuin Pakai ahenga ahung kilah-in, ajah-a, Egypt gama chesuh hih-in, keiman kaseipeh ding gama chun chengin." 
Genesis26:3 Hiche gama hin khopemin, chule keiman nangma umping ting, phatthei kaboh ding nahi; ajehchu nangma le nachilhahte henga hiche gamjouse hi kapeh ding; chutia chu keiman napa Abraham henga kaki hahsel na chu kasuh bulhit ding ahi." 
Genesis26:4 Chule keiman nachilhahte van'a ahsi jatnin punsah ingting, chule hiche gam jouse hi nachilhahte kapeh ding; chule nachilhahte-a kona vannoi namtin jouse phatthei boh chang ding ahiuve." 
Genesis26:5 Ajehchu Abraham'in kathu angaijin chule kathuhil ho, kathupeh ho, kachondan ho, chule kadanthu ho anitnin ahi, ati." 
Genesis26:6 Chuti chun Isaac Gerar mun'a chun achengtan ahi. 
Genesis26:7 Chuin chuche mun'a cheng ho chun a-inneipi thudol adongun ahile, aman, Kanaonu ahi, ati. Ajehchu amanu ahoijeh chun chuche munna miho chun Rebekah jal chun eithat getnunte, tia ageljeh-a, Ka-inneipi ahi, ati ngamlou ahi." 
Genesis26:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama chukoma sottah aumjouvin, Philistine lengpa Abimelech'in bangkotna konin ahinven ahile, Isaac'in Rebekah anoupet amun ahi." 
Genesis26:9 Chuin Abimelech'in Isaac chu akouvin, ahenga, Vetan, amanuhi na-inneipi ahimonge; achutile itidana, Kanaonu ahi, nati ham? ati. Chuin Isaac'in ahenga, Ajehchu keiman ajole amanu jal hin thilo getninge, tia kagel jeh ahi, ati." 
Genesis26:10 Chuin Abimelech'in, Kachunguva nathil bol hi ipi hitam? Miho lah-a khattou hin na-inneipi hi bailam tah-a aluppi jeng thei ahin, chutia chu kachunguva hi themona nahin lhunsah jengthei ahi, ati." 
Genesis26:11 Chuin Abimelech'in amite jouse chu agih-in ahenguva, Koi hile mipa ahilou le, a-inneipi tongkha chan chu kithat teiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis26:12 Chujouvin Isaac'in chuche gama chun muchi athen ahile, chuche kum chun ajat ja a-atdoh-in ahi; chule Pakaiyin amachu phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
Genesis26:13 Chuin mipa chu ahung haolheh jengtan mihao nasatah ahung hi kahsen ahao tultul jengin ahi. 
Genesis26:14 Ajehchu aman kelngoihon, bonghon, chule soh tamtah aneitan ahi. Chuin Philistine mihon amitthip taovin ahi." 
Genesis26:15 Ajehchu apa Abraham hinlaija apa sohten analaiju twikhuh jouse chu Philistine mihon asuhtanguva, chule leija adipdim gamu ahitai." 
Genesis26:16 Chuin Abimelech'in Isaac henga, Keiho-a konin chemang taovin, ajehchu nangma keiho sangin gamchengin nahat tai, ati." 
Genesis26:17 Chuin Isaac chua kon chun akichonin, Gerar phaichama pon in asongin chua chun achengtai." 
Genesis26:18 Chuin Isaac'in apa Abraham hinlaija atuikhuh laiho chu alai kittan ahi; ajehchu Philistine miten Abraham thinunga anasuh tang gamu ahitai. Chule apan ana minsah bang cheh chun, amin sah cheh kittan ahi." 
Genesis26:19 Chuin Isaac sohten phaicham chu alaijun ahile, twinah put khat amutaove." 
Genesis26:20 Chuin Gerar mun'a ganchingho chun, Twi hi keiho-a ahi atiuvin, Isaac ganching ho chu akinah pi taovin ahi. Chuin amahon akinahpi jeh-u chun twikhuh minchu Esek asahtai." 
Genesis26:21 Chujouvin amahon twikhuh chomkhat alaikitnun ahile, hiche chunga jong chun akina kit taove. Hijeh chun aman chuche minchu Sitnah asahtai." 
Genesis26:22 Chuin ama chua konchun akichon kitnin, twikhuh khat alaikitnin ahile hiche chunga vang chun akina tapouve. Hijeh chun hiche mun chu Rehoboth asahtai; ajehchu tunvang Pakaiyin eihodin mun eipe taovin, chule hiche gamahi hatah-a ipundiu ahitai, ati." 
Genesis26:23 Chuin hichea kon chun ama Beersheba'a achetou tan ahi. 
Genesis26:24 Chuin chuche janchun ahenga Pakai ahung akilah-in, Keima hi napa Abraham Pathen chu kahi; kicha hih-in, ajehchu keiman nangma kaumpinai; chule kasoh Abraham jala nangma phatthei kaboh ding, chule nachilhah kapunsah ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis26:25 Hijeh chun aman chua chun maicham khat asemin, Pakai minchu akouvin, chule chua chun apon in asongin ahi. Chuin chua chun Isaac sohte chun twikhuh khat alaijun ahi." 
Genesis26:26 Chujouvin Abimelech Gerar'a konin agolho lah-a khat Ahuzzath le, asepai lamkai Phicol toh ahenga agacheuvin ahi." 
Genesis26:27 Chuin Isaac'in amaho henga, Neivetda jeh uva naheng uva kona neisol doh-u ahitan, ipi dinga kahenga hung nahiuvem? ati." 
Genesis26:28 Chuin amahon, Pakaiyin, naumpi-e ti kichentah-in kamuve. Hijeh-a chu keihon, Tun eiho kah-a, keihole nangma kah ngeija kihahselna umhen lang, nangma toh kitepna neileuhen katiu ahi." 
Genesis26:29 Chutia chu keihon nangma katohkhah daova, chule apha tailou imacha dang kabol daova, chule lungmong tah-a kasolmang bangu chu, nangman jong neisuhset louna dingu ahi. Tun nangma Pakai phatthei boh chang nahitai, atiuve." 
Genesis26:30 Chuin aman amaho ding chun golvah abolin, chuin amahon aneuvin, adonnuvin ahi." 
Genesis26:31 Chuin jingkah matah in athouvun, amaho khat le khat akihahsel uvin ahi. Chuin Isaac'in amaho chu asoldoh-in, chule amaho ama-a konin lung mongin achedoh taove." 
Genesis26:32 Chuin chuche ni mama chun ahitin ahi, Isaac sohte ahungun, atuikhuh laiju chungchang thu chu ahung seijun, ahenga, Twi kamutaove, ahung tiuve." 
Genesis26:33 Chuin aman hichu Shebah asahtai. Hijeh chun chuche khopi minchu tu nikho geijin Beersheba ahung hitai. 
Genesis26:34 Chuin Esau kum somli alhinin, Hit mi Beeri chanu Judith, chule Hit mi Elon chanu Bashemath jin aneijin ahi." 
Genesis26:35 Chule amani chu Isaac le Rebekah dingin lungnatna ahi lhonin ahi. 
Genesis27:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Isaac chu ateh-a khomutheilou khopma amit athim phatnin, achapa lenjo Esau chu akouvin, ahenga, Kachapa, atin ahile, aman adonbutnin, Ven, hikoma kaume, ati." 
Genesis27:2 Chuin aman, Tun vetan, keima katehtan, itih nikho-a kathi dingham kahepon ahi." 
Genesis27:3 Hijeh chun katao ahi, tun nagalvonho, nalivathei le nathalpi kikenin lang, gamlah-a chen, chule keimadin sa gakaptan." 
Genesis27:4 Chule kathi masanga kahinnan phatthei nabohthei nadingin, kadulamtah-in, tuitah-in neihon peh-in lang, kaneh dingin kahenga hinchoijin, ati." 
Genesis27:5 Chule Isaac'in achapa Esau henga athusei chu Rebekah'in ajatan ahi. Chuin Esau sakap ding le ahinpo dingin gamlah-a achetan ahi. 
Genesis27:6 Chuin Rebekah'in achapa Jacob henga, Ven, napa keiman na-upa henga," 
Genesis27:7 Sa gakap minlang, chule me tuitah-in neihon peh-in, chule hichu nengting, kathi masangin Pakai masanga phathei naboh inge, tia asei kajai, ati." 
Genesis27:8 Hijeh chun tun, kachapa, nangman kathupeh dungjuijin kathu ngaijin." 
Genesis27:9 Tun gan hon lah-a chenlang, alah-a kelnou phatahtah ni hinchoijin; chule keiman hichu adulam tah-in, napa dingin me tuitah honpeh-ing kate." 
Genesis27:10 Chule aman aneh-a, athi masanga phatthei naboh nadinga, hichu napa henga nachoipeh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis27:11 Chuin Jacob'in anu Rebekah henga, Ven, ka-upa Esau hi mimul ahin, keimala minam kahi ngalin," 
Genesis27:12 Ijemtin kapan eihin tham tale, ama dinga keima hi milhemtoh kabah ding ahin, phatthei boh hijolouvin, gaosap najoh kaki buh khum ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis27:13 Chuin anun ahenga, Kachapa nakigaosap nachu keima chunga chumaihen; kathuhi ngaipou pouvin, chenlang neigalah pehtan, ati." 
Genesis27:14 Chuin ama achen, agalan, hichu anu henga ahinchoitan ahi. Chuin anun apa dulamtah in me chu ahontan ahi." 
Genesis27:15 Chuin Rebekah'in achapa lenjo Esau von phaho in'a akoma umho chu alan, achapa neojo Jacob chu avonpehtan ahi." 
Genesis27:16 Chuin amanun kelnou vunho chu akhut teni le angong nam laija chun atom pehtan ahi. 
Genesis27:17 Chuin amanun ame hon tuitah le changlhah chu achapa Jacob khutna apetan ahi. 
Genesis27:18 Chuin ama apa henga ahungin, ajah-a, Hepa, atin ahile; aman, Hikoma kaume, koi nahim kachapa, ati." 
Genesis27:19 Chuin Jacob'in apa henga, Keima nachapa apeng masa Esau chu kahi; nangman neithupeh bangin kagaboltai. Katao ahi, thouvin, chule touvin lang, phatthei neibohnadin kasakap hi netan, ati." 
Genesis27:20 Chuin Isaac'in achapa henga chun, kachapa, chubang loma gangtah-a nagamu jeng chu iti danham? ati. Chuin aman, Pakai na Pathen'in kahenga ahinchoijeh ahi, ati." 
Genesis27:21 Chuin Isaac'in Jacob henga, Katao ahi, kachapa Esau mong mong nahi nahilou katham theina dingin, hungnai temin, ati." 
Genesis27:22 Chuin Jacob'in apa Isaac ahin naijin, chuin aman amachu achulin, A-aw hila Jacob aw ahin, ahin akhut ho hila Esau khut ahingalin, ati." 
Genesis27:23 Akhut hochu a-upa Esau khut banga amuljeh chun, koi ahi ahekhen thei tapon ahi. Hijeh chun aman amachu phatthei aboh tan ahi." 
Genesis27:24 Chuin aman, Nangma kachapa Esau nahi mong mong hinam? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Kahimonge ati." 
Genesis27:25 Chuin aman, Kahenga hinchoi naijin, kahinnan phatthei kaboh thei nadingin, kachapa sakap nenge, ati. Chuin aman ahinchoi naipeh-in, anetan; chuin lengpitwi jong ahin choipeh-in, adontan ahi." 
Genesis27:26 Chuin apa Isaac'in ahenga, Kachapa, tun hung naijin lang, neichopmin, ati." 
Genesis27:27 Chuin ama ahung naijin, achopmin; chuin aman avonho namchu anah-in, amachu phatthei aboh-in, hitin ati, Ven kachapa gimnam hi Pakai phatthei boh gam gimnam ahi." 
Genesis27:28 Chuti ahijeh chun Pathen'in nangma van daitwi le leipha, chule chang le lengpitwi ninglhing setnin napehen." 
Genesis27:29 Mitinin nangma najenu hen, chule namtin nangma anga kuncheh-u hen. Nasopite chunga a-pakaiyun uminlang, nanu chapate na anga kun uhen. Nangma nagaosap chanchu gaosap chang hen lang, nangma phatthei naboh chanchu phatthei boh changhen, ati." 
Genesis27:30 Chuin ahitin ahi, Isaac'in Jacob phatthei aboh jou chun, Jacob apa Isaac henga konin anapotdoh man hamhamin, a-upa Esau asadela konin ahung lhung paitan ahi." 
Genesis27:31 Chuin aman jong me tuitah in ahonin, apa henga ahin domin; chule apa henga, Kapa, thouvin lang nahinnan phatthei neiboh nadingin, nachapa sakap hi netan, ati." 
Genesis27:32 Chuin apa Isaac'in ahenga, Nangma koi nahim? ati. Chuin aman, Keima nachapa apeng masa Esau kahi, ati." 
Genesis27:33 Chuin Isaac nasatah in ati akithing jengtan, koiham? Sa gakapma kahenga asa hinchoija, nahung lhun masanga kana nehjou hella, phatthei kana bohchaisa chu hoilamba hitam? Tahbeh-a amachu phattheiboh changding ahitai, ati." 
Genesis27:34 Chuin Esau'in apa thusei ajah phatnin, nasatah le lhasetah in akaplutlut jengtan, apa henga, Vo hepa, phatthei neiboh-in, keimatah ngeijong hi phatthei neibohteijin, ati." 
Genesis27:35 Chuin aman, nanaopa kahenga doha themtah-in ahungin, na phatthei chanding chu akilahdoh tai, ati." 
Genesis27:36 Chuin aman Jacob kisah chu dih lheh hilou ham? Ajehchu aman niveijen ei dohabol ahitai. Aman ka-upat eilah peh-in, chule ven tun kaphatthei chanding eilahmang peh kit tai, ati. Chuin aman, Phattheina neikhen peh louhel hitam? ati." 
Genesis27:37 Chuin Isaac'in Esau chu adonbutnin, ahenga, Vetan, amachu napakai din kasemtan, chule asopite jouse asohdin kapetan; chule ama chang le lengpitwi jin kavangboh tai. Achutile kachapa nangdinga ipi kabolpeh ding hitam? ati." 
Genesis27:38 Chuin Esau'in apa henga, Phattheina khatseh bou nanei hija ham? Vo hepa, keimahi, keima ngeijong hi phatthei neiboh teijin, ati. Chuin Esau chu hatah-in akaptan ahi." 
Genesis27:39 Chuin apa Isaac'in adonbutnin, ahenga, Vetan, nachenna ding chu leiphatna le chunga kona van daitwi umna mun hiding ahi." 
Genesis27:40 Chule nangma nachem jama nahina, chule nanaopa najending; chule hung hitiding ahi: nangma vaihom na nahin nei teng le, nangonga kona anamkoljon chu nasuhboh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis27:41 Chuin apan phatthei aboh jeh chun, Esau'in Jacob ahotan ahi. Chuin Esau'in alungsunga, Kapa chunga lunghemna nikho anaitan; chujoule kanaopa Jacob hi that ning kate, ati." 
Genesis27:42 Chuin achapa lenjo Esau thusei chu Rebekah chu aseipeh taovin ahi. Hichun aman achapa neojo Jacob chu akouvin, ahenga, Vetan, na-upa Esau'in nangma thading nagon, amale ama akilhamonin ahi." 
Genesis27:43 Hijeh chun tun, kachapa kathu ngaijin, kipat ninlang Haran'a kasopipa Laban heng lama jamtan." 
Genesis27:44 Chule na-upa lungsat nahi abei kahsen, ama chutoh nichom khat ga umtan." 
Genesis27:45 Nachunga na-upa lunghan nahi abeija achunga nathilbol hi asuhmil tengleh, mi hinsoling ting, chua kon chun hung puidoh sah nange. Ipi dinga hi nikhat tah-a nani lhonna kachan ding ham? ati." 
Genesis27:46 Chuin Rebekah'in Isaac henga, Heth chanute jal hin kahinkho ahesoh lheh jenge, Jacob hin hiche gama Heth chanute lah-a hi ji aneikit dingle, kahin hi keidinga ipi phatna ding umem? ati." 
Genesis28:1 Chuin Isaac'in Jacob akouvin, phatthei aboh-in, thu apen ahenga, Nangman Canaan mite chanuho naji dinga nakipui theilou ding ahi." 
Genesis28:2 Kipat in, Padan Aram lama nanu pa Bethuel in'a chen; chua kon chun nanu sopipa Laban chanute khat naji ding gakipuijin." 
Genesis28:3 Chule nangma vaipi khat nahi thei nadingin, hat chungnung Pathen'in phatthei naboh hen, nachi phatsah henlang, hapunin napunsah hen." 
Genesis28:4 Chule hiche nakholjinna gam, Pathen'in Abraham henga anapehsa gamhi nalotheina din, Abraham phatthei kiboh na chu nangma le nachilhahte napeu hen, ati." 
Genesis28:5 Chuin Isaac'in Jacob asolmang tan ahi. Chuin ama Jacob le Esau nu Rebekah sopipa, Syria mi Bethuel chapa Laban henglam Padan Aram lama achetan ahi." 
Genesis28:6 Esau'in, Isaac'in Jacob phatthei aboh-a Padan-Aram'a ji kipui dingin asol le, aman amachu phatthei aboh-a, Canaan chanute nakichenpi louding ahi, tia thu apeh chu amun," 
Genesis28:7 Chule Jacob in anule apa thu angaija, Padan Aram-a ache chu amun;" 
Genesis28:8 Chule Esau'in Canaan chanute chun apa Isaac alung lhaisah pouve, ti amu phatnin;" 
Genesis28:9 Chuin Esau Ishmael henga achen, Abraham chapa, Ishmael chanu Mahalath, Nebojoth sopinu chu ji aneisaho chung chon chun akichenpi kitnin ahi." 
Genesis28:10 Chuin Jacob Beersheba'a konin akipat doh-in, Haran lam jonin achetai." 
Genesis28:11 Chuin ama munkhat alhun phatnin, nisa alhumtah jehchun ageh khovahtan ahi. Chuin aman chuche munna songkhat chu alan, lukhapmin aneijin, chukoma ihmuding chun alumtan ahi." 
Genesis28:12 Chuin aman mang aneijin, Vetan, leiset chunga kalbilei akidon, chule hiche mong chun van aphan, chule Pathen vantil ho akumsuh akaltou chu amun ahi" 
Genesis28:13 Chuin vetan, chuche vuma chun Pakai adingin, Keima hi Pakai, napu Abraham Pathen, chule Isaac Pathen chu kahi; nalupna gamhi nangma le na chilhahte henga kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis28:14 Chule nachilhahte chu leisetna leivuijat hung hintin, chule nangma lhumlam le solama, chule sahlam leh lhanglama naki thejao ding ahi. Chule nangma le nachilhahte-a kona vannoi'a namtin phattheiboh chang dingu ahi." 
Genesis28:15 Chule vetan, Keiman nangma kaumpinai, chule nachena chana kachintupma, hiche gama hi kahin nungpui kitding nahi; ajehchu nahenga kasei hi kamolso masangsen nangma dalhapong kate." 
Genesis28:16 Chuin Jacob a-ihmutna konin ahung khangdoh-in; chule aman, Hiche mun'a hin Pakai aum monge; hichu keiman kana hetlou ahi, ati." 
Genesis28:17 Chuin ama akichatan, Hiche mun hi tijat iti umtam! hikom hi Pathen in tailou adang ima ahipoi, hiche hi van kotpi phung ahi, atitai." 
Genesis28:18 Chuin Jacob jingpitah-in athouvin, lukhapma akoi song chu alan, song khom-in aphutnin, achungvuma chun thao asungin ahi." 
Genesis28:19 Chuin aman chumun chu Bethel asah tai. Ahin atila chu chuche khopi chu Luz anakisah ahi. 
Genesis28:20 Chuin Jacob'in kitepna aneijin, Pathen'in eiumpia, kachena lampia hi eichintupma, nehding changlhah le kivon nading sil le chen eipeh-a," 
Genesis28:21 Hitia chu kapa in'a lungmong tah-a kahung kilekitna ahile, Pakai chu ka Pathen hiding ahi." 
Genesis28:22 Chule hiche song khoma katun hi Pathen In hiding; chule nangman neipeh jouse-a kona hi somakhat thonlou hela kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
Genesis29:1 Chujouvin Jacob akholche achepeh-in, chule solam mite gam agalhungtai." 
Genesis29:2 Chuin aman agahven ahile, gamlah-a twikhuh khat amun, chule veuvin, akoma chun kelngoi honthum akolun ahi; ajehchu twikhuh-a kona chu amahon kelngoi honchu twi adonsah jiu ahi. Chule song lentah khat twikhuh kama chun akikoijin ahi." 
Genesis29:3 Chule chua chu kelngoi hon jouse kikhom khom jiuva, chule achinghon twikhuh kama kona chu song chu atahdoh jiuva, kelngoi ho chu twi adonsah jiu ahin; chujouteng, song chu twikhuh kama aum na-a chu akoikit jiu ahi." 
Genesis29:4 Chuin Jacob'in amaho jah-a, Kasopite, nangho hoilamkon mi nahiuvem? ati. Chuin amahon, Haran'a kon kahiuve, atiuve." 
Genesis29:5 Chuin aman ahenguva, Nahor chapa, Laban chu nahet uvem? ati. Chuin amahon, Kaheuve, atiuve." 
Genesis29:6 Chuin aman ahenguva, Amachu damnam? ati. Chuin amahon, Adamnai, chule ven, achanu Rachel'in kelngoi ahinpuijin ahunge, atiuve." 
Genesis29:7 Chuin aman, Veuvin, nisa khu asang lheh nalaijin, gancha puikhom phatjong ahihihlaije. Kelngoi hohi twi chipsah unlang, an ganehsah kit taovin, ati." 
Genesis29:8 Chuin amahon, kelngoihon jouse hung kikhop khom soh-a, twikhuh kama song akilahdoh masangsen, keiho chedoh thei pouvinge. Hiche jouteng chulebou keihon ka kelngoihou twi kadonsahjiu ahi, atiuve." 
Genesis29:9 Chuin ama amaho chutoh akihou nalaijin, Rachel apa kelngoi ho chutoh lhonin ahungin ahi; ajehchu aman kelngoiho chu achinji ahi." 
Genesis29:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jacob'in anu sopipa Laban chanu Rachel le, anu sopipa Laban kelngoi hochu amuphatnin, Jacob chu agache naijin, song chu twikhuh kama konin atangdoh-in, anu sopipa Laban kelngoihon chu twi achip sah-in ahi." 
Genesis29:11 Chuin Jacob in Rachel chu achopmin hatah in akaptan ahi. 
Genesis29:12 Chuin Jacob'in ama amanu pa sopipa ahi le, Rebekah chapa ahichu Rachel aseipeh tan ahi. Chuin amanu alhaijelin apa agahiltan ahi." 
Genesis29:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, Laban'in asopinu chapa Jacob thu ajah phatnin, ama kimupi ding chun alhaijelin, amachu apomin, achopmin, a-in'a ahinpuitai. Chuin aman Laban chu thu jouse ahiltan ahi." 
Genesis29:14 Chuin Laban'in ahenga, tahbeh-in nangma kagu le kaphe mong nahi, ati. Chuin ama akoma chun lhakhat aumtan ahi." 
Genesis29:15 Chuin Laban'in Jacob henga, Nangma katupa nahimana keima mohseh-a neijen ding ham? Natoh man ipi hiding ham, neisei peh-in? ati." 
Genesis29:16 Tun Laban'in chanu ni aneijin, alen jonu minchu Leah ahin, aneo jonu minchu Rachel ahi." 
Genesis29:17 Leah chu amit agelin, Rachel vang chu mel hoitah le dei umtah ahi." 
Genesis29:18 Chuin Jacob'in Rachel chu angailun, hijeh chun aman, Keiman nachanu neojo Rachel lonan kum sagi nangma jen inge ati." 
Genesis29:19 Chuin Laban'in, Keiman amanu midang kapeh sangin, nangma kapeh ding aphajoi. Kakoma umtan ati." 
Genesis29:20 Chuin Jacob'in Rachel dingin kum sagi ajenin, ahin amanu angailut jehchun hiho chu amadin ni chomkhat to abang bepmin ahi." 
Genesis29:21 Chuin Jacob'in Laban henga, Ahenga kalut theina dingin, ka-inneipi chu neipetan; ajehchu kanikho ho abulhing tai, ati." 
Genesis29:22 Chuin Laban'in chuche munna mijouse akhomin golvah abolin ahi. 
Genesis29:23 Chuin nilhah ahiphat nin ahitin ahi, aman achanu Leah chu apuijin, Jacob henga apuilut tan; chule amapa jong amanu henga aluttan ahi." 
Genesis29:24 Chuin Laban'in asohnu Zilpah chu achanu Leah sohnu din apetai. 
Genesis29:25 Chuin ahitin ahi, jingkah ahunghi phatnin, Veuvin, Leah ana hitai. Chuin aman Laban henga, kachunga nabol hi ipi ham? Rachel dinga nangma kajen hilou ham? Achuti le ipi dinga nei dohabol ham? ati." 
Genesis29:26 Chuin Laban'in, kagam uva hi apeng masa masanga aneojo pehdoh chu kibol jilou hel ahi, ati." 
Genesis29:27 Amanu hapta hi subulhitnin, chule kum sagi dang neijen kitding manin amanu jonghi nangma pekit naovinge, ati." 
Genesis29:28 Chuin Jacob'in chuti chun abolin, amanu hapta chu asubulhit tai. Chuin aman achanu Rachel chu aji dingin apetan ahi." 
Genesis29:29 Chuin Laban'in asohnu Bilhah chu achanu Rachel sohdin apetan ahi. 
Genesis29:30 Hitichun ama Rachel henga jong alutnin, aman Rachel chu Leah sangin angailu jon, chule amachu kum sagi dang ajenbe kitnin ahi." 
Genesis29:31 Chuin Leah hotbola aumchu Pakaiyin amuphatnin, anaobu ahonpehtai. Ahin Rachel vangchu achingin ahi." 
Genesis29:32 Chuin Leah'in nao avopmin chapa khat ahingin, amin Reuben asah tai. Ajehchu amanun, tahbeh-in Pakaiyin kahesohna amutan; tunvang ka-inneipun eingailu tante, ati." 
Genesis29:33 Chuin amanun nao avop kitnin chapa khat ahingin, Pakaiyin hotna kaum ahetjeh-a, hiche chapa jong hi eipeh ahi, ati. Chuin aman amin Simeon asahtai." 
Genesis29:34 Chuin amanun nao avop kitnin chapa khat ahingin, Tunvang chapa thum kahin pehtah jeh-in ka-inneipu keija beh tante, ati. Hijeh chun amin Levi asahtai." 
Genesis29:35 Chuin amanun nao avopkit leuvin chapa khat ahing kitnin, chuin amanun, Tunvang keiman Pakai chu vahchoi tange, atin ahi. Hijeh chun amanun amin Judah asahtai: chujouvin amanun acha hin abangtai." 
Genesis30:1 Chuin Rachel'in Jacob cha ahinpeh lou chu amuphatnin, Rachel'in a-unu athangset tan ahi. Chuin amanun Jacob henga, Cha neipen, achuti louleh kathi ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis30:2 Chuin Jacob Rachel chunga alunghan akoujah jengin, ajah-a, Keima nanaobu khahtang-a, Pathen thalhenga uma kahim? ati." 
Genesis30:3 Chuin amanun, Ven, hikoma hin kasohnu Bilhah aume, amanu henga galut tan, chutia chu keiman jong amanu-a kona chate kaneija, chule amanun kaphei chunga cha ahinding ahi, ati." 
Genesis30:4 Chuin amanun asohnu Bilhah chu a-inneipi dingin apetan, chule Jacob jong amanu henga agalut tan ahi." 
Genesis30:5 Chuin Bilhah'in nao avopmin, Jacob chu chapa khat ahinpeh tai." 
Genesis30:6 Chuin Rachel'in, Pathen'in kathu atantan, chule ka aw jong ajan, chapa khat eipetai, ati. Hijeh chun amanun amin Dan asahtai." 
Genesis30:7 Chuin Rachel sohnu Bilhah'in nao avop kitnin, Jacob chu chapa nina ahinpehtai." 
Genesis30:8 Chuin Rachel'in, Kibotna nasatah-in ka-unu kabon-in, kajoutai, ati. Chuin amin Naphtali asah tai." 
Genesis30:9 Leah'in cha ahintah louding ahet phatnin, asohnu Zilpah chu Jacob henga apuijin, ajidin apetan ahi." 
Genesis30:10 Chuin Leah sohnu Zilpah chun Jacob chapa khat ahin peh-in ahi. 
Genesis30:11 Chuin Leah'in, Kavang phalheh-e, ati. Chuin amanun amin Gad asahtan ahi." 
Genesis30:12 Chuin Leah sohnu Zilpah chun Jacob chu chapa nina ahinpeh-in ahi. 
Genesis30:13 Chuin Leah'in, Keima kakipah lheh jenge, ajehchu numei hon anunnom eitidiu ahitai, ati. Chuin amanun amin Asher asahtai." 
Genesis30:14 Chuin suhlou chang at laijin Reuben avah len ahile, hamlah-a joldei-ai ahinmun, anu Leah henga ahin choijin ahi. Chujouvin Rachel'in Leah henga, Katao ahi, nachapa joldei-ai chu neipen, ati." 
Genesis30:15 Chuin amanun ahenga, Ka-inneipu neichudoh peh jong hi thil neocha nahisah-a, kachapa joldei-ai kisan jonghi chudoh ding neigot kit ham? ati. Chuin Rachel'in, Hijeh chun nachapa joldei-ai manin aman tujan nangman luppi nan nate, ati." 
Genesis30:16 Chuin nilhah lamin, Jacob louva kona ahungphatnin, Leah alamdot dingin apotdoh-in, ahenga, Keima henga nahunglut teiding ahi; ajehchu kachapa joldei-ai ja kalodoh nahitai, ati. Chuin aman chuche jan chun amanu aluppitan ahi." 
Genesis30:17 Chuin Pathen'in Leah taona chu asangin, chule amanun nao avopmin, Jacob chu chapa nga channa ahinpeh tai." 
Genesis30:18 Chuin Leah'in, Kasohnu chu ka-inneipu kapeh jeh-a, Pathen'in kalo eipeh ahitai, ati. Chuin amin chu Issachar asahtai." 
Genesis30:19 Chuin Leah'in nao avop kitnin, Jacob chu chapa gupna ahinpeh tai." 
Genesis30:20 Chuin Leah'in, Pathen'in keima thilken phatah eipetai; keiman chapa gup kahin peh tah jeh-in, tunvang ka-inneipun eichen khompi tante, ati. Chuin amin Zebulun asahtai." 
Genesis30:21 Chuin khonungin amanun chanu khat ahingin, amin Dinah asahtai." 
Genesis30:22 Chuin Pathen'in Rachel ageldoh-in, ataona asanpeh-in, anaobu ahonpeh tai." 
Genesis30:23 Chuin amanun nao avopmin, chapa khat ahingtai. Chuin amanun, Pathen'in noise-a kaumna aladohtai, ati." 
Genesis30:24 Hijeh chun amin Joseph asahtai, chule amanun, Pakaiyin chapa khat eipeh beding ahi, ati." 
Genesis30:25 Chuin ahitin ahi, Rachel'in Joseph ahin nungin, Jacob'in Laban henga, keima kho mong le kagam lama kache theina din neisol dohtan." 
Genesis30:26 Nangma kajena kalodoh kajite le kachate neipenlang, neichesah tan. Ajehchu nangma dinga kanatoh ho chu nahenai, ati." 
Genesis30:27 Chuin Laban'in ahenga, katao ahi, namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, umtadin; ajehchu nangma jal-in Pakaiyin phatthei eiboh-e ti kahe doh-in ahi, ati." 
Genesis30:28 Chuin aman, Nalo ding chu neisei peh-in, keiman penange, ati." 
Genesis30:29 Chuin aman ahenga, Nangma iti kajena, chule nagancha te kakoma iti umam, ti nangma tah-in nahet ahi." 
Genesis30:30 Ajehchu keima hung masanga chu lhomcha bou nanei ahin, tunvang tamtah-in apung taove; chule kahunga patnin Pakaiyin nangma phatthei naboh-in ahi. Ahin tun, itih leba keima insung tum ding kakingaito ding ham? ati." 
Genesis30:31 Chuin aman, Nangma ipi kapeh ding ham? ati. Chuin Jacob in, Nangman imacha neipeh louding ahi. Hichehi neibolpeh dinga ahileh, keiman nagancha hon vah ingting, chingkit nange." 
Genesis30:32 Tunin nagancha hon jouse gachonsoh ingting, kengoi lah-a avompol chit chet leh apol phet phut jouse le kelngoinou asan gao jouse, chule kelcha lah-a akang polphet phut le apol chitchet jouse lhengdoh ingting, hichu katohman ding hihen." 
Genesis30:33 Chuti chun khonungle katohman chu namai koh-a ahung kilah teng leh, kachon phatnan keima dinga donbutna apehding ahi. Kelcha ho lah-a apol chitchet le apol phetphut lou jouse le kelngoi lah-a asan gao loujouse chu kaguh-a nalah jeng ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis30:34 Chuin Laban'in, vetan nasei bangchun hihen, ati." 
Genesis30:35 Chuin chuche nichun aman kelchal akihalpol, apoltan le apol phet phut chule kelnu apolchit chet le apolphet phut jouse le achunga akang umjouse, chule kelngoi asan gao jouse chu alhengdoh in, achapate vettupdin apedoh tai." 
Genesis30:36 Chuin aman nithum lam gamlan Jacob chu akikhenpin, chule Jacob chun Laban gancha hon dang jouse chu avah-in ahi." 
Genesis30:37 Chuin Jacob'in navolthing, bulthing, chule thalthing a-eng tenggol hing asatnin, ahoh chu akhoh kangin, tenggol ho-a chun akangchu akido sah-in ahi." 
Genesis30:38 Chutichun ganchaho chu twichipma ahung tengule agaipa nadiuvin, aman ahoh akho tenggol hochu gancha honnin achipnajiu twi donna ho-a chun, gancha hon twi chipma ahung tengule amasanguva chun akoijin ahi." 
Genesis30:39 Chuin gancha hon chu tenggol masanga chun nou anei jiuvin, chule ganchaho chun ajinlha-a pol, apoltan, apol chitchet chule apol phetphut ahing jiuvin ahi." 
Genesis30:40 Chule Jacob'in Kelngoinou hochu atumin akhendoh-in, chule gancha hon chu Laban ganchahon ajinglha, apoltan ho le asan gao jouse lamchu angatsah jin ahi. Chule aman ama ganchahon chu atumin akoijin, Laban gancha hontoh akoitha pon ahi." 
Genesis30:41 Chuin ahitin ahi, ganchahon lah-a ahatdom hochu agai tengle tenggol ho lah-a agai theina diuvin, Jacob'in tenggol hochu twilonna-a chun ganchaho mitmun akoijin ahi." 
Genesis30:42 Ahivangin gancha hatmodom ho ding chun hichu akoi jipoi. Chutichun ahatmo ho chu Laban'a ahijin, ahatho chu Jacob'a ahijitai." 
Genesis30:43 Chuin mipa chu nasatah-in ahung haodoh tan, ganchahon tamtah, soh numei tamtah, soh pasal tamtah, chule sangongsao le sangan tamtah aneitan ahi." 
Genesis31:1 Chuin Laban chapaten, Jacob'in i-pau thil jouse akilahdoh tan; chule ipauva kona hiche loupina nasatah hi akimudoh ahi, tia aseiju chu Jacob'in ajatan ahi." 
Genesis31:2 Chuin Jacob'in Laban maiso chu aven ahile, veuvin, masanga toh abang tapon ahi." 
Genesis31:3 Chuin Pakaiyin Jacob henga, Napu napate gamle nasopite henga kiletan, chule keiman nangma umpi nange, ati." 
Genesis31:4 Hijeh chun Jacob'in gamlah-a agancha hon umna-a chun Rachel le Leah chu agakou sah-in ahi. 
Genesis31:5 Chuin aman aheng lhona, Napau maiso kaven ahile, masanga bangin kachunga ahoi tapon ahi; ahivangin kapa Pathen chun eiumpi jingnai." 
Genesis31:6 Chule katha neina jouse-a napau kajen chu nahe lhon nai. 
Genesis31:7 Ahivangin napau vin dohan eihabolin, katohman chu somvei jen eina khelpeh-e; ahivangin aman eisuhset ding chu Pathen'in ana phalpoi." 
Genesis31:8 Aman, Apol chit chet ho chu natohman ding ahi atile, ganchahon jouse chun apol chit chet ahing jitauvin; chule aman apoltan ho chu natohman ding ahi atile, ganchaho chun apoltan jeng ahing jitauve." 
Genesis31:9 Chutichun Pathen'in napau ganchaho chu alamangin, hiho chu keima eipetai." 
Genesis31:10 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, Ganchaho gai phat laichun, kamangin ka khodah-in ahile, veuvin, ganchahon matna kelngoi chal hochu apoltan, apoltan chit chet chule ajem chom choma pol ngenin kamun ahi." 
Genesis31:11 Chuin Pathen vantil chun kamangin kahenga, Jacob, atin; chuin keiman, Hikoma kaume, kati." 
Genesis31:12 Chuin aman, Tun nangma khodah inlang ven, ganchahon matna kelngoi chal jouse khu apoltan, apol chit chet chule ajem chom choma polngen ahiuve. Ajehchu Laban'in nachunga abol jouse kamutai." 
Genesis31:13 Keima hi nangman songphu chunga thao nanu-a, chule ahenga kitepna naneina Bethel Pathen chu kahi. Tun kipatdoh-in, hiche gama konhin nangma potnin lang, nasopite gamlama kiletan, eitin ahi." 
Genesis31:14 Chuphatnin Rachel le Leah'in adonbut lhonin, ahenga, Kapao insunga keini chanding ahiloule kagoulo lhon ding ipi umnalai beh-em?" 
Genesis31:15 Aman keini maljin bangbepma eigelhon hilouham? Ajehchu aman eikijoh honin, chule kasum hon jong anemang sohtai." 
Genesis31:16 Ajehchu Pathen'in kapauva kona alahmang gou jouse chu keini le kachateuva ahi. Achuti le tun, Pathen'in nahenga aseichan chu boltan, ati lhone." 
Genesis31:17 Chujouvin Jacob akipatnin, achapate le a-inneipi hochu sangongsao chunga atousah-in;" 
Genesis31:18 Canaan gama apa Isaac henga chedingin agancha jouse, alamdoh anei jouse, chule Padan Aram gama alamdoh agancha neiho chu akitolmang soh keitan ahi." 
Genesis31:19 Chuin Laban akelngoiho mulvou dingin achedoh-in; chuin Rachel'in apa milim ho chu agutan ahi. 
Genesis31:20 Chuin Jacob Syria mi Laban hetlouvin akigodoh-in, aman ajam chu anasei peh pon ahi." 
Genesis31:21 Chuti chun ama aneijouse toh ajam than; chule akipatnin vadung chu agalkaijin, Gilead molsang lama akiheitan ahi." 
Genesis31:22 Chuin anithum channin Jacob ajamtai, ti chu Laban aseipeh taovin ahi." 
Genesis31:23 Chuin aman asopite akipuijin, amachu ni sagi lama anungdelin: chuin amahon ama chu Gilead molsang chun aphapa taovin ahi." 
Genesis31:24 Chuin Pathen'in Syria mi Laban henga chun ajan mangin ahungin, ajah-a, Jacob henga ase apha imacha nasei louna din kichih theijin, ati." 
Genesis31:25 Chuin Laban'in Jacob chu aphapatan ahi. Tun Jacob chun apon in chu chuche molsanga chun asongin; chule Laban le asopite chun Gilead molsanga chun asongun ahi. 
Genesis31:26 Chuin Laban'in Jacob henga, Ipi bola nahi-a, kahetlouva nakiguh doh-a, kachanute chu chemjam'a gal hinga kiman banga puimanga nahim? ati." 
Genesis31:27 Iti dana guhthim cha najam manga, keija kona nakiguh doh-a; kipana la, khongcha, chule tumgintheito tho-a kilhahdoh nadinga neihetsah louham?" 
Genesis31:28 Chule katute le kachanu te kachop ding naphal lou ham? Nangman tun ngol hoitah in thil naboltai. 
Genesis31:29 Nangma suhset thei na dingin tha kaneije; ahivangin napa Pathen chun janhi jan chun kahenga, nangman Jacob henga ase apha nasei lounadin kichih theijin, eitin ahi." 
Genesis31:30 Chule tun nangman napa in nangai behseh jeh-a chu che tahbeh-a nahitan, ipi dinga ka pathenho chu neiguh peh ham? ati." 
Genesis31:31 Chuin Jacob'in Laban chu adonbutnin, ahengah, Kakichat jeh ahi; ajehchu keiman, Nachanute hi acham louvin keija konin neilah peh getnin nate kati ahi." 
Genesis31:32 Na pathen ho namuna penpen chu koi hijongle kihinghoi louding ahi. Kasopiteu mitmu hin nathil kakoma umchu holdoh inlang kilah jengin, ati. Ajehchu Rachel'in chuche ho aguh chu Jacob'in ahetlou ahi." 
Genesis31:33 Chuin Laban Jacob pon in'a alutnin, Leah pon in'a, chule asohnu teni pon in'a alutnin; ahin aman hiho chu amupon ahi. Chujouvin ama Leah pon in'a konin apotdoh in, Rachel pon in'a aluttan ahi." 
Genesis31:34 Tun Rachel'in milim hochu analan, sangongsao pho lah-a chun akoijin, achunga chun atouvin ahi. Chuin Laban'in pon insung jouse chu amailen, ahivangin amupon ahi." 
Genesis31:35 Chuin amanun apa henga, namasanga kakipatdoh theilou jeh hin, ka Pakaiyin nopmo sahihbeh hen; ajehchu numei hina ngai chu kachunga auma ahi, ati. Chuin aman ahol len, ahin limho chu amujou pon ahi." 
Genesis31:36 Chuin Jacob alunghangin, Laban chu ahousen; chule Jacob'in adonbutnin, Laban henga, Kasuhkhel ipi ham? Kachonsetna ipi hija, Lungsa tah-a neihin nung del jengham?" 
Genesis31:37 Kathil jouse namaichai soh helin, na insung thil ipi namu em? Eini kahlah thuhi atan theina dingun, hikoma hin kasopite le nasopite anga podoh-in." 
Genesis31:38 Hiche kum somni jenhi nakoma kaumtan, nakelngoipi hole nakelpi hon anou anei chavai khapouvin, chule nakelngoi hon lah-a achal hojong kanekhapoi." 
Genesis31:39 Gamsa loitel ho jong nahenga kahinlhut khapon; keima tah-in amang chu kamo poh-in; suna kigumang hihen, jana kigumang hijongle, hichu keima neidit sah-in ahi." 
Genesis31:40 Hiti hin kaumin; sun teng nisatnin, chule janteng dapmin eisugim lheh jengjin, chule ihjong ka-ihmuji pon ahi." 
Genesis31:41 Chuti chun kum somni na in'a kahung umin; nachanu teni lonan kum som le kum li nangma kana jenin, chule naganchaho lona-in nangma kumgup kajenin; chuleh nangman katoh man chu somveijen neikhel peh-in ahi." 
Genesis31:42 Kapa Pathen, Abraham Pathen, chule Isaac gina chu kakoma umlou hile, thonlouva tu-a jong hi khutgoh keova neisol mang teiding ahi. Pathen'in kahesohna le kakhutna katoh gimna chu amua, janhi janna chu napho ahitai, ati." 
Genesis31:43 Chuin Laban'in adonbutnin, Jacob henga, Hiche chanute hohi keima chanute ahin, hiche chate hi keima chate ahiuvin, hiche gancha ho jonghi keima gancha ho ahiuvin, chule namu jouse hi keima-a ahi. Ahin tuni hin hiche kachanu te chung le, ahinnu achateu chunga hin ipi kabolthei dingham? ati." 
Genesis31:44 Hijeh chun tun hungin, nangma le keiman kitepna khat sem hite; hichu nangma le keima kah-a hettohsahna hihen, ati." 
Genesis31:45 Chuin Jacob'in song khat alan, khommin aphuttan ahi." 
Genesis31:46 Chuin Jacob'in asopite henga, song lhoh khomun, ati. Chuin amahon song alhoh khomun, alhuh-in aseuvin, chule songlhuh chunga chun an aneuvin ahi." 
Genesis31:47 Chuin Laban'in hichu Jegar-Sahadutha asah-in; ahivangin Jacob'in hichu Gilead asah-in ahi. 
Genesis31:48 Chuin Laban'in, Tunikhoa hi hiche kisekhom hohi nangle keima kikah-a hettohsahna ahitai, ati. Hijeh chun hiche min chun Gilead akisahtan;" 
Genesis31:49 Chule Mizpah jong akisah-in ahi; ajehchu Laban'in, Eini khat le khat ikikhen tengleh, Pakaiyin nangle kei eivetup jing lhonhen." 
Genesis31:50 Nangman kachanu te hi nasuh genthei ja, ahilouleh kachanu te tailou jidang naneija ahile, koimacha eini koma aumhih nai; ven, Pathen chu nangle kei kah-a ahetoh ahi, atin ahi." 
Genesis31:51 Chuin Laban'in Jacob henga, Hiche song kisekhom hi venlang, nangma le keima kah-a hiche song kaphu jong hi ven." 
Genesis31:52 Suhset nadinga keiman hiche songlhuh le song kiphut khela nangma henglam kahinkhel louding, chuleh nangman jong hiche songlhuh le songkiphut khela keima henglam nahin khellouna dingin, hiche songlhuh hi hettohsah hihen, chule song kiphut hi hettohsah hihen." 
Genesis31:53 Abraham Pathen, Nahor Pathen, chule apatehou Pathen chun ikah hona thu tanhen, ati. Chuin apa Isaac ginna-a chun Jacob akihah seltan ahi." 
Genesis31:54 Chujouvin Jacob'in molsang chunga chun ganlhaina atoh-in, asopite chu changlhah nedingin akouvin ahi. Chuin amahon changlhah aneuvin, molsang chunga chun ageh khovah taovin ahi." 
Genesis31:55 Chuin jingpi matah-in Laban athouvin, achapate le achanute achopmin, chule phatthei aboh-in ahi. Chuin Laban akipatnin agam lama akiletan ahi." 
Genesis32:1 Chuin Jacob achepeh-in ahile, Pathen vantil ten ana kitopiuvin ahi." 
Genesis32:2 Chuin Jacob'in amaho chu amu phat nin, Hiche hi Pathen ngahmun ahi, ati. Chuin aman chuche munchu Mahanaim asahtai." 
Genesis32:3 Chuin Jacob'in Edom gamkai sunga Seir gama a-upa Esau henga chun, amasanga sottol ho asolin ahi." 
Genesis32:4 Chuin aman amaho chu thu apen, ahenguva, Hitia hi nanghon ka pakai Esau henga nasei dingu ahi; nasohpa Jacob'in hitin aseije, keima Laban koma kagathamin, chumuna chun tugeihin kaume." 
Genesis32:5 Chule keiman bongchal ho, sangan ho, kelngoi ho, soh pasal ho, chule soh numei ho kaneijin; chule namit mu-a hi lungsetna kamu theina dinga ka pakai hetsah dinga kahinsol ahi, tin gaseijun, ati." 
Genesis32:6 Chuin sottol hochu Jacob henga ahung kileuvin, ajah-a, Na-upa Esau heng kaga phaovin, chujongle ama nangma toh kimuto dingin mi jali toh kilhonin ahunge, atiuve." 
Genesis32:7 Chuphatnin Jacob hatah-in akichan chule alung gimlhehtan ahi. Chuin aman aum khompi miho, kelngoihon, bonghon, chule sangongsao ho chu loinin ahom khenin;" 
Genesis32:8 Chule aman, Esau chu loikhat koma ahunga, atha tah-a ahijongle, adalhah loikhat chu hoidoh theijinte, atin ahi." 
Genesis32:9 Chuin Jacob'in, Vo kapa Abraham Pathen, chule Kapa Isaac Pathen, nagam lam le nasopite henglama kiletan, keiman nangma bolpha nange tia kahenga seija Pakai;" 
Genesis32:10 Nangman nasoh chunga namusah hepina jouse le thutah jouse lah-a hi aneopen changdinga kilom kahipoi; ajehchu hiche Jordan hi ka tenggol sehtoh hung galkai ja kahin, tunvang loini hel kahung hitai." 
Genesis32:11 Katao ahi, ka-upa khutna kon, Esau khut ngeija konin neihuh-in: ajehchu ajole ama hungintin, nunao chapang ho pumin eihung that get nunte, ti kakichan ahi." 
Genesis32:12 Chule nangman, Tahbeh-in keima nabol phang ting, chule nachilhahte atambehseh jeh-a simjoulou twikhanglen kama neldi jat banga kasem ding nahi, tin naseijin ahi, ati." 
Genesis32:13 Chuin ama chuche jan chun chukoma chun agehtan; chule akhutna um aneiho lah-a konin a-upa Esau thilpeh-a pehding aladoh-in; 
Genesis32:14 Kelpi jani le kelchal somni, kelngoipi jani le kelngoichal somni," 
Genesis32:15 Anoi kilhoh lai sangongsao somthum le anoute, bongpi somli le bongchal som, sanganpi somni le sangan chal som akhendoh-in ahi." 
Genesis32:16 Chuin aman hiche ho chu loitum cheh-in asoh ho khutna apedoh-in, chuin asoh ho henga, Kamasanga ana chepeh unlang, gancha loitum cheh kikah-a chun mun ong umsahcheh-un, ati." 
Genesis32:17 Chuin aman amasapen chu thu apen ahenga, ka-upa Esau'in nakimupia, nahenga, Koija nahim, hoija cheding nahim? Chule namasanga um hiche hohi koija ham? tia nadoh tengle;" 
Genesis32:18 Nangman, Hiche hohi nasoh Jacob'a ahiuvin, ka pakaiyu Esau dinga thilpeh-a ahinthot ahi; chule Ven, amajong kanunguva ahunge, tia nasei dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis32:19 Chuin aman chutobang machun anina, athumna, chule gancha hon loitum juiho henga chun, Esau namu tengule chutobangma cheh-a chu nasei dingu ahi, tin thu apei." 
Genesis32:20 Chule nanghon chuche chungchon chun, Ven, nasoh Jacob jong kanunguva khun ahunge, nati dingu ahi, tin ahilcheh in ahi. Ajehchu aman, Kamasanga kisol thilpeh hin keiman alung sudamthei khat ning ting, chujouteng le amai mu nange; ijem atile aman eisangkhat nante, atin ahi." 
Genesis32:21 Chuti chun thilpeh ho chu amasanga asol masan; amatah vangchu chuche jan chun mihon lah-a chun agehtan ahi. 
Genesis32:22 Chuin chuche jan chun ama athouvin, a-inneipi teni, asoh numei teni, chule achapate somlekhat chu akipuijin, Jabbok vadung agalkai taovin ahi." 
Genesis32:23 Chuin aman amaho chu apuijin, vadunga chun asol galkaijin, chule anei chengse jong agalkaisah tai." 
Genesis32:24 Chuin Jacob achang seh-in aumtan; chuin mikhatnin amachu khovahlhah masangsen akibotpin ahi. 
Genesis32:25 Chuin amapa chun Jacob athatlel ding amuphatnin, apheipi gu kisuhtona akhoipeh in ahile, akibotlhon phatnin Jacob pheipigu kisuhtona chu akikhentan ahi." 
Genesis32:26 Chuin aman, Neichesah tan, ajehchu khovahlha ding ahitai, ati. Chuin aman, Phatthei neiboh louleh lhaponge ati." 
Genesis32:27 Chuin aman ahenga, Namin ipiham? ati. Hichun aman, Jacob kahi, ati." 
Genesis32:28 Chuin aman, Namin Jacob kiti louding, Israel joh nakiti ding ahitai: ajehchu nangma Pathen toh mihem toh nakibonin najoutai, ati." 
Genesis32:29 Chuin Jacob'in amachu adongin, Katao ahi, namin neisepeh-in, tin angehtan ahi. Chuin aman ipidinga kamin neidoh ham? ati. Chuin chua chun amachu phatthei aboh tan ahi." 
Genesis32:30 Chuin Jacob'in chuche munchu Peniel asahtai: ajehchu keiman Pathen chu kimaito-in kamun, chule kahinkho hing hoijin aume, ati." 
Genesis32:31 Chuin aman Penuel agalkaijin nisa achunga ahung sohtan, chule ama apheipi jehchun akibaipeh-in ahi." 
Genesis32:32 Chuti ahijeh chun tuni geihin Israel chaten pheipi gu kisuhtona thajung achomho, pheipi homa umho chu anengai pouve. Ajehchu aman Jacob pheija thagui chomho chu akhoipeh ahi." 
Genesis33:1 Chuin Jacob akhodah-in agahven ahile, veuvin, Esau mi jali toh kilhonin ahungin ahi. Hijeh chun aman achate chu Leah le Rachel chule sohnu teni henga ahomkhen tan ahi." 
Genesis33:2 Chuin aman sohnu teni le achateu chu amasa penin akoijin, chuin Leah le achate chu abana, chule Rachel le Joseph chu anunung penin akoijin ahi." 
Genesis33:3 Chule ama amasanguva achen, a-upa kom aphah kahsen, tolla sagivei aboh khupmin." 
Genesis33:4 Chuin ama kimupi ding chun Esau ahung lhaijelin, apomin, chuin angong koijin achopmin; chuin amani akaplhon tai." 
Genesis33:5 Chuin ama akhodah-in ahile, numei ho le chapang ho chu amun, Nalhonpi hohi koi hiuvam? ati. Chuin aman, Pathen'in lungset tah-a nasoh apeh chapang ho chu ahiuve, ati." 
Genesis33:6 Chujouvin sohnu teni chu achateu toh ahung naijun, amani le achateu chu aboh khupmun ahi." 
Genesis33:7 Chuin Leah jong chu achate toh ahung naijun aboh khupmun ahi. Chujouvin Joseph le Rachel ahungnai lhonin, abohkhup lhonin ahi." 
Genesis33:8 Chuin aman, Gancha hon kakitopi ho jouse chu ipi nangaitona ham? ati. Chuin aman, Hiho chu ka Pakai mitmu-a lungsetna kachan nadinga ahi, ati." 
Genesis33:9 Chuin Esau'in, Kanao, keiman kagotkhop kaneinai; nangman nanei chu nangma din kikoijin, ati." 
Genesis33:10 Chuin Jacob'in, Ahipoi, nahenga katao ahi, tu-a hi namitmu-a lungsetna changa kahile, kakhut na konin kathilpeh hi kisanin. Ajehchu namai kamu hi Pathen mai kamu toh abang jengin, nangma kachunga nakipah-in ahi." 
Genesis33:11 Nahenga hinkichoi vangbohna hi kisanin, tia katao ahi; ajehchu Pathen'in eilungsetnin, kagotkhop jong kaneinai, ati. Chuin aman amachu angeh khoh-in ahile, akilah tai." 
Genesis33:12 Chuin Esau'in aseijin, Ilamjotnu jong jomu hitin, chetao hite, chule keima namasanguva lamkai jinge, ati." 
Genesis33:13 Chuin aman ahenga, Chapang hohi neocha cha ahiuvin, chule kelngoi hon kakoma umho jonghi anoukai ahiuve ti ka pakaiyin nahei; chule nikhat jengcha jong kahoi valleh ganchahon jouse hi thigam diu ahi." 
Genesis33:14 Katao ahi, ka Pakai, nasoh masanga anache masatan; keiman Seir munna ka Pakai heng kahung lhun masangsen, kamasanga um gancha ho le chapang ho kalson dungjui jin hung taovinge." 
Genesis33:15 Chuin Esau'in, Tun keiman kalhonpi mi phabep nangma dalhahpeh inge, ati. Chuin aman, Ipi ngaikhoh ding ham? Ka pakai mitmun lungsetna neimusah tan, ahi." 
Genesis33:16 Chuti chun Esau chuche nichun Seir lam jonin akiletai. 
Genesis33:17 Chuin Jacob Succoth lama achen, ama dingin in khat asan, chule ganchahon dingin buh asahpeh-in ahi. Hijeh chun chukom munchu Succoth akisah tai." 
Genesis33:18 Chuin Jacob Padan Aram-a konin Canaan gama Shechem khopi Shalem chu ahung lhung tan; chule aman khopi maija chun apon in asongin ahi. 
Genesis33:19 Chuin aman Shechem pa Hamor chate khutna konin gam behkhat dangka jakhat-in acho-in, hia chun apon in asongin ahi." 
Genesis33:20 Chuin aman chukoma chun maicham khat asemin, hichu El-Elohe-Israel asahtai." 
Genesis34:1 Chuin Leah'in Jacob ahinpeh achanu Dinah chu chuche gam chanute ve dingin agapotdoh-in ahi. 
Genesis34:2 Chuin Hiv mi Hamor chapa Shechem, chuche gam leng chapa chun amanu amuphatnin, apuijin, aluppin, asubohtan ahi." 
Genesis34:3 Chuin alungthim chu Jacob chanu Dinah chunga chun aumtan, chule aman nungahnu chu angailutan, amanu chu kamdam awnemin ahoupitan ahi." 
Genesis34:4 Chuin Shechem'in apa Hamor akihoupin, Hiche nungah nu khu kajidin neipui peh-in, ati." 
Genesis34:5 Chuin Jacob'in achanu Dinah Shechem'in asuhboh chu ahetai. Tun achapate gamlah-a aganchate toh uma ahiuvin, chule amaho ahung lhunkah seuchun, Jacob'in alung adejingin ahi." 
Genesis34:6 Chuin Shechem pa Hamor chu Jacob toh kihou dingin ahung potdoh-in ahi. 
Genesis34:7 Chuin Jacob chapate chun hichu ajah phatnun, gamlah-a konin ahung lhung taove. Chule aman Jacob chanu aluppia, Israel lah-a ngolhoi tah-a achona, bollou hel ding thil abol jehchun, pasal ho chu alung phamo uvin, alunghang lheh jeng taovin ahi." 
Genesis34:8 Chuin Hamor'in amaho chu akihoupin, Kachapa Shechem lungin nachanu alha ngaitai. Amanu hi ajidingin petaovin, tia katao ahi." 
Genesis34:9 Chule keihotoh kichengto uhitin, nachanu teo keiho neipeuvin lang, chule keiho chanute nangho din kilah uvin." 
Genesis34:10 Chule nangho keiho lah-a chenguvin natin, chule gamchu namasanguva umding ahi. Nangho chengunlang, hia chun kiveijun, chule nanghon gou kikholun, ati." 
Genesis34:11 Chuin Shechem'in numeinu pa le asopite henga chun, Namit muva lungsetna neimusah-un, chule kahenga nasei chanu pengkate." 
Genesis34:12 Man le thilpeh neiha ngeh behseh hih-un, kahenga nasei dungjuijun penge. Ahinla nungah chu jidingin neipeuvin, ati." 
Genesis34:13 Chuin asopinu Dinah chu asuhboh jehchun, Jacob chapate chun Shechem le apa Hamor chu dohan adonbut uvin;" 
Genesis34:14 Chuin amahon amani henga, Kasopinu cheptan lou khat henga pehdoh ding, hitobang thil hi keihon kabolthei pouve; ijeh inem itile hichu keiho dinga kisuhjum na ahi." 
Genesis34:15 Ahin hiche hi nabol ule vang kanop dingu ahi: nalah uva pasal jousen chep atanuva, keiho banga hi naum uva ahile;" 
Genesis34:16 Chuteng le kachanuteu nangho peuvingting, chule nachanuteu keihon kakipui diu, chuleh nangho toh kachengkhom uva, namkhat ihung hidiu ahi." 
Genesis34:17 Ahinla kathuseiju nangailou uva, chep natan lou vangule; kachanu kakipui uva, kache diu ahitai, tin adonbutnuve." 
Genesis34:18 Chuin athuseiju chun Hamor le Hamor chapa Shechem chu alung lhaisah lhontan ahi. 
Genesis34:19 Chuin Jacob chanu adeijeh-in gollhangpa chun chuche thilbol ding chu ageisang sahpon ahi. Chule amachu apa insung jouse lah-a ja-um pentah hija ahi. 
Genesis34:20 Chuin Hamor le achapa Shechem chu akhopiu kotpibul lah ahung lhonin, akhopiu miho chutoh akihouvun, ajah uvah," 
Genesis34:21 Khuche miho khu eihotoh kicham tah-in aumuve; hijeh chun hiche gama khun chengu henlang, kiveiju hen; ajehchu veuvin, gam khu amaho dingin alen khopnai; achanuteu ji dingin kipuiju hitin, chule eiho chanute amaho peuhite." 
Genesis34:22 Namkhat ihung hina dingule eihoto achenkhomna dinguva, eihon hiche bouhi ibolu ngai ahi: Hichu amaho cheptan banga, eiho lah-a pasal jousen chep atan cheh ding hi ahi." 
Genesis34:23 Chutile aganchahou, anei agouhou, chule asa jouseu khu eihoa hisoh keilou ding ham? Athuseiju ngaipou pouvu hite, chutile amaho ilah uva hungcheng taovinte, atilhone." 
Genesis34:24 Chuin akhopi kotpi phunga hungpotdoh jouse chun Hamor leh achapa Shechem thu ajoptaovin; chuin akhopiu kotpi phunga hunglut jouse pasal tapou achep atanpeh taovin ahi. 
Genesis34:25 Chuin anithum chanin ahitin ahi, amaho anat laitah-un, Jacob chapate lah-a ni, Dinah sopiteni, Simeon le Levi chun achemjam cheh akilah lhonin, khopi chu hangtah-in anokhum lhonin, pasal jouse athatgam lhontan ahi." 
Genesis34:26 Chuin amanin Hamor le achapa Shechem chu chemjam hemin athatlhonin, chuin Shechem in'a konin Dinah chu apuidoh lhonin, achemang lhontai." 
Genesis34:27 Jacob chapate chun thilong chunga chun lam ajotnun, asopinu asuhboh jeh-u chun, akhopiu chu achomun ahi." 
Genesis34:28 Amahon akelngoi hou, abongchal hou, asangan hou, chule khopi sungle gamlah-a umjouse chu akilah taovin ahi." 
Genesis34:29 Chule agou jouseu, achasen hou jouse, ajite hou jouse chu sohchangin akaijun, chule insunga um jouse chu achomun ahi." 
Genesis34:30 Chuin Jacob in Simeon le Levi henga, Nangnin hiche gama cheng Canaan mite leh Perizz mite lah-a hin hotnin neiumsah lhonin, neisugim lheh lhontai; keima lhomcha kahijeh-in, amaho eidoudin hung kikhom khom untin, keima eitha diu; keima le ka-insung mite hi suhmanga kaum dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis34:31 Chuin amahon, Kasopinu chu aman mijong banga abolding ham? atiuve." 
Genesis35:1 Chuin Pathen'in Jacob henga, Kipat doh-in, Bethel'a chetou vinlang, chua chun gachengin; chule na-upa Esau'a kona najam mang laija nahenga hung kilah Pathen dingin chua chun maicham khat semin, ati." 
Genesis35:2 Chujouvin Jacob'in a-insung mite le aumpiho jouse henga chun, Nalah uva gamdang Pathen umho chu koidoh-un, kisuthengun, chule navonu kikhelun," 
Genesis35:3 Chule eiho kipatnu hitin, Bethel'a chetouvu hite; chua chu kahesoh laija eina donbutna, kachena lam chana eiumpi jinga Pathen dingin maicham khat kasem ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis35:4 Chuin amahon akhutnuva um gamdang pathen jouse le abiluva bilba jouse Jacob apetaovin; chuin Jacob'in hiho chu Shechem koma gangpi phung noija chun aselin ahi. 
Genesis35:5 Chuin amaho acheuvin ahile, aveluva um khopi ho jouse chunga chun Pathen'a kona tijatna achutan, chule amahon Jacob chapate chu anungdel tapouvin ahi." 
Genesis35:6 Chutichun Jacob chu ama le aumpi miho jouse chutoh Canaan gama Luz, hichu Bethel ahin, ahunglhung taove." 
Genesis35:7 Chuin aman chukoma chun maicham khat asemin, hichu El-Bethel asahtai. Ajehchu a-upa-a kona ajammang laija chumuna chu Pathen ahenga hung kilah-a ahi." 
Genesis35:8 Ahin Rebekah jennu Deborah athitan, chule amanu chu Bethel mun'a gangpi phung noija chun akivuitan ahi. Chule chuche minchu Allon-bacuth akisah tai." 
Genesis35:9 Chuin Padan-Aram'a kona ahung potdoh chun, Pathen Jacob henga ahung kilah kitnin, amachu phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
Genesis35:10 Chuin Pathen'in ama henga, Namin hi Jacob ahin: namin hi Jacob kiti kit lou ding, amavang namin Israel kiti joding ahitai, ati. Chuin aman amin chu Israel asahtai." 
Genesis35:11 Chuin Pathen'in ahenga, Keimahi hat chungnung Pathen kahi, chi tamtah lhah inlang, hapunin pungin; nampikhat chule nam chom chom loijong nanga konin hung doh intin, chule lengho jong nanga kona hung pengdoh dingu ahi." 
Genesis35:12 Chule Abraham le Isaac henga kanapeh gamchu nangma pengting, chule nangma nungsanga nachilhahte jong hiche gamhi kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis35:13 Chuin akihoulimpi na mun'a chun Pathen ama-a konin akaltou tai. 
Genesis35:14 Chuin akihoulimpi na mun'a chun Jacob'in khompi khat, songkhompi chu aphutnin; hiche chunga chun donding thilpeh alheilhan, chuin aman chuche chunga chun thao asungin ahi." 
Genesis35:15 Chuin Jacob'in Pathen'in ahoulim pina mun chu Bethel asah tai. 
Genesis35:16 Chuin amaho Bethel'a konin achetauvun, chuin Ephrath lhunna ding chu phabep aum nalaijin ahi. Chuin Rachel naosonat nin anatan, nasatah-in athohgim tan ahi." 
Genesis35:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanu athohgim behseh phatnin, nao domnu chun ahenga, Kicha hih-in, nangman hiche chapa jonghi naneiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis35:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, alha achedoh to lhonin, (ajehchu amanu thia ahitai) amanun amin Ben-oni asah-in ahi. Ahivangin apan Benjamin asah-in ahi." 
Genesis35:19 Chuin Rachel athitan, Bethlehem kiti Ephrath jotna lampia chun avuitaovin ahi." 
Genesis35:20 Chuin Jacob'in alhan chunga chun songkhom aphutnin; hichu tuni geihin Rachel lhansongphu akiti jingin ahi. 
Genesis35:21 Chuin Israel achepeh-in, Edar insang kala chun apon in chu asongin ahi." 
Genesis35:22 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israel chuche gama achenlai chun Reuben achen, apa thaikemnu Bilhah chu aga luppitan; chuin Israel'in hichu ahetan ahi. Tun Jacob chapate chu somleni ahiuve." 
Genesis35:23 Leah chapate chu, Jacob chapa masapen Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar chule Zebulun ahiuve." 
Genesis35:24 Rachel chapate chu, Joseph le Benjamin ahilhone." 
Genesis35:25 Chule Rachel sohnu Bilhah chapate chu, Dan le Naphtali ahilhone." 
Genesis35:26 Chule Leah sohnu Zilpah chapate chu, Gad le Asher ahilhone. Hichenghi Jacob chapate Padan-Aram gama pengho chu ahiuve." 
Genesis35:27 Chuin Jacob Arba khopi, hichu Hebron ahin, Abraham le Isaac pemna mun Mamre'a chun apa Isaac kom ahunglhun tan ahi." 
Genesis35:28 Chule Isaac damsung chu kum jakhat le kum somget ahi. 
Genesis35:29 Chuin Isaac'in alhagao alhan, upatah le teh bongsetnin athitan, amite toh gopkhomin aumtan ahi. Chuin achapa teni Esau le Jacob chun avuilhon tan ahi." 
Genesis36:1 Tun hichengho hi Edom kiti, Esau chilhah teho chu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:2 Esau'in Canaan chanute jin akipuijin, amaho chu: Hit mi Elon chanu Adah, chule Hiv mi Zibeon chanu, Anah chanu Aholibamah," 
Genesis36:3 Chule Nebojoth sopinu, Ishmael chanu Bashemath ahiuve." 
Genesis36:4 Chuin Adah'in Esau Eliphaz ahinpeh-in, chule Bashemath'in Reuel ahingin ahi." 
Genesis36:5 Chuin Aholibamah'in Jeush, Jaalam chule Korah ahingin ahi. Hichenghi Esau chapate Canaan gama pengho chu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:6 Chuin Esau'in a-inneipite, achapate, achanute, chule a-insung mite jouse, aganchaho leh agamsa jouse, chule Canaan gama alamdoh aneijouse akitolin, anaopa Jacob'a konin gamchoma achemang tai." 
Genesis36:7 Ajehchu amaho munkhatna achenkhom nadiuvin aneiho chu atambehseh tan, chule agancha hou jehchun apemnao gamchun adol tapouvin ahi." 
Genesis36:8 Chutichun Esau Seir molsanga achengtan ahi. Esau chu Edom ahi. 
Genesis36:9 Chule hichenghi Seir molsang mun'a Edom mite pa Esau chilhahte chu ahiuvin; 
Genesis36:10 Hichenghi Esau chapate minho chu ahi; Esau inneipi Adah chapa Eliphaz, Esau inneipi Bashemath chapa Reuel ahilhone." 
Genesis36:11 Chule Eliphaz chapate chu Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam chule Kenaz ahiuve." 
Genesis36:12 Chule Timna chu Esau chapa Eliphaz thaikemnu ahin; amanun Eliphaz dingin Amalek ahinpeh-in ahi. Hichenghi Esau inneipi Adah chapate ahiuve. 
Genesis36:13 Chule hichenghi Reuel chapate ahiuve; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah chule Mizzah ahiuve. Hichenghi Esau inneipi Bashemath chapate ahiuve." 
Genesis36:14 Chule hichenghi Zibeon chanu, Anah chanu, Esau inneipi Aholibamah chapate ahiuve. Amanun Esau chu Jeush, Jaalam chule Korah ahinpeh-in ahi." 
Genesis36:15 Hichenghi Esau chapate lah-a apipu ho chu ahiuve: Esau chapa masapen Eliphaz chapate chu, pipu Teman, pipu Omar, pipu Zepho, pipu Kenaz," 
Genesis36:16 Pipu Korah, pipu Gatam, chule pipu Amalek ahiuve. Hicheng hi Edom gama Eliphaz'a kona pengdoh pipu hochu ahiuvin, hichenghi Adah chapate ahiuve." 
Genesis36:17 Hichenghi Esau chapa Reuel chapate ahiuve: Pipu Nahath, pipu Zerah, pipu Shammah, chule pipu Mizzah ahiuve. Hichenghi Edom gama Reuel'a kona pengdoh pipuho chu ahiuvin; hichenghi Esau inneipi Bashemath chapate ahiuve." 
Genesis36:18 Chule hicheng hi Esau inneipi Aholibamah chapate chu ahiuve: Pipu Jeush, pipu Jaalam, pipu Korah ahiuve. Hicheng ho hi Anah chanu, Esau inneipi Aholibama'a kona pengdoh pipu hochu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:19 Hichenghi Edon kiti Esau chapate ahiuvin, chule hichenghi apipuhou chu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:20 Hichenghi chuche gama cheng, Hor mi Seir chapate ahiuve: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah," 
Genesis36:21 Dishon, Ezer, chule Dishan ahiuve. Hichengho hi Edom gama Seir chapate, Hor mite pipuho chu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:22 Chule Lotan chapate chu Hori le Heman ahilhonin; chuleh Lotan sopinu chu Timna ahi. 
Genesis36:23 Chule Shobal chapate chu hicheho ahiuve: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, chule Onam ahiuve." 
Genesis36:24 Chule hichenghi Zibeon chate chu ahiuve; Ajah chule Anah ahilhone. Hiche Anah hi ahi apa Zibeon sanganho gamthipma achinna-a sanganpi ho mudohpa chu. 
Genesis36:25 Chule Anah chate chu hichenghi ahiuve; Dishon le, Anah chanu Aholibamah ahilhone." 
Genesis36:26 Chule hichenghi Dishon chate chu ahiuve; Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, chule Cheran ahiuve." 
Genesis36:27 Ezer chate chu hichenghi ahiuve; Bilhan, Zaavan, chule Akan ahiuve." 
Genesis36:28 Dishan chate chu hichenghi ahiuve; Uz le, Aran ahilhone." 
Genesis36:29 Hicheng hi Hor mite-a kona hungpeng doh pipu hochu ahiuve: Pipu Lotan, pipu Shobal, pipu Zibeon, pipu Anah," 
Genesis36:30 Pipu Dishon, pipu Ezer, chule pipu Dishan ahiuve. Hichengho hi Seir gama pipu holah-a Hor mite hung dohna pipuho chu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:31 Chule hichengho hi Israel chate chunga koimacha ana lengchan masanga, Edom gama analeng changa lengho chu ahiuve." 
Genesis36:32 Beor chapa Bela chu Edom'ah ana leng changin; chule akhopi min chu Dinhabah anahi. 
Genesis36:33 Chuin Bela chu athitan, Bozra gama Zerah chapa, Jobab chu akhelin analeng changin ahi." 
Genesis36:33 Chuin Bela chu athitan, Bozra gama Zerah chapa, Jobab chu akhelin analeng changin ahi." 
Genesis36:34 Chuin Jobab chu athitan, Temani gama Husham chu amakhelin analeng changin ahi." 
Genesis36:34 Chuin Jobab chu athitan, Temani gama Husham chu amakhelin analeng changin ahi." 
Genesis36:35 Chuin Husham chu athitan, Moab gamlah-a Midian thatpa Bedad chapa Hadad chu ama khelin aleng changin ahi. Chule akhopi min chu Avith ahi." 
Genesis36:36 Chuin Hadad chu athitan, Mashrekah mi Samlah chu akhelin analeng change." 
Genesis36:37 Chuin Samlah athitan, luipi panga Rehoboth kho-a Shaul chu ama khelin analeng changin ahi." 
Genesis36:38 Chuin Shaul chu athitan, Achbor chapa Baal-hanan chu ama khelin analeng changin ahi." 
Genesis36:39 Chuin Akchbor chapa Baal-hanan chu athitan, ama khelin Hadar analeng change. Chuleh akhopi min chu Pau ahin; chule a-inneipi chu Matred chanu, Mezahab chanu Mehetabel ahi." 
Genesis36:40 Hichengho hi a-insung dungjuiju, achennao munho dungjuile, aminu dungjuija Esau'a kon hungdoh pipu hochu ahiuve; Pipu Timnah, pipu Alvah, pipu Jetheth," 
Genesis36:41 Pipu Aholibamah, pipu Elah, pipu Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 Pipu Kenaz, pipu Teman, pipu Mibzar," 
Genesis36:43 Pipu Magdiel, chule pipu Iram ahiuve. Hichengho hi agoulona gama achennao dungjuija Edom pipuho chu ahiuve. Amachu Edom mite pa Esau ahi." 
Genesis37:1 Chuin Jacob apa kholjina gam, Canaan gama chun achengtan ahi." 
Genesis37:2 Hichenghi Jacob achilhah ho chu ahiuve. Joseph chu kum som le kum sagi alhinin, asopite toh ganchahon achingun; chule chapang chu apa inneipi teni Bilhah chapate le Zilpah chapate toh aumin ahi. Chuin Joseph'in agitlounau thuthang chu apa henga alhutjin ahi." 
Genesis37:3 Tun Israel'in Joseph chu atehnunga ahin achapa ahijeh chun, achapa dang jouse sangin angailun ahi. Chuin aman amachu sangkhol chol jemchom choma pol asempeh-in ahi." 
Genesis37:4 Chuin amachu asopiho jouse sangin apauvin angailujoi ti a-ute chun amuphatnun, amahon amachu aho taovin, kam ngeijin ahouthei tapouvin ahi." 
Genesis37:5 Chuin Joseph'in mang aneijin, hichu asopite henga aseipeh-in ahi. Chuin amahon amachu anahot locheh taovin ahi." 
Genesis37:6 Chuin aman ahenguva, Katao ahi, keiman kamangmat hiche mang hi ngaitemun," 
Genesis37:7 Ajehchu veuvin, eihon louva changphal inakanun, chule veuvin, keima changphal chu ahung kipatdoh-in, adingjang petnin; chuin veuvin, nangho changphal hochu ahung ding kimvelun, keima changphal chu chibai aboh-un ahi, ati." 
Genesis37:8 Chuin a-ute chun ahenga, Nangma kachunguva nalengchan mongding ham? Ahilouleh nangma kachunguva vaihoma napan mongding ham? atiuve. Chuin amahon amachu ahotbecheh jeng taovin ahi." 
Genesis37:9 Chuin aman mang chomkhat amat kitnin, chule hichu a-ute henga ahilin, ajah uvah, Veuvin keiman mang khat kanei kitnin ahi; chule veuvin, nisa, lhathah chule ahsi somlekhat nin chibai eina boh-e, ati." 
Genesis37:10 Chuin aman hichu apa leh a-ute aseipehtan ahi. Chuin apan amachu aphoh-in, ajah-a, Namang neihi ipi mang ham? Keima le nanu chule nasopite hi nangma henga tolla bohkhupma chibai boh dinga kahung mong diuham? ati." 
Genesis37:11 Chuin a-uten amachu amitthip taovin; ahin apa vangin thu kiseichu aching jingin ahi. 
Genesis37:12 Chuin a-ute chu apao ganchahon vah dingin Shechem'a achetauvin ahi. 
Genesis37:13 Chuin Israel'in Joseph henga, Na-uten gancha hon Shechem'a avah-u hilouham? Hungin, keiman nangma amaho henga solinge, ati. Chuin aman ahenga, Hikoma ka ume, ati." 
Genesis37:14 Chuin aman ahenga, Katao ahi, chenlang na-ute ho dam naovem, chule ganchahon jong dam naovem gavenlang, chule kahenga thu hinpo kitnin, ati. Chutichun aman amachu Hebron phaichama konin asolin, chuin ama Shechem aga lhungtai." 
Genesis37:15 Chuin mi koiham khatnin amachu amun, chule veuvin, ama gamlah-a avahlen ahi. Chuin mipa chun ahenga, Ipi nahol ham? tin adongin ahi."
