Genesis37:16 Chuin aman, ka-ute kahol ahi. Nahenga katao ahi, hoija aganchahon nu avah-um neisei peh-in, ati." 
Genesis37:17 Chuin mipa chun, Amaho hia konin achetauve; ajehchu amahon Dothan'a cheohite atiu kajai, ati. Chuin Joseph'in a-ute chu anungdelin, Dothan'a chun agamutan ahi." 
Genesis37:18 Chuin amahon amachu gamlatah-a agahmu phatnun, amaho lam ahungnai masangin, amahon ama tha ding thu ana kihousom taove." 
Genesis37:19 Chuin khatnin khat henga aseijin, Veuvin, mang neipa chu ahunge." 
Genesis37:20 Hijeh chun tun hunguvin, amahi thatnu hitin, kokhuh khat touva seplutnu hitin, chule eihon, Gamsa hang khat touvin atha ahitai tiu hite: chule amang chu ipi ahungso ivet dingu ahi, akitiuve." 
Genesis37:21 Chuin Reuben'in hichu ajan, akhut nuva konchun ahuhdoh-in; chule, Eihon amahi that pou hite, atin ahi." 
Genesis37:22 Chuin Reuben'in akhutnuva kona chudoh-a, apa henga anungsolpeh theina dingin, ajah uva, Thisan sohih beh-un, amavang gamthip laija hiche kokhuh-a khun galeh lutnuvin lang achunga vang khut lhahih-un ati." 
Genesis37:23 Chuin ahitin ahi, Joseph chu a-ute heng ahung lhun phatnin, amahon Joseph'in aki-ah sangkhol chol, ajemchom choma pol chu asutlhah peh-un;" 
Genesis37:24 Chule amahon amachu apuijun, kokhuh sunga alehlut taove. Hiche kokhuh chu akeo ahin, asunga twi umlou ahi." 
Genesis37:25 Chuin amaho an nedingin atou taovin ahi. Chuin amaho akhodah-un ahile, veuvin, Ishmael honkhat Gilead gama kona asangongsao houtoh thil namtui, thingnailou, chule Myrrh hinpo-a, Egypt gama posuh dinga cheho chu amuvin ahi." 
Genesis37:26 Chuin Judah'in asopite henga, Eihon inaopao ithaova, athisan isouva ipi phachom ding ham?" 
Genesis37:27 Hungun, Ishmael mite henga johdoh-u hitin, achunga ikhutnu lhapouhite; ajehchu ama inaopao ahin, itahsa mongu ahibouve, ati. Chuin asopiten athu angai taovin ahi." 
Genesis37:28 Chuin Midian sumkol veiho chun ahinho pauvin ahile, amahon Joseph chu kokhuh-a konin akaidoh-un, Ishmael miho henga chun dangka somni dingin ajoh taovin ahi. Chuin amahon Joseph chu Egypt gama apuitaove." 
Genesis37:29 Chuin Reuben kokhuh-a ahung kitnin ahile; veuvin, Joseph chu kokhuh-a ana umtapon; aman apon asattel jengin ahi." 
Genesis37:30 Chuin ama asopite henga ahung kilen, ahenguva, Chapang chu aumtapoi; keima hi hoilama chetang katem? ati." 
Genesis37:31 Chuin amahon Joseph sangkhol chol chu alauvin, kelcha khat athatnun, athisan lah-a chun sangkhol chol chu adeuvin ahi." 
Genesis37:32 Chuin amahon sangkhol chol jemchom choma kisem chu apau athotnun, chule amahon ahenga ahin choijun, ajah-a, Hichehi keihon kamu-u ahi: nachapa sangkhol chol ahi ahilou nahet em? atiuve." 
Genesis37:33 Chuin aman hichu ahetan, Hichehi kachapa sangkhol chol ahi; gamsa hangin anehjou hiding hitahi; Joseph hi thonlouva ahal hala asatel hitahi, ati." 
Genesis37:34 Chuin Jacob'in aponsil ho asat telin, akonga khaodip pon akichenin, nitampi achapa pul adouvin ahi." 
Genesis37:35 Chuin achapate jouse le achanute jouse ama lhamon dingin akipatnun; ahivangin ama lhamon ding anompon; Ajehchu chu keima lhankhuh-a lunghem puma kachapa henga cheding kahi, ati. Chutichun apa chu ama dingin akap akapmin ahi." 
Genesis37:36 Chuin Midian mihon amachu Egypt gama Pharoah noija pipu, ngahtup ho lah-a lamkai Potipher henga ajoh taovin ahi." 
Genesis38:1 Chuin hiche laichun ahitin ahi, Judah chu asopite lah-a konin achesuh-in, Adulam mikhat amin Hirah chu agabeltan ahi" 
Genesis38:2 Chuin hia chun Judah chun amin Shua kiti Canaan mikhat chanu amutan; chule aman amanu chu akichenpin, ahenga aluttan ahi." 
Genesis38:3 Chuin amanun nao avopmin, chapa khat ahingin; chule aman amin Er asah-in ahi." 
Genesis38:4 Chuin amanun nao avoppai kitnin, chapa khat ahingin; aman amin Onan asah-in ahi." 
Genesis38:5 Chuin amanun nao avopkitnin, chapa khat ahingin; amin Shelah asah-in ahi. Amanun ama ahinna chun amapa Cherib'a aumin ahi." 
Genesis38:6 Chuin Judah'in achapa masa Er ding chun ji apuipeh-in, amin Tamar ahi." 
Genesis38:7 Chuin Judah cha masapen Er chu Pakai mitmun akhang gilou lheh-in ahile, Pakaiyin amachu athat tan ahi." 
Genesis38:8 Chuin Judah'in Onan henga, Na-upa inneipi henga galutnin lang, amachu kichenpin, chule na-upa dingin chi khaipeh-in, ati." 
Genesis38:9 Chuin Onan'in achikhai chu ama-a ahilouding chu ahen; chuin ahitin ahi, ama a-upa inneipi henga alut phatnin, a-upa dinga chi akhai pehlouna din, tolla alhi lhajin ahi." 
Genesis38:10 Chuin athilbol chun Pakai alung lhaitapon; hijeh chun amajong athattan ahi. 
Genesis38:11 Chujouvin Judah'in amounu Tamar henga, Kachapa Shelah ahung khandoh kahsen, napa in'a meithaijin ana umtan, ati. Ajehchu aman, Ama jonghi a-uteni bangin thiget inte ati ahi. Chuin Tamar achen, apa in'a agachengtan ahi." 
Genesis38:12 Chuin phat chomkhat jouvin Shua chanu Judah inneipi chu athitan ahi; chuin Judah chu lhep lung mongin aumtan, ama le agolpa Adullam mi Hira chu Timnah'a kelngoimul vouho henga agachetou lhonin ahi." 
Genesis38:13 Chuin Tamar henga chun, Ven natehpu akelngoi mul voudingin Timnah'a achetouve, tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
Genesis38:14 Chuin aman ameithai vonho ahohlhan, pon lukhuh akikhuh in, akitomchah-in, Timnah jotna lampi mun onglai khatna atouvin ahi; ajehchu Shelah chu kikhan lhitna ahitan, akichenpi dinga apehlou chu amanun ahet ahi." 
Genesis38:15 Judah'in amanu chu amuphatnin, amai akhujeh chun noti hinte tin angaiton ahi." 
Genesis38:16 Chuin ama lampama amanu henglama chun akiheijin, ajah-a, Katao ahi, hungin, keima nahenga hunglut inge, ati (Ajehchu aman amounu ahilam chu ahetlou ahi.) Chuin amanun, Kahenga nahunglut dinga ahile, ipi neipeh ding ham, ati." 
Genesis38:17 Chuin aman, Keiman ganhon lah-a konin kelnou khat hinthot nange, ati. Chuin amanun, Nangman hichu nahinthot masanga, kitepna khat neipeh ding hinam? ati." 
Genesis38:18 Chuin aman, Ipi kitepna kapeh ding ham? ati. Chuin amanun, Na mahor, na chao, chule nakhutna um natenggol chu neipen, ati. Chuin aman hichu amanu apen, chule amanu henga aluttan, chule amanun amapa-a konin nao avoptan ahi." 
Genesis38:19 Chuin amanu akipatdoh-in, achemangin, aponkhu chu ahohlhan, chule ameithai von chu akivon kittan ahi." 
Genesis38:20 Chuin Judah chun numeinu khutna kona akitepna thilho ladingin, agolpa Adullam mi khutna chun kelnou khat chu athotnin ahi. Ahinla aman amanu chu amujou tapon ahi." 
Genesis38:21 Chuin aman chuche munna miho chu adongin, Lam pama mun ong laija notinu chu hoija umtam? ati. Chuin amahon, Hiche mun'a noti koima aumpoi, atiuve." 
Genesis38:22 Chuin ama Judah henga ahung kilen, ajah-a, Amanu chu kaga mujoupoi; chule chuche mun'a mihon jong, Hiche mun'a koima noti aumpoi, atiuve, tin aseijin ahi." 
Genesis38:23 Chuin Judah'in thil chu amanu changden tahen, achuti loule kijumso get hite;ven, hiche kelnou hi kathotnin, amanula nagamu joupoi, ati." 
Genesis38:24 Chuin ahitin ahi, lha thum jouvin, Judah henga, Namounu Tamar noti'n apangin, chukal valin jong, ven, ajon na-a konin nao avoptai, tin aseipeh-un ahi. Chuin Judah'in, Amanu chu hinpui doh-un, chule kihal lihhen, ati." 
Genesis38:25 Chuin amanu ahinpuidoh phatnun, Hiche thilho neipa-a kona hi naovopma kahi, tin atehpu henga chun thu agathot tan ahi. Chuin amanun, Katao ahi, hiche mahor, chao, chule tenggol hi koija ham? vechenin, ati." 
Genesis38:26 Chuin Judah'in chuche thilho chu ama-a ahi chu ahetan, Amanu keisangin achonphajon ahi; ajehchu kachapa Shelah amanu dinga kapehlou jeh ahi, ati. Chuin amanu chu akal akitimatpi kittapon ahi." 
Genesis38:27 Chuin amanu naosonat phat ahunglhin phatnin ahitin ahi, veuvin, naobu sunga chun apengkop ding ni anaumin ahi." 
Genesis38:28 Chule ahitin ahi, amanu anaovin ahinheh phatnin, khatnin akhut ahinsoh doh-in ahile, naodom nun, Hichehi ahung sohdoh masajo ahi tin akhut chu alan, pat sandup abupeh-in ahi." 
Genesis38:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman akhut aloilut kit phatnin, veuvin asopipa ahungdohtan ahi. Chuin amanun, Iti nahin phut vang ham? hiche phutkeh nahi nachunga umhen, ati: hijeh chun amin Pharez asah taove." 
Genesis38:30 Chuin chuche jouchun akhutna pat sandup kibua asopipa chu ahung pengtan ahi. Chuin amin Zarah asah taovin ahi. 
Genesis39:1 Chuin Joseph chu Egypt gama apuisuh-un; chule Pharoah noija pipu khat, ngahtup loilah-a lamkai Egypt mi Potipher chun hinpui suh-a Ishmael miho khutna konin achotan ahi." 
Genesis39:2 Chuin Pakaiyin Joseph chu aumpin, amachu milolhing tah ahung hita; chule apu Egypt mipa in'a chun aumin ahi." 
Genesis39:3 Chuin Pakaiyin ama aumpia, atoh jouse chu Pakaiyin akhut na alolhinsah chu apupa chun amutai." 
Genesis39:4 Chuin Joseph apu mitmun lungsetna achangtan, amachu ajen letan ahi. Chuin ama insung vetup ding chun akoijin, aneijouse chu akhutna akoitan ahi." 
Genesis39:5 Chuin ahitin ahi, a-insung le anei jouse chunga avetup dinga akoi nikho-a pat chun Pakaiyin Joseph jal-in Egypt mipa insung chu phatthei aboh tan; chule Pakai phatthei bohchu a-insung alouma chule aneijouse chunga chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis39:6 Chuin aman aneijouse Joseph khutna akoisohtan, chule anehding an tailou ahetding dol thiljong ahetapon ahi. Chule Joseph chu migong hoitah le melhoitah ahi." 
Genesis39:7 Chuin hiche nungchun ahitin ahi, apu inneipi chun Joseph chu deichat mitnin avetan, chule amanun Neiluppin, atin ahi." 
Genesis39:8 Ahivangin ama anompon, apu inneipi henga chun, Vetan kapun hiche insunga hi kakhutna ipipi um ahi ahepon, chule aman aneijouse kakhutna akoi ahitai." 
Genesis39:9 Hiche insunga hi keima sanga lenjo koima aumpon; chujongle nangma a-inneipi nahi jeh-in nangma tailou hiche insunga aman keima khutna apehdoh lou imacha umlou ahi. Chuti ahile keiman hitobang khangitlouna lentah hi iti kabola, Pathen douna-a kachonset thei ding ham? ati." 
Genesis39:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanun Joseph luppi ding ahiloule aumpi dinga niseh-a aseivangin, aman amanu chu lungna changin angai pehpon ahi." 
Genesis39:11 Chuin chuche laiphat chun ahitin ahi, Joseph chu insunga kinbol dingin agalutnin ahile, insunga chun koimacha aumpon ahi." 
Genesis39:12 Chuin amanun, Neiluppin, atin amachu aponsilin amanin ahi. Chuin aman aponsil chu amanu khutna chun adalhan, ajamin, insunga kon chun apotdoh tan ahi." 
Genesis39:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanun akhutna apon adalhan, insunga konin ajamdoh tai, ti ahet phatnin," 
Genesis39:14 Amanun a-insunga miho chu akouvin, ajah uvah, Vetaovin eiho jum sahdin aman Hebrew mikhat ihenguva ahin puilutnin; eiluppi dingin amapa kahenga ahung lutnin, chuin keima hapenin kapeng jah jengin ahi." 
Genesis39:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, Aman aw sangtah-a kapenjah jengchu ahet phatnin, aponsil kakoma adalhan ajamin, insunga konin ajamdoh tan ahi, ati." 
Genesis39:16 Chuin amanun a-pakaipa in ahunglhun kahsen, aponsil chu akoma akoi jingin ahi." 
Genesis39:17 Chuin amanun chuche thu mama chu ahenga aseijin, Ihenguva nahin puilut Hebrew mi sohpa chu eisujum dingin kahenga ahung lutnin ahi." 
Genesis39:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, aw sangtah-a kapenjah phatnin, aman aponsil kakoma adalhan, ajamdoh tai, ati." 
Genesis39:19 Chuin ahitin ahi, Joseph pakaipa chun a-inneipin ahenga, Nasohpan hitihin eibole, tia aseichu ajah phatnin, alunghan akoujah jengin ahi." 
Genesis39:20 Chuin a-pakaipa chun Joseph chu akaijin, lengte soh changho kihenna mun songkul'a chun akoitan; chule ama songkul'a chun aumtan ahi." 
Genesis39:21 Ahivangin Pakaiyin Joseph aumpin, hepina amusah-in, chule songkul ngahpa mitmu-a lungsetna achansahtan ahi." 
Genesis39:22 Chuin songkul ngahpa chun songkul'a um sohchangho jouse chu Joseph khutna achinsahtan; chule chumuna kibol jouse chu, Joseph mopohna ahitai." 
Genesis39:23 Pakaiyin aumpi jeh le atoh tapou chu Pakaiyin alolhinsah jeh-in, akhut noija thil umpou pou chu songkul ngahpan adonkhoh tapon ahi." 
Genesis40:1 Chuin chucheng thil jouse nungin ahitin ahi, Egypt lengpa jukhon dompa le changlhah sempa chun a-pakaiyu, Egypt lengpa chu alung phatmosah lhontan ahi." 
Genesis40:2 Chuin Pharoah noija pipu teni, jukhon dom pipu le changlhah sem pipu chunga alunghang tan ahi." 
Genesis40:3 Chuin aman Joseph kihenna songkul ngah ho lamkaipa in, kihenna mun'a chun amani chu akhumtai." 
Genesis40:4 Chuin ngahtup ho lamkaipa chun amani vetup dingin Joseph chu akoijin, chule aman amani chu ajenletan ahi. Chule kihenna munna chun amani phat chomkhat a-umlhontan ahi." 
Genesis40:5 Chuin songkul'a um Egypt lengpa jukhon dompa le changlhah kangpa mang amat lhonin, anilhona jan khatna aneicheh lhon ahin, chule anilhonin aledohna to amangmat tha cheh lhonin ahi." 
Genesis40:6 Chuin Joseph chu jingkah-in amani henga ahungin, amani chu aven ahile, veuvin amani anguichet jeng lhonin ahi." 
Genesis40:7 Chuin aman a-pakaipa indan khatna aumpi Pharaoh vaipo teni chu adongin, Ibola nangni tunia hi hiti nguichet jeng nahi lhonham? ati." 
Genesis40:8 Chuin amanin ahengah, Keinin mang kamat lhonin, ahinla hichu aledohding koima aumpoi, atilhone. Chuin Joseph'in amani hengah, Aledoh nachu Pathen'a um hilouham? Kahenga neiseipeh lhonin tia katao ahi, ati." 
Genesis40:9 Chuin juhai dom pipu chun amang chu ahilin, ajah-a, Kamangin, veuvin, kamasanga lengpigui khat anaumin;" 
Genesis40:10 Chule lengpiguija chun abah thum aumin; chule hichu amum hung kisem bangin aumin, apah ho ahung sohdoh-in, chule apahboh hochun lengpiga minho chu ahinsodoh tan ahi." 
Genesis40:11 Chuin Pharaoh khon chu kakhutna hin anaumin; chule keiman lengpiga chu kanalan, Pharaoh khonsunga kana mehlhan, chuin keiman khon chu Pharaoh khutna kanapen ahi, ati." 
Genesis40:12 Chuin Joseph'in ahenga, Hiche hi aledohna chu ahi: Abah thum hochu nithum ahi." 
Genesis40:13 Nithum sunga Pharaoh'in nangma nalhadoh-a, natoh mun'a napansah kitding ahi. Chule masanga nangma ajukhon doma napan laija banga, Pharaoh khonchu akhutna napeh kitding ahi." 
Genesis40:14 Ahin nangma dinga thil aphatsoh phatle keima neihin geldoh inlang, kachunga hin lungsetna neihin musah-in, chule Pharaoh henga kaumchan hinseijin lang, hiche in'a konhin neihung puidoh teijin." 
Genesis40:15 Ajehchu tahbeh-a keima hi Hebrew mite gamsunga kona eikigudoh ahin; chule hikom jenga jong hi hiche gimbolna mun'a eikikhum nathei khopma ima katohset umlou ahi, ati." 
Genesis40:16 Chuin changlhah sem pipu chun aledohna chu aphalam ahi ti amuphatnin, Joseph henga, Keiman jong mangkhat kana matnin, chule veuvin, changlhah lothum kalu chunga kathopton ahi." 
Genesis40:17 Chuin achung nungpen lo-a chun Pharaoh dinga kihon nehthei namkim aumin; chuin kalu chunga lo-a konchun vachaten hichu aneuvin ahi, ati." 
Genesis40:18 Chuin Joseph'in adonbutnin, ahenga, Hiche hi aledoh nachu ahi: Lo thum chu nithum ahin;" 
Genesis40:19 Nithum sunga Pharaoh'in nangma nalhadoh-a thingchunga nakhai ding; chule vachaten nasa anehdiu ahi, ati." 
Genesis40:20 Chuin nithum chanin ahitin ahi, hichu Pharaoh pen nikho ahin, aman asohte jouse din golvah abolin ahi. Chuin aman jukhon dom pipu le changlhah sem pipu chu asohte lah-a apuidoh tan ahi." 
Genesis40:21 Chuin aman jukhon dom pipu chu ajukhon dopna mun'a apansah kitnin; chuin aman khon chu Pharaoh khutna apekit tan ahi. 
Genesis40:22 Ahivangin aman changlhah sem pipu chu Joseph'in aheng lhona aledoh bangchun, akhailih tan ahi." 
Genesis40:23 Ahinla jukhon dom pipu chun Joseph ageldoh tapon, amachu asumiltan ahi." 
Genesis41:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, kumni kichaina lamin Pharaoh'in mang aneijin; chule veuvin, ama vadung panga ana dingin ahi." 
Genesis41:2 Chuin veuvin, bongpi sagi hoitah cheh le thaochet cheh vadunga konin ahung doh-un; hampa lah-a chun alhaovin ahi." 
Genesis41:3 Chuin veuvin, bongpi dang sagi melse tah le gongtah tah vadunga kon mama chun ahungdoh kitnun; vadung pam twi china-a chun bongpi dangho koma adingun ahi." 
Genesis41:4 Chuin bongpi melse tah le gongtah tah ho chun, bongpi hoitah le thaotah tah hochu anejou hel taovin ahi. Chuin Pharaoh ahung khangdoh tan ahi." 
Genesis41:5 Chuin Pharaoh a-ihmulhu kitnin, anivei channa-in mang aneikit: chule veuvin, changkung khat nahin changvui sagi lentah le phatah ahung doh-in ahi." 
Genesis41:6 Chuin chuche jouchun, veuvin, solam huijin asem gopsa changvui geositset sagi ahungdoh-in ahi." 
Genesis41:7 Chuin geositset sagi chun changvui lentah le phatah sagiho chu avallhumtan ahi. Chuin Pharaoh ahung khangin ahile, veuvin, hichu amang anahi." 
Genesis41:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, jingkah ahung hi phatnin ama alungkham lheh jengtan, chuin aman mi asolin, Egypt gama mitphel doithem jouse le miching jouse akoutan ahi. Chuin Pharaoh'in amaho henga amang chu aseijin; ahivangin Pharaoh henga chun hiche ledohthei koimacha aumtapon ahi." 
Genesis41:9 Chujouvin jukhon dom pipu chun Pharaoh henga, Tunin kathemona khat kagel doh-e:" 
Genesis41:10 Pharaoh chu asohte ni chunga alung hana, keima le changlhah sem pipu chu ngahtup ho lamkai in'a songkul'a akoi laijin," 
Genesis41:11 Keima le ama chun jan khat mang kanei gel lhonin; keinin atumcheh-in aledohna um mang kanei gel lhonin ahi. 
Genesis41:12 Chuin chukoma chun ngahtup lama lamkaipa sohpa Hebrew khangdong khat keini toh aumkhomin ahi; chuin amachu kaseipeh lhonin ahile, aman kamanglhon chu aledoh-in; kamanglhon dungjui chun aledohna chu eiseipeh gel lhonin ahi." 
Genesis41:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman kaheng lhona aledoh bang chun, chutichun ahung guilhungin; aman keima katoh na mun'a eipansah kitnin, chule amavang chu akhailih tan ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:14 Chujouvin Pharaoh'in Joseph koudingin mi asolin, chuin amahon songkul'a konin gangtah-in ahin puidoh-un ahi. Chuin ama akivou ngimin, aponsil akikhelin, Pharaoh henga chun ahunglut tan ahi." 
Genesis41:15 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Keiman mangkhat kaneijin, hichu aledohthei ja koimacha aumtapoi. Chule keiman nangma chungchang thu, nangman mang ledohthem theina naneije ti mi seinan kajan ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:16 Chuin Joseph'in Pharaoh chu adonbutnin, ahenga, Hichu keima-a uma ahipoi; Pathen joh-in lungmon umtah donbutna chu Pharaoh apehding ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:17 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Kamangin, veovin, keima vadung panga kana dingin ahi." 
Genesis41:18 Chuin, veovin, bongpi sagi thaotah le hoitahcheh vadunga konin ahungdoh-un; hamhing lah-a chun alhaovin ahi." 
Genesis41:19 Chule veovin, bongpi sagi dang phamotah le melsetah chule gongtah tah, chutobang tah-a melse Egypt gam jouse-a jong kanamukhah louhel chu anunguva chun ahungdoh-un ahi." 
Genesis41:20 Chuin bongpi gongtah le melsetah hochun bongpi sagi thaotah tah masaho chu anejouhel taovin ahi. 
Genesis41:21 Chuin hiho chu anehjouhel vangun, anehjouvu chu hetdoh thei ahidehpoi; ajehchu amaho chu atila bang chun amelse jing jenguvin ahi. Chuti chun keima kahung khangdohtai." 
Genesis41:22 Chuin keiman kamangin, veuvin, changkung khatna changvui sagi dimset set le phatah tah ahungdoh kamun ahi." 
Genesis41:23 Chuin veuvin, hiho nunga chun changvui sagi asisa le gaositset chule solam huijin asemgopsa ahungsoh kitnin ahi." 
Genesis41:24 Chuin changvui geositset hochun changvui phatah tah sagiho chu avaljouhel tan ahi. Chule keiman hichu mitphel doithemho henga kaseijin; ahivangin eihilchen thei koimacha aumpon ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:25 Chuin Joseph'in Pharaoh henga, Pharaoh manghi thakhat ahi, Pathen'in athil hinbol dingho chu Pharaoh henga amusah ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:26 Bongpi phatah sagiho chu kum sagi ahin; chule changvui pha sagi chu kum sagima ahi. Mang chu thakhat ahi. 
Genesis41:27 Chule anunga bongpi gongtahle melsetah sagi hungsoh doh hochu kum sagi ahin; chule changvui sagi asikeu, solam huijin asemgopsa chu kum sagi kel lhah ding ahi." 
Genesis41:28 Keiman Pharaoh henga kaseisa chu hiche thilhi ahi. Pathen'in athil hinbolding chu Pharaoh amusah ahi. 
Genesis41:29 Veovin, Egypt gam pumpi-a hi kum sagi neh nasatah-a ninglhingsetna hung lhung ding ahi." 
Genesis41:30 Chule hiche jou chule kum sagi kel lhah hung lhungding; chule Egypt gama neh ning lhinna kum jouse chu suhmila hung umding; chule kel lhah chun gam chu anehchai ding; 
Genesis41:31 Chule kel hung lhunding jeh-a chu ninglhinna chu gamsunga hetphah louhela umding ahi; ajeh chu hichu nasalheh ding ahi. 
Genesis41:32 Chule Pharaoh'in mang nivei nanei kopna jehchu hichehi ahi: Pathen'in thilchu asuhdet ahitan; chule hichu Pathen'in chomlouva aguilhunsah ding jeh ahi. 
Genesis41:33 Hijeh chun tun Pharaoh'in lungelthem le miching khat holdoh henlang, amachu Egypt gam chunga vaipon tungdoh hen." 
Genesis41:34 Hijeh chun Pharaoh'in tun hichehi bolhen, chule gamsunga hin vaipoho lhengdoh henlang, amaho chun neh ninglhinna kum sagi sungchun Egypt gama nehsoh hopnga-a hopkhat lakhom uhen." 
Genesis41:35 Chule amahon ahung lhung ding kum phaho sunga chang jouse chu khom khomu henlang, changho chu Pharaoh khutnoija kholuhen, chule amahon khopiho-a chun chang kholuhen." 
Genesis41:36 Chule keljeh-a gamhi amanthah louna dinga, Egypt gama hung chuding kelhah kum sagi sunga dinga kigina-a, chang chu hiche gama dinga hi kholkhom ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:37 Chuin hiche thuchu Pharaoh leh asohte mitmun aphalheh jengin ahi. 
Genesis41:38 Chuin Pharaoh'in asohte henga, Ama tobanga Pathen Lhagao asunga aumna mihem hi imu joumong diu hinam? ati." 
Genesis41:39 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Pathen'in hicheho jousehi nangma namusah jeh hin, nangma banga lungelthem le miching dang aumpoi." 
Genesis41:40 Nangma ka-insung chunga vaipo-a napanding, chule nangma thupeh dungjuija kamite hi kivaipo diu ahi; Laltouna chungchanga hibou keima nangma sanga lenjo kahiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis41:41 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Ven, keiman nangma Egypt gam jouse chunga vaipo-a katun nahitai, ati." 
Genesis41:42 Chuin Pharaoh'in akhutna konin khutjem chu aladoh-in, Joseph khutna abupeh-in, chule tupat ponsil hoitah-in ajemin, sana ngong'o angonga a-o peh-in;" 
Genesis41:43 Chule amachu akangtalai nei nilhina-a chun atousah-in; chule amasanga, Dilsuvin, tin asamun ahi. Chutichun aman Egypt gam pumpi chunga vaipon atungtan ahi." 
Genesis41:44 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Keimahi Pharaoh kahin, chule nangma thulouvin Egypt gam pumpi-a hin koimachan akhut hile akeng hileh lamthei ponte, ati." 
Genesis41:45 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph min chu Zaphnath-Paaneah asah in; On thempu Potiphera chanu Asenath chu aji dingin apen ahi. Chuin Joseph'in Egypt gam jouse agachonle tan ahi. 
Genesis41:46 Joseph Egypt lengpa Pharaoh angsunga adin chun kum somthum alhingtan ahi. Chuin Joseph Pharaoh henga konin apotnin, Egypt gam pumpi agachonsoh tan ahi." 
Genesis41:47 Chuin kum sagi neh ninglhin sung chun leijin nengtah-in an asosah-in ahi. 
Genesis41:48 Chuin aman Egypt gamsunga kum sagi sungin chang jouse akhom khomin, khopi ho-a chun akholin ahi. Chule akimvela louho-a kona changho chu khopitina chun akhol khomin ahi." 
Genesis41:49 Chuin Joseph'in chang chu twikhanglen'a neldi jat banghela tamin akhomin, simjouhoi ahitahlou jeh in, asimjong abang heltan ahi." 
Genesis41:50 Chuin kel lhah kum ahunglhun masangin Joseph'in chapa ni aneijin, hichu On thempu Potiphera chanu Asenath'in ahinpeh ahi." 
Genesis41:51 Chuin Joseph'in apeng masa chu Manasseh asah-in ahi. Ajehchu Pathen'in kahahsatna jouse le kapa insung jouse eisuhmil sahtai, ati." 
Genesis41:52 Chuin ani lhinna chu amin Ephraim asahtai. Ajehchu Pathen'in kathoh gimna gamahin eipunsahtai, ati." 
Genesis41:53 Chuin Egypt gama neh lhinna kum sagi chu ahung kichaitai. 
Genesis41:54 Chule Joseph'in aseibangin kellhah kum sagi chu ahung lhungtan; ahivangin Egypt gam pumpi-a chun neh aumin ahi. 
Genesis41:55 Chuin Egypt gam jouse-a kel ahunglhah phatnin, miho chu Pharaoh lengpa henga neh thumin ahung tao taovin ahi. Chuin Pharaoh'in Egypt mite jouse henga chun, Joseph koma cheovin, aman naheng uva aseichu bolun, atitai." 
Genesis41:56 Chule kel chu leiset pumpi chunga alhatan ahi. Chuin Joseph'in chang kikhol khomna in jouse chu ahong doh-in, Egypt mite henga chun ajoh in; chule kel chu Egypt gama chun akhohlheh jengin ahi." 
Genesis41:57 Chuin kel chu gam jouse-a alhah nasat behset jeh in, gam jouse-a mihemte Egypt gama Joseph henga chun chang cho dingin ahungun ahi." 
Genesis42:1 Tun Jacob'in Egypt gama chang aume, ti amuphat nin, Jacob'in achapate henga, Ipi dinga nakimoh vetto jengu ham? ati." 
Genesis42:2 Chuin aman, Veuvin, Egypt gama chang aume, ti kajai; thilouva ihindoh theina diuvin chua chun gachesuh unlang, eiho dingin chang gacho taovin, ati." 
Genesis42:3 Chuin Joseph sopi somho chu Egypt gama chang cho dingin achesuh taove. 
Genesis42:4 Ahin Joseph naopa Benjamin vang chu Jacob'in asopiho chutoh asolthapoi; ajehchu aman, Ijemtin toset khat achunga chukhante, atin ahi." 
Genesis42:5 Chuin Israel chapate chu adang ahungho chutoh lhonin chang cho dingin ahungtaove. Ajehchu Canaan gama chun kel alhatan ahi. 
Genesis42:6 Chule Joseph chu chuche gama chu gamvaipo-a panga ahitan, chule ama chuche gam mijouse henga chu chang joh-a panga ahitai. Chuin Joseph sopite chu ahungun, chule a-angsunga tolla chun aboh khupmun ahi." 
Genesis42:7 Chuin Joseph'in asopite chu amun, chule amaho chu ahen; ahivangin aman amaho chu ahetlou bangin abolin, i-sah loutah-in ahouvin; chuin aman amaho henga, Hoija kona hung nahiuvem? ati. Chuin amahon, Canaan gama kona chang cho dinga hunga kahiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Genesis42:8 Chule Joseph'in asopite chu ahenan, ahivangin amahon amachu ahepouve." 
Genesis42:9 Chuin Joseph'in amaho chungchang thua mang anamat chu ageldoh-in, chuin ahenguva, Nangho hi gam velhi nahiuve, gam agohkeova aumhi velhi dinga hung nahiuve, ati." 
Genesis42:10 Chuin amahon ahenga, Ahipoi, ka pakai, nasohte hi changcho dinga bou hunga kahi bouvui, atiuve." 
Genesis42:11 Keiho kabon chaovin mikhat chapate kahiuve; mi kitah kahiuvin, nasohte gamvelhi kahipouve." 
Genesis42:12 Chuin aman amaho henga, Ahipoi, hiche agoh keova aum hi velhi dinga hunga nahiuve, ati." 
Genesis42:13 Chuin amahon, Nasohte hi sopi somleni kahiuvin, Canaan gama mikhat chapate kahiuve; chule vetan, alhumpen chu tupet hin kapau toh aumin, khatvang aumtapoi, atiuve." 
Genesis42:14 Chuin Joseph'in ahenguva, Gamvelhi nahiuve, katichu nahiuve." 
Genesis42:15 Hichea hi nangho kipatep ding nahiuve: Nasopi pao alhumpen chu hikoma hi ahung louleh, Pharaoh mina kahahsel nahiuve, nangho hikoma kona hi napotdoh loudingu ahi." 
Genesis42:16 Nangho-a thutah aum aumlou nathusei uva kona photchet ahina dingin, nalah uva mikhat solunlang nanaopao chu hinpuihen, nangho vang songkul'a naum dingu ahi. Achuti louleh Pharaoh mina kahahsel nahiuve, nangho hi gam velhi nahi mongui, atitai." 
Genesis42:17 Chuin aman amaho chu abonchauvin thakhatnin nithum ahentan ahi. 
Genesis42:18 Chuin Joseph'in anithum chanin ahenguvah, Hichehi bolun lang hinnan neijun; ajehchu keiman Pathen kaginge, ati." 
Genesis42:19 Nangho hi mikitah nahiuleh, na-uchahou lah-a khatpen hitihin songkul'a umden hen: Nangho adangse na-in sunguva kelthohho ding chang kipoh unlang chetaovin." 
Genesis42:20 Ahin nanao-u alhumpen chu kahenga hinpuijun; hitichun nathusei houchu photchetnin umintin, nangho nathiloudiu ahi, ati. Chuin amahon chutichun aboltauve." 
Genesis42:21 Chuin amaho khatnin khat henga, Tahbeh-in eiho inaopao thudol, aman eiho eingeh tun tun pettah uva alungsung hesoh je kimu khel khela, ingaipeh louvu chu ithemo lheh-ui, Hiche jeh-a chu hiche gentheina hi ichunguva chua ahitai, atiuve." 
Genesis42:22 Chuin Reuben'in amaho chu adonbutnin, Chapang chunga chun chonset bolhih-un tia kaseipehsa nahilouvu ham? Ahin nanghon kathusei nangai pouve; hiche jeh-a chu veuvin, athisan phu chu kingeh-a ahitai, ati." 
Genesis42:23 Chule akah uva Pao le aum jehchun, Joseph'in amaho thusei ahet chu amahon ahepouve." 
Genesis42:24 Chuin ama amaho-a konin akihei mangin, akaptai; chuin ama ahenguva ahung kitnin, amaho chutoh akihouvin, chuin Simeon chu ahenguva konin akaijin, chuin amitmuva chun akantai." 
Genesis42:25 Chujouvin Joseph'in adipmu chu chang sundimpeh dingle asum cheh-u chu adipcheh uva lekhum pehcheh dingin, chule lampi-a aneh dingu an agonpeh dingun thu apetan; chutichun amaho ding chun abolpeh tan ahi." 
Genesis42:26 Chuin achang houchu asangan hou apohsah-un, akipatdoh taove." 
Genesis42:27 Chuin alah uva khatnin agenau inna asangan an pedinga adipchu agah honleh, asumchu amutai; ajehchu, veovin, hichu adip kama chun ana umin ahi." 
Genesis42:28 Chuin aman asopite henga, Kasum ana kilekoi kit tai; Chule veuvin, kadipsung ahin ana ume, ati. Chuin amaho alungling laovun, akicha gamtaovin, Pathen'in ichunguva abolhi ipi ahitadem? akitiuvin ahi." 
Genesis42:29 Chuin amaho Canaan gama apau Jacob heng ahung lhung taovin, chule achunguva thusoh jouse chu ama chu ahilun; ahenga hitin aseijun ahi," 
Genesis42:30 Mipa, agam pakaipa chun huham tah-in eina houvun, chuche gam velhi danin einalaovin ahi." 
Genesis42:31 Chuin keihon ahenga, Keiho mikitah tah te kahiuvin; gam velhi kahipouve," 
Genesis42:32 Keiho sopi somleni kahiuvin, pakhat hinbou kahiuve; khatpa aumtapoi, alhumpen vang tupetnin Canaan gama kapau toh aume, katiuvin ahi." 
Genesis42:33 Chuin chuche mipa, agam pakaipa chun kahenguva, Hichea hin nangho milungdih nahiu chu hethei jinge; nasopiteu lah-a khat kahenga dalhao vin, chule na-in sunguva kelthoh ho dingin chang kipoh unlang chetaovin." 
Genesis42:34 Chule nanao-u alhumpen chu kahenga hinpuijun: chutengle nangho gam velhi nahipouvin, ahin mikitah tah te nahiuve tichu heng kate. Chuteng nasopi pao lhadohpeh ungting, chule hiche gamahi nakivei dingu ahi, eitiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Genesis42:35 Chuin amahon adip mu alheilhah phatnun, ahitin ahi, veuvin, amitakip sum chun chu adip cheh-a ana umtan ahi. Chuin amaho leh apau chun asumchun hou amuphat nun, akicha lheh taovin ahi." 
Genesis42:36 Chuin apau Jacob chun ahenguva, Nangho hin kachate neichan sah-u ahitai; Joseph aumtapon, Simeon jong aumtapon, chule nanghon Benjamin jong puimang nagouve. Hicheng thil jousehin eilhunkhum ahitai, ati." 
Genesis42:37 Chuin Reuben'in apa henga, Keiman amachu nakoma kahin puilutkit louleh kachapa teni hi that jengin; amachu kakhutna neipedoh-in, keiman ama chu nahenga hinle puikit nange, ati." 
Genesis42:38 Chuin aman, Kachapa hi nangho toh kilhona chesuh louhel ding ahi; ajehchu a-upa thia ahitan, ama changsehbou uma ahitai. Nachenao lamdunga achungah toset chutale, kasam kangsa hi lhankhuh-a lunghem puma napuisuh dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis43:1 Chuin hiche gama chun kel alha nasalheh jengtan ahi. 
Genesis43:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, amahon Egypt gama kona ahinpoh-u chang chu anehjou phatnun, apauvin ahenguva, Chekitnun lang eihodin chang phabep gachouvin ati." 
Genesis43:3 Chuin Judah'in ahenga, Mipa chun, Nanaopao chu nahin kilhonpi lou uleh kamai namu louhel dingu ahi, tin nasatah-in eigih-un ahi." 
Genesis43:4 Nangman kanaopao hi keihotoh lhondinga nasolding vangle, keiho chesuh ungting, chang gachohpeh unge." 
Genesis43:5 Ahin amachu nasol louding vangleh, keiho chesuh pouvinge. Ajehchu mipa chun kahenguva, Nanaopao chu nahin kilhonpi lou uleh, kamai namu louheldiu ahi, ati ahi, tin aseije." 
Genesis43:6 Chuin Israel'in, Ipidinga naokhat nanei nah laiju thu chu mipa chu nahin seipehkhel kheluva, hitobanga phalou tah-a hi neibolu ham? ati." 
Genesis43:7 Chuin amahon, Mipa chun, napau damna laijam? Sopidang naneijum? tin keiho thudol le insung thudol eidoh doh jeng jeh uva, hiche akam chengho dungjuija chu ama kaseipeh-u ahi. Nanaopao hinpui suh-un, ati ding chu keihon ija kahet diu ham? atiuve." 
Genesis43:8 Chuin Judah'in apa Israel henga, Keiho le nangma, chule chapang sen hohi thilouva ahintheina diuvin chapang chu keimatoh neilhon sah-in." 
Genesis43:9 Keima ama dingin kitung-ing kating, keima khut ngeija amachu ngeh-in: keiman ama nahenga kahin lepui louva, namasanga hi kadinsahkit louva ahileh mona chu kumkhon pojeng ing kate." 
Genesis43:10 Ajehchu keiho khongaisot louva hileuveng, tu-a hi nivei kile kitding kahiu ahitai, ati." 
Genesis43:11 Chuin apau Israel'in ahenguva, Tun hichu hiding mong ahi tah le, hiche hi bolun; nadip uva hichegam thingga phapen phabepho, thingnailou phabep, khoiju phabep, thilnamtui, myrrh, beleilut, chule jonmot posuh unlang, chule mipa chu thilpeh-in peuvin." 
Genesis43:12 Chule nakhut un dangka ajatnia tamin kenbeuvin, chule nadip uva dangka nahinlepoh kitnu jongchu kiken kitnuvin, mukhel jong hithei ahi." 
Genesis43:13 Nanaopao jong chu kipuijun, kipat doh-un lang, chuche mipa henga chun chekit taovin." 
Genesis43:14 Chule amapan nasopipa le Benjamin ahinlhadoh kit nadin, imajouse bolthei hat chungnung Pathen'in mipa masanga chun lungsetna napeu hen. Kachate chu kachantah jong leh kachan himaitante, ati." 
Genesis43:15 Chuin miho chun thilpeh chu apouvin, dangka jatni apoh beuvin, chule Benjamin jong akipuijun; akipatnun, Egypt gama achesuh-un, Joseph anga chun ading kit taove." 
Genesis43:16 Chuin Joseph'in Benjamin chu amaho chutoh amuphatnin, a-insung vetuppa henga, Hiche miho hi in'a puijin, sa thatnin lang, gotsan koijin; ajehchu miho khun sun le keima toh ankong a-umkhom dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis43:17 Chuin mipa chun Joseph thupeh bangchun abolin; miho chu Joseph in'a apuilut tan ahi. 
Genesis43:18 Chuin Joseph in'a apuilut jehchun, miho chu akicha taovin; chule amahon iche masah uva idipmuva dangka ana kikoijeh-a chu ichunguva agomkom ahola, ichunguva chua, eiho le isangan hou hi soh-a neiding eigotnuva eipuilutnu ahi, akitiuve." 
Genesis43:19 Chuin amahon Joseph insung vetuppa chu ahin naijun, kotkhah bula chun amachu akihoulim piuvin," 
Genesis43:20 Chule amahon, Vo hepu, kahung masah chungu chun keiho chang choding monga hunga kahiuve." 
Genesis43:21 Chuin ahitin ahi, keiho jinlhun in kalhun phatnun, kadipmuchu kahongun ahile, ka dangka cheh uchu kadipkam cheh uva chun ana umtan, ka dangkao chu agih lhingsetnin ana umtan ahi. Chule keihon hichu kahinpo kitnun ahi." 
Genesis43:22 Chule chang choh nading dangka jong kahinpouvin, ahi. Kadip sunguva kadangkau chu kon anakoiham Kahepouve, atiuve." 
Genesis43:23 Chuin aman, Lungmong tah-in umun, kicha hih-un; na Pathen'u chule napau Pathen chun nangho dinga nadip uva gou nakoipeh-u ahi; keiman nangho dangka kamunai, ati. Chuin Simeon chu ahenguva ahinpui doh-in ahi." 
Genesis43:24 Chuin mipa chun amaho chu Joseph in'a apuilutnin, chuin amaho chu twi apen, amahon akengu akisilun; chule aman asangongsao hou jong an apen ahi." 
Genesis43:25 Chuin amahon chua changlhah anehdiu chu ajataovin, sunna Joseph ahung tengle peh ding chun thilpeh hochu agongtup mun ahi." 
Genesis43:26 Chuin Joseph in'a ahung phatnin, akhutnuva um thilpeh chu insunga ahin choilutnun, chuin amaho tolla aboh khupmun, ama chu chibai aboh-un ahi." 
Genesis43:27 Chuin aman amaho umchan chu adongin, Nanghon aumchan naseiju napau tehse chu damnam? amachu hing nalaijam? ati." 
Genesis43:28 Chuin amahon adonbut un, Nasohpa kapau chu adampet ahin, chule ahing nalainai, atiuve. Chuin amaho akunun, chibai abohkitnun ahi." 
Genesis43:29 Chuin ama akhodah-in ahile, anaopa Benjamin, anu chapa chu amun; hichun aman, Hiche hi nanao-u alhumpen, aumchan kahenga naseipao chu ham? ati. Chuin aman, Kachapa, Pathen'in nalungset hen, ati." 
Genesis43:30 Chuin Joseph'in anaopa chu alung ase behseh-in, kikin notah-in kana ding mun aholtan; Chuin ama a-indan sunga alutnin, chua chun agakaptan ahi." 
Genesis43:31 Chuin aman amai akiphetnin, apotdoh kitnin, chuin ama akikham nahnah-in, Ankong semun, ati." 
Genesis43:32 Chuin amahon amading atumin, chule amahoding atumin, chule amatoh neh khompi Egypt miho ding chun atumin asemtaove. Ajehchu Egypt miho chun Hebrew miho toh an aneh khom ngailouvu ahi; ajehchu Egypt mite dinga hichu thet umtah ahi." 
Genesis43:33 Chuin amaho apeng masapen chu a-upat hina dungjuijin, chule alhumpen chu achapan dungjuijin Joseph anga chun atousah taovin ahi. Chuin amaho chun kidang asalheh jengun ahi." 
Genesis43:34 Chuin ama-a konchun chanho chu alan ahenguva chun ahomin; ahin Benjamin chan chu amaho khat chan sangin chan nga in atamjon ahi. Chuin amahon adonun, amato akipahkhom taovin ahi." 
Genesis44:1 Chuin aman a-insung vetuppa chu thu apen, ajah-a, Amahon ajo chanuva apoh diuvin adip-u khu chang sundim peh-in, chule adangka cheh-u chu adip kamuva koipeh cheh-in." 
Genesis44:2 Chule kakhon, kadangka khon chu alhumpenpa dipkama achang man dangka chutoh koithan, ati. Chuin aman Joseph'in aseibang chun aboltan ahi." 
Genesis44:3 Chuin jing kho ahungvah vah-in, miho chu asangan hou toh asoldoh taove." 
Genesis44:4 Chuin amaho khopi-a kona achedoh uva gamlatah agei masangun, Joseph'in neichingpa henga chun, Kipat in lang miho chu delin, chule nangman amaho chu naphah tengle, ahenguva, Ipi dinga phatna chu setna-a nalethuh uham?" 
Genesis44:5 Hichea hi ka pakai pan adonji hilou hija, chule tahbeh-a hichehi agaochan naji chu hilouham? Hiche nabolu hi nangho nasuhkhelu ahitai, tin ahenguva gaseijin, ati." 
Genesis44:6 Chuin aman amaho chu adelpha tan, chule hiche thu mama chu ahenguva aseitan ahi." 
Genesis44:7 Chuin amahon ahenga, Ipi dinga ka pakaiyin hitobang thuhi naseiham? Nasohten chutobang aboldiu chu Pathen'in jada jenghen." 
Genesis44:8 Vetan, kadip kamuva kamudoh-u dangka chu Canaan gama konin nahenga kahinlepoh kitnuve; achutile napakai pa in'a kona sana le dangka keihon iti kaguh diu ham?" 
Genesis44:9 Nasohte lah-a hin koihile namuna penpen chu, ama chu thijeng hen, chule keiho jeng jong ka pakai soh-in um jenguvinge, atiuve." 
Genesis44:10 Chuin aman, Tun nasei bangu chu himaihen: hiche kimuna penpa chu kasoh himai ding ahin; chule adangho vang themo chanda jenghen ati." 
Genesis44:11 Chujouvin amaho amitakipmin adipmu chu gangtah-in tolla akoilhauvin, amitakip chun adip cheh uchu ahong taovin ahi." 
Genesis44:12 Chuin aman alenpena apanin, alhumpen geijin akholtan ahile, khon chu Benjamin dipma chun amudohtan ahi." 
Genesis44:13 Chutah-in amahon avonhou chu asattelun, chule amitakip chun apotnu asangnu apohsah kitnun, khopi lama akilekit taove." 
Genesis44:14 Chuin Judah le asopite chu Joseph'in ahung lhung taove; ajehchu ama chua chu umnalai ahi. Chuin amaho a-angsunga chun tolla abohkhup taove. 
Genesis44:15 Chuin Joseph'in amaho henga, Hiche nathilbol uhi ipi nabolnao hitam? Keitobang mihin phun asan theije ti nahet lou uham? ati." 
Genesis44:16 Chuin Judah'in ka pakai henga ipi kaseidingu hitam? keihon ipi seitaoving em? Ahilouleh keiho le keihon iti kaki seitheng diu hitam? Pathen'in nasohte khangitlouna hi amudoh ahitai. Vetan, keiho hi ka pakai sohte kahiu ahitai, keiho le khon kimudoh napa jonghi, ati." 
Genesis44:17 Chuin aman, chutobanga kaboldiu chu Pathen jahda hihen. Ahin khon akhutna kimudohna pa bouchu kasoh hiding ahin; nangho vang, lungmong tah-in kipat un lang napau henga chetaovin, ati." 
Genesis44:18 Chuin Judah'in akom ahin naijin, Vo ka pakai, nahenga katao ahi, nasoh hin ka pakai nahenga thucheng khat seijing ting, chule nalunghanna chu nasoh chunga hinkou dohsah hih-in; ajehchu nangma Pharaoh masap nahi." 
Genesis44:19 Ka pakaiyin nasohte henga, Nanghon pa ahiloule nasopiu nanei nalai uvem? tin neina dongun;" 
Genesis44:20 Chuin keihon ka pakai henga, Kapau tehse khat le ateh nunga ahin chapang sopi khat kaneijuve; chule a-upa vang athitan, chule anu chate lah-a amabou uma ahitan, apan amachu angailu lheh-e, kanatiuve." 
Genesis44:21 Chuin nangman nasohte henga, Amachu kamitna kamunadin kahenga hinpui suh-un natin, ahi." 
Genesis44:22 Chuin keihon ka pakai henga, Chapang chun apa dalhathei ponte, ajehchu aman apa dalha taleh, apa thijeng ding ahi, kanatiuve." 
Genesis44:23 Chuin nangman nasohte henga, Nanao lhumpenu chu nang hotoh lhona ahungsuh louva ahile, nanghon kamai namukit loudiu ahi, nati." 
Genesis44:24 Chuin nasoh kapau henga kakiletou kitphatnun ahitin ahi, Keihon ka pakai thusei jouse chu kaseipeh-un ahi." 
Genesis44:25 Chuin kapau vin, Chekitnun lang eihoding chang phabep gachokitnun atin ahi." 
Genesis44:26 Chuin keihon, Keiho chesuhthei pouvinge, kanaopao alhumpen chutoh neilhonsah dinguleh keiho kachesuh dingu ahi: ajehchu kanaopao alhumpen chutoh kalhon lou uleh, mipa maichu kamu kitthei loudiu ahi, kanatiuve." 
Genesis44:27 Chuin nasoh kapau chun kahenguva, Ka-inneipin chapa ni eihinpeh nanghon naheuve." 
Genesis44:28 Chuin khatpa chun eidalhatan, chule keiman thonlouva ahal hala kimaltel hitante, kanatin; chule keiman amachu chuche-a patchun kamutapon ahi." 
Genesis44:29 Chule nanghon ama jonghi keija konin puidoh unlang, achunga toset chutale, nanghon kasam kangsahi lunghem puma lhankhuh-a napuilut dingu ahi, atin ahi." 
Genesis44:30 Hijeh chun tun, keima hi nasoh kapau kom kalhunteng, chapang chu keihotoh umtahih leh, ahinkho chu chapangpa hinkho toh kikan khom ahijeh chun," 
Genesis44:31 Hung hitiding ahi, aman chapang chu keihotoh kalhonkhom louvu chu amuteng, thitei ding ahitai. Chule nasohte hin, nasoh kapau sam kangsa chu lunghem puma lhankhuh-a kapuilut dingu ahi." 
Genesis44:32 Ajehchu nasoh hi kapau henga chapang dinga hungkitung kahin, ahenga, Nahenga kahin lepuikit louleh, kapa henga kumkhon themona pong kate, kanati ahi." 
Genesis44:33 Hijeh chun tun, nahenga katao ahi, chapang khelchun keimahi ka pakai dingin nasoh-in umingting, chule chapanghi asopite toh chetaohen." 
Genesis44:34 Ajehchu chapang chu kalhonpi louleh, kapa koma iti kakiletou thei ding ham? Ajehchu kapa chunga hung chuding setna chu muget inge, ati." 
Genesis45:1 Chujouvin Joseph akoma dingho angsunga chun ama le ama akikhamtang joutapon; chuin aman, Mijouse kakoma konin potdoh sah-un, tin asamtan ahi. Chuin Joseph ama le ama asopite henga akiphondoh chun, koimacha akoma aumpon ahi." 
Genesis45:2 Chuin ama hatah-in akaptan; chule Egypt mite le Pharaoh insung mite chun ajauvin ahi. 
Genesis45:3 Chuin Joseph'in asopite henga, keima Joseph kahi; kapa dam nalai nam? ati. Chuin asopite chun amachu adonbut thei pouvin; ajehchu amasanga chu lungdong gamu ahitai." 
Genesis45:4 Chuin Joseph'in asopite henga, Katao ahi, kakom hinaijun ati. Chuin amahon ahin naijun ahi. Chuin aman keima nanaopao Joseph, Egypt gama najohdoh pao chu kahi." 
Genesis45:5 Hijeh chun tun nanghon hikoma neinajoh jeh-uchun lungkham hih-un, ahilouleh nangho le nangho kilunghan hih un; ajehchu Pathen'in hinkho venbitna aumna dinga nangho masanga einasol ahi." 
Genesis45:6 Ajehchu hiche kumni sunghin hiche gamahin kel alhatai: chule kumnga aum nalaijin, hiche sunga hi lou tuh le chang-at himhim umlou ding ahi." 
Genesis45:7 Chule leichunga hi nachilhah teo hongbit dingle, lhatdohna loupitah-a nahinkhou hoidoh sah dinga Pathen'in nama sang uva einasol ahi." 
Genesis45:8 Hijeh chun tun hikoma einasola chu nangho nahipouvin, Pathen joh ahibouve. Chule aman Pharaoh pa le a-insung jouse pakai ding, chule Egypt gam pumpi-a vaihom dingin eisemtan ahi." 
Genesis45:9 Kino uvin, kapa koma cheovin lang, ahenga, Nachapa Joseph'in, Pathen'in Egypt gam pumpi-a pakaiyin eitung tai; kahenga hin hungsuh-in, hung geisang hih-in." 
Genesis45:10 Chule nangma Goshen gama nachen ding, nangma le nachate, chateho, nakelngoi hon, nabonghon, chule nanei chengse puma keima kom naija naum ding ahi." 
Genesis45:11 Chule keiman nangma chua chun vah-ing kate; ajehchu kumnga kel lhanalai ding ahi; achuti loule nangma le na-insung mite, chule nanei chengse vaichat na-a chugetnun nate, tin aseije gatiuvin." 
Genesis45:12 Chule, veuvin, keiman kakamtah-a naheng uva kasei ahi ti namit tah-u le kanao Benjamin mittah-in amutai." 
Genesis45:13 Chule Egypt gama kaloupina jouse le nathil mu jouseu hi kapa naseipeh dingu; chule nanghon gangtah-a kapa chu hilama nahin puisuh diu ahi, ati." 
Genesis45:14 Chuin aman anau Benjamin chu angong koijin, akaptan; chule Benjamin'in jong angong koijin akaptan ahi." 
Genesis45:15 Chuche chung chon chun asopite jouse chu achopmin, akakhumin ahi. Chujou chun asopite chun ama akihou limpi taovin ahi." 
Genesis45:16 Chuin Joseph sopite ahunguve, ti thuthang chu Pharaoh'in ajah phatnin, Pharaoh le asohte chu akipah lheh-un ahi." 
Genesis45:17 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Nasopite henga hitin seijin, Nanghon hitin bolun: nanghon nasangan houchu chang pohsah unlang, cheovin, Canaan gama kileuvin;" 
Genesis45:18 Chule napau le na-insung miho hinpui junlang, kahenga hunguvin; keiman nangho Egypt gam phapen chu kapeh uva, chule nanghon chuche gamphapen ga chu naneh dingu ahi." 
Genesis45:19 Tun nangma thu kapeh nahin, hichehi bolun: nachasenhou dingle, na-inneipite diuvin, Egypt gama konin kangtalai ho kilah-un, chule napau hinpuijun lang, hunguvin." 
Genesis45:20 Chujongleh nathilkeo hou gelkhoh hih-un; ajehchu Egypt gam pumpi-a aphapen chu nangho-a ahi, tin aseijin ahi." 
Genesis45:21 Chuin Israel chaten chutichun aboltauvin; chule Pharaoh kamsoh dungjuijin, Joseph'in amaho chu kangtalai ho apen, lampi-a aneh dingu an jong apen ahi." 
Genesis45:22 Aman aboncha diuvin kikhelna ding ponsil apesoh keijin; ahin aman Benjamin vang chu dangka jathum le kikhelna ponsil to nga apen ahi. 
Genesis45:23 Chuin aman apa henga hiche hohi athotnin ahi; Egypt gam thilphaho sangan som poh dimset le,lamjotna-a apan aneh ding chang, changlhah chule nehding sanganpi poh som dimset athotnin ahi." 
Genesis45:24 Chutichun aman asopite chu asoltan, chule amaho akipatdoh taove. Chuin aman ahenguva, Lampia nakiboipa louna dingun kichih theijun, ati." 
Genesis45:25 Chuin amaho Egypt gama konin achetouvun, Canaan gama apau Jacob heng ahung lhung taove," 
Genesis45:26 Chuin amahon ahenga, Joseph chu ahing nalaijin, chule Egypt gam pumpi-a gamvaipon apange, atiuve. Chuin Jacob lungphut akhongaijin ahi; ajehchu amaho chu atahsan lou ahi." 
Genesis45:27 Chuin amahon Joseph'in ahenguva aseithu jouse chu aseipeh taovin ahi. Chuin ama akitolna dinga Joseph'in ahinthot kangtalai ho chu amuphatnin, apau Jacob lungthim ahung haldoh kittan ahi." 
Genesis45:28 Chuin Israel'in, Aphaset tai; kachapa Joseph adam nalaije. Kathi-kah in cheng ting amachu gamunge, ati." 
Genesis46:1 Chuin Israel anei chengsetoh akipatnin, Beersheba ahung lhungin, chuin apa Isaac Pathen henga chun kilhaina gantha ho atoh-in ahi." 
Genesis46:2 Chuin jana mu aneina-a Pathen'in Israel chu ahin houvin, ajah-a, Jacob, Jacob, atin ahi. Chuin aman, hikoma kaume, ati." 
Genesis46:3 Chuin aman keimahi Pathen, napa Pathen chu kahi; Egypt gama chesuhding kicha hih-in: ajehchu chukoma chu keiman nangma nam lentah-a kasemding nahi." 
Genesis46:4 Keiman nangma Egypt gamah kilhonsuh pingting, chule nangma kahin lepuikit teiding nahi; chule Joseph'in akhut tah-a namit ahin sinsah ding ahi." 
Genesis46:5 Chuin Jacob Beersheba'a konin akipatdoh tai. Chuin Israel chapate chun apau Jacob chu achasen hou, chule a-inneipi teochu Pharaoh'in ama kitol nadinga ahinsol kangtalai ho-a chun atousah taovin ahi." 
Genesis46:6 Chuin Jacob le achilhahte chun Canaan gama alamdoh-u aganchahou leh athilkeu hou chu akipoh-un, Egypt gam ahung lhung taovin ahi." 
Genesis46:7 Achapate le atupate, Achanute le atunute, chule achilhahte chengse akipuijin, Egypt gam alutpitan ahi." 
Genesis46:8 Chule hicheng hi Egypt gama lut, Israel chate, Jacob le achapate minho chu ahiuve; Reuben, Jacob chapa lenpen ahi." 
Genesis46:9 Chule Reuben chapate chu; Hanoch, Phallu, Hezron, chule Carmi ahiuve." 
Genesis46:10 Chule Simeon chapate chu; Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Johar, chule Canaan numei khat chapa Shaul ahiuve." 
Genesis46:11 Chule Levi chapate chu; Gershom, Kohath chule Merari ahiuve." 
Genesis46:12 Chule Judah chapate chu; Er, Onan, Shelah, Pharez chule Zerah ahiuvin; ahivangin Er le Onan chu Canaan gama athilhontan ahi. Chule Pharez chapate chu Hezron le Hamul ahilhone." 
Genesis46:13 Chule Issachar chapate chu; Tolla, Phuvah, Job, chule Shimron ahiuve." 
Genesis46:13 Chule Issachar chapate chu; Tolla, Phuvah, Job, chule Shimron ahiuve." 
Genesis46:14 Chule Zebulun chapate chu; Serad, Elon, chule Jahleel ahiuve." 
Genesis46:15 Hichenghi Leah chapate, achanu Dinah toh Padan-Aram gama Jacob ahinpehho chu ahiuve. Achapate le achanute agomin somthum le thum ahiuve." 
Genesis46:16 Chule Gad chapate chu; Ziphion chule Haggi, Shuni, Ezphon, Eri, Arodi, chule Areli ahiuve." 
Genesis46:17 Chule Asher chapate chu; Jimnah, Ishuah, Ishui, Beriah, chule asopinu Sarah toh ahiuve. Chule Beriah chapateni chu Heber, Malchiel ahilhone." 
Genesis46:18 Hichenghi Laban'in achanu Leah dinga apeh Zilpah chapate ahiuvin, hicheng ho hi amanun Jacob ahinpeh ahi; agoma mi somlegup ahiuve." 
Genesis46:19 Jacob inneipi Rachel chapate chu; Joseph le Benjamin ahilhone. 
Genesis46:20 Chuin Joseph chun Egypt gama achapa Manasseh le Ephraim ahingin, hichu On kho-a thempu, Potiphera chanu Asenath'in ahinpeh ahi." 
Genesis46:21 Chule Benjamin chapate chu; Belah, Becher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim chule Ard ahiuve." 
Genesis46:22 Hicheng hi Rachel'in Jacob dinga ahinpeh chapateho chu ahiuvin, abonchauvin mi somleli ahiuve." 
Genesis46:23 Chule Dan chapa chu; Hushim ahi. 
Genesis46:24 Chule Naphtali chapate chu; Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer, chule Shillem ahiuve." 
Genesis46:25 Hichengho hi Laban'in achanu Rachel dinga apeh Bilhah chapate chu ahiuvin, amanun hicheng hohi Jacob ahinpeh ahi; abonchauvin mi sagi ahiuve." 
Genesis46:26 Jacob achapate inneipi teho tilouvin, Egypt gama Jacob toh lhonlut, ataiguija kondoh ho chu abonchauva mi somgup le gup ahiuve." 
Genesis46:27 Chule Egypt gama penga Joseph chapa chu mini ahilhonin, Egypt gama pemlut insung mite jouse chu somsagi hiuve." 
Genesis46:28 Chuin Jacob'in Goshen gam lampi chu gahetoh dingin, Judah chu Joseph henga asolmasan; chuin amaho Goshen gam ahung lhung taovin ahi." 
Genesis46:29 Chuin Joseph'in akangtalai akigotnin, Goshen gama apa Israel kimutopi dingin achetoutan, chuin ama le ama ahenga akiphongin ahi; chuin amachu angong koijin, angongkoi pumin sot thimtah akaptan ahi." 
Genesis46:30 Chuin Israel'in Joseph henga, Tunvang dama nana umma, namai kamukit tahjeh-in, thi jong leng khoh kasatapoi, ati." 
Genesis46:31 Chuin Joseph'in asopite le apa insung mite ho henga, Keima chetou vingting, Pharaoh kimuping ting, chule ahenga, Canaan gama cheng kasopite le kapa insungmite ho kaheng ahung lhung taove;" 
Genesis46:32 Chule amaho natoh chu ganchavah ahin, chule kelngoi ching mi ahiuve; chule amahon akelngoihon uleh agancha honnu, chule anei jouseu ahinposoh keijun ahi, tin gasei ing kate." 
Genesis46:33 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Pharaoh'in nangho nakou uva, ipi natong mi nahiuvem? tia ahin dohteng leh," 
Genesis46:34 Goshen gama nachen theina dinguva, nanghon, Nasohte hi kachapan nuva pat tuni geijahi keiho le kapateho ganchavah mi kahiuve, nati dingu, ahi. Ajehchu kelngoiching tapou chu Egypt mite dinga thet umtah ahi, tin aseije." 
Genesis47:1 Chujouvin Joseph chu ahungin Pharaoh henga, Kapa le kasopite ho akelngoi hon nutoh, agancha hon nutoh, chule anei chengseutoh Canaan gama konin ahunguvin; chule, vetan, amaho Goshen gama aumuve, ati." 
Genesis47:2 Chuin aman asopite lah-a konin mi nga apuijin, Pharaoh henga, aphongdoh-in ahi." 
Genesis47:3 Chuin Pharaoh'in asopite henga chun, Nangho ipi natong mi nahiuvem? ati. Chuin amahon Pharaoh henga, Nasohte hi, keiho le kapu kapateu jong kelngoi ching mi kahiuve, atiuve." 
Genesis47:4 Hicheng chungchon chun amahon Pharaoh henga, Hiche gama pemdinga hunga kahiuve; ajehchu Canaan gam kel akhoh behset jeh-in, nasohte kelngoihon nehding hampa aumtapoi: hijeh chun tun nasohte hi Goshen Gama neichen sah-un, tia nahenga kataovu ahi, atiuve." 
Genesis47:5 Chuin Pharaoh'in Joseph henga, Napa le nasopite nahenga ahunguvin;" 
Genesis47:6 Chule Egypt gam hi namasanga aume; napa le nasopite hi gampha pentah-a chensah in; Goshen gama chun chenguhen. Chule alah uva mi natong theitah nahet le, kagancha ho chunga thuneidin koijin, ati." 
Genesis47:7 Chuin Joseph'in apa Jacob ahin puilutnin, Pharaoh anga adinsah-in ahi. Chuin Jacob'in Pharaoh chu phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
Genesis47:8 Chuin Pharaoh'in Jacob henga, Kum ijat nahitah em? ati." 
Genesis47:9 Chuin Jacob'in Pharaoh henga, Kahinkho kakholjinna nikho hohi kum jakhat le kum somthum ahitai. Kadamsung kumhi lhomcha le hahsatah ahin, kapu kapate hinkho kholjin laisung kum ho jong aphajoupoi, atin ahi." 
Genesis47:10 Chuin Jacob'in Pharaoh phatthei aboh-in, Pharaoh angsunga konin achedohtan ahi." 
Genesis47:11 Chuin Joseph'in apa le asopite chu achensah-in, Pharaoh thupeh dungjuijin Egypt gamsunga, Rameses gam sunga mun phapen chu alodiuvin apetan ahi." 
Genesis47:12 Chuin Joseph'in apa le asopite, chule apa insung mite jouse chu a-inko pumpiuvin changlhah in avahtan ahi." 
Genesis47:13 Chuin gamsung pumpi-a chun nehding him him aumtapoi; ajehchu kelhah chu akhoh behseh jengtan, Egypt gam le Canaan gam pumpi-a chu keljeh chun alhasam lheh tan ahi." 
Genesis47:14 Chuin Joseph'in achang chohnao man chun Egypt gam le Canaan gama um sum jouse chu akhomsoh heltan ahi. Chuin Joseph'in sum chu Pharaoh in'a achoi luttan ahi. 
Genesis47:15 Chuin Egypt gam le Canaan gama sum jouse chu akiman chaisoh phatnin, Egypt mite jouse chu Joseph henga ahungun, ajah-a, Nehding neipeuvin, ajehchu namitmu-a hi ipidinga kathi jeng dingu ham? ajehchu ka sum jouseu abeisoh heltai, atiuve." 
Genesis47:16 Chuin Joseph'in, nasum'u abeitah-a ahile na gancha hou neipeuvin, chule keiman nangho na gancha hou khelin nehding napenao vinge, ati." 
Genesis47:17 Chuin amahon agancha hou Joseph henga ahinpuijun: Joseph'in amaho chu sakol ho, kelngoiho, bongho chule sangan ho khel chun nehding apen ahi. Chuche kum chun agancha hou jouse man chun nehding apen avahtan ahi." 
Genesis47:18 Chuin chuche kum chu akichai phatnin, ama henga chun akum nina-in ahungun, ajah-a, Ka sum hou iti kaman chaiju ahi ka-pakaiya konin impou vinge; chule kagancha hou jouse jong ka-pakaiya ahitai. Katahsao leh kagam'u tilouvin, ka pakai mitmun imacha khen aumtapoi." 
Genesis47:19 Ipidinga namitmu-a keiho le kagam uhi kamantha jeng dingu ham? Nangman nehman dingin keiho le kagam'u hi neicho taovin, chule keiho le kagam uhi Pharaoh soh-in pang taovinge. Keiho thilouva kahin theina dingu le gamhi agohkeova aumlouna dingin muchi neipeuvin, ahungtiuve." 
Genesis47:20 Chuin Joseph'in Egypt gam pumpi chu Pharaoh dingin achotan ahi; ajehchu achunguva kel khohbeh seh tahjeh chun, Egypt mite jousen aloucheh-u ajohdoh taovin ahi. Chutichun gam chu Pharaoh'a ahisoh tan ahi." 
Genesis47:21 Chule miho vangchu, aman amaho chu Egypt gam ningkhat lama konin ning langkhat na um khopi ho-a chun akichon lutsah tan ahi." 
Genesis47:22 Aman thempuho gam chubou achopon ahi; ajehchu thempuho chun Pharaoh'a konin chantum aneijun, chule Pharaoh'in apeh-u chan chu aneh-u ahi. Hijeh chun amahon agamu chu akijoh pouvin ahi." 
Genesis47:23 Chujouvin Joseph'in miho henga chun, Veuvin, tunia hi keiman nangho le nagamu hi Pharaoh dinga kachohdoh ahitai. Veovin, hikomahin nangho ding muchi aumin, chule nanghon hichu leija natu dingu ahi." 
Genesis47:24 Chule chang atphat teng hitiding ahi, hopnga-a hopkhat chu Pharaoh napeh uva, hopnga-a hopli chu nangho nachan diu, hichu louva muchiding, nangho le na-insung miteu nehding le, nachasen hou dinga nehding hiding ahi, ati." 
Genesis47:25 Chuin amahon, Nangman kahinkhou nahuhhing ahitai; ka pakai mitmun lungsetna neimusah-un, chule keiho Pharaoh soh hitaovinge, atiuvin ahi." 
Genesis47:26 Chuin Joseph'in, Pharaoh'in hopnga-a hopkhat achandinga dan asem chu Egypt gama dingin tunichan geihin chona danin aumtan ahi. Thempuho gam bouchu Pharaoh'a ahipon ahi." 
Genesis47:27 Chuin Israel chu Egypt gamsung, Goshen gama chun achengtan; chule hia chun amahon gou akholdoh-un, chi tamtah akhaijun, nasatah-in apung taovin ahi." 
Genesis47:28 Chuin Jacob Egypt gama chun kum som le kum sagi ahingin ahi. Chuti chun Jacob damsung hinkho chu kum jakhat le kum somli le kum sagi ahi. 
Genesis47:29 Chuin Israel thina ding phat ahung naitan ahi. Chuin aman achapa Joseph chu akouvin, ajah-a, Tuahi namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, nahenga katao ahi, nakhut chu kapheipi noija hinkoijin lang, lungset le thutah-in kachunga natongin; katao ahi, Egypt gama hin neihin vuihih-in." 
Genesis47:30 Ahin kapu kapate toh neilupkhom sah-in; Egypt gama kona hin neipuidoh inlang, akivuinao mun'a chun neivuijin, ati. Chuin aman, Nasei banga kabol ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis47:31 Chuin aman, Kahenga kihahsel in, ati. Chuin ama ahenga akihahseltai. Chuin Israel ajalkhun lulhunna chun akunin ahi." 
Genesis48:1 Chuin hicheng jouse nunghin ahitin ahi, Joseph henga, Vetan, napa anai atipeh-un ahi. Chuin aman achapa teni Manasseh le Ephraim akipuijin achetan ahi." 
Genesis48:2 Chuin Jacob henga, Vetan, nachapa Joseph nahenga ahunge, atipeh-un ahi. Chuin Israel ama le ama akiha bolin, jalkhun chunga chun atouvin ahi." 
Genesis48:3 Chuin Jacob'in Joseph henga, Imajouse bolthei Pathen hat chungnung chu Canaan gama Luz mun'a chun kahenga ahung kilah in, phatthei eiboh-in," 
Genesis48:4 Chule kahenga, Vetan, keiman nangma chi tamtah khaisah ingting, kapunsah ding, chule keiman nangma vaipi tamtah kahisah ding; chule hiche gamhi nanunga nachilhahte dinga tonsotna agou dinguva kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis48:5 Chule tun Egypt gama nahenga kahung masanga Egypt gama nanei, nachapa teni Ephraim le Manasseh hi keija ahilhone. Reuben le Simeon keija ahibanga, amani hi keija hiding ahi." 
Genesis48:6 Amani nunga cha le nao nanei vang chu nangma mi hitantin, amaho chu asopite gou le minlah-a kisimtha nante." 
Genesis48:7 Chule keima vang, Padan-Aram'a kona kahung chun Rachel chu Canaan gama Ephrath phah nading gamla thim avat nalaijin, lamdunga ka-angsunga athitan ahi. Chuin keiman Ephrath lamdunga chun kavuitan ahi; Hichu Bethlehem chu ahi." 
Genesis48:8 Chuin Israel chun Joseph chapateni chu aven, Amani hi koi hilhon ham? ati." 
Genesis48:9 Chuin Joseph'in apa henga, Amani hi hiche mun'a Pathen'in eipeh kachapa teni ahilhone, ati. Chuin aman nahenga katao ahi, kahenga hinpuijin, chule keiman amani vangboh ingkate, ati." 
Genesis48:10 Tun Israel chu atehjeh-in amit athimtan, kho amuthei tapon ahi. Chuin Joseph'in amani chu ahenga ahinpui naijin; chuin aman amani chu achopmin, apomtan ahi." 
Genesis48:11 Chuin Israel'in Joseph henga, Namel muding kana gelphah lou ahitan; ahin vetan, Pathen'in nachilhah kisan eimusahtai, ati." 
Genesis48:12 Chuin Joseph'in amani chu apa pheichunga konin apuidoh'in, amatah chu tolla aboh khupmin ahi." 
Genesis48:13 Chuin Joseph'in anilhon chun akaijin, Ephraim chu akhut jetlamin Israel khut veilam, chule Manasseh chu akhut veilamin Israel khut jetlama ahin kaijin, ahenga ahinpui naijin ahi." 
Genesis48:14 Chuin Israel'in akhut jetlam ahin lhang doh-in, aneojopa Ephraim lu chunga chun angamin ahi, chule akhut veilama chu Manasseh lu chunga angamin, akhut chu henasan ajam pelin ahi; ajehchu Manasseh chu apeng masa ahi." 
Genesis48:15 Chuin aman Joseph chu phatthei aboh-in, kapute kapa, Abraham le Isaac namasanga anavale nalhon Pathen, kahinkho lhumkeija, tuni nikho geija eihin ching jinga Pathen," 
Genesis48:16 Thil gilou tinchenga kona eina huhdoh jing vantil chun, chapang teni hi phatthei hinboh hen; chule amani chunga hin keima min, kapu kapa Abraham le kapa Isaac min hinpu lhonhen; chujong le amani hi leiset vaipi jalah-a mipi atama tamin hung punglhon hen ati." 
Genesis48:17 Chuin Joseph'in apan akhut jetlam Ephraim luchunga angap chu amuphatnin, alung phamotan ahi. Chuin aman apa khut chu Ephraim lu-a kona Manasseh lu-a chon dingin atuh-in ahi." 
Genesis48:18 Chuin Joseph'in apa henga, Chutiponte, kapa; ajehchu hiche pahi apeng masa ahin, nakhut jetlam chu alu chunga koijin, ati." 
Genesis48:19 Chuin apa chu anom pon, Keiman kahenai, chapa, keiman kahenai; amajong namkhat hunghi ding, chule amajong lending ahinai. Amavang tahbeh-a anaopa johhi ama sanga hunglen joding, achilhahte chu nam tamtah hung hiding ahiuve, ati." 
Genesis48:20 Chuin aman chuche nichun amani chu phatthei aboh-in, Nangni min pana Israel'in Phatthei abohding, Pathen'in nangma Ephraim le Manasseh bangin nasem hen, ati dingu ahi, atin; aman Ephraim chu Manasseh masanga akoitan ahi." 
Genesis48:21 Chuin Israel'in Joseph henga, vetan, keima kathiding ahitai. Hijongle Pathen'in nangma naumpi jing ding, chule aman nangma napu napate gamsunga nahin lepui kitding ahi." 
Genesis48:22 Chuche chung chon chun Amor mite-a kona kachemjam le kathalpi-a kona kaladoh chu, keiman nangma nasopite chan sangin tamin chan khat kapehben ahi ati." 
Genesis49:1 Chuin Jacob'in achapate chu akouvin, ahenguva, Ninunung nile nachung uva ipi hung chuding ham tichu kaseipeh theina dingun, hung kikhom khomun, ati." 
Genesis49:2 Nangho Jacob chapate, hung kikhom khomun lang ngaijun; napau Israel thusei hi ngai phaovin." 
Genesis49:3 Reuben nangma kachapa lenpen nahin, kathilbol theina, chule kathahat kipatna, kichoisang na chungnung pen le thahatna chungnung pen chu nahi." 
Genesis49:4 Twisih banga dingdetlou nahin, nangma achung nungpen nahilou ding ahi, ajehchu nangma napa jalkhuna nakaldoh-in, nasuboh-in ahi: ama kalupna-a akaldoh-in ahi." 
Genesis49:5 Simeon le Levi ucha ahilhonin; hunam galvon ho chu amani chena-a aumin ahi. 
Genesis49:6 Vo kalhagao, nangma amani thuguh-a chun hunglut hih-in; vo kaloupina, amani kiloikhomna-a chun lha hih-in. Ijeh inem itile alunghan nalam lhonin mi athat lhonin, chule a-engset nalam lhonin bongchal ho asatbai lhonin ahi." 
Genesis49:7 Alunghana lhon chu kichat umtah ahijeh le, alungsatna lhon chu phaloutah ahijehchun gaosap hihen. Keiman amani Jacob sunga homkhen ningting, Israel lah-a kathecheh ding ahi." 
Genesis49:8 Judah nangma nasopiten avahchoi dingu chu nahi; nakhut chu namelmate ngonga umding; napa chate chu na angsunga kundiu ahi. 
Genesis49:9 Judah hi keipi bahkai nou ahi; kachapa nasamat na-a konin nakaltou tan ahi. Ama abohmat depmin, keipi bahkai bangle keipi bahkai teh bangin akolin ahi; koiham asuthou dinga?" 
Genesis49:10 Lal tenggol chu Judah'a konin kichon mang pontin, chule danpe- jong akeng kah-a konin kichon mang ponte, Shiloh ahung masangsen; chule ama henga namtin kikhop khomna umding ahi." 
Genesis49:11 Asangan lengpi guija ahenin, asangan nou chu lengpigui phatah-a ahenin, aman avonho chu lengpitwija asopmin, chule apon chu lengpitwi thisanin asopmin ahi." 
Genesis49:12 Amit chu lengpitwi sangin asan jon, chule aha chu bongnoi sangin abang jon ahi." 
Genesis49:13 Zebulun chu twikhanglen kama chengding; chule amachu kongho dinga ngahmun hung hiding; chule agamgi chu Sidon toh kijopmat ding ahi. 
Genesis49:14 Issachar hi sangan hattah, pohgih tah ni kah-a boh ahi." 
Genesis49:15 Chule aman acholngah namun chu aphan, chule gamchu anome, ti amun; hijeh chun aman thilgih pudingin alengkou anemsah-in, hunama natohna mun'a soh ahung hitan ahi." 
Genesis49:16 Dan hin Israel phung ho lah-a khat banga amite chu vai ahom ding ahi. 
Genesis49:17 Dan hi lampi pama gul, lampi laija gulse, achunga toupa akinung lelhahna khopma sakol nungkeng chua hiding ahi." 
Genesis49:18 Vo Pakai, nami huhhingna chu kangah jinge." 
Genesis49:19 Gad hi gal mihon ajoding ahin; ahivangin akhon nale aman ale joding ahi. 
Genesis49:20 Asher'a kona aneh phading ahin, chule aman lengho anneh tuitah tahho aso sah ding ahi." 
Genesis49:21 Naphtali hi sajuhpi kilhaso ahin; aman thupha tah ho aseijin ahi. 
Genesis49:22 Joseph hi aga phatah thingbah chu ahin, twikhuh panga aga phatah thingbah ngei chu ahi; abahho chun bang ajamkhup mun ahi." 
Genesis49:23 Thalpi kap ho chun ama nasatah-in asugentheijun, akap uvin, chule ahotbolun ahi." 
Genesis49:24 Ahivangin athalpi chu long louvin athahat jingin, chule akhut banthaho chu imajouse bolthei Jacob Pathen'in ahatsah-in, (Chua kon chun Kelngoi ching, Israel songpi chu hung uma ahi:)" 
Genesis49:25 Nakithopi dinga napa Pathen, chule phatthei naboh ding imajouse bolthei hat chungnung chun, chung van'a kona phattheina ho-a, noilanga thutah-a um phattheina ho, chule ang le naobu phattheina ho-a nahatsah ahi." 
Genesis49:26 Napa phattheina ho hin kapu kapate phatthei naho chu tonsot lhangho khodong geijin akhupjon ahi. Hiho chu Joseph luchunga umding, chule asopite-a kona kikhendohpa lujanga chu umding ahi." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamin ngei banga nehpap ahin: jingkah le asamat chu aneh-a, chule nilhah le athilchom chu ahopkhen ding ahi, ati." 
Genesis49:28 Hicheng jouse hi Israel phung som le phung ni chu ahiuve. Chule hiche hi apauvin amaho phatthei aboh-a, ahenguva aseichu ahin; amatoh kitoh phatthei bohna-a khatcheh-a phatthei aboh ahi." 
Genesis49:29 Chuin aman amaho chu athulhah-in ahenguva, Kamite toh puikhoma umding kahitai. Hit mi Ephron louva songkoa chun kapu kapate lah-a neivuijun;" 
Genesis49:30 Hiche songko chu Canaan gama Mamre koma Machpelah louva um ahin, alou muntoh goma Abraham'in Hit mi Ephron'a kona kivuina mun'a neidinga ana choh ahi." 
Genesis49:31 Chukoma chun amahon Abraham le a-inneipi Sarah chu anavuijun, Isaac le a-inneipi Rebekah jong avuijun; chule chua chun keiman Leah kana vuijin ahi." 
Genesis49:32 Aloumun le asunga um songko chu Heth chate ho-a kona ana kichoa ahi, ati." 
Genesis49:33 Chuin Jacob'in achapate chu athupeh jouvin, akeng jalkhuna asep doh in, alhagao alhan, chule amite toh gopkhomin aumtan ahi." 
Genesis50:1 Chuin Joseph'in apa mai le amai asuton, akapmin, achopmin ahi." 
Genesis50:2 Chuin Joseph'in apa long chu monthei louva asemna diuvin asohte louthem ho chu thu apen ahi. Chuin louthem ho chun Israel chu Amon theilou dingin asemtaovin ahi. 
Genesis50:3 Chuin ama chunga chun nisomli alutnun ahi; ajehchu amon louna dinga kisem miho ding chun ni chujatchu lutji-a ahi. Chuin Egypt mite chun amachu ni somsagi a-opmuvin ahi. 
Genesis50:4 Chuin ama a-opnau nikho ho chu akichai phatnin, Joseph Pharaoh insung mite henga chun, Tu-a hi namit muva lungsetna kachana ahile, lungset tah-in Pharaoh henga hitin neisei peh-un;" 
Genesis50:5 Kapan eikihahsel sah-in, kahenga, Vetan, keima athiding kon kahitan; Canaan gama keiman keimatah dinga kasemsa lhana chu neivuiding ahi, ati. Hijeh chun tun nahenga katao ahi, kapa vuidingin neiche tousah-in, chujouleh hungkit tange, ati, tin neisei peh-un, ati." 
Genesis50:6 Chuin Pharaoh'in, Aman nangma nakihahsel sah bang chun chetouvin lang, napa chu gavuitan, ati." 
Genesis50:7 Chuin Joseph apa vuidingin achetoutan; chule Pharaoh sohte jouse, a-insunga upaho, chule Egypt gamsunga upaho jouse ama toh alhonun," 
Genesis50:8 Chule Joseph insung mite jouse, asopiteho, chule apa insung miho chu amatoh achetou khomun ahi. Achasen hou, akelngoihon hou, chule abonghon ho bou Goshen gama adalhauvin ahi." 
Genesis50:9 Chuin amachu sakol kangtalai ho leh sakol chunga tou mihon akilhon piuvin, chule amaho chu tamtah ahiuve." 
Genesis50:10 Chuin amaho Jordan luigala Atad chang chilna pholmun alhung taovin, chule amaho chua chun lhasetah-in akapmun ahi. Chuin aman nisagi sungin apa puldouna abolin ahi." 
Genesis50:11 Chuin chuche gama cheng Canaan miho chun Atad chang chilna phola thi-opna chu amuphatnun, Hiche hi Egypt mite dinga lunghemna nasatah ahi, atiuvin; hiche jehchun chuche munchu Abel-mizraim asahtaove; hichu Jordan luigala um ahi." 
Genesis50:12 Chuin achapate chun ama thulhah bangtah-in abolpeh taovin ahi. 
Genesis50:13 Ajehchu achapaten ama chu Canaan gama apolutnun, Abraham'in kivuina dinga Hit mi Ephron koma aloumun toh achohtha, Mamre koma Machpela louva songkoa chun avuitaovin ahi." 
Genesis50:14 Chuin Joseph'in apa avuijou chun asopite toh, apa vuidinga akilhonpi chengse toh, Egypt gama akilekit taovin ahi." 
Genesis50:15 Chuin Joseph asopite chun apau thichu amuphatnun, Joseph hin ijemtin eivetdao vintin, thil gilouho achunga inabolu chu lethuhding hin ngaito theijinte, akitiuvin ahi." 
Genesis50:16 Chuin amahon Joseph henga thupokhat asolun, hitin aseijuve, Napan athi masangin hiche thulhah hi anadalhan ahi;" 
Genesis50:17 Hitia hi Joseph henga nasei dingu ahi, Nahenga katao ahi, nasopite suhkhelna le achonsetnao ngaidamin; ajehchu amahon nachunga thilgilou anaboltaove, tin aseije. Chule tun nahenga kataovu ahi, Napa Pathen sohteho suhkhelna chu ngaidamtan, atiuvin ahi. Chuin amahon ahenga hichu aseiphatnun Joseph akaptan ahi." 
Genesis50:18 Chuin asopite jong chu ahungun, a-angsunga abohkhup jengun; ajah-a, Vetan, keiho hi nasohte kahiuve, atiuve." 
Genesis50:19 Chuin Joseph'in ahenguva, Kicha hih-un: ajehchu keima Pathen khela kitung kahi mongem?" 
Genesis50:20 Ahin nangho vangin kachunga hi thilgilou bol nagotnu anahin; ahinla hichu Pathen'in tunikho-a bang ngeija hi mitamtah hinkho huhdoh-a aumna dinga apha dinga anagot ahijoi. 
Genesis50:21 Hijeh chun tun, kicha hih-un; keiman nangho le nachasenhou vahnang kate, ati. Chuin aman amaho chu alhamonin, damheochan ahouvin ahi." 
Genesis50:22 Chuin Joseph chu ama le apa inkote toh Egypt gama chun achengun ahi. Chule Joseph chu kum jakhat le kum som ahingin ahi. 
Genesis50:23 Chule Joseph chun Ephraim chate akhang thum lhinna tuson thum chan amu manin ahi. Chule Manasseh chapa Machir chateho jong Joseph pheichunga aseilenun ahi. 
Genesis50:24 Chule Joseph'in asopite henga, Kathiding ahitai; ahin Pathen'in nahungvil tei dingu ahin, hiche gama kona hi napui doh uva, Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga ana kihahselna gama chu napui tei dingu ahi." 
Genesis50:25 Chuin Joseph'in Israel chate chu akihahsel sah-in, Pathen'in thonlouva nahung vil dingu ahin, chutengle kagu hohi hia konahi napoh tou dingu ahi, ati." 
Genesis50:26 Hitichun Joseph chu kum jakhat le kum som alhinin athitan ahi. Chuin amahon along chu amonthei louna din asemun, Egypt gamsunga thikong sunga akoitaove." 
Exodus1:1 Tun hichehi Egypt gama hunglutna Israel chateho min chu ahi; amitakip le a-insung miteu Jacob toh ahungun ahi. 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Simeon, Levi, chule Judah," 
Exodus1:3 Issachar, Zebulun, chule Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan le Naphtali, Gad le Asher," 
Exodus1:5 Chule Jacob taiguija kona pengdoh mihing chu aboncha mi somsagi ahiuve. Joseph vang chu Egypt gama ana umsa ahitai. 
Exodus1:6 Chuin Joseph le asopite chule chuche khanga miho jouse chu athigam taovin ahi. 
Exodus1:7 Chujouvin Israel chate chu achipha lheh jengun, apungtul tullun, atamlheh jeng taovin, chule hattah ahitaovin; gamsung chu alosoh taovin ahi." 
Exodus1:8 Tun Egypt gama chun Joseph hephalou lengthah khat ahung lengchang tan ahi. 
Exodus1:9 Chuin aman amite jah-a, Veuvin, Israel chate mipi hi eiho sangin atamjouvin, chule ahatjouvin ahi." 
Exodus1:10 Hungun, eihon amaho hi chingthei tah-in bolu hite: achuti louleh amaho pungcheh cheh-untin, hung hitiding ahi, gal kisatna khattou ahung umteng, amaho imelmateu lama hung pangun tin, eiho eisat untin, hitichun gamsunga konin potdoh getnunte, ati." 
Exodus1:11 Hijeh chun amahon apohgih houva amaho gimbol dingin achunguva tohvai homho apansah taove. Chule amahon Pharaoh dingin gou kholna khopiho Pithom le Rameses asauvin ahi. 
Exodus1:12 Ahivangin amahon amaho chu abolgim chanun apung cheh-un, akhangcheh cheh-un ahi. Chuin amahon Israel chate jehchun alunggim taovin ahi." 
Exodus1:13 Chule Egypt miten Israel chate chu gimtah-in ana-u atohsah-un ahi. 
Exodus1:14 Amahon natoh hahsatah ho bon nganin, cheh-in, chule loujaova natoh jat tintangin ahinkhou chu asugenthei lheh jengun: ana-u atohsahna jouseuva genthei tah-in atohsah-un ahi." 
Exodus1:15 Chule Egypt lengpan Hebrew mi naososah teni, khatnu min Shiphrah le khatnu min Pu-ah chu akihoupin;" 
Exodus1:16 Ajah lhona, Nangnin Hebrew numei ho nao nasosah lhonteng, naososahna touna chunga chun amaho chu velhonin; iti hama hichu pasal ahile natha lhonding ahi: ahin numei ahivangle hinghoi lhonin, ati." 
Exodus1:17 Ahivangin naososah teni chun Pathen aging lhonin, Egypt Lengpa thupeh bangchun abol lhonpon, ahin naosen pasal ho chu ahinghoiji lhonin ahi." 
Exodus1:18 Chuphatnin Egypt lengpan naososah teni chu akouvin, ajah lhona, Ipi dinga hicheho hi nabol lhona, naosen pasal ho chu nahing hoi lhon ham? ati." 
Exodus1:19 Chuin nao sosah teni chun Pharaoh jah-a, Hebrew numei hohi Egypt numei ho tobang ahilou jeh-u ahi; ajehchu amaho adamtheijun, nao sosah ho ahengu alhun masangle anasoh lhaji taovin ahi, atilhone." 
Exodus1:20 Chutichun Pathen'in nao sosah teni chung chun aphalam tah-in na atongin ahi: chuin miho chu apung tul tul jengun, nasatah-in ahatdoh taovin ahi." 
Exodus1:21 Chuin ahitin ahi, nao sosah teni chun Pathen aginjeh lhonin, a-insungmi lhonding apen ahi." 
Exodus1:22 Chuin Pharaoh'in amite chu athupeh-in, Pasal chapang pengtapou chu vadunga seplutnun, numei chapang tapou chu hing hoijun, atitai." 
Exodus2:1 Chuin Levi phunga peng pasal khat achen Levi chanu khat ji dingin akipuitan ahi. 
Exodus2:2 Chuin amanu chun nao avopmin, chapa khat ahingtai. Amanun ama chu naosen hoitah ahichu amu phatnin, lhathum aselin ahi." 
Exodus2:3 Amanun ama chu aselbe joulou phatnin, pumpenga kisa sinkhup khat alan, thingnai man le vahaibonin aloibitnin, asunga chun naosen chu akhumin; vadung kama peng lah-a chun agakoitai." 
Exodus2:4 Chule achunga ipi ahung sohdem ti ve dingin asopinu chu gamlatah-a adingin ahi. 
Exodus2:5 Chuin Pharaoh chanu chu kisil dingin vadunga chun ahung suh-in; chule asoh numei ho chu lui panga chun avah leovin ahi: chuin amanun peng lah-a sinkhup chu amuphatnin, hichu galadin asohnu chu asolin ahi." 
Exodus2:6 Chuin amanun hichu ahon phatnin naosen chu amutai: chule, veuvin, naosen chu ahung kapmin ahi. Chuin amanun amapa chu alung asen, Hichehi Hebrew chate lah-a khat ahi, ati." 
Exodus2:7 Chujouvin a-unu chun Pharaoh chanu jah-a chun, Keima kache-a hiche naosen hi nadonpeh dinga Hebrew naodon numei kaga koupeh ding ham? ati." 
Exodus2:8 Chuin Pharaoh chanun amanu jah-a, Chen, ati. Chuin nungahnu chu achen, naosen nuchu agakoupeh tan ahi." 
Exodus2:9 Chuin Pharaoh chanu chun amanu henga, Hiche naocha hi kipuijin lang keima dingin neihin vah peh-in, chule keiman natohman kapeh ding nahi ati. Chuin numei chun chapang chu akipuijin, avahtan ahi." 
Exodus2:10 Chuin chapang chu ahung khandoh phatnin, naodonnu chun Pharaoh chanu henga ahinpuijin, ama amanu chapa ahitan; chule amanun amin Mosi asah tai: Ajehchu keiman twilah-a kona kalahdoh ahi, ati." 
Exodus2:11 Chuin hiche laichun ahitin ahi, Mosi akikhanlhit phatnin, asopite henga agachen, apohgih-u chu agaven ahile, Egypt mikhatnin asopi Hebrew mi khat aden chu amulhi tan ahi." 
Exodus2:12 Chuin aman akimvel dung avelen, koimacha amulou phatnin Egypt mipa chu athatnin, neldi lah-a aselin ahi." 
Exodus2:13 Chule ani ni channia apotdohkit phatnin, veuvin, Hebrew mi ni akidel lhonin: aman athemo jopa henga, Ipidinga nasopi naden ham? ati." 
Exodus2:14 Chuin amapan, Keiho chunga pipui le thutan dinga kon natunham? Egypt mipa natha banga chu keijong thading neigot ham? ati. Chuin Mosi akichatan, Tahbeh-a hiche thilhi kihedoh-a ahitai, ati." 
Exodus2:15 Tun Pharaoh'in hichehi ajah phatnin, Mosi chu thadingin aholtan ahi. Ahin Mosi Pharaoh maikoh-a konin ajam mangin, Midian gama achengin: chule ama twikul panga atouvin ahi." 
Exodus2:16 Tun Midian thempupa chun chanu sagi aneijin ahi. Chuin maho chu twi thalin ahungun, apa kelngoihon chip dingin kongho chu athal dimun ahi." 
Exodus2:17 Chuin kelngoi chingho chu ahungun amaho chu anodoh-un ahi: ahivangin Mosi adingdoh-in amaho chu akithopin, akelngoi honu chu twi achipsah-in ahi." 
Exodus2:18 Chuin amaho apau Reuel henga ahung phatnun, aman ahenguva, Iti dana tunia nahiti hungvah uham? ati." 
Exodus2:19 Chuin amahon, Egypt mikhatnin kelngoi chingho khutna konin eihuhdoh-un, chule keiho dingin lhingsetnin twi jong eithal peh-un, kelngoihon jong twi achipsah-in ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus2:20 Chuin aman achanute jah-a, Ama chu hoija umtam? ipidinga mipa chu nahin dalhah-u ham? an nedingin gakouvun, ati." 
Exodus2:21 Chuin Mosi chuche pa toh chending chu anomtan: chule aman achanu Zipporah chu Mosi apetan ahi. 
Exodus2:22 Chuin amanun chapa khat ahinpeh-in, amin Gershom asahtai: ajehchu aman, Keima mi gama khopema kahi, ati." 
Exodus2:23 Chuin phat chomkhat jouvin ahitin ahi, Egypt lengpa chu athitan ahi. Chuin Israel chate chu asohchan jeh-un akhoisauvin, akapmun, chule asohchan jeh uva akanao chu Pathen kom alhungtan ahi." 
Exodus2:24 Chuin Pathen'in akhoisat nao chu ajahpeh tan, Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob toh akitepna chu ageldoh tan ahi." 
Exodus2:25 Chuin Pathen'in Israel chate chu ahinven, amaho chu akhohsah tan ahi." 
Exodus3:1 Tun Mosi'n Midian thempu anupa pa Jethro kelngoihon achingin ahi. Chuin kelngoihon chu neldi gam nunglam panga chun apuijin, Pathen molsang Horeb ahunglhung tan ahi." 
Exodus3:2 Chuin Pakai Vantil chu hamboh lah-a konin meikongin ahung kilah-in ahi. Chuin aman aven ahile, veuvin, hamboh chu meikongin akouvin, ahinla hamboh chu akavampon ahi." 
Exodus3:3 Chuin Mosi'n, Tun keima kiheijing ting, i-atile hamboh khu kalouham, hiche melchihna nasatah hi gavenge, atin ahi." 
Exodus3:4 Chuin avedinga akihei chu Pakaiyin amu phatnin, hamboh lah-a konchun Pathen'in ahin kouvin, Mosi, Mosi, ati. Chuin aman, Hikoma kaume, ati." 
Exodus3:5 Chuin aman, Hilam hin nai hih-in: nakenga konin nakeng chot sutlhan, ajehchu nadinna chu muntheng ahi, ati." 
Exodus3:6 Chukalvallin aman, Keima napu napate Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, Jacob Pathen kahi, ati. Chuin Mosi'n amai aseltai: ajehchu aman Pathen avet ngamlou ahi." 
Exodus3:7 Chuin Pakaiyin, Keiman Egypt gama kamite kisuh genthei kichen tah-in kamutan, chule tohvai homho jala akanao kajatai; ajehchu keiman agenthei nao kahetai." 
Exodus3:8 Chule Egypt miho khutna kona huhdoh dingle amaho chuche gama kona chu puidoh-a, gamphatah le gamlentah khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam, Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite, chule Jebus mite gama puitou dinga hung kumlha kahi." 
Exodus3:9 Hijeh chun tun, ven, Israel chate kana chu kakom ahung lhung tai: chule Egypt miten amaho abolgenthei nao jong kamudoh tai." 
Exodus3:10 Hijeh chun tun hungin, kami Israel chate Egypt gama kona napuidoh theina dingin Pharaoh henga nasol ing kate, ati." 
Exodus3:11 Chuin Mosi'n Pathen henga, Keima koi kahia, Pharaoh henga kache-a, Egypt gama kona Israel chate chu kagapui doh ding ham? ati." 
Exodus3:12 Chuin aman, Tahbeh-a keiman nangma kaumpi ding nahi; chule hichehi keiman kasol nahi amelchihna hiding ahi: nangman miho chu Egypt ma kona nahin puidoh teng, hiche molsanga hi Pathen najen dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus3:13 Chuin Mosi'n Pathen henga, Vetan, keima Israel chate heng kagalhuna, amaho jah-a, Napu napateu Pathen'in naheng uva eihinsol ahi, kati tengle; amahon, Amin ipiham? tia ahinsei tei dingu ahin, ahenguva ipi kasei ding ham? ati." 
Exodus3:14 Chuin Pathen'in Mosi henga, KEIMA CHU KEIMA KAHI: chule Israel chate jah-a chu KEIMA kitipan nangho henga eihinsol ahi tia nasei ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus3:15 Chukal valin Pathen'in Mosi jah-a, Israel chate henga chun, Napu napateu Pakai Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen'in naheng uva eihinsol ahi: hichehi tonsotna kamin, chule nakhang khanguva neihet jingna dingu ahi tin seipeh-in." 
Exodus3:16 Chen, Israel upaho chu gakhom khomin lang, ahenguva, Napu napateu Pakai Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen chu kahenga ahung kilah-in, kajah-a, Keiman nangho tahbeh-in kahung vilun, chule Egypt gama nachung uva kibol chu kamutan:" 
Exodus3:17 Chuin keiman, Nangho Egypt suhgentheina-a kona kapuidoh uva, Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite, chule Jebus mite gam, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gama chu kapuilut dingu nahiuve, tin kaseije, gatin." 
Exodus3:18 Chutengle amahon nathusei angai dingu ahi. Chutengle nangma le Israel upa ho Egypt lengpa koma nahung diu, ajah-a, Hebrew mite Pakai Pathen'in keiho eikimu piuvin ahi: tun Pakai ka Pathen'u henga ganlhaina kaganei nadingun, gamthipma nithum lampi neiche sah-un tia nahenga kataovu ahi, tia nasei dingu ahi." 
Exodus3:19 Ahin Egypt lengpa chun khut thahat tah tilouva nasoldoh louheldiu ahi ti kichen tah-in kahei. 
Exodus3:20 Chule keiman kakhut kahin lhandoh ding, alah uva kabolding thil kidanga chu Egypt kajepding: chujouteng aman nangho nasoldoh dingu ahi." 
Exodus3:21 Chule keiman Egypt mite mitmu-a hiche mitehi khotona kapeh ding, chule hung hiti ding ahi, nangho nache tengule agoh-a nache lou dingu ahi." 
Exodus3:22 Ahin numei takipmin a-inheng le a-in'a pemho henga dangka le sana-a kijepna ho, ponsil nihchen ho apa-a alah dingu: hicheho chu nachapa teo le nachanu teo najepnadiu; hitia chu nanghon Egypt mite chu nachom dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus4:1 Chuin Mosi'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Hijongle ven, amahon eitahsan lou dingu, kathujong angailou dingu ahi: ajehchu amahon, Nahenga Pakai akilahpoi ati dingu ahi, ati."
