Exodus4:2 Chuin Pakaiyin ahenga, Nakhutna umchu ipiham? ati. Chuin aman, Tenggol ahi, ati." 
Exodus4:3 Chuin aman, Tolla seplhan ati. Chuin aman hichu tolla aseplhan ahile gul asohtan; chuin Mosi chuche masanga konchun ajamtan ahi." 
Exodus4:4 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Nakhut lhangin lang hichu ameijin manin; (Chuin aman akhut alhangin, amanin ahile, akhutna tenggol asoh kit tai:)" 
Exodus4:5 Amahon apu apateu Pakai Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen chu nahenga ahung kilahnai ti atahsan theina dingun, ati." 
Exodus4:6 Chuin Pakaiyin ahenga asei kitnin, Tun nakhut chu na-opma koijin, atin ahi. Chuin aman akhut a-opma akoitan ahi: chuin hichu alahdoh phatnin, veuvin, akhutchu aphah-in buhbang bangin abangtan ahi." 
Exodus4:7 Hichun aman, Nakhut chu na-opma koikitnin, ati. Aman akhut chu a-opma akoikitnin ahile, a-opma akhut chu atidang bang bang ahi kit tai." 
Exodus4:8 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, amahon nangma natahsan lou uva, chule melchihna masajong chu angai louvule, amahon melchihna nunung joh chu atahsan dingu ahi." 
Exodus4:9 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Amahon hiche melchihna ni teni jonghi atahsan lou uva, chule na thusei jong angai lou uva ahileh, nangman vadung twi nalah-a, tolgo chunga nasunlhah ding ahi. Chule nangman vadunga kona nalahdoh twi chu tolgo chunga chu thisan hungsoh ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus4:10 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga, Vo ka Pakai, keima tumasangin jong, chule nangman nasoh henga thu nahinseija patnin jong mi kamnal kahipoi: ahin keima thusei ngongkai le lei kipehlou kahi, ati." 
Exodus4:11 Chuin Pakaiyin ama henga, Mihem kam sema koiham? Ahiloule paomo le na-ngong, chule kho muthei le mitcho sema chu koiham? Pakai keima kahi hilouham?" 
Exodus4:12 Hijeh chun tun chen, keiman nakam kaumpi jinga, nasei ding kahil ding ahi ati." 
Exodus4:13 Chuin aman, Vo ka Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, nangman nasolnom dang khat solmaijin ati." 
Exodus4:14 Chuin Pakai lunghanna chu Mosi chunga akoujahtan, ahenga, Levi mi nasopipa Aaron uma hilouham? aman thu phatah-in aseitheije ti kahei. Chujongle ven, ama nangma kimupi din ahungdoh-e: aman nangma namuteng alungsung kipahding ahi." 
Exodus4:15 Chule nangman ama henga thu nasei ding, akamsunga thuho nakoipeh ding ahi: chule keiman nangma kam le ama kam kaumpi ding, chule nabol lhonding kahil ding ahi." 
Exodus4:16 Chule amachu nangma dinga mipi ho henga thuseija pangding: ama chu nangma dinga nakam khela panga, chule nangma ama dinga Pathen khela napan ding ahi." 
Exodus4:17 Chule nangman hiche tenggol hi nakhutna nakichoi ding, hichea hi melchihna ho nabolding ahi, ati." 
Exodus4:18 Chuin Mosi anupa pa Jethro henga ahung kilen, ajah-a, Nahenga katao ahi, Egypt gama kasopite henga kinungle kit dingin neisolin, hingnalai naovem gavenge, ati. Chuin Jethro'n Mosi jah-a, Lung mongin chetan, ati." 
Exodus4:19 Chuin Pakaiyin Midian gama Mosi henga, Chen, Egypt gama kilekit tan, ajehchu nangma thadinga nahol ho jouse chu athigam taove, ati." 
Exodus4:20 Chuin Mosi'n a-inneipi le achapate chu apuijin, sangan chunga atousah-in, Egypt gama akiletan ahi. Chule Mosi'n Pathen tenggol chu akhutna akichoijin ahi." 
Exodus4:21 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Ven, Egypt gama nakile teng nakhutna kakoi thil kidang ho jouse chu Pharaoh angsunga nabol ding ahi: hijongle aman miho chu asoldoh louna dinga Pharaoh lung chu katahsah ding ahi." 
Exodus4:22 Chule nangman Pharaoh jah-a, Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, Israel chu kachapa, apeng masapen ahi." 
Exodus4:23 Chule keiman najah-a kasei ahi, Aman keima eijen theina dingin kachapa chu soldoh tan: chule nangman ama soldoh ding nanop louva ahile, ven, keiman nachapa katha ding, apeng masapentah chu kathading ahi, tia nasei ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus4:24 Chule lampia jinlhun in'a chun ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin ama chu akimupin, thadin aholtan ahi." 
Exodus4:25 Hichun Zipporah'in meituh songhem khat alan, achapa chep atanpeh-in, hichu akengbula aseplhan, Tahbeh-in nangma hi keima dinga thisanso inneipu nahi, ati." 
Exodus4:26 Hitichun amachu alhadoh tan ahi. Chuin amanun, Cheptan jeh-a chu nangma keima dinga thisanso inneipu nahi ahi, ati." 
Exodus4:27 Chuin Pakaiyin Aaron henga, Gamthipma Mosi kimupi din chen, ati. Chuin ama achen, Pathen molsanga chun ama akimupin, achopmin ahi." 
Exodus4:28 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron henga chun asolpa Pakai thusei jouse le athupeh melchihna jouse chu aseipehtan ahi. 
Exodus4:29 Chuin Mosi le Aaron achelhonin, Israel upaho jouse akhom khom lhontai." 
Exodus4:30 Chuin Aaron'in Pakaiyin Mosi henga asei thu jouse chu aseijin, miho mitmun melchihna ho chu aboltan ahi:" 
Exodus4:31 Chuin mipi chun atahsan taove. Chuin Pakaiyin Israel chate avila, athohgimnao ahinvet pehchu ajah phatnun, amaho akunun Pathen ahou taovin ahi." 
Exodus5:1 Chuche jouchun Mosi le Aaron alut lhonin, Pharaoh henga, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, gamthipma keima dinga Kut aboltheina diuvin kamite solin ati, tin asei lhonin ahi." 
Exodus5:2 Ahinla Pharaoh'in, Pakai chu koi hija, keiman athu kangaija Israelte kasoldoh ding ham? Keiman Pakai chu kahepon, Israelte jong kasoldoh louding ahi, ati." 
Exodus5:3 Hichun amanin, Hebrew mite Pathen'in eikimupi lhon ahi. Nahenga kataolhon ahi, Pakai ka Pathen'u henga ganlhaina gabol dingin nithum lampia neisolun: achutiloule aman ichunguva gamna hise ahiloule chemjam achuhsah ding ahi, atilhone." 
Exodus5:4 Chuin Egypt lengpan amani henga, Nangni Mosi le Aaron'in ipidinga mipi hohi anatoh-u nangahsah lhonham? napohgih hou gakipoh thim thimun, ati." 
Exodus5:5 Chuin Pharaoh'in, Veuvin, hiche gam mihohi tun tamtah ahiuvin, nangnin amaho chu apohgih houva konin nakicholdo sah lhontan ahi, ati." 
Exodus5:6 Chuin chuche nile le chun Pharaoh'in tohvai poho le alamkai ho athupeh-in, ajah uva," 
Exodus5:7 Nanghon masanga banga chu miho chu cheh aden nadingu changpol napehkit lou dingu ahitai: amaho cheohen lang amaho ding cheh pol gakihol khomu hen. 
Exodus5:8 Chule tumasanga acheh denjiu jatjat chu nadensah jing dingu: hichea kona chu nalhomsah loudiu ahi: ajehchu amaho thaseuva ahi; hijeh-a, Ka-Pathen'u henga ganlhaina gabol dingin neisolun tia pengu ahi." 
Exodus5:9 Hahsa tah-a atoh diuvin chuche miho chunga chun natoh hahsacheh koibe peh-un; amahon thumanlou ngaisah daohen, ati." 
Exodus5:10 Chuin mipi tohvai poho le toh lamkai chu achedoh-un, mipi ho henga chun, Pharaoh'in hitihin aseije, Keiman nangho changpol kapehlou dingu ahitai." 
Exodus5:11 Nangho cheovin lang namu nathei theijuva pol gakiholun; hijongle nanatoh-u chu kilhomsah deh louding ahi, agatiuve." 
Exodus5:12 Chutichun mipi chu changpol khela manding changkung gakhom khom dingin Egypt gam pumpi-a akithecheh taovin ahi. 
Exodus5:13 Chuin tohlamkai ho chun amaho chu anouvin, nanitin natoh houchu changpol aumlai bang chun tong bukimun, atiuve." 
Exodus5:14 Chuin Pharaoh toh lamkaiho chun mipi ho chunga apansah Israel chate lamkaiho chu avouvin, Ipi dinga nacheh dennu natoh chu masanga banga janhi le tunia nabol bulhit lou uham? tin aphohsal taovin ahi." 
Exodus5:15 Hichun Israel chate lamkaiho chu ahungun Pharaoh henga agakapmun, Ibola nangman nasohte hi neihiti bolu hitam?" 
Exodus5:16 Nasohte hi changpol la eikipe pouvin, chule amahon kahenguva, Cheh denguvin eitiuvin ahi. Chule ven, nasohte hi eivouvin, ahivangin athemmo chu namite ahiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Exodus5:17 Ahivangin aman, Nangho thase nahiuve, nangho thase nahiuve: hijeh-a chu nanghon, Cheohitin Pakai henga ganlhaina gabolu hite natiu ahi." 
Exodus5:18 Hijeh chun tun cheovin lang na gatongun: ajehchu nangho changpol kipelou ding nahiuve, hijongle nacheh dendiu jat chu nabulhit dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus5:19 Nanghon niseh-a nanatoh naova na cheh dendiujat chu nalhomsah loudiu ahi tia akiseipeh phatnu chun, Israel chate lamkaihon achunguva thilphalou chua ahitai ti amudoh taovin ahi." 
Exodus5:20 Chuin amaho Pharaoh koma kona ahungpot doh-u toh kilhonin, lampia anading Mosi le Aaron chu akimutopi taovin ahi." 
Exodus5:21 Chuin amahon amani henga, Pakaiyin nave lhonhen lang nachung thu lhon tanhen; ajehchu nangnin keiho thana dinga akhutnuva chemjam koina dingin Pharaoh mitmu le asohte mitmun thet umtah in neisem taovin ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus5:22 Chuin Mosi Pakai henga akinungle kitnin, Pakai, ipi dinga hiche mite chungahi phalou tah-a na natoh ham? Ipi dinga neisol ham?" 
Exodus5:23 Ajehchu Pharaoh henga namina thusei dinga kahunga pat hin, aman hiche mite chunga thilse abol jingin; chule nangman jong namite nahuhdoh hihhelin ahi, ati." 
Exodus6:1 Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Keiman Pharaoh chunga ipi kabol ding tu-a hi nangman namu ding ahi. Ajehchu khut thahat hin amaho chu asol ding, chule khut thahat hin amaho chu agamsunga kona adeldoh tho sah ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus6:2 Chuin Pathen'in Mosi henga thu aseijin, ajah-a hitin aseije, keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Exodus6:3 Chule keima Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob hengah Pathen hat chungnung minin kana kilah-in; ahinla amahon kamin JEHOVAH hin eina hepouvin ahi." 
Exodus6:4 Chule gamdangmi ahinao akholjina gamu Canaan gam chu amaho pehdingin keiman amahotoh kakitepna kaphut doh-in ahi. 
Exodus6:5 Chule Egypt miten sohchanga ahennaova Israel chate akhoisatnao jong chu kajan; chule kakitepna chu kageldoh tan ahi. 
Exodus6:6 Hijeh chun Israel chate henga hitin seijin, Keima Pakai kahin, chule Egypt mite pohgih ho noija kona kapui diu, apohgih houva kona kalhadoh uva, chule keiman ban jahdoh le thutanna nasatah puma kahuhdoh ding nahiuve." 
Exodus6:7 Chule nangho kamite hidinga kalah uva, chule keima na-Pathen'u kahi ding: chule Egypt mite pohgih ho-a kona napuidoh uva Pakai na-Pathen'u kahichu nahetdingu ahi." 
Exodus6:8 Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob henga pehdinga kana kihahselna gamachu kapuilut ding nahiuvin; chule hichu nagoulo diuva kapeh ding nahiuve: keima Pakai chu kahi, tin, ati." 
Exodus6:9 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate hengah thu aseijin; ahivangin alhagaovu ahesoh jehle asoh channu akhoh behseh jehchun Mosi thusei chu angaipeh pouvin ahi. 
Exodus6:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati." 
Exodus6:11 Chenlang Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chun agama kona Israel chate asoldoh nadingin gaseijin, ati." 
Exodus6:12 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga, Vetan, Israel chaten bon kathu angailou uva ahile; Pharaoh'in keima kam chepkitanlou thuhi iti angaiding ham? ati." 
Exodus6:13 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga thu aseijin, Egypt gama kona Israel chate puidoh nadingin, Israel chate le Egypt lengpa Pharaoh'a henga seiding thu apen ahi." 
Exodus6:14 Hichenghi apu apateo insung aluchangho chu ahiuve; Israel'a kona apeng masapen Reuben chapate chu Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron le Carmi ahiuve. Hichenghi Reuben insung mite ahiuve." 
Exodus6:15 Chule Simeon chapate chu Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin le Zoher, chule Canaan numeinu chapa Shaul ahiuve. Hichenghi Simeon insung mite ahiuve." 
Exodus6:16 Chule hicheng hi amaho khanggui dungjuija Levi chapate min chu ahi; Gershon, Kohath, chule Merari ahiuve. Chule Levi damsung kumkho chu kum jakhat le somthum le sagi ahi." 
Exodus6:17 Gershon chapate chu, a-insungu dungjuijin Libni le Shimei ahilhone." 
Exodus6:18 Chule Kohath chapate chu, Amran, Izhar, Hebron, chule Uzziel ahiuve. Chule Kohath damsung kumkho chu kum jakhat le somthum le thum ahi." 
Exodus6:19 Chule Merari chapate chu, Mahli le Mushi ahilhone. Hichenghi akhangguiju dungjuija Levi insung mite ahiuve." 
Exodus6:20 Chuin Amram'in apa sopinu chanu Jochebed chu aji dingin akipuijin; amanun Aaron le Mosi ahinpeh-in ahi. Chule Amram damsung kumho chu kum jakhat le somthum le sagi ahi. 
Exodus6:21 Chule Izhar chapate chu, Korah, Napheg, chule Zichri ahiuve." 
Exodus6:22 Chule Uzziel chapate chu Mishael, Elzaphan, chule Zithri ahiuve." 
Exodus6:23 Chuin Aaron'in Amminadab chanu Nahshon sopinu Elisheba chu aji dingin akipuijin; chule amanun Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, chule Ithamar ahinpeh-in ahi." 
Exodus6:24 Chule Korah chapate chu, Assir, Elkanah, chule Abiasaph ahiuve. Hichenghi Korah insung mite ahiuve." 
Exodus6:25 Chuin Aaron chapa Eleazar chun Putiel chanute lah-a khat aji dingin akipuijin; chule amanun Phinehas ahinpeh-in ahi. Hichenghi a-insungu dungjui cheh-a Levi ho pate bulpiho ahiuve. 
Exodus6:26 Hiche teni hi Pakaiyin, Egypt gama konin Israel chate chu galsat miho dungjuijin puidoh lhonin tia asei na Aaron le Mosi chu ahillhone." 
Exodus6:27 Hiche teni hi ahi Egypt gama kona Israel chate puidohna dinga Egypt lengpa Pharaoh henga thusei teni chu: Hiche teni hi chuche Mosi le Aaron chu ahilhone. 
Exodus6:28 Chuin Egypt gama Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseini chun ahitin ahi," 
Exodus6:29 Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, Keima Pakai chu kahi: keiman nahenga kasei jouse chu Egypt lengpa Pharaoh henga seijin, ati." 
Exodus6:30 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai angsunga chun, Vetan, keima kam cheptanlou kahin, chule Pharaoh'in iti kasei angaiding ham, ati." 
Exodus7:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Ven, keiman nangma Pharaoh henga dingin pathen'in kasemtai; chule nasopipa chu nangma themgao hiding ahi." 
Exodus7:2 Nangman kathupeh jouse chu aboncha naseidoh ding; chule nasopipa Aaron'in agamma kona Israel chate chu asoldohna dinga Pharaoh henga aseiding ahi 
Exodus7:3 Chule keiman Pharaoh lungchang kasuhtah ding, Egypt gamsunga chu kamelchih naho le kathil kidangho kapunsah ding ahi." 
Exodus7:4 Hijongleh Egypt gamsunga kakhut kalhah nading le, kagalsat miho le kami Israel chate chu thutanna nasatah-a Egypt gamsunga kona kapuidoh nadinga Pharaoh'in nasei angaideh louding ahi." 
Exodus7:5 Chule keiman Egypt chunga kakhut kajah-a, amaho lah-a kona Israel chate kapuidoh teng, keima Pakai kahi chu Egypt miten ahet dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus7:6 Chutichun Mosi le Aaron'in Pakaiyin athupeh bang bangin abol lhonin, chuti chun abol lhon tai." 
Exodus7:7 Chule amanin Pharaoh henga thu aseilhon chun Mosi kum somget alhingtan, chule Aaron chu kum somget le kum thum alhingtan ahi." 
Exodus7:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus7:9 Pharaoh'in najah lhona, Nangnin thilkidang vetsah lhonin atiteng; nangman Aaron hengah, Natenggol chu lanlang Pharaoh angsunga seplhan, natiding ahi. Chuteng hichu gul hungsoh ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus7:10 Chuin Mosi le Aaron Pharaoh henga alutlhonin, Pakai thupeh bangchun abol lhontan ahi. Chuin Aaron'in atenggol chu Pharaoh masang le asohte masanga aseplhan ahile, hichu gul asohtan ahi." 
Exodus7:11 Chuphatnin Pharaoh'in jong miching ho le doi themho akoukhom tai. Tun Egypt mitpheldoi themho, amaho jong chun adoijuva konin chutobang bang chun aboltheijun ahi." 
Exodus7:12 Ajehchu amaho amitakipmin atenggol cheh-u chu aseplhaovin ahile hicheho chu gul asohtan ahi: ahivangin Aaron tenggol chun atenggol hou chu avallhum gamtan ahi. 
Exodus7:13 Chuin Pharaoh lungsung chu Pakaiyin aseibang chun amani thusei angailouna dingin, Aman atahsah tan ahi." 
Exodus7:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Pharaoh lungsung akisuh tah jeh-a aman miho chu achesah nomlou ahi." 
Exodus7:15 Nangma jingkah le Pharaoh henga gachen: ven, ama twikhuh lama chun achei; chule nangma amato kimuto dinga vadung panga chu nanading ding; chule gul naso sahna tenggol chu nakhutna nakichoi ding ahi." 
Exodus7:16 Chutengle nangman ama henga, Hebrew mite Pakai Pathen'in nangma henga, Amahon keima gamthipma eijen theina diuvin kamite chesah-in, tia seidinga eihinsol ahi: ahinla ven, tugeihin hichu nangman nangaipoi." 
Exodus7:17 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Hichea konahi Pakai kahi chu neihet ding ahi. Ven, kakhut na tenggola hi vadunga twi chu kajepding ahin, chule hichu thisan sohding ahi." 
Exodus7:18 Chule vadunga um nga hochu thiding, vadung chu uiding ahin; chule Egypt miten vadunga twi chu donding akidah diu ahi, ati." 
Exodus7:19 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Aaron jah-a, Natenggol chu lanlang Egypt twiho chunga, aluidung hou chunga, vadung ho chunga, atuikul hou chunga, chule atuikul hou jouse chunga aboncha thisan asotheina ding le Egypt gam pumpi-a thing kongho le song kongho-a jong thisan aumna dingin nakhut jahdoh-in tin seijin, ati." 
Exodus7:20 Chuin Pakai thupeh bang chun Mosi le Aaron'in abol lhontan ahi; chuin aman atenggol chu alamin, Pharaoh mitmu le asohte mitmun vadunga um twi chu ajeptan ahi; chuin vadunga um twi jouse chu thisan asohtai." 
Exodus7:21 Chuin vadunga um nga ho chu athin; vadung chu a-uitan, Egypt miten vadung twi chu adonthei tapouvin; chule Egypt gamsung pumpi-a chun thisan aumtan ahi." 
Exodus7:22 Chuin Egypt mitpheldoi themho chun adoi uva konin chutobangma chun abolun ahi. Chule Pharaoh lung chu tahsah-in aumin, Pakaiyin aseibang chun aman amani thusei angai dehpon ahi." 
Exodus7:23 Chuin Pharaoh chu akiheijin a-insunga aluttan, hiche thuhi alungsunga angaito pon ahi." 
Exodus7:24 Chuin Egypt miten donding twi holna-in vadung vel chu alaitauvin ahi; ajehchu amahon vadung twi chu adonthei louvu ahitai. 
Exodus7:25 Chule Pakaiyin vadung chu avoh-a pat nisagi alhingtan ahi. 
Exodus8:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Pharaoh henga gachen lang, ajah-a hitin gaseijin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Eijen theina diuvin kamite soldoh tan." 
Exodus8:2 Chule nangman amaho chu nasol nomlouva ahile, ven, keiman nagamsung pumpi uphoh-a kajep ding ahi." 
Exodus8:3 Chule vadung chun uphoh atama tam ahinsepdoh ding, hicheho chu na-in sung, na-indan sung, najalkhun chung, nasohte insung, namite chung, nathuh khuh sung, chule nachang bong mehnao kong houva hunglut ding ahiuve." 
Exodus8:4 Chule uphoh ho chu nangma chungle namite chung, chule nasohte jouse chunga hung kaltou diu ahi, tin seijin ati." 
Exodus8:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Aaron henga seijin, Vachadung ho chule vadung hole twikul ho chunga natenggol pumin nakhut chu jahdoh inlang uphoh hochu Egypt gam chunga hungdoh sah-in, tin, ati." 
Exodus8:6 Hiti chun Aaron'in Egypt twi chunga chun akhut ajahdoh-in ahile uphoh ho chu ahungdoh-un, Egypt gam chu alodim taovin ahi." 
Exodus8:7 Chuin mitphel doithem ho jong chun adoiju chu mangchan chutobangma chun abolun, Egypt gam chunga chun uphoh hochu ahungdoh sah-un ahi." 
Exodus8:8 Hichun Pharaoh'in Mosi le Aaron akouvin, ajah lhona, Keima le kamite-a kona uphoh hohi alahmang nadingin Pakai henga ngeh lhonin; chutengle Pakai henga ganlhaina boldinga mipi chu kasol ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus8:9 Chuin Mosi'n Pharaoh jah-a, Lunglhai selin neithu peh-in, itih phatle nangma le na-insunga kona uphoh ho suhmanga auma vadunga bou aumna dinga nangma-a ding, nasohte-a ding, chule namite dinga katao dingham? ati." 
Exodus8:10 Chuin aman, Jingle ati. Chuin aman, Pakai ka Pathen'u bang hi koimacha dang aumpoi ti nahet nadingin: nathusei dungjuijin hitahen." 
Exodus8:11 Chule uphoh hochu nangma-a kon, na-insung ho-a kon, nasohte-a kon, chule namite-a kona chemanguva, vadunga bou umdingu ahitai, ati." 
Exodus8:12 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chu Pharaoh koma konin apotdoh lhontai. Chuin Mosi'n Pharaoh douna-a uphoh ho asosah jehchun Pakai henga ataotan ahi. 
Exodus8:13 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi thu dungjuijin ahinboltan: chuin uphoh ho chu inho, kho ho, chule louho-a konchun athigam taovin ahi." 
Exodus8:14 Chuin amahon hiho chu alhuh lhuh-in asekhom mun: gamsung chu apumpin a-uitan ahi. 
Exodus8:15 Ahivangin Pharaoh'in chomkhat akicholdona amuphatnin, Pakaiyin anasei bangin alung atahsah-in; amani thusei chu angaipeh tapon ahi." 
Exodus8:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Aaron jah-a, Egypt gam pumpi-a leivuichu kha ahung so nadin natenggol lamin lang gamsunga leivui chu jepmin, tin seijin, ati." 
Exodus8:17 Chuin amanin chutichun abol lhontan ahi: ajehchu Aaron'in atenggol chu akhut toh alamin, leisetna leivui chu ajepmin ahile sa le mihem chunga chun kha ahung langtan; chuin Egypt gam pumpi-a chun tolla leivui jouse chu kha ahungsoh tan ahi." 
Exodus8:18 Chule mitphel doithem hochun adoiju chu amang chaovin kha asosah gouvin, ahivangin amahon abolthei tapouvin ahi. Chutichun sa le mihem chunga chun kha alangtan ahi." 
Exodus8:19 Chujouvin mitpheldoi themho chun Pharaoh henga, Hichehi Pathen khutjung ahi atiuvin ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin anaseisa bang chun Pharaoh lungsung chu tahsah-in aumin; aseilhon angaipeh tapon ahi." 
Exodus8:20 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Jingpi matah-in thouvin lang Pharaoh anga gadingin: ven, ama twikhuh lama ahunge; chule nangman ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Amahon eijen theina dingun kamite soldoh-in ati." 
Exodus8:21 Chutilouva, nangman kamite nasoldoh louva ahile, ven, nangma chung, nasohte chung, namite chung, chule na-insung chunga thousivaibong kahin lansah ding; Egypt mite insungho le adinnau leiset chunga chu thousivaibong dimset ding ahi." 
Exodus8:22 Chuche nikho chule kamite chenna Goshen gamchu kakhendoh ding, chukoma chu thousivaibong himhim umlou ding; chuteng keima leiset lailung Pakai kahi nahetdoh ding ahi." 
Exodus8:23 Chule keiman kamite le namite kah-a kikhenna kakoi ding: jingle hiche melchihna chu hung umding ahi, gatin, ati." 
Exodus8:24 Chuin Pakaiyin chutichun aboltan; Pharaoh insung le asohte insunga, chule Egypt gam pumpi-a chun genthei umtah thousivaibong ahung lhungtan: thousivaibong jehchun gam chu suhboh-in aumtan ahi." 
Exodus8:25 Chuin Pharaoh'in Mosi le Aaron chu akouvin, ahenglhona, Nangho cheovin lang hiche gamahin na-Pathen'u henga ganlhaina ganei taovin, ati." 
Exodus8:26 Chuin Mosi'n, Chutobanga bolding chu thildih ahipoi; ajehchu keihon Egypt mite-a dinga thet umtah hochu Pakai ka-Pathen'u henga ganlhaina-a kaneidiu ahi: ven, Egypt mite dinga thet umtah hochu amitmu tah uva ganlhaina-a kaneijuva ahile, amahon songa eiselou dingu ham?" 
Exodus8:27 Aman eithupeh banguva gamthip nithum lama kacheuva, Pakai ka-Pathen'u henga ganlhaina kanei dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus8:28 Chuin Pharaoh'in, Pakai na Pathen'u henga gamthipma ganlhaina nanei theina dingun nasolu vinge; ahin gamlatah-a vang nachelou dingu ahi: keima dingin neitao peh-un, ati." 
Exodus8:29 Chuin Mosi'n, Ven, keima nakoma kona kachedoh-a, Pharaoh le asohte, chule amite-a kona thousivaibong hohi jinga patna achemang nadiuvin Pakai koma kagatao ding ahi: ahin mipi ho chu Pakai henga ganlhaina neidinga chesah louna dingin, Pharaoh'in dohan neibolkit tahih-un, ati." 
Exodus8:30 Chuin Mosi Pharaoh anga konin apotdoh-in, Pakai henga ataotan ahi." 
Exodus8:31 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi thusei bangchun abolin; chule thousivaibong hochu Pharaoh'a kon le asohtea kon, chule amite-a konin aladoh-in; khatcha jong aumdena aumpon ahi." 
Exodus8:32 Chuin Pharaoh'in hiche chunga jong hi alung atahsah-in, miho chu asoldoh dehpon ahi." 
Exodus9:1 Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Pharaoh koma lutnin lang ajah-a, Hebrew mite Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Keima eihou theina diuvin kamite chu soldoh tan." 
Exodus9:2 Nangman amaho soldoh ding nada-a, nahen jing nahlaija ahile," 
Exodus9:3 Ven, loujaova um naganchaho chung, sakol ho, sanganho, sangongsang ho, bongchalho, kelngoiho chungah Pakai khut chuding: gancha pul khohtah langding ahi." 
Exodus9:4 Chule Pakaiyin Israel mite gancha honle Egypt mite gancha hon chu achomkhen ding: chule Israel chate-a poupou chu khatcha jong thilou ding ahi, tin gaseijin, ati." 
Exodus9:5 Chuin Pakaiyin phatbih khat atepmin, Pakaiyin jing nikhole hiche thilhi gamsunga abolding ahi, ati." 
Exodus9:6 Chutichun ajing nikhon Pakaiyin chuche thil chu aboltan, Egypt gamsunga gancha jouse chu athitai: ahinla Israel chate gancha ho chu khatcha jong athipon ahi." 
Exodus9:7 Chuin Pharaoh'in mi asolin, chule veuvin, Israel mite gancha khatcha jong athi aumpon ahi. Chuin Pharaoh lungthim chu akisutah-in; chule miho chu alhadoh dehpon ahi." 
Exodus9:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga, Nangnin thuh sunga konin vut khutdim la lhonin lang, hichu Mosi'n Pharaoh mitmu tah-in van lama thehen." 
Exodus9:9 Hichu Egypt gamsung jouse-a leivuinel soh ding, Egypt gamsung pumpi-a mihem chungle gancha chunga uilut le mase nasatah chaljal ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus9:10 Chuin amanin thuh sunga vut chu ahamlhonin, Pharaoh angsunga ading lhonin; chuin Mosi'n hichu van lama athen ahile, mihemle gancha chunga chun uilut ahungsoh tan, mase khohtah achaljal tan ahi." 
Exodus9:11 Chuin chuche uilut jehchun mitpheldoi themho chu Mosi masanga adingthei tapouvin ahi; ajehchu uilut chu mitphel doithemho le Egypt mite jouse chunga chu-ah ahi. 
Exodus9:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Pharaoh lungthim chu atahsah-in, Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseibang chun athu seilhon chu angai pehpon ahi." 
Exodus9:13 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Jingpitah-in thouvin lang, Pharaoh henga gadingin, chule ahenga, Hebrew mite Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Keima eihou theina diuvin kamite soldoh tan." 
Exodus9:14 Ajehchu leiset chung jouse-a hin keima tobang koimacha aumpoi ti nahet nadinga, tuchunga hi nangma lungsung chung le nasohte chung, chule namite chunga ka hise jouse kahin chuhsah ding ahi." 
Exodus9:15 Ajehchu nangma le namite chu hise-a kajep theina dinguva, tu-a hi keiman kakhut kalhandoh ding: chule nangma leisetna kona paidoh-a naum ding ahi." 
Exodus9:16 Chule kathahat nahi nangma vetsah nading le kamin hi vannoi leiset pumpi-a phondoh-a aumna dinga, hiche jeh tah-a hi nangma katundoh nahi." 
Exodus9:17 Tugeihin nangman amaho nasoldoh louva konhin, kamite douna-in nangle nang naki choisangin ahi." 
Exodus9:18 Ven, jing nikho tuphat tah hile Egypt gam kiphudoh-a pat tuchan geija anaumkha louhel, gel nasatah chu kahin juhsah ding ahi." 
Exodus9:19 Hijeh chun tun mi solinlang, loujaova um nagancha jouse gakhop khom sah-in; ajehchu in'a kipuilut louva loujaova um mihemle gancha chung jouse-a chu gel hunglha ding, amaho chu thiding ahiuve, gatin, ati." 
Exodus9:20 Chuin Pharaoh sohte lah-a Pakai thu gingho chun asohteu le aganchahou chu insunga ajamlut sah loijun ahi. 
Exodus9:21 Chule Pakai thu ngaisah louho chun asohteu le aganchahou chu louva adalha denun ahi. 
Exodus9:22 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Egypt gam jouse mihem chung le gancha chung, chule Egypt gamsung jouse-a louva hampaho jouse chunga gel ahunglhah nadingin, van lama nakhut jahdoh-in, ati." 
Exodus9:23 Chuin Mosi'n atenggol chu van lama ajahdoh tan ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin van ginle gel ahinsoltan; mei chu leichunga avahmat jengin; hitichun Pakaiyin Egypt gam chunga chun gel alhah sahtan ahi. 
Exodus9:24 Chutichun gel, meito kihal gel alhan, akhohset danchu namkhat ahung hiuvapat Egypt gamsunga hitobang hi aumkha khapon ahi." 
Exodus9:25 Chuin Egypt gam jouse-a loujaova thil um jouse, mihem le gancha jong gel chun aseplih gamin; chule gel chun loujaova hampa louhing jouse aseplih-in, gama thing jouse jong asepbong gamtan ahi." 
Exodus9:26 Israel chate umna Goshen gama chun bou gel alhapon ahi. 
Exodus9:27 Chuin Pharaoh'in mi asolin, Mosi le Aaron chu agakou sah-in, aheng lhona chun, Tuchung hin keima kachonse tai; Pakai chu achonpha ahin, keima le kamite vang gilou kahiuve." 
Exodus9:28 Van gin nasatah le gel hi abeina dingin, Pakai henga ngeh lhonin, (ajehchu phasetna ahitai;) keiman nangho kasoldoh uva, nangho na-umsot tahlou dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus9:29 Chuin Mosi'n ahenga, Keima khopi sunga kona kapotdoh dohle Pakai henga kakhut kajahdoh ding: leiset hi Pakaiya ahi nahetdoh nadinga van gin chu thipding, geljong lhahbe louding ahitai, ati." 
Exodus9:30 Ahivangin nangma le nasohte thudol vang, nanghon Pakai Pathen chu nagindeh lou dingu ahi kahei, ati." 
Exodus9:31 Chule tupat phungle sakol chang chu suhmangin aumtan ahi. Ajehchu sakol chang chu avui ahungdoh tan, tupat phung vang chu apahlaitah ahi." 
Exodus9:32 Ahin suhlou chang le butun vang akedoh loulai jeh-in suhmangin aumpon ahi. 
Exodus9:33 Chuin Mosi Pharaoh koma konin khopi chu adalhan, Pakai henga akhut ajahdoh-in ahi; chuin van ginle gel chu atangtan, lei chunga go ajutapon ahi." 
Exodus9:34 Chuin Pharaoh'in go le gel chule van gin ho atan amuphatnin, chonset abolbe nalaijin, amale asohte chun alungthimu atahsah kit taovin ahi." 
Exodus9:35 Chuin Pharaoh lungthim chu suhtah-in aumin, Pakaiyin Mosi henga anasei bang chun, Israel chate chu alhadoh dehpon ahi." 
Exodus10:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Pharaoh koma galutnin: ajehchu hiche kamelchihna hohi amasanga kamusah theina dinga, amale asohte lungsung chu katahsah ahi:" 
Exodus10:2 Chutia chu nangman nachapate le natupate nabenga Egypt gamsunga kathilbol ho leh alah uva kamelchihna bolho naseipeh uva; chule keima Pakai kahi nahetna dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus10:3 Chuin Mosi le Aaron Pharaoh hengah ahunglut lhonin, ajah-a, Hebrew mite Pakai Pathen'in hiti hin ati, Nangma itihchan ka-angsunga kineosah ding nada nahlai ding ham? Keima eihou theina dingun kamite soldoh tan." 
Exodus10:4 Chutilouva, kamite nasoldoh nomlouva ahile, ven, jingle nagam pumpi-a khaokho kahin lhalut ding ahi." 
Exodus10:5 Chule koiman tol amu theilou leuva amahon leiset chung alosoh dingu ahi: chule gel suhset moh, nahenga umnalai jouse chu anehjou hel diu, chule nangma-a dinga keh loujaova thingphung jouse jong chu aneh jouhel dingu ahi." 
Exodus10:6 Chule amahon na-insung le nasohte jouse insung, chule Egypt mite jouse insung chu alodim sohdiu; hichu napateu le naputeuvin jong leiset chunga achenuva pat tuni geija amukhah lou dingu ahi, ati. Chuin ama akiheijin, Pharaoh henga konin apotdoh tai." 
Exodus10:7 Chuin Pharaoh sohte chun ahenga, Hiche mipahi itih chan eiho dinga thanga pang dingham? Pakai a-Pathen'u chu ajen theina diuvin miho chu soldoh tan: Egypt gamhi suhmangin aumtai ti nahet loulai ham? atiuve." 
Exodus10:8 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chu Pharaoh henga ahinpui kitnun ahi. Chuin aman aheng lhonna, Cheovin, Pakai na-Pathen'u chu gajen taovin: ahin koi koi cheding nahiuvem? ati." 
Exodus10:9 Chuin Mosi'n, Keiho kakhangdong hou le katehse hou toh, kachapateu le kachanuteu toh, kabong honhou le kakelngoi honhou toh kache dingu ahi; ajehchu keihon Pakai henga Kut kabol dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus10:10 Chuin aman ajah lhona, Keiman nachasen houtoh kasoldoh uva ahile, Pakaiyin na-umpiu hen: chingtheijun, ajehchu namasanguva thilphalou aume." 
Exodus10:11 Chutiponte: tun nangho pasal chengchu cheovin lang Pakai chu gajen taovin: ajehchu hichu nangaichatnu ahi, ati. Chuin Pharaoh angsunga konin amani chu anodoh taovin ahi." 
Exodus10:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Khaokhote Egypt gamsung chunga ahungchuh uva, hiche gama gel seset moh hampa louhing jouse anehthei nadiuvin, khaokhote-a dingin Egypt gamsung chunga hin nakhut jahdoh-in ati." 
Exodus10:13 Chuin Mosi'n Egypt gam chunga atenggol chu ajahdoh-in ahile, Pakaiyin sun nilhum jankhovah-in gamchunga chun solam hui anunsah tan, chuin jingkah ahung hi phatnin solam hui chun khaokho hochu ahin polut tan ahi." 
Exodus10:14 Chuin khaokho ho chu Egypt gam jouse chunga ahung taovin, Egypt gam pumpi jouse-a chun acholnga taovin ahi. Hiho chu akhohse lheh jengun; amaho masanga hin amaho tobang khaokho ana umkhapon, amaho nunga jong chutobang umkit louding ahi." 
Exodus10:15 Ajehchu hicheho chun leiset pumpi chu atomchah jeng taovin, chutichun gamsung chu athim jengtan; chule gelin asuhset moh gama hamhing tincheng le thingna jouse chu anegam hel taovin ahi. Chutichun Egypt gamsung jouse-a chun thingphung ho-a thing hing le loujaoa hampa louhing a-eng him him khatcha jong aumtapon ahi." 
Exodus10:16 Chuin Pharaoh'in Mosi le Aaron chu gangtah-in akouvin, ajahlhona, Keima Pakai na Pathen lhonle nangni douna-in kachonse tai." 
Exodus10:17 Hijeh chun tun, katao ahi, Kachonset hi khatveiseh neingaidam kit lhonin, hiche thina hi keija kona alahmang theina din Pakai na Pathen henga neitaopeh lhonin, ati." 
Exodus10:18 Chuin ama Pharaoh koma konin apotdoh in, Pakai henga atao tai." 
Exodus10:19 Chuin Pakaiyin lhumlam hui hattah anunsah-in ahile, hichun khaokho ho chu alhoh mangin, twipi sana alhoh lutsoh keijin; Egypt gam pumpi-a chun khaokho khatcha jong aumtapon ahi." 
Exodus10:20 Ahivangin Pakaiyin Pharaoh lung chu atahsah-in, chuti chun aman Israel chate chu asoldoh dehpon ahi." 
Exodus10:21 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Egypt gam chunga tohkhah thei hel khopma muthim ahung umtheina dingin van lama nakhut jahdoh-in, ati." 
Exodus10:22 Chuin Mosi'n van lama akhut ajahdoh tan ahile, nithum Egypt gam pumpi chunga chun nasatah-in mu athimtan ahi." 
Exodus10:23 Amaho khatle khat akimuto thei tapouvin, nithum sung chun koimacha aumna munna kona kipatdoh aumpon ahi. Ahivangin Israel chate jouse chennaho-a chun vah aneicheh-un ahi." 
Exodus10:24 Chuin Pharaoh'in Mosi chu akouvin, ajah-a, Nangho cheovin lang, Pakai chu gajen taovin; nabonghon houle na kelngoihon hou bouchu umhen: nachasen hou jong chu nangho toh lhonuhen, ati." 
Exodus10:25 Chuin Mosi'n, Nangman Pakai ka-Pathen'u henga ganlhaina-a kato dinguva ganlhaina thilto dingle govam thilto ding jong neipeh dingu ahi." 
Exodus10:26 Kagancha hou jong keiho toh lhonding ahi: gancha kengtin khatjong dalhah-a umlou ding ahi: ajehchu Pakai ka-Pathen'u kajen nadinguva phabep kalhendoh dingu ahin; amun kalhun masang seova hoichepena hi Pakai kajen dingu kihet louvu ahi, ati." 
Exodus10:27 Ahivangin Pakaiyin Pharaoh lung chu atahsah tan, amaho chu asoldoh nompon ahi." 
Exodus10:28 Chuin Pharaoh'in ahenga, Kakoma konin chemangtan, kichih theijin, kamai mukit tahih-in; ajehchu kamai namukit ninileh nathi ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus10:29 Chuin Mosi'n, Nangman nasei dih-e, keiman namai kamukit louding ahitai ati." 
Exodus11:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Pharaoh chung le Egypt gam chunga hise khat kalhunsah be nahlai ding ahin; chujouteng leh hikoma kona hi nasoldoh diu ahitai: aman nasoldoh tengule, thonlouva nanodoh tho sohkei jeng dingu ahi." 
Exodus11:2 Tun mipi ho henga seipeh-in, chule pasal jouse le numei jousen aheng akoma konin dangka le sana-a kisem kijepnaho kithum cheh uhen, ati." 
Exodus11:3 Chuin Pakaiyin Egypt mitmu-a chun Israel miho chu khohsahna apetan ahi. Chukal valin mipa Mosi chu mipi mitmu le Pharaoh sohte mitmun Egypt gam sunga mi minthang tah ahitan ahi. 
Exodus11:4 Chuin Mosi'n, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Jan khangkim donle Egypt gamsung lailung tah-a kalut ding:" 
Exodus11:5 Chule Egypt gamsunga chapa peng masapen jouse, laltouna-a tou Pharaoh chapa lenpena pat, sumheija sohnu chapa lenpen changeija thisoh hel dingu; chule gancha asoh masapen ho jong thisoh hel dingu ahi." 
Exodus11:6 Chule Egypt gamsung jouse-a chu kana nasatah umding, hitobang hi anaum khalou ahin, umjong umkit louhel ding ahi." 
Exodus11:7 Ahin Israel chate douna-a vang, mihem douna hihen le gancha douna hijongle, uichan jong alei achalohsah louding ahi; chutia chu nanghon Egypt mite le Israel kah-a Pakaiyin ichana kikhena akoiham ti nahet ding ahi." 
Exodus11:8 Chuteng hiche nasohte jouse hi kahenga hung suh uva, ka-angsunga bohkhup diu, Chedohtan, nanungjui mipi jouse toh: ahung tidingu; chujou teng keima kachedoh ding ahi, ati. Chuin ama Pharaoh koma konchun lunghang tah-in apotdohtan ahi." 
Exodus11:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Egypt gamsunga hi kathilbol kidang apun chehcheh theina dinga Pharaoh'in nathu angailou ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus11:10 Chuin Mosi le Aaron'in Pharaoh angsunga hiche thilkidang hojouse hi abol lhonin: chule Israel chate chu agama kona asoldohlou nadingin, Pakaiyin Pharaoh lung chu atahsah-in ahi." 
Exodus12:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Egypt gama Mosi le Aaron henga chun aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus12:2 Hiche lhahi nangho dinga lha kipatna hiding: nangho dinga kumsunga lha masapen chu hiding ahi. 
Exodus12:3 Israel mipi kikhom ho jouse henga chun thu seilhonin lang, hitin seilhonin, Hiche lha nisom chan ni hile mitinin ama-a dingin kelngoinou khatcheh kilah-u hen, apu apateu insung dungjuija in khatna dinga kelngoinou khatcheh hiding ahi:" 
Exodus12:4 Chule ijemtia insung khat chu kelngoinou khat dinga alhom behseh-a ahile, amale a-inhengpa chun kelngoinou khat chu amijatnu dungjuijin kilah-u hen; mitinin ava khamcheh-a aneh dingjat dungjuija kelngoinouva dinga chu mi nasimtoh dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:5 Na kelngoinouvu chu nolna beihel, achal kum khat lhingbep hiding: nanghon hichu kelngoi ham, ahiloule kelcha hama kona nalah dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:6 Chule nanghon chuche lha ni somle nili chan ni geija nakoi dingu: chule Israel mipi kikhom khomho jouse chun nilhah teng atha dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:7 Chule amahon athisan chu alah uva, aneh nadiu inho kotchung teni le achung jolla chu anu dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:8 Chule amaho chuche jan chule aphe chu meija agouva, cholsolou changlhah toh an-che kha toh ame dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:9 Asela naneh loudiu, chule twija kihon jong naneh lou dingu, amavang alu jong akeng jong chule asung jouse puma meija nasahmin tho dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:10 Chule nanghon jingkah geija khatcha nakoilou dingu ahi; jingkah geija anaumden tapouchu meija nagovam dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:11 Chule hitia hi naneh dingu ahi; tai kigah pum le kengchot kise pum, chule nakhut uva natenggolu kichoi puma kinotah-a naneh dingu ahi: hichehi Pakai kalchuh ahi." 
Exodus12:12 Ajehchu tujan tengle keiman Egypt gamsung kahin jotpa ding, Egypt gamsunga mihem le gancha apeng masa jouse kathagam ding; chule Egypt pathen jouse chunga jong thutanna kalhunsah ding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Exodus12:13 Chule thisan chu nangho dinga na-umnao inho chunga melchih na-a pangding; chule thisan chu kamu teng, nangho chu kakalchuh ding; Egypt gam kahin got teng, hise chu nangho sumang dinga nachung uva chulou ding ahi." 
Exodus12:14 Chule hiche nikho hi nangho dinga hetjingna hiding; chule nanghon hichehi nakhang lhumkei uva Pakaiya dinga kutna nanit dingu; nanghon hiche kut hi a-itih-a chonna dan kisuna nanit dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:15 Nanghon ni sagi cholsolou changlhah naneh diu; ni masa ni-a patna na-in houva kona chol nakoidoh diu ahi. Ajehchu koihile nimasa ni-a patna ni sagi changeija chola kisem changlhah netapou chu, hiche mipa chu Israel lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Exodus12:16 Chule nimasani chule nangho dinga kikhoppi theng umding; chule ani sagi ni jongleh kikhoppi theng umkit ding ahi; chule hiche nikho ho-a chu natoh imacha natohlou dingu; amitinin anehsohkei dingu ahin, nehding bou chu nakibol thei dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:17 Chule nanghon cholsolou changlhah kut chu nanit dingu ahi; ajehchu chuche nilele-a chu nagalsat hou Egypt gama kona kapuidoh ahiuve. Hijeh-a chu hiche nikho hi a-itih-a akhang akhanga chonna dan kisuna nanit dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:18 Nanghon lha masapen chuche lha nisomle nili nilhah-a pat, chuche lha mama nisomni le nikhat nilhah changeija cholsolou changlhah naneh dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:19 Ni sagi sunga chu chol him him na-inhouva kimulouhel ding ahi: ajehchu koi hijongle chol kiso netapou chu, maljin hihen, gamsunga peng hijongle, chutobang michu Israel mipi kikhomho lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Exodus12:20 Chol kiso tapou imacha nanehlou dingu ahi; nachenna mun jouseuva cholsolou changlhah bou naneh dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus12:21 Chujouvin Mosi'n Israel upaho jouse akouvin, ajah uva, Kelngoinou chu kikaijun lang, na insungmi cheh-u dungjuijin kalchuh sa chu that taovin." 
Exodus12:22 Chule nanghon hyssop bohkhat nalah uva, lheng sunga um thisan lah-a chu nadelut dingu, chuche lheng sunga um thisana chu kotbeng teni le kotchungjol chu nanu dingu: chule jingkah ahunghi kahse-a koimacha a-inkot khah-a kona potdoh louding ahi." 
Exodus12:23 Ajehchu Egypt mite sugam dinga Pakaiyin ahin jotpa ding ahin; chule aman kotchin teni le kotchungvuma thisan chu amutengle, Pakaiyin hiche kot chu akalchuh ding, nangho sugam dinga suhmangna chu na-insungu ahin lutsah louding ahi." 
Exodus12:24 Chule hiche thil hi nangho le nachapa teovin a-itih-a chonna danna nanit jing dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:25 Chule hung hitiding ahi, athutep banga Pakaiyin napeh dingu gamsung chu nalhun phat tengu jongle, hiche natoh hi nanit jomjing dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:26 Chule hung hitiding ahi, nachateovin naheng uva, Hiche natoh hi ipi vetsahna ham? ati phat tengule;" 
Exodus12:27 Nanghon, Aman Egypt mite asuhgama eiho eihuhdoh laijuva, Egypt gama Israel chate inho kalchuhpa Pakai kalchuh ganlhaina chu ahi nati dingu ahi, ati. Chuin mipi chu akunun Pathen ahou taovin ahi." 
Exodus12:28 Chuin Israel chate chu achemangun, Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron athupeh bangchun aboltaove." 
Exodus12:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin khangkimin alaltouna-a tou Pharaoh cha masapena pat gal hing kikaija songkul'a kihen cha masapen geijin, Egypt gamsunga apeng masapen jouse athat gamin; chule gancha masapen ho jouse jong athat gam tan ahi." 
Exodus12:30 Chuin Pharaoh chu jan-in athouvin, asohho jouse le Egypt mite jouse chu athoudoh uvin; chule Egypt gama chun kana nasatah aumtan ahi; ajehchu mithi louna in khatcha jong umlou ahi." 
Exodus12:31 Chuin aman jan-in Mosi le Aaron chu akouvin, aheng lhona, Kipatdoh-un, nangni le Israel chate chu kamite-a konin chedoh taovin; chule cheovin lang nasei bangin Pakai chu gajen taovin." 
Exodus12:32 Chule naseilhon bangin nabonghou le nagancha hou jouse jong kipuijun lang chetaovin; chule keijong phatthei neiboh-un, ati." 
Exodus12:33 Chuin Egypt mite chun chuche miho chu gamsunga kona gangtah-a soldoh loina ding chun akinotaove; ajehchu amahon, Eiho mithi ihisoh diu ahitai, atiuve." 
Exodus12:34 Chuin miho chun achangbong amehsao chu chol kiso masangin akichoijun, achanglhah mehnao kongho pona kijel chu alengkou uva akiput taovin ahi." 
Exodus12:35 Chule Israel chate chun Mosi seibang chun abolun; amahon Egypt mite-a konin sana le dangka-a kisem kijepnaho le vonho chu akithumun ahi. 
Exodus12:36 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel mite chu Egypt mite mitmun khotona amusah-in, hiti chun amahon athum chanu chu apeuvin ahi. Chutichun amahon Egypt mite chu achom gamun ahi." 
Exodus12:37 Chuin Israel chate chu Rameses'a konin Succoth lama ajin taovin, amaho chu nunao chapang simlouvin, kenga lamjot cheh pasal sangjagup ahiuve." 
Exodus12:38 Chule choplop mihonpi chu amaho toh achetou khomun; chule kelngoihon, bonghon, chule gancha tamtah toh alhon khomun ahi." 
Exodus12:39 Chule amahon Egypt gama kona ahinkipoh-u changbong mehsa-a chun cholsolou changlhah akangun ahi, ajehchu chol kiso louva ahi; ijeh inem itile Egypt gama kona asotdoh tho jengu ahijeh-a, amaho akhongai sot thei louvu, nehding imacha akigotman louvu ahi." 
Exodus12:40 Tun Egypt gama cheng Israel chate akhopemnao phatsung chu kum jali le kum somthum ahi. 
Exodus12:41 Chuin kum jali le kum somthum kichaijin ahitin ahi, chuche nile le chun ahitin ahi, Pakai janel jouse chu Egypt gama konin apotdoh taovin ahi." 
Exodus12:42 Hiche hi Egypt gama kona ahinpuidoh jeh uva Pakai geldohna dinga anitdiu jan chu ahi. Hiche hi Israel chate jousen akhanguva anitdiu Pakai jan chu ahi. 
Exodus12:43 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga, Kalchuh kut kiman dingdan chu hichehi ahi; maljin koimachan hichu aneh louding ahi:" 
Exodus12:44 Ahin suma kicho soh vangchu, nangman achep natanjou tengle, hichu aneh theiding ahi." 
Exodus12:45 Gamchom mi le soh sum thalo vang chun hichu aneh theilou ding ahi. 
Exodus12:46 Hichu inkhat sunga nehding ahin; nanghon aphe khatjeng jong inpolama nachoidoh lou dingu; chule agujong nasuhboh lou dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:47 Israel mipi ho chun hiche hi anit dingu ahi. 
Exodus12:48 Maljin khat nakoma pema auma, Pakai dinga kalchuh kut anit dinga ahile, apasal jousen chep tanu henlang, chujou tengle hinnai hen, chule hichu nit hen; chutengle ama chuche gama penga mikhat tobang hiding ahi. Ajehchu chep tanlou tapou chun hichu anehlou dingu ahi." 
Exodus12:49 Agam sunga peng hihen, nalah uva hung khopem gamdangmi hijongle, dan khat bou hiding ahi, ati." 
Exodus12:50 Chutichun Israel chate jousen abol taovin; Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron athupeh bangchun abol taovin ahi. 
Exodus12:51 Chuin chuche nilele chun ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin Israel chate chu aloi loijin Egypt gama konin apuidohtan ahi." 
Exodus13:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus13:2 Israel chate lah-a naobu hinphukeh-a apeng masa jouse chu mihem hihen gancha hijongle kahenga thenso soh keijun: hichu keija ahi, ati." 
Exodus13:3 Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho henga aseijin, Nanghon Egypt gamsung sohchana in'a kona nahungdoh nao hiche nikhohi hejingun; ajeh chu Pakaiyin khut thahatna hiche mun'a kona chu nahin puidoh-u ahi. Chol kiso changlhah naneh loudingu ahi." 
Exodus13:4 Abib lha hiche nikho-a hi nahung potdoh-u ahi. 
Exodus13:5 Chule Pakaiyin Canaan miho, Hit miho, Amon miho, Hiv miho, chule Jebus miho gam, napu napateu pehdinga akihahselna khoiju le bangnoi lona gama chu napuilut phat tengule, hiche lha ngeija hi hiche kin kibol hi nanit jing dingu ahi." 
Exodus13:6 Nisagi cholsolou changlhah naneh dingu, chule ani sagi ni chu Pakaiya dinga kut hiding ahi." 
Exodus13:7 Nisagi chol solou changlhah nehding ahin; nakom him himuva chol kiso changlhah kimulou ding, nachennao mun jouse vellah-a jong chol him him kimulou ding ahi." 
Exodus13:8 Chule chuche nikho chule nachapa nahetsah-a, ajah-a, Egypt gama kona kahung potdoh-a Pakaiyin kachunga anatohho jeh-a hichehi kibola ahi, tia naseipeh ding ahi." 
Exodus13:9 Chule Pakai danthu chu nakama aumtheina dinga, hiche hi nakhut chunga melchihna hiding, chule namit teni kikah-a hetjingna hiding ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin khut thahat tah-a Egypt gama kona napuidoh ahi." 
Exodus13:10 Hijeh chun kumseh le hiche dan kisem hi aphatseh-a nanit jingding ahi. 
Exodus13:11 Chule napu napate le nangma henga ana kihahselna banga, Pakaiyin Canaan miho gama napuilutna, hiche gam chu napeh tengle hitiding ahi," 
Exodus13:12 Nangman naobu hinphukeh masa jouse le nagancha apeng masa chengse chu Pakai dinga nachom khen ding ahi; pasal ho chu Pakaiya ding ahi. 
Exodus13:13 Chule sangan asoh masa chengse chu kelngoinouva nalhatdoh ding; nalhatdoh louding ahile angong chu naheboh ding ahi. Nachate lah-a apeng masapen pasal jouse chu nalhatdoh ding ahi. 
Exodus13:14 Chule hitiding ahi, phat ahung lhung ding ho-a chu nachapan, Hichehi ipi tina ham? tia nahindoh tengle, nangman ahenga, Pakaiyin akhut thahat chun Egypt gam sohchana in'a kona eina lhatdoh ahi:" 
Exodus13:15 Chule ahitin ahi, Pharaoh chun eisoldoh nomlou phatnun, Pakaiyin Egypt gama mihem le gancha apeng masa jouse chu atha gam jeh-a keiman naobu hinphukeh-a apeng masa pasal jouse chu Pakai koma kalhandoh ahi; ahivangin kachate lah-a apeng masa jouse chu kalhatdoh-in ahi." 
Exodus13:16 Chule hiche hi nakhut chunga melchihna le namit teni kikah-a hetjingna hiding ahi: ajehchu khut thahatna Pakaiyin Egypt gama kona eipuidoh-u ahi, nati ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus13:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pharaoh'in mipi ho chu asoldoh phatnin, alampi chu anai vangin Pathen'in Philistine mite gam jotna lampia chun amaho apuipon ahi: ajehchu Pathen'in, Achuti loule mipi ho chun galkisat amutengule kisih untin, Egypt lama kilekit getnunte, ati ahi." 
Exodus13:18 Ahin Pathen'in mipi chu twipi san jotna gamthip lampia chun apuijin;chule Israel chate chu Egypt gama kon chun galsat dinga kigosan akitol tou taovin ahi. 
Exodus13:19 Chuin Mosi'n Joseph guho chu apon ahi: ajehchu aman Israel chate chu ana kihahsel sah-a, ajah uva, Pathen'in nangho thonlouva nahungvil dingu ahin; chule nanghon kagu hi hikoma kona napohtou dingu ahi, anati ahi." 
Exodus13:20 Chuin amaho Succoth'a konin akipat doh-un, gamthip chin Etham'a agebuh-u asongun ahi." 
Exodus13:21 Chuin sun le jana achetheina diuvin Pakai chu sun le meibang khompin amasanguva achen, chule jan le meikong khompin amaho chu vah pedingin amasanguva achepeh-in ahi." 
Exodus13:22 Hitichun sun na meibang khompi le jana meikong khompi chu mipi ho masanga konchun alamangpon ahi. 
Exodus14:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus14:2 Israel chate henga, amaho kiheijuva Baal-zephon maijona um Migdol le twikhanglen kah-a Pi-hahiroth mun'a gebuh akison nadiuvin seipeh-in: hiche masanga chu twikhanglen panga gebuh nason dingu ahi." 
Exodus14:3 Ajehchu Pharaoh'in Israel chate thudola, Amaho gamsunga chun a-ohden taovin, gamthip chun amaho akhakhum den ahitaove, atiding ahi." 
Exodus14:4 Chule keiman Pharaoh lungsung chu kasuh tah ding, aman amaho ahin nungdel ding ahin; chule Egypt miten keima Pakai kahi ahetna dinguva, keima Pharaoh le asepaiho jouse chunga jabola kaum ding ahi. Chuin amahon hiti chun abol taovin ahi." 
Exodus14:5 Chuin Egypt lengpa henga mipi chu ajam taove ti aseipeh taovin ahi. Chuin Pharaoh le asohte lungsung chu mipi ho douna chun akiheitan, chule amahon, Ipi dinga hiche hi inaboluva, eiho eijen naova kona Israel chu isoldoh-u hitam? atiuve." 
Exodus14:6 Chuin aman asakol kangtalai chu akigotnin, amite chu akipuijin ahi." 
Exodus14:7 Chuin aman lhentum sakol kangtalai jagup le Egypt sakol kangtalai jouse, chule khatcheh chunga sepai lamkaiho chu akipuijin ahi." 
Exodus14:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Egypt lengpa Pharaoh lungsung chu atahsahtan, aman Israel chate chu anungdel tai; chule Israel chate chu hangtah-a chedoh-a ahitaove." 
Exodus14:9 Ahivangin Egypt mite chun Pharaoh sakol kangtalai ho le sakol jouse, asakol chung tou miho, chule asepaihon chutoh amaho chu anungdel taovin, chuin amaho chu Baal-zephon phah masang Pi-hahiroth kom, twikhanglen panga agebuh ason naova chun apha taovin ahi." 
Exodus14:10 Chuin Pharaoh ahung nai phatnin, Israel chate akhodah uvin ahile, veuvin, Egypt mite chu anunguva ahung kijot jot jenguvin; chuin amaho akicha talheh jengun ahi. Chuin Israel chate chu Pakai henga atao taovin ahi." 
Exodus14:11 Chuin amahon Mosi henga, Egypt gama lhankhuh umlou hija gamthipma thidinga neipuidoh-u ham? Nangman ibola Egypt gama kona neipuidoh uva, hitia hi neibolu ham?" 
Exodus14:12 Egypt mite kajen theina diuvin neilimsah hih-un tia Egypt gama kanaseiju chu hiche thuhi hilou ham? ajehchu gamthipma kathigam sang uva Egypt mite kajenu chu keiho dinga phajo ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus14:13 Chuin Mosi'n mipi henga, Nangho kicha hih-un, ding thimbeh-un lang, Aman nangho tunia namusah dingu Pakai mi huhhingna chu veuvin: ajehchu tunia namu-u Egypt mite hi a-imatih chana avela namu kitlou dingu ahitai." 
Exodus14:14 Pakaiyin nangho dinga gal asatding, chule nangho na-umthim beh dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus14:15 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Ipi dinga kahenga naka uham? Israel chate chu amalamuva ache nadiuvin ahenguva seipeh-in." 
Exodus14:16 Ahin nangman natenggol chu domsangin lang, twikhanglen chunga chun nakhut jahdoh-in, hichu hom khenin: chule Israel chaten tolgoa twikhanglen lailung chu ajotdingu ahi." 
Exodus14:17 Chule keima, ven, keimatah-in Egypt mite lungsung kasuhtah ding, chule amahon amaho nung chu ajui dingu ahi. Chule Pharaoh le ajanelho jouse, asakol kangtalai ho, chule asakol chunga tou miho chunga keiman jabolna kamuding ahi." 
Exodus14:18 Chule Pharaoh chung le asakol kangtalai chung, chule asakol chungtou miho chunga jabola kaum tengle, Egypt miten keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus14:19 Chuin Israel gebuh masanga che Pathen vantil chu akichonin, anunguva achen; chule meilhang khompi chu amasanguva kon chun akichonin, anunguva adingtan ahi." 
Exodus14:20 Chuin hichu Israel miho gebuh le Egypt miho gebuh kikah-a chun ahungin; hichu amaho ding chun meilhang le muthim ahin, khat ho ding vang chun janle vah apen ahi. Chutichun jankhovah keijin khatnin khat chu anailutpon ahi." 
Exodus14:21 Chuin Mosi'n twipi chunga chun akhut ajahdoh tan ahi; chuin Pakaiyin hiche jan chun solam hui hattah mangchan twipi chu alelon sah-in, twipi chu tolgo asosahtan, twiho chu akikhentan ahi." 
Exodus14:22 Chuin Israel chate chu twipi lailung tolgoa chun alut taovin; chule twiho chu jetle veija bang bangin akisungin ahi. 
Exodus14:23 Chuin Egypt miho chun anung delun, Pharaoh sakol ho, akangtalai ho, asakol chunga tou miho jouse chu amaho nunga chun twipi lailunga chun alut taovin ahi." 
Exodus14:24 Chuin ahitin ahi, jingkah ahiphatnin Pakaiyin Egypt mite chu meilhang le meikong khompia konin ahinven, Egypt mite janel chu asunohphah tan," 
Exodus14:25 Asakol kangtalaiju kangho chu alahdoh peh-in ahile amahon gihsatah in atolun ahi. Hijeh chun Egypt miten, Eiho Israel maikoh-a konhin jamtao hite; ajehchu Pakaiyin amaho dinga Egypt mitehi asat ahitai, atiuvin ahi." 
Exodus14:26 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Egypt mite sakol ho, akangtalaihou, chule asakol chunga touhou chunga twiho chu ahung lonkhom kitna dingin, twipi chunga chun nakhut jahdoh-in, ati." 
Exodus14:27 Chuin Mosi'n twipi chunga chun akhut ajahdoh-in ahile, jingkah ahunghi phatnin twipi chu angaija alonhat bangin ahunglong kit tai; chuin Egypt hiche lama chun ajamun; Pakaiyin Egypt mite chu twipi lailunga chun alehlut gamtan ahi." 
Exodus14:28 Chuin twiho chu ahung long gom kitnin, sakol ho, kangtalai ho, sakol chunga touho, chule amaho hin nungdel twipi sunga lut ho Pharaoh janelho jouse chu achuptan; khatcha jong asohcha aum pouvin ahi." 
Exodus14:29 Ahivangin Israel chaten twipi lailunga chun tolgo laija lam ajotnun; chule twiho chu amaho dingin ajetlam le aveilam uva bang bangin akisungin ahi. 
Exodus14:30 Chutichun Pakaiyin chuche nikho chun Israel chate chu Egypt mite khutna konin ahuhhingtan; chule twipanga konin Israelte chun Egypt mite athiu chu amuvin ahi. 
Exodus14:31 Chuin Israel ten Egypt mite chunga Pakai natoh loupi chu amutaovin ahi: chule mipichun Pakai chu aging taovin, Pakai le asoh Mosi chu atahsan taove." 
Exodus15:1 Chujouvin Mosi le Israel chate chun Pakai henga hiche la hi asaovin, hitihin aseijuve: Loupitah-a gal ajotah jeh-in, keiman Pakai henga la sange; aman sakol le achunga toupa chu twipi sunga alehlut tai." 
Exodus15:2 Pakai chu kahatna le ka la ahin, chule eihuhinga jong ahung hitai. Ama ka Pathen ahin, keiman ama kavahchoi ding; Ama kapa Pathen ahin, keiman kachoi sang ding ahi." 
Exodus15:3 Pakai chu gal hatmi ahi. Pakai chu amin ahi. 
Exodus15:4 Pharaoh sakol kangtalai ho le asepai janel chu aman twipi sunga alehlutnin; asepai lamkai lhenchom ho jongchu twipi sana alhalut gam tan ahi. 
Exodus15:5 Twi thuh-in achupsoh taovin; twi thuhtah noija chun song bangin alhalut taove. 
Exodus15:6 Vo Pakai nakhut jetlam chu thanei na-in aloupin: vo Pakai nakhut jetlam chun melma chu asuchip tan ahi. 
Exodus15:7 Naletna chungnunga chun nangma douna-a kipanho chu najoutan; nalunghanna chu nahin soldoh-in, amaho chu changpol bangin akavam taovin ahi." 
Exodus15:8 Nanah hai chun twiho chu akhom khomin, twisoh chu alhuh-in adingden tan, chule twithuh chu twipi lailunga adingchah dentan ahi." 
Exodus15:9 Melma chun, Keiman kanungdel ding, kaphah pa-a thil kichomdohho chu kahop khending; kangaichat chu achunguva kasuh bulhit ding; kachemjam kasa doh-a, kakhutnin amaho asuhmang ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus15:10 Nangman nahui chun namutnin ahile, twipi chun amaho chu akhukhum tan: twi thuh sunga chun amaho chu ngen bangin alhalut taovin ahi." 
Exodus15:11 Vo Pakai, pathen ho lah-a hi nangma tobang koi umam? nangma tobanga thenna-a loupi, pachat naho-a gin um, chule thil kidang ho bolla koi umam?" 
Exodus15:12 Nangman nakhut jetlam najah doh-in, leisetnin amaho chu aval lhumtai." 
Exodus15:13 Nangman nami hepina-in nalhatdohsa namite chu napui doh-in, nangman nathahatna-in amaho chu nachenna munthenga chun napui lhungtan ahi." 
Exodus15:14 Mipi chun jaovintin, chule kichadiu: Philistine mite chenna munchu lungkham na-a dimding ahi." 
Exodus15:15 Chuteng Edom lenghon hichu kidang asahdiu; Moab mihat ho chu kihot hotdiu; Canaan gama cheng ho jouse chu junmang diu ahi. 
Exodus15:16 Nangman nachohdohsa namite chu agalkai kahseovin, Vo Pakai, namite chu agalkai kahseuva kichat le tijat na chu amaho chunga chuding; naban thahat nasatah-a chu amaho song banga umthimbeh dingu ahi." 
Exodus15:17 Vo Pakai nangman nachenna dinga nasemna mun, Vo Pakai nakhut tah-a naphudet muntheng, nagoulo molsanga chu amaho chu napuilutna nachensah ding ahi." 
Exodus15:18 Pakaiyin atonsot atonsotna lengvai apohding ahi. 
Exodus15:19 Ajehchu Pharaoh sakol ho, akangtalai ho leh, asakol chunga touho toh twipi sunga alutnuvin, chuin Pakaiyin twipi chu achunguva alonsah kittan ahi; ahivangin Israel chate chu twipi lailung tolgo chunga chun acheuvin ahi." 
Exodus15:20 Chuin Aaron sopinu Miriam themgaonu chun akhutna thih khutbeh khat akilah-in; chule numei jouse chun thih khutbeh choipum le lampumin anung ajuijun ahi. 
Exodus15:21 Chuin Miriam'in amaho chu adonbutnin, Nanghon Pakai henga la saovin, ajehchu aman loupitah-a gal ajou tan ahi; aman sakol le achunga toupa chu twipi sunga aleh lutan ahi, ati." 
Exodus15:22 Chuti chun Mosi'n Israel chu twipi sana konchun ahin puijin, Shur gamthipma alut taovin ahi; chuin amaho gamthipma chun nithum acheuvin ahile twi amu tapouvin ahi." 
Exodus15:23 Chuin Marah ahung lhun phatnun, Marah mun'a twiho chu akhat jeh-in adonthei tapouvin ahi. Hiche jeh-a chu hiche mun chu Marah kisah-a ahi." 
Exodus15:24 Chuin mipi ho chu Mosi chunga aphun taovin, Ipi kadondiu ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Exodus15:25 Chuin ama Pakai henga akaptan ahileh, Pakaiyin thingphung khat amusah-in, hichu twiho lah-a chun akholutnin ahile, twiho chu atwi tan ahi. Chua chun aman amaho dingin chonadan le thupeh asemin, chule chuachun amaho chu apatepmin," 
Exodus15:26 Ajah uva, Nanghon Pakai na Pathen'u aw hi chingthei tah-a nangai uva, amitmu-a adih chu nabol uva, chule achondan thu jouse nanit uva ahile, keiman Egypt mite chunga kachuhsah hiche natho hi khatcha jong nachung uva kachuhsah louding ahi; ajehchu keima nangma damsah-a Pakai chu kahi ati." 
Exodus15:27 Chuin amaho Elim ahung lhungun, chukoma chun twikhuh somleni le lusuphung somsagi aumin ahi. Chuin amahon twipanga chun gebuh asongun ahi." 
Exodus16:1 Chuin amaho Elim'a konin akholjin kitnun, Egypt gam adalhahnao lhanina ni somle ninga ni tah chun Israel chate mipi kikhomho jouse chu Sinai le Elim kikah-a um Sin gamthip ahunglhung taovin ahi." 
Exodus16:2 Chuin gamthipma chun Israel chate mipi kikhomho jouse chu Mosi le Aaron dounan aphun taovin; 
Exodus16:3 Israel chate chun aheng lhona, Pathen'in Egypt gama sabel ho koma katou uva, nengtah-a changlhah kaneh laijuva Pakai khutna eina thisah joh-u hitavele; ajehchu nangnin hichea mipi ho hi kella thisah dinga hiche gamthipma hi neihin puilutnu ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Exodus16:4 Hichun Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Ven, keiman nangho dinga van'a kona changlhah kahinjuhsah ding ahin; amaho kadan thua achonuleh achonlouvu kapatep theina dinga, mipi ho chu potdoh uva niseh-a anehkham cheh diu aga kilokhom dingu ahi." 
Exodus16:5 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, anigup nile ahin lokhom hou chu akigontup dingu; hichu niseh-a alokhomu jatni hiding ahi, ati." 
Exodus16:6 Chuin Mosi le Aaron'in Israel chate jouse henga, Nilhah tengleh Egypt gama kona nahinpui doh uva chu Pakai ahi nahet dingu:" 
Exodus16:7 Chule jingkah tengleh Pakai loupi namu dingu ahi; ajehchu Pakai douna-a naphunchel nao chu aman ajatai: keini ipi kahi lhona keini chunga naphunu ham? atilhone. 
Exodus16:8 Chuin Mosi'n, Hiche hi nilhah teng Pakaiyin nanehdiu sa napeh uva, jingkah teng changlhah nengtah-a napeh tengule namu dingu ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin naphun nao, ama douna-a naphun chelnao chu ajatan ahi. Keini koi kahilhon ham? keini douna-a phun nahipouvin, Pakai douna-a phun nahijo bouvui, ati." 
Exodus16:9 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron henga, Israel chate mipi kikhomho henga, Pakai angsunghi hinaijun; ajehchu aman naphun nahou chu ajatai, tin seipeh-in ati." 
Exodus16:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, Aaron'in Israel chate mipi kikhomho henga thu aseipat patnin, amahon gamthiplam chu aveovin ahile, veuvin, Pakai loupi nachu meilhang lah-a ahung kilah-in ahi." 
Exodus16:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus16:12 Israel chate phunchel nachu keiman kajatan ahi. Amaho henga chun, Nilhah teng sa naneh dingu, chule jingkah tengle changlhah-a navaset dingu; chutengle keima Pakai na-Pathen'u kahi nahet dingu ahi, tin seijin, ati." 
Exodus16:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, nilhah-in vengkeho chu ahungdoh-un, agebuh uchu atomchah tan ahi. Chule jingkah-in janelho kimvela chun daitwi analhan ahi." 
Exodus16:14 Chuin daitwi lha chu ahul phatnin, veuvin, gamthip tol chunga chun thil lumpilpel neocha cha, buhbang neocha cha tobangin amuvin ahi." 
Exodus16:15 Chuin Israel chate chun hichu amuphatnun khatle khat akihouvun, Hiche hi manna ahi atiuve: ajehchu ipi ahi ahetlouvu ahi. Chuin Mosi'n ahenguva, Hichehi Pakaiyin naneh dinguva napeh-u changlhah chu ahi." 
Exodus16:16 Hiche thil hi Pakaiyin ana thupeh chu ahi: Mitinin ama nehkhop cheh, na-insung mijat dungjuijun mikhat cheh-a dingin omer khatcheh; amitakipmin aponbuh sunga umho jouse-a dingin kilokhom cheh hen, ati." 
Exodus16:17 Chuin Israel chaten hitichun abolun, abangin atamjep chule abangin alhomjep akilo khomun ahi." 
Exodus16:18 Chuin amahon omer-a ate phatnun, atam lodoh panjong imacha amoh aneipon, chule alhom lodoh pajong chu alhinglel dehpon; amitinin anehkhop cheh ding akilo khomun ahi." 
Exodus16:19 Chuin Mosi'n, Koimachan jingkah changeijin khenhih hen, ati." 
Exodus16:20 Ahivangin amahon Mosi thusei chu angaipouvin; alah uva mi phabepmin jingkah geija dingin akhenun, ahin hichu ana thanin, a-uitan ahi. Chuin Mosi achunguva alunghang tan ahi." 
Exodus16:21 Chuti chun jingkah seh le amitakipmin anehkhop cheh ding akilokhom jiuvin; nisa ahung sat tengleh hichu ajunmang jitan ahi. 
Exodus16:22 Chuin ahitin ahi, anigup ni chule changlhah chu ajatni, mikhat dingin omer nicheh alohkhom jiuvin ahi. Chuin mipi kikhom vaipoho jouse chu ahungun, Mosi ahung hetsah taovin ahi." 
Exodus16:23 Chuin aman amaho henga chun, Hiche hi Pakaiyin asei chu ahi, Jingkhu Pakaiya dinga kicholdo ni cholngah nitheng ahi. Nahon dingu chu tunin honunlang, nakan dingu chu kanguvin, chua amoh umchu jingkah lama dingin kikoijun, ati." 
Exodus16:24 Chuin Mosi'n aseibang chun jingkah changei chun akoijuvin ahile, hichu anengpon, thanjong athan pon ahi." 
Exodus16:25 Chuin Mosi'n, Hichu tunin neovin; ajehchu tuni hi Pakaiya dinga cholngah ni ahi: tunia hichu loujaova namu lou dingu ahi." 
Exodus16:26 Hichu nigup sunga nalokhom dingu; ajing nisagi ni chu cholngah ni ahin, chuche nikho chule khatcha jong umlou ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus16:27 Chuin ahitin ahi, mi phabep nisagi ni chun aloh khomdin apotdoh un, ahin khatcha amupouve." 
Exodus16:28 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Kathupeh ho le kadan thuho hi itihchan nitnom louva naum dingu ham?" 
Exodus16:29 Veovin, Pakaiyin cholngah ni napeh jeh uvin, nigup chan nileh nini-a ding changlhah napeh-u ahi; amitakip namun cheh-a umun lang, nisagi nileh aumna mun'a konin koimacha potdoh hihhen, ati." 
Exodus16:30 Chutichun mipi chu nisagi nin acholdo taovin ahi. 
Exodus16:31 Chuin Israel insung chun hichu amin manna asah-un ahi. Hichu pathikhom mu tobanga bangleh ahin, atuidan chu khoijutoh kihala kisem changlhah tobang ahi." 
Exodus16:32 Chuin Mosi'n, Hiche thilhi Pakai thupeh chu ahi, Egypt gama kona kapuidoh laijuva gamthipma kavahnao changlhah chu amutheina diuvin; nakhang khanguva umjing dingin omer dimkhat koijun, ati." 
Exodus16:33 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron henga, Bel khat lan lang asunga chun manna omer dimkhat koijin; hichu nakhang khanguva umjing dingin Pakai angsunga koijin, ati." 
Exodus16:34 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi thu apehbang chun chin jing dingin hettohsahna angsunga chun akoitan ahi. 
Exodus16:35 Hitichun Israel chaten alo dingu gamsung ahung lhun kahseovin, kum somli sung chun manna chu aneovin; Canaan gam gamgiho ahunglhun kahseovin manna chu aneuvin ahi." 
Exodus16:36 Tun omer khat chu ephah hop soma hopkhat ahi. 
Exodus17:1 Chuin Israel chate kikhom khom pumpi chu Sin gamthipma konchun akipatdoh kitnun, Pakai thupeh dungjuijin Rephidim'a chun gebuh asongun ahi. Chuin chukoma chun mipi ho donding twi aumtapon ahi." 
Exodus17:2 Hijeh chun mipi chun Mosi akinah piuvin ajah-a, Kadon dinguvin twi neipeovin atiuvin ahi. Chuin Mosi'n ahenguva, Ipi dinga kei neiki nahpiu ham? Ipi dinga Pakai chu napatep uham? ati." 
Exodus17:3 Chumuna chun mipi chu twi ngaichan adangchah taovin; chule mipichu Mosi chunga chun aphun uvin, ajah-a, Ipi dinga keiho le kachateu chule kagancha hou hi dangchah-a thigamsah dinga Egypt gama kona neipuidoh-u ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Exodus17:4 Chuin Mosi Pakai henga akapmin, Hiche mipi hohi i-kaloding hitam? amahon keima songa selih ding eigo taove, ati." 
Exodus17:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Mipi masanga chun chen, chule Israel upaho chu kipuijin; chule vadung navohna tenggol chu nakhutna kichoijin lang, chen." 
Exodus17:6 Ven, keima namasanga um Horeb songpi chunga khu kadin ding; chule nangman songpi chu navoh ding, hichea kona chu twi hungput doh-a, hichu mipin adonthei dingu ahi, ati. Hitichun Mosi'n Israel upaho mitmu tahchun hitichun aboltan ahi." 
Exodus17:7 Israel chaten Mosi akinahpi jeh-u le Pakai chu ilah uva umam umhih-em, tia Pakai chu apatep jeh uvin, aman chuche mun chu Massah le Meribah asah tan ahi." 
Exodus17:8 Chujouvin Amalek mite chu ahungun, Rephidim mun'a chun Israelte chu ahungsat taovin ahi." 
Exodus17:9 Chuin Mosi'n Joshua jah-a, Ilah uva mi lhengdoh-in, chule cheovinlang Amalek mite khu gakisat piuvin: jingtengle kakhutna Pathen tenggol choipuma lhang chungvuma kadin ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus17:9 Chuin Mosi'n Joshua jah-a, Ilah uva mi lhengdoh-in, chule cheovinlang Amalek mite khu gakisat piuvin: jingtengle kakhutna Pathen tenggol choipuma lhang chungvuma kadin ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus17:10 Chutichun Mosi'n ahenga aseibang chun Joshua'n abolin, Amalek mite akisatpi taovin: chuin Mosi, Aaron le Hur chu lhangvuma chun akaltou taovin ahi." 
Exodus17:10 Chutichun Mosi'n ahenga aseibang chun Joshua'n abolin, Amalek mite akisatpi taovin: chuin Mosi, Aaron le Hur chu lhangvuma chun akaltou taovin ahi." 
Exodus17:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Mosi'n akhut adopsang phatle Israelte chun ajou jiuvin; aman akhut adoplhah phat phatle Amalek mite chun ajou jiuvin ahi." 
Exodus17:12 Ahin Mosi khut chu ahung khamtan; chuin amanin song alalhonin, anoija akoilhonin, ama achunga atouvin; chule Aaron le Hur chu asih langkhat gela apang lhonin, akhut teni chu adomsang jing lhonin; chutichun akhut chu nisalhum kahsen det tah-in apang tan ahi." 
Exodus17:13 Chutah chun Joshua'n Amalek le amite chu chemjamin ajoutan ahi. 
Exodus17:13 Chutah chun Joshua'n Amalek le amite chu chemjamin ajoutan ahi. 
Exodus17:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Hichehi hetjinga aumna dingin lekhabua suninlang, Joshua nabenga jong jahsah kitnin; ajehchu keiman vannoi'a hi Amalek het jingna chu kasuh manghel ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus17:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Hichehi hetjinga aumna dingin lekhabua suninlang, Joshua nabenga jong jahsah kitnin; ajehchu keiman vannoi'a hi Amalek het jingna chu kasuh manghel ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus17:15 Chuin Mosi'n maicham khat asemin, hichu Jehovah-nissi asah-in ahi." 
Exodus17:16 Ijeh inem itile aman, Ajehchu Pakaiyin akhang khanga Amalek douna-a gal asatding ahi tin Pakai akihahselin ahi, ati." 
Exodus18:1 Chuin Mosi nupapa Midian gam thempu Jethro'n Pathen'in Mosi le ami Israelte athil bolpeh jouse le Egypt gama kona Pakaiyin Israel ahin puidoh chu ajah phatnin; 
Exodus18:2 Mosi nupapa Jethro chun Mosi'n anungsol kit inneipi Zipporah chu apuijin; 
Exodus18:3 Chule achapa teni, khatpa min chu Gershom ahi; ajehchu aman, Hetlouna gama maljin kahi, ati:" 
Exodus18:4 Chule khatjopa min chu Eliazar ahi; ajehchu aman, Kapa Pathen chu eikithopia ahin, Pharaoh chemjam'a konin eihuhdoh-e, ati:" 
Exodus18:5 Chuin Mosi nupapa Jethro'n Mosi achapa teni le a-inneipi ahinpuijin, gamthip Pathen molsang mun'a agebuh sahna mun'a chun ahenga ahungun ahi." 
Exodus18:6 Chuin aman Mosi jah-a, Keima nanupapa Jethro, na-inneipi toh achapa teni toh kahunguve, ati." 
Exodus18:7 Chuin Mosi anupapa lamto dingin apotdoh-in, jana apen, achopmin; chule amani khatle khat aumchan akidongto lhonin; pon insunga ahunglut lhontan ahi." 
Exodus18:8 Chuin Mosi'n anupapa Jethro henga Pakaiyin Israelte akhohsahna jala Pharaoh le Egypt miho chunga athilbol jouse, lamdunga achunguva gentheina hungchu ho jouse, chuleh Pakaiyin amaho alhatdoh jeo chu aseipehtan ahi." 
Exodus18:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel chu Egypt mite khutna kona ahin huhdoh-a, achunga athilpha abol hojouse jehchun Jethro akipah lheh jengin ahi." 
Exodus18:10 Chuin Jethro'n, Egypt mite khutna kon le Pharaoh khutna kona nahuhdohpa, Egypt mite khutnoija kona mipi ho chu huhdohpa Pakai chu nunnom hen." 
Exodus18:11 Tun Pakai chu pathen jouse sangin aloupi joi ti kahetai; ajehchu amahon kiletsah tah-a thil abolnao jenga jong chun, amachu amaho sangin achung nungjon ahi, ati." 
Exodus18:12 Chuin Mosi nupapa Jethro'n govam thilto alan Pathen'a dingin ganlhaina abolin ahi. Chuin Aaron le Israel upa ho jouse chu Pathen angsunga Mosi nupapa Jethro toh an nedingin ahunguvin ahi. 
Exodus18:13 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Mosi chu mipi ho thutan dingin atoutan: chule mipi ho chu jingkah-a patnin nilhah geijin Mosi koma chun adingun ahi." 
Exodus18:14 Chuin Mosi nupapa chun mipi ho chunga athilbol jouse chu amuphatnin, ajah-a, Mipi ho chunga nathilbol hi ipiham? Ipidinga nangma nachang seh-a natouva, mipi ho chu jingkah-a pat nilhah geija nakimvela dinguva ham? ati." 
Exodus18:15 Chuin Mosi'n anupapa henga, Mipi hi Pathen lunglam dong dinga kahenga ahung jeh-u ahi." 
Exodus18:16 Amahon thu aneitengule kahenga hung jiuva; chule keiman khatle khat kah-a thu katanji-a, chule Pathen chondan thuhou le adanthu ho kahetsah ji ahi, ati." 
Exodus18:17 Chuin Mosi nupapan ahenga, Hiche nathilbol hi aphapoi." 
Exodus18:18 Nangma nahin nakoma um mipi ho ahiuvin nachol val dingu ahi. Ajehchu hiche thil hi nangma dingin agihsa behseh-in ahi; nangma changin nabol jouhoi ahipoi. 
Exodus18:19 Tun kaseihi ngaijin, keiman nangma thumopming kating, Pathen'in nangma naumpi ding ahi: thunoh ho chu Pathen henga napohlut theina dingin, nangma Pathen masanga mipi ho-a dingin thalheng hi-in." 
Exodus18:20 Chule nangman amaho chu chondan thuho le danthu ho nahilding, chule amahon ajot teidiu lampi le abol teidiu natoh chu nahil ding ahi." 
Exodus18:21 Chuche chungchona chun mipi ho jouse lah-a kona thil bolthei, Pathen ging mi, mi thudih, kiloset thetbol mi lhengdoh-in lang; amaho chu sangkhat chunga vaihom, jakhat chunga vaihom, somnga chunga vaihom, chule som chunga vaihom dingin pansah-in." 
Exodus18:22 Chule amaho chun mipi ho chunga phatseh-in vaihomu hen; chule hichehi hiding ahi, thulen ho chu nahenga ahinlhut diu, amavang thu neo neo ho chu amahon atandingu ahi. Chuti henlang hile nangma dinga olna hiding, chule amahon pohgih chu napoh hu dingu ahi." 
Exodus18:23 Nangman hiche thilhi nabola, chule Pathen'in jong chutia chu nathupeh-a ahile nangman nadoujou ding, chule hiche mipi ho jouse jonghi mongtah-a aumna mun uva kile dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus18:24 Chuti chun Mosi'n anupapa seichu angaijin, asei jouse chu aboltan ahi." 
Exodus18:25 Chuin Mosi'n Israel pumpi lah-a konin thilbolthei mi alheng doh-in, amaho chu mipi luchang hidingin sangkhat chunga vaihom, jakhat chunga vaihom, somnga chunga vaihom, chule somkhat chunga vaihom dingin akoitan ahi." 
Exodus18:26 Hitichun amaho chun phat tinin mipi ho thu atan taovin: thu hahsa ho chu Mosi henga ahinlhut nun, ahin thuneo jouse chu amaho tah-in atanjiuvin ahi." 
Exodus18:27 Chuin Mosi'n anupapa chu asoldohtan; hitichun ama aumna gam lama achetai. 
Exodus19:1 Israelte Egypt gama kona apotdoh uva pat lha thumna, chuche nitah chun amaho Sinai gamthip ahunglhung taove." 
Exodus19:2 Ajehchu amaho Rephidim'a kona hung kipatdoh uva, Sinai neldi gam hung lhunguva, hiche gamthipma chu ponbuh akison ahi; hitichun Israel ten molsang bula chun gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Exodus19:3 Chuin Mosi chu Pathen henga achetouvin, chule molsanga konchun Pakaiyin ahin kouvin, Jacob insung henga hitia hi naseija, chule Israel chate henga nasei ding ahi;" 
Exodus19:4 Nanghon Egypt mite chunga ipi kana bola, chule iti nangho muvanlai lhaving chunga kapoh-a, keimatah henga kapuilut ham namutaove." 
Exodus19:5 Hijeh chun tun, nanghon kathu nangai tahbeh uva, kakitepna hi nanit tahbeh uva ahile, namdang jouse chungvuma nangho hi kagou tumbeh nahi dingu ahi; ajehchu leiset pumpi hi keija ahi." 
Exodus19:6 Chule nangho keima dingin lenggam thempuho le namtheng nahi dingu ahi. Hiche thuho hi ahi nangman Israel chate henga nasei ding chu, ati." 
Exodus19:7 Chuin Mosi ahungin, mipi lah-a upaho chu akou khomin, Pakaiyin athupeh hiche thuho jouse chu a-angsung uva atahlangtan ahi." 
Exodus19:8 Chuin mipi jouse chun thakhat tah-in adonbutnun, ahenga, Pakaiyin asei jouse chu kabol dingu ahi, atiuve. Chuin Mosi'n mipi thusei ho chu Pakai henga alhuttan ahi." 
Exodus19:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Ven, nangma toh ikihou teng mipin ajahtheina dingu leh tonsotna nangma natahsan theina diuva, nahenga meilhang satah-a kahung ding ahi, ati. Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho thusei ho chu Pakai ahetsah tan ahi." 
Exodus19:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Mipi henga chenlang amaho chu tuni le jingle suthengin, chule amahon avonhou kisop thengu henlang," 
Exodus19:11 Anithum ni-a dingin kigosa demin umuhen: ajehchu anithum nileh mijouse mitmu-a Sinai molsang chunga chu Pakai hungkumlha ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus19:12 Chule nangman mipi dinga akimveluva gamgi nasempeh ding, chule ajah uva, Nangho molsang chunga nakaltou louna dingu le agamgi natohkhah louna dingun chingtheijun; koihileh molsang tongkha chan chu kithat tei ding ahi." 
Exodus19:13 Khut khatchan jong atohkhah louding, amavang ama chu songa selih ding ham, ahiloule thalpi-a kaplih ding ham hitei ding ahi; gancha hihen mihem hijongleh hichu hinglou ding ahi. Sumkon chu sottah agin tengleh amaho molsang lama hungtou dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus19:14 Chuin Mosi molsanga konchun mipi ho henga akumsuh-in, mipi ho chu asuthengin; chule amahon avonhou asopmun ahi." 
Exodus19:15 Chule aman mipi ho henga chun, Anithum channia dingin kigosa demin umun: na-inneipiteu koma jong luthih-un, ati." 
Exodus19:16 Chuin anithum ni jingkah-in ahitin ahi, van ahung gingin kol aphen, molchunga chun meilhang satah aumin, chule sumkon thongje jun ahung gingin; chutichun gebuh-a mipi umho chu akihot lhul gam taovin ahi." 
Exodus19:17 Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho chu Pathen toh kimuto dingin gebuh-a kon ahinpui doh-in; chule amaho molsang bula chun adingun ahi. 
Exodus19:18 Chuin Pakai chu meikonga ahung kumlhah jehchun, Sinai molsang pumpi chu mei akhu jengin: chule akhu chu lhum meikhu bangin akitung doh-in, molsang pumpi chu nasatah-in akihotnin ahi." 
Exodus19:19 Chuin sumkon chu sottah agina, ahagin cheh cheh phatnin, Mosi'n thu aseijin ahile Pathen'in aw gingin ahindonbut nin ahi." 
Exodus19:20 Chuin Pakai chu Sinai molchunga, amolsang chungvuma chun ahungkum suhtan ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi chu molchung vuma chun akoutouvin; chule Mosi akaltoutan ahi." 
Exodus19:21 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Kumsuh inlang mipi chu gagih-in, ajole mipi khu avedingin Pakai henglam hinphukeh untin, mi tamtah manthah lo getnunte." 
Exodus19:22 Chule Pakai kom hinaija thempuho jong chu kisuthengu hen, ajole Pakai chu achunguva hetman louvin chuget ninte, ati." 
Exodus19:23 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga, Mipi chu Sinai molsanga hungkaltou thei pouvinte; ajehchu nangman, Molsang kimvela chun gamgi semun lang, hichu suthengun, tia neithu peh-u ahi, ati." 
Exodus19:24 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Chen, kumsuh tan, chule Aaron toh nahung kaltou lhonding ahi: ahivangin thempuho le mipi chu Pakai henga hung dingin hinphukeh hih-uhen, ajole ama achunguva chuget ninte, ati." 
Exodus19:25 Chuti chun Mosi chu mipi ho henga achesuh-in, ahenguva thu jouse chu aseitan ahi." 
Exodus20:1 Chuin Pathen'in hiche thuho jouse aseijin, hitin ati." 
Exodus20:2 Keima Egypt gama kon le nasohchana in'a kona napui dohpa Pakai na-Pathen chu kahi. 
Exodus20:3 Keima angsunga nangman Pathen dangho nanei louding ahi. 
Exodus20:4 Nangman imacha alim semthu, van chunga um hihen, lei noija um hihen, leinoi'a twisunga um hijongleh akibahpi imalim nasemthu louding ahi:" 
Exodus20:5 Nangma hicheho masanga chu nakun louding, jen jong najen louding ahi: ajehchu Pakai na-Pathen keima hi thangthip Pathen kahin, keima eithet bola pate khansetna chu khangthum akhangli chan geija chate chunga phulajia;" 
Exodus20:6 Chule eingailua chule kadan thupeh nit ho sang tamtah chunga hepina musah-a chu kahi. 
Exodus20:7 Nangman Pakai na-Pathen min chu mohseh-a napat louding ahi; ajehchu mohseh-a amin pana chu Pakaiyin themona beija alha louding ahi. 
Exodus20:8 Cholngah nikho thengtah-a nitding ahi geldoh jingin. 
Exodus20:9 Nigup sung na natoh-a, natoh ding jouse natoh chaiding ahi:" 
Exodus20:10 Amavang nisagi nichu Pakai na-Pathen cholngah ni ahi: hiche nikho chule na kiti natoh louding, nangma nahin, nachapa ahin, nachanu ahin, nasohpa ahin, nasohnu ahin, nagancha hon ahin, chule nakotpi sunga um namaljin ho ahiuva jong atoh louhel dingu ahi." 
Exodus20:11 Ajehchu nigup sunga Pakaiyin van le leiset, twikhanglen, chuleh asunga um jouse chu asema, nisagi ni kicholdo ahi. Hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin choldo nichu phatthei aboh-a asuhtheng ahi." 
Exodus20:12 Pakai na-Pathen'in nangma napehna leichunga nahinkho asot theina dingin: nanu napa jabolin. 
Exodus20:13 Tol natha louding ahi. 
Exodus20:14 Na jon louding ahi. 
Exodus20:15 Na guchat louding ahi. 
Exodus20:16 Naheng nakom douna-a jouthu-a hettohsah-a napan louding ahi. 
Exodus20:17 Nangman naheng nakom in nathangset louding, naheng nakom inneipi jong nathangset louding, asohpa ahin, asohnu ahin, abongchal ahin, asangan hijongle, naheng nakom thil kiti tapou chu nathangset louding ahi." 
Exodus20:18 Chuin mipi jouse chun van ginho, kolphet ho, sumkon gin, chule molsang meikhut chu amuvin ahi. Chuin mipi chun hichu amuphatnun, akichonun, gamlatah-a ading taove." 
Exodus20:19 Chuin amahon Mosi henga, Nangman kahenguva thu seijin, keihon ngainao vinge: Ahin Pathen'in vang kahenguva thu seidahen, ajole kathilo dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus20:20 Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho henga, Kicha hih-un: ajehchu ama kichatna chu namasang uva auma, nachonset louna dinguva, nangho patep dinga Pathen chu hunga ahibouve, ati." 
Exodus20:21 Chuin mipi chu gamlatah-a adingun; Mosi'n Pathen umna muthim satah lamchu anailutnin ahi. 
Exodus20:22 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Hitia hi Israel chate henga naseiding ahi, Nanghon van'a kona nangho kahoupiu chu namu taove." 
Exodus20:23 Nanghon kakoma dangka pathenho nasem loudingu, chule nangho dinga jong sana pathenho nasem lou dingu ahi." 
Exodus20:24 Keima dinga leisetna maicham khat nasem uva, chule hiche chunga chu nagovam thiltohou, nachamna thiltohou, chule nakelngoi hou le nabongchal hou nato dingu ahi. Kamin kigeldohna dinga kalhen namun jouse-a chu naheng uva kahunga, phatthei kaboh ding nahiuve." 
Exodus20:25 Chule nangman keima song maicham neisem peh-a ahile, song kikhenga nasem louding ahi: ajehchu nangman hiche chunga chu namanchah chu nalapma ahile, hichu nasuhboh ahitai." 
Exodus20:26 Na sagohkeo chu akimulouna dinga, ka-maicham'a kalbia chu nakal lou ding ahi." 
Exodus21:1 Tun nangman amaho masanga nakoi ding thutanna ho chu hiche hohi ahi. 
Exodus21:2 Nangman Hebrew mi soh-a nachoh-a ahileh, kumgup sung aman najending: akum sagi channa leh imacha ngailouva chamlhat dinga chedoh jeng ding ahi." 
Exodus21:3 Ama achanga hung lut ahile, achanga potdoh ding: ama jinei ahileh, a-inneipi toh pottha ding ahi." 
Exodus21:4 A-pakai pan ama chu ji apuipeh ahia, amanun chanu chapa ahinpeh-a ahileh; a-inneipi leh achate chu a-pakai pa-a hiding, chule amachu achanga potdoh ding ahi." 
Exodus21:5 Amavang sohpa chun kichentah-a, Keiman ka pakaipa, ka-inneipi, chule kachate chu kangailui; chamlhatdin potdoh ponge atia ahile:" 
Exodus21:6 Chuteng a-pakaipa chun amachu thutan ho henga ahin puiding; chujongle amachu kotkhah ham, kotbeng hama apui ding; a-pakaipa chun thil kijumhem khatna abil avupeh ding; chule amachu tonsotna ajending ahitai." 
Exodus21:7 Chule pasal khatnin achanu chu sohnu dinga ajoh-a ahile, soh pasal ho bangin amanu chu potdoh louding ahi." 
Exodus21:8 Amanu chun a-pakaipa, ama kichenpi dinga jihol pa chu alunglhaisah joulouva ahile, akilhatdoh sah kitding ahi. Amapan amanu chu doha-a aboljeh-a, gamdangmi koma johna ding tha anei louding ahi." 
Exodus21:9 Chule amapan achapa dinga anahol ahileh, amapa chun chanuho bangtah-a abolding ahi." 
Exodus21:10 Chule amapan jichom dang akipuija ahileh; amanu neh le chah, ponsil, chule nupa hina-a athaneina chu asuhlhompeh louding ahi." 
Exodus21:11 Chule aman hicheng thilthumhi amanu chunga abol louva ahileh; amanu dangka ngailouva potdoh jeng ding ahi. 
Exodus21:12 Min mikhat avoh-a, amachu athitah-a ahile, amajong thonlouva thatei ding ahi." 
Exodus21:13 Ahin mikhatnin achanlhih hilouva, Pathen'in amachu akhutna apehdohjoh ahileh; keiman ajamlut nading munkhat kagonpeh ding ahi." 
Exodus21:14 Ahinla mikhat chu ahenasa-a a-inheng chunga achuh-a, doha bola tha agotna ahile; amachu athi teina dinga, ka-maicham'a kona nakaidoh dingu ahi."
