Exodus21:15 Koihileh anuham, apaham vo-a chu tha teiding ahi." 
Exodus21:16 Koihile mihem khat gua, kijoh, ahilouleh akhutna aum petna kimudoh aumle; amachu thonlouva thatei ding ahi." 
Exodus21:17 Koihile anuham, apaham gaosapma chu thonlouva thatei ding ahi." 
Exodus21:18 Chule mi akinah-a, khat chun khatjoh chu songtum ahiloule akhut tuma asuh-a, amachu athilouva, ajalkhuna alupma:" 
Exodus21:19 Ama chu ahung thodoh kitna, atenggol akiphu-a avahle theileh, mivopa chun aphat suhmang man apeh ding, ajendam selding ahi." 
Exodus21:20 Khattouvin asohpa ahilouleh asohnu mola avoh-a, akhut luma alouva ahile; amachun thonlouva talen amat ding ahi." 
Exodus21:21 Amavang nikhat ham, nini ham ahinna ahile, amachun talen amatlou ding ahi; ajehchu amachu adangka man ahi." 
Exodus21:22 Chule pasal le pasal akinah-a, numei naovop asuhkhah lhona, agai ajula, ahia la amanu chu ima atilouva ahile; numeinu inneipun achunga chu adeljat dungjuija talen amatding; chule thutan hon aphatsah dungjuija aditding ahi." 
Exodus21:23 Amavang setna-in ajuikhah tah-a ahileh, nangman hikho khela hikho napehding ahi." 
Exodus21:24 Mit khela mit, ha khela ha, khut khela khut keng khela keng," 
Exodus21:25 Meija kihal meija, maha khela maha, kijep khela kijep napeh ding ahi." 
Exodus21:26 Mikhatnin asohpa mit ahim, asohnu mit ahim abehpeh-a, hichu achot tah-a ahile; amitjeh-a chu ama chamlhat dinga alhadoh ding ahi." 
Exodus21:27 Chule asohpa ha ahim, asohnu ha ahim avohlhoh-a ahile; aha jeh-a ama chu chamlhat dinga alhadoh ding ahi." 
Exodus21:28 Bongchal khatnin pasal ham, numei khat apih-a, amachu athia ahile; bongchal chu thonlouva songa selih teiding ahin, chule asa chu nehlou ding; ahinla bongchal neipa vang chu lha-ong ding ahi." 
Exodus21:29 Ahin chuche bongchal chu masanga jong mipih ngai ahia, aneipa chu kihetsah sa ahitah-a, aman in'a achintup loujeh-a pasal ham numei ham khat atha-a ahileh; bongchal chu songa selih ding, chule aneipa jong tha ding ahi." 
Exodus21:30 Sum joh-a leosah ding chu achunga achuh tah-a ahile; ahinna akichoh dohna dinga chu akitep jat chu apeh ding ahi. 
Exodus21:31 Apih chu chapa hihen chanu hijongleh, hiche thutanna banga hi achunga kibol ding ahi." 
Exodus21:32 Bongchal chun soh pasal ham, soh numei hamkhat apih-a ahileh; bong neipa chun apihpa pakaipa chu dangka shekel somthum apehding, chule bongchal chu selih ding ahi." 
Exodus21:33 Mi khattouvin kotong ahon ham, ahiloule kotong alaija, kotong sinlouva akoija, bongchal ham, Sangan ham khat alhahlut na ahile;" 
Exodus21:34 Kotong neipa chun aman chu aditding, gancha neipa chu sum apeh-a, gancha thi chu ama changding ahi." 
Exodus21:35 Chule mikhat bongchal'in midang khat bongchal asuh khah-a, athia ahile; bongchal ahing nalai chu ajoh lhonding, aman kihom lhonding ahi; chule bongchal thisa jong chu asa kihom lhonding ahi." 
Exodus21:36 Ahilouva chuche bongchal chun masangin jong gancha apihji ti kihesa ahia, aneipan achintup lou ahile; aman thonlouva bongchal khela bongchal apehding; chule athipa vangchu ama chang ding ahi." 
Exodus22:1 Khattouvin bongchal ham, kelngoi ham khat aguh-a, hichu atha ham, ahiloule akijohdoh ham ahile; aman bongchal khat chu bongchal nga-a asahding, chule kelngoi khat chu kelngoi li-a asah ding ahi." 
Exodus22:2 Gucha khatnin in aphet vangpet akimudoh-a, akivohna-a athitah-a ahile, amajeh-a thisan kiso louding ahi." 
Exodus22:3 Chule nisan asokhum tah-a ahile, ama-a dinga thisan kiso ding; aman alhingsetna aditding ahi; itihama imacha aneilouva ahileh, athilguh mana chu ama kijoh ding ahi." 
Exodus22:4 Chule athilguh chu bongchal hihen, sangan hihen, ahiloule kelngoi hihjongle, hichu ahinga akhutna akimudoh-a ahivangle; ajat ni-a aledit ding ahi." 
Exodus22:5 Mi khattouvin louham, lengpilei ham khat anehsah-a, agancha chu alhatlutna, midang lou chu aneh sah-a ahile; alou aphapen tah leh alengpilei phapena chu aditding ahi." 
Exodus22:6 Mei ahung kah-a, linglah akahmatna, changphal setlomsa ham, chang atlhuh loulai ham, ahiloule louham akah mangsoh jeng tah-a ahile; meihal pa chun thonlouva adit teiding ahi." 
Exodus22:7 Mikhatnin a-inhengpa koma dangka ham, nehding ham chin dinga apeh-a, chuche mipa in'a kona chu akiguhmang tah-a; gucha chu akimat doh-a ahile ajatnia asah ding ahi." 
Exodus22:8 Chule gucha chu akimatdoh louva ahile, a-inneipa chu a-inhengpa thilho chunga chu akhut anat anatlou hetna dinga thutan ho henga puiding ahi." 
Exodus22:9 Suhkhelna jouse, bongchal thu hihen, sangan hihen, kelngoi hihen, ponsil hihen, itobang thil mang hijongle, hichu midang khatnin keija ahi tia aseija ahile, alang teni chu thutan ho anga hunglhon ding; chule thutan hon themo achan penpen chun a-inhengpa chu jatni-a asahding ahi." 
Exodus22:10 Mikhatnin a-inhengpa koma asangan ahim, bongchal ahim, kelngoi ahim, gancha poupou achin dinga apehdoh-a; hichu koima mulouva athi ham, akitongkha-a ham, akinomanga ham ahile;" 
Exodus22:11 A-inheng thilkeo chunga kakhut anatpoi ti hetna-a, Pakaiya kihahselna chu akahlah lhona umding; hichu agan neipa jong noma, aman jong hichu aditlou ding ahi." 
Exodus22:12 Ahin hichu akoipa koma kona kigumanga ahivangle, aman aneipa chu aditding ahi." 
Exodus22:13 Hichu akimal tel soh ahi tah-a ahile, aman hichu hettohsahna dingin hinchoi hen, aman akimaltelsa chu aditlou ding ahi." 
Exodus22:14 Mikhatnin a-inhengpa gancha khat chu man dinga alah-a, hichu athi ham, akisukha ham ahile; aman adit teiding ahi." 
Exodus22:15 Ahin aneipa chu akoma um ahivangle, aman adit louding ahi: hichu apa kila ahile, aman peh dinga kithalah ahi-a ahile, akithalah man chutoh kitoh ding ahi." 
Exodus22:16 Mikhatnin nungah mi jihol hiloulai khat alheplhah-a, aluppi-a ahile; amapan amanu chu ajiman ding apeh-a akichenpi teiding ahi." 
Exodus22:17 Amavang nungahnu pa chun ama chutoh akichensah nomlouva ahile, aman nungah theng man dungjuija hichu apeh ding ahi." 
Exodus22:18 Nangman mitphel doi choi chu nahinghoi louding ahi. 
Exodus22:19 Koi hileh ganchatoh lumkhoma chu thatei ding ahi. 
Exodus22:20 Koihile Pakai khatseh heng tilouva, pathen dang pou pou henga ganlhaina bol tapou chu suhmang hel ding ahi." 
Exodus22:21 Nangman kholjin mi na-engbol louding, boljong nabol genthei lou helding ahi: ajehchu nangho jong Egypt gama kholjin nanahiu ahi." 
Exodus22:22 Nanghon meithai tapou le paneilou chapang chu nasuh genthei loudiu ahi. 
Exodus22:23 Nanghon iti ham khatna amaho chu nasuh genthei juva, kahenga ahung ka poupou uva ahileh, keiman akanao chu kangaipeh tei teiding;" 
Exodus22:24 Chule kalung hanna hung soudoh-a, chemjam'a kathagam dingu; chuteng na-inneipi teo chu meithai soh uva, nachateo chu pabei sohgam ding ahiuve." 
Exodus22:25 Nakoma um kamite mivaicha khattou chu sumpa napeh-a ahile, ama-a dinga chu sumthoi lami nabahlou ding, chuleh achunga athoi jong nakoi louding ahi." 
Exodus22:26 Nangman na-inheng ponsil chu abat mana nalah tah-a ahile, nangman nisalhum masanga nalepeh teiding ahi." 
Exodus22:27 Ajehchu hiche bou chu akitomna aneisun ahin, avun dinga ponsil ahi. Ama hoilaija lumding hitam? chule hung hiti ding ahi, kahenga ahung ka teng, keiman kajahpeh ding ahi; ajehchu keima lungset themtah kahi." 
Exodus22:28 Nangman Pathen nahouset louding, namite lah-a vaihomho jong nagaosap louding ahi." 
Exodus22:29 Nangma natheiga min masa holeh nalengpi twiho tohdinga nageisang louding ahi. Nachapa te lah-a apeng masapen chu keima neipeh ding ahi. 
Exodus22:30 Chutobang ma-a chu bongchal ho le nakelngoi ho nabolding: ni sagi apitoh uma; niget nileh keima neipeh ding ahi. 
Exodus22:31 Chule nangho keima dinga mitheng nahidiu ahi: nanghon gamsa hon gama amaltel sao sapou pou naneh louhel dingu; uicha ho naselhah peh dingu ahi. 
Exodus23:1 Nangman jouthu nalhut louding ahi: chonphalou hettohsah hidinga migilouho toh naki khutjop louding ahi. 
Exodus23:2 Thilse bolna dinga mipi chu najui louding; chuleh mipi chun thudih tah chu adihlou sosahna ding agot naova jongchu thu nasei louding ahi. 
Exodus23:3 Ahiloule mivaicha jong achungthu kitan na-a langneina namusah ding ahipoi. 
Exodus23:4 Nangman namelma bongchal ham, sangan ham ava mang namu-a ahileh, thonlouhela ama koma nahin puikit ding ahi." 
Exodus23:5 Nangma vetda mikhat sangan chu apohgih noija opden namu-a, kithopi ding nada-a ahijongle, thonlouva nakithopi ding ahi." 
Exodus23:6 Nangman nami vaicha kiheh na-a adihna chu nahei mangpeh louding ahi. 
Exodus23:7 Jouthu-a konin nangma gamlatah in kikangsen; chule themona neilou le mi kitah chu that hih-in: ajehchu keiman migilou chu them kachansah louding ahi. 
Exodus23:8 Chule nangman nehguh nabol louding ahi: ajehchu nehguh chun michingho mit achot sah-in, michonpha ho thuseidoh chu aheimangjin ahi." 
Exodus23:9 Chujongle nangman kholjin mi nasuh genthei louding ahi: ajehchu nangma Egypt gama kholjin nahi jeh-in, kholjin mi lungthim nahen ahi." 
Exodus23:10 Kumgup sunga nangman nagamsunga muchi natu ding, chule muchi gaho chu nalo khomding ahi." 
Exodus23:11 Ahin kum sagi chana leh, namite lah-a mivaicha hon aneh theina diule, amahon adalhah hou chu gamsa hon aneh theina diuva, nangman gam chu nakicholdo sah-a nakoithim ding ahi. Chutobang ma-a chu nalengpilei le Olive lei jong nabolding ahi." 
Exodus23:12 Nigup sunga nana nakitoh ding, ni sagi channi leh nabongchal leh na sangan acholdo theina dingleh, nasohnu chapa le kholjin jong akitha-ol theina diuva, nacholdo ding ahi." 
Exodus23:13 Nahenga kaseisa thil jouse-a hin nangma chingthei tah-in umin; chule pathen dangho min him him chu phapoh hih-in, nakama konin jong kijadoh hihhen." 
Exodus23:14 Nangman kum khat sunga keima dinga kut thumvei nanit ding ahi. 
Exodus23:15 Nangman cholsolou changlhah kut nanit ding ahi: (Keiman nangman kathupeh banga phat kitepna Abib lha sunga chu cholsolou changlhah nisagi naneh ding ahi; ajehchu chuche lha sung chu Egypt gama kona nahungdoh ahi. Chule koimacha kamasanga khutgoh keova hungkilah louding ahi). 
Exodus23:16 Chule louva natuho natoh gimna ga masapen lholhun kut nanit ding: chule kumlhun na louva kona natoh gimna ga jouse khopkhomna lhosoh khoptup kut nanit ding ahi. 
Exodus23:17 Kumkhat sunga napasal hou jouse Pakai Pathen angsunga thumvei kilahsoh keidiu ahi. 
Exodus23:18 Kahenga kilhaina nabolnao thisan chu chol kiso changlhah toh natotha louding; chule ganna eikilhaina sathao chu jingkah geija umden louding ahi. 
Exodus23:19 Nagamga masaho lah-a aga masapen chu Pakai na-Pathen in'a nahinchoi ding ahi. Nangman kelnou chu api noitwija nahon louding ahi. 
Exodus23:20 Ven, lampia naching dingle keiman kagotpehna munna napuilut dingin namasanga vantil khat kasole." 
Exodus23:21 Ama chunga chingthei jinlang athu ngaijin, chule lunghansah hih-in; ajehchu aman nasuhkhel naho angaidam louding ahi. Ajehchu ama-a chu kamin uma ahi." 
Exodus23:22 Ahin nangman ama thu nangai tahbeh-a, kasei jousehi nabola ahile; namelmaho dinga melma kahiding, nadouho dinga akidoupiu kahiding ahi." 
Exodus23:23 Ajehchu ka vantil na masanga che-a, Ammon miho, Amor miho, Hit miho, Perizz miho, Canaan miho, Hiv miho chule Jebus miho henga chun napuilut ding: chule keiman amaho chu kasatgam ding ahi." 
Exodus23:24 A-pathen hou henga nakun louding, jen jong najen louding, chule athilbol banguva jong nabol louding ahi. Amavang hicheho chu nasuhmang hel ding, chule amilim hou chu nasuhchip sohkei ding ahi." 
Exodus23:25 Chule nanghon Pakai na Pathen'u chu najendiu; aman nachanglhah le natwi phatthei abohding; chule nalah-a kona natna kalahmang ding ahi. 
Exodus23:26 Nagam sunga koimacha ajula leh achinga umloulou ding; keiman nahin nikho hou chu kasuh bulhing peh ding ahi. 
Exodus23:27 Kichat ka umna chu namasanga kasol ding, akomuva nahung nading mi jouse chu kasuh mang ding, chule namelma te ho jouse kanung ngat sah ding nahi." 
Exodus23:28 Chule keiman namasanga khoingal ho kasol ding, hiho chun Hiv mite, Canaan mite, chule Hit mite na-angsunga kona adelmang diu ahi." 
Exodus23:29 Namasanga kona kumkhat sunga kadel mangsoh louding ahi; achuti louleh gamsung chu kamhelin tin, nangma doudinga gamsaho hungpung dingu ahi." 
Exodus23:30 Nangma nahung punna, gam chu nalosoh kahse-a, amaho chu lhomcha cha-a namasanga kona kadelmang ding ahi." 
Exodus23:31 Chule nagamgi chu twipi sana kona Philistine twipi chan, nelphaija kona vadung chana kasem ding ahi: ajehchu keiman chugama chengho chu nakhutna kapehdoh ding; chule nangman amaho chu namasanga kona nadel mang ding ahi." 
Exodus23:32 Nangman amaho le a-pathenhou toh kitepna imacha nasem louding ahi. 
Exodus23:33 Amaho nagam sunga chenglouhel diu ahi; achuti loule amahon keima dounan nachonset sah dingu ahi. Ajehchu nangman a-pathen hou najenna ahile, hichu nangma dinga thang hitei ding ahi." 
Exodus24:1 Chuin aman Mosi henga, Nangma Aaron toh, Nadab toh, Abihu toh, chule upa somsagi toh Pakai hengah hung kaltouvun; chule gamlatah-a konin neihin houvun." 
Exodus24:2 Chule Mosi changseh bouvin Pakai kom ahin nai ding ahi: ahin amahon vang ahin nailou dingu; chule mipi chu amatoh chetou loudiu ahi, ati." 
Exodus24:3 Chuin Mosi ahungin, Pakai thu jouse le thutanna jouse chu mipi aseipeh tan ahi. Chuin mipi chun aw khat tah-in adonbutnun, ajah-a, Pakaiyin thusei ho jouse chu kabol dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus24:4 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai thusei ho jouse chu asunin, jingpi matah in athouvin, lhang noija chun maicham khat le Israel phung somle phung ni dungjuijin khompi somleni aphutnin ahi." 
Exodus24:5 Chuin aman Israel chate lah-a gollhang ho asolin, amahon Pakai henga pumgo thilto atoh-un, chule bongchal khatna chamna thilto ganlhaina abolun ahi." 
Exodus24:6 Chuin Mosi'n thisan akehkhat chu alan, twikong ho-a chun akoijin; chule thisan akehkhat chu maicham chung chu athe khumin ahi." 
Exodus24:7 Chuin aman kitepna lekhabu chu alan, mipi ho jahdin asimdoh-in ahi. Chuin amahon, Pakaiyin asei jouse chu kabol dingu, chule asei kangai dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus24:8 Chuin Mosi'n thisan chu alan mipi ho chu athe khumin, ajah uva, Veuvin, hicheng thuho jouse thudola Pakaiyin thisan kitepna asem hi, ati." 
Exodus24:9 Chujouvin Mosi toh, Aron toh, Nadab toh, Abihu toh, chule Israel upa somsagi toh achetou taovin ahi." 
Exodus24:10 Chuin amahon Israel Pathen chu amuvin: Akengto chotpha chu khi-eng song lhong kisem bangleh, athendan chu van then bangin athengin ahi." 
Exodus24:11 Chuin aman Israel milen milal ho chunga akhut angampon ahi: chujongle amahon Pathen chu amuvin, chule aneovin, adonun ahi." 
Exodus24:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Molsang chunga hin kahenga hungkaltou vinlang, chua chun umin: chule keiman nangma danthu le songpheng hochunga kasut kathupeh chu amaho nahil dinga kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
Exodus24:13 Chuin Mosi le alhacha Joshua chu akipatdoh lhonin; chule Mosi chu Pathen molsanga chun akaltou tan ahi. 
Exodus24:13 Chuin Mosi le alhacha Joshua chu akipatdoh lhonin; chule Mosi chu Pathen molsanga chun akaltou tan ahi. 
Exodus24:14 Chuin aman upa ho henga, Naheng uva kahung kile kahseovin hikoma hin keini eina ngah jingun: chule veuvin, Aaron le Hur nakom uva aumlhone: koihile thunoh nei na-umuleh, amani henga chehen, ati." 
Exodus24:15 Chuin Mosi molsang chunga akaltouvin, chuin molsang chu meilom'in atomchah tan ahi." 
Exodus24:16 Chuin Pakai loupina chu Sinai molsanga chun aumjingin, nigup sung chu meilom'in atomchah-in ahi. Chuin nisagi chanin aman Mosi chu meilom lah-a konchun ahinkouvin ahi." 
Exodus24:17 Chuin molsang chung vuma Pakai loupina chu Israel chate mitmun kavamthei meikong abangin ahi. 
Exodus24:18 Chuin Mosi chu meilom lah-a chun alutnin, molsanga chun akaltou tai. Chuin Mosi chu nisomli le jan somli molsanga chun aumtan ahi." 
Exodus25:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus25:2 Israel chate henga chun keima dingin thilto ahin choina dingun seijin: mitin alungcham tah-a peho-a kona keima dinga thilto chu nalahding ahi. 
Exodus25:3 Chule nangman amaho-a kona thilto nalahding chu hichehi ahi; sana, dangka, sum-eng," 
Exodus25:4 Pat adumloi, asandup loi, asanthip loi, patngat, kelmul," 
Exodus25:5 Kelngoichal vun kidesan, satuilut vun, thinggi thing," 
Exodus25:6 Vahding thao le gimnamtui thaova nuding thil namtui," 
Exodus25:7 Boitong sangkhol le a-ompho chunga behding khisonggel le songho ahi. 
Exodus25:8 Chule amaho lah-a kachenthei nadingin, amahon keima dingin muntheng eisempeh uhen." 
Exodus25:9 Houbuh kigon limleh amanchah ho jouse chu kigon lim kavetsah sa jouse bangtah-a nasah dingu ahi. 
Exodus25:10 Chule amahon thinggi thinga kitepna thingkhong asemdiu: adung tong ni le akeh, avai tong khat le akeh, chule atun chu tong khat le akeh hiding ahi." 
Exodus25:11 Chule nangman hichu sana thengtah-a asungleh apo nalonkhum ding, chule achung kimvela chu sana lallukhuh lim nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus25:12 Chule nangman hiche dinga chu sana chaokol li nalhah ding, chule chuche ningli-a chu hicheho chu nabuding ahin; chaokol ni chu asih lang khat na, chule chaokol ni ma chu asih langkhat na nabuding ahi." 
Exodus25:13 Chule nangman thinggi thing mol lhon ni nalah-a, hichu sana-a nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus25:14 Chule thingkhong chu amahon ajontheina diuva, kitepna thingkhong sih-a chaokol ho sunga chu mol lhon teni chu nagol lutding ahi." 
Exodus25:15 Mol lhon ho chu kitepna thingkhong chaokol ho sunga chu chuti umden ding; hiche teni chu kiladoh louhel ding ahi. 
Exodus25:16 Chule kitepna thingkhong sunga chu kapeh ding hettohsahna chu nakoilut ding ahi. 
Exodus25:17 Chule nangman sana thenga hepi touna nasemding, asao tong ni le akeh, chule avai tongkhat le akeh hiding ahi." 
Exodus25:18 Chule nangman hepi touna mong teni-a chu thih kikhetna-a kikheng sana-a kisem Cherub ni nasem ding ahi. 
Exodus25:19 Chule Cherub khat chu alangkhat monga nasemding, khat chu achom langkhat monga nasemding; hepi touna chunga chu among langto-a Cherub ni nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus25:20 Chule Cherub teni chun sangtah-in alha ajal lhonding, alhaho chun hepi touna chu akhuding, chuleh amailhon chu kingatto gelding; Cherub teni mai chun hepi touna lam chu angat lhon ding ahi." 
Exodus25:21 Chule nangman thingkhong chunga chu hepi touna chu nakoiding; chule thingkhong sunga chu keiman kapeh ding hettohsahna chu nakoiding ahi. 
Exodus25:22 Chule chukoma chu nangma kimutopi ding, Israel chate henga kathupeh ding jouse chu hettohsahna thingkhong chunga um hepi touna chunga Cherub teni kikah-a kona chu kaki houpi ding nahi." 
Exodus25:23 Nangman thinggi thinga dokhang khat nasemding: adung tongni, avai tong khat, atun tong khat le akeh hiding ahi." 
Exodus25:24 Chule hichu sana thenga nalonkhum ding, chule agei kimvela sana lallukhuh lim nasemding ahi." 
Exodus25:25 Chule nangman akimvela chu khutpeh te agei nasemin ding, agei kimvela sana lallukhuh lim nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus25:26 Chule sana chaokol li nasema, akeng li kimvel aning li ho-a chu chaokol hochu nabu ding ahi." 
Exodus25:27 Dokhang jon nading mol lhon khumlutna dinga chaokol ho chu ageichin na nabuding ahi. 
Exodus25:28 Chule thinggi thinga mol lhon nasem ding, hiche teni-a chu dokhang chu akijon theina dinga, sana-a nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus25:29 Chule hiche-a dinga chu akongho, akheho, asinho, chule twikongho nasem ding; chuleh hicheho chu sana thengsela nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus25:30 Chule vetsahna changlhah chu kamasanga dokhang chunga nakoijing ding ahi. 
Exodus25:31 Chule sana thengtah-a thaomei khom khat nasem ding: thaomei khom chu akhetna-a kikhenga nasem ding ahi. Atunna atopal, abahho, alhengho, amumho, chule apahcha ho chengse chu pumkhatna nasemding ahi." 
Exodus25:32 Chule chuche asih langto-a kona chu abah gup hungdoh ding; asih khatna kona thaomei khom abah thumna umding, asih khatna kona chu thaomei khom bah thum ma umding ahi." 
Exodus25:33 Chule abah khatna chun jonmot ga banga kisem lheng thum, apah mun le apah pahlhah umding, chule abah dang khatna jong chu jonmot ga banga kisem lheng thum, apah mun le apah pahlhah umding; chutia chu thaomei khoma kona hungdoh abah gup ho-a chu umcheh ding ahi." 
Exodus25:34 Chule thaomei khoma chu jonmot ga banga kisem lheng li, amum hole apah ho puma umding ahi." 
Exodus25:35 Chule abah chungnung pen teni noija chu aboh khat umding, anina abah teni noija jong chu aboh khat, chule athumna abah ni noija chu aboh khat umding, hitia chu thaomeija kona hungdoh abah gup dungjuija chu umcheh ding ahi." 
Exodus25:36 Akhom ho le abahho chu sana pumkhatna kona kisem, sana thengtah-a kikheng hiding ahi." 
Exodus25:37 Chule hiche-a dinga chu thaomei sagi nasem ding; chule meivah chun amasang chu asalvah theina dinga amahon thaomei chu ahal dingu ahi. 
Exodus25:38 Chule chuche-a achaiche ho le ameivam dolna kongho chu sana thengsela kikheng hiding ahi. 
Exodus25:39 Hicheng um le bel ho jouse hi sana thengsel talent khat toh kikotna agih-a kona semding ahi. 
Exodus25:40 Chule molsang chunga alim kigondan kavetsah bang banga chu nasem nadin chingtheijin. 
Exodus26:1 Chuche kalvala jong nangman houbuh chu tupat ngatsel kilhuh cheh adum, asandup chule asanthip pondal soma nasemding: hicheng chunga chu khut them tah-a Cherub ho lim nasemding ahi." 
Exodus26:2 Pondal khat chu atun tong somni le tong get, chule pondal khatchu avai tong li hiding; chule pondal jouse chu kibang chehdiu ahi." 
Exodus26:3 Pondal nga chu khat le khat kijopmat sah ding; chule pondal dang ngajong chu chutima chu kijop matsah ding ahi. 
Exodus26:4 Akimatna sunga agola kona chu pondal khat geija a-enga abil nasemding, chutobanga chu anina gola aponung pen geija jong nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus26:5 Pondal khatna geija chun abil somnga nasemding, chule pondal ani chana gola aponungpen pondal geija chun abil somnga nasemding, abilho chu khat le khat kikoimat ding ahi." 
Exodus26:6 Chule sana-a ponche chahna somnga nasema, chule pon chechah na ho-a chu pondal ho chu achemat toding: chutengleh houbuh khat hung hiding ahitai." 
Exodus26:7 Chule houbuh chung khuna dinga chu kelmula kisem pondal ho nasemding: pondal somlekhat nasemding ahi. 
Exodus26:8 Pondal khat chu tong somthum cheh saoding; chule pondal khat avaichu tong li cheh hiding: chule pondal somlekhat chu kibang chehdiu ahi. 
Exodus26:9 Chule pondal ngaho chu khatle khat kikoimat ding: chule pondal gupho jongchu khatle khat kikoimat ding: chule houbuh mailam pondal gupna chu thoni hiding ahi. 
Exodus26:10 Chule akil matna ponungpen pondal geija chu abil somnga nasema, chule akoimatna ani channa pondal geija jong abil somnga ma nasemding ahi." 
Exodus26:11 Chule sum-enga ponche chahna somnga nasema, ponche chahna hochu abil ho-a chu nathilding: pon in ahithei na dinga nakoimat sohkei ding ahi." 
Exodus26:12 Pon in'a pondal ho aval chengse, pondal akeh valdoh chengse chu houbuh tomlama kikhaiding ahi." 
Exodus26:13 Chule alang khatna tongkhat, alang chom khatna tong khat, pon in pondal ho adungjuija avaldoh chu, houbuh hilam pang le khulam panga akhudinga kikhai lhato gelding ahilhone." 
Exodus26:14 Chule chuche pon in chung khuna ding chun kelngoichal vunho akide san nasemding, hiche chungvuma achung khuna ding chun satuilut vunho nasemding ahi." 
Exodus26:15 Chule houbuh thingpeh ho chu thinggi thing ading jang keija nasemding ahi. 
Exodus26:16 Thingpeh khat chu adung tong som, chule thingpeh khat chu availam tong khat le akeh hiding ahi." 
Exodus26:17 Thingpeh khat cheh-a chu butonako dinga aki-at kot ni cheh umding: chutia chu houbuh thingpeh jouse chu nasemding ahi. 
Exodus26:18 Chule nangman thingpeh somni chu lhanglama pangdinga, houbuh thingpeh ho nasemding ahi." 
Exodus26:19 Chule thingpeh somni ho noija chun dangka khombul butona ding ko somli nasemding; thingpeh khat noija butonako ni dingin khombul kigeitong ni, chule thingpeh chom dang noija butona ko hidingin khombul kigeitong ni ma nasem kitding ahi." 
Exodus26:20 Houbuh pang ani chana sahlam panga chu thingpeh somni hiding ahi. 
Exodus26:21 Chule dangka khombul kigeitong somli ho, thingpeh khat noija khombul butona ko ni, chule thingpeh chomdang khat noija khombul butonako ni cheh nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus26:22 Chule houbuh tomlama, lhumlam sanga chu thingpeh gup nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus26:23 Chule houbuh tomlam aning ni-a dinga thingpeh ni nasemding ahi. 
Exodus26:24 Chule hiteni chu anoilama chu kithokop lhonding, chule achunglama chu achina thih chaokol khatna tuhmat hiding ahi. Chutia chu anigel lhona dinga chu chutiding; hiteni chu aning teni-a ding hiding ahi." 
Exodus26:25 Hitia chu thingpeh getna chu sana butonako ho, thingpeh khat noija chu abutona ko ni, adang thingpeh noija jong chu nima abona somlegup umding ahi." 
Exodus26:26 Chule thinggi thinga banggol ho nasem ding; houbuh pang langkhatna thingpeh ho-a ding chu banggol nga," 
Exodus26:27 Chule houbuh pang langkhatna thingpehho dinga chu banggol ngama; chule lhanglam houbuh tomlama thingpeh ho dingin banggol ngama nasemding ahi. 
Exodus26:28 Chule thingpeh ho lah-a akima banggol chu among khatna pat among langkhat geija kigolpai ding ahi. 
Exodus26:29 Chule thingpeh ho chu sana-a nalonkhum ding, abangolho thunlutna dinga chu chaokol nasemding: chule abanggol jong chu sana-a nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus26:30 Chule houbuh chu molsang chunga nakimusah lim bang banga chu nasah ding ahi. 
Exodus26:31 Chule pondala dinga pat adum, asandup, asanthip, chule tupat ngatsel akilhuh-a kikhong nasemding: chule Cherub limho chu khut them tah-a nasemding ahi." 
Exodus26:32 Chule sana kilonkhum dangka khombul ho-a kiphut thinggi thing khom li chunga chu nakhai ding; koikaho chu sana hiding, dangka-a kisem butonako li chunga chu kibut ding ahi." 
Exodus26:33 Chule hettohsahna thingkhong chu pondal sunga napohlut theina dinga, pondal chu pon chechahna ho noija chu nakhai ding, chule pondal chun munthengle muntheng chungnung chu nahopkhen pehding ahi." 
Exodus26:34 Chule muntheng chungnung sunga chu hepi touna chu hettohsahna thingkhong chunga nakoiding ahi. 
Exodus26:35 Chule pondal polama chu dokhang chu nakoiding, chule meivah khom chu dokhang jon, houbuh pang lhanglam sanga nakoiding: chule dokhang chu sahlam sanga nakoiding ahi." 
Exodus26:36 Chule houbuh kotna dinga chu ponjal adumloi, asandup, asanthip, chule tupat ngatsel kilhuh-a kikhong, heova kijemhoiho chu kikhai ding ahi." 
Exodus26:37 Chule akikhai nading chu thinggi thinga khom nga nasemding, chule sana nalonkhum ding, akoika hojong chu sana kisem hiding ahi. Chule hicheho dinga chu sum-enga khombul butonako nga nalhah ding ahi." 
Exodus27:1 Chule thinggi thinga kisem maicham khat nasemding, hichu adung tong nga, avai tong nga hiding; chule maicham chu aningli kibang hiding: chule asan tong thum hiding ahi." 
Exodus27:2 Chule aning li ho chunga chu akiho nasemding, akiho chu kithakhat ding; chule hichu sum-enga nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus27:3 Chule avutvam ho dona ding kongho nasemding, vut lona kheho, akongtong, asakoika ho, chule achaiche ho jong, hiche um le bel ho jouse chu sum-enga nasemding ahi." 
Exodus27:4 Chule hicheng ding chu sum-eng kiphan len nasemding; chule len chunga aning liho-a chu sum-eng chaokol nabuding ahi. 
Exodus27:5 Len chun maicham noilam gei ahin phahna dinga, len chun maicham kim aphah ding ahi." 
Exodus27:6 Chule maicham putna dinga chu mol lhon, thinggi thing mol lhon nasemding; chule hiho chu sum-enga nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus27:7 Chule mol lhon hochu chaokol hom sunga chu nathil lut ding, chule aputna dinga maicham langto-a mol lhon chu umding ahi." 
Exodus27:8 Thingpeh hochu alai homa nasemding: molsang chunga nakimusah banga chu asem dingu ahi. 
Exodus27:9 Chule houbuh hong sung nasemding: lhanglam panga hongsung dinga chu tupat ngatsel kilhuhkop, langkhat pang dinga tong jakhat sao ponjal kikhai ding ahi." 
Exodus27:10 Chule akhom somni chule khom butona koho somni chu sum-eng hiding: akhom koikaho le agol laiho chu dangka kilonkhumsah hiding ahi. 
Exodus27:11 Chutobang machu sahlamsanga dinga adung tong jakhat sao kikhai pondal le khom somni, chule sum-eng khom butona koho somni umding ahi. Akhom koikaho le agol laiho chu dangka kilonkhum hiding ahiuve." 
Exodus27:12 Chule lhumlam sang hongsung availam ding akikhai pondal kikhai tong somnga hiding: akhom som le khom bul butona ko som hiding ahi. 
Exodus27:13 Chule solama um hongsung availam solamsang chu tong somnga hiding ahi. 
Exodus27:14 Kotpi sihlang khatna pondal kikhai chu tong somlenga hiding, chule akhom thumtoh akhombul butona ko thum toh hiding ahi." 
Exodus27:15 Chule asih chomlang khatna chu pondal kikhai tong somlenga umding: akhomho thumtoh akhombul butona ko thumtoh umdiu ahi. 
Exodus27:16 Chule ahongsung kotpi dinga chu pondal kikhai tong somni, adum, asandup, asanthip, tupat ngatsela kilhuh khutthem tah-a kijemho chu kidah ding ahi. Akhomho chu li hiding, akhombul butona ko chu li ma hiding ahi." 
Exodus27:17 Ahongsung kimvela khomho jouse chu dangka kilonkhum hicheh ding, akoikaho chu dangka-a kisem hiding; chule akhombul butonaho chu sum-eng hidiu ahi." 
Exodus27:18 Ahongsung chu adung tong jakhat, availam chu tong somnga, chule asan ngatsela kikhuh kopma kikhong tupat pon chu tong nga hiding; chule akhombul butonako hochu sum-eng hiding ahi." 
Exodus27:19 Houbuh kinbolna jouse-a kongle bel ho jouse le athil kilnaho jouse, chule hongsung kilna ho jouse chu sum-eng hiding ahi." 
Exodus27:20 Chule thaomei chu avahjing theina dinga, Israel chate chun olive thaochim kiheh lha nahenga ahinchoi jingna dinguva nathupeh ding ahi." 
Exodus27:21 Mipi kikhopna houbuh hettohsahna masanga pondal polama chu Aaron le achapate chun Pakai angsunga nilhah-a pat jingkah changeija avet tup dingu ahi. Israel chate thalhenga akhang lhumkei juva chona dan hiding ahi. 
Exodus28:1 Chule Israel chate lah-a konin nasopipa Aaron le akoma um achapate chun thempu tohmuna eijen theina dingun, Aaron le chapate Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar chule Ithamar chu nakoma lhengdoh-in." 
Exodus28:2 Chule nasopipa Aaron loupina le vet hoina dinga vontheng nagon pehding ahi. 
Exodus28:3 Chule alungthim them le chihna lhagaova kadip dimho jouse henga chun nangman thu seijin lang, Aaron chun thempu tohmuna chu keima eijen theina dinga suhthenga aum theina dingin avonho chu sempeh uhen." 
Exodus28:4 Chule amahon asemdiu vonho chu: ompho, boitong sangkhol, sangkhol len, akijempah delkop, konggah hiding; hitia chu amahon thempu tohmuna keima eijentheina diuva, amahon Aaron le achapatea dinga vontheng ho asempeh dingu ahi." 
Exodus28:5 Chule amahon sana, pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat naljet amandiu ahi." 
Exodus28:6 Chule amahon sana le pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat naljetna boitong sangkhol chu khut themtah-a asemdiu ahi." 
Exodus28:7 Akijopmat theina dinga chu alengkou teni chunga agenhon kikilmatna aneiding ahi. 
Exodus28:8 Chule boitong sangkhol chunga um akijempah konggah jong chu thakhat hiding; sana, pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat naljetna akisem hiding ahi." 
Exodus28:9 Chule khisonggel ni nalah-a achunga chu Israel chate min nasutding ahi. 
Exodus28:10 Aminu gup chu songkhat chunga chu nasutna, adang minchom gup chu apendolu dungjuija songchom chunga chu nasutding ahi." 
Exodus28:11 Min kitana mohor chunga songkheng themin akhenji banga, songpheng teni-a chu Israel chate minho nakhet ding: hiho chu sana jemho-a nasemdoh ding ahi." 
Exodus28:12 Chule Israel chate dinga hetjingna songho hidinga, chuche song teni chu boitong sangkhol lengkoupeh teni-a chu nakoiding; chule Aaron'in hetjingna dinga alengkou teni chunga minho chu Pakai masanga apohjing ding ahi." 
Exodus28:13 Chule nangman sana jemkoho semin," 
Exodus28:14 Chule nangman sana chaokol thengtah jangni pahvui kithil banga nasema, jemkoho-a chu nahenchah ding ahi." 
Exodus28:15 Chule thutana ompho khut themtah-a nasem ding: boitong sangkhol kisem bang banga sana, pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat naljetna nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus28:16 Aning li kibanga atho-a kilhep ding; adung khapkhat, avai khapkhat ma hiding ahi." 
Exodus28:17 Chule chua chu song buding ho chu nabuding; song chu gol li-a nabuding ahi. Agol masa chu songsan, song-eng, chule song santhip hiding: hichu agol masa hiding ahi." 
Exodus28:18 Chule agol nina chu song engsel, song dumjet, chule song mantam hidiu ahi." 
Exodus28:19 Chule agolthum na chu song sandang, song vom, chule song sandup hiding ahi." 
Exodus28:20 Chule agol lina chu song engdum, khisonggel, chule khi song pol hiding ahi. Hiho chu akiphunao muncheh-a sana lonkhumcheh ding ahi." 
Exodus28:21 Chule song ho chu Israel chate dungjuija, amin dungjui cheh uva somleni hiding: mohor kikheng ho banga phung som le phungni dungjuija khatcheh chu amintoh umcheh ding ahi." 
Exodus28:22 Chule ompho chunga chu sana chaokol thengtah pahvui kithil banga sana sumgui nasemding ahi. 
Exodus28:23 Chule ompho chunga chu sana chaokol ni nasema, chaokol teni chu ompho ning teni-a chu nabuding ahi." 
Exodus28:24 Chule pahvui banga kisem sana sumgui teni chu ompho ning gela um thih chaokol sunga chu thillut ding ahi. 
Exodus28:25 Chule pahvui banga kisem thih chaokol mong teni chu jemko ni-a chu nahetlut ding, boitong sangkhol lengkou anglam sanga chu nakhichah ding ahi." 
Exodus28:26 Chule sana chaokol ni nasema, hichu boitong sangkhol bantah-a, asungnung geija ompho ning teni-a chu nabuding ahi." 
Exodus28:27 Chule sana chaokol chomdang ni nasemding, boitong sangkhol lengkou teni noilamsang, amasanglam, atho-a kilhepna noi, boitong sangkhol khut kijempah-a konggah chung laitah-a chu nabuding ahi." 
Exodus28:28 Chule amahon ompho chaokol ho le boitong sangkhol chaokol ho chu amahon patdum kipheh khatna akan matdiu, hiche chu phatah-a kipheh boitong sangkhol konggah chunga aumtheina ding le boitong sangkhola kona chu akikan louna dinga ahi." 
Exodus28:29 Chule Aaron chun Pakai masanga hetjingna dinga munthenga chu achelut seh a-op phang dontah-a Israel chate min kijihna thutana ompho chu tantih neilouva apoh jingding ahi. 
Exodus28:30 Chule nangman Urim le Thummim chu thutana ompho sunga chu nakoilut ding, chule Aaron Pakai anga ache tengle hichu alungchang dontah-a umding ahi. Hitia chu Aaron'in Israel chate thutana chu alung chung dontah-a imatih chana Pakai anga apohding ahi." 
Exodus28:31 Chule nanghon chuche boitong sangkhol chol chu adum jenga nasem dingu ahi. 
Exodus28:32 Chule hichu achung le alai dona ahom khat umding; chule ahom kimvela chu a-eh louna dinga akhichahna tupat sangkhol ponung ngong khina khaokipheh detchet umding ahi. 
Exodus28:33 Chule chuche geiho-a chu adum, asandup, asanthipma kolbuthei ho nasemding: chule akahho kimvela sana changeng ho nakhai ding ahi." 
Exodus28:34 Sangkhol len gei kimvela chu sana changeng le kolbutheiga, sana changeng le kolbutheiga nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus28:35 Hichu kinbolna dinga Aaron'in akivon ding; chule athi louna dinga, Pakai anga munthenga alutle apotle tengle agin kija ding ahi." 
Exodus28:36 Chule sana thengsela kong khat nasemding, achunga chun mohor kikhen banga PAKAIYA DINGA ATHENG tia nakhet ding ahi." 
Exodus28:37 Chule hichu delkop chunga aumtheina dinga patkhao dum khatna nabuding: hichu delkop masang jontah-a chu umding ahi. 
Exodus28:38 Chule Aaron'in Israel chaten athiltheng tohouva athensona diu akhan gitlouna hou chu apoh nadinga hichu Aaron chalpanga umding ahi. Chule amaho chu Pakai anga san ahitheina dinguva hichu achalpanga apoh jingding ahi. 
Exodus28:39 Chule tupat ngatsela sangkhol chol chungnung chu khut themtah-a najep hoi ding, tupat ngatsela delkop nasemding, chule konggah chu hoitah-a nakhui ding ahi." 
Exodus28:40 Chule Aaron chapate dinga loupina ding le hoina dinga sangkhol sungnung nasema, amaho dinga konggah ho nasemding, chule delkop ho jong nasem ding ahi." 
Exodus28:41 Chule hicheho chu nasopipa Aaron le aumpi achapate navonpeh ding; chule amaho chun kamasanga thempu tohmuna keima eijentheina diuva thao nanu-a nasuhtheng ding, chule nachom khending ahi." 
Exodus28:42 Chule asagoh-u khukhumna dingin amaho chu tupat pon tokaho nasempeh ding; hichu akonga pat apheigei lhungding ahi. 
Exodus28:43 Chule hichu Aaron le achapaten houbuh ahunglut phatnu ham, ahiloule munthenga lhacha dinga maicham ahinnai phatnu ham tengule, khangit louna apoh uva athi louna dinguva achen chehdiu ahi. Hichu amale anunga achilhah channa jong a-itih-a dinga chonna dan kisun hiding ahi." 
Exodus29:1 Thempu tohmuna eijen theina diuva suhtheng ahina diuva amaho chunga nabolding chu hiche hi ahi: nolna beihel bongchalgol khat le kelngoichal ni nalah ding," 
Exodus29:2 Chule cholsolou changlhah, thao toh kihal cholsolou changlhah le changlhah lum, chule thao toh kihal changlhah pheng nalah ding; hicheho chu suhlou changbong nelsela nasemding ahi." 
Exodus29:3 Hicheng chu nangman pocha sung khatna nakhol khoma, pocha puma nahin todoh ding; chule bongchal le kelngoichal teni jong chu nahin kailut paipai ding ahi." 
Exodus29:4 Chule Aaron le achapate chu houbuh mun'a chu nahinpuija, twija nakisil sah ding ahi." 
Exodus29:5 Chuteng le vonho chu nalah-a, Aaron chu boitong sangkhol leh pon sangkholen, boitong sangkhol le ompho chu navonpeh ding: chule khut themtah-a kijempah boitong sangkhol khaigahna-a chu akong nagehpeh ding ahi." 
Exodus29:6 Chule aluchanga chun delkop nakop peh-a, lukhuh theng chu delkop chunga chu nakhuhsah ding ahi." 
Exodus29:7 Chuteng nuding thao chu nalah ding, alu chunga nalhei lhah-a, amachu thao nanuding ahi." 
Exodus29:8 Chule achapate chu hinpuilut nahin puilut ding, sangkhol chol chungnung na-ah peh ding ahi." 
Exodus29:9 Chule Aaron le achapate chu konggah ho nageh peh-a, delkop nakoppeh ding: chule thempu tohmun chu amahoa dinga a-itih-a chonna dan khatna umding ahitai. Chule nangman Aaron le achapate chu nathenso ding ahi." 
Exodus29:10 Chule bongchal chu houkhom ho houbuh masanga nahin kailut sah ding; chule Aaron le achapaten bongchal luchunga chu akhutnu angapdiu ahi. 
Exodus29:11 Chule houkhom ho houbuh kotphung Pakai angsunga chu bongchal chu nathading ahi. 
Exodus29:12 Chule bongchal thisan chu nalah-a, nakhut junga maicham sakiho chunga chu nakoiding; chule thisan jouse chu maicham bula chu nasunlhah ding ahi." 
Exodus29:13 Chule asunga beh athao jouse nalah-a, athin chunga athaolom, akalteni chule achunga thao ho chu maicham chunga nahalding ahi." 
Exodus29:14 Ahin chuche bongchal saphe le avun, chule a-eh chu gebuh polama meija nagovam ding ahi. Hichu chonset thilto ahi." 
Exodus29:15 Chule kelngoichal chu nalah-a, Aaron le achapate chun kelngoichal luchanga chu akhutnu angapdiu ahi." 
Exodus29:16 Chule kelngoichal chu nathading, chule athisan chu nalah-a maicham chung kimvel chu nathekhum ding ahi." 
Exodus29:17 Chule kelngoichal chu ahal ahalla nasem nonga, asung ho le akeng ho chu nasopding, ahal hala asa semnong sa le alu chutoh nakoitha ding ahi." 
Exodus29:18 Chule kelngoichal chu apumpia maicham chunga nagoding ahi. Hichu Pakai dinga govam thilto ahin; hichu Pakaiya dinga meija kisem thilto, gimnamtui tah chu ahi." 
Exodus29:19 Chule kelngoichal dang khat chu nalah-a, Aaron le achapate chun kelngoichal luchanga chu akhutnu angapdiu ahi." 
Exodus29:20 Chuteng nangman kelngoichal chu natha ding, chule athi chu nalah-a Aaron jetlam bilkol monga, achate jetlam bilkol monga, akhut jetlamu khutpi chung, chule akeng jetlamu kengpi chunga chun nanuding, chule athisan chu maicham kimvela nathe ding ahi." 
Exodus29:21 Chule maicham chunga um thisan le kinuding thao chu nalah-a, Aaron chung, avon chung, achate chung, aumpi achate von chunga nathekhum ding; chuteng amajong, avonjong, achate jong, chule aumpi achate von jong chu thengding ahi." 
Exodus29:22 Nangman Kelngoichal thao le ameithao, asunga kai athaoho, ala kimvela athao le akalteni tom athao, chule alengkou jetlama chu nalah ding ahi; ajehchu kelngoichal chu ganlhaina dia kipesa ahi." 
Exodus29:23 Chule Pakai angsunga um changlhah lum khat, thaova kikang changlhah khat, pocha sunga kon cholsolou changlhah kikang peh khat nalah ding:" 
Exodus29:24 Aaron le achate khutna aboncha nakoiding; chule Pakai angsunga jap thilto-a dinga najap ding ahi. 
Exodus29:25 Chule hichu nangman amaho khutna kona chu nalah-a, Pakai angsunga gimnamtui tah hidinga maicham chunga chu nago ding ahi: hichu Pakaiya dinga meija kisem thilto ahi." 
Exodus29:26 Chule Aaron'in kipehthenga atodohsa kelngoi om chu nalah-a, Pakai angsunga jap thilto-a dinga najap ding ahi: chule hiche chu nang chan hiding ahi." 
Exodus29:27 Chule Aaron'a ding le achate-a dinga kithensona kelngoija kona chu jap thilto a-om le, thilto adah bul chu nathenso ding; hichu jap thilto le dop thilto ahi." 
Exodus29:28 Hichu Israel chate-a kona tonsot chondan dinga Aaron le achapate chan hiding ahi. Ajehchu dop thilto ahin: chule hichu Israel chaten Pakaiya dinga adop thiltou, achamna thiltou ganlhaina-a kona dop thilto dingu chu ahi." 
Exodus29:29 Chule hichea chu thao akinu uva chule akipehtheng nadinguva, Aaron vontheng hochu ama nungteng achate-a hiding ahi." 
Exodus29:30 Chule acha ama khela thempu-a pangpa chun muntheng mun'a natong dinga houkhom na houbuh-a mun'a chu ahung tengleh, vonho chu nisagi akivon ding ahi." 
Exodus29:31 Chule kipeh thengna kelngoi chu nangin nalah-a, chule apheho chu munthenga chu nahon ding ahi." 
Exodus29:32 Chule Aaron le achapaten kelngoi sa chu pocha sunga kikoi changlhah chutoh, houbuhho houbuh kot koma chu anehdiu ahi." 
Exodus29:33 Chule amahon longlhenna kibolho chu akipehtheng nadiu le akisuhtheng nadiuva anehdiu: amavang thiltheng ahijeh-a, gamdang mi vang anehsah loudiu ahi." 
Exodus29:34 Ijemtia kipeh thengna saphe le changlhah chu jingkah geija aval aumle, nangman hicheho chu meija nahalvam ding ahi: ajehchu atheng ahi jeh-a nehlou ding ahi." 
Exodus29:35 Chule keiman kathupeh banga nangman Aaron le achapate chunga nabol ding ahi: nisagi sung amaho dinga kipeh thengna nabolpeh ding ahi. 
Exodus29:36 Chule nangnam niseh le longlhen na-a dinga chonset thilto-a bongchal khat natoding: chule nangman hiche-a dinga chu longlhena naboljou tengle maicham chu nasop thengding; chule suhthengna dinga thao nanu ding ahi. 
Exodus29:37 Nangman ni sagi sunga maichama dinga longlhenna nabola chule nasuhtheng ding; chutengle maicham thengchung nung hiding ahitai: ipi hijongle maicham tongkha chanchu thengjeng ding ahi. 
Exodus29:38 Tun maichama natoding chu hiche hi ahi: kum khat lhingbep kelngoi ni niseh-a nato ding ahi. 
Exodus29:39 Kelngoi khat chu jingkah lamleh natoding; chule kelngoi dang khat chu nilhah lamle natoding ahi. 
Exodus29:40 Chule kelngoi khat dinga chu changbong neljet ephah hopsom-a hopkhat le thao kihehdoh hin khat hopli hopkhat hiding; chule don thilto-a dinga lengpitwi hin hopli-a hopkhat hiding ahi. 
Exodus29:41 Chule kelngoi khat jopa chu nilhah lamle natoding, chule jingkah-a anneh thilto kitoh bang le don thilto kitoh banga Pakaiya dinga meija kisem thilto, gimnamtui tah hidinga nato ding ahi." 
Exodus29:42 Hiche hi nangma kihoupi dinga kakimuto pina ding mun Pakai angsunga houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga nakhang khanguva dinga tanglouva govam thilto kiboljing chu hiding ahi. 
Exodus29:43 Chule hiche mun'a chu Israel chatetoh kakimuto ding, chule houbuh chu kaloupi na-a suhthenga umding ahi." 
Exodus29:44 Chule keiman houkhom ho houbuh le maicham chu kasuhtheng ding: chujongle Aaron le achapate chu thempu natohna mun'a keima lhacha natong dinga kasuhtheng ding ahi. 
Exodus29:45 Chule keima Israel chate lah-a kachena, chule a-Pathen'u kahiding ahi." 
Exodus29:46 Chule amahon amaho lah-a kachen theina dinga, Egypt gama kona amaho hinpui dohpa, Pakai a-Pathen'u kahi ahet dingu ahi: keima Pakai a-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Exodus30:1 Chule nangman gimnamtui halna maicham nasem ding: hichu nangman thinggi thinga nasemding ahi. 
Exodus30:2 Hichu adung tongkhat chule avai tong khat hiding; aningli hiding, chule atun tongni hiding, akijong hitobangma chu sangding ahi." 
Exodus30:3 Chule nangman achungvum, avel pumpi-a, chule akiho chu sana-a natomding; chule nangman akimvel chu sana lallukhuh-a nasemding ahi." 
Exodus30:4 Chule nangman sana chaokol ni lallukhuh lim noija chun nasemding, aningtenia jong, apangtenia jong, chule hicheho chu amoljolho kithilna hiding ahi." 
Exodus30:5 Chule nangman amoljolho chu thinggi thinga nasema, sana-a nalonkhum ding ahi." 
Exodus30:6 Chule nangman hichu kakimutopi nading mun, hettohsahna thingkhong kom, hepi touna maija, hiche pondal maija chu nakoiding ahi." 
Exodus30:7 Chule Aaron'in hikoma chu jingkah sehleh gimnamtui ahalding; thaomei avahjou tengle, achunga gimnamtui ahalding ahi." 
Exodus30:8 Chule Aaron'in nilhah lama thaomei avahteng le gimnamtui chu ahalding, nakhang lhumkei uva Pakai masanga gimnamtui kihal hiding ahi." 
Exodus30:9 Nangman hiche chunga chu gimnamtui chomdang khat nahal lou ding, govam thilto, anneh thilto jong nato louding, chule achunga don thilto jong nasunlhah louding ahi." 
Exodus30:10 Chule longlhena chonset thilto-a chu Aaron'in kumkhat le saki chunga chu longlhenna khatvei abolding; akhang akhanga chu kumkhatna khatvei hiche chunga chu longlhenna abolding ahi: hichu Pakaiya dinga atheng chungnung ahi. 
Exodus30:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus30:12 Nangman Israel chate chu ajatnu hetna dinga aminu nasim tengle, nangman nasim tengu le alah uva hise aumlouna dinga; ajatnu nasim dungjuija amitakipmin amading cheh-a Pakai henga ahinna man dingu apeh cheh dingu ahi." 
Exodus30:13 Apeh dingu chu hichehi ahi, akisim sahho lah-a lutding jouse chun muntheng shekel dungjuija shekel kehkhat cheh apehdiu ahi: (shekel khat chu gerah somni ahi:) Shekel keh chu Pakaiya thilto hiding ahi." 
Exodus30:14 Akisim saho lah-a lutding jouse, kum somni apat chunglang sechun Pakaiya dinga thilto apeh cheh dingu ahi." 
Exodus30:15 Nahinna longlhenna dinga Pakai koma thilto abol tengule, ahaovin jong shekel kehval apehlou ding, chule avaijin jong shekel keh lhinglou apehlou ding ahi." 
Exodus30:16 Chule nangman Israelte longlhenna sum chu nalahding, hichu houkhomna houbuh natohna-a naman ding ahi; hichu nahinnao longlhenna bolna dinga, Pakai angsung Israel chatea dinga melchihna hiding ahi." 
Exodus30:17 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus30:18 Nangman kisilnading sum-enga kisem, akeng jongchu sum-eng hiding, twidol khat nasem ding ahi: chule hichu houkhom ho houbuh le maicham kah-a nakoija, chule asunga twi nakoi ding ahi." 
Exodus30:19 Ajehchu hichea chu Aaron le achapaten akhut akeng akisilngim ji dingu ahi: 
Exodus30:20 Amaho mipi houkhom na houbuh sunga alut tengule, ahiloule Pakaiya dinga meija kisem thilto hal dinga maichama ahung tengule; athilouna dinguva chu akhut akeng akisildiu ahi." 
Exodus30:21 Hitia chu athi louna dinguva akhut akengu akisildiu: chule hichu akhang khanguva a-itih-a dinga ama le achate-a dinga tonsot chondan hijing ding ahitai. 
Exodus30:22 Chukalvalin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus30:23 Nangman gimnamtui loupiho, myrrh thengtah-a kisem shekel janga, chule thingthal namtui tah-a kisem shekel jani leh somnga, chule kolchu lhum shekel jani le somnga jong," 
Exodus30:24 Chule munthenga shekel dungjuijin halnamtui shekel janga, chule olive thao hin khat nahenga lan." 
Exodus30:25 Chule nangman hicheho-a chu lou sem themho sem banga thaotheng nasem ding; hichu kinuding thao theng hiding ahi. 
Exodus30:26 Chule nangman hichea chu houkhom ho houbuh le hettohsahna thingkhong chu thao nanu ding ahi. 
Exodus30:27 Chule dokhang le akong le bel jouse, athaomei khomle avahna lhengho, chule gimnamtui halna maicham," 
Exodus30:28 Chule govam thiltona maicham le akong le bel jouse, chule sum-eng twidol le akhomjong hiche thao chu nanu ding ahi." 
Exodus30:29 Chule theng chungnung ahina dinguva nangman nasuhtheng ding; chule hicheho atongkha jouse atheng hiding ahi. 
Exodus30:30 Chule amaho thempu mun'a kalhacha na atoh theina dinguva, Aaron le achapate jong chu thao nanu-a nasuh theng ding ahi." 
Exodus30:31 Chule nangman Israel chate koma hitia naseiding ahi, Hichehi nakhang khanguva keima-a dinga kinu ding thao theng ahitai." 
Exodus30:32 Hichehi mihem tahsaphe chunga nasunlhah loudiu, ahiloule hitobanga kihal thao tobang hi adang jong nasemlou dingu ahi: atheng ahin, nangho-a dinga atheng hiding ahi." 
Exodus30:33 Koi hijongle hiche tobanga kihal thao sema, ahiloule hetlou mi chunga sunglha-a aumleh, amachu amite lah-a kona kipaidoh ding ahi." 
Exodus30:34 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, Nangman gimnamtui ho, thingnai, ngavun namtui, ankam namtui; hicheho tohin bego thengtah agih danu kibang chetnin lan." 
Exodus30:35 Chule nangman lou semhon phatah-a asem bangun, phatechan ngimsel le thengselin gimnamtui semin." 
Exodus30:36 Chule nangman phabep chu navoh bongselin lang, nangma kakimutopi nading mun, houkhom ho houbuh sunga hettohsahna masanga chun koijin: hichu nangma dinga theng chungnung hiding ahi." 
Exodus30:37 Chule hiche gimnamtui nasem banga chu, nangman nangma-a dinga hitobanga kihal gimnamtui nasem louding ahi: hichu nangma-a dinga Pakaiya atheng ahi." 
Exodus30:38 Koi hijongleh manchah dinga hitobang thao chu asema aumle, amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Exodus31:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus31:2 Ven Keiman Judah phunga kon Uri chapa, Hur chapa, Bezalel chu aminin kakouve;" 
Exodus31:3 Chule amachu chihna-in, hetna-in, lungthimin, chule tohna dan jouse-a Pathen lhagaova kadimsah-in," 
Exodus31:4 Khut them natoh ho hichu sana, dangka, chule sum-eng," 
Exodus31:5 Song tanboh le settoh, thingpeh vutoh, chule khut them natoh jouse tongdingin." 
Exodus31:6 Chule ven, Dan phunga kon Ahisamach chapa Aholiab chu ahenga kapetai. Chule keiman nangma kapeh thupeh jouse chu amahon aboltheina dingun miching jouse lungsunga chihna kakoipehtan ahi." 
Exodus31:7 Houkhom ho houbuh le hettohsahna thingkhong, chule hiche chunga um hepi touna le houbuh manchah jouse chu," 
Exodus31:8 Chule dokhang le amanchah jouse, thaomei khom tuna theng le amanchah jouse, chule gimnamtui halna maicham," 
Exodus31:9 Chule govam thiltona maicham le amanchah jouse, twidol le akeng," 
Exodus31:10 Lhacha natohna ponho, Aaron thempu von thengho, thempuho natohna mun'a akivondiu achate von," 
Exodus31:11 Chule nuding thao le munthenga dinga gimnamtui: hicheho jouse hi keiman thu kapeh jouse dungjuija amahon aboldingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus31:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus31:13 Nangman Israel chate jah-a jong hitihin seijin, Tahbeh-a nanghon kacholngah nikhoho nanit dingu ahi: ajehchu nanghon keimahi nasutheng uva Pakai kahi ti nahettheina dinguva; hichu nakhangu lhumkeija keima le nangho kikah-a melchihna hiding ahi." 
Exodus31:14 Hijeh-a chu nanghon Sabbath nanitdiu ahi; ajehchu hichu nangho dinga atheng ahi. Koi hijongleh asuboh chanchu kithat ding ahi: ajehchu chuche nikho-a natonga tapou chu, hiche hinna chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Exodus31:15 Nigup sunga na natohdiu ahin, ni sagi ni vang chu choldo nadinga cholngahni, Pakaiya dinga atheng ahi: koi hijongle cholngah nikho-a natoh kiti tapou tonga chu thatei ding ahi." 
Exodus31:16 Hijeh-a chu Israel chaten kumkho-a kitepna hidinga akhang khanguva cholngah nikho chu anit theina dinguva, cholngahni chu anit dingu ahi." 
Exodus31:17 Hichu a-itih-a dinga keima le Israelte kikah-a melchihna hiding ahi: ajehchu nigup sungin Pakaiyin van le lei asemin, chule nisagi nin akicholdon, akitha-olin ahi." 
Exodus31:18 Chuin Sinai molsang chunga akihoupi jou phatchun, aman Mosi henga hettohsahna songpheng ni, Pathen khutna kisun songpheng chu apetan ahi." 
Exodus32:1 Chuin mipi chun Mosi molsanga kona ahung kumlhah vahlou amu phatnun, mipi chu Aaron koma ahung kikhom khomun, ahenga, Kipatdoh-in, keiho masanga che dingin pathenho neisem peh-un: ajehchu Egypt gama kona eihin puidoh uva hiche Mosi hi iti hitam kahe tapouve, atiuvin ahi." 
Exodus32:2 Chuin Aaron'in amaho jah-a, Nanghon na inneipi teo, nachapa teo, nachanu teo sana bilba chu abonchan ladoh-un lang, hicheho chu kahenga hinchoijun, ati." 
Exodus32:3 Chuin mipi jouse chun abiluva um sana bilba jouse chu aladoh-un, Aaron henga ahinchoi taove." 
Exodus32:4 Chuin aman amaho khutna konchun hicheho chu alan, asemna manchah mangin asemin, bongnou lim khat asemin ahi. Chuin amahon, Vo Israel, hichehi Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh uva na pathen hou chu hihen ati." 
Exodus32:5 Chuin Aaron'in hichu amuphatnin, amasanga maicham khat asemin; chule Aaron'in, Jing nikho khu Pakaiya dinga kut ahi, tin aphongdoh tan ahi." 
Exodus32:6 Chuin amaho ajingin matah-in athoudoh-un, govam thilto atoh-un, chule chamna thilto ahinchoijun; chuin mipi ho chu adon dingle ane dingin atouvun, chule alam dingin akipat doh-un ahi." 
Exodus32:7 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Chen, kumlhan: ajehchu Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh namite khu akisuboh gam taovin ahi." 
Exodus32:8 Amaho gangtah-in keiman kathupeh-a konchun lamchom beh-a akihei taovin: amahon bongnou kilhajol asemun, hichu ahouvun, chule ahenga kilhaina abolun, Vo Israel, hichehi Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh uva na pathen hou chu hihen atiuvin ahi, ati." 
Exodus32:9 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Hiche miho hi ken kamutan, chule ven, amaho hi milouchal tah te ahiuve." 
Exodus32:10 Hijeh chun tun achunguva kalunghan na asoudoh-a, amaho kasuh manghel nadingin, keima neichang lhan: chule keiman nanga kona nam lentah khat kasem ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus32:11 Chuin Mosi Pakai a-Pathen henga ataovin, Pakai, thilboltheina nasatah le khut thahat tah-a Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh namite chunga ibola nalunghanna soudoh jenga ham?" 
Exodus32:12 Ipi dinga Egypt miten, Molsang ho-a thagam dingle, leiset chunga kona suhmang dinga aman dihlou tah-a amaho khu apuidoh ahi, ati dingu ham? Nalunghan na nasatah-a konin kile heijinlang, namite douna-a thil gilou na ngaitona-a konhin nalung hinheijin." 
Exodus32:13 Chule keiman nachilhah kapunsah-a, van'a ahsijat kaphahsah ding, chule keiman kasei hiche gam jouse hi nachilhahte kapeh ding, amahon atonsotna alo dingu ahi tia Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob henga nangma le nangma nana kihahsela nasei chu geldoh-in, ati." 
Exodus32:14 Chuin Pakaiyin amite chunga thilphalou bol ding angaitona-a konin alung aheitan ahi. 
Exodus32:15 Chuin Mosi akiheijin, molsanga konchun achesuh-in, hettohsahna songpheng teni chu akhutna achoijin ahi. Songpheng chu ani lang to-a kisun ahin; langkhat le akileh lang panga chu akisuna ahi." 
Exodus32:16 Chule songpheng chu Pathen khutsoh ahin, akisun chu Pathen khutsut, songpheng chunga chu kisuna ahi." 
Exodus32:17 Chuin Joshua'n mipi awgin thong chu ajah phatnin, Mosi jah-a, Gebuh-a gal husa aume, ati." 
Exodus32:17 Chuin Joshua'n mipi awgin thong chu ajah phatnin, Mosi jah-a, Gebuh-a gal husa aume, ati." 
Exodus32:18 Ahin aman, Galjona-a kisam awgin ahipon, chule gal lelna-a kisam awgin jong ahipoi, amavang keiman kajah hi la kisa awgin ahi, ati." 
Exodus32:19 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama gebuh ahungnai phatnin, bongnou lim kisem le alamu chu amutai. Chuin Mosi alunghana asoudoh tan, akhutna songpheng ni chu aseplhan, chule mol bula chun asukehtan ahi." 
Exodus32:20 Chuin aman asemu bongnou lim chu alan, meija agouvin, chule asubong selin, twi chunga athen, Israel chate chu adonsah-in ahi." 
Exodus32:21 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron jah-a, Mipi hohin nachunga ipi aboluva, nangman hitobang chonset nasatah hi achunguva nalhunsah ham? ati." 
Exodus32:22 Chuin Aaron'in, Ka pakai lunghanna hi soudoh hih hen: nangman hiche mite hi thilphalou bolnom mi ahiu nahen ahi." 
Exodus32:23 Ajehchu amahon kahenga, Keiho masanga che dingin pathenho neisem peh-un: ajehchu Egypt gama kona eihin puidoh uva hiche Mosi hi iti hitam kihe tapouve, atiu ahi." 
Exodus32:24 Hichun keiman amaho koma, Koi hijongle sana neijousen hinsut lhaohen, kati. Hitichun amahon keima eipeovin: chule keiman hichu meija kalelut le hiche bongnou hi hungsoh doh-a ahi, ati." 
Exodus32:25 Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho chu sagoh keuva aumu amu phatnin; (ajehchu Aaron'in amaho chu agalmite lah-a ajachat na dinguva von beija akoi ahi.) 
Exodus32:26 Hichun Mosi gebuh kotpi phunga adingin, Pakai lama panga umem? amaho chu kahenga hunghen, ati. Chuin Levi chapate jouse chu ahenga akikhom khom taovin ahi." 
Exodus32:27 Chuin aman ajah uva, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin ati, Amitakipmin apanga chemjam kikocheh henlang, gebuh sung jouse-a kotpi khatna konin kotpi khatna lutle potleu hen, chule amitakipmin asopi, amitakipmin akivop piho, chule amitakipmin aheng akom that hen, tin aseije, ati." 
Exodus32:28 Chuin Levi chapate chun Mosi thu seibangin abol taovin: hiche nikho-a chun mi sangthum tobang athin ahi. 
Exodus32:29 Hitichun Mosi'n, Tunia hi aman nangho phatthei naboh theina dingun, tunikho hin nangho amitakip achapa chungle asopipa chunga Pakaiya dingin kithensouvin ati." 
Exodus32:30 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Mosi'n mipi ho jah-a chun, Nangho nasatah-in nachonse taove: chule tu-a hi keima Pakai henga kache touva; ahitheile nachonset nao longlhenna kagabol ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus32:31 Chuin Mosi Pakai henglama ahung kilen, ahenga, Ohe, hiche miho hin chonset nasatah abol taovin, chule sana-in bongnou pathenho akisem taove." 
Exodus32:32 Hijongle tun, nangman achonsetnao nangaidam dinga ahile -; chule nangaidam louding ahile, katao ahi, nangman nasutsa lekhabua konin kamin ladohtan, ati." 
Exodus32:33 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Koi hijongle keima douna-a chonse chan chu, kalekhabua kona kalahdoh ding ahi." 
Exodus32:34 Hijeh chun tun chen, mipi ho chu keiman nahenga kaseipehna mun'a chun puitan: ven, kavantil namasanga cheding ahi: hijeng jongle keiman kavil nikho leh achunguva chonset naho chu kavil ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus32:35 Chuin Aaron'in asempeh-u bongnou chunga athilbol jeh-u chun, Pakaiyin mipi ho chu hise-in agot tan ahi." 
Exodus33:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Kipatdoh-in, keiman Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob henga kana kihahsela, Keiman nachilhahte kapeh ding ahi, tia kaseina gama chun, nangma le Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh mipi ho chu hikoma konhin chetou taovin." 
Exodus33:2 Chule keiman namasanguva vantil kasolding; chule keiman Canaan mite, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite, chule Jebus mite chu kadeldoh ding ahi." 
Exodus33:3 Khoiju le bongnoi lona gama chun chetouvun; keiman nalah uva nangho to kachetou louding ahi; ajehchu nangho milouchal tahte nahiu ahi: achuti loule lampia sumangpa getnung kate, ati." 
Exodus33:4 Chule mipi chun hitobang thugilou ajah phatnun, amaho alunghemun; koimacha akijema aum tapouvin ahi." 
Exodus33:5 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Israel chateho koma hitihin seijin, Nangho milouchal te nahiuve: chomlouva nalahtah uva kahungtouva, kasuhmang ding nahiuve. Hijeh chun tun nachung uva ipi kabolding kahet theina dingin, nakijepnao jouse chu nangho-a konin sutlhaovin, ati ahi." 
Exodus33:6 Chuin Israel chate ho chun Horeb molsanga chun akijepnao jouseu asutlhagam taovin ahi. 
Exodus33:7 Chuin Mosi'n houbuh chu alan, gebuh pam lam gebuh-a kona gam latah in asongin; hichu houkhom ho houbuh tin aminvo tan ahi. Chuin ahung hitin ahi, amitakip Pakai holchan chu gebuh pama um houkhom ho houbuh-a chun acheuvin ahi." 
Exodus33:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, Mosi houbuh-a dinga ahungdoh chun, mipi chu akipat doh-un, amitakip amaho gena ponbuh kotbul cheh-a adingun, Mosi chu houbuh-a alutkahsen avetaovin ahi." 
Exodus33:9 Chuin ahitin ahi, Mosi houbuh-a alut tolhonin, meilom khompi khat ahung kumlhan, houbuh kotphunga chun ading denin; chuin Pakai chu Mosi to akihoulim lhontan ahi." 
Exodus33:10 Chule mipi chun houbuh kotphunga meilom khompi akitun chu amuvin ahi. Chuin mijouse akipat doh-un, amaho ponbuh kotpi cheh-a konchun Pakai chu ahou taovin ahi." 
Exodus33:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi chu mikhatnin agolpa akihoupi bangin kimaiton akihoupin ahi. Chuin ama gebuh mun lama chun ahungtai: ahinla asohpa Nun chapa Joshua, golhangpa vang chu houbuh-a konin ahung doh tapon ahi." 
Exodus33:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi chu mikhatnin agolpa akihoupi bangin kimaiton akihoupin ahi. Chuin ama gebuh mun lama chun ahungtai: ahinla asohpa Nun chapa Joshua, golhangpa vang chu houbuh-a konin ahung doh tapon ahi." 
Exodus33:12 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga, Ven nangman kahenga, Hiche mipi ho hinpui touvin natin, chule kakilhonpi dinga koi neisolpeh got ham neihetsah pon; ahinla nangman, Keiman nangma naminin kahei, chule kamitmu-a lungsetna nachange, natin ahi." 
Exodus33:13 Hijeh chun tun katao ahi, namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, nangma kahetna ding le nangma mitmu-a lungsetna kachan nadingin nalampi neihilin; chule hiche nam mite hi namite ahi tin gelin, ati." 
Exodus33:14 Chuin aman, kaumpinan nalhonpiu vintin, chule cholngahna kapeh ding nahiuve, ati." 
Exodus33:15 Chuin aman ajah-a aseijin, Na-umpinan eilhonpi louleh hia konhin neipuitou datao vin." 
Exodus33:16 Ajehchu nangman neilhonpi lou uva ahile keima le namitehin namitmu-a lungsetna kachang-uve tihi iti kahetthei ding ham? Chutile keiho, keima le namite hi leiset chunga um miho-a kona sepkhena kaum dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus33:17 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Nangman nasei thilho jonghi kabol ding ahi: ajehchu kamitmun lungsetna nachangin, chule keiman nangma naminin kahen ahi, ati." 
Exodus33:18 Chule aman, Nahenga katao ahi, naloupi na chu neimusah-in, ati." 
Exodus33:19 Chuin aman, Keiman kaphatna jouse namasanga kichesah ding, na-angsunga Pakai minchu kaphonjal ding ahi. Chule keiman kalungset ding chu kalungsetna, chule hepina kamusah ding pa chu hepina kamusah ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus33:20 Chuin aman, Nangman kamai namuthei louding ahi: ajehchu eimu-a chu koima ahinga umlou ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus33:21 Chuin Pakaiyin, Ven, kakoma mun khat aume, chule nangma songpi chunga nadin ding ahi." 
Exodus33:22 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, kaloupinan nahin jotpa tengle, nangma songpi khikeh kah khatna kakoiding, nangma kapal galkai kahse-a kakhutna kakhuding:" 
Exodus33:23 Chule keiman kakhut kalah doh-a, nangman kanunglam namu ding ahi: kamai vang namu louding ahi, ati." 
Exodus34:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Nangman amasa bang bang chun songpheng ni khengin; chule nangman nasuhchip songpheng chunga kisun thu tobang bang chu hiche songpheng teni chunga chu kasut ding ahi." 
Exodus34:2 Chuleh jingkah leh kigonlang Sinai molsanga hungin, chule molsang vuma khun kakoma hung kilah-in." 
Exodus34:3 Chule koimacha nangma toh hunglhon tou louding, chule molsang pumpi-a jong koimacha kimulou ding; chule kelngoi hon ho le ganchahon jong hiche molsang panga chu an nanehsah lou dingu ahi, ati." 
Exodus34:4 Chuin aman amasa bangin songpheng ni akhengin ahi. Chuin Mosi jingpitah-in athouvin, Pakaiyin athupeh bangin Sinai molsanga chun akaltouvin, songpheng ni chu akhutna achoijin ahi." 
Exodus34:5 Chuin Pakai chu meibol lah-a ahung kumlhah, amatoh chua ading khomin, chule Pakai minchu aphongjal tan ahi." 
Exodus34:6 Chuin Pakaiyin amasang ahin jotpan, Pakai, Pakai Pathen, lungset le hepina-a dim, chule phatna le thutah-a bulhingset," 
Exodus34:7 Sang tamtah chunga hepina nei, khangilouna, suhkhelna le chonsete ngaidam, themona mohseh-a subeilou; pate khangit louna chate chung le achate chateho chunga khangthum khangli changeija viljing, tin aphongjalin ahi." 
Exodus34:8 Chuin Mosi mangang tah-in tollah akunin, ama chu ahoutan ahi." 
Exodus34:9 Chuin aman, Vo Pakai, tu-a hi namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, nahenga katao ahi, ka pakai chu keihotoh lhonkhom hen; ajehchu milouchal tahte ahiuve; chule kakhangit lounao le kachonsetnao ngaidamin lang, nagou lodin neilaovin, ati." 
Exodus34:10 Chuin aman, Ven, keiman kitepna kaseme: keima namite jouse masanga leiset chung jouse-a koima nam lah-a jong ana kibol khalou thil kidang kabol ding: chule naumna namite jousen Pakai natoh chu amudingu ahi. Ajehchu nangtoh katoh ding chu tijat umtah thil hiding ahi." 
Exodus34:11 Tunia nahenga kathupeh hi nitnin: ven, keiman Amor mite, Canaan mite, Hit mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite chule Jebus mite chu nangho masanga kadelmang ding ahi." 
Exodus34:12 Kichih theijin, achutiloule nachena gama miho toh kitepna semun natin, ajole hichu nalah uva thang hung hikha ding ahi." 
Exodus34:13 Amavang nanghon amaichamu nasuh mangdiu, amilim hou navoh bohdiu, chule adoikhom hou chu naphuh lhuh diu ahi." 
Exodus34:14 Chule pathen dangho nahou loudiu ahi: ajehchu Pakai amin thangthip kitipa chu, thangthip Pathen ahi:" 
Exodus34:15 Achuti loule agama cheng hotoh kitepna neijin natin, amahon a-pathenhou toh jonthanhoi aboluva, a-pathenhou henga ganlhaina aboldingu, chule khat touvin nahin kou-a, aganlhaina sachu naganeh khah dingu;" 
Exodus34:16 Chule nangman nachapate dinga achanu teo nalah-a, chule achanuteu chu a-pathenhou henga jonthanhoi boldinga chediu, chuteng nachapateo jong a-pathenhou henga ajonthanhoi sah dingu ahi." 
Exodus34:17 Nangho-a dinga semthu pathen nakisem lou dingu ahi. 
Exodus34:18 Nanghon cholsolou changlhah kut nabol jing dingu ahi. Abib lha phat sunga keiman kathupeh dungjuija, nisagi cholsolou changlhah naneh dingu ahi: ajehchu nangho Egypt gama kona Abib lha-a nahung doh-u ahi." 
Exodus34:19 Naobu hinphukeh tapou chu keija ahin; chule gancha lah-a apeng masapen jouse, bong hihen, kelngoi hijongleh achal jouse chu keija ahi." 
Exodus34:20 Ahivangin sangan apeng masapen jouse chu kelngoija nalhatdoh dingu ahi: ijemtia nalhatdoh lou dinga ahileh, angong naheboh dingu ahi. Nachateo asoh masa jouse chu nalhatdoh dingu ahi. Chule koimacha akhutgoh-a ka-angsunga kilah louding ahi." 
Exodus34:21 Nigup sunga na natoh ding ahin, amavang nisagi chan nileh nacholdo ding: loukai laile chang-at laija jong nacholdo dingu ahi." 
Exodus34:22 Chule nanghon suhlou chang gamasapen ahunglhun tengle hapta kut nanit dingu, chule kum kichai tengle lhoga khoptup kut nanit dingu ahi." 
Exodus34:23 Nachapateo jouse chu kumkhat sunga thumvei Pakai Pathen, Israel Pathen masanga hungkilah chehdiu ahi." 
Exodus34:24 Ajehchu namasanga kona namtinho chu kadeldoh ding, nagamgiho kakehlet ding ahi. Chuche kumkhat sunga Pakai na-Pathen angsunga kilah dinga thumvei nachetou kah-a chu, koimachan jong nagam avetlel louding ahi." 
Exodus34:25 Nangman keima dinga ganlhaina kibol thisan chu chol toh natotha louhel ding; chule kalchuh kut ganlhaina ho jong chu jingkah geija nakoi louding ahi. 
Exodus34:26 Nagam ga masaho lah-a aga masapen chu Pakai na-Pathen in'a nahinchoi ding ahi. Nangman kelnou sa chu api noitwija nahonlou ding ahi, ati." 
Exodus34:27 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Nangman hiche thuho hi sunin: ajehchu hiche thuho banga hi nangma le Israelte toh kitepna kasem ahi, ati." 
Exodus34:28 Chuin ama chua chun Pakai toh nisomli le jan somli aumin; aman changlhah jong anepon twi jong adonpon ahi. Chule aman songpheng chunga chun kitepna thu, thupeh som chu asuntan ahi." 
Exodus34:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, Mosi Sinai molsang kona kitepna songpheng teni akhutna ahinchoija ahungsuh phatnin, molsang chunga kona ahung kumsuh chun, amatoh akihoupetna amai vah chu Mosi'n ahepon ahi." 
Exodus34:30 Chuin Aaron le Israel chate jousen Mosi amuphatnuvin, veuvin, amaiso chu avah-in, amahon ama kom naiding akichauvin ahi." 
Exodus34:31 Chuin Mosi'n amaho akouvin ahile, Aaron le mipi kikhomho lah-a lamkaiho jouse chu ahenga ahung kinungleu vin; Mosi'n amaho akihoupitan ahi." 
Exodus34:32 Chuchejouvin Israel chate jouse chu ahung naijun: chuin aman Sinai molsanga Pakaiyin asei jouse chu amaho koma thupeh-in apetan ahi. 
Exodus34:33 Chule Mosi'n athusei ajo kahsen, amai chu maikhu akhun ahi." 
Exodus34:34 Ahivangin Mosi Pakai kihoupi dinga a-angsunga achelut tengle ahungdoh kit kahsen amai ahohdohjin ahi. Chule ahungdohjin ama thu kipe chu Israel chate aseipeh jin ahi. 
Exodus34:35 Chule Israel chate chun Mosi maiso chu amu phat uvin, Mosi maiso chu avah-in ahi: chuin Mosi amatoh kihou dinga alutkit kahsen, amaija maikhu akhukit tan ahi." 
Exodus35:1 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate houkhom ho jouse akoukhomin, ajah uva, Nanghon nabol dinguva Pakaiyin nathupeh-u thuho chu hicheho hi ahi." 
Exodus35:2 Nigup sunga na natoh dingu ahin, ni sagini vang chu nangho dinga nitheng ni hiding, Pakai dinga kicholdona cholngahna ni hiding ahi. Chuche ni-a natong chanchu thading ahi." 
Exodus35:3 Nangho nachennao gam pumpiuva cholngahni le mei nati louhel dingu ahi. 
Exodus35:4 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate mipi houkhom ho jouse jah-a hitin ati, Hichehi Pakai thupeh ahi," 
Exodus35:5 Nanghon nalah uva konin Pakai henga toding thilpeh khat choicheh-un: koi hijongleh alungsunga penom channin Pakai henga thilpeh hinchoi hen; sana, dangka, sum-eng," 
Exodus35:6 Pon dum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, ponnem, chule kelmul," 
Exodus35:7 Kelngoichal vun kidesan, satuilut vun, chule thinggi thing," 
Exodus35:8 Vahding thaotwi, nuding thao namtui, chule gimnamtui," 
Exodus35:9 Khisonggel ho, boitong sangkhol le ompho-a behding songho." 
Exodus35:10 Chule nalah uva mi lungching chengse hunguntin, chule Pakai thupeh jouse hi aboldingu ahi." 
Exodus35:11 Houbuh le achungkhu chule athingpehho, abanggol ho, akhom ho, achechah naho," 
Exodus35:12 Thingkhong, mol lhon ho, hepi tounamun, chule achung khuna pon," 
Exodus35:13 Dokhang le mol lhon ho, akong ho jouse, chule vetsahna changlhah," 
Exodus35:14 Avah dinga khoilu thaomei jong, athil le lo, athaomeiho, vahding thaotwi ho toh," 
Exodus35:15 Chule gimnamtui halna maicham mol lhonho, akinu ding thao, gimnamtui ho, chule houbuh lutna kotna kikhai ding pondal," 
Exodus35:16 Govam thiltona maicham, asum-eng ho, amol lhon ho, chule aum le abelho jouse le twiluina kong le akeng," 
Exodus35:17 Ahong sunga pondal kikhainaho le, akhomho akibutona ho, ahong kotpi pondal ho," 
Exodus35:18 Houbuh kilnaho, ahong kilna, chule akhaoho," 
Exodus35:19 Munthenga kinbolna ding, kinbolna ponho, thempu dinga vontheng ho le achapate vonho, thempu natohna mun'a kinbol nading, tin aseijin ahi." 
Exodus35:20 Chule Israel chate houkhom ho jouse chu Mosi angsunga konin apotdoh taove. 
Exodus35:21 Chule alung kisuhthou le alhagaovin peh nomna apehchu ahungun, akinbolna ngaicha ding jouse le von thengho jouse din, mipi houkhom ho houbuh natohna-a Pakaiya thilto chu ahinchoijun ahi." 
Exodus35:22 Chuin pasal ahin numei ahin alungsunga peh nomna nei jouse ahunguvin, chaojangho, bilbaho, khutjemho, khiho, chule sana kijepnaho jouse chu ahinchoijun: thilpeh pejouse chun Pakai henga thilto dingin sana atoh uvin ahi." 
Exodus35:23 Chuin amijouse chun, koihile pon dum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, tupat ponnem, kelchavun, kelngoichal vun san theng, satuilut vunho neijousen ahin choijun ahi." 
Exodus35:24 Amitakip dangka le sum-eng thilto pechan chun Pakaiya thilpeh ahin choijun: chule amitakip thinggi thing neijouse chun lhacha kinbolna din ahin choijun ahi. 
Exodus35:25 Chule numei lungching jouse chun akhutnuva akheh-un pon dum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, tupat ponnem hochu ahin choijun ahi." 
Exodus35:26 Chule chihna-a alungthimu kisuthou numei ho chun kelcha mul akheh-un ahi. 
Exodus35:27 Chule vaipoho chun khi songgel hole songdang dangho chu boitong sangkhol le ompho-a beh dingin ahin choijun; 
Exodus35:28 Lou namtui, vah-a ding thao, kinuding thao, chule gimnamtuija ding ahin choijun ahi." 
Exodus35:29 Israel chaten Pakai henga lungcham thilto hochu ahinchoijun; numei ahin pasal ahin, alungin peh nomna aneisah jouse chun Pakaiyin Mosi khutna boldinga athupeh jouse bolna dingin ahin choijun ahi." 
Exodus35:30 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate koma, Veuvin, Pakaiyin Judah phunga, Hur chapa, Uri chapa Belzalel aminin akouvin;" 
Exodus35:31 Chuin aman amachu chihna-in, hethemna-in, lungthim themna-in, chule natoh dan jouse-a dingin Pathen lhagaovin adimsah-in;" 
Exodus35:32 Sana, dangka, chule sum-eng natoh kidangho gongtoh dingin," 
Exodus35:33 Chule songho at-tan dingdan, asettoh dingdan, thing-at dan, chule khutthem natoh jouse-a dingin Pathen lhagaovin adipmin ahi." 
Exodus35:34 Aman ama le Dan phungmi Ahisamach chapa Aholiab chu mihil thei ahilhona dingin alungsung lhona chihna akhumpeh tan ahi. 
Exodus35:35 Aman amanichu natohna jouse tohtheina, khutthem nale natoh themnalna, thil jih themna, pon dum, ponsandup, ponsanthip chule tupat ponnem jepthemna, ponkhom themna, mihemin abolthei jouse boltheina le, khutthem jouse thepna-in alungsunghon chihnan adipmin ahi, ati." 
Exodus36:1 Hichun Pakaiyin athupeh dungjuijin, Pakaiyin muntheng natohna-a natoh dingdan jouse hetthemna dinga chihna le hetna apeh miching jouse, chule Belzalel le Aholiab'in natoh chu apan taovin ahi." 
Exodus36:2 Chuin Mosi'n Belzalel le Aholiab, chule Pakaiyin alungthim uva chihna apeh michingho, chule natohna-a hunga na hungtong dinga alungthim kisuthou chan chu akouvin:" 
Exodus36:3 Chule amahon muntheng sahna dingle asunga natoh thilbol na-a dinga Israel chaten ahin tokhom houchu Mosi khutna konin alauvin ahi. Chule amahon jingkah seh le ama henga lungcham thilpeh ahin choijing nalaijun ahi. 
Exodus36:4 Chuin munthenga natohho jouse tonga miching jouse amitakip anatohna-a konin ahungun; 
Exodus36:5 Chuin amahon Mosi henga, Miho hin natohna-a dinga Pakai thupeh sanga tamjo ahinchoi taovin ahi, atiuve." 
Exodus36:6 Chuin Mosi'n thupeh apen, hichu amahon gebuh jouse, Nangho pasal hihen numei hijongle koimachan muntheng natohna-a dinga ima natobe lou dingu ahitai, tin aphongjal leuvin ahi. Hitichun mipi chu athilto naova konchun asutang taovin ahi." 
Exodus36:7 Ajehchu athilnei houchu natohna dinga lhingset ahin, chule avalset ahitai." 
Exodus36:8 Chuin alah uva milungching takip houbuh-a natong ho chun tupat pon hoile mantam tah-in ponjal som adum, asanthip le asandup asemun; khutthem tah-in Cherub ho pumin hiho chu asemun ahi." 
Exodus36:9 Ponjal khatchu asao tong somni le get, ponjal khatchu avai tongli ahin, ponjal jouse chu akibangsoh-e." 
Exodus36:10 Chuin ponjal nga ho chu akhuimat nin, chule adang ponjal nga jong chu akhuimat nin ahi." 
Exodus36:11 Chuin aman ni kisuhmatna ageilom laija konchun ponjal khat geija chun adum ajolkhat abil hom asemin ahi. Hibang chun aman anina kisuhtona sunga chun adang ponjal pamnung pena chun abollin ahi. 
Exodus36:12 Aman ponjal khatna chun abil somnga asemin, chule aman ani lhina ponjal patoh akisuhtona-a jong chun ponjal geilaijah abil somnga asemin, ponjal liho chu khatle khat akimatnin ahi." 
Exodus36:13 Chuin aman chechahna somnga sana-in asemin achechah sah-in ahi. Chule ponjal chu hiche achechahna mun'a chun akikolmat tan ahile hitichun houbuh khat asohtan ahi. 
Exodus36:14 Chuin aman houbuh chunglama chun pon in dingin kelmullin ponjal asemin ahi. Aman ponjal somlekhat asemin ahi. 
Exodus36:15 Ponjal asaodan chu tong somthum ahin, chule aponjal aletdan chu tong li ahi, ponjal somlekhat chu akibangsoh-in ahi." 
Exodus36:16 Chuin aman ponjal nga chu akhuimat nin, chule adang gup jong chu akhuimat nin ahi." 
Exodus36:17 Chuin aman ponjal kikilmatho mongpena chun abilhom somnga asemin chujongle ani lhina ponjal kikil monga jong chun abil hom somnga asemin ahi. 
Exodus36:18 Chuin aman khatseh ahitheina dingin chechahna somnga sum-eng in asemin ahi. 
Exodus36:19 Chule aman pon-in khukhumna dingin kelngoivun kinusan asemin, chule achunga chun satuilut vun akhun ahi." 
Exodus36:20 Chule aman houbuh-a din thinggi thingpeh asemin, atungin ahi." 
Exodus36:21 Thingpeh saodan chu tong som ahin, chule avai chu tong khatle akeh ahi." 
Exodus36:22 Thingpeh khat chun ako le abil kibangchet ni aneijin, hitobang chun aman houbuh thingpeh jouse chu asemin ahi." 
Exodus36:23 Chule aman houbuh-a din thingpeh asemin; chule thingpeh somni chu noilam sanga noilam panga din aseme. 
Exodus36:24 Chule aman hichu thingpeh somni noijachun dangka-a kisem kibutona somli asemin; akibuto naho ni-a ding chun thingpeh khat noija chun akibutona kohomni asemin; chule bulutna muh ni chu adang thingpeh-a bulutna muh ni ding ahi. 
Exodus36:25 Chule houbuh pang langkhat sahlang ninga chun thingpeh somni asemin ahi. 
Exodus36:26 Chule dangka-a abil somli kisem achun akibutona ko ni chu thingpeh khat ding ahin, chule adang akibutona ko ni chu thingpeh adang ding ahi." 
Exodus36:27 Chule lhumlang sang houbuh panga chun aman thingpeh gup asemin ahi. 
Exodus36:28 Chule aman thingpeh ni chu houbuh apang teni aning ni-a dingin asemin ahi. 
Exodus36:29 Chule amaho chu anoija akimatnin, chule achung chu chaokollin akimatnin; hitichun aning jouse-a chun abollin ahi." 
Exodus36:30 Chule hichun thingpeh get asemin, chule akibuto naho chu dangka-a kisem akisuhto naho somlegup ahi, thingpeh khat khat noija chun akibutona ko ni ni aumin ahi." 
Exodus36:31 Chule aman thinggi thingpeh in banggol ho asemin; houbuh pang lang khatna din thingpeh nga," 
Exodus36:32 Chule adang thingpeh banggol nga chu houbuh alangkhat nading ahin, chukit le adang thing banggol nga chu houbuh lhumlang sanga ding ahi." 
Exodus36:33 Chule aman akima che banggol jong abollin, hichun thingpeh jouse chu akima avut vangin among geijin aumin ahi." 
Exodus36:34 Chule thingpeh ho chu sanatwi jin aloijin, chule banggol jouse matchahna din sana chaokol akisemin, chule banggol ho chu sanatwi jin aloijin ahi." 
Exodus36:35 Chule aman ponjal hochu pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat ponnemin asemin, thilbol kidang tah-in Cherubim limin ajemin ahi." 
Exodus36:36 Chule hichea chun aman thinggi thingin khom li asemin, hicheho chu sana twijin aloijin; akoika ho chu sana-a kisem ahin, chule aman dangka-in akibutona ko li akoipeh-in ahi." 
Exodus36:37 Chule aman houbuh kotna din pondal adum, asandup, asanthip chule tupat ponnema kisem phatah-a kikhui akhaijin ahi." 
Exodus36:38 Chule khom nga ho-a chun koika aumcheh-in, chule aman alupal jouse le agolho jouse sana twijun aloi jolin ahi. Ahivangin akibutona ko nga ho vang chu sum-enga kisem ahi." 
Exodus37:1 Chule Belzalel'in thinggi thingin thingkhong chu asemin; adung tongni le akeh avai tong khatle akeh, chule atun tong khatle akeh ahi." 
Exodus37:2 Chule aman asung le apose chu sana thengselin aloijin; chujongle agei kimvel chu sana lallukhuh limin ajemin ahi. 
Exodus37:3 Chule aman sana chaokol li akoijin, amaho chu aning li-a koiding ahi. Chaokol ni chu alangkhat na chule adang chaokol ni chu khatna akoijin ahi." 
Exodus37:4 Chuin aman thinggi thingin mol lhon asemin, chule sana twijin aloijin ahi." 
Exodus37:5 Chuin aman thingkhong chu aputna dingin thingkhong panga agollutnin ahi. 
Exodus37:6 Chuin aman sana thenga kisem hepi touna chu asemin; chule adung chu tong ni le akeh chule avai tong khat le akeh ahi. 
Exodus37:7 Chuin aman sana hal khatna kona kikheng Cherub ni hepi touna mong teni-a chun asemin ahi. 
Exodus37:8 Cherub khat chu among langkhatna, chule Cherub khat chu alang khat mongah hepi touna mong teni-a chun Cherubim asemin ahi." 
Exodus37:9 Chule Cherubim teni chun alha sangtah-in ajal lhonnin, chule alha teni chun hepi touna chu akhukhum lhonnin, amani akimaingat to lhonnin, hepi touna lamchu anga lhonnin ahi." 
Exodus37:10 Chule aman thinggi thingin dokhang asemin, adung tong ni ahin, avai tongkhat, atun tong khat le akeh ahi." 
Exodus37:11 Chuin aman hichu sana thengin aloijin, chujongle avelchu sana lallukhuh limin ajemin ahi." 
Exodus37:12 Chujongleh hiche chunga chun khutpheng tebep akol kimvel asemin, chule agei kimvel chu sana lallukhuh limin ajemin ahi." 
Exodus37:13 Chule aman hiho ding chun sana thih chaokol li alhan, akeng liho umna aning li-a chun abupeh in ahi." 
Exodus37:14 Akimvela chun Dokhang putna mol lhon thilna ding chaokol ho chu aumin ahi. 
Exodus37:15 Chuin aman dokhang putna dingin thinggi thingin mol lhon asemin, hiche chu sana twijin aloijin ahi." 
Exodus37:16 Chule aman dokhang chunga kongle bel hochu asemin, akongho, asumkheho, asum lhengho, asinho abona sana thenga kisem ahi." 
Exodus37:17 Chule aman sana theng thaomei khom asemin, atopal khoilu thaomei khom chu asemin, alhongpi le abahho, alheng ho, abohdoh ho chule apah ho chu kibang cheh ahiuve." 
Exodus37:18 Chule abah gup chu asih-a konin ajamdoh-in, thaomei khom apang langkhat chun abah thum aneijin, chujongle apang lang khat chun abah thum aneijin ahi." 
Exodus37:19 Alang khatna chun abo khat le apah khattoh almond limin khonthum aumin, chule aleng langkhatna abo khat le apah khattoh almond jih bangin alheng thum aumin, hitichun alhung lhonin, thaomei khom abah gup ajamdoh-in ahi." 
Exodus37:20 Chule thaomei khoma chun almond limin alheng lile abo chule apah ho aumin ahi. 
Exodus37:21 Chule amasa abah ni noija chun aboh khatma aumin, chule abanna ni noija aboh khatma aumin, chule athumna abah ni noima-a chun aboh khat ma aumkitnin, hicheho hi abah gup jamdoh dungjui ahi."
