Exodus37:22 Abo hole abahho chu tikhat ahiuvin, hicheho jouse chu sana thenga kikheng ngen ahi." 
Exodus37:23 Chule aman thaomei sagi, achena manchah ho, meivah koina kongho jouse sana thengin asemin ahi." 
Exodus37:24 Hiche hole kong le bel ho jouse semna dingchun sana thengsel talent khat amangin ahi. 
Exodus37:25 Chule aman thinggi thingin gimnamtui halna maicham asemin adung tong khat, avai tong khat ahin aningli kibangcheh tong ni ahin akiho jong akibangin ahi." 
Exodus37:26 Chuin aman achung teni le akimvel ki hochu sanan aloijin; chule akimvel chu lallukhuh limin ajemin ahi. 
Exodus37:27 Chuin aman aputna mol lhon thilna dingin apangteni chunga aning teni-a lallukhuh noija chun sana chaokol ni asemin ahi. 
Exodus37:28 Chule aman amol lhon jongchu thinggi thingin asemin, chule sana twijin aloijin ahi." 
Exodus37:29 Chule aman gimnamtui thengsel jong halnam dingin asemin, thaosempa thilsem bangtah-in asemdohtan ahi." 
Exodus38:1 Chule aman thinggi thingin govam thiltona maicham chu asemin, adung tong nga, avai tong nga atun tong thum ahi." 
Exodus38:2 Chule aning li-a aki asemin, akiho chu akibangin, achung sum-eng in aloijin ahi." 
Exodus38:3 Chule aman maicham kongho, abelho, akheho, vutlonaho, meitina belho, kong dang jouse sum-eng in asemin ahi." 
Exodus38:4 Chuin aman maicham lailung tah-a asandan vetna noitah-a chun sum-enga kisem thihvang khat maicham ding chun asemin ahi. 
Exodus38:5 Chuin aman mol lhonho thilnading sum-eng thihvang mongli-a chun chaokol li asemin ahi. 
Exodus38:6 Chule aman mol lhonho chu thinggi thingin asemin, sum-eng in alutnin ahi." 
Exodus38:7 Chule aman thingpeh aputna din maicham sih-a chaokol ho-a chun agolho chu athilin alaihomin asemin ahi. 
Exodus38:8 Chule aman houbuh maija mipi ahung kikhop tengleh numei ho dingin twikholna kong le akengho chu sum-eng val leh phatvetnin asemin ahi. 
Exodus38:9 Chule aman lhang lama chun ahongsung asemin, hiche tupat ponnem tong jakhat-in hong chu akai kullin ahi." 
Exodus38:10 Akhomho chu somni, akibutona koho jong somni asemin chule akhomho akoikahou le agolho chu sum-enga kisem ahi." 
Exodus38:11 Sahlang sanga kikhailha ding chun tupat ponnem tong jakhat-in akisemuvin, akhom jong somni chule sum-enga kisem akibuto naho jong somni ahicheh in, chule akhomho akoikaho le agolho dangka-a kisem ahi." 
Exodus38:12 Chule lhumlang sanga akikhai ponchu tong somnga ahin, akhomle akibutona koho chu som cheh ahi, akhomho akoikaho le agolho chu dangka-a kisem ahi." 
Exodus38:13 Chule solama chu tong somnga ahi. 
Exodus38:14 Akotpi panga kikhai ponho chu tong somnga ahin, akhom thum ahin chule akibutona kothum ahi." 
Exodus38:15 Chule ahongsung mun langkhat kotna ponjal chu tong somlenga akikhaijin chule akibutona ko-hole khomho chu thum thum ahi. 
Exodus38:16 Ahongsung kimvella kikhai pon jouse chu tupat kilhuh pona kisem cheh ahi. 
Exodus38:17 Chule akhom kibutonaho jouse chu sum-eng in asemin, sutkhom bille agolho jouse dangkan asemin, amuhhal jouse chu dangkan aloijin ahi. Chule ahongsung sutkhom ho jouse chu dangkan akitomin ahi." 
Exodus38:18 Chule ahongsung kotpi-a kikhai pondal hochu akikhontho ahin, adum, asandup, asanthip chule tupat kilhuh pon ahin; chule adung tong somni, availam le asan tong nga ahin, hiho chu ahongsung mun'a pon kikhai ho toh kitoh ahi." 
Exodus38:19 Chule akhomho chu li ahin, asunga kisem butona koho chu li, akoika chu dangka-a kisem ahin, chule achungho jouse le agolho chu dangka-a kilonkhum ahi." 
Exodus38:20 Chule houbuh kilnaho jouse le ahongsung kimvel kikilna jouse chu sum-enga kisem ahi. 
Exodus38:21 Hiche hi houbuh thudol chu ahi, hettohsahna houbuh ngei jong chu Mosi thupeh dungjuija Aaron thempupa chapa Ithamar khutna chu Levi ho kinbolna dinga kisema ahi." 
Exodus38:22 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi koma athupeh jouse chu Juda phunga um, Hur chapa Uri chapa Bezalel'in abolsoh keijin ahi." 
Exodus38:23 Chule aman akilhonpi chu Dan phunga Ahisamach chapa Aholiab, song geithem natong khutthem chule pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip chule tupat ponnem hoitah jempahthei ahi." 
Exodus38:24 Munthenga natohna-a dinga kisulut sana jouse, thilto sanaho geijin, munthenga kimang shekel dungjuijin, abonin talent somni le ko leh shekel jasagi le somthum ahi." 
Exodus38:25 Chule mipi kikhom simsaho lah-a kisundoh dangka ho jouse chu talent jakhat ahin, chule munthenga ding chu shekel sangkhat le jasagi le somsagi le nga ahi." 
Exodus38:26 Munthenga shekel kitena dungjui chun mikhat dingin bekah khat hichu shekel keh ahi. Koi hijongle kum somni-a pat chunglama kisim ho chu khat khatnin abonun mi sangjagup le sangthum le janga le somnga ahiuvin ahi. 
Exodus38:27 Ponjal butona koho le muntheng butona koho sunga chun dangka talent jakhat akileh lutnin, butonako khat khat dinga talent khat ahijehchun butonako jakhatna chun talent jakhat ahi." 
Exodus38:28 Chule akhomho, koikaho, alupal chule apehkhat akikhukhum asemin, hiho-a chun shekel sangkhat le jasagi le somsagi le nga alutnin ahi." 
Exodus38:29 Chule sum-eng kitohdoh ho chu talent somsagi le shekel sangni le jali ahi. 
Exodus38:30 Chule hikoma chun mipi houkhom ho houbuh mun nachun butona koho le sum-eng maicham, sum-eng thihvang chule maicham kong dangho," 
Exodus38:31 Chule ahongsung kimvella akibutonako, ahongsung kotpi-a koho, chule houbuh kihena akilho chule hongsung avel pumpi-a akihena thihkil hochu asemin ahi." 
Exodus39:1 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuijin, Aaron din vontheng ho asemun, chule munthenga natohna din, kinbolna pon adum, asandup, chule asanthip min asemin ahi." 
Exodus39:2 Chule aman sana adum, asandup, asanthip chule tupat ponnemin boitong sangkhol ho asemin ahi." 
Exodus39:3 Chuin amahon pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip chule tupat ponnem khutthem tah-a kikhongho chunga kaidin sana chu pasetnin akhengun, ajangin alheh-un ahi." 
Exodus39:4 Amahon hiche ding chun lengkou tomho asemun, akimatsah un, aguiteni chu akilmatnun ahi." 
Exodus39:5 Chule boitong sangkhol chunga konggah kidangtah chu Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuija kisem pon adum, asandup, asanthip, tupat kilhuh pon kisem chuto thakhat ahi." 
Exodus39:6 Israel chate minho jouse chu mutheitah in sana jemkoa Mohor namna bangin songgel chunga anamin ahi. 
Exodus39:7 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin, Israel chate geldoh jingna song dingin boitong sangkhol lengkouva chun abeh-in ahi." 
Exodus39:8 Chule aman boitong sangkhol ompho jong chu sana-in pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat kilhuh ponnem bang chun khutthem tah-in ompho chu asemin ahi." 
Exodus39:9 Hiche chu aning li ahin, Ompho chu akithop ahin adung khap khat chule avai khap khat ahi." 
Exodus39:10 Chule amahon song gol li-in akoijun; golphei masa chu; songsan, song-eng, chule song santhip ahin: hiche hi gol masa ahi." 
Exodus39:11 Chule golphei nina chu; song engsel, song dumjet, chule song mantam ahi." 
Exodus39:12 Chule golphei thumna chu; song sandang, song vom, chule song sandup ahi." 
Exodus39:13 Chule golphei alina chu; song engdum, khisonggel, chule khi song pol ahi. Hicheho hi abonchan sana khaoguija akanbeh sohkeijun ahi." 
Exodus39:14 Chule songho chu Israel chate dungjuijin, aminu somleni dungjuijin mohor'a amin kitat bangin amitakip amin cheh-in phung somleni dungjuijin aumin ahi." 
Exodus39:15 Chule amahon sana-a kisem pahvui bangin ompho mongteni-a chun sana chaokol theng asemun ahi. 
Exodus39:16 Chule amahon sana jemko ni le thih chaokol ni asemin, chule ompho mong teni-a chun thih chaokol ni chu abut touvin ahi." 
Exodus39:17 Chule amahon ompho mong teni geija sana pahvui banga kisem sana chaokol akoijun ahi. 
Exodus39:18 Chule thih chaokol mong teni-a jemko teni-a chun pahvui ahenbeh-un, chule boitong sangkhol lengkou tom chunga amalama chun akoijun ahi." 
Exodus39:19 Chule amahon boitong sangkhol sungnung langa agei chunga um ompho mongteni chunga chun sana chaokol ni asemun akoijun ahi. 
Exodus39:20 Chule amahon sana in chaokol ni asemuvin, hichu boitong sangkhol anoilanga chun abutnun ahi. Hichu amai langa mutheija kikhui boitong sangkhol konggah kijemhoi chunga akoijun ahi." 
Exodus39:21 Chule amahon boitong sangkhol chunga chun thih chaokol kil aumin, thih chaokol maman ompho-a chun akilbeh un; hiche boitong sangkhol chunga konggah phatah ahi. Hiche hi Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuija boitong sangkhola kona chu ompho chu kikangdoh louding ahi." 
Exodus39:22 Chule aman adumngen na kikhong boitong sangkhol akon sangkhol len asemin ahi. 
Exodus39:23 Chule sangkhol len laija chun alai khat aumin, akikhen louna dingin sangkhol ngong hom bangin ahom kimvela chun akanchahna aum me." 
Exodus39:24 Chule amahon sangkhol len mongchep chunga chun, kolbuthei limin pondum, ponsandup, ponsanthip, chule tupat kilhuh ponnemin asemun ahi." 
Exodus39:25 Chule amahon sanatheng changengho asemun, sangkhol len mong jouse kolbuthei limho chun asemsao changeng chu akoijun ahi." 
Exodus39:26 Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuija kintheng bolna din sangkhol len pamchep kimvella chun changengin kolbuthei chu kikahhalchet nin aumin ahi. 
Exodus39:27 Chule amahon Aaron le achate dingin sangkhol chol tupat ponnemin khonthon asempeh un ahi. 
Exodus39:28 Chule thempu delkop tupat ponnem, ponnema kisem sangkhol sungnung, chule tupat ponnema kisem lukhuh hoiho chule tupat lhuhsa ponnem thempu delchen," 
Exodus39:29 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjui jin tupat lhuhsa patjang le patdum, patsandup, chule patsanthipmin konggah asemun ahi." 
Exodus39:30 Chule amahon sana thenga kisem lallukhuh theng chunga chun melchihna mohor chunga kisun bangin, PAKAIYA ATHENG tin asunun ahi." 
Exodus39:31 Chule amahon Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuijin, hichu thempu delkop chunga sangtah-a kandetna dingin patdum kipheh-in akanun ahi." 
Exodus39:32 Hitichun houkhom na houbuh-a natohho jouse chu akijoutan; Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun Israel chaten abol taovin ahi. 
Exodus39:33 Chule amahon houbuh pon in, amanchah le achechah naho, thingpeh banggolho, akhomho chule akibutona koho," 
Exodus39:34 Chule akhuna kelngoichal vuna kidesan, akhuna satuilut vunho chule pondal kikhai," 
Exodus39:35 Hettohsahna thingkhong le mol lhon ho, chule hepi touna," 
Exodus39:36 Dokhang kongle belho chule vetsahna changlhah," 
Exodus39:37 Khoilu thaomei khom theng, athaomeiho le thaomei ho geichu asemtoh un, chule kongle belho chule vahding thaotwi," 
Exodus39:38 Chule sana maicham, le nuding thao namtui le houbuh kotna kikhaiho," 
Exodus39:39 Sum-eng maicham le sum-eng tengsa, amollhon ho le abelho jouse, twidolna le akitunna akengho," 
Exodus39:40 Hongsunga kikhaiho le khomho chule akibutonakoho chule houkhom ho houbuh kinbolna ding kongle belho jouse," 
Exodus39:41 Muntheng sunga natohna ding vonho, kintheng tohna dinga thempupa vontheng ho Aaron le achapate vonho Pathen na atohna diuva kipe hochu Mosi henga ahin choijun ahi." 
Exodus39:42 Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh jouse dungjuijin Israel chaten aboldoh sohkeitaove. 
Exodus39:43 Chuin Mosi'n akitongho jouse chu amun, aman, veuvin Pakai thupeh bang bangin nanghon natongun ahi tin Mosi'n amaho chu phatthei aboh tan ahi." 
Exodus40:1 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Exodus40:2 Lha masapen, nikho masapen ni chule houkhom ho houbuh chu natundoh dingu ahi." 
Exodus40:3 Chule asunga chu hettohsahna thingkhong chu nakoi ding, chule thingkhong chu pondal nakhu khum ding ahi." 
Exodus40:4 Chule dokhang chu nahin putlut ding, achunga goltoh ding thilho chu nagoltoh ding; chule thaomei khom chu nahin pohlutna, thaomei ho chu navah ding ahi." 
Exodus40:5 Chule nangman hettohsahna thingkhong masanga chu gimnamtui halna sana maicham chu nakoiding; chule houbuh kotpi-a chu pondal nakhai ding ahi. 
Exodus40:6 Chule houkhom ho houbuh kotphung masanga chu govam thiltona maicham nakoiding ahi. 
Exodus40:7 Chule twikholna kong chu houkhom ho houbuh le maicham kikah-a nakoija, asunga chu twi nasunding ahi." 
Exodus40:8 Chule akimvela chu ahongsung nasem ding, chule hong sung kimvel kotpi-a chu pondal hochu nakhai ding ahi." 
Exodus40:9 Chule nangman nuding thao chu nalah-a, houbuh le asunga umho jouse nanu-a, nasuhtheng ding, chule asunga kong le belho jouse toh: chuteng atheng hiding ahi." 
Exodus40:10 Chule govam thiltona maicham le akongho jong chu thao nanu-a nasuhtheng ding: chutengle maicham thengpen hiding ahitai. 
Exodus40:11 Chule nangman twikholna kong le akeng chu thao nanu-a nasuhtheng ding ahi. 
Exodus40:12 Chule nangman Aaron le achapate chu houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga nahinpui ding, chule amahochu twija nasil ding ahi." 
Exodus40:13 Chule nangman Aaron chu vontheng navonpeh ding; thempu natohna mun'a atoh theina dinga thao nanu-a, nasuhtheng ding ahi." 
Exodus40:14 Chule nangman achapate chu nahinpui ding, sangkhol chol na-ahpeh ding:" 
Exodus40:15 Chule nangman apao nabol banga amahon thempu natohna munthenga na atoh theina dinguva, amaho jong thao nanu ding ahi: hiche athao kinu-u chu akhang khanguva atonsotna thempu ahi nadingu ahitai, ati." 
Exodus40:16 Hitichun Pakaiyin athupeh bangchun Mosi'n atongsoh keijin, chutobang chun aboltan ahi." 
Exodus40:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, akum nina lhamasa penna nikho masapen nin houbuh chu akitungdoh tan ahi." 
Exodus40:18 Chule Mosi'n houbuh chu atungdoh-in, akibutona koho akanchah-in, athingpehho, abanggol ho, chule akhomho chu atundoh-in ahi." 
Exodus40:19 Chule aman houbuh chunga chun ponjal chu ajalin, chule ponjal chu achungvuma akhun, Pakaiyin Mosi koma athupeh bang chun aboltanin ahi." 
Exodus40:20 Chuin aman hettohsahna chu alan, thingkhong sunga akhumin, amol lhonho chu thingkhonga abutona ding kisem chaokol sunga chun ahenglutnin, chule hepi touna chu thingkhong chunga chun akoijin ahi." 
Exodus40:21 Chule aman thingkhong chu houbuh sunga ahin polutnin, chule akhuna pondal chu akhaijin, hettohsahna thingkhong chu akhun; Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun aboltan ahi." 
Exodus40:22 Chule houkhom ho ponbuh in sung, houbuh sahlam sang, pondal polama chun dokhang chu akoijin ahi." 
Exodus40:23 Chuin aman Pakaiyin Mosi henga athupeh dungjuijin, Pakai angsunga chun changlhah chu agoltan ahi." 
Exodus40:24 Chuin aman houkhom ho ponbuh lhanglam sang, dokhang maijona chun thaomei khom chu akoitan ahi." 
Exodus40:25 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga athupeh bangin aman thaomei chu Pakai masanga chun avahtan ahi. 
Exodus40:26 Chule aman houkhom ho pon in sunga pondal masanga chun sana maicham chu akoitan ahi. 
Exodus40:27 Pakaiyin Mosi henga athupeh dungjujin aman gimnamtui chu ahaltan ahi. 
Exodus40:28 Chule aman houbuh kot maija chun pondal chu akhaitan ahi. 
Exodus40:29 Chule aman houkhom ho houbuh kot koma chun govam thiltona maicham chu akoijin, chule hia chun Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuijin aman govam thilto le anneh thilto atohtan ahi." 
Exodus40:30 Chule aman kisuhthengna ding twikholna chu mipi houkhom ho pon-in le maicham kikah-a chun akoijin, kisil thengna din hia chun twi akoijin ahi." 
Exodus40:31 Chule Mosi, Aaron, chule achapate chun hichea chun akhut akeng akisilun ahi." 
Exodus40:32 Amaho houkhom ho pon-in sunga alut tengu, chule maicham anai tengule, Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuijin akisil jiuvin ahi." 
Exodus40:33 Chuin aman houbuh le maicham vela chun ahongsung asemin, kotpi chungjola chun pondal akhaitai. Hitichun Mosi'n anatoh ajoutan ahi." 
Exodus40:34 Hichun houkhom ho pon-in chu meilom'in ahinkhun, Pakai loupina chun houbuh chu adiptan ahi." 
Exodus40:35 Chuin Mosi chu houkhom ho pon in'a chun alut thei tapon ahi; ajehchu meilom chu aumdentan, Pakai loupina chun houbuh chu adiptan ahi." 
Exodus40:36 Houbuh chunga kona meilom chu akilahdoh phatnin, Israel chate chun akholjina ajomtaovin ahi." 
Exodus40:37 Amavang meilom chu akitoldoh louva ahile, akitoldoh kahsen amaho akholjinji pouvin ahi." 
Exodus40:38 Ajehchu Israel insung pumpi mitmun akholjina sung seuvin Houbuh chunga chun sunle Pakai meilom chu aumjin, chule jan le meikongin aumjin ahi." 
Leviticus1:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi chu akouvin, houkhom ho houbuh-a kona chun ahenga thu ahin seijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus1:2 Israel chate ho henga seijin lang, ajah uva, Nalah uva khattouvin Pakai henga thilpeh ahin choija ahile, athilpeh hinchoi houchu gancha lah uva kon, bonghon lah-a kon, chule kel hon lah-a kon hitei ding." 
Leviticus1:3 Amapa thilpeh chu bonghon lah-a kona govam thilto ahile, achal nolna beihel pehen: aman houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah phunga hing jing Pakai anga ama lungcham tah-a apehding ahi." 
Leviticus1:4 Aman hiche govam thilto luchang chunga chu akhut angap ding, chuteng hichu ama dinga longlhena bolpehna dinga kisanpeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus1:5 Aman bongchal chu Pakai anga atha ding: chule thempu, Aaron chapate chun thisan ahinchoi dingu, chule houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah phunga um maicham chung kimvela chu thisan chu athe chansoh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus1:6 Aman govam thilto chu avun alipma, hal hala achenbong ding ahi." 
Leviticus1:7 Chule Aaron thempu chapate chun maicham chunga mei akoidingu, chule chuche mei chunga chu thing gol kitoh chetna aset dingu," 
Leviticus1:8 Chule Thempu Aaron chapateho chun akichen bong ho, aluchang, chule athao chu maicham mei kikoi chunga kise thing chunga chu kitohchetna aset dingu ahi." 
Leviticus1:9 Ahinla asungho le akengho vang chu aman twija asoptheng ding: chule thempu chun govam thilto, meija kisem thilpeh, Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga maicham chunga chu aboncha keija ahalding ahi." 
Leviticus1:10 Ama thilpeh chu kelngoi hon ahilou leh keltah hon lah-a kona govam ganlhaina ding ahile; aman nolna beihel, achal ahin kaiding ahi." 
Leviticus1:11 Aman hichu maicham sahlam panga chu Pakai angsunga atha ding; chule thempuho, Aaron chapate chun maicham chung kimvela chu thisan chu athe chansoh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus1:12 Aman hichu aluchang le athao toh puma achen bonga; chule thempu chun hicheho chu maicham chunga mei kihalna chunga thing kigoltoh chunga chu akoitoh chet ding ahi. 
Leviticus1:13 Ahinla aman asungho le akengho chu twija asopding; chule thempu chun hichu aboncha ahinchoija maicham chunga ahalding ahi: hichu govam thilto, meija kisem thilpeh, Pakai henga gimnamtui chu hiding ahi." 
Leviticus1:14 Pakai henga govam thilto-a dinga athilto chu vachaho ahitah-a ahileh, aman vakhu ahiloule vapal nou ahinchoi ding ahi." 
Leviticus1:15 Thempu chun hichu maichama ahinchoija, alu ahetana, maicham chunga ahal ding ahi. Chule athisan chu maicham panga alhoh lhahding ahi." 
Leviticus1:16 Aman achang oi le amul ho chu aloidoh ding, chule maicham solam sanga vut ho umna-a chu apaiding ahi." 
Leviticus1:17 Chule aman alha teni chu aloikeh ding, ahivanga aloikhen pai louding; thempu chun hichu maicham chung, mei chunga um thing chunga chu ahal ding: hichu govam thilto, meija kisem thilto, Pakai henga gimnamtui chu hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:1 Chule khat touvin Pakai henga anneh thilto atoa ahile, ama thilpeh chu changbong neljet hiding; achunga chu thao alheija, chule bego akoiding:" 
Leviticus2:2 Aman hichu Aaron chapate thempuho henga ahinchoi ding: aman hichea kona chu changbong nel chu thao toh, bego jouse toh akhut dimkhat alahdoh ding; chule thempu chun hetjingna hidinga meija kisem thilto, Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga maicham chunga chu ahalding ahi." 
Leviticus2:3 Chule a-anneh thilpeh amoh chu Aaron le achapatea hiding ahi: hichu meija kisem Pakaiya thiltoho lah-a athengpen ahi. 
Leviticus2:4 Nangman thuhkhuh-a kihonmin anneh thilto nahin choija ahileh, hichu changbong neljetna kisem cholsolou changlhah thao kihal hiding, ahilouleh cholsolou changlhah paset thao kinu hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:5 Chule nathilto chu bela kikang anneh thilto ahile, hichu thao toh kihal cholsolou changbong neljet hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:6 Nangman hichu ahal hala nakhenna, chule achunga thao nalhei ding, hichu anneh thilto hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:7 Na thilto chu thil kanna bela kikang ahile, hichu thao toh changbong neljet na kibol hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:8 Chule nangman hiche ho-a kisem anneh thilto chu Pakai henga nahinchoi ding; hichu thempu henga akipeh tengle, aman maicham phung ahinchoilut ding ahi." 
Leviticus2:9 Thempu chun hiche anneh thilto-a kona chu hetjingna dinga phabep alahdoh-a, maicham chunga chu ahalding: hichu meija kisem thilto, Pakai henga gimnamtui chu hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:10 Hiche anneh thilto amoh chu Aaron le achapatea hiding ahi: hichu meija kisem Pakaiya thiltoho lah-a athengpen hiding ahi. 
Leviticus2:11 Pakai henga nahinpoh anneh thilto nahinchoi chanchu chola kisem hilou ding ahi: ajehchu nangman meija kisem Pakaiya thilto tapou lah-a chu chol ahiloule khoiju nahal louding ahi. 
Leviticus2:12 Ahin ga masaho thilto-a vang chun, hiho chu Pakai henga napeh dingu ahi: hijongle hiho chu gimnamtui hidinga maichama kihal louding ahi." 
Leviticus2:13 Anneh thilto napeh chan chu nangman chi naso cheh ding; na anneh thilto-a chu na Pakai toh nakitepna chi chu na lhahsam sah louding ahi: nathilto jouse chu chito natotha cheh ding ahi. 
Leviticus2:14 Chule Pakai henga anneh thilto-a ga masaho nato-a ahileh, na gamasa anneh thilto nato ding chu changvui hing meija kisang go, akunga kona ki-atlha avui lhingset hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:15 Chule achunga chu thao nasuna, chule chuche chunga chu thao namtui nakoi ding: hichu anneh thilto hiding ahi." 
Leviticus2:16 Chule thempu chun hetjingna dinga changvuija kona phabep, thao phabep le bego jouse chu ahal ding: hichu Pakai henga meija kisem thilto hiding ahi." 
Leviticus3:1 Chule ama thilto chu chamna thilto ganlhaina ahia, ganhon lah-a kona ato-a ahile: hichu achal hihen lang anu hijongle, Pakai anga atodoh ding chu nolnabei ahi." 
Leviticus3:2 Chule aman athilto luchanga akhut angapma, houkhom ho houbuh kot phunga atha ding; chule Aaron chapate thempuho chun athisan chu maicham chung kimvela chu athekhum diu ahi." 
Leviticus3:3 Chule aman chamna thilto ganlhaina chu Pakai henga meija kisem thilto-a apehding; asungho toma athao le asungho chunga athaova kaijouse," 
Leviticus3:4 Akal teni leh akong vel lah-a kai athao, chule athin chunga kai athao chu akal teni puma alahdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus3:5 Chule Aaron chapaten hichu maicham meichunga um thing chunga govam ganlhaina chunga chu ahal dingu ahi: hichu meija kisem thilto Pakai henga gimnamtui chu ahi. 
Leviticus3:6 Chamna thilto ganlhaina-a Pakai henga ato chu kelngoihon lah-a kona ahile; hichu achal hihen anu hijongle nolna beihel ato ding ahi. 
Leviticus3:7 Aman athilto dinga chu kelngoi nou ato-a ahile, aman hichu Pakai anga atoding ahi." 
Leviticus3:8 Aman athilto doh luchang chunga chu akhut angapma, chule houkhom ho houbuh masanga hichu athading: chule Aaron chapaten chuche thisan chu maicham chung kimvel athinkhum dingu ahi." 
Leviticus3:9 Aman chamna thilto ganlhaina-a kona chu Pakai henga meija kisem thilto atoding; chua um athao le amei geija athao jouse chu ating juija lahdoh ding; chule asunga kai athao le asungho toma pang athao jouse," 
Leviticus3:10 Chule akalteni leh akong vel lah-a kai athao, chule athin chunga kai athao chu akal teni puma alahdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus3:11 Thempu chun hichu maicham chunga ahalding: hichu Pakai henga meija kisem anneh thilto chu ahi. 
Leviticus3:12 Chule athilto chu kelcha ahia ahile, aman hichu Pakai anga atoding ahi." 
Leviticus3:13 Aman chuche luchang chunga chu akhut angapma, houkhom ho houbuh masanga athading; chule Aaron chapaten chuche thisan chu maicham kimvela athekhum dingu ahi." 
Leviticus3:14 Aman hiche athilto-a kona chu Pakai henga meija kisem thilto atoding; asungho toma athao le asung chunga kai athao jouse," 
Leviticus3:15 Chule akalteni leh akong vel lah-a kai athao, chule athin chunga kai athao chu akal teni puma alahdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus3:16 Chule thempu chun hichu maicham chunga ahalding: hichu gimnamtui hidinga meija kisem anneh ahi: athao jouse chu Pakaiya ahi. 
Leviticus3:17 Nanghon thao hileh thisan hileh naneh louhel dingu ahi tihi nachennao mun jouse-a akum kho-a nakhang uva chondan hijing ding ahi. 
Leviticus4:1 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati." 
Leviticus4:2 Israel chate henga seipeh-in, Mihem khattouvin Pakaiyin bollou dinga athupehho khattou abola, hettoh lou jeh-a bollou dingho lah-a khat penpen chu anabola achonset tah-a:" 
Leviticus4:3 Thao kinu thempu chu mipi ho chonset dungjuija achonset tah-a ahileh; ama chun anabolna chonset jehchun chonset thilto dingin Pakai henga nolna beihel bongchalnou khat hinkaihen. 
Leviticus4:4 Aman bongchal chu Pakai anga houkhom ho houbuh kot phunga ahin kaiding, chule chuche bongchal luchang chunga chu akhut angapma, chule Pakai anga abongchal chu atha ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:5 Thao kinu thempu chun chuche bongchal thisan chu alah-a, chule hichu houkhom ho houbuh-a ahin choiding:" 
Leviticus4:6 Thempu chun chuche thisanna chu akhut jung adelut ding, chule thisan chu muntheng pondal masang, Pakai angsunga chu sagivei athe ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:7 Thempu chun thisan phabep houkhom ho houbuh sunga um, Pakai anga gimnamtui maicham sakiho chunga chu akoiding; chule bongchal thisan jouse chu houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah phunga govam thilto maicham bula chu asunlhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:8 Chule aman chuche-a kona chu bongchal thao jouse chu chonset thilto dinga alahdoh ding; asungho toma athao le asungho chunga kai athao jouse," 
Leviticus4:9 Chule akalteni leh akong vel lah-a kai athao, chule athin chunga kai athao chu akal teni puma alahdoh ding," 
Leviticus4:10 Chamna thilto ganlhaina bongchala kona akilahdoh banga chu alahdoh ding: chule thempu chun hiche ho chu govam thilto maicham chunga ahal ding ahi. 
Leviticus4:11 Chule bongchal vun le aphe jouse, aluchangl e akengho, chule asungho le a-eh," 
Leviticus4:12 Abongchal pumpi chu aman gebuh pam vut ho kiboh lhahna munthenga chu apohdoh-a, hichu thingchunga meija ahal ding: vut ho kisun lhah na-a chu ahal ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:13 Chule Israel houkhom ho chu apumpiuva hettohlou jeh-a achonset tah uva, chule athil chu houkhom mipi ho mitna kona akisela, chule amahon bol louding dol thilho chungchanga Pakai thupeh ho lah-a khatpen chu anaboluva, chule athemmo tah uva ahile;" 
Leviticus4:14 Chonset abolnao chonsetna chu akihetdoh teng, houkhom ho chun chuche chonsetna jeh-a chu houkhom ho houbuh masanga bongchal nou khat ahinkai dingu ahi." 
Leviticus4:15 Houkhom upaho chun akhutnu chu bongchal luchang chunga Pakai angsunga angap diu: chule bongchal chu Pakai angsunga kithat ding ahi. 
Leviticus4:16 Chule thao kinu thempu chun bongchal thisan chu houkhom ho houbuh-a ahin choiding: 
Leviticus4:17 Chule thempu chun chuche thisan phabep lah-a chu akhutjung adelutna, pondal masanga Pakai angsunga chu sagivei athinlhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:18 Chule aman thisan phabep houkhom ho houbuh sunga um, Pakai anga gimnamtui maicham sakiho chunga chu akoiding; chule bongchal thisan jouse chu abona houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah phunga govam thilto maicham bula chu asunlhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:19 Aman hichea kona chu athao jouse alahdoh sohding, chule hichu maicham chunga ahalding ahi." 
Leviticus4:20 Aman hiche bongchal chu chonset thilto bongchal abolna bang banga abolding, hitobanga chu hiche chunga hi abolding ahi: chule thempu chun amaho dinga longlhenna abolpeh-a, chule amaho kingaidam ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:21 Chule aman bongchal chu gebuh pama apohdoh-a, bongchal masajo ahal banga chu ahalding ahi: hichehi houkhom ho dinga chonset thilto ahi." 
Leviticus4:22 Vaihom khat achonsetna, chule aman bol louding dol thilho chungchanga Pakai thupeh ho lah-a khatpen chu anabola, chule athemmo tah-a ahile;" 
Leviticus4:23 Ahilouleh, chonsetna anabol achonsetna chu ahin kihetdoh-a ahile; aman athilto-a dinga nolna beihel kelcha nou achal khat ahinkai ding;" 
Leviticus4:24 Chule hiche kelcha luchanga chu akhut angapma, chule amahon Pakai angsunga govam thilto athanao mun'a athading ahi; hichu chonset thilto ahi." 
Leviticus4:25 Chule thempu chun hiche chonset thilto thisan chu akhutjunga alah-a, govam thilto maicham sakiho chunga chu akoiding, chule athisan chu abona govam thilto maicham bula chu asunlhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:26 Chule aman chamna thilto ganlhaina thao ahal banga, hiche thao jouse chu maicham chunga ahalding: chule thempu chun ama-a dinga achonsetna chungchanga longlhen abolpeh ding, chule ama ngaidam hiding ahi." 
Leviticus4:27 Chule milham ho lah-a khattou achonsetna, chule aman bol louding dol thilho chungchanga Pakai thupeh ho lah-a khatpen chu anabola, chule athemmo tah-a ahile:" 
Leviticus4:28 Ahilouleh, chonsetna anabol achonsetna chu ahin kihetdoh-a ahile; aman chonsetna anabol achonsetna jeh-a chu, athilto-a dinga nolna beihel kelcha nou anu khat ahinkai ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:29 Chule aman chonset thilto luchang chunga chu akhut angapma, chonset thilto chu govam thiltona munna chu athading ahi." 
Leviticus4:30 Chule thempu chun chuche thisan phabep chu akhut junga alah-a, govam thilto maicham kiho chunga akoiding, chule chuche thisan jouse chu abona maicham bula asunlhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:31 Aman chuche thao ho jouse chu chamna thilto ganlhai thao akilahdoh banga alahdoh ding, chule thempu chun hichu Pakai henga gimnamtui dinga maicham chunga ahalding ahi." 
Leviticus4:32 Aman chonset thilto dinga kelngoi nou khat ahinpohle, aman nolna beihel anu khat ahinpoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus4:33 Aman chuche chonset thilto luchunga chu akhut angapma chule chonset thilpeh dinga amahon govam thilto abolnao munna chu hichu atha dingu ahi. 
Leviticus4:34 Thempu chun chonset thilto thisan chu akhut junga alah-a chule govam thilpeh maicham kiho chunga chu anuding, chule maicham bulla chu chuche thisan jouse chu asunlhah sohding:" 
Leviticus4:35 Aman chuche-a kona athao jouse chu, chamna thilto ganlhaina-a kona kelngoinou thao akilahdoh banga alahdoh-a; chule thempu chun Pakai henga meija kisem thilto ho kibol dungjuija maicham chunga ahalding ahi: chule thempu chun amapan anabol achonsetna jeh-a chu longlhena abolpeh-a, chule ama chu kingaidam ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:1 Mi khattou amu ahiloule ahet thilkhat chunga hettohsah-a apana, kihahselna aw ajah-a jong phongdoh louva a-ima kona achonset tah-a ahile; amatah-in themona akipoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:2 Ahiloule mi khattouvin thilthenglou khattou, sathenglou thilong hihen, ahiloule ganthenglou thilong hihen, ahiloule athenglou tolla kithol thoho thilong hijongle atoh khah-a, chule hichu aman ahetdohlou ahileh; amajong athenglou hiding, chule themmo chang hiding ahi." 
Leviticus5:3 Ahiloule aman mihem khat thenlouna atoh khah-a, itobang thenlouna hijongle mihem khat suhboh theija chu atohkhah-a, chule hichu aman ahetdohlou ahileh; aman hichu ahetdoh teng, ama themmo chang hiding ahi." 
Leviticus5:4 Ahiloule mi khattou aphalou hihen, apha hijongle bolding akama akihahsela, itobang kihahselna hijongle akama aphondoh-a, hichu aman ahetdohlou ahileh; hichu aman ahetdoh teng, hicheho khatpen pena themo changding ahi." 
Leviticus5:5 Chule hitiding ahi, ama hiche thilho khatpen pena themo achanteng, aman chuche thilla chun kachonse tai tia aphondoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:6 Chule aman chonsetna abol achonsetna jeh-a chu Pakai henga athemona thilto, chonset thilto-a dinga ahonlah-a kona anu, kelngoinou ahiloule kelcha nou khat ahinkai ding; chule thempu chun ama-a dinga achonsetna chungchanga chu longlhenna abolpeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:7 Chule ijemtia aman kelngoinou chu ahinpoh theilou tah-a ahileh, aman anabol chonsetna jeh-a chu vakhu ni ahiloule vapal nou ni, khat chu chonset thilto dinga, chule adang khat chu govam thilto dinga Pakai henga ahinchoi ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:8 Chule aman hiche ho chu thempu koma ahinchoi ding, thempu chun chonset thilto ding joh chu atodoh masatna, chule angonga kona alu ahepela ahetan pai louding ahi." 
Leviticus5:9 Chule aman chonset thilto thisan chu maicham chung apanga athinlhah ding; chule thisan umnalai jouse dangho jouse chu maicham bula athin lhah ding ahi: hichehi chonset thilto chu ahi. 
Leviticus5:10 Chule aman anina chu govam thilto-a dinga akibolji ngaibanga atoding: chule thempu chun chonset anabol chonsetna jeh-a chu ama dinga longlhenna abolpeh ding, chule ama kingaidam ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:11 Ahinla aman vakhu ni ahiloule vapal nou ni chu ahinchoi jou tah louva ahileh, achonsepa chun athilto dinga changbong neljet ephah dimkhat hopsom-a hopkhat chu chonset thilto-a dinga ahinchoi ding; hiche chunga chu thao asunlou ding, chule bego jong akoilou ding ahi; ajehchu hichu chonset thilto ahi." 
Leviticus5:12 Chujou tengle aman hichu thempu henga ahinchoi ding, chule thempu chun melchihna dinga hichea kona chu akhut dimkhat alah-a, Pakai henga meija kisem thiltoho kibol banga, maicham chunga ahalding ahi: hichu chonset thilpeh ahi." 
Leviticus5:13 Thempu chun hiche thilho lah-a achonsetna penpen jeh-a chu longlhena abolpeh ding, chule ama chu kingaidam ding ahi: chuleh amohcheng chu anneh thilpeh banga thempu-a ding hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus5:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus5:15 Mi khattouvin suhkhel ana neija, chule hettohlou jeh-a Pakai thil thengho chunga ana chonset tah-a ahile; chuteng aman Pakai henga asuhkhel jeh-a kelngoihon ho lah-a kona nolna beihel achal khat ahinkai ding, aman chu nangman muntheng thil tena dungjuija dangka shekel nateppeh ding: hichu suhkhel thilto hiding ahi." 
Leviticus5:16 Chule aman thiltheng chunga anasuhkhel na chu adit ding, chule nga-a khat abe-a hichu thempu henga apehding: chule thempu chun ama dinga suhkhel thilto kelngoichala chu longlhenna abolpeh ding, chule ama chu kingaidam ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:17 Chule mi khattou achonsetna, chule Pakai thupeh-in boldinga aphal lou thilho lah-a khattou anabol tah-a ahileh; aman kihet hih jongle themmo chang ahin, chule akhangit louna chu akipoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:18 Chule aman kelngoihon lah-a kona nolna beihel achal khat, aman chu nangman kilom nasah dungjuija natanpeh-a, suhkhel thilto dinga thempu henga ahinkai ding: chule thempu chun ama dinga akihetdoh lou asuhkhelna chungchanga chu longlhena abolpeh ding, chule ama chu kingaidam ding ahi." 
Leviticus5:19 Hichu suhkhel thilto ahi: aman tahbeh-a Pakai douna-a asuhkhel ahi. 
Leviticus6:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus6:2 Mi khattou achonsetna, Pakai douna-a suhkhel khat aneija, chule aheng akoma thil le lo avop dinga kikoisah chungham, ahiloule kiloikhomna chungham, ahiloule pum hatna kiladoh thil kila chunghama jou abola, ahiloule aheng akom adoha bola ahile;" 
Leviticus6:3 Ahiloule thil mangkhat amudoh-a, hiche chungchanga chu jou aseija, chule jouva kihahsela ahile, hitiho jouse lah-a khatpenpen abola, achonsetna ahile:" 
Leviticus6:4 Chuteng hitiding ahi, ama achonset, athemo tah jeh-a chu aman pumhatna alah ham, ahiloule doha-a kona amu ham, ahilouleh aman avop dinga kikoisah ham, ahiloule amang akimu chu hijongle alepeh ding," 
Leviticus6:5 Ahiloule ajouva ana kihahselna jouse chu hijongle; abonchang keija alhingsetna alepeh ding, chule hichea chu nga-a khat abe ding, chule suhkhel thilto ato nikho le hichu aneipa alepeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus6:6 Chule aman Pakai henga asuhkhel thilto-a dinga kelngoihon lah-a kona nolna beihel achal khat, aman chu nangman kilom nasah dungjuija natanpeh ding, thempu henga suhkhel thilto dinga ahinkai ding ahi." 
Leviticus6:7 Chule thempu chun Pakai angsunga amapa dinga chu longlhena abolpeh ding: chule aman suhkhela anaboldoh hicheho khatpenpen jeh-a chu ngaidam changding ahi. 
Leviticus6:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus6:9 Aaron le achapate thu penlang, hitin seijin, Hichehi govam thilto thudola dan kipe chu ahi: maicham chunga jan khovah kei jingkah geija akihala, chule maicham meikong chu hiche sunga chu koujing jengding ahi jeh-a chu govam thilto kiti ahi." 
Leviticus6:10 Chule thempu chun atupatpon von chu akivon ding, chule tupat pon delchen chu akichen ding, chule maicham chunga govam thilto meikouvin akahvam vut hochu alodoh-a, hicheho chu maicham panga akoiding ahi." 
Leviticus6:11 Chule aman avonho chu asutlhah-a, chule von dangho akivon ding, chule avutho chu gebuh pam muntheng khatna apohdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus6:12 Chule maicham chunga meichu asunga chu koujing ding; hichu kisumit louding ahi: chule thempu chun jingkah sehleh hiche chunga chu thing atiding, hiche chunga chu govam thilto chu akoitoh ding; chule hiche chunga chu chamna thiltoho thao chu ahal ding ahi." 
Leviticus6:13 Mei chu maicham chunga chu a-itih-a koujing ding; hichu mitlouhel ding ahi. 
Leviticus6:14 Chule hichehi anneh thilto chunga danthu ahi; Aaron chapaten Pakai angsung maicham masanga chu atodoh dingu ahi. 
Leviticus6:15 Chule aman anneh thilto changbong le athao chu anneh thilto chunga kikoi bego jouse puma akhutna ahamdoh ding, hichu Pakai henga gimnamtui dinga maicham chunga hetjingna dinga ahal ding ahi." 
Leviticus6:16 Chule hichea kona amohse chu Aaron le achapaten aneh dingu: hichu muntheng phunga cholsolou changlhah toh amediu, houkhom ho houbuh hongsunga chu aneh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus6:17 Hichu chol toh kikantha louding ahi. Keiman hichehi eikipe meija kisem thilto lah-a kona amaho chan dinga amaho kapeh ahitai; hichehi chonset thilto le suhkhel thilto banga atheng chungnung ahi. 
Leviticus6:18 Hichu Aaron chapate lah-a pasal jousen aneh dingu ahi. Hichehi meija kisem Pakaiya thiltoho chungchanga nakhang khanguva a-itih-a dinga chondan kipe chu ahi: hicheho tongkha tapou chu atheng hiding ahi. 
Leviticus6:19 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus6:20 Hiche thilto hi thao akinu nikhouva patna Aaron le achapaten Pakai henga ato dingu thilto chu ahi; anneh thilto-a niseh-a atojing dingu chu changbong neljet ephah khat hopsom-a hopkhat hiding, akehkhat chu jingkah lamle atouva, chule akehkhat chu janle ato dingu ahi." 
Leviticus6:21 Hichu khangbela thao toh kibol ding; chule hichu akikan joutengleh nangman nahin choilut ding: chule anneh thilto apheng penga kikang jousaho chu nangman Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga nato ding ahi. 
Leviticus6:22 Chule ama khela thao kinu achapate lah-a kona thempupa chun ato ding ahi: hichehi Pakai henga a-itih-a dinga chondan kisem chu ahi; hichu aboncha halchai helding ahi. 
Leviticus6:23 Ajehchu thempu-a ding anneh thilto tapou chu aboncha halchai ding ahi: hichu nehlou ding ahi. 
Leviticus6:24 Chule Pakaiyin hichu Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus6:25 Aaron le achapateho henga hitihin seijin, Hichehi chonset thilto thudola dan kipe chu ahi; Govam thilto akithana mun tah-a chu chonset thilto chu Pakai angsunga kithat ding ahi: hichehi atheng chungnung ahi." 
Leviticus6:26 Chonset thilto toh-a pang thempu chun hichu anehding ahi: hichu houkhom ho houbuh hongsung munthenga kineding ahi. 
Leviticus6:27 Ipi hitale chuche saphe tongkha tapou chu atheng hiding ahi: chule hiche thisan chu von khattou chunga akithekhum teng, nangman ana kithekhum von chu munthenga nasopding ahi." 
Leviticus6:28 Ahinla chuche kihona leibel chu kisukeh ding ahi: ijemtia hichu sumsan bela kihon ahile, abel chu not thenga chule twija lhaotheng ding ahi." 
Leviticus6:29 Thempuho lah-a pasal jouse chun hichu aneh diu ahi: hichu atheng chungnung ahi. 
Leviticus6:30 Chule munthenga kichamna bolna dinga houkhom ho houbuh sunga thisan kipolut chonset thilto tapou chu nehlouhel ding ahi: hichu meija govam ding ahi. 
Leviticus7:1 Chutobangma chun, hichehi suhkhel thilto thudola dan kipe chu ahi: hichehi atheng chungnung ahi." 
Leviticus7:2 Amahon govam thilto athanao muntah-a chu suhkhel thilto chu atha dingu ahi: chule athi chu maicham chung kimvela athe dingu ahi. 
Leviticus7:3 Chule aman chuche thao jouse chu atodoh ding, amei thao le asung toma athao jouse," 
Leviticus7:4 Chule akalteni leh akong vel lah-a kai athao, chule athin chunga kai athao chu akal teni puma alahdoh ding:" 
Leviticus7:5 Chule thempu chun hicheho chu Pakai henga meija kisem thilto hidinga ahalding ahi: hichehi suhkhel thilto ahi. 
Leviticus7:6 Thempuho lah-a Pasal tapouvin hiche chu anehdingu: hichu munthenga kineding ahi. Hichu atheng chungnung ahi. 
Leviticus7:7 Suhkhel thilto jong hi chonset thilto kibol banga kibol ding ahi: hiche teni-a dinga hi dan khatbou uma ahi: chumuna longlhena bol thempupa chun hichu akilah ding ahi. 
Leviticus7:8 Chule mi koija hijongle agovam thilto tohdoh peh-a pang thempupa chun, aman atodoh govam thilto vun chu akilah ahi." 
Leviticus7:9 Chule thuh-a kikang anneh thilto jouse le thil kana bel ahiloule khangbela kisem jouse chu, apehdoh-a pang thempupa changding ahi." 
Leviticus7:10 Chule anneh thilto thao toh kihala kigotsah tapou chu, Aaron chapate jouse chang dingu, khat le khat kibang cheh-a changding ahiuve." 
Leviticus7:11 Chule hichehi aman Pakai henga atoding chamna thilto ganlhaina thudola dan kipe chu ahi. 
Leviticus7:12 Aman hichu thangvah na-a ato ahile, aman thangvahna ganlhai chutoh thao toh kihal chol solou changlhah lumho, chule thao kinu changlhah phengho, chule changbong neljet na kisem le kikang changlhah lum thao toh kihal apehtha ding ahi." 
Leviticus7:13 Hiche changlhah lumho tailouva chu, achamna thilto thangvahna ganlhaina-a dinga chu chol kiso changlhah atotha ding ahi." 
Leviticus7:14 Chule hiche thilto jouse lah-a kona chu changlhah khatcheh Pakai henga jap thilto hidinga atoding; hichu chamna thilto ho thisan the-a pang thempupa changding ahi. 
Leviticus7:15 Chule thangvah na-a dinga chamna thilto ganlhaina saphe chu akitodoh nikho mama-a chu nehding ahi; chule aman hichu jingkah geija akhen louhel ding ahi. 
Leviticus7:16 Ahinla aganlhaina thilto chu kihahselna, ahiloule lungcham thilto ahile, aman aganlhaina thilto atodoh nikho mama-a chu kineding: chule amoh chu ajing geija jong kineding ahi." 
Leviticus7:17 Ahinla ganlhaina sa amoh chengse chu anithum channi le meija halding ahitai. 
Leviticus7:18 Chule ijemtia achamna thilto ganlhaina sa chu themkhat tou nithum chan ni-a ana kineh khah tah-a ahile, hichu kisanpeh louding, atohdoh pa-a dinga jong kitaipeh louding: hichu thilthet umtah hiding; chule chuche ana nepa chun akhangit louna akipoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus7:19 Chule thilthenglou khattou tongkha tapou sa chu nehlou ding; hichu meija halding ahi, chule satheng vangchu atheng jousen aneh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus7:20 Ahinla mihem khattou athenlouna achunga umpuma Pakaiya dinga kipedoh chamna thilto ganlhaina sa ne-a chu, hiche mipa ngeichu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus7:21 Chujongle mihem khattou thilthenglou, mithenglou ham, ahiloule sathenglou ham, ahiloule thet umtah thilthenglou ham tongkha-a, ahia Pakaiya dinga kipedoh chamna thilto ganlhaina sa ne-a chu, hiche mipa ngeichu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus7:22 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus7:23 Israel chate henga hitin seijin, Nanghon athao kitipou chu, bongchala hihen, kelngoija hihen, ahiloule kelcha-a hijongleh naneh lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus7:24 Chule gamsa thikam thao le gamsa hon atha sathao chu thildang danga manthei ahi; ahinla iti nama jongle hichu nanghon naneh lou dingu ahi. 
Leviticus7:25 Ijeh inem itile koihileh mihon Pakai henga meija kisem thilto-a dinga atou sa athao nechan chu,hiche mipa ngeichu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus7:26 Chujongle nanghon nachenna mun jouseuva thisan kiti pou pou, vacha-a hihen, ahiloule sa-a hijongle naneh lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus7:27 Koitobang mi hijongle thisan kiti netapou chu, hiche mipa ngeichu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus7:28 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus7:29 Israel chateho henga hitin seijin, Koi hile Pakai henga chamna thiltoh ganlhaina pechan chun, achamna thiltoh ganlhaina-a kona chu athilto chu Pakai henga apohlut ding ahi." 
Leviticus7:30 Akhut tah-a meija kisem Pakaiya thiltoho chu ahin choiding, a-om chu Pakai angsunga jap thilto-a jap dinga, a-om chu athaotoh ahinchoi ding ahi." 
Leviticus7:31 Chule thempu chun athao chu maicham chunga ahalding; amavang a-om chu Aaron le achapate chang dingu ahi. 
Leviticus7:32 Chule nanghon adah jetlam chu nachamna thilto hou longlhen belap thilto dinga thempu chu napeh dingu ahi. 
Leviticus7:33 Aaron chateho lah-a chamna thilto thisan le thao pe-a pang amachun adah jetlam chu ama channa changding ahi. 
Leviticus7:34 Ijeh inem itile Israel chateho chamna thilto ganlhaina ho-a kona keiman jap thilto-a kon a-om le dop thilto-a kon adah chu kalah-a, Israel chate lah-a kona atonsotna chondan hidinga Aaron thempu leh achapate chu kapeh ahitai." 
Leviticus7:35 Hichehi thempu natong dinga Pakai henga apehlut nikho-a kona Pakai henga meija kisem thiltoho lah-a kona, thao kinu-a Aaron le thao kinu-a achapate chanding chu ahin;" 
Leviticus7:36 Hichu Israel chateho-a kona pehding ahi tia Pakaiyin amaho thao anu nikho-a chu akhang khanguva chondan khatna aneidiuva athupeh ahi. 
Leviticus7:37 Hichehi govam thilto, anneh thilto, chonset thilto, suhkhel thilto, kipeh thengna le chamna thilto ganlhainaho-a dinga dan chu ahin;" 
Leviticus7:38 Hichu Pakaiyin Sinai molsanga Mosi henga, Israel chatehon Pakai henga athilto hou ato dingu ahi tia Sinai gamthipma thu apeh chunga athupeh chu ahi." 
Leviticus8:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus8:2 Aaron le achapate chu puijin lang, chule vonho, kinuding thao, chule chonset thilto dingin bongchal khat chule kelngoichal ni le cholsolou changlhah ephah khat kengin," 
Leviticus8:3 Chule mipi ho jouse chu houkhom ho Houbuh kotphunga chun khom khomin. 
Leviticus8:4 Chuin Mosi'n Pakaiyin athupeh bangchun anabolin; chule mipi ho chu houkhom ho Houbuh kotphunga akikhom khom taovin ahi. 
Leviticus8:5 Chuin Mosi'n houkhom ho henga, Hichehi Pakaiyin boldinga athupeh chu ahi, ati." 
Leviticus8:6 Chule Mosi'n Aaron le achapate chu ahinpuijin, amaho chu twijin asilin ahi." 
Leviticus8:7 Chuin aman sangkhol chu a-ah peh-in, konggah chu akonga agahsah-in, sangkhol cho chu a-ah peh-in, thempu sangkhol chu a-ah peh-in, phatah-a kikhong thempu sangkhola gahna-a chun agah-in, chule hiche-a chun thempu sangkhol chu achunga akhitnin ahi." 
Leviticus8:8 Chuin aman a-ompho chu a-ah peh-in; chule aman ompho-a chun Urim le Thummim akoijin ahi. 
Leviticus8:9 Chule aman alua thempu lukhuh akhuhpeh-in: chule Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin alukhuh achalpang lama chun sana lheng, lallukhuh theng chu akoijin ahi." 
Leviticus8:10 Chuin Mosi'n nuding thao chu alan, chule Houbuh leh asunga umjouse chu thao anun, abonin asuthengin ahi." 
Leviticus8:11 Chule aman hichea chun maicham chung chu sagivei athin khumin, maicham le akongle bel, atwi luina kongle akeng geijin asuthenna dingin thao anun ahi." 
Leviticus8:12 Chuin aman kinuding thao chu Aaron lujanga asunglha-in, suhthengna dingin thao anutan ahi." 
Leviticus8:13 Chule Mosi'n Aaron chapate chu ahinpuijin, Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin sangkhol hochu a-ah peh-in, konggah-in akongu agah-in, chule alu uva lukop akop peh-in ahi." 
Leviticus8:14 Chuin chonset thilto dingin bongchal chu ahin kaijin; chule Aaron le achapate chun chonset thilto-a dingin chuche bongchal luchanga chun akhutnu angam mun ahi. 
Leviticus8:15 Chule aman hichu athatnin; chule Mosi'n thisan chu alan, maicham sakiho chunga chun akhut jungin akoikimvelin, maicham chu asuthengin, chule thisan chu maicham bula asunglhan, achunga kichamna bolna dingin asuthengin ahi." 
Leviticus8:16 Chule aman asunga athao beh jouse le athin chunga athao aumho, chule akal teni le athao chu alan, chule hichu Mosi'n maicham chunga ahaltan ahi." 
Leviticus8:17 Ahinla bong chal le avun, aphe leh a-eh chu, Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun gebuh pama meijin ahaltan ahi." 
Leviticus8:18 Chule aman govam thilto-a dingin kelngoi chal chu ahinkaijin: chule Aaron le achapaten hiche kelngoi chal luchanga chun akhutnu angamun ahi. 
Leviticus8:19 Chuin aman hichu athatnin, chuleh Mosi'n thisan chu maicham chung kimvel athekhumin ahi." 
Leviticus8:20 Chuin aman kelngoichal chu a-at tel telin, chuin Mosi'n aluchang, ahal holeh athao chu ahaltai." 
Leviticus8:21 Chule aman asunglam ho le akengho chu twijin asopthengin; chuin Mosi'n kelngoi chal chu apumpin maicham chunga ahaltai. Hichu Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh banga, Pakai henga dinga meija kisem thilto, gimnamtui hidinga govam thilto chu ahi." 
Leviticus8:22 Chuin aman kelngoichal dang khat, kipeh thengna kelngoichal chu ahin kaijin: chule Aaron le achapate chun hichu kelngoichal luchanga akhutnu angamun" 
Leviticus8:23 Chuin aman hiche chu athatnin; chule Mosi'n chuche-a konchun thisan chu alan, Aaron bilkol mong jetlam le akhut jetlam khutpi chunga, chule akeng jetlam khopi chungah anun ahi." 
Leviticus8:24 Chujouvin aman Aaron chapate chu ahinpui doh-in, chule Mosi'n thisan chu abilkol mong jetlamu le akhut jetlamu khutpi chunga, chule akeng jetlamu khopi chungah anun ahi: chuin Mosi'n thisan chu maicham chung kimvela athin khumin ahi." 
Leviticus8:25 Chuin aman thao, amei thao le asunga kai athao jouse, athin chunga athao lom, chule akal teni le athao chule adah jetlam chu alan:" 
Leviticus8:26 Chule Pakai angsunga um cholsolou changlhah kikoina Pocha-a konchun, cholsolou changlhah lumkhat, chuleh thao kinu changlhah lumkhat, chule changlhah paset khat alan, hicheho chu athao le adah jetlam chunga chun akoijin ahi." 
Leviticus8:27 Chule aman abonchan Aaron khut chung le achate khutchunga akoijin, Pakai angsunga jap thilto hi dingin hicheho chu ajapmin ahi." 
Leviticus8:28 Chuin Mosi'n hicheho chu amaho khutna konin alan, chule maicham chungah govam thiltoho chunga chun ahaltan ahi. Hicheho hi gimnamtui hidinga kipetheng ho chu ahi. Hichehi Pakai henga dinga meija kisem thilto chu ahi." 
Leviticus8:29 Chuin Mosi'n a-om chu alan, Pakai anga jap thilto dingin ajapmin ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh banga, kipeh thengna kelngoichala kona chu Mosi chan ding uma ahi." 
Leviticus8:30 Chule Mosi'n kinuding thaova kon phabep leh maicham chunga um thisan phabep alan, chule hichu Aaron le avon chung, achapate chung le achapate avonhou chunga athin khumin, chule Aaron le avonho, chule achapate le achapate aumpiho von chu asuthengin ahi." 
Leviticus8:31 Chule Mosi'n Aaron le achapate henga, Houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah phunga chun asa chu honun; chule keiman Aaron le achapaten anehdiu ahi tia kathupeh bangchun, chua chun kipehthenga pocha sunga um changlhah chutoh neuvin." 
Leviticus8:32 Chule asa-a kon le changlhah-a kona akinemoh chengse chu nanghon meija nahal dingu ahi. 
Leviticus8:33 Chule nangho ni sagi sung nakipeh theng nao nikho akichai tokahse-a houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga kona napotdoh louhel dingu ahi: ajehchu nangho ni sagi nakisuh theng dingu ahi. 
Leviticus8:34 Aman tunia abol banga hi, chutobanga chu nangho-a dinga longlhen bolna dinga Pakaiyin bol dinga ana thupeh ahi." 
Leviticus8:35 Hijeh-a chu nangho nisagi sung sun le jana houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga naum uva, Pakaiyin nanganse nao chu nathilouna dinguva nanit dingu ahi: ajehchu chutia chu keima eina kithupeh-a ahi, ati." 
Leviticus8:36 Hitichun Aaron le achapate chun Pakaiyin Mosi khutna athupehho jouse bangchun abol taovin ahi. 
Leviticus9:1 Chuin aniget lhinin ahitin, Mosi'n Aaron le achapate chule Israel lamkaiho akoukhomin," 
Leviticus9:2 Chule Aaron henga, Nangman chonset thilto dingin bongnou khat chule govam thilto dingin kelngoichal khat, nolna beihel lanlang, hicheho chu Pakai anga tohdoh-in." 
Leviticus9:3 Chule nangman Israel chate henga, Nanghon chonset thilto dingin kelchaho nou khat; chule govam thilto dingin bongnou khat le kelngoinou khat, ania kumkhat lhingbep chule nolna beihel cheh kilah-un;" 
Leviticus9:4 Chule Pakai anga ganlhaina le chamna thilto dingin bongchal khat le kelngoichal khat jong; chule thao toh kihal anneh thilto jong hinlaovin: ijeh inem itile tunia hi nangho henga Pakai hungkilah ding ahi, tin seipeh-in ati." 
Leviticus9:5 Chule amahon Mosi'n athupeh jouse chu houkhom ho houbuh maija ahinkai taovin: chule houkhom ho jouse chu ahung naijun Pakai anga ading taove. 
Leviticus9:6 Chuin Mosi'n, Hichehi Pakaiyin nanghon nabol diuva nathupeh-u chu ahi: chutile Pakai loupina chu nangho henga hungkilah ding ahi, ati." 
Leviticus9:7 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron henga, Maicham phunglama chen, chule nachonsetna thilto le nagovam thilto gatoh-in, chule nangma dingle mipi ho dingin longlhena gabolin: chule mipi ho thilto chu toh-in lang, Pakai thupeh bangin amaho dingin longlhena gabolpeh-in, ati." 
Leviticus9:8 Hitichun Aaron maicham phung lama achen, chule ama chang dingin chonset thilto bongnou chu athat tan ahi." 
Leviticus9:9 Chule Aaron chapaten ama henga thisan chu ahinchoijun: chule aman thisana chun akhutjung adelutnin, chule hichu maicham sakiho chunga akoijin, chule thisan chu maicham bula asunglhan ahi." 
Leviticus9:10 Ahinla chonset thilto thao leh akal teni, chule athin chunga thao umchu, Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuijin maicham chunga ahaltai." 
Leviticus9:11 Chule aphe le avun chu aman gebuh pamlamah meijin ahallin ahi. 
Leviticus9:12 Chuin aman govam thilto chu athatnin, chule Aaron chapaten thisan chu ama henga ahinpeuvin, aman hichu maicham chung kimvela chun athen ahi." 
Leviticus9:13 Chule aman govam thilto chu ahal ho le alutoh pumin ama apeovin: chule aman hicheho chu maicham chunga ahalin ahi. 
Leviticus9:14 Chule aman asung ho le akeng ho chu asopthengin, chule hicheho chu maicham chunga govam thilto chunga chun ahaltai." 
Leviticus9:15 Chuin aman mipite thilto chu ahin choijin, chule mipi ho dinga chonset thilto kelcha chu amanin, chule athatnin, hichu amasa-a bangin chonset thilton atoh-in ahi." 
Leviticus9:16 Chule aman govam thilto chu ahin choijin, akibol ding dungjuijin atoh-in ahi." 
Leviticus9:17 Chule aman anneh thilto chu ahin choijin, chuche-a konchun khut dimkhat alan, chule jingkah govam ganlhaina koma chun hichu maicham chunga ahalin ahi." 
Leviticus9:18 Aman mipi ho chamna ganlhai thilto dingin bongchal le kelngoichal jong chu athatnin: Aaron chapaten thisan chu ama ahin peovin, hichu aman maicham chung kimvela chun athen ahi." 
Leviticus9:19 Chule chuche bongchal le kelngoichal thao, amei thao le asunga kai athaoho, akal teni le athin chunga athao;" 
Leviticus9:20 Chuin amahon athao chu a-om chunga akoijun, aman athao chu maicham chunga ahalin ahi." 
Leviticus9:21 Chule Mosi'n athupeh bangin, a-om le adah jetlam chu Pakai anga jap thilto dingin Aaron'in ajapmin ahi." 
Leviticus9:22 Chuin Aaron'in mipi lam ngan akhut adomsangin, amaho chu phatthei aboh-in, chuin chonset thilto, govam thilto chule chamna thilto atona-a konin ahung kumlhatan ahi." 
Leviticus9:23 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chu houkhom ho houbuh sunga alut lhonin, chuin ahungdoh lhonin, mipi ho chu phatthei aboh lhonin ahi: chuin Pakai loupina chu mipi ho jouse henga ahung kilahtan ahi." 
Leviticus9:24 Chule Pakai anga konin meikou khat ahung doh-in, maicham chunga govam thilto le athao chu akavam tai. Mipi ho jousen hichu amu phatnun apengun, amaiju asulutnun abohkhup taove." 
Leviticus10:1 Chuin Aaron chapate Nadab le Abihu'in alheng cheh ala lhonin, asunga mei akoi lhonin, chuin asunga chun gimnamtui akoi lhonin, aman athupeh-u hilou Pakai angsunga mei kidangtah atohdoh lhontan ahi." 
Leviticus10:2 Chuin Pakaiya konin meikou ahungdoh-in, amani chu akan, Pakai angsunga chun athi lhontan ahi." 
Leviticus10:3 Hichun Mosi'n Aaron henga, Hichehi Pakaiyin anasei, Keima eihin naiho-a chu suhthenga kaum ding, chule mipi ho jouse angsunga loupisah-a kaum ding ahi, tia aseichu ahi, ati. Chuin Aaron athipbeh tan ahi." 
Leviticus10:4 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron paneopa Uzziel chapateni Mishael le Elzaphan chu akouvin, ajah lhona, Hungnai lhonin, munthenga konin nasopite niu hi gemun pamlama podoh lhonin atin ahi." 
Leviticus10:5 Hitichun amani achenai lhonin, Mosi'n aseibang chun asangkhol lhona aman lhonin, apumin gebuh pama apodoh lhontai." 
Leviticus10:6 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron le achapateni Eleazar le Ithamar henga, Naluchungu hohdoh hih-un, naponu jong botkeh hih-un; achuti loule thi khaovin natin, chule mipi ho jouse chunga lunghanna hunglhung khante: ahinla nasopiteu, Israel insung pumpi hin Pakaiyin achokou meikong hi lhasetpi joh-u hen." 
Leviticus10:7 Chule nangho houkhom ho houbuh kotna kona nachedoh louhel dingu ahi, achuti loule thikhaovin nate: ijeh inem itile nachung uva Pakai thaonu chu uma ahi, ati. Chule amahon Mosi thusei bangchun abolcheh-un ahi." 
Leviticus10:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Aaron henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus10:9 Nangma nahin, naumpi nachate ahiuvin, houkhom ho houbuh sunga nachelut tenguleh ju ahiloule khamnathei nadonlou dingu ahi, achuti loule nathi dingu ahi: hichehi nakhang khanguva a-itih-a dinga chonna dan hiding," 
Leviticus10:10 Chutia chu nanghon atheng le athenglou, chule angim le angimlou nase khen theijuva," 
Leviticus10:11 Chule nanghon Israel chateho chu Pakaiyin Mosi khutna amaho aseipeh chondan jouse nahil theina dingu ahi, ati." 
Leviticus10:12 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron le akidalha achapateni Eleazar le Ithamar henga, Meija kisem Pakai henga thilto lah-a aval anneh thilto chu laovin lang, hichu chol beijin maicham panga chun neovin: ajehchu hichu atheng chungnung ahi." 
Leviticus10:13 Chule nanghon hichu muntheng mun'a chu naneh dingu ahi: ajehchu hichu meija kisem Pakai henga ganlhaina ho lah-a nangma chan chule nachapate chan hija ahi: hitia hi keima eina kithupeh ahi. 
Leviticus10:14 Chule jap thilto a-op le dop thilto adahbul chu nangma le nachapaten, chule nangma toh umkhom nachanuten muntheng khatna naneh diu ahi: ajehchu hicheho chu Israel chate chamna thilto ganlhainaho-a kona kipedoh nangma chan chule nachapate chan chu ahi." 
Leviticus10:15 Dop thilto adahbul le jap thilto a-op chu amahon Pakai anga jap thilto-a ajap dinga meija kisem athao thilto chutoh ahin choitha dingu; chule hichu Pakai athupeh dungjuija a-itih-a chondan hidinga, nangma le naumpi nachapate chanding hiding ahi, ati." 
Leviticus10:16 Chuin Mosi'n chonset thilto kelcha chu hoitah-in akholin ahile, veuvin, hichu akahvam tan ahi: hichun ahing nalai Aaron chapateni Eleazar le Ithamar chunga chun alung ahangin, hitihin aseitai," 
Leviticus10:17 Ipiding jeh penna nanghon chonset thilto chu theng chungnung ahi ti henasa le Pathen'in hichu houkhom ho chonkhelna poding le Pakai anga amaho dinga longlhenna bolna dinga nangho napeh-u ahi ti henasa-a munthenga naneh lou uham? 
Leviticus10:18 Veovin, athisan chu muntheng sunga ahin kichoilut poi: keiman kathupeh banga, tahbeh-a nanghon hichu munthenga nananeh ding dolu ahi, ati." 
Leviticus10:19 Chuin Aaron'in Mosi henga, Ven, tuni kho-a hi amahon achonset thiltou leh agovam thiltou Pakai anga atou ahin chule hitobang thil hohin eilhun khumtai. Chule keiman tuni hin chonset thilto chu ana netaleng, hichu Pathen mitmun san hinantem? ati." 
Leviticus10:20 Chuin Mosi'n hichu ajah phatnin, alunglhai tan ahi." 
Leviticus11:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus11:2 Israel chate henga hitihin seipeh lhonin, Hiche hohi leiset chunga sa ho jouse lah-a naneh diu saho chu ahiuve." 
Leviticus11:3 Sa jouse lah-a kon akengtin kikhena, atin ni-a kika, chule anehsa ihdoh kitna lhaikit tapou chu naneh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus11:4 Hijeng jongle hiche hohin anehsa ihdoh kitna lhaikitnu henglang, atinnu kika jong le naneh lou dingu ahi: Sangongsang hin anehsa a-ihdoh kitnin alhainan, ahin akengtin akikah loujeh-in; ama chu nangho dinga athenglou ahi." 
Leviticus11:5 Chule jupi khun anehsa a-ihdoh kitnin alhainan, ahin atin akikah loujeh-in, ama chu nangho dinga athenglou ahi." 
Leviticus11:6 Chule telep khun anehsa a-ihdoh kitnin alhainan, atin akikah loujeh-in, ama chu nangho dinga athenglou ahi." 
Leviticus11:7 Chule vohcha khu akengtin akikhena atin akikah jeng vangin, anehsa a-ihdoh-a alhailou jeh-in, ama chu nangho dinga thenglou ahi." 
Leviticus11:8 Amaho sa naneh lou dingu, chuleh athilong jong natohkhah lou dingu ahi. Amaho nangho dinga athenglou ahiuve." 
Leviticus11:9 Hichehohi twilah-a um naneh dingu jouse chu ahi: twilah-a um alha le alip neitapou, twikhanglen ho-a um hihen, vadung ho-a um hijongle, hicheho chu naneh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus11:10 Chule alha le alip neilou ho jouse, twikhanglen ho-a um hihen, chule vadung ho-a um hijongle, twi lah-a chatle thei jouse le twilah-a um ahingthei jouse chu, nangho-a dinga thet umtah hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:11 Amachu nangho dinga thet umtah hiding ahin; nanghon asa-u chu naneh loudiu, athilong hou chu thet uma nahet joh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus11:12 Twilah-a um alha le alip neilou tapou hu nangho dinga thet umtah hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:13 Chule hiche hohi vachaho lah-a nanghon thil thet uma nahet dingu chu ahi; nanghon hicheho chu nanehlou dingu ahin, amaho thet umtah ahiuve: mulaopi, muvanlai chule mungagal." 
Leviticus11:14 Muthong le, mu chilhah jouse:" 
Leviticus11:15 Va-ah tincheng le achilhah jouse; 
Leviticus11:16 sumbupi, lhang simbu le kakhut, chule muthi le achilhah jouse," 
Leviticus11:17 Chuleh sumbu neo, twivatot vom, chule sumbupi," 
Leviticus11:18 Chule twivatot, twilen vamuhsao, chule chammu," 
Leviticus11:19 Twiva, Vakengsang chule achilhah jouse, chule Vashonglhu chule bah." 
Leviticus11:20 Tolla vah vacha jouse, akeng li-a che ho jouse chu nangho dinga thet umtah hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:21 Hijongle nanghon nanehthei tolla vah kengli nei ahia lengle thei hochu, lei chunga chople nathei ding akengphang chunguva kengho neichan chu;" 
Leviticus11:22 Amaho lah-a kona hicheho hi naneh thei dingu ahi; khaokho leh achilhah, khaonam leh achilhah, lhenglhe le achilhah, chule khaokhopi le achilhah." 
Leviticus11:23 Ahinla adang tolla vah kengli nei ahia lengthei jouse chu nangho dinga thet umtah hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:24 Chule hicheho jeh-a hi nangho athenglou nahi dingu ahi: koi hile amaho thilong tongkha chu nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:25 Chule koi hileh amaho thilong pokha chun apon akisop ding ahin, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:26 Sa akeng tin kikah-a ahia ni kisolou leh anehsa ihdoh-a lhailou taphot thilong chu nangho dinga aboh ahin; atongkha tapou chu aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:27 Chule akeng li-a che gamsa jouse lah-a, akhophanga chetapou chu nangho dinga aboh ahi; koi hileh amaho thilong tongkha chan chu nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:28 Chule amaho thilong pokha chanchun aponho akisop ding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi; amaho chu nangho dinga aboh ahi." 
Leviticus11:29 Hicheho jong hi leichunga vah ganhingho lah-a nangho dinga aboh hiding ahiuve; kongkoi, jucha, sumkong le achilhah," 
Leviticus11:30 Chule khoili, thangkip, tangnam, dahdeng chule bui," 
Leviticus11:31 Hicheho hi avathoho jouse lah-a nangho dinga aboh hochu ahiuve: koi hileh amaho athi nunguva tongkha chan chu nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:32 Chule ipi hitaleh hicheho hin athi nungule alhah khum pennu chu aboh hiding ahi: thinga kisem umle bel hihen, von hihen, vun hihen, dip hihen, chule itobang umle bel hihen ipi tobang bolna-a kimangcha hijongle, hichu twija delut ding ahin, chule hichu nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi; chutengle atheng hibep ding ahi." 
Leviticus11:33 Chule hicheho chun akheh khum leibel tapou chu, asunga chu ipi uma hijongle aboh hiding; chuleh nanghon leibel chu nasukeh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus11:34 Nehthei anneh jouse lah-a chutobang twijin ajotkhum tapou chu aboh hiding: chule chutobang lhenga kona kidon tapou jongchu aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:35 Chule hicheho thilong halkhat nin alhahkhum thil tapou chu aboh hiding ahin; tapkong hihen, bel kitunggol hijongle, hicheho chu suhset hiding ahi: ajehchu hicheho chu aboh ahin, chule nangho dinga aboh hiding ahiuve." 
Leviticus11:36 Hijeng jongle twinah ahiloule komtong twi nengtah-a aumna mun chu atheng hiding ahi: ahinla ipi hijongle hicheho thilong tongkha chan chu aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:37 Chule hicheho thilong halkhat chun tuding muchi khattou akheh khuma ahile, hiche chu atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:38 Ahinla amuchi chunga chun twi themkhat akikoija, chule hicheho thilong halkhat chu hiche chunga chu achuh-a ahile, hichu nangho dinga aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:39 Chule naneh theiju saho lah-a kona khattou athia ahile; athilong tongkha chanchu nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus11:40 Chule chuche thilong nekha chun aponho akisop ding, nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi. Chule chuche thilong popa jongchun aponho akisop ding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus11:41 Chule leichunga kitholtho ganhing tapou chu thet um hiding ahi; hichu nehlou helding ahi. 
Leviticus11:42 Ipi hitaleh a-oija kithol, kenglia chetho, ahilouleh leichunga kithol tho ganhingho lah-a keng tampi neija kitholtho ho, hicheho chu nanehlou dingu ahi; ajehchu hicheho chu nangho dinga thet um ahiuve." 
Leviticus11:43 Nangho akitholtho ganhing tapouva naki suhboh louhel dingu, chule naboh louna dinguva amaho-a kona jong nakisuhnet lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus11:44 Ijeh inem itile keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahi. Hijeh-a chu nangho nakisuh thenguva, atheng nahi dingu ahi; ajehchu Keima atheng kahi. Chule leichunga kitholtho ganhing tapouva nangho le nangho naki suhboh lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus11:45 Ijeh inem itile keima na-Pathen'u hidinga Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh uva Pakai chu kahi; Hiche jeh-a chu nangho nathen dingu ahi; ajehchu keima atheng kahi. 
Leviticus11:46 Hichehi saho, vachaho, twilah-a vahle ahingthei jouse, chule leichunga kitholthoho chung changa dan chu ahi;" 
Leviticus11:47 Aboh le atheng khenna dingle, sa nehthei le nehtheilou kisekhen theina dinga ahi." 
Leviticus12:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati." 
Leviticus12:2 Israel chate henga hitihin seijin, Numei khatnin nao avopma cha pasal ahina ahile, amanu chu ni sagi aboh hiding; anumei hina-a athenlou nikhoho dungjuija aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus12:3 Chule niget chan nileh naosen chep chu kitanding ahi. 
Leviticus12:4 Chule amanu chun athisan kisuhtheng na-a nisomthum le nithum gei ajomding; akisuh thengna nikho alhin kahse-a munthenga jong lut louding chule thiltheng tapou jong atoh khah thei lou ding ahi. 
Leviticus12:5 Ahinla amanun numei ahina ahile, anumei hina athenlouna nikho dungjuija hapta ni aboh hiding ahi. Chule amanu chun thisana akisuh thengna chu ni somgup le nigup ajompeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus12:6 Chule amanu kisuhthengna nikhoho alhin tengle, amanun chapa-a ding, ahiloule chanua dinga govam thilto dinga kelngoinou kumkhat lhingbep khat; chule chonset thilto dinga vakhu nou ahiloule vapal khat houkhom ho Houbuh phunga chu thempupa henga ahinchoi ding:" 
Leviticus12:7 Aman hichu Pakai anga ato-a, amanu dinga longlhena abolpeh ding: chule amanu chu athilonna-a kona chu suhtheng hiding ahi. Hiche cha pasal ahilouleh cha numei hingnu-a dinga dan chu ahi." 
Leviticus12:8 Chule ijemtia amanun kelngoinou ahinchoi joutah louva ahileh, amanun vapal ni ahiloule vakhu nou ni; khat govam thilto ding chule adang khat chu chonsetna thilto dinga ahinchoi ding: thempu chun amanu dinga longlhena abolpeh-a, chule amanu chu theng ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:1 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus13:2 Mikhatnin atahsa chung avuna abohdoh khat, akhih khat, ahiloule akangdoh laikhat ahin neija, chule hichu atahsa vunna phah natna tobang ahia ahile, chuteng ama chu Aaron thempupa ahilouleh achapate thempupaho henga nahin pui dingu ahi." 
Leviticus13:3 Chule thempupa chun tahsa vuna hise chu avetding; chule natna laija timul chu ahung kana, chule natna kimuchu atahsa vun sanga athuh johle, hiche chu phahna hise ahi: chule thempupan ama chu avetna, chule amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:4 Ijemtia atahsa vuna ahung ngoudoh lai chu ahung kana, chule mutheija avun sanga athuhjoh louva, chule atimul chu ahung kan louva ahile, thempupa chun chuche hise neipa chu ni sagi akhatup ding:" 
Leviticus13:5 Chule ni sagi lhin nileh thempupa chun amachu avetna, chule veuvin, anatna chu amitmua atan dena, chule hise chu avuna chal louva amule, thempupa chun amachu ni sagi akhatup beding ahi." 
Leviticus13:6 Chule ni sagi lhin nileh thempupa chun amachu avetkitna, chule veuvin, hise chu avomthima, chule hise chu avuna chal louva amule, thempupa chun ama chu atheng ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: akhihbou ahi; amachun aponho akisopma, atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus13:7 Ahinla akisuhtheng nadinga thempupa akimupi jouva, akhih chu avuna achallheh jenga ahile, amachu thempupan avetkit ding:" 
Leviticus13:8 Chule thempupa chun avetna, akhih chu avuna challa amuleh, chutengle thempupan amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: hichu phahnat ahi." 
Leviticus13:9 Phahna hise chu mikhat chunga aumteng, amachu thempupa henga kipuiding ahin;" 
Leviticus13:10 Chule thempupan amachu avetna, veuvin, avuna apomdoh lai vun chu akana, hichun amul chu akansah-a, chule apomdoh laija chu vouthah-a amua ahile," 
Leviticus13:11 Amapa vuna chu phahna lui uma ahin, thempupan amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh-a, akhatup louding ahi: ajehchu ama phah-a ahi." 
Leviticus13:12 Chule phahna chu avuna ahung jaldoh-a, chule phahna chun hise neipa vun chu thempupan avetna lam jouse aluchanga patna akeng phang geija atomsoh hela ahile," 
Leviticus13:13 Chutengle thempupan angaito ding: chule veuvin, phahna chun amapa tahsa pumpi chu atoma ahile, thempupan hise veipa chu atheng ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi. Aboncha keija hung kang soh-a ahitan, amachu atheng hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus13:14 Ahinla ama-a chu vouthah ahungdoh-a ahile, amachu aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus13:15 Chule thempupan hiche vouthah chu avetna, amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: ajehchu vouthah chu aboh-a ahin, hichu phahnat ahi." 
Leviticus13:16 Ahiloule vouthah chu ahung kikhel kitna, chule akang ahung kiso kitna ahile, amachu thempupa henga hung ding;" 
Leviticus13:17 Chule thempupan ama avetding; chuleh veuvin, hise chu akanga ahung kikhel kitna ahile, thempupan hise veipa chu atheng ahitai tia aphondoh ding ahi: amachu thenga ahitai." 
Leviticus13:18 Atahsa ativuna chu uilut ahungdoh-a, chule hichu adam tah-a," 
Leviticus13:19 Chule uilut umna mun'a chu ahung pomdoh akang, ahiloule ahung ngoudoh laikhat auma, chule iti hama santhim dana auma ahileh, hichu thempupa henga vetsah ding ahi:" 
Leviticus13:20 Chule hichu thempupan avetna, avun sanga thuhjoa amua, chulai mun'a amulchu akanga kikhela ahile, thempupan amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: hichu uilutna kona hung sohdoh phahna hise chu ahi." 
Leviticus13:21 Ahinla, thempupan hichu avetna, chule veuvin, hia chu amul akang aumlouva, chule hichu avun sanga athuhjoh louva, avomthima ahile, chuteng chule thempupan amachu ni sagi akhatup ding:" 
Leviticus13:22 Chule hichu avuna akithe jala ahile, thempupan amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: hichu hise ahi." 
Leviticus13:23 Ahinla ahung ngoudoh laichu angai ngai ahijinga, achal louva ahile, hichu uilut ahibouvin; chule thempupan amachu atheng ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:24 Ahiloule mihem khat meijin atahsa akah-a, meijin akahna aphelai laijachu ahung vamdoh, asanthim ahiloule akang auma ahile," 
Leviticus13:25 Chutengle hichu thempupan avetding, chule veuvin, ahung vamdohdoh laija amulchu ahung kana, chule avun sanga agathuh lutna ahileh, hichu meikah-a kona hung potdoh phahnat ahi. Hiteng chule thempupan amachu athenglou ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: hichu phah hise ahi." 
Leviticus13:26 Ahinla thempupan hichu avetna, chuleh ahung vamdoh laija chu amulkang umlouva, chule hichu avun dangho sanga athuhjoh louva, avomthima ahile, thempupan amachu ni sagi akhatup ding:" 
Leviticus13:27 Chule ni sagi lhin nile thempupan amachu avetding, chule veuvin, avun sunga chu hichu nasatah-a akithejala ahile, thempupan amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: hichu phahna hise ahi." 
Leviticus13:28 Chule ahung vamdoh laichu angai ahijinga, chule avuna akithejal louva, ahia hichu avom thima ahile, hichu meikah-a kona hung duldoh ahin: thempupan amachu atheng ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi; ajehchu meikah jeh-a hung khidoh ahibouve." 
Leviticus13:29 Pasal ham numei ham aluchang ham ahilouleh akhamul hama chu hise aneija ahile," 
Leviticus13:30 Chuteng thempupan hise chu avetding, chule veuvin, hichu avun sanga agathuhlut joh-a, chule chua chu ai-eng ena eng mulngat khat auma ahile; chuteng thempupan amachu aboh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi: hichu tithah luchunga ahilouleh khamula um phahna ahi." 
Leviticus13:31 Chule thempupan tithah hise chu avetna, chule veuvin, hichu avun sanga agathuh lutjoh louva, chule chuche-a chu mulvom aumlouva ahile, thempupan tithah hise neipa chu ni sagi akhatup ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:32 Chule ni sagi lhin nileh thempupan hise chu avetding, chule veuvin, tithah chu kithejal louva, chule hichea chu ai-eng enna eng amul jong aumlouva, chule tithah chu avun sanga agathuh lutjoh louva ahile;" 
Leviticus13:33 Amachu amul hetngima umding, amavang tithah laichu ahetngim louding ahi; chule thempupan tithah neipa chu nisagi akhatup beding ahi." 
Leviticus13:34 Chule ni sagi alhin nile thempupan tithah chu avetding, chule veuvin, tithah chu avuna akithejal louva, ahiloule avun sanga jong agathuh lutlouva ahile, thempupan amachu atheng ahi tia aphondoh ding; chule amachun aponho akisopma, chule atheng hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus13:35 Ahinla akisuhngim jouva tithah chu avuna akithejala ahileh; 
Leviticus13:36 Chuteng thempu pan ama avet ding, chule veuvin, tithah chu avuna akithejala ahile, thempu pan ai-eng eng mul aholkhoh louding ahi: ama athenglou ahitai." 
Leviticus13:37 Ahinla tithah chu aumdenna, chule chuche mun'a chu mulvom ahung kedoh-a, chule tithah chu adam tah-a ahile, amachu atheng ahitai: thempupan amachu atheng ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:38 Pasal ham ahiloule numei hamin atahsa vuna chu ahung vamdoh, akang hung vamdoh aneija ahile;" 
Leviticus13:39 Chuteng thempupan avetding ahi: chule ativun ahung vamdoh hochu akangdup leh, hichu avuna tikang hung umdoh-a ahin; ama atheng ahi." 
Leviticus13:40 Chule pasal alua kona asam pullha-a chu luchai ahin, atheng ahi." 
Leviticus13:41 Chule pasal alujang mailam panga asam pullha-a chu dehchai ahin; ama atheng ahi. 
Leviticus13:42 Chule ijemtia aluchai ahiloule adehchai laija chu tina sandang khat ahung bohdoh-a ahile, hichu aluchai ahiloule adehchai laija phahnat hung pongdoh chu ahi." 
Leviticus13:43 Chuteng thempupan hichu avetding, chule veuvin, aluchai ahiloule dehchai laija tina hung bohdoh chu tivun danga phahna hung pongdoh tobanga asandang ahile;" 
Leviticus13:44 Amachu miphah ahin, aboh ahitai: thempupan amachu aboh tahbeh ahi tia aphondoh ding ahi; hise chu alujanga uma ahitai." 
Leviticus13:45 Chule hise neija miphah chun aponho abokeh ding, chule alu tol puma ane chunglam akhu ding, chuleh athenglou, athenglou, tia asapding ahi." 
Leviticus13:46 Ama-a hise chu aum laisung nikhoho lhungkeija amachu suhboh hiding ahi; ama athenglou ahin; achanga chengding ahi: gebuh pamlam chu ama chenna ding ahi. 
Leviticus13:47 Phahna hise umna von jong chu, samul von hihen, tupat ponnel von, hijongleh," 
Leviticus13:48 Akikhonto hihen akisahtho hihen, tupatpon hihen, samul pon hijongleh, savun hihen ahilouleh savuna kisem thilkhat pou pou hijongleh," 
Leviticus13:49 Hise chu von akikhontho ham, akisahtho ham, savun ham, savun thil itobang khat pou pouva eng danga ahilouleh sandanga abe-a ahile, hichu phahna hise ahin; chule thempupa henga vetsah ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:50 Chule thempupan hise chu avetding, chule hise po-a von chu ni sagi akhatup ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:51 Chule hise chu ni sagi lhin nileh avetding; hise chu von akikhontho ahiloule akisahtho chung, samul chung, savun chung, ahiloule savuna kisem ipi chung hijongle, hise chu akithe jala ahile; hise chu tijat umtah phahnat ahi: hichu aboh ahi." 
Leviticus13:52 Hijeh-a chu aman chuche von chu akikhontho hihen, akisahtho hile, samula hihen, tupatna hile, ahilouleh savun thil ipi hitaleh ahallhah ding ahi; ajehchu tijat umtah phahnat ahin; hichu meija hallhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:53 Chule thempupan avetna, chule hise chu von akikhongtho hihen, akisahtho hileh, ahilouleh savun thil kiti pou pouva chu kithejal louva ahile;" 
Leviticus13:54 Chutengle thempupa chun hise umna thil chu asop dinguva amaho athupeh ding, chule ni sagima hichu akhatup beding:" 
Leviticus13:55 Chule hichu akisop jouteng thempupan hise chu avetding, chule veuvin, hise chu avouso akikhelchom louva, chule hise chu akithejal louva ahile; hichu aboh ahin; nangman hichu meija nahalding ahi: hichu asunglama tijat umtah ahin; asung hihen apolam hijongle aneh ahitai." 
Leviticus13:56 Chule thempupan avetna, chule veuvin, hise chu akisop jouva avom thima ahile, chuteng hichu vona kona, savuna kona, ahilouleh akikhontho le akisahtho-a kona asalhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus13:57 Chule hichu von chunga akikhontho hihen, akisahtho hijongleh, chule savun pon pou pou chunga chu akilah nahlaija ahile, hichu akithejal hise ahin; nangman hise chu meija nahalding ahi." 
Leviticus13:58 Chule von, akikhontho hihen, akisahtho hileh, ahilouleh savuna kisem itobang von hitaleh nasop ding, chule hichea kona chu hise chu apotdoh-a ahile, ani veina nasop kitding; chutengle atheng hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus13:59 Hiche hohi von samula hihen, tupatna hile, akikhontho hihen, akisahtho hijongleh, ahilouleh savun thilkhat pou pouva phahna hise umchu atheng ahi, ahilouleh athenglou ahi tia phondohna ding dan chu ahi." 
Leviticus14:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus14:2 Hichehi miphah kisuhtheng nikho-a juiding dan chu ahi. Amachu thempupa henga ahinpui dingu; 
Leviticus14:3 Chule thempupa chun gebuh-a kona potdoh ding; chule thempupa chun avetding, chule veuvin miphahpa chunga hise chu adam tah-a ahile;" 
Leviticus14:4 Chuteng thempupan akisuhtheng dingpa henga kona chu vacha theng ahing ni, chuleh Cedar thing, ponsanthip le Hyssop lah dinga athupeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:5 Chule thempupa chun vacha ho lah-a khat chu leibel sunga twi lona chunga nathadiu ahi, tia athupeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:6 Vacha ahingpa chu ahile, cedar thing, Ponsandup chule Hyssop chu alah-a, hicheho chu vacha hing chutoh twi long chunga kithat vacha thisana chu adelut ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:7 Chule aman aphahna akona kisutheng dingpa chunga sagi vei athin ding, chule amapa chu atheng ahitai tia aphondoh ding, chule vacha hing chu gam onga alha mang ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:8 Chule akisutheng dingpa chun aponho asopma, chule asam jouse ahet tolla, ama athen theina dinga twija gakisil ding ahi. Chujou teng chule ama gebuh sunga hunglut ding, aponbuh pama ni sagi khongai nalai ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:9 Ahinla ni sagi lhin ni-a chu aman aluchanga asam jouse, akhamul chuleh amitchung mul jouse, amulho jouse ahet ngima, chule aman aponho asopma, ama tahsa jeng jong twija asil ding ahi, chule ama theng ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:10 Chule niget lhin nileh aman nolna beihel kelngoinou chal ni leh, nolna beihel kelngoinou anu kumkhat lhingbep khat, chule anneh thilto ding changbong nel thao toh kihal ephah hopsom-a hopthum, chule thao log khat ahin choiding ahi." 
Leviticus14:11 Chule ama suthenga pang thempupa chun akisutheng dingpa le chuche thil ho chu houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga apehlut ding ahi. 
Leviticus14:12 Chule thempupa chun kelngoinou khat chule thao log khat chu alah-a, suhkhel thilto dinga ato-a, chule Pakai angsunga jap thilto-a ajap ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:13 Chule aman kelngoinou chu chonset thilto chule govam thilto athana ding munthenga mun'a chu athading ahi; ajehchu chonset thilto thempupa-a ahibanga, suhkhel thilto jong chutobangma chu hija ahin; hichu atheng chungnung ahi." 
Leviticus14:14 Chule thempupa chun suhkhel thilto thisan chu phabep alah-a, thempupan hichu akisutheng dingpa jetlam bilmong, akhut jetlam khutpi chung, le akeng jetlam kengpi chunga anuding ahi." 
Leviticus14:15 Chule thempupan thao log khatna kona chu phabep alah-a, aveilam khutphang chunga alheilhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:16 Chule thempupan akhut veilama um thaova chu akhut jetlam khut jung adelutna, akhut junga thao chu Pakai anga sagivei athe ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:17 Chule akhutna umnalai thao amohse chu thempupa chun akisutheng dingpa jetlam bilmong, ajetlam khutpi, ajetlam kengpi chunga, chule suhkhel thilto thisan chunga chu anuding ahi." 
Leviticus14:18 Chule thempupa khutna thao umnalai amohchu aman akisutheng dingpa lujanga asunlhah ding, chule thempupan ama dinga chu Pakai anga longlhena abolpeh ding ahi."
