Leviticus14:19 Chule thempupa chun chonset thilto chu ato-a, athen louna-a kona kisutheng dingpa-a dinga longlhenna abolpeh ding; chule aman govam thilto chu athading ahi." 
Leviticus14:20 Chule thempupan maicham chunga um govam thilto le anneh thilto chu atoding, chule thempupan ama dinga longlhena abolpeh ding: chuteng ama atheng hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus14:21 Ahinla ama chu mivaicha ahia, chuchengpi chu atojou louva ahile, aman alonglhena kibolna dinga suhkhel thilto-a jap dinga kelngoinou khat ahin kaiding; chule anneh thilto-a dinga changbong neljet thao toh kihal ephah hopsom-a hopkhat le thao log khat," 
Leviticus14:22 Chule aman amujou dandana vapal ni ahiloule vakhu nou ni; khat chu chonset thilto ding le adang khat chu govam thilto dinga ahinchoi ding ahi. 
Leviticus14:23 Chule hicheho chu aman niget lhin nileh akisuhtheng nadinga thempupa henga, houkhom ho Houbuh kotphunga Pakai angsunga chu ahin choiding ahi." 
Leviticus14:24 Chule thempupa chun suhkhel thilto kelngoinou leh thao log dimkhat chu alah ding, chule thempupa chun hichu Pakai anga jap thilto ato ding;" 
Leviticus14:25 Chuteng aman suhkhel thilto kelngoinou chu athading, chule thempupa chun chuche suhkhel thilto thisan phabep chu alah-a, akisutheng dingpa jetlam bilmong chunga, ajetlam khutpi chunga, chule ajetlam kengpi chunga anuding ahi." 
Leviticus14:26 Chule thempupa chun thao chu ama khutphang veilam chunga alheilhah ding," 
Leviticus14:27 Chule thempupa chun akhut veilama um thao chu ajetlam khutjunga sagi vei Pakai angsunga athe ding," 
Leviticus14:28 Chule thempupa chun akhutna thao chu akisutheng dingpa jetlam bilmong chunga, ajetlam akhutpi chung, ajetlam kengpi chunga, chule suhkhel thilto thisan chunga chu anuding ahi." 
Leviticus14:29 Chule thempupa khutna aum nalaiho sechu, aman akisutheng dingpa lujanga anua, amapa-a dinga chu Pakai anga longlhena abolpeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:30 Chule aman amapan amujou dungjuija ahinchoi vakhu teni ahilou leh vapal nou teni chu lah-a, khat chu atoding," 
Leviticus14:31 Amapan amujou dungjuija khat chonset thilto dinga, chule adang khat chu anneh thilto le govam thilto dinga ahinchoi ding, chule thempupa chun Pakai anga akisutheng dingpa chu longlhena abolpeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:32 Hichehi koi hileh phah hise veija, akhutna akisuhtheng nadinga kimujou louho chunga kimang ding dan chu ahi." 
Leviticus14:33 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus14:34 Keiman nalodiuva kapeh-u Canaan gam nahung lutnuva, chule keiman nalonao gamsunga chu insung khatna phah hise kachuhsah tengleh;" 
Leviticus14:35 Chuche inneipa chu thempupa henga hunga, Insunga hin hise khat um bangin kahe-e, tia aseiding ahi." 
Leviticus14:36 Chutengle thempupa chun chuche insunga umjouse chu abona aboh ahilouna dinga, ama hise phochen dinga insunga asunglhah masanga, a-in chu amahon asuh-ong nadiuva thupeh apehding ahi. Chujou tengle thempupa chu insung vedinga sunglha ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:37 Chule aman hise avetna, chule veuvin, hise chu in-bang dunga auma, engdang ahilouleh sandang banga akilah-a, bang sanga athuhlut joh-a ahile," 
Leviticus14:38 Chuteng thempupa chu insunga kona kotphunga hungdoh-a, a-in chu nisagi akhatup ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:39 Chule thempupa chu nisagi nile hungkitna, avetding, chule hise chu chuche inbang ho-a ana challa ahile;" 
Leviticus14:40 Chuteng thempupa chun hise umna in'a song ho chu alahdoh diuva athupeh ding, chule amahon song ho chu khopi pam muntheng lou khatna aselut dingu;" 
Leviticus14:41 Chule aman a-insung kimvel chu ahet theng sah ding, chule amahon ahet lhah-u vutvai chu khopi pam muntheng lou mun khatna agasun lhah dingu ahi." 
Leviticus14:42 Chule amahon song chombeh alah uva, chuche songho umna-a chu akoikhel dingu, chule aman leingan dang alah-a, in chu aloithah ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:43 Chule ijemtia aman songho alahdoh-a, a-in chu ahet ngima, chule aloithah kit jouva, hise chu ahungkitna chuche insunga chu ahung sokitna ahile;" 
Leviticus14:44 Chutengle thempupa chu hunga avetding, chule hise chu insunga kithe jalsoh-a ahile; insunga chu tijat umtah hise chua ahitan; chule hichu athenglou ahitai." 
Leviticus14:45 Chule aman a-in, asongho, athing ho, chule aloina jouse asuhsetna, chule khopi polam muntheng lou laija apohdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:46 Chujongle chuche in khachah-a aum laisungse-a chu koitobang agalutna aumle, amachu nilhah tokah-a atheng louva umding ahi." 
Leviticus14:47 Chule chuche insunga galum kha-a chun aponho akisopma, chule chuche insunga gane kha-a chun aponho akisop ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:48 Chule a-in kiloithah jouva chu thempupa ahung lutna, ahungvetna, chuleh a-insunga hise chu kithejal soh louva ahile; thempupa chun in chu atheng ahi tia aphonding ahi: ajehchu hise chu dama ahitai." 
Leviticus14:49 Chule aman in suhtheng nadinga vacha ni, Cedar thing le Ponsanthip, chuleh Hyssop alah ding," 
Leviticus14:50 Chule vacha teni lah-a khat chu leibel sunga twilong chunga athading," 
Leviticus14:51 Chule aman cedar thing, hyssop, ponsanthip, chule vahing chu alah-a, vacha kithat thisan sungle twi longa adelut ding, chule in chu sagi vei athekhum ding;" 
Leviticus14:52 Chule aman vacha thisana, twilonga, Cedar thinga, hyssopma, chule ponsanthipma in chu asuhtheng ding ahi." 
Leviticus14:53 Ahin aman vacha hing vangchu khopi pampeh gam onga agalha doh ding; chule chuche insung dinga chu longlhena abolding; chule hichu atheng hiding ahitai. 
Leviticus14:54 Hiche hi phah hise jouse le tithah jouse," 
Leviticus14:55 Chule vonphah, inphah," 
Leviticus14:56 Apomdoh, akhihdoh, chule avamdoh-a dinga dan chu ahin," 
Leviticus14:57 Athenlou pet le athen pet kihetna dinga kihilna chu ahi: hiche hi phah chung changa dan chu ahi. 
Leviticus15:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus15:2 Israel chate henga thu seilhonin lang, ajah uva hitin seilhonin, Pasal khattou atahsa-a kona longdoh thi neija ahile, hiche athi lonjeh-a chu amachu aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:3 Hiche hi athilong doh-a kona abohna hiding ahi: athi longdoh atahsa-a kona ahung londoh jenga, ahiloule atahsa-a kona alondohsah da-a ahijongle, amachu athenglou ahi." 
Leviticus15:4 Thilongdoh neipa galupna jalkhun tapou chu aboh ahin, chule ama toupha thil jouse jongchu aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:5 Chule thilongdohpa lupna tongkha tapou chun aponho asop ding, amatah twija kisil ding, chule nilhah kah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:6 Chule thilongdoh pa toupha thil tapou chunga gatouva chun aponho asop ding, amatah twija kisil ding, chule nilhah kah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:7 Chule thilongdoh neipa tahsa tongkha tapou chun aponho akisop ding, amatah twija kisil ding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:8 Chule thilongdohpa chun mi atheng khattou achil aset khum khah-a ahileh, amapan aponho asopding, amatah twija kisil, chule nilhah kah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:9 Chule thilongdohpa touna tapou chu aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus15:10 Chule koi hile ama delpha thil tapou gatongkha chan chu nilhah kahse-a aboh hiding; chutobang thilho tapou pole-a chun aponho akisop ding, amatah twija kisil, chule nilhah kah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:11 Koihileh thilongdohpa tongkha-a twija akhut teni soplou chun, aponho akisop ding, amatah twija kisil, chule nilhah kah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:12 Chule thilongdoh pan atohkhah leija kisem umle bel tapou chu suhkeh ding, chule thinga kisem umle bel tapou chu twija silding ahi." 
Leviticus15:13 Chule thilong neipa chu athilon na-a kona suhthenga aumteng, aman akisuhtheng nading nisagi akisimdoh ding, aponho asopma, chule atahsa chu twilonga asil ding, chule atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:14 Chule aniget chan nileh aman vapal nou ni ahiloule vakhu ni akilah-a Pakai anga houkhom ho Houbuh kotphunga hunga chule hichu thempu apeh ding ahi. 
Leviticus15:15 Chule thempu chun khat chu chonset thilto-a, chule adangkhat chu govam thilto-a atoding; chule thempupa chun Pakai anga athilondoh jeh-a chu ama dinga longlhena abolpeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus15:16 Chule pasal khattou abotwi achedoh tah-a ahile, aman atahsa twija asilding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:17 Chule chuche abotwi chuhna pon le savunho jouse chu twija sopding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:18 Chujongle numei chu pasal to alupkhoma, amapa botwi chu apotdoh-a ahile, anilhona twija kisilding, chule nilhah kahse-a aboh hilhon ding ahi." 
Leviticus15:19 Chule numei jin ama-a kona thil longdoh aneija, chule atahsa-a kona longdoh chu thisan ahia ahile; amanu chu ni sagi chom koidoh ding ahi: chule koi hileh amanu tongkha-a chu nilhah kahse-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:20 Chule amanun aga chom um sunga agalup pha chule aga toupha thil tapou ho chu aboh hiding ahi. 
Leviticus15:21 Koi hileh amanu jalkhun gatongkha tapou chun aponho asopding, amatah twija kisil ding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:22 Koihileh amanun atoupha thil tapou gatongkha chun, aponho asopding, amatah twija kisil ding, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:23 Amanu jalkhun chunga um hihen, atoupha thil khattou hileh, amapan agatoh khah leh, amapa chu nilhah kahse-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:24 Chule pasal'in amanu aluppi jengtah-a, amanu thi chu amapa chunga abeleh, amapa chu ni sagi aboh hiding; chule alupna jalkhun jouse chu aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:25 Chule numei khatnin angaina banglouva nitamtah thi aneija, ahiloule achoma aumna phat valsetna thi aneija ahile; athilon na-a athenlouna nikhosung sese chu amanu achoma aumna nikho hiding ahi; amanu chu aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:26 Thilonga aumsung se-a alupna jalkhun tapou chu amanu dinga chom koidoh-a aumna jalkhun tobang ding ahi. Chuleh amanun atoupha thil tapou chu, achoma aum sunga aboh banga aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:27 Chule koihile chuche thilho tongkha-a chu aboh hiding ahin, aponho akisopma, amatah jong twija kisila, chule nilhah tokah-a aboh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:28 Ahinla athilonna-a kona chu athen tah-a ahile, amanun ama-a dinga nisagi akisimdoh ding, chujouteng amanu atheng hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus15:29 Chule aniget chanileh amanun vapal ni ahilouleh vapal nou ni akilah-a, houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah phunga thempupa henga ahin choiding ahi." 
Leviticus15:30 Chuteng thempupa chun khat chu chonset thilto-a, chule khat chu govam thilto-a ato ding, amanu thenlouna thilongdoh jeh-a chu amanu-a dinga Pakai angsunga longlhena abolpeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus15:31 Chutia chu amahon alah uva um houkhom ho houbuh chu asuhboh tenguleh, athenlou naova athilouna dinguva, nanghon Israel chate chu thenlouna-a kona nakhendoh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus15:32 Hichehi ama-a kona thilondoh jeh le, abotwi chedoh jeh-a thenglouho," 
Leviticus15:33 Chule athilon jeh-a dammo-a numei, chuleh athi longa pasal le numei, chule thinei numei lupia pasal ho-a dinga danthu chu ahi." 
Leviticus16:1 Aaron chapaten Pakai angsunga thilto aneipet lhona athilhon jouvin, Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin," 
Leviticus16:2 nasopi Aaron henga, athilouna dingin thingkhong chunga hepi touna masanga ponjal sunga um muntheng sunga aphat jouse-a ahunglut louna dingin seipeh-in; ajehchu hepi touna chunga chu keima meiloma kahung kilah ding ahi, ati." 
Leviticus16:3 Aaron chu muntheng sunga hitia hi hunglut ding ahi: chonset thilto dinga bongchalnou khat, govam thilto dinga kelngoichal khat." 
Leviticus16:4 Aman tupat sangkhol theng chu aki-ah-a, atahsa chunga chu tupat pon chu akichen ding, tupat konggah akigah-a, chule tupat lukhuh chu akikhuh ding ahi: hichehohi vontheng ahin, hijeh-a chu aman atahsa twija akisila, chuleh akivon ding bou ahi." 
Leviticus16:5 Chule Israel chate houkhom ho-a kona chu chonset thilto-a dinga kelnou ni leh govam thilto-a dinga kelngoichal khat alahding ahi. 
Leviticus16:6 Chule Aaron'in ama chonset thilto bongchal chu ama dinga atoa, ama-a dingle a-insung dinga longlhena abolding ahi." 
Leviticus16:7 Chuteng aman kelcha ni chu alah-a, houkhom ho Houbuh kotkhah phunga Pakai angsunga apehdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:8 Chule Aaron'in kelcha ni chunga chu, khatchu Pakaiya dinga, chule adangkhat chu keldai dinga vangvetna aneiding ahi." 
Leviticus16:9 Chule Aaron'in Pakaiya dinga vang chuhna kelcha chu ahinkaija, chonset thilto-a atoding ahi." 
Leviticus16:10 Ahinla keldai dinga achunga vang chuhna kelcha chu, longlhenna bolna-a mandinga ahinga Pakaiya apehlut ding, chule keldai dinga gamthipma agalhadoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:11 Chule Aaron'in ama chonset thilto-a ding bongchal chu ahin kaija, ama le a-insung dinga longlhenna abolding, chule ama chonset thilto-a ding bongchal chu athading:" 
Leviticus16:12 Chule aman Pakai angsung maichama kona chu mei-am lhengkhat dim leh akhut dimsetna gimnamtui dimset kisubong chu alah ding, chule pondal sunga achoilut ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:13 Chuteng aman hiche gimnamtui khu chun hettohsahna thingkhong chunga um hepi touna chu akhu-a chutia chu ama athi louna dinga, Pakai angsunga gimnamtui chu meisunga akoilutding ahi." 
Leviticus16:14 Chule aman bongchal thisan chu alah-a, hichu akhutjunga hepi touna chung solam sanga atheding; chule hepi touna maija chu thisan chu akhut junga sagivei atheding ahi." 
Leviticus16:15 Chujouteng aman chonset thilto kelcha chu mipi ho-a dinga atha-a, athisan chu ponbuh sunga ahin choilutna, bongchal thisan abol banga chu abolding, chule hepi touna chung le hepi touna maija chu atheding ahi." 
Leviticus16:16 Chule aman Israel chateho chu athenlou jeh-u le asuhkhel uva achonset jeh uva, munthenga dinga chu longlhenna abolpeh ding ahi: chule hitia chu athenlou nalah uva um houkhom ho houbuh-a dinga chu abolding ahi." 
Leviticus16:17 Chule ama muntheng sunga ama le a-insung ding, chule Israel houkhom ho jouse dinga longlhenna boldinga agalutna chule ahungdoh kahse-a, koimacha houkhom ho Houbuh sunga chu umlou ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:18 Chule Pakai angsunga um maicham mun'a chu che-a, hiche dinga chu longlhenna aga bolding; chule bongchal thisan le kelcha thisan chu phabep alah-a, maicham sakiho chunga chu akoi kimvel ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:19 Chule aman hiche chunga chu akhutjunga thisan sagivei athea, asuhthenga, Israel chate athenlou naova kona asuhtheng ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:20 Chule aman muntheng le houkhom ho Houbuh chule maicham chu kichamna aboljou tengleh, kelcha hing chu ahin kaiding:" 
Leviticus16:21 Chule Aaron'in akhut teni chu kelcha lujanga angapma, achunga chu Israel chateho khangitlouna jouse, asuhkhel nao jouse leh achonsetnao jouse aphondoh-a, kelcha lujanga akoija, chule mihem aboldinga kilom khat khutna gamthipma aga lhadohsah ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:22 Kelcha chun amaho khangitlouna jouse chu achunga apoh-a, koima chen louna gama apohlut ding; chule mipa chun kelcha chu gamthipma agalha ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:23 Chujouteng Aaron chu houkhom ho houbuh sunga hunga, munthenga agalut petna avonho, tupat vonho chu asuhlhah-a, chua chu adalhah ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:24 Chule aman munthenga um twija atahsa akisila, avonho akivona, chule hungdoh-a govam thilto, mipi ho govam thilto chu atoding, chule ama-a ding le mipi ho-a dinga longlhenna abolding ahi." 
Leviticus16:25 Chule chonset thilto thao chu maicham chunga agoding ahi. 
Leviticus16:26 Chule keldai dinga kelcha galhadohpa chun aponho akisop ding, chule atahsa twija asila, chujouteng gebuh sunga hunglut ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:27 Chule thisan munthenga longlhen bolna-a kipolut chonset thilto-a ding bongchal le chonset thilto-a ding kelcha chu khatnin gebuh pama apohdoh ding; chule amahon avunho, apheho le a-eh ho chu meija agodiu ahi." 
Leviticus16:28 Hitiho meija gagoupa chun aponho asopding, ama chu twija atahsa akisil ding, chujouteng leh gebuh sunga hunglut ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:29 Chule hichehi nangho dinga a-itih-a chondan hiding ahi: lhasagi chana nisom lhin nikhole nanghon nahinnao nakisuh gim dingu, nagamsung miu hihen lang, gamdangmi nalah uva khopen hijongle natoh kiti him him natohlou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus16:30 Ijeh inem itileh Pakai angsunga nachonset nahou jouse-a kona nathen theina dinguva, chuche nikho teng chuleh nangho suhthengna dinga thempun nangho dinga longlhenna nabolpeh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus16:31 Hiche nikho chu nangho dinga choldona dinga cholngah ni hiding, chule a-itih-a chondan hidinga nahinnao nasuh gim dingu ahi." 
Leviticus16:32 Chule aman apa khela thempu tohmuna natong dinga thao anua, akatdoh thempupa chun longlhenna chu abolding, chule tupat ponho le vontheng ho jeng jong chu akivon ding ahi." 
Leviticus16:33 Chule aman munthenga dinga longlhenna abolding, maicham leh houkhom ho houbuh-a dinga longlhenna abolding, chule thempuho leh houkhom mipi ho-a dinga longlhenna abolding ahi." 
Leviticus16:34 Hichehi Israel chatea dinga kumkhatna khatvei achonset nahou jouse jeh-a longlhenna bolna dinga, nangho-a kipe a-itih-a chondan hiding chu ahi. Chuin aman Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin aboltan ahi." 
Leviticus17:1 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus17:2 Aaron, achapate, chule Israel chate jouse henga hitin seijin; Hichehi Pakaiyin athupeh hochu ahi," 
Leviticus17:3 Israel insung mi koihileh gebuh sung ahiloule gebuh pama bongchal ham, kelngoi ham, ahilouleh kelcha ham thatna auma," 
Leviticus17:4 Pakai Houbuh masanga Pakai henga thilto-a to dinga houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga ahinchoi louva ahileh; thisan kiso mona chu aman akipoh ding ahi; aman thisan aso ahin; hiche mipa chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding: 
Leviticus17:5 Hichu Israel chaten gam onga ganlhainaho abol hou chu ahin choijuva, Pakai henga, houkhom ho houbuh kotphung, thempupa henga ahin choijuva, Pakai henga chamna thilto-a dinga ato theina dingu ahi." 
Leviticus17:6 Chule thempu chun thisan chu houkhom ho houbuh kot phunga Pakai maicham chunga athea, chule athao chu Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga ahalding ahi." 
Leviticus17:7 Chule amahon anajonpiu thilhaho henga chu ganlhaina abolkit loudiu ahitai. Hichehi amaho dinga akhang akhanga a-itih-a chondanu hiding ahi. 
Leviticus17:8 Chule nangham amaho henga chu, Israel insungmi hihen ahiloule gamdang mi nangho lah-a hung khopem hijongle, koitobang govam thilto ganlhaina toh-a," 
Leviticus17:9 Pakai henga todoh dinga houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga hinchoilou auma ahile; hiche mipa ngei chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi. 
Leviticus17:10 Chule koitobang Israel insung mi hihen,ahilouleh gamdang mi nangho lah-a khopem hijongle thisan ne aumleh; thisan ne mi chu keiman kamaingat ding, chule amite lah-a kona kapaidoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus17:11 Ijehnem itile tahsa hinna hi thisana um ahin: chule hichu nahinna uva dinga longlhen bolna dinga maicham chunga nangho kapeh nahiuve: ijeh inem itile hinna-a dinga longlhen bola chu thisan ahi. 
Leviticus17:12 Hijeh-a chu, Nangho koimachan thisan nanehlou dingu, chule nalah uva khopem gamdangmi koimachan jong thisan anehlou ding ahi, tia Israel chate henga kasei ahi." 
Leviticus17:13 Chule Israel chate lah-a kon hihen, ahiloule nalah uva khopem gamdangmi koihile gam galenga nehthei sa ahilouleh vacha gamana chun: athisan chu avatlhah sah-a, leivui avuhkhum ding ahi." 
Leviticus17:14 Ajehchu hichu tahsa jouse hinna ahi; athisan chu ahinna ahi. Hijeh-a chu, Nanghon tahsa jouse hinna hi athisanu ahijeh-a, itobang tahsa thisan hileh naneh louhel dingu ahi: koihileh anea aumle amachu paidoh hiding ahi, tia Israelte henga keiman kasei ahi." 
Leviticus17:15 Chule nagam miteo hihen, ahilouleh gamdangmi hijongle, koitobang athikam ahilouleh gamsan athasa ne-a chun, aponho asopding, ama chu twija kisil ding, chule nilhah tokah-a athenglou hiding: chujou tengleh atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus17:16 Ahinla aman aponho soplouva, atahsa akisil louva ahileh; akhangit louna akipoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus18:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus18:2 Israel chate henga thu seijin lang, ajah uva hitin seijin, Keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahi." 
Leviticus18:3 Nana chenao Egypt gam chonna banga nangho nachon loudiu, chule keiman nangho kahin lhutna Canaan gam chonna banga jong nachon louhel dingu: chule amaho chona dan jong najuilou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus18:4 Nangho kathulhah ho-a nachon uva, chule hicheho-a chu nalam lhah theina dinguva kachona danho nanit dingu ahi; Keima Pakai na Pathen nu kahi." 
Leviticus18:5 Hijeh-a chu nanghon ka chondan kisun hole keima thutanna ho nanitdiu: hichu mikhatnin anitleh ama hicheho-a chu hing ding ahi; keima Pakai kahi. 
Leviticus18:6 Nangho koimachan akinaipi a-insungmi sagohkeo hodohpeh dinga najot lou dingu ahi: Keima Pakai kahi. 
Leviticus18:7 Nangman napa sagohkeo hina ahilouleh nanu sagohkeo hina chu naho dohpeh louding ahi: amanu nanu ahin, amanu sagohkeo hina chu nangman naho dohpeh louding ahi." 
Leviticus18:8 Nangman napa jinu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi: Hichu napa sagohkeo hina ahi. 
Leviticus18:9 Nangman nasopi, napa chanu hihen, nanu chanu hijongle, in'a peng hihen mun danga peng hijongleh, asagohkeo hina chu naho dohpeh louding ahi." 
Leviticus18:10 Nangman nachapa chanu hihen, nachanu chanu hijongle, asagohkeo hina chu naho dohpeh louding ahi. Ajehchu amaho sagohkeo hina chu nangma sagohkeo hina ahibouve." 
Leviticus18:11 Napa jinu chanu, napan ahinchu nasopinu ahi, nangman amanu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi." 
Leviticus18:12 Nangman napa sopinu sagohkeo hina chu naho dohpeh louding ahi. Amanu chu napa kinaipi asopinu ahi. 
Leviticus18:13 Nangman nanu sopinu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi. Ajehchu amanu chu nanu kinaipi asopinu ahi. 
Leviticus18:14 Nangman napa sopipa sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding, nangman ama jinu jong nagajot lutlou ding ahi: amanu chu nanungah ahi." 
Leviticus18:15 Nangman namounu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi: amanu chu nachapa jinu ahin; nangman amanu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi. 
Leviticus18:16 Nangman nasopipa jinu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi: nasopipa sagohkeo hina ahi. 
Leviticus18:17 Nangman numei khatleh achanu sagohkeo hina naho dohpeh louding, chule achapa chanu ahilouleh achanu chanu jeng jong asagohkeo hinao hodohpeh dinga nakipui louding ahi: ajehchu amanu kiguijoppi numei ho ahiuve: hichehi gitlouna ahi." 
Leviticus18:18 Chule nangman numei khatchu asopinu hinlai sungse-a, amanu suhgentheina ding le ama sagohkeo hina hodoh peh dinga asopinu chu nakipuithei louhel ding ahi." 
Leviticus18:19 Chujoule athenlou jeh-a chomkoija aumlai sungse-a, nangman amanu sagohkeo hina hodoh peh dinga najot louhel ding ahi." 
Leviticus18:20 Chukalvala jong nangman nakisuhboh na dinga naheng nakom inneipi chu aluppi louding ahi. 
Leviticus18:21 Chule nangman nachilhah lah-a khatcha jong Molech houna dinga meija govam dinga naphal doh louhel ding, na Pathen min jong nasuh minset louding ahi: keima Pakai kahi." 
Leviticus18:22 Nangman numei toh nalupkhom banga pasal toh nalupkhom louding ahi: hiche chu thet umtah ahi. 
Leviticus18:23 Chule nangma nakisuhboh nadinga ganhing kiti tapou toh nalupkhom louding ahi. Numei tapou jongchu ganhing khat anga aluppi dinga gaum lou ding ahi: hichehi jon chungnung ahi. 
Leviticus18:24 Hiche thil ho kiti tapouva hin nangho kisuboh hih-un: ajehchu nangho masanga kana paidoh namho chu hicheho jouse-a hi kisuboh ahiuvin: 
Leviticus18:25 Chule gam chu suhboh-in aumtan: hijeh-a chu keiman akhangitlou naochu talen kamat sah-a, gamsung amatah-in achengho chu ahin lohdoh ahi." 
Leviticus18:26 Hijeh-a chu nanghon keima chondanho le kathu tan naho nanit tei dingu, chule nanam mite ahiuva, gamdang mi nalah uva khopemho ahiuva jong, hiche kidah umho hi khatcha jong nabol lou dingu ahi:" 
Leviticus18:27 (Ijeh inem itile nangho masanga agama um miho chun hiche kidah umhohi ana bolu ahin, chule gamsunghi suhboh-a anaum ahi;)" 
Leviticus18:28 Agam min nangho masanga anaumho analodoh banga, nanghon jong nasuhboh tengule nalohdoh louna diuvin." 
Leviticus18:29 Ajehchu koihile hiche kidah umho lah-a khat bolla chu, hiche tobang bola mihem chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus18:30 Hijeh-a chu namasanguva ana kibol hitobang thet umtah chonnaho hi nabol louna dingule, hitiho-a hi suhboh-a naum louna dinguva, ka thupeh hohi nanit dingu ahi: keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahi." 
Leviticus19:1 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseije, hitin ati," 
Leviticus19:2 Israel chate houkhom ho jouse henga hitihin seijin, Nangho nathen dingu ahi: ajehchu keima Pakai na Pathen'u hi atheng kahi." 
Leviticus19:3 Nangho amitakipmin nanu le napa naginuva, chule kacholngah nikho ho nanit dingu ahi, keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:4 Milimho lama kihei hih-un lang, alim semthu pathen ho jong kisem hih-un: keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:5 Nanghon Pakai henga chamna thilto longlhenna nato uva ahile, nanghon hichu nalungcham tah uva nato dingu ahi." 
Leviticus19:6 Hichu natodoh nikhou le ajing nikho-a nanehjou tei dingu ahi: ijemtia ani thum ni geija um nalaija ahile, hichu meija goding ahi." 
Leviticus19:7 Chule hichu anithum ni-a akineh poupouva ahile, kidah umtah ahin; hichu kisang louding ahitai." 
Leviticus19:8 Hijeh-a chu ane jouse chun Pakai thiltheng asuh minset jeh uva, akhangit lounao akipoh cheh dingu: chule hiche mihem chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus19:9 Nangman nagam ga na-at teng le, nangman nalou ningho jouse chu na-at sohkei louding, chule na-at na-a alhajah ho chu nakichom ngim louding ahi." 
Leviticus19:10 Chule nangman nalengpi thei gaho nachom ngimsel louding, nalengpi thei gaho jong aboncha nalotheng louding; hitiho chu vaichate le gamdang mi dinga nakhenpeh ding ahi: keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:11 Nangma naguchat louding, dihlou tah-a jong nabol louding, chule khat le khat kah-a jong jou nasei louding ahi." 
Leviticus19:12 Chule nangma kamin panna jouva nakihahsel louding, na-Pathen minjong nasuh minset louding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:13 Nangman naheng nakom najoulhep louding, chomjong nachom louding ahi. Akigoipa lo chu jan khovah-a jingkah geija nakoma naumsah louding ahi." 
Leviticus19:14 Nangman na-ngong nagaosap louding, mitcho masanga jong kipal lhuh theina nakoi louding ahi, na-Pathen joh nagin ding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:15 Nathu tan na-a chonphat louna nabol louding ahi: nangman mivaichate chu nakhohsah chom louding, ahiloule mithaneite jong najabol chom louding: amavang chonphatah-a naheng nakom thu natan ding ahi." 
Leviticus19:16 Chule nangma namite lah-a thuse seija nachesuh nachetouna louding: chule naheng nakom thisan thua jong jouthu-a napan louding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi. 
Leviticus19:17 Nangman nalungsunga nasopipa nahotbol louding: iti nama jongle nangman naheng nakom naphosal louding, chule chonset nabolsah louding ahi." 
Leviticus19:18 Nangman phu nalah louding, namite chateho chunga thangthipna jong nanei louding ahi, amavang nangman naheng nakom chu nangma naki ngailut banga nangailut ding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:19 Nanghon kachondan ho nanit diu ahi. Nanghon nagancha hou chu gancha dangto nakimatsah lou dingu ahi: nanghon nalou uva muchi natu hal lou dingu ahi. Chule tupat le samul kihal von jong nachunga nakaisah louding ahi. 
Leviticus19:20 Chule soh numei, pasal khat dinga khao khisa, lhadoh loulai le chamlhatna peh loulai khat chu tahsa ngaichatna jeh-a khattouvin aluppia ahile, amanu chu kijepding ahi: amanu chamlhat ahiloujeh-a anilhona vang kithat louding ahi" 
Leviticus19:21 Chule amapa chun asuhkhelna thilto chu Pakai henga houkhom ho houbuh kotkhah bula chu ahinchoi ding, suhkhkelna thilto dinga kelngoi chal khat ahinkai ding ahi." 
Leviticus19:22 Chuteng thempupa chun amapan anabol chonsetna jeh-a chu, amapa dinga suhkhel thilto kelngoi chal chu Pakai anga atodoh-a, amapa dinga longlhenna abolpeh ding ahi: chutengle amapan anabol chonsetna chu kingaidam ding ahi." 
Leviticus19:23 Chule nangho chuche gama nalut uva, chule nanghon nehdinga thing namkim naphu tengule, aga chu cheptan louva nasim dingu: hichu nangho dinga kum thum cheptan lou hiding; hichu nanehlou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus19:24 Ahinla akum li na-a vang chuche gaho jouse chu, Pakai vahchoina dinga atheng hiding ahitai." 
Leviticus19:25 Chule akum nga na vang, nangho-a dinga aga asodoh thei nadinga aga naneh dingu ahi: keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:26 Nanghon imacha athisan puma nanehtha lou dingu: chule mitpheldoi le ailhim namanchah lou dingu ahi. 
Leviticus19:27 Nanghon nasamu nahet tol kimvel lou dingu, chule nabeng mul hou jong aning navoset lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus19:28 Nanghon mithiho jeh-a natahsao na-at pop lou dingu, chule nati chunguva jong imacha lim nasemlou dingu ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:29 Nangman jonthanhoi sahna dinga nachanu noti'a napansah louding ahi; achuti loule gamsung hi jonthanhoina-a hunglhun tin, gamsunghi gitlouna-a dim ding ahi." 
Leviticus19:30 Nanghon kacholngah ho nanit diu; chule kamun theng naja dingu ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi. 
Leviticus19:31 Nanghon amaho-a kona nakisuhboh louna dingun lhakou mangchaho ngaisang hih-un, chule doithemho jong hol hih-un: keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:32 Nangma lukangho masanga nadin doh ding, tehse mai najading, chule na Pathen nagin ding ahi: keima Pakai kahi." 
Leviticus19:33 Chule namdang khat nagam sunga nangho toh akhopem khoma ahile, ama chu dihlou tah-a nabol lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus19:34 Amavang gamdang mi nangho toh chengkhoma chu nangho-a dinga nalah uva peng tobang hiding, nangho naki ngailut banguva nangailut dingu ahi: ajehchu nangho jong Egypt gama gamdang mi nana hiu ahi: keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus19:35 Nanghon thutanna lam, asaotena ahin, agih tena ahin, ahiloule asan tena hijongle chonphat louna nabol lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus19:36 Khaikot dih, gihtum dih, Ephah dih, chule hin dih nanei diu ahi: keima Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh uva Pakai na Pathen'u kahi." 
Leviticus19:37 Hijeh-a chu nanghon kachondan ho le kathutan jouse najuidiu, chule naboldiu ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus20:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus20:2 Israel chateho henga hitihin seikitnin, Israel chate lah-a kona ahin, Israel gama khopem gamdang mi lah-a kon hijongle, koitobang Molech henga acha pe-a chu; ama chu thatei teiding ahi: agam mite chun ama chu songa asediu ahi." 
Leviticus20:3 Keiman amapa douna-a kamaingat ding, chule amite lah-a kona kapaidoh ding ahi; ajeh chu aman keima muntheng suhbohna ding le keima mintheng suhminset nadingin acha Molech henga apen ahi." 
Leviticus20:4 Chule itiham khatna agam mite chun amapan acha Molech henga apeh chu akimumo sah uva, chule amapa chu atha lou uva ahileh," 
Leviticus20:5 Chuteng chule keiman amapa le a-insung mite douna-a kamaingat ding, chule Molech to jonthanhoi dinga amatoh jong jouse chu amite lah-a kona kapaidoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus20:6 Chule koi hile amaho to jong dinga lhakou ho le doithemho lama kihei tapou chu, amapa douna-a kamaingat ding, chule amite lah-a kona kapaidoh ding ahi" 
Leviticus20:7 Hijeh chun nangho kisuthengun lang atheng hiuvin: ajeh chu keima Pakai na-Pathen'u kahi. 
Leviticus20:8 Chule nanghon keima chondan ho nanit uva, natohdoh dingu ahi: ajehchu keima nangho suthengpa Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus20:9 Koi hile apa ahiloule anu gaosapma chu thonlouva thatei ding ahi: aman apa ahiloule anu agaosap ahin; athisan chu ama chunga chuding ahi. 
Leviticus20:10 Chule pasal khat pasal dang ji to jonga, aheng akompa jinu to jonga chu, ajongpa le ajongnu anilhona thatei ding ahi." 
Leviticus20:11 Chule pasal khat apa jinu to lumkhoma, apa sagohkeo hina hodohpeh-a chu, amani chu anilhona thatei ding ahi; amani thisan chu amani chunga chuding ahi." 
Leviticus20:12 Chule pasal khat amounu to alupkhoma ahile, amani chu anilhona thatei ding ahi; amanin kidah umtah aboldoh lhon ahitai; amani thisan chu amani chunga chuding ahi." 
Leviticus20:13 Pasal khat apasal chanpi khattoh numei to lupkhom banga alup khoma ahile, amani chun kidah umtah abol lhon ahitan; amani chu thatei ding ahi: amani thisan amani chunga chuding ahi." 
Leviticus20:14 Chule pasal khatnin ajinu le ajinu nu ji-a anei kopma ahile, hichu gitlouna ahi: nalah uva gitlouna aumlouna dinga amapa le amani chu meija hala umdingu ahi." 
Leviticus20:15 Chule pasal khat gancha khattoh alupkhoma ahile, amapa chu thatei ding: chule nanghon agancha jong chu atha dingu ahi." 
Leviticus20:16 Chule numei khatnin gancha khat ajotlutna, chuche tochun alupkhoma ahile, nangman numeinu le gancha chu nathatei ding ahi: amani chu thitei ding ahilhone; amani thisan chu amani chunga chuding ahi." 
Leviticus20:17 Chule pasal khatnin asopinu, apa chanu hihen anu chanu hile akichenpi-a, aman amanu sagohkeo amua, amanun amapa sagohkeo amua ahile; hichu gilouna ahi; amani chu amiteu mitmu-a paidoh-a umlhon ding ahi: amapan asopinu sagohkeo hina chu ahodoh peh ahitan; amapan akhangit louna chu akipoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus20:18 Chule pasal khatnin numei anatna neipet khat alupia, amanu sagoh hina ahodoh peh-a ahile; amapan amanu twinah ahodoh peh ahin, amanun athisan twinah chu ahodoh ahitai: chule amani chu anilhona amiteu lah-a kona paidoh-a umlhon ding ahi." 
Leviticus20:19 Nangman nanu sopinu ahin, napa sopinu hile asagokeo hina naho dohpeh louding ahi: ajeh chu amapan akinaipi a-insungmi ahodoh ahi: amanin achonset nalhon akipoh lhonding ahi." 
Leviticus20:20 Chule pasal khatnin apa-ngahpa jinu alupkhom pia ahile, aman apa-ngahpa sagohkeo hina chu ahodohpeh ahitan: amanin achonset nalhon akipoh lhonding, chabeija thilhon ding ahi." 
Leviticus20:21 Chule pasal khatnin asopipa jinu akipuija ahile, hichu thilthenglou ahin: aman asopipa sagohkeo hina ahodohpeh ahi; amani chabeija umlhon ding ahi." 
Leviticus20:22 Hijeh-a chu keiman nangho kahin puilut nadingu gam chun nangho nalohdoh louna dingun; nanghon kachondan ho le kathutana ho nitnun lang chule bolun. 
Leviticus20:23 Chule nangho masanga keiman kakaidoh nam chondan bangin chonhih-un: ajeh chu amahon hitiho jouse hi anabolun, hijeh-a chu keiman amaho chu kahot ahi." 
Leviticus20:24 Ahinla keiman nangho henga, Nanghon amaho gam chu nalo diu, chule hiche bongnoi le khoiju lona gam chu nalo diuva kapeh ding nahiuve, kati ahi. Keima nangho namdang ho-a kona khendoh-a Pakai Pathen chu kahi." 
Leviticus20:25 Hijeh-a chu nanghon satheng le saboh, vacha boh le atheng nakhen dingu ahi: chule sa hile vacha hile chule tolla kitholtho ho hijongle keiman nangho-a kona athenglou ahi tia kakhendoh ho-a kona chu nahinnao thet umtah nasolou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus20:26 Chule nangho keima dinga atheng nahi dingu ahi: ijeh-inem itile Pakai keima hi atheng kahin, chule keima-a tum hidinga nanghohi midang ho-a kona kakhen doh nahiuve." 
Leviticus20:27 Pasal hihen numei hile, lhakou ahiloule doithem hia chu thonlouva thading ahi: amahon amaho chu songa asediu ahi: amaho thisan chu amaho chung mama-a chuding ahi." 
Leviticus21:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Aaron chapate thempuho henga hitihin seijin, Koimacha amite lah-a mithiho jeh-a kisuboh louding ahi:" 
Leviticus21:2 Ahin a-insungmi amato kinai, anu-a ding, apa-a ding, achapa-a ding, achanu-a ding, chule asopipa-a ding," 
Leviticus21:3 Chule asopinu nungah theng, ama to kinaija um, jinei loulaija ding; hichenga dinga vanghi kisuboh thei ahi." 
Leviticus21:4 Ahinla amite lah-a aluchangpen ahi jeh-in, athenlou nadinga ama le ama kisuboh louding ahi." 
Leviticus21:5 Amahon aluchangu avotol loudingu, abengmulu mongjong avoset lou dingu, chule atahsao jong a-atpop loudiu ahi." 
Leviticus21:6 Amaho chu a-Pathen'uva ding atheng hidiu, chule a-Pathen'u min jong asuhboh loudiu ahi. Ajeh amahon meija kisem Pakai henga thilto le a-Pathen'u changlhah chu atojiu ahi: hijeh-a chu amaho atheng hidingu ahi." 
Leviticus21:7 Amahon ji dinga noti ahiloule athenglou chu akipui loudiu; chule ajipan adasa numei jong akipui lou dingu ahi: ajehchu amapa chu a-Pathen'a dinga atheng hija ahi. 
Leviticus21:8 Nangman hijeh-a chu amachu nasuhtheng ding ahi; ajehchu aman nangma Pathen changlhah chu atodoh ahi: amapa chu nangma dinga atheng hiding ahi: ijeh inem itile nangma suthenga Pakai keima atheng kahi. 
Leviticus21:9 Chule thempu khat penpen chanu chu noti'a apana amale ama akisuhboh-a ahile, apa asuhboh ahin: amanu chu meija halding ahi." 
Leviticus21:10 Chule asopite lah-a thempu chungnunga pang, alua thao kinu, thempu vonho von dinga kisuthenga chun, alu ahodoh louding, aponho jong abokeh louding;" 
Leviticus21:11 Thilong kiti tapou anailut louding, apa-a ding le anu-a dinga jong kisuboh louding;" 
Leviticus21:12 Munthenga kona jong potdoh louding, a-Pathen muntheng jong asuhboh louding ahi; ijeh inem itile a-Pathen thao kinu lallukhuh chu achunga um ahi: Keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus21:13 Chule aman ajinu chu nungah theng ahi petna akipui ding ahi. 
Leviticus21:14 Meithai, akidasa numei, akisubohsa, ahiloule noti, hicheho hi akipui louding ahi; amavang amite lah-a kona nungah theng khat akipui ding ahi." 
Leviticus21:15 Amite lah-a jong achilhah asuhboh louding ahi; ajehchu Pakai keiman ama kasuhtheng ahi. 
Leviticus21:16 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus21:17 Aaron henga hitin seijin, Nakhang sunguva nachilhah hou lah-a nolna nei poupou chun, a-Pathen changlhah toh dingin galut dahen." 
Leviticus21:18 Koi hile nolna neichan chu lut louding ahi: amitcho, a-elbai, anahkui soi, ahiloule atichunga aval nei," 
Leviticus21:19 Pasal akengbong, ahilouleh akhutbong," 
Leviticus21:20 Atingbong, mineo, ahiloule amitna nolna um, tipat, tibol, ahiloule atilchangkeh hijongle;" 
Leviticus21:21 Aaron chilhah ho nolna nei koimachan Pakai henga dinga meija kisem thilto toh dinga hungnailut lou dingu ahi: aman achunga nolna anei ahi: a-Pathen changlhah tohdinga hungnailut lou ding ahi. 
Leviticus21:22 Aman a-Pathen changlhah athengpen le atheng chu ania anehthei ding ahi. 
Leviticus21:23 Aman nolna khat aneijeh-a chu keima muntheng aman asuhboh louna dinga, ama pondal sunga chu lutlou ding, maicham naija jong hunglut lou ding ahi: ajehchu Pakai keiman amaho kasuhtheng ahi." 
Leviticus21:24 Chuin Mosi'n hichehi Aaron le achapate chule Israel chate jouse henga aseipeh tan ahi. 
Leviticus22:1 Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus22:2 Aaron le achapate henga chun amaho Israel chate thil thengho-a kona akikang seova, chule keima henga amahon athensosao hiche thilho-a chu keima mintheng asuhboh louna dingun seipeh-in: Keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus22:3 Amaho henga hitihin seijin, Koi hijongle nakhanggui jouseuva nachilhah jouse lah-a kon achunga thenlouna aumpetna Israel chaten Pakai henga akatdoh-u thilthengho henga galutna chu, amachu keima angsunga kona kipaidoh ding ahi: Keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus22:4 Aaron chilhahte lah-a kon koitobang miphah hihen lang, ahiloule thilong hijongle, akisuhtheng kahse-a thil thengho lah-a kona imacha aneh louding ahi. Chule koi hile thilonga kona kisuboh thilkhat tongkha-a, ahiloule ama-a kona abotwi chedoh-a chu," 
Leviticus22:5 Ahiloule akisuhbohna thei ding akitholtho, ahiloule thenlouna akilahson nathei mi, itobang thenlouna nei hijongle;" 
Leviticus22:6 Chutobang khattou tongkha tapou chu nilhah tokah-a thenglouva umding, chule aman atahsa twija asop masangse-a thil thengho lah-a kona imacha aneh louding ahi." 
Leviticus22:7 Chule nisa ahung lhumteng, ama theng ding ahitan, chujou tengle thiltheng lah-a kona chu anehding ahitai: ajehchu hichu ama an ahi." 
Leviticus22:8 Akisuhboh nadinga achama thia ham, san apelih ham chu aneh louding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus22:9 Hijeh-a chu amahon kachondanho anit dingu ahi, achuti louva ahile hiche chonsetna chu apoh uva, hichu asuhboh uva ahile thi dingu ahi: keima Pakai amaho suthenga chu kahi." 
Leviticus22:10 Gamdang mi kiti tapouvin thiltheng chu aneh louding ahi: thempute henga khopem hihen, soh thalah hijongle thiltheng chu aneh theilou ding ahi." 
Leviticus22:11 Ahinla thempu chun asuma mikhat achoh-a ahile, amapa chun hichu anehding, chule a-insunga penga jong chun: amahon ama anneh chu anehthei dingu ahi." 
Leviticus22:12 Thempu chanu khattou gamdang mi toh akichena ahile, amanun thiltheng kitoh ho lah-a kona chu ima anehthei louding ahi." 
Leviticus22:13 Ahinla thempu chanu chu meithai ahiloule akida ahia, chabei ahia, chule anungah lai banga apa insunga umdinga ahung nungkih ahile, amanun apa anneh chu aneh teiding ahi: amavang gamdang min hichu aneh louding ahi." 
Leviticus22:14 Chule pasal khattouvin hetlouva thiltheng lah-a kona ima aneh-a ahile, aman thiltheng chu thempu henga aledit kitding, hopnga-a hopkhat apehbe ding ahi." 
Leviticus22:15 Chule amahon, Israel chateho thiltheng ho, Pakai anga ato houchu asuhboh lou dingu;" 
Leviticus22:16 Ahiloule athiltheng houchu aneh tengule suhkhelna khangitlouna chu apohsah lou dingu ahi: ajehchu keiman amaho suthenga Pakai chu ahi. 
Leviticus22:17 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus22:18 Aaron heng le achapate heng, chule Israel chate jouse henga hitihin seijin, Israel insunga kona hihen, Israel lah-a um gamdang mi hijongle, koitobang akitepna khattouva dinga ganlhaina, ahiloule lungcham thilto-a dinga Pakai henga govam thilto tohding auma ahile," 
Leviticus22:19 Nanghon nalungcham tah uva bongho, kelngoiho, ahiloule kelcha ho-a kona nolna beihel achal napeh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus22:20 Ahinla nolna neitapou chu natolou dingu ahi: ajehchu hichu nangho-a dinga kisanpeh louding ahi. 
Leviticus22:21 Koi hijongle akitepna suhbulhit nading ham, ahiloule lungcham thilto dinga bong ham, ahiloule kelngoi hama Pakai henga chamna thilto ganlhaina toh chan chun, athilto chu sanpeh ahina dinga ahoi chamkim atoding ahi: achunga chu nolna imacha umlou ding ahi." 
Leviticus22:22 Mitcho, kengbong, atipat, tahsa-a apomdoh nei, tina-a kon anai long, ahiloule tipat tapou chu nanghon Pakai henga nato lou diu, chule Pakaiya dinga maicham chunga meija kisem thilto-a nato lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus22:23 Bongchal ahiloule kelngoinou atahsa tibah-a aval, ahiloule alhasam auma ahile, nangman hichu lungcham thilto-a nato thei ahi: ahinla kitepna-a dinga vang hichu kisang louding ahi." 
Leviticus22:24 Nangman gancha atilchang kisuhchip, kitatkeh, kisukeh, le ki-atkeh kiti tapou chu Pakai henga nato louding ahi; chule hitobang ho-a chu nagamsunga jong thilto imacha nabol lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus22:25 Gamdang mi khutna kona hicheho chu na-Pathen changlhah hidinga nato louding ahi: ajeh chu amaho-a bohna aumin, chule amaho-a nolna aumin ahi: hicheho chu nangho dinga kisanpeh louding ahiuve." 
Leviticus22:26 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus22:27 Bongchal ham, kelngoi ham, ahiloule kelcha ham ahung so tengle amachu ni sagi api toh umkhom ding ahi: chule niget channi-a patna Pakai henga meija kisem thilto-a dinga kisang ding ahitai." 
Leviticus22:28 Chule bongpi hihen kelngoipi hile, anouho toh nikhat sunga nathalou diu ahi." 
Leviticus22:29 Chule nanghon Pakai henga thangvahna ganlhaina nato tengule, nalungcham tah uva nato dingu ahi." 
Leviticus22:30 Anikho mama-a chu hiche chu nehjou keiding ahi: ajing geija dinga imacha khenlou ding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi. 
Leviticus22:31 Hijeh chun nanghon kathupeh ho nanit uva, chule hicheho chu nabol dingu ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus22:32 Chule nanghon ka mintheng jong nasuhboh loudiu; amavang Israel chate lah-a keima suhthenga kaumding ahi: keima nangho suthenga Pakai chu kahin," 
Leviticus22:33 Egypt gama kona na-Pathen'u hidinga hinpui dohpa chu kahi: Keima Pakai chu kahi. 
Leviticus23:1 Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus23:2 Israel chate henga thu seijin lang, ajah uva hitin seijin, Pakai kut ho thudola, nanghon kikhoppi theng ahi tia naphondoh dinghou chu, hichehohi keima kut ho chu ahi." 
Leviticus23:3 Nigup sunga na kitong ding ahin: nisagi ni vang chu cholngah ni ahin, kikhoppi theng ahi; hiche nikho-a hi natoh imacha natoh lou dingu ahi: hiche hi nachen namun jouseuva Pakai cholngah ni ahi." 
Leviticus23:4 Hiche hohi aphat ahunglhun dungjuija nanghon naphon lediu Pakai Kut ho, kikhoppi thengho chu ahi." 
Leviticus23:5 Lha masapen nisom le nili nilhah chu Pakai kalchuh Kut ahi. 
Leviticus23:6 Chuche lha mama nisom le ninga ni chu Pakai dinga cholsolou changlhah Kut ahi. Nisagi cholsolou changlhah naneh diu ahi. 
Leviticus23:7 Nimasa pen nile nanghon kikhoppi theng khat nanei diu, chule hiche sunga chu natoh imacha natohlou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus23:8 Ahinla nisagi sunga chu Pakai henga meija kisem thilto nato dingu ahi: nisagi ni chu kikhoppi theng ahin, nanghon hiche sunga chu natoh imacha natohlou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus23:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus23:10 Israel chate henga hitin seijin, Keiman nangho kapehnao gamsunga nahung lutnuva, chule aga na-at tengule, nanghon nachang-at doh-u aga masapen ho phalkhat chu thempu henga nahin choi dingu ahi." 
Leviticus23:11 Chule aman nangho dinga santhei ahina dinga aphal chu Pakai anga ajap ding: cholngahni jou ajing le thempu chun ajap ding ahi. 
Leviticus23:12 Chule nanghon aphal najap niu chule, Pakai henga govam thilto-a dinga kumkhat lhingset nolnabei kelngoi nou achal khat nahin kai dingu ahi." 
Leviticus23:13 Chuche-a dinga anneh thilto chu thao toh kihal changbong neljet ephah hopsom-a hopni, Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga meija kisem thilto hiding: chule adonding thilto chu lengpitwi hin khat hoplia khat hiding ahi." 
Leviticus23:14 Chule nanghon na-Pathen'u henga thilto nahinchoi nikhou mamachu ahunglhun masanga, changlhah hile, kanpoh hile, changvui hile naneh loudiu ahi. Hichehi nachen namun jouseova a-itih-a nakhang khanguva chondana naman diu ahi." 
Leviticus23:15 Nanghon cholngah ni jou ajinga pat, jap thilto-a dinga changhal nahinchoi niuva pat nasim dingu; choldoni sagi nasuhlhing diu ahi:" 
Leviticus23:16 Cholngah sagina jou ajinga pat nisom nga-a nasim uva; Pakai henga anneh thilto thah nato diu ahi. 
Leviticus23:17 Nanghon nachen namun houva kona ephah hopsom-a hopni-a kisem japtho changlhah lumni nahin choidiu; hichu changbong neljetna kon hiding, chol toh kikantha ding; hichu Pakai henga dinga ga masaho ahiuve." 
Leviticus23:18 Chule nanghon changlhah chutoh kumkhat lhingbep nolnabei kelngoinou sagi, bongchalnou khat, chule kelngoichal ni natotha diu; hicheho chu Pakai henga govam thilto le a-anneh thiltoho, adon thilto ho, Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga meija kisem thito ding ahi." 
Leviticus23:19 Chujouteng nanghon chonset thilto-a dinga kelchaho noukhat natodiu, chule chamna thilto-a dinga kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou ni natodiu ahi." 
Leviticus23:20 Chule thempupa chun hicheho chu gamasaho changlhah le kelngoinou ni chutoh Pakai henga jap thilto hiding ajapding: hichu Pakaiya dinga atheng thempupa kipe chu ahi. 
Leviticus23:21 Chule nanghon chuche nikho mama chule, hichu nangho dinga kikhoppi theng ahi tia naphondoh diu: hiche sunga chu nanghon natoh imacha natoh lou dingu ahi. Hichehi nachen namun jouseuva nakhang khanguva a-itih-a dinga chondan hiding ahi." 
Leviticus23:22 Chule nanghon nagam gao na-at tengule, na-atpet nuva chu naloulai ninghou na-at ngimsel loudiu, na-at naova alhajah jong nachom khom loudiu ahi: hicheho chu vaichate le gamdang mi dinga nakhenpeh dingu ahi: keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus23:23 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus23:24 Israel chate henga hitihin seijin, lhasagi channa nikho masapen nileh nanghon choldona nanitdiu, sumkon mut hetjingna kikhoppi theng naman dingu ahi." 
Leviticus23:25 Hiche sunga chu nanghon natoh imacha natohlou dingu; amavang nanghon Pakai henga meija kisem thilto nato dingu ahi. 
Leviticus23:26 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus23:27 Hiche lhasagi channa nisom lhin ni chu longlhenna nikho hiding: hichu nangho dinga kikhoppi theng hiding; chule nanghon nahinnao nasuh gimuva, Pakai henga meija kisem thilto nato dingu ahi." 
Leviticus23:28 Hiche ni-a chu nanghon natoh kiti natohlou diu ahi: ajehchu hichu longlhenna nikho ahin, Pakai na-Pathen'u anga nangho ding longlhenna kibol nikho ahi." 
Leviticus23:29 Ijeh inem itile koihile hiche nikho-a ngeija ahinna suhgim lou chu, amachu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi." 
Leviticus23:30 Chule koihile hiche nikho ngeija natoh khattou tonga chu, amachu amite lah-a kona keiman kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Leviticus23:31 Nanghon itobang natoh hile natoh louhel dingu ahi: hichehi nachen namun jouseova nakhang khanguva a-itih-a ding chondan hiding ahi. 
Leviticus23:32 Hichehi nangho dinga cholngahna choldoni hiding, chule nanghon nahinnao nasuh gim dingu ahi: hiche lha niko ni nilhah-a pat ajing nilhah geija nangho cholngahni nanitdiu ahi." 
Leviticus23:33 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus23:34 Israel chate henga hitihin seipeh-in, hiche lhasagi channa nisom le ni ngani hi Pakai henga nisagi sung Houbuh Kut hiding ahi." 
Leviticus23:35 Ani masapen nikho-a chu kikhoppi theng umding: hiche sunga chu natoh imacha natoh loudiu ahi. 
Leviticus23:36 Nanghon nisagi sung Pakai henga meija kisem thilto nato diu: nigetni chu nangho dinga kikhoppi theng hiding; Pakai henga meija kisem thilto nato diu ahi; hichehi kipun khomna loupitah ahin; chule hiche sunga hi nangho koimachan na natoh loudiu ahi. 
Leviticus23:37 Hichehohi Pakaiya ding kut ho, Pakai henga meija kisem thilto, govam thilto, anneh thilto, ganlhaina, don thilto anikho dungjuijuva tona dinga kikhoppi theng ahi tia naphondoh dinghou:" 
Leviticus23:38 Pakai cholngah niho, na thiltohou, na kitepnahou jouse, chule na lungcham thiltohou, Pakai henga napeh hou simlouva mandingho chu ahi." 
Leviticus23:39 Chujongle lhasagi channa nisom le ninga ni, nanghon nagam gahou nakhop khom tengule, nanghon Pakaiya dinga kut nisagi naman diu ahi; animasa pen ni chu cholngahni hiding, chule nigetni jong chu cholngahni hiding ahi." 
Leviticus23:40 Chule nimasa pen nile nanghon thingpha gaho, lusu doho, thingdo aboh phaho boh, vachadung panga keh huisum ho nalah diu, chule Pakai anga nisagi nakipa thanop diu ahi." 
Leviticus23:41 Chule hiche hi Pakai dinga kut tia kum khat sunga nisagi naman diu ahi. Hichehi nakhang khanguva dinga a-itih-a chondan kipe-a chu ahi: hichehi nanghon lhasagi channa sunga nanit jingdiu ahi. 
Leviticus23:42 Nangho nisagi lhambuh sunga nachendiu; Israel chate apeng jouse lhambuh-a cheng dingu ahi. 
Leviticus23:43 Chutia chu nakhang khanguva nanghon Israel chate Egypt gama kona kahinpuidoh chun amaho lhambuh-a kana chensah-e ti nahet themna diu ahi: keima Pakai na Pathen'u chu kahi. 
Leviticus23:44 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate henga Pakai kut ho chu aphongdoh tan ahi. 
Leviticus24:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati;" 
Leviticus24:2 Israel chate henga meivah ho avah jomjing theina dingin, vahding monga kiheh Olive thao thengseh chu nahenga ahin choina diuvin thupeh neijin." 
Leviticus24:3 Hichu Aaron nin Pakai anga nilhah-a pat jingkah geija tanglouva hettohsahna pondal pamlam, houkhom ho houbuh sunga agoltoh ding ahi; hiche hi nakhang khanguva a-itih-a dinga nachondanu hiding ahi." 
Leviticus24:4 Aman Pakai angsunga meivah khom theng chunga meivah ho chu tanglouva agoltoh ding ahi. 
Leviticus24:5 Chule nangman changbong neljet nalah-a, hichea kona chu changlhah lum somleni nasemding, lumkhat khatna ephah hopsom-a hopni nalutsah cheh ding ahi." 
Leviticus24:6 Chule hicheho chu Pakai angsung dokhang theng chunga nangman golkhatna gup cheh-a golnia nagol ding ahi. 
Leviticus24:7 Chule hetjingna changlhah, Pakai henga meija kisem thilto hidinga nangman agolni chunga chu bego thengsel nakoi ding ahi." 
Leviticus24:8 Atonsot kitepna-a dinga Israel chate-a kona kila ahito lhona, cholngahni sehle aman hiche chu tanglouva Pakai anga phatecha agontup jing ding ahi." 
Leviticus24:9 Chule hiche chu Aaron le achapatea hiding, amahon hichu munthenga aneh diu ahi; ajeh chu a-itih-a chondan hijing dinga Pakaiya dinga meija kisem thilto chu ama dinga thengtah hija ahi." 
Leviticus24:10 Chule Israel numei khat chapa, apa chu Egypt mi ahin, ama chu Israel chate lah-a achedoh-in: hiche Israel numeinu chapa leh Israel mi khat gebuh sunga akidel lhonin;" 
Leviticus24:11 Chuin Israel numeinu chapa chun Pakai min chu ataitomin, agaosap tan ahi. Chuin amahon amapa chu Mosi henga ahin puijuvin: (anu min chu Shelomith, Debri chanu, Dan phunga kon ahi)." 
Leviticus24:12 Amahon Pakai lunggel amaho henga vetsah-a aum theina din, amapa chu vetsuijin akoijuve." 
Leviticus24:13 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus24:14 Agaosap mipa chu gebuh pama puidoh-in; chule athusei jaho jouse chun alujang chunga chun akhutnu ngamuhen, chule houkhom ho jouse chun songin sepmuhen." 
Leviticus24:15 Chule Israel chate henga chu, Koi hile a-Pathen gaosap chan chun achonset akipoh ding ahi, tia naseipeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus24:16 Chule Pakai min taitompa chu thonlouva thatei ding ahin, chule houkhom ho jousen amachu songa ase dingu ahi: gamdangmi jong chu agam sunga pengpa banga Pakai min ataitoma ahile thading ahi." 
Leviticus24:17 Chule koi hile mithat tapou chu thonlouva thatei ding ahi. 
Leviticus24:18 Chule koihile gancha thatna chun, gan chu gan'a aditding ahi." 
Leviticus24:19 Chule khattouvin aheng akom chunga nolna khat achuhsah-a ahile, aman abol tobang banga chu ama chunga kibol ding ahi." 
Leviticus24:20 Gubong chu gubonga, mit chu mitna, ha chu ha-a; aman mikhat chunga nolna asosah banga ama chunga jong kisosah kitding ahi." 
Leviticus24:21 Chule gancha thatna chun, adit ding; chule mihem thatna vang chu, ama thatei ding ahi." 
Leviticus24:22 Nanghon gamdang mi-a ding ahin, nagam mihou khatna ding ahin, dan khatbou naneidiu ahi. Ajehchu keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi, ati." 
Leviticus24:23 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate henga, amahon agaosap pa chu gebuh pama ahinpuidoh uva, chule ama chu songa ase diuvin aseipehtai. Chule Israel chaten Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bang chun abol taovin ahi." 
Leviticus25:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Sinai molsanga Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati." 
Leviticus25:2 Israel chate henga thu seijin lang, ajah uva hitin seijin, Nangho keiman kapeh-u gam nahunglut tengule, agam pumpin Pakai henga cholngahni anitding ahi." 
Leviticus25:3 Nangman kumgup nalouva muchi natuding, chule kum gup nalengpilei nalhongim ding ahi, chule aga naki chopkhom ding," 
Leviticus25:4 Ahinla kum sagi lhinkum chu agam pumpi dinga cholngahna, Pakaiya dinga cholngah hiding ahi. Nangman nalouva muchi natulou ding, nalengpilei nalhongim louding ahi." 
Leviticus25:5 Nangman nachang atna nunga changson chu na-at louding, nalengpigui malngim lou ga jong nalokhom louding ahi; ajehchu agam pumpi dinga cholngah kum ahi." 
Leviticus25:6 Chule gam pumpi cholngah kum-a achama hung kehdohho chu nangho dinga anneh hiding; nangma-a ding, nasohnu-a ding, nasoh thalah-a ding, chule nangma toh khopem khom gamdangmi-a ding," 
Leviticus25:7 Chule nagancha-a ding, chule nagamsunguva um saho-a dinga, chua kona hung gadoh jouse chu nangho anneh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus25:8 Chule nangman cholngah kum sagi nakisim ding, kum sagi sagivei; chule cholngah kumho kikah sungse chu nangma dinga kum somli le kumko hiding ahi." 
Leviticus25:9 Chuteng lhasagi channa nisom lhinni le nangman Jubilee sumkon namutging sah ding, longlhenna nikhoteng sumkon chu nagam pumpiu sunga namut ging sah ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:10 Chule nanghon kum somnga kum chu nathenso diu, chule gamsung pumpi sunga chengho jouse henga chamlhatna naphondoh dingu ahi. Hichu nangho dinga Jubilee hiding; mitinin ama ama neilegou akinungmu kitding, chule mitin a-insung mite henga kile kitding ahi." 
Leviticus25:11 Kum somnga channa chu nangho dinga Jubilee hiding: nanghon natuloudiu, chua kona achama hung khangdoh jong na-at loudiu, chom ngimlou nalengpi leija kona lengpi ga hojong nalokhom louding ahi." 
Leviticus25:12 Ajehchu Jubilee ahin; nangho dinga atheng hiding ahi: nanghon gamsunga kona achama hung kehdoh hochu naneh dingu ahi. 
Leviticus25:13 Hiche Jubilee kum-a hi mitin ama ama neilegou nalepeh dingu ahi. 
Leviticus25:14 Chule nangman naheng nakom henga thilkhat tou najoh-a, ahiloule naheng nakom khutna kona thilkhat tou nachoh-a ahile, nangho khatle khat naki suhgentheito lou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:15 Jubilee jou kum jat dungjuija nangman naheng nakoma kona nachoh ding, chule aga kum jat dungjuija nangman ama henga ajoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:16 Akumho atam dungjuija nangman chuche man chu nakalsah ding, chule akum alhom dungjuija chuche man chu nasuhlhom ding; ajehchu aga na kumho dungjuija aman nangma henga ajoh ahi." 
Leviticus25:17 Hijeh-a chu nangho khat le khat nakisuh gentheito loudiu; amavang Pathen nagin joh dingu ahi: ajehchu keima Pakai na Pathen'u chu kahi. 
Leviticus25:18 Hiche jeh-a chu nanghon kachondan ho najuijuva, kathu tanho nanit uva, natoh dingu ahi; chutile nangho gamsunga bitkeija nachen dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:19 Chuteng gamchun aga ahinso sah-a, nanghon vasetna nanehdiu, chule asunga chu bitkeija nachen dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:20 Chule nanghon, Veuvin, keihon tujong katu daova, agaho jong kalokhom daova ahile, Kum sagi lhinna-a chu ipi kanehdiu ham? nati uva ahile," 
Leviticus25:21 Chuteng keiman kum gup channa-a chu kavangbohna nachung uva kathupeh ding, chule hichun kumthum sung ding ga asodoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:22 Chutia chu nanghon kum get channa le muchi natu dingu, ahivanga kumko channa geija aga lui chu naneh dingu; aga ahung lhun kahse-a nanghon alui kikhola kona chu naneh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:23 Gam chu a-itih-a dinga johdoh louding ahi: ajehchu gamchu keija ahibouve; chule nangho hi keima koma gamdangmi le hungkhopem nahibou uve. 
Leviticus25:24 Chule nanghon nalonao gamsung jouse-a chu, gam kilhatdoh hi naphal dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:25 Nasopipa chu hung vaicha lheh tah-a, chule aman aneilegou phabep chu ajohdoh-a, akinaipi a-insungmi khat chuche lhatdoh dinga ahunga ahile, ama chun asopipan ajoh chu alhatdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:26 Chule mipa chun koimacha alhatdoh ding nei hih-a, chule ama tah-in alhatdoh jouding ahi tahle," 
Leviticus25:27 Chuteng aman anei alahkit theina dingin, ajoh dohna kumho kisim henlang, aval chu ajoh napa henga lepehkit hen." 
Leviticus25:28 Ahinla aman amapa henga chu alepeh joulou tah-a ahile, athil kijohdoh chu amapa khutna Jubilee kum ahikahsea umden ding ahi: chule Jubilee teng hiche lahdohna hung umding, chule amapa chun anei ahinle neikit ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:29 Chule mikhatnin kulbang kikai khum khopi sunga um chenna in khat ajoh-a ahile, aman hichu ajohdoh jou kumkhat guilhungset sunga akilhatdoh thei ding; kum khat lhingset sunga aman alhatdoh thei ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:30 Ahinla hichu kum khat lhingset sunga akilhatdoh tahlouva ahile, kulbang kikai khum khopi sunga in chu akhang khanga achopa-a dinga kiphutdet ding: chule Jubilee teng jongle pehdoh louding ahitai." 
Leviticus25:31 Ahinla kulbangin akolkhumlou khoneo ho-a um inho vangchu gamsunga um louho dana kisimding: hicheho chu lhatdoh thei hiding, chule Jubilee tengle pehdoh hiding ahi." 
Leviticus25:32 Hijeng jongle Levi mite khopiho le agoulou khopiho-a inho vangchu, Levi miten itih phat hijongle alhatdoh theiju ahi." 
Leviticus25:33 Chule mikhatnin Levi miho-a kona thilkhat achoh-a ahile, agou lona khopi-a akijohdoh in chu Jubilee kum tengle pehdoh hiding ahi. Ijeh inem itile Levi phungho khopi ho-a in ho chu Israel chate lah-a amahon aneiju chu ahi." 
Leviticus25:34 Ahinla akhopiu pamho-a um louho chu kijoh theilou ding ahi; ajeh chu hichu a-itih-a dinga amaho gouchan ahi. 
Leviticus25:35 Chule nasopipa chu ahung vaicha tah-a, chule nalah uva chu vaichatna alhuhlhah tah-a ahile, nangman amachu nakithopi ding ahi: henge, gamdangmi le khopem banga nangma koma nachen sah ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:36 Ama-a konin nangman akan ahiloule apung lahih-in: nasopipa chu nangma toh achenkhom theina dingin, na Pathen gingin." 
Leviticus25:37 Nangman nasum chu akan dinga napeh louding; naneh nachah jong apung dinga napeh louding ahi. 
Leviticus25:38 Canaan gam peh dingle na-Pathen'u hidinga, Egypt gama kona nahin puidohpao Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus25:39 Chule nakoma cheng nasopi khat chu ahung vaichatna, nangma henga ahung kijoh-a ahile; nangman ama chu soh banga na natohsah louding:" 
Leviticus25:40 Amavang soh thalah bang le khopem banga nahenga umding, Jubilee kum geija nangma najen ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:41 Chujouteng aman nanga kona potdoh ding, ama le aumpi achate abonuva, chule a-insung mite henga kinungle kitnuva, apu apate goulona gama chu kile kitding ahi." 
Leviticus25:42 Ijeh inem itile amahohi Egypt gama kona kahin puidoh keima sohte ahiuve: amaho soh-a kijoh lou dingu ahi. 
Leviticus25:43 Nangma ama chunga hunam tah-a navaihom louding; amavang na-Pathen nagin johding ahi. 
Leviticus25:44 Soh pasal le soh numei nanghon naneikop dinghou chu, nakimvel uva um Pathen houlou ho hidiu ahi: amaho lah-a kona nanghon soh pasal le soh numei nakichoh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:45 Chujongle nalah uva khopem gamdangmi chateho-a kona le, nagam sunguva peng nangho toh umkhom amaho insung mite chu nachoh theiju ahi: chule amaho chu nangho neilegou hiding ahiuve." 
Leviticus25:46 Chule amaho chu nangho nunga nachateo goulo dinga, nei le gou alo diuva nalah dingu ahi; amaho chu a-itih-a nangho soh hiding ahiuve: ahinla nasopiten Israel chate chunga vang, nangho khatnin khat chunga hunam tah-a navai homlou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus25:47 Chule nakoma khopemho le gamdangmi khat chu ahung haodoh-a, chule ama koma cheng nasopipa chu ahung vaichatna, chule nakoma um gamdangmi ahiloule khopempa heng, ahiloule gamsungmi khat henga ahung kijoh tah-a ahile;" 
Leviticus25:48 Ama chu akijoh jouteng lhatdoh kit thei hiding ahi; asopite ho lah-a khatnin ama alhatdoh thei ahi. 
Leviticus25:49 Apa-ngahpa ahiloule apa-ngahpa chapa chun ama alhatdoh theiding ahin, ahiloule ama insungmi akinaipi khatnin alhatdoh thei; ahiloule ajo lhangle ama le ama akilhatdoh thei ahi." 
Leviticus25:50 Chule aman ama chapa chu ama akichohna kum-apat Jubilee kum gei dinga chu akihoupi ding ahi: chule ama akijohdohna manchu akum kisim dungjuija, amatoh ana umkhom soh thalah khat phat dungjuija kitepding ahi." 
Leviticus25:51 Kum tamtah aum nahlaija ahile, hicheho dungjuija chu akilhatdohna man chu akichohna suma kona apehding ahi." 
Leviticus25:52 Chule Jubilee kum lhinna ding chu kum phabep bou avatna ahile, ama amapa toh asimding, akumho dungjuija chu akilhatdohna man chu apeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus25:53 Akum kum-a soh thalah banga amapa chuto umding: chule akhatpa chun nangma angsunga ama chunga chu hunam tah-a vai ahomlou ding ahi. 
Leviticus25:54 Chule hiche kumho sunga hi ama lhatdoh-a aumlouva ahile, Jubilee kum tengle potdoh ding, ama le aumpi achate chu potdoh ding ahiuve." 
Leviticus25:55 Ajeh chu Israel chate chu keima dingin kasohte ahiuvin; Egypt gama kona kahin puidoh kasohte ahiuve: keima Pakai na Pathen'u chu kahi. 
Leviticus26:1 Nanghon nangho semthu lim, ahiloule khenthu lim nakisem loudiu, lim kituntho jong natundoh loudiu, songa kisem limpou pou jong a-anga kun nadinga naphudoh lou dingu ahi: ajehchu keima Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus26:2 Nanghon kacholngah nikhoho nanit uva, kamun theng najaboldiu ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus26:3 Nanghon kachondan ho-a nachon uva, kathupeh ho nanit uva, chule nabol uva ahile;" 
Leviticus26:4 Keiman nangho aphatcha gotwi kapeh diu, chule gamsung chun aga ahinsodoh ding, loujaova thingphung hon jong agau ahin sepdoh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:5 Chule nachang voh-u chu lengpigui lokhomto kikaimatna, nalengpiga lokhomu chu muchi lhah phattoh kikaimat ding: nanghon na annu vasetna naneh uva, chule nagam sunguva bitkeija nachen diu ahi." 
Leviticus26:6 Chule keiman gamsunga chamna kalensah-a, chule nalup uva, koimachan nasuh kichat lou dingu ahi: chule gamsunga kona gamsa gilouho chu kano manga, chemjam minjong na gamsungu apal louding ahi." 
Leviticus26:7 Chule nanghon namelma teo nadel uva, amaho nangho masanga chemjam'a loudingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:8 Nalah uva mi nga-in jakhat nadel uva, mi jakhat nin sangsom nadel jamdiu: namelma teu chu namasanguva chemjam'a loudingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:9 Ajehchu keiman nangho kajabol uva, kaphat theisah dingu, chule kapunsah uva, nangho to kakitepna naphudoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus26:10 Chule nanghon akikhol chu naneh uva, athah jeh-a aluichu nahin pohdoh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:11 Chule keiman ka houbuh nalah uva katundoh ding: kahinnan nangho ahot louding ahi. 
Leviticus26:12 Keima nalah uva kache le-a, na Pathen'u kahiding, chule nangho kamite nahi dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:13 Nanghon amaho soh nahilou na dinguva, Egypt gama kona nangho hinpui dohpa Pakai na-Pathen'u chu kahi; chule keiman nanamkol jon khaovu kasuhtana, dingjanga kachesah nahitaove." 
Leviticus26:14 Ahinla, nanghon kathu nangailou uva, chule hiche thupeh ho jouse nabol lou uva;" 
Leviticus26:15 Chule kachondan ho nanah sahmo uva, nahinnaovin kathutan naho ahotbola, chutia chu kathupeh ho jouse nabol daova, kakitepna nasuhkeh uva ahile;" 
Leviticus26:16 Hichehi keiman jong nangho chunga kabolding ahi; namit teniu kamang ding le nalungsungu sugenthei dinga, nachung uva tijatna, khutsao le khosihpi kachuhsah ding ahi. Chule mohseh-a muchi nalhah dingu ahi, ajehchu namelmate nehding bep ahibouve." 
Leviticus26:17 Chule keiman nangho douna-a kamai kangat ding, chule nangho namelma teu masanga naloudiu: nangho hinmuda hochun nachung uva vai ahomdiu; chule nangho koima del louva najam dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:18 Chule hicheho jouse jeh-a jong kathu nangailou nahlai uva ahile, nachonset jeh uva sagi vei kasuh gentheibe ding nahiuve." 
Leviticus26:19 Chule nakiletsah piu nathanei nao chu kasuhkeh ding; chule navan-u chu thih, chule na leiset nu chu sum-eng kaso ding ahi." 
Leviticus26:20 Chuteng nathahat naochu mohjen seh-a kisumang ding ahi; ajehchu naleiset un aga asolou ding, gamsunga thingphung honjong aga aseplou dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:21 Chule nangho keito kikala nacheova, kathu nangailou uva ahile; nachonset nahou dungjuija chan sagi-a tam hise nachung uva kalensah ding ahi." 
Leviticus26:22 Keiman nachateo chom mang ding, nagancha hou sumang ding, chule lhomcha naso dinguva gamsaho jong kahinsol ding; chule nalam lhongpiu hou chu agohkeo hiding ahi." 
Leviticus26:23 Chule hiche ho-a jonghi nangho nakisem thah lou nahlai juva, chule keima toh kikala nachon nahlai uva ahile;" 
Leviticus26:24 Keima jong nangho to kikala kacheding, chule nachonset nahou jeh-a sagivei kasuhgimbe ding nahiuve." 
Leviticus26:25 Chule keiman kakitepna nelkalna phula dinga, nachung uva chemjam kachuh sah ding ahi: chule nakhopi hou sunga nangho nakikhop khom tengule, nalah uva natset kalensah ding; chule nangho namelma teu khutna kipedoh ding nahiuve." 
Leviticus26:26 Chule keiman na-an neh-u hungkon dohna kasuhtan tengle, numei somin thuh khatna nachang lhah-u akandiu, chule amahon nachang lhah-u chu agih dungjuija napehdiu; nanghon naneh uva, ahivanga nava loudiu ahi." 
Leviticus26:27 Chule hicheho jouse jenga jonghi nanghon kathu nangailou uva, chule keima toh kikala nache nahlai juva ahile;" 
Leviticus26:28 Chuteng keima nangho toh kikala lungsa tah-a kacheding; chule keima, keimatah-in nachonset nahou jeh-a sagivei kagimbol ding nahiuve." 
Leviticus26:29 Chuteng nanghon nachapateo tahsa naneh dingu, chule nachanuteu tahsa jong naneh dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:30 Chule keima namun sanghou kasuhsetna, nalimsem hou kasuh boh-a, nalongu chu namilim hou long chunga kaselhah ding, chule kahinnan nangho ahotding ahi." 
Leviticus26:31 Keiman nakhopi hou agoh-a kakoija, namun theng hou chu agohkeova kakoiding, chule nathil namtui hou nam chu kanahpeh louding nahiuve." 
Leviticus26:32 Chule keiman gamsung chu agohkeova kakoiding: chule namelma teu asunga chengho chun hichu kidang asahdiu ahi. 
Leviticus26:33 Chule keiman Pathen helouho lah-a nangho kathecheh ding, nanung uva chemjam'a kalap ding ahi: chule nagamu chu agohkeova uma, nakhopi hou chu ahomkeo hiding ahi." 
Leviticus26:34 Chuteng gamsung chu agohkeova aumsungse-a acholngah nikhoho amanding, chule nangho namelma teu gamsunga naum dingu ahi; chutengle gamsung chu kicholdo ding, acholngah nikhoho aman ding ahi." 
Leviticus26:35 Agohkeova aumlai sungse-a kicholdo ding ahi; ajehchu nangho asunga nachen laijun, cholngah nikho hon akicholdo pon ahi." 
Leviticus26:36 Chule nangho lah-a ahingdoh amoh chasun chunga chu, aumnao amelmateu gamsunga chu alungsunga kichatna kachuh sah ding; thingdo kilin ginin jong amaho adel ding; chule chemjam masanga jam banga jam dingu; chule koiman adellou tengu jongle amaho lhuding ahiuve." 
Leviticus26:37 Chule koiman adellou tengu jongle amaho chemjam masanga jam banga, khat chu khat chunga lhuding ahiuve: chule nanghon namelma teu masanga dinjou nathei tha nanei loudiu ahi." 
Leviticus26:38 Nangho Pathen helouho lah-a namanthah heldiu, chule namelma teu gamin nangho naneh jouhel dingu ahi." 
Leviticus26:39 Chule nangho lah-a ahoidoh hochun namelma teu gamsunga ana khangitlou naho anguipi diu; chule apu apateu khangitlou naho jong chu angui mangpi dingu ahi. 
Leviticus26:40 Iti hama amahon akhangit lounao le apu apateu khangitlouna, asuhkhel nao keima douna-a asuhkhelna hou, chule keima toh kikala alamlhah nahou aphondoh uva ahile;" 
Leviticus26:41 Chule keima jong amaho toh kikalin kanachen, chule amelmateu gamsunga kana puilut tan; ijemtia alungsung cheptan louho chu asuhnemuva, chule akhangit lounao talen chu akisanuva ahile;" 
Leviticus26:42 Keiman Jacob to kakitepna, Isaac to kakitepna, chule Abraham to kakitepna chu kageldoh kitding; chule gamsung chu kahin geldoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus26:43 Gamsung jong amahon adalhah uva, gamsung chun amaho beija agohkeova aum sunga chu acholngah nikhoho aman ding: chule amahon akhangitlou naova atalen matnu chu asandiu ahi: ajehchu amahon kathu tanho anahsah loujeh uva, chule amahon keima chondan ho ahotbol jeh-u ahi." 
Leviticus26:44 Chule hiche ho jouse jeh-a hi amelmateu gamsunga aumtengule, keiman amaho kapaidoh louding, suhmanghel ding le kakitepna suhkeh nadinga kahot loudingu ahi: ajehchu keima Pakai a-Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Leviticus26:45 Hijongle keiman amaho jala hi, a-Pathen'u kahi theina dinga Pathen helouho mitmu-a Egypt gama kona kahungpuidoh aputeo apateu to kakitepna chu kageldohkit ding ahi: keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Leviticus26:46 Hicheho hi chondanho, thutan naho, danthuho, Pakaiyin amale Israel chate kah-a Sinai molsanga Mosi khutna asemchu ahi." 
Leviticus27:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati," 
Leviticus27:2 Israel chate henga thu seijin lang, ajah uva hitin seijin, Mikhatnin mihem khat chu Pakaiya katdoh nadinga kitepna aneija ahile, nangman nahisah sah chu hiding ahi" 
Leviticus27:3 Nangman nahisah ding dan chu pasal kum somni apat kum somgup upa ahile, amachu munthenga shekel dungjuija dangka somnga hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:4 Numei ahile nangman nahisah ding chu shekel somthum hiding ahi. 
Leviticus27:5 Chule kum nga-a pat akum somni sung ahile, nangman pasal la chu shekel somni, chule numeija chu shekel som nahisah ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:6 Chule lhakhat napat kum nga gei ahile, pasal ho dinga natepeh dingchu shekel nga hiding, numei hoding chu shekel thum hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:7 Chule kum somgup mapat chunglam ahia, pasal ahile, shekel somlenga nahisah ding, numei ahile shekel som nahisah ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:8 Ahinla nangman nahisah sanga ama anavaichat johle, amachu amale ama thempu henga hung kipelut ding, chule thempun aman atepding ahi. Akihahselpa hijouna dungjuija, thempun aman atepding ahi." 
Leviticus27:9 Chule Pakaiya thilto dinga ahin kaiju chu gancha ahia ahile, mitinin Pakaiya dinga ahin to jouseu chu atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:10 Aman hichu akhel louding, aphalou chu apha-a jong alheh louding ahi: chule ijemtia gan chu gana alheh tah-a ahile, hiche chule alhetna chu ania atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:11 Chule hichu Pakai henga ganlhaina atoji louvu sathenglou ahia ahile, aman gan chu thempu anga ahin pehlut ding:" 
Leviticus27:12 Chule hichu thempun hichu apha hile ase hile aman atepding; thempu nangman aman natep jat jat chu aman hijeng ding ahi 
Leviticus27:13 Ahinla aman hichu alhatdoh dinga ahile, nangman aman natep chunga chu nga-a khat abelap ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:14 Chule mikhatnin a-in chu Pakaiya atheng hidinga asuhtheng tengle, thempun hichu apha hile ase hile aman atepding: thempun atep jatjat chu hijeng ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:15 Chule a-in suthengpa chun a-in chu alhatdoh dinga ahile, nangman aman natep chunga chu nga-a khat abelap ding, chule hichu ama-a hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:16 Chule mikhatnin agoulo loumun behkhat chu Pakai henga asuhtheng tah-a ahile, aman dingchu chuche-a muchi kilhah dungjuija nangman natepding ahi; sakolchang chi homer khat chu dangka shekel som nga-a kitepding ahi." 
Leviticus27:17 Aman alou chu Jubilee kum-a pat asuhthenga ahile, nangman aman natep jatchu hijing ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:18 Ahinla aman alou chu Jubilee jouva asuhtheng ahile, thempun apehding sum avat chu Jubilee hunglhun nading kum avatho dungjuija asimdoh pehding, chule hichu nangman nateppeh jatna kona kisulhom ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:19 Chule lou suthengpa chun ipijeh hama alhatdoh dinga ahile, nangman aman natep chunga chu nga-a khat abelap ding, chuteng hichu ama-a dinga kisuhdet pehding ahi." 
Leviticus27:20 Chule aman alou chu alhatdoh louding ahia, ahiloule alou chu midang khat henga ajohdoh-a ahile, kilhatdoh kit louding ahitai." 
Leviticus27:21 Ahinla louchu Jubilee sunga pehdoh ahia ahile, akikatdoh lou banga hichu Pakaiya atheng hiding ahi; hichu thempu gouchan hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:22 Chule khattouvin ama neilegou hilou, amavang achohtho loumun chu Pakai henga asuhthenga ahile;" 
Leviticus27:23 Chuteng thempun Jubilee kum geija dinga nangman natep chu ama dinga asimpeh-a, chule hiche nikho mama chule amapan nangman natep jat chu thiltheng banga Pakai henga apeh ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:24 Jubilee kum tengle alou chu akichohna pa henga kile kitding, masanga agam neipa heng ngeija chu kile kitding ahi." 
Leviticus27:25 Chule nangman natep ho jouse chu munthenga shekel dungjui hicheh ding, gerah somni chu shekel hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:26 Gancha peng masapen, Pakaiya dinga apeng masapen hidingho bouchu koimachan asuhtheng louding ahi; bongchal hihen, ahiloule kelngoiho hijongle; hichu Pakaiya ahi." 
Leviticus27:27 Ahinla hichu gantheng louva kon ahile, natep dungjuija amapan alhatding, chule achunga nga-a khat abelap ding; ahiloule hichu akilhat lou dinga ahile, nangman aman natep dungjuija kijohdoh ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:28 Hijeng jongle thil kikatdoh tapou, mikhatnin aneiho jouse lah-a kon mihem le gancha lah-a kon hihen, agouchan alouva kon hijongle Pakaiya dinga akatdoh chan chu kijoh louding, lhatjong kilhatdoh louding ahi: thil kikatdoh jouse chu Pakaiya ding atheng chungnung hia ahi." 
Leviticus27:29 Mihem lah-a kona suhmang dinga kikatdohsa mihem vangchu koiman alhatdoh louding, amavang kithat teiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:30 Chule gamsunga somma khat jouse, gamsung muchi-a kon hihen, ahiloule agam theiga lah-a kon hijongle, Pakaiya ahi: Pakaiya dinga atheng ahi." 
Leviticus27:31 Chule mikhatnin asoma khat hochu lhatdoh ding agotna ahile, aman hiche chunga chu nga-a khat abelap ding ahi." 
Leviticus27:32 Chule bonghon, ahiloule kelngoi hon thudola somakhat chu, moljol noija lut tapou asom lhina jouse chu Pakai henga dinga atheng hiding ahi." 
Leviticus27:33 Aman hichu aphaham ahiloule aseham akholkhoh louding, chule khel jong akhel louding ahi: chule iham tia aman akhel khah tah-a ahile, hiche chu le akhelpa chu ania atheng hiding ahi; hichu kilhatdoh louding ahi." 
Leviticus27:34 Hicheho hi Sinai molsanga Israel chatea dinga Pakaiyin Mosi henga athupeh chu ahi. 
Numbers1:1 Egypt gama kona ahungdoh kalu kumni channa, alhani lhinna nimasa pen nin Sinai gamthipma kikhopna houbuh sunga chun Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a thu ahin seijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers1:2 Israel chate houkhom ho jouse chu a-in ko kon, aphung phunga apate kailhah cheh-in, amin jatnu dungjui cheh-in pasal jouse abonchan simsoh keijin." 
Numbers1:3 Israel sunga galsat dinga manthei jouse kum somni-a pat achunglam sechu nangma toh Aaron'in aloi loija sim sohkei lhonin. 
Numbers1:4 Chule aphung phunga apate kailhah-a insung luchang pentah mikhat cheh nakithopi lhon dinga nalhen doh lhon ding ahi. 
Numbers1:5 Chule hicheng jouse hi nangni kithopi ding miho minchu ahi: Reuben phunga kon; Shedeur chapa Elizur. 
Numbers1:6 Simeon phunga kon, Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel." 
Numbers1:7 Judah phunga kon, Amminadab chapa Nahshon." 
Numbers1:8 Issachar phunga kon, Zuar chapa Nethaneel." 
Numbers1:9 Zebulun phunga kon, Helon chapa Eliab." 
Numbers1:10 Joseph chate holah-a kon: Ephraim phunga kon, Amihud chapa Elishama: Manesseh phung kon, Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel." 
Numbers1:11 Benjamin phunga kon Gideoni chapa Abidan. 
Numbers1:12 Dan phunga kon, Ammishaddai chapa Ahiezar." 
Numbers1:13 Asher phunga kon, Ocran chapa Pegiel." 
Numbers1:14 Gad phunga kon, Deuel chapa Eliasaph." 
Numbers1:15 Naphtali phunga kon, Enan chapa Ahira hiding ahi." 
Numbers1:16 Hichenghi houkhom na lah-a kona aminche cheh ahiuvin, apu apateu phung kaija pipu cheh, Israel asang sang luchang ho ahiuve." 
Numbers1:17 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chun hiche amin kisimdoh chengse hi apuidoh lhonin; 
Numbers1:18 Chule houkhom ho jouse chu lhani lhinna nimasa pen nichun akhom khomun, amahon apu apaova a-inko dungjui cheh-in, kum somni-a lhah chunglamse chu asimun, amin jatnu dungjui cheh-in aphung guiju chu aphongdoh taove." 
Numbers1:19 Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin, aman jong Sinai gamthipma chun aminu asimtan ahi." 
Numbers1:20 Israel chapa alenpen Reuben chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkei tan ahi." 
Numbers1:21 Reuben phunga kon akisimdoh amaho chengse chu; sangsomli le sanggup toh janga ahi. 
Numbers1:22 Simeon chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:23 Simeon phunga kon akisimdoh amaho chengse chu sangsomnga le sangko toh jathum ahi. 
Numbers1:24 Gad chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:25 Gad phunga kon akisimdoh amaho chengse chu sangsomli le sangnga toh jagup le somnga ahi. 
Numbers1:26 Judah chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:27 Judah phunga kon akisimdoh amaho chengse chu sangsomsagi le sangli toh jagup ahi. 
Numbers1:28 Issachar chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:29 Issachar phunga kon akisimdoh amaho chengse chu sangsomnga le sangli toh jali ahi. 
Numbers1:30 Zebulun chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:31 Zebulun phunga kon akisimdoh amaho chengse chu sangsomnga le sagi toh jali ahi. 
Numbers1:32 Joseph chate, aminso dinga Ephraim chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:33 Ephraim phunga kon akisimdoh chengse chu sangsomli toh janga ahi. 
Numbers1:34 Manasseh chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;"
