Numbers1:35 Manasseh phunga kon akisimdoh chengse chu sangsomthum le sangni toh jani ahi. 
Numbers1:36 Benjamin chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:37 Benjamin phunga kon akisimdoh chengse chu sangsomthum le sangnga toh jali ahi. 
Numbers1:38 Dan chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:39 Dan phunga kon akisimdoh chengse chu sangsomgup le sangni toh jasagi ahi. 
Numbers1:40 Asher chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:41 Asher phunga kon akisimdoh chengse chu sangsomli le sangkhat toh janga ahi. 
Numbers1:42 Naphtali chate chu akhangu dungjui, a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh le, aminu kisim dungjui cheh-in pasal takip kum somni-a lhah chunglam sese galla konthei cheh chu asimtoh sohkeijun ahile;" 
Numbers1:43 Naphtali phunga kon akisimdoh chengse chu sangsomnga le sangthum toh jali ahi. 
Numbers1:44 Hichenghi Mosi le Aaron nin asimdoh lhon chu ahin, Israel pipuho chu mi som le mini ahin; mikhat cheh chu phung khat cheh-a ding ahi." 
Numbers1:45 Hijeh chun hichengho jouse hi Israel chate ho, apu apateu insung dungjui cheh-a kumsom ni-a lhah chunglamse, Israel sunga gal konthei cheh akisimdoh hochu ahiuvin;" 
Numbers1:46 Aboncha akisimdoh jouse chu, sangjagup toh sangthum toh janga le somnga ahi." 
Numbers1:47 Ahivangin Levi ho chu apu apateu kailhah phung lah ahin akisimtha pon ahi. 
Numbers1:48 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers1:49 Levi phung bou chu nasimtha louding, Israel chate kisim na-a jong nasimtha louding ahi." 
Numbers1:50 Ahivangin nangman Levi ho chu hettohsahna houbuh chung le asunga um sumlheng ho chung, chule thildang aum jouse vetupma napansah ding ahi; amahon houbuh le asunga sumlheng ho jouse apoh dingu; chule hicheho chunga chu lhacha-a pangdiu, chujongle houbuh kimvela chu gebuh akison dingu ahi." 
Numbers1:51 Houbuh chu malama akichon ding tengle, Levi miten aphetlhah dingu: chule houbuh chu sonding ahitengle, Levi mihon atundoh dingu ahi: chule hetkhahlou mi anaija hunga aumle thajeng ding ahi." 
Numbers1:52 Chule Israel chate chun ama ama ponbuh cheh chu abung abunga akisah diu, amitakipmin ajanelu dungjuija aponlap kom cheh uva akisah dingu ahi." 
Numbers1:53 Amavang Levi ho chun Israel houkhom ho chunga lungsatna aumlouna dinga, hettohsahna houbuh vela chu akisah dingu ahi. Chule Levi ho chun hettohsahna houbuh chunga mopohna anei dingu ahi." 
Numbers1:54 Chuin hitichun Israel chate chun Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh jouse dungjui chun abol taovin ahi. 
Numbers2:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron jah-a thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers2:2 Israel chate jouse chun apu apateu insung melchihna kom, aponlap kom cheh uva pon in akison cheh dingu; amahon houkhom ho houbuh-a kona gamlatah-a pon in chu akison dingu ahi." 
Numbers2:3 Chule nisa hung sodoh na solam sanga chu ajanelu kihop khen dungjuija Judah le ajanel hon gebuh ason dingu ahi: chule Amminadab chapa Nahshon chu Judah chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahin," 
Numbers2:4 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomsagi le sangli toh jagup ahi." 
Numbers2:5 Chule ama banna gebuh kison dinga chu Issachar phung hiding: chule Zuar chapa Nethanel chu Issachar chate chunga gal lamkaija pangding ahi. 
Numbers2:6 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomnga le sangli toh jali ahi." 
Numbers2:7 Chujoule Zebulun phung hintin: chule Helon chapa Eliab chu Zebulun chate chunga gal lamkaija pang ding ahi. 
Numbers2:8 Chule ami janel, jatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomsagi le sangli toh jali ahi." 
Numbers2:9 Chule Judah gebuh-a kisimdoh chengse chu, sangjakhat le sangsomget le sanggup toh jali ahi. Amahohi kipatdoh masadiu ahi." 
Numbers2:10 Chule noilam sanga chu ajanelu kihop khen dungjuija Reuben le ajanel hon gebuh ason dingu ahi: chule Shedeur chapa Elizur chu Reuben chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:11 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomli le sanggup toh janga ahi." 
Numbers2:12 Chule ama koma gebuh kisonho chu Simeon phung hiding ahi: chule Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel chu Simeon chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:13 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomnga le sangko toh jathum ahi." 
Numbers2:14 Chubanna chu Gad phung hiding: chule Deuel chapa Eliasaph chu Gad chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:15 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomli le sanga toh jagup le somnga ahi." 
Numbers2:16 Chule Reuben gebuh sunga kisimdoh chengse chu sangjakhat le sangsomnga le sangkhat toh jali le somnga ahi, chule amaho chu agolni chana kipatdoh dingu ahi." 
Numbers2:17 Chuteng houkhom ho houbuh chu gebuh lailunga Levi ho gebuh chutoh kitoldoh thading; amitakip amun cheh-a aponlap-u dungjuija, aponbuh-u ason bang banguva chu kitol dingu ahi." 
Numbers2:18 Chule lhumlam sanga chu ajanelu kihop khen dungjuija Reuben le ajanel hon gebuh ason dingu ahi: chule Ephraim chate chunga gal lamkai ding chu Ammihud chapa Elishama hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:19 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomli le janga ahi." 
Numbers2:20 Chule akoma chu Manasseh phung hiding: chule Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel chu Manasseh chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:21 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomthum le sangni toh jani ahi." 
Numbers2:22 Chubanna chun Benjamin phung hintin: chule Gedeoni chapa Abidan chu Benjamin chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:23 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomthum le sangnga toh jali ahi." 
Numbers2:24 Chule Ephraim gebuh sunga kisimdoh chengse chu sangjakhat toh sangget toh jakhat ahi. Chule amaho chu malam no-a agolthum channa-a chedingu ahi. 
Numbers2:25 Chule Dan le ajanel ho gebuh chu ajanelu kihop khen dungjuija sahlam sanga umding ahi: chule Ammishaddai chapa Ahiezer chu Dan chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:26 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomgup le sangni toh jasagi ahi." 
Numbers2:27 Chule akoma gebuh kison dinga chu Asher phung hiding: chule Ocran chapa Pagiel chu Asher chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:28 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomli le sangkhat toh janga ahi." 
Numbers2:29 Chubanna chun Naphtali phung hintin: Enan chapa Ahira chu Naphtali chate chunga gal lamkai hiding ahi. 
Numbers2:30 Chule ami janel, ajatnu kisimdoh chengse chu sangsomnga le sangthum toh jali ahi." 
Numbers2:31 Chule Dan gebuh-a kisimdoh jouse chu sangjakhat le sangsomnga le sangsagi toh jagup ahi. Chule amaho chu aponlap utoh anunung pena cheding ahiuve. 
Numbers2:32 Chule hichengse hi Israel chate lah-a apu apateu insung dungjuija kisimdoh chu ahi: agebuh uva ajanel pumpiu akisimdoh chengse chu abonchang keijin sangjagup leh sangthum to janga le somnga ahi. 
Numbers2:33 Ahivangin Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin, Levi ho chu Israel chate lah-a chun akisimtha pon ahi." 
Numbers2:34 Chutichun Israel chaten Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bang chun abol taovin; aponlap kom cheh uva pon in akisonun, amaho insung kailhah dungjui cheh le apu apateu insung dungjui cheh-in malama akitolun ahi." 
Numbers3:1 Hichehohi Pakaiyin Sinai molsanga Mosi henga thu anasei nikho-a Mosi le Aaron chilhah ho chu ahiuve. 
Numbers3:2 Chule hicheho hi Aaron chapate min chu ahi: apeng masapen Nadab, chule Abihu, Eleazer chule Ithamar ahiuve." 
Numbers3:3 Hichehohi thempu natohna-a lhacha natoh tong dinga aman akatdoh, thempu dinga thao kinu Aaron chapate ho min chu ahi." 
Numbers3:4 Chule Nadab le Abihu chu Sinai gamthipma Pakai masanga dan ngailouva gimnamtui ahalpet lhonin, Pakai angsunga athi lhontan, chule amanin cha aneilhon pon ahi: chule Eleazer le Ithamar chun apao Aaron mitmun thempu natohna lhachana chu atong lhontan ahi." 
Numbers3:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers3:6 Levi phung chu hinpui naijin lang, amahon ama henga lhacha na atohtheina diuvin Aaron thempu masanga hinpui lutnin." 
Numbers3:7 Chule amahon houbuh lhacha natoh nadinga, houkhom ho houbuh maija chu ama le houkhom pumpiho kin aboldingu ahi." 
Numbers3:8 Chule amahon houbuh lhacha natohna dinga, houkhom ho houbuh manchah jouse achin uva, Israel chate jouse tohding kin chanchu atoh dingu ahi." 
Numbers3:9 Chule nangman Levi mite chu Aaron le achapate henga napehdoh ding ahi: amaho chu Israel chate lah-a kona apumpiuva ahenga dinga pehdoh ahiuve. 
Numbers3:10 Chule nangman Aaron le achapate chu thempu-a napan sah-a, chule amahon thempu tohmun chu angatup diu: chule hetkhahlou mi ahung naija aumle kithat ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers3:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers3:12 Chule keima, ven, keiman Israel chate lah-a naobu phukeh-a apeng masaho jouse khela Levi mitehi Israel lah-a kona kalahdoh ahitai: hijeh chun Levi mite chu keija hidingu ahi." 
Numbers3:13 Ajehchu apengmasa jouse chu keija ahi; ijeh inem itile keiman Egypt gama apengmasa jouse katha nikho-a chu, Israelte lah-a apengmasa jouse mihem hihen gancha hijongle keima-a dinga kana suhtheng ahitai: amaho keija hiding ahiuve: keima Pakai chu kahi, ati." 
Numbers3:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Sinai gamthipma chun Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers3:15 Levi chateho jouse a-inko kou-a, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjuija, pasal takip lhakhatna pat chunglamse nasim ding ahi." 
Numbers3:16 Chuin Mosi'n Pakaiyin athupeh bangin amaho chu asimtan ahi. 
Numbers3:17 Chule hicheho hi aminu dungjuija Levi chapate chu ahiuvin; Gershon, Kohath, chule Merari ahiuve." 
Numbers3:18 Chule hiche hohi a-inkou dungjuijin Gershon chapate ahiuve; Libni chule Shimei ahilhone. 
Numbers3:19 Chule a-insungu dungjuija Kohath chapate chu; Amram, Izehar, Hebron, chule Uzziel ahiuve." 
Numbers3:20 Chule a-inkou dungjuija Merari chapate chu; Mahli chule Mushi ahiuve. Apu pateu insung kailhah dungjuija hiche hohi Levi insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers3:21 Gershon'a kon hochu Libni insung mite le Shim insung mite ahiuvin; amaho hi Gershon insung miho chu ahiuve. 
Numbers3:22 Amaho-a kon kisimdoh, pasal jouse kisim dungjuija lhakhat napat achunglam akisimdoh ho chu sangsagi le janga ahi." 
Numbers3:23 Gershon insung mite chun houbuh tomlam, lhumlam sanga houbuh akisondiu ahi." 
Numbers3:24 Chule Gershon insung mite pipuding chu Lael chapa Eliasaph hiding ahi. 
Numbers3:25 Chule Gershon le achapaten houkhom ho houbuh sunga atohdiu chu houbuh, ponbuh, chule achung khuna, houkhom ho houbuh kotna khai ding ponjal," 
Numbers3:26 Chule inhong sunga kikhai pondal ho, houbuh koma umle maicham kimvella um inhong kotna ding pondal, chule akhaoho jouse le hichea pangthei jouse chu ahi." 
Numbers3:27 Chule Kohath insungmiho chu Amram insungmi, Izehar insungmi, Hebron insungmi, chule Uzziel insungmi ahiuve: hichenghi Kohath insungmi ahiuve." 
Numbers3:28 Muntheng vetup ding mi pasal lhakhat napat achunglamse akisim doh sangget le jagup ahi. 
Numbers3:29 Kohath chapateho insungmi chun houbuh pang lhanglam sanga chu pon in akisondiu ahi. 
Numbers3:30 Kohath chilhah insung mite pipupen ding chu Uzziel chapa Elizaphan hiding ahi. 
Numbers3:31 Chule amopoh diu chu Pathen thingkhong, dokhang, meivah khom, maicham ho, akin bolnadiu munthenga sumlheng ho, pondal, chule chua kin kibolding jouse chu ahi." 
Numbers3:32 Chule Aaron thempupa chapa Eleazar chu Levi ho pipuiho chunga pipui pen hiding, chule muntheng vetupma pangho vesuile hiding ahi." 
Numbers3:33 Merari'a kon hochu Mahli insungmite le Mushi insungmite ahiuvin; hichengse hi Merari insungmi ho ahiuve. 
Numbers3:34 Chule amaho-a kon kisimdoh, pasal jouse kisim dungjuija lhakhat napat achunglam akisimdoh ho chu sang gupto jani ahi." 
Numbers3:35 Merari chilhahte insung pipupen chu Abihail chapa Zuriel ahi; hicheho hin houbuh pang sahlam sanga chu pon in akison dingu ahi. 
Numbers3:36 Chule Merari chapate vetup dinga kinganse chu houbuh thingpeh ho, chua kimang banggol ho, akhomho, akhom tunnaho, sumlheng ho, chule hicheho to kisai thil jouse," 
Numbers3:37 Chule ahongsung kimvella akhomho, akhom tunnaho, akilbeh naho leh akhaojangho chu ahi." 
Numbers3:38 Ahinla solam sanga Houbuh maija, houkhom ho houbuh mai tah-a solam sanga ponbuh song ding chu Mosi le Aaron chule achapateho hiding, Israel chatehoa dinga muntheng mopohna chu atohdiu ahi; chule midang akom naija hung aumleh thajeng ding ahi." 
Numbers3:39 Pakai thupeh-a Mosi le Aaron'in asimdoh lhon Levi mite akisimdoh jouse chu, a-inko pumpiuva, pasal lhakhatna pat chunglam jouse chu sangsomni le sangni ahi." 
Numbers3:40 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Israel chate apengmasa pasal jouse lhakhat napat chunglam jouse simdoh inlang, aminhou jatchu simdoh-in." 
Numbers3:41 Chule nangman Levi mite chu keija dinga Israel chate apeng masaho jouse khella nalahding, (keima Pakai kahi); chule Israel chate gancha apengmasa jouse khela Levi mite gancha chu nalah ding ahi." 
Numbers3:42 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai thupeh bangin Israel achate lah-a apengmasa ho jouse chu asimdohtan ahi. 
Numbers3:43 Chule apengmasa pasal jouse min kisim dungjuijin lhakhatna pat achunglam jouse chu sangsomni le sangni toh jani le somsagi le thum ahi. 
Numbers3:44 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers3:45 Israel chate lah-a apengmasa jouse khelin Levi mite, aganchaho khellin Levi mite ganchaho lan; chule Levi mite chu keija hidingu ahi: Keima Pakai chu kahi." 
Numbers3:46 Chule lhatdoh-a umding Israel chate apengmasa Levi miho sanga jani le somsagi le thuma tamho chu; 
Numbers3:47 Nangman mikhat na Shekel nga cheh, munthenga shekel kila dungjuija nalahding ahin; (Shekel khat chu gerah somni ahi.)" 
Numbers3:48 Chule nangman sum chu avalho lhatdohna dinga Aaron le achapate napehding ahi, ati." 
Numbers3:49 Chuin Levi mite sanga tamjoho kilhatdohna ding sum chu Mosi'n alatan ahi. 
Numbers3:50 Munthenga shekel dungjuijin Israel chate apengmasa ho-a konin aman sum shekel sangkhat le jathum le somgup le nga alatan ahi. 
Numbers3:51 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin, Mosi'n lhatdamna sum chu Pakai thu dungjuijin Aaron le chapate apetan ahi." 
Numbers4:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga asejin, hitin ati," 
Numbers4:2 Kohath chapate mijat chu Levi chapaho lah-a kon le a-insung chule apu apateo insung dungjuijin," 
Numbers4:3 Kum somthuma lhah chunglam kum somnga gei houkhom ho houbuh sunga natohna tongdinga pangthei nalai jouse chu simdoh lhonnin. 
Numbers4:4 Hichehi houkhom ho houbuh sunga Kohath chapaten thiltheng chungnung penho chungchanga atohdiu kin chu hiding ahi: 
Numbers4:5 Houbuh chu akichondoh ding tengle, Aaron le achapate chu hunguva muntheng chungnunga kikhai pondal chu aloilhah uva, hettohsahna thingkhong chu akhukhum dingu ahi." 
Numbers4:6 Chule hichu satwilut vuna akhu khumuva, chule apumpia chu pondum khat akhukhum diu, chutengle ajolho chu athollut dingu ahi." 
Numbers4:7 Chule vetsahna changlhah dokhang chunga chu pondum khat apha uva, chule hiche achunga chu kongho, thihkheho, sum lhengho, chule asinna ding asinho akoi dingu: chule tanglouhela kikoijing changlhah chu chuche chunga umding ahi." 
Numbers4:8 Chule amahon hicheho chunga chu ponsanthip khat aphadiu, chule hichemama chu satuilut vunho-a akhukhum muva, chule ajolho chu athollut dingu ahi.." 
Numbers4:9 Chule amahon pondum khat alah uva alhacha natoh naova kimangcha meivah khom le athaomei, avutloho, akongho, chule chua um athaobelho jouse chu akhukhum diu:" 
Numbers4:10 Chule amahon hiche chu le umle belho jouse chu satuilut vunho-a akhukhum uva, ajol chunga chu akoidiu ahi." 
Numbers4:11 Chule sana maicham chung chu pondum khat na akhu khumuva, hichu satuilut vun khuna-a akhudiu, chule ajolho chu avodiu ahi." 
Numbers4:12 Chule amahon munthenga akin bolnaova kinbolna manchaho jouse chu pondum khatna akoijuva, satuilut vun khuna akhudiu, chule moljol chunga akoidiu ahi." 
Numbers4:13 Chule amahon maichama kona vut hochu alahdoh uva, chule achunga ponsandup khat apha diu:" 
Numbers4:14 Chule hiche chunga chu amahon kinbolna-a amanchah-u umle belho jouse, gimnamtui halnaho, sathuhna thihkhe kaho, vutloho, twibel ho, chule maichama um thiljouse chu satuilut vun khuna ho-a akhuva, moljol ho avodiu ahi." 
Numbers4:15 Chule houbuh chu akichondohna dinga, Aaron le achapaten muntheng le asunga um le bel jouse akhukhum jou tengule; Kohath chapate chu apudinga hungdiu: amavang amahon athilouna dinguva thiltheng tapou chu atohkhah loudiu ahi. Hichehohi houkhom ho houbuh-a Kohath chapate pohding chu ahi." 
Numbers4:16 Chule Aaron thempupa chapa Eleazar tohding chu; meija vahding thao, gimnamtui, nitin anneh thilto, nuding thao, chule houbuh pumpi leh asunga um jouse, munthenga thil umjouse le chua um le bel ho jouse vetsui ding chu ahi." 
Numbers4:17 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers4:18 Levi miho lah-a konin Kohath phung insungmite chu paidoh lhon hih-in; 
Numbers4:19 Ahinla amahon thiltheng chung nungho anaitengule thilouva ahinthei nadinguva hitia hi nabolpeh lhon ding ahi. Aaron le achapate chu lutnuntin, atohdiu kin le apohdiu cheh agotpeh diu:" 
Numbers4:20 Amavang thilthengho akikhukhum pet teng, athilouna diuva avedinga lutlou diu ahi." 
Numbers4:21 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers4:22 Gershon chapate mijat chu apu apateo insung pumpi le a-insungu dungjuijin simdoh-in; 
Numbers4:23 Lhacha kin bola lutna, houkhom ho houbuh sunga natohna tongthei jouse chu kum somthuma lhah chunglam kum somnga gei jouse chu nasimdoh ding ahi." 
Numbers4:24 Kinbol le pohgih pohna lam hi Gershon insung mite tohding kin ahi. 
Numbers4:25 Chule amahon houbuh pondal ho, houkhom ho houbuh, achung khuna, achunga um satuilut vun chung khuna, chule houkhom ho houbuh kotna kikhai pondal," 
Numbers4:26 Chule inhong sunga pondal ho, houbuh kom le maicham kimvela um inhongsung kotpi kotkhah-a pondal kikhaiho, akhaoho, chule akinbol naova manchah jouse le amaho dinga kisem jouse chu apohdiu ahi. Hitia chu amahon kin chu aboldiu ahi." 
Numbers4:27 Gershon chapate natoh jouse, apohdiu jouse le akinboldiu jouse chu Aaron le achapate thupeh-a kona aboldingu ahi: chule nangman apohdiu jouse-a dinga thuneina napehding ahi." 
Numbers4:28 Hiche hi Gershon insung chapatehon houbuh sunga atohdiu kin chu ahi. Chule amaho natoh jouse chu Aaron thempupa chapa Ithamar mopohna noija umding ahi. 
Numbers4:29 Merari chapate chu ahile, a-insung hou le apu apateo insung kailhah dungjuija nasimding;" 
Numbers4:30 Kum somthuma pat chunglam kum somnga gei, houkhom ho houbuh sunga natong dinga, kinbolna-a lutsese chu nasimding ahi." 
Numbers4:31 Chule amaho mopohna chu hichehi hiding ahi; houkhom ho houbuh sunga anatohnao dungjuija, houbuh thingpehho, chua um banggol ho, akhompiho, akhom tunnaho," 
Numbers4:32 Chule ahongsung kimvela khompiho, akhom tunnaho, akilnaho leh akhaoho, amanchahho jouse pum leh anatohna hou jouse toh pohding ahin; amin cheh uva apoh diu manchah cheh chu nagonpeh ding ahi." 
Numbers4:33 Hichehi Aaron thempu chapa Ithamar khut noija houkhom ho houbuh sunga akin jouseu dungjuija Merari chapate insung tohding kin chu ahi. 
Numbers4:34 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chule houkhom pipuihon Kohath chapate chu a-insungu dungjui le apu apateo insung kailhah dungjuijin asimtaovin," 
Numbers4:35 Kum somthuma pat chunglam kum somnga gei houkhom ho houbuh sunga natong dinga, kinbolna-a lutsese chu," 
Numbers4:36 Amaho insung kailhah cheh-a kisimdoh-a chu sangni le jasagi toh somnga ahi. 
Numbers4:37 Hiche hohi Pakaiyin Mosi khutna kona athupeh dungjuija Mosi le Aaron'in Kohath insungmi teho jouse houkhom ho houbuh sunga kin natong dinga asimdoh lhon chu ahi. 
Numbers4:38 Chule Gershon chapateho a-insung pumpiu, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjuija kisimdoh ho," 
Numbers4:39 Kum somthuma pat chunglam kum somnga gei, houkhom ho houbuh sunga natong dinga kinbolna-a lutsese chu," 
Numbers4:40 Chuti chun a-insungu pumpi le apu apateu insung kailhah-a kona kisimdoh chu sangni le jagup toh somthum ahi. 
Numbers4:41 Hichengse hi Gershon chapate insungho-a houkhom ho houbuh sunga kinbolna jouse-a natongthei cheh dinga Mosi le Aaron'in Pakai thupeh dungjuija asimdoh lhon chu ahi. 
Numbers4:42 Chule Merari chapate insung, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjuija a-insung pumpiu kisimdoh ho chu ahi." 
Numbers4:43 Kum somthuma pat chunglam kum somnga gei houkhom ho houbuh sunga natong dinga, kinbolna-a lutsese chu," 
Numbers4:44 Hitichun a-insungu dungjuija kisimdoh chengse chu sangthum le jani ahi. 
Numbers4:45 Hichengse hi Pakaiyin Mosi khutna kona athupeh dungjuija Mosi le Aaron'in Merari chapate insung anasimdoh lhon chengse chu ahi. 
Numbers4:46 Mosi, Aaron chule Israel lamkai pipuihon a-insungu dungjui, apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh-a anasimdoh hou chengse chu," 
Numbers4:47 Kum somthuma lhah chunglam kum somnga gei, kinbolna lhacha natohna le houkhom ho houbuh sunga lhacha kinbona dinga hungchan chu," 
Numbers4:48 Hitia amahoa kona kisimdoh jouse chu sang get le janga toh somget ahi. 
Numbers4:49 Pakai thupeh dungjuijin Mosi khutna konin amitakip chu atohdiu kin dungjui cheh leh apohdiu dungjui cheh-in asimdoh un, hitichun Pakaiyin Mosi anathupeh bangin amaho chu asimdoh tan ahi." 
Numbers5:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers5:2 Miphah takip, athilong takip le, thilonga suboh chan chu ponbuh polama anodoh nadiuvin Israel chate thu pen:" 
Numbers5:3 Alaitah-a ka chenna aponbuh hou asuhboh louna diuva, nangma pasal le numei agoma nanodoh-a, ponbuh polama nakoidoh ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers5:4 Chuin Israel chaten chutichun abolun, amaho chu ponbuh polama akoitaove. Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a anasei bang chun Israel chaten aboltauvin ahi." 
Numbers5:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers5:6 Israel chate jah-a seipeh in, Pasal ahiloule numei khattouvin Pakai douna-a mihemin abolji chonset itobang hijongle abol tengle, hitobang mi chu themmo changa ahin," 
Numbers5:7 Chutengle amahon achonset bolu chu aphondoh dingu, chule aman asuhkhelna chu lhingsetna aledit ding, hichea chu hopnga-a hopkhat abe-a, anasuhkhelna pa chu apehding ahi." 
Numbers5:8 Ahinla asuhkhel ditdohna ding mipa chu inko neilou ahile, asuhkhelna chu Pakai hengle thempu heng ngeija ledit hen; longlhenna kelngoichal simlouva, ama dinga longlhenna khat semding ahi." 
Numbers5:9 Chule Israel chatehon thempu henga ahinchoi ju ahintou thiltheng hou jouse chu ama-a hiding ahi. 
Numbers5:10 Chule amitakip thilto kisuthengho chu ama-a hiding; itobang hile mi khattouvin thempupa apeh tapou chu, ama-a hiding ahi." 
Numbers5:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers5:12 Israel chate jah-a seipeh in lang hitihin tin, Pasal khattou aji ajammanga, amapa douna-a suhkhel abola," 
Numbers5:13 Pasal khattou amanutoh alup khoma, hichu ajipa mitmu-a kona akisel manga, aki-imchah-a, chule amanu akisuhboh-a, amanu chunga ahetoh aumlouva, chule amanu matdoh ahilouva;" 
Numbers5:14 Chule amapa chunga thangthipna lhagao achuh-a, akisuboh-a a-inneipi chu athang thippi khah tah-a; ahiloule amapa chunga thangthipna lhagao achuh-a, ana kisubohlou a-inneipi chu athang thippi khah tah-a ahile;" 
Numbers5:15 Chuteng mipa chun a-inneipi chu thempupa henga apuiding, amanu dinga thilpeh suhlou chang anneh ephah hopsom ma hopkhat ahinchoi ding; amapan achunga thao asunlou ding, bego jong akoilou ding ahi; ajehchu hichehi thangthip thilpeh, hetjingna thilpeh le, khanset geldoh jingna thilpeh ahi." 
Numbers5:16 Chule thempupa chun amanu chu akom naija apuilutna, Pakai masanga adinsah ding:" 
Numbers5:17 Chule thempupa chun twitheng leibela ahindopma; houbuh lhonga leivui chu alah-a, twilah-a chu alhahlut ding;" 
Numbers5:18 Chule thempupa chun numeinu chu Pakai anga adinsah-a, asam alhaplhah peh-a, akhutna chu thangthipna thilpeh, hetjingna thilto chu akoi ding: chule thempupa chun akhutna sapset konsah twikha chu akidop ding ahi." 
Numbers5:19 Chutengle thempun amanu kihahsel sah-a, amanu jah-a chu, Koimachan naluppi louva, na-inneipu khela midangtoh thanhoi na-a navamang lou ahile, hiche sapset konsah twikha-a konhin ongtholin:" 
Numbers5:20 Amavang na-inneipu khela midang henga vahmanga, nakisuh boh-a, chule na inneipu tailou midang khattouvin naluppi-a ahileh:" 
Numbers5:21 Chutengle thempupa chun numeinu chu sapsetna kitepna khatna akitepsah-a, chule thempu chun numeinu jah-a, Pakaiyin napheipi amonsah-a, chule na-oipi apohsah tengle, Pakaiyin namite lah-a nangma gaosap le hahselna nachansah hen;" 
Numbers5:22 Chule hiche sapset kona twihin na-oipi pohsah ding le napheipi monsah dinga na-oipi sunga lutding ahi, atiding; chule numeinu chun Amen, Amen, atiding ahi." 
Numbers5:23 Chule thempupa chun hiche sapsetna hochu lekhabu khatna ajihlutna, chule aman hicheho chu twikha-a chu asoplhah ding ahi." 
Numbers5:24 Chule aman numeinu chu sapset konsah twikha chu adonsah ding, chule sapset konsah twi chu amanu sunga lutna hungkha ding ahi." 
Numbers5:25 Chujouteng thempu chun thangthipna thilpeh chu numeinu khutna kona alah-a, thilto chu Pakai masanga ajapma, maicham chunga ato ding ahi." 
Numbers5:26 Chule thempu chun thil kitohdoh, hetjingna ngeitah chu khutdim khat achoija, maicham chunga ahalvam ding, chujou tengle aman numeinu chu adonsah ding ahi." 
Numbers5:27 Chule aman amanu chu twi adonsah tengle hitiding ahi, hichu, amanu kisuboh ahia, a-inneipu douna-a suhkhel nei ahile, sapset konsah twi chu asunga lutna, hungkha-a, a-oipi hungpoma, chuleh apheipi hungmon lhading: chuleh numeinu chu amite lah-a sapset chang hitading ahi." 
Numbers5:28 Ahinla numeinu chu akisuhboh lou ahi-a, athensel ahivangle; amanu chu ongthola, son le pah aneiding ahi." 
Numbers5:29 Hichehi inneipi khat a-inneipu khela michom henga achea akisuboh tenga dinga thangthipna dan ahin," 
Numbers5:30 Ahiloule ama chunga thangthipna lhagao ahung uma, ajinu chunga thangthipna nei ahile, numeinu chu Pakai masanga adinsah ding, thempupa chun amanu chunga hiche dan jousehi atoh bulhit ding ahi." 
Numbers5:31 Chutengle mipa chu khangitlouna-a kona ongthola, numeinu chun ama khangitlouna chu akipoh ding ahi." 
Numbers6:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers6:2 Israel chate lah-a seipeh-in lang, ajah uva, Pasal ahiloule numei Pakaiya dinga atumbeh hiding, Nazir mikhat hina dinga kitepna-a kitep dinga akichomkhen tengule;" 
Numbers6:3 Amachu ju le khamna theija kona kikangse ding, juthuh ahiloule khamnathei juthuh adonlou ding, lengpiga ju tapou hijongle adonlou ding, chule lengpiga athah hihen alui hijongle anehlou ding ahi." 
Numbers6:4 Akichom khenna nikhoho jouse-a chu lengpiguija kona kisem, amuho-a patna ahoh changeija kisem ipi hijongle anehlou ding ahi." 
Numbers6:5 Akichom khenna akitepna nikhoho jouse-a chu aluchanga samchem chulouding ahi. Chule Pakaiya dinga akipehdohna nikhoho abulhit masangse-a ama chu atheng hiding, chule alua asamlom jong akhansah ding ahi." 
Numbers6:6 Pakaiya dinga akichom khenna nikhoho sungse-a chu aman mithilong anailou ding ahi. 
Numbers6:7 Aman apa ham, anuham, asopipa ham ahiloule asopinu ham athi tengle, amale ama kisuboh louding ahi; ajehchu a-Pathen suhthengna chu aluchanga uma ahi." 
Numbers6:8 Akichom khenna nikhoho sungse-a chu ama Pakaiya dinga atheng ahi. 
Numbers6:9 Ahin mikhattou akoma photlotna athi jeng tah-a, Pathen'a akipeh thengna aluchu abohtah-a ahile, akisuhtheng nikho nile alu ahettol ding, anisagi nile ahettol ding ahi." 
Numbers6:10 Chule aniget lhin nile aman houkhom ho houbuh kotbula thempu henga chu vakhu nou ni ahiloule vapal nou ni ahinchoi ding; 
Numbers6:11 Chule thempupa chun khatchu chonset thilto-a ato-a, chule khat chu govam thilto-a atoding, chule amadinga chu longlhena abolding ahi; ajehchu mithilong jeh-a achonsea ahin, chule hiche nima ma-a chu aman alu akisuhtheng ding ahi." 
Numbers6:12 Chule akichomkhena nikho hochu Pakai henga suhthengna dinga, kumkhat lhingsa kelngoinou chal khat suhkhel thilto-a dinga ahinkai ding ahi. Amavang akichom khenna abohtah jeh-a chu amasanga nikhoho chu moh hiding ahitai." 
Numbers6:13 Chule hichehi Nazir mikhatnin akichom khenna nikhoho alhin teng abolding dan chu ahi: amachu kimutona houkhom ho houbuh kotna chu hung kipui ding: 
Numbers6:14 Chule aman Pakai henga govam thilto-a todinga kumkhat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoinou chal khat, chonset thilto-a dinga kumkhat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoinou chal khat, chule chamna thilto-a dinga kumkhat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoinou chal khat apehding," 
Numbers6:15 Chule cholsolou changlhah pocha khat, thao toh kihal changbong neljet changlhah phengkhat, thao kinu-a pasetna kisem cholsolou changlhah khat toh, anneh thilto le donding thilto apehding ahi." 
Numbers6:16 Chule thempu pan hicheho chu Pakai masanga ahinchoi ding, chule aman chonset thilto le govam thilto chu atoding:" 
Numbers6:17 Chule aman kelngoichal chu Pakai anga chamna ganlhaina thilto-a dinga cholsolou changlhah pocha khattoh atoding: Thempu pa chun a-anneh thilto le adon thilto jong atoding ahi. 
Numbers6:18 Chule Nazir mi chun houkhom ho houbuh kotna chu akichom khenna lu chu akivoding, chule akichom khenna melchihna asam chu alah-a, hichu gan lhaina chamna thilto ho noija um meisunga aselut ding ahi." 
Numbers6:19 Chule thempu pa chun akihonminsa kelngoichal chu adah khatle pocha-a cholsolou changlhah lum khat, chule cholsolou changlhah paset khat alah-a, hicheho chu akichom khenna sam avojou tengle Nazir pa khutna apehding ahi." 
Numbers6:20 Chule thempu pa chun hicheho chu Pakai anga jap thilto-a dinga ajapding ahi: hiche hi le jap thilto-a dinga kitoh a-om le amal chu thempu-a dinga atheng ahi. Chujouteng lehin Nazir mi chun lengpitwi adonthei ding ahitai. 
Numbers6:21 Hichehi akitepma Nazir mi-a dinga dan le, akhutnin aphal dungjuija apeh ho simlouva, akichom khenna-a dinga Pakai henga athilpeh ding chu ahi: kitepna-a akitep banga chu akichom khenna dan dungjuija aboltei ding ahi." 
Numbers6:22 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers6:23 Aaron le achapate jah-a chun hin seijin, Hiche dungjuija hi Israel chate chu phatthei naboh uva, ahenguva hitia nasei dingu ahi," 
Numbers6:24 Pakaiyin nangma phatthei naboh henlang, naching jinghen," 
Numbers6:25 Pakaiyin nachunga amai vahsah henlang, nachunga lungsetna neijinghen," 
Numbers6:26 Pakaiyin nachunga amai hinlah henlang, chamna napejing hen." 
Numbers6:27 Chutia chu amahon Israel chate chunga kamin akoidiu; chule keiman amaho phatthei kabohding ahi. 
Numbers7:1 Mosi'n Houbuh lhingsetna atundoh-a, thao anua, chule asuh thenga, asunga um amanchah jouse, maicham le um le bel ho jouse toh agoma thao anua asuhtheng phatnin, ahitin ahi." 
Numbers7:2 Phungho pipui, akisimdoh saho chunga lamkai, Israel pipui ho, apu apateu insunga aluchangho chun thilpeh aneijun ahi." 
Numbers7:3 Chule amahon athilto hou; kangtalai innei gup le bongchal somleni hochu Pakai anga ahinchoijun; kangtalai khat chu pipui ni-a ding, chule bongchal khat chu mikhat cheh-a ding ahin: chule amahon hichu houbuh maija ahin choijun ahi." 
Numbers7:4 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers7:5 Hiche hohi houkhom ho houbuh kinbol na-a manchah dingin amaho-a konin lanlang, amitakip ama ama tohding kin dungjui cheh-in Levi ho chu pen, ati." 
Numbers7:6 Chuin Mosi'n kangtalai hole bongchal ho chu alan Levi ho apetan ahi. 
Numbers7:7 Kangtalai ni le bongchal li chu Gershon chapateho atohdiu kin dungjui cheh-in apen: 
Numbers7:8 Chule kangtalai li le bongchal get chu Aaron thempupa chapa Ithamar khut noija um Marari chapateho chu atohdiu kin dungjui cheh-in apen ahi. 
Numbers7:9 Ahin aman Kohath chapateho chu imacha apepon ahi; ajehchu amahon alengkou uva aput tho uchu munthenga atohdingu kin chu ahi. 
Numbers7:10 Chuin pipui hon thao kinu nikho chun maicham katdohna-a dingin thilto aneijun; hitichun pipuiho jengin jong maicham maija chun thilto aneijun ahi. 
Numbers7:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, maicham katdohna-a dinga chu pipui khat cheh-in ama ama nikho-a athilto dingu chu apeh cheh dingu ahi." 
Numbers7:12 Anikho masapen ni-a thilpeh pe-a chu Juda phunga Aminadab chapa Nahshon ahin: 
Numbers7:13 Ama thilpeh chu muntheng shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin; aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:14 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:15 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:16 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat: 
Numbers7:17 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Aminadab chapa Nahshon thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:18 Anini lhin nin Issachar pipu Zuar chapa Nathaneel chun thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:19 Aman athilto-a dingin munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat atoh-in: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:20 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:21 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:22 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat," 
Numbers7:23 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Zuar chapa Nathaneel thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:24 Anithum lhin nin Zebulun chate pipu Helon chapa Elia'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:25 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:26 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:27 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:28 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat," 
Numbers7:29 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Helon chapa Elia thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:30 Anili lhin nin Reuben chate pipui Shedeur chapa Elizur'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:31 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:32 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:33 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:34 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:35 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Shedeur chapa Elizur thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:36 Ani nga lhin nin Simeon chate pipu Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:37 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:38 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:39 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:40 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:41 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:42 Anigup lhin nin Gad chate pipu Deuel chapa Eliasaph'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:43 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:44 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:45 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:46 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:47 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Deuel chapa Eliasaph thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:48 Anisagi lhin nin Ephraim chate pipu Amihud chapa Elishama'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:49 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:50 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:51 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:52 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:53 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Amihud chapa Elishama thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:54 Niget lhin nin Manasseh chate pipu Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel'in thilto abolin ahi: 
Numbers7:55 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi:" 
Numbers7:56 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:57 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:58 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:59 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichengpi hi Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:60 Aniko lhin nin Benjamin chate pipu Gideoni chapa Abidan'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:61 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:62 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:63 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:64 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:65 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Gideoni chapa Abidan thilpeh ahi." 
Numbers7:66 Anisom lhin nin Dan chate pipu Amishaddai chapa Ahiezer'in thilto apen ahi. 
Numbers7:67 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:68 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:69 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:70 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:71 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Amishaddai chapa Ahiezer thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:72 Nisom le khat lhin nin Aser chate pipu Ocran chapa Pagiel'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:73 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:74 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:75 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:76 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:77 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hichenghi Ocran chapa Pagiel thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:78 Anisom le ni lhin nin Naphtali chate pipu Enan chapa Ahira'in thilto abolin ahi. 
Numbers7:79 Ama thilto chu munthenga shekel dungjuija shekel jakhat le somthuma gih dangka kongtong khat, shekel somsagi-a gih dangka sumlheng khat ahin: aninia chu anneh thilpeh-a ding changbong neljet thao toh kihal dimset cheh ahi." 
Numbers7:80 Gimnamtui dimset shekel soma gih sana thihkhe khat: 
Numbers7:81 Govam thilto-a ding bongchal nou khat, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou khat:" 
Numbers7:82 Chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou khat; 
Numbers7:83 Chule chamna ganlhaina thilto-a ding bongchal ni, kelngoichal nga, kelchal nga, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou nga ahi: hicheng hi Enan chapa Ahira thilto ahi." 
Numbers7:84 Hichehi Israel pipuhon thao anu nikhouva maicham kithensona chu ahi: dangka kongtong somleni, dangka sumlheng somleni toh, sana thihkhe somleni ahi." 
Numbers7:85 Dangka kongtong ho chu shekel jakhat le somthum cheh-a gih ahin, sumlheng ho chu shekel somsagi cheh-a gih ahi. Dangka um le bel jouse chu muntheng shekel dungjuia shekel sangni le jali gih ahi." 
Numbers7:86 Gimnamtui dimset sana thihkhe chu somleni ahin, munthenga shekel dungjuijin shekel som gih cheh ahi. Thihkhe-a sana ho jouse gihdan chu shekel jakhat le somni ahi." 
Numbers7:87 Govam thilto dinga bongchal jouse chu bongchal somnileli, kelngoichal somgup, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou somgup, an neh thilpeh jouse toh; chule chonset thilto-a ding kelchaho nou chu somleni ahi." 
Numbers7:88 Chule chamna ganlhai thilto-a ding bongchal jouse chu bongchal somnileli, kelngoichal somgup, kelchal somgup, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou somgup ahi. Hichehi thao akinu jouva maicham thensona chu ahi." 
Numbers7:89 Chuin Mosi Ama toh kihou dinga houkhom ho houbuh sunga alutphatnin, Cherub teni kikah-a, hettohsahna thingkhong chunga hepi touna-a kon ahenga thu kisei aw khat ajan, chuin ama koma chun thu aseitan ahi." 
Numbers8:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers8:2 Aaron jah-a thu seijin lang, Nangman meivah navah tengle, meivah sagi chun meivah khom masangtah chu asalvah ding ahi, tin seijin ati." 
Numbers8:3 Chuin Aaron'in hitichun abolin, Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun meivah ho chu meivah khom masanga avahtan ahi." 
Numbers8:4 Hiche meivah khom kisem dan chu sana kikheng ahin, akhom topala pat apah geichu akikheng ahi: Pakaiyin Mosi anavetsah dan bang bang chun, aman meivah khom chu asemin ahi." 
Numbers8:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers8:6 Israel chate lah-a konin Levi ho chu lhengdoh inlang amaho chu suthengin. 
Numbers8:7 Chule amaho suhthenga aumna diuva hitia hi nabolding ahi: achunguva suhthengna twi chu thekhumin lang, amahon atipum piuva amul jouseu chu avolhah diu, chule aponsilu akisop uva, hitia chu amaho kisuhtheng dingu ahi." 
Numbers8:8 Chutengle amaho chun bongchalgol khat le anneh thilto, thao toh kihal changbong neljet ngei chu kilah-uhen, chule nangman bongchalgol dang khat chonset thilto dinga nalah ding ahi." 
Numbers8:9 Chule nangman Levi ho chu houkhom ho houbuh maija nahinpui ding: chule Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu nakhop khom sohkei ding ahi. 
Numbers8:10 Chule nangman Levi ho chu Pakai anga nahin puija, chule Israel chaten amaho chunga chu akhut angap dingu ahi." 
Numbers8:11 Chule Pakai lhacha na atoh doh theina dinguva, Aaron'in Levi ho chu Israel chate-a kon thilto khat banga Pakai angsunga atodoh ding ahi." 
Numbers8:12 Chule Levi hon akhutnu chu bongchal teni luchunga angapdiu; chule nangman Levi ho longlhenna dinga bongchal khat chu chonset thilto-a dinga nato-a, chule khatpa chu govam thilto-a dinga nato ding ahi." 
Numbers8:13 Chule nangman Levi ho chu Aaron le achapate masanga natousah-a, amaho chu Pakai henga thilto banga natodoh ding ahi." 
Numbers8:14 Hitia chu Levi hochu Israel chate lah-a kona nakhendoh ding: chule Levi ho chu keija hiding ahiuve. 
Numbers8:15 Chujou tengle Levi ho chu houkhom ho houbuh lhacha natong dinga lutdiu: chule nangin amaho chu nasuh thenga, thilto khat banga natodoh ding ahi." 
Numbers8:16 Ajehchu amaho apumpiuva Israel chate lah-a kona keima eikipe ahitan; naobu takip phukeh ho jouse khel, apeng masa jouse khela keiman amaho keija dinga kana kilah ahitai." 
Numbers8:17 Ajehchu Israel chate lah-a kon apeng masa jouse mihem hihen lang, gancha hile keija ahi. Keiman Egypt gama apeng masa jouse kathagam nikho-a chu amahohi keija dinga kasuhtheng ahitai." 
Numbers8:18 Chule keiman Levi hohi Israel chate apeng masa ho jouse khela kalah ahi. 
Numbers8:19 Chule Israel chaten muntheng ahinnai tengule, Israel chate lah-a hise umlouna dinga; keiman Levi ho hi Israel chate lah-a kona Aaron le achapate henga houkhom ho houbuh-a Israel chate lhacha natong ding le Israel chate-a dinga longlhenna boldinga thilpeh banga kapeh ahitai." 
Numbers8:20 Mosi le Aaron chule Israel chate houkhom ho jouse chun Levi mite chungchanga Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh jouse bangin Levi ho chunga chun abolun, Israel chate chun amaho chunga chutichun abol taovin ahi." 
Numbers8:21 Chuin Levi miho akisuthengun, avonhou akisop thengun; Aaron'in amaho chu Pakai angsunga thilto bangin atoh doh-in; chule Aaron'in amaho suhtheng nadingin longlhenna abolpeh tan ahi." 
Numbers8:22 Chuin hiche jou chun Levi miho chu houkhom ho houbuh sunga Aaron le achapate masanga lhacha natong dingin alut taovin ahi: Pakaiyin Levi ho chung changa Mosi athupeh bangin, amahon hitichun achunguva abol taovin ahi." 
Numbers8:23 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers8:24 Hiche hi Levi mite thudol ahi: kum somni le nga-a lhah chunglamse houkhom ho houbuh-a sunga lhacha natong dinga lutdiu ahi. 
Numbers8:25 Chule kumsom nga alhin tengule lhacha natohna-a kona kicholdodiu, atohbe loudiu ahitai." 
Numbers8:26 Hijongle houkhom ho houbuh-a chu asopi hotoh ngaichat ahinaova lhachana atoh khomdiu, amavang lhacha kin abol loudiu ahi. Hitia chu Levi miho chu atohdiu nagonpeh ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers9:1 Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh nungu kumni lhinna, lha masapen-in Pakaiyin Sinai gamthipma Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers9:2 Israel chaten akitep phat dungjuijin kalchuh kut mang jingu hen. 
Numbers9:3 Hiche lha nisom le nili ni, nilhah lam, akitep phat tah-a hi naman dingu; chondan kisun jouse le akibolding dan jouse dunjuija naman dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers9:4 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate chu kalchuh kut aman nadingun aseipeh tan ahi. 
Numbers9:5 Chuin amahon lhamasa nisom le nili ni nilhah-in Sinai gamthipma chun kalchuh kut chu amangun, Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh jouse dungjuijin, Israel ten hitichun abol taovin ahi." 
Numbers9:6 Chule mi phabep mithilong jeh-a kisuboh aumun, hicheni chun kalchuhkut anitthei tapouvin ahi. Chuin amaho hicheni chun Mosi le Aaron masanga ahungun;" 
Numbers9:7 Chule hiche miho chun ajah-a, Mithilong jeh-a suhboh-a um kahiuvin; ibola Israel chate lah-a akitep phat sunga Pakaiya thilpeh kapediu kijahda ham? atiuve." 
Numbers9:8 Chuin Mosi'n ajah uva, Khongaita diuvin, keiman nangho chung changa Pakaiyin thupeh aneijam ngaijing kate, ati." 
Numbers9:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers9:10 Israel chate jah-a seipeh inlang, hitin seijin, Nalah uva ahiloule nachilhah hou lah-a mikhattou thilong khat jeh-a athenlouva, ahiloule kholgamla tah-a um hijongle, amachun Pakaiya kalchuhkut aman thouthou ding ahi." 
Numbers9:11 Lhani lhinna nisom le nili nilhah lamle aman dingu, cholsolou changlhah le anche kha toh amediu ahi." 
Numbers9:12 Amahon hichu khatcha jong jingkah geija akhenlou diu, agujong khatcha asuhboh loudiu: kalchuhkut kiman dingdan jouse dungjuija aman diu ahi." 
Numbers9:13 Ahin mikhat chu atheng ahia, chule kholgama che jong ahilouva, ahia kalchuhkut mangding anoplouva ahile: amatah chu amite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ahi; ajeh chu aman akitep phat sungin Pakaiya dingin thilpeh ahinchoipon, hichepa chun achonset akipoh ding ahi." 
Numbers9:14 Chule nalah uva namdang mi ahung kholjin auma, ama chun Pakaiya kalchuhkut manding anople, kalchuhkut kiman dingdan dungjuija le chonna ngai dungjuija amanding ahi: nanghon namdang mi ding le agama peng denpa-a dinga dan khatseh naneidiu ahi." 
Numbers9:15 Chuin houbuh kitundoh ni chun ponbuh, hettohsahna ponbuh chu meilom'in atomin ahi. Chule nilhah lamin houbuh chung chu meikong bangin, jingkah geijin aumin ahi." 
Numbers9:16 Chutobang chun aumjing jengin ahi: sunle meilom'in atomin chule jan le meikongin akilangjin ahi. 
Numbers9:17 Chule meilom chu houbuh akona lahtouva aum tengle, Israel chate chu akitol jiuvin, chutengle meilom kingahna mun'a chun Israel chaten ponbuh akison jiuvin ahi." 
Numbers9:18 Pakai thupeh dungjuijin Israel chate akitol jiuvin, chule Pakai thupeh dungjuijin gehbuh akison jiuvin; meilom chu houbuh chunga aum laisen apon in houva akicholnga jiuvin ahi." 
Numbers9:19 Chule houbuh chunga meilom chu nitampi aumteng le, Israel chaten Pakai thupeh anitnun, akitoldohji pouvin ahi." 
Numbers9:20 Meilom chu houbuh chunga chu ni lhomcha aum kom jongle chutobang chun abolun ahi; Pakai thupeh dungjuijin amaho aponbuh uva aumun, chule Pakai thupeh dungjuijin akitol jiuvin ahi." 
Numbers9:21 Hitichu ahin, meilom chu nilhah-a pat jingkah gei auma, hiche meilom chu jingkah-a akilah-a ahile amaho akitol jiuvin ahi. Sun hihen jan hijong le meilom chu akilahdoh tihtih le amaho akitol jiuvin ahi." 
Numbers9:22 Ahiloule nini hihen, lhakhat hihen, ahiloule kumkhat hijongle, meilom chu houbuh chunga auma, aumdena ahile, Israel chate chu aponbuh houva aumun, akitol ji pouve: ahin hichu akilah doh tengle, akitol jiuvin ahi." 
Numbers9:23 Pakai thupeh dungjuijin amaho ponbuh-a akicholdo jiuvin, Pakai thupeh dungjuijin akitol jiuvin ahi; Pakaiyin Mosi khutna athupeh dungjuijun, amahon Pakai thu chu anitjiuvin ahi." 
Numbers10:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers10:2 Mipi ho koukhom nading le ngahmun ho kitoldoh na-a naman theina dingin dangka sumkon ni semin, hichu sehcha-a nakhetna nasem ding ahi." 
Numbers10:3 Hichu ania amahon amut tengule mipi ho jouse chu nahenga houkhom ho houbuh kotna chu hung kikhom diu ahi. 
Numbers10:4 Chule amahon sumkon khatbou amutnuva ahile, Israel asang asang luchang ho, pipuiho chu nakoma hung kikhom diu ahi." 
Numbers10:5 Nanghon kigina khatvei namut tengule, solam sanga um gebuh hochu kitolmasa diu ahi." 
Numbers10:6 Nanghon kigina aniveina namut tengule, lhanglam sanga gebuhho kitoldiu ahi; amahon akitol nadiuva kigina amutdiu ahi." 
Numbers10:7 Ahinla houkhom ho chu akikhop khom ding tengule nanghon namut diu, amavang kigina namut banguva naginsah lou dingu ahi." 
Numbers10:8 Chule Aaron thempu chapate chun sumkon chu amut dingu; chule nakhang lhumkei uva a-itih-a dinga chonna dan hiding ahi. 
Numbers10:9 Chule nagamsunguva nasugenthei uva namelma teu satdinga nacheuva ahile, nanghon sumkona chu kigina namut diu; chutile Pakai Pathen angsunga goldoh-a naum diu, chule namelma teova kona huhdohna-a naum diu ahi." 
Numbers10:10 Chujongle nakipa nikhou le, naniloupi nikho hou, chule lha kipatseh le napumgo thiltou le nachamna thiltou ganlhaina chunga chu, hicheho chu nangho dinga Pathen angsunga geldoh ahitheina dinga sumkon ho namut dingu ahi. Keima na Pakai Pathen'u kahi." 
Numbers10:11 Chuin akum nina, alhani lhina, nisomni channi chun ahitin ahi, meilom chu hettohsahna houbuh-a konin akiladoh tan ahi." 
Numbers10:12 Chuin Sinai gamthipma konin Israel chate akitolun; Paran gamthipma chun meilom chu akingatan ahi. 
Numbers10:13 Chuin Mosi khutna Pakai thupeh dungjuijin amahon akholjinu masapen chu apan taovin ahi. 
Numbers10:14 Amasa penin agalsat miteo dungjuijin Judah chate houbuh ponlap chu achen; chule janel ho chunga lamkaija chu Amminadab chapa Nashon ahi. 
Numbers10:15 Issachar chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai chu Zuar chapa Nathaneel ahi. 
Numbers10:16 Chule Zebulun chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai chu Helon chapa Eliab ahi. 
Numbers10:17 Chuin houbuh chu aphelhauvin; Gershon chapate le Merari chapaten houbuh chu apouvin malam ajon taovin ahi. 
Numbers10:18 Chuin agalsat miteu dungjuijin Reuben ponbuh ponlap chu akitolin, chule Shedeur chapa Elizur chu janel chunga lamkai ahi." 
Numbers10:19 Simeon chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai chu Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel ahi. 
Numbers10:20 Chule Gad chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai chu Deuel chapa Eliasaph ahi. 
Numbers10:21 Chuin Kohath miho chun muntheng chu apouvin akitolun ahi. Chule adangho chun amaho hunglhun masangin houbuh chu anatung doh masaovin ahi. 
Numbers10:22 Chuin agalsat miteu dungjuijin Ephraim chate ponbuh ponlap chu akitolin; chule Ammihud chapa Elishama chu ajanel hou chunga lamkai ahi. 
Numbers10:23 Chule Manasseh chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai chu Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel ahi. 
Numbers10:24 Chule Benjamin chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai chu Gideoni chapa Abidan ahi. 
Numbers10:25 Chuin Dan chate gebuh ponlap chu akitolin, hichu ami janel hou sunga gebuh nunungpen ahin ahi: chule Amishaddai chapa Ahiezer chu janel chunga lamkai ahi." 
Numbers10:26 Chule Asher chate phunga janel ho chunga lamkai Ocran chapa Pagiel ahi. 
Numbers10:27 Chule Naphtali chate phunga janel chunga lamkai chu Enan chapa Ahira ahi. 
Numbers10:28 Hiche hi akitol laijuva agalsat miteu dungjuija Israel chate kitoldan ahi. 
Numbers10:29 Chuin Mosi'n anupapa, Midian mi Raguel chapa Hobab jah-a, Pakaiyin nangho kapeh ding nahiuve tia aseina mun jona che kahiuve; hungin kilhonnute, keihon na bolpha naovinge, ajeh chu Pakaiyin Israelte thudola thilpha aseije, ati." 
Numbers10:30 Chuin aman ajah-a, Kahung louding ahi; ahin keima kagam le ka-inkote koma kache johding ahi, ati." 
Numbers10:31 Chuin aman, Katao ahi, neidalha hih-un; ajehchu nangman keihon gamthipma gebuh iti kason diu nahen, nangma keiho mitna napan ding ahi." 
Numbers10:32 Chule hitiding ahi, nangma keihotoh nalhon khomma ahile, henge, hitiding ahi, Pakaiyin keiho chunga phatna abolding chanchu keihon jong nangma chunga kaboldiu ahi, ati." 
Numbers10:33 Chuin amaho Pakai molsanga kon chun nithum lampia chun akipat doh-un: chule Pakai kitepna thingkhong chu nithum lampia chun amaho kingahna ding mun hol dingin amasanguva achen ahi. 
Numbers10:34 Chule amaho ngahmuna kona achedoh tengule Pakai meilom chu sun le achunguva aumjin ahi. 
Numbers10:35 Chule ahitin ahi, thingkhong chu akitol tengle Mosi'n, Pakai, kipatdoh-in, chule namelmaho chu kithecheh-u henlang; nangma nahotbolte chu na angsung jamuhen, atijin ahi." 
Numbers10:36 Chule hichu akingah tengle, aman, O Pakai, Israel sangtamtah henga hung kile kitnin atijin, ahi." 
Numbers11:1 Chuin mipi chu aphun phatnun, Pakai alunglhai tapon: chule hichu Pakaiyin ajan, alung akoujah jengtai; chuin Pakai lunghanna chu amaho lah-a akoudoh tan, gebuh pammong penna umho chu aka mangtan ahi." 
Numbers11:2 Chuin mipi chu Mosi hengah apengjah taovin ahile, Mosi Pakai henga ataovin, hichun meichu amit tai." 
Numbers11:3 Mipi lah uva chu Pakai meija ahung kou jehchun, aman hiche munchu Taberah asahtai." 
Numbers11:4 Chuin choplop mihonpi lah-a chun sa ducha-a aumtan; chule Israel chate jong chu akapkit taovin; Kon eiho nehding sa eipeh dingu ham? 
Numbers11:5 Egypt gama manbeija ineh-u nga ho, changmai ho, donkho ho, louthul ho, louthul tilnei ho, louthul chang neiho chu igel doh-un ahi." 
Numbers11:6 Ahinla tun ihinnao agolhatan; chule imitmu uva manna tilou imacha aumpon ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers11:7 Chule manna chu pathikhomu toh abangin, chule avoupoh chu thingnaidol toh abangin ahi." 
Numbers11:8 Chule miho chu cheova, alokhomuva, sumheija agoibongu, ahiloule songlhenga avoh bonguva, khangbela akanuva, chutengle hiche-a chu changlhah asemjiu ahi: hichu atuidan thaothah kikang changlhah toh abangin ahi." 
Numbers11:9 Chule jana gebuh chunga daitwi ahunglhah tengle, manna chu alhahtha jin ahi." 
Numbers11:10 Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho jouse a-inko ko-a, ami takip ponbuh kotna akau ajatan; Pakai lunghanna chu nasatah-in ahung kong dohtan, Mosi jong chu alung nommo lheh tan ahi." 
Numbers11:11 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga, Ipi dinga nasoh hi nagimbol ham? Ipi jeh-a kachunga mipi jouse pohgih hi nangapma, nangma mitmu-a nalungsetna kachan leltam?" 
Numbers11:12 Keiman hiche miho jouse hi kanavop ham? Keima hinbeh hiuva Nangma kahenga, Mipan naosen noichep lai apom bangin nangman amahohi na-angsunga pomin lang, apu apateu kateppeh gamma puilutnin neitiham?" 
Numbers11:13 Keiman mipi jouse pehdinga sa hoija kalah ding ham? Ajehchu amaho kahenga akapmun, Kaneh diuvin sa neipeuvin, atiuve." 
Numbers11:14 Mipi hijatpi hi kachang seh-in pojou ponge, ajehchu keidingin agihsa behseh-e." 
Numbers11:15 Hitia hi neibolding ahile, katao ahi, namit mu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, hilai munahin tule tun neithat jengin; kamanthahna muda jenginge, ati." 
Numbers11:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Nangman mipi ho chunga lamkai le upa ahi tia nahet Israel upaho mi somsagi kahenga hinkhomin; chule amaho chun nangma to adinkhom theina diuvin houkhom ho houbuh-a hinpuijin." 
Numbers11:17 Chule keima kahung kumlhah-a hikoma chu nangma kakihoupi ding: chule nachunga um lhagao chu kalah-a amaho chunga kakoiding; chule nangman mipi ho pohgih chu nachang seh-a napoh louna dinga amahon napoh hu dingu ahi. 
Numbers11:18 Chule nangman mipi ho jah-a, Jing nikho-a dingin nangma cheh kisutheng uvin, nanghon sa naneh dingu ahitai. Ajehchu nangho Pakai nakhanga nakapmun, kon keiho nehding sa eipeh diu ham? Egypt gama kaumu chun nom kasajouve, nati uve: hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin nangho sa napeh uva naneh diu ahitai." 
Numbers11:19 Nanghon nikhat jong hilou, nini jong hilou, ninga jong hilou, nisom jong hilou, chule nisomni hilou;" 
Numbers11:20 Ahinla lha lungkeija nanah hom sunguva ahungdoh-a, naloh-u asotokah seuva ding ahi. Ajeh chu nanghon nalah uva um Pakai chu nanotthap uvin, a-angsunga nakamun, Ipidinga Egypt gama kona ihung doh uham? nati uve, tin seipeh-in, ati." 
Numbers11:21 Chuin Mosi'n, Alah uva kaumna mipi, kenga lamjotthei cheh sangjagup hiuva; nangman, Amahon lhakhat lhungkeija aneh diuva sa kapeh ding ahi, tin naseije." 
Numbers11:22 Anehkhop nadiuva kelngoihon le gancha honho chu kithapeh ding hiuvem? ahiloule anehkhop nadiuva twikhanglen'a nga jouse kimatkhom peh ding hiuvem? ati. 
Numbers11:23 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Pakai khut chu kisuchoma hitam? tu-a hi nangman kathusei nachunga aguilhun aguilhun lou namu ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers11:24 Chuin Mosi apotdoh-in, mipi ho chu Pakai thu chu aseipeh-in, chule mipi lah-a upa somsagi ho chu akhomin, houbuh kimvella chun adinsah tai." 
Numbers11:25 Chuin Pakai meilom'in ahung kumlhan, ajah-a thu aseijin, chule achunga um lhagao chu aladoh-in, upa somsagi ho apetan ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi, lhagao achunguva achuh phatnin, gaothu aseijun, atang tapouvin ahi." 
Numbers11:26 Ahin mi ni chu gebuh-a umden ahin, khatpa minchu Eldan ahin, khat chu Medad ahi: chuin Lhagao chu achung lhona achun; amanihi amin kilakhom lah-a chu jao ahilhonin, houbuh-a potdoh lou ahilhone. Chuin amanin gebuh sunga gaothu aseilhon tan ahi." 
Numbers11:27 Chuin gollhang khat ahunglhaijin, Mosi jah-a, Eldad le Medad-in gebuh sunga gaothu aseilhone, ahungtin ahi." 
Numbers11:28 Chuin agollhangho lah-a khat, Mosi lhacha Nun chapa Joshua'n adonbutnin, kapu Mosi, amani khu phohthipmin, ati." 
Numbers11:28 Chuin agollhangho lah-a khat, Mosi lhacha Nun chapa Joshua'n adonbutnin, kapu Mosi, amani khu phohthipmin, ati." 
Numbers11:29 Chuin Mosi'n ajah-a, Keima jala namit thip ham? Pakai mite jouse themgao hiuhenlang, Pakaiyin achunguva alhagao koi tavele kati, ati." 
Numbers11:30 Chuin Mosi le Israel upa hochu gebuh sunga aluttaovin ahi. 
Numbers11:31 Chuin Pakaiya konin hui ahung nungin, twikhanglen'a konin vamim ahinlhoh-in, gebuh kom, hilama kona nikhat lampi, khulama kona nikhat lampi tobang gei, gebuh kimvela, chule hichu leiset chunga kon tongni geija sangin alhahsah-in ahi." 
Numbers11:32 Chuin mipi ho chu adingdoh-un, nilhum keile jan khovah-in, chule ajing nilhum keijin, vamim hochu aloh-un: alohlhom pen pan pocha som alohdoh-in; chule hicheho chu ama ama ding cheh-in gebuh kimvela chun thejaovun ahi." 
Numbers11:33 Chuin ahakah uva sa chu aumnalaija, alhaigoi masangun, Pakai lunghanna chu mipi dounan ahung kongdoh tan, Pakaiyin mipi chunga chun hise nasatah achuhsah tan ahi." 
Numbers11:34 Chule hiche mun'a chu sa-a lop miho avuitah jeh-un, hiche mun chu Kibroth-hatta-avah asahtai." 
Numbers11:35 Chuin mipi chu Kibroth-hatta-avah'a konin Hazeroth jonin akitolun, Hazeroth'a gebuh asemtaovin ahi." 
Numbers12:1 Chuin Mosi'n Ethiopia numei khat akichenpi jeh-in Miriam le Aaron'in ama douna thu aseilhontan ahi: ajehchu aman Ethiopia numei khat ana kichenpin ahi. 
Numbers12:2 Chuin amanin, Tahbeh monga Pakaiyin Mosi'a kona bou thu aseiham? eini-a kona jong asei hilouham? atilhone. Chule hichu Pakaiyin ajatan ahi." 
Numbers12:3 (Tuhin Mosi kiti mipahi leiset chunga mijouse lah-a alungneng pen ahi). 
Numbers12:4 Chuin phulou helouvin Pakaiyin Mosi, Aaron, chule Miriam henga thu ahin seijin, Nangho thum houkhom ho houbuh lama hungun, ati. Chuin amaho ahung taovin ahi." 
Numbers12:5 Chuin Pakai chu meilhang khompin ahung kumlhan, houbuh kotna chun adingin, Aaron le Miriam chu ahin kouvin: chuin amani ahung potdoh lhonin ahi." 
Numbers12:6 Chuin aman, Tun kathu ngailhonin: nalah uva themgao auma ahile, keima Pakaiyin amachu gaova kakihetsah-a, chule manga akoma thu kasei ahi." 
Numbers12:7 Ka-insung pumpi-a tahsan umtah, kalhacha Mosi chunga vang chutobang ahipoi." 
Numbers12:8 Ama hitoh kikam sanna, kicheh tah-a, thu ki-im beija kakihoupiji ahi; chule aman Pakai melso jong amu ahi; chuti ahile ibola kalhacha Mosi douna-a thusei ding kichalou nahi lhonham? ati." 
Numbers12:9 Chuin Pakai lunghanna chu amani dounan ahung koudoh-in; chuin adalhatan ahi. 
Numbers12:10 Chuin meilhang chu houbuh-a konin akihohdoh tan; veuvin, Miriam chu ahung phah-in, buhbang bangin abangtan: chuin Aaron'in Miriam chu aven, chuin veuvin, amanu aphah ahitai." 
Numbers12:11 Chuin Aaron'in Mosi jah-a, Ohe, ka Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, ngolhoi tah-a kanachon lhona, kaboldoh lhon chonsetna, hiche chonsetna hi kachung lhona ngam loujenin." 
Numbers12:12 Mi anu sunga atipum akehkhat beisa-a hungpenga bangin, amanu hi athisa bangin umsah hih-in, ati." 
Numbers12:13 Chuin Mosi Pakai henga ataovin, Vo Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, amanu hi tun damsah-in, ati." 
Numbers12:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Amanuhi apan amaichanga achil asetkhuma ahile amanu nisagi sung jahchalou ding ham? gebuh-a konin nisagi kaidoh-unlang, hiche jou chule puilut hikit hen, ati." 
Numbers12:15 Chuin Miriam chu nisagi gebuh pama akoijun; Miriam ahung kipui lut kit kahsen mipi chu akitol tapouve. 
Numbers12:16 Hichejou mipi chu Hazeroth'a konin akichonun, Paran gamthipma chun ponbuh asong taove." 
Numbers13:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers13:2 Israel chate kanapeh, Canaan gam kholtoh dingin, apu apateu kailhah cheh-a mi khatcheh, alah uva vaipo khatcheh chu solin, ati." 
Numbers13:3 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai thupeh bang chun amaho chu Paran gamthipma konin asoltai. Hiche miho chu Israel chate aluchang ho ahiuvin ahi. 
Numbers13:4 Chule hichengsehi amaho min ahi: Reuben phunga Zaccur chapa Shammua. 
Numbers13:5 Simeon phunga, Hori chapa Shaphat." 
Numbers13:6 Judah phunga Jephunneh chapa Caleb. 
Numbers13:7 Issachar phunga, Joseph chapa Igal." 
Numbers13:8 Ephraim phunga, Nun chapa Oshea." 
Numbers13:9 Benjamin phunga, Raphu chapa Palti." 
Numbers13:10 Zebulun phunga, Sodi chapa Gaddiel." 
Numbers13:11 Joseph phunga, tichu Manesseh phunga Susi chapa Gaddi." 
Numbers13:12 Dan phunga, Gemalli chapa Ammiel." 
Numbers13:13 Asher phunga, Michael chapa Sethur." 
Numbers13:14 Naphtali phunga, Vophsi chapa Nahbi." 
Numbers13:15 Gad phunga, Michi chapa Geuel ahi." 
Numbers13:16 Hiche hohi Mosi'n gam velhi dinga asol miho min chu ahi. Chuin Mosi'n Nun chapa Oshea chu Jehoshua tin asah-in ahi. 
Numbers13:17 Chuin Mosi'n amaho chu Canaan gam velhi dingin asolin, ahenguva hitin aseije, Lhanglam sanga kon khun chetouvun lang, molchunga khun kaldoh-un;" 
Numbers13:18 Chule gavechenun agam chu itobang ham, chule asunga chengho chu hatnaovem ahiloule hatmovem, lhomuvem ahiloule tamuvem;" 
Numbers13:19 Chule achennao gamchu itobang ham, pha-am ahiloule se-ham, achennao khopiho-a chu itobang khopi ho-a chenguva, pon in'a cheng hiuvem ahiloule kulpi-a cheng hiuvem;" 
Numbers13:20 Chule agam chu itobang gam ham, leipha ham ahiloule leiphalou ham, hichea chu thing umam ahiloule umhih-am gaveovin. Nangho hangsanun lang agamga hinpouvin. Hichelai phat tah chu lengpithei ga masapen minphat tah ahi." 
Numbers13:21 Chutichun amaho achetouvun, agam chu Zin gamthipma pat Hamath lutna Rehob geijin akhol taovin." 
Numbers13:22 Chuin amaho lhanglama konin achetouvun, Anak chate ho Ahinam, Sheshai, chule Talmai umna mun Hebron ahung lhungun ahi. (Tun Hebron chu Egypt gama Zoan kisahdoh ma kum sagi masanga kisadoh ahitai.)" 
Numbers13:23 Chuin amaho Eshcol vachadung ahung lhungun, hichea konchun amahon lengpi theiboh khat aboh pumin asat lhaovin, minin moljolin ahinjong lhonin; chule kolbuthei ho le thei changho ahin pouvin ahi." 
Numbers13:24 Hiche munna kona chu Israel chaten lengpiga boh asatlhah jeh-un, hiche mun chu Eshcol vachadung akisahtan ahi." 
Numbers13:25 Chuin amahon gam chu agakhol toh-u nisomli jouvin ahung kilekit taovin ahi. 
Numbers13:26 Chuin amaho acheuvin Mosi le Aaron henga, chule Kadesh mun'a um Paran gamthipma Israel chate houkhom ho jouse henga ahungun; chule amaho hengle houkhom ho jouse henga thu ahin pouvin, agamga jong chu amaho avetsah-un ahi." 
Numbers13:27 Chule amahon ama henga, Keiho nangman neisolnao gama chu kacheuvin, tahbeh mongin agam chu khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam ahi; chule hiche hi agamga chu ahi." 
Numbers13:28 Ahijeng vangin agama chengho chu mihat ahiuvin, akhopihou chu kulpi kikai khum ahin, chule aletna lenthei ahi; chukalvalin keihon chukoma chun Anak chateho kamuvin ahi." 
Numbers13:29 Amalek miho chu lhanglama achengun; Hit miho, Jebus miho, chule Amor miho chu molsang ho-a achengun; chule Canaan miho chu twikhanglen pang le Jordan panga achengun ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers13:30 Chuin Caleb min mipi ho chu Mosi angsunga chun aphoh thipmin, Eiho mangang tah-in cheu hitin, galo jengu hite; ajehchu eihon ijo teitei dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers13:31 Ahivangin ama chekhom piho chun, Eiho amaho igajo lou dingu ahi; ajehchu amaho eiho sanga hatjo ahiuve, atiuve." 
Numbers13:32 Amaho chun agakhol tohnao gamchung chang thudola chun Israel chate henga thulhut phalou ahin pouvin, Keiho kacheuva kaga kholtoh nao gam chu agama chengho negamhel thei gam ahin; chule chua kaga mu-u mijouse chu milen ngen ahiuve." 
Numbers13:33 Chule keihon chumuna chun milen tahtah ho, Anak chapate, milen tahtah ho chilhah-a kon hungpengho chu kagamuve: chule keiho mitmun keihochu khaokhopi bangbep kahiuvin, amaho mitmu-a jong chutobangma chu kahiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Numbers14:1 Chuin houkhom ho jouse chun aw sangtah-in asamun, apengun; hiche janchun mipi chu akaptaovin," 
Numbers14:2 Chuin Israel chate jouse chu Mosi le Aaron chunga aphun taovin: houkhom pumpi chun ajah lhona, Pathen'in Egypt gama eina thisah-u hitavele! Ahiloule Pathen'in hiche gamthipma hi eina thisah-u hitavele!" 
Numbers14:3 Chule ipi dinga Pakaiyin hiche gamahi chemjam'a lougam ding le, kaji kachateu hi gal anchah hiding bepma eipuilutnu hitam? eiho dinga Egypt gama kilekit phajo louding ham? atiuve." 
Numbers14:4 Chuin amaho khatle khat akihouvun, Eihon lamkai khat kilhenu hitin, Egypt gam lama kilekit tao hite, atiuve." 
Numbers14:5 Hichun Mosi le Aaron chu Israel chate houkhom kikhomho jouse angsunga chun abohkhup lhontan ahi. 
Numbers14:6 Chuin gam kholtoh-a cheloi lah-a pang Nun chapa Joshua le Jephunneh chapa Caleb chun aponsil lhon abot-eh lhonin: 
Numbers14:6 Chuin gam kholtoh-a cheloi lah-a pang Nun chapa Joshua le Jephunneh chapa Caleb chun aponsil lhon abot-eh lhonin: 
Numbers14:7 Israel chate houkhom ho jouse henga chun, Kholtoh dinga kachot lenao gamchu gampha tah mongmong ahi." 
Numbers14:8 Pakai ichunguva alunglhaina ahile hiche gama chu eipuilut nuva, khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam chu eipeh diu ahi." 
Numbers14:9 Pakai dounan kiphinda poupou vunlang, chuche gam mite jong kicha hih-un; ajehchu amaho i-anchah dingu ahiuve: akihon bitnao chu amaho-a kona chedoh ahitan, chule eihovang Pakaiyin eiumpiuve: amaho chu kicha hih-un, tin aseilhonin ahi." 
Numbers14:10 Ahinla houkhom ho jouse chun songa sedingin agaotaovin ahi. Chuin Pakai loupina Israel chate jouse angsung, houkhom ho houbuh-a chun ahung kilahtan ahi." 
Numbers14:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Itihchan hiche mipi ho hin eilung hansah diuham? Chule alah uva melchihna hijatpi kamusah nunguva jong, itihchan eitahsan da diuham?" 
Numbers14:12 Keiman amaho chu natsetna kajepma, kasuhmang ding; chule keiman nangma amaho sanga lenjole hatjo nam khatna kasemding nahi ati." 
Numbers14:13 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga, Chuteng Egypt mihon hichehi ajah diu, (ajehchu nangman hiche mihohi nathahatna amaho lah-a kona nahinpuidoh ahi;)" 
Numbers14:14 Chule amahon hiche gama cheng miho henga aseidiu ahi. Ajeh chu amahon, Pakai nangma hiche miho lah-a naum, Pakai nangma chu kimaito-a akimupiu, nameiloma achungu na-opkhum, chule amasanguva sunle meiloma nache-a, janle meikonga nacheji chu ajataovin ahi." 
Numbers14:15 Tun nangman hiche mite jousehi mikhat bangin that talechun, nangma minthan ja-a namho chun," 
Numbers14:16 Pakaiyin hiche mihohi ahahselna gama apuilut jou tahlou jeh-a, gamthipma athagam ahi atudiu ahi." 
Numbers14:17 Chule tun, nahenga katao ahi, ka Pakai thilboltheina chu loupi hen, nangman hitia nasei bangin," 
Numbers14:18 Pakai chu thoh hattah, hepina lentah nei, khangitlouna le suhkhelna ngaidam ji, chule themona chu donlouva koilou, pate khangitlouna chate chunga khangthum khangli geija viljing nahi." 
Numbers14:19 Katao ahi, hiche mipi ho Egypt'a pat tuni geija nangaidam bangin, nahepina lentah dungjuijin hiche mipite khangitlouna hi ngaidamtan, ati." 
Numbers14:20 Chuin Pakaiyin, nangma thu dungjuijin amaho hi kangaidam tai;" 
Numbers14:21 Ahinla keima tahbeh-a kahinjing bangin, leiset pumpihi Pakai loupina-a dimset ding ahi." 
Numbers14:22 Ajehchu hiche mite Egypt gam le gamthip laija kaloupina le kathilbol kidang bolho mujouse, chule tu-a som veijen eipatepma, ka aw ngailou jouse hin;" 
Numbers14:23 Thonlou hela amahon apu apateo kahahselna gam chu amu louhel diu, chule eilung hansah jousen jong amulou diu ahi:" 
Numbers14:24 Kalhacha Caleb vangin lunggel chom neija, eijui lhingset jeh-a, agachena gama chu kapuilutding, chule achilhah ten alodiu ahi." 
Numbers14:25 (Tun Amalek miho le Canaan miho chu phaichama chun achengun ahi.) Jingle kiheijun lang, twipisan jotna lampia konin gamthipma lut taovin, ati." 
Numbers14:26 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers14:27 Hiche houkhom gilouho keima douna aphun phun uhi itihchan kathoh ding ham? keima chunga Israel chate phunna hohi kajatan ahi. 
Numbers14:28 Amaho chu seipeh-in, keima tahbeh-a kahinjing bangin tin Pakaiyin aseije, Nanghon kana benga nasei jouseu banga hi, nachung uva keiman kabolding ahi." 
Numbers14:29 Nalongu hiche gamthipma hi lhukam ding ahi: keima douna phunna, kum somni-a lhah chunglam, nami jatnu dungjuija nalah uva kona kisim doh jouse chu," 
Numbers14:30 Jephunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tailou, nangho chensahna dinga kahahselna gama chu khatcha nalutlou dingu ahi." 
Numbers14:30 Jephunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tailou, nangho chensahna dinga kahahselna gama chu khatcha nalutlou dingu ahi." 
Numbers14:31 Ahinla mi anchah ding bep natiu nachasen hou, amaho chu kapuilutna, nanghon nanot thapmu gam chu ahetdiu ahi." 
Numbers14:32 Nangho thudol vang, nalongu hiche gamthipma hi lhuchap ding ahi." 
Numbers14:33 Chule nachateo chu gamthipma kum somli vahle leova, nalongu gamthipma hi abeihel kahse-a najon thanhoi naochu athoh diu ahi." 
Numbers14:34 Gam nagakhol nao nikhojat dungjuija, nisomli ngeichu, nikho khat nakhangitlou naochu kumkhat nakipoh diu, kum somli sunga, chutengle keima hi aki pampai teng iti ji-am nahetdiu ahi." 
Numbers14:35 Pakai Keima kaseidoh ahin, douna-a kikhom khom hiche houkhom gilouho jouse chunga hi katohdoh tahbeh ding ahi: hiche gamthipma hi mangthah uva, thigam ding ahiuve, ati." 
Numbers14:36 Chuin Mosi'n gamkholtoh dinga asol miho, ahung kile kitnuva gamthudol akaleh-a thu ahinpoh jeh uva, houkhom ho jouse phunchel sahho," 
Numbers14:37 Chule gam chunga thudola thulhut phalou hinpoho ngei chu, Pakai angsunga hisen athigam taovin ahi." 
Numbers14:38 Ahinla gamkhol dinga cheho lah-a pang, Nun chapa Joshua le Jephunneh chapa Caleb vang ahing lhon nalaije." 
Numbers14:38 Ahinla gamkhol dinga cheho lah-a pang, Nun chapa Joshua le Jephunneh chapa Caleb vang ahing lhon nalaije." 
Numbers14:39 Chuin Mosi'n hiche thukisei hohi Israel chate chu aseipeh tai: chuin mipi chu alung hem cheh taovin ahi. 
Numbers14:40 Chuin jingpitah-in athoudoh un, molsang vuma akaldoh-un, Veuvin, eiho hikoma i-umuve, Pakaiyin eitep pehnao mun'a ichetou dingu ahi: ajehchu eiho ichonse taove, atiuve." 
Numbers14:41 Chuin Mosi'n ipi dinga Pakai thupeh napalkeh-u ham? Hiche nathil gonuhi lolhing louding ahi. 
Numbers14:42 Namelma teu masanga tha-a naum louna dingun, chetou hih-un; ajehchu nalah uva Pakai aumtapoi." 
Numbers14:43 Ajehchu Amalek mihole Canaan miho namasanguva aumun, achemjam muva nalou gamdiu ahi: ajehchu nangho Pakaiya kona kiheimang nahitaovin, hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin naumpi lou dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers14:44 Ahin amaho lhangvuma kaltou dingin akigotei teijun: ahivangin Pakai kitepna thingkhong le Mosi la gebuh-a konin akipatdoh pon ahi. 
Numbers14:45 Chuphatnin Amalek miho le chucheng lhangvuma cheng Canaan miho chu ahungkum lhaovin, amaho chu athagtnun, Hormah geijin asatpeh-un ahi." 
Numbers15:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers15:2 Israel chate chu seipeh in lang, ajah uva hitin seijin, Keiman nangho kapeh, nachenna diu gam nalhun tengule," 
Numbers15:3 Ganhon ahiloule kelngoi honna kona Pakai henga gimnamtui dinga, Pakaiya dinga meija kitohdoh thilto govam thilto ham, kitepna guilhunsah ganlhaina ham, lungcham thilto ham, ahiloule nakut loupiho ham napeh tengule," 
Numbers15:4 Chutengleh Pakai henga thilto pedingpa chun anneh thilto-a dinga changbong neljet ephah hopsom-a hopkhat toh kihal thaotwi hin khat hoplia hopkhat ahinchoi ding; 
Numbers15:5 Chule donding thilto lah-a lengpitwi hin khat hoplia hopkhat chu govam thilto ham, ganlhaina ham toh kelngoinou khatna dinga nagon ding ahi." 
Numbers15:6 Ahiloule kelngoichal khat dinga, nangman changbon neljet hopsom-a hopni, thaotwi hin khat hopthum-a hopkhat toh kihal anneh thilto nagon ding ahi." 
Numbers15:7 Chule donding thilto dinga chu lengpitwi hin khat hopthum-a hopkhat Pakaiya henga gimnamtui tah hidinga nato ding ahi. 
Numbers15:8 Chule govam thilto dinga bongchal nagon tengle, ahiloule kitepna suhbulhit na dinga ganlhaina ham, ahiloule Pakai henga chamna thilto ham nagon tengle;" 
Numbers15:9 Chutengle nangman thaotwi hin keh khat toh kihal changbong nelsel hopsom-a hopthum, bongchal tochun anneh thilto ding nahin kaiding ahi." 
Numbers15:10 Chule donding thilto-a lengpitwi hin keh khat, Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga meija kitohdoh thilto nahinchoi ding ahi." 
Numbers15:11 Hitia chu bongchal khat ham, ahiloule kelngoichal khat ham, kelngoinou khat ham, ahiloule kelnou khat hama dinga nabol ding ahi." 
Numbers15:12 Nagondiu jat dungjuija, amitakip henga ajatnu dungjuija naboldiu ahi." 
Numbers15:13 Chule agama peng jouse chun, Pakai henga gamnamtui tah hidinga meija thilto apeh tengule hitia hi aboldiu ahi." 
Numbers15:14 Chule namdang mi nangho toh akholjin khoma, ahiloule nakhang khanguva nalah uva khosaden chan chun, Pakai henga dinga gimnamtui thilto meija kitohdoh thilto apeh noma ahile, nangho bolbang banga aman jong abolding ahi." 
Numbers15:15 Chule nangho houkhom ho le namdang mi nalah uva khopem hon pomding chondan khat naneidiu, nakhang khanguva a-itih-a chondan khatbou nanei dingu ahi: namdang miho chu Pakai anga nangho bang bang hidingu ahi." 
Numbers15:16 Nangho le nalah uva khopem namdang miho-a dinga dan khatseh le chonna dan khatseh umding ahi. 
Numbers15:17 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers15:18 Israel chate henga thu seijin lang, ajah uva seipeh-in, Nangho keiman kapuilut na ding gama chu nalhun tengule," 
Numbers15:19 Chutengle hitiding ahi, nanghon agam changlhah naneh tengule, Pakai henga jap thilto nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers15:20 Nachanglhah meh masapenu chu jap thilto-a natodiu: changphola jap thilto nabol banguva chutia chu nabol dingu ahi. 
Numbers15:21 Nakhang khanguva nachanglhah mehmasa penu chu Pakai henga jap thilto-a nato dingu ahi. 
Numbers15:22 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi henga anasei hiche thupeh jouse hi nasuhkhel uva, nanit lou uva ahile," 
Numbers15:23 Pakaiyin Mosi ana thupeh ni-a kipat amasanglam nakhang lhungkeijuva Pakaiyin Mosi khutna kona nangho nathupeh jouse geija chu; 
Numbers15:24 Chutengle hung hitiding ahi, houkhom ho hetlouva hetlou jeh-a suhkhel ahile, houkhom ho jousen bongchal golkhat Pakai henga gam namtuitah hidinga govam thilto-a ding, a-anneh thilto le adonding thilto toh dan dungjuija atotha diu, chule chonset thilto-a dinga kelnou khat atodiu ahi." 
Numbers15:25 Chule thempupa chun Israel chate houkhom ho jouse dinga longlhenna abolding, hetlouva kibol ahijeh-a kingaidam ding ahiuve. Chule ahetlou jeh uva Pakai henga meija kitohdoh ganlhaina thilto ahinchoi uva, Pakai henga achonsetnao thilto ahinchoi dingu ahi." 
Numbers15:26 Chule Israel chate houkhom ho jouse le amaho lah-a khopem namdang mipi jouse chu kingaidam ding ahiuve; ajehchu mijouse chun ahetlouvu ahi. 
Numbers15:27 Chule mikhat tou hetlou jeh-a achonsetna ahile, amachun kelcha anu kumkhat lhingbep khat chonset thilto-a dinga ahinchoi ding ahi." 
Numbers15:28 Chutengle thempupa chun hetlou jeh-a chonsepa dinga chu longlhenna abolding ahi, chule aman Pakai anga hetlou jeh-a chonset abola alonglhena abol tengle amachu kingaidam ding ahi." 
Numbers15:29 Nanghon Israel chate lah-a peng hihen, nalah uva hung khopem namdang mi hijongle, hetlou jeh-a chonset bolpa dinga dan khat nanei dingu ahi." 
Numbers15:30 Ahivangin henasa-a bolpa chu, gamsunga penga hihen lang, namdang mi hijongle, amachun Pakai i-sah louva abol ahin; amachu amite lah-a kona kipaimang ding ahi." 
Numbers15:31 Ajehchu aman Pakai thu chu anot thapma, athupeh apalkeh ahin, hichepa chu paimanga umding ahi; akhangit louna chu ama chunga chuding ahi." 
Numbers15:32 Chule Israel chate gamthipma aumpetnun, choldo ni-a thingkang chom mikhat amutaovin ahi." 
Numbers15:33 Chuin thingkang chom muho chun amachu Mosi le Aaron chule houkhom ho jouse henga ahin puitaovin ahi. 
Numbers15:34 Chuin iloding akiphondoh loulai jeh-in, amachu mihen na-a akoi taove." 
Numbers15:35 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Mipa chu thatei ding ahi: houkhom ho jousen gebuh polama songa asediu ahi, ati." 
Numbers15:36 Chuin mipi chun Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangin amachu gebuh pama ahin puidoh-un, songa aseplih taovin ahi." 
Numbers15:37 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers15:38 Israel chate jah-a chun akhang khanguva apon geihou ajeppah nadiu le, agei ajep pahnao chunga chu adumpol aba diuvin seipeh-in," 
Numbers15:39 Chule nanghon najeppah nao chu nangho dinga, hichu navet nuva, Pakai thupeh jouse chu nageldoh uva nabol nadiu hidin: chule jonthanhoi boldinga anung najuijiu nalung ngaichatnu le namit vetnu chu najuilou nadiu ahi." 
Numbers15:40 Chutia chu kathupeh jouse nageldoh uva, nabol uva, na Pathen'u dinga atheng nahinadiu ahi." 
Numbers15:41 Keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahin, na Pathen'u hidinga Egypt gama kona nahin puidohpao chu kahi: keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahi."
