Numbers16:1 Tun Izhar chapa, Kohath chapa, Levi chapa Korah le Reuben chapate Eliab chapa teni Dathan le Abiram, chule Peleth chapa On chun miho apuijun," 
Numbers16:2 Chuin houkhom ho sunga um loupileh, minche cheh akikhom khomho pipui jani le somnga le Israel chate phabep toh Mosi maija adingdoh-un," 
Numbers16:3 Chuin amaho Mosi le Aaron dounan akikhomun, aheng lhona, Houkhom ho jouse, amitakip athengun alah uva Pakai aume ti hena sasan nakibolthei sah behseh lhone. Ibola Pakai houkhom ho chung vuma kidomsang jeng nahi lhonham? atiuve." 
Numbers16:4 Chuin Mosi'n hichu ajah phatnin, tolla aboh khupmin:" 
Numbers16:5 Korah le aloiho jouse jah-a chun aseijin, hitin ati, Jingkah le Pakaiyin koi chu ama-a hija, koi chu atheng hijaham avetsah-a; chule amachu aheng anailut sah ding ahi: chule ama alhenpa tah ngeichu akinailut sah ding ahi." 
Numbers16:6 Hiche hi bolun: Korah le aloiho jousen gimnamtui lheng ho kilah-un; 
Numbers16:7 Chule Asunga chun mei hallun lang, jingteng Pakai angsunga asunga chun gimnamtui koijun; chule hitiding ahi, Pakaiyin alhen amapa chu atheng hiding ahi. Nangho Levi chate, nakibolthei sah behseh taovin ahi." 
Numbers16:8 Chuin Mosi'n Korah jah-a, Ngaijun, katao ahi, nangho Levi chapate;" 
Numbers16:9 Ama henga puinaja, Pakai houbuh lhachana tongding le, houkhom ho masanga akinthengu bol dinga ding dinga Israelte Pathen'in Israel houkhom ho-a kona nachomkhenu hi nangho dinga thil neocha bou hia nagelu ham?" 
Numbers16:10 Chule aman nangma le nasopi ho Levi chapate jouse ama henga napuinai taove: achutile nanghon themputna jong nahol nahlaiju ham? 
Numbers16:11 Hijeh chun nangma le naloiho jouse Pakai dounan nakikhom khomun: ahi. Aaron chu ipi hija ama douna-a naphunu ham? ati. 
Numbers16:12 Chuin Mosi'n Eliah chatehi Dathan le Abiram koudin mi asolin ahile, amanin, hungtou lhon ponge:" 
Numbers16:13 Khoiju le bongnoi lonna gama kona gamthipma thadinga neihin puidoh-u hi thilneocha hija, kachunguva naki piput sah ham?" 
Numbers16:14 Chukal vallin nangman khoiju le bongnoi lonna gama neipuilut pouvin, ahiloule lou le lengpilei la neilosah deh pouve: hicheng miho jouse mit hi kaldoh nagot ham? kahung tou lhon louding ahi, ati lhontan ahi." 
Numbers16:15 Chuin Mosi alung ahang lheh jengtan, Pakai henga, Athil toujong sanghih-in; keiman amaho-a konin sangan khatjong kalapon, amaho khatcha jong kasuna pon ahi, ati." 
Numbers16:16 Chuin Mosi'n Korah jah-a, Nangma le naloiho jouse, nangma le amahose chu Aaron toh jingle Pakai angsunga naum diu ahi:" 
Numbers16:17 Chule amitakipmin nagimnamtui lheng cheh kilah unlang, asunga gimnamtui koijun, chule amitakipmin nagimnamtui lheng cheh-u gimnamtui lhengcheh-u, jani le somnga chu Pakai anga hinchoijun; nangma le Aaron'in jong nagimnamtui lheng cheh nakichoi lhonding ahi, ati." 
Numbers16:18 Chuin amitakip min agimnamtui lheng cheh akilah-un, asunga mei akoijun, achunga gimnamtui akoijun, houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga chun Mosi le Aaron toh ading khom taovin ahi." 
Numbers16:19 Chuin Korah chun amaho dounan houkhom ho jouse houkhom na ponbuh kotphunga akhomin ahi: chuin Pakai loupina chu houkhom ho jouse henga ahung kilah tan ahi. 
Numbers16:20 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron jah-a thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers16:21 Hetmanlouva amaho kasuhmang theina dingin, hiche houkhom ho-a konin kikhindal lhonin ati." 
Numbers16:22 Chuin amani abohkhup lhonin, Vo Pathen, tahsa jouse lhagao ho Pathen, mikhat chonset jeh-a houkhom ho jouse chunga lunghang ding nahi hitam? atilhon tan ahi." 
Numbers16:23 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin," 
Numbers16:24 Houkhom ho jah-a chun, Korah, Dathan chule Abiram houbuh-a konin kikhin doh-un tin seijin ati." 
Numbers16:25 Chuin Mosi akipatdoh-in Dathan le Abiram henga achen; chule Israel upahon anung ajuijun ahi. 
Numbers16:26 Chuin aman houkhom ho jah-a, Naheng uva katao ahi, hiche miphalou ho ponbuh ho-a konin kikhin doh-un, chule a-imachao tongkha hih-un, achuti loule achonsetnao jouse-a mangthah getnun nate, ati." 
Numbers16:27 Chutichun amaho Korah, Dathan chule Abiram houbuh ningtina konin akipat doh-un ahi. Chuin Dathan le Abiram ahungdoh lhonin, aponbuh-u kotphunga chun ajiteu, achateu, chule achasen houtoh ading taovin ahi." 
Numbers16:28 Chuin Mosi'n hichea kona hi Pakaiyin keima hicheng na jouse tong dinga eisol ahi nahet dingu ahi; ajeh chu keiman hiche hohi kalung chama kabol ahipoi. 
Numbers16:29 Hiche miho hi mijouse thi ngaija athiuva, ahiloule miho kivil banga akiviluva ahile, Pakaiyin eihin sol hilou ding ahi." 
Numbers16:30 Ahinla Pakaiyin thilthah abola, leiset akam katna, amaho hi aneijouseu toh aval lhuma, chule kotong sunga gangtah-a alhah lhumuva ahile; hiche miho hin Pakai alung hansah uve ti nahet chet dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers16:31 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman hicheng thuhi aseijou jouvin, anoijuva leiset chu ahung keh-in akikhen totan ahi." 
Numbers16:32 Chuin Leisetnin akam ahin kathom sah-in, amaho le a-inhou, chule Korah loiho jouse le athilkeo jouseu chu aval lhumtan ahi." 
Numbers16:33 Amahole aneijouseu ahingin kokhuh sunga chun alhalutnun, chule achunguva leiset akichin; amaho houkhom ho lah-a konin amangthah taovin ahi." 
Numbers16:34 Chuin avela um Israel ho chu amaho pen gin chun ajam gamtaovin ahi. Ajehchu amahon, Eiho jong leijin eival lhum getnunte atiu ahi." 
Numbers16:35 Chuin Pakaiya konin meikong ahungdoh-in, gimnamtui hal mi jani le somnga chu akavamtan ahi." 
Numbers16:36 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers16:37 Aaron thempu pa chapa Eleazar jah-a, gimnamtui lhengho chu meikong lah-a kona ladoh nadin seipeh-in, ajehchu hicheho chu atheng ahi; chule meichu gamlha thim tah-a thaijah-in." 
Numbers16:38 Amaho hinna douna-a chonseteho gimnamtui lheng ho chu maicham khuna kongdalin semuhen; ajehchu amahon Pakai anga ato-u ahin, hijeh-a chu hicheho chu thenga ahi. Chule hicheho chu Israel chate dinga melchhihna hiding ahi, ati." 
Numbers16:39 Chuin Eleazar thempupan meikavam hon thiltona amanu sum-eng gimnamtui lheng ho chu alan, hiche ho chu maicham khuna kongdalin asemin;" 
Numbers16:40 Hichu Aaron chilhah hilou namdang mi koimachan Pakai angsunga gimnamtui hal dinga ahung nai louna diu; Pakaiyin Mosi khutna kona ahenga aseibanga, Korah le aloiho abah louna diuva, Israel chate dinga hetjingna hiding ahi." 
Numbers16:41 Ahivangin ajingin Israel chate houkhom ho jouse chu Mosi douna le Aaron dounan aphunuvin, Nangman Pakai miho nathatne atiuvin ahi." 
Numbers16:42 Chuin ahitin ahi, houkhom ho chu Mosi le Aaron douna-a akikhop petnun, houkhom ho houbuh lam chu aveovin ahile: veuvin, hichu meilom'in atomin, chule Pakai loupi chu ahung kilah-in ahi." 
Numbers16:43 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chu houkhom ho houbuh maija chun ahung lhonin ahi. 
Numbers16:44 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a thu aseijin," 
Numbers16:45 Amaho chu hetmanlouva kasuhmang thei nadin, hiche houkhom ho lah-a konhin hung doh-in, ati, chuin amaho chu abohkhup gam taovin ahi." 
Numbers16:46 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron jah-a, Gimnamtui lheng kilah-inlang, asunga chun maichama kon mei koilutnin, chule gimnamtui hal loijin lang, mangang tah-in houkhom ho henga chenlang, amaho dingin longlhenna gabolin: ajehchu Pakaiya konin lunghanna ahungdoh tan, hise akipantan ahi, ati." 
Numbers16:47 Chuin Aaron'in Mosi'n athupeh bangchun alan, houkhom ho lah-a alhailuttai; chule veuvin, mipi ho lah-a chun hise chu anakipantan ahi. Chuin aman gimnamtui ahalin, mipi ho dinga chun longlhenna aboltan ahi." 
Numbers16:48 Chuin ama athiho le ahingho kikah achun adingin ahile, hise chu atangtan ahi." 
Numbers16:49 Tun Korah chungchang thua thiho tilouvin, hise-a thichu sangsom le sangli le jasagi ahi." 
Numbers16:50 Chuin Aaron chu houkhom ho houbuh kotphung lama Mosi henga akiletan: chule hise chu atangtan ahi. 
Numbers17:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers17:2 Israel chate jah-a seijin lang, apu apateu insung kailhah mikhat cheh-a kon tenggol khatcheh, apipuhou jouse apu apateo insung kailhah cheh-a kon tenggol somleni lan lang; chule nangman amitakip min chu atenggol chung cheh uva chun sunnin." 
Numbers17:3 Chule nangman Aaron min chu Levi tenggol chunga nasutding ahi; ajeh chu tenggol khat cheh chu apateo insung luchang cheh-a ding ahi. 
Numbers17:4 Chule nangman hiche ho chu nangma kakimupina houkhom ho houbuh sung hettohsahna maija chu nakoi ding ahi. 
Numbers17:5 Chule hung hitiding ahi, keiman kalhen pen tenggol chu hungpah ding ahi: chutengle Israel chate aphun nao, nangni douna-a aphunao chu keija kona kasuh tang ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers17:6 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate henga chun aseijin ahile, pipuho chu aman tenggol khatcheh apeuvin, apu apateo insung dungjuijin tenggol somleni apeuvin ahi. Chule Aaron tenggol chu amaho-a tenggol lah-a chun aumin ahi." 
Numbers17:7 Chuin Mosi'n hettohsahna houkhom ho houbuh sunga Pakai anga chun tenggol ho chu akoitan ahi. 
Numbers17:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, ajingin Mosi hettohsahna houbuh sunga chun alutnin ahile, veuvin, Levi insung dinga Aaron tenggol chu anadonin, amumdoh-in, chule ahungpah-in, jonmot anagan ahi." 
Numbers17:9 Chuin Mosi'n tenggol ho chu Pakai angsunga konin Israel chate henga ahinpodoh-in; chule amahon aveovin, amitakipmin atenggol cheh akilah taovin ahi." 
Numbers17:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Aaron tenggol chu akiphinho hetna-a hettohsahna maija koidin hinlechoi kitnin; chutengle amaho keima douna-a aphunchel naova athilou nadinguva nasuhthip ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers17:11 Chuin Mosi'n hiti chun abolin, Pakaiyin thu apeh bang chun aboltan ahi." 
Numbers17:12 Chuin Israel chaten Mosi jah-a, Ven, keiho kathigamun, kamang thah-un, kamanthah gamhelu ahitai." 
Numbers17:13 Koi hijongle Pakai houbuh hinnai jouse chu thiding ahi: thina-a chu imanthah dingu hitam? atiuve. 
Numbers18:1 Pakaiyin Aaron jah-a, Nangma le nachapa, chule napu napateu insungin munthenga khangitlouna chu napohdiu, chule nangma le nachapate nangma toh na themputnao khangitlouna chu napohdiu ahi." 
Numbers18:2 Chule Nangma le nachapaten hettohsahna houbuh maija lhachana natoh naova nakithopi theina dinguvin, Levi phunga nasopi ho, napa phungmi hochu hin kipuijin." 
Numbers18:3 Chule amahon nangma natoh ding le houbuh natohding jouse chu avetup dingu ahi: amaho ahia nangma nahi-a jong nathilou na dinguva munthenga bel hole maicham bou chu ahin nailou dingu ahi. 
Numbers18:4 Chule amahon nangma nakitho piuva, houkhom ho houbuh natoh le houbuh lhacha natoh jouse atohdiu: chule namdang min vang nahinnai louding ahi." 
Numbers18:5 Chutia chu Israel chate chunga lunghanna aumbe louna dinga, nangman muntheng natoh le maicham natoh chu natoh ding ahi." 
Numbers18:6 Chule keima, ven, keiman nasopi ho Levi chate chu Israel chate lah-a konin kalheng doh-in; houkhom ho houbuh-a natong dingin Pakai dinga thilpeh khat bangin nangma nakipe taove." 
Numbers18:7 Hijeh chun nangma le nangma to umkhom nachapaten maicham le pondal sunglam thua thempu tohmuna na natoh diu ahi: nathempu tohmun natohhi nalhacha natohdiu thilpeh-a kapeh-u nahiuve: namdang mi ahin naija chu thiding ahi, ati." 
Numbers18:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Aaron jah-a, Ven, keiman jap thilto, Israel chaten thiltheng jouse chu nangma mopohna jong kapen; hicheho jouse chu thaokinu ahijeh-a nangma le nachapate a-itih-a chondan khat hidinga kapeh nahi." 
Numbers18:9 Hiche hi meija kona amoh, nanga dinga thiltheng chungnung ho chu ahi: athil tohou jouse anneh thilto jouse, achonset thiltou jouse, asuhkhel thiltou jouse-a keima eipehdiu jouse chu nangma le nachapate dinga theng chungnung hiding ahi." 
Numbers18:10 Muntheng chungnunga chu nangman nanehding; pasal takipmin anehdingu ahi: hichu nangma dinga atheng hiding ahi. 
Numbers18:11 Hichehi nanga ding ahi; Israel chaten dopkhang thilto dinga athilto hou, ajap thilto hou jouse toh, nangma le nangma toh umkhom nachapate le nachanute henga a-itih-a chondan hidinga kapeh nahiuve: na-insunga atheng tapouvin hichu aneh dingu ahi." 
Numbers18:12 Thao apha pentah le, lengpitwi apha pentah, chule suhlou chang, aga masapen ho Pakai henga apehdingu hou jouse chu nangma kapeh nahi." 
Numbers18:13 Chule Pakai henga ahin choi dingu gamsunga amin masapen chan chu nanga ding ahin; na-insunga atheng takipmin hichu aneh dingu ahi. 
Numbers18:14 Israel gamsunga thilto jouse nanga hiding ahi. 
Numbers18:15 Pakai henga apeh-u, tipum jouse-a naobu phukeh masa chan chu mihem hihen gancha hile nanga hiding ahi: ahivanga cha masapen chu nalhatdoh teiding ahin, chule gancha thenglou apeng masapen ho chu nalhat doh ding ahi." 
Numbers18:16 Chule lhakhat ahia patna alhatdohna ding ho chu nalhatdoh ding, alhatna man nangma gon dungjuija, muntheng shekel dungjuija shekel chu gerah somni ahin, shekel nga-a nalhat ding ahi." 
Numbers18:17 Ahivangin bongnou masapen, kelngoi masapen le kelcha masapen chu nalhatdoh louding ahi; amaho atheng ahiuve: athisanu chu maicham chunga nathe-a, athao chu Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga meija kitoh thilto dinga nagoding ahi." 
Numbers18:18 Chule a-om kijap le adah jetlam nanga ahibanga, atipum chu nangma ding ahi." 
Numbers18:19 Israel chaten Pakai henga lhuh thilto apeh-u thil thengho jouse chu, nangma le nangma toh umkhom nachapate le nachanute henga a-itih-a chondan hidinga kapeh nahiuve. Hiche hi Pakai anga a-imatih chana dinga nangma le nachilhahte henga chi-a kitepna hiding ahi." 
Numbers18:20 Chuin Pakaiyin Aaron henga thu aseijin, ajah-a, Nangman amaho gamsunga gou naneilou ding, chule alah uva chan jong naneilou ding ahi: Keimahi Israel chate lah-a nagou le nachan chu kahi." 
Numbers18:21 Chule ven, keiman Levi chate chu Israel gamsunga hopsom jouse chu, atoh-u lhacha natoh, houkhom ho houbuh-a alhacha natoh-u jehtah chun agoulo diuvin kapen ahi." 
Numbers18:22 Tua patna Israel chaten chonset apoh uva athilouna dinguva, houkhom ho houbuh aga nailou dingu ahi." 
Numbers18:23 Amavang Levi ho chun houkhom ho houbuh lhachana atoh uva, athemo nao chu apohdiu ahi. Hichehi a-itih-a nakhang lhum keijuva dinga chondan hiding, chutia chu Israel chate lah-a goulo naneilou diu ahi." 
Numbers18:24 Amavang Israel chaten Pakai henga lhuh thilpeh-a apeh-u ahopsom hou chu Levi hon gouva alodiuva kapeh ahitai; hijeh-a chu keiman ajah uva, Israel chate lah-a amahon goulo aneilou diu ahi, kati ahi." 
Numbers18:25 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers18:26 Nangman Levi ho kihoupin lang, ajah uva, Nanghon Israel chate hopsom, keiman nagoulo diuva kapeh chu amaho-a kon nalah tengule, hopsom-a hop khat ngeichu Pakai dinga lhuh thilto-a napehdiu ahi, ati." 
Numbers18:27 Chule hiche nalhuh thilto hou chu pholla chang leh lengpi chilhahna-a pum dimset banga kisimding ahi. 
Numbers18:28 Hita chu Israel chate hopsom nalah jouse chu Pakai henga lhuh thilto-a nato diu; chule chuche Pakaiya lhuh thilto chu Aaron thempupa napeh diu ahi. 
Numbers18:29 Nathilto hou jouse lah-a kon aphapen le, atheng chengse chu Pakai henga lhuh thilto-a nato teidiu ahi." 
Numbers18:30 Hiche jeh-a chu nangman amaho jah-a hitia nasei ding ahi, Nanghon aphapen ho nalhuhdoh tenguleh Levi ho dinga hiche hi changphol le lengpitwi kiheh na-a kona agasoh-a kisim ding ahi." 
Numbers18:31 Chule hiche hi nangma le na-insung miten mun jouse-a naneh thei dingu ahi: ajeh chu hichehi houkhom houbuh-a nalhacha natoh manuva kipe tohman ahi. 
Numbers18:32 Chule hichea kona aphapen nalhuh tengule, hiche jeh-a chu nanghon chonset napoh loudiu: chule nathi louna dinguva Israel chateho thiltheng jouse chu nasuhboh theilou dingu ahi." 
Numbers19:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers19:2 Hichehi Pakai thupeh chona danthu ahin, Israel chate henga chun bongla asan, pol lou, achunga nolna beihel, achunga namkoljon kibut khalou, nahin kaipeh nadiuvin seijin." 
Numbers19:3 Chule hiche chu Eleazar thempupan gebuh pama ahin kaidoh dinga napeh ding, chule mikhatnin a-angsung laitah-a atha ding ahi." 
Numbers19:4 Chutengle Eleazar thempupa chun athisan chu akhutjunga alah-a, houkhom ho houbuh masanga sagivei atheding ahi." 
Numbers19:5 Chule khatnin ama mitmu-a bongla chu agoding; avunjong, atipum jong, athijong chule a-eh jong ahalding;" 
Numbers19:6 Chutengle thempu chun Cedar thing le hyssop chule asandup alah-a, bongla kigona meikong lah-a chu aselut ding ahi." 
Numbers19:7 Chule thempu chun aponho akisopma, atahsa twija akisil ding, chujoule gebuh-a hunglut ding, chule thempupa chu nilhah geija thenglou ding ahi." 
Numbers19:8 Hitia bongla gou penpen chu twija avon asopma, amajong twija kisilding, chule nilhah geija thenglou ding ahi." 
Numbers19:9 Chule mitheng khatnin bongla kigona vutvam chu alokhoma, gebuh pam muntheng lai khatna akoiding, chule Israel chate houkhom ho-a dinga kisekhena twija mandinga koiding ahi: hichu chonset suhtheng na hiding ahi." 
Numbers19:10 Chule bongla kigona vutvam lohkhompa chun avon asopma, nilhah geija atheng louva umding ahi: chule hichu Israel chate le alah uva namdang akholjin khompiu ho-a dinga a-itih-a dinga dan hiding ahi." 
Numbers19:11 Koi hile thilong tongkha-a chu nisagi thenglouva umding ahi. 
Numbers19:12 Chule hiche twija chu anithum nile kisuthenga, anisagi nile amachu thengding ahi; ahin ama anithum nile akisuhtheng louva ahile, anisagi lhinni jongle thenglou ding ahi." 
Numbers19:13 Mi khattou mithi long tongkha-a, chule kisutheng louchun, Pakai houbuh asuhboh ahin; amachu Israel chate lah-a kona kipaimang ding ahi. Ajeh chu achunga kise khenna twi akithe khumpon, ama chu athenglou hiding; athenlouna chu achunga umnalai ahi." 
Numbers19:14 Hichehi mikhat pon in'a athi tenga dan ding chu ahi: pon in sunga hunglutho jouse le, pon in sunga um jouse chu nisagi thenglou diu ahi." 
Numbers19:15 Chule asunga um kong le bel asin umlouva kihong jouse chu athenglou hiding ahi. 
Numbers19:16 Chule koi hijongle tol lhanga chemjam'a kithat, ahiloule mithilong, ahiloule mithigu, ahiloule lhankhuh tongkha-a chu nisagi athenglou hiding ahi." 
Numbers19:17 Chule hiche athengloupa dinga chu amahon chonset thensona bongla kigona vutvam hochu alahdiu, chule twi longlai toh kongsunga ahaldiu," 
Numbers19:18 Chutengle mitheng khatnin hyssop alah-a, twija chu adelutna, ponbuh chung le kongho chung jouse le mi aumho chung jouse-a, migu, ahiloule akithat, ahiloule mithi, ahiloule lhankhuh tongkhapa chu athinkhum ding:" 
Numbers19:19 Chule mithengpa chun athengloupa chu anithum channi, chule anisagi channile athin khum ding ahi: chule anisagi channi le amajong kisuthenga, avon asopma, atahsa twija kisilngim ding, chule nilhah lam lebou thengding ahi." 
Numbers19:20 Ahin mi athenglou, ama le ama kisutheng lou chu, houkhom ho lah-a kona kipaimang ding ahi; ajehchu mipa chu Pakai muntheng asuhboh ahi: achunga kisekhena twi akithin khumlou ahin; amachu athenglou ahi." 
Numbers19:21 Chule hichu amaho dinga a-imatih channa dinga chondan hiding ahi. Chule kisekhena twi chapma pangpen pen chun apon akisop ding; chule kisekhena twi tongkha penpen chu anilhah geija aboh-a umding ahi. 
Numbers19:22 Chule ipi hijongle atheng loupan athamkhah tapou chu aboh hiding ahin; chule chuche thil tongkha pa chu nilhah geija bohding ahi. 
Numbers20:1 Chujouvin Israel chate, houkhom ho pumpi ngei chu lha masa sungin Zin gamthip ahung lhungun ahi. Chuin mipi ho chu Kadesh'a gebuh akisonun; chule hia chun Miriam athin, hia chun avuitaovin ahi." 
Numbers20:2 Chule hia chun houkhom ho ding twi aumtapon; chuin amaho Mosi le Aaron dounan akikhom khom taovin ahi. 
Numbers20:3 Chuin mipin Mosi akinah piuvin, hitin atiuve, Isopihou Pakai angsunga anathi laijuva chu Pathen'in eina thisah-u hitavele!" 
Numbers20:4 Chule ipidinga keiho le kagancha hou hi hikoma thi dinga, nangman Pakai houkhom ho hi hiche gamthima neipuidoh-u ham?" 
Numbers20:5 Chule ipi dinga keiho hiche gitlouna muna hi puilut dinga Egypt gama kona neihung doh sah-u ham? Hiche hi muchi, thei changho, lengpitheiho, kolbuthei ho mun jong ahipon; twidon ding jeng jong aumpoi, atiuvin ahi." 
Numbers20:6 Chuin Mosi le Aaron chu mipi kikhom mitmu tah-a chun houkhom ho houbuh kot lama chun achelhon tan, amai tolla asulut lhonin ahi: chuin Pakai loupina chu ahenguva ahung kilahtan ahi." 
Numbers20:7 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers20:8 Tenggol chu kilah-in, chule nangma le nasopipa Aaron'in mipi chu khomkhom lhoninlang, amitmu tah-un songpi jah-a chun thu seilhonin; hichun atwi ahin putdoh sah-a, chutia chu nangman songpi-a kona chu twi naputdoh sah ding ahi. Chutengle nangman houkhom ho le aganchahou twi napeh ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers20:9 Chuin ama thupeh bangin Mosi'n tenggol chu Pakai angsunga konin akilahtan ahi. 
Numbers20:10 Chuin Mosi le Aaron'in houkhom ho chu songpi masanga chun akhom lhonin; chule ajah uva, Tun doumah bolho nanghon ngaijun; hiche songpi-a kona hi twi kalon dohsah teitei lhonding ham? ati lhone." 
Numbers20:11 Chuin Mosi'n akhut chu adomsangin, atenggolin songpi chu nivei avon ahi. Chuin twi chu neng jengjungin ahung longdoh tan, hitichun houkhom ho le agancha houvin jong adonun ahi." 
Numbers20:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron jah-a, Nangnin Israel chate mitmu-a suhtheng dinga neitahsan lhonlou jehchun; hiche mihohi keiman kapeh gamsunga chu napuilut lhon louding ahitai, ati." 
Numbers20:13 Hiche hi Meribah twi ahi; ajehchu Israel chaten Pakai chu akidou piuvin, chuin Ama amaho-a chun suhthengin aumin ahi." 
Numbers20:14 Chuin Mosi'n thupole ho chu Kadesh'a konin Edom lengpa koma asolin, ahenga, Nasopipa Israel'in hitin aseije, nangman kachunguva lhung hahsatna ho jouse nahesoh keijin:" 
Numbers20:15 Itobanga kapu kapateu chu Egypt gama anachesuh uva, chule keiho Egypt gama phat sottah kana chennuva; chule Egypt mihon keiho le kapu kapateu einabol genthei danhou;" 
Numbers20:16 Chule keihon Pakai henga kapen phatnun, aman ka aw-u ajatan, vantil khat ahin solin, Egypt gama konin eipuidoh-un ahi. Chule ven, keiho Kadesh mun, nagamgi china um khopi khatna kaumuvin ahi." 
Numbers20:17 Katao ahi, Nagamsung neijot galkaisah-un: keihon loulai ahiloule lengpithei leiho lah kajot loudiu, twikul ho-a twi jong kadon loudiu ahi: lengpa lamlena bou kacheuva, nagamgi sung kagalkai kahseuva jetle veija jong kakihei loudingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers20:18 Chuin Edom'in ahenga, nahung galkai theilou dingu ahi, achutiloule nangdouna-a chemjam toh kahung konding ahi, ati." 
Numbers20:19 Chuin Israel chate chun ajah-a, Keiho lamlena chu kache dingu ahi: chule ijemtia kei le kagancha hon natwi kadon uva ahile, aman kapeh dingu ahi: imacha dang bollouva kenga bou kache galkai dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers20:20 Chuin aman, Nagalkai theilou ding ahi, ati. Chuin Edom chu amaho dou dingin mi tamtah le galsatmi hat tahho toh ahung kon taovin ahi." 
Numbers20:21 Hitichun Israel gamgi galkaisah ding Edom anomtapon; hijeh chun Israel chu ama-a konin achoma akihei mangtai. 
Numbers20:22 Chuin Israel chate, houkhom ho jouse ngei chu Kadesh'a konin ahung kitolun, Hor molsang ahung lhung taovin ahi." 
Numbers20:23 Chuin Edom gamgia Hor molsanga chun Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron henga chun aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers20:24 Aaron amitetoh kigom khom ding ahitai; ajehchu ama Israel chate kana peh gama chu lutlou ding ahi, ajehchu Meribah twija chun kathu dounan nakiphin lhonin ahi." 
Numbers20:25 Aaron le Achapa Eleazar chu kouvun lang, Hor molsanga hinpui touvin:" 
Numbers20:26 Chule Aaron vonho chu sutlhan lang, achapa Eleazar vonpeh-in: chule Aaron amitetoh kigoma khoma, hia chu thiden ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers20:27 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai thupeh bangin abolin: houkhom ho jouse mitmu-a chun amaho Hor molsang lama akaltou taovin ahi. 
Numbers20:28 Chuin Mosi'n Aaron vonho chu asutlhan, achapa Eleazar chu avonpeh-in; chule hiche molsang chunga chun Aaron athitan ahi: Chuin Mosi le Eleazar chu molchunga kon chun ahung kumsuh lhontan ahi." 
Numbers20:29 Chuin houkhom ho chun Aaron thi chu amu phatnun, amaho Israel insung pumpi ngei chun Aaron chu nisomthum alunghem piuvin ahi." 
Numbers21:1 Chuin lhanglama cheng Canaan mi Arad lengpa chun gam velhi lampia ahunguve tia kisei ajah phatnin; Israel chu akisatpin, amaho lah-a phabep jong gal hingin ahinkaijin ahi." 
Numbers21:2 Chuin Israel chu Pakai henga kihahsel in, Tahbeh-a nangman hiche mihohi kakhutna neipeh doh-a ahile, keiman akhopihou kasuhmang hel ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers21:3 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel aw chu angaipeh-in, Canaan miho chu akhutna apedoh tan; chuin amahon amaho le akhopi hou chu asumang hel taovin ahi. Chule aman hiche munchu Hormah tin asahtai." 
Numbers21:4 Chuin amaho Hor molsanga konin Edom gam velkolna dingin twipisan jotna lampi lamchu ajonkit taovin; chule mipi ho chu lampi jeh-in alungu alha lheh jengtan ahi. 
Numbers21:5 Chuin mipi ho chun Pathen le Mosi dounan thu aseitaovin, Ipi dinga nangnin Egypt gama kon hiche gamthipma thiding gunsetna neipuidoh uham? Ajehchu changlhah jong aumpon, chule twi jongla aumhih-in, kahinna-un hiche changlhah jangthet thut hi akidah tan ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers21:6 Chuin Pakaiyin mipi lah-a chun gulgu khohtah ahin lansahtan ahileh, hicheho chun mipi ho achu-in: Israel mi tamtah athitan ahi." 
Numbers21:7 Hijeh chun mipi ho chu Mosi henga ahungun, Keihon Pakai le nangma dounan thu kaseijun kachonse taovin ahi; Aman gul hohi keiho lah-a kona alahmang nadingin Pakai henga taovin, atiuve. Chuin Mosi mipi dingin ataotan ahi." 
Numbers21:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Gulse khohtah khat lim seminlang, hichu mol lhon leh-a tahdoh-in, chule hitiding ahi, gul'in achuh tapou chun sum-eng gul chu avetna ahile hingding ahi, ati." 
Numbers21:9 Chuin Mosi'n sum-eng in gullim khat asemin, hichu mol lhon leh-a atah-in, chuin ahitin ahi, gul chun khat tou achuh-a, achuhpa chun sum-eng gullim chu avetteng ahingjin ahi." 
Numbers21:10 Chuin Israel chate chu akitollun, Oboth munna pon-in akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers21:11 Amaho Oboth'a konin akitolun, Moab toh kigalsai nisolam Ije-abarim gamthipma pon-in akisonun ahi." 
Numbers21:12 Hichea konchun amaho akichonun, Zared phaichama pon-in akisonun ahi." 
Numbers21:13 Hichea konchun amaho akichonun, gamthipma um, Amor mite gamsunga kona hungdoh Arnon gal langkhat lama chun pon-in akisonun ahi. Ajeh chu Arnon hi Moab le Amor kikah-a um Moab gamgi ahi." 
Numbers21:14 Hijeh chun Pakai galsatnaho lekhabu sunga, Aman twipisan le Arnon vachaho-a athilbol," 
Numbers21:15 Chule Moab gamgia um Ar chenna mun'a lunglha vachaho-a athilbol, tin akisunin ahi." 
Numbers21:16 Chuin hichea konchun amaho Beer'a achetouvun ahi: hichemun chu Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Miho chu khom khomin, chule keiman amaho chu twi kapeh ding ahi, tia aseina twikhuh chu ahi." 
Numbers21:17 Chuphatnin Israel ten hiche la hi asaovin; Vo twikul, twiput sah-in, nanghon ahenga la saovin:" 
Numbers21:18 Danthu pepa thupeh dungjuijin, atenggolun pipuihon twikhuh alaijun, miloupi hon twikhuh alaijun ahi. Chuin amaho gamthipma konin Mattahan'a achetauve ahi." 
Numbers21:19 Chuin Mattanah'a konin Nahaliel: chule Nahaliel'a konin Bamoth: 
Numbers21:20 Chule Moab gamsunga phaichama um Bamoth'a konin Jeshimon kimu phahna Pisgah molvum alhungun ahi. 
Numbers21:21 Chuin Israel ten Amor mite lengpa Sihon koma thupo ho asolun, ajah-a," 
Numbers21:22 Nagamsung neijot galkai sah-un; keiho loulai le lengpilei laija kakiheilut loudiu; twikhuh-a twiho jong kadon loudiu: gamgi kakhelto kahseuva lengpa lamlen bou kajot dingu ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Numbers21:23 Chule Sihon'in Israelte chu gamsung agalkai diu chu aphaltapon; ahin Sihon'in amite jouse akhom khomin, gamthipma Israel sat dingin akontan ahi. Chuin ama Jahaz'a ahungin, Israelte toh akisattai." 
Numbers21:24 Chuin Israel ten amachu chemjamin athat uvin; agam chu Arnon'a pat Jabbok gei, Ammon chate gam geijin alotaovin ahi. Ajeh chu Ammon chate gamgi chu hat tah ahi." 
Numbers21:25 Chuin Israel ten hiche khopi ho chu alauvin; chule Israelte chu Amor miho khopi jouse, chule Heshbon le akhoneo jouseuva acheng taovin ahi." 
Numbers21:26 Heshbon hi Moab leng masapa galla anasatna, agam jouse Arnon geija akhutna kona analahpeh-a Amor mite lengpa Sihon khopi ahi." 
Numbers21:27 Hijeh chun amahon thuchih-in aseijun, Heshbon'a hungun, Sihon khopi kigong henlang kisahen:" 
Numbers21:28 Ajehchu Heshbon'a konin mei ahungkan, Sihon khopi-a konin meikou ahung kongdoh-in; hichun Moab gama um Ar, chule Arnon munsanga pakaiho chu akavamtan ahi." 
Numbers21:29 Moab, nangma ada nahi! Vo Chemosh mite amangthah nahitaove: aman asohcha achapateho le achanute chu Amor mite lengpa Sihon henga gal hinga kaidin apetan ahi." 
Numbers21:30 Keihon amaho kakapmun; Heshbon chu Dibon geijin amangthah tan, chule keihon Medeba lhunna Nophah geijin kamhellin kalha taove, tin aseijun ahi." 
Numbers21:31 Hitichun Israelte chu Amor miho gama acheng taovin ahi. 
Numbers21:32 Chuin Mosi'n Jaazer velhiding mi asoldoh-in, chule amahon hiche khoho chu alauvin, chua cheng Amor miho chu anodoh taovin ahi." 
Numbers21:33 Chuin amaho ahung kile kitnun Bashan jotna lampia akaltouvun ahi. Chuin Bashan lengpa Og chu amaho satdin, amale amite jousetoh Edrei galmuna galsatdin ahung kondoh taovin ahi." 
Numbers21:34 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Amakhu kicha hih-in: ajehchu keiman amale amite jouse, chule agam khu nakhutna kapeh doh ahitai; nangman amakhu Heshbon'a um Amor mite lengpa Sihon nabolna bang banga nabolding ahi, ati." 
Numbers21:35 Hijeh chun amahon amale achapate chule amiteho jouse chu khatcha jong ahing doh abeihel kahsen athatgamun ahi: chuin amahon agam chu alotaovin ahi. 
Numbers22:1 Chuin Israel chaten malam anouvin, Jericho kom Jordan gal Moab phaichama chun gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers22:2 Chuin Zipper chapa Balak chun Israel ten Amor miho chunga anabol jouse chu amusoh keijin ahi. 
Numbers22:3 Chuin Moab chun miho chu atamjeh-un akicha lheh jengtan: chule Moab miho chu Israel chate jeh-in alungu athoilheh jengtan ahi. 
Numbers22:4 Chuin Moab'in Midian upaho henga chun, Tu-a hi bongchalin loujaova hampa aneh jouhel banga, hiche mihonpi hin iveluva umjouse hi aneh jouhel dingu ahi, ati. Chule chuphat laija chu Zippor chapa Balak hi Moab mite lengpa hija ahi." 
Numbers22:5 Hijeh chun aman ama miho chate gam, vapi panga um Pethor kho-a Boer chapa Balaam koudin sotol ho asolin, ahenga, Vetan Egypt gama kon hungpot doh mihon khat aume: ven, amahon leiset chung alodimun, chule amaho keimatoh kimaito tah-in aumuve;" 
Numbers22:6 Hijeh chun tun, katao ahi, keiman amahohi kajo-a, katha gamuva, hiche gama kona kadelmang thei nadingun, hungin lang hiche mihohi hung gaosapmin; ajehchu amahohi keima dingin ahatbeh seh-un ahi: ijeh inem itile nangman phatthei naboh mi chu phatthei achangin, koihile nagaosap mi chu gaosap achange ti kahei." 
Numbers22:7 Chuin Moab upaho le Midian upaho chun aisan kipa manding hochu achoijun, akipat doh-un, Balaam henga ahungun, Balak thusei chu ajah-a asei taovin ahi." 
Numbers22:8 Chuin aman amaho koma, Tujan hikoma hin geh-un lang, Pakaiyin keima koma aseibang bangin keiman nangho koma thu hinpokit nange ati. Hitichun Moab puiho chu Balaam toh agehkhom taovin ahi." 
Numbers22:9 Chuin Pathen chu Balaam henga ahungin, ajah-a, Naum khompi miho khu koi hiuvem? ati." 
Numbers22:10 Chuin Balaam'in Pathen henga, Moab lengpa Zippor chapa Balak-in kahenga ahinsola," 
Numbers22:11 Ven, Egypt gama kona hungpot doh-a leiset chung lodima mihon khat aumuve: Tun hungin lang amahohi eihung gaosap peh-in, keiman amaho kajo-a, kadeldoh jou thei khat le gatin tia ahinsol ahi, ati." 
Numbers22:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Balaam jah-a, Nangma amaho hitoh nakilhon louding; chule nangman hiche mihohi nagaosap louding ahi; ajehchu amaho phattheiboh chang ahiuve, ati." 
Numbers22:13 Chuin jingkah-in Balaam athoudoh-in, Balak pipuiho jah-a, Nagam lamuva kilekit taovin; ajehchu nangho toh lhonkhoma chedingin Pakaiyin eija nompoi, tin aseitan ahi." 
Numbers22:14 Chuin Moab pipuiho chu akipat doh-un, Balak henglama acheuvin, Balaam keihotoh hungding anompoi, agatiuve." 
Numbers22:15 Chuin Balak in pipuiho amaho sanga ja-umtah cheh asolkit nalaijin ahi. 
Numbers22:16 Chuin amaho Balaam henga ahungun, ahengah, Zippor chapa Balak'in hitin aseije, Katao ahi, kahenga nahung nadingin imacha kidal tansah hih-in;" 
Numbers22:17 Ajehchu keiman nangma jana lentah kapeh-a kachoi sang ding, chule nangman kahenga nasei chan chu kabolding ahi: hijeh chun hungin lang hiche mitehi neihung gaosap peh-in, atie atiuve." 
Numbers22:18 Chuin Balaam'in Balak sohte henga chun adonbutnin ajah uva, Balak'in a-in dimset sana dangka eipeh ding hijongle, keima Pakai ka Pathen thu kalvalin tamtah bolding hihen, lhomcha bolding hijongle che ponge;" 
Numbers22:19 Hijeh chun tun, naheng uva katao ahi, Pakaiyin kahenga ipi aseibe-am kahet theina dingin, tujan jong hi-ah geh kitnun, ati." 
Numbers22:20 Chuin jan-in Pathen chu Balaam henga ahungin, ajah-a, Miho chu nangma kou-a hung ahiule kipat in lang amahotoh kilhonin, amavang keiman nahenga kasei thubou chu nabol ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers22:21 Chuin Balaam jingkah-in athoudoh in, asangan pho asepdoh in, Moab pipuiho chutoh alhontai." 
Numbers22:22 Chuin ama ache jehchun Pathen lungsat asoujahtan: Pakai Vantil chu ama douna-a kimaitopi din lampia chun anadingtan ahi. Hichepet nahi ama sangan chunga touva, asoh minin akilhonpi ahi." 
Numbers22:23 Chuin sangan chun Pakai Vantil khatnin akhutna chemjam achoija lampia adin amutan ahi; chuin sangan chu lamsih lama akiheidoh-in, loulai langa achetan ahi. Chuin Balaam'in sangan chu lampia heilutna din avon ahi." 
Numbers22:24 Ahin Pakai Vantil chu alang teni-a bang umgel lengpilei lampia chun ana dingin ahi. 
Numbers22:25 Chuin sangan nin Pakai Vantil chu amuphatnin bang suhnan akineijin, Balaam kengchu bang toh atat cheptan ahile, aman avokitnin ahi." 
Numbers22:26 Chuin Pakai Vantil chu ache gamla jepmin, jetle vei akiheina ding lampi umlou munneo laitah khatna anading tan ahi." 
Numbers22:27 Chuin sangan chun Pakai Vantil chu amuphatnin, Balaam noija a-optan ahi. Chuin Balaam lungsat chu akoujah tan, aman sangan chu tenggolin avon ahi." 
Numbers22:28 Chuin Pakaiyin sangan chu ahin paosah-in, aman Balaam jah-a, Keiman nangma chunga ipi kabola hitia hi thumveijen neivoh ham? ati." 
Numbers22:29 Chuin Balaam'in sangan jah-achun, Nangin neidai chatvai jeh ahi, kakhutna chemjam umlebon kathading nahi, ati." 
Numbers22:30 Chuin sangan chun Balaam henga, Keima nasangan kahilou hija, nanga kahia patna tuni chan geija kachunga nahung tou jing hilouham? hitobanga hi masanga nachunga kanabol khah-em? ati. Chuin aman, Nabolkhapoi, ati." 
Numbers22:31 Chuin Pakaiyin Balaam mit ahadohsah-in ahile, aman Pakai Vantil lampia adina akhutna chemjam adopchu amutan ahi. Chuin ama akunin, tolla aboh khupmin chibai aboh tan ahi." 
Numbers22:32 Chuin Pakai Vantil chun ajah-a, Ipi dinga nangman sangan chu thumvei jen navoh ham? Ven, nalampi hi kamitmu-a akaleh lam ahi jeh-a, nangma lamtin dinga hungkon doh-a kahi;" 
Numbers22:33 Ahin sangan chun keima eimu-a, keija kona thumveijen kihei doh ahin, ama kiheidoh lou hile tu-a hi thonlouva nangma katha-a ama kahinghoi ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers22:34 Chuin Balaam'in Pakai Vantil hengah, Keima kachonse tai: ajehchu keiman douna-a lampia nadinna nei lamtin chu kahetlou ahi. Hijeh chun tun, hiche nangma lunglhai louna ahile, keima kilekit tange, ati." 
Numbers22:35 Chuin Pakai Vantil chun Balaam henga, Miho khutoh lhonin, amavang keiman kaseipeh ding thubou chu nasei ding ahi, ati. Hitichun Balaam chu Balak pipuiho chutoh alhontan ahi." 
Numbers22:36 Chuin Balak in Balaam hungchu ajah phatnin, Arnon gamgi mong lhapeh-a um Moab khopi khatna ana kimutopi dingin ahungdoh-in ahi." 
Numbers22:37 Chuin Balak'in Balaam henga, Keiman nangma kou dinga lungnem tah-a mi kahinsol hilouham? Ipi dinga kahenga hunglou nahim? Keiman nangmahi ja-um tah-a katunmo-a nabol ham? ati." 
Numbers22:38 Chuin Balaam'in Balak henga, Ven, keima nahenga kahungtai; keiman tu-a hi ipi hijongle seina ding tha kaneibeh-em? Pathen'in kakama akhum thu bou chu kaseiding ahi, ati." 
Numbers22:39 Chuin Balaam chu Balak toh akilhonin, Kirjath-huzoth'a ahunglhon tan ahi." 
Numbers22:40 Chuin Balak'in bongchal ho le kelngoi ho atohdoh-in, Balaam le aumpi pipuiho henga chun athot tan ahi." 
Numbers22:41 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Balak'in Balaam chu apuijin, mipi ho jouse amutheina dingin, Baal munsang ho-a chun apuitou tan ahi." 
Numbers23:1 Chuin Balaam'in Balak henga, Hikomahin keima dingin maicham sagi seminlang, chule bongchal sagi le kelngoichal sagi neigot peh-in, ati." 
Numbers23:2 Chuin Balaam'in aseibang chun Balak'in aboltan: Balak le Balaam chun maicham chung tinna chun bongchal khat le kelngoichal khat atohdoh lhontan ahi. 
Numbers23:3 Chuin Balaam'in Balak henga, Nagovam thilpeh koma hin ding jingin, keima kimupi dinga Pakai ahung khattoule, keima gacheng ting, chule aman eimusah tapou chu seipeh nange, ati. Chuin ama munsang khatna achetan ahi." 
Numbers23:4 Chuin Pathen'in Balaam akimupin ahi. Chuin aman ahenga, Keiman maicham sagi kagongin, maicham jouse chunga chun bongchal khatle kelngoichal khat cheh katoh-in ahi, ati." 
Numbers23:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Balaam kamsunga thu akoipeh-in, ajah-a, Balak henga kilekit ninlang, gaseipeh in, ati." 
Numbers23:6 Chuin ama ahenga akile kitnin ahile, veuvin ama le Moab pipuiho jouse chu govam ganlhaina koma chun anadingun ahi." 
Numbers23:7 Chuin aman athulemin thu aseipaijin, hitin ati, Moab lengpa Balak'in Aram gam solamsang molsang ho-a konin eihin puijin, kajah-a, Hungin lang Jacob neihung gaosappeh-in, hungin lang Israel hung chouvin, ati." 
Numbers23:8 Pathen'in agaosap louho chu ken iti kagaosap dingham? ahiloule Pakaiyin achoulou chu ken iti kachou ding ham? 
Numbers23:9 Ajehchu keiman songpiho chungvuma konin ama kamun, chule lhang ho-a konin ama chu kaven ahi: veuvin, mipichu achanguva chengdio, namtin lah-a kisim thei louding ahiuve." 
Numbers23:10 Koiham Jacob leivui simjou ding le Israelte hoplia hopkhat simjou dinga? michonpha thin neithisah inlang, kahinkho bei danjong ama-a tobang hihen, ati." 
Numbers23:11 Chuin Balak'in Balaam jah-a, Kachunga hi ipi nabol hitam? Keiman kamelmate gaosap dinga kapui nahin, ahin, vetan, nangman amaho phatthei naboh jotan ahi, ati." 
Numbers23:12 Chuin aman adonbutnin, Pakaiyin kakama eikhumpeh hohi kaseidoh nadinga kachihthei ngailou dingham? ati." 
Numbers23:13 Chuin Balak'in ajah-a, Katao ahi, hungin, chukoma kona chu amaho namuthei nadin, keimatoh munchom khatna che hite; chua kona chu nangman apamnung pen hobou namu ding, abonchauva namulou ding ahin, amaho chu keima-a dingin neigaosap peh-in, ati." 
Numbers23:14 Chuin aman ama chu Sophim loulai, Pisgah molsang vuma chun apuijin; chule maicham sagi asemin, chule bongchal khat le kelngoichal khatcheh maicham takip chunga atoh-in ahi." 
Numbers23:15 Chuin aman Balak henga, Keima Pakai to gallanga kakimuto laisen, nangma govam thilto phunga ding jingin, ati." 
Numbers23:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Balaam akimupin, akama thu akhumpeh-in, ajah-a, Balak henga chekitnin lang, hitin seijin ati." 
Numbers23:17 Chuin ama ahenga ahunga ahile, veuvin, ama thilto phunga chun Moab pipui hotoh anadingun ahi. Chuin Balak'in ahenga, Pakaiyin ipi aseijem? ati." 
Numbers23:18 Chuin aman thulem aseipanin, hitin ati, Kipatdoh-in Balak, ngaijin; nangma Zippor chapa, kathusei hi ngaijin:" 
Numbers23:19 Pathen chu jou seiji-a mihem ahipon; chule lungheiji-a mihem chapa jong ahipoi; Aman aseisa chu abolda dingham? ahiloule aseidohsa chu abolphat lou dingham? 
Numbers23:20 Vetan, keiman phatthei bohna ding thupeh kamutan' chule aman phatthei aboh ahitan, keiman lehei thei ponge." 
Numbers23:21 Aman Jacob khangitlouna, chule Israel'a jong chonvalna amupoi: Pakai a-Pathen chun aumpin, chule lengpa khosap awgin chu alah uva aumin ahi." 
Numbers23:22 Pathen'in amaho chu Egypt'a kona ahin puidoh ahin; aman sakol kinei thahat tobang aneijin ahi. 
Numbers23:23 Jacob douna ding themthu aumpon, chule Israel douna dingin aisan theina jong aumpoi: Tu-a hi Jacob le Israel thudola Pathen'in ipi abol hitam! kiti ding ahi." 
Numbers23:24 Vetan, hiche mite hi keipi bahkai lentah banga thoudoh dingu, keipi bahkai khangdong banga dingdoh ding ahi: aman a-anchah aneh masangse le asatha thisan adon masangse-a kol louding ahi, ati." 
Numbers23:25 Chuin Balak'in Balaam henga, Amaho hi gaosap jong gaosap hih-in, phatthei jong phatthei boh hih-in, ati." 
Numbers23:26 Ahivangin Balaam'in Balak adonbutnin, Pakaiyin asei jouse chu kaboltei ding ahi, tia kaseipeh nahilou ham? ati." 
Numbers23:27 Chuin Balak'in Balaam henga, Hungin, katao ahi, munchom khatna napui jing kate; chua konchun amaho neigaosap peh lechun Pathen lunglhai maithei ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers23:28 Chuin Balak'in Balaam chu Jeshimon lam kimuna Peor molsang vuma apuijin ahi. 
Numbers23:29 Chuin Balaam'in Balak henga, Hikoma hin maicham sagi neigon peh-in lang, kelngoichal sagi gotsan neikoi peh-in, ati." 
Numbers23:30 Chuin Balak'in Balaam seibang chun abolin, maicham takip chunga chun bongchal khat cheh le kelngoichal khat cheh atohtan ahi." 
Numbers24:1 Chuin Balaam'in Israel chapate phatthei abohding chu Pakai lungdei ahi, ti ahet phatnin, phatdang bangin themthu holin achedoh tapon, gamthip lam johchu amaingat tan ahi." 
Numbers24:2 Chuin Balaam akhodah-in ahile, Israel chu aphung dungjui cheh-a agebuh uva aumu amun ahi, chuin Pathen lhagao chu achunga ahung chutan ahi." 
Numbers24:3 Chuin aman athulem aseipanin, hitin ati, Boer chapa Balaam thuseidoh; amit kihadoh sahpa thuseidoh:" 
Numbers24:4 Pathen thuho ja-a, hat chungnungpa gaothilmu-a mupa, kipal lhu-a ahivanga amit hahjingpa thuseidoh ho:" 
Numbers24:5 Vo Jacob, naponbuh ho iti hoi hitam! Chule vo Israel, nahoubuh ho iti hoi hitam!" 
Numbers24:6 Phaicham bangin akiphajal deh-in, vadung panga honleiho abangin; Pakai phudoh Aloes thingphung hole, twipanga Cedar thingphung ho toh abangin ahi." 
Numbers24:7 Aman atwibel ho-a konin twi hinbung lhantin, achilhahte chu twi tampi lah-a umdiu; alengpa jong Agag sanga sangjo ding, chule alenggam chu kichoisang ding ahi." 
Numbers24:8 Pathen'in ama Egypt gama kona ahin puidoh ahin, aman sakol kinei thahat tobang aneijin ahi: akidoupi namtin vaipiho anehjou ding, aguhou ahe ngema, athalchanga athilpai dingu ahi." 
Numbers24:9 Ama aboh-in, keipi bahkai bangin, chule keipi bahkai lentah bangin akole: kon ama asuhthou ngam ding ham? Nangman phatthei naboh chan phatthei changhen lang, nagaosap chan chu gaosap changhen, ati." 
Numbers24:10 Chuin Balaam chunga chun Balak lungsat akoujahtan, akhut teni abengton ahi: chuin Balak'in Balaam jah-a, Kamelmate gaosap dinga kakou nahin; ahin, vetan, nangman amaho thumvei jen hi phatthei nabohtan ahi." 
Numbers24:11 Hijeh chun tun naumna lama jamtan: keiman jana lentah chang dinga tundoh kagot nahin; ahivangin, vetan Pakaiyin nangma jabola naumna dinga konin natingtan tan ahi, ati." 
Numbers24:12 Chuin Balaam'in Balak henga, Kahenga nahinsol miho henga jong kaseisa hitalou ham?" 
Numbers24:13 Balak'in keima sana dangka a-in dimsetna eipeh ding hijongle, Pakai thupeh kalvala kachama aphabolna hihen, asebolna ding hijongle kabollou ding ahi; amavang Pakaiyin aseiho bouchu kaseiding ahi, kati hilou ham?" 
Numbers24:14 Chule tun, vetan keima kamite henga kache ding ahitai; hijeh chun hungin, hiche miho hin ni nunung nile namite henga ahin thilbol dinghou chu seipeh-inge, ati." 
Numbers24:15 Chuin aman athulem aseipanin, hitin ati, Beor chapa Balaam thusei ho, chule amit kihadoh sahpan thusei ho:" 
Numbers24:16 Pathen thupeh ho japa le chungnung pen hetna thudol hepa, hat chungnung pen gaothilmu-a mupa, kipal lhu-a ahivanga hahjingpa thuseidoh ho:" 
Numbers24:17 Keiman ama chu kamuding ahin, tuvang hilouding; keiman amachu kavet ding ahin, naicha vang ahipoi: Jacob'a kona Ahsi khat hungdoh-a, Israel lah-a kona leng tenggol khat hung kitungdoh ding; hichun Moab ningkoi ho avoh-a, chule Seth chateho jouse asuhmang ding ahi." 
Numbers24:18 Chule Edom chu chanvou hung hiding, Seir jong amelmateuva dinga chanvou hung hiding ahi: chule Israel ten hangsan tah-a aboldingu ahi." 
Numbers24:19 Lengvai podingpa chu Jacob'a kona hungdoh-a, khopi-a umdenpa chu asuhmang ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers24:20 Chuin aman Amalek lam aven athulem aseipanin, hitin ati, Amalek hi chitin namtin bulpi ahinan, amavang akichaina ding chu tonsotna manthah na hiding ahi, ati." 
Numbers24:21 Chuin aman Ken miteho aven, athulem aseipanin, hitin ati, Nachenna mun chu dettah ahin, nabuh chu songpi chunga nakiset in ahi:" 
Numbers24:22 Hijeng jongle Asshur'in gal hinga nakaimang kahse-a, Ken chu suhsetna umding ahi, ati." 
Numbers24:23 Chuin aman athulem aseikitnin, Ohe! Pathen'in hitia hi ahinbol tengle, koi hingjou tantem!" 
Numbers24:24 Chule Chittim gamkaija konin kong inneiho hunguntin, Asshur le Eber chu asuh gentheidiu, chule amajong a-itih-a dinga mangthah ding ahi, ati." 
Numbers24:25 Chuin Balaam akipatdoh-in, aumna lama akile kit tai. Chule Balak jong alampia achetan ahi." 
Numbers25:1 Chuin Israelte chu Shittima achengun, chule miho chun Moab chanute toh jonthanhoi abolpan taovin ahi." 
Numbers25:2 Chuin amaho chun Israelte chu a-pathen hou ganlhaina-a akoutaovin; chule miho chun aneovin, a-pathenhou anga abohkhup taovin ahi." 
Numbers25:3 Chuin Israel chun Baal-Peor chu ajoptan ahile, Pakai lungsat chu Israel chunga akongjah tan ahi." 
Numbers25:4 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga, Mipi lamkaiho jouse chu puijin lang, tijat umtah Pakai lungsatna chu Israel te-a kona akichon mangtheina dingin, Pakai masang nisanoi tah-a khailih-in ati." 
Numbers25:5 Chuin Mosi'n Israel thutan ho henga, Nangho amitakipmin Baal-Peor jopma amite jousechu that cheh hen, ati." 
Numbers25:6 Chuin veuvin, Israel chate lah-a mi khat ahungin, Mosi mitmule Israel chate houkhom ho houbuh kot maija kapma-um miteho mitmu-a chun Midian mi numei khat asopiho henga ahin puijin ahi." 
Numbers25:7 Chuin Aaron thempu chapa, Eleazar chapa Phinehas in hichu amuphatnin, houkhom ho lah-a konchun akipatdoh-in, akhutna tengcha khat akichoijin;" 
Numbers25:8 Chule Israel mipa chu pon in sunga ajuilutnin, anilhonin Israel mipale numeinu chu a-oipi laitah chu asunpai tan ahi. Chutichun Israel lah-a konin hise chu atangtan ahi." 
Numbers25:9 Chule hiche hise-a thi chu sangsomni toh sangli ahi. 
Numbers25:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga aseijin, hitin ahi." 
Numbers25:11 Aaron thempupa chapa Eleazar chapa Phinehas'in kalung hanna chu Israel te-a konin aheimangin ahi; ajehchu kathangthipna-a Israel chate kasuhmang lounadin, amaho lah-a keiding jal-in athang thipmin ahi." 
Numbers25:12 Hijeh chun hitin seijin, Ven kachamna kakitepna chu ama kapetan ahi;" 
Numbers25:13 Chule hichu ama le ama nunga achilhah hon anei dingu, a-itih-a thempu hina dinga kitepna ahi; ajehchu ama a-Pathen'a dingin athang thipmin, Israel chate-a dingin longlhenna chu abolin ahi, ati." 
Numbers25:14 Tun akithatna Israel mipa, Midian numei nutoh kithat koppa min chu, Zimri ahin, Salu chapa Simeon miho lah-a insungmi upa khat ahi." 
Numbers25:15 Chule Midian numei akithatnu minchu Cozbi ahin, apa Zur chu mipi chunga lamkai, Midian miho insunga mi upa khat ahi." 
Numbers25:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers25:17 Midian ho chu sunohphah inlang, chule sugammin:" 
Numbers25:18 Ajehchu amahon Peor chungchang le, Peor jeh-a hise lan mikho-a kithat Median pipupa chanu Cozbi le asopinu chungchanga alungthim gilouvun nasunoh phah-un ahi, ati." 
Numbers26:1 Chuin hise umjou chun ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron thempupa chapa Eleazar henga thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
Numbers26:2 Israel chate houkhom ho lah-a konin apu apateo insung kailhah-a, Israelte galsatna konthei cheh kum somni-a pat chunglam sese simdoh lhonin, ati." 
Numbers26:3 Chuin Mosi le Eleazar thempupan amaho chu Moab phaicham Jordan pang Jericho naija chun akihoupi lhonin," 
Numbers26:4 Pakaiyin Mosi le Egypt gama kona hung potdoh Israel chateho thu apeh bangin, mipi ho kum somni apat chunglamse chu simdoh-un, atilhone." 
Numbers26:5 Reuben, Israel chapa lenpen: Reuben chateho chu: Hanoch'a kon Hanoch insung mite ahung kondoh-un: Pallu'a kon Pallu insung mite ahung kondoh-un ahi." 
Numbers26:6 Hezron'a kon Hezron insung mite: Karmi'a kon Karmi insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:7 Hichengse hi Reuben inko ahiuvin: chule amaho akisimdoh sese chu sangsomli le sangthum toh jasagi le somthum ahiuve. 
Numbers26:8 Chule Pallu chapa chu Eliab ahi. 
Numbers26:9 Chule Eliab chapate chu Nemuel, Dathan, chule Abiram ahiuve. Hiche Dathan le Abiram hi ahi houkhom ho lah-a minthang tah Korah le akiloipihon Pakai anelkal laijuva amahoto ana kiloija Mosi le Aaron ana nelkala teni chu." 
Numbers26:10 Chule hicheho loi athiu chun leisetnin akam akan, amaho chu Korah toh avallhum than, meijin mi janitoh somnga akalih-in, amaho chu melchihna khatnin ahung pangtaove." 
Numbers26:11 Achuti jeng vang chun Korah chate chu athipon ahi. 
Numbers26:12 Simeon chapate chu insungu dungjuijin: Nemuel'a kon Nemuel insung mite: Jamin'a kon Jamin insung mite: Jachin'a kon Jachin insung mite: 
Numbers26:13 Zerah'a kon Zerah insung mite: Shaul'a kon Shaul insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:14 Hichehohi Simeon insungmiho ahiuvin, Sangsomni le sangni toh jani ahiuve." 
Numbers26:15 Gad chateho chu a-insungu dungjuijin: Zephon'a kon Zephon insung mite: Haggi'a kon Haggi insung mite: Shuni'a kon Shuni insung mite: 
Numbers26:16 Ozni'a kon Ozni insung mite: Eri'a kon Eri insung mite: 
Numbers26:17 Arod'a kon Arod insung mite: Arali'a kon Areli insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:18 Hiche hohi Gad chate insungmihi akisimdoh dungjuija ahiuvin, Sangsomli toh janga ahiuve." 
Numbers26:19 Juda chapate chu Er le Onan ahilhonin; chuin Er le Onan chu Canaan gama athilhon tan ahi. 
Numbers26:20 Chule Juda chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin: Shelah'a kon Shelah insung mite: Pharez'a kon Pharez insung mite: Zerah'a kon Zerah insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:21 Chuleh Pharez chapate chu: Hezron'a kon Hezron insung mite: Hamul'a kon Hamul insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:22 Hiche hohi amaho akisim doh dungjuija Juda insung mite ahiuvin, sangsomsagi le sanggup toh janga ahiuve." 
Numbers26:23 Issachar chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin: Tola'a kon Tolla insung mite: Pua'a kon Pua insung mite: 
Numbers26:24 Jashub'a kon Jashub insung mite: Shimron'a kon Shimron insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:25 Hichehohi Issachar insung mite akisimdoh-u dungjuija amijat-u chu ahin, sangsomgup le sangli toh jathum ahiuve." 
Numbers26:26 Zebulun chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin: Sered'a kon Sered insung mite: Elon'a kon Elon insung mite: Jahleel'a kon Jahleel insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:27 Hicheho hi Zebulun insung miho akisimdoh-u dungjuija amijatnu chu ahin, sangsomgup toh janga ahi." 
Numbers26:28 Joseph chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin, Manasseh le Ephraim ahilhone." 
Numbers26:29 Manasseh chapate chu: Machir'a kon Machir insung mite: Machir'in Gilead ahingin, Gilead'a konin Gilead insung miho ahungdoh-in ahi." 
Numbers26:30 Hichehohi Gilead chapate ahi: Jeezer'a kon Jeezer insung mite: Helek'a kon Helek insung mite: 
Numbers26:31 Asriel'a kon Asriel insung mite: Shechem'a kon Shechem insung mite: 
Numbers26:32 Shemida'a kon Shemida insung mite: Hepher'a kon Hepher insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:33 Chuin Hepher chapa Zelophehad chun chapa aneitapon, chanu ho bou aneijin ahi. Chule Zelophehad chanute min chu Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah chule Tirzah ahi." 
Numbers26:34 Hichehohi Manasseh insung miho ahin, chule akisimdoh amaho chengse chu, sangsomnga le sangni toh jasagi ahiuve." 
Numbers26:35 Hiche hohi Ephraim chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin, Shuthelah'a kon Shuthelah insung mite: Becher'a kon Becher insung mite: Tahan'a kon Tahan insung mite ahiuve." 
Numbers26:36 Chule hichehohi Shuthelah chapateho ahi: Eran'a kon Eran insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:37 Hichehohi amaho akisim doh-u dungjuija Ephraim chapate insung miho ahiuvin, sangsomthum le sangni toh janga ahi. Hichehohi a-insungu kailhah cheh-a Joseph chapate ahiuve." 
Numbers26:38 Benjamin chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin: Bela'a kon Bela insung mite: Ashbel'a kon Ashbel insung mite: Ahiram'a kon Ahiram insung mite: 
Numbers26:39 Shupham'a kon Shupham insung mite: Hupham'a kon Hupham insung mite: Naaman'a kon Naaman insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:40 Chule Bela chapateni chu Ard le Naaman ahilhone: Ard'a kon Ard insung mite: Naaman'a kon Naaman insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:41 Hicheho hi a-insungu kailhah cheh-a Benjamin chapate ahiuvin, chule akisimdoh-u dungjuijin amaho chu sangsomli le sangnga toh jagup ahi." 
Numbers26:42 Hicheho hi Dan chapate a-insungu dungjuija ahiuve: Shuham'a kon Shuham insung mite ahiuve. Hiche hohi a-insungu kailhah cheh-a Dan insung miho ahiuve. 
Numbers26:43 Shuham insung mite jouse, akisimdoh dungjuijin amaho chu sangsomgup le sangli toh jali ahi." 
Numbers26:44 Asher chateho chu a-insungu dungjuijin; Jimna'a kon Jimna insung mite: Jesui'a kon Jesui insung mite: Beriah'a kon Beriah insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:45 Beriah chapateho chu; Heber'a kon Heber insung mite: Malchiel'a kon Malchiel insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:46 Chule Asher chanu min chu Sarah ahi. 
Numbers26:47 Hichehohi Asher chapate insung miho ahiuvin, akisimdoh-u dungjuijin, sangsomnga le sangthum toh jali ahiuve." 
Numbers26:48 Chule Naphtali chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin; Jahzeel'a kon Jahzeel insung mite: Guni'a kon Guni insung mite: 
Numbers26:49 Jazer'a kon Jezer insung mite: Shillem'a kon Shillem insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:50 Hichehohi a-insungu dungjuija Naphtali insung miho ahiuvin, amaho akisim doh hochu sangsomli le sangnga toh jali ahi." 
Numbers26:51 Hiche hohi Israel chateho jat ahin, sangjagup toh sangkhat toh jasagi le somthum ahiuve." 
Numbers26:52 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a thu aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers26:53 Hicheho henga hi gam chu alodinguva aminu kisimdoh dungjuija kihoppeh ding ahiuve. 
Numbers26:54 Atamho henga chu nangman alodiu lentah napehding, chule alhomho henga alodiu neocha napeh ding ahi. Amitakip henga chu amijat kisimdoh dungjuija alodiu kipeding ahi." 
Numbers26:55 Hijeng jongle gam chu vang sanna kihomding ahin, apu apateu phungmin kailhah dungjuija amahon alodingu ahi." 
Numbers26:56 Vang kisan dungjuija gam chu atam le alhom kikah-a kihom khen ding ahi. 
Numbers26:57 Chule hiche hohi Levi ho a-insungu dungjuija kisimdoh hochu ahiuve; Gershon'a kon Gershon insung mite: Kohath'a kon Kohath insung mite: Merari'a kon Merari insung mite ahiuve. 
Numbers26:58 Hiche hohi Levi mite insung miho ahiuvin, Libni mite insung, Hebron insung mite, Mahli insung mite, Mushi insung mite, Kohath insung mite ahiuve. Chule Kohath'in Amram ahingin ahi." 
Numbers26:59 Chule Amram jinu minchu Jochebed ahin, Levi chanu, anun Egypt gama Levi'a dinga ahinpeh ahi: chule amanun Amram chu Aaron le Mosi chule asopinu lhon Miriam ahinpeh-in ahi." 
Numbers26:60 Chule Aaron'in Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithmar ahingin ahi." 
Numbers26:61 Ahin Nadab le Abihu chu Pakai anga mei thenglou ato pet lhonin athilhon tan ahi. 
Numbers26:62 Chule amaho Pasal lha khatna pat chunglamse akisimdoh hochu sangsomni le sangthum ahiuve. Ajehchu amaho chu Israel chate lah-a goulo ding akipeh lou jeh-un, Israel chate lah-a akisimtha pouvin ahi." 
Numbers26:63 Hichehohi Mosi le Eleazar thempupan, Moab phaicham, Jordan pang, Jericho naija asimdoh lhon Israel chate chu ahiuve." 
Numbers26:64 Ahivangin Mosi le Aaron thempupan Sinai gamthipma Israel chate anasim lhon miho chu amaho lah-a hin khatcha beh jong aumtapon ahi. 
Numbers26:65 Ajehchu Pakaiyin amaho thudola chun, Amaho thonlouva gamthipma thiding ahiuve, anati ahi. Chutia chu Jephunneh chapa Caleb leh Nun chapa Joshua tilou adang khatcha jong kikhenlou anahitan ahi." 
Numbers26:65 Ajehchu Pakaiyin amaho thudola chun, Amaho thonlouva gamthipma thiding ahiuve, anati ahi. Chutia chu Jephunneh chapa Caleb leh Nun chapa Joshua tilou adang khatcha jong kikhenlou anahitan ahi." 
Numbers27:1 Chujouvin Joseph chapa Manasseh insunga Manasseh chapa, Machir chapa, Hepher chapa, Gilead chapa, Zelophehad chapa ahungun: chule achanute min chu Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah chule Tirzah ahi." 
Numbers27:2 Chuin amaho Mosi le Eleazar thempupa masang, pipui hole houkhom ho jouse masang-ah, houkhom ho houbuh kotbula chun adingun, hitin aseijuve," 
Numbers27:3 Kapao chu gamthipma athin, chule Korah loiho lah-a Pakai douna-a kichom khomho loi lah-a chun ana pangpoi; amavang ama chonset na-a thi anahin, chapaho ana neipon ahi." 
Numbers27:4 Chapa neilou jeh-a kapamin chu ipi dinga a-insung mite lah-a kona paidoh-a umding ham? Hijeh chun kapao sopi holah-a chankhat neipeuvin atiuve. 
Numbers27:5 Chuin Mosi'n athu chu Pakai henga alhuttan ahi. 
Numbers27:6 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu seijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers27:7 Zelophehad chanute sei chun adih aseiju ahi: apao sopiho lah-a gou chanding napeh tei dingu ahi; chule apao gou chanding chu amaho napeh ding ahi. 
Numbers27:8 Chule nangman Israel chate jah-a hitia naseiding ahi; Pasal khat chu chapa beija athia ahile, apa gouchu achanu teo napeh dingu ahi." 
Numbers27:9 Ahinla amachun chanu aneilouva ahile, nanghon ama gouchu asopiho napeh dingu ahi." 
Numbers27:10 Chule aman sopi aneilouva ahile, ama gouchu apa sopiho napeh dingu ahi." 
Numbers27:11 Chule apao chun sopi aneilouva ahile, nanghon agouchu a-insunguva akinaipi pa henga napeh diu, ama chun aloding ahi. Hichu Pakaiyin Mosi athueh banga Israel chate dinga thutanna chondan hiding ahi." 
Numbers27:12 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Nangma hiche Abarim molsanga hin kaldoh-in lang, Israel chate kanapeh gam khu gaven." 
Numbers27:13 Chule nangman hichu navetjou tengle, nasopipa Aaron kagop khom banga nangma jong namite toh kagop khom ding nahi." 
Numbers27:14 Ajehchu Zin nelgama houkhom ho phunchel laijun, twiphunga amitmu uva suhthenga kaumna dinga kathupeh napalkeh lhonin ahi. Hichu Zin gamthipma um Kadesh mun'a Meribah twi chu ahi, ati." 
Numbers27:15 Chuin Mosi'n Pakai henga thu aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers27:16 Pakai tipum jouse-a um lhagao Pathen chun houkhom ho chunga mikhat tunghen," 
Numbers27:17 Chutia chu Pakai houkhom ho hi achingbei kelngoi abah louna dinguva amasanguva potdoh-a, amasanguva chelut ding, chule amaho puidoh dingle amaho puilut dingin, ati." 
Numbers27:18 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Asunga lhagao um mipa, Nun chapa Joshua chu kipuijin lang achunga nakhut ngamin;" 
Numbers27:18 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Asunga lhagao um mipa, Nun chapa Joshua chu kipuijin lang achunga nakhut ngamin;" 
Numbers27:19 Chule amachu Eleazar thempupa le houkhom ho jouse masanga dinsah inlang, amitmuva chun mopohna pen." 
Numbers27:20 Israel chate houkhom ho jouse seingai ahina diuva, ja naumna phabep chu achunga nakoiding ahi." 
Numbers27:21 Chule ama Eleazar thempupa anga ding ding, chule amachun Pakai angsunga Urim thutanna dungjuija ama-a dinga thumop athumpeh ding ahi. Ama le Israel chate jouse, houkhom ho jouse ngeichu ama thusah-a potnuva, chule ama thusah-a lut ding ahiuve, ati." 
Numbers27:22 Chuin Mosi'n Pakaiyin athupeh bangchun abolin; Joshua chu Eleazar thempupa le houkhom ho jouse masanga adinsah tan ahi. 
Numbers27:22 Chuin Mosi'n Pakaiyin athupeh bangchun abolin; Joshua chu Eleazar thempupa le houkhom ho jouse masanga adinsah tan ahi. 
Numbers27:23 Chuin aman achunga chun akhut angamin, Pakaiyin Mosi khutna athupeh bangin amachu mopohna apetan ahi." 
Numbers28:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a thu aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers28:2 Israel chate chu thu penlang, hitin seijin, Keima-a dinga thil kitoh ho, keima henga gimnamtui tah hidinga meija kisem kaganlhaina ka changlhah hochu, kahenga akitep phat dungjuija natona dingun chingtheijun." 
Numbers28:3 Chule nangman ajah uva, Hiche hi Pakai henga dinga meija kisem thilto nato dingu chu ahi; jomjing govam thilto-a ding chu, nolnabei kelngoinou kumkhat lhingbep ni hiding ahi." 
Numbers28:4 Kelngoi nou khat chu jingkah lamle nato dingu, chule kelngoi nou adang khatma chu nilhah lamleh nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:5 Chule a-anneh thilto ding chu thao kimehdoh hin khat hopli-a hopkhat toh kihal changbong nel Ephah khat hopsom-a hopkhat hiding ahi. 
Numbers28:6 Hiche hi Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga meija kisem kilhaina, Sinai molsanga kisudetsa jomjing govam thilto chu ahi." 
Numbers28:7 Chule donding thilto ding chu kelngoinou khatna dinga hin khat hoplia hopkhat hiding; munthenga chu lengpitwi chihtah chu Pakai henga donding thito hidinga nasunlhah dingu ahi. 
Numbers28:8 Chule kelngoi dang chu nilhah lamleh natodiu ahin; jingkah lama anneh thilto bangle donding thilto banga chu Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga meija kisem kilhaina nato dingu ahi. 
Numbers28:9 Chule cholngahni leh kumkhat lhingbep nolna beihel kelngoinou ni, chule anneh thilto dinga thao toh kihal changbong nel hopsom-a hopni, chule adonding thilto toh nato tha dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:10 Hiche hi jomjing govam thilto le adonding thilto tilouva jong, hiche hi cholngah niseh-a govam thilto ding chu ahi." 
Numbers28:11 Chule nangho lha kipat sehleh Pakaiya govam thilto natodiu; bongchal gol ni, kelngoi chal khat, nolna beihel kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou sagi nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:12 Chule bongchal khatna dinga, a-anneh thilto ding chu thao toh kihal changbongnel ephah hopsom ma hopthum; chule kelngoichal khatna dinga a-anneh thilpe ding chu, thao to kihal changbongnel ephah khat hopsom-a hopni hiding ahi." 
Numbers28:13 Chule kelngoinou khatna dinga a-anneh thilto dingachu thao to kihal changbongnel ephah hopsom-a hopkhat hiding ahi; hiche hi Pakaiya dinga meija kisem kilhaina govam thilto gimnamtui chu ahi. 
Numbers28:14 Chule adonding thilto houchu bongchal khatna dinga lengpitwi hin keh khat, kelngoichal khatna dinga hin khat hopthum-a hopkhat, chule kelngoinou khatna dinga hin khat hoplia hopkhat hiding ahi. Hichehi lhaseh-a pumgo thilto, kumlhung keija lhaseh-a bolding ahi." 
Numbers28:15 Chule jomjing govam thilto le adongding thilto tilouva jong, kelchanou khat chu chonset thilto-a dinga Pakaiya nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:16 Chule lhamasa pen nisomle nili ni chu Pakai dinga kalchuh kut ahi. 
Numbers28:17 Chule hiche lha nisom le ninga nichu kut ahin; nisagi chol solou changlhah nehdingu ahi. 
Numbers28:18 Nikho masapen nile kikhoppi theng umding; hiche sunga chu natoh imacha natoh lou dingu ahi; 
Numbers28:19 Amavang Pakai henga govam thilto-a dinga meija kisem kilhaina naboldiu, bongchal gol ni le kelngoichal khat, chule kum khatbep kelngoinou sagi nato diu, hiche hochu nolna beihel hidingu ahi;" 
Numbers28:20 Chule a-anneh thilto-u chu changbongnel thao toh kihal hiding, bongchal khatna dinga ephah hopsom ma hopthum, kelngoichal khatna dinga ephah hopsom ma hopni hiding ahi;" 
Numbers28:21 Kelngoinou sagiho jouse dinga chu kelngoinou khat cheh dinga ephah hopsom-a hopkhat hiding ahi. 
Numbers28:22 Chule nangma longlhen bolna-a kelcha khat chonset thilto dinga nato dingu ahi. 
Numbers28:23 Jomjing govam thilto, jingkah-a govam thilto tilouva jong hichengho jonghi nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:24 Pakai henga gamnamtui hidinga meija kisem kilhaina sa chu hiche banga hi aniseh-a, nisagi lhumkeija nato dingu ahi: hichehi jomjing govam thilto le adonding thilto tilouva jong pehtei dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:25 Chule nisagi nile kikhoppi theng khat nanei uva, natoh imacha natohlou dingu ahi." 
Numbers28:26 Ga masa nikho, hapta kut sunga Pakai henga anneh thilto thah nahin to tengu jongleh, nanghon kikhoppi theng nanei diu, natoh imacha natoh lou dingu ahi;" 
Numbers28:27 Amavang Pakai henga gimnamtui hidinga govam thilto natodiu; bongchal gol ni, kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou sagi nato dingu ahi;" 
Numbers28:28 Chule a-anneh thilto diu chu changbongnel thao toh kihal hiding, bongchal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopthum, kelngoichal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopni," 
Numbers28:29 Kelngoi sagiho jouse dinga chu kelngoinou khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopkhat hiding ahi. 
Numbers28:30 Chule nangma longlhen bolna dinga kelchaho nou khat nato dingu ahi. 
Numbers28:31 Jomjing govam thilto le, a-anneh thilto-u (hicheho chu nolna beihel hidiu,) chule adonding thilto hou tilouva jong hicheho chu nato diu ahi." 
Numbers29:1 Chule lhasagi channa, hiche lha nimasa nileh nanghon kikhoppi theng khat nanei diu; natoh imacha natohlou diu ahi; hichu nangho dinga sumkon ho mut nikho ahi." 
Numbers29:2 Chule nanghon Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga govam thilto nato dingu; bongchal golkhat, Kelngoichal khat, Chule kum khat lhingbep nolna beihel kelngoinou sagi nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:3 Chule a-anneh thilto-u chu thao toh kihal changbongnel hiding; bongchal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopthum, chule kelngoichal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopni hiding," 
Numbers29:4 Kelngoinou sagi ho jouse-a dinga chu kelngoi khat cheh dinga ephah hopsom-a hopkhat khat hiding ahi. 
Numbers29:5 Chule nangma longlhen bolna dinga kelcha nou khat chu chonset thilto-a nato ding ahi. 
Numbers29:6 Lhaseh-a govam thilto le a-anneh thilto, niseh govam thilto le adonding thilto, chule ajatnu dungjuija Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga meija kisem kilhaina tilouva jong, hicheho hi nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:7 Chule nanghon hiche lhasagi channa nisom channi le kikhoppi theng khat nanei diu; chule nanghon nahinnao nasuhgim diu; chule hiche sunga natoh imacha natoh loudiu ahi. 
Numbers29:8 Ahinla nanghon Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga pumgo thilto natodiu, bongchal golkhat,kelngoichal khat, kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou sagi nato dingu ahi. Hicheho chu nolna beihel hidingu ahi." 
Numbers29:9 Chule a-anneh thilto-u chu thao toh kihal changbongnel hiding, bongchal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopthum, chule kelngoichal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopni hiding;" 
Numbers29:10 Kelngoi sagi ho jouse-a dinga chu kelngoinou khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopkhat khat hiding ahi; 
Numbers29:11 Longlhenna chonset thilto leh jomjing pumgo thilto, chule a-anneh thilto le adonding thilto hou tilouva jong, kelchanou khat jong chonset thilto-a nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:12 Chule lhasagi channa nisom le ninga nile kikhoppi theng khat naneidiu; natoh imacha natoh loudiu, Pakai henga ni sagi kut nabol diu ahi." 
Numbers29:13 Chule nanghon Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga meija kisem kilhaina pumgo thilto natodiu, bongchal gol somlethum, kelngoichal ni, kum khatbep kelngoi somleli: hicheho chu nolna beihel cheh hiding ahi." 
Numbers29:14 Chule a-anneh thilto-u chu thao toh kihal changbongnel hiding, bongchal somle thuma dinga chu, bongchal takipma dinga ephah hopsom-a hopthum, kelngoichal ni-a dinga chu kelngoichal khatna dinga ephah hopsom-a hopni hiding," 
Numbers29:15 Chule kelngoi somleli ho jouse-a dinga chu kelngoinou khat dinga ephah hopsom-a hopkhat cheh hidingu ahi; 
Numbers29:16 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto, a-anneh thilto-u le adonding thilto-u tilouva jong, kelngoiho noukhat chonset thilto-a nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:17 Chule anini lhin nile nanghon bongchal gol somleni, kelngoi chal ni, kumkhat bep nolna beihel kelngoi nou somleli nato diu ahi." 
Numbers29:18 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelngoichal ho-a ding, kelngoichal hole kelngoinou ho-a ding, ajatnu dungjuija angaina dungjuija, a-anneh thilto-u le adonding thilto-u nato dingu ahi;" 
Numbers29:19 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u, chule adonding athilto-u tilouva jong, kelcha ho nou khat chu chonset thilto-a nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:20 Chule anithum nile bongchal somlekhat, kelngoichal ni, chule nolna beihel kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou somleli nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:21 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelngoi chalho-a ding, chule kelngoiho-a dinga ajatnu dungjuija, angaina dungjuija, a-anneh thilto-u le adonding thilto-u nato dingu;" 
Numbers29:22 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u, chule adonding athilto-u tilouva jong, chonset thilto-a dinga kelcha khat hiding ahi." 
Numbers29:23 Chule anili nile bongchal som, kelngoi chal ni, chule nolna beihel kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou somleli nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:24 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelchal ho-a ding, chule kelngoiho-a dinga ajatnu dungjuija angaina banga, a-anneh thilto-u le adonding athilto-u nato dingu;" 
Numbers29:25 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u chule adonding athilto-u tilouva jong, kelchaho nou khat chonset thilto-a apehdingu ahi." 
Numbers29:26 Chule ani nga nile bongchal ko, kelngoichal ni, chule apolkom beihel kum khat lhingbep kelngoinou somleli nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:27 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelngoi chal ho-a ding, chule kelngoi nou ho-a dinga chu, amaho ajatnu dungjui le angaina banga a-anneh thilto-u le adonding athilto-u nato dingu;" 
Numbers29:28 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u, chuleh adonding athilto-u tilouva jong, chonset thilto dinga kelcha khat nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:29 Chule anigup nile bongchal get, kelngoichal ni, chule nolna bei kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou somleli nato dingu;" 
Numbers29:30 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelngoichal ho-a ding, chule kelngoinou ho-a dinga chu amaho jat dungjui le angaina banga a-anneh thilto-u leh adonding thilto-u nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:31 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u, chule adonding athilto-u tilouva jong, chonset thilto dinga kelngoi khat nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:32 Chule ani sagi lhin nile bongchal sagi, kelngoichal ni, chule nolna beihel kumkhat lhingbep kelngoinou sagi nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:33 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelngoichal ho-a ding, chule kelngoinou ho-a ding, ajatnu dungjuija leh angaina banga, a-anneh-u thilto-u le adonding thilto-u nato dingu;" 
Numbers29:34 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u chule adonding athilto-u tilouva jong, chonset thilto dinga kelcha khat nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:35 Aniget nile kikhoppi loupitah khat naneidiu; hiche sunga nanghon natoh imacha natoh loudiu ahi. 
Numbers29:36 Ahin Pakai henga gimnamtui tah hidinga, meija kisem kilhaina govam thilto natodiu; bongchal khat, kelngoichal khat, nolna beihel kelngoi sagi kumkhat lhingbep nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:37 Chule bongchal ho-a ding, kelngoichal ho-a ding, chule kelngoinou ho-a dinga amaho jat dungjuile angaina banga a-anneh thilto-u leh donding athilto-u nato dingu;" 
Numbers29:38 Chule jomjing pumgo thilto le a-anneh thilto-u, chule adonding thilto-u tilouva jong, chonset thilto dinga kelcha khat nato dingu ahi." 
Numbers29:39 Chule nakitep nahou, nalung cham thilto hou, napumgo thilto houding, na anneh thilto hou ding, nadon ding nathilto hou ding, nachamna thilto hou ding tilouva jong, hicheng hi Pakaiya dinga na kut houva chu nabol dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers29:40 Chuin Mosi'n Pakaiyin athupeh jouse dungjuijin Israel chate henga aseitan ahi. 
Numbers30:1 Chuin Mosi'n phung lamkai ho jah-a, Israel chate chungchang thudol aseijin, hitin ati; Hichehi Pakai thupeh ahi." 
Numbers30:2 Mikhattou Pakai henga kitepna khatna akitepma, ahiloule ahinna kikanna dinga kihahselna khatna akihahsela ahile, athusei chu apalkeh louding, akama aseidoh dungjuija atohding ahi." 
Numbers30:3 Numei khattou Pakai henga kitepna khatna akitepma, anungah laija apa in'a ana umlaija, kikanna khatna amanu akikana;" 
Numbers30:4 Chule apan akitepna le ahinna kikan nadinga akikan nachu ajah-a, apan amanu athipsan jeng ahile; akitepna jouse chu ding jing ding ahin, chule ahinna anakanna akihahselna jouse jong chu ding jing ding ahi." 
Numbers30:5 Amavang apachun ajah nikho-a chu ajahda-a ahile; amanu kitepna ho, ahiloule ahinna kikan nadinga akikannaho chu dinglou ding ahi; chule apan ajahda jeh-a, Pakaiyin amanu chu angaidam ding ahi." 
Numbers30:6 Chule amanu akitepet ahiloule amanun ahina akana dia akamsunga thu hungpotdoh laija chu jinei ahitah-a; 
Numbers30:7 Chule hichu ajipan ajah-a, chule ajah nikho-a chu amanu ana thipsanna ahile; amanu kitepnaho chu ding jing ding; chule ahinna kikana dinga akihahsel naho chu ding ding ahi." 
Numbers30:8 Ahinla ajipan hichu ajahdoh nikho-a ajahda-a ahile, amanu kitepna khatna anakitepna, chule ahinna akikana akamsunga kona thu hungpot doh ho chu asuhmang pehding; Pakaiyin amanu chu angaidam ding ahi." 
Numbers30:9 Amavang meithai le akidasa numei jin ahinna kikan nadinga akitepna tapou chu amanu chunga ding jing ding ahi. 
Numbers30:10 Chule amanu chu ajipa in'a kitep ahia, ahiloule ahinna chu kihahsel na-a akan ahi-a," 
Numbers30:11 Chule ajipan hichu ajah-a, amanu athip sana, ajahda louva ahile, akitepna jouse chu dingjing ding, ahinna kikan nadinga akihahselna takip chu ding jing ding ahi." 
Numbers30:12 Ahinla ajipan hiho chu ajahdoh nikho-a ajah da-a ahile; akitepna thudola akama kona potchan, ahiloule ahinna kikana thudol chu dinglou ding ahi. A-inneipun ajahda ahin, Pakaiyin amanu angaidam ding ahi." 
Numbers30:13 Kitepna tapou le ahinna sugentheina dinga kikana tapou chu ajipan aphudet thei, ahiloule asuhmang thei ahi." 
Numbers30:14 Amavang a-inneipun ani ania amanu henga chu imacha seilouva auma ahile; amanu akitepnaho le amanu chunga akikana jouse chu aphudet peh ahi. Amapan hicheho chu ajahdoh nikho-a athipsan jeh-a chu, hicheho chu anamdet ahi." 
Numbers30:15 Ahinla amapan hicheho ajahdoh nunga asuhmanga ahile; amapan amanu chonsetna chu akipoh ding ahi. 
Numbers30:16 Hicheho hi Pakaiyin Mosi ana thupeh, pasal le a-inneipi kikah-a, chule amanu khangdong ahilai, apa in'a aumlaija amanu le apa kikah-a dinga chondan apeh chu ahi." 
Numbers31:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati,." 
Numbers31:2 Midia mite chunga Israel chate phu lanlang, chujouteng na mite toh gopkhoma naum ding ahitai." 
Numbers31:3 Chuin Mosi'n mipi ho henga chun aseijin, hitin ati; Nangho lah-a mi phabep galsat dingin galvon kivonu henlang, Midia mite doudin cheohen, chule Midia mite chungah Pakai phuba galao hen." 
Numbers31:4 Israel phung jouse-a kon, phung khatna kon sangkhat cheh chu galkon dinga nasol dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers31:5 Hitichun Israel sangtamtah ho lah-a konin phung khatna kon sangkhat cheh, galkon dinga galvon kivon mi sangsom le sangni alhengdoh taovin ahi." 
Numbers31:6 Chuin Mosi'n amaho chu manchah thengtah hole mutding sumkon ho chu akhutnuva akichoisah-in, chule Israelte phungtina sangkhat cheh le Eleazar thempu chapa Phinehas chu galsat din asoltan ahi." 
Numbers31:7 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bang chun, amahon Midia mite asat taovin; chule pasal jouse athat taovin ahi." 
Numbers31:8 Chuin adang athahou tilouvin jong amahon Midia leng ngaho athatnun, amaho chu: Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur chule Reba ahiuve. Beor chapa Balaam jong chu chemjamin athatnun ahi." 
Numbers31:9 Chuin Israel chate chun Midia numei ho le achasen hou jouse gal hingin ahin kaijun ahi, chule agancha hou jouse, akelngoi hou jouse, chule athilkeo jouseu ahin chomun ahi." 
Numbers31:10 Chuin amahon achennao khopi jouse le akulpiu phatah ho jouse chu meijin ahal lha uvin ahi. 
Numbers31:11 Chuin amahon galthil achom jouseu, mihem le ganhing agomin apui taovin ahi." 
Numbers31:12 Chuin amahon gal hinga kiman jouse le thil achomdoh hou jouse chu Mosi le Eleazar thempupa, chule Israel chate houkhom ho henga Jericho naija um, Jordan pang Moab phaichama gebuh-ah ahinpui taovin ahi." 
Numbers31:13 Chuin Mosi le Eleazar thempupa, chule houkhom ho lah-a lamkai pipuiho chu amaho kimupi din gebuh pama apotdoh-un ahi." 
Numbers31:14 Chuin galmuna kona hung janel lamkaiho, sepai asang sang lamkai ho, chule aja aja chunga lamkai ho chunga chun Mosi alunghang tan ahi." 
Numbers31:15 Chuin Mosi'n amaho henga, Nanghon numei ho jouse hi hinghoi nahiuvem?" 
Numbers31:16 Veovin, hiche numei ho hin Balaam thumopma kona Israel chate hi Peor chungchanga Pakai douna asuhkhel sah-u ahin, chule Pakai houkhom ho lah-a chu hise analanga ahi." 
Numbers31:17 Hijeh chun tun chapangho lah-a pasal takip chu thatnun lang, chule numei takip pasal toh lupkhom kha jouse chu thatnun," 
Numbers31:18 Amavang numei chapang jouse, pasal toh lumkhom khalou jouse chu nangho-a dingin hinghoijun;" 
Numbers31:19 Chule nangho gebuh pama ni sagi naum dingu: koi hijongleh mi that tapou, chule koi hijongle mithilong tongkha tapou chu, nangho le nami mat hou agoma nithum ni leh ni sagi ni-a naki suhtheng dingu ahi." 
Numbers31:20 Chule navon jouseu, savuna kisem jouse, kelmulla kisem jouse, chule thinga kisem jouse chu sutheng uvin, ati." 
Numbers31:21 Chuin Eleazar thempupan galsatna che galsat miho henga chun, Hichehi Pakaiyin Mosi henga athupeh danthua chondan ahi;" 
Numbers31:22 Sana, dangka, sum-eng, thih, tin chule ngen hobou," 
Numbers31:23 Meija katheilou thil jouse chu nanghon meija nahal diu, chuteng hichu atheng hiding ahi. Hijeng jongle kisekhena twija suhtheng hiding ahi. Chule mei kahthei jouse chu twija nadediu ahi," 
Numbers31:24 Chule nanghon napon hou chu ani sagi nile nasop theng diu, chuteng atheng nahi dingu ahitai. Chujou tengle nangho gebuh-a nahung lut dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers31:25 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati,." 
Numbers31:26 Nangmale Eleazar thempupa, chule houkhom ho lah-a lamkai pipuihon, galla kichom doh chu mihem hihen sa hijongle ajat simtoh-un." 
Numbers31:27 Chule galsat dinga galmuna konho le houkhom ho jouse kah-ah galthil chu hopnin hoppeh-un: 
Numbers31:28 Chule galsat dinga galmuna konho-a konin Pakaiya dingin kai dongun; mihem'a kon, bongchal ho-a kon, sangan ho-a kon, chule kelngoi ho-a konin agomun janga lah-a khatcheh laovin;" 
Numbers31:29 Pakaiya lhuh thilto dingin, akehkhat chu lanlang, Eleazar thempupa chu pen." 
Numbers31:30 Chule Israel chate chan akeh khatna konin, somnga lah-a konin khat ladoh-un lang, mihem'a kon, bongchal ho-a kon, sangan ho-a kon, kelngoiho-a kon, gamsa jouse-a konin laovin lang, chule Pakai houbuh chingtup-a pang Levi ho henga peuvin." 
Numbers31:31 Chuin Mosi le Eleazar thempupan Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun abol lhontan ahi. 
Numbers31:32 Chule galsat mihon ahinlah-u galthil kichomho simlouvin, kelngoi chu sangjagup toh sangsomsagi le sangnga ahin," 
Numbers31:33 Bong sangsomsagi le sangni," 
Numbers31:34 Sangan sangsomgup le sangkhat," 
Numbers31:35 Chule pasal to kitimat khalou numei chu sangsomthum le sangni ahi. 
Numbers31:36 Chule akeh khat, galsatna konho chan chu: kelngoi sangjathum le sangsomthum le sangsagi le janga ahin;" 
Numbers31:37 Chule Pakaiya dinga kelngoi kai kipe chu jagup le somsagi le nga ahi. 
Numbers31:38 Chule bongchal ho chu sangsomthum le sanggup ahin; hicheho lah-a kona Pakaiya dinga kai kipe chu somsagi le ni ahi. 
Numbers31:39 Chule sangan ho chu sangsomthum le janga ahin; Pakaiya dinga kai kipe chu somgup le khat ahi. 
Numbers31:40 Chule mihem chu sangsom le sanggup ahin; hicheng lah-a Pakaiya dinga kai kipe chu mi somthum le ni ahi. 
Numbers31:41 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun, Pakaiya lhuh thilpeh kai chu Mosi'n Eleazar thempupa apetan ahi." 
Numbers31:42 Chule Israel chate chan akehkhat, galsatna konho lah-a kona Mosi'n ahopkhenho chu;" 
Numbers31:43 (Tun houkhom ho chan akeh khatna chu: kelngoi sangjathum le sangsomthum le sangsagi to janga ahin," 
Numbers31:44 Chule bongchal sangsomthum le gup," 
Numbers31:45 Chule sangan sangsomthum le janga," 
Numbers31:46 Chule mihem sangsom le sang gup ahi.) 
Numbers31:47 Israel chate-a chan akeh khatna konin, Mosi'n mihem le gancha agomin somnga-a khat alan, chule Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun Pakai houbuh ngahtup Levi miho chu apen ahi." 
Numbers31:48 Chuin janel asang sangho chunga lamkai, asang sang lamkaiho le, ajaja lamkaihon, Mosi ahin naijun," 
Numbers31:49 Chuin amahon Mosi henga, Nasoh keihon mi keiho mopohna noija um galsat miho sese kasimun ahile, mi khatcha akisam aumpoi." 
Numbers31:50 Hijeh chun amitakip min Pakai henga thilpeh dingin kanei hou, sana-a kisem kijepna ho, sumguiho, chaoho, khutjemho, bilbaho, chule khiho Pakai anga kahinna uva dinga longlhenna bolna dingin kahin choijun ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers31:51 Chuin Mosi le Eleazar thempupa chun amaho-a konin sana jouse, sana-a kisem kijepna jouse ala lhontan ahi." 
Numbers31:52 Chule Pakaiya dinga asangsang lamkaiho le ajaja lamkaihon apehdoh-u thilpeh sanaho jouse chu, shekel sangsom le sanggup toh jasagi le somnga ahi." 
Numbers31:53 (Ajehchu galkon miho amitakip min ama ding cheh-a thil ahin kichomu ahi.) 
Numbers31:54 Chuin Mosi le Eleazar thempupan asangsang lamkai ho le jalamkai ho sana chu ala lhonin, Pakai angsunga Israel chate-a dinga melchihna khat hidingin, houkhom ho houbuh sunga achoilut lhontan ahi."
