Numbers32:1 Tun Reuben chate le Gad chate chun gancha atama tam aneijun: chule amahon Jazer gam le Gilead gam amuphatnun, veuvin, amun chu gancha vahna dinga mun phatah ahijeh-in," 
Numbers32:2 Gad chate chule Reuben chate chu ahungun, Mosi le Eleazer thempupa, chule houkhom lamkai pipuiho henga aseijun, hitin atiuve," 
Numbers32:3 Ataroth, Dibon, Jezer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Shebam, Nebo chule Beon," 
Numbers32:4 Pakaiyin Israel houkhom ho masang tah-a anasuhmang gamhi gancha vahna dinga phatah ahin; nasoh houhin gancha kaneijun ahi: 
Numbers32:5 Hijeh chun amahon, Keiho namitmu-a lungsetna kachan uva ahile, hiche gam hi nasohte lo dingin nei pedoh jengun, chule keiho Jordan gal lama neipuilut da taovin, atiuvin ahi." 
Numbers32:6 Chuin Mosi'n Gad chate le Reuben chate jah-a chun, Nasopi ho gal kona cheova, nangho hilaija hi natou thim dingu ham?" 
Numbers32:7 Chule ibola nanghon Israel chate chu Pakaiyin apehnao gam agalkai diuva kona nalung lhahsah uham? 
Numbers32:8 Kadesh-bernea'a kona agam vedinga kasolai chun napateu vin hitihin anabolun ahi. 
Numbers32:9 Ajehchu amaho Eshcol phaichama acheuva, agam agamu-u chun, amahon Israel chate chu Pakaiyin apehnao gama alut louna diuvin alunglhah sah-un ahi." 
Numbers32:10 Chuin Pakai lunghanna chu hiche pet chun ahung koudohtan, chule ama akihah sellin, hitin ati." 
Numbers32:11 Thonlouva Egypt gama kona hungdoh miho kumsom ni-a lhah chunglamse koimachan keiman Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga kanatep gam chu amutheilou dingu ahi, ajehchu amahon eijui bulhing pouve;" 
Numbers32:12 Kenez mi Jephunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tilou; ajehchu amanin Pakai ajui bukim lhonin ahi. 
Numbers32:12 Kenez mi Jephunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tilou; ajehchu amanin Pakai ajui bukim lhonin ahi. 
Numbers32:13 Chuin Pakai lunghanna chu Israel chate chunga akoudoh tan, Pakai mitmu-a thilse bolho khang jouse chu abeisoh kahsen amaho chu gamthipma kum somli avavai sah-in ahi." 
Numbers32:14 Chule veuvin, chonset punna mite, Israel chunga Pakai lunghan punbesah nadingin, nangho napateu khelin nahung kisepdoh-un ahi." 
Numbers32:15 Ajehchu nangho ama najuinaova kona nakihei manguva ahile, aman amaho hi gamthipma adalhah kit ding, chule nanghon hiche miho jouse hi nasuh mangdiu ahi, ati." 
Numbers32:16 Chuin amahon ama ahin naijun, Keihon hilaija hi kagancha ho hongding le kachateu ho-a ding khopiho chu kasahdiu:" 
Numbers32:17 Amavang keiho tah hi Israel chate cheng achen nadiu gamsunga kapuilut kahseuva amasanguva manchah puma kigosa kachediu ahi: chule agama cheng miho jeh-a hi kachateu kul kikai khum khopiho-a kachen sahdiu ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers32:18 Israel chate amichang cheh-in aloding cheh-u alo kahseuva keiho ka in'uva kahung kile loudiu ahi. 
Numbers32:19 Ijeh inem itile keihon amaho toh Jordan gallang, ahiloule akal lam chu kalokhom loudiu ahi; ajeh chu keiho gamloding chu hilam Jordan solamsang ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers32:20 Chuin Mosi'n amaho henga, Hitobang thil hi nabol uva, Pakai angsunga galsatna nakon uva," 
Numbers32:21 Chule Pakaiyin amelmate a-angsung kona adelmang kahse-a, nangho galvon kivon jouse Pakai angsunga Jordan nagal kaijuva," 
Numbers32:22 Chule Pakai angsung tah-a agam chu suhnema auma ahile; chujouteng chule nangho nakinungle uva, chule nangho Pakai angle Israelte anga themona bei nahi dingu; chule agam chu Pakai angsunga nangho loding hiding ahi." 
Numbers32:23 Ahinla nanghon hitia chu nabol lou uva ahile, veuvin, nangho Pakai douna-a chonse nahiuvin, thonlouva nachonset nao chun nahin holdoh dingu ahi." 
Numbers32:24 Nachasen teo dingin khopi saovin lang, nakelngoi houva din kelngoi hong saovin, hitichun nakam muva thupot dungjui chun bollun, ati." 
Numbers32:25 Chuin Gad chate le Reuben chate chun Mosi henga, ka Pakai thupeh banga nasohten kabol dingu ahi." 
Numbers32:26 Kachasen hou, ka-inneipiteu, kakelngoi hon hou, chule kagancha hou, hiche Gilead khopiho sunga umdingu ahin," 
Numbers32:27 Ahin ka pakai pa seibanga, nasohte amitakip galsat dinga galvon kivon chengse, galsatna Pakai angsunga kache dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers32:28 Hijeh chun amaho chung thua hin Mosi'n Eleazar thempupa le Nun chapa Joshua, chule Israel chate phung lamkai ho thu apen:" 
Numbers32:28 Hijeh chun amaho chung thua hin Mosi'n Eleazar thempupa le Nun chapa Joshua, chule Israel chate phung lamkai ho thu apen:" 
Numbers32:29 Chule Mosi'n amaho jah-a, Gad chate le Reuben chate hi nangho toh Pakai angsunga amitakip galvon akivon uva, Jordan agalkaijuva, gamchu namasanguva suhnema auma ahileh; chuteng nanghon Gilead gam chu amaho lodinga napeh dingu ahi." 
Numbers32:30 Ahin amaho galvon puma nangho toh agalkai khom lou uva ahile, amahon Canaan gama nangho lah-a loding anei dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers32:31 Chuin Gad chatele Reuben chate chun adonbutnun, Pakaiyin nasohte henga asei banga chu keihon kabol dingu ahi." 
Numbers32:32 Kachan dingu kagoulo diu chu Jordan hilamsang ahitheina dinga keiho galvon kivon puma Pakai angsunga Canaan gamsunga kagalkai dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Numbers32:33 Chuin Mosi'n Amor mite lengpa Sihon gam le Bashan lengpa Og gam, agamgi sunga khopi ho, gamsung kimvella khopiho chu Gad chate, Reuben chate chule Joseph chapa Manasseh phung akehkhat hochu apetai." 
Numbers32:34 Chuin Gad chate chun Dibon, Ataroth le Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Chule Atroth, Shophan, Jazer le Jogbehah," 
Numbers32:36 Beth-nimrah chule Beth-haran, kul kikai khum khopiho, chule kelngoi hongho asadoh-un ahi." 
Numbers32:37 Chule Reuben chaten Heshbon, Elealeh le Kirjathaim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baal-meon (amin ho kikhela ahitai,) chule Shibmah khopiho asadoh-un, chule amahon asahdoh-u khopiho chu minchom asah-un ahi." 
Numbers32:39 Chuin Manasseh chapa Machir chate hochu Gilead'a acheuvin, agalaovin, chule asunga um Amor miho chu anodoh-un ahi." 
Numbers32:40 Chuin Mosi'n Gilead chu Manasseh chapa Michir apen, ama chua achengtan ahi." 
Numbers32:41 Chuin Manasseh chapa Jair chu achen, chua khopi neoho chu alan, chule hicheho chu Havoth-Jair asahtai." 
Numbers32:42 Chule Nobah achen Kenath le chua kho neoho chu alan, ama min aputsah-in, Nobah asahtan ahi." 
Numbers33:1 Hicheng hi Mosi le Aaron khut noija Israel chate asepai ho toh Egypt gama kona akholjin nao chu ahi. 
Numbers33:2 Chule Mosi'n Pakai thupeh-a konin akholjin nao dungjuijin achedoh nao asunne: chule hicheng hi achedoh nau dungjuija akholjinu chu ahi. 
Numbers33:3 Chuin Ramases'a konin alha masapen nisomle ninga channa lha masapen, kalchuh kut ni ajingin Israel chate chu Egypt miho jouse mitmun khut thahat tah-in ahung kitoldoh taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:4 Ajehchu Egypt miho chun achateu apeng masapen jouse Pakaiyin athaho chu avuijun, a-pathenhou chunga jong Pakaiyin thu atan ahi." 
Numbers33:5 Chuin Israel chate chu Ramseses'a konin ahung kitoldoh-un, Succoth'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:6 Chuin amaho Succoth'a konin akipat doh-un gamthip monglha Ethama gebuh akisonuve. 
Numbers33:7 Chuin amaho Etham'a konin akipat doh-un, Baal-Zephon maija um Pi-hahiroth lamma akile heijun, Migdol'a gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:8 Chuin amaho Pi-hahiroth maija chun akipat doh-un, dillen lah-a achepeh-un, gamthipma chun alutnun, hitichun amaho Etham gamthipma chun nithum akitolun, chuin Marah'a gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:9 Chuin Marah'a konin akipat doh-un, Elim'a ahung lutnun, Elim'a chun twinah somleni le lusu phung somsagi aumin, hia chun amahon gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:10 Chuin amaho Elima konin ahung kipatdoh-un, twipisan panga gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:11 Chuin amaho twipisan panga konin akipat doh-un, Sin gamthipma gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:12 Chuin amaho Sin gamthipma konin akitolun, Dophkah'a gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:13 Chuin amaho Dophkah'a konin akipat doh-un, Alush'a gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:14 Chuin amaho Alush'a konin akichonun, mipi ho donding twi umlouna mun Rephidim'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:15 Chuin amaho Rephidim'a konin akipat doh-un, Sinai gamthipma chun gebuh akison taovin ahi." 
Numbers33:16 Chuin Sinai nelphaija konin akichonun, Kibroth-hatta-avah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:17 Chuin amaho Kibroth-hatta-avah'a konin akipat doh-un, Hezeroth'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:18 Chule amaho Hazeroth na konin akipat doh-un, Rithmah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:19 Chuin amaho Rithmah'a konin akipat doh-un, Rimmon-parez'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:20 Chuin Rimmon-parez'a konin akipat doh-un, Libnah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:21 Chuin Libnah'a konin akichonun, Rissah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:22 Chuin Rissah'a konin akitollun, Kehelathah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:23 Chuin Kehelathah'a konin achekitnun, Shapher molsanga gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:24 Chuin Shapher molsanga konin akitolun, Haradah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:25 Chuin Haradah'a konin akitolun, Makheloth'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:26 Chuin Makheloth'a konin akitolun, Tahath'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:27 Chuin Tahath'a konin akipat doh-un, Tarah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:28 Chuin Tarah'a konin akipat doh-un, Mithkah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:29 Chuin Mithkah'a konin acheuvin, Hashmonah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:30 Chuin Hashmonah'a konin akipat doh-un, Mosiroth'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:31 Chuin Mosiroth'a konin akipat doh-un, Bene-ja-akan'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:32 Chuin Bene-ja-akan'a konin akichonun, Hor-hagidgad'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:33 Chuin Hor-hagidgad'a konin acheuvin, Jotbathah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:34 Chuin Jotbathah'a konin akitolun, Ebronah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:35 Chuin Ebronah'a konin akipatdoh-in, Ezion-gaber'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:36 Chuin Ezion-gaber'a konin akichonun, Kadesh kiti Zin gamthipma chun gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:37 Chuin Kadesh'a konin akichonun, Edom gam monga um Hor molsanga gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:38 Chuin Aaron thempupa chu Pakai thupeh dungjuijin Hor molsang chunga akaltouvin, chuin hia chun Israel chate Egypt gama kona ahungdoh-u kum somli lhinni, lha-nga channa nimasani chun athitan ahi." 
Numbers33:39 Chule Aaron Hor molsang athi chun kum jakhat le somni le thum ahitai. 
Numbers33:40 Chule Canaan lengpa Arad chu Canaan gam lhanglama cheng ahin, Israel chate hung chu ajatan ahi." 
Numbers33:41 Chuin amaho Hor molsanga konin akipat doh-un, Zalmonah'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:42 Chuin Zalmonah'a konin akipat doh-un, Punon'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:43 Chuin Punon'a konin akipat doh-un, Oboth'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:44 Chuin Oboth'a konin akipat doh-un, Moab gamgia Ije-abarim'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:45 Chuin Iim'a konin akipat doh-un, Dibongad mun'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:46 Chuin Dibongad'a konin akichon kitnun, Almon-diblath-aim mun'a gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:47 Chuin Almon-diblath-aim'a konin akichonun, Nebo masanga Abarim molsang ho-a chun gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Numbers33:48 Chuin Abarim molsang ho-a kon chun Moab phaicham Jordan gal Jericho naijah gebuh akisonun ahi. 
Numbers33:49 Chuin Jordan gal Moab phaichama um Beth-jesimoth apat Abel-shittim geichun gebuh akisonun ahi. 
Numbers33:50 Chuin Moab phaicham, Jordan gal, Jericho naija chun Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati,." 
Numbers33:51 Israel chate henga chun seipeh inlang, hitihin seijin, Nangho Jordan nagalkaijuva Canaan gamsung nalhun tenguleh;" 
Numbers33:52 Nanghon namasanguva um agam neiho chu nadeldoh uva, chule amilim hou nasuhmang peh dingu, alim semthu a-pathen hou nasuhmanguva, chule amun thenghou nasuhlhuh diu ahi:" 
Numbers33:53 Chule agama cheng miho chu nadeldoh uva, hia chu nachendiu ahi: ajehchu keiman gam chu nalo dinguva kapeh-u nahi." 
Numbers33:54 Chule nanghon agam chu vang nasan uva na-insung kailhah dungjui cheh-a nakihop dingu ahi. Chule atamte chu natam peh uva, chule alhomte chu nalhom pehdiu: amitakip min avang san dungjui cheh-a mun chu aloding, napu napateu phung dungjuija nalo dingu ahi." 
Numbers33:55 Ahinla nanghon agama cheng miho na masang uva kona nadeldoh louvule, hung hiti ding ahi: nanghon na-umden sahhou chun namit uva dinga moljuma panguva, napang peh uva dinga linga pangdingu, chule nachen nao gama chu nasunoh phah uva hungpang diu ahi." 
Numbers33:56 Chukalvalla jong hung hitiding ahi, amaho chunga boldinga kanagel banga chu nangho chunga kabolding ahi." 
Numbers34:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers34:2 Israel chate thu penlang, chule ajah uva hitin seijin, Nangho Canaan gamsunga nalut tengule, (hichehi nangho lodinga hunglha ding gam chu ahin, Canaan gam agamgi chin hotoh hitha ding ahi)." 
Numbers34:3 Lhanglama nagamgi dingu chu Zin gamthipma pat Edom gamgi chin gei hiding, chule lhanglam sang gamgi chu Chi dil solam among gei hiding ahi." 
Numbers34:4 Chule nagamgiu chu lhanglama Akrabbim kaltouna-a patna hung kiheidoh-a, Zina galkai ding; chule Kadesh-barnea lhanglama chepeh ding, chule Hazar-addar'a cheding, chule Azmon galkai ding ahi." 
Numbers34:5 Chule agamu ngahna chu Azmon'a patna Egypt vadung geija akolding, ahung kikhodoh ho chu twipia kinga ding ahi." 
Numbers34:6 Chule lhumlam gamgi ding chu, agamgi-a dinga twipilen naman diu; hichehi lhumlama nagamgiu hiding ahi." 
Numbers34:7 Chule nangho sahlam gamgi ding chu, twipilen'a kona Hor molsang chan hiding ahi." 
Numbers34:8 Hor molsanga kona nanghon Hamath lutna geichu namelchih peh dingu; nangho gamgi kilhungdoh chu Zedad'a kilhung lutding ahi. 
Numbers34:9 Chule agamgi chu Ziphron geija kilhunga, Hazarenan'a kilhunglut ding; hichu sahlama nagamgiu hiding ahi." 
Numbers34:10 Chule nangho solam gamgi chu Hazarenan'a patna Shepham geija namelchih diu," 
Numbers34:11 Chule gamgi chu Shepham'a pat A-in solam sanga Riblah'a kilhunglha ding, chule agamgi chu kilhungsuh-a, Chinnereth solam dil gei lhungding," 
Numbers34:12 Chule agamgi chu Jordan geija kilhung lha-a, chule akilhungdoh ho Chi twipia kilhunglut ding; hichu nangma gam kimvela nagamgi hiding ahi." 
Numbers34:13 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate thu apen, Hiche gamhi nanghon vang sanna nalodiuva Pakaiyin phung ko hole phung kehkhat ho anapeh chu ahi." 
Numbers34:14 Reuben chate aphung kailhah le apu apateu insung dungjuija, chule Gad chate aphung kailhah le apu apateu insung dungjuija, amahon alodingu gou chu amu-u ahitai, chule Manasseh phung keh khat jong aloding dolu chu changa ahitaove:" 
Numbers34:15 Phung nile phung keh khat hochun achandingu chu Jordan hilamsang, Jericho nai solamsang, nisa sona lamsang amutaovin ahi, ati." 
Numbers34:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati,." 
Numbers34:17 Hichehohi nanghon nalodingu gam nahop khenpeh dinghou min chu: Eleazar thempupa le Nun chapa Joshua ahi. 
Numbers34:17 Hichehohi nanghon nalodingu gam nahop khenpeh dinghou min chu: Eleazar thempupa le Nun chapa Joshua ahi. 
Numbers34:18 Chule nangman nalodiu gam hopkhen peh dinga aphung takipma kona pipui khat cheh nalhendoh dingu ahi. 
Numbers34:19 Amaho min chu hiche hi ahi: Judah phunga Jephunneh chapa Caleb; 
Numbers34:20 Simeon chate phunga, Ammihud chapa Shemuel;" 
Numbers34:21 Benjamin phunga kona Chislon chapa Elidad; 
Numbers34:22 Chule Dan chate phung lamkai Jogli chapa Bukki; 
Numbers34:23 Joseph chate phung lamkai, Manasseh chate phunga dingin, Ephod chapa Hanniel;" 
Numbers34:24 Chule Ephraim chate aphung lamkai, Shiphtan chapa Kemuel;" 
Numbers34:25 Chule Zebulun chate phung lamkai, Parnach chapa Elizaphan;" 
Numbers34:26 Chule Issachar chate phung lamkai, Azzan chapa Paltiel;" 
Numbers34:27 Chule Asher chate phung lamkai, Shelomi chapa Ahihud;" 
Numbers34:28 Chule Naphtali chate phung lamkai, Ammihud chapa Pedahel ahi." 
Numbers34:29 Hichehohi Pakaiyin Canaan gama Israel chate gouchan hoppeh dinga athupeh hochu ahi. 
Numbers35:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Moab phaicham Jordan gal Jericho naija chun Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati." 
Numbers35:2 Israel chate chu agou chanhou lah-a kona Levi miho chen nading khopi apeh nadingun thu pen, chule nanghon Levi miho chu khopiho kimvela gam op-ho chu napeh dingu ahi." 
Numbers35:3 Chule khopiho chu achenna dingu hintin, chule agam op-hou chu agancha hou, athilkeu hou, aganhing hou jouse-a ding hiding ahi." 
Numbers35:4 Chule nanghon Levi miho napeh dingu gam op-ho chu, khopi kulbanga pat polam tong sangkhat kimvel hiding ahi." 
Numbers35:5 Chule khopiho pamlam chu nate dingu, solam sanga tong sangni, lhanglam sanga tong sangni, lhumlam sanga tong sangni, chule chunglam sanga tong sangni hiding, akhopi chu alailunga umding, hichehohi amaho dinga khopiho gam-op hiding ahi." 
Numbers35:6 Chule nangman Levi miho napehding khopiho lah-a chu hoidohna khopi gup, tolthatpa jamlutna dinga nalhendoh ding; chule amaho dinga khopi somlileni nabedingu ahi." 
Numbers35:7 Chitia chu Levi miho napeh dingu khopiho jouse chu khopi somlileget hiding, amaho chu agam op-toh napehtha diu ahi." 
Numbers35:8 Chule nanghon napeh diu khopiho chu Israel chate losa ho-a kon hiding; atam neiho-a kona natampeh diu, alhom neiho-a kona nalhom pehdiu: amitakip min Levi miho chu analo akhopihou dungjui cheh-a apeh dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers35:9 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi henga thu aseijin, hitin ati,." 
Numbers35:10 Israel chate henga thu seijin lang, ajah uva, Nangho Jordan gal Canaan gamsung nahung galkai tengule," 
Numbers35:11 Nanghon nangho dinga hoidohna khopi dinga khopiho na kilhendoh diu; chutia chu kiningman louva khattou tolthatna chu chulama jamthei ding ahi. 
Numbers35:12 Chule hicheho chu nangho-a dinga phula dingho-a kona nahoidohna diu hiding; houkhom ho thutanna anga adin tokahse-a mithat chu athi louna ding hiding ahi. 
Numbers35:13 Chule nanghon napehdiu khopi holah-a kona gup chu nangho dinga hoidohna hiding ahi. 
Numbers35:14 Nanghon Jordan hilam sanga khopi thum napeh uva, Canaan gamsunga khopi thum napeh diu; hichu hoidohna khopi ho hiding ahi." 
Numbers35:15 Hicheng khopi gup chu, Israel chate le namdang hoding, chule alah uva khopemdenho agomuva dinga hoidohna hiding, kiningman louva tolthat chan chulama jamthei ahi." 
Numbers35:16 Chule aman thih manchah khatna amachu avoh-a, athitah-a ahile, ama chu tolthat ahitan; tolthat chu thatei teiding ahi." 
Numbers35:17 Chule athina theija, aman songa asekhah-a, athitah-a ahile, ama chu tolthat ahitan; tolthat chu thatei tei ding ahi." 
Numbers35:18 Ahiloule aman thina khopma thing manchah khutchoi khatna avoh-a, ama athi tah-a ahile, ama chu tolthat ahintan; tolthat chu thatei teiding ahi." 
Numbers35:19 Thisan phulapa amatah chun tolthatpa athading; aman ama chu amu mule atha ding ahi. 
Numbers35:20 Ahinla muda mana asotlhuh ham, ahiloule achanlhih-a thilkhat touva asea, athitah-a ahile," 
Numbers35:21 Ahiloule kidouna jeh-a akhutna avoh-a, ama athitah le; ama vopenpa chu thatei teiding ahi. Ajehchu ama tolthat ahitan: thisan phulapa chun amuteng le atha ding ahi." 
Numbers35:22 Ahinla aman amachu kidouna beija hetman louva asotlhuh ham, ahiloule changlhi louva ama chunga thil khattou asekhuma ahile," 
Numbers35:23 Ahiloule mikhat thinathei khop song khat touva amapa chu mulouva asekhah-a, ama athitah-a; ahia ama chu akidoupi jong hilou chule suhgenthei dia jong ahol hilou ahile," 
Numbers35:24 Houkhom ho chun mithat pale thisan phulapa kikah-a thutanna dan dungjuija thu atan dingu ahi. 
Numbers35:25 Chule houkhom ho chun mi thatpa chu thisan phulapa khutna kona ahuhdoh uva, houkhom ho chun ama chu ajamna hoidohna khopi-a chu agathah diu; chule ama chukoma chu thaotheng kinu thempu chungnungpa thi kahse-a umjing ding ahi." 
Numbers35:26 Ahinla tolthat pa chu ajamna lam, ahoidohna khopi gamgi pam polama, ahungpotdoh khah-a;" 
Numbers35:27 Chule thisan phulapa chun hoidohna khopi polama amapa chu amua, thisan phulapan mithatpa chu atha-a ahile; amachu thisana themmo chang louding ahi." 
Numbers35:28 Ajehchu ama hoidohna khopi sunga chu thempu chungnung thi tokahse-a umthim behding ahin, thempu chungnung thi nung teng vangle mithatpa chu alosa agam sunga hung kinung lekit ding ahi." 
Numbers35:29 Chutichun hicheng jousehi nangho dinga nakhang khanguva, nachena mun jouseuva chondan hiding ahi." 
Numbers35:30 Koi hijongle mi khattou thatna aumle tolthatpa chu ahetoh ho kama kona thajeng ding ahi. Ahinla mikhattou thana dinga achunga hettohsah khatnin photchena aneilou ding ahi. 
Numbers35:31 Chukal vallin nanghon thinakhop hella mochang tolthat chu lhatdohna dinga kilhatdohna nalah lou dingu ahi, ajehchu ama chu thatei teiding joh ahi." 
Numbers35:32 Chule hoidohna kulpi-a jampa chu thempupa thikah-a, gamsunga chengdia ahung kile theina dinga, ama dinga kilhatdohna nalah theilou diu ahi." 
Numbers35:33 Hitia chu nanghon nachen nao gam chu nasuh boh loudiu, thisan jeh-a gam chu boh-a ahin; thisan lonna gam chu kisutheng joulou ahin; amavang thisan sopa thisana bou kisutheng thei ahi." 
Numbers35:34 Hijeh chun nachena diu gam, keima chenna chu suboh hih-un: ajehchu keima Pakai Israel chate lah-a cheng jinga chu kahi." 
Numbers36:1 Chuin Gilead chate insung mi upaho, Machir chapa Manasseh chapa Joseph chapate insung miho chun, Mosi angle lamkai ho anga, Israel chate upaho masang ahin naijun, aseitaovin ahi:" 
Numbers36:2 Chuin amahon, Chaten vang sanna alodiu gam chu pedingin Pakaiyin ka pakai thu anapen; chule kasopipa Zelophehad gouchan chu achanute pehdingin ka pakai hi Pakaiyin ana thupeh tai." 
Numbers36:3 Tun amaho chu Israel chate phung dangho chatetoh kicheng tale, agou loding hou chu kapa tehouva kona kiladoh-a amaho kichenpi phungho gouchan chuto kigoppeh ding ahin; chutia chu vang dungjuija kagou chanuva kona kiladoh ding ahitai;" 
Numbers36:4 Chule Israel chate Jubilee ahunghi tengle, amaho gouchu amahon akichenpiu phungho gou chutoh kigop thading ahitan; chutia chu amaho gou chu kapu kapatehou phungho goulah-a kona kiladoh ding ahitai, atiuve." 
Numbers36:5 Chuin Mosi'n Israel chate chu Pakai thupeh dungjuijin thu apen, hitin ati, Joseph chapateho phungin aseiju chu adih lheh-e." 
Numbers36:6 Zelophehad chanuho chungchanga Pakaiyin thu apeh chu hitihi ahi, Amaho pha asah penpenu chutoh kichengu hen, ahinla apu apateu phung sunga ho kichen piu hen:" 
Numbers36:7 Chuti chu Israel chate gouchan chu phung khatna kona phung khatna kichon lele louding ahi; ajehchu Israel chate tapou chun amatah-in apu apatehou gou chu anga dingu ahi. 
Numbers36:8 Chule chanu tapou, Israel chate sung koiphung hitale gouloa chun, hiche apa phung insung khatna chu inneipi hiding, hitia chu Israel chate takip min apu apateu gou chu alothei dingu ahi." 
Numbers36:9 Gou chu phung khatna kona phung khatna kichon lele louding; amavang Israel chate phung khat cheh chun ama ama gou akinga dingu ahi, ati." 
Numbers36:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh bangchun Zelophehad chanute chun abol taove; 
Numbers36:11 Ajehchu Zelophehad chanute Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milkah, Noah chu apateo sopiho chapate toh akicheng taovin ahi." 
Numbers36:12 Chuin amaho Joseph chapa Manasseh chapate insung miho toh akicheng taovin, agouhou chu apateu insung phunga chun aumdentan ahi." 
Numbers36:13 Hicheho hi Jericho naija Jordan pang Moab phaija Israel chate henga Mosi khutna Pakai thupeh, thupeh ho le thutannaho chu ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Hiche thuho hi Mosi'n Israelte jouse henga Jordan gal gamthip hilam sang, twipisan gal Paran le Tophel, Laban le Hazeroth, chule Dizahah kikah phaichama asei ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (Seir molsang lampi jotna-a ichele Horeb'a pat Kadesh-barnea gei chu nisomle nikhat lam ahi.) 
Deuteronomy1:3 Chuin kum somli lhin na-in ahitin ahi, lhasom le lhakhat lhina, chuche lha nimasa nichun, Pakaiyin amaho peh dinga ahenga athupeh jouse dungjui chun Mosi'n Israel chate henga aseijin," 
Deuteronomy1:4 Hichu Heshbon'a cheng Amor lengpa Sihon le, Edrei sunga Astaroth'a cheng Bashan lengpa Og atha jou ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Moab gam sung Jordan pang hilam sanga, Mosi'n hiche danthu hi aphongdoh panin, hitin ati." 
Deuteronomy1:6 Pakai i-Pathen'un Horeb molsanga chun ijah uva aseijin, Nangho hiche molsanga nachamsot behseh taove:" 
Deuteronomy1:7 Kiheijun lang, nakholjin ban jom taovin, chule Amor mite molsang le akom naija um mun jouse-a, phaichama, thinglhanga, dama, lhanglama, chule twilen panga, Canaan mite gama, chule Lebanon gei, twipi, Euphrate vapi geijin cheovin." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Veovin namasanguva gam kakoi peh uve; Pakaiyin napu napateu Abraham, Isaac, Jacob henga pehding le amaho nunga achilhahte peh dinga ana kihahsel nagam chu galo taovin." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Chule hiche laichun naheng uva kana seijin, Keiman kachang seh-in nangho napojou pou vinge;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Pakai na Pathen'un nangho napunsah taovin, chule veuvin, tunvang natam danu chu van'a ahsi ho jatjen nahitaove." 
Deuteronomy1:11 (Napu napateu Pakai Pathen'u chun athutep bangin tu-a sanghin ajat sang khatnin napunsah beu henlang, phatthei naboh-u hen.)" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kei changseh in naboinao, napohgih-u, nakiphin nao iti kapohjou dingham?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nanghon naphung sunguva michingho, ahethemho, chule mihet ho lhengdoh unlang, keiman amaho chu nachung uva vaihomin seminge, tin kanaseijin ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Chule nanghon, Nangman naseiho hi keihon kabol dinguva pha ahi, tin neidonbut un ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Hijeh chun keiman naphung pipuihou, michingho, mihet ho chu kalheng doh-in, nachung uva vaihomin kapansah-in, sangkhat chunga, jakhat chunga, somnga chunga, chule somkhat chunga lamkai dingleh, naphung sunguva vaipon kapansah tan ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Chule hiche laichun keiman nathutan vaihomhou chu thu kanapen, ajah uva, Nasopi ho kah-a aboina hou chu ngaipeh unlang, mijouse leh asopipa kikah, ahiloule nalah uva um gamdangmi kikah-a chun chonphat na-in thu tanun." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Thutan na-a maipha navetlou dingu; amavang alen thu nangai banguva aneo thujong nangaidiu; mihem maija kichatna naneilou dingu ahi; ajehchu thutanna chu Pathen'a ahi. Chule nangho dinga thuhahsa behsetho chu kaheng hinlhutnun, keiman ngailha nange, tin kana seijin ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Chule hiche laichun keiman naboldiu jouse kana thupeh jiuvin ahi. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Chuin Pakai i-Pathen'uvin thu einapeh bangun, Horeb molsanga kon ikipatdoh-un, Amor mite molsang lampia namu-u gamthip lentah le gimneitah jouse chu ijot lhung keijun, chuin Kadesh-barnea iga lhung taove." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Chuin keiman naheng uva, Nangho Pakai i-Pathen'uvin eipehnao Amor mite molsang chu nalhung taove." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Veovin, Pakai na Pathen'un namasanguva gamchu nakoipeh uve. Chetou vinlang napu napateu Pathen'in naheng uva aseibangin galo jengun; kicha hih-un, lungjong lungthoi hih-un, tin kanaseijin ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Chule amitakip kahenga nahungnaijun, kajah-a, Keihon imasanguva mi solung ting, amahon gam chu gakhol toh-uhen lang, ipi lampia ichetou uva, ipi khopi-a ilut diuham? tithu hinpo hen, nati uvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Chule akisei chun eilung lhaisah lheh-in; chuin keiman nalah uva mi somleni, phung khatna mikhat cheh kalheng doh-in ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Chuin amaho akiheijun, molsang lama chun akal touvun, Eshcol phaichama ahungun, akholle taovin ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Chule amahon agamga akhutnun ahin loh-un, ihenguva ahin pohsuh peh-un, chule thu ahinpouvin, Pakai i-Pathen'un eipeh-u chu gampha ahi, atiuve." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Achuti vangin nangho chetou ding nanom pouvin, Pakai i-Pathen'u thupeh chu nadou jouvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Chule napon in sunguva naphun chelun, Pakaiyin eithet jeh uva suhmang dinga Amor mite khutna pehlut dinga, Egypt gama kona eipuidoh-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Hoilama ichetou diuham? Isopihou vin, Miho chu alentheijun, eiho sangin asang jouvin, khopi hochu alentheijin, van geija pal akikho touvin ahi; chukal valin chua chun Anakim chapate kaga mu uvin ahi, tin ilungu asudoijun ahi, nati uve." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Chujouvin keiman najah uva, Amaho chu ginghih-un, kijong kicha hih-un." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Namasanguva che Pakai na Pathen'u chun namitmu tah uva Egypt gama nangho dinga nabolpeh hou jouse dungjuijin gal satpeh naovin nate. 
Deuteronomy1:31 Chule gamthipma min acha apoh banga, Pakai na Pathen'un hiche munhi nalhun kahseuva, lampi jouse-a iti napoh-u ham chu namu taove." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ahin hichan geihin jong Pakai na Pathen'u chu natahsan pouvin; 
Deuteronomy1:33 Naponbuh son nadiu mun holdohpeh dingle, nachenao lampi musah dinga, jan le meikonga, sunle meilhanga namasang uva chepa chu natahsan deh pouve." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Chuin Pakaiyin nathu seiju ajan, alungsatan, akihah selin, hitin ati." 
Deuteronomy1:35 Tahbeh-a hiche khang gilou mite khatchan jong napu napateu pehdia kahah selna gampha chu amulou heldiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Jephunneh chapa Kaleb tailou: aman hichu amuding, chule agachotsa gam chu amale achilhahte kapeh ding ahi; ajehchu aman Pakai chu ajuikim helin ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nangho jal-in Pakai chu keichunga alung hangin, Nangma jengjong chumuna chu nalut louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Ahin namasanga ding Nun chapa Joshua, amachu lutding ahi. Ama chu tilkhouvin; ajehchu aman hiche gam chu Israel alosah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Ahin namasanga ding Nun chapa Joshua, amachu lutding ahi. Ama chu tilkhouvin; ajehchu aman hiche gam chu Israel alosah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Chukal valin, Anchah dingbep ahi natiu nachasen houleh, chuche laija sele pha hekhen loulai nachateo hochu chua lut dingu, chule keiman kapeh-a, amahon alo dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ahin nangho vang kiheijunlang, twipisan lampi gamthip lama nakholjin ban jom taovin, ati." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Chuphatnin nanghon nei donbutnun, kahenga, Pakai dounan kachonse taove, Pakai ka Pathen'un eithupeh jouseu dungjuijin chetaoving ting, galsatnu vinge, nati uve. Chuin amitakip min agalvon nakivoncheh phatnun, thinglhang lama kaldin phasademin na-umtaove." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ahin Pakaiyin kahenga, Chetou hih-un, chule galjong gasat hih-un; ajehchu keima nalah uva kaumpoi: achutiloule nagalteu masanga gal lel getnun nate, tin seipeh-in eiti." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Hijeh chun najah uva kaseipeh-un; chule nanghon nangai pouvin, ahin Pakai thupeh dounan nagolkeh-un, hangtah-in thinglhang lama nakaltou taove." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Chuin hiche molsanga cheng Amor mite chu nangho dou dingin ahungkon doh-un, khoihon mi adel bangin nahin delun, Seir gei le Hormah geijin nathatnun ahi." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Chuin nahung kileuvin, Pakai masanga nakap-un; ahinla Pakaiyin na-aw-u nangaipeh pouvin, anakhang jong nasunpeh pouve." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Chuti chun chuche mun'a nagasuhmangu nikhoho dungjuijin Kadesh mun'a nisot tah naum denun ahi. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Chujouvin Pakaiyin kahenga asei bangin iki heijun, twipisan lampia gamthiplam jonin ikhol jinun, chule Seir molsang chu nikho tamtah ivelkolun ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga aseijin, hitin ati;" 
Deuteronomy2:3 Nanghon hiche molsang hi navelsot behset taove; sahlam sanga kiheijun," 
Deuteronomy2:4 Chule nangman mipi chu thu penlang, Seir'a cheng nasopi hou Esau chate gamsung najotdiu; amahon nakichat diu ahi; hijeh chun nangho chingthei tah-in umun;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 Amaho toh kina hih-un, ajehchu keiman agamu chu nangho kapeh louding, kengphang te jong kapeh louhel ding nahiuve; ajehchu Seir molsang chu Esau lodia kanapeh ahitai." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Nanghon naneh dingu an-neh chu amahoa kona suma nakichoh uva nanehdiu, chule nadon diu jong suma nakichoh uva nadondiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'un nakhut uva natoh jouseu phatthei aboh-in, chule gamthip lentah najotnu chu ahen ahi. Hiche kum somli sunghin Pakai na Pathen'un na-umpiuvin, lhahsamna imacha nanei pouvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Chuin Eloth le Ezion-gober'a pat phaicham lampi jotna-in Seir'a cheng Esau chilhah isopiteu gamchu ipal pouvin, ikiheijun Moab gamthip lampia iki tolun ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, Moab chu sugim hih-un, gal'in jong kisatpi hih-un; ajehchu agamu chu nalodiuva kapeh louding nahiuve; ajehchu Ar chu Lot chilhahte kapeh ahitai, ati." 
Deuteronomy2:10 Masangin chua chun Anakim te banga len, tam le, sanga Emim mite ana chengun ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Amaho jong chu Anakim ho banga mihatna sim ahiuvin; Moab miten vang, Emim tin amin sah-un ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Masangin Seir'a hin Hor miho jong anachengun; ahinla Pakaiyin amaho apeh gam Israel'in analo bang chun, Esau chaten amasanguva konin asumangin, alopaijun, amaho khelin acheng taove." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Tun kipatdoh-un lang Zered vachadung chu galkaijuvin, tin kaseijin; chuin Zered vachadung chu igalkai taove." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Chule Kadesh-barnea idalhah uva pat Zered vacha igalkai geiju, Pakaiyin ahahsel nao banga janel lah-a kona gal hat ho khang kichaihel tokah chu kum somthum le kumget ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ajehchu amanthah hel tokah uva, janel lah-a kona sumang dinga Pakai khut chun amaho anadou tahbeh ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Hijeh chun ahitin ahi, eiho lah-a kona galsat ho jouse amanthah heluva, chule athigam phatnun," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Pakaiyin kahenga hitin aseijin, hitin ati," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Tunia hi nangman Moab gamsung Ar najotpaija nagalkai ding ahi; 
Deuteronomy2:19 Chule Ammon chate naija nahung tengle, amaho chu sugenthei hih-in, chule kinah jong kinahpi hih-in; ajehchu Ammon chate gamchu nalodinga kapeh louding ahi; ajehchu Lot chate lo dia kanapehsa ahitai, ati." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Hiche gam jongchu mihat ho gama anakisim ahin; hia chu mihat ho masang laija anacheng ahiuve; chule amaho chu Ammom miten Zamzummim anasah-uvin ahi. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Anakim ho banga len, tam le sang ahiuve: ahinla Pakaiyin amaho chu amasanguva asumangin, amahon alopaijun, chule chu-a chun achengun:" 
Deuteronomy2:22 Seir'a cheng Esau chate-a dinga amasanguva kona Hor mite asuhmangpeh bangin abolpeh-in ahi: chuin amahon alopaijun, tuni geihin amaho khelin achengun ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Chuin Hazerim le Azzah geipeh-a cheng Avim miho chu Caphtor-a kona hungdoh Caphtor miho chun asumangun, chule amaho khelin acheng taove)." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Kipatdoh-un, nakholjin ban jomun lang, Arnon vapi galkaijun: veuvin, Amor mi Heshbon lengpa Sihon le agam chu nakhut na kapeh ahitai. Hichu lopanun lang gal'in kidoupiuvin." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Tunia hi vannoi pumpi-a um namho chunga nangma kichatna le ginna kakoi patding ahin; amahon nangma chungchang thu kilhut jaovintin, nangma jeh-a kithing uva, lung gentheidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Chuin Kedemoth gamthipma konin Heshbon lengpa Sihon henga chamna thu kengin sottol kasolin," 
Deuteronomy2:27 Nagam sungu neijotpai sah-in, lamlhonga bou chengkatin, jet le veija jong kiheiponge;" 
Deuteronomy2:28 Nangman kaneh ding an sumin neichoh sah inlang, chule kadon ding twi jong sumin neichoh sah-in: kenga bou kagalkai dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:29 (Seir'a cheng Esau chate le Ar'a cheng Moab chaten eibolna bangin,) Pakai ka Pathen'un eipehnao gam Jordan kagalkai kahseuva dingbou ahi, kati." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Ahinla Heshbon lengpa Sihon'in agam ijot galkai diuchu eiphalpeh pouve. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen uvin tunikho-a banga hi nakhut nuva apehlut theina dinga alungu asuh tah-a, alouchal sah ahi." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, Vetan keiman Sihon le agam chu namasanga kape pantai: agama nachenthei nadin lo pantan, eiti." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Chujouvin Sihon amale amite jouse Jahaza'a eiho douna-a galsat din ahung kondoh taove. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Chuin Pakai i-Pathen'un amaho chu imasanguva ahinpedoh-in, chuin eihon ama le achapate, chule amite jouse ithatgam taove." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Chuin hiche petchun akhopi jouseu ilaovin, khopi tinna mihem jouse pasal, numei, chule naosen ho isumang helun, khatcha jong ihinghoi pouvin," 
Deuteronomy2:35 Eiho-a dingin aganchahou le akhopihouva kichomho bou ilaovin ahi. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Arnon vapi pamchina um Aroer'a pat, vapi chinna um khopi-a kipat Gilead chan geijin, eiho dinga hetbeh seh khopi khatcha aumpoi. Ajehchu Pakai i-Pathen'un abonchauvin eiho eipe soh hel taovin," 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ammon chate gam sese le Jabbok vapi gamkaiho, molsang ho-a khopiho le Pakai i-Pathen'un eijahda nao mun ho-a bou chu nahunglut louvu ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Chujouvin ikiheijun, Bashan jotna lampia ichetouvun, chuin Bashan lengpa Og le amite jouse eihotoh Edrei mun'a kisatdin ahung konun ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, Amachu kicha hih-in; ajehchu keiman amale amite jouse, chule agam nakhutna kapeh ding ahin; chule Heshbon'a cheng Amor lengpa Sihon nabol banga amachu nabolding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Chutichun Pakai i-Pathen'un Bashan lengpa Og le amite jouse jong ikhutnuva eipeuvin; mikhatcha jong hinghoi louvin ithat gamun ahi. 
Deuteronomy3:4 Chule hichepet chun akhopiho jouse ilaovin, Bashan'a Og lenggam Argob gamkai jouse-a khopi somgup lah-a ilah louvu khatcha aumpon ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Hiche khopi jousehi kulbang sangtah tah-a kiget khum le, kotpi neicheh, chule kotgol ho-a kikam ngen ahin; hiche tilouvin kul kiget khumlou khopineo tamtah jong ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Chule Heshbon lengpa Sihon ibolnao bangin khopi tinna pasal hole numei ho chule chapangho isumang hel jengun ahi. 
Deuteronomy3:7 Gancha jouse le khopiho-a thil kichomho vang eiho chantumdin ikilah-uve. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Chule hichepet chun Amor mite lengni-a konin Jordan hilam panga galla um gam Arnon vapi'a pat Harmon molsang geijin ilaovin; 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Harmon chu Sidon miten Sirion asah-un, Amor miten Shenir asah-un)," 
Deuteronomy3:10 Phaicham khopi jousele, Gilead gam jouse, chule Bashan gam jouse Salcah le Edrei geijin, Bashan'a Og lenggam sunga khopiho chu inalaovin ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Ajehchu Bashan lengpa Og bou chu mihat milenho lah-a ahingdoh amoh hija ahi. Veovin, ajalkhun chu thih jalkhun ahin, Ammon chate kho Rabbath-a um hilou ham? mihem tong dungjuijin adung chu tongko ahin, avai tongli ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Chuche petna inalo-u hiche gamhi Arnon vapi panga um Aroer'a patna Gilead molsang kehkhat le, asunga khopi hochu Reuben mite le Gad mite kana petan ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Gilead gam adang sese le Og lenggam Bashan pumpi chu Manasseh phung kehkhat kanapen; Argob gamkai jouse le Bashan pumpi chu mihat le milenho gam anakiti. 
Deuteronomy3:14 Manasseh chapa Jair'in Argob gam pumpi, Geshuri le Maachathi gamgi geijin alan, hichu ama min aputsah-in, tuni geijin Bashan Havoth-jair akiti." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Chuin Gilead chu Machir kanapetai. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Chuin Reuben mite le Gad mite henga Gilead'a pat Arnon vapi phaicham kehkhat, chule agamgi diuvin Jabbok vapi geijin kapen, hichu Ammon chate gamgi ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Phaicham jong, Jordan le apanga um gamho, Chinnereth'a pat Ashdoth-pisgah solam sanga um phaicham twipi, chituipi geijin kanapen ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Hiche laichun nangma thu kanapen, Pakai na Pathen'un hiche gamhi nalodiuva anapeh ahi. Nasopi hou Israel chate masanga namihang hou jouse chu galvon vonpuma nagalkai diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Ahinla najiteu, nachasenhou, chule nagancha hou, (ajehchu gancha nahao lheh-uve ti kahen,) keiman kapeh-u nakhopi houva chu umden dingu," 
Deuteronomy3:20 Nangho banga Pakaiyin nasopiteu acholngah sah kahseu le Jordan galla Pakai na Pathen'un napeh-u gam alo kahseuva umdingu ahi. Chujou tengle amitakipmin keiman kapeh gamchu nahung lokit chehdiu ahi, kati." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Chule hiche laichun Joshua thu kapen, Pakai na Pathen'un hiche lengteni abolna jouse chu namitnin namutan, chutobang ma-a chu Pakaiyin nalo dingu lenggam ho chu abolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Chule hiche laichun Joshua thu kapen, Pakai na Pathen'un hiche lengteni abolna jouse chu namitnin namutan, chutobang ma-a chu Pakaiyin nalo dingu lenggam ho chu abolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Pakai na Pathen'un nangho dinga gal nasatpeh ding jeh-un, nanghon amaho chu kicha hih-un kati." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Chule hiche laichun Pakai henga ngehna kana neijin, hitin kati;" 
Deuteronomy3:24 Vo Pakai Pathen, nangman nasoh hi nalet je le nakhut thahat je neimusah pantai; ajehchu leile van'a nathilbol bang le thahat bang bolthei Pathen koi umam?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Katao ahi, neigalkai sah inlang, Jordan galla gam phatah molsang hoitah le Lebanon chu neimusah-in, kanati." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Ahinla nangho jeh-in Pakaiyin eina lunghan khumin, eingaipeh nompoi: chule Pakaiyin kahenga, Phaset tante, hiche thuhi kahenga seikit tahih-in." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisgah molvum'a kaldoh inlang lhumlam, sahlam, lhanglam chule solama khodah-in lang, hichu namit-in ven; ajehchu nangma hiche Jordan hi nagalkai louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ahin Joshua ngansen lang, tilkhouvin, chule hatsah-in; ajehchu ama hiche miho masanga hi galkaija, nagamu ding gamchu amaho alosah ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ahin Joshua ngansen lang, tilkhouvin, chule hatsah-in; ajehchu ama hiche miho masanga hi galkaija, nagamu ding gamchu amaho alosah ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Chuti chun Beth-peor maijon phaichama chun i-um taovin ahi. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Hijeh chun tun, vo Israel, nahin theijuva, napu napateu Pakai Pathen'in napeh-u gamchu nagalo theina dingun, najui diuva kahil masah dem chondanho leh thutannaho hi ngaijuvin." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Keiman nangho kathupeh hi nakoibe loudiu, chule chua kona jong nalahdoh louhel diu, chutia chu keiman kapeh-u Pakai na Pathen'u thupeh chu nanit diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Baal-peor jeh-a Pakai thilbol chu namitnun namutaove. Ajeh chu Baal-peor jui jouse chu Pakai na Pathen'un nalah uva konin asumangtai. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Ahinla nanghon Pakai na Pathen'u heng lama behho vang amitakip tunigei hin nahingjing naove. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Veovin, Pakai Pathen'in eithupeh bangtah chun, lodinga nachenna diu gama naboldiuvin, keiman chondan le thutanna chu kahil taove." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Hijeh chun hicheho chu nit unlang bolun; ajehchu hichu namtin ho mitmu-a nachih naole nahet them nao ahin, amahon chondan kisun jouse hi ajah uva, Tahbeh-in hiche nam lentehi aching le ahechen mite ahiuve, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ikouna chanuva einaijiu Pakai i-Pathen'u tobanga amaho naiji Pathen nei chutobang namlen koi umam? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Chule tulaija namasanguva kakoi dan kisun jouse banga hititah-a chondan hole thutan na nei namlen dang koi umam? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kichih thei pou pouvun lang, gunchu tah-in nalhagaovu hongphaovin, achuti louleh namitnun amu thilho chu sumilun natin, nahinlai nikho sungseuvin nalungsunguva konin mangthah get ninte: ahin nachapate le nachapate chate chu hiljouvin." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Adeh deh-in Horeb molsanga Pakai na Pathen anga nadin nikhou, chule Pakaiyin kahenga anasei, Mipi ho chu neikhop khompeh-in, leiset chunga ahinlai nikho sungseuva keima ginje akihil theina diule, achateu ahiltheina diuvin kathu jahsah inge ati nikho chu." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Chuin nahin naijun molsang bula nadinguvin, chule molsang chu vanlaijol geijin muthim, meilhang, chule thimletlut nin meijin akan ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Chuin meikong lah-a konchun Pakaiyin naheng uvah thu aseijin, a-aw cheng chu najaovin, alim vang namupouve; a-aw sehseh najaovin ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Chuin aman naheng uva thuson, najui diuva athupeh akitepna chu aphongdoh-in, song pheng ni chunga asunin ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Chuin Pakaiyin hichepet chun lodinga nachennao gama nabol diuvin, chondan kisunho le thutan naho chu nangho kahil diuvin eina thupeh-in ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Hijeh chun nangho kichihtheijun, ajehchu Horeb'a meikong lah-a Pakaiyin naheng uva thu asei nikho chun, nanghon alim namu pouve." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Achutiloule nakisuhboh uva, alim semthu, ipi lim hamkhat toh kilou, pasal ham, numei ham tobang kisem getnun natin," 
Deuteronomy4:17 Leichunga um ganhing khat tou tobang, vanlaijola lengle alhanei vacha khat tou tobang," 
Deuteronomy4:18 Leichunga a-opma kithol ganhing khat tou tobang, leinoi twilah-a nga khat lim tobang, kisemthu getnun nate." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Chule achutiloule namitna vanlam navet uva, nisa, lhathah,ahsi ho, chule van janelpi namu tengule, Pakai na Pathen'un vannoi pumpi-a nam jouse-a dinga apeh chu houding le jendingin kiheilut getnun nate." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ahinla Pakaiyin tunikho-a nahi nao banga hi agoulo ama mite hidinga nalah uva, thih meilhum sung, Egypt gama kona nana puidoh-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Chukalvalin nangho jeh-in Pakai keima chunga alunghangin, Jordan kagalkai louna dingle, Pakai na Pathen'un lo dinga napeh-u gam phatah-a chu kalut louna din akihah selin ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Keima vang hiche gama kathi-a, Jordan hi galkai louding kahitai; ahin nangho nagalkaijuva chuche gam phatah chu nagalo diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Nangho kichih theijun, ajole Pakai na Pathen'un nang hotoh akitepna sumil khaovin natin; Pakai na Pathen'un ajahda alim semthu ham, ahiloule ipiham khat toh kilou kisemthu getnun nate." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u hi kavamhel mei ahin, thangthip tah Pathen ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Nanghon chate le chateho chate nahin neijuva, gamsunga chu sottah nachen uva, nakisuhboh uva, alim semthu, ahiloule ipihamkhat toh kibang lim nakisem thuva, Pakai na Pathen'u mitmu-a thilse nabol uva, nalung hansah uva ahile," 
Deuteronomy4:26 Lo dinga Jordan nagalkai nao gama kona chu naman thah helnadiuva, tunikho-a hi nachung uva ahetoh dinga van le lei kakou ahin; chukoma chu nachensot loudiu, suhmang hela naum johdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Chule Pakaiyin namtin lah-a nathe cheh uva, Pakaiyin napuinadiu Pathen helouho lah-a chu lhomcha naphah diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Chule chua chu mutheilou, jatheilou, netheilou, thilnam jalou, mihem khutsem thing le song pathen lhachana natoh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Hijongle chua kona Pakai na Pathen'u chu nahol uva, nalungthim pumpiu le nahinnao pumpi-a nahol ule, namu dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Hesoh genthei natouva, ni nunungni le hicheng thil jouse nachung uva achuhteng, Pakai na Pathen lama nakiheijuva, a-aw nangai uva ahile," 
Deuteronomy4:31 (Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u chu hepina-a dim Pathen ahi,) aman nadalhah loudiu, nasuhmang louheldiu, napu napateu henga akihahselna le akitepna chu asuhmil louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Ajehchu nikho che masaho, nangho masanga Pathen'in leichunga mihem asem nikho-a pat, chule van langkhatna pat alangkhat geija, hiche tobang thil nasa adang anaum kha-a, ahiloule hitobang hikija khatam? dong temun." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Nanghon najah uva nathilou banguva, meikong lah-a kona Pathen thusei aw min ajahkhah em?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ahiloule Pakai Pathen'in Egypt gama namitmuva abol hojouse dungjuija, Pathen'in lhepna-a, melchih na-a, thil kidang, khut thahatna, ban jahdoh-a, tijatna nasatah-a, namkhat lah-a kona namkhat lahdoh dinga cheding agot khah-em?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Pakai chu Pathen ahi ti nahet theina dinguva, naheng uva kimusah ahi. Amalou koima dang aumpoi." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Aman nahil theina diuva, van'a kona a-aw najah sah uva; chule leichunga ameikou loupitah chu namusah-u ahi; chule nanghon meikou lah-a konchun athu najaovin ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Chule napateu angailut jehchun, amaho nungin achilhahte alhengin, chule Egypt gama konin athahat thilbol theina-a chun amitmu-a konin napui doh-un;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 Tunikho-a banga hi nangho puilutna, agamu gouva lodinga peh dingin, nangho sanga lenjole hatjo namho namasanguva konin anodoh-in ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Hijeh chun Pakai hi vanchung le leichung Pathen ahi ti hi tuni hin heuvin lang, nalungun ngai touvin; Amalou adang khatcha aumpoi." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Hijeh chun nangho le nanung uva nachateo aphatthei na dingu leh, a-itih-a dinga Pakai na Pathen'un napeh-u leiset chunga hi nahinkhou asotna dingin, tunikho-a kathupeh-u ama chona dan kisemho le athupehho hi nit jingun, ati." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Chujouvin Mosi'n Jordan hilam pang nisolam panga khopi thum akhendoh-in," 
Deuteronomy4:42 Tolthat ho, gutuhna neilou, masanga jong hotna neilou tosoija aheng akom that ho ajamlutna ding; chule hiche khopiho khatna ajamlut le ahintheina din akhendoh-in:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 Hicheho chu Reuben mite-a dingin phaicham gamthipma um Bezer ahin, Gad mite-a dingin Gilead gama um Ramoth ahin, chule Manasseh mite-a dingin Bashan gama um Golan ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Chule hiche hi Mosi'n Israel chate angsunga apeh danthu chu ahi. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Hicheho hi Egypt'a kona ahungdoh nunguva Mosi'n Israel chate jah-a anasei, hettohsah le, dan kisemho, chule thutan ho chu ahin," 
Deuteronomy4:46 Mosi le Israel chaten Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh nunguva anatha-u Hesbon'a cheng Amor mite lengpa Sihon gamsung Jordan pang hilam sang, Beth-peor maijona um phaichama apeh ahi." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Chuin amahon ama gam le Bashan lengpa Og gam, Jordan hilam pang nisolam sanga cheng Amor mite lengni gamchu alouvin," 
Deuteronomy4:48 Arnon vapi panga um Areor'a pat, Hermon'a um Sion molsang chan," 
Deuteronomy4:49 Chule Jordan hilam pang solam sanga phaicham jouse, Pisgah twinah phung noija um twikhanglen phaicham geijin alouvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Chuin Mosi'n Israelte jouse akouvin, ahenguva, Vo Israel, nakihil uva, nachintup uva, chule nabol diuvin, tunia naheng uva kasei chonna danho leh thutannaho hi ngaijun." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Pakai i-Pathen'uvin Horeb'a eihotoh kitepna khat anaseme. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Pakaiyin hiche kitepna hi ipateu toh abol ahipon, tunia ahingnalai jouse eihotah tojoh abol ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Pakaiyin nang hotoh kimaiton molsanga chun meikong lah-a konin thu anaseijin," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (Hiche pet chun Pakai thu chu nangho hetsah dingin Pakai le nangho kah-a kana dinge. Ajehchu meikong jehchun nana kichauvin, molsanga chun nakaltou pouvin;) hitin ati," 
Deuteronomy5:6 Keima Pakai na Pathen kahin, nakihenna in, Egypt gama kona nahin puidohpa chu kahi." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Nangman Keima ansunga Pathen dangho nanei louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Nangman alim semthu, chung van'a um hihen, ahiloule noi leisetna um hihen, ahiloule leinoi'a twisunga um hijongle, akibahpi ima lim nasem louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Nangma hitobangho anga nakun louding, alhacha-a jong napan louding ahi. Ajehchu keima Pakai na Pathen hi thangthip tah Pathen kahin, keima eihot bola pate khansetna chu achate khangthum khangli chan geija vila, achunguva phulajia kahin," 
Deuteronomy5:10 Keima eingailua chule kathupeh nit chu sang tamtah ho chunga khotona musah-a kahi. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Nangman Pakai na Pathen minchu mohseh-a napat louding ahi. Ajehchu mohseh-a amin pana chu Pakaiyin themona beija alhalou ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Pakai na Pathen'in nathupeh banga cholngah ni chu athengin mangin. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Nigup sunga na natoh-a, natohding jouse chu natoh ding," 
Deuteronomy5:14 Amavang nisagi ni chu Pakai na Pathen cholngah ni ahi. Hiche nikho-a hi nangma nahin, nachapate ahin, nachanute ahin, nasohpa ahin, nasohnu ahin, nabongchal ahin, nasangan ahin, nagancha poupou ahin, nakotpi sunga um namaljin hijongle ima natoh loudiu; nangma bang banga nasohpa le nasohnu jong kicholdodiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Chule Egypt gama soh-a um nanahin, chule Pakai na Pathen'in chua kona khut hattah le ban jahdoh-a nahin puidoh ahi chu geldoh-in. Hijeh-a chu Pakai na Pathen'in cholngah ni nitdinga nathupeh ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Pakai na Pathen'in thu nathupeh bangin nanu napa jabolin, chutile Pakai na Pathen'in napehna leisetna chun nahinkho sotnintin, naphatthei ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Tol natha louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Jon jong nabol louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Gujong naguchat louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Naheng nakom chunga hettohsah dihlouva jong napan louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Naheng nakom ji jong nadeichat louding, naheng nakom in ahin, alou ahin, asohpa ahin, asohnu ahin, abongchal ahin, asangan ahin, naheng nakoma thilpou pou chu nathangset louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Hiche thuho hi Pakaiyin molsanga meikong lah-a kon, meilom lah-a kon, chule muthim satah lah-a kona aw gingtah-a houkhom ho nabon uva henga anasei ahin; abelap tapoi. Chule hicheho chu songpheng ni-a asunin, kahenga einapen ahi." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Chuin ahitin ahi, nanghon muthim lah-a kona aw najah-u chun, (ajehchu molsang chu meikonga ka ahi,) nangho nahiuvin, naphung uva aluchangho ahiuvin, chule nalamkai jouseu ahin kaheng neihin naijun," 
Deuteronomy5:24 Chule hitin naseijui, Vetemin, Pakai i-Pathen'un aloupina le aletna eimusah-un, chule meikong lah-a konin a-aw ijaovin ahi. Tunikho hin eihon Pathen'in mihem akihoupia, ahivanga ahin chu imu taove." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Hijeh chun tu-a ibola ithijeng diuham? Ajehchu hiche meikou nasatah hin eikahvam dingu ahi; eihon Pakai i-Pathen'u aw jahbe leuhen ithi teidingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ajehchu eiho banga meikong lah-a kona hingjing Pathen aw ja-a, hing nalai tahsa pujouse lah-a koi umam?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Nangman ganai jinlang, Pakai i-Pathen'uvin asei ding chu gangai jin; chule Pakai i-Pathen'uvin nahenga aseijouse chu nangin kabonchao jah-a seijin lang, keihon ngai ungting, bolu vinge, nati uve." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Chule kahenga nathusei petnuchun Pakaiyin nathuseihou chu ajan; Pakaiyin kahenga, Keiman mipin nahenga athuseiju aw chu kajan ahi. Amahon athuseihou jouse chu aseidih lheh uve." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kaden, amaho ding le achateu dinga a-itih-a aphalheh jing nadin, a-itih laijin jong hitobang lungchu pujingu henlang, eigingu henlang, kathupeh jouse anit jing jeng taveleu!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Chenlang ahenguva, Napon in nuva lutkit taovin, gatipeh-in." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Nangma vang kakoma dingin lang, alodiuva kapehna gama abol theina diuva amaho nahil dinga thupeh jouse, chonna dan kisemho, chule thutanna ho nahenga kasei ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Hijeh chun Pakai na Pathen'un nathupeh banguva nabolna diuvin chingtheijun; nangho jetle veija nakihei mang lou dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Nalodiu gama naphat theijuva, nahinkhou asotna dinga, Pakai na Pathen'un nathupeh-u lampi jouse chu najot sohkei dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Tun hichehohi nacheuva nagalo diu gama naboldiuva Pakai na Pathen'un nangho hil dinga thupeh eipeh dan thupeh ho, chondan ho, chule thutanna hochu ahi," 
Deuteronomy6:2 Chutia chu nahinkhou asotna dinga keiman nangma le nachapa chule nachapa chapate kathupeh achondanho le athupehho chu nahinkho lhumkei uva nanit uva, Pakai na Paten chu nagin dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Hijeh chun, vo Israel, Pakai napu napateu Pathen'in athutep banga khoiju le bongnoi lona gama chu naphat theijuva chule hatah-a napun nadiuvin, ngaijin lang, naboldoh nadin chingtheijin." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Ngaijin, vo Israel, Pakai na Pathen'u chu Pakai khat seh ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Chule nangman Pakai na Pathen chu nalung pumpi-a, nalhagao pumpi-a chule nathaneina pumpi-a nangailut ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Chule tu nikho-a nangma kathupeh hohi nalung sunga nachin jing ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Chule nangman hicheho hi nachate henga tomngai tah-a nahilding, na-insunga natoupet tengle, lamdunga nachepet tengle, naluppet tengle, chule nathodoh teng jongle naseipeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Chule hicheho chu melchihna dinga nakhutna nabua, chule namit teni kikah-a thuchihbom tobang hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Chule hicheho chu na-in khomhou le nakotpi hou chunga nasut dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Pakai na Pathen'un napu napateu Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga pehdinga akihahselna gam, nangma sahdoh hilou khopi lentah le phatah ho-a chu nahin puilutna," 
Deuteronomy6:11 Nangma dimsah hilou thilpha jouse dimna inho, nangman nalai hilou twikul kilaiho, nangma phu hilou lengpilei le Olive thingphung ho chu nangman naneh-a nava teng le," 
Deuteronomy6:12 Chuteng chingtheijin, ajole Egypt gam kihenna in'a kona nahin puidoh Pakai chu sumil getnin nate." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Pakai na Pathen chu nagin na, ama najena, chule ama minna nakihahsel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Nanghon pathen dang, nakimvel uva cheng miho pathen nung najui loudiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:15 (Ajehchu nalah uva Pakai na Pathen chu thangthip Pathen ahin,) ajole Pakai na Pathen lungsat nachung uva koujah-intin, leiset chunga konin nasumang hel getnunte." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Nanghon Massah mun'a nana patep banguva Pakai Pathen chu na patep loudiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Nanghon Pakai na Pathen'un thupeh napeh-u adan thupeh ho, ahettohsah ho, chule achonna dan kisunho chu gunchu tah-a nanit dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Chule Pakaiyin napu napateu henga ana kihahselna gama nagacheuva naga lona dingu le naphat theina dinguva Pakai mitmu-a adih le apha chu nabol diu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 Pakaiyin anasei banga namelma teu jouse chu namasang uva kona nomanga umdingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Chule ahunglhung ding phat teng nachapan nahenga, Pakai i-Pathen'un nana thupeh hettohsah ho, dan kisunho, thutanna ho chu ipi kiseina ham? tia nadoh tengleh," 
Deuteronomy6:21 Chuteng nachapa henga chu, Keiho Egypt'a Pharaoh soh kana hiuvin, Pakaiyin Egypt'a kona khut thahat tah-a eipuidoh-u ahi;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 Pakaiyin kamit mutah-un Egypt chung leh Pharaoh chung, chule a-insung pumpi chunga, melchihna ho, thilkidang ho, thina, chule thohtheilou hel lungkhamna eimu sah-un ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Chule pehdinga ipu ipateu anahahselna gama eipuilut theina diuvin, hia konchun eina puidoh-un ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Chule tunikho-a banga hi eihinghoi theina dingu le, a-itih-a iphat theina dingu, chule Pakai i-Pathen'u igin na dinguva, Pakaiyin hiche chondan jousehi ibol diuva eina peh-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Chule aman eithupeh banguva, Pakai i-Pathen'u masanga hiche thupeh ho jouse chu initnuva ahile, hichu ichon phatnao hiding ahi, tia naseipeh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Chule lodinga nachenao gama chu Pakai na Pathen'un napuilut nuva, na angsunguva nam tamtah Hit mite, Girgash mite, Amor mite, Canaan mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite chule Jebus mite nangho sanga tamjole hatjo nampi sagi anodoh tengle," 
Deuteronomy7:2 Chule Pakai na Pathen'un amaho chu namasanguva apehdoh tengle, nanghon amaho chu natha uva nasuhmang heldiu, amahotoh kitepna nasem loudiu, hepina jong namusah louhel dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Amaho tojong nakichenlou ding, nachanu jong achapa dinga napehlou diu, chule achanu jong nachapa ji dinga nalah louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Ajehchu amahon nachapa chu pathen dangho lhacha-a apan theina dinga keima eijui na-a kona aheimangdiu: chutia chu Pakai lungsatna chu nachungah deujah-a, photlotna nasuhmang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ahinla nanghon amaho chu hitia hi naboldingu ahi: amaichamu nasuhmang pehdiu, amilimhou nasuhboh diu, athingbom hou chu naphuh lhuh pehdiu, chule alim semthu milimho chu meija nahalvam dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen uva dinga namtheng nahiu ahin, Pakai na Pathen'un leiset chunga nam jouse chungvuma ama-a dinga nam tumbeh hidinga nalhen doh-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Namdang sanga natamjoh jeh uva Pakaiyin nachung uva ngailutna akoija, nalhenu ahipoi; ajehchu nangho nam jouse lah-a alhompen nanahiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Ahinla Pakaiyin nangailut jeh-u le, napu napateu henga akihahselna asuh bulhit nom jeh-a Pakaiyin khut thahat tah-a napui doh uva, soh channa in'a konleh, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh khutna kona nalhatdoh-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Hijeh chun Pakai na Pathen chu Pathen ahin, kitahtah Pathen, ama ngailuho le athupeh nit ho henga khang sangkhat geija akitepna le akhotona koijing," 
Deuteronomy7:10 Chule ama hotbolpa chu sumang dinga amai uva lethuh jia Pathen ahi: ama ahotbol pa chu adep jing louding, amaikoh tah-a alethuh ding ahi, ti kihetnin." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Hijeh-a chu nangman tunikho-a kathupeh danthupeh ho, chonna dan kisunho, chule thutanna ho hi nanit ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Chutengle hung hitiding ahi, nangman hiche thutanna hohi nangaija, nanitna, chule nabola ahileh, Pakai na Pathen'in napu napate henga akihahselna, akitepna le ahepina chu anit jingding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Chule aman nangma nangailutna, phatthei naboh ding, chule napunsah ding; nangma pehdinga napu napateu henga akihahselna leisetna chu nalaigilga le naleiset ga, nachang, nalengpi thei, nathao nabong hole kelngoihon ho phatthei abohding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Nangma nam jouse chungvuma phatthei nachan ding; nangho lah-a kon, ahiloule nagancha lah uva kona anu hijongle apaham hijongle achinga umlou helding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Pakaiyin nangma-a kona natna jouse alahmanga, nangman nahet Egypt hiveiho jouse chu nachunga khatcha akoilou ding; nangma nahot bolte jouse chunga akoijoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Chule Pakai Pathen'in napehdoh ding miho jouse chu nasuhmang hela, achunguva khotona naneilou ding, a-pathen'u jong najen louding ahi; ajeh chu hichu nangma dinga thanga hungpang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Nangman nalungthima, Hiche namho hi keisangin atamjon, iti kanomang jou ding ham? nati-a ahile," 
Deuteronomy7:18 Amaho chu nakichat louding; amavang Pakai na Pathen'in Pharaoh leh Egypt mite jouse chunga anatoh jouse chu nageldoh joh-a," 
Deuteronomy7:19 Nangman namitna namu patepna nasatah ho, melchihna ho, thil kidangho, khut thahat tah le ban jahdoh-a Pakai na Pathen'in napuidoh chu nageldoh ding ahi: Pakai na Pathen'in nakichat miho jouse chunga chutobanga chu abolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Chukal vala jong Pakai na Pathen'in nangma-a kona kisel ahingdoh amoh ho chu asuhmang kahse-a alah uva khoi-ngal alhakhum ding ahinalaije. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Nangman amaho chu nakichat louding ahi: ajehchu tijat umtah le hat chungnung Pakai na Pathen'u nalah uva aume. 
Deuteronomy7:22 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in namasanga hiche namho chu athem thema anodoh ding ahi. Nangman khatvei phulsuh-a nasuhmang thei louding ahi; achuti loule gamsa ho nachunga hungpung getnunte. 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ahinla Pakai na Pathen'in amaho chu nangma henga hinpe doh intin, chule suhmang hela aumkah seuva manthah na-a nasatah-a asuhmang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Chule aman aleng hou chu nakhutna ahin pehdoh ding, nangman amin'u vannoi'a kona nasuhmang ding ahi. Amaho nasuhmang hel tokah se-a koimacha namasanga dingjou louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Alim semthu pathen ho chu meija nahalding, achung kai sana ahiloule adangka ho chu nadeichat louding, lah jong nakilah louhel ding ahi; atiloule chua ohkhan nate: ajehchu Pakai na Pathen dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Chule na-insunga thil thet um napohlut louhel ding ahi; atiloule hiche tobang chun sapsetna-in umkhan nate. Amavang nangman hichu nasatah-a nathetna, nakidah johding ahi: ajehchu hichu sapset thil ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Nahin uva, napun uva, napu napateu henga Pakaiyin ana hahselna gama chu nalut uva nalotheina dingun, tunia kapeh thupeh jouse hi nabolna dingun chingtheijun." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Chule nangho suhnem nading, photchetna ding, nalungsunguva ipi umam hetdohna dingle, aman nathupeh hou chu najuidiu najui loudiu hetna dinga, Pakai na Pathen'un kum somli sung gamthipma nahinpui nao lampiho chu geldoh-un." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Mihem changlhah seh-in ahingpon, Pakai kamsunga kona hungpotdoh thucheng jouse-a bou hingding ahi ti nangho nahetsah theina dinguva, aman nasuhnem uva, gilkel nathoh dingu aphala, nangho nahiuva, napu napateu ahia jong ahet khahlouvu manna-a navah-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Hiche kum somli sunghin natahsa chunguva navonu achulpon, nakengu jong apom pon ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Mihemin achapa asehgim jibanga, Pakai na Pathen'in nasehgim chu, nalunga jong nangaito ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Hijeh-a chu alampia nachena dingu le, ama nagin na dinguva Pakai na Pathen'u thupeh ho chu nanit dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'un gamphatah, thinglhang le phaichama kona hunglong doh twinah le twisam putdohna gam, vachadung ho lona gama napuilut uva," 
Deuteronomy8:8 Suhlou chang, sakol chang, lengpigui ho, theichang phungho, kolbuthei ho, Olive thao le khoiju lona gam," 
Deuteronomy8:9 Lhasam louva changlhah naneh nadingu, asunga chu imacha nalhahsam loudingu; asong ho thih hija, alhangho-a kona sum-eng laidoh theina gamphatah-a napuilut dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nanghon naneh uva nava tengule, aman gam phatah napeh jeh uva Pakai na Pathen'u chu nathangvah dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Tunia nangho henga kathupeh; adan thupeh ho, athutan naho, achonna danho hi nanit daova, Pakai na Pathen'u chu nasuhmil louna dingun chingtheijun." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Achuti loule naneh-a nava tengle, chule in hoitah nakisah-a asunga nachen tengle," 
Deuteronomy8:13 Chule nagancha honu le nakelngoi hon hou ahung puna, nasanao le nadangka hou ahung puna, naneijouseu ahung punteng," 
Deuteronomy8:14 Chuteng le nalungthimu hung kichoisanga, henkola na-umnao in, Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh-a Pakai na Pathen chu sumil khaovin natin;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 Gulse le aipi umna, Twi umlouna gamgo gamthip lentah le tijat umtah lhungkeija nahin pui galkaija, meituh songpi-a kona twi nape pao;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 Nahinkho nunung lamle naphat theina diuva nasuhnem theina diule naphotchet theina diuva gamthipma napute napateu vin ahetkhah louvu manna-a navahpao chu sumil khaovin natin; 
Deuteronomy8:17 Chule nangman nalungthima, Kathil boltheina le kakhut thahat na-in hiche haona hohi eilampeh ahi, tigetnin nate." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Amavang Pakai na Pathen chu nageldoh ding ahi: ajehchu tunikho-a banga hi napateu henga ana kihahselna akitepna chu aphudet theina dinga thahat nape-a chu ama ahi. 
Deuteronomy8:19 Chule hitiding ahi, Pakai na Pathen'u chu nasuhmil heluva, Pathen dang nung najuijuva, alhacha na natoh uva, nahou uva ahile, tunikho-a hi kagihsal nahiuve, nangho namanthai teidingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Pakai na Pathen'u aw najuinom loujeh uva, namasanguva namdangho asuhmang banga, chutobanga chu namanthah dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Ngaijun, Vo Israel: Tunia hi nangho sanga nasajo le hatjo, khopi lentah le van geija akulbang kisaho lodinga Jordan nagalkai ding ahin," 
Deuteronomy9:2 Nangin nanahetsa-u Anakim chate, Anak chate masanga koiham ading joudinga? tia miseina-a nanajah sao milentah tah le sangtah ho masanga nachedingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Hijeh chun tunikho hin namasanguva che-a chu Pakai na Pathen'u ahi ti heuvin; aman amaho chu kavamthei mei banga asuhmanga, na-angsung laitah uva asuhnem dingu ahi. Hitia chu Pakaiyin najah uva asei banga, amaho chu nanodoh uva, nasuhmang loi jeng dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Pakai na Pathen'in namasanga kona amaho anodoh nung tengle, Kachon phatna jeh-a Pakaiyin hiche gam lodinga eipuilut ahi, tin seihih-in; hiche nampiho gitlou jeh joh-a Pakaiyin namasanguva kona amaho anodoh ahibouve." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Nachon phatna jeh, ahiloule nalungthima chondihna nanei jeh-a agamu lodia nache ahipoi: amavang hiche nam mite gitlou jeh le, Pakaiyin napu naputeu Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob henga akihahselna asuh bulhitna dinga, Pakai na Pathen'un namasanguva kona amaho anodoh joh ahibouve." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Hijeh chun hiche gampha hi nachon phatnao jeh-a Pakai na Pathen'un nalodiuva napeh-u ahipoi ti kihet un; ajehchu nangho milouchalte nahi bouvui. 
Deuteronomy9:7 Gamthip laija chu iti dana Pakai na Pathen'u nalunghansah-u ham geldoh-un lang, sumil hih-un; Egypt gama kona nakipat doh nikhouva pat, hiche mun nahunglhun geijun, nangho Pakai dounan nkiphinun ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb'a jong Pakai chu nalunghan sah uvin, chutichun nangho suhmangna ding khopmin Pakai chu alungsan ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Songpheng teni, Pakaiyin nang hotoh akitepna songpheng teni chu ladinga molchunga kakaltou chun, nisomli le jan somli kaga umin, an kanepon, twi jong kadonpon ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Chule Pakaiyin Pathen khutjunga kisun songpheng ni eipen; hichea chun kikhoppi nikho-a Pakaiyin molsanga meikong lah-a kona nangho jah-a athusei jouse dungjuijin achunga chun akisunin ahi. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Chuin nisomli le jan somli kichai nichun ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin songpheng ni, kitepna songpheng teni ngei chu eipen ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, Kipatdoh-in, hikoma konhin chesuh loijin; ajehchu Egypt'a kona nahin puidoh namite khu amaho le amaho akisuboh-un; kathupeh lampi-a konin gangtah-in akihei mangun, amaho dingin akilhajol milim akisem taove, ati." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Chukal valin Pakaiyin kahenga, Hiche mitehi kaven ahile, vetan, milouchalte ahiuve." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Amaho hi kasuh manga, aminu vannoi'a kona kanoimang nadin kalolo neilosah jengin; chule nangma-a kona amaho sanga nasajole hatjo namkhat kasem ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Hijeh chun kakiheijin molsanga konin kahung kumlhan, chuin molsang chu meijin akan; chule kitepna songpheng teni chu kakhut teni-a aumin ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Chuin kaven ahile, veuvin, Pakai na Pathen'u dounan nachon seovin, bongnou lim kilhajol nana kisemun; Pakaiyin nathupeh-u lampia konin gangtah-in nakihei mangun ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Chuin songpheng teni chu kalan, kakhut teni-a konin kaseplhan, namitmu tah-un kasuchip min ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Chuin amasa-a bang chun nisomli le jan somli Pakai angsunga kaboh khupmin; ama lunghansah dinga Pakai mitmu-a giloutah-a chonset nabol hou jouseu jehchun, an neloule twi donlouvin kaumin ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ajehchu nangho sumang dinga nachung uva Pakai lunghanna, alungsatna le alunglhai louna chu kakichan ahi. Ahivangin Pakaiyin hichepet jong chun kathu angaijin ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Chuin Pakai chu Aaron chunga suhmang na ding khopmin alunghangin; Aaron dinjong hiche petchun kataovin ahi. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Chuin nachonset nao, na bongnou kisemu chu kalan, meija kagouvin, leivui banga adi kahsen kachil goijin; chule adi chu molsanga kona longlha vachadunga chun kalehlut tai." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Chule Teberah'a, Massah'a, Kibroth-hatta-avah'a jong Pakai chu nalunghansah-uvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Chutobang chun Pakaiyin Kadesh-barnea'a kona nasol uva, Chetouvun lang keiman kapehnao gamchu galo taovin ati chun; Pakai na Pathen'u thupeh dounan nakiphin un, ama natahsan hih-un, athujong nangai pouvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Nanghohi kahet nikhouva patnin Pakai dounan nakiphin un ahi. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Chutia Pakaiyin nangho suhmang ding ahi atijeh chun, amasa-a kabohkhup bangchun, nisomli le jan somli Pakai anga kaboh khupmin ahi." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Hijeh chun Pakai henga kataovin, Vo Pakai Pathen, naloupina vanga nalhat doh-a, khut thahat tah-a Egypt'a kona napuidoh nam mite le nagoulote hi sumanghih-in." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Nasoh Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob chu geldoh inlang, hiche mite lungtahna, agitlouna le, achonset naohi vehih beh-in." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Achuti loule neihin puidohnao gam miten, Pakaiyin ateppehna gama apuilut theilou jeh le, aman amaho ahot jeh-a, gamthipma thagam dinga ahin puidoh-u ahi, tigetnunte." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Amavang nathahat thilboltheina le naban najahdoh-a nahinpuidoh namite le nagoulote ahiuve, katin ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Hiche laichun Pakaiyin kahenga, Amasa-a bangin songpheng ni khengin lang, molsang chunga kaheng lama hungtouvin lang, thing thingkhong khat semin." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Chule nangin nasechip songphenga kisun thucheng hochu songpheng teni chunga chu kasutding, chule hichu thingkhong sunga nakoiding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Chuin Shittim thingin thingkhong kasemin, chule amasa bangin songpheng ni kakhengin, chule songpheng teni chu kakhutna choipumin molsanga chun kakal toutai." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Chuin songpheng chunga chun akisun masa bangin, khoppi nikho-a molsanga meikong lah-a kona Pakaiyin naheng uva asei thupeh som chu asunin; chule hichu Pakaiyin keima eipetai." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Chuin kaki heijin molsanga konin kahung kumlhan, songpheng chu kasem thingkhong sunga chun kakhumin; Pakaiyin eithupeh bangin chua chun aumjing tan ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Chuin Israel chate chu Jaakan chate kho Beeroth'a konin Mosera alhungun; chua chun Aaron athin, chumun mama-a chun avui taovin; chule ama khelin achapa Eleazer'in thempu tohmun lhachana chu atongtai." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Chua konchun amaho Gudgodah'a alhungun, Gudgodah-a konin vapi twiho umna gam Jotbath alhungun ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Hiche laichun Pakai kitepna thingkhong puding le, Pakai angsunga dinga lhachana tong dingin, chule tunichan geija amin phatthei boh dingin Pakaiyin Levi phung chu achom khenin ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Hijeh-a chu Levi'n asopite lah-a chan jong, gou jong aneilou ahi; Pakai na Pathen'un athupeh banga, Pakai chu agoulo hija ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Chuin phat masa-a bang chun nisomli le jan somli molsanga chun kaumin; chule hichepet jong chun Pakaiyin eingaipeh-a, Pakaiyin nangho nasumang tapouvin ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, Kipatdoh-in, Apu apateu pehdinga kaki hahsel na gamchu alutnuva agalo theina diuvin, mipi ho chu lamkaijin, eiti." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Chule tun, Israel, Pakai na Pathen'in nanga kona angeh chu ipiham, Pakai na Pathen chu naginna, alampi jouse-a najuija, ama nangailutna, nalung pumpi le nathaneina pumpi-a Pakai na Pathen najena," 
Deuteronomy10:13 Naphat theina dinga tunia kathupeh, Pakai thupeh hole achonna dan kisunho nanitding hi hilouham?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Veuvin, van le vanho jouse van, chule leiset le asunga umjouse jonghi Pakai na Pathen uva ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ahinla napu napateu ngailut ding bou chu Pakai lunglhaina ahin, amaho nunga achilhahteu, nangho jeng jong tunia nahinao bangahi mijouse chungvuma nalhenu ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Hijeh chun nalungsung chep tanun lang, louchal tahih-un." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u hi pathenho Pathen, pakai ho Pakai, Pathen loupitah, hat chungnung, tijat umtah, mihem mai velou le, lepthol lalou ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Aman paneilou le meithai thu dihtah-in atanin, gamdangmi nehding le vonding apen angailun ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Hijeh chun nanghon gamdangmi ngailuvin; ajehchu nangho jong Egypt gama gamdangmi nanahiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Nangman Pakai na Pathen nagin ding; ama najena, ama-a nabe ding, chule amina nakitep ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Amachu navahchoi dingpa ahin, chule namit teni-a namu hiche thil loupile tijat umtahho nangma dinga ana bola na Pathen chu ahi." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Napu napateu chu Egypt gama mi somsagi toh anachesuh-un; chule tun Pakai na Pathen'un natamdanu chu van'a ahsi ho banga tamin nasemtaove. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Hijeh-a chu nangman Pakai na Pathen chu na ngailutna, aman nanganse na ho, achona dan kisunho, athutanna ho, chule athupehho nanit jingding ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Chule tunikhon heuvin, ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u gimbolna, aloupina, akhut thahat, chule aban jahdohna hekhalou le mukhalou nachateo henga thu kasei ahipoi;" 
Deuteronomy11:3 Chule Egypt mite lailung tah-a Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chung le agamsung pumpi-a athilkidang bol ho le anatohho," 
Deuteronomy11:4 Egypt sepai ho chung le asakol hou chung, chule akangtalai chunga anabol ho, amahon nahin nungdel naova twipisan iti achupsah-u, chule iti dana Pakaiyin amaho tunigeija asuhmang ham," 
Deuteronomy11:5 Chule hiche munna nahunglhun kahseuva gamthipma chu naheng uva ipi abol," 
Deuteronomy11:6 Chule Reuben chapa Eliab chapateni Dathan le Abiram chunga ipi abol, leisetnin akam iti ahinkah-a amaho le a-insungu pumpi, chule apon inhou le Israelte lah-a anei jouseu aval lhum ham ti hekhalou le mukhalou nachateo henga thu kasei ahipoi." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Ahin nangho mitnin vang Pakai thilbol loupiho jouse chu amun ahi. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Hijeh-a chu nahat theijuva, lodinga nachennao gam chu nagalo theina dinguvin, keiman tunia kathupeh, dan thupeh ho jousehi nanit dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Chutile Pakaiyin napu napateu leh achilhah teo pehdinga ahahselna, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gama chu nahinkhou sot thei ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ajehchu galo dinga nachenao gamchu nahungdohnao Egypt gam, anche louhing hon, muchi natheuva nakenga twi nachap jinao tobang ahipoi." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Ahinla galo dinga nachenao gam chu thinglhang le phaicham umna, van gotuijin achap nou jingna gam," 
Deuteronomy11:12 Pakai na Pathen'un avettup jingna gam, Pakai na Pathen'u mit chu kum kipatna pat kum kichaigeija achunga aum jingna gam ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Chule hung hitiding ahi, Pakai na Pathen chu nangailutna nalung pumpi le nalhagao pumpi-a ama jen dinga tunia kapeh thupeh hi chingthei tah-a nangaija ahile," 
Deuteronomy11:14 Nachang, na lengpithei, chule nathao twi naki khoptup theina dinga van gotwi masale gotwi nunung aphatcha kapeh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Chule naneh uva nava theina dinguva, nagancha teo dinga nagamsunguva hamhing kaphatsah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Nalungsungu lheplhah-a aumlouna dingle, nakihei manguva pathen dang ho najen uva nahoulou nadingun chingtheijun." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Chutile Pakai lunghan nachunga koujah intin, gojuh louna din van khah intin, leijin aga asodoh louding,Pakaiyin napeh-u gam phatah-a konin mangthah loi getnun nate." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Hijeh chun hiche kathuho hi nalungthim le nahinna-in vop inlang, namit teni kah-a thuchih bom tobang ahitheina din, nakhut chunga melchihna hidingin kanbeh-in." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Chule hicheho chu nachateo nahil dingu, na-in'uva natou petnu, nalam jot petnu, nalup petnu chule natho tengu jongle nahil jingdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Chule na-inkot khomho chung le nakotpiho chunga hichehi nasut dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Chutia chu napu napateu pehdinga Pakaiyin ahahselnau gama chu nahinkhou le nachateo hinkhoho chu leichunga vangam nikhoho banga sotding ahi. 
Deuteronomy11:22 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen chu ngailut ding, alampi jouse jotdinga chule ama-a behjing dinga kathupeh ho chu chingthei tah-a nanitna ahile," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Pakaiyin namasanguva konin hiche nam jousehi anodoh ding, nangho sanga nasajole hatjo namho nahin lodiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Nakeng phanguva nachot phahna chanu chu nangho-a hiding, gamthip le Lebanon'a pat, luipilen, Euphrates luipi-a pat twikhanglen mong gei sana nangho-a hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Namasanguva ding ngam koimacha umlou ding ahi. Ajehchu aman naheng uva anasei banga, nachot phahdiu gamjousea chu Pakai na Pathen'un nangho gin nale kichatna akoiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Veuvin, tunin namasanguva phattheina le gaosapna kakoije." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Pakai na Pathen nu thupeh ho, tu-a kapeh hohi nanit nuva ahile phattheina hintin," 
Deuteronomy11:28 Chule Pakai na Pathen'u thupeh nanit lou uva, nahetkhah lou pathen dangho houdinga, tunia kathupeh lampia kona nakihei manguva ahile gaosapna hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, galo dinga nachenao gama chu Pakai Pathen'in napuilut tengu le, Gerizim molsang chunga chu phat theina nakoi uva, Ebal molsang chunga gaosapna nakoi dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Hichu Jordan gal langkhat, nisa lhumna lamsanga Moreh phaicham kom, Gilgal maijon muncham dunglaija Canaan mite chena gama chu uma hilouham?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'un napehnao gamchu galo dinga Jordan nagalkai diu ahin, chule hichu nalouva, asunga nachendiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Chule tunia namasanguva kakoi chonna dan kisun hole thutanna hochu nanitna dinguva nachihthei dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Hichehohi napu napateu Pakai Pathen'in leisetna nahin laiseuva nalodiuva anapehnao gama nanitdiu chonna dan le thutan naho chu ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:2 Nagalo diu gama namhon molsang ho chung le lhangho chunga, chule thinghing phung engsel noitina, a-pathen hou anajen nau munho jouse chu nasuhmang soh heldiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Chule amaicham ho nasuh chimuva, asong phu hou navohboh uva, athingbom hou meija nahaldiu, semthu milim pathenho naphuh lhuh uva, chuche munna kona chu aminu nasuhmang diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Pakai na Pathen'u henga vang chutia nabol loudiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Ahinla Pakai na Pathen'un naphung jouseu lah-a kona amin umna dinga alhendoh ding mun, hiche mun ngeichu nahol diu, hiche mun'a chu nahung diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Chule hilama chu nagovam thiltohou, naganlhai na hou, na somakhat hou, nakhutjap thilpeh hou, nakitep nahou, nalung cham tah uva thilto natohou, nagan honu le na kelngoi hon lah uva apeng masapen ho chu nahin choidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Chule chua chu Pakai na Pathen'u masanga naneh uva Pakai na Pathen'in nanatohna jouse-a phatthei nabohna chung changa nangma le na-insung mite jouse nakipa diu ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:8 Tunikho-a hilai mun'a mitinin ama mitmu-a dih asah chan abol banga hi nabol loudingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'un napeh-u choldona le gou lona munchu nalhung hihlai tadiuve. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ahinla nangho Jordan nagalkaijuva, Pakai na Pathen'un lodinga nana peh-u gama nachen tengule, chule nakimvel uva namelma teu jouse-a kona choldona napeh tengule, bitkeija nachendiu ahitan;"
