Deuteronomy12:11 Chutengle Pakai na Pathen'un amin umna dinga alhending munkhat umintin; hilama chu kathupeh jouse, nagovam thiltohou, naganlhai nahou, nahopsom hou, nakhutjap thilpeh hou, Pakai henga nakitepnao deilhen kitepna jouse nahinchoi dingu ahi;" 
Deuteronomy12:12 Chule nangho Pakai na Pathen'u masanga, nangho le nachapateo le nachanuteu, nasoh pasal ho leh nasoh numei hou, chule nakotpi sunguva um Levi miteho toh nakipa khomdiu ahi; ajehchu amaho nang hotoh chan le gou neikhomlou ahiuve." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Mun namuna jouse-a govam thilto nato louna dingin chingtheijin. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Ahinla Pakaiyin naphung sungu khat penpena kona alhendoh ding munna chu govam thilto nato uva, chua chu kathupeh jouse nabolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Ahivanga Pakai na Pathen'u phattheiboh dungjuija aman napeh jouseu chu nalungin angaichat dungjuija nakotpi phung jouse-a natha-a, asa naneh theiding ahi. Mi atheng le atheng louvin jong, sapengchal le sakhichal hijongle aneh theiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Thisan bou naneh loudiu, twibanga tolla nasunlhah diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Nakotpi hou sunga chu nachang hopsom-u, nalengpi gao hopsom, nathao twi'u hopsom, nagancha houlah-a apeng masaho ahiloule nakelngoi hon lah uva apeng masaho, kitepna-a nakitepna hou, nalungcham thilto hou, nakhutna najap thiltohou chu naneh theilou dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Amavang Pakai na Pathen'un alhending mun'a chu Pakai na Pathen'u masanga vang,nang le nachapate le nachanute, nasoh pasal le nasoh numei ho, chule nakotpi hou sunga um Levi hotoh naneh teidiu ahi. Chule Pakai na Pathen'u masanga nakhut nangapna jouse-a chu nakipa diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Leichunga nahinlai chansea Levi mite nanot thap lounadin chingtheijin. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Pakai na Pathen'un nana teppeh-u banga nagamgi akehletna, chule, Nahinna-in sa nehding ngaichat jeh-a sa nenge nati tengle, nahinnan aduchat sa chan chu naneh thei ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Pakai na Pathen'in amin koina dinga analhen munchu nanga kona agamlat behsetna ahile, keiman kathupeh banga, Pakaiyin napeh nagancha hon le nakelngoihona kona natha-a, nakotpi phunga chu nahinna-in aduchat channa naneh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Sapeng chal leh sakhichal kineh banga naneh ding ahi; athengle atheng louvin kibanga aneh dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Thisan bou chu naneh louhelna dingin chingtheijin; ajehchu thisan chu hinna ahin; chule hina chu asa toh naneh koptha theilou ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Nanghon hichu naneh loudiu, twibanga tolla nasunlhah dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Pakai mitmu-a thildih nabol tengle, nangma le nanunga nachate naphat theina dinguva hichu naneh lou dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Nathil theng neiho le nakitep naho bou chu nachoija, Pakaiyin alhending mun'a chu nache ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Chule na govam thilto chu asa le athisan agoma Pakai na Pathen'u maicham chunga na nato-a, chule aganlhaina thisan chu Pakai na Pathen maicham chunga kisung lhading, asachu naneh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Pakai na Pathen mitmu-a apha le adih nabol tengle, nangma le nanunga nachate dinga a-itih-a naphat theina dinguva, nangman kathupeh jouse hi lunglutna nangaija nanitding ahi." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Pakai na Pathen'in galo dinga nachenao gama nampiho chu namasanguva kona asuhmanga, nanghon amaho najo uva, agamuva nachen tengule;" 
Deuteronomy12:30 Namasanguva kona akisuhmang banguva, amaho nung najuina-a na-o louna ding le, hiche namhohin itobanga a-pathen'u ajenum? amaho bolbangin eihon jong bolute, tia a-pathen'u thudol hou nakhol louna dingun chingtheijun." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Hitobanga chu Pakai na Pathen'u henga nabol loudingu ahi. Ajehchu amahon Pakaiya thet umjouse, ahot ho chu abol jiuvin, achapateu le achanuteu san a-pathen dingun meijin ahal jiuve." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Boldinga thu kapeh chanchu nabolding ahi; hichea kona chu nabelap louding, lah jong nalahdoh louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Nalah uva themgao ham, mang neiham asodoh-a, melchihna ham, thil kidang namusah uva," 
Deuteronomy13:2 Chule melchihna ham, thil kidang ham chu aguilhuna, chule naheng uva, Nahet khahlouvu pathen dangho juiju hitin, amaho jennu hite tia aseile;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 Nanghon chuche themgao ham, mang neipa ham thuchu ngaihih-un; ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in nalung pumpile nalhagao pumpiuva Pakai na Pathen'u chu nangailut nangailut lou hetna dia napatepmu ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Nanghon Pakai na Pathen'u nung najuijuva, naginuva, athupeh ho nanit uva, athu naman uva, ama najen uva, chule ama-a nabediu ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Chule chuche themgao ham, mangnei ham pachu tha jengding ahi; ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u Egypt gama nahinpuidoh uva, sohchana in'a kona nalhatdoh paova kona kihei mangna ding thu aseijin, Pakai Pathen'in chedinga thu napehnao lampia kona kiheimang ding nagouvin ahi. Chutia chu nanghon agilou chu nalah uva kona chu nasuhmang diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Nanu chapa nasopipa ham, nachapa ham, nachanu ham, na-angkoi na-inneipi ham, nagol napai ham, nahinna tobang hela nagel khatnin guhthima najola, nahenga, Nangman nahetkhah lou, nangma le napaten ahetkhah louvu pathen dangho gahouvu hite;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 Nakimvel uva mite, nakom naiham, gamlatah-a umham, kolmonga pat kolmong langkhat gei pathen ho chu gahouvu hite tia aseija ahileh," 
Deuteronomy13:8 Nangman amachu nanoppeh louding, ngaijong nangaipeh louhel ding; namitnin jong akhotolou ding, kheh jong nakheh louding, chule imjong na-im mang lou ding;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 Amavang natha teitei joh ding; nangman ama thana dinga achunga nakhut nalhah masat pending, chujoule mipijouse khut chu achunga chuding ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Chule ama chu songa nase-a naselih dingu ahi; ajehchu aman Egypt gamsunga sohchana in'a kona nahin puidoh Pakai na Pathen'a kon heimang ding nagon ahi. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Chutia chu Israel jousen ajah uva, kicha diu, chule nalah uva hitobang gitlounahi abolkit tah loudingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Pakai na Pathen'in chenna dinga nanapeh khopiho khatna thu kisei; 
Deuteronomy13:13 Nalah uva kon mi phabep, Belial chate achedoh-un, akhopi sunguva mite chu ajol lhaovin, ajah uva, Nanahet khah louvu pathen dangho lhachana tong dingin cheohite, tia kisei najah-a ahile;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 Chuteng nangman nadoh toh ding, nakhol ding, gunchutah tah-a nadoh ding, chule ven, hichu thutah ahia, chutobang thet umchu nalah uva akibol tahbeh ahi-a ahile;" 
Deuteronomy13:15 Chuche khopi-a chengho chu chemjam hema natha teiding, chua cheng jousele, chua ganchahon chu chemjam hema nasuhmang hel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Chule chua galthil kichom jouse chu kholai lamlena nakhop sohkeija, chuche khopi le thilkichom takip chu Pakai na Pathen dinga meija nahalding ahi. Chule hichu a-itih-a dinga kisevuma, avela kisadohkit louhel ding ahitai." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Chule nakhutna gaosap thil natohkhah louding ahi: chutile Pakai chu tijat umtah alungsatna-a kona akileheija, napu napateu henga anamusah banga hepina namusah-a, nachunga lainatna aneija, napunsah ding ahi;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen mitmu-a adih bolna dinga tunia keiman thu kapeh ama thupeh jouse nanitna dingin, Pakai na Pathen aw nangaijin ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Nangho Pakai na Pathen'u chate nahiuve: mithi puldou na-a nangho le nangho naki-at chen loudingu, chule namitmulu jong nahet tol louhel dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ajehchu nangho Pakai na Pathen uva dinga mitheng nahiu ahin, chule Pakaiyin leichunga um nam jouse chungvuma ama-a tum hidinga achombeh-a nalhenu ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Nanghon thet um kiti mongmong naneh louhel dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Nanghon naneh dingu saho chu: bongchal, kelngoi, chule kelcha." 
Deuteronomy14:5 Sakhichal, sapengchal, sajuh, gamkel, gambongchal chule gamkelngoi." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Chule sa jouse lah-a kon akengtin kikhena atin ni-a kika, chule anehsa ihdoh kitna lhaikit tapou chu naneh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Hijongle anehsa ihdoh kit ahiloule atin kikhenkah lah-a kon sangongsang, telep, jupi, hichehohi naneh loudiu ahi; ajehchu amahon anehsa a-ihdoh-un alhaikit naovin ahin atinnu vang akika pon ahi. Hijeh-a chu nangho dinga athenglou hiuva ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Chule vohcha jong atin akikah vangin anehsa a-ihdoh-a alhaikit lou jeh-in nangho dinga athenglou ahi. Nanghon asao naneh loudiu, athilongu jong natohkhah loudiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Twilah-a ganhing nenehthei houchu hichehohi ahi: alha nei le alipnei jouse naneh diu ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Chule alha le alip neilou jouse chu naneh loudingu ahi; hicheho chu nangho dinga thenglou ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Vacha theng jouse naneh dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ahin naneh loudiu hochu: muvanlai, mungagal, muthong" 
Deuteronomy14:13 Muvom, mubong, chule muthong toh kilimlo jouse." 
Deuteronomy14:14 Va-ah le amatoh kilimlo jouse," 
Deuteronomy14:15 Chule sumbu, vabah, kakhut, chule mu toh kilimlo jouse." 
Deuteronomy14:16 Sumbuchanglit, sumbupi, twivatot," 
Deuteronomy14:17 Chule twivamuhsao, muthong lhem, vatot muhkon" 
Deuteronomy14:18 Chule twilungva, twivakang le akilimlo jouse, vakhong lhu le bah," 
Deuteronomy14:19 Chule a-opma kitholtho-a lengthei takip nangho dinga athenglou ahi: hicheho chu nehlou ding ahiuve. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Ahinla vacha thengho jouse chu naneh theiju ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Nanghon athikam imacha naneh loudingu ahi: hichu nakotpi phunga um kholjin mihon anehdiuva napeh ding; ahiloule gamchom mi henga najohthei ahi. Ajehchu nangho Pakai na Pathen'u dinga mitheng nahiu ahi. Nanghon api noitwija kelnou nahon loudingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:22 Akumtina nalouvin asodoh namuchi-a kona hungpeng doh jouse hopsom-a hopkhat thonlouva napeh ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Pakai na Pathen ginje nakihil jing theina dinga, nachang hopsom, nalengpi theiga hopsom, nathao twi hopsom, nabonghon le nakelngoi hon na kona peng masaho chu amin umna dinga alhendohna munachu Pakai na Pathen angsunga naneh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Pakai na Pathen'in phatthei naboh teng, Pakai na Pathen'in amin umna dinga alhendohna mun chu nanga kona agamlhat behsetna, ahiloule alampi chu asao behsetna, chutia chu napoh joulouva ahile;" 
Deuteronomy14:25 Nangman athil chu sum nasosah-a, sum chu nahin choija, Pakai na Pathen'in alhendohna mun'a chu nacheding ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Chule hiche sum chu nahinna-in angaichat jouse bongchal ham, kelngoi ham, lengpithei ham, ahiloule zuchih ham, nahinnan angaichat jouse chohna-a namana; chukoma chu Pakai na Pathen angsunga naneh-a, nangma le na-insung mite kipah tah-a naum dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Chule nakotpi sunga um Levi mite chu nanot thap louding ahi; ajehchu aman nangma toh chan le goulo aneikhom pon ahi. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Kumthum akichai sehle chuche kum-a nathilsoh jouse hopsom nahin choija, nakotpi sunga nasetkhom ding," 
Deuteronomy14:29 Chule Levi mite (ajehchu amahon nangma toh chan le goulo aneikhom lou ahi,) le na kotpi sunga um namdang mi, pabeiho, chule meithaiho chun aneh uva vading ahiuve; chutile Pakai na Pathen'in nakhutna natoh jouse chu phatthei abohna ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Kum sagi kichai sehle lha ongna nabolji ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Chule lha ongna umdan chu hichehi hiding ahi: aheng akom batna pechanin alha-ong ding ahi; aheng akom ahiloule asopi batna homa chun alahpeh teitei louding ahi; ajehchu hichehi Pakai lha-ongna kiti chu ahi. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Gamdang mi batna napeh vang chu nalelah kit thei ahi, ahinla ipi hile nangma-a nasopi henga umchu nalha-ong ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Hiche jeh-a chu nalah uva koima avaicha umlou ding ahi; ajehchu lodinga Pakai Pathen'in napeh gama chu Pakaiyin nasatah-a phatthei naboh ding ahi; 
Deuteronomy15:5 Tunia thu kapeh hiche thupeh ho jouse jui dinga Pakai na Pathen aw chu kituptah-a nangaija ahile. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Ajehchu aman nana thutep banga Pakai na Pathen'in phatthei naboh ding ahin: nangman nam tamtah henga nahop ding, amavang nangman apa nalah louding; nam tamtah chunga vai nahom ding, amavang amahon nang chunga vai ahomloudiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Pakai na Pathen'in napehna gama nakotpi sunga chu nasopite khattou nalah uva vaicha auma ahile, nangman nalung natahsah louding, nasopi vaicha-a kona nakhut nakihsah louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Amavang ahenga naphalna khut nalhana, alhahsamna-a angaichat lhingsetna napehjoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Nangman nalungsung gilouva chun Kum sagina lha ongna kum anaitai tia nagel louna dingle; nasopi chunga namit thipma ima pelouva naum louna din chingtheijin; chutile nangma dounan Pakai kou intin, nadingin chonset hikhante." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Nangman ama napeh teitei ding; chule ama napeh tengle nalung nanatsah louhel ding ahi. Ajehchu hiche-a ding tah-a chu Pakai na Pathen'in natoh jouse le nakhutna nabol jouse chu phatthei aboh ahi. 
Deuteronomy15:11 Ajehchu gamsunga kona migenthei beitih umlou ding ahi. Hijeh-a chu nagamsunga nasopipa, nami vaichapa, namilhasampa chunga nakhut hongphalin tia thu kapeh nahi." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Chule nasopi Hebrew mi pasal ham, ahiloule numei ham nahenga hung kijoh auma, kumgup nangma najentah-a ahile; akum sagi lhinnale nanga kona ongthola nalhadoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Chule nanga kona ongthola nasoldoh tengle, agohkeova nachemang sah louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Nakelngoi hona kon, nachang phola kon, nalengpi ga chilna-a kona itlou hella napeh ding; Pakai na Pathen'in phatthei naboh na-a kona chu ama napeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Chule nangman jong Egypt gama soh nanahi-a, Pakai Pathen'in nalhatdoh ahi chu nageldoh ding ahi; hijeh-a chu tunia hichehi kathupeh nahi." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Chule hitiding ahi, nangma le na-insungmi angainat jeh, nangma toh umkhom nop asah jeh-a, amachun nahenga, Nanga konin chemang ponge ati-a ahileh;" 
Deuteronomy15:17 Nangman thih hemkhat nalah ding, kotkhah phunga abil navuding, chule amachu a-itih a dinga nasoh hiding ahi. Chule nasoh numei chunga jong chutobang ma-a chu nabol ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Nanga kona ongthola nasoldoh chu nang dinga thil hahsatah tobang hilouding ahi; ajehchu thalah soh natoh chan ni atoh-a kum gup set nangman najen ahi. Chutia chu Pakai na Pathen'in natohna channa phatthei naboh ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy15:19 Nagancha hole nakelngoi hon lah-a achal pengmasa ho jong chu Pakai na Pathen dinga nathenso ding: nabongchal peng masapen chu na natoh sah louding, nakelngoi honlah-a apeng masapen jong chu amul navo louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Chule hichu nangma le na insung miten kumsehle Pakaiyin alhenna mun'a chu Pakai na Pathen angsunga naneh dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Chule alah-a nolna nei auma, akengbai ham, amitcho ham, deimotah-a nolna nei umtapou chu Pakai na Pathen henga ganlhaina-a nato louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Nangin hichu nakotpi ho sunga naneh ding: mi aboh le athengin kibang tah-a sapeng chal le sakhichal sa kineh banga anehdiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Athisan bou chu naneh louding, twi banga tolla nasunlhah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Abib lhachu nit inlang, Pakai na Pathen henga kalchuhkut bolin: ajehchu Abib lha jan laija chu Pakai na Pathen'in Egypt'a kona nahin pui ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin amin umna dinga alhena mun'a chu ganchahon le kelngoi hon lah-a kona Pakai na Pathen henga kalchuh kut ganlhaina nabol ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:3 Nangman hichu chol kiso changlhah toh naneh louding; Egypt'a kona nahung dohlai nikho chu geldohna dinga nahinlaise-a cholsolou changlhah, gimbolna changlhah ngei chu nisagi naneh ding ahi; ajehchu Egypt gama kona kinotah-a hung doh-a nahi." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Chule nagamsunguva chu nisagi sung chol kiso changlhah himhim kimulouding; chule nimasani nilhah lama naganlhai sa chu jankhovah jingkah geija umlou ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Pakai na Pathen'in napehna kotpi sung khat penpena chu kalchuhkut ganlhaina nabolthei louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:6 Amavang Pakai na Pathen'in amin umnadia alhending mun'a chu, Egypt gama kona hungpotdoh phattah, nilhumdon, nilhah lama chu kalchuhkut ganlhaina nabolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in alhending mun'a chu asa chu nago-a naneh ding, jingkah le nakile-a, naponbuh-a nache ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Nigup sunga cholsolou changlhang naneh ding; nisagi nile Pakai na Pathen'a dinga kikhop loupi umding ahi. Hiche sunga chu na natoh louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:9 Nangman hapta sagi nasimdoh ding: hapta sagi chu chang-atna dia koite nalap pat ni-a patna nasim ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Pakai na Pathen henga nakhut tah-a lungcham thilto nato-a haptaho kut chu nanit ding, Pakai na Pathen'in phatthei naboh dungjui bangtah-a Pakai na Pathen henga napeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in amin umna dinga adeilhen mun'a chu Pakai na Pathen angsunga nangma nahin, nachapa ahin, nachanu ahin, nasohpa ahin, nasohnu ahin, nakotpi sunga um Levi mite ahin, nangma to umkhom namdang mi ahin, pabeiho ahin, meithai ahin, nakipa dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Chule nangma tahjong Egypt gama sohchanga ana um nahi nageldoh-a: hiche dan kisunhohi nanitna nabol ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Nachang le nalengpi ga nakhoptup jou tengle, nisagi sung lhambuh kut naman ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Chule na kut sunga chu nangma nahin, nachapa ahin, nachanu ahin, nasohpa ahin, nasohnu ahin, chule nakotpi sunga um Levi mite ahin, gamdangmi ahin, paneilou ahin, meithai ahin nakipa dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Pakaiyin adeilhen na ding mun'a chu Pakai na Pathen'u henga nisagi sung kut loupi nabol dingu ahi. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in nalhosoh jouse le nakhutsoh jouse chunga phatthei naboh ding ahin, hijeh-a chu nakipa teiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Kumkhat sunga na pasal jouseu Pakai masanga aman adeilhen mun'a chu thumvei gaki lulah dingu ahi; cholsolou kutna, haptaho kutna, chule lhambuh kutna: chule Pakai masanga khutgoh keova kilulah loudingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Mitinin Pakai na Pathen'un apeh phatthei bohna dungjuija ajokham cheh apehding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:18 Pakai na Pathen'in napeh nakul kotpi jouse-a, naphung jouse-a thutan hole vaipoho natundoh ding: chule amaho chun mipi thuchu dihtah-a atanpeh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Dihlou tah-a thu natan louding; mihem mai vea jatum na neilou ding; nehguh jong nalah louding ahi: ajehchu nehguh chun miching mit asuchon, michonpha ho thusei jong aheikon jin ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Pakai Pathen'in napehna gam chu nalo theija, nachen theina dinga, adih bouchu najui ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Pakai na Pathen maicham nasem nading vella chu ipi thing hitaleh thingbul naphu louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Pakai na Pathen'in ahot milim tapou natundoh louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy17:1 Bongchal ahiloule kelngoi chunga nolna nei, ahiloule deimona um tapou chu Pakai na Pathen henga ganlhaina-a nato louding ahi. Ajehchu hichu Pakai na Pathen dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Pakai na Pathen'un napeh-u kotpi sung hoichepen hijongle, nalah uva Pakai na Pathen thutep sukeh-a amitmua gitlouna bol pasal ahiloule numei akimu doh-a," 
Deuteronomy17:3 Pathen dangho agajena, keiman kathupeh hilou nisa ham, lhathah ham, van janel khattou ahouva;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 Chule hichu nangma nakisei peh-a, nangman najah-a, gunchu tah-a nadoh toh-a, chule ven, hichu adih ahia, Israel sunga chutobang thil thet um bolla aum chu akiphotchetna ahile:" 
Deuteronomy17:5 Chutobang thilse bol pasal ahiloule numei chu nakul kotpi phunglama napui doh-a, chuche pasal ahiloule numei ngeichu, chule athikah seuva songa nase dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ahetoh mini, ahiloule mi thum kama kona thidinga lompa chu tha hiding ahi; ahin ahettohsah mi khat kama vang amachu kithat louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Ama thana dinga chu ahettohsah hon akhut alap masat pen dingu, chujoule mipi jousen khut alhahdiu ahi. Chutia chu nalah uva thilphalou chu nasuhmang diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Thisan kiso thu, them kichu thua, kivohto thu, nakotpi sunga kinel nohphah na thu nang dinga ageltoh hahsa behseh ahung sodoh-a ahile: nakipat doh-a, Pakai na Pathen'in adeilhen ding mun'a chu nache ding;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 Chuche laija Levi thempuho le thutana pang ding pa henga nahunga, nadoh tohding; chule amahon athutan lhuhnao chu namusah dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Chule Pakaiyin adeilhen ding mun'a mihon namusahdiu dungjuija chu nabolding; chule nahetsah-u jouse dungjuija nabolna dinga nachih theiding ahi. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Amahon thulhuh dan nahil dungjui le, thutan dan nahil dingu dungjuija nabol ding; amahon namusahdiu thu lhuhsah-a kona chu jetlam le veilama napeldoh louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Chule Pakai na Pathen anga kinbola pangji thempu thu le thutanpa thu ngailouva ama kisongpa ngei chu thi ding ahi: chule Israel lah-a kona aphalou chu nasuhmang ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy17:13 Chutile mijousen jaovintin, kichaovintin, ama le ama kisongin ima boltapou vinte." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Pakai Pathen'in napehna gam chu nahung lhuna, hichu nalo-a, asunga nachenna, Avela namho jouse bangin kachunga lengkhat kisem inge nati tengle;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 Pakai na Pathen'in alhendingpa tahchu iti jongle lenga natunding ahi: nasopite lah-a kona mikhat chu nachunga lenga natunding ahin; nasopi hilou namdang mi chu nachunga natunlou ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ahinla aman ama dinga sakol apunsah louding, ahiloule sakol apunsahna dinga mite chu Egypt gama akilesah louhel ding ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin naheng uva, Nangho hiche lampia chu nakilekit louheldiu ahi, anatin ahi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Alung kiheimang louna dinga jijong tampi anei louding; chule sana dangka jong nasatah-a apunsah louhel ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Chule hiti ding ahi, ama alenggam laltouna-a atouteng, Levi mite le thempuho angsung um hiche dan thuhi lekhabu khatna akijih dohding:" 
Deuteronomy17:19 Chule hichu amatoh umkhom ding, ahinkho lhum keija asimding ahi: chuti henglang hile Pakai ginje ahetna, chule hiche danthu-a thuchengho le dan kisunho chu atohdoh na dinga chingthei ding," 
Deuteronomy17:20 Asopiho chunga alungthima akichoisang lou ding, chule thupeh-a kona jetlam ahiloule veilama akihei manglou ding; achaina geija Israelte lah-a ama ahin achate ahin alenggam sunga ahinkho sot thei ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Thempuho le Levi ho, chule Levi phung jouse chun chanle gou Israel toh aneikhom theilou diu ahi; amahon meija kigou Pakaiya dinga thiltoho le Ama chanho chu aneh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Hijeh-a chu amahon asopite lah-a gou aneiloudiu ahi: aman ahenguva aseibanga, Pakai chu agoulou ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Chule mipi-a kona thempu chanding chu hicheho hi ahi, bong ahiloule kelngoija ganlhaina thilto hintoh hochun thempupa chu adah, akhalhang, chule agilpi apeh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Nangman na chang ga masapen, lengpitwi masapen, thaotwi masapen, chule na kelngoimul kivou masapen jong ama napeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in amale achapate chu a-itih-a Pakai mina lhacha na tong dinga naphung jouseu lah-a kona ana lhendoh ahi. 
Deuteronomy18:6 Chule Levi mikhat chu akhopemna Israel jouse lah-a khopi khatpen pena kona ahunga, Pakaiyin alhending mun chu alungpumpia ngailutna neija ahunga ahile;" 
Deuteronomy18:7 Chuteng Pakai anga dingjing asopi Levi hon abol bang banga Pakai a-Pathen mina lhacha-a pangding ahi. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Agouchan kijohna-a kona amu tilou amahon nehding chan kibang aneicheh dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy18:9 Pakai na Pathen'in napehna gam chu nalhun tengle, chuche namho chonna thet umtah hochu boldinga naki themchuh louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Nalah uva achapa ham ahiloule achanu ham mei pal galkaisah, ahiloule ailhim mangcha, gaothusei, mitpheldoi mangcha, ahiloule doichoi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 Ahiloule milhimthei, lhagao bohtoh kijol, doi-aithem, mithilha koutheiho chu nalah uva umloubeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ajehchu hiche thilho boljouse chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin; chule hiche thet umtahho jeh-a hi Pakai na Pathen'un na-angsung uva kona amaho anodoh ahi. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Nangma Pakai na Pathen angsunga pha chamkim nahiding ahi. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Ajehchu naloding hiche namhohin gaothusei ho le aisan ho thu angaiju ahin; nangma vang Pakai na Pathen'in chutia boldin naphalpoi. 
Deuteronomy18:15 Pakai na Pathen'in nalah uva kon, nasopite lah-a kona keima tobang themgao khat nahin tundoh pehdingu ahin; amathu chu nangaidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Horeb mun'a kikhopi nikho-a, Kathi louna din Pakai ka Pathen aw neijah sahkit danlang, hiche meikong nasatah hi neimusah kit hih-in, tia Pakai na Pathen nangaichatna jouse dungjui chun." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, Amahon aseiju chu aseikha lheh-uve ati." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Keiman asopiteu lah-a konin nangma tobang khat themgao khat tundoh peh ungting, akamsunga kathu kakhum ding; keiman ama kathupeh ding jouse chu aman ajah uva aseipeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Chule hitiding ahi, aman kamina aseiding kathu hohi angailou chanchu, keiman ama-a kona hichu kangeh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ahinla aseidinga thu kapehlou kamina achama thusei themgao, ahiloule pathen dangho mina thusei chanchu, chuche themgao ngeichu thiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Chule nangman nalungthima, Thu chu Pakaiyin asei ahipoi ti iti kahet ding ham? nati-a ahile," 
Deuteronomy18:22 Themgao khatnin Pakai mina thu aseija, aseidoh thilho chun anung ajui louva, ahung guilhun louva ahile, hiche thilchu Pakaiyin asei hilou ahin; amavang themgaopa chun hichu ama lungchama asei ahi: nangman ama chu nakichat louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Pakai Pathen'in agamu napeh amaho chu Pakai na Pathen'in asuhmanga, chule nangman agamu natoupha-a, akhopi hou le a-inhouva nachen tengle;" 
Deuteronomy19:2 Pakai Pathen'in lodinga napehna gam lailunga chu khopi thum nakhendoh ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Pakai Pathen'in lodinga napehna gam pumpi chu hopthum-a nahopkhen na, tolthat takip jamlut theina dinga lampi nagon ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Chule tolthat ahintheina dinga chumuna jamlut dingho thudol chu hichehi ahi: amasanga kihot tona umlouva tosoija aheng akom that ho; 
Deuteronomy19:5 Mi aheng akom toh gam manga thingphuh dinga achea, thingchu phuhlhuh nadinga aheicha chu alap donga, achang chu aga-a kona alendoh-a, aheng akompa chunga achuh-a, athi-a ahile; hiche khopiho khatna chu jamlutna hingding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Amasa hotna aneiloujeh-a ama chu thidinga lom ahilou vangin, thisan phu lapan tolthatpa chu alungsat petnin nungdel intin, lampi asaojeh-a phapantin, that getninte." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Hijeh-a chu khopi thum nakise khen ding ahi, tia thu kapeh nahi." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in napu napate henga peh dinga anahahselna gamchu akehletna, napu napate pehdinga athutep gam apumpi chu napeh-a ahile;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 Pakai na Pathen chu ngailut ding le alampi jot jing dinga, tunia thu kapeh hiche thupeh jousehi nanitna ahile; hiche khopi thum tilouva khopidang thum jong nakibelap thei ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Chutia chu Pakai Pathen'in lodinga napehna gamsunga chu thisan phu nachunga aumlouna dinga, monabei thisan kiso umlou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Ahinla khat touvin aheng akom ahotna amachu achanlhih-a, ama douna-a akipatdoh-a, thina theija avoh-a, athitah-a, hiche khopiho sung khatna chu ajamlutna ahile;" 
Deuteronomy19:12 Chuteng akhopi upaho chun mi asola chua kona ahinpuijuva, athi theina dinga thisan phulapa khutna chu apehdoh diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Namit nin ama chu akhoto louding, amavang aphatna dinga themona bei thisan kiso chu Israel'a kona nasuhmang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Pakai Pathen'in lodinga napeh nagoulona gamsunga malaija mihon anaphu sao, naheng nakom gamgi chu nachondoh louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Mihem khat themona ahin, ahiloule chonsetna ahin, itobang chonsetna bola hijongle, mikhat douna-a hettohsah khat kipanlou ding ahi. Hettohsah mini ham ahiloule mi thum ham kama bou athudol chu kisudet ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Hettohsah lhem khatnin mikhat thilbol adihlouva ngoh dinga ahung kipatdoh-a ahile; 
Deuteronomy19:17 Akinel teni chu anilhona chuche nikho laija thempu le, thutanpa masang Pakai angsunga chu ding lhonding;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 Thutanpa chun gunchu tah-a kholtoh ding: chule veuvin hettohsah chu hettohsah lhem ahia, asopi chunga dihlou tah-a ahettohsah ahile;" 
Deuteronomy19:19 Chutengle asopi chunga bolding agot bang banga chu, amachunga naboldiu ahi. Hitia chu nalah uva kona thilse chu nasuhmang diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Chule aumnalai ho chun ajah diu, kichadiu, chukalle chutobang thilse chu nalah uva abolkit loudiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Chule namitnin akhoto louding; hinkho khela hinkho, mit khela mit, ha khela ha, khut khela khut, chule keng khela keng kila ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Namelmate sat dinga nakon doh-a, sakol ho, akangtalai ho, mipi nang sanga tamjo namuteng, amaho chu kicha hih-in; ajehchu Egypt gama kona nahinpuidoh-a Pakai na Pathen chun naumpi jingnai." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Chule hitiding ahi, gal nasatdiu konle, thempu chun mipi ho chu anailutna akihoupi ding," 
Deuteronomy20:3 Chule ajah uva, Ngaijun, Vo Israel, tunia hi namelma teu satdia nahung naiju ahita: nalungu lhahsah hih-un, kicha hih-un, hot jong kihot hih-un, chule amaho jeh-in tijong tija hih-un;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen chu nangho huhhing dinga, nangho dinga namelma teu satdinga nangho toh lhonkhoma ahi, atiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Chule gal lamkai ho chun mipi jah-a, Inthah sa-a thensolou mi koi naum uvem? Ama chu a-in lama chedin kilekit tahen, achuti loule gala thi intin, midangin kithenso getninte." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Chule lengpihon sema aga neloulai naum uvem? Ama jongchu a-in lama chedin kilekit hen, achuti loule gala thi intin, midangin aga kineh getninte." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Chule jihol neija kichenpi loulai naum uvem? Ama chu a-in lama chedin kilekit tahen, achuti loule gala thi intin, midangin kichenpi getninte." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Chule lamkai ho chun mipi ho henga asebe nahlai ding, Akichale alungthoi naum uvem? Ama chu a-in lama chedin kilekit tahen, achuti loule ama lungbang bangin asopite lungthoi getninte, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Chule hitiding ahi, lamkai hon mipi henga thu aseichai tengule, agalsat lamkaiho chu mipi amakaisah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Khopi khat satdinga nahungnai tengle, ahenguva chamnathu seiphongin." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Chule hitiding ahi, chamna thua nahin donbut nuva, nahenga ahung kihon uva ahileh, hiti ding ahi: chua um mijouse chu nanoija hiuva, nangma najen dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ahin nakichampi nomlouva, nangma nanasat thuh-a ahi vangle, nangman hichu na-umkhum ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in nakhutna napehdoh tengle, chua pasal jouse chemjam'a monghema nathagam ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Ahinla numei ho le naosen ho, ganchaho le khopi sunga umjouse, chua thil kichom jouse geija nakilah ding; Pakai na Pathen'in nanapeh namelma teu thil nachomho chu naneh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Hiche nam miteho khopi hilou, nanga kona gamlatah-a um khopiho jouse chunga chutia chu nabol ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Ahinla Pakai na Pathen'in nagou loding napeh hiche khopi ho-a mite chu, ahaithei khatcha nahinghoi louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Hit mite, Amor mite, Canaan mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite, Jebus mite chu Pakai na Pathen'in nathupeh banga nasuhmang helding ahi." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Chutia chu amahon a-pathen hou chunga abolu thet umtah chonnaho chu nahil louna ding ahi; achuti loule Pakai na Pathen'u chunga nachonset khah ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy20:19 Khopi khat lah dinga achunga gal nabola, phat sottah na-umkhum teng, chukoma thingphung ho chu heicha-a naphuh-a nasuh manglou ding ahi. Ajehchu naneh thei ahin, kulpi umna-a pangdinga naphuh lhuh louding ahi, (ajehchu loujaova thingphung ho hi mihem hinkho ahi)." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Nemse ahikah seuva nangma kisatpi khopi chu umkhum na dinga, aga kinelouva nahet thingho bou chu nasuhmanga naphuh lhuh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Pakai Pathen'in lodinga napeh gamsunga chu mikhat kithatna, loujaova along luma, koitha ahi kihelouva aumle:" 
Deuteronomy21:2 Chuteng na upahou le nathutan hou hunguva, akithatpa-a kona akimvela khopiho chu atediu;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 Chule hitiding ahi, akithatpa-a kona khopi naipen, hiche khopi-a um upaho ngeichun bongla natong loulai, koljon kaikha loulai khat ahinkaijuva;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 Chule chuche khopi upaho chun bongla chu loukikai loulai le ima tuloulai phaichama chu akai lhah uva, chuche phaichama chu angong atan lhahdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Chule thempuho Levi chapaten ahin nai dingu ahi; ajehchu amaho chu Pakai na Pathen'un akin bol dingle, Pakai mina phattheiboh dinga alhendoh ahin; kinohphahna tin le kivohtona thutin chu athuva kona kitan ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Chule akithatpa-a kona khopi naipen upaho jouse chun phaichama angong kitan bongla chunga chu akhutnu akisop uva," 
Deuteronomy21:7 Chule amahon hitia hi adonbut uva aseidingu ahi, Kakhut uvin hiche thisan hi aso ahipon, chule kamitnun jong amupon ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Vo Pakai, nalhatdohsa nami Israelte henga hepina neijinlang, chule themona neilou thisan kiso hi nami Israelte chunga nga hih-in, atidiu ahi. Chutile thisan kiso chu ngaidama umding ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Chutia chu Pakai mitmu-a apha naboltengle, nalah uva kona mona neilou thisan kisochu nakoimang dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Namelmate chunga galbol dinga nakon doh-a, Pakai na Pathen'in amaho chu nakhutna napeh doh-a, gal hinga nakaija," 
Deuteronomy21:11 Chule sohchangho lah-a chu numei melhoi namu-a, deichatna naneija, naji dinga nangaito-a ahile;" 
Deuteronomy21:12 Nangman amanu chu na-in lama napui ding, alu akivo tolding, chule atinho atan ding;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 Chule amanun asoh channa von chu ama-a kona aholhah-a, na-inna umden ding, lhakhat lhingset anu le apa pul adou ding ahi: chujouteng amanu henga nalutna, a-inneipu nahi-a, chule amanu na-inneipi hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Chule hitiding ahi, nangman amanu-a kipana naneilouva ahile, anop nopna-a nasolding; amavang sum manavang najoh louhel ding, kiveina-a nanei louhel ding ahi; ajehchu amanu nasuhnem ahitai. Chapa Lenpen Goulo Thudol;" 
Deuteronomy21:15 Pasal khatnin jini aneija, khat angailutna, khat ahotna, amani adeinu le ahotnu chun chate ahinpeh gel lhona; achapa masapen chu ahotnu hin ahile," 
Deuteronomy21:16 Chuteng hitiding ahi, aman anei agou chu chapate losah dinga agot teng, ahotnu chapa apeng masa sanga chu adeinu chapa apeng nukhahjo chu apengmasa-a asem louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Aneijouse lah-a channi apeh-a kona ahotnu chapa chu apeng masa-a asim ding ahi. Ajehchu amapa chu thahat kipatna ahin; pen masatna chanvou chu ama-a hija ahi. 
Deuteronomy21:18 Mikhatnin chapa louchal le kiphinhat aneija, apaham anuham thu ngailouva, gimbolna apeh teng jongle athuhon angailouva ahile," 
Deuteronomy21:19 Chuteng anu le apan amatlhona, akhopi upaho heng le aumnao kotpi phunga ahinpuidoh lhonding;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 Chule amanin khopi upaho henga chu, Hiche kachapa lhonhi louchal le kiphinhat ahin, kathulhon ngaiding anompoi; amahi neh hatle julop ahi atilhonding ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Chule akhopi sunga pasal ho jouse chun athina dinga songa asediu ahi. Chutia chu nalah uva kona agilou chu nakoi mangdiu; Israelte jousen ajah uva, kichadiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Chule pasal khatnin thinalom chonset abola, amachu thading ahia, amachu thinga nakhai lih-a ahile;" 
Deuteronomy21:23 Along chu jankhovah-a thing chunga umden louding, hiche nima ma chu navuitei ding ahi; (ajehchu akikhai chu Pathen gaosop changa ahi;) Pakai Pathen'in goulo dinga napeh gamchu akisuboh louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Nasopipa bongchal ahiloule kelngoi vahmang namu-a ahile nakimu mosah louding ahi: iti nama jongle nasopite henga nahinpuilut teiding ahi. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Nasopipa chu nanaija umlou ahia, ahiloule nahetlou ahia ahile, na-in'a nahin kaija, nasopin ahinhol kahse-a naumpi-a, chule amachu nalepeh kitding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Chutobang ma-a chu asangan chunga nabolding; aponsil chunga nabol ding; nasopipa mansah thil mang jouse nangin namu chasun chu chutobanga chu nabolding; nangman nakiselden louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy22:4 Nasopi ho sangan ahiloule bongchal lamsih-a lhu-a namu-a ahile nakimu mosah louding ahi: nangman amaho akaidoh-a aumkitna dinga nakithopi tei teiding ahi. 
Deuteronomy22:5 Numei jin pasal von akivon louding, pasal'in jong numei von akivon louding ahi. Ajehchu chutia boljouse chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Lamdunga nache na-a vachabuh thingchung ham, tollhang hama anou ham atwi ham um nato-a, apin anou ham, atuiham chu aopkhuma ahile, api chu anou toh nalahkop louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Amavang api chu itijong le nalhadoh-a anou vang chu nakilah ding ahi; chutile nangdin phantin, chutia chu nahinkho sotding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 In thah nasah teng, chua kona mikhatou alhah-a na-in chu thisan sona-in ahilouna dinga, na-in chungdal nasem ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Nalengpi leija muchi dang chomchom natulou ding ahi; achuti loule namuchi tu ga chun nalengpi theiga chu asuboh ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy22:10 Bongchal le sangan mang kopma lou nakai louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Nangin samul le tupat kihal tobang, pat jatchom chom kihal ponsil nasil louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Nangman nakivon ponsil mongchep munlia chun ponjem semin. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Mikhatnin ji aneija, amanu henga alutna, avetda-a," 
Deuteronomy22:14 Amanu chunga nolna thusei phat akipeh-a, amanu asuh minsetna, Hichenu hi kakipuijin, ahenga kahung phatnin nungah ahipoi ti kamu doh-e atia ahile;" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Chuteng nungahnu nule pa chun chuche khopi-a kotpi phunga upaho henga chu nungah theng ahina melchihna amusah lhonding; 
Deuteronomy22:16 Chule nungahnu pa chun upaho jah-a chu, Hichepa hi aji dinga kachanu kanapen ahile, amapan ahotbol tan;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 Chule veuvin, amapan amanu chunga nolna thu aseijin, Nachanu anungah hina kahepoi ati; ahinla hichehohi kachanu nungah theng ahina melchihna ahi, atiding ahi. Chule khopi upaho angsunga chu ponchu aphajal lhonding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Chule chuche khopi upa hochun mipa chu amatnuva asehgimdiu; 
Deuteronomy22:19 Chule amahon amapa chu dangka shekel jakhatna agapmuva, hichu nungahnu pa apeh diu ahi; ajehchu aman Israel nungah theng khat aminset sah ahi: chule amanu chu amapa ji hikit ding; aman amanu ahinlaisea ada louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Ahinla hichu adih ahia, nungahnu dinga chu nungah theng ahina melchihna akimulouva ahile," 
Deuteronomy22:21 Chutengle nungahnu chu apa inkot phunga akaidoh uva, khopi pasal hon amanu chu athina dinga songa ase ding ahi; ajehchu amanun apa insung jonthanhoi apatna, Israel sunga ngolhoi thil abol ahi: chutia chu nalah uva kona thil gilou chu nasuhmang dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Numei aji um luppi pasal akimule, anilhona numei luppi pasal le numei chu thikop ding ahi. Chutia chu Israel lah-a kona thil gilou chu nasuhmang diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Pasal khat dinga jiholsa nungah theng chu mikhatnin khopi sunga amua, amanu aluppia ahile," 
Deuteronomy22:24 Chuche khopi kotpi polama anilhona nahin kaidoh uva, athilhonna dinga songa nase dingu ahi; numeinu chu khosunga umngala apen loujeh, chule pasalpa chu aman aheng akom ji asetpi jeh ahi. Chutia chu nalah uva kona thil gilou chu na suhmang diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Ahin mikhatnin loujaova mijihol amua, mipa chun acham louva abola, aluppi le; amanu luppi mipa bouchu thiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Amavang nungahnu chu imacha nalo louding ahi; nungahnu chunga chu thina theilom chonset umlou ahi: ajehchu hiche thudol hi mikhatnin aheng akom adouva atha tobang ahi. 
Deuteronomy22:27 Ajehchu aman amanu loujaova amu ahin, mijihol nungah chu apengin, ahuhhing ding koimacha aumpoi." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Min nungah theng mijihol hilou amua, amanu amatna, aluppia, chule amani chu akimudoh-a ahile," 
Deuteronomy22:29 Chutengle aluppi mipa chun nungahnu pa chu dangka shekel somnga apeh-a, amanu chu aji hiding ahi; ajehchu aman amanu asuhboh ahitan, ahinlai sungse-a amanu adathei louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Min apaji akichenpi louding, apa deljong ahodohpeh louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Mi atilchang keh, ahiloule ajang ki-at tan chu Pakai houkhom na-a lutlou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Pakai houkhom ho lah-a jaocha kiti lutlou ding; ama khangsom changei jenga jong Pakai houkhom holah-a lutlou ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Ammon mi ahiloule Moab mi chu Pakai houkhom na-a lutlou ding; khangsom geija jong Pakai houkhom na-a a-imatih channa lutloudiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Ajehchu Egypt gama kona nahung doh-un lamdunga chun changlhah le twisih jengchan jong nana lamdot pouvin; chule Mesopotamia gam, Pethor kho-a Beor chapa Balaam chu nangma douna-a nagaosap dinga athalah jeh-u ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Hijeng jongle Pakai na Pathen'in Balaam thu angaipon; ahinla Pakai na Pathen'in nalungset jeh-in, Pakai na Pathen'in gaosapna chu nangma dingin phattheiboh na-in aheidohtai." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Nahinlaisea a-itih-a amaho dinga chamna le aphattheina dingu nahol louhel ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Nangman Edom michu nathet louding ahi; ajehchu ama nasopipa ahi. Nangman Egypt michu nathet louding ahi; ajehchu agamsung uva kholjin mi nanahi ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Amaho chate chu akhang thum channa teng Pakai houkhom ho lah-a lutdiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Namelmate doudinga janel akon tengle, thil gilou tin chenga konin kitimin." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Nalah uva mikhattou janlaija thenlounan aphah jeh-a aboh-a aumle, amachu janna gebuh-a kona potdoh-a, gebuh sunga hunglut louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Amavang hitiding ahi, nilhah lam ahunghi tengle twija kisila; nisa alhum tengle gebuh sunga hunglut kitding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Nangin gebuh pamlama jong eh thahna munkhat nanei ding, chua chu nacheji ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Chule namanchah lah-a chu lei lona khat naneiding; chule hitiding ahi, nangma pamlama naposo tengle hichea chu lei nalaija, nakiheija nanga kona hungpotdoh chu navuh khum ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen chu nahuhdoh ding le namelmate pedoh dinga nagebuh lah-a vahle jia ahi; hijeh-a chu nachunga aboh ima amu louva, nanga kona akiheimang louna dinga, nagebuh chu atheng hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Soh apu-a kona kiteldoh nahenga hunga chu apu henga napehdoh kit louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Nakotpi hou sunga akilhen ding adeinapen na mun'a chu nalah uva nangma toh chengding ahin; ama nasuh genthei louhel ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:17 Israel chanute lah-a noti, ahiloule Israel chapate lah-a Sodom mi umthei louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Noti man le uicha man chu Pakai na Pathen in'a kitepna khattouva dinga nahin poh louding ahi. Ajehchu hiteni chu Pakai na Pathen dinga thet umtah ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:19 Nasopi henga apung dinga thilpa napeh louding; sum pung ahin, neh le chah-a apung ahin, chule ipi hijongle apung dinga kipe thil himhim napeh louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Namdang henga vang apung dingin thil napeh thei ahi; amavang nasopi henga apung dinga thil apa-a napeh louding ahi. Hitia chu nagoulo ding gama nakhut lhahna pou pouva Pakai na Pathen'in phatthei naboh theina ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy23:21 Nangman Pakai na Pathen henga kitepna-a nakitep teng, pe dinga nangongkai louding ahi; ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in thonlouva nahenga angeh ding ahin; hichu nadinga chonset hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ahinla kitepna lama nakikangse-a ahile, hichu nanga dinga chonset hilouding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Nakama nakihahsel sa lungcham thilto ngei chu, Pakai na Pathen henga nakitep dungjuija, nakama kona potdoh sachu nanitna nabol ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Naheng nakom lengpi leija nahung tengle, lengpiga chu nagot channa navasetna nanehthei ahin; amavang nabella nakoi louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Naheng nakom changkung ding lah-a nahung tengle, changvui chu nakhutna nakisi thei ahin; amavang naheng nakom chang dinglai chu koite-a na-at theilou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Pasal khatnin ji akipuija akichenpia, amanu chunga thenlouna amujeh-a amitmua lunglhaina achan joulou tah-a ahile; amapan kidana lekha asutna, amanu khutna apeh-a, a-in'a kona asoldoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Chule amanu a-in'a kona apotdoh teng, che-a pasal chomkhat ji hithei ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Chule a-inneipu nunung joh chun ahotna, kidana lekha asutna, akhutna apeh-a, a-in'a kona asoldoh ham; ahiloule ajidinga amanu akipuija a-inneipu nunung chu athia ahile;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 Amanu ana soldoh-a a-inneipu masa chun, amanu kisuhboh nunga chu jidinga akipuikit thei lou ding ahi; ajehchu hichu Pakai anga dinga thet umtah ahi. Chule Pakai na Pathen'in lodinga napeh gamsunga chonset nalutsah louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Pasal khatnin ji anei tille galsatna konlouding, natoh khatpou pouva tong dinga jong goi hilouding ahi. Amavang in'a ongthol tah-a kumkhat uma, ajinu alunglhaisah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Koimachan sumhei song anoinung ahiloule achungnung thil mana kitungchu alah louhel ding ahi; ajehchu aman mihem hinkho chu thil mana alah ahi. 
Deuteronomy24:7 Mi khattouvin Israel chate asopiho aguh-a, akiveina anei ham, ahiloule ajoh ham akimudoh-a ahile; chuche gucha chu thiding ahin; chule thilse chu nalah uva kona nasuhmang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Phah hise thudolla Levi thempuho jousen nahil dingu dungjuija pontho tah-a nitna dingin chingtheijun; keiman amaho kathupeh banga nangman boldinga nanit ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Egypt gama kona nanahung doh jou uva, lampi-a Pakai na Pathen'un Miriam abolna chu geldoh-un." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Nasopi thil khattou apa-a napeh tengle, athil tun ladinga a-in sunga nalut louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Nangma inpoa nadinding, apa-a napeh mipa chun athiltun chu nahenga ahinchoidoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Amapa chu mivaicha ahile, athiltun chu najan gepi louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Chutia chu apon noija nomtah-a alupma, phatthei naboh theina dinga, nisa alhum tengle athiltun chu iti nama jongle ama napehkit ding ahi. Hichu Pakai na Pathen angsunga nachon phatna hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Nangman soh kithalah avaicha le alhasam chu nasopi hihen lang, ahiloule nagam sunga nakotpi sunga um namaljin ho hijeng jongle, nasuh genthei louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Atoh ni-a chu alo napehding, nisan alhumkhum louding ahi; ajehchu genthei ahin, hichea chu alung angah ahi; achuti loule nangma dounan Pakai henga peng tale, hichu nang dinga chonset hiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Chate jala pate kithat louding, pate jala chate kithat louding ahi. Amitakip chu ama ama chonset jeh-a kithat ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Nangman kholjin mi le paneiloute thu dihlouva natan louding, meithai ponsil jong thiltun mana nalah louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Ahinla nangma Egypt gama sohchanga nana um ahin, Pakai na Pathen'in chua kona nalhatdoh ahi chu nageldoh ding ahi. Hijeh-a chu hichehi naboldinga kathupeh nahi." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Nangman nalouva chang na-atna, loulaija changphal nahaimil tengle, gala dinga nachekit louding ahi: hichu kholjin miho, paneilou ho, meithai ho-a ding ahi. Chutile Pakai na Pathen'in nakhut natoh jouse phatthei abohding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Nangman na Olive thing navoh tengle, abahho chu naveiboh louding ahi: hichu kholjin mite, paneiloute chule meithai ho ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Nangman na lengpi leija aga nalokhom teng, akhai nahol louding ahi: hichu gamdang mite, paneiloute chule meithai ho ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Chule nangma Egypt gama sohchang nana hichu nageldoh ding ahi. Hijeh-a chu hiche boldinga hi kathupeh nahi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Pasal ho kahlah-a kinahna auma, thutan ho henga athu-u tansah dinga ahung tengule; amahon michonpha ho chu them achanuva, migilou chu themmo achan dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Chule hitiding ahi, migilou chu vohdinga lom ahile, thutanpa chun alupsah-a, ama angsung laitah-a ijatvei ham athemona dungjuija vohding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Aman somlivei avohding; avala avoh thei louding ahi; avalin vohen, hicheng kalval chun tamtah vei votaleh, nasopipa chu namit mu-a kijumso behseh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Bongchal chang chilpet amuh nakan louding ahi. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Sopiho achenkhomuva, alah uva khat athia, cha aneilouva ahile, athipa jinu chu pama midangtoh kichenglou ding ahi. A-inneipu sopipan avetna, akichenpi ding, amanu chunga chu asopipa tohding kin chu atohding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Chule hitiding ahi, amanun cha ahin masah pen chun Israelte lah-a amin manlouna dinga asopi thisapa munchu aloding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Chule mipa chun asopipa jichu akichenpi nomloule, asopipa jinu chu kotpi phunga upaho henga chea, ka-inneipu asopipa Israelte lah-a asopipa min tundoh ding anomhih-in, ka-inneipu sopipa kin abol nompoi agati ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Chutengle khopi upahon amapa akou uva, akihoulimpi diu, chule ama ada teiteija, kakichenpi nompoi ati-a ahile," 
Deuteronomy25:9 Asopipa jinu chu upaho angsunga amapa henga hungding, amapa kenga kona kengkoh chu asutna, amaija chil asetkhuma, Asopipa insung atungdoh nomloupa chu hitia hi bolding ahi, tia adonbutna aseiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Chule amapa minchu Israel lah-a, Akengkoh kisutpehpa insungmi kisah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Pasal ho kahlah-a kina auma, khatjopa jinu chun a-inneipu chu avopa khutna kona huhdoh dinga ahung naija, amanun akhut alhandoh-a, amapa chu ajanga amatna ahile," 
Deuteronomy25:12 Amanu khut chu natanboh peh-a, amanu chu nakhoto louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Nadipma khaikot jatni, agihle ajang naneilou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Na-insung jong thil tena jatni, alen le aneo naneilou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Ahinla Pakai na Pathen'in napehna gamsunga nahinkho asotna dinga agih tena le asao tena chamkimle dihtah naneiding ahi. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Ajehchu chutobanga bol ho jouse le chonphat louna thil boljouse chu Pakai na Pathen dinga thet umtah ahi. 
Deuteronomy25:17 Egypt'a kona nahungdoh laijuva lamdunga Amalek ten nabolnao," 
Deuteronomy25:18 Pathen jong ginglouva, nalhahsam le nachol laitah-a iti nakimaito pia, nanunga hung achatmo jouse, anu nungpen geija iti atha gam ham chu geldoh-in." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Hijeh-a chu hitiding ahi, Pakai na Pathen'in gouloa nanei dinga napehna gama chu, Pakai na Pathen'in nakimvela namelmate jouse-a kona nacholdosah tengle, vannoi'a kona Amalek kihetna chu nanoimang ding ahi. Hichehi nasuhmil louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Chule hitiding ahi, Pakai na Pathen'in goulo dinga napehna gam chu nahung lhuna, nalo-a, nachenlut tengle," 
Deuteronomy26:2 Pakai na Pathen'in napehna gama kona leiset ga jouse lah-a kona amasapen chu pocha sunga nakoija, Pakai na Pathen'in amin umsahna dinga adeilhen mun'a chu nahinchoi ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Chule chuche nikho-a thempu hidingpa henga chu nache-a, ajah-a, Eipeh dinguva ipu ipateu henga Pakaiyin anahahsel leimuna chun kahung lhuntai tia tunia hi Pakai na Pathen henga kaphondoh ahi, tia nagasei ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Chuteng thempu chun nakhutna kona pocha chu alah-a, Pakai na Pathen maicham masang tah-a chu aluiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Chule Pakai na Pathen anga chu thu naseija, hitia hi nasei ding ahi, Mangthah dinga gotsa Syria mipa chu kapa ahin, Egypt ma anachesuh-in, milhomcha toh anapem lutnin, chuin chua chun nam lentah, thaneitah, chuleh tamtah ahung hidoh-in;" 
Deuteronomy26:6 Chuin Egypt miten eina bolseuvin, eibol gimun, sohna hahsatah kachunga akoijun;" 
Deuteronomy26:7 Chuin Pakai kapu kapateu Pathen henga chun kakapmun ahile, Pakaiyin kakounao aw ajan, kathohnatna houle kathoh gimnao, eikisuh genthei naochu aven;" 
Deuteronomy26:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Egypt'a konin khut thahat tahle ban lhang doh-in, tijat nasatah hole melchihna ho, chule thil kidangho pumin eihin puidoh taovin;" 
Deuteronomy26:9 Hiche mun'a hin eina puilutnun, hiche gam khoijule bongnoi lonna gam ngeihi eipe taovin ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Chule tun, vetan, vo Pakai, nangman neipeh leiset ga masapen chu kahinchoi tai, nati ding ahi. Chule hichu nangin Pakai na Pathen masanga natuna, Pakai na Pathen chu nahou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in nangma le na-insungmi napeh thilpha takip chunga chu, nangma le nalah uva um Levi te, chule kholjin miho nakipa cheh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Hopsom peh kum, nalhosoh hopsom jouse napeh jou kum thumna, Levi ho, namdang miho paneilouho, meithaiho chun nakotpi hongsunga aneh uva, avatheina diuva napeh joutengle," 
Deuteronomy26:13 Chuiteng nangman Pakai na Pathen henga, Ka-in'a konin thil thengho kahinpodoh-in, chujongle Levi ho, kholjin miho, paneilou ho, meithai ho jong nangman neipeh thupeh dungjuijin kanapen, nathupeh ho jouse kasukhel pon, sujong kasumil pon:" 
Deuteronomy26:14 Hia konchun kalunghem petnin kana nepon, hia konchun thil aboh tapouva mandingin jong kana lamangpon, chule hia konchun mithi ho dingin jong kana pepoi: amavang Pakai ka Pathen aw joh chu lunglutnin kana ngaijin, chule nangman neina thupeh jouse dungjuijin kaboltan ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Nachenna theng, van'a konin hin vesuh-in lang, nami Israelte le kapu kapateu henga khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam pehdia nanahahsella neina peh-u gamhi phatthei hinboh-in, natiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Tunikho-a hi Pakai na Pathen'in hiche chon dan kisunho le thutan ho nabol dinga nathupeh ahi. Hijeh-a chu nangin hicheho chu nalung pumpile nahinna pumpi-a nanitna, najui ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Tunia hi nangin Pakai chu na Pathen hidinga, alampiho-a chedinga, adan kisunho, athupeh hole, athutan naho nitna dingle, athu ngaidinga naphondoh ahitai." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Chule tunikho-a hi Pakaiyin nana thutepsa banga ama mite chombeh hidingle, athupeh jouse nitding," 
Deuteronomy26:19 Chule vahchoina, minthana le, jabolna-a asemsa nam jouse chungvuma choi-at dingle, aman aseisa banga Pakai na Pathen henga vaipi theng khat hidinga naphondoh ahitai." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Chuin Mosi'n Israel upaho toh mipi chu thu apen, Tunia nangho kapeh thupeh jouse hi nit uvin." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in napeh gam Jordan gal nakai nitengleh hitiding ahi, song lentah ho naphu-a, hiho chu songlou nanu ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Chule napu napateu Pakai Pathen'in nathutep jouse banga, Pakai na Pathen'in napeh-u bongnoi le khoiju lonna gamchu nalut theina dinga, nagalkai tengle achung ho-a chu hiche danthu thucheng jouse hi nasut dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Hijeh-a chu Jordan nagalkai joutengle hitiding ahi, tunia kathupeh hiche song hohi Ebal molsanga naphu-a, songlouva naloijol ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Chule chua chu Pakai na Pathen henga maicham, song maicham khat nasem ding; achunga chu thih manchah imacha nalap louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Pakai na Pathen maicham chu khetlou songho-a kona nasem ding ahi. Hiche chunga chu Pakai na Pathen henga govam thilto nato ding; 
Deuteronomy27:7 Chule chamna thilto nato-a, chua chu naneh ding, chule Pakai na Pathen anga nakipa ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Chule songho chunga chu hiche danthu jouse hi kichehtah-a nasut ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Chuin Mosi le Levi thempuhon Israel jouse lah-a aseijun, Vo Israel, chingthei jinlang ngaiphan; tunia hi Pakai na Pathen mite nahung hi ahitai." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Hijeh-a chu Pakai na Pathen aw nangai ding, tunia nangma kathupeh thupeh ho le adan kisunho hi nabolding ahi, atiuve." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Chuin hiche nikho mama chun Mosi in mipi thu apen, hitin aseije," 
Deuteronomy27:12 Jordan nagalkai tengule mipi ho phatthei bohdinga hiteho Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Joseph, chule Benjamin hi Gerizim molsang chunga dingden dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Chule hiteho Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, chule Naphtali hi agaosap dinga Ebel molsang chunga ding dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Chule Levi hon thu aseijuva, Israel mite jouse henga aw sangtah-a asapmuva," 
Deuteronomy27:15 Khutthemho khutna kisem, Pakai dinga thet umtah alim semthu ahiloule lhahtho ham anakoigu aumle gaosap changin umhen, atidiu; chule mipi jousen, Amen, atiuva adonbut dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Anu ahiloule apa jabol louva chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:17 Aheng akom gamgi chondohpa chu sapset changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:18 Mitcho lampia kona vaveisah-a chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:19 Kholjin mi, paneilou, chule meithai thutana akaleh-a heidoh chanchu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Apa ji luppi-a chu gaosap changhen, ajehchu aman apa del ahopeh ahi, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Gancha poupou jonpia chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Asopinu, apa chanu, ahiloule anu chanu luppi-a chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:23 A-inneipi nu luppi-a chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:24 Aheng akom guhthima philla chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:25 Monabei mi thana dinga thilpeh la-a chu gaosap changhen, atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy27:26 Hiche danthu jouse boldinga sudet loupa chu gaosap changhen atidiu; chule mipi ho jousen Amen, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Chule hung hitiding ahi, tunia nangma kathupeh jouse nitna dingle juina dinga Pakai na Pathen aw chu gen ngaitah-a nangaija ahile, Pakai na Pathen'in leiset chunga nam jouse vuma nachoisang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Pakai na Pathen aw nangaija ahile hiche phattheina jouse hi nachunga hung chua, nachuphel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Nangma khopi sunga phatthei nachan ding; nangma loujaova phatthei nachan ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Nachilhah, naleiset ga, nagancha hon, nabongpi hon, chule nakelngoi hon ho phatthei changdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Na palbom le nathil kholna jong phatthei changding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Nahung vailhun teng phatthei nachan ding, navaikon doh teng jong le phatthei nachan ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Nangma doudinga hungkon namelmate chu Pakaiyin namai koh-a athagam ding: nangma dou dinga lampi khatna hungdoh uva, namai koh-a lampi sagi-a jamcheh diu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Pakai chun nathil kholna in le nakhut natoh jouse chunga phattheina chu thu apeh ding; Pakai na Pathen'in napeh gamsunga chu aman phatthei nabohding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Nangman Pakai na Pathen thupeh ho nanitna, alampiho-a nache-a ahile, aman nahahsel na banga Pakaiyin ama ding tuma namtheng khatna natundoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Chule leiset mite jousen Pakai mina nakikou chu amuva, nangma nakichat dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Chule Pakaiyin napu napate henga nangma pehdinga anahahselna gama chu, Pakaiyin thil le lo, nachilhah, nagancha, naleiset ga-a nanen jengjung sah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Pakaiyin nangma dinga nagamsunga aphatcha gotwi peding le, nakhutna nanatoh jouse phattheiboh dinga, agou kholna phatah vanchu nahonpeh ding; nangman nam tamtah henga thil apan homin natin, nangin thil apa-a nalah louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Tunia kathupeh Pakai na Pathen thupeh hohi nitding le juidinga nangaija ahile, Pakaiyin amei hilouva alua nakoija, chule anoinung hilouva achunga bou nakoiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Chule tunia kathupeh thuho-a kona pathen dangho jenna dinga anungu juina-a jetlam ahiloule veilama nakihei louhel ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:15 Amavang hung hitiding ahi, tunia kathupeh athupeh jouse le, achonna dan kisunho jouse juidinga Pakai na Pathen aw chu nangailouva ahile; hiche gaosapna jouse hi nachunga hungchua, nachup helding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Khopi sunga gaosapna nachan ding, chule loujaova jong gaosapna nachan ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Na palbom le nathil kholna jong gaosap changding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Nachilhah, naleiset ga, nabongpi hon, nakelngoi honho jong gaosap changding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Nahung vailhun tengle sapset nachana, navai kondohteng jongle sapset nachan ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Nathilbol gitlouna-a kona neidalhah jeh-a nangma nakisuh manga namanthah hel loi kahse-a Pakaiyin na natohna chunga, nakhut lhahna jouse-a, gaosapna, suhnohna, housetna jouse ahinchuhsah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Galo dinga nachena gama kona aman nasuhmang hel kahse-a, Pakaiyin nachunga natset alenden sah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Pakaiyin hihet, khosih, tipom chetchut, tisat val, chemjam, huise, chule motna-a najepma, namanthah hel kahse-a hicheng hin najuiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Naluvuma um van chu sum-eng soh-a, nanoija leiset chu thih hungsoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Pakaiyin nagama gotwi chu leivui le vutvai aso-a, namanthah hel kahse-a nachunga van'a kona hung julha ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Namelmate masanga Pakaiyin gal nalelsah ding; amaho sat dinga lampi khatna nakon doh-a, amasanguva lampi sagi-a najam ding ahi. Chule leiset lenggam jouse-a nakichonle ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Chule nalong chu chungleng vacha jouse le leiset gamsa dinga anneh hiding, chule koimachan anomang loudiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Pakaiyin Egypt gam uilutna, thilona, tinakhih neija, tithah na-a najep natna, chuho-a kona chu nadamdoh louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Pakaiyin ngolna-a, mitchot na-a, lungkidanna-a najepding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Muthim noija mitcho akimai banga sunchang noija nakimai ding, nalampi-a nalolhin louding: a-itih-a bolgenthei le chom mangbou nahi-a, koimachan nahuhhing louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Nangin jihol neijin natin, midangin amanu aluppi ding: nangin in kisah-in natin, nangla chua nachen louding: nangin lengpilei kibolin natin, chua kona lengpiga nalo louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Namitmu na-angsung laitah-a nabongchal kithat ding, hichu nanehlou ding: namaikoh tah-a kona nasangan pumhatna kikai mang ding, nakilepeh louding: nakelngoi chu namelmate kipe ding, ahuhdoh ding koimacha naneilou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Nachapate le nachanute midangho kipe ding, namitna navetna, nilhumkeija amaho lhangai na-a natha beiding: nakhutna hatna himhim umlou ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Naleiset ga le natoh gim ga jouse chu nahet khahlou nam khatnin anehchai ding; nangma suhgenthei le noigep vou nahiding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:34 Chutia chu namitnin avet nathilmu ho jala chu nangolding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Pakaiyin suhdam theilou uilut khohtah-a nakhup teni le kengteni, nakengto-a pat nalujang gei anatsah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Pakaiyin nangma le nachunga atunding nalengpa chu nangma le napu napateu jong anahet khahlou beh namkhat henga napuilut dingu ahin; chuachu thih le song pathen dangho bou nagajen dingu ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Chule Pakaiyin napuina ding namtin lah-a chu nangma datmo umtah, paochamtuh, chule seichah bep nahungso ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Nangman muchi tamtah loujaova napohlut ding, amavang themcha bou nalokhum ding ahi; ajehchu khaokhopin anehchai ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Nangman lengpilei nabola, nalho ngim ding, amavang alengpitwi chu nadonlou ding, chule lengpiga jong nalo khom louding ahi; ajehchu lungin anehdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Nangman nagamsung jouse-a Olive thing nanei ding, amavang athao chu nakinu louding ahi; ajehchu na Olive chu aga pulgam ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Nangman chapate le chanute hingin tin, ahinla nanopsahna hilouding ahi; ajehchu gal hinga chegamdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Nagamsunga thingphung jousele aga jouse chu khaokhon anehgamhel ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Nalah-a um namdang mi chu nang vuma hatah-a hung kichoisang ding; nangma hatah-a nanemsuh ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Aman nangma apa-a napeh ding, nangman vang ama apa-a napeh louding: ama aluchangin pangintin, nangma ameija nahung panding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Chukal vala jong Aman nathupeh athupeh ho le adan kisunho nitna dinga Pakai na Pathen aw nangailou jeh-a, namanthah hel kahse-a hiche gaosap nahohi nachunga hungchua, nanung ajuija, nachup mangding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Chule hicheho chu nangma le nachilhahte chunga a-itih-a dinga melchihna le thil kidanga umding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Thiljouse anen jeh-a Pakai na Pathen chu lungsung thanom tah le kipah tah-a najenlou jeh-a; 
Deuteronomy28:48 Hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin nangma doudinga ahinsol ding namelmate chu gilkel le dangchah-a, sagohkeu le ijakai lhasama najending: aman nangma nasuhmang hel kahse-a nangonga thih namkoljon napohsah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Pakaiyin nangma doudinga gamlatah-a kon,leiset kolmanga kon namkhat, mulaopi banga gangjet; apaovu jong nahetlouhel nam khat ahinpui ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Kichat umtah melpu, tehse ja-ngaina neilouhel, chapang jong lungset chomlou nam;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 Chule amachun namanhel kahse-a nagancha hon le nagamga aneh ding: aman nasuhmang hel kahse-a chang, lengpithei, thao, nabongnou, ahiloule nakelngoi hon ho-a kona apungdoh hojong nakhenpeh louhel ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Natahsan nangapna nagamsung pumpi-a kulpi kikai khum sangtah ho chu achimlhahsoh kahse-a, aman nakotpi jouse-a na-umkul ding: Pakai na Pathen'in napeh gamsung pumpi nakul kotpiho jouse na-umkul khumdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Namelmate bol hesohna-a naki-um kul le nakineh chintona-a chu, Pakai na Pathen'in napeh nangmatah chilhah, nachapate le nachanute sa chu nanehding:" 
Deuteronomy28:54 Chutia chu nalah-a um lungnem le hongphal pa jongchun asopipa le a-angkoi ajinu, chule achate lah-a, ahinghoi ding amohpen jeng jong chu amuset ding:" 
Deuteronomy28:55 Chutia chu amaho khatcha jong anehding achate sa chu apehlou ding ahi: ajehchu nakotpi phung jouse-a namelma ten umkulna le nehchep na-a nasuhgenthei ding jeh-a imacha akikhenlou ahitai. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Nalah uva um numei lungnemle lungneng pen, alung nemle alungnet behseh jeh-a akengkho taljum jong tolla chuhsah nomlou numei jong chun a-angkoi ajipa le achapa chule achanu chu amuset ding," 
Deuteronomy28:57 Chule akengteni kah-a hung pengdoh-a chasen le ahin hinding achate jong, amuset ding ahi: ajehchu umkulna le gotchep na-a namelma ten nakotpi phung jouseuva nasuh genthei jeh uva, ijakai lhahsap jeh-a amanun amaho chu guhthima anehgam ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:58 PAKAI NA PATHEN kiti min loupitah le tijat umtah hi nagin theina dinga hiche lekhabu sunga kisun danthuho jouse chingthei tah-a najui louva ahile; 
Deuteronomy28:59 Pakaiyin nangma hise le nachilhahte hise chu hise kidangtah, hise nasatah, sottah umding hise, natna khohtahden, sottah umjom jingding asosah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Chukalvala jong nangman nagin Egypt gama hise jouse chu, nachung uva alensah ding; hicheho chun nakolchah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Chule hiche danthu lekhabu sunga kisun lou natna tincheng le hise tincheng ho jong chu Pakaiyin namanthah hel kahse-a nachunga ahinlhut ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Chule natam jeh-un van'a ahsi jat ana hijongleu chun, lhomcha bou kikhen ding nahiuve; ajehchu Pakai na Pathen aw nangaipon ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Chule hung hitiding ahi, naphatna bolding le nangma suhpung ding chu Pakai kipana ahi banga; chutia chu nangma suhmang dingle manlou soding chu Pakai kipah hiding ahitai; chule galo dinga nachena gama kona chu nakibotdoh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Chule Pakaiyin mijouse lah, leiset kolmong langkhatna pat langkhat geija nathe cheh uva; chua chu nangma nahi-a napu napate ahiuva jong anahet ngailou thing le song pathen ngeichu najending ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Chule hiche namho lah-a chu choldona namu louding, nakengto jengin jong olna amulou ding: Pakaiyin lungsung linglaona, mit setna, chule lungkhamna napeh johding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Chule namalam hinkho chu lung opkaina hiding, sunle jana nakichat na, nahinkho dinga dettah-a ngamna nanei louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Kichatna nalunga nagel ding jeh le namitna namu ding thilmujeh-a, jingkah teng, Pathen'in nilhah hisah taveleh! nati-a, nilhah teng, Pathen'in jingkah hisah taveleh! natiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Chule hichehi namukit louding ahitai tia kaseina lampia chu Pakaiyin Egypt gama kong inneija nale puilut kitding: chua chu namelma te henga sohpa le sohnu-a vuldinga nakijoh diu ahin, koimachan nakichoh loudiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Hichehohi Horeb'a amahotoh kitepna asem tilouva, Moab gama Israel chate toh neidinga Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh kitepna thuchengho chu ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Chuin Mosi'n Israelte jouse akouvin, ajah uva, Nanghon Egypt gama Pharaoh chung, asohte jouse chung, chule agampumpi chunga Pakai thilbol jouse chu namitmu tah uva namu taovin;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 Patepna nasatah ho, melchihna ho, chule thilkidang nasatah ho chu namit uva namutaovin:" 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ahijeng vangin Pakaiyin hetchetna lungthim, muchetna mit, chule jahchetna nakhang tunigeijin napehih laijuve." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Chule keiman gamthipma kum somli kana lamkaijun: nachung uva naponsilu achulpon, nakenguva nakengkoh-u jong aluipon ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Keima hi Pakai na Pathen'u kahi nahet theina diuvin, nanghon changlhah nane pouvin, lengpitwi le khamna thei jong nanadon pouve." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Chuin hiche mun'a nahunglhun phatnun, Heshbon lengpa Shihon le Bashan lengpa Og chu eiho satdin ahung kondoh lhonin, eihon ina joutaove." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Chule agamhou ilaovin, Reuben mite, Gad mite, chule Manasseh phung kehkhat goulodin ipetaove." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Hijeh chun nabol jouseuva nakhantou theina diuvin, hiche kitepna thuho hi nitnun lang juijun." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Tunin nabonchaovin, naphung lamkai hou, na-upahou, napipu hou, chule Israel mite jouse toh Pakai na Pathen'u anga nading sohkeijun," 
Deuteronomy29:11 Nacha senteu, na-inneipi teu, napon in sunguva um nakhopem hou, na thing tuh houva pat twikhai ho geijin:" 
Deuteronomy29:12 Tunia Pakai na Pathen'un nangho toh asem, Pakai na Pathen to akitepna le akihahselna sunga nalut theina dingun;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 Aman nahenga aseibanga le, napu napateu Abraham, Isaac, Jacob henga anakihahsel banga, Tunikho-a hi aman nangho ama mite hidinga natundoh theina dingu le, ama nangho Pathen ahitheina ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Hiche kitepnale kihahselna hi nangma changseh toh kasem ahipon," 
Deuteronomy29:15 Tunia Pakai i-Pathen'u anga ilah uva hikoma umpa, chule tunia hikoma ilah uva umloupa to jong ahi:" 
Deuteronomy29:16 (Ajehchu Egypt gama iti ina chen uva, chule ihin jotpao nampiho iti ihin palpao ham naheuvin," 
Deuteronomy29:17 Chule alah uva um athet umtah hou, amilimhou, thing le song, dangka le sana hochu namuvin ahi.)" 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ijemtia nalah uva pasal ham, numei ham, insungham, inkoham, phungham, Pakai i-Pathen'uva kona, hiche nam mite pathenho gajen dinga alunghei manga ummaithei ahin; achuti loule nalah uva thingkha le hampa kha jungnei hung umdoh getninte;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, hitobang michun hiche gaosapna thuho hi ajah tengle, Dangchah chu khamna-a akibelap bangin, kalung ngaito dandanin umjong leng chamna neinange, tin alungsunga ama le ama phatthei kiboh henlang hileh," 
Deuteronomy29:20 Pakaiyin amachu akhen louhel ding, ahinla Pakai lungsatna le athang thipna chu amapa chunga chu meikhu-a kitungdoh-a, hiche lekhabua kisun gaosapna ho jousehi achunga chuding, chule Pakaiyin aminchu vannoi'a kona hi anoimang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Chule Pakaiyin amachu hiche dan lekhabu sunga kisun kitepna chunga gaosapna ho jouse dungjuija, Israel phung jouse-a kona hamsetna chang dinga akhendoh ding:" 
Deuteronomy29:22 Chutia chu nanunga hung pengdoh ding nachate khang hunglhung dingho le, gamlatah-a kona hung ding namdang mi hon Pakaiyin achunga achuhsah chuche gamna hise le natna ho chu amutengule;" 
Deuteronomy29:23 Chuche gam pumpi chu kath, chi, meikah, ima kitu lou, ima galou, asunga hampa jong kehlou, Pakaiyin alungsatna le alunghana asumangsa Sodom le Gomorrah, Admah le Zeboiim tobang ahi atidiu:" 
Deuteronomy29:24 Chule namtinho jouse jengin jong, Ipibola Pakaiyin hiche gamhi ahitibol hintem? hiche lunghanna nasatah hi ipi tina ahidem? atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Chutengle mihon, Egypt gama kona amaho ahinpuidoh laijuva amaho toh anasem, apu apateu Pakai Pathen kitepna chu adalhah jeh-u ahi;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 Ajehchu Aman amaho henga apeh hilouho pathen dangho, ahetkhah louvu pathen ho henga acheuvin agajenun, ahou jeh uva;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 Hiche lekhabu sunga kisun gaosapna jouse pohlut khum dinga Pakai lunghanna chu hiche gam chunga koujah-a ahitai; 
Deuteronomy29:28 Chule Pakaiyin amaho chu lungsatna, lunghanna, chule lungphatmona nasatah, tunikho banga hi, agamma kona ajung aja-a abodoh-a mi gamdanga aselut ahitai, atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Thil kiselho chu Pakai i-Pathen uva ahin: ahin akiphongdoh saho chu hiche danthua thuho jouse hi ijuitheina diuva a-itih-a dinga eihole ichateuva ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy30:1 Chule hung hitiding ahi, namasanga kakoi hiche phattheina le gaosapnaho jouse hi nachunga ahung lhuna, Pakai na Pathen'in nadel lutna namho jouse lah-a kona chu nahin geldoh-a," 
Deuteronomy30:2 Chule Pakai na Pathen henga nahung kile-a, nangma le nachaten nalung pumpiu le nahinna pumpiuva tunia nangma thu kapeh jouse dungjuija hi a-aw nangai uva ahile;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 Pakai na Pathen'in gal hinga nakikaina chu aleheija, nachunga lainatna aneija, chule hung kileheija Pakai na Pathen'in nathe chehna namho jouse lah-a kona nachopkhom kitding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Na mi khattou chu van mong geija ana kinodoh-a ahijongle, chua kona Pakai na Pathen'in nalonkhoma, chua kona nahin puidoh ding ahi;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 Chule Pakai Pathen'in napu napateu vin alonao gamsunga chu nahin puilutna, nangman hichu naloding; Aman nabol phatna, napu napateu chungvuma napunsah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in nahin theina ding, nalungthim pumpile nahinna pumpi-a Pakai na Pathen nangailutna dinga, nalungsung le nachilhahte lungsung chep atan ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in hiche gaosapna jousehi namelmate le nahotbol te, chule nabolsete chunga akoiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Chule nangma nahung kile-a Pakai aw chu nangaiding, tunia nangma kathupeh ama thupeh jouse hi nabolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Chule Pakai na Pathen'in nakhutna athilbol jouse, nachilhahte, nagancha ho, chule nagamga aphatna dinga hatah-a asuhpung ding ahi: ajehchu Pakai chu napu napateu chunga athanop banga, naphatna dinga nangma chunga thanom kitding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Hiche dan lekhabu sunga kisun athupeh hole adan kisunho nitna dinga Pakai na Pathen thu nangaija; chule Pakai na Pathen henglama nalungthim pumpile nahinna pumpi-a nakihei ja ahile chuti ding ahi. 
Deuteronomy30:11 Ajehchu tunia nang kathupeh hiche thupeh hi nanga kona kisel ahipon, chule gamlapi-a umjong ahipoi." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Ijah uva, ibol theina diuva, eiho dinga van'a koi gakal touva, eiho henga ahin pohlhah ding ham? natina diuva hichu van'a uma ahipoi." 
Deuteronomy30:13 Ijah uva, ibol theina diuva, eiho dinga twikhanglen galla koi gachea, ihenguva ahinpoh galkai ding ham? natina diuva hichu twikhanglen galla um jong ahipoi." 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ahinla thuchu nanit theina dinga, nakom naicha, nakam sungle nalungsung um ahibouve." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Ven, tuni hin namasanga hinna le thilpha, thina le thilse kakoipeh-e." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Pakai na Pathen chu nangailut nading, alampiho juina ding, athupeh hole achondan ho chule athutan ho nitna dinga tunia kathupeh hohi nanitna ahile nahina, napuntheina ding: chule lodinga nachenna gama chu Pakai na Pathen'in phatthei nabohding ahi." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Amavang najahlouna dinga nalungthim akihei manga, puimanga naum joh-a, pathen dang nahouva, najena ahile," 
Deuteronomy30:18 Namanthah teidiu ahi tia tunia hi kaphondoh ahi; galo dinga Jordan nagalkaina gama chu nahinsot louheldiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Namasanguva hinna le thina, phattheina le gaosapna kakoije ti nangho douna-a ahetoh dinga tunia hi van le lei kakou ahi; hijeh chun nangma le nachilhahte nahinthei dingu hinna kilhenun:" 
Deuteronomy30:20 Chutia chu Pakai na Pathen nangailutna, a-aw nangaija, chule ama nakolchah theinadin: ajehchu ama nahinna ahin, nahinkho sotna ahi: chutia chu Pakaiyin napu napa te Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob peh dinga ahahselna gama chu nachen theiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Chuin Mosi achen, Israel miho jouse henga chun hiche thuho hi aseije," 
Deuteronomy31:2 Chuin ajah uva, Tuni hin keima kum jankhat le kum somni kalhingtan; kalut le kapot le joutapon ahi: chujongle Pakaiyin jong kajah-a, Nangma hiche Jordan hi nagalkai louding ahi, eiti." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Pakai na Pathen'u chu namasanguva lamkaijin tin, aman hiche namhohi namasanguva kona asumang ding, chule nanghon amaho gamchu nalo dingu ahi. Chule Pakaiyin ana seibanga, Joshua'in nalamkai dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Pakai na Pathen'u chu namasanguva lamkaijin tin, aman hiche namhohi namasanguva kona asumang ding, chule nanghon amaho gamchu nalo dingu ahi. Chule Pakaiyin ana seibanga, Joshua'in nalamkai dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Chule Pakaiyin amaho chu Amor miho lengteni Sihon le Og abol banga abolding, chule aman asuhmang gamho banga abolding ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Chule keiman nangho thu kapeh-u thupeh ho jouse dungjuija ahenguva nabol theina dinguva, Pakaiyin amaho chu namaikoh uva napehdoh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Hatnunlang hanguvin, kicha hih-un, amaho khu ging jong ging hih-un: ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u, nangho nalhonpia chu ama ahi; Aman nalosam sah loudingu, dajong nadalhah louheldiu ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Chuin Mosi'n Joshua akouvin, Israelte jouse mitmu-a chun ajah-a, hatninlang hangin; ajehchu nangma Pakaiyin apu apateu pehdinga anahahsel gama chu hiche mipite hitoh nalhona, nangman amahohi nalosah teiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Chuin Mosi'n Joshua akouvin, Israelte jouse mitmu-a chun ajah-a, hatninlang hangin; ajehchu nangma Pakaiyin apu apateu pehdinga anahahsel gama chu hiche mipite hitoh nalhona, nangman amahohi nalosah teiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Chule namasanga chea amachu Pakai ahi, aman aumpi ding, aman nalosamsah louding, dajong nadalhah louding ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Chuin Mosi'n hiche danhi asunin, Pakai kitepna thingkhong poleji Levi chapate thempuho le, Israel upaho jouse henga apen ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Chuin Mosi'n amaho thu apen, ajah uva, Kum sagi kichaiseh, kilhadohna kum le lhambuh kut laile," 
Deuteronomy31:11 Ama deilhen nading mun'a Israel chate jouse Pakai na Pathen anga kilah dinga ahung tengule, hiche danthu hi Israelte jouse masanga ajahdiuva nasimpoh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Amahon ajah uva, ahetnuva, Pakai na Pathen'u chu aginuva, hiche danthu-a um thu jouse hi anitna dingun, mijouse, numei ahin, pasal ahin, chapang ahin, nakotpi sunga um gamdang mi ahin khomkhom soh keijin:" 
Deuteronomy31:13 Chule imacha heloulai nachateo chun lodinga nachenao Jordan gal gamsunga chu nachen laiseuva Pakai na Pathen ginje ahettheina diuva ajahdiu ahi. 
Deuteronomy31:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Ven, nathi nading nikho ahung naitai; mopohna kapehthei nadin Joshua chu kouvin lang houkhom na pon in sunga hung kilah lhonin ati. Chuin Mosi le Joshua ache lhonin, houkhom ho ponbuh sunga agakilah lhontai." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Ven, nathi nading nikho ahung naitai; mopohna kapehthei nadin Joshua chu kouvin lang houkhom na pon in sunga hung kilah lhonin ati. Chuin Mosi le Joshua ache lhonin, houkhom ho ponbuh sunga agakilah lhontai." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Chuin Pakai chu houbuh sunga meibang khomin ahungkilah-in: meibang khompi chu houbuh kotchung tah-a chun adingden tai. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a, Vetan, nangma napu napate toh nalupkhom ding ahitan; hiche mipihohi kipat uva, aga umnadingu mite lah-a gamdang mite pathenho nung ajuijuva noti'a gapangdiu, chule keima eidalhah uva, amahotoh kanabol kitepna chu apalkehdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Chuteng hiche nikho chule achunguva kalungsatna deujah ding, amaho kadalhah-a, amaho-a kona kamai kasel ding, amaho bahgama umdiu, thilse tamtah le hesohnahon alhun khumdiu; chutia chu hiche nikho chule, I-Pathen'u ilah uva aumloujeh-a thilse hohi ichunguva hunglhung hilouham? atidiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Pathen dangho lama akihei nalam uva thilse jouse ahin boldiu ho jeh-a chu, hiche nikho chule kamai kaseltei ding ahi."
