Deuteronomy31:19 Hijeh chun tun hiche la hi nangma dingin kisut in lang, Israel chate hilin; hiche la hi Israel chate chunga keima dinga hettohsahna dingin akam sunguva khumpeh-in." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ajehchu apu apateu kahahselna, bongnoi le khoiju lona gama amaho kapuilut teng, amahon aneh uva, vaset uva, chule hungthao diu; chutengle pathen dangho lama kiheijuva, hiho chu ajendiu, keima eilunghan sah uva, kathupeh apalkehdiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Chule hung hitiding ahi, thilse tamtah le lungkhamna tamtah-in aphah tengule, achunguva hettohsah khat banga hiche la hin ahettohsah ding ahi; ajehchu achilhahteu kama kona hiche la hi suhmila umlou ding ahi: ajehchu tujeng jonghin kahahselna gama kapuilut masanga achele nadinguva alung ngaitohou chu kahen ahi." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Hijeh chun Mosi'n hiche la hi hiche ni mama chun asunin, Israel chate chu ahiltai." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Chuin Aman Nun chapa Joshua chu mopohna apen, ajah-a, Hatninlang hangin, ajeh chu nangman Israel chate chu amaho kahahselna gama chu napuilut ding ahi; keiman nangma ka umpi ding nahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Chuin Aman Nun chapa Joshua chu mopohna apen, ajah-a, Hatninlang hangin, ajeh chu nangman Israel chate chu amaho kahahselna gama chu napuilut ding ahi; keiman nangma ka umpi ding nahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Chuin ahitin ahi, Mosi'n hiche danthu hohi lekhabu khatna asutchaija, jo ahi phatnin," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Mosi'n Pakai kitepna thingkhong pu-a pang Levi ho chu thu apen, hitin aseije," 
Deuteronomy31:26 Hiche danthu lekhabu hi laovinlang, nachung uva hettohsah dingin Pakai na Pathen'u kitepna thingkhong koma chun koijun." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ajehchu nakiphin hat danule nalouchal danu kahei: veuvin, tunikho-a nang hotoh kahin khomlai petna bon Pakai douna-a nakiphin uva ahile; kathinung teng ijat nabolbe tadiuvem?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Hiche thuho hi anakhang uva kaseija, ahetoh dinga vanle lei kakou theina dingin, naphung houva upaho le nalamkai hou jouse kahenga hinkhomun." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ajehchu kathi nungle nangho le nangho nasatah-a nakisuhset nuva, nangho kathupeh-u lampia kona nakihei mangdiu; chule ninunung lamle thilphalouvin nalhah khumdiu ahi; ajehchu nakhut soh-u thilbola kona suh lunghangna dinga Pakai mitmu-a thilphalou nabol dingu ahi ti kahei, ati." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Chuin Mosi'n Israel houkhom ho jouse nakhanga chun hiche lacheng hi akichai kahsen asei pehtan ahi. 
Deuteronomy32:1 Vo vanho, nana hinsungun, keiman thu seijinge; chule vo leiset, kakama thupot ho ngaijin." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Kathuhil hi gotwi bangin juntin, kathusei daitwi bangin chimintin, hamnel chunga gophin bangle, hampa chunga gohongju banginte." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ajehchu Pakai min kaphongdoh ahi: Nanghon Pathen loupina seichoi leuvin. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ama songpi ahin, anatoh ho achamkime; ajehchu alamlhah jouse thudih ahi: khansetna beihel le thutah Pathen, chondih le chonpha chu ama ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ama hole amaho akisuboh-un, amonao chu achate mona ahipoi: amaho khanglamvai le lungput janglou khang ahiuve." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Vo mingol le mitanangte, chutia chu Pakai nalethuh diuham? Ama nachodoh pao napao hilouham? Ama nasem paole natungdoh pao hilouham?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Gollui lai geldoh inlang, khang tamtah-a kumho chu ngaito temin; napa dongle chun navetsah ding ahin, na upate dongle chun naseipeh taovinte." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Hatchung nungin namho agoulo diu ahoppeh lai, aman Adam chapate asekhen laichun, Israel chate ajatnu dungjuijin mipite gamgi chu anasepeh-e." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ajehchu Pakai chanvou chu amite ahin, Jacob hi agouchan ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Aman amachu neldi gam, agohkeo gamthip ginghou hou lah-a amu ahi; Aman ahinpuidoh-a, ahila, ama mitchang banga avettup ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Mulaopi in abuh aphetlhah-a, anou chunga akijapma, alha ajahkhuma, amat ji-a, alha chunga apoh banga;" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Chutia chu Pakai bouvin ama apuile-a, gamdang pathen toh umkhom lou ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Louvin asepdoh ga aneh theina dingin leiset mun sangho chunga atousah-in; songpi-a konin khoiju achepdoh sah-in, meituh songa konin thaotwi aputdoh sah-in;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Bongnoiha le kelngoi noi, kelngoinou thaotah, chule Bashan kelngoi chalho, le kelho, suhlou chang phapen tah; chule lengpitwi thisan thengtah ju in nadonin ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Ahin Jeshurun athao behsettan, akeng apeh pehtai; nathaovin, nasalha jengin, thaovin natome; chuin asempa Pathen adalhan, alhatdamna songpi chu totnopnan aneitai." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Amahon namchom pathenho jeh-in athangthip sah-un; thet umtah ho-a konin alunghan sah-un ahi. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Amahon Pathen kom hilouvin thilha ho, ahetkhah louvu pathenho, napu napateu vin anagin louva athah beh-a hungpot pathen thah ho henga ganlhai abolun ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Nahinga Songpi chu iman nagelpon, nahin semdoh-a Pathen chu nasumil tai." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Pakaiyin hichu amuphatnin, Achapate le achanuteu suhlunghan sahna jeh chun amaho chu akidahtai." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Chuin aman, amahoa kona kamai kaselding, akichainao ipi soh mongam kavet ding ahi: Ajehchu amaho khang lamvai mite ahiuvin, tahsanna umlou chate ahiuve." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Amahon Pathen hilouho-a eithangthip sah-un; apannabei houva eichou lunghangun; kenjong nam hilouho-a kona athangthip nadiuva kachouthou uva, nam ngoltah-a kona kachou lunghang dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ajehchu kalunghana-a mei akongdoh-in, thikholkhul geija akahlhah ding, hichun leiset le asunng keh jouse akah lhah-a, molsang bulho jouse meijin akahding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Achunguva setna kaset thopma, achunguva kathal chang ho kamanchah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Amaho gilkelin akah uva, meika nasatah le suhgamna nasatah-in aval lhum diu ahi: leivui lah-a kitol gulgu toh kilhona achunguva gamsaho ha hemtah kasolpeh ding ahi" 
Deuteronomy32:25 Polama chemjamin, sunglama tijatna-in, gollhang le nungah theng, noicheplai le samkangsa jong asuhmang ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Aning ninga kathecheh-a, mihem lah-a kona hetjinga aumnao kichaina kabolding ahi, kati;" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Akidoupi houvin agelkhel uva, Kakhutnu hi choisangin aumin, hiche ho jouse hi Pakaiyin abol ahipoi, tia aseiuva melma lunghanna chu kaginlou hile." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Ajehchu amaho thumopbei nam ahiuvin, chule amaho-a hetkhena himhim aumpon ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:29 O, hichehi ahetkhen na dinguva ching hitaveleu, khonunga akichaina dingu angaito dingu hija!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 A songpiuvin amaho akijohdoh-a, Pakaiyin amaho akhakhum ahilou ngale; mikhatnin sangkhat iti adela, minin sangsom iti adeljam ding ham?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Ajehchu amaho songpi chu eiho Songpi tobang ahipon, imelmateu amaho le amaho jengjong thutan ho ahiuve." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Ajehchu alengpi guiju chu Sodom lengpigui le Gomorrah loujaova kon ahi: alengpi ga houchu gilkha lengpiga ahin, aga bohho chu akhan ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Alengpitwi houchu dragon gu le gulgu phaloutah ahi. 
Deuteronomy32:34 Hichehi kakoma kikhol hilou hija, kagou ho lah-a kikha khum hilou ham?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Phulahna le lethuhna chu keima-a ahin; aphat tahle akengto-u kithol ding ahi: ajehchu amanthah nao nikho anaitan, achunguva hunglhung ding thilho chu gangtah-a hunglhung ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Ajehchu athahatnao abeisoh-a, akikhu khumle akidalha abeihel tengule; Pakaiyin amite thu tan intin, asohte-a dinga alung aheiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Chule aman hitia aseiding ahi, A-pathenhou, atahsanu angapnao asongpiu chu hoiba hitam?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Aganlhainao sathao ne-a, adon thilto lengpitwi donho chu? amaho chu hung thoudoh uhenlang nakithopiu hen, chule nahongbit nun pangu hen." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Tun veuvin, kei, keimamong monghi Ama chu kahi, Keima toh pathen hikhom adang aumpoi: Keiman kathatjin, chule kahinsah jin; Keiman kamavojin, chule kadamsah kitjin ahi: kakhutna kona huhdoh jouding koimacha aumpoi." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ajehchu Keiman van lama kakhut kadom sangin, tonsotna kahing jinge katin ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Kachemjam duljeju chu kanola, kakhutnin thutanna atuh-a ahile; kamelmate chunga phu kalah ding, eihot bolte kalethuh ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Akithatho le sohchangho thisan le, melmate lamkaiho luchanga kon, Ka thalchang ho thisan kadonkham sah-a, kachemjamin saphe avalhum ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Vo namtinho, hiche amitetoh hin kipah-un: ajehchu aman asohte thisan phu alah-a, akidoupi ho chunga phu alah ding, chule agam le amite chunga hepina anei ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Chuin Mosi amatah chu Nun chapa Hoshea toh ahungin, hiche la thu jouse chu mipi ho nabenga aseijin ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Chuin Mosi'n hiche thuho jouse hi Israel pumpi jah-a asei aseichaijin," 
Deuteronomy32:46 Chuin amaho jah-a, Tunia nalah uva kaphondoh thu jouse-a hin nalungu koijun lang, hiche danthu jouse hi chingthei tah-a ajuidiuva nachateo nathupeh dingu ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Hichehi nangho-a dinga mohthil ahipoi; ajehchu hiche hi nahinkhou ahi: chule hicheho jala hi lodinga Jordan nagalkai nao gama chu nahinkhou sotding ahi. 
Deuteronomy32:48 Chuin hiche nikho mama chun Pakaiyin Mosi jah-a aseijin, hitin ati," 
Deuteronomy32:49 Jericho toh kigalsai, Moab gama um Abarim molsanga um Nebo molsanga khun kaltouvin lang; Israel chaten alo dinguva kapeh Canaan gamchu gaven:" 
Deuteronomy32:50 Nasopipa Aaron Hor molsanga athia amitetoh akigop bangin, nakaltouna lama chun hungthiden ninlang namite toh kigomtan." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Ajehchu Zin gamthip, Kadesh mun Meribah twiphunga Israel chate lah-a keima douna in nachonkhela; Israel chate lah-a neijabol loujeh ahi." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Hijeng jongle agam chu namasangtah-a nagamu ding, amavang Israel chate kapeh gamsunga vang chu nalut louding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Chule hichehi Pathen mipa Mosi'n athi masanga Israel chate phatthei abohna, phattheina chu ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Chuin aman, Sinai'a konin Pakai ahungin, Seir'a konin ahenguva dingin akipatdoh-e; aman Paran molsanga konin asalvah-in, mitheng sangsom to ahunge: akhutjet lama konin amahodin danthu khaotah apotne." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ahi, aman mipi angailun, amithengte jouse nakhutna aumui: chule amaho nakengbulla atouvun, mitinin nathu akisandiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Jacob mipite agoudiuva apeh danthu chu Mosi'n einapeuve. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Mipi lamkaiho le Israel phungho akikhop khom phatnun, ama Jeshurun'a aleng changin ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Reuben hingjing henlang thihih hen; chule amite jong lhomcha hihih hen. 
Deuteronomy33:7 Hichehi Judah phatthei kibohna ahi, chuin aman, Pakai, Judah aw hi ngaijin lang, amite henga puijin; amadin akhut teni hi bulhingset henlang, amelmate-a kona kithopi-a chu nangma hin, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Levi thudolla aman, Massah mun'a naphotchet pa, Meribah twiphunga nakibaopi pa, na mithengpa henga na Thummim le na Urim chu umhen." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Aman anu le apa henga, Keiman ama kanamupon, aman asopite jong ahekhenpon, chule achate tahjong ahepoi: ajehchu amahon nathu amangun, nakitepna anitnun ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Amahon nathutanna chu Jacob ahiluva, chule na danthu chu Israel ahil dingu; namasanga gimnamtui akoijuva, na maicham chunga pumgo ganlhai aboldiu ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Pakai, anei agouhou phatthei boh-inlang, akhutna anatohhou sanpeh-in; ama mudaho le ama douna-a hung kipan hochu akipat doh kit louna diuvin akongu jeppeh-in, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Benjamin thudolla aman, Pakai ngailutna chu akoma bitkeija chengding; chule Pakaiyin nilhum keija akhu-a, alengkou teni kikah-a chengding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Chule Joseph thudolla aman, Agam chu van thilluho-in, daitwi ho-in, leinoi thuhtah-a umho-in Pakai phattheiboh changhen," 
Deuteronomy33:14 Chule nisan asodoh ga thillu ho le lhathah-a asodoh thil luho-in," 
Deuteronomy33:15 Chule tonlai molsangho thilgun holeh kemlou lhang ho-a thil manlu ho," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Chule leiset le athil manlu holeh, asung dima umho-in; chule hamboh lah-a chengpa lungdeijin: Joseph lamkaipa luchang le asopite-a kona kikhendohpa luchanga phattheibohna hunglhung hen." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Aloupina chu abongchal sohmasa pen abangin, akiho chu gambong ki ho abange: hicheho-a chu aman mite chu kolmong geija anokhom ding; chule amaho chu Ephraim mi sangsom le Manasseh mi asang sang chu ahiuve." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Chule Zebulun thudolla aman, Zebulun nangma napotdoh na-a kipah inlang, chule Issachar nangma naponbuh sunga kipah-in." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Amahon miho chu molsang lama akoudiu, hia chu chonphatna ganlhai atodiu ahi. Ajehchu amahon twikhanglen ninglhina le, nellah-a kiselgu gou ho chu achopdiu ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Chule Gad thudolla aman, Gad kehlena chu nunnom hen: ama keipi bahkai bangin achengin, banjang le lu-a lallukhuh chu amaltelin ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Chule chua danthu pepa chanvou mun'a chu ama atou jeh-in, ahop masapen ama akichantan: chule mipi lamkaiho chutoh ama ahungin, aman Pakai dihna le Israelte chunga athutanna atongdoh-in ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Chule Dan thudolla aman, Danhi keipi bahkai nou ahin, Beshan'a kona hungchom doh ding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Chule Naphtali thudolla aman, Vo Naphtali, lungdeija lunglhaile Pakai phatthei boh-a dim, lhumlamle lhanglam gam lotan, ati." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Chule Asher thudolla aman, Asher hi chilhah in phatthei changhen lang, asopite henga lahthei dol hihen, chule akeng thaotwija dehen." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Nakengchot thih le sum-eng hiding, nahinlai nikhoho banga nahatna jong umding ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Nangma napanpi dinga vanlaijola touva, chule aloupina-a meibol chunga um Jeshurun Pathen tobang khatcha aumpoi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Tonsot Pathen chu nakiselna ahin, chule noilama atonsot bannang aumin ahi: Aman namasanga kona melmate adelmang ding, amaho chu sumangin atiding ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Chutengle Israel changseh bitkeija chengding, Jacob twinah chu changle lengpithei gama umding; chule avanin jong daitwi alhahsah ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Vo Israel, anunom nahi: nangma tobang koi umam, Vo napanpi nao lumdal le na loupina chemjam, Pakai huhhing mite! Namelmate nahenga ajounao kimuntin, nangman amun sanghou nachotpha ding ahi." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Chule Mosi Moab phaicham konin Nebo molsang, Pisgah vuma akaldoh-in, hichu Jericho jontah ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin Gilead gam jouse chu Dan geijin avetsah-in," 
Deuteronomy34:2 Chule Naphtali gam jouse, Ephraim gam, Manasseh le Judah gam pumpi, twikhanglen mong geijin," 
Deuteronomy34:3 Chule lhanglama Jericho phaicham, tumthing kena khopi Zoar geijin avetsahtan ahi." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Nachilhah te kapeh ding ahi tia Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga kana kihahselna gamchu hichehi ahi: keiman hichehi namitnin ka musahtan, amun vang nalhun louding ahi, ati." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Chuti chun Pakai thu dungjuijin, Pakai soh Mosi chu Moab gama chun athiden tai." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Chuin Aman Moab gamsunga phaicham khat Beth-peor jona chun avuijin, ahinla tuni geihin alhan chu koimachan ahepoi." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Chule Mosi athichun kum jakhat le kum somni ahitan; amit athimpon, athahat jong alha dehpoi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Chuin Moab phaichama chun Israel chaten Mosi chu nisomthum akauvin; chuti chun Mosi dinga kana le lunghemna chu akichaitai. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Chuin Nun chapa Joshua chu Mosi'n achunga akhut angap jeh-in, chihna lhagao adimset tan: Israel chaten athu angaijun, Pakaiyin Mosi thu apehbangin abolun ahi." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Chuin Nun chapa Joshua chu Mosi'n achunga akhut angap jeh-in, chihna lhagao adimset tan: Israel chaten athu angaijun, Pakaiyin Mosi thu apehbangin abolun ahi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Chule chucheng nunga pat chun Pakaiyin kimaito tah-a anahet Mosi tobang Israel sunga themgao khatcha asohdoh kit tapon," 
Deuteronomy34:11 Egypt gamsunga Pharaoh heng le asohte jouse heng, chule agamsung pumpi-a, melchihna ho le thil kidangho jouse chu boldinga Pakaiyin anasol," 
Deuteronomy34:12 Chule Israel jouse mitmu tah-a Mosi'n anavetsah chuche khut thahat tah jouse-a le chuche tijat umtah jouse boldoh-a khatcha asohdoh kit tapon ahi. 
Joshua1:1 Pakai soh Mosi athijouvin ahitin ahi, Mosi lhacha Nun chapa Joshua henga Pakaiyin hitin ati." 
Joshua1:2 Kasoh Mosi athitan, hijeh chun tun kipat in, nangmale hiche mipi jouse, amaho Israel chate dinga kapeh gam jondingin hiche Jordan hi galkaijun lang cheovin." 
Joshua1:3 Mosi henga kana seibangin, nakengton achotphana chanchu nang kapeh nahitai." 
Joshua1:4 Gamthiple hiche Lebanon apat Euphrates vadunglen, Hit mite gamjouse chuleh nilhum lama twikhanglen gei nangma gamsung hiding ahi." 
Joshua1:5 Nahinlai sungse-a koimacha namasanga ding joulou ding, Mosi kana umpi banga nangma jong kaumpi ding nahin, nangma nadalha pongting, nujong nanuse ponge." 
Joshua1:6 Hatninlang hangsanin, ajehchu apateu pehdinga kana kihahsel gam chu alodiuva hiche mitehohi nahoppeh ding ahi." 
Joshua1:7 Kasoh Mosi juidinga kapeh dan jouse nabola nachintup theina dingin, nangma hatpou pouvin lang hangtah-in umin. Nachena channa naphattheina dingin, chua kon chun jet le veija kihei mang loujenin." 
Joshua1:8 Hiche danthupeh buhi nakamtoh kikhenkah hih hen, amavang asunga kisunho dungjuija nabola nachintup theina dingin sunle jan-in lunggiltah-in ngaiton. Chutile nalampi lamjangpeh a nalolhinsah ding ahi." 
Joshua1:9 Keiman nangma kanathupeh hilouham? hatninlang hangin, kicha hih-in, lungjong lungthoi hih-in. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in nachena chana naumpi jinge." 
Joshua1:10 Chuin Joshua chun mipi vaipoho jouse chu thu apen aseije," 
Joshua1:11 Gebuh lailunga cheovinlang mipi jah-a nehlechah kigot tupmun, ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in lodinga napeh-u gamchu che-a galodinga, nithum sunga hiche Jordan hi nagalkai dingu ahi, tin mipi thu gapeuvin, ati." 
Joshua1:12 Chule Reuben mite, Gad mite chule Manasseh phung akehkhat ho henga Joshua'n hitin aseijin," 
Joshua1:13 Pakai na Pathen'un nakicholdo sah un, chule hiche gamhi napetaove, tia Pakai lhacha Mosi'n nangho henga napeh-u thuchu geldoh un." 
Joshua1:14 Na-inneipiteu, nachasenhou chule nagancha hou Mosi'n napehnao Jordan gal hilama umden hen. Ahinla manchah choi miho galhangho jouse, masanga anacheuva, amaho na kithopi diu," 
Joshua1:15 nangho napeh banga Pakaiyin nasopi hou akicholdosah masangse-a, chule Pakai na Pathen'in amaho apeh-u gamchu alo masangseuva naki thopi diu ahi. Chujoule Jordan solama umna gam nalo diuva Pakai soh Mosi'n napeh-u gama chu nakile uva nalodiu ahi." 
Joshua1:16 Chuin amahon neithupeh jouseu chu bolungting neisolnao channa cheovinge tin Joshua adonbutnun ahi. 
Joshua1:17 Imajousea Mosi thu kanangai bangun nangma thujong lunglut tah-in ngai uvinge, Pakai Pathen'in Mosi aumpi bangin nangma jong naumpi teihen atiuve." 
Joshua1:18 Nathupeh douva chule nathupeh ngailou koi hijongle kithat ding ahi, hang pou pouvin lang hattah-in umin, atiuve." 
Joshua2:1 Nun chapa Joshua'n Shittim'a konin mini guhthimin gam velhi dingin asollin, chelhon inlang gamchu adeh-in Jericho gave lhonin tin aseipeh-in ahi. Chule amani amin Rahab kiti notinu in'a chun ahunglhonin, ageh lhontai." 
Joshua2:2 Chule veuvin, tujanhin gam velhi dingin Israel chilhah ho hikoma ahunguve, tin Jericho khopi lengpa chu thu ahilun ahi." 
Joshua2:3 Hichun Jericho lengpan nahenga na-inna hunglut miteni chu hinpui doh-in; ajehchu amani gamjouse velhi dinga hunglhon ahi ti seidingin Rahab henga mi asolle. 
Joshua2:4 Chuin numeinu chun miteni apuidoh-in, asellin, henge kahenga mini ahunge, ahinla hoija hungkon ahilhon vang kahepoi, tin aseije." 
Joshua2:5 Chule ahitin ahi, kotpi khachah phat don, khothim phatnin, miteni chu achedoh lhontan, hoija achelhon kahepoi. Mangang tah-in amani chu nungdelun, ajehchu phapaovin nate ati." 
Joshua2:6 Ahinla amanun, amani chu in chunga apuitouvin, akisetoh changpol lah-a chun aseltai." 
Joshua2:7 Chuin mihochun miteni chu Jordan kaimun lampi geipeh chun anungdellun, chule anungdelho chu apotphatnun kul kotkhah chu akhah taovin ahi." 
Joshua2:8 Chuin amani ahung kumlhon masangin in chunga amanu akaldoh-in," 
Joshua2:9 chule amanun Pakaiyin hiche gam napeh-u ahitai, nangho gin nahi kachunguva achun, chule nangho jeh-a hiche gama chengho jouse kihotlhugam dingu ahitai ti kahei, tin miteni chu aseipehtai." 
Joshua2:10 Ajehchu Egypt'a kona nahungpot doh uva Pakaiyin twipisan chu nangho dinga iti akansah-a, chule nanghon nathagamhelu Jordan gal langkhatna um Amor leng teni Sihon le Og chunga ipi nabolu chu kanajaove." 
Joshua2:11 Chule hichehi kajahjah-un kalungu ajunlha tai, nangho jeh-in koimacha chunga hanna himhim aumtapoi. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u chu chunga leh noija Pathen ahi." 
Joshua2:12 Hijeh chun tun kangeh nahi lhone, Pakai minin kahenga kihahsel lhonin, keiman nangni lungsetna kamusah tah jeh-in, Nangnin jong kapa insung chunga lungsetna neimusah lhoninlang, melchihna dihtah neipe lhonnin." 
Joshua2:13 Chuti chun, kanule kapa, kasopi numei ho le pasal ho, chule aneijouseu neihinghoi peh-un lang, kahinkhouhi thina-a konin neihuhdoh peh-un, ati." 
Joshua2:14 Chuin miteni chun amanu jah-a, kathilbol lhonhi naseidohlouva ahile nanghodin kahinna tohlhoninge. Chule hung hitiding ahi, Pakaiyin hiche gamhi eipeh tengule lungsetna neitahle dihtah-in nangma nabollunge tin adonbut lhone." 
Joshua2:15 Chujouvin amanun amani chu bangkotna konin khaovin akhailhatai. Ajehchu amanu in chu khopi kulchunga kisa ahin, chule ama kul chunga chu chenga ahi." 
Joshua2:16 Chuin amanun, amani jah-a, mol langa lampia khun chelhonin, nanungdel hon mugetnun nate. Chule nanungdel ho akilekit kahseovin nithum sung gakisel lhonin, chule chujou tengle chethei lhontan nate." 
Joshua2:17 Hichun miteni chun amanu jah-a, neiki hahsel sah nalhon kitepna achun mona neilhon hih inge." 
Joshua2:18 Vetan, keiho hiche gam kahunglut tengule, hiche neikhai lhah nalhon bangkotna hi patkhao santhip nakhiding, chule nanule napa nasopi pasal ho, chule napa insungmite jouse na-inna anapuikhomin," 
Joshua2:19 chule hitiding ahi. Koi hijongle na-inna kona kholaija potdoh aumleh mona thisan chu aman akipoh ding, keiho themmo hilouding ahi. Chule koihile na-inna naumpi chunga khutlha aumle athisan chu kaluchunguva chuhen," 
Joshua2:20 chule kathilbol lhonhi naseidoh a ahile, neiki hahsel sah lhon kitepna-a kona chu mo kachan lhon louding ahi atilhone." 
Joshua2:21 Chuin amanun nasei bang banglhon chu hitahen, ati. Chuin amanun amani chu asolmangin apotdoh lhontai. Chuin amanun pat santhip chu bangkotna akhaitan, ahi." 
Joshua2:22 Chuin amani mollama chun achelhonin, anungdelho akinungle kahseovin chua chun nithum agaum lhone. Chuin anungdelho ahung kinungle uvin lamjousea aholun amutapouve." 
Joshua2:23 Hichun miteni chu molla konin ahung kumsuh lhonin, agalkai lhonin akilekit lhontai. Chuin Nun chapa Joshua henga ahunglhonin, achung lhona thilsoh jouse chu ahenga aseipeh lhontai." 
Joshua2:24 Chuin amanin tahbeh-in Pakaiyin gamjousehi ikhutnuva eipehdoh-u ahitai. Ajeh chu agama cheng jouse chu eihojeh-in akihot lhugam taove tin Joshua henga aseipeh lhone. 
Joshua3:1 Chuin Joshua jingpitah in athouvin, chule Shittim'a konin akipat doh-un, Jordan lui ahunglhung taove. Amale Israel chate jouse agalkai masangun chua chun ageh taove." 
Joshua3:2 Chuin ahitin ahi. Nithum jouvin lamkaiho chu gebuh lah-a chun acheuvin; 
Joshua3:3 Chule amahon mipi ho chu Pakai na Pathen thulhun thingkhong chu Levi thempuhon aput namu phat tengule naum naova konin kichon unlang chuche nungchu najuidingu ahi, tin thu apeuve." 
Joshua3:4 Ahinla nanghole hiche kikah chu tong sangni tobanga nakigamlat diu, nachenadiu lampi nahet theina dingun, nai hihhelun. Ajehchu tumasangin hiche lampia hin nanache khapouve." 
Joshua3:5 Chule Joshua'n mipi jah-a, nangho kisuthengun ajehchu Pakaiyin jingleh nalah uva thilkidang abolding ahi, ati." 
Joshua3:6 Chuin Joshua'n thempuho jah-a, thulhun thingkhong chu puvinlang mipi masanga chun cheovin, ati. Chuin amahon thulhun thingkhong chu apuvin mipi masanga chun achetauve." 
Joshua3:7 Chule Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, keiman Mosi kana umpi bang banga nangma jong kaumpi ding nahi, ti amahon ahetheina dingun tunia hi Israel pumpi mitmu-a kachoi sang panding nahi, ati." 
Joshua3:8 Chule nangman thulhun thingkhong pu-a pang thempuho jah-a, Jordan vapam chin nagei phat nule Jordan'a nadindendiu ahi, tin thu pen, ati." 
Joshua3:9 Hitichun Joshua'n Israel chate jah-a, hilama hungun lang Pakai na Pathen'u thuhi ngaijun, ati." 
Joshua3:10 Chule Joshua'n hia konahi hingjing Pathen nalah uva aume ti nahet dingu ahi. Chule aman Kanaan mihole Hit miho, Hiv miho Perizz miho, chule Girgash mihole Amor miho chule Jebus miho thonlou hela namasanguva adeldoh ding ahi, ati." 
Joshua3:11 Veovin, leiset pumpi Pakai thulhun thingkhong chu namasanguva Jordan lui galkai ding ahi." 
Joshua3:12 Hijeh chun tun phung khatna mikhatcheh Israel phungho-a konin somleni lhengdoh-un. 
Joshua3:13 Chule hung hitiding ahi. Pakai leiset pumpi Pakai thulhun thingkhong pu-a thempuho kengin achot chot nuleh Jordan twipi chu kiting tanding sahlama kona hunglong twipia kona chu kikhendoh ding, chule hichu aloma kiting dending ahi." 
Joshua3:14 Chuin ahitin ahi, mipihole mipi masanga thulhun thingkhong pu-a thempuho Jordan galkai nadinga aponbuh uva kona akipatdoh phatnun," 
Joshua3:15 Chule thingkhong puho Jordan lui aga lhunuva, thingkhong pu thempuho keng chun twi agahchot lutnule, (ajehchu chang atlai sungsele Jordan luihi longletji ahi)." 
Joshua3:16 Sahlama kona hunglong suh twi chu akiting denin, Zarethan koma um Adam khopi geijin gamlatah-in akidilin ahi. Chule phaicham gamlatah twipi lamsanga chi twipi lama longsuh laichu atantan, hitichun mipi ho chu Jericho khopi dontah-a chun agalkai taove." 
Joshua3:17 Pakai thulhun thingkhong pu-a thempuho chu Jordan lui mipi ho chu agalkaisoh kahseovin, Jordan lailunga tolgoa chun ading detnun, chule Israelte jouse chu tolgoa agalkai taovin ahi." 
Joshua4:1 Chuin ahitin ahi. Mipi jouse Jordan agalkai sohkei phatnun, Pakaiyin Joshua henga," 
Joshua4:2 Phung khatna konin Pasal khat cheh, mipi lah-a pasal somleni lhengdoh-in," 
Joshua4:3 Chule ajah uva, thempuho dettah a adinnau mun Jordan lailunga konchun song somleni laovin. Chule hicheho chu pogalkai junlang tujana nagenadiu munachun koijun, tin thu pen, tin aseipeh-in ahi." 
Joshua4:4 Chuin Joshua'n Israel chate lah-a phung khatna kon mikhat cheh analhendoh mi somleni chu akouvin," 
Joshua4:5 Chule Joshua'n ajah uva, Jordan lailung Pakai na Pathen'u thulhun thingkhong masanga chun gacheuvin lang Israel chate phungjat dungjuijin nangho mikhatnin, song khat cheh nalenguva hinpuvin, ati." 
Joshua4:6 Hiti achu hichehi nalah uva melchihna hunghia, khonung tengle, nachateovin apateu henga hiche songhohi ipi kihetna ham? tia nadoh tengule" 
Joshua4:7 Nanghon Pakai thulhun thingkhong masanga Jordan lui alonglai adinjeh ahi. Jordan agalkai laijun Jordan twi chu akangtanin, chujeh-in hiche songhohi Israel chate dinga a-itih a dinga hetjingna hiding ahi, tia amahochu nadonbut diu, ahi ati." 
Joshua4:8 Chule Israel chaten Joshua thupeh bangin abollun, Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a anasei bangin, Israelte phungjat dungjuijin alauvin, agenao mun geijin apogal kaijun, chuachun akoitauvin ahi." 
Joshua4:9 Chule Joshua'n thulhun thingkhong pu-a thempuho dinna Jordan lailunga chun song somleni aphutnin, hihochu tunichanin aumjinge." 
Joshua4:10 Ajehchu tulhun thingkhong pu-a thempuho chu Mosi'n Joshua henga thu anapeh jouse dungjuijin mipi henga seipehdin Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a thu anapeh chu akichai kahsen Jordan lailunga chun adingdenun ahi. Chuin mipi chu kinotah-in agalkai taovin ahi. 
Joshua4:11 Chule ahitin ahi, mipi ho chu agalkai sohkei phatnun Pakai thulhun thingkhong le thempuho chu mipi mitmun agalkai taove." 
Joshua4:12 Chule Reuben chate, Gad chate chule Manasseh phung kehkhat gal manchah pumin, Mosi'n ahenguva aseipeh bangin Israel chate masanga anagalkaijun ahi." 
Joshua4:13 Galvona kivonjousadem mi sangsomli tobang gal satdingin Jericho phaicham ho-a Pakai masanga akitolun, ahi." 
Joshua4:14 Hicheni chun Pakaiyin Israel pumpi mitmu-a chun Joshua achoisangin ahi. Chuin amahon Mosi agin bangun amachu ahinlai sungsen agingun ahi. 
Joshua4:15 Chule Pakaiyin Joshua henga aseijin," 
Joshua4:16 Hettohsahna thingkhong pu-a thempuho chu Jordan'a kona ahungdoh nadiuvin thu pen, ati." 
Joshua4:17 Hijeh chun Joshua'n Jordan'a konin hungdoh taovin, tin thempuho thu apetan ahi." 
Joshua4:18 Chule ahitin ahi, Pakai thulhun thingkhong pu-a thempuho chu Jordan lailunga kona ahungdoh uva, chule tolgo akaidoh phatnun angai bang bangin Jordan luichu alongkittan, vadung pangho chu aletkittan, ahi." 
Joshua4:19 Chuin mipi chu lha masapen nisom channin Jordan luija konin ahungdoh un, Jericho gam solamsang Gilgal'a chun gebuh asong taovin ahi." 
Joshua4:20 Chule song somleni Jordan luija kona alahdoh uchu Gilgal'a chun Joshua'n aphuttan ahi. 
Joshua4:21 Chule aman Israel chate jah-a, khonung tengle nachateovin apateu henga, hiche songhohi ipi kihetna ham? tia nadoh tenguleh," 
Joshua4:22 Nanghon nachateo henga, Israel chu hiche Jordan'a hin tolgon anagalkaijun ahi, ti nahetsah dingu ahi." 
Joshua4:23 Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'un twipisan kagalkai kahseuva kamasanguva agotsah bangchun, Pakai na Pathen'un Jordan twi chu nagalkai kahseovin akansah-in, ahi." 
Joshua4:24 Hiti achu leiset mite jousen Pakai khut chu hattah ahi, ti ahetheijuva, nanghon Pakai na Pathen'u chu a-imatih chana nagin theina dingu ahi tin aseipeh-in ahi." 
Joshua5:1 Chuleh ahitin ahi, Jordan gal lhumlam sanga um Amor mite leng jouse le, twipi panga um Kanaan mite leng jousen Israel chate masanga Jordan agalkaisoh kahseovin Pakaiyin Jordan luichu akansah-e, ti ajah phatnun alungu ajunlha gamtan, Israel chate jehchun amaho-ah hanna lung him him aumtapoi." 
Joshua5:2 Hichepet chun Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, chemcha hem hinsem munlang, Israel chate chu aniveina-a din achepmu tanpeh kitnin, ati." 
Joshua5:3 Chuin Joshua chun chemcha hem asemin, Israel chate chu achepmu atanpehtan ahi." 
Joshua5:4 Chule Joshua'n chep atanna ajehchu hichehi ahi. Egypt'a kona ahungdoh nungun mipi jouse galmiho jengjong, Egypt'a kona ahungdoh jouvun, gamthip lampia athigam taovin, ahi." 
Joshua5:5 Egypt'a kona hungpotdoh jouse chu cheptansa ahiuvin ahi. Ahinla ahungdoh nunguva gamthipma lamkah-a pengho jouse chu chep tanlou ahiuve. 
Joshua5:6 Egypt'a kona hungdoh Israel chate galmi jousen Pakai aw lunglut tah-a angailou jeh-un, suhmanga aumkah seovin gamthipma kum somli athammun, Pakaiyin apateu pehdinga anatepsa khoijule bongnoi lonna gam chu amaho musahlou dingin ana kihahselin, ahi." 
Joshua5:7 Hijeh chun akheluva atundoh achateu chu Joshua'n achepmu atanpehtan ahi. Ajehchu amaho lamdunga chep ana tanpeh loujeh-un, chep tanlou anahiuve." 
Joshua5:8 Chule ahitin ahi, mipi jouse chep akitanjou phatnin, adam kahseovin aumnao gebuh a chun aumun ahi." 
Joshua5:9 Chule Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, tunia nangho-a kona Egypt te i-sah louna chu katolmang ahitai, ati. Hijeh chun tuni geihin hiche munchu Gilgal akisahtan ahi." 
Joshua5:10 Chuin Israel chaten Gilgal'a chun gebuh akisonun, hiche lha nisomlenili channi nilhah lamin Jericho phaicham ho-a chun kalchuh kut anit taove." 
Joshua5:11 Chule kalchuh kut jou ajing nikhotah chun amahon hiche gama mimle chang leija kona cholsolou changlhah chule changkanpoh chucheni mama chun anetaovin, ahi." 
Joshua5:12 Chule chuche gam changvui anehjouvu ajing chun Mana chu akichaitan, Israel chaten Mana chu nejong anetapouve. Ahinla amahon hiche kum-a pat chun Kanaan gam gachu anetaovin, ahi." 
Joshua5:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, Joshua Jericho naija aumpet chun akhodah-in aven ahile, veuvin, amasanga mikhat achemjam sadohsan akhutna achoijin adingin ahi. Chuin Joshua'n akom anaijin ajah-a, keiho lama pang nahim, ahiloule kamelmate lama panga nahim? ati." 
Joshua5:14 Chuin aman ahipoi, Pakai janel lamkaija hungjoh kahi ati. Chuin Joshua tolla aboh khupmin ahouvin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin nasoh henga ipi seinom naneijem? atin ahi." 
Joshua5:15 Chuin Pakai janel gallamkai chun Joshua jah-a, nakengchot sutlhan, ajehchu nadinna mun chu muntheng ahi, ati. Chuin Joshua'n chuti chun aboltan, ahi." 
Joshua6:1 Tun Jericho chu Israel chate jehchun akikhahchahtan, koimacha alutle apotle aumtapoi." 
Joshua6:2 Chuin Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, vetan, Jericho le alengpau chule mihat mihangsan tamtah hohi nakhutna kapeh ahitai." 
Joshua6:3 Chule nangho galmi jousen khopihi naum uva, hitia chu khatvei navelsoh diu ahi. Chule chutobangma chu nigup sunga naboldingu ahi." 
Joshua6:4 Chule thempu sagin kelngoichal ki-a kisem sumkon sagi kitepna thulhun thingkhong masanga achoijuva, chule anisagi ni-a chu khopi chu vel sagivei navelsoh dingu, chuteng thempuhon sumkon ho chu amutdiu ahi." 
Joshua6:5 Chule hung hitiding ahi. Amahon kelngoichal ki-a kisem sumkon chu amut huilhung jenjunu gin najah tenguleh mipi chun ha-aova na-aodiu, chutahle khopi kulchu chimlhading ahi. Chule mipi chu ama ama majon cheh a jangjela kaltou dingu ahi, ati." 
Joshua6:6 Chuin Nun chapa Joshua'n thempuho chu akouvin, ajah uvah, thulhun thingkhong hi jong unlang, thempu sagin Pakai kitepna thingkhong masang lama chun kelngoichal ki-a kisem sumkon sagi choijuhen ati." 
Joshua6:7 Chuin aman mipi jah-a, chepeh unlang khopi chu velkolun lang, chule galvona kivonta pouchu Pakai kitepna thingkhong masanga chun cheohen, ati." 
Joshua6:8 Chuin ahitin ahi. Joshua'n mipi henga thu aseijou phatnin, kelngoichal ki-a kisem sumkon sagi choija thempuho chun Pakai masanga achoiju sumkon ho chu amut taovin, chule Pakai thulhun thingkhong chun anungu ajuitan ahi." 
Joshua6:9 Chule galvon kivon hochu sumkon ho mut thempuho masanga chun acheuvin, chule anungthop ho chu thulhun thingkhong nunga ahungun, thempuho chun ache pumu chun sumkon ho chu amutnun ahi." 
Joshua6:10 Chuin Joshua'n na aona dinguva thu kapeh ding nikho alhin tokahse-a, na ao-loudingu, chule nahusat loudingu ahi. Chule thujong nasei loudingu, thu kapeh tenglebou na aodiu ahi, tin mipi chu thu apetan, ahi." 
Joshua6:11 Chutichun Pakai thulhun thingkhong chu khopi chu khatvei avelsah un, chule gebuh a ahung kilekitnun, agehjiuve." 
Joshua6:12 Chule Joshua jingpitah-in athouvin, thempuho chun Pakai thulhun thingkhong chu apuve." 
Joshua6:13 Chuin Pakai thingkhong masanga kelngoichal ki-a kisem sumkon ho choija thempu sagiho chu tanglouvin acheuvin ahi. Chule galvona kivonho chu amasanguva acheuve. Ahinla anungthop ho chu Pakai thulhun thingkhong nunga ahungun, thempuho chun chepumin sumkon ho amut jingun ahi." 
Joshua6:14 Chuin anini channin khopi chu velkhat avellun gebuh a ahungkile uvin ahi. Chutichun nigup abolluve. 
Joshua6:15 Chuin anisagi channin ahitin ahi, khovah then thenin athouvun, abol ngaima bangun khopi chu vel sagi avelun ahi. Hichenia bou chu khopi chu vel sagivei avelu ahi." 
Joshua6:16 Chuin avel sagi chana-in ahitin ahi, thempuhon sumkon ho amut phatnun Joshua'n mipi jah-a hatah-in aovun ajehchu Pakaiyin khopihi nangho napeh-u ahitai atin, ahi." 
Joshua6:17 Chule khopile asunga umjouse ngeichu sapsetna dinga Pakaiya kipedoh ahitai. Rahab noti le a-insunga aumpi chengse bouchu sohcha ding ahi. Ajehchu amanun imisolte niu anaselin ahi. 
Joshua6:18 Chule sapset thilho-a konin kikang seuvin. Achutiloule sapset thilho chu lakhaovin natin, sapset changkhaovin nate. Chule Israel gebuh a jong sapsetna lhungintin, boina umgetninte." 
Joshua6:19 Ahinla sana dangka, thihle sum-eng bel jouse Pakai dinga kisuthenga ahi. Hicheho chu Pakai goukhol na-a kikoiding ahi, ati." 
Joshua6:20 Chutichun thempuhon sumkon ho amutphatnun ahitin ahi. Mipin sumkon ho gin ajah phatnun ha aovin a-aovun ahileh, kulpi chu achimlhatan, chuphatnin mipi chu amaho doncheh a jangjelin alhai touvun khopi chu alataove." 
Joshua6:21 Chuin amahon khopi sunga um numeile pasal nungah le gollhang abonin, ateh akhang chule bongchal le kelngoi, chule sangan abonchan chemjamin athat gamhel taovin ahi." 
Joshua6:22 Ahinla Joshua'n gamvelhi teni jah-a, notinu in'a chun lut lhonin lang amanule aneijouse chu ahenga nana kihahselna lhon bang chun gapuidoh lhonin, ati." 
Joshua6:23 Chuin gollhang gamvelhi teni chu ahunglhonin, Rahab, anule apa, asopiho chule aneijouse toh apuidoh lhontan, ahi. Chule amanin a inkote jouse apuidoh lhonin Israel gebuh pama adalha lhontan, ahi." 
Joshua6:24 Chuin amahon khopi chu asunga thil umjouse toh meijin ahalvamun, sana dangka, thihle sum-eng belho bouchu Pakai in'a gou kholna-a akoitaovin, ahi." 
Joshua6:25 Chuin Joshua'n Rahab notinu le aneijouse, chule apa insung ahuhhingin ahi. Chule amanu tuni geijin Israelte lah-a acheng nalaije. Ajehchu amanun Joshua'n Jericho gavelhi dinga asolteni chu ana selin, ahi." 
Joshua6:26 Chuti chun Joshua'n amaho chu ahahselin, hitin aseije: hiche Jericho khopi hintungdoh kitna chu Pakai masanga sapset chenghen. Abul phutna chun achapa lenpen achan ding, chule akotpiho atundoh tengle achapa lhumpen achan ding ahi," 
Joshua6:27 Hitichun Pakaiyin Joshua aumpin, gam jouse-a amin chu akithangtan ahi." 
Joshua7:1 Ahin Israel chaten sapsetna thil chungah asukhel taove. Ajehchu Judah phunga Zerah chapa Zabdi chapa Karmi chapa Achan'in sapsetna thilchu alan ahi. Chuin Israel chate chunga Pakai lunghana chu akoudoh jahtan ahi. 
Joshua7:2 Chuin Joshua'n Jericho akonin Bethel solam Bethaven koma um Ai kho-a mi asolin, ajah uvah, chetou vunlang gamchu gaveovin tin aseijin ahi. Chuin miho chu acheuvin Ai khochu agave taove." 
Joshua7:3 Chuin amaho chu Joshua henga ahung kilekitnun, ajah-a, mijouse kontousah datan, ahinla sangni sangthum tou kontouvu henlang Ai khochu nokhumu hen, mijouse suhthachol datan, ajeh chu lhomcha bou ahiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Joshua7:4 Hichun mipi ho lah-a mi sangthum tobang akontou taove. Ahin amaho Ai miho masanga ajamtaovin ahi. 
Joshua7:5 Chuin Ai miten amaho mi somthumlegup tobang athatnun ahi. Ajehchu kotpi-a kona Shebarim geipeh a ahindelsuh uva, ajamsuh nalam uva athao ahi. Hijeh chun miho lung chu alhoplhatan, twibang ahijengtai." 
Joshua7:6 Chuin Joshua'n avonho abottelin Pakai thulhun thingkhong masanga chun nilhah geijin aboh khupmin, tolla amai asulutnin, amale Israel upaho chun, aluchung uva leivui akinutaove." 
Joshua7:7 Chuin Joshua'n, vo Pakai Pathen, ipidinga hiche mipihohi Amor mite khutna napeh doh-a thagam dingbepma Jordan napui galkai mongham? Jordan gal langkhatna lungmonga kanaum hitaleh!" 
Joshua7:8 Vo Pakai, Israelte hi amelmate masanga kinungchon jing tale ipi seitang em?" 
Joshua7:9 Ajehchu Kanaan mihole hiche gama cheng jousehin hichu jaovintin, eium kimvel untin kaminuhi leisetna kona asuhmang diu ahitai. Chutengle Namin loupitah hi inaloding hitam? ati." 
Joshua7:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, thoudoh-in, ipi dinga hiti achu nabohkhupma nalup ham? ati." 
Joshua7:11 Israel achonvaltan, kathupeh kathulhun jong eisuhkeh peh-un, amahon sapsetna thil jengjong alauvin, aguvin, aselguvin, athilkeo lah uva aselun ahi." 
Joshua7:12 Hiche jeh-a chu Israel chate amelmateu masanga ding joulouva galte masanga nungjam joh ahiuve. Ajehchu amaho chu sapset changa ahitaovin, nalah uva kona sapset thilchu nasuhmang lou uleh kaumpi louding nahitaove." 
Joshua7:13 Kipat in mipi ho sutheng inlang ajah uva, jing nikho-a dingin kisuthengun; ajehchu Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin ati, Israel nalah uva kona sapsetsa thilchu nasuhmang kahseuva namelma teu masanga nadin jouloudiu ahi, tin seipeh-in." 
Joshua7:14 Hiche jehchun jingkah tengle naphungu dungjuija naki khopdiu, chule hitiding ahi. Pakaiyin alhendoh phung chu abom dungjuija hungdiu ahi. Chule Pakaiyin alhendoh bom chu a-insung dungjuija hungdiu, chule Pakaiyin alhendoh dungjuija amichangcheh hungdiu ahi." 
Joshua7:15 Chule hitiding ahi, sapset thiltoh kimattha pen penchu amale aneijouse meija kigouvam ding ahi. Ajehchu aman Pakai thulhun asukhelin, Israel lah-a chonval tah-in thil abole, ati." 
Joshua7:16 Chuin Joshua jingpitah-in athouvin, Israelte chu aphung phungin ahinpuijin ahile Judah phungchu alheng dohtai." 
Joshua7:17 Chuin aman Judah sunga abom bomin ahinpuijin, Zarhi bom chu alhengdoh-in ahi. Chuin Zarhi bom chu mikhat khatnin ahinpuijin ahile Zabdi chu alheng dohtan ahi." 
Joshua7:18 Chuin a-inkouvin mikhat khatnin ahinpuijin ahile Judah phunga Zarah chapa Zabdi chapa Karmi chapa Achan chu amandohtan ahi. 
Joshua7:19 Chuin Joshua'n Achan jah-a, kangeh nahi, kachapa Pakai Israel Pathen chu loupi chamkim jana penlang nachonsetna phongin, chule ipi nanabol tun imlouvin kakoma seijin, ati." 
Joshua7:20 Chuin Achan'in Joshua chu adonbutnin, ajah-a, tahbeh mongin Pakai Israel Pathen dounan kana chonsetan, hitihin kanaboltai." 
Joshua7:21 Keiman thil kichomho lah-a chun Babylon von hoitah khatle dangka shekel jani, chule shekel somnga-a gih sana lhon khat kamun ahile, kavejou tahih-in, kakilahtan ahi. Chule vetan, hicheho chu kaponbuh lailung leinoi'a kaselin, dangka chu anoija aume, atin ahi." 
Joshua7:22 Chuin Joshua'n mi asolin, amaho chu ponbuh lama alhaijun, chule vetan, hichu aponbuh sunga anaselin, dangka anoinunga anaume." 
Joshua7:23 Chuin amahon ponbuh a konin hicheho chu aladoh-un, Joshua le Israel chate jouse henga ahinchoijun Pakai angsunga akoitaove." 
Joshua7:24 Chuin Joshua le aumpi Israel pumpin Zarah chapa Achan dangka, von, sana lhon, achapate le achanute, abongchalho, asanganho le akelngoiho, aponbuh chule aneijouse ahintolun Achor phaicham ahinlhut taove." 
Joshua7:25 Chuin Joshua'n ibola neisuh lunggimu ham? Pakaiyin tunia nangjong nasuh lunggim ding ahitai, ati. Chuin Israel mipin amale aumpi jousen songin asepmun, asejou phatnun meijin ahalvam taove." 
Joshua7:26 Chuin amahon achunga chun songlhuh lentah atungdoh-un, hichu tunigei hin aumjing nalaije. Hitichun alungset tijat umtah-a konin Pakai akileheitai. Hijeh chun hiche munchu tunigeijin Achor phaicham akisahtai." 
Joshua8:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, kicha hih-in, lungjong lunglha hih-in, galmi jouse puijin kipat inlang Ai kho-a chetouvin, ven, Ai lengpa le amite chule akhopile agam nakhutna kapeh nahitai." 
Joshua8:2 Chule Jericho le alengpa chunga nabol banga Ai le alengpa chunga jong nabolding ahi. Chule thilkichomhole ganchaho chu nangho ding ahin, khopi nunglama chu achanglhi nakoiding ahi, ati." 
Joshua8:3 Chutichun Joshua le galmiho jouse Ai satna chedin akipat doh-un ahi. Chuin Joshua'n mihat, mihang sangsomthum alhengdoh-in, jannin asoldohtan, ahi." 
Joshua8:4 Chuin amaho chu thu apen, veuvin, khopi nunglama nachanlhih diu ahi. Khopi-a kona chegamla behseh louva, kigosa dema naum johdiu ahi." 
Joshua8:5 Chule keimale kaumpi chengse chun khopi chu hinnai lutnung kating, chule hung hitiding ahi. Keiho doudinga ahungdoh tengule, amasa bangchun keiho amasanguvah jamung ting," 
Joshua8:6 (ajehchu amaho keiho nunga hungdoh ding,) amaho khopisunga kapuidoh kahseovin, ajehchu amahon amasa-a bangin, amaho amasanguvah ajamtaove atidiu ahin, hijeh-a chu amasanguva kajamdiu ahi." 
Joshua8:7 Chuteng nanghon nachanlhih naova kona nakipat doh uva, khopi chu nalahdiu ahi. Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in nakhut uva apehding ahi." 
Joshua8:8 Chule hitiding ahi, nanghon khopi chu nalah tengule nahal dingu ahi. Pakai thupeh dungjuija nabol dingu ahi. Veovin, thu kapeh nahiuve, ati." 
Joshua8:9 Hichun Joshua chun amaho chu asoldoh-in, chule amaho changpang dingin acheuvin, Ai khole Bethel kikah Ai lhumlama chun aga umun, Joshua vang hiche janchun mipi lah-a agehtan, ahi." 
Joshua8:10 Chuin Joshua jingpitah-in athouvin, mihochu asimin, amale Israel upaho mipi masanga chun Ai kho jonin akitoltou taove." 
Joshua8:11 Chuin mipi jouse ahenga amatoh umkhom galmiho jouse chu chetouvun, chule ahin naijun khopi masanga ahunglhung uvin, Ai khopi sahlama chun ponbuh asonguve. Tun amahole Ai kikah-a chu phaicham khat umah ahi." 
Joshua8:12 Chuin aman mi sangnga tobang apuijin, khopi lhumlam sang Bethel le Ai kikah-a chun changlhi-a kisel dingin akoitan ahi." 
Joshua8:13 Chuin amahon khopi sahlama um mipi janel, chule khopi lhumlama changpangho geija agontohsoh phatnin, hiche janchun Joshua phaicham lailunga achetan ahi." 
Joshua8:14 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ai lengpan hichu amuphat chun, kinotah-in ama athouvin, khopi miho, amale amite jouse chu phaichama chun Israelte satdingin ahung kondoh taove. Ahinla khopi nunglama asat ding achanglhi aume tichu ahepouvin, ahi." 
Joshua8:15 Chuin Joshua le Israel mijouse chu gallel bangin amaho masanga chun gamthip lama chun ajamtaove. 
Joshua8:16 Chuin Ai kho-a um mijouse chu amaho nungdel dingin akikoukhomun, Joshua nung adelun khopi-a konin akitolmang taove." 
Joshua8:17 Chuin Ai khole Bethel kho-a chun Israelte nungdela chelou khatchabeh aumpouve. Chule khopi kot chu honsan adalhaovin Israelte chu adeltaove. 
Joshua8:18 Chuin Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a, Ai kholam ngan nakhutna tengcha chu gah lhandoh-in, ajehchu hichu nakhutna kapeh ding ahi, ati. Chuin Joshua'n akhutna um tengcha chu khopi lam ngan alhang dohtan ahi." 
Joshua8:19 Chuin changpangho chu aumna mun uva konin akipatdoh loijun, akhut alhandoh doh chun alhaijun, khopi-a chun alutnun hichun alauvin gangtah-in ahallha taove." 
Joshua8:20 Chuin Ai kho miho chu akiheijun anung lamu agah vetnule, veuvin, khopi meikhu van'a akitungdoh amuvin, hoilampena jamding ham ahetapouve. Chuin gamthip lama jam mipi ho chu ahung kilekitnun, anungdelhou chunga chun achutaove." 
Joshua8:21 Chuin Joshua le Israel pumpi, achanglhi hon khopi alah-u chule khopi meikhu kitungdoh chu amuphatnun akiheijun Ai kho miho chu athatgam taove." 
Joshua8:22 Chuin adangho chu amaho satdin khopi-a konin ahung kitoldoh-un, hitichun amaho alang alanga Israelte lailung tah-a aumtaove. Chuin akihinghoile ajamdoh khatcha aumsah tapouve." 
Joshua8:23 Chuin Ai khopi lengpa chu ahingin amanun, Joshua henga ahinkai taovin ahi." 
Joshua8:24 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israel ten gamlah le anungdel nao gamthipma Ai kho mijouse chemjam'a akitha-a akisuh gamhel phatchun, Israelte jouse Ai kho-a akileuvin chemjamin asumang taovin ahi." 
Joshua8:25 Chule hiche nikho-a Ai khopi-a thijouse chu anumei apasal'in sangsom le sangni ahiuve. 
Joshua8:26 Joshua'n ateng alhandoh chu Ai kho-a miho athajou tokahseochun akhut alha lhapon ahi. 
Joshua8:27 Pakaiyin Joshua henga athupeh bangin hiche khopi-a ganchaho le thil kichomho bou chu Israel ten ama ama chanding dola akilah-u ahi. 
Joshua8:28 Chuin Joshua Ai kho chu ahalin, a-itih-a dingin alhuh-in asemin, tunichan hin ahomkeo ahijinge." 
Joshua8:29 Chule Ai kho lengpa chu nilhah geijin thingleh-a akhaijin, chule nilhum ding konin Joshua'n thu apen, thilong chu thingleh-a konin alalhauvin khopi lamlen lutna bulla apaijun achunga song atungdoh-un tunichanhin aum nalaije." 
Joshua8:30 Chujouvin Joshua'n Ebal lhanga Israel Pakai Pathen dingin maicham asemin ahi. 
Joshua8:31 Mosi dan lekhabua kisun bangin Pakai soh Mosi'n Israel chilhah ho thu anapeh bangchun, hiche maicham chu songa kisem ahin, koiman achunga thih alhahkhum loulaiju ahi. Hichea chun Pakai dingin govam thilto le chamna thiltoho atoh-in ahi." 
Joshua8:32 Chuin aman hiche songa chun Mosi danho chu Israel chate mitmun asunin ahi. 
Joshua8:33 Chule Israelte jouse, a-upahou, thutan vaihomho, Levi te thempuho chu Pakai thingkhong jongho masanga, thulhun thingkhong sihtoa chun phung chomho le chuche gama pengho jouse jongchu ading khom sohkeijun, akehkhat Gerezim molpangah adingun, Pakai soh Mosi'n Israelte chu vang aboh tahdi ding ahi tia thu anapeh bangchun, akeh khat chu Ebal jonna aumun ahi." 
Joshua8:34 Chule chujouchun danthua thujouse danthu bu-a kisun jouse dungjuijin vangbohna le sapsetna thuho chu asimdoh-in ahi. 
Joshua8:35 Mosi thupeh jouse chu Israelte houkhom ho jousele, numei ho le chapang neocha cha hole amaho lah-a chidang namdang chengho hetnin Joshua'n simlou khatchabeh aneipon ahi." 
Joshua9:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jordan hilamsang thinglhang, phaicham chule twipilen Lebanon geija cheng jouse Hit mi, Amor mi, Kanaan mi, Perizz mi, Hiv mi chule Jebus mi lengho jouse chun ajah phatnun," 
Joshua9:2 Amaho Joshua le Israel satdingin lungkhat tah-in akikhom khomtaove. 
Joshua9:3 Chuin Gibeon na chengho chun Joshua'n Jericho le Ai kho abolnaho chu ajah phatnun," 
Joshua9:4 Amahon doha abolun palaija kisol bangin acheuvin, asanganhou chunga khaodip pon luiho aphaovin, jupenglui asesaho le akikanchomho apouvin," 
Joshua9:5 Chule kengchotlui abehbeh a pol akiseovin, vonlui akivonun, anehdiuva changlhah ahinkipoh hou jong agon, a-ap gamtan ahi." 
Joshua9:6 Chuin amaho Gilgal gebuh-a Joshua henga acheuvin, amale Israel mite henga, keiho kholgam latah-a kona hung kahiuvin, hijeh chun tun neikicham piuvin, atiuve." 
Joshua9:7 Chuin Israel miten Hit mite jah-a, nangho kalah uva cheng hikhatnun nate. Achutile nang hotoh thulhunna iti kasem dinguham? atiuve." 
Joshua9:8 Chuin amahon Joshua jah-a nasohte kahiuhi atiuve, chuin Joshua'n ajah uva, nangho koi nahiuva hoijakona hung nahiuvem? ati." 
Joshua9:9 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Pakai na Pathen min jala nasohte hi kholgam latah a kona hunga kahiuve. Ajehchu keihon aminthangjele Egypt gama athilbol jouse kaja taove," 
Joshua9:10 chule Jordan galla um Amor mite lengni Heshbon lengpa Sihon le Ashtaroth na cheng Bashan lengpa Og chunga athilbol jouse phatah-in kajaovin, ahi." 
Joshua9:11 Hijeh chun ka-upahou le kagamsunga cheng mijousen kajah uvah, nanehdiu kipoh unlang, amaho kimupi dingin cheovin, chule alah uva keihohi nasohte kahiuve. Hijeh chun tun nanghon neikichampiuvin gatiuvin tin eihilun ahi, atiuve." 
Joshua9:12 Naheng uva hungdinga kakigot uva pat kanehdiuva kahinpoh-u hiche changlhah hohi sapeh-ah ahi. Ahinla tun veuvin, agopmin a-ap tai." 
Joshua9:13 Chule ju kahin kikhum nao penghohi athahleh ahin, veuvin tun, asegamtai. Hiche kavon houleh ka kengchot-u jonghi lamsaotah kahinjot jeh uva luigama ahitai, atiuve." 
Joshua9:14 Chuin mihochun Pakai chu dong louvin an anehkhompi taovin ahi. 
Joshua9:15 Chuin Joshua'n amahochu hinghoi dingin chamna asemin, akitep pitan ahi. Chule mipi kikhomho lamkaiho jong ahenguva akitep taovin, ahi." 
Joshua9:16 Chuin amato akitep nungu nithum jouvin ahitin ahi. Amahochu alah uva chengah akhovelhou ahiuchu ahedoh taovin ahi. 
Joshua9:17 Chuin Israel chate akitolun, anithum chanin akhopihou alhung taovin ahi. Tun akhopihou chu Gibeon, Chephirah, Beeroth chule Kirjath-jearim ahi." 
Joshua9:18 Chuin mipi kikhomho pipuiho Pakai Israel Pathen minna akihahsel tahjeh-un, Israel chaten amaho chu asumang tapouve. Chuin houkhom ho jouse chu pipuiho chunga chun aphuntaove." 
Joshua9:19 Ahinla pipuiho jousen houkhom hojouse henga, tonsot Pakai Pathen minna ahenguva kihahsela akihitai. Hijeh chun tun eihon amaho itohkhah theilou diu ahi." 
Joshua9:20 Eihon amaho chunga hitihin boluhite, eiho amaho chunga ina kihahsel taovin, amahohi ihinghoi teidiu ahi. Achutiloule ichunguva lunghana hunglhung getninte." 
Joshua9:21 Chuin pipuiho chun amaho chu hinghoijun atiuvin, ahin pipuiho kitepna bangin mipi kikhomho dingin thingpo twikhaijin panguhen atiuve." 
Joshua9:22 Chuin Joshua'n amaho chu akouvin, ajah uva, kalah uva cheng hiuva, ipidia nangho-a kona gamlatah-a chenga kahiuve tia neijoulhep muham? ati." 
Joshua9:23 Hijeh chun tun nangho gaosap changa nahitaove. Soh nahinaole Pathen in dinga thingpole, twikhailea napan naova kona khatcha jong ongthol naum lou dingu ahi, tin aseitan ahi." 
Joshua9:24 Chuin amahon Joshua chu adonbutnun, Pakai na Pathen'in asoh Mosi henga hiche gam jouse nangma pehdinga thu napeh chule acheng jousehi namasanga nasuhgam ding ahi ti soh hohin kichentah-in eina hilui. Nangho jeh-in kahinkhouhi suhmanga aumdinghi kakicha behsetnun, hiti ahi kana bollu ahitai." 
Joshua9:25 Chule tun vetan, keihohi nakhutna um kahiuvin, kachunguva boldingin aphai, adih-e, natichu boljengin, atiuve." 
Joshua9:26 Chuin hitichun aman amaho chu abolin Israel chate khutna konin ahuhdoh un, amaho chu athat tapouve." 
Joshua9:27 Chuin Joshua'n hiche nikho chun amaho chu houkhom ho Pakai maichama dinga thingpole twikhaija alhendohna mun'a chun tuni geijin, apansahtan ahi." 
Joshua10:1 Tun ahitin ahi, Jerusalem lengpa Adonizedek'in Joshua'n Ai kho alah a asuhmanghela Jericho khopi le alengpa asuhmang banga Ai khole alengpa abol chule Gibeon'a chenghon Israel toh kichamna asemuva alah uva aum ajah phatchun," 
Joshua10:2 Akichalheh jengun, ajehchu Gibeon hi lengte khopiho khat banga khopi lenkhat ahin, hichu Ai kho sangin jong alenjon asunga chengjouse hattah ahiuve." 
Joshua10:3 Hijeh chun Jerusalem lengpa Adonizedek chun Hebron lengpa Hoham le Jarmuth lengpa Piram chule Lachish lengpa Japhia chule Eglon lengpa Debir henga mi asolin," 
Joshua10:4 Hungun lang eihung kithopiuvin, Gibeon sumangu hite. Ajehchu Joshua le Israel chatetoh kichamna asemtaove, ati." 
Joshua10:5 Hijeh chun, Amor te leng ngaho: Jerusalem leng, Hebron leng, Jarmuth leng, Lachish leng chule Eglon leng akikhom khomun, amahole asepai janel jouse akontouvun, Gibeon koma gebuh asemun, akisatpi taove." 
Joshua10:6 Chuin Gibeon mihochun Gilgal gebuh-a Joshua henga mi asolun, nasohte-a dingin nakhut lhang thase hih-in. Kahenguva hungtou loijinglang nei hung kithopiuvin, neihuhhing jengun ati. Ajehchu thinglhanga cheng Amor te lengho jouse keiho doudin akikhom taove." 
Joshua10:7 Chutichun Joshua Gilgal'a konchun amale agalsatmi jouse, mihat mihangho jouse chu akontou taovin ahi." 
Joshua10:8 Chuin Pakaiyin Joshua henga amaho chu kicha hihbeh-in, amaho chu nakhutna kapehdoh nahitai, namasanga miho khatcha dingjou louding ahi, ati." 
Joshua10:9 Hijeh chun hetman louvin Joshua Gilgal'a konin ahenguva jankhovah in achetouvin, ahi." 
Joshua10:10 Chuin Pakaiyin amaho chu Israelte masanga chun amaimoh sah-in, chule Gibeon'a chun mitamtah athatnun ahi. Bethhoron jottouna lampi lhungkeijin adeltaovin, Azekah le Makkedah geijin agathatnun ahi." 
Joshua10:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israelte masanga ajammuva Beth-horon lama achesuh petnun, Pakaiyin Azekah geijin van'a konin achunguva gel len tahtah alhahsah in athiuvin ahi. Israel chaten chemjam'a atha sangun gel selih chu atamjon ahi." 
Joshua10:12 Chujouvin Pakaiyin Amor mite chu Israelte khutna apehdoh nichun Joshua'n Pakai jah-a, hitin aseijin, Israel chate mitmun; Nisa nangma Gibeon chunga dingdenin, chule lha jong Aijalon damjola dingdenin, ati." 
Joshua10:13 Chuin mipi chun amelmateu chunga phu alahjou masang seochun nisa chu adingden tan, chule lhajong chu aumden tai, hiche hi Jasher lekhabua kisuna hilouham? Hitichun vantham jola nisa ading denin, nikhat lhumkei tobang lhumvah louvin aumin ahi." 
Joshua10:14 Chule chuche masang ahiloule chuche nungin jong chutabong nikho, Pakaiyin mihem khat aw angaipehna aumkhapoi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin Israelte dinga gal anasat ahi." 
Joshua10:15 Chuin Joshua le aumkhompi Israel jouse Gilgal gebuh a akilekit taove. 
Joshua10:16 Ahin chuche leng ngaho chu ajamun Makkedah songkoa akisel taove. 
Joshua10:17 Chuin Joshua henga hiche leng ngaho chu Mekkedah songko khatna akiseluve, tin ahungseipeh taove." 
Joshua10:18 Chuin Joshua'n songko kotna chun song len tahtah tanglut unlang amaho ngahtup din mi koijun ati. 
Joshua10:19 Chule nangho umden louvin, nagalmiteo nungdelun, chule amaho lah-a anungthop ho geijin thatnun amaho akhopi houva lutsah hih-un. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'in amaho chu nakhut uva apehdoh ahitai, ati." 
Joshua10:20 Chuin ahitin ahi, Joshua le Israel chaten amaho chu asuhmanghel nadiuvin hathan athatnun, amoh chengchu kul kikai khum khopiho-a chun aluttaovin ahi." 
Joshua10:21 Chuin mijouse chu Mekkedah gebuh a Joshua henga lung mongtah-in akileuvin ahi. Koiman Israel chate chung kitimong monga akam akeh tapouve. 
Joshua10:22 Hiche jouchun Joshua'n songkotkhah chu hongunlang leng ngaho chu kahenga hinpuijun, atin ahi." 
Joshua10:23 Chuin chutichun abolun songkoa konchun leng ngaho Jerusalem lengpa, Hebron lengpa, Jarmuth lengpa, Lachish lengpa chule Eglon lengpa chu ahenga ahinpui taove." 
Joshua10:24 Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche lengho chu Joshua henga ahinpui phatnun, Joshua'n Israel mipi jouse chu akouvin, amatoh kilhon galmi lamkaiho jouse jah-achun hung naijun lang hiche lengho ngong nakengun chonun ati. Chuin amaho ahung naijun amaho ngong chu akenguva achon taove." 
Joshua10:25 Chuin Joshua'n ajah uva, kicha hih-un, lungjong lunglha hih-un, hatnunlang hangsan uvin ati. Ajehchu Pakaiyin nakisatpiu namelma teu jouse chu hitia chu abolding ahi, ati." 
Joshua10:26 Chule hiche jouchun Joshua'n amahochu asatnin, athatnin thingphung nga chunga akhaijin ahi. Chule amahochu thingchunga nilhah geijin akhaijun ahi." 
Joshua10:27 Chuin nilhum dingkonin ahitin ahi, Joshua'n thu apen, amahochu thingleh-a konchun alalhauvin, akiselnao songkoa chun alehlutnun ahi. Songho chu song lenpipin asingun, hichu tunigeijin jong aumnalaije." 
Joshua10:28 Chuin chuche nichun Joshua'n Makkedah chu alan, hichu chemjamin asumangin, mihing jouse asugamhelin khatcha jong ahinghoipoi. Chule Jericho lengpa chunga anabol bangchun Makkedah lengpa chunga jong aboltai." 
Joshua10:29 Chujouvin Joshua'n aumpi Israel chate jousetoh Makkedah'a patnin Libnah lama acheuvin, Libnah chu asat taove." 
Joshua10:30 Chuin Pakaiyin Libnah le alengpa chu Israelte khutna apedoh-in, asunga cheng miho jouse chemjamin athat gamin, khatcha jong ahinghoipoi. Chutichun Jericho lengpa abolna bang chun chuche lengpa jong chu aboltan ahi." 
Joshua10:31 Chuin Joshua'n Libnah'a konin aumpi Israel jousetoh Lachish'a acheuvin, chuin gebuh asongun asattaove." 
Joshua10:32 Chuin Pakaiyin Lachish chu Israelte khutna apedoh-in, hichu nini channin alan ahi. Libnah anabolna jouse bangchun akhopile asunga cheng mihing jouse chu chemjamin asumangtai." 
Joshua10:33 Chujouchun Gezer leng Horam chu Lachish kithopi dingchun ahung touvin ahile, Joshua'n amale amite chu khatcha khen neilou helin athatgamtai." 
Joshua10:34 Chuin Lachish'a konin aumpi Israel jousetoh Joshua chu Eglon'a acheuvin, gebuh asongun asat taove." 
Joshua10:35 Chuin chuche nichun amahon alauvin, chule asunga mihing umjouse chu chemjamin asatnun, hiche nikho mama chun Lachish abolna bangun athatgam heltai." 
Joshua10:36 Chuin Joshua chu aumpi Israel jousetoh Eglon'a konin acheuvin Hebron ho chu asat taove. 
Joshua10:37 Chule amahon hichu alauvin, Eglon anabolna jouse bang chun, Hebron le alengpa aumpi jousele, asunga cheng mihing jouse chu chemjamin athatgam heltan ahi." 
Joshua10:38 Chuin aumpi Israel jousetoh Joshua Debir lama acheuvin, asatnun," 
Joshua10:39 Aman Debir le alengpa chule khopi jouse chu alan, chule amahon amahochu chemjamin asatnun, asunga cheng mihing jouse chu athatnun, khatcha ahinghoi pouve. Hebron abolna bangle Libnah le alengpa abolna bangchun Debir le alengpa jongchu aboltan ahi." 
Joshua10:40 Hitichun Joshua'n lhanglam gam hihen agam pumpin, sim gamho phaigam chule twiputna chana lengte jouse chu asugam sohkeijin, Pakai Israel Pathen thupeh bangin khatcha khenlouvin, ahaithei jouse athat gamheltan ahi." 
Joshua10:41 Chule Joshua'n Kadesh-barne'a pat Gazah channin, Goshen gam jouse toh Gibeon channin asumang heltan ahi." 
Joshua10:42 Pakai Israel Pathen'in Israel dinga gal asat jeh-in, Joshua'n hiche lenghole agam jouseu chu khatvei lah-in alatai." 
Joshua10:43 Chuin Joshua aumpi Israel jousetoh Gilgal gebuh-a chun ahung kilekit taove. 
Joshua11:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Hezor lengpa Jabin'in hicheho chu ajah phatnin, Madon lengpa Jobab, Shimrom lengpa chule Achshaph henga," 
Joshua11:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Hezor lengpa Jabin'in hicheho chu ajah phatnin, Madon lengpa Jobab, Shimrom lengpa chule Achshaph henga," 
Joshua11:2 chule sahlang thinglhang gamle Chinnereth lhanglam phaichamle dam chule lhumlam Dor gamgi-a cheng lengho henga," 
Joshua11:3 chule solamle lhumlama Kanaan mi, Amor mi, Hit mi, Perizz mi chule thinglhanga um Jebus mi chule Mizpeh gam Hermon noilam Hiv mite henga mi asoltan ahi." 
Joshua11:4 Chule asepai jouseu toh mitampi atama tam, atam dannu chu luikama nel simsenlou jatjen sakol kangtalai tamtah toh akondoh taove." 
Joshua11:5 Chuin hiche lengho jouse chu akisuhkhom phatnun Israel doudingin Merom twipanga gebuh asongkhom taove. 
Joshua11:6 Chuin Pakaiyin Joshua henga, amaho jehchun kicha hih-in, ajehchu jing nikho tuphat donle amaho Israel masanga thagam dinga kapehdoh ding nahi. Nangman asakolu aja nabana akangtalaihou meija nahalvam ding ahi, ati." 
Joshua11:7 Hijeh chun Joshua'n agalsat miho jousetoh amaho satdingin phulou helouvin Merom twilah-a chun ahungun, amaho chu anokhom taove." 
Joshua11:8 Chuin Pakaiyin amahochu Israelte khutna apedoh-in, amahon amaho chu athatnun Zidon gei, Misrephoth-maim gei chule solam Mizpeh phaicham geijin adelun, khatcha khenlou helin athat gamtaove." 
Joshua11:9 Chule Pakai thupeh bangchun Joshua'n amaho chunga abolin, asakolhou ja abanin, asakol kangtalai hou meijin ahalvamtan ahi." 
Joshua11:10 Chuin Joshua hichepet chun akinunglen, Hazor chu alan, alengpa chu chemjamin athat tai. Ajehchu chuche masang chun Hazor chu chuche lenggam jouse chunga alenpen anahi." 
Joshua11:11 Chuin chuche sunga um mihing jouse chu chemjamin athatnun, amaho chu asugam helun, khatcha ahinghoi pouve. Chule aman Hazor chu meijin ahal lhatai." 
Joshua11:12 Chuin chugama lengho khopi jousele alengteu jouse chu Joshua'n amanin chemjamin athat tai. Chule Pakai soh Mosi'n athupeh bangin amaho chu asumang heltai. 
Joshua11:13 Ahinla Joshua'n anahallhah Hazor seh tilouvin molvum'a dingjing khopiho chu Israel ten khatcha anahal lhapouve. 
Joshua11:14 Chuin chuche khopiho-a thilkichom jousele ganchaho chu Israel chaten galla kichom thilin akilah-un ahi. Ahivangin amahon amitakip asuhmang tokahseovin chemjamin athatnun khatcha jong ahinghoi pouve. 
Joshua11:15 Pakaiyin asoh Mosi henga thu anapeh bangin Mosi'n Joshua koma thu anapen, chutobangma chun Joshua'n abolin Pakaiyin Mosi thu anapeh jouse chu bolouva akhen khatcha aumpoi." 
Joshua11:16 Chutichun Joshua'n chuche gam jouse thinglhang gamho, lhanglam gamkai jousele Goshen gam jouse, phaichamle phaitong jouse chule Israel molle chuche molsanga damjol jouse alan," 
Joshua11:17 Seir lhang geija kikhotou Halak molsanga pat Hermon mol noilam Lebanon phaichama um Baalgad chan geijin alahpeh-in, alengho jouse amanin asatnin athatgamtan, ahi." 
Joshua11:18 Joshua'n chuche lengho chu phat sottah anakidoupin, ahi." 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon'a cheng Hiv miteho tailou Israel chate toh kichamna sema khopi khatcha jong aumpoi. Adang jouse galla chu alah ngenchangu ahi. 
Joshua11:20 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Mosi anathupeh bangin aman amahochu lungsetna beihela asuhmanghel theina dinga, amahon Israel ahung kidoupina dinguva alungu kitahsah chu Pakaiya kon ahi." 
Joshua11:21 Chuin chuphat chun Joshua ahungin molsang ho-a konchun Hebron, Debir le Anaba konin Judah molsangho jouse-a konle Israel moljouse-a konin Anakim te chu athatnin, Joshua'n amaho chu akhopihou pumin asumang heltan, ahi." 
Joshua11:22 Israelte gamsunga chun Anakim te khatcha thalouva kihinghoi aumtapoi. Gaza, Gath, chule Ashdod nabou aumtaove." 
Joshua11:23 Chutichun Pakaiyin Mosi henga anasei jouse dungjuijin Joshua'n gampumpi chu alan ahi. Chuin Joshua'n amaho aphungu kikhen dungjuijin hichu alodiuvin Israelte apetan ahi. Chule agamchu galla konin akicholdotai. 
Joshua12:1 Tun nisolam Jordan gal langkhat Arnon vapidunga kipat Hermon lhang gei, chule solam phaicham jouse Israel ten asuh manguva atouphao gama lengho chu hitehohi ahiuve." 
Joshua12:2 Heshbon'a cheng Amor mite lengpa Sihon, Arnon vapidung panga um Aroer'a pat, chule vapidung lailunga pat, Gilead gamsung kehkhatna pat, Ammon chate gamgia um Jabbok vapidung chan geipeh-a anavaihom," 
Joshua12:3 chule phaichama pat solama Chinnereth twipi geile Phaicham twipi gei Beth-jeshimoth jotna lampia solam chi twipi geipeh chule Ashdoth-pisgah noi lhanglama pat," 
Joshua12:4 Ashtaroth le Edrei'a cheng amoh ho lah-a Amoth Bashan lengpa Og gamsung," 
Joshua12:5 Chule Hermon lhanga Salcah a Bashan gam jouse, Geshur mitele Maachath mite chule Gilead gamgi kehkhat Heshbon lengpa Sihon Gamgi geijin vai anahome." 
Joshua12:6 Amahochu Pakai soh Mosi le Israel chatehon anatha gamuva, chule Pakai soh Mosi'n Reuben te le Gad te chule Manasseh phung kehkhat-ho lodinga anapeh ahi." 
Joshua12:7 Chule Joshua to Israel chaten Jordan gal hilam lhumlamsanga atha gamu chuche lengho chu ahiuvin, agammu chu Lebanon phaicham Baalgad'apat Halak lhang, Seir geija kikhotou ahi. Hichehi Joshua'n kihop khen dungjuija alodiuva Israelte phungho anapeh gamhochu ahi." 
Joshua12:8 Molsangho le damphai, phaichamle twinah ho-a chule gamthip gamle lhanglam gama Hit miho, Amor miho chule Kanaan miho, Perizz miho, Hiv miho chule Jebus miho gamchu ahi." 
Joshua12:9 Jericho lengpa, khat; Bethel koma um Ai kho lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem lengpa, khat; Hebron lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:11 Jarmuth lengpa, khat; Lachish lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:12 Eglon lengpa, khat; Gezer lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:13 Debir lengpa, khat; Geder lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:14 Hormah lengpa, khat; Arad lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:15 Libnah lengpa, khat; Adullam lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:16 Makkedah lengpa, khat; Bethel lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:17 Tappuah lengpa, khat; Hapher lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:18 Aphek lengpa, khat; Lasharon lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:19 Madon lengpa, khat; Hazor lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:20 Shimronmeron lengpa, khat; Achshaph lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:21 Taanach lengpa, khat; Megiddo lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:22 Kadesh lengpa, khat; Karmel gam Jokneam lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:23 Dor panga Dor lengpa, khat; Gilgal nam miho lengpa, khat;" 
Joshua12:24 Tirzah lengpa, khat; Lengho jouse abonchauvin somthumle khat ahiuve." 
Joshua13:1 Tun Joshua chu ateh-in, akumjong atamlheh tan, chule Pakaiyin ajah-a nangla natehkem tan, nakum atamlhehtan, gamtamtah lahding aumnalaijin ahi, ati." 
Joshua13:2 Lahmoh chu hiche gamhohi ahi. Philistine le Geshur gamgichin jouse," 
Joshua13:3 Egypt masanga um Shihora pat sahlam Kanaan mihon atouphao Ekron gamgidung geija umho, Philistine te leng ngaho, Gazeth te Ashdod te, Eshkalon ho, Gitt ho, Ekron ho chule Avi te jong ahiuve," 
Joshua13:4 Lhanglama Kanaan miho gam jouse chule Sidon miho koma um Meareh apat Aphek lama Amor miho gamgi changei," 
Joshua13:5 chule Gibli miho gamle Lebanon pumpi, nisolam sanga, Hermon lhangnoija Baal-gad'apat Hamath lutna changei ahi." 
Joshua13:6 Lebanon'apat Misrephoth-maim changei, thinglhang gam cheng jousele amaho chu Israel chate masanga kona kadeldoh ding ahi. Sidon miho jouse, nangma kathupeh bangchun vangvet na-a konin Israel chate henga achenna diuvin ahoppeh poupouvin ahi." 
Joshua13:7 Hijeh chun tun hiche gamhi phung ko hole Manasseh phung kehkhat ho henga agoulo diuvin hoppeh-in ati. 
Joshua13:8 Amaho chutoh Reuben te le Gad te chun Jordan sahlama achan dinguva Mosi'n anapeh chu anakisan taovin, Pakai soh Mosi amatah-in anapeh bang ngeichu ahi." 
Joshua13:9 Arnon vapidung panga um, Aroer le vadung lailunga um khopi medeba phaicham jouse-a pat Dibon changei," 
Joshua13:10 chule Heshbon'a lengchang Sihon, Amor mite lengpa khopi jouse Ammon chate gamgi gei," 
Joshua13:11 chule Gilead le Geshur mite chule Maachath'te gamgisungho leh Hermon lhang pumpi chule Bashan pumpi Salcah changei," 
Joshua13:12 Milen mihat amoh umnalai, Ashtaroth le Edrei leng Bashan na Og lenggam jouse, hicheho jeh-a hi Mosi'n amaho ana douva anadeldoh ahi." 
Joshua13:13 Ahijeng vangin Israel chatehon anadeldoh pouve. Geshur mite ahilou jongle Maachath mite, Geshur mitele Maachath mitechu tuni geijin Israelte lah-a acheng nalai juve." 
Joshua13:14 Aman amaho koma ana seibang chun, Levi phunga miho vangchu chenna ding gam ana kipepoi. Israel Pakai Pathen'a dinga meija kigou ganlhainaho bouchu amaho gou ahi." 
Joshua13:15 Chule Mosi'n Reuben chateho chu a-insungu dungjui cheh in chenna ding gam anapei. 
Joshua13:16 Chule amaho gamding chu Arnon luipanga um Aroer'apat chule alailunga um khopilen Medeba phaicham jouse jong ahi. 
Joshua13:17 Heshbon chule phaichama um akhopilen hochu Dibon le Bamoth-baal chule Beth-baal-meon," 
Joshua13:18 chule Jahezah le Kedemoth chule Mephaath," 
Joshua13:19 chule damjolla um lhang chunga Kirjathaim le Sibnah chule Zareth-shahar," 
Joshua13:20 chule Beth-peor le Ashdoth-pisgah chule Beth-jeshimoth," 
Joshua13:21 chule phaichama um khopilen jouse Heshbonna leng Amor mite lengpa Sihon lenggam jouse Mosi'n Midia ho leng chapa jousetoh anathakhom, Evi, Rekan, Zur chule Reba chuche gama cheng Sihon leng noidouho chu ahiuve." 
Joshua13:22 Beor chapa Balaam doithempa jong chu Israel chaten midang atha nalah uva chun chemjamin anatha thaovin ahi. 
Joshua13:23 Reuben chateho gamgi chu Jordan le anaivelse chu ahi. Hiche khopihole khohohi Reuben chate a-insungu dungjuija achenna dinguva alou gam chu ahi. 
Joshua13:24 Chule Mosi'n Gad phunga Gad chateho ngeichu, a-insungu dungjuijin achenna dingu gam anapen, ahi." 
Joshua13:25 Chule agamsunga chu Jazer le Gilead khopilenho jouse, Ammon chateho gam akehkhat Aroer geile masanga Rabbah changei ahi." 
Joshua13:26 Chule Heshbon'a pat Ramath-mizpeh le Betonim chule Mahanaim apat Dabir gamgi gei ahi. 
Joshua13:27 Chule damjol Beth-aram, Beth-nimrah, Succoth chule Zephon, Heshbon lengpa Sihon lenggam sunga amoh jouse Jordan le agamsung, Chinnereth twikhanglen pamchin geija gal langkhat Jordan solam chan ahi." 
Joshua13:28 Hichehi Gad chate a-insung dungjuija agoulo dinguva kigotpeh khopilen hole akhoneoho chu ahi. 
Joshua13:29 Chuin Mosi'n Manasseh phung kehkhat chu alodiu gam anapei. Chule hichehi Manasseh chate phung kehkhatnin a-insungu dungjui cheh a analo chu ahi. 
Joshua13:30 Chule hiche Mahanaim apat, Bashan pumpi gamsung Bashan leng Og gam jousele Bashan gama Jair khopi jousetoh, hichu khopilen somgup ahi." 
Joshua13:31 Chule Gilead gam kehkhat le Ashtaroth chule Edrei Bashan Og lenggam khopi lenho Manasseh chapa Machir chateho-a ahin, Machir chatedia a-insungu dungjui cheh a kigotpeh ahi." 
Joshua13:32 Hichehohi Moab phaicham ho-a, Jordan gal langkhatna Jericho solam sanga Mosi'n achenna diuva ana hoppeh gamho chu ahi." 
Joshua13:33 Ahinla Mosi'n Levi phung chu goulo gam khatcha anapepoi. Ahenguva ana seibangin, Israel Pakai Pathen chu agoulou ahijenge." 
Joshua14:1 Chule hiche gamhohi Israel chaten Kanaan gam alonao gamho chu ahin, Eleazar thempule Nun chapa Joshua, chule Israel phungho pate lamkaihon alo diuva anahoppeh-u ahi." 
Joshua14:2 Pakaiyin Mosi khutna thu anapeh banga, phung ko le akehkhat dinga vang asanuva analou ahi" 
Joshua14:3 Ajehchu Mosi'n Jordan gal langkhatna chu phung nile phung kehkhat ho chu achen nadiu anapeh ahitai. Levi te goulo ding khatcha anapepon ahi. 
Joshua14:4 Ajehchu Joseph chate chu phungni, Manasseh le Ephraim ahin, hijeh chun Levi ho chu achen nadiu khopilen hole khopamvel ganlhat lena ding munle anachenau inmun tilou chu anape pouve." 
Joshua14:5 Pakaiyin Mosi thu anapeh bangchun Israel chateho jong hiti chun anaboluvin gamchu ana kihom uve. 
Joshua14:6 Chujouvin Gilgal'a Joshua henga chun Judah chate ahungun, chule Kenimi Jephunneh chapa Kaleb chun ahenga, Pathen mi Mosi henga Pakaiyin keimale nangma chungchang Kadesh-barnea'a aseichu nahenai, ati." 
Joshua14:7 Pakai soh Mosi'n Kadesh-barnea'a kona gam velhi dinga eisol chun kum somlia upa kahitan, kalung ngaito bangin ahenga thu kalhut kitne." 
Joshua14:8 Ahijeng vangin, kalhonpi kasopiho chun mipilung ajunlhah sah-un, kenvang Pakai ka Pathen chu kajuilhum keije." 
Joshua14:9 Chule hicheni chun Mosi akihahselin, nangin Pakai ka Pathen najui lhumkei jeh-in, nakengin achotphah gamchu a-itih a nangmale nachate goulo gam hiding ahi, ati." 
Joshua14:10 Chule tun vetan, Israel chate gamthipma avavei laijuva Mosi henga Pakaiyin hiche thuhi Mosi henga anaseija patchun hiche kum somli le kum nga hi aseibangin Pakai chun eina hinghoijin chule tun vetan, tunin keima kum somget le kum nga kahitai." 
Joshua14:11 Mosi'n eina solni-a bangchun tuni geijin kahat jing nalaije. Galkon nale lhunkit theina jenga jong chupetna kathahatna bang ngeichun tunjong katha ahat jing nalaije. 
Joshua14:12 Hijeh chun tun chuche ni-a Pakaiyin anasei bangin, hiche molsangho neipetan ati. Ajehchu nangman chuche laichun Anakim miho chutobanga akhopilen nasatah tahho kulpi kiget khum ahiuchu najatai. Chutia Pakaiyin ei umpile Pakai seibanga keiman amaho chu kadeldoh ding ahi." 
Joshua14:13 Chuin Joshua'n amachu phatthei aboh-in, chule Hebron chu Jephunneh chapa Kaleb chu alodingin apetai." 
Joshua14:14 Hijeh chun Aman Pakai Israel Pathen chu ajuilhumkei jeh-in, Hebron chu tunigeijin Kenizz mi Jephunneh chapa Kaleb goulo gam ahunghitai." 
Joshua14:15 Chule Hebron minhi masangin Kirjath-arba anahin, hiche Arba chu Anakim miho lah-a milentah anahi. Chule agam chu galla konin akicholnga tai." 
Joshua15:1 Chujouvin hichehi Judah phungmi chateho insungho vangsan na-a kona achanu chu ahi. Lhanglam sanga atonungpen Zin gamthip gamgi Edom gamsung geichu ahi. 
Joshua15:2 Chule noilama agamgi chu chituipi pamchina pat ahin, twipama kona gah suhvetna lhanglam sang chu ahin," 
Joshua15:3 chule lhanglam ngan Mealeh-acrabbin jonnin akikhosuh-in, Zin lam ajuipeh-in, lhanglam panga Kadesh-barnea geijin akikhotouvin, Hezron jonna achen, Adar geijin achen chule Karkea vella akiheitai." 
Joshua15:4 Chua konin Azmon lam ajonin, Egypt luipi lama akikhotouvin, hichu vapidunga akikholutnin, hichu lhanglam sanga nagamgi ngahna hiding ahi." 
Joshua15:5 Chule solam gamgi chu chi twipi gei ahin, Jordan kichaina gei, chule sahlama gamgi chu twininglut Jordan sodohna chu ahi." 
Joshua15:6 Chule gamgi chu Beth-hoglah'a achetoupeh-in, Beth-arabah sahlama achepeh-in, chule gamgi chu Reuben chapa Bohan songphung geijin akikhotou peh-in," 
Joshua15:7 chule gamgi chu Achor damjolla patna Debir lama akikho toupeh-in, chutimachun sahlama Gilgal lam gahvetna vapidung lhanglam sanga um Adummin jottouna masang chu ahi. Chule gamgi ngahna chu Enshemesh twiho lamsanga akikhopeh-in, chua kona kikhodoh chu Enrogel geipeh ahi." 
Joshua15:8 Chule gamgi chu Hinnom chapa gom'ah akikho touvin, Jabush miho lhanglam gamgi geipehchu agasun, hichu Jerusalem ahi. Chule gamgi chu Hinnom lhumlam gom masanga molvum geipeh chun akikhotouvin, hichu mihat ho umna chunglama damjol monglha sahlama uma ahi." 
Joshua15:9 Chule gamgi chu lhangvuma kona Nephtoah twinah geijah achesah-in Kirjath-jearim kiti Baalah lama chu kikaipeh ahi. 
Joshua15:10 Chule gamgi chun Baalah lhumlam sanga patna Seir lhang geija chu agah kolkhum peh-a, Jearim lhang panglam ahopeh, hichu sahlama Chesalon ahin Beth-shemesh'a chesuh-a Timnah geija ajotpeh ahi." 
Joshua15:11 Chule gamgi chu Ekron pang sahlam sanga kikho-a, chule gamgi chu Shicron geija kikhanga, Baalah mollam ajotpeh-a, Jabneel geija kikho-a, chule akondohna gamgi chu twikhanglen chu hija ahitai." 
Joshua15:12 Chule lhumlam gamgi chu twipilen le apangchingei ahin, hichehi Judah chate insung dungjuija agam hopmu chu ahi." 
Joshua15:13 Chule Jephunneh chapa Kaleb henga chun, Joshua henga Pakai thupeh dungjuijin Judah chate lah-a chan khat Anak pa khopi Arba Hebron kiti khopi jengjong chu apen ahi." 
Joshua15:14 Chuin Kaleb'in Anak chapa thum Sheshai, Ahiman, chule Talmai, Anak chate chu adeldoh-in," 
Joshua15:15 chuin ama chua konchun Debir'a chengho henga achetouvin, chule Debir hi masang laijin Kirjath-sepher anakitin ahi." 
Joshua15:16 Chuin Kaleb'in Kirjath-espher sumanga, agajou theija chu kachanu Achsah hi ajidinga kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
Joshua15:17 Chuin Kaleb sopipa Kenaz chapa Othniel'in hichu alatan, aman achanu Achsah chu ajidingin apetan ahi." 
Joshua15:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, aheng agalhun chun apa henga lou thumdingin ajolin ahi. Chuin amanu a-sangan chunga akumlhan, Kaleb'in amanu jah-a, ipi nadeijem? ati." 
Joshua15:19 Aman adonbutnin vang neiboh-in, ajehchu nangman lhanglam gam neipetan, twinah neiho neipehthan ati. Chuin aman sahlama twinahhole lhanglam twinahho chu apetai." 
Joshua15:20 Hichehi Judah chate phung a-insung dungjuija goulo gam ahi. 
Joshua15:21 Chule Judah chate phung khopilenho Edom gamgi lamsanga lhanglam sanga gam monglha penho chu Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 chule Kinah, Dimonah chule Adadah," 
Joshua15:23 chule Kadesh, Hazorle Ithnan," 
Joshua15:24 Ziph, Telam, Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 chule Hazor, Hadattah, Kerioth, Hezron, hichu Hazor," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Shema le Moladah," 
Joshua15:27 chule Hazargaddah, Hashmonle Bethpelet," 
Joshua15:28 chule Hazar-shual, Beer-sheba le Bizjothjah," 
Joshua15:29 Baalah le Ijim le Azem," 
Joshua15:30 chule Eltolad le Chesil le Hormah," 
Joshua15:31 chule Ziklag le Madmannaah le Sansannah," 
Joshua15:32 chule Lebaoth le Shilhim, A-in le Rimmon khopi lenho jouse chu somni le kole akhodang danghotoh," 
Joshua15:33 chule phaichama chun Eshtaol, Zorah le Ashnah," 
Joshua15:34 chule Zanoah, Engannim, Tappuah le Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh le Azekah," 
Joshua15:36 chule Sharaim chule Adithaim, Gederah chule Gederothaim, khopilen somleli le akho dangdang hotoh," 
Joshua15:37 Senan, Hasashah le Migdalgad," 
Joshua15:38 chule Dilean le Mizpeh le Joktheel," 
Joshua15:39 Lachish, Bozkath le Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 chule Kabbon, Lahmam le Kithlish," 
Joshua15:41 chule Gederoth, Bethdagon, Naamah, Makkedah, khopilen somlegup le akho dang dang hotoh," 
Joshua15:42 Libnah, Ether le Ashan," 
Joshua15:43 chule Jiphtah le Ashnah le Nezib," 
Joshua15:44 chule Keilah, Achzib le Mareshah khopilen ko le akho dang dang hotoh," 
Joshua15:45 Ekron khopilen le akhodang dang hotoh," 
Joshua15:46 Ekron'a pat twikhanglen chanpeh Ashdod naija umjouse, akhodang dang hotoh," 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod le akhopi hole akhodang danghou, chule akhodang dangho Egypt vapidung le twipilen chule chuche gamgi ngahna changei." 
Joshua15:48 Chule thinglhang gama Shamir le Jattir le Sokoh," 
Joshua15:49 chule Dannah le Kirjath-sannah, Debir kiti jongchu ahi." 
Joshua15:50 Chule Anab le Eshtemoh le Anim," 
Joshua15:51 chule Goshen, Holon chule Giloh, khopilen somlekhat le akhodang dang hotoh," 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Dumah le Eshean," 
Joshua15:53 chule Janum, Beth-tappuah le Aphekah," 
Joshua15:54 chule Humtah, Kirjath-arba hichu Hebron kiti ahin chule Zior khopi len ko hole akho dang dangho," 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Ziph le Juttah," 
Joshua15:56 chule Jezreel le Jokdeam le Zanoah," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibeah, Timnah, khopi somle kho dang dangho," 
Joshua15:58 Halhul, Beth-zur le Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 chule Maarath le Beth-anoth le Eltekon khopilen gupleh khodang dang hotoh," 
Joshua15:60 Kirjath-jearim kiti Kirjath-baal le Rabbah khopilen nile akhodang danghotoh," 
Joshua15:61 Gamthip machun Beth-arabah, Middin le Secacah," 
Joshua15:62 chule Nibshan chule chi khopi Engedi khopilen gup leh khoneo hotoh ahiuve. 
Joshua15:63 Jerusalem'a cheng Jebus mite vangchu Judah chaten adeldoh joupouvin, hijeh chun Jebus mite chu tuni geijin Jerusalem'a Judah chate lah-a achenghal jinguvin ahi." 
Joshua16:1 Chule Joseph chate vang chuhna chu, Jericho koma Jordan'a pat solama Jericho twi umnagei, Jericho a kipatna gamthip geija kikhotou Bethel mol pumpi chu ahi." 
Joshua16:2 Chule Bethel'a pat Luz geija akikhodoh in, Archi gamsung Ataroth geijin akikhopeh in, ahi." 
Joshua16:3 Chule lhumlam panga Japhleti mite gamgi Beth-horon lhang nemjo gamsung Gezer channin akikhosuh in, hichu twikhanglen'a alutnin ahi." 
Joshua16:4 Hitichun Joseph chate Manasseh le Ephraim'in agam chu alotaove. 
Joshua16:5 Chule a-insungu dungjuijin Ephraim chate gamgi chu hitihi ahi. Solam sanga agoulou gamgi Ataroth-addar a pat Beth-horon sahlam gei ahi. 
Joshua16:6 Chule gamgi chu twikhanglen sahlam sanga Michmethah geijin akikhodoh-in, chule solama Taanath-shiloh geijin ahung kikhodoh-in, hichu ajotpeh-in, solama Janoah chan akikho lhungpeh-in ahi." 
Joshua16:7 Chuin hiche Janohah'a pat Ataroth le Naarah changei akikhosuh-in, Jericho ahopan chule Jordan'a akikholutne." 
Joshua16:8 Gampumpi chu Tappuah konin lhumlam sanga Kanah vapidung geijin akilhungdoh-in, hichu twikhanglen'a akikholutne. Hichehi Ephraim chate phung a-insung dungjuijuva agoulou gamchu ahi." 
Joshua16:9 Chule Manasseh chate goulah-a Ephraim chate goulo ding khopilen kikhendohho chu akhopilen jouseule akhodang dangho chu ahi. 
Joshua16:10 Chule amahon Gezer'a cheng Kanaan miho chu ananodoh pouve. Hijeh chun Kanaan miho chu Ephraim mite lah-a tuni geijin achengun kai apeovin, ajenun ahi."
