Joshua17:1 Manasseh phung dingin chan khat ana umin ahi, ajehchu ama Joseph cha masapen ahi. Gilead pa Manasseh chapa masapen Machir chu ahi. Hijeh chun ama galhat ahijeh-in Gilead le Bashan gama achenge, ajehchu amaho gal hat ahi." 
Joshua17:2 A-insungu dungjuija Manasseh chilhah dangho Abiezer chate, Helek chate, Asriel chate, Shechem chate, Hepher chate chule Shemida chate dingin jong chan khat anaume. Amahohi a-insungu dungjuija Joseph chapa Manasseh chapate ahiuve." 
Joshua17:3 Ahinla Manasseh chapa Machir, Machir chapa Gilead chapa Hepher, Hepher chapa Zelophehad'in achanute tilou chapa aneipon, achanuteu minho chu Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah le Tirzah ahi." 
Joshua17:4 Chuin amahon Eliazer thempu, Nun chapa Joshua chule pipuiho ang ahin naijun kasopihou lah-a goulo eipehna dingun Pakaiyin Mosi thu anapeh ahi, agatiuve. Hijeh chun Pakai thupeh dungjuijin Joshua'n apateo sopiho lah-a agoulo dingu anapetan ahi." 
Joshua17:5 Hitichun Jordan gal langkhatna um Gilead le Bashan tilouvin Manasseh chu chan som achange. 
Joshua17:6 Ajehchu Manasseh chanuten achapate lah-a gou alo khomun, chule Manasseh chapa dangho chu Gilead achang taove." 
Joshua17:7 Manasseh gamchu Ashera pat Michmethah changei ahin, Shechem masanga um agamgi chu lhanglam En-tappuah mite chenna gam geijin akikhosuh-in ahi." 
Joshua17:8 Tun Tappuah gam Manasseh achangin, ahinla Manasseh gamgi chinna um Tappuah kho chu Ephraim chate-a ahi." 
Joshua17:9 Chuin agamgi chu Kanah vapidung lhanglama chun akilhungsuh-in, hiche Ephriam khopiho chu Manasseh khopiho lah-a aumin, chule Manasseh gamgi ngahna jongchu vapidung sahlam pang ahin, chule twikhanglen changei ahi." 
Joshua17:10 Lhanglam sang chu Ephraim ahin, sahlam gam chu Manasseh'a ahin, chule twikhanglen chu agamgi ahi. Chule sahlama Asher chule niso lama Issachar gamchan chu ahi." 
Joshua17:11 Chule Manasseh chu Issachar le Asher gama Beth-shean le akhopiho, Ibleam le akhopiho Dor'a chenghole akhopiho, Endorra chenghole akhopiho, Taanach a chenghole akhopiho, Negiddo'a chenghole akhopiho, agamhou thum geijin achangin ahi." 
Joshua17:12 Ahijeng vangin Manasseh chapate chun chuche khopi lenho-a chengho chu anodoh joupouve. Hitichun Kanaan mite chu hiche gama chun achengden taove. 
Joshua17:13 Ahijeng vangin ahitin ahi. Israel chate chu ahung hatdoh phatnun, amahon Kanaan mite chu kai apehsah-un, ahinla agama konin anodoh theng theipouve." 
Joshua17:14 Chuin Joseph chaten Joshua jah-a, tunigeija Pakaiyin phatthei eiboh jeh uva mipi hijatpi kahiu henasa-a ibola kalodiu vang khat, chan khatsehbou neipeh uham, atiuve." 
Joshua17:15 Chuin Joshua'n amaho chu adonbutnin, nangho natamlheh uva Ephraim lhanga chu natehbehseh tah uva ahile, Perizz mitele milen mihat ho gamsunga gammang lama nangho chetouvun lang gakituhchai taovin, ati." 
Joshua17:16 Chuin Joseph chate chun thinglhang gamchu keiho-a dingin alhingpoi. Jangcham gama cheng Kanaan mite jousele Bethshean le khopiho chengse chule Jezreel damjola chenghon thih kangtalai anei cheh uve atiuve. 
Joshua17:17 Chuin Joshua'n Joseph insung mite Ephraim le Manasseh henga, nangho mitamle thahat tahte nahiuvin chankhat sehbou chang pouvin nate," 
Joshua17:18 ahinla molsang hi nangho ding ahi, gammang ahijeh-in kivatchaijun lang, agamgijui chan chu nangho ding ahi. Kanaan mite chun thih kangtalai neijuhen hatlheh jongleu nanodoh dingu ahi tin aseipeh-e." 
Joshua18:1 Chuin Israel chate kikhom pumpi chu Shiloh a akikhom khomun, chua chun houkhom ho houbuh atungdoh-un ahi. Chule amasanguva gamchu athunoijuva aumtai." 
Joshua18:2 Chule Israel chate lah-a agou chanding muloulai phung sagi aum nalaijun ahi. 
Joshua18:3 Chuin Joshua'n Israel chate jah-a, Pakai napateu Pathen'in napeh-u gam galo ding chu itihchan nahsah louva na-umsahdiu ham?" 
Joshua18:4 Nalah uva phungkhat cheh-a konin mi thum lhengdoh-un, chule keiman amaho kasola amaho kipat uva gamchu agachotnuva, alodiu dungjuija agasuh chetnuva kahenga hungkilekit dingu ahiuve." 
Joshua18:5 Chule amahon hichu hop sagi-a ahopdiu, Judah lhanglam gamsunga umding, Joseph insungin sahlam gamsung alodiu ahi." 
Joshua18:6 Hitichun gam umchan chu hopsagi-a photchetna nanei uva, Pakai i-Pathen'u anga nangho dinga vang kavetpeh theina dinga hiche photchetna chu kahenga nahin lhut dingu ahi." 
Joshua18:7 Ahinla Levi miten nalah uva chan aneipouve, ajehchu Pakai thempu natoh chu amaho chan ahijenge. Chule Gad le Reuben chule Manasseh phung kehkhat vang chun Pakai lhacha Mosi'n apehnao gam Jordan gal solam chu alodiu ahi." 
Joshua18:8 Chuin mihochu akipat doh-un, achetauve ahi. Gam phochenna cheho chu Joshua'n thu apen, cheovin, gamchu gachonun, gapho chenun lang hiche Shiloh-a hi nangho dinga Pakai anga vang kavet theina dingin kahenga hung kile kitnun, ati." 
Joshua18:9 Chuin mihochu acheuvin, gamchu agachon sohkeijun, khopilen hochu lekhabua asunlutnun, mun sagin akhenun ahi. Chule Shiloh lama chun alhonpiuvin Joshua henga ahungkile kitnun ahi." 
Joshua18:10 Chuin Joshua'n Shiloh-a Pakai masanga amaho dingin vang asantan ahi. Chule chuachun Joshua'n gamchu Israel chate kihop khen dungjuijin ahoppehtan ahi. 
Joshua18:11 Chule Benjamin phung chilhah ho chan chu a-insung dungjuijin ahungdohtan, achandiu gamsung Judah chatele Joseph chate gam kikah chu ahung hikhatan ahi." 
Joshua18:12 Chule Sahlama agamgiu chu Jordan'a pat sahlam sanga Jericho lhang panga akikho touvin, Lhumlam molla chun akikho lutnin, Beth-aven gamthipma akilhung lutnin ahi." 
Joshua18:13 Chule gamgi chu chu-a konchun Luz lam, lhanglama Luz kiti Bethel lhang panga akikhon, hichu Beth-horon noilam lhanglam sanga Ataroth-adar lama achesuh-in," 
Joshua18:14 chuin agamgi chu chua konin akikhon Beth-horon toh akigalsai lhanglam sanga um molsanga pat twipilen ning chu lhum-lhanglam sanga akikho kimvelin, Judah chate khopi khat Kirjath-baal, Kirjath-jearim kiti chu ahi. Hichu nilhumlama agamgiu chu ahi." 
Joshua18:15 Chule lhanglama agammu chu Kirjath-kearim monga kipat in agamgiu chu lhumlama akikhon Nephtoah twikulho-a akikholutnin ahi. 
Joshua18:16 Chule agamgiu chu sahlama milen mihat ho damjola um Hinnom chapa jangcham masanga um molsanga akikho doh-in, lhanglam Jebus lhangpang Hinnom gom geijin akikhon Enrogel'a akikholutne." 
Joshua18:17 Chule sahlama konin akikho kimvelin, Enshemesh-a akilhung lutnin, Adummin gam kentoh kigalsai Gelioth lama akilhungin chule Reuben chapa Bohan songphu-a akikholutne." 
Joshua18:18 Chule Arabah sah lamsang toh kigalsaijin akilhungpeh in, chule Arabah'a ahung kilhunglhan," 
Joshua18:19 chuin agamgi chu Bethhoglah sahlam panga ahung kilhungin, chule gamgi akilhung doh hochu Jordan mong lhanglam chi twipi pang sahlama aumin, hichu lhanglam gamgi ahi." 
Joshua18:20 Chule Jordan chu solam sanga gamgi ahi. A-insung dung juijin hiche gamgi jousehi Benjamin chate goulo ding chu ahi. 
Joshua18:21 Tun a-insungu dungjuija Benjamin chate phunga khopi lenho chu Jericho, Beth-hoglah, Keziz phaicham," 
Joshua18:22 chule Beth-arabah, Zemaraim le Bethel," 
Joshua18:23 chule Avim, Parah le Ophrah," 
Joshua18:24 chule Chephar-haammonai, Ophi le Geba khopilen somlenile akhoneo hotoh," 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, Ramah le Beeroth," 
Joshua18:26 chule Mizpeh, Chephirah le Mozah," 
Joshua18:27 chule Rekem, Irpeel le Taralah," 
Joshua18:28 chule Zelah, Eleph chule Jebus hichu Jerusalem Gibeath le Kirjath ahin khopilen somleli le akhoneo hotoh ahi. A-insung dung juija Benjamin chaten alodingu chu ahi." 
Joshua19:1 Chuin anivei channa vangvetna chu Simeon henga, a-insungu dungjuijin Simeon chate phung dingngei chun ahungdoh-in ahi. Chule agoulo chu Judah chate goulo sunga uma ahi." 
Joshua19:2 Chule amahon agoulo naova aneiju chu Beersheba ahiloule Sheba le Moladah," 
Joshua19:3 chule Hazashul, Balah le Azem," 
Joshua19:4 chule Eltolad, Bethul le Hormah," 
Joshua19:5 chule Siklag, Beth-marcaboth le Hazar-susah," 
Joshua19:6 chule Beth-lebaoth, Sharuhen khopilen somlethum le akhoneoho," 
Joshua19:7 Ain, Remmon, Ether le Ashan, khopilen lile khoneoho," 
Joshua19:8 chule lhanglama Baalath-beer, Ramath geijin hiche khopi lenho kimvela khoneoho jouse chu ahi. Hichehi a-insung dungjuija Simeon chate phungho gam lo chu ahi." 
Joshua19:9 Judah chateho chanding lah-a chu Simeon chate goulo uma ahin, ajehchu Judah chate chanchu amaho dinga lenbehseh ahin, hijeh-a chu Simeon chate goulo chu amaho goulo sunga chu aneiju ahi." 
Joshua19:10 Chuin a-insungu dungjuijin vangvet thumna chu Zebulun chate chunga achutai. Chule agoulo gamgi chu Sarid chan ahi. 
Joshua19:11 Chule agamgiu chu twipia Meralah lama akilhung touvin, Dabbashath alhungin, chule Jokneam masanga vapidung chu alhungin ahi." 
Joshua19:12 Chuin Sarid na konin Chisloth-tabor gamsung geijin nisolam sanga akiheijin, chuin Cabarathna achedoh-in Japhia geijin achetouvin ahi." 
Joshua19:13 Chule chua konin solam juijin Gittah-hepher le Ittah-kazin ajotpeh in, chule Remmon-mathoar'a Neah geijin achen," 
Joshua19:14 chule agamgi chun Hannathon sahlam akhokhelin, chule akilhungdoh hochu Jiphtah-el phaicham ageijin," 
Joshua19:15 chule Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron le Idalah chule Bethlehem khopilen somlenitoh khopineoho ahiuve." 
Joshua19:16 Hiche khopilenle akhoneo hohi a-insungu dungjuija Zebulun chate goulo chu ahi. 
Joshua19:17 Chuin vangvet alina chu Issachar chunga, a-insungu dungjuijin Issachar chate dingin achutan ahi." 
Joshua19:18 Chule agamsung chu Jezreel lamsanga Chesulloth le Shunem," 
Joshua19:19 chule Hapharaim, Shihon le Anaharath," 
Joshua19:20 chule Rabbith, Kishon le Abez," 
Joshua19:21 Chule Remeth, Engannim, En-haddah le Beth-Pazzez," 
Joshua19:22 chule agamgi chu Tabor, Shahazimah le Beth-shemesh alhungin, chule agamgi ngahha kilhungdohho chu Jordan ageijin ahi. Khopilen somlegup le akhoneoho chu ahi." 
Joshua19:23 Khopihole akhoneoho, a-insungu dungjuija Issachar chate goulo chu hichehi ahi." 
Joshua19:24 Chuin vangvet a-nga channa chu a-insungu dungjuija Asher chate phung dingin ahungdoh tan ahi. 
Joshua19:25 Chule agamgi ngahna chu Helkath, Hali, Reten le Achshaph," 
Joshua19:26 chule Allammalech, Amad, Mishal, lhumlama Karmel le Shihor-libnahth gei ahin," 
Joshua19:27 chule nisolam sanga Beth-dago na akiheijin, Zebulun alhungin, Jiphthah-el gom Beth-emek le Neiel sahlama achen, veilamsang Cabulla achedoh-in," 
Joshua19:28 chule Hebron, Rehod, Hammon le Kanah, Zidon len geijin jong," 
Joshua19:29 chujouvin agamgi chu Ramah-a akiheijin, khopidet Tyre le Hosah'a akiheijin, chule akilhungdoh ho chu Achzib geija konin twikhanglen chan alhunge." 
Joshua19:30 Ummah jong, Aphek, Rehob, khopilen somnileni toh akhoneoho," 
Joshua19:31 Hiche khopihole akhohohi a-insung dungjuija Asher chate phungin alouchu ahi. 
Joshua19:32 Vangvet gupvei channa chu a-insunga dungjuijin Naphtali chate dingin ahungdoh-in ahi. 
Joshua19:33 Chuin agamgiu chu Heleph-a kon, Allon, Zaanannim, Adammi-nekeb, Jabneel, Lakum gei ahin, chule akilhungdoh ho chu Jordan geijin aumin ahi." 
Joshua19:34 Chukitnin agamgiu chu lhumlama Aznoth-tabor lama akiheijin, chua konin Hukkok alhungin, Zebulun lhanglam sang alhungin, chuin Asher lhumlam sanga achen, nisolam Jordan chunga Judah alhungin ahi." 
Joshua19:35 Chule kul kikhokhum khopiho chu Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath Chinnereth," 
Joshua19:36 chule Adamah, Ramah le Hezor," 
Joshua19:37 chule Kedesh, Edrei le Enhazor," 
Joshua19:38 chule Iron le Migdalel, Horam, Beth-anath le Beth-shemesh khopilen somleko le khoneoho," 
Joshua19:39 hiche khopihole khoneoho a-insung dungjuija Naphtali chate phung goulo chu ahi. 
Joshua19:40 Chuin a-insung dungjuijin vangvetna sagina chu Dan chate dingin ahungdohtan," 
Joshua19:41 chule alodingu agamsungu chu Zorah, Eshtaol le Ir-shemesh," 
Joshua19:42 chule Shaalabbin, Aijalon le Ithlah," 
Joshua19:43 chule Elon le Thimnathah le Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 chule Eltekeh le Gibbethhon le Baalath," 
Joshua19:45 chule Jehud le Bene-berak le Gathrimmon," 
Joshua19:46 chule Me-jarkon le Rakkon Japho naija gamgi ahi. 
Joshua19:47 Chule Dan chate gamsung amaho dingin aneobehseh-in hijeh chun Dan chateho Leshem chate sat dingin akonun, chule ajouvun chemjamin athat gamun, chule gamchu alotaovin, achengun, Leshem chu apao min Dan alauvin Dan asah un ahi." 
Joshua19:48 Hichehi akhopihole khoneohotoh a-insung dungjuijin Dan chate phungin gouva alodingu chu ahi. 
Joshua19:49 Amahon gampumpi achanding dolcheh gamgi asekhennuva akihop jouphat un, Israel chaten alah uva Nun chapa Joshua chu agam loding apetaovin, ahi." 
Joshua19:50 Pakai thu dungjuijin aman athum Ephraim molla Timnath-serah geichun apeovin ahi. Chule aman khopilen chu asadoh-in chua chun achengtan ahi. 
Joshua19:51 Hiche hohi agamlo dinguva Eleazar thempu le Nun Chapa Joshua, chule Israel chate aphunguva apa teovin, mipi ho houbuh kotpi phung, Pakai masang Siloh mun'a vangvet na-a agamlo dinguva ana hoppeh-u chu ahi. Hitihin amaho gamchu akihom jou taovin ahi." 
Joshua20:1 Pakaiyin Joshua jah-a aseijin, hitin ati." 
Joshua20:2 Israel chate henga hitihin seijin, nanghon Mosi jah-a kasei bangin kiselna khopi lenho semmun ati." 
Joshua20:3 Mikhatnin dihloutah a koiham khat atha-a ahile kiselna dinga hicheho chu nangho-a dinga thisan so-a phulading pa-a kona hoidohna hiding ahi. 
Joshua20:4 Chule hitia chu ama chutobang khopilenho khatna chu jamlutna, khopi kotpiphunga adina chule chuche khopi-a um upaho jah-a ajeh aseiphongleh, amahon amachu khopi sunga alah lutnuva mun apeh dingu, hiti achu amahotoh chengding ahi." 
Joshua20:5 Chule thisan phulading pachun, ahin nungdela ahile amahon mithatpa chu ama khutna apehdoh loudingu ahi. Ajehchu aman aheng akom chu hotna nei masalouva tosoija atha ahi." 
Joshua20:6 Chule amachu mipi angsunga athu tandinga adin kahse-a chule hiche laija thempu chungnung thikahsea hiche khopi-a chu chengding ahi. Chutengle mithatpa chu ama khopilen ajamdohna khopi a-in'a chu kilekit ding ahi. 
Joshua20:7 Chule amahon Naphtali molla um Galilee'a Kadesh, Ephraim molla Schechem chule Hebron kiti Judah molla um Kirjath-arba chu alhengun ahi." 
Joshua20:8 Chule Jericho solam Jordan gal langkhatna chun Reuben phungho lah-a phaicham gamthipma Bezer, Gad phungho lah-a Gilead'a Ramoth chule Manasseh phungho lah-a Bashan gama Golan apeovin ahi." 
Joshua20:9 Hichehohi Israel chate jousele alah uva khopem tosoija mithatchan chulama ajama thisan phulapa khutna kona athilouna dinga mipi ho masanga adin kahse-a akiselna dinga kilhengdoh khopiho chu ahi. 
Joshua21:1 Chujouvin Levi pateho luchangho chu Eleazar thempu heng, Nun chapa Joshua heng, Israel chate phung luchangho henga ahungun," 
Joshua21:2 chule amahon Kanaan gamsunga um Shiloh a amaho henga kachena dingun khopi lenho chule kagancha ho dingun akhovelho eipehtha dinguva Mosi henga Pakaiyin thu anapehsa ahitai atiuve. 
Joshua21:3 Chuin Pakai thupeh bangchun akhopilen houle akhoveluva ho jouse chu Israel chaten agoulouva konin Levi mite chandingin apeovin ahi. 
Joshua21:4 Chule Kohath te insung midingin vangvetna ahungdoh in, chule Aaron thempu chate amaho chu Levi mite ahiuvin, Judah phunga konle Simeon phunga konin chule Benjamin phunga konin khopilen somlethum vangvet na-a konin achangun ahi." 
Joshua21:5 Chule Kohath chate amoh chengse chun Ephraim phung insungho-a konle, Dan phunga konin chule Manasseh phung kehkhatna konin khopilen som vangvet na-a konin achang taovin ahi." 
Joshua21:6 Chule Gershon chateho chun vangvet na-a konin Issachar phung insungho-a kon, Asher phunga kon, Naphtali phunga kon, chule Bashan'a um Manasseh phung akehkhatna konin khopilen somlethum achangun ahi." 
Joshua21:7 Merari chaten a-insungu dungjuijin Reuben phunga kon, Gad phunga kon chule Zebulun phunga konin khopi somleni achangun ahi." 
Joshua21:8 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi athupeh dungjuijin khopilen hole akhovelho chu Israel chaten vangvet na-a konin Levi mite apetaovin ahi. 
Joshua21:9 Chule amahon hichea amin kisei khopilenho hi Judah chate phunga konin Simeon chate phunga konin apedoh-un; 
Joshua21:10 Hichu Levi chate lah-a, Kohath Insunga kon Aaron chate chan chu ahi. Ajeh chu amaho chu vangvetna masapen changa ahiuve." 
Joshua21:11 Chule amahon Judah thinglhang gama akhopi Hebron chu akimvela akhovelho pumin Anak pa Arba chu apetaovin ahi. 
Joshua21:12 Ahin khopilen loujaohole khoho vangchu Jephunneh chapa Kaleb lodingin apetaovin ahi. 
Joshua21:13 Hitichun amahon Aaron thempupa chate chu mithat ho kisellutna khopilen hidingin, Hebron le akhovelho chule Libnah le akhovelho pumin," 
Joshua21:14 chule Jattir le akhovelho pumin Eshtemoa le akhoheng pumin," 
Joshua21:15 chule Holon le akhovelho pumin, Debir le akhovelho pumin," 
Joshua21:16 chule a-in le akhovelho pumin, Juttah le akhovelho pumin, Beth-shemesh le akhovelho pumin, phungnia konchun khopilen ko apetaovin ahi." 
Joshua21:17 Chule Benjamin phunga konin Gibeon le akhovelho, Geba le akhovel ho," 
Joshua21:18 Anathoth le akhovelho chule Almon le akhovel hotoh khopilen li ahi. 
Joshua21:19 Aaron thempu chate khopilen abonin akhovelho pumin somlethum ahi. 
Joshua21:20 Chule Kohath chate insungho, Kohath chate amoh Levi ho chun, Ephraim phunga kona avang vetnuva kon amu-u khopilenho chu aneijun ahi." 
Joshua21:21 Ajehchu amahon Ephraim lhanga Shechem le akhovelho pumpin, mitha-a kona hoidohna khopilen hidingin Gezer jong akhovelho pumin," 
Joshua21:22 Chule Kibzaim le akhovelho pumin, Beth-horon le akhovelho pumin, khopilen li amaho apeovin ahi." 
Joshua21:23 Chule Dan phunga kon Eltekeh le akhovelho pumin, Gibethon le akhovelho pumin," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon le akhovelho pumin, Gathrimmon le akhovel ho pumin khopilen li ahi." 
Joshua21:25 Chule Manasseh phung kehkhatna kon Tanach le akhovel ho, chule Gathrimmon le akhovel ho pumin khopilen ni ahi." 
Joshua21:26 Hiche kho jousele akhovelho jouse-a chenghi Kohath chate insung miho amohho dingchu khosom ahi. 
Joshua21:27 Chule Gershon chateho Levi phungho chu Manasseh phung kehkhat ho channa-a kon, mithat ho kisellutna khopi Bashan gama Golan chu akhovel hotoh Beesh-terah khole akhovel hotoh, khopilen ni apetaovin ahi." 
Joshua21:28 Chule Issachar phunga konin Kishon le akhovel hotoh, Dabareth le akhovel hotoh," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmuth le akhovel hotoh, Engannim le akhovel hotoh, khopi li ahi." 
Joshua21:30 Chule Asher phunga kon Mishal le akhovel hotoh, Abdon le akhovel hotoh," 
Joshua21:31 Helkath le akhovel hotoh, Rahob le akhovel hotoh khopilen li ahi." 
Joshua21:32 Chule Naphtali phunga konin Galilee sunga um Kedesh le akhovelho pumin, mithat ho kisellutna khopilen hidingin; chule Hammoth-dor le akhovelho pumin, Kartan le akhovelho pumin khopilen thum ahi." 
Joshua21:33 Gershon mite insungho khopilen jousele akhovelho pumin, khopilen somlethum ahi." 
Joshua21:34 Chule Zebulun phunga kon, Levi mite amohse Merari chate insungho henga Jokneam le akhovel hotoh, Kartah le akhovel hotoh," 
Joshua21:35 Dimnah le akhovelho pumin, Nahalal le akhovelho pumin khopilen li ahi." 
Joshua21:36 Chule Reuben phunga konin Bezer le akhovel hotoh, Zehazag le akhovel hotoh," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoth le akhovel hotoh, Mephaath le akhovel hotoh khopilen lima ahi." 
Joshua21:38 Chule Gad phunga kon mithat ho hoidohna khopi Gilead gama Ramoth le akhovelho toh Mahanaim khole akhovel hotoh," 
Joshua21:39 Heshbon le akhovel hotoh, Jazer akhovel hotoh abona khopilen li ahi." 
Joshua21:40 Chutichun Levi insungmi amohse Merari chate insung mihon vangvet na-a kona amu khopilen jouse chu somleni ahi. 
Joshua21:41 Israel chaten alo sunga um Levi mite khopilen jouse chu akhovelho hop pummin somlileget ahi. 
Joshua21:42 Hiche khopilenho hin akimvel aneisoh keijun; hiche khopi jouse chu chutabanga chu umcheh ahi. 
Joshua21:43 Chuin Pakaiyin apateo henga ana kihahsel nasa gamjouse chu Israel henga apetan, chuin amahon alovin chua acheng taovin ahi." 
Joshua21:44 Chule Pakaiyin apateo henga akihahsel dungjuijin, amaho akicholdosah tai. Chule amaho masanga amelmateu jouse apedohtai." 
Joshua21:45 Pakaiyin Israel insung henga thupha aseichan chu athonna um umlouvin, aguilhung sohkeijin ahi." 
Joshua22:1 Hichun Joshua'n Reuben mite, Gad mite Manasseh phung akehkhat akouvin," 
Joshua22:2 chule ahenguva, nanghon Pakai lhacha Mosi thupeh jouse nanit sohkeijun, chule kathupeh ka aw gin jouse chu nanit un ahi." 
Joshua22:3 Nanghon nasopi ho ni hijatpihi, tuni geijin nadalha pouve. Amavang Pakai na Pathen'u thupeh chu nachingtup jingun ahi." 
Joshua22:4 Chule amaho henga akitepna bangin tun Pakai na Pathen'un nasopi hou cholngahna apetan ahi. Hichejeh chun tun, nangho Jordan gal langkhat lama Pakaiyin asoh Mosi anapeh gama chun kile taovin." 
Joshua22:5 Ahinla Pakai na Pathen'u ngailu dingle, alampi jouse jot dingle, athupeh ho juidingle, ama-a behjing dingle, nalhagao pumpiule nalungthimu pumpi-a jen dinga Pakai lhacha Mosi'n nathupeh-u danho tongdoh dingin chingtheijun, ati." 
Joshua22:6 Hitichun Joshua'n amaho phatthei aboh-in, asoldohtai. Chule amaho aponbuh uva akile taovin ahi." 
Joshua22:7 Tun Manasseh phung kehkhat chu Mosi in Bashan alodiuvin, anapen, ahivangin Joshua'n Jordan panga lhumlam sangchu asopite henga akehkhat chu apen ahi. Chuin Joshua'n amaho jongchu phatthei aboh-in aponbuh cheh uva asoldoh tan ahi." 
Joshua22:8 Chule amaho henga, von tamtah toh thih sum-eng, sana, dangka, gancha tamtah toh gou tamtah pumin naponbuh uva kileovin, nagalteova nalah-u thilkichom nasopi houtoh kihom uvin, ati." 
Joshua22:9 Chuin Reuben chate Gad chate chule Manasseh phung akehkhat akileuvin, Mosi khutna Pakaiyin athupeh banga amahon alodingu gamchu, Gilead gama chenna dinga Shiloh kiti Kanaan gama Israel chate-a konin apotdoh-un ahi." 
Joshua22:10 Chuin amahon Kanaan gamsunga um Jordan gamgi chin alhun phatnun, Reuben chate, Gad chatele Manasseh phung akeh in, Jordan pama vet dinga maicham khat asemun ahi." 
Joshua22:11 Chuin Israel chaten ajah phatnun, veuvin, Reuben chate, Gad chatele Manasseh phung keh khatnin Israel lampi laija Kanaan gamtoh kigalsaija Jordan pama chun maicham khat asemuvin ahi, ti thu ajaove." 
Joshua22:12 Hichu Israel chaten ajah phatnun, Israel chate abonchauvin amahotoh kidouva chedingin Shiloh a chun mipi akikhom taovin ahi." 
Joshua22:13 Chuin Israel chate chun Eleazar thempupa chapa Phinehas chu Gilead gamsunga um Reuben chate, Gad chate le Manasseh phung akehkhat henga chun asolun ahi." 
Joshua22:14 Chule amaho chu Israel phung jouse lah-a inpi ngah cheh leng chapa som chule Israel asang asang lah-a apateo insunga a-upapen cheh ahiuve. 
Joshua22:15 Chule amaho Gilead gama um Reuben chate Gad chatele Manasseh phung akeh khat henga ahungun amahotoh akihouvun aseijuve. 
Joshua22:16 Pakai Mipi kikhomte chun hitin atiuve, Israel Pakai Pathen chunga ipi nasuhkhelu hitam, Pakai nung najuinaova kona nakihei mang jenguva, Pakai douna-a maicham nakitundoh jenguhi." 
Joshua22:17 Peor'a chonsetna chu eiho dinga lhing loulai ham? Hiche-a kona chu eiho tuni geija thengloulai ihiuvin, hicheni chun Pakai mipite lah-a natset ana lengin ahi." 
Joshua22:18 Amavang nangho tunia Pakai nung juina-a kona hi nakihei mang got teiteiju hitam? Tunia nanghon Pakai nadou ule jing nikhole Israel mipi chunga ama lunghana hung chuding ahi. 
Joshua22:19 Hitajengjongle, nalonao gamchu athenlouva ahile, Pakai lona gam Pakai houbuh umna keiholah-a hungcheng jengun, amavang Pakai dounale keiho douna-in Pakai i-Pathen'u maicham tilou maicham dang semhih-un." 
Joshua22:20 Zarah chapa Achan'in sapset thil le suhkhel aneija kona, Israel mipikikhom chunga lunghana anachu-a hilouham? Chule hiche mipa chu ama khangitlou jeh-a achangseh-a thilouva hilou ham? atiuve." 
Joshua22:21 Chuin Reuben chate, Gad chate, chule Manasseh phung akeh khatnin adonbutnun, chule Israel asang asang luchangho henga aseijun" 
Joshua22:22 Pakai, Pathen ho Pathen, Pakai Pathenho Pathen chun ahei, chule Israel honjong ahetdingu ahi, hichehi douna ahia, ahiloule Pakai douna-a suhkhel ahile, (tunin neihinghoi hih-un)," 
Joshua22:23 Keihon Pakai nungjui na-a kona kihei mangna dinga maicham kasemuva, ahiloule achunga govam thilto katouva, chuche-a chu chamna thilto katouva ahileh Pakaiyin eiphulah-u hen." 
Joshua22:24 Chule hiche kichatnajeh-a hiche chu kabollou-uleh, phat ahunglhun phatleh nachateovin kachateu henga, Israel Pakai Pathen chu ilonge nati uham? tia ahinsei theiju ahi." 
Joshua22:25 Reuben chate, Gad chate, nanghole keiho kikah-a Pakaiyin Jordan hi gamgia asem ahin, nanghon Pakaiya chan naneipouve, atiuva, nachateovin, kachateu Pakai ginna asuhtang theidiu ginna-a kabolu ahi." 
Joshua22:26 Hichejeh chun keihon tun eiho govam thilto tona ding hilou, chule ganlhai thilto tona ding hilouvin maicham khat semdingin kigongu hite, katiuvin," 
Joshua22:27 ahinla keihon govam thilto le, kilhaina thilto chuleh chamna thilto hotoh Pakai anga kilhaina kaboluhi khonunga hungding ichateu dinga hettohsahna hung hiding ahi. Khonungle nachateovin kachateu henga nangho Pakaiya chan naneipouve, atilounadiu ahi." 
Joshua22:28 Hiche jeh-a chu keihon hung hitiding ahi katiuve, amahon keiho koma ahiloule khonungle kasonho koma aseitengule; Veovin kapu kapa teovin Pakai maicham lim kigong abollu chu govam thiltona ding ahipon, ganlhaina ding jong ahipoi. Amavang keihole nangho kikah-a hettohsahna ahi, tia keihon kaseipeh dingu ahi." 
Joshua22:29 Keihon tunia Pakai kadou uva, ama-a kon kiheimanga, ahoubuh masanga um Pakai i-Pathen'u maicham tilouva govam thiltoho, nehding thilto ahilouleh ganlhaina ding dang kasem louhel dingu ahi." 
Joshua22:30 Chuin Phinehas thempupa aumpihon Israel asang asang luchangho le mipi kikhomho vaipohon Reuben chate, Gad chate, Manasseh chaten aseiju chu ajah phatnun, alungu alhaitan ahi." 
Joshua22:31 Chuin Eliazar thempupa chapa Phinehas chun Reuben chate, Gad chate, Manasseh chate henga, tuni hin keihon ilah uva Pakai aume ti kaheuve; ajeh chu Pakai douna-in suhkhel nabol pouvin ahi. Tun nanghon Pakai khutna konin Israel chate chu nahuhdoh taovin ahi." 
Joshua22:32 Chule Eliazar thempu chapa Phinehas chun vaipoho Reuben chate, Gad chate umna Gilead gama konin Kanaan gam Israel chate henga, thu ahinpo taovin ahi." 
Joshua22:33 Chule hicheho chun Israel asulunglhai lheh in, chule Israel chate chun Pathen avahchoi taovin ahi. Chule Reuben chate chenna gam suhmangna dinga galsatna cheding agotapouvin ahi." 
Joshua22:34 Chuin Reuben chate, Gad chaten, maicham chu hettohsah asah-un ahi. Ajehchu hichehi eiho kah-a Pakai chu Pathen ahi ti melchihna hiding ahi." 
Joshua23:1 Chule Israelte avelluva adou miho-a kona Pakaiyin choldona apehjou nungpeh-in, Joshua chu ateh lhehtan, chule akum atamin avoilhatan ahi." 
Joshua23:2 Chuin Joshua'n Israel jouse, a-upahou, aluchanghou, avaipohou, akouvin amaho henga keima katehtan, kakum jong atamtan ahi, ati." 
Joshua23:3 Chule Pakai na Pathen'un nangho jeh-a hiche namho jouse chunga abol hojouse hi namuvin ahi. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u chu gal nasatpehpao chu ahi. 
Joshua23:4 Veovin, keiman twipilen lhumlam gei jenga jong Jordan'a kona naphung houvin alotheina dinguva, keiman nam jouse kasuhmanga, hiche nam amoh ho chu vangvet na-a kahop peh-u nahi, ati." 
Joshua23:5 Chule Pakai na Pathen'un na masang uva kona amaho anomanga, namitmuva kona akaidoh-a; Pakai na Pathen'u naheng uva akitepna banga chu nanghon agamu chu nalo dingu ahi." 
Joshua23:6 Hiche jeh-a chu nangho jetlam ahiloule veilama nakiheile louna dinguva, lekha-a kisun Mosi danthu jouse jui dingle tongdoh dingin hangsanun." 
Joshua23:7 Chule nangho lah-a umden namho lah-a chehih-un, a-pathen'u minjong pan hih-un; amaho mina kihahsel hih-un, jen jong jen hih-un, a-angsung uva jong bohkhup hih-un." 
Joshua23:8 Ahinla tuni chana nabol bangun Pakai na Pathen'u chu kolchah jingun. 
Joshua23:9 Ajehchu Pakaiyin namlenle namhat ho namasanguva adeldohtai. Ahin nangho dingin tunigeijin namasanguva koimacha adingjou pon," 
Joshua23:10 nalah uva mikhatnin mi sangkhat adelthei ahi. Ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'un, nangho dinga ama kitepna banga gal nabolpeh-u ahi." 
Joshua23:11 Pakai na Pathen'u nangailut nadingun nangho nasatah-in kigingphaovin lang hiuvin. 
Joshua23:12 Ahiloule nangho nakinung leuva, akidalha namho nalah uva cheng nalaiho hi nakivop piuva, amahotoh jilecha-a nakilah taouva, amahotoh nakiloi uva, amahon jong nakivop piuva ahile," 
Joshua23:13 Pakai na Pathen'un leiset phatah napeh-u, hiche munna hi namanthah tokah seova amahochu nangho dinga thangle pel hiding, chule napangteni-a dinga kivohna mol, chule namit dinguva ling hunghijo ding ahi. Hijeh chun kihetchen uvin." 
Joshua23:14 Chule veuvin, tunia keima leiset mijouse lampia chemang ding kahi, chule nalungsungu le nalhagao uvin naheuve. Pakai na-Pathen'un nangho chunga asei thilho chu thil khatjong athon aumpon ahi." 
Joshua23:15 Hijeh-a chu hung hitiding ahi, Pakai na Pathen'un nateppeh dungjui uva, thil jouse chu nangho dinga apha ahunglhun banga, Pakai na Pathen'un leiset phatah napehna uva kona nasuh manghel kahseuva Pakai na Pathen'un thilphalou jouse nachunga ahinlhun sah ding ahi." 
Joshua23:16 Aman nahenga nathupeh Pakai na Pathen thulhun, chu chonval tah-a nasuhkeh uva, nacheuva pathen dang naga jenuva, chule amaho anga nagabokhup-uleh, Pakai lunghanna chu hungkong jalintin, aman napeh-u gampha-a chu mangang tah-a namanthah dingu ahi." 
Joshua24:1 Chuin Joshua'n Israel phung jouse Shechem'a akhomin, Israel upaho jouse phung bulpiho athutanhou, avaipohou jouse akouvin chule amaho Pathen anga akipelut taovin ahi." 
Joshua24:2 Chuin Joshua'n mipi ho henga hitin aseije, Israelte Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, nidang laijin napateu chu vadunglen gal langkhatna ana chengun, Abraham pa le, Nahor pa Terah tah-in jong, abonun pathen dang ana jenun, ahi." 
Joshua24:3 Chuin keiman napau Abraham chu vadunglen gal langkhatna kapuidoh-in, Kanaan gamsung pumpi-a kapuijin, achilhah kapunsah-in chule Isaac kapen ahi." 
Joshua24:4 Chule keiman Isaac chu Jacob le Esau kapen, chule alodingin Esau chu Seir mol kapen ahinla Jacob le achate vang Egypt'a achesuh taovin ahi." 
Joshua24:5 Keiman Mosi le Aaron kasollin, Egypt gama chun alah uva thil kidang kabolin hise kalansah in chule hiche jouchun kapuidoh in ahi." 
Joshua24:6 Chule keiman napateu chu Egypt'a konin kahin puidoh-in, chule nangho twipi lama nahungun, chule Egypt miho chun twipisan geijin napateu chu kangtalai le sakol in ahin nungdelun ahi." 
Joshua24:7 Chule amaho Pakai henga akau le nangho le Egypt miho kikah-a aman muthim ajinsah-in, twipi chu achunguva alonsah-in, amaho akhukhumin, chule Egypt mite chunga ipi katoh ham tichu namitnun naveovin ahi. Chule nangho phat sottah gamthipma naum taovin ahi." 
Joshua24:8 Chuin Jordan gal langa um Amor mite gama kapuilutnun, amahon nangho nakisat piuvin, chuin agamu chu nalotheina dingun amahochu nakhut uva kapen, chuin nangho masanga kasumangin ahi." 
Joshua24:9 Hichun Moab lengpa Zippor chapa Balak akipatnin Israel asatnin, chuin Beor chapa Balaam chu nagaosap dingun akousah-in," 
Joshua24:10 ahivangin ken Balaam thu kangaipon, hichejeh chun aman nang phatthei naboh jingin, hitia chu ama-a kona kahuhdoh nahi." 
Joshua24:11 Chuin nangho Jordan galla nacheovin, Jericho'a nahungun, Amor mi Perizz mi, Kanaan mi, Hit mi, Girgash mi, Hiv mi, Jebus miho chule Jericho hon nasatnun, ahin ken amaho, nangho khutna kapen ahi." 
Joshua24:12 Chuin nangho masanga amaho delmang dingin khoingal ho kasolin; Amor lengteni chunga jong, hichu nangho chemjamle thal'a kon ahipon ahi." 
Joshua24:13 Chule nangho ngaito hilouhelin ken nangho gam kapen, chule nasah louhelu khopi-a nacheng uvin, chule naphu louhelu lengpi theile Olive thei naneovin ahi." 
Joshua24:14 Hiche jehchun tun, Pakai ginguvin, lunglut tahle dihtah-in jen'uvin, napa teovin vadunglen gal langkhat le Egypt gama anahouvu pathen dangho chu paimangun chule Pakai jen'uvin." 
Joshua24:15 Chule nangho dinga Pakai jen chu aphalou abahle, tunin najen ding chu nangman lhengdoh-in, Vadunglen gal lama napateovin anajen a-pathen hou chu najendingu ham? Ahiloule agama nana chennu Amor miho pathen chu najen dingu ham? Amavang keile ka-insung mite vangin Pakai kajen dingu ahi." 
Joshua24:16 Chuin mihochun adonbutnun, Pakai Pathen'in ajahda keihon pathen dang iti nama jongle jenpou vinge atiuve." 
Joshua24:17 Ajehchu Egypt gama keiho le kapateu soh in'a kona eipuidoh uva chu Pakai Ka Pathen'u ahin, kamit mutah uva melchihna loupitah tah abolin, chuleh kachena chanule kajotpanao miho-a konin eihuhdoh-uve." 
Joshua24:18 Chule Pakaiyin mijouse, agama cheng Amor mite jengjong, kama sang uva adeldoh-in; hiche jeh-a chun keihon Pakai kajen dingu ahi, ajehchu Amachu ka Pathen'u ahi." 
Joshua24:19 Chuin Joshua'n miho henga chun Pakai chu najen theilou dingu ahi, ajehchu ama Pathen theng ahin, thangthip Pathen ahin, nagolkeh naole nachonset nahou angaidam louding ahi ati." 
Joshua24:20 Nanghon Pakai chu nadalhah uva gamdang pathen najen uva ahile, nangho dinga thilpha abolnunga, nachunga khansetna ahinlhun sah jeng ding ahi." 
Joshua24:21 Chuin mipihon Joshua henga, ahipoi, keihon Pakai bou kajendingu ahi, atiuve." 
Joshua24:22 Chuin Joshua'n mipi ho henga, nanghon Pakai jending joh tunin nakilhen taovin ahi, ti hettohsah chu nanghotah nahiuve atile amahon keihotah ahettohsah kahitaove, atiuvin ahi." 
Joshua24:23 Hichejeh chun tun nalah uva um gamdang pathenho chu paidoh-un, chule Pakai Israel Pathen henga nalungu koijun, ati." 
Joshua24:24 Chuin mipihon Joshua henga, Pakai ka Pathen'u chu jenung kating, ama thu jengbou kangai dingu ahi atiuve." 
Joshua24:25 Hicheni chun Joshua'n mipitoh thulhun asemin, chule kitepnadan kisun khatle chondan khat Shechem'a aphutdoh-in ahi." 
Joshua24:26 Chuin Joshua'n hiche thuho chu Pathen dan lekhabua ajihlutnin, chuin song lenpitah khat alan, gangpi phungnoi khatna atungin, hiche chu Pakai muntheng kom ahi." 
Joshua24:27 Chuin Joshua'n mipi ho henga, veuvin, hiche songhi eiho kah-a hettohsah chu ahi. Pakaiyin ihenguva aseijouse chu hiche hin ajatan ahi; hijeh-a chu hichehi nangho dinga hettohsah hiding, achutiloule na Pathen chu nuse khagetnun nate, ati." 
Joshua24:28 Hitichun Joshua'n mipi ho chu a-inuva kilecheh dingin akikhensahtan ahi. 
Joshua24:29 Chule ahung hitin ahi, hiche jouchun Nun chapa Joshua Pakai soh chu kum jakhat le kumsom ahin athitan ahi." 
Joshua24:30 Gaash lhang sahlam sanga, Ephraim molla um Timnath-serah sunga ama chandinga kisem gamgi chinna chun avuitaovin ahi." 
Joshua24:31 Chuin Joshua hinsungsen chule upaho, Joshua sanga upajoho Pakaiyin Israelte dinga anatoh jouse anaheho adam sungu chun Israel mipi ho chun Pakai anajui sohkeijun ahi." 
Joshua24:32 Chule Israel chaten Egypt'a kona Joseph guho apoh touvu chu, Shechem pa Hamor chate-a kona Jacob'in dangka jakhatna anachoh achun avuijun, chule hichu Joseph chate lonamun ahitan ahi." 
Joshua24:33 Chuin Aaron chapa Eleazar athitan, chuin amahon Ephraim lhanga achapa Phinehas anapehnao agamsung lhanga chun avuitaovin ahi." 
Judges1:1 Tun Joshua thi nungin ahitin ahi, Israel miten Pakai henga, Keiho-a dinga Canaan mite douva kisatpi dinga koi che masapen dingham? tin adongun ahi." 
Judges1:1 Tun Joshua thi nungin ahitin ahi, Israel miten Pakai henga, Keiho-a dinga Canaan mite douva kisatpi dinga koi che masapen dingham? tin adongun ahi." 
Judges1:2 Chuin Pakaiyin, Judah chetou ding ahi; Ven, keiman gamsunghi akhutna kapehdoh ahitai ati." 
Judges1:3 Chuin Judah'in asopipa Simeon hengah, Canaan mite eisat khompi dingin keima eikipe kagam lona-a hungtouvin; chule chutobangma chun nangma nakipe nagam lona-a jong kilhonpinge, ati. Hitichun Simeon'in akilhonpin ahi." 
Judges1:4 Chuin Judah achetouvin, chule Pakaiyin Canaan mite le Perizz mite chu akhutna apehdoh tan: chule amahon Bezek'a chun mi sangsom athat uvin ahi." 
Judges1:5 Chule amahon Adonibezek chu Bezek'a amuvin, ama chu akisat piuvin, chule Canaan mite le Perizz mite chu athatnun ahi." 
Judges1:6 Ahivangin Adonibezek ajamin; chuin amahon anungdelun, amanun, chule akhutpi le akeng khopiho atanpeh-un ahi." 
Judges1:7 Chule Adonibezek'in, Leng somsagi akhutpiu le akengpiu kitanlhaho chun kadokhang noija anmal akilokhomu ahin: keiman kana bol bang banga chu Pathen'in kachunga eilethuh ahitai ati. Chule amahon ama chu Jerusalem'a ahinpuijun, chua chun ama athitai." 
Judges1:8 Tun Judah chatehon Jerusalem asatnun, alauvin, chemjamin asatnun, chule khopi chu meijin ahal lhaovin ahi." 
Judges1:9 Chule hiche nungchun Judah chate chu molsanga cheng, lhanglama cheng, chule phaichama cheng Canaan mite toh kisat dingin achesuh-un ahi." 
Judges1:10 Chuin Judah'in Hebron'a cheng Canaan miho akisatpin; (tun Hebron hi masangin Kirjath-arba ana kiti:) chuin amahon Sheshai, Ahiman, chule Talmai chu athatnun ahi." 
Judges1:11 Chuin chua konchun Debir'a chengho akisatpin ahi: masangin Debir min chu Kirjath-sepher anahi. 
Judges1:12 Chule Caleb'in, Koihile Kirjath-sepher gasatna, gala-a aumleh, amachu ajidinga kachanu Achsah kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
Judges1:13 Chuin Caleb naopa Kenaz chapa Othniel'in hichu agalatan; chuin aman achanu Achsah chu ajidin apetan ahi. 
Judges1:14 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanu amapa henga ahung phatnin, amanun apa henga gam athumdin angehtai. Chuin amanu asangan'a konin akumlhan ahile, Caleb'in amanu henga, Ipi nadeijem? anati." 
Judges1:15 Chuin amanun ahenga, Phatthei neiboh-in: Nangman lhanglam gam neipeh ahi ngaleh, twinahho jong neipen, ati. Chuin Caleb'in twinah sahnung le lhangnung chu apetai." 
Judges1:16 Chuin Mosi nupapa Ken mipa chate chu tumthing kena khopi-a konchun Judah chate toh apotdoh-un, Arad lhanglama um Juda gamthipma alutnun; chule acheuvin miho lah-a chun agacheng taovin ahi." 
Judges1:17 Chuin Judah chu asopipa Simeon toh achen, Zaphath'a cheng Canaan mite athat nun, asugam helun ahi. Chule akhopi minchu Hormah akitin ahi." 
Judges1:18 Chule Judah'in Gaza chu agamsung pumpi toh, Askelon chu agamsung pumpi toh, Ekron chu agamsung pumpi toh alan ahi." 
Judges1:19 Chule Pakaiyin Judah aumpin; aman molsanga chengho chu adelmangin; amavang phaichama chengho chun thih sakol kangtalai aneijeh-un adeldoh joupon ahi. 
Judges1:20 Chule Mosi'n anasei bangin Hebron chu Caleb apeuvin ahi. Chuin aman chukoma konchun Anak chate thumho chu adeldoh-in ahi. 
Judges1:21 Chule Jerusalem'a chenga Jebus mite chu Benjamin chaten adeldoh pouvin; amavang tunigeijin Jebus mite chu Benjamin chatetoh Jerusalem'a achengkhom nalaijun ahi. 
Judges1:22 Chule Joseph insung miho jong chu Bethel satnin akonun; chule Pakaiyin amaho aumpin ahi. 
Judges1:23 Chule Joseph insung miho chun Bethel gavelhi din mi asolun ahi. (Masangin hiche khopi minchu Luz anakisah-in ahi.) 
Judges1:24 Chuin gam velhihon khopi-a kona hungdoh mikhat amuvin, ahengah, Kataovu ahi, khopi lutna hoilang ham neihilun, chutile hepina kamusah dingu nahi, atiuve." 
Judges1:25 Chuin aman khopi lutna avetsah phatnin, amahon khopi chu chemjamin asumangun; mipa vang chu a-insung mite toh asoldoh taovin ahi." 
Judges1:26 Chuin mipa chu Hit miho gama achen, khopi khat agatungdoh-in, hichu Luz asah-in: tuni geijin hiche minchu apujing nalaijin ahi." 
Judges1:27 Manasseh'in Bethshean'a chenghole akhopi, Taanach'a chengho le akhopiho, Dor'a chengho le akhopiho, Ibleam'a chengho le akhopiho, Megiddo'a chengho le akhopiho chu anodoh pon; amavang gamsunga chun Canaan miho acheng jouvin ahi." 
Judges1:28 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israelte ahunghat phatnun Canaan miho chu hunama natongin apansah-un, adeldoh sohkei pouvin ahi." 
Judges1:29 Ephraim'in jong Gazer'a cheng Canaan miho chu adeldoh pon; amavang Canaan miho chu Gezer'a amaho lah-a achengun ahi. 
Judges1:30 Zebulun'in jong Kitron'a cheng miho ahin, chule Nahalol'a cheng miho ahin adeldoh pon; amavang Canaan miho chu alah uva achengun, hunam natongin apansah uvin ahi." 
Judges1:31 Asher'in jong Accho'a cheng miho, Zidon'a cheng miho, Ahlab'a, Achzib'a, Helbah'a, Aphik'a, chule Rehob'a cheng miho chu adeldoh pon ahi." 
Judges1:32 Amavang agama cheng Canaan miho lah-a chun Asher mite chu achengun ahi. Ajehchu amaho adeldoh louvu ahi. 
Judges1:33 Naphtali'in jong Beth-shemesh'a chengho ahin, chule Beth-anath'a chengho chu adeldoh pon; amavang agama cheng Canaan miholah-a chun ama achengun ahi. Ahijeng vangin Beth-shemesh le Beth-anath'a chengho chun amaho henga kai apeuvin ahi." 
Judges1:34 Chule Amor mite chun Dan chate chu molsang lama adel touvun, phaichama hungjong ahungsah pouvin ahi." 
Judges1:35 Ahin Amor mite chu Aijalon'a um Heres molsang le Shaalbim'a achengun ahi. Ahivangin Joseph insung mite khutnin amaho chu ajouvin, hitichun amaho hunam natongin apangtaovin ahi." 
Judges1:36 Chule Amor miho gamgi chu Akrabbim lam chetou na-a pat, songpi-a pat achunglam ahi." 
Judges2:1 Chuin Pakai vantil khat Gilgal'a konin Bochim'a ahungtouvin, hitin aseije, Keiman Egypt'a konin kapotdoh sah-in, napu napateu kahahselna gamsunga kahin puilutnin; chule keiman kanaseijin, Nang hotoh kakitepna imatih-a jong kasukeh louding ahi." 
Judges2:2 Chule nangho hiche gama cheng miho toh kijop matna naneilou diu; amaicham nasuhchim pehdiu ahi kanati. Ahinla nanghon ka aw nangaipouve. Ibola hiche hi nabolu hitam? 
Judges2:3 Hijeh chun hiti jonghin kaseije, Namasanguva kona amaho kadeldoh louding; amavang amaho chu naveluva ling banga umdiu, chule a-pathen houchu nangho dinga thang hiding ahiuve, ati." 
Judges2:4 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pakai vantil chun Israel chate jouse henga hiche thu asei pet chun, amaho awsang tah-in akap taovin ahi." 
Judges2:5 Chuin amahon hiche mun minchu Bochim asah-un; chule chukoma chun Pakai henga kilhaina abolun ahi. 
Judges2:6 Chuin Joshua'n mipi ho chu alhadoh phatnin, Israel mite amichangcheh chu agamu lodin a-inlam cheh uva ache taovin ahi." 
Judges2:6 Chuin Joshua'n mipi ho chu alhadoh phatnin, Israel mite amichangcheh chu agamu lodin a-inlam cheh uva ache taovin ahi." 
Judges2:7 Chuin miho chun Joshua hinlaise le, Israelte dinga Pakai natoh loupitahho anamu-a Joshua sanga hingsot upaho hinlaise chun Pakai chu ajenun ahi." 
Judges2:7 Chuin miho chun Joshua hinlaise le, Israelte dinga Pakai natoh loupitahho anamu-a Joshua sanga hingsot upaho hinlaise chun Pakai chu ajenun ahi." 
Judges2:8 Chuin Pakai lhacha Nun chapa Joshua chu kum jakhatle somkhat alhin phatnin athitan ahi. 
Judges2:8 Chuin Pakai lhacha Nun chapa Joshua chu kum jakhatle somkhat alhin phatnin athitan ahi. 
Judges2:9 Chuin amahon Gaash sahlam Ephraim molsanga um agoulo Timnath-heres gamgi-a chun avuitaovin ahi. 
Judges2:10 Chuin chuche khang miho jouse jong chu apu apateu toh gopkhomin aumgam taovin; chule amaho nungin Pakai helou, chule Israelte dinga anatohho hephalou khangchom ahung umdoh tan ahi." 
Judges2:11 Chuin Israel chate chun Pakai mitmun thilse abolun, Baal ajenun ahi." 
Judges2:12 Chule amahon Egypt gama kona hinpuidoh-a apu apateu Pakai Pathen chu adalhaovin, aveluva um mihemho pathenho lah-a pathen dangho chu ajuijun, hicheho anga chun aboh khupmun, Pakai chu alunghansah taovin ahi." 
Judges2:13 Chule amahon Pakai adalhaovin, Baal le Astaroth chu ajen taovin ahi." 
Judges2:14 Hichun Pakai lunghanna chu Israelte chunga ahung soudohtan, amaho achomgam hou khutna chun achomgam dingun apedohtan; chule amaho agal miteu masanga adin joulou nadingun, aveluva um agal miteu khutna ajohdoh tan ahi." 
Judges2:15 Pakaiyin aseibang le amaho chunga akihahselna bangchun, achedohna chanuva Pakai khut chu amaho dounan aphalou lama achun; amaho nasatah-in agenthei taovin ahi." 
Judges2:16 Ahivangin Pakaiyin thutan ho atundoh peh-in, amaho chun achomgam hou khutna konin ahuhdoh jiuvin ahi." 
Judges2:17 Ahijeng vangin amahon athutanhou thu chu angai pouvin, pathen dangho nung juijun noti'n apangun, a-anguva aboh khupmun ahi. Amaho apu apa teovin Pakai thupeh angaijuva achenau lampia konchun gangtah-in akihei mangun, hibang chun abolpouvin ahi." 
Judges2:18 Chuin Pakaiyin thutan ho atundohpeh phatnin, Pakaiyin thutan ho aumpin, thutan ho nikholaisen agalteu khutna konin ahuhhingin ahi. Ajehchu amaho suhgenthei le bol hesoh-a aum uva apen pennao jehchun Pakaiyin alung aheitan ahi." 
Judges2:19 Chule ahitin ahi, thutanpa athi phat phatle amaho akilehei jiuvin, pathen dangho chu jending le a-anga bohkhup dingin apu apateu sangin abohjo jiuvin; acham tah uva anatoh uva konle, alouchal uva konin atang deh pouvin ahi." 
Judges2:20 Chuin Pakai lunghana chu Israelte chunga ahung soudoh-in, hitin aseije, Hiche mite hin apu apateu henga thupeh kanapeh kakitepna asuhkeh uva, chule kathu angailou jeh-un," 
Judges2:21 Keiman jong Joshua athia adalhah namhohi amasanguva kona khatcha kadeldoh louding ahi. 
Judges2:21 Keiman jong Joshua athia adalhah namhohi amasanguva kona khatcha kadeldoh louding ahi. 
Judges2:22 Chutia chu amaho-a kona hi, apu apa teovin anajui banguva Israel ten Pakai lampi chu ajuijuvem ajuihih uvem kaphotchet ding ahi, ati." 
Judges2:23 Hichejeh-a chu Pakaiyin hiche namho chu mangang tah-a delmang louva akoija, chule Joshua khutna jong ana pehdoh lou ahi." 
Judges2:23 Hichejeh-a chu Pakaiyin hiche namho chu mangang tah-a delmang louva akoija, chule Joshua khutna jong ana pehdoh lou ahi." 
Judges3:1 Pakaiyin Israelte, Canaan gamsunga galkisat hekha loulai Israel mi tampiho patep nadia akhen namtin vaipiho chu hichenghi ahiuvin;" 
Judges3:2 Israel chate khangguihon galsat dan ahetna dingu leh, tumasanga ima anahe loulaihon ahetna dinguva kikhena ahiuve;" 
Judges3:3 Hiche ho chu, Philistinte leng nga ho, Canaan miho jouse, Sidon miho, Baal-hermon molsanga patna Hamath lutna geija Lebanon molsanga cheng Hiv miho ahiuve." 
Judges3:4 Chule Israel ten Pakai thupeh, Mosi khutna kona apu apateu henga ana thupeh chu angainah uvem ti photchetna dinga amaho chu kikhendoh ahiuve." 
Judges3:5 Chuin Israel chate chu Canaan miho, Hit miho, Amor miho, Perizz miho, Hiv miho, Jebus miho lah-a achengun;" 
Judges3:6 Chule amahon achanuteu ajidingun alauvin, achanuteu amaho chapate dingin apeuvin, chule a-pathen hou jong ajenun ahi." 
Judges3:7 Chule Israel chate chun Pakai mitmun thilse abolun, Pakai a-Pathen'u asumilun, Baal le Asherah ajenun ahi." 
Judges3:8 Hichejeh chun Pakai lunghana chu Israelte chunga asoudoh tan, hijeh chun Mesopotamia lengpa Chushan-rishathaim khutna amaho ajohdoh tan; hitichun Israel ten Chushan-rishathaim chu kumget ajenun ahi." 
Judges3:9 Chuin Israel chate Pakai henga apen phat uvin, Pakaiyin Israelte huhdoh ding khat, Caleb naopa Kanez chapa Othniel ngeichu atungdoh-in, amachun amaho ahuhdoh-in ahi." 
Judges3:10 Chuin Pakai lhagao chu achunga achun, aman Israelte thu atanin, galsat din akondoh-in: chule Pakaiyin Mesopotamia lengpa Chushan-rishathaim chu akhutna apedoh-in; chule akhutnin Chushan-rishathaim chu ajoutan ahi." 
Judges3:11 Chuin gamsung chu kum somli akicholdon ahi. Chuin Kenaz chapa Othniel chu athitai. 
Judges3:12 Chuin Israel chaten Pakai mitmun thilse abolkit taovin; chule amaho Pakai mitmu-a thilse jeng abol jeh-u chun, Pakaiyin Israelte dounan Moab lengpa Eglon chu athahatsah tan ahi." 
Judges3:13 Chuin aman Ammon le Amalek chate ahenga akhomin, akondoh-in Israelte agajouvin, tumthing khopi chu alotan ahi." 
Judges3:14 Hitichun Israel chaten Moab lengpa Eglon chu kum somleget ajenun ahi. 
Judges3:15 Ahivangin Israel chate Pakai henga aka phatnun, Pakaiyin Benjamin mi Gera chapa Ehud, mi veikolong pa chu ahuhdoh dingun atundohpeh-in; chule ama khutna chun Israel chaten Moab lengpa Eglon henga thilpeh athotnun ahi." 
Judges3:16 Ahinla Ehud'in hemto chemjam tongkhatna sao akisemin, ajetlam malpi chunga avonnoija akigah-in ahi." 
Judges3:17 Chuin aman thilpeh chu Moab lengpa Eglon henga ahin choijin: chule Eglon chu mithaotah ahi. 
Judges3:18 Chuin aman thilpeh apeh jou phatnin, thilpeh hinpoho chu asolmangtai." 
Judges3:19 Ahivangin amatah Gilgal'a song kikhena mun'a konchun akileheijin, ahenga, Vo lengpa keiman nahenga dingin guhthim thusei ding kaneije atile, aman thipmin atin ahi. Chuin akoma ding jouse chu ama-a konin achemang taovin ahi." 
Judges3:20 Chuin Ehud ahenga ahungin; chule ama chu amachang dingabou anei nipilai touna indan-a chun atouvin ahi. Chuin Ehud'in ahenga, Nahenga seiding Pathen'a kon thukhat kaneije ati. Hichun ama atouna-a konchun akipatdoh-in ahi." 
Judges3:21 Chuin Ehud'in akhut veilam ahin lhang doh-in, ajetlam pheichunga chem chu alan, a-oija adotlut tai." 
Judges3:22 Chule achem nunga chun achemkung jong alutthan; chem chu athaovin atomin ahile aman chem chu a-oija konin asatdoh joutapon; chule a-eh ahungdoh-in ahi. 
Judges3:23 Chujouvin Ehud hongcha lama apotdoh-in, touna danho kotho chu akha khumin, akam khumtan ahi." 
Judges3:24 Ama achedoh phatnin asohteho ahungun, chule touna danho kot kikam chu amuphatnun, Amahin thonlouva nipilai indan sunga akeng akikhu hinte atiuvin ahi." 
Judges3:25 Chuin amahon jachat umleuvin angah-un; chule veuvin, aman indan kot chu ahongtapon ahi. Hijeh chun amahon aheh hongna alauvin, ahongdoh-un; chule veuvin a pakaiyu chu tolla athisan analumin ahi." 
Judges3:26 Chule amaho khongai kahchun Ehud ahoidohtan, song kikhetna mun akhelin, Seirah geijin ajamdoh tan ahi." 
Judges3:27 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama ahung phatnin, Ephraim molchunga chun sumkon ahin mutnin, chule Israel chate chu amatoh mola konin ahungsuh-un, ama amasan ahi." 
Judges3:28 Chuin aman amaho henga, Kanung hinjuijun: ajehchu Pakaiyin namelmao Moab mite chu nakhut nuva apehdohtai, ati. Chule amahon anung ajui suh-un, Moab mai naija um Jordan gal kulho chu alauvin, koimacha agalkaisah pouvin ahi." 
Judges3:29 Chuin amahon hiche pettah chun Moab mite sangsom tobang athat uvin, amaho chu mihat cheh le mihangsan cheh ahiuve; koimacha ahoidoh aumpon ahi." 
Judges3:30 Hitichun hiche nikho chun Moab chu Israel khutnoija suhnemin aumin ahi. Chuin gamsung chu kum somget acholngan ahi. 
Judges3:31 Chule amanungin Anath chapa Shamgar ahin, amapan bong sutna tengcha-in Philistine te mi jagup athatnin: chule Israelte jong ahuhdoh-in ahi." 
Judges4:1 Chuin Ehud athi phatnin, Israel chate chun Pakai mitmun thilse abolkit taovin ahi." 
Judges4:2 Chuin Pakaiyin amaho chu Hazor mun'a vaihompa, Canaan lengpa Jabin khutnah ajohdoh tan ahi. Ajanel lamkai chu Sisera ahin, amachu Gentile ho umna Harosheth'a cheng ahi." 
Judges4:3 Chuin Israel chate chu Pakai henga atao taovin ahi. Ajehchu aman thih-a kisem sakol kangtalai jako aneijin; chule aman kum somni Israelte chu nasatah-a asuh genthei ahi. 
Judges4:4 Chule Lapidoth jinu Deborah themgaonu chun hiche laija chu Israelte thu atan ahi. 
Judges4:5 Chule amanu chu Ephraim molsanga um Ramah le Bethel kikah-a Deborah tumthing noija chu chenga ahin; chule Israel chate chu athu-u tansah dinga ahenga hungjiuva ahi. 
Judges4:6 Chuin amanun Kadesh-napthtali'a kon Abinoam chapa Barak agakou sah-in, ajah-a, Israel Pakai Pathen'in, Tabor molsang lama chun chenlang, Naphtali chatele Zebulun chate sangsom kipuijin," 
Judges4:7 Chule keiman Jabin gal lamkaipa Sisera chu asakol kangtalai le amihonpi to nangma heng Kidron vapidung lama kahin puiding; amachu nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahi, tia thu napeh hilouham? ati." 
Judges4:8 Chuin Barak'in amanu henga, Nangman nei kilhonpi leh chenange; amavang nei kilhonpi lou dinga ahile kache louding ahi, ati." 
Judges4:9 Chuin amanun, Keiman thonlouva kalhonpi ding nahi; ahivanga nakalsona lampia hi nangma dinga loupina umlou ding ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin Sisera chu numei khat khutna ajohdoh ding ahi, ati. Chuin Deborah akipatnin Barak toh akilhonin Kadesh lama achelhontan ahi." 
Judges4:10 Chuin Barak'in Zebulun le Naphtali chu Kadesh'a akouvin; mi sangsom toh alhon touvin: chule Deborah'in alhon toupin ahi. 
Judges4:11 Tun Mosi nupapa Hobab chate lah-a Ken mi Heber chu Ken miho-a konin akitumse-in, Kedesh koma um Zaanaim phaichama chun ponbuh akisontan ahi." 
Judges4:12 Chule amahon Tabor molsanga chun Abinoam chapa Barak chu achetoutai ti Sisera henga aseipeh taovin ahi. 
Judges4:13 Chuin Sisera'in akangtalai jouse, athih kangtalai jako geijin, chule Gentile ho umna Harosheth'a kon Kishon vapidung geija akoma um mijouse chu akhom khomin ahi." 
Judges4:14 Chuin Deborah'in Barak henga, Kipat in, ajehchu tunihi Pakaiyin nakhutna Sisera apehdoh nikho ahi; Pakai chu namasanga che hilouham? ati. Hitichun Barak Tabor molsanga konin achesuh-in, mi sangsomin anung ajuijun ahi." 
Judges4:15 Chuin Pakaiyin Barak masanga Sisera le akangtalai ho, chule aumpiho chu chemjam monghemin amaimoh sahtan; hitichun Sisera chu akangtalaija konchun akumlhan akengin ajammang tan ahi." 
Judges4:16 Ahivangin Barak'in Gentile ho umna Harosheth geijin kangtalai ho le janelho chu anungdelin; Sisera sepai jouse chu chemjam monghemin alhusoh keijun, khatcha asohcha aumpouvin ahi." 
Judges4:17 Ahivangin Sisera chu Ken mi Heber inneipi Jael ponbuh geijin akengin ajamlutnin ahi. Ajehchu Hazor lengpa Jabin le Ken mi Heber insung kikah-a chamna uma ahi. 
Judges4:18 Chule Jael chu Sisera lamto dingin ahungdoh-in, Hunglutnin, ka pakai, kahenga hunglutnin, kicha hih-in ati. Chuin amapa amanu ponbuh sunga ahunglut phatnin, amanun ama chu pon akhu khumin ahi." 
Judges4:19 Chuin amapan amanu jah-a, Nahenga katao ahi, dondingin twi themkhat neipen, ajehchu kadang achah lheh-e ati. Chuin amanun bongnoi hai ahongin, amapa adonsah-in, chule akhu khumtai." 
Judges4:20 Chule amanu koma aseikitnin, Pon in kotna dingin lang, chule hiti ding ahi, mikhattou nahenga ahunga, Hikoma hi mi umam? tia nadoh ule, aumpoi tin seijin, ati." 
Judges4:21 Hiche jouchun Heber jinu Jael'in pon in kilna thingkil chu alan, akhutna sehtumkhat alan, ahenga kangchan achen, angeichanga chun akhenlutnin, toltoh akilmat jengin ahi; ajehchu ama acholjeh-a aihmumil hela ahi. Hitichun amapa athitai." 
Judges4:22 Chuin veuvin, Barak'in Sisera ahinjui laijin, Jael chu amapa kimutopi dingin apotdoh-in, chule ahenga, Hungin, keiman naholpa chu vetsah inge, ati. Chuin amapa amanu ponbuh-a ahung phatnin, veuvin Sisera chu athisan analumin, thingkil chu angeichanga ana kiphut in ahi." 
Judges4:23 Hitichun hiche nikho chun Pathen'in Canaan lengpa Jabin chu Israelte masanga asunemtai. 
Judges4:24 Chuin Israel chate khut akhangtou chehcheh-in, Canaan lengpa Jabin asuhmang kahseovin, Canaan lengpa Jabin chu ajoupeh-un ahi." 
Judges5:1 Chujouvin Deborah le Abhinoam chapa Barak in hiche nikho chun la asalhonin, hitin atilhone," 
Judges5:2 Mipite amaho le amaho akipehdoh uva, Israel phu alahpeh jeh-in, Pakai chu avahchoijun." 
Judges5:3 Vo lengho, ngaijun; Vo pipuiho, nana hinsungun; kei, keimatah in Pakaiya la sangting, Israel Pakai Pathen vahchoi La kasah ding ahi." 
Judges5:4 Pakai, Seir'a kona nangma nahung doh-a, Edom loujaova kona nahung kondoh chun, leiset akihot nemin, vanho apullhan, meilhang ho atuisoh gamtai." 
Judges5:5 Molsang ho chu Pakai masanga ajunlhan, Sinai jengjong chu Israel Pathen masanga ajunlha tai." 
Judges5:6 Anath chapa Shamgar nikho laijin, Jael nikho laijin, Lamlhongpiho athipbeh-in, kholjinle hon lampel ajotnuve." 
Judges5:7 Khosunga chengho aum tapouvin, Israel sunga aum tapouve; Keima Deborah kakipat doh-a, Israel sunga minu khatna kakipatdoh masangsen." 
Judges5:8 Amahon pathen thah ho akilhennun, chuin kotpi sunga gal anaume. Israel sangsomli lah-a lumle teng ana umam?" 
Judges5:9 Kalungthim hi mipi lah-a kona achamtah-a kipedoh Israel gamvaipoho lah-a aume, Pakai chu nunnom hen." 
Judges5:10 Seijuvin, nangho sangan kang chunga touho, thupi tanna-a touho, chule lamdunga cheleho." 
Judges5:11 Atuikhainau munho-a thalkap ho thal len gina kona kihuh dohhon, chumuna chu amahon Pakai chonphatna natoh aseiphong diu, chonphatna natoh ngei chu Israel sunga akho sunguva chengho lah-a ajahsah diu; chuteng Pakai mite kotpi phunga kumsuh diu ahitai." 
Judges5:12 Thouvin, thouvin, Deborah; thouvin, thouvin, la khat san: kipat doh-in, nangma Abinoam chapa Barak, chule gal hinga ki kaiho gal hingin kaijin." 
Judges5:13 Chujouvin aman ahingdohpa chu miho lah-a miloupiho chunga vaihomin apansah-in; Pakaiyin keima mihat ho chunga vai eipohsah-in ahi. 
Judges5:14 Ephraim'a konin Amalek douding amaho lah-a jung khat aumin, nangma nungin namite lah-a Benjamin; Machir'a konin gamvaipoho ahungsuh-un, chule Zebulun'a konin thil sunhon lekhamol tuhho ahungsuh-un ahi." 
Judges5:15 Chule Issachar leng chapa ho chu Daborah toh aumkhomun; Issachar jengjong, chule Barak jong aumin: ama chu kengin phaichama lama akisolin ahi. Reuben kikhentel jeh-in lungsunga lunggel lentah asohdoh-in ahi." 
Judges5:16 Kelngoiho pen gin ngaidinga, kelngoi honlah-a ibola nangma uma nahim? Reuben kikhentel jeh-in lungsung kikholna nasatah aumin ahi." 
Judges5:17 Gilead chu Jordan gal langa achenge: chule Dan chu ibola kong innei sunga umden ham? Asher twipi panga aumjingin, chule abahho kah-a achengin ahi." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun le Naphtali hi gam sanglam loulaija thina ginglouva ahinkholhon phaldoh-a mi ahilhone. 
Judges5:19 Lengho ahungun gal ahungsatnun, Megiddo twipi pang Taanach mun'a Canaan lengho asatnun; Amahon gamthil le sum alapouvin ahi." 
Judges5:20 Amahon van'a konin gal asatnun, ahsihon alamlhah uva konin Sisera asatnun ahi." 
Judges5:21 Kishon vapidungin amaho alhoh mangun, hichu malai vapi, Kishon vapi chu ahi. O kahinna, nangman thahatna nachotpha ahitai." 
Judges5:22 Chujouvin sakol ho chu akihatil jeh-un, amihatpaovin ahatil jeh-un, atinhou alhong gamtan ahi." 
Judges5:23 Meroz chu samseuvin, tin Pakai vantil'in aseije, asunga chengho jouse chu nasatah-in samseuvin; ajehchu Pakai kithopi din ahung pouvin, ahat ho doudinga Pakai kithopi dingin amaho ahung pouvin ahi." 
Judges5:24 Numei ho jouse chungvuma Ken mi Heber jinu Jael chu phatthei changding ahin; ponbuh-a cheng numei ho jouse chungvuma phatthei changding ahi. 
Judges5:25 Amapan twi athumle amanun bongnoi apen; amanun milen kongsunga bongnoi ha ahin domin ahi. 
Judges5:26 Amanun akhutnin thingkil alan, akhut jetlama natongho seh alan; seh-a chun Sisera akhenin, amanun angeichang akhet pai phatnin alu chu avochiptan ahi." 
Judges5:27 Amapa amanu kengbula aboh khupmin, alhun, akijamtai: amanu kengbula aboh khupmin, alhun; abohkhupna-a chun athisan akijamtai." 
Judges5:28 Sisera nuchun bangkotna konin aven, avangkah-a konin apengjah-in, Ipidinga akangtalai hung geisangham? Ipidinga akangtalai kangho khongai ahidem?" 
Judges5:29 Aloi numei chinghon adonbutnun, Henge, amanu amale ama akidonbutnin," 
Judges5:30 Amaho gangjou louvu hitam? Gal thilkichom kihom louvu ham? Pasal takip dinga nungah khat ahiloule ni; Sisera dinga gal thillah jemchom chom, gal thillah kikhui pahjem chomchom, alangtoa kikhuipah jem chomchom, galthil kilahho ngonga dinga kilomho amujou louvu ahidem? ati." 
Judges5:31 O Pakai, Hitichun nagalmiteu mangthah hen: ahivanginla ama ngailuho chu thahat tah-a chelai nisa banguhen. Chuin gamsung chu kum somli acholdon ahi." 
Judges6:1 Chule Israel chaten Pakai mitmun thilse jeng abolun ahile; Pakaiyin amaho chu Midia te khutna kum sagi apedoh tan ahi. 
Judges6:2 Chuin Midia te khut chun Israelte chu ajoutan: chule Midia mite jehchun Israel chaten molsang ho-a kokhuh, leikoho, chule kuldet akisem taovin ahi." 
Judges6:3 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israel ten muchi atu tengule Midia miho ahung tou jiuvin, chule Amalek miho le solam chateho jongchu amaho doudin ahung tou jiuvin;" 
Judges6:4 Chule amaho dounan gebuh asong jiuvin, Gaza geijin leisetna kon muchi jouse chu asuse jiuvin, chule Israelte dingin nehding himhim akhenji pouvin, kelngoiho, bongho, sanganho jong akhenji pouvin ahi." 
Judges6:5 Ajehchu amaho aganchahou le aponbuh-u toh hungtou jiuva, mihonpi chu khaokho banga hung kitol jiuva ahi; ajehchu amahole asangongsang hou chu simjou lou ahiuvin, gamsung sumang dinga hunglut jiu ahi." 
Judges6:6 Chule Midia mite jeh chun Israelte chu nasatah-in avaicha taovin; chuin Israel chate Pakai henga apeng taovin ahi. 
Judges6:7 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, Midia mite jeh-a Israel chaten Pakai asap phatnun," 
Judges6:8 Pakaiyin Israel chate dingin themgao khat ahinsol peh-in, ama chun ahenguva hitihin thu aseijin, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Keiman Egypt'a kona kahinpuidoh uva, nabul putnaova kona kahinpuidoh nahiuvin;" 
Judges6:9 Chule Egypt mite khutna konle, nabol gentheihou khutna kona kahuhdoh uva, namasanguva kona kadeldoh-a, agamu nangho kapeh nahiuve;" 
Judges6:10 Chule keiman naheng uva, Keimahi Pakai na-Pathen'u kahi; nanghon agamuva nachennao Amor mite pathenho chu ging hih-un, kanatin: ahinla nanghon kathu nanit pouvin ahi, ati." 
Judges6:11 Chuin Pakai vantil khat ahungin, Ophrah kho-a um Abiezer mi Joash gangpi phung noija atouvin; chule achapa Gideon chun Midia mite-a kona sel dingin lengpiga chilna-a suhlou chang achilin ahi." 
Judges6:12 Chuin Pakai vantil chu ahenga akilah-in, ajah-a, Nangma mihang gal hatpa, Pakaiyin naumpi, ati." 
Judges6:13 Chuin Gideon'in ama henga, Vo ka Pakai, Pakaiyin eiumpiuva ahileh, hichengpihi ibola kachunguva chu-a ham? Chule kapu kapateuvin keiho henga Pakaiyin keiho Egypt'a kona eihin puidoh-u hilouham, tia anaseiju athilbol kidangho chu hoilamba hija hitam? Ahinla tun Pakaiyin eida lhaovin, Midia mite khutna eipedoh taove, ati." 
Judges6:14 Chuin Pakaiyin amapa aven, hitin aseije, Hiche nathahatna-a hin konin, chule nangman Midia te khutna konin Israel nahuhdoh ding ahi, keiman kasol nahi hilouham? ati." 
Judges6:15 Chuin aman ahenga, Vo ka Pakai, iti dana keiman Israel kahuhdoh dingham? Ven, ka-insung hi Manasseh sunga dinga alhasampen ahin, chule keimahi kapa insunga dinga alhumpen kahi, ati." 
Judges6:16 Chuin Pakaiyin ahenga, Thonlouva keiman nangma kaumpi ding nahin, chule nangman Midia mite chu mikhat tha-a natha ding ahi, ati." 
Judges6:17 Chuin aman ahenga, Tu-a namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, nangman nei kihoupina melchihna neimusah-in." 
Judges6:18 Nahenga katao ahi, nahenga kahunga thilpeh kahin choidoh-a na anga kakoi kahsen, hiche mun'a konin chedoh hih-in, ati. Chuin aman, Nahung kahse-a kana ngading nahi, ati." 
Judges6:19 Chuin Gideon alutnin, kelnou khat athatnin, chule changbong chol solou ephah khat aga kangin; saphe chu pocha sunga ahengin, atwi chu bel sunga asunglutnin, gangpi phung noija aumna-a chun ahinchoijin, amapa chu apen ahi." 
Judges6:20 Chuin Pathen vantil chun ahenga, Saphe le chol solou changlhah chu lanlang songpi chungahin koijin lang, atuichu sunglhan ati. Chuin hitichun aboltai." 
Judges6:21 Chuin Pakai vantil'in akhutna um tenggol muh-a chun saphe le cholsolou changlhah chu agah tongkhan ahileh, songpi-a konchun mei ahung kongdoh-in, saphe le cholsolou changlhah chu akamangtan ahi. Chujouvin Pakai vantil chu amitmua konin achemang tai." 
Judges6:22 Chuin Gideon'in ama chu Pakai vantil ahi ahet phatnin, Gideon'in, Ohe Pakai Pathen! ajehchu keiman Pakai vantil chu kimaito tah-in kakimupi tai, ati." 
Judges6:23 Chuin Pakaiyin ahenga, Lung mongin umin, kicha hih-in; nathi louding ahi, ati." 
Judges6:24 Chuin Gideon'in Pakai dingin chua chun maicham khat atungdoh-in, hichu Jehovah-shalom asahtai. Tuni geijin Abiezer mite umna Ophrah'a aum jingin ahi." 
Judges6:25 Chuin hiche jan mama chun ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin ahenga aseijin, Napa bongchal gol, kum sagi lhing bongchal gol nina ngei chu lanlang, napa Baal maicham chu suchimin, chule akoma um thingbom chu phuhlhun;" 
Judges6:26 Chule hiche songpi chunga hin Pakai na Pathen dingin maicham khat sanlang, hoitah-in goltupmin, chule bongchal nina chu lanlang, naphuh ding thingbom thinga chun halvam thilpeh chu toh-in, ati." 
Judges6:27 Chujouvin Gideon'in asohte mi som apuijin, Pakaiyin ahenga aseibang chun aboltan ahi. Chule ahitin ahi, apa insung mihole khopi-a miho aginjeh chun sunnin abolngam pon, jannin abolin ahi." 
Judges6:28 Chuin khopi miho chu jingpi tah-a ahungthodoh phatnun, veuvin Baal maicham chu ana kisulhun, chule akoma um thingbom jong chu ana kiphuh lhutan, chule Maicham kisa chunga chun bongchal nina chu ganlhaijin ana kitoh-in ahi." 
Judges6:29 Chuin amaho khatle khat, Hichehi koibolham? tin akidong touvin ahi. Chule amahon akholuva adoh phatnun, Hichehi Joash chapa Gideon bol ahi, tin adonbutnun ahi." 
Judges6:30 Chujouvin khopi sunga mihon Joash henga, Nachapa hinpuidoh in, thitei tei ding ahi. Ajehchu aman Baal maicham asuchimin, chule akoma um thingbom chu aphuh lhun ahi, atiuve." 
Judges6:31 Chuin Joash'in akidin tepiho jouse henga, Nanghon Baal dinga thu naseipeh dingu ham? Nanghon ama nahuhhing dingu ham? Koihile ama-a dinga thusei chanchu tu jingkah ahipet hin kithat jenghen; ama pathen ahile achungthu kisei hen, ajehchu mikhatnin amaicham asuhchim pehtai, ati." 
Judges6:32 Hijeh chun aman, Baal'in amapa dounan achungthu kiseihen, ajehchu aman a-maicham asuhchim pehtai, atin, amapa chu Jerubbaal asahtai." 
Judges6:33 Chujouvin Midia te jousele Amalek mite chule solama chateho akikhomun, agalkaijun, Jezreel phaichama pon in asong taovin ahi." 
Judges6:34 Ahivangin Pakai lhagao chu Gideon chunga ahung chun, chule aman sumkon amutnin; Abiezer miho anunga ahung kikhomun ahi." 
Judges6:35 Chuin aman Manasseh mite umna jouse-a thusep asolin, amaho anunga ahung kikhomun ahi. Chule Asher henga jong, Zebulun henga jong, Naphtali henga jong thusep asolin; chuin amaho ama kimutopi din ahung touvun ahi." 
Judges6:36 Chuin Gideon'in Pathen henga, Nangman nasei banga kakhutna Israel nahuhdoh dinga ahile," 
Judges6:37 Ven, keiman tollhanga kelngoi mul kakoi ding; daitwi chu kelngoimul chungabou alhah-a, akivela leiset chungchu agotseh-a ahile, nasei banga chu kakhutna Israel nahuhdoh ding ahi tichu kahet ding ahi, ati." 
Judges6:38 Chuin chutichu ahitai. Ajehchu ajing jingkah matah-in athouvin, kelngoimul ho chu achom khomin, atuichu kelngoi mula kona chu ahehlhan ahile, kongkhat adimsetnin ahi." 
Judges6:39 Chuin Gideon'in Pathen henga, Kachunga lunghang hih beh-in, khatvei sehseh bou seikit inge: katao ahi, hiche kelngoi mula hin khatvei patep kit inge; tun kelngoimul chung bouchu gotsah inlang, leiset chung vang daitwi kotsah-in, ati." 
Judges6:40 Chuin Pathen'in hiche janchun hitichun aboltai. Ajehchu kelngoi mul chung bouchu ago-in, leiset chung jouse chu dai akotnin ahi." 
Judges7:1 Chujouvin Jerubbaal, (hichu Gideon ahi,) le aumpi miho jouse chu jingpi tah-in athoudoh-un, Harod twikul panga chun ponbuh asongun; hitichun Midia sepai janel chu asahlam uva Moreh lhang chin phaichama aumun ahi." 
Judges7:2 Chuin Pakaiyin Gideon henga, Akhutnuva Midia mite kapehdohna din nalhonpi miho chu atam behseh uve, achuti loule Israelte kei dounan hoithou vintin, kakhut tah-in eihuhdoh ahi tigetnunte, ati." 
Judges7:3 Hijeh chun tun chenlang mipi ho jahdin gaseiphongin, Koitobang akicha le atijachan chu, Gilead molsanga konhin kinungle loihen, tin ati. Chuin mipi-a konchun mi sangsomni le ni akinunglen, sangsom aum denun ahi." 
Judges7:4 Chuin Pakaiyin Gideon henga, Mipi hohi atam behseh nalaijui; Amaho hi twiphunga puilhan, chukoma chu keiman nangma-a dingin kapatep ding ahi. Chule hitiding ahi, keiman, Amahi nangma toh lhonkhom ding ahi katichan chu nangma toh lhonkhom ding; chule koi hijongle nahenga, Amahi nangma toh lhonkhom louding ahi kati chanchun, nangma toh lhonkhom louding ahi, ati." 
Judges7:5 Hitichun aman mipi ho chu twiphunga apuilhan ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin Gideon henga, Koihile uicha banga twi chu aleija letho chanchu achoma nakhendoh ding, chutobang ma-a chu akhupma bohkhupma donho jong nakhendoh ding ahi, ati." 
Judges7:6 Chuin akama akhut koija letho ho jouse chu jathum ahiuvin; mipi adangse vangchu akhupma dilsua dontho ho ahiuve. 
Judges7:7 Chuin Pakaiyin Gideon henga, Ale-tho mi jathum hochu mangcha-a nangma kahuh hinga, Midia te chu nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahi. Adangse vangchu ama ama muncheh-a chetaohen," 
Judges7:8 Hitichun mihon aneh dingu le asumkon cheh-u akhutnuva akichoijun ahi. Chuin aman Israel dangse chu amitakip aponbuh cheh-a asolin, hiche mi jathum ho chu aumdensah-in ahi: chule Midia mipi janel chu ama noija phaichama chun aumun ahi." 
Judges7:9 Chuin hiche jan mama chun ahung hitin ahi, Pakaiyin ahengah, Thoudoh-in, mipi janel lah-a khun chesuh-in; ajehchu nakhutna kapehdoh" 
Judges7:10 Amavang chesuh ding nakichatle, nasohpa Purah kilhonpin lang janel lah-a chun chesuh-in;" 
Judges7:11 Chule amahon ipi aseijiu nagajah ding ahin, chutengle mipi janel henga chesuhna dinga nakhut chu suhhatna umding ahitai, ati. Chujouvin ama asohpa Purah toh mipi janelho lah-a sepai manchah choiho umna china chun aga chesuh lhonin ahi." 
Judges7:12 Chule Midia miho, Amalek miho, chule solam chate mipi ho chu khaokhote banga tamin phaicham lhonlhunga aumun; chule asangongsao houchu simsenglou, twikhanglen panga neldi banga tam ahi." 
Judges7:13 Chuin Gideon ahung phatnin, veuvin, chukoma chun mikhatnin agolpa koma amang aseijin, hitin ati, Ngaijin, keiman mang khat kamatnin, ven, Midia mipi janel lah-a butunna kisem changlhah pheng ahung kilih lutnin, ponbuh geijin ahung lutnin, hichun ahinse-a ahileh asuchimtan, akilehkhup min, athalin akijamtai, ati." 
Judges7:14 Chuin aloipan adonbutnin, Hichu Israel mikhat Joash chapa Gideon chemjam tilou imadang hiponte. Ajehchu Pathen'in akhutna Midia te le mipi janel hi apehdoh ahitai ati." 
Judges7:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, Gideon'in mang kisei le aledohna kisei chu ajah phatnin, Pathen ahouvin, Israel mipi ho lah-a akinunglen, hitin aseije, Thouvun, ajehchu Pakaiyin nakhut uva Midia mipi janel chu apedohtai, ati." 
Judges7:16 Chuin aman mi jathum chu loithumin akhenin, akhutcheh uva sumkon khatcheh apen, chule leibel keu khatcheh, asunga thaomei kikoi leibel keu khatcheh toh apen ahi." 
Judges7:17 Chuin aman ahenguva, keima neiveuvin lang, kabol bang bangin bollun. Chule veuvin, keima ngahmun pam kahung lhun tengle hung hitiding ahi, keima bol bangbang chu nabol cheh dingu ahi." 
Judges7:18 Keima le kaumpi jousen sumkon kamut tengule, nanghon jong ngahmun jouse pang tinna sumkon namut uva, Pakai le Gideon chemjam, nati diu ahi, ati." 
Judges7:19 Hitichun jan khangkim kipat tah-in Gideon le aumpi mi jakhat chu gebuh pam chu ahung lhungun, amaho chu ngahtup ana kikhel jou pettah-u ahin; chuin amahon sumkon amutnun, akhutnuva leibel keuho chu avokeh uvin ahi." 
Judges7:20 Chule loithumho chun asumkonnu chu amutnun, bel homho jong chu asukeh un, akhut veijun meivah ho chu adomun, akhut jetna sumkon tuh in amutnun, chuin Pakai le Gideon chemjam tin a-ao taovin, ahi." 
Judges7:21 Chuin ngahphol kimvella chun amitakip adinna cheh uva adingun ahi. Chuin janel chu alhaijun, hatah in apengun ajammang taovin ahi." 
Judges7:22 Chuin loithumho chun asumkonu amutnun ahile, Pakaiyin mitin chemjam chu aloipa chunga achuhsah-in, mipi janel pumpi lah ngeija chun; chuin mipi janel chu Zererath'a mun'a um Beth-shittah lama le, Tabbath lama Abel-meholah gamgi geijin ajamtaovin ahi." 
Judges7:23 Chuin Israel mijouse chu Naphtali'a kon, Asher akon, Manasseh'a konin akikhomun, Midia miho chu anung delun ahi." 
Judges7:24 Chuin Gideon'in Ephraim molsang jouse-a thusep asolin, ahenguva, Midia mite doudin hungsuh un, chule amaho masanga konin Bethbarah le Jordan geijin atwi neh-u chu lahpeh-un, atin ahi. Chujouvin Ephraim mijouse chu akikhom khomun, Bethbarah le Jordan geijin amaho-a konin atwi neh-u chu alah peh-un ahi." 
Judges7:25 Chule amahon Midia mite leng chapa ni Oreb le Zeeb chu amanun; chuin amahon Oreb chu Oreb song chunga athatnun, chule Zeeb chu Zeeb lengpiga chilna-a athatnun, Midia te chu anungdelun, Oreb le Zeeb luchang chu Jordan gallanga Gideon henga ahinpouvin ahi." 
Judges8:1 Chule Ephraim mihon ahenga, ibola nangin keiho neihiti bol uva, Midia mite toh kisatna nacheuva chu neikou louvu ham? atiuvin amachu nasatah-in ahouseuvin ahi." 
Judges8:2 Chuin aman amaho henga, Nang hotoh tekah dinga tu-a keiman ipi kabol em? Abiezer theichang ga lokhom sanga Ephraim lengpiga lokhom chu phajo louham?" 
Judges8:3 Pathen'in nakhut uva Midia leng chapa teni Oreb le Zeeb chu apedoh tan: keiman nang hotoh tekah dinga ipi katoh jouding ham? atin ahi. Chuin chuche aseiphatnin ama chunga lunghan nau chu adailhatan ahi. 
Judges8:4 Chuin Gideon Jordan'a ahungin, apalgalkai paijin, amale alhonpi mi jathum chu amaho nungdel nan alhadah taovin ahi." 
Judges8:5 Chuin aman Succoth miho henga, Naheng uva katao ahi, kanung juija miho hi changlhah peovin, ajehchu amaho alhadah taove, chule keiman Midia leng teni Zebah le Zalmunna nung kadel ahi, ati." 
Judges8:6 Chuin Succoth leng chapate chun, Zebah le Zalmunna khutchu nakhutna umbeh hita-a, keihon nasepai ho chu changlhah kapeh dingu ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Judges8:7 Chuin Gideon'in, Hiche jeh-a chu Pakaiyin Zebah le Zalmunna kakhutna eipehdoh phatle, keiman gamthipma lingho le khaogui lingneiho-a naphe-u kabotel ding ahi, ati." 
Judges8:8 Chuin ama Penuel geijin achepeh-in, hitobangma chun ahenguva aseijin; chule Penuel'a um miho jongchun, Succoth mihon adonbutna bangu chun anadonbutnun ahi." 
Judges8:9 Chuin aman Penuel miho henga aseijin, Lungmonga kahungkit tengle, hiche insanghi kasuhchim ding ahi, atin ahi." 
Judges8:10 Tun Zebah le Zalmunna chu Karkor munna aumlhonin, chule aumpi miho chu sangsom le sangnga ahiuvin, abonuva chu solam chate janel hon lah-a amoh ngen ahiuve. Ajehchu chemjam lamthei cheh mi sangjakhat le sangsomni athiuvin ahi." 
Judges8:11 Chuin Gideon Nabah le Jogbehah solam sanga chengho ponbuh lampia chun achetouvin, chule janel chu aban tha gamin ahi: ajehchu amaho mongtah-a umuva ahi." 
Judges8:12 Chuin Zebah le Zalmunna ajam phatnin, aman anung delin, chule Midia lengteni Zebah le Zalmunna chu amanin, janel pumpi chu amaimoh sahtan ahi." 
Judges8:13 Chuin Joash chapa Gideon chu nisa sodoh masangin galmuna konin ahung kinungle tan ahi. 
Judges8:14 Chuin Succoth mi golhang khat amanin, adongin ahile, amapan Succoth leng chapateho le, a-upahou mi somsagi le sagi geijin phatechan ahiltai." 
Judges8:15 Chuin Succoth miho henga chun ahungin, chule ajah uva, Veuvin Zebah le Zalmunna, Tu-a hi nakhutna Zebah le Zalmunna khut chu umbeh hija, namite lhasamho chu changlhah kapeh diuham? tia neitaitom nao chu, atin ahi." 
Judges8:16 Chuin aman khopi-a upaho chu amanin, gamthipma lingle khaogui lingnei chu alan, hicheho-a chun Succoth miho chu ahiltan ahi." 
Judges8:17 Chule Penuel insang chu asuhchimin, khopi-a miho chu athatnin ahi." 
Judges8:18 Chujouvin Zebah le Zalmunna henga, Tabor munna nathaho chu itobang mi hiuvem, atin ahi. Chuin amanin, Amaho chu nangma tobang ahiuvin, amitakip leng chapate tobang cheh ahiuve, tin adonbut lhone." 
Judges8:19 Chuin aman, Amaho chu kasopite ahiuvin, kanu chapa ngen ahiuve: Pakai ahin jing bangin, nangman amaho chu nana hinghoi hile, keiman nangni hi kathalhon louding nahi, ati." 
Judges8:20 Chuin aman achapa masapen Jether henga, Kipatdoh inlang amani hi thatnin, ati. Ahinla gollhang chun achem adohdohpoi: ajehchu ama chapang nalai ahijeh-in akichan ahi." 
Judges8:21 Chujouvin Zebah le Zalmunna'in, Nangma kipat inlang kachung lhonna hung chun; ajehchu mi ahi dungjuija, athahat jong umding ahi, atilhone. Chuin Gideon akipat doh-in, Zebah le Zalmunna chu athatnin, chule a-sangongsao ngonga um kijepnaho chu alan, ahi." 
Judges8:22 Chujouchun Israel mihon Gideon henga, Nangmale nachate, chule natute geijin kachunguva vaihomin. Ajehchu nangman Media miho-a konin neihuhdoh uvin ahi, atiuve." 
Judges8:23 Chuin Gideon'in amaho henga, Keima kahin, kachate ahiuvin jong nangho chunga vai kahomlou dingu ahi; Pakaiyin nangho chunga vai ahom ding ahi, ati." 
Judges8:24 Chuin Gideon amaho henga, Keiman nangho henga ngehnom khat kaneije, mijousen agalthil chomuva kona bilba ho jouse chu keima neipeuvin, ati (Ajehchu amahon sana bilba aneiju ahi; ajehchu amaho Ishmael mi hiuva ahi)." 
Judges8:25 Chuin amahon adonbutnun, Keihon hicheho chu kipahtah-in peuvinge, atiuve. Chuin amahon pon aphaovin, ami takipmin gal thila kichomdoh bilba hochu asepkhom taovin ahi." 
Judges8:26 Chuin aman athum sana bilbaho chu sana shekel sangkhat toh jasagi in agih-in; hicheho lah-a chu Midia lengho kivon na ngong'o, ponsandup ho, chule sangongsao hon angonguva aki-o'u khivuiho kisimtha lou ahi." 
Judges8:27 Chuin Gideon'in thempu boitong sangkhol khat asemin, hichu ama khopi Ophrah ngeija akoijin ahi. Chuin Israelte jousen chukom mun'a chun acheuvin, noti'n apangun; hiche chu Gideon le a-insungmite dingin thang ahung sohtan ahi." 
Judges8:28 Hitichun Midia te chun kiletsahna-a aluchangu aputkit louna dingun Israel chate masanga suhnemin aumtan ahi. Chule Gideon nikho sungin gamsung chu kum somli mongtah-in aumtan ahi. 
Judges8:29 Chuin Joash chapa Jerubbaal achen, a-in'a agachengtan ahi." 
Judges8:30 Chule Gideon ama laigila kon chapa somsagi ahingin ahi. Ajehchu aman ji tamtah anei ahi. 
Judges8:31 Chule Shechem'a cheng athaikemnu jongchun chapa khat ahinpeh-in, amin Abimelech asah-in ahi." 
Judges8:32 Chuin Joash chapa Gideon chu tehkem setnin athitan, Abiezer mite umna Ophrah mun'a um apa Joash vuikhuh-a chun avuitaovin ahi." 
Judges8:33 Chuin ahitin ahi, Gideon athi joujou chun, Israel chate chu akilehei kitnun, chule Baal henga noti chonin achon kitnun, Baal-berith chu a-pathen diuvin akisemuvin ahi." 
Judges8:34 Chule Israel chate amun jouse-a agaltehou khutna kona amaho huhdoh-a Pakai a-Pathen'u chu ageldoh tapouve. 
Judges8:35 Chule Israelte anamusah phatna jouse dungjuijin jong, Gideon kiti Jerubbaal insung miho henga jong khotona amusah pouvin ahi." 
Judges9:1 Chuin Jerubbaal chapa Abimelech chu Shechem'a anu sopite henga achen, amaho akihoupin, anu pa le a-insungmi jouse henga hitin aseije," 
Judges9:2 Katao ahi, Shechem'a cheng mijouse jah dingin seijun, Jerubbaal chapate somsagi chun nangho chunga vai ahom chu phajo-am, ahiloule mikhatnin nachung uva vai ahom chu phajo em? Keimahi nagu-u leh naphe-u kahi tijong geldoh-un, ati." 
Judges9:3 Chuin anu sopiho jousen Shechem'a cheng mijouse jah-a ama chungchanga hiche thu jouse chu aseijun ahile; alungun Abimelech nung juidingin aumtaove; ajehchu amahon, Amahi isopiu ahi, atiuve." 
Judges9:4 Chuin amahon Baal-berith in'a konin dangka somsagi apeuvin, hiche-a chun Abimelech'in pannabei le thulahlou miho agoijin, amahon anung ajuijun ahi." 
Judges9:5 Chuin ama apa in Ophrah'ah achen, asopiho Jerubbaal chapate somsagi chu song khat chunga athatnin ahi. Jerubbaal chapa aneopen Jotham vangchu ahing hoijin ahi; ajehchu ama kisela ahi." 
Judges9:6 Chuin Shechem miho jousele Millo insungmi jouse akikhomun, acheuvin, Abimelech chu Shechem'a um khompi phaichama chun lengin atungtaovin ahi." 
Judges9:7 Chuin hichu Jotham aseipeh phatnun, ama achen Gerizim molvum'a adingin, aw sangtah-in asamin, amaho henga, Shechem'a um mihon, Pathen'in nathuseiju angainadin, keima thusei hi ngaijun." 
Judges9:8 Khatvei chu thingphung ho achunguva leng changding thao nu dingin achedoh-un; Olive thingjeh-a, Kachung uvah vaipon pangin atiuvin ahi." 
Judges9:9 Ahinla Olive thing chun ahenguva, Mihem le Pathen jabolna kineiji kathao hi kadalhah-a, thingphung ho chunga dopsanga umdinga kache dingham? ati." 
Judges9:10 Chuin thingho chun theichang thing henga, Nangma hungin lang kachunguva vai hungpon atiuve." 
Judges9:11 Ahinla theichang thing chun ahenguvah, Keiman kalhum na leh kaga phatah hi kadalhah-a, thingphung ho chunga dopsanga umdinga kache dingham? ati." 
Judges9:12 Chujou phatnin thingho chun lengpigui henga, Nangma hungin lang kachunguva vai hungpon atiuve." 
Judges9:13 Chuin lengpigui chun ahenguva, Mihem le Pathen kipasah ka ju hi kadalhah-a, thingphung ho chunga dopsanga umdinga kache dingham? ati." 
Judges9:14 Chujou phatnin thing jouse chun theimi koma, Nangma hungin lang kachunguva vai hungpon, atiuve." 
Judges9:15 Chuin theimi chun thingho henga, Nanghon tahbeh-a nachung uva leng hidinga thao neinu uva ahileh, hungun lang natahsan naochu kalim'a hung ngam uvin: achuti louva ahile, theimi-a konhin mei hungpot doh henlang, Lebenon'a cedar thingho hi hung kavam hen, ati." 
Judges9:16 Hiche jehchun tun, dihtahle lung thengsela Abimelech chu lenga nalhenu ahi-a, Jerubbaal le a-insung mite chunga phatecha nabolu ahi-a, chule akhutna achandinga kilom dungjuija achunga natong nahiuva ahile," 
Judges9:17 (Ajehchu kapan nangho dinga gal asatna, ahinkho set toh dinga aphala, Midia miho khutna kona nahuh doh-u ahin;" 
Judges9:18 Ahinla nanghon tunin kapa le a-insung mite dounan nakipat doh-un, achapate mi somsagi chu song khat chunga nathatnun, chule asohnu chapa Abimelech chu nasopiu ahijeh-in Shechem miho chunga lengin nasemun ahi.)" 
Judges9:19 Tunia hi nanghon Jerubbaal le a-insung mite chunga kitah tahle lunggiltah-a natong nahi vangule, nangho Abimelech chunga kipah unlang, amajong nangho chunga kipahhen."
