Judges9:20 Amavang chuti ahi louva ahileh, Abimelech'a konin mei hungdoh henlang, Shechem miho le Millo insung chu kavamhen; chule Shechem mihole Millo insunga konin mei hungdoh henlang, Abimelech chu kavamhen, ati." 
Judges9:21 Chuin Jotham alhaijin, ajam mangin, Beer kho-a achen, asopipa Abimelech agin jeh-in chuachun achengtai." 
Judges9:22 Israelte chunga Abimelech'in kumthum vai apoh jouvin," 
Judges9:23 Pathen'in Abimelech le Shechem miho kikah-a lhagao phalou ahinsolin; chule Shechem miho chun Abimelech chu lungthim kitahloutah-in abolun: 
Judges9:24 Hichu gilou tah-a anabolu Jerubbaal chate mi somsagi ho phu chu achunguva achuh theina dingle, athisannu phu chu athatnuva pang asopipau Abimelech chunga achuh-a; chule asopihou thana dinga kithopi-a Shechem miho chunga achuh theina dinga chuti ahi." 
Judges9:25 Chuin Shechem miho chun molchunga ama changlhi ding akoijun, chule amahon chuche lampia amaho hinhopa jouse chu achomun: chule hiche thu chu Abimelech henga akiseipeh tan ahi." 
Judges9:26 Chuin Ebed chapa Gaal chu asopihotoh ahungin, Shechem agalkaijun; chule Shechem miho chun ama chu atahsanun ahi." 
Judges9:27 Chuin amaho loujaova apotdoh-un, alengpi theihou chu alohkhomun, achilun, kipa golnop abolun, chule a-pathen'u in'a alutnun, aneuvin, adonnun, chule Abimelech chu agaosap uvin ahi." 
Judges9:28 Chuin Ebed chapa Gaal'in, Abimelech chu koi hija, chule Shechem chu koi hija, eihon ama ijendiu ham? Amachu Jerubbaal chapa hilouham? Chule avaipo chu Zebul hilou ham? Shechem pa Hamor miho chu jenuvin: ajehchu ipidinga ama ijendingu ham?" 
Judges9:29 Chule amahohi Pathen'in kakhutnoija aumsah hile, keiman Abimelech kalahdoh ding ahi, ati. Chuin aman Abimelech henga, Nagalsat mi supungin lang, hung doh-in, ati." 
Judges9:30 Chuin khopi vaipo Zebul chun Ebed chapa Gaal thusei ajah phatnin, alunghan akongjah tan ahi." 
Judges9:31 Chuin aman Abimelech henga guhthimin thupo asolin, ajah-a, Ven, Ebed chapa Gaal le asopiho Shechem'a ahungun; chule vetemin, amahon nangma dounan khopi kul akai taove." 
Judges9:32 Hijeh chun tun nangma naumpi nasopi ho toh jan-in kipat unlang, loujaova chang lhiuvin;" 
Judges9:33 Chule hitiding ahi, jingkah-a nisa ahungso sole, nangma jingpitah-in thoudoh inlang, khopi chu nokhumin: chule ven, amale aumpiho nang douna ahung tengule, nangman aphat namu dungjuija achunguva na natohding ahi, ati." 
Judges9:34 Chuin Abimelech aumpiho toh jannin athouvun, chule loi li akiso-un Shechem douna-in achang pangun ahi." 
Judges9:35 Chuin Ebed chapa Gaal apotdoh-in, khopi lutna kotpi-a chun adingin; chule Abimelech le aumpiho chu akisel naova konin ahungpot doh-un ahi." 
Judges9:36 Chuin Gaal'in miho chu amuphatnin, Zebul henga, Ven mipikhu molsang chunga konin miho ahungsuh uve, ati. Chuin Zebul'in ahenga, Molsang le-lim ho chu nangin mi-a namu hinte, atin ahi." 
Judges9:37 Chuin Gaal'in aseikitnin, Ven, lampia gamsung kimlai tah-a konin miho ahung suh-in, chule loi dangjong Meonemin phaicham ahunge ati." 
Judges9:38 Hichun Zebul'in ahenga, Abimelech chu koi hija, amachu ijen diuham? tia nathuseina nakam chu tu-a hoilama um hitam? Hiche mihohi hilou ham nangin nataitom chu? Katao ahi, potdoh inlang, gakisatpin ati." 
Judges9:39 Chuin Gaal chu Shechem miho masanga achedoh-in, Abimelech akisatpi tai." 
Judges9:40 Chuin Abimelech'in ama chu adelin ahile, ama masanga ajamtan; kotpi lutna geijin mi tamtah alhun, akitongkhan ahi." 
Judges9:41 Chuin Abimelech Arumah'a achengtai. Chule Zebul'in Gaal leh asopiho chu Shechem'a achen nalou diuvin anomangin ahi. 
Judges9:42 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, mipi chu lou jaova apotdoh-un; hichu Abimelech aseipeh taovin ahi." 
Judges9:43 Chuin aman mipi chu akipuijin, hopthum in ahomin, loujaova chun achang pangun, chule aveovin ahile, veuvin, mipi ho chu khopi-a kona ahungdoh-un; chuin amaho dounan akipatdoh-in, amaho chu athat tai." 
Judges9:44 Chuin Abimelech le aumpiho chu amasang lamuva alhaijun, khopi lutna kotpi-a chun adingun; adang loini chun loujaova umho chu anokhumun, athatgam taovin ahi." 
Judges9:45 Chuin Abimelech'in nilhum keijin khopi chu akisatpin; chule khopi chu alan, asunga cheng jouse chu athatnin, khopi chu asuchimin, asugoi selin ahi." 
Judges9:46 Chuin Shechem daivei insanga umhon hichu ajah phatnun, Berith pathen in'a kohomsung khatna alut taove." 
Judges9:47 Chuin Shechem daivei insanga um mijouse akikhom khomtai tichu Abimelech ahil taovin ahi. 
Judges9:48 Chuin Abimelech ama le aumpi mijousetoh Zalmon molsanga akaldoh-un; chule Abimelech'in akhutna heicha akichoijin, thinga konin abah alhamlhan, hichu alan, alenga apun, chule aumpiho henga chun, Ipi kabol namu bangun, kino uvin, kabol bang banghin bolun, ati." 
Judges9:49 Chuin mipi jouse chun Abimelech bol bang chun athingbah ding cheh-u alham lhaovin, Abimelech nung ajuijun, kohoma chun akoijun, achunguva kohom chu ahal khumun; hitichun Shechem daivei insanga umho jong chu athi taovin, amaho chu numei le pasal sangkhat tobang ahiuve." 
Judges9:50 Chujouvin Abimelech chu Thebez'ah achen, chule Thebez kho dounan gebuh agasongin, ahin latan ahi." 
Judges9:51 Ahinla khopi sunga chun daivei insang dettah khat aumin, hiche sunga chun numei le pasal, chule khopi sunga um mijouse chu akikha khumun; kul chunga chun ahung kaldoh-un ahi." 
Judges9:52 Chuin Abimelech insanga chun ahungin, ahung satnin, meija hal dingin insang kotphung lama ahungin ahi." 
Judges9:53 Chuin numei khatnin sumheisong halkhatnin Abimelech luchang ahinsepmin, alugu asepkeh tan ahi." 
Judges9:54 Hichun aman agalvonpo gollhangpa chu gangtah-in akouvin, ahenga, Mihon numei tha ahi eiti lounadin nachemjam satdoh inlang neithatnin ati. Chuin gollhangpa chun asunpaijin ama athitai." 
Judges9:55 Chuin Israel miho chun Abimelech athi amuphatnuvin, amitakip ama mun cheh-a achetauve." 
Judges9:56 Hitichun Pathen'in Abimelech'in asopi somsagi atha-a, apa chunga akhansetna jouse chu alethuh tan ahi." 
Judges9:57 Chule Shechem miho thilse bol jouse chu Pathen'in aluchung uva akhuhpeh-in; chule achunguva Jerubbaal chapa Jotham sapsetna chu ahung lhungtan ahi. 
Judges10:1 Chuin Abimelech nungin Issachar mi Dodo chapa, Pu-ah chaoa, Tolla chu Israel huhdohdin ahung kipatdoh-in; chule amachu Ephraim molsanga um Shamir kho-a cheng ahi." 
Judges10:2 Chuin aman kum somni le kumthum Israelte thu atanin, chuin athin, Shamir'a akivuijin ahi." 
Judges10:3 Chuin ama nungin Gilead mi Jair ahung kipatdoh-in, kum somni le kumni Israelte thu atanin ahi." 
Judges10:4 Chule aman sanganchal chunga toucheh chapa somthum aneijin, chule amahon khopi somthum aneijun, tunichan geihin Havoth-jair akitin, hicheho chu Gilead gamsunga um ahi." 
Judges10:5 Chuin Jair athin, chule Camon'a akivuitan ahi." 
Judges10:6 Chuin Israel chate chun Pakai masanga thil gilou abolkit taovin, Baal le Ashtaroth, chule Syria pathenho, Zion pathenho, Moab pathenho, Ammon chate pathenho, chule Philistine te pathenho ajenun, Pakai chu adalhaovin, amachu jenjong ajen pouvin ahi." 
Judges10:7 Chuin Pakai lunghana chu Israelte chunga asoudoh tan, chule aman Philistine te khut le Ammon chate khutna ajoh dohtan ahi." 
Judges10:8 Chuin hiche kum-a patchun amahon Israel chate, Jordan gala um Amor mite gam Gilead'a um Israel chate jouse chu kum somle kumget sung asugentheijun, anoijuva akun sah-un ahi." 
Judges10:9 Chukalvalin Ammon chate chu Judah douna le, Benjamin douna, chule Ephraim insungmi douna kisatpi dingin Jordan agalkaijun; hitichun Israel ahesoh lheh jengtan ahi." 
Judges10:10 Chuin Israel chate chu Pakai henga apengun, Nangma dounan kachonse taove, ajehchu ka Pathen'u kadalhaovin, Baal jeng kahoutaovin ahi, atiuve." 
Judges10:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel chate henga, Keiman nangho Egypt mite-a kona, Amor mite-a kona, Ammon chate-a kon, chule Philistine te-a kona kahuhdoh nahilouvu ham?" 
Judges10:12 Zidon miten jong, Amalek mite, chule Maon miten nasuh gentheijuvin; chuin kahenga natao ule, amaho khutna konin kahuhdoh-un ahi." 
Judges10:13 Ahijeng vangin nanghon keima neidalhaovin, pathen dangho najenun ahi; hijeh chun keiman nangho nahuhdoh kit tapouvinge." 
Judges10:14 Cheovinlang nanghon nakilhenu pathenho henga chun gakap taovin; amaho chun nangho nahesoh genthei naova konin nahuhdoh-u hen, ati." 
Judges10:15 Chuin Israel chate chun Pakai henga, Keiho kachonse taove. Nangman pha nasah dungjuijin kachunguva boljengin; kataovu ahi, tuni hin nei huhdoh pou pouvun, atiuve." 
Judges10:16 Chuin amahon alah uva konin gamdang pathenho chu apaimangun, Pakai chu ajen taove. Chuin Israelte gim gentheina chu athohjou tapon ahi." 
Judges10:17 Chujouchun Ammon chate akikhom khomun, Gilead'a gebuh asongtaove. Chule Israel chate jong akikhom khomun, Mizpeh'a gebuh asongtaovin ahi." 
Judges10:18 Chuin Gilead leng chapatele miho chu khatle khat akihouvun, Ammon chate douna kisatpi dinga hung kipandoh ding chu itobang mi ham? Ama chu Gilead gama chengho jouse lamkaija pang ding ahi, atiuve." 
Judges11:1 Tun Gilead mi Jephthah chu mihat hangsantah ahin, amahi noti chapa ahin; chule Gilead'in Jephthah ahingin ahi." 
Judges11:2 Chule Gilead jinu chun chapate ahingin; chule ajinu chapate chu ahungkhang lennun, amahon Jephthah chu anomangun, ahenga, Nangman kapao in nalo louding ahi; ajehchu nangma hetlou numei cha nahi, atiuve." 
Judges11:3 Chujouvin asopiho-a konin Jephthah ajamangin, Tob gama agachengtai. Chuin pannabei miho Jephthah toh akiloijun, amatoh michomin ache jiuvin ahi." 
Judges11:4 Chujou chomkhat jouvin ahung hitin ahi, Ammon chate chun Israel chunga gal ahin bolun ahi." 
Judges11:5 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ammon chaten Israel chunga gal abol phatnun, Gilead upaho chu Tob gama kona Jephthah puidoh dingin achedoh taove." 
Judges11:6 Chuin amahon Jephthah henga, Hungin, Ammon chate toh ikisat theina dingun, keiho gal lamkaijin hung pangin, atiuve." 
Judges11:7 Chuin Jephthah'in Gilead upaho henga, Nanghon neihot uva, Kapa in'a kona neikai doh-u hilou ham? Chule ibola tu-a hi nagenthei phatnuva kahenga hunga nahiuvem? ati." 
Judges11:8 Chuin Gilead upaho chun Jephthah henga, Hiche jeh-a chu Ammon chateho toh kisat dinga nangma keiho to nalhona, chule Gilead'a chengho jouse chunga kalamkai uva napana dinga, nahenga hung kihei kit kahiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Judges11:9 Chuin Jephthah'in Gilead upaho henga, Ammon chate satdinga in'a neipui kitnuva, chule Pakaiyin amaho chu ka angsunga eipehdoh-a ahile, keima nalamkai uva kapan mongding ham? ati." 
Judges11:10 Chuin Gilead upahon Jephthah henga, Nathu sei banga kabol lou uleh, Pakai chu ikah uva ahetoh hihen, atiuve." 
Judges11:11 Chuin Jephthah Gilead upaho toh alhonin, chule miho chun amachu achunguva vaipo dingle alamkai diuvin asemun; chule Jephthah'in hicheng thu jousehi Mizpah mun'a Pakai angsunga asei ahi." 
Judges11:12 Chuin Jephthah'in Ammon chate lengpa henga thupo ho asolin, ajah-a, Nangman keima ilo ding neiti-a, kagam sunga keima douva kisatpi dinga hunga nahim? atin ahi." 
Judges11:13 Chuin Ammon chate lengpan Jephthah thupo ho chu adonbutnin, Israel ten Egypt gama ahungdoh laijuva kagam'u Arnon'a kona Jabbok, chule Jordan geija alo jeh-u ahi: hijeh chun tun hiche gamho chu kicham delin neilepeh kit taovin, atin ahi." 
Judges11:14 Chuin Jephthah in Ammon chate lengpa henga thusep mi asol kitnin: 
Judges11:15 Ahenga, Jephthah'in hitihin aseije, Israel'in Moab gam alahpeh pouvin, chule Ammon chate gam jong alahmang peh pouvin ahi." 
Judges11:16 Ahin Israel Egypt'a kona ahungdoh-u chun, twipisan geijin gamthip gam ahin jotnun, chule Kadesh ahung lhungun ahi." 
Judges11:17 Chuin Israel'in Edom lengpa henga thusep asolin, Nahenga katao ahi, nagamsung neijot galkai sah-in, atin; ahinla Edom lengpan angaipeh pon ahi. Chuin hiche bangma chun Moab lengpa henga thusep asolkitnin; ahin aman jong anoppeh dehpoi. Hijeh chun Israel Kadesh'a aumdentai." 
Judges11:18 Chujouvin amahon gamthip lah ahin jotnun, Edom gam le Moab gam chu avelkolun, Moab gam solam sanga ahungun, Arnon gal lampanga gebuh asaovin, ahivangin Moab gam gamgi sunga ahunglut pouvin ahi. Ajehchu Arnon hi Moab gamgi ahi." 
Judges11:19 Chuin Israel'in Amor mite lengpa, Heshbon lengpa Sihon henga thusep asolin, chule Israel'in ahenga, Nahenga katao ahi, kagam kalut theina dingin, nagam chu neipal galkaisah-in, ati." 
Judges11:20 Ahin Sihon'in agamsung pal galkai ding chun Israel chu atahsan pon: ahivangin Silhon'in amiteho jouse akhom khomin, Jahaz'a gebuh asongun, chule Israel akisatpi tan ahi." 
Judges11:21 Ahivangin Pakai Israel Pathen'in Shihon le amite jouse chu Israel khutna apedoh tan, chuin amahon amaho chu athatnuvin ahi. Hitichun Israel'in chuche gama cheng Amor mite gam jouse chu alo taovin ahi." 
Judges11:22 Chuin amahon Arnon'a kon Jabbok geijin jong, chule gamthip gama kon Jordan geijin Amor mite gamsung chu alo taovin ahi." 
Judges11:23 Hitichun tun Israel Pakai Pathen'in Amor mite chu amite Israel masanga konchun anodoh ahitan; nangman hichu nalo dingham? 
Judges11:24 Nangman na-pathen Chemosh'in nalo dinga napeh chu nalo louding ham? Hijeh chun Pakai ka Pathen'un kamasanguva kona adeldoh hou gamsung chu kalo dingu ahi. 
Judges11:25 Chule tu-a hi nangho Moab leng Zippor chapa Balak sanga phajo nahiuvem? Aman Israel douna kiphin kha-em? Ahiloule amaho akidoupi khah-em? 
Judges11:26 Israel chu Heshbon le akholenho, Arnon le akholenho, Aroer le akholenho, chule Arnon panga khopiho jouse-a kum jathum achen laija chu? Chuche phat sunga chu ibola ana kinunglah kitlou nahim?" 
Judges11:27 Hijeh chun keima nangma dounan kachonsepoi, nangman keima neidouhi kachunga dihlou joh nahi. Thutan Pakai chun tunikho hin Israel chate le Ammon chate kikah-a thu tanhen, ati." 
Judges11:28 Ahivangin Ammon chate lengpan Jephthah'in ahin misol ahinsola thu asei chu ngaipeh-in aneipon ahi. 
Judges11:29 Chujouvin Pakai Lhagao chu Jephthah chunga achun, chule ama Gilead le Manasseh agalkaijin, Gilead gama Mizpeh agalkaijin, chule Mizpeh'a um Gilead gama Mizpeh'a konin Ammon chate umnalam ajonin ahi." 
Judges11:30 Chuin Jephthah'in Pakai henga kihahsel na-in akihahselin, chule hitin aseije, Nangman Ammon chate chu kakhutna thonlouva neipehdoh-a ahile," 
Judges11:31 Hitiding ahi, Ammon chate-a kona lungmonga kahung kilekit tengle, eikimutopi dinga kakotna kona hungpotdoh masapen chu thonlouva Pakaiya hiding, chule keiman govam thilto-a katoding ahi, ati." 
Judges11:32 Hitichun Jephthah chu Ammon mite satdingin ahenglam uva achen; chule Pakaiyin amaho chu akhutna apedoh tan ahi. 
Judges11:33 Chuin aman amaho chu Aroer'a kipat in Minnith changeijin athatpeh-in, khopi somnijen, chule lengpilei phaicham geijin hathan athattan ahi. Hitichun Ammon chate chu Israel chate masanga suhnemin aumun ahi." 
Judges11:34 Chuin Jephthah Mizpeh kho-a a-in'a ahungin ahile, veuvin, achanu ama kimupi din khongcha beng pumle lam pumin ahungdoh-in ahi. Amahi chanu changkhat seh ahin; amanu tailou hi chapa le chanu dang aneilou ahi." 
Judges11:35 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman amanu amuphatnin, apon abotkeh-in, Kaden Kachanu! nangman keima neisunem lheh-in, chule nangma hi eisugimho lah-a khat nahitai. Ajehchu keima Pakai henga kana kamkatan, chule kih theilou ding kahitai, ati." 
Judges11:36 Chuin amanun ahenga, Hepa, nangman Pakai henga nakam nanakat ahitah-a ahile, nangman nakama nana phondoh bangbang chun kachunga boltan; ajehchu Pakaiyin nagalmite Ammon chate chunga phu nalahpeh ahitai, ati." 
Judges11:37 Chuin amanun apa henga, Hichehi keima dingin neibol peh-in, Molsang chung dunga kachesuh kachetouva, kagol hotoh nungah theng kahina pul kagadou nadiuvin, lhani neichang lhan, ati." 
Judges11:38 Chuin aman, Chen, ati. Hitichun aman amanu chu lhani sunga dinga asolmang tan ahi. Chuin amanu aloiho toh achen, molsang chungho-a chun nungah theng ahina pul chu agadou tan ahi." 
Judges11:39 Chuin lhani nungin ahitin ahi, amanu apa henga ahung kinunglen, aman akitepna bangin amanu chunga atongtan: chule amanu pasal to akitimat pon ahi. Chule hichehi Israelte chonna dan ahung hitan," 
Judges11:40 Hitichun Israel chanute chu Gilead mi Jephthah chanu lunghempi nan kumseh leh nili achedoh jiuvin ahi. 
Judges12:1 Chuin Ephraim miho chu akikhom khomun, sahlama acheuvin, Jephthah henga, Ipijeh-a Ammon chate kisatpi dinga nahung galkaija, chule ibola naki lhonpi dinga neikou lou uham? Na inpuma kahal khum dingu nahi, atiuve." 
Judges12:2 Chuin Jephthah ahenguva, Keima le kamite Ammon chateto hatah in kakisat nun, kahinkou laijun akhut uva konin neihuh doh pouve." 
Judges12:3 Chuin neihuhdoh louvu kahet phatnin, kahinkho kaki choithon, Ammon chate kisatpi din kagalkaijin, Pakaiyin amaho chu kakhutna eipehdohtan ahi. Achutile ibola tunia hi keima to kisat dinga nahung kon uham? ati." 
Judges12:4 Chuin Jephthah'in Gilead mihojouse akhomin, Ephraim toh akisat tai. Chule Gilead mihon Ephraim miho chu athat taove; ajehchu amahon, Nangho Gilead mite hi Ephraim'a kona jammang, Ephraim mite le Manasseh mite lah-a kona jam mangho nahiuve, atijiu ahi." 
Judges12:5 Chuin Gilead miho chun Ephraim miho lhun masanga Jordan galkainaho chu ana laovin: chule ahung hitin ahi Ephraim mite ahung jamdoh hochun, nei galkai sah-un ati tengule; Gilead miho chun ahenguva, Nangma Ephraim mi nahim? tin adong jiuvin; amahon, Kahipoi, ati-a ahile," 
Judges12:6 Amahon ahenga, Chuti ahile Shibboleth gah ti-in ati jiuvin: chuteng aman Sibboleth ati jin ahi; ajehchu dihtah-a aseidoh thei jilou ahi. Chuteng amahon amapa chu aman jiuvin, Jordan vadung lampia chun athat jiuvin ahi. Hitichun hiche chunga chun Ephraim chu mi sangsomli le sangni athatnun ahi." 
Judges12:7 Chule Jephthah'in Israelte chunga kumgup thu atanin ahi. Chujouvin Gilead mi Jephthah chu athitan, chule Gilead khopi ho sung khatna akivuitan ahi." 
Judges12:8 Chuin ama nungin Bethlehem'a um Ibzan'in Israelte thu atanin ahi. 
Judges12:9 Chule aman chapa somthum le chanu somthum aneijin, aman hiche achanute chu gamdanga asolin, chule achapate dingchu gamdangmi chanu somthum apuipeh-in ahi. Chule ama Israelte chunga kum sagi thutanin apangin ahi." 
Judges12:10 Chujouvin Ibzan athitan, Bethlehem'a avuitaovin ahi." 
Judges12:11 Chuin amanungin Zebulun mi Elon'in Israel chate thu atanin; chule aman Israelte chunga kumsom thutanin apangin ahi. 
Judges12:12 Chuin Zebulun mi Elon athitan, chule Zebulun gamsunga um Aijalon mun'a akivuitan ahi." 
Judges12:13 Chule amanungin Pirathon mi Hillel chapa Abdon chu Israelte thutanin apangin ahi. 
Judges12:14 Chule aman chapa somli leh tu somthum aneijin, sangan gol somsagi chunga atouvin ahi. Aman Israelte chunga kumget thu anatanin ahi." 
Judges12:15 Chuin Pirathon mi Hillel chapa Abdon athitan, Ephraim gama Amalek mite molsanga um Pirathon munna akivuijin ahi." 
Judges13:1 Chuin Israel chaten Pakai mitmun thilse abolkit taovin ahile, Pakaiyin amaho chu Philistine te khutna kum somli apedohtan ahi." 
Judges13:2 Hichelai chun Zorah kho-a Dan phunga kon Manoah kiti khat anaumin; chule ajinu chu aching ahin, chaneilou ahi." 
Judges13:3 Chuin Pakai vantil chu numeinu henga chun ahung kilah-in, amanu henga, Tun vetemin, nangma achinga nahin, cha nahingpoi; ahinla nangman nao nahinvop ding, chule chapa khat naneiding ahi." 
Judges13:4 Katao ahi, hichejeh chun chingtheijin, ju le khamnathei donhih-in, chule thilthenglou kiti poupou jong nehih-in." 
Judges13:5 Ajehchu vetan, nangma gaijin natin, chapa khat nanei ding; aluchanga samchem kilam louding ahi. Ajehchu naosen chu naobu-a kon Pathen'a dinga Nazir hiding ahi. Chule ama chun Israelte chu Philistinte khutna kona ahuhdoh patding ahi, ati." 
Judges13:6 Chujouvin numeinu chu ahungin ajipa henga, Pathen mi khat kahenga ahungin, amaiso chu Pathen vantil maisotoh abangin, Kichat aumlheh-e; ahinla keiman hoija hungkon nahim tinjong kadongpon, chule aman jong kahenga amin eiseipehpoi:" 
Judges13:7 Ahin aman kahenga, Ven, nangman nao navopding, chapa khat nanei ding ahi; chule nangman tun ju le khamna thei donhih-in, thilthenglou kiti poupou jong nehih-in: ajehchu chapang chu naobu-a kona athini geija Pathen'a dinga Nazir hiding ahi, tin aseije, ati." 
Judges13:8 Chuin Manoah Pakai henga ataovin, hitin aseije, Vo ka pakai, nahinsol Pathen mipa chu kakom lhona hungkit henlang, ahung pengding chapang chunghi ipi katohlhon dingham eihung hil lhonhen, ati." 
Judges13:9 Chuin Pathen'in Manoah aw chu angaipeh-in; amanu loujaova atouna-a Pathen vantil chu amanu henga ahung kitnin; ahinla ajipa Manoah chu amatoh anaumpon ahi. 
Judges13:10 Chuin numeinu chu mangang tah in alhai jel-in, ajipa chu agahilin, ahenga, Ven, nikhat ni-a kahenga hung kilah mipa chu kahenga ahung kilah kitne, agati." 
Judges13:11 Chuin Manoah akipat doh-in, ajinu nung ajuijin, mipa koma chun ahungin, ahenga, Nangma hiche numei to kihouva chu nahim? ati. Chuin aman ahenga, Kahi, ati." 
Judges13:12 Chuin Manoah'in, Tun nathuseiho chu hung guilhung hen. Chapang chu iti kakhou khah lhona, chule achunga ipi kabol lhon dingham? ati." 
Judges13:13 Chuin Pakai vantil chun Manoah henga, Numeinu henga kasei jouse bangchun amanu kichih thei hen." 
Judges13:14 Amanun lengpi guija kona kisem ipi thil hijongle nehda hen, chule ju le khamnathei jong dondahen, chule thilthenglou kiti poupou jong nehdahen: kathupeh jouse chu amanun juihen, ati." 
Judges13:15 Chuin Manoah'in Pakai vantil henga, Nahenga katao ahi, keinin nang dinga kelnou khat kagagot lhon kahsen neiumpeh lhonin, ati." 
Judges13:16 Chuin Pakai vantil chun Manoah henga, Nangman nei khongaisah jongle chun keiman nachanglhah neponge: chule nangman govam thilto nato dinga ahile, Pakai henga nato ding ahi, ati. Ajehchu Manoah'in amachu Pakai vantil ahilam ahetlou ahi." 
Judges13:17 Chuin Manoah'in Pakai vantil henga, Nathusei aguilhun tengle nangma kajolbol theilhon na dingin, namin ipiham neisei peh-in, ati." 
Judges13:18 Chuin Pakai vantil'in ahenga, Akiselguh ahi munasa-a, ibola hitachu kamin neidoh ham? ati." 
Judges13:19 Hitichun Manoah'in kelnou khat chu anneh thilto toh alan, songchung khatna Pakai henga atoh doh-in ahi. Chuin vantil chun kidang tah-in abolin, Manoah le ajinun hichu avelhonin ahi." 
Judges13:20 Ajehchu ahung hitin ahi, meikou chu maichama kona van lama alentou chun, Pakai vantil chu maicham meikou lah-a chun alengtou tan ahi. Chuin Manoah le ajinun hichu avelhonin, amailhon tolla asulut lhontan ahi." 
Judges13:21 Ahivangin Pakai vantil chu Manoah le ajinu henga akilahkit tapoi. Hichun Manoah'in Pakai vantil ahichu ahedohtai. 
Judges13:22 Chuin Manoah'in ajinu henga, Eini thonlouva ithitei lhonding ahitai, ajehchu einin Pathen imulhontai, ati." 
Judges13:23 Ahinla ajinun amahenga, Pakaiyin eini eithanom lhona ahile, govam thilto le neh thilto chu eini khutna kona akisan louding, chule hicheho jouse jonghi eivetsah lhon louding, chujongle tuphat tah-a hi hitobang thilho jong hi eiseipeh lhon lou ding ahi, ati." 
Judges13:24 Chuin numeinu chun chapa khat ahingin, Samson asahtai. Chuin chapang chu ahung khangin, Pakaiyin phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
Judges13:25 Chuin Zorah le Eshtaol kikah-a Dan gebuh-a chun Pakai lhagaovin achunga na atong pantan ahi. 
Judges14:1 Chuin Samson chu Timnah'a achesuh-in, chule Timnah'a chun Philistine te chanuho numei khat amun ahi." 
Judges14:2 Chuin ama ahung touvin anule apa henga aseijin, hitin ati, Keiman Timnah'a Philistine te chanuho numei khat kamui: hijeh chun amanu chu kaji dingin gapui lhonin, ati." 
Judges14:3 Hiche phatchun anule apan ahengah, Nasopi ho chanute ahiloule kamite jouse lah-a numei umlouhel hija, cheptanlou Philistine te kichenpi ding nagot ham? atilhonin ahi. Chuin Samson'in apa henga, Amanu neipui peh-in; ajehchu amanun kalung atoh lheh-e, ati." 
Judges14:4 Achuti vangin anule apan hichu Pakaiya kon ahi le, aman Philistine te douna-a phat gomkom ahol ahi chu ahelhon pon ahi. Ajehchu hiche petna chu Philistine ten Israelte chunga vai ahomu ahi." 
Judges14:5 Chujouvin Samson anule apa toh Timnah'a achesuh-un, chule Timnah kho lengpi leilai ahung lhung taovin: chuin veuvin, keipi bahkai golbep khatnin ahin ngih tai." 
Judges14:6 Chuin Pakai Lhagao chu thanei tah-in achunga ahung chun ahile, aman kelnou alhetel bangin, akhutna imacha choilouvin abottel tan ahi. Ahinla aman athilbol chu anule apa henga aseidoh pon ahi." 
Judges14:7 Chuin ama achesuh-in, numei chutoh akihoulimin; chule amanun Samson alunglhaisah lheh-in ahi." 
Judges14:8 Chuin phat chomkhat jouvin amanu puidingin ahung kilekitnin, akeipi bahkai thasa longchu ve dingin akiheijin ahile; veuvin, keipi bahkai long sunga chun khoilhah anakaijin ahi." 
Judges14:9 Chuin aman akhutnin alan, alamjot pumin anen, anule apa koma ahungin, amani jong apen, chule amanin jong anelhonin ahi. Ahinla hiche khoiju chu keipi bahkai thilong sunga kona alah ahi chu anule apa aseipeh pon ahi." 
Judges14:10 Hitichun apachu numeinu koma chun achesuh tan ahi. Chuin Samson'in chukhoma chun golvah abolin ahi; ajehchu gollhang hon hitia chu abolngai mong ahi. 
Judges14:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, amahon ama amuphatnun, ama koma umdingin loi somthum ahinpuijun ahi." 
Judges14:12 Chuin Samson'in ahenguva, Keiman naheng uva thuchih khat kasei ding: hiche chu nanghon golvah nisagi sunga neihilchen theijuva, nahetdoh uva ahile, keiman nangho ponsil somthum, chule kikhelna von somthum kapeh dingu ahi." 
Judges14:13 Amavang neihilchen theilouvu leh, nanghon ponsil somthum le kikhelna von somthum neipeh dingu ahi, ati. Chuin amahon ahenga, Nathuchih chu seijin, keihon ngaijuvinge, atiuve." 
Judges14:14 Chuin aman amaho henga, Mi ne-a konin nehding ahung potnin, thahat tah-a kona thil lhumtah ahung potne, ati. Chuin amahon nithum geijin thuchih chu ahedoh thei pouvin ahi." 
Judges14:15 Chuin nisagi nin ahitin ahi, amahon Samson jinu henga, Hiche thuchih hi eihil chetna dingun najipa jolin, achutiloule nangma le napa inhi meija kahal dingu ahi: nangman kanei hou lahpeh dinga neikouvu ham? Hiti chu hilouham? atiuvin ahi." 
Judges14:16 Chuin Samson jinu chu ahenga akapmin, hitin aseije, Nangman nei ngailut ahipon, neihot joh ahi: Nangman kamite henga thuchih nadongin, keima neiseipeh poi, ati. Chuin aman amanu henga, Ven, keiman kanu kapa koma jong kaseilou ahin, hiche chu nangma koma kasei ding ham? ati." 
Judges14:17 Chuin agolvah-u kibol sungse, nisagi ni chun amanu a-angsunga akapkap jengtan ahi. Chuin ni sagi nin ahitin ahi, amanun aha ngeh behseh jehchun aseidoh pehtan ahi. Chuin amanun thuchih chu amite chateho henga aseipeh tan ahi." 
Judges14:18 Chuin ni sagi ni nisalhum masangin khopi-a cheng pasal ho chun ahenga, Khoiju sanga lhumjo ipiham? chule keipi bahkai sanga hatjo ipi ham? atiuvin ahi. Chuin aman amaho henga chun, Kabongla-a hi lou nakai louvu hile, kathuchih hi hedoh pouvin nate, ati." 
Judges14:19 Chuin Pakai Lhagao achunga ahungchun, ama Ashkelon'a achesuh-in, mi somthum athatnin, avonhou chu ahinlan, athuchih aseidohho henga chun kikhelna von somthum chu apetan ahi. Chuin alunghan akoujah-in, apa in lama achetou tan ahi." 
Judges14:20 Chule Samson jinu chu agolpa, agolpha pena aneipa henga chun ape taovin ahi." 
Judges15:1 Ahinla chomkhat jouvin ahung hitin ahi, suhlou chang atlaijin, Samson'in kelnou khat apon ajinu agavilin; chule, Indan sunga kajinu henga kagalut ding ahi, ati. Ahin ajinu pa-in alutding aphalpon ahi." 
Judges15:2 Chuin ajinu pan, Keiman najinu nahot mongmonga kangaito ahitan; hijeh-a chu naloipa kapeh ahitai. Anaonu hi ama sanga hoijoa hilouham? Nahenga katao ahi, amanu khelin kipuitan, ati." 
Judges15:3 Chuin Samson'in amaho chungchanga hitin aseitai, Tun keiman amaho chunga mona boljong leng Philistine mihon a-engkhan eihisah thei pouvinte, ati." 
Judges15:4 Chuin Samson achen sial jathum amanin, ameiju akan matnin, meisel phabep alan, amei le amei kikah-a chun akanmat pehtan ahi." 
Judges15:5 Chuin meisel ho-a chun mei atih-in, Philistine te changphung dinglah-a alhalut nin ahile, changphal le changphung dinglai ho, lengpilei le Olive thing jouse geijin akamangtan ahi." 
Judges15:6 Chujouvin Philistine ten, Hichehi kon abol ham? atiuve. Chuin amahon, Timnah tupa Samson bol ahi, ajehchu aman ajinu alahpeh-a aloipa apeh jeh ahi, tin adonbut uve. Chuin Philistine te ahungun, amanu chule apa chu meijin ahal lih taovin ahi." 
Judges15:7 Chuin Samson'in amaho henga, Nanghon hiche nabol jeh uva hi, keiman nachung uva phu kalah ding ahi, hichu kabol chaiteng umthim bepding kahi, ati." 
Judges15:8 Chuin aman amaho chu khotona beijin mitamtah athatnin; chule achesuh-in Etam songpi vuma agacheng tan ahi. 
Judges15:9 Chujouvin Philistine te achetouvun, Judah gamsunga gebuh asonguvin, chule Lehi mun'a chun akithe jalun ahi." 
Judges15:10 Chuin Judah miten, Ipi bola keiho douna-a hunga nahiuvem, atiuve. Chuin amahon adonbutnun, Samson kantum dingle, kachung uva abol bang banga achunga bol dinga hungtouva kahiuve, atiuve." 
Judges15:11 Chuphatnin Judah mi sangthum Etam molsang songpi chunga chun achetouvun, chule Samson henga, Philistine hi eiho chunga vaipo ahiuve ti nahetlou ham? Chule nangman kachunguva nabol pihi ipi ham? atiuve. Chuin aman amaho henga, Ka chunga atoh bang banguva chu keiman jong amaho chunga katoh ahi, ati." 
Judges15:12 Chule amahon ama henga, Keihon nangma Philistine te khutna kapehdoh theina dinguva, nangma kantum dinga hunga kahiuve, atiuve. Chuin Samson'in ahenguvah, Nangho tah-in neitha louna dingun kahenga kihahselun,atin ahi." 
Judges15:13 Chuin amahon ahenga, Ahipoi, keihon nangma kakanchah uva, amaho khutna kapehdoh dingu ahibouve; keihon nangma nathat pouvinge, atiuve. Chuin amahon amachu khao thahbet nin akanun, song chunga konchun ahin puidoh-un ahi." 
Judges15:14 Chule ama Lehi mun ahunglhun phatnin, Philistine te chu ama dounan hatah in a-aovun ahi. Hichun Pakai Lhagao thanei tah-in achunga ahung chun ahile, akhut kikanna khaoho chu meija kihaltan abang jengin, akhutna konin akikan naho chu alhamang tan ahi." 
Judges15:15 Chule aman Sangan khagu thahbet khat amun, hichu alan, hiche-a chun mi asang asang avolihtan ahi." 
Judges15:16 Chuin Samson'in, Sangan khagu mangchan, athop athopmin kavolhun, Sangan khagu mangchan, mi sangkhat kathatnin ahi, ati." 
Judges15:17 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, aman thu aseijouvin, sangan khagu chu akhutna konin apaimangin, hichemun chu Ramath-lehi asahtai." 
Judges15:18 Chuin ama hatah-in adang chahtan, Pakai hengah ataovin, hitin ati, Nangman nasoh khutna hi hitobang lhatdohna nasatah hi napeh ahitan; tu-a hi dangchah-a kathi-a, cheptan louho khutna hi kalhuh ding ham? ati." 
Judges15:19 Hijeh chun Pathen'in Lehi mun'a chun komtong apokehsah-in ahile, chu-a kon chun twi ahung longdoh-in; chule aman adonphatnin, alungthim ahatdoh kitnin, ahaldoh kit tai. Hijeh chun hiche mun chu En-hakkore asah tan, hichu tuni geijin Lehi mun'a aum jingin ahi." 
Judges15:20 Chuin aman Philistine te nikho laijin Israelte chunga kum somni thu anatanin ahi. 
Judges16:1 Chujouvin Samson Gaza'ah achen ahile numei kijoh khat amun, amanu henga chun alut tan ahi." 
Judges16:2 Chuin Gaza mite henga, Samson hilama ahunge, ti aseipeh taovin ahi. Chuin amahon a-um na munm chu a-umkimvelun, chule jan khovah keijin khopi kotpi-a chun achanguvin, jan khovah in thipchetnin aumun, Jingkah kho ahungvah vahleh itha dingu ahi, akitiuvin ahi." 
Judges16:3 Chuin Samson khangkimgei alumin, khangkimin athoudoh-in, khopi kotpi kotkhahle akhom tenitoh abotdoh-in, abonchan alengkouva apun, Hebron maijona um lhangvum khatna apudoh pehtan ahi." 
Judges16:4 Chule hiche nung chun ahitin ahi, aman Sorak phaichama numei khat amin Delilah kitinu chu adeicha tan ahi." 
Judges16:5 Chuin Philistine vaipoho chu amanu henga ahungun, ahenga, Amapa hi kakan tum uva achunga kachuh theina dingun, iti achunga tha kanei thei dingu ham ti hetdohna dingin, amapa khu anajolin lang, athahatna nasatah khu hoija umham ana hedoh-in: chule keiho mikhat cheh-in nangma dangka sangkhat le jakhat kapeh dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Judges16:6 Chuin Delilah'in Samson henga, Nahenga katao ahi, nathahatna nasatah hi hoija uma hija, chule nangma suhgentheina dinga hi ipi-a naki kan dingham? neiseipeh temin, ati." 
Judges16:7 Chuin Samson'in amanu henga, Ago khalou khaogui hing sagi in eikanleo, keima lhasam tangting, midangho bang bang kahi ding ahitai, ati." 
Judges16:8 Hiche phatchun Philistine vaipohon chun amanu henga, ago khalou khaogui hing sagi ahinchoijun, chule amanun hicheho-a chun akanin ahi." 
Judges16:9 Tun mi phabepmin ama chu achang lhiuvin, indan sunga chu amanu toh uma ahiuve. Chuin amanun ahenga, Samson, Philistine te nachunga chuding ahi taove, ati. Chuin aman khaoguiho chu patdum kipheh meija kihaltan bangin abottan jengtan ahi. Hitichun athahatna chu hetdoh ahipon ahi." 
Judges16:10 Chuin Delilah'in Samson henga, Ven, nangman neidai chavaijin, jouvin neilheme. Tu-a hi katao ahi, ipi-a nakikan tum thei dingham? ati." 
Judges16:11 Chuin aman amanu jah-a, amahon mi kikanna khahlou khao thahbet-a eikan leu, kalhahsam ding ahitan, chuteng midangho bang bang kahi ding ahitai, ati." 
Judges16:12 Hitichun Delilah'in khao thahbet alan, Samson chu akanin, ajah-a, Samson, Philistine te nachunga chuding ahitaove, atin ahi. Chule mi phabepmin indan sunga achanlhih jingu ahi. Chuin aman hicheho chu patjang kibot tan bangin akhutna konin atumtan tan ahi." 
Judges16:13 Chuin Delilah'in Samson henga, Tuni geihin nangman neidai chavaijin, jouvin nei lheme: ipi-a kikan ding nahim, neihilin, ati. Chuin aman, Nangman kalua kasam pheh sagi hi hehkople chun, ati." 
Judges16:14 Chuin aman ahehkopmin akildet chetnin, ahenga, Samson, Philistine te nachunga chuding ahitaove, ati. Chuin ama a-imutna konin athoudoh-in, asam lom kihehkop leh akilna chu abotdoh tan ahi." 
Judges16:15 Chuin amanun ahenga, Nalungsung keima koma umlouva, nangman kalungsetne iti neitithei ham? Nangman hiche thumvei neidai chavaijin, nahatna nasatah hi hoilaija umham neiseipeh poi, ati." 
Judges16:16 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanun aniseh-a angah jinga, adoh jing phatnin, amapa thiding khopmin alung gimtan ahileh;" 
Judges16:17 Hichun alungthim jouse amanu henga aseijin, hitin ati, Kalu chunga samchem kipan khalou ahi; ajehchu keima kanu oisunga patna Pathen'a dinga Nazir mi kahi. Kasam akivo chaija ahile kahatna keija kona chemanga, kalhahsam ding, midangho bang bang kahiding ahitai, ati." 
Judges16:18 Chuin Delilah'in amapan ahenga alungsunga um jouse aseidoh chu amuphatnin, Philistine vaipoho koudingin mi asolin, ajah uva, Khatvei hungtou kitnun, ajehchu aman alungsunga um jouse eiseipehtai, ati. Chujouvin Philistine vaipoho chu ahungun, akhutnuva sum jong ahin choijun ahi." 
Judges16:19 Chuin amanun amapa chu apheipi chunga alupsah-in a-imutsah-in; asam voudingin mi akouvin, alua lom sagi-a asam kikan chu avolhah pehtan ahi. Chuin amanun asugim panin, chule athahatna chu ama-a konin achemang tan ahi." 
Judges16:20 Chuin amanun, Samson, Philistine te nachunga chuding ahi taove, ati. Chuin ama a-imutna-a konin ahung thouvin, chule, Nidang bangin chedoh ingting, kithing lhange ati. Ahinla Pakaiyin ama adalhah chu ahepon ahi." 
Judges16:21 Ahinla Philistine ten amanun, amit teni akaldoh-un, Gaza'a apui lhaovin, sum-eng henkol abupeh-un; songkul inna sumhei goijin apangtai." 
Judges16:22 Ahinla alu-a asam chu akivotol nungin ahung khangpan kit tan ahi. 
Judges16:23 Chujou phatnin Philistine vaipoho chu a-pathenu Dagon henga kilhaina loupitah bola, kipa thanop boldingin akikhom khom taovin ahi. Ajehchu amahon, I-pathen'u hin imelmapao Samson hi ikhutnuva eipehdoh-u ahi, atiu ahi." 
Judges16:24 Chuin mipin ama amuphatnun a-pathen'u chu avahchoijun ahi. Ajehchu amahon, I-pathen'un imelmapao, chule eiho tamtah eithatnuva, igamsungu sumangpa hi ikhutnuva apehdoh ahitai, atiuve." 
Judges16:25 Chuin ahitin ahi, amaho alungthimu akipa phat chun, Vetnom um eibolpeh diuvin Samson gakouvun atiuvin ahi. Chuin amahon songkul in'a konchun Samson agakouvun, chule aman amaho dingchun vetnom um abolpehtai. Chuin amahon amachu khom lentah ni kah-a adinsah-un ahi." 
Judges16:26 Chuin Samson'in akhut kaile-a pang chapangpa henga chun, Inpi kingapna khom teni chu kaki ngainadin neituh sah-in, ati." 
Judges16:27 Tun in chu numei le pasal dimsetna ahin, chule Philistine vaipoho jouse chu umsoh keijuva; Chule in chunga chu Samson vetnom um bol vedinga numei pasal mi sangthum jen uma ahiuve." 
Judges16:28 Chuin Samson Pakai henga ataovin, Vo Pathen, Philistinte chunga khatvei sehseh kamit teni asuhchotnao phu kalah theinadin; Vo Pakai Pathen, katao ahi, neigel doh-in, chule katao ahi, tu khatvei sehseh hi katha hatsah-in, ati." 
Judges16:29 Chuin Samson'in inpi douva pang, alaija inpi kidouna khomteni chu atuh-in; chule khatna chun akhut jetlam angamin, khat joh-a chun akhut veilam angamin ahi." 
Judges16:30 Chuin Samson'in, Philistine mite hito thitha tange, atin ahi. Chuin aman athahat jouse-a asonin ahile, inpi chu vaipoho jouse le asunga umho jouse chunga chun achimtan ahi. Hitichun hiche athinia amitha chu ahinlaija atha sangin atamjon ahi." 
Judges16:31 Chujouvin asopitele apa insung mite ahungsuh-un, along chu alauvin, ahin potouvun, Zorah le Eshtaol kikah-a apa Manoah lhankhuh-a chun avui taovin ahi. Aman Israelte chunga kum somni thu anatanin ahi." 
Judges17:1 Chule Ephraim molsanga chun Micah kiti mikhat aumin ahi. 
Judges17:1 Chule Ephraim molsanga chun Micah kiti mikhat aumin ahi. 
Judges17:2 Chuin aman anu henga, Nangma-a kona dangka shekel sangkhat le jakhat kiladoh, nana gaosap khum, chule keima jah-a jong nanasei chu, ven, hiche dangka chu kakoma aume; keima lah ahi, ati. Chuin anun, Kachapa, Pakaiya phattheiboh changin, ati." 
Judges17:3 Chuin aman anu koma dangka shekel sangkhat le jakhat chu anungpeh phatnin, anun ahenga, Milim kilha le kikheng semna dinga keiman kakhutna kon kachapa dinga dangka chu Pakaiya kapehdoh ahitai: hijeh-a chu tu-a hi nangma koma kapehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Judges17:4 Ahivangin sum chu anu henga alepeh-in ahi. Chuin anun dangka shekel jani chu alan, dangka khengpa apen ahile, aman hiche-a kon chun milim kilha le milim kikheng asemin; chule hicheho chu Micah in'a umin ahi." 
Judges17:4 Ahivangin sum chu anu henga alepeh-in ahi. Chuin anun dangka shekel jani chu alan, dangka khengpa apen ahile, aman hiche-a kon chun milim kilha le milim kikheng asemin; chule hicheho chu Micah in'a umin ahi." 
Judges17:5 Chule Micah kitipa chun pathen ho inkhat aneijin, thempu boitong sangkhol le milim houna asemin, chule achapate lah-a khat chu athenso-in, amachu thempun apangin ahi." 
Judges17:5 Chule Micah kitipa chun pathen ho inkhat aneijin, thempu boitong sangkhol le milim houna asemin, chule achapate lah-a khat chu athenso-in, amachu thempun apangin ahi." 
Judges17:6 Hiche laichun Israel ten leng aneipouvin, ahinla mijousen ama mitna dih asah chanchu aboljengu ahi." 
Judges17:7 Chule Judah gam Bethlehem'a kon Judah insungmi gollhang khat aumin; ama chu Levi mi ahin, chule chukoma chu khopema ahi." 
Judges17:8 Chule hichepa chun chen nading mun amu muna-a cheng dingin Judah gam Bethlehem khopi chu ahin dalhan ahi. Chuin ama akholjin lena lamin, Ephraim molsanga um Micah in chu ahung lhungin ahi." 
Judges17:8 Chule hichepa chun chen nading mun amu muna-a cheng dingin Judah gam Bethlehem khopi chu ahin dalhan ahi. Chuin ama akholjin lena lamin, Ephraim molsanga um Micah in chu ahung lhungin ahi." 
Judges17:9 Chuin Micah'in amapa henga, Hoija kona hung nahim? ati. Chuin aman ahenga, Keima Judah gam Bethlehem'a kon Levi mi kahin, chule chen nading mun hola kholjin le-a kahi, ati." 
Judges17:9 Chuin Micah'in amapa henga, Hoija kona hung nahim? ati. Chuin aman ahenga, Keima Judah gam Bethlehem'a kon Levi mi kahin, chule chen nading mun hola kholjin le-a kahi, ati." 
Judges17:10 Chuin Micah in ahenga, Keima toh chengkhomin, chule keima dingin pa le thempu-in pangin, chule keiman kumkhatna dangka shekel som, von tokhat, chule nehle chah kapeh ding ahi, ati. Hitichun Levi mipa chu achengtai." 
Judges17:10 Chuin Micah in ahenga, Keima toh chengkhomin, chule keima dingin pa le thempu-in pangin, chule keiman kumkhatna dangka shekel som, von tokhat, chule nehle chah kapeh ding ahi, ati. Hitichun Levi mipa chu achengtai." 
Judges17:11 Chule Levi mipa chu mipatoh umkhom dingchu anomtan, chule gollhangpa amapa dingchun achapa khat tobang ahitan ahi." 
Judges17:12 Chuin Micah chun Levi gollhangpa chu athenson, chule gollhangpa chu athempun apangin, Micah in'a chun aumin ahi." 
Judges17:12 Chuin Micah chun Levi gollhangpa chu athenson, chule gollhangpa chu athempun apangin, Micah in'a chun aumin ahi." 
Judges17:13 Chujouvin Micah'in, Tun Levi mikhat thempu-in kaneitan, Pakaiyin kachunga thilpha abolding ahi ti kahetai, ati." 
Judges17:13 Chujouvin Micah'in, Tun Levi mikhat thempu-in kaneitan, Pakaiyin kachunga thilpha abolding ahi ti kahetai, ati." 
Judges18:1 Hiche nikho laichun Israelte lah-a leng aumpoi. Chule hiche nikholai machun Dan mite chenna ding gam aholun ahi; ajehchu hiche nikho geija chu Israelte phung lah-a amaho gamlo ding aumloulai ahi. 
Judges18:2 Chuin Dan chate chun aumnao mun Zorah le Eshtaol kho-a konin a-insungmiu pasal hangsan cheh mi nga gam velhi dingle gamhol dingin asolun; ajah uvah, Cheovinlang gamchu gakholun, atiuve. Hichun Ephraim molsanga um Micah in'a chun aga lhungun, hia chun ageh taovin ahi." 
Judges18:2 Chuin Dan chate chun aumnao mun Zorah le Eshtaol kho-a konin a-insungmiu pasal hangsan cheh mi nga gam velhi dingle gamhol dingin asolun; ajah uvah, Cheovinlang gamchu gakholun, atiuve. Hichun Ephraim molsanga um Micah in'a chun aga lhungun, hia chun ageh taovin ahi." 
Judges18:3 Amaho Micah in'a aumlaijun, amahon Levi gollhangpa chu a-awso-a konin aheuvin; aheng lama akiheijun, ajah-a, Kon hikoma hi nahin puilut ham? Chule hikoma hi ipi nabol ham? chule hikoma hi ipi naneijem? atiuve." 
Judges18:3 Amaho Micah in'a aumlaijun, amahon Levi gollhangpa chu a-awso-a konin aheuvin; aheng lama akiheijun, ajah-a, Kon hikoma hi nahin puilut ham? Chule hikoma hi ipi nabol ham? chule hikoma hi ipi naneijem? atiuve." 
Judges18:4 Chuin aman ahenguvah, Micah'in hiti khati hin eibolin, eigoijin, chule athempua kapan ahi, ati." 
Judges18:4 Chuin aman ahenguvah, Micah'in hiti khati hin eibolin, eigoijin, chule athempua kapan ahi, ati." 
Judges18:5 Chuin amahon ahenga, Nahenga kataovu ahi, kachenao lampia hi kakhantou kakhantou lou dingu kahet theina diuvin, Pathen neidoh peh-un, atiuvin ahi." 
Judges18:6 Chuin thempupa chun ahenguvah, Lungmong tah-in cheovin, Pakaiyin nachenao lampia naumpi naove, ati." 
Judges18:7 Chujouvin mi ngaho chun akipat doh-un, Laish kho-a ahung lhungun, hichea chengho Sidon miho bang banga-a chamdela, mongtah le bit keija achenu chu amuvin; chule hiche gama chun ipi lama hijongle ajachatnau boldoh pehding lamkai aneipouvin ahi. Chule amaho Sidon mite-a konin agamlauvin, chule koimato jong kigui jopna anei pouvin ahi." 
Judges18:8 Chuin amaho Zorah le Eshtaol'a sopite henga ahungun: chule asopiho chun ahenguva, Ipi seithei nanei uvem? atiuve." 
Judges18:9 Chuin amahon, Amaho doudinga ikontou theina dinguvin, kipat un: ajehchu keihon gamchu kagam'u uvin, chule veovin, gamphatah ahi. Ima nabol got louvu ham? Chu gama cheding le galut ding chule galo ding thase hih-un." 
Judges18:10 Nangho nache tengule, mongtah-a cheng miho kom le gam lentah nalhun dingu ahi. Ajehchu Pathen'in leisetna thil um jouse lhahsam louna mun chu nakhut uva napeh-u ahitai, atiuve." 
Judges18:11 Chuin Zorah le Eshtaol kho-a konchun Dan insung mite mi jagup chu manchah pumin ahung kondoh-un ahi. 
Judges18:12 Chuin amaho achetouvun, Judah gam Kirjath-jearim'a gebuh asongtaove. Hijeh chun hiche munchu tuni geijin Mahaneh-dan asah-un ahi. Veovin hichu Kirjath-jearim nunglama uma ahi." 
Judges18:13 Chuin amaho chua konchun Ephraim molsang lam ajonun, Micah in ahung lhung taovin ahi." 
Judges18:13 Chuin amaho chua konchun Ephraim molsang lam ajonun, Micah in ahung lhung taovin ahi." 
Judges18:14 Chujouvin Laish gam velhia che mi ngaho chun adonbutnun, asopiho henga, Nangho hiche inho-a hi thempu boitong sangkhol, milim ho, milim kilhah le, milim kisoltho aume ti nahet uvem? Hijeh chun tun ipi nabol dingu ham ngaitouvin, atiuve." 
Judges18:15 Chuin amaho chulama chun akiheijun, Levi gollhangpa umna in, Micah in geija chun ahungun, ama chu chibai aboh-un ahi." 
Judges18:15 Chuin amaho chulama chun akiheijun, Levi gollhangpa umna in, Micah in geija chun ahungun, ama chu chibai aboh-un ahi." 
Judges18:16 Chule Dan insungmi galvon kivona mi jagupho chu kotpi-a chun adinguvin ahi. 
Judges18:17 Chuin gam velhia mi nga chu ache touvun, hilama chun ahung lutnun, milim kisemthu, boitong sangkhol, milimho, milim kilhajolho chu alauvin, chule thempupa chu galvonna kivon mi jagup ho toh kotpi phunga chun adingun ahi." 
Judges18:18 Chuin amaho Micah in'a acheuva, milim kisemthu ho, thempu boitong sangkhol, milimho, akisoltho milim ahin lah-u chun, thempupan amaho henga, Ipi bola nahiuvem? ati." 
Judges18:18 Chuin amaho Micah in'a acheuva, milim kisemthu ho, thempu boitong sangkhol, milimho, akisoltho milim ahin lah-u chun, thempupan amaho henga, Ipi bola nahiuvem? ati." 
Judges18:19 Chuin amahon ahenga, Thipbeh-in, nakhutnin nakam kihupmin lang, kanungu hinjuijin, chule keiho dingin pa le thempu-in pangin. Nangma dinga mi khatseh insunga thempu-a panding phajo-am, ahiloule phung khat le Israel insung khat chunga thempu-a pan phajo-am? atiuve." 
Judges18:20 Chuin thempupa lungsung chu akipah lheh-in, thempu boitong sangkhol, milimho, chule akilhahtho milim chu alan, mipi lailunga chun achetan ahi." 
Judges18:21 Hitichun amaho akiheijun, akipat doh-un, chule amasanguva chapangho le ganchaho achesah-un ahi." 
Judges18:22 Chule Micah in'a kona gamla thimtah agei phatnun, Micah invela miho chu akikhom khomun, Dan miho chu adelpha taovin ahi." 
Judges18:22 Chule Micah in'a kona gamla thimtah agei phatnun, Micah invela miho chu akikhom khomun, Dan miho chu adelpha taovin ahi." 
Judges18:23 Chuin amahon Dan chate chu agah samun ahi. Chuin amaho Micah heng lama chun akiheijun, ahenga, Ipin nabola hitobang mihonpi toh nahung ham, atiuve." 
Judges18:23 Chuin amahon Dan chate chu agah samun ahi. Chuin amaho Micah heng lama chun akiheijun, ahenga, Ipin nabola hitobang mihonpi toh nahung ham, atiuve." 
Judges18:24 Chuin aman, Nanghon keiman kakisem ka-pathen le kathempu nakilah uvin nachemang taove. Chule ken idang kanei nahlai ham? chule nanghon kahenga, ipin nabol ham, natiu chu ipi nasei nao ham? ati." 
Judges18:25 Chuin Dan chate chun ahenga, Kalah uva na awgin kijah sah hih-in, achuti loule alunghangho nachunga hung chuntin, nahinkho le na-insung pumpi manlo ding ahi, atiuve." 
Judges18:26 Chuin Dan chate chu alampiuva achemang taove, chule Micah'in amaho chu ama dinga ahatvalu chu amu phatnin, akinunglen a-in lama achetai." 
Judges18:26 Chuin Dan chate chu alampiuva achemang taove, chule Micah'in amaho chu ama dinga ahatvalu chu amu phatnin, akinunglen a-in lama achetai." 
Judges18:27 Chuin amahon Micah thilsemho le athempupa chu ahin laovin, mongtah le bitkeija cheng mite umna Laish kho chu ahunglhung taove. Chuin amahon amaho chu chemhemin athatnun, khopi chu ahallha taove." 
Judges18:27 Chuin amahon Micah thilsemho le athempupa chu ahin laovin, mongtah le bitkeija cheng mite umna Laish kho chu ahunglhung taove. Chuin amahon amaho chu chemhemin athatnun, khopi chu ahallha taove." 
Judges18:28 Amaho Zidon'a kona gamlatah ahijeh ule, koimatoh kiguijop lou ahi jeh-u chun ahuhdoh dingu koima aumpon ahi. Hichu Beth-rehob koma phaichama uma ahi. Chuin amahon khopi khat asaovin, chua chun acheng taove." 
Judges18:29 Chuin akhopi semu chu Israel'a dinga hungpenga apau Dan min aput sah-un, Dan asah taove. Ahivangin khopi minchu amasa Laish anahin ahi." 
Judges18:30 Chuin Dan chate chun semthu milim atungdoh-un; agamu chu sohchanga ache kahseuvin Manasseh chapa, Gershom chapa, Jonathan le achateho chu Dan phunga thempun apanguvin ahi." 
Judges18:31 Chuin amahon Micah'in asemthu milim chu atungdoh-un, hiche phatsungse chu Pathen in chu Shiloh-a aumin ahi." 
Judges18:31 Chuin amahon Micah'in asemthu milim chu atungdoh-un, hiche phatsungse chu Pathen in chu Shiloh-a aumin ahi." 
Judges19:1 Chuin hiche nikho laichun ahung hitin ahi, Israelte lah-a leng aumlou laichun, Ephraim molsang panga chun Levi mikhat ana khopemin, ama chun Juda gam Bethlehem'a konin thaikem khat akipuijin ahi." 
Judges19:2 Chuin ama thaikemnu chu ama dounan noti'n apangin, chule ama-a konin achedoh-in Juda gam Bethlehem'a apa in'a chun achen, chua chun lhali aga umin ahi." 
Judges19:3 Chuin a-inneipu chu amanu kamdama kihoupi ding le hin nungpui kit dingin akipat doh-in, asoh khat le sangan kopto akipuijin, anung ajuijin ahi. Chuin amanun amapa chu apa in'a ahin puijin; chule nungahnu pa chun amapa amuphatnin kipah tah-in alamton ahi." 
Judges19:4 Chuin anupa-pa, nungahnu pachun, amapa chu a-umsah-in; chule amapa jong ama chutoh nithum aumkhomin ahi. Hitichun mahon aneuvin, adonun, chule chu-a chun ageh-un ahi." 
Judges19:5 Chuin nili chanin ahung hitin ahi, jingkah matah-a ahung thodoh doh-un, amapa che dingin akipatdoh tan ahi. Hichun nungahnu pa chun achanu jipa henga, Changlhah themkhat beh nenlang nalung suhal photnin, chujou tengle chenan nate, ati." 
Judges19:6 Chuin amani atou lhonin, anekhom, adonkhom lhonin ahi. Ajehchu nungahnu pa chun mipa henga chu, Katao ahi, lunglhai selin umin, tujan khongaijin lang, nalungthim kipasah-in, atin ahi." 
Judges19:7 Chuin mipa chu chedinga akipatdoh phatnin, anupa-pa chun alho lhon ahile, amapa aumkit tai." 
Judges19:8 Chuin ani nga ni jingpi tah-in amapa chedingin ahung thoudoh-in ahile, nungahnu pa'n ahenga, Katao ahi, nalung suhal tadin, ati. Chuin amani nisa akihei geijin akhongai lhonin, chule amanin anekhom kit lhonin ahi." 
Judges19:9 Chule mipa chu ama, athaikem, chule asohpa toh chedinga ahung kipatdoh phatnin, anungahnu pa chun ahenga, Ven, tuhi nilhah hiding ahitan, kangeh nahi, tujan khongai nalaijun: ven, nikho kichai ding ahitai, nalungthim kipana dingin hilaija hin geh maijun; chule jingle in nalhun theina dingin, jingpitah le najotna ding jonnan nate, ati." 
Judges19:10 Ahinla mipa chu khongai ding anompon, hijeh chun akipat doh-in achen, Jebus maijon ahung lhungtan, hichu Jerusalem ahi. Chule akoma sangan ni apho lhingset toh, athaikemnu aumin ahi." 
Judges19:11 Chuin amaho Jebus kom ahung lhunun, nikho chu beiding ahitan; asohpa chun apu henga, Katao ahi, hungin, Jebus miho khopi-a hin lutnu hitin, gehtao hite, ati." 
Judges19:12 Chuin apupan ahenga, Eiho Israel chate-a hilou, hetkhahlou miho khopi-a ilut loudingu ahi; Gibeah kho geija cheu hite, ati." 
Judges19:13 Chuin asohpa henga, Hungin, Gibeah ahiloule Ramah khatjoh joh naiju hitin, jan geh-u hite ati." 
Judges19:14 Chuin amaho acheuvin, alamjot ajomun; chule Benjamin mite kho Gibeah kom alhunun, nisa alhumtan ahi." 
Judges19:15 Chuin amaho hilama chu lutding le Gibeah'a chu geh dingin akihei lutnun ahi. Chuin ama alutphatnin, khopisung lamlen khatna atoutan ahi. Ajehchu amaho puiding le a-in'a lhunsah ding koimacha umlouva ahi." 
Judges19:16 Chuin veuvin nilhah ahiphatnin, tehsepu khat alou kona-a konin ahungin, ama jong chu Ephraim molsanga kon ahin; Gibeah'a khopem ahi: ahivangin chuche mun'a cheng miho chu Benjamin mi ahiuve." 
Judges19:17 Chuin ama agah khodah-in ahile, khopi lampi-a tou kholjin mipa chu amun; chuin tehsepun ajah-a, Hoija cheding nahiuva? chule hoilama hungkon nahiuvem? ati." 
Judges19:18 Chuin aman amapa henga, Keiho Juda gam Bethlehem'a kon Ephraim molsang jonding kahiuvin, keima chu mun'a kon kahi. Keima Juda gam Bethlehem'a gache-a kahin, ahin tu-a hi Pakai in'a cheding kahi; chule koiman a-in'a eilhunsah ding aumpoi." 
Judges19:19 Ahin hikoma hin changpol le ka sangan hou dinga ngaikhoh ho aumin, chule keima ding le kasohnu ding, chule nasohpan alhonpi gollhangpa dingin lengpitwi le changlhah jong aumin ahi, imacha alhasam beihela uma ahi, ati." 
Judges19:20 Chuin tehsepun, Lungmong tah-in umun; hijongle nadei jouseu keima chunga ngamun lang, lamlhonga vang geh hih beh-un, ati." 
Judges19:21 Hitichun tehsepu chun amapa chu a-in'a apuilutnin, a-sangan teni chu nehding apen; chule amahon akengu akisilun, aneovin adonun ahi." 
Judges19:22 Chuin amaho alungsungu akipa laitah-un, veuvin, khopi miho phabep, Belial chapa phabep chun aumnao in chu aum kimvelun, akot chu achumun, chule a-inneipa tehsepu henga chun, Na in'a lhungpa chu kaki timatpi dingun hinpui doh-in, atiuvin ahi." 
Judges19:23 Chuin mipa, a-inneipa chu ahenguva achedoh-in, ajah uva, Ahipoi, kasopiho, ahipoi, naheng uva katao ahi, hitilom hin khangse hih-un; hiche mipa hi ka in'a hung ahi namu jeh uvin, hiche ngol hoitah hi bolhih-un." 
Judges19:24 Veovin, hikomahin kachanu nungah khat le thaikemnu aume; keiman amani hinpui doh ingting, nanghon amanichu noinep munlang, achung lhona pha nasah sah-u chu boljeng uvin: hichepa chunga vang chutobang thilse chu bol hih-un, ati." 
Judges19:25 Ahinla miho chun ama thusei chu ngaisah-in aneipeh pouve. Hitichun mipa chun athaikemnu chu apuijin, amaho henga chun ahin puilut tan ahi; chuin amahon amanu aluppiuvin, jan khovah jingkah geijin akichep naovin ahi. Chuin jingkho ahung vah phatnin, amanu asolmang taove." 
Judges19:26 Chuin thingjang ahungvah phatnin numeinu chu ahungin, apupa umna mipa kotphunga chun alhun, khovah lhah kahsen hia chun aumtan ahi." 
Judges19:27 Chuin jingkah-in a-pakaipa athouvin, inkot chu ahongin, achena ding lampia chu che dingin apotdoh-in ahile; veuvin, athaikem numeinu chu kotbula chun analhun, chule akhut teni chu kotbula ana kingamin ahi." 
Judges19:28 Chuin amapan ahenga, Thouvin, chetaohite ati. Ahin adonbut tapoi. Hichun mipan amanu chu a-sangan chunga adomdoh-in, amajong atoudoh-in, achena dinga achetai." 
Judges19:29 Chuin amapa a-in alhun phatnin, chemcha khat alan, athaikemnu chu atuh-in, agutoh pumin a-at khen khenin, tum somleni ason, chuin Israel gam pumpi-a athot tai." 
Judges19:30 Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche mujouse chun, Israel chate Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh uva pat tuni chan geihin hitobanghi akibol khapon, mujong akimu khapoi. Hichehi ngaitouvin, thuhilna lauvin lang, nalungthimun thu seijun, atiuve." 
Judges20:1 Chujouvin Israel chate jouse chu Dan'a pat Beersheba changei, chule Gilead gamsunga konin jong achedoh-un, mihonpi chu mikhat bangin Pakai ansung Mizpeh mun'a akikhom khomun ahi." 
Judges20:2 Chuin mipi jouse lamkaiho, Israel phungho chu Pathen mite kikhopna-a chun apangun, chemjam lamthei cheh kenga kalsong sepai sangjali ahiuvin ahi." 
Judges20:3 (Hichun Benjamin chaten Israel chate chu Mizpeh'a achetou uve ti ajataovin ahi.) Chuin Israel chaten, Iti dana hitobang gitlouna natoh hi sohdoh-a ham? neisei peh-un, atiuve." 
Judges20:4 Chuin Levi mipa, akithat numeinu jipa chun amaho adonbutnin, ahenguva, Benjamin miho khopi Gibeah'a chun keima le kathaikemnu jan gehdingin kahung lhonin ahi." 
Judges20:5 Hichun Gibeah miho keima dounan ahung kipat doh-un, jan-in kaumna in aum kimvelun, thadingin eigouvin: kathaikemnu hunamin abolun ahile, athilotan ahi." 
Judges20:6 Chuin keiman kathaikemnu chu kahin pon, kasat tel telin, chule Israelte chenna gamtina kathot kimvel tai. Ajehchu amahon Israel sunga thet umtah jonthanhoi le ngol hoitah na atong doh-un ahi." 
Judges20:7 Veovin, nangho nabonun Israel chate ngen nahiuve: hikoma hin nathuhilu le nathumop mu neipeuvin, ati." 
Judges20:8 Chuin mipi jouse chu mikhat bangin akipat doh-un, Eiho khatcha iponbuh uva ichelouhel diu, khatcha i-in'uva iche louhel dingu ahi." 
Judges20:9 Ahin eihon tu-a hi Gibeah chunga ibol dingu chu hiche hi ahi: vang kivet dungjuija amaho doudinga ikon tou dingu; 
Judges20:10 Chule amaho Benjamin te khopi Gibeah'a alhun tengule, amahon Israel sunga ngol hoitah aboldoh banguva chu achunguva na atoh theina dinguvin, eihon Israel phung jouse-a kona mipite an thah dinga, mi jakhat lah-a kon som, sangkhat lah-a kona jakhat, chule sangsom lah-a kon sangkhat ilhendoh dingu ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Judges20:11 Hitichun Israel mite jouse khopi douna chun mikhatseh bangin akipunkhom taovin ahi. 
Judges20:12 Chuin Israel phungho chun Benjamin phungho jouse henga mi asolun, Nalah uva kibol hitobang khangitlouna hi ipi hitam?" 
Judges20:13 Hichejeh chun tun keihon amaho chu katha uva, Israel lah-a kona gitlounahi kasuhmang nadingun hiche miho, Gibeah'a um Belial chate chu neipedoh-un, atiuve. Ahinla Benjamin chaten asopiho Israel chate thusei chu ngaisah-in aneipeh pouvin:" 
Judges20:14 Amavang Benjamin chate chu Israel chate satdingin, akhopi houva konin Gibeah khopi-a chun akikhom khomun ahi." 
Judges20:15 Chule hiche pettah-a chun Gibeah a chengho lhentum cheh jasagi tilouvin, Benjamin chate chu akhopihou jouse-a konin chemjam lamthei mi sangsomni le sanggup aumin ahi." 
Judges20:16 Hicheho lah-a chun lhentum cheh veikolong mi jasagi aumun; chule amaho chun samjangte geija khel louhela sepkha thei cheh ahiuve. 
Judges20:17 Chule Israel mite chu Benjamin simlouvin chemjam lamthei cheh mi sangjali ahiuvin; amaho hi abonuva galhang cheh ahiuve. 
Judges20:18 Chuin Israel chate chu akipat doh-un, Pathen in lama chun ache touvun, Pathen'a konin thumop angeh-un, Keiho lah-a Benjamin chateho toh kisat dinga koipen kachetou masah ding ham? atiuve. Chuin Pakaiyin, Judah chetou masa ding ahi, ati." 
Judges20:19 Hitichun Israel chate chu jingkah-in athou doh-un, Gibeah dounan gebuh asong taovin ahi." 
Judges20:20 Chuin Israel miho chu Benjamin to kisatdin akondoh uvin; chule Israel chate chu amaho toh kisat dingin Gibeah'a chun akigoltoh taovin ahi. 
Judges20:21 Chuin Benjamin chate chu Gibeah'a konin ahung potdoh-un, hiche nikho chun Israel mite sangsomni le sangni jen tolla asat chapmun ahi." 
Judges20:22 Chuin Israel mite chu akitil khouvun, amasani-a akigolna mun mama uva chun galsat dingin akigolkit taovin ahi." 
Judges20:23 (Chuin Israel chate achetouvun, nilhah geijin Pakai angsunga akapmun, Pakaiya kon thumop angeh-un, Kasopipa Benjamin chate douva kisatpi dinga kachetoukit ding ham? atiuve. Chuin Pakaiyin, Agakisatpi din kontouvin, ati.)" 
Judges20:24 Chuin anikho ni channin Israel chate chu Benjamin chate dounan ahung nailut kit taovin ahi. 
Judges20:25 Chuin anikho ni chanin Gibeah'a konin Benjamin amaho doudingin ahungdoh-in, Israel chate sangsom le sang get chu tolla asat chapmun ahi; amaho chu abonchauva chemjam lamthei cheh ahiuve." 
Judges20:26 Hiche phatchun Israel chate, chule mi jouse chu ache touvun, Pathen in'a ahungun, akapmun, chule Pakai angsunga atouvun, hiche nikho chun nilhah geijin an angolun, chule Pakai angsunga chun govam thilto le chamna thilto atoh-un ahi." 
Judges20:27 Chuin Israel chaten Pakai adongun, (ajehchu hiche nikho laija chu Pathen thulhun thingkhong chu hikoma chu uma ahin," 
Judges20:28 Chule hiche nikho laichun Aaron chapa Eleazar chapa Phinehas chu a-angsunga chun adingjin ahi), Kasopipa Benjamin chate douva kisatpi dinga kachekit ding ham? atiuve. Chuin Pakaiyin, Kontouvin, ajehchu jingle amaho khu nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Judges20:29 Chuin Israel ten Gibeah kimvela changpang ding akoigu taovin ahi. 
Judges20:30 Chule anithum channin Benjamin chate sat dingin Israel chate akontouvun, nidanga bangin Gibeah'a kidou dingin akigolkit taovin ahi." 
Judges20:31 Chuin Benjamin chate chu mipi ho dou dingchun ahungdoh-un ahile, khopi-a konchun agamlha taovin ahi. Chule nidang bangin miho chu asatnun, Pathen in chetouna lamlhong le Gibeah jotna loujao lah-a chun Israelte mi somthum tobang athatpan kit taovin ahi." 
Judges20:32 Chuin Benjamin chaten, Amasa bangin imasanguva tha-in aumkit taove, atiuve. Ahinla Israel chate chun, Eiho jamuhitin, khopi-a konin lamlhonga puidoh uhite, atiu ahi." 
Judges20:33 Chuin Israel miho jouse chu apanmun cheh uva konin ahung kipatdoh uvin, amaho le amaho Baal-tamar'a akigolun; chule Israel chate changpanga pangho chu aumnao Gibeah phaichama konin ahungdoh-un ahi." 
Judges20:34 Chuin Israel mipi lah-a konin kilhengdoh mi sangsom ho chu Gibeah dou dingin ahungdoh-un, chule gal kisat chu anasa lheh-in ahi. Ahivangin Benjamin miho chun achunguva manthah na akomchaova aume ti ahepouve." 
Judges20:35 Chuin Pakaiyin Benjamin chu Israel masanga agal lel sahtan; chule hiche nikho chun Israel chaten Benjamin mite chu sangsomni le sangnga le jakhat athatnun; amaho chu chemjam lamthei cheh ahiuve. 
Judges20:36 Hitichun Benjamin chaten agal lel'u chu amutaovin ahi. Ajehchu Israel miho chun Gibeah pama changpang akoihou chu atahsan jeh uva, Benjamin miho dinga chu mun a-otnu ahi." 
Judges20:37 Chuin changpangho chun kinotah-in Gibeah chu adel khumun; chule changpangho chu akihom khenun, khopi sunga chengho jouse chu chemjamin athat gamtaovin ahi." 
Judges20:38 Tun Israel miho leh changpangho chun akah uva melchihna khat aneiju ahin, hichu khopi-a kona meikong nasatah le meikhu ajamdohsah dingu ahi." 
Judges20:39 Chutichun Israel mite chu agalsat naova kona akicholnga kahlah-un, Benjamin miho chun ahin nokhumun, Israel mi somthum tobang athatnun ahi. Ajehchu amahon, Amahohi kisatna masa-a banga imasanguva gallel kit ahi taove atiu ahi." 
Judges20:40 Ahinla khopi-a kona meikong leh meikhu khompi banga ahung kitundoh phatnin, Benjamin miho chu akinung heijun aveovin ahile, veuvin, khopi-a kon meikong chu van geijin akikho touvin ahi." 
Judges20:41 Chuin Israel miho ahung kinunghei kitnun ahile, Benjamin mihon kidang asaovin ahi; ajehchu amahon achunguva manthah na ahung lhungtai ti amuvin ahi." 
Judges20:42 Hijeh chun amaho Israelte masang chun akinung heijun, gamthip lama ajam taove; ahinla gal kisatchun apha paovin, khopi-a kona hungdoh hochun alah tah uva konin asumangun ahi." 
Judges20:43 Hitichun Benjamin miho chu aumkolun, adelun, Gibeah maijon nisona lam geijin bailam tah-in kengin achilun ahi." 
Judges20:44 Chuin Benjamin miho chu sangsom le sangget athiuvin; abonchauvin mihangsan jeng ahiuve. 
Judges20:45 Chuin amaho akiheijun gamthip Rimmon songpi lama ajam taovin ahi. Chuin amahon lamlhonga chun mi sanga athatnun, chule Gidom geijin hatah-in anung adelun, mi sangni athatnun ahi." 
Judges20:46 Hitichun chuche nikho-a Benjamin mite athi jat chu chemjam lamthei cheh mi sangsomni le sangnga ahin; amaho abonchauva mihangsan cheh ahiuve. 
Judges20:47 Ahin mi jagup hochu akiheijun gamthip Rimmon songpi lama chun ajamun, chule Rimmon songpi-a chun lhali aumun ahi." 
Judges20:48 Chuin Israel miho Benjamin miho chunga achukit uvin, chemjamin athatnun, khopi jouse-a konin amu jouseu mihem hihen, sahem hijongle athat gamun ahi. Chule amahon ahung lhunnao khopi jouse jongchu meijin ahalun ahi." 
Judges21:1 Tun Israel mihon chu Mizpeh'a akihahselun, Ilah uva khatchan achanu Benjamin mi ji dinga apehthei louding ahi, atiuve." 
Judges21:2 Chuin mipi chu Pathen in'a ahungun, Pathen anga nilhah geijin aumun, aw sangtah-in asamuvin, hakan akapmun;" 
Judges21:3 Vo Israelte Pakai Pathen, hitobang pihi ipi jeh-a Israel lah-a soh-a, tunikho-a Israel lah-a kona phungkhat lhasam ding hitam? atiuve." 
Judges21:4 Chuin ajingin ahung hitin ahi, miho chu jingpi tah in athouvun, maicham khat asaovin, govam thilto le chamna thilto atoh-un ahi." 
Judges21:5 Chuin Israel chaten, Israel phung jouse lah-a kona Pakai henga dinga mipi houkhom ho toh lhontou lou koi umam? atiuve. Ajehchu amahon Mizpeh mun'a Pakai henga hunglou tapou chungchanga kihahselna lentah aneijuva, Amachu thatei tei ding ahi, atiu ahi." 
Judges21:6 Chuin Israel chate chu asopipao Benjamin dingin alung hesoh-un, Tuni hin Israel'a konin phung khat akipai dohtai." 
Judges21:7 Tu-a amoh umnalai ho ji ding chungchanga hi ipi ibol dingu hitam? Eihola Ichanuteu ajidiuvin pepouhite tin Pakai anga kihahselna ineitaovin, atiuve." 
Judges21:8 Chuin amahon, Pakai henga dinga Mizpeh'a hungtou lou Israel phung khat tou umam? atiuvin ahi. Chuin veovin, Jabesh Gilead'a konin akikhomho umna gebuh'a chun koimacha ahungpouve." 
Judges21:9 Ajehchu mipi chu akisima ahile, veuvin, Jabesh Gilead'a cheng miho chu khatcha jong aumpon ahi." 
Judges21:10 Chuin mipi kikhom chun ahangsan dehset cheh mi sangsom le sangni asolun, chule thupeh aneijun, ahenguva, Cheovinlang Jabesh Gilead'a chengho chu numei leh achateuse toh chemhemin gathatnun." 
Judges21:11 Chule hichehi nabolding dolu chu ahi: nanghon pasal takip, chule pasal toh lumkhomsa numei takip chu natha gamheldiu ahi, atiuve." 
Judges21:12 Chuin amahon Jabesh Gilead'a kon chun pasal hekhalou nungah theng jali amudoh-un ahi. Chuin amahon amaho chu Canaan gama Shiloh gebuh-a ahin puijun ahi. 
Judges21:13 Chuin houkhom pumpi chun Rimmon songpi-a um Benjamin chatetoh kihou dingle, amaho lungmong tah-a kou dingin mi phabep asolun ahi." 
Judges21:14 Hijeh chun Benjamin chu ahungkit tan; chule amahon amaho chu Jabesh Gilead miho-a kona ahinghoiju numei ho chu ajidingun apeuvin; ahinla hicheho chun atohjou pon ahi. 
Judges21:15 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel phungho sunga chun kikhenna aumsah jehchun, mipi ho chu Benjamin jeh-in alunghemun ahi." 
Judges21:16 Chujouvin mipi kikhomho lah-a upaho chun, Benjamin'a konin numei ho akisumang tai ti imu utoh lhona, ahing nalaiho ji dinga hi ipi ibol dingu hitam? atiuve." 
Judges21:17 Chuin amahon, Israel lah-a kona phungkhat suhmanga aumlou nadinga, Benjamin miho lah-a kona ahingdoh hohin goulo aneitei dingu ahi." 
Judges21:18 Ahinla eihon amaho chu aji dinguva ichanuteu ipehthei loudingu ahi: ajehchu Israel chate chun kihahselna ananeijuva, Benjamin mi jidinga achanu pechan chu sapset changhen anatiu ahi, atiuve." 
Judges21:19 Chujouchun amahon, Veuvin Bethel sahlam, Bethel'a kona Sheshem jotna lamlhong solam, chule Lebonah lhanglam Shilloh mun'a khun kumseh le Pakai golvah akiboljin ahi." 
Judges21:20 Hichejeh chun amahon Benjamin chate chu athupeh-un, ahenguva, Cheovin lang lengpi leija khun gachang pangun;" 
Judges21:21 Chule ana veuvin lang, veuvin, Shiloh kho-a nungah ho chu lamna-a lamdinga ahungule, lengpi leija konchun hungpot unlang, amitakipmin Shiloh chanute-a konchun naji ding cheh-u kimatnun lang, chule Benjamin gam lama chepiovin." 
Judges21:22 Chule hung hitiding ahi, apatehou ahiloule asopitehou kehenguva kiphinna thu seidinga ahung tengule, keihon amaho henga, Keiho jal-in amaho chunga khun khohsahna neijun, ajehchu gal kisatna-a chu eihon amitakip ajidingu ikhendoh peh pouvin, chule nanghon tu-a jonghi amaho napeh-u ahilou jeh-in, themmo chang pouvin nate, tin seinao vinge, atiuve." 
Judges21:23 Chuin Benjamin chate chun hitichun aboltauvin, amahon amijat dungjuijun alama hungdohho aji dinga akimat hou chu akipuijun; chule agoulonao gama akileuvin, khopi ho chu asaphaovin, acheng taovin ahi." 
Judges21:24 Chuin hichephat chun Israel chate chu hiche mun'a konchun akipat doh-un, amijouse ama phungle insung, chule agou lona mun cheh-a achedoh taovin ahi." 
Judges21:25 Hichelai chun Israelte lah-a leng aumpon: amijousen ama mitmu-a pha asah chu abol jengu ahi. 
Ruth1:1 Tun thutan ho vaihomho nikho laijin, gamsunga kel analhan ahi. Chuin Judah gam Bethlehem'a pasal khat a-inneipi le achapa teni toh Moab gama phat chomkhat cheng dingin anacheuvin ahi." 
Ruth1:2 Pasalpa minchu Elimelech ahin, a-inneipi minchu Naomi ahi, chule achapa teni minchu Mahlon chule Chilion ahin, Judah gam Bethlehem kho-a um Ephrath mi ahiuve. Amaho Moab gama acheuvin agaum taove." 
Ruth1:3 Chuin Naomi inneipu Elimelech chu athitan; amanu le achapateni adalhatan ahi. 
Ruth1:4 Chuin achapa tenin Moab numei ji-in akipui lhonin; Khatnu minchu Orpah ahin, khajonu minchu Ruth ahi. Chutichun hiche gama chun kumsom tobang anachengun ahi." 
Ruth1:5 Chuin Mahlon le Chilion jong ani lhonin athi lhontan; hitichun Naomi chu a-inneipu le achapa tenin adalhatan ahi. 
Ruth1:6 Chujouvin Naomi Moab gama kona kilekit dingin amou tenitoh akipat dohtan ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin amite nehding apen aviltai ti Moab gama konin ajan ahi. 
Ruth1:7 Hijeh chun amanu amou teni toh aumna-a konin akipatdoh-in; Judah gam kilekit nading lampi-a chun achetauve. 
Ruth1:8 Chuin Naomi in amouteni jah-a, chelhonin, nanuteni incheh-a kinungle lhontan; nangnin athiho le keima neibolna lhon bangin Pakaiyin lungsetna-in nabol lhonhen." 
Ruth1:9 Na-inneipu teni incheh-a lung kicholdona namulhon nadingin, Pakaiyin phatthei nape lhonhen, ati. Chujouvin abenglhon chu achopmin, athummun aw sangtah-in akap taove." 
Ruth1:10 Chuin amanin amanu jah-a, keini namite henga nangma toh kakile tei lhonding ahi, atilhon tai." 
Ruth1:11 Ahin Naomi'in, kachanu teni kinungle lhontan; Ibola keima toh nakilhon hon dingham? Kanaobua ji-a nanei theilhon ding chapa um nalaija ham?" 
Ruth1:12 Kinungle lhonin, kachanu teni, chelhontan; ajehchu ji neikit dingin kateh behsehtai. Keiman kinepna kaneije tin seijing ting, tujan mamahin ji neijingting, chapate hingkit jongleng;" 
Ruth1:13 Nangnin amaho kikhan lhit gei nangajou lhonding hinam? jineilouva amaho nangalhon dingham? Hitheiponte, kachanu teni; ajehchu Pakaiyin akhut keima douna-a alapjeh hin, nangni-a ding gelnan kalung ana tangeije, ati." 
Ruth1:14 Chutichun amaho aw sangtah-in akap kit taove. Chuin Orpah in atehpi lhahnan achopmin; Ruth vang chun akolchahtan ahi. 
Ruth1:15 Chuin Naomi in hitin aseije, ven na-unu amitele a-pathenho henga akilekit tai. Nangjong na-unu nung juijin kiletan, ati." 
Ruth1:16 Ahinla Ruth'in, nangma dalha dingle nanung kajuina-a kona kinungle kit dingin neijol hih-in: ajehchu nache che na-a kache ding, nachen chenna-a kachen ding; namite chu kamite hia, na Pathen chu ka Pathen hiding;" 
Ruth1:17 Nathi thi na-a kathi-a, hiche munna chu eikivui ding ahi. Thina tilouvin thil dangin eikhen lhonna ahile, Pakaiyin kachungah abolnom nom bolhen, achungnung jo cheh-in jong chuhsah jenghen, tin aseitai." 
Ruth1:18 Naomi'in amounu amatoh kilhon dinga dettah-a apan amu phatchun, ajah-a imacha aseitapon ahi." 
Ruth1:19 Hitichun amani Bethlehem alhunlhon kahsen achepeh lhontan ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi, Bethlehem alhunlhon phatchun, khosung pumpi chu amani jeh-in akiling soh jengin; chule numei hon, hichehi Naomi hilouham? atiuve." 
Ruth1:20 Chuin amanun ajah uva, Naomi neiti hih-un, Mara neitijouvin; ajehchu Hatchung nungin nasatah in eisugenthei tan ahi." 
Ruth1:21 Ninglhinga potdoh-a kahin, Pakaiyin ahomkeovin in eihin lepui kit tai. Pakaiyin keima douna ahet tohsah-a, Hatchung nungin kachungah gentheina achuhsah namu nunguva, ipi dinga Naomi neiti nahlaiju ham?" 
Ruth1:22 Hitichun Naomi chu ahung kile kitnin, Moab numei amounu Ruth toh Moab gama konin ahung kile lhontan ahi. Chuin sakol chang ki-at patlaijin Bethlehem ahunglhung lhontai." 
Ruth2:1 Tun, Naomi'in a-inneipu sopi mihaotah khat aneijin; ama chu Elimelech insunga kon ahin, amin chu Boaz ahi." 
Ruth2:2 Chuin Moab numei Ruth'in Naomi jah-a, tun keima louva cheng kating, koihile amitmua lungset eichan penpen louva changkhai gaholinge, ati. Chuin Naomi'in ajah-a, kontan kachanu, ati." 
Ruth2:3 Chuin amanu apotdoh-in, achen, louva chang at-ho nunga changkhai aholtan ahi. Chule amanu chu Elimelech insungmi Boaz loulaija avahlut khatan ahi." 
Ruth2:4 Chuin veuvin, Bethlehem'a konin Boaz ahungin, chang at-ho jah-a, Pakaiyin na-umpiu hen, ati. Chuin amahon jong Pakai;in nangma phatthei naboh hen, tin adonbutnuve." 
Ruth2:5 Chuin Boaz in chang at-ho vesuija pang sohpa jah-a, hichenu hi hoi koi nungah ham? ati." 
Ruth2:6 Chuin chang at-ho vesuija pang sohpa chun adonbutnin, amanu hi Moab gama kon Naomi toh hung kinungle khangdong Moab nungahnu chu ahi." 
Ruth2:7 Amanun, katao ahi, chang at-hon adalhah-u changphal lah-a changkhai neihol khom sah-in, atin; hitichun amanu ahungin, in'a chomcha akicholdo tilouvin, jingpi-a pat tuchan geihin achomkhom peh-in ahi, tin adonbutne." 
Ruth2:8 Chujouvin Boaz chun Ruth jah-a hitin aseije, kachanu, kathusei nangai nah louding ham? Midang louva changkhai holdin chehih-in, hikoma konin jong potdoh hih'in, ahin ka numei ho toh kikhen louvin kivop jingin." 
Ruth2:9 Amahon a-atnao loulai chu velhin lang, anungu juijin. Gollhang hon nangma natohkhah louna dinga thu kapeh louva nabol ham? nadang achah teng twibel phunga chenlang, gollhang hon ahinkhaiju twi chu donjin." 
Ruth2:10 Chuin amanu tollah aboh khupmin, amapa jah-a, keima gamdang mi kahi munasa-a, ipijeh-a neihet thema, namitmu-a hibanga lungsetna kachan ham? ati." 
Ruth2:11 Chuin Boaz'in adonbutnin, amanu jah-a, na-inneipu thinunga natehpi najennaho; nanule napa, napenna gam nahin dalhah-a, masanga nahet khahlou miho lah-a nahung thu kichentah-a eikihetsah ahitai." 
Ruth2:12 Pakaiyin natohna chunga lethuhna napehen lang, chule kicholdo nadinga alhaving noi nahinjot Pakai Israel Pathen chun, kipaman lhingsetnin napehen, ati." 
Ruth2:13 Chuin amanun, ka Pakai, na mitmu-a lungsetna changjing inge; ajehchu nasoh numei ho lah-a khatbeh hihih jongleng, nangman neilhamon in, nasohnu hi lungset tah in nei kihoulim pitai, ati." 
Ruth2:14 Chuin an aneh phatnun, Boaz'in amanu jah-a, hungin lang an hungnen, chule nachanglhah halchu lengpitwi thuh-a hin hung kide-in, ati. Chuin amanu chu chang at-ho koma atoutan; amapa chun amanu chu changkanpoh apen, amanun ane vasetnin, amoh phabep akhenin ahi." 
Ruth2:15 Chuin amanu changkhaiho lohkhom dingin akipatdoh phatnin, Boaz'in asoh pasal ho athupeh-in, ajah uva, hichenu hi changphal ho lah jenga jong kilokhom sah-un, phohsal hih-un." 
Ruth2:16 Chule changphal loma konin jong amanu kilokhom dingin phabep lhahsahthu jiuvin lang, phoh hih-un, ati." 
Ruth2:17 Chuti chun amanun nilhah geijin loulaija chun changkhai aholin, chule changkhai alokhom chengse chu avolhan ahileh, hichu sakol chang ephah khat tobang ahi." 
Ruth2:18 Chuin amanun hichu apon khopi sungah alutnin; atehpin achangkhai hinpoh chu amutan ahi. Chuin amanun anehvaset jouva anehval akhen chu atehpi apetan ahi. 
Ruth2:19 Chuin atehpin ajah-a, tunia hoilama changkhai nahol em? hoija na nagatoh em? Nangma nahin hethempa chu nunnom hen, ati. Chuin Ruth'in aloukona mipa chu atehpi jah-a aseipeh-in, ajah-a, tunia kakonna louneipa chu Boaz ahi, ati." 
Ruth2:20 Chuin Naomi'in amounu jah-a, Athiho le ahing nalaiho chungah lungsetna nungsun lou Pakai chu nunnom hen ati. Chuin Naomi'in ajah-a, hiche mipa chu eiho dinga isopiu, inko ikinaipi penhou lah-a khat ahi, ati." 
Ruth2:21 Chuin Moab numeinu Ruth'in, amapa chun kahengah, kachang a-at jou kahseovin, ka gollhangho toh kikhen louvin ummin, tin aseije ati." 
Ruth2:22 Chuin Naom'in amounu Ruth jah-ah, kachanu, amapa numei ho toh nakon khomchu aphai. Ajehchu midang louva kon le chun hitabang chu namu louding ahi, ati." 
Ruth2:23 Hitichun amanu Sakol chang le suhlou chang ki-atchai kahsen changkhai holdingin Boaz numei ho toh kikhen louvin aumkhomin; chule atehpi toh achengkhom lhontan ahi. 
Ruth3:1 Chuin atehpi Naomi'in amanu jah-a, kachanu, nangdia thilpha asotheina dinga, nakicholdo nading kangaito peh louding ham?" 
Ruth3:2 Chule nangman anumeiho nakivop piji Boaz khu i-inkopau hilouham? Ven, tujan tengle phola sakolchang ajapchil ding ahi." 
Ruth3:3 Hijeh chun kisilngimin lang, thao kinun, navon phapen kivonin lang, pholla chesuh-in: ahin amapan neh le don achai masangsen akoma chun kiphong hih-in." 
Ruth3:4 Chule hitiding ahi, alupna ding munchu melchih inlang, ama aluptengleh, chu-a chun lutnin, chule akeng hohdoh inlang chu-a chun lumin; chutengle aman nabolding nahil nante, ati." 
Ruth3:5 Chuin Ruth'in amanu jah-a, kahenga nasei jouse kabolding ahi, ati." 
Ruth3:6 Chuin amanu pholla achesuh-in, atehpin asei bangin agaboltai." 
Ruth3:7 Chuin Boaz'in nehle don achai phatnin, lung kipah tah-in chang kisevum banna chun lum dingin achetan ahi; chuin amanu kangchan ahungin, amapa kengchu ahohdoh-in, chu-a chun alumtai." 
Ruth3:8 Chuin khangkimin ahitin ahi, amapa chu akinin, agah kiheileh; ven, numei khat akeng todopmah alumin ahi." 
Ruth3:9 Chuin amapan koi nahim? ati. Amanun adonbutnin, nasohnu Ruth kahi; hijeh chun nasohnu hi naponmong neisilpeh in; ajehchu nangma kasopi kinaipi nahi, ati." 
Ruth3:10 Chuin aman, kachanu, Pakaiyin phatthei naboh hen; ajehchu gollhang ahao hihen, avai hijongle anungu najuilou hin, amasalama sangin ajona lamah khotona namusah cheh-in ahi." 
Ruth3:11 Chule tun, kachanu, kicha hih-in; keiman na-ngeh jouse kabolpeh ding nahi: ajehchu kakhopi sunga kamite jousen numei chondihtah nahi ahesoh keijuve." 
Ruth3:12 Tun keima nakinaipi nasopi kahichu adih-e; ahin keima sanga sopi kinaipi aumnalaije. 
Ruth3:13 Tujan gehden tan, jingkah tengle hitiding ahi, amapa chun sopi khat boldingdol kinchu nangma chunga abola ahile, aphai; sopi boldingdol kinchu bolhen. Amavang aman hiche sopi boldingdol kinchu nangma chunga abol louva ahile, Pakai ahinjing bangin, keiman sopi boldingdol kinchu nangma chunga bolnange. Jing khovah kahsen gehdentan, ati." 
Ruth3:14 Chutichun amanu chu amapa kengdopmah jingkah geijin alumtan; jingkah phalvah then masangin athoudohtan ahi. Chuin amapan, pholla numei ahunge ti koiman hetdahen, ati." 
Ruth3:15 Aman amanu jah-a, naponsil chu hinchoijin lang, do-in, ati. Chuin aman ponchu adon ahile sakol chang tena gup atepeh-in, apohsahtai. Chuin amanu khopi sunglama aluttan ahi." 
Ruth3:16 Chuin amanu atehpi kom agalhun phat chun, atehpin, kachanu, ito nahungbah hinam? ati. Chuin amanun mipa chun ama dinga abolpeh jouse chu aseipehtan ahi." 
Ruth3:17 Chule amanun, hiche sakol chang tena gup hi amapan eipeh ahi; ajehchu amapan kajah-a, natehpi henga khut gohkeovin chehih-in eiti, ati." 
Ruth3:18 Chuin amanun, kachanu, hiche thua hi ipi ahungso nahetchet kah-in khongaijin; ajehchu tunia hiche thuhi asuhchet masangse-a amapa kicholdo louding ahi, ati." 
Ruth4:1 Chujouvin Boaz kotpi phung-ah achetouvin, chua chun atoutan ahi. Chuin ven, Boaz'in anasei akinaipi asopipa chu ahungin; Boaz'in ajah-a, golpa hung kiheijin lang, hikoma hin hungtouvin, ati. Chuin amajong akiheijin atoutai." 
Ruth4:2 Chuin aman khopi sunga upa som akouvin, ajah uva, hikoma hin touvun, ati. Chuin amaho atou taove." 
Ruth4:3 Hichun aman akinaipipen asopipa jah-a, Moab gamma kona hungkile kit Naomi'in, isopipao Elimelech gam behkhat ajoh-in:" 
Ruth4:4 Hiche thuhi nangma hetsah dinga kagel ahi, hikoma chengho le kamite upaho anga hichu kichohtan. Nangman nalhat dinga ahile, lhatnin; nalhat louding ahile, kahet thei nadin neisei peh-in; ajehchu nang tailou hiche lhatding chu koimacha aumpon, Keihi nang bantah-a kahi, ati. Chuin amapan, hichu lhatnange, ati." 
Ruth4:5 Chuin Boaz'in, Naomi khutna kona louchu nachoh ninile, agoulo chunga athipa min chu aumjing theina dinga, athipa inneipi Moab numei Ruth jong nachohtha ding ahi, ati." 
Ruth4:6 Hichun asopi kinaipipa chun, keima dingin lhat thei ponge, atiloule keima neilegou ngeijong kisuh chatvai ding ahi. Lhatdohna tha kanei jonghi nangma chang maijin, ajehchu keiman kalhat thei louding ahi, ati." 
Ruth4:7 Masanglaijin Israelte lah-a lhatdohna le kilhet tona chung changa chonna ngai dan chu hiti ahi: ipi thu hitale suhchetna dinga chu, pasal khatnin akengkoh asutlhah-a, michom khatpa chu apehji ahi: hichu Israelte lah-a suhdetna hija ahi." 
Ruth4:8 Hijeh chun asopi kinaipi penpa chun Boaz jah-a, nangma dingin kilhattan, ati. Chuti chun aman akengkoh asutlhan ahi." 
Ruth4:9 Chuin Boaz'in upaho le mipi jouse jah-a, tunia hi nangho hichehi ahetoh nahiuve, keiman Naomi khutna konin Elimelech gou jouse, chule Chilion le Mahlon neijouse aboncha kachoh ahitai." 
Ruth4:10 Hiche chungvum chun, athipa minchu agouva aumjinga, hitia chu athipa min chu asopiho lah-a kon leh aumna mun kotpi phunga kona kahlhah-a aumlouna dingin, Moab numei Ruth, Mahlon inneipi jong kajidingin kachoh thatai; tunia hi ahetoh-a nangho nahiuve, ati." 
Ruth4:11 Chuin kotpi phunga um mijouse le upaho chun ajah-a, keiho ahetoh kahiuve. Pakaiyin na-insunga hunglut numeinu hi Israel insung tungdoh teni, Rachel le Leah tobang hisah hen; chule nangma jong Ephrathah'a phathei jin lang, Bethlehem'a namin kithang hen." 
Ruth4:12 Pakaiyin hiche khangdong numeinu chilhah-a kona napehding na-insung chu, Judah dinga Tamar ahinpeh Pharez insung tobang chu hihen, atiuve." 
Ruth4:13 Hitichun Boaz'in Ruth akipuijin, ji-in aneitai. Chuin ama amanu koma alut phatnin, Pakaiyin amanu chu nao avopsah-in, chapa khat ahingtan ahi." 
Ruth4:14 Chuin numei hon Naomi jah-a, Tuni tah ngeija sopi kinaipi beija nadalha louva Pakai chu nunnom hen; chule amapa hi Israel sunga amin kithang hen." 
Ruth4:15 Chule amapa hi nahinkho kiledohsah le nateh nunga navah-a hungpang hen; ajehchu nangma nangailu-a, nangma dinga chapa sagi sanga phachomjo namounun amahi ahin ahi, atiuve."
