Ruth4:16 Chuin Naomi'in naosen chu alan, a-angah apomin, adonin apangtan ahi." 
Ruth4:17 Chuin a-inheng numei hon naocha min asah-un, Naomi'a dingin chapa khat apenge, atiuvin; Obed asahtaove. Amahi David pa, Jesse pa ahi." 
Ruth4:18 Tun hicheho hi Perez chilhah ahiuve. Perez in Hezron ahingin," 
Ruth4:19 Hezron'in Ram ahingin, Ram'in Amminadab ahingin," 
Ruth4:20 Amminadab'in Nahshon ahingin, Nahshon'in Salmon ahingin," 
Ruth4:21 Salmon'in Boaz ahingin, Boaz in Obed ahingin," 
Ruth4:22 Obed'in Jesse ahingin, Chule Jesse'in David ahinge." 
1Samuel1:1 Tun Ephraim molsang Ramathiam Zophim mun'a Ephrath mi, Zuph chapa, Tohu chapa, Elihu chapa, Jeroham chapa, amin Elkanah kiti mikhat anaumin ahi." 
1Samuel1:2 Chule aman ji ni aneijin, khatnu minchu Hannah ahin, achom khatjonu minchu Peninnah ahi. Chule Peninnah chun cha aneijin, ahinla Hannah'in vang cha aneipoi." 
1Samuel1:3 Chule hiche mipahi akhopia konin kumsehle Shiloh'a janel Pakai houding le ganlhai boldin achetoujin ahi. Chule Pakai thempu Eli chapateni Hophni le Phinehas chu hia chu umji lhon ahi. 
1Samuel1:4 Chuin Elkanah hin thilto aneiphat tengle a-inneipi Peninnah le achapate le achanute jouse chu chan apejin," 
1Samuel1:5 Ahinla Hannah vang chun achanding doltah apejin ahi: ajehchu aman Hannah angailun, ahinla amanu chu Pakaiyin anaobu akhapeh ahi." 
1Samuel1:6 Chule Pakaiyin anaobu akhapeh jehchun khatjonu chun alungnat nadingin nasatah-in alunghansah jin ahi. 
1Samuel1:7 Chule chutia chu kumseh-a aboljing ahin, Pakai in'a amanu achetou tengle amanu aphinsejin; hijeh chun amanu akapmin anjong aneji tapoi." 
1Samuel1:8 Chujouvin Elkanah'in a-inneipi Hannah hengah, Ibola naka ham? ebola an nelouva um nahim? chule ibola lungkhama uma nahim? Keima nang dinga chapa som sanga phajoa kahi louham? ati." 
1Samuel1:9 Chutia amahon Shiloh'a an aneh uva, chule twi adonjou phatnun, Hannah akipatdoh tan ahi. Tun Eli thempu chu Pakai houin khom khat bula touna chunga touva ahi." 
1Samuel1:10 Chuin amanu chu ahinna ahesoh lheh jengin, Pakai henga ataovin, chule laina tah-in akapmin ahi." 
1Samuel1:11 Chuin amanu kitepna khatna akitepmin, Vo janel Pakai, nasohnu thohgimnahi neivet peh-a, neihet jinga, nasohnu hi nasuhmil louva, nasohnu hi chapa khat neipeh-a ahile, chuteng ahinkho lhumkeija Pakaiya kapeh ding, alua samchem kilamlou ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel1:12 Chuin ahitin ahi, amanu Pakai anga ataojom jing laihin, Eli'n amuh phunchu anaven ahi." 
1Samuel1:13 Tun Hannah hin alungsunga asei ahijeh-in, amuh bouchu aphunin, ahin a-aw vang akijapoi. Hijeh chun Eli'n amanu jukhamin agelin ahi." 
1Samuel1:14 Chuin Eli'n amanu jah-a, Itihchan nakham dingham? Naju chu nanga konin koimangin, ati." 
1Samuel1:15 Chuin Hannah'in adonbutnin, Ahipoi, ka pakai, keima lungkham na-a dim numei kahi; keiman ju le khamnathei jong kadonpoi, amavang Pakai anga kahina kabuhlhah joh ahi." 
1Samuel1:16 Nasohnu hi Belial chanun neisim hih-in, ajehchu kakiphina le kahesohna tambehseh jenga tuchana hi thu kasei ahi, ati." 
1Samuel1:17 Chuphatnin Eli'n adonbutnin, Lung mongin chetan: Israel Pathen'in nathilthum chu naphal pehtai ati." 
1Samuel1:18 Chuin amanun, Nasohnu hi namitnun lungsetna neimusah-in, ati. Chutichun hiche numei chu achena ding lampia achen, an anen, chule lungkham mel aputapon ahi." 
1Samuel1:19 Chuin amaho jingkah matah-in athouvun, Pakai ahouvun, akileuvin, a-in'u Ramah'ah ahung taove. Chuin Elkanah'in a-inneipi Hannah chu aluppin; chule Pakaiyin amanu chu ageldoh tan ahi." 
1Samuel1:20 Hijeh chun ahung hitin ahi, Hannah'in nao avopma, aphat ahunglhin tah-in chapa khat ahingin, Pakai henga kanathum ahi atin, amin Samuel asahtai." 
1Samuel1:21 Chuin Elkanah kitipa le a-insung mijouse chu Pakaiya kumtin ganlhai le akitepna tohdohdin achetou taove. 
1Samuel1:22 Ahinla Hannah achetoupoi; ajehchu amanun a-inneipu henga, Naosen in noi abankahsea kachetou louding ahi, Pakai anga gaki lahthei ahi-a, chule chumuna a-itih-a aumden theiding teng kahinpui ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel1:23 Chuin a-inneipu Elkanah'in ajah-a, Nangman phante nati bangchun boltan; noi aban kahsen khongai jengin; Pakaiyin bou athu chu phutdet hen, ati. Chutichun amanu aum denin, chule achapan noi aban kahsen avah-in ahi." 
1Samuel1:24 Chuin amanun noi abansah phatnin, ama chu alhontoupin; bongchal thumtoh, changbong ephah khat le lengpitwi haikhat toh Shiloh'a Pakai in'a ahinpuitai: chule chapang chu khangdong cha ahi nalaije." 
1Samuel1:25 Chuin bongchal khat athatnun, naosen chu Eli henga apuitaovin ahi." 
1Samuel1:26 Chuin amanun, Vo ka pakai, nangma nahinjing bangin, ka pakai, hilaimuna nangma koma ana dinga Pakai henga anataova numei chu keima kahi." 
1Samuel1:27 Hiche chapang dinga hi anataova kahin; Pakaiyin ahenga kanathum kataona chu eipetai. 
1Samuel1:28 Hijeh chun keiman jong amahi Pakai henga kapeh ahi; ama ahinlai chansea Pakaiya hiding ahi, ati. Chuin amapan chukoma chun Pakai ahoutan ahi." 
1Samuel2:1 Chuin Hannah ataovin, Kalungsung Pakaiya akipah lheh-in, Pakaiya ka ki hi choisangin aumin ahi: nami huhhingna-a chu kakipa jeh-in, kamelmate chunga kakam akikeh lenin ahi." 
1Samuel2:2 Pakai banga thenga koima aumpoi: ajehchu nang tailou koimacha dang aumpon; i-Pathen'u tobang songpi jong aumpoi. 
1Samuel2:3 Kiletsah valin thu seitahih-in; nakamin hoithona thu pothih hen: ajehchu Pakai chu hetna Pathen ahin, chule aman thil kibol jouse aleptohji ahi." 
1Samuel2:4 Mihatte thalpi abong gamin, chule akipal lhuho chu hatna-in ataiju akigah pehtai." 
1Samuel2:5 Ana oivaho-a chu neh holnan amaho le amaho changlhah mandin akipedoh-un, anakel ho akelkit tapouve: chutichun achingan cha sagi ahingtan, chatam neinuchu alhasamtai." 
1Samuel2:6 Pakaiyin athatnin achoh hingjin: chule thikholkhul'a apuisuh-in apuidoh kitjin ahi. 
1Samuel2:7 Pakaiyin avaichatsah-in chule ahaosahjin; aman asunemin chule adomsang jin ahi. 
1Samuel2:8 Aman mivaicha chu leivuija konin akaithouvin; leng chapate lah-a tousah dingle, loupina laltouna losah dingin; khutdo chu eh lah-a konin adom doh-in ahi. Ajehchu leiset khompi jouse Pakaiya ahin, achunguva chu vannoihi atun ahi." 
1Samuel2:9 Aman amithengte kengchu achintup ding; chule migiloupa chu muthima thipbeh-a umding ahi; ajehchu thahatna koima dingjou louding ahi. 
1Samuel2:10 Pakai douho chu ahal hala kisuchipdiu; amaho chunga Ama van'a kona hung kitumding ahi. Pakaiyin leiset kolmong gei thu atan ding; aman alengpa chu thahat apehding, athaonupa ki chu achoisang ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel2:11 Chuin Elkanah a-in lam Ramah kho-a achetai. Chule chapang chun Eli thempu masanga Pakai kin aboltan ahi. 
1Samuel2:12 Tun Eli chapa teni chu Belial chapate ahilhonin, amanin Pakai ahe lhonpon ahi." 
1Samuel2:13 Chule mipi ho lah-a thempuho bolding chu, khattouvin akilhaina atodoh teng, sa chu asou laitah le thempu sohpa chun satul kathum neikhat ahinchoija;" 
1Samuel2:14 Chule aman hichu bel bilnei, khangbel len, ahiloule bel sunga chu asutlutna, satul ka-a ahin khaidoh jouse chu thempupan ama dinga akilahji ahi. Hitia hi Shiloh'a hung Israelte jouse henga aboljiu ahi." 
1Samuel2:15 Sathao chu ago masang uva jong thempu sohpa chu hunga, ganlhaina bolpa jah-a chu, Thempupa-a dinga gopeh dingin saphe chu neipen; ajehchu aman nanga kona akihon minsa alah louding, asel bou alahding ahi, atiji ahi." 
1Samuel2:16 Chule khattouvin ahenga, Amahon athao ago masat teiju ngai ahi, chujou tengle nahinnan adeijat jat kilah-in tia aseija ahileh; aman, Ahipoi, tu-a hi neipeh teiding ahi, achuti loule thahatsana kalahding ahi, tia adonbut ji ahi." 
1Samuel2:17 Chuti chun gollhangho chonsetna chu Pakai masanga anasalheh jengtan; mihon Pakaiya thilto chu athetlo taovin ahi. 
1Samuel2:18 Amavang chapangchan Samuel'in tupat ponnem thempu boitong sangkhol aki-ah in, Pakai anga lhacha na atongin ahi." 
1Samuel2:19 Chukalvalin anun sangkhol chol neokhat akhuipeh-in, kumsehle ganlhaina boldinga a-inneipu toh ahungtou lhonteng ahinchoi pehjin ahi." 
1Samuel2:20 Chuin Eli'n Elkanah le a-inneipi phatthei aboh-in, Pakai henga thilpeh jalchun hiche numeija hin Pakaiyin sonle pah napelhon hen, ati. Chuin a-in lhona achelhon tai." 
1Samuel2:21 Chuin Pakaiyin Hannah ahung vilin ahile amanun nao avopmin, chapa thumle chanu ni ahingin ahi. Chule chapang Samuel chu Pakai angsunga akhanglenin ahi." 
1Samuel2:22 Tun Eli atehlheh jengtan, Israelte jouse chunga achapateni thilbol jouse; houkhom ho houbuh kotphunga numei hung kikhom ho iti alup piji lhonham ti ajatan ahi." 
1Samuel2:23 Chuin aman aheng lhonna, Ibola chutobang thil nabolhon ham? Ajehchu nakhanset bollhon chu hiche miho-a konhin kajan ahi." 
1Samuel2:24 Ahipoi, kachateni; kajahhi thulhut phaloutah ahi: nangnin Pakai mite chu nachon khelsah lhon ahitai." 
1Samuel2:25 Mikhat tou midang douna-a achonsetna ahile, thutanpan athu atan ding ahin: ahin mikhat tou Pakai douna-a achonsetna ahile, kon ama dinga ataopeh dingham? ati. Ahijeng vangin Pakaiyin amani thading atup jeh chun, apao thusei chu angaideh lhonpon ahi." 
1Samuel2:26 Chuin chapang Samuel chu akhang akhangin, Pakai le mihem deisah-in aumtan ahi." 
1Samuel2:27 Chuin Pathen mikhat Eli henga ahungin, ajah-a hitin ati, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Amaho Egypt gama Pharaoh insunga aum laijuva chu napa insunga kichentah-a kana phondoh hitalou ham?" 
1Samuel2:28 Chule Israel phung jouse-a kona kathempu hiding, ka-maicham chunga thilto ding, gimnamtui halding, chule kamasanga thempu boitong sangkhol kivon dinga kana lhendoh hilouham? Chule Israel chate meija kigou thilpeh jouse napa insung kanapeh hilouham?" 
1Samuel2:29 Ipi dinga kaumna-a kathupeh kaganlhaina le kathilto napeh manga, kami Israelte thilpeh jouse-a kon ahoipen chun nathao dohsah nadinga keisanga nachapateni najabol joh ham?" 
1Samuel2:30 Hijeh chun Pakai Israel Pathen'in, Keiman nangma insungle napa insungchu a-imatih chana kamasanga vahle diu ahi, tia anasei ahin: ahinla tun Pakaiyin, Hichu keija konin gamla tahen; ajehchu eijabol ho chu kajabol ding, chule nahsah louva eibolho chu nahsah louva kabolding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel2:31 Vetan, na-insunga tehse khatcha aumlouna dinga, nangma ban le napa insung mite ban kasatlhah nading nikhoho chu ahung lhungtai." 
1Samuel2:32 Chule Kachen namun le Pathen'in Israel apehding gou jouse-a chu melma khat aum namu ding: chule a-imatih chana na-insunga tehse umta louhel ding ahi. 
1Samuel2:33 Chule ka-maicham'a kona kasatlhah louding namipa chu namitlhi sosah dingle nalungsung suna dinga kakoiding: chule na-inna peng jouse chu adonglai cheh-a thiding ahiuve. 
1Samuel2:34 Chule hichehohi nachapateni Hopni le Phinehas chunga thil hunglhung dingho namelchihna ahi; nikhat sunga anilhona thilhon ding ahi. 
1Samuel2:35 Chule keiman kalungthim le kangaito dungjuija tongding, keima dinga thempu tahsan umtah khat kitundoh ding: chule keiman a-insung dettah-a katundohpeh ding; chule ama a-itih-a kathaonupa masanga vahle jing ding ahi." 
1Samuel2:36 Chule hung hitiding ahi, na-in'a umnalai chasun chu ahenga hunguva dangka pehkhat le changlhah kamkhat athum diu, ahenga, Changlhah halkhat kaneh theina dingin, thempu natoh khat neipen, tia asei dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel3:1 Chapang Samuel chu Eli masanga Pakai kin bolin apangin ahi. Chule hichelai chun Pakai thuchu amantam lheh jengin; phongtah-a kilahna anaumpoi. 
1Samuel3:2 Chuin hiche laichun ahitin ahi, Eli chu aumna-a alupma, kho muthei lou leuva amitchu ahung thima;" 
1Samuel3:3 Chule Pathen kitepna thingkhong umna Pakai houin'a Pathen thaomei chu amit masang, chule Samuel chu imu ding aluplhah petnin;" 
1Samuel3:4 Chutichun Pakaiyin Samuel akouvin ahile aman, Hikoma kaume, tin adonbutnin ahi." 
1Samuel3:5 Chuin ama Eli henga alhaijelin, Hikoma kaume; ajehchu nangman neikouve, agatin ahi. Chuin aman, Kakoupoi, galumkit tan, ati. Chuin ama achen alumtai." 
1Samuel3:6 Chuin Pakaiyin avelin akoukitnin, Samuel, ati. Chuin Samuel athouvin, Eli henga chun achekitnin, Hikoma kaume; ajehchu nangman neikou monge, ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Kakoupoi, kachapa; galum kittan, ati." 
1Samuel3:7 Tun Samuel'in Pakai chu ahehih laijin, Pakai thujong chu ahenga akiphong hihlaije." 
1Samuel3:8 Chuin athumvei channa-in Pakaiyin Samuel akoukitnin ahi. Chuin ama athouvin, Eli henga achen, ajah-a, Hikoma kaume; ajehchu nangman neikou monge, ati. Chuin Eli'n Pakaiyin chapang chu akou ahi ahedohtan ahi." 
1Samuel3:9 Hijeh chun Eli'n Samuel henga, Chen, galum kittan; chule hitiding ahi, aman nahinkou kitna ahileh, nangman, Seijin, Pakai, nasoh in kajanai natiding ahi, ati. Chutichun Samuel aumna-a agalumtai." 
1Samuel3:10 Chuin Pakai ahungin, adingin, amasa-a bangchun, Samuel, Samuel, tin akouvin ahi. Hichun Samuel'in adonbutnin, Seijin; ajehchu nasoh-in kajanai, ati." 
1Samuel3:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Samuel jah-a, Ven Israel sunga thilkhat kabolding ahin, hichun ajachan nakhang asutding ahi." 
1Samuel3:12 Hiche nikho chule Eli douna-a a-insung chungchanga kanasei jousechu kaboldoh ding; kakipat tengle achaina jong kabolding ahi. 
1Samuel3:13 Ajehchu aman ahetsa khansetna jeh-a, a-insung chu a-imatih chana athu katan ding ahi tia kahilsa ahitai. Ajehchu achapa tenin thilse abol lhonin, aman amani anaphoh tangpoi." 
1Samuel3:14 Chule hichejeh-a chu keiman Eli insung chunga kana kihahsela, Eli insung khansetna chu ganlhai le anneh thilto-a jong a-itih-a suhtheng thei hilouding ahi, kanati ahi, ati." 
1Samuel3:15 Chuin Samuel chu jingkah geijin alumin, Pakai in kot ho ahongin ahi. Chule Samuel'in Eli henga athilmu hetsah dingchu akichalheh-in ahi." 
1Samuel3:16 Hichun Eli'n Samuel akouvin, ajah-a, Kachapa Samuel ati. Chuin Samuel'in adonbutnin, hikoma kaume, ati." 
1Samuel3:17 Chuin aman, Pakaiyin nahenga aseichu ipithu ham? kangeh nahi, Keija konin imhih-in: nahenga aseijouse chu kahenga na-im auma ahile, Pathen'in nahenga chutobang chun chule akhohcheh-in jong bolhen, ati." 
1Samuel3:18 Chuin Samuel'in thujouse chu ahilin, chule ahenga imacha a-im aumpoi. Chuin aman, Ama Pakai ahin, aman pha asah sah chun bolmaihen, ati." 
1Samuel3:19 Chuin Samuel chu ahung khanglen jep jepmin, Pakaiyin aumpin, chule ama thuho chu khatcha jong tolla alhah sahpon ahi." 
1Samuel3:20 Chuin Dan'a pat Beersheba geijin Israelte jousen Samuel chu Pakai themgao khatnin akitung dohtai ti ahetauve. 
1Samuel3:21 Chuin Shiloh'a chun Pakai ahung kilah kitnin ahi: ajehchu Pakai thu dungjuija Shiloh'a chu Pakai amatah Samuel henga kiphongdoh ahi. 
1Samuel4:1 Chuin Samuel thu chu Israelte jouse henga ahung lhungtan ahi. Tun Israelte chu Philistine te satdin akondoh taovin, Ebenezer panga ponbuh asongun: Philistine te chun Aphek mun'a ponbuh asongun ahi." 
1Samuel4:2 Chuin Philistine te chu Israelte satdingin amaho le amaho akigol toh-un: chuin gal akisat phatnun Israelte chu Philistine te masanga agallel taovin; chule amahon galmuna chun galsat mi sangli tobang athat taovin ahi. 
1Samuel4:3 Chuin mipi chu gebuh ahunglhun phatnun Israel upaho chun, Ipijeh-a tunia Pakaiyin Philistine te masanga eigol lel sah-u ham? Shiloh'a konin Pakai kitepna thingkhong chu eiho henga dingin gapodoh-u hitin, hichu ilah uva ahungteng, hichun igalmiteu khutna konin eihuhdoh theijunte, atiuve." 
1Samuel4:4 Hijeh chun mipichun Cherub teni kikah-a cheng janel Pakai kitepna thingkhong chu chua kona agapoh theina diuvin Shiloh'a mi asolun: chule Eli chapateni Hophni le Phinehas chu Pathen kitepna thingkhong chutoh chukoma chun aum lhonin ahi. 
1Samuel4:5 Chuin Pakai thingkhong chu gebuh ahunglhun phatnin Israelte jousen ha aovin a-aovun, hitichun leiset akithong leovin ahi." 
1Samuel4:6 Chuin Philistine ten gingleng lunga a-ao ginu ajah phatnun, Hebrew miho gebuh-a ging lenglung khu ipithu hitam, akitiuvin ahi. Chuin amahon Pakai kitepna thingkhong gebuh hunglhung ahi ti ahechen taove." 
1Samuel4:7 Chuin Philistine ten Gebuh-a Pathen hunglut ahi atiuvin akicha taovin ahi. Chuin amahon, Ohe idau ahi! ajehchu tumasangin hitobang thil anasoh khapoi." 
1Samuel4:8 Ohe idau ahi! hiche hat chungnung Pathenho khutna kona kon eihuhdoh diuham? Hichehohi gamthipma Egypt mite hivei jouse-a sugama Pathenho chu ahiuve. 
1Samuel4:9 Vo nangho Philistine te, nangho soh-a ana um banguva, Hebrew mite soh-a naum louna dingun hatnunlang, kipasal sah-un: nangho kipasal sah-un lang, satnun atiuve." 
1Samuel4:10 Chuin Philistine techun asatnun, Israelte chu jo-in aum taovin, chule amaho amitakip aponbuh lam cheh uva ajam taovin; chule nasatah-a kithana aumin ahi: ajehchu Israelte chu keng sepai sangsomthum athiuvin ahi." 
1Samuel4:11 Chule Pathen kitepna thingkhong chu alah peh-un; chule Eli chapateni Hophni le Phinehas jong athat taovin ahi. 
1Samuel4:12 Chuin sepai lah-a konin Benjamin phunga kon mikhat alhaijelin, apon teldehduh le aluchanga leiset pumin hicheni mama chun Shiloh'a alhailutnin ahi." 
1Samuel4:13 Chuin ama ahungphatnin, veuvin, Eli chu lampamah touna chung khatna atouvin, anaven ahi: ajehchu Pathen kitepna thingkhong jeh chun alungsung akithingin ahi. Chule mipa khopi sunga ahunglut phatchun aseijin ahile khopi pumpi mihochu hakan akaptaovin ahi." 
1Samuel4:14 Chule Eli'n ka awgin chu ajah phatnin, Hiche awging lullul khu ipithu hitam? ati. Chuin mipa chun kinotah-in ahungin, Eli ahung hiltai." 
1Samuel4:15 Tun Eli chu kum somko le kumget ahitan; amit athimin, kho amuthei tapon ahi." 
1Samuel4:16 Chuin mipan Eli jah-a, Keima sepai lah-a kona hungdoh-a kahin, tunia hi sepaiho lah-a kona hungjam doh kahi, ati. Chuin aman, Kachapa, chukoma chu ipi soh em? ati." 
1Samuel4:17 Chuin thupopan adonbutnin ajah-a, Philistine te masanga chun Israelte ajamun, mipi lah-a chun nasatah-a kithana aumin, chule nachapa teni Hophni le Phinehas jong athi lhonin, Pathen kitepna thingkhong jongchu alataove, ati." 
1Samuel4:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman Pathen kitepna thingkhong aphahpoh phatnin, kotpi phung sih-a chun atouna-a konin anung lhuh-in, angong atat bongin, athitan ahi; ajehchu ama tehse ahin, gih-a ahi. Chule aman kum somli Israelte thu anatanin ahi." 
1Samuel4:19 Chule amounu Phinehas inneipi chu naovopma soh koncha ahi: chuin aman Pathen kitepna thingkhong kilahle atehpu le a-inneipu thithu ajah phatnin, ama abungin nao aneitan ahi. Ajehchu anatchu achunga hunglhung ahitai." 
1Samuel4:20 Chuin ama athikon chun akoma ding numei ho chun, Kicha hih-in; ijeh inem itile chapa khat nahin ahi, atiuve. Ahinla amanun adonbut tapon, ngaijong angaisah tapoi." 
1Samuel4:21 Hichun amanun naosen min chu Ichabod asah-in, Loupina chu Israel'a konin akitol mangtai ati: Pakai kitepna thingkhong kilahpeh jeh le, atehpu le a-inneipu jeh ahi." 
1Samuel4:22 Chuin amanun, Loupina chu Israel'a kon kitolmang ahitai: ajeh chu Pathen thingkhong kilahmanga ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel5:1 Chuin Philistine ten Pathen thingkhong chu alauvin, Ebenezer'a konin Ashdod'a ahinpouvin ahi." 
1Samuel5:2 Philistine ten Pathen thingkhong ahinlah phatnun, Dagon in'a ahinpouvin, Dagon koma akoi taovin ahi." 
1Samuel5:3 Chule ajing jingkah matah-a Ashdod miho atho phatnun, veuvin, Dagon chu Pakai thingkhong masanga chun amai tollam ngan analhutan ahi. Chuin amahon Dagon chu adomdoh-un akitunna mama-a chun atung kitnun ahi." 
1Samuel5:4 Chuin ajing jingkah matah-a atho phatnun, veuvin, Dagon chu Pakai thingkhong masanga chun amai tollam ngan analhun; chule Dagon luchang le akhutphang teni chu tanbohsan kotbula chun anaumin, Dagon tahsa chubou ana kidalhan ahi." 
1Samuel5:5 Hijeh chun Dagon thempupa hihen lang, Dagon insunga hung koi hijongle, Ashdod'a Dagon kotphung chu tuni geijin achon pouvin ahi." 
1Samuel5:6 Ahinla Pakai khutchu Ashdod mite chunga gihsatah-in achun, chule amaho chu asumangin, Ashdod le agam kimvela chengho chu uilutnin ajepmin ahi." 
1Samuel5:7 Chuin Ashdod miten hichu amuphatnun, Israel Pathen thingkhong hi eihotoh umthei ponte: ajehchu ama khut chu eiho chungle i-pathen'u Dagon chunga anasa behseh jengin ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel5:8 Hijeh chun amahon Philistine te milen milal jouse ahenguva akou khomun, Israel Pathen thingkhong hi i-ilo diuham? atiuve. Chuin amahon adonbutnun, Israel Pathen thingkhong chu Gath lama kipotahen, atiuve. Chuin Israel Pathen thingkhong chu chulama chun apotaove." 
1Samuel5:9 Chuin ahitin ahi, hichu chulama apoh nungun, Pakai khutchu suhgamna nasatah-in khopi dounan achun; khopi sunga mite chu alen aneo abonun ajepmin, achunguva uilut achutan ahi." 
1Samuel5:10 Hijeh chun amahon Pathen thingkhong chu Ekron'a asoltaove. Chuin ahitin ahi, Ekron'a Pathen thingkhong ahunglhun phatnin, Ekron mite chu apeng jah-un, Amahon eiho le imiteu thatgam dingin Pathen thingkhong chu eiho henga ahinpouve, atiuvin ahi." 
1Samuel5:11 Hijeh chun Philistine milen milal ho jouse chu agakoukhom sah-un, ahenguva, Israel Pathen thingkhong hi solmangun, chule eiho imiteu eitha louna dingin aum namun mama-a chekit tahen, atiuve. Ajehchu hiche khopi jouse sunga chu suhgamna nasatah uma ahitan; Pathen khut chu gihsatah-a chua ahitai." 
1Samuel5:12 Chule mihem athilouho chunga chun uilut achun; chule khopi-a kana awgin chu van alhung touvin ahi. 
1Samuel6:1 Pakai thingkhong chu Philistine gama lhasagi aga umin ahi. 
1Samuel6:2 Chuin Philistine ten thempuho le doithemho akouvun, ahenguva, Pakai thingkhong chu ikalodiuham? Aumna ngaija chu iti kasol diuham? neisei peh-un, atiuve." 
1Samuel6:3 Chuin amahon, Israelte Pathen thingkhong chu nasol ule agoh-in solhih-un, ahinla suhkhel thilto khattoh nalesoltha teidiu ahi; chuteng nadam uva, ipijeh-a nangho-a kona akhut achondoh louham ti nahet dingu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel6:4 Hichun amahon, Amatoh kalesol tha dingu suhkhel thilpeh dingchu ipi hiding ham? atiuve. Amahon adonbutnun, Philistine te milal ho jat dungjuija uilut lim sanatum ngale sana jucha lim nga; ajehchu nabon chaova chungle namilen milal hou chunga chu natna kibang chua ahi." 
1Samuel6:5 Hijeh chun gamsung suse na-uilutnu limle najucha limu chu nasem uva; chule Israel Pathen chu loupina napeh dingu ahi. Chuti henlang hile nanghole na-pathen hou, chule nagam uva konin akhut ajangkhaisah domding ahi." 
1Samuel6:6 Chuti ahile ibola Egypt mite leh Pharaoh banga nalungu natahsah uham? Aman alah uva kidangtah-a na atoh phatna chu amahon mipi achedohsah uva, chule amaho potdoh-u hilouham?" 
1Samuel6:7 Hijeh chun tun kangtalai thah khat semun lang, namkoljon pokhalou bongpi noi kilhohlai ni kaijun, chule bong kang chuto sutouvin lang, anouteni chu amani-a konin inlama hinkaijun." 
1Samuel6:8 Chule Pakai thingkhong chu domun lang bongkang chunga koijun; chule suhkhel thilpeh ding sana tum amato nung soltha dinga nasemhou chu thingkhong khatna khumun lang apanga koijun; chule achemang nadingin solmangun. 
1Samuel6:9 Chule Beth-shemesh lampia ama gamkaija chu chetoupeh-am veuvin; achetou peh-a ahile hiche thilse khohtahhi amabol hija ahi; amavang achetoupeh louva ahile, eisugimuva chu ama khut ahipon, achama ichunguva hungsoh ahi ti ihetdiu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel6:10 Chuin mihon achuti bolun, bongpi noi kilhohlai ni akaijun, chule bongkang chuto asutouvin, chule anouteni chu in'a ahentup taove." 
1Samuel6:11 Chuin Pakai thingkhong le sana jucha lim le uilut lim umna thingkhong chu bongkang chunga chun akhangdoh taove. 
1Samuel6:12 Chuin bongpi tenichun Beth-shemesh jotna lamchu ajonjang lhonin, kun pumin lamlhongpi chu ajotpeh lhonin, jetle veija apetdoh lhonpoi; chule Philistine milal hochun Beth-shemesh gamgi geijin ajuipeh-un ahi." 
1Samuel6:13 Chule Beth-shemesh mihochun phaichama chu asuhlou changu ana-atnu ahin: amaho akhoda uva ahile thingkhong chu amutaovin, hiche amujeh-u chun akipah lheh-un ahi." 
1Samuel6:14 Chuin bongkang chu Beth-shemesh khomi Joshua lou ahung lutnin, chua songpi lentah khat umna-a chun adingtai. Chuin amahon bongkang thingchu a-eh un, bongpi tenichu Pakai henga govam thilto-in atoh taove." 
1Samuel6:14 Chuin bongkang chu Beth-shemesh khomi Joshua lou ahung lutnin, chua songpi lentah khat umna-a chun adingtai. Chuin amahon bongkang thingchu a-eh un, bongpi tenichu Pakai henga govam thilto-in atoh taove." 
1Samuel6:15 Chuin Levi hon Pakai thingkhong le aumpi sana manluho umna thingkhong chu alalhauvin, songpilen chunga chun akoitaove. Chule Beth-shemesh mihon hiche nikho mama chun Pakai henga govam thiltoho le ganlhainaho abol taovin ahi." 
1Samuel6:16 Chuin Philistine milal ngahon hiche amuphatnun, hicheni mama chun Ekhron'a akile taove." 
1Samuel6:17 Chule Philistine ten Pakai henga suhkhel thilto dinga ahin nungsolu uilut lim sanatumho chu ahile; Ashdod dinga khat, Gaza dinga khat, Ashkelon dinga khat, Gath dinga khat, chule Ekron dinga khat ahin;" 
1Samuel6:18 Chule sana jucha limho chu, kul kikai khum khopiho le thinglhang khoneoho puma Philistine te milen milal nga ho khopi jouse jat dungjuija ahin, Pakai thingkhong akoilhahnao Abel songpilen chung geichu ahi. Hiche songpi chu Beth-shemesh mite Joshua loulaija chu tuni geijahi umjing nalai ahi." 
1Samuel6:18 Chule sana jucha limho chu, kul kikai khum khopiho le thinglhang khoneoho puma Philistine te milen milal nga ho khopi jouse jat dungjuija ahin, Pakai thingkhong akoilhahnao Abel songpilen chung geichu ahi. Hiche songpi chu Beth-shemesh mite Joshua loulaija chu tuni geijahi umjing nalai ahi." 
1Samuel6:19 Chuin amahon Pakai thingkhong sung avetjeh-un, Aman Bethshemesh mihochu athatnin; mipi ho lah-a mi sangsomnga le somsagi jen athatnin ahi. Pakaiyin mipichu tamtah atha jeh-in mipi chu alunghem taovin ahi." 
1Samuel6:20 Chuin Beth-shemesh miho chun, Hiche Pakai Pathen thengtah masanga hi koiham adingjou dinga? Chule eihoa kona ama koihenga chedoh dingham? atiuve." 
1Samuel6:21 Chuin amahon Kirjath-jearim kho miho henga thupole ho asolun, ahenguva, Philistine ten Pakai thingkhong ahinpokit taove; hungsuh-un lang naheng uva potaovin, atiuve." 
1Samuel7:1 Chuin Kirjath-jearim miho chu ahungun, Pakai thingkhong chu apotouvun, thinglhanga Abinadab insunga apolutnun, achapa Eleazar chu Pakai thingkhong chingtup dingin athenso taove." 
1Samuel7:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, Kirjath-jearim'a thingkhong chu phat sottah aumin ahi; ajehchu kum somni jen uma ahi. Hitichun Israel insung pumpi chun Pakai lhangaijin akachamun ahi." 
1Samuel7:3 Chuin Samuel'in Israel insung jouse jah-a, Nangho nalung pumpiuva Pakai henga hungkile nahiuva ahile, nalah uva konin gamchom pathenho le Ashtaroth chu koimangun; chule Pakaiya din nalungu gongtup unlang, amabou jenun: chutile aman Philistine te khutna kona nahuhdoh dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel7:4 Hichun Israel ten Baalim le Ashtaroth chu akoimangun, Pakai bou ajentaove." 
1Samuel7:5 Chuin Samuel'in, Israelte chu abonchauvin Mizpeh'a khom khomun, chule keiman Pakai henga nataopeh uvinge, ati." 
1Samuel7:6 Chuin Mizpeh'a akikhom khomun, twi athalun, Pakai angsunga asunglhaovin, hiche nikho chun an angolun, Keiho Pakai dounan kachonse taove, atiuve. Chuti chun Samuel'in Israelte chu Mizpeh'a athu-u atanin ahi." 
1Samuel7:7 Chuin Philistine ten Israelte Mizpeh'a akikhom khomuve ti ajah phatnun, Philistine milal ho chu Israelte doudingin akontouvin ahi. Chuin Israel chaten hichu ajah phatnun, Philistine te chu akicha taovin ahi." 
1Samuel7:8 Chuin Israel chaten Samuel henga, Philistine te khutna kona eihuhdoh nadingun Pakai ka-Pathen'u hengu keiho dingin tanglouvin neitao peh-un, atiuve." 
1Samuel7:9 Chuin Samuel'in kelngoinou noicheplai khat alan, apumin Pakai henga govam thilto-in atohdoh-in: Israelte din Pakai henga ataovin; Pakaiyin asanpehtan ahi." 
1Samuel7:10 Chuin Samuel'in govam thilto ato laijin, Philistine te chu Israel satdin ahung naijun ahi. Ahinla Pakaiyin hiche nikho chun Philistine te chunga vangin nasatah aginsah-in, alungboi sah-in, Israelte masanga agal lel taovin ahi." 
1Samuel7:11 Chuin Israel mite chu Mizpeh'a konin apotdoh-un, Philistine te chu anungdelun, Beth-car aphah kahseovin athatpeh-un ahi." 
1Samuel7:12 Chujouvin Samuel'in song khat alan, Mizpeh le Shen kah-a atungin, chuin Hichan geijahi Pakaiyin eipanpiu ahi atin, aminchu Ebenezer asahtai." 
1Samuel7:13 Chutichun Philistine te chu suhnemin aumun, chule amaho Israelte gamsunga ahungkit tapouve. Samuel nikho laisen Pakai khutchun Philistine te adou jingin ahi." 
1Samuel7:14 Chule Philistine ten Israel te-a kona analah khopiho chu Ekron'a pat Gath geijin Israelte alepeh kit tan; chule agam kimvelho jouse jongchu Philistine te khutna konin Israel ten alelah kit taovin ahi. Chule Israelte le Amor mite kah-a chun chamna aumin ahi. 
1Samuel7:15 Chule Samuel'in ahinlai sungin Israelte thu anatanin ahi. 
1Samuel7:16 Chule akumseh'in Bethel le Gilgal, chule Mizpeh'a achekol lejingin, hiche munho-a chun Israelte thu atanjin ahi" 
1Samuel7:17 Chule Ramah'a chun a-in aumjeh'in ahungkile kitjin; chule hia chun Israelte thu anatanjin; hia chun Pakai dingin maicham khat asemin ahi. 
1Samuel8:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Samuel ateh phatnin achapa teni chu Israelte chunga thutandin apansah tan ahi." 
1Samuel8:2 Tun achapa lenpenpa minchu Joel ahin; aninapa minchu Abiah ahi: amanichu Beersheba-a thutan ahilhone. 
1Samuel8:2 Tun achapa lenpenpa minchu Joel ahin; aninapa minchu Abiah ahi: amanichu Beersheba-a thutan ahilhone. 
1Samuel8:3 Chule achapa teni chu ama lampia achelhonpon; ahin alam louva sum muding agolhonin, nehguh akilah lhonin, chule thudih chu aheikon lhonin ahi." 
1Samuel8:4 Hichun Israel upaho jouse chu akikhom khomun, Samuel henga Ramah'a ahungun," 
1Samuel8:5 Chule ajah-a, Ven, nangla natehtan, nachapa tenila nang lampiho-a achelhon poi; tun namdangho jouse bangin kathu-u tanding leng khat neisem peh-un, atiuve." 
1Samuel8:6 Ahinla amahon, Kathu-u tanding lengkhat neipeuvin, tia aseiju chun Samuel alung phatmo sah-in ahi. Chuin Samuel Pakai henga ataotan ahi." 
1Samuel8:7 Chuin Pakaiyin Samuel henga, Mihon nahenga aseijouse chu ngaipehtan, ajehchu amahon nangma napaiju ahipon; amavang achunguva vai kahom louna dinga keimajoh eipaiju ahibouve." 
1Samuel8:8 Egypt gama kona kahinpuidoh-a pat tuni geija athilbol jouseu dungjuija keima eidalhah uva, pathen dang ajenjiu banga chu, nangma henga jong abolu ahi." 
1Samuel8:9 Hijeh chun tun amaho thuchu ngaipeh-in: ahijeng vangin amahochu gihsalin lang, achunguva leng changdingpa thutan dingdan chu musah-in, ati." 
1Samuel8:10 Chuin Samuel'in Pakai thuho jouse chu leng neipeuvin tia ngeh-a mipi ho henga chun ahiltan ahi. 
1Samuel8:11 Chuin aman, Hichehi nachung uva lengchang dingpa thutan dingdan chu hiding ahi: aman nachapateo chu ama-a dinga alah-a, akangtalaiho-a ding le asakol sepai dinga apansah ding, chule abang asakol kangtalai masanga lhaiding ahiuve." 
1Samuel8:12 Chule aman asang chunga gallamkai, somnga chunga gallamkai dinga apansah ding; chule amaho chu alou lhouding, achang atding, agalmanchah semding, chule asakol kangtalai ho manchah sema apansah ding ahi." 
1Samuel8:13 Aman nachanuteu chu gimnamtui semding, anhon ding, chule changlhah semdinga akilahding ahi." 
1Samuel8:14 Chule aman nalouhou, nalengpi leihou, chule na-olive honhou chu aphapenho kisana alah-a, asohte apehding ahi." 
1Samuel8:15 Chule aman namuchi houle nalengpigao somakhat alah-a, avaipoho le asohte apehding ahi." 
1Samuel8:16 Chule aman nasoh pasal hou le nasoh numei hou, chule nagollhang phapenhou le nasangan hou chu alah-a, ama na atohsah ding ahi." 
1Samuel8:17 Aman nakelngoi honhou somakhat alahding: chule nangho ama soh-a napan dingu ahi. 
1Samuel8:18 Chule hiche nikho chule nanakilhenu lengpa jeh-a chu nahung ka diu; chule hiche nikho chule Pakaiyin nanangai peh loudingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel8:19 Ahijeng vangin mipichu Samuel thusei chu ngaiding anompouvin; amahon, Ahipoi, kachunguva leng khat kaneitei dingu ahi." 
1Samuel8:20 Chutia chu keiho jong namdangho jouse tobang kahidiu; chule kalengpaovin kathu-u eitan pehdiu, chule kamasanguva lamkaija kagalu eisatpeh dingu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel8:21 Chuin Samuel'in mipi ho thujouse chu angaijin, chuin abonchan Pakai nakhang sunga akhumsoh kitnin ahi." 
1Samuel8:22 Chuin Pakaiyin Samuel henga, athuseiju ngaipeh inlang leng khat tundoh pehtan, ati. Chuin Samuel'in Israel miho henga chun, Amitakip nakhopi cheh uva chetaovin, ati." 
1Samuel9:1 Tun hichelai chun Benjamin mikhat amin Kish kiti Abiel chapa, Zeror chapa, Bechorath chapa, Aphiah chapa, Benjamin mi, mihat thuneitah khat aumin ahi." 
1Samuel9:2 Chule aman gollhang dei umtah le hoitah amin Saul kiti chapa khat aneijin: chule Israel chate lah-a chun ama sanga hoija mi aumpoi. Alengkouva pat chunglamse chu midangho vuma sangdoh ahi. 
1Samuel9:3 Chuin Saul pa Kish sanganho chu amangin ahile Kish'in achapa Saul jah-a, Tun kipat in, nasoh ho lah-a khat kipuijin lang, sanganho holin chen, ati." 
1Samuel9:4 Chuin aman Ephraim molsang ajotpeh-in, Shalisha gamsung ajotnin, ahinla amanin amujou lhonpon ahi. Chuin Shalim gamsung ajotpeh lhonin, chua jong chun anaum pouvin ahi. Chuin Benjamin gamsung ajotpeh lhonin, ahinla amudeh lhonpoi." 
1Samuel9:5 Chuin amani Zuph gam ahunglhung lhon phatnin, Saul'in ahin kilhonpi asohpa jah-a, Hungin, kileta hite, achuti loule kapa sanganho chung sangin eini chunga lungkham jogetninte, ati." 
1Samuel9:6 Chuin aman ahenga, Ven, tuhin hiche khopi sungahin Pathen mi khat aume, chule amachu ja umtah mi ahin; aman asei jouse guilhung jengji ahi. Tun hilama chun chehite; ijem atile ichena lhonding lampi eihil theilhon khattou vinte, ati." 
1Samuel9:7 Hichun Saul'in asohpa jah-a, Ahinla ven, eini chelehen mipa chu ipi ichoipeh dingham? Ajehchu ibelsung lhona changlhah la abeisohtan, Pathen mipa choipehding thilpeh dingla aumpon: ipi ineijem, ati." 
1Samuel9:8 Chuin sohpa chun Saul adonbut kitnin, Ven, keiman kakhutna dangka shekel khat hoplia hopkhat aume; ilampi lhonding eihil lhon nadingin, hichehi Pathen mipa chu petange, ati." 
1Samuel9:9 (Masanglaijin Israel gama Pathen thudoh neidinga mi achetengle, Hungin, mitvah neipa henga chehite, ana tijiuve. Ajehchu tu-a themgao kitihi masanga chu mitvah neipa kitiji ahi)." 
1Samuel9:10 Chuin Sual'in asohpa henga, Naseidih-e; hungin, chehite, ati. Chuti chun Pathen mipa umna khopi-a chun achelhon tai." 
1Samuel9:11 Chuin khopi jotna lhanga chu akaltou lhona ahile, soh nungah ho twithal dinga hungpot dohho amulhonin, ahenguva chun, Mitvah neipa chu umam? atilhone." 
1Samuel9:12 Chuin amahon amani chu adonbutnun, Aumnai, ven, ama namasang lhona ache-e; tun kikinsah lhonin, ajehchu ama tunia hi khopi-a hunga ahi; ajehchu tunia hi munsanga mipi ganlhaina umding ahi:" 
1Samuel9:13 Khopisung nalut lhonlhonle munsanga an ne-a ache masanga namupai jeng lhonding ahi: ajehchu ama ahunglhun masanga mipihon an anehlou dingu ahi, ajehchu aman ganlhaina chu phatthei aboh-a, chujou teng akikouho chun anehdiu ahi. Hijeh chun tun chetou lhonin, tuphat donnahi ama namu lhonding ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel9:14 Chuin khopi sunga chun achetou lhontai: amani khopisung ahunglut lhon phatnin, veuvin, munsanga cheding chun Samuel chu amani henglam jonin ahunge." 
1Samuel9:15 Saul hunglhun masanga nikho-a chu Pakaiyin Samuel nabenga hitia anasei ahitai," 
1Samuel9:16 Jing nikho tuphat don hileh Benjamin gama kon mikhat kahinsol ding ahin, amachun Philistine te khutna kona kamite ahuhdoh theina dinga, kami Israelte chunga gallamkai dinga amachu thao nananu ding ahi: ajehchu akanao kaheng ahunglhun tahjeh-in, kamite chu kakhohsah tan ahi, ati." 
1Samuel9:17 Chuin Samuel'in Saul amuphatnin, Pakaiyin ahenga, Ven! keiman nahenga kanasei mipa chu, hiche mipa hin kamite chunga vai apohding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel9:18 Chuin Sual'in kotpi phunga chun Samuel chu agah naijin, Katao ahi, mitvah neipa in chu hoilaiham neihilin, ati." 
1Samuel9:19 Chuin Samuel'in Saul adonbutnin, Keima mitvah neipa chu kahi: munsang lama chun kamasanga chetouvin; ajehchu nangman tunia hi keima toh an ineh khomding, chule jingtengle kasol bepding; nalungsunga um jouse chu kahil ding nahi." 
1Samuel9:20 Chule nithum masanga anamanga nasangan hou thudola vang, amaho chunga chun lungkham hih-in; ajehchu amahochu amutaove. Chule Israelte ngaichat ho jouse chu koichunga umam? Nangmale napa insung pumpi chunga uma hilouham? ati." 
1Samuel9:21 Chuin Saul'in adonbutnin, Keima Israel phung jouse lah-a aneopen Benjamin mi kahi louham? chule ka-insung jong Benjamin phunga alhumpen hilouham? achutile ipijeh-a kahenga hitobang chu naseiham? ati." 
1Samuel9:22 Chuin Samuel'in Saul le asohpa chu kikhopna in'a ahin puilutnin, akikouho lah-a mun loupi pena atousah-in ahi: amaho chu somthum tobang ahiuve." 
1Samuel9:23 Chuin Samuel'in anhonpa jah-a, Nahenga, Atum beh-in koijin, tia kapeh sachan chu hinchoitan, ati." 
1Samuel9:24 Chuin anhonpan adah le achunga umhochu adomdoh-in, Saul anga aluitai. Chuin Samuel'in, Ven, anakikhen khenna chu hiche hi ahi, na-anga akiluije; ne-in; ajehchu, Keiman mipi ho kakouve kati-a pat tuchana hi nangma dinga anakikoi ahi, ati. Chutichun hiche nikho chun Saul'in Samuel to anekhomin ahi." 
1Samuel9:25 Chuin munsanga kona khopi sunga ahungsuh phatnun, Samuel'in indan chunga chun Saul akihoulimpin ahi." 
1Samuel9:26 Chuin matah-in athouvun; nisa sophat donin ahitin ahi, Samuel'in Saul chu indan chunga chun akou touvin, ajah-a chun, Kasoldoh theina dingin thouvin, ati. Chuin Saul athouvin, amale Samuel chu achedoh gel lhontai." 
1Samuel9:27 Chuin khopi pam geija achesuh lhon laijin, Samuel'in Saul jah, Sohpa hi imasang lam lhona ache nadingin solin, (ama achetai,) ahin nangma vang Pathen thu kamusah theinadin chomkhat dingdenin, ati." 
1Samuel10:1 Chujouvin Samuel'in thaothei khat alan, aluchunga asunglhan, amachu achopmin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin agoulote chunga gallamkai dinga thao nanu hilouham?" 
1Samuel10:2 Tunia hi nangma keima-a kona nachedoh tengle, Benjamin gamgi Zelzah'a Rachel lhan koma mini namu ding; chule amanin nangma henga, Ahol dinga nache lona sanganho chu akimutai: chule ven, napan sanganho khohsah ding anga-in, nangma dingin alungkhamin, Kachapa dinga hi ipi kabol dingham? atie, ati lhonding ahi." 
1Samuel10:3 Chuteng chua konchun masanglama chebe lechun Tabor phaicham lhungin natin, chua chu Bethel'a Pathen henga chetou mi thum nakimuto piding, khatpan kelnou thum, khatpan changlhah thum, chule khatpan lengpitwi haikhat achoiding ahi." 
1Samuel10:4 Chule amaho chun chibai naboh diu, changlhah ni napeh dingu; hichu akhutnuva kona nakisan ding ahi." 
1Samuel10:5 Chujou tengle Philistine sepaiho umna Pathen lhang chu nahung ding; chule hitiding ahi, hiche khopi-a chu nahungtengle, tumging le khongcha, kuli, chule selangdah amasanguva hintho-a munsanga kona hung kumlha themgao honkhat nakitopi ding; amaho chun gaothu asei dingu ahi." 
1Samuel10:6 Chule Pakai lhagao nachunga hungchu ding, amahoto gaothu nasei khomding, chule michombeh nakiso ding ahi." 
1Samuel10:7 Chule hung hitihen, hiche melchihnahohi nachunga ahunglhun tengle, thil hungso dungjuija nabol jengding ahi; ajehchu Pathen'in na-umpinai." 
1Samuel10:8 Chule nangma kamasanga Gilgal'a nachesuh ding; chule ven, govam thiltoho tohdingle chamna thilto ganlhaina toh dinga nahenga kahungsuh ding ahi. Nangman ipi nabolding musah dinga nahenga kahung kahse-a, nisagi nakhongai ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel10:9 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama Samuel'a kona kinungle dinga che akigotchun, Pathen'in ama lungchom khat apen; hicheni chun melchihna jouse chu aguilhung soh heltai." 
1Samuel10:10 Chuin amani chuche lhang lama chu ahung lhona ahile, veuvin themgao honkhat toh akitoh lhonin; chule Pathen lhagao achunga ahung chutan, chuin aman alah uva chun gaothu aseitan ahi." 
1Samuel10:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, masanga ama anahesa jouse chun aman themgaoho lah-a gaothu asei chu amuphatnun, miho chu khatle khat akihouvun, Kish chapa chunga khu ipi hungsoh-a hitam? Saul jong themgaoho lah-a panga hitam? atiuve." 
1Samuel10:12 Chuin chukoma mikhatnin adonbutnin, Ahin apao chu koiham? ati, hijeh chun Saul jong themgaoho lah-a panga ham? kitihi thuchih ahung hidohtan ahi." 
1Samuel10:13 Chuin athemgao thusei kichai chaijin, ama munsang lama ahungtai." 
1Samuel10:14 Chuin Saul pangahpa chun amale asohpa henga, Hoilama nache lhonham? ati. Chuin aman, Sangan hola che kahi lhonin: chule hoimacha kamu lhonlou phatnin, Samuel henga kahunglhone, ati." 
1Samuel10:15 Chuin Saul pangah pan, Katao ahi, Samuel'in nahenga ipi aseijem neihilin, ati." 
1Samuel10:16 Chuin Saul'in apangahpa henga, Aman sanganho chu akimutai tin kichentah-in eihil lhone, ati. Ahinla lenggam thudol Samuel'in aseivang chu ahilpoi." 
1Samuel10:17 Chuin Samuel'in mipichu Mizpeh'a Pakai henga akoukhomin; 
1Samuel10:18 Israel chate jah-a chun, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, keiman Egypt'a konin Israel kahin puidoh-in, Egypt mite khutna konle lenggam jouse-a kon, chule nasugenthei houva konin kahuh doh-in ahi." 
1Samuel10:19 Ahin tunin nahesoh naole nagenthei nao jouse-a kona nahuhdoh uva Pathen nanotthap taovin; chule nanghon ama henga, Ahipoi, kachunguva leng khat neitun peh-un, nati uve. Hijeh chun tun nangho tah Pakai masanga aphung phungin, asang sangin hungkipe doh-un, ati." 
1Samuel10:20 Chuin Samuel'in Israel phung jouse aheng ahin naisah phatnun, Benjamin phungchu alhengtai." 
1Samuel10:21 Benjamin phung chu a-inko kou-a aheng ahin nai phatnun, Matri insungchu lhen ahin, Kish chapa Saul chu lhendoh ahitai. Ahinla amachu aholule amujou pouve." 
1Samuel10:22 Hijeh chun amahon mi ahung be ding umnalai em, tin Pakai chu avelin adong kitnun ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin adonbutnin, Veuvin, ama thilkeu lah-a akisele, ati." 
1Samuel10:23 Chuin amaho alhaijun chua konin agapuidoh taovin ahi: chuin ama mipi lah-a adin phatnin, alengkouva pat chunglamse chu mijouse sangin asangjon ahi." 
1Samuel10:24 Chuin Samuel'in mijouse jah-a chun, Pakaiyin alhenpa, mijouse lah-a amatobang aumlou khu namu uvem? ati. Chuin mijouse chun hatah in asamun, Pathen'in lengpa huhhing hen, atiuve." 
1Samuel10:25 Chujouvin Samuel'in mipi chu lenggam thudol ahilin, lekhabu khatna asun lutnin, Pakai angsunga chun akoitai. Chuin Samuel'in mipi ho chu ama ama incheh-a asolmangtai." 
1Samuel10:26 Chuin Saul jong Gibeah'a a-in'a achetan; chule Pathen'in alungu atohkhah mi honkhatnin alhonpiuvin ahi. 
1Samuel10:27 Ahinla Belial chate chun, Hiche pan iti eihuhdoh diuham? atiuve. Chuin amahon ama nahsahmon abolun, thilpeh imacha ahinchoipeh pouve. Ahinla ama athipbeh-in ahi." 
1Samuel11:1 Chujouvin Ammon mi Nahasah chu ahung konin, Jabesh-Gilead dounan gebuh asongin ahi. Chuin Jabesh mijouse chun Nahash jah-a, Keihotoh kitepna khat semin, chule keihon nangma kajen dingu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel11:2 Chuin Ammon mi Nahash chun adonbutnin, Hitia hi nang hotoh kitepna kasem ding ahi, namit jetlam jouseu kakaldoh-a, Israel jouse-a dinga jum na hiding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel11:3 Chuin Jabesh upahon ajah-a, Israel gamkai jouse thangkou kasolthei nadiuvin, ni sagi neikhongai jun; chujouteng eihuhdoh dingu mi aumlouva ahile nahenga kahung kipehlut dingu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel11:4 Hichun thupole ho chu Saul chenna Gibeah ahung lhungun, thuchu miho jah-a aseitaovin ahi. Chuin mijouse awgingin akaptaove." 
1Samuel11:5 Chuin veuvin, Saul chu louva konin ganchahon nunga ahungin ahi; chuin Saul'in, Ipi hahsatna uma mipi ho khu kapma hiuvam? ati. Chuin amahon Gibeah miho thupoh chu aseipeh taove." 
1Samuel11:6 Chuin Saul'in chuche thuho chu ajah phatnin Pathen lhagao achunga ahungchun, alunghana chu nasatah-in akoujah jengtan ahi." 
1Samuel11:7 Chuin bongchal ni alan, achenbong bongin, Israel gamkai jouse-a thupole ho khutna athotnin, Saul le Samuel nung hinjuilou chanchu hitabonga hi abongchal chunga kibolding ahi, ati. Chuin mipi chunga chun Pakai ginna achutan, amaho lungkhat tah-in ahung kondoh taove." 
1Samuel11:8 Chuin aman amahochu Bejek mun'a asimin ahile, Israel chate chu sangjathum ahin, Judah miho chu sangsomthum ahiuve." 
1Samuel11:9 Chuin amahon thupole mi ahungho henga, Jabesh Gilead miho henga chun, Jing nikho nisasat laitahle kithopina namu dingu ahi, tin gaseipeh-un atiuve. Chuin thupole ho chu ahungun, Jabesh miho chu aseipeh-un ahile, amaho akipah lheh-un ahi." 
1Samuel11:10 Hijeh chun Jabesh mihon, Jingle naheng uva kahungdoh dingu ahin, nanghon kilominte tia pha nasah bangun kachungu boltaovin, atiuve." 
1Samuel11:11 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Saul'in mipi chu loithumin ahom khenin; jingpi phalvah-in amaho janel lailung tah-a chun alutnun, Ammon miho chu nisa asatdoh kahsen athatnun ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi, mi ni kidalha khoma aumlou kahsen, amoh chengse chu akithe cheh-un ahi." 
1Samuel11:12 Chuin mipi chun Samuel henga, Saul chu ichunguva lengchang mongding ham tia seija chu koiham? keihon katha theina dinguvin, amaho chu hinpuijun atiuve." 
1Samuel11:13 Chuin Saul'in, Tunia hi mi khatcha kithat theilou ding ahi; ajehchu tunia hi Pakaiyin Israel sunga huhhingna na atoh ahi, ati." 
1Samuel11:14 Chujouvin Samuel'in mipi ho jah-a, Hungun, Gilgal'a cheohitin, chule chua chun lengam gasemthah-u hite, ati." 
1Samuel11:15 Chuin mipi ho jouse chu Gilgal'a acheuvin; chule Gilgal'a chun Pakai masanga Saul chu lengin asemtaove. Chule hiche mun'a chun Pakai angsunga chamna thilto ganlhaina apeuvin; chuachun Saul le Israel mite jouse nasatah-in akipah-un ahi. 
1Samuel12:1 Chuin Samuel'in Israelte jouse jah-a, Veovin kahenga nasei jouseu chu kangaijin, nachung uva lengkhat kasempeh taove." 
1Samuel12:2 Chule tun veuvin, lengpa chu namasanguva achei: chule keima tehse lukang kahitan; chule veuvin, kachapate nang hotoh aumui: chule keima kachapan laijapat tunigeija hi namasanguva chejing kahi." 
1Samuel12:3 Veuvin, keima hikoma kaume; Pakai le athao nupa anga kachung chang thu hettoh sah-un: koi bongchal kalahpeh umkham? koi sangan kalahpeh umkham? koi kajoulhep umkham? koi kasuhgenthei umkham? ahiloule koi khutna kona kamit chotna dinga nehguh kalah umkham? Keiman hichu nangho kalepeh dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel12:4 Chuin amahon, Nangman neijoulhep khapouve, nei sugenthei kha pouvin, chule koima khutna konin jong nala khapoi, atiuve." 
1Samuel12:5 Chuin aman ajah uvah, Kakhutnahin adihlou ima namupouve tihi Pakai chu nachung uva ahetoh ahin, athao nupa hi tunia ahetoh ahi, ati. Chuin amahon, Amachu ahetoh ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel12:6 Chuin Samuel'in mipi jah-a, Mosi le Aaron ana gonga, chule Egypt gama kona napu napateu hinpuidoh-a chu Pakai ahi." 
1Samuel12:7 Hijeh chun tun nanghole napu napateu chunga anabol Pakai chonphatna natoh jouse chu, Pakai masanga nangho toh kagelkhom theina dingin dingdet nun." 
1Samuel12:8 Egypt'a Jacob alut nungin, napu napateu chun Pakai akouvun, chuin Pakaiyin Mosi le Aaron asolin, amanin napu napateu chu Egypt'a kona apuidoh lhona, hiche munahi achensah lhon ahi." 
1Samuel12:9 Chuin amahon Pakai a-Pathen'u chu asuhmil phatnun, aman Sisera Hazor janel gallamkai khut le Philistine te khutna, chule Moab lengpa khutna ajoh doh-in, chuin amahon amaho asatnun ahi." 
1Samuel12:10 Chuin amaho Pakai henga akapmun, ahenga, Keihon Pakai kadalhah uva Baal lim le Ashtaroth kajen jeh-un kachonse taove: ahinla tun kamelma teo khutna konin neihuhdoh uvin, chutile nangma kajen diu ahitai, atiuve." 
1Samuel12:11 Chuin Pakaiyin Jerubbaal, Bedan, Jephthah chule Samuel asolin, ningtina namelmate hou khutna konin nahuhdoh-un, lung mongin nacheng taove." 
1Samuel12:12 Chuin nanghon Ammon chate lengpa Nahash nangho douna-a ahung namu phatnun, Pakai na Pathen'u chu nalengpao ahilaijin, nanghon kahenga, Ahipoi; leng khatnin kachunguva vai ahomding ahibouve, nati uve." 
1Samuel12:13 Hijeh chun tun veuvin, nanghon nalhen ule nangaichatnu lengpa chu hikoma aume; chule veuvin, Pakaiyin nachung uvah leng khat atungtai." 
1Samuel12:14 Nanghon Pakai nagin uva, ama najen uva, a-aw nangai uva, chule Pakai thupeh chu nadou daova ahile, nangho le nachung uva vaipo lengpan jong Pakai Pathen chu najuijom jing dingu ahi." 
1Samuel12:15 Ahinla Pakai awchu nangailou uva, Pakai thupeh chu nadou uva ahile, Pakai khutchu napu napateu chunga anachuh banga, nangho chunga hungchu ding ahi." 
1Samuel12:16 Hijeh chun tun, dingun lang hiche thil loupitah Pakaiyin namitmuva namasanguva abol dinghi veuvin." 
1Samuel12:17 Tunihi suhlou chang atni hilouham? leng nakithum jeh uva Pakai mitmu-a nathilbolu nagitlou nao chu lentah ahi ti nahetdoh uva chule namutheina diuva keiman Pakai kakou ding; aman van ginle go ahinsolding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel12:18 Chutichun Samuel'in Pakai akouvin ahi; chuin hiche nikho chun Pakaiyin van ginle go ahinsolin: chuin mijousen Pakai le Samuel chu nasatah-in aging taovin ahi. 
1Samuel12:19 Chuin mipi jouse chun Samuel henga, Kathi louna diuvin Pakai na Pathen henga nasohtedin neitao peh-un; ajehchu kachonsetnau jouse belapma hiche lenghi kaki thumu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel12:20 Chuin Samuel'in mipi ho henga, Kicha hih-un: nanghon hiche gitlouna jousehi nabolu ahitai: hitajongle Pakai juina-a konin kiheimang daovinlang, nalung pumpiuvin Pakai chu jenuvin;" 
1Samuel12:21 Chule kiheimang hih-un; phatchomnabei le huhhing theilou pannabei thilho najui louheldiu ahi; ajehchu hihochu ahomkeo ahiuve. 
1Samuel12:22 Chutile Pakaiyin amin loupina jala amite adalhah louding ahi: ajehchu nangho amite-a semdinghi Pakai kipana ahi. 
1Samuel12:23 Chukalvalin keiman vang, nangho dinga kataona man kangah-a Pakai chunga kachonset dingchu Pathen'in jahda hen; amavang keiman apha le lamdih chu kahil dingu ahi." 
1Samuel12:24 Pakai bou gingun lang, nalung pumpiuvin thutah-in ama jenun: itobang thil loupitah nanabolpeh-u hitam ngaitouvin." 
1Samuel12:25 Ahinla nangho gilou tah-a nachon jingule, nangho le nalengpau nagom uva namanthah dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel13:1 Saul kumkhat aleng changin; chuin Israelte chunga kumni alengchan phatnin; 
1Samuel13:2 Saul'in ama dingin Israelte lah-a konin pasal sangthum alhengdoh-in; sangni chu Saul'in Michmash le Bethel molsanga aumpin; sangkhat chu Jonathan toh Benjamin gam Gibeah'a aumun: chule mipi amohho chu apon in cheh uvah asoltan ahi. 
1Samuel13:3 Chuin Jonathan'in Gebah'a Philistine sepai touho chu asatnin, hichu Philistine ten ajataove. Chuin Saul'in, Hebrew miten anajaohen atin, gamsung jouse-a chun sumkon amutnin ahi." 
1Samuel13:4 Chuin Israelte jousen Saul'in Philistine sepai honkhat abulu-in, chule Israelte chu Philistine te hot ahung hitaove ti ajataovin ahi. Chuin mipi ho chu Saul lengpa henga Gilgal'a akikhom taove." 
1Samuel13:5 Chuin Philistine te chu Israelte toh kisatdin akikhom khomun, sakol kangtalai sangsomthum, sakol sepai sanggup, chule mipi chu twikhanglen kama neldi jat helin atamun ahi. Chuin amaho ahung kondoh-un, Beth-aven'a pat solama um Michmash'a pannun asemun ahi." 
1Samuel13:6 Chutia Israel miten nochinto-a aumu amuphatnun, (ajehchu mipi chu lungdong lheh jenguva ahi,) mipi chu songko sung, hambohlah, songpiho-a, munsang ho-a, chule kotong dunga akisel gamtaove." 
1Samuel13:7 Chule Hebrew mi phabep Jordan agalkai jun, Gad le Gilead gama acheuvin ahi. Saul vangchu Gilgal'a aum nalaijin, mipihon kihotpum pummin anung ajuijun ahi." 
1Samuel13:8 Chuin Samuel'in phat ateppeh dungjuijin, nisagi aumin: ahin Samuel chu Gilgal'a ahunglou phatnin; mipi ho chu ama-a konin akithecheh taovin ahi." 
1Samuel13:9 Chuin Saul'in, Hikoma hin kahenga govam thilto le chamna thilto hinchoijun, ati. Chuin aman govam thilto aboltai." 
1Samuel13:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman govam thilto atojou jouvin, veuvin, Samuel ahung lhung paijin; chule Saul chu amatoh kimuto-a chibai bohdin apotdoh-in ahi." 
1Samuel13:11 Chuin Samuel'in, Ipi bola nahim? ati. Chuin Saul'in, Mipi ho keija kona akithe cheh uva, nangla nikho kitep sunga nahung da-a, chule Philistine te Michmash'a akichop khomu kamuphatna;" 
1Samuel13:12 Hichejeh-a keiman, Tu-a hi Philistine te keima doudinga Gilgal'a hungdiu ahitan, keimanla Pakai henga ngehna kanei louding ahi katin: hijeh-a chu keile kei kachamlouva kakibola, govam thilto kanato ahi, ati." 
1Samuel13:13 Chuin Samuel'in Saul henga, Nangin ngol hoitah thil nabol ahitai: nangman thupeh nape-a Pakai na Pathen'in nathupeh chu nanit tapoi: ajehchu tuahi Pakaiyin nalenggam chu Israel chunga a-itih-a dinga phudet ding agot ahin;" 
1Samuel13:14 Amavang tun nalenggam hi chejom louding ahitai: ajehchu nangman Pakaiyin nathupeh chu nanit lou jeh-a, Pakaiyin ama lungput tobang pumi akihol ahitai, chule Pakaiyin ama chu amite chunga lamkai dinga athupeh ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel13:15 Chuin Samuel akipat doh-in Gilgal'a konin Benjamin gam Gibeah'a achetoutai. Chuin Saul'in amatoh umkhom miho chu pasal jagup tobang asimdohtai. 
1Samuel13:16 Chuin Saul le achapate Jonathan, chule amanito umkhom miho chu Benjamin gam Gibeah'a chun aumtaove; ahinla Philistine mihon Michmash'a panmun asemun ahi." 
1Samuel13:17 Chuin Philistine te pan mun'a konchun michom dingho chu loithumin ahung potdoh-un: loikhat chun Shual gam Ophrah jotna lampi chu ajotnun; 
1Samuel13:18 Chule loikhat chun Beth-horon jotna lampi ajotnun; chule loikhat chun gamthip Zeboiim phaicham ngatna gamgi chin jotna lampi ajotnun ahi. 
1Samuel13:19 Tun Israel gampumpia chun thihkheng khatcha anaumpon ahi: ajehchu Philistine ten, Achuti loule Hebrew miten chemjam le tengcha kikhen getnunte, atiu ahi." 
1Samuel13:20 Chule Israelte jouse chu amitakip alangkon thih-u, alou kalnao, aheichao, chule atuphenghou khenghem dinga Philistinte henga chesuhji ahiuve." 
1Samuel13:21 Achutijeng vangin amahon tupheng, langkon thih, thihka, heicha, chule gancha hoina thihmol suhhemna aneijun ahi." 
1Samuel13:22 Chutichun chuche ni-a kidouna-a chun ahitin ahi, Saul le Jonathan toh kiloi miho khutna chun chemjam le tengcha khatcha muding aumpon ahi. Ahinla Saul le achapa Jonathan'in vang aneijin ahi." 
1Samuel13:23 Chuin Philistine sepaihon ho chu Michmash lampi lama achedoh-un ahi. 
1Samuel14:1 Tun nikhat chu ahitin ahi, Saul chapa Jonathan'in agalvon po-a pang gollhangpa jah-a, Hungin, Philistine sepaihon ho umna apang langkhatna khun gache galkai hite, ati. Ahinla apa henga anahet sahpon ahi." 
1Samuel14:2 Chule Saul chu Gibeah khopam ningkoi Migron'a um kolbuthei phung noikhatna atouvin ahi. Chule ama umpi mihochu pasal jagup tobang ahiuve. 
1Samuel14:3 Chuin Shiloh'a chun Pakai thempu Eli chapa, Phinehas chapa, Ichabod sopipa Ahitub chapa Ahiah chu boitong sangkhol akivonin ahi. Chule mipi chun Jonathan chelam chu ahepouve." 
1Samuel14:4 Chuin Jonathan'in Philistine te sepaihon ho galkai agotna lampi kikah jetle veija chun songpihem ni aumin, khatpa minchu Bozez ahin, khatjopa min chu Seneh ahi." 
1Samuel14:5 Tomasah pachun Michmash sahlam angan, khatjopa chun Gibeah jotna lhanglam angan ahi." 
1Samuel14:6 Chuin Jonathan'in agalvon po-a pang golhangpa henga, Hungin, hiche cheptanlou sepaihon ho heng lama khun galkai hite: Pakaiyin eini dinga na eitoh pehlhon thei ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiya dingin huhdohna natohna-a hin tam le lhomin ima apopon ahi, ati." 
1Samuel14:7 Chuin agalvon popan ajah-a, Nalungsunga umjouse chu bolin: kiheijin; ven, nalungdei banga umdingin keima nakoma kaume, ati." 
1Samuel14:8 Chuphatnin Jonathan'in, Ven miho henga khun galkai hitin, amaho gakimusah hite." 
1Samuel14:9 Amahon eini henga, Naheng lhona kahung kahseovin umtadi lhonin atiuva ahile, i-umna mun lhona idinden lhonding, ahenguva ichetou louding ahi." 
1Samuel14:10 Ahinla amahon, Kahenguva hungtou lhonin, atiuva ahile ichetou ding ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin ikhutna amahochu eipehdoh lhon ahitan: hiche hi amelchihna hiding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel14:11 Chuin anilhonin Philistine sepaihon ho aga kimusah lhontan ahi. Chuin Philistine ten, Veuvin, Hebrew ho khu akiselnao kohoma konin ahungdoh uve, atiuve." 
1Samuel14:12 Chuin sepaiho chun Jonathan le agalvon popa chu ahin donbutnun, Kahenguva hungtou lhonin, thilkhat vetsah-unge atiuve. Chuin Jonathan'in agalvon popa jah-a, Neihin juitouvin: ajehchu Pakaiyin amahokhu Israelte khutna apehdoh ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel14:13 Chuin Jonathan'in akhutle akeng tho-a akaltouva ahile, agalvon popan anung ajuitan ahi. Chuin amaho Jonathan masanga chu alhu taovin; anunga agalvon popa chun ahin that peh-in ahi." 
1Samuel14:14 Chuin Jonathan le agalvon popa mitha masatpen hochu mi somni bang ahin, gamneocha bongchal tokhat khoijou theibep acre keh sungbou ahi." 
1Samuel14:15 Chuin loujauva mipi janel lah leh mipi ho jouselah'a chun tijatna nasatah aumtan; sepaihon ho le thilchomho jong akihotnun: chule ling akihotnin, chutichun tijatna nasatah aumtan ahi." 
1Samuel14:16 Chuin Benjamin gama Gibeah'a Saul'in khongah akoiho chun aveovin; chuin veuvin, mihopi chu achat melmulun, khat le khat akiphuto saosaovun ahi." 
1Samuel14:17 Chuin Saul'in aumpi mipi ho jah-a, Tun kisim unlang ilah uva koi potdoh am veuvin, ati. Chuin amahon asimphatnun, veuvin Jonathan le agalvon popa anaum tapoi." 
1Samuel14:18 Chuin Saul'in Ahiah jah-a, Pathen thingkhong chu hilama hinpon, ati. Ajehchu hichepetna chu Pathen thingkhong chu Israelte toh uma ahi." 
1Samuel14:19 Chuin ahitin ahi, Saul'in thempu henga thu aseipet chun, Philistine te janel husa chu ahagincheh cheh jengtan: chuin Saul'in thempupa jah-a, Nakhut ladohtan, ati." 
1Samuel14:20 Chuin Saul le akoma um mijouse chu akikhom khomun, galmuna chun ahungtaove. Chule veuvin, mitin chemjam chu aloipa chunga achun, chule boina nasatah aumin ahi." 
1Samuel14:21 Chukalvalin chuche masanga Hebrew miho Philistine te toh ana umkhomho, chuche gamkimvela kona agebuh uva amahotoh anachetouho chu, amaho jongchu Israelte toh apangkhomun, Saul le Jonathan to apangkhom taovin ahi." 
1Samuel14:22 Chubangma chun Ephraim molsanga anakisel Israel mite jouse chun, Philistine te ajam taove tithu ajah phatnun, amaho jong chun galsat na-a amaho chu hatah in anungdelun ahi." 
1Samuel14:23 Chutichun Pakaiyin chuche nikho chun Israel ahuhdoh-in, chule gal kisat chu Beth-aven geijin agalkaijun ahi." 
1Samuel14:24 Chule hiche nikho chun Israelte chu alung genthei lheh-un ahi: ajehchu Saul'in, Kamelmate phu kalahthei nadin, nilhah ahi kahse-a an ne-a chu sapset changhen, tia mipi chu ahahsel ahi. Chutichun koimachan an kiti atep pouvin ahi." 
1Samuel14:25 Chuin gamsung mi jouse chu gamlah ahunglhung taovin; chule leichunga chun khoiju anaumin ahi. 
1Samuel14:26 Chuin mipi ho jouse chu gamlah ahunglut phatnun, veuvin, khoiju anakaijin; ahin koiman akhutna alan anepon ahi: ajehchu mipi chun hahselna chu akichatnu ahi." 
1Samuel14:27 Ahinla Jonathan'in apan mipi hahselna-a ahahsel chu anajapon; hijeh chun akhutna achoi molmuh-a chun khoiju lah chu asunlutnin, chuin akhutnin alan akama ahengtan ahile, amitchu hoitah-in ahung hahdoh theitan ahi." 
1Samuel14:28 Chuphatnin mipi lah-a khatnin adonbutnin, Napan mipi nasatah-a hahselna-a ahahsela, Tunia an ne-a michu sapset changhen ati ahi, ati. Chutichun mipi alhasam tan ahi." 
1Samuel14:29 Chuphatnin Jonathan'in, Kapan gamsunghi agentheisah ahi: Katao ahi, vetemin, hiche khoiju themkhat katep jeh-a kamithi iti hungha doh-a hitam." 
1Samuel14:30 Mipi jonghin amelmateu thil achom naova amuhouhi aning anopmin nomtah-in neleu phacheh louding ham? hijeh-a chu tugeija Philistine te tamtah itha theilouvu hilouham? ati. 
1Samuel14:31 Chule hicheni chun Michmash'a pat Aijalon geijin Philistine te chu athat peh-un; chule mipi chu alhasamlheh taovin ahi. 
1Samuel14:32 Chuin mipi chu thil kichom chunga achuvin, kelngoiho, bongchalho, bongnouho chu tollhanga athatnun: athisan pumchun anetaovin ahi." 
1Samuel14:33 Chuphatnin amahon Saul jah-a, Vetan, mipin thisan aneh uva konin Pakai dounan achonse taove, atiuve. Chuin aman, Nanghon nasukhelun; tuni hin songtum lentah neitahkhum taove, ati." 
1Samuel14:34 Chuin Saul'in, Mipi lah-a kithecheh unlang, ajah uvah, Amitakipmin nabongchalu, nakelngoiju hinkaijun, chule hikoma hin thatnuvin lang neuvin; thisan puma ne-in Pakai dounan chonse hih-un, ati. Chuin chuche jan chun mipi jouse amitakipmin abongchalu chu ahinkaijun, hikoma chun athat taove." 
1Samuel14:35 Chuin Saul'in Pakai dingin maicham khat asemin; hiche chu Pakai dinga maicham asem masat pentah ahi. 
1Samuel14:36 Chuin Saul'in, Eihon janlaijin Philistine te nung delsuh-u hitin, jingkhovah kahsen chommu hitin, chule amaho khatcha hinghoi pouhite, ati. Chuin amahon, Nangman phante nati tichu bolin, atiuve. Chuphatnin thempupan, Hilamhin Pathen naitadiu hite, ati." 
1Samuel14:37 Chuin Saul'in Pathen adongin; Philistine te satna kakonsuh dingham? Nangman amaho chu Israelte khutna napehdoh dingham? ati. Ahinla hiche nikho chun adonbut tapoi. 
1Samuel14:38 Chuin Saul'in, Mipi ho pipui jousen hilam hinai cheh-un: chule tunia hiche chonset hi hoilaija umham heuvin lang vetemun." 
1Samuel14:39 Ajehchu Israel huhhing-a hingjing Pakai mina kasei ahi, kachapa Jonathan chunga uma hijongle, ama thonlouva thiding ahi, ati. Ahinla mipi ho jouse lah-a konin khatchan adonbut pon ahi." 
1Samuel14:40 Chuphatnin aman Israelte jouse jah-a, Nangho langkhatna umunlang, keile kachapa Jonathan langkhatna kaum lhonding ahi, ati. Chuin mipin Saul jah-a, Nangman phante nati tichu boltan atiuve." 
1Samuel14:41 Hijeh chun Saul'in Israelte Pakai Pathen henga, Vang kisan dihtah hintah langin, ati. Chuin Saul le Jonathan chunga achutan, mipi vang ahoidohtai." 
1Samuel14:42 Chuin Saul'in, Keile kachapa Jonathan kah-a vang san uvin, ati. Chuin Jonathan chunga achutai." 
1Samuel14:43 Chuphatnin Saul'in Jonathan jah-a, Ipi nabolham neihilin, ati. Chuin Jonathan'in, Kakhutna um mol leh-a khoiju themcha khat katep ahi, chule ven, kathi teiding ahi, tin ahiltan ahi." 
1Samuel14:44 Chuin Saul'in, Pathen'in hitichun chule akalvalin jong boljenghen, ajehchu Jonathan, nangma nathi teiding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel14:45 Chuin mipi ho chun Saul jah-a, Israelte lah-a huhhingna loupitah bolla Jonathan hi thiding ham? Pathen'in jahda hen: Pakai hingjing mina kaseiju ahi, aluchunga kon samjang khatjon tolla lhalouding ahi; ajehchu tunin aman Pathen toh atongkhomin ahi, atiuve. Chutichun mipin Jonathan chu athilou nadin ahuhdoh taove." 
1Samuel14:46 Chujouvin Saul chu Philistine te nung adelna-a konin ache toutan; chule Philistine te jong aumnaova achetauve. 
1Samuel14:47 Chuti chun Saul'in Israelte chunga lengvai apon, ningtina amelmate jouse, Moab, Ammon chate, Edom, Zobah lengho, chule Philistine mite to akidouvin: chule akiheina lam tina gal ajoupeh-in ahi." 
1Samuel14:48 Chuin aman mipi janel akhomin, Amalek mite asatnin, chule amaho chom gama miho khutna konin Israelte ahuhdoh-in ahi." 
1Samuel14:49 Tun Saul chapate chu Jonathan, Ishui, chule Melchishua ahiuvin, chule achanu teni minchu hiche ahi; apeng masa nu min Merab ahin, chule aneojonu min Michal ahi." 
1Samuel14:50 Chule Saul inneipi min Ahinoam ahin, Ahimaaz chanu ahi. Chule ajanel gal lamkaipa minchu Abner ahin, Saul pangahpa Ner chapa ahi." 
1Samuel14:51 Chule Kish chu Saul pa ahin, chule Abner pa Ner chu Abiel chapa ahi." 
1Samuel14:52 Chule Saul nikholai sungse chun Philistine mite toh kidouna chu anasalheh jengin ahi: chutichun Saul'in mihat le mihangsan amu poupouva ahile, amanin ama-a dingin akipui jengjin ahi." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuel'in jong Saul jah-a, Pakaiyin ami Israelte chunga leng dinga nangma thao nudingin einasol ahin, hijeh chun tun Pakai thusei hi ngaijin." 
1Samuel15:2 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Amalek'in Israel chunga ana thilbol, Egypt'a kona ahungtouva chu lampia iti ana lamtin ham ti kahe jingin ahi." 
1Samuel15:3 Tun chenlang Amalek gasatnin, chule aneijouseu sumanghelin lang, amaho khatcha khenhih-in; pasal le numei agomin, naosen le noicheplai, bong le kelngoi, sangongsang le sanganho abonin thatgamin, ati." 
1Samuel15:4 Chuin Saul'in mipi ho chu akhom khomin, Telaim mun'a chun keng sepaiho sangjani leh, Judah mi sangsom asimdoh-in ahi." 
1Samuel15:5 Chuin Saul Amalek khopi khatna ahungin, phaichama chun achangpang tan ahi." 
1Samuel15:6 Chuin Saul'in Ken miho jah-a, Cheovin, kipatdoh-un, Amelek mite-a kon chun chesuh-un, achuti loule keiman amahotoh kasuh mangtha dingu ahi: ajehchu Egypt'a kona Israelte ahungtouvu chun hepina nana musah-un ahi, ati. Hijeh chun Ken miho chu Amalek miho-a konin apotdoh taove." 
1Samuel15:7 Chuin Saul'in Amalek mite chu Havilah'a pat Egypt toh kigalsai Shur lutna geijin anasuhmang pehtan ahi. 
1Samuel15:8 Chuin aman Amalek mite lengpa Agag chu ahingin amanin, mijouse chu chemjam monghemin asumang sohkeijin ahi." 
1Samuel15:9 Ahin Saul le mipi chun Agag le kelngoi hoipenho, bongchal thao ho, kelngoithao ho le anouhose chu ahing hoijun, ahin aphalou le dei umlou sechu asumang heltan ahi." 
1Samuel15:10 Hichun Samuel henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, hitin ati," 
1Samuel15:11 Saul lenga kanatundoh hi kakisih tai: ajehchu ama eijui na-a konin akileheijin, kathupeh ho atongdoh tapoi, ati. Hichun Samuel alungkham sahtan; jankhovah helin Pakai henga ataotai." 
1Samuel15:12 Chuin Saul kimupi dinga Samuel jingpitah-a athochun, Samuel henga, Saul chu Carmel lhanga ahungin, chule vetan, minkhat akisemin, chule ache lelen, achedoh-in, Gilgal'a achesuhtai, tin aseipeh-uvin ahi." 
1Samuel15:13 Chuin Saul henga Samuel ahungin: chule Saul'in ahenga, Pakai phattheiboh chang nahi; keiman Pakai thupeh chu kamolso tai, ati." 
1Samuel15:14 Chuin Samuel'in, Kanakhanga kelngoi hamgin le bongchal hamgin kajah hi ipi thu hitam? ati." 
1Samuel15:15 Chuin Saul'in, Amahon Amalek mite-a kona ahinkaiju ahi: ajehchu mipihon kelngoiho le bongchalho aphapenho chu Pakai na Pathen lhaina dinga ahing hoiju ahi; adangse vang kasumanghel taove, ati." 
1Samuel15:16 Chuphatnin Samuel'in Saul henga, Khongaijin, tujana Pakaiyin kahenga ipi anaseijem nahilinge, ati. Chuin aman, Seijin, ati." 
1Samuel15:17 Chuin Samuel'in, Namitmu-a neocha nahilaija chu Israel phungpi luchanga nakisema, Pakaiyin Israel pumpi chunga leng dinga thao nananu hilouham?" 
1Samuel15:18 Chule Pakaiyin kholjinin nasolin, nahenga, Chenlang michonse Amalek mitekhu gasumangsoh helin, chule abeitheng tokah seuvin amaho chu satnin, ati." 
1Samuel15:19 Achutile ibola Pakai awchu ngailouva, thil kichom chunga nachuhjoh-a, chule Pakai mitmu-a thilse nabol ham? ati." 
1Samuel15:20 Chuin Saul'in Samuel jah-a, henge, keiman Pakai thusei kanitnin, Pakaiyin eisolna lampia chun kachen, Amalek lengpa Agag chu kahinpuijin, Amalek mite chu kasumang heltai." 
1Samuel15:21 Ahin mipi hin suhmang heldingsa thilkichom kelngoiho le bongchalho, thil lah-a apha chung nungho chu Gilgal'a Pakai na Pathen henga ganlhaina-a dinga ahin kilah-u ahi, ati." 
1Samuel15:22 Chuin Samuel'in, Pakaiyin Pakai thusei ngai akipapi banga, govam thilpeh le ganlhainaho akipapi hinam? ven, thuman hi ganlhaina sanga phajo ahin, chule thusei kingaipeh hi kelngoichal thaotah sanga phajo ahi." 
1Samuel15:23 Ijeh inem itile golkeh hi aisana-a chonsetna toh kibang ahin, louchal kitihi khangitlouna le milim houna toh kibang ahi. Ajehchu nangman Pakai thusei napaidoh tah jeh-in, Aman jong leng nahina-a kona napaidoh ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel15:24 Chuin Saul'in Samuel henga, Keima kachonse tai: ijeh inem itile Pakai thupeh hole nangma thuho kapalkeh tai. Ajehchu mipi kakichatna, athu-u kanangai ahitai." 
1Samuel15:25 Hijeh chun, tun, nahenga katao ahi, kachonsetna neingaidamin lang, Pakai chu kahouthei nadingin keima toh kinungle kitnin, ati." 
1Samuel15:26 Chuin Samuel'in Saul jah-a, Keima nang toh kakinungle kit louding ahi: ajehchu nangman Pakai thu napaidoh ahitan, Pakaiyin Israelte chunga leng nahina-a kona napaidoh ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel15:27 Chuin Samuel chu chemang dinga akiheija ahile, aman asangkhol chol mong chu amanin, aloi-eh tan ahi." 
1Samuel15:28 Chuin Samuel'in ajah-a, Tunia hi Pakaiyin Israel lenggam chu nanga kona alhetela, nangma sanga phajo naheng nakom khat henga apeh ahitai." 
1Samuel15:29 Chujongle Israel Thahatna chu jou louding, alung jong aheilou ding ahi; ajehchu ama lunghei ding mihem ahipoi, ati." 
1Samuel15:30 Chuphatnin aman, Keima kachonse tai: hitajongle katao ahi, kamite upaho masang le Israelte masanga neijabolin lang, Pakai na Pathen chu kahouthei nadingin keima toh kinungle kitnin, ati." 
1Samuel15:31 Chuti chun Samuel chu Saul toh akinunglen, chuin Saul'in Pakai ahou tai." 
1Samuel15:32 Hichun Samuel'in, Amalek mite lengpa Agag chu kahenga hinpuijun ati. Chuin Agag chu ahenga ti kithing pumin ahungin ahi. Chule Agag chun, Thina tijat umtah chu chemanga ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel15:33 Chuin Samuel'in, Nachemjam chun numei ho chabei aso banga, numei lah-a nanujong chabei hiding ahitai, ati. Chuin Samuel'in Gilgal'a Pakai masanga chun Agag chu ahal halin asattel tan ahi." 
1Samuel15:34 Chujouvin Samuel chu Ramah'a achetan; chule Saul jong Saul umna Gibeah ah achetoutan ahi. 
1Samuel15:35 Chuin Samuel chu athi nikho geijin Saul kimupi dingin ahungkit tapoi; ahijeng vangin Samuel chu Saul dingin alunghem jingin ahi. Chule Saul chu Israelte chunga lenga anatun chu Pakai akisih tan ahi. 
1Samuel16:1 Chuin Pakaiyin Samuel jah-a, Israelte chunga alengchana kona kapaidoh henasa itihchan Saul dinga nalunghem dingham? nasaki-a thao sungdim minlang chen, keiman Bethlehem mi Jesse henga kasolding nahi: ajehchu achapate lah-a khu lengchang ding khat keiman gotsa kakoi ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel16:2 Chuin Samuel'in, Iti kachethei dingham? Saul'in jadoh leh eithading ahi, ati. Chuin Pakaiyin, Bongla khat kaijinlang, Pakai henga ganlhaina neidinga hung kahi, tin." 
1Samuel16:3 Chule ganlhaina-a chun Jesse kouvin, chule keiman nabolding chu kahilding ahi: chule nahenga kaminphah pachu keima dinga thao nanu ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel16:4 Chuin Samuel'in Pakai seibang chun abolin, Bethlehem'a ahungtan ahi. Chuin khopi-a upaho chu ahung jehchun atiu akithingin, Chamna-a hunga nahi hinam? atiuve." 
1Samuel16:5 Chuin aman, Chamna ahinai: Pakai henga ganlhai bola hunga kahi: nangho kisuthengun lang kahenga ganlhaina-a hungun, ati. Chuin Jesse le achapate chu asuthengin, ganlhaina-a din akoutai." 
1Samuel16:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, amaho ahung phatnun, aman Eliab chu aven, Pakai thaonupa chu amasanga umpa hi hiteijinte ati." 
1Samuel16:7 Ahivangin Pakaiyin Samuel jah-a, Nangman amaiso ahiloule asandan chu vehih-in, ajehchu keiman amachu kadeilou ahi; ijeh inem itile Pakaiyin mihem thilvet banga avet ahipoi; ajehchu mihemin polam melput avet ahin, Pakaiyin vang lungsung avet ahi, atipeh-e." 
1Samuel16:8 Chujouvin Jesse'n Abinadad akouvin, Samuel anga asolin ahi. Chuin aman, Hichepa jong Pakaiyin alhengpoi, ati." 
1Samuel16:9 Chujouvin Jesse'n Shammah asolkitnin ahi. Chuin aman, Hichepa jong Pakaiyin alhengpoi atipeh-e." 
1Samuel16:10 Avelin Jesse'n achapate sagiho chu Samuel anga asolin, ahi. Chuin Samuel'in Jesse jah-a, Hicheho hi Pakaiyin alhengpoi, ati." 
1Samuel16:11 Chuin Samuel'in Jesse jah-a, Hiche mun'a hi nachate jouse umkim sohkeiju vaham? ati. Chuin aman, Aneopenpa avat nalaije, chule ven ama kelngoi ching ahi, ati. Chuin Samuel'in Jesse jah-a, Gakousah-in; ajehchu ama hikoma ahunglhun masangse-a eiho itou loudiu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel16:12 Chuin aman agakou sah-in, ahinpui taove. Tun amachu tahsa phatah, mitha hoitah, chule vetnom umtah ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin, Kipatdoh-in, thao nutan; ajehchu hichehi amapa chu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel16:13 Hichun Samuel'in saki-a thaochu alan, asopite lah-a amachu thao anutai. Chuin chuche nikho-a patnin Pakai lhagao David chunga achutai. Hitichun Samuel akipatdoh-in, Ramah'a achetai." 
1Samuel16:14 Ahinla Pakai lhagao chu Saul'a konin achemang tan, chule Pakaiya kon lhagao gilou khatnin asugimtan ahi." 
1Samuel16:15 Chuin Saul sohten ahenga, Ven, tuahi Pathen'a kon lhagao gilou khatnin nasuhgim ahitai." 
1Samuel16:16 Tun ka-pakaiyun namasanga um nasohte hin semjang saithem mikhat agahol nadiuvin thupeh neijin; chule hung hitiding ahi, Pathen'a kon lhagao gilou chu nachunga ahung umteng, aman semjang asai ding, chutengle nangma naphat jiding ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel16:17 Chuin Saul'in asohte jah-a, Tun asai themtah mikhat neipeuvin, amachu kahenga hinpuijun, ati." 
1Samuel16:18 Chuin sohte lah-a khatnin adonbutnin, Ven, Bethlehem mi Jesse chapa semjang saithemtah, gal hat mihangsan, galbolmi, ijakaija hekhen themtah, chule melhoitah, Pakaiyin aumpi khat kamui, ati." 
1Samuel16:19 Hijeh chun Saul'in Jesse henga thupole ho solin, ahenga, Kelngoiho toh umkhom nachapa David chu neihinsol peh-in, ati." 
1Samuel16:20 Chuin Jesse'n changlhah toh lengpitwi haikhat, chule kelnou khat sangan apohsah-in, achapa David khutna Saul athot tai." 
1Samuel16:21 Chuin David Saul henga ahungin, amasanga adingtai: chule aman nasatah-in alungsetnin, agalvonpon ahung pangtai." 
1Samuel16:22 Chuin Saul'in Jesse henga, Katao ahi, David hi kamasanga dingjing hen; ajehchu ama kamitmun lungsetna achange, ati." 
1Samuel16:23 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pathen'a kon lhagao gilou chu Saul chunga aumtengle, David'in semjang alan, akhutna asaijin ahi: hitichun Saul chu alimdohjin, aphajitan, chule lhagao gilou chun adalhaji tan ahi." 
1Samuel17:1 Tun Judah gam Shochoh mun'a chun Philistine galsat ho chu galbol din akikhomun, chule Ephes-damim'a um Shochoh le Azekah kikah-ah ponbuh asongun ahi." 
1Samuel17:2 Chuin Saul le Israelte jong akikhom khomun, Elah phaicham panga aponbuh-u asongun, Philistine te douna-a galsatdin akigongtoh taove." 
1Samuel17:3 Chuin Philistine te chu molpang langkhatna adingun, chule Israelte chu molpang khatlama adingun ahi. Chule akah uva chun phaicham khat aume." 
1Samuel17:4 Chuin Philistine te gebuh-a konin Gath khomi amin Goliath kiti mihat tah khat, tong gup le khap khatna sang ahungdoh-in ahi." 
1Samuel17:5 Chule aman aluchunga sum-eng lukhuh akhuh-in, thih sangkhol aki-ah-in, asangkhol gihdan chu sum-eng shekel sanga agih ahi." 
1Samuel17:6 Akengteni sum-eng ngaltomin akitomin, chule alengkou teni kikah-a sum-eng tengcha aumin ahi." 
1Samuel17:7 Chule atenglung chu ponkhong ho talhang abangin, atengpeh gih chu thih shekel jagup ahi: chule mikhatnin apho apon amasanga achen ahi." 
1Samuel17:8 Chuin ama adingin Israel galsat miho jah-a chun asamin, Ipi dinga galsat dinga hung kigola nahiuvem? keima Philistine kahi, nangho Saul sohte nahiu hilouham? nanghodin mikhat lheng unlang, amachu kahenga hungsuh hen." 
1Samuel17:9 Aman eihung kisatpi jouva, eitha-a ahile, keiho nasoh-u hiuvingting; ahinla ken kajo-a, amachu katha-a ahile nangho kasoh nahiuva, neijen dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel17:10 Chuin Philistine mipa chun, Tunia hi Israel galsat miho kataitom nahiuve; kaki satpi dingin, mi khat neipeuvin, ati." 
1Samuel17:11 Saul le Israel mijousen Philistine mipa thusei chu ajah phatnun, alungu alhan, akichalheh jengun ahi." 
1Samuel17:12 Tun David chu Judah gam Bethlehem'a Ephrath mi Jesse chapa ahi; amapan chapa get aneijin, chule ama Saul nikholaija chun tehsetah ahitai." 
1Samuel17:13 Chule Jesse chapa lenpen thumho chu acheuvin galmuna chun Saul ajuijun ahi. Chule achapa thum galmuna cheho minchu, achapa lenpen Eliab, abanna Abinadad, athumna Shammah ahiuve." 
1Samuel17:14 Chule David chu alhumpen ahin, chule alenpen thumin Saul ajuiju ahi." 
1Samuel17:15 Ahinla David chu achen Saul'a konin apa kelngoi ching dingin Bethlehem'a ahung kile kit tai. 
1Samuel17:16 Chule Philistine mipa chun jingkah nilhah-in ahin naijin, nisomli sungin ahung kilah jingin ahi." 
1Samuel17:17 Chuin Jesse'in achapa David jah-a, Tun na-ute dingin changkanpoh ephah khatle changlhah lhon somkhat choi jinlang, na-ute gebuh lama lhaijin," 
1Samuel17:18 Chule hiche bongnoiha somkhat hi sangkhat chunga gal lamkaipa pohpeh-in, chule nasopite iti umuvem gavenlang thu hinle poh-in, ati." 
1Samuel17:19 Tun Saul le Israel mite jouse chu Elah phaichama Philistine tetoh kisatdinga uma ahiuve. 
1Samuel17:20 Chuin David chu jingkah matah-in athouvin, kelngoiho chu achingtup ding khattoh adalhan, Jesse'n athupeh bangchun thilho chu apon achetai. Chuin janelho galkula kon galsat dinga akijotdoh uva, galsat dinga a-ao laitah-un, ngahphol chu agalhungtai." 
1Samuel17:21 Ajehchu Israelte le Philistine te chu galsat mi le galsat mi kisatto din akigol cheh taove. 
1Samuel17:22 Chuin David'in thil chingtuppa henga athilpohho chu adalhan, galsat miho lah-a alhailutnin, a-ute chu chibai agabohtai." 
1Samuel17:23 Chuin amahotoh akihou laijin, veuvin, Gath mi Philistine mihatpa, amin Goliath kitipa chu Philistine galsat mihon lah-a konin ahungdoh-in, athusei ngaibang chun ahinsei kitnin ahile, hichu David'in ajatai." 
1Samuel17:24 Chuin Israel mite jousen mipa chu amuphatnun, ama-a konchun ajamun, hatah-in akichao vin ahi." 
1Samuel17:25 Chuin Israel miho chun, Ahungdoh mipa khu namuvem? Israelte sujum ding mongmonga hungdoh-a ahi; chule hiti ding ahi, ama that penpen chu lengpan haona nasatah-a ahaosah ding, chule amachu achanu jong apeh-a, apate insung chu Israel lah-a a-onthol sah ding ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel17:26 Chuin David'in akoma dingho jah-a chun, hiche Philistine mipa thatna, Israel te-a kona minsetna lamangpa chu i-kilo dingham? ajehchu hiche cheptanlou Philistine mipa hi hoi koi hija, Pathen hing galsat miho hi ajumso ham? ati." 
1Samuel17:27 Chuin mihochun hitihin adonbutnun, Amapa that penpen chunga chu, akisei bang banga kibolding ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel17:28 Chuin a-upa alenpen Eliab'in miho toh akihoulim chu ajan; David chunga chun Eliab lunghanna chu akoujah jengtan, ajah-a, Ibola hikoma hungsuh nahim? chule kelngoi lhomcha khat chu gamthipma koi nahin chin sah ham? naki letsah na le naphatlou kahei; ajehchu kidouna munoma hungsuh nahi, ati." 
1Samuel17:29 Chuin David'in tu-a hi ipi kabol em? ajeh uma hilouham? ati. 
1Samuel17:30 Chuin ama-a konin adangho lama akiheijin, chutobangma chun aseijin ahi: chuin mipin amachu amasa bangma chun adonbutnun ahi." 
1Samuel17:31 Chuin David thusei ho ajah phatnun, Saul henga aga hetsah taovin ahile, aman akouding ahinsol tai." 
1Samuel17:32 Chuin David'in Saul jah-a, Ama jehkhun koimacha lunglha hihhel hen, nasohhi kache-a hiche Philistine mipa tokhun kaga kisat ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel17:33 Chuin Saul'in David jah-a, Hiche Philistine mipa kidoupi dingkhun chethei pon nate: ajehchu nangma khangdong chabou nahin, amakhu aneova patna galbolmi hung hija ahi, ati." 
1Samuel17:34 Chuin David'in Saul jah-a, Nasohhin apa kelngoi ana chingin, hia chun keipi bahkai le vompi ahunga kelngoihon lah-a konin kelngoi nouho ahunglhoh jiteng;" 
1Samuel17:35 Anung kadel jin, kakidel pin, akama konin kaloidoh-in kahuh dohjin ahi: chule keima thatdinga ahung kipatdoh-a ahile, akhamula kamanin, kajepmin, kathatjitai, ati." 
1Samuel17:36 Nasoh hin keipi bahkai le vompi ani-in kathatnin ahi: chule hiche cheptanlou Philistine mipa hi Pathen hing galsat mite ajumso kimu ahin, hiteho khat tobang chu hiding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel17:37 David'in aseiben, Pakaiyin keipi khophanga konle vompi khophanga kona eina huhdoh ahin, aman hiche Philistine mipa khutna kona jong eihuhdoh ding ati. Chuin Saul'in David henga, Chen, Pakaiyin naumpi hen, ati." 
1Samuel17:38 Chuin Saul'in agalvon chu David avonpeh'in, aluchanga chun sum-eng lukhuh akhuhpeh-in, thih sangkhol a-ah peh-in ahi." 
1Samuel17:39 Chuin David'in achemjam chu agalvon chunga akojin, cheding agon ahi; ajehchu hichu anapatep khahlou ahi. Chuin David'in Saul jah-a, Hicheho pumin chethei ponge, ajehchu hichehohi kamangkhapoi, ati. Chuti chun David'in asutlha gamtai." 
1Samuel17:40 Chuin atenggol akhutna achoijin, vachadunga konin songchang jolsel changnga alhengin, akelngoi chinna sakhao neo sunga akhumin; akhutna ahsongse achoijin, Philistine mipa chu anailut tan ahi." 
1Samuel17:41 Chuin Philistine mipa ahungin, David chu ahin naipheijin; chule apho popa chu amasanga achen ahi." 
1Samuel17:42 Chule Philistine mipan avetle David amuphatnin, amachu anoiselheh-in ahi: ajehchu ama khangdong ahin, tahsa phatah le maiso hoitah ahi." 
1Samuel17:43 Chuin Philistine mipan David jah-a, Keima uicha kahia kahenga tenggol toh nahungham? ati. Chuin Philistine mipa chun a-pathenhou min panin David chu agaosaptai." 
1Samuel17:44 Chuin Philistine mipan David jah-a, Kahenga hungin, keiman naphe chu chunga leng vachate le gamlah-a gamsaho kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel17:45 Chuin David'in Philistine mipa jah-a, Nangma kahenga chemjam le tengcha chule lum tho-a nahung ahin, hinlah keima vang nangin nataitom Israel galsat mite Pathen, janel Pakai mina chu hunga kahi." 
1Samuel17:46 Tunia hi Pakaiyin nangma kakhutna eipehdoh ding; chule nangma katha-a, nalu kalahding; chule leiset pumpin Israelte lah-a Pathen aumme ti ahetna diuva, Philistine sepai janel longchu tunia hi chunga leng vachate le leija gamsaho kapeh ding ahi." 
1Samuel17:47 Chule hichea kikhom jousehin Pakaiyin chemjam le tengchan ahuhhing poi ti ahetdiu ahi; ajehchu galsat hi Pakaiya ahin, aman nangho kakhut uva eipehlut diu ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel17:48 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, Philistine mipa ahung kipatdoh-a, David henglam ahin nai phatnin, kintah-in David chu Philistine galsat miho toh kisuto dingin alhaitan ahi."
