1Samuel17:49 Chuin David'in akhutnin sakhao sung asoh-in, chua konchun songchang khat alan, ahsongse-a chu asea ahile, Philistine mipa chalpanga achun, songchang chu achalpanga alutnin; chuin ama amaijin tolla alhutai." 
1Samuel17:50 Chuti chun David'in Philistine mipa chu ahsongse le songchang khatnin ajouvin, Philistine mipa chu asepmin, athattai; ahinla David khutna chun chemjam aumpon ahi." 
1Samuel17:51 Hitichun David alhaijin, Philistine mipa chunga adingin, achemjam chu alan, apaija konchun asatdoh in, athatnin, hia chun alu atanbongtai. Chuin Philistine ten amihatpao athi chu amuphatnun ajamtaovin ahi." 
1Samuel17:52 Chuin Israelte le Judah miho akipatnun, hatah in a-aovun, phaicham le Ekron kotpi aphah kahseovin Philistine te chu anung delun ahi. Chule Philistine mipi ho chu Shaaraim lampi dunga, Gath le Ekron changeijin alhuchap jengun ahi." 
1Samuel17:53 Chuin Israel chate chu Philistine te anungdel uva konin ahung kileuvin, aponbuh houchu asumang taove." 
1Samuel17:54 Ahin David'in Philistine mipa luchang chu alan, Jerusalem'a ahinpotai; ahin agalvon vang apon in'a akoijin ahi." 
1Samuel17:55 Chuin Saul'in David Philistine mipa satdinga achedoh amuchun, janel gallamkai Abner jah-a, Abner hiche gollhangpa hi koicha ham? ati. Chuin Abner'in, Vo lengpa, nahinna hingjeng hen, kasei theipoi, ati." 
1Samuel17:56 Chuin lengpan, Khangdongpa chu koicha ham? hinkhol toh-in, ati." 
1Samuel17:57 Chuin David chu Philistine mipa atha-a kona ahung kile phatnin, Abner'in apuijin, akhutna Philistine mipa luchang pumin Saul masanga ahin puilut tai." 
1Samuel17:58 Chuin Saul'in ajah-a, Gollhang nangma koipen cha nahim? ati. Chuin David'in adonbutnin, Keima Bethlehem mi nasoh Jesse chapa kahi, ati." 
1Samuel18:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Saul henga athusei achai phatnin, Jonathan hinna chu David hinna toh akijopmat tan, chule Jonathan'in David chu ama hinna bang bangin angailutan ahi." 
1Samuel18:2 Chuin hicheni chun Saul'in ama akipuijin, chule a-in lam apa in'a achesah nom tapoi." 
1Samuel18:3 Chujouvin Jonathan le David'in kitepna aneilhone; ajehchu aman ama hinna bangin amachu angailun ahi. 
1Samuel18:4 Chuin Jonathan'in achunga kai asangkhol len chu asutlhan, avonho, achemjam le athalpi, chule akongah sannin David apetan ahi." 
1Samuel18:5 Chuin Saul'in asolnalam lama David achedohjin, chule chingthei tah-in aumin ahi: chule Saul'in ama chu galbolho chunga lamkaijin atungin, ama chu mijouse mitmu le Saul sohte mitmun deisahna achangin ahi." 
1Samuel18:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, David'in Philistine mipa atha-a, atha naova kona ahungkileu chun, Israelte khopiho jouse-a konin numei ho lasa le lam pumin, khongcha le thil gingtheiho thon thanom tah-in Saul lamto dingin ahungpot doh-un ahi." 
1Samuel18:7 Chuin numei hon la asaovin, Saul'in asang asang athatnin, David'in sangsom sangja athatne, tin khatle khat akidonbutnun ahi." 
1Samuel18:8 Chuin Saul alung ahanglheh-in, akisei chun alung phatmosah lheh-in; aman, David'in sangsom athan aseijun, chule keiman sangkhat kathan bou aseijuve: lenggam tailou adang ipi alahbe ding umtam? ati." 
1Samuel18:9 Chuin Saul'in chuche ni-a pat akalse chu David chu amit thiptan ahi. 
1Samuel18:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, ajingin Pathen'a kona lhagao gilou chu Saul chungah ahungchun, insunga chun gaothu aseijin: phatdanga bangin David'in akhutnin semjang asaijin; chule Saul khutna chun tengcha khat aumin ahi." 
1Samuel18:11 Chuin Saul'in tengcha chun akhon ahi; ajehchu aman, David chu tengchan bangtoh khobeh inge, ati ahi, chuin David ama-a konin nivei ahoidoh-in ahi." 
1Samuel18:12 Chuin Saul'in David chu akichatan ahi, ajehchu Pakaiyin ama aumpin, Saul chu adalha tai." 
1Samuel18:13 Hijeh chun Saul'in ama-a konin asoldoh-in, sangkhat chunga gal lamkaijin apansah-in; chule ama mipi masanga chun alutle apotlejin ahi." 
1Samuel18:14 Chuin David alampi jouse-a chingthei tah-in aumin; chule Pakaiyin aumpin ahi. 
1Samuel18:15 Hijeh chun Saul'in ama chingtheitah-a aum amuphatnin, amachu akichatan ahi." 
1Samuel18:16 Ahinla Israelte jouse le Judah ten David chu a-angsung uva alutle apotle jeh-in angailuvin ahi. 
1Samuel18:17 Chuin Saul'in David jah-a, Ven, kachanu lenjonu Merab hi najidinga kapeh ding nahi: keidin hangtah-in pang poupouvin lang, Pakai galchu satnin, ati. Ajehchu Saul'in, Kakhut hi achunga chuhda hen, amavang Philistine te khut joh chu achunga chuhen, ati ahi." 
1Samuel18:18 Chuin David'in Saul jah-a, Keima hi koi kahiham? chule kahinkho ipi hija, Israel insunga kapa insung ipi hija, lengpa tupa kahiding ham? ati." 
1Samuel18:19 Ahinla Saul chanu Merab chu David akipeh ding phatchun ahitin ahi, Meholath mi Adriel jidin amanu akipetan ahi." 
1Samuel18:20 Chuin Saul chanu Michal'in David adeichan; chule Saul jah-ah aseipeh-un ahile ama akipah lheh-in ahi. 
1Samuel18:21 Chuin Saul'in, Amanu hi amapa dinga thang ahitheina dingle, Philistine te khut achunga achuhthei nadin, amanu chu David penge, ati. Hijeh chun Saul'in David jah-a, Tunia katupa nahi ding ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel18:22 Chuin Saul'in asohte thu apen, ajah uva, David toh guhthim chan kihou unlang, ahenga, Ven, lengpan nachunga kipana aneijin, asohte jousen nangailui: hijeh chun tun lengpa tupa hitan tiuvin, ati." 
1Samuel18:23 Chuin Saul sohten thuho chu David jah-a aseijun ahi. Chuin David'in, Kei migenthei le mi nahsahmo kahi nahena saova, lengpa tupa hidingchu thil bailama nagelu ham? ati." 
1Samuel18:24 Chuin Saul sohten ajah-a, David'in hitin aseije tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
1Samuel18:25 Chuin Saul'in, Hitia hi David henga nasei dingu ahi, lengpan amelmate phu lahna dinga Philistine chep jakhat tailou numei man imacha angehpoi tin seijun, ati. Ahinla Saul'in David chu Philistine te khutna thisah agot ahibouve." 
1Samuel18:26 Chuin asohten hichethu chu David aseipeh phatnun, lengpa tupa hiding chu David akipah-in; nikhoho chu akichai hihlaije." 
1Samuel18:27 Chuin David akipatdoh-in, amale amite acheuvin, Philistine miho jani agathatnun: David'in achepmu ahinpon, lengpa tupa ahithei nadin, lhingkeijin lengpa apetaove. Chuin Saul'in ajidin achanu Michal apetai." 
1Samuel18:28 Chuin Saul'in Pakaiyin David aumpi chu ahetan, chule Saul chanu Michal'in amachu angailun ahi." 
1Samuel18:29 Chuin Saul'in David chu akicha cheh tan: Saul chu David melma ahijom jingtan ahi. 
1Samuel18:30 Chujouvin Philistine pipuiho apotdoh-un: chuin ahitin ahi, amaho potdoh nungun, David chu Saul sohte jouse sangin chingthei cheh-in aumtan; chutichun aminchu nasatah-in akithangin ahi." 
1Samuel19:1 Chuin Saul'in achapa Jonathan le asohte jouse David that dingin ahoulimpi tan ahi. 
1Samuel19:2 Ahinla Saul chapa Jonathan'in David chu angailu lheh-in: chule Jonathan'in David henga, Kapa Saul'in thadingin nahole: hijeh chun tun, katao ahi, jingkah ahikahsen kichihtheijin, munthipma uminlang kiselin." 
1Samuel19:3 Chule keima kachesuh-a naumna loujaova chun kapa koma kadina, nangma chungchang thu kaseiding; chule kamudoh chanchu nangma kaseipeh ding nahi, ati." 
1Samuel19:4 Chuin Jonathan'in apa Saul henga David chu aseiphan, ahenga hitin aseije, Lengpan asohpa David dounan chonset boldahen; ajehchu nang dounan achonsepon, chule athilbol jouse chu nang dinga phatna ngen ahi:" 
1Samuel19:5 Ajehchu aman ahinkho akhutna akichoi tho-a, Philistine mipa anatha-a, Pakaiyin Israelte jouse dinga huhhingna loupitah anabol ahi: chuti ahile ajeh beija David chu natha-a, monabei thisan douna-a nachonset ding ham? ati." 
1Samuel19:6 Chuin Saul'in Jonathan thusei angaijin: chule Saul akihahselin, Hingjing Pakai min pana kasei ahi, ama kithat louding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel19:7 Chuin Jonathan'in David akouvin, chule Jonathan'in thu jouse chu ahiltan ahi. Chule Jonathan'in David chu Saul henga apuijin, masanglaija bangin a-angsunga aumkit tan ahi." 
1Samuel19:8 Chuin gal aumkit tan: David akondoh-in Philistine tetoh akisatnin, amaho nasatah-in athatnin; chuin amaho ama-a konin ajamtaove." 
1Samuel19:9 Chuin a-insunga auma, akhutna teng akichoi petnin, Pakaiya kon lhagao gilou chu Saul chunga achutan; chule David'in akhutnin semjang asaijin ahi." 
1Samuel19:10 Chuin Saul'in David chu bangtoh khobeh-a thading agon; ahinla ama Saul umna-a konin ajamdoh-in, ateng chun bang akhochang jengin ahi. Chuin David ajamin, hiche janchun ajamdoh tai." 
1Samuel19:11 Saul'in David inlama jingkah-a anachanga thatdingin sottol leho asolin ahi: chuin David inneipi Michal'in ahenga, Tujanna nahinna nakihuh doh louva ahile, jingle nakithat ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel19:12 Chutichun Michal'in David chu bangkotna akhailhan: ama achen, ajamin, ahoidohtai." 
1Samuel19:13 Chuin Michal'in milim khat alan, jalkhuna chun alupsah-in, aluchang dingin kelcha mul akoijin, hichu ponnin akhun ahi." 
1Samuel19:14 Chuin Saul'in David kouding thangkou asolphatnin, amanun, Adampoi atin ahi." 
1Samuel19:15 Chuin Saul'in David vedin sottol hochu asolkitnin, ajah uva, Katha theinadin, ajalkhun pumin kahenga hindom touvun, ati." 
1Samuel19:16 Chuin sottol ho ahunglut phatnun, veuvin, jalkhuna chun aluchang dinga kelcha mul kikoi milim khat analumin ahi." 
1Samuel19:17 Chuin Saul'in Michal henga, Ibola hitia hi neijou lhepma, kamelma pa chu ahoidoh nadinga nasoldoh ham? ati. Chuin Michal'in Saul adonbutnin, Aman kahengah, Neiche sah-in; ibola kathading nahim? atin ahi, ati." 
1Samuel19:18 Chuin David chu ajamin, ahoidohtan, Ramah'a Samuel koma ahungin, Saul thilbol jouse chu ahiltai. Chuin amale Samuel ache lhonin, Naioth'a acheng lhontai." 
1Samuel19:19 Chuin hichu Saul ahilun, Ven, Ramah gamsung Naioth'a David aume, atiuve." 
1Samuel19:20 Chuin Saul'in David mandin sottol leho asolin: chuin amahon themgao honkhat gaothu aseijuva, chule achunguva Samuel lamkaija ana ding amuphatnun, Saul sottol leho chunga chun Pathen lhagao ahung chun, amahon jong gaothu asei taove." 
1Samuel19:21 Chuin hichu Saul aseipeh phatnun, sottol dangho asolkitnin ahile, amahon jong chutima chun gaothu aseikit taove. Chuin Saul'in athumveina-a sottol leho asolkitnin ahileh, amahon jong gaothu aseiden kit taove." 
1Samuel19:22 Hichun amajong Ramah'a ahungin, Sechu'a um twikul lentah phung ahung lhungin, Samuel le David hoija umlhonnam? tin adongin ahi. Chuin mikhatnin, Vetan, Ramah gam Naioth mun'a aum lhone, ati." 
1Samuel19:23 Chuin ama Ramah gam Naioth'a achen ahile, Pathen lhagao chu ama chunga jong achutan, Ramah gam Naioth alhun kahsen ache pumin gaothu aseipeh tan ahi." 
1Samuel19:24 Chuin aponjong ahohlhan, Samuel angsunga chun hitichun gaothu aseijin, chuche nikho nilhum le jankhovah-in asagoh-in alumin ahi. Hijeh chun amahon, Saul jong themgaoho lah-a panga hitam? atiuve." 
1Samuel20:1 Chuin David chu Ramah gam Naioth'a konin ajamin, Jonathan henga ahungin, ajah-a, Ipi kabol am? kakhan gitlouna ipi umam? chule napa anga kachonsetna ipi uma thadinga kahinkho hi aholham? ati." 
1Samuel20:2 Chuin aman ajah-a, Nathi ding chu Pathen'in jahda hen: ven kapan keima hetsah louvin, thil len hihen, thilneo hijongle bolponte. Achutile ipi dinga kapan hicheho chu kakoma a-im dingham? Chutiponte, ati." 
1Samuel20:3 Chuin David akihahsel kitleuvin, Namitmu-a lungsetna kachanhi napan chentah-in ahen; Jonathan'in hichehi hetda maihen, atiloule lungna getninte ati hinte. Ahinla hingjing Pakai le nangma mina pana kasei ahi, keima le thina kikah-a hi kalkhat sehbou uma ahi, ati." 
1Samuel20:4 Hichun Jonathan'in David jah-a, Ipi hijongle nahinnan angaichat chanchu, nanga dinga kabolpeh ding nahi, ati." 
1Samuel20:5 Chuin David'in Jonathan jah-a, Ven jingkhu lhathah ni ahin, lengpa toh ankonga thonlouva katoukhom tei ngai ahi; ahinla anithum ni nilhah geija gamlah-a kaga kisel theinadin neisolin." 
1Samuel20:6 Napan eiholmona aumhela ahile, David'in akhopi Bethlehem'a gache vahdin kakoma phalna khohtah-in athumin ahi: ajehchu insung pumpi-a dinga kumtin ganlhai chukoma aneiju ahi, tin seijin ati." 
1Samuel20:7 Hitia chu aman, Aphai atia ahile, nasohhi lungmona kanei ding; amavang hatah-a alung hana ahileh, thilse angaitoi ti hejengin." 
1Samuel20:8 Hijeh-a chu nasoh chunga hi hepina neitah-a na natoh ding ahi; ajehchu nasohhi Pakaiya kitepna naneipi ahitai. Hijeng jongle keima-a khangitlouna aumle, nangmatah in neithat jengin; ipi khoh-a napa henga neipui dingham? ati." 
1Samuel20:9 Chuin Jonathan'in, Hichu nanga konin gamlahen: ajehchu kapan nachunga thilse bol agot kahet monga ahile, kahil louding ham? ati." 
1Samuel20:10 Chuphatnin David'in Jonathan jah-a, Napan setah-in nadonbut tale, kon eihunghil dingham? ati." 
1Samuel20:11 Chuin Jonathan'in David jah-a, Hungin, loujaova chehite, ati. Chuin amani loujao lama achedoh lhontan ahi." 
1Samuel20:12 Chuin Jonathan'in David jah-a, Pakai Israel Pathen chu ahetoh ahi! jing nikho, ahiloule nithum nikho hama kapa kadoh teng, David dinga apha ahia, chuteng nahenga mi kasol louva kahetsah louva ahile," 
1Samuel20:13 Pakaiyin chutobang chun, chule akhohjo cheh-in Jonathan chunga boljenghen: ahinla nangma bolset dingchu kapa lunglhaina ahia ahile, lhamonga nachethei nadin nahetsah ingting, nasolmang nange. Chule kapa ana umpi bangchun Pakaiyin nangma naumpi hen." 
1Samuel20:14 Chule kathilouna dinga kahinlai jenga Pakai phatna neimusah ding hilouvin; 
1Samuel20:15 A-itih-a dinga ka-insunga kona naphatna nasat tanhel louding ahi. Pakaiyin David melmate aboncha leiset chunga asuhmanghel nung jongle sattanhih helin, ati." 
1Samuel20:16 Hitichun Jonathan'in David insung toh kitepna asemin, Pakaiyin David melmate chunga phu lahen, ati." 
1Samuel20:17 Chuin Jonathan'in angailut jeh-in, David chu akihahsel sah kitnin ahi. Ajehchu aman ama hinna angailut bang banga angailut ahi." 
1Samuel20:18 Hichun Jonathan'in David jah-a, Jing nikho khu lhathah ni ahin; natouna a-on ding jeh-a nakiholmo ding ahi." 
1Samuel20:19 Chule nithum naum nungteng, nachesuh loija thukhoh aumtengle nakisel jina mun mama-a chu nahung ding, Ezel song panga chu na-umden ding ahi." 
1Samuel20:20 Chule keiman doikhat neibanga thalchang thum hiche panga chu kahinkap ding ahi. 
1Samuel20:21 Chule ven, chapang khat kahinsol ding, Chenlang thalchang ho khu gaholdoh-in, katiding ahi. Chule chapang henga chu, Ven, thalchang ho chu nasih hilam panga aume, hinlan kati-a ahile, hung jengin. Ajehchu Pakai hingjing mina kasei ahi, nangma dingin lungmona aumin, setna aumpoi." 
1Samuel20:22 Ahinla gollhangpa jah-a chu, Ven, thalchang ho chu nakhel lama aume, kati-a ahile; nalampi-a che jengin: ajehchu Pakaiyin nasolmang ahi." 
1Samuel20:23 Chule nang le kei kikah-a iseidohho jouse chunga chun, ven, Pakai chu nang le kei kikah-a a-itih-in umjing hen, ati." 
1Samuel20:24 Chuti chun David amale ama gamlah-a akiselin: chuin lhathah nikho ahunglhun phatnin, lengpa chu an nedin atou lhatan ahi." 
1Samuel20:25 Chuin lengpa phat dangho bangin atouna chunga atouvin, bangpanga touna-a chun atouve: chuin Jonathan akipatdoh-in, chule Abner chu Saul panga atouvin, David munchu a-ongtan ahi." 
1Samuel20:26 Ahivangin Saul'in hicheni chun imacha aseipoi: ajeh chu aman, Achunga thilkhat tou soh-a thenglou hinte; thonlouva ama thenglou hinte, tia angaito ahi." 
1Samuel20:27 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, hichu chuche lha nini channi ahin, David munchu a-ongkit tai. Chuin Saul'in achapa Jonathan jah-a, Jesse chapa chu janhi-a jong, tunia jong ibola hunglou ham? ati." 
1Samuel20:28 Chuin Jonathan'in Saul adonbutnin, David'in Bethlehem'a chenadin hatah-in kakoma phalna athumin:" 
1Samuel20:29 Katao ahi, neiche sah-in: ajehchu ka insung miten khopi sunga ganlhaina kaneidiu ahin; chule kasopipan chua umdin eithupeh-in ahi: chule tun, namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, katao ahi, neichesah inlang kasopite gamunge, atin ahi. Hijeh-a chu lengpa dokhanga hunglou ahi, ati." 
1Samuel20:30 Chuphatnin Jonathan chunga Saul lunghana chu akoujah tan, ajah-a, Nang numei vahvei le golkeh chapa, nangman nangmatah jachat nadingle nanu sagohkeu jachatsah nadinga Jesse chapa chu nalhen ahi kahetlouva nabolham?" 
1Samuel20:31 Ajehchu Jesse chapa leiset chunga ahinlaisea nangma le nalenggam kiphutdet louding ahi. Hijeh chun tun kahenga din mi gakousah-in, ajehchu ama thiteiding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel20:32 Chuin Jonathan'in apa Saul adonbutnin, ajah-a, Ipi dinga ama kithat dingham? aman ipi abolem? ati." 
1Samuel20:33 Chuin Saul'in thadingin teng khatnin akhon ahi. Hichea konchun Jonathan'in apan David thading agotmong ahichu ahetai. 
1Samuel20:34 Hitichun Jonathan chu dokhanga konchun lunghang tah-in akipatdoh-in, chuche lha anini nichun an anetapoi. Ajehchu apan ajachatsah behseh jehchun, David chu alungkhampin ahi." 
1Samuel20:35 Chuin Jingkah-in ahitin ahi, David toh akitep phat tah chun Jonathan chu chapang khat toh apotdoh-in, loujaova chun achetai." 
1Samuel20:36 Chuin aman achapangpa jah-a, Lhaijinlang kathalchang kap ho chu gaholdoh-in atin. Chuin chapangpa chu alhai tolhonin, thalchang khat akal lama chun agah kapmin ahi." 
1Samuel20:37 Chuin chapangpa chun Jonathan'in akapdoh thalchang phung aphah phatnin, Jonathan'in chapangpa jah-a, Thalchang chu nakal peh-a uma hilouham? tin asame." 
1Samuel20:38 Chuin Jonathan'in chapang chu asamin, Kikinnon, gangin, umden hih-in, ati. Chuin Jonathan chapangpa chun thalchang ho chu achom khomin, apu henga ahungtai." 
1Samuel20:39 Ahin chapang pa chun imacha ahepon: Jonathan le David'in bou thil kibolchu ahelhone. 
1Samuel20:40 Chuin Jonathan'in amanchahho chapangpa apen, ajah-a, Chenlang khopi-a anapo lutan, ati." 
1Samuel20:41 Chuin chapangpa achedoh doh-in, David lhanglama munkhatna konin ahung kipatdoh-in, amai tolla asulutnin, thumvei akunin ahi. Chuin khatle khat akichopto lhonin, David'in alhakang kahse chun hatah-in akika lhontan ahi." 
1Samuel20:42 Chuin Jonathan'in David henga, Lung mongin chetan, ajehchu ini-a Pakai mina ikihahsela, Pakai chu kei le nang kah-a, chule kei chilhahle nang chilhah ho kah-a a-itih-in ahetoh hijing tahen tia inasei ahitai, ati. Chuin ama akipatdoh-in achetai. Chule Jonathan jong khopi sunga alut tan ahi." 
1Samuel21:1 Chujouvin David Ahimelech thempu henga Nob'a ahungin ahi. Chule David to akimuto chu Ahimelech akichan, ajah-a, Ipidinga nachangseh nahi hija, koimatoh kilhonlou nahim? ati." 
1Samuel21:2 Chuin David'in Ahimelech thempu jah-a, Lengpan kinkhatna eisola, kajah-a, Keiman kasolna thudol le kathupeh hi koimacha hetsah hih-in, ati ahi. Chule keiman kasohte hilai khulai mun'a chu kasol ahi." 
1Samuel21:3 Hijeh chun tun nakhutna ipi umam? kakhutna changlhah nga ahiloule nakoma um umchu neipen, ati." 
1Samuel21:4 Chuin thempu pan David adonbutnin, Kakhutna changlhah lham aumpon, changlhah thengbou aume; gollhangho chu numeija kon beh-a akichintup uva ahile, ati." 
1Samuel21:5 Chuin David'in thempu pa chu adonbutnin, ajah-a, Atahbeh-in kahunga pat nithum tobang keiho-a kona numei ho kichomkoi ahin, chule gollhangho belho hi athenga ahi, chule changlhah chu tunia belsunga kisutheng hijongle, gelkhatna alham ahi ati." 
1Samuel21:6 Hitichun thempupan changlhah theng chu apetai; ajehchu khat akilahdoh tengle changlhah sapeh akhela koidinga Pakai angsunga kona kiladoh vetsahna changlhah tailou changlhah ding umlou ahi. 
1Samuel21:7 Tun hicheni chun Saul sohte khat hia chun Pakai anga anakihenin; aminchu Doeg ahin, Edom mi Saul ganchingho lah-a apipuipen ahi." 
1Samuel21:8 Chuin David'in Ahimelech henga, Nakhutna tengcha ahiloule chemjam umlou ham? ajehchu lengpa thuchu thukin ahijeh-in kachemjam le kagal manchah kahin poman tapoi, ati." 
1Samuel21:9 Chuin thempu pan, Ven, Elah phaichama natha Philistine mipa Goliath chemjam chu hia thempu sangkhol nunga ponin akijelin aume: nadeile hichu kilah-in; ajehchu hiche tailou chu adang aumpoi, ati. Chuin David'in, Chekal lhah chu umding ham; neipe jengin, ati." 
1Samuel21:10 Chuin David akipatdoh-in, hicheni chun Saul ginna in ajamin, Gath lengpa Achish henga chetai." 
1Samuel21:11 Chuin Achish sohten ajah-a, Hichehi chuche gam lengpa David hilouham? Mihon achung changa lampuma khat le khat kidonbut to-a la asah uva, Saul'in sangkhat athatnin, David'in sangsom athatne, atiuchu hilouham? atiuve." 
1Samuel21:12 Chuin Davidn'in thuhochu alungsunga aching pai jengin, Gath lengpa Achish chu akicha lheh jengtan ahi." 
1Samuel21:13 Hitichun amasanguva achondan khelin, amitnuva chun akingolsah-in, kotpi kotkhah ho ajihpol letlut in, akhamul achun achilche akaisah dehduh-in ahi." 
1Samuel21:14 Chujouvin Achish'in asohte jah-a, Veuvin, mingol ahi henasa ibola kahenga nahin pui uham?" 
1Samuel21:15 Mingol kangaichat hija, ka-angsunga angolna-a kichem dinga hitobang mihi nahin pui uham? Hitobang miho ka-insunga hunglut diham? ati." 
1Samuel22:1 Hijeh chun chua konchun David apotdoh-in, Adullam songkoa akiselin; asopitele apa insung mijousen ajah phatnun ahenga achesuh-un ahi." 
1Samuel22:2 Chuin alung genthei jouse, leiba neijouse, chule lunglhailouna neijouse ahenga ahung kikhomun; amaho chunga chun ama gal lamkaijin apangin: chule ama toh umkhoma chu mi jali tobang ahiuve." 
1Samuel22:3 Chuin David chua konin Moab gam Mizpeh'a achetan: chule Moab lengpa jah-a, Pathen'in kachunga ipi abolding ahi kahet masangsen, nahenga katao ahi, kanule kapa aumna-a hung dohhen lang nangma toh umkhom hen, ati." 
1Samuel22:4 Chuin aman amani Moab lengpa anga apuijin; chule David songkoa aumlaisen amato acheng khomun ahi. 
1Samuel22:5 Chuin Gad themgaovin David henga, songko sunga chun umden hih-in; potdoh-in, Judah gamsunga chen, ati. Chuin David apotdoh-in, Hareth gammanga alut tan ahi." 
1Samuel22:6 Saul'in David le aumpi miho chu akimu dohtai ti ajah phatnin, (tun Saul chu Gibeah gam Ramah kho-a thingphung khat noija aumin, akhutna tengcha akichoijin, akimvela asohte jouse adingun ahi;)" 
1Samuel22:7 Chuin Saul'in avella ding asohte jah-a chun, Tun nangho Benjamin miten ngaijun; Jesse chapa chun nangho amitakip lou le lengpi honho napeh cheh uva, sangkhat chunga gallamkai le jakhat chunga gal lamkaija napansah cheh dingu hija;" 
1Samuel22:8 Nabon uva keima douna galguh nabol uva, chule kachapan Jesse chapa toh kitepna anei lam eihetsah-a khatcha naum daova, keima dinga lungkham khatcha naum daova, chule tunia banga hi kachapan kasohpa keima douna-a eichanglhi dinga atildoh jonghi eihila koima umlou nahiuvem? ati." 
1Samuel22:9 Chujouvin Saul sohte chunga lamkaija kitung Edom mi Doeg chun adonbutnin, Nob'a Ahitub chapa Ahimelech henga Jesse chapa ahung kamui." 
1Samuel22:10 Chule aman amadin Pakai adohpeh-in, nehding ho apen, chule Philistine mipa Goliath chemjam jong apei, ati." 
1Samuel22:11 Chuphatnin aman Ahitub chapa Ahimelech thempupa le apa insungmi Nob'a um thempuho jouse koudin mi asolin ahi. Chuin amaho abonun lengpa henga ahunguvin ahi. 
1Samuel22:12 Chuin Saul'in, Tun nangma Ahitub chapa, ngaijin, ati. Chuin aman, Ka pakai hikoma kaume, ati." 
1Samuel22:13 Chuin Saul'in ajah-a, Tunia banga hi nangma le Jesse chapan ibola keima douna-a galguh nabol lhona, keima douna-a kipatna eichanglhi dinga nangman amachu changlhah le chemjam napeh-a, Pakai nadoh peh ham? ati." 
1Samuel22:14 Chuin Ahimelech'in lengpa chu adonbutnin, Lengpa tupa hija, nasolna chana chea, na-insunga ja-umtah David tobanghi nasohte jouse lah-a koi umam?" 
1Samuel22:15 Achutile ama dinga Pathen dohpeh chu kakipatbep ham? hichu keija konin gamlahen: lengpan nasohpa hi le kapa insung mite jousehi imachan mo neichan hihbeh-un; ajehchu hicheho jouse thudol hi nasohpan alhom hihen atam hileh imacha kahepoi, ati." 
1Samuel22:16 Chuin lengpan, Ahimelech nangma le napa insung mite jouse nathi teidingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel22:17 Chuin lengpan akoma ding keng sepaiho henga, Kiheijun lang Pakai thempuho chu David toh akikhut jop jeh ule, amahon ajampet ahetnuva keima eihetsahlou jeh-un thatnun, ati. Ahinla Pakai thempuho chunga akhutnu lha dingchu lengpa sohte anompouve." 
1Samuel22:18 Chuin lengpan Doeg henga, Nangma kiheijin lang thempuho chungachun chun, ati. Chuin Edom mi Doeg chu akiheijin, thempuho chunga achun, hiche nikho chun tupat ponnem thempu sangkhol kivon mi somget le nga athatnin ahi." 
1Samuel22:19 Chuin thempuho khopi Nob chu chemjamin asatnin, pasal le numei, chapang le noichep laiho, bongchal, sangan, chule kelngoiho chemjamin athat gamin ahi." 
1Samuel22:20 Chuin Ahitub chapa Ahimelech chapate lah-a khat amin Abiathar chu asohchan, David henga ajamin ahi." 
1Samuel22:21 Chuin Saul'in Pakai thempuho atha chu Abiathar'in David ahetsah tan ahi. 
1Samuel22:22 Chuin David'in Abiathar jah-a, Chuche ni-a Edom mi Doeg chua anauma chu Saul ahetsah teiding chu kahet ahitai: napa insung mite jouse chu keijeh-a thia ahitaove." 
1Samuel22:23 Nangma kahenga ummin lang, kicha hih-in: ajehchu keima thadinga eiholpa chun nang jong thadinga nahol ahi. Keitoh na-umle vang nahoidoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel23:1 Chujouvin amahon David jah-a, Ven Philistine ten Keilah asatnun, changphol ho achomun ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel23:2 Hijeh chun David'in Pakai adongin, Kache-a Philistine te khu kagasat dingham? ati. Chuin Pakaiyin David jah-a, Chen, Philistine te gasatnin lang, Keilah gahuhdoh-in, ati." 
1Samuel23:3 Chuin David loihon ajah-a, Ven, hikom Judah gama bon kikicha-a, Keilah'a ihunguva, Philistine galsat miho igadou diuchu iti kichat umjocheh ding hitam? atiuve." 
1Samuel23:4 Hichun David'in Pakai adong kitnin ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin adonbutnin, Kipatdoh-in lang Keilah'a chesuh-in; ajehchu Philistine te chu nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel23:5 Hitichun David le aloite Keilah-a acheuvin, Philistine te chutoh akisatnun, agancha hou ahin pui mangun, amaho chu nasatah-in athatnun ahi. Hitichun David'in Keilah miho chu ahuhdoh tan ahi." 
1Samuel23:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ahimelech chapa Abiathar chu David henga Keilah lama ajam phatnin, aman akhutna thempu sangkhol khat ahinchoijin ahi." 
1Samuel23:7 Chuin David Keilah'a ahungchu Saul henga aseipeh taovin ahi. Chuin Saul'in, Pathen'in ama kakhutna eipehdoh ahitai; ajehchu khopi kulkotpi le kotjol nei alutna chu, ama kikam khum ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel23:8 Chuin Saul'in mijouse chu galsat ding, Keilah'a chesuh-a David le aloite umchah din akoukhom tan ahi." 
1Samuel23:9 Chule David'in guhthima Saul'in ama chunga doha abolchu ahen; Abiathar thempu henga chun, Thempu sangkhol chu hinchoi jin, ati." 
1Samuel23:10 Hichun David'in, Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, keijeh-a Keilah khopi suse dingin Saul ahung suh-e ti kichentah in kajatai." 
1Samuel23:11 Keilah mihon akhutna eipehdoh diu ham? nasoh-in kajah banga hi Saul hungsuh ding ham? Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, katao ahi, nasoh hi neihet sah-in, ati. Chuin Pakaiyin, Hungsuh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel23:12 Hichun David'in, Keilah miten keima le kamitehi Saul khutna eipeh doh dingu ham? ati. Chuin Pakaiyin, Amahon napehdoh dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel23:13 Chuphatnin David le aloiho mi jagup tobang chu akipatnun, Keilah chu adalhaovin, achetheinao lamcheh-a achetauve. Chuin David chu Keilah'a konin ajamdoh tai tichu Saul aseipeh taovin; chule aman amaho kondoh dingchu ajahda tan ahi." 
1Samuel23:14 Chuin David chu gamthipma mundet tah khatna aumin, Ziph gamthip lhang khatna aumden tan ahi. Chule Saul'in aniseh-in aholin, ahivangin Pathen'in akhutna apedoh pon ahi." 
1Samuel23:15 Chuin Saul chu ama that dingin ahung kondoh-e ti chu David'in amutan: chule David chu Ziph gamthip gammanga uma ahi. 
1Samuel23:16 Chuin Saul chapa Jonathan akipatnin, David umna gammanga chun achen, Pathen'a akhut tha agahatsah-in ahi." 
1Samuel23:17 Chuin aman ajah-a, Kicha hih-in: ajehchu kapa Saul khutnin namaidoh louhel ding ahi; nangma Israel chunga leng changding nahin, keima nabantah-a kahi ding ahi; chule hichu kapa Saul'in ahet ahi, ati." 
1Samuel23:18 Chuin amanin Pakai angsunga kitepna aneilhonin ahi: chuin David gammanga aumin, Jonathan chu a-in'a achetai." 
1Samuel23:19 Chujouvin Ziph miho chu Gibeah mun'a Saul henga ahungun, ajah-a, Jeshimon lhanglama um Hachelah lhang gammang lah mun dettah khatna David chu keiho toh kisela hilouham?" 
1Samuel23:20 Hijeh chun, vo lengpa, nalungin hungsuh ding anangaichat dungjuijin hungsuhtan; chule keiho mopohna chu lengpa khutna pehdoh dingchu hiding ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel23:21 Chuin Saul'in, Nangho Pakaiya phattheiboh chang hiuvin; ajehchu nanghon keima neilainat piuvin ahi." 
1Samuel23:22 Cheovin, naheng uva katao ahi, gakhol toh-un, hilai mun'a chu kon amu ham akiselna mun gaveovin lang gahetoh-un; ajehchu ama doha thuhtah ahi ti eikisei peh-e." 
1Samuel23:23 Hijeh chun akiselguhna mun jouse chu gahetoh-un, chule adihchet chu nahet tengule kahenga hung kitnun, chutengle keima nangho toh kalhon ding ahi. Chule hung hitiding ahi, ama gamsunga um ahi pouva ahile, Judah mi asang asang lah-a chu kaholdoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel23:24 Chuin amaho akipat doh-un, Saul angsunga konin Ziph gama ache taovin ahi: ahin David le aloiho chu Jeshimon lhanglam phaichama um Maon gamthipma aumuvin ahi." 
1Samuel23:25 Saul le amite jong ama holin acheuvin ahi. Chuin amahon David aseipeh-un: hijeh chun ama songpi khat sunga ahung lutnin, Maon gamthipma aumtan ahi. Saul'in hichu ajah phatnin, David chu Maon gamthipma ahin nungdel tan ahi." 
1Samuel23:26 Chuin Saul molpang hilam sanga achen, David le aloiho molpang khulam sanga acheuvin; chule David'in Saul ginna jammang loiding agon ahi: ajehchu Saul le aloihon David le amite chu matdinga a-umkolu ahitai." 
1Samuel23:27 Ahinla Saul henga thupole khat ahungin, ajah-a, Kinonlang hungin; ajehchu Philistine ten gamsunga gal ahinbol taove, tin ahungseijin ahi." 
1Samuel23:28 Hijeh chun David nung adelna-a konin Saul akinunglen, Philistine te satdin achetai. Hijeh chun hiche mun chu Sela-hammah-lekoth asah taovin ahi." 
1Samuel23:29 Chuin David chua konchun achetouvin, Engedi mun dettah sunga achengtai." 
1Samuel24:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Philistine te nung adelna-a kon Saul ahungkile phatnin, ahenga, Ven, Engedi gamthipma David aume tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
1Samuel24:2 Hichun Saul'in Israelte jouse lah-a kona kilhengdoh mi sangthum akipuijin, David le amite chu gamkel ho umna songko dung holdin achetaovin ahi." 
1Samuel24:3 Chuin lamdunga kelngoi kotphung songko umna khatna ahungin; chule Saul chu kicholdo dingin alutnin ahi: David le aloiho chu songko sungnung lama chu uma ahiuve. 
1Samuel24:4 Chuin David loihon ajah-a, Vetan, Pakaiyin nahenga, Ven, namelmate nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahi, nangman phante nati bang banga achunguva nabol ding ahi, tia asei nikho chu tuni ahi, atiuve. Chuin David akipatdoh-in, Saul sangkhol chol mong chu achelhah pehtan ahi." 
1Samuel24:5 Chuin chuche jouvin ahitin ahi, aman Saul sangkhol chol monglha achelhah jehchun David'in alungthimin phamo asalheh jengtan ahi." 
1Samuel24:6 Chuin aman aloiho jah-a, Pakai thaonu kapu chunga kakhut kalapma, thaonu ahi ti henasasa hitobang kabolding chu Pakaiyin aphalpoi, ati." 
1Samuel24:7 Chuti chun David'in asohte chu hiche thua hin asutangin, Saul chunga akhut analha sahpon ahi. Ahinla Saul chu songkoa konin ahungdoh-in, alamjot ban ajomkit tai." 
1Samuel24:8 Chujouvin David jong akipatnin, songkoa konin apotdoh-in, Saul jah-a, Kapu lengpa tin agah samin ahi. Chuin Saul'in nunglam ahinven ahile, David akunin tolla aboh khupmin ahi." 
1Samuel24:9 Chuin David'in Saul jah-a, Ibola miho thusei, ven David'in suhsetdin nahole atiuchu nangaiham?" 
1Samuel24:10 Ven, tunia hi Pakaiyin songko sunga chu itobanga kakhutna eipehdoh hitam ti namit tah-in namutai. Mi phabepmin nangma thatdin eisolun; ahin, Keiman kapu chunga kakhut lhaponge, ajehchu ama Pathen thaonu ahi, tin kamitmun kahing hoijin ahi." 
1Samuel24:11 Chukal valin, kapa, ven, kakhutna um napon chol mong kachetanhi ven: ajehchu naponchol kache lhah-a nangma katha louva konhin kakhutna gitlouna le khelna aumpon, nangma dounan kachonsepoi ti namun, nahen ahi. Ahinla nangin kei hinkho lahdin neidel lelen ahi." 
1Samuel24:12 Keima le nangma kah-a Pakaiyin thu tanhen lang, Pakaiyin naphu kachunga lamaihen; amavang kakhut hi nachunga chulou ding ahi." 
1Samuel24:13 Gollui thuchih-a kisei bangin, Migilouva konin gitlouna asohdoh-e, akiti: keima vang kakhut nachunga lhaponge." 
1Samuel24:14 Israelte lengpa hi koi nung dela hung doh ham? nangman koinung nadel ham? uithisa khat nungle uili khat nungbou ahi. 
1Samuel24:15 Hijeh chun Pakai chu thutan hihen lang kei le nang kah-a thu tanhen, chule hinve hen, hin kholtoh henlang, nakhutna kona eihuhdoh hen, ati." 
1Samuel24:16 Chuin ahitin ahi, David'in Saul jah-a hiche thuho hi aseijou phatnin, Saul'in, Kachapa David, hichehi nangma aw hija ham? ati. Chuin Saul hakan akaptai." 
1Samuel24:17 Chuin aman David jah-a, nangma keisangin nachonphajoi: ajehchu nangman apha jenga bou neilethuh-in, keiman vang ase jenga bou kalethuh-e." 
1Samuel24:18 Chule tunin nangman neiboldan neimusah tai: ajehchu Pakaiyin nakhutna einapeh jengin jong, nangman neithat poi." 
1Samuel24:19 Ajehchu min amelma amule bitkeicha lampia achemangsah dingham? Hijeh chun tunia kahenga nathilbol jehhin Pakaiyin thilphan nalethuh hen. 
1Samuel24:20 Chule ven, tun thonlouva nangma leng nahung hia, Israel lenggam hi nakhutna kitungdoh ding ahi, ti kichen tah-in kahetai." 
1Samuel24:21 Hijeh chun tun kahenga, kanung tengle kachilhah te nasuhbeilou nading le, kapate insunga kona kamin nasuhmang louna dingin Pakaiya kihahsel in, ati." 
1Samuel24:22 Chuin David Saul henga akihahsel tan ahi. Chuin Saul a-in'a achetan; David le amite vang aumnao mun'a achetou taovin ahi. 
1Samuel25:1 Chuin Samuel athitan; Israelte jouse akikhom khomun, alunghem piuvin, a-in mun Ramah'a avui taovin ahi. Chuin David akipatnin Paran gamthipma achesuhtai." 
1Samuel25:2 Chuin Moan kho-a chun Carmel'a anei agouho uma mikhat aumin; chule mipa chu ahao lheh jengin, kelngoi sangthum le kelcha sangkhat aneijin ahi. Chuin aman Carmel'a akelngoi mul avouvin ahi." 
1Samuel25:3 Tun mipa minchu Nabal ahin, a-inneipi minchu Abigail ahi. Chule amanu chu numei lungching tah le melhoitah ahin: hinla mipa vang chu umje helou le gilou tah-a natong ahi: chule ama Caleb insungmi ahi." 
1Samuel25:4 Chuin David'in gamthipma chun Nabal'in akelngoi mul avouve ti thu ajan ahi. 
1Samuel25:5 Chuin David'in gollhang som asolin, David'in gollhangho jah-a chun, Carmel'a chetouvun lang, Nabal henga cheovin, chule kaminin chibai gabolun:" 
1Samuel25:6 Chule haosatah-a hingpa jah-a chu hitia nagasei dingu ahi, Nachunga lungmon umhen, na-insung chunga lungmon umhen, chule nanei jouse chunga lungmon umhen." 
1Samuel25:7 Chule tun nangman kelngoimul vouho naneije ti kajaovin ahi: tun nakelngoi chingho chu Carmel'a aum sungseuvin keihotoh kaum khomun, kasugenthei pouvin, amahoa konin jong imacha amanga aumpoi." 
1Samuel25:8 Nagollhangho dongle chun namusah naovinte. Hijeh chun gollhangho hi namitmun lungsetna changu hen: ajehchu keiho kut nikho-a hung kahiuve. Nakhutna naphal khamkham chu nasohte le nachapa David dingin hinpen tin, gaseijun, ati." 
1Samuel25:9 Chuin David gollhangho ahung phatnun, hiche thuho jouse dungjui chun Nabal henga David minin aseijun anga taove." 
1Samuel25:10 Chuin Nabal'in David sohte chu adonbutnin, David chu koiham? chule Jesse chapa koiham? tulaijin apu thu palkeh-a jam manga soh tamtah aume." 
1Samuel25:11 Keiman ka-anneh le katwidon, chule ka kelngoi mul vouho dia kathapeh kasa chu kalah-a hoija kon ahiu kahetlou mihochu kapeh dingham? ati." 
1Samuel25:12 Chutichun David gollhangho chu akinung leuvin, ahungun thujouse chu David ahiltaove." 
1Samuel25:13 Chuin David'in aloiho jah-a, Amitakipmin nachemjam cheh kikouvin, ati. Chuin amitakip chun ama ama chemjam cheh akiko taovin; chule David'in jong achemjam akikon ahi. Chuin David nunga chun mi jali tobang le, moltum choi mi jani tobang acheuvin ahi." 
1Samuel25:14 Ahin gollhang khatnin Nabal jinu Abigail aseipeh-in, ajah-a, Ven, David'in gamthipma konin kapu chibai boh dingin sottol leho ahinsolin ahile, aman amaho anajumson ahi." 
1Samuel25:15 Ahinla miho chu keihodia phatah ahiuvin, eisugenthei pouvin, amahotoh kakihou theijuva, gamlah-a kaum sungseuvin imacha jong kamansah pouve:" 
1Samuel25:16 Amaho toh kiloija kelngoi kachin sungseuvin, amaho keihodin sun le janin kulbangin akisungun ahi" 
1Samuel25:17 Hijeh chun tun nangman ipi nabolding ham henlang ngaiton; ajehchu kapu chung le a-insung pumpi douna-a thilse kingaito ahitai. Ajehchu ama chutobang tah-a Belial chapa ahin, min ahenga thu asei theipon ahi, ati." 
1Samuel25:18 Chuphatnin Abigail akinoloijin, changlhah lhon jani, ju haini, kelngoi semtohsa nga, changkanpoh tena nga, chule lengpithei ga gop boh jakhat, theichang changlhah jani alan, asangan ho chunga agongtai." 
1Samuel25:19 Chuin amanun asohte jah-a, Kamasanga cheovin; veuvin, nanung uva kahunge, ati. Ahinla ajipa Nabal ahetsahpon ahi." 
1Samuel25:20 Chule anahitin ahi, amanu sangan chunga atouva, lhang dunga ahungsuh laijin, veuvin, David le aloiho amanu dontah-a ahungun; amaho chu akimaitopi tai." 
1Samuel25:21 Tun David'in, Aneijouse imacha amanlouna dinga gamthipma kanachin tuppeh chu mohseh ahitai; aman apha chu asen eilethuh tai." 
1Samuel25:22 Pasal tapou ama-a kaiho jouse jingkah khovah geija kahinghoi ja ahile, akalvalin jong Pathen'in David melmate chunga bolhen, ati." 
1Samuel25:23 Chuin Abigail'in David amuphatnin, sangan chunga konin kintah-in akumlhan, David masanga chun alhun, tolla aboh khupmin;" 
1Samuel25:24 Akhophang bula alhun, ajah-a, Kachunga, ka pakai, keima chunga hiche themona hi umhen; chule nahenga katao ahi, nasohnu hi nanakhanga thu neiseisah inlang, nasohnu thusei hi neingaipeh-in." 
1Samuel25:25 Nahenga katao ahi, ka pakai, hiche Belial mipa Nabal hi thupi tah-in lahih-in: ajehchu amin tobang banga ama jong hija ahin; amin Nabal ahin, ama-a ngolna um ahi. Ahinla kapun nahinsol gollhangho chu nasohnun kanamu lou ahi." 
1Samuel25:26 Hijeh chun tun, kapu, Pakai hingjing le nangma hinna panna kasei ahi, Pakaiyin thisanso dinga nahung kon le nangma khut tah-a thisan phuladinga nahung kon hi atuhtang ahitan, tun namelmate le kapu dinga thilse ngaito chanchu Nabal tobang hiuhen." 
1Samuel25:27 Chule tun kapu henga nasohnun kahinpoh hiche phattheina hohi, kapu nung hinjui gollhangho hi kipehen." 
1Samuel25:28 Nahenga katao ahi, nasohnu suhkhelna ngaidamin: ijeh inem itile Pakaiyin thonlouva kapu insung hi dettah-a atundoh ding ahi; ajehchu kapun Pakai gal nasat ahin, chule nahinkho sunga hin thilse himhim akimu pon ahi." 
1Samuel25:29 Ahijeng vangin nahin nungdel dingle nahinkho lamang dingin mikhat akipatdoh-in: ahinla kapu hinna hi Pakai na Pathen hinna toh kikan khom ding ahin; namelmate hinnaho vang, aman ahsongse-a kona kisepdoh banga asedoh ding ahi." 
1Samuel25:30 Chule hung hitiding ahi, Pakaiyin kapu-a dinga aman nangma chungchanga thilpha anaseiho jouse dungjuija ahintoh chaija, Israel chunga vaipo-a nahin pansah tengle;" 
1Samuel25:31 Ajeh beijin thisan naso hihen lang, kapu'n ama phu akilahna hijongle, hichu nangma dinga lungkhamna le, kapu dinga lungnatna hitalou ding ahi: ahinla Pakaiyin kapu-a dinga thilpha ahinbol tengle, nasohnu hi neihin geldoh-in, ati." 
1Samuel25:32 Chuin David'in, Abigail jah-a, Tunia eikimupi dinga nahinsola Israel Pakai Pathen chu nunnom hen." 
1Samuel25:33 Tunia thisanso dinga kahungna-a kon le, kakhut tah-a kaphu kakilah nadinga kona eihoidoh-a nangmale nathumop chu nunnom hen." 
1Samuel25:34 Ajehchu nangma eikimupi dinga kino loija nahung lou hile; nangma suhsetna dinga kona eituhtanga hingjing Israel Pakai Pathen min pana kasei ahi, thonlouva jingkhovah teng Nabal'a dinga pasal khatcha jong asohcha umlou helding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel25:35 Hitichun David'in amanun ahin pohpeh hochu akhutna konin akisanin, amanu jah-a, Na-in'a lung mongin chetan, ven na aw kangaija chule nangma kajabol nahitai, ati." 
1Samuel25:36 Chuin Abigail chu Nabal henga ahungin; veuvin, aman a-in'a lengpa golvah tobangin golvah anabolin; chule Nabal chu ju akham jeh-in, alungsung akipah lheh-in ahi. Hijeh chun amanun jingkhovah kahsen imacha ahilpoi." 
1Samuel25:37 Ahin jingkho ahungvah-in ahitin ahi, Nabal juhu atheu phatnin, a-inneipin thuho jouse chu aseipehtan ahile, alungsung athi helin, songtumto abangtan ahi." 
1Samuel25:38 Chuin nisom jouvin ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin Nabal chu adengin ahile athitan ahi." 
1Samuel25:39 Chuin David'in Nabal thithu ajah phatnin, Nabal khutna kona i-sah louva eikibolna phu eilah peh-a le asohpa thilse-a kona hoidoh-a Pakai chu nunnom hen; ajehchu Pakaiyin Nabal gitlouna chu ama luchanga achuhsahtai, ati. Chuin David'in Abigail chu ajidinga gahel dingin ahenga mi asolin ahi." 
1Samuel25:40 Chuin David sohte chu Carmel'a Abigail henga ahung phatnun, amanu henga, David'in ajidinga nangma puidinga nahenga eihinsolu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel25:41 Chuin amanu akipatnin, aboh khupmin amai tolla asulutnin, ven, nasohnu hi kapupa sohte keng sildingin soh-in hungpang inge, ati." 
1Samuel25:42 Chuin Abigail akipatdoh paijin, sangan chung khatna atouvin, anungjui nungah nga toh ahin; David thupole ho nunga achen, ajin agapang tai." 
1Samuel25:43 Chuin David'in Jezreel mi Ahinoam jong akipuijin; amani jong anilhonin aji ahilhontai. 
1Samuel25:44 Ahinla Saul'in achanu David jinu Michal chu Gallim mi Laish chapa Phalti chu apetan ahi. 
1Samuel26:1 Chuin Ziph mite chu Saul henga Gibeah'a ahungun, David chu Jeshimon masanga um Hachilah lhanga kisela hilouham? atiuve." 
1Samuel26:2 Chujouvin Saul akipatnin, Ziph gamthipma David holdingin Israel pasal akilhengdoh sangthum apuijin, Ziph gamthipma achesuh tan ahi." 
1Samuel26:3 Chuin Saul'in Jeshimon masang lampi pang Hachilah lhanga gebuh asongin ahi. Ahinla David chu gamthipma aumin, Saul'in gamthipma anung ahindel chu amun ahi." 
1Samuel26:4 Hijeh chun Davidn'in mive lhiho asolin, Saul chu ahung monge ti ahechentai." 
1Samuel26:5 Chuin David akipatnin, Saul gebuh sonna-a chun ahungin ahi: chuin David'in Saul le janel gal lamkai Ner chapa Abner lupna chu aven: Saul chu leiko-a alumin, mipi chun akimvela gebuh akisonun ahi." 
1Samuel26:6 Chujouvin David'in adonbutnin Hit mi Ahimelech jah le Joab sopipa Zeruiah chapa Abishai jah-a, Saul henga agebuh uva keitoh lhonsuh ding koi nahiuvem? ati. Chuin Abishai'in, Keima nangtoh kalhonsuh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel26:7 Chuti chun David le Abishai chu jan-in mipi ho henga chun ahunglhonin: chuin veuvin, Saul leiko sunga analumin, alulhun koma chun atengcha tolla akiphutnin ahi: Abner le mipi vangchu akimvela alumun ahi." 
1Samuel26:8 Hichun Abishai'in David jah-a, tunia hi Pathen'in namelmapa hi nakhutna napehdoh ahitai: hijeh chun nahenga katao ahi, tun that jeng inge, tengchan khatvei sutnin tolto kilbeh jenging kate, velni kasut louding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel26:9 Chuin David'in Abishai jah-a, Sumang hih-in: ajehchu koiham Pathen thaonusa khat douna-a achunga akhut lha-a themmo changlouva umthei ding? ati." 
1Samuel26:10 David'in aseiben, Hingjing Pakai min pana kasei ahi, Pakaiyin sumang nante; ahiloule athinading anikho hunglhung nante; ahilou jongle galsatna konsuh intin, mangthah nante." 
1Samuel26:11 Pakai thaonu chunga kakhut kalha ding chu Pakaiyin aphalpoi; ahinla nahenga katao ahi, tun alulhun koma tengcha le atuipai chu lanlang cheta hite, ati." 
1Samuel26:12 Chutichun David'in Saul lulhun koma tengcha le twipai chu alan, achemang lhontai; amahon hejong ahepouvin, mujong amupouvin, koimacha akhanga jong aumpoi. Pakaiya kona imutlhuhna nasatah achunguva achuh jeh chun, amaho a-ihmu cheh-un ahi." 
1Samuel26:13 Chujouvin David agal langkhatna agalkaijin, chule lhang chungvum khatna gamlatah-a adingin; akah uvah gam ong lentah aumin ahi." 
1Samuel26:14 Chuin David'in mipi le Ner chapa Abner agah samin, ajah-a chun, Abner, nadonbut louding ham? ati. Chujouvin Abner'in adonbutnin, Lengpa hinsama nangma koi nahim? ati." 
1Samuel26:15 Chuin David'in Abner jah-a, Nangma pasal hangsan nahi hilouham? chule Israel sunga nangma tobang koi umam? achutile napu lengpa chu ida nangatup louham? ajehchu miho lah-a khat napu lengpa thatdingin ahungin ahi." 
1Samuel26:16 Hiche nathilbol hi aphapoi. Hingjing Pakai min pana kasei ahi, Pakai thaonu napupa nangatup loujeh-a athidinga lom nahi. Chule tun, lengpa tengcha chu hoija um hitam? chule alulhun koma um atuipai chu hoija uma hitam? ati." 
1Samuel26:17 Chuin Saul'in David aw chu ahen, Hiche hi nang aw ham? kachapa David? ati. Chuin David'in, Vo ka pakai lengpa, kei aw ahi, ati." 
1Samuel26:18 Chuin aman ipidinga ka pakaiyin asohpa nung adel ham? ipi kabol em? ahiloule kakhutna ipi gitlouna umem? 
1Samuel26:19 Hijeh chun tun nahenga katao ahi, kapu lengpan asohpa thusei hi ngaihen. Pakaiyin keima doudinga nachothou ahile, aman thilto kisanhen; ahinla amahochu mihem chate ahiule, Pakai masanga sapset changuhen; ajehchu amahon tuni hin Pakai gouloho umna-a konin einodoh-un, pathen dangho gajenin eitiuve." 
1Samuel26:20 Hijeh chun tun kathisanhi Pakai maikoh-a tolla longhihhen; ajehchu Israelte lengpa chu mikhatnin molsang ho-a vabuh adel bangin, uili khat holin ahung kondohtai, ati." 
1Samuel26:21 Hichun Saul'in, Keima kachonse tai: hungkile kittan, chapa David: ijeh inem itile keiman nangma kasuh gentheikit louding ahitai, ajehchu tunin kahinna hi namitmun amantan lheh-e: vetan, ngolhoi tah-in kachonin, nasatah-in, kasukheltai, ati." 
1Samuel26:22 Chuin David'in adonbutnin, Ven lengpa tengchahi gollhangho khat hung galkaihen lang hunglahen." 
1Samuel26:23 Pakaiyin amitakip achonphatna le akitahna alethuhjin ahi: ajehchu tunin Pakaiyin nangma kakhutna eipeluttan, hijongle keiman Pakai thaonusa chunga kakhut kalha louding ahi." 
1Samuel26:24 Chule ven, tunia nahinkho kamitmu-a manlutah ahibang hin, Pakai mitmun keima hinkho jong manlutah hihen, chule gentheina jouse-a konin eihuhdoh hen, ati." 
1Samuel26:25 Chujouvin Saul'in David jah-a, Kachapa David, nunnomin, nangin thil loupitah nabol ding, chule jojong najopeh ding ahi. Chutichun David achenading lampia achetan, Saul jong aumna-a akiletai." 
1Samuel27:1 Chuin David'in alungthimin, Tun nikhatle Saul khutna kathi teiding ahin; Philistine te gamsunga gangtah-a ka-otdoh tailou keidinga phajo imachadang aumpoi. Chutile Saul'in Israel gamsunga eihol hi ngatantin; akhutna kona kahoidoh ding ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel27:2 Chuin David akipatnin Gath lengpa Maoch chapa Achish henga aumpi mi jagup chutoh agalkai taove. 
1Samuel27:3 Chuin David chu amale aloiho, chule amitakip a-insung mite jouse toh, David le ajiteni Jezreel mi Ahinoam le Carmel mi Nabal inneipi Abigail ngei chutoh Gath'a chun Achish toh acheng taove." 
1Samuel27:4 Chuin David Gath'a ajamtai ti Saul aseipeh-un ahile, aman aholkit tapoi." 
1Samuel27:5 Chuin David'in Achish jah-a, Tun namitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, gamsunga khopiho lah-a hin kachen nadin munkhat eipeuhen; nasohhi ibola lengkhopi sunga nangtoh kachen khom dingham? ati." 
1Samuel27:6 Chuphatnin Achish'in hiche nikho chun Ziklag chu apetai. Hijeh chun Ziklag chu tulai geihin Judah lengte gam ahijingtai. 
1Samuel27:7 Chule Philistine te gamsunga David aumna phatchu kum khat le lhali lhingset ahi. 
1Samuel27:8 Chuin David le aloiho chu akondoh-un, Geshur mite, Gezri mite, chule Amalek mite agasat taove; ajehchu hiche namhochu Shur jotna lampi-a pat Egypt gam geija masanglaija pat agama chu cheng anahi taove." 
1Samuel27:9 Chule David'in chuche gamchu asumangin, numei pasal khatcha ahoipon, kelngoiho leh bongchalho, sanganho leh sangongsang ho, chule ponsil ho akilah-in Achish henga ahung kiletai." 
1Samuel27:10 Chuin Achish'in, Tuni hoilam nagachomu ham? ati. Chuin David'in, Judah lhanglam sang, Jerahmeel mite lhanglam sang, chule Ken mite lhanglam sang, ati." 
1Samuel27:11 Chuti chun David'in Gath henga thu hinpo ding pasal ahin, numei ahin khatcha ahinghoi jipon ahi; ajehchu aman, achuti loule ichungthu-u ahenga gahilun tin, David'in chutin abolin, Philistine gamsunga achengin phatseh-in hiti khatin achonne tiget nunte ati ahi." 
1Samuel27:12 Chuin Achish'in David atahsanin, Aman ami Israelte chu akihotsah heltai; hijeh-a chu ama a-itih-a kasoh hijing ding ahitai, ati." 
1Samuel28:1 Chuin hiche nikho laichun ahitin ahi, Philistine te chun Israelte toh kisatdin asepaiteu galsat dingin akhom khomun ahi. Chuin Achish'in David jah-a, Nangho le namite galsatdia keitoh ikon dohdiu ahi ti kichentah-in nahei, ati." 
1Samuel28:2 Chuin David'in Achish henga, Thonlouva nasohpa hin ipi kabolthei nahet ding ahi, ati. Chule Achish'in David jah-a, Hijeh-a chu a-itih-a eihongbit dinga kapansah ding nahi, ati." 
1Samuel28:3 Tun Samuel chu athitan, Israelte jouse chun akauvin, ama khopitah Ramah-a chun avuitaove. Chule Saul'in lhakouhole doithemho gamsunga konin anodohtai." 
1Samuel28:4 Chuin Philistine te akichom khomun, ahungun Shunem'a gebuh ahungsong taovin ahi: chule Saul'in Israelte jouse achom khomin Gilboa'a gebuh asongun ahi." 
1Samuel28:5 Chuin Saul'in Philistine janelho amuphatnin, akichan, alungthim akihot hot jengtan ahi." 
1Samuel28:6 Chuin Saul'in Pakai adoh phatnin, Pakaiyin amangin jong, Urim'in jong, themgaohon jong adonbutpon ahi." 
1Samuel28:7 Chuphatnin Saul'in asohte henga, Ahenga kache-a kadoh theinadin numei lhakouthei khat neigahol peh-un, ati. Chuin asohten ajah-a, Ven, Endor'a numei lhakouthei khat aume, ati." 
1Samuel28:8 Chuin Saul'in alim akhelin, vonchom akivonin, minitoh jan-in numeinu henga chun ahungtaove. Chuin aman, Nahenga katao ahi, nalha kouthei na-a chun phun neisan peh-inlang, nahenga min kasei penpen chu neihin koudoh peh-in, ati." 
1Samuel28:9 Chuin numei chun ajah-a, Ven, Saul'in lhakou ho le doithemho gamsunga kona iti adeldoh helham nangman nahei. Achutile ibola kathi nadinga, kahinkho hi thang neikam peh ham? ati." 
1Samuel28:10 Chuin Saul amanu henga Pakaiya akihahselin, Hingjing Pakai min pana kasei ahi, hiche jeh-a hi nachunga engbolna chulou ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel28:11 Chuphatnin numei nun, Nahenga koi kahin puitou diham? ati. Chuin aman, Samuel neipuitou peh-in, ati." 
1Samuel28:12 Chuin amanun Samuel amuphatnin hatah-in apengin: chuin Saul jah-a, Ibola neilhep ham? ajehchu nangma Saul nahi, ati." 
1Samuel28:13 Chuin lengpan amanu jah-a, Kicha hih-in: nangin ipi namu em? ati. Chuin numeinu chun Saul jah-a, pathenho leisetna kona ahung kaltouvu kamui, ati." 
1Samuel28:14 Chuin aman amanu jah-a, Aman itobang mel aputnem? ati. Chuin amanun, Tehsepu khat ahungtouvin; sangkhol cholin akivone, ati. Chuin Saul'in Samuel ahi ahetan, amai tolla asulutnin akuntai." 
1Samuel28:15 Chuin Samuel'in Saul jah-a, Ibola puitoudinga neisuhboi ham? ati. Chuin Saul'in adonbutnin, Kalung genthei behset jenga ahi; ajehchu Philistine ten eisatnun, Pathen keija konin achemang tan, themgao ham, mang hamin jong eidonbut tapon ahi: hijeh-a chu ipi kabolding nangin neihetsah theina dinga kakou nahi, ati." 
1Samuel28:16 Hichun Samuel'in, Pakai nanga kona achemang henasa le namelma ahitai ti henasa-a ibola keima neidoh ham?" 
1Samuel28:17 Pakaiyin kakoma aseibanga abol ahitai. Ajehchu Pakaiyin lenggam chu nakhutna kona alhekeh-a, naheng nakom David ngeichu apeh ahitai." 
1Samuel28:18 Ajehchu Pakai thusei nangaipon, chule Amalek mite chunga alunghana tijat umtah chu natongdohpoi; hijeh-a chu tunia hi hichehi Pakaiyin nachunga abol ahitai." 
1Samuel28:19 Achungchona jong Pakaiyin Israel chu nangma toh Philistine te khutna apehdoh ding ahinalaije. Chule jing nikho le nangma le nachapate keitoh i-um khomdiu ahitan: chule Pakaiyin Israel janel jongchu Philistine te khutna apehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel28:20 Chuphatnin Samuel thusei jehchun Saul chu alhun tolla akijamhel jengin, akicha behseh jengtan ahi: chule ama-a chun tha himhim aum tapon ahi; ajehchu sun nilhum jankhovah-a an nelouva um ahi." 
1Samuel28:21 Chuin numeinu chu Saul henga ahungin, alunggim behseh chu amun, ajah-a, Ven, nasohnun nathu kanitnin, chule kahinkho kakhutna kakichoijin, kahenga nasei thuho chu kangaijin ahi." 
1Samuel28:22 Hijeh chun tun nahenga katao ahi, nangin jong nasohnu thusei ngaijin lang, na-anga changlhah kam khatbeh luipeh ingting; nachena ding lampia nache tengle tha nanei theinadin nen, ati." 
1Samuel28:23 Ahin ama anomhih-in, Kaneh louding ahi, ati. Ahinla asohte le numeinu akithouvin angeh teitei jengun ahile, athu angaitai. Chutichun tolla konin akipatdoh-in, jalkhun chunga atoutai." 
1Samuel28:24 Chule numeinu hin a-in'a bongnou thaochet khat aneijin; chuin gangtah-in athatnin, changbong alan ameh halin, chule hichea chun cholso louvin changlhah akangin;" 
1Samuel28:25 Chuin Saul le asohte anga ahindomin, amahon anetaove. Chuin amaho chuche janchun akipatnun, achetauve." 
1Samuel29:1 Tun Philistine ten asepaiteu jouse Aphek'a akhomun, Israel ten Jezreel'a twinah phung khatna gebuh asongun ahi." 
1Samuel29:2 Chuin Philistine te pakaiho chu aja ajan, chule asang asangin akitol akitol jengun; ahinla David le aloiho chu Achish toh anunung penin ahung kitolun ahi." 
1Samuel29:3 Chuin Philistine pipuihon, Hiche Hebrew miho hin hikoma ipi aboluham? atiuve. Chuin Achish'in Philistine pipuiho jah-a, Amahi Israel lengpa Saul sohpa, ni hijatle kum hijat kakoma um, kei koma ahung lutna pat tuni geija amona kamulou David hilouham? ati." 
1Samuel29:4 Chuin Philistine pipuiho chu achunga alunghangun, chule Philistine te chun ahenga, Hiche mipahi nangman aumna dinga napeh mun'a chu achekit theinadin kinungle sahtan, eiho toh galmuna chesuh khom hihhen, achuti loule galkisat na-a chun eiho douvin hungpang getninte. Ajehchu apu toh ipi-a kicham kit dingham? hiche mite luchanga kon hilou dingham?" 
1Samuel29:5 Mihon khat le khat kilhang lhah-a lam puma la asah uva, Saul'in asang asang athatnin, David'in sangsom sangja athatne, atiuchu hiche David hi hilouham? atiuve." 
1Samuel29:6 Chuphatnin Achish'in David akouvin, ahenga, Hingjing Pakai min pana kasei ahi, nangma nachondih jingin, chule janel lah-a keima toh nalutle napotle hi kamitmun aphalheh-e: ajehchu kahenga nahunga pat tunigei hin nachunga thilse kamupoi: hitajongle pipuihon nadeipouve." 
1Samuel29:7 Hijeh chun tun Philistine pipuiho nalunghansah lounadin kilenlang, lung mongin chetan, ati." 
1Samuel29:8 Chuin David'in Achish henga, Hijongle ken ipi kabol em? tuni geija nangma toh kahung um sunga hi nasoh chunga ipi namu-a, kapu lengpa melmate satdinga kache monading ipi umam? ati." 
1Samuel29:9 Chuin Achish'in adonbutnin, David jah-a, Kamitmun Pathen vantil khat bangin naphai ti kahei: achuti vangin Philistine pipuihon, Ama eiho toh galmuna chetou louhel ding ahi, ati ahi." 
1Samuel29:10 Hijeh chun tun jingkah matah kho avah vahle napu sohte nahin kilhonpi hotoh thoudoh unlang che jengun, ati." 
1Samuel29:11 Chuti chun David le amite chu kipatdoh-a Philistine gama kiledin matah-in athoutaove. Chule Philistine te chu Jezreel'a achetou taove. 
1Samuel30:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, nithum ni-a David le aloiho Ziklag ahung lhunun, Amalek miten lhanggam le Ziklag ana buluvin, Ziklag kho chu anasatnun, meijin ahalun;" 
1Samuel30:2 Chule asunga um numei ho chu gal hingin akaijun, alen le aneo khatcha thatlouvin akaimangun, achetauve ahi." 
1Samuel30:3 Hitichun David le aloiho chu khopi ahunglhung taovin, chuin veuvin, meijin ana kihal vamin; ajiteu le achapateu, chule achanuteu gal hingin anakai taove." 
1Samuel30:4 Chuin David le alhonpi mipi chu ka nadinga tha aneilou geijun, hakan akaptaovin ahi." 
1Samuel30:5 Chule David jiteni Jezreel mi Ahinoam le Carmel mi Nabal jinu Abigail chu gal hingin anakai taovin ahi. 
1Samuel30:6 Chule David chu ahesoh lheh jengtan ahi; ajehchu amitakip achapate le achanute dinga alungkham cheh jeh-un, mipin ama songa seding agotauve. Ahinla David amatah Pakai a-Pathen'a akitil khouvin ahi." 
1Samuel30:7 Chuin David'in Abiathar thempu Ahimelech chapa henga, Nahenga katao ahi, thempu sangkhol chu eihin choipeh-in, ati. Chuin Abiathar'in thempu sangkhol chu David henga ahinchoi tai." 
1Samuel30:8 Chuin David'in Pakai adongin, Hiche mihonpi chu kanungdel dingham? del leng kaphah jouding ham? atin ahi. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Delin: ajehchu nangman naphah teitei ding, thonlouva nahuhdoh sohding ahi, ati." 
1Samuel30:9 Chutichun David le aumpi jagupho chu acheuvin, Besor vachadung ahung lhungun, ami dalhahho chu chuachun aumtaove." 
1Samuel30:10 Ahinla David le mipi jali chun anungdel uvin ahi; ajehchu mi jani chu alhahsam behseh jeh uva Besor vachadung galkai joulouva umdena ahitaove. 
1Samuel30:11 Chuin amahon gamlah-a chun Egypt mikhat amuvin, David henga ahinpuijun, changlhah apeuvin ahile aman anen; chule donding twi jong apeuvin ahi." 
1Samuel30:12 Chuin theichang changlhah halkhat le lengpithei gop bohni apeuvin; chuin aman aneh phatnin, atha ahungkile kittan ahi. Ajehchu nithum le janthum an nelou twi donlouhel ahitai." 
1Samuel30:13 Chuin David'in ajah-a, Koija nahiham? chule Hoilama kon nahim? ati. Chuin aman keima Amalek mikhat soh, Egypt gollhang kahi; kadamlou jeh-in kapun nithum masang chun eidalhatan ahi." 
1Samuel30:14 Chereth mite lhanglam, Judah te gamsung, chule Caleb gam lhanglam kabulu uvin, chule Ziklag chu meijin kahalun ahi, ati." 
1Samuel30:15 Chuin David'in, Hiche loiho henga chu neipuisuh theiding ham? ati. Chuin aman, Neitha louding le kapu khutna neipehdoh loudingin Pathen'a kihahsel in, chule hiche loiho henga chun puisuh nange, ati." 
1Samuel30:16 Chuin aman apuisuh phatnin, veuvin, amaho tollhanga anakithe jalun, Philistine gam le Judah gama kona thil tamtah achomdoh jeh-u chun, aneovin, adonnun, alamun ahi." 
1Samuel30:17 Chuin David'in amaho chu khovah tila pat ajing nilhah lam geijin asatnin: sangongsang chunga touva hoidoh gollhang jali tilou mi khatcha asohchapon ahi. 
1Samuel30:18 Chule David'in Amalek miten apoh mangho chu akilelah sohkeijin: David'in ajiteni jong ahuhdohtai. 
1Samuel30:19 Chule amahon anachomu alen ahin, aneo ahin, achanuteu ahin, achapateu ahin khatcha lhasam umlou helin David'in alelah sohkeijin ahi." 
1Samuel30:20 Chuin David'in kelngoihon holeh bonghonho chu alasoh keijin, hiho chu gancha dangho masanga ahoijun, Hihohi David galthil chom ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel30:21 Chuin David alhahsam behseh jeh-a David juijou louva mi jani ho heng, Besor vachadunga aumsah hou henga chun ahungin; chule amaho David le ahinlhonpi mipi ho chu lamtodin apotdoh-un ahi. Chuin David'in miho heng ahinnai phatchun, amaho chu chibai aboh-in ahi." 
1Samuel30:22 Hichun David kilhonpi ho lah-a migilouho le Balial miho jouse chun adonbutnun, Amaho ilah uva ahung pantha loujeh-u chun, akipuijuva ache theina ding uva ajiteu le achateu ipeh-u tailou akichom thilho jouse chu khatcha ipeh lou dingu ahi, atiuve." 
1Samuel30:23 Chuphatnin David'in, Kasopite ho, Pakaiyin eihoidoh uva, eiho doudinga hunga mihonpi chu ikhutnuva eipedoh uva kona eipeh-u thilho hi chutichun bolhih-un." 
1Samuel30:24 Ajehchu hiche thua hi kon nathu-u angai dingham? galsat dinga konpa chan jatjat chu thilchinga pangpa jong changding ahi: amaho akibang banga kihom dingu ahi, ati." 
1Samuel30:25 Chule chuche nikho-a pat tuni geihin, Israelte din chutichun houdan thupeh le chondanin achepehtai." 
1Samuel30:26 Chuin David Ziklag'a ahung phatnin, agalthil chomho phabep chu Judah upaho, agolho geijin athotnin, ajah uva, Veuvin, Pakai melma te-a kon galthil kichomdoh nangho dinga thilpeh ahi, atin;" 
1Samuel30:27 Bethel'a umho, Ramoth lhanglama umho, chule Jattir'a umho," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer'a umho, Siphmoth'a umho, chule Eshtemoa'a umho," 
1Samuel30:29 Rachal'a umhole Jerahmeel mite khopiho-a umho, chule Ken mite khopi ho-a umho," 
1Samuel30:30 Hormah'a umhole, Chorashan'a umho, chule Athach'a umho," 
1Samuel30:31 Chule Hebron'a umhole, David amatahle aloiho umna munjouse-a henga chun athot tan ahi." 
1Samuel31:1 Tun Philistine ten Israelte dounan gal ahinbolun: chule Israel mitechu Philistine te masanga konin ajamun, Gilboa molsanga chun akithat chap jengun ahi." 
1Samuel31:2 Chule Philistine ten Saul le achapate hatah-in ajuijun; chule Philistine te chun Saul chapate Jonathan, Abinadab, chule Melchishua chu athat taovin ahi." 
1Samuel31:3 Chuin Saul douna gal kisat chu anasa lheh jengin; thalthem ho-a konin nasatah-in amachangtan ahi. 
1Samuel31:4 Chuphatnin Saul'in agalvon popa jah-a, Nachemjam satdoh inlang neisunpai jengin; achutiloule hiche cheptan louho khu hunguntin eisununtin, eijumso getnunte, ati. Ahinla agalvon popa anompoi; ajehchu kicha behseh jenga ahi. Hijeh chun Saul'in chemjam alan, achung chu abotan ahi." 
1Samuel31:5 Chuin agalvon popan Saul athi amuphatnin, aman jong achemjam chu abokhumin amatoh athi thatai." 
1Samuel31:6 Chuti chun Saul le achapate thum, agalvon popa le amiho jouse chu chuche nichun athigam taove." 
1Samuel31:7 Chuin Israel mipi phaicham pang langkhatna umhole, Jordan pang langkhat lama umhon Israel mite ajama Saul le achapate athiu chu amuphatnun, khopiho adalhaovin ajamtaovin ahi. Chuin Philistine te ahungun, asunga acheng taove." 
1Samuel31:8 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Philistine te akithatho von sutdinga ahung phatnun, Saul le achapa thumho chu Gilboa molsanga alhuh chapmu amutaovin ahi." 
1Samuel31:9 Chuin amaho alu atanun, agalvon asutlhaovin, amilim hounao inho le mipi ho lah-a phonjal dingin Philistine te gamsunga athot kimvel taovin ahi." 
1Samuel31:10 Chuin agalvon chu Astaroth insunga akoijun: along chu Beth-shan banga akanbeh-un ahi. 
1Samuel31:11 Chuin Philistine ten Saul abolnau chu Jabesh-gilead'a chenghon ajah phatnun; 
1Samuel31:12 Mihangsan jouse akipatnun, jankhon acheuvin, Saul le achapate longchu Beth-shan kulbanga konin alauvin, Jabesh'a ahungun, hikoma chun ahaltaove." 
1Samuel31:13 Chuin aguho chu alauvin, Jabesh kho-a thingphung noi khatna avuijun, nisagi an angolun ahi." 
2Samuel1:1 Tun Saul thinungin ahitin ahi, David'in Amalek mite athagamma ahung kinunglekit chun; David chu Ziklag'a nini ana umin;" 
2Samuel1:2 Ahin anithumnin ahitin ahi, hichun veuvin mikhat apon teldehduh le alua leiset nat pumin Saul gebuh-a konin ahungdoh-in; chuin ahitin ahi, ama David kom ahunglhun phatnin tolla alhun chibai aboh tan ahi." 
2Samuel1:3 Chuin David'in ajah-a, Hoija kona hunga nahim? ati. Chuin aman, Israel gebuh a kona hung hoidoh kahi, ati." 
2Samuel1:4 Chuin David'in ajah-a, Thu iti tam? neisei peh-in, katao ahi, ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Miho galmuna konin ahung jamtaovin, chule mi tamtah jong alhun chule athitan; chule Saul le achapa Jonathan jong athitai, ati." 
2Samuel1:5 Chuin David'in gollhangpa henga, Nangman Saul le achapa Jonathan athi iti nahet ham? ati." 
2Samuel1:6 Chuin gollhangpa chun ajah-a, Keima Gilboa molsanga kaga umkhan ahile, ven Saul chu atengcha chunga ana opmin, chule ven sakol kangtalai hole sakol chung themho chun amachu nasatah-in ahindelun ahi." 
2Samuel1:7 Chuin aman anunglam ahin vetna ahile keima eimun, chuin eihin kouvin ahi. Chuin keiman kadonbut nin, Hikoma kaume, kati." 
2Samuel1:8 Chuin aman kahenga, Nang koi nahim? ati. Chuin keiman kadonbut nin, Keima Amalek mi kahi, kati." 
2Samuel1:9 Aman kahenga aseikitnin, Kachunga dingin lang neithatnin, ajehchu kachunga lunghemna ahunglhung tai; ajehchu kahinkhohi keima-a aum nalaijin ahi, ati." 
2Samuel1:10 Hijeh chun keima achunga kadingin, amachu kathat tai; ajehchu ama alhuh nunga ahinjou louding chu kahet ahitai; chule keiman alu-a um alal lukhuh le abanbul ho-a chaokolho chu kagalah-a, ka pakai nangma henga kahinpohlut ahitai, ati." 
2Samuel1:11 Hitichun David'in avonho abotkeh-in, hitima chun amatoh um miho jouse jong chun aboluvin ahi." 
2Samuel1:12 Chuin amaho chu alunghemun, akapmun, hitichun amahon Saul le achapa Jonathan ding, Pakai miho jouse ding le Israel insung miho jouse dingin nilhah geijin an angolun ahi. Ajehchu amaho chemjam'a louva ahiuve." 
2Samuel1:13 Chuin David'in athuseipeh gollhangpa jah-a chun, Hoilang mi nahim? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Keima gamchom mikhat chapa Amalek mi kahi, ati." 
2Samuel1:14 Chuin David'in ajah-a, Iti nangman Pakaiyin thao anusa khat chunga chu kichalouhela nakhut nalhah-a nasuhmang jengham? ati." 
2Samuel1:15 Chuin David'in gollhangho lah-a khatchu akouvin ajah-a, Nailutnin lang achunga chun, ati. Chuin aman ama chu athat tai." 
2Samuel1:16 Chuin David'in ajah-a, Pakai thaonusa kathatne tia nakamtah-a naphon jeh-in, nangma thisan phuchu nachunga chuhen, ati." 
2Samuel1:17 Chuin David'in Saul le achapa Jonathan ka-lan akachamin; 
2Samuel1:18 (Chuin aman Judah chate jongchu thalpi manje hilding ahi, tin thu apen, veuvin, hichehi Jasher lekhabua akisunin ahi)." 
2Samuel1:19 Israel loupina chu namunsangho-a akithat tai; i-atile ahat ho lhu-a hitam! 
2Samuel1:20 Gath mun'a seihih-un, Ashkelon lampi dunga phongle hih-un, achuti loule Philistine te chanuho kipah uvintin; chule cheptan louho chanute jong kichoisang getnunte." 
2Samuel1:21 Gilbao molsang nangho, nachung uva daitwi lhahda henlang, gojong juhdahen, louhon jong aga soda hen; ajehchu mihatpa lumdal chu theng loutah-in lemangin aumin, Saul lumdal chu thao nulou bangin anaumin ahi." 
2Samuel1:22 Akithatpa thisana konle ahatpa thaova konin, Jonathan thalpi chu akile kitpon, chule Saul chemjam jong agoh keuvin ahung kilepon ahi." 
2Samuel1:23 Ahinkho sung lhonin Saul le Jonathan hi ngailut umtah le dei um pentah ahilhonin; chule athilhonin jong akikhen lhonpoi; amani muvanlai sangin amangang jolhonin, keipi bahkaiho sangin jong ahat lhonin ahi." 
2Samuel1:24 Nangho Israel chanute, dei umtah ponsanthipma natompao, sana-a najempao Saul dingin kapmun." 
2Samuel1:25 Iti ahat ho galmuna lhujenga hitam! Vo Jonathan, namun sangho chunga chun nangma nakithat tai." 
2Samuel1:26 Kasopipa Jonathan, nangma jeh-in kalung agenthei lheh-in ahi: Keima dingin kipa umtah chu nanahin, keima neingailutna akidangin, numei ho ngailutna sangin asangjon ahi." 
2Samuel1:27 Ahat ho iti lhuh-a, chule gal manchah ho iti manthah jenga hitam!" 
2Samuel2:1 Chuin hiche jouchun ahitin ahi, David'in Pakai adongin, Judah khopiho khatpena chu kachetou dingham? ati. Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Chetouvin, ati. Chuin David'in hoilama kachetou ding ham? ati. Chuin aman, Hebron, ati." 
2Samuel2:2 Hijeh chun David chukom mun jonin ajiteni Jezreel mi Ahinoam le Karmel mi Nabal jinu Abigail toh achetou tai. 
2Samuel2:3 Chule David'in aumpi amite, amitakip a-insung mite toh ahin puitouvin, chuin amaho Hebron khopiho-a chun acheng taove." 
2Samuel2:4 Chuin Judah miho ahungun, David chu hikoma chun Judah insung pumpi chunga leng dingin thao ahungnu taovin ahi. Chuin amahon David henga, Saul vuija pangho chu Jabesh-gilead miho ahi ti aseipeh-un ahi." 
2Samuel2:5 Chuin David'in Jabesh-gilead mite henga sottol ho asollin, ahenguva, Pakaiyin phatthei naboh uhen, ijeh inem itile nanghon hitobang lungset themna chu napakai pau Saul navetsah-un, navui jun ahi." 
2Samuel2:6 Chule tun Pakaiyin nangho-a lungset themnale thutah namusah taohen: Chule nanghon hiche thilhi nanabol jeh uva keiman jong nangho ding thilpha kabolding ahi. 
2Samuel2:7 Hijeh chun tun nabanthau hatdoh sah-un lang, chule hangsanun; ajehchu napakai pau Saul chu athitan; chujongle Judah insung miten achunguva leng dingin keima thao einutaovin ahi, ati." 
2Samuel2:8 Ahinla Ner chapa Abner, Saul janel gal lamkaipa chun Saul chapa Ishbosheth chu Mahanaim'a ahinpuitan ahi." 
2Samuel2:9 Chuin amachu Gilead Ashurim Jezreel, Ephraim chule Benjamin le Israel pumpi chunga lengin apansahtan ahi." 
2Samuel2:10 Saul chapa Ishbosheth'in Israelte chunga vai ahomchun kum somli ahitan, chule kumni aleng changin ahi. Ahivangin Judah insung mi ten vang David ajuijun ahi." 
2Samuel2:11 Chule David Hebron khopi-a Judah insung pumpi chunga lenga apansung chu kum sagile lhagup ahi. 
2Samuel2:12 Chuin Ner chapa Abner chule Saul chapa Ishbosheth soh ho chu Mahanaim'a konin Gibeon'a apotdoh-un ahi. 
2Samuel2:13 Chule Zeruiah chapa Joab le David soh ho akondoh-un, Gibeon twikul panga akisutou vin ahi: chuin khat ho chu twikul pang langkhatna atouvun, chule khat langho chu twikul pang langkhatna atouvun ahi." 
2Samuel2:14 Chuin Abner'in Joab jah-a, Tun gollhangho chu kipatdoh-u henlang, imasanguva kideluhen, ati. Chuin Joab'in, Amahochu kipatdoh-u hen, ati." 
2Samuel2:15 Chuin Saul chapa Ishbosheth langa konin Benjamin mi somleni akipat doh-un, chule David sohte-a konin somleni akipat doh-un ahi." 
2Samuel2:16 Chuin mikhat chehchun agolpao luchang chu atuh-un, chule aloipa pangpeh chehchu chemjamin akisunto uvin; hitichun amaho thakhatnin alhutaovin ahi. Hijeh chun hiche munchu Helkath-hazzurim asahtaove. Hichu Gibeon'a um ahi." 
2Samuel2:17 Chule hiche nikho-a galkisat chu anasalheh jengin, Abner le Israel miho chu David sohte masanga agal lel taovin ahi." 
2Samuel2:18 Chule chumuna chun Zeruiah chapa thumho: Joab, Abishai chule Asahel ajaovun, chule Asahel kaljandan chu gamlah sakhipi tobang ahi." 
2Samuel2:19 Chuin Asahel chun Abner nungchu adelin, chule achepumin jetle veija kihei louvin Abner nungchu ajuipeh-in ahi." 
2Samuel2:20 Chuin Abner akinung heijin, Nangma Asahel nahilouham? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Kahinai, ati." 
2Samuel2:21 Chuin Abner'in ajah-a, Najetlam ahiloule naveilama kiheijin lang nagollhangho khatchu manin lang, agalvon chu lahpeh-in; ati. Ahinla Asahel chun ama ajuina-a konchun akiheidoh dehpon ahi." 
2Samuel2:22 Chuin Abner'in Asahel jah-a aseikitnin, Keima neijuina-a konin kiheidohtan: keiman nangma ibola hiche munahi kathading nahim? Achutile kamai chu nasopipa Joab angsunga iti kalah dingham? ati." 
2Samuel2:23 Ahivangin ama kiheimang ding anompon; hijeh chun Abner'in atengcha lhumkeijin amapa nahgu ngachanna noitah chu asunin ahile anunglanga apaidoh jengin ahi: chuin ama alhun, hiche munna chun athitan ahi, chuin ahitin ahi, Asahel alhuh-a athina mun hin phapa chanchu adingden jengun ahi." 
2Samuel2:24 Ahin Joab le Abishai chun Abner nungchu adel lhonin: chule Giah masanga um Gibeon gamthip jotna lampia um Ammah lhang ahung lhunun nisa alhumtan ahi. 
2Samuel2:25 Chuin Benjamin chate chu Abner nung chun akikhom khomun, chule amaho chu galsatmi honkhat akisouvin, lhang chunga adingun ahi." 
2Samuel2:26 Chuin Abner'in Joab chu akouvin, ajah-a, chemjam hin a-itih-a avallhum jingding hitam? Khonung akichaina le lungjinna ahung hi ding chu nahetlou ham? Namiho chu asopihou nung adelnauva kona akinungle kitna diuva naseipehna ding phat chu itih hiding ham? ati." 
2Samuel2:27 Chuin Joab'in, Hingjing Pathen mina kasei ahi, Nangman ima na naseilou, hile thonlouva jingkah lama chu amitakipmin asopi nung adellou dingu ahitai, ati." 
2Samuel2:28 Hijeh chun Joab'in sumkon amutnin ahile mijouse adingden taovin; chule Israel nung chu adeltapouvin, chule satjong akisatpi tapouvin ahi." 
2Samuel2:29 Chuin Abner le aloiho chu hiche jan chun phaicham ajot peh-un, chule Jordan agalkaijun, Bithron pumpi achonsoh-un, Mahanaim'ah ahungtaovin ahi." 
2Samuel2:30 Chuin Joab chu Abner ajuina-a konin ahung kinungle kittan, miho jouse chu akhop khoma ahile, David sohte mi somleko toh Asahel chu alhasamtan ahi." 
2Samuel2:31 Ahinla David sohte chun Benjamin mi Abner miho chu jathum le somgup athatnun ahi. 
2Samuel2:32 Chuin amahon Asahel longchu apuvin, Bethlehem'a um apa kivuina ding lhanna chun avuitaovin ahi. Chuin Joab le amite jankhon akitolun, jingkho vah-in Hebron ahunglhung taovin ahi." 
2Samuel3:1 Tun Saul insungle David insung miho kikah-a chun gal sottah aumtan ahi. Ahinla David chu ahatcheh ahatcheh-in, Saul insung chu ahatmo cheh ahatmo cheh jengtan ahi." 
2Samuel3:2 Chuin Hebron khopi-a David'in chapa phabep ahingin: achapa apeng masapen chu Amnon ahin, Jezreel mi Ahinoam toh ahin ahi." 
2Samuel3:3 Chule achapa ni chana chu Chileab ahin, Karmel mi Nabal inneipi Abigail hin ahi: chule athum channa chu Absalom ahin, Geshur lengpa Talmai chanu Maakah chapa ahi." 
2Samuel3:4 Chule ali channa chu Haggith chapa Adonijah ahin, chule anga channa chu Abital chapa Shephatiah ahi:" 
2Samuel3:5 Chule agup channa chu Ithream ahin, David jinu Eglad hin ahi. Hichengsehi Hebron khopi-a David'in chapa ahin hochu ahiuve." 
2Samuel3:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, Saul insung le David insung kikah-a gal aum sungchun, Abner chu amatah Saul insung miho-a dingin akisuhat nin ahi." 
2Samuel3:7 Chule Saul'in thaikem khat aneijin, amin chu Rizpah ahin, Aiah chanu ahi. Chuin Ishbosheth'in Abner henga Ipidinga kapa thaikemnu chu naluppi ham? atin aseije." 
2Samuel3:8 Hichun Abner Ishbosheth thusei jehchun alunghang lheh jengtan, ajah-a, Keima hi Judah te uicha lu beh kahim? Tunin keiman napa Saul insung, asopiho heng, aloi agolho henga kitahna kamusah-in, chule David khutna jong kapedoh pon nahi; ahinla nangman numei khat chungchanga nei themosah nalai ham?" 
2Samuel3:9 Pathen ahenga akihahselna bang banga keiman David achunga kabol louva ahile, Pathen'in Abner chunga abolnom nom bol henlang, akalvalin jong bolhen;" 
2Samuel3:10 Lenggam chu Saul insunga kona toldoh-a, chule Israel le Judah chunga David laltouna chu Dan'a pat Beersheba geija tundohna dinga." 
2Samuel3:11 Chuin aman Abner chu thusei cheng khatcha adonbut theipon ahi, ajehchu aman amachu akichan ahi." 
2Samuel3:12 Chuin Abner'in ama thalhengin David henga sottol ho asollin, ajah-a, Gamsung hi koijapen ham? aman aseiben, Keimatoh kitepna neijin, chule ven, Israel jouse nahenga hinpuilut nadinga kakhut hi nangma to pangkhom ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel3:13 Chuin aman, Aphai, keiman nangma toh kitepna kaneiding ahi: ahin keiman nahenga thilkhat kangaichat aume, hichu, Keimatoh kimuto dinga nahung tengle Saul chanu Michal nahin puimasat loule kamai namu louhel ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel3:14 Chuin David'in Saul chapa Ishbosheth henga sottol ho asolin, ajah-a, Philistine te chep jakhat mana kaji dinga kanahol kajinu Michal chu neipedoh-in, ati." 
2Samuel3:15 Chuin Ishbosheth'in mi asolin, a-inneipu Laish chapa Phaltiel'a konin agapuidoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel3:16 Chuin ajipa chun kappumin amanu nungchu Bahurim geijin ahinjuijin ahi. Hichun Abner'in ama henga, Kinungletan, ati. Chuin ama akilekit tan ahi." 
2Samuel3:17 Chuin Abner chu Israel upaho toh akihou khomin, ahenguva, Phat chomkhat masang jepchun nanghon David chu nachung uva leng dingin nanaholun;" 
2Samuel3:18 Tun hichu boltaovin; ajehchu Pakaiyin David chungchanga, Kasoh David khutna kona keiman kami Israelte hi Philistinte khutna kon le amelma jouseu khutna kona kahuhdoh ding ahi, tia asei ahi, ati." 
2Samuel3:19 Chuin Abner'in Benjamin mite henga jong aseijin ahi. Chuin Abner chu Israel le Benjamin insung pumpi-a dinga apha dinga kilomho seidingin Hebron khopi'a David henga achen ahi. 
2Samuel3:20 Hijeh chun Abner chu Hebron khopi-a David henga mi somni toh ahungin ahi. Chuin David'in Abner le amatoh alhonpi miho-a ding chun golvah abolin ahi. 
2Samuel3:21 Chuin Abner'in David henga, Keima kipat in chengting, chule amahon nangma toh kitepna asemtheina dingu le, nalunggot jouse banga vai nahom theina dingin, ka pakai le ka lengpa dingin Israelte jouse gakhom khominge, ati. Hitichun David'in Abner chu asoldoh-in, ama lungnom tah-in achetan ahi." 
2Samuel3:22 Chuin veuvin, David sohte hole Joab chu michoma achenaova konin ahung lhungun, chule thil kichomdoh tamtah ahinpouvin ahi: ahin Abner vangchu Hebron'a David toh anaum tapon ahi; ajehchu aman ama chu asoldoh ahitan, lungmong tah-a che-a ahitai." 
2Samuel3:23 Chuin Joab le aumpi mipi janel chu ahung phatnun, amahon Joab henga, Ner chapa Abner chu lengpa henga ahungin, chuin aman amachu asolmangin, chule ama lungmong tah-in achetai, atiuve." 
2Samuel3:24 Chuin Joab chu lengpa henga ahungin, ajah-a, Nangma ipi bol nahi hitam? Ven, Abner nahenga ahungin; ipidinga amachu nalesol kitna, chule ama chemanga hitam?" 
2Samuel3:25 Ner chapa Abner chu nalhemlha dinga, nahunglut napotdoh heding le, nabol jouse hedinga hunga ahichu nangman nahenai, ati." 
2Samuel3:26 Chuin Joab chu David koma kona ahung potdoh nungin, Abner nunga chun sottol ho asolin, chuin amahon amachu Sirah twikul'a konin ahinlepui kitnun ahi; ahinla hichu David'in ahepon ahi." 
2Samuel3:27 Chuin Abner chu Hebron'a ahung kilekit phatnin, kotpi phunga chun Joab'in atumbeh-a kihou pidin apuijin, chuin asopipa Asahel thisan phulahnan, anahgu nga channa noitah chu asutna ahile, athitan ahi." 
2Samuel3:28 Chuin chomkhat jouvin David'in hichu ajahdoh phatnin, hitin aseitai, Ner chapa Abner thisan chungchanga hin keima le kalenggam hi Pakai angsunga a-itih-in themona kaneipouve," 
2Samuel3:29 Hichehi Joab chung le apate insung jouse luchunga lhungjohen; chule Joab insunga konin thisan longa damlou, aphah, tenggola kingai, chemjam'a louva, ahiloule changlhah lhahsam ma kichat hihhen, ati." 
2Samuel3:30 Hitichun Joab le asopipa Abishai chun sopipalhon Asahel chu Gibeon galmuna anatha jehchun Abner chu athat lhontan ahi. 
2Samuel3:31 Chuin David'in Joab le ama umpi miho jouse henga chun, Naponhou jouse botkeh-unlang, nataiju chu khaodip ponin kigah-un, chule Abner masanga chun lunghemun, ati. Chule David amatah-in mithi kong chu ajuitan ahi." 
2Samuel3:32 Chuin amahon Abner chu Hebron'a avui taovin: chuin lengpa awsang tah-in Abner lhanna chun akaptan, chule mipi jouse jong akaptan ahi." 
2Samuel3:33 Chuin lengpan Abner chu akachamin, hitin ati, Abner hi mingol thia thiding hitam?" 
2Samuel3:34 Nakhut teni la akikanpon, nakeng teni jongla akisom poi; miphalouho anga mihem khat alhuh jeng bangin, nangma nalhu jengtan ahi, ati. Chuin mipi chu ama chunga akapkit taovin ahi." 
2Samuel3:35 Chule sun ahipetna an nehsah ding mipi chu David henga ahung phatnun, David akihahselin, Nisalhum kah-a keiman changlhah le thildang katepma ahile, Pathen'in kachunga hitihin bolhen lang akhoh cheh-in jong eibolhen, ati." 
2Samuel3:36 Chuin mipi ho chun ahethemun, alunglhai taove; lengpan bol jouse-a chu mipi ho lunglhaija ahiuve." 
2Samuel3:37 Ajehchu hiche nikho-a chu mijousele Israelte chun Ner chapa Abner kitha chu lengpa lunglam ahilou chu ahetnu ahi. 
2Samuel3:38 Chuin lengpan asohte henga, Tunia hi Israel sunga pipui le milen khat lhuh-a ahi ti helou nahiuvem?" 
2Samuel3:39 Chule keima lengdinga thao kinu kahi jeng vangin, tuni hin katha alhasam lheh-in ahi; chule hiche miho Zeruiah chapate hi keima dingin akhoh behseh jengun ahi. Pakaiyin thilphalou bolhohi aphatlounao natoh dungjuija alethuh dingu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel4:1 Chuin Saul chapan Hebron'a Abner athi tai ti ajah phatnin, akhut teni angoilhan, chule Israel pumpi jouse alunggim taovin ahi." 
2Samuel4:2 Chule Saul chapan loilah-a gal lamkai mini aneijin: khatpa minchu Baanah ahin, chule khatjopa minchu Rechab ahi, Benjamin phunga Beeroth mi Rimon chapateni ahilhone, (ajehchu Beeroth jonghi Benjamin'a kisim ahi;" 
2Samuel4:3 Ajehchu Beeroth miho chu Gittaim'a jamlut uva, chule hiche munna chun tunikho geija khopemden ahitaove)." 
2Samuel4:4 Chule Saul chapa Jonathan'in chapa khat aneijin amachu akengbai ahi. Jezreel'a kona Saul le Jonathan chungchang thu ahungchun amachu kumnga ahitan, ama jenlea pangnu chun amachu apuija ajampi ahi. Chule hitihi hija ahi, amanun mangang tah-a ajampi laitah-a amapa kiseplhu-a, akeng kibai ahi. Chule amapa minchu Mephibosheth ahi." 
2Samuel4:5 Chuin Beeroth mipa Rimmon chapateni Rekab le Baanah chu akipat lhonin, hiche sun nisa noija chun Ishbosheth in'a ahung lhonin, amapa chu suna alupna-a ana lumin ahi." 
2Samuel4:6 Chuin amani suhlou chang hamding bangin insunga alutlhonin; amapa nahgu nga channa noitah chu asun lhonin: chuin Recab le asopipa Baanah chu ajamdoh lhontan ahi. 
2Samuel4:7 Ajehchu amani insunga ahunglut lhonchun, amapa alupna dansung alupna-a analumin ahi, chuin amanin amachu avo lhonin, athat lhonin, alu atan lhonin, chule alu chu ahinchoi lhonin jankhovah-a phaicham lampia chun ahin jampi lhonin ahi." 
2Samuel4:8 Chuin amanin Ishbosheth luchang chu Hebron'a David henga ahinpo lhonin, lengpa henga, Ven, nahinkho lahdinga gopa namelmapa Saul chapa Ishbosheth luchang ahi; ka pakai le ka-lengpa dinga hi tunia Pakaiyin Saul le achilhahte chunga phu nalahpeh ahitai, atilhone." 
2Samuel4:9 Chuin David'in Beeroth mi Rimmon chapateni Recab le asopipa Baanah chu adonbutnin, ajah lhona, Kaki lungdoupi ho-a kona kahinna huhdohpa, hingjing Pakai mina kasei ahi," 
2Samuel4:10 Mikhatnin kahenga kipana thupha hinlhut dana akingaitoa, Ven, Saul chu athitai atichun; athupoh jeh-a kipaman kapeh dinga kinempa chu keiman kamanin, Ziklag'ah kathat tan ahi." 
2Samuel4:11 Achutile migilou hon michonpha khat a-insunga alupna chunga atha chungchanga hi ichana khohcheh-a kibolding hitam? Tu-a hi keiman amapa thisan hi nakhut lhona kangeh-a, leisetna kona kasuhmang lhonlou dingham? ati." 
2Samuel4:12 Chuin David'in agolhangho chu thu apen ahile, amahon amani chu athatnun, akhutlhon le akenglhon atanbongun, Hebron'a um twikul chung khatna akhai taovin ahi. Ahin amahon Ishbosheth luchang chu alauvin, Hebron mun'a um Abner lhanna chun avuitaove."
