2Samuel5:1 Chuin Israel phung jouse Hebron'a David henga ahungun, ahenga, Ven keihohi nagu le naphe jeng kahiuve." 
2Samuel5:2 Chule masanga Saul keiho chunga lenga anapan laija patna, Israel gamsunga keiho eipuidoh uva le eipuilut uva nahi; chule Pakaiyin nahenga, Ka kelngoi Israelte hi navah ding, chule nangma Israelte chunga gallamkai nahi ding ahi, tin aseijin ahi, atiuve." 
2Samuel5:3 Hitichun Israel upaho jouse chu Hebron'a lengpa henga ahungun: chule David lengpan Hebron'a Pakai angsunga amatoh kitepna khat aneipin: chuin amahon David chu Israel pumpi chunga leng dingin thao anu taovin ahi. 
2Samuel5:4 David alengchan kipatchun ama kum somthum ahitan, chule kum somli aleng changin ahi." 
2Samuel5:5 Hebron'a Judah te chunga kum sagile lhagup aleng changin, chule Jerusalem'a chun kum somthum le kumthum Israel le Judah chunga aleng changin ahi." 
2Samuel5:6 Chuin lengpa le amite chu chuche gama um Jebus mite chenna Jerusalem'a chun acheuvin; amaho chun David henga, Mitcho le elbai nalahdoh masat loule hichea hi nahunglut theilou diu ahi, atiuvin ahi; ajehchu amahon David chu khopi sunga hin hunglut jou ponte, tia anagelu ahi." 
2Samuel5:7 Ahijeng vanginla David'in Zion mundet pen chu alatan: hichu David khopi ahitai. 
2Samuel5:8 Chuin hiche nikho chun David'in, Koi hijongle twilama kaltouva, Jebus miho le, David hinna-in adou mitcho le elbai ho gathat penpenpa chu lamkai pipuile gal lamkai hiding ahi, ati. Hijeh-a chu amahon, Mitcho le elbai insunga hunglut theilou ding ahi, atiu ahi." 
2Samuel5:9 Hitichun David kulpi sunga chun achengin, chule hichu David khopi asahtai. Chuin David'in Millo'a pat asunglamsea chun kul akaikhum tan ahi." 
2Samuel5:10 Chuin David chu ahung khangtou chehcheh in, janel Pakai Pathen'in aumpin ahi." 
2Samuel5:11 Chuin Tyre lengpa Hiram'in David henga sottol ho, chule cedar thingho, thingthem bolhole, song kheng themho ahinsolin ahi: chule amahon David dingin in asahpeh uvin ahi." 
2Samuel5:12 Chuin David chun Pakaiyin Israelte chunga lengdinga atundoh ahichu ahetan; chule alenggam jong chu ami Israelte jal-in achoi lheh jengtan ahi. 
2Samuel5:13 Chuin ama Hebron'a kona ahungdoh jouchun, David'in Jerusalem'a konin aji dingle athaikem akipuiben: chule David'a dingin chapate le chanute apenbe nalaijun ahi." 
2Samuel5:14 Chule hichengsehi Jerusalem'a aumsunga pengho achate minchu ahi, Shammuah, Shobab, Nathan le Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 Chule Ibhar, Elishua, Napheg le Japhia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada, chule Eliphalet ahiuvin ahi." 
2Samuel5:17 Ahin Philistine ten David chu Israelte chunga leng dingin thao anutaove ti ajah phatnun, Philistinte jouse chu David holding chun ahung taovin; chule David'in hichu ajan, kulpidet lamma chun achesuhtan ahi." 
2Samuel5:18 Philistinte jong chu ahungun Rephaim phaichama chun akithecheh taovin ahi. 
2Samuel5:19 Chuin David'in Pakai adongin, Keima Philistinte dou dinga kachetou dingham? Nangman amaho kakhutna neipeh doh dingham? ati. Chuin Pakaiyin David henga, Chetouvin; ijeh inem itile keiman tahsanlelna beihela Philistinte chu nakhutna kapeh dohding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel5:20 Chuin David chu Baal-perazima ahungin, chule David'in hilaija chun amaho chu ajouvin, chuin aman, Pakaiyin kamelmate chu kamasanga twi kiphijah bangin asukeh jengtan ahi, ati. Hijeh chun aman hiche munchu Baal-perazim asahtai." 
2Samuel5:21 Chuin amahon hia chun amilimhou chu adalha taovin ahile, David le aloihon ahalha taovin ahi." 
2Samuel5:22 Chuin Philistine ho chu ahung kontou kitnun, chule amaho Rephaim phaichama chun akithecheh-un ahi." 
2Samuel5:23 Hijeh chun David'in Pakai adongin ahile, aman, Nangma nakontou louding ahi; amavang nangman amaho nunglama kona nahin velkola, thingtheimi phungho maidon tah-a chu achunguva nachuh ding ahi." 
2Samuel5:24 Chule hitiding ahi, nangman thingtheimi phungho chunga mipi kitol gin najah tengle, malam nanoding ahi; ijeh inem itile hiche phat chule Pakai chu Philistine janelho thatgam dinga namasanga cheding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel5:25 Chuin David'in jong Pakaiyin athupeh bangchun aboltan; hitichun aman Philistinte chu Geba'a pat Gezer geijin athat tan ahi. 
2Samuel6:1 Chuin David'in Israel mi akilhengdoh sangthum hochu akhom khomin ahi. 
2Samuel6:2 Hichun David akipatdoh-in, aumpi jouse toh Juda gam Baale'a konin, Cherubim teni kikah-a um janel ho Pakai minna kikou, Pakai thingkhong chu gapotou dingin ache taovin ahi." 
2Samuel6:3 Chuin amahon Pathen thingkhong chu bongkang thah khat chunga akoijun, Gibeah kho-a cheng Abinadab in'a konchun ahin podoh taovin ahi. Hitichun Abinadab chapateni Uzzah le Ahio chun hiche bongkang thah chu ahintol lhonin ahi." 
2Samuel6:4 Chule amahon Pathen thingkhong chu Gibeah kho-a Abinadab in'a konin ahinpodoh-un; Pathen thingkhong chutoh ahung kilhonpeh-un, chule Ahio chu Pathen thingkhong masanga chun achen ahi." 
2Samuel6:5 Chuin David le Israel insung mijouse chun Pakai masanga chun chahthinga kisem manchah jatchom chomho, selangdah, tumgingtheiho jouse, khongchaho, sumkon bineiho, chule thih khutbeh ho atum gingun ahi." 
2Samuel6:6 Chuin amaho Nacon pholmun ahunglhun phatnun, Uzzah chun Pathen thingkhong lama chun akhut ajahdoh-in, atuh-in ahi: ajehchu bongchal teni chun hichu athin lhon ahi." 
2Samuel6:7 Chuin Pakai lunghanna chu Uzzah chunga ahung koujah jengin; chuin Pathen'in athemona jeh-in hikoma chun ajepmin; chule ama Pakai Pathen thingkhong koma chun athitan ahi. 
2Samuel6:8 Chuin Pakai Uzzah chunga achuh jehchun David alung nommo lheh jengtan; hiche mun chu Perezuzzah asah-in, tunigeijin akisah tan ahi." 
2Samuel6:9 Chuin hicheni chun David'in Pakai akichan, Pakai thingkhong chu kahenga iti hung thei dingham? ati." 
2Samuel6:10 Hijeh chun David'in Pakai thingkhong chu ahenga David khopi sunga pohlut ding anomtapon; ahinla David'in hichu Gitt mi Obed-edom insunga chun apolut tan ahi. 
2Samuel6:11 Chuin Pakai thingkhong chu Gitt mi Obed-edom in'a chun lhathum aumin; chuin Pakaiyin Obed-edom le a-insung pumpi chu phatthei aboh tan ahi. 
2Samuel6:12 Chuin David lengpa jah-a, Pathen thingkhong jal-in Obed-edom le a-insung pumpi le anei agou jouse phatthei achang tai, ti akiseipeh tan ahi. Hijeh chun David achen, Pathen thingkhong chu Obed-edom in'a konin kipah tah-in David khopi-a ahin potou tan ahi." 
2Samuel6:13 Chuin anahitin ahi, Pakai thingkhong puhon kalgup ason jouvun, aman bongchal le gan kivahthaova ganlhainan abolin ahi." 
2Samuel6:14 Chuin David chu Pakai angsunga chun athanei chasunin alamin; chule David chun tupat ponnem thempu sangkhola atai akigah ahi. 
2Samuel6:15 Hijeh chun David le Israel insung miho jouse chun aw thongjeju le sumkon ginto thon Pakai thingkhong chu ahin putouvun ahi. 
2Samuel6:16 Chule Pakai thingkhong chu David khopi sunga ahung lhunto lhonin, Saul chanu Michal'in bangkotna konin ahinven ahile, David lengpa Pakai masanga akhut alea alam chu amutan; amanun alungthimin amuneo lheh-in ahi." 
2Samuel6:17 Chuin amahon Pakai thingkhong chu ahinpolut nun, aumna dinga David'in anasah ponbuh lailung tah-a chun akoitaovin ahi. Chuin David'in Pakai anga govam thilto le chamna thilto abolin ahi." 
2Samuel6:18 Chuin David'in athilto, govam thilto le chamna thiltoho achai phatnin, aman mipi hochu Pakai janel minin phatthei aboh tan ahi." 
2Samuel6:19 Chuin David'in mijouse le Israel mite jouse chu, anumei apasal'in changlhah lum khatcheh le sachan khatcheh, chule lengpitheija kisem changlhah khatcheh ahoppeh'in ahi. Hitichun mijouse chu a-inlam cheh uva achetauvin ahi." 
2Samuel6:20 Chuin David chu a-insung miho phatthei bohdingin ahung kiletan ahi. Chuin Saul chanu Michal chu David kimupi dingin ahungdoh-in, ahenga, Tunia Israelte lengpa pannabei mijahmo tah khat asagoh-a aum banga, tunia asoh numei ho mitmu-a asagoh-a aum jengchu iti loupi hitam! ati." 
2Samuel6:21 Chuin David'in Michal jah-a, Pakai mite Israelte chunga vaihom dinga eitungdohpa, napa le a-insung miho jouse khella eilhengdoh pa Pakai masang ahi; hijeh achu Pakai masanga lamding kahi." 
2Samuel6:22 Chule hiche sunga kamelse cheh ding, chule kamitmu-a kakisuhnem ding ahi. Nangman nasei soh numei ho chungchanga vang, keima amaho jabola kaum ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel6:23 Hijeh chun Saul chanu Michal chun athini geijin cha aneitapon ahi. 
2Samuel7:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, lengpa insunga atouva, Pakaiyin akimvela amelmaho-a konin choldona apeh phatnin," 
2Samuel7:2 Chutichun lengpan themgao Nathan henga, Tun vetemin, keima Cedar in'a kachengin, ahin Pathen thingkhong chu ponbuh maimai sunga aumin ahi, ati." 
2Samuel7:3 Chuin Nathan'in lengpa henga, Chenlang nalunga umjouse chu gaboltan, ajehchu Pakaiyin na-umpinai, ati." 
2Samuel7:4 Chuin chuche janchun ahitin ahi, Pakai thu chu Nathan henga ahungin, hitin ati," 
2Samuel7:5 Chenlang kasoh David jah-a, Nangman keima dinga kachenna ding in khat neisahpeh dingham?" 
2Samuel7:6 Keiman Israel chate Egypt gama kona kahin puidoh ni-a pat tuni geijin in'a kachengpon, amavang ponbuh sungle houbuh sungabou kachen ahi." 
2Samuel7:7 Keima Israel chateto kana valena mun jouse-a, kami Israelte vahdinga kathupeh Israel phungho henga thu kanaseija, ahenguva, Ipi dinga nanghon keima dinga Cedar thinga in khat neisahpeh louvu ham tia kanasei khah-em?" 
2Samuel7:8 Hijeh-a chu tuahi nangman kasoh David henga hitia hi nasei ding ahi, Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Keiman nangmahi kelngoi lhatna hamhing lah-a kelngoi najuina-a kona kamite Israelte chunga vaihom dinga kalhendoh nahi:" 
2Samuel7:9 Chule keiman nachena chana kalhonpin, namitmu-a konin namelmate jouse kasumangin, leiset chunga miminthang ho minkhat bangin namin kathansah tan ahi." 
2Samuel7:10 Hiche chungvuma chu keiman kami Israelte dinga chu munkhat kalhendoh pehding, chule amaho agam mong monguva achenuva, akichon lele tahlou nadinguva kaphudet dingu; chule masanga banga migilou chaten jong asuhgenthei tahloudiu;" 
2Samuel7:11 Kami Israelte chunga dinga thutan ho kana thupeh laija patna ana chutiu ahin; chule namelmate jouse-a konin kakicholdo sahtan ahi. Chujongle Pakaiyin nahenga na-insung katundoh pehding nahi ati. 
2Samuel7:12 Chule nahin nikhoho ahunglhina, nangma napu napate toh nalupkhom tengle, keiman nanunga nachilhah, nangma taijola mong monga peng khat katundoh ding, Chule keiman alenggam kaphudet ding ahi." 
2Samuel7:13 Ama chun kamina in khat asah ding, chule keiman alenggam chu atonsotna dinga kaphudet ding ahi." 
2Samuel7:14 Keima apa kahi ding, chule ama kachapa hiding ahi. Aman khangit louna aneija ahile keiman amachu mihem sehgimna tenggol le mihem chate kajepna-a chu kasehgim ding ahi." 
2Samuel7:15 Amavang namasanga kona kachondoh Saul'a kona kalahmang banga, kami hepina chu ama-a kona kalahmang louding ahi." 
2Samuel7:16 Chule na-insung le nalenggam chu a-itih a dinga namasanga kiphutdet ding; na laltouna jong a-itih-a dinga kiphutdet ding ahi, tin gaseipeh-in ati." 
2Samuel7:17 Hicheng thuho dungjui le hiche gaothilmu ho dungjui hin Nathan'in David chu aseipeh tan ahi. 
2Samuel7:18 Chuin David lengpa chu alutnin, Pakai masanga atouvin, hitin aseije, Vo Pakai Pathen, keima koi kahi ham? chule ka-in chu ipiham hija nangman hichan geija neipuiham?" 
2Samuel7:19 Chule vo Pakai Pathen, hichehi nangma dinga thil neocha bou ahinalaijin; chule nangman khonungpeh-a nasoh insunga hunglhung ding jong naseijin ahi. Chule Vo Pakai Pathen, hichehi mihem chonna dan ngaimong hinam?" 
2Samuel7:20 Chule David'in nahenga ipi aseibe dingham? Ajehchu Pakai Pathen nangin nasoh hi nahenai. 
2Samuel7:21 Ajehchu nathu jal le nangmatah lung ngaito dungjuija, hiche thil loupitahhi nasoh-in ahetthei nadinga nabol ahitai." 
2Samuel7:22 Hijeh chun vo Pakai Pathen, nangma naloupin ahi: ajehchu keihon kanaova kajah dungjuijun nangma tobang aumpon, nangma tailou Pathen dang aumpoi." 
2Samuel7:23 Chule leiset chunga hi nami Israelte tobanga namkhat Pathen'in nangma-a hidinga Egypt gama kon, namtin le a-pathen hou lah-a kona, namite hiding le namin loupi sah ding, chule nangma dinga thil loupitahho le nagama dinga tijat umtahho boldinga nalhatdoh umkham?" 
2Samuel7:24 Ajehchu nangma tah-in nami Israelte hi a-itih-a namite hidinga nanamdet ahitan: chule Pakai, nangma a-Pathen'u nahung hitai." 
2Samuel7:25 Chule tun, vo Pakai Pathen, nasoh chungchang le a-insung chung chang thua nasei thuhi a-itih a dingin phutdet ninlang, naseibang chun boltan." 
2Samuel7:26 Chule Janel Pakai hi Israelte Pathen ahi tin namin hi a-imatih chanin choisangin umhen lang: chule nasoh David insung hi namasanga kiphutdet hen. 
2Samuel7:27 Ajehchu nangma Vo janel Pakai le Israel Pathen'in nasoh henga naphong doh-in, Keiman na-insung katundoh ding ahi tin naseije. Hijeh-a chu nasoh hin hiche taona neina dinga hi alungsunga hansana amu ahi." 
2Samuel7:28 Chule tun, vo Pakai Pathen, nangma Pathen nahin, chule nathu hohi thutah ahin, chule nangman hiche phatna hi nasoh henga nahahsel in ahi." 
2Samuel7:29 Hijeh chun tun a-itih-a namasanga aumjing nadin, nasoh insung phatthei naboh dinghi nalung lhaina hihen:ajehchu vo Pakai Pathen, nangman hichehi nasei ahitai; chule nangma phatthei bohna-a chun, nasoh insunghi a-itih-in phatthei changjing tahen." 
2Samuel8:1 Chuin hiche jouchun ahitin ahi, David'in a Philistinte chu asatnin, amaho chu asunemin ahi. Chuin David'in Metheg-ammah chu Philistinte khutna konin aladohtan ahi." 
2Samuel8:2 Chule aman Moab asatnin, chule amahochu tolla alupsah-in, khaovin aten; thading ho chu golni in aten, chule hinghoi dingho chu golkhat lhingsetnin aten ahi. Chutichun Moab mite chu David soh-in ahung pangun, thilpeh ahinchoi jiuvin ahi." 
2Samuel8:3 Chuin David Euphrate luidunga agamgi lelah dinga achea chun, aman Zobah lengpa Rehob chapa Hadadezer jong chu athatnin ahi." 
2Samuel8:4 Chuin David'in amapa-a konchun sakol kangtalai sangkhat le sakol sepai jasagi, chule keng sepai sangsomni ahinlan ahi. Chuin David'in sakol kangkai jouse chu asubaijin, ahinla sakol kangtalai jakhat kaiding vang akhendoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel8:5 Chuin Damascus'a Syria mite chu Zobah lengpa Hadadezer kithopi dingin ahungun ahile, David'in Syria mite chu sangsomni le sangni athatnin ahi." 
2Samuel8:6 Chuin David'in Syria'a um Damascus'a chun sepai tampi akoitan ahi. Chuin Syria mite chu David soh-in ahung pangun, thilpeh ahinchoi jiuvin ahi. Chule Pakaiyin David chu achenna jouse-ah aveng jingin ahi." 
2Samuel8:7 Chuin David'in Hadadezer sohpa khutna um sana lumdal chu alan, Jerusalem'a ahin polut tan ahi." 
2Samuel8:8 Chuin Hadadezer khopi Betah le Berothai'a konin, David lengpan sum-eng tamtah ahinpon ahi." 
2Samuel8:9 Hamath lengpa Toi'in David lengpan Hadadezer janel jouse athattai ti ajah phatnin," 
2Samuel8:10 Hichun aman Hadadezer asatna ajo jehchun, Toi'in ama chibai bohding le phatthei bohdingin achapa Joram chu David henga ahinsolin ahi; ajehchu Hadadezer chu Toi toh anakigal jinga ahi. Chule Joram'in dangka, sana, chule sum-eng kong le belho ahinpon:" 
2Samuel8:11 Hicheho chengse chu David'in asuhnem namtin jouse-a kona alah dangka le sana jouse chutoh Pakai henga atohdoh-in ahi. 
2Samuel8:12 Hicheho chu Syria'a kon, Moab'a kon, Ammon chate'a kon, Philistinete-a kon, Amalek'a kon, Zobah lengpa Rehob chapa Hadadezera'a kon galthil kichomho ahi." 
2Samuel8:13 Chuin David'in chi phaicham mun'a Syria mite sangsom le sangget atha-a ahung kinunglekit chun amin athang tan ahi. 
2Samuel8:14 Chuin aman Edom'a sepai tampi akoijin, Edom gamsung jouse chun sepai akoisoh keijin, chuin Edom mite jouse David sohte ahung hitaovin ahi. Chule David chu Pakaiyin achena jouse-a avengbit jingin ahi." 
2Samuel8:15 Chuin David'in Israel pumpi chunga vai ahomin; chule David'in amite jouse chunga chun phatah le dihtah-in na atongin ahi. 
2Samuel8:16 Chule Zeruiah chapa Joab chun janel chunga vaipo ahin; chule Ahilud chapa Jehoshaphat chu thuching ahin; 
2Samuel8:17 Ahitub chapa Zadok le Abiathar chapa Ahimelech chu thempu ahilhonin; chule Seraiah chu danthu sun ahin; 
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada chapa Benaiah chu Chereth mite le Peleth mite chunga vaihomin apangin; chule David chapate chu vaihom pipun apangun ahi. 
2Samuel9:1 Chuin David'in, Jonathan khohsahna jala hepina kamusah ding Saul insungmi khatbeh akikhendoh umlou ham? ati." 
2Samuel9:2 Chuin Ziba kiti Saul insungmi lah-a soh khat aumin ahi. Chuin amahon amachu David henga akouvun, chuin lengpan ajah-a, Nangma Ziba nahim? ati. Chuin aman, Nasohhi amachu kahinai, ati." 
2Samuel9:3 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Achunga Pathen mihepina kamusah ding Saul insungmi khatbeh umlou ham? ati. Chuin Ziba'in lengpa henga, Jonathan chapa khat aumin, amachu kengbai ahi, ati." 
2Samuel9:4 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Amachu hoilaija umam? ati. Chuin Ziba'in lengpa henga, Ven amachu Lodebar kho-a um Ammiel chapa Machir in'a aumin ahi, ati." 
2Samuel9:5 Chuin David lengpan mi asolin, Lodebar kho-a um Ammiel chapa Machir in'a konchun agapuidoh tan ahi." 
2Samuel9:6 Tun Saul chapa, Jonathan chapa Mephibosheth chu David kom ahunglhun phatnin, ama aboh khupmin jana apen ahi. Chuin David'in, Mephibosheth, ati. Chuin aman, ven nasohhi! tin adonbutnin ahi." 
2Samuel9:7 Chuin David'in ajah-a, Kicha hih-in: ajehchu keiman thonlouva napa Jonathan khohsahna jala nangma hepina kamusah ding, chule napu Saul gam sese jong kalepeh kitna, nangma tanglou hela kadokhang chunga changlhah naneh jing ding ahitai, ati." 
2Samuel9:8 Chuin ama akunin, Nasohhi ipi kahia, chule uicha thisa tobang keimahi nei khohsah ham? ati." 
2Samuel9:9 Chuin lengpan Saul sohpa Ziba chu akouvin, ajah-a, Saul neijouse le a-in jouse napakai pa chapahi kapeh ahitai." 
2Samuel9:10 Hijeh-a chu nangma le nachapate, chule nasohten amadinga leiset chu nalhopeh diu, chule napakai pau hin nehding an aneitheina dinga agasoh hochu nahin pohdiu ahi: ahin napakai pao chapa Mephibosheth hin phattina kadokhanga changlhah anehding ahi, ati. Tun Ziba'n chapa somle ngale soh somni aneijin ahi." 
2Samuel9:11 Hichun Ziba'n lengpa jah-a, Ka pakai lengpan asoh athupeh dungjuija hi nasoh-in kabol ding ahi, ati. Mephibosheth chungchanga, lengpan hitin ati, aman kadokhang chunga chapateho khat banga an anehding ahi." 
2Samuel9:12 Chule Mephibosheth'in chapa khangdong khat aneijin, amin chu Mica ahi. Chule Ziba insunga cheng jouse chu Mephibosheth soh ahi taovin ahi." 
2Samuel9:13 Hitichun Mephibosheth chu Jerusalem'a achengin ahi: ajehchu aman tanglou helin lengpa dokhanga anen; chule ama akeng ni-a baija ahi. 
2Samuel10:1 Chuin hiche jouchun ahitin ahi, Ammon chateho lengpa chu athitan ahile achapa Hanun chun ama khelin lengvai apotan ahi." 
2Samuel10:2 Chuin David'in, Apan kachunga hepina eimusah banga, keima jong Nahash chapa Hanun chunga hepina kamusah ding ahi, ati. Hitichun David'in apa chungchanga ama lhamon ding chun asohte asoltan ahi. Chuin David soh ho chu Ammon chate gama chun ahunglut taovin ahi." 
2Samuel10:3 Chule Ammon chate pipuho chun apakaipao Hanun jah-a, David hin napa ajana jala lhamonsah hohi ahinsol ahi hinte tia nagelem? David hin khopi hi ajotheina dinga akholtoh dingle, avelhi ding joh-a ahinsol hilou ham? atiuve." 
2Samuel10:4 Hijeh chun Hanun'in David soh ho chu amanin, akhamulu akeh langkhat avolhahpeh-in, chule aponchenu chu akimlaitah, ato don laitah-u chu achetanpeh-in; chuin amahochu asolmang tan ahi." 
2Samuel10:5 Chuin hichehi David aseipeh phatnun, aman amaho kimupi ding asolin ahi, ajehchu miho chu jahcha lheh jengu ahi: chuin lengpan, Nakhamulu asaodohkit kahsen Jericho-a umunlang, ahung saodoh tengle hung kinunglekit taovin, ati." 
2Samuel10:6 Chuin Ammon chaten David angsung kidah umtah ahiu amudoh phatnun, Ammon chate chun Bethrehob'a um Syria mite, Zobah'a um Syria mite keng sepai sangsomni, Maakah lengpa-a kon mi sangkhat, chule Ishtob'a kon mi sangsom le sangni athalah-un ahi." 
2Samuel10:7 Chuin David'in hichu ajah phatnin, Joab le amihat janelho chu asoltan ahi." 
2Samuel10:8 Chuin Ammon chate chu ahung kondoh-un, kotpi phung lutna-a chun galsat dingin akigolun: Zobah'a um,Rehob'a um, Ishtob'a um le Maakah'a um Syria mite chu amaho le amaho loujaova aumun ahi." 
2Samuel10:9 Joab'in galchu anung le ama-a aum amu phatnin, Israel mi lhentum cheh chu alhengdoh-in, amaho chu Syria te toh kisat dingin akigolsah-in:" 
2Samuel10:10 Chule adangho sese chu asopipa Abishai khutna Ammon chate toh kisat dinga agoltoh dingin apedoh-in ahi. 
2Samuel10:11 Chuin aman, Syria te chu keija dinga ahat behseh uva ahile, nangman neikithopi ding; ahia Ammon chate chu nanga dinga ahat behseh uva ahile, keima kahunga kahung kithopi ding nahi." 
2Samuel10:12 Hangsanun, eiho imiteu dingleh i-Pathen'u khopiho-a dingin pangu hite: chule Pakaiyin amitmu-a pha asah bang bangin bolhen, ati." 
2Samuel10:13 Chuin Joab le aumpi miho chu Syria mite to kisat dingin galmun anailut taovin ahile, amaho chu amasanga chun ajam taovin ahi." 
2Samuel10:14 Chuin Ammon chate chun Syria mite jam chu amu phatnun, amaho jong Abishai masanga chun ajamun, khopi sungah aluttaovin ahi. Hitichun Joab chu Ammon chate-a konchun ahung kinunglen, Jerusalem'a ahungtan ahi." 
2Samuel10:15 Chuin Syria miten Israelte masanga agal lel'u chu amuphatnun, amaho akikhom khom taovin ahi." 
2Samuel10:16 Chuin Hadadezer'in mi asolin, luipi galla um Syria mite chu agapuidoh-in ahi. Chuin amaho Helam'a ahungun, chule Hadadezer janel gal lamkai Shobach chu amaho masanga achen ahi." 
2Samuel10:17 Chule hichethu hi David aseipeh phatnun, aman Israelte jouse akhom khomin, Jordan agalkaijun, Helam mun'a ahungun ahi. Chuin Syria mite chu David doudingin amaho le amaho akigol toh-un, ama chutoh akisat taovin ahi." 
2Samuel10:18 Chuin Syriaho chu Israel masanga chun ajam taovin; chule David'in Syria miho sakol kangtalai tolmi jasagi le sakol sepai sangsomli, chule ajanelhou lamkai Shobach jong chu athatnin, hiche mun'a chun athitan ahi." 
2Samuel10:19 Chuin Hadadezer soh-a um lengho jouse chun Israelte masanga agal lel'u chu amu phatnun, Israelte toh chamna abollun, amaho jenle-in apang taovin ahi. Hijeh chun Syria miten Ammon chateho kithopi kit ding chu akicha taovin ahi." 
2Samuel11:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, kum ahung kichaina, lengho galkon phat laitah-in, David'in Joab le aumkhompi asote chule Israel mite chu asolin; chuin amahon Ammon chate asumangun, Rabbah khopi aum uvin ahi. Ahinla David Jerusalem'a aum jingin ahi." 
2Samuel11:2 Chuin nilhah langin ahitin ahi, David chu alupna-a konin athoudoh-in, leng in chunga chun avahle len ahi. Chuin aman in chunga konchun numei khat akisilpet amun, chule hiche numeinu chu vetdinga melhoitah ahi." 
2Samuel11:3 Chuin David'in mi asolin amanu thudol agakholchil sah-in ahi. Chuin mikhatnin, Hichehi Hit mi Uriah inneipi Eliam chanu Bathsheba hilouham? ati." 
2Samuel11:4 Chuin David'in thupole ho khat asolin, amanu agapuisah tan; chule amanu ahenga ahungin, aman amanu aluppitan ahi; ajehchu amanu chu athen louna-a kona kisuthenga ahin: chuin amanu a-in lama akile kittan ahi." 
2Samuel11:5 Chuin amanun nao avop phatnin, David henga mi asolin, Nao kavoptai, agati sah-e." 
2Samuel11:6 Chuin David'in Joab thu athotnin, Hit mi Uriah chu neihin solpeh-in, ati. Chuin Joab'in Uriah chu David henga ahin soltan ahi." 
2Samuel11:7 Chuin Uriah ahenga ahung phatnin, David'in Joab le mipite chu iti naovem, chule galchu itobanga machal jinga hinam tin adongin ahi." 
2Samuel11:8 Chuin David'in Uriah jah-a, Na-in lama chesuh inlang, nakeng kisilin, ati. Chuin Uriah chu lengpa in'a konin akipatdoh-in, chule lengpa-a kona nehding thilpeh ho-in anung ajuisuh paijin ahi." 
2Samuel11:9 Ahivangin Uriah chu lengpa in kotkhah bula chu a-pakaipa sohte chutoh alum denin, a-in lama chun achesuhpon ahi." 
2Samuel11:10 Chuin amahon Uriah chu a-in lama achetapoi tia David aseipeh phatnun, David'in Uriah jah-a, Nakholjin na-a kona nahung hilouham? ipidinga na-in lama chu chesuh louva nahim? ati." 
2Samuel11:11 Chuin Uriah chun David henga, Pathen thingkhong le Israel chule Judah pon in'a aumun; chule ka pakaipa Joab le ka pakaipa sohten gamlah-a gebuh akisonun; keima ane dingle adonding, chule kaji toh lumkhom dinga ka-in'a kache dingham? Nangma nahina nalhagao ahinlaisen keiman hiche tobang thil hi bolponge ati." 
2Samuel11:12 Chuin David'in Uriah henga, Tunin jong hiche mun'a hin umkit tan, chule jing tengle keiman kipatdohsah nange ati. Hijeh chun Uriah chu Jerusalem'a hicheni chun chule ajing geijin aumtan ahi." 
2Samuel11:13 Chuin David'in ama akou phatnin, aman ama masanga chun anen adonin, chuin aman ama chu adonkhamsah tan ahi. Chuin nilhah lamin a-pakaipa sohtetoh jalkhuna lum dingin achen, ahin a-inlanga vang achesuh pon ahi." 
2Samuel11:14 Chuin jingkah-in ahitin ahi, David'in Joab henga dingin lekha khat asunin, hichu Uriah khutna athottan ahi." 
2Samuel11:15 Chuin aman lekha chunga chun asunin, Uriah chu galmun khohpen masanga chun pansah-in, amachu akisuhkhah -a athitheina dingin, ama-a konin kinung chonun, ati." 
2Samuel11:16 Chule ahitin ahi, Joab'in khopi chu aum laijin, Uriah chu galhat miho umna-a ahet munkhatna chun apansah-in ahi." 
2Samuel11:17 Chuin khopi sunga um miho chu apotdoh-un, Joab toh akisat taovin ahi: chule hiche mun'a chun David sohte mipi ho lah-a phabep khat alhutaovin; chule Hit mi Uriah jong chu athitai." 
2Samuel11:18 Chuin Joab'in gal chung chang thu jouse David gaseipeh dingin mi asoltan; 
2Samuel11:19 Chuin aman thupolepa chu thu apen, Nangman lengpa henga gal umchan thuho jouse nagasei soh tengle," 
2Samuel11:20 Lengpa alunghana, nahenga, Ipidinga kisatpi dinga khopi chu nachuti nailut jengu ham? Banga kona nahin kap dingu chu nanghon nahetlouvu ham?" 
2Samuel11:21 Jerubesheth chapa Abimelech chu koiham athatna? Banga kona numei khatnin sumheisong halkhat aselhah khumleh ama chu Thebez mun'a thia hilouham? Ipi dinga nangho bang naija nacheu ham? tia asei tengle nangman, Nasoh Hit mi Uriah jong athitai, tia nasei ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel11:22 Chuin thupolepa chu achen, Joab'in asol lona jouse chu David henga aseitan ahi." 
2Samuel11:23 Chuin thupolepa chun David henga, Tahbeh-in miho chun keiho eihinjou jouvin, chule loujaova keiho lah-a lama ahungpotnun, keihon amaho chu kotpi phung lutna geijin kanung delun ahi." 
2Samuel11:24 Chuin thalkap hon kulbanga konin nasohte lah ahin kapmun ahile lengpa soh phabep khat athitan, chule nasoh Hit mi Uriah jong chu athitan ahi, ati." 
2Samuel11:25 Chujouvin David'in thupolepa henga, Nangman Joab henga, Hicheho hin nangma nalungkham sah dahen, ajehchu chemjamin mikhat ahiloule adangkhat athateiji mong ahi: khopi douna-a chun nagalsat hatsah cheh inlang, khopi chu suse-in, tia naseija amachu natilkhou ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel11:26 Chuin Uriah jinun ajipa Uriah athitai ti ajah phatnin, ajipa pul adoutan ahi." 
2Samuel11:27 Chuin alunghemna akichai phatnin, David'in amanu chu a-in'a agapuilut sah-in, chule amanu chu a-inneipi ahung hitan, chuin ama dingin chapa khat ahinpeh-in ahi. Ahin David thilbol chun Pakai alung lhaisah tapon ahi." 
2Samuel12:1 Chuin Pakaiyin David henga Nathan asolin, chuin ama ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Khopi khatna hin mini aumin, khatchu ahaovin, khatjohpa chu avaichan ahi." 
2Samuel12:2 Mihaopa chun kelngoi honle ganchahon tamtah aneijin: 
2Samuel12:3 Ahinla mivaichapan akichoh-a avah kelngoinou anu khat tilouvin imacha aneipon ahi. Chule hiche kelngoinou amale achate toh thakhatna hungkhang len ahin, chule ama an ngei chu aneh-a, akhontah-a twi adona, ama angsunga lumma, chule amadinga chanu khat tobang hija ahi." 
2Samuel12:4 Chuin mihaopa koma chun kholjin vahlekhat ahungin, chuin aman akelngoi honho lah-a khatjeng chajong chu hiche kholjin ahung lhungpa thapeh dingchun aphalpon; ahin mivaichapa kelngoi chu alan, chuin aman ahenga hung mipa ding chun athapehtan ahi, ati." 
2Samuel12:5 Hiche mipa chunga chun David lunghana chu akoujah jengin, chuin aman Nathan henga, Hingjing Pakai mina kasei ahi, hitobang thil bolla michu thiteiding ahi:" 
2Samuel12:6 Chule hitobang abola, khotona anei loujeh-a, kelngoi chu ajatlia aleding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel12:7 Chuin Natha'in David henga, Hiche mipa chu nangma nahi. Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Keiman nangmahi Israel chunga leng dinga thao kanua, chule Saul khutna kona kahuh doh-a;" 
2Samuel12:8 Chule napakai pa insungle ajiteho chu nangma kapeh-a, chule Israel le Judah insung jong nangma kapeh nahin; ahin hiche chu lhombehseh ahia ahile, keiman nangma adang dang jong kapehbe nalai ding ahi." 
2Samuel12:9 Ipidinga nangman amitmua thilphalou bolna dinga Pakai thupeh chu nahsah louva nabol ham? Nangman Hit mi Uriah chu chemjamin nathatnin, a-inneipi chu naji dingin nakipuijin, chule ama Ammon chate chemjamin nathatnin ahi." 
2Samuel12:10 Hijeh chun tu-a hi na-insunga kona chemjam kiladoh louding ahi; ajehchu nangman nahsahmon neibolin, Hit mipa Uriah inneipi chu najidingin nakipuijin ahi." 
2Samuel12:11 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Vetan, Keiman nangma douna-a na-insunga thilphalou khat kasodohsah ding, chule najiteho chu namitmu-a kalahpeh-a, amaho chu na-inhengho kapeh ding, chule aman najiteho chu sunchang noija aluppi dingu ahi." 
2Samuel12:12 Ajehchu nangman hichehi guhthima nabol ahin; ahinla keiman hichehi Israel jouse masangle sunchang noija kabol ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel12:13 Chuin David'in Nathan henga, Keima Pakai dounan kachonse tai, ati. Chuin Nathan'in David henga, Pakaiyin jong nachonsetna aladohtai, nangma nathi louding ahi." 
2Samuel12:14 Hijeng jongle hiche nathilbola konahi Pakai melmaten Pathen ataitomna ding uva phat gomkom napeh ahi jeh-in, nangma-a dinga penga nachapa chu thitei ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel12:15 Chuin Nathan chu a-in'a dingin akipatdoh tan ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin Uriah inneipin David ahinpeh chapang chu adengin ahile, hanatnin anatan ahi." 
2Samuel12:16 Chuin David chapang dingchun Pakai henga ataovin; chule David'in an angolin, chuin insunga alutnin, jankhovah-in tolla alumin ahi." 
2Samuel12:17 Chuin a-insung upaho akipat doh-un, tolla kona ama gathoudoh dingin ahenga acheuvin ahi: ahinla ama thodoh ding anompon, chule amahotoh anjong anepon ahi." 
2Samuel12:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, nisagi lhinin chapang chu athitan ahi. Chule David sohte chun naosen athitai tia ama seipeh ding chu akichalheh jengun ahi. Ajehchu amahon, Veuvin, chapang chu ahin laija bon ahenga thu iseijuva ahile, aman ithuseiju anangai lou ahin: chapang chu athi tin seipeh leuhen, khohjo cheh louding ham? atiu ahi." 
2Samuel12:19 Ahin David'in asohho kihou lhih chu amu phatnin, David'in naosen chu athi ahi ahetai. Hijeh chun David'in asohte henga, Chapang chu athi hitam? ati. Chuin amahon, Ama athitai, atiuve." 
2Samuel12:20 Hichun David tolla konin athoudoh in, akisilin, thao akinun, chuin avon akikhelin, Pakai in'a ahung lutnin, Pathen ahou tan ahi. Chuin a-in lama ahung kilen; chuin aman angaichat phatnin amahon a-angsunga an aluipeh-un ahile aman anetai." 
2Samuel12:21 Chujouvin asohten ahenga, Ipibola hitia hi chona nahim? chapang chu ahinlaisen ama dingin an nangolin nakapmin, ahin chapang chu athi phatnin nathou doh-in an nanen ahi, atiuve." 
2Samuel12:22 Chuin aman, Chapang chu ahinlaijin keiman an kangol-in, kakapmin ahi: ajehchu keiman, Pathen'in eilungsetna chapang chu hunghing maithei ahi kon ija aseithei dingham? kati ahi." 
2Samuel12:23 Ahinla tun ama athitai, ipidinga keiman an kangol dingham? Keiman ama kapuikit theiham? Keima amakoma kache ding ahin; ahinla ama keikoma hung kilethei louding ahitai, ati." 
2Samuel12:24 Chuin David'in a-inneipi Bathsheba chu alhamonin, chule amanu koma chun achen, aluppin ahi: chuin amanun chapa khat ahingin, amapan amin Solomon asahtai: chule Pakaiyin amachu angailun ahi." 
2Samuel12:25 Chuin aman Nathan themgaopa khutna thu athotnin ahile; aman Pakai jal-in aminchu Jedidiah asahtan ahi. 
2Samuel12:26 Chuin Joab'in Rabbah-a Ammon chate dounan gal asatnin, chuin leng khopi chu alatan ahi." 
2Samuel12:27 Chuin Joab'in thupole ho chu David henga asolin, ahenga, Keiman Rabbah kasatnin, chule twipi khopiho chu kalatai." 
2Samuel12:28 Hijeh chun tun mipi adang sese chu khom khomin, chule khopi douna ding chun gebuh kisonun lang, hichu laovin; achutiloule akhopi chu kalah-a kamin kalosah ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel12:29 Chuin David'in mipi jouse akhom khomin, Rabbah-a achetauve, chule agasatnun, hichu alataovin ahi." 
2Samuel12:30 Chuin aman alengpao lallukhuh chu aluchanga konin aladoh-in, hiche agih dan songmantam toh kihal sana talent khat ahin; chuin hichu David luchanga akhuh peh-un ahi. Chuin aman khopi-a thil kichomdoh tamtah ahinpon ahi." 
2Samuel12:31 Chuin aman chua um mipi ho chu ahinpui doh-in, chule amaho chu thing-at, thih loukai le thih heicha semin apansah-in, chule cheh dengin apansah-in: hitichun aman Ammon miho khopi jouse-a chun abolin ahi. Chuin David le mipi ho chu Jerusalem'a ahungkile taovin ahi." 
2Samuel13:1 Chuin hicheho jouse nunghin ahitin ahi, David chapa Absalom chun Tamar kiti sopi nungah hoitah khat aneijin, chule David chapa Amnon chun amanu chu adeicha lheh jengin ahi." 
2Samuel13:2 Chule Amnon chu anaonu Tamar jehchun agenthei lheh jengin anatlo tan ahi; ajehchu amanu nungah thengsel ahin; chule Amnon'in amanu chunga thilkhat abolding chu amadingin hahsa asalheh jengin ahi. 
2Samuel13:3 Ahin Amnon'in David sopipa Shimeah chapa Jonadab kiti gol khat aneijin: Jonadab hi mi lungthim themtah khat ahi. 
2Samuel13:4 Chuin aman ajah-a, Nangma lengpa chapa hija ipidinga ani ania nagon cheh cheh ham? neiseipeh louding ham? ati. Chuin Amnon'in, ajah-a, Keiman kasopipa Absalom naonu Tamar kadeichai, ati." 
2Samuel13:5 Chuin Jonadab'in ajah-a, Najalkhuna luminlang kinatsah-in: chule napa nave-a ahung tengle, ajah-a, Nahenga katao ahi, kasopinu Tamar chu hunghen lang nehding eihung pehen, chule amanu khutna kona kaneh theina dingin kamitmu in nehding eihung sempeh hen, tin seijin, ati." 
2Samuel13:6 Hitichun Amnon alumin, chule akinat sahtan ahi. Chuin lengpa avedinga ahung phatnin, Amnon'in lengpa henga, Nahenga katao ahi, kasopinu Tamar chu hung henlang, akhutna kona kaneh theina dingin kamitmu-a changlhah phengni eihung sempeh hen, ati." 
2Samuel13:7 Hichun David'in in'a Tamar henga mi asolin, ajah-a, Nangma tun na-upa Amnon in'a chenlang, anehding an gagotpeh in, ati." 
2Samuel13:8 Hitichun Tamar chu asopipa Amnon in'a achen ahile, ama analumin ahi. Chuin amanun changbong alan, ameh-in, amitmun changlhah phabep asemin, chuin changlhah chu akangin ahi." 
2Samuel13:9 Chuin aman khangbel khat alan, chule hicheho chu a-angsunga asunglhan; ahinla ama nehding anompon ahi. Chuin Amnon'in, Pasal jouse kakoma konin soldoh-in, ati. Chuin amaho amitakip ama koma konin achedoh taovin ahi." 
2Samuel13:10 Chuin Amnon'in Tamar henga, Nakhutna kona kaneh thei nadingin, nehding chu indan sunga hinchoi lutnin, ati. Chuin Tamar'in achanglhah semho chu alan, hicheho chu indan sunga a-upa Amnon henga ahinchoitan ahi." 
2Samuel13:11 Amanun hicheho chu ama nehdinga ahinchoi phatnin, aman amanu chu amanin, ahenga, Kanaonu, hungin neiluppin, ati." 
2Samuel13:12 Chuin amanun adonbutnin, Ahipoi, he-o, pumhatnin neibol hih-in; ajehchu hitobang thil hi Israelte lah-a akibol ngaipoi: hiche ngol hoitah thil hi bolhih-in." 
2Samuel13:13 Chule keiman kajumna hi hoija kachepi ding ham? chule nangma jong Israel sunga mingol khat banga naum ding ahi. Hijeh chun tun, nahenga katao ahi, lengpa henga seijin, ajehchu aman nangma dingin ei-it louding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel13:14 Ahivangin aman amanu thusei chu angaipeh pon: amanu sanga hatjoh ahijeh-in, pumhatnin abolin, amanu aluppitan ahi." 
2Samuel13:15 Hiche jouchun Amnon'in amanu chu hahotnin ahotan, hitichun aman amanu ahotna chu angailutna sangin alenjotan ahi. Chuin Amnon'in amanu jah-a, Thoudoh inlang chemangtan, ati." 
2Samuel13:16 Chuin amanun ajah-a, Hichehi angai ahipoi: hitia dihlou tah-a neisol mang hi kachunga nathilbol khatjo sanga chu phaloujo ahi, ati. Ahinla aman amanu thusei chu angaipeh pon ahi." 
2Samuel13:17 Hichun aman ama jenlea pang asohpa chu akouvin, ajah uva, Hiche numei nuhi kakoma konin kaidoh inlang, amanu nunga kot kamun, ati." 
2Samuel13:18 Chule amanu chun sangkhol jatchom choma pol khat aki-ah ahi: ajehchu hitobang sangkhol chu leng chanu nungahthengho von ahi. Chujouvin asohpa chun amanu chu ahinpui doh-in, amanu nunga kotchu akamtan ahi." 
2Samuel13:19 Chuin Tamar'in aluchunga vut akinun, chule amanun asangkhol jatchom choma polchu abotkeh-in, alujanga akhut akoijin, kap pumin achemang tan ahi." 
2Samuel13:20 Chuin asopipa Absalom'in amanu jah-a, Nasopipa Amnon chun naum khompi ham? Ahinla tun, kasopinu lung mongin umin: ama nasopipa ahi; hiche thilhi lungnat nan neihih-in, ati. Hitichun Tamar chu asopipa Absalom in'a chun thomhao tah-in aumtan ahi." 
2Samuel13:21 Ahinla David lengpan hicheho jousehi ajah phatnin, ama alunghang lheh jengin ahi." 
2Samuel13:22 Chule Absalom'in asopipa Amnon henga ase jong apha jong imacha aseipon ahi. Ahin Amon'in asopinu Tamar pumhatna abol jeh chun, Absalom'in Amnon chu ahon ahi." 
2Samuel13:23 Chuin kumni lhingset jouvin ahitin ahi, Absalom'in Ephraim koma um Baal-hazor mun'a kelngoimul avouvin: chule Absalom'in lengchapaho jouse chu akouvin ahi." 
2Samuel13:24 Chuin Absalom chu lengpa henga ahungin, Tun vetemin, nasoh hin kelngoimul kavo ding ahin; katao ahi, lengpa hu nasoh hito lhonin cheohite, ati." 
2Samuel13:25 Chuin lengpan Absalom henga, Ahipoi, kachapa, tun eiho ibonun chepou hite, achuti loule nanga dingin pohgih hikhao vinge, ati. Chuin aman amachu angeh kitnin, ahivangin ama cheding anompon, phatthei aboh jotan ahi." 
2Samuel13:26 Hichun Absalom'in, Chuti ahilou dingle, nahenga katao ahi, kasopipa Amnon hi keihotoh lhonkhom hen, ati. Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Ipidinga amachu nangma toh lhonkhom dingham? ati." 
2Samuel13:27 Ahinla Absalom'in angeh teiteijin ahile, aman Amnon le lengpa chapateho jouse chu amatoh alhonkhom sahtan ahi." 
2Samuel13:28 Tun Absalom'in asohho chu thu apeh-a, hitia asei ahi, Amnon lungthim chu ju-a akipasah tengleh nanghon melchih-un, chule keiman naheng uva, Amnon chu thatnun; kati tengle, amachu thatnun, kicha hih-un: keiman nangho kathupeh nahiu hilouham? hangsanun lang hatnun, ati." 
2Samuel13:29 Chuin Absalom soh ho chun Absalom'in athupeh bangu chun Amnon chunga abol taovin ahi. Chuphatnin lengpa chapateho jouse akipat doh-un, amitakip asangan chunga atoudoh-un, ajam taovin ahi." 
2Samuel13:30 Chuin ahitin ahi, amaho lampia achepetnun, Absalom'in lengpa chapate jouse athat gamin, amaho khatcha jong ahingdoh aumpoi, tithu David heng ahung lhungtan ahi." 
2Samuel13:31 Hichun lengpa akipat doh-in, aponsil abotkeh-in, tolla alumin; chule asohte jousenjong aponsilu abotkeh-un akoma adingun ahi." 
2Samuel13:32 Chuin David sopipa Shimeah chapa Jonadab'in adonbutnin, Ka pakai amahon lengpa chapate khangthah jouse atha sohkeijin ngaito hih-in, ajehchu Amnon sehseh bou athin ahi. Ajehchu aman asopinu Tamar pumhatna anabol ni-a patna, Absalom thupeh dungjuija hichehi hung kigong pana ahitai." 
2Samuel13:33 Hijeh chun tun ka pakai lengpan lengchapate jouse thia ahi tin nalungin ngaito hih-in: ajehchu Amnon sehseh bou thi ahi, ati." 
2Samuel13:34 Hichun Absalom ajamtan ahi. Chuin gollhang khongah-a pangpa chu akhoda-a, avetna ahile, veuvin, anunglam molpang lampia chu mitamtah ahung amun ahi." 
2Samuel13:35 Chuin Jonadab'in lengpa henga, Ven, Lengpa chapate ahunguve: nasoh-in asei bangbang chu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel13:36 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman thu asei joujou chun, veuvin, lengpa chapate ahung lhungun, chuin awsang tah-in akapmun ahi: chule lengpa le asohte jong hakan akap taovin ahi." 
2Samuel13:37 Ahinla Absalom chu ajam mangin, Geshur lengpa Ammihud chapa Talmai henga achetan ahi. Chuin David chu achapa jeh-in niseh-in alunghemin ahi." 
2Samuel13:38 Hitichun Absalom ajamin, Geshur'a achen, chua chun kumthum aumin ahi." 
2Samuel13:39 Chule David lengpa hinna chu Absalom henga achenom lheh jengin ahi. Ajehchu ama Amnon thi chung changa ana lungmonga ahitai. 
2Samuel14:1 Tun Zeruiah chapa Joab'in lengpa lungthim chu Absalom heng lama aume ti ahetan ahi. 
2Samuel14:2 Chuin Joab'in Tekoah'a mi asolin, chuche-a um numei chingtah khat agapuisah-in, amanu henga chun, Nahenga katao ahi, alunghem khat bangin uminlang lunghemna von kivonin, chule thao jong kinu hih-in, ahin phatsottah thi-op numei khat bangin umin." 
2Samuel14:3 Chutengle lengpa henga hungin lang, ahenga hitobanghin seijin, ati. Hitichun Joab'in amanu kamsunga aseiding thuho chu akoipehtan ahi." 
2Samuel14:4 Chuin Tekoah numei nun lengpa henga thu aseichun, amai tolla asulutnin, jana apen, lengpa henga, Vo lengpa, neikithopin, ati." 
2Samuel14:5 Chuin lengpan amanu jah-a, Ipin nasuh genthei ham? ati. Chuin amanun adonbutnin, Tahbeh-in keima meithai kahin, ka-inneipu chu thia ahitai." 
2Samuel14:6 Chule nasohnu hin chapa ni aneijin, chuin amani gamlah-a akidel lhonin, koimacha aphel khending aumpon, khatpan khatjopa chu avon, athattan ahi." 
2Samuel14:7 Chule, ven, insung pumpihi nasohnu doudin akipatdoh taovin, chule amahon, Asopipa thatpa chu asopipa athajeh-a katha theina diuvin neipedoh un; chule agou lodingpa jongchu kasuh mangdiu ahi, atiuve. Chule chutia chu akidalha-a kamei-am chu asuhmitnuva, kapasal chu min neilou le, leichunga chilhah himhim neilouva akoi dingu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel14:8 Chuin lengpan numeinu jah-a, Na-in lama chetan, keiman nangma chung chang thu hinhetsah nange, ati." 
2Samuel14:9 Chuin Tekoah numeinu chun lengpa henga, Ka pakai, O lengpa, hiche khangitlouna chu keimale kapa insunga chuhen: chule lengpa le alaltouna vang themonabei hihen, ati." 
2Samuel14:10 Chuin lengpan aseijin, koi hijongle nahenga ikhat seija aumle, amachu kahenga hinpuijin, chule aman avela natohkhah kit louding ahitai, ati." 
2Samuel14:11 Hichun amanun, Nahenga katao ahi, lengpan Pakai na Pathen hejingin lang, thisan phulapan asuhmangbe louna dingin phalna pehih-in; achuti loule kachapa sumang getnunte, ati. Chuin aman, Hingjing Pakai mina kasei ahi, nachapa samjang khatcha jong tolla lhalou ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel14:12 Hitichun amanun, Ka pakai ka-lengpa jah-a nasoh in thukhat seijinge, ati. Chuin aman, Seijin, ati." 
2Samuel14:13 Chuin numeinu chun, Chuti ahile ipidinga nangman Pathen mite douna hitobang thil chu nagelham? ajehchu lengpan anomangpa chu in'a apuilut kitloujeh-a, lengpan hichehi themona nei khat thusei banga nasei ahi." 
2Samuel14:14 Ajehchu eiho ithi teitei dingu ahin, tolla twi kisunglha kithaldoh kit theilou tobang ihi dingu ahi. Ahijeng vangin Pathen'in hinkho alamang pon; amavang aman anodoh hochu ama-a kona akipaimang lou nadingun lampi asemin ahi." 
2Samuel14:15 Hijeh-a chu, tu-a mipihon eikichatsah jeh uva, keima hiche seidinga hi ka pakai lengpa henga hunga kahi. Chule nasohnu hin, Ijemtia lengpan asohnu taona hi asanpeh khatle, tun lengpa koma thu gaseijinge." 
2Samuel14:16 Ajehchu lengpan eingaipeh intin, asohnu hi Pathen gouloa kona keima le kachapa suhmang dingpa khutna konin eilhatdoh inte, kati ahi." 
2Samuel14:17 Chule nasohnun, Tu-a hi ka pakai lengpa thusei chu lhamona hiding ahi: ajehchu ka pakai leng hi aphale ase sepkhen na-a Pathen vantil tobang hija ahi. Hijeh chun na Pakai na Pathen'in naumpi hen, ati." 
2Samuel14:18 Chuphatnin lengpan numeinu chu adonbutnin; Nahenga katao ahi, keiman nangma kadoh dingho hi im hih-in, ati. Chuin amanun, Tun ka pakai lengpan seijin, ati." 
2Samuel14:19 Chuin lengpan, Hicheng jousehi Joab to kikhut jopna naneijam? ati. Chuin numei nun adonbutnin, Ka pakai lengpa hinna pana kasei ahi, ka pakai lengpan nathuseidoh hohi koimachan jetlam ahiloule veilama aheikon theilou ahi. Ajehchu nasoh Joab'in eisola, hiche thuho jousehi nasohnu kama akoi ahi." 
2Samuel14:20 Kivaihom danho akikhel nadinga nasoh Joab'in hichehi abol ahi; Pakai vantil chihna bangin, leiset thil umjouse hetna dingin, ka pakai hi achingin ahi, ati." 
2Samuel14:21 Chuin lengpan Joab henga, Ven, tun hichehi kaboltan ahi: hijeh chun chenlang, gollhang Absalom chu gapuijin, ati." 
2Samuel14:22 Chuin Joab aboh khupmin, tolla amai asulutnin, lengpa henga kipathu aseije: chule Joab'in, Tuni hin ka pakai vo lengpa, lengpan asohpa ngaichat asuh bulhitna konhin, nasoh keima namitmun lungsetna kachange ti kahetan ahi, ati." 
2Samuel14:23 Hitichun Joab akipatdoh-in, Geshur'a achen, Absalom chu Jerusalem'a ahin puitan ahi." 
2Samuel14:24 Chuin lengpan, A-in lama kihei henglang, kamai muda hen, ati. Hitichun Absalom chu a-in lama akile heijin, lengpa mai chu amutapon ahi." 
2Samuel14:25 Ahinla Israelte lah-a chun Absalom banga amel hoina pachat ding koimacha aumtapon ahi. Akengtoa pat aluchanga lallukhuh geijin ama achun nolna aumpon ahi. 
2Samuel14:26 Chule aman asam avolhah tengle (ajehchu kumlhun sehle avolhahji ahi: ajehchu achunga asam chu agihjin, hijeh-a chu avolhahji ahi:) asam chu atejin, lengpa thiltena dungjuijin shekel jani aphajin ahi." 
2Samuel14:27 Chule Absalom'a dingin chapa thumle, chanu khat apengin, achanu min chu Tamar ahi. Amanu chu numei melhoi tah ahi." 
2Samuel14:28 Hitichun Absalom chu kumni lhingset Jerusalam'a achengin, ahinla lengpa mai amupon ahi." 
2Samuel14:29 Hijeh chun Absalom'in lengpa henga soldingin Joab agakou sah-in; ahinla ama amahenga ahungpon ahi. Chuin aman aniveinan akouding asolkitnin, ahung dehpon ahi." 
2Samuel14:30 Hijeh chun aman asohte henga, Veuvin, Joab lou khu kei lou komcha-a um ahin, chule aman hilaija chun sakol chang aneijin ahi; cheovinlang meija gahalun, ati. Chuin Absalom sohte chun louchu meijin ahaltaovin ahi." 
2Samuel14:31 Chuin Joab akipatdoh-in, Absalom henga a-in'a chun ahungin, ajah-a, Ipidinga nasohten kalou chu meija ahalu ham? ati." 
2Samuel14:32 Chuin Absalom'in Joab chu adonbutnin, Ven, lengpa henga, Ipidinga keima Geshur'a kona hunga kahim? tuchan hin chukoma umleng keija dinga phajo ahi: tia seidinga kasol theina dinga hikoma hungin tia nangma kou dinga mi kahinsol ahi; hijeh chun tun lengpa maicha neimusah-un, chule kachunga khangit louna auma ahile, aman eithat jenghen, ati." 
2Samuel14:33 Hijeh chun Joab lengpa henga ahungin, ahenga aseitai. Chuin aman Absalom akou phatnin, ama lengpa henga ahungin, lengpa angsunga tolla aboh khupmin: chuin lengpan Absalom chu achoptan ahi." 
2Samuel15:1 Chuin hiche jouchun ahitin ahi, Absalom'in ama dingin sakol kangtalai ho le sakol ho, chule amasanga lhaiding mi somnga akigot tan ahi." 
2Samuel15:2 Chule Absalom matah-in athoudoh jin, kotpi phungkom lampia chun anadingjin ahi: chule ahitin ahi, mi khattouvin boina aneija, lengpa henga athu tansah dinga ahung teng, Absalom'in ama chu aheng lama akoulutjin, chule ahenga chun, Hoikom khopi-a kon nahim? atijin, chule amachun, Nasohhi Israel phungho lah-a hiche phung chu kahi, atijin ahi." 
2Samuel15:3 Chuteng Absalom'in ajah-a chun, Ven, nathuho hi aphan adih-e; ahinla nathu ngailha dinga mopohna apeh koima aumpoi, atijin ahi." 
2Samuel15:4 Hicheng tilou jongchun Absalom'in, Kaden keima gamsunga thutan dinga eikisem hitavele, chutile kiheh nading ahiloule boina neijouse kahenga hunguntin, chuteng keiman amaho them anachan ji tadinga! tin aseibejin ahi." 
2Samuel15:5 Chule ahitijin ahi, mi khattou chibai boh dinga akom anai tengleh, aman akhut alhangdoh jin, amapa chu atuh-in, achopjin ahi." 
2Samuel15:6 Hitobanghin Absalom'in lengpa henga athu tansah dinga hunga Israelte jouse chu anabolsoh keijin ahi. Hitichun Absalom'in Israel miho lungthim chu agumang sohtan ahi. 
2Samuel15:7 Chuin kum somli jouvin ahitin ahi, Absalom'in lengpa henga, Nahenga katao ahi, Pakai henga kitepnaho gasubulhit dingin Hebron'a neisolin." 
2Samuel15:8 Ajehchu Syria gam Geshur'a kana umlaijin nasohhin kitepna khat kana neijin, Pakaiyin Jerusalem'a eipuilut kitna ahile, Pakai kajen ding ahi, tia kanasei ahi, ati." 
2Samuel15:9 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Lung mongin chen, ati. Hitichun ama akipatdoh-in, Hebron'a achetai." 
2Samuel15:10 Ahinla Absalom'in Israel phungho jouse lah-a guhthimin mi asolin, ajah uva, Nanghon sumkon gin najah jah tengule, Absalom'in Hebron'a vai ahomtai, nati dingu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel15:11 Chuin Jerusalem'a kona kikoudoh mi jani chu Absalom toh alhonun; amaho imacha gellouva cheu ahin, imacha ahet louvu ahi." 
2Samuel15:12 Chuin Absalom'in David dinga thumopma pang Gilon mi Ahithophel chu ama khopi Gilon'a ganlhaina thilto abol laitah-in agakou sah-in ahi. Chule galguh chu ahatlheh jengin ahi; ajehchu Absalom dingin mi atamcheh cheh jengtan ahi. 
2Samuel15:13 Chuin David henga thupole khat ahungin, Israelte jouse lungthim chu Absalom lamma akaitaove, ati." 
2Samuel15:14 Chuin Davidn'in Jerusalem'a amato umkhom asohte jouse henga, Kipatdoh-un, jamtaohite; ajehchu eiho Absalom'a kona ihoidoh loudiu ahi. Potdoh dingin mangang un, achutiloule aman hetman louvin eihin delkhum diu, chule eiho chunga thilphalou ahin lhutna, khopi hi chemjam'a asat ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel15:15 Chuin lengpa soh ho chun lengpa henga, Ven, nasohte hi ipihile ka pakai lengpan boldinga eithupeh chanu boldinga kigosa dema um kahiuve, atiuve." 
2Samuel15:16 Chuin lengpa apotdoh-in, chule a-insung miho jouse chun anung ajuijun ahi. Chuin lengpan inngah dingin athaikem numei som adalhan ahi." 
2Samuel15:17 Chule lengpa apotdoh-in, mipi jousen anung ajuijun, mun gamlatah khatna aumtaovin ahi." 
2Samuel15:18 Chuin asohho jouse chu amato akilhonun, chule Gath'a kona anung hinjui Cherth mite, Palet mite, chule Git mite mi jagup chu lengpa masanga acheuvin ahi." 
2Samuel15:19 Chuin lengpan Gitmi Ittai jah-a, Ipidinga nangjong keihohitoh nalhon ham? Naumna lama kile kitnin lang, lengpa toh gaum khomin. Ajehchu nangma gamchommi nahin, chule nagam sunga kona kinodoh jong nahi." 
2Samuel15:20 Chule nangma janhi vela bou hung nahin, tunia keima kachena thei thei na-a che ding kahin, iti nangma keiho toh lhonna kachesuh kachetou sah ding ham? nangma kilekittan, chule nasopi ho hi kipuijin: hepina le thutah-in naumpi jinghen, ati." 
2Samuel15:21 Chuin Ittai'in lengpa adonbutnin, ajah-a, Hingjing Pakai min le ka pakai lengpa min pana kasei ahi, thonlouva hoikom mun hijongle ka pakai lengpa umna-a chu thina hihen, hinna hile, hichelai mun ngeija chu nasoh hi kaumding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel15:22 Chuin David'in Ittai jah-a, Chenlang galkaitan, ati. Chuin Git mi Ittai chu amite jousele aumkhompi chapang neoho jouse chutoh agalkai taovin ahi." 
2Samuel15:23 Chuin gam pumpi chu awsang tah-in akapmun, chule mipihochu agalkai taovin ahi. Chule lengpa amatah jong Kedron vachadung chu agalkaijin, chuin miho jouse chu gamthip jotna lampi langa chun agalkai taovin ahi." 
2Samuel15:24 Chule veuvin, Zadok le ama koma um Levi hon jong Pathen kitepna thingkhong apouvin ahi. Chuin amahon Pathen kitepna thingkhong chu angaovin; chule mipi ho jouse khopi-a kona apotdoh kahseuvin Abiathar chu achetouvin ahi." 
2Samuel15:25 Chuin lengpan Zadok hengah, Pathen thingkhong chu khopi-a nungpoh kitnin: ijemtia Pakai mitmu-a lungsetna kachana ahile, aman eihin lepui kitna, anai-a hiche hile aumna mun chu eimusah kitding ahi." 
2Samuel15:26 Ahinla aman, Nachunga lunglhaina kaneipoi atia ahile; ven, hikoma kaume, aman kachunga pha asah bangbang chun bolhen, ati." 
2Samuel15:27 Chuin lengpan Zadok thempupa henga, Nangma mitvah nei nahi louham? Nangma to umkhom nachapateni, nachapa Ahimaaz le Abiathar chapa Jonathan toh lung mongin khopi sunga kiletaovin." 
2Samuel15:28 Ven nangma-a kona thu ahung kahse-a keiman gamthip phaichama kaum ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel15:29 Hijeh chun Zadok le Abiathar chun Pathen thingkhong chu Jerusalem'a apokit lhonnin; chule hikoma chun amani aum lhontan ahi. 
2Samuel15:30 Chuin David chu olive molsang kaltouna-a chun achetouvin, chule akap pum pumin achetouvin, alu akhu khumin, akeng keuvin lam ajotnin ahi: chule akoma um mipi jouse amitakipmin alu akhu khumun, kap pumin achetouvun ahi." 
2Samuel15:31 Chuin mikhatnin David jah-a, Ahithophel chu Absalom galguh bolho lah-a ajaove, tin aseipeh-in ahi. Chuin David'in, Vo Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, Ahithophel thumopna chu ngolnan heidoh peh-in, ati." 
2Samuel15:32 Chuin ahitin ahi, David a-Pathen houna mun molchung ahunglhun phatnin, veuvin, Arch mi Hushai chu sangkhol chol kibotkeh le aluchanga leiset nat pumin ama kimupi ding chun ahungin ahi." 
2Samuel15:33 David'in ama henga, Nangma keima toh lhon lehen, keima dinga pohgih nahi ding ahi:" 
2Samuel15:34 Ahinla nangma khopi-a nakile-a, Absalom henga, Vo lengpa, keima nasoh hinge; hichan geija napa soh-a kana um bangin, tunjong nangma soh hingkate, tia nagaseija ahile: nangman keima dingin Ahithophel thumop chu neijopeh ding ahi." 
2Samuel15:35 Chule nangman nangma to pangkhom dinga Zadok le Abiathar thempu teni nanei hilouham? Hijeh-a chu hitiding ahi, Ipi hile nangman lengpa in'a kona najah chanchu, Zadok le Abiathar thempupa naseipeh ding ahi." 
2Samuel15:36 Ven, hikoma chun amani chutoh achapateniu Zadok chapa Ahimaaz le Abiathar chapa Jonathan aumlhone; chule nangman najah takip chu amani-a kona kakoma nahin thotding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel15:37 Hitichun David lengpa golpa Hushai chu khopi sunga ahungin, chule Absalom chu Jerusalem'a ahunglut tan ahi." 
2Samuel16:1 Chuin David'in molsang chungvum phabep akhel nungin, veuvin, Mephibosheth sohpa Ziba'in sangan ni apho pumle achunga chanlhah pheng jani, lengpithei gop boh jakhat, chule nipilai theiga jat jakhat, chule ju haikhat toh ana kimupin ahi." 
2Samuel16:2 Chuin lengpan Ziba jah-a, Hiche nabolhi ipi vetsahna ham? ati. Chuin Ziba'n, Sanganho hi lengpa insung mite touna ding ahin, chule changlhah leh nipilai theigahohi gollhangho nehding ahin, chule juhi gamthipma lhasamho donding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel16:3 Chuin lengpan, Chuti ahile, napakai pa chapa lah-em? ati. Chuin Ziba'n lengpa henga, Ven, ama Jerusalem'a aume: ijeh inem itile aman, Tunia Israel insungin kapa lenggam eilosah dingu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel16:4 Hiche phatchun lengpan Ziba henga, Ven, Mephibosheth nei jouse chu nangma-a ahitai, ati. Chuin Ziba'n, namitmu-a lungsetna kachan theina dinga, ka pakai, vo lengpa, nahenga katao ahi, ati." 
2Samuel16:5 Chuin David lengpa Bahurima ahung phatnin, veuvin, chua konchun Gera chapa Shimei kiti Saul insungmi khat ahungdoh-in ahi. Ama ahung potdoh-in, alamjot toh gaosap ahin koppeh-in ahi." 
2Samuel16:6 Chuin aman David le, David lengpa sohte jouse chu songin ahin sepmin: chule miho jousele mihat ho jouse jet le veija aumun ahi." 
2Samuel16:7 Chule Shimei'in agaosap laijin hitin aseijin ahi, Hung doh-in, hung doh-in, nangma thisan sopa le Belial mipa:" 
2Samuel16:8 Akhela navaihom, Saul le a-insung pumpi thisan chu Pakaiyin nachunga ahinle lhunsah ahin; chule Pakaiyin lenggam chu nachapa Absalom khutna apehdoh ahitai: chule ven, nangma thisanso hat nahi jeh-a, nathemmona chu nachunga chua ahitai, ati." 
2Samuel16:9 Chuphatnin Zeruiah chapa Abishai'in lengpa henga, Ipidinga hiche uicha thisa hin ka pakai lengpa hi agaosap ham? nahenga katao ahi, galkaijing ting, alu galange, ati." 
2Samuel16:10 Chuin lengpan, Nangho Zeruiah chapate, nangho le kei ikibahnao ipi umam? Eigaosap hen, ajehchu Pakaiyin ahenga, David khu gaosapmin, ati ahi. Chuti ahile, Ipidinga nangin hiti ahi nabol ham? tia aseidinga chu koiham? ati." 
2Samuel16:11 Chuin David'in Abishai le asohte jouse henga, veuvin, ka-oisunga kona hungdoh kachapa jengin kahinna lahdinga ahola ahile; tu-a hi hiche Benjamin miten ichan geija ahol dingu ham? Limsah hih-un, agaosap nom chanin gaosaphen; ajehchu Pakaiyin asol ahi." 
2Samuel16:12 Chuti henlang hile Pakaiyin kagen theina hinve intin, tunia aman eisapset nahi Pakaiyin aphalama eilethuhpeh ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel16:13 Chule David le amiho chu lampia ache laijun, Shimei chu molpanga chun ama dontah-a achen, achepum chun agaosapmin, chule songin asepmin leivui athekhumin ahi." 
2Samuel16:14 Chuin lengpa le aumkhompi mihochun alel taovin; hijeh chun amaho hia chun akicholdo taove. 
2Samuel16:15 Chuin Absalom le Israel mite jouse chu Jerusalem'a ahungun, chule ama Ahithophel toh ahi." 
2Samuel16:16 Chuin ahitin ahi, David golpa Arch mi Hushai chu Absalom henga ahung phatnin, Hushai'in Absalom henga, Pathen'in lengpa huhhing hen, Pathen'in lengpa huhhing hen, ati." 
2Samuel16:17 Chuin Absalom'in Hushai henga, Hichehi nagolpa nahepina ham? ipidinga nagolpatoh lhonlou nahim? ati." 
2Samuel16:18 Chuin Hushai'in Absalom henga, Ahipoi, Pakai le hiche mite, chule Israel mipi ho jousen alhen paova chu kahi ding, chule keima ama toh kaumding ahi." 
2Samuel16:19 Chujongle, keiman koi kajen dingham? Achapa chu kajen ding hilouham? Napa kajen banga chu nangma kajending ahi, ati." 
2Samuel16:20 Chuphat chun Absalom'in Ahithophel henga, Ipi kabol dinguham neithumop uvin, ati." 
2Samuel16:21 Chuin Ahithophel'in Absalom henga, Napan inngah dinga akoi athaikemho henga chun chen; chule Israel mipi ho jousen nangma napa-a dinga kidah umtah nahichu ajahdiu: chutengle nangma toh umho jouse khuttha chu hatdoh ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel16:22 Hitichun amahon Absalom dingin in chunga chun pon inkhat asongun, chuin Absalom chu Israel miho jouse mitmun apa thaikem ho henga aluttan ahi." 
2Samuel16:23 Chule Ahithophel thumop, hiche nikho laija Ahithophel anathumopho chu, mikhatnin Pathen athudop banga ana gelu ahi. David le Absalom dinga jong Ahithophel thumop ho jouse chu hitobang chu anahija ahi." 
2Samuel17:1 Hicheng tilou chun Ahithophel'in Absalom henga, Tun keima mi sangsom le sangni lhendoh ingting, tujan mama hin kipatdoh ingting, David ganungdel inge:" 
2Samuel17:2 Chule ama athachola akhuttha alhompet tahle achunga kachuh ding, kasuh kichat ding: chutengle aumpi miho jouse chu jam mang untin, keiman lengpa bouchu katha ding ahi." 
2Samuel17:3 Chule mipi jouse chu nahenga kahin lepuiding ahi. Nangman naholpa tailou adang jouse ahung kilekit teng, mijouse chu lung mong diu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel17:4 Chule akisei chun Absalom le Israel upaho jouse chu alunglhaisah lheh-in ahi. 
2Samuel17:5 Chujouvin Absalom'in, Tun Arch mipa Hushai jongchu kouvun, chule eihon ama thusei jongchu ngaiju hite, ati." 
2Samuel17:6 Chuin Hushai chu Absalom henga ahung phatchun, Absalom'in akihoupin, Ahithophel'in hitihin aseije: aman asei bangahi iboldiu ham? Ahilouva ahile, nangman hinseijin, ati." 
2Samuel17:7 Chuin Hushai'in Absalom henga, Ahithophel thumop hi tuphatna dingin aphapoi." 
2Samuel17:8 Hushai'in aseiben, Ajehchu nangman napale amiho chu gal hat ahiu, chule vompi gamlah-a anou kilahpeh banga alungsung uva lungsa ahiu nahen ahi; chule napahi galsat mi ahin, miho lah-a jong gehlou ding ahi." 
2Samuel17:9 Ven, amahi tu-a leiko khat sung, ahiloule munchom dang khatna kisel ding ahi: chule hung hitiding ahi, amaho lah-a themkhat ahung lhuh masah tengule, hiche jaho jouse chun, Absalom nungjui miho lah-a kitha chapna aumtai atidiu ahi." 
2Samuel17:10 Chutengle mihangsan tah, alungchang keipi lungchang tobang jong chu junlha ding ahi: ajehchu Israelte jousen napa chu mihat ahi ahetnu ahin, chule aumkhompi miho chu mihangsan jeng ahiuve." 
2Samuel17:11 Hijeh chun Dan'a pat Beersheba geija Israelte jouse luipikama neldi jat banga nahenga nakhop khoma, chule nangmatah chu gala nakon ding chu kathumop nahi." 
2Samuel17:12 Hiti achu eiho ama kimunathei ding mun'a chu ihungdiu, chule daitwi tolla alhah banga eiho ama chunga ichuh jeng dingu ahi. Chule amale aumpi miho jouse khatcha jong kidalha louding ahi." 
2Samuel17:13 Hicheng chungchona chu, ama khopi sung khat touva alutna ahile, Israelte jousen hiche khopi lama chu khao ahinchoidiu, chule khopi chu song halkhat cha akimulou kahse-a vadung sunga ikailut dingu ahi, ati." 
2Samuel17:14 Chuin Absalom le Israel mipi jouse chun, Arch mipa Hushai thumop hi Ahithophel thumop sangin aphajoi, atiuvin ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin Absalom chunga thilphalou ahinlhun sahna dinga, Pakaiyin Ahithophel thumop phaho jona dinga tohgon ananeisa ahitai." 
2Samuel17:15 Hichun Hushai'in Zadok le Abiathar thempupa henga, Hiti khati hin Ahithophel'in Absalom le Israel upaho athumopmin; hiti tihin keiman kathumop in ahi." 
2Samuel17:16 Hijeh chun tun gangtah-in solin lang, David henga, Tujan gamthip phaicham ho-a chun gehhihhen, ahinla mangang tah-in galkaijin; achutiloule lengpa le aumpi miho jouse chu val lhuma umkha diu ahi, tin gaseisah-in, ati." 
2Samuel17:17 Tun Jonathan le Ahimaaz chu khopisung ahunglut lhon akimulouna dingin Enrogel'a aumlhonin ahi: chuin soh numei khat achen amani agaseipeh-in; chuin amani ache lhonin David lengpa agaseipeh lhontan ahi. 
2Samuel17:18 Ahijeng vangin pasal chapang khatnin amaho chu anamun, Absalom chu aseipehtan ahi. Ahin amani mangang tah-in achemang lhonin, chuin Bahurim'a ahongsunga twikul neikhat in'a ahung lhonin; hia chun akumlha lhontan ahi." 
2Samuel17:19 Chuin numeinu chun twikul kamchu asingin, chuin achunga chun chang aphouvin ahile, hichu akihedoh pon ahi." 
2Samuel17:20 Chuin Absalom sohte numeinu in'a ahung phatnun, ahenga, Ahimaaz le Jonathan chu hoilama umham? atiuve. Chuin numei nun ajah uvah, Amani vachadung galkailhon tante, ati. Chuin amahon aholmo phatnun Jerusalem'a ahungkile taovin ahi." 
2Samuel17:21 Chuin ahitin ahi, amaho chedoh nungin, amani twikul'a konin ahungdoh lhonin, achelhonin David lengpa henga agaseipeh lhonin, ajah-a, Kipatdoh inlang mangang tah-in twi chu galkaijin; ajehchu Ahithophel'in nangma douna-a hitia hi athumop ahitai, atilhonne." 
2Samuel17:22 Hichun David le aumkhompi miho jouse chu akipat doh-un, Jordan agalkaijun: jingkho vah-in amaho Jordan galkailou khatcha aumtapouvin ahi." 
2Samuel17:23 Chuin Ahithophel'in athumop akijuilou amuphatnin, asangan pho kigotnin, akipatdoh-in, akhopi a-in lama achen, a-insung asemtupmin, chuin amale ama akikhailih-in, athin, apa lhanna akivuitan ahi." 
2Samuel17:24 Hichun David Mahanaim'a ahung lhungin ahi. Chule Absalom le aumpi Israel mite jouse chu Jordan agalkai taovin ahi. 
2Samuel17:25 Chuin Absalom'in Joab khelin Amasa chu janel lamkaijin apansahtai: Hiche Amasa kitipa hi chu Joab nu Zeruiah sopinu Nasah chanu Abigail galuppi pa Israel mi Jithra kitipa chapa ahi. 
2Samuel17:26 Hitichun Israel le Absalom'in Gilead gama chun pon in akison taovin ahi. 
2Samuel17:27 Chuin ahitin ahi, David Mahanaim ahunglhun phatnin, Ammon mi Rabbah kho-a cheng Nahash chapa Shobi le, Lodebar kho-a cheng Ammiel chapa Machir toh, Rogelim kho-a cheng Gilead mi Barzillai'in," 
2Samuel17:28 Jalkhunho, twikhonho, leibelho, suhlou chang, sakolchang, changbong, changkanpoh, bepaiho, bechim, belheng kikangho," 
2Samuel17:29 Chule khoiju, bongnoi thao, kelngoi le bongnoihaho chu David le aumpi miho nehdingin ahinpouvin ahi: ajehchu amahon, Mipi hi gamthipma gilkel, thachol le dangchah-a umu ahi, atiuve." 
2Samuel18:1 Chuin David'in aumkhopi miho chu asimin, chuin aman sangkhat chung lamkai le jakhat chunga lamkai ding alhengdoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel18:2 Chule David'in mipi hopthum-a hopkhat chu Joab khut noija asoldoh-in, hopthum-a hopkhat chu Zeruiah chapa Joab sopipa Zeruiah chapa Abishai khut noija asoldoh-in, chule hopthum-a hopkhat chu Git mi Ittai khut noija chun asoldoh-in ahi. Chuin lengpan mipi ho henga, Keima tahjong thonlouva nang hotoh kalhonkhom ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel18:3 Ahinla mipin adonbutnun, Nangma nakondoh louding ahi: ajehchu keiho jamta leoveng, amahon keiho gelkhoh-a einei loudiu; chule keiho akehkhat thijong leoveng, amahon keiho gelkhoh-a einei loudiu ahi. Ahinla tun nangma keiho sangsom toh kibang nahi: hijeh-a chu nangman tu-a khopi sunga naum hi phajo ahi, atiuve." 
2Samuel18:4 Chuin lengpan ajah uva, Nanghon aphapen dinga nagelu chu kabol ding ahi, ati. Chuin lengpa kotpi phung koma chun adingin, mipi jouse chu jakhat cheng le sangkhat chengin ahungdoh-un ahi." 
2Samuel18:5 Chuin lengpan Joab, Abishai chule Ittai chu thu apen, ajah uva, Keima ding ngaitonan gollhangpa, Absalom ngeichu lungneng tah-in hindemun, ati. Chule miho jouse chun lengpan Absalom chung changa ja lamkaiho athupeh chu ajaovin ahi." 
2Samuel18:6 Hitichun mipi chu gamlah-a Israelte doudin achedoh taovin ahi. Chuin gal chu Ephraim gammanga kisat uva ahi; 
2Samuel18:7 Hiche mun'a chun Israel mipi ho chu David sohte masanga akithat chap taovin, chule hiche nikho chun mi sangsomni athin ahi." 
2Samuel18:8 Ajehchu gal chu gamsung jouse-a akithechan soh-a ahitan: chule hiche nikho chun chemjam'a kithat sangin, gammang lah-a ohlih atamjouvin ahi." 
2Samuel18:9 Chuin Absalom'in David sohte chu atohkha tan ahi. Chuin Absalom chu sangan chung khatna touva ahin, chule sangan chu gangpi lentah abah kibom noija chun achen ahile, alu chu gangpi-a chun a-ohdentan; chuin ama vanle lei kikah-a akikhai denin; anoija um sangan chu achemang tan ahi." 
2Samuel18:10 Chuin mikhatnin hichu amun, Joab jah-a, Ven, keiman Absalom gangpi phunga akikhai kamun ahi, ati." 
2Samuel18:11 Chuin Joab'in aseipehpa henga, Ven, nangman ama namu ahin, ipidinga amachu tolla satlhalou nahim? chutile keiman nangma dangka Shekel somleh konggah khat nape tadinga, ati." 
2Samuel18:12 Chuin mipa chun Joab henga, Keiman dangka Shekel sangkhat kakhutna kasan ding hijongleh, keiman lengpa chapa dounan kakhut kalha louding ahi; ajehchu keiho jah tah-in lengpa nangma le Abishai chule Ittai nathu peh-un, Gollhang Absalom chu koimachan natohkhah louna dingun chingtheijun, ati." 
2Samuel18:13 Achuti louva ahile kahinkho douna-a dihlou tah-a na katohding ahi: ajehchu lengpa-a kona ki-ima imacha aumpon, nangmatah ngeijong keima douva nahung panding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel18:14 Hichun Joab'in, Keima nangma toh hitihin umthei ponge, ati. Chuin aman akhutna tengcha thum alan, Gangpi thing lah-a ahinga ana umnalai Absalom alungchang chu asun pailetnin ahi." 
2Samuel18:15 Chuin Joab galmanchah po-a pang gollhang mi somho chun Absalom chu a-umkimvelun, avouvin, athat taovin ahi." 
2Samuel18:16 Chuin Joab'in sumkon amutnin ahile, mipi chu Israelte anungdel naova konin ahungkile taovin ahi; ajehchu Joab'in mipi chu akhamtang ahitai." 
2Samuel18:17 Chuin amahon Absalom chu alauvin, gammang lah kotong lentah khat aseplutnun, chule achunga songlhuh lentah-in aseuvin ahi. Chuin Israelte chu amitakip ama ama ponbuh lam cheh-a ajamtaovin ahi." 
2Samuel18:18 Tun Absalom'in ahinlaijin lengpa phaichama chun amadingin khompi khat anatung doh-in ahi. Ajehchu aman, keiman kamin geldoh jingna dinga koiding chapa kaneipoi, ati: chuin aman khompi chu ama-min aputsah-in ahi. Chule hichu tunigeijin Absalom mun tin akisahtai." 
2Samuel18:19 Chujouvin Zadok chapa Ahimaaz'in, Tun keima lhaijing kating, Pakaiyin melmaho chunga iti phu analah hitam, lengpa koma athu hi galhut inge, ati." 
2Samuel18:20 Chuin Joab'in ahenga, Tunia hi nangman thu napoh theilou ding, amavang nidang tengle napoh ding ahi. Tunia vanghi nangman thu napoh louding ahi, ajehchu lengpa chapa thia ahi, ati." 
2Samuel18:21 Chujouvin Joab'in Cushi henga, Chenlang nathilmu hi lengpa gaseipehtan, ati. Chuin Cushi chu Joab anga akunin, alhaijeltan ahi." 
2Samuel18:22 Hichun Zadok chapa Ahimaaz chun Joab henga aseikitnin, Ahile hitante, nahenga katao ahi, Cushi nunga chun lhaijing kate, ati. Chuin Joab'in, Kachapa, athupoh ding umlouva ipi dinga lhaiding nakigot jengham? ati." 
2Samuel18:23 Ahinla aman, Ahile hitante, lhaijeng inge, ati. Hichun aman ajah-a, Lhaitan, ati. Hichun Ahimaaz chu phaicham lampia chun alhaijin Cushi chu akhelpatan ahi." 
2Samuel18:24 Chule David chu kotpi teni kikah-a chu touva ahi. Chuin khongahpa chu kotpi phung bang chunga chun akaldoh-in, akhodah in ahile, veuvin, mikhat achanga hunglhai amun ahi." 
2Samuel18:25 Chuin khongahpa chun asamin, lengpa henga aseipehtan ahi. Chuin lengpan, Ama achang ahile, akama thu ahinpoh hinte, ati. Chuin ama kintah-in ahunglhaijin ahungnai chehcheh-in ahi." 
2Samuel18:26 Chuin khongahpa chun michom dang khat hunglhaija amukitnin: chuin khongahpa chun kotngahpachu akouvin, ahenga, Ven, michom dang khat jong ahunglhaije, ati. Chuin lengpan amajong thu ahinpoh ahi, ati." 
2Samuel18:27 Chuin khongahpan, Keiman ahunglhai masapenpa chu Zadok chapa Ahimaaz lhai danin kahen ahi, ati. Chuin lengpan, Amachu mipha ahin, chule thupha toh hungtha ahi, ati." 
2Samuel18:28 Chuin Ahimaaz'in ahin samin, lengpa henga, Imajouse aphasoh keinai, ati. Chuin aman lengpa masang tolla chun amai asulutnin, Ka pakai lengpa douna akhut lamho jouse pedoh-a Pakai na Pathen chu nunnom hen, ati." 
2Samuel18:29 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Gollhang Absalom chu hoidoh nam? ati. Chuin Ahimaaz'in adonbutnin, Joab'in lengpa sohpa le nasoh keima eisol lhonchun, keiman mipi boilah lah chu kamun, ahinla hichu ipi ahi kahepoi, ati." 
2Samuel18:30 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Kikhindoh inlang, hikoma hin dingin, ati. Chuin ama akikhindoh-in, ading thimbeh-in ahi." 
2Samuel18:31 Chuin veuvin, Cushi ahung lhungin; chule Cushi'n, ka Pakai lengpa thu kahinpoi; ijeh inem itile nangma doudinga kipatdoh ho jouse chunga tuni hin Pakaiyin phu alatai, ati." 
2Samuel18:32 Chuin lengpan Cushi henga, Gollhang Absalom chu hoidoh nam? ati. Chuin Cushi'n adonbutnin, Ka pakai lengpa melmaho jouse, chule nangma suhkhah nadinga nangma douna kipatdoh jouse chu gollhangpa chutoh bangcheh hen, ati." 
2Samuel18:33 Chuin lengpa chu alung analheh jengtan, kotpi phunga dan chunga chun akaldoh-in, akaptan ahi: chuin aman achepumin, Ohe! kachapa Absalom! kachapa, kachapa Absalom! Pathen'in nangma khela eithisah joh hile ong! ohe Absalom, kachapa, kachapa, atin ahi." 
2Samuel19:1 Chuin Joab henga, Ven, lengpa chu Absalom dingin akapmin, alunghemin ahi tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
2Samuel19:2 Chule hiche nikho-a galjona chu mijouse dingin lunghemna asohtan ahi. Ajehchu mipi jousen, Lengpa ichan geija achapa dinga lung gentheija hitam, tia kisei chu ajauvin ahi." 
2Samuel19:3 Chule galmuna kona ajamdoh jeh-a jahchatah-a umho bangin, hiche nikho chun mipi ho chu guhthim chan khopi sunga chun ahung lutnun ahi." 
2Samuel19:4 Ahivangin lengpan amai akikhun, awsang tah-in, Vo kachapa Absalom! vo Absalom kachapa, kachapa, tin akapmin ahi." 
2Samuel19:5 Chuin Joab chu lengpa in'a ahunglutnin, ajah-a, Nangman tunikho hin nangma hinkho, nachapate hinkho, nachanute hinkho, najite hinkho, nathaikem ho hinkho huhdoh-a nasohte jouse maihi najumson;" 
2Samuel19:6 Hiche-a hin nangman namelmate nangailun, naloi nagol ho nahotbolin ahi. Ajehchu tuni hin nangman leng chapate le soh ho hi ija naselouna naphongdoh tan: tuni hin Absalom chu hing henlang, keiho jousehi thileuveng nakipah ding ahi ti kamudohtai." 
2Samuel19:7 Hijeh chun tun kipatdoh-in, chedoh-in lang nasohte henga lungmona thu gaseijin: ajehchu Pakai mina kihahsel kahi, napotdoh louva ahile, tujan apat khatcha jong nangma toh umlou ding ahitai: chule hichu nakhangdon laija patna tuni geija nachunga thilse anachuho sanga khohjo ding ahi, ati." 
2Samuel19:8 Hichun lengpa akipatdoh-in, kotpi phunga chun atoutan ahi. Chuin amahon mipi ho jouse henga chun, Veuvin; lengpa chu kotpi phunga atoutai, atiuve. Chuin mipi chu lengpa masanga ahungun ahi: ajehchu Israelte amitakip ama ama pon-in lam cheh-a jamu ahitai." 
2Samuel19:9 Chuin Israel phung jouse lah-a mipi ho chu akiphinun, Lengpan imelmateu khutna konin eihuhdoh-un; chule Philistinte khutna konin eihuhdoh-un; chule tun ama Absalom jeh-in gamsunga konin ajamdoh tai." 
2Samuel19:10 Chule ichunguva dinga thao inupao Absalom chu galmuna athitan ahi. Hijeh chun tun ipidinga lengpa lepuikit nadinga thu changkhat beh nasei daoham? atiuve. 
2Samuel19:11 Chuin David lengpan Zadok le Abiathar thempu henga mi asolin, ajah-a, Judah upaho henga hitin aseijin, Israelte thusei chu lengpa le a-insung ngei tah-a hunglhung tai ti namu nunguva, ipidinga nanghon lengpa a-in'a lepui kitnadinga anunung pena napan uham?" 
2Samuel19:12 Nangho kasopite nahiuvin, kaguhole kaphe nahiuve. Chuti ahile ipidinga nangho lengpa lepuina dinga anunungpen nahiu ham?" 
2Samuel19:13 Chule nanghon Amasa henga, Nangma kagule kaphe nahilouham? Nangma kamasang Joab khela janel gallamkai nahijom jing louva ahile, Pathen'in kachunga hitichun, chule akhohjo cheh-in eibolhen, ati." 
2Samuel19:14 Chuin aman mikhat lungsung bangin Judah miho jouse lungsung chu asunemin; hitichun amahon lengpa henga thu athotnun, Nangmale nasohteho hungkile taovin, atiuvin ahi." 
2Samuel19:15 Hitichun lengpa ahungkilen, Jordan ahung lhungtan ahi. Chuin Judah chu lengpa kimutopi ding le Jordan galkaipi dingin Gilgal'a ahungtan ahi." 
2Samuel19:16 Chuin Bahurim'a um Benjamin mi Gera chapa Shimei chu Judah miho toh David lengpa kimutopi dingin mangang tah-in ahungsuh-in ahi. 
2Samuel19:17 Chule ama chu Benjamin mi sangkhat to ahin, Saul insungmi sohpa Ziba le achapa somlenga toh, chule asoh somni toh ahiuvin: chuin amaho chu lengpa masanga chun Jordan agalkaijun ahi." 
2Samuel19:18 Chuin amaho lengpa insungmi le aman boldinga pha-a agel chu boldingin kongneo khatna agalkaijun ahi. Chuin ama Jordan ahung galkai kaijin, Gera chapa Shimei chu lengpa masanga abohkhup jengin;" 
2Samuel19:19 Chule lengpa henga, Ka pakaiyin khangitlouna chu keija simhih-in, chule ka pakai lengpan Jerusalem adalhah ni-a nasoh kanachonvalna jong chu geldoh danlang, lengpan nalunga jong vophih beh-in." 
2Samuel19:20 Ajehchu nasoh hin chonse kahi ti kakihetne: hijeh chun ven, tunia hi Joseph insung miholah-a ka pakai lengpa kimutopi dinga hungsuh masapen kahi, ati." 
2Samuel19:21 Ahivangin Zeruiah chapa Abishai'in adonbutnun, aman Pakai thaonusa agaosap jeh-a Shimei chu thading hilouham? ati." 
2Samuel19:22 Chuin David'in, Nangho Zeruiah chapate, nangho le keima ipi ikibahnao uma, tunia hi keima douva napan uham? Tunia Israel sunga mi kithat ding ham? tunia hi keiman Israelte chunga leng kahihi kahet louva nabolu ham? ati." 
2Samuel19:23 Hijeh chun lengpan Shimei jah-a, Nangma nathilou ding ahi ati. Chuin lengpa amahenga akiteptan ahi." 
2Samuel19:24 Chuin Saul chapa Mephibosheth chu lengpa kimupi dingin ahungsuh-in, chule aman lengpa akipatdoh ni-a pat lungmonga ahungkit nikho tokah-a hi akeng jong asillou, akhamul jong apolou, avonho jong asoplou ahi." 
2Samuel19:25 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama Jerusalem'a lengpa kimutopi dinga ahung chun lengpan ahenga, Mephibosheth ipidinga keima toh kilhonlou nahim? ati." 
2Samuel19:26 Chuin aman adonbutnin, Ka pakai, vo kalengpa, nasohhi kengbai kahi jeh-in keima, Achunga katouva lengpa henga kache theina dingin sangan chu kigotninge kati ahi; hinlah kasohpan eijoulhep ahi" 
2Samuel19:27 Chule aman nasohhi ka pakai lengpa henga eihehsen ahi; ahinla ka pakai lengpa hi Pathen vantil tobang ahi. Hijeh chun namitmu-a pha masah dungjuijin boltan. 
2Samuel19:28 Ajehchu kapa insung pumpiho ka pakai lengpa masanga athisa ahitan, hijongle nangman nasohhi nangma dokhanga neho lah-a napan sah-in ahi. Hijeh chun lengpa henga taokitna dinga ipi thaneina kaneijem? ati." 
2Samuel19:29 Chuin lengpan ahenga, Ipidinga nangman nathu chu nasei nahlai ham? Keiman, Nang le Ziba gam chu kihomlhontan tin kanaseije, ati." 
2Samuel19:30 Chuin Mephibosheth'in lengpa henga, Ka pakai lengpa lungmonga a-in'a hung kilekit ahitah jeh-in, abonin aman kilahtahen, ati." 
2Samuel19:31 Chuin Gilead mi Barzillai chu Rogelim'a konin ahungsuh-in chuin, Jordan gal gei gathah dingin, lengpa toh Jordan agalkai lhonin ahi." 
2Samuel19:32 Tun Barzillai chu mi kum upatah ahitan, kum somget ahitai. Chule aman lengpa Mahanaim'a aumlaija chu nehding ana khan ahi; ajehchu ama mihao tah ahi." 
2Samuel19:33 Chuin lengpan Barzillai henga, Kakoma hungin lang, Jerusalem'a kakoma na-umlaisen keiman navah nange, ati." 
2Samuel19:34 Chuin Barzillai'in lengpa henga, Keima itih chanpi kahin nahlai ding hija, lengpa toh Jerusalem'a kachetou dingham?" 
2Samuel19:35 Tuhin keima kum somget kahitai. Chule keiman apha le ase kalhengkhen thei ding ham? Nasoh hin kaneh dingle kadon ding chu atwi atam kahetthei ding hinam? Numei lasathem le pasal lasathem ho lasah awgin chu kajah thei nalaiding hinam? chuti ahile ipi dinga nasohhi ka pakai lengpa dinga pohgih kibe nabep kahiding ham? 
2Samuel19:36 Nasoh hi lengpa toh Jordan gal themkhat chebeding kahi: ipidinga hitobang thilpeh-a hi lengpan neilethuh got ham? 
2Samuel19:37 Nahenga katao ahi, nasohhi kakhopia kathi-a kanule kapa lhanna kakivui theina dingin, neinungsol tan. Ahinla ven, nasoh Chimham hi; amahi ka pakai lengpa toh lhonhen lang, nangman apha hidinga kilom nasah dungjuijin achunga hin boltan, ati." 
2Samuel19:38 Chuin lengpan adonbutnin, Chimham hi keimatoh kilhon ding ahin, chule keima ama chunga hi apha hidinga kilom kasah dungjuija kabolding ahi. Chule ipi hitajongle keima-a kona nangaichat chu kabolpeh ding nahi, ati." 
2Samuel19:39 Chuin mijouse Jordan agalkai taovin ahi. Chuin lengpa ahung galkai phatnin, lengpan Barzillai chu achopmin, chule phatthei aboh-in; chuin ama aumna lama akile kittan ahi." 
2Samuel19:40 Chujouvin lengpa Gilgal'a achen, chule Chimham chu amatoh alhonin ahi. Chuin Judah mijouse le Israel mipi akehkhat chun lengpa ahin puijun ahi." 
2Samuel19:41 Chuin veuvin, Israel mipi ho jouse chu lengpa henga ahungun, lengpa jah-a, Ipidinga Judah mi kasopi hon nangma naguh manguva, lengpa le a-insungmi chule David'in aumpi miho jouse chu apui galkaiju ham? atiuve." 
2Samuel19:42 Chuin Judah miho jouse chun Israel miho chu adonbutnun, Lengpa hi kakinaipiu ka-insungmiu ahijeh ahi. Chuti ahile ipidinga nangho hiche jeh-a hi lunghanga nahiuvem? Lengpa chohsa ne-a kahiuvem? ahiloule aman keiho thilpeh eipeh khah uvem? atiuve." 
2Samuel19:43 Chuin Israel miho chun Judah miho chu adonbutnun, Keihon lengpa-a chansom kaneijun, chule keihon nangho sangin David'a thaneina kaneijouvin ahi. Chuti ahile ipidinga lengpa galepui kitna dinga keiho thuhil chu masajo ahi chu i-sah louva bol nahiuvem? tiuve. Ahinla Judah miho thusei chu Israel miho thusei sangin ahatjon ahi." 
2Samuel20:1 Chuin Benjamin Bikhri chapa Sheba kiti boinasem mikhat ana umin ahi. Chuin aman sumkon amutnin, Eihon David'a chan ineipouve, chule Jesse chapa-a konin jong goulo ding ineipouve: Vo Israel, naponbuh cheh uva chetaovin, ati." 
2Samuel20:2 Hitichun Israel mite jousen David adalhaovin, chuin Bikhri chapa Sheba chu ajuitaovin ahi. Ahivangin Jordan'a pat Jerusalem geija Judah mite vangchu alengpaova dingin apangdetnun ahi." 
2Samuel20:3 Chuin David Jerusalem'a a-in ahung lhungin, chuin lengpan a-inngah dinga adalhah, numei thaikem somho chu insung dan khatna akoijin, avah-in, ahin amaho koma chun alut tapon ahi. Hitichun amaho chu athi nikho geijun khakhumin aumun, meithai bangin ahing taovin ahi." 
2Samuel20:4 Chujouvin lengpan Amasa henga, Nithum sungin Judah mite neikhop khompeh inlang, chule nangma tahjong umin, ati." 
2Samuel20:5 Hijeh chun Amasa chu Judah mite khom dingin achen: ahinla David'in atepeh phat sangchun ahung geijotan ahi. 
2Samuel20:6 Chuin David'in Abishai henga, Tu-a hi Bikhri chapa Sheba hin Absalom'in eibolnao sanga khohjo cheh-a eiboldiu hitam? Napakai sohte kipuijin lang ama chu nungdelin, achuti loule khopi kul kikai khum khat kimuntin, eihoa konin sohcha getninte, ati." 
2Samuel20:7 Chule ama nunga chun Joab miho, Chereth mite, Peleth mite le mihat ho jouse acheuvin; chuin amaho Bikhri chapa Sheba nung del dingin Jerusalem'a konin akipat doh-un ahi." 
2Samuel20:8 Amaho Gibeon mun songpilen phunga aumlaijun, Amasa chu amasanguva ahungin ahi. Tun Joab chu galvon'a kivon ahin, chule chu-a chu konggah um, chule akonga chu chemjam apaija kiheng kikhaija ahi; chuin ama malama achea ahile hichu ahung kitanglhan ahi." 
2Samuel20:9 Chuin Joab'in Amasa henga, Kasopi pa, nadam hinam? ati. Chuin Joab'in Amasa chop dingin akhut jetlama akhamulin amanin ahi." 
2Samuel20:10 Ahivangin Amasa chun Joab'in akhutna chemjam achoi chu ahepon ahi. Chuin aman hichea chun a-oipoh asut peh-in ahile, agil tolla alonglhan, avelin asunkit tapon; chuin ama athitan ahi. Hitichun Joab le sopipa Abishai chun Bikhri chapa Sheba chu anungdel lhontan ahi." 
2Samuel20:11 Chule Joab miho khat chu Amasa koma adingin, Joab khohsah jouse le, David langa pang jouse chu Joab nunga cheohen, ati." 
2Samuel20:12 Chuin Amasa chu lamlhong lailunga athin achupmin ahi. Chuin mipa chun mipi adinden chu amuphatnin, Amasa chu lamlhonga konin gamlah-a achondoh-in, chule akom hinhopa jouse adin dennu chu amuphatnin, ama chu ponkhat akhukhumin ahi." 
2Samuel20:13 Ama lamlhonga akichondoh phatnin, mijouse Bikhri chapa Sheba nung del dingin Joab nunga acheuvin ahi." 
2Samuel20:14 Chule ama Abel gei le Beth-maachah geijin Israel phung jouse henga le Ber mite jouse henga achen ahi. Chuin amaho akikho khomun ama nung ajuitaove.
