2Samuel20:15 Chuin amaho ahungun amaho chu Beth-maachah'a um Abel mun'a chun aumkolun, chule amahon khopi dounan leibang asepmun, chule hichu kiselna leiko-a dinga ahin: Joab toh umkhom mipi jouse chun kulbang chu suhchim dingin asusepan ataovin ahi." 
2Samuel20:16 Hichun khopi-a konchun numei chingtah khatnin ahin samin, Ngaijun, ngaijun; Joab henga katao ahi, nangma toh kakihou theina din, hilam hin naijin, ati." 
2Samuel20:17 Chuin amapa amanu henga ahungnai phatnin, numeinu chun ahenga, Nangma Joab nahim? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Keima ama chu kahi, ati. Hichun amanun ajah-a, Nasohnu thusei ho hi ngaijin, ati. Chuin aman Kangaije, atin adonbutnin ahi." 
2Samuel20:18 Hichun amanun, Masanglai chun min, Amahon thonlouva Abel kho-a thumop adoh teidiu ahi, tin anasei jiuvin: chule hitichun thu chu achai jiuvin ahi." 
2Samuel20:19 Keima Israel sunga chamna deile tahsan ho lah-a khat kahi. Nangman khopi khat le Israel minu khat suhmangdin naholin ahi. Ipidinga nangman Pakai goulo chu naval lhum ding ham? ati. 
2Samuel20:20 Chuin Joab'in adonbutnin, Keiman kaval lhum ding ahiloule kasuhmang ding chu keija konin gamlahen, keija konin gamlahen." 
2Samuel20:21 Athu chu chuti ahipoi: ahin Ephraim molsana kon mikhat Bikhri chapa amin Sheba chun David lengpa dounan akhut alamin ahi. Ama changseh chu hinpe doh-un, chule keiman khopi hi dalhatange, ati. Chuin numei nun Joab henga, Ven aluchang chu bang chunga kona kahin selhahpeh ding nahi, ati." 
2Samuel20:22 Hichun numeinu chu chingtheitah in mipi ho jouse henga chun achen ahi. Chuin amahon Bikhri chapa Sheba chu alu atanun, Joab henga asepdoh taovin ahi. Chuin aman sumkon amutnin, chuin amaho khopi-a konin ama ama pon-in cheh-a akile taovin ahi. Chuin Joab lengpa henga Jerusalem'a ahung kiletan ahi." 
2Samuel20:23 Tun Joab chu Israel janel chunga ahin: chule Jehoiada chapa Benaiah chu Chereth mite le Peleth mite chunga ahi. 
2Samuel20:24 Chule Adoram chu kaidong pipu ahin; chule Ahilud chapa Jehoshaphat chu thuching ahi. 
2Samuel20:25 Chule Sheva chu danthusun ahin; chule Zadok le Abiathar chu thempu ahilhone. 
2Samuel20:26 Chule Jair mi Ira chu David dinga vaihom pipu ahi. 
2Samuel21:1 Chujouvin David nikho laichun akum kum-in kum thum kel alhan ahile, David'in Pakai chu adongin ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin, Hichehi Saul le thisanso hat a-insung mite jeh ahi, ajehchu aman Gibeon mite chu ana thatnin ahi, tin adonbutne." 
2Samuel21:2 Chuin lengpan Gibeon mite chu akouvin, ajah uva hitin ati; (tun Gibeon mite hi Israel chate ahipouvin, amavang Amor mite amoh ho ahiuve; chule Israel chate chu ahenguva ana kihahselu ahi: ahin Saul'in Israel le Judah chate-a dinga atompan nalama thadinga anahol ahi)." 
2Samuel21:3 Hijeh chun David'in Gibeon mite henga, Nangho dinga ipi kabolpeh diuham? chule Pakai goulo hohi phatthei nabohna diuva, ipi-a longlhena kabol dingham? ati." 
2Samuel21:4 Chuin Gibeon mihon ajah-a, Keihon Saul ahiloule a-insunga kon sana dangka kadeipouvin, chule keiho-a dinga jong Israel sunga mi khatcha natha louding ahi, atiuve. Chuin aman, Nanghon nasei seiju chu kabolpeh ding nahiuve, ati." 
2Samuel21:5 Chuin amahon lengpa chu adonbutnun, Israel gamsung munkhat cha-a jong kaum louna diuva suhmang dingle thagam dinga eigopao thudola," 
2Samuel21:6 Achapate pasal sagi chu keiho eikipedoh-uhen, chule keihon amaho chu Pakai henga, Pakaiyin analhen Saul umna Gibeah'a chun khaisang uvinge atiuve. Chuin lengpan, Amahochu kapeh dingu nahiuve, ati." 
2Samuel21:7 Ahinla lengpan Saul chapa Jonathan chapa Mephibosheth chu Pakai hahselna amaho kah, David le Saul chapa Jonathan kah-a aumjeh chun akhendoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel21:8 Hijeh chun lengpan Aiah chanu Rizpah'in Saul'a dinga ahinpeh achapateni Armoni le Mephibosheth le, Meholath mi Barzillai chapa Adriel dinga ahin Saul chanu Michal chapa ngaho chu alan," 
2Samuel21:9 Chuin aman amaho chu Gibeoh miho khutna apedoh-in, chule amahon amaho chu Pakai masanga lhang chunga akhaijun ahi. Chuin amaho abonchauvin mi sagi chu chang-at nikho masapen, sakolchang ki-at tillin thakhatnin athat taovin ahi." 
2Samuel21:10 Chuin Aiah chanu Rizpah'in khaodip pon khat alan, chang-at kipatna pat van'a kona hicheho chunga twi ahung chuh tokahse-a ding chun amanu-a dingin songpi chunga aphan; chule sunle chungleng vachaho, chule janteng gamlah-a gamsaho chu achunguva achuh sahpon ahi." 
2Samuel21:11 Chuin Saul thaikemnu Aiah chanu Rizpah'in athilbol chu David aseipeh taovin ahi. 
2Samuel21:12 Chuin David achen, Saul le achapa Jonathan guho chu Jabesh-gilead mite koma konin agalan; hiche guho chu Philistine miten Gilbao mun'a Saul athajou uva, Beth-shan kholaija akhai naova kona ana guhdoh-u ahi." 
2Samuel21:13 Chuin aman hia konchun, Saul le achapa Jonathan guho chu ahinpodoh-in; chule amahon akhailih hou guho chu alohkhomun ahi." 
2Samuel21:14 Chuin amahon Saul le achapa Jonathan guho chu Benjamin gam Zelah mun'a apa Kish lhanna chun avuijun: chule amahon lengpa thupeh ho jouse atongdoh sohkeijun ahi. Chuin hiche jouchun Pathen'in gamsung mite taona chu angaipeh tan ahi. 
2Samuel21:15 Hiche chungchon chun Philistine ten Israelte dounan gal ahinbol kitnun; chuin David le asohte chu akonsuh-un, Philistine te toh akisat taovin: chule David chu achol lheh jengtan ahi." 
2Samuel21:16 Chuin mihat chapate lah-a khat, atengcha chu sum-eng Shekel jathum-a gih Ishbi-benob kitipa chun, chemjam thah khat akikoijin, David chu thading agotan ahi." 
2Samuel21:17 Ahin Zeruiah chapa Abishai'in amachu ahunghuh doh-in, Philistine mipa chu asatnin, athat tan ahi. Chujouvin David miho chu ahenga akihahselun, Israel meivah kisuhmit louna dinga, nangma keihotoh galkona nachekit louding ahitai, atiuve." 
2Samuel21:18 Chuin hiche jouchun ahitin ahi, Gob mun chun Philistine te toh akisat kit taovin; chuin Hushath mi Sibbachai chun Saph athatnin, amachu mihat chapate lah-a khat ahi." 
2Samuel21:19 Chuin Gob mun'a chun Philistine te toh akisatpha kitnun, hilaija chun Benjamin mi Jaare-oregim chapa El-hanan'in Git mi Goliath sopipa chu athatnin, atenglung chu ponkhong ho pumlong te ahi." 
2Samuel21:20 Chuin Gath mun'a chu gal akisat kitnun, hilaija chun mi atahsa lentah khat aumin, akhutjung gup chule akengjung gup, agoma somnileli ahin; chule mihat chihlhah ahi." 
2Samuel21:21 Chuin aman Israelte achou phatnin, David sopipa Shimea chapa Jonathan chun agathatnin ahi." 
2Samuel21:22 Hicheng liho Gath'a mihatpa ding hungpeng ho, David khut le asohte khutna louho chu ahiuve." 
2Samuel22:1 Chule Pakaiyin amelmate jouse khut le Saul khutna kona ahuhdoh nikhon, David'in Pakai koma hiche lachengho hi aseijin ahi." 
2Samuel22:2 Chuin aman, Pakai hi kasongpi le kakulpi, chule eihuhhingpu ahi;" 
2Samuel22:3 Kasongpi Pathen ahin; keiman ama katahsan ding ahi: Ama kalum le kasochatna ki, ka-insang le kahoidohna, kahuhhingpu ahin; nangman pumhatna konin neihuhdoh tai." 
2Samuel22:4 Keiman pachat dinga lomtah Pakai chu kakou ding: hiti achu kamelmaho-a kona huhdoh-a kaumding ahi. 
2Samuel22:5 Thina twi kinongin eium kimvel teng, Pathen heloute twisoh-in eikichatsah-e;" 
2Samuel22:6 Thikholkhul lungkham nan eium kimvelin, thina thanghon eikimaitopi-e." 
2Samuel22:7 Kagenthei tengle Pakai kakouvin, ka Pathen henga kapengin, Chule aman a-houin'a konin ka aw ahinjan, kapena chun anakhang sunga alutnin ahi." 
2Samuel22:8 Hichun leiset akilingin akihotnin; van kibulphuna ho akihotnin, akilinge, ajehchu ama lunghanga ahi." 
2Samuel22:9 Chuin anah homa konin meikhu ahungdoh-in, chule akama kona meikong chun aval lhumin; hiche chun meihol ho chu ahal kong tan ahi." 
2Samuel22:10 Aman van ho jong aloi nemin, chule ahung kumlhan; muthim chu akengto noija umin ahi." 
2Samuel22:11 Chule ama Cherub chunga atouvin, alengin; chule amachu hui lhavingho chunga akimun ahi." 
2Samuel22:12 Aman akimvela muthim lhangkhal akihehsah-in, twi thimjeju le van'a meilom satah ho chu." 
2Samuel22:13 Ama masang vah-a kon chun mei-am ho ahung aldoh-in ahi. 
2Samuel22:14 Pakaiyin vangin bangin a-aw ahin sodoh-in; chungnung pen chun thu ahin seijin ahi. 
2Samuel22:15 Chule aman thalpi ho akapdoh-in, chule athe jal-in; kol aphet sah-in, amaho chu ajoutan ahi." 
2Samuel22:16 Pakai phosalna le anahhoma ahu alhadoh-a konin; Twikhanglen toho chu akilangdoh-in, vannoi kibulphu naho jong akimudoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel22:17 Aman chunga konin ahinsolin, keima eiladoh-in; twi tamtah lah-a konin aman eikaidoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel22:18 Ka melma hattah ho-a konle eithetboltea konin eihuhdoh-in; ajehchu amaho keima dingin ahat behseh-un ahi. 
2Samuel22:19 Kahamsetna nikhon amahon eikimaitopi-un; ahinla Pakai chu kapanmun ahijinge. 
2Samuel22:20 Aman munlen tah-a jong eipuilutnin, kachunga akipa jeh-in eihuhdoh tai." 
2Samuel22:21 Pakaiyin kachon phatna dungjuijin kipaman eipen, kakhut teni thenna dungjuijin aman eilethuh-in ahi." 
2Samuel22:22 Ajehchu keiman Pakai lampiho kajuijin, chule ka-Pathen'a konin giloutah-in kapot pon ahi." 
2Samuel22:23 Ajehchu ama thutan ho jouse kamasanga aumin: achonna dan kisunho thudola vang, keima hicheho-a konchun kapotdoh pon ahi." 
2Samuel22:24 Keima amasanga chondih tah kanahin; kakhangit louna-a konin kakikangsen ahi. 
2Samuel22:25 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin kachon phatna dungjui eilethuh-a; amitmu-a kathena dungjuijin eilethuh ahi. 
2Samuel22:26 Hepina neite henga nangman hepinanei nahi namusah ding; michondih ho henga nangma chondih nahi nakimusah ding ahi. 
2Samuel22:27 Mitheng ho henga atheng nahi nakimusah ding; milungkon te henga chingtah nahi nakimusah ding ahi 
2Samuel22:28 Chule bolgentheija umte nangman nahuhdoh ding; mikiletsahte chu suhnema aumtheina dingun, namit chu achunguva aumin ahi." 
2Samuel22:29 Ajehchu vo Pakai nangma kathaomei nahin; Pakaiyin kamuthim eisalvah pehding ahi. 
2Samuel22:30 Ajehchu nangma jala galmi honkhat douna kalhai ding; ka-Pathen jala bang kachop khup ding ahi. 
2Samuel22:31 Pathen vang, alampi achamkimin; Pakai thu chu akipho chenin; ama tahsan te jouse dingin ama alumdalu ahi." 
2Samuel22:32 Ajehchu Pathen tailou, Pakai koiham? chule Pathen tailou, koiham songpi?" 
2Samuel22:33 Pathen chu kathahatna le kathaneina ahin: aman kalampi achamkimsah-in ahi. 
2Samuel22:34 Aman kakeng sajuhnu keng bangin asemin; kamun sangho-a eitousah-in ahi. 
2Samuel22:35 Kakhutnin thih thalpi ho ajetboh nadingin; Aman kakhut galbolje ahilin ahi. 
2Samuel22:36 Nangman nahuhhinga lumdal neipetan; nanun nem nachun keima lentah-in eisemdohtai. 
2Samuel22:37 Nangman kalhuh louna dingin, kanoija kakalsona ding neikeh letpeh-in ahi." 
2Samuel22:38 Keiman kamelmate kadelin, amaho kasumangin; chule amaho kasuh manghel kahsen kahungkile pon ahi." 
2Samuel22:39 Athokit theilouna diuvin keiman amaho kamavon, kasumang helin; henge, amaho kakengto noija alhusoh taovin ahi." 
2Samuel22:40 Ajehchu nangman galsatn-a dingin thahat na-in katai neigah peh-in; keima douna-a kipandoh hochu kanoija nakoitan ahi. 
2Samuel22:41 Nangman keima eihot bolte chu kasuhmang nadingin, kamelmate lolho chu neipedoh-in ahi." 
2Samuel22:42 Amahon aveovin, ahinla ahuhdohdiu koima aumpon; Pakai jengin jong amaho adonbutpon ahi." 
2Samuel22:43 Hichun keima amaho chu vutvai bangin kavongoijin, chule lamlen dunga bonlhoh bangin kachotphan, akithejalji taovin ahi." 
2Samuel22:44 Nangman kamite kiphinna-a konin neihuh doh-in, Pathen hephalouho luchang dingin neikoitai: kahet khahlou mihon eijen nadingu ahi." 
2Samuel22:45 Gamdang miho kahenga hungkipelut dingu: amahon ajah jah ule kasei angai dingu ahi. 
2Samuel22:46 Gamchom mihochu hung lhadah untin, chule akikul khupnao mun'a kona kicha ding ahiuve." 
2Samuel22:47 Pakai chu ahingjingin, chule kasongpi chu nunnom hen; huhhingna songpi Pathen chu choisangin umhen." 
2Samuel22:48 Kaphu eilah peh-a, mihemte kanoija sunema Pathen ahin," 
2Samuel22:49 Chule kamelmate lah-a kona eipuidoh-a chu Pathen ahi: keima douna-a kipandoh ho chungvuma neidomsangin: mihuham ho-a konin neihuhdoh tan ahi. 
2Samuel22:50 Hijeh-a chu vo Pakai, Pathen hephalouho lah-a nangma thangvah ingting, chule namin vahchoi La kasah ding sange." 
2Samuel22:51 Amachu aleng dinga sochatna insang ahin; chule athaonu David le achilhahte henga a-itih chanin hepina amusah-in ahi. 
2Samuel23:1 Tun hiche hohi David thusei nunungpen ahitai. Chungnung pena dopsanga umpa le Jacob Pathen'in thao anu, chule Israelte lah-a lathempen Jesse chapa David'in aseitai;" 
2Samuel23:2 Pakai lhagao chun keija konin thu aseidoh-in, chule athu kaleija achengin ahi." 
2Samuel23:3 Israel Pathen'in hitin aseijin, Israel songpin kajah-a hitin aseije, Mihem chunga vaihompa chu thudih ding, Pathen ging puma vai ahomding ahi." 
2Samuel23:4 Chule amachu meibol kailouni jingkah, nisa ahungso doh-a khovah tobang hiding; gojuh jouva leisetna kona thengsela hungdon doh h amhing tobang hiding ahi." 
2Samuel23:5 Ka-insung hi Pathen'a dingin chutobang chu hihih jongle; aman keimatoh tonsot kitepna asemin, thiljouse thonlou dingin kitoh tah-in akoijin ahi. Ajehchu aman hichehi kahuh hingna jousele kangaichat ho jouse chu ahi; aman akhantousah lou dingham?" 
2Samuel23:6 Ahinla Belial chapate chu ling kisatlha-a kipaidoh tobang hidingu ahi, ajehchu amaho khutna kiman theilou ahiuve." 
2Samuel23:7 Ahinla amaho gatongkha-a michu thih le tenglung ki-um khumding; chule amaho hiche mun'a chu meija kihalvam ding ahiuve. 
2Samuel23:8 Hichehohi David'in anei mihat ho minchu ahi. Tachmon mite touna-a tou, lamkaiho lah-a pipu chu Ezni mi Adino ahi: aman mi jaget dounan atengcha alamin, amaho chu khatvei tha-in athat gamin ahi." 
2Samuel23:9 Chule ama bantah-a chu ahile, David le amihat thumho lah-a khat, Ahoh mi Dodo chapa Eleazar ahin, amahon galsat dinga galmuna kikhom Philistine te agahchou laijun, Israel miho chu ajam mang taovin;" 
2Samuel23:10 Chuin ama akipatdoh-in, chemjam le akhut kikhen louvin, akhut angoi tokahsen Philistine te chu athatnin ahi. Chule hicheni chun Pakaiyin nasatah-in gal ajosah-un; chule mipi chu ama nunga thil kichom dingin akileuvin ahi." 
2Samuel23:11 Chule ama bantah-a chu Harar mi Agee chapa Shammah ahi. Chuin Philistine te chu louthul dimsetna gambih khatna apunin akikhom khomun: chule mipi chu Philistinete-a konin ajamtaovin ahi. 
2Samuel23:12 Ahinla ama loujao lailunga chun adingin, ngahtupmin apangin, chule Philistine te chu athatnin ahi. Hichun Pakaiyin nasatah-in agaljo sah-in ahi." 
2Samuel23:13 Chule lamkai pipui somthum lah-a thum chu achesuh-un, chuin chang at laijin Adullam songkoa David henga ahungun: chule Philistine te sepaiho chun Rephaim phaichama gebuh akisonun ahi." 
2Samuel23:14 Chule David chu kosung khatna aumin, chule Philistine te sepaihon chu Bethlehem'a umuva ahi." 
2Samuel23:15 Chuin David'in ngaicha tah-in, Ohe Bethlehem kotpi phungkom twikul'a twi chu dondin mi khat touvin eihung pethei taveleh! ati." 
2Samuel23:16 Chuin mihat thumho chun Philistine janelho lahchu aphujalun, Bethlehem kotpi phung koma um twikul'a twi chu athalun, chule David henga ahindomun ahi. Ahijeng vangin aman hichu adonpon, ahinla aman Pakai henga asunglhatan ahi." 
2Samuel23:17 Chule aman, Vo Pakai hiche kabol dinghi keija konin gamlahen: hiche ahinkhou tijat umtah-a dinga phaldoh miho thisan hilou ham? ati. Hijeh-a chu aman adon tapon ahi. Hiche mihat thumho hin hicheho hi aboldoh-u ahi." 
2Samuel23:18 Chule Zeruiah chapa Joab sopipa Abishai chu thumho lah-a apipuipen ahi. Chuin aman mi jathum dounan atengcha chu alamin, amaho chu athatnin, chuin thumho lah-a chun aminthang tan ahi." 
2Samuel23:19 Amachu thumho lah-a ja umpen hilouham? Hijeh chun ama amaho gallamkai ahitai. Hijongle amasa thumho lah-a chun apang phapon ahi. 
2Samuel23:20 Chule Kabzeel'a mihangtah khat chapa Jehoiada chapa Benaiah, thil tamtah tongdohpa chun, keipi bahkai tobang Moab mini athatnin ahi. Chule aman buh lhahlaijin achesuh-in, kotong sung khatna keipi bahkai khat jong athatnin ahi." 
2Samuel23:21 Chuin aman Egypt mi miphatah khat athatne: Egypt mipa chun akhutna tengcha akichoi ahin, hinlah aman tenggol khat achoijin achesuh-in, Egypt mipa khutna konchun tengcha chu alahpeh-in, ama tengcha mama-a chun ama chu athatnin ahi." 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoiada chapa Benaiah'in hiche thilhohi anabolin, chule mihat thumho lah-a chun ama aminthang tan ahi." 
2Samuel23:23 Amachu somthum hosangin ja aum cheh-in, ahinla amasa thumho chu aphapon ahi. Chuin David'in ama ngahtupho chungvuma akoitan ahi." 
2Samuel23:24 Joab sopipa Ashahel chu somthum holah-a khat ahin; Bethlehem'a um Dodo chapa Elhanan," 
2Samuel23:25 Harod mi Shammah, Harod mi Elika," 
2Samuel23:26 Palt mi Helez, Teko mi Ikkesh chapa Ira," 
2Samuel23:27 Anathoth mi Abiezer, Hushath mi Mebunnai," 
2Samuel23:28 Ahoh mi Zalmon, Netophah mi Maharai," 
2Samuel23:29 Netophah mi Baanah chapa Heleb, Benjamin gam Gibeah'a kona Ribai chapa Ittai," 
2Samuel23:30 Pirathon mi Benaiah, Gaash vacha dungho-a kon Hiddai." 
2Samuel23:31 Arbath mi Abialbon, Bahur mi Azmaveth," 
2Samuel23:32 Shaalhon mi Eliahba, Jashen chapate lah-a Jonathan," 
2Samuel23:33 Harar mi Shammah, Harar mi Sharar chapa Ahiam," 
2Samuel23:34 Maachath chapa, Ahasbai chapa Eliphelet, Gilon mi Ahithophel chapa Eliam," 
2Samuel23:35 Karmel mi Hezrai, Arbai mi Paarai," 
2Samuel23:36 Zobah'a Nathan chapa Igal, Gad mi Bani," 
2Samuel23:37 Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiah chapa Joab galvonpopa Beeroth mi Naharai," 
2Samuel23:38 Ithrite mi Ira le Ithrite mi Gareb," 
2Samuel23:39 Hit mi Uriah ahiuvin, abonun mi somthum le sagi ahiove." 
2Samuel24:1 Chuin Pakai lunghanna chu Israelte dounan ahung koujah kittan, chuin amaho douna-a David atilin, Chenlang, Israel le Judah gasimin, atisah-in ahi." 
2Samuel24:2 Ajehchu lengpan aumkhompi janel gal lamkaipa Joab henga, Amijat kahet theina dingin, tun chenlang Israel phungho jouse Dan'a pat Beersheba geijin gasimin, ati." 
2Samuel24:3 Chuin Joab'in lengpa henga, Ka pakai lengpa mitnin amutheina dingin, Pakai na-Pathen'in amaho ijat hijeng jongleu ajat jakhat-in punsah hen: ahinla ipi dinga ka pakai lengpan hiche hohi nangaichat ham? ati." 
2Samuel24:4 Ahijeng vangin lengpa thu chu Joable janel lamkaiho chu anehjou jotan ahi. Chuin Joab le janel lamkaiho chu lengpa mitmu tah-in Israel mipi ho sim dingin apotdoh taovin ahi. 
2Samuel24:5 Chuin amaho Jordan agalkaijun, Gad vachadung koma uma khopi jetlam Jazer langsang Aroer mun'a chun ponbuh asong taovin ahi." 
2Samuel24:6 Chujouvin amaho Gilead le Tahtim-hodshi gam ahung lhungun; chuin amaho Dan-jaan le Zidon veldung ahung lhungun," 
2Samuel24:7 Chule Tyre kulpi dettah le Hiv mite khopi jouse le Canaan miho khopi jouse-a ahungun: chuin amaho Judah lhang lamsang Beersheba changeijin acheuvin ahi. 
2Samuel24:8 Hitichun amaho agamsung jouse-a acheleuvin, lhakole nisomni alhinin amaho Jerusalem ahung lhungun ahi" 
2Samuel24:9 Chuin Joab'in mipi akisimdoh jat chu lengpa apedohtan: chule Israelte lah-a chun mihangsan chemjam lamthei cheh sang jaget aumin, chule Judah miho lah-a chun mi sangjanga aume." 
2Samuel24:10 Chuin aman mipi asimjou phatnin David chu alung nalheh jengin ahi. Chuin David'in Pakai henga, Kana thilbol chungahin kachonse lheh jengtai: chule Vo Pakai, tu-a hi nahenga katao ahi, nasoh khangit lounahi ladoh in; ajehchu keiman ngolhoi tah-in na kanatongin ahi, ati." 
2Samuel24:11 Tun David jingkah-a ahungtho phatnin, Pakai thu chu David mitvah neipa Gad themgao henga ahungin, aseije," 
2Samuel24:12 Chenlang David henga, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, keiman nangma thil thum kapei, nachunga kalhunsah dingin, thumlah-a hin khat penpen kilhenin, tin gaseijin ati." 
2Samuel24:13 Hitichun Gad David henga ahungin, amachu aseipeh-in, ajah-a, Nagam sunga kum sagi kel hunglha ding ham? ahiloule nangma namelmate masanga lhathum najama amahon nanung adeldiu ham? ahiloule nagamsunga hiset nithum lang dingham? Tun eihinsolpa henga kakilea kadonbut theina dingin neihilin, ati." 
2Samuel24:14 Chuin David'in Gad henga, Keima nasatah in kagenthei tai; tun eiho Pakai khutna kipelut jenguhite; ajehchu amihepina alenin ahi: chule mihem khutna vang lutpou hite, ati." 
2Samuel24:15 Hitichun Pakaiyin jingkah-a pat, aphat kitep geichun Israelte lah-a chun natset alhahsah tan ahi. Chutichun mipi lah-a konin Dan'a pat Beersheba geijin mi sangsomsagi athitan ahi." 
2Samuel24:16 Chuin Jerusalem suhmangna dinga vantil'in achunga akhut alap phatnin, Pakaiyin thilphalou abolgotna konin alung aheijin, mipi sumang ding vantil henga chun, Aphaset tai: nakhut chu tuhtang tan, ati. Chuin Pakai vantil chu Jebus mi Araunah pholla chun aumin ahi." 
2Samuel24:17 Chuin David'in mipi ho sumang dinga vantil chu amuphatnin, Pakai henga, Ven keima giloutah-in kanachonin, kachonse tai: ahinla hiche kelngoiho hin ipiham abollu? nahenga katao ahi, nakhut chu keima le kapa insung dounan chujohen, ati." 
2Samuel24:18 Chule hicheni chun David henga Gad ahungin, ajah-a, Kipatdoh-in, Jebus mi Araunah pholmuna khun Pakai dingin maicham khat gasemin, ati." 
2Samuel24:19 Chuin Pakai thupeh le Gad seidung juijin David achetoutan ahi. 
2Samuel24:20 Chuin Araunah'in aven ahile lengpa le asohte chu ahenglama ahung amun ahi. Chuin Araunah chu achedoh-in, lengpa masanga chun tolla amai asulut tan ahi." 
2Samuel24:21 Chuin Araunah'in, Ipi dinga ka pakai lengpa hi asoh henga hunga ham? ati. Chuin David'in, Mipi ho-a kona natset suhtanga aumna dinga, Pakaiya dinga maicham khat semna dinga nachangphol chodinga hunga kahi, ati." 
2Samuel24:22 Chuin Araunah'in David henga, Ka pakai lengpan aman phante atibang chun kilah henlang pejenghen: Ven, hikoma hin govam thilto-a toding bongchal, chule thinga manding changphola manchah ho le bongchal manchah dangho aumin ahi." 
2Samuel24:23 Hicheho jousehi Araunah'in lengpa dinga abola apehdoh ahi, ati. Chuin Araunah'in lengpa henga, Pakai na-Pathen'in nasanpehhen, ati." 
2Samuel24:24 Chuin lengpan Araunah henga, Ahipoi, keiman thonlouva nangma-a kona aman uma kachoh ding ahi: chule keiman imacha suhmang louhela Pakai ka-Pathen henga govam thilto katolou ding ahi, ati. Hitichun David'in changphol le bongchalho chu dangka shekel somnga in achotan ahi." 
2Samuel24:25 Chuin David'in hia chun Pakaiya dingin maicham khat asemin, govam thilto hole chamna thiltoho atohtan ahi. Hitichun Pakaiyin gamsung taona chu angaipeh-in, chule Israelte lah-a konin natset chu akitolmang tan ahi." 
1Kings1:1 Tun leng David chu ateh-in kum tamtah ahitan, chuin pon tamtah asilpeh-un, ahinla lum asajoupoi." 
1Kings1:2 Hijeh chun asohten ahenga, ka pakai lengpa dingin khangdong nungah theng khat kihol hen, amanu lengpa anga dinghen lang, vesuihen lang, chule ka pakai lengpa tilumthei nadin, na-anga lumjihen, atiuve." 
1Kings1:3 Chutichun amahon Israel gamsung pumpi-a nungah hoitah khat aholuvin ahile, Shunam mi Abishag amuvin, lengpa henga ahinpui taove." 
1Kings1:4 Nungahnu chu ahoilheh jengin, lengpa chu avesuijin, ajenletan ahi. Ahinla lengpan amanu chu akitimatpi pon ahi." 
1Kings1:5 Chuphatnin Haggith chapa Adonijah chu ama akichoisangin, keima kalengchan ding ahi, tin kangtalai ho le sakol touthemho, chule mi somnga amasanga lhaidin akigottan ahi." 
1Kings1:6 Chule apan, ibola hitobang nabol ham? tin adongin alungnatsah khapoi. Amapa hi mi melhoitah jong ahin, anun Absalom nunga ahin ahi." 
1Kings1:7 Chule aman Zeruiah chapa Joab le Abiathar thempu chu ana kihoutoh pin, chule amanin Adonijah ajoplhonin, akithopi lhonin ahi." 
1Kings1:8 Ahinla Zadok thempu, Jehoida chapa Benaiah, Nathan themgao, Shimai, Rei chule David mihangsan ho vangchu Adonijah toh apangkhom pouvin ahi." 
1Kings1:9 Chuin Adonijah'in kelngoiho, bongchalho, chule gancha thao ho Enrogel koma um Zohaleth songpi chunga chun athatnin; leng chapate asopiho jouse le Judah gama lengpa lhachaho jouse akouvin;" 
1Kings1:10 Ahin Nathan themgao, Benaiah, mihangsan ho le asopipa Solomon vang akoupon ahi." 
1Kings1:11 Hijeh chun Nathan'in Solomon nu Bethsheba jah-a, Haggith chapa Adonijah alengchana, ipu David'in ahetlou khu najahdoh louham?" 
1Kings1:12 Hijeh chun tun hungin, katao ahi, nangmatah hinkhole nachapa Solomon hinkho huhdoh theina din thumopming kate." 
1Kings1:13 Leng David henga lutnin lang, ajah-a, kapu vo lengpa nasohnu henga thonlouva nachapa Solomon kakhela lengchanga, kalaltouna-a touding ahi tia nana kihahsel hilouham? Ibola Adonijah lengchanga hitam? tin gaseijin ati." 
1Kings1:14 Vetan, lengpa toh nakihou laitahle, keima jong nanunga hunging ting, nathusei kahung suhdet ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings1:15 Chuin Bethsheba chu lengpa henga indan sunga chun aluttai. Lengpa chu atehlheh jengtan, chule Shunam mi Abishag chun lengpa chu ajenlen ahi." 
1Kings1:16 Chuin Bethsheba chu aboh khupmin, lengpa chu janan chibai abohtai. Chuin lengpan, ipi nangaichat ham? anati." 
1Kings1:17 Amanun ajah-a, ka pakai, nangman nasohnu henga Pakai na Pathen min panin, kanungle nachapa Solomon thonlouva lengchanga, kalaltouna chunga touding ahi, tin nana kihahsel in ahi." 
1Kings1:18 Chule tun, vetan, Adonijah alengchang tan; chule tun, ka pakai lengpan hichu nahepoi." 
1Kings1:19 Aman bongchalho, gancha thao ho, chule kelngoiho nengtah-in athatnin; lengpa chapate jousele Abiathar thempu chule sepai janel gallamkai Joab akouvin, ahin nasoh Solomon vang akoupon ahi." 
1Kings1:20 Chule nangma, ka pakai, vo lengpa, nangma nunga ka pakai laltouna-a chu koi hungtou dingham ti naseipeh dingu ngah-in, Israel chate jouse mit chu nangma chunga aume." 
1Kings1:21 Achutiloule hung hitiding ahi, ka pakai lengpa hi apu apate toh ahung lupkhom tengle, keile kachapa Solomon hi mi kisuhmosah-a eiki simlhon ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings1:22 Chule veuvin, amanu lengpa toh akihou petnin, Nathan themgao jong chu ahunglut tan ahi." 
1Kings1:23 Chuin amahon lengpa ahilun, Nathan themgao ahunge, atiuve. Ama lengpa ang ahunglut phatnin lengpa anga akunin amai tolah asulut tai." 
1Kings1:24 Chuin Nathan'in aseijin, ka pakai, vo ka lengpa, nangman kanungle Adonijah hi kalaltouna-a touding, chuleh vai ahomding ahi tia naseikhah ham?" 
1Kings1:25 Ajehchu ama tuni hin achesuh-in, bongchalle gancha thao chule kelngoi nengtah-in athatnin, leng chapate jouse, janel gallamkai, chule Abiathar thempu akouvin; chule vetan, amasanga aneuvin adonun, Pathen'in Adonijah lengpa huhhing hen atiuve." 
1Kings1:26 Ahinla keima, nasoh keimatah jengjong, chule Zadok thempu, Jehoida chapa Benaiah, chule nasoh Solomon vang akoupon ahi." 
1Kings1:27 Hiche thilhi kapu lengpan nabol hija, kapu lengpa nunga alaltouna chunga koi atouding nasohpa henga nahetsah lou khattou ham? atin ahi." 
1Kings1:28 Chuphatnin David lengpan adonbutnin, Bethsheba chu kahenga dingin hinkou lutnun, ati. Chutichun amanu lengpa angsunga ahunglutnin, lengpa angah adingtai." 
1Kings1:29 Chuin lengpa akihahselin, lung gentheina jouse-a kona kahinna eilhatdoh jingjeng Pakai chu ahinjing bangin," 
1Kings1:30 Keiman nahenga Pakai Israel Pathen mina kana kihahsela, thonlouva nachapa Solomon keima nunga lengchanga, keima khela kalaltouna chunga touding ahi, tia kanasei banga, tunikho-a hi chutia chu kabol tahbeh ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings1:31 Chuphatnin Bethsheba'in amai tolah asulutnin, lengpa jana apen, kapu David lengpa a-imatih-in hingjing hen, ati." 
1Kings1:32 Chuin David lengpan Zadok thempu, Nathan themgao, chule Jehoiadah chapa Benaiah chu kahenga dingin hinkoulut nun ati. Chuin amaho lengpa henga ahungtaovin ahi." 
1Kings1:33 Lengpan jong amaho henga, napu sohte hi puijun lang, kachapa Solomon chu kasakol chunga tousah unlang, Gihon'a puisuh-un;" 
1Kings1:34 Chule Zadok thempupa le Nathan themgaovin hikoma chun Israel chunga leng dingin thao nulhon hen; chule nanghon sumkon mut un lang, Solomon lengpa Pathen'in huhhing hen, tiuvin." 
1Kings1:35 Chujoule ama kalaltouna-a atoutheina dingin, nanghon anung hinjui touvun; ajehchu kei khella ama lenga pangding ahi. Chule keiman ama Israel le Judah chunga vaipo dinga katun ahitai, ati." 
1Kings1:36 Chuin Jahoiada chapa Benaiah chun lengpa adonbutnin, Amen, kapu lengpa Pakai Pathen'in jong chutichun seihen." 
1Kings1:37 Pakaiyin kapu lengpa anaumpi bangin, Solomon jong umpi henlang, alaltouna chu kapu David laltouna sanga lenjon sempeh hen, ati." 
1Kings1:38 Hitichun Zadok thempu, Nathan themgao, Jahoiada chapa Benaiah, Chereth mite, chule Paleth mite achesuh-un, David lengpa sakol chunga chun Solomon atousah-un, Gihon'a ahinpui taovin ahi." 
1Kings1:39 Chuin Zadok thempu chun houbuh-a konin thao koina saki khat aladoh-in, Solomon chu anutai. Chuin amahon sumkon amutnun; mijouse chun, Pathen'in Solomon lengpa huhhing hen, atiuve." 
1Kings1:40 Chuin mipi jouse anunga akitol touvun, mipin kuli amutnun, hachangpan akipah-un, hitichun ahusaovin leiset akithing leovin ahi." 
1Kings1:41 Chuin Adonijah le ajinho jousen a-anneh jouvun hichu ajataovin ahi. Chuin Joab'in sumkon gin ajah phatnin, ipidinga khopi sunga awgin kithong lenglung ham? atin ahi." 
1Kings1:42 Aman hichu asei nalaijin, veuvin, Abiathar thempu chapa Jonathan ahunge; chuin Adonijah'in ajah-a, hunglutnin, nang mihangsan nahin, kipanathu nahinpoi, ati." 
1Kings1:43 Chuin Jonathan'in Adonijah adonbutnin, tahbeh-in ipu David'in Solomon lengin asemtai, ati." 
1Kings1:44 Chule lengpan Zadok thempu, Nathan themgao, Jehoiada chapa Benaiah, Chereth mite, chule Peleth mite chu amatoh asolin, amahon amachu lengpa sakol chunga atousah-un;" 
1Kings1:45 Zadok thempu le Nathan themgaovin amachu Gihon'a lengdin thao anulhonin, amaho chua kona thanom tah-a hungtou uva, hijeh-a chu ahusan uva khopi kithonga ahi. Nanghon najah-u hi hiche husa chu ahi." 
1Kings1:46 Chule Solomon jong lenggam laltouna achun atoutan ahi. 
1Kings1:47 Chukalvalin lengpa sohte chu ipu David lengpa phattheiboh dingin ahungun, Pathen'in nangma min sangin Solomon min chu kithansah johenlang, chule alaltouna chu nangma laltouna sanga lenjon semhen atiuve. Chule lengpa chu alupna chunga akunjin ahi." 
1Kings1:48 Chule lengpan jong, kamitnin amu petna, tunikho-a kalaltouna-a touding mikhat eipe-a Israel Pakai Pathen chu nunnom hen, tin aseije, ati." 
1Kings1:49 Chuin Adonijah toh umkhom ajinho jouse akicha taovin, akipat doh-un, mijouse amadoncheh-a achedoh taove." 
1Kings1:50 Chule Adonijah chu Solomon jeh-in atijan, akipatnin, achen, maicham ki hochu atuh dentan ahi." 
1Kings1:51 Chuin hichu Solomon aseipeh-un, veuvin, Adonijah'in Solomon lengpa akichatai; ajehchu, vetan, aman maicham ki hochu atuh-in, Solomon lengpan asohpa chemjam'a atha louna dingin tuni hin kahenga kihahsel hen atie, atiuve." 
1Kings1:52 Chuin Solomon'in, aman mi tahsan um ahina avetsah-a ahile asamjang khat jong tolla lhalou ding ahi; amavang ama-a khangitlouna akimu dohle, thiteiding ahi, ati." 
1Kings1:53 Chutichun leng Solomon chun mi asolin, amahon maichama konin ahin puisuh taove. Chuin ama ahungsuh-in Solomon henga chun abohkhuptan; chuin Solomon'in ajah-a, na inlama chetan, ati." 
1Kings2:1 Tun David thi nading nikho chu anaitan; aman achapa Solomon chu athupeh-in, ajah-a," 
1Kings2:2 Keima leiset pumpi chena lampi-a chu cheding kahitai; hijeh chun hatninlang, pasal nahina chu tahlangin." 
1Kings2:3 Chule Pakai na Pathen thupeh chu nit jingin; Mosi lekhabua kisun bangin alampiho juijin, adan kisunho, adan thupeh ho, athutan lhahho le, ahetthohsahna ho nitjingin; chutile nakihei nalam jouse le nabol jouse-a naphatthei ding;" 
1Kings2:4 Chutiachu Pakaiyin keima chungchanga, nachaten alung pumpiu le ahinna pumpiuva kamasanga thutah-a achonna dinguva, akalsona lampi houva achihthei uva ahile, Israel laltouna-a touding kiphasam louva nanei ding ahi, tia anaseichu aguilhunsah ding ahi." 
1Kings2:5 Chukal vallin Zeruiah chapa Joab'in kachunga athilbol, chule Israel janel gallamkai teni, Ner chapa Abner le Jether chapa Amasa atha-a, achung hona athilbol; chamna aumlaija gal thisan aso-a, akonga agah konggah chungle akenga akibu kengkoh chunga gal thisan anu chu nangman nahen ahi." 
1Kings2:6 Hijeh chun nachihna bangtah-in bolinlang, alukan nung hijongle lungmong tah-in lhankhuh-a chesuhsah hih-in." 
1Kings2:7 Ahinla Gilead mite Barzilai chapate henga chun lungsetna chu musah inlang, nadokhanga an neho lah-a chun amahochu ankong umsah-in; ajehchu nasopipa Absalom jeh-a kajamle laijin kakoma ahungun ahi." 
1Kings2:8 Chule ven, Mahanaim'a kache petna gaosapna khohtah eina gaosap, Bahurim'a cheng Benjamin son Gera chapa Shimei chu nahenga uma ahi. Ahinla Jordan'ah eikimupidin ahungsuh-in, keiman Pakai minin kahahselin, chemjamin that ponge kanatin ahi." 
1Kings2:9 Hijeh chun tun ama mona beijin koihih-in; ajehchu miching nahin, achunga ipi bolding ahi nahenai; Ahin alukan nung hijongle thisan puma lhankhuh najotsah ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings2:10 Chutichun David chu apu apate toh analum khomin, David khopi-a anavuitaove." 
1Kings2:11 Chule David'in Israelte chunga lengvai anapoh sung chu kum somli ahin, Hebron'ah kum sagi analeng changin, Jerusalem'a kum somthum le kumthum ana lengchange." 
1Kings2:12 Chujouvin Solomon chu apa David laltouna-a atouvin; chule alenggam lentah-in anaki phutdoh tai. 
1Kings2:13 Chuin Haggith chapa Adonijah chu Solomon nu Bethsheba henga ahungin ahi. Amanun ajah-a, chamdela nahung hinam? tin adongin ahile, amapan, chamdelin kahung nai, ati." 
1Kings2:14 Chukalvalin aman amanu jah-a, nahenga seinom themkhat kaneije, ati. Amanun ajah-a, seijin, ati." 
1Kings2:15 Hichun amapan, lenggam chu keija ahi-a, chule Israelte jousen jong keima lengvai poding ahi tia eivet cheh-u ahi ti nangman nahenai; hijongle lenggam chu akiheidoh-in, kasopipa-a ahunghitai. Ajehchu Pakaiya kona hichu ama-a hija ahi." 
1Kings2:16 Chule tun nahenga ngehnom khat kaneijin, nei itpeh hihbeh-in, ati. Chuin amanun, seijin, ati." 
1Kings2:17 Chuin aman katao ahi, Solomon lengpa henga Shunam mi Abishag khu kaji dingin neithum peh-in, (ajeh chu aman nathu nelponte,) ati." 
1Kings2:18 Chuin Bethsheba'n, aphai, lengpa henga nangma-a dingin seipeh nange, ati." 
1Kings2:19 Hijeh chun Bethsheba chu Adonijah'a dinga seipeh dingin Solomon lengpa henga achetai. Chuin lengpa amanu kimuto pidin akipatdoh-in, a-anga akunin, chuin alaltouna-a atouvin, chule lengpa nu-a ding chun laltouna ado sah-in; akhutjet lama chun atoutai." 
1Kings2:20 Chuin amanun ajah-a, nangma henga ngehna neokhat kanei nome; katao ahi, kanompoi neitipeh hih-in, ati. Chuin lengpan amanu henga, thumin, kanu, ajehchu kanompoi tipeh ponge, ati." 
1Kings2:21 Chuin amanun, Shunam mi Abishag hi nasopipa Adonijah ji dingin kipehen, ati." 
1Kings2:22 Chuin leng Solomon'in anu adonbutnin, ibola Shunam mi Abishag chu Adonijah ji dinga nathum ham? ama dingin lenggam jonghi thumin; ajehchu ama ka upa ahi; amadingin, Abiathar thempu dingin, chule Zeruiah chapa Joab dinjong thumin, ati." 
1Kings2:23 Chujouvin Solomon lengpa Pakaiya akihahselin, Adonijah'in ama hinkho douna-a hiche thuhi aseilou hileh, Pathen'in kachunga chutichun bolhen, chukalvallin jong bolhen." 
1Kings2:24 Hijeh chun tun, Pakai ahin jing bangin, athutep bangtah-a eitungdoh-a, kapa David laltouna-a eitousah-a, insungkhat eisempehpa mina kahahsel ahi; tunikho-a hi Adonijah thi teitei ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings2:25 Chuin Solomon lengpan Jehoiada chapa Benaiah chu asolin, ama achunga achun athat tai." 
1Kings2:26 Chuin lengpan Abiathar thempu henga, nangma Anathoth kho na inle lou mun'a kichetan, athidinga lom nahi; kapa David masanga Pakai Pathen kitepna thingkhong naput jehle, kapa kibolgimna chana kibolgim nahi jeh-in, tuchunghin thatponge, ati." 
1Kings2:27 Chutichun Pakaiyin Shiloh'a Eli insung thudol anaseichu aguilhunsah theina dingin; Solomon'in Abiathar chu Pakai thempu ahina chu ahaisahtai. 
1Kings2:28 Chujouvin Joab henga thu ahung lhungtai: ajehchu ama Absalom lama kiheihih jongle Joab chu Adonijah lama akiheija ahi. Hijeh chun Joab chu Pakai houbuh lama ajamin, maicham sakiho chu atuhchah tai." 
1Kings2:29 Chuin, Joab chu Pakai houbuh lama ajamin, chule ven, maicham koma aume, tin Solomon lengpa aseipeh taove. Hichun Solomon'in Jehoiada chapa Benaiah asolin, chenlang gathatnin, ati." 
1Kings2:30 Chuin Pakai houbuh phunga Benaiah ahungin, ahenga, lengpan hung doh-in ati, tin agaseijin ahi. Ahin aman, kanompoi, hikoma hin thijonge, ati. Chuin Benaiah'in lengpa thu ahetsah kitnin, Joab'in hitin aseijin, hitin eidonbutne, ati." 
1Kings2:31 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, aseibang bangin boljengin, that inlang vuitan; chutile keima le kapa insunga kona monabei thisan Joab'in asochu nalahmang theiding ahi." 
1Kings2:32 Chule ama sanga dihjo le phajo mini, Ner chapa Abner Israel janel gallamkai le Jether chapa Judah janel gallamkai Amasa chu kapa David hetlouva achemjama athajeh-a, Pakaiyin athisan chu ama luchung tah-a achuhsah ding ahi." 
1Kings2:33 Hijeh-a chu amani thisan chu Joab luchangle achilhahte luchunga a-itih-a dinga hungkile ding ahin; ahinla David chungle achilhahte chung, insung mite chungle alaltouna chunga vang Pakaiya kona a-itih a chamna leng ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings2:34 Hitichun Jehoiada chapa Benaiah achetouvin, achunga achun, athattai. Chule gamthipma amatah in'a akivui tan ahi." 
1Kings2:35 Chuin lengpan Jehoida chapa Benaiah chu ama khelin janel chunga vaihomin akoijin; chule Zadok thempu chu Abiathar mun'a akoitan ahi. 
1Kings2:36 Chuin lengpan Shimei kouding asolin, ajah-a, Jerusalem'a inkhat kisah-in lang chuachun chengin, chua konin hoima danga chedoh hih-in." 
1Kings2:37 Ajehchu hitiding ahi, nangma nachedoh-a Kidron vachadung nagalkai ninile, nangma thonlouva nathi teiding ahi ti kihetnin; nathisan chu nangmatah luchunga chuding ahi, ati." 
1Kings2:38 Chuin Shimei'in lengpa henga, akiseichu aphai; kapu lengpan nasei bangin nasohpan bollinge, ati. Chuin Shimei Jerusalem'a nitamtah achengtai." 
1Kings2:39 Chuin kumthum jouvin ahitin ahi, Shimei sohte mini Gath lengpa Maachah chapa Achish henga ajammang lhontai. Chule Shimei koma, ven, nasoh teni Gath'a aumlhone, tin aseipeh taove." 
1Kings2:40 Chuin Shimei akipatnin, asangan chunga atouvin, Gath'a Achish henga asohteni hollin achetai; chuin Shimei achen, asohteni chu Gath'a konin ahinpuitai." 
1Kings2:41 Chule Shimei Jerusalem'a konin Gath'a achen, ahungkile kit tai tin Solomon aseipeh taovin ahi." 
1Kings2:42 Chuin lengpan Shimei kouding mi asolin, ajah-a, keiman Pakai mina kaki hahsel sah-a, nangma napotdoh-a, mundanga navadoh ninileh nathi teiteiding ahi, chentah-in kihetnin, tia kagihsa nahi hilouham? chule nangman kajah-a, kathujah hohi aphai natin ahi." 
1Kings2:43 Achutile ibola Pakaiya kihahselna le, thupeh kapeh chu nitlouva nahim?" 
1Kings2:44 Chukal valin lengpan Shimei jah-a, kapa David nabolna gitlouna jouse nahen, nalung gilin nahetpeh-e; hijeh chun nagitlouna chu Pakaiyin nangmatah luchunga achuhsah ding ahi." 
1Kings2:45 Chule Leng Solomon vang nunnom mintin, chule leng David laltouna chu Pakai angsunga tonsotna phudetna umding ahi, ati." 
1Kings2:46 Chuti chun lengpan Jehoiada chapa Benaiah thu apen; ama apotdoh-in, achunga achun, athat tai. Chule lenggam chu Solomon khutna akiphutdet tai." 
1Kings3:1 Chuin Solomon'in Egypt lengpa Pharoah toh kihet them tona abolin, Pharoah chanu akichenpin, ama inding, Pakai inding, chule Jerusalem kimvella bang asah chaisoh kahse-a dingin, David khopi sunga chun akipui luttai." 
1Kings3:2 Pakai mina in akisah loulai jeh-in, hiche nikho geija chun mihon munsang ho-a kilhaina abol jiuvin ahi." 
1Kings3:3 Chule Solomon'in Pakai angailun, apa David chonnadan anitjingin; amavang munsang ho-a kilhainale gimnamtui halna aboljin ahi." 
1Kings3:4 Chuin lengpa Gibeon'a ganlhaina boldin achetai; ajehchu hikom munchu munsang thupipen ahi. Solomon'in hiche maicham chunga chun govam thilto sangkhat jen atoh-in ahi. 
1Kings3:5 Gibeon mun'a Pakai chu jan-in Solomon manga ahung kilah-in; chule Pathen'in, thumin ipi kapeh ding nahim, ati." 
1Kings3:6 Chuin Solomon'in, Nangman nasoh kapa David namasanga thutah-a, chonphatna-a, chule lung dihtah pu-a nangma toh aum jeh-in, achunga hepina lentah nanamu sah-in; ama khohsahna jal-in hiche hepina chu nakoi jom jingin, tunikho-a banghin alaltouna-a touding chapa khat nanapetan ahi." 
1Kings3:7 Chule tun, vo Pakai ka Pathen, nangman nasohhi kapa David khelin lengin neisemtan, hinla keimala chapang neocha kahin; vaikonje vailhunje helou kahi." 
1Kings3:8 Chule nasohhi nalhendoh mite, mipi tamtah, atamjeh uva simjouhoi hiloule ajat hetjouhoi hilou lah-a hin kaumme." 
1Kings3:9 Hijeh chun nasohhin, asele apha kakhentoh theija, namite vai kahom thei nadin, hetkhen themna lung neipen; ajehchu hibanga tam namite hi kon vai ahom thei dingham? ati." 
1Kings3:10 Solomon'in hiche thil athumna-a athuseihin Pakai alunglhaisah lheh jengin ahi. 
1Kings3:11 Chuin Pathen'in ajah-a, nangman hiche thil nathuma, na hinkhosot nading, nahao nading, ahiloule namelmate hinkho ding thumlouva, nangman vaihom themna dinga hetkhenthem theinajoh nathum jeh-in," 
1Kings3:12 Vetan, nathusei bang bangin kabolpeh tai. Ven, chihna le hetkhenthem theina lungthim kapeh nahitai; chutia chu namasanga jong nangma tobang ana um khalou, chule nanunga jong nangma tobang himhim hung umkit talou ding ahi." 
1Kings3:13 Chule nahin laise-a lengho lah-a nangma tobang himhim aum louhel nadingin, nangman nathumlou haonale jabolna jong kapehthan ahi" 
1Kings3:14 Chule kadan kisunho le kadan thupeh ho nanitna, napa David'in ajui banga, kalampiho najuija ahile, nahinkho kasotsah ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings3:15 Chuin Solomon akhangtan ahileh, veuvin hichu amang anahi. Chuin ama Jerusalem'a ahungin, Pakai kitepna thingkhong masanga adingin, govam thilto le chamna thiltoho atoh-in, asohte jouse golvah khat abolpeh-in ahi." 
1Kings3:16 Chujouvin lengpa hengah numei kijoh ni ahunglhonin, chule a-angsunga ading lhonnin ahi." 
1Kings3:17 Chuin numei khatnu chun, Vo ka pakai, keile hichenu hi inkhatna kacheng lhonin; insunga amatoh kaum petnin cha khat kahingin ahi." 
1Kings3:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, kacha hinjou anithumnin, hiche numeinu jonghin cha ahingin ahi. Hitichun ka umkhom lhonin, hiche insunga chu keini tilou midang koimacha toh kaum khom louvu ahi." 
1Kings3:19 Chule hichenun anaocha chu adelpha khah jeh-in, jan-in ana thitan ahi." 
1Kings3:20 Chuin jankhangin amanu athouvin, nasohnu ka-imut petnin kachapa kakoma konin akilah-in, apotnin a-anga alupsah-in, ama cha athisa chu keima angngah analupsah tan ahi." 
1Kings3:21 Chuin kanao noi chepsah dinga jingkah-a katho phatnin, vetan, athisa anahitai. Ahinla jingkah-a hoitah-a kavetchetna ahile, vetan, keiman kahin kachapa chu anahitapon ahi, ati." 
1Kings3:22 Chuin numei khatjonu chun, ahipoi; ahingjoh chu keichapa ahin, athi chu nang chapa ahi, ati. Chuin amasanu chun, ahipoi; athijoh chu nang chapa ahin, ahing chu kei chapa ahi, ati. Hitichun anilhon chun lengpa angsunga asei lhontan ahi." 
1Kings3:23 Chujouvin lengpan, khatnin ahinghi keicha ahin, athi hi nang chapa ahi natilhon in; chule khatnin, ahipoi, athijoh chu nang chapa ahin, athilou chu keichapa ahi natilhone, tin aseije." 
1Kings3:24 Chuin lengpan, chemjam khat neihin peuvin, ati. Chuin lengpa anga chun chemjam khat ahinchoi taovin ahi." 
1Kings3:25 Chuin lengpan, naosen ahingjoh chu bongni souvin, bongkhat lamchu khat peuvinlang, chule bong khat lamchu khat jonu peuvin, ati." 
1Kings3:26 Chuphatnin naosen hingnu johchun lengpa jah-a, achapa alaigilga akhotona jeh-in, vo ka pakai, naosen hing chu amanu chu petan, thathih beh-un, ati. Ahinla khatjonu chun, keija jong hida henlang nanga jong hida hen, bongni souvin, atitai." 
1Kings3:27 Chuphatnin lengpan adonbutnin, naosen hingchu amasajonu, that hih beh-un tinu chu peuvin, amanu chu ahinga anu ahi, atitai." 
1Kings3:28 Chuin Israelte jousen lengpa thutanlhah danchu ajataovin; lengpa chu akichataove; ajehchu amahon thutan nadinga Pathen chihna ama-a aumchu amutaovin ahi. 
1Kings4:1 Chutichun Solomon lengpa Israel pumpi chunga leng anahi. 
1Kings4:2 Chule hichehohi amilen neiho chu ahiuve: Zadok chapa Azariah chu Thempu ahin," 
1Kings4:3 Elihoreph, le Shisha chapa Ahijah chu lekhasun ahin; Ahilud chapa Jehoshaphat chu thuching ahi." 
1Kings4:4 Chule Jehoiada chapa Benaiah chu janel gallamkai ahin; chule Zadok le Abiathar chu thempu ahilhone. 
1Kings4:5 Nathan chapa Azariah chu lamkaiho chunga ahin; Nathan chapa Zabud chu thempu le lengpa golpa ahi. 
1Kings4:6 Ahishar chu insung vaipo ahin; Abda chapa Adoniram chu sele kai choiho chunga vaipo ahi. 
1Kings4:7 Chule Solomon'in Israel pumpi chunga chun lamkai somleni aneijin, amaho chun lengpa le a-inkote dinga nehle chah angaito jiuvin; mikhatnin kumkhatna lhakhat sung nehding angaito cheh jiu ahi." 
1Kings4:8 Hichehi aminu ahi: Hur chapa chun Ephraim molsang apon," 
1Kings4:9 Derek chapa chu Makaz, Shaalbim, Bethshemesh chule Elonbethhanan mun apon;" 
1Kings4:10 Hesed chapa chu Aruboth, Sochoh le Hepher gamsung pumpi apon;" 
1Kings4:11 Abinadab chapa chun Solomon chanu Taphath jin aneijin, Dor gamkol apumpi apon;" 
1Kings4:12 Ahilud chapa Baana chun Taanach, Megiddo, Bethshean pumpi, Jezreel noija Zarthanah koma um Bethshean'a pat Abel-meholah gei, Jokmeam gallam mungeijin apon;" 
1Kings4:13 Geber chapa chun Ramoth-gilead, Gilead'a umho Manasseh chapa Jair khopiho chu ama-a ahin, Bashana um Argob gamkai jong ama-a ahin, banghole akotgol ho sum-enga kisem cheh khopilen somgup ahin ahi." 
1Kings4:14 Iddo chapa Ahinadab'in Mahanaim apon; 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz'in Naphtali apon; Solomon chanu Bashemath chu jidin akipuijin ahi. 
1Kings4:16 Hushai chapa Baanah chun Asher le Aloth-a apo-in; 
1Kings4:17 Paruah chapa Jehoshaphat'in Issachar gamsung apon; 
1Kings4:18 Ela chapa Shimei chun Benjamin gamsung; 
1Kings4:19 Uri chapa Geber chun Gilead gamsung, Bashan lengpa Og chule Amor mite lengpa Sihon gamsung chu apon ahi. Chule agamsunga chu ama sehseh bou gamvaipo hia ahi." 
1Kings4:20 Judah le Israel chu luipi kama neldi bangin atamlheh-un, aneuvin adonun, chule nop abollun ahi." 
1Kings4:21 Chule Solomon chu luipi apat Philistine gamgi, chule Egypt gamgi chin geija lenggam jouse chunga chun vai ahomin; amahon thilpeh ahinchoijun, Solomon chu ahin laisen ajenun ahi." 
1Kings4:22 Solomon nikhat anneh chu changbong neljet tena somthum, chule changbong an tena somgup ahi." 
1Kings4:23 Sakhi chalho, sapeng chalho, sakhi gol, chule vacha kivahthao ho tilouvin; bongchal thao som, hamdonga kivah bongchal somni, chule kelngoi jakhat ahi." 
1Kings4:24 Ajehchu aman luipipang hilamsang gamkai pumpi, Tiphsah apat Azzah gei, luipang hilamsang lengho jouse chunga lengvai apoh ahin; akimvel jouse toh chamna aneijin ahi." 
1Kings4:25 Chule Judah le Israel chu Dan'a pat Beersheba geijin Solomon hinlaisen amitakip alengpi phungle atheichang phung noija mongtah-in achengun ahi. 
1Kings4:26 Chuin Solomon'in asakol kangtalai koinadin in sangsomli aneijin, chule sakol touthem mi sangsom le sangni aneije." 
1Kings4:27 Chule vaipiho chu amitakipmin alha seh-in Solomon dingle, Solomon lengpa dokhanga hungjouse dingin nehding ahin peuvin; amaho ima alhasam pouve." 
1Kings4:28 Amitakipmin akinganse dungjuijin sakolhole gancha kaljangho ding chun, sakolchang le changpol ahinpo jingun ahi." 
1Kings4:29 Chuin Pathen'in Solomon chu chihna le hetthem theina nasatah, chule lungletna twipi panga neldi banghela tamin apen ahi." 
1Kings4:30 Chule Solomon chihna chun solam gam chate chihnale, Egypt pumpi chihna jouse akhokheltan ahi." 
1Kings4:31 Ajehchu ama mijouse sangin achingin; Ezrah mi Etham, Heman, Chalcol chule Derda, Mahol chapate sangin achingjon, chule akimvela namjouse lah-a akithangtan ahi." 
1Kings4:31 Ajehchu ama mijouse sangin achingin; Ezrah mi Etham, Heman, Chalcol chule Derda, Mahol chapate sangin achingjon, chule akimvela namjouse lah-a akithangtan ahi." 
1Kings4:32 Aman thuchih sangthum aseijin; chule la anabol chu sangkhat le nga ahi. 
1Kings4:33 Chule thingphung jouse, Lebanon'a um cedar thinga pat, kulbanga kona hung kehdoh hyssop changeijin anaseijin; aman gamsaho, vachaho, a-opma kitholho, chule ngaho thu jong anaseije." 
1Kings4:34 Ama chihna anajakha-a leiset lengho jouse-a konin, Solomon chihna ngai dingin namtin ahung jiuvin ahi." 
1Kings5:1 Chule apa indan sunga amahon amachu lengdin thao anuve ti ajah jeh-in, Tyre lengpa Hiram'in asohteho Solomon henga asoltan ahi. Ajehchu Hiram chu a-itih-a David ngailu jing anahi." 
1Kings5:2 Chuin Solomon'in Hiram henga mi asolin, ajah-a hitin aseije," 
1Kings5:3 Pakaiyin amaho akengto noija akoi masangse-a, galmiten ama aumkimvel jing jeh uva, kapa David'in Pakai a-Pathen mina in iti anasah joulou ham ti nangman nahen ahi." 
1Kings5:4 Ahinla tun Pakai ka Pathen'in ningtina konin choldona eipetan, hijeh chun kidoupi jong hamsetna jong aumtapoi." 
1Kings5:5 Chule, vetan, Pakaiyin kapa David henga anasei, na indan sung nalaltouna-a katousah ding nachapa chun, keima mina in eisahpeh ding ahi, anati bangin, Pakai ka Pathen mina in sah ding kagon ahi." 
1Kings5:6 Hijeh chun tun Lebanon'a kona cedar thingho aphuh nadiuvin thu penlang; kasohte hi nangma sohte toh pangkhom untin, chule nanganse dungjuijin nasohte thaman keiman penange. Ajehchu Sidon mite banga thing tuthem kalah uvah aumpoi ti nahei, ati." 
1Kings5:7 Chuin ahitin ahi, Hiram'in Solomon thu ajah phatnin akipah lheh jengin, hiche mipi tamtah chunga chapa ching David pepa Pakai chu tuni hin nun nomhen, ati." 
1Kings5:8 Chuin Hiram'in Solomon henga mi asolin, neihin solnaho chu kangaiton, cedar thingle chahthing chungchanga nangaichat jouse chu bolnange." 
1Kings5:9 Kasohten Lebanon'a konin twipi geijin hintol lhaovintin; nangin neitepeh ding mungeijin twipia hintoling ting, chule chua chun sodohsah ing-katin, chua kona chu nangman nana kilah ding ahi. Chule ka insung nehding neipeh-a, kangaichat neisuh bulhit pehding ahi, ati." 
1Kings5:10 Chutichun Hiram'in Solomon chu angaichat jouse dungjuijin cedar thingle chahthing apetan ahi. 
1Kings5:11 Chuin Solomon'in Hiram chu a-insung anneh dingin suhlou chang tena sangsomni, chule thaotheng tena somni apen; hitichun Solomon'in akum akumin Hiram apejin ahi." 
1Kings5:12 Chuin Pakaiyin akitepna bangin Solomon chu chihna apen; chutichun Hiram le Solomon kah-a chamna aumin; amanin kiguijopna aneigel lhonne. 
1Kings5:13 Chuin Solomon lengpan Israel jouse lah-a konin natong honkhat aphutdoh-in; natonghon hochu pasal sangsomthum ahiuve. 
1Kings5:14 Chuin aman amaho chu Lebanon'a asolin, lhakhatna sangsom cheh-in akilhahsah-in; Lebanon'a lhakhat umjiuva, in'a lhani umji ahiuvin; chule Adoniram chu natongho vesuija pang ahi." 
1Kings5:15 Solomon'in molsang ho-a chun thilgih poho mi sangsomsagi aneijin, chule songkheng them mi sangsomget aneijin," 
1Kings5:16 Natohnaho chunga Solomon vaipo pipuiho tilouvin, natohna-a mipi ho chunga vaihom dingin mi sangthum leh jathum aneijin ahi." 
1Kings5:17 Chuin lengpan thu apen, inbul setna dingin song len tahtah, chule manlutahtah song kikhengho ahinpouvin ahi." 
1Kings5:18 Chuin Solomon insaho, Hiram insaho, chule Gebal mi song khengho chun hicheho chu akhengun, chutichun insah nadin thingle songho chu agong uvin ahi." 
1Kings6:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israel chate Egypt gama ahungpot doh-u kum jali le kum somget lhinkum, Israelte chunga Solomon alengchan kum li na, Zif lha, hichu alha ni chana ahin, Solomon'in Pakai houin ding chu asapan tan ahi." 
1Kings6:2 Pakai dinga Solomon lengpa houin sahchu adunglam tong somgup, availam tong somni, chule asanlam tong somthum ahi." 
1Kings6:3 Chule houin mailama ahongcha chu a-invai adungjuija adunglam tongsomni ahin, invailam amaichu tongsom ahi." 
1Kings6:4 Chule houin dinga chun bangkot jim vah lutna asemin ahi. 
1Kings6:5 Chule houin bang kimvela chun indan ahoi kimvelin, houin bangho jon kimvel, houin le houna mun'a chun indan ahoi kimvele." 
1Kings6:6 Dan noinungpen chu tong nga-in alenin, alai chu tong gupmin alenin, chule athumna chu tong sagin alenne. Inkamho chu inbangho-a akihendet lounadin inbang sunglama chun akingapna din akimvela chomcha adosah-e." 
1Kings6:7 Chule houin kisah sunga chu seh le heicha, ahiloule thih manchah gin insunga chu akijah louna dinga, insah na-a kimangcha songho chu kikheng tohsa-a hin kipolut ahi." 
1Kings6:8 Chuche danlai kotkhah chu houin jetlam sanga aumin; amaho chu kalbi-a danlailha-a chiu kaltoujiu, danlaija kona chu athumna-a kaltou jiu ahi." 
1Kings6:9 Hitichun houin chu asan, ajouvin, houin chu cedar thingtum le thingpeh-in atomin ahi." 
1Kings6:10 Aman houin jonna chun indanho asa-in, tong nga-a cheh-a sangin asan; hicheho chu houin chunga cedar thingtuma kingamin ahi." 
1Kings6:11 Chuin Pakai thu Solomon henga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije;" 
1Kings6:12 Nangman nasah houin chungchanga hin, kachonna dan kisunho najuija, kathutanho najopma, kathupeh ho jouse nanit na, hichu najuija ahile; napa David henga kanasei thu chu nachunga kalhunsah-a," 
1Kings6:13 Israel chate lah-a kachena, chule kami Israelte kanungsun louding ahi, ati." 
1Kings6:14 Chutichun Solomon'in in chu asan ajoutai. 
1Kings6:15 Chule houin sunglam bang ahin, lhong ahin, chuleh in chung ahin ceder thingpeh-in atomin; hiche chunga chun asunglam chu thingin atomin, inlhong chu chahthingpeh-in atomin ahi." 
1Kings6:16 Chule inbangho chu tongsomni cheh-in lhongle bangho chu cedar thingpeh-in asan; houna mun, muntheng chungnung jenga jongchun asunglam hititah chun abolin ahi." 
1Kings6:17 Chule chuche houin mai chu tong somlia saova ahi. 
1Kings6:18 Chule insung lama chun apah mumle apahlha pahcha banga kijem cedar thing aumin; aboncha cedar thinga kisem ahi, song khatcha muding aumpon ahi." 
1Kings6:19 Chule Pakai kitepna thingkhong koina dingin insung lama chun Pathen houna muntheng agongin ahi. 
1Kings6:20 Chule houna mun sunglam chu tong somni, atoa tong somni, alet tong somni, asan tong somni ahin, hichu sanathengin alonkhum cheh-in, chule cedar thing maicham chu chutima chun alonkhumin ahi." 
1Kings6:21 Chutichun Solomon'in insunglam chu sanathengin alonkhum sah-in; chule houna mun maicham chu sanaguijin indan khenna asemin, hichu sanatwi jin alonkhum sah-in ahi." 
1Kings6:22 Chuin houin pumpi chu injouse ajosoh kah-un sana alonkhumin, houna mun koma maicham pumpi jongchu sana-in alonkhumin ahi." 
1Kings6:23 Chule houna mun sunga chun olive thingin Cherubim ni, tongsom cheh-a sangin asemin ahi." 
1Kings6:24 Chule Cherub khatpa lhavingchu tong nga ahin, Cherub chompa lhaving chu tong nga ma ahi; khatpa lhaving monga pat, achompa lhaving mong geichu tongsom ahi." 
1Kings6:25 Chule Cherub chompa chu tongsom ahin, Cherub teni chu alet aneu kibangchet ahi." 
1Kings6:26 Cherub khat sandan chu tongsom ahin, Cherub khatpa jongchu chutima chu ahi." 
1Kings6:27 Chule Cherub teni chu insung nunga chun atungin, Cherubim teni lhaving chu akijahdoh gelin; chutima chun Cherub khatpa lhavingin bang langkhat chu atongkhan, alhaving lhonchu inlailung tah-a akigotkhan ahi." 
1Kings6:28 Chule Cherub teni chu sanatwijin kilonkhumin ahi. 
1Kings6:29 Chule inbang jouse kimvel chu Cherubim le lusuphung, pahcha, chule pahcha pahlhan asungle apo ajem hoijin ahi." 
1Kings6:30 Chule inlhong asungle apochu sanatwijin alonkhumin ahi. 
1Kings6:31 Chule houna mun lutnadin olive thingin kot asemin; kotchungle kotbang hochu bang hopnga-a hopkhatjen ahi. 
1Kings6:32 Chule kot teni chu olive thing ahigelin; achung lhonchu Cherubim le lusuphung, chule pahchapah phungin ajempolin, hihochu sanatwijin alonkhumin, Cherubim le lusu phungho chung chu sanatwi athekhumin ahi." 
1Kings6:33 Chutima chun houin kotbengho chu, bang hop li-a hopkhatjen olive thingin asemin ahi." 
1Kings6:34 Chule kot teni chu chahthinga kisem ahin; kotkhahpeh tenichu akilhepthei ahin, kot pheng chompa peh teni jongchu akilhepthei ahi." 
1Kings6:35 Hiche chungchu Cherubim le lusuphung, chule pahcha pahlhan ajemin; akijempah chungchu sanan atom nalaijin ahi." 
1Kings6:36 Houin sungnung chu song kikhen jolsa golthum, chule cedar thingtum golkhatnin asan ahi." 
1Kings6:37 Kum li lhina, Zif lha-a Pakai houin bul chu kiphutna ahin;" 
1Kings6:38 Chule kumsomle khatna, Bul lha, hichu lha getna ahin, houin pumpi chu akigon dungjui cheh-in akijou sohtan ahi. Chutichun hiche sahna-a chun kum sagi alutnin ahi." 
1Kings7:1 Ahin Solomon'in amatah in sahnan kumsomle kumthum alut sah-in, a-in chu abonchan ajoutai." 
1Kings7:2 Aman Lebanon gammang in jongchu asan: hichu adung tong jakhat, avai tong somnga, asanlam tong somthum ahin, cedar khom gol li kiphutna, hiche khomho chunga chu cedar thingtuma kisa-a ahi." 
1Kings7:3 Chule thingtumho chunga chu ceder thinga kikhu-a, khom somlenga cheh-a kigol, khom somli le nga chunga kisa-a ahi." 
1Kings7:4 Chule golthum na-a bangkot aumcheh-in, vahle vah chu golthumin akidongto cheh uve." 
1Kings7:5 Chule kotpi jousele khomho chu ningli cheh ahin, bangkot hotoh vahle vah chu golthumin akidongto cheh uve." 
1Kings7:6 Aman khomho neijin thutanna hongcha jongchu asemin, hichu asaodan tong somnga ahin, chule avai chu tong somthum ahi. Chule hongcha chu amai lama aumin, khom dangho leh inkam lentah chu amailam sanga aumin ahi." 
1Kings7:7 Chujouvin thu atan theinadin, laltouna hongcha asemin, thutanna hongcha jong asemin; hichu lhong langkhatna patna langkhat gei cedar thinga kikhu ahi." 
1Kings7:8 Chule achenna in hongcha sunga chun inhong chomkhat aneijin, hiche jongchu chutobang ma-a kisa ahi. Solomon'in hiche hongcha tobanghin, ajidinga akipui Pharoah chanu dingin jong inkhat asahpeh-in ahi." 
1Kings7:9 Hicheho jousehi akikheng songho, song atna-a ki-at, song mantam tah jenga kisa ahin, a-inbula patna aleh gei, asung apo, chule inpilen hongsung apolam geija chutia chu kisa ahi." 
1Kings7:10 Chule inbulchu song mantam tah ho, song len tahtah, tongsom chenga sao le tong get sao ho-a kise ahi." 
1Kings7:11 Chule achunglam chu song mantam tah ho, song kitetoh-a kikhengtoh ho, chule cedar thinga kisa ahi." 
1Kings7:12 Chule inlen chu akimvela song kikheng golthum le cedar thingtum golkhat kigola kisa ahin; Pakai indan sungnung le ahongcha jongchu chutobang ma-a chu kibola ahi. 
1Kings7:13 Chuin Solomon lengpan Tyre'a konin Hiram agapuisah-in ahi. 
1Kings7:14 Ama chu Naphtali phunga meithai khat chapa ahin, apa chu sum-eng kheng Tyre mi ahi. Amachu chihna le hetkhen themna dimset ahin, sum-eng khenalama thepna nei ahi. Chuin ama Solomon lengpa henga ahungin ana jouse chu atoh pehtai." 
1Kings7:15 Chuin aman tong somle tong getna sang sum-eng khomni alhan; chule aletdan chu tongsomle tongni cheh ahi. 
1Kings7:16 Chule khom teni vuma tundin, sum-eng kilhajol khom alujum ni asemin, khomjum khatchu tongnga asangin, khomjum khatpa jong tong ngama ahi." 
1Kings7:17 Chule khompiteni vuma khom lujum teni jeppahna dingin sum-eng guilen polchit chet asemin; khom lujum khatdin sagi ahin, chule khom lujum khatpa dingin jong sagima aseme." 
1Kings7:18 Aman khompiho asemin, avuma khom lujum teni khunadin kolbuthei lim lenvang golni asemin, chutimachun khom lujum khatpa jong abole." 
1Kings7:19 Chule hongcha khom vuma ajumchu molhoipah-in akijemin, tongli ahi." 
1Kings7:20 Chule khom lujum teni chunga apoh dontah-a avang silsel koma chun kolbuthei lim asemin; khom lujum ni kimvella chun kolbuthei lim jani agolin aumin ahi. 
1Kings7:21 Chuin khom hochu houin hongcha-a aphutnin; jetlam khom aphutdoh-in, hiche minchu Jachin asah-in; chule veilam khom chu aphutdoh-in, hiche minchu Boaz asah-in ahi." 
1Kings7:22 Chule khompi vuma chun molhoipah lim achongin, chutichun khom natoh akichaitai." 
1Kings7:23 Chuin twibem khat asemin, ageikhatna pat langkhat gei tongsom ahin; apuma kikolsoh ahin, asanlam tong nga ahin; chule akimvela kikolchu tong somthum ahi." 
1Kings7:24 Hiche ageinoi kimvel chu pahmun limin avelsoh-in, tongkhat sunga pahmun som cheh asemin, twibem chu pahmunin akolkhumin ahi; pahmunchu akisun chun golnin akisungin ahi." 
1Kings7:25 Hichu bongchal somleni chunga kingam ahin, thumin sahlam angan, thumin lhumlam angan, thumin simlam angan, thumin solam angat ahi. Twibem chu amaho chunga kikhang ahin, ameiju chun sunglam angat cheh ahi." 
1Kings7:26 Hichu asalam khutphang te-a sa ahin, ageichu khon gei tobang ahin molhoipah-a kijemin; asung chun twitena bath sangni adolin ahi." 
1Kings7:27 Chuin aman sum-eng khomtodom som asemin, khomtodom khat chu adung tongli ahin, avai tongli, chule asan chu tong thum ahi." 
1Kings7:28 Chule khomtodom boldan chu hiti ahi: hicheho chun agei anei cheh-un, hiche ageiho chu akoho kikah-a kikhumlut cheh ahiuve." 
1Kings7:29 Chule ageiho kikah-a akoho-a chun keipi bahkaiho, bongchalho, Cherub ho lim aumin; ageiho chunga chun tunsonna aumin, keipi bahkai le bongchalho noilam chu khut thema jephoina akisemin akibelap cheh-in ahi." 
1Kings7:30 Tunsonna tinin sum eng kangtalai li cheh, sum-eng kong licheh aneijun, aninglia kingapna aumcheh-in, kisilna bel noija kingapna kisung aumin, aning cheh-a belapna umcheh ahi." 
1Kings7:31 Alujum kikol sung akam chu tongkhat lha ahin, hiche akam vangchu tunsonna abem banga kikolbem ahin, tongkhat le akeh ahi. Chule akam gei kimvel chu kigeihoi ahin, aningli ahin, abem ahipoi." 
1Kings7:32 Ageiho noija kangtalai li aumin, kangtalai ajolpi chu tunsonna toh akimatnin; akeng khatchu tong khatle akeh-a sang ahi." 
1Kings7:33 Chule akang boldan chu sakol kangtalai kiboldan bang ahin, ajolpiho, alaibohho, akaldet naho, ajangho chu akisuntho cheh ahi." 
1Kings7:34 Chule tunsonna ningli cheh-a akingapna licheh uma ahin; hiche akingapna hochu tunsonna toh pumkhat ahi. 
1Kings7:35 Tunsonna chungvuma chun tong keh-a sang velkol khat aumin, tunsonna chunga ageihole akoho chu thakhat ahi." 
1Kings7:36 Ajehchu chuche ageipehle akoho chunga chun ahithei bang bangin Cherub ho, keipiho, tumthingho lim achonsah-in, akimvela ajephoina aumsoh keijin," 
1Kings7:37 Hiche tobang cheh hin tunsonna som abolin; abona pumkhatna kisung ahicheh-in, tena thakhat, alet thakhat cheh ahi." 
1Kings7:38 Chujouvin kisilna belson sum engin asemin, kisilna bel khatnin twitena dim somli adolin; bel jouse chu tongli cheh ahin, tunsonna som chunga kisilna bel khat akitung cheh-e." 
1Kings7:39 Chule tunsonna nga houin jetlama atungin, ngama houin veilama atunge. Chule twibem chu houin jet lama niso lamngan atungin ahi." 
1Kings7:40 Chule Hiram'in kisilna belho, vutloho, maiphet kongho asemin ahi. Chutichun Hiram'in Pakai houin'a dinga Solomon'in asemsah ho jouse chu ajousoh heltan:" 
1Kings7:41 Khomni, khom ni chungvum alujum chunga kisem twithol teni, chule khom teni chungvuma alujum teni-a twidol tobang kikoi khuna-a kisem lenvang ni;" 
1Kings7:42 Chule chuche lenvang dinga kibol kolbuthei jali, khomteni chunga twidol khuna ding lenvang khatna kolbuthei vui ni;" 
1Kings7:43 Chule tunsonna somle tunsonna chunga kisilna bel som," 
1Kings7:44 Chule twibem khatle twibem noija bongchal somleni," 
1Kings7:45 Belho, vutloho le maiphetna kongho, chule kongle belho jouse, Pakai houin'a dinga Solomon lengpan Hiram asemsah hochu sum-eng duljet cheh ahi." 
1Kings7:46 Jordan phaicham, Succoth le Zarthan kikah leilai mun'a lengpan hicheho chu asun sah ahi." 
1Kings7:47 Chule kongle belhochu atam behseh jeh-in Solomon'in telouvin amoh koitan, sum-eng gih jong hetsoh jouhoi ahipoi." 
1Kings7:48 Chule Solomon'in Pakai in'a um kong leh bel jouse asemin: sana maicham le vetsahna changlhah koina sana dokhang," 
1Kings7:49 Chule houna mun masanga kikoi thaomei khom; jetlama nga, chule veilama nga, pahchaho leh meivah ho chule sana cheichaho," 
1Kings7:50 Chule khonho, meivahpon, chena ho, maiphetna kongho, thihkheho, sanatheng sela kisem lhengho; insung gilla muntheng pentah kotkhah ho le houin kotkhah ho kibutona ho chu sana ngenin asemin ahi." 
1Kings7:51 Chutichun Solomon lengpan Pakai in'a dinga asem jouse chu achaisoh tai. Chuin Solomon'in apa David pehdohsa dangka, sana, chule kong leh bel ho geijin ahin polutnin, Pakai in'a gouho lah-a chun akoitan ahi." 
1Kings8:1 Hitichun Solomon'in Israel upaho, phungho jouse upaho, Israel sonho lah-a upaho chu, David khopi Zion'a kona Pakai kitepna thingkhong potou dingin Jerusalem'a akhomin ahi." 
1Kings8:2 Hijeh chun Israel mijouse chu lha sagina, Ethanim lha-a kut kibola chun Solomon lengpa henga amaho le amaho ahung kikhomun ahi." 
1Kings8:3 Hitichun Israel upaho jouse chu ahungun, chule thempuho chun kitepna thingkhong chu apuvin ahi." 
1Kings8:4 Chuin amahon Pakai kitepna thingkhong, houkhomhole houbuh pon, chule houbuh-a um kong leh bel thengho chu ahin potouvun; hicheho jouse chu thempuho le Levi hon apotouvun ahi." 
1Kings8:5 Chule Solomon lengpa le Israel mipi kikhomho, ama henga hung kikhomho jouse chu amatoh kitepna thingkhong masanga aumuvin; kelngoile bongchal atamval jeh-a simjou hilou le ajat hetthei jouhoi hilouvin ganlhaina aneijuvin ahi." 
1Kings8:6 Chule thempuhon Pakai kitepna thingkhong chu aumnading mun, insunggil houna mun, muntheng pentah sung, Cherub teni lhaving noija chun akoi taove." 
1Kings8:7 Ajehchu Cherub teni chun kitepna thingkhong umna chung chu alhateni ajahkhuma, Cherub teni chun kitepna thingkhong le achunga moljol teni chu ahop sohkei ahi." 
1Kings8:8 Chule moljol teni chu agasao doh-in, houmun masang munthenga konchun akimu phan ahi, ahin polama konin vang akimupoi; chule hichu tunichan geijin chua chun aumjingin ahi." 
1Kings8:9 Kitepna thingkhong sunga chun Egypt'a kon ahung potdoh laijuva, Pakaiyin Israel chate toh kitepna anei laija, Mosi'n Horeb molsanga anakoi songpheng ni tailou imadang aumpon ahi." 
1Kings8:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, thempuho munthenga kona ahungdoh phatnun, Pakai in chu meipin ahinkhu dimtan ahi." 
1Kings8:11 Hitichun thempuho chu meipi jeh-in kinbolin adingthei tapouve. Ajehchu Pakai loupina-in Pakai in chu alodim sohtan ahi. 
1Kings8:12 Chuin Solomon'in hitin aseije, Pakaiyin muthim satah-a chu kaumding ahi ati." 
1Kings8:13 Keiman tahbeh-in nachen nading in kasah peh-in, Tonsotna naum nading mun kasahpeh-e." 
1Kings8:14 Chuin lengpa akile heijin, Israel houkhom ho jouse chu phatthei aboh-in, (Israel houkhom ho jouse chu ading sohkeijun ahi.)" 
1Kings8:15 Chuin aman, Israel Pakai Pathen chu nunnom hen, aman kapa David henga akam ngeijin anaseijin, akhut ngeijin asubulhitnin," 
1Kings8:16 Keiman kami Israelte Egypt gama kona kapuidoh nikho-a pat, kamin umna ding in sah nadingin Israel namjouse lah-a khopi khatcha jong kanalheng khapon; ahinla kami Israelte chunga vaipodin David kana lhenge, ati." 
1Kings8:17 Chuti chun kapa David'in Israel Pakai Pathen min dinga in sah ding chu alungelin anatupmin ahi. 
1Kings8:18 Ahin Pakaiyin kapa David jah-a, nalung gillin kamin dinga in sah ding natup lheh-in, hitobang lung naput hi aphalheh-in ahi." 
1Kings8:19 Hijeng jongle nangman in chu nasah louding ahi; amavang nachapa, nataiguija hung pengdoh dingchun kamin dinga in chu asah ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings8:20 Chuin Pakaiyin athusei chu asudetnin, Pakai thutan bangin kapa David munchu kahinlotan, Israel laltouna-a chun kahung toutan, Israel Pakai Pathen min dingin in chu kahin satan ahi." 
1Kings8:21 Chule hia chun, Egypt gama kona ana puidoh laija, Pakaiyin ipu ipateu to ana kitepna, hiche thingkhong umna ding mun chu kagongin ahi." 
1Kings8:22 Chuin Solomon chu Pakai maicham masang, Israel houkhom ho jouse masanga adingin, van lama akhut ajahdoh in:" 
1Kings8:23 Vo Pakai, Israel Pathen, nasohte alung pumpiuva nangma masanga lamlhaho henga akitepna le khotona musah-a, nangma tobang Pathen himhim chunglam van'a le noilam leija aumpoi;" 
1Kings8:24 Nangman nasoh kapa David nathutep jouse nanit in; nangman nakamin thu naseijin, tunia banghin nakhutnin naguilhun sah-in ahi." 
1Kings8:25 Hijeh chun tun, Israel Pakai Pathen, nasoh kapa David henga nanasei, nangma kamitmu-a nalam lhah banga, nachate achih theijuva alamlhah uleh, Israel laltouna-a keima angsunga touding losam ponte, tia naseichu nitnin." 
1Kings8:26 Chule tun, vo Israelte Pathen, katao ahi, nangman nasoh kapa David henga nanaseisa chu sudet teijin." 
1Kings8:27 Hijeng jongle Pathen chu leija hin acheng mong nadem? vetan, vanle vanho van'in nadol joulou ahin; ka houin sah hi ichana lhasamjo hitam?" 
1Kings8:28 Ahivangin, vo Pakai, ka Pathen, nasoh taona le thumna hi nei jabolpeh-in lang; nasoh tunia ataona, nahenga angehna le ataona hi ngaipeh-in." 
1Kings8:29 Hitia chu hikoma hi kamin umding ahi tia nanaseina mun, hiche houin lam hi namitnin sunle jana avet jinga, chutia chu nasoh-in hiche houin munlam nga-a ataona nangaipeh theina ding kati ahi." 
1Kings8:30 Chule nasoh, chule nami Israelte ngehna ngaipeh inlang, hiche munlam nga-a atao tenguleh; nachenna mun van'a konin ngaipeh inlang, chule najah teng, ngaidamin." 
1Kings8:31 Khattouvin aheng akom chunga asuhkhella, acham louva kihahsel dinga auma, hiche houin'a maicham masanga kihahsel dinga ahungleh;" 
1Kings8:32 Chuteng nangman van'a konin ngaipeh inlang, kipanin, nasohte thu tanpeh-in; migilou chu anatoh lampi chu aluchunga chuhsah inlang, chule michonpha chu achonphatna dungjuijin themchan sah-in." 
1Kings8:33 Nami Israelte hin nang douna-a achonset jeh uva, melmate anga vohlhuh a aumuva; chuteng nangma lam ahin ngat kitnuva, namin aphondoh uva, hiche houin'a hi taona le ngehna aneijuva ahileh," 
1Kings8:34 Chuteng nangman van'a konin ngaipeh inlang, nami Israelte setna chu ngaidamin, chule apu apateu napehna gamsunga lepui kitnin." 
1Kings8:35 Nangma douna-a achonset jeh uva van akikha-a, go ajuhlou teng, hilam nga ataovuva, namin aphondoh uva, chule nangman amaho nabolgenthei jeh-a achonset naova kona alungu aheijuva ahileh," 
1Kings8:36 Chutengle nangman van'a konin ngaipeh inlang, achenadiu lampipha nahila, chule namite goulo dinga napehna gama hi go najuhsah nadingin, nasohte le nami Israelte setna chu ngaidamin." 
1Kings8:37 Gamsunga kel alhah-a, hise alanna, huise, thingtam, khaokho, ahiloule lungmul alana, amelma teovin akhopi houva aumkol uva, itobang suhgamna le itobang natna ahunglhuna ahijongle," 
1Kings8:38 Khat touvin, ahiloule nami Israelte jousen, itobang taona hihen, itobang ngehna hijongle, alungsunga hahsat nei ahi akihetna, hilam nga-a akhut ahin jah-a ahile;" 
1Kings8:39 Chutengle nachenna mun van'a konin ngaipeh inlang, ngaidamin, kipan inlang, mitin alamlhah dungjui cheh le alung gelu nahet bangin lethuh-in, (ajeh chu nangma jengbou mihem chapate lungsung he-a nahi.)" 
1Kings8:40 Chutiachu nangman kapu kapateu napeh gamsunga hi achenlai seuva nangma nagin theidiu ahi. 
1Kings8:41 Chukalvalin, nami Israel hilouho gamdangmi, namin jala gamlatah-a kona hung kalsongho chungchanga;" 
1Kings8:42 (Ajehchu namin kithangtah le nakhut thahat tah, chule naban najahdohna chu ajah dingu ahin;) hiche inlam nga-a ahunga atao tengle;" 
1Kings8:43 Nami Israelte banga leiset mijousen nangma nagin theina dinguva namin ahetnuva; hiche ka insah hin namin apui ti ahet theina dinguvin, nangman nachenna van'a konin ngaijin lang, gamchom mihon athum bangu chun bolpeh-in." 
1Kings8:44 Namite nangman nasol nalam lama amelmateu satdinga acheuva, chule nalhentum khopi lam leh, namin dinga kasahpeh hiche in lam nga-a Pakai henga ataovuleh;" 
1Kings8:45 Chuteng nangman van'a konin ataonao le angehnao ngaipeh inlang, chule athu uchu gelpeh-in." 
1Kings8:46 Nangma douna-a achonsetnuva, (ajehchu koima chonselou aumpoi,) achunguva nalunghanna, melmate khutna napeh doh-a, amahon gamlatah ham ahiloule naicha gal hinga akai manguva;" 
1Kings8:47 Gal hinga akikai mangnao gama akingaito doh uva, akisih uva, chonset kabolun, lamvaijin, khangitlouna kaboltaove, tia gal hinga akaiteu gamachu nahenga thumna ahin neijule," 
1Kings8:48 Chule chutia chu nahenga alung pumpiule alhagao pumpiuva gal hinga kaimanga aumnao, amelmateu gama kona, apu apateu napehna gam, nalhentum khopi, namin dinga kasahpeh houin lam nga-a ahung kileheijuva ataovule;" 
1Kings8:49 Chuteng nangin nachenna mun van'a chun ataonao le angehnao ngaipeh inlang, athu uchu gelpeh-in." 
1Kings8:50 Namiten nangma douna-a chonset abol jouseule, nangma douna-a khangitlouna aboljouseu chu ngaidamin; chule soh-a akaimang houvin khotona aneitheina diuvin, a-angsunga khotona musah-in." 
1Kings8:51 Ajehchu amaho Egypt gama thih meikonga kona nahin puidoh, nangma mite le nagoulote ahiuve." 
1Kings8:52 Chutia chu nasoh ngehna le nami Israelte ngehna lama hi namit nahasah-a, chule nahenga atao chanuleh nangaipeh ding ahi." 
1Kings8:53 Ajehchu vo Pakai Pathen, nangman kapu kapateu Egypt gama kona napuidoh laija, nasoh Mosi-a kona nasei banga, nagou lodinga vannoi mijouse lah-a kona amaho chu nakhendoh anahi." 
1Kings8:54 Chule chutichun Solomon'in Pakai henga taonale ngehna jouse achai phatnin, Pakai maicham masanga adilsuh na-a konin, akhut teni-a vanlam sangpumin ahung dingdoh tan ahi." 
1Kings8:55 Chuin adingin, Israel houkhom ho jouse chu aw gingtah-in phatthei aboh-in, hitin aseije;" 
1Kings8:56 Athutep dungjuija ami Israelte olna pepa Pakai chu nunnom hen, asoh Mosi khutna athutep phajouse chu thucheng khatcha athon aumpoi." 
1Kings8:57 Pakai i-Pathen'un ipu ipateu anaumpi bangchun, eiho jong eiumpiu hen; Aman eidalha hih-u henlang, nungjong einungsun hih-u hen," 
1Kings8:58 Chutile alampi jouse jotdingle, iputeu thu anapeh banga athupeh ho, adanthuho, athutanho nitna dinga ilungthimu ama lama eiheilut peh dingu ahi." 
1Kings8:59 Chule phattina asohte ngaichatna le ami Israelte angaichat dungjuija angaitopeh theina dingin, Pakai anga kangehna hiche thucheng hohin, asun ajanin Pakai i-Pathen koma umjing hen;" 
1Kings8:60 Chutia chu leiset mijousen Pakai chu Pathen ahin, adang khatcha aumpoi ti ahet dingu ahi." 
1Kings8:61 Hijeh chun tunikho-a banghin adanthuho mangdingle, athupehho nitdingin, Pakai i-Pathen'u henga nalungthimu phachamkim hen, ati." 
1Kings8:62 Chuin lengpa le aumpi Israelte jousen Pakai masanga ganlhaina apeuvin ahi. 
1Kings8:63 Chuin Solomon'in chamna thiltoho, ganlhaina Pakai henga atochu, bongchal sangsomni le sangni, chule kelngoi sangjakhat le sangsomni ahi. Hitichun lengpa le Israel chate jousen Pakai in chu athenso taovin ahi." 
1Kings8:64 Hiche nikho chun lengpan Pakai in masanga um hongcha lailung chu asuthengin ahi; ajehchu aman govam thiltoho, anneh thiltoho, chule chamna thiltoho thao chu atoh-in ahi: ajehchu Pakai masanga um sum-eng maicham chu govam thiltoho, anneh thiltoho chule chamna thiltoho thao sanna dinga chu neo behset ahi." 
1Kings8:65 Chuin hiche petchun Solomon le Israelte jouse, Hamath kho lutna-a pat Egypt vapi geija houkhom mipi tamtah ho chun, nisagi, chule nisagi ma, ni somle nili sungin kut abolun ahi." 
1Kings8:66 Anigetnin mipi ho chu asolmangin, chule amahon lengpa chu phatthei aboh-un; Pakaiyin asoh David dingle ami Israelte dinga aphatna jehchun aponbuh lamuvah kipahtah le lungkipah tah-in achetauve." 
1Kings9:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Solomon'in Pakai in le leng in, Solomon'in ama lunglhaina bangtah-a boldinga atup jouse chu aboljou phatnin;" 
1Kings9:2 Chuti chun Gibeon'a ahenga akilah bangchun, aniveinan Pakai chu Solomon henga ahung kilah-in ahi." 
1Kings9:3 Chuin Pakaiyin ahenga, ka-anga nataona le nathumna chu kangaipeh tan; a-imatih chana kamin umna dinga nasah hiche in hi kasu thengtan, kamit teni le kalungthim hia chu umjing ding ahi." 
1Kings9:4 Chule nangma jong kathupeh jouse bangle napa David umchan banga, lungthim dihtah le chondih tah-a kamit mua na-uma, kadan thuho le kathutanho najui jinga ahile," 
1Kings9:5 Chutengle Israelte laltouna-a touding mi kisudong ponte tia napa David henga kana kitepna bangin, Israel chunga nalenggam laltouna chu a-itih-a dinga kaphudet ding ahi." 
1Kings9:6 Amavang nangma le nachaten keima neijui naova kona nakihei manguva, najuidaova na-ang uva kakoi kathupeh ho le kachonna dan kisunho najuidaova, pathen dangho kin nagabol uva, nagahou vuleh," 
1Kings9:7 Chutengle keiman amaho kapehsa gama kona chu Israelte chu kasuhmang ding; chule kamin dinga kasuhtheng hiche in hi kamitmu-a kona kapaidoh ding, chule Israel hi mijouse lah-a thuchih le paochamtuh-a pangding ahiuve." 
1Kings9:8 Chule hiche in hi, kichoisang tah hijongle, ajotpa jousen adatmouva, akhoisat khumdiu; iti dana Pakaiyin hiche gamsung le hiche in hi hititah-a abol hitam? atidiu ahi." 
1Kings9:9 Chule amahon, Pakai a-Pathen'u, apu apateu Egypt'a kona puidohpa chu adalhah uva, pathen dangho akolchah uva, ahou uva, akinu aboltah jeh-uva Pakaiyin hiche thilse jousehi achunguva alhunsah ahi, ati dingu ahi." 
1Kings9:10 Solomon'in in ni, Pakai in le leng in asah kum somni akichaijin, ahitin ahi." 
1Kings9:11 (Tun Tyre lengpa Hiram'in Solomon chu cedar thingho, chahthingho, sanaho, angaichat dungjuijin apen,) chule Solomon lengpan Hiram chu Galilee gama khopi somni apen ahi." 
1Kings9:12 Chuin Hiram Tyre'a konin Solomon'in apeh khopiho vedin ahungdoh-in, ahin hicheho chu alunglhaina ahipon ahi." 
1Kings9:13 Chuin aman kasopipa, nangman neipeh hohi itobang khopi bepseu hitam? ati. Chule aman hicheho chu Cabul gam asah-in, tuni geihin akisahden tan ahi." 
1Kings9:14 Chule Hiram'in lengpa chu sana talent jale somni athotnin ahi. 
1Kings9:15 Chule Solomon lengpan natong honkhat asemlona ajehchu hiche ahi: Pakai in le ama in chule Millo sah nading, chule Jerusalem, Hazor, Megiddo, chule Gezer kulbang sahna ding ahi." 
1Kings9:16 Ajehchu Egypt lengpa Pharoah chu achetouva, Gezer khopi agalah-a, hichu meijin ahala, chule khopi-a cheng Canaan miho chu atha gama, achanu, Solomon jinu chu kipaman thilpeh dinga apeh ahi." 
1Kings9:17 Chuin Solomon'in Gezer le Beth-horon lhangnung chu asan," 
1Kings9:18 Baalath chule chuche gamthipma Tadmor," 
1Kings9:19 Chule Solomon'in anei thilkhopna khopiho jouse, akangtalai ho ding khopiho, asakol chung touho ding khopiho, chule Solomon'in Jerusalem le Lebanon, chule ama gamvai pohnaho sunga sahdinga agot chanchu asaovin ahi." 
1Kings9:20 Chuin Israel chate hilou, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite, Jebus miteho-a kona kidalha mijouse," 
1Kings9:21 Chuche gama amaho nunga kidalha-a achateu, Israel chaten jong asuhmangsoh joulouho chu, hicheho chunga chun tuni chanin Solomon'in hunama soh natongin anasemin ahi." 
1Kings9:22 Israel chate vang Solomon'in soh-in anasempon, ahinla amaho chu galbol mi, ama lhachate, ama pipuiho, agal lamkaiho, chule kangtalai ho le sakol chung touho vaipon apansah-in ahi." 
1Kings9:23 Hichehohi Solomon natohna chunga pipui dehho ahiuvin, nakitoh na-a mipi ho chunga vaipoho chu janga le somnga ahiuve." 
1Kings9:24 Ahinla Pharaoh chanu chu David khopi-a konin Solomon'in amanu dinga in asahpeh-a chun ahungtoutan ahi. Chuin aman Millo chu asan ahi. 
1Kings9:25 Chuin Pakai dinga asem amaicham chunga chun Solomon'in kumkhat sungin govam thiltoho le chamna thiltoho thumvei atohjin, chule Pakai masanga um maicham chunga chun namtui ahalin ahi. Hitichun houin chu ajoutai." 
1Kings9:26 Chuin Solomon lengpan Edom gama, Twipisan pang, Eloth koma um, Ezion-geber mun'a chun kongho asemin ahi." 
1Kings9:27 Chuin Hiram'in asohte, twipi lampanga thepna neiho chu Solomon sohte toh natongkhom dingin, kong khatna ahin solin ahi." 
1Kings9:28 Chuin amaho chu Ophir'a ahungun, chua konchun sana talent jali leh somni ahin lapaovin, hichu Solomon lengpa henga ahinpouvin ahi." 
1Kings10:1 Chuin Pakai min chungchanga Solomon minthanje chu Sheba lengnun ajah phatnin, thudoh hahtahho to achihna phochendin ahungin ahi." 
1Kings10:2 Chuin amanu anungjui tamtah toh, sangongsang ho-a gimnamtui ho, sana tamtah, song mantam tamtah po pumin Jerusalem'a ahungin; chuin amanu Solomon henga ahunglhun phatnin, alungsunga umjouse a chun ama akihoupitan ahi." 
1Kings10:3 Chuin Solomon'in amanu thudoh jouse chu adonbutsoh keijin, amanu aseipehlou lengpa-a kona kisela thil imacha aumpon ahi." 
1Kings10:4 Chuin Sheba lengnun Solomon chihnaho jouse, chule a-insahho;" 
1Kings10:5 Adokhanga annehho, asohte toudanho, chule ajenho umjedan hole akivondan hou, chule akhon domho, chule Pakai in'a achetouna lampiho amuphatnin, lunggel dang himhim aneitapoi." 
1Kings10:6 Chuin amanun lengpa jah-a, nanatoh ho le nachihna kagam lama kanajah chu thuthang dihtah mong ahi." 
1Kings10:7 Ahivangin keima kahunga, kamit tah-a kahungmu kahsen, thuho chu kana tahsanpoi; chule vetan, akehkhat jong einahil pouve. Nachihna le naphattouna hin thuthanga kanajah chu akhokhelin ahi." 
1Kings10:8 Na anga tanglouva dingjinga, chule nachihna thu ngaijinga namite le nasohte hi anunnoma ahiuve." 
1Kings10:9 Nangma-a kipah-a, Israel laltouna-natousahpa, Pakai na Pathen chu nunnom hen; ajehchu Pakaiyin Israel hi tonsotna angailut ahin, hijeh-a chu dihtah-a thutan dinga lenga natun ahi, ati." 
1Kings10:10 Chuin amanun lengpa chu sana talent jale somni toh, gimnamtui tamtah le, songmantam ho apen; Sheba lengnun Solomon lengpa gimnamtui apeh, sanga tamjo ahung lutbe khatapoi."
