1Kings10:11 Chule Ophir'a kona sana hinpo-a Hiram konglen jongchun, Ophir'a konin almug thingphung ho le songmantam ho ahinpon ahi." 
1Kings10:12 Chuin lengpan almug thingho chu Pakai in le leng in'a khompiho ding, chule lasaho dinga selangdahle tumgingho semnan amangin; chutobang almug thing himhim chu ahunglut tapon, tugeijin mujong akimukit tapoi." 
1Kings10:13 Chule Solomon lengpan Sheba lengnu chu angaichat chanle athumchan apen, chuche tailouvin Solomon'in athumlousan hongphal tah-in apei. Chutichun aumna gamlama amanule asohte akiletaove." 
1Kings10:14 Tun Solomon henga kumkhat sunga sana hunglut chu agih talent jaguple somgup le gup ahin," 
1Kings10:15 Hiche tiloujong chun aman sumkolvei mihole thiljoh ho, chule Arabia gama lengho jousele gamsung vaipoho aneijin ahi." 
1Kings10:16 Solomon'in sana kikheng peh-in lumdal lentah jani asemin, lumdal khatna chu sana shekel jagup lutna kisem ahi." 
1Kings10:17 Chule sana kikhengpeh lumdal jathum asemin, lumdal khatna chu sana mina thumthum lutna kisem ahi. Lengpan hicheho chu Labanon gamthipma in'a chun akoijin ahi." 
1Kings10:18 Chukalvallin lengpan saiha laltouna lentah khat asemin, hichu sana phapen twi alonkhumin ahi." 
1Kings10:19 Laltouna chun kalbi gup aneijin, laltouna chungvum nunglam chu akikolin, atouna sihteni-a chun ban ngapna aumgelin, ban ngapna panga chun keipi bahkai ni adinge." 
1Kings10:20 Chule kalbi gup chunga asih langto-a chun keipi bahkai gupcheh, alangtoa somleni adingin; chutobang chu koimacha lenggama akisem khapoi." 
1Kings10:21 Solomon lengpa twi donna khonho jouse jong sana ngen ahin, chule Lebanon gamthip in'a kongle beljouse jongchu sana theng ngen ahi. Dangka-a kisem khatcha aumpoi; Solomon nikholaijin dangka chu imachan akigelpoi." 
1Kings10:22 Ajehchu lengpan twipia chun Hiram kong inneiho le Tarshish kong inneiho aneijin; Tarshish kong inneiho chun kumthum halin sana dangka, saiha, jongho chule vahongho ahin pojiuvin ahi." 
1Kings10:23 Chutichun Solomon lengpan leisetna lengho jouse chu haonale chihnan nasatah-in akhelsoh keijin ahi. 
1Kings10:24 Chule Pathen'in alungsunga akhumpeh chihna thu ngaidingin, leiset pumpin Solomon ahol holjin ahi." 
1Kings10:25 Chule amaho amitakipmin thilpeh ahinchoijun; dangka kongle belho, sana kongle belho, vonho, galvonho, namtuiho, sakol ho chule sanganho, kumtin in abineija ahin peuvin ahi." 
1Kings10:26 Chule Solomon'in sakol kangtalai ho le sakol touthemho akhom khommin, chule sakol kangtalai sangkhat le jali, sakol touthem sangsom le sangni aneijin; hichehochu kangtalai koina khopiho le Jerusalem'a leng umna-a chun aumsah in ahi." 
1Kings10:27 Chule lengpan dangka chu Jerusalem'a song bolin abolin, chule cedar thingchu atamjeh-in phaichama theiba thing bolin abole." 
1Kings10:28 Chule Solomon'in Egypt gama kona hung kipodoh sakolhole tupat ponnel ho aneijin; lengpa sumkolvei ho chun tupat ponnel chu aman apeh uva achohjiu ahi. 
1Kings10:29 Sakol kangtalai khat Egypt'a kona hungtouva potdoh chu dangka shekel jagup man ahin, chule sakol khat chu jakhatle somnga man ahi. Chuti chun Hit lengho le Syria lengho din ahin toldohpeh jiuvin ahi." 
1Kings11:1 Ahinla Solomon lengpan gamdang numei tamtah adeichatan, Pharaoh chanutoh kigomin, Moab numei ho, Ammon numei ho, Edom numei ho, Zidon numei ho chule Hit numei ho;" 
1Kings11:2 Pakaiyin Israel chate jah-a, ahenguva nachelou dingu, amahojong naheng uva hunglou diu ahi; ajehchu thonlouva amahon nalungthimu a-pathen lamuva aheikoi dingu ahi; anatina miho chu Solomon'in ngailutna-in akolchahtai." 
1Kings11:3 Hitichun aman leng chanute jasagi ji-in aneijin, chule thaikem jathum aneijin; ajiten alung ahei mangpeh taove." 
1Kings11:4 Ajehchu ahitin ahi, Solomon ahungteh phatnin, ajiten pathen dangho lama alung aheikonpeh-un, chule apa David lungput bangin Pakai a-Pathen lama alungput aphachamkim tapon ahi." 
1Kings11:5 Ajehchu Solomon'in Zidon mite pathen Astorath, chule thet umtah Ammon mite pathen Milchom lama chun akiheitan ahi." 
1Kings11:6 Chuin Solomon'in Pakai mitmun thilse ahinboltan, apa David bangin Pakai chu ajui bukim tapoi." 
1Kings11:7 Hitichun Solomon'in Jerusalem masang lhanga chun thet umtah Moab mite Chemosh dingle, thet umtah Ammon chate Molech dingin munsang khat asemin ahi." 
1Kings11:8 Chutobang machun gamdang numei ajite jouse pathenho dingin gimnamtui halna le ganlhaina aseme. 
1Kings11:9 Chuin Pakai Israel Pathen, ahenga niveijen kilahpa-a kona akiheimang jehchun, Solomon chunga Pakai alunghang tan," 
1Kings11:10 Aman pathen dang ahoulou nadinga, hiche thudola hi thu anapehsa ahin; ahinla aman Pakaiyin ana thupeh chu anitpon ahi." 
1Kings11:11 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Solomon henga, hitobang tah-a hi na-uma, nangma kathupeh kathulhun le kachondanho nanit loujeh-in, lenggam chu thonlouva kabotela nasohpa kapeh ding ahitai, ati." 
1Kings11:12 Ahijeng vangin napa David jal-in nahin sungin bolponge; ahinla nachapa khutna kona kalhe khending ahitai. 
1Kings11:13 Hijeng jongle lenggam jouse chu lhehkhen pongting, kasoh David jal leh kalhentum Jerusalem jala phungkhat vang nachapa kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings11:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Solomon doudingin Edom mi Hadad chu ahintildoh-in, amachu Edom leng chilhah ahi." 
1Kings11:15 Ajehchu ahitin ahi, David Edom gama auma, janel gal lamkai Joab chun Edom gama pasal takip atha nungin, amithaho vuidin ache touvin ahi;" 
1Kings11:16 (Ajehchu Edom pasal takip athagam soh kahseuvin, Joab chu chua chun Israelte jousetoh lhagupjen aga umun ahi,)" 
1Kings11:17 Hadad chu apa sohte lah-a Edom mi phabep toh Egypt gama dingin ajamun; Hadad chu chapang neocha bou ahinalaije. 
1Kings11:18 Amaho Midian gama konin akipat doh-un, Paran'a ahungun; Paran'a konin mi akipuijun, Egypt gama, lengpa Pharoah henga ahungun; amachun in apen, nehlechah angaitopeh-in, gamjong anapen ahi." 
1Kings11:19 Chule Hadad chu Pharoah mitmun lungsetna lentah achangin, chutichun amatah jinu sopinu, Tahpenes lengnu sopinu chu ajidin apen ahi." 
1Kings11:20 Tahpenes sopinu chun chapa Genubath ahinpeh-in, amachu Tahpenes'in Pharoah in'a noichep abansah-in; Genubath chu Pharoah insungmi, Pharoah chapatetoh alhakhomin ahi." 
1Kings11:21 Chuin Hadad'in Egypt gama konin, David chu apu apatetoh alumkhom tan, chule sepai vaipipo Joab athitai ti ajah phatnin, Hadad'in Pharoah henga, kagamlama kachethei nadin neipotdoh sahtan, ati." 
1Kings11:22 Chuphatnin Pharoah'in ajah-a, kakoma naumhi ipi lhahsamna naneija, hitia chu phulou helouva nagam lama cheding nagot ham? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, imacha kalhasampoi, ahin neichesah pou pouvin, ati." 
1Kings11:23 Chuin Pathen'in akidoupi chomkhat, Eliadah chapa Rezon, a-pakaipa Zaboh lengpa Hadadezer'a kona jamdohpa atildohpeh kitnin;" 
1Kings11:24 David'in Zobah kho miho athagam laija chu, amapa hin ahenga mi anakhopma, chule honkhat chunga gal lamkaija hungpanga; chule amaho Damascus'a acheuva, chua chu gachenguva, Damascus'a vaipo-a panga ahi." 
1Kings11:25 Chule Hadad'in thilphalou anabol tilouvin jong, Solomon hinkho lhumkeijin amapa chu Israel kidoupi ahijingin; Israelte aho lheh-in, Syria gamchunga vai ahomin ahi." 
1Kings11:26 Chule Zerada kho-a Ephrath mi, meithai khat amin Zeruah kitinu chapa, Solomon sohpa, Nebat chapa Jeroboam jongchun, lengpa dounan akhut alamin ahi." 
1Kings11:27 Lengpa chunga akhut alapna ajehchu hiche ahi: Solomon in Millo asa-in, apa David khopi aselaiho asemphan ahi." 
1Kings11:28 Chule Jeroboam kiti mipa hi hattahle hangsantah ahin; chule Solomon'in chuche gollhang chu miphachom tah ahi ahetjeh-in, Joseph insung natohjouse chunga vaihomin apansah-in ahi." 
1Kings11:29 Chuin chuphat laitah chun ahitin ahi, Jeroboam Jerusalem'a kona apotdoh-a ahile, Shilon mi Ahijah themgaovin amachu lamdunga akimupin; amachun pon thahbeh akivon ahin, chule gamlah-a chu amanibou umlhona ahi." 
1Kings11:30 Chuin Ahijah chun achunga pon thahbet-a chun amanin, halsomle halni in abottelin," 
1Kings11:31 Chuin aman Jeroboam jah-a, nangman halsom kilah-in, ajehchu Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije; vetan, keiman Solomon khutna kona lenggam chu kalhekhena, phung som chu nangma kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
1Kings11:32 (Ahinla kasoh David jalle Israel namjouse lah-a kalhendoh khopi Jerusalem jala, namkhat vang aman aneiding ahi.)" 
1Kings11:33 Ajehchu amahon eida lhaovin Zidon mite pathen nu Astoreth, Moab mite pathen Chemosh, chule Ammon chate pathen Milcom ahouvun, apa David bangin kalampiho ajuipon, kamitmu-a thildih abolpon, kachondan kisunho le kathutanho anitpon ahi." 
1Kings11:34 Ipi hitaleh gam pumpi vang akhutna konin lahpeh ponge; ahinla kathupeh ho le kachondan kisunho nitpa, kalhendohsa kasoh David jal-in, ahinlaisen leng khatnin pansah nange." 
1Kings11:35 Amavang lenggamhi achapa khutna kona kalah-a, phung somho chu nangma kapeh ding nahi." 
1Kings11:36 Chule kamin koina dinga kalhentum khopi Jerusalem, kasoh David'in kamasanga a-imatih chana vah aneitheina dinga, namkhat chu achapa kapeh ding ahi." 
1Kings11:37 Nangma tungdoh-ing kating, nalunggot bangtah-a vai nahom ding, Israel chunga lenga napanding ahi." 
1Kings11:38 Chule hitiding ahin, kathupeh jouse nanitna, kalampiho najotna, kasoh David banga kachondan kisunhole kathupeh ho nanitna, kamitmu-a adih chu nabola ahile; chutichun nakoma umjinging ting, David dinga kasahpeh banga nangma jong insung dettah kasahdohpeh ding, chule Israelte hi kapeh ding nahi." 
1Kings11:39 Chule hiche jeh-a hi David chilhahte kabol genthei ding ahin, ahinla tonsotna ding ahipoi." 
1Kings11:40 Hijeh chun Solomon'in Jeroboam thadingin aholtan ahi. Chuin Jeroboam akipat doh-in, Egypt gama Egypt lengpa Shishak henga ajamlutnin, Solomon thi kahsen Egypt'a aumtai." 
1Kings11:41 Tun Solomon thilbol dangho jouse, anatohho jouse, chule achih naho chu, Solomon thilbolho kijihna lekhabua kisun hilouham?" 
1Kings11:42 Chule Jerusalem'a Israel pumpi chunga Solomon analengchan sungchu, kum somli anahi." 
1Kings11:43 Chuin Solomon chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, chule apa David khopi-ah akivuitai. Chule Rehoboam achapa chu akhelin alengchang tan ahi." 
1Kings12:1 Chuin Rehoboam Shechem'a achen ahi: ajehchu Israelte jouse ama lengchansah dinga Shechem'a hunga ahiuve. 
1Kings12:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, Egypt gama umnalai Nebat chapa Jeroboam'in hichu ahinjatan, (ajehchu ama Solomon lengpa-a kona jam-a ahin, chule Jeroboam Egypt gama chenga ahi;)" 
1Kings12:3 Hitichun amahon ama agakousah taovin ahi. Chuin Jeroboam le Israel mipi ho jouse chu ahungun, Rehoboam henga thu aseijun, hitin aseijuve," 
1Kings12:4 Napan kanamkol jonu agihsah behseh-in, hijeh chun tun napa kinbol hahsatahle kachunguva angap anamkoljon gihchu jansah-in, chutile nangma kin bolnao vinge, atiuve." 
1Kings12:5 Chuin aman ajah uva, nithum sunga din kikhin kang tadiuvin, chuteng kahenga hungkitnun, ati. Chuin mipi chu akikhin kangtaove." 
1Kings12:6 Chuin Rehoboam lengpan apa Solomon hinlaija ahenga dingjing upaho chu akihoulim pin, hiche miho kadonbut theina ding thu iti neipeh diuham? tin adongin ahi." 
1Kings12:7 Chuin amahon ajah-a, tunia hiteho soh-a napana, najenna, amaho nadonbutna, chule thungei tah naseipeh-a ahile; amaho a-itih-a nasoh hijingdiu ahitai, atiuve." 
1Kings12:8 Ahinla aman tehse hon apeh-u thumop ho chu anot thapmin, amatoh khandohtha-a, amasanga dingjing khangdongho chu adong jotan;" 
1Kings12:9 Chuin aman ajah uvah, kahenga, napan kachunguva angap namkoljon hi jansah-in, tia seija mipi ho idonbut theina dinguva itobang thumop neipeh dingu ham? ati." 
1Kings12:10 Chuin amatoh khandohtha khangdongho chun ajah-a, nahenga, napan kanamkol jonu agihsah behseh-in, nangman vang jansah dommin, tia seiho koma chu hitia hi naseiding ahi; kamecha hi kapa taibuh sanga sajo ahi." 
1Kings12:11 Chule kapan namkol jon gihtah nasepeh-u ahin, keiman nanamkol jonu kasebe ding; kapan khaohola najepmu ahin, keiman vang aipi-a kasuhgim ding nahiuve, atiuve." 
1Kings12:12 Chutichun lengpan nithum nile kahenga hungkitnun tia anateppeh bangchun, anithumnin Jeroboam le mipi jouse chu Rehoboam henga ahung kitnun ahi." 
1Kings12:13 Chuin lengpan mipi ho chu khautah-in adonbutnin, chule tehse hon athumop naochu anot thapmin;" 
1Kings12:14 Chule khangthah ho thumop dungjui chun, kapan na namkol jonu agihsah ahin, keiman na namkol jonu kabelap ding: kapan khaohola najepmu ahin, kenvang aipiho-a kasuh gimding nahiuve, tin ahenguva aseitan ahi." 
1Kings12:15 Ajehchu thilsoh chu Pakaiya kon ahin, Nebat chapa Jeroboam henga Shilon mi Ahijah mangcha-a Pakaiyin anaseisa chu tohdoh theina dinga, lengpan mipi ho thusei chu angaipeh lou ahitai." 
1Kings12:16 Hitichun Israelte jouse chun lengpan athu angaipeh lou amu phatnun, mipi chun lengpa adonbutnun, eihon David'a ipi chan ineijum? chule Jesse chapa-a jong gouloding inei pouve. Vo Israelte, napon in cheh kijotnun; vo David, tun nangmatah in kivetan, atiuve. Hitichun Israel ten apon in cheh akijot taove." 
1Kings12:17 Ahinala Judah khopiho-a cheng Israel chate chunga vang Rehoboam'in lengvai apotai. 
1Kings12:18 Chujouvin Rehoboam lengpan kaidong vaipo Adoram chu asolin ahile; Israelte jousen songin anasepmun, athitai. Hijeh chun Rehoboam lengpa Jerusalem'a jamdin akangtalaija kinotah-in akaldoh-in ahi." 
1Kings12:19 Hitichun Israel'in tunigei hin David insungmite adouvin ahi. 
1Kings12:20 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israelte jousen Jeroboam ahungkit ahet phatnun, mipi kikhomho hengadin akou asolun, Israelte jouse chunga dingin lengin atungtaove. Judah phung tailou David insung nungjuija khatcha aumpouve." 
1Kings12:21 Chuin Rehobaom Jerusalem'a ahungphatnin, Israel insung kisatpi dingle, lenggam chu Solomon chapa Rehoboam dinga lelahkit dingin, Judah insung jousele Benjamin phunga gal hat hangsan cheh mi sangsom le sangget hel akhomin ahi." 
1Kings12:22 Ahinla Pathen mi Shemaiah henga Pathen thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
1Kings12:23 Judah lengpa Solomon chapa Rehobaom hengle, Judah le Benjamin insung mijouse, chule mipi amoho henga chun seijin," 
1Kings12:24 Pakaiyin hitihin aseije; nangho nachetou loudiu, nasopiu Israel chate chu nasat louheldiu ahi; amitakip a-incheh-a kileuhen, ajehchu hiche thil hi keijakon ahi. Amahon Pakai thuchu angaijun, Pakai thu dungjuijin akileuvin akikhen taove." 
1Kings12:25 Chuin Jeroboam'in Ephraim molsanga chun Shechem kho asemin, hia chun achengin; chua konin achedoh-in, Penuel kho asemin ahi." 
1Kings12:26 Chuin Jeroboam'in alungsunga, tun lenggam chu David insung mite henga kilekit khaget nunte;" 
1Kings12:27 Hiche mitehi Jerusalem'a Pakai in'a ganlhaina bola acheuva ahile, chuteng hiche mite lungthimhi a-pakai pao, Judah lengpa Rehoboam lama kiheijintin, chutengle keima eitha uva, Judah leng Rehoboam lama chekit diu ahi, ati." 
1Kings12:28 Chuti chun lengpan mi aki thumop sah-in, sana bongnou lim ni asemin, ajah uva, nanghodin Jerusalem kaltou ahahsa behseh-e; vo Israel mite, veuvin, Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh uva na-pathen'u hi, ati." 
1Kings12:29 Chuin khat Bethel'a akoijin, khatchu Dan'a akoijin ahi." 
1Kings12:30 Ahin hiche thilhi chonset ahunghitai; ajehchu mipichu khatjoh chu houdingin Bethel'a acheuvin, khatjopa houdingin Dan'a ache jiuvin ahi." 
1Kings12:31 Chule aman munsanga in asan, Levi chapate hilou, jalhang lah-a minoinungpen hochu thempun apansah-in ahi." 
1Kings12:32 Chuin Jeroboam'in Judah gama kut bangin, lhagetna-a chuche nisomle ninga ni chu kut nikho din asudetnin, maicham chunga chun atoh doh-in ahi. Chutichun Bethel'a jong abolin, asem bongnou henga chun ganlhaina abolin ahi. Chutichun aman munsang asem ho-a thempuho chu Bethel'a akoijin ahi." 
1Kings12:33 Chutichun aman alungdei bangtah-a agot, lhagetna nisomle ninga ni chun, Bethel'a amaicham asemin ahi. Chule Israel chate dingin kut asudetnin, chule maicham chunga chun thilto atoh-in, gimnamtui ahalin ahi." 
1Kings13:1 Chule veuvin Pathen mikhat Juda gama konin Pakai thusah-in Bethel'a ahungin, Jeroboam chu maicham pangah gimnamtui haldin anadinge." 
1Kings13:2 Chuin Pakai thun maicham douna asap khumin, vo maicham, maicham Pakaiyin hitin aseije; vetan David insunga chapa khat, amin Josiah kiti hungpeng ding; nachunga gimnamtui haljia munsanga thempuho nachunga atodoh ding, mihem guho chu nachunga kihalding ahi, ati." 
1Kings13:3 Chule hiche nikho mama chun melchihna apen, hichehi Pakaiyin asei melchihna chu ahi; vetan maicham hi khikeh intin, achunga um vutvamhohi kisung lhading ahi, ati." 
1Kings13:4 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pathen mipa thusei, Bethel'a maicham douna-a athusei chu leng Jeroboam'in ajah phatnin, man-uvin, tin akhut maichama konin ahinlhangin ahi. Ahin amapa heng lama ahinlhandoh akhutchu agoheltan, hitichun akhut chu aleloi theitapon ahi." 
1Kings13:5 Pathen mipan Pakai thua melchihna asei bangchun, maicham jongchu akhikeh-in, meivamho chu maichama konin akisung lhatai." 
1Kings13:6 Chuin lengpa chun adonbutnin Pathen mipa jah-achun, kakhut hi ahungdamkit theina din Pakai na Pathen maikoh-a neitao peh-in, ati. Chuin Pathen mipa chu Pakai henga ataovin ahile, lengpa khutchu adamkit tan, atila toh ahungbang kit tai." 
1Kings13:7 Chuin lengpan Pathen mipa jah-a chun, keimatoh in lama hungin lang, hungkichol don, chule keiman kipaman napenge, ati." 
1Kings13:8 Chuin Pathen mipa chun lengpa jah-a, na in kehkhat neipehding hijongle nangma toh lhonin hung pongting, hikoma jonghin anneh twidon himhim jong bolponge." 
1Kings13:9 Ajehchu changlhah nehih-in, twi himhim jong donhih-in, chule nahung nalam mama-a jong kilekit hih-in, tia Pakai thua thupehsa kahi, ati." 
1Kings13:10 Chuti chun lamchoma achen, Bethel jona ahungna lampia chun akiletapoi." 
1Kings13:11 Tun Bethel'a chun themgao tehsepu khat achengin, chuin achapate chu ahungun, chuchenia Bethel'a Pathen mipa thilbol jouse chu ahilun; lengpa henga athuseiho jong chu apau ahilun ahi." 
1Kings13:12 Chuin apauvin ajah uvah, hoilama che am? ati. Ajehchu Juda gama kona hung Pathen mipa chena lampia chu achapaten anamu-u ahi." 
1Kings13:13 Chuin aman achapate jah-a, sangan neigon peh-un, ati. Hitichun amahon sangan agonpeh-un, achunga chun atoutan," 
1Kings13:14 Pathen mipa nunga chu achele gangpi phung noija atou agamun ahi. Chuin aman ajah-a, nangma Juda gama kona hung Pathen mipa chu nahim? ati. Chuin aman kahi, ati." 
1Kings13:15 Chuin aman ajah-a, keitoh in'a chehitin an hungnen, ati." 
1Kings13:16 Chuin aman, keima nangtoh kilethei pongting, nangto jong na-in lutthei ponge; hiche mun'a hin nangtoh anneh twidon himhim bolponge;" 
1Kings13:17 Ajehchu kajah-a Pakai thuchun, hikoma chu an naneh-a, twi nadon louhel ding; nahungna lampia jong nakilekit louhel ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings13:18 Chuin aman ajah-a, keijong nang bang bang themgao khat kahin, chule Pakai thun vantil khatnin kajah-a, aman an aneh-a, twi adonthei nadin na in'a hinlepuitan eiti, ati. Ahin aman ajou asei ahibouve." 
1Kings13:19 Hitichun ama amapa chutoh anungchen, a-in'a an anen, twi adontan ahi." 
1Kings13:20 Chuin ahitin ahi, amani dokhang phunga agatou lhona ahile, ama lepui themgaopa henga chun Pakai thu chu ahung lhungin;" 
1Kings13:21 Juda gama kon Pathen mipa jah-a chun ahin samdoh-in, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Pakai kamsung thu ngailouva, Pakai na Pathen'in nathupeh nanitda-a," 
1Kings13:22 Nahung nung hunga, Pakaiyin nahenga an nehih-in, chule twi jong donhih-in atinamuna, an naneh-a, twi nadon jeh-in; nalonghi napu napate lhan hunglhung louhel ding ahi, atin ahi." 
1Kings13:23 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman an aneh jouva, twi adonjou phatnin, themgao ahin lepuipa chunn sangan agonpeh-in ahi." 
1Kings13:24 Chuin ama achephatnin, keipi bahkai khatnin lampia ana kimaito pin, athat tai. Chule along chu lamdunga selhah-in aumin, sangan chu akoma adingin, keipi bahkai jongchu thilong koma chun adinge." 
1Kings13:25 Chuin veuvin, mihon ahin jotpaovin, chule lamdunga along kiseplha-a, keipi bahkai thilong koma adinchu amuvin ahi. Chuin amaho ahungun themgao tehsepu chenna khopi-a agasei taovin ahi." 
1Kings13:26 Chuin lampia kona galepui themgao chun ajah phatnin, Pathen mi, Pakai thusei ngailoupa chu ahije; hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin ahenga asei athu bangtah-a, Pakaiyin keipi bahkai apeh doh-a, keipi bahkaijin amaltela atha ahi, ati." 
1Kings13:27 Chuin aman achapate jah-a, sangan neigotpeh un, ati. Chuin amahon agotpeh taove." 
1Kings13:28 Chuin ama achen ahile along lampia kiseplha chu agamun, chule sangan le keipi bahkai akoma adinlhon chu amun ahi. Keipi bahkai chun thilong chu anepon, sangan jongchu abot telpon ahi." 
1Kings13:29 Chuin themgao chun Pathen mipa long chu adomin, sangan chunga akoijin, ahinlepoh tai. Chule themgao tehsepu chu lunghem dingle avuidin khopi-a chun ahunge." 
1Kings13:30 Chuin aman thilong chu amatah lhanna alupsah-in; ohe, kasopipa! tin achunga alunghem uvin ahi." 
1Kings13:31 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama avuijou phatnin achapate jah-a, keima kathiteng Pathen mipa kivuina lhan nahin neihin vuijun lang, ama gu koma kagu hinkoijun, ati." 
1Kings13:32 Ajehchu Bethel maicham chungle Samaria khopi-a um munsanga in jouse douna-a Pakai thua anaseidohho chu hung guilhung teiding ahi, ati." 
1Kings13:33 Hicheng thilsoh nung jonghin Jeroboam setna lampia konin akilehei dehpon, ahinla minoinung dehho chu munsang ho thempun asemin; anomchan aman asuthengin, amatah munsang ho thempu khatnin apangin ahi." 
1Kings13:34 Hiche thilhohi Jeroboam insung dinga chonsetna, kisuhgamna, chule leisetna kona suhmang helna ahung hitai." 
1Kings14:1 Hiche laichun Jeroboam chapa Abijah adampon ahi. 
1Kings14:2 Chuin Jerobaom'in ajinu jah-a, nahenga katao ahi, kipat in lang Jerobaom jinu ahi ti ahetlouna diuvin na-umdan khelin lang, Shiloh'a gache temin; ven, hia chun Ahijah themgao, hiche miho chunga lenga kahungpan ding kachung chang thuseipa chu aume, ati." 
1Kings14:3 Chule changlhah somle changlhah lum neocha cha, chule khoiju haikhat kenginlang ahenga gachen; aman chapang umdan ding nahinhil teiding ahi, ati." 
1Kings14:4 Chuin Jeroboam jinun chutichun abolin, akipatnin, Shiloh'a achen, Ahijah in'a ahungtai. Ahin Ahijah chun atehjeh-in kho amutheipoi." 
1Kings14:5 Chuin Pakaiyin Ahijah henga, ven, Jeroboam jinu nahenga achapa dinga thilkhat thumdingin ahunge, ajehchu ama adamlou ahi. Chule hitiding ahi, amanu ahunglut tengle, numei dangho bangtah-a hung umding ahi." 
1Kings14:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ahijah'in amanu kotphung ahunggeija akhodap gin ajah phatnin, amanu jah-a, nangma Jerobaom jinu hunglutnin; ibolla midang kihisah-a nahim? ajehchu keima thuhil phaloutah hildinga nahenga eikisola ahi." 
1Kings14:7 Chen, Jeroboam jah-a gaseipeh-in, Pakai Israelte Pathen'in hitin ati, ajehchu mipi ho lah-a kona kachoisanga, kami Israelte chunga vaipo-a kapansah-a," 
1Kings14:8 Chule David insunga kona alenggam kalhe khena, nang kapeh nahin; ahivangin nangma kathupeh ho nitna, chule kamitmu-a adih jeng bolna dingin alungthim pumpi-a eijuija, kasoh David bangin na-umpon;" 
1Kings14:9 Ahivangin nangman keima lunghansah nadingin, namasanga mijouse sangin thilse nabol dehsetne; ajehchu nachen Pathen danghole milim kilhajol nakisemin, nanung lama neipaitai." 
1Kings14:10 Hijeh chun vetan, keiman Jeroboam insung chunga thilse kalhunsah ding, chule Jeroboam'a kona pasal tapou akihen hihen, ongthol hijongle, Israel gamsunga kona kasuhmang ding; chule Jeroboam insungmi ahingdoh amoh chengse chu, min eh abeikahse atheh banga katheh ngim ding ahi." 
1Kings14:11 Jerobaom insungmi khopi sunga thitapou chu ui jin aneh ding, gama thitapou chungleng vachaten anehdiu ahi; ajehchu hichu Pakai seisa ahitai." 
1Kings14:12 Hijeh chun kipat in, na inlama chetan; khopi sunga nakho nalhah lutlutleh chapang chu thiding ahi." 
1Kings14:13 Chutia chu Israel jousen apul adouvuva, avuidiu ahi. Ajehchu Jeroboam insung mi amabou lhana kivui hiding ahi, ajehchu Jeroboam insunga amabouhin Israelte Pakai Pathen lama phatna themkhat aneijin ahi." 
1Kings14:14 Chukal vala Pakaiyin Jeroboam insung sumang dinga Israel chunga lengkhat atundoh ding; tujenga jong, ahile itiding hitam?" 
1Kings14:15 Ajehchu Pakaiyin twilah-a peng kilingling banga Israel ajepding, chule Pakai lunghansah nadinga milim akisemthu jeh uva, aman Israel chu apu apateu anapeh hiche gam phatah-a kona hi abodoh-a, chule vadunglen gala athecheh ding ahi." 
1Kings14:16 Jeroboam chonset naho jehle chonset anabola Israel achonsetsah jeh-a, aman Israel apaidoh ding ahi." 
1Kings14:17 Chuin Jeroboam jinu akipat doh-in, apotnin, Tirzah ahunglhung tai. Chuin kotbul kempum agaphah phah-in chapang chu athitai." 
1Kings14:18 Chuin amahon avuitaovin; Pakaiyin asoh Ahijah themgao henga anasei, Pakai thu dungjui chun avuijun, Israelte jousen apul adoutaove." 
1Kings14:19 Jeroboam thilbol adang jouse, gal iti asatna, lengvai iti apoh thuho chu, veuvin, Israel lengte thusimbua hihochu akisunin ahi." 
1Kings14:20 Jeroboam lengchan nikhoho chu kum somni le kumni ahi. Chuin ama apu apate toh alumkhomin, achapa Nadab chu ama khelin alengchang tai." 
1Kings14:21 Chuin Solomon chapa Rehoboam Judah gama aleng changin ahi. Rehoboam ahung lengchan patchun kum somli le kumkhat ahitan, Pakaiyin amin umna dinga Israel phung jouse lah-a kona analhentum khopi Jerusalem'a chun kum somle kumsagi aleng changin ahi. Anu minchu Naamah ahin, Ammon mi ahi." 
1Kings14:22 Chule Judah te chun Pakai mitmun thilse abolun, apu apateu jouse sanga chungnung-jo-a chonset abolnaova chun, Pakai chu thangsetna dingin achoh thouvun ahi." 
1Kings14:23 Ajehchu amahon munsang jouse, chule thinghing phungnoi tinna munsang ho, milimho, khomho, chule thinga kisem milim atungdoh-un ahi." 
1Kings14:24 Chule gamsunga chun Sodom mijong aumun; Israel chate masanga Pakaiyin anapaidohsa thet umtah namho bolbangchu anabolun ahi. 
1Kings14:25 Chuin Rehoboam lengchan kum ngana-a chun ahitin ahi, Egypt lengpa Shishak chu Jerusalem doudin ahung touvin," 
1Kings14:26 Chule Pakai in'a gouho le lengpa in'a gouho chu alan, abonchan apomangin; Solomon'in anasem sana lumdal ho chu abonchan apomangtai." 
1Kings14:27 Chuin Rehoboam lengpan hicheho khelchun sum-eng in lumdal asemin, hicheho chu lengpa kot ngah-a pang, ngahtup pipui khutna apedoh-in ahi." 
1Kings14:28 Chule hitihi anahi, lengpa chu Pakai in'a achetengle, ngahtup pachun hicheho chu ahinkengjin, chujou tengle ngahtup indan sunga alekoi kitjin ahi." 
1Kings14:29 Tun Rehoboam thilbol danghole anatoh jouse chu, Judah lengho thusimbu ho-a kisun soh hel hilouham?" 
1Kings14:30 Chule Rehoboam le Jeroboam kah-a chun ahinkho lhumkei lhonin kidouna aumjinge. 
1Kings14:31 Chuin Rehoboam chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, apu apateu toh David khopi-a avuitha taove. Chule anu minchu Naamah ahin, Ammon numei ahi. Chuin achapa Abijam akhelin alengchang tai." 
1Kings15:1 Tun Nebat chapa Jeroboam lengchan kum somle kumget na-in, Judah gam chunga Abijam aleng changin ahi." 
1Kings15:2 Ama Jerusalem'a kumthum alengchange. Chule anumin chu Maachah ahin, Abishalom chanu ahi." 
1Kings15:3 Chule apan masanga anabol chonsetna jouse-a chun achonin; alungthim chu apa David lungthim bangin Pakai a-Pathen'a apha chamkimpon ahi. 
1Kings15:4 Hijeng jongle David khohsahna jal-in Pakai a-Pathen'in ama nunga achapa tundoh nadingle, Jerusalem phudoh nadingin, Jerusalem'a meivah khat anapen ahi." 
1Kings15:5 Ajehchu Hit mi Uriah chungchang tilouvin, David'in Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabolin, ahin laisen athupeh khatcha-a konin akihei mangpon ahi." 
1Kings15:6 Chule Rehoboam chu Jeroboam toh ahin laisen akidou jing lhonin ahi. 
1Kings15:7 Tun Abijam thilbol danghole anatohho Judah lengho thusimbu ho-a kisun soh hel louham? Chule Abijam le Jereboam kah-a chun kidouna anaumin ahi. 
1Kings15:8 Chuin Abijam chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, David khopi-a avuitaove. Chule achapa Asa chu ama khelin alengchang tai." 
1Kings15:9 Chuin Israel lengpa Jeroboam lengchan kum somni na in Juda gamsunga Asa aleng changin ahi. 
1Kings15:10 Chule ama Jerusalem'a kum somli le kumkhat alengchange. Anu minchu Maachah ahin, Abishalom chanu ahi." 
1Kings15:11 Chule Asa chun apa David'in anabol bangin, Pakai mitmun adih chu abolin ahi." 
1Kings15:12 Chuin aman gamsunga jonthanhoi bolhochu anodoh-in, chule apatehon anasem milim jouse asumang soh-in ahi." 
1Kings15:13 Chule anu Maachah, apena anu jengjong Asherah lim anasemjeh-in lengnu ahina ahaisah-in; Asa'in amanu milim chu asumangin, Kidron vapanga ahalvamin ahi." 
1Kings15:14 Ahinla munsang ho vang asumangpon, ahijeng vangin Asa lungthim chu ahinlai chansen Pakai lama achamkimin ahi." 
1Kings15:15 Chule apan asuhthengsa thilhole, amatah-in apeh thengsaho dangka le sana kong leh bel hochu, Pakai in'a apolutnin ahi." 
1Kings15:16 Chule Asa le Israelte leng Baasha kikah-a ahinkho lhungkei lhonin kidou kinahna aumjinge. 
1Kings15:17 Chuin Israel lengpa Baasha chu Judah doudin achetouvin, Judah te lengpa Asa henga dinga koima alut le apot aumlouna dingin, Ramah kho asadoh-in ahi." 
1Kings15:18 Chuphatnin Asa'in Pakai in'a anakidalhaho le lengpa in'a gouho, dangka le sana jouse chu alan asohte khutna apetai. Chuin lengpa Asa chun Damascus kho-a cheng Syria lengpa, Hezion chapa, Tabrimon chapa Benhadad henga chun aseijin," 
1Kings15:19 Keima le nangma kikah, kapale napa kikah-a kinoptona aumin, ven, keiman nangma dangka le sana kipaman thilpeh kahinthotne; hungin lang, keija kona apotdoh nadingin, Israel lengpa Baasha toh nakinoptona hungsu keh-in, ati." 
1Kings15:20 Chuin Benhadad'in Asa lengpa thu angaijin, Israel khopiho doudingin janel gal lamkaiho asolin, Israel khopiho Ijon, Dan, Abel-beth-maachah, Cinneroth gam pumpi, chule Naptali gamjouse pumin asumangin ahi." 
1Kings15:21 Chuin ahitin ahi, Baasha'n hiche thuchu ajah phatnin, Ramah'a kho asah banchu adalhan, Tirzah'a achengtai." 
1Kings15:22 Chujouvin lengpa Asa chun Judah gam pumpi-a thu athejalin, koimacha ahoi doh-a aumpoi. Baasha'in anasah Ramah'a songhole thingho aphedoh-un, chule hicheho chu Asa lengpan Mizpah le Benjamin gama Geba kho sahnan aneijin ahi." 
1Kings15:23 Asa thilbol dang jouse, athibol theina jouse, chule anatoh jouse, akhopi sahho chu Judah lengho thusimbu ho-a kisun hilouham? Hijeng jongle ateh lamin akhut akenga natna aneitan ahi." 
1Kings15:24 Chuin Asa chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, apa David khopi-a apu apate toh avuitaove. Chuin achapa Jehoshaphat'in ama khellin lengvai apotai." 
1Kings15:25 Chule Jeroboam chapa Nadab chu Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum nina-in Israelte chunga vaipon apangin,Israelte chunga kumni alengchange." 
1Kings15:26 Chule Pakai mitmun thilphalou abolin, apa lampia achen, achonsetna-a chun Israelte achonsetsah-e." 
1Kings15:27 Chuin Issachar insung mi lah-a Ahijah chapa Baasha chun ama dounan thilphalou agongin, Philistine ho gam Gibbethon'ah Baasha'n amachu athat tai. Ajehchu Nadab le Israelte jousen Gibbethon aumkol petnu ahi." 
1Kings15:28 Judah leng Asa kumthum channa'in Baasha'n Nadab chu athatnin, amakhelin alengchang tai." 
1Kings15:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama alengchan phatnin Jeroboam insung pumpi athatnin; Shilon mi asoh Ahijah henga Pakai thusei dungjuijin, asuh manghel kahsen Jeroboam'a dingin ahingthei khatcha akhenpeh poi." 
1Kings15:30 Jeroboam'in anabol chonset naho jehle, Israel achonsetsah jeh, chule Israel Pakai Pathen chu asuh lunghang jeh ahi." 
1Kings15:31 Tun Nadab thilbol danghole atoh jouse chu Israel lengte thusimbua kisun hilouham? 
1Kings15:32 Asale Israel leng Baasha kah-a ahinkho pumpi lhonin kigalna anaum jingin ahi. 
1Kings15:33 Judah leng Asa lengchan kal kumthum lhina-in, Ahijah chapa Baasha chu Tirzah'a kum somni le kumli Israelte chunga aleng changin ahi." 
1Kings15:34 Chule aman Pakai mitmun thilse anabolin, Jeroboam lampia chun anachen, aman achonsetna-a chun Israelte achonsetsah-in ahi." 
1Kings16:1 Chujouvin Pakai thuchu Baasha dounan, Hanani chapa Jehu henga ahungin, hitin aseije." 
1Kings16:2 Leivuija kona nangma kachoi sanga, kami Israelte chunga vaipo-a kapansah; chule Jeroboam lamlhah najuija, achonset naova eilung hansah nadinguva, kami Israelte nachonset sah dungjuijin;" 
1Kings16:3 Vetan, keiman Baasha phattheina le a-insung phattheina kasuhmanga, chule Nebat chapa Jeroboam insung banga kasemding ahi." 
1Kings16:4 Baasha mi khopi sunga thia chu uichan aneh-a, loujaova thipa chu chungleng vachahon anehdiu ahi." 
1Kings16:5 Tun Baasha thilbol danghole, ipi abol, chule athahatna chu Israel lengte thusimbu ho-a kisunlut hilou ham?" 
1Kings16:6 Hitichun Baasha apu apate toh alumkhomin, Tirzah'a avuitaove. Chuin achapa Elah akhelin alengchang tai." 
1Kings16:7 Jeroboam insung tobanga Pakai mitmu-a thilsetah abola, akhutsoh-a Pakai achunga alunghansah jeh, chule amachu atha jeh-in; Hanani chapa Jehu themgaova konin Pakai thuchu, Baasha le a-insung dounan ahung lhungtan ahi." 
1Kings16:8 Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum somni le kumgup lhinna-in, Baasha chapa Elah chu Tirzah'a Israelte chunga alengchang panin, kumni alengchange." 
1Kings16:9 Chuin akangtalai kehkhat chunga vaipopa, asohpa Zimri chun ama dounan thil agongin; ama Tirzah'a um ahito lhonin, Tirzah'a a-insung gouchingpa Arza in'a chun ju adonkhamin ahi." 
1Kings16:10 Chuin Zimri chu agalutnin avon, athatnin, akhelin alengchang tan ahi. Hichu Judah leng Asa alengchan kal kum somni le kumsagi lhinkum ahi." 
1Kings16:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ama ahung lengchan patna, alaltouna chunga atou touchun, Baasha insungmi jouse athatnin; a-insungmi chule agol apaite chapaho pasal tapouchu khatcha khen neilouvin asumangin ahi." 
1Kings16:12 Hitichun Jehu themgaova kona Baasha chungchanga Pakai thusei dungjuijin, Zimri'in Baasha insung mijouse chu athat gamheltai." 
1Kings16:13 Ajehchu apannabei houva Israel Pakai Pathen alunghansah uva, Baasha chonset naho jousele achapa Elah chonset naho jouse, hiche achonsetna ho-a chu Israelte achonset sah-u anahi." 
1Kings16:14 Tun Elah thilbol danghole anatoh jouse Israel lengte thusimbua kisunna hilouham? 
1Kings16:15 Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum somni le kum sagi lhinkum chun, Zimri chu Tirzah'a nisagi aleng changin ahi. Chuin mipi chun Philistine gama um Gibbethon dounan gebuh asongun ahi." 
1Kings16:16 Chuin gebuh songho mipi chun, Zimri'in thilphalou agongin lengpa jong atha ahitai, tia kisei aja taovin; hijeh chun Israelte jouse chun janel gallamkai Omri chu Israelte chunga chun alengchansah taove." 
1Kings16:17 Chuin Omri le Israelte jouse chu Gibbethon'a konin achetouvun, Tirzah chu aumkimvel taove." 
1Kings16:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, Zimri chun khopi chu akilatai ti ahet phatnin, leng inpi sunga alutnin, leng inpi akihal khumin, athitai." 
1Kings16:19 Ajehchu Pakai mitmu-a thilsetah abola achonsetnaho jehle, Jeroboam lamlhahho ajotna, achonsetna-a Israel chate achonsetsah jeh ahi." 
1Kings16:20 Tun Zimri thilbol danghole ami philguhna thuho chu Israel lengte thusimbu ho-a kisunlut hilouham? 
1Kings16:21 Chujouvin Israel mipi chu hopni in akihom khenun; mipi akeh khatnin Ginath chapa Tibni ajuijun, akeh khatnin Omri ajuitaove." 
1Kings16:22 Ahivangin Omri jui mipi ho chun Ginath chapa Tibni juiho chu ajoujovin; hitichun Tibni athin Omri alengchang tai. 
1Kings16:23 Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum somthumle kumkhat alhinin, Israelte chunga Omri kum somle kumni alengchang pannin; Tirzah'a kumgup alengchange." 
1Kings16:24 Chuin aman Samaria lhang chu Shemer'a konin dangka talent ni in achon, lhang chunga chun khopi asemin, akhopi sem minchu lhang neipa Shemer min dungjuijin Samaria asahtai." 
1Kings16:25 Ahinla Omri chun Pakai mitmun chonset abolin, ama masanga ho jouse sanga sejocheh-in abolin ahi." 
1Kings16:26 Ajehchu aman Nebat chapa Jeroboam lamlhah ajuijin, chule achonsetna-a chun Israel achonsetsah-in, apannabei houva Israel Pakai Pathen alunghan sah-un ahi." 
1Kings16:27 Tun Omri natohdoh athilbol dangho le athilbol theina atahlangho chu Israel lengte thusimbua kisun hilouham? 
1Kings16:28 Hitichun Omri chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, Samaria'a akivuitai. Chuin achapa Ahab ama khelin alengchang tai." 
1Kings16:29 Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum somthumle kumget alhinin, Israelte chunga Omri chapa Ahab alengchang panin; Omri chapa Ahab chun Israelte chunga Samaria'a kum somni le kumni alengchange." 
1Kings16:30 Chule Omri chapa Ahab chun Pakai mitmun ama masanga ho jouse sangin thilse abolin ahi. 
1Kings16:31 Chuin ahitin ahi, Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonsetna juichu amadingin ima hilou bangtah-in, Zidon mite lengpa Ethbaal chanu Jezebel akichenpin; Baal agajenin, ahoutan ahi." 
1Kings16:32 Chule Samaria gama Baal dinga in asahna-a chun, Baal ding maicham khat aseme." 
1Kings16:33 Chuin Ahab chun thingin milim asemin; ama masanga Israel lengho jouse sangin Ahab chun Pakai Israelte Pathen lunghana abol betan ahi. 
1Kings16:34 Ama nikho laichun Bethel'a Hiel chun Jericho khopi chu anasan ahi. Nun chapa Joshua'a kona Pakaiyin anaseidoh bangin; a-inbul agon patnin achapa lenpen Abiram hinkho achanlon, akotpiho atungdoh-in achapa lhumpen Segub achanin ahi." 
1Kings16:34 Ama nikho laichun Bethel'a Hiel chun Jericho khopi chu anasan ahi. Nun chapa Joshua'a kona Pakaiyin anaseidoh bangin; a-inbul agon patnin achapa lenpen Abiram hinkho achanlon, akotpiho atungdoh-in achapa lhumpen Segub achanin ahi." 
1Kings17:1 Chuin Gilead gama cheng Tishbi mi Elijah'in Ahab henga, A-anga kadinjing Pakai Israel Pathen hingjing mina kasei ahi, kum ijat-ham kathulouva daitwi le gotwi long louhel ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings17:2 Chuin Pakai thuchu ahenga ahung lhungin," 
1Kings17:3 Hia konin kipat inlang solam sanga kiheijin; Jordan masanga um Cherith vachadunga gakiselin. 
1Kings17:4 Chule hitiding ahi, nangman vachadung chu nadon ding; chukoma chu nangma vah dinga va-ah ho thu kapehsa ahitai, ati." 
1Kings17:5 Hitichun ama achen Pakai thudungjui chun aboltai; ajehchu ama achen Jordan masanga um Cherith vachadung panga agachengtai. 
1Kings17:6 Chuin va-ah ten jingkahle changlhah leh sa, chule nilhahle changlhah leh sa ama ahin pohpeh jiuvin; vachadung twi chu adonin ahi." 
1Kings17:7 Chuin chomkhat jouvin ahitin ahi, gamsunga go ajuh louhel phatnin, vachadung chu akangtan ahi." 
1Kings17:8 Chuin Pakai thuchu ahenga ahung lhungin," 
1Kings17:9 Kipat in, Zidon gama Zarephat'a chenlang hiche munachun gachengin; vetan, keiman nangma nanavah dingin meithai khat thu kapetai, ati." 
1Kings17:10 Hitichun ama akipatnin Zarephat'a achetai. Chuin ama khopi lutna kotpi ahunglhun phatnin, veuvin, meithainu chu chua anaumin, thingkang anachome. Chule aman amanu chu akouvin, ajah-a, kadon ding bela twi themkhat neipen tia nahenga katao ahi, ati." 
1Kings17:11 Chuin amanu twidom dinga achen ahile, amanu chu akouvin, kangeh nahi, changlhah kamkhat nakhutna neihin choipeh than, ati." 
1Kings17:12 Chuin amanun, Pakai na Pathen hingjing mina kasei ahi, changlhah kaneipon, ahin bel'a changbong khutdim khat le thao theija thao themcha vang aume; chule ven, kagalutna keima le kachapa dinga kasemtheina dinga thingkang ni kachom ahin, hitia chu kaneh lhona kathi lhonding ahitai, ati." 
1Kings17:13 Chuin Elijah'in amanu jah-a, kicha hih-in, nasei bangchun gaboltan; ahin hichea konchun keima-a ding changlhah neocha hinsem masan lang, kahenga hinchoijin; chujoule nangle nachapa ding semin." 
1Kings17:14 Ajehchu Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Pakaiyin leichunga go ahinjuhsah nikho kahse-a, bel'a changbong chu kemlou ding, thao thei jong kanglouhel ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings17:15 Chuin amanun Elijah thusei bangchun agaboltan; amanule amapa chule a-insung miten nitamtah aneuvin ahi. 
1Kings17:16 Chuin Pakaiyin Elijah'a kona asei dungjuijin, bubel chu akempon, thao umjong chu akangpon ahi." 
1Kings17:17 Chuin hicheho jouchun ahung hitin ahi, numei inneinu chapa chu ahung natan; anat chu alel lheh jengin ahile ama a chun haina hu aumtapoi." 
1Kings17:18 Chuin amanun Elijah henga, vo nangma Pathen mipa, nangma i-kalo ding nahim? Ka chonsetna geldohsah dingle kachapa thatdinga hunga nahim? ati." 
1Kings17:19 Chuin aman amanu jah-a, nachapa chu neipen, ati. Chuin anun a-angsunga apomna-a konin aladoh-in, ama umna chung dana chun apomtouvin, ajalkhuna alupsah-in ahi." 
1Kings17:20 Chuin aman Pakai chu asamin, vo Pakai ka Pathen, kakholjina meithainu chunga jonghi, achapa thapeh-a kona thilse nahin lhunsah hija hitam? ati." 
1Kings17:21 Chuin chapang chunga chun thumvei akijah-in, Pakai chu akouvin, vo Pakai ka Pathen, kangeh nahi, hiche chapangpa hinna hi ama-ah hinkilesah kitnin, ati." 
1Kings17:22 Chuin Pakaiyin Elijah aw chu angaipeh-in; chapangpa hinna chu ama-a ahungkile kitnin, ahaldoh tai." 
1Kings17:23 Chuin Elijah'in chapang chu alan, a-indana konin insunga apuisuh-in, anu henga apen ahi. Chule Elijah'in amanu jah-a, ven, nachapa ahingtai, ati." 
1Kings17:24 Chuin numeinu chun Elijah henga, tun hichea konhin nangma Pathen mikhat nahin, nakamsunga Pakai thuchu adih ahi ti kahetai, ati." 
1Kings18:1 Chuin nikho tamtah jouvin ahitin ahi, Pakai thuchu akum thum na-in Elijah henga ahung lhungin, chen Ahab gakimusah-in, leichunga go kajuh sah ding ahitai, ati." 
1Kings18:2 Chuin Elijah Ahab kimusah dingin achetan; chule Samaria gama chun kel akhoh lheh-in ahi. 
1Kings18:3 Chuin Ahab min a-insung vaipopa Obadiah chu akouvin ahi (tun Obadiah hi Pakai gingtah ahi. 
1Kings18:3 Chuin Ahab min a-insung vaipopa Obadiah chu akouvin ahi (tun Obadiah hi Pakai gingtah ahi. 
1Kings18:4 Ajehchu hitichun, Jezebel'in Pakai themgaoho athagam laichun, Obadiah'in themgaoho jakhat apuijin, songkoa somnga ngan aselin, chule amaho chu changlhah le twijin avah-in ahi.)" 
1Kings18:4 Ajehchu hitichun, Jezebel'in Pakai themgaoho athagam laichun, Obadiah'in themgaoho jakhat apuijin, songkoa somnga ngan aselin, chule amaho chu changlhah le twijin avah-in ahi.)" 
1Kings18:5 Chuin Ahab'in Obadiah henga, gamsunga twinahho jousele vachadung jouse-a gachen; ganchaho jouse manghel louva ijemtia hampa imuva, sakol ho le sanganho ihuhhing theina dingun, atin ahi." 
1Kings18:5 Chuin Ahab'in Obadiah henga, gamsunga twinahho jousele vachadung jouse-a gachen; ganchaho jouse manghel louva ijemtia hampa imuva, sakol ho le sanganho ihuhhing theina dingun, atin ahi." 
1Kings18:6 Hitichun gamsung chu chotsoh nadin amani akihomlhonin, Ahab amatah akipatnin langkhat lama achen, Obadiah amatah akipatnin lamchom lama chun achen ahi." 
1Kings18:6 Hitichun gamsung chu chotsoh nadin amani akihomlhonin, Ahab amatah akipatnin langkhat lama achen, Obadiah amatah akipatnin lamchom lama chun achen ahi." 
1Kings18:7 Chuin Chutia Obadiah lampia achepet chun, veuvin, Elijah'in akimupin; chule amapa chun ahen, amai tolla asulutnin, nangma kapu Elijah nahim? ati." 
1Kings18:7 Chuin Chutia Obadiah lampia achepet chun, veuvin, Elijah'in akimupin; chule amapa chun ahen, amai tolla asulutnin, nangma kapu Elijah nahim? ati." 
1Kings18:8 Aman adonbutnin, kahi; chen, napakai pa jah-a, ven, Elijah hikoma aume, tin gahilin, ati." 
1Kings18:9 Chuin aman, ipi chonsetna kabola nasohhi thadinga Ahab khutna neipeh hitam? ati." 
1Kings18:10 Pakai na Pathen ahinjing banga kasei ahi, ka pakaiyin nangma holdinga asol louna mun le gam aum tapoi. Chule ama khu-a aumpoi ati tenguleh; nangma namu lounao thuah lenggam le namchu akihahsel sahjin ahi." 
1Kings18:11 Chule tun nangman, chen, napakai pa jah-a, ven, Elijah hikoma aume, tin naseije." 
1Kings18:12 Chule hung hitiding ahi, keima nakoma kona kachedoh dohleh, Pakai Lhagaovin kahetlouna gama napuimang tantin; chutia chu kache-a Ahab kaga hila, aman nangma namudeh louteng, eitha ding ahi. Ahin nasoh keiman kakhangdon laijapat Pakai kanagin jing ahi." 
1Kings18:13 Jezebel'in Pakai themgaoho athalaija kathilbol, Pakai themgaoho somnga nga-a mi jakhat songkoa kaselguh-a, changlhah le twija kavah chu ka pakai hi naseipeh louvu hijaham?" 
1Kings18:14 Tun nangman, chen, napakai pa jah-a, ven, Elijah hikoma aume, tin gaseijin neiti; aman eithatei ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings18:15 Chuin Elijah'in, a-anga kadinjing janel Pakai hingjing mina kasei ahi, tunikho-a hi thonlouva kakimusah teiding ahi, ati." 
1Kings18:16 Chuin Obadiah Ahab kimupi din achen, amachu ahiltai. Chuin Ahab Elijah kimupi dingin achetai." 
1Kings18:16 Chuin Obadiah Ahab kimupi din achen, amachu ahiltai. Chuin Ahab Elijah kimupi dingin achetai." 
1Kings18:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ahab'in Elijah amuphatnin ajah-a, nangma Israelte sulungjing pachu nahim? ati." 
1Kings18:18 Chuin aman, keiman Israelte kasulung jingpoi; nangma le napa insungmiten Pakai thupeh ho nadalhah uva, Baal nung najuijuva kona nasuh lungjingu ahi bouve." 
1Kings18:19 Hijeh chun tun Israelte jouse, Baal themgaoho jali, chule Jezebel dokhanga an nejing Asherah themgao jali chu kahenga Carmel lhanga gakoukhom sah-in, ati." 
1Kings18:20 Hitichun Ahab'in Israel chate jouse akoukhomin, Carmel lhanga themgaoho chu akou khomin ahi." 
1Kings18:21 Chuin Elijah chu mipi jouse henga chun ahungin, ahenguva, itihchan lunggel ni saikah-a naum jing diuham? Pakai chu Pathen ahile, juijun; ahin Baal joh ahi nati ule, amachu juijun, ati. Ahin mipin chengkhat chanjong adonbut pouve." 
1Kings18:22 Chujouvin Elijah'in mipi jah-a, kei, keima bouhi Pakai themgao umnalai kahitan; Baal themgaoho vang mi jali leh somnga aumuve." 
1Kings18:23 Hijeh chun amahon bongchal ni eipeuhen; chule amahon bongchal khat kilhen uhen, chen bongselu henlang, thing chunga koijuhen, anoija mei tih hih-u hen. Chule bongchal chomjoh chu ken sem ingting, thing chunga koi jingting anoija mei kati louding ahi." 
1Kings18:24 Chule nanghon na pathen hou minchu kou unlang, chule keiman Pakai min kakouding; chule meija hindonbut Pathen chu, Pathen hiding ahi, ati. Chuin mipijouse chun adonbutnun, nathusei chu apha lheh-e, atiuve." 
1Kings18:25 Chuin Elijah'in Baal themgaoho jah-a, nangho dingin bongchal khat kilhenun, chule kisem masatnun; ajehchu nangho natam uve; chule na pathen hou min chu kouvun, anoijavang mei natilou diu ahi, ati." 
1Kings18:26 Chuin amaho kipe bongchal chu athatnun, asemun, chule jingkah-a pat sunkim geihel Baal minchu akouvun, vo Baal, neihouvun, atiuve. Ahinla awgin ahiloule ahin donbutna khatcha aumpoi. Chuin amaicham semu chunga akichomchom jenguve." 
1Kings18:27 Chuin sunkimin ahitin ahi, Elijah'in amaho a-eng houvin, hapenun, ajehchu ama pathen ahin; aman thu aseiham, minung ajuiham, kholche ham, ahiloule a-ihmu khat touham hintin, suhkhah ngaiding ahi, ati." 
1Kings18:28 Chuin hasapmin asamun, achonnau ngaibangin chemchan chule thih hemin aki-atnun, achunguva athiu alonlhah kahsen aki-atnun ahi." 
1Kings18:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, nilhangkai ahi phatnin, amahon nilhah lam ganlhaina anneh thilto phat geijin gaothu aseijun; hinlah aw khatcha aumpon, chule donbutna khatchala aumpon, koima chanjong ijin asepeh pouvin ahi." 
1Kings18:30 Chuin Elijah'in mipi jouse jah-a, neihin naijun, ati. Chuin mijouse chu akoma ahung naijun ahi. Chuin Pakai maicham akivochimsa chu asemphan ahi." 
1Kings18:31 Chuin Elijah'in, namin Israel hiding ahi tia Pakai thu hunglhuna Jacob chapate phungjat dungjuijin, songtum somleni alan ahi." 
1Kings18:32 Songho-a chun Pakai minin maichan khat asemin, maicham kimvela chun muchi tena dimni doljou dinga lenin leiko khat alai kimvelin ahi." 
1Kings18:33 Aman thingho agol golin akoijin, bongchal chu achenbongin, thingho chunga ajamin; chuin ajah uva, bel li chu twi sungdim munlang, govam ganlhaina le thing chunga chun sungun, ati." 
1Kings18:34 Chuin aman, aniveinan bolkitnun, ati. Chuin aniveina-in abolkitnuve. Chuin aman athumvei na-in bolkitnun, ati. Chuin amahon athumvei na-in jong abolkit taove." 
1Kings18:35 Chuin twi chu maicham kimvela alongin, aman leiko jongchu twija adipmin ahi." 
1Kings18:36 Chuin nilhah lam ganlhai phat ahiphatnin, Elijah themgao ahungnaijin, hitin aseije; Abraham, Isaac chule Israel Pakai Pathen, nangma Israel Pathen nahi-a, chule keima nasoh kahia, chule hiche thiljousehi nangma thua kabol ahi ti tuni hin kihedoh hen, ati." 
1Kings18:37 Neihin ngaipeh-in, vo Pakai, neihin ngaipeh-in, chutile hiche mipihohin nangma Pakai Pathen nahi-a, chule nangman alungu nalehei ahitai ti ahet dingu ahi, ati." 
1Kings18:38 Chujouvin Pakai meikong chu ahungleng lhan, govam ganlhai, thingho, songho, leivuiho chu akavamin; chule leiko a twi chu ahulsahtan ahi." 
1Kings18:39 Chuin mipi jousen hichu amuphatnun, amaiju tolla asulutnun, Pakai, amachu Pathen ahi; Pakai, amachu Pathen ahi, atiuve." 
1Kings18:40 Chuin Elijah'in ajah uvah, Baal themgaoho chu man-un; khatcha hoidoh sah hih-un, ati. Chuin amahochu amanun; Elijah'in Kishon vachadunga apuisuh-in, hiche munachun athatgamtai." 
1Kings18:41 Chuin Elijah'in Ahab jah-a, chetouvin, nenlang donin, ajehchu go hajuh-a juhding husa aume, ati." 
1Kings18:42 Hitichun neding le dondingin Ahab achetoutai. Chuin Elijah chu Carmel lhangvuma akaltouvin, tolla akunchah-in, akhupteni kah-a amai asulutnin ahi." 
1Kings18:43 Chuin asohpa jah-a, tun chetouvin, twikhanglen lam ven, ati. Chuin ama achetouvin, agahven, imacha aumpoi, ati. Chuin ajah-a, sagivei chekitnin, ati." 
1Kings18:44 Chuin asagivei lhinnan, aman Elijah henga, vetemin, mihem khut tobang twikhanglen'a konin meilhang neocha ahung kitungdoh-e, ati. Chuin aman chetouvin, Ahab jah-a, nakangtalai kigotnin lang, gon nahen lounadin chesuh-in, tin gaseipeh-in, ati." 
1Kings18:45 Chuin chomkah louvin, van chu meilhang le huijin athimletlut jengin, go nasatah in ajutan ahi. Chuin Ahab kangtalai ja atouvin Jezreel lama achetai." 
1Kings18:46 Chule Pakai khut Elijah chunga aumin; aman atai akigah-in, Ahab masanga Jezreel lutna lama alhaitai." 
1Kings19:1 Chuin Ahab'in Elijah thilbol, Baal themgaoho jouse chemjam'a athajedan jouse chu Jezebel ahilin ahi." 
1Kings19:2 Chuin Jezebel'in Elijah henga thupole asolin, jingle tuphat vela amaho khatpen hinkho banga nahinkho kabol louleh, pathen hon kachunga hitobang chun bolhen, chule akalvalin jong bolu hen ati." 
1Kings19:3 Chuin hichu amuphatnin, akipatdoh-ni, ahinnadin ajamdoh-in, Judah gama um Beersheba-a ahung lhungin, hikoma chu asohpa chu adalhatai." 
1Kings19:4 Ahin amatah vang gamthip sunga nikhat lama achen, chuin ahungin juniper thingphung noikhatna atoutai. Chuin athina dingin athumin, tun aphaset tai, vo Pakai, kahinna ladohtan, kapu kapate sangin kaphachom jopoi, ati." 
1Kings19:5 Chuin ama juniper thingphung noija alupma a-imut chun, vetan, vantil khatnin athamin, thouvin, an kineh-in, ati." 
1Kings19:6 Chuin avetle, vetan, mei-am chunga changlhah khatle twi umkhat alu lhuna anaumin ahi. Chuin aman anen adonin, alumkit tai." 
1Kings19:7 Chuin Pakai vantil chu aniveinan ahungkitnin, ahinkhoijin, ajah-a, thouvin lang nen; ajehchu nakholjin nading chu nangma-a dingin asao behsetne, ati." 
1Kings19:8 Chuin ama athouvin, anen adonin, chule hiche an thahat chun Pathen Molsang Horeb lama nisomli le jansomli achen ahi." 
1Kings19:9 Chuin chulama songko khatna alutnin, chua chun agehden tai. Chule vetan, Pakai thu ahenga ahung lhungin, ajah-a, Elijah hikoma ibol nahim? ati." 
1Kings19:10 Chuin aman, keima janelho Pakai Pathen dinga tompan behseh jeng kanahi; ajehchu Israel chaten nakitepna adondauvin, namaicham ho asuchimun, nathemgao ho chemjamin athatnun; kei, keima sehseh bouhi asohcha kahi; chule amahon kahinnahi lahmang dingin aholun ahi, ati." 
1Kings19:11 Chuin aman, potdoh-in, chule molsang chunga khun Pakai anga gadingin, ati. Chuin veuvin, Pakai ahungin, chule Pakai angsunga chun huipi hattah le nasatah-in molsang ho chu asemkeh-in, songpiho ahal halin asuchipmin; ahin huilah-a chun Pakai aumpoi; chule hui akichai phatnin ling akihotnin; ahin inlinga chun Pakai aumpoi." 
1Kings19:12 Ling kiho jouvin mei akan; ahin meija chun Pakai aumpoi; chuin meikah jouvin aw ngatselin ahung gingin ahi. 
1Kings19:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, Elijah'in hichu ajah phatnin, aponin amai akitomin, apotdoh-in songko lutna-a chun adingtan ahi. Chuin vetan, ahenga awkhat ahung gingin, Elijah hikoma hi ipibol nahim? ati." 
1Kings19:14 Chuin aman, keima janelho Pakai Pathen dinga tompan behseh jeng kanahi; ajehchu Israel chaten nakitepna adondauvin, namaicham ho asuchimun, nathemgao ho chemjamin athatnun; kei, keima sehseh bouhi asohcha kahi; chule amahon kahinnahi lahmang dingin aholun ahi, ati." 
1Kings19:15 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, chen Damascus gamthip lama kilen lang, nahung lhunteng Hazael chu Syria chunga leng dinga thao nu-in." 
1Kings19:16 Chule Nimshi chapa Jehu chu Israel chunga lengdinga thao nanuding; chule na indan sunga Abel-meholah khomi Shaphat chapa Elisha chu themgao dinga thao nanuding ahi. 
1Kings19:17 Chule hung hitiding ahi, Hazael chemjam'a kona hoidohchan Jehu'n atha ding; Jehu chemjam'a kona hoidohchan Elisha'n athading ahi." 
1Kings19:18 Hijongle Baal anga akhupma bohkhup khaloulai, chule amuh-a ama chopkha louhel Israel gamsunga mi sangsagi kakikhen nalaije, ati." 
1Kings19:19 Hitichun hichea konchun apotnin, chule Shaphat chapa Elisha amun, amachun lou anakai jin, ama masanga bongchal tosomleni achen, chule ama somleni chana tochun alhonkhomin ahi; chuin Elijah'in ama agah jotpan, achunga apon agah sekhumin ahi." 
1Kings19:20 Chuin aman bongchalho chu adalhan, Elijah nunga alhaijin, katao ahi, kanule kapa gachop tading ting, chutengle juinange, ati. Chuin aman ajah-a, kinungle kitnin; ajehchu keiman nangma ipi kabolpeh em? ati." 
1Kings19:21 Chuin ama ama-a konin akinunglen, bongchal tokhat akaijin, athatnin, asa ho chu bong manchah ho-a chun ahonin, miho chu apen, aneovin ahi. Chuin ama akipatdoh-in, Elijah nung ajuijin, ama ajenletai." 
1Kings20:1 Chuin Syria lengpa Benhadad'in asepai janel jouse akhom khomin; amato pangkhoma chu leng somthumle ni ahin, amaho chu asakol kangtalaiju toh ahitha cheh-u ahi. Chuin ama achetouvin Samaria aum kimvelin, achunga gal aboltai." 
1Kings20:2 Chuin aman khopi sunga Israelte lengpa Ahab henga thupo ho asolin, hitin agasei sah-e, Benhadad'in hitin aseije," 
1Kings20:3 Nasana le nadangka ho chu keija ahin; najite le nachate, aphapen ho geija keija ahi." 
1Kings20:4 Chuin Israel lengpa chun adonbutnin, ka pakai, vo lengpa, nathusei bangin keima le kaneijouse abonchan nanga ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:5 Chuin thupo ho chu ahungkitnun, hitin aseijuve, Benhadad'in hitin aseije, nahenga nadangka ho le nasana ho, najite le nachate neipeh ding ahi, tia mi kahinsol vangin," 
1Kings20:6 Jingle tuphat donahi kasohte kahinsola, amahon nangma inle nasohte inho aholdiu; chule hitiding ahi, ipi hile namit lachanchu, akhutnuva kona alah uva achoimang diu ahitai, ati." 
1Kings20:7 Chuin Israel lengpan gamsung upaho jouse akouvin, kangeh nahiuve, hichepan thilse aboldanhi melchih unlang vetemun; ajehchu kahenga kajite le kachate, kadangka le kasanaho ahin thumin; kana itpehlou ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:8 Chuin upa jousele mipi jousen, athu ngaihih-in, nopjong noppeh hih-in, atiuve." 
1Kings20:9 Hijeh chun aman Benhadad thupo ho henga, ka pakai lengpa chu seipeh-un, nasoh henga mi nahinsola na-ngeh masat jouse chu kabolding ahi: ahin hiche vanghi bolthei ponge. Chuin thupo ho chu akipat doh-un, hiche thuchu agalhut taove." 
1Kings20:10 Chuin Benhadad'in ahenga mi asolin, kanungjui mipi ho jouse-a dinga khutdim khat cheh tohding Samaria leivui kakhen poupoule, hitobang chun pathen hon kachunga lhunsah hen, chule akalvalin jong lhunsah hen, agati sah-e." 
1Kings20:11 Chuin Israel lengpan adonbutnin, galvon kivonpa chu akisutlha sapa bangin hoitho hihhen, tin gaseipeh un, ati." 
1Kings20:12 Chuin ahitin ahi, Benhadad'in hiche thu chu ajah phatnin, ama le aleng chankhompi hon pon insunga ju adon petnu ahin, asohte jah-a, kigouvin, ati. Chuin amaho akhopi satdingin akigo taove." 
1Kings20:13 Chuin veuvin, themgao khat Israel lengpa Ahab henga ahungin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije; mipi tamtah hohi namu em? ven, tunia hicheho hi nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahin; chutengle keima Pakai chu kahi neihetding ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:14 Chuin Ahab'in, keija konin em? ati. Chuin aman, Pakaiyin hitin ati, gamkaiho-a pipui gollhang ho-a konin, ati. Chuphatnin aman galsatdinga koijin thu apeh dingham? ati. Chuin aman, nangman, ati." 
1Kings20:15 Chujouvin aman gamkaiho-a pipui gollhangho asimin, amahochu jani leh somthumle ni ahiuvin; chuin amaho nunga mijouse, Israel chate jouse asimle, sangsagi ahiuve." 
1Kings20:16 Chuin amaho sunkimin akipatdoh taove. Benhadad vang pon inho sunga, amale akithopi leng somthumle ni chun ju adonun, anakham tan ahi." 
1Kings20:17 Chuin gamkaiho-a pipui gollhangho apotdoh masaovin; chuin Benadad'in mi asolin, chule amaho chun, Samaria konin miho ahung potdoh uve, tin aseipeh uve." 
1Kings20:18 Chuin aman, cham boldinga hung ahijongle ahingin man-un; ahiloule galbol dinga ahung ahiu jongle ahingin man-un, ati." 
1Kings20:19 Hitichun gamkai lenho-a pipui gollhangho chu khopi-a konin ahungdoh uvin, galsatmi hochun anungu ahinjuijun ahi." 
1Kings20:20 Chuin amitakipmin atokhahcheh-u athatnun ahile, Syria te chu ajam taovin; Israelte chun anung delun ahi; chuin Syria lengpa Benhadad chu sakol chunga atouvin, sakol tou them hotoh ajamdoh tan ahi." 
1Kings20:21 Chuin Israel lengpa chu apotdoh-in, sakolhole kangtalai ho chu asusen, Syria te chu tamtah athatnin ahi." 
1Kings20:22 Chuin themgaopa chu Israel lengpa henga ahungin, ajah-a; chen, natha hatsah inlang melchih-in, chule ipi nabolding kingaiton; ajehchu kum kitle Syria lengpa nangma dou dinga hungding ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:23 Chuin Syria lengpa sohten ajah-a, a-pathen hou chu thinglhang pathen ho ahin; hijeh-a chu eihosanga amaho hatjoa ahiuve; ahin eihon amaho phaichama kisatpiu hite, chutile amaho sanga thonlouva ihatjoh dingu ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:24 Chule hitiho hi bolin, lengho chu amitakip ama muncheh-a konin ladoh-in, amaho mun'a chun sepai gal lamkaiho pansah-in." 
1Kings20:25 Nangman namansah sepaiho tobang sepaiho, sakol khela sakol, kangtalai khela kangtalai kisimdoh-in; chule keihon phaichama amaho kisat piuvinge, chule amaho sanga thonlouva kahatjohdiu ahi, atiuve. Chuin aman athu-u chu angaijin, hitichun aboltai." 
1Kings20:26 Chuin akum kitnin ahitin ahi, Benhadad'in Syria mite chu asim toh-in, Israelte satdingin Aphek'a achetou tan ahi." 
1Kings20:27 Chuin Israel chate chu akisim taovin, abonun ahungcheh-un, amaho satding chun ache taove. Chule Israel chaten amaho masanga chun kelnou hon neocha ni bangin pon-in akisonuve; Syria te vang chun gamsung alodimsoh jengun ahi." 
1Kings20:28 Chuin Pathen mikhat ahungin, Israel lengpa henga thu aseijin; Pakaiyin hitin atie, Syria te Pakai chu thinglhangho pathen ahin, phaicham pathen ahipoi atiuvin, hijeh-a chu mipi atama tamho jousehi nakhutna kapeh ding, chutia chu keimahi Pakai chu kahi ti nahetdiu ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:29 Chuin amaho chun khatle khat kigalsai ton ponbuh akisonun ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi, nisagi nin gal akipanin, Israel chaten Syria mite chu nikhat sungin mi sangjakhat athatnun ahi." 
1Kings20:30 Ahin adangho vang Aphek khopi sunga ajamlutnun; aumnalaiho mi sangsomni le sangsagi chu kulpin achim khumin ahi. Chuin Benhadad chu ajam mangin, khopi sunga, indan sungnunga ajamlut tai." 
1Kings20:31 Chuin asohten ajah-a, tun vetemin Israel insunga lengho khu hepina-a dim lengho ahiuve ti kanajaove. Katao ahi, ikong uvah khaodip pon kichenu hitin, chule ilu uva khaokol kikhiu hitin, Israel lengpa henga gacheu hite; ijem itile aman nahinkho huhhing khatninte, atiuve." 
1Kings20:32 Hitichun akonguvah khaodip pon akingah-un, aluva khaokol akikopmun, Israel lengpa henga ahungun, ahenga, nasoh Benhadad'in, katao ahi, neihing hoijin, atie, atiuve. Chuin aman hingnalaija ong? kasopipa hijachu, atin ahi." 
1Kings20:33 Tun mihochun ama-a kona thu hungpot chu lunglut tah-in anitnun, chule ajoploi chelun; nasopipa Benhadad, atiuve. Chuin aman, gapuijun, ati. Chujouvin Benhadad ahenga ahungtan; chuin aman kangtalai ja akaldoh sah-in ahi." 
1Kings20:34 Chuin Benhadad'in ajah-a, kapan napa-a kona analah khopiho chu kalepeh ding nahi; chule kapan Samaria'a abolbang chun nangman jong Damascus khosung lamlen kisemin, ati. Chuin Ahab'in keiman hiche kitepna hotoh nasoldoh tha nange, ati. Hitichun aman amatoh kitepna asemin, asolmangtai." 
1Kings20:35 Chuin themgaoho chapate lah-a mikhatnin Pakai thu-in aheng akompa jah-a, nahenga katao ahi neivotem in, ati. Ahin mipa chun avonompoi." 
1Kings20:36 Chuin aman ajah-a, Pakai thu nangailou jeh-in, vetan, keija kona napotdoh dohle, keipi bahkaijin nathading ahi, ati. Chuin ama-a kona apotdoh doh-in, keipi bahkai khatnin amun, athat tai." 
1Kings20:37 Chujouvin michom khat amun, katao ahi, neivotem in, ati. Chuin amapan avotan, chutichun avohna-a chun amavotan ahi." 
1Kings20:38 Hitichun themgaopa chu apotdoh-in, lengpa chu lampia angah-in, amai vutvai anun alim achomsah-in ahi." 
1Kings20:39 Chuin lengpa ahungphatnin, aman awsang tah-in lengpa jah-a chun; nasohhi galmun laitah-a kagachen; chule vetemin, mikhat akiheidoh-in kahenga mikhat ahinpuijin, hichepa hi chingphan; itihama amanle ahinkho khela nahinkho nachan ding, ahiloule dangka talent khat napehding ahi, ati." 
1Kings20:40 Chule nasohhi hilamle khulama kakisahlel kah-in amapa ana achemang tai, ati. Chuin Israel lengpan ajah-a, hitobanga chu nathu kitanlha ding ahi; nangma le nangman nakitan lhah ahitai, ati." 
1Kings20:41 Chuin aman amaija kona vutvai chu aladoh loijin ahileh, Israel lengpa chun ama themgaoho lah-a ahi chu ahedohtan ahi." 
1Kings20:42 Chuin aman ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, suhgamhel dinga kagotsa chu nakhutna kona kakitol dohsah tahjeh-a, nahinkho chu ama hinkho khela, namite chu amite khela cheding ahiuve, ati." 
1Kings20:43 Chuin Israel lengpa chun nguitah le lunghimo tah-in a-inlam jonin achen, Samaria ahung lhungtai." 
1Kings21:1 Chuin hicheng jouchun ahitin, Jazreel mi Naboth'in lengpi hon khat aneijin, hichu Jazreel mun'a um ahin, Samaria'a lengpa Ahab inpi bantah-a uma ahi." 
1Kings21:2 Chuin Ahab'in Naboth jah-a, nalengpi leihi ka in komcha-a um ahijeh-in, ka anche leidin neipetan, hiche khelchun asanga phajo hondang khat nape nange, ati." 
1Kings21:3 Chuin Naboth'in Ahab jah-a, kapu kapate gou nang kapeh ding chu Pakaiyin ajanompoi, atin ahi." 
1Kings21:4 Chuin Jezreel mi Naboth thusei jehchun Ahab chu nguichet le lunghimo tah-in a-in'a ahung tan ahi; ajehchu aman, kapu kapate gou nangma peponge ati ahi. Chuin ama ajalkhuna alumin, amai aheimangin, imacha anenom tapon ahi." 
1Kings21:5 Ahinla a-inneipi Jezebel ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, ibola nachuti lunggima, annelouva uma nahim? ati." 
1Kings21:6 Chuin aman amanu jah-a, ajehchu keiman Jezreel mi Naboth henga, nalengpilei chu sumin neikichoh sah-in; ahilouva nalung lhaina ahile, hiche khelchun lengpilei chomkhat nape nange kanatin ahi. Ahinla aman, keiman kalengpilei nangma peponge, tin einadon butnin ahi, ati." 
1Kings21:7 Chuin a-inneipi Jezebel'in ajah-a, nangma Israel lenggam vaipo nahilouham? thouvin lang an nen, nalung kipasah-in; keiman Jezreel mi Naboth lengpilei chu nangma kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
1Kings21:8 Hitichun amanun Ahab minin lekhathot khat asunin, lengpa mohor chu anamkhumin, lekhathot chu Naboth toh chenga khopisunga upa hole milal ho chu athotnin ahi." 
1Kings21:9 Amanun lekhathot ho-a chun, an ngol ding phongjalun lang, mipi lah-a chun Naboth chu domsangun;" 
1Kings21:10 Chule mini, Belial chapateni chu amapa douna hettohsah dingin dinsah-un, nangman Pathen le lengpa nataitome, tin seisah-un; chujouteng puidoh unlang athina dingin songin sepmun, tin asunne." 
1Kings21:11 Chuin akhopi sunga miho, akhopi sunga cheng upaho, milen milal ho chun, Jezebel'in ahenguva ahinthot lekhathotna kisunbang chun abol taovin ahi." 
1Kings21:12 Amahon an ngolthu aphongjalun, mipi lah-a Naboth chu adomsangun ahi." 
1Kings21:13 Chuin mini, Belial chate pasal ni ahunglut lhonin, amasanga atoulhone. Chuin Belial mi teni chun ama douna, Naboth dounan mipi anga chun ahettohsah lhonin, Naboth'in Pathen le lengpa ataitome, atilhone.Chujouvin amahon khopi-a konin akaidoh-un, songin asepmun ahile athitai." 
1Kings21:14 Chuin Jezebel henga, Naboth songin asepmun, athitai tin agah hetsah taove." 
1Kings21:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jezebel'in Naboth songin asepmun athitai ti ahet phatnin, Jezebel'in Ahab henga, kipat in, Jezreel mi Naboth lengpilei suma chohdinga aphalou chu galotan; ajehchu Naboth chu ahingtapoi, athitai atin ahi." 
1Kings21:16 Chuin Ahab'in Naboth athitai ti ajah phatnin, Ahab chu Jezreel mi Naboth lengpilei galo dingin akipat doh-in, achesuh tai." 
1Kings21:17 Chuin Tishbi mi Elijah henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
1Kings21:18 Kipat doh-in, Samaria'a um Israel lengpa Ahab kimupi din chesuh-in; ven, galo dinga achesuh lona Naboth lengpi leija aume." 
1Kings21:19 Chule nangman ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, nangman natha-a, agam hi nalo hilouham? chule nangman ajah-a, Pakaiyin aseije, uichan Naboth thisan alena mun'a chu, uicha hon nangma thisan ngeitah jong ale dingu ahi, tin jong gaseijin, ati." 
1Kings21:20 Chuin Ahab'in Elijah jah-a, neimudoh hitam, vo kamelma pa? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, kamudoh nahitai; ajehchu Pakai mitmu-a thilse boldinga nangle nang kijoh nahitai." 
1Kings21:21 Vetan, keiman nachunga thilse kahin lhunsah ding, nachilhah kalah mangding, Israel gamsunga Ahab chilhah pasal jouse, akihen hihen, ongthol hijongle kasuh manghel ding ahi." 
1Kings21:22 Chule nangman neilung hansah-a, Israelte nachonset sah jeh-a, na-insung chu Nebat chapa Jeroboam insung bangle Ahijah chapa Baasha insung banga kasuhmang ding ahi." 
1Kings21:23 Jezebel chungchang thujong Pakaiyin aseijin, kulpanga uichaten Jezebel anehdiu ahi." 
1Kings21:24 Ahab insung mite khopi sunga thichan chu uichaten anehdiu; chule gama thichan chu chungleng vachaten anehdiu ahi. 
1Kings21:25 Ahinla a inneipi Jezebel tildoh-a Pakai mitmu-a thilse tongdinga amale ama akijohdoh-a Ahab tobang koimacha aumpoi. 
1Kings21:26 Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga ana nodoh Amor mite thilbol jouse bangin, thet umtah in milimho nung anajuijin ahi, ati." 
1Kings21:27 Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche thuhochu Ahab'in ajah phatnin, apon abottelin, khaodip pon akisilin, an angolin, khaodip pon silin alumin, kangchan achedohtan ahi." 
1Kings21:28 Chuin Tishbi mi Elijah henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
1Kings21:29 Ven ichana Ahab kamasanga amale ama kineosah hitam? kamasanga akineusah jeh-in ama hinkho sungin thilse lhunsah taponge; ahin achapa hinkho sungin vang a-insunga thilse kalhunsah ding ahi, ati." 
1Kings22:1 Chuin Israel le Syria kikah-a chun kumthum sungin gal ana umpon ahi. 
1Kings22:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, akumthum na-in Juda lengpa Jehoshaphat chu Israel lengpa henga ahungsuh-in ahi." 
1Kings22:3 Chuin Israel lengpan asohte jeh-a, Gilead gama Ramoth kho khu eihoa ahin, Syria lengpa khutna konin akiladoh hihlaije ti nahet lou uham? ati." 
1Kings22:4 Chuin aman Jehoshaphat jah-a, Ramoth-gilead gal neisat hu ding ham? ati. Chuin Jehoshaphat'in Israel lengpa jah-a, keima nangma tobang kahin, kamite jong namite tobang, chule kasakolte jong nasakol tobang ahi, ati." 
1Kings22:5 Chuin Jehoshaphat'in Israel lengpa jah-a, kangeh nahi, tunin Pakaiyin ipi thu aseijem dong photnin, ati." 
1Kings22:6 Chuphatnin Israel lengpan themgao mi jaliho akhom khomin, ajah uvah, Ramoth-gilead satdinga kakon dingha, kakon louding ham? ati. Chuin amahon, kontouvin, ajehchu Pakaiyin hichu lengpa khutna apehding ahi, atiuve." 
1Kings22:7 Chuin Jehoshaphat'in, eihon idohthei dingu Pakai themgao dang khattou hia hi umlou ham? ati." 
1Kings22:8 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoshaphat jah-a, Pakai thu idoh theina diu mikhat, Imlah chapa Micaiah aum nalaijin, hinla amapan keima chungchang ase tailou apha aseikhah louhel jeh-a kahot ahi, ati. Chuin Jehoshaphat'in, lengpan chuti chun seihih hen, ati." 
1Kings22:9 Chuin Israel lengpan vaipo khat akouvin, Imlah chapa Micaiah hin puiloi temin, ati." 
1Kings22:10 Chuin Israel lengpa le Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chu aleng vona kivon pumin, laltouna-a Samaria lutna kotpi phung mun ong laija atoulhonin; amasang lhona themgao jousen gaothu aseijuve." 
1Kings22:11 Chuin Chenaanah chapa Zedekiah chun thih-in ki phabep asemin; chuin aman, Pakaiyin hitin ati: hiche-a hi nangman Syria mite chu nasuh manghel kahse-a nanoding ahi, ati." 
1Kings22:12 Chule themgaoho jousen chutobang machun gaothu aseijun, Ramoth-gilead'a chetouvin lang galolhing teijin; ajehchu Pakaiyin lengpa khutna hichu apehdoh ding ahi, atiuve." 
1Kings22:13 Chuin Micaiah kou-a che thupopan ajah-a aseijin, tun vetemin, themgaoho chun lengpa-a dingin kitohtah-in akamuva thupha aphong jalun ahi; katao ahi, nangma thu jong amaho khatpenpen thu tobang hihen lang, apha chu seijin, ati." 
1Kings22:14 Chuin Micaiah in, Pakai hing jing mina kasei ahi, Pakaiyin kahenga aseibou chu kaseiding ahi, ati." 
1Kings22:15 Hitichun lengpa henga ahungtai. Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Micaiah Ramoth-gilead satna kache diuha, kachelou diuham? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, chenlang galolhing taohiti: ajehchu Pakaiyin hichu lengpa khutna pedoh navehta, ati." 
1Kings22:16 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, thutah tailou kahenga Pakai mina naseilouna dinga ijatvei nangma kaki hahsel sah ding nahim? ati." 
1Kings22:17 Chuin aman, Israelte jouse chu achingbei kelngoiho banga, lhang dunghoa achehchau gamhelu kamun; chule Pakaiyin, hihohin aching ding aneitapouve; mitin a-in lama lungmong tah-in kile taohen, atie, ati." 
1Kings22:18 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoshaphat jah-a, kachung chang thu ase tailou apha himhim seiponte tia kahil nahilouham? ati." 
1Kings22:19 Chuin Micaiah'in, hichejeh chun nangman Pakai thuhi ngaijin; Pakai chu alaltouna chunga atouva, vanmi janel ajetlam le aveilama adinu kamui." 
1Kings22:20 Chuin Pakai chun Ahab hi Ramoth-gilead'a achea agathi nadinga kon agalhep ding ham? atin ahi. Chutichun khatnin hitin aseijin, chule adang khatnin khutin aseijin ahi." 
1Kings22:21 Chuin lhagao khat ahungdoh-in, Pakai anga adingin, keiman lheminge, ati." 
1Kings22:22 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, iti danin em? ati. Chuin aman gache ingting, athemgaoho jouse kama chun jousei lhagaovin gapanginge, ati. Chuin aman ajah-a, nangman nagalhep ding, chule jojong nagajoding ahi; hijeh chun gachenlang hitobang chun gaboltan, ati." 
1Kings22:23 Hijeh chun tun, vetan, Pakaiyin hiche nathemgao ho jouse kama jousei lhagao akoijin, chule Pakaiyin nachung changa thilse aseitan ahi, ati." 
1Kings22:24 Ahinla Chenaanah chapa Zedekiah'in aganaijin, Micaiah ngeiphe chu abengin, Pakai lhagao chu nahenga thu seidinga keija kona hoiche lampi-a potdoh-a ham? ati." 
1Kings22:25 Chuin Micaiah'in, vetan, indan sungnunga kisel dinga nalut niteng hetan nate, ati." 
1Kings22:26 Chuin Israel lengpan, Micaiah hi puijun lang, khopi vaihompa Amon le leng chapa Joash henga lepuijun;" 
1Kings22:27 Chule hitin gaseijun, lengpan hitihin aseije, hichepahi songkul'a khumun lang, lungmonga kahung kahsen, gentheina an le gentheina twijin vah-un, ati." 
1Kings22:28 Chuin Micaiah'in, lungmonga nahung kile pou poule, Pakaiyin kajah-a thu aseilou hinte, ati. Chuin aman, mipi ho, nangho kichih theijun, ati." 
1Kings22:29 Hitichun Israel lengpa le Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat Ramoth-gilead'a achetou lhontai. 
1Kings22:30 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoshaphat jah-a, keiman kalim kheling ting galmuna lutninge; nangman vang nalengvon kivonin, ati. Chuin Israel lengpan alim akhelin, galmuna alut tai." 
1Kings22:31 Ahinla Syria lengpan kangtalai chunga vaipo gal lamkai somthumleni chu thu apen, Israel lengpa tailou alenjong aneojong kisatpi hih-un, ati." 
1Kings22:32 Chuin ahitin ahi, kangtalai sepai vaipoho chun Jehoshaphat amuphatnun, amahon, amachu Israel lengpa ahimonge atiuvin ahi. Chuin ama satdingin akiheijun ahile, Jehoshaphat chu ahung pengjah-in ahi." 
1Kings22:33 Chuin kangtalai sepai vaipipo ho chun Israel lengpa ahilou ahet phatnun, ama anungdel uva konin akinungle taovin ahi." 
1Kings22:34 Ahin mikhatnin athal ajebongin amoh kapmin ahileh Israel lengpa galvon thokah akhan ahi. Hijeh chun akangtalai tolpa jah-a chun, kaiheijin lang mipi lah-a konin neipotdoh pin, keima machanga kahitai, ati." 
1Kings22:35 Hicheni chun gal kisat akhohcheh chehtan, Syria mite lamngan lengpa chu kangtalai chunga akingaijin, nilhah lamin athitai. Chule amaha-a kona thisan along doh-in kangtalai sunga chun along lutnin ahi." 
1Kings22:36 Chuin nilhum ding konin sepai janel lah-a konin, amitakip akhopile agamsung cheh-a chetouhen, tin ahung kisamin ahi." 
1Kings22:37 Hitichun lengpa chu athin, Samaria'a ahinpouvin; chuin lengpa chu Samaria'a avui taove." 
1Kings22:38 Chuin mikhatnin kangtalai chu Samaria twikul'a chun asopmin; Pakai thusei dungjuijin, uicha hon athichu aleh-un; agalvon chu asopmun ahi." 
1Kings22:39 Tun Ahab thilbol danghole anatohho jouse, saiha-a a-in sah, chule ama sahdoh khopiho jouse chu Israel lengte thusimbua kisuna hilouham?" 
1Kings22:40 Hitichun Ahab chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, ama khelin achapa Ahaziah alengchang tai." 
1Kings22:41 Chuin Israel lengpa Ahab lengchan kal kum li na-in, Asa chapa Jehoshaphat chu Juda gama alengchang panin ahi." 
1Kings22:42 Jehoshaphat alengchan kipat chun kum somthumle kum nga ahitan; Jerusalem'a kum somni le kum nga alengchange. Chule anu minchu Azubah ahin, Shili chanu ahi." 
1Kings22:43 Chuin aman apa Asa lampi jouse chu ajotnin, chua kona kiheimang louvin Pakai mitmu-a adih jeng abolin ahi. Ahivangin munsang ho vangchu akiladoh dehpoi; ajehchu munsang ho-a chun mipin thilpehle gimnamtui halna aneijing nalaijun ahi." 
1Kings22:44 Chule Jehoshaphat'in Israel lengpa toh chamna asemin ahi. 
1Kings22:45 Tun Jehoshaphat thilbol danghole ahatna avetsahho, chule agalbol danho chu Judah lengte thusim buho-a kisuna hilou ham?" 
1Kings22:46 Chule apa Asa nikhoho-a jonthanhoija kimangcha ahingdoh amoh umsun chu, gamsunga konin anodohsoh helin ahi." 
1Kings22:47 Chulaichun Edom'a leng ana umpon; gamvaihom chu leng anahijenge. 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshaphat'in Ophir'a sana gapoding Tarshish kongho asemin, ahinla Ezion-geber'a kongho chu akegam jeh-in achetapoi." 
1Kings22:49 Chuphatnin Ahab chapa Ahaziah chun Jehoshaphat jah-a, kasohte hi nasohtetoh kongho-a konkhom sah-u hite, ati. Ahinla Jehoshaphat anompon ahi." 
1Kings22:50 Chuin Jehoshaphat apu apate toh alumkhom tan, apu apate toh apa David khopi-a avuitaovin ahi. Chuin ama khelin achapa Jehoram alengchang tai." 
1Kings22:51 Chuin Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat lengchan kal kum somle kumsagi alhinin, Samaria gama Israelte chunga Ahab chapa Ahaziah alengchang panin; Israelte chunga kum ni alengchange." 
1Kings22:52 Aman Pakai mitmun thilse abol jingin, apa lamlhah le anu lamlhah, chule Israelte chonsetsah-a Nebat chapa Jeroboam lamlhah chu ajotpeh-in ahi;" 
1Kings22:53 Ajehchu apan anabol bangin Baal ajenin, ahouvin, Israel Pakai Pathen lung hansahna dingin aphinsen ahi." 
2Kings1:1 Chuin Ahab thi nungin, Moab mite chu Israel dounan akiphin taovin ahi." 
2Kings1:2 Chuin Ahaziah chu Samaria'a um a-indan chungnung akalbi vang kah-a alhamangin, adammo tan ahi. Chuin thupole ho asolin ajah uva, kanatna-a konahi kadamdoh kitding hinam ti Ekron pathen Baalzebub chu gadop temun, ati." 
2Kings1:3 Ahinla Pakai vantil'in Tishbi mi Elijah jah-a, kipat inlang chen, Samaria lengpa thupole ho gakimupin, chule ajah uvah hitin gaseijin, Israel gamsunga Pathen umloujeh-a Ekron pathen Baalzebub donga che nahiuvem?" 
2Kings1:4 Hijeh chun tun Pakaiyin aseije, nangma nakaltouna jalkhuna kona kumlha louva thiden teiding nahitai tin seipeh un, ati. Chuin Elijah akipatdoh tai." 
2Kings1:5 Chuin thupole ho ahenga ahung kilekit phatnun, aman ajah uvah ibola hung kinungle pai nahiuvem? ati." 
2Kings1:6 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Mikhat eikimupi diuvin ahung touvin kajah uvah, nahinsolpao lengpa henga kinung leovin lang ajah-a, Pakaiyin Ekron pathen Baalzebub donga nacheu chu, Israel gama Pathen umloujeh hijaham? hijeh chun nangma nakaldohna jalkhuna kona kumlha louva nathiden teitei ding joh ahi ati, atiuve." 
2Kings1:7 Chuin aman ajah uvah, nakimupi diuva hungtouva, hiche thuho nahilpao chu itobang melpu ham? ati." 
2Kings1:8 Chuin amahon, ama mimul ahin, akonga savun konggah akigah-e, tin adonbutnuve. Chuin aman Tishbi mi Elijah ahi, ati." 
2Kings1:9 Chujouvin lengpan somnga chunga gal lamkaipa le anungjui somnga hochu ahenga asolin ahi. Chuin amapa ahenga achetouvin; chuin, vetan, ama lhangvum khatna anatouvin ahi. Chuin amapan ajah-a, Pathen mipa, lengpan hungkum suh-in tin aseije, ati." 
2Kings1:10 Chuin mi somnga chunga gal lamkaipa chu Elijah'in adon butnin, keima Pathen mi kahia ahile, van'a konin mei hung lenglha henlang, nangma le nanungjui somnga hochu kavam helhen, ati. Chuin van'a konin mei ahungleng lhan, amale anungjui somnga hochu akavam heltan ahi." 
2Kings1:11 Aman avelin, somnga chunga gallamkai le anungjui somnga ma asol kitnin ahi. Chuin amapan adonbutnin, ajah-a, vo Pathen mipa, lengpan hungkumlha loijin ati, ati." 
2Kings1:12 Chuin Elijah'in adonbutnin, ajah uvah, keima Pathen mi kahia ahile, van'a konin mei hung lenglha henlang, nangma le nanungjui somngaho kavamhen, ati. Chuin van'a konin mei ahungleng lhan, ama le anungjui somnga hochu akavam heltan ahi." 
2Kings1:13 Chuin aman athumvei channa-in somnga gallamkai khat anungjui somnga toh asolkitnin ahi. Chuin somnga vaipo thum channapa chu achetouvin, Elijah masanga akhupmin adilsun, ahenga ngehna aneijin, ajah-a, vo Pathen mipa, nahenga kathum ahi, keima hinkho le nasohte hicheho somngaho hinkho hi namitmun manlutah hisah-in." 
2Kings1:14 Vetan, van'a konin mei ahungleng lhan, somnga vaipo masa teni le anungjui somnga gelchu akavam heltan ahi. Hijeh chun kahinkho hi namitmun manlutah hisah-in, atitan ahi." 
2Kings1:15 Chuin Pakai vantil chun Elijah jah-a, ama toh chesuh-in; ama chu kicha hih-in, ati. Chuin ama akipat doh-in, amapa chutoh lengpa henga achesuh tai." 
2Kings1:16 Chuin aman ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Israel gamsunga Ekron pathen Baalzebub donga mi nasol chu, Israel gamsunga athu dopthei Pathen umloujeh ham? hichejeh-a chu nangma nakaldohna jalkhuna kona chu nahung kumlhah tahlouhel ding, nathi teitei ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings1:17 Hitichun Elijah in asei Pakai thu bangchun ama athitai. Chule Judah te lengpa Jehoshaphat chapa Jehoram lengchan kal kum nina-in, amakhelin Jehoram alengchang tai; ajehchu aman chapa aneipoi." 
2Kings1:18 Tun Ahaziah natohle athilbol dangho chu Israel lengte thusimbu ho-a kisuna hilouham? 
2Kings2:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin Elijah chu van lama chimpeija atoltou dingkon chun, Elijah chu Elisha toh Gilgal'a konin akipatdoh lhonin ahi." 
2Kings2:2 Chuin Elijah'in Elisha jah-a, kangeh nahi, nangma hikoma hin umdentan; ajehchu Pakaiyin Bethel'a che dingin eisole, ati. Ahin Elisha'n ajah-a, Pakai hinna le nangma hinna pana kasei ahi, keiman nadalha hihhel inge, ati. Hitichun Bethel'a achesuh lhontai." 
2Kings2:3 Chuin Bethel'a anaum themgaoho chapate chu Elisha henga ahungdoh-un, ajah-a, Pakaiyin nangma-a kona napupa chu tunia alahdoh dinghi nahet nah-em? atiuve. Chuin aman, henge, kahenai; lung mongin umun, ati." 
2Kings2:4 Chuin Elijah'in Elisha jah-a, kangeh nahi, nangma hikoma hin umdentan; ajehchu Pakaiyin Jericho'a che dingin eisole, ati. Chuin aman Pakai hinna le nangma hinna pana kasei ahi, keiman nadalha hihhel inge, ati. Hitichun Jericho'a ahung lhontai." 
2Kings2:5 Chuin Jericho'a um themgaoho chapate chu Elisha henga ahungun, ajah-a, Pakaiyin nangma-a kona napupa chu tunia alahdoh ding ahitai ti nahet nah-em? atiuve. Chuin aman adonbutnin, henge, kahenai; lung mongin umun, ati." 
2Kings2:6 Chuin Elijah'in ajah-a, kangeh nahi, umdentan; ajehchu Pakaiyin Jordan'a chedin eisole, ati. Chuin aman Pakai hinna le nangma hinna pana kasei ahi, keiman nadalha hihhel inge, ati. Chuin amani achejom kit lhontai." 
2Kings2:7 Chuin themgaoho chapate pasal somnga acheuvin, gamlatah-a konin agaldot din adingun; amani Jordan panga adinglhone." 
2Kings2:8 Chuin Elijah'in aponsil chu alan, ajel tumin, twi chu avon ahile hilam le khulama akikhenin, hitichun amani tolgoa chun ache galkai lhontai." 
2Kings2:9 Chuin ahitin ahi, amani agalkailhon phatnin, Elijah'in Elisha jah-a, nangma-a kona lahmanga kaum masanghin, nangma ipi kabolpeh dingham, kithumin, ati. Chuin Elisha'n, katao ahi, nalhagao chan channi kachunga umhen, ati." 
2Kings2:10 Chuin aman, nangman thil hahsatah nathum ahi; hijeng jongle nangma-a kona lahdoh-a kaum pet namu-a ahile, nachunga chutichun umhen; namu loule vang, chutilou ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings2:11 Chuin amani lamjot puma akihoulimpeh lhona ahile, veuvin, mei kangtalai khatle mei sakol ho ahungkilah-in, amani achom khenin; Elijah chu chimpeijin van'a akaltoutai." 
2Kings2:12 Chule Elisha'n hichu amun, hepa, hepa, Israel kangtalai le asakol touthemho khu, tin asamin ahi. Chuin aman amachu amukit tapoi: chuin aponsil chu alan abotkeh-in, halni ason ahi."
