2Kings2:13 Aman Elijah ponsil ama-a kona hunglha jong chu alan, akile kitnin, Jordan pama adingtai." 
2Kings2:14 Aman Elijah ponsil ama-a kona hunglha chu alan, twi chu avon, Elijah Pakai Pathen chu hoija uma ham? ati, chuin amanjong twi avoh phatnin, hilam le khulama akikhenin ahi: chuin Elisha agalkaitai." 
2Kings2:15 Chuin themgaoho chapate Jericho'a anagaldot jinga umhon ama amuphat uvin, amahon Elijah lhagao Elisha chunga achutai atiuve. Chuin ama kimupi dingin ahungun, amasanga tolla aboh khupmun ahi." 
2Kings2:16 Chuin amahon ajah-a, tuhin vetemin, nasohte pasal hatcheh mi somnga kaumui; kataovu ahi, amaho cheohen lang na pupa gaholuhen; ijemtia Pakai lhagaovin apohtouva, molchung dung, ahiloule phaicham dunga ama aselhah hithei ahi, atiuve. Ahin aman nasol loudiu ahi, ati." 
2Kings2:17 Chuin amahon jachat umkhop leuva angeh phatnu chun, ajah uva, soltaovin, ati. Hijeh chun amahon pasal somnga asolun, nithum sung aholun, ahinla amupouve." 
2Kings2:18 Chuin amaho ahenga ahungkit phatnun, (ajehchu Jericho'a uma ahi,) aman ajah uvah, chehih-un tia naheng uva kasei hilouham? ati." 
2Kings2:19 Chuin khopi sunga miho chun Elisha jah-a, vetemin, katao ahi, ka Pakaiyin namu banghin, hiche khopihi nomtah ahi; ahinla twi aphapon, aleiset jong gamtem ahi, atiuve." 
2Kings2:20 Chuin aman, kahenga leibel thahkhat hinchoi junlang, asunga chi hinkoijun, ati. Chuin hichu ahenga ahinchoijun ahi." 
2Kings2:21 Chuin ama twisam phunga chun aga chen, asunga chun chi asung lutnin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Keiman hiche twihi kasuhtheng ahitai; tua patna thina, ahiloule gamtem umtalou ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings2:22 Hitichun Elisha'n asei dungjuijin, twi chu tuchan geijin aphajingtai." 
2Kings2:23 Chuin ama hiche mun'a konchun Bethel lama achetou tan ahi, chuin lamdunga achetou petchun, khopi-a konin chapang neochaho ahungdoh-un, amachu eltolnan abolun ajah-a, lutolpa, chetouvin; lutolpa, chetouvin, atiuve." 
2Kings2:24 Chuin ama akinung heijin, amaho chu aven, Pakai minin agaosap tan ahi. Chuin vompi ni gammanga konin ahungdoh-in, chapang somlileni chu abottel lhontan ahi." 
2Kings2:25 Chuin ama chua konin Carmel molsanga achen, chu-a konchun Samaria lama akiletai." 
2Kings3:1 Tun Judah leng Jehoshaphat lengchan kal kum somle kumget lhinkumin, Ahab chapa Jehoram chu Samaria'a Israelte chunga alengchang panin; chule kum somle kumni aleng changin ahi." 
2Kings3:2 Aman Pakai mitmun thilse abolin, apale anu bang vang ahipoi. Ajehchu apan anasem Baal milim chu anapai mangin ahi." 
2Kings3:3 Hijeng jongle ama Israel chonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonsetna a chun abeh jingin; hia konchun akikangse pon ahi. 
2Kings3:4 Chuin Moab lengpa Mesha chu kelngoi vahmi ahin, aman Israel lengpa henga kelngoinou sangjakhat le kelngoichal sangjakhat amul pumin anapen ahi." 
2Kings3:5 Ahinla ahitin ahi, Ahab athi phatnin, Israel lengpa dounan Moab lengpa akiphin tan ahi." 
2Kings3:6 Chuin Jehoram lengpa chuphat laitah chun Samaria'a konin apotdoh-in, Israelte jouse chu asimtan ahi." 
2Kings3:7 Chuin ama achen Judah leng Jehoshaphat henga mi asolin, Moab lengpan keima dounan akiphin tai; Moab douna galsat dinga keima toh nalhon dingham? agati sah-e. Chuin aman, ka chetou ding ahi: keima nang tobang kahin, kamite namite tobang ahin, kasakolho nangma sakol ho tobang ahi, ati." 
2Kings3:8 Chuin aman lampi hoichepena ikitoltou diuham? ati. Aman adonbutnin, Edom gamthip jotpaina lamlena, ati." 
2Kings3:9 Hitichun Israel lengpa chu Judah lengpa le Edom lengpa toh akontaove. Chuin nisagi achekolun ahile, anung juihou janel hole ganchaho donding twi aumtapon ahi." 
2Kings3:10 Chuin Israel lengpan, ohe! Pakaiyin leng thumho hi Moab mite khutna pehdoh dinga eikou khomu hitante, ati." 
2Kings3:11 Ahinla Jehoshaphat'in, hikoma hi ama-a kona Pakai idopthei nadiu Pakai themgao khatbeh umlou ham? ati. Chuin Israel lengpa soh khatnin adonbutnin, Elijah khut twi sung jipa Shaphat chapa Elisha aume, ati." 
2Kings3:12 Chuin Jehoshaphat'in, Pakai thu chu ama henga uma ahi, ati. Hitichun Israel lengpa le Jehoshaphat, chule Edom lengpa chu ahenga achesuh-un ahi." 
2Kings3:13 Chuin Elisha'n Israel lengpa henga, keiman nangma toh ipi kiguijopna kaneijem? napa themgaoho le nanu themgaoho henga chen, ati. Chuin Israel lengpan ajah-a, chepong-e: ajehchu Pakaiyin hiche leng thumho hi Moab mite khutna pehdoh dinga akoukhom ahitai, ati." 
2Kings3:14 Chuin Elisha'n, a-anga kadin jing hingjing janelho Pakai min panna kasei ahi, Judah leng Jehoshaphat hungjao hi kakhohsahlou hile, nangma lamhi vetjong kavet louding, mujong kakimusah louding nahi." 
2Kings3:15 Hijongle tumging tumthem mikhat neihin puipeh-un ati. Chuin ahitin ahi, tumging tumthem chun ahintum phatnin, Pakai khut achunga achutan ahi." 
2Kings3:16 Chuin aman, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hiche phaicham hi kotongin dimsah-un." 
2Kings3:17 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nanghon hui himhim namu loudiu, go himhim jong namuloudiu ahi. Hijeng jongle hiche phaicham chu nadon diuva twi dimding, nanghole nagancha teo, chule nagamsa houvin adondingu ahi." 
2Kings3:18 Chule hichehi Pakai mitmu-a thil neocha bou ahi: aman Moab mite jong nakhut nuva apehdoh nahlai ding ahi. 
2Kings3:19 Khopi kul nei jouse le khopi deilhen jouse najo uva, thingphung phaho jouse naphuh lhuh diu, twikul jouse nasuh kangdiu, chule gamphaho jouse songa nasuhset dingu ahi, ati, ati." 
2Kings3:20 Chuin jingkah anneh thilto tophat vellin ahitin ahi, hichun veuvin, Edom lampia konin twi ahung longin, gamsung chu twijin adimsoh tai." 
2Kings3:21 Chule Moab mite jousen, amaho satdingin lengho chu ahung kontou taove ti ajah phatnun, galvon kivon theija pat chunglam jouse akikhomun, gamgi china ading taove." 
2Kings3:22 Chuin amaho jingkah matah-in athoudoh-un, twi chung chu nisan ahinkhon ahile, Moab miten apang langkhatna twi chu thisan bangin asanin amuvin ahi." 
2Kings3:23 Chuin amahon, hichehi thisan ahi; lengho chu akithat mong mong ahiuve, amaho khatle khat kithat to ahitaove; hijeh chun tun, Moab mite, gachom taote atiuvin ahi." 
2Kings3:24 Chuin amaho Israelte gebuh ahunglhun phatnun, Israelte akipat doh-un, Moab miho chu athat taovin, hitichun amaho amasanguva ajamtaove. Ahinla amahon amano peh-un, Moab mite chu agamsungu geisanin athatpeh jengun ahi." 
2Kings3:25 Chule khopiho chu avochimun, agampha lai jouse amitakipmin song asekhumun avuhdimun, twikul jouse asubingun, thingphung phajouse aphuh lhuvin; Kirharaseth kho-a songho bouchu adalhaovin ahi. Ahinla ahsongse choiho acheleuvin, aga sumangun ahi." 
2Kings3:26 Chuin Moab lengpan gal kisat chu ama dingin ahoise behsetne ti amuphatnin, chemjam themcheh mi jasagi akipuijin, Edom lengpa pan nalam suhkeh ding agongin; ahinla ajou joupouve." 
2Kings3:27 Chujouvin akhela lengchang dingpa achapa lenpen chu amanin, kulvuma chun govam thilto dingin atohdoh-in; Israelte chunga hatah-in alunghangun ahi. Chuin ama chu adalhaovin, agamuva akile taove." 
2Kings4:1 Tun themgaoho chapate jite khatnin Elisha jah-a, nasohpa kajipa chu athitan; chule nasohpan Pakai aginje chu nahenai. Chule kachapa teni soh-a kaidingin kaleibat pao ahunge, tin akaptan ahi." 
2Kings4:2 Chuin Elisha'n amanu jah-a, ipi kabolpeh dingham? neisei peh-in, na in'a ipi naneijem? ati. Chuin amanun ajah-a, nasohnun ina thao belkhat tailou imacha kaneipoi, ati." 
2Kings4:3 Chuphatnin aman, naheng nakom jouse umle belho, akeoho ngeichu apadin galan, lhomcha gala hih beh-in." 
2Kings4:4 Chule nahunglut tengle, nangma le nachateni kot nakikha khumdiu; bel jouse nasun dimuva, chule adimho jouse achoma nakoi diu ahi, ati." 
2Kings4:5 Hitichun amanu ahenga konchun achedoh-in, bel hinchoi peh-a achapa teni toh kot akikhakhumun; aman asung sung jengtan ahi." 
2Kings4:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, belho adimsoh phatnin, amanun achapa jah-a, bel neihin choipeh nalaijin, ati. Chuin aman anu jah-a, beldang aumtapoi, ati. Chuin thao chu akangtai." 
2Kings4:7 Chuphatnin amanu ahungin Pathen mipa chu aseipehtai. Chuin aman, chen thao chu gakijoh inlang nabat gasan, chule amoh-a chun nangle nachapate kihinso taovin, ati." 
2Kings4:8 Chuin nikhat hi numei haotah khat chenna Shunem kho-a Elisha agachen, amanun an nedin asolin ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi, aman hiche mun ahin hopa chanin, hia chun an nedin alutjin ahi." 
2Kings4:9 Chuin amanun a-inneipu jah-a, tun vetemin, eihin hopa jinguva hi Pathen mitheng khat ahi kahetai." 
2Kings4:10 Katao ahi, bang chunga khun indan neokhat sempeh hitin; ama dingin jalkhun khat, dokhang khat, touna khat, chule meivah khom koipeh hite; chutia chu ama eini koma ahungji teng, hia chu lutji ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings4:11 Chuin nikhat chu ahitin ahi, ama hilama chun ahungin, indan sunga chun alutnin, hia chun alumtai." 
2Kings4:12 Chuin aman asohpa Gehazi henga Shunem, numeinu gakouvin, ati. Chuin aman agakouvin, amanu amasanga adingtai." 
2Kings4:13 Chuin aman amapa jah-a, tun amanu jah-a, vetan, nangman keiho-a dingin najo chanin neikhoh sah-un; nangma ipi kabolpeh ding nahim? lengpa, ahiloule janel gallamkai henga thu kaseipeh diuham? tin dongin ati. Chuin amanun adonbutnin, keima kamite lah-a cheng kahi, ati." 
2Kings4:14 Chuin aman, achutile amanu dinga ipi kibolpeh tantem? ati. Chuin Gehazi'n adonbutnin, tahbeh-in amanu chabei ahin, chule ajipahi tehse ahitai, ati." 
2Kings4:15 Chuin aman, amanu chu kouvin, ati. Chuin amanu akouphatnin, amanu kotna adingtai." 
2Kings4:16 Chuin aman, khovei tulai phatteng chapa khat napom ding ahi, ati. Chuin amanun, ahipoi, ka pakai, Pathen mipa, nasohnu henga jousei hih-in, ati." 
2Kings4:17 Chuin phatche dungjuijin numei chu agaijin, Elisha'n ajah-a anasei phattah chun chapa khat ahingtan ahi." 
2Kings4:18 Chuin chapang chu akhandoh phatnin, nikhat hi chang at-ho lah-a apa henga agachen ahi." 
2Kings4:19 Chuin aman apa henga, kalu, kalu atin ahi. Chuin apan chapang khat henga, anu hengah puiloijin, ati." 
2Kings4:20 Chuin aman chapangpa chu apoma, anu henga apui phatnin, anu khupchunga sun geijin atouvin, chujouvin athitai." 
2Kings4:21 Chuin amanu achetouvin, Pathen mipa jalkhun chunga alupsah-in, kot akha khumin, achedohtai." 
2Kings4:22 Chuin aman a-inneipu akouvin, nahenga katao ahi, Pathen mipa henga kalhaija kahungkit theinadin, gollhangho lah-a khatle sangan holah-a khat neihin solpeh in, ati." 
2Kings4:23 Chuin aman, lhathahni ahiloule cholngahni jongla ahipon, ibola tunitah-a ahenga nache ding ham? ati. Ahin amanun, hung phapha nante, ati." 
2Kings4:24 Chuin amanu sangan chunga atouvin, asohpa jah-a, masang lama tilloi loijin; thu kapeh tilouvin keima-a dingin olchesah hih-in, ati." 
2Kings4:25 Hitichun achen Pathen mipa heng Carmel mollama ahungin ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi, Pathen mipan amanu gamlatah-a amuphatnin, asohpa Gehazi jah-a, vetemin, gallanga khu Shunem numeinu ahi;" 
2Kings4:26 Tun amanu kimupi din lhai jel-in, kangeh nahi, chule ajah-a, ima jouse phapha-a hinam? na inneipu phapha-a hinam? naocha chu phapha-a hinam? gatin, ati. Chuin amanun, apha phanai tin adonbutne." 
2Kings4:27 Chuin amanu lhanga Pathen mipa heng ahung lhun phatnin, akeng atuh jengin ahile; amanu sondohdin Gehazi'n ahin naijin ahi. Chuin Pathen mipan, limsah hih in; ajehchu amanu lung gentheija ahi: Pakaiyin keija kona a-ima, eihetsahlou ahitai, ati." 
2Kings4:28 Chuphatnin amanun, ka pakai pa-a kona chapa kangeh-em? neijoulhep hih-in tia kanasei hilou ham? ati." 
2Kings4:29 Hitichun Gehazi jah-a, nakong kigah in, chule nakhutna katengol choijin lang chen; mikhat tou namujongle chun chibai boh hih-in, chule khat touvin na chibai jongle chun donhih-in; ka tenggol hi chapang maija gajamin, ati." 
2Kings4:30 Chuin chapangpa nuchun, Pakai hinna le nangma hinna pana kasei ahi, keiman nangma kadalhah louhel ding nahi, ati. Chuin akipatdoh-in, amanu chu ajuitai." 
2Kings4:31 Chule Gehazi chu amani masanga anachen, tenggol chu naocha maija anajamtai; ahinla husale imacha jahding aumtapoi. Hijeh chun ama kimupi din achekitnin, ajah-a, chapang chu athoudoh dehpoi, tin aseipeh-in ahi." 
2Kings4:32 Chuin Elisha insung ahunglhun phatnin, veuvin, chapang chu athisan ajalkhuna analumin ahi." 
2Kings4:33 Hitichun alutnin, amani changseh insunga kot akikhakhum honin, Pakai henga ataotai." 
2Kings4:34 Chuin lupna-a chun akaldoh-in, chapang chunga chun aboh-in, akamle akam, amitle amit, chule akhutle akhut asuton ahi. Chuin chapang chu a-op khumin ahile chapangpa tichu ahunglum jepjep tan ahi." 
2Kings4:35 Chuin akumlha kitnin, insunga chun avahlelen; chuin akaltou kitnin, ama chu a-opkhum kitnin ahi. Chuin chapang chu sagi veijen achin, chuin chapang chu amit ahahtai." 
2Kings4:36 Chuin aman Gehazi akouvin, Shunem numeinu hinkouvin, ati. Hitichun aman amanu ahinkoutan ahi. Chuin amanu ahenga ahung phatnin, nachapa hi kipomtan, ati." 
2Kings4:37 Chuin amanu alutnin, akengbula alhun, tolla aboh khupmin, achapa chu akipomin, apotdohtai." 
2Kings4:38 Chuin Elisha Gilgal'a ahungkit tai: chule gamsunga chun kel alhan; themgaoho chapate chu amasanga atouvun ahi. Chuin aman asohpa jah-a, bel lenchu songin lang themgaoho chapate din annoi honpeh in, ati." 
2Kings4:39 Chuin mikhat anche louva loujaova achen ahile gam lengpi guikhat amun, agachu a-ang dimset-in ahinpomin, annoi bela chun alhahtai: ajehchu amahon hihochu ipi ahi ahet louvu ahi." 
2Kings4:40 Hitichun mipi ho nehdin athuhpeh taove. Chuin ahitin ahi, annoi chu aneh petnun, amahon ahin samdoh-un, vo Pathen mipa, belsunga thina aume atiuve. Hitichun amahon hichu anethei tapouve." 
2Kings4:41 Ahinla aman, achutile anchu hinlaovin, ati. Chuin bela alhei lutnin; ajah uva, mihon anehtheina diuvin thuh-un, ati. Chuin belsunga chun imacha aphamo aumtapon ahi." 
2Kings4:42 Chuin Baal-shalisha'a konin mikhat ahungin, Pathen mipi chu ga masa-a kona kisem changlhah, sakol changlhah somni toh chang ga thah lihleh vuikhat ahinpohpeh in ahi. Chuin aman ajah-a, amahon aneh theina diuvin mipi ho chu pen ati." 
2Kings4:43 Chuin asohpan, mi jakhatjen anga hichehi kaluipeh dingham? ati. Aman mihon aneh theina diuvin pen, tin aseikitnin ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, amahon neuvintin, anehval nahlaidiu ahi, ati." 
2Kings4:44 Hitichun a-anguva aluipeh-in, amahon aneuvin, Pakai thu dungjui chun, aneh valu akhen nalaijun ahi." 
2Kings5:1 Tun Syria lengpa janel lamkai Naaman chu a-pakaipa mitmu-a dinga milentah le jabol changtah ahin, ajehchu ama jala Pakaiyin Syria te chu galjona anapeh ji ahi. Ama hi mihat hangsantah jong ahin; hinla miphah ahi." 
2Kings5:2 Syria mite chu ahon honin akitoldoh uvin, chule Israel gama konin numei chapang khat sohchangin ahin puidoh uvin; amanu chu Naaman inneipi jenin apangin ahi." 
2Kings5:3 Chuin amanu chun a-pakainu jah-a, ka pakaipa hi Samaria'a um themgaopa gakivetsah hitavele! ajehchu aman aphahhi athensah ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings5:4 Chuin Naaman agalutnin a-pakaipa jah-a chun, Israel gama kon nungahnu khun hiti tihin thu aseije agatin ahi." 
2Kings5:5 Chuin Syria lengpan, gache jengin, keiman Israel lengpa henga chun lekha khat jih nange, ati. Chuin ama akipatdoh-in, dangka talent som toh, sana nong sang gup toh, kikhelna von som akipoh-in ahi." 
2Kings5:6 Chuin aman lekha chu Israel lengpa henga ahin choijin, athuchu hitin akisune: Tun hiche lekha hi nahenga ahunglhun teng, vetan, keiman kasohpa Naaman hi aphah-a kona nathensah theina dingin, nahenga kahinsolin ahi." 
2Kings5:7 Chuin ahitin ahi, Israel lengpan lekha chu asimphatnin, apon asat telin, keihi Pathen kahia, mi kathisah-a, kahin sahthei hija, hichepa hin phah thensah dinga kahenga mi ahinsol ham? hijeh chun ngaitouvin, katao ahi, chule veuvin keimatoh kinahna nading iti ahol hitam, atin ahi." 
2Kings5:8 Chule Pathen mipa Elisha'n Israel lengpan aponho abot tele ti ajah phatnin, lengpa henga mi asolin, ibola napon nabotel ham? Israel gama themgao khat aume ti ahetnadin, tun amachu kahenga hinsolin, ati." 
2Kings5:9 Hitichun Naaman chu asakole akangtalai toh ahung kitolin, Elisha in kotphunga adingtai." 
2Kings5:10 Chuin Elisha'n thupole khat ahenga asolin, Jordan'a sagivei gaki soplhan, chutile natahsa hungkile kitnin tin, chutengle natheng ding ahitai, agatisah-e." 
2Kings5:11 Ahinla Naaman alunghangin, ache mangin, hitin aseije, vetan, kei ngaiton ama kahenga hungdoh teijintin, dingintin, a-Pakai Pathen min kou intin, akhutna kanatna chung chu thamintin, chuteng phahna chu daminte kati ahi, ati." 
2Kings5:12 Damascus vapiho, Abana le Pharpar khu Israel gama twi jouse sanga phajo hilou ham? hicheho-a khu kakisop lhah-a kathen moham? ati. Hitichun lunghang tah-in akiheijin achemang tai." 
2Kings5:13 Chuin asohten ahin naijun, ahenga thu aseijun, hepa, themgaopan thil lentah boldia nasoleh, hichu nabolda theiding ham? Aman gakisoplhan lang thengtan, ati kalvalla ipiba asei nahlai dingham? atiuve." 
2Kings5:14 Chuphatnin ama achesuh-in, Pathen mipa sei dungjuijin, Jordan'a chun sagivei akiphumin ahi. Chuin avouchu chapangsen vou bangin ahungkile kitnin, athengseltan ahi." 
2Kings5:15 Chuin ama le aloiho jouse Pathen mipa henga ahungkile kitnun, amasanga ading taove. Chuin aman, vetan, leiset pumpi-a hin Pathen aumpon, Israel gama bou aumme ti tun kahetai; hijeh chun tun kangeh nahi, nasoh phatthei bohnahi neisan peh-in, ati." 
2Kings5:16 Ahinla aman, a-anga kadinjing Pakai hingjing mina kasei ahi, keiman imacha laponge, ati. Ahin alahteina dingin aman angeh-in, ahinla ama anompoi." 
2Kings5:17 Chuin Naaman'in nahenga, chuti ahile, katao ahi, nasoh hi sangan nin apoh khopset leiset neipeh thei dingham? ajehchu nasoh hin tua pat Pakai henga tilouva, govam thilto le ganlhaina himhim pathen dangho henga kalha louhel ding ahitai." 
2Kings5:18 Hiche thila hin Pakaiyin nasohhi ngaidam maihen; kapupa Rimmon houin'a chibaiboh dinga alut tengle, aman kakhut chunga akingaijin, chule keimatah hi Rimmon houin'a kunjia kahi. Keima Rimmon houin sunga kakunji teng nasohhi Pakai chun hiche thilahin eingai damhen, ati." 
2Kings5:19 Chuin aman ajah-a lung mongin chetan, ati. Hitichun ama-a konin apotdoh-in achesaohih laije." 
2Kings5:20 Ahinla Pathen mi Elisha sohpa Gehazi chun, ven kapun Syria mi Naaman thil hinkenho lahpeh louvin alhadoh jengtan; ahinla Pakai hinna pana kasei ahi, nungdel ingting ipiham khatbeh galahpeh inge, atin ahi." 
2Kings5:21 Hitichun Gehazi'n Naaman anungdeltai. Chuin Naaman'in anunga min ahindel amuphatnin, akimupidin kangtalai ja konin akumlhan, ijakai phapha-a hinam, anati." 
2Kings5:22 Chuin aman, ijakai aphanai; kapun vetan tutah chun Ephraim mola konin themgao chapate mini ahung lhonin ahi. Kangeh nahi, dangka talent khat le kikhelna pon ni amani chu pen tia eihinsol ahi, ati." 
2Kings5:23 Chuin Naaman'in, lunglhai selin talent ni kilah jengin, ati. Chule akilah dingin hangeh-in angeh-in, sakhao ni sunga dangka talent nile kikhelna ponsil ni dipsunga athunin, asohte mini apohsah-in; chule Gahazi masanga chun ache lhonin ahi." 
2Kings5:24 Chuin insang alhun phatnun, amani khutna konin alan, insunga chun akoitai. Chuin amani chu alesolin, amani achedoh lhontai." 
2Kings5:25 Ahinla ama alutnin, apu anga adingtai. Chuin Elisha'n ajah-a, Gehazi hoilama kona hung nahim? ati. Chuin aman nasoh hoimacha kachepoi, ati." 
2Kings5:26 Chuin aman ajah-a aseijin, nakimupi dingpa akangtalaija kona ahung kiheikitna chu, kalungthim hi nangma toh kilhona hilou ham? sum, ponsil, Olive hon, lengpi hon, bongchal ho, soh pasal ho, chule soh numei ho lah phat ham?" 
2Kings5:27 Hijeh chun Naaman phahna chu nangma chungle nachih lhahte chunga a-itih-a chujingding ahitai, ati. Chuin amasanga kona apotdoh doh-in buhbang bangin aphahtan ahi." 
2Kings6:1 Chuin themgaoho chapaten Elisha jah-a, vetemin, tuhin nangma toh ichen khomnao munhi eiho dingin aneo behsehtai." 
2Kings6:2 Kataovu ahi, Jordan lama cheohitin, mitinin thingtum khatcheh chua konchun laohitin, chumuna chun ichen nadiu mun kisemu hite, atiuve. Chuin aman, cheovin, ati." 
2Kings6:3 Chuin mikhatnin, katao ahi, nasohte neilhon piuvin, ati. Chuin aman, lhonpi naovinge, tin adonbutnin ahi." 
2Kings6:4 Hitichun amahotoh alhontai. Chuin Jordan alhun phatnun, thing aphuhtaove." 
2Kings6:5 Ahinla mikhatnin thingtum atana ahile heichang chu twija alhalut tai. Chuin ama apengjah-in, ohe, hepu! mi-a kapalah ahi, ati." 
2Kings6:6 Chuin Pathen mipan hoija lhamang ham? ati. Chuin amun chu ahilin ahi. Aman molkang khat asatnin, amuntah-a chu akholutnin ahile; heichang chu ahung kiletdoh tai." 
2Kings6:7 Hichun aman, kilah-in, ati, chuin aman akhut alhangin, akilahtai." 
2Kings6:8 Chuin Syria lengpan Israelte chunga gal abolin, asohte toh thumop anei khomun, hiche mun chuche munchu kagebuh hiding ahi, ati." 
2Kings6:9 Chuin Pathen mipan Israel lengpa henga mi asolin, chuche mun jotlounadin chingtheijin; ajehchu hilama chun Syria te ahungsuh uve agatisah-e." 
2Kings6:10 Chuin Israel lengpan Pathen mipa hilnale gihna mun'a chun mi asolin, hia konchun khatvei niveiseh hilouvin, akihuhhing jingin ahi." 
2Kings6:11 Hijeh chun Syria lengpa chu hiche thil jeh hin alungkham lheh-in, asohte akouvin, ajah uva, ilah uva Israel lengpa lama pang koipen ihiu nei musah loudiu ham? ati." 
2Kings6:12 Chuin asohte lah-a khatnin, vo lengpa ka pakai, khatcha aumpoi: Israel gamsunga Elisha themgaopan najalkhun danna nathuseiho chu Israel lengpa ahilji ahibouve, ati." 
2Kings6:13 Chuin aman, keiman mi kasola kamat theinadin, chenlang hoija aum gavelhi temin, ati. Chuin ajah-a, vetan, Dothan'a aume, tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
2Kings6:14 Hijeh chun hilama chun sakol ho, kangtalai ho, chule mipi janle asolin; amaho jan-in ahungun, khopi chu a-um kimvel taove." 
2Kings6:15 Chuin Pathen mipa sohpa chu matah-a athodoh-a apotdohle, veuvin, mipi janelin khopi chu sakol ho le kangtalai toh anaum kimvelun ahi. Chuin sohpan ajah-a, ohe hepu! i-itiding hitam? ati." 
2Kings6:16 Chuin aman adonbutnin, kicha hih-in; ajehchu eini lama pangho chu amaho lama pangho sangin atamjouvin ahi, tin adonbutne." 
2Kings6:17 Chuin Elisha ataovin, Pakai, katao ahi, amuthei nadin amit hasah-in, ati. Chuin Pakaiyin gollhangpa mit ahasah-in ahile, aman amutan: chuin veuvin, Elisha kimvela molsang chu sakolle mei kangtalai ho adimsetnin ahi." 
2Kings6:18 Chuin amaho ahenga ahungsuh phatnun, Elisha Pakai henga ataovin, katao ahi, hiche mitehi amitnu chotsah-in, ati. Chuin Elisha thu dungjuijin amitnu achotsahtai." 
2Kings6:19 Chuin Elisha'n ajah uva, hichehi lampichu ahipon, chule khopi jongchu hichehi ahipoi; neijuijun, chutile naholpao henga chu kapuiding nahiuve, ati. Ahinla aman amaho Samaria lama apuitai." 
2Kings6:20 Chuin ahitin ahi, amaho Samaria ahunglhun phatnun, Elisha'n, Pakai amutheina diuvin, hiteho mit hi hasahtan, ati. Chuin Pakaiyin amitnu ahasahtan ahile, kho amutaovin; chule veuvin, amaho Samaria lailunga um anahi taove." 
2Kings6:21 Chuin Israel lengpan amaho amu phatnin, Elisha henga, hepa amahohi katha dingham? katha dingham? ati." 
2Kings6:22 Aman adonbutnin, nangman amahohi nasuhmang louding ahi; nangman soh changa namat ho chu nachemjam le nathalpi-a natha dingham? Amahon aneh uva adonuva, chule apupao henga ache theina diuvin, amasanguva an le twi luipeh-in, ati." 
2Kings6:23 Chuin amaho nehding nasatah-in agonpeh-in; chule amahon aneh uva, adon jouvun, amaho chu asolmang tan, amaho a-pakaipa henga achetauve. Hitichun Syria miho chu Israel gamsunga ahungkit tapouve." 
2Kings6:24 Chuin hiche jouhin ahitin ahi, Syria lengpa Benhadad'in janel honpi chu akhomin, akontouvin, Samaria aumkol tan ahi." 
2Kings6:25 Chuin Samaria gama chun kel nasatah alhatan; chule veuvin, sangan lu khat dangka somgetna akijoh-a, vakhu eh hop li-a hop khat dangka nongsi nga-a akijoh kahsen, khopi chu aumchah jengun ahi." 
2Kings6:26 Chuin Israel lengpa kulvuma ahung valea ahile, numei khatnin ama chu ahinsamin, ajah-a, neikithopin, ka pakai, vo lengpa, atin ahi." 
2Kings6:27 Chuin aman, Pakaiyin nakithopi loule keiman hoija kona kakithopi dingham? Chang pholla konin em, ahiloule lengpi kichilna-a konin em? ati." 
2Kings6:28 Chuin lengpan amanu jah-a, iti nahi ham? ati. Chuin amanun adonbutnin, hichenu hin kahenga, nachapa hintoh doh-in, tunin nehitin, chule jingle kei chapa nena hite, atin ahi." 
2Kings6:29 Hitichun kachapa kakihon lhonin, kane lhontai. Chuin ajing nikhon amanu henga, nachapa hintoh dohtan, neta hite, katin ahile; amanun achapa anaseltai." 
2Kings6:30 Chuin ahitin ahi, lengpan numeinu thusei ajah phatnin, apon asat telin; chuin palvuma vahlen, mipi chun aveovin, chule veuvin, atichunga khaodip pon akisiltan ahi." 
2Kings6:31 Chuin aman, tunikho-a hi Shaphat chapa Elisha luchang achunga aum den poupouva ahile, Pathen'in chutobang chun eibol hen, chule akalvalin jong eibol hen, atin ahi." 
2Kings6:32 Ahinla Elisha a-in'a atouvin, chule upahon atoupiuvin ahi. Chuin lengpan a-angsunga konin mikhat asolin; ahinla amapa chu ahunglhun masangin, aman upaho jah-a, hiche tolthatpa chapan kalu ladinga mi ahinsol hi nahet uvem? Veuvin, sottolpa ahungteng kot khah unlang, kotna lutsah hih helun: anunga khu apu kholhah gin hilouham? ati." 
2Kings6:33 Chuin ama amahotoh akihou nalaijin, veuvin, thupo chu amaheng ahung lhungtai. Chuin aman, veuvin, hiche thilsehi Pakaiya kon ahin; Pakai chu ipi dinga kanga nahlai dingham? ati." 
2Kings7:1 Chujouvin Elisha'n, Pakai thuhi ngaijun; Pakaiyin hitin aseije, jingle tuphat teng Samaria kotpi phunga changbong nelsel tena dan khat sekel khat, chule sakol chang tena dan ni sekel khatna kijoh ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings7:2 Chuin lengpa kingaina milen khatnin Pathen mipa chu adonbutnin, veuvin, Pakaiyin van'a bangkot ahonding hijongle, hichu hitheidi hinam? ati. Chuin aman, vetan hichehi namitna namu-a, neh vang naneh louding ahi, ati." 
2Kings7:3 Chuin kotpisung lutna-a chun miphah li aumin; amaho khatnin khat jah-a, hikomahi ibola ithi kahseuva itou diuham?" 
2Kings7:4 Khosunga lutnu hite tileu henla, khosung kel alhan, chua chu ithi jeng dingu ahin; hilaija hin hiti tou jongleu hen, ithi thou thoudiu ahi. Hijeh chun tun hungtemun, Syria sepaiho lama kipelut jengu hite; eihing hoijule hingu hitin; eithaolela ithi maidingu hitante, akitiuve." 
2Kings7:5 Syria miteho gebuh-a chedingin khomut chipchep in akipatdoh taovin; chuin amaho Syria te gebuhpam nungpen ahung lhunule, veuvin, hichea chun koimacha anaum tapoi." 
2Kings7:6 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Syria mite janel chu kangtalai ho husagin, sakol ho hugin, janelho hugin chule janel tamtah ho hugin geijin ajahsah-in; chuin khatnin khat jah-a aseijun, veuvin, Israel lengpa hin Hit lengte, Egypt lengte hohi ichunguva galbol dinga apalah ahi, atiuve." 
2Kings7:7 Hijeh chun amaho akipatnun khomut chipchep in ajamun, apon inhou, asakolhou, asanganhou, chule agebuh-u chu atobang bangin ahinna diuvin adalhaovin, ajamtaovin ahi." 
2Kings7:8 Chuin hiche mi phahho chu gebuh manglhapen alhun phatnun, pon-in khatna agalutnun, aneuvin adonnun, chua konchun sana le dangka chule ponsil ho akilah uvin, acheuvin agaselun; chuin ahungkitnun gebuh chomdang khatna alut kitnun, chu-a kon jongchun alah kitnun, aselkitnun ahi." 
2Kings7:9 Chuin amaho khatnin khat jah-a aseijun, ithilbolu hi aphapoi; tuni hi kipana thupha lhunni ahin, eiho ithipbeh jengun ahi: jingkah khovah gei ingauva ahile, ichunguva thilse hunglhung thei ahi. Hijeh chun tun hungun, icheuva lengte insung igahil theina diuvin, akitiuve." 
2Kings7:10 Hitichun ahungun, khopi kotngahpa chu akouvun, ahenga, Syria miho gebuh-a kagacheuvin, chule vetan, chua chun mi koimacha aumpon, mi awjong akijapon, ahinla sakol ho, sanganho akihennin, pon inho chu abang bangin aume, atiuve." 
2Kings7:11 Chuin aman kotngah ho chu akouvin, chuin amahon leng insunga miho chu ahilun ahi." 
2Kings7:12 Chuin lengpa chu ajanin athouvin, asohte henga, tun keiman Syria miten ichunguva ipi abolem navetsah uvinge, eiho igilkel uve tihi ahetnuva; hijeh-a chu agebuh uva kona chu gamlah-a kiseldinga potdoh uva, amaho khopi-a kona ahungdoh tengule ahingin man-u hitin, khopi sunga lutnu hite atiu ahi, ati." 
2Kings7:13 Chuin asohte lah-a khatnin adonbutnin, nahenga katao ahi, khopi sunga sakol umsun lah-a ngahi mi phabep gakaisah-in, (vetan, amahohi akidalha Israel mipi ho jouse tobang ahiuvin; vetan, amaho Israel mipi athigam saho tobang ahiuve:) hijeh chun amaho solu hitin, vetem uhite kati-e, ati." 
2Kings7:14 Hijeh chun amahon sakol kangtalai ni alauvin; chule lengpan Syria janelho nunga mi asolin, cheovinlang gaveovin, ati." 
2Kings7:15 Chuin amaho Jordan lama amaho nunglama acheule; veuvin, lampi jouse chun Syria miten akino nalam uva apaiju um le bel chule ponsil adimsetnin ahi. Chuin thupo ho akileuvin lengpa ahiltaove." 
2Kings7:16 Chuin mipi apotdoh-un, Syria mite ponbuh chu achom taove. Hitichun Pakai thu dungjuijin, changbong nel tena dim khat sekel khat manin akijoh-in, chule sakol chang tena ni chu sekel khat manin akijohtan ahi." 
2Kings7:17 Chuin lengpan kingaina milenpa chu kul kotpi ngah-in apansah-in ahi. Ahenga lengpa ahung kumsuh laija, Pathen mipan anasei bangin, amapa chu mipin kotphunga ana chotphaovin, athitai." 
2Kings7:18 Chuin Pathen mipan lengpa henga anasei, jingle tuphat vela Samaria kotbula sakol chang tena dimni sekel khat manna kijoh-a, chule changbong nel tena dimkhat sekel khat manna kijoh ding ahi, atia;" 
2Kings7:19 Chule pipui pan, vetan, Pakaiyin van'a bangkot ahonding hijongle, hichu hitheidi hinam? tia ana donbutna; Elisha'n, ven, nangman hiche chu namitna namu ding, nehvang naneh louding ahi, tia anasei ahi." 
2Kings7:20 Hitobang chun ama chunga achutai. Ajehchu mipin kotpiphunga achotphaovin, ama athitan ahi." 
2Kings8:1 Chuin Elisha'n achapa adamsah numei henga chun, kipatdoh-in, nangma le na-insung mite naumthei theina dinguvin, napem nathei chanun gapemun; ajehchu gamsunga Pakaiyin kumsagi jen kel alhahsah ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings8:2 Chuin Pathen mipan asei dungjuijin, numei chu akipat doh-in; a-insung mite toh acheuvin Philistine gama chun kumsagi agapemun ahi." 
2Kings8:3 Chuin kumsagi kichai chun ahitin ahi, numeinu chu Philistine'a konin ahungkile kitnin, lengpa henga a-inle alou ngeh dingin agachen ahi." 
2Kings8:4 Chule lengpan Pathen mipa soh Gehazi ana kihoulim pin, katao ahi, Elisha thilbol loupiho jouse chu neihilin, atin ahi." 
2Kings8:5 Chuin ahitin ahi, mithisa khat ahinsahkit asei laitah chun, veuvin, achapa kihinsahkit numeinu chu lengpa henga a-in le lou ngehnan ahung taovin ahi. Chuin Gehazi'n, ka pakai, vo lengpa, hichehi Elisha'n ahinsah numeinu le achapa chu ahi, ati." 
2Kings8:6 Chuin lengpan numeinu chu adongin ahile, amanun aseipehtan ahi. Hitichun lengpan vaipo khat angansen, hiche numeinu-a jouse chu lepeh kitnin, chule gamsung adalhah nikho-a pat tuchan geija loujaova agaho jouse lepeh kit tan, ati." 
2Kings8:7 Chuin Elisha Damascus'ah ahungin; chule Syria lengpa Benhadad chu anadampon; ahenga, Pathen mipa chu hilama ahunge, ti aseipeh-un ahi." 
2Kings8:8 Chuin lengpan Hazael jah-a, thilpeh kenginlang Pathen mipa gakimupin, chule hiche kanatna-a kona hi kadamdoh kitding hinam? Pakai chu gadohsah temin, ati." 
2Kings8:9 Hitichun ama kimupi din Hazael achen, thilpehdin Damascus'a konin thilpha tincheng sangongsao somli jen poh thil akengin, ahungin ama masanga adingin, nachapa Benhadad Syria lengpan nahenga eihinsolin, hiche natna-a kona hi kadamdoh kitding ham? atin ahi, ati." 
2Kings8:10 Chuin Elisha'n ajah-a, thonlouva nadamdoh kitding ahi gatipeh-in: ahinla thitei teiding ahi ti Pakaiyin eimusahtai, ati." 
2Kings8:11 Chuin jachat umkhop leuvin amapa chu aven: chuin Pathen mipa chu akaptai. 
2Kings8:12 Chuin Hazael'in, kapu chu ibola kapjeng nahim? ati. Aman, Israel chate chunga thilse naboldingchu kahetjeh ahi; akuldetho halhan natin, agollhangho chemjamin thatnin natin, achateu chule anu oipi sunga umho jongchu nakhejalpeh ding ahi, tin adonbutne." 
2Kings8:13 Chuin Hazael'in, nasoh keima hi uicha kahija, hitobang thil loupi chu katohthei ding hijaham? ati. Chuin Elisha'n, nangma Syria mite chunga leng nahiding Pakaiyin eimusah ahitai, ati." 
2Kings8:14 Hitichun ama Elisha'a konin apotnin, apu henga ahungtai. Aman ajah-a, Elisha'n nahenga ipi aseijem? ati. Chuin aman na damdoh teiding ahi, ti eiseipeh-e, tin adonbutnin ahi." 
2Kings8:15 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, ponsatah khat alan twija adekotnin, amai akhunan ahile, hitichun athitan ahi. Chuin Hazael alengchang tai." 
2Kings8:16 Chuin Israel leng Ahab chapa Jehoram lengchan kal kum ngana-in, Jehoshaphat chu Judah leng hija ahin, Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chapa Jehoram chu ahung lengchang panin ahi." 
2Kings8:17 Ama alengchan patchun kum somthumle kum ni ahin, Jerusalem'a kumget aleng changin ahi." 
2Kings8:18 Chule aman Ahab insung chonna bangin, Israel lengte lamlhah ajotnin ahi: ajehchu a-inneipi chu Ahab chanu hija ahin; Pakai mitmun thilse abolin ahi." 
2Kings8:19 Hijongle ama le achate henga meivah pehjing dinga ana thutep bangin, asoh David khohsahna jalchun Judah chu asumangpon ahi." 
2Kings8:20 Ama nikho laijin Edom chu Judah khutnoija konin akiphinun, achunguva lengkhat akisem taove." 
2Kings8:21 Hijeh chun Joram kangtalai jousetoh Zair'a achetouvin ahi. Chuin ama jan-in athou doh-in, ama umkimvel Edom miho le gal lamkai kangtalai ho athatgamin; mipi ho chu aponbuh sunguva ajamlut gamtaove." 
2Kings8:22 Ahinla Edom Judah khutnoija konin tuni geijin akiphinun ahi. Chuin hiche phat mama chun Libna jong akiphinin ahi. 
2Kings8:23 Chule Joram thilbol dangho jousele atoh jouse chu Judah lengte thusimbua kisun hilouham? 
2Kings8:24 Chuin Joram apu apate toh alumkhomin, David khopi-a apu apate toh akivuitai. Chuin ama khelin achapa Ahaziah alengchang tai." 
2Kings8:25 Israel leng Ahab chapa Joram lengchan kal kum somle kumni na-in, Judah leng Jehoram chapa Ahaziah alengchang panne." 
2Kings8:26 Alengchan pat kumchun Ahaziah kum somni le kumni ahitai. Chuin ama Jerusalem'a kumkhat aleng changin ahi, chule anu minchu Athaliah ahin, Israel lengpa Omri chanu ahi." 
2Kings8:27 Chuin aman Ahab insung lamlhah ajotnin, Pakai mitmun Ahab insung bol bangin thilse abolin ahi. Ajehchu ama Ahab insung tupa hija ahi." 
2Kings8:28 Chuin ama Ramoth-gilead'ah Syria lengpa Hazael kisatpi dingin Ahab chapa Joram toh achen; chuin Syria miten Joram amavo taove. 
2Kings8:29 Chuin Joram lengpa chu Syria lengpa Hazael to akisat petnuva Ramah mun'a akimavona kijen dinga Jezreel lama akinungle tan ahi. Chuin Judah lengpa Jehoram chapa Ahaziah chu, Jezreel'a um Ahab chapa Joram anat jeh-a vedin achesuh-in ahi." 
2Kings9:1 Chuin Elisha themgaovin themgao chate khat akouvin, ajah-a, natai kigah-in, chule nakhutnin hiche thaobom hi choijin lang Ramoth-gilead'a gache-in:" 
2Kings9:2 Chukoma nagalhun teng, Nimshi chapa Jehoshaphat chapa Jehu chu holdoh inlang lutnin; chule asopite lah-a konin kipatdohsah inlang, indan sungnung khatna puilutnin:" 
2Kings9:3 Chule thaobom chu lanlang aluchunga sungin, chule ajah-a, Pakaiyin Israelte chunga lengdinga thao kanu nahitai, atie, tin seijin. Chuteng kot honginlang jamin, chule khongai hih-in, ati." 
2Kings9:4 Hitichun themgao gollhangpa chu Ramoth-gilead'a achetai. 
2Kings9:5 Chuin ahung lhunle, veuvin, janel gal lamkaiho chu ana toukhomun ahi; chuin aman, gal lamkaipa, nahenga thukhoh seiding kaneije, ati. Chuin Jehu'n koipen henga am? ati. Chuin aman, vo gallamkai, nangma henga, ati." 
2Kings9:6 Chuin ama akipatdoh-in, insunga alut tai; chuin aman aluchanga thaochu asungin, ajah-a, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Pakai mipite Israelte chunga lengdinga thao kanu nahitai." 
2Kings9:7 Kasohte themgaoho thisanle Pakai sohte jouse thisan phuchu Jezebel khutna kalah theina dinga, Ahab insung mite chu natha gamhel ding ahi." 
2Kings9:8 Ajehchu Ahab insung pumpi mangthah ding; Israel gamsunga Ahab'a kona cha pasal tapou chu, ongthol hihen akihen hijongle kasuhmang ding ahi." 
2Kings9:9 Chule Ahab insung chu Nebat chapa Jeroboam insung bangle, Ahijah chapa Baasha insung banga kasem ding ahi." 
2Kings9:10 Uicha hon Jezebel chu Jezreel kulpanga anehdiu, amanu vuiding koimacha umlou ding ahi, ati. Chuin kot ahongin ajamtai." 
2Kings9:11 Hitichun Jehu chu apu sohte henga ahungdohtan; chuin mikhatnin ajah-a, ijakai phasohnam? ibola mi ngolpahi nahenga hunga ham? ati. Chuin aman ajah uvah, nahetsao mi hija, athusei jong nahetnu chula-em, ati." 
2Kings9:12 Chuin amahon, kahe pouve; tun neihilun atiuve. Chuin aman ahenguva, hiti hitihin kahenga thu aseijin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Israelte chunga lengdinga thao kanu nahi, atie, ati." 
2Kings9:13 Chuin amaho amitakipmin aponu asutlhaloi chelun, kalbiho chungnung pena ama noija chun aphaovin; sumkon amutnun, Jehu alengchang tai, atiuve." 
2Kings9:14 Hitichun Nimshi chapa Jehoshaphat chapa Jehu chun Joram dounan aguh-a thil agong pantan ahi. (Tun Joram, amale Israelte jousen, Syria lengpa Hazael jeh-a Ramoth-gilead chu ana ngatupmu ahi." 
2Kings9:15 Joram lengpa vangchu Syria leng Hazael toh akisat laija Syria leng miten amavo chu Jezreel kho-a kisudam dinga kilekit ahitai.) Chuin Jehu'n, pha nasah ule koimacha Jezreel langa hiche thusei dingin potdohsah hih-un, ahiloule jam dohsah hihhelun, ati." 
2Kings9:16 Hitichun Jehu chu kangtalai ja atouvin, Jezreel lama chun achetan ahi; ajehchu chukoma Joram uma ahin, chule Judah lengpa Ahaziah chu Joram vedinga hungsuh-a ahi." 
2Kings9:17 Chuin Jezreel insung chunga chun khongah khat adingin, amachun Jehu loiho hungchu amulhin, mihon khat kamui, ati. Chuin Joram'in, amaho kimupi din sakol toumi solinlang, chamna thu hinam? gatisah-in, ati." 
2Kings9:18 Hitichun mikhat akimupidin sakol chunga atouvin achen, lengpan chamna thu hinam? atie agati. Chuin Jehu'n chamna iding natiham? kanunglama chen, ati. Chuin khongahpa chun aseijin, thupolepa chu ahenguva achen, ahinla ahungkile tapoi, ati." 
2Kings9:19 Chuin aman aniveinan michom dang khat sakol chunga asolkitnin, ahenguva ahunglhunin, lengpan chamna thu hinam? atie ati. Chuin Jehu'n adonbutnin, chamna iding natiham, kanung lama chen, ati." 
2Kings9:20 Chuin khongah pan, ama jong ahengu agalhungin, ahinla ahung kinungle kit tapoi: chule asakol tildan jong Nimshi chapa Jehu sakol tildan abange; ajehchu hamvevun atil jenge, ati." 
2Kings9:21 Chuin Joram'in kigon, ati. Chuin akangtalai agotpeh taove. Chuin Israel leng Joram le Juda leng Ahaziah akangtalai gela atoulhonin, Jehu kimupi din akondoh lhonin, chule Jezreel mi Naboth honsunga akimuto pi lhontan ahi." 
2Kings9:22 Chuin ahitin ahi, Joram'in Jehu amu phatnin chamna thu hinam, Jehu? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, nanu Jezebel jonthanhoina le doithu hijatpi hi aumlai se-a ipi chamna umthei dingham? atin ahi." 
2Kings9:23 Chuin Joram'in akhut aleheijin, ajam'in, chule Ahaziah jah-a, vo Ahaziah kiduha bolna aume, ati." 
2Kings9:24 Chuin Jehu'n athanei chasunin thalpi chu aloijin, Joram dahteni kikahtah-a akapma ahile, athalmuh jumin aluchang adotpaijin, akangtalai chunga a-op dentai." 
2Kings9:25 Chujouvin Jehu'n agal lamkaipa Bidkar jah-a, along chu lanlang, Jezreel mi Naboth loulai mun'a seplhatan; ajehchu hiche hi geldoh-in, nangle kei apa Ahab nunga itoukhom laija, Pakaiyin hiche pohgih hi achunga anangap ahitai;" 
2Kings9:26 Pakaiyin, tahbeh-in janhin Naboth thisanle achapate thisan kamu mong mongin; chule hiche mun mama-a hi kalethuh ding nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Hijeh chun tun Pakai thu dungjuijin ama chu lanlang, hiche leiset munahin seplhan, ati." 
2Kings9:27 Ahin Judah lengpa Ahaziah chun hichu amuphatnin, hon inlampi lama ajamtan ahi. Chuin Jehu'n anung ajuijin, kangtalai ja chun amajong thatnun, ati. Chuin Ibleam khokenga Gur jot touna-a chun hitichun abol taovin ahi. Chuin ama Megiddo lama ajamin, hia chun athitai." 
2Kings9:28 Chuin asohten Jerusalem lama kangtalai khatna apouvin, David khopi-a apu apate toh lhana avuitaove." 
2Kings9:29 Chuin Ahab chapa Joram lengchan kal kum kumsomle kumkhat na-a chu Ahaziah chu Judah te chunga ana lengchang pan ahi. 
2Kings9:30 Chuin Jezreel'a Jehu ahung phatnin, hichu Jezebel'in ajatan; amanun amai ajemin, asam akipo jolin, bangkotna konin ahinven ahi." 
2Kings9:31 Chuin Jehu kotpi-a alut tolhonin, amanun, apu thatpa Zimri'in chamna anei hinam? atin ahi." 
2Kings9:32 Chuin Jehu bangkotlam ngan adahdoh-in, koiham keima lama pang? koiham? atin ahi. Chuin nukiso ni ham thum hamin ahin veuvin ahi." 
2Kings9:33 Chuin aman, amanu chu hinson lhaovin, ati. Chuin mahon ahin sonlhaovin ahile, athisan phabeppi bang le sakol ho chunga akithe thangin ahi. Chuin aman akengton anachilin ahi." 
2Kings9:34 Chuin ama alut phatnin, anen adon tan ahi. Chuin aman, cheovin, hiche sapset changnuhi gaveovin lang gavuijuvin; ajehchu amanuhi leng chanu khat ahi, ati." 
2Kings9:35 Chuin amaho avui dingin ache taove; ahinla amahon alugu le akeng chule akhut phangho tailou adang amu tapouve. 
2Kings9:36 Hitichun amaho ahung kile kitnun, hichu ahung hetsah taove. Chuin aman, hichehi Pakaiyin asoh Tishbi mi Elijah'a kona anasei, Jezreel khomuna Jezebel phe uichaten anehdiu;" 
2Kings9:37 Chule koimachan, hilaija hin Jezebel akivuije atilouna dinguva, alongchu Jezreel gam loujaova eh tobang hiding ahi, tia anasei guilhuna ahi, ati." 
2Kings10:1 Samaria'a chun Ahab'in chapa Somsagi aneijin ahi. Chuin Jehu'n Samaria'a Jezreel vaipoho, chule Ahab chate hinvah dohho henga chun lekha athotnin, hitin asune;" 
2Kings10:2 Tun hiche lekha hi nahengu ahunglhun lhunle, napupao chapate chu naheng uva uma, chule kangtalai ho, sakol ho, kulpi kium le galvon jong naneiju ahin," 
2Kings10:3 Napu-u chapate lah-a aphapen veovin lang, apa laltouna chunga tousah-un, chule napu insung dingin gal sat uvin, ati." 
2Kings10:4 Ahinla amaho akicha behset jengun, veuvin, amasanga leng nibon dingjou louva; eiho iti idinthei dinguham? atiuve." 
2Kings10:5 Chuin leng insunga vaipopa, khopi chunga vaipopa, upaho jong, chule chapangho hinvah dohho nasan chun Jehu henga chun thu athotnun, keiho nasohte kahiuvin, nangin bolin neiti jouseu bolung ting; leng khatcha sem pouvinge: namitmu-a pha nasah chan boljengin, atiuvin ahi." 
2Kings10:6 Chujouvin aniveina-in lekha hitin asun kitnin, keima-a nahiuva, kathu nangai dinguva ahile, napupao chapate luchu hinlaovin lang jingle tuphat hin Jezreel'a kahenga hunguvin, tin asunin ahi. Tun leng chapate chu somsagi ahiuvin, ahin vahdoh-a khopi milen hotoh umngen ahiuve." 
2Kings10:7 Chuin ahitin ahi, lekha chu ahengu alhun phatnin, lengchapate chu amanun, asomsagi chun athatnun, alu chu boma akhumun, chule amahon hichu Jezreel'a athot taove." 
2Kings10:8 Chuin thangkou khat ahungin, amahon lengpa chapate lu ahinpo taove, tin amachu aseipeh-e. Chuin aman khopi lutna akhun lhuhnin lhu khomun lang, jingkah geijin umhen, ati." 
2Kings10:9 Chuin jingkah-in ama apotdoh-in, adingin, mijouse jah-a chun, nangho michonpha nahiuve: veuvin, kapu chu ka changlhin kathat tai. Ahinla hicheho jousehi koitha ham?" 
2Kings10:10 Pakaiyin Ahab mite chungthu asei Pakai thuchu halkhat chajong tolla lhamang louding ahi ti tuhin hechennun: ajehchu Pakaiyin asoh Elijah kama aseichu atohdoh ahitai, ati." 
2Kings10:11 Hitichun Jehu'n Jezreel'a Ahab insung mi amoh jouse, amilenho jouse, chule asangkaiho, athempuho khatcha khenlou hela atha chai kahsen athatnin ahi." 
2Kings10:12 Chuin ama akipatdoh-in achen, Samaria ahungtai. Chuin lamdunga kelngoimul vona in'a aumchun," 
2Kings10:13 Jehu'n Judah lengpa Ahaziah sopiho amun, koi nahiuvem? ati. Chuin amahon keiho Ahaziah sopite kahiuvin; lengpa chate le lengnu chate chibai bohdinga chesuh kahiuve, tin adonbutnuve." 
2Kings10:14 Chuin aman ahingin man-un ati. Chuin amaho ahingin amanun, kelngoimul vona in kokhuh-a mi somlileni jen athatnun; amaho khatcha khen aneipoi." 
2Kings10:15 Chuin chukom adalhah phatnin, Rechab chapa Jehonadab ama lamto-a hung amun: chuin chibai aboh-in, ajah-a, nachunga lungdih kaput banga hi lungdih naputnem, ati. Jehonadab'in kapu nai, ati. Achutile nakhut neihinpen, ati. Chuin akhut agahpen ahile, ama henga kangtalai chunga akai luttai." 
2Kings10:16 Chuin aman kahenga hungin lang Pakai dinga katompanje hungven, ati. Hitichun akangtalai chunga atousah taove." 
2Kings10:17 Chuin ama Samaria ahunglhun phatnin, Elijah henga Pakai thusei dungjuijin, Ahab insungmi Samaria umjouse chu asuhmanghel kahsen abonchan athat gamtan ahi." 
2Kings10:18 Chuin Jehu'n mijouse akoukhomin, ajah uvah, Ahab'in Baal chu anajen maimai ahin; Jehu'n vang aha jencheh ding ahi." 
2Kings10:19 Hijeh chun tun Baal themgao jouse, asohte jouse, chule athempu jouseu kahenga hinkouvun; koima alhasam umlou helding ahi: ajehchu Baal henga ganlhaina loupitah kabolding ahin; aumlouchan chu kihinghoi louhel ding ahi, ati. Ahinla Jehu'in Baal houho thagam nadinga, doha thuhtah-a abol ahi." 
2Kings10:20 Chuin Jehu'n Baal houna dingin khoppilen phongjalun, ati. Chuin amahon aphongjal letaovin ahi." 
2Kings10:21 Chuin Jehu'n Israel pumpi thu athotnin; Baal houjouse ahungun, hitichun ahunglou mikhatcha jong aumpoi. Chuin amaho Baal insunga alutnun; Baal kotbula konin bangtom changei adimset jengun ahi." 
2Kings10:22 Hitichun kivonna pon hompa jah-a chun, Baal houho jousehi kivonna pon pecheh in, ati. Hitichun kivonna pon chu apecheh-in ahi." 
2Kings10:23 Chuin Jehu le Rechab chapa Jehonadab chu Baal insunga chun alutlhonin, chuin Baal houho jah-a chun, holun lang veleuvin, hiche-a hin Baal houho tailou Pakai mite jong umgetnunte, ati." 
2Kings10:24 Chuin ganlhaina le govam thilto tohdinga alutphatnun, Jehu'n polama mi somget adinsah-in, ajah uva, nakhut uva kahinpuilut mikhattou ahoidoh auma, ajamdohsah aumle, ajamdohpa hinna khela aman ahinna achanding ahi, ati." 
2Kings10:25 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman govam thilto achai chaijin, Jehu'n avetuphole gal lamkaiho jah-a, lutnun lang thatnun; khatcha hung dohsah hih-un, ati. Chuin amaho chu chemjamin athatnun; chuin ngahtuple gal lamkaiho chun ahinleh doh-un, khopi-a Baal in'a chun acheuvin ahi." 
2Kings10:26 Chuin Baal in'a konin milimho ahinpodoh-un, ahalvam taove." 
2Kings10:27 Chuin Baal milim chu asuchimun, Baal in chu asulhuvin, tunigeijin ehbuh in aneijuve." 
2Kings10:28 Hitobang chun Jehu'n Israel lah-a konin Baal anasumang helin ahi. 
2Kings10:29 Ahijeng vangin Bethel le Dan'a um sana bongnou lim asema, Israel chonset sahpa, Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonset naho-a konin Jehu chu akiheimang dehpon ahi." 
2Kings10:30 Chuin Pakaiyin Jehu jah-a, kamitmu-a thildih nabola, kalungsunga umho jouse dungjuija Ahab insung chunga nabolphat jeh-a, nachate khang li geija Israelte laltouna-a toudiu ahi, ati." 
2Kings10:31 Ahinla Jehu'n alungthim pumpi-a Israel Pakai Pathen dan thupeh-a chon ding chu akhohsahpon ahi; ajehchu Israelte chonsetsah Jeroboam chonset na-a konin akihei mangpon ahi. 
2Kings10:32 Hiche laichun Pakaiyin Israel gamsung chu asukeh pantan; Hazael'in Israel gamsung jouse ahinjou pehtan ahi. 
2Kings10:33 Jordan'a pat solamsang, Gilead gam jouse, Gad te, Reuben te, Manasseh te, Arnon vapidung panga Aroer kho-a pat Gilead le Basan geijin ahinlatan ahi." 
2Kings10:34 Tun Jehu thilbol danghole anatoh jouse chu Israel lengte thusimbua kisunlut hilouham? 
2Kings10:35 Chuin Jehu chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, amachu Samaria a avuitaove. Chuin achapa Jehoahaz ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Kings10:36 Samaria'a Israelte chunga Jehu lengchan phatsung chu kum somni le kumget ahi. 
2Kings11:1 Chuin Ahaziah nu Athaliah'in achapa athi amuphatnin, akipatnin leng chilhah jouse asumangtai." 
2Kings11:2 Ahinla Ahaziah sopinu, Joram lengpa chanu Jehosheba chun, Ahaziah chapa Joash chu leng chapate kithat ho lah-a konchun anagudoh-in; amale adon nutah chu Athaliah'a konin lupna indan sunga asel honin, hitichun amachu akithat tapoi." 
2Kings11:3 Chule amanu chutoh Pakai in'a kumget akisel lhone. Chule Athaliah chu hiche gama chun leng achangtan ahi. 
2Kings11:4 Chuin kum sagina-a chun Jehoiada'in mi asolin, jakhat chunga vaihomho, gal lamkaiho le ngahtupho agakou sah-in, amaho chu Pakai insunga ama henga apuilutnin, amaho chu kitepna aneipin, Pakai insunga chun akihahsel sah-in, chule leng chapa chu amaho avetsah-in ahi." 
2Kings11:5 Chuin amaho chu thu apen, hichehi nabol dingu thil chu ahi; nalah uva choldoni-a hunglut ho chu hopthum-a hopkhatnin leng in chu ngah untin," 
2Kings11:6 Chule hopthum-a hopkhat Sur kotpi-a umding, hopthum-a hopkhat ngatupna nunglam kotpi phunga umding: hiti achu in chu achimlhah louna dinga nangatup diu ahi." 
2Kings11:7 Chule nangho choldoni-a potdoh ho jouse lah-a hopni chun, lengpa kimvela Pakai in chu angadiu ahi." 
2Kings11:8 Chule amitakipmin manchah akichoicheh-a, lengpa chu na-umkim veldiu ahi. Chule aki-um sunga hunglut lutchu nanatha diu, chule lengpa apotdoh le ahunglut nalhonpi jingdingu ahi, ati." 
2Kings11:9 Chuin Jehoiada thempu thupeh dungjuijin, jakhat chunga gallamkai hochun abolun; chule amahon choldoni-a hunglut ding amite cheh-u, chule choldoni-a potdoh dingho chu ahinpuijun, Jehoiada thempu henga ahungcheh-un ahi." 
2Kings11:10 Chuin thempupan Pakai houin sunga um David lengpa tengcha ho le lumho chu sepai jakhat chunga gallamkai hochu apen ahi. 
2Kings11:11 Chuin ngahtupa le amitakipmin amanchah-u akhut cheh uva akichoijun lengpa akimvelun, houin ning jetlama pat houin ning veilam gei akigolun, houin le maicham lhon lhungin adingun ahi." 
2Kings11:12 Chuin Jehoiada'in lengpa chapa chu ahinpui doh-in, Lallukhuh chu akhuhpeh-in, het tohsahna chu apen; chuin amahon amachu lengin atungun, thao anuvin; akhutnu abengun, Pathen'in lengpa huhhing hen atiuve." 
2Kings11:13 Chuin ngahtupho le mipi husa chu Athaliah'in ajah phatnin, Pakai in'a mipi ho lah-a chun ahunglut tan ahi." 
2Kings11:14 Amanun agahven ahileh, veuvin, chonna ngaibangin sutpi phunga lengpa chu anadingin, pipuiho le sumkon mut ho lengpa koma chun adingun, gamsunga mipite jouse akipah-un, sumkon amutnuvin ahi. Chuin Athaliah'in apon abot eh-in, kidouna, kidouna tin apeng jah-in ahi." 
2Kings11:15 Ahinla jakhat chunga lamkaiho le sepai janel milenho chu Jehoiada thempupan thu apen, ajah uvah, ngahtupho kikah lah-a konin potdoh sah-un, chule amanu juitapou chu chemjamin thatnun, ati. Ajehchu thempupan, amanu chu Pakai houin sunga that hih-un ati ahi." 
2Kings11:16 Chuin amanu chunga khut alhaovin; amanu chu lengpa in'a sakol ho hunglutnaji lampia chun achen, chu-a chun amanu athat taove." 
2Kings11:17 Amaho chu Pakai mite ahitheina diuvin, Jehoiada'n Pakai le lengpa chule mipi kah-a kitepna asemin, leng le mipi kah-a jong chutichun aseme." 
2Kings11:18 Chuin gamsung mijouse Baal insunga alutnun, asuchimun, maicham ho masanga chun Baal thempu Mattan chu athat taove. Chuin thempupan Pakai inpi chunga vaipo ding alhengin ahi." 
2Kings11:19 Chuin jakhat chunga lamkaiho gal lamkaiho, ngahtuppa, chule gamsung mipite jouse apuijin; amahohin lengpa chu Pakai in'a konin ahinpuisuh-un, leng in ngahho kotpi lampi ahin houvin ahi. Chuin ama lengho laltouna-a atoutai." 
2Kings11:20 Chuin gamsung mipi jouse akipah-un, khopi chu athip chetnin; chule Athaliah chu lengpa inpanga chemjamin athatnun ahi." 
2Kings11:21 Jehoash alengchan patchun kum sagibou ahi. 
2Kings12:1 Jehu lengchankal kumsagi na-in Jehoash alenchang panin; chule ama Jerusalem'a kum somli alengchange. Chule anu minchu Zibiah ahin, Beersheba mi ahi." 
2Kings12:2 Chuin Jehoash chu Jehoiada thempun ahilchah bangin, ahinkho lhum keijin Pakai mitmu-a adihchu abol jingin ahi." 
2Kings12:3 Ahivangin munsang ho chu akiladohpon; munsang ho-a chun mipi ho chun ganlhaina le gimnamtui halna aneijing nalaijun ahi. 
2Kings12:4 Chuin Jehoash'in thempuho jah-a, Pakai insunga hinkipolutna akikat dohsa sum jouse, amitakipmin apeh dinga kitepeh dungjuija ato doh-u sum jouse, chule alungsunga Pakai insunga pohlutdinga akigelhah dungjuija atodoh sum jouse chu," 
2Kings12:5 Thempuhon hicheho chu lakhomu hen, mitinin amel hethouva konin lalutnu hen; chule houin selaiho, aselai kimuchanse chu semphat nan neiju hen, ati." 
2Kings12:6 Ahinla ahitin ahi, Jehoash lengchan kum somni le kumthum lhinin thempuhon houin selaiho chu asempha pouvin ahi." 
2Kings12:7 Chuin leng Jehoash'in Jehoiada thempu le thempu dangho akouvin, ajah uvah, ibola houin selaiho chu nasemphat lou uham? hijeh chun tun namel hethouva konin sum latahih-un, ahinla houin selaiho sempha dingho pedoh jengun, ati." 
2Kings12:8 Chuin thempuho chun miho-a kona sum lahtah loudingle amaho tah-in houin selaiho asemphat loudingu chu pha asaovin ahi. 
2Kings12:9 Ahivangin thempu Jehoiada'n thingkhong khat alan, asin agei vangin, Pakai in lutna jetlama maicham panga akoijin ahi. Hichea chun Pakai ina sum kichoilut jouse chu kotngah thempuho chun akoilutji jiuvin ahi." 
2Kings12:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, thingkhonga chun sum atamtai ti ahet tenguleh, lengpa lekha sunpa le thempu chungnung chu hungji-a, dipho-a akoijiuva, Pakai insunga kimu sum hochu asimjiu ahi." 
2Kings12:11 Chutengle amaho asimsao sum chu natongho, Pakai insaho chunga vaipoho khutna apeh jiuva; amahon Pakai in bolna dinga natongho, thingthemho le insaho," 
2Kings12:12 Chule songbol ho, song khengho, chule Pakai in selaiho semphatna dinga thing le song kikhengsa ho chohna dingle, chule angaicha ho jouse-a dinga apehjiu ahi." 
2Kings12:13 Ahijeng vangin Pakai insunga sum hungkichoilut chun Pakai in'a dingin dangka khonho, kong leh bel, twikongho, sumkon ho, sanabelho, dangka belho asemhih laijuve." 
2Kings12:14 Ahinla natong miho henga apeuvin, hichu Pakai in semphatna-in amang chaovin ahi." 
2Kings12:15 Chukal valin natongho hoppeh dinga akhutnuva sum apehlutna houchun tahsan umtah-a abol jeh-un, amaho chu avesuisam pouvin ahi." 
2Kings12:16 Pakai in'a chun suhkhelna sumho le chonsetna sumho chu achoilutji pouve. Hichu thempu ho-a ahi. 
2Kings12:17 Chujouvin Syria lengpa Hazael achetouvin, Gath agasatnin alatai. Chuin Hazael chu Jerusalem lam ngan achetoutai." 
2Kings12:18 Chuin Juda lengpa Jehoash'in apu apate Judah lengho Jehoshaphat, Jehoram chule Ahaziah tehon anakatdoh-u thil thengho jouse, ama thilthengho jouse, chule Pakai in le lengpa in goukhol na-a kimu sana jouse chu alasoh keijin, Syria leng Hazael chu athotnin: chuin Jerusalem'a konin apotdohtai." 
2Kings12:19 Chuin Jehoash thilbol danghole anatoh jouse chu Judah lengte thusimbua kisun hilouham? 
2Kings12:20 Chuin asohte akipat doh-un, achang lhiuvin, Jehoash chu Millo in'a Silla jotsuhna-a chun athat taove." 
2Kings12:21 Ajehchu asoh teni, Shimeath chapa Jozachar le Shomer chapa Jehozabad chun avoh lhona, thia ahi. Chuin amahon David khopi-a apu apatetoh avuitha taove. Chuin achapa Amaziah ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings13:1 Judah leng Ahaziah chapa Joash lengchan kal kum somlethum lhin kum-in, Jehu chapa Jehoahaz chu Israelte chunga Samaria'a alengchang panin, kum somle kum sagi alengchange." 
2Kings13:2 Chuin Pakai mitmun thil phaloutah abol jingin, Israelte chonset sahpa Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonsetna chu ajuijingin; chua konin akichoidohpoi." 
2Kings13:3 Chuin Pakai lungsat chu Israelte chunga asoujah jengin, Syria lengpa Hazael khut le Hazael chapa Benhadad khutna ahinkho lhumkeijun apedoh tan ahi." 
2Kings13:4 Chuin Jehoahaz'in Pakai henga ngehna aneijin, Pakaiyin angaipehtai. Ajehchu Syria lengpan amaho asuh genthei jeh-in, Israelte kisuh gentheina chu amupehtan ahi." 
2Kings13:5 (Chuin Pakaiyin Israel chu huhhingpu khat ahinpen, hitichun amaho Syria mite khutnoija konin apotdoh taovin: Israel chate chu masanga bangin aponbuh uva acheng taove." 
2Kings13:6 Ahijeng vangin Israel chonsetsah Jeroboam insung chonset na-a konin amaho ahaideh pouvin, hiche achun aumjinguvin; chule Samaria gama chun thingbom jong aumjing nalaijin ahi)." 
2Kings13:7 Jehoahaz chun amite lah-a sakol chung toumi somnga toh, kangtalai somtoh, keng sepai sangsom tilou aneiding aphalpeh louvu ahi. Ajehchu Syria lengpan asuhmanghela, phola leivui banga asem ahitai." 
2Kings13:8 Tun Jehoahaz thilbol dangho, anatohho jouse le athil bolthei naho chu Israel lengho thusimbua kisun hilouham?" 
2Kings13:9 Chuin Jehoahaz chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, Samaria'a avuitaove. Chuin achapa Joash ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings13:10 Chuin Judah lengpa Joash lengchan kal kum somthumle kum sagina-in, Jehoahaz chapa Jehoash chu Israelte chunga Samaria'a alengchang panin, kum somle kumgup alengchange." 
2Kings13:11 Chuin aman Pakai mitmu-a thilphalou anaboljin; Israelte anachonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonset naho-a konin ana kikangsepon; hichea chun achon jingin ahi. 
2Kings13:12 Chule Joash thilbol danghole anatoh jouse, Judah leng Amaziah asatna athilbol theinaho chu Israel lengho thusimbua kisun hilouham?" 
2Kings13:13 Chuin Joash chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, chuin Jeroboam chu alaltouna-a atoutai. Chuin Joash chu Samaria'a Israel lengho toh akivui khomtai." 
2Kings13:14 Tun Elisha chu athipi khop hel ding natna-in ahung natan ahi. Chuin Israel lengpa Joash chu ahenga ahungsuh-in, amaichunga chun akapmin, vo hepa, hepa Israelte kangtalai le sakol touthemho, atin ahi." 
2Kings13:15 Chuin Elisha'n ajah-a, thalpi le thalchang ho hinlan, ati. Chuin aman ahenga thalpi le thalchang ho ahinlatai." 
2Kings13:16 Chuin aman Israel lengpa jah-a, thalpi chunga chun nakhut koijin, ati. Chuin aman achunga akhut akoijin; chuin Elisha'n lengpa khut chunga chun akhut akoitai." 
2Kings13:17 Chuin aman, solamsang bangkot hongtemin, ati. Chuin hichu ahongtai. Chuin Elisha'n, kapmin, ati. Chuin akaptai. Pakaiya kon huhdohna thalchang, Syria te-a kona huhdohna thalchang ahi. Ajehchu nangman Syria mite Aphek mun'a nasuh manghel kahse-a nasatding ahi, ati." 
2Kings13:18 Chuin aman, thalchang ho chu lan, ati. Chuin aman alatai. Chuin aman Israel lengpa jah-a, tolchu jepmin, ati. Chuin aman thumvei ajepmin, angatai." 
2Kings13:19 Chuin Pathen mipa chu achunga alungsatan, ajah-a, ngavei, gupvei najep dingdol ahi; chutile Syria te chu nasuhmang hel kahse-a najep ding ahin; ahinla tun Syria te chu thumvei sehbou najoding ahitai, ati." 
2Kings13:20 Chuin Elisha athitan amahon avuitaove. Chuin kum hunglhung chun Moab miten ahon honin gamchu ahinsatnun ahi. 
2Kings13:21 Chuin ahitin ahi, mikhat vuiding agot laitah-un, vetan, amahon mihonpi khat amuvin; chuin mipa chu Elisha lhansunga alehlut taove. Chuin mipa chu akilelhah-a Elisha gu atohkhah phatnin, amachu ahingdoh-in, akengin adingdohtai." 
2Kings13:22 Ahin Syria lengpa Hazael chun Jehoahaz nikho pumpi chun Israelte asugentheijin ahi. 
2Kings13:23 Ahivangin Pakaiyin Abraham, Isaac, Jacob henga athutep jeh-in amaho chu alungsetnin, achunguva lainatna aneijin, chule angaisah-in; asumang nompon, chujongle a-ansunga konin apaidoh nompon ahi." 
2Kings13:24 Hitichun Syria lengpa Hazael chu athitai; chuin achapa Benhadad ama khelin alengchang tai. 
2Kings13:25 Apa Jehoahaz khutna kona gala aman analahdohsa khopiho chu, Jehoahaz chapa Jehoash'in Hazael chapa Benhadad khutna konin alakit tai. Amachu Joash'in thumvei ajouvin, Israelte khopiho chu alelah kit tai." 
2Kings14:1 Israel leng Jehoahaz chapa Joash lengchan kal kumni na-in, Judah leng Joash chapa Amaziah ahung lengchange." 
2Kings14:2 Ama alengchan phatchun kum somni le nga ahitan, Jerusalem'a kum somni le kumko alengchange. Chule anu minchu Jehoaddan ahin, Jerusalem mi ahi." 
2Kings14:3 Chule aman Pakai mitmun adihchu abolin, ahinla apa David bang ahi hihlaije: aman apa Joash boljouse chu anabolin ahi." 
2Kings14:4 Ahijeng vangin munsang ho chu akiladoh dehpon; munsang ho-a chun mipi ho chun ganlhaina le gimnamtui halna anei jiuvin ahi. 
2Kings14:5 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, lenggam chu ama khutna ahungdet detchun, apa lengpa anathat sohte chu ahin thatnin ahi." 
2Kings14:6 Ahinla Mosi Danbua, chate jeh-a pate thading ahipon, pate jeh-a jong chate thading ahipoi, ahinla amitakip ama ama chonsetna jeh-a kithat ding ahi, tia kisun Pakai danthupeh anakisunsa bangin; tolthat ho chate chu anathatpon ahi." 
2Kings14:7 Edom mite chu chi phaichama sangsom athatnin, Selah khochu galin alan, hiche minchu tunichan geijin Joktheel asah-un ahi." 
2Kings14:8 Chujouvin Amaziah chun Israel lengpa, Jehu chapa Jehoahaz chapa Jehoash henga mi thupole mi asolin, hungin kimaiton khatle khat kivehite, ati." 
2Kings14:9 Chuin Israel lengpa Jehoash'in Judah lengpa Amaziah henga, Lebanon'a um meithai seltho lingin Lebanon'a um Cedar jah-a, kachapa jiding nachanu neipen ati. Chuin hiche munachun Lebanon gamsa khat ahungin meithai seltholing chu achonlhu deltan ahi." 
2Kings14:10 Nangman Edom chu najo tahbeh ahin, chule nalungthim chu kichoisang ahitai. Hiche-a chun loupi inlang, in'a kiumthimin; ajehchu ipidinga nangin nalungthima nangmatah le Judah mite toh lhuhtha nading nangaito dingham? ti thu agah thottai." 
2Kings14:11 Ahinla Amaziah chun ngaipeh-in aneipon ahi. Hijeh chun Israel lengpa Jehoash akontouvin, amale Judah lengpa Amaziah chu Judah gam Bethshemesh'a khatle khat akimaito lhontan ahi." 
2Kings14:12 Chuin Israelte masanga chun Judah chu amaimoh taovin; hichun mitin aponbuh lam cheh-a ajamtaove. 
2Kings14:13 Chuin Israel lengpa Jehoash'in, Ahaziah chapa Jehoash chapa Amaziah Judah lengpa chu Bethshemesh'a amanin, chule Jerusalem'a ahungin, Jerusalem kulpi chu Ephraim kotpi apat aninglama kotpigei tong jalijen asuchimin ahi." 
2Kings14:14 Chuin Pakai inle leng in'a gou kholkhom na-a kimu sana le dangka jouse, chule um le bel manchah jouse alan, Samaria'a akiletai." 
2Kings14:15 Tun Jehoash'in atohdoh athilbol dangho jouse le athilbol theina, chule Judah leng Amaziah asatdanho chu Israel lengte thusimbua kisunlutna hilouham?" 
2Kings14:16 Chuin Jehoash chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, Israel lengte toh Samaria'a avuitaove; chuin achapa Jeroboam akhelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Kings14:17 Chuin Judah lengpa Joash chapa Amaziah chu, Israel leng Jehoahaz chapa Jehoash thinungin kum somle kum nga ahing nalaije." 
2Kings14:18 Chule Amaziah thilbol dangho chu Judah lengho thusimbua kisun hilouham? 
2Kings14:19 Chule tun amahon ama dounan Jerusalem'a thilguh agongun; chuin ama Lachish lama ajamin, ahinla Lachish lama anunga mi asolun, hiche munachun athat taove." 
2Kings14:20 Chuin amahon sakol in ahinpouvin, David khopi Jerusalem'a apu apate toh avuitha taove." 
2Kings14:21 Chuin Judah mipite jousen kum somle kum gup lhingbep Azariah chu apuijun, apa Amaziah khelin alengchansah taove." 
2Kings14:22 Aman Elath kho chu asadoh-in, Judah gama aumsah kitnin, hiche jouchun lengpa chu apu apate toh alumkhom tai." 
2Kings14:23 Judah leng Joash chapa Amaziah lengchan kal kum somle kumnga alhinnin, Israel lengpa Joash chapa Jeroboam Samaria'a alengchang panin; kum somli le kum khat aleng changin ahi." 
2Kings14:24 Chuin Pakai mitmun thilse abolin, Israelte chonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonsetna jouse-a konin akikangse pon ahi." 
2Kings14:25 Pakai Israel Pathen'in Gath-hepher'a um Amittai chapa asoh themgao Jonah khutna athusei bangin, Hamath lutna-a kona phaicham luipi geijin Israel gamchu alelah kit tai." 
2Kings14:25 Pakai Israel Pathen'in Gath-hepher'a um Amittai chapa asoh themgao Jonah khutna athusei bangin, Hamath lutna-a kona phaicham luipi geijin Israel gamchu alelah kit tai." 
2Kings14:26 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Israelte nasatah-a athohgimnao chu amun; ajehchu akihen oh-a hihen, akilha onga hile Israelte kithopi ding koimacha aumlou amun ahi." 
2Kings14:27 Pakaiyin Israelte minhi vannoi'a kona asuhmang ding anaseipon; Joash chapa Jeroboam khutna konin amaho chu ahuhdohjon ahi. 
2Kings14:28 Tun Jeroboam thilbol danghole anatoh jouse, chule athilbol theina, agal boldan, chule aman tumasanga Judah te chan anahijing Damascus le Hamath kho Israelte dia ahin lelahlut thuho hi Israel lengte thusimbua kisunlut hilouham?" 
2Kings14:29 Chuin Jeroboam chu apu apate, Israel lengte ngeitoh analum khomin; chule achapa Zekeriah ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Kings15:1 Israel leng Jeroboam lengchan kal kum somni le kum sagina-in, Judah leng Amaziah chapa Azariah alenchang panin ahi." 
2Kings15:2 Alengchan patchun kum somle kumgup ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somnga le kumni alengchange; chule anu minchu Jecholiah ahin, Jerusalem mi ahi." 
2Kings15:3 Chuin aman apa Amaziah boljouse dungjuijin Pakai mitmu-a adih chu abolin," 
2Kings15:4 Munsang ho-a bouchu achonmang dehpon; mihon munsang ho-a chun ganlhaina le gimnamtui hal aboljing nalai uve. 
2Kings15:5 Chuin Pakaiyin lengpa chu adengin, hitichun athi nikho geijin aphah-in, intumbeh-a achengtai. Chule leng chapa Jotham chu gamsung mite vaihomin insunglam vaipon apangtai." 
2Kings15:6 Chule Azariah thilbol danghole anatohho jouse chu Judah lengte thusimbu kisutlutna-a kisunlutna hilouham? 
2Kings15:7 Hitichun Azariah apu apate toh alumkhomin, chule amahon David khopi-a apu apate toh avuitaove. Chuin ama khelin achapa Jotham alengchang tai." 
2Kings15:8 Judah lengpa Zakariah lengchankal kum somthumle kum get lhin na-in, Jeroboam chapa Zakariah chu Israelte chunga Samaria'a lhagup alengchange." 
2Kings15:9 Chule apu apate bolbangin Pakai mitmun dihloutah abol jingin, Israelte chonsetsah-a Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonset naho-a konin akiheimang dehpoi." 
2Kings15:10 Chuin Jabesh chapa Shallum'in ama douna-in thilguh agongin, miho anga ajepmin, athatnin, akhelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings15:11 Chule Zakariah thilbol dangho chu vetan Israel lengte thusimbu sunga akisunin ahi. 
2Kings15:12 Hichehi Jehu henga Pakaiyin thu aseichu ahin, Nachapate chu Israelte laltouna-a khangli geija toudiu ahi tin aseije. Chuin hitichun aguilhung tan ahi." 
2Kings15:13 Juda lengpa Uzziah lengchan kal kum somthumle kumko lhin kum-in, Jabesh chapa Shallum chu alengchang panin, Samaria'a lhakhat lhingset alengchange." 
2Kings15:14 Ajehchu Gadi chapa Menahem chu Tirzah'a konin achetouvin, Samaria'a ahungin, Samaria'a Jabesh chapa Shaallum chu avon, athatnin, ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings15:15 Chule Shallum thilbol danghole ama thilguh gonho chu, veuvin, Israel lengte thusimbu sunga akisunlut tan ahi." 
2Kings15:16 Chuin Menahem'in Tirzah le asunga umjouse, chule agamsung chu Tirzah'a patnin asatnin ahi. Ajehchu ama henga akipehlut loujeh uva asat ahin, chule chuche sunga um numei naovop jouse chu agai akhepeh-in ahi." 
2Kings15:17 Judah leng Azariah lengchan kal kum somthumle kum ko na-in, Gadi chapa Menahem Israelte chunga ahung lengchang panin, Samaria'a kum som alengchange." 
2Kings15:18 Chule aman Pakai mitmun thilse abol jingin, Israelte chonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonset na-a konin ahinkho lhumkeijin akihei mangpon ahi." 
2Kings15:19 Chuin Assyria leng Pul chu agamu dounan ahungkonin; chule Menahem'in lenggam chu akhutna suhdet ahina dinga akhut chun aumpina dingin, Pul chu dangka talent sangkhat apen ahi." 
2Kings15:20 Chuin Menahem'in Israelte mihaoho sum jouse chu, mikhat khatna dangka shekel somnga cheh Assyria lengpa pehdingin adongin ahi. Hitichun Assyria lengpa akinunglen gamsunga aumdenpoi." 
2Kings15:21 Chuin Menahem thilbol danghole atoh jouse chu Israel lengho thusimbua kisun hilouham? 
2Kings15:22 Chuin Menahem chu apu apate toh alum khomin, ama khelin achapa Pekahiah alengchang tai." 
2Kings15:23 Judah lengpa Azariah lengchan kal kum somnga na-in, Menahem chapa Pekahiah chu Israelte chunga Samaria'a aleng changin, kumni lengvai apon ahi." 
2Kings15:24 Chule Pakai mitmun thilse abol jingin, Israelte chonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonset naho-a konin akikangsepoi." 
2Kings15:25 Chuin agal lamkai Remaliah chapa Pekah chun guhthimin thilgon aneijin, Samaria leng inpi sunga Argob le Arieh chule akiloipi Gilead mi somnga chutoh avouvin; chule athatnin, a-indan sunga alengchang tai." 
2Kings15:26 Chule veuvin Pekahiah thilbol danghole atoh jouse chu Israel lengte thusimbua akisunlut cheh-e. 
2Kings15:27 Judah leng Azariah lengchankal kum somnga le kum ni kum-in, Remaliah chapa Pekah chu Israelte chunga Samaria'a alengchang panin, kum somni alengchange." 
2Kings15:28 Chule aman Pakai mitmu-a aphalou chu abol jingin, Israelte chonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam chonset naho-a konin akikangsepoi." 
2Kings15:29 Israel leng Pekah lallaijin, Assyria leng Tiglath-pileser ahungin Ijon, Abel-beth-maachah, Janoah, Kedesh, Hazor, Gilead, Galilee, chule Naphtali gam pumpi alan, Assyria gama amaho chu gal hingin akaitai." 
2Kings15:30 Chuin Elah chapa Hoshea chu Remaliah chapa Pekah dounan guhthimin thilgon aneijin, asatnin, athatnin; Uzziah chapa Jotham lengchan kal kum somni na-a chun akhelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings15:31 Chule Pekah thilbol danghole atohjouse, veuvin, hicheho chu Israel lengte thusimbua kisunlutna ahi." 
2Kings15:32 Israel lengpa Remaliah chapa Pekah lengchankal kumni na-in, Judah leng Uzziah chapa Jotham chu alengchang pantai." 
2Kings15:33 Alengchan patchun kum somni le kum nga ahitan, Jerusalem'a kum somle kumgup aleng changin ahi. Chule anu minchu Jerusha ahin, Zadok chanu ahi." 
2Kings15:34 Hitichun aman Pakai mitmu-a adih chu abolin; aman apa Uzziah boljouse bangchun abolin ahi. 
2Kings15:35 Hitajongle munsang ho chu akiladohpon, miho chun munsang ho-a chun ganlhaile gimnamtui hal aboljing nalai uve. Aman Pakai in kotpi chungnung chu asan ahi." 
2Kings15:36 Tun Jotham thilbol danghole anatohho chu Judah lengho thusim kisutlutna lekhabua kusuna hilouham? 
2Kings15:37 Hiche laichun Pakaiyin Syria leng Rezin le Remaliah chapa Pekah chu Judah te doudin asol pantan ahi. 
2Kings15:38 Chuin Jotham chu apu apate toh alumkhom tan, chule apa David khopi-a apu apate toh akivuitha tai. Chule achapa Ahaz chu ama khelin ahung lengchangtai." 
2Kings16:1 Remaliah chapa Pekah lengchankal kum somle kum sagina-in, Judah lengpa Jotham chapa Ahaz chu alengchang panin ahi." 
2Kings16:2 Ahaz ahung lengchan patchun kum somni ahin, chule Jerusalem'a kum somle kum get vai apon, aman apa David bangin Pakai Pathen mitmun thildih abolpon ahi." 
2Kings16:3 Ahin Israel lengte lamlhah jouse chu ajotnin; chule Israel chate masanga kona Pakaiyin apaidoh Pathen helouhon abolu thet umtah dungjuijin, achapa chu meija aselutsah-in ahi." 
2Kings16:4 Chule munsang ho le lhangho, chule thinghing jouse noija ganlhaina le gimnamtui ahaljin ahi." 
2Kings16:5 Chuin Syria leng Rezin le Israel lengpa Remaliah chapa Pekah chu Jerusalem'a gal bolin ahungtou lhonin; chule Ahaz chu aumun, ahinla amachu ajoujou lhonpoi." 
2Kings16:6 Hiche laichun Syria lengpa Rezin'in Elath chu Syria gamdin alelah-in, Judah te chu Elath'a konin adelmangin, Syria te chu Elath na ahungun tugeijin achenguve." 
2Kings16:7 Hijeh chun Ahaz'in Assyria lengpa Tiglath-pileser henga thupole asolin; keima nasoh le nachapa kahi; hungtouvin lang eidou dinga hungkipat doh-a Syria lengpa le Israel lengpa khutna konin neihuh doh-in, ati." 
2Kings16:8 Chuin Ahaz'in Pakai in'a dangka le sana umjouse, chule leng in'a gou kholkhom na-a umjouse alan, Assyria lengpa chu thilmoh peh din athottai." 
2Kings16:9 Chuin Assyria lengpa chun athu angai pehtai; ajehchu Assyria lengpa chu Damascus dounan achetouvin, alan, amite chu Kir gama gal hingin akaijin, Rezin chu athat tai." 
2Kings16:10 Chuin Ahaz lengpa chun Assyria lengpa Tiglath-pileser chu kimupi ding Damascus'a achen, chule Damascus'a um maicham khat agamun ahi. Chule maicham lim le akisem dan, chule akigon bangtah chun, lengpan Uriah thempu agah thotnin ahi." 
2Kings16:11 Chuin Uriah thempu chun Ahaz lengpan Damascus'a kona ahinthot dungjui chun maicham asemin; hitichun Uriah thempupan Damascus'a kona leng Ahaz ahung kilekah-in anasem joutan ahi. 
2Kings16:12 Chuin Damascus'a kona lengpa ahung chun, lengpan maicham chu amun; chule maicham chu anailutnin, hichea chun thilto atohtai." 
2Kings16:13 Chuin aman govam thilto le anneh thilto ahalin, chule donding thilto alheijin, maicham chung chu chamna thiltoho thisan chu athe khumin ahi." 
2Kings16:14 Chuin houin maija kon, maicham thah le Pakai in kikah-a konin, Pakai masanga um sum-eng maicham jongchu aladoh-in, maicham sahlam panga chun akoitai." 
2Kings16:15 Chuin Ahaz lengpan Uriah thempu jah-a, maicham len chungahin jingkah govam thilto, nilhah anneh thilto, lengpa govam ganlhai, a-anneh thilto, chule gamsunga mijouse govam thilto, anneh thilto, chule dontho thilto toh-in; chule hiche chunga chun govam thilto thisan le kilhaina thilto jouse thisan chu thekhumin; sum-eng maicham vangchu keima houna ding ahi, tin athupeh-in ahi." 
2Kings16:16 Hitichun Uriah thempu chun Ahaz lengpa thupeh jouse dungjuijin aboltai. 
2Kings16:17 Chuin Ahaz lengpan agamgi geisihho chu akhin neovin, hicheho-a konchun kisilna kong chu achondoh-in, twidol chu anoija um sum-eng bongchal ho-a konin alalhan, songlhongnal chunga atungtai." 
2Kings16:18 Chule houin sunga choldoni-a dinga pondal abolule, polama lengpa lutna chu Assyria lengpa jeh'in Pakai in'a konin atoldohtai." 
2Kings16:19 Tun Ahaz thilbol thusim dangho ama natohho chu Judah lengte thusimbu ho-a kisunlutna hilouham? 
2Kings16:20 Chuin Ahaz apu apate toh alumkhomin, chule David khopi-a apu apate toh avui khomuve. Chuin achapa Hezekiah chu ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings17:1 Judah lengpa Ahaz lengchan kal kumsomle kum ni na-in, Elah chapa Hoshea chu Israelte chung Samaria'a alengchang panin, kum ko alengchange." 
2Kings17:2 Chuin Pakai mitmu-a thilphalou chu anabolin, ama masanga Israel lengho tobang anahipon ahi." 
2Kings17:3 Assyria lengpa Shalmaneser chu ama dounan ahung kontouvin; chule Hoshea chu asoh-in ahungpangin, thilpeh ho apen ahi." 
2Kings17:4 Chuin Assyria lengpan Hoshea thilguh gonchu amudohtai: ajehchu aman Egypt lengpa So henga thu pole asolin, akumseh-a abolngai bangin Assyria lengpa henga thilpeh ahinpe tapon ahi. Hijeh chun Assyria lengpan songkul'a ahenin, akhachah khumtai." 
2Kings17:5 Chuin Assyria lengpan gamjouse ahin banchot touvin, Samaria'a achen, kumthum hel aum khumtai." 
2Kings17:6 Hoshea lengchan kal kumko lhinkum chun Samaria alan, Israelte chu Assyria gama atol mangin, Gozan vadunglen pama Medes te khopiho Halah le Habor'ah aumsah taovin ahi." 
2Kings17:7 Ajehchu ana hitin ahi, Egypt gama konle Egypt lengpa Pharoah khutnoija kona ahinpuidoh uva, Pakai a-Pathen'u dounan achonse taovin, chule pathen dangho joh aging taovin," 
2Kings17:8 Amahon Israel chate masanga kona Pakaiyin ana nodohsa Pathen hephalouho, chule amahon akitun'u Israel leng teho chonnadan chu ajuijun, ahi." 
2Kings17:9 Chule Israel chaten Pakai a-Pathen'u dounan guhthimin adihlou thilho chu anabolun; chule akhopiho jouse-a, khongahpa insangho-a pat, kulnei khopi geijin munsang ho akisemun ahi." 
2Kings17:10 Chule lhangsang jouse le thingphung hing jouse noija, milimho le thingbomho akitundoh-un," 
2Kings17:11 Chule chua munsang ho jouse-a, Pakaiyin amasanguva kona apaidoh Pathen hephalouho bangin gimnamtui ahalun; Pakai lunghana sodohna dingin thilphalou agongun ahi." 
2Kings17:12 Ajehchu Pakaiyin ahenguva, hitobanghi bolhih-un anati, milimho chu anajenun ahi." 
2Kings17:13 Ahin Pakai chun themgao jousele mitvahneiho jouse-a konin, Israelte le Judah te douna chu ana phongdoh jin, ahenguva, nakhangitlou naova konin hung kiheijun lang, naheng uva kasohte themgaoho kahinsola, napateu henga kathupeh ho jouse dungjuijin, kachondanho le kathupeh ho nit uvin, anati jin ahi." 
2Kings17:14 Achuti vangin amahon angai hih-un, Pakai a-Pathen'u ana tahsan lou apu apateu ngong bangin, angongu ahamsah-un ahi." 
2Kings17:15 Chule amahon apu apateu toh asemu achondanhou le akitepna, chule ahenguva athu hettohsah ho chu asandauvin; pannabei nungchu ajuijun, pannabei asoh-un, achung changuva Pakaiyin amaho bangin umhih-un anati, akimveluva Pathen hephalouho nung ajuijun ahi." 
2Kings17:16 Chule Pakai a-Pathen'u thupeh jouse adalhaovin, akilhajol bongnou lim nitoh akisemun, thingbom akisemun, van janelpi ahouvun, Baal ajentaove." 
2Kings17:17 Chule achapateule achanuteu mei apalsah-un, aisan le lhimna amangun, ama lungsat sah-a lung hansah nadin Pakai mitmun thilsetah boldingin akijoh doh-un ahi." 
2Kings17:18 Hijeh chun Israelte chunga Pakai alunghang behsetnin, amuphahna louva achon mangin; Judah phung tailou khatcha akhen aumtapoi." 
2Kings17:19 Judah jongchun a-Pakai Pathen'u thupeh chu anit tapon; ahinla Israel ten akisemu chondan kisema chun achontaove. 
2Kings17:20 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel chilhah jouse chu adeitapon, asugentheijin, amitmua kona apaidoh kahsen michom mangho khutna chun apedohtan ahi." 
2Kings17:21 Ajehchu Israel chu David insunga konin abottelin, chule amahon Nebat chapa Jeroboam chu lengin asemun; chuin Jeroboam'in Israelte chu Pakai ajuijuva konin anomangin, amaho chu chonsetna lentah-in achonset sahtai." 
2Kings17:22 Ajehchu Israelte chu Jeroboam'in abol chonsetna jouse-a chun achonseuvin, hicheho-a konchun akiheimang theipouvin;" 
2Kings17:23 Asohte themgaoho jouse kama anasei bangin, Pakaiyin amitmua kona achon manghel kahsen hicheho-a konchun akichoidoh pouve. Hitichun atolmangin tunigeijin achengden taove." 
2Kings17:24 Chuin Assyria lengpan Babylon'a kon, Cuthah'a kon, Ava'a kon, Hamath'a kon, chule Sepharvaim'a konin mi ahinpuijin; Israel chate khelin Samaria'a achensahtai. Amahon Samaria alovin, chua khopiho-a chun acheng taove." 
2Kings17:25 Chuin ahitin ahi, chua achentilu chun, Pakai chu aging pouvin; hijeh chun Pakaiyin alah uva keipi bahkai asollin, mi phabep athatnin ahi." 
2Kings17:26 Hijeh chun amaho Assyria lengpa henga, nangman nachon doh-a, Samaria khopi-a nachensah nam mite hin, hichegam Pathen houdan ahepouve. Hijeh chun aman alah uva keipi bahkai ahinsolin, vetan, hiche gam Pathen houdan ahetlou jeh-un, amaho chu athat taove, atiuve." 
2Kings17:27 Chuin Assyria lengpan thu apen, khulama kona nahin puiho thempuho lah-a khat puijun lang; chule chua gacheng hen, chule chugam Pathen houdan chu amaho gahil hen, ati." 
2Kings17:28 Chuin Samaria'a kona ahin puidoh hou lah-a thempu khat ahungin, Bethel'a achengin, amaho chu Pakai ginje ahiltan ahi." 
2Kings17:29 Hijongle namtinin ama amacheh pathen akisemun, Samaria ten akisemu munsang ho, inho, chule namtinin achennao khopiho-a hicheho chu akikoicheh uve." 
2Kings17:30 Chuin Babylon miten Succoth-benoth asemun, Kuth miten Nergal asemun, Hamath miten Ashima asemun," 
2Kings17:31 Avi miten Nibhaz le Tartak semun, chule Sepharv miten achateu chu Sepharvaim pathenho Adram-melech le Anam-melech henga din meija agou jiuve." 
2Kings17:32 Hitichun Pakai chu agingun, chule alah uva anempenho chu munsang ho-a thempun akisemun, munsang inho-a chun kilhaina aneijiuve." 
2Kings17:33 Amahon Pakai chu agingun, chule chua kona apuimangu namho houdan dungjuijin, amaho pathenho chu ajen jiuvin ahi." 
2Kings17:34 Tumasanga aboldan bangun tulai geijin abolun; Pakai chu agingpouvin, aman Israel tia aminvo Jacob chateho chonna dan kisunle houdan thupeh ho, chule Pakaiyin apeh dan thupeh ho jongchu anitpouvin;" 
2Kings17:35 Amaho chutoh Pakaiyin kitepna asema, amaho chu athu lhah-a, nanghon pathen dangho naginloudiu, a-anguva jong nakunloudiu, jenjong najen loudiu, ahenguva jong naki lhai loudiu;" 
2Kings17:36 Amavang thilboltheina nasatah le banjah puma Egypt gama kona napuidoh pao Pakai chu naginuva, nahou uva, ama hengabou kilhaina nabol dingu ahi." 
2Kings17:37 Aman nangho dinga asut achondanho, houdanho, dan, chule danthupeh chu a-imatih chana chingthei tah-a nanit dingu; pathen dangho nagin loudingu ahi." 
2Kings17:38 Chule nangho toh kitepna kasemhi nasuhmil loudingu, pathen dangho jong nagin louhel dingu ahi." 
2Kings17:39 Ahinla Pakai na Pathen'u chu nagin dingu; aman namelma teu jouse khutna kona nahuhdoh dingu ahi, ati." 
2Kings17:40 Achutijeng vangin amahon angaideh pouvin, tumasanga aumdanu bou abol jingun ahi." 
2Kings17:41 Hitihin hiche nam mite hin Pakai chu agingun, amilim semthu chu apu apateu vin anajen bangun, achateu le achate chateuvin jong ajenun; hitichun tulai geihin abolun ahi." 
2Kings18:1 Tun ahitin ahi, Elah chapa Israel leng Hoshea lengchan kal kum thum na-in, Judah lengpa Ahaz chapa Hezekiah chu ahung lengchang panin ahi." 
2Kings18:2 Ama alengchan patchun kum somni le kum nga ahin; chule ama Jerusalem'a kum somni le kum ko alengchange. Anu minchu Abi ahin, Zachariah chanu ahi." 
2Kings18:3 Aman apa David'in anabol jouse dungjuijin, Pakai mitmun adih chu abolin ahi." 
2Kings18:4 Munsang ho chu achon mangin, milimho chu asubongin, thingbomho aphuh lhun, Mosi'n anasem sum-eng gul chu avobongsele; ajehchu hiche nikholai geija chu Israel chaten hiche henga chu gimnamtui ahaljiu ahin; chule aman hichu Nehushtan asah-e." 
2Kings18:5 Aman Pakai Israel Pathen atahsanin; hitichun ama nungin Juda lengte jouse lah-a ama tobang aum tapon, ama masangin jong khatcha anaumpoi." 
2Kings18:6 Ajehchu Pakai atuhchah-in, ama ajuija konin achemangpon, Pakaiyin Mosi anapeh thuho chu anit jingin ahi." 
2Kings18:7 Chule Pakaiyin aumpin, achedohna lamjousea aphattheijin; Assyria lengpa dounan akiphinin, ama chu ajenpon ahi."
