2Kings18:8 Philistine te chu Gaza kho le agamgi chin gei, khongah ho insanga pat khopi kulnei geijin abantha gamin ahi." 
2Kings18:9 Chuin Hezekiah lengchan kumli alhinin, Israel leng Elah chapa Hoshea kum sagi alengchan kum-in ahitin ahi. Assyria leng Shalmaneser chu Samaria satdin ahung kontouvin, Chule aum kultan ahi." 
2Kings18:10 Chuin kumthum kichaijin alataovin ahi: Hezekiah lengchan kal kum gup lhina, Israel lengpa Hoshea lengchankal kum ko na-in, Samaria chu lah-in aumtan ahi." 
2Kings18:11 Chuin Assyria lengpan Israelte chu Assyria-a apuimangin, Halah'a Gozan vapi pama Habor chule Medes khopiho-a chun amahochu akoitan ahi." 
2Kings18:12 Ajehchu amahon Pakai a-Pathen'u aw angaipouvin, akitepna le Pakai soh Mosi athupeh jouse asukhelun, ajui nomhih-un, boljong abolpouve." 
2Kings18:13 Tun Hezekiah Lengpa lengchan kal kum somle kum li lhinin, Assyria lengpa Sennacherib chu Judah gam khopi kulpi neijouse satdin ahungkon touvin, hicheho chu alatan ahi." 
2Kings18:14 Chuin Judah lengpa Hezekiah'in Lachish'a Assyria lengpa henga chun, thil kanabol kheltan ahi, tin thu agah thottai. Chuin Assyria lengpa chun Hezekiah chu dangka talent jathum le sana talent somthum atep pehtan ahi." 
2Kings18:15 Chuin Hezekiah'in Pakai in'a dangka umjouse le leng in'a goukhol na-a dangka umjouse chu apetan ahi. 
2Kings18:16 Hiche phatlai chun Hezekiah'in Pakai in kotna sanale, Juda leng Hezekiah'in khompi ho-a sana alonkhumho chu akhohdoh sohkeijin, Assyria lengpa chu apetan ahi." 
2Kings18:17 Chuin Assyria lengpan Tartan le Rabsaris chule Rabshakeh chu Lachish'a konin sepai janeltoh Jerusalem'a Hezekiah lengpa henga asolin ahi. Chuin amaho achetouvun Jerusalem alhung taove. Chuin amaho alhunun, ponsoppa lamlhah-a twikul sahnung, twilam panga chun adinguve." 
2Kings18:18 Chuin amahon lengpa akouvun ahile, insung vaipopa Hilkiah chapa Eliakim, lekhasunpa Shebna, chule thuchingpa Asaph chapa Joah chu ahungdoh-un ahi." 
2Kings18:19 Chuin Rabshakeh chun ajah uva, tun nanghon Hezekiah henga gaseijun, leng loupitah, Assyria lengpan hitin aseije, ipi tahsana nakingaija kisong nahim?" 
2Kings18:20 Nangman naseijin, (ahinla hicheho chu mohthu mai maibou ahi,) keiman galbol nadin thumopthem le thahatna kaneije nati. Tun koichunga natahsan nangapma, keima douna-a kiphin nahim?" 
2Kings18:21 Tun, vetan, hiche pumpeng kihehchip tenggol Egypt mite ngeichu natahsan ahin; ama chunga chun mikhattou kingaitaleh, akhutna lutna chule asutding ahi. Egypt lengpa Pharoah tahsan jouse chu chutiding ahi." 
2Kings18:22 Ahinla nanghon kahenga, Pakai ka Pathen'u katahsanu ahi, tijong leuchun, hiche munsang ho le maicham ho chu hilouham, Hezekiah'in alah manga, Judah le Jerusalem mite henga, Jerusalem'a um hiche maicham masanga hi nahoudiu ahi, ati chu?" 
2Kings18:23 Hijeh chun tun kangeh nahiuve, ka pakai Assyria lengpa henga chun kitepna peuvin, chule achunga touding mi nanga jouding pou ule, sakol sangni napeu vinge." 
2Kings18:24 Achutile iti dana kapupa sohteho lah-a gal lamkai neopen khat mai nahei manguva, Egypt mite kangtalai ho le sakol ho chunga natahsanu na-ngap muham?" 
2Kings18:25 Tu-a hi keima Pakai thulouva hiche munhi satna sumang dinga hunga kahim? Pakaiyin kajah-a, heche gam dounan chetouvin, chule gasumangin eiti ahi, ati." 
2Kings18:26 Chujouvin Hilkiah chapa Eliakim, Shebna, chule Joah chun Rabshakeh jah-a, kangeh nahi, nasohte jah-a, Syria paovin thu seijin; ajehchu keihon kahecheh naove; chule kulpi vuma mipi jahdin Judah paovin neikihoupi hih-un, atiuve." 
2Kings18:27 Ahinla Rabshakeh chun ajah uva, kapu chun napu hengle nangma henga hiche thuho seidinga eihinsol ham? Kulpi vuma touho hin nang hotoh aeh-u aneh uva ajunu adon theina dinguva ahenguva eihinsol hilouham? ati." 
2Kings18:28 Chujouvin Rabshakeh adingin, Judah paovin aw sangtah-in asamin, thu aseijin, lenglen Assyria lengpa thu ngaijun;" 
2Kings18:29 Lengpan hitin aseije, Hezekiah chu kilheplhah sah hih-un; ajehchu aman ama khutna konin nahuhdoh jou pouvinte." 
2Kings18:30 Chule Hezekiah'in, Pakaiyin thonlouva eihuhdoh teidingu ahin, hiche khopihi Assyria lengpa khutna jong kipedoh louhel ding ahi, tin Pakai natahsan sah daohen." 
2Kings18:31 Hezekiah thu ngai hih-un; ajehchu Assyria lengpan hitin aseije, thilpeh khatna konin keitoh kinoptona khat bolun lang kahenga hungun, hitichun mitinin alengpi gui cheh le atheichang phung cheh kineh hen, chule nangho mitinin atwibel cheh-u kidonuhen;" 
2Kings18:32 Thilouva nahina diuva nangho gam tobang gam, chang le lengpithei gam, changlhah le lengpilei gam, olive thao le khoiju lonna gam khatna dinga kahunga kahung puidoh kahseuvin: chule, Pakaiyin eihuhdoh naovinte tia najol tengule, Hezekiah thu ngai hih-un." 
2Kings18:33 Namtin pathenho lah-a khat tou Assyria lengpa khutna kona agam huhdoh-a umkha tam? 
2Kings18:34 Hamath le Arpad pathenho hoija umtaovam? Sepharvaim, Hena, chule Ivah pathenho hoilamba hitaovam? Amahon kakhutna kona Samaria ahuhdoh beh uvem?" 
2Kings18:35 Gamsung pathenho jouse lah-a kakhutna kona agamu huhdohpeh-a koi uma, Pakai chun kakhutna kona Jerusalem ahuhdoh ding hijaham? ati." 
2Kings18:36 Ahinla mipi chu athipbeh-un, thu chengkhat chanjong adonbut pouve. Ajehchu lengpa thulhah chu, donbut hih-un, ti ahi." 
2Kings18:37 Chujouvin leng insunga vaihom Hilkiah chapa Eliakim le lekhasun Shebna chule thuchingpa Asaph chapa Joash chu Hezekiah henga aponu kibottel pumin ahungun, Rabshakeh thusei ho chu ama aseipeh-un ahi." 
2Kings19:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Hezekiah lengpan hichu ajah phatnin, apon abottelin, khaodippon akisilin, Pakai insunga alut tai." 
2Kings19:2 Chuin insung vaipopa Eliakim, lekhasun Shebna, chule thempuho lah-a upaho chu khaodip pon kisil pumin, Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao henga asoltan ahi." 
2Kings19:2 Chuin insung vaipopa Eliakim, lekhasun Shebna, chule thempuho lah-a upaho chu khaodip pon kisil pumin, Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao henga asoltan ahi." 
2Kings19:3 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Hezekiah'in hitin aseije, tunihi lungjin nikho, kipho nikho, chule kitaitom nikho ahi: ajehchu naosen ho pengding aki gouvin, ahinla apenlhahsah nading thahatna aumpoi." 
2Kings19:4 Apu Assyria lengpan hingjing Pathen house dinga asolpa Rabshakeh thusei jouse chu Pakai na Pathen chun jatei tantin; Pakai na Pathen'in athu jahho chu phohsal nante. Hijeh chun amoh umnalai ho ding chun taona manpeh-in, atiuve." 
2Kings19:5 Hitichun Hezekiah lengpa soh ho chu Isaiah henga ahungtaove. 
2Kings19:5 Hitichun Hezekiah lengpa soh ho chu Isaiah henga ahungtaove. 
2Kings19:6 Chuin Isaiah'in ajah uvah, napupao henga hiti nagasei dingu ahi; Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nathujah hou, Assyria lengpa sohten eitamsetnao thuho-a chun kicha hih-in." 
2Kings19:6 Chuin Isaiah'in ajah uvah, napupao henga hiti nagasei dingu ahi; Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nathujah hou, Assyria lengpa sohten eitamsetnao thuho-a chun kicha hih-in." 
2Kings19:7 Veovin, achunga huihat kanunsah ding, chule aman thuthang ajah-a, agamlama kileding; agamsung tah-a chemhema kalousah ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings19:8 Hitichun Rabshakeh akiletan, Assyria lengpan Libnah anasat agatohkhai; ajehchu aman ama chu Lachish'a konin apot tai ti ajah ahitai." 
2Kings19:9 Chule, Ethiopia leng Tirhakah chungchanga kisei, veuvin, nangma satdingin ahungkon dohtai ti thu ajah phatnin; Hezekiah henga thupole ho asolkitnin, ajah-a," 
2Kings19:10 Hitia hi Judah lengpa Hezekiah henga naseidingu ahi, Assyria lengpa khutna Jerusalem kipedoh ponte tia natahsan pa na Pathen chu kilhep lhahsah hih-in." 
2Kings19:11 Veuvin, Assyria lengten gamjouse asuhmang hela, achunguva athilbol houchu najatan; achutile nangma huhhing-a na-umchom dehding ham?" 
2Kings19:12 Kapu Kapa teovin anasuhmang Gozan, Haran, Rezeph, chule Thelasar kho-a um Eden chateho chu, namtin pathenho chun anahuhdoh beh-em?" 
2Kings19:13 Hamath lengpa, Arpad lengpa, chule Sepharvaim khopi lengpa, Hena le Ivah lengpa hoija umgama hitaovam? agati sah-e." 
2Kings19:14 Chuin Hezekiah'in thupo ho khutna lekhathot chu amun, asimtai. Chuin Hezekiah chu Pakai in'a achetouvin, hichu Pakai anga aphajaltan ahi." 
2Kings19:15 Chuin Hezekiah Pakai anga ataovin, Cherub teni kah-a cheng, vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nangma, nangma sehseh bou lenggam jouse-a Pathen nahin; nangman vanle lei nana seme." 
2Kings19:16 Pakai nanakhang hinsung inlang, ngaijin; Pakai namit hasah inlang hinven: chule Pathen hing taitom na-a Sennacherib i-sah louna thuseihi ngaijin." 
2Kings19:17 Tahbeh-in, Pakai, Assyria lengten namtinle agamu asuhmang gamuva," 
2Kings19:18 Chule a-pathen hou meija alelutpeh gamu ahitai. Ajehchu amaho pathen ahi pouvin, mihem khutsem thingle songbou ahiuve: hijeh-a chu asuhmangu ahi." 
2Kings19:19 Hijeh chun tun, vo Pakai ka Pathen'u, kangeh nahi, leiset lenggam jousen nangma sehseh bou Pakai Pathen nahihi ahet theina diuvin, ama khutna konin neihuh doh-un, ati." 
2Kings19:20 Chujouvin Amoz chapa Isaiah chun Hezekiah henga thu athotnin, hitin aseije, Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseije, Assyria leng Sennacherib douna-a kahenga nataona chu kasangtai." 
2Kings19:20 Chujouvin Amoz chapa Isaiah chun Hezekiah henga thu athotnin, hitin aseije, Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseije, Assyria leng Sennacherib douna-a kahenga nataona chu kasangtai." 
2Kings19:21 Hichehi achungchang thu-u Pakaiyin aseichu ahi; Nungah theng Zion chanu chun nahsah-in naneipon, i-sah louvin nanuisat in; Jerusalem chanun alu napei khume." 
2Kings19:22 Koi nahousetna koi nataitom ham? Koichunga na aw nachoi sanga, namit nachung hasah ham? Israel mithengpa tah chunga ahi." 
2Kings19:23 Nathu poleho mangchan Pakai chu nahousen, hitin naseijin, ka kangtalai ho tamtah toh Lebanon panga um molsang ho kahung lhungtoutan, chule chua Cedar thing sangtah tahho leh, chahthing phatah tahho kaphuh lhuhding; chule keima agamgi chin geija kalutna, Karmel gammang geija kalut ding ahi." 
2Kings19:24 Keiman kalaijin, gamdang twi kadonjin, kakengto hin kulpi kium khum vadungho chu kakan sahjin ahi, nati." 
2Kings19:25 Keiman hichehohi sotlaija iti kanabola, khanglui laija kanasemsa ahidan najah khah louham? Hicheho chu tu-a hi kagui lhunsah ahin, Khopi kul neiho chu nasuhchima bohse banga nasetvum ding ahi." 
2Kings19:26 Hijeh chun asunguva chengho thalhoma ahiuvin, ameidoijuva, maimoh ahiuvin; amaho jaova hampaho, hamhing eng ho, in chunga hamhing keh bangle akikhanlhit kah-a golhaji chang tobang bep hiuva ahi." 
2Kings19:27 Ahinla keiman nachenna, nahunglut le napotdoh, chule kachunga nalungsat kahenai." 
2Kings19:28 Ajehchu kachunga nalunghan nale nakitomna kanakhang sunga ahunglut tan; hijeh-a chu ka ngakoi nanah-a kavo-a, nanephu-a kakamdal kakoi ding, nahungna lampia kakinung lesah ding nahi." 
2Kings19:29 Chule hichehi nangma dinga melchihna hiding ahi, tukum achama kehho naneh dingu, kum ni nateng hiche-a kona alikeh mama chu nanehdingu; kumthum nateng vangle nakitu uva na atdiu; chule lengpilei nabol uva, aga nanehdiu ahi." 
2Kings19:30 Chule Judah insung mi ahoidoh amoh cheng chun ajungu noilama khothuh unting, chunglama aga asepdoh dingu ahi." 
2Kings19:31 Ajehchu Jerusalem'a kona amoh ho, Zion mola kona ahoidohho chu potdoh diu ahi. Janel Pakai tompan nachun hichehi abolding ahi, ati." 
2Kings19:32 Hijeh chun Assyria lengpa chungchang thu Pakaiyin hitihin aseije; ama hiche khopi sunga hunglut louding, thalchang khatjong akaplut louding, alumdal jong ahinpohlut louding, aumna ding kuljong asesang louhel ding ahi." 
2Kings19:33 Ahungna lampi hiche mama-a chu kilekit ding, hiche khopi sunga hunglut louding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
2Kings19:34 Ajehchu keima le keima kikhoh sahna jal le, kasoh David khohsahna jala, hiche huhdohna dinga kahonbit ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings19:35 Chuin hiche janchun ahitin ahi, Pakai vantil chu akondoh-in, Assyria te gebuh-a chun sepai sangjakhat le sangsomget le sangnga athatnin ahi. Chuin amaho jingpitah-a athophatnun, veuvin, amaho abonchauvin mithilong ngen ahitaove." 
2Kings19:36 Hitichun Assyria lengpa Sennacherib chu apotdoh-in, akinunglen, Nineveh'a achengtai." 
2Kings19:37 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman a-pathen Nisroch in'a ama ahoupetnin, achapa teni Adram-melech le Sharezer'in chemjamin athat lhontan ahi. Chuin amani Armenia gama ajammang lhontai. Hichun achapa Esarhaddon ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings20:1 Hiche laichun Hezekiah chu thidingin anatan ahi. Chuin Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao chu ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, na insung kisemtoh-in; ajehchu nathi ding ahitan, nahinsot tahlou ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings20:1 Hiche laichun Hezekiah chu thidingin anatan ahi. Chuin Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao chu ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, na insung kisemtoh-in; ajehchu nathi ding ahitan, nahinsot tahlou ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings20:2 Chujouvin amai banglama aheijin, Pakai henga ataovin, hitin aseije," 
2Kings20:3 Vo Pakai, kangeh nahi, namasanga thutah le lungdih pu-a chule namitmu-a thilpha kanabolho chu tuhin neigeldoh pehtan, ati. Chuin Hezekiah hakan akaptai." 
2Kings20:4 Chuin ahitin ahi, Isaiah chu hongsung lailunga apotdoh masangin, Pakai thu chu ahenga ahung lhungin," 
2Kings20:4 Chuin ahitin ahi, Isaiah chu hongsung lailunga apotdoh masangin, Pakai thu chu ahenga ahung lhungin," 
2Kings20:5 Kilekitnin lang kamite vaipipo Hezekiah chu gaseipeh-in, Pakai, napa David Pathen chun hitin aseije, keiman nataona kasangin, namitlhi lon kamutai: ven, kadamsah ding nahitai. Nithum chan nile nangma Pakai in'a nachetou ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings20:6 Nahinkho kum somle kum nga kajopbea, nangmale hiche khopihi Assyria lengpa khutna kona kahuhdoh ding; chule hiche khopihi keima le keima kikhoh sahna jaleh kasoh David kakhohsahna jala kahonbit ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings20:7 Chuin Isaiah'in, theichang pheng khat hinlaovin ati. Chuin ahinlaovin uilut chunga chu akoijun ahile a-ol domtan ahi." 
2Kings20:7 Chuin Isaiah'in, theichang pheng khat hinlaovin ati. Chuin ahinlaovin uilut chunga chu akoijun ahile a-ol domtan ahi." 
2Kings20:8 Chuin Hezekiah'in Isaiah jah-a, Pakaiyin eidamsah dingle nithum ni-a Pakai in'a kachetou nading melchihna chu ipi hintem? ati." 
2Kings20:8 Chuin Hezekiah'in Isaiah jah-a, Pakaiyin eidamsah dingle nithum ni-a Pakai in'a kachetou nading melchihna chu ipi hintem? ati." 
2Kings20:9 Chuin Isaiah'in, Pakaiyin aseisa chu aboltei ding ahi tihi nangma-a dinga Pakaiya kona namelchihna chu ahi: nilim chu kalsom machon dingham, ahiloule kalsom nungchon dingham? ati." 
2Kings20:9 Chuin Isaiah'in, Pakaiyin aseisa chu aboltei ding ahi tihi nangma-a dinga Pakaiya kona namelchihna chu ahi: nilim chu kalsom machon dingham, ahiloule kalsom nungchon dingham? ati." 
2Kings20:10 Chuin Hezekiah'in adonbutnin, nilim dinga kalsom chesuh dinghi thil bailam ahin; hichu hidahen, ahinla nilim chu kalsom kinungchon johen, ati." 
2Kings20:11 Chuin Isaiah themgao chu Pakai henga ataovin; Ahaz nidan melchih na-a kumlhasa nilim chu kalsom ahinlepui kitnin ahi. 
2Kings20:11 Chuin Isaiah themgao chu Pakai henga ataovin; Ahaz nidan melchih na-a kumlhasa nilim chu kalsom ahinlepui kitnin ahi. 
2Kings20:12 Hiche laichun Babylon lengpa Baladan chapa Berodach-baladan'in Hezekiah henga lekhathot le thilpeh ahinthotnin ahi: ajehchu aman Hezekiah chu anai ti ajan ahi. 
2Kings20:13 Chuin Hezekiah'in amahochu ana sasah-in, athillu koina in jouse, dangka, sanaho, gimnamtui ho, thao mantamho, agalvon koina in jouse, chule agou kholna-a umjouse avetsah sohkeijin; a-insungle alenggam jouse Hezekiah'in amaho amusahlou khatcha aumpon ahi." 
2Kings20:14 Chujouvin Isaiah themgao chu Hezekiah lengpa henga ahungin, ajah-a, hiche teho hin ipi aseijum? hoija kona nahenga hunguva ham? ati. Chuin Hezekiah'in amaho gamlatah-a Babylon'a kona hunga ahiuve, ati." 
2Kings20:14 Chujouvin Isaiah themgao chu Hezekiah lengpa henga ahungin, ajah-a, hiche teho hin ipi aseijum? hoija kona nahenga hunguva ham? ati. Chuin Hezekiah'in amaho gamlatah-a Babylon'a kona hunga ahiuve, ati." 
2Kings20:15 Chuin aman, na insunga hi ipipi amutah um? ati. Chuin Hezekiah'in adonbutnin, ka-insunga thil umjouse amutaove; kagouho lah-a kavetsahlou khatchabeh aumpoi, ati." 
2Kings20:16 Chuin Isaiah'in Hezekiah jah-a, Pakai thuhi ngaijin," 
2Kings20:16 Chuin Isaiah'in Hezekiah jah-a, Pakai thuhi ngaijin," 
2Kings20:17 Vetan, na-insunga umjouse le napan tunigeija anakhol khomho chu Babylon gamsunga apohlutna dingu nikho hunglhung ding; imacha khen umlou ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
2Kings20:18 Chule nangma nahin, nangma-a kona hungpot ding nachapate chu apuimangdiu; chule amaho chu Babylon lengpa leng insunga Nukiso ho hiding ahiuve, ati." 
2Kings20:19 Chuphatnin Hezekiah'in Isaiah henga, nangin naseidoh Pakai thuchu apha ahi. Chule aman, kahinkho sungbeh-a hi chamna le thutah aumle, hichu apha hijeng lou ham? ati." 
2Kings20:19 Chuphatnin Hezekiah'in Isaiah henga, nangin naseidoh Pakai thuchu apha ahi. Chule aman, kahinkho sungbeh-a hi chamna le thutah aumle, hichu apha hijeng lou ham? ati." 
2Kings20:20 Chule Hezekiah thilbol danghole athaneina jouse, chule twikul le twilam iti asema, chule khopi sunga twi iti ana lahlut ham tiho chu, Judah lengte thusimbua kisunlutna hilouham?" 
2Kings20:21 Chuin Hezekiah chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, chule achapa Manasseh chu ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings21:1 Manasseh alengchan patchun kum somle kum ni ahin, ama Jerusalem'a kum somnga le kum nga analeng change. Chule anu minchu Hephzi-bah ahi." 
2Kings21:2 Chule aman Israelte masanga Pakaiyin ananodoh, Pathen helouho thil thet um bolji ho bangchun, Pakai mitmun thilse anabolin ahi." 
2Kings21:3 Ajehchu apa Hezekiah'in asuhmangsa munsang ho atungdoh kitnin; Israel leng Ahab bol bangin Baal maicham atungdoh in, thingbom asemin, van janelpi ahouvin, ajentaovin ahi." 
2Kings21:4 Pakaiyin Jerusalem'a kamin kaum sah ding ahi atina, Pakai in'a chun maicham ho asemin ahi." 
2Kings21:5 Chuin aman Pakai in hongsung teni-a chun van janelho jousedin maicham ho aseme. 
2Kings21:6 Chuin aman achapa chu meija kilhaina-in amangin, phat ho anitnin, kilhimna ho amangchan, lhakou le doithemho amangin: lungsat sah-a lunghansah nadin, Pakai mitmun khangitlouna tamtah abolin ahi." 
2Kings21:7 Aman thingbom milim asem chu Pakai in'a chun atungdoh-e, hiche houin chungchang hi Pakaiyin David le achapa Solomon henga, hiche in le Jerusalem hi a-imatih chana kamin umjing nadinga, Israel phung jouse-a kona kalhendoh ahin," 
2Kings21:8 Keiman amaho kathupeh jouse dungjuile, kasoh Mosi'n amaho athupeh jouse dungjuija boldinga anit pou ule, apu apateu kanapehna leisetna kona Israel ten akalu asondoh louhel dingu ahi, anati." 
2Kings21:9 Ahinla amahon angaipouvin; Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga anasuhmang namho bolsanga phaloujo cheh-in Manasseh'in miho chu alhemlha tai. 
2Kings21:10 Chuin Pakaiyin asoh themgaoho-a thu aseijin," 
2Kings21:11 Ajehchu Judah lengpa Manasseh in hichethil thet umtah abola, amaho masanga Amor mihon abol jouseu vuma giloutah-a abola, Judah jong milim houva achonsetsah jeh hin;" 
2Kings21:12 Hijeh chun Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, veuvin, hiche thuhi ajapha chanin anakol teni kichih lahlah leuva ajah nadinga, keiman Jerusalem le Judah chunga thilse kalhunsah ding ahi." 
2Kings21:13 Chule Samaria tena khao le Ahab insung tena thihkhai chu Jerusalem chunga kaman ding; min kong asoptheng banga Jerusalem kasuhtheng ding, chule kabung butun ding ahi." 
2Kings21:14 Chule kagou chan amoh chengse chu kadalhah-a, amelmateu khutna kapehdoh ding; chule amaho amelmateuva dinga anchahle thil kichom hidiu ahi." 
2Kings21:15 Ajehchu apateu Egypt'a kona ahungdoh uva pat tunigei hin kamitmun thilphalou jeng aboluvin, kalunghan nadin eilungsat sah-un ahi, ati." 
2Kings21:16 Chukal vallin Manasseh hin themona bei thisan aso tambeh seh'in, Jerusalem dunglevai adip jengin; ama chonset tilouvin Judah jong achonsetsah-in, hitichun Pakai mitmun thilse jeng abolin ahi." 
2Kings21:17 Tun Manasseh thilbol danghole chonsetna abol hochu Judah lengte thusimbua kisuna hilouham? 
2Kings21:18 Chuin Manasseh apu apate toh alumkhomin; a-in'a ama honsungtah, Uzza honsunga avuitaovin: achapa Amon ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings21:19 Amon alengchan patchun kum somni le kumni ahin, Jerusalem'a kumni alengchange. Anu minchu Meshullemeth ahin, Jotbah kho-a Haruz chanu ahi." 
2Kings21:20 Aman apa Manasseh bolbangin Pakai mitmun thilphalou jeng abolin ahi. 
2Kings21:21 Chule apa chena lampi chu ajotnin, apan milim kin abol hochu abolin, amaho chu ahouvin," 
2Kings21:22 Hitichun apu apate Pakai Pathen chu adalhan, Pakai lamlhah chu ajotpon ahi." 
2Kings21:23 Chuin Amon sohte chun ama dounan guhthimin thilgon aneijun, lengpa chu ama in'a athat taove." 
2Kings21:24 Ahinla chuche gam miho chun Amon lengpa changlhiho chu athatgam helun; chuche gam miho chun achapa Josiah chu ama khelin alengchansah taove. 
2Kings21:25 Tun Amon'in anabol anatoh dangho chu Judah lengte thusimbua kisuna hilou ham? 
2Kings21:26 Chuin ama chu Uzza honsunga lhana chun avuijun, achapa Josiah ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings22:1 Josiah chu alengchan kipat chun kum get ahin, ama Jerusalem'a kum somthumle kumkhat aleng changin ahi. Chule anu minchu Jedidah ahin, Boskath kho-a Adaiah chanu ahi." 
2Kings22:2 Chuin aman Pakai mitmu-a thil dihtah abolin, apa David lamlhah jouse ajotnin, jetle veija akiheidohpon ahi." 
2Kings22:3 Chuin ahitin ahi, Josiah lengchan kumsomle kum getna-in, lengpan Meshullam chapa Azaliah chapa Shaphan lekhasun chu Pakai in'a asolin, aseije," 
2Kings22:4 Thempu chungnung Hilkiah henga chetouvin lang, kotngah hon miho-a kona alahkhomu, Pakai in'a kipo dangka chu simhen," 
2Kings22:5 Chule Pakai in'a natongho vesuiho khutna pedoh uhen; chule amahon houin selai semphat nadingin, Pakai in'a um natongho," 
2Kings22:6 Thingthem bol hole insaho chule songthem bolho hengah, insemphat nading thingtumle song kikhengho choh nadingin peson uhen, ati." 
2Kings22:7 Ahivangin amahon tahsan umtah-a aboljeh-un, akhutnuva kipelut sumho chu vetsuina aumpoi." 
2Kings22:8 Chuin thempu chungnung Hilkiah'in lekhasun Shaphan jah-a, danthupeh lekhabu chu Pakai in'a kamutai, ati. Chuin Hilkiah'in lekhabu chu Shaphan apen, aman hichu asimtan ahi." 
2Kings22:9 Chuin lekha sunpa Shaphan chu lengpa henga ahungin hitihin thu ahinlhut tai; nasohten in'a um sumho chu natongho khutna Pakai insa-a natongho apesoh hel taove, ati." 
2Kings22:10 Chuin lekha sunpa Shaphan'in lengpa henga, Hilkiah thempupan lekhabu khat eipei, tin lengpa avetsah tai. Chuin Shaphan'in lengpa masanga hichu asimtai." 
2Kings22:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, lengpan danthupeh lekhabua thuchu ajah phatnin, apon abottelin ahi." 
2Kings22:12 Chuin lengpan Hilkiah thempu, Shaphan chapa Ahikam, Michaiah chapa Achbor, lekhasun Shaphan, lengpa sohpa Asahiah chu thu apen," 
2Kings22:13 Cheovin, Pakai chu keima dingle mipi ho-a ding, chule Judah te jousedin hiche akimudoh lekhabua thu umho chungchang thuhi neigadop peh-un; ajehchu ijuidiuva hiche lekhabua kijih jousehi ipu ipateovin ajuilou jeh-un, ichunguva Pakai lungsatna deujeju ahi, ati." 
2Kings22:14 Hitichun Hilkiah thempu, Ahikam, Achbor, Shaphan, Asahiah chu ponsil chingtupma pang Harhas chapa Tikvah chapa Shallum inneipi Huldah themgaonu henga acheuvin,(Amachu Jerusalem vengsahlama cheng ahin,) amanu aga kihoupiu vin ahi." 
2Kings22:15 Chuin amanun ajah uvah, Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, kahenga nahinsolpao jah-a chun seipeh taovin," 
2Kings22:16 Pakaiyin hitin ati, vetan, Judah lengpan asim lekhabua thucheng jouse banga chu, hikom munle asunga chengho jouse chunga thil phaloutah kalhunsah ding ahi:" 
2Kings22:17 Ajehchu akhutsohho jouse-a eilung hansah theina dinguvin, amahon keima eidalhao vin, pathen dangho henga gimnamtui ahaluvin ahi; hijeh-a chu hiche mun douna-a hi kalungsatna deujah jengding, chule kisumit louding ahi." 
2Kings22:18 Ahinla Pakai dopdinga nahin soluvah Judah lengpa henga chun hitihin seijun, Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin ati, nathu jah ho chungchanga;" 
2Kings22:19 Hiche mun le asunga chengho chungchanga kathusei, amaho akamhel le sapset chang hung hidiu ahi tia kasei najah phatna nalung anema, Pakai anga nakineosah-a, napon nabotel jenga, kamasanga naka jeh-in; keiman nataona kasangtai tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
2Kings22:20 Hijeh chun vetan, keiman nangma napu napate henga kapuiding, nalhansunga lhamong tah-a kipuilut ding nahin; hiche mun'a thilse kalhunsah dingchu namitna namulouhel ding ahi, tin gaseipeh-un ati. Hitichun hiche thuchu lengpa henga agalhut taovin ahi." 
2Kings23:1 Chuin lengpan mi asolin, Judah gam le Jerusalem'a upaho jouse ahenga akhomin ahi." 
2Kings23:2 Chuin lengpa chu Judah mi jousele Jerusalem'a cheng jouse, chule thempuho le themgaoho, chule mijouse, alenle aneo agomin amatoh Pakai in'a achetouvun; Pakai in'a kimu kitepna lekhabua thujouse chu nakhang jouse jah dingin asimin ahi." 
2Kings23:3 Chuin lengpa chu khompi koma adingin, Pakai nung juidingle, adan thupeh ho, athu hettohsah ho, achondan kisunho chu alungthim pumpi le ahinna pumpi-a juiding le, hiche lekhabua kisun kitepna ho jouse tongdoh dingin, Pakai angsunga chun kitepna aneijin ahi. Chule mipi jouse chun kitepna chu adin piuvin ahi." 
2Kings23:4 Chule lengpan thempu chungnung Hilkiah, anoidou thempuho, chule kotngah ho chu Baal ding, thingbom ding, chule van janelpi dinga kisem um le bel jouse Pakai in'a kona ladohdin thu apen ahi. Chuin aman hicheho chu Jerusalem pama Kidron loujaova agouvin, avamho chu Bethel'a apotai." 
2Kings23:5 Chule aman milimhou thempuho, Judah khopiho le Jerusalem kimvel munsang ho-a gimnamtui haldia Judah lengten anapansah hou; Baal, nisa, lhathah, vantham jola umho, chule van janelho henga gimnamtui hal hochu, ahaisah gamtai." 
2Kings23:6 Chule aman thingbom chu Pakai in'a konin Jerusalem pamlam, Kidron vachadunga apodoh-in; Kidron vachadunga ahalvamin, dijetnin achil ngemin, adi chu mipi ho chate buikhuh chunga apaijin ahi." 
2Kings23:7 Chule Pakai in koma pasal kijoh ho umna, thingbom dinga numei hon pon akhon jinao inho chu asuchim gamtan ahi." 
2Kings23:8 Chule Judah khopiho-a konin thempu jouse apuidoh-in, thempuho ginnamtui halna munsang ho Geba'a pat Bersheba geijin asuboh soh helin; khopi kotpi lutna veilam sanga khopi vaipo Joshua kotpi lutna-a munsang ho chu asuchimin ahi." 
2Kings23:8 Chule Judah khopiho-a konin thempu jouse apuidoh-in, thempuho ginnamtui halna munsang ho Geba'a pat Bersheba geijin asuboh soh helin; khopi kotpi lutna veilam sanga khopi vaipo Joshua kotpi lutna-a munsang ho chu asuchimin ahi." 
2Kings23:9 Munsang thempuho chu Jerusalem'a Pakai maichama ahunglou vangun, asopiteu lah-a chol solou changlhah vang ane naove." 
2Kings23:10 Chule koimachan achapa ahiloule achanu Molech koma meija alelut louna din, Hinnom chate phaichama um Tophet chu asuboh'in ahi." 
2Kings23:11 Chule Pakai in lutna, lengpa noidou Nathan-melech indan koma um, Judah lenghon nisa dinga apeh-u sakol ho chu aladoh-in; nisa kangtalai ho chu meijin ahalin ahi." 
2Kings23:12 Chule Ahaz indan chungnung vuma Judah lenghon maicham asemhou, chule Manasseh'in Pakai inhong teni sunga maicham asemho chu lengpan avochimin, asubongin, aleivuiju chu Kidron vachadunga apai lutnin ahi." 
2Kings23:13 Chule Jerusalem masang, kitahlouna molsang jetlama um munsang ho, Israel lengpa Solomon'in Zidon mite pathen thet umtah Ashtoreth ding, Moab miho Pathen thet umtah Chemosh ding, Ammon chate pathen thet umtah Milcom dinga anasah hochu, lengpan asubohtan ahi." 
2Kings23:14 Chuin milimho chu ahal halin asuchipmin, chule thingbomho chu aphuh lhun, amunho chun mihem gubuh-in adipme." 
2Kings23:15 Chukal valin Israelte chonsetsah Nebat chapa Jeroboam'in Bethel'a maicham le munsang asem munho chu asuchim soh-in; munsang chu ahalvamin, achil ngemin, thingbom chu ahalvamtai." 
2Kings23:16 Chuin Josiah agakiheile mola lhanho chu ahinmun, mi asolin, lhana konin guho chu agalahsah-in, hiche thu anasei, Pathen mipan anaphondoh Pakai thu dungjuijin, maicham chunga chun ahalvamin, asubohtai." 
2Kings23:17 Chuphatnin aman, khuche kagah mukhu ipi songphu ham? ati. Chuin khopi miho chun, Pathen mi, Judah gama kona hunga Bethel maicham chunga nathilbol saho hung seichoi masapa lhan ahi, tin ahiluve." 
2Kings23:18 Chuin aman limsah hih-un, koiman aguchu suloh hih-un, ati. Hitichun Samaria'a kona hung kipotou themgaoho gutoh umkhom louvin, achomkoi taove." 
2Kings23:19 Chule Israel lengten Pakai lunghan sahna-a asah-u, Samaria khopiho-a munsang inho jouse jongchu, Joshiah'in alamangin, Bethel'a abol bangin abolsoh keijin ahi." 
2Kings23:20 Chule munsang thempuho jouse jongchu maicham chunga athatnin; mi guho chu achunguva ahalin; chuin Jerusalem'a akiletai. 
2Kings23:21 Chuin lengpan mijouse henga, hiche kitepna lekhabua kisun banghin, Pakai na Pathen'u henga kalchuh kut mangun, tin thu apei." 
2Kings23:22 Tabbeh-in Israelte chunga thutan hon thu atan laijuva pat, Israel leng tele Judah lengte nikholai jousen jong, chutobanga kalchuh kut chu ana umkhapon ahi." 
2Kings23:23 Josiah lengchan kal kum somle kumget na-in, chuche kalchuh kut chu Jerusalem'a Pakai dingin ananei bepmun ahi." 
2Kings23:24 Chukal valin Pakai in'a thempu Hilkiah'in amudoh lekhabua danthupeh kisunho suhbulhit ahina dingin, lhakou ho, doithemho, milimho, alim kisunthu bolho, chule le Judah gamle Jerusalem'a thil thet um amujiho jouse chu Josiah'in asumang soh hele." 
2Kings23:25 Mosi danthupeh dungjuija Pakai lama alungthim pumpi, alhagao pumpi, chule athaneinao pumpi-a kipe-a amatobang leng khatcha anaumpon, anungin jong ama tobang khatcha jong aum tapoi." 
2Kings23:26 Achuti jeng vangin Pakai chun alunghana tijat umtah, Manasseh'in alunghan sahna jouse jeh-a, Judah chunga alunghana deujejua konchun adai lhadeh pon ahi." 
2Kings23:27 Chuin Pakaiyin, Israel kachon mang banga, Judah jonghi kamitmu-a kona kachon mang ding ahin; keiman kalhentum hiche khopi Jerusalem le, chu-a chu kamin umding ahi tia kanaseina hiche houin hi kapaidoh ding ahi, ati." 
2Kings23:28 Tun Josiah thilbol dangho le anatoh jouse chu Judah lengte thusimbua kisuna hilouham? 
2Kings23:29 Ama nikho laijin Egypt lengpa Pharoah-nechoh chu Assyria lengpa satdin Euphrates luipi-a akon touvin: chuin Josiah lengpa chu amapa kidoupidin achen; chuin Pharoah-nechoh'in ama amu phatnin Megiddo'a athat tai. 
2Kings23:30 Chuin asohten Megiddo'a konin kangtalai khatna athilong chu apouvin, Jerusalem alhutnun, amatah lhana avuitaove. Chuin gamsung mite chun Josiah chapa Jehoahaz apuijun, thao anuvin, apa khelin lengin apansah taove." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaz alengchan patnin kum somni le kum thum ahin; Jerusalem'a lhathum aleng changin ahi. Anu minchu Hamutal ahin, Libnah'a Jeremiah chanu ahi." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaz alengchan patnin kum somni le kum thum ahin; Jerusalem'a lhathum aleng changin ahi. Anu minchu Hamutal ahin, Libnah'a Jeremiah chanu ahi." 
2Kings23:32 Chule aman apu apate thilbol jouse bangin, Pakai mitmun thilphalou jeng abolin ahi." 
2Kings23:33 Chuin Pharoah-nechoh chun Jerusalem'a alengchan theilouna dingin, Hamath gama um Riblah'a ahen nin; chule agamu chu dangka talent jakhat le sana talent khat kai apohsah tan ahi." 
2Kings23:34 Chuin Pharoah-nechoh chun Josiah chapa Eliakim chu apa Josiah indan sunga chun alengchan sah-in, aminchu Jehoiakim'in akhelin, Jehoahaz chu apuimangtai. Chuin Pharoah'in Jehoahaz chu Egypt'a apuisuh-in, chua chun Jehoahaz athitai." 
2Kings23:35 Chuin Jehoiakim'in dangka le sana chu Pharoah apen; ahinla Pharaoh thupeh dungjuija sum pehdingin gamsung chu kai apohsah cheh-in ahi. Aman Pharoad-nechoh pehdinga mitin ateppeh cheh bangtah-in, chuche gam miho chu dangka le sana kaijin apehsah cheh-in ahi." 
2Kings23:36 Jahoiakim chu alengchan tilin kum somni le kum nga ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kum khat alengchange. Chule anu minchu Zebudah ahin, Rumah mi Pedaiah chanu ahi." 
2Kings23:37 Chule aman apu apate bolho jouse bangin Pakai mitmun thilphalou ngen abolin ahi. 
2Kings24:1 Ama nikho laichun Babylon lenga Nabuchadnezzar ahungtouvin, Jehoiakim chu kumthum asoh-in ahung pangin; chujouvin akile heijin chule ama douvin ahung pangtai." 
2Kings24:2 Chuin Pakaiyin ama doudin Chaldea loiho, Syria loiho, Moab loiho, chule Ammon chate asolin, Pakaiyin themgaoho kama anasei thu dungjuijin, Judah douva sumangdingin asoltan ahi." 
2Kings24:3 Tabbeh-in Manasseh chonsetna ho jouse le athilbolho jouse dungjuija, amitmua kona chondoh nadinga, Pakaiya kona hiche thupeh hi hunglhunga ahi." 
2Kings24:4 Chule themonabei thisan asojeh jong ahi: ajehchu Jerusalem chu monabei thisan sonan adiptan, Pakaiyin angaidam louding ahi." 
2Kings24:5 Tun Jehoiakim thilbol danghole atoh jouse chu Judah lengte thusimbua kisuna hilouham? 
2Kings24:6 Hitichun Jehoiakim apu apate toh alumkhomin, achapa Jehoiachin ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Kings24:7 Chuin Egypt lengpa chu agama konin ahungkit tapoi: ajehchu Babylon lengpan Egypt vapidunga kona Euphrates vadunglen gei, Egypt lengpa gamhop jouse alah ahitai." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiachin chu alengchan patnin kum somle kumget ahin, chule Jerusalem'a lhathum alengchange. Chule anu minchu Nehusta ahin, Jerusalem'a um Elnathan chanu ahi." 
2Kings24:9 Chuin aman apa thilbol jouse dungjuijin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng abolin ahi. 
2Kings24:10 Hiche laichun Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar sohpa Jerusalem dounan ahung touvin, khopi chu aumkul taovin ahi." 
2Kings24:11 Chuin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khopi doudinga chu ahungleh, asohten anaumchah taovin ahi." 
2Kings24:12 Chuin Judah lengpa Jehoiachin chu ama le anu, asohte, amilenho, avaipoho toh Babylon lengpa henga achedoh-un; chuin alengchan kumget lhinin Babylon lengpan sohchangin akaitai." 
2Kings24:13 Chuin Pakaiyin anasei bangchun, Pakai in'a goujouse le leng in'a goujouse chu hiche mun'a konchun apodoh-in, Pakai houin'a Israelte lengpa Solomon'in sana kong leh bel anasem jouse chu avokeh sohkeijin ahi." 
2Kings24:14 Chuin Jerusalem'a mijouse, milen jouse, mihatle mihang jouse chu gal hing sangsom jen akaijin, khutthem jousele thih khengho jouse chu apuimang soh helin: gamsunga chun mipi avaicha dehho tailou koimacha aumtapoi." 
2Kings24:15 Chuin Jehoiachin chu Babylon'a apui mangin, chule lengpa nu, lengpa jiteho, avaipoho, chule chuche gama mihat ho chu Jerusalem'a konin gal hingin Babylon'a akaitai." 
2Kings24:16 Chule pasal hatjouse chu sangsagi jen, khutthemhole thih khengho sangkhat ahiuvin, amaho chu mihat le gal bolthei cheh ahiuvin, Babylon lengpan gal hingin Babylon'a akaitai." 
2Kings24:17 Chuin Babylon lengpan Jehoiachin pa sopipa Mattaniah chu ama khelin alengchan sah-in, amin akhelpeh-in Zedekiah asahtai." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiah alengchan patnin kum somni le kum khat ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kum khat alengchange, chule anu minchu Hamutal ahin, Libnah kho-a Jeremiah chanu ahi." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiah alengchan patnin kum somni le kum khat ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kum khat alengchange, chule anu minchu Hamutal ahin, Libnah kho-a Jeremiah chanu ahi." 
2Kings24:19 Chule Jehoiakim'in anabol bangin Pakai mitmun thilphalou jeng anabolin ahi. 
2Kings24:20 Ajehchu Pakai lunghan na-a kona Jerusalem le Judah gamsung chu a-angsunga kona apaidoh kahse-a chuti chu soh-a ahi. Chuin Zedekiah chu Babylon lengpa dounan akiphin tan ahi. 
2Kings25:1 Chuin Zedekiah lengchan kal kum ko na, lha somna, chuche lha nisom na-in ahitin ahi, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar chu, amale asepaite toh Jerusalem dounan ahung konun, pal akai khumun, akimvela kul akai khumun ahi." 
2Kings25:2 Zedekiah lengpa lengchan kal kum somle kum khat na-in, khopi chu aum kimvel taove." 
2Kings25:3 Chuin lha lina ni ko nichun khopi-a chun kel alhan, gamsung miho dingin an himhim aumtapoi." 
2Kings25:4 Chuin khopi chu asukeh-un, galsatmi jouse chu lengpa honna kulbang ni kikah lampia chun jan-in ajamun; (tun Chaldea te chun khopi chu aum khumu ahin,) chuin lengpa chu phaicham lampi lama chun achen ahi." 
2Kings25:5 Chuin Chaldea sepaihon lengpa chu anung delun, Jericho phaichama aphapa taovin; asepaite jouse chu ama-a konin akithecheh taove." 
2Kings25:6 Hitichun lengpa chu amanun, Babylon lengpa henga Riblah'a apuitouvun; achungthu atan taove." 
2Kings25:7 Chuin amahon Zedekiah chapate chu ama mitmu tah-in athatnun, chule Zedekiah chu amit akaldoh-un, sum-eng khaovin akanun, Babylon lama apuitaove." 
2Kings25:8 Chuin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kal kum somle kumko na, alha ngana, chuche lha nisagi nichun, Babylon lengpa sohpa vetup ho gal lamkai Nebuzaradan chu Jerusalem'a ahungin;" 
2Kings25:9 Pakai in le lengpa in, chule Jerusalem'a injouse le milentakip in chu meijin ahallha gamtan ahi." 
2Kings25:10 Chuin vetup vaipopa henga um chaldea sepai jouse chun, Jerusalem kimvela kulbangho chu asuchim gam taove." 
2Kings25:11 Tun khopi sunga kidalha mipi dangho, chule Babylon lengpa henga kona jammangho, chule amoh tamtah ho chu vetuploi lamkai Nebuzaradan'in apuimang sohtai." 
2Kings25:12 Ahinla gamsunga mivaichaho chu vetup loi lamkaipa chun lengpilei lhouding le louboldin adalha tai. 
2Kings25:13 Chuin Pakai insunga sum-eng khomho, chule twikongho, Pakai insunga sum-eng twidol, chule atunna sum-eng ho chu Babylon'a apotaove." 
2Kings25:14 Chule bel ho, vutlonaho, chaicheho, thihkheho, chule sum-enga kisem um le bel jouse chu amahon apomang taovin ahi." 
2Kings25:15 Chule khangbelho, sumlheng ho, chule chutobang thilho chu, sana chu sana-in, dangka chu dangka-in ngahtup gallamkai pan apomangtai." 
2Kings25:16 Solomon in Pakai in dinga anasem khom ni, twidol khat, chule atunna, umle bel ho jouse sum-eng chu tejougol ahipoi." 
2Kings25:17 Khompi khat sanje chu tong somle tong get ahin, achunga aluboh chu sum-eng ahi; aluboh sanje chu tong thum ahin, chule aluboh chung kimvel chu kolbuthei lim kigeipol chitchetna, ajepna chu sum-eng jeng hija ahi. Hiche tobangma-a hi khompi nina-a jong chu akigeipol chitchet uma ahi." 
2Kings25:18 Chuin ngahtup vaipopa chun thempu chungnung Seraiah, thempu nina Zephaniah, chule kotngah thumho chu amanin;" 
2Kings25:18 Chuin ngahtup vaipopa chun thempu chungnung Seraiah, thempu nina Zephaniah, chule kotngah thumho chu amanin;" 
2Kings25:19 Chule aman khopi sunga galbolho chunga vaipo toh, khopi sunga lengpa anga ana umjing mi nga toh, gamsunga mipi ho min sunlutji janelho lekhasun pipuipa toh, khopisunga um gamsung mipilah a mi somgup toh amanin ahi." 
2Kings25:20 Chuin ngahtup vaipo Nebuzaradan'in amaho chu akaijin, Riblah'a Babylon lengpa henga apuitai." 
2Kings25:21 Chuin Babylon lengpan amaho chu Hamath gamsunga um Riblah'a mun'a chun amaho chu athat gamin ahi. Hitichun Judah chu agamuva konin apuimangtai. 
2Kings25:22 Chule Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in adalhah, Judah gama umden hoding chun, aman Shaphan chapa Ahikam chapa Gedaliah chu achunguva gamvaipo din asem peh-in ahi." 
2Kings25:23 Chuin galsat lamkaiho jouse, amahole amiteuvin Babylon lengpan Gedaliah chu gamvaipodin asemtai ti ajah phatnun, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael, Careah chapa Johanan, Netophah mi Tanhumeth chapa Seraiah, Maachath mi chapa Jaazaniah amahole amiteu chu Mizpah'a Gadaliah henga ahunguvin ahi." 
2Kings25:24 Chuin Gedaliah amahole amiteu henga akihahselin, ajah uvah, Chaldea ho soh hiding kicha hih-un; gamsunga chun chengun lang Babylon lengpa jenmaijun; chutile nangho dinga thilpha hiding ahi, ati." 
2Kings25:25 Ahinla lha sagina-in ahitin ahi, lengte chilhah-a kon Elisha chapa Nethania chapa Ishmael chu pasal somtoh ahungin, Gedaliah le Mizpah'a aumpi Judah tele Chaldea te chu anokhumun athat taovin ahi." 
2Kings25:26 Chuin mijouse, alen aneo, chule galsat vaipoho, akipatnun Egypt'a ahungtaove; ajehchu Chaldea te chu akichatnu ahi." 
2Kings25:27 Chuin ahitin ahi, Judah lengpa Jehoiachin sohchan kal kum somthumna, lha somle lhanina, nisomni le sagini na-in, Babylon lengpa Evil-merodach ahung lengchan kum kipat chun, Judah lengpa Jehoiachin chu songkul'a konin alhadoh tan ahi." 
2Kings25:28 Chule ahenga lungsetna neitah-in thu aseijin, Babylon'a amatoh umkhom lengho jouselaltouna vuma chun ama laltouna adosangpeh-in;" 
2Kings25:29 Asongkul von akhelpeh-in, ahinkho lhumkeijin a-anga an anejom jingtan ahi." 
2Kings25:30 Chule alo chu ahile, lengpan niseh-in a-an nehding ape jingin, ahinkho lhumkeijin niseh-in achang neijin ape jingin ahi." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam, Seth, Enosh;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoch, Methuselah, Lamech;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Noah, Shem, Ham, chule Japheth." 
1Chronicles1:5 Japheth chapate chu: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech chule Tiras ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:6 Chule Gomer chapate chu: Ashkenaz, Riphath chule Togarmah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:7 Chule Javan chapate chu: Elishah, Tarshish, Chittim chule Dodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ham chapate chu: Cush, Mizraim, Put, Canaan ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:9 Cush chapate chu: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah chule Sabtecha ahiuve. Chule Raamah chapate chu: Sheba le Dedan ahi." 
1Chronicles1:10 Chule Cush'in Nimrod ahingin; Amachu leisetna mihat masapen ahunghitai. 
1Chronicles1:11 Chule Mizraim'in Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathrusim, Casluhim (ama-a kona Philistine te hungdoh ahi), chule Caphthorim ahinge." 
1Chronicles1:13 Chule Canaan'in chapa masapen Sidon, abana Heth," 
1Chronicles1:14 Jebush miho, Amor miho, Girgas miho," 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiv miho, Ark miho, Sin miho," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad miho, Zemar miho, chule Hamath miho ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Shem chapate chu: Elam, Asshur, Arphaxad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether chule Meshech ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:18 Chule Arphaxad'in Shelah ahingin, Shelah'in Eber ahinge." 
1Chronicles1:19 Chule Eber'a konin cha pasal ni apengin, khatpa minchu Peleg ahi, ajehchu ama nikho laijin leiset ana kikhena ahi; chule asopipa minchu Joktan ahi." 
1Chronicles1:20 Chule Joktan'in Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram jong, Uzal, Diklah," 
1Chronicles1:22 Chule Ebal, Abimael, Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Chule Ophir, Havilah le Jobab ahingin ahi. Hichengse hi Joktan chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:23 Chule Ophir, Havilah le Jobab ahingin ahi. Hichengse hi Joktan chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber, Peleg, Reu;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Serug, Nahor, Terah;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Abram; hichu Abraham ahi. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abraham chapateni chu: Isaac le Ishmael ahilhone. 
1Chronicles1:29 Hichehohi akhangguiju ahi: Ishmael chapa lenpen chu Nebaioth ahin, chejouchun Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Naphish, chule Kedemah ahiuve. Hichehohi Ishmael chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:32 Tun Abraham thaikem Keturah chapate chu: amanun Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, chule Shuah ahinge. Chule Jokshan chapateni chu: Sheba le Dedan ahilhone." 
1Chronicles1:33 Chule Midian chapate chu: Ephah, Epher, Henoch, Abida chule Eldaah ahi. Hichehosehi Keturah chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:34 Chule Abraham'in Isaac ahinge. Isaac chapateni chu Esau le Israel ahilhone. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau chapate chu: Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam chule Korah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:36 Eliphaz chapate chu: Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna chule Amalek ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuel chapate chu: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah chule Mizzah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:38 Chule Seir chapate chu: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer chule Dishan ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:39 Chule Lotan chapateni chu: Hori le Homam ahilhonin, Timna chu Lotan sopinu ahi." 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobal chapate chu: Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi, chule Onam ahiuve. Chule Zibeon chapateni chu Aiah le Anah ahilhone." 
1Chronicles1:41 Anah chapa chu Dishon ahi. Chule Dishon chapate chu: Amran, Eshban, Ithran chule Keran ahiuve." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezer chapate chu: Bilhan, Zavan chule Jakan ahiuve. Dishan chapateni chu Uz le Aran ahilhone." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israel chate chunga leng khatchan vai ahom masanga Edom gama analengchangte lengho chu tun hichehohi ahiuve. Beor chapa Bela ahin; chule akhopi minchu Dinhabah ahi. 
1Chronicles1:44 Chule Bela athiphatnin Bozrah'a um Zerah chapa Jobab ama khelin analeng change. 
1Chronicles1:44 Chule Bela athiphatnin Bozrah'a um Zerah chapa Jobab ama khelin analeng change. 
1Chronicles1:45 Chule Jobab athiphatnin Teman ho gama Husham ama khelin aleng changin ahi. 
1Chronicles1:45 Chule Jobab athiphatnin Teman ho gama Husham ama khelin aleng changin ahi. 
1Chronicles1:46 Chule Husham athiphatnin Bedad chapa Hadad, Moab phaija Midia ho joupa chu ama khelin aleng changin, chule akhopi minchu Avith ahi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Chule Hadad athiphatnin Masrekah'a um Samlah ama khelin aleng changin ahi. 
1Chronicles1:48 Chule Samlah athiphatnin vadung panga Rehoboth'a um Shual ama khelin analeng change. 
1Chronicles1:49 Chule Shual athiphatnin Achbor chapa Baalhanan ama khelin aleng changin ahi. 
1Chronicles1:50 Chule Baalhanan athiphatnin ama khelin Hadad alengchange; chule akhopi min Pai ahi, chule ajinu minchu Mezahab chanu Matred chanu Mehatabel ahi." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hada jong athitan ahi. Chule Edom leng noidouho chu: leng noidou Timna, leng noidou Aliah, leng noidou Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:52 Leng noidou Aholibamah, leng noidou Elah, leng noidou Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Leng noidou Kenaz, leng noidou Teman, leng noidou Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Leng noidou Magdiel, leng noidou Iram, hichehohi Edom leng noidouho ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:1 Israel chapate chu hichehohi ahiuve: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad chule Asher." 
1Chronicles2:3 Judah chapate chu: Er, Onan chule Shelah ahiuvin, amaho thum chu Canaan mi Shua chanu-a kona peng ahiuve. Judah chapa lenpen Er chu Pakai mitmun agilou lheh jengin, hitichun Pakaiyin athattan ahi." 
1Chronicles2:4 Amounu Tamar'in Pharez le Zerah ahinpeh-in ahi. Judah chapate chu abonun mi nga ahiuve. 
1Chronicles2:5 Pharez chapateni chu Hezron le Hamul ahilhone. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zerah chapate chu: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calkol chule Dara ahiuvin, abonun mi nga ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:7 Carmi chapa chu Akar ahin, Israel sunohphah-a sapset thila suhkhel nei ahi." 
1Chronicles2:8 Chule Ethan chapa chu Azariah ahi. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezron'a kona hungpeng achapate chu: Jerahmeel, Ram chule Chelubai ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:10 Chule Ram'in Amminadab ahingin; chule Amminadab'in Judah chate pipu pa Nahshon ahingin ahi. 
1Chronicles2:11 Chule Nahshon'in Salma ahingin, chule Salma'in Boaz ahinge." 
1Chronicles2:12 Chule Boaz'in Obed ahingin, chule Obed'in Jesse ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles2:13 Chule Jesse'in achapa peng masapen chu Eliab ahin, anina Abinadab, athumna Shimma," 
1Chronicles2:14 Ali channa Nethaneel, anga channa Raddai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Agup channa Ozem, asagi channa chu David ahinge." 
1Chronicles2:16 Asopiu numei teni minchu Zeruiah le Abigail ahilhone. Chule Zeruiah chapate chu: Abishai, Joab chule Asahel ahin, mi thum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:17 Chule Abigail'in Amasa ahingin; chule Amasa pachu Ishmael mi Jether ahi. 
1Chronicles2:18 Chule Hezron chapa Caleb'in ajinu Azubah le Jerioth'a konin chate ahingin, achapate chu: Jesher, Shobab chule Ardon ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubah athi phatnin Caleb in Ephrath akichenpi kitnin Hur ahinge. 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur'in Uri ahingin, chule Uri'in Bezaleel ahinge." 
1Chronicles2:21 Hiche nungchun Hezron Gilead pa Machir chanu henga ache-in, kum somgup ahinungin akichenpin; chule amanun Segup ahinpeh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segup'in Jair ahingin, aman Gilead gama khopi somni le thum aneije." 
1Chronicles2:23 Aman amaho'a konin Geshur le Aram, Jair khopihotoh, chule Kenath toh akhopiho, khopi somgup jen alahpeh-in ahi. Hicheho jousehi Gilead pa Machir chapate-a ngen ahi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Chuche nunga Caleb-ephrathah mun Hezron'a athi phatnin, Hezron inneipi Abijah'in Tekoa pa Ashur chu ahinpeh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles2:25 Hezron chapa masapen Jerahmeel sonho chapate chu apeng masapen Ram ahin, chule Bunah, Oren, Ozem le Ahijah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahmeel'in jidang jong aneijin amin Atarah ahi: Amanuhi Onam nu ahi. 
1Chronicles2:27 Jerahmeel chapa masapen Ram chapate chu; Maaz, Jamin chule Eker ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onam chapateni chu Shammai le Jada ahilhonin; chule Shammai chapateni Nadab le Abishur ahi. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishur inneipi min chu Abihail ahin, amanun Ahban le Molid ahinpeh-e." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab chapateni chu Seled le Appaim ahin, Seled vang chahing louvin athitan ahi." 
1Chronicles2:31 Appaim chapa chu Ishi ahin; Ishi chapa chu Sheshan ahi. Chule Sheshan chapa chu Ahlai ahi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Shammai sopipa Jada chapateni chu Jether le Jonathan ahilhone. Chule Jether chu chabeijin athitan ahi. 
1Chronicles2:33 Jonathan chapateni chu Peleth le Zaza ahilhone. Hichehohi Jerahmeel chapate ahiuve. 
1Chronicles2:34 Tun Sheshan'in chanuho tailou cha pasal aneipon ahi. Chule Sheshan'in Egypt mi Jarha kiti soh khat aneijin ahi. 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshan'in asohpa Jarha jidingin achanu apen, amanun Attai ahinpeh-e." 
1Chronicles2:36 Attai'in Nathan ahingin, chule Nathan'in Jabad ahingin," 
1Chronicles2:37 Jabad'in Ephlal ahingin, chule Ephlal'in Obed ahingin," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed'in Jehu ahingin, chule Jehu'n Azariah ahingin," 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariah'in Helez ahingin, chule Helez'in Eleasah ahingin," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasah'in Sisamai ahingin, chule Sisamai'in Shallum ahingin," 
1Chronicles2:41 Shallum'in Jekamiah ahingin, chule Jekamiah'in Elishama ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles2:42 Tun Jerahmeel sopipa Caleb chapate chu: achapa masapen chu Mesha ahin, amachu Ziphte pa ahin; chule Hebron pa Mereshah chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebron chapate chu; Korah, Tappuah, Rekem chule Shema ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema'in Jorkeam pa Raham ahingin, chule Rekem'in Shammai ahinge." 
1Chronicles2:45 Shammai chapa chu Maon ahin; chule Maon chu Beth-zur pa ahi. 
1Chronicles2:46 Caleb thaikemnu Ephah'in Haran, Moza chule Gazez ahinge, chule Haran'in Gazez ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Jahdai chapate chu; Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah chule Shaaph ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:48 Caleb thaikemnu Maachah'in Shebor le Tirhanah ahinge. 
1Chronicles2:49 Amanun Madmannah pa Shaaph toh Machbenah pa Sheva chule Gibeah pa ahingin: chule Caleb chanu chu Achsah ahi. 
1Chronicles2:50 Caleb chilhah ho chu: Ephrathah chapa masapen Hur chapate, Kirjath-jearim pa Shobal," 
1Chronicles2:51 Bethlehem pa Salma, chule Beth-gader pa Hareph ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:52 Kirjath-jearim pa Shobal'in chapate aneijin: Haroeh le Manaheth miho akehkhat ahiuve. 
1Chronicles2:53 Kirjath-jearim insungmiho chu Ithra miho, Puth miho, Shumath miho, chule Mishrai miho ahiuve: amaho-a konchun Zareath miho le Eshtaul miho ahungdoh uve." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma chapate chu; Bethlehem chule Netophah miho, Netophah miho, Joab insungmi Atroth, chule Manaheth mite akehkhat le Zor miho ahiuve." 
1Chronicles2:55 Jabez'a cheng danthusunho insung mite chu; Tirath miho, Shimeath miho, chule Suchath miho ahiuve. Hicheho hi Rechab insung pa Hamath'a kona hungdoh Ken mite ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:1 Tun hichehohi David chapate Hebron'a pengho ahiuve: Acha masapen chu Amnon ahin, Jezreel numeinu Ahinoam'a kon ahi; anina Daniel ahin, Karmel numeinu Abigail'a kon ahin," 
1Chronicles3:1 Tun hichehohi David chapate Hebron'a pengho ahiuve: Acha masapen chu Amnon ahin, Jezreel numeinu Ahinoam'a kon ahi; anina Daniel ahin, Karmel numeinu Abigail'a kon ahin," 
1Chronicles3:2 Athum channa chu Geshur lengpa Talmai chanu Maachah chapa Absalom ahin, ali channa chu Haggith chapa Adonijah ahi:" 
1Chronicles3:3 Anga channa chu Abital chapa Shephatiah ahin; agup channa a-inneipi Eglah'in ahinpeh Ithream ahi. 
1Chronicles3:4 Hiche guphohi Hebron'a peng ahiuvin; chule ama hia chun kum sagi le lhagup alengchange. Chule ama Jerusalem'a kum somthum le kumthum aleng changin ahi. 
1Chronicles3:5 Chule Ammiel chanu Bath-shua'in Jerusalem'a ahin achapate li hochu: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan chule Solomon ahiuve:" 
1Chronicles3:6 Chujongle Ibhar, Elishama chule Eliphelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Chule Nogah, Nepheg le Japhia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada chule Eliphelet, mi ko ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:9 Hichengsehi athaikemho chapate tilouvin David chapate ngen ahiuvin, chule asopinu-u Tamar toh ahi." 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomon chapa chu Rehoboam ahin, Rehoboam chapa chu Abia ahin, Abijah chapa chu Asa ahin, Asa chapa chu Jehoshaphat ahin," 
1Chronicles3:11 Jehoshaphat chapa chu Joram ahin, Joram chapa Ahaziah ahin, Ahaziah chapa chu Joash ahin," 
1Chronicles3:12 Joash chapa chu Amajiah ahin, Amajiah chapa Azariah ahin, Azariah chapa chu Jotham ahin," 
1Chronicles3:13 Jotham chapa chu Ahaz ahin, Ahaz chapa chu Hezekiah ahin, Hezekiah chapa chu Manasseh ahin," 
1Chronicles3:14 Manasseh chapa chu Amon ahin, Amon chapa chu Josiah ahin," 
1Chronicles3:15 Chule Josiah chapate apeng masapen chu Johanan, anina Jehoiakim, athum channa Zedekiah, ali channa chu Shallum ahi." 
1Chronicles3:16 Chule Jehoiakim chapateni chu: Jeconiah le Zedekiah ahilhone. 
1Chronicles3:17 Chule Jeconiah chapate chu; Assir, achapa Salathiel," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazar, Jekamiah, Hoshama chule Nedabiah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:19 Chule Pedaiah chapateni chu Zerubbabel le Shimei ahilhonin; chule Zerubbabel chapateni chu Meshullam le Hananiah ahilhonin, asopinulhon chu Shelomith ahi." 
1Chronicles3:20 Chule Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah chule Jushabhesed mi nga ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananiah chapate chu Pelatiah le Jesaiah ahin, Rephaiah chapate, Arnan chapate, Obadiah chapate, Shechaniah chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananiah chapate chu Pelatiah le Jesaiah ahin, Rephaiah chapate, Arnan chapate, Obadiah chapate, Shechaniah chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:22 Chule Shechaniah chapa chu Shemaiah ahin, Shemaiah chapate chu Hattush, Igeal, Bariah, Neariah chule Shaphat, mi gup ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:23 Neariah chapate chu Elioenai, Hezekiah chule Azrikam, mi thum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles3:24 Chule Elioenai chapate chu Hodaiah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah chule Anani, mi sagi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:1 Judah chapate chu; Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur chule Shobal ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobal chapa Reaiah'in Jahath ahingin, chule Jahath'in Ahumai le Lahad ahinge. Hichehohi Zorath miho insung mite ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:3 Chule hichehohi Etam pa chapate ahi: Jezreel, Ishma chule Idbash ahiuvin, asopinu-u minchu Hazzelelponi ahi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Gedor pa Penuel le Hushah pa Ezer toh, hichehohi Bethlehem pa Ephrathah cha masapen Hur chate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:5 Chule Tekoa pa Ashhur'in ji ni, Helah le Naarah aneijin ahi." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naarah'in Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni chule Haahashtari ahinpeh-in ahi. Hichehohi Naarah chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:7 Chule Helah chapate chu Zereth, Zerer chule Ethnan ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:8 Chuin Coz'in Anub, Zobebah le Harum chapa Aharhel insung mite ahinge." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabez vangchu asopi dangho sangin ja aumpenin, anun lung hesoh puma kavop ahi atijeh-a amin Jabez asah ahi." 
1Chronicles4:10 Chuin Jabez Pathen henga ataovin, O, nangman phatthei neiboh teiding hihen lang, kagamsung nasuh letna, nakhut chu kakoma umjinga, thilphalouvin eilungdon sahlou nadinga hiche-a kona chu neihuhdoh ding hitavele! ati. Hichun Pathen'in angeh chu aphal pehtai." 
1Chronicles4:11 Chule Shuah sopipa Chelub'in Eshton pa Mehir ahingin ahi. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton'in Beth-rapha, Paseah chule Irnahash pa Tehinnah ahinge, hichehohi Rekah mite ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenaz chapateni chu: Othniel le Seraiah ahilhone; chule Othniel chapa chu Hathath ahi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai'in Ophrah ahingin, Seraiah'in Charashim phaicham semdohpa Joab ahinge. Amahohi khutthem mi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:15 Jephunneh chapa Caleb chapate chu: Iru, Elah chule Naam ahiuvin; chule Elah chapa chu Kenaz ahi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Jehalelel chapate chu: Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria chule Asareel ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezrah chapate chu: Jether, Mered, Epher chule Jalon ahiuvin; chule Mered inneipin Miriam, Shammai chule Eshtemoa pa Isbah ahinge." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezrah chapate chu: Jether, Mered, Epher chule Jalon ahiuvin; chule Mered inneipin Miriam, Shammai chule Eshtemoa pa Isbah ahinge." 
1Chronicles4:18 A-inneipi Jehudijah chun Gedor pa Jered, Socho Pa Heber, chule Zanoah pa Jekuthiel ahingin ahi. Hichehohi Mered'in akichenpi Pharaoh chanu Bithiah chapate hochu ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:19 Chule Naham sopinu Hodiah inneipi chapate chu; Garm mite pa Keilah ahin, chule Eshtemoa mite pa Maachath ahi." 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimon chapate chu: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan chule Tilon ahiuvin; chule Ishi chapateni chu Zoheth le Benzoheth ahilhone." 
1Chronicles4:21 Judah chapa Shelah chapate chu: Lecah pa Er, Mareshah pa Laadah, chule Ashbea inkon tupat ponnem khong insung miho," 
1Chronicles4:22 Jokim le Chozeba mite, Joash, Moab gam chunga thuneina ananei Saraph, chule Jashubi-lahem ahiuve. Tun hichehohi khanglui thu ahitai." 
1Chronicles4:23 Hichehohi beldengho ahiuvin, amaho chu thingbil lah-a achengun; hiche mun'a chu lengpa natong dinga cheng ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeon chapate chu: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zarah chule Shaul:" 
1Chronicles4:25 Achapa Sahllum, achapa Mibsam, chule achapa Mishma ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mishma chapate chu: achapa Hamuel, achapa Zaccur, achapa Shimei ahiuve." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei'in chapa somlegup le chanu aneije, ahivangin asopihon cha tampi aneipouve, Judah chate bangin a-insung miteu apungpon ahi." 
1Chronicles4:28 Amaho Beersheba, Moladah, chule Hazarshual'ah achengun ahi." 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilhah, Ezem chule Toladah," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bethuel, Hormah, chule Ziklag'ah," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bethmarcaboth, Hazarsusim, Bethbirei, chule Shaaraim'a jong achengun ahi. Hicheho chengsehi David lengchan geija akhopihou ahi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Chule akhohou chu; Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tochen chule Ashan, khopi len nga ahin;" 
1Chronicles4:33 Chuche Baal changeija khopilenho kimvela um khoho jouse ahi. Hichehohi achennao chule akhangguiju ahi.

1Chronicles4:35 Joel le Joshibiah chapa Jehu, Seraiah chapa, Asiel chapa,"

1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel chule Benaiah," 
1Chronicles4:37 Shiphi chapa Ziza, Allon chapa, Jedaiah chapa, Shimri chapa, Shemaiah chapa:" 
1Chronicles4:38 Hiche amin kikut hohi a-insunguva pipui ngenchang ahiuve, chule apu apateu insung chu ahapun lheh jengin ahi." 
1Chronicles4:39 Agan honu lhatnading holin solam phaicham langsang Gedor lutna mun geijin acheuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles4:40 Hitichun gan hon lhatnading mun phatah, nehding hamhing tamna, gam lentah, munthip le gamhoina mun agamudoh-un ahi; ajehchu masanga chu hiche munna chu Ham mite anacheng uva ahi." 
1Chronicles4:41 Hiche amin kisunlut hohi Judah lengpa Hezekiah nikho laijin ahungun, aponbuh hou asuseuvin, chuche munna anachengho chu tunichan geijin asugam helun, amaho munna chun acheng taove: ajehchu chuche munna chu agan honu lhatnading hamhing mun uma ahi." 
1Chronicles4:42 Alah uva Simeon chapate ngeija kon mi janga chu, Ishi chapate Pelatiah, Neariah, Rephaiah le Uzziel lamkaina-in Seir molsanga acheuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Chule amahon ahoidoh Amalek mite amohse chu asatgamun, hitichun tunichan geijin chuche munna chun achengden taove." 
1Chronicles5:1 Tun Israel cha masapen Reuben chapate chu, ama chu (cha masapen hijeng jongle, apa jalkhun asuhboh tahjeh-in upa hina chu Israel chapa Joseph chapate chu kipe ahitan; chule akhanggui thu chu upa hina dungjuija kisut talou ding ahi." 
1Chronicles5:2 Ahin Judah chu asopite sangin achung nungin, hitichun ama-a konin vaipo pipu ahungkon doh-in: ahivangin upa hina chu Joseph'a hijaa hi.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Israel cha masapen Reuben chapate chu: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron chule Karmi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles5:4 Joel chapate chu: achapa Shemaiah, achapa Gog, achapa Shimei,"

1Chronicles5:5 Achapa Micah, achapa Reaiah, achapa Baal,"

1Chronicles5:7 Akhangu khanggui thu akisutlaija a-inko ko-a asopihou lah-a pipui chu Jeiel le Zekeriah," 
1Chronicles5:8 Chule Aroer, Nebo le Baalmeon geija cheng Joel chapa, Shema chapa, chule Azaz chapa Bela ahi." 
1Chronicles5:8 Chule Aroer, Nebo le Baalmeon geija cheng Joel chapa, Shema chapa, chule Azaz chapa Bela ahi." 
1Chronicles5:9 Chule amaho chu solamsang Euphrates vadunglen'a pat gamthip ma lutnachan geijin anachengun ahi. Ajehchu Gilead gama chu agancha honu punglheh jenga ahi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Saul damlaijin Hagar mite toh akidouvun, amaho chu anajouvun, Gilead solam sese-a aponbuh uva anachengun ahi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Chule Gad chu Bashan gamsunga Salcah changeijin amahotoh akigalsaijin achenge. 
1Chronicles5:12 Apipuiju chu Joel ahin, aban Sapham chule Bashan, Jaanai le Shaphat ahiuve." 
1Chronicles5:12 Apipuiju chu Joel ahin, aban Sapham chule Bashan, Jaanai le Shaphat ahiuve." 
1Chronicles5:13 Apu apateu insunga asopihou chu: Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jachan, Zia chule Heber; mi sagi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles5:14 Hichehohi Buz chapa, Jahda chapa, Jeshishai chapa, Michael chapa, Gilead chapa, Jaroah chapa, Hur chapa, Abihail chate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles5:15 Guni chapa, Abdiel chapa Ahi hi apu apateu insunga pipupen ahi." 
1Chronicles5:16 Amahohi Bashan gama Gilead le akhopihou, chule Sharon kimvel changeijin achengun ahi." 
1Chronicles5:17 Hicheho sesehi Judah lengpa Jotham nikholai le Israel lengpa Jeroboam nikholaija akhanggui thubu houva ana kisun ahi. 
1Chronicles5:18 Reuben chapate le Gad mite chule Manasseh phung kehkhat, mihang cheh, chemjam le lum thothei, thal kapthem le galdou them, galla kontheiho chu sangsomli le sangli le jasagi le somgup ahiuve." 
1Chronicles5:19 Chuin amahohin Hagar mite, Jetur, Naphish chule Nodab chunga gal abolun," 
1Chronicles5:20 Chule amaho douna-in panpi achangun, Hagar mite le apankhompi jouse chu akhutnuva akipelut taove: ajehchu kidouna munna Pathen akou jeh uva aman ataonao asanpeh ahi. Ajehchu amahon Ama-a atahsanao angamun ahi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Hitichun aganchahou, asangonsangu sangsomnga, kelngoi sangjani le sangsomnga, sangan sangni, chule mihem sangjakhat akai mangun ahi." 
1Chronicles5:22 Kidouna chu Pathen'a ahijeh-in mitamtah athiuvin ahi. Chule amaho gal hinga akikaimang kahseuvin agamuvah chun acheng taovin ahi. 
1Chronicles5:23 Chule Manasseh phung kehkhat chate chu chua chun anachengun; Bashan'a kipat Baal-hermon le Senir chule Hermon mol geijin anapunguve. 
1Chronicles5:24 Chule hichehohi apu apateu insunga apipupen cheh ahiuve: Epher, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah chule Jahdiel, amahohi mihatle hangsan, mi minthang le apu apateu insunga aluchang cheh ahiuve."

1Chronicles5:25 Chuin amaho apu apateu Pathen douna-in achonkhelun, amaho masanga Pathen'in anasuh mangsa, chuche gama miho pathenho chu ajon thanghoipi taovin ahi."

1Chronicles6:55 Chule amaho chu Judah gamsunga um Hebron le khopipam kimvel sese anapeuve. 
1Chronicles6:56 Ahinla khopi naija gamho le khoneoho chu Jephunneh chapa Caleb anapeuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles6:57 Chule Aaron chapate chu Judah khopiho, hoidohna khopi Hebron, Libna le khopi kimvel, chule Jattir le Eshtamoa le akhopi kimvel ho sese toh anapeuve." 
1Chronicles6:58 Chule Hilen le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Debir le khopi kimvel ho," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashan le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Bethshemesh le akhopi kimvel sese anapeuve." 
1Chronicles6:60 Chule Benjamin phunga konin: Geba le akhopi kimvel ho, Alemeth le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Anathoth le akhopi kimvel ho sese anapeuve. A-insung pumpiuva akhopihou chu khopi somlethum ahi." 
1Chronicles6:61 Chule Kohath phunga chapa dangho chu, Manasseh chapate phung akehkhatna konin vang sanin khopi som apeuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles6:62 Chule Gershom chapate chu a-insungu dungjuijin Issachar phunga kon, Asher phunga kon, Naphtali phunga kon chule Bashan'a Manasseh phunga konin khopi somlethum apeuve." 
1Chronicles6:63 Merari chapate henga chun a-insungu dungjuile vangkivet dungjuijin Reuben phunga kon, Gad phunga kon, chule Zebulun phunga konin khopiho somleni akipen ahi." 
1Chronicles6:64 Israel chaten hiche khopi somleni hohi akhopiu kimvel ho pumin Levi mite anapeuve. 
1Chronicles6:65 Chule vangvet na-in Judah chate phunga kon, Simeon chate phunga kon, chule Benjamin chate phunga kon, hiche aminuva kivo khopihohi anapeuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles6:66 Chule Kohath chapate insung mi amohho chun Ephraim phunga konin gam le khopilen aneijuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles6:67 Chuin amahon amaho chu Ephraim molsanga hoidohna khopi Shechem chu akhopi kimvel ho to apeuvin, chule Gezer le akhopi kimvel ho," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jokmeam le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Beth-horon le akhopi kimvel ho," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalon le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Gathrimmon le akhopi kimvel sese apeuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles6:70 Manasseh phung kehkhatna konin, Kohath chapate insung amoh ho-a dingin Aner le akhopi kimvel ho, Bileam le akhopi kimvel sese apeuve." 
1Chronicles6:71 Manasseh phung kehkhat insungho-a kona Gerahom chapate kipe chu Bashan'a um Golan le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Ashtaroth le akhopi kimvel sese ahi." 
1Chronicles6:72 Issachar phunga konin Kedesh le akhopi kimvel ho, Daberath le akhopi kimvel ho," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramoth le akhopi kimvel ho, Anem le akhopi kimvel sese apeuvin:" 
1Chronicles6:74 Chule Asher phunga konin Mashal le akhopi kimvel ho, Abdon le akhopi kimvel ho," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukok le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Rehob le akhopi kimvel sese apeuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles6:76 Chule Naphtali phunga konin Galilee gama um Kedesh le akhopi kimvel ho, Hammon le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Kirjathaim le akhopi kimvel sese apeuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles6:77 Zebulun phunga kona Merari chate amohchengse henga kipe chu Rimmon le akhopi kimvel ho, Tabor le akhopi kimvel sese ahi." 
1Chronicles6:78 Chule Reuben phunga kona amaho kipedoh chu Jordan gal langkhat Jericho kom Jordan solamsang gamthipma um Bezer le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Jahzah le akhopi kimvel ho," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemoth le akhopi kimvel ho, chule Mephaath le akhopi kimvel sese ahi."

1Chronicles7:1 Tun Issachar chapate chu: Tolla, Pu-ah, Jashub chule Shimron, mi li ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:2 Chule Tolla chapate chu: Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Jibsam chule Shemuel, Tolla sonho apu apateu insunga luchang cheh ahiuvin; akhanguva mihat le mihangsan cheh ahiuve: David nikholaijin amijatnu chu sangsomni le sangni le jagup alhinguve." 
1Chronicles7:3 Chule Uzzi chapa chu Izrahiah ahin chule Izrahiah chapate chu: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, Isshiah, mi nga ahiuvin, abonchauvin pipui jeng ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:3 Chule Uzzi chapa chu Izrahiah ahin chule Izrahiah chapate chu: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, Isshiah, mi nga ahiuvin, abonchauvin pipui jeng ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:3 Chule Uzzi chapa chu Izrahiah ahin chule Izrahiah chapate chu: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, Isshiah, mi nga ahiuvin, abonchauvin pipui jeng ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:4 Amaho le akhanguva chu, apu apateu insung dungjuija galdouthei sepaihon ngen ahiuvin, mi sangsomthum le sang gup ahiuve: ajehchu amahon ji tamtah tah le chapa tamtah tah aneiju ahi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Chule Issachar insung mite jouse lah-a asopiteu chu mihat mihangsan cheh ahiuvin, akhangthu sutna dungjuija sutnin abonun sangsomget le sangsagi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamin chapate chu: Bela, Becher chule Jediael, mi thum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:7 Chule Bela chapate chu: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth chule Iri, mi nga ahiuvin; apu apateu insunga luchang cheh, mihat mihangsan ngen ahiuve;, akhangguithu sutna dungjuijin sangsomni le sangni le somthum le li ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:8 Chule Becher chapate chu: Zemira, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth chule Alemeth ahiuvin, hicheho chenghi Becher chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:9 Amijatnu, akhangu khanggui thu kisutna dungjuijin apu apateu insunga luchang cheh, mihat mihangsan cheh sangsomni le jani ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediael chapa jong chu Bilhan ahin; chule Bilhan chapate: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish chule Ahishahar ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:11 Hichehohi Jediael chapate, apu apateu insunga luchang chehho sima mihat mihangsan cheh sangsom le sangsagi le jani ahiuvin, galmuna galsatna konthei cheh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shuppim le Huppim chu Ir chapateni ahin, chule Hushim chu Aher chapa ahi." 
1Chronicles7:13 Naphtali chapate chu: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer chule Shallum ahin, Bilhah chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasseh chapa chu Asriel ahin, amahi athaikemnu Aram numei nun ahinpeh ahi; (amanuhin Gilead pa Machir jong ahinge." 
1Chronicles7:15 Chule Machir'in Huppim le Shuppim sopinu Maakah chu ji in aneije;) chule anichanna pa chu Zelophehad ahin, chule Zelophehad'in chanu jengbou aneijin ahi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Machir inneipi Maakah'in chapa khat ahingin, amanun amin Peresh asah-in ahi; chule asopipa minchu Sheresh ahin, chule achapateni chu Ulam le Rakem ahilhone." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulam chapa chu Bedan ahi. Hichehohi Manasseh chapa Machir, Machir chapa Gilead chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:18 Chule asopinu Hammoleketh in Ishod, Abiezer chule Mahalah ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemida chapate chu Ahian, Shechem, Likhi chule Aniam ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ephraim chapate chu: Shuthelah chule achapa Bered, achapa Tahath, achapa Eladah, achapa Tahath," 
1Chronicles7:21 Chule achapa Zabad, achapa Shuthelah, chule achapa Ezer le Elead, aganchahou gudinga ahungsuh jeh lhona agama peng Gath mihon anatha teniu chutoh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:22 Hitichun apau Ephraim chun nitamtah alunghempi-in, hijeh chun asopite ama lhamon dingin ahunguvin ahi." 
1Chronicles7:23 Chujouvin ama a-inneipi henga alutnin, amanun nao ahinvop min, chule chapa khat ahingin a-insunga thilse aumtahjeh-in amin Beriah asahtan ahi." 
1Chronicles7:24 (Chule achanu Sherah ahin, Beth-horon noinung le chungnung chule Uzzen-sherah sadohnu ahi)." 
1Chronicles7:25 Achapa Rephah ahin, Resheph jong ahin, Resheph chapa Telah chule Tahah chapa Tahan ahi." 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahan chapa Laadan, Laadan chapa Ammihud, Ammihud chapa Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama chapa Nun, Nun chapa Joshua ahi." 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama chapa Nun, Nun chapa Joshua ahi." 
1Chronicles7:28 Chule aneiju le achennahou chu Bethel le akhopihose, solam sanga Naaran, lhumlama Gezer le akhopihose toh, Shechem le akhopiho, chule Gaza le akhopiho changei ahi." 
1Chronicles7:29 Chule Manasseh chapate gamgi china um Bethshean le akhopise, Taanach le akhopise, Megiddo le akhopise Dor chule akhopise ahi. Hicheho ahin Israel chapa Joseph chate achengun ahi." 
1Chronicles7:30 Asher chapate chu: Imnah, Ishuai, Ishuai, Beriah chule asopinu-u Serah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriah chapateni chu Heber le Birzavith pa Malchiel ahilhone. 
1Chronicles7:32 Chuin Heber'in Japhlet, Shomer, Hotham chule asopinu-u Shua ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles7:33 Chule Japhlet chapate chu: Pasach, Bimhal chule Ashvath ahiuve. Amahohi Japhlet chate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:34 Shemer chapate chu: Ahi, Rohgah, Jehubbah chule Aram ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:35 Chule asopipa Helem chapate chu Zophah, Imna, Shelesh chule Amal ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zophah chapate chu: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran chule Beera ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:38 Chule Jether chapate chu: Jephunneh, Pispah, chule Ara ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:39 Chule Ulla chapate chu: Arah, Hanniel chule Rezia ahiuve." 
1Chronicles7:40 Hicheho chengsehi Asher chate, apu apateu insung luchang cheh, lhendoh le mihat mihangsan ngen, lamkai pipui cheh ahiuve. Chule akhanggui thu apumpia kisutna dungjuija galdouna-a gala konthei chu mi sangsomni le sang gup ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:1 Tun Benjamin'in acha masa Bela, anina Ashbel, athumna Aharah," 
1Chronicles8:2 Alichana Nohah, chule anga chana Rapha ahinge." 
1Chronicles8:3 Chule Bela chapate chu: Addar, Gera, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shephuphan chule Huram ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:6 Chule hichehohi Ehud chapate ahiuvin: Geba'a chengho pate luchang cheh ahiuvin, chule amahon amaho chu Manahath'a atolmangun ahi." 
1Chronicles8:7 Chule Naaman, Ahiah, chule Gera, amahohi atolmangin, chuin Uzza le Ahihud ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Chule Shaharaim'in ajiteni Hushim le Beera asolmang nungin, Moab gama chate ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles8:9 Chule aman a-inneipi Hodesh'a konin; Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcham," 
1Chronicles8:9 Chule aman a-inneipi Hodesh'a konin; Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcham," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuz, Sachia chule Mirma ahingin ahi. Hiche achapateho hi apu apateu insunga luchang cheh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:11 Chuin Hushim'a konin Abitub le Elpaal apengin ahi. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpaal chapate chu: Eber, Misham, chule Ono le akimvela khopiho sadohpa Shema." 
1Chronicles8:13 Gath'a chengho nodoh-a, Aijalon'a chengho pate luchang cheh Beriah le Shema;" 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahio, Shashak le Jeremoth," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiah, Arad le Ader,"

1Chronicles8:18 Ishmerai, Izliah le Jobab, hichenghi Elpaal chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishmerai, Izliah le Jobab, hichenghi Elpaal chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:19 Chule Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Chule Elienai, Zilthai le Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaiah, Beraiah chule Shimrath, hichenghi Shimhi chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishpan, Heber le Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zichri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiah, Elam le Anthothijah," 
1Chronicles8:25 Iphdeiah chule Penuel, hichenghi Shashak chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamsherai, Shehariah le Athaliah," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaresiah, Eliah chule Zichri, hichengsehi Jeroham chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:28 Hichehohi apu apateu insunga aluchang cheh, akhanguva pipui ngen ahiuve. Amahosehi Jerusalem'a cheng ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:29 Chule Gibeon'a Gibeon pa achengin, a-inneipi min chu Maachah ahi." 
1Chronicles8:30 Chule achapa peng masapen chu Abdon ahin, chule Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Ahio chule Zecher ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:32 Chule Mikloth'in Shimeah ahinge. Amaho jonghi asopihou toh kigalsaijin Jerusalem'a achengun ahi. 
1Chronicles8:33 Chule Ner'in Kish ahingin, Kish in Saul ahingin, Saul'in Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab chule Eshbaal ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles8:34 Jonathan chapa chu Merib-baal ahi, chule Merib-baal'in Micah ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles8:34 Jonathan chapa chu Merib-baal ahi, chule Merib-baal'in Micah ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles8:35 Chule Micah chapate chu; Pithon, Melech, Tarea chule Ahaz ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:35 Chule Micah chapate chu; Pithon, Melech, Tarea chule Ahaz ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:36 Chule Ahaz'in Jehoadah ahingin, chule Jehoadah'in Alemeth, Azmaveth, chule Zimri ahingin, Zimri'in Moza ahingin," 
1Chronicles8:37 Chule Moza'in Binea ahingin, Binea chapa chu Rapha ahin, Rapha chapa chu Eleasah, Eleasah chapa chu Azel ahi." 
1Chronicles8:38 Chule Azel'in chapa gup aneijin, hicheho minchu: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, chule Hanan ahi. Hicheho jousehi Azel chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:38 Chule Azel'in chapa gup aneijin, hicheho minchu: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, chule Hanan ahi. Hicheho jousehi Azel chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:39 Chule asopipa Eshek chapate chu Ulam acha masa, Jehush anichanna, chule Eliphelet athum channa, ahiuve." 
1Chronicles8:40 Chule Ulam chapate chu mihat mihangsan, thal kapthem mi ahiuvin, chapate tamtah aneijun, achapateu chapate mi jale somnga ahiuve. Hicheho jousehi Benjamin chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:1 Hitichun Israelte jouse akhanguijuva konin akisimin; chule veuvin, amaho chu Israel lengte le asuhkhel jeh uva Babylon'a kikaimang Juda lengte lekhabua akisune." 
1Chronicles9:2 Tun achanu khopiho-a cheng masapen ho chu; Israelte, thempuho, Levi ho, chule Nethinim ho ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:3 Chule Jerusalem'a Judah chate, Benjamin chate, chule Ephraim le Manasseh chate achengun; amaho chu:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Judah chapa Pharez chapate lah-a kon Bani chapa, achapa Imri, Imri chapa, Omri chapa, Ammihud chapa Uthai." 
1Chronicles9:5 Shilon mite lah-a kon; acha masa Asaiah le achapate. 
1Chronicles9:6 Chule Zerah chapate lah-a; Jeuel le asopite mi jaguple somko. 
1Chronicles9:7 Chule Benjamin chapate lah-a kon: Hasenuah chapa Hodaviah, Hodaviah chapa Meshullam, chule Meshullam chapa Sallu," 
1Chronicles9:8 Jeroham chapa Ibneiah, Michri chapa Uzzi, Uzzi chapa Elah, Ebnijah chapa Reuel, Reuel chapa Shephatiah, Shephatiah chapa Meshullam," 
1Chronicles9:9 Chule akhangu dungjuija asopiteu jakole somnga le gup ahiuve. Hicheho sesehi apu apateu insunga aluchang cheh ahiuve. 
1Chronicles9:10 Chule thempuho lah-a kon; Jedaiah, Jehoiarib le Jachin," 
1Chronicles9:11 Chule Pathen in'a vaihompa Ahitub chapa Meraioth, Meraioth chapa Zadok, Zadok chapa Meshullam, Meshullam chapa Hilkiah, Hilkiah chapa Azariah," 
1Chronicles9:12 Chule Malchijah chapa Pashhur, Pashhur chapa Jeroham, Jeroham chapa Adaiah, chule Immer chapa Meshillemith, Meshillemith chapa Meshullam, Meshullam chapa Jahzerah, Jahzerah chapa Adiel, Adiel chapa Maasia," 
1Chronicles9:13 Chule asopiteu, apu apateu insunga luchangcheh sangkhat le somgup ahiuvin, Pathen insunga kinbolna-a natong hatcheh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:14 Chule Levi ho lah-a kon: Merari chapate lah-a Hashabiah chapa Azrikam, Azrikam chapa Hasshub, Hasshub chapa Shemaiah," 
1Chronicles9:15 Chule Asaph chapa Zichri, Zichri chapa Micah, Micah chapa Mattaniah, Galal, Haresh, chule Bakbakkar," 
1Chronicles9:15 Chule Asaph chapa Zichri, Zichri chapa Micah, Micah chapa Mattaniah, Galal, Haresh, chule Bakbakkar," 
1Chronicles9:16 Chule Jeduthun chapa Galal, Galal chapa Shemaiah, Shemaiah chapa Obadiah, chule Netophah mite khoho-a chengho Elkanah chapa Asa, Asa chapa Berechiah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:16 Chule Jeduthun chapa Galal, Galal chapa Shemaiah, Shemaiah chapa Obadiah, chule Netophah mite khoho-a chengho Elkanah chapa Asa, Asa chapa Berechiah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:17 Chule kotngah ho chu Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman chule asopiteu jong ahi. Shallum chu apipuipen ahi." 
1Chronicles9:18 Lengpa solam kotpi chu tumasang sen angah jiuvin, amahohi Levi chate kiloikhom lah-a kotngah ho chu ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:19 Chule Korah chapa Ebiasaph, Ebiasaph chapa Kore, Kore chapa Shallum le asopite, apa insunga kon Korah mite chu Houbuh kotngah-a panga, kinbolna-a natonga pang ahiuve. Chule apu apateu chu Pakai janelho ngahmun lutna ngahtupma anapang ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:20 Chule Eleazar chapa Phinehas chu tumasanga amaho chunga vaihoma pang ahin, Pakaiyin aumpin ahi." 
1Chronicles9:21 Chule Meshelemiah chapa Zakariah chu Houkhom ho Houbuh kotngahpa ahi. 
1Chronicles9:22 Kotphungho ngahdinga lhendoh ho jousehi mi jani leh somleni ahiuve. Hichehohi akhohouva akhangguiju kisut dungjuija David le themgao Samuel'in atohmunu tongdinga anasuhdetsa ahiuve. 
1Chronicles9:23 Hitichun amahole achateu chun Houbuh Pakai in kotphungho chu avetup mun, angahtup mum ahi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Kotngah ho chu aningli: solam, lhumlam, sahlam chule lhanglama umuva ahi." 
1Chronicles9:25 Chule asopihou akhoneo houva umho ni sagi sehle aphat phatna amahotoh umdinga hungji dingu ahi. 
1Chronicles9:26 Hiche Levi mi ngahtup pipui li hochun akingansenao Pathen in indanho le goukholna indanho chu avetupmun ahi. 
1Chronicles9:27 Chule jingkah seh-a kot hongdinga kinganse ahijeh-un Pathen in kimvela chun ageh jiuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles9:28 Chule alah uva abang um le bel kinbol ahiuvin, akoilut alahdoh tengule asimcheh jiu ahi." 
1Chronicles9:29 Amaho abang chu um le bel ho le munthenga manchah ho jouse: changbong, lengpitwi, sathao, bego chule gimnamtui ho vetup dinga kipansah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:30 Chule thempuho chapate phabep chun nuding gimnamtui asemun ahi. 
1Chronicles9:31 Chule Korah mi Shallum chamasa Levi mikhat Mattithiah kitipa chu khangbel ho-a kikang thilto chunga natohna neidinga kinganse ahitai. 
1Chronicles9:32 Chule asopihou loikhat Kohath mite chapate chu vetsahna changlhah chunga tohmun nei ahiuvin, cholngahni seh-a asemdingu ahi." 
1Chronicles9:33 Chule hichehohi lasaho ahiuvin, Levi ho pate lah-a pipui, indan sunga um a-ongthola umjingho ahiuve; ajehchu amahon chuche nachu sunle jana atoh-u ahi." 
1Chronicles9:34 Levi pate pipui hohi akhangu lhumkeija pipui ahiuvin; amaho Jerusalem'a achengun ahi. 
1Chronicles9:35 Chule Gibeon'a chun Gibeon mite pa Jehiel achengin, a-inneipi minchu Maakah ahi."
