1Chronicles9:36 Chule achapa masapen chu Abdon ahin, Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahio, Zekeriah chule Mikloth toh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:38 Chule Mikloth'in Shimeam ahinge. Chule amaho jong asopihou toh kikotmai ngatnin Jerusalem'a achenguve. 
1Chronicles9:39 Chule Ner'in Kish ahingin, Kish'in Saul ahingin, Chule Saul in Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab chule Eshbaal ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles9:40 Chule Jonathan chapa chu Merib-baal ahin, Merib-baal'in Micah ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles9:40 Chule Jonathan chapa chu Merib-baal ahin, Merib-baal'in Micah ahingin ahi." 
1Chronicles9:41 Chule Micah chapate chu; Pithon, Melech, Tahrea chule Ahaz ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:41 Chule Micah chapate chu; Pithon, Melech, Tahrea chule Ahaz ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:42 Chule Ahaz'in Jarah ahingin, Jarah'in Alemeth, Azmaveth chule Zimri ahingin, chule Zimri'in Moza ahinge." 
1Chronicles9:43 Chule Moza'in Binea ahingin, Binea chapa chu Rephaiah ahin, Rephaiah chapa chu Eleasah ahin, Eleasah chapa chu Azel ahi." 
1Chronicles9:44 Chule Azel'in chapa gup aneijin, aminu hiche ahi: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah chule Hanan. Hicheho jousehi Azel chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles9:44 Chule Azel'in chapa gup aneijin, aminu hiche ahi: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah chule Hanan. Hicheho jousehi Azel chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles10:1 Tun Philistine ten Israelte ahinsatnun; Israel mite chu Philistine te masanga ajam taovin, chule Gilboa molsanga chun mi tamtah athiuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:2 Chule Philistine ten Saul le achate chu hadelin adelun; hitichun Philistine te chun Saul chapate Jonathan, Abinadab, chule Malchishua chu athat taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:3 Chuin gal chu Saul dingin ahahsalheh jengtan, chuin thal themhon ahinkap khauvin, thalthem hon amavotaovin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:4 Chuin Saul'in agalvon popa jah-a, Nachemjam satdoh inlang, hiche cheptan louho khu ahunguva eihung jumso louna dingun, neisun pailet jenggin, ati. Ahivangin agalvon popa chu anompoi; ajehchu ama akichalheh jengin ahi. Hijeh chun Saul'in achemjam alan, achung chu abotan ahi." 
1Chronicles10:5 Chule agalvon popan Saul athi amuphatnin, chutobang machun achemjam chungchu abon, athitan ahi." 
1Chronicles10:6 Hitichun Saul le achapate thum, chule a-insung jouse chu athikhom taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Chuin phaichama um Israel miho jousen, amaho ajamuva, chule Saul le achapate athiu chu amu phatnun, akhopihou adalhauvin ajamtaovin ahi. Chuin Philistine te ahungun, hicheho-a chun acheng taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:8 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Philistine te mithiho von sutlha dinga ahunguva ahile, Saul le achapate Gilboa molsanga anathiu chu amudoh taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:9 Chuin avon asutlhah phatnun, aluchang le agalvon alauvin, amilim semthuhou le mipite henga thupha pole dingin Philistine te gamsunga athot kimvel taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles10:10 Chule agalvonho chu a-pathen houin'a akoijun, aluchu Dagon houin'a atah-un ahi." 
1Chronicles10:11 Chuin Jabesh-Gilead mite jousen Saul chunga Philistine te thilbol jouse ajah phatnun," 
1Chronicles10:12 Mihangsan sese akipatnun, Saul le achapate longchu agalamangun, Jabesh'a ahinpouvin, aguhou chu Jabesh'a gangpi thing noija chun avuijun, chule nisagi an angolun ahi." 
1Chronicles10:13 Hitichun Saul chu Pakai thu angailou jeh le, lhakou ho henga thumop adoh-a, Pakai douna suhkhelna aneitah jeh-in athitan ahi;" 
1Chronicles10:14 Chule aman Pakai adongpon: hijeh chun aman ama chu athatnin, chule alenggam chu Jesse chapa David henga apetan ahi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Chuin Israelte jouse David henga Hebron'a ahung kikhom khomun, ahenga, Ven keiho nagule naphe kahiuve." 
1Chronicles11:2 Chujongle tumasanga Saul lengchanlaijin jong Israel puidoh'a puilutjia chu nangma nahin: chule Pakai na Pathen'in naheng-ah, Nangman kami Israelte navah-a, kamipi Israelte chunga vai napoh ding ahi, ati'e atiuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles11:3 Hijeh chun Israel upaho jouse Hebron'a lengpa henga ahungun; David'in Hebron'a chun amahotoh Pakai masanga kitepna asemin; chuin Pakaiyin Samuel mangcha asei thucheng dung juijin, David chu Israel chunga leng hidingin thao anutaovin ahi." 
1Chronicles11:4 Chuin David le Israelte jouse Jerusalem'a acheuvin, hichu Jebus ahin; chuche gama anachengho chu Jebus mite ahiuve." 
1Chronicles11:5 Chuin Jebus'a chengho chun David hengah, Nangma hilama nahunglou helding ahi, atiuve. Ahijeng vangin David'in Zion kulpi chu alan, hichu David khopi ahung hitai." 
1Chronicles11:6 Chuin David'in, Koihile Jebus mite gasat masapen pen chu lamkaiho pipui hiding ahi, ati. Hitichun Zeruiah chapa Joab chu akontou masapenin, apipuipen ahitan ahi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Chuin David chu kulpi-a chun achengin; hijeh chun amahon hichu David khopi asahtaovin ahi. 
1Chronicles11:8 Chuin aman khopi chu Millo'a pat akimvelse geijin asadoh-in; chule Joab'in khopi amohse chu asemphan ahi. 
1Chronicles11:9 Hitichun janel Pakaiyin aumpi jeh chun; David akhangtou chehcheh jengtan ahi. 
1Chronicles11:10 Hicheho hi Israelte chungchanga Pathen'in anaseidoh dungjuija David'in anei mihat pipuiho, alenggam sunga ama le Israel pumpi to kisuhat hochu ahiuve." 
1Chronicles11:11 Chule hichehi David'in anei mihat jat ahi: gal lamkaiho pipuipen Hachmon mi Jashobeam ahin: aman atengcha alamin phat khatseh'in mi jathum jen athatgam helin ahi. 
1Chronicles11:12 Chule ama bana chu Ahoh mi Dodo chapa Eleazer ahin, amahi mihat thumho lah-a khat ahi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Ama David toh Pasdamim'a umkhom ahin, chule hiche mun'a chun Philistine te galsat dingin anakikhom khomun, chule hiche mun'a chu sakol chang dimsetna akena leiset beh khat aumin ahi. Chuin mipi ho chu Philistine te masanga konin ajamtaove." 
1Chronicles11:14 Chuin amaho chu loulaija chun dettah-in apangun, ahuhdoh-un, chule Philistine te chu athatnun; chule Pakaiyin amaho chu huhdohna loupitah-in ahuhdohtai." 
1Chronicles11:15 Tun gal lamkai somthum lah-a mi thum chu, songpi lama Adullam songko sunga David henga chun achesuh-un; chule Philistine sepai janel chun Rephaim phaichama chun pon in akison uvin ahi." 
1Chronicles11:16 Chule hichepetna chu David kulpi-a uma ahin, chule Philistine te galsat miho chu Bethlehem'a pansaova ahi." 
1Chronicles11:17 Chuin David'in ngaicha tah-in, Oh Bethlehem kotpi phung twikul'a twi chu dondinga eipethei khattou umtave leh! ati." 
1Chronicles11:18 Chuin mi thumho chun Philistine sepai janel chu aphu vangun, Bethlehem kotpi phung twikul'a konin twi agakhaijun, ahin domun, David henga ahinchoijun ahi: ahinla hiche donding chu David anompon, ahinla Pakai henga asunglha jon," 
1Chronicles11:19 Hitin ati, Hiche kabolding hi ka Pathen'in eijahda maihen: ahinkhou tosetna-a dinga pedoh hiche miho thisanhi kadon dingham? Ajehchu ahinkhou tosetna puma ahinchoiju ahi, ati. Hijeh-a chun aman adon tapon ahi. Hichehohi mihat chungnung thumho bol ahi." 
1Chronicles11:20 Chule Joab sopipa Abishai hi thumho pipui ahi: ajehchu aman mi jathum chunga atengcha alamin, athat gamhelin, thumho lah-a minphatna achangtai." 
1Chronicles11:21 Mi thumho lah-a chun ni teni sangin amachu ja-aumjon ahi; ajehchu ama alamkaiju ahi. Hijongle amasa mi thumho chu aphajoupoi. 
1Chronicles11:22 Kabzeel kho-a mihangsan pa chapa Jehoiada chapa Benaiah chun tohdoh tampi aneijin; keipi bahkai tobang Moab mi ni athatnin; chule achesuh-in buhbang lhah laijin kokhuh sunga keipi bahkai khat jong athatnin ahi. 
1Chronicles11:23 Chule aman milen pitah, tong nga-a sang Egypt mi khat athatnin; chule Egypt mipa chun ponkhong ho talhang tejen tengcha khat akichoi ahin; chule aman atenggol akichoijin ajonsuh-in, Egypt mipa khutna konchun atengcha asalhah peh-in, ama tengcha mama chun athattan ahi." 
1Chronicles11:24 Hichehohi Jehoiada chapa Benaiah thilbol ahin; mihat chungnung thumho lah-a chun minphat achangtan ahi. 
1Chronicles11:25 Veuvin, ama somthum lah-a jana achangin, ahin amasa mi thumho vang chu aphadehpoi; amachu David'in ama ngahtupho chunga apansah-in ahi." 
1Chronicles11:26 Chujongle agalsat ho lah-a mihangsan ho chu, Joab sopipa Asahel, Bethlehem'a Dodo chapa Elhanan," 
1Chronicles11:27 Haror mi Shammoth, Pelon mi Helez," 
1Chronicles11:28 Teko mi Ikkesh chapa Ira, Anathoth mi Abiezer," 
1Chronicles11:29 Hushath mi Sibbecai, Ahoh mi Ilai," 
1Chronicles11:30 Netophah mi Maharai, Netophah mi Baanah chapa Heled," 
1Chronicles11:31 Benjamin chapate gama um Gibeah mi Ribai chapa Ithai, Pirathon mi Benaiah," 
1Chronicles11:32 Gaash vadung ho-a cheng Hurai, Arbath mi Abiel," 
1Chronicles11:33 Baharum mi Azmaveth, Shaalbon mi Eliahba," 
1Chronicles11:34 Gizon mi Hashem chapate, Harar mi Shage chapa Jonathan," 
1Chronicles11:35 Harar mi Sacar chapa Ahiam, Ur chapa Eliphal," 
1Chronicles11:36 Mecherathmi Hepher, Pelon mi Ahijah," 
1Chronicles11:37 Carmel mi Hezro, Ezbai chapa Naarai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathan sopipa Joel, Haggeri chapa Mibhar," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathan sopipa Joel, Haggeri chapa Mibhar," 
1Chronicles11:39 Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiah chapa Joab galvon popa Beroth mi Naharai," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ithri mi Ira, Ithri mi Gareb," 
1Chronicles11:41 Hit mi Uriah, Ahlai chapa Zabad," 
1Chronicles11:42 Reuben mi Shiza chapa Adina, Reuben mite gal lamkaipa le amatoh um somthum ho," 
1Chronicles11:43 Maakah chapa Hanan, Chule Mithni mi Joshaphat," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ashterath mi Uzzia, Aroer mi Hotham chapate Shama le Jehiel," 
1Chronicles11:45 Tiz mi Shimri chapa Jediael le asopipa Jaha," 
1Chronicles11:46 Mahav mi Eliel, chule Elnaam chapate Jeribai le Joshaviah chule Moab mi Ithmah," 
1Chronicles11:47 Mesoba mi Eliel, Obed chule Jasiel ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:1 Tun hichehohi Kish chapa Saul jeh-a akikulkhup laija Ziklag'a David koma hungho chu ahiuve: chule amaho chu galsatna-a kithopi-a pang mihat ho ahiuve. 
1Chronicles12:2 Amahon thal akichoijun, song senale thal kapdohna dinga akhut jetlamle veilam thothei cheh ahiuvin, Benjamin phunga Saul sopite ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:3 Apipuipenu chu Ahiezer ahin, aban Joash, Gibeath mi Shemaah chapateni ahilhonin; chule Azmaveth chapateni Jeziel le Pelet, chule Anathoth mi Berachah le Jehu," 
1Chronicles12:4 Chule somthum chungle somthum lah-a mihat Gibeon mi Ismaiah, chule Gederath mi Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan chule Josabad," 
1Chronicles12:4 Chule somthum chungle somthum lah-a mihat Gibeon mi Ismaiah, chule Gederath mi Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan chule Josabad," 
1Chronicles12:5 Haruph mi Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah chule Shephatiah," 
1Chronicles12:6 Korah mi Elkanah, Jesaiah, Azareel, Joezer chule Jashobeam," 
1Chronicles12:7 Chule Gedora Jeroham chapate, Joelah chule Zebadiah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:7 Chule Gedora Jeroham chapate, Joelah chule Zebadiah ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:8 Chule Gad miho gamthip kul sunga David henga behho chu mihat mihang ngen, chule galsatmi galsat dinga lhingset, lumle pho thothem cheh, amaiju keipi bahkai mai banghel, akaljan danu molsanga sakhi banga gang ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:9 Akhatna Ezer, anina Obadiah, athumna Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:9 Akhatna Ezer, anina Obadiah, athumna Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:10 Alina Mishmannah, angana Jeremiah," 
1Chronicles12:10 Alina Mishmannah, angana Jeremiah," 
1Chronicles12:11 Agupna Attai, asagina Eliel," 
1Chronicles12:12 Agetna Johanan, akona Elzabad," 
1Chronicles12:13 Asomna Jeremiah, asomlekhat na Machbannai." 
1Chronicles12:13 Asomna Jeremiah, asomlekhat na Machbannai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Hichehohi Gad chapate sepai janel gal lamkai cheh ahiuvin: alah uva aneopen chu jakhat chunga thunei, chule alenpen sangkhat chunga thunei ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:15 Amahohi lha masapen sung, luikam khela twi let leuva Jordan asolaitah-a palgalkai ho ahiuvin; amahon phaichama chengho chu lhumlamle solama agadel jamun ahi." 
1Chronicles12:16 Chuin David kulpi-a chun Benjamin le Judah miho ahunguvin ahi. 
1Chronicles12:17 Chuin amaho kimupi din David apotdoh-in ajah uva, Eipanpidia chamna-a hung nahiule, kalungthim hi nangho-a kijopmat ding; amavang kakhut teni-a thildihlou kabolkhahlou munasa-a, kamelmate henga eipedoh dinga hung nahiule, ipu ipateu Pathen'in hinvehen lang, nathu-u tanhen, ati." 
1Chronicles12:18 Chuphatnin gal lamkaiho pipui Amasai chungah lhagao ahungchun, hitin ati, Keiho nanga kahiuve David, nangma lama panga kahiuve Jesse chapa: lungmon, nachunga lungmon umhen, chule napanpi ho chunga lungmon umhen: ajehchu na Pathen'in napanpi, ati. Chuin David'in amaho chu asangin, honho lamkaijin asemtai." 
1Chronicles12:19 Chule Saul doudinga Philistine te toh ahunglaijun, Manasseh mi phabepmin David anajopmun: ahinla amahon ana kithopi pouve: ajehchu Philistine te pakaiho kihoutoh uva, Ama apu Saul lama lutnintin, iluchang diuvin tosetna hibep ding ahi, atiuva asolmangu ahitai." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ziklag'a achen ahile Manasseh mi Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Michael, Jozabad, Elihu chule Zilthai Manasseh miho asang sang lamkaiho ama lama alutnun ahi." 
1Chronicles12:21 Chuin amahon michomgamho loi douna-in David akithopiuvin ahi; ajehchu amaho mihat mihangsan, sepai janel lamkai cheh hiuva ahi." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ajehchu chuche laija chu ani ania Pathen janel tobang sepai janel nasatah ahikahsea, David kithopi dinga hunghung jenguva ahi." 
1Chronicles12:23 Chule hichehohi Pakai thu dungjuija, Saul lenggam chu ama-a hisah dinga Hebron'a David henga hung, galsat dinga galvon puma kigosa dema umjing sepaihon honho jat ahi." 
1Chronicles12:24 Juda chate lumle tengcha choi, galsat dinga galvon puma kigosadem chu sangguple jaget ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:25 Simeon chate galsat dinga mihat mihangsan cheh sangsagi le jakhat ahiuve. 
1Chronicles12:26 Levi chate-a kon sangli le jagup ahiuve. 
1Chronicles12:27 Aaron mite lamkai chu Jehoiada ahin, amatoh sangthum le jasagi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:28 Chule Zadok, gollhang mihat hangsanle apa insunga gal lamkaiho somnileni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:29 Chule Saul insungmi, Benjamin miho chu sangthum ahiuvin, amaho atamjo Saul insung lama panga ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:30 Chule Ephraim chate apu apateu insung pumpi-a minthang cheh sangsomni le jaget ahiuve. 
1Chronicles12:31 Chule Manasseh phung kehkhat-a kon David lenga semdinga hungdia kiminkut cheh chu sangsom le sangget ahiuve. 
1Chronicles12:32 Chule Issachar chate-a kon phat hetthemna nei, Israel'in ipi abolding hethem; aluchang cheh-u jani ahiuvin, asopihou jouse chu amaho thu thu ahi." 
1Chronicles12:33 Zebulun chate gal kondohthei, gal manchah tincheng tho-a galsat them, panmun neithei cheh sangsomnga ahiuvin: amahohi lungtho neilou ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:34 Chule Naphtali'a kon gal lamkai sangkhat, chule lumle teng toh tho-a amahotoh umkhom sangsomthum le sangsagi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:35 Chule Dan'a kon galsatna konthei cheh sangsomni le sangget le jagup ahiuve. 
1Chronicles12:36 Chule Asher'a kon galsatna konthei cheh, galbol them sangsomli ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:37 Chule Jordan gal langkhat lama um Reuben mite, Gad mite chule Manasseh phung kehkhatna kon, gal mun'a galmanchah tincheng mangthem cheh mi sangjakhat le sangsomni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles12:38 Hicheho jousehi galsat mi, panmun tuhthei cheh, Israel jouse chunga David lenga semdinga lungthim chamkim tah-a Hebron'a hunga ahiuvin, chule Israel adang amoh chengse jong chu David lenga semdinga lungkitoh sel ahiuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Hitichun hiche mun'a chun amaho David toh nithum aumun, anekhom adonkhomun ahi: ajehchu asopihouvin amaho ding anagonpeh-u ahi." 
1Chronicles12:40 Chukalvalin amaho nai vela um Issachar, Zebulun, chule Naphtali ho jengin jong sangan ho, sangongsang ho, sakolpol ho, chule bongchal hochun sa, an, theichang changlhah, lengpithei gop bohho, lengpitwi, sathao chule bongchal ho le kelngoi ho atama tam ahinpo uvin ahi: ajehchu Israel sunga kipa thanop uma ahi." 
1Chronicles13:1 Chuin David'in asangsang le ajaja gal lamkaiho le vaipoho jouse akihou khompin ahi. 
1Chronicles13:2 Chule David'in Israel mipi ho jouse jah-a, Hichehi nanghon pha nasah uva, chule Pakai i-Pathen'uva kon ahile, Israel gamsung jouse-a kidalha, muntina um isopihou heng, chule amaho toh akhopihoule akimvela cheng thempuho le Levi mite jouse jong, hitichun eiho henga ahung kikhop khom theina dingun mi solkimvelu hitin:" 
1Chronicles13:3 Chule eihon i-Pathen'u thingkhong chu ihenguva polut kit taohite: ajehchu eihon Saul nikho laijin hichu inadon tapouvin ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles13:4 Chuin mipi kikhomho jouse chun chutia chu aboldiuvin aseitaove: ajehchu hichu mi jouse mitmu-a dih sohkeija ahi. 
1Chronicles13:5 Hitichun David'in Egypt gam Shihor'a pat Hamath lutna geija Israelte jouse chu, Kirjath-jearim'a kona Pathen kitepna thingkhong podingin akhom khomtan ahi." 
1Chronicles13:6 Chuin David le Israelte jouse chu Judah gama um Baalah kiti Kirjath-jearim'a um Cherub teni kikah-a cheng, Amin kiphon dohna, Pakai Pathen thingkhong podingin achetouvun ahi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Chuin amahon Pathen thingkhong chu bong kangtalai thah khatnin Abinadab in'a konin apodoh-un, Uzza le Ahio in bong kangtalai chun atol lhone." 
1Chronicles13:8 Chule David le Israelte jousen ajochanun Pathen anga lasah pumin, selangdah le tumging toh, khongcha le khutbeh, chule sumkon ho mut pumin alamuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles13:9 Chuin Chidon changchilna phol ahung geitah-un, Uzz'in akhut alhangdoh-in thingkhong agah tuh go-in ahi: ajehchu bongchal chu kipala ahi." 
1Chronicles13:10 Chuin Uzza chunga Pakai lunghanna ahung koujah tan, aman thingkhong akhutna atuhjeh chun adengin; chuachun Pathen masanga athitan ahi." 
1Chronicles13:11 Chuin Uzza chunga Pakaiyin akhut alhajeh chun David alunglhaitapon: hijeh chun tuni geijin chuche munchu Perez Uzza akitin ahi. 
1Chronicles13:12 Chule chuche nikho chun David'in Pathen akichatan, Pathen thingkhong hi iti in'a kahenga kapohlut ding ham? ati." 
1Chronicles13:13 Hijeh chun Davidn'in thingkhong chu David khopi ama in'a alhutapon, Git mi Obed-edom in'a chun apolut jotan ahi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Chule Pathen thingkhong chu Obed-edom insungmi tetoh ama in'a lhathum jen aumdentan ahi. Chule Pakaiyin Obed-edom insung chu aneiho jouse toh phatthei aboh tan ahi. 
1Chronicles14:1 Tun Tyre lengpa Hiram'in David koma thupole ho toh lhonin, cedar thingtumho, songkheng themho chule thingthemho a-in sahpeh dingin asolin ahi." 
1Chronicles14:2 Ami Israelte jala alenggam choisanga aumtahjeh chun, Pakaiyin Israelte lenga atundet ahichu David'in akihet tai." 
1Chronicles14:3 Chuin David'in Jerusalem'a chun ji akipuibe nalaijin: David'in chapate le chanute ahinbe nalaije. 
1Chronicles14:4 Tun hichehohi Jerusalem'a anei achate minho chu ahi: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan chule Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Chule Ibhar, Elishua chule Elpalet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Chule Nogah, Nepheg chule Japhia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Chule Elishama, Beeliada, chule Eliphelet ahiuve." 
1Chronicles14:8 Chuin Philistine miten David chu Israel jouse chunga leng dingin thao akinutai ti ajah phatnun, Philistine mite jouse David holdingin achetou taovin ahi. Chuin David'in hichu ajan, amaho kisatpi din akondohtai." 
1Chronicles14:9 Chule Philistine te ahungun Rephaim phaichama akithecheh taove. 
1Chronicles14:10 Chuin David'in Pathen adongin, Philistine te satna kakontou dingham? Chule kakhutna amaho chu neipeh ding hinam? ati. Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Kontouvin, amaho chu nakhutna kapehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles14:11 Hitichun amaho Baal-perazim geijin ahung touvun, David'in chuachun amaho ajoutan ahi. Chuphatnin David'in, Twi kivocheh bangin kamelmate chu Pathen'in kakhutna avochehtai, ati. Hijeh chun amahon chuche mun chu Baal-perazim asahtaove." 
1Chronicles14:12 Chuin amahon chukoma a-pathen hou adalhah phatnun, David'in thupeh apen, meijin ahalvam taove." 
1Chronicles14:13 Chuin Philistine te chu avelin phaichama chun ahung kithecheh kitnuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles14:14 Hijeh chun David'in Pathen adongkitnin ahile, Pathen'in ajah-a, Amaho nunga khun chetou hih-in; amaho-a konin kihei mang inlang, thingtheimi phung jonna khun achunguva hung chun." 
1Chronicles14:15 Chule hunghiti ding ahi; thingtheimi thing chunga akitol ginu najah teng, galsatdia nakondoh ding ahi: ajehchu Philistine galmi janel that dinga namasanga Pathen kondoh-a ahitai, ati." 
1Chronicles14:16 Hijeh chun David'in Pathen'in thupeh bangchun abolin; amahon Philistine galmi janel chu Gibeon'a pat Gazer geijin athatpeh taovin ahi. 
1Chronicles14:17 Chuin gam jouse-a David min athangtan; chule Pakaiyin nam jouse chunga ama ginna achuhsah tan ahi. 
1Chronicles15:1 Chule David'in David khopi-a chun a-inding ho asan, chule Pathen thingkhong dingin mun khat agongin, ponbuh asonpeh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles15:2 Hichun David'in, Levi mite tailouvin Pathen thingkhong apohthei louhel dingu ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin amaho chu Pathen thingkhong pole ding le atonsotna ama jendinga alhendoh ahiuve, ati." 
1Chronicles15:3 Chuin David'in aumna dinga agonpehna mun'a chu Pakai thingkhong potou dingin, Israelte jouse chu Jerusalem'a akhom khomin ahi." 
1Chronicles15:4 Chule David'in Aaron chate le Levi mite akhomin: 
1Chronicles15:5 Kohath chapate lah-a kon; pipui Uriel, chule asopite jakhat le somni," 
1Chronicles15:6 Merari chate lah-a kon; pipui Asaiah, chule asopite jani le somni," 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershom chapate lah-a kon; pipui Joel, chule asopite jakhat le somthum," 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershom chapate lah-a kon; pipui Joel, chule asopite jakhat le somthum," 
1Chronicles15:8 Elizaphan chapate lah-a kon; pipui Shemaiah, chule asopite jani," 
1Chronicles15:9 Hebron chapate lah-a kon; pipui Eliel, chule asopite somget," 
1Chronicles15:10 Uziel chapate lah-a kon; pipui Amminadab, chule asopite jakhatle somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles15:11 Chuin David'in thempu teni Zadok le Abiathar, chule Levi mite Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel chule Amminadab akouvin," 
1Chronicles15:11 Chuin David'in thempu teni Zadok le Abiathar, chule Levi mite Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel chule Amminadab akouvin," 
1Chronicles15:12 Ajah uva, Nangho Levi ho pate pipuiho nahiuve: aumna dinga kasemsa mun lama Israel Pakai Pathen thingkhong nahinpoh theina dingun, nangho le nasopite cheng kisuthengun." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ajehchu amasa chunga chu hichu nabollou jeh-u le, abolding dan ama idohlou jeh uva, Pakai i-Pathen'un ichunguva akhut analhah ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles15:14 Hitichun thempuho le Levi te chu Israel Pakai Pathen thingkhong podingin akisutheng taovin ahi. 
1Chronicles15:15 Chuin Levi chate chun Pakai thu dungjuija Mosi thupeh bangin, achunga moljola chun Pathen kitepna thingkhong chu alengkouvun apuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles15:16 Chuin David'in Levi pipuiho chu ahoupin, asopihou chu lasahna manchah pum, tumgingho le selangdah ho pum, chule khutbeh to tho-a, aw sangtah-a lasa dinga alhendoh diuvin aseipeh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles15:17 Hitichun Levi hon Joel chapa Heman, chule asopite lah-a Berechiah chapa Asaph, asopihou Merari chapate lah-a Kushaiah chapa Ethan chu apansah-un;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Hitichun Levi hon Joel chapa Heman, chule asopite lah-a Berechiah chapa Asaph, asopihou Merari chapate lah-a Kushaiah chapa Ethan chu apansah-un;" 
1Chronicles15:18 Chule amaho kitho-a aloi ni-a pangding asopihou chu; Zekeriah, Ben, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattithiah, Elipheleh, Mikneiah chule kotngah-a pang teni Obed-edom le Jeiel toh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles15:19 Hitichun lasathem, Heman, Asaph chule Ethan chu sum-eng khutbeh bengin apansah uvin," 
1Chronicles15:20 Chule Zekeriah, Aziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah chule Benaiah chu Alamoth dungjuija tumging toh thoding ahiuvin;" 
1Chronicles15:21 Chule Mattithiah, Elipheleh, Mikneiah, Obed-edom, Jeiel chule Azaziah chu Sheminith dungjuija selangdah toh thoding ahiuve." 
1Chronicles15:22 Chule Levi te pipui Chenaniah chu labul-in apangin ahi; ajehchu ama athep jeh-in lahil in apangin ahi. 
1Chronicles15:23 Chule Berechiah le Elkanah chu thingkhong kotngah-in apang lhonin ahi. 
1Chronicles15:24 Chule thempuho Shebaniah, Joshaphat, Nethaneel, Amasai, Zekeriah, Benaiah chule Eliezer chu Pathen thingkhong masanga sumkon mut ahiuvin; chule Obed-edom le Jehiah chu thingkhong umna kotngah ahilhone." 
1Chronicles15:25 Hitichun David le Israel upaho, chule asang asang chunga gal lamkaiho chu Obed-edom in'a kona Pakai kitepna thingkhong kipahtah-a gapotou din ache taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles15:26 Chule ahitin ahi, Pakai kitepna thingkhong pu-a pang Levi ho chu Pathen'in akithopi phatchun, amahon bongchal sagile kelngoichal sagin ganlhaina aboluvin ahi." 
1Chronicles15:27 Chule David le kitepna thingkhong jonga pang Levi ho jouse, chule lasaho le lalamkaipa Chenaniah chu tupat ponnemin akivonun; David'in jong tupat ponnem boitong sangkhol aki-ah in ahi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Hitichun Israelte jousen a-ao tothon, sumkon binei ginle sumkon gin, khutbeh gin, tumging le selangdah gin to thon Pakai kitepna thingkhong chu apotou taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles15:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pakai thutep thingkhong chu David khopi sung ahunglhun tah-in, Saul chanu Michal'in David lengpa lamle chople chu bangkotna konin amutan: alungsunga amuneo lheh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles16:1 Chutichun amahon Pathen thingkhong chu ahin pouvin, David'in chuche dinga anason ponbuh lailung tah-a chun angauvin; chule Pathen angsunga govam thilto le chamna thilto atoh-un ahi." 
1Chronicles16:2 Chuin David'in govam thilto le chamna thilto aboljou phatnin, Pakai minin mipi ho chu phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles16:3 Chule Israelte amitakip apasal anumeijin, mitin changlhah tumkhat, saphehoi lhang khat, chule lengpitwi pai khat apecheh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles16:4 Chule aman Levi te mi phabep chu Pakai thingkhong masanga lhacha ding, thu ching ding, chule Israel Pakai Pathen thangvah le vahchoi dingin apansah-in;" 
1Chronicles16:5 Pipui Asaph, chule amabana Zekeriah, Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah chule Obed-edom ahiuvin: chule Jeiel chu tumgingle selangdah thoding ahin, hinlah Asaph chu thih khutbeh bengin apangin;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Thempu Benaiah le Jahaziel'in Pathen kitepna thingkhong masanga chun sumkon amutjing lhonin ahi. 
1Chronicles16:7 Chule hiche nikho chun David'in amasapen dingin hiche Pakai thangvahna la Asaph le asopite khutna apedoh-in ahi. 
1Chronicles16:8 Pakai henga vahchoina peuvin lang, aminin taovun, mihemte lah-a athilbol hetsah-un." 
1Chronicles16:9 Ahenga la saovin, Ahenga vahchoi La saovin, athil kidang bolho jouse seijun." 
1Chronicles16:10 Amintheng chu loupisah-un; Pakai holho lungthim kipah hen. 
1Chronicles16:11 Pakai le ahatna holunlang; tanglouvin amai holjingun. 
1Chronicles16:12 Aman ana tohdohsa anatoh kidangho, athil kidangho, akamsunga athutanho chu geldoh-un;" 
1Chronicles16:13 Vo nangho Israel chilhah asohte, vo alhentum nangho Jacob chate," 
1Chronicles16:14 Amachu Pakai i-Pathen'u ahin; athutanho chu leiset chung jouse-a aume. 
1Chronicles16:15 Akitepna chu a-itih-in geldoh jingun; khang sang sanga dinga athupeh thuho chu; 
1Chronicles16:16 Abraham henga akitepna ngei le, Isaac henga akihahselna chu;" 
1Chronicles16:17 Chule hiche mama chu Jacob henga danthu-a dingin asudetnin; chule Israelte henga tonsotna kitepna dingin asuhdetnin," 
1Chronicles16:18 Ahenga, Canaan gam chu nangma dinga, nachan ding gouva kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
1Chronicles16:19 Nangho hiche gamahi lhomcha bou, tahbeh-a lhomcha bou khopem nahilaiju chun." 
1Chronicles16:20 Chule amaho nam khatna kona nam khatna, lenggam khatna kona midang henga achele laijun," 
1Chronicles16:21 Koiman adihlouva aboldiu aphalpon; chule amaho jeh-in lengho aphohsal jin; 
1Chronicles16:22 Kathaonupa hi tongkha hih-un, chule kathemgao ho chunga khangse hih-un, atin ahi." 
1Chronicles16:23 Leiset pumpin Pakai vahchoi La saovin: anitinin ahuhhingna phongjalun. 
1Chronicles16:24 Aloupi na chu Pathen helou ho lah-a; chule anatoh kidangho chu namtin lah-a phongjalun. 
1Chronicles16:25 Ajehchu Pakai hi loupitah ahin; loupitah-a choiat ding ahi: Ama Pathen dang jouse chung vuma ginding ahi. 
1Chronicles16:26 Ajehchu miho pathen jouse chu milim bou ahin; Pakaiyin vang vanho asemin ahi. 
1Chronicles16:27 Loupina leh jana ama-a aumin; thahatna le kipana ama munah aume. 
1Chronicles16:28 Pakai henga peuvin, nangho phungtina miho, Pakai henga loupi na le thahatna peuvin." 
1Chronicles16:29 Pakai henga aminto kithuh loupina peuvin: thilto hin choi jinlang a-angsung hungun; athenna hoina-in Pakai chu houvun. 
1Chronicles16:30 Lei pumpi a-anga kichauvin; vannoi jong akilon louna dinga detding ahi. 
1Chronicles16:31 Vanho kipahhen lang leiset thanom hen: chule Pakai alengchang tai, tin miten namtin lah-a seijuhen." 
1Chronicles16:32 Twipi le asunga umjouse ginglellul henlang: gamho le asunga umho jouse thanomuhen. 
1Chronicles16:33 Chujou tengle gammang thing jousen Pakai anga la asahdoh dingu ahi, ajehchu ama leiset thutan dingin ahunge." 
1Chronicles16:34 Aw Pakai henga thangvahna peuvin; ajehchu ama aphan; ahepina atonsotnin aumjinge. 
1Chronicles16:35 Chule nanghon, Vo eihuh hinguva Pathen, neihuhhing un, namin theng kathangvah uva, napachat na-a loupina kapeh theina dingun, neikhom khomun lang, Pathen helouho-a konin neihuh doh-un, tiuvin." 
1Chronicles16:36 Israel Pakai Pathen chu atonsot atonsotnin nunnom hen, ati. Chuin mipi jouse chun AMEN, Pakai chu vahchoijun atiuve." 
1Chronicles16:37 Chutichun aman Asaph le asopite cheng chu Pakai kitepna thingkhong masanga chun, niseh-a tohding angai dungjuija kitepna thingkhong masanga tanglouva kinbol jing dingin;" 
1Chronicles16:38 Chule Obed-edom toh asopite somgup le get, Jeduthun chapa Obed-edom chu Hosah toh kotngah-a pang dingin;" 
1Chronicles16:39 Chule thempu Zadok le asopite thempuho chu Gibeon'a um munsanga Pakai Houbuh masanga," 
1Chronicles16:40 Aman Israelte ana thupeh, Pakai danthua kisun jouse dungjuija boldingle, tanglouva jingkah nilhah seh-a govam thilto maicham chunga govam thilto pejing dingin;" 
1Chronicles16:41 Chule amaho chutoh Heman le Jeduthun, chule amin kiminkutna kilhengdoh adangho sese chu ahepina tonsotna aumjing jeh-a Pakai henga thangvahna pedingin;" 
1Chronicles16:42 Chule amaho chutoh Heman le Jeduthun chu sumkon ho le thihkhutbehho chule Pathen tumgingtheiho tumging dingin adalhan ahi. Chule Jeduthun chapate chu kotngah ahiuve. 
1Chronicles16:43 Chuin ami jouse chu a-inlam cheh-a akile taovin: chule David jong a-insung vangboh dingin akiletan ahi. 
1Chronicles17:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, David chu a-in'a atoupetnin Nathan themgao jah-a chun David'in, Ven keima cedar thinga kisa in'a kachengin, ahivangin Pakai kitepna thingkhong chu pon in noija aumnalaije, ati." 
1Chronicles17:2 Chuphat chun Nathan'in David jah-a, Nalunga um jouse chu boljengin; ajehchu Pathen'in na-umpinai, ati." 
1Chronicles17:3 Chuin chuche jan mama chun ahitin ahi, Nathan henga Pathen thu ahung lhungin, hitin ati," 
1Chronicles17:4 Kasoh David henga chenlang hitin gaseijin, Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, Nangman kachenna ding in neisahpeh louding ahi;" 
1Chronicles17:5 Ijeh-inem itile Israel kapuidoh nikho-a pat tuni geihin in'a kacheng khapon; ponbuh-a kon ponbuh, chule Houbuh khatna kon achom khatna kakichon lele bouvin ahi." 
1Chronicles17:6 Israelte jouse toh kachelena jouse-a, ka mipite vahdinga kathupeh Israel vaipoho khatpenpen jah-a chu, Ipidinga cedar thinga in neisahpeh lou uham, tia kasei khah em?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Hijeh chun tun kasoh David jah-a hitia hi naseiding ahi, Janel Pakaiyin hitihin ati, kelngoihon lah-a kon, kelngoi nung najuina ngeija konin kami Israelte chunga leng dingin kapuidoh-in:" 
1Chronicles17:8 Chule nachelena lam jouse-a kalhonpi jingin, namasanga konin namelmaho jouse kasatlhah peh-in, chule leisetna um miloupi tahtah ho min bangin namin kathansah tan ahi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Chujongle kami Israelte dinga munkhat kagonpeh ding, kaphulut uva, amaho amunuva cheng diu, chule kichonle talou dingu; chule abultil lai banga gitlouna chaten asuhgim kit tahlou dingu," 
1Chronicles17:10 Kami Israelte chunga vaihom dinga thutan ho kathupeh lai banga chu. Chujongle namelmaho jouse kasuhnempeh ding nahi. Chukit jongle Pakaiyin insung khat natundoh pehding ahi ti kaseipeh nahi. 
1Chronicles17:11 Chule hunghiti ding ahi, nanikho ho ahung beija napu napate toh umkhom dinga nacheteng, nanunga nachilhah khat katundoh ding, amachu nachapate lah-a kon hiding; chule alenggam kaphudet ding ahi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ama chun in eisahpeh ding, chule keiman tonsotna dinga alaltouna katundoh pehding ahi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Keima apa kahiding, chule ama kachapa hiding: nangma masanga ana umpa-a kona kalahmang banga, ama-a kon kahepina kalahmang louding:" 
1Chronicles17:14 Amavang atonsotna dinga ka insungle kalenggam sunga kachensah ding: chule alaltouna chu a-imatih chana dinga katundoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles17:15 Hiche thuho jouse dungjui le, hiche gaothil muho dungjuijin, Nathan'in David hengah aseitan ahi." 
1Chronicles17:16 Chuin David lengpa chu ahungin Pakai angah atouvin, hitin aseije, Vo Pakai Pathen, keima koi kahia, chule ka insunghi ipi hija, nangman hichangei jen neihinpui hitam?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ahinla vo Pathen, hichehi nangma mitmun thil neocha bou ahi nalaije; ajehchu nasoh insunga khonung peh sottah jouva hunglhung ding jong naseijin, chule vo Pakai Pathen, nangman keimahi dinmun sangtah nei miho tobangin neikoije." 
1Chronicles17:18 Nasoh najabolna chunga hi David'in nahenga ipidang aseibe thei nahlai ding ham? Ajehchu nangman nasoh hi nahenai. 
1Chronicles17:19 Vo Pakai, nasoh khohsahna jal le, nangmatah lunggel dungjuija, hiche thil loupiho jouse pihi hetsahna dinga, hiche thilloupitah jouse hi nabol ahi." 
1Chronicles17:20 Vo Pakai, kakol uva kajah-u jouse dungjuijin nangma tobang koima aumpon, chule nangma tailoujong Pathen dang khatcha aumpoi." 
1Chronicles17:21 Chule nami Israelte tobanga Pathen'in amite hidinga aga lhatdoh, Egypt gama kona nahuhdoh namite-a dinga amasanguva kona namtin nanodoh-a, namin kithan nadinga thil kidangtah le loupitah nabolna nam khatbeh leiset chunga hi umkham?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Ajehchu nami Israelte hi tonsotna namite hidingin nasemtan; chule Pakai, nangma a-Pathen'u nahunghi tai." 
1Chronicles17:23 Hijeh chun tun, Pakai, nasoh chung chang le a-insung chungchang thua nasei thil chu atonsotna dingin sudet inlang, chule naseisama bangin hinboltan." 
1Chronicles17:24 Pakai janel Pathen hi Israel Pathen ahin, Israel Pathen ngeichu ahi: tia tonsotna namin choisanga aumna dingin kiphut det hen; chule nasoh David insunghi nangma angsunga phudetnin umhen." 
1Chronicles17:25 Ajehchu vo ka-Pathen, nangman nasoh henga insung khat natundoh pehding ahi tin naseipeh tan ahi: hijeh-a chu nasohhin na-anga taona ding lungthim amu ahi." 
1Chronicles17:26 Chule tun, Pakai, nangma Pathen nahin, chule hiche phatnahi nasoh henga nateppeh ahitai:" 
1Chronicles17:27 Hijeh chun tun, na-angsunga tonsotna a-umjing theina dingin, nasoh insung vangboh dinghi nalung lhaina hihen: ajehchu vo Pakai, nangman phatthei naboh ahitan, atonsot geija phatthei boh hiding ahitai, ati." 
1Chronicles18:1 Tun hiche jouhin ahitin ahi, David'in Philistine te ajouvin, chule asunemin, chuin Philistine mite khutna konin Gath le akhopiho alatan ahi." 
1Chronicles18:2 Chule Moab ajouvin, Moab mite chu David soh-in apangtauvin, chule thilpehho ahinpouvin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:3 Chuin David Euphrates vadung geija alenggam tungdet dinga achena-a, Hamath langa Zobah lengpa Hadarezer chu ajoutan ahi." 
1Chronicles18:4 Chule David'in ama-a konin sakol kangtalai sangkhat, sakol chunga tou sepai sangsagi, chule keng sepai sangsomni ahin lan: chuin David'in kangtalai kai sakol ho jouse chu akeng asat baijin, alah uva konchun sakol kangtalai jakhat kaiding bou akhenin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Chuin Damascus'a kona Syria miho Zobah lengpa Hadarezer kithopi dinga ahung phatnun, David'in Syria miho chu mi sangsomni le sangni athatnin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:6 Chuphatnin David'in Syria gamsung Damascus'a sepai atousah in; chule Syria miho chu David soh-in apanguvin, thilpeh ahin choijun ahi. Hitichun Pakaiyin David chu achenalam jouse ah avengbit jingin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:7 Chuin David'in Hadarezer soh ho chunga um sana lumho chu alan, Jerusalem'a ahinpo tai." 
1Chronicles18:8 Chutobang machun David nin Hadarezer khopiho Tibhath le Chun akonin sum-eng atama tam ahinlan; hicheho-a chun Solomon'in sum-eng twikong le khom, chule sum-eng belho asemin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tun Hamath lengpa Tou'in Zobah lengpa Hadarezer sepaihon jouse David nin ajousohtai ti ajah phatnin," 
1Chronicles18:10 Hadarezer chu akisatpi-a ajotah jeh chun, ama chibai bohdingle kipapi dingin, achapa Hadoram chu David lengpa henga asolin ahi: (ajehchu Hadarezer le Tou chu ana kidou jingsa ahilhone) chule aman sana, dangka chule sum-eng um le bel namkim ahin solthan ahi." 
1Chronicles18:11 David lengpan jong hicheho chutoh nam dangdang ho: Edom'a kon, Moab'a kon, Ammon chate-a kon, Philistine miho-a kon chule Amalek mite-a kona ahinpohho dangka le sanaho chu Pakai henga apedohtai." 
1Chronicles18:12 Chukalvalin Zeruiah chapa Abishai'in chi phaichama chun Edom mite Sangsom le sangget anathatnin ahi. 
1Chronicles18:13 Chule aman Edom'a sepai akoijin, Edom mite jouse chu David soh-in apangtauvin ahi. Hitichun Pakaiyin David chu achenalam chenga aveng bitnin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:14 Hitichun David Israel mite jouse chunga aleng changin, chule amipi jouse lah-a thudih le chondih na-in vai ahomin ahi." 
1Chronicles18:15 Chule sepai janel jouse chunga vaihoma chu Zeruiah chapa Joab ahin; chule Ahilud chapa Jehoshaphat chu thuching ahi. 
1Chronicles18:16 Chule Ahitub chapa Zadok le Abiathar chapa Abimelech chu thempu ahilhonin; chule Shavsha chu danthusun ahin; 
1Chronicles18:17 Chule Jehoiada chapa Benaiah chu Chereth mite le Peleth mite chunga vaibol ahin; chule David chapate vang lengpa kimvela pipuipen ahiuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles19:1 Tun hiche jouhin ahitin ahi, Ammon mite lengpa Nahash athitan ahile, ama khelin achapa alengchang tan ahi." 
1Chronicles19:2 Chuin David'in, Apan kachunga hepina anamusah jeh-in ken jong Nahash chapa Hanun chunga hepina vetsah inge, ati. Hitichun David'in apa chungchanga ama lhamon dingin thupole ho asole. Hitichun David sohte chu Ammon chate gama Hanun henga alhamon din ahungun ahi." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ahinla Ammon chate lah-a pipuihon Hanun jah-a, David'in napa ajajeh-a nahenga lhamon ding miho ahinsol hidinga nagelem? Asohhohi nahenga gamsung kholtoh-a lehkhup dinga, avelhi dingin hunga hilou uham? atiuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles19:4 Hijeh chun Hanun'in David sohte chu amanin, akhamulu ahettol peh-in, chule avonhou chu akimlaitah atobuh-u phabep bepmin atanpeh-in, asolmang tan ahi." 
1Chronicles19:5 Chuphatnin mi phabep David henga acheuvin, miho kiboldanho chu aseipeh taovin ahi. Chule aman amaho kimu pidingin mi asolin ahi: ajehchu miho chu ajahcha behseh jenguve. Chuin lengpan, Nakhamulu ahung khandoh kit kahsen Jericho'a umunlang, chujou tengle hungkile taovin, ati." 
1Chronicles19:6 Chuin Ammon chaten David dinga thet umtah-a akisemdoh-u amu phatnun, Hanun chule Ammon chaten Mesopotamia'a kon, Syria-Maachaha kon, chule Zobah'a kona kangtalai ho le sakol touthemho goina dingin dangka talent sangkhat athot taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles19:7 Hijeh chun amahon kangtalai sangsomthum le sangni le Maachah lengpa le amipiho chu atha lah un: amaho ahungun Medeba masanga ponbuh akisonun, chule Ammon chateho akhopilen houva konin ahung kikhom khomun, galsat dingin ahung taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles19:8 Chuin David'in hichu ajah phatnin, Joab le sepai hangsan janel jouse asoltan ahi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Chuin Ammon chate ahungdoh-un, khopi lutna kotpi-a galsat dingin akigolun; chule ahunga lengho jong loujaova chun apangun ahi." 
1Chronicles19:10 Tun Joab'in anung ama-a adouding aume ti amu phatnin, Israel lah-a konin lhentum cheh phabep alhengdoh-in, Syria te doudingin agoltohtan ahi." 
1Chronicles19:11 Chule mipi adang sese chu asopipa Abishai khutna apedoh-in, chule amaho chu Ammon chate doudingin akigol taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles19:12 Chuin aman, Syria mite keidinga ahatbeh seh-u le neihin huding ahi: ahinla Ammon chate chu nang dinga ahatbeh seh-ule keiman nangma kahin huding ahi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Hangsan tah-in uminlang, imipiteu le I-Pathen'u khopiho dingin hangtah-in umhite; chule Pakaiyin amitmua pha asah bangtah-in hinbol tahen, ati." 
1Chronicles19:14 Hitichun Joab le amatoh umkho mipite chu Syria miho doudingin anailut taovin; chuin amaho ama masanga ajamcheh taovin ahi. 
1Chronicles19:15 Chuin Ammon chaten Syria te ajamtaove ti amuphatnun, amaho jong chutobangma chun asopipa Abishai masanga konin ajamcheh-un, khopi sunga chun alut taovin ahi. Chujouvin Joab Jerusalem'a ahungtai." 
1Chronicles19:16 Chuin Syria ten Israelte aleluchu amuphatnun, sottole ho asolun, vadung gala um Syria mite chu agatoldoh taovin: chuin Hadarezer sepai janel gallamkai Shophach chu amasanguva alamkaijin ahi." 
1Chronicles19:17 Chuin hiche chu David aseipeh taovin ahile, aman Israel jouse akhomin, Jordan agalkaijun, achunguva achun, kisatpi din akigol taovin ahi. Chutia Syria te doudinga David nin asepaiho agoltoh phatnin, amahon akisatpi taove." 
1Chronicles19:18 Ahinla Israelte masanga Syria te ajamcheh taovin, David'in Syria te kangtalai ja galsat ho mi sangsagi, chule keng sepai sangsomli athatnin, chule janel gallamkai Shophach chu athattan ahi." 
1Chronicles19:19 Chule Hadarezer sohten Israel masanga amaimoh-u amuphatnun, David toh chamna asemun, hitichun asoh-in apang taovin; chule Syria ten Ammon chate chu apanpi kit tapouvin ahi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, kum ahung kichaija, lengho galsatna achedoh phat laitah-un, Joab'in sepaihon thahat tah chu apuidoh-in, Ammon chate gam chu asusen, chuin ahungin Rabah ahin umtan ahi. Ahin David vangchu Jerusalem'a aume. Chuin Joab'in Rabbah ajouvin, asusetan ahi." 
1Chronicles20:2 Chule David'in alengpao luchanga konin lallukhuh alalhan, hichu sana talent khatna gih ahi amudoh-in, chule hia chun song mantam jong ajaovin; chuin hichu David akhuhpeh taovin: chule khopi-a kon chun gala kichomdoh thil tamtah jong ahin pon ahi." 
1Chronicles20:3 Chuin chua um mipihochu apuidoh-in, thing-at, khenchi, chule heicha mangin na atohsah-in ahi. Chutobang tahchun David'in Ammon chate khopiho jouse chu abolin ahi. Chuin David le mipite jouse Jerusalem'a akile taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles20:4 Chuin hiche jouhin ahitin ahi, Philistine te toh Gezer'a kidouna aumin; hichepet hin Hushath mi Sibbechai'in milen chate lah-a khat Sippai kitipa chu athatnin: chuin amaho chu suhnemin aumtaovin ahi." 
1Chronicles20:5 Chule Philistine te toh kidouna aumkitnin, chuin Jair chapa Elhanan'in Git mi Goliath sopipa, atenglung jong ponkhong ho talhang tejen hijah, Lahmi chu athatnin ahi." 
1Chronicles20:6 Chuin Gath'a kidouna aumkitnin, hia chun mi sangtah khat, akhut langto-a khutjung gup le akeng langto-a kengjung gup cheh, agoma khutjungle kengjung somnileli nei aumin: ama jong chu milen chapa ahije." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ahinla aman Israelte ataitom phatnin, David sopipa Shimeia chapa Jonathan'in ama chu athattan ahi." 
1Chronicles20:8 Hichehohi Goth mun'a milen ho-a kona pengho ahiuvin, ahin amaho David le asohte khutna alougam taove." 
1Chronicles21:1 Chuin Israelte dounan Satan adingdoh-in, Israelte simsah din David chu atildohtan ahi." 
1Chronicles21:2 Chuin David'in Joab le mipi vaipoho jah-a, Cheovin, Beersheba apat Dan geipeh-in Israel jat simunlang, kahet theina dingin kahengah ajatnu hin lhutnun, ati." 
1Chronicles21:3 Chuin Joabmin adonbutnin, Pakaiyin amite chu ajat jakhatna tamjon punsah hen: ahinla ka pakai lengpa, amaho chu ka pakaipa sohte ngen hilouham? Ipidinga ka pakaiyin hiche thilhi angaichat hija ham? Ipidinga ama Israel themmo channa hunghi dingham? ati." 
1Chronicles21:4 Ahijeng vangin lengpa thusei chun Joab chu ajoujotan ahi. Hijeh chun Joab akipatdoh-in Israel achonsoh keijin, Jerusalem'a ahungkile kit tai." 
1Chronicles21:5 Chuin Joab'in David hengah mipi asimdoh jat chu apei. Chule Israel lah-a chemjam lamthei cheh chu mi sang sangkhat le sangjakhat ahiuve: chule Judah lah-a chemjam lamthei cheh chu mi sangjali le sangsomsagi ahiuve. 
1Chronicles21:6 Ahivangin Levi le Benjaminte chu alah uva akisimtha poi; ajehchu lengpa thusei chu Joab dinga thet umtah ahije. 
1Chronicles21:7 Chule hiche thil la hin Pathen alunglhai tapon, hijeh chun Israel chunga jepna achuhsah tai." 
1Chronicles21:8 Chuin David'in Pathen hengah, hiche thil kabol jeh hin keima nasatah-in kachonse tai: ahin tun, nahenga katao ahi, nasoh khangit louna hi lamangtan; ajehchu ngolhoi tah-in kana chontai, ati." 
1Chronicles21:9 Chuin Pakaiyin David mitvah neipa, Gad henga thu ahin seijin, hitin ati," 
1Chronicles21:10 Chenlang David hengah hitin gaseijin, Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, keiman nangma thil thum kagonpeh-e: nachunga katoh theina dingin alah-a khat kilhenin gatin, ati." 
1Chronicles21:11 Hitichun Gad chu David hengah ahungin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitihin ati, Nangman kilhenin," 
1Chronicles21:12 Kumthum kel lhah ham; ahiloule namelmate masanga lhathum sunga suhmanga naum ding, hiche sunga chu namelmate chemjamin nadelding; ahiloule nithum sunga gamsunga Pakai chemjam, hise ngeichu gamsunga uma, chule Pakai vantil'in Israel gamkol jouse asuhmang ding nalhenam. Hijeh chun tun, eihin solpa henga ipi thu kalhut dingham kilhen temin, ati." 
1Chronicles21:13 Chuphatnin David'in Gad jah-a, Keima kalung adonglheh jengtai: tun Pakai khutna lhalut jenging kate; ajehchu amihepina nasatah-in alenin ahi: mihem khutna vang neilhahlut sah hihbeh-in, ati." 
1Chronicles21:14 Hitichun Pakaiyin Israel chunga hise alansahtan, Israel lah-a mi sangsomsagi athi taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles21:15 Chule Pathen'in Jerusalem sumang dingin vantil asoltan: chule aman asuhmang laitah-in, Pakaiyin aven, chule thilse atohgotna konchun alung aheijin, asumang vantil henga chun, Aphasettai, tun nakhut tuhtang tan, ati. Chuin Pakai vantil chu Jebus mi Ornan phola chun adingtan ahi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Chuin David akhodah-in ahile, Pakai vantil chemjam kidopma Jerusalem lam nga-a, leile van kikah-a adin amutan ahi. Chuphatnin David le Israel upaho khaodippon kisila umho chu tolla abohkhup taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Chuin Davidn'in Pathen hengah, Mipi ho simding thu pe-a chu keima kahi hilouham? Achonsea khanset bola chu keima ngeihi kahi; ahin hiche kelngoi ho vanghin ipi aboluvem? Vo Pakai ka Pathen, nahenga katao ahi, nakhut chu keimale kapa insungah chujohen; ahin hiche namite hin natset atona dingun chuhda hen, ati." 
1Chronicles21:18 Chujouvin Pakai vantil'in Gad hengah David chu achetouva, Jebus mi Ornan phola Pakai dinga maicham agasem nadinga David aseipeh dingin athupeh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Chuin Gad'in Pakai mina aseibang chun David achetou tan ahi. 
1Chronicles21:20 Chuin Ornan chu akinung heija ahile vantil chu amutan; chule akoma um achapa liho akisel taovin, ahin Ornan chun suhlouchang chu achil jingin ahi." 
1Chronicles21:21 Chuin David Ornan koma ahung laichun, Ornan'in ahinven ahile David chu amutan, chuin phola konchun achedoh-in, amai tolla asulutnin David anga chu abohkhuptan ahi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Hitichun Davidn'in Ornan jah-a, Mipi lah-a kona natset atan theina dingin, hiche phol munhi Pakai henga maicham kasem theina dingin neipen; aman lhingsetna dinga neipeh ding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles21:23 Chuin Ornan'in David jah-a, Kilah jengin, chule ka pakai lengpan pha asah bang bangin boljeng hen; ven, govam thilto dingin bongchal, thing dingin changchilna manchah ho, chule anneh thilto dingin suhlouchang kapei: abonahi kapeh sohkei nahi, ati." 
1Chronicles21:24 Chuin David lengpan Ornan jah-a, Ahipoi, aman lhingsetna kachohtei ding ahi: ajehchu nangma-a chu Pakaiya dinga kalah louding, imacha suhmang louva govam thilto kato louding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles21:25 Hitichun David'in Ornan chu chuche mun man ding chun sana shekel jagup-a gih apen ahi. 
1Chronicles21:26 Chuin David'in chumunna chun Pakai dingin maicham asemin, govam thilto hole chamna thiltoho apen, Pakai henga ataovin ahi; chuin aman meijin van'a konin govam thilto maicham chunga chun ahindonbut nin ahi." 
1Chronicles21:27 Chuin Pakaiyin vantil chu thu apen, chuin achemjam chu apaijah akhumkit tan ahi." 
1Chronicles21:28 Chule David'in Jebus mi Ornan chang chilna phol mun'a Pakaiyin adonbut amu phatnin, hia chun ganlhaina aboltai." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ajehchu gamthipma Mosi'n asem Pakai Houbuh le govam thilto maicham chu chuche petna chu Gibeon munsanga uma ahi. 
1Chronicles21:30 Ahivangin hiche masanga chu Pakai dong dingin David ache ngampon ahi; ajehchu Pakai vantil chemjam jeh-a chu kicha-a ahi. 
1Chronicles22:1 Chujouvin David'in hichehi Pakai Pathen in ahin, hichehi Israel dinga govam thilto maicham ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles22:2 Chuin David'in Israel gamsunga gamdang mi umho chu khopkhom dingin thupeh apen; chule Pathen in sahna dingin songkheng hochu song akhensah-in ahi. 
1Chronicles22:3 Chuin David'in kotpi ho kotkhah kilna dingle akisuhto naho kilna-a thihkila man dingin thih atamatam agongin; chule sum-eng chu tejoulou khopma tam," 
1Chronicles22:4 Cedar thing jong atama tam akhol khomin ahi: ajehchu Sidon miho le Tyre mihon David hengah cedar thing tamtah ahinpoh-u ahi. 
1Chronicles22:5 Chule David'in, Kachapa Solomon hi chapang cha le ima heloulai ahin, chule Pakai dinga kisading in hi gamjousea minthana le loupina-a choisanga umding ahin: hijeh chun tun keima hiche-a dingchun kigotna neijing kate, ati. Hitichun David'in athi masangin thil tampitah agongtup min ahi." 
1Chronicles22:6 Hichun aman achapa Solomon akouvin, Israel Pakai Pathen in sahdingin ngansena apetan ahi." 
1Chronicles22:7 Chule David'in Solomon jah-a, Kachapa, keima kalungthimin Pakai ka Pathen min dinga in khat sah ding kanagelin ahi:" 
1Chronicles22:8 Ahinla Pakai thu kahengah ahung lhungin, Nangman thisan naso tamlheh jengin, gal nasatah tahho nasat ahin: nangman kamin dinga in nasah louding ahi, ajehchu kamitmu-in leiset chunga thisan tamtah nasotai." 
1Chronicles22:9 Ven, chapa khat hingin natin, ama chu chamna mi hiding; chule akimvela amelmaho jouse-a kon choldona kapeh ding ahi: ajehchu amin Solomon hiding ahin, chule ama nikho laija chu Israelte henga chamnale lungmonna kapeh ding ahi." 
1Chronicles22:10 Aman kamin dinga in asahding; chule ama kachapa hia, keima apa kahiding ahi; chule keiman atonsotna dinga Israel chunga alenggam laltouna katundoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles22:11 Tun kachapa, Pakaiyin naumpi hen; nangma khangtouvin lang, aman nachung changa asei bangtah-in Pakai na Pathen in chu sa-in." 
1Chronicles22:12 Pakai na Pathen danthu chu nanit theina dingin, Pakai sehseh-in bou chihna le het themna, chule Israel chung changa ngansena nape hen ati." 
1Chronicles22:13 Chutengle Israel chung changa Pakaiyin Mosi ana thupeh tepna danho le thutan lhahnaho chu chingthei tah-a najuija ahile kakhantou ding ahi. Hatnin lang hangsanin; kicha hih-in, lungjong lungthoi hih-in." 
1Chronicles22:14 Tun, ven, boipum pumin keiman Pakai in sahna dingin sana talent sangjakhat, dangka talent sang sangkhat; chule sum-eng le thih jong tejoulou khopma tam; chule thingtum le song jong kagong tupmin; nangman nakibelap thei ahi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Chukalvalin natong mi, songkheng them le thing thembol, chule natoh tinchenga khutthem tamtah nakoma aume." 
1Chronicles22:16 Sana, dangka, sum-eng chule thih ajat simjoulou aumin ahi. Hijeh chun kipatdoh-in lang tong jengin; chule Pakaiyin naumpi hen, ati." 
1Chronicles22:17 David'in jong Israel pipuiho chu achapa Solomon kithopi dingin thu apen: 
1Chronicles22:18 Pakai na Pathen'un na-umpiu hilou ham? Chule ningtina cholngahna napeh-u hilou ham? Ajehchu chuche gama chengho chu kakhutna eipeh ahitan ahi, chule agam chu Pakai le amipite masanga suhnema uma ahitai." 
1Chronicles22:19 Tun nalungthimu le nahinao chu Pakai na Pathen'u holnan neijun; hijeh chun kipatdoh-un, chule Pakai kitepna thingkhong le, Pathen um le bel thengho chu Pakai mina kisa ding insunga chu napohlut theina dingun Pakai Pathen muntheng sadoh-un, ati." 
1Chronicles23:1 Chuin David ahung teh-a akum ahung tamlheh phatnin, achapa Solomon chu Israel chunga leng dingin apansahtan ahi." 
1Chronicles23:2 Chule aman Israel pipuiho jouse chu thempuho le Levi ho toh akhomkhom soh keijin ahi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Tun Levi mite kum somthuma lhah achunglamse akisimin ahile: akisim dungjuijun mi pasal cheh sangsomthum le sangget alhinguve. 
1Chronicles23:4 Hicheho lah-a sangsomni le sangli hohi Pakai in kisah vetup ding ahiuvin; chule sanggupho chu milenho le thutan ho ahiuve. 
1Chronicles23:5 Chukalvalin sangli chu kotpi ngahho ahiuvin; chule sanglima chu Pakai vahchoi nadinga kasem manchah ho chu amanuva, Pakai chu avahchoi dingu ahi, tin David'in aseije." 
1Chronicles23:6 Chule David'in Levi chapate lah-a Gershon, Kohath chule Merari loi tin amaho chu aloi loijin akhenin ahi." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gershon mite-a kon Laadan le Shimei; 
1Chronicles23:8 Laadan chapate chu; apipen Jehiel ahin, Zetham, chule Joel, mi thum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:8 Laadan chapate chu; apipen Jehiel ahin, Zetham, chule Joel, mi thum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:9 Shimei chapate chu; Shelomith, Haziel, chule Haran, mi thum ahiuve. Hiche hohi Laadan pate insung pipui ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:10 Chule Shimei chapate chu; Jahath, Zina, Jeush, chule Beriah ahiuve. Hiche mili hohi Shimei chapate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:11 Chule Jahath chu apipen ahin, Zizah anina ahi: ahinla Jeush le Beriah'in chapa tampi anei lhonpoi; hijeh-a chu amahohi apu apateu insung dungjuija insung khatna kisim ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kohath chapate chu; Amram, Izhar, Hebron, chule Uzziel, mi li ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amram chapate chu; Aaron le Mosi ahi: Aaron vang chu amale achapate a-itih-a dinga thiltheng chung nungho chu sutheng dingle, Pakai anga gimnamtui halding, ama jending le, a-itih-a ama mina phatthei bohdinga khendoh ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:14 Tun Pathen mi Mosi thudol chu, achapate chu Levi phunga kiminvo ahitaove." 
1Chronicles23:15 Mosi chapateni chu Gershom le Eliezer ahilhone. 
1Chronicles23:16 Gershom chapate lah-a pipui chu Shebuel ahi. 
1Chronicles23:17 Chule Eliezer chapate lah-a pipui chu Rehabiah ahin, chule Eliezer'in chapa dang himhim aneipon, Rehabiah'in vang chapa tamtah aneije." 
1Chronicles23:18 Izhar chapate lah-a pipui chu Shelomith ahi. 
1Chronicles23:19 Hebron chapate lah-a kon; amasapen Jeriah ahin, anina Amariah, athumna Jahaziel chule alina Jekameam ahi." 
1Chronicles23:20 Uzziel chapate lah-a kon; amasapen Michah ahin, anina chu Jesiah ahi." 
1Chronicles23:21 Merari chapateni chu; Mahli le Mushi ahilhone. Chule Mahli chapateni chu; Eleazar le Kish ahilhone. 
1Chronicles23:22 Chuin Eliezar chu chapa neilouvin athitan, chanuho bou aneijin: amaho chu asopiteu Kish chapaten akichenpiuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Mushi chapate chu; Mahli, Eder chule Jeremoth, mi thum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:24 Hichehohi apu apateu insung dungjuija Levi chapate ahiuvin, a-insungu kisimna dungjuija kisimdoh, apu apateu lah-a pipui cheh, Pakai in'a kintheng bolna-a pang, kum somni-a lhah achunglamse ahiuve." 
1Chronicles23:25 Ajehchu David'in, Israel Pakai Pathen'in amite chu Jerusalem'a atonsotna achentheina dingun choldona apei, atin;" 
1Chronicles23:26 Chule Levi mite jah-a jong, Houbuh ahiloule kin bolna-a manchah dinga umle bel ho apohleu ngaitalou ding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles23:27 Ajehchu David thusei nukhahpenho dungjuija Levi mite chu kum somni apat achunglamse kisima ahiuve. 
1Chronicles23:28 Ajehchu atoh dingu chu, Pakai in lhacha natohna-a hongsungho le dansungho-a Aaron chapate kithopi ding, thil thengho jouse sutheng ding, chule Pathen in'a lhacha natoh toh ding;" 
1Chronicles23:29 Vetsah changlhah le anneh thilpeh ding changbong nel chung, cholsolou changlhah phengho chung, khangbela agoa kikangmin chule thaova kikangmin chung, chule atam alhom alet aneo chunga mopoh ding," 
1Chronicles23:30 Chule jingkah nilhah seh-a, Pakai thangvah le vahchoina la sadinga dingding," 
1Chronicles23:31 Chule cholngah nikhoho, lhathah nikho ho, chule kut kitep nikho ho-a chu amaho tohding thu kipeh dungjuija, mijat chun Pakai henga govam thilto jouse, Pakai masanga abol jingjeng ding;" 
1Chronicles23:32 Chule Pakai in'a kintheng bolna-a asopiteu Aaron chapate akithopi ding, chule munthengle mipi Houkhom ho Houbuh vetupma pangding chu ahi." 
1Chronicles24:1 Tun hichehi Aaron chapate kihop khen dan chu hiche hi ahin. Aaron chapate chu; Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, chule Ithamar ahiuve." 
1Chronicles24:2 Ahinla Nadab le Abihu chu apao sangin athimasa lhonin, cha anei lhonpoi: hijeh chun Eleazar le Ithamar'in thempu natoh atong lhontan ahi." 
1Chronicles24:3 Chule David'in Eleazer chapate lah-a Zadok, chule Ithamar chapate lah-a Ahimelech chu alhacha natoh naova atoh dingu ahop peh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ithamar chapate lah-a sangin Eleazer chapate lah-a pipui atamjon, hijeh chun amaho chu akihom khen ahi. Apu apateu insung dungjuijin Eleazer chapate lah-a pipui somlegup aumin, chule apu apateu insung dungjuijin Ithamar chapate lah-a pipui get aumuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles24:5 Hitichun vang vetna konin amaho loikhat le loikhat chu ahomtoh uvin ahi; ajehchu muntheng vetup le Pathen in vetup hochu Eleazer chapate le Ithamar chapate ahigelun ahi. 
1Chronicles24:6 Chule Levi miho lah-a khat, lekhasun Nathaneel chapa Shemaiah chun aminhou chu lengpa le milenho, thempu Zadok le Abiathar chapa Ahimelech angsung, chule thempuho le Levi ho apu apateu insunga apipen cheh angsunga chun asunlut tan: apu apateu insunga abulpen dingin Eleazer dingin mi khat, Ithamar dingin mi khat akilan ahi." 
1Chronicles24:7 Tun, vang masapen chu Jehoiarib chungah achun, anina Jedaiah chungah," 
1Chronicles24:8 Athumna Harim chungah, alina Saorim chungah," 
1Chronicles24:9 Angana Malchijah chungah, agupna Mijamin chungah," 
1Chronicles24:10 Asagina Hakkoz chungah, agetna Abijah chungah," 
1Chronicles24:11 Akona Jesuah chungah, asomna Shechaniah chungah," 
1Chronicles24:12 Asomle khatna Eliashib chungah, asomle nina Jakim chungah," 
1Chronicles24:13 Asomle thumna Huppah chungah, asomle lina Jeshebeab chungah," 
1Chronicles24:14 Asomle ngana Bilgah chungah, asomle gupna Immer chungah," 
1Chronicles24:15 Asomle sagina Hezir chungah, asomle getna Aphses chungah," 
1Chronicles24:16 Asomle kona Pethahiah chungah, asomnina Jehezekel chungah," 
1Chronicles24:17 Asomnile khatna Jachin chungah, asomnile nina Gamul chungah," 
1Chronicles24:18 Asomnile thumna Delaiah chungah, asomnile lina Maaziah chungah achun ahi." 
1Chronicles24:19 Hiche hi Pakai Israel Pathen'in apau Aaron ana thupeh dungjuija, anoija atoh ding danu, Pakai insunga ahunglut uva alhacha natoh dingu kihop khen dan chu ahi." 
1Chronicles24:20 Chule Levi chapate amohse chu hichehohi ahiuve: Amram chapate lah-a kon, Shubael; Shubael chapate lah-a kon, Jehdeiah." 
1Chronicles24:21 Rehabiah chungchang chu: Rehabiah chapate lah-a kon, amasapen Isshiah ahi." 
1Chronicles24:22 Izhar mite lah-a kon, Shelomoth: Shelomoth chapate lah-a kon, Jahath." 
1Chronicles24:23 Chule Hebron chapate chu: akhatna Jeriah, anina Amariah, athumna Jahaziel, alina Jekameam ahi." 
1Chronicles24:24 Uzziel chapate lah-a kon, Michah; Michah chapate lah-a kon, Shamir ahi." 
1Chronicles24:25 Michah sopipa chu Isshiah ahin: Isshiah chapate lah-a kon, Zekeriah ahi." 
1Chronicles24:26 Merari chapateni chu Mahli le Mushi ahilhone; Jaaziah chapa chu Beno ahi. 
1Chronicles24:27 Merari chapate Jaaziah' akon chu Beno, Shoham, Zaccur chule Ibri ahiuve." 
1Chronicles24:28 Mahli'a konin Eleazar apengin, aman chapa aneipoi." 
1Chronicles24:29 Kish chungchang chu: Kish chapa chu Jerahmeel ahi. 
1Chronicles24:30 Chujongle Mushi chapate chu; Mahli, Eder chule Jerimoth ahiuve. Hitehohi apu apateu insung dungjuija Levi ho chate ahiuve." 
1Chronicles24:31 Amahohin hitima chun asopiteu Aaron chapate bangin lengpa David, Zadok, Ahimelech chule thempuho le Levi ho insunga apu apateu lah-a pipui cheh angsunga chun vang aveovin ahi. Insung pate pipuiho chun asopiu neojoho bolbang bang chun aboltauve." 
1Chronicles25:1 Chukitle David le asepai janel lamkai hon, lhachana tong dingin Asaph chapate, Heman chapate, chule Jeduthun chapate lah-a konin phabep achomkhenun; amaho chun selangdah, tumging, chule thih khutbeh toh tho-a gaothu aseidingu ahi. Chule chutobanga tongding ho mijat chu:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Asaph chapate lah-a konin: Zaccur, Joseph, Nethaniah, chule Asarelah ahiuve, achapate sehi Asaphmin alamkaijin lengpa thupeh dungjuijin gaothu aseijuve." 
1Chronicles25:3 Jeduthun'a kon: Jeduthun chapate chu, Gedaliah, Zeri, Jeshaiah, Hashabiah chule Mattithiah, mi gup ahiuvin; apau Jeduthun tumgingtoh tho gaothusei khutnoija Pakai loupisah dingle vahchoi ding ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:4 Heman'a kon: Heman chapate chu: Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel, Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti chule Romamti-ezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir chule Mahazioth." 
1Chronicles25:5 Hiteho jousehi Pathen thu dungjuija saki mutding lengpa mitvahnei themgao Heman chapate ahiuve. Chule Pathen'in Heman chu chapa somleli le chanu thum apen ahi. 
1Chronicles25:6 Hicheho jousehi lengpan Asaph, Jaduthun chule Heman athupeh dungjuija apau khut noija, Pakai in'a thih khutbeh le, chule selangdah tho-a Pathen in'a kintheng kibolna-a kimang cha-a lasa loi ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:7 Hitichun amaho amijatnu chu, asopihou Pakai la ho kihil themsa cheh pumin mi jani leh somget le get ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:8 Chule atohding chanu chu akibah cheh nadingin, alen jong aneo jong, mihil jong jillai jong abonchauvin vang aveovin ahi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Tun vang masa chu Asaph chapa Joseph chungah achun: anina chu Gedaliah chungah achun, amale asopite chule achapate somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:10 Athumna chu Zaccur chungah achun, amale achapate, chule asopite somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:11 Alina chu Izri chungah achun, amale achapate chule asopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:12 Angana chu Nethaniah chunga achun, amale achapate chule asopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:13 Agupna chu Bukkiah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:14 Asagina chu Jesharelah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:15 Agetna chu Jeshaiah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:16 Akona chu Mattaniah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:17 Asomna chu Shimei chungah achun, amale achapate chule asopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:18 Asomle khatna chu Azareel chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:19 Asomle nina chu Hashabiah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:20 Asomle thumna chu Shubael chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:21 Asomle lina chu Mattithiah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:22 Asomle ngana chu Jeremoth chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:23 Asomle gupna chu Hananiah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:24 Asomle sagina chu Joshbekashah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:25 Asomle getna chu Hanani chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:26 Asomle kona chu Mallothi chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:27 Asomnina chu Eliathah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:28 Asomnile khatna chu Hothir chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:29 Asomnile nina chu Eliathah chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:30 Asomnile thumna chu Mahazioth chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles25:31 Asomnile lina chu Romamti-ezer chungah achun, amale achapate chule sopite mi somleni ahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:1 Kotngah ho kihopdan thudol: Kor mite-a kon Asaph chapate lah-a Kore chapa Meshelemiah ahi. 
1Chronicles26:2 Chule Meshelemiah chapate chu; apeng masapen Zechariah ahin, anina Jediael, athumna Zebadiah, alina Jathniel," 
1Chronicles26:2 Chule Meshelemiah chapate chu; apeng masapen Zechariah ahin, anina Jediael, athumna Zebadiah, alina Jathniel," 
1Chronicles26:3 Angana Elam, agupna Jehohanan, asagina Elioenai ahi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Chukitle Obed-edom chapate chu; apeng masapen Shemiah ahin, anina Jehozabad, athumna Joah, alina Sacar chule angana Nethaneel," 
1Chronicles26:5 Agupna Ammiel, asagina Issachar, agetna Peullethai ahi; ajehchu Pathen'in ama phatthei aboh-e." 
1Chronicles26:6 Chujongle achapa Shemaiah'a konin chapate, apateu insunga vaipoho apenguve; ajehchu amaho chu mihat hangsan ngen anahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:7 Shemiah chapate chu; Othni, Rephael, Obed, chule Elzabad ahin, asopiteniu Elihu le Samachiah chu mihat ahilhone." 
1Chronicles26:8 Hicheho jousehi Obed-edom chapate ahiuvin; amahole achapateu chule asopiteu jouse kinbolna dinga mibulhing cheh chu, Obed-edom kon mi somgup le mini ahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:9 Chule Meshelemiah chun chapa le sopi mihat cheh somleget aneijin ahi. 
1Chronicles26:10 Merari chate lah-a Hosah'in jong chapate ahingin, Simri chu apipen (apeng masapen ahilou vangin ama chu apan apipui penin anasemin) ahi." 
1Chronicles26:11 Anina Hilkiah, athumna Tebaliah, alina Zekeriah ahin, Hosah chapate le asopite jouse chu somlethum ahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:12 Hicheho lah-a amaho loihi apipuiho lah jenga jong Pakai in'a natong dinga chan neija, houin kot ngah dinga kihom khen ahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:13 Amahon alen aneo abonin, apateu insung dungjui cheh-in, kotphung jouse-a dingin vang asang uve." 
1Chronicles26:14 Chuin nisolama dinga vang chu Shelemiah chunga achutai. Chujouvin thumopthem milungching chapa Zechariah dinga vang asanuva ahile sahlam sanga din alhatai. 
1Chronicles26:14 Chuin nisolama dinga vang chu Shelemiah chunga achutai. Chujouvin thumopthem milungching chapa Zechariah dinga vang asanuva ahile sahlam sanga din alhatai. 
1Chronicles26:15 Obed-edom dingin lhanglam alhan, achapatea dingin thil koikhomna mun alhai." 
1Chronicles26:16 Shuppim le Hosah dinga vang kisan chu lhumlam, khonga nale khongahna kikah lampi kaltouna-a um Shallecheth toh ahi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Niso lamah Levi mi migup aumun, sahlama nikhat in mi li aumin, lhang lamah nikhat in mi lima aumin, chule thil koikhomna mun'a mi nini aumin ahi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Lhumlam inhongsung lutna song lampia mi li, chule inhongsungah mi ni." 
1Chronicles26:19 Hichehohi Kore chapate lah le Merari chapate lah-a kotngah ho kihop khen dan chu ahi. 
1Chronicles26:20 Chule Levi ho lah-a Ahijah chu Pathen in'a gouthilho le thilthengho chunga vaihom ahi. 
1Chronicles26:21 Laadan chapate chungchang ahile, Laadan chu Gershon chapate lah-a khat, apu apate insunga aluchang ahin, Laadan chate lah-a chu Jehieli ahi." 
1Chronicles26:22 Jehieli chapate; Zetham le asopipa Joel chu Pakai in'a gouho chunga ahiuve. 
1Chronicles26:22 Jehieli chapate; Zetham le asopipa Joel chu Pakai in'a gouho chunga ahiuve. 
1Chronicles26:23 Amram mite, Izhar mite, Hebron mite chule Uzziel mite lah-a;" 
1Chronicles26:24 Mosi chapa Gershom chapa Shebuel chu gouho chunga vaipo ahiuve. 
1Chronicles26:25 Chule Eliezer'a kona asopite chu: achapa Rehabiah ahin, Rehabiah chapa chu Jeshaiah ahin, Jeshaiah chapa chu Joram ahin, Joram chapa chu Zichri ahin, chule Zichri chapa chu Shelomith ahi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Hiche Shelomith le asopite hi David lengpa le insung pateho luchang, sepai sang lamkaiho ja lamkaiho, chule sepai janel gal lamkai hon atodoh-u gouho chunga vaipo ahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kidouna munho-a thil kichom phabep chu Pakai in'a manchah dingin atohdoh jiuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles26:28 Chule mitvahneipa Samuel, Kish chapa Saul, Ner chapa Abner, chule Zeruiah chapa Joab tehon atodoh jouseu chule koihile ato channu chu Shelomith le asopite khutnoija um ahi." 
1Chronicles26:29 Izhar mite lah-a kon Chenaniah le achapate chu Israel chunga polam kin mopo ahiuvin, milenle thutan ahiuve." 
1Chronicles26:30 Chule Hebron mi Hashabiah le asopite mihangsan cheh mi sangkhat le jasagi ho chu Jordan vadung lhumlama vaipole vetupmin apangun, chule Pakai kin bol le lengpa natong ahiuvin ahi." 
1Chronicles26:31 Hebron mite lah-a Jerijah chu apu apateu khanggui dungjuijn Hebron mite lah-a apipu pen ahi. David kum somli alengchan kum-in amaho chu akholuvin ahile, Gilead gam Jazer kho-a alah uva mihat hangsanho chu phabep amudoh-un ahi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Chule asopite chu mihangsan le pipui cheh mi sangni le jasagi ahiuvin, amaho chu David lengpan Reuben mite, Gad mite, chule Manasseh phung kehkhat chunga, Pathen lam thil tintang le, lengpa kinbolna-a, vaipo-a apansah-u ahi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Tun Israel chate amijatnu chu, apipui cheh, pate pipuiho le sepai sangkhat lamkaihole ja lamkaiho, chule akihop dungjuija lamjouse-a lengpa natong kum lhung keija alha alha-a ahung lhungle apotdoh jing jengho chu mi sangsomni le sangli ahiuve." 
1Chronicles27:2 Aphat kihop dungjuija alha masapena lamkai chu Zabdiel chapa Jashobeam ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:3 Ama chu Perez chate lah-a apipui pentah, alha masapena sepai janel jouse lamkai pen ahi." 
1Chronicles27:4 Chule alhani channa loi lamkai chu Ahoh mi Dodai ahin, aloi lah-a chun Mikloth jong vaipo khat ahin, ama hon lah-a jong chun mi sangsomni le sangli ma aumui." 
1Chronicles27:5 Alhathum channa sepai janel jalamkai thumchanna chu thempu pipui khat Jehoiada chapa Benaiah ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:6 Hiche Benaiah hi ahi mihat somthum lah-a panga, chule somthum lah-a achungnung pen chu: ama loija chun achapa Ammizabad apange." 
1Chronicles27:7 Alha lina-a gallamkai lina chu Joab sopipa Asahel ahin, chule ama bana achapa Zebadiah ahi; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui." 
1Chronicles27:8 Alha ngana-a gallamkai ngana chu Izrah mi Shamhuth ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:9 Alha gupna-a sepai jalamkai gupna chu Teko mi Ikkesh chapa Ira ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:10 Alha sagina-a gallamkai sagina chu Ephraim chate lah-a Pelon mi Helez ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:11 Alha getna-a gallamkai getna chu Zarh mite lah-a Husath mi Sibbecai ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:12 Alha kona-a gallamkai ko nachu Benjamin mite lah-a Anetoth mi Abiezer ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:13 Alha somna-a gallamkai somna chu Zarh mite lah-a Netophah mi Maharai ahi; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:14 Alha somle khatna-a gallamkai somlekhatna chu Ephraim chate lah-a Pirathon mi Benaiah ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:15 Alha somleni na-a gallamkai somlenina chu Othniel chate lah-a Netophah mi Heldai ahin; ama loi lah-a chun mi sangsomni le sangli aumui. 
1Chronicles27:16 Chukalvalin Israel phungho chunga: Reuben mite chunga vaipo chu Zichri chapa Eliezer ahin; Simeon mite lah-a, Maachah chapa Shephatiah ahin," 
1Chronicles27:17 Levi mite lah-a, Kemuel chapa Hashabiah ahin; Aaron mite lah-a Zadok ahin:" 
1Chronicles27:18 Judah mite lah-a, David sopite khat Elihu ahin; Issachar mite lah-a, Michael chapa Omri ahin:" 
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun mite lah-a, Obadiah chapa Ishmaiah ahin; Naphtali mite lah-a Azriel chapa Jerimoth ahin:" 
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun mite lah-a, Obadiah chapa Ishmaiah ahin; Naphtali mite lah-a Azriel chapa Jerimoth ahin:" 
1Chronicles27:20 Ephraim chate lah-a, Azaziah chapa Hoshea ahin; Manasseh phung kehkhat lah-a, Pedaiah chapa Joel ahin;" 
1Chronicles27:20 Ephraim chate lah-a, Azaziah chapa Hoshea ahin; Manasseh phung kehkhat lah-a, Pedaiah chapa Joel ahin;" 
1Chronicles27:21 Manasseh phung kehkhat lah-a Gilead'a Zekeriah chapa Iddo ahin; Benjamin phung lah-a, Abner chapa Jaasiel ahin:" 
1Chronicles27:22 Dan mite lah-a, Jeroham chapa Azareel ahin. Hichehohi Israel phung sunga pipuiho ahiuve." 
1Chronicles27:23 Ahivangin David'in kum somni-a pat anoilamse chu ajat anasim thapoi: ajehchu Pakaiyin Israelte chu van'a ahsi ho banga apunsah ding ahi tia anaseisa ahi. 
1Chronicles27:24 Zeruiah chapa Joab'in ana simpantan, ahinla ana simjou manpoi,;ajehchu Israelte chungah lunghanna achutan, David lengpa thusimbua jong ajat akisut tha tapoi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Chule lengpa gouho chunga vaipo chu, Adiel chapa Azmaveth ahin; chule loujaoho-a le khopiho-a, kho neoho le kul sangho-a thilkeo koikhomnaho chunga vaipo chu Uzziah chapa Jonathan ahi." 
1Chronicles27:26 Chule loujaova loukaija pangho jouse chunga vaipo chu Chelub chapa Ezri ahi: 
1Chronicles27:27 Chule Lengpilei ho chunga vaipo chu Ramath mi Shimei ahin; lengpitwija dinga lengpigaho chunga vaipo chu Shiph mi Zabdi ahi: 
1Chronicles27:28 Chule phaicham munnem ho-a Olive thingho le theichang thingho chunga vaipo chu Geder mi Baal-hanan ahin; chule thao kholkhomnaho chunga vaipo chu Joash ahi. 
1Chronicles27:29 Chule Sharon'a kivah ganchahon ho chunga vaipo chu Sharon mi Shitrai ahin; chule phaichama ganchahon ho chunga vaipo chu Adlai chapa Shaphat ahi. 
1Chronicles27:30 Sangongsang ho vetup chu Ishmael mi Obil ahin; chule sanganho vetup chu Meronoth mi Jehdeiah ahi. 
1Chronicles27:31 Chule kelngoihon vetup chu Hager mi Jaziz ahi. Hicheho jousehi David lengpa neichunga vaihomho ahiuve. 
1Chronicles27:32 Chule David pangah Jonathan chu thumop ahin, michingtah chule lekhasun ahi: chule Hachmoni chapa Jehiel chu lengpa chapate toh umkhom ahi." 
1Chronicles27:33 Chule Ahithophel chu lengpa thumop ahin, Arch mi Hushai chu lengpa kiloipi ahi." 
1Chronicles27:34 Chule Ahithophel bana chu Benaiah chapa Jehoiada le Abiathar ahilhonin, chule lengpa Galsat ho gallamkai lenpen chu Joab ahi." 
1Chronicles28:1 Chuin David'in Israel pipuiho jouse, phung pipuiho, chule aphat kihop dungjuija lengpa nehle chah sutupma pang loi lamkaiho, asang sang chunga lamkaiho, aja aja chunga ja lamkaiho, chule lengpa neile gou jouse vetupma pang neiching ho, achapate le milen milal ho jouse, chule mihangsan ho jouse chu Jerusalem'a akoukhom sohkeijin ahi." 
1Chronicles28:2 Chuin David lengpa chu adingdoh-in, Kasopite le kamiteho, kathuseihi ngaijuvin, keiman Pakai kitepna thingkhong kicholdona ding le, i-Pathen'u kengto ngapna ding in sah ding kalungin kana ngaiton, in sahna ding jong kagongtoh soh hel tan ahi." 
1Chronicles28:3 Ahinla Pathen'in kajah-a, Nangman kamin dingin in nasah louding ahi, ajehchu nangma galsat mi nahin, thisanso mi nahije, ati." 
1Chronicles28:4 Hijeng jongle Israel Pakai Pathen'in kapa insung jouse lah-a atonsotna Israel leng hidingin eina lhengtan ahi; ajehchu aman Judah phunga kapa insung alhengin, chule kapa chapate lah-a konin Israel jouse chunga leng hidingin keima eina deilhentai." 
1Chronicles28:5 Chule kachapate jouse lah-a jong, (ajehchu Pakaiyin chapa tamtah einapen,) Israelte chunga Pakai leng laltouna-a tou dingin kachapa Solomon hi alhengtan ahi." 
1Chronicles28:6 Chule aman kajah-a, Nachapa Solomon, aman ka in le kahong sungho asah ding ahi; ajehchu amachu kachapa dinga kalhendoh ahitan, keima apa kahi ding ahi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Chujongle aman kathupeh ho le kathutan lhahho chu tunia banga hi anit jinga ahile, ama lenggam chu atonsotna dinga kasemdoh ding ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles28:8 Hijeh chun tun, Pakai mipi ho Israel jouse mitmule, Pathen jah tah-a kasei ahi, Pakai na Pathen'u thupeh ho jouse chu holunlang nitnun; chutile hiche gampha hi nalouva, nangho nunga nachateo goulo ding a-imatih chana dinga nadalhah peh thei dingu ahi." 
1Chronicles28:9 Chule nangma, kachapa Solomon, nangman napa Pathen hi hejingin lang, lungsung chamkimkei le lungthim thanom tah-in jenin; ajehchu Pakaiyin lungsung jouse akholin, lungsunga lunggel ho jouse jong ahesoh keije. Ama nahola ahile namu ding: amavang amachu nadalhah-a ahile, aman atonsotna dinga nanotthap ding ahi." 
1Chronicles28:10 Tun chingtheijin, ajehchu Pakaiyin muntheng sadinga nalhendoh ahitai: hatninlang hichu tongin, ati." 
1Chronicles28:11 Chuin David'in achapa Solomon chu hongcha lim, in lim, asumkholna in lim, inchungdan lim, indan sungnung lim, chule hepi touna mun lim kigongho chu apen," 
1Chronicles28:12 Chule lhagaova kona agontoh lim jouse, Pakai in hongsung, chule akimvela indanho jouse, Pathen in'a goukhol khomna, chule akikatdoh thilho kholkhom lim chu apen;" 
1Chronicles28:13 Chujongle thempuho le Levi mite aloi aloija aumna dingu mun limho, Pakai in'a kinbolna ding jouse limho, chule Pakai in'a kinbolna-a kimangcha ding um le bel limho jong," 
1Chronicles28:14 Kinbolna-a sana kimang ding jouse chu sana-a kisem din atedohpeh-in apen, kinbolna-a dangka kimang ding jouse jong chu akin jatna manchah dingin dangka atedohpeh-in;" 
1Chronicles28:15 Sana meivah ho geijin, sana meivah khom ho ding, sana-a kisem meivah ho takip ding: chule dangka meivah ho ding jong atepeh cheh-in, meivah dingle ameivahkhom dingin jong, ameivah dungjuijin atedohpeh cheh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles28:16 Chule vetsahna changlhah dokhangho semna ding le dokhang jouse-a dingin sana ape-in; chule chutima chun dangka dokhangho semna ding dangka agih tesan apen ahi. 
1Chronicles28:17 Chujongle satul kaho ding, lhengkong ho ding, khonho dingin sana thengsel atepeh-in; chule sana kongdal ding ho-a dingin, sana kongdal khatcheh dingin sana tesan apen; chutobangma chun dangka kongdal khat khat ding jong dangka tesan apecheh-in ahi." 
1Chronicles28:18 Chule gimnamtui maicham ding sana kilha thengsel, chule Pakai kitepna thingkhong khukhum na-a alha jah Cherub kangtalai dingin sana apen ahi." 
1Chronicles28:19 David'in, Hicheho jousehi Pakaiyin ama khutna kachunga suttho-a, nakitoh dingdan lim jouse hi eihetsah ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles28:20 Chule David'in achapa Solomon jah-a, Hatninlang hangsanin, chule hichu tongin; kicha hih-in, chule lung jong lungthoi hih-in; ajehchu Pakai Pathen, ka Pathen ngeichun naumpi ding; aman nalosam sah louding, Pakai in kinbolna natohho jouse nachaidoh kahse-a da jong nadalhah lou ding ahi." 
1Chronicles28:21 Chule ven, aloi aloija kihomtoh thempuho le Levi mite chun Pathen in'a kin kibolna jouse-a dinga naumpi jing dingu ahin; chule ipi kinbolna hijengjongle natohna jouse-a thanom tah natong themgil mihon naumpi dingu: chujongle pipuiho le mipi ho jouse chu nathupeh-a umdiu ahi, ati." 
1Chronicles29:1 Chukit jongle leng David'in mipi ho jouse jah-a chun, Pathen bouvin alhendoh kachapa Solomon hi achapang nalaijin ima ahenaipon, anatoh ding hila alen lheh jengin ahi. Ajehchu hiche leng inpihi mihem'a ding ahipon, Pakai Pathen'a ding ahi." 
1Chronicles29:2 Tun kahatna jousen ka Pathen in dingin sana-a kisem thilho dingin sana, chule dangka-a kisem thilho dingin dangka, chule sum-enga kisem thilho ding sum-eng, chule thih-a kisem thilho dingin thih, chule thinga kisem thilho dingin thing: Song engdang songho, setding songho, avahthei songho, ajem chomchom le song mantam jat chomchom, chule songkang atama tam kagotan ahi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Chukalvalin, ka Pathen in kangailut behseh jal-in, hiche in theng dinga kagot ho chungvumin jong, keima tuma dinga kanei sana le dangka jong ka Pathen in dingin kapen ahi." 
1Chronicles29:4 Abangho jephoina dingin Ophir sana, sana talent sangthum, chule dangka thengsel talent sangsagi;" 
1Chronicles29:5 Amanchahna ding jat chomchoma natong themhon amanchah dingun, sana thil manchahna dinga manchah dingin sana, chule dangka manchahna dinga dangka kapen ahi. Ahile tunia Pakaiya natohna-a dinga kiphal tah-a kipenom koi umem? ati." 
1Chronicles29:6 Hitichun apu apateu pipuiho, chule Israel phungho lah-a pipuiho, chule sangkhat chungle jakhat chunga lamkaiho chun lengpa natohna-a vaipo sese toh kiphal tah-in," 
1Chronicles29:7 Chuin Pathen in sahna dingin sana talent sangnga le dram sangsom, chule dangka talent sangsom, chule sum-eng talent sangsom le sangget, chule thih talent sangjakhat apeuvin ahi."
