1Chronicles29:8 Chule song mantam neiho chun Gershon mi Jehiel khutna Pakai in gouthil kholkhom na-a dingin apeuvin ahi. 
1Chronicles29:9 Hitichun mipi ho chu Pakai dinga alung pumpiuva kiphal tah-a thil apehjeh-u chun athanom lheh jengun, chule leng David jong kipa mainah-in akipahpon ahi." 
1Chronicles29:10 Hijeh chun houkhom ho jouse masang-ah David'in Pakai chu avahchoijin: chule David'in hitin aseije, Kapu kapau Israel Pakai Pathen, nangma atonsot atonsotnin nunnom jingin." 
1Chronicles29:11 Vo Pakai, letna, thaneina, loupina, galjona, choi-atna jouse nanga ahi: ajehchu van'a le leija thil jousehi nangma-a ahin, Vo Pakai lenggam chu nangma-a ahin, ijakai chungvuma aluchang hidinga choisang nahi." 
1Chronicles29:12 Haonale jana agoma nanga hungkon ahin, chule nangma ijakai chungvuma vaihom nahi; chule nakhutna thilbol theinale thahat aumin; chule nakhutna mijouse dinga loupisah nading le thahat pehtheina aume." 
1Chronicles29:13 Hijeh chun tun, ka-Pathen'u, nangma kathangvah-un, namin loupi kavahchoi juve." 
1Chronicles29:14 Hijongle keimahi koi kahia, ka mipite jonghi ipi hiuva, hitobang khopma kiphal tah-a kapeh theiju hija ham? Ajehchu thil jousehi nanga hungkon ahin, chule nangma-a mama chu kahin lepeh kitnu ahibouve." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ajehchu keiho hi nangma angsunga kapu kapatehou jouse banga maljin le khopem bou kahiu ahi: chule leiset chunga kahinkhouhi le-lim tobang bou ahin, aumden ding imacha aumpoi." 
1Chronicles29:16 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, namin theng dinga in kasahpehna diuva, kakigot nao hiche thil hijatpi hi nangma khutna kon bou ahin, abonchan nangma-a ahi." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ka Pathen, nangman lungsunghi napatep jin, chondihna chunga nalunglhaije tijong kahei. Keijong kalungsung chondih na-in thilho jousehi hongphal tah-in nangma kanapetan: tun kipah tah-in namite hilaija umho hin kiphal tah-a nahenga athilpehhou kamutan ahi." 
1Chronicles29:18 Vo Pakai, kapu kapateu Abraham, Isaac chule Israel Pathen, hitobang lunggel hi namite lungthima a-itih-a aumjing theina dingin koijingin lang, nangman alungsungu gongtoh-in." 
1Chronicles29:19 Chule kachapa Solomon hin nathupeh ho, nathu hettohsah ho, nachon danho anitna, hicheho jousehi abolna ding le, chule kana ngaito in loupi hi asahthei nadingin lungsung phachamkim hinpen, ati." 
1Chronicles29:20 Chuin David'in mipi ho jouse jah-a, Tun Pakai na Pathen'u chu vahchoijun, ati. Chuin mipi ho jouse chun apu apateu Pakai Pathen chu avahchoijun, chule akunun, Pakai le lengpa chu chibai aboh-un ahi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Chuin chuche nikho jou ajingin Pakai hengah ganlhaina asemun, chule Pakai henga govam thilto din bongchal sangkhat le kelngoichal sangkhat, chule kelngoinou sangkhat toh, donding thiltoho toh Israel pumpi dingin ganlhaina tampitah asemun ahi." 
1Chronicles29:22 Chule hiche nikho chun kipah thanom tah-in Pakai angsunga chun aneuvin adontauvin ahi. Chule amahon David chapa Solomon chu anivei channa-in leng dingin asemkitnun, chule Pakai henga vaipo pipuipen hidingin thao anuvin, chule Zadok chu thempun asemun ahi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Hitichun Solomon chu apa David khelin Pakai laltouna-a chun lengin atoutan, chule akhangtouvin; chule Israelte jousen athu angaijun ahi." 
1Chronicles29:24 Chule pipuiho jouse, mihangsan jouse, chule Leng David chapaho jouse jongchu leng Solomon henga chun akipelut taovin ahi." 
1Chronicles29:25 Chule Pakaiyin Israel jouse mitmun Solomon chu nasatah-in achoisangin, chule Israel gamsunga ama masanga leng khatchan jong aneikhah louvu leng hina loupina achansah tai." 
1Chronicles29:26 Hitichun Jesse chapa David chu Israel jouse chunga chun lengvai apon ahi. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ama Israel chunga alengchan sungchu kum somli ahin, Hebron'a kum sagi aleng changin, chule Jerusalem'a kum somthumle kumthum aleng changin ahi." 
1Chronicles29:28 Chuin ama upatah le tehkem keijin, chule haotah le jabol changpumin athitan ahi; chule ama khelin achapa Solomon chu alengchang tan ahi." 
1Chronicles29:29 Tun, David lengpa natohho abula patna achaina gei chu, veuvin, mitvahnei Samuel lekhabu le Nathan themgao lekhabu, chule mitvahneipa Gad lekhabu ho-a akisunsoh keijin," 
1Chronicles29:30 Alengvai poh thu jouse le athahatje, chule ama chungle Israel chung, chule gamjousea lenggam jouse-a thilsoh jouse chu achongsoh keijin ahi." 
2Chronicles1:1 Chuin David chapa Solomon chu alenggama chun hatah-in akisuhat tan, Pakai a-Pathen'in aumpin, nasatah-in achoisang tai." 
2Chronicles1:2 Chuin Solomon'in Israelte jouse, sepai sang lamkaiho, ja lamkaiho, thutan ho, Israel pumpi sunga gamvaipo jouse, phung upaho henga thu aseije." 
2Chronicles1:3 Hitichun Solomon chule aumpi houkhom ho jouse chu Gibeon'a um munsanga chun acheuvin ahi; ajehchu hia chu Pakai soh Mosi'n gamthipma anasem Pathen houkhom ho Houbuh chu uma ahi. 
2Chronicles1:4 Ahinla Pathen thingkhong chu David'in Kirjath-jearim'a konin akoina dinga asemna chun apotou tan ahi; ajehchu hiche dinga chu Jerusalem'a ponbuh khat anasonsa ahitai. 
2Chronicles1:5 Chukalvalin Hur chapa, Uri chapa, Bezaleel in'a anasem sum-eng maicham chu Pakai houbuh maija chu akoi ahin; Solomon le houkhom ho chun hichu aholun ahi." 
2Chronicles1:6 Chuin Pakai angsunga um sum-eng maicham phunga chun Solomon achetouvin, hichu houkhom ho Houbuh-a uma ahin, achunga chun govam thilto sangkhat jen atoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles1:7 Hiche janchun Solomon henga Pathen akilah-in, ahenga, Thumin, ipi kapeh ding ham, ati." 
2Chronicles1:8 Chuin Solomon'in Pathen henga, Nangman kapa David henga hepina lentah namusah-in, ama khelin keima neilengchan sahtai." 
2Chronicles1:9 Tuhin, vo Pakai Pathen, kapa David henga nathutep chu guilhun sahtan: ajehchu leivuibanga tam miho chunga hi lenga neitun ahitai." 
2Chronicles1:10 Hiche miho anga kavaikon kavailhun theinadin, chihna le hetna neipen; ajehchu hibangse-a tam nam mite hi kon thu atanjou dingham? atin ahi." 
2Chronicles1:11 Chuin Pathen'in Solomon jah-a, Hiche lungthimhi navopma, haona, neile gou, jabolna, namelmate hinkho, ahiloule nangma hinkho sotna jong thumlouva; achunguva lenga kapansah kamite thu natan theina dinga, chihna le hetna naki thumjoh jeh-in:" 
2Chronicles1:12 Chihna le hetna chu kapeh nahitan; chule nangma masanga anaum lengho khatchan jong ananei khahlou, nanunga honjong aneikhah loudiu haona, neile gou, chule jabolna jong kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
2Chronicles1:13 Chujouvin Solomon chu Gibeon'a um munsanga, houkhom ho houbuh masang akholjina-a konin Jerusalem'a ahungin, Israelte chunga vai ahomtan ahi." 
2Chronicles1:14 Chuin Solomon'in kangtalai ho le sakol chung touho akhomin: aman kangtalai sangkhat le jani, chule sakol chunga tou mi sangsom le sangni aneijin, hicheho chu sakol kangtalai khopiho-a le lengpa umna Jerusalem'a akoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles1:15 Chule Jerusalem'a chun lengpan dangka le sana song bangkhopma nengin akoijin, chule cedar thing chu phaichama theiba thing tam bangkhopma neingin aum sah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Chule Solomon'in tupat kikheh ho chu Egypt'a konin sakol ho ahin toldoh sah-in; lengpa sumkol veihon tupat kikheh ho chu aman apeh uva akilahjiu ahi. 
2Chronicles1:17 Amahon kangtalai khat chu dangka shekel jagup din Egypt'a konin ahintoluvin; hitichun Hit miho lengte jouse dingle Syria lengho dingin sakolhochu amaho minin ahin toldoh jiuvin ahi. 
2Chronicles2:1 Chuin Solomon'in Pakai min dinga in khat le alenggama dinga in khat sah ding agel lhutai. 
2Chronicles2:2 Chuin Solomon'in pohgih poding mi sangsomsagi, molsanga song khengding mi sangget, chule avetupdiu mi sangthum le jagup alhengdoh tan ahi." 
2Chronicles2:3 Chuin Solomon'in Tyre lengpa Huram henga mi asolin, Kapa Davidn'in achenna ding in khat akisahna dinga cedar thing nathotna nabolna bangin keimatah jong neibolin." 
2Chronicles2:4 Vetan, choldo nikho, lhathah nikho, chule Pakai ka Pathen'u kutpi nikhoho le ama henga katdoh ding, amasanga gimnamtui halna ding, tanglouva vetsahna changlhah tona ding, chule jingkah nilhah-a govam thilpeh bolna dinga Pakai ka Pathen mina inkhat kasah ahi. Hichehi Israelte dinga a-itih-a houdan thupeh ahi." 
2Chronicles2:5 Chule ka-in sahhi lentah ahin; ka Pathen'u hi pathenho jouse sanga lenjo ahi. 
2Chronicles2:6 Ahinla vanle vanho van jengin jong ama adoljoulou ahin, kon ama dinga in asahpeh jou dingham? Ama anga ganlhaina kago tailou, kei koi kahia ama dinga in kasahpeh thei dingham?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Hijeh chun tun kapa David'in anamanchahsa Judah le Jerusalem'a kaumpi natongthem hotoh tongkhom dingin, sana, dangka, sum-eng, thih, pon asandup, asanthip, adum ho jouse-a thepna nei mikhat neihin solpeh-in." 
2Chronicles2:8 Labanon'a konin cedar thing, chah thing, algum thingho jong neihin tolpeh-in; ajehchu nasohte chu Lebanon thing tuhdan athemuve ti kahei; chule vetan, keima sohten nangma sohte kithopiu vintin," 
2Chronicles2:9 Thing nengtah-a eigonpeh dingu ahi; ajehchu ka in sahgot hi kidangtah-a len hiding ahi. 
2Chronicles2:10 Chule, vetan, nasohte, thing phuh-a tanho chu suhlou chang kigoibong tena sangsomni, sakolchang tena sangsomni toh, lengpitwi tena sangsomni, chule thaotwi tena sangsomni kapeh ding ahi, tin mi agahsole." 
2Chronicles2:11 Chuphatnin Tyre lengpa Huram'in sut tho-in adonbutnin, Solomon athot tai; Pakaiyin amite angailut jeh-in, nangma achunguva lengin nasemtai." 
2Chronicles2:12 Achung chonin Huram'in aseiben, Van le lei sempa, Pakai dinga in khatle alenggam dinga in khat sathei dinga David dinga chihna le hetkhen themna nei chapa chingtah khat pepa Pakai Israel Pathen chu nunnom hen." 
2Chronicles2:13 Chule tun keiman kapate Huram mi, mithemnal, hetkhen themma nei mi khat kahin solpeh-e." 
2Chronicles2:14 Ama Dan chanute numei khat chapa, apachu Tyre mi ahin, sana-a, dangka-a, sum-enga, ponduma, tupat ponnema, ponsanthip lama themtah ahin; thiljem jouse khengthei, boldinga kigonpeh jouse boldohthei ahin, nangma khutthemho le kapu David napa khutthemho toh kithothei ahi." 
2Chronicles2:15 Hijeh chun tuhin ka pakaiyin anaseisa suhlou chang, sakolchang, thaotwi, lengpitwi chu asohte henga hinthot tahen;" 
2Chronicles2:16 Chule keihon Lebanon'a konin nangaichat dingjat jat chu phuh ungting; keihon nahenga Joppa geijin twipi chunga puma kahin toldiu, chule nanghon Jerusalem geija naki lhoh dingu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles2:17 Chuin Solomon'in apa David'in anasimsa bangin, gamsunga um gamdangmi jouse asimin; amaho chu sangjakhat le sangsomnga chule sangthum le jagup asimdoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles2:18 Chuin amaholah-a sangsomsagi chu thilgih poding, mi sangsomget chung molchunga song khengding, chule mi sangthum le jagup chu anatoh-u vetup dingin apansah tan ahi." 
2Chronicles3:1 Chujouvin Solomon'in Jerusalem'a um Moriah molsang, apa David henga Pakai kilahna mun, Jebus mi Ornan pholmun David'in anagona mun'a chun Pakai in chu asapantan ahi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Alengchan kum lina, alhani na, nini chan nin insah akipantan ahi." 
2Chronicles3:3 Tun hichehohi Pathen in kisah dingdan Solomon anakihil chu ahi. Adunglam chu tena masa dungjuijin tong somgup ahin, avaichu tong somni ahi." 
2Chronicles3:4 Chule inmai lama um hongcha dunglam chu invai dungjuijin tong somni ahin, asanlam tong jakhatle somni ahin: asunglam chu sana theng twijin aloijin ahi." 
2Chronicles3:5 Chule aman in alenjo sung chu chahthingin athopmin, hichu sana thengin aloijin, achunga chun tumthingho le thihkhao kiphan lim aseme." 
2Chronicles3:6 Chuin in chu ahoinadin song mantamin ajemin, sana chu Parvaim gam sana ahi." 
2Chronicles3:7 Aman in chu a-inkamho, akhomho, abangho, akotho chu sana in aloijin; bangho chunga chun Cherub limho asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Aman in theng chungnung asemin, adung chu invai dungjuija tong somni ahin, avai jong tong somnima ahi: chuin aman sana thengset talent jagup man jenin aloijin ahi." 
2Chronicles3:9 Chule akilnaho chu sana shekel somnga-a gih ahin, chule indan chungnung chu sana-a kiloi ahi." 
2Chronicles3:10 Chule intheng chungnung sunga chun Cherub ni lim asemin, sana in aloijin ahi." 
2Chronicles3:11 Cherub teni lhachu tong somni asaovin: Cherub khat lha langkhat chu tong nga ahin, inbang chu aphan ahi: hiche bang chun alha langkhat jong tong nga ma ahin, Cherub khatpa lhaving chu aphai." 
2Chronicles3:12 Chule Cherub khatpa lhaving langkhat chu tong nga ahin, inbang chu aphan; alhaving dang jongchu tong nga ahin, Cherub khatpa lhaving chutoh akimatnin ahi." 
2Chronicles3:13 Hiche Cherub teni lhavingho chu tongsomni akijalin, amani akengin adinglhonin, amailhonin sunglam angatgel lhone." 
2Chronicles3:14 Chule aman ponjal adum, asanthip, asandup, chule tupat ponnem asemin; achunga chun Cherub ho lim achonsah-e." 
2Chronicles3:15 Aman inmaija chun khom ni tong somthum le nga sanggel jong asemin, achungvuma alujum lhon chu tongnga gel ahi." 
2Chronicles3:16 Chuin aman muntheng insunga bangin thihkhao kiphan asemin, khomteni leh-a akhaijin, chule khombula chun kolbuthei lim jakhat asemin, thihkhao kiphana-a chun akoije." 
2Chronicles3:17 Chule aman Houin maija chun khompi ni, khat chu jetlama, khat veilama atungdoh-in; chule jetlama pa minchu Jachin asah-in, veilamapa minchu Boaz asah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Chukalvalin aman sum-eng maicham, adung tongsomni, avai tongsomni, chule asan tongsom khat asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Aman twikonglen ageilang khatna pat langkhat kah chu tongsom lha-a akimvel kikolkhum ahin, chule asanlam chu tong nga asangin asemin, chule khaojang tong somthum khatnin akimvel akolkhumin ahi." 
2Chronicles4:3 Anoilam chu bongchalho lheh lheh abangin, hiche lim chun akimvelin akolkhumin, tong khatna som cheh-in twikong chu akimvelin ahi. Hiche kisun laija chu bongchal lim golnia kisung ahi." 
2Chronicles4:4 Hichu bongchal somleni chunga chun adingin; thumin sahlam angan, thumin lhumlam angan, thumin lhanglam angan, chule thumin solam angai: chule twikong chu hitiho chungvuma chu kiluija, atou chu akholut cheh-u ahi." 
2Chronicles4:5 Asadan khutphang chana sa ahin, agei chu khongeija molhoipah kisem tobang ahin; hichun bath sangthum adole." 
2Chronicles4:6 Aman twidol jong som asemin; kisilna dingin jetlama nga akoijin, veilama ngama akoijin ahi: hicheho sunga chu govam thiltoho asopjiu ahin, ahinla twikongho chu thempuho kisilna ding ahi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Chule agongu dungjuijin sana meivah khom som asemin; houin sunga jet lama nga, chule veilama nga atunge." 
2Chronicles4:8 Aman dokhang som jong asemin, houin sunga chun jetlama nga chule veilama ngama akoije; chule sana twikong jakhat jong asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles4:9 Chuche bana aman thempuho hongsung le kulpi, chule kulpi kotkhah asemin; chule kotho chu sum-eng in aloijin ahi." 
2Chronicles4:10 Chule twikong chu solam mong jetlam lhanglam jona chun akoijin ahi. 
2Chronicles4:11 Chuin Huram'in belho le vutloho, chule twikongho chu asemtan ahi. Chule Huram'in Pathen in'a dinga Solomon lengpa abolpeh natohho chu ajoutan ahi." 
2Chronicles4:12 Hetding chu khomteni, khombemho, khom teni lehvuma abohteni, chule khompiteni lehvuma abohtenia khombem teni khuna ding pahvuiteni;" 
2Chronicles4:13 Pahvui teni chunga kolbuthei jali, khomho chunga abohtenia khombem teni khuna ding pahvui khat khat chunga chu kolbuthei golnini ga ahi." 
2Chronicles4:14 Aman akhomho asemin, chule akhomho chungadin twidol ho aseme." 
2Chronicles4:15 Twikong khatle anoija bongchal somleni asemin; 
2Chronicles4:16 Belho jong, vutlona le satulka; hicheho jouse hi apa Huram'in Pakai in'a dinga sum-eng duljetna Solomon lengpa asempeh ahi." 
2Chronicles4:17 Jordan phaicham Succoth le Zeradathah kikah-a hahlei laija lengpan alhahtho ngen ahi. 
2Chronicles4:18 Hitichun Solomon'in hiche umle belho jousehi bulhing setnin asemtan ahi: ajehchu sum-eng ho gihchu hetsoh jouhoi ahitapoi. 
2Chronicles4:19 Chule Solomon'in Pathen in dinga umle belho jouse asemjouvin, sana maicham jong, chule achunga vetsahna changlhah kitoh koina dokhang jong;" 
2Chronicles4:20 Chukalvalin muntheng pen masanga adan dungjuija adetjiu meivah khomhole ameivahho jong sanathengin asemin; 
2Chronicles4:21 Chule pahchaho, thaomei ho, chaicheho jouse jongchu sana thengselin asemin;" 
2Chronicles4:22 Chule thaomei ponchenaho, twikongho, thihkheho, gimnamtui lhengho chu sana thengselin asemin: insung lutna, muntheng chungnung kotkhah sungnung, chule houin kotkhah ho chu sana in asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles5:1 Hitichun Pakai in dinga Solomon'in aboljouse chu jo ahitan: Solomon'in apa David'in anakatdohsa thil jouse; chule sana, dangka, chule manchah jouse chu Pathen in thilkholna lah-a chun ahin polut tan ahi." 
2Chronicles5:2 Chuin Solomon'in Israel upa hole phung upaho, Israel chate upaho lamkai jouse chu David khopi Zion'a kona Pakai kitepna thingkhong podoh din Jerusalem'a akhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles5:3 Hijeh chun Israel mite jouse lha sagi lhinna kut-a chun lengpa henga akikhom taove. 
2Chronicles5:4 Chuin Israel upaho jouse ahungun; Levi ho chun thingkhong chu apodoh taove. 
2Chronicles5:5 Chule amahon thingkhong, houkhom ho houbuh, chule houbuh sunga um le bel thengho jouse ahinpo touvun; hichehohi thempuho le Levi ho hinpohtou ahi." 
2Chronicles5:6 Solomon lengpa le ahenga thingkhong maija mipi kikhom Israel hou lamkaiho jouse chun kelngoiho le bongchal ho-a kilhaina abolun, hichu atambehseh jeh-in seijougol ahitapoi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Chuin thempuho chun Pakai thulhun thingkhong chu ama mun, houin'a muntheng lai, muntheng chungnung pena chun Cherubim lhaving noi ngeija ahinpolut taovin ahi:" 
2Chronicles5:8 Ajehchu Cherub teni lhaving chun thingkhong kikoina ding chung chu akhu ahin, chule Cherub teni chun thingkhong le achunga amoljol teni chu akhu ahi." 
2Chronicles5:9 Chuin thingkhoga moljol teni chu asao behseh jeh-in, munthenga konin akimuphan ahi; ahin polama vang akimupoi. Hitichun hikoma chun aumjing nalaije." 
2Chronicles5:10 Thingkhong sunga chu Egypt'a kona ahungdoh laiju, Pakaiyin Israel chatetoh Horeb mun'a kitepna asem laija, Mosi'n anakoilut songpheng teni tailou imacha umlou ahi." 
2Chronicles5:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Thempuho chu munthenga kona ahungdoh phatnun, (ajeh chu thempu aumho jouse kisutheng cheh jiuva ahin, ahona kingahlou ahiuve:" 
2Chronicles5:12 Chujongle Levi lasaho jouse, Asaph'a kon jouse, Heman'a kon, Jeduthun'a kon, achapateu le asopiteu jouse chu tupat ponbangleh-a akivonun, thih khutbehho, tumgingho, selangdah ho akichoijun, maicham mong solama chun adingun, chule amaho chutoh sumkon mut thempu jakhat le somni dinguva ahi:)" 
2Chronicles5:13 Ahung hitin ahi, Pakai vahchoina le thangvahna aw akijah nadinga sumkon mut hole lasaho chun awkhat banga ahin ginsah uva; sumkon le thih khutbeh chule tumgingthei manchah ho jouse to kitho-a apenuva, Ama aphai, ijeh inem itile ahepina atonsotnin aum jinge, tia Pakai avahchoi laijun: Pakai houin ngeichu meilhangin adiptan;" 
2Chronicles5:14 Meilhang jehchun thempuho chu kinbol dingin ading thei tapouve: ajehchu Pathen in chu Pakai loupi na-in adip ahitai. 
2Chronicles6:1 Chuin Solomon'in, Pakaiyin muthim lhangkhal kiheh lah-a kachending ahi, tin anaseije." 
2Chronicles6:2 Hijongle naum nading le, tonsotna nachenna ding mun hidingin in khat kasahpehtai, ati." 
2Chronicles6:3 Chuin lengpan amai aheijin, Israel houkhom ho jouse chu phatthei aboh-in: chule Israel houkhom ho jouse chu adingdoh-un ahi." 
2Chronicles6:4 Chuin aman, kapa David henga akamtah-a anaseisa akhut tah-a guilhun sah-a Israel Pakai Pathen chu nunnom hen." 
2Chronicles6:5 Aman kamite Egypt gama kona kapuidoh nikho-a patnin kamin umna dinga in khat sahna dingin Israel phung jouse sunga khopi khatcha kanalheng khapon; kami Israelte chunga vaipo dingjong mi khatcha kana lheng khapoi. 
2Chronicles6:6 Ahinla keiman Jerusalem chu kamin umtheina din kana lhengin; kami Israelte chunga vaihomdin David chu kana lhengin ahi. 
2Chronicles6:7 Tun Israel Pakai Pathen dinga in khat sahdoh ding chu kapa David lungsunga ana umin ahi. 
2Chronicles6:8 Ahinla Pakaiyin kapa David henga, Kamin dinga in sah ding nalunga nagela, hitobang lungtup chu nalunga aumjeh-in aphalheh jenge;" 
2Chronicles6:9 Hijeng jongle in chu nangman nasah louding ahi; amavang nataijola hungpeng nachapa chun, kamina in chu asahding ahi." 
2Chronicles6:10 Hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin anaseisa chu aguilhunsah ahi. Ajehchu keima kapa David indan sunga kahung seilenin, Pakai thutep bangin Israel laltouna-a katouvin, Israel chate Pakai Pathen min dingin in chu kasatan ahi." 
2Chronicles6:11 Chule hiche sunga chun Pakaiyin Israel chatetoh anasem kitepna thingkhong chu kakoitan ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles6:12 Chuin ama Israel houkhom ho jouse mitmun Pakai maicham anga chun adingin, akhut ajah-in:" 
2Chronicles6:13 Ajehchu Solomon'in sum-eng dokhang tong nga sao, tong nga len chule tong thum sangkhat asem ahin, hichu hongsung lailunga atun ahi. Chuin hiche chunga chun adingin, Israel houkhom ho jouse masanga chun adilsun, akhutnin vanlam sangin," 
2Chronicles6:14 Hitin ati, Vo Pakai, Israel Pathen, nangma banga akitepna subulhit, namasanga alung pumpiuva vahlea nasohte henga hepina musah-a van'a ahin leija ahin jong Pathen dang aumpoi." 
2Chronicles6:15 Nangman nasoh kapa David henga nana thutep jouse nasubulhit nin; nakamtah-in nanaphong doh-in, tunikho banghin nakhut tah-in namolso tai." 
2Chronicles6:16 Hijeh chun tun, Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nasoh kapa David henga, Nachate chu kamasanga nangma chonna banga alamlhah uva, chule kadanthu dungjuija alamlhah na diuva achihthei pou uva ahile; kamitmu-a Israelte laltouna-a touding mi lhasam louding ahi, tia nana thutep chu molsotan." 
2Chronicles6:17 Achutile tun, vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nasoh David henga naseisa thu chu subulhit teijin." 
2Chronicles6:18 Ahinla Pathen chu leisetna hin mihemte toh achengkhom mong nadem? Vetan vanle vanho van'in jong nadolou ahin, keiman kasah hiche inhi iti neojocheh-a hitam!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Hijeh chun vo Pakai ka Pathen, nasoh taona le thumna hi jabolpeh inlang, na angsunga nasohpa taona le pen nahi ngaipeh-in:" 
2Chronicles6:20 Chule nasoh-in hiche lam nga-a ataona nangaipeh na dingin; kamin kakoi ding ahi tia nanaseina mun, hiche in hi asun ajanin ve jingin." 
2Chronicles6:21 Hitichun nasohpa le nami Israel ten hichemun lam nga-a ataonao chu ngaipeh-in: nachenna mun van'a konin ngaijin lang, najahpeh tengle ngaidamtan." 
2Chronicles6:22 Mi khattou aheng akom douna-a achonsetna, kihahselsah dinga achunga thutep achuh-a, hiche akihahsel dingpa chu hiche insung namaicham masang ahi ahunga ahile," 
2Chronicles6:23 Van'a konin hinngaijin lang na hintongin, nasoh chu athu tanpeh-in; michonpha chu themchanna le, achonphatna dungjuija lethuh inlang; migilou chu ama luchang ngeija phulahna chuhsah-in." 
2Chronicles6:24 Chule nangma douna chonset aboljeh uva, nami Israelte chu amelmateu masanga aleluva; ahung kile heijuva, namin aphondoh uva, hiche insungahi na-angsunga taona le thumna aneijuva ahile;" 
2Chronicles6:25 Van'a konin hin ngaipeh inlang, nami Israelte chonsetna chu ngaidamin, chule nangman amaho le apu apateu nanapeh gama chun hinlepui kitnin." 
2Chronicles6:26 Nangma douna-a achonset jeh uva, van akikha-a, go julouva aumteng; amaho hiche munlam nga-a atao uva, namin aphondoh uva, namgman nasuh genthei jeh uva, achonset naova kona ahung kileuva ahile;" 
2Chronicles6:27 Van'a konin hinngaijin lang, ajot dingu lampi pha nahil theina dingin, nasohte le nami Israelte chonset ngaidamin; chule alodinguva namite nanapehna nagam chunga hin go hinjuh sah-in." 
2Chronicles6:28 Gamsunga kel alhah ham, hise alan ham, huise anun ham, thinglung ahiloule khaokho alan hama; melmaten agamsungu khopiho-a chu aumchah-uham; itobang hise ham ahiloule itobang natna hijongle alanteng;" 
2Chronicles6:29 Amitakipmin apohgih ule alung khamna cheh akihetdoh uva, hiche in lam nga-a akhut ajah uva, changval ham ahiloule Israel mipi jousen, itobang taona hihen, itobang thumna hijong le ahin nei tengule;" 
2Chronicles6:30 Nachenna van'a konin ngaipeh inlang, ngaidamin, chule alunggelu nahet bangin, mitin alamlhah dungjui cheh-un lethuh-in; (ajehchu nangma bouvin mihem chate lungsung nahet ahi.)" 
2Chronicles6:31 Chutia chu kapu kapateu nanapehna gamsunga hi achenlai seuva nalampi ajot nadinguva nagin dingu ahi. 
2Chronicles6:32 Chukalvalin namin loupitahle nakhut thahat tah, chule naban jahdoh jala gamlatah-a kona hung nami Israelte hilou gamdang mi thudola; amaho ahunguva hiche insunga hi ataovuva ahile;" 
2Chronicles6:33 Chuteng nachenna mun vanho ngeija konchun ngaijin lang, gamdang mipan nakoulona pen dungjui chun bolpeh-in; chutile leiset mite jouse namin ahet dingu, nami Israel ten nagin banguva nagin diu, chule keiman kasah hiche inhi namina kivo ahi ti ahet dingu ahi." 
2Chronicles6:34 Namite chu nangman nasolna lampia amelmateu satdinga akondoh uva, nangman nalhendohsa hiche khopi lam le nangma min dinga kasah hiche in lam nga-a hi ahung tao uva ahile," 
2Chronicles6:35 Nangman van'a konin ataonao le athumnao ngaipeh inlang, athu-u bolpeh in." 
2Chronicles6:36 Amaho nangma douna-a achonsetnuva, (ajehchu achonse lou khatcha umlou ahi,) nangma achunguva nalunghana, amelmateu henga napeh doh-a, amahon gamlatah ham naicha hama sohchanga akaimang uva ahile," 
2Chronicles6:37 Hijongle sohchanga akikainao gama chu ahung kingaito uva, asohchannao gama chu ahung kiheijuva nahenga ahung tao uva, Keiho kana chonseuvin, kasukhelun, chule giloutah-in na katonguve atiuva;" 
2Chronicles6:38 Soh-a akikainao asohchannao gama kona chu alung pumpiu le ahinna pumpiuva nangma lama ahung kiheijuva, apu apateu nanapeh gam le nangman nanalhen khopi, chule keiman namin dinga kasah hiche in lam nga-a hi ahungtao uva ahile;" 
2Chronicles6:39 Chuteng ataonao le athumnao chu nachenna mun van'a kon ngeichun ngaipeh inlang, athu chu bolpeh-in; chule nangma douna chonsea namite hi ngaidamin." 
2Chronicles6:40 Tun, ka-Pathen, kangeh nahi, hiche mun'a taona kimanna-a hin, namit hasah inlang, nana hinsungin." 
2Chronicles6:41 Hijeh chun tun, vo Pakai Pathen, nacholdona mun'a dingin nangma chule nathahatna thingkhong toh kipatdoh-in; vo Pakai Pathen nathempu ho chu huhhingna-in kivonu henlang, namithengte chu phatna-a kipah uhen." 
2Chronicles6:42 Vo Pakai Pathen, nathaonupa mai chu heimang hih-in, nasoh David hepinaho chu geldoh-in, ati." 
2Chronicles7:1 Tun Solomon taojou phatnin, van'a konin mei ahungleng lhan, govam thilto le ganlhaina hochu akavamin, houin chu Pakai loupina adimtan ahi." 
2Chronicles7:2 Chuin Pakai in chu Pakai loupina adimjeh-in, Pakai insunga chun thempuho alutthei tapouve." 
2Chronicles7:3 Chuin Israel chate jousen mei ahung lenlhah le in chunga Pakai loupina ahung kumlhah chu amuphatnun, tolla songlhongnal chunga amaiju asulutnun, Pakai chu ahouvun, avahchoijun, Ama aphat jeh-in, ahepina tonsotnin aumjinge, atiuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles7:4 Chuin lengpa le mijouse chun Pakai angsunga chun ganlhaina atoh taovin ahi. 
2Chronicles7:5 Chuin Solomon'in bongchal sangsomni le sangni toh, kelngoi sang jankhatle sangsomni in kilhaina abolin; hitichun lengpa le mijouse chun Pathen in chu athenso taove." 
2Chronicles7:6 Chuin thempuho chu atohmun cheh uva adingun; chule Levi ho jong chun David'in, Ajehchu ahepina atonsotnin aumjinge tia Pakai vahchoina dinga anasem, Pakai tumging thei manchah ho chu akichoijun; chuin thempuhon mipi angsunga chun sumkon amutnun ahile, Israelte jouse chu adingdoh sohkeijun ahi." 
2Chronicles7:7 Chukalvalin Solomon'in Pakai in maija hongsung lailung chu athenson ahi: ajehchu Solomon'in asem sum-eng maicham chun govam thilto le anneh thilto, chule thao thilto chu adol joulou jeh-a, govam thilto le chamna thilto thao ho chu hikoma chu atou ahi." 
2Chronicles7:8 Hiche sung mama chun Solomon le akoma um Israelte jouse, Hamath lutna-a pat Egypt vapi geija hung kikhom mipi atama tam chun nisagi kut amangun ahi." 
2Chronicles7:9 Chuin niget lhinin kikhoppi loupitah abolun ahi: ajehchu amahon maicham thensona chu nisagi amanuva, kut chu ni sagima amanu ahi." 
2Chronicles7:10 Chuin lha sagina, nisomni le nithum ni chun, Pakaiyin David le Solomon chule ami Israelte henga anamusah phatna jeh chun, mipi chu kipahtahle thanom tah-in aponbuh lamuva asoltan ahi." 
2Chronicles7:11 Hitichun Solomon'in Pakai inle lengpa in chu ajoutai: chule Pakai in le amatah in sahna dinga Solomon lunga kon jouse chu aman lamjang keijin amolsotan ahi. 
2Chronicles7:12 Chuin Pakai chu jan-in Solomon henga akilah-in, ahenga hitin aseije, Nataona kangaijin, hiche munhi keima dinga ganlhaina in hidingin kalheng tai." 
2Chronicles7:13 Keiman van kakha-a go ajuhda-a, ahiloule gamsung bahgam dinga khaokhopi kalansah-a, ahiloule kamite lah-a hise kalansah-a ahile;" 
2Chronicles7:14 Kamina kikou kamite hi ahung kineosah uva, atao uva, kamai aholuva, akhansetna houva kona akile heijuva ahile; chuteng keiman van'a kona ataonao kangaipeh ding, achonsetnao kangaidam-a, agamu kadamsah ding ahi." 
2Chronicles7:15 Hiche mun'a taona kimangho lama kamit kahasah-a kana kasun jing ding ahi. 
2Chronicles7:16 Ajehchu a-itih-a kamin umjing nadinga hiche in hi kalhena kasuhtheng ahitai: kamit le kalungthim hi chukoma umjing ding ahitai. 
2Chronicles7:17 Chule nangma thudol vang, napa David lamlhah banga kamasanga nalam lhah-a, Keiman kathupeh jouse dungjuija nabola, kachonna dan le kathutan lhah nanitna ahile;" 
2Chronicles7:18 Nanga kona Israelte lah-a vaipo ding lhasam louding ahi, tia napa David toh kakitepna dungjuija nalenggam laltouna kaphudet ding ahi." 
2Chronicles7:19 Ahinla nakihei manga, namasanga kakoi kachonna dan le kathupeh nadalhah-a, nache-a pathen dangho najena naga houva ahile;" 
2Chronicles7:20 Chutengle amaho kanapeh gamsunga kona ajung ajaova kabodoh uva, kamin dinga kathenso hiche in hi kamitmu-a kona kapaidoh ding, namtin lah-a thuchih le seichah khatna kaum sah ding ahi." 
2Chronicles7:21 Chule hiche in sangtah hi ajotpa channin adatmoa; chutia chu amahon, Pakaiyin ibola hiche gam le hiche in hi ahitibol ham? atidiu ahi." 
2Chronicles7:22 Amahon apu apateu Pakai Pathen, Egypt gama kona ahin puidohpao adalhah uva, pathen dangho akolchah uva, ahou uva chule ajenjeh uva; hijeh-a chu hitobang thilsehi achunguva alhunkhum sah ahi, tia adonbut dingu ahi." 
2Chronicles8:1 Chuin Solomon'in Pakai in le ama in ding asahsung kum somni kichaijin ahitin ahi. 
2Chronicles8:2 Huram'in Solomon analepeh khopi chu Solomon'in asaphan, hia chun Israel chate chu achensahtan ahi." 
2Chronicles8:3 Chuin Solomon Hamath-zobah satdin achen, agajou tan ahi." 
2Chronicles8:4 Chuin aman gamthipma Tadmor asan, Hamath'a thilkholna khopiho jouse asan ahi." 
2Chronicles8:5 Aman Beth-horon sahnung le Beth-horon lhangnung khopi kium kul, abangho, akotpiho, akotgolho pumin jong asan," 
2Chronicles8:6 Chule Baalath le Solomon'in anei thil kholna khopi jouse, sakol kangtalai khopiho, sakol touthemho khopiho asan, chule Jerusalem le Labanon chule alenggam pumpi-a Solomon'in asah nom jouse chu asadohtan ahi." 
2Chronicles8:7 Israel hilou Hit mite, Amor mite, Perizz mite, Hiv mite, chule Jebus mite amoh chengse thudola," 
2Chronicles8:8 Achateu gamsunga amaho nunga kidalha, Israel chaten asuhmang louhou chu Solomon'in tuni geijin kai apeh sah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles8:9 Israel chate lah-a konin Solomon'in anatong soh alapon ahi; ahin amaho chu galbolin, gal lamkaijin, sakol kangtalai ho le sakol ho chunga lamkaijin apansahjon ahi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Hichehohi Solomon pipui lenho ahiuvin, mipi chunga vaihom mi jani le somngajen ahiuve." 
2Chronicles8:11 Chuin Solomon'in Pharaoh chanu chu David khopi-a konin ama dinga asahpeh in lama apuitoutai. Ajehchu aman, Israel lengpa David in chu Pakai thingkhong lhunna muntheng ahijeh-in, ka-inneipi chengthei louding ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles8:12 Chuin Solomon'in hongcha maija asem Pakai maicham chunga chun Pakai henga govam thilto atoh-in," 
2Chronicles8:13 Mosi thupeh dungjuija, niseh-a dia kibituh ngei bangin choldo nikho ho, lhathah niho, kumkhatna abineija kibol kut thumho; cholsolou changlhah kut, haptaho kut, chule Houbuh kutna atohjin ahi." 
2Chronicles8:14 Chuin apa David thupeh bangin, thempuho chu natong dingin aloi aloijin, Levi ho chu niseh-a angaichat dungjuija vahchoi dingle thempuho masanga lhachana tongding, Kotpi ngahho jouse jongchu kotpi jouse-a akihopkhen dungjui uvin mopohna apesoh keijin ahi; ajeh chu Pathen mipa David'in hitia hi ana thupeh ahi." 
2Chronicles8:15 Chule thempuho le Levi ho chu lengpan athupeh-a konin ipilam thu hihen, sumle pai lampang hijongle akiheimang pouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles8:16 Tun Pakai inbul kiphu nikho-a pat le akijo theng nikho geija Solomon natoh jouse chu gontupsa ahi. Hitichun Pakai in chu achamkimin ahi. 
2Chronicles8:17 Chuin Solomon Edom gamsunga luipipanga um Ezion-geber le Eloth'a chun achen ahi. 
2Chronicles8:18 Chuin Huram'in asohte khut, twikhanglen umdan hethem asohteho khutnin kong inneiho ahin thotnin ahi. Chuin amaho Solomon sohte toh Ophir'a acheuvin, chua kon chun sana talent jali le somnga ahin laovin, Solomon lengpa heng ahinlhut taove." 
2Chronicles9:1 Chuin Sheba lengnun Solomon kithan chu ajatan, aloi tampitah toh, gimnamtui ho le sana chule songmantam tampitah po-a sangongsang ho ahin puijin, thudoh hahsatah ho-a Solomon phochen dingin Jerusalem'a ahungin ahi. Chuin amanu Solomon heng ahunglhun phatnin, alungsunga umjouse akhedoh-in akihoupitai." 
2Chronicles9:2 Chuin Solomon'in athudoh jouse ahilin: Solomon'a kona kisela amanu ahil lou khatcha aumpoi. 
2Chronicles9:3 Chuin Sheba lengnun Solomon chihna le a-insah amuphatnin," 
2Chronicles9:4 Chule adokhanga anneh, asohte toudanho, alhachate kinboldan, akivonnao; chule akhon domho le akivonnao; chule Pakai in'a achetouna lampiho amuphatnin; alungthim abeihel jengtan ahi." 
2Chronicles9:5 Chuin amanun lengpa jah-a, Kagam sunga nathilbol le nachihna thulhut kanajah chu anadih lheh-e." 
2Chronicles9:6 Ahinla kahunga kamittah-a kamu kahsen athu-u chu katahsan pon ahi: ven, na chihna loupi danhi akehkhat jong einakisei peh lou ahibouve: ajehchu naminthan na kanajah chu nakho khelin ahi." 
2Chronicles9:7 Namite le hiche nasohte na ang sunga dingjinga nachihna thu jajingho hi anunnom ahiuve. 
2Chronicles9:8 Pakai na Pathen'a dinga leng hidinga alaltouna tousah ding thanoma Pakai na Pathen chu nunnom hen: ajehchu na-Pathen'in tonsotna dinga tundoh dingin Israelte angailun, hiche jeh-a chu thudih le chonphatna boldinga achunguva lenga napansah ahi." 
2Chronicles9:9 Chuin amanun lengpa chu sana talent jakhat le somni, gimnamtui tamtah toh, songmantam ho apen: Sheba lengnun Solomon lengpa apeh gimnamtui tobang khatcha aum khapoi." 
2Chronicles9:10 Chule Ophir'a kona sana hinpo-a Huram sohte le Solomon sohten jong algum thinghole songmantam ho ahinpouvin ahi. 
2Chronicles9:11 Chuin lengpan algum thinga chun Pakai in le lengpa inpi kalbiho, lasaho selangdah le tumgingho asemin;chule hitobang chu masangin Judah gama ana kimu khapon ahi." 
2Chronicles9:12 Chule Solomon lengpan Sheba lengnu chu ama hinpoh tailouvin angaichatna athumjouse chu apen ahi. Hitichun amale asohte chu agamlama akileuvin achemang taove. 
2Chronicles9:13 Tun kumkhat sunga Solomon henga sana hunglut chu sana talent jaguple somgup le gup ahin; 
2Chronicles9:14 Hichu thiljohle sumkol veiho hinpoh simlouva ahi. Chule Arabia lengho jouse le gamsunga gamvaipoho jousen Solomon henga sana le dangka ahin popo jengun ahi. 
2Chronicles9:15 Chuin Solomon lengpan sana kikhenglum jani asemin, sanalum khatna chu sana kikheng shekel jagup lutna ahi." 
2Chronicles9:16 Chule sana-a kikheng lumdal jagup asemin, lumdal khatna chu sana shekel jathum lutna ahi. Chuin lengpan hicheho chu Lebanon gammang in'a chun akoije." 
2Chronicles9:17 Chukalvalin lengpan Saiha laltouna lentah khat asemin, sana thengin aloijin ahi." 
2Chronicles9:18 Laltouna-a kaldohna ding chun kalbi gup aumin, akeng chu sana-a kisem ahin, hichu laltouna toh kikilmat ahi; touna alangtoa chun khut ngapna aum gelin, khut ngapna geija chun keipi bahkai ni adinge." 
2Chronicles9:19 Chule kalbi gup alangtoa chun keipi bahkai somleni adingin; hitobanga kisem hi lenggam khatcha-a jong aumpon ahi. 
2Chronicles9:20 Chule Solomon lengpa khonho jouse chu sana ngen ahin, chule Lebanon gammang in'a khonho jouse chu sana theng ngen ahi: dangka-a kisem khatcha aumpoi, Solomon khanglaijin hichu imachan akisimpoi." 
2Chronicles9:21 Ajehchu lengpa kong inneiho chu Huram sohte toh Tarshish'a chejiu ahin; Tarshish kong inneiho chun kumthum sehle khatvei sana, dangka, saiha chule vahong chalho ahinpohjiu ahi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Chule Solomon lengpan leiset lengho jouse chu haona le chihna-a akhelsoh keijin ahi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Chule Pathen'in alungsunga akhumpeh chihna chu ngaidingin leiset lengho jousen Solomon umna chu ahin holhol jenguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles9:24 Chule amitakipmin athilpeh diu dangka kongle belho, sana kongle belho, ponsil, galvon, gimnamtui ho, sakol ho, sanganho kumtin in abi neijin ahinpe jiuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles9:25 Chule Solomon'in sakol le sakol kangtalai kholna in sangli aneijin, sakol touthem mi sangsom le sangni aneijin; amaho chu sakol kangtalai khopiho le lengpa heng Jerusalem'a aumsah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles9:26 Chule ama vadunga pat Philistinete le Egypt gamgi geijin lengho jouse chunga vai ahomin ahi. 
2Chronicles9:27 Chule lengpan Jerusalem'a dangka chu songho abahsah-in, cedar thingho chu phaicham nemho-a tamtah keh theiba thingho abahsah jengin ahi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Chule amahon Egypt'a konle gamjousea konin sakol ho Solomon henga ahintol tol jengun ahi. 
2Chronicles9:29 Tun Solomon thilbol dangho jouse, thusim abula pat ajona gei chu Nathan themgao lekhabu, Shilon mi Ahijah gaothu seina, Nebat chapa Jeroboam douna-a mitvahnei Iddo thilmuho-a chu kisun sohkeija hilouham?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon chu Jerusalem'a Israel pumpi chunga kum somli analeng change. 
2Chronicles9:31 Chuin Solomon chu apu apatetoh alumkhom tan, apa David khopi-a avuitaove. Chuin ama khelin achapa Rehoboam alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles10:1 Chuin Rehoboam Schechem'a achen ahi: ajehchu Shechem'a chu ama leng chansah dinga Israelte jouse hunga ahiuve. 
2Chronicles10:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, Solomon lengpa-a kona jam-a Egypt'a ga um Nebat chapa Jeroboam'in hichu ajah phatnin, Egypt'a konin Jerusalem'a ahung kiletai." 
2Chronicles10:3 Chuin akou dingin mi asolun ahi. Hitichun Jereboam le Israelte jouse Rehoboam henga hungun," 
2Chronicles10:4 Napan kanamkol jonu agihsah behseh-in ahi: hijeh chun tun napan kachunguva angap sohthalah natoh hahsa le anamkol gihtah hi jansah domin lang, keihon nangma jennung kate, atiuve." 
2Chronicles10:5 Chuin aman ajah uva, Nithum joule kahenga hungkit taovin ati. Chuin mipi apotdoh taove." 
2Chronicles10:6 Chuin Rehoboam'in apa Solomon hinlaija amasanga dingjing tehse ho chu adopmin, Hiche mipihohi donbutna dinga ipi thumop neipeh diuham? ati." 
2Chronicles10:7 Chuin amahon ahenga, Hiche mipite hi nakhoto-a, nakipa sah-a, ahenguva thupha naseipeh-a ahile, a-itih-a nalhacha ding ahiuve, atiuve." 
2Chronicles10:8 Ahinla tehse hon athumopmu chu adondan, amatoh seilettha, amasanga dingjing khangdongho thumop chu alajon ahi." 
2Chronicles10:9 Chuin aman ajah uva, Napan kachunguva anangap namkol jonhi themkhat jansah domin tia kajah-a seija hiche mitekhu idonbut theinadiu ipi thuhil neinei uvem? ati." 
2Chronicles10:10 Chuin amatoh seilettha khangdongho chun ahenga, Napan kanamkol jonu agihsah ahin, nangin vang themkhat beh jansah-in tia nahenga sei mipi chu hitin donbutnin, Kamechahi kapa kong sanga sajo ding ahi." 
2Chronicles10:11 Ajeh chu kapan namkol jon gihtah nachung uva angap ahin, keiman na namkoljon'u kabelap ding: kapan khaohola nanasuhgimu ahin, kenvang aipi-a kasuhgim ding nahiuve, tin seijin atiuve." 
2Chronicles10:12 Hitichun lengpan, Nithum nile hungun anati bangchun, nithum nin Jeroboam le mipi ho jouse chu Rehoboam henga ahungtaovin ahi." 
2Chronicles10:13 Chuin lengpan amaho chu gumtah-in anadonbutnin; chule Rehoboam lengpan tehse ho thumop chu adon tapon," 
2Chronicles10:14 Khangthah ho thumop dungjuijin, Kapan na namkol jonu agihsah ahin, kenvang kabelap ding; kapan khaohola nasuhgimu ahin, kenvang aipiho-a kasuhgim ding nahiuve tin adonbut tai." 
2Chronicles10:15 Hitichun lengpan mipi ho thu angaitapoi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin Shilon mi Ahijah amanchah-a, Nebat chapa Jeroboam henga anaseisa chu amolso theina dinga, hichu Pathen'in asosah ahitai." 
2Chronicles10:16 Chuin lengpan athu-u angai pehlou chu Israelte jousen amuphatnun, mipin lengpa chu adonbutnun, David'a chu ipi chan kaneijum? Jesse chapa-a chun goulo imacha kaneipouve. Vo Israel, amitakipmin naponbuh cheh-u kijot taovin: chule tun, David, na-insung kivettan, atiuve. Hitichun Israelte jouse aponbuh cheh-a achetauve." 
2Chronicles10:17 Ahinla Judah gam khopiho-a cheng Israel chunga vang Rehoboam aleng changin ahi. 
2Chronicles10:18 Chuin Rehoboam lengpan kai vaipopa Hadoram chu asolin ahile Israel chaten amachu songin asepmun, athitai. Ahinla Rehoboam lengpa chu Jerusalem'a jamdingin asakol kangtalai ja atoudoh loitan ahi." 
2Chronicles10:19 Hitichun Israel'in tugeijin David insung adoujing taovin ahi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Chuin Rehoboam Jerusalem'a ahung phatnin, lenggam chu Rehoboam henga puilut kit theina dinga Israelte satdin Judah le Benjamin insunga akilhengtum gal hatcheh mi sangsom le sangetjen akhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles11:2 Ahinla Pathen mipa Shemaiah henga chun Pakai thu ahung lhungin," 
2Chronicles11:3 Judah lengpa Solomon chapa Rehoboam le Juda gama cheng Israelte le Benjamin mite jouse henga," 
2Chronicles11:4 Pakaiyin hitin ati, Nangho nachetou loudiu, nasopiteu jong nagasat loudiu ahi: amitakip na-in cheh-a kileuvin: hichehi keimabol ahi, tin seijin, gatin ati. Chuin Pakai thu chu angaijun, Jereboam satdinga achegot uva konin akih taove." 
2Chronicles11:5 Chuin Rehoboam Jerusalem'a achengin, Judah gamsunga chun kihuhdoh nading khopi Kul asadoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles11:6 Aman Bethlehem, Etam, chule Tekoa jengjong asadoh-in," 
2Chronicles11:7 Beth-zur, Shoco, chule Adullam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gath, Mareshah, chule Ziph," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim, Lachish, chule Azekah," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zorah, Aijalon, chule Hebron asadoh-in, hichehohi Judah le Benjamin gama um kulpinei khopiho ahiuve." 
2Chronicles11:11 Kulho chu asudetnin, hicheho-a chun vaipo akoicheh-in, nehding le thao chule lengpitwi akholkhome." 
2Chronicles11:12 Chule khopi tina lumle tengcha ho akoicheh-in, dettah-in asemin, Judah le Benjamin chu ama lama pang ahi." 
2Chronicles11:13 Chule Israel gamsung jouse-a thempuho le Levi ho jouse agamkai cheh uva konin ahenga ahunguve. 
2Chronicles11:14 Ajehchu Jeroboam le achapaten Pakai dinga thempu na atoh naova kona ahaisah jeh uva, Levi ho chun agamule aumnao khopi kimvelse adalhah uva, Judah le Jerusalem'a hunguva ahi:" 
2Chronicles11:15 Chule aman munsang ho-a ding, thilhaho-a ding, chule abongnou semho-a dinga thempuho akisuhdet ahitai." 
2Chronicles11:16 Chule amaho nungchun Pakai Pathen holding lungput neija Israelte chu apu apateu Pakai Pathen henga ganlhaina boldingin Israel phung jouse-a konin Jerusalem'a ahunguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles11:17 Chuti chun Judah lenggam chu asuhatnun, kumthum sung Solomon chapa Rehoboam chu ahatsah uvin ahi: ajehchu amahon kumthum sung David le Solomon lampi ajotnun ahi." 
2Chronicles11:18 Chuin Rehoboam'in David chapa Jerimoth le Jesse chapa Eliab chanu Abihail chanu Mahalath chu aji dingin akipuijin ahi. 
2Chronicles11:19 Amachun chate, Jeush, Shemariah, chule Zaham ahinpeh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles11:20 Amanu nungin Absalom chanu Maachah akichenpin, amanun Abijah, Attai, Zizah, chule Shelomith ahinpeh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles11:21 Chule Rehoboam'in Absalom chanu Maachah chu ajite jousele athaikemho lah-a angailu pene, (ajehchu aman ji somleget le thaikem somgup akipuijin; chapa somni le get le chanu somgup anei ahi)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Chuin Rehoboam'in Maachah chapa Abijah chu lenga semding agotjeh-in, asopite lah-a vaipo pipen dingin akoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles11:23 Aman chingthei tah-in abolin, achate jouse chu Judah le Benjamin gamjouse khopi kulpi nei tina athecheh-in, nehding nengchetnin apen ahi. Chule amaho dingin ji tamtah agonpeh-e." 
2Chronicles12:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Rehoboam'in lenggam atundoh-a, ama hattah-a akisahdoh phatnin, amale aumpi Israelte jousen Pakai danthupeh chu anungsun taove." 
2Chronicles12:2 Chule ahitin ahi, amahon Pakai douna asuhkhel jeh uvin, Rehoboam lengchan kal kum nga lhina-in, Jerusalem satdingin Egypt lengpa Shishak chu ahung kontou tan," 
2Chronicles12:3 Sakol kangtalai sangkhat le jani le, sakol touthem sangsomgup toh ahung kontaovin: Egypt'a kona ahin kondohpi Lubim miho, Sukkiim miho, Ethiopia miho chu simjoulou ahiuve." 
2Chronicles12:4 Aman Judah gamsung kulpinei khopiho chu aban lah-in, Jerusalem'a ahungtai." 
2Chronicles12:5 Chuin Shishak jeh-a Jerusalem'a kikhom Rehoboam le Judah pipuiho henga chun Shemaiah themgao chu ahungin, ajah uva, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Nanghon neinungsun taovin, hijeh-a chu kenjong Shishak khutna kadalhah-u nahitaove, tin Pakaiyin aseije, ati." 
2Chronicles12:6 Hichun Israel pipuiho le lengpa chu akineosah uvin, Pakai chu chonpha ahi atiuve." 
2Chronicles12:7 Chuin Pakaiyin akineosah-u chu amuphatnin, Shemai henga Pakai thuchu ahung lhungin, hitin aseije, Amaho akineosah taovin; hijeh chun sumang tapong ting, amavang akihoidoh nadiu themkhat kapeh ding ahi. Chule Shishak khutna kona Jerusalem chunga kalunghana kabuh lhah louding ahi." 
2Chronicles12:8 Hijeng jongle keima kinbol le lenggam dangho kinbol ahetkhen theina diuva, amaho ama soh-a pangdiu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles12:9 Hitichun Egypt lengpa Shishak'in Jerusalem ahungsatnin, Pakai in sunga gouho le leng in sunga gouho chu apomangin; aman Solomon'in anasem sana lumdal ho jong chu apomangtai." 
2Chronicles12:10 Hicheho khelchun Rehoboam lengpan sum-eng lumho akisemin, hiche chu leng in lutna kotngah vaipoho khutna akoitan ahi." 
2Chronicles12:11 Chule lengpa Pakai in sunga alutji tengle kotngahpa chu hunga, agalahdoh jia, chule kotngah ho indan sunga akoilut kitji ahi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Chuin ama akineosah phatnin, asuh manghel lounadin Pakai lunghanna chu ama-a konin akilehei tan; chule Judah gamsunga jong thil ache hoi tan ahi." 
2Chronicles12:13 Hitichun Rehoboam lengpa chu Jerusalem'a akisuhat nin, lengvai apon ahi. Ajehchu Rehoboam alengchan patchu akum kum somli le kum khat ahitan, Pakaiyin amin umna dinga Israel phung jouse-a kona alhendoh khopi Jerusalem'a chun kum somlesagi lengvai apon ahi. Chule anu min chu Naamah ahin, Ammon mi ahi." 
2Chronicles12:14 Chule Pakai holna dinga alungthim agontuplou jeh-in, thilse jeng abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles12:15 Tun Rehoboam thilbol abula pat ajogei chu Shemaith themgao lekhabu le, mitvanei Iddo khanggui bu-a kisun hilouham? chule Rehoboam le Jereboam kah-a chun kidouna aumjom jingin ahi." 
2Chronicles12:16 Chule Rehoboam chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, David khopi-a akivuitai: chule achapa Abijah chu ama khelin alengchang tai." 
2Chronicles13:1 Tun Jeroboam lengchan kum somle kumget lhin kum-in Judah gama Abijah alengchang panin ahi. 
2Chronicles13:2 Aman Jerusalem'a kumthum lengvai apon ahi. Anu min chu Michaiah ahin, Gibeah mi Uriel chanu ahi. Chule Jeroboam le Abijah kah-a gal ana umin ahi." 
2Chronicles13:3 Chuin Abijah chu galsat dingin lhentum cheh sepai galsat mihangsan sangjali to akigol toh-in: Jeroboam'in jong lhentum cheh sepai galsat mihangsan sang jaget toh ama satdingin akigol toh-in ahi. 
2Chronicles13:4 Chuin Ehpraim molsanga um Zemaraim mol chunga Abijah adingin, Nangma Jeroboam le Israelte jousen kasei ngaijuvin;" 
2Chronicles13:5 Pakai Israel Pathen'in Israelte chunga lenggam hi David le achapate henga chi-a kitepna-a tonsotna dinga anapehsa ahi chu nahet diudol hilouham? 
2Chronicles13:6 Hijongle David chapa Solomon sohpa Nebat chapa Jeroboam chu akipatdoh-in, a-pakaipa dounan akiphintan ahi." 
2Chronicles13:7 Chule ama henga chun pannabei ho, Belial chate akikhomun, Rehoboam chu khangdong cha le lungthim nemhiuheo ahi-a amaho doudal thei ahilou petchun, Solomon chapa Rehoboam dounan akisuhat nun ahi." 
2Chronicles13:8 Chule tun nanghon David chapate khutna um Pakai lenggam chu doudal dingin nangaitou vin; chule nangho mihonpi tamtah nahiuvin, Jeroboam'in pathenho dinga anasempeh-u sana bongnouho chu nangho toh aumkhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles13:9 Nanghon bongchal khat le kelngoichal sagi-a kisutheng dinga hungchan chu pathen hilouho thempu ahithei nadinga; Pakai thempuho, Aaron chapate le Levi ho nanodoh uva, gamdang namho chona banga thempu nakisem thu-u hilouham?" 
2Chronicles13:10 Keiho din vang Pakai chu ka Pathen'u ahin, ama chu kanungsun pouve; chule Pakai kinbol thempuho chu Aaron chapate ahiuvin, chule Levi hon amaho kin abol jingun ahi." 
2Chronicles13:11 Chule amahon jingkah nilhah sehle Pakai henga govam ganlhaina le gimnamtui ahaljiuvin; vetsahna changlhah jong chu dokhang theng chunga atoh jiuvin; chule nilhah seh-a halding sana meivah khomle chua meivah pumin akoitoh jiuvin ahi. Ajehchu keihon Pakai i-Pathen'u thupeh kanit jingu ahin; nanghon vang ama nanungsun taove. 
2Chronicles13:12 Chule veuvin, Pathen amatah chun eilamkai hidingin eiumpiuvin, chule athempuho jong nangho douna gal sumkon mutdingin aumjinguve. Vo Israel chate, napu napateu Pakai Pathen'u chu kisatpi hih-un; ajehchu najolou dingu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles13:13 Ahinla Jeroboam'in anunglam uva kona hinbulu ding asolin ahi: hitichun amaho Judah te masanga aumun, chule ahin bulu dingho chu anunglam uva aumun ahi." 
2Chronicles13:14 Chuin Judah ten akinung heijuva ahile, veuvin, gal chu anung ama uva aumtan ahi: Chuin Pakai henga ataovun, chule thempuhon sumkon amutnun ahi." 
2Chronicles13:15 Chuin Judah mite a-aovun: chule Judah mite hatah a a-ao phatnun ahitin ahi, Pathen'in Jeroboam le Israelte jouse chu Abijah le Judah te masanga agal lelsah tan ahi." 
2Chronicles13:16 Chuin Israelte chu Judah masanga ajamtaovin; Pathen'in amaho chu akhutnuvah apedoh tai. 
2Chronicles13:17 Chuin Abijah le amiten amaho chu atamatam athat taovin: hitichun hikoma chun Israel mite chu lhentum cheh sangjanga athiuvin ahi. 
2Chronicles13:18 Hitichun chuche chunga chun Israel chate chu suhnemin aumun, Judah chate chun apu apateu Pakai Pathen chunga akingai jeh-un ajoutaovin ahi." 
2Chronicles13:19 Chuin Abijah'in Jeroboam anungdelin, ama-a konin khopi phabep alan, Bethel chu akholenho pumin, Jeshanah chu akholenho pumin, chule Ehpraim chu akholenho pumin alatan ahi." 
2Chronicles13:20 Abijah nikho laijin Jeroboam chu ahatdohjou tapon ahi: chuin Pakaiyin adengin, athitai." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abijah vang ahat cheh cheh-in, ji somleli aneijin, chapa somnileni toh chanu somgup ahingin ahi." 
2Chronicles13:22 Abijah thilbol adangse le alamlhah ho, chule athuseiho chu Iddo themgao thusima kisun cheh ahi." 
2Chronicles14:1 Hitichun Abijah apu apatetoh alumkhomin, David khopi-a avuijun: chule achapa Asa ama khelin alengchang tan ahi. Ama nikholaijin gamsung chu kum som galmongin aumuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Chule Asa'in Pakai a-Pathen mitmun apha le adih jeng abolin ahi. 
2Chronicles14:3 Ajeh chu aman gamdang pathenho maicham ho le munsang ho aladoh-in, milimho avobongin, Asherah limho aphuh lhun:" 
2Chronicles14:4 Judah te chun apu apao Pakai Pathen aholuva, adanthu le athupeh anit dingun athupeh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles14:5 Aman Judah te khopiho jouse-a konin munsanghole milimho alamangin; lenggam chu ama noija galmongin aumin ahi. 
2Chronicles14:6 Aman Judah gamsunga chun khopi kulneiho asan ahi: ijeh inem itile gamsungin choldona amun, chule chuche kumho-a chun aman gal aneipon ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin choldona apeh ahi." 
2Chronicles14:7 Hijeh chun aman Judah te henga, Gamhi imasanguva aumpetnin, hiche khopiho hi saohitin, akimveluvah kulbangho, insangho, kotpiho, chule kotgolho semuhite; ajehchu eihon Pakai i-Pathen'u iholun, eihon ama iholun chule aman ningjouse-a choldona eipeuvin ahi, ati. Hitichun amahon asaovin, akhangtou lheh-un ahi." 
2Chronicles14:8 Chule Asa'n Judah'a konin thih khutbu le tengcha choi cheh galsat mi sangsomthum aneijin, Benjamin'a kona lum le thal thocheh mi sangjani le somget aneijin: amaho mihat mihangsan cheh ahiuve." 
2Chronicles14:9 Chuin Ethiopia mi Zerah chu amaho satdin galmi janel asang asangto, sakol kangtalai jathum toh ahung kondoh-in; Mareshah'a ahungun ahi." 
2Chronicles14:10 Chuin Asa ama satdin ahung kondoh-in, Maresha'a um Zephathah phaichama chun galsat dingin akigoltoh taove." 
2Chronicles14:11 Chuin Asa'n Pakai a-Pathen akouvin, Pakai, nangman napanpi ding chu mi tamtah manchah ding hihen, ahiloule thanei louho manchah ding hijongle imacha ahichom poi: vo Pakai ka Pathen'u, neipanpi uvin; ajehchu nanga kingai kahiuvin, namina mihonpi hi satdinga che kahiuve. Vo Pakai, nangma ka Pathen'u nahi: mihemin najouhih helhen, ati." 
2Chronicles14:12 Hitichun Pakaiyin Asa le Judah te masanga Ethiopia mite chu ajouvin; Ethiopia mite ajamtaove. 
2Chronicles14:13 Chuin Asa le aumpi mipi chun amaho chu Gerar geijin adelun: Ethiopia mite chu ajoutaovin, hitichun amaho akidodoh jou tapouve; ajehchu Pakai le ajanel angsunga gallel ahitaove; chuin amahon galthil kichom tamtah ahinkipoh mangun ahi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Chuin amahon Gerar kimvela khopi jouse asumangun ahi; ajehchu achunguva Pakai ginna hung chu-a ahitai: chule amahon khopi jouse achomun ahi: ajehchu hiche ho sunga chu galthilchom tamtah uma ahi. 
2Chronicles14:15 Amahon ganchaho ponbuh ho jong asumangun, kelngoiho le sangongsang ho tampitah akikaimangun, Jerusalem'a ahung kile taove." 
2Chronicles15:1 Chuin Oded chapa Azariah chunga Pathen lhagao ahungchun: 
2Chronicles15:2 Asa kimupi din achen, ahenga, Asa, Judah te chule Benjamin miten kathusei ngaijun; amatoh naum khom lai seuvin, Pakaiyin na-umpive; nanghon ama nahol uva ahileh ama namu dingu; amavang nanungsun uva ahile, aman jong nangho nanungsun dingu ahi." 
2Chronicles15:3 Tun Israel hi phat sottah Pathen dih bei le, mihil ding thempu bei, chule dan bei anahiuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles15:4 Ahinla amaho alungdon uva Israel Pakai Pathen henga akileuva, ama aholuva ahile, ama amu jiuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles15:5 Chule hichelai chun vaikonpa ahiloule vailhungpa din chamna anaumpon, gamsunga cheng jouse chunga gentheina nasatah anaumjon ahi." 
2Chronicles15:6 Pathen'in vangsetna jouse-a asuhgenthei jeh-un, namkhat le namkhat, khopi khat le khopi khat akisumang touvin ahi." 
2Chronicles15:7 Hijeh chun hatnunlang nakhut thau lhomsah hih-un; ajehchu nanatoh-u tohman kipe ding nahiuve, ati." 
2Chronicles15:8 Chuin Asan hiche thuho le Oded themgao thusei ajah phatnin, ahangsan chehtan, Judah le Benjamin gamsung jouse-a kon le Ephraim molsanga kona akhopi lah ho-a konin kidah umtah milim jouse akoimangin, Pakai hongcha maija um Pakai maicham chu asemphan ahi." 
2Chronicles15:9 Chuin aman Judah mite le Benjamin mite jouse, chule Ephraim, Manasseh le, Simeon'a kon amaho umpi gamdang miho jouse akhom khomin ahi. Ajehchu Pakai a-Pathen'in aumpi amuphatnuva, Israel'a konin mi tamtah-in ama ahinbelu ahitai." 
2Chronicles15:10 Hitichun Asa lengchan kal kum somle kumnga na, alhathum lhina-in amahole amaho Jerusalem'a akikhom khom taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles15:11 Chule hiche chunga chun amahon Pakai henga galthila ahin chomhou lah-a konin bongchal jasagi le kelngoi sangsagi atoh-un ahi. 
2Chronicles15:12 Chuin amahon alungthim pumpiu le ahinna pumpiuva apu apateu Pakai Pathen hol dingin kitepna aneijuvin; 
2Chronicles15:13 Hitichun alen hihen aneo hileh, numei hihen pasal hijongle, Pakai Israel Pathen hollou chanchu kithat ding ahi atiuve." 
2Chronicles15:14 Chuin Pakai henga awsang tah-in, sumkon le sumkon binei mutpum in akihahselun ahi." 
2Chronicles15:15 Chule Judah te jouse chu kihahsel na-a chun akipah uvin ahi; ajehchu alung pumpiuva kihahsel uva, angaichat nao pumpi-a aholu ahin; amachu amuvin ahi: chuin Pakaiyin akimveluvah choldona apeuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles15:16 Chujongle Asa lengpa nu Maachah thudola, amanun Asherah lim anakisem jeh-in, lengnu ahina-a konin akoidohtai: chule Asa'n amilim chu aphuh lhun, achon goijin, Kidron vadunga ahal lhatai." 
2Chronicles15:17 Ahinla Israel'a konin munsang ho chu akilamangpon: hijeng jongle Asa lungthim vangchu ahinkho lhumkeijin achamkimin ahi. 
2Chronicles15:18 Chule aman Pathen insunga chun apa thensosa thilho le amatah in athensosa thilho, dangka, sana chule umle belho chu ahin polutnin ahi." 
2Chronicles15:19 Chule Asa lengchan kum somthum le kumnga sungchun gal aumkit tapon ahi. 
2Chronicles16:1 Asa lengchan kal kum somthum le kumgup kum-in, Judah lengpa Asa henga koimacha alut le apot aum louhel nading gelnan Israel lengpa Baasha chu Judah satdin ahungtouvin, Ramah chu asadohtan ahi." 
2Chronicles16:2 Hichun Asa'n Pakai in'a konle leng in goukholna in'a konin dangka le sana aladoh-in, Damascus'a cheng Syria lengpa Banhadad agah thotnin, ahenga," 
2Chronicles16:3 Kapa le napa kah-a anaum bangin keima le nang kah-a kitepna aumin ahi: ven, dangka le sana kahin thotne; chen, ama keija kona apotdohna dingin, Baasha toh nakitepna lhon gasukehtan, ati." 
2Chronicles16:4 Chuin Benhadad'in Asa lengpa thu angaijin, agalsat lamkaiho chu Israel khopiho satdin asolin; amahon Ijon, Dan, Abel-maim le Naphtali thilkholna khopiho jouse agajou taove." 
2Chronicles16:5 Chuin ahitin ahi, Baasha'n hichu ajah phatnin, Ramah asah chu adalhan, anatoh atansahtai." 
2Chronicles16:6 Chuin Asa lengpan Judah te jouse apuijin, amahon Baasha'in amanchah Ramah songho jouse le thingho chu apomangun, hicheho-a chun Geba le Mizpeh asadohtan ahi." 
2Chronicles16:7 Hichelai chun mitvahnei Hanani chu Judah lengpa Asa henga ahungin, ahenga, Nangma Pakai na Pathen'a kingai louva Syria lengpa-a nakingai jeh-in, Syria lengpa sepai janel chu nakhutna konin ahoidoh taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ethiopia mite le Lubim mite chu sakol kangtalai tamtah le sakol touthem tamtah janel mihonpi hilouvu ham? ahivangin Pakaiya nakingai jeh-in aman amaho nakhutna apedoh-in ahi. 
2Chronicles16:9 Ajehchu ama lama alungthim chamkimho henga amaho khela ahatna musah dinga Pakai mit chu leiset pumpi-a suhletunga lhailele-a ahi. Hichea hin nangman ngolhoi tah-in thil naboltai: hijeh-a chu tua patna gal nanei jingding ahitai, ati." 
2Chronicles16:10 Chuphatnin mitvah neipa chunga Asa alunghangin, songkul'a akhumtai; ajehchu hiche thilho jeh-a chu achunga alungsalheh jenga ahi. Chule hiche laichun Asa'n mi phabep asugentheijin ahi." 
2Chronicles16:11 Chule vetan, Asa thilbol amasale anunung chu, vetan, Judah le Israel lengho lekhabua akisunlut cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles16:12 Chule Asa lengchan kal kum somthum le kumko lhin kum-in akenga natna aneitan; ahanat kikhon geijin anatan: ahinla anatna-a chun Pakai hollouvin louthem ho joh anaholin ahi. 
2Chronicles16:13 Chuin Asa apu apate toh alumkhomin, alengchan kal kum somli le kumkhat lhina-in athitan ahi." 
2Chronicles16:14 Chuin amahon aman David khopisunga anakisem lhansunga avuijun, gimnamtui semhon gimnamtui jat chomchom agonu dimset jalkhuna chun alupsah taove. Chule amahon ama dingin meikong deojejun atih-un ahi." 
2Chronicles17:1 Chuin achapa Jehoshaphat ama khelin aleng changin, Israelte dounan akisuhat nin ahi." 
2Chronicles17:2 Aman Judah gamsunga kulbang nei khopiho jouse-a galsatmi akoijin, Judah gamsung le apa Asan analahsa Ephraim khopiho-a sepaihon akoicheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles17:3 Pakaiyin Jehosaphat aumpin ahi; ajehchu aman apa David lampi masa chu ajotnin, Baalim ahol pon;" 
2Chronicles17:4 Pakai apa Pathen joh aholin, ama thupeh ho-a chun achonnin, Israelte chonna bangin achonpon ahi." 
2Chronicles17:5 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin lenggam chu akhutna asudetnin; Judah te jousen Jehosaphat henga thilpeh ahinchoijun, chule aman haona le jabolna bulhing setnin aneije." 
2Chronicles17:6 Alungthim Pakai lampiho-a achoisangin; achungchonin jong Judah gamsunga konin mun sanghole Asherah limho alamangin ahi. 
2Chronicles17:7 Alengchan kumthum na-a jongchun Judah gamsung khopiho-a cheng miho hildingin amilenho Benhail, Obadiah, Zechariah, Nethaneel chule Michaiah asolle." 
2Chronicles17:7 Alengchan kumthum na-a jongchun Judah gamsung khopiho-a cheng miho hildingin amilenho Benhail, Obadiah, Zechariah, Nethaneel chule Michaiah asolle." 
2Chronicles17:7 Alengchan kumthum na-a jongchun Judah gamsung khopiho-a cheng miho hildingin amilenho Benhail, Obadiah, Zechariah, Nethaneel chule Michaiah asolle." 
2Chronicles17:8 Chule aman amaho chutoh Levi miho, Shemaiah, Nethaniah, Zebadiah, Asahel, Shemiramoth, Jehonathan, Adonijah, Tobijah, Tob-adonijah, chule amahotoh Elishama le Jehoram thempu teni asoltan ahi." 
2Chronicles17:9 Amahon Judah gamsunga ahilun, Pakai danthu lekhabu chu akikenun, Judah gamsung khopiho jouse achonchan sohkeijun, mipichu ahil leuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles17:10 Chuin Judah gamkimvela um lenggam ho jouse chunga chun Pakai kichatna achutan, hitichun amahon Jehosaphat dounan gal abol pouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles17:11 Chule Philistine mite phabepmin jong Jehosaphat chu thilpeh le dangka kai apeuvin; chule Arab mihon kelngoi hon sangsagi le jasagi toh kelchal jasagi ahin peuvin ahi. 
2Chronicles17:12 Chuin Jehosaphat chu nasatah-in aloupitan; Judah gamsunga kulpiho le thilkholna khopiho asadoh-in ahi. 
2Chronicles17:13 Chule aman Judah gamsung khopiho-a chun natoh tamtah aneijin: galbolmiho le mihat mihangsan ho chu Jerusalem'a aumun ahi. 
2Chronicles17:14 Chule hichehohi apu apateu insung kailhah dungjuija ajatnu chu ahi: Judah insunga sang gal lamkaiho pipui chu Adnah ahin; chule amatoh umkhom mihat mihangsan hochu sangjathum ahiuve. 
2Chronicles17:15 Chule ama bana chu gallamkai Jehohanan ahin, ama tohin mi sangjani leh sangsomget aumkhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles17:16 Ama bana chu ama le ama kiphal tah-a Pakai henga kipe Zichri chapa Amasiah ahin; ama tohin mihat mihangsan sangjani aumkhomin ahi. 
2Chronicles17:17 Chule Benjamin'a konin mihat mihangsan Eliada ahin, ama tohin thal le lum thothei mi sangjani aumkhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles17:18 Chule abana chu Jehozabad ahin, ama tohin galkap dinga kigosadem mi sangjakhat le sangsomget aumkhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles17:19 Hicheho hi Judah gamsung pumpi-a kulbang nei khopiho sunga lengpan akoiho simlouva lengpa ngahho chu ahiuve. 
2Chronicles18:1 Tun Jehoshaphat chu haona le jabolna nasatah achangtan, chule Ahab toh kiguijopna aneitan ahi." 
2Chronicles18:2 Chuin kum ijat-ham jouvin Ahab henga Samaria'a achesuh-in ahi. Chuin Ahab'in amale alhonpiho chu kelngoi le bongchal nengchetnin athapeh-in, Ramoth-gilead'a kilhon toupi din ajolin ahi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Chuin Israel lengpa Ahab'in Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat henga, Ramoth-gilead'a neilhonpi dingham? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Keima nangma tobang kahin, kamite jong namite tobang ahi; galchu sat hu nao vinge, ati." 
2Chronicles18:4 Chuin Jehoshaphat'in Israel lengpa jah-a, Katao ahi, tuni hin Pakai thu doptadin, ati." 
2Chronicles18:5 Hijeh chun Israel lengpan themgaoho mi jali jen akhomin, ajah uva, Ramoth-gilead'a galsatna kakon diuham, ahiloule kahaidiu ham? ati. Chuin amahon, Kontaovin; ajehchu Pathen'in lengpa khutna apehdoh dingu ahi, atiuve." 
2Chronicles18:6 Ahinla Jehoshaphat'in, Hicheho tilouva hi eihon idop theidiu Pakai themgao umlouva hitam? ati." 
2Chronicles18:7 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoshaphat jah-a, Eihon Pakai thu idopna theidiu mi khat aum nalainai: ahinla keiman ama kahon ahi; ajehchu aman thilphalou tilou apha eigaopeh ngaipoi: amachu Imla chapa Micaiah ahi, ati. Chuin Jehoshaphat'in, Lengpan hiti chun thu seihih-in, ati." 
2Chronicles18:8 Chuin Israel lengpan lamkaiho khat akouvin, Imla chapa Micaiah chu kintah-in gakouvin, ati." 
2Chronicles18:9 Chuin Israel lengpa le Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chu Samaria lutna kotpi bul mun onglaija lengvon pumin alaltouna gella atou lhonin; a-angsung lhona chun themgaoho chun gaothu aseijun ahi. 
2Chronicles18:10 Chuin Chenaanah chapa Zedekiah chun thih sakiho akisemin, Hicheho-a hi Syria mite chu amanhel tokah seova nano ding ahi tin Pakaiyin aseije, ati." 
2Chronicles18:11 Chuti chun themgao jouse chun chutima chun gaothu aseijun, Ramoth-gilead'a chetouvin lang galo lhingin: ajehchu Pakaiyin hichu lengpa khutna apehdoh ding ahi, atiuve." 
2Chronicles18:12 Chuin Micaiah kou-a che sottol chun ajah-a, Ven, lengpa henga themgaoho chun kitohtah-in aphalam aseijuve; katao ahi, nathu chu amaho-a tobangin hihen, chule apha seijin, ati." 
2Chronicles18:13 Chuin Micaiah'in, Pakai hingjing min pana kasei ahi, Ka-Pathen'in asei sei bouchu keiman kaseiding ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles18:14 Chuin ama lengpa henga ahung phatnin, lengpan ajah-a, Micaiah, Ramoth-gilead'a galbola kakon diuham, ahiloule kahaisah diham? ati. Chuin aman, Kontou vunlang galo lhingun, amaho chu nakhutna kipedoh ding ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles18:15 Chuin lengpan ajah-a, Pakai mina thutah tailou imacha dang seilou dinga ijatvei kaki hahsel sah ding nahim? ati." 
2Chronicles18:16 Chuin aman, Israelte molsang chungho-a achingbei kelngoi banga akithecheh-u kamui: chule Pakaiyin, Hiche hohin lamkai anei tapouve; hijeh chun amitakip a-incheh-a lung mongin kiletaohen atie, ati." 
2Chronicles18:17 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoshaphat henga, Aman thilse tailou apha eigaopeh ponte tia kasei hilouham?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Chule Micaiah'in aseiben, Pakai thu ngaijun; Pakai alaltouna-a atouva, ajetle veija vanmi janel jouse adinnu kamui." 
2Chronicles18:19 Chule Pakaiyin, Koipen tah-in Israel lengpa Ahab chu Ramoth-gilead-a agathi den nadinga agalhep dingham, ati. Chuin khatnin hitobanghin atin, achom khatnin khutobang khun atin ahi." 
2Chronicles18:20 Chujouvin lhagao khat ahung potdoh-in, Pakai anga agadingin, Ken lheminge, ati. Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, ipi lampi-in em? ati." 
2Chronicles18:21 Chuin aman chedoh ingting, athemgaoho koma jouthu sei lhagaova kagapan ding ahi, ati. Chuin Pakaiyin, Nangman nagalhep ding, jojong najoding ahi: chen lang chuti chun gaboltan, ati." 
2Chronicles18:22 Hijeh chun tun, vetan, Pakaiyin hiche nathemgao ho kama jousei lhagao akoija, Pakaiyin nangma douna-a thilse asei ahitai, ati." 
2Chronicles18:23 Chujouvin Chenaanah chapa Zedekiah chun ahin naijin, Micaiah ngeiphe abengin, ajah-a, Hoiche lampi-a Pakai lhagao chu keima-a kona nangma henga thusei dinga che-a ham? ati." 
2Chronicles18:24 Chuin Micaiah'in, Ven, kiseldinga indan sungnunga nalut nikhole hetan nate, ati." 
2Chronicles18:25 Chuin Israel lengpan, Micaiah chu man unlang, khopi vaipo Amon le, lengpa chapa Joash henga lekaijun;" 
2Chronicles18:26 Chule, Lengpan hitin aseije, Hichepa hi keima lhamonga kahung kilekit kahsen songkul'a khumin lang, gimbolna changlhah le gimbolna twijin vah uvin atie, tin gaseijun ati." 
2Chronicles18:27 Chuin Micaiah'in, Lungmonga nahung kile ngeingeija ahile Pakaiyin keima mangcha-a thu aseilou hinte, ati. Chule aman, Mipi jousen ngaijun, ati." 
2Chronicles18:28 Hitichun Israel lengpa le Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chu Ramoth-gilead lama akontou lhontai. 
2Chronicles18:29 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoshaphat jah-a, Keiman kalim kachom sah-a galmuna kache ding ahi; nangma vang naleng von kivonin, ati. Hitichun Israel lengpan alim achomsah-in, galmuna ache taove." 
2Chronicles18:30 Tun Syria lengpa chun alhonpi sakol kangtalai lamkaiho athupeh-in, Nanghon Israel lengpa tailou alen jong aneo jong nasat loudiu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles18:31 Chuin ahitin ahi, sakol kangtalai lamkaihon Jehoshaphat amu phatnun, Hichekhu Israel lengpa ahi, atiuve. Hijeh chun kisatpidin ahin um taovin; ahinla Jehoshaphat chu apeng jah-in ahile, Pakaiyin akithopin; Pathen'in amaho chu amapa adalhah sahtan ahi." 
2Chronicles18:32 Ajehchu ahung hitin ahi, sakol kangtalai lamkaihon Israel lengpa ahilou ahetphat uvin, ama nung adel naova konin ahung kinungle taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles18:33 Chuin mikhatnin doitum neilouvin athal akapmin ahile, Israel lengpa ompho kikah tah chu akhan ahi. Hijeh chun asakol kangtalai tolpa henga, Janel lah-a kona neitoldoh theinadin nakhut leheijin; ajehchu keima kamachang tan ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles18:34 Chule hiche nikho chun galkisat anasalheh jengin: ahijeng vangin Israel lengpa chu sakol kangtalai chunga Syria mite lamngan nilhah geijin aumin: chuin nisa lhumphat donin athitan ahi. 
2Chronicles19:1 Chuin Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chu lungmong tah-in a-in lam Jerusalem'a ahung kile kit tai. 
2Chronicles19:2 Chuin ama kimupi din mitvahnei Hanani chapa Jehu apotdoh-in, Jehoshaphat lengpa henga, Nangman Pathen helouho napanpi-a, Pakai hotbolteho nangailut ding hijaham? hijeh chun Pakai masanga konin nachung uva lunghana achutan ahi." 
2Chronicles19:3 Ahivangin hiche gama kona doikhomho nalahmanga, Pathen holding nalungthim nagot jeh-in, nangma-a thilpha akimun ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles19:4 Chuin Jehoshaphat Jerusalem'a achengin; Beersheba'a pat Ephraim molsang geijin amite lah-a achelen, Pakai apu apateu Pathen lama amaho chu ahin lepui kitnin ahi." 
2Chronicles19:5 Chuin aman Judah gama kulbang nei khopiho jouse-a, khopi tina thutan ho akoijin," 
2Chronicles19:6 Thutan ho henga, Nathilbol uva chingtheijun: ajehchu mihem dinga thutan nahipouvin; nathutan naova na-umpiu Pakai ding joh-a thutan nahiuve." 
2Chronicles19:7 Hijeh chun tun nachung uva Pakai ginna umhen; chingthei tah-in bolun: ajehchu Pakai i-Pathen uva chun khangitlouna, maipha vetna, chule nehguh nehna aumpon ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles19:8 Chukalvalin amaho Jerusalem'a ahung kile phatnun, Jehoshaphat'in Jerusalem'a chun Pakai thutan ding le thunoh baotamna-a thutan dingin Levi ho le thempuho, chule Israel phung upaho akoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles19:9 Chule aman amaho chu athupeh-in, Nanghon Pakai ging pum le kitah tah-a, chule lungthim chamkim tah-a hichu naboldiu ahi." 
2Chronicles19:10 Chule achennao akhopi houva nasopiteu lah-a kon ipi thu hijongle: thisan le thisan kikah thu, danthu le thupeh kikah thu, chondanho le thutanlhahho thua naheng uva hungchan chu, nangho le nasopiteu chunga lunghanna achuh louna dinga Pakai douna-a asuhkhel louna diuva nahil chahdiu ahi. Hichehi bolun, chutile nasuhkhel lou dingu ahi." 
2Chronicles19:11 Chule veuvin, thempu chungnung Amariah chu Pakai thulam jouse-a nachung uva aumin; chule lengpa thulam jouse-a Judah te insung vaihompa Ishmael chapa Zebadiah aume; chule Levi mite jong chu namasanguva lamkai hidiu ahi. Hangtah-in tongun, chule Pakaiyin miphaho aumpi ding ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles20:1 Hiche jou jonghin ahitin ahi, Moab chatele Ammon chate chu Ammon mite hilou adangtoh Jehoshaphat satdin ahunguvin ahi." 
2Chronicles20:2 Chuin mi phabep Jehoshaphat henga ahungun, Mihonpi tamtah nangma doudin twipigal hilam Syria'a konin ahung konun; chule vetan, Engedi kite Hazazon-tamar'a aumun ahi, tin ahilun ahi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Chuin Jehoshaphat akicha tan, Pakai holdin akipen, Judah gamsung pumpi-a an ngol din aphongdoh tan ahi." 
2Chronicles20:4 Chuin Judah chu Pakai kithopina thumdin akikhom khomun: Judah khopiho jouse-a konin Pakai holdin ahungdoh-un ahi. 
2Chronicles20:5 Chuin Jehoshaphat chu Judah le Jerusalem houkhom ho lah, Pakai insunga inhong thah maija chun adingin," 
2Chronicles20:6 Hitin ati, Vo kapu kapateu Pakai Pathen, nangma van'a um Pathen nahi hilouham? chule Pathen helou mite lenggam ho chunga vaihom nahi hilouham? chule koimachan nanan joulou na dinga, nakhutna thahatna le thaneina uma hilouham?" 
2Chronicles20:7 Nami Israelte masanga kona hiche gama chengho nodoh-a, nagolpa Abraham chilhahte tonsotna dia pe-a ka-Pathen'u nahi hilouham?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Chuin amaho hia chun achengun, hia chun namin dingin muntheng khat nasahpeh-un," 
2Chronicles20:9 Ijemtia kachunguva thilphalou, chemjam, thutana, hise, kellhah ho kachunguva ahung chuh-a ahile, hiche in mai le na angsung tah-a hi kadindiu, (ajehchu hiche insunga hi namin uma ahi,) kathohgim naova kona nangma henga kapendiu, chuteng nangman neingaipeh uva neikithopi dingu ahi, tin anaseijuve." 
2Chronicles20:10 Chule tun, vetan, Egypt gama kona ahungdoh laijuva Israel ten gala asat dingu nanaphal louho, amavang amaho-a kona kinungle uva, asuhmang louvu Ammon chate le Moab chate, chule Seir molsang miho hi;" 
2Chronicles20:11 Vetan, itobanga eilethuh-u hitam, nangman kalodiuva neinapeh-u nagouchana kona nodoh dingin ahunguve." 
2Chronicles20:12 Vo ka Pathen'u, nangman athu-u natanlou dingham? Ajehchu eidoudiuva hungkon hiche hon tamtah ho douna dingin hatna kanei pouvin; alonaje jong kahepouve: ahin kamitnu hi nangma chunga aume, ati." 
2Chronicles20:13 Chuin Judah te jouse chu Pakai angsunga achasen houle ajiteu, chule achateu toh adingsoh keijun ahi" 
2Chronicles20:14 Hichun Levi mi Asaph chate lah-a Mattania chapa, Jeiel chapa, Benaiah chapa, Zekeriah chapa, Jahaziel chunga chun houkhom ho lailung tah-a Pakai lhagao ahungchutan;" 
2Chronicles20:15 Chuin aman, Ngaijun, nangho Judah te jouse le Jerusalem'a cheng jouse, chule nangma Jehoshaphat lengpa, Pakaiyin najah uva hitin aseije, Hiche mihonpi jeh hin nangho kicha hih-un, lung jong lungthoi hih-un; ajehchu galsat hi nangho-a ahipon, Pathen'a joh ahi" 
2Chronicles20:16 Jing nikhole amaho doudingin konsuh-un; veuvin, amaho Ziz songkol'a ahung kaltou uve; nanghon Jeruel gamthip masang, vadung kichaina lama namudiu ahi." 
2Chronicles20:17 Hiche galhi nangho sat ngailou ding ahi: nangho le nangho kigol toh-un, dingthim beh uvinlang, napanpiuva Pakai huhhingna chu veuvin, vo Judah le Jerusalem: kicha hih-un, lungjong lungthoi hih-un; jingtengle amaho doudingin kondoh-un; ijeh inem itile Pakaiyin na umpi dingu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles20:18 Chuin Jehoshaphat akunin amai tolla asuluttai: chuin Judah le Jerusalem'a cheng jouse Pakai anga alhuvin, Pakai chu ahou taove." 
2Chronicles20:19 Chuin Kohath chate lah-a kon le Korhi chate lah-a kon Levi miho chu awgin sangtah le nasatah-a Israel Pakai Pathen vahchoi dingin adingdoh uvin ahi. 
2Chronicles20:20 Chuin jingpi tah-in athouvun, Tekoa gamthipma alutnun: amaho achedoh laijun Jehoshaphat adingin, ajah uva, Vo Judah le Jerusalem'a chengte, kathusei ngaijun; Pakai na Pathen'u tahsanun, chutile naki phutdet dingu ahi; athemgaoho tahsanun, chutile nalolhin dingu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles20:21 Chuin mipi toh akihoutoh phatnin, Pakai vahchoijun, ajehchu ahepina tonsotnin aumjinge, tia sepaiho masanga achepumuva athen hoina vahchoi ding le Pakai henga lasa ding mi alhengdoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles20:22 Chuin amahon lasah le vahchoina apat phatnun, Pakaiyin Judah doudinga hunga Ammon chate, Moab chate, chule Seir molsang miho dounan changpang akoijin; chuin amaho chu ajou taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles20:23 Ajehchu Ammon chate le Moab chate chu Seir molsang miho thatgam hela sumanghel dingin amaho dounan akipat doh-un: Seir'a chengho athagam phatnun, amitakip khatle khat akisumangto taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles20:24 Chuin Judah te gamthipma um khongahpa insang ahung lhun phatnun, mihonpi lam chu aveovin ahile, veuvin, tolla mithilong alhuchap jengin, khatcha ahoidoh aumpouve." 
2Chronicles20:25 Chuin Jehoshaphat le amite chu galthil kichomdinga ahung phatnun, amahon mithi longho-a chun thil mantam tahtah haosatna le kijepna thil lutahtah ho amuvin, apohlel khophel dingun amaho-a din akisut lhah-un ahi: chule atam behseh jehchun, galthil chu nithumjen achom khomun ahi." 
2Chronicles20:26 Chuin nilinin amaho Berachah phaichama akikhomun ahi; ajehchu hia chun Pakai achoi-anun ahi. Hijeh chun hiche mun minchu tugeijin Berachah phaicham akitin ahi. 
2Chronicles20:27 Chujouvin Judah le Jerusalem mite jouse akinung leuvin, Jerusalem'a kipahtah-a chedingin Jehoshaphat chu alamkaijin ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin amelmateu chunga akipasah-u ahi." 
2Chronicles20:28 Chuin tumging le selangdah, chule sumkon tho-in Jerusalem'a Pakai in chu ahunglhung taove." 
2Chronicles20:29 Chuin Pakaiyin Israel te-a dingin amelmateu dounan gal asatne ti ajah phatnun, chuche lenggam ho jouse chunga Pathen ginna achutai." 
2Chronicles20:30 Chuin Jehoshaphat gamsunga lungmona aumtan ahi; ajehchu a-Pathen'in akimvela choldona apeh ahi. 
2Chronicles20:31 Hitichun Jehoshaphat chu Judah te chunga aleng changin ahi. Ama alengchan pat chun kum somthum le kumnga ahin, ama Jerusalem'a kum somni le kumnga aleng changin ahi. Chule anu minchu Azubah ahin, Shilhi chanu ahi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Chule aman apa Asa lamlhah ajotnin, chua kona petdoh louvin Pakai mitmu-a adih chu abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles20:33 Ahijeng vangin munsang ho chu lahmangin aumpon ahi; ajehchu mipi chun apu apateu Pathen lama dingin alungthimu agongtup hihlaijun ahi. 
2Chronicles20:34 Tun Jehoshaphat thilbol dangho jouse chu abula pat achaina gei chu, veuvin, Israel lengte lekhabu sunga kiphapoh, Hanani chapa Jehu lekhabua akisuncheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles20:35 Hiche jou nung hin Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chun thil giloutah bola Israel lengpa Ahaziah toh kiguijopna aneijin; 
2Chronicles20:36 Aman Tarshish'a chena ding kong-innei semna'a amato chun akigui jopmin; chule amanin Ezion-gaber'a kong innei chu asem lhonin ahi. 
2Chronicles20:37 Chujouvin Mareshah mi Dodavah chapa Eliezer'in Jehoshaphat dounan gaothu aseijin, ahenga, Nangman Ahaziah toh kiguijopna nabol jeh-in, Pakaiyin nanatoh ho asusetai, ati. Hitichun kongho chu suhsetnin aum gamin, Tarshish'a achethei lhon tapoi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Tun Jehoshaphat apu apate toh alumkhomin, David khopi-a apu apate toh avuikhom taove. Chule ama khelin achapa Jehoram alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles21:2 Aman Jehoshaphat chapate sopi Azariah, Jehiel, Zechariah, Azariah, Michael, chule Shephatiah aneijin: amahohi abonuva Israel lengpa Jehoshaphat chapate ahiuve." 
2Chronicles21:2 Aman Jehoshaphat chapate sopi Azariah, Jehiel, Zechariah, Azariah, Michael, chule Shephatiah aneijin: amahohi abonuva Israel lengpa Jehoshaphat chapate ahiuve." 
2Chronicles21:3 Chule apaovin amaho thilpeh nasatah dangka, sana, thilmantam ho, chule Judah gama kulbang nei khopiho apeuvin ahi: ahinla lenggam chu Jehoram apen ahi; ajehchu ama apeng masapen ahi." 
2Chronicles21:4 Tun Jehoram'in apa lenggam ahin lopat phatnin, amale ama akisuhat nin, asopi pasal jouse chemjamin athatnin, Israel pipuiho dangdang jong athatnin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:5 Alengchan patchun Jehoram chu kum somthum le kumni ahitan, Jerusalem'a kumget aleng changin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:6 Aman Ahab insung bangin Israel lengte lamlhah ajotnin ahi; ajehchu aman Ahab chanu jin aneijin: chule Pakai mitmun thilse abolin ahi. 
2Chronicles21:7 Ahinla Pakaiyin David to kitepna anasemjeh le, amale achate henga a-itih-a meivah peh dinga anakitep jehchun, David insung chu asumang pon ahi." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ama nikholai chun Edom mite chu Judah vaihomna noija aumnaova konin akiphinun, leng khat akitun taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:9 Chuin Jehoram apipuiho le amato umkhom sakol kangtalai jousetoh akondoh-un: chuin jan-in athoudoh-in, ama le asakol kangtalai lamkaiho umkimvela Edom mite chu asatnin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:10 Hitichun tuni geijin Edom mite chu Judah te khutnoija konin akiphinjing taovin ahi. Hiche phatlai mama jong chun aman apu apate Pakai Pathen anungsun jeh-in; Libnah chu akhut noija konin akiphinin ahi. 
2Chronicles21:11 Chukalvalin jong aman Judah molsang chungho-a munsang ho asemin, Jerusalem'a chengho ajonthanhoi sah-in, Judah te apuimangin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:12 Chuin Elijah themgaova konin ahenga lekha ahungin, hitin ati, Napa David Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, nangman napa lamlhah najuilou jehle, Judah leng Asa lamlhah najuilou jeh," 
2Chronicles21:13 Amavang Israel lengte lamlhah najuija, Ahab insung jonthanhoi banga Judah le Jerusalem'a chengho na jonthanhoi sah-a, nang sanga phajo cheh napa insunga nasopite nathagam jeh-in," 
2Chronicles21:14 Vetan, Pakaiyin namite, nachate, najite, chule nanei nagouho jouse chu hise nasatah-a ajepding:" 
2Chronicles21:15 Chule nangman gilnatna kona natna nasatah naneiding, ani ni-a hiche natna jeh-a chu nagil hung lotdoh kahse-a natna nanei ding ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles21:16 Chukal valin Pakaiyin Ethopia naija um Philistine miho le Arab miho lungthim chu Jehoram doudingin atildoh-in; 
2Chronicles21:17 Amaho Judah gama ahung kontouvun, abuluvin, lengpa insunga kimu thiljouse le achapate le ajite jong apomangun; hitichun achate lah-a alhumpen Jehoahaz tailou chapa khatcha adalhahpeh pouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:18 Chuin hicheho jouse jouhin Pakaiyin amachu gilnat damthei louvin ajeptan ahi.
