2Chronicles21:19 Chuin ahitin ahi, phat phabep sung kumni kichai jouvin, anatnajeh in agiljang ahung lotdoh-in; hitichun natna hoisetah-in athitan ahi. Chule amiten apate meikong anatipeh ji bangun, ama chu meikong atipeh pouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles21:20 Alengchan kipat in ama kum somthumle kumni ahin, Jerusalem'a kumget lengvai apon, koimacha alha ngaija beihelin athitan ahi. Ahijeng vangin amahon David khopi-a avuijun, lengte lhan vang ahipoi." 
2Chronicles22:1 Chuin Jerusalem'a chenghon achapa lhumpen Ahaziah chu ama khelin alengchansah taove. Ajehchu Arab miho toh kiloija gebuh-a hunga mihon ho chun a-ute sese atha gamu ahitai. Hitichun Judah lengpa Jehoram chapa Ahaziah chu alengchang tan ahi. 
2Chronicles22:2 Alengchan patchun Ahaziah chu kum somli le kumni ahin, Jerusalem'a kumkhat aleng changin ahi. Anu min chu Athaliah ahin, Omri chanu ahi." 
2Chronicles22:3 Amajong Ahab insung lamlhah ajuijin ahi. Ajehchu anu chu athilse bolna dinga athumopma pang ahi. 
2Chronicles22:4 Hijeh chun aman Pakai mitmun Ahab insung bangin thilse abolin ahi: ajehchu apa thinungin amaho chu amanthahna dinga thumopmin apanguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles22:5 Amajong amaho thumop bangchun achonin, Israel lengpa Ahab chapa Jehoram toh kilhonin Syria lengpa Bazael toh kisatdin Ramoth-Gilead'a achen: chule Syria mihon Joram chu amavouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles22:6 Chuin Syria lengpa Hazael toh Ramoth'a akisatna-a amachanjeh-in, kijendam dingin Jezreel'a ahung kiletai. Chuin ama adamlou jehchun, Judah lengpa Jehoram chapa Azariah chu Ahab chapa Jehoram ve dingin Jezreel'a ache suh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles22:7 Chule Joram henga Amaziah ahungchu amanthahna dinga Pathen thilgon ahi: ajehchu ama ahung chun, Pakaiyin Ahab insung sumang ding thao anu Nimshi chapa Jehu doudin Jehoram toh akondoh lhonin ahi." 
2Chronicles22:8 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, Jehu'n Ahab insung chunga thutana anei laijin, Judah pipuiho le Ahaziah sopiho chapaten Ahaziah ajenu chu amun, amaho chu athat tan ahi." 
2Chronicles22:9 Chuin aman Ahaziah aholin; chule amahon ama amanun, (ajehchu ama Samaria'a anakisel ahin,) Jehu henga ahin puijun ahi. Chuin amahon ama atha jouvun avui taovin ahi. Ajehchu amahon, Amahi alung pumpi-a Pakai hola Jehoshaphat chapa ahi, atiuve. Hitichun Ahaziah insung miten lenggam chunga lengvaipo ding anei tapouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ahinla Ahaziah nu Athaliah'in achapa thi amu phatnin, akipatdoh-in Judah insunga lengte chilhah jouse athat gamtan ahi." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ahinla lengpa chanu Jeho-shabeath'in Ahaziah chapa Joash chu akithatna leng chapate lah-a konin agudoh-in, adonnu toh indan sung khatna akoitai. Hitichun Jehoram lengpa chanu Jehoiada thempupa jinu Jeho-shabeath chun (ajehchu amanu Ahaziah sopinu hija ahi,) amanun amapa atha louna dingin, Athaliah'a konin aselin ahi." 
2Chronicles22:12 Chuin ama chu amahotoh kumgup sung Pathen in'a akiselin: chule gamsunga chun Athaliah'in lengvai apon ahi. 
2Chronicles23:1 Chuin kum sagi lhinna-in Jehoida akisuhat nin, Ja lamkaiho, Jeroham chapa Azariah, Jehohanan chapa Ishmael, Obed chapa Azariah, Adaiah chapa Maaseiah, chule Zichri chapa Alishaphat apuijin, amato kitepna aneijin ahi." 
2Chronicles23:2 Chuin Judah gam achonleuvin, Judah khopiho-a konin Levi mite le Israel phung upaho jouse akhomun, Jerusalem'a ahungun ahi." 
2Chronicles23:3 Chuin houkhom ho jouse Pathen insung lengpa toh thulhun asemuvin ahi. Chuin aman ajah uva, Veuvin Pakaiyin David chapate thudol asei banga, lengpa chapan lengvai apohding ahi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Nanghon nabol dingu chu hiche ahi; choldoni-a lutji thempuho le Levi ho lah-a hopthum-a hopkhat chu kotngah-a napandiu," 
2Chronicles23:5 Hopthum-a hopkhat lengpa in'a; chule hopthum-a hopkhat chu kotpi bula napandiu: chule mipi ho jouse chu Pakai in hongcha ho-a umdiu ahi. 
2Chronicles23:6 Ahinla thempuho le kinbola pang Levi ho tailou koimacha Pakai insung hunglut louding ahi; amaho athenjeh uva lutdiu ahin: mipi ho jouse vang Pakai anga dingu ahi. 
2Chronicles23:7 Chule Levi miten akhutna manchah kichoijuva lengpa chu aum kimvel diu; koi hijongle insung hunglut chan chu kithat ding ahi. Ahinla nanghon lengpa chu ahunglut le apotdoh teng naumpi jingdiu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles23:8 Hitichun Levi ho le Judah te jousen Jehoida thempu thupeh bangtah-in abolun, chule amitakipmin choldoni-a hunglut ding amiho chu choldoni-a potdoh dingho chutoh apuijun ahi; ajehchu Jehoida thempupan anatoh-u angahsah louvu ahi." 
2Chronicles23:9 Chukalvalin Jehoida thempupan ja lamkaiho chu Pakai in'a um David lengpa tengcha ho le lumho chu apen ahi. 
2Chronicles23:10 Chuin aman miho jouse chu amitakip akhutna galvon kengcheh-in houin jetlama pat veilam geijin, maicham le houin lhung lhonin lengpa kimvela adin sah-in ahi" 
2Chronicles23:11 Chujouvin amahon leng chapa ahin puidoh-un, achunga lallukhuh akhuh peh-un, thulhun chu apeuvin, lengin asemtaove. Chuin Jehoiada le achapaten thao anuvin, Pathen'in lengpa huhhing hen atiuve." 
2Chronicles23:12 Tun Athaliah'in mipi alhai gin le lengpa vahchoina husa ajah phatnin, Pakai insunga mipi henga chun ahungin," 
2Chronicles23:13 Amanun agahven ahile, veuvin, insung lutna-a khompi phunga chun lengpa adingin, chule lengpa koma chun pipuiho le sumkon mutho adingun: gamsung mipi jouse akipah-un, sumkon amutnun, lasahon jong akihil bangun manchahto thon avahchoijun ahi. Chuphatnin Athaliah'in apon abot eh-in, Kidouna, kidouna, atin ahi." 
2Chronicles23:14 Hichun Jehoida thempupan janel chunga lamkaija akoi ja lamkaiho chu apuidoh-in, ajah uva, Amanu chu milah-a konin puidoh unlang, amanu juichan chu chemjamin thatnun, ati. Ajehchu thempupan, Amanu chu Pakai insunga that hih-un ati, ahi." 
2Chronicles23:15 Hitichun amahon achunga akhut alhaovin; lengpa in khoma sakol lutna kotpi phung ahunggei phatnin, chua chun amanu athat taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles23:16 Chuin Jehoiada'n ama le mipi ho jouse le lengpa kah-a chun Pathen mite ahina diuvin kitepna asemin ahi. 
2Chronicles23:17 Hichun mipi jouse Baal in'a acheuvin, amaichamho le amilimho asuchimun, maicham meija chun Baal thempu Mattan chu athat taove." 
2Chronicles23:18 Chujongle Jehoiada'n Pakai in'a natoh ding jouse chu, Mosi danthu bu-a kimu dungjuija David'in ana gontup bangchun, Pakai insunga kipah le lasa puma Pakai henga govam thilto tohdoh dinga David'in anahoptoh Levi mite thempuho khutna apedoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Chule aman imalam jouse-a thenglou tapou khatcha alut louna dingin, Pakai in kotpi-a kotngah ho akoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles23:20 Chuin aman ja lamkaiho, milunho, mipi chunga vaipoho le chuche gama mipi ho jouse chu apuijin, Pakai in'a konin lengpa chu apuilhasuh-un: kotpi sang palgalkai jin leng in lama acheuvin, lengpa chu alenggam laltouna-a atousah taove." 
2Chronicles23:21 Chule gamsung mipi jouse akipah-un: Athaliah chemjam'a atha phatnun, khopi chu lung mongin aumtan ahi." 
2Chronicles24:1 Joash chu alengchan patchun kum sagi ahibepmin, Jerusalem'a kum somli aleng changin ahi. Anu min chu Zibiah ahin, Beersheba mi ahi." 
2Chronicles24:2 Jehoiada thempu nikho laisen Joash'in Pakai mitmun adih abolin ahi. 
2Chronicles24:3 Chule Jehoiada ama dingin ji ni apuipeh-in, aman chanu chapa ahingin ahi." 
2Chronicles24:4 Chuin hiche jouhin ahitin ahi, Joash'in Pakai in semphat ding alungviltai." 
2Chronicles24:5 Chuin aman thempuho le Levi ho akhomin, ajah uva, Judah khopiho-a cheovinlang, akum kum-a Pakai in semphatnadin Israel mijouse henga dangka gadong khomun, chule hiche natoh hi nakino sah dingu ahi, ati. Ahinla Levi ho chu akino pouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles24:6 Chuin lengpan thempu chungnung Jehoiada chu akouvin, ajah-a, I-atile Pakai soh Mosi le Israel houkhom ho thupeh dungjuija hettohsahna houbuh-a dinga tokhom chu Judah le Jerusalem'a kona gadongkhom dinga Levi mite nasol louham?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Ajehchu numei phalounu Athaliah chapaten Pathen in chu asuseuvin; Pakai in'a thil kikatdoh jouse jong Baal'a dingin apedoh gam taovin ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles24:8 Chuin amahon lengpa thupeh-in sumbom asemun, hichu Pakai in kotpi polama akoijun ahi." 
2Chronicles24:9 Chuin gamthipma Pathen soh Mosi'n Israelte chunga anapohsah tokhom chu Pakai henga ahinchoi diuvin, Judah gamjouse le Jerusalem'a asam phong taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles24:10 Chuin pipuiho jouse le mipi ho jouse athanomun, ahinchoijun, apehchai kahseovin sumbom sunga alehlut nun ahi." 
2Chronicles24:11 Tun ahung hitin ahi, hichelai chun sum thingkhong chu lengpa natohna mun'a Levi ho khutnin ahin domlutnin, sum tampi aumtai ti ahet phatnun, lengpa thuchingpa le thempu chungnung vaipoho ahungun, sumbom chu ahongun, aladoh-un, chule amun mama-a agakoi kitnun ahi. Hitichun niseh in abolun, sum tampi akholdoh taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Chuin lengpa le Jehoiada'n hicheho chu Pakai in'a natong kinbolho apedoh lhonin; chule amahon Pakai in semphat nadin songkheng hole thingthem ho agoijun, chujongle Pakai in chu bolpha dingin thih le sum-enga semphaho jong agoijun ahi." 
2Chronicles24:13 Hitichun natong hon atongun amaho-a konin natoh chu amolsouvin, Pathen in chu amasalai bangin atungdoh-un, asudet taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles24:14 Chuin ajophatnun sumval chu lengpa le Jehoiada henga ahinchoijun, hichea chun Pakai in'a ding um le bel ho, kinbol nading le thiltona ding manchah ho, thihkhe ho, sanale dangka umle bel ho asemuvin ahi. Chuin Jehoiada nikho laisen Pakai in'a chun govam thilto tanglouvin atoh jinguvin ahi." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ahinla Jehoiada chu atehlheh tan, nikho alhingsetnin athin; athi chun kum jakhatle somthum ahitai." 
2Chronicles24:16 Chule Israelte lah-a Pathen'a ding le a-in dinga thilpha aboljeh-in, amahon David khopi-a lengho lah-a avuitaove." 
2Chronicles24:17 Tun Jehoiada thinungin Judah pipuiho ahungun, lengpa chu jana ahung peuvin ahi. Chuin lengpan amaho angaipeh tan ahi." 
2Chronicles24:18 Chuin amahon apu apateu Pakai Pathen in adalhauvin, thingbul le milim semthuho ahou taove: chule hiche suhkhelna jeh hin, Judah le Jerusalem chunga lunghanna achutai." 
2Chronicles24:19 Ahinla aman amaho chu Pakai henga hinlepui kit dingin themgaoho asolin; chule amahon amaho dounan thu aseijun: ahinla angaipeh pouve. 
2Chronicles24:20 Chuin Jehoiada thempupa chapa Zechariah chunga Pathen lhagao ahung chun, amachu miho chunglama adingin, ajah uva, Pathen'in hitin aseije, Nakhantou louna diuva ibola Pakai thupeh chu nasuhkhelu ham? Nanghon Pakai nanungsun tah jeh-un, amanjong nangho nanungsun taove, ati." 
2Chronicles24:20 Chuin Jehoiada thempupa chapa Zechariah chunga Pathen lhagao ahung chun, amachu miho chunglama adingin, ajah uva, Pathen'in hitin aseije, Nakhantou louna diuva ibola Pakai thupeh chu nasuhkhelu ham? Nanghon Pakai nanungsun tah jeh-un, amanjong nangho nanungsun taove, ati." 
2Chronicles24:21 Chuin ama dounan guhthimin akihou khomun, Pakai inhong sunga chun lengpa thupeh-in songin aseplih taove." 
2Chronicles24:22 Hitichun Joash lengpan apa Jehoiada'n ama anahepina ageldoh tapon, achapa chu athat tan ahi. Chuin athi konin, Pakaiyin hinvehen lang, hinlethuh hen, ati." 
2Chronicles24:23 Chuin kumlhun phatnin ahitin ahi, Syria sepaite chu ama doudingin ahung kontouvun; amaho Judah le Jerusalem'a ahungun, mipi lah-a kona pipuiho jouse athat gamun, amaho-a kona achomdoh jouse chu Damascus lengpa athot soh hel taove." 
2Chronicles24:24 Ajehchu Syria sepaiho hon lhomcha hunguva ahin, Pakaiyin janel mihon tamtah chu amaho khutna apedoh tan ahi; ajehchu amahon apu apateu Pakai Pathen anungsun taovin ahi. Hitichun amahon Joash chunga thutanna anei taove." 
2Chronicles24:25 Chuin amahon ama adalhah phatnun, (ajehchu natna nasatah thoh puma adalhah-u ahi,) Jehoiada chapate thisan jehchun asohte guhthimin akihou somun, ajalkhuna athatnun, ama athitai. Chuin David khopi-a avuijun, lengte lhanna vang avuipouve." 
2Chronicles24:26 Chule ama douna-a guhthima kihou somho chu hichehohi ahiuve; Ammon mi Shimeath chapa Zabad, Moab mi Shimrith chapa Zehozabad ahilhone." 
2Chronicles24:27 Tun achapate thudol le, achungah pohgih natsatje thu, chule Pathen in kisemphat thudol chu, veuvin, lengho thusimbua akisun chen cheh-in ahi. Chuin achapa Amaziah chu ama akhelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziah chu alengchan patchun kum somni le kumnga ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somni le kumko aleng changin ahi. Chule anu minchu Jehoaddan ahin, Jerusalem mi ahi." 
2Chronicles25:2 Chule aman Pakai mitmu-a adih abolin, ahinla lungthim chamkimtah-in abolpon ahi." 
2Chronicles25:3 Tun ahitin ahi, lenggam chu ama-a akiphudet phatnin, apa lengpa anathat asohho chu athat tan ahi." 
2Chronicles25:4 Ahinla achate chu athatpoi; Mosi danthupeh lekhabua kisun, Pate chu chate jeh-a thilou ding, chate dinga jong pate jeh-a thilou ding, amavang mitin ama chonset jeh-a thiding ahi, tia Pakaiyin athupeh bangchun abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles25:5 Chukalvalin Amaziah'in Judah te akhom khomin, Judah le Benjamin gamsunga apu apateu insung kailhah dungjuijin sang chunga lamkai le ja chunga lamkaijin apansah-in: chule kum somni-a pat chunglamse asima ahile, tengle lum choija gal konthei lhentum cheh mi sangjathum aumuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles25:6 Aman Israel gama kon mihat mihangsan cheh sangjakhat jong dangka talent jakhat-in athalah-e. 
2Chronicles25:7 Ahinla ahenga Pathen mi khat ahungin, Vo lengpa, Israel galsat ho chu lhonpi hih-in; ajehchu Pakaiyin Israel le Ephraim chate aumpipon ahi." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ahin nache ding ahi jongle, boljengin, galsat dingin kisuhatnin: Pathen'in melmate masanga nalhuhsah ding ahi; ajehchu Pathen'in panpi theina le pailhah theina thahat anei ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles25:9 Chuin Amaziah'in Pathen mipa jah-a, Achutile Israel sepaiho kapeh dangka talent jakhat chu i-ilo dingu hitam? ati. Chuin Pathen mipan adonbutnin, Pakaiyin chuche sanga gamchenga tamjo napehthei ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles25:10 Chuphatnin Amaziah'in Ephraim'a kona ahenga hung sepaiho chu in'a kile kitdin achom khentai. Hijeh chun Judah te chunga alunghang lheh jengun, lunghang tah-in inlama akilekit taove." 
2Chronicles25:11 Chuin Amaziah akisuhat nin, amite chu apuidoh-in, chi phaichama acheuvin, Seir miho chu sangsom jen athatnun ahi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Chuin ahing hoiju sangsom dang chu Judah ten gal hingin akaijun, songpi chungvuma akaitouvun, songpi vuma konin asonlhaovin, abonchauvin agoisoh jengun ahi." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ahinla Amaziah'in amatoh galsatna chelou dinga anungsolho chu Samaria apat Beth-horon geijin Judah gam khopiho chunga achuvin, mi sangthum athatnun, thilchom tamtah akipoh uvin ahi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Tun ahitin ahi, Edom mite athana-a Amaziah ahung kilekit phatnin, Seir chate pathenho chu ahinpon, a-pathen dingin atungdoh-in, a-anguva chun akunin, ahenguva gimnamtui ahalin ahi." 
2Chronicles25:15 Hijeh chun Amaziah chunga Pakai lunghan akongjahtan, ahenga themgao khat ahin solin, ama chun ajah-a, Ipi dinga nakhutna kona amite huhdohjoulou chuche mite pathenho najuiham? ati." 
2Chronicles25:16 Chuin ahitin ahi, ajah-a thu aseilai chun, lengpan ajah-a, Nangma lengpa thumopma kisem nahim? kithipmin, ibola kithat ding nahim? ati. Chuin themgaopa chu akhongaijin, Nangman hichehi nabola, kathumop nasan loujeh-in, Pathen'in nangma suhmangdin nagotai ti kahei, ati." 
2Chronicles25:17 Chujouvin Judah lengpa Amaziah'in mi thuhilna alan, Israel lengpa Jehoahaz chapa, Jehu chapa, Joash henga mi asolin, Hungin khatle khat kimaito-in kisat hite, agatisah-e." 
2Chronicles25:18 Chuin Israel lengpa Joash'in Judah leng Amaziah henga, Lebanon'a lingphungin Lebanon'a cedar phung jah-a, kachapa jiding nachanu neipen ati; chuin Lebanon'a konin gamsa khat ahungin, lingphung chu achon lhutan ahi." 
2Chronicles25:19 Nangman, Ven, keiman Edom mite kajouve natin, nalung thimin nangma kihoitho sah dingin nadom kangin ahi: tun na-in'a kium thimin; ibola nangma le naumpi Judah mite lhuhna dinga kisalung gima nahim? ati." 
2Chronicles25:20 Ahinla Amaziah'in ngaisah ding agopon ahi; ajehchu Edom mite pathenho ahoujeh uva, amelmateu khutna apehdoh theina dinga Pathen thilgon hija ahi." 
2Chronicles25:21 Hitichun Israel lengpa Joash ahung kontouvin, amale Judah lengpa Amaziah chu kimaito-in Judah gamsunga um Beth-shemeash'a kimaiton akisat lhontai." 
2Chronicles25:22 Chuin Judah ten Israelte masanga gal alel taovin, amitakip aponbuh cheh uva ajam taove." 
2Chronicles25:23 Chuin Israel lengpan Jehoahaz chapa, Joash chapa, Juda lengpa Amaziah chu Beth-shemesh'a amanin, Jerusalem'a ahinkaijin, Jerusalem kulbang chu Ephraim kotpi-a pat kulning kotpigei tong jalijen asuchimin ahi." 
2Chronicles25:24 Chuin aman Pathen insunga sana le dangka, chule um le bel ho jouse chu, lengpa in'a gouchinga pang Obed-edom le lhachaho pumin akaijin, Samaria'a akiletai." 
2Chronicles25:25 Chuin Judah lengpa Joash chapa Amaziah chu, Israel lengpa Jehoahaz chapa Joash thinungin kum somle kumnga ahing nalaije." 
2Chronicles25:26 Tun Amaziah thilbol dangho jouse abula pat ajogei chu, vetan, Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua kisunlut hilouham?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Tun Amaziah'in Pakai anungsun jouvin, Jerusalem'a chun ama dounan galguh abol taovin, chule ama Lachish'a ajamtai; ahinla Lachish'a mi anungdel sah-un, hia chun athat taove." 
2Chronicles25:28 Chuin sakol ho chunga ahinpouvin, Judah khopi-a chun apu apate toh avuikhom taove." 
2Chronicles26:1 Chuin Judah mite jousen kum somlegup hibep Uzziah chu apuijun, apa Amaziah khelin alengchan sah taove." 
2Chronicles26:2 Amachun lengpa apu apatetoh alupkhom nungin, Eloth kho chu asaphan, Judah gama alelutsah kit tai." 
2Chronicles26:3 Alengchan kipat in Uzziah kum somlegup ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somnga le kumni aleng changin ahi. Anumin chu Jecholiah ahin, Jerusalem mi ahi." 
2Chronicles26:4 Chule apa Amaziah thilbol jouse bangin, aman Pakai mitmu-a adih abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:5 Chuin Pathen kilahna hethemna nei Zachariah nikho laisen Pathen aholin; chule Pakai ahol laise chun Pathen'in alolhin sah-in ahi. 
2Chronicles26:6 Chuin ama akondoh-in Philistine te akisatpin, Gath kulbang le Jabnah kulbang, chule Ashdod kulbang asuchimin, Ashdod kimvel le Philistine mite lah-a khopiho asan ahi." 
2Chronicles26:7 Chuin Pathen'in Philistinte le Gurbaal'a chenga Arab mite, chule Mehunim mite douna-in apanpin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:8 Chuin Ammon miten Uzziah chu thilpeh apeuvin: Egypt lutna geijin amin athangin ahi; ajehchu ama nasatah-in akisuhatna ahi. 
2Chronicles26:9 Chukalvalin Uzziah'in Jerusalem kotpi ning le, phaicham kotpi, chule kulbang kisuhto na-a chun insang asan, hicheho chu asudetnin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:10 Nelphaija jong insang asan, twikul tamtah alaijin ahi: ajehchu aman gamnem laile phaicham ho-a gancha tamtah anei ahi; chule molsang hole Carmel mun'a honlei bolding akoijin ahi; ajehchu loubol ngailu mi ahi." 
2Chronicles26:11 Chukalvalin Uzziah lengpan agal lamkai khat Hananiah khutnoija lekha sunpa Jeiel le vaipopa Maaseiah khutna ajatnu kisimtoh dungjuijin, ahon honna kondoh-a galbol mi janel aneijin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:12 Mihat mihangsan pipuiho jouse chu sangni le jagup alhinguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles26:13 Amaho khutnoija thanei tah-a galsat, melma-a kona lengpa panpi thei sepai sangjathum le sangsagi le janga aumuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:14 Chule Uzziah'in sepai jousedin lum, tengcha, thih lukhuh, thih sangkhol, thalpi, chule song sena ahsongse agonpeh cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles26:15 Chuin aman Jerusalem'a thilsemdoh themho pohdoh-a konin insang chungle kulpi bangho chunga thal kapdohna dingle songlen lenho kapdohna ding manchah aseme. Chuin gamtina aminthang tan ahi; ajehchu ahat kikhon kahsen kidang tah-in kithopin aumin ahi. 
2Chronicles26:16 Ahinla ahung hatdoh phatnin, amanthah nadingin alungthim ahung kichoisang tai. Ajehchu Pakai a-Pathen dounan asuhkhel tan, gimnamtui halna maicham chunga gimnamtui haldingin Pakai houin sung alutnin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:17 Chuin Azeriah thempupa le mihangsan cheh Pakai thempu mi somgetnin anung ajuilutnun; 
2Chronicles26:18 Chule Uzziah lengpa chu ajahdaovin, ahenga, Uzziah, Pakai henga gimnamtui halhi nang bolding ahipoi, gimnamtui haldinga kithenso Aaron chate thempuho bolding ahibouve: munthenga konin potdoh-in; ijeh inem itile nangman nasukhel tan; Pakaiya kona jabolna nachanna lou ding ahi, atiuve." 
2Chronicles26:19 Hichun Uzziah alunghangin, akhutna gimnamtui halna ding lheng akichoi ahin; chuin thempuho chunga alunghan phatchun, Pakai insunga thempuho masang gimnamtui halna maicham koma chun achalpanga phah ahung chutan ahi." 
2Chronicles26:20 Chuin thempu chungnung Azariah le thempuho jousen avetnuva ahile, veuvin, achalpang chu anaphahtan, amahon chua konchun asondoh taovin ahi; hichun amatah jong potdoh din akinotan ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin ama chu aden ahitai." 
2Chronicles26:21 Hitichun Uzziah lengpa chu athikahsen miphah ahitan, miphah ahi jehchun inchoma achengtai; ajehchu Pakai in'a kona kinodoh ahitai. Chuin achapa Jotham chu leng in chunga vaipon apangin, gamsung mite thu atanin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Tun Uzziah natoh adang jouse amasa-a pat ajona gei chu, Amoz chapa Isaiah themgaovin asunin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Tun Uzziah natoh adang jouse amasa-a pat ajona gei chu, Amoz chapa Isaiah themgaovin asunin ahi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Hitichun Uzziah chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, lengte kivuina mun'a chun apu apate toh avuitaove; ajehchu amahon, Ama miphah ahi, atiuve. Chuin ama khelin achapa Jotham alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotham alengchan pat chun kum somni le kumnga ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kumgup aleng changin ahi. Anu min chu Jerushah ahin, Zadok chanu ahi." 
2Chronicles27:2 Chuin aman apa Uzziah'in anabol jouse dungjujin Pakai mitmu-a adih chu abolin ahi: ahijeng vangin ama Pakai houin sunga analutpoi. Ahin mipichun thilphalou abol nalaijun ahi. 
2Chronicles27:3 Aman Pakai houin kotpi sang chu asan, chule Ophel kulbang chu nasatah-in asan ahi." 
2Chronicles27:4 Chukalvalin Judah molsang ho-a khopiho asan, gam mangho-a chun in thupi tahtah le insangho asan ahi." 
2Chronicles27:5 Ammon lengpa tojong akisatnin, amaho chu ajouvin ahi. Chule Ammon chaten hiche kum mama chun dangka talent jakhat toh suhlouchang atena dim sangsom le sakolchang atena dim sangsom apeuvin ahi. Hitichun Ammon chaten amachu akum ninale thum na-in jong tamtah tah apeuve." 
2Chronicles27:6 Hitichun jotham'in Pakai Pathen anga alampi akigontup jeh-in, ahung hat lhehtan ahi." 
2Chronicles27:7 Tun Jotham thilbolho dangho jouse, agalbolho jouse, alamlhah jouse chu, veuvin, Israel le Judah lengte lakhabu-a akijihlut cheh-e." 
2Chronicles27:8 Ama alengchan pat chun kum somni le nga ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kumgup lengvai apon ahi." 
2Chronicles27:9 Chuin Jotham apu apate toh alumkhomin, David khopi-a avuitaove: chuin achapa Ahaz chu ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaz alengchan pat chun kum somni ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kumgup aleng changin ahi. Ahin aman apu David bangin Pakai mitmun adih abolpon ahi." 
2Chronicles28:2 Ajehchu Israel lengho lamlhah ajuijin, Baalim kilhajol jong asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:3 Chukalvalin Hinnom chapa phaichama chun gimnamtui ahalin, Pakaiyin Israelte masanga anodohsa namho thilbol thet umtah bangin, aman achate chu meija agouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:4 Aman munsang ho, lhangho, chule thinghing noi tina kilhaina abolin, gimnamtui ahalin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:5 Hijeh chun Pakai a-Pathen'in Syria lengpa khutna apedoh-in, amahon akisat piuvin, amaho tamtah gal hingin akaijun, Damascus'a apui taove. Chule Israel lengpa khutna jong pehdoh-in aumin, aman ajouvin, mi tamtah athatnin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:6 Ajehchu Remaliah chapa Pekah chun nikhat sungin Judah te sangjakhat le sangsomni athatnin, abonuva mihangsan cheh ahiuve; ajehchu amahon apu apateu Pakai Pathen anungsun taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:7 Chuin Ephraim mihatpa Zichri chun lengpa chapa Maaseiah le insung vaipo Azrikam, chule lengpa noidou Elkanah chu athatnin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:8 Chuin Israel ten asopiteu lah-a konin mi sangjani, numei ho, achapateu, chule achanuteu chu gal hingin akaimangun, amaho-a konin galthil tamtah jong apomangun, galthil kichomho chu Samaria'a ahinpouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ahinla Pakai themgao khat hia chun anaumin, amin Oded ahi: chuin ama Samaria'a hung janelho masanga chun achen, ajah uva, Judah te chunga napu napateu Pakai Pathen alunghan jeh-in amaho chu nakhut uva apedoh-in, ahin nanghon lunghan manin nathatnun, hichu van ahung geitai." 
2Chronicles28:10 Chule nanghon Judah le Jerusalem mite chu nanoi uva soh numei le soh pasal'a vulding nagouvin ahi: ahinla nangho-a jong, nangho tah ngeija jong Pakai na Pathen'u douna-a chonset uma hilouham?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Hijeh chun tun kasei ngaijun lang, nasopiteu lah-a kon gal-hinga nahinkaiju, gal-hingho chu lhadoh kit taovin; ajehchu tijat umtah Pakai lunghanna chu nachung uva aumtai, ati." 
2Chronicles28:12 Chuin Ephraim chate lamkaiho phabep, Johanan chapa Azariah, Mishillemoth chapa Berechiah, Shallum chapa Jehizkiah, chule Hadlai chapa Amasa chu galmuna kona hungho dounan adingdoh-un;" 
2Chronicles28:13 Ajah uva chun, Gal hinga namathou chu hilama nahinkai loudiu ahi: ajehchu Pakai douna-a ikhel nao chungchona, ichonset nao le isuhkhel nau belap ding go-a nahiuve: ijeh inem itile isuhkhelu alenin, Israelte douna-a tijat umtah lunghan chua ahitai, atiuve." 
2Chronicles28:14 Hitichun sepaihon gal hingho le galthil kichomho chu pipuiho le houkhom ho masanga adalha taove. 
2Chronicles28:15 Chuin akimin phahho chu akipatnun, gal-hinga kimanho chu apuijun, galthil ho-a kon chun alah uva sagoh keova umho chu von avonpeh-un, kengchot asepeh-un, nehding le donding apeuvin, thao anuvin; achatmo jouse sangan chunga atousah-un, lusu kena khopi-a asopiteu umna Jericho'a apuijun; chuin amaho Samaria'a akile taove." 
2Chronicles28:16 Hichelai chun Ahaz lengpan Assyria lengpa ahin panpi nadingin ahenga mi asolin ahi. 
2Chronicles28:17 Ajehchu Edom miten Judah te ahung satkit uvin, gal hingin akai kit taove." 
2Chronicles28:18 Chuin Philistine ten jong gamnem khopiho le Judah lhanglam ahin buluvin, Beth-shemesh, Aijalon le Gederoth, chule Shocho chu akhoneo hou pumin, Timnah chu akhoneo hou pumin, Gimzo jong akhoneo hou pumin alauvin, hia chun acheng taove." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ajehchu Israel lengpa Ahaz jeh-a Pakaiyin Judah asuhnem ahi; ajehchu Judah chu sagoh-a aumsah-a, Pakai douna nasatah-a chonkhel ahi." 
2Chronicles28:20 Chule Assyria lengpa Tilgath-pilneser chu ahenga ahungin, hatsah jolouvin, ahung sugenthei jin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ajehchu Ahaz'in Pakai in'a konle lengpa in'a kon, chule pipuiho-a kona thil mantamho alah doh-a Assyria lengpa chu apeh ahin; ahinla aman apanpipon ahi." 
2Chronicles28:22 Chule alung genthei laitah-in jong Pakai douna suhkhel aneibebe jengin ahi: hichehi Ahaz lengpa chu ahi. 
2Chronicles28:23 Ajehchu aman alel Damascus te pathenho henga ganlhai abolin; chule aman, Syria lengte chu a-pathen houvin apanpi jeh-un, keima jong eipanpi theina diuvin, amaho henga ganlhaina bolinge, ati ahi. Ahinla amaho chu amale Israelte jouse manthah na ahi." 
2Chronicles28:24 Chuin Ahaz'in Pathen in'a umle bel ho achom khomin, Pathen in'a umle bel ho chu asatse gamin, Pakai in kot akhahchah-in, Jerusalem ningkoi tina ama dingin maicham akisemin ahi." 
2Chronicles28:25 Chule Judah te khopi tamtah-a pathen dangho henga gimnamtui halna ding munsang ho asemin, apu apate Pakai Pathen alunghan sah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles28:26 Tun athilbol dangho le achondan dangho jouse abula pat achaigei chu, veuvin, Judah le Israel leng teho lekhabua akisun cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles28:27 Chuin Ahaz chu apu apatetoh alumkhomin, khopisung Jerusalem ngeija chun avuitaove: ahinla Israel lengte lhana chun akoipouve. Chuin achapa Hezekiah chu ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiah alengchan pat chun kum somni le kumnga ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somni le kumko aleng changin ahi. Anu minchu Abijah ahin, Zekeriah chanu ahi." 
2Chronicles29:2 Ama apa David'in anabolho jouse bangin Pakai mitmu-a adih abolin ahi. 
2Chronicles29:3 Alengchan kipat kum, lha masapen-in Pakai in kotho chu ahongin, asemphan ahi." 
2Chronicles29:4 Aman thempuho le Levi ho apuilutnin, solam khopi lamlena akhom khomin," 
2Chronicles29:5 Chuin ajah uva, Nangho Levi ho, kathu ngaijun, tun nanghole nangho kisuthengun lang, napu napateu Pakai Pathen in jong suthengun, chule munthenga konin abohho chu podoh uvin." 
2Chronicles29:6 Ajehchu ipateovin asukhelun, Pakai i-Pathen'u mitmu-a thilphalou anabolun, chule ama adalhaovin, Pakai chenna mun'a konin amai aheimangun, anung ngat taove." 
2Chronicles29:7 Chujongle hongcha kotho akhah-un, meivah ho asumitnun, muntheng sunga chun Israel Pakai Pathen henga gimnamtui ahal pouvin chule govam thilto jong atohpouve." 
2Chronicles29:8 Hijeh chun Pakai lunghanna chu Judah le Jerusalem mite chunga achutan, namit tah uva namu-u bangin boina, lungkidanna, chule khoisatna henga apedoh taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ijeh inem itile veuvin, ipu ipateu chu chemhemin alouvun, hichejeh hin ichapateu le ichanuteu chule ijiteu asohchang taove." 
2Chronicles29:10 Tun alunghana tijat umtah chu eihoa kona aheimang theina dingin, Pakai Israel Pathen toh kitepna semding kalunga aumin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ka chapateho, tun nahsahmon bolhih-un: ajehchu Pakaiyin nangho hi a-angsunga dingding, ama jending, alhacha na tongding, chule gimnamtui hal nadinga nalhenu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles29:12 Hichun Levi miho chu, Kohath chapate lah-a kon Amasai chapa Mahat le Azeriah chapa Joel: chule Merari chapate lah-a kon Abdi chapa Kish, Jehalelel chapa Azariah: Gershon mite lah-a kon Zimmah chapa Joash le Joash chapa Eden," 
2Chronicles29:12 Hichun Levi miho chu, Kohath chapate lah-a kon Amasai chapa Mahat le Azeriah chapa Joel: chule Merari chapate lah-a kon Abdi chapa Kish, Jehalelel chapa Azariah: Gershon mite lah-a kon Zimmah chapa Joash le Joash chapa Eden," 
2Chronicles29:13 Chule Elizaphan chapate lah-a kon Shimri le Jeiel: Asaph chapate lah-a kon Zechariah le Mattaniah," 
2Chronicles29:13 Chule Elizaphan chapate lah-a kon Shimri le Jeiel: Asaph chapate lah-a kon Zechariah le Mattaniah," 
2Chronicles29:14 Chule Heman chapate lah-a kon Jehiuel le Shimei: Jeduthun chapate lah-a kon Shemaiah le Uzziel akipat doh-un ahi. 
2Chronicles29:15 Chuin asopiteu akou khomun, akisuthengun, Pakai thua kona lengpa thupeh dungjuijin Pakai in sutheng ding chun ahungtaove." 
2Chronicles29:16 Chuin thempuho chu asutheng dingin Pakai in sungnunga alutnun, Pakai houin sung athenglou amujouseu chu Pakai inhong sunga ahinpodoh uvin ahi. Chuin Levi mihon Kidron vadung lama pohdoh dingin alauvin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Tun lha masapen nimasanin asutheng pannun, chuchelha nigetnin Pakai hongcha-a ahungun, niget sungin Pakai in chu asuthengun, lha masa nisomle nigupnin ajona asemtaove." 
2Chronicles29:18 Chuin Hezekiah lengpa henga ahungun, ajah-a, Pakai in jouse le govam thiltona maicham chu a-umle belho jousetoh, chule vetsahna changlhah dokhang chu a-umle bel jouse toh kasutheng soh hel taove." 
2Chronicles29:19 Chukalvalin Ahaz lengpan alengvaipoh laija asuhkhelna apaimang um le bel jouse chu kagong toh-un, kasutheng uvin, chule ven, hicheho chu Pakai maicham masanga aumuve, atiuve." 
2Chronicles29:20 Hichun Hezekiah lengpa matah-in athouvin, khopi sunga vaihomho akhomin, Pakai houin lama achetou taove." 
2Chronicles29:21 Chuin lenggam le muntheng chule Judah dinga chonset thilto dingin bongchal sagi, kelngoichal sagi, kelngoinou sagi, chule kelchal sagi ahin kaijun ahi. Chuin hicheho chu Pakai maicham chunga tohdoh dingin Aaron chapate thempuho chu athupeh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles29:22 Hitichun bongchal ho chu athatnun, thempuhon athi chu alauvin, maicham chunga atheuvin; hitobang machun kelngoichal ho chu atha phatnun, athi chu maicham chunga atheuvin; kelngoinou ho jong athatnun, athichu maicham chunga atheuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:23 Chuin kelchalho chu chonset thilto dingin lengpa le houkhom ho masanga ahinkaijun; hicheho chunga chun akhutnu angamun: 
2Chronicles29:24 Chuin thempu hon hicheho chu athatnun, Israelte jouse-a dinga lhatdohna bolna dingin maicham chunga athisana kichamna asemun ahi: ajehchu lengpan govam thilto le chonset thilto chu Israelte jouse-a dinga boldingin athupeh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles29:25 Chuin David le lengpa themgao Gad chule Nathan themgao thupeh bangin, Pakai in'a chun Levi ho chu thih khutbeh, tumging le selangdah ho tumdin akoijun ahi: ijeh inem itile hitia chu boldinga Pakaiyin athemgaoho-a kona thu apeh ahi." 
2Chronicles29:26 Chule Levi ho chu David manchah ho toh, chule thempuho chu sumkon toh adingun ahi." 
2Chronicles29:27 Chuin Hezekiah'in maicham chunga chu govam thilto ato dinguvin thupeh aneijin ahi. Chuin govam thilto atopat phatnun, sumkon le Israel lengpa David manchah ho toh kithon Pakai la chu asapan taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:28 Chuin houkhom ho jousen Pathen ahouvun, lasahon la asauvin, sumkon mut hon sumkon amutnun: hicheho jousehi govam thilto kichai kahsen aboljom jingun ahi." 
2Chronicles29:29 Chuin thilto ajophatnun, lengpa le aumpiho jouse akunun, Pathen ahou taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:30 Achung chonin lengpa Hezekiah le pipuihon David le mitvanei Asaph sem Pakai la sadingin Levi ho thu apeuvin ahi. Chuin amahon kipahtah-in vahchoi la asaovin, akunun Pathen ahou uvin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:31 Hichun Hezekiah'in adonbutnin, Tun nangho Pakaiya dinga kisuhtheng nahitah-u toh kilhonin, hung naijun lang ganlhaina le thangvahna thilto hochu Pakai in sunga hin choijun, ati. Chuin houkhom ho chun ganlhaina le thangvahna thilto hochu ahinchoi lutnun; chule alungthima kiphalna neichan chun govam thilto atoh-un ahi." 
2Chronicles29:32 Chule houkhom ho hinto govam thilto jat chu bongchal somsagi, kelngoi chal jakhat, kelngoi nou jani ahi. Hicheho jousehi Pakai henga govam thilto-a ding ahi." 
2Chronicles29:33 Chule thil kithensoho chu bongchal jagup le kelngoi sangthum ahi. 
2Chronicles29:34 Ahinla thempuho alhom behseh jeh-u chun govam thilto jouse chu avun alipjou pouvin; hijeh chun natoh kichai kahsehle thempu dangho akisuhtheng kahseuvin asopihou Levi ho chun akitho piuvin ahi: ajehchu amaho le amaho kisuhtheng nalama Levi ho chu thempuho sangin alungdih jouvin ahi. 
2Chronicles29:35 Chujongle govam thiltoho, chamna thilto-a dinga athao ho, chule govam thilto jouse-a dinga don thiltoho chu atamlheh jengin ahi. Hitichun Pakai houin lhacha natoh dan chu akigoltoh chetnin ahi." 
2Chronicles29:36 Chuin Pathen'in mipi agontup jeh chun Hezekiah le mipi chu akipah lheh jenguvin ahi: ajehchu thilchu photlotna kibol ahi. 
2Chronicles30:1 Chuin Hezekiah'in Israelte le Judah te jouse henga mi asolin, chule Ephraim le Manasseh henga jong, Pakai houin Jerusalem mun'a ahunguva, Israel Pakai Pathen henga kalchuh kut ahung manna diuvin lekha athotnin ahi." 
2Chronicles30:2 Ajehchu lengpa le apipuiho chule Jerusalem'a houkhom ho jouse chu lhanina-a kalchuh kut mang dinga kihoutoh-u ahi. 
2Chronicles30:3 Ajehchu thempuho bulhing setna akisuh theng lou jeh-u le, mipi ho jong Jerusalem'a ahung kikhopkhom loujeh uva, hichepetna chu amanthei louvu ahi." 
2Chronicles30:4 Chule hiche thilhin lengpa le houkhom ho jouse alung lhaisah lheh-in ahi. 
2Chronicles30:5 Hitichun Beersheba'a pat Dan geija Israelte jouse henga, Jerusalem'a ahunguva Israel Pakai Pathen henga kalchuh kut ahungman diuva phonjal dingin akilol lha taovin ahi: ajehchu akisutdan bangtah a phat sottah anabol louvu ahitai." 
2Chronicles30:6 Hitichun lekha thah ho chu lengpa le pipuiho-a kona lekhathot pumin Israel le Judah gamjousea acheuvin, lengpa thupeh bangin hitin agaseijuve, Israel chate, nangho Abraham, Isaac, chule Israel Pakai Pathen henga hungkileuvin, chutile ama nangho Assyria lengte khutna kona hoidoh amohho henglama hungkile kitding ahi." 
2Chronicles30:7 Chule nangho apu apateu Pakai Pathen douna-a sukhela napu napateu le nasopiteu bangin umhih-un, hijeh-a chu namu-u bangahi aman amaho chu akamhel dinga apehdoh-u ahitai." 
2Chronicles30:8 Tun nangho napu napateu bangin lungtah hih-un, Pakai henga nangho le nangho kipelut unlang, a-itih-a dinga asuhthengsa amunthenga chun lutjouvin: chule alunghana tijat umtah chu nangho-a kona aheimang theinadin, Pakai na Pathen'u kin boluvin." 
2Chronicles30:9 Ajehchu Pakai heng lama nahung kilehei kitnuva ahile, nasopiteu le nachateo chu hiche gama ahung kilekit nadinguva gal hinga akaimanghou angsunga lungsetna chang dingu ahi: ajehchu Pakai na Pathen'u chu lungset le hepina-a dim ahin, nangho ama heng lama nakile heijuva ahile, aman nangho-a kona amai aheimang louding ahi, atiuve." 
2Chronicles30:10 Hitichun lekha thah ho chu Ephraim le Manasseh chule Zebulun geipeh-in khopitina acheuvin: ahinla amahon anuisatnun anahsah pouvin ahi. 
2Chronicles30:11 Ahijeng vangin Asher le Manasseh chule Zebulun mi phabep akineosah-un, Jerusalem'a ahungun ahi." 
2Chronicles30:12 Pakai thua kona lengpa le pipuiho thupeh jopnadin, Judah gamsung jong Pathen'in lungkhat aputsah uve." 
2Chronicles30:13 Chuin alhanina-in cholsolou changlhah kut mangdin Jerusalem'a mi tamtah, mipi atama tam akikhomun ahi." 
2Chronicles30:14 Chuin amaho akipatnun Jerusalem'a maicham ho chule gimnamtui halna maicham ho aladoh-un, Kidron vadunga aseplut taove." 
2Chronicles30:15 Hichun amahon lhanina nisomle nilinin kalchuh kut ding gan athatnun ahi: chuin thempuho le Levi ho chu ajahcha taovin, chuphatnin amahole amaho akisuthengun, govam thiltoho chu Pakai insunga alalut taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles30:16 Chuin Pathen mi Mosi danthu dungjuijin, amaho chongai danin ama muncheh-a adingun: thempuhon Levi ho khutna alah-u thisan chu atheuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ajehchu houkhom ho lah-a mi tamtah kisutheng lou aum nalaijun: Pakaiya dinga suhtheng ahina diuva, athenglou takipma dinga kalchuh kut sa thapeh ding mopohna chu Levi ho changuva ahi." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ajehchu mipi choplop, Ephraim, Manasseh, Issachar le Zebulun'a kon mi tamtah chu kisutheng lou ahiuvin, ahinla akisun banglouvin amahon kalchuh kut an chu ane jenguvin ahi. Ahinla Hezekiah'in amaho ataopeh-in, Pakai Phatah chun amitakip," 
2Chronicles30:19 Munthenga kisuhthengna dungjuija thenga hihih jongle, Pathen, apu apateu Pakai Pathen holdinga alungsunga kigotna neichan chu ngaidamhen, ati." 
2Chronicles30:20 Chuin Pakaiyin Hezekiah taona asanpeh-in, mipi chu asudamtai." 
2Chronicles30:21 Chuin Jerusalem'a um Israel chate chun cholsolou changlhah kut chu kipana nasatah-in nisagi amangun: Levi ho le thempuho chun ani anin Pakai avahchoijun, manchah gingtah pumin Pakaiya la asaove." 
2Chronicles30:22 Chuin Hezekiah'in Pakai hetna phatah thuhila pang Levi ho jouse henga lhamona thu aseijin: amahon apu apateu Pakai Pathen henga chamna thilto atoh-un, chonset phondohna aneijun, chule kut ni sagi lhumkeijin aneuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles30:23 Chuin khoppi pumpi chu nisagi bang manbe dingin akihouvun, kipahtah-in nisagi amanbe kitnun ahi." 
2Chronicles30:24 Ajehchu Judah lengpa Hezekiah'in houkhom ho chu bongchal sangkhat le kelngoi sangsagi apen; chule pipuiho chun houkhom ho chu bongchal sangkhat le kelngoi sangsom apeuvin: thempu tamtah akisuthengun ahi. 
2Chronicles30:25 Chuin Judah gam houkhom ho jouse, thempuho le Levi ho toh, chule Israel gama kona hungdoh houkhom ho jouse, Israel gama kona hungdoh-a Juda gama cheng gamdang mijouse jouse chu akipah-un ahi." 
2Chronicles30:26 Hitichun Jerusalem'a kipana nasatah aume: ajehchu Israel lengpa David chapa Solomon nikho-a patnin chutobangtah kipana chu ana umkhapon ahi. 
2Chronicles30:27 Chuphatnin thempuho le Levi ho chu akipat doh-un, mipi chu phatthei abohtauve: chuin athuseiju chu ngaipeh-in aumin, ataonao chu achenna muntheng van geijin alhungin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:1 Tun hicheho jouse akichai nunghin, chua um Israelte jouse chu Judah khopiho-a acheuvin, song milimho avochipmun, thingbomho aphulhuvin, Judah le Benjamin gam, Ephraim le Manasseh gamho-a konin munsang ho le maicham ho jouse chu abeihel kahsen aphuhlhu uvin ahi. Chuin Israel chate jouse akinung leuvin, amitakip agoulona akhopi cheh uva akile taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:2 Chuin Hezekiah'in thempuho le Levi kihom khenho chu akihopkhen dungjuijun atoh dingu akomu peh-in, amitakip akinbol dingu dungjui cheh-in, thempuho le Levi ho chu govam thilto le chamna thilto toh ding, lhacha natong ding, thangvahna peding, Pakai ponbuh kotpi phunga vahchoi jingdingin angansen ahi." 
2Chronicles31:3 Aman Pakai dan thupeh-a kisun banga, jingkah le nilhah-a dinga govam thilto ding; choldo nikho, lhathah nikho, chule kut bineiho-a dinga govam thilto dingho chu lengpa neile gouva konin aman apohdoh dingin agongin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:4 Chukalvalin Pakai danthu-a akitilkhou theina diuvin Jerusalem'a cheng mipi ho chu thempuho le Levi ho chan pedingin athupeh-in ahi. 
2Chronicles31:5 Chuin thupeh ahung kithejal jal-in, Israel chaten chang, lengpitwi, thao, khoiju, chule lousoh jouse-a kon gamasaho chu ninglhing tah-in ahinpolut nun ahi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Chule Judah khopiho-a cheng Israel le Judah chate thudol chu, amahon jong bongchal le kelngoiho hopsom, chule Pakai a-Pathen uva dinga kikatdoh thilthengho hopsom ahinpeuvin, asevum jengun ahi." 
2Chronicles31:7 Lha thum na-a asetvum patnu ahin, lha sagina-in ajou uvin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:8 Chule Hezekiah le pipuiho chu ahunguva, akisevum chu amuphatnun, Pakai le amite Israelte chu phatthei aboh taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:9 Chuphatnin Hezekiah'in akisevum thudol chu thempuho le Levi ho chu adongin ahi. 
2Chronicles31:10 Chuin Zadok insung mi Azariah thempu chungnung'in adonbutnun, Mipihon Pakai insunga thilto ahinpohlut patnuva patnin nehding bulhing setnin kaneijun, tamtah avaldoh nalaijin ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin amite phatthei aboh-in, chule thil hijatpi hi amoh chengse chu ahi, ati." 
2Chronicles31:11 Chuin Hezekiah'in Pakai insunga chu indan sem dingin thu apen, chule amahon asem taovin," 
2Chronicles31:12 Chuin thiltoho le hopsom ho, chule thilpeh thengho chu tahsan umtah-in alhoh lutnun: hiche chunga chu Levi mi Conaniah chu vaipo ahin, asopipa Shimei chu ama noidou ahi." 
2Chronicles31:13 Chuin Jehiel, Azariah, Nahath, Asahel, Jerimoth, Jozabad, Eliel, Ismachiah, Mahath, chule Benaiah, mi hicheng hi Hezekiah lengpa le Pathen houin lamkai Azariah thupeh-a, Conaniah le asopipa Shimei khutnoija vetupma pang ahiuve." 
2Chronicles31:14 Chule solam kotpi ngah-a pang Levi mi Imnah chapa Kore chu, Pakaiya lungcham thilpehho vetuple, Pakaiya dinga thilpeh le thiltheng chung nungho homtoh ding ahi." 
2Chronicles31:15 Ama bana chu Eden, Miniamin, Jeshua, Shemaiah, Amariah, Shecaniah ahiuvin, amaho thempuho khopiho-a umuva, asopihou chu akihopkhenu dungjuija alen aneo kibanga chan ahoppeh dingu;" 
2Chronicles31:16 Khanggui kisutna-a kisun pasal kum thuma pat chunglamse tilou, Pakai in'a hunglut amitakip chu akihopkhenu dungjuija nitina akin bolna-a amuding achan chu ahop dingu," 
2Chronicles31:17 Chule apu apateu ingsung kailhah-a dungjuija khanggui kisutna-a jao thempu-a pang le Levi miho kum somni-a pat chunglamse kihomkhena anatoh-u dungjui," 
2Chronicles31:18 Chule mipi jouse lah-a kona khanggui kisutna-a jao jouse, achasen hou, ajiteu, achapateu, chule achanuteu geija ahoppeh dingu ahi: ajehchu amaho akin boldiu kipe mun'a chu thenna-a kisutheng cheh ahiuve." 
2Chronicles31:19 Akhopihou kimvel loujao dunga cheng le khopi tina Aaron chapate thempuho thudola, thempuho lah-a pasal jouse le Levi mite lah-a kon khanggui kisutna-a kisimho jouse chan hoppeh dingin mi phabep akimin kutnin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Chule Hezekiah'in Judah gamsung jouse-a hitichun abolin, chule Pakai a-Pathen angsunga chun apha, adih, chule atah jeng abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles31:21 Chule Pathen houin kinbolna-a anatoh jouse ahin, danthu lam ahin, thupeh lam ahin, abula patnin a-Pathen aholin, alung pumpin atongin; hitichun akhangtou cheh cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles32:1 Hicheng thilho kiphudet nunghin, Assyria lengpa Sennacherib ahungin, Judah gama alutnin, kulbang nei khopiho dounan gebuh asongin, ama-a dinga joding angaiton ahi." 
2Chronicles32:2 Chuin Hezekiah'in Sennacherib ahunga Jerusalem satding agot chu amu phatnin," 
2Chronicles32:3 Apipuiho le amihat hotoh khopi pama twinahho suhbing dingin akihouvun, amahon akitho piuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:4 Hitichun mipi tamtah akikhomun, gamsung lailunga long twinahho le vachaho atingun, Ipibola Assyria lengho, twi nengtah-a amu diuham? atiuve." 
2Chronicles32:5 Chuin ama akisuhat nin, kulbang kehlai jouse asaphan, insangho atungdoh-in, polama kulbang chom jong agensonin, chule David khopi-a um Millo jong asaphan, tengcha le lumdal jong ninglhing tah-in asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Chuin mipi chunga gal lamkaiho atungin, amaho chu khopi kotpi lamlena chun ahenga akhomin, ahenguva lhamona thu aseijin, hitin ati," 
2Chronicles32:7 Hatnunlang hangun, Assyria lengpa ahiloule aumpi mipi ho jeh-in kicha hih-un, lungjong lungthoi hih-un: ajehchu ama umpi sangin eiho umpi atamjon ahi." 
2Chronicles32:8 Ama koma um chu tahsa bantha ahin; eiho koma vang Pakai i-Pathen'u chu eihuhdiu le igalteu satdinga uma ahi, ati. Chuin Judah te lengpa Hezekiah thuseija chun mipi chu alung ngam taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:9 Hiche jouhin Assyria lengpa Sennacherib'in asohte chu (ahinla amale aumpi agalhat ho jouse chun Lachish dounan kulpi akaijun ahi,) Jerusalem'a um Judah lengpa heng le Jerusalem'a um Judah mite jouse henga asolin, hitin agasei sah-e," 
2Chronicles32:10 Assyria lengpa Sennacherib'in hitin aseije, Jerusalem'a umkulsa naum nunguva, ipi-a kisong nahiuvem?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiah'in, Assyria lengpa khutna konin Pakai i-Pathen'un eihuh naovinte tia gilkel le dangchah-a nathi nadiuva bou najolu hilouham?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Amunsangho le amaichamho sumanga, Judah le Jerusalem henga, Maicham khat angabou nahou uva, achunga gimnamtui nahaldiu ahi tia seija chu hiche Hezekiah mamahi hilouham?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Kei le kapaten gamdangho chunga ipi kanabolu nahet lou uham? chuche gamsunga cheng namho pathenho chun amaho kakhutna kona anahuhdoh jou beh-um? 
2Chronicles32:14 Kapaten anasuh manghel-u namho pathenho lah-a kakhutna kona amite huhdoh-a koi ana uma, kakhutna kona na-Pathen'u chun nahuhdoh jou diuham?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Hijeh chun tun Hezekiah chun nalhemlha hih-u hen, ahiloule najol lhahih-u hen, tahjong tahsan hih-un: ajehchu koimacha namle lenggam pathen khatchan amite chu kakhutna konle, kapate khutna konin anahuhdoh joupoi: na Pathen'un kakhutna kona nahuh dohding chu ichanna lhinglel jocheh hitam? ati, atiuve." 
2Chronicles32:16 Chuin asohten Pakai Pathen le asohpa Hezekiah dounan thu aseibe nalaijun ahi. 
2Chronicles32:17 Aman Israel Pakai Pathen tailtomna le ama dounan lekhathot jong asunin, Gamdangho namdang pathen hon amiteu kakhutna kona ahuhdoh louvu bangin, Hezekiah Pathen'in jong amite kakhutna konin huhdoh ponte, ati." 
2Chronicles32:18 Chujouvin khopi chu alah theina diuvin Jerusalem mite kulbanga um miho henga chun, kichatsah-a, suhboina dingin Judah te paovin awsang tah-in asapkhumun ahi." 
2Chronicles32:19 Amahon Jerusalem Pathen dounan, mihem khutna kisem leiset pathenho douna bangbepmin thu aseijun ahi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Chuin hiche jeh hin, Hezekiah lengpa le Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao chu atao lhonin, vanlam sangin akaplhonin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Chuin hiche jeh hin, Hezekiah lengpa le Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao chu atao lhonin, vanlam sangin akaplhonin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:21 Chuin Pakaiyin vantil khat asolin, Assyria lengpa gebuh-a um mihat hangsan jouse, chule lamkaiho le vaipoho chu athatgam tan ahi. Hitichun maijum tah-in agamlama akiletai. Chuin a-pathen in'a ahung phatnin asunga kona hungpengho tahchun hiche munachun chemjamin athat taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:22 Hitichun Pakaiyin Hezekiah le Jerusalem'a chengho chu Assyria lengpa Sennacherib khutna kon le adang jouse khutna konin ahuhdoh-in, lamtina apuihoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:23 Chuin mi tamtah-in Jerusalem'a Pakaiya dingin thilpeh ahinpouvin, Judah leng Hezekiah chu apeove: hitichun hiche-a pat chun namjouse mitmun amachu choi-atnin aumtan ahi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Hiche nikholai chun Hezekiah chu thina khopmin anatan, Pakai henga ataovin ahile, Aman ahenga thu aseijin, melchihna khat apen ahi." 
2Chronicles32:25 Ahinla Hezekiah'in achunga phatna kibol dungjuijin alethuh pon ahi. Ajehchu alungthim akichoisang tan; hijeh chun amale Judah chule Jerusalem chunga Pathen lunghana achutan ahi. 
2Chronicles32:26 Ahinla Hezekiah le Jerussalem'a chengho jouse chu alungsung hoithona-a konchun akineosah taovin, hitichun Hezekiah nikho sungsen achunguva Pakai lunghanna achutapoi." 
2Chronicles32:27 Chuin Hezekiah'in nasatah-in haona le jabolna aneitan: aman ama dingin dangka, sana, songmantam, gimnamtui, lumle pho, chule thillu jat jouse khol khomna ding in akisah-in;" 
2Chronicles32:28 Chujongle chang le lengpitwi, chule thao khol khomna dingin in asan; chule ganhing namkim khumna dingin gan in asan, chule kelngoi ho-a dingin kelngoi hongho asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:29 Chukal valin khopiho akisahdoh-in, kelngoihon le bonghonho ahaolheh jengin ahi: ajehchu Pathen'in neile gou atama tam apen ahi." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hiche Hezekiah mamahin Gihon luipi sahnung jong atingkangin, David khopi lhumlam sanga jangpetnin alonsah-in ahi. Chuin Hezekiah chu anatohna jouse akhangtouvin ahi." 
2Chronicles32:31 Ahijeng vangin palaija hunga Babylon pipuho thudol, gamsunga thil kidang kibolho kholdinga ahinsol hou thudola vang; alungsunga umjouse ahetdohna dingle apatep nadingin, Pathen ama-a konin apotdoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Tun Hezekiah thilbol danghole aphatnaho chu, veuvin, Amoz chapa Isaiah gaothil mun'a le Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua chun akisunlut cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Tun Hezekiah thilbol danghole aphatnaho chu, veuvin, Amoz chapa Isaiah gaothil mun'a le Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua chun akisunlut cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles32:33 Chuin Hezekiah chu apu apate toh alumkhomin, David chapate lhan thupipena chun avuitaove: chule athi chun Judah le Jerusalem'a chengho jousen jabolna apeuve. Chuin achapa Manasseh chu ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasseh lengchanpat chun kumsom le kumni ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somnga le kumnga aleng changin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:2 Ahinla Pakaiyin Israelte masanga kona anodoh pathen helou namhon thilbol thet umtah bangchun, Pakai mitmun thilphalou abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:3 Ajehchu aman apa Hezekiah suhchimsa munsang ho chu asapha kitnin, Baal maicham ho atungdoh-in, thingbomho aphutnin, van janel jouse ahouvin, amaho chu ajenin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Pakaiyin, Jerusalem'a hi a-itih-a kamin umding ahi tia aseina mun, Pakai insunga jong chun maicham ho asemin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:5 Aman Pakai houin hongcha teni-a chun van janelho jouse-a dingin maicham atungdoh-in ahi. 
2Chronicles33:6 Aman Hinnom chapa phaicham meisung chu achate apalsah-in, phat ho jong anitnin, phun asangin, doi le ai amangchan, lhakou ho le mitpheldoi themho jong adongin: phinsetna lunghansah nadinga Pakai mitmun thilphalou tamtah abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:7 Chule Pathen in sunga chun aman milim semthuho akoijin, Pathen'in David le achapa Solomon henga, Israel namjouse anga kana lhendoh hiche Jerusalem houin sungahi a-itih-a kamin kakoi jingding:" 
2Chronicles33:8 Mosi khutna kona kapeh kadanthu jouse le kachona dan ho jouse, chule kachondan jouse atohdoh uva ahile, napu napateu dinga kanapeh leisetna kona jong Israelte keng kachondoh kit louhel ding ahitai tia aseina mun'a chun milim semthuho chu akoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:9 Hitichun Manasseh'in Judah le Jerusalem'a chengho chu Pakaiyin Israelte anga anasuhmang houbeiho sanga khohjo cheh-in thilphalou abolsahtan ahi. 
2Chronicles33:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Manasseh le amite henga thu anaseijin, ahinla amahon ngaipeh-in anei pouve." 
2Chronicles33:11 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Assyria sepai janel lamkaiho chu achunguva achuhsah-in, amahon Manasseh chu linglah-a akaijun, henkol abuvin, Babylon'a akaitaove." 
2Chronicles33:12 Chuin ama suhgentheija aumphatnin, Pakai a-Pathen aholtan, apu apate Pathen angsunga nasatah-in akineosah tan," 
2Chronicles33:13 Ahenga ataotai: chuin alungsetna achangin, ataona asanpeh-in, alenggam Jerusalem'a ahinpui kit tai. Chuphatnin Manasseh'in Pakai amachu Pathen ahi ti ahetai." 
2Chronicles33:14 Chuin hiche jouchun David khopi polama Gihon lhumlam vacha phaicham ngalim kotpi lutna geijin, chule Ophel gei umkimvelin kulpi asan, asana sangin atungdoh-in, Judah gama kulbang nei khopi jouse-a chun gal lamkaiho akoitai." 
2Chronicles33:15 Chuin gamdang pathenho le milimho chu Pakai in'a konin aladoh-in, Pakai in molsang Jerusalem'a anatundoh maicham ho jouse chu khopi polama apaidoh sohtai." 
2Chronicles33:16 Chuin Pakai maicham asemphan, achunga chun chamna thilto le thangvahna thilto ganlhai abolin, Judah te chun Israel Pakai ajen dinguvin thu apen ahi." 
2Chronicles33:17 Hijeng jongle mipihon munsang ho-a chun ganlhaina abol nalaijun, amavang Pakai a-Pathen'u hengabou abolu ahi." 
2Chronicles33:18 Tun Manasseh thilbol dangho le a-Pathen henga ataona, chule Pakai Israelte Pathen mina ahenga themgaoho thusei ho chu, veuvin, Israel lengte lekhabua akisun cheh-e." 
2Chronicles33:19 Ataonaho jong, chule Pathen'in iti alungsetnam; chule akineosah masanga achonsetna jouse le asuhkhelna jouse, munsang asahna munho jouse le thingbul le milim aphuho jouse chu, veuvin, themgaoho thusei ho lah-a akisun cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Hitichun Manasseh apu apate toh alumkhomin, amatah insunga avuitaove. Chuin achapa Ammon ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles33:21 Ammon alengchan phatchun akum kum somni le kumni ahin, Jerusalem'a kumni aleng changin ahi." 
2Chronicles33:22 Ahinla apa Manasseh'in anabol bangin Pakai mitmun thilse abolin ahi. Ammon'in apa Manasseh'in anasema anahou khentho milimho jouse henga ganlhaina abolin; 
2Chronicles33:23 Apa Manasseh anakineosah bangin Pakai anga akineosah pon; ahinla Ammon'in asuhkhel bebe jengin ahi. 
2Chronicles33:24 Chuin asohte ama dounan galguh abolun, a-insung tah-a athat taove." 
2Chronicles33:25 Ahinla Ammon lengpa douna-a galguh bolho jouse chu gamsung miten athatgamun; gamsung mite chun achapa Josiah chu akhelin alengchan sah taovin ahi. 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiah alengchan patchun kum get ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somthumle kumkhat aleng changin ahi." 
2Chronicles34:2 Chule Pakai mitmu-a adih abolin, apa David lamlhahho ajotnin, jetlam le veilama akihei dohpoi." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ajehchu alengchan kal kumget lhina-in chapangcha ahinalaijin, apa David Pathen chu ahol pantan ahi. Chuin kum somle nina-in Judah le Jerusalem chu munsang ho, doikhomho, khenthu milimho, chule lhahtho milim ho-a konin asuthengtan ahi." 
2Chronicles34:4 Chuin Baal maicham ho chu amitmun asuchimun, chule hicheho chunga um milimho chu aphuh lhun: thingbul hole khettho milimho, chule lhahtho milimho chu avochipmin, leivui ason, ahenguva kilhaiho lhan chunga chun athe jalsoh helin ahi." 
2Chronicles34:5 Thempuho guho chu amaicham chunguva ahalin, Judah le Jerusalem chu asuthenge." 
2Chronicles34:6 Hitichun aman Manasseh, Ephraim, Simeon, chule Naphtali khopiho le akimvelu jouse jongchu hitichun abolcheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles34:7 Aman maicham ho le doikhomho asuhchima, milim kikhengho bongsela avoh chipma, Israel gamsung pumpi-a milimho aphuh lhuh soh phatnin, Jerusalem'a akiletai." 
2Chronicles34:8 Tun alengchan kal kum somle kumget alhinna, gamsungle in chu asuhtheng phatnin, Azaliah chapa Shephan le khopisung vaipo thuchingpa Joahaz chapa Joah chu Pakai a-Pathen in saphadin asole." 
2Chronicles34:9 Chuin thempu chungnung Hilkiah henga ahung phatnun, amahon kotngah Levi mihon Manasseh le Ephraim mite, chule Israelte amoh umjouse le Judah le Benjamin mite jouse khutna kona adonkhom uva Pathen insunga akoiju sum chu apeuvin; chuin Jerusalem'a akiletaove." 
2Chronicles34:10 Chuin Pakai in vetupma natongho khutna chun akoijun, amahon Pakai in sapha ho le semhoiho khutna apeuvin," 
2Chronicles34:11 Judah lenghon anasuhsetnu lhongho semphatna dingin song kikheng le athopna ding thing chohnadin khuthemho le insaho chu apeuvin ahi. 
2Chronicles34:12 Chuin mihon na chu tahsan umtah-in atongun; amachal nadinguva avetupmuva chu Levi ho Merari chapate-a kon Jahath le Obadiah; Kohath chapate-a kon Zechariah le Meshullam ahin; chule Levi dangho lasahna-a manchah tumthemho jousetoh na chu atonguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles34:12 Chuin mihon na chu tahsan umtah-in atongun; amachal nadinguva avetupmuva chu Levi ho Merari chapate-a kon Jahath le Obadiah; Kohath chapate-a kon Zechariah le Meshullam ahin; chule Levi dangho lasahna-a manchah tumthemho jousetoh na chu atonguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles34:12 Chuin mihon na chu tahsan umtah-in atongun; amachal nadinguva avetupmuva chu Levi ho Merari chapate-a kon Jahath le Obadiah; Kohath chapate-a kon Zechariah le Meshullam ahin; chule Levi dangho lasahna-a manchah tumthemho jousetoh na chu atonguvin ahi. 
2Chronicles34:13 Amaho chu pohgih poho vetupma chule lhachaho tintang kinbolna jouse vesuija jong ahiuve; chule lekhasunho, vaipoho, chule kotngah ho chu Levi mite lah-a jeng ahiuve." 
2Chronicles34:14 Chuin Pakai in'a achoilutnu sum chu ahinladoh phatnun, Hilkiah thempupan Mosi'n apeh Pakai danthu lekhabu chu amudoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Chuin Hilkiah'in adonbutnin Lekhasunpa Shaphan henga, Danthu lekhabu chu Pakai in'a akimu dohtai, ati. Chuin Hilkiah'in lekhabu chu Shaphan apetai." 
2Chronicles34:16 Chuin Shaphan'in lekhabu chu lengpa henga achoijin, lengpa henga thu alhut kitnin, Nasohte boldia kigotpeh jouse chu abolnaove." 
2Chronicles34:17 Chule Pakai in'a aum kimu sum chu alakhomun, vetup hole natongho khutna apedoh taove, ati." 
2Chronicles34:18 Chuin lekhasun Shaphan'in lengpa henga, Hilkiah thempupan lekhabu khat eipei, ati. Chuin Shaphan'in lengpa anga hichu asimdoh pehtan ahi." 
2Chronicles34:19 Chuin ahitin ahi, lengpan danthuho chu ajah phatnin apon abottel tai." 
2Chronicles34:20 Chuin lengpan Hilkiah le Shaphan chapa Ahikam, Micah chapa Abdon, lekhasun Shaphan, chule lengpa soh Asaiah chu thu apen," 
2Chronicles34:20 Chuin lengpan Hilkiah le Shaphan chapa Ahikam, Micah chapa Abdon, lekhasun Shaphan, chule lengpa soh Asaiah chu thu apen," 
2Chronicles34:21 Cheovin, hiche lekhabu kimu chungchanga hin keima le Israel le Judah'a kidalha ho din Pakai chu neigadoh peh-un: ajehchu hiche lekhabua kisun banga ipu ipateovin Pakai thu anajoplou jeh-un, Pakai lunghanna chu ichunguva akibung lhatai, ati." 
2Chronicles34:22 Chuin lengpan anganseho le Hilkiah chu ponho chingtupma pang Hasrah chapa, Tikvath chapa, Shallum jinu, Huldah themgaonu henga acheuvin; (tun amanu Jerusalem indan nina-a cheng ahi,) chule hiche thuchu agasei taove." 
2Chronicles34:23 Chuin amanun amaho chu adonbutnin, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin ati, Kahenga nahinsolpa chu seipeh uvin," 
2Chronicles34:24 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Veuvin hiche munle asunga chengho chunga Judah lengpa masanga asimdoh-u lekhabua kisun sapsetna jouse chu kalhunsah ding ahi:" 
2Chronicles34:25 Ajehchu amahon eida lhaovin, akhutnuva athilbol uva kona eilunghan sahna diuvin pathen dangho henga gimnamtui ahalun ahi; hiche jeh-a chu hiche mun chunga kalunghana kibunglha ding, chule kisumit jou louding ahi." 
2Chronicles34:26 Ahin Pakai dong dinga nahin soluva Judah lengpa thudol chu hitin seipeh-un, Nangman najah thuho thudola hin Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije," 
2Chronicles34:27 Hiche mun douna le asunga chengho douna athusei najah phatna, nalung anema, Pathen anga nakisuhnem jeh-in, chule kamasanga nakineosah-a, napon nabotel-a, kamasanga naka jeh-in; keiman jong nathu kangaipeh-e, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
2Chronicles34:28 Ven, keiman napu napate toh kagop khom ding, lungmonga lhana nakivui ding, hiche munle asunga chengho chunga kalhunsah ding thilphalou jouse chu namitnin amulouding ahi, ati. Hitichun lengpa henga thu ahinpo taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles34:29 Chuin lengpan mi asolin, Judah le Jerusalem'a upa jouse akhomin ahi." 
2Chronicles34:30 Chuin lengpan Judah mijouse le Jerusalem'a chengho jouse toh, thempuho, Levi ho, chule mijouse alen aneo Pakai in'a achetouvun; chuin aman Pakai in'a amudoh-u kitepna lekhabua thu jouse chu anabenguva asimdoh peh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles34:31 Chuin lengpa chu aumna mun'a adingin, alungthim pumpi le ahinna pumpi-a Pakai nung juiding le, athupehho, ahettoh sahnaho, achondanho nitding, chule hiche lekhabua kisun kitepna thuho jouse tongdoh dingin Pakai angsunga kitepna aneijin ahi" 
2Chronicles34:32 Chuin Jerusalem le Benjamin'a umjouse hiche-a chu dingdet dingin aseijin ahi. Chuin Jerusalem'a chengho chun a-Pathen'u, apu apateu Pathen thulhun dungjuijin abol taovin ahi." 
2Chronicles34:33 Chuin Josaiah'in Israel chate gam jouse-a konin thil thet umjouse alamangin, Israel'a umjouse chu Pakai a-Pathen'u bouchu ajensah-in ahi. Chuin ahinkho lhumkeijin Pakai, apateu Pathen ajuija konin akichoi dohpon ahi." 
2Chronicles35:1 Chukalvalin Josiah'in Jerusalem'a chun Pakai dingin kalchuh kut amangin: lha masapen nisomle nili nin kalchuh kut sa athatnun ahi. 
2Chronicles35:2 Chuin thempuho chu akinganse naova apansah-in, amaho chu Pakai in'a kinboldin atilkhouvin," 
2Chronicles35:3 Chuin Pakaiya dinga atheng Israelte hila pang Levi ho jah-a chun, Israel lengpa David chapa Solomon'in asah in'a chun thingkhong thengchu koijun; hichu nalengkou uva dinga pohgih hitalou ding ahi: tun Pakai na Pathen'u le ami Israelte jenun," 
2Chronicles35:4 Chule Israel lengpa David sutle achapa Solomon sut dungjuijin, napu napateu insungho kailhah dungjui le nakihopkhen dungjuijun kigotup uvin." 
2Chronicles35:5 Chule mipi ho nasopiteu insung kailhah kikhen dungjuile, Levi insung kailhah kikhen dungjuijin muntheng chun dinguvin." 
2Chronicles35:6 Hitichun kalchuh kut sa that unlang kisuthengun, chule Mosi khutna kon Pakai thu dungjuija atoh theina diuvin, nasopiteu chu gongtoh-uvin, ati." 
2Chronicles35:7 Chuin Josiah'in chuche mun'a um mijouse chu kalchuh kutna atodiu ganhon lah-a konin kelngoinou le kelnou sangsomthum le bongchal sangthum apen, hicheho chu lengpa neija kon ahi." 
2Chronicles35:8 Chuin apipuiho chun mipi ho, thempuho, chule Levi ho chu hongphal tah-in apeuvin; Pathen in vaipo Hilkiah, Zechariah, chule Jehiel chun thempuho chu kalchuh kut thiltodin ganchaneo sangni le jagup le bongchal jathum apeuve." 
2Chronicles35:8 Chuin apipuiho chun mipi ho, thempuho, chule Levi ho chu hongphal tah-in apeuvin; Pathen in vaipo Hilkiah, Zechariah, chule Jehiel chun thempuho chu kalchuh kut thiltodin ganchaneo sangni le jagup le bongchal jathum apeuve." 
2Chronicles35:9 Conaniah le asopi Shemaiah le Nathaneel, chule Levi ho pipu Hashabish le Jeiel, chule Jozabad jongchun Levi ho henga kalchuh kutna todin ganchaneo sanga le bongchal janga apeuve." 
2Chronicles35:10 Hitichun lhacha natohna chu agongun, lengpa thupeh bangin thempuho chu amun cheh uvah adingun, Levi ho jong aloi loijin apang taove." 
2Chronicles35:11 Amahon kalchuh kut sa athatnun, thempuhon akhutna konin thisan atheuvin, Levi hon avun alipmuve." 
2Chronicles35:12 Chuin Mosi lekhabua kisun banga, mipi chun a-insungu kikhen dungjuija Pakai henga atotheina dingun, govam thiltoho chu aladoh-un ahi. Hitichun bongchalho jong aboluve." 
2Chronicles35:13 Chuin kalchuh kut sa chu chondan dungjui jin meija agou minun, thilto theng dangho vang bel le bel lengnei, chule khangbelin ahonun, mipi lah-a chun ahomdoh loi jiuvin ahi." 
2Chronicles35:14 Hiche jouchun amahole thempuhodin asemtoh uvin ahi: ajehchu Aaron chapate thempuho chu thilto thua govam thilto le thao thilto-a khojin geija kisalel uva ahi; hijeh chun Levi ho chun amaho dingle Aaron chapate thempuhodin agongtoh uvin ahi. 
2Chronicles35:15 Chuin David le Asaph, Heman, chule lengpa mitvanei Jeduthun thupeh dungjuijin, Asaph chapate lasaho chu amun cheh-a aumun; akinuva kona atoldoh theilouna diuvin kotngah hon kotpi tina angah-un ahi; ajehchu asopiteu Levi hon agontohpeh-u ahi." 
2Chronicles35:16 Hitichun Josiah lengpa thupeh bangin kalchuh kut nitna dingle Pakai maicham chunga govam thiltoho tona dingin, hiche nikho mama chun Pakai kinbolna jouse chu agongtoh uvin ahi." 
2Chronicles35:17 Chule Israel chapate chua umho chun kalchuh kut amangun, cholsolou changlhah kut jong nisagi amanguve." 
2Chronicles35:18 Samuel themgao nikho-a patnin Israel gamsunga chutobang kalchuh kut ana umkhapon; Josiah le thempuho, Levi ho, chule chua um Judah le Israel jouse, chule Jerusalem'a chenghon anaman bangun, Israel lengte jousen jong hitobang kalchuh kut hi anamang khapouve." 
2Chronicles35:19 Josiah lengchan kala kum somle kumget na-a hiche kalchuh kut hi anamanu ahi. 
2Chronicles35:20 Hicheho jouse nung, Josiah'in houin agontoh phatnin, Egypt lengpa Nicho chu Euphrates luija Carchemish satdin ahungtouvin; chule Joshiah chu ama doudin akondoh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ahinla aman ahenga palai ahinsolin, ajah-a, Judah lengpa, nangle kei kikah-a ipi iboina uma ham? tunia nangma doudinga hung kahipoi, kakisatpipa insung doudinga hungjoh kahibouve: ajehchu Pathen'in kikinno dinga eithupeh ahi: eiumpia Pathen nadoudal na-a konin kikhindalin, nasumang khante, agati sah-e." 
2Chronicles35:22 Ahijeng vangin Josiah'in ama-a konin amai aheidoh nompon, akisatpi theinadin amel achomsah-in, Pathen kama kon Necho thusei chu angai hih-in, Megiddo phaichama kisatpidin ahunge." 
2Chronicles35:23 Chuin thal kaphon Josiah lengpa ahin kapkha taovin; hichun lengpa chun asohte henga, Neipodoh-un; ajehchu nasatah-in kamachang tai ati." 
2Chronicles35:24 Hijeh chun asohten amachu kangtalai ja konchun aladoh-un, akangtalai nina-a akoijun; Jerusalem'a ahinpolut nun, athin, apu apateu lhankhuh khatna avuitaove. Chuin Judah le Jerusalem mite jousen Josiah chu alunghempi taove." 
2Chronicles35:25 Chule Jeremiah'in jong Josiah alunghempin: chule lasa pasal hole lasa numei ho jousen Josiah chu tunigeijin akalaova akacham cham jengun, Israel gamsunga chondan khatnin asem taovin ahi: chule veuvin, hicheho chu kala lekhabua akisunin ahi." 
2Chronicles35:25 Chule Jeremiah'in jong Josiah alunghempin: chule lasa pasal hole lasa numei ho jousen Josiah chu tunigeijin akalaova akacham cham jengun, Israel gamsunga chondan khatnin asem taovin ahi: chule veuvin, hicheho chu kala lekhabua akisunin ahi." 
2Chronicles35:26 Tun Josiah thilbol dangho le Pakai danthu-a kisun dungjuija aphatnaho," 
2Chronicles35:27 Anatohho apatna le ajona chu, veuvin, Israel le Judah lengte lekhabua akisun cheh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles36:1 Chuin chuche gam mihochun Josiah chapa Jehoahaz chu apuijin, Jerusalem'a apa khelin alengchansah taove." 
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahaz chu alengchan patnin kum somni le kumthum ahitan, Jerusalem'a lha thum alengchange." 
2Chronicles36:3 Chuin Jerusalem'a Egypt lengpan amachu asulhun, agamchu dangka talent jakhat le sana talent khat kai apohsah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles36:4 Egypt lengpa chun asopipa Eliakim chu Judah le Jerusalem'a lengin atungin; amin chu Jehoiakim'in akhel peh-in ahi. Chuin Necho chun asopipa Jehoahaz chu apuijin, Egypt'a akaitai." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakim chu alengchan patnin kum somni le kumnga ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kumkhat aleng changin ahi. Ahin aman Pakai a-Pathen mitmun thilse jeng abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar ama satdin ahung kontouvin, Babylon'a puidin bul atuh-in ahi." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebuchadnezzar'in Pakai in'a khon le kongho jongchu Babylon apon, hicheho chu Babylon'a a-houin'a akoijin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:8 Tun Jehoiakim thilbol dangho ama-a kimudoh thet umtah thil anabolho chu, veuvin, Israel le Judah lengte lekhabua akisuncheh-e, chuin achapa Jehoiachin chu ama khelin alengchang tan ahi." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiachin chu alengchan patnin kum get ahin, Jerusalem'a lhathum le nisom aleng changin ahi. Chule aman Pakai mitmun thilphalou abolin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:10 Chuin kum kichai phatnin, Nebuchadnezzar lengpan mi ahinsolin, Pakai in'a um le bel phaho toh Babylon'a apuijin; asopipa Zedekiah chu Judah le Jerusalem chunga lengin atungtai." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah alengchan patchun kum somni le kumkhat ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somle kumkhat aleng changin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:12 Chuin aman Pakai a-Pathen mitmun thilse abol jingin, Pakai kama kona thuseipa Jeremiah themgao anga chun akisunem nompon ahi." 
2Chronicles36:12 Chuin aman Pakai a-Pathen mitmun thilse abol jingin, Pakai kama kona thuseipa Jeremiah themgao anga chun akisunem nompon ahi." 
2Chronicles36:13 Ama Pathen'a ana kitep sah-a Nebuchadnezzar dounan jong agolkeh-in, Pakai Israel Pathen lama akiheina dinga konin angong avaiputnin, alung atahsah-in ahi." 
2Chronicles36:14 Chukalvalin thempu pipuiho jouse le mipi chun Pathen helouho thilbol thet umtahho bangin asukhel taovin; Jerusalem'a Aman asuhthengsa Pakai houin jongchu asuboh-un ahi. 
2Chronicles36:15 Chule apu apateu Pakai Pathen'in amite chung le achenna mun alainatpi jeh-in, ahenguva sottol tamtahvei asolin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ahinla Pakai lunghan amite chunga akondoh chu, asudai lhading abeihel kahsen amahon Pathen thupo ho chu totnopnan aneijun, chule athuho anuisatnun, athemgaoho chu dihlou tah-in amang chaovin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:17 Hijeh chun achunguva Chaldea mite lengpa ahin puilutnin, amunthengu insunga agollhanghou chemjamin athatnin, gollhang le nungah, tehse le tehse kongkon chunga lainatna beijin, abonun ama khutna apedohtai." 
2Chronicles36:18 Chuin Pathen in'a um le bel jouse alen aneo, Pakai in'a gouho le leng in'a gouho, chule apipuiho: hitiho jouse Babylon'a apotai." 
2Chronicles36:19 Chule Pathen in chu ahalun, Jerusalem bang asuchimun, leng inpi jouse meijin ahalun, chua um le bel phaho jouse chu asumang helun ahi." 
2Chronicles36:20 Chemjam'a kona sohcha jouse chu aman Babylon'a apuijin; chua chun Persia lenggam vaipoh kahsen amaho chu amale achapate soh-in apanguvin: 
2Chronicles36:21 Gamsungin acholngahni aman kahse-a Jeremiah kama Pakai thu guilhuna dingin: ajehchu kumsom sagi asuhbulhit nadingin, agohkeova aumlaisen acholngahni chu anitnin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:21 Gamsungin acholngahni aman kahse-a Jeremiah kama Pakai thu guilhuna dingin: ajehchu kumsom sagi asuhbulhit nadingin, agohkeova aumlaisen acholngahni chu anitnin ahi." 
2Chronicles36:22 Tun Jeremiah kama Pakai thusei guilhun theinadin, Persia lengpa Cyrus lengvaipoh kumkhat na-in, Pakaiyin Persia lengpa Cyrus lungthim atildoh-in, hitichun aman alenggam sung jouse-a thuphon aneijin, chule sut thon jong akoijin ahin," 
2Chronicles36:22 Tun Jeremiah kama Pakai thusei guilhun theinadin, Persia lengpa Cyrus lengvaipoh kumkhat na-in, Pakaiyin Persia lengpa Cyrus lungthim atildoh-in, hitichun aman alenggam sung jouse-a thuphon aneijin, chule sut thon jong akoijin ahin," 
2Chronicles36:23 Persia lengpa Cyrus in hitin aseije, Leiset lenggam jouse hi van Pakai Pathen'in keima eipeh ahitan; chule Judah gam Jerusalem'a ama-a ding in sadingin eingansen ahi. Amite jouse lah-a kon koi naum uvem? Pakai a-Pathen'in ama chu umpi hen, chule ama chetouhen, ati." 
Ezra1:1 Persia lengpa Cyrus lengchan kum khat alhinin, Jeremiah kama Pakaiyin athumopsa chu aguilhun theina dingin, Persia leng Cyrus lung chu Pakaiyin achoh thouvin ahi. Chule jihtho-a koidingin aseijin alenggam pumpi-a thu aphongdoh tai." 
Ezra1:1 Persia lengpa Cyrus lengchan kum khat alhinin, Jeremiah kama Pakaiyin athumopsa chu aguilhun theina dingin, Persia leng Cyrus lung chu Pakaiyin achoh thouvin ahi. Chule jihtho-a koidingin aseijin alenggam pumpi-a thu aphongdoh tai." 
Ezra1:2 Persia leng Cyrus chun hitin aseije, leiset lenggam jouse chu keima khutna van Pakai Pathen'in phatthei eiboh-in eipen; chule aman Judah gam Jerusalem'a a-in sadingin thu eipetai." 
Ezra1:3 Nangho amite jouse lah-a koi umam? ama chu a-Pathen'in umpihen, chule Judah gam Jerusalem'a chetou henlang, Pakai Israel Pathen (ama chu Pathen ahi) in chu gasahen, hichu Jerusalem'a um ahi." 
Ezra1:4 Chule apemna mun'a chengdena koi hijongle aumna muncheh-a chun lungcham thilpeh tilouvin; dangka-in, sana-in, thil lelo-in, gancha-in Jerusalem'a Pathen in sahna dingin kithopiu hen." 
Ezra1:5 Chujouvin Judah le Benjamin phunga apateo lah-a alamkaiho, thempuho, chule Levi ho, Jerusalem'a um Pakai in sadinga chetou dinga Pathen lhagaovin alung asuhthouho chutoh akipatdoh taove." 
Ezra1:6 Amaho chu akimveluva umho chun lungcham thilpeh-a apeh-u tilouvin, dangka umle belho, sana, thil le loho, ganchaho chule thillu tahtah ho apeuvin, atha hatsah-un ahi." 
Ezra1:7 Chule Cyrus lengpan jong Nebuchadnezzar'in Jerusalem'a kona anapoh-a, a-pathen in'a anakoi, Pakai in'a umle belho chu ahinpodoh-in ahi." 
Ezra1:8 Hitihohi Persia leng Cyrus chun neichingpa Mithredath alahdohsah-in, chule ajat asimun, Judah gama vaipipo Sheshbazzar khutna apetai." 
Ezra1:9 Hitiho asimdoh-u chu: sana kong somthum, dangka thih-a kisem kong sangkhat, chemcha somni le ko ahi." 
Ezra1:10 Sana khondal somthum, dangka khondal jatchom jali le som, chule um le bel adang sangkhat toh," 
Ezra1:11 Um le bel sana le dangka-a kisem chu aboncha sanga le jali ahi. Sohchangho Babylon'a kona Jerusalem'a ahintoltou laichun, hitiho jouse jonghi Sheshbazaar in ahintolthan ahi." 
Ezra2:1 Tun Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in gal-hinga Babylon'a anakai mangho, asoh channao gama kona Jerusalem le Judah, ama ama khopi cheh-a hung kilekit ho chu ahiuvin;" 
Ezra2:2 Hitehohi Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah toh hungkilhon Israel mitejat chu ahiuve." 
Ezra2:2 Hitehohi Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah toh hungkilhon Israel mitejat chu ahiuve." 
Ezra2:3 Parosh chilhah chu sangni le jakhat toh somsagi le ni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:4 Shephatiah chilhah chu jathum le somsagi le ni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:5 Arah chilhah chu jasagi le somsagi le nga ahiuve. 
Ezra2:6 Pahath-moab chilhah lah-a Jeshua le Joab chate chu sangni le jagetle somleni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:7 Elam chilhah chu sangkhat le jani leh somnga le li ahiuve. 
Ezra2:8 Zattu chilhah chu jakole somli le nga ahiuve. 
Ezra2:9 Zaccai chilhah chu jasagi le somgup ahiuve. 
Ezra2:10 Bani chilhah chu jaguple somni le thum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:11 Bebai chilhah chu jaguple somni le thum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:12 Azgad chilhah chu sangkhat le jani leh somnileni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:13 Adonikam chilhah chu jaguple somgup le gup ahiuve. 
Ezra2:14 Bigvai chilhah chu sangni le somnga le gup ahiuve. 
Ezra2:15 Adin chilhah chu jali leh somnga le li ahiuve. 
Ezra2:16 Ater son lah-a Hezekiah son hochu somko leh get ahiuve. 
Ezra2:17 Bezai chilhah chu jathum le somni le thum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:18 Jorah chilhah chu jakhatle somleni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:19 Hashum chilhah chu jani leh somni le thum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:20 Gibbar chilhah chu somko le nga ahiuve. 
Ezra2:21 Bethlehem chilhah chu jakhatle somni le thum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:22 Netophah mite somnga le gup ahiuve. 
Ezra2:23 Anathoth mite jale somni le get ahiuve. 
Ezra2:24 Azmaveth chilhah chu somlileni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:25 Kirjath-arim, Chephirah le Beeroth chilhah chu jasagi le somli le thum ahiuve." 
Ezra2:26 Ramah le Geba chilhah chu jaguple somni le khat ahiuve. 
Ezra2:27 Michmas mite jakhat somnileni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:28 Bethel le Ai mite jani leh somni le thum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:29 Nebo chilhah chu somnga le ni. 
Ezra2:30 Magbish chilhah chu jakhatle somnga le gup ahiuve. 
Ezra2:31 Michom Elam chilhah chu sangkhat le jani leh somnga le li ahiuve. 
Ezra2:32 Harim chilhah chu jathum le somni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:33 Lod chilhah, Hadid le Ono chilhah chu jasagi le somni le nga ahiuve." 
Ezra2:34 Jericho chilhah chu jathum le somli le nga ahiuve. 
Ezra2:35 Senaah chilhah chu sangthum le jaguple somthum ahiuve. 
Ezra2:36 Thempuho: Jeshua insung mi Jedaiah chilhah chu jakole somsagi le thum ahi. 
Ezra2:37 Immer chilhah chu sangkhat le somnga le ni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:38 Pashhur chilhah chu sangkhat le jani leh somli le sagi ahiuve. 
Ezra2:39 Harim chilhah chu sangkhat le somlesagi ahiuvin," 
Ezra2:40 Levi ho: Jeshua chule Kadmiel Hodaviah chilhah chu somsagi le li ahiuve. 
Ezra2:41 La saho: Asaph chilhah jakhatle somni le get ahiuvin," 
Ezra2:42 Kotngah ho chilhah: Shallum chilhah Ater chilhah Talmon chilhah, Akkub chilhah Hatita chilhah Shobai chilhah abonchauvin jakhatle somthumle ko ahiuve." 
Ezra2:43 Nethinim ho: Ziha chilhah Hasupha chilhah Tabbaoth chilhah," 
Ezra2:44 Keros chilhah, Siaha chilhah, Padon chilhah," 
Ezra2:45 Lebanah chilhah, Hagabah chilhah, Akkub chilhah," 
Ezra2:46 Hagab chilhah, Shamlai chilhah, Hanan chilhah," 
Ezra2:47 Giddel chilhah, Gahar chilhah, Reaiah chilhah," 
Ezra2:48 Rezin chilhah, Nekoda chilhah, Gazzam chilhah," 
Ezra2:49 Uzza chilhah, Paseah chilhah, Besai chilhah," 
Ezra2:50 Asnah chilhah, Mehunim chilhah, Nephisim chilhah," 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuk chilhah, Hakupha chilhah, Harhur chilhah," 
Ezra2:52 Bazluth chilhah, Mehida chilhah, Harsha chilhah," 
Ezra2:53 Barkos chilhah, Sisera chilhah, Thamah chilhah," 
Ezra2:54 Neziah chilhah, Hatipha chilhah." 
Ezra2:55 Solomon soh ho chilhah: Sotai chilhah, Sophereth chilhah, Peruda chilhah," 
Ezra2:56 Jaalah chilhah, Darkon chilhah, Giddel chilhah," 
Ezra2:57 Shephatiah chilhah, Hattil chilhah, Pochereth, Zebaim chilhah, Ami chilhah." 
Ezra2:58 Nethinim jousele Solomon soh ho chilhah chu abonchauvin jathum le somko le ni ahiuve. 
Ezra2:59 Chule hitehohi Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan chule Immer akon chetou ahiuvin ahin amahon apu apau insung Israel mimong mong ahinao avetsahthei pouve." 
Ezra2:60 Delaiah chilhah, Tobiah chilhah, Nekoda chilhah, chu jaguple somnga le ni ahiuve." 
Ezra2:61 Chule thempuho chilhah: Habaiah chilhah, Koz chilhah, Barzillai chilhah (Barzillai in Gileadite mitejin aneijin achilhah chu amin dungjuijin asah-in ahi)." 
Ezra2:62 Mi hichenghi phunggui thu kisut na-a chun aminu aholun, ahin amujou pouve. Hijeh chun amaho chu akisuboh tobang ahiuvin, athemputnao ahaisah taove." 
Ezra2:63 Chuin Tirshatha chun ahunguva Urim le Thummim kivon thempu khat chua adindoh kahsen amahon thilthengtah chu anehthei loudingu ahi tin aseije. 
Ezra2:64 Mipi kikhomho jouse chu sangsomli sangni toh jathum le somgup ahiuve. 
Ezra2:65 Asohteo pasal hole numei ho mi sangsagi le jathum le somthumle sagi simlouvin, lasaho pasal le numei jani aumun ahi." 
Ezra2:66 Asakolho chu jasagi le somthumle gup, sangan jani leh somli le nga ahin," 
Ezra2:67 Asagonsangu jali leh somthumle nga, asanganu sangguple jasagi le somni ahi." 
Ezra2:68 Jerusalem'a Pakai in ahung lhunun, amun mama-a akisahdoh kitna dingin, phung lamkaiho phabep min kipehna thilto aneijun ahi." 
Ezra2:69 Ajokham cheh apeuvin, thilkholna-a akholdoh-u chu sana dram sangsomgup le sangkhat chule dangka sangnga le thempu von jakhat ahi." 
Ezra2:70 Hitichun thempuho le Levi ho chule mi phabep khat lasahile kotngah ho, chule Nethinim ho chule Israelte jouse akhopi cheh-a acheng taove." 
Ezra3:1 Chuin lhasagi ahunglhina, Israel chate khopiho-a aumlaijun, mipi ho chu mikhat bangin Jerusalem'a akikhom khommun ahi." 
Ezra3:2 Chuin Jozadak chapa Jeshua le asopi thempuho, chule Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel le asopiho chu ading doh-un, Pathen mi Mosi dan thupeh-a kisun banga achunga govam thiltona ding Israel Pathen maicham chu asataove." 
Ezra3:3 Chuin amun mama-a chun maicham chu asemuve; ajeh chu chuche gamkaija miho jeh-a chun achunguva kichatna chu-a ahitai. Chua chun amahon Pakaiya dingin govam thilto atoh uvin, jingkah nilhah seh-in jong govam thilto atoh jiuvin ahi." 
Ezra3:4 Anakisunsa bangin amahon Houbuh kut jong abollun, chule niseh-a bolding jat danthua kisun dungjuijin nisehle govam thilto chu atohjiovin;" 
Ezra3:5 Chule hiche nunghin govam thilto aboljompeh-un, lhathah ho chule akithenso Pakai kut ho jouse-a, Pakai dingin mitinin kiphal tah-in lungcham thilpehho chu atoh-un ahi." 
Ezra3:6 Lha sagina nimasa ni-a patnin Pakai dinga govam thilto atoh panun ahi. Ahinla Pakai houin chu abul akiphutdoh hihlaijin ahi. 
Ezra3:7 Persia lengpa Cyrus'in apeh dung juijun, amahon songkheng hole thingthem bol hochu sum apeuvin, Lebanon'a pat Joppa twipi geijin Cedar thingho hinpo-a Sidon le Tyre miho chu anneh, twidon chule thao apeovin ahi."
