Ezra3:8 Tun Jerusalem'a Pathen In ahunglhunu kum nina, lhani na-in, Shealtiel chapa Zerubbabel le Jozak chapa Jeshua, chule asopite thempu dangho jouse le Levi ho, chule asoh channauva kona Jerusalem'a hungkileho chun natoh apanuvin, Levi ho kum somni-a lhah achunglamse chu Pakai in sahna-a mopo dingin apansah-un ahi." 
Ezra3:9 Chujouvin Jeshua chu achapate le asopite, Kadmiel le achapate, Judah chapate Pathen in'a natong dinga kisepdoh ho toh thakhatnin adingun, Henadad chapateleh asopite Levi chapate toh ahiuve." 
Ezra3:10 Chuin insahon Pakai houin chu abul aphudoh phatnun, amahon thempuho chu sumkon leh von akivonsah-un, chule Asaph chapate Levi ho chun khutbeh akichoijun, Israel lengpa David houdan thupeh dungjuijin Pakai chu avahchoijun ahi." 
Ezra3:11 Chuin amahon kilhang lhah-in vahchoina le thangvah nachu Pakaiya apeuvin: Ajehchu Pakai aphai, ijeh inem itileh ahepina a-imatih chanin Israel chunga aum jinge, tin asaovin ahi. Chule Pakai in abul akiphudoh tahjeh chun, mipi chun Pakai avahchoijun, awsang tah-in asamun ahi." 
Ezra3:12 Ahinla thempu tamtah le Levi ho chule phunglah-a lubohho, milui tehse houin masa anamukha ho chun, amit mutah uva hiche Pakai in khom akiphu amutah-un, aw thong jejun akapmun, chule mitamtah kipah tah-in a-aosot sot jengun ahi." 
Ezra3:13 Hitichun mipi chun kipana jeh-a awgin leh mipi ka awgin chu ahekhenthem tapouve. Ajeh chu mipi chu thong jejun a-aovun, aw gin kithong chu gamlatah-a akijan ahi." 
Ezra4:1 Tun Judah le Benjamin mite kidoupihon, gal hinga kikaihon Israel Pakai Pathen houin ding asauve ti ajahphat uvin;" 
Ezra4:2 Amaho Zerubbabel leh pate lamkaiho henga ahungun, ajah uva, keihon nasah khompiu vinge; ajehchu nangho bol bangin, keihon jong na Pathen'u kahol ui; chule hichan geija eihinpui toupao Assyria leng Esarhaddon nikho-a pat ama henga chu ganlhaina kana pehjiu ahi, atiuve." 
Ezra4:3 Ahivangin Zerubbabel le Jeshua chule Israel lah-a pate lamkai dangho chun ajah uvah hitin aseijun, Ka Pathen'u in kisahna-a hin nangho ima nakikum nadiu aumpoi; ahinla Persia leng Cyrus'in thu eipeh banguva keihotah in Israel Pathen in kasahpeh dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Ezra4:4 Chuphatnin chuche gama miho chun Judah mipi khut tha chu ahatmosah-un, a-insah-u chu asunohphah taove." 
Ezra4:5 Chule Persia leng Cyrus nikholai sungsele, Persia leng Darius vaihom chan geijin, athilgonnu sunoh dingin amaho dounan thumopthem ho athalah-un ahi." 
Ezra4:6 Chule Ahasuerus leng vaipoh kipattil lamin, amahon Judah gamsungle Jerusalem'a chengho hehna lekha asunuve." 
Ezra4:7 Chule Artaxerxes nikho laijin Bishlam, Mithredath, Tabeel chule akiloipi dangho Persia leng Artaxerxes henga lekha ajih-un; chule lekhathot chu Syria paova kisun ahin, Syria paova kiledoh ahi." 
Ezra4:8 Vaipo pipui Rehum le danthu sunpa Shimshai'in Jerusalem douna-in Artaxerxes lengpa henga hitobanghin lekhathot asun lhonin: 
Ezra4:9 Chuin vaipo pipu Rehum, danthu sunpa Shimshai, chule akiloipi dangho: Dina mite, Apharsath mite, Tarpel mite, Apharsith mite, Archevite mite, Babylon mite, Susan mite, Dehavi mite, chule Elam mite," 
Ezra4:10 Chule ginle ja umtah Asnapper'in ahinpuidoh-a, chuche phat laija Samaria gamsung achensahho leh luigallam gamdanga cheng adang chengsen, hitihin asunun ahi." 
Ezra4:11 Alekha thotnu chu hiche hi ahi: Artaxerxes lengpa henga, luigal langkhatna chengho leh adang dangho-a kon nalhacha tehon:" 
Ezra4:12 Nangma-a kona Judah mi hungkitol dohho chu kahenguva Jerusalem'a ahungun, amahon baotamna le phaloutah khopi asauvin, abangho atungdoh-un, chule abulhochu asuto taove tihi lengpan anahe tan." 
Ezra4:13 Hiche khopihi akisah phatna, chule abangho akitundoh kitna ahile, amahon gam man, thilpoh man, lamlen man ho apehlou dingu ahitan, chule hitia chu lengho sum mun'a asuhset dingu ahi, tihi tun lengpan anahe tan." 
Ezra4:14 Ajehchu keiho leng inpia kona kivah kahi jalun, lengpa kijabol louna mu hi keiho dinga vet thada umtah ahin, hijeh-a chu keihon hiche thuhi lengpa kahin hetsah-u ahi." 
Ezra4:15 Napu napate thuchin lekhabua chun kiholhen; chutile thuchin lekhabua kona chu, hiche khopihi kiphinna khopi, lengho le agamkaiho dinga kisuhkhah nathei, chule phat masa-a patna ana kiphin jing ahi jeh-a hiche khopi chu kisumanga anahi, ti namudoh-a nahetdoh ding ahi." 
Ezra4:16 Hiche khopihi akisahphat kitna, chule abang akitundoh kitleh, hichejeh-a hi hilam pang vadung gal sese-a hi nangman chanvou nanei louhel ding ahi, ti lengpa kahin hetsah-u ahi." 
Ezra4:17 Chuphatnin lengpan adonbutna alethot nin: Vaipo pipu Rehum le danthu sunpa Shimshai, chule Samaria'a cheng akiloikhompi dangho le vadung lama chengho henga chun, chamna umhen." 
Ezra4:18 Kahenguva nahin thotnu lekha chu, kamasanga kichentah-in akisim doh-e." 
Ezra4:19 Chule thu lhahna kapen, aki khol toh-in; hiche khopihi masanga patna lengho douna-a thunoh baotam boljing, asungah kiphinna le kiphin dinga mijollhahna ana umjing ahi, ti mudoh ahi." 
Ezra4:20 Jerusalem'a hin leng thahat tahtah ana umin, amaho chu vadung gal gamjousea jong vai anahom uvin, chule amaho henga chun gam man, thilpoh man, lamlen man anapeuvin ahi." 
Ezra4:21 Tun hiche miho chun anatoh-u angahna diu le keiman thupeh dang kanei kit masangse-a khopi chu akisah kit louna dingin nanghon thu peuvin. 
Ezra4:22 Hichehi boldoh louva aumlouna dingin tun nangho chingtheijun; ipidinga lengho setnading kiboldoh becheh ding ham? 
Ezra4:23 Tun Artaxerxes lengpa lekhathot chu Rehum le danthu sunpa shimahai le akiloipiho masanga asimjouvun, kinotah in Jerusalem'a Judah te henga acheuvin, thuneitah le thahatsanin anatoh-u chu angahsah taove." 
Ezra4:24 Chuphatnin Jerusalem'a Pathen Houin kisa chu atang tan ahi. Hitichun Persia leng Darius vaihom kum ni lhinna geijin atangdel tan ahi. 
Ezra5:1 Chuchephat laichun Themgaoho, Haggai Themgao le Iddo chapa Zakariah'in, Judah le Jerusalem'a chengho Judah te henga Israel Pathen minin gaothu asei lhonin ahi." 
Ezra5:1 Chuchephat laichun Themgaoho, Haggai Themgao le Iddo chapa Zakariah'in, Judah le Jerusalem'a chengho Judah te henga Israel Pathen minin gaothu asei lhonin ahi." 
Ezra5:2 Chujouvin Shealtiel chapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadok chapa Jeshua chu Jerusalem'a Pathen in chu sadingin akipan lhontai. Amani chu Pathen Themgaoho toh ahiuvin, amaho chun akithopiuvin ahi." 
Ezra5:3 Hichephat laitah chun vadung hilamsang vaipopa Tatnai le Shetharbozenai, chule aloihotoh ahenguva ahungun, ajah uvah, hiche in sadingle abangho sajoudinga thu napeuvah koiham? tin ahung seijun ahi." 
Ezra5:4 Chuphatnin keihon ajah uvah hitin kasei taove, hiche in saho min chu ipiham? katiuve." 
Ezra5:5 Ahivangin Pathen mit chu Judah upaho chunga chun aumin, hiche thudol hi Darius leng heng alhun masangsen anatoh-u chu asutang theipouve. Chuphatnin hiche thudol hi lekhathot nin ahindonbut taove." 
Ezra5:6 Hiche hi Tattenai'in athot lekhathot chu ahi: Vadung hilamsang vaipopa Tatnai le Shetharbozenai le akiloipi Aphreachi mite, vadung hilam sanga umhon, leng Darius henga:" 
Ezra5:7 Amahon ahenga lekha athotnun, asunga hitin akisune: Darius lengpa henga, lungmona jouse umhen." 
Ezra5:8 Keiho Judah gamsunga kacheuvin, Pathen in loupitah, song lenpipi-a akisah le abang thing lenpipi-a kigen, chule hiche natoh hi amachal lheh-a, akhut tah uva akhantouvu hi lengpan anahen ahi." 
Ezra5:9 Chuin keihon upaho henga chun, hiche in sading le abangho tungdoh dinga koijin thu napeh uham? tin kadongun ahi." 
Ezra5:10 Nangma henga alamkai hou min kichehtah-a kahin jih theina dingun, aminu jong kadongun ahi." 
Ezra5:11 Amahon hitin eidon butnun, keihohi van le lei Pathen lhacha kahiuvin, kum tamtah masanga anakisa, Israelte leng loupi khatnin anasahdohsa in chu kasah-u ahi, atiuve." 
Ezra5:12 Ahinla kapu kapa teovin van Pathen chu ana sulunghangun, Aman Chaldea mi Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khutna amaho anapen, aman hiche in hi anasusen, miho chu Babylon gama anapuimang tan ahi." 
Ezra5:13 Ahivangin Babylon leng Cyrus lengchan akum khat na-in, leng Cyrus hin hiche Pathen in sah ding thupeh anapen ahi." 
Ezra5:14 Chule Jerusalem'a um Pathen houin'a kon, sanale dangka-a kisem khonle bel jouse, Nebuchadnezzar'in analahdoh-a Babylon houin'a apohlut chengse chu, leng Cyrus chun Babylon houin'a konin aladoh kitnin, mikhat amin Sheshbazzar gam vaipo-a apansahpa henga chun apedohtan;" 
Ezra5:15 Chule ahenga, hiche kong leh bel hohi lanlang, chen, Jerusalem'a um houin'a polutnin, Pathen houin chu akisahna ngaima-a kisa hen, ati." 
Ezra5:16 Chuphatnin Sheshbazzar chu ahungin, Jerusalem'a um Pathen houin sahnading khombul chu atungdoh-in, chule hichea patna chu tuni geija kisa jing ahin, chule tuchan hin akisajou hihlaije." 
Ezra5:17 Hichejeh chun tun lengpan pha asahlam ahile, Jerusalem'a hiche Pathen in kisahna dinga leng Cyrus'in thutanlhah apehmong hinam ti hetdoh nadin, Babylon'a um lengpa goukholna in chu kikholtoh hen, chule hiche chungchang thudolla hin lengpan alungdeilam eihin hetsah taohen." 
Ezra6:1 Chuphatnin lengpa Darius chun thupeh apen, Babylon'a goukholna, thusimlui jouse kikoina in chu akhol toh uvin ahi." 
Ezra6:2 Hichea hin Media gamkai, Achmetha khopi leng inpia lekhabujol amuvin, chule hiche sunga chun hitihin akisunin ahi." 
Ezra6:3 Leng Cyrus lengchan kumkhat alhin kum-in, hiche Cyrus lengpa hin Jerusalem'a Pathen houin thudola chun hitihin thupeh apei; ganlhai thilto aboljinao in chu kisapha hen, chule akhombul chu dettah-in kiphut hen, asanlam chu tong somgup, chule availam jong tong somgup hihen;" 
Ezra6:4 Songtum len tahtah golthum min kigol hen, chule thingpeh thah gol khatnin kigol hen, chule akimang jouse chu leng ina kona kipeding ahi." 
Ezra6:5 Chule Pathen in'a kon sana le dangka-a kisem khonle lheng jouse, leng Nabuchadnezzar in Jerusalem houin'a kona alahdoh-a Babylon lama anapohho chu, kilepehkit henlang Jerusalem houin'a chun kipolutkit hen, chule Pathen in'a akikoina muncheh-a kikoi kit hen." 
Ezra6:6 Hijeh chun tun vadung gal lama gam vaipo Tatnai, Shetharbozenai le vadung gal lama um naloiho Apharsach mite chu, chukoma konchun ana kikhindalun." 
Ezra6:7 Hiche Pathen in kisahi limsah hih-un, Judah te gam vaipopa leh Judah upaho chengsen hiche Pathen houin hi amun mama-a saohen." 
Ezra6:8 Chukalvallin hiche Pathen in kasahna dinga, Judah upaho chunga ipi naboldingu thupeh kapeh nahiuve; amaho natoh atanlouna diuva lengpa thilholeh vadung lama kaiho chu, hiche miho hin amanchah diuva pehding ahi." 
Ezra6:9 Chule van Pathen dinga govam thilto ding angaichat jouseu, bongchal golho, kelngoichalho, kelngoinou ho, suhlou chang, chi, lengpitwi le thao ho chu Jerusalem'a thempu hon angaichat khoh dungjuijuva aniseh-a amaho thonlouva napeh teitei dingu ahi." 
Ezra6:10 Chutileh van Pathen henga namtui tahtah-a ganlhaina aneitheijuva, chule lengpa le achate hinkho dinga ataopeh theidingu ahi." 
Ezra6:11 Hiche thupeh jonghi kapeh ahi: koihile hiche thuhi akhela aumle, a-in lhungpi kiloilha hen, chule hichu kiphut hen, achunga chun kikhailih hen; chule a-in chu eh notnan kineihen." 
Ezra6:12 Chule chemuna amin umsah Pathen chun, Jerusalem'a Pathen in suhsetgo-a, chule hiche thu kheldoh ding go-a khut lama chu lengho hihen, mipi ho hijongleh suhmang hihen, keima Darius in thu kapeh ahi; gangtah in kitongdoh hen." 
Ezra6:13 Chujouvin Darius lengpan thu ahinthot dungjuijin, vadung hilamsanga vaipo Tatnai le Shetharbozenai chule aloihon gangtah in aboltauve." 
Ezra6:14 Chule Judah upaho chun asaovin, Haggai themgao le Iddo chapa Zekeriah gaothusei vangin amachallheh jenguvin ahi. Hitichun Israel Pathen thupeh dungjuile, Persia leng Cyrus, Darius, chule Artaxerxes thupeh dungjuijin asauvin, ajoutaovin ahi." 
Ezra6:14 Chule Judah upaho chun asaovin, Haggai themgao le Iddo chapa Zekeriah gaothusei vangin amachallheh jenguvin ahi. Hitichun Israel Pathen thupeh dungjuile, Persia leng Cyrus, Darius, chule Artaxerxes thupeh dungjuijin asauvin, ajoutaovin ahi." 
Ezra6:15 Chuin hiche in chu Darius alengchan kumgup lhinna, Adar lha nithum channin ajou taove." 
Ezra6:16 Chuin Israel chate, thempuho, Levi ho, chule sohchang chate danghon, hiche Pathen in thensona chu kipahtah-in amangun," 
Ezra6:17 Hiche Pathen houin thenso na-a hin, bongchal jakhat, kelngoichal jani, kelngoinou jali, chule Israel pumpidin chonset thilpeh-a dingin Israel phungjat dungjuijin kelchal somleni apeuvin ahi." 
Ezra6:18 Mosi lekhabua kisun dungjuijin, Jerusalem'a Pathen kin bolna dingin thempuho chu aloiloijin chule Levi ho chu agolgolin ahomkhenun ahi." 
Ezra6:19 Chule lha masapen nisomle nili lhinin, gal hinga kikai chaten kalchuh kut amangun ahi." 
Ezra6:20 Ajehchu thempuho le Levi ho chu akisutheng khomun, abonchauvun atheng taovin, chuin sohchang chate jouse dingle asopiteu thempuho chule amaho ding ngeijin kalchuh kut satha aboltauve." 
Ezra6:21 Chule Israel chate gal hinga kikai hungkilekit hole, Pakai Israel Pathen holdinga chuche gama Pathen helou thenlouna-a kona kikangse jouse chun aneuvin ahi." 
Ezra6:22 Chutichun cholsolou changlhah kut chu thanom tah-in nisagi amanguve. Ajehchu Pakaiyin amaho chu akipasah in, Pathen, Israel Pathen insahna-a akhuthou hatsah dingin, Assyria lengpa lungthim chu amaho lam angatsah-in ahi." 
Ezra7:1 Tun hicheng nunghin Persia leng Artaxerxes alengchan laijin, Ezra: amachu Seraish chapa, Azariah chapa, Hilkiah chapa," 
Ezra7:2 Shallum chapa, Zadok chapa, Ahitub chapa," 
Ezra7:3 Amariah chapa, Azariah chapa, Meraioth chapa," 
Ezra7:4 Zerahiah chapa, Uzzi chapa, Bukki chapa," 
Ezra7:5 Abishua chapa, Phinehas chapa, Eleazar chapa, thempu chungnung Aaron chapa ahi." 
Ezra7:6 Hiche Ezra hi Babylon'a kon achetouvin, chule Pakai Israel Pathen'in apeh Mosi danthu sunthem tah ahin, Pakai a-Pathen khutchu achunga aumjeh-in angeh chanchu lengpan apejingin ahi." 
Ezra7:7 Chule leng Artaxerxes alengchan kum sagi alhinnin, Israel chate phabep, thempuho, Levi ho, Lasaho, kotngah ho, chule Nethinim ho Jerusalem'a agache touvun ahi." 
Ezra7:8 Chule lengpa lengchan kal kum sagina, alha ngana-a chun Ezra Jerusalem ahung lhungin ahi." 
Ezra7:9 Ajehchu lha masapen nikho masapen ni-a Babylon'a kona hung kipatdoh ahin, a-Pathen khutchu achunga aum dungjuijin alha chaina nikho masapen nin Jerusalem ahung lhungin ahi." 
Ezra7:10 Ijeh inem itileh Ezra chu Pakai dan thupeh ho chu hol ding le tongdoh dinga, chule tepna dan kisun hole thutanlhahna chu Israel lah-a hildingin, alunggila akigo chaisa ahitai." 
Ezra7:11 Tun, leng Artaxerxes in Ezra thempu, danthu sun, Pakaiyin Israelte apeh dan thupeh ho le danthu kisunho hethempa, henga apeh lekhathot chu hichehi ahi." 
Ezra7:12 Lengho leng Artaxerxes Ezra thempu, van Pathen danthusunpa henga: lungmona chamkim tu le khonungin umjinghen." 
Ezra7:13 Kaleng gamsunga Israel mipi jouse, thempuho le, Levi ho, Jerusalem'a chetou nom jouse chu nangma toh kilhondin thu kalhuhsahtai." 
Ezra7:14 Nakhutna um Pathen dan dungjuija, Judah gam le Jerusalem chungchang thudol kholtoh dinga lengpa le athumop mi sagihon nangmatah nasolu ahin;" 
Ezra7:15 Chule Jerusalem'a cheng Israel Pathen henga, lengpa le athumop hon achamtah uva atou, sanale dangka thah dinga;" 
Ezra7:16 Chule Babylon gamkai jouse sana le dangka namu jousetoh, Jerusalem'a Pathen in dinga kiphal tah-a mipi hole thempuhon atodoh-u, lungcham thilpeh hojong thah dinga kisol nahi:" 
Ezra7:17 Chutia chu nangman hiche suma chu bongchalho, kelngoichalho, kelngoinou ho, anneh thilto hole donthei theilto ho chu gangtah-a nachoh-a, Jerusalem'a um na Pathen houin maichama chu natoding ahi." 
Ezra7:18 Chule sanale dangka amoh chengse chu nangma le nasopi hon naphatsahna lam lamun, na Pathen lungdeilamin mangtaovin." 
Ezra7:19 Na Pathen in'a akinbolna dinga nakipe kong leh bel hojong, Jerusalem'a Pathen angsunga napehlut ding ahi." 
Ezra7:20 Chule na Pathen in'a dinga akhohna chana pehding aum nahlaileh, lengpa nei khol khomna in'a kona napehding ahi." 
Ezra7:21 Chule keima Artaxerxes leng keimatah-in, vadung gal lama um neiching ho jouse henga; ipi hijongle Ezra thempu, van Pathen danthu sunpan naheng uva athumchan chu gangtah-a nabolpeh dingu ahi, tin thulhah kaneijin ahi." 
Ezra7:22 Dangka talent jakhat, suhlou chang tena jakhat, lengpitwi atena jakhat, thao atena jakhat, chule chi ijatmong ti umlouva napeh dingu ahi." 
Ezra7:23 Van Pathen thupeh chanchu, van Pathen in dinga thanom tah-a pehding ahi. Ajeh chu ipidinga lunghanna chu lengpa le achapate lenggam douna-a umding ham?" 
Ezra7:24 Chujongle thempuho, Levi ho, tumginga lasaho, kotngah ho, Nethinim ho, ahiloule Pathen in'a lhachaho chunga thilpohman kai, ahiloule thilho kai lah hi danto kitohlou ahi, ti kahin hetsah nahiuve." 
Ezra7:25 Chule Ezra nangman, nakhutna Pathen chihna nanei dungjuija, vadung gala mipi jouse thutan dinga, na Pathen dan heho lah-a kona thutan dingle vaihom ding nalhen ding, chule ahelouho chu nahil ding ahi." 
Ezra7:26 Koihile na Pathen danle lengpa dan joplou chu: thading ham, nodoh dingham, ahiloule athilkeo lahpeh dingham, songkul'a khumding ham, gangtah-a dan dungjuija athu-u tanding ahi." 
Ezra7:27 Jerusalem khopi'a Pakai in jephoina dinga lengpa lungsunga hitobang lunggel khumpeh-a ipu ipateu Pakai Pathen chu nunnom hen. 
Ezra7:28 Chule aman lengpa le athumopho, chule lengpa pipui loupitahho masanga hepina eina pejingin ahi. Chule Pakai ka Pathen khut kachunga aumjeh-in keima katha ahatdoh-in, Israel lah-a konin mithupiho keima kilhontoupi din kakhomkhomin ahi." 
Ezra8:1 Hichehohi leng Artaxerxes vaihom laija Babylon'a kona keitoh hung kilhontou aphung sunga upa chengse phunggui chu ahi. 
Ezra8:2 Phinehas chapate lah-a Gershom, Ithamar chapate lah-a Daniel, David chapate lah-a Hattush." 
Ezra8:2 Phinehas chapate lah-a Gershom, Ithamar chapate lah-a Daniel, David chapate lah-a Hattush." 
Ezra8:3 Shecaniah chapate, Parosh chapate, Zekeriah chapate chule amatoh phunggui kisimna-a pasal jakhatle somnga alhinguve." 
Ezra8:4 Pahath-moab chapate, Zerahiah chapa Elihoenai ahin, chule amatoh jani ahiuve." 
Ezra8:5 Shecaniah chapate, Jahaziel chapa chule amatoh pasal jathum ahiuve." 
Ezra8:6 Adin chapate, Jonatham chapa Ebed chule amatoh pasal somnga ahiuve." 
Ezra8:7 Chule Elam chapate, Athaliah chapa Jeshaiah chule amatoh pasal somsagi ahiuve." 
Ezra8:8 Shephatiah chapate, Michael chapa Zebadiah chule amatoh pasal somget ahiuve." 
Ezra8:9 Joab chapate, Jehiel chapa Obadiah chule amatoh pasal jani leh somleget ahiuve." 
Ezra8:9 Joab chapate, Jehiel chapa Obadiah chule amatoh pasal jani leh somleget ahiuve." 
Ezra8:10 Chule Shelomith chapate, Josiphiah chapa chule amatoh pasal jakhatle somgup ahiuve." 
Ezra8:11 Chule Bebai chapate, Bebai chapa Zekeriah ahin chule amatoh pasal somni le get ahiuve." 
Ezra8:12 Chule Azgad chapate, Hakkatan chapa Johanan chule amatoh pasal jakhatle som ahiuve." 
Ezra8:13 Chule Adonikam chapate anunung lamho lah-a, aminho chu Eliphelet, Jeiel, Shemaiah, chule amatoh pasal somgup ahiuve." 
Ezra8:14 Bigvai chapate jong Uthai le Zabbud chule amatoh pasal somsagi ahiuve. 
Ezra8:15 Chule amaho chu keiman Ahava luidunglen lama long vadunga chun kakhom khomin, chule hiche mun'a chun pon in'a nithum kaumun, chule mihole thempuho chu kagahven ahile Levi chapate khatcha jong kamupoi." 
Ezra8:16 Chuphatnin mithupiho, Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekeriah, Meshullam koudin mi kasolin; chule hetkhenna nei Joirib le Elnathan jong kakouvin ahi." 
Ezra8:17 Chule keiman amaho chu Kasiphia mun'a lamkai Iddo henga thupeh pumin kasollin, chule ka Pathen in'a lhachading kahenguva ahinpuina dingun Kasiphia mun'a um Iddo le asopipa Nithinim jah-a ipi aseidingu kaseipeh-in ahi." 
Ezra8:18 Chule ka Pathen khut phatah kachunguva aumjeh-in, milung chingtah khat: Mahli chapate lah-a, Levi chapate lah-a, Israel chapate lah-a kon Sherabiah kitipa chu achapate le asopite somleget toh kahenguva ahinpuijun ahi;" 
Ezra8:19 Chule Hashabiah, amatoh Merari chapate Jeshaiah, asopite leh achapate toh somni ahiuvin," 
Ezra8:20 Chujongle David le pipuhon Levi ho kin boldinga anapansah-u, Nethinim lah-a Nethinim mi jani leh somni ahiuvin, amahohi amincheh-a kiphongdoh ahiuve." 
Ezra8:21 Chuphatnin Ahava vadunglen'a chun, ka Pathen'u anga keihole keiho kaki gimbol uve, ama-a kona lamdih kamutheina dingun, keiho dingle kacha tediu chule kathilnei jouseu diuvin, an ngolding thu kaphongin ahi." 
Ezra8:22 Ijeh inem itile sepai honkhat, chule sakol sepaiho lamkah-a melma ho-a kona eikithopi diu lengpa henga thumding chu kajah achai. Ajehchu keihon lengpa henga, ka Pathen'u khutchu ama holho jouse chunga aphatna diuvin aumjin, ahinla ama nungsun ho jouse chunga athahatna le alunghana chujia ahi, tia kanaseiju ahi." 
Ezra8:23 Hitichun hiche dingin an kangol taovin, ka Pathen'u henga kathum un, eijahpeh-un ahi." 
Ezra8:24 Chuin thempuho lah-a lamkai somleni, Sherabiah, Hashebiah, chule asopiho somtoh kasep khentan ahi." 
Ezra8:25 Chule lengpa le athumopho, a-pakai ho, chule chua Israel aum jousen anato doh-u sanale dangka, umle bel, ka Pathen'u in'a thilpehho jengjong chu amaho katedoh pehtan:" 
Ezra8:26 Keiman dangka talent jaguple somnga, dangka umle bel talent jakhat, chule sana talent jakhat," 
Ezra8:27 Chujongle sana twikong somni, dram sangkhat, chule sana tobanga lu sumsantheng bel ni, akhutnuva katedoh in ahi." 
Ezra8:28 Chule ajah uvah nangho Pakai dinga atheng nahiuvin, umle bel hojong atheng ahin, chule sanale dangka hohi napu napateu Pakai Pathen henga lungcham thilto ahi." 
Ezra8:29 Jerusalem'a Pakai indan ho-a, thempuho le Levi ho lamkai, chule Israel pateho lamkaiho angsunga hicheho hi natedoh masang seuvin, vetupmun lang chingphaovin." 
Ezra8:30 Hitichun thempuho leh Levi hon todohsa dangkale sana chule um le bel ho chu, Jerusalem'a ka Pathen'u in'a pohdingin alataovin ahi." 
Ezra8:31 Chujouvin lhasomle lhani na nimasanin, Ahava vadunglen'a konin Jerusalem'a chedin kakipan taove. Chule ka Pathen'u khutchu kachunguva aumin, lampi dunga eichanglhi ho leh melmaho khutna konin eihuhdoh uve." 
Ezra8:32 Chule Jerusalem'a kahungun, chule hia chun nithum kanichong taove." 
Ezra8:33 Tun anili channin, dangka le sana chule umle bel ho chu ka Pathen'u in'a thempu Uriah chapa Meremoth khutna katedoh taovin; chule amato chun Phinehas chapa Eleazer aumin, chule amanitoh Levi mi Jeshua chapa Jozabad le Binnui chapa Naodiah aumin ahi." 
Ezra8:34 Thil jouse chu simsoh keile tesohkei ahin; chule akite jouse chu hiche petchun akisunlut sohkeije. 
Ezra8:35 Chujongle anakikai manga sohchana-a kona hungkilekit chatehon, Israel Pathen henga bongchal somleni, kelngoichal somko le gup, kelngoinou somsagi le sagi, govam thilto din, chule kelchal somleni chonset thiltodin atoh uve. Hicheho jousehi Pakai henga govam thilto ahi." 
Ezra8:36 Chuin amahon lengpa thalheng ho, chule vadunglen hilam sanga gam vaipoho henga, lengpa thutanlhah hochu apedoh taove. Chule amahon mipileh Pathen houna in chu akithopi jomjing taovin ahi." 
Ezra9:1 Tun hiti thil jouse akitoh chai phatnin, milenho chu eikimuto pidingin ahunguvin, kajah-a; Israel mite, thempuho, chule Levi ho chense chu, hiche gama cheng Canaan mite, Hit mite, Perizz mite, Jebus mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite, Egypt mite chule Amor mite thilbol thet umtah tahho-a konin amaho le amaho akikangse pouve, tin aseijun ahi." 
Ezra9:2 Ajehchu amahon achanu teu chu achapateu jidingle, amaho jidin akipuijun; hitichun muchi theng chu amaho le amaho agam miho toh akihalsoh taovin, hiche suhkhelna chu lengho le vaihomho khut ahahi dehsetne." 
Ezra9:3 Hiche thilsoh kajah apat hin, kavon holeh kaponsil kabot telin, kasam le kakhamul kabot doh-in, kidang satah-in katou lhatai." 
Ezra9:4 Sohchanga kikaiho thil suhkhel jeh-a Israel Pathen thua ati kithingleu hochu kahenglama ahung khomun; chuin nilhah lam ganlhaiphat channin kidang satah-in katoutai. 
Ezra9:5 Chule nilhah lam ganlhai phatnin lungkham tah-a katouna-a konin kathoudoh-in, kavonle kapon kabokeh tolhonin kaboh khupmin, chule Pakai ka Pathen lama kakhut kajah-in," 
Ezra9:6 Chule hitin kati, Vo Ka Pathen, nahenglam hinngat dinghi kajah achan kamaimoh lheh jenge, vo Pathen; ajehchu kachonset naohin kaluvumu achup jengin, chule kasuhkhel naohi van chan phahelin akitungdoh-e." 
Ezra9:7 Kapu kapateu nikho laija pat tuni chanin suhkhelna lentah kanei jingun; kakhan gitlou jeh-un keiho, kalengteo, chule kathempu hou gamsunga lengho khutna, chemjam'a, sohchang dinga, chomgam dinga, jumle ja thoh dinga, tunia banga hi eikipedoh-u ahi." 
Ezra9:8 Chule tunvang ka Pathen'un kamit hou ahadohsah theina dingle, soh-a kaum naova kona halna neokhat eipeh theina diule, asohcha amoh themkhat beh kaum theina dingun, chule amunthenga eiumsah theina dingun, Pakai ka Pathen'un chom khatbeh lungsetna eimusah nalaiju hen." 
Ezra9:9 Ajehchu keihohi soh kihen kahibouvun, ahijeng vangin ka Pathen'un kakihen naova eidalha pouvin, ahivangin keiho halna peh kit dingle, Pathen in tungdoh ding, chule aselaiho sempha dingle, Judah gamle Jerusalem'a kulbang sempha dingin, Persia lengte mitmu-a hepina eimusah-un ahi." 
Ezra9:10 Chule Vo ka Pathen, tu-a keihon hicheho jouse nunga ipi kasei dingu hitam? keihon nathupeh ho kanung ngatsan taovin," 
Ezra9:11 Nalhacha themgaoho mangcha-a, hitia nanasei, nagalo dingu gam chu, agama chengho thenlounale, thil kidah umtah abolhouva kona bohtin bohtanga among langkhat napat among langkhat geija asuhboh-u, gam thenglou ahi." 
Ezra9:12 Hijeh chun tun nathahat na dingule, gamsunga anpha naneh nadingu, chule nachateo gou ding nadalhah peh theina dingun: nanghon nachanuteu chu achapateu pedoh hih-un, chule achanuteu chu nachapateo dingin puipeh hih-un, chuleh a-imatih chanin amaho-a konin chamna le neile gou hol hih-un." 
Ezra9:13 Chule ka-eng khan jeh-uleh, kasuhkhel nau jeh-a, kachung uva hitobang thil ahunglhun nungin jong, nang ka Pathen'un kakhan gitlounau jeh-a kathoh dingu sanga lhomjo-a gotna neipeh uva, hitobang tah hin neihoidoh nahlai jeh-un:" 
Ezra9:14 Neithupeh hou chu kasuhkehkit uva, chule hiche thet umtah miho hi kaki guijoppi kit dingu ham? Ahoidoh-a le ajamdoh-a beihela neisuh mang kahseuva, kachunguva nalunghang lou ding ham?" 
Ezra9:15 Vo Israelte Pakai Pathen, nangma chonphatah nahi; ajehchu keiho tunikho-a banghin kahoidoh nalaijun ahi. Ven kasuh khelnao pumin namasanga kaum uve; ajehchu hiteho jeh-a hi nama sanga dingthei lou kahiuve." 
Ezra10:1 Tun Ezra chu ataova, chonset naho chu aphongdoh-a, kapuma Pathen in masanga chun atoulhah jeng phatchun, Israel mite lah-a kon pasal le numei chule chapang mipi kikhom nasatah ahenga ahung kikhomun, mipi chu lhasetah-in akap taove." 
Ezra10:2 Chule Elam chate lah-a kona Jehiel chapa Shechaniah chun adonbutnin chule Ezra keihon i-Pathen angsungah thil kasukhel taovin, chule hiche gama gamchom numei ho chu jin kaneijun ahi; ahinla hiche thua hin Israel mite din kinepna aum nalaijin ahi." 
Ezra10:3 Hijeh chun tun ka pakai thumop dungjuile, danthu dungjuijin, Pathen danthupeh ginga kihot hotna umjousen, gamdang numei ji-a kinei jouse le amaho-a kon peng jouse koidoh nadingin, i-Pathen'u toh kitepna khat semu hite." 
Ezra10:4 Thoudoh-in, ajehchu hichehi nangma khutna um ahi, keiho jong nangma to kaum khom dingu ahi; hangsanin, tong jengin, ati." 
Ezra10:5 Chutah-in Ezra athoudoh-in, thempulen leh Levi ho chuleh Israel mijouse chu akisei thu banga boldingin akihahsel sah-in ahileh, amaho jong akihahsel taove." 
Ezra10:6 Chuin Ezra Pathen in masanga konchun athoudoh-in, Johanan kiti Eliashib chapa indan sunga alutnin: chule hiche mun ahunglhun chun, aman changlhah anepon twi jong adonpoi; ajehchu soh-a kikai mangho thilsuhkhel jeh-a lunghema uma ahi." 
Ezra10:7 Chule Judah gam le Jerusalem'a um sohchangho jouse henga chun, Jerusalem'a kikhop sohkei dingin kouna thu alha taovin;" 
Ezra10:8 Koihile milen holeh vaihom upaho thumop dungjuija, nithum sunga hung kikhom louva aumleh, athilkeu jouse kilahpeh-a, amatah jongchu soh-a kikaimang mipi ho lah-a kona chomkhen hiding ahi, ti thu akiphongtai." 
Ezra10:9 Chujouvin Judah le Benjamin mite sese chu nithum sungin Jerusalem'a akikhom kimsoh-un ahi. Hichu lhako channa hichelha nisomni alhin nikho ahi. Chuin Pathen in lamlenna chun mipi jouse chu atouvun, athu akhoh jehle go ajuh nasat jeh-in mipi ho chu akithing thing jengun ahi." 
Ezra10:10 Hichun thempu Ezra chu adingin, mipi henga chun: nanghon nasukhel taove, nanghon Israel mipi suhkhel belap nadingin jatdang numei jin naki puijun ahi ati." 
Ezra10:11 Hijeh chun tun Pakai napu napateu Pathen henga chun nachonset phongun lang, alunglhaina boluvin; chule hiche gama jatdangho-a konle, anumei houva konhin kikangse uvin ati." 
Ezra10:12 Chutah-in houkhom ho mijouse chun adonbutnun, awging tah-in, nasei bangin bolnao vinge." 
Ezra10:13 Ahinla mipi hi atamlheh jengin, go hajuh laima ahin, chule polanga kading jing thei pouvin, chumale nikhat nini natoh jong ahipoi: ajehchu hiche thu ahin achonkhela jong katam taovin ahi." 
Ezra10:14 Tun mipi kikhomho jouse chunga eivaipohou chu dingdoh uhen, chule hiche chungchanga Pathen lunghanna nasatah hi eiho-a kon akiheimang kahsen, ka khopi hou jouse-a jatdang ji-a nei jouse chu, khopi jouse-a upaho leh vaihomho toh akitep nikhon hunguhen, atiuve." 
Ezra10:15 Asahel chapa Jonanthan le Tikvah chapa Jahaziah'in bouvin anelkal lhonin, chule Levi mi Meshullam le Shabbethai'in akithopi lhonin ahi." 
Ezra10:16 Chuin gal hing kikai chilhah hon hitichun aboltauve. Chuin Ezra thempu le, apu apateu lhah-a, insunga phung upa akilhengdoh hotoh ahin, amaho amin cheh-a kilheng doh ahiuvin, akihom khenun, chule hiche thu ngaito dinghin lhasom channa nikho masapen nin atou khomtaove." 
Ezra10:17 Chule lhakhatna nikhatnin jatdang ji-a neiho jousechu akholdoh chai taove. 
Ezra10:18 Chule thempu chate lah-a jatdang ji-a ananei ahetdoh houchu: Jozadak chapa Jeshua chapateho le asopiho; Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib chule Gedaliah hichenghi ahiuve." 
Ezra10:19 Chuin amahon ajiteu akoidohna dingun akhutnu apedoh-un; chule themo ahi jeh-un, suhkhel thilto dingin kelngoi honlah-a kelngoi chal khat atoh-un ahi." 
Ezra10:20 Chule Immar chapateho-a kon; Hanani le Zebediah. 
Ezra10:21 Harim chapateho-a kon; Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel chule Uzziah." 
Ezra10:22 Pashhur chapateho-a kon; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad chule Elasah." 
Ezra10:23 Chumaleh Levi lah-a kon; Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (Kelita akiti), Pethahiah, Judah le Eliezer." 
Ezra10:24 Chule lasa loi lah-a kon jong; Eliashib, chule kotngah ho lah-a Shallum, Telem le Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Israel dangdang ho lah-a kon: Parosh chapateho; Ramiah, Jeziah, Malchiah, Miamin, Eleazar, Mechijah chule Benaiah." 
Ezra10:26 Elam chapateho-a kon; Mattaniah, Zechariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth chule Eliah." 
Ezra10:26 Elam chapateho-a kon; Mattaniah, Zechariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth chule Eliah." 
Ezra10:27 Zattu chapateho-a kon; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad le Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Bebai chapateho-a kon jong; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai le Athlai." 
Ezra10:29 Chule Bani chapateho-a kon; Meshullam, Malluch, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal chule Ramoth." 
Ezra10:30 Pahath-moab chapateho-a kon; Adna, Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui chule Manasseh." 
Ezra10:31 Chule Harim chapateho-a kon; Eliezer, Ishijah, Malchiah, Shemaiah chule Shimeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Malluch, chule Shemariah." 
Ezra10:33 Hashum chapateho-a kon; Mattenai, Mattatthah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh chule Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Bani chapateho-a kon; Maadai, Amram chule Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaiah, Bedeiah, Chelluh," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib," 
Ezra10:37 Mattaniah, Mattenai chule Jaasau," 
Ezra10:38 Chule Bani, Binnui chule Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Chule Shelemiah, Nathan chule Adaiah," 
Ezra10:40 Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Azareel le Shelemiah, Shemariah," 
Ezra10:42 Shallum, Amariah le Joseph." 
Ezra10:43 Nebo chapateho-a kon; Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddau, Joel, chule Benaiah." 
Ezra10:43 Nebo chapateho-a kon; Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddau, Joel, chule Benaiah." 
Ezra10:44 Hiteho jousehin jatdang numei ji'n aneijun; chule abangin ajiteuva konin cha aneijuve. 
Nehemiah1:1 Hachaliah chapa Nehemiah thuho chu ahi. Chuin ahitin ahi. Kum somni lhinkum Chislev lhasunga keima Shushan leng ina kaum laijin," 
Nehemiah1:2 Kasopite lah-a mikhat Hanani chule Judah'a konin mi phabep ahungun, chule keiman Judah te sohchan na-a kona hoidohho chule Jerusalem khopi thu kadonglen ahi." 
Nehemiah1:3 Chuin amahon kajah-a, sohchan na-a kidalha amohho chun gamsunga gentheinale seisetna athoh thoh jengun, Jerusalem kul bang jong achimlha gamtan, chule akotpiho jouse jong meijin akalhatan ahi atiuve." 
Nehemiah1:4 Chule ahitin ahi, hiche thuho kajah phatnin katouvin kakapmin, chule ni ijat-ham lunghemin kaumin, chule an kangol-in van Pathen henga kataovin," 
Nehemiah1:5 Vo Pakai van Pathen, Pathen loupitahle tijat um, ama ngailu-a athupeh nit ho chunga thulhun chingtupma lungsetji nahenga katao ahi," 
Nehemiah1:6 Tun nasohte Israel chate dinga asun ajana namasanga nasohpa kataonahi ngaipeh dingin namit hin hasah inlang, nanakhang hinsungin; nangma douna-a kachonse taovin, Israel chate chonset naho kahin phonge, keimale kapa insung mite kachonse taove." 
Nehemiah1:7 Nangma dounan thilphalouhel kanabol taovin, nalhachapa Mosi henga nanapeh thupeh ho, tepna danho, vaihomnaho jouse chu kana nit tapouve." 
Nehemiah1:8 Kangeh nahi, geldoh temin, nalhacha Mosi henga kathupeh chu nasuhkhel uva ahile, keiman nangho namtin lah-a kathejal ding nahiuve nati." 
Nehemiah1:9 Ahinla keima lama nahung kiheijuva, kathupeh nachintup uva nabol uva ahile, van mong geija nomanga um hijongleu chun chua kona chu kapuidoh khomding, chule kamin umna dinga kalhena mun'a chu amaho kapuikhom ding ahi." 
Nehemiah1:10 Tun hiteho hi nasohte le namite, nathilbol theina loupitahleh nakhut thahat tah-a nalhatdohsate chu ahiuve." 
Nehemiah1:11 Vo Pakai kangeh nahi, tun nasoh taona lama hin nanakhang hindon, chule nasohho taona namin janachu lolhinsah-in katao nahi, tunin nasoh keima hiche mipa mitmuhin lungset tah-in hepina neipen, ajehchu keima lengpa khondoma panga kahi, ati." 
Nehemiah2:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Artaxerxes lengchan kal kum somni lhin kum, Nisan lha sungin a-anga lengpitwi aumin, keiman lengpitwi chu kalan lengpa chu kapetai. Tuma sangin amasanga lungkham mel kamusah khapon ahi." 
Nehemiah2:2 Hijeh chun lengpan kajah-a, anala nahipon, namaiso anguinave itidan ham? imachadang hiponte, lungdonna nanei ahi, ati, chuphatnin kakicha behset jengtai." 
Nehemiah2:3 Chuin keiman lengpa jah-a, lengpa hingsotnin, ipidia kamaiso nguida dingham? kapu kapate khopi, lhankhuh ho umna chu mang thah-in aum gamtai, kotpiho jouse meijin akagam tan, ahomkeo ahitai, kati." 
Nehemiah2:4 Chuin lengpan kajah-a ipi nathum nomham? eitin, hiti chun keima van Pathen henga kataotai." 
Nehemiah2:5 Chuin lengpa henga Lengpa lunglhai nading ahia, nasohpa nangma mitmu-a hi lungset theidol kahile, Judah gama kapu kapate lhankhuh ho umna khopi-a chun neisolin lang gasaphange, kati." 
Nehemiah2:6 Chuin lengpan kajah-a (lengnu jong akoma atoupet ahi) itih changei nagatham ding ham? itih phatleh nahung kilekit ding ham? atin, hiti chun lengpan soldingin pha eisan, chuin keiman aphat kateptai." 
Nehemiah2:7 Achung chonin lengpa henga chun, Lengpa lunglhaina ahileh Judah gam kalhun kahse-a eichesah uva, eihen-oh louna diuvin vadunglen lama gamvaipoho mudin lekhathot neisutpeh inlang," 
Nehemiah2:8 Chule Lengpa gam ngahpa Asaph dingin jong, inpitoh kimat kotpi-a pangding, khopi kul-a ding, chule kagachenna inding thing, eipehtheina dingin lekha neisut peh-in katin ahi. Chule ka Pathen khut thahat kachunga aumdung juijin, imajouse chu lengpan eiphatsah pehtai." 
Nehemiah2:9 Chuin keijong vadung len gal lama gamvaipo ho henga kahungin, lengpa lekhathot ho chu kapen ahi. Chuin lengpan sepai lamkaiholeh, sakol chungtou galsatho chu eikilhonpi din ahin solin ahi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Chuin Horon mi Sanballat le sottola pang Ammon mi Tobiah sohpan anajahtah uchun, Israel chate khantouna ding ngaito din mi ahunguve tin, analung himolheh-un ahi." 
Nehemiah2:11 Hitichun Jerusalem'a kahungin nithum kanichong tai. 
Nehemiah2:12 Chuin jan-in kathouvin, keimatoh kaumpi mi phabep kahiuvin, Jerusalem dinga katohgot ka Pathen'in kalungthima eikoipeh chu, koima kahilpon, katouna gancha tilou chu kahenga gamchadang aumpoi." 
Nehemiah2:13 Chule jan laijin kapotdoh-in, phaicham lama kotpi lampi chu kajuijin, dragon twikul mai lampileh ehbohna kotpi phung geijin kachepeh-in, Jerusalem kulbang chimsa leh akotpi meijin akahvamsaho chu kavetohsoh keije." 
Nehemiah2:14 Chujouvin twinah kotpi phung gei, lengpa twikul geijin kachen, ahin che-apat hin katouna gancha chu achepai theina ding mun aumtapoi." 
Nehemiah2:15 Chuin jan-in vachadung kajottouvin, kulbang chu kavelen, chuin kakinungle kitnin, phaicham kotpi-a chun kalutnin hitichun kakinungle kit tai." 
Nehemiah2:16 Vaihomte chun hoija kache, ipikabol jong eihedoh pouvin, chule Judah te thempuho, milen milalhole vaihomho chule hiche natonga pangdingho henga jong kasei pon ahi." 
Nehemiah2:17 Chuin keiman amaho jah-a, igen theinao nasatje hi namuvin, Jerusalem agohkeova aumle, akotpi phungho jouse meijin akasetai tijong namuve: hungtemun, mi i-sah louva i-um louna dingun, Jerusalem kulpi chu saphakitnu hite, kati." 
Nehemiah2:18 Chuin keiman amaho chu kadinga phatah ka Pathen khutleh lengpan kajah-a anasei thu jouse chu kaseipehtai. Chuin amahon kipatdoh-u hitin, saote, atiuve. Hitichun napha tongding chun abanthau ahatsah taove." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ahinla Horon mi Sanballat le Ammon mi sottollea pang Tobiah leh Aram mi Geshem, amahohin ajahdoh phatnu chun, eidai chavaijun, nahsahmotah-in eibolun, nathil boluhi ipi hitam? lengpa douna-a kiphin ding nahiuvem? atiuve." 
Nehemiah2:20 Chuin amaho chu keiman kadonbut nin, van Pathen'in eilolhinsah untin, hijeh chun keiho ama lhacha hohi kipat ungting kasahdoh dingu ahi. Nangho vangin Jerusalem'a chanle thuneina chule hetjingna naneipouve, katin ahi." 
Nehemiah3:1 Chuin thempu chungnung Eliashib chu asopi thempu dang hotoh akipat doh-un, kelngoi hongkot chu asemphaovin, asuthengun, chule akotkhah ho asutouvin Meah insangle Hananeel insang geijin asuthengun ahi." 
Nehemiah3:2 Chule hiche bana hin Jericho miten asauvin ahi. Chule amaho bankitna chun Imri chapa Zaccur chun asan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:3 Ahin Hasseneaah chapaten ngakul kotpi laichu asemun, ajol chengsetoh ajamun, chule akot jousetoh atouvin, akamnading holeh athihlhon jong atouve." 
Nehemiah3:4 Chule amaho banin Koz chapa Uriah chapa Meremoth in asemphan ahi. Chule amaho bana hin Meshezabeel chapa Berechiah chapa Meshullam'in asemphan ahi. Chule amaho bana hin Baana chapa Zadok'in asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:5 Chule amaho bana hin Tekoa miten asemphaovin, amilen amilalteu chu hiche a-pakaiyu natohna-a hin athunoija akunpouve." 
Nehemiah3:6 Hiche chungchon hin akotpi luichu Paseah chapa Jehoiada le Besodeiah chapa Meshullam'in asemphaovin, ajolpi ajamun akot jouse atouvin, akamnading hole athihjol jong atouve." 
Nehemiah3:7 Amaho bana hin Gibeon mi Melatiah le Meronoth mi Jadon le vadunglen gallama gamvaipo Gibeon mite Mizpeh mihon asemphaovin ahi. 
Nehemiah3:8 Abana hin sana khengho lah-a pang Harhaiah chapa Uzziel'in asemphan ahi. Abankitna chun thao namtui semho chapa khat Hananiah in asemphan, chule Jerusalem kulbang satah geijin kul akhokhum taovin ahi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Amaho bana hin Jerusalem khopi kehkhat vaipo-a pang Hur chapa Rephaiah in asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:10 Chule amaho bana hin Harumaph chapa Jedaiah'in ama inmai dontah chu asemphan chule ama bana hin Hashabnah chapa Hattush'in asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:11 Harim chapa Malchijah le Pahath-moab chapa Hashub'in amaho semnaban alangkhat chu asemphan, meilum insang chan geijin asemphan ahi." 
Nehemiah3:12 Chule abana chun Jerusalem kehkhat chunga vaihom Hallohesh chapa Shallum'in achanu tetoh asemphaovin ahi. 
Nehemiah3:13 Phaicham kotpichu Hanun le Zanoah chenghon asemphaovin, amahon asaovin kotkhah ho atovin akamnading holeh athihlhon hojong atovin, chule Ehbohna kotpi changeijin akulbang tong sangkhat asemun ahi." 
Nehemiah3:14 Ahinla ehbohna kotpi lamchu Beth-haccerem gamkaikhat vaipopa Rechab chapa Malchiah in asemphan, asan, akotkhahho atungdoh-in akamnading hole athih lhonho jong aton ahi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Ahin Mizpah gamkaikhat vaipopa Col-hozeh chapa Shallun'in twinah kotpi chu asemin, asan, chule aloijolsoh-in, chule akotkhah ho atung doh-in akamnading holeh athihgol hojong asemin, chule lengpa hon pama Siloah twikul chu David khopi lam jotsuhna kalbi chanin asemphai." 
Nehemiah3:16 Chule abanin Azbuk Beth-zur gam kehkhat vaipopa chapa Nehemiah chun David lhankhuh toh kigalsaile twikul kisem nalam le mihangsan ho in changeijin, asemphan ahi." 
Nehemiah3:17 Ama jouvin Levi holeh Bani chapa Rehum'in asaphan ahi. Abanin Keilah gam kehkhat vaihoma pang Hashabiah chun ama gamchan chu thalhengin asemphai. 
Nehemiah3:18 Ama banin Keilah gam kehkhat vaipopa Henadad chapa Bavaile asopihon asemphaovin ahi. 
Nehemiah3:19 Chule ama banin Mizpeh gam vaipo Jeshua chapa Ezer chun gal manchah kholna kul ningkoi jottouna jonchu asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:20 Ama jouvin Zabbai chapa Baruch chun phatchom ngaitah-in mun behkhat, kul ningkoi apat thempu chungnung Eliashib in kotpi phung geijin asemphai." 
Nehemiah3:21 Abanin Koz cha Uriah chapa Meremoth'in, mun behkat Eliashib in kotkhah apat Eliashib in monglam chanin asemphan ahi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Chule ama banin phaicham miho le thempuhon asemphaove. 
Nehemiah3:23 Amaho bana hin Benjamin mitele Hashub miten amani in donchu asempha lhonin ahi. Chujouvin Ananiah cha Maaseiah chapa Zariah'in ama in kom chu asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:24 Abanin Hanadad chapa Binnui'in mun behkhat Azeriah in-apat kulbang ningkoi chan asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:25 Uzai chapa Palal'in kulbang in ningkoito kigalsai le lengpa insanga kona hung sangdoh, songkul tangho, thukitana vela insang chungnung chu asemphan ahi. Aban chu Parosh chapa Pedaiah'in asemphan ahi." 
Nehemiah3:26 Chukal valin Ophel'a cheng Nethinim ho chun niso lampanga twikul kotpi kigalsai, in kisa sangdoh geijin asaphaovin ahi." 
Nehemiah3:27 Aban chu Tekoa hon mun behkhat insang lenpi kisajumdoh jonleh Ophel kulbang chanin asaphauve. 
Nehemiah3:28 Amaho banin thempuhon sakol kotpi chunglama pat, ama ama injoncheh asemphaovin ahi." 
Nehemiah3:29 Immer chapa Zadok'in amaho bana hin, ama injon asemphan ahi. Abanchu niso lam kotpi ngah-a pang Shechaniah chapa Shemaiah'in asemphan ahi." 
Nehemiah3:30 Abana hin Shelemiah chapa Hananiah le Zalaph chapa agupna Hanun'in mun behkhat asemphaove. Abana hin Berechiah chapa Meshullam'in ama indanjon chu asemphan ahi. 
Nehemiah3:31 Ama bana hin sana kheng chapa Malchiah'in, Nethinim ho umna mun Miphkad kotpi chanleh kivei miho inchan asemphan ahi." 
Nehemiah3:32 Aning jottouna lampile kelngoihong kotpitoh kikah chu, kivei miho leh sana khenghon asemphaove." 
Nehemiah4:1 Ahinla ahung hitin ahi, Sanballat'in kulbang kasemphatnu ajahtah-in, alung ahanglheh jengin Judah te chu ataitomin, i-sah loutah-in aboltan ahi." 
Nehemiah4:2 Chule asopiholeh Samaria sepaiho masanga chun hitin thu aseijin, hiche milhachom Judah hohin ipiham abolu? amahole amaho kisadoh joudingu hinam? ganlhaina abolmong dingu hinam, nikhat na asahdoh mong dingu hinam? meijin akahsetsa, bohnen lah-a kilhukhom songho chu akaldoh uva asemphat joumong dingu hinam? ati." 
Nehemiah4:3 Hichun akoma um Ammon mi Tobiah chun, ahinai cheho insah hi iti sahjongleu achunga sial khattou gakaldohleh, asongbang hohi chimlha talou ding ham? ati." 
Nehemiah4:4 Vo, ka Pathen'u ngaijin, i-sah louvin kaumun, eihou setnao jousehi amaho chunga lhunsah inlang, amaho jong hoilai gam hama sohchang dingin michomgamte khutna pedoh-in." 
Nehemiah4:5 Chule akhangit lounao immangpeh hih in, chule achonsetnao chu nangma-a konin thaimangin umdahen, ajehchu kulbang semho masanga nangma naphinseuvin ahi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Hitichun kulbang chu kasauvin, chule kulbangho chu akimlai gei kajopmatsoh taove. Ajehchu mipi honjong natoh thanopna lung apucheh un ahi." 
Nehemiah4:7 Ahinla ahung hiti, Sanballat, Tobiah le Arabia mite, Ammon mite, chule Ashdod miten, Jerusalem kulbang sahphat ahia, chule akehlai jouse akisemphatai ti ajahtah-un, alunghang lheh taovin," 
Nehemiah4:8 Chuin abonchauvin akihougu sohkeijun, chule Jerusalem chu kisatpi-a suhtang agotauve." 
Nehemiah4:9 Hijeng jongle ka Pathen'u henga kataovun, asun ajanin amaho ngah-a velhiding kakoijingun ahi." 
Nehemiah4:10 Chuin Judah chun, thilpoho athachol gamtaovin, ahin bohnenla tampi aumnalaijin, hijeh-a chu kulbanghi i-sah joulou dingu hitante ati." 
Nehemiah4:11 Imelma teovinla, amaho lah-a igalut uva, igathaova, anatoh-u igasuh tangpeh tokah seuva ahet loudingu ahi, mujong eimu pouvinte tin aseijui." 
Nehemiah4:12 Chule ahitin ahi, akenguva cheng Judah te chu ahungun, kajah uvah amaho muntina kona hunguva eihung delkhum dingu ahi, tin somveijen ahungseijui." 
Nehemiah4:13 Hijeh chun kenjong kulbang polam pang anem nalai le asanglai munho chun mipi ho chu, a-in kokon achemjamu, atengchao chule thalpi hotoh thon panmun kasemsah-e." 
Nehemiah4:14 Chule kathoudoh-in kagavelen, milen milal, vaihomhole mipi ho jah-a, amaho khu kichahih beh-un, Pakai loupi kidang le thahat tah neipa chu sumil louvin, nasopi hou, nachapateo, najiteule na-inko huhnadin satnun kati." 
Nehemiah4:15 Chule ahitin ahi, kamelma teovin athil gonnu kahetdoh uva, chule Pathen'in athilgonu asuh chatvai pehtah-in, keiho jong ama ama natoh cheh tong dingin kakinungle kit taove." 
Nehemiah4:16 Chule ahitin ahi, hiche nikho-a pat hin, keima lhachate mi akeh khatnin na atongun, chule akehkhat hochu tengcha, lumle thalpi chule ompho aki-ah un, chule vaihomte chu Judah te insung mite nunglama apanguve." 
Nehemiah4:17 Kulbang seho, chule pohgih pohon apohgih-u pumin akhut langkhat nun na atongun langkhatna manchah akichoicheh un ahi." 
Nehemiah4:18 Hitichun insaho chun achemjamu apanguva akikocheh-un, insah chuto akopmun, chule sumkon mutna pangpa chu keima koma aume." 
Nehemiah4:19 Chule keiman milen milal holeh vaihomho chule mipi henga chun, inatoh-u hi anasan alenlheh-in, kulbang isahnaova hin ikigamlat thei lheh-un," 
Nehemiah4:20 Hijeh chun sumkon gin najah nalamcheh uvah keiholam hindelluvin, i-Pathen'un eiho dia gal eisatpeh diu ahi, kati." 
Nehemiah4:21 Hitobang tah hin na ka tongun, mi akeh khatnin jingkah khovah lhah-a pat nilhah jan ahsi sophat geijin tengcha akidopmun ahi." 
Nehemiah4:22 Hiche bangma hin chepettah hin mipi jah-a chun, jana eingah dingule suna natonga pang ding koihileh alhacha hotoh Jerusalem'a gehsoh keijuhen tin kaseije." 
Nehemiah4:23 Hitichun keima jong, kasopite hojong, kasottol houjong, kanungjuija eingah uva pangho kisilpet tailouvin koimachan kavonnu sop dingin jong kasutlha pouvin ahi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Chule mipi holeh ajiteu chu asopihou Judah te douna-in nasatah-in akapmun ahi. 
Nehemiah5:2 Ajeh chu amaho abang khatnin, keiho kachapa teoleh kachanu teotoh tampi kahiuvin hijeh chun kaneh uva kahintheina dingun anneh kilah unge atiuvin ahi." 
Nehemiah5:3 Abang khatnin kel jeh-in keihon kalou mun jouseu, kalengpilei jouseu le ka-inu neh chohna din katungjou taove, atiuve." 
Nehemiah5:4 Abangkhat kitnin, keihon kalou munnu kalengpileiju lengpa kai pehdin sum pa lahnan katungdoh soh taove atiuvin, ahi." 
Nehemiah5:5 Tuchanin katahsao hi kasopihou tahsavou bang ahin, kachateu jong amaho chate tobang ahiuve. Chule ven, kachapateu hi sohchanga um gamdingu ahitai. Kachanuteu phabep jong sohchanga um ahitaovin, huhdohna je kaheta pouve, ajehchu kagam houleh lengpilei ho midang achang taove, atiuvin ahi." 
Nehemiah5:6 Chuin hicheng thuho kajah-a, akao-aw kajahtah-in, keima kalung ahangbehseh jengtan," 
Nehemiah5:7 Hichun keiman kalung kanageltoh masan, milen milal tele vaihoma pangho chu kahousen, nangho amitakipmin nasopi hou batman apung nakilahcheh uve, kati, chule amaho thu gelkhom dingin mi tamtah kakoukhomin ahi." 
Nehemiah5:8 Chuin keiman ajah uva Pathen hephalou lah-a kijohdohsa isopihou chu ijochanun ilhatdoh-un, nanghon nasopi hou Judah te chu joh nagotjingu ham? eihole eiho lah-a jong ikijoh dingu ham? katin, chutah-in adailhahel taovin, donbut nading ahetapouve." 
Nehemiah5:9 Kasei kitnin, nathilbolu hi aphahih beh-e, imelmateu Pathen helouhon eihouset jeh uva Pathen kicha jinga naum dingu hilouham? kati." 
Nehemiah5:10 Hitobang chun keimale kasopite chule kalhachaho jong sum chule changle mim kana palahsah jiuve, Kangeh nahiuve, apung uma palah sahhi haitaohite." 
Nehemiah5:11 Kangeh nahiuve, tuni tah hin, alouhou alengpilei hou, a olive honhou, a-inhou, chujongle hop jakhat chunga hopkhat nalahjiu sum hihen, chang hihen, lengpitwi hihen chule thao hijongle lepehsoh kitnun, katin ahi." 
Nehemiah5:12 Chuin amahon, keihon lepehkit nunge, chule amaho-a konin imacha ngehpou vinge, hitichun nasei bangtah-in boluvinge, atiuve. Chujouvin, keiman thempuho kakouvin, thutep bangtah-a abolsohkei nadiuvin kaki hahsel sahtai." 
Nehemiah5:13 Chujongle kaponchol chen chu kathingin, hitin kati, hiche thutep banga molsolou jouse chu Pathen'in ama insung le anatoh na-a konin hitobang hin thinglha hen, chule agoh keuseh-in umuhen, chuin mipi kikhomho jouse chun, atisoh keijun, Pakai avahchoi taove. Chule mipi ho chun hiche kitepna banghin aboltauve." 
Nehemiah5:14 Hiche kalval hin amaho chungle Judah ho chunga gam vaipodia eikipansah-a pat leng Artaxerxes kum somni alengchan kum-a pat kum somthumle kumni alengchan gei; hichu kum somle kumni sunga hin, keile kasopi hon gamvaipo anneh chu kanepouve." 
Nehemiah5:15 Ahin, keima masanga gamvaipoa anapangho chun mipi hodinga pohgih tampi anapeuvin, dangka shekel somli simtha louvin changlhah le lengpitwi analahpeh jiuvin, ahi. Alhachaho jengin jong mipi chunga vai ahomun, ahinla kenvang, ka Pathen kakichat jeh-in hitobanghin kabolpoi." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ahi, hiche kulbang bolna-a hi kapan jing ahin, gam himhim kachopouve, kalhachate jouse jong natongin aumkhom jingun ahi." 
Nehemiah5:17 Hiche chungchonin, ikimvel uva namtina konle Pathen helouhole ahung kikhom khomho simlouvin, Judah teleh vaihomlete lah-a keima dokhanga an ananejing mi jakhat le somnga aumjinguve." 
Nehemiah5:18 Nikhat sunga kei nehdinga kigong chu bongchal khatleh deilhencheh kelngoi gup, chule ahcha hojong keidingin asemun, nisom alhinsehle lengpitwi akimin akhol khomun, hichan geihin eikigonpeh jongle mipi ho asohchannao anasatjeh-in, keiman gam vaipo kahina-a, kipe changlhah chu kanejipoi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ka Pathen hiche mite dinga kathilbol jouse dungjui hin, nangin keima phatnading neigelpeh jingin." 
Nehemiah6:1 Tun ahung hitin ahi, Sanballat le Tobiah le Arab mi Geshem chule kamelmaho adangsen bang kisahdoh le aphalou akidalha abeitai ti ajah phatnun, (kotpi kotho kabuto loulai vangin,)" 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanballat le Geshem'in, hungin lang Ono phaicham khoho khatna kimutou hite, tin thu ahinthot lhonin ahi. Ahinla amahon kachunga engkhanna thilphalou abol gotnu ahi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Chuin keiman ahenguva thupole ho kasolin, na loupitah katoh jeh-in kahungsuh theipoi. Kahungsuh-a kadalhah kah-a, natoh ibola tangding ham? katin ahi." 
Nehemiah6:4 Ahinla hitobang hin mi liveijen ahinsolun, keiman kadonbut ngaiman kadonbut jin ahi." 
Nehemiah6:5 Chuphatnin chutobangma chun angavei channa-in, Sanballat'in kahenga lekhathot kihongsa khat asohpa ahinchoi sah-in," 
Nehemiah6:6 Asunga chun hiti hin akisune: Pathen heloulaiho henga akiseijin, Geshem injong aseijin ahi, hichu nangle Judah ten kiphin nagotnu ahi. Hiche dinga chu kulpi bang hi nasem phatnu ahi, akisei dungjuija nangma amaho leng nahi theina dinga ahi." 
Nehemiah6:7 Chule Judah gama lengkhat aume tia nathu phong jalle ding themgao tamtah Jerusalem'a napansah tai. Chule tun hiche thuho dungjui jahi lengpa henga thu alhut dingu ahitai. Hijeh chun, tun hungin lang kihou khomu hite, ati." 
Nehemiah6:8 Chuphatnin keiman thu kathotnin, nasei banga thil kibol khatcha aumpoi, nangma lungchama nasemthu ahibouve, kati." 
Nehemiah6:9 Ajehchu amaho jousen eikichatjeh uva, kanatoh-u pilhin louna dinga kakhutnu hatmosah ding eitiu ahi. Hijeh chun tun vo, Pathen kakhutnu hatsah in." 
Nehemiah6:10 Hiche jouhin Mehetabeel cha Delaiah chapa Shemaiah henga kachen, ama a-in'a kot kikha khum ahin, chule aman aseije, Pathen'in a-houin sungeija kimuto hitin, houin kotkhah ho ikhadiu ahi, ajehchu nangma thatdinga hungding ahiuve; henge, janteng nangma thatdinga hungdiu ahi." 
Nehemiah6:11 Chuin keiman hitin kati, kei tobang mikhat chu jam intem? keitobanga ahinna huhdoh go-a houin sunga lutding koi umam? lut louhel ding kahi." 
Nehemiah6:12 Chule ven, ama Pathen sol ahipoi ti kahethemtai. Hiche gaothuhi keima douna-a asei ahi, ajehchu Tobiah le Sanballat'in athalah lhon ahi." 
Nehemiah6:13 Hijeh-a chu keima katijatna, ati bangu kabola, chule thil engkhanna nei ahi tia eisuhminset nuva, eihouset theina dinguva, athalah-u ahibouve." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ka Pathen, Tobiah le Sanballat hi, anatoh dungjui cheh leh Naodiah themgaonu, chule themgao dang dangho kichatsah eigohohi hetpeh jingin." 
Nehemiah6:15 Nisomnga le nini lutnin Elul lha nisomni le ninga lhinin kulbang chu jo ahitai. 
Nehemiah6:16 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pathen helouho leh kamelma teovin, nakitong jouse amutah un, amaho alungthoi lheh-un, hiche nakitonghi Pathen natoh ngei ahi ti ahetauve." 
Nehemiah6:17 Chukalvalin hiche laichun Judah milen milal hon Tobiah chu lekha tamtah athotnuvin, chujongle Tobiah lekhathot jong amujiuve." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ajehchu Judah mitamtah ama koma kihahselji ahiuvin, ajehchu amachu Arah chapa Sehchaniah tupa ahin, achapa Johanan chun Berechiah chapa Meshullam chanu ji-a anei ahi." 
Nehemiah6:19 Keima jahdin anatohphat aseijiuvin chule kathuseiho jong ama koma alhutjiuve. Chule Tobiah hin kei kichatsah nadinga lekha ahinthotji ahi. 
Nehemiah7:1 Tun ahitin ahi, kulbangho kasemuva kotkhah ho katundoh uva, kotngah ho, lasa loile Levi ho kapansah jouvun," 
Nehemiah7:2 Kasopi Hanani leh leng ina vaihom Hananiah, amani hi Jerusalem vaipo din kathupeh-in, amahi mi kitah tahsan umtah ahin, chule midang sanga Pathen ging ahi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Chule ajah uvah, Jerusalem kotpihi nisa asatdoh kahsen kihonda henlang, kotngah ho dinpetin, kotjouse khah-u henlang, kamsoh keijuhen, chule kotngah-a pangdin Jerusalem'a chengho lhengdoh unlang, ama ama ngana munchehle, ama ama injoncheh akingadiu ahi, kati." 
Nehemiah7:4 Tun khopi chu alenin, chule ajaolheh-in, ahin amihem alhom nalaijin chule inho jong sahjou loulai ahi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Chuin ka Pathen'in kalung gila milen milal ho, vaihomho chule mipi ho kou khomsoh keija, aphungkhai khaija aminu simdin kalunggil ahetsah-in ahi. Chule anachetou masaho phung kaija minbu sutna chu kamudoh-in, hia chun hitia kisunhi kamun, ahi." 
Nehemiah7:6 Hitehohi agamsung chate chu ahiuve amaho gal hinga kikaina mun'a kona hungkitol tou ahiuvin, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar chun anatolmanga, Jerusalemle Judah a hungkile kitnuva, ama khopi cheh ahinkijot kitnu, ahi." 
Nehemiah7:7 Amaho chu Zerubbabel toh hungkhom; Jeshua, Nehemiah, Azariah, Raamiah, Nahamani, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum, Baanah ahiuve. Israel mipi lah-a amijatmong chu hichehi ahi, kati." 
Nehemiah7:8 Parosh chate sangni le jakhat le somsagi le ni. 
Nehemiah7:9 Shephatiah chate jathum le somsagi le ni. 
Nehemiah7:10 Arah chate jagup le somnga le ni. 
Nehemiah7:11 Jeshua le Joab sonho Pahath-moab chate sangni le jaget le somleget ahiuve. 
Nehemiah7:12 Elam chate sangkhat le jani le somnga le li. 
Nehemiah7:13 Zattu chate jaget le somli le nga. 
Nehemiah7:14 Zaccai chate jasagi le somgup. 
Nehemiah7:15 Binnui chate jagup le somlileget. 
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai chate jagup le somni le get. 
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad chate sangni le jathum le somnileni. 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam chate jagup le somgup le sagi. 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvai chate sangni le somgup le sagi. 
Nehemiah7:20 Adin chate jagup le somnga le nga. 
Nehemiah7:21 Ater, Hezekiah tia jong kikou, chate somko le get." 
Nehemiah7:22 Hashum chate jathum le somni le get. 
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai chate jathum le somnileli. 
Nehemiah7:24 Hariph chate jakhat le somleni. 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon chate somko le nga. 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem le Netophah mi jakhat le somget le get. 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathoth'a mi jakhat le somni le get. 
Nehemiah7:28 Beth-azmaveth'a mi somlileni. 
Nehemiah7:29 Kirjath-jearim, Chephirahle Beeroth mi jasagi le somli le thum." 
Nehemiah7:30 Ramah le Geba a mi jagup le somni le khat. 
Nehemiah7:31 Michmas mi jakhat le somnileni. 
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel le Ai'a mi jakhat le somni le thum. 
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo khatjopa'a mi somnga le ni. 
Nehemiah7:34 Elam chomkhat chate sangkhat le jani le somnga le li. 
Nehemiah7:35 Harim chate jathum le somni. 
Nehemiah7:36 Jericho chate jathum le somli le nga. 
Nehemiah7:37 Lod, Hadid le Ono chate jasagi le somni le khat." 
Nehemiah7:38 Senaah chate sangthum le jako le somthum. 
Nehemiah7:39 Thempuho: Jeshua insung kon Jedaiah chate jako le somsagi le thum. 
Nehemiah7:40 Immer chate sangkhat le somnga le ni. 
Nehemiah7:41 Pashhur chate sangkhat le jani le somli le sagi. 
Nehemiah7:42 Harim chate sangkhat le somlesagi. 
Nehemiah7:43 Levi ho: Hodevah chate akon Jeshua le Kadmiel chate somsagi le li. 
Nehemiah7:44 La saho: Asaph chate jakhat le somlileget. 
Nehemiah7:45 Kotngah ho: Shallum chate, Ater chate, Telex Talmon chate, Akkub chate, Hatita chate, Shobai chate jakhat le somthum le get." 
Nehemiah7:46 Nethinim ho: Ziha chate, Hashupha chate, Tabbaoth chate." 
Nehemiah7:47 Keros chate, Sia chate, Padon chate." 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebanah chate, Hagaba chate, Shalmai chate." 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanan chate, Giddel chate, Gahar chate." 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaiah chate, Rezin chate, Nekoda chate." 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazzam chate, Uzza chate, Phaseah chate." 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai chate, Meunim chate, Nephushesim chate." 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuk chate, Hakupha chate, Harhur chate." 
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlith, Mahida chate, Harsha chate." 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkos chate, Sisera chate, Thamah chate." 
Nehemiah7:56 Neziah chate, Hatipha chate." 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomon soh ho chate sotai chate. Sophereth chate, Perida chate." 
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala chate, Darkon chate, Giddel chate." 
Nehemiah7:59 Shephatiah chate, Hattil chate, Zebaim mi Pochereth chate, Amon chate ahiuve." 
Nehemiah7:60 Nethinim jouse toh Solomon soh ho chilhah chu jathum le somko le ni ahiuve. 
Nehemiah7:61 Chule Temalah, Talharesha, Cherub, Addon le Immera kona hungtou hochu hichehohi ahiuve, ahinla apu apa sonholah-a achilhah ho chu Israel mi ahiule ahilouvu chu asutthei tapouve." 
Nehemiah7:62 Delaiah chate, Tobiah chate, Nekoda chate sechu jaguple somlileni ahiuve." 
Nehemiah7:63 Chule thempuho lah-a, Habaiah chate Barxillai chate Gilead mi Barzillai chanute lah-a khat akichenpia, aminu dungjuija kisah ahi." 
Nehemiah7:64 Mi hichenghin phungmin kisutna lah-a, aminu aholun, ahinla amujou tapouve. Akisuhboh jeh-un, a thempu hinaova konin akihaisahtaove." 
Nehemiah7:65 Chule Tirshatha'in amaho jah-a, thempu chun Urim le Thummim akibeha adin kahse-a, thiltheng chungnung chu anehthei loudiu ahi, ati." 
Nehemiah7:66 Mipi kikhomho jouse chu abonchauvin, sangsomli le sangni le jathum le somgup ahiuve." 
Nehemiah7:67 Asohho numei le Pasal sangsagi le jathum le somthum le sagi simtha louvin la saloi numei le Pasal jani le somli le nga ahiuvin," 
Nehemiah7:68 A sakol houchu ja sagi le somthum le gup, sanganho chu jani le somli le nga ahiuve." 
Nehemiah7:69 A sangongsao vuchu jali le somthum le nga ahi. 
Nehemiah7:70 Chule Pa te lah-a lamkai phabepmin natohna dingin atoh doh un ahi. Tirshatha gam vaipopan sana tena sangkhat, twikong somnga, thempu von janga le somthum, sumkhol na-a atohdohe." 
Nehemiah7:71 Chule insung luboh mi phabep honjong sumkhol na-a din sana tena sangsomni chule dangka tena sangni le jani atohdoh-un, ahi." 
Nehemiah7:72 Chule midang jousen apeh uchu sana tena sangsomni le dangka tena sangni, chule thempu von somgup le sagi ahi." 
Nehemiah7:73 Hitihin thempuho, Levi ho, kotngah ho, lasaho mi phabep le Nethinim ho, chule Israel jouse chu ama ama khopi cheh-a achengcheh un, ahi. Lhasagi ahunglhin phatnin Israel chate chu akhopicheh uvah aumtaove." 
Nehemiah8:1 Chuin mipi jouse chu mihem khat bang jengin twikul kotpi masang lamlena chun akikhom khommun, chule amahon Pakaiyin Israelte dan thupeh Mosi dan lekhabu chu hinpodoh dingin, lekhasunpa Ezra henga aseitaove." 
Nehemiah8:1 Chuin mipi jouse chu mihem khat bang jengin twikul kotpi masang lamlena chun akikhom khommun, chule amahon Pakaiyin Israelte dan thupeh Mosi dan lekhabu chu hinpodoh dingin, lekhasunpa Ezra henga aseitaove." 
Nehemiah8:2 Chuin thempu Ezra chun, anumei apasal houkhom ho henga leh ahekhen themthei ho jah ding chun, amasanguva lhasagi na, ani masa nin danthupeh chu ahinpodoh tai." 
Nehemiah8:2 Chuin thempu Ezra chun, anumei apasal houkhom ho henga leh ahekhen themthei ho jah ding chun, amasanguva lhasagi na, ani masa nin danthupeh chu ahinpodoh tai." 
Nehemiah8:3 Chuin aman twi kotpi phunga um khopi lamlen masanga chun numei pasal leh ahethei dingdol jouse masanga chun jingkah-a pat nin sunkim geijin asimdoh peh in: chule dan thupeh chu mijousen anakhang uva lunglut tah-in angaisoh keijun, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Chuin danthusun Ezra chu thuseina dinga lhongpeh kidosang chunga chun adingin, akoma chun Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah adinguvin; chule ajet le veija chun Pedaiah, Mishael, Malchijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zekeriah, le Meshullam adinguvin ahi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Chuin danthusun Ezra chu thuseina dinga lhongpeh kidosang chunga chun adingin, akoma chun Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah adinguvin; chule ajet le veija chun Pedaiah, Mishael, Malchijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zekeriah, le Meshullam adinguvin ahi." 
Nehemiah8:5 Chuin Ezra'in mipi jouse mitmun lekhabu chu aphongin; (ajeh chu mipi jouse chungvuma dinga ahin) chuin aphohdoh phatnin mipi jouse chu adingun: 
Nehemiah8:5 Chuin Ezra'in mipi jouse mitmun lekhabu chu aphongin; (ajeh chu mipi jouse chungvuma dinga ahin) chuin aphohdoh phatnin mipi jouse chu adingun: 
Nehemiah8:6 Chuin Ezra'in Pakai Pathen len chu athangvah-in ahi. Chuin mipi jousen adonbut un; “Amen, Amen” tin akhut hou adomsangun: chule alu akunsah-un, amaiju tolla asulut nun Pakai chu ahou taovin, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:6 Chuin Ezra'in Pakai Pathen len chu athangvah-in ahi. Chuin mipi jousen adonbut un; “Amen, Amen” tin akhut hou adomsangun: chule alu akunsah-un, amaiju tolla asulut nun Pakai chu ahou taovin, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Chule Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan, Pelaiah, le Levi hojong chun mipi hochu danthu peh ahetchet sah-un: chule mipi hochu adinnau munna chun ading jingun ahi." 
Nehemiah8:8 Hitichun amahon Pathen dan thupeh lekhabu chu kichentah-in asimun, chule athuchu ahilchet peh in, asimdoh hochu ahetkhenthem sah-un ahi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Chuin Tirshatha Nehemiah le dan thusun thempu Ezra, chule mipi hille-a pang Levi hochun, mipi jouse henga chun; tuni nikho hi Pakai na Pathen dinguva nikho theng ahin, lunghem hih-un, kapjong kap hih-un, atiuvin ahi, Ajeh chu amahon danthupeh thu cheng hochu ajah phatnuva mipi jouse chu kapma ahiuve." 
Nehemiah8:9 Chuin Tirshatha Nehemiah le dan thusun thempu Ezra, chule mipi hille-a pang Levi hochun, mipi jouse henga chun; tuni nikho hi Pakai na Pathen dinguva nikho theng ahin, lunghem hih-un, kapjong kap hih-un, atiuvin ahi, Ajeh chu amahon danthupeh thu cheng hochu ajah phatnuva mipi jouse chu kapma ahiuve." 
Nehemiah8:10 Chuin aman ahenguva, cheovin lang, athao thao neuvin lang, alhum lhum donun: imacha kigon louho dingin chan thotpeh-un: ajeh chu tunihi i-Pakai dinguva nikho theng ahin, lung jong lungdong hih-un; ajeh chu Pakai kipana chu na thahat nau ahi." 
Nehemiah8:11 Hitichun Levi hochun mipi hochu athipsah-un, tunihi nikho theng ahin, chule lungjong lungkham hih un, atiuve." 
Nehemiah8:12 Chuin ahenguva kiphongdoh thuho chu ahetcheh tah jeh-un, aneh dingle adonding chule chanho thotdoh dingle kipah tah-a umdingin akikhen dohtaove." 
Nehemiah8:13 Chuin ani ni lhinnin, Mipi jouse lah-a apateu insung luchang holeh Levi holeh thempu hochu, dan thusun Ezra henga; dan thupeh ho hetchet theina dingin akikhomun, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:13 Chuin ani ni lhinnin, Mipi jouse lah-a apateu insung luchang holeh Levi holeh thempu hochu, dan thusun Ezra henga; dan thupeh ho hetchet theina dingin akikhomun, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:14 Chule Pakaiyin Mosi anapeh, Israel chate chu lhasagi channa kut sunga lhambuh sunga chengdio ahi: tia dan thupeh lekhabua kisun chu amahon amuvin ahi." 
Nehemiah8:15 Chule hitia chu amahon akhopi jouseule Jerusalem khopi sunga alhangsap leuva, lhangvum lama potdoh unlang Olive thingbah ho, chah thing bah ho, lenmui bah ho, tumkao ho, chule lhambuh ho-a sem dinga akijih banga, aphonjal lediu ahi." 
Nehemiah8:16 Hitichun mipi hochu acheuvin, hitiho chu ahinpouvin; ama ama in chung dingle ahonsung dinghou, chule Pathen in hongsung ho-a, twi kotpi khopi lamlen; chule Ephraim kotpi khopi lamlen sunga lhambuh in akisemun, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Chule gal hinga kikai hungkile kit mipi ho jouse chun, lhambuh ho akisonun, lhambuh ho noija chun atouvun Nun chapa Joshua nikholaija pat hiche nikho geija hi Israel chaten hitia hi anabolkhah loulaiju ahi. Hitichun kipa na lentah anaumin, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Chule gal hinga kikai hungkile kit mipi ho jouse chun, lhambuh ho akisonun, lhambuh ho noija chun atouvun Nun chapa Joshua nikholaija pat hiche nikho geija hi Israel chaten hitia hi anabolkhah loulaiju ahi. Hitichun kipa na lentah anaumin, ahi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Chujongle ani anin ni masa ni-a pat achaini geijin, Pathen danthupeh lekhabu chu asimin ahi. Chule amahon nisagi kut abollun, chule aumdan dungjui jin, aniget nichu thupeh dungjuija kikhoppi theng nikho ahi." 
Nehemiah9:1 Tun hiche lha nisomni le nili nin, Israel chaten khaopon akisilun, achunguva leivui akinuvin an ngollin kikhopna aneijun ahi." 
Nehemiah9:2 Chuin Israel chilhah phung chu gamdangmi ho lah-a konin, akisepdoh un adingun, chule achonset nau leh apu apateu khangitlouna jouseu aphongun, ahi." 
Nehemiah9:3 Chule amaho aumnacheh uva ading doh-un, chuche nikho hopli-a hopkhat sung chun Pakai a-Pathen'u danthupeh lekhabu chu asimun; chule hopli-a hopkhat danga chun a-Pathen'u ahouvun ahi." 
Nehemiah9:4 Chuin Levi ho thuseina dinga kisepsang chunga chun Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebia, Bani le Chenani hohi adingun, awsangtah in Pakai a-Pathen'u asamun ahi." 
Nehemiah9:5 Chuin Levi ho, Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabnah, Sherebiah, Hodijah, Shebaniah le Pethahiah chun dingun lang na Pathen chu atonsotnin choi-anun, chule pachatna leh vahchoina tincheng chunga namin loupichamkim chu nunnom hen, atiuve." 
Nehemiah9:6 Nangma bou Pakai nahi, nangman van nasemin, vanle vanho ngeisunga umjouse, leisetle asunga aumjouse twipiho chule asunga umjouse, chu Nangin nachingtup'in, chule van janelin nahouvun, ahi." 
Nehemiah9:7 Nangin Abram chu Chaldea gam Ur kho-a kona nahinpuidoh-a, amindinga Abraham hinsah-a Pakai Pathen chu nangma nahin," 
Nehemiah9:8 Chule namasanga ama milungkitah ahina namudoh a, chule Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Ammor mite, Perizz mite, Jebus mite chule Girgas mite gam pehdinga amatoh thulhuna nanasem achilhahte kapeh ding ahi, natin chule nangin nathuho chu nasubu lhit jie, ajehchu nangma chondihtah nahi." 
Nehemiah9:9 Egypt gama kapateu thohgimna namujingin, chule twipi sana akanao najahpeh-e." 
Nehemiah9:10 Chule Pharaoh le asohte jouse le agamsung mihem jouse chunga melchihna le thil kidangho namusah-in ahi. Ajehchu amahon amaho dounan kiletsahtah -in thil anaboluve, ti nahedoh-in ahi. Hitichun tuni banghin min khat nana neije." 
Nehemiah9:11 Amaho twikhanglen lailunga tolgoa achetheina dingun, nangin amasanguva twikhanglen chu nasukhenin, song twihat lah-a kiseplut bangin, abolgenthei hochu twithuh lah-a naseplutnin ahi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Chukal valin amaho achenau lampia vah pehdin, sunle meilhang khompin chule janleh meikong khompin amaho chu nanapuijin ahi." 
Nehemiah9:13 Chule Sinai lhang chunga konin jong nahung kumlhan, van'a konin amaho nakihoupin, amaho thutanlhah dihna dan dihtahho, tepnadan phaho le thupeh ho napen," 
Nehemiah9:14 Chule nacholdo nitheng chu amaho nahetsah-in, chule nasoh Mosi khutna konin danho, tepna danho, danho, amaho thu napen ahi." 
Nehemiah9:15 Chule agilkel tengule van'a konin changlhah napen, chule adangchah tengule songpi-a konin twi naputdoh sah-in, amaho pehdinga nana thutepna gama acheuva, agalo nadingun amaho nathutep-in ahi." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ahinla amaho leh kapateu chun kiletsah tah-in anabollun, alouchalun, nathupeh hochu angainom pouve." 
Nehemiah9:17 Chule thu amangnom pouvin, alah uva nathil kidang bolhojong anahsah pouvin, ahinla alouchalun akiphinun, asoh hinao mun'a kilekitdin gal lamkai ding akilhenun, ahivangin nangin ngaidam dinga kigosa jingpa Pathen milungset themle hepina-a dim, lunghang vahlou khotona-a dim nahin, amaho namoh dalhah ngaipon ahi." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ahi, amahon akilhajol bongnou lim anasemuvin, hichehi ahi, na Pathen'u, Egypt gama kona nahinpuidoh uva chu, atiuvin, chule lunghana nasatah-in naphin seuve;" 
Nehemiah9:19 Hijongle hepina dimset chun gamthipmah amaho nadalha pon, lampia sunle amaho puidingin meilhang khompin chule amaho salvah dingle achenao lampi hildingin janleh meikong khompin, nadalha jipon ahi." 
Nehemiah9:20 Amaho hil dingin nalhagao pha chu napen, na manna chu akam sunguva lutding na-itpon, chule adang chah naova amaho twi napen ahi." 
Nehemiah9:21 Ahi, gamthipma chun kum somli sung nanavah-in, hitichun imacha alhasam pouvin, asil le achenu achulpon, akeng houjong apompon, ahi." 
Nehemiah9:22 Chukal valin lenggam holeh nampi hochu napen, gam ningkoi tina amaho nahom khennin, hitichun amahon Sihon gam Heshbon lenggam leh, Bashan lengpa Og gamchu alotauve." 
Nehemiah9:23 Achateu jongchu van'a ahsi jatnin napunsah-in, chule amahon alodinguva apateu henga nana tepsa gamsunga chun napuilut tan ahi." 
Nehemiah9:24 Hitichun achateu chu alutnun gamchu alotaovin, chule nangman gamsunga chun Kanaan miho chu amaho masanga nasunemin, anop aninguva aboldiuvin alenghouleh chugama miho chu akhutnuvah napedoh tai." 
Nehemiah9:25 Chule amahon khopi det holeh leiset phaho chu alauvin, chule thilkeu dimset inhole, twikul kilaiho, lengpilei ho, Olive honho, theiphung tamtah jong alotaovin, ahi. Hitichun aneuvin, avasetnun, ahung thaovun, chule naphatna lentah achun akipah un, ahi." 
Nehemiah9:26 Hijengjongle sei angaipouvin, nangma dounan akiphinun, chule nadan thupeh thuchu anung angatnun, nangma lama ahung kiheikit nadinguva, amaho douna-a nathu hettohsahna themgao hou chu athatnun, chule amahon nasatah-in aphinseuvin, ahi." 
Nehemiah9:27 Hijehhin amaho sugenthei amelmateu khutna chun napedoh in, alungdon laijuva nangma nakou phatnu chun, van'a konin nanangai peh-in, chule namihepi nadimset chun amelmateuva konin ahuhdoh dingu nanapei." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ahin amaho akicholdo jouvun, amahon namasanga engkhan abolkit taovin, hijeh chun amelmateu khutna dingin nadalha jitan; hitichun amelma teovin, achunguva vai ahomin, ahinla ahung kihei juva nangma nasap tenguleh, van'a konin nahin ngaijin, chule nami hepina dungjuijin amahochu vel tamtah na huhdohjin ahi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Chule nadan thupeh thua amaho nahinpui kit theina dingin, amaho dounan nahet tohsahjin ahi. Hijongle amaho kiletsah tah-in aumun, nathu peh ho angaipouvin, nathu tanlhah ho dounan achonseuvin, (min abola ahile, ama hina-a chu hingding ahi) chule alengkouvu ahih leuvin, angong avaiputnun chule angainom pouve." 
Nehemiah9:30 Ahinla kum tamtah amaho nanathoh ham hamin, chule na themgaoho mangchan nalhagaovin amaho dounan nana hettohsah jin ahi. Hijongle anakhangu asung pouvin, hijeh chun nangman gamsunga cheng miho khutna napedoh-in ahi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Hijeng jongle nahepina lentah jalchun, amaho nasumang hel jipoi, notjong nanot thap pon, ajehchu nangma khotonale hepina-a dim Pathen nahi." 
Nehemiah9:32 Hijeh chun tun, ka Pathen, akitepna le akhotona chingjing, loupitahle thilbol thei chule tijat umtah Pathen, Assyria lengho phat laija pat tuni nikho geija, keihole kaleng teho, kapipui hou, kathempu hou, kathemgao hou, kapatehou chule nampite jouse chunga hahsatna hung lhung jousehi thilneo maimai jin anasandan." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ipi hitajongle kachunguva thil nalhunsah jousehin nadih-e, ajehchu nangman adih nabolin, keihovang giloutah-in kachon jiuve." 
Nehemiah9:34 Nangma amaho douna-a nana photchen sahna dan thupeh, nathupeh ho leh nathu photchen sahna ho chu, kalenghou, kapipui hou, kathem puhou, kapu kapa tehouvin anitpouvin, ngaijong angainom pouve." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ajehchu naphatna lentah chule amasanguva gam lentahle phatah amaho napehjing vangin, amahon aleng gamuva nangma naja nompouvin, a-engkhan bolnaova konin jong ahung kilehei pouvin ahi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Vetan, tun misoh kahitao vin, gamle asunga theiga le thilpha, kapu kapateu nehdinga nanapeh chu ven, chemunna chun keiho soh in kapangun ahi." 
Nehemiah9:37 Kachonset jeh uva kachung uva leng dinga neisem peh houvinla gamga soh ho anetam valun, kati chungule kagancha teo chunga jong nopsahnan vai ahomun, chule keiho kahesoh behset taove." 
Nehemiah9:38 Chule hitiho jouse jeh hin thulhun dettah kasemun, chule kasunun, kapipui hou, Levi ho, chule kathempu hou vin hichu namdet anam khumun ahi." 
Nehemiah10:1 Tun, Namdet kinamkhum hochu Nehemiah, Tirshatha, Hachaliah chapa chule Zidkiah," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraihah, Azeriah, Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraihah, Azeriah, Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashhur, Amariah, Malchijah," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluch," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruch," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruch," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maaziah, Beilgai, Shemaiah; hichenghi thempu ahiuve." 
Nehemiah10:9 Chule Levi techu: Azariah chapa Jeshua, Henadad, Kadmiel chapa Binnui ahiuve." 
Nehemiah10:10 Chule asopiho Shebaniah, Hodijah, Kelita, Pelaiah, Hanan," 
Nehemiah10:11 Micha, Rehob, Hashabiah," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zaccur, Sherebiah, Shebaniah," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodijah, Bani, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Mipi ho luchang Parosh, Pahath-moab, Elam, Zatthu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Bunni, Azgad, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonijah, Bigvai, Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Hizkijah, Azzur," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodijah, Hashum, Bezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Hariph, Anathoth, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpiash, Meshullam, Hezir," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshezabel, Zadok, Jaddua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatiah, Hanan, Anaiah," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hananiah, Hashub," 
Nehemiah10:24 Hallohesh, Pileha, Shobek," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehum, Hashabnah, Maaseiah," 
Nehemiah10:26 Chule Ahijah, Hanan, Anan," 
Nehemiah10:27 Malluch, Harim, Baanah, ahiuve." 
Nehemiah10:28 Chule mipi dangho chu thempuho, Levi ho, kotngah ho, la saho, Nethinim mitele Pathen dan thupehna gamsung miho a konle amahole amaho kisepkhena, ajiteu achateu le achanuteu, hetna neiho jouse chule hetkhenthem theina neiho jouse." 
Nehemiah10:29 Pathen soh Mosi in apeh, I-Pakaiyu Pakai athutanlhah hole adan kisemho, bolla nitding chule Pathen danthu peh jouse-a chon dingin amaho asopite, amilen amilal teova abeh un, gaosapnale kihahsel na-a alutnun," 
Nehemiah10:30 Chule keihon chugama miho ding chun, kachanu tehou pepou vingting, kachapa teo jiding achanuteu jong lapouvinge." 
Nehemiah10:31 Chule agamsung miten choldoni-a johding thil, ahiloule nehlechah johding hinpojongleu, keihon choldonin ahilouleh nithengnin amaho-a konin imacha chopouvinge, chule hia chun kum sagi lhinkumle achamlou louva bat kilaho chu kangaidam diu ahi." 
Nehemiah10:32 Ka Pathen ina natoh nadingin, sekel hopthum-a hopkhat kumseh-a peh dingin houdan khatjong kasemun," 
Nehemiah10:33 Vetsahna changlhah, tantih neilou anneh thilto, tantih neilou govam thilto, choldoniho, lhathah ni, kutho bolnading, chule thiltheng ho-a dingin, Israelte dia longlhen kisempeh nadinga chonset thiltoho, chule ka Pathen in'a natoh naho-a dingin houdan thupeh hojong kakisemun, ahi." 
Nehemiah10:34 Dan thupeh-a kisun dungjuijin, kumtina kitepsa phatho-a Pakai ka Pathen maicham chunga haldingin, kapateu insungho dungjuijin thing thilto ka Pathen insunga polut ding, thempuho le Levi ho chule mipi ho lah-a chun vang kasangun ahi." 
Nehemiah10:35 Chule kumseh-a kaleiset lhosoh-u ga masapenle thing jouse ga masapen Pakai in'a pohlutdin," 
Nehemiah10:36 Chujongle dan thupeh-a kisun dungjuijin kachateu apengdoh masapen le gancha apeng masapen, chule gan honle kelngoihon apeng masapen hochu, ka Pathen houin'a lhacha natong thempu koma puicheh din," 
Nehemiah10:37 Chule keihon gam ga masapen changbong, kathilpeh hou chule theiga jat namkim lengpitwi le, thao jat namkim thempuho komle ka Pathen indan sungnunga kapoh lutnuva, chule kagam gao hopsom-a hopkhat hochu Levi ho anga kapohlut uva, hiche Levi ho chun khopi jouse-a kalousoh uchu aneitheina dingu ahi." 
Nehemiah10:38 Levi ten somakhat alahding tengule, Aron chapa thempu chu Levi hotoh umkhom ding, chule Levi hon somakhat alah uva kona somakhat chu ka Pathen indan sunga thil kholkhom na-a ahinpohlut dingu ahi." 
Nehemiah10:39 Ajehchu Israel chate le Lei chaten, changle lengpitwi le thao, thilpeh-a kipechu houin dansung munthenga manchah kikoina, alhachale thempuho, kotngah ho, lasaloi umna indan-a chu ahinpohlut dingu ahin, keiho ka Pathen in chu donlouva koilou ding kahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:1 Mipi vaihomho chu Jerusalem'a achengun, mipi adangho jongchun somakhat lah-a khat khopitheng Jerusalem'a chengding somkhat lah-a ko chu khopi danga chengdingin vang aveovin, ahi." 
Nehemiah11:2 Chule mipin jong ama ama lung chama Jerusalem'a cheng dinga hungkipeho chu phatthei abohsoh keijun ahi. 
Nehemiah11:3 Tun hitehohi agamkai dola gamsung lamkai Jerusalem'a chengho chu ahiuve. Ahinla Judah gamsung khopiho-a chun, ama ama chanding dolcheh khopiho-a chun achengun, Israelte ahin, thempuho ahin, chule Levi te leh Nethinim ho le Solomon soh ho chate ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:4 Chuin Jerusalem'a chun Judah mileh Benjamin mi phabep achengun ahi. Judah chate lah-a chun Uzziah chapa Athaiah ahin, Zakariah chapa Amariah chapa Shephatiah chapa Perez chate lah-a Mahalalel ahiuvin;" 
Nehemiah11:5 Chule Baruch chapa Maaseiah Col-hozeh chapa, Hazaiah chapa Asaiah chapa Joiarib chapa Zekeriah chapa Shiloni chapa ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:6 Perez chate Jerusalem khopi-a chengho jouse chu abonchauvin gal hangcheh jali le somgup le get ahiuve. 
Nehemiah11:7 Chule amahohi Benjamin chapate ahiuvin, Meshullam chapa Sallu Joab chapa Pedaiah chapa, Kolaiah chapa, Maaseiah chapa, Ithiel chapa, Jesaiah chapa ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:8 Chule ama nunga hin Gabbai, Sallai mi jakole somni leh get ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:9 Chule Zichri chapa Joel chu amaho vetup ahin; chule Senuah chapa Judah chu Jerusalem khopi chunga lamkai anina-a panga ahi. 
Nehemiah11:9 Chule Zichri chapa Joel chu amaho vetup ahin; chule Senuah chapa Judah chu Jerusalem khopi chunga lamkai anina-a panga ahi. 
Nehemiah11:10 Thempu hochu: Joiarib chapa Jedaiah, Jachin." 
Nehemiah11:11 Hilkiah chapa Seraiah, Meshullam chapa, Zadok chapa Meraioth chapa, Ahitub chapa chu Pathen insunga vaihoma panga ahi." 
Nehemiah11:12 Chule asopite in'a natonga pangho chu mihem jagetle somnileni ahiuve; chule Jeroham chapa Adaiah, Pelaliah chapa, Amzi chapa, Zekeriah chapa, Pashhur chapa, Malchiah chapa," 
Nehemiah11:13 Chule asopitele apateo lamkaiho chu mi jani leh somlileni ahiuvin: chule Azareel chapa Amashai, Ahasai chapa, Meshillemoth chapa, Immer chapa," 
Nehemiah11:14 Chule asopiteu mihat mihangho chu jakhatle somni le get ahiuvin: chule milen khat chapa Zabdiel chu vaipole-a pang ahi. 
Nehemiah11:15 Levi ho jong: Hashub chapa Shemaiah, Azrikam chapa, Hashabiah chapa, Bunni chapa ahiuvin;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Levi ho pipui Shabbethai le Jozabad chun Pathen in polama nakitong jouse chu avettuplhonin ahi. 
Nehemiah11:17 Chule Micha chapa Maataniah, Zabdi chapa, Asaph chapa chu vahchoi taona kin akibolteng alamkai pipenin apangin, asopite lah-a ni chana Bakkukiah, Shammua chapa Abda, Galal chapa, Jeduthun chapa ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:18 Khopi thenga Levi ho jouse chu jani leh somget le li ahiuve.
