Nehemiah11:19 Chukal vallin kotpi ngahho, Akkub, Talmon le asopite kotho ngah-a chu mihem jakhatle somsagi le ni ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:20 Chule Israel amoh chengse le thempuho Levi ho chu Judah khopiho-a ama ama loding muncheh-a aumtaove. 
Nehemiah11:21 Ahinla Nethinim ho chu Ophel'a achengun, chule Ziha le Gispa chu Nethinim mite chunga lamkai ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalem khopi-a Levi ho vaipo-a pangpa jong chu Vani chapa Uzzi, Hashabiah chapa, Mattaniah chapa, Micha chapa, ahiuve. Asaph chapate lasaho chu Pathen insunga natong lamkai ahiuve." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ajehchu amaho chungchanga lengpa thulhahna chu hichehi ahin, niseh-a lasaho dinga chan phabep umding ahi." 
Nehemiah11:24 Judah chapa Zerah chate son lah-a Meshezabeel chapa Pethahiah chu mipi ho chungthu dola ijakaija lengpa thalhenga panga ahi. 
Nehemiah11:25 Chule khoholeh alouhou diuvin, Judah chate phabep chu Kirjath-arba le hiche khoho-a achengun, chule Dibon le asunga khohole, Jekabzeel le asunga khoho-a chun." 
Nehemiah11:26 Chule Jeshua le Moladah chule Beth-phelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 Chule Hazar-shual, Beer-sheba le kho ho-achun," 
Nehemiah11:28 Chule Ziklag, Mekonah'a chule kho ho-a," 
Nehemiah11:29 Chule En-rimmon le Zovah ah chule Jarmuth'a," 
Nehemiah11:30 Nanoah, Adullam chule akho houva Lachish le aloumun houva, Azekah le khoho-a chun achengun ahi. Chuin amaho Beersheba apatnin Hinnom gamgeijin achengun ahi." 
Nehemiah11:31 Chule Benjamin chate jongchu Geba apat, Michmash a achengun chule Aija, Bethel chule akhohouva," 
Nehemiah11:32 Chule Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid, Zeboiim, Neballat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod le Ona khut themho phaichama achenguve. 
Nehemiah11:36 Chule Levi ho chu Judah le Benjamin gama ahomkhen taovin, ahi." 
Nehemiah12:1 Tun hichehohi Shealtiel chapa Zerubbabel le Jeshua toh kilhona chetouva thempuho le Levi hochu ahiuvin, Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra." 
Nehemiah12:1 Tun hichehohi Shealtiel chapa Zerubbabel le Jeshua toh kilhona chetouva thempuho le Levi hochu ahiuvin, Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra."

Nehemiah12:2 Amariah, Malluch, Hattush," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shechaniah, Rehum, Meremoth," 
Nehemiah12:4 Iddo, Ginnethoi, Abijah," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miamin, Maadiah, Bilgah," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaiahle Jolarib, Jedaiah," 
Nehemiah12:7 Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah. Hichehohi Jeshua nikho laija thempuho leh asopiho lah-a lamkai pipen ahiuve." 
Nehemiah12:8 Hiche chungchon chun Levi ho, Jeshua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Sherebiah, Judah le Mattaniah hi amale asopiho thangvah na-a lamkaijin apangun, ahi." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakbukiah le Unni chule asopite jong chu amaho vetupmin apanguve.

Nehemiah12:11 Chule Joiada'n Jonathan ahingin, Jonathan'in Jaddua ahingin ahi." 
Nehemiah12:12 Chule Joiakim nikho laija thempuho apateo luchangho chu: Seraiah, Meraiah; Jeremiah, Hananiah;"

Nehemiah12:14 Melicut, Jonathan, Shebaniah te, Joseph,"

Nehemiah12:16 Iddo te, Zekeriah, Ginnethon, Meshullam," 
Nehemiah12:17 Abiah, Zilchri, Miniamin, Moadiah, Piltai," 
Nehemiah12:18 Bilgah te, Shammua, Shemaiah, Jehonathan,"

Nehemiah12:20 Sallai, Kallai, Amok te, Eber," 
Nehemiah12:21 Hilkiah, Hashabiah, Jedaiah, Nethaneel." 
Nehemiah12:22 Eliashib, Joiada, Johanan chule Jaddua nikho laija Levi ho chu apateu pipuija ana kisunlut ahiuvin, Persia mi Darius in vaihom lah-a thempuho jong ahiuve." 
Nehemiah12:23 Levi chapate le apateu pipuiho chu Eliashib chapa Johanan nikho geijin thusimbua akijihlutsoh keijin ahi. 
Nehemiah12:24 Chule Levi ho lamkai pipuiho chu, Hashabiah, Sherebiah, chule Kadmiel chapa Jashua le asopihotoh, Pathen mipa David thulhahna dungjuija vahchoina le thangvahna pedingin aloiloijin akilhauve." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkub hohi kotbula thilkeu koikhom nahole kotpi ngaho ahiuve." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkub hohi kotbula thilkeu koikhom nahole kotpi ngaho ahiuve." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hitehohi Jozadak chapa Jeshua chapa Joiakim nikho lai leh gam vaipo Nahemiah le Ezra thempu leh lekhasunpa nikholaija um anahiuve. 
Nehemiah12:26 Hitehohi Jozadak chapa Jeshua chapa Joiakim nikho lai leh gam vaipo Nahemiah le Ezra thempu leh lekhasunpa nikholaija um anahiuve. 
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalem kulbang thensona-a Jerusalem'a hung dingin Levi te chu kulbang chu kipahtah-a thenso ahina dingin selangdah, tumging, khutbeh, lasah le thuseidin aumnao munjouse-a konin aholdoh-un ahi." 
Nehemiah12:28 Chule lasa themho chapate chu Jerusalem le akimvel phaicham Netophah mi khoho-a konin ahung khomun. 
Nehemiah12:29 Chujongle Gilgal ina konle, Geba le Azmavath gama konin ahung kikhomun ahi. Ajehchu lasa hochun Jerusalem kimvella chun khoho anatungdoh-un ahi." 
Nehemiah12:30 Chule Thempuho le Levi ho chu akisuthengun, chule mipihole kotpiho chule akul bangho chu asuthengun ahi." 
Nehemiah12:31 Chujouvin keiman Judah milenho chu kulbang chunga kapuidoh in, chule thangvahna pedingin loilentahtah nin kahom khenin, loikhat chu kulbang chunga ehkotpi jetlama chun acheuvin," 
Nehemiah12:32 Amaho nunga hin Hoshaiah le Judah pipuiho akehkhat jen akitolun ahi. 
Nehemiah12:33 Chule Azariah, Ezra le Meshullam," 
Nehemiah12:33 Chule Azariah, Ezra le Meshullam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah chule Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah chule Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah12:35 Chule sumkon choi thempu chate loikhat aminu chu Jonathan chapa Zekeriah, Mattaniah chapa, Michaiah chapa, Zaccur chapa, Asaph chapa," 
Nehemiah12:36 Chule Pathen mipa David tumging manchah chu asopiho Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah, Hanani in akengun, chule lekhajihpa Ezra chu alamkaijin ahi." 
Nehemiah12:36 Chule Pathen mipa David tumging manchah chu asopiho Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah, Hanani in akengun, chule lekhajihpa Ezra chu alamkaijin ahi." 
Nehemiah12:37 Amaho jonna um twinah kotpi phungle, kulbang jottouna David insahlam solamsang twi kotpi geile David khopi kalbia chun akaltouvun ahi." 
Nehemiah12:38 Chule loichom dang thangvahna peho chu, amaho jong chu acheuvin, keima anunguva kachen, chule mipi akehkhat chu meilhum insang khella pat kulbang satah gei, bang chunga chun acheuvin," 
Nehemiah12:39 Chule Ephraim kotpi chunga kotpilen chungah, chule Hananeel insanglen Maah insanga pat kelngoi kotkhah geijin acheuvin, chuin amaho songkul kotpi-a chun adingdenun ahi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Hitichun keimale Pathen ina thangvahna peho loini hole, kaum khompi vaihomho akehkhat chu kadingun," 
Nehemiah12:41 Chule sumkon choija thempuho chu Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Micaiah, Elioenai, Zekeriah, chule Hananiah," 
Nehemiah12:42 Chule Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malchijah, Elam chule Ezer ahiuve. Chule la saho chun avaipopao Jezrahiah toh hatah-in asaove." 
Nehemiah12:43 Chujongle hicheni chun ganlhaina loupitah ho atoh un, akipah thanomun ahi. Ajehchu Pathen'in amaho chu kipana lentah in akipa sah-in ajite houle achateu hojong akipah thanom mun, hitichun Jerusalem kipana chu gamlatah in jong akijan ahi." 
Nehemiah12:44 Chule hichepet laichun, loujaoho lah-a le khopiho-a danthupeh dungjuija thempuho le Levi ho chan ga masaho, thiltoho, hopsom ho thil kholna indan ho-a, kholkhom din mi phabep akipansah-e. Ajehchu thempuho leh Levi ho kinboljeh chun Judah akipah thanomin ahi." 
Nehemiah12:45 Chule David le achapa Solomon thulhahna dungjuijin, a-Pathen dinguva natoh peh dandingle kisuh thengna dan chu lasaloile kotngah hon jong ajopmun ahi." 
Nehemiah12:46 Ajehchu malai David le Asaph nikho laijin, lasaloi lamkaile Pathen vahchoina le pachatna lasa ana umin ahi." 
Nehemiah12:47 Chule Zerubbabel le Nehemiah nikho laijin Israel jouse lasa holeh kotngah hochu niseh-in achan dolu ana pejiuvin ahi. Chule thiltheng hochu Levi hodin asuthengun, chule Levi hon hicheho chu Aaron chate dingin asuthengun ahi." 
Nehemiah13:1 Hiche nikho chun mipi hetdin Mosi lekhabu asimun, chule chuachun Ammon miteleh Moab mite chu Pathen houkhom ho lah-a a-itih-a pangthei loudiu ahi tia kisun asimdoh uve." 
Nehemiah13:2 Ajehchu amahon Israel chate chu changlhah leh twisih-in analamto pouvin, ahinla amaho douna-a gaosapdin Balaam athalah-un ahijeng vangin ka Pathen'un gaosapna chu phattheina in aheidoh tai." 
Nehemiah13:3 Tun ahitin ahi, amahon danthupeh chu ajah phatnun, Israel te-a konin mipi choplopho jouse chu asepkhen taovin ahi." 
Nehemiah13:4 Chule hiche masanghin, ka Pathen'u indan sungnung vetupjing, Eliaship thempupa chu Tobiah toh akithujop lhonin," 
Nehemiah13:5 Chule Levi ho, lasaho chule kotngah ho peh dinga kithu lhahna thao, lengpitwi thah, mimle chang hopsom ho, um le bel, begole nehding thilpehho, chule thempuho dinga thiltoho, tumasanga anakoinau indan lentah chu amadin agonpeh-in ahi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ahinla hiche phatlai hin keima Jerusalem'a kana umpoi. Babylon leng Artaxerxes kum somthumle kum ni alengchan kum-in lengpa henga kachen, chule ni ijat-ham jouvin lengpa-a konin phalna kamun ahi." 
Nehemiah13:7 Chuin Jerusalem'a kahungin, chule Pathen in hongsung ho-a amadinga indan khat agonpeh-a, Eliashib min Tobiah'a dinga thildih lou abolchu kahechen tan ahi." 
Nehemiah13:8 Chule hichun eisulungna behsetnin, hijeh chun keiman indan sunga konin Tobiah insang thilkeu jouse chu kapaidoh tan ahi." 
Nehemiah13:9 Chuin gihna thu kapen, amahon indan chu asutheng taove. Chule keiman hia chun Pathen in'a um le bel holeh anneh thiltoho chule bego chu kahinpolut kit tai." 
Nehemiah13:10 Chuin keiman Levi ho chandingdol hochu akipe pouve ti kahedohtan ahi. Hijeh chun Levi ho le lasaloi chu ama ama honlam cheh-a anajamtaovin ahi. 
Nehemiah13:11 Chujouvin keiman vaihomho chu kanelkalin, ipidinga Pathen in hi kimoh dalhahthip jingaham? chuin amaho chu kakou khomin, ama ama panmun cheh-a kapansah kit tai." 
Nehemiah13:12 Chujouvin Judah jousen changle mim chule lengpitwi thah le thao hopsom chu thilkholna-a ahinpolut nun ahi. 
Nehemiah13:13 Chuin keiman thilkholna ho chunga thilkhol ding kasemin, Shelemiah thempu, danthusun Zadok, Levi ho le Pedaiah, chule amaho bana chu Mattaniah chapa, Zaccur chapa Hanan ahi. Ajehchu amaho chu tahsan detna kisima, chule amaho natohna munchu asopiteu kihoppeh ding ahi." 
Nehemiah13:14 Vo, ka Pathen hiche chungchanga hin neihe jingin, chule ka Pathen in'a dingle hiche tohmun ho-a dinga thilpha kanabol hochu noimang hih-in." 
Nehemiah13:15 Hichelai hin Judah gamsunga choldo nikho-a lengpiga achiluva, changphal ahinpoh uva, sangan apohsah-u, lengpitwi le lengpiga hihen, theichang ga hihen, pohgih tincheng apohsah uva, choldoni-a Jerusalem sunga ahinpoh lutjiu kamun ahi. Chuin hiche nikho-a nehle chah ajohjeh-un amaho dounan kaphoh sal-in, ahi." 
Nehemiah13:16 Hiche mun'a cheng Tyre mihojong chun, nga leh johthei thil namkim ahinpouvin, Judah le Jerusalem chate henga choldonin ahungjoh jiuvin ahi." 
Nehemiah13:17 Chujouvin keiman Judah milen milal hochu kanelkalin, ajah uvah, ipidinga hitobang thilphalou nabol uva, choldoni hi asuhboh-u ham? kati." 
Nehemiah13:18 Napateu vin hitobanghi anaboluva, i Pathen'un hiche thilphalou jousehi eihole hiche khopi chunga analhunsah hilou? hijongle choldoni nasuhboh naova konin Israel chunga lunghanna nahin pohlutbe nalaijun ahi." 
Nehemiah13:19 Chuin ahitin ahi, choldoni masanga Jerusalem kotpiho-a muthim ahungkipat jouseh le khachah-a, chule choldoni kichai kahse-a honlouna dingin gihna thu kapen ahi. Chule choldoni-a thilpoh kiti apohlut louna dingun kasohho phabep khat kotpiho-a kakoijin ahi." 
Nehemiah13:20 Hitichun akivei holeh thil jatchom chom joh hochu khatveiham? nivei ham? Jerusalem polama chun ageh khovah dentauve. 
Nehemiah13:21 Chujouvin, keiman amaho dounan kahettohsah-in, ajah uvah, ipidinga nanghohi kulbang vela geh nahiuvem? Hitobanga nabolkit ule, nachung uva khut kalhahding ahi, katipeh-e. Hichea patchun amahon choldonin ahungkit tapouve." 
Nehemiah13:22 Chuin keiman Levi ho chu amaho akisuh thenguva, chule hunguva kotpiho chu anga uva, choldoni sutheng dingin thupeh kapen, ahi. O ka Pathen, hiche chungchanga jonghin neihejingin lang, nahepina lentah dungjuijin neihing hoijin." 
Nehemiah13:23 Hiche nikholai jong chun Judah mite chun, Ashdod mite, Ammon mite Moab miho ji-a aneiju kamun ahi." 
Nehemiah13:24 Chule Judah te pao ahekhenthem pouvin, ahinla mipi ho pao dungjui cheh-in, achateu apaodoh tengule akeh khatnin Ashdod pao amangun, ahi." 
Nehemiah13:25 Chule ken amaho chu kakinelpi, kasamsen, abang bangjong kadengin, asamu kabopeh-in, nachanu teochu achapa teodinga napehloudiu, ahiloule nachapateo dinga achanuteu napuipeh loudiu, nangho tah-in jong nabol loudiu ahi, tin Pathen'a kaki hahsel sah-in ahi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Israel leng Solomon jongchu hiche thil ho-a hi anachonsea hilouham? Pathen'in Israelte chunga Leng din anapansah-in, ama tobanga Pathen'in angailut lengdang namtin vaipi lah-a anaum khapoi: Hitajeng jongleh namdang numei hon amajeng jong chonsetnan alhahsah-un ahi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Gamchom numei ho kichenpia ka Pathen douna-a suhkhel dinga, hiche thil phalouho boldinga nathu-u kangai dingu ham?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Thempu chungnung Eliashib chapa Joiada chapate khat chu Horon mi Sanballat tupa ahin, hijeh chun keiman amahi keija konin kanomangtai." 
Nehemiah13:29 Vo, ka Pathen amahohi hejing temin, ajehchu amahon themputna kin chule thempu hina-a kitepna le Levi kitepna asubohtauve." 
Nehemiah13:30 Hitichun keiman gamdang mite akonin amaho kasuthengin, thempuho leh Levi dinga anatoh ding dolcheh-u leh anatoh ding danu kagot peh-in ahi." 
Nehemiah13:31 Akitepsa phatho-a thing toh dingle, aga masapen peding kagot toh peh-in ahi. Vo ka Pathen aphalam thila dingin nelheng jingin." 
Esther1:1 Tun Ahasuerus nikho laijin ahung hitin ahi, (hiche Ahasuerus hi India'a kona Ethiopia changei gamkai jakhatle somni le sagi chunga analeng changin ahi)" 
Esther1:2 Chuche laichun, Shushan'a um leng inpia Ahasuerus lengpa alenggam laltouna-a atoujin," 
Esther1:3 Alengchan kal kumthum channa-in, aman pipuiho le asohho jouse dingin golvah abolin; Persia le Media thaneina, gamkai pipuiho, chule milenho chu amasanga aumuvin;" 
Esther1:4 Chule aman alenggam loupitah haona, chule alal loupina nasatah jabola aumna chu nikho tamtah, nijakhat le nisomget sungin avetsah-in ahi." 
Esther1:5 Chuin hiche nikhoho chu akichai phatnin, lengpan leng inpi honsunga chun alen aneo khenlouvin, Shushan leng inpia mi jouse chu nisagi golnop abolpin;" 
Esther1:6 Hia chun akang, a-engle aduma kisem pondal ho chu, tupat patngat le dangka sumkola akikhaijin, chule songval khompi ho-a chun akihenin; chule sanale dangka-a kisem tounaho chu songlhongnal sanpeh, adum, akang, avoma kisemho chunga chun akidon ahi." 
Esther1:7 Chuin amahon amaho chu sana khonin leng ju chu adon diuvin ahomun, (akhonho chu achomcheh ahi,) chule lenggam kipohna dungjuijin, ju aneng jengjung jengin ahi." 
Esther1:8 Chule hichea adonu chu dan dungjuija kibol ahin; koima acham louva kibol aumpoi: ajehchu lengpan amijouse chu amacheh dei dungjuija abolpeh dinguva a-in'a vaipoho chu athupeh cheh ahi. 
Esther1:9 Chule lengnu Vashti jong chun lengpa Ahasuerus leng inpia chun, numei umjouse chu golnop abolpin ahi." 
Esther1:10 Nisagi lhin ni-a, lengpan ju adona alung akipa petnin, aman Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha, chule Abagtha Zethar, chule Carcas, Ahasuerus anga kinbol nukiso sagiho chu asolin," 
Esther1:11 Lengnu Vashti chu melhoitah ahijeh-in, mipile milenho vetsah dinga, aleng lukhuh puma lengpa anga ahinpui dingun thu apen ahi." 
Esther1:12 Ahivangin Vashti lengnu chu anukisoho-a kona leng thupeh-a hungding chu anompon; hijeh chun lengpa alung ahangtan, alungsa tuntun jengin ahi." 
Esther1:13 Chuphatnin lengpan michingho, phat umchan hethemho henga chun aseijin, (ajehchu dan le thutanje heho chungchanga lengpa umdan ngai mong ahi." 
Esther1:14 Chule ama bantah-a hochu Persia le Media'a milen sagiho Carshena, Shethar, Admathah, Tarshish, Meres, Mersena, chule Memucan ahiuvin, amaho chu lengpa angsunga lutmasapen le lenggam sunga alenpenho ahiuvin ahi;)" 
Esther1:15 Ahasuerus lengpan nukiso ho-a kona apeh thupeh amanun anittah loujeh-a, dan dungjuija Vashti lengnu chunga ipi ibol diu hitam? tin adonge." 
Esther1:16 Chuin Memucan'in lengpa le pipuiho anga chun adonbutnin, lengnu Vashti in lengpa heng seh-a dihloutah abol hilouvin, Ahasuerus lengpa gamkai jouse-a, milen jousele mipi jouse chunga jong abolkhel ahi." 
Esther1:17 Ajehchu Ahasuerus lengpan, Vashti lengnu amasanga hinpuidia thupeh apehle, amanu ahungpon ahi ti thuhi ahung kiseison tengle, lengnu natoh hi numei ho jousen hin hedoh-untin, amahon amitmuva ajiteu chu ajalou dingu ahitai." 
Esther1:18 Hiche banga chu Persia le Media'a numei ho lengnu thilbol jajouse chun lengpa pipuiho jouse henga chu lengnu natoh ajah-u chu aseidingu ahi. Hitia chu kitaitom nale lunghana tamtah sohdoh ding ahi. 
Esther1:19 Lengpa lunglam ahile, Vashti chu Ahasuerus lengpa masanga hunglut talou ding ahi tin ama-a konin leng thupeh khat sohdoh hen, chule hichu khelkit tahlou dingin Media le Persia dan lah-a kisunlut hen; chule lengpan lengnu mun chu ama sanga phajo dangkhat pehen." 
Esther1:20 Chule aman apeh ding leng thupeh chu alenggam pumpi-a akiphon dohteng (ajeh chu lenggam chu lentah hija ahi), numei jousen ajiteu chu alen hihen aneo hijongle jana apehcheh dingu ahi, ati." 
Esther1:21 Chuin kithumopna hin lengpa le pipuiho chu alung lhaisah lheh-in; chule Memucan thusei dungjui chun lengpan aboltai. 
Esther1:22 Hitichun lengpan gamkaiho jouse-a, agamkai jouse alekhajem cheh uva, amitakip apao cheh-un, Pasal tinin a-insung cheh-a vai ahom cheh dingu ahi tin, amitakip pao dungjuija phonjal dingin lekha athottan ahi." 
Esther2:1 Hiche hojouse nung, lengpa Ahasuerus alunghan na-a kon alungdam phatnin, Vashti le athilbol, chule achunga thupeh ho chu ahin geldoh-in ahi." 
Esther2:2 Chuin ajenlea pang asohho chun lengpa henga, Lengpa-a dingin nungah theng donglai melhoi kiholpeh hen:" 
Esther2:3 Chule nungah theng donglai melhoiho jouse chu leng inpi Shushan'a, numei ho chingpa lengpa nukiso Hegai vettupna-a, numei ho umna in'a kholkhom dingin, lengpan alenggama gamkai jouse sunga vaipoho pansah hen. Chule amaho chu akisuhtheng nadinguva khoh thilho chu kipehen." 
Esther2:4 Chule lengpa lunglhaina penpen nungah chu lengnu Vashti khel hihen, atiuve. Chule lengpan hichu pha asan, hitichun aboltai." 
Esther2:5 Tun Shushan leng inpi sunga chun Juda mi khat aumin, amin Mordecai akitin, Jair chapa, Shimei chapa, Kish chapa Benjamin mi ahin;" 
Esther2:6 Amahi Jerusalem'a kona Jeconiah toh kilhona sohchang dinga Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in anapoh mangho lah-a chu jao ahi. 
Esther2:7 Chule aman apangah chanu Hadassah, hichu Esther ahin, ahin khoukhah-in ahi: ajehchu amanu nulepa neilou ahin, chule nungahnu chu vetnom umle melhoitah ahi; Mordecai'in anu le apa thi nunga ama chanu dinga akilah ahi." 
Esther2:8 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, lengpa thupeh le thuphondoh chu jah ahi-a, Shushan leng inpi-a nungah tampi Hagai vetsuina noija khopkhom ahi phatnin, Esther jong chu lengpa in'a numei ho vesuipa Hagai vetsui ding chun ahinpui taovin ahi." 
Esther2:9 Hiche nungahnu chun amapa chu alunglhaisah lheh-in, amapa hepina achangtan ahi; hijeh chun amapan akisuh thengna dinga thil ngaikhoh ho, achan dinga thil kigotpeh ho, chule leng inpia kona amanu jenleding nungah sagi kipeho chu amanu apeloi jengin: chule aman amanu le ajenleding numei ho chu numei ho in'a mun phalai pena chun akoitan ahi." 
Esther2:10 Esther'in vang amitele a-inkoho aseidohpon ahi: ajehchu Mordecai'in amanu henga seidoh hih-in tia aseipeh masah ahi. 
Esther2:11 Chule nisehle Mordecai chu numei ho umna in hong maija chun Esther iti uma, achungchanga ipi hungsoh doh dingham ti hetnadin avahle jingin ahi." 
Esther2:12 Tun numei ho umdan dungjuija lhasomle lhani alhin jou chun, nungah ho chu leng Ahasuerus anga akilutlhah lhahdiu nikho ahung lhungtan ahi, (ajeh chu akisuhtheng nao nikho lhinga ahitan, lhagup myrrh thao kinu uva, lhagupma gimnamtui le numei ho kisuhthengna thildangho kinu uva ahi)." 
Esther2:13 Hitichun nungah ho jouse chu lengpa anga ahunguvin; chule numei khatcheh chu numei ho umna in'a kona lengpa in'a ache tengle adeichan chu akipe jin ahi. 
Esther2:14 Nilhahle lutji-a, ajingle numei umna in nina, thaikem ho vetuppa lengpa nukisopa Shaashgaz vetsuina-a umdingin akile kitjin ahi. Amanu chu achunga lengpan lunglhaina aneija, amina akou tilouva lengpa henga avela lutkit talou ahi." 
Esther2:15 Tun achanu dinga hinkivahdoh, Mordecai pangah Abigail chanu Esther, lengpa henga alutna ding phat ahunglhun phatnin, numei ho vetuppa lengpa nukisopa Hagai'in agot teho tailou amanun imacha dang angaichapoi. Chule Esther chu ama hinvaho jouse mitmun lungsetna achangin ahi." 
Esther2:16 Hitichun alengchan kum sagi chana, lhasom channa, Tebeth lha-a chun lengpa Ahasuerus leng inpi sunga Esther chu ahin puilut taovin ahi." 
Esther2:17 Chuin lengpan numei dangho jouse sangin Esther angailu penin, nungah theng dangho jouse sangin amitmun lungsetna le khotona achangtan ahi; hijeh chun aman amanu chu lallukhuh akhuh peh-in, Vashti khelin lengnun apansah tai." 
Esther2:18 Chujouvin lengpan pipuiho jousele asohte din golvah loupitah, Esther golvah ngei chu abolin; gamkaiho-a choldona aphongdoh-in, lengpa gamkai dungjuijin thilpehho apen ahi." 
Esther2:19 Chule aniveina-a nungahthengho chu akikhopkhom phatnun, Mordecai chu lengpa kotpi bulla atouvin ahi." 
Esther2:20 Hiche geichun Esther'in Mordecai'in ahilna bangin, aphungle amite chu aseidohpon ahi. Ajehchu aman ahin vahlai bangbanga Esther'in Mordecai thupeh angai ahi." 
Esther2:21 Hiche nikholai, Mordecai chu lengpa kotpi bula atouji laichun, lengpa kotngah ho lah-a nukiso mini Bigthan le Teresh chu alunghang lhontan, leng Ahasuerus chunga khut lhah ding ago lhontan ahi." 
Esther2:22 Chuin thil umdan chu Mordecai'in ahetan, aman lengnu Esther ahilin; chule Esther'in Mordecai minin lengpa henga ahetchen sahtan ahi." 
Esther2:23 Chuin hiche thu chu akikholtoh phatnin, atahbeh ahi akihechentan, hijeh chun anilhonin thinga akhailih taovin ahi. Chuin hichu thusimbua lengpa masanga akisunlut tan ahi." 
Esther3:1 Hicheng jouhin Ahasuerus lengpan Agag mi Hammedatha chapa Haman chu apanmun akalsah in, amasotsah in, chule apipui chankhompi jouse chungvuma touna adopehtan ahi." 
Esther3:2 Chule Lengpa kotpi phunga um asohte jouse akunun, Haman chu jana apeovin ahi: ajehchu lengpan ama thudola hitia chu thu apeh ahi. Ahin Mordecai vang kun jong akunpon, jana jong apepoi." 
Esther3:3 Chuin lengpa kotpi phunga um soh ho chun Mordecai henga, ibola leng thupeh nasuhkhel ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Esther3:4 Tun ahitin ahi, amahon ajah-a niseh-a asei seijuva, aman angaipeh lou phatnun, amahon Mordecai thu ache achelou hetnadin, Haman ahiltaove: ajehchu aman amaho henga Judah mi kahi tin aseijin ahi." 
Esther3:5 Chuin Haman'in Mordecai chu kunjong akunlouva, chule jana jong apehlou chu amudoh phatnin, Haman chu lunghan na-in adimtan ahi." 
Esther3:6 Chuin aman Mordecai chungseh seh-a khut lhading chu imalouvin ageltan ahi; ajehchu amahon Mordecai jat mite chu ama ahetsah-u ahitai. Hiche jehchun Haman'in Ahasuerus gamsung pumpi-a Mordecai mite, Judah ho jouse chu suhmanghel ding agotan ahi." 
Esther3:7 Ahasuerus lengchan kal kum somle kumni lhinna-a, lha masapen, hichu Nisan lha ahin, amahon Haman angsunga pur kiti vangvetna khat, ani anin, chule alha alhan, lhasomle lhani channa, Adar lha geichun, asang asang jengun ahi." 
Esther3:8 Chuin Haman'in lengpa Ahasuerus henga, Nalenggam sung gamkai jouse mipi ho lah-a hin namkhat kithecheh-a le vahcheh-a aumun; chule adan uchu mijouse-a toh akitohpon; chule lengpa dan jong anit pouvin ahi. Hijeh chun amaho nomlhat sah ding chu lengpa dinga phatchomna bei ahi." 
Esther3:9 Lengpa lunglam ahile, amaho chu suhmang ding ahi tin kisunhen: chule keiman chuche tong dinga nganseho khutna chun, lengpa goukhol na-a din dangka talent sangsom penge, ati." 
Esther3:10 Chuin lengpan akhutna konin akhutjem aladoh-in, Judah te melmapa, Agag mi Hammedatha chapa Haman chu apetan ahi." 
Esther3:11 Chuin lengpan Haman henga, dangka le miho chu naphatsah sah-a nabol dinga kipehdoh nahitai ati." 
Esther3:12 Chuin lha masapen nisomle nithum lhin nin, lengpa lekhasunho chu akikou khomin, Haman thupeh dungjuijin, lengpa gal lamkaiho heng, gamkai jouse-a vaipoho heng, chule gamkai tina mipi chunga vaihomho henga alekha jem-u dungjui cheh le apaovu dungjui cheh-in Ahasuerus lengpa minin thupeh khat asunun, lengpa khutjem chu anam khumun ahi." 
Esther3:13 Chule lha somle lhani na, hichu Adar lha ahin, ni somle nithum ni lhin nikho leh, nikhat sunga, Juda te jouse khangdong le tehse, chapang le numei ho abonuva suhmang ding, thading, suhgamhel ding, chule anei agou jouseu chomgamhel dingin, lekhathot ho chu lengpa gamkai jouse-a lekhapole ho-a konin akithot tan ahi." 
Esther3:14 Chuche nikho-a dinga akigot chehna dinguva, hiche lekha chu mijouse-a dinga kisun ahito lhonin, hichu sutsona gamkai jouse-a dan banga mijouse henga phondoh dinga thupeh ahi." 
Esther3:15 Lengpa dinga athupeh dungjuijin lekhaho chu gangtah-in akihomdoh tan; chule thuphondoh chu leng inpi Shushan'a phondoh-in aumtai. Chuin lengpa le Haman chu judon dingin atoulhonin, ahinla Shushan khopi sung chu alungdong gamtaove." 
Esther4:1 Mordecai'in thil kibol jouse amudoh phatnin, Mordecai'in apon jouse abotkeh-in, khaodip pon akiselin vut akinun, khopi sung laitah-a ahungdoh-in, hatah le lungna tah-in akapmin;" 
Esther4:2 Chule lengpa kotpi chan geijin ahunge: ajehchu khaodip pon kisila chu koimacha lengpa kotpi-a luttheilou ahi. 
Esther4:3 Chule gamkai jouse-a, lengpa thupeh le thuphondoh lhunna chana chun, Judah teho lah-a lunghemna nasatah toh, anngolna, kana le penna aumin: chule mitam tah-in khaodip pon akisilun vut lah-a alumun ahi." 
Esther4:4 Hitichun Esther soh numei ho le anukiso ho chu ahungun hichu ahunghil taovin ahi. Chuphatnin lengnu alungkham behseh jengtan, akhaodip pon chu aholhah-a akivon dingin Mordecai chu pon agah thotnin; ahinla aman hichu akisanpon ahi." 
Esther4:5 Chujouvin Esther'in, ama vetup dinga kipansah, lengpa nukiso ho lah-a Hatach chu akouvin, Mordecai chungchanga ipi iti hija, chule ipidinga chuti umham? ti gahetoh din thupeh apen ahi." 
Esther4:6 Hitichun Hatach chu lengpa kotpi maija khopi lamlena Mordecai henga chun achedoh-in ahi. 
Esther4:7 Chuin Mordecai'in achunga thusoh jouse, chule Judah te suhmangna dinga Haman'in lengpa goukhol na-a sum pedinga akitepnaho chu ahilin ahi." 
Esther4:8 Chule aman Esther avetsah-a, ahenga ahilchetna, chule amanu lengpa angsunga galut dinga thu apeh-a, amanu ahenga agataova, chule amite dinga ngehna aganei theina dingin, amaho suhmang nadinga Shushan'a kona thutanlhah kithotdoh lekhat khat jong apen ahi." 
Esther4:9 Chuin Hatach chu ahungin, Mordecai thusei jouse chu Esther ahiltan ahi." 
Esther4:10 Esther'in Hatach henga aseikitnin, chule Mordecai henga hitia agasei dingin thupeh apen ahi." 
Esther4:11 Lengpa sohte jousele lengpa gamkai sunga um jousen, koi hijongle, numei hihen pasal hijongle, aman akou louva lengpa hongsung sungnunga hunglut ho chu, aman dan khatseh aneijin, amachu kithat ding, amavang lengpan sana tenggol ama lama adop khumho bou chu hingding ahi, ti ahesoh keijun ahi. Ahinla nisomthum sunghin lengpa henga lut dingin keima eikikou tapoi, ati." 
Esther4:12 Chuin amahon Esther thu chu Mordecai aseipeh-un ahi. 
Esther4:13 Chuin Mordecai'in Esther hitia adonbut diuvin athupeh-in ahi, Judah te jouse sangin leng inpi sunga hoidoh nange tin kigel hih-in." 
Esther4:14 Ajehchu nangma tuphatna hi nathipbeh-a ahile, mun danga kona Judah te letdohna le hoidohna um teiding ahin, nangmale napa insung vang namanthah diu ahi. Hitobang phatna dinga hi lenggam sunga nahungpan ahi kon ahetnem? ati." 
Esther4:15 Chuin Esther'in hiche donbutna hi Mordecai hetsahdin amaho chu asolin: 
Esther4:16 Cheovin, Shushan'a um Judah te jouse kichomkhomu vinlang, keidingin an ngolun, chule nithum sung sunle jan-in nelou donlouvin umun: keimale kasoh numei hon jong hitobanga chu an kangol diu; chule dan hihih jongle lengpa koma kagalut ding ahi: kamanthahle mangthah tange, ati." 
Esther4:17 Hitichun Mordecai chu achedoh-in, Esther'in athupeh jouse chu aboltan ahi." 
Esther5:1 Tun anithum channin ahitin ahi, Esther'in alengpon akivonin, lengpa in jon tah-a lengpa hongsung sungnunga chun adingtan: chule lengpa chu in kotpi jontah, leng in sunga alaltouna-a chun atouvin ahi." 
Esther5:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, lengpan Esther lengnu chu thutana hongsunga adin amu phatnin, lengpa mitmun amanu chu lungsetna achangtan; chuin lengpan akhutna um sana tenggol chun Esther chu ahin japmin ahi. Hitichun Esther ahung naijin, chule tenggol muh chu athamin ahi." 
Esther5:3 Chuin lengpan amanu jah-a, lengnu Esther, ipiham nadei? chule ipiham nathum? Lenggam akehkhat geija jong kipeding nahi, atitai." 
Esther5:4 Chuin Esther'in adonbutnin, lengpan pha asah-a ahile, tunia keiman ama dinga kagonpeh anneh khomna-a hin lengpa le Haman hunglhon le kati, ati." 
Esther5:5 Chuin lengpan, Esther seibang aboltheidin, Haman chu hinpui loijun, ati. Hitichun Esther'in agon nehkhom na-a chun lengpa le Haman chu ahungtai." 
Esther5:6 Chuin lengpan judon khomna-a chun Esther henga, ipiham nathum? nakibolpeh ding nahi, chule na-ngeh chu ipi ham? lenggam kehkhat hijengjongle kibulhitpeh ding nahi, ati." 
Esther5:7 Chuin Esther hin adonbutnin, kathum le kangeh chu:" 
Esther5:8 Lengpa mitmu-a lungsetna kachana, kathilthum hi lengpan phalpeh dinga pha nasah-a, Kathil ngeh bulhitpeh dinga pha nasahle, lengpa le Haman kagonpeh ding nehkhom na-a hunglhonin lang, lengpa seibangin jingle bolnange, ati." 
Esther5:9 Hitichun Haman chu hicheni chun lunglhaisel le thanom tah-in apotdohtai. Ahinla Haman'in lengpa kotpi phunga Mordecai ama jana-a adindohlou le achalohlou chu amuphatnin, Mordecai chunga alunghang lheh jengin ahi." 
Esther5:10 Ahijengvangin, Haman akitimham hamin: in ahunglhun phatnin agolho le ajinu Zeresh koudin asolin ahi." 
Esther5:11 Chuin Haman'in amaho henga ahaona loupije, achate tamdan, lengpan adopsangna thilho jouse, chule lengpa pipuiho le asohte chungvuma amasotsah dan chu aseijin ahi." 
Esther5:12 Chukalvalin Haman'in aseibe kitnin, Henge, Esther lengnun nehkhom na agonna-a chun lengpa le kei tailou koimacha alutsahpoi; chule jingle avelin lengpa toh eikou kit lhonin ahi." 
Esther5:13 Ahinla lengpa kotpi phunga tou Judah mi Mordecai kamu laisen, hicheho jousehin ima eiphatchom sahpoi, ati." 
Esther5:14 Chuin ajinu Zeresh le agolho jousen ajah-a, tong somnga sang thingpel kisem hen, chule achunga chu Mordecai akikhai theinadin nangman lengpa henga jingle hinseijin: chuteng lengpa to thanom tah-in nehkhom na-a chun chen, atiuve. Chuin Haman'in hichu pha asan, thingpel chu asemsahtai." 
Esther6:1 Hiche jan chun lengpa a-imuthei hihbeh-in, chule thusoh ho kisutlutna thusimbu chu ahinchoi diuvin thupeh apen, chule hicheho chu lengpa angah asimun ahi." 
Esther6:2 Chuin Bigthana le Teresh lengpa kotngah-a pang nukiso tenin, Ahasuerus lengpa chunga khut lhahdia agotlhon, Mordecai'in ana seidohpeh thu kisun chu amudoh-un ahi." 
Esther6:3 Chuin lengpan aseijin, hiche jeh-a hi ipi janale choi-atna Mordecai kibolpeh am? ati. Chuin ajenlea pang lengpa sohten, ima akibol pehpoi, atiuvin ahi." 
Esther6:4 Chuin lengpan, hong sunga koi umam? ati. Tun Haman chu lengpa aman asem thingpel chunga Mordecai khaiding thusei dingin, indan ponunga chun ahunglutnin ahi." 
Esther6:5 Chuin lengpa sohten ajah-a, vetan, hong sunga Haman adinge, atiuve. Chuin lengpan, hinlutsah un, ati." 
Esther6:6 Hitichun Haman ahunglut tai. Chuin lengpan ajah-a, lengpan ajabol nompa henga ipi kibolpeh le phantem? ati. Tun Haman'in alungsunga, lengpan keisanga ajabolnom koi umding ham? tin agelin ahi." 
Esther6:7 Chuin Haman in lengpa chu adonbutnin, lengpan ajabol nom mipa ding chun," 
Esther6:8 Lengpan akivon lengvon, lengpa tounaji sakol, chule lengpa kikhuhji lallukhuh chu hin kilahsah hen:" 
Esther6:9 Chule lengpan ajabol dingpa chu ajep theina dingin, hiche von le sakol chu lengpa pipu lulpen ho lah-a khat khutna kipehen: chule amachun khopi lamlena sakol chunga chun ama chu puile henlang, amasanga chun: lengpan ajabol nom mi chu hiti ahi kibol ding ahi, tin samphongle hen, ati." 
Esther6:10 Chuin lengpan Haman jah-a, kino-in, nasei bang chun von le sakol chu galan, chule lengpa kotpi phunga tou Juda mipa Mordecai henga khun gabolin: naseiho chu khatcha akipel umlou ding ahi, atitai." 
Esther6:11 Hitichun Haman'in von le sakol chu alan, Mordecai chu avonpeh-in, sakol chunga khopi sung lamlena ahinpuijin, amasanga chun, lengpan ajabol nom mi chu hitia hi kibol ding ahi, tin asampeh-in ahi." 
Esther6:12 Chuin Mordecai chu lengpa kotpi phunga ahungkit tan ahi. Haman vang chun ponlu akikhun, lunghem tah-in a-in lama acheloitai." 
Esther6:13 Chuin Haman'in ajinu Zeresh le agolho jouse henga achunga thilsoh jouse chu aseitai. Hichun amiching hole ajinu Zeresh'in ahengah, ama masanga nalhuhpatna Mordecai chu Judah te son ahile, nangman ama najo louhel ding, amavang thonlouva a-anga nalhuhtei ding ahi, atiuve." 
Esther6:14 Chuin amaho amatoh akihoulim nalai uvin, lengpa nukiso ho khat ahungin, Esther lengnun asem nehkhom na-a dingin Haman chu mangang tah-in ahung puitan ahi." 
Esther7:1 Hitichun lengpa le Haman chu Esther lengnun agon nehkhom na-a chun ahung lhontan ahi. 
Esther7:2 Chule anini channi jong chun lengpan don khomna-a chun Esther chu adongin, Esther lengnu, nathum chu ipiham? nangma kinop peh ding nahi, chule na-ngeh chu ipiham? lenggam kehkhat pehding hijengjongle, kibolpeh ding nahi, ati." 
Esther7:3 Chuin lengnu Esther'in adonbutnin, Vo lengpa namit mu-a lungsetna kachana, lengpa lung ahile, kathumna-a hin kahinkho hi eikipe henglang, kangehna-a hin kamite hinkho kipehen." 
Esther7:4 Ajehchu keiho, keimale kamitehi, suhmang ding, tha dingle, suhgamhel dinga eikijoh doh-u ahitai. Ahinla keihohi sohpa le sohnu dinga eikijohdoh maimaiju hilevang, melmapan lengpa thil suhmang ditdoh jouding hihih jongle, ima seilouva kaum jengding ahi, ati." 
Esther7:5 Chuin Ahasuerus lengpan Esther lengnu adonbutnin, ajah-a, alungsunga jong chutobang gahgel ngama chu koihija, hoija uma ham? ati." 
Esther7:6 Chuin Esther'in, doubol le melma chu hiche mi-engsepa Haman hi ahi ati. Chuin Haman chu lengpa le lengnu anga chun akichatan ahi." 
Esther7:7 Chuin lengpa ju donkhom na-a kon chun lunghang tah-in adingdoh in, leng inpi honsung lama achetai. Chuin Haman chu adingdoh-in ahinkho kihuhna dingin Esther lengnu henga ataotai; ajehchu lengpan achunga setna angaito chu ahet ahitai." 
Esther7:8 Chuin lengpa chu hona konin donkhomna mun'a akile kitnin, chule Haman chu Esther umna jalkhun chunga chun analhun ahi. Hichun lengpan, kamasang tah-a jong aman hiche insunga hi lengnu suhset ding agot ham? ati. Chutia lengpa thusei petchun, Haman chu amai atompeh taove." 
Esther7:9 Chuin nukiso ho lah-a khat Harbonah chun, lengpa anga, Vetan, lengpa dinga thupha seipa Mordecai khailihna dinga Haman'in tong somnga sanga asem thingpel chu Haman in'a akitunge, ati. Chuin lengpan, hiche chunga chun ama khailih-un, ati." 
Esther7:10 Hijeh chun amahon Haman chu Mordecai kikhaina dinga asem thingpel chunga chun akhai taove. Chujouvin lengpa chu alungdamtai. 
Esther8:1 Hiche ni chun Ahasuerus lengpan Judah te melmapa Haman in chu Esther lengnu apetan ahi. Chuin Mordecai lengpa masanga ahungin ahi; ajehchu Esther'in ama chu ama dinga a ipi ahi aseipeh ahitai. 
Esther8:2 Chuin lengpa chun Haman'a kona alah akhutjem chu aladoh-in, Mordecai chu apetan ahi. Chule Esther'in Mordecai chu Haman insung vaipon apansahtai." 
Esther8:3 Chuin Esther'in lengpa anga thu aseikitnin, akengbula alhun, mitlhi pumin Agag mi Haman'in Judah te douna-a thilphalou agon chu alahdoh din angeh-e." 
Esther8:4 Chuin lengpan sana tenggol chu Esther lama adomdoh-in ahi. Hitichun Esther athoudoh-in, lengpa anga adingin," 
Esther8:5 Hitin aseije, Lengpan pha asah-a, amitmua lungsetna kachana, chule hiche thil hi lengpa anga adih-a akilah-a, amitmua alunglhaina kahile, lengpa gamkai jouse sunga um Judah te suhmangna dinga Agag mi Hammedatha chapa Haman'in anabol lekhaho chu akheldohna ding kisun hen:" 
Esther8:6 Kanam mite chunga hunglhung ding setna chu ken iti kamu-a kadoujou dingham? Ahiloule kasopiho kisuh mangna ding chu iti kamua kadoujou dingham? ati. 
Esther8:7 Chuin Ahasuerus lengpan Esther lengnu le Judah mi Mordecai hengah, veuvin, Judah te chunga akhut alhah jeh-a thingpel'a akhailih-u Haman in chu, keiman Esther kapeh ahitai." 
Esther8:8 Nanghon nadeilam tah-un lengpa minin Judah te dingin jong lekha sunun, chule lengpa khutjema chun sinkhana nam khumun: ajehchu lengpa mina kisuna, chule lengpa khutjema sinkhana kinamkhum chu koimachan akhelthei louhel ahitai, ati." 
Esther8:9 Chuin chuche phatlai lha thumna, hichu sivan lha ahin, nisomni le nithum nin lengpa lekhasunho chu koukhom in aumun; abonchan Mordecai'in athupeh dungjuijin, India'a pat Ethiopia gei, agoma gamkai jale somni le sagi-a um Judah te heng, gal lamkaiho heng, gamvaipoho le pipuiho henga thotdin lekha asunun; gamkai jouse chu amaho lekhajem'in, mijouse chu apao cheh-in, chule Judah te dingin jong alekhajem dungjuile apao dungjuijun athot uvin ahi." 
Esther8:10 Chuin aman Ahasuerus lengpa minin asunin, lengpa khutjemin sinkhana anamkhumin, lekha chu lekha pole-a pang sakol chung, sangan chunga touho, sangongsang, chule sangongsang khangdongho apohsah-un ahi." 
Esther8:11 Hia chun lengpan khopi tina cheng Judah te jouse chu ahinkhou kihuhna dinga akikhop khomuva, amaho hindel khum ding thahatna jouse mihem le gamkai chu naosen le numei geija asumanguva, atha uva, asuhgamhel uva, chule anei agouhou chu galthil choma akichom diuvin aphalpeh-in," 
Esther8:12 Hichu nikhat sung, lha somle lhani na, hichu Adar lha ahin, nisomle nithum nileh, Ahasuerus lengpa gamkai jouse-a tohdoh-a umding ahi." 
Esther8:13 Gamkai tina mijouse pehdinga thuphondoh kisunson chu, Juda te chu hiche nikho-a amelmateu chunga phula dinga kigosa dema aumna dinguvin, mijouse henga akihom jaltan ahi." 
Esther8:14 Hitichun kino dingle kikinsah dinga lengpa thupeh ahi jehchun, sangan le sangongsang chunga tou lekhahomho chu akipatdoh taove. Chule thuphondoh chu leng inpi Shushan'a kihomdoh ahi." 
Esther8:15 Chuin Mordecai chu lengpa angsunga konin lengvon adum le akang, sana lallukhuh loupitah, tupat ponnem le ponsandup kivon pumin apotdoh-in: chuin Shushan khopi chu akipah-un chule athanomlheh jengun ahi." 
Esther8:16 Judah te chun vah, kipana, thanopna, chule jana aneitauvin ahi." 
Esther8:17 Chuin gamkaitin le khopitin, lengpa thupeh le thuphondoh lhunna channa chun Judah ten kipana le thanopna aneijun, golvah abolun chule akichol douvin ahi. Chuin gamsunga mitamtah chunga chu Judah te ginna achuh jeh-in, Juda mi asohgam taove." 
Esther9:1 Tun lhasom le lhani lhina, hichu Adar lha ahin, chuche lha nisomle nithum ni, lengpa thupeh le thuphondoh chu tohlhah-a aumding nikho, Juda mite chunga amelma teovin thaneina anei diuva akinepnao nikho chu ahung nai phatnin, (amaho ana hotbol ho chunga Judah te joh-in vai ahomna diuva thu chu akaleh-a heija aum vang chun)" 
Esther9:2 Judah te chu Ahasuerus lengpa gamkai sung jouse-a chun khopi jouse-a, achunguva thilse boldingho chunga khut lhadin akikhomun ahi: Chule koiman amaho atingjou pouve; ajehchu amaho kichatna chu mijouse chunga chua ahitai." 
Esther9:3 Chule gamkaija vaipoho jouse, gal lamkaiho, chule lengpa vaipoho chun Judah te akithopiuve; ajehchu achunguva Mordecai ginna achutan ahi." 
Esther9:4 Ajehchu Mordecai chu leng insunga alen lhehtan, chule aminthanna chu gamkai jouse-a akithang sohtan ahi; ajehchu hichepa Mordecai hi akhangtou tultul jengin ahi." 
Esther9:5 Hitichun Judah ten amelmateu jouse chu chemjamin abansat gamun, athatnun, asumangun, chule ahotbolteu chunga boldinga lomtah chu abol taovin ahi." 
Esther9:6 Chule Shushan inpia Judah ten mi janga athatnun asumangun ahi. 
Esther9:7 Chuin Parshandatha, Dalphon, chule Aspatha," 
Esther9:8 Chule Poratham, Adalia, chule Aridatha," 
Esther9:9 Chule Parmashta, Arisai, Aridai chule Vaizatha." 
Esther9:10 Hammedatha chapa Haman chapa som, Judah te melmaho chu amahon athatnun; ahinla galthil chu ima alapouvin ahi." 
Esther9:11 Hichenia Shushan leng inpia kithatho chu amijat lengpa angsunga ahinpolut nun ahi. 
Esther9:12 Chuin lengpan lengnu Esther jah-a, Judah ten Shushan inpia mi janga athatnun, asumanguvin, chule Haman chapate misom jong chu athat taove: lengpa gamkai dang jouse-a ipi aboluvem? Tun ipiham nathum? Hichu kibolpeh ding nahi. Ahiloule ipiham nangehbe? Hichu kibolding ahi, ati." 
Esther9:13 Chuin Esther'in, lengpa lunglam ahile, Shushan'a um Juda te chu tunikho-a dinga thuphondoh kibol banga, jing nikho jongle abol diuvin phalna kipehen, chule Haman chapate somho hi thingpel'a kikhai hen, ati." 
Esther9:14 Chuin lengpan chutia bolding chun thupeh apetan ahi. Chule thupeh apeh chu Shushan'a akipen; chule amahon Haman chapate som chu thingpel'a akhailih taove. 
Esther9:15 Ajehchu Shushan'a um Judah te chu Adar lha, ni somleli nin akikhom khomun, Shushan'a mi jathum athat uvin; hinlah athilhou vang imacha alapouvin ahi." 
Esther9:16 Ahinla Juda mi adang dangho lengpa gamkai sunga umho chu akikhomun, ahinnao huhna-in apanguvin, amelmateuva konin akicholdo uvin, agalteu chu sangsomsagi le sangnga athatnun ahi; hinla anei agouhou chunga akhut alha pouve;" 
Esther9:17 Hiche hi Adar lha ni som le nithum ni ahi. Chuin hiche lha mama nisomle nili channin amaho akicholdo uvin, hiche nikho chu golvah le kipa nikhon amanguvin ahi." 
Esther9:18 Ahinla Shushan'a um Judah te chu chuche lha ni somle nithum ni, chuleh nisomle nili nin akikhomun; chule hiche lha mama nisomle ninga channin akicholdo uvin, hiche nikho chu golvah le kipa nikhon amanguvin ahi." 
Esther9:19 Hijeh-a chu kulpi kikai khum lou khoneo ho-a Judah te chun, Adar lha nisomle nili ni chu kipa le golvah nikhon amangun, chule choldoni akilhaovin, khat lekhat thilpeh kipehto nikhon amanguvin ahi." 
Esther9:20 Chuin Mordecai jin hichehohi asunin, Ahasuerus lengpa gamkaiho jouse-a um Judah te, naija le gamlha-a umho jouse henga lekha athotnin," 
Esther9:21 Adar lha nisomle nili le nisomle ninga ni hi kum seh-a anitdiuva alah uva phudoh-a," 
Esther9:22 Hiche nikho-a chu Juda te amelmateova kona acholdonao nikhou, chule chuche lha chu amaho dinga lunggim na-a kon kipana aso-a, chule lunghemna-a kona choldo nikho sodohna lha ahin: hitia chu amahon hiche nikho teni chu golvah le kipa nikho, khatle khat thilpeh kipehto nikho, chule gentheiho thilpeh peh nikho-a amandiuvin athotnin ahi." 
Esther9:23 Chuin Judah te chun amahon ana bolpatsao bangle, ahenguva Mordecai hinsut banga chu bol dingin asang taove." 
Esther9:24 Ajehchu Agag mi Hammedatha chapa Haman, Judah te melmapa chun Judah te douna-a amaho suhmang ding anagotna, chule Pur anasana, hichu vangvetna ahin, amaho chu thagama, suhgam ding anagot ahi." 
Esther9:25 Ahinla, Esther chu lengpa anga ahung phatnin, lengpan lekha-a thupeh apen, amapa lung ngaito phalou, Judah te douna-a abol hochu ahungkinung le-a, abona ama luchunga achuh-a, chule amale achapate chu thingpel'a khailih ahina dingin nathupeh tan ahi." 
Esther9:26 Hiche jeh-a chu hiche nikhohi Pur mina konin Purim asah-u ahi. Hijeh chun hiche lekhathotna thucheng jousele, chuche chungchanga athilmu hou jouse, chule amaho chunga hunglhungho jeh chun," 
Esther9:27 Judah ten amaho chung le, asohteu chung, chule amaho jop chan chunga din, akisun dungjuija thonlou hela akitep dungjuija kumseh le hiche nikho ni hi anit dingun asudetnun ahi." 
Esther9:28 Chule hiche nikho teni hi geldoh jinga uma, insung tina, gamkai tina, chule khopi tina akhang akhanga kinit jingding ahi. Chule hiche Purim nikho teni hi Judah te lah-a kona kilamang louding, chule hicheho hetjingna jonghi achilhah teova kona mangthah louding ahi." 
Esther9:29 Chujouvin Abihail chanu lengnu Esther le Juda mi Mordecai'in thaneina jouseto thon, Purim suhdetna dingin lekhathot aniveina asun lhonin ahi." 
Esther9:30 Chuin aman lekhathot ho chu, Ahasuerus lenggama gamkai jakhatle somni le sagi-a cheng Judah te jouse henga, lungmona thu le thutah thu toh athot than," 
Esther9:31 Judah mi Mordecai le Esther lengnun ajui diuva aphatsah lhon dungjuile, a-an ngolu le akanao thudola amaho tah dingle achateu dinga thuphondoh anabol banguva, phat kitep dungjuija hiche Purim nikho hi suhdetna aumna dinga athot ahi." 
Esther9:32 Chuin Esther thuphondoh chun Purim thudol chu asudet tan; chuleh hichu lekhabua akisunlut tai. 
Esther10:1 Chuin lengpa Ahasuerus'in leiset chungle twikol gamho chunga kai alatan ahi. 
Esther10:2 Chuin athaneina le athilbol theina-a anatoh jouse, chule Mordecai loupina kiphondoh, lengpan amasot dan, Media le Persia lengte thusimbua kisunlut hilouham?" 
Esther10:3 Ajehchu Juda mi Mordecai chu leng Ahasuerus ban tah-a ahin, chule Judah te lah-a loupitah, asopi tamtah lunglhaina, amite phatna ding hol, chule achilhahte jouse henga lungmona thu aseijing ahi." 
Job1:1 Uz gamsunga chun amin Job atiu mikhat anachenge. Amapa chu chamkimle mikitah anahin, chuleh Pathen ginga setna nungsun jing mi anahi." 
Job1:2 Chule aman chapa sagile chanu thum ahinge. 
Job1:3 Aman aneiho chu kelngoi sangsagi, sangongsao sangthum chule bongchal to janga chule sanganpi sanga ahin, chuleh insung lentah ahi; hijeh chun hichepa chu solam miho jouse lah-a milenpen anahi." 
Job1:4 Chuin achapate chun a-inhouva ama ama nikhosehle golvah bollin ache jiuve. Hichea chun nehkhom donkhompi ding chun asopi numei thum jongchu akoujiuve. 
Job1:5 Golvah nikho kitol chu akichai phatnin, Job'in mi asollin achate chu asuthengjin chuleh Jingpi tahle athoujin achate khatcheh ding chun govam thilto abolpehjin ahi; ajehchu Job'in, kachate Pathen douna-in chonse khaovintin, chule alungun Pathen chu gaosap khaovinte, ati ahi. Hitichun Job'in tanglouvin abol jingin ahi." 
Job1:6 Tun nikhat Pathen chapate chu Pakai angsunga acham chama ahung kikhop nikhou ahung lhungin, alah uva chun Satan jong ahungpange." 
Job1:7 Chule Pakaiyin Satan jah-a hoija kona hung nahim? ati. Satan'in Pakai chu adonbutnin, leiset chunga suhle tunga kavalea chule chungle noi kakoptoa kahung ahi, ati." 
Job1:8 Chuin Pakai chun Satan jah-a nangman kalhacha Job khu iti nagellem? Leiset chunga michamkim, mikitah Pathen ginga chule asetnalam nungsun jing amatobang aumdem? ati." 
Job1:9 Chuphatnin Satan'in Pakai chu adonbutnin, Job'in Pathen chu mohseh a agin hija ong? ati." 
Job1:10 Nangman amale a-insungmite chule aneijousele aveljouse pal nakaikhum hilouham? Nangman akhut tenin atoh jouse phatthei naboh in, chule hiche gamsunga hin anei agou apung chehcheh-in ahi." 
Job1:11 Ahinla tun nakhut lhang inlang aneijousehi tongkha lechun, aman namaichang tah a nagaosap tante ati." 
Job1:12 Chule Pakai chun Satan jah-a, ven, aneijouse khu nangma thaneina ahitai; amatahsa chunga vang nakhut lha hih in. Hitichun Satan chu Pakai angsunga konchun achedohtai." 
Job1:13 Chule nikhathi a-upa pennu inna chun achapate achanute chun nehkhom donkhom abolpetnu chun: 
Job1:14 thangkou mikhatnin Job henga thu ahung lhutnin, hitin aseije. Bongchal hon lou akaipetnu, chule sanganhon akomuva ham aneh petnun," 
Job1:15 Seba miho chun ahindel khumuvin abonun akaimangun chule sohdangho jouse jong chu chemjamin athatnun, kei changseh bouhi nangma hildinga hung hoidoh kahi, ati." 
Job1:16 Aman hiche thuchu asei nalaijin, midang khatma ahung lhungin hitin aseije, Pathen meichu van'a konin ahungleng lhan, kelngoihole soh ho chu akataovin amaho meijin ahalvamtai. Kei changseh bouhi nangma hildinga hung hoidoh kahi, ati." 
Job1:17 Aman hiche thuchu asei nalaijin, midang khatma ahung lhungin, Chaldea miho loithumin akisemmun sangongsao ho ahindeluvin, amahochu akaimang taove. Kei changseh bouhi nangma hildinga hung hoidoh kahi, ati." 
Job1:18 Aman hiche thuchu aseinalaijin, midang khatjong ahunglhung paijin nachapate le nachanutehon a-upa penu in'a an aneh uva lengpitwi adonpet tah-un," 
Job1:19 Chule ven, gamthipma konin khopihuijin in ningli chu ahinmutnin ahile, in chun khangdongho chu alhuh khumin, amaho athigam taove. Chule kei changseh bouhi nangma hildinga hung hoidoh kahi, ati." 
Job1:20 Chutah in Job chu akipatdoh-in, asangkhol lenchu abottelin, asam akivotolin, chuin tolla aboh khupmin, Pathen chu ahoutai," 
Job1:21 Chule hitin aseije, kanu naobu sunga kona kasagoh keova hungdoh-a kahin, sagoh keova kakilekit ding ahi. Pakai chun eipeh ahin, Pakai chun akile lahkit ahi; Pakai min chu nunnom hen." 
Job1:22 Hicheng jouse-a hin Job'in chonset abolpon, Pathen jong ngol hoitah in oimo achanpoi." 
Job2:1 Nikhathi Pathen chapate chu Pakai anga ahung kikhomkit taovin, chule amaho lah-a chun Satan jong Pakai angah ahunglhan ahi." 
Job2:2 Chule Pakai chun Satan jah-a, hoija hungkon nahim? ati. Satan'in Pakai chu adonbutnin leiset chunga suhle tunga kavalea chule chungle noi kakoptoa kahung ahi, ati." 
Job2:3 Chule Pakai chun Satan jah-a, kalhachapa Job khu iti nagellem? Leiset chunga michamkim michondih Pathen ginga chule setnalam nungsun jing amatobang aumpoi. Nangman ajeh beija ama suhmang dinga ama douna-a neitildoh vangin, aman achondihna lhadeh louvin atuhchah jing nalaije, ati." 
Job2:4 Chuin Satan'in Pakai chu adonbutnin, vun khella vun, henge, min aneijouse ahinna lhengin pente." 
Job2:5 Ahin tun nangman nakhut lhangin lang agule aphe tongkha lechun aman namaichang tah-a nangma gaosap tannate, ati." 
Job2:6 Pakai chun Satan jah-a, ven, ama nakhutna aume ahinla ahinna vang hoijin, ati." 
Job2:7 Hitichun Satan chu Pakai angsunga konin achedoh-in, chule Job chu akengtoa pat alujang geijin uilut khohtah-in atomsah tai." 
Job2:8 Chule aman akikhot nadingin bel halkhat alan, vut lah-a chun atoutai." 
Job2:9 Chuin ajinu chun ajah-a, nachondihna chu nakolchah nahlaijem? Pathen chu gaosap minlang thijengtan, ati." 
Job2:10 Ahin aman amanu jah-a nangman numei ngolkhat thusei bangin thu naseije. Ipiham? einin Pathen'a kona apha jeng ikisana, aphalou kisan louva i-um dingham? Hicheng chunga hin Job'in akamin thuse aseipoi." 
Job2:11 Tun Job golte thumho chun hiche thilse jouse hi ama chunga achutai ti ajah phatnun, aumna cheh uva konin ahungun; amaho chu Teman mi Eliphaz, Shuh mi Bildad, chule Naamath mi Zophar ahiuve. Amaho chu ama lunghempi dingle lhamon ding chun akitem toh-un ahi." 
Job2:12 Chule amahon gamlatah-a avetnuva amachu ahettheilou phatnun amaho awging tah-in akaptaovin; chule amahon asangkhol cheh-u chu abottelun, chule van lama aluchung uva leivui atheuvin ahi." 
Job2:13 Hitichun amahon amachu ni sagi le jan sagi tollhanga atoupiuvin, koimachan kamcheng khatchan jong ahouloh pouve; ajehchu amahon athohgim nasatah chu amuvin ahi." 
Job3:1 Hicheng jouhin Job akam kan apenni chu agaosaptai. 
Job3:2 Chule Job apaodoh-in hitin aseije," 
Job3:3 Kapenna nikho chu mangthah hen, chule naosen pasal khat akivoptai tia kiseina janchu mangthah hen." 
Job3:4 Hiche nikho chu muthim hihen, chunglama konin Pathen'in ngaisah dahen, hiche nikho chu vah injong salvah dahen." 
Job3:5 Hiche nikho chu muthimle thina limmin kaikhumhen, meipin achung khukhumhen; muthim lhangkhal in hiche ni chu kichatsah hen." 
Job3:6 Chule hiche janchu muthimin mangjeng hen; hichu kumsunga nikho lah-a jong pandahen, lha kisim nalah ajong panghih hen." 
Job3:7 Veovin hiche janchu janlengvai hihen; hia chun kipa awgin hung lutdahen. 
Job3:8 Alunghem nao sodohgo-a nikho gaosaphon hichu gaosap muhen. 
Job3:9 Thingjangvah ahsi hochu thim taohen, hiche chun khovah velehen, ahin khatcha jong mudahen, khovahlhah jong mudahen." 
Job3:10 Ajehchu hiche jan chun kanu naobu anasingpon, chujongle gentheina kamitna konin ana selmangpoi." 
Job3:11 Ipijeh-a naobu-a kona kanathi louham? Oisunga kona kahungdoh a chu ipijeh-a kahinna kanalha louham? 
Job3:12 Ipijeh-a pheiphung in einasana? ahiloule, ipi dinga kachepding noi ana uma ham?" 
Job3:13 Chutile keima tu-a hi analuma thipbeh-a anaum tadinga, keima ana ihmu tadinga, hichepetna chu keima anacholdo hitaleng," 
Job3:14 Amaho-a dinga khogemsa kisema leiset thumopthem ho le leiset lenghoto," 
Job3:15 Ahiloule a-inhou dangka a sudima, sana neija leng chapatetoh," 
Job3:16 ahiloule aphatlouva peng chapang kisel mahthah khat tobangla kana hitapon, vah mukhalouhel naosen ho tojongla kanabang tapon," 
Job3:17 Hikoma chun migilouho alungkham naova konin atangun, chule athacholla chu akitha oltai." 
Job3:18 Hikoma chun songkul lut ho acholngaovin; mibol gentheina aw jong ajatapouve. 
Job3:19 Hikoma chun alen aneo aumun, chule sohjong apakaipa-a konin achamlhat tai." 
Job3:20 Ipijeh-a genthei thohpahi vah chu anakipea, chule alha hesoh lengvaipahi hinna anakipeham;" 
Job3:21 Thina ngaicha lheh-a ahivanga hunglhung dehlou, chule gouthil kiselgu sanga nasajo-a holpa;" 
Job3:22 Amahon lhankhuh amutengule, hatah-a kipah thanomji hilou vuham?" 
Job3:23 Ipijeh-a alampi kisel mangpeh mipa hengle, Pathen'in kul akaikhum pehpa henga vah kipe aham?" 
Job3:24 Ajehchu ka anneh masangin kahai sammin eiphan, chule kapen ginhi twi bangin akibunglhai." 
Job3:25 Ajehchu kakichat pentah thilchu kachunga alhungtan, chule kana ginjing thilchun eihin phatai." 
Job3:26 Keima kana hoidohpon, choljong kana choldopoi, chule thipbeh injong kana umpoi, ajehchu gimna chun eilhun khumtai." 
Job4:1 Chuphatnin Teman mi Eliphaz chun adonbutnin, hitin ati," 
Job4:2 keihon nangma kihoulimpi talengu nalung phamo dem? ahinla koiham paolouva umthei dinga? 
Job4:3 Vetan, nangman mi tamtah nahildoh-in, khut thalhom te chu nahatsah-in ahi." 
Job4:4 Nathun alhusapa chu atungdingin, khup ngoite chu nathahat sahtai." 
Job4:5 Ahin tun nachunga alhungtan ahile, nangma nalhasam tan; hichun nangma natongkhan ahile nangma nagenthei tai." 
Job4:6 Hichehi nakichat, natahsan, nakinepna chule nalampi ho-a nadihna chu hilouham?" 
Job4:7 Geldoh-in, katao ahi; suhkhel neilou mangthah-a koi umam? ahiloule mikitah ho koi kipaidoh kha-am?" 
Job4:8 Keimatah jengin jong kamudanin, khan gitlouna lou kaija kaiho chule khansetna muchi tu-a tuhon jong kibang bangin a-atnun ahi." 
Job4:9 Pathen hu-a amaho amangthah jiuvin; chule alunghana hu-a chun amaho ajunmang jitaove. 
Job4:10 Keipi bahkai kitum, chule keipi bahkai hang awgin, chule keipi donglai haho jong chu akisubong tan ahi." 
Job4:11 Keipi bahkai teh chu nehding lhasamin amangthah jin, chuteng keipi bahkai nouho chu akithecheh jin ahi." 
Job4:12 Tun thilkhat guhthim chan kakom ahung lhungin; chule kanakhangin thuguh kisei ajan ahi. 
Job4:13 Mihemte chunga imutlhuhna achuh-a, jana gao thilmu ho-a kona kagel laijin," 
Job4:14 Kichatna kachunga ahungchun, kakithingtai; hichun kagu jouse ahot longin ahi." 
Job4:15 Chujouvin lhagao khat kamaikoh-a ahungin; katimul athoujenge. 
Job4:16 Kading jingin, ahin keiman alimso kahe thempon; alim chu kamasanga aumin, athipchetnin, chuin keiman awkhat kajan hitin aseije," 
Job4:17 Thithei mihem Pathen sanga dihjo thei ham? mihem chu asempa sanga thengjo theiham? 
Job4:18 Ven, aman asohte chunga ginchatna aneipon; chule avantil te jengjong themmo achane." 
Job4:19 Ngetnin asuhmangji, bon in'a chenga, leivui lah-a kona kisemdoh leingan hohi, ichanna lhasamdiu ham?" 
Job4:20 Amaho chu jingkah-a patnin nilhah geijin suhmangin aumun, amaho chu i-sah loutah in atonsotnin amangthah jiuve." 
Job4:21 Amaho-a thilphapen chu chemangjilou ham? chuteng amaho chu chihna beijin athiji taove. 
Job5:1 Nangma nadonbut theiding khattou aumle tun kouvin; chule mithengho koi kom pena nakihei ding ham? 
Job5:2 Ajehchu lunghanin mingol chu athatjin, thangsetnan milungthim beipa chu athatjin ahi." 
Job5:3 Keiman mingol aki jungkho kamun; ahin phulou helouvin achenna kagaosap tai. 
Job5:4 Achate jong bitna-a konin agamlaovin, amaho kotpi phunga suhchipmin aumjiuvin, amaho huhdoh ding koimacha akimuji tapoi." 
Job5:5 Achang atsajong agilkelten anejou taovin, chule linglah jenga jong alakhomjin, gucha michom hon aneijouseu chu avallhum jitai." 
Job5:6 Thohgimnahi leivuilah-a kona hung ahilou vangin, chule gentheina jonghi leisetna hungkon ahilou vangin;" 
Job5:7 Hitajongle meisi chunglama alentou banga, mihemhi thohgim ding monga penga ahi." 
Job5:8 Keiman vang Pathen holingting, chule Pathen henga kathuhi lhutning kate:" 
Job5:9 Amachun thil len tahtah le holdoh jouhoi hilou thilkidang tamtah simjoulou abole. 
Job5:10 Aman leichunga go ajuhsahjin, loulaija twi ahinsolji:" 
Job5:11 Hichun mi noinungte tundoh ahinadiule, alunghemte chu hoina-a choisang ahina dingu ahi." 
Job5:12 Aman miduha thuh ho thilgon asumojin, hitichun atohgonu chu akhutnun atongtheiji tapouve." 
Job5:13 Aman michingho chu adohaovin amanjin, milung gilouho thilgon chu abungbun achuhsahjin ahi." 
Job5:14 Amaho nisa vah noija muthim toh akitoh-un, sunchangnoija muthim lah bangin akimailele jiuve." 
Job5:15 Ahin aman michaga chu ahatho khutna konle, akamuva kon chule chemjam'a konin ahuhdohjin ahi." 
Job5:16 Hitichun mivaichan kinepna aneijin, khan gitlouna chun akam ahuptai." 
Job5:17 Ven, Pathen'in asuhdih mi chu minunom ahi; hijeh chun hat chungnung gimbol nahi i-sah louvin koihih-in." 
Job5:18 Ajehchu aman amavon, chule atompeh-in, asukhan, akhutnin adamsah kitji." 
Job5:19 Gentheina gup ma kona aman nahuhdoh ding; sagi na-a jong setnan natohkhah louding ahi. 
Job5:20 Kellhah tengle aman thina-a kona nalhatdoh ding, chule galmuna chemjam thanei na-a kon nahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Job5:21 Miseiseho-a kona selthipma aum ding; gamna ahungteng jongle nakichat louding ahi. 
Job5:22 Suhgamna le kel lhahna chu na nuisat ding; leiset gamsaho jong nakichat louding ahi. 
Job5:23 Ajehchu loulai songhotoh nangman kiloikhomna nanei ding, chule gamlah saho chun nangma toh kichamna anei diu ahi." 
Job5:24 Chule nahoubuh-a chamna aumding chu nahet ding, chule nachenna chu navil ding, chonset nabol louding ahi." 
Job5:25 Chule nangman nachilhah ho letding jong nahetding, chule nachilhah hou chu leija hampa tobang ding ahi, ti nahet ding ahi." 
Job5:26 Aphatcha kiloh changvui banga, nakum kilhin tenglebou nalhankhuh najotding ahi." 
Job5:27 Ven, hichehi keihon kaholdoh-u ahi, hitichu ahi; ngaijin, nangma dinga pha ahi ti kihetnin." 
Job6:1 Ahin Job'in adonbutnin hitin aseije. 
Job6:2 O kagimna ho hi kito tohsel henlang, chule kahamsetnaho hi khaikotnin kilepto tavele!" 
Job6:3 Ajehchu, tunvang hicheng pihi twikhanglen panga neldi sangin gihjonte; hijeh-a chu kathuseiho vallhuma um ahitai." 
Job6:4 Ajehchu hat chungnungpa thalchang chu kasunga aumin; agu chun kalhagao adonjou heltan, Pathen'a tijatnaho keidou dingin akigoltoh taove." 
Job6:5 Gamlah sangan chu hamhing neisasa pengji-am? ahiloule bongchal anehding chunga bu ngainam? 
Job6:6 Atamset thilchu chi beijin akinethei nadem? ahiloule ahtui podala atuina umam? 
Job6:7 Kalhan jong atohkhah nomlou thilho chu, keija din lungkham na-a dim anneh tobang ahi." 
Job6:8 O keiman ngehkhat kaneithei ding hihen, chule Pathen'in kadei thilchu eiphalpeh theiding hitavele!" 
Job6:9 Pathen chun eisuhmang jenga lunglhai ding hijongle, chule aman akhut alha-a eitanboh ding hijongle!" 
Job6:10 Chuteng keiman lhamona kanei nahlai ding, chule kagenthei na-a jong kakipa ding ahi; aman eihoidoh dahen, ajehchu keiman mithengpa thuho chu kana selgupoi." 
Job6:11 Kathahat nahi ipi hija kakineppi ding ham? chule kaki chaina chu ipihija, keiman kahinkho kakisuhsao dingham?" 
Job6:12 Kathahi songho banga tah hija, kasaphe hi sum-eng tobang ham?" 
Job6:13 Keija hi panpina umlou ham? chihnahi keija kona kidelmanga hitam? 
Job6:14 Bolhesoh-a umpahi agolpa-a kona lungsetna chu vetsah ding ahi; ahinla aman Hat chungnung ginna chu adalhatai. 
Job6:15 Kasopi hon vachadung bangin kitahloutah-in eijoubolun, chule luidungho bangin alongmang taovin;" 
Job6:16 Hicheho chu buhbang jeh-in avomin, chule asunga chun buhbangho kiselin;" 
Job6:17 Amaho akisahjun phatle amangjitan, hichu asat tengle aumnaova konin amangthah jitaove." 
Job6:18 Achenau lampi chu akiheimangin, amaho hoima lhungjilouvin amangthahji taove." 
Job6:19 Tema galsat mihon aveovin, Sheba kiloihon amaho chu angah-uve." 
Job6:20 Amahon akineppina anei jeh-un akisumo taovin, amaho khulama ahungun akisujum taove." 
Job6:21 Ajehchu tun nangho ima nahi tapouvin, nanghon eikiselhah namuvin, chuleh nakichataove." 
Job6:22 Kahenga hinchoijun tia kasei khah em? ahiloule nanei uva konin lhatdoh man neipeuvin tia kaseikhah em? 
Job6:23 Ahiloule melma khutna konin neihoidoh-un; ahiloule hat chungnung khutna konin neilhat doh-un katikhah em? 
Job6:24 Neihilun, chule keiman kalei tuhtang ingkate; chule hoikoma chu kasuhkhel ham neihetchet sah-in." 
Job6:25 Thudih hohi itobanga thaneija hitam! ahinla naminel nahou hin ipi aphatsah em? 
Job6:26 Thu kisei hohi suhdih dinga nagel hih uva, chule kinepna neiloupa thusei chu hui tobangbou hitam?" 
Job6:27 Henge, pa neilou chu nasugimun, chule nagol diuvin kokhuh nalaijun ahi." 
Job6:28 Hijeh chun tun lunglhaijun, keima neiveuvin; kajou ahile kicheh-in heuvin nate." 
Job6:29 Hungkileuvin naheng uva katao ahi, khan gitlouna chu hidahen; henge, hung kile kitnun, kachon phatna chu hia chun aume." 
Job6:30 Kaleijahi khan gitlouna umam? kathil patepna hin hetkhena tha aneilou hitam? 
Job7:1 Leiset chungahi mihem dinga phattep khat uma hilouham? anikhohi thalahpa nikho tobang hilouham? 
Job7:2 Soh-in nilim angaichat ten bangle, thalahpan atohman sanding avetlhih jing bangin," 
Job7:3 Hitichun panna beijin lha hijatpihi eiki chansah-in, thohgimna jan hijatpihi kadingin eikitep pehtai." 
Job7:4 Kalupteng itihle kathou kitdem katin, chule janhi itihle abeitadem? katin, chule khovah kahsen nungle ma-a kakileh humhal jengjin ahi." 
Job7:5 Katahsa hi lungle leivuijin atomin, kavunhi akeh-in chule kidah umtah asohtai." 
Job7:6 Kanikho hi ponkhong khothei sangin aleng gangjon, chule kinepna beijin akimang chaitai." 
Job7:7 Oh, kahinkho hi hui ahi ti geldoh jingun; kamitnin apha mukit taponte." 
Job7:8 Eimupa mitchun eimukit tapontin; chule namitnun eiventin, keivang ana um taponge." 
Job7:9 Meilhang amanthah a abeihel bangin, thikholkhula chelutsa chu ahungdoh kitjitapoi." 
Job7:10 A-in'a ahung kilekitji tapon; chule ama munin jong ama anaheta ponte. 
Job7:11 Hijeh chun keiman kakam hupta pong ting; kalhagao hesoh puma thu kasei ding, kahinna natna jeh-a chu kaphun ding ahi." 
Job7:12 Keimahi twikhanglen kahia, ahiloule ngapi kahija, eingah ding kachunga nakoi ham?" 
Job7:13 Kajalkhun in eilhamon nintin, chule kalupnahin kalunglhai louna olsah dominte kati tengle;" 
Job7:14 Nangman mangin neikichat sah-in, munei na-in neitijat sah-e." 
Job7:15 Hitia chu kahinna hin, hin sanga kimeh lihle thi alhenjoh theina dinga nabol ahi." 
Job7:16 Hichehi kakidah-e, kahinbe nompoi; neichang lhaovin, ajehchu kanikhoho hi pannabei ahi." 
Job7:17 Mihemhi ipi hija nangman nahiti choisanga, achunga nalungthim nakoijing ham?" 
Job7:18 Jingkah sehle nangman amahi navil jinga, chule phattina napatep jingding ham?" 
Job7:19 Itihchan keija kona chemanglouva na-uma, chule kachil kaval lhah kahse dinga jong neichanglha louding ham?" 
Job7:20 Kana chonsetai; nahenga ikatiding hitam, Vo nang mihem hinkho chingtup pa? ipijeh-a nangma douna melchihna khatna neikoija, hitachu keimahi keima dinga pohgih kahi hitam?" 
Job7:21 Chule nangman ibolla suhkhel ngaidamlouva, keima khan gitlouna nalahmang louham? ajehchu tun keima leivui lah-a ihmutang kating, chule nangman jingkah le neihol ding, ahia keima ana umlou ding kahitai." 
Job8:1 Chuphatnin Shuhit mi Bildad chun adonbutnin, hitin aseije." 
Job8:2 Nangman itih chanpi hiche hohi nasei dingham? chule itih chanpihi nakamsunga kona hungpotdoh thuchenghi, hui hattah hungbang dingham?" 
Job8:3 Pathen'in thutan lhahhi alehei khah-em? ahiloule hat chungnung chun thudih hi alehei khah em? 
Job8:4 Nachate ama douna-a achonsetnuva, chule asuhkhel jeh uva aman apaidohle," 
Job8:5 Nangman aphatcha Pathen chu naholkitna, chule hat chungnung henga chu taona nasemkitna ahile;" 
Job8:6 Nangma nathem channa chule nathenna ahile, thonlouvin tun ama nangma dingin hung thoudoh intin, chule nachon phatna munchu khantousah tante." 
Job8:7 Nakipatna chu neocha anahijongle, nakichai na chu nasatah-a pungding ahi." 
Job8:8 Ajehchu nahenga katao ahi, khanglui lama miho chu kholin, chule apatehou chung changhi holdingin kigon," 
Job8:9 (Ajehchu eiho janhi mibou ihiuvin, chule ima ihepouve; ajehchu leisetna ihinkhou hi le-lim bou ahi.)" 
Job8:10 Amahon nangma nahil louvu, naseipeh louvu, chule alunguva kona thu naseipeh lou dingu ham?" 
Job8:11 Doplah louva phaipheng kehtheijam? twi beija peng kehthei ding hinam? 
Job8:12 Satlhah louvin ado hingpet jong, hamhing dangho sangin agoplha masaji taove." 
Job8:13 Pathen sumilho jouse lamlhah chu hitichu ahin; chule miphalhem pa kinepna jong mangthah ding ahi. 
Job8:14 Amapa kinepna chu suhbeijin umintin, chule aginchatna chu maimom pan tobang ding ahi." 
Job8:15 Ama a-in'a kingai jintin, ahivangin hichu dingjou louding; aman hatah-in tuhchah intin, ahivangin pangjou louding ahi." 
Job8:16 Ama nisat masanga ahingsetnin, chule honsunga konin abah ajamdoh-in ahi." 
Job8:17 Ajungho chu song lah-a ajam lutnin, chule songho lah-a chun mun aveove." 
Job8:18 Aman amuna konchun sumang taleh, hichun ama seilep mintin nangmahi kamukha hihbeh-e, tinte." 
Job8:19 Ven hichehi ama kipana lampi chu ahin, chule leisetna konin adangho hung kehdoh tante." 
Job8:20 Ven Pathen'in miphachamkim chu apaidoh louding; chujongle khanset bolpa chu akithopi louding ahi. 
Job8:21 Aman nakam nuina-a adip dima, namuh kipana-a adipdim kahse-a," 
Job8:22 Nangma nahotbol teho chu jachatna-a kivona, chule mikhang gilou chenna munchu imalou hungsoh ding ahi." 
Job9:1 Chujouvin Job'in adonbutnin, hitin aseije." 
Job9:2 Hichehi thutah ahi ti kahei: ahivanga Pathen angsunga koiham them changjou dinga? 
Job9:3 Aman ama kinahpi goleh, sangkhat lah-a khat jong donbut theiponte." 
Job9:4 Ama lungthima chingtah, tha-a hattah ahin, ama douna-a kilungtahsah-a khangtouva koi umam?" 
Job9:5 Molsang ho achon mangin, amahon ahepouve; aman alunghan na-in amaho aleh khupmin ahi." 
Job9:6 Aman leiset hi aumna mun'a konin ahot lingjin, chule chua akhomho chu akilingjin ahi." 
Job9:7 Aman nisa thu apen nisa asohji tapoi; chule ahsi ho namdet anam khumjin ahi. 
Job9:8 Amabou chu vanho phajala, chule twikhanglen kinongho chotpha a chu ahi." 
Job9:9 Aman sahlam valpa, Juheisuhtun, Bombel, chule lhanglam ahsi umna jousehi asem ahi." 
Job9:10 Aman mudohjoulou thillen abolin; simjoulou thil kidangho jong abolin ahi. 
Job9:11 Ven, ama kakom tah-a achen, ahinla kamupoi; chule ama achepeh jengin, ahinla kahekhen theipoi." 
Job9:12 Veuvin, aman akilah mangleh koiham akhamtheija? koiham ajah-a ipi nabol ham tithei dinga?" 
Job9:13 Pathen chun alunghana alahdohji loutengle, mi kiletsahte kithopi ho chu anoija akunjiuve." 
Job9:14 Keiman ijatna lhoma ama kadonbut dingham? chule amatoh kihouna dinga thucheng ijat kaki lhendoh dingham? 
Job9:15 Keima dihlheh jongleng ama donbut pongkating; ahinla keima kathutan dingpa henga taona neijo tange. 
Job9:16 Keiman ama kou ingting, aman eidonbut jongle, aman ka awchu einangai peh-e ti gingcha ponge." 
Job9:17 Ajehchu aman huipi le go kithon keima eisuchipmin, chule ajehbeijin kamaha put apunsahbe-e." 
Job9:18 Aman kahaina kalah ding eiphalpon, ahinla genthei na-in eidipme." 
Job9:19 Keiman hatna thu seijong leng, ven, ama ahatne; chule thutanna tijongleng, koiham thu kasei theina dinga phat eipeding." 
Job9:20 Keima them kichan jongleng, kakam sungin mo-eichan intin; keima kacham kimme tijong leng, hiche jongchun kalhin lelna eiphot chetpeh bepding ahi." 
Job9:21 Keima ana chamkim nama jongleng, kahinna hi hedehpong kating, kahinkhohi nahsahmo bep ingkate." 
Job9:22 Hichehi thilkhat ahi; hijeh-a chu hichehi kasei ahi, aman michamkim pa le mikhang giloupa asumang gele." 
Job9:23 Hitichun phulou helouvin kijepna-in kijeplih jongle, aman themona neiloupa thukitan chu anuisat bepding ahi." 
Job9:24 Leiset hi agiloupa khutna kipedoh ahin, aman thutan ho maichu atoma, hichu ahiloule, hoija, koiba hijaham?" 
Job9:25 Tun kahin nikhohohi thangkouva lhaipa sangin aman gangjon, amaho aphajong muman louvin alengmang jitai." 
Job9:26 Kongho mangang tah-a akitolmang jeljel bangle, mulaopin anehding amat dinga amangan bangin agangin ahi." 
Job9:27 Keiman kakiphin nahi sumiltange, kagihsatna hohi dalhang ting, chuleh keima kilhamon tange titaleng;" 
Job9:28 Keiman kagenthei naho jousehi kakichan, nangman themona beija neikoi deh louding ahi ti kahei." 
Job9:29 Keima mikhang gilou khat kahile, ipijeh-a pannabei ja kakisuhboi ham?" 
Job9:30 Buhbang twijin kisilha jongleng, kakhut hohi hibang tah-in thengkha hih jongle;" 
Job9:31 Hijongleh, nangman kokhuh sunga neiphumlut teijin natin, chule kapon jengtah jonghin eithetbol ding ahi." 
Job9:32 Ajehchu ama kadonbut theiding le, thutan na-a kache khompi theiding, keitobang mihem ahipoi." 
Job9:33 Kachung cheh lhonna akhut lhathei ding, kakahlhona palai dingjong aumpon ahi." 
Job9:34 Aman amol lhon keija konin ladohhen; chule ama kichatna hin eitijatsah dahen; 
Job9:35 Chuteng keiman thu seijing ting ama kichataponge; ahin keima kachuti theipoi. 
Job10:1 Kahinna in kahinkhohi acholpitai; kakiphin naho hi keima chungtah-a ngamingting; kahinna-in lungna tah-in thu seitange. 
Job10:2 Keiman Pathen henga themmo neichan hih-in tinge; Ipijeh-a neilungsat khumham neimusah-in tinge. 
Job10:3 Nakhutna nasemsa hi bolgentheija, nahsahlouva koija, migilou ho kihouna chungjoh salvah dinghi nangma dinga phajo hitam?" 
Job10:4 Tahsa mit tobang naneija? ahiloule mihem thilmu banga nangman jong namuham? 
Job10:5 Nangma hin nikhohi mihem hin nikho tobang ham? nangma hinkho kumho jonghi mihem hin nikho ho tobang hija ham? 
Job10:6 Hiti achu nangman kakhan gitlouna ho nakhol jinga, chule kachonset naho naholjing ham?" 
Job10:7 keima khanggilou kahilou hi nangman nahen; chule nakhutna kona eihuhdoh theija koimacha aumpoi tihi nahei. 
Job10:8 Nakhut tenin einasema, chule kalimhi nasuhto-a neimehtoh ahin; ahijeng vangin nangman neisumang tan ahi." 
Job10:9 Geldoh in, nahenga kangeh ahi, nangman bonngan banga neisem ahin, chule leivui neisokit ding hitam?" 
Job10:10 Nangman bongnoi banga neisunlhah hilou ham? chule bongnoiha banga neihatsah hilou ham? 
Job10:11 Nangman vunle phen neitomin, chule gule thaguijin neikan chah-in ahi." 
Job10:12 Nangman hinkhole panpina chu neipen; chule neivil jingna chun kalhagao aching tupmin ahi. 
Job10:13 Chule hiche thilhohi nalungsunga naselin; hichehi nangma-ah aume ti kahei. 
Job10:14 Keima kachonsetle nangman neimelchih-in, chule nangman kakhan setna jong don louvin neikoipoi." 
Job10:15 Keima mikhangilou kanahile, ohe ada chu kahi! chule midih ana hijongleng khodah pong kate. Keima kiboina-in kadimtan; hijeh chun kahesohnahi hungvetan." 
Job10:16 Ajehchu hichehi apungcheh tai. Nangman keipi bahkai hangtah bangin neidelin, chule nangman kachunga kidang tah-in nakitahlang kitnin ahi." 
Job10:17 Nangman keima douna-in hettohsahna athah-in napodoh-in; chule kachunga nalunghanna napunbe sahsah-in; kikhelna le galkisat hi keimato aumkhom jinge. 
Job10:18 Ipijeh-a chu naobu-a kona chu neihinpuidoh hitam? Ohe, kalhagao chu kanalha hihen, mit khatchan jong einamu da hitale!" 
Job10:19 Keima ana umkhalou tobang hitadinga, naobu-a kona lhankhuh-a eikipo tading ahi." 
Job10:20 Kanikho hi lhomcha hitalou ham? themkhat beh jong lungmonga kaum theina dingin, khongai jinlang, neichang lhatan." 
Job10:21 Kilekit lounading mun, muthim gamle, thina le-lim gama kache masangin;" 
Job10:22 Muthim gam, athima thim, chule thina le-lim, thupeh umtalou; chule vah jong muthim banga athim namun ahi." 
Job11:1 Chujouvin Naamath mi Zophar chun adonbutnin, hitin aseije," 
Job11:2 Thu hijatpihi donbut louva umthei dingham? chule mihem khatchu thusei tamjeh-a them kichanthei dingham? 
Job11:3 Najou hohin miho asuhthip thei dingham? mi i-sah louva nabol tengle koiman eijumso ponte natiham? 
Job11:4 Ajehchu nangman kathuhil hi athenge, chule namitmuva kangime natin ahi." 
Job11:5 Ahinla, oh! Pathen'in thu seihen lang, chule nangma douna-in akam kataleh;" 
Job11:6 Chutengle aman akisei chihna thuguh ho chu nangma namusah intin, hicheho chu hiche aumsa sanga hi achan ni-a tama ahin, Pathen'in nakhanset jala nathoh dingdol sanga lhomjo nachunga angeh ahi hi kihetnin." 
Job11:7 Nangman Pathen chu nahol vanga namudoh theiham? hat chungnung chu chamkim keija naholdoh thei dingham? 
Job11:8 Hichehi van banga sanga ahin, ipi nalo theiding ham? thikholkhul sanga thuhjo ahin, ipi nahetjou dingham?" 
Job11:9 Atena chu leiset sanga saojo ahin, chule twikhanglen sanga jaojo ahi." 
Job11:10 Aman tanbong hen, chule khahchah hen, ahiloule khomtup henlang hile koiham ama sutang jouding?" 
Job11:11 Ajehchu aman pannabei miho chu ahen; aman khan gitlounaho jongchu amunai; chuti ahileh aman hichu angaito louding ham? 
Job11:12 Ajehchu gamlah sangan nou bangin mihem chu peng tajongle, pannabei mihem chu hungching ding ahi." 
Job11:13 Nangman nalungsung chu nagot tupma, nakhut teni-a ahenglam nasan dinga ahileh;" 
Job11:14 khansetna chu nakhutna auma ahile, gamlatah-a koimangin, chule khan gitlouna chu naponbuh sunga chensah hih-in." 
Job11:15 Chutengle nolna umlouvin namai dadohsah-in natin; chule kichalouva nadindet ding ahitai. 
Job11:16 Ajehchu nangman nathohgimna chu suhmilin natin, chule akitol mangsa twiho banga nagelding ahitai." 
Job11:17 Chule nahinkho hi sunlai sanga thengjoding, nangman navah nasodoh-a, jingkah toh nabahding ahi." 
Job11:18 Chule nangma huhtupma naum ding ahi, ajehchu hichea chun kinepna aumtan; henge, nangman nachung chang nakikhol ding; chule kihuhtupna mun'a nangma nacholngah ding ahi." 
Job11:19 Chule nangma lummin natin, koimachan nakichat sah tah louding, hiteng chule mitam tah-in nahenga ngehna anei diu ahitai." 
Job11:20 Ahinla mikhangilou ho mitvang chu losam ding, chule amaho hoidoh loudiu; chule akinepna chu alhagaovu lhadoh ding bou ahi." 
Job12:1 Chuin Job'in adonbutnin, aseije." 
Job12:2 Tahsanlel beihela nanghohi mipi chu nahiu ahitan, chule chihna toh nathitha diu ahi." 
Job12:3 Ahinla keiman jong nangho bangin hetna kaneije, keima nangho sanga noinungjo deh kahipon; hiche hohi ahelou koi umem?" 
Job12:4 Keimahi Pathen kou-a amanjong ana donbutji, aheng akomaho i-sahlou mikhat tobang kahitan; midihtah nolnabei chu mi nuisatle ki-dah in aumtai." 
Job12:5 Alhudinga kigosa umpa chu nomsa tah-a umpan alunga adeilou thaomei tobang ahi. 
Job12:6 Gucha michomho ponbuh sungchu akhangtouvin, chule Pathen sulunghang ho jong huhtup in aumun; akhutnu Pathen'in apeneng chetnin ahi." 
Job12:7 Ahinla tun gamsaho khu dongun, chuteng amahon nahil untin; chule chunga leng vachaho jongkhu dongun, amahon naseipeh dingu ahi." 
Job12:8 Ahiloule leiset koma seijin, aman nahil intin, chule twikhanglen'a nga hon nahenga aphondoh diu ahi." 
Job12:9 Hichehi Pakai khutnin atoh ahin, hicheng jouse-a kona hetheilou koiham?" 
Job12:10 Ama khutna ahingthei jouse hinna aumin; chule mihem jouse haina hu aumme. 
Job12:11 Nakhangin thu jahding agotna, chule kammin a-anneh atepkhahji louham?" 
Job12:12 Khanglui mite henga chihna aumin; chule hinkho sotna-a hetkhenna aume. 
Job12:13 Chihna le thahatna amatoh umkhom ahin, aman thumop le hetkhenthem theina aneije." 
Job12:14 Ven, aman aphelhan, akisadohkit theitapoi; aman mi akhakhumjin, chule akihongdoh kit theiji tapoi." 
Job12:15 Ven, aman twiho atingin ahile ago gamtaovin; chule aman hicheho chu ahinsol doh-in ahile, amahon leiset achup jengun ahi." 
Job12:16 Chihna thahatna chu amatoh auma ahin, akilhem lhapa le alhem lhapa chu ama-a ahi." 
Job12:17 Aman thumopthem ho chu achomgamjin, chule thutan ho chu mingol jeng asojitai." 
Job12:18 Aman lengho kikanna alhaplhah pehjin, chule konggah-in akongu agahpehjin ahi." 
Job12:19 Aman pipuiho chu galthil kichom bangin apuimangjin, chule amihatteu chu asumangjin ahi." 
Job12:20 Aman ginchat theitahpa thusei chu atolmangin, chule tehse ho hetkhen themna jongchu alahmang pehjin ahi." 
Job12:21 Aman vaipoho chunga i-sah louna abunglhajin, chule mihatpa thahat chu alhahsam sahjin ahi." 
Job12:22 Aman muthim lah-a thil kiselguh ho chu ahedohjin, chule thina le-lim chu vah-a ahin puidohjin ahi." 
Job12:23 Aman namho apunsah-in chule asumangjin; namho chu asulenin chule apuijang kitjin ahi. 
Job12:24 Aman leiset mihemte alamkaipao lungthim chu alahmang pehjin, amahochu lampi umlouna gamthip laija chun avamahthah sahjin ahi." 
Job12:25 Amaho chu vah beijin muthim lah-a chun akimailele jiuvin; chule aman amaho chu pasal jukham bangin avalon lelesah jin ahi. 
Job13:1 Veuvin kamit tah-in hicheng jousehi amukhanai, kanakhangin ajan, chule hichu kahekhen tan ahi." 
Job13:2 Ipi nahetnum, hiche jengjong chu keiman kahei, keima nangho sanga noinungjo deh kahipon ahi." 
Job13:3 Tahbeh-in keiman hat chungnung hengah seijing ting, chule Pathen toh ngaito khomding kadeijin ahi." 
Job13:4 Ahin nangho jouthu bolho nahiuvin, nabonchao vin manlutna neilou louthem nahiuve." 
Job13:5 Oh, nanghohi thipbeh-in umthei tave leuchun! hichu nachihnao hiding ahi." 
Job13:6 Tun kalung ngaitohi ngaijun, chule kakam sunga kataonahi neingaipeh-un." 
Job13:7 Nanghon Pathen dinga gitlou na-a thu nasei dingu ham? chule amadinga lheplhahna thua nakihou dingu ham? 
Job13:8 Nanghon amachu nasan dingu ham? nanghon Pathen dinga nelkalna nanei dingu ham? 
Job13:9 Aman nangho naholdoh diuhi pha hinam? ahiloule mikhatnin michom dangkhat anelpeh banga, nanghon ama hitia chu nanelpeh dingu ham?" 
Job13:10 Nanghon guhthima miho nasan ule, aman nangho napho teidingu ahi." 
Job13:11 Chungnunna hin nangho natijat sah loudingu ham? chule ama ginna hi nachung uva chulouding ham? 
Job13:12 Na kigeldohna jouseu chu vutvai tobangbou ahi, natahsao jong leingan tobang ahi." 
Job13:13 Nangho thipbeh un, thu kasei theina dingin neichang lhaovin, kachunga ipi hunglhung ding hijongle hunglhung hen," 
Job13:14 Ipijeh-a kaha-a kasa hi kaketlhah-a, kahinkhohi kakhutna kakoi dingham?" 
Job13:15 Aman eithat jongle katahsan jingding, ahin ama angsunga kalampihi katuhdet jingding ahi." 
Job13:16 Ama kahuh hingna jong hiding ahi; ajehchu miphalhem koimacha a-anga lutlou ding ahi. 
Job13:17 Kathuseihi phatechan ngai phaovin, chule kaphondoh hi nanakhangun ngaijun." 
Job13:18 Tun veuvin, kathuhi kagong tuptai; keima them eiki chanding ahi ti kakihetne." 
Job13:19 Keima eiseihu ding koiham? ajehchu tun keima thiptaleng kalhagao kalhadoh ding ahitai. 
Job13:20 Kadingin thilni sehseh hi boldan, chutengle nangma-a konin keima kiselmang taponge." 
Job13:21 Keija konin gamlatah-in nakhut lamangin, chule natijat na-in neikichat sah hih-in." 
Job13:22 Chutengle nangman neikouvin, keiman donbut nange, ahiloule keiman seijing ting chule neidonbut in." 
Job13:23 Kachonsetna le kakhan gitlounaho hi ijatloma tama hitam? Kasuh khelnale kachonsetna hohi neihetsah-in. 
Job13:24 Ipijeh-a namai nasela, namelma-a neingaito ham?" 
Job13:25 Nangin suhle touva huijin alhohle thingna chu nahe ngem ding ham? Chule chang kung gosa nadel lele ding ham? 
Job13:26 Ajehchu nangman keima douna-in thilse tah najih-in, chule kakhang donlaija khangitlouna jouse chu neichansah tai." 
Job13:27 Nangman kakeng jong thinghom sung ho-a nakoijin; chule kalamlhah ho jouse hoitah-in navejingin, nangin kakengto teni-a din teptena nakoijin ahi." 
Job13:28 Chule keima thil monsa tobang kahin, ngetnin aneh chaisa ponse tobang kahi." 
Job14:1 Numeija hung penga mihem hinkho hi nichomcha bou ahin, chule lungkham nan adimsetne." 
Job14:2 Pahcha bangin ahung pahdoh jin, chule akisat tan jitai; ama nilim kihei bangin alhaijin, atangden jitai." 
Job14:3 Hitobang bep mi khat hi nangin namit lhuh jinga, chule nahenga thu kitan dinga neipui lutjiham?" 
Job14:4 Kon thilthenglou lah-a kona thiltheng alahdoh theijem? koima cha aumpoi. 
Job14:5 Ama hin nikho hi tepsa ahin, ahinkho lha ho jong nangkoma umah ahin? aman akhokhel louna din nangin agamgi nasempeh-in;" 
Job14:6 Thalah tobang ahin nikho hi, aman lhumkah-a acholdo theina din, ama-a konin kiheimangin." 
Job14:7 Ajehchu thingphung khat chu kiphuh lhu jongle, ajih ahung dondoh kitding le, chule hiche abah kisepthah chu atanden louding kinepna aneijin ahi."
