Job14:8 Ajung chu leinoi'a motgam henlang, aphungbul chu leinoi'a thi jongle;" 
Job14:9 Twija konin hichu hung mumdoh kitnintin, chule thingphung banga abah ahinsepdoh nahlai ding ahi." 
Job14:10 Ahin mihem athin, manthei louvin paimang ahijitai: henge, mihemin alhagao alhajin, hoija umji-a hitam?" 
Job14:11 Twipia kona twiho alhahsam bangle, twisoh lai akana agot jeng bangin;" 
Job14:12 Hitichun mihem chu a-imu miljin, athoudohji tapoi; vanho jouse abeito kahse-a amaho khang taloudiu, alupnaova kona thou jong thou taloudiu ahitai." 
Job14:13 O nangin nalungsatna abeikah-a guh thima neikoija, lhan khuh sunga hi neisel ding hija; nangin keija dinga phat khat neitep peh-a, chule neigeldoh kit ding hitavele!" 
Job14:14 Mihem khat athile ahingkit dem? kakikhelna ding nikho ahung lhun kah-a, keiman eikiteppeh phat nikho ho chu kanga ding ahi." 
Job14:15 Nangman neikouvin natin, keima kahou ding; nangman nakhutsem chunga hi ngaichat nahin neiding ahi." 
Job14:16 Ajehchu tun nangin kakalse jat nasima; chule kachonsetna hi navet lhih jing hilouham? 
Job14:17 Kasuhkhelna hi sakhao sunga khumtupmin aumin, chule kakhan gitlouna nangin nakhui chahjin ahi." 
Job14:18 Chule thonlou hella molsang hung chimma ahal halla mang ding, chule songpi chu aumna-a kona kitoldoh ding ahi." 
Job14:19 Twijin song ho alhoh mangin; nangin leivui lah-a kona hung kehdoh thil jouse chu twijin nasumangin, chule mihem kinepna chu nasumang tan ahi." 
Job14:20 Nangin ama a-imatih-a din najouvin, ama achetai; nangin amaiso nakhel peh-in chule nasolmangtan ahi." 
Job14:21 Achapate chu jabolna pedin ahungun, ahin aman hichu ahetapoi; amaho suhnemin aumtaovin, ahin aman amaho ageldoh tapon ahi." 
Job14:22 Ahinla atahsa chun natna athoh ding, chule ama-a um hinna chun pul adou ding ahi." 
Job15:1 Chujouvin Teman mi Eliphaz'in adonbutnin, aseije," 
Job15:2 Michingin pannabei thu aseidohjia, chule solam huija asung asuhdim ji-em?" 
Job15:3 Aman phatchomna umlou thu kisei chu anel ding ham? ahiloule thilpha bolna theilou thu aseiding ham? 
Job15:4 Ahi, nangin kichatna napaimangin, chule Pathen anga taona nasutange." 
Job15:5 Ajehchu nakamin nakhangit louna aphondoh-a, chule doha lheplhahna lei chu nakilhen ahitai." 
Job15:6 Nakamin nangma themmo nachan ahin, keima kahipoi; henge, namuh-in nangma dounan thu ahettohsah-in ahi." 
Job15:7 Ana peng masapenah mihem chu nangma nahim? ahiloule mol le lhangho masanga ana kisema chu nangma nahim? 
Job15:8 Nangin Pathen thuguh chu najahkhah am? chule chihna hi nangma sehseh-in naneija nangaito ham? 
Job15:9 Keihon kahet louvu nangin ipi nahet em? keiho-a umlou nangin ipi hetthemna naneijem? 
Job15:10 Kalah uvah napa sanga gamchenga upajo, lukangle, tehsejo a-umui." 
Job15:11 Pathen'a kona lhamona hohi nadinga thilneo ham? nadinga aguh-a um thil ipi umem? 
Job15:12 Ipi dinga nalungin nangma napuimang hitam? chule namit nin ipi aphet lhap lhap piham? 
Job15:13 Hitia chu nalhagao Pathen douna-a naleheija, chule nakama kona hitobang thuho hi naso dohsah hitam?" 
Job15:14 Mihem chu ipi hija theng tei ding hija ham? numeija kona penga chu chonpha teiding hija ham? 
Job15:15 Veovin, aman amithengte lah-a tahsana akoipoi; henge, ama mitmun van ho jong atheng pouvin ahi." 
Job15:16 Khan gitlouna twi banga donna mihem hi, ichanna lenjo-a thet umle theng lou jocheh-a hitam?" 
Job15:17 Ngaijin, keiman navetsah-inge; chule kamu tah chu kaphon doh ding ahin;" 
Job15:18 Miching hon apateova kona anaseiju, chule aselmang louvu;" 
Job15:19 Hitobang miho henga bou chun leiset hi anakipen, gamchom mi alah uva vahlea aumpoi." 
Job15:20 Mi khang gilou chun ahinkho lhum keijin natna athoh-in, chule ahinkho kum jat chu misugenthei pa-a akiselin ahi." 
Job15:21 Tijat umtah awgin chu anakhanga agingin; aphatthei laitahle mi sumangpa achunga hung lhung ding ahi. 
Job15:22 Muthima kona kiledoh ding kahi ti aman atahsan joupon, aman alouna ding chemjam chu angah-in ahi." 
Job15:23 Ama an holnan avah kimvelin, hoija uma hitam? atin, thimjin nikho gotsa chu ahungnai tai, ti ahen ahi." 
Job15:24 Lungkhamna le lung genthei na-in ama akichatsah ding; leng khat galsat dinga akigot banga, amahon ama ajokhupdio ahi." 
Job15:25 Ajehchu aman akhut Pathen dounan alhangdoh-in, hat chungnung pen douna-in amale ama aki suhatnin," 
Job15:26 Ama, ama chungle angong chang chung gei, chule alum satah ho chunga chun alhailen ahi." 
Job15:27 Ajehchu aman amai chu athaovin atomin, ataija chun athao akikhol khome." 
Job15:28 Suhmanga umdinga gotsa, koimacha chen khah louna, khopi kamhelsa-a um inho-a chun ama achengin ahi." 
Job15:29 Ama haodoh lou ding, anei agou jong umjing lou ding, aman leisetna hiche ho-a chu ninglhinna aneisot lou ding ahi." 
Job15:30 Ama muthima kona potdoh talou ding; meikongin abahho chu aleo got ding, chule akama ahaina hu-a chu ama jammang ding ahi." 
Job15:31 Ama chu ahomkeo tahsan dinga kilhemlha-a hihih hen; ajehchu ama kilethuhna ding chu ahomkeo ahibouve. 
Job15:32 Hiche hi ama phat masanga kisu bulhit ding, chuleh ama bah chu ana hing lou ding ahi." 
Job15:33 Aman lengpithei banga amin lou agaho chu aholhah ding, chule apah chu olive banga apaidoh ding ahi." 
Job15:34 Ajehchu miphalhem kikhomho chu kamhel ding, nehguhna houbuh chu meija kisumang ding ahi." 
Job15:35 Amahon thilphalou naovop in avopmun, ahomkeo ahungsoh-in, lheplhahna chu a-oijuva akigongjin ahi." 
Job16:1 chuin Job'in adonbutnin, aseije," 
Job16:2 Keiman hitobang thil ho tamtah kajai, mi sugenthei dinga lhamon sah-a panga chu nangho nahiuve." 
Job16:3 Pannabei thuho hin akichaina aneijem? ahiloule ipin nasuh thouva hitia chu nadonbut ham? 
Job16:4 Nahinnao hi keima hinna khela hinga hileh, kenjong nangho bangin kaseithei ding ahin; nangho douna-a thuho kasei doh ding, chule kalu hi kathin khum ding nahiuve." 
Job16:5 Ahin kakamin nangho suhatning ting, kakama kona pot thu chun nahahsat nao angaijang ding ahi." 
Job16:6 Keiman seijong leng kahesohna hi oldom dehponte, chule keiman thoh thoh jong leng ipiham kanopna ding?" 
Job16:7 Ahin, tun aman eithacholsah ahitan, nangin kagol kapai ho jouse nasuh kamhel ahitai." 
Job16:8 Chule keima douna-a hettohsah din nangman kapuma tivoijin neikoijin; chule kamaija hettohsahna hidin, katahsa agong lhan ahi." 
Job16:9 Aman alung hanna-a eibottelin, keima eihotai; aman kachunga aha eigel khumin; kamelman mitsal tengin eive-e." 
Job16:10 Amahon kachunga akamu lentah-in akah-un; isahlou tah-in kabengphe abengun; keima dounan amaho akikhom khomun ahi. 
Job16:11 Pathen'in ama ngaisah lou mite henga eipedoh-in, khang giloute khutna eipaidoh tan ahi." 
Job16:12 Keima nom-in kana umin, ahin aman ahal halin eisuchiptan; aman kalollin jong eimanin, eithingin, ama bidoija din eitungdoh-e." 
Job16:13 Athal kap hon eium kimvelun, aman kakalteni khenlouhellin asukhenin; kathinkha tolla asung lhan ahi." 
Job16:14 Aman setna chunga setna-in eisusetan, kachunga milen mihat tah bangin alhailen ahi." 
Job16:15 Katahsa vou chunga hin khaodip pon kakikhun, chule leivui lah-a hin kaki asuboh tai." 
Job16:16 Kamai hi kaka kanan asan dohtan, kamitgeiho hi thina le-lim alange." 
Job16:17 Kakhut tenihi thildihlou imacha-a din kamangpon; kataona jong hi atheng ahi. 
Job16:18 Vo leiset, nangin kathisan hi vuhmang hih-in, chuleh kaka nahin mun neihih hen." 
Job16:19 Chujongle tun, veuvin, keima hettohsahna chu van'a aume, chuleh kathu kichinna bu chu chungsanga aume." 
Job16:20 Kagol tehon nasahmon eibolun; ahinla kamit lhihi Pathen heng lama along jinge. 
Job16:21 Mihem khat a-inheng dinga atao bangin, mihem khat dinga mikhat Pathen'a taopeh ding uma hile o!" 
Job16:22 Kum phabep ahung lhunteng, hung kile kit lounading mun'a chu keima kache ding ahitai." 
Job17:1 Kahaina hi akemtan; kahin nikho hojong alhasuhtan, keima dinga lhan khuh ho chu gotsa ahitai." 
Job17:2 Mi nelpeh ho chu kakoma um hilou ham? ami phin lunghang nao hi kamitnin avet lhih jing hilou ham? 
Job17:3 Tun, keima nanga dinga kitepna khat nin nei umsah-in; keima to kikhutsan ding chu koiham?" 
Job17:4 Ajeh chu nangman alung thimu chu hetthem theina-a konin nasel mangpeh-in; hijeh-a chu amaho nachoisang louding ahi. 
Job17:5 Agol apaiho henga pachat lhem thuseipa chu, achate mit ngeijong khomulouva umding ahi." 
Job17:6 Mite seichah thei din jong aman eisem dohtan; chule phat masalaija chu min achil aset khum mi tobang kana hi. 
Job17:7 Kahesoh na jeh in kamit jong hi athimin, katibah hojong nilim kihei abangtan ahi." 
Job17:8 Milungdih hochun hiche hi kidang saovintin, themona neilou michu miphalhem dounan amale ama kitildoh inte." 
Job17:9 Michonphan alampi jong kituh chah intin, chule akhutho thengsella umsah jingpa chu hatcheh cheh ding ahi." 
Job17:10 Ahin nangho jouse vang, tun hungkile kitnun lang, hungun,; ajeh chu keiman nalah uva hin miching khat jong kamu doh joupoi." 
Job17:11 Kahin nikhoho achetan, kathil gon hole kalunga kagelho jeng jong abonin achavaitai." 
Job17:12 Hicheho chun jan chu sun aso-un; muthim jeh-in khovah achome. 
Job17:13 Keiman ngah taleng, lhankhuh chu ka-in ahitan; ka jalkhun chu muthim lah-a kakisemtan ahi." 
Job17:14 Keiman monmang thei jah-a chun, nangma kapa nahi; lung jah-a chun, nangma kanule kasopinu chu nahi, kati." 
Job17:15 Achutile tu-a kakinepna chu hoija umtam? kakinepna vangchu kon amuding hitam? 
Job17:16 Leivui toh kichoh halla kicholdo kahung hitenguleh, amaho aki khahtup kotong lam jona chu chesuh ding ahiuve." 
Job18:1 Chujouvin Shuh mi Bildad nin adonbutnin, aseije," 
Job18:2 Thuho nachaina ding chu itih chan hiding ham? melchih-in, chujouteng keihon seijuvinge." 
Job18:3 Ipijeh-a keiho gamsa-a eiki simuva, chule namitmu-a man mo-a eikigelu ham?" 
Job18:4 Alung hanna-a amale ama kimal teljia; nang dinga leiset hi kidalha ding ham? chule songpi chu aumna-a kona kichondoh ding ham? 
Job18:5 Henge, mi khang gilou meivah chu kisumit ding, chule ameikonga meisi chu vahdoh louding ahi." 
Job18:6 Ahoubuh sunga meivah chu thimding, chule athaomei chu ama puma kisuhmit thading ahi." 
Job18:7 Athahat lai kalsena ho chu kisu chom ding, amatah thumopna chun ama asotlhah ding ahi." 
Job18:8 Ajeh chu amatah kengchun ama lenthang sunga akhumlutna, chule ama thang kikam chunga vahlea ahi." 
Job18:9 Thangin akhotal jum-a akhi khah ding, chule gucha michompa chun ama ajo ding ahi." 
Job18:10 Ama dinga thang kikam chu leinoi'a akivuijin, athangchu lampia akidoi." 
Job18:11 Tijatna hon ning jouse-a ama akichatsah ding, akeng geija ahin no ding ahi." 
Job18:12 Athahatna chu gilkel thohna hung hintin, chule manthah na chu ama-a gotsa hiding ahi." 
Job18:13 Hichun atichung vun thaneina chu aval lhum ding; thina peng masapen ngeichun athahatna avallhum ding ahi. 
Job18:14 Ama thil tahsana chu a houbuh sunga kona kila dohding, hichun ama tijat umtah lengpa henga ahin lhut ding ahi." 
Job18:15 Hichu ama houbuh sunga hung cheng inte, ajeh chu ama-a khatcha ahitapoi; ama chena chunga chu meile kaat kithejal ding ahi." 
Job18:16 Ajung ho chu noilanga gopgamin tin, chule chung langa abah chu kisat lha ding ahi." 
Job18:17 Ama kigeldoh jingna chu leisetna kona mangding, chule aman khopi lamlena min kiphah pohna aneilou ding ahitai." 
Job18:18 Ama khovah-a konin muthim lah-a nodoh-in umintin, chule vannoi'a kona kideldoh hiding ahi." 
Job18:19 Aman amite lah-a achapa le asopiten ahin chapate aneilou ding, chujongle achena sung ho-a ahinga um umlou ding ahi." 
Job18:20 Ana che masa hon tijatna ana nei banguva, ama nunga hung ho chu ama nikho nileh kidang asah diu ahi." 
Job18:21 Tahbeh-a hitobang hi mi khang gilouho chena chu ahin, chule hiche hi Pathen hepha louho mun chu ahi." 
Job19:1 Chuin Job'in adonbutnin, aseije:" 
Job19:2 Nanghon itihchan kahina hi nasuhgenthei uva, chule thua ahal hala suhchip ding neigotnu hitam?" 
Job19:3 Hiche somvei jenhi i-sah louvin neibolun; kahenga hetkhah lou mibanga nachonu hi jachatnan naneipouvin ahi. 
Job19:4 Chule bolkhel kanei hijeng jongle, kadihlouna chu keima-a umding ahi." 
Job19:5 Tahbeh-a keidouna-a nangho kichoisang nahiule, i-sah louva eikibol nahi keima douna-a nelkalna mang nahiule;" 
Job19:6 Tun heovin, Pathen'in keima eisot lhah ahitan, chule alen thang chun eiumkivel ahitai." 
Job19:7 Veovin, keiman dihlou na-a konin kasamin, ahin eikijah peh tapoi; hatah-in kasamin, ahinla thutana ima aumpoi." 
Job19:8 Keima kache thei louna din, aman kalamlhah na-ah pal agenin, chule kalam lhahna-a thim ajin sah-in ahi." 
Job19:9 Aman kaloupina eiho lhah peh-in, chule kalua konin lallukhuh aladoh-in ahi." 
Job19:10 Aman keima lam jouse-a eisumang tan, keima akichai kahitai, chule aman kakinepna hi thingphung banga abodoh ahitai." 
Job19:11 Aman keima dounan alungsatna jong akoudoh sah-in, chule amelma holah-a khat bangin eisimtai." 
Job19:12 Agalsat mite ahung khomun, keima douna din lampi akisemun, chule kahoubuh kimvela gebuh akisonun ahi." 
Job19:13 Aman kasopite keija konin gamlatah-in akoijin, chule keima kimel hetpi hojong tahbeh-a keija kona achoma umdoh ahitaove." 
Job19:14 Ka-in kote alosamtan, chule kaki ngailutpi gol le paihon eisumil taovin ahi." 
Job19:15 Keima in'a cheng mite le kasoh numei hon gamchom min eisim taovin; amitmu uvin gamchom mi kahitai. 
Job19:16 Keiman kasohpa kakouvin, ahin aman eidonbutpon; kakam tah-in ahenga kataovin ahi." 
Job19:17 Kahaina hu hi ka-inneipi-a dingin ajatchom tan, ka-insungmite dinga jong deimo-um kahitai." 
Job19:18 Ahi, khangdong chapanghon i-sah louvin eibolun; kakipatdoh in ahile, keidouna thu aseijun ahi." 
Job19:19 Kaki ngailutpi tah golle paihon eihot bolun; kangailut ho chu keima douvin apang taovin ahi. 
Job19:20 Kagu hi kavunle kaphe toh akikamat tan, keima kahani vun sehseh toh hoidoh kahi." 
Job19:21 O nangho kagol kapaiten neilungset nun, neilungsetnun; ajeh chu Pathen khut chun eitong khatan ahi." 
Job19:22 Ipi dinga Pathen'in eibol genthei banga nanghon neibol genthei uva, katahsa thoh nahohi phaset nasah loulai uham?" 
Job19:23 Ohe, tun kathu hohi sutlutnin umtavele! Ohe, hiho chu lekhabua kitat doh-a hita vele!" 
Job19:24 Hiho chu thih lekhabu sutna mol chule ngenin songpi chunga, a-itih-a dinga kigeitong hitavele!" 
Job19:25 Ajeh chu eilhatdohpa chu ahingin, chule ninunung lamle leiset chunga hung ding ding ahi, ti kahei." 
Job19:26 Chule kavun bannin hiche katahsa hi lunghon ne manghel jeng jongleu, katahsa tah-a Pathen chu kamu ding ahi." 
Job19:27 Kasunga kalung thimgil jun manghel tajongle, keima-a dinga ama chu kamu ding, chule kamit teni-a kavet ding, adang ima kamulou ding ahi." 
Job19:28 Ajehchu keija thiljouse bul akimudoh chu namudiu ipidinga eihon ama isuh genthei diuham? nati diu ahi. 
Job19:29 Chemjam chu nanghon kichaovin; ajeh chu thutana aume ti nahet theina dinguva, lung hana chun gimbolna chemjam ahin lhut ding ahi." 
Job20:1 Chuin Naamath mi Zophar'in adonbutnin, aseije;" 
Job20:2 Hijeh chun kalunggel hohin eidonbut sah-in, hiche thua ka kinon ahi." 
Job20:3 Keima ima eikisahlouna thu kajan, kahetthem theina lhagao chun donbutnin eitin ahi." 
Job20:4 Leiset chunga mihem aki koija pat, nangman hiche thului hi nahetlou ham?" 
Job20:5 Hitia chu migilou kichoisang na hi chomcha bou ahin, chule miphalhem kipana jong mitphetkah bou hilou ham?" 
Job20:6 Alul nachun vanho chan pha henlang, aluchun meibol ho lah phajongle;" 
Job20:7 Ama a-imatih chana a-eh banga mangthah ding; ama anamu kha-a miho chun, ama hoija um hitam? atidiu ahi." 
Job20:8 Ama mang banga leng manga, kimudoh lou ding ahitan; jana gaothilmu banga ama delmanga umding ahi." 
Job20:9 Ama anamua mit jong chun ama amukit tah louding; chujongle ama ana-umna mun jong chun ama amukit lou ding ahitai. 
Job20:10 Achaten mivaicha lunglhaina ding hin holuntin, chule akhutnin athilhou alepeh kitding ahi." 
Job20:11 Aguho chu akhang dong laija chonsetna adimin, hiche chu amato leivui lah-a luptha ding ahi." 
Job20:12 Gitlouna chu a akam sunga lhumlheh henlang, aman hichu alei noija seljongle;" 
Job20:13 Aman hichu khendoh hen, chule notthap dahen, akamsunga chuti koiden tajongle;" 
Job20:14 A-oija um anchu akikhelin, asungah gulse thinkha asohtan ahi." 
Job20:15 Aman haonaho aval lutnin, chule ahin lohdoh kit ding; Pathen'in a-oija kona ahin paidoh ding ahi." 
Job20:16 Aman gulseho gu achepding; gulse leijin ama atha ding ahi. 
Job20:17 Aman vadungho le twisohho, khoiju le bongnoi lona vachadung ho amulou ding ahitai." 
Job20:18 Aman acholna man alepehdoh kitna, chule hichu aman aval lhum louding; athil nei dungjuija alepeh kitna jong hiding, aman hichea chu lung lhaina anei louding ahi." 
Job20:19 Ajeh chu aman mivaicha agotchepmin, anungsunin; chule aman asahdoh hilou in chu pumhatnin alapeh-in ahi." 
Job20:20 Thonlou hella aman asunga damna aneilou ding, chule angaichat ho imacha ahuhdoh jou louding ahi." 
Job20:21 A-anneh na-a amoh kidalha khatcha umlou ding; hijeh-a chu koiman aphatna amulouding ahitai. 
Job20:22 Aninglhina pentah chun ama agentheisah ding, khang gilou ho khut jouse chu achunga hung chuding ahi." 
Job20:23 A-oipoh suhdim ding agot petle, Pathen'in alungsatna chu achunga ahin selhah-a, a-anneh laitah leh hichu achunga go banga julha ding ahi." 
Job20:24 Ama thih-a kisem manchah-a kona jam ding, chule thihtah-a kisem thal chun ama asut pailet ding ahi." 
Job20:25 Akiloidoh-in, atahsa-a kon chun ahung dohtan ahi; ahi, chemjam val lahlah chu athinkha-a konin ahung doh-in; tijat umtah ho chu achunga achutai." 
Job20:26 Muthim jouse chu guthim muna selmanga umding; huijin asemmit joulou meikongin akah vamding; aponbuh sunga kidalha chu ama dinga natna hiding ahi. 
Job20:27 Van'in ama khangitlouna chu hin phongdoh-in tin; chule leiset chu ama dou dinga hung thoudoh ding ahi. 
Job20:28 A-insung khantouna chun adalhah ding, chule athilkeo ho chu Ama lungsatna nikhole long mang ding ahitai." 
Job20:29 Hiche hi migilou pa chanding Pathen'a kon chu ahin, chule Pathen'in ateppeh goulo chu ahitan ahi." 
Job21:1 Ahinla Job'in adonbutnin, aseije:" 
Job21:2 Kathusei hi lunglut tah-in ngaijun, chule hiche hi nangho kilhamona hihen." 
Job21:3 Keiman kasei theina din thoh hamham tadiuvin; chule kasei chai tengle nei nelpeh naovin nate. 
Job21:4 Keima vang, kakiphina hi mihem lama ham? chuti chu hia ahile, ipi dinga kalhagao suhboija umlou ding ham?" 
Job21:5 Neimel chih unlang kidang saovin, chule nakhut nun nakam simun." 
Job21:6 Keiman kageldoh teng jongle kati ajan, chule katahsa hi akithing jin ahi." 
Job21:7 Ipi dinga migilouhi hing jinga, hung tehji-a; chule thahat thaneitah hijiuva ham?" 
Job21:8 Achateu chu amaho mitmu tah-in amaho toh phudoh than aumin, chule achilhahteu chu amaho maikoh-a phudoh-in aume." 
Job21:9 A-in hou chu kichatna-a konin ahoidoh-in, achunguva Pathen lungsatna moljong achujipon ahi." 
Job21:10 Abongchal houvin anou ahinsah-un, athona aumpon; abongpiu houvin anou ahingun, anou adalha khapon ahi." 
Job21:11 Amahon achateu chu ganchahon bangin asoldoh jiuvin, acha teo alam alam jiuvin ahi." 
Job21:12 Amahon khongcha le selangdah akichoijun, tumging kitumgin na-a chun akipah-un ahi." 
Job21:13 Amahon ahin nikhou chu haosatnan amang jiuvin, chom louvin lhan khuh-a achesuh ji taove." 
Job21:14 Hijeh chun amahon Pathen henga, keiho-a konin potdoh tan; ajeh chu nalampi ho hetkhen theina chu keihon kangaicha pouve, atiuve." 
Job21:15 Keihon kajendiu Hat chungnung amachu ipiham? Keiho ahenga kataovule ipi phatchomna kanei diuham? 
Job21:16 Veovin, athilu chu akhutnuva aumpon; migilou thumopna chu keija konin gamla tah-in aumin ahi." 
Job21:17 Mikhang gilou thaomei chu ichana kimutmit matchet jinga hitam! chule amanthahna chu achunguva ichana lhung matchet hitam! Pathen'in alungsatna-a lung gentheina hi ahom dohjie. 
Job21:18 Amaho huipi masanga chang kong gosa tobang ahiuvin, chule hui leh gon apohmang changsi tobang ahiuve." 
Job21:19 Pathen'in amapa khansetna chu achateuva din akholpehjin, amapan ahetthei nadin lethuhna apejin ahi." 
Job21:20 Amit tenin ama kisuh mangna chu amuding, chule Hat chungnung lungsatna chu adon ding ahi." 
Job21:21 Ajeh chu ahin nikho lhajat ho akimlaitah-in sattanin umtaleh, anunga ipi nopna insunga anei ding ham?" 
Job21:22 Aman mi chunglama umho thu atanji-e ti munasa-a, Pathen chu hetna kon ahil dingham?" 
Job21:23 Mikhat chu lung nomsa chamkimin, athalhin laitah-in athi jin ahi." 
Job21:24 Anoi teni chu noitwi adimin, chule aguho chu lhintwi adimin ahi." 
Job21:25 Chule mi abangchu hinkho hahsa tah-in athijin, kipah-in ima anekha pon ahi." 
Job21:26 Amaho chu leivui lah-a thakhatna lumdiu, chule lungin amaho atomchah ding ahi." 
Job21:27 Veovin, keiman nalunggel hou, keima douna-a thilgon dihlou nangaito hou jouse chu kahen ahi." 
Job21:28 Ajeh chu nanghon, leng chapa in chu hoiche hija? chule migiloute chenna mun chu hoilai ham? nati uve." 
Job21:29 Lampia chelea miho chu nanghon nadoh khah lou uham? chule amaho melchihna chu nahet lou uham? 
Job21:30 Mikhang gilou chu manthah nikho-a dinga kikoija hilouham? amaho chu lunghan nikho-a hung kipuidoh ding ahiuve. 
Job21:31 Koiham alampi ding amaikoh-a phondoh peh thei dinga? chule kon athilbol na chunga lethuhna apeh ding ham? 
Job21:32 Hijeng jongle ama chu lhan khuh-a kipui ding, chule buikhuh sunga umding ahi." 
Job21:33 Phaichama leilhang ho chu ama dinga lhumtah hiding, amasanga simjoulou miho ache banga, mitinin ama nungchu ajui ding ahi." 
Job21:34 Achutile nathil donbut naovahin jouthu aume ti namunasaova, ipi dinga pannabei ja neilhamonu ham?" 
Job22:1 Chujouvin Teman mi Eliphaz'in adonbutnin, aseije;" 
Job22:2 Achinga jong chu ama dinga bou phachomthei ahijeh-in, Pathen'a dinga mihem hi phachom dingham?" 
Job22:3 Nangma chonphatna hi Hat chungnung dinga lunglhaina hinam? ahiloule nalampi ho nachamkim sahna hin ama aphatchom sah hinam? 
Job22:4 Nangma nagin jeh-a aman napho ding ham? ama nangto thupi tanna-a lutkhom ding ham? 
Job22:5 Nakhan gitlouna hi lentah hilou hija, nakhansetna hohi akhon nabei hilou ham?" 
Job22:6 Ajeh chu nangin nasopipa-a konin pannabei jin kitepna thil nala-in, chule aponsil ho nahoh lhan sagoh keovin naum sah-in ahi." 
Job22:7 Nangin thachol techu donding twi napepon, chule changlhah chu agilkel ho-a dingin naphalpon ahi." 
Job22:8 Ahin mihatpan vang leiset aneijin, hia chun gin umtah mihem chu achengin ahi." 
Job22:9 Nangin meithai ho chu khutgoh keovin nasol mangin, chule paneiloute thahat chu aki subong tai." 
Job22:10 Hijeh chun nakim vela thangho akikamin, hetmanlou kichatnan nasuboi tai;" 
Job22:11 Ahiloule kho namu thei louna din thim ajingin; chule twisoh chun nachup tan ahi. 
Job22:12 Pathen hi vanchung sanga um hilou ham? chule ahsi ho sandan khu vetemin, amaho iti sanna sang hitaovem!" 
Job22:13 Chule nangin, Pathen'in iti ahet hija? aman meipi thim lah-a thu iti atan theiham? tin naseijin ahi." 
Job22:14 Meilhang satah ho khu aman amuthei louna dinga akhukhuma pang ahin; chule ama van'a avahkimvel lejin ahi. 
Job22:15 Mi khang gilouvin ajotji lamlui chu namel chihji em? 
Job22:16 Hiho chu aphatnu lhin masangin satlhah-in aumjin, akingapna bul chu twisoh-in achuptai." 
Job22:17 Hiho chun Pathen henga, keiho-a konin potdoh-in, Hatchung nungin amaho-a dinga ipi abol thei dingham? atiuve." 
Job22:18 Hijongle aman a-in ho chu thilphan adippeh-in; mikhang gilou thumopna vang chu keija kona gamlatah ahi. 
Job22:19 Michonphan hichu amun akipahjin; chule themona neilou michun, i-sah loutah-in anuisat khumjin ahi." 
Job22:20 Hichan chun eiho neilegou suhmangin aumpon, ahinla amaho-a amoh chengse meijin akavamtai." 
Job22:21 Tun nangma amatoh kiheton lang, chule lung mongin umin; hichun nangdinga thilpha ahin lhut ding ahi." 
Job22:22 Nahenga katao ahi, akama kondoh danthu chu kisanin, chule athu chu nalungthim sunga khol khomin." 
Job22:23 Hat chungnung pen henga nakile kitna ahile, nangma kisadoh-in natin, nangin khansetna chu nahoubuh ho-a kona gamla tah-a nakoi mang ding ahi." 
Job22:24 Chuteng sana chu leivui banga nakhola, chule Ophir sana chu vachadunga songho banga nakhol khom ding ahi." 
Job22:25 Hiteng chule Hat chungnung chu nahongbitna hintin, chule dangka ninglhing setna naneiding ahi." 
Job22:26 Chutengle nangman Hatchung nungpen nachun kipana neijin natin, chule Pathen lama namai nangat ding ahi." 
Job22:27 Nangman ahenga taona neijin natin, aman nataona angaiding, chule nakitepna chu napeh ding ahi." 
Job22:28 Nangman thupeh khat jong naphondoh ding, hichu nachunga tohdoh-a hung umding; chule vahchun nalampi ho asalvah ding ahi." 
Job22:29 Mihem hi akisuh lhah tengle, kitundoh-na aum jie, tia naseiding; aman mi kineosah chu ahuhhing ding ahi." 
Job22:30 Aman themona neilou mi chu ahuhdoh ding ahin, nakhut teni thenna-a chu kihuhdoh ahi." 
Job23:1 Chujouvin Job'in adonbutnin, aseije." 
Job23:2 Kakiphina hi tuni chanin akha-in; kakhoisatna sangin kahesohna hi agihjon ahi. 
Job23:3 Oh ama touna mun ngeija kahung lut theina dingin; keiman ama chu hoijah kamu doh thei tadem? 
Job23:4 Keiman amasanga kachung thu lhut ingting, chule kakam sung nelkal na-a kadip ding ahi." 
Job23:5 Aman eidonbutna ding thuho chu kihetning ting, chule kahenga asei ding chu ipi ahi, kahetchet ding ahi." 
Job23:6 Aman athahat thunei na-in kachung thu eiseipeh dem? Chutiponte, aman keija hi thahatna ahinkoijoh ding ahi." 
Job23:7 Michonphan chua chu amato thu aseikhom ding; hitia chu thutana-a kona keima a-imatih-a dinga huhdoh kahiding ahitai. 
Job23:8 Veovin, keima malama kachen, ahin ama hia chun aumpoi; nunglama kachen, ahin ama kahe dohpon ahi." 
Job23:9 Aman akhut veilama na atongin, ahin ama kamupon; ama kamu theilouna dingin akhut jetlama akiselin ahi." 
Job23:10 Ahin aman kakalsena lampi ahen; aman eipatep teng keima sana toh kahungbah ding ahi. 
Job23:11 Kakeng phangin ama kholhahna ho achonin; ama lampi chu kaching jingin, kavah doh khapoi." 
Job23:12 Ama thupeh-a konin keima nungjong kanungchon kitpon; ama kamsung thuchengho chu ka anneh thilkhoh pen sanga twijon kangai sangin ahi. 
Job23:13 Ahin ama lungthim khatseh pu ahin, aman angaitoa bolding ati chu kon aheikon jouding ham?" 
Job23:14 Ajehchu keima dinga kitepsa thil chu aman atongdohjin, chule hitobang thilho chu akoma tamtah aume." 
Job23:15 Hijeh chun lungkhamin amasangah kaumin; kangaiton ahile keiman ama kakichan ahi. 
Job23:16 Ajeh chu Pathen'in kalung asu nemin; chule Hatchung nungin eilung khamsah-e," 
Job23:17 Ajehchu keima muthima kona suhmang kanahipon, kamai jong muthim ana khu khum sahpoi." 
Job24:1 Ipi dinga phat hi hat chungnung pa-a kona selmanga aumlou munasa-a, ama he-a miten ama nikho ho chu amulouvu ham?" 
Job24:2 Mi konkhat in gamgi achonji-un; amahon pumhatnin gancha hon alamang jiuvin, hia chun akivah jiuve." 
Job24:3 Amahon paneiloute sangan chu ahoi mangun, meithai bongchal chu kitepna thil dingin amang jiuve." 
Job24:4 Amahon angaichate chu lampia konin anodoh-un; leisetna vaichate chu akisel mangji taove. 
Job24:5 Veovin, nelgama gam sangan bangin, amaho anatoh naovadin apot doh-un; neh ding holin akipat doh-un; gamthip gam chun amaho dingle achateu dingin neh asodoh-e." 
Job24:6 Amaho amitakipmin louva chang aki-at cheh-un; chule amahon khansetna lengpiga chu aloh khomun ahi. 
Job24:7 Amahon sagohkeo chu pon beijin ajan gesah-un, hitia chu amaho daplaija silding neilou ahiuve." 
Job24:8 Amaho molsang ho-a gotwijin akotnun, kiselna ding deinan songpi akolun ahi." 
Job24:9 Amahon pa neilou chu anu-anga konin asat lhaovin, vaichate-a konin kitepna thil ala jiuve." 
Job24:10 Amahon pon beijin sagoh keovin ache sah-un; chule gilkelpa-a konin changphal alah mang peh-un; 
Job24:11 Abang hou sunglama thao aheh-un, alengpiga hou achilun; dangchah athoh-un ahi." 
Job24:12 Mihem hi khopi sunga konin khoisan aumun, akimavo miho hinna ataovin; hijongle Pathen'in amaho chu ngaipeh-in aneipoi." 
Job24:13 Amaho khovah douna-a kiphin mite ahiuvin; alampihou ahethei pouvin, hiche lampia chun umjong aumthei pouve." 
Job24:14 Tolthat ho khovah le athouvun, vaichale ngaicha jingte athat jiuvin, janle gucha abangun ahi." 
Job24:15 Jonthanhoi bolnom mit jongchun khothim angah jingin, koiman eimu ponte tin, amaiso akikhelsah jin ahi." 
Job24:16 Sunteng melchihna akisemu in hochu janteng avut jiuvin; amahon khovah kiti ahepouve. 
Job24:17 Ajehchu amaho din jingkah chu thina le-lim toh abangin; khat touvin amaho ahetnule, thina le-lim kichan aumjiuvin ahi" 
Job24:18 Ama twi banga ganga ahin; achanu chu leisetna gaosap ahin; aman lengpilei ho lampi chu amuphapon ahi. 
Job24:19 Gamgot le nichang satnin buhbang twiho ajunsah tan, hitobanga chu lhankhuh-in jong michonse te chu abol ahi." 
Job24:20 Naobun amachu asuhmil ding; lungin amachu nomsa tah-a kivahnan neijintin; ama geldoh-a umtalou ding, chule khan gitlouna chu thingbanga phuhlhuh-a umding ahi." 
Job24:21 Aman cha neilou achinga chu kivahnan mangchan tin; meithai chunga thilpha abolpeh louding ahi. 
Job24:22 Aman mihatpa jong chu athaneinan akaijin; ama akipat dohjin, chule hinkho kicheh tah mihem koiman aneipoi." 
Job24:23 Akicholdo nadin, bitkeicha aumna ding kipe jongle, amit chun alampi hou avetjing ding ahi." 
Job24:24 Amaho phat chomcha dinga kichoisang ahiuvin, ahinla suh nemin aumin akichaijitaove; amaho alampiuva kona midangho banga kimandoh ahiuvin, changvuileh kisih tan banga kisattanji ahi taove." 
Job24:25 Chule tun hichu ahilouva ahile, koiham keima eijousah-a, chule kathusei pannabei ahi tiding chu?" 
Job25:1 Chujouvin Shuh mi, Bildad'in adonbutnin, aseitai." 
Job25:2 Vaihom nale kichatna chu ama-a aumin, aman amunsang ho-a chamna aumsah-in ahi." 
Job25:3 Agalsatmite ho ajat umthei ngaijem? chule achunguva avahsodoh louna mite umem? 
Job25:4 Achutile mihem hi Pathen angsunga iti themchang thei dingham? ahilouleh numeija kona peng mihem chu iti thenjou ding ham? 
Job25:5 Lha jeng jong khu veuvin, avahjipon ahi; henge, ama mitmu-a ahsi ho jong athengpon ahi." 
Job25:6 Lungtol bangbep mihem hi ichan geija lhasamjo ham? mihem chapa hi, lungtol bangbep hia hitam?" 
Job26:1 Ahinla Job'in adonbutnin, aseije:" 
Job26:2 Nangin tha neilou mi chu iti nakithopi-a, tha neilou ban chu iti nahuhdoh-am?" 
Job26:3 Chihna neilou mi chu nangin iti nathumop ma? chule ahina banga thilchu iti lhingsetna naphondoh am? 
Job26:4 Koi koma nangin thuho naseijam? Chule nanga kona koi lhagao hungdoh am? 
Job26:5 Thil thiho jousele chuche-a chengho jouse chu, twinoija kona kisem ahi." 
Job26:6 Damun chu ama masanga agohkeo ahin, chule suhmangna chun akhu ding ima aneipoi." 
Job26:7 Aman sahlam chu ahomkeo mun chunga ajah doh-in, chule leiset chu imacha umlouva akhaijin ahi." 
Job26:8 Aman twiho chu meilom satah-in atomchah-in; chule amaho noija chun meilhang chu akehpon ahi. 
Job26:9 Aman alaltouna maichu akhukhumin, chule ameilhang chu achunga chun akijal sah-e." 
Job26:10 Sunle jan ahung kichai kahsen, aman twiho chu gikhatnin aumkim velin ahi." 
Job26:11 Aman apho tengle van khompiho akithing jin, chule kidang asaovin ahi." 
Job26:12 Aman athaneina-in twipi ahom khenin, chule ahetthem na-in kiletsah ajepjin ahi." 
Job26:13 Aman alhagaovin vanho ajem hoijin, ama khut chun dihna neilou gul chu aseme." 
Job26:14 Veovin, hiche hohi ama lampiho ahin, ahinla ama thudol hi ichana kija lhoma hitam? athaneina van kithing tobanghi kon ahetthem thei ding ham?" 
Job27:1 Hiche chung chon chun Job'in athulem sei ajomin, aseije;" 
Job27:2 Kathu kitana ding eilahmang peh-a hingjing Pathen, chule kahinna suboija Hat chungnung;" 
Job27:3 Kasunga haina thei aum laise le, Pathen lhagao kanahkohom teni sunga aum laisen;" 
Job27:4 Kakamin khangitlouna thu sei pongting, kaleijin jong lheplhahna thu phongdoh ponge." 
Job27:5 Nangma them kachansah ding Pathen anompoi; kathi kahse-a keiman kadinna kachondoh louding ahi. 
Job27:6 Kachon phatna hi tuhdet jinging ting, kalhaso louhel ding; kahin lai chansen kalung thim hin eithemmo sah louding ahi." 
Job27:7 Kamelma chu mikhang gilou tobang hihen, keima dou dinga hung kipatdohpa chu chonpha louteto banguhen." 
Job27:8 Ajehchu Pathen'in ahinna alahdohteng, phatchomna neijongle mipha lhemin ipi kinepna aneiding ham?" 
Job27:9 Lungkhamna achunga ahung lhunteng ataona chu Pathen'in angaipeh na dem? 
Job27:10 Hat chungnungpa-a chun amatah alung lhaina dem? phattinin aman Pathen akou nadem? 
Job27:11 Pathen khut thahat dan nangho seipeh-unge; Hat chungnungpa koma um chu keiman ka-imchah lou ding ahi. 
Job27:12 Veovin, nangho tah-in hichu namu taovin; achutile ipi dinga nangho nabon chaova hitia hi pannabei, nahiu hitam?" 
Job27:13 Hiche hi mikhang gilouvin Pathen'a achan chu ahin, misugenthei ho goulo ding, Hat chungnung pa-a kon amudio chu ahi." 
Job27:14 Achateu apunna ahile hichu chemjam'a lou ding bep ahiuvin; chule achilhahteu chu changlhah-a oiva loudiu ahi. 
Job27:15 Ama nunga ana umnalai ho chu thi uva kivui diu; chule ameithai hou chun aka loudiu ahi. 
Job27:16 Aman dangka leivui bangin kholkhom henlang, kivona pon leiset bangin gong jongle;" 
Job27:17 Hichu aman gong theijinte, ahinla hichu midih-in akivon ding, chule dangka chu themona neilou ho kihom diu ahi." 
Job27:18 Aman a-in chu maimom bangin asan, thil ngah-a pangpan akisah lhambuh bangbep ahi." 
Job27:19 Mihaopa chu lumintin, ahin ama gopkhoma umlou ding; aman amit ahahsahle, ama anaum tapoi." 
Job27:20 Tijatna hon ama twibangin achuptan, huipin jan-in ama alhoh mangtai." 
Job27:21 Ama solam huijin apomangin, ama achemang tan; chule aumna mun'a konin khopi huijin alhoh mangtan ahi" 
Job27:22 Ajehchu Pathen'in achunga ahin selhah-a, ama akhendoh louhel ding; ama khutna kona ama lhasama jamdoh ding ahi." 
Job27:23 Mihon ama khut abeh khumuva, chule aumna mun'a kona aphisanuva anodoh dingu ahi." 
Job28:1 Tahbeh-in dangka-a dingin akhuh aumin, chuleh sana-a dingin akilhit thengna mun aumin ahi." 
Job28:2 Thih hi leisetna kona kiladoh ahin; chuleh sum-eng hi song lah-a kona kiladoh-a kilhajol ahi. 
Job28:3 Ama muthim akhona geijin achen, muthim le thina le-lim changei songho chu agaholin ahi." 
Job28:4 Aman mihem umlouna-a le chotkhah louna mun'a leiko avutnin, mihem'a konin gamlha tah-in akikhaijun, suh le tunga akivat leuvin ahi." 
Job28:5 Leiset hi ahileh, hichea konhin neh ahungdoh-in, anoilang vang meikong tobanga hungsoh doh ahi." 
Job28:6 Hiche mun'a songho chu khisongdum ahin, chule hia chun sana di aumin ahi." 
Job28:7 Chungleng vachan ahetkhahlou, muthong mitnin amukhahlou, lampi khat aumin;" 
Job28:8 Keipi bahkai nouvin achotkhahlou, keipi hangtah-in jong ahokhahlou lampi khat aume." 
Job28:9 Aman akhutchu songpi chunga akoidoh-in, aman molsangho chu abula konin alehkhup jenge." 
Job28:10 Aman songpiho lah-a vadung alaidoh-in, thil manlutah hojouse chu amitnin amun ahi." 
Job28:11 Aman alonlet louna dingin twisoh ho chu atingin, chule anakisel thilho chu aman khovah-a ahinpodoh-in ahi." 
Job28:12 Ahinla chihna chu hoija kimu ding ham? Chule hetkhen themtheina munchu hoilai ham? 
Job28:13 Mihemin hicheho manlut dan chu ahedoh joupoi, ahiloujongle mihing gamachun hichu akimudoh jou dehpoi." 
Job28:14 Hiche chu keija aumpoi, tin twi thuhtah chun aseijin, hiche chu keija aumpoi, tin twipin aseije." 
Job28:15 Hiche chu sana-a jong chohjou ahipon, ahilou jongle hiche manding chu dangka-a jong lepjou ahipoi." 
Job28:16 Ophir sana mantam tah ahilouleh khisongdum manlutna toh tethei ahipoi. 
Job28:17 Sana le songval toh kibanga ahipon, chule sana-a kilhatheng thil mantam tah tojong lhehthei ahipoi." 
Job28:18 Songmantam san ahiloule twikohchang hojong gahmin phahthei ahipoi; ajehchu chihna manlutdan chu song mantam phapen sanga lujo ahi. 
Job28:19 Ethiopia khi song engtoh kibanga jong ahipon, ahilou jongle sanatheng manlutna tojong kibanga ahipoi." 
Job28:20 Achutile chihna hoija hungkon hija, hetthem theina munchu hoilaiham?" 
Job28:21 Ahingthei jousele mitmu jouse-a kon kisel ahin, chungleng vacha jouse-a kona akiselmang ahi." 
Job28:22 Manthahnale thina-in, hiche chungchang thulhut hi kanakhang hona kajalhonin ahi, ati lhone." 
Job28:23 Pathen'in hiche lampi chu ahekhenin, chule aman hiche laimun chu ahen ahi." 
Job28:24 Ajeh chu aman leiset kichaina ding gei aven, vannoi pumpihi amun ahi." 
Job28:25 Huidingin agih tena ding asemin, chule aman twiho chu agih tena-a aten ahi." 
Job28:26 Aman go henga thupeh anapeh-a, van ginle kolphe dinga lampi anasemachun:" 
Job28:27 Chua chun aman chihna chu amun, aphong doh-in; aman agongin, henge, chule hichu aholdoh-in ahi." 
Job28:28 Chule mihem jah-a chun aman aseijin, veuvin Pakai ginhi chihna chu ahin, chule setna a kona jamdoh chu hetkhen themna chu ahi." 
Job29:1 Chukal valin Job'in athulem ajompeh-in aseije. 
Job29:2 O Pathen'in eichintup nikhoho, achesa lhaho-a chu keima ana uma hileng;" 
Job29:3 Kalu chunga athaomei anavah-a, chule amavah-a muthim lah kanajotle lai;" 
Job29:4 Kakhang donlai nikhoho, Pathen thuguh chu kahoubuh chunga aumlai;" 
Job29:5 Hatchung nungpen pan kakoma eiumpia, kachate kakimvela ahung umlaiju;" 
Job29:6 Kakholhah naho bongnoi thaova kana soplai, chule songpin kadinga thaotwi vadung long banga asodohsah lai;" 
Job29:7 Khopi sung kotpi phunga kapotdoh le-a, khopi lamlen laija katouna kadole laichun!" 
Job29:8 Khangdong hon eimuvin, akiseluvin, chule tehse ho chu akipat doh-un, ading jiuvin ahi." 
Job29:9 Pipuiho chu ahoulim laiju atang jiuvin, chule akhutnun akam akisip jiuve." 
Job29:10 Milen milal ho athipchet jiuvin, chule aleiju chu adanguva abehjin ahi." 
Job29:11 Nakhangin eijahteng, phatthei eiboh-in, mitnin eimuteng, hichun keima hettohsahna eipen ahi." 
Job29:12 Ajehchu keiman mivaicha pengpenga umle, paneiloute, chule kithopi ding neiloupa chu kahuh doh-in ahi." 
Job29:13 Mangthah dinga umpa phattheina chu keima chunga ahungchun, keiman meithainu lungsung chu kipanan la kasah sahjin ahi." 
Job29:14 Chonphatna chu kakivonin hichun eitomin, kathutan lhah chu sangkhol len le lukhuh tobang ahi." 
Job29:15 Mitchodin mit kanahin, kengbaiho din keng kanahi." 
Job29:16 Mivaichate din apau kahin, chule kahet khahlou thu chu kaholdoh jin ahi." 
Job29:17 Khang giloute khagu chu kasuhboh peh-in, chule akamuva konin anehdoh houchu kasadoh peh-in ahi." 
Job29:18 Chuin keiman, neldi banga kahin nikhohohi kapunsah-a, kabuh sunga kathi ding ahi, kati." 
Job29:19 Twipanga kajung ajamin, kabahho chunga jankhon daitwi alhan ahi." 
Job29:20 Kaloupina chu keija athah jingin, chule kakhutna kathalchang chu akisuthah jinge." 
Job29:21 Mihon kahenga anakhangu ado-uvin, chule angah jiuvin, kathumop teng athipchet jiuve." 
Job29:22 Kathusei joutengle amahon aseikitji tapouvin, chule kathusei chu achunguva achun ahi." 
Job29:23 Gotwi angaichat bangun keima eingaicha jiuvin; gotwi nunung ngah bangin, amahon akamu akalen jiuve." 
Job29:24 Keiman amaho nuisat jongleng, amahon atahsan loudiu; chule kamaiso vah chu amahon asulha pouvin ahi." 
Job29:25 Alampihou kalhen peh-in, apipu uvin kapange, chule sepai lah-a lengpa bangin kaumin, lhasete lhamonsah khat bangin kaumin ahi." 
Job30:1 Ahinla tun, apateu kaganhon ngah-a uichate toh pangkhom dinga jong kadeilou, keisanga khangdongjoho chun i-sah louvin eibolun ahi." 
Job30:2 Henge, akhut thahatnaova kona ken ipi kaphatchompi ding ham? athahatnao chu beija ahitai." 
Job30:3 Lhahsap jehle keljeh-in amaho achang lhatnun, masanga ana kamhel le agohkeo gamthipma chun ajamlutnun ahi." 
Job30:4 Amahon nangboh lah-a vandol, chule theimi jungchu anehdiuvin abotdoh un ahi." 
Job30:5 Amaho chu miho lah-a konin aki deldoh-un, (amahon gucha kihoh bangin hatah-in a-aovun;)" 
Job30:6 Phaicham khikah dungle, leiset kotong sung, chule songpiho lah-a umdin adeldoh-un ahi." 
Job30:7 Hamboh lah-a amaho chu apengun, lingphung noi dunga amaho akisukhomun ahi." 
Job30:8 Amaho mingol chate le, milung lhomho chate ahiuvin, amaho leiset sangin aphamo jouve." 
Job30:9 Tun keima amaho la chu kahin, henge, keima aseichah-u kahitai." 
Job30:10 Amahon eihotaovin, keija konin gamlatah-a ajamun, chule kamai chil setkhum dingjong akiphalam pouve." 
Job30:11 Ajehchu aman kakhao alhanenga chule eisuhgenthei jeh-in, amahon jong ka-angsunga kamdal alha nengun ahi." 
Job30:12 Kakhut jetlama khangdongho akichoisangun, kakeng asonmangun, chule amanthahna lampihou chu keima dounan aboldoh uve." 
Job30:13 Amahon kakeng lampi asuseuvin, kahamset nading kamasanga akoijun, amaho akithopi ding aumpoi;" 
Job30:14 Amaho twipi pohjah bangin kachunga ahungun, setna lah-a kachunga ahung kitoluve." 
Job30:15 Tijatnaho kachunga ahung kihei lutnin, amahon kahinna chu huibangin ahin delun, kaphat theina chu meibol bangin achemang tai." 
Job30:16 Chule tun kahinna kachunga akisunglhan, suhgenthei nikho hon eikolchah tai." 
Job30:17 Jantengle kaguhon eichipjin, katha junghon choldona aneipoi." 
Job30:18 Kanatna hoisetna jehchun kavon akikhelsah-in, kasangkhol chol ngong bangin eikanbeh tai." 
Job30:19 Aman bonlhoh lah-a eileh lutnin, keima vutle leivui kabang jengtai." 
Job30:20 Keiman nangma kakouvin, ahinla nangman neingai pehpoi: keima kading doh-in, chuleh nangman iman neigelpoi." 
Job30:21 Nangma keima dingin nahung giloutan: na bantha hattah chun nangman neidouve. 
Job30:22 Nangin huijin neidom touvin; achunga chun neitou sah-in, kahinnaho nasujun lhatan ahi." 
Job30:23 Ajehchu nangman thina-a neipuilut ding, chule ahing jouse dinga kitepsa ina chu neipuiding ahi, ti kahei." 
Job30:24 Itin iti jongle amaho kisuhgepna-a kapjongleu, aman lhan geija akhut ajahdoh louding ahi." 
Job30:25 Boina neiho dinga kanaka hilouham? kahinna hi amaho dinga analungna-a hilouham? 
Job30:26 Apha kagaldot teng, kahenga setna ahungjin, khovah kanga tengle muthim ahung lhungjie." 
Job30:27 Kalung agimlheh jin, akicholdopoi, genthei hesohna nikhon eikimai topi jinge." 
Job30:28 Nisa beijin lunghemin kavahlen, mipi kikhomho lah-a chun kading doh-in kakapme." 
Job30:29 Keima dragon ho sopile, sumbupi ho kiloipi kahi." 
Job30:30 Katichunga kavun adupmin, kaguhohin eileusa henhune." 
Job30:31 Ka selangdah jong lunghemna, chule kamut gingjong akapho ogin asohtai." 
Job31:1 Keiman kamit tenitoh kitepna kasemin, achutile ibola nungah kageltah dingham?" 
Job31:2 Ajehchu chunga Pathen'a kona chanding ipi umam? chungsang Hatchung nunga kona gou chan ding ipiham? 
Job31:3 Mi khanggilou dinga manthah na um hilou ham? engbolna kidangtah chu khansetna bolteho-a ding hilou ham? 
Job31:4 Aman kalampiho amulou hija, chule kakho lhahnaho asim hilouham?" 
Job31:5 Keima pannabei ja kanavalea, ahiloule lheplhahnaho-a kakal kanason gangtah-a ahile," 
Job31:6 Pathen'in kadihna ahettheina dingin, khaikotnin eilep hen." 
Job31:7 Kakalson nahi lampia kona akiheimanga, kamitnin amuchu kalungin ajuile, anen khattou kakhutna abetahle;" 
Job31:8 Chutengle muchi tungting adangin nehen; henge, kason kapahho chu ajungah kibotdoh hen." 
Job31:9 Numei khatnin kalung alheplhah-a, ahiloule ka-in heng kotphunga ka chanlhih-a ahile;" 
Job31:10 Chuteng ka-inneipin midang ding chang suhen, chule midangho amanu chunga bohkhup uhen." 
Job31:11 Ajehchu hichehi thet umtah khansetna ahin; henge, hichehi thutan hon engbolna apehding khansetna chu ahi." 
Job31:12 Ajehchu hichehi manthah na geija kavamtheija meichu ahin, chule kaphat touna jouse ajunga kibodoh ding ahi." 
Job31:13 Kasohpa ahiloule kasohnu thu chu i-sah louva kabola, amahon keima eikinahpi tengule;" 
Job31:14 Pathen ahung kipatdoh tengle ikatiding hitam? Aman aviltengle ipi-a kadonbut dingham? 
Job31:15 Naobu sunga keima einasempa chun ama asem hilouham? chule khatseh-in naobu sunga einasemu hilouham? 
Job31:16 Keiman mivaichate ngaichat ka-itpeh-a, ahiloule meithainu mit chu kalosamsah khah-a ahile;" 
Job31:17 Ahiloule ka-an chu kachanga kakineh-a, chule paneilou ten hichu anehkhah loule;" 
Job31:18 (Ajehchu kakhangdon laijapat amachu keimatoh hung khanglen khom ahin, pa banga, kanu naobu sunga patna amanu kahin lamhil ahi);" 
Job31:19 Koihamkhat ponsil lhahsam jeh-a mangthah-a, ahiloule silding neilou mivaicha khattou kamua;" 
Job31:20 Alungin keima phatthei eibohlouva, chule kakelngoi mulla aman lum asah loule," 
Job31:21 Kotpi phunga eikithopi kamua, paneiloute douna-a kakhut kalapma ahile," 
Job31:22 Chuteng kabanhi kalengkouva konin lhonglha henlang, chule kaban guhi bonglha jeng hen." 
Job31:23 Ajehchu Pathen'a kona manthah na chu keidinga tijat umtah ahin, chule alalna jeh-in, kathoh joupon ahi." 
Job31:24 Keiman kakinepna chu sana kahi sah-a, ahiloule sana theng jah-a, nangma katahsana nahi, kanati-a ahile;" 
Job31:25 Kagou tamjeh le, kakhut hin tamtah amujeh-a kakipa-a ahile;" 
Job31:26 Keiman nisa ahungvah kavetna, ahiloule lhathah vahtah-a ache kavetna;" 
Job31:27 Chule kalungthimhi aguh-a jol lhah-a auma, ahilouleh kakamin kakhut achopleh;" 
Job31:28 Hiche jonghi thutanpan engbolna apehding khansetna chu ahi; ajehchu chunga um Pathen chu keiman kasanlou ahitai. 
Job31:29 Keima eithetbolpa kisuhmang nikho-a kakipa-a, thilsen alhunkhum teng kakichoi sanga ahile;" 
Job31:30 Kakamhi chonsetna, ama hinna sapset sahna dingin jong kaphalpon ahi." 
Job31:31 Kahoubuh mihon, Oh atahsa chu kaneilouva ahile! kalungnao chimlou ding ahi, atiuve." 
Job31:32 Gampam mi khopi lamlena agehpon, ahin kholjinleho dingin kakotho kahonpeh-in ahi." 
Job31:33 Keiman Adam banga kasuhkhelna leh, kakhan gitlouna chu ka-angsunga kakhu khuma ahile;" 
Job31:34 Keiman mihonpi kakichatna, ahiloule insung mite i-sah louna chun eikichatsah-a, thipbeh-a kauma, kotpama potlouva kaum-em?" 
Job31:35 O khattouvin eingaipeh hitaveleh! vetan, kangaichat chu, Hatchung nungin eidonbutna, chule kaki doupin lekha ajihding chu ahi." 
Job31:36 Thonlouva hichu kalengkouva kaputna, chuleh lallukhuh banga kakhuh ding ahi." 
Job31:37 Kakholhah jatchu ahenga kaphon doh-a, vaipo khat banga ahenga kahin nailut ding ahi." 
Job31:38 Kagam chu keima douna-a apenna, ahiloule langkonho jong chu hitobanga chu akiphina ahileh;" 
Job31:39 Keiman hiche lougaho chu sum pelouva kaneh-a, ahiloule aneiho hinkho chu kachansah-a ahileh;" 
Job31:40 suhlouchang khelin meithai seltholing, sakol chang khellin hampa kehhen. Job thusei akichaitai." 
Job32:1 Hitichun hiche mithumho chun Job chu ama le ama mitmu-a achonphat jehchun, adonbutnu chu anga taovin ahi." 
Job32:2 Chujouvin Ram inkon Buz mi Barachel chapa Elihu lunghanna chu akoujah-in, Job douna-a ama deojah-a ahi, ajehchu ama Pathen sangin akithem chanin ahi." 
Job32:3 Amagolte thum ho douna-in jong alunghan adeujah-e, ajehchu amahon adonbutna ding amujou pouvin, hinlah Job chu themmo achanun ahi." 
Job32:4 Tun amaho chu ama sanga upajo cheh ahijeh-un, Elihu'n Job thusei kichai chu angahjing nalaijin ahi." 
Job32:5 Elihu'n hiche mi thumho kamsunga donbutna aumlou amu phatnin, alunghana adeujah tai." 
Job32:6 Chuin Buz mi Barachel chapa Elihu chun adonbutnin: keima khangdong kahin, nangho upatah cheh nahiuve; hijeh-a chu keima kakichatna, kalunggel nangho kavetsah ngamlou ahi." 
Job32:7 Upaho chun seijuntin, chule kum tamtah ho chun chihna hilinte, katin ahi." 
Job32:8 Ahinla mihem'a hi lhagao uma ahin, chule Hatchung nungpen hu haikhumna chun amaho chu hetkhenthem theina apeh ahi." 
Job32:9 Milenho chu ching jing jengu ahipon, mi kumtam hon jong thutanlhah themna ahetdeh-u ahipoi." 
Job32:10 Hijeh chun kathusei ngaijun, keiman jong kalunggel vetsah uvinge, kati." 
Job32:11 Vetan, nathuho chu kangah-in, ipiseiding ham tia nanghon nahol laiju chun nakihoulim naova kanakhang kanasungin ahi." 
Job32:12 Henge, lunglut tah-in nathuseiju kangaijin, chuleh veuvin, nalah uva Job noplhah sahthei, ahiloule athuho donbut theiding khatcha na-umpouve." 
Job32:13 Keihon chihna kamudoh taove, tin seikhaovin nate, mihem ahipon Pathen'in ama asuhlhuh ahibouve." 
Job32:14 Tun aman athuho chu keima douna ahipon, hijeh-a chu nangho thusei ho-a chu ama kadonbut louding ahi." 
Job32:15 Amahon kidang asauvin adonbutbe tapouve, thu asei tapouve." 
Job32:16 Keiman kanga-a chun, (ajehchu amahon thu aseitapouvin, ading dennun, adonbut be tapouve;)" 
Job32:17 Kadonbut dingdol chu donbut ningting, kalunggel jong vetsah ingkate, kanatie." 
Job32:18 Ajehchu keima thu-in kadimsetnin, kasunga kalhagao hin eisol teitei tan ahi." 
Job32:19 Veuvin, ka oipoh hi akising chah ju toh abangtai, hichehi juhai thah pohkeh ding kigo tobang ahitai." 
Job32:20 Kahaldoh kit theina dingin keiman thu seijinge; kakam kangting donbut ning kate. 
Job32:21 Nahenga katao ahi, mi koimacha langneina musah dang ting, Pachat lhem thucheng mihem'ah pejong peponge." 
Job32:22 Ajehchu keiman pachat lhem thucheng pehje kahepon, hitichun bol taleng eisempan eilahdoh loiding ahi." 
Job33:1 Hijeh chun Job, nahenga katao ahi, kathuseiho ngaijin, chule kathu jousehi neingaipeh-in." 
Job33:2 Vetan, tun keima kakamkan, kalei hin kakama thu aseije." 
Job33:3 Kathuhohi kalungsung chondih na-a kon hiding ahin, chule kakamin hetna chu thengtah-a aphondoh ding ahi." 
Job33:4 Pathen lhagaovin einasemin, chule Hatchung nungpen haina hu chun hinna eipeh ahi." 
Job33:5 Nangman neidonbut thei dinga ahile, nathuho chu kamasanga koitoh inlang, dingdoh-in." 
Job33:6 Vetan, keimahi nadeisah dungjuija Pathen khela um kahin, keijong leinganna kisemdoh kahi." 
Job33:7 Vetan, tijat kaumna-in nakichat sah pontin, kakhut jengjong nachunga gihponte." 
Job33:8 Tahbeh-in, kajah theijin thu naseijin, chule keiman nathusei awgin chu kajatai;" 
Job33:9 Keima suhkhelna beija thenga kahin, themona neilou kahin, khansetna jengjong keija aumpoi." 
Job33:10 Vetan, aman keima douna ajehho chu amun, aman keima amelma khatnin eisimtai," 
Job33:11 aman kakengteni ahennin, kalampi jouse amelchih-e." 
Job33:12 Vetan, hichea hin nangma nadihpon ahi; keiman nangma donbut-inge, Pathen chu mihem sanga lenjo ahi." 
Job33:13 Ipidinga ama douna-a nakiphin ham? ajehchu aman ama chungchang thuho khatcha apepon ahi. 
Job33:14 Ajehchu Pathen'in khatvei thu aseijin, henge nivei, ahijeng vangin mihemin ahetheipon ahi." 
Job33:15 Jan manga, janna muneina-a, mihemte chunga imut lhuhna ahung chuh-a, lupna chunga imutsona alhun tengle;" 
Job33:16 Chuteng aman mihem nakhang ahonpeh-in, chule amaho kithupehna chu asinkhumpeh-in," 
Job33:17 Athil gona kona mihem alahdoh theina dingle, mihem'a konin kiletsahna aselmangpeh jin ahi." 
Job33:18 Kokhuh-a konin ahinna, chule ahinkho chu chemjam'a amanthah nadinga konin ahuhdoh peh-in ahi." 
Job33:19 Aman ajalkhun chunga natna, chule agu achangho jouse hachang natna natna-in asugimin," 
Job33:20 Hitia chu ahinkho chun changlhah, chule ahinna chun anneh ahot nadinga abol ahi." 
Job33:21 Akimutheilou nadingin, atipum chu ajunmang tan, chule agu anakimulouho chu adoh setsot tai." 
Job33:22 Ahi, ahinna chun lhankhuh lam, chule ahinkho chun suhmangna chu anaijin ahi." 
Job33:23 Achondihna chu mihem musahna dinga, thupole khat, paoledoh khat, sangkhat lah-a khat amatoh auma hileh," 
Job33:24 Chuteng amachu ama lungset them ahin, hitin aseije, kokhuh-a lhahlutna dinga konin aman ahuhdoh-in, keiman lhatdohna kamutai." 
Job33:25 Ama tipum chu chapanga sanga noujo ding, ama akhangdonlai nikho-a kilekit ding ahi." 
Job33:26 Ama Pathen henga taoding, chule ama chu amadinga lunglhaina hiding, chule aman kipah-a amai amuding ahi: ajeh chu aman chonphatna chu mihem apehding ahi." 
Job33:27 Aman mihemho aven, khattouvin, keima kachonsetan, adih-a konin kakiheimang tan, chule hiche hin eiphatchom sahpoi, atia ahileh;" 
Job33:28 Aman ahinna chu kokhuh-a alhahlutna dinga kona alhatdoh ding, chule hinkho chun vah amuding ahi." 
Job33:29 Ven, hiche thil ho jousehi mihem dingin Pathen'in abol jingin," 
Job33:30 Kokhuh-a kona ahinna puidoh nading, hinna vah-a vahsah nading ahi." 
Job33:31 Vo Job, phatah in melchih in, kathu ngaijin, thipmin, thu kaseiding ahi." 
Job33:32 Nangin seiding khattou naneija ahile neidonbut in, seijin ajehchu keiman nangma kathem chansah nome." 
Job33:33 Ahiloule kasei ngaijin, thipmin, chule keiman chihna kahil ding nahi." 
Job34:1 Elihun adonbut kitleuvin aseije: 
Job34:2 Vo miching nanghon; kathuhi ngaijunlang, hetnanei nanghon nanakhangu hinsung uvin," 
Job34:3 Ajehchu kamin an atepbangin, nakhangin thu apatepmin ahi." 
Job34:4 Eihon thutanlhah dih kilhenu hitin, ilah uva apha chu ipiham kihetnu hite." 
Job34:5 Ajehchu Job'in keima michonpha kahin, Pathen'in kadihna alahmang ahitai, ati." 
Job34:6 Keima kadihna chunga kajou ding ham? suhkhel bei kahivangin kamaput hi damtheihoi ahipoi. 
Job34:7 Job banga mi-isahlouna twibanga dontheijah koi umam? 
Job34:8 Ama khangitlouna bolhotoh akiloijin, chule miphalou hotoh akilhonlen ahi." 
Job34:9 Ajehchu aman, mihem Pathen'a kipah-a aumhin imachan aphatchom pipoi, ati." 
Job34:10 Hijeh chun hethem na nei mi nanghon kathuhi ngaijun; Pathen'in khansetna abol louding, chule Hatchung nungin khangitlouna abol louhel ding ahi." 
Job34:11 Ajehchu mihem chu atoh dungjuija achunga alhunsah ding, chule mijouse achonna dungjui cheh a lethuhna amusah ding ahi." 
Job34:12 Henge, Pathen'in khan gitlouna abol louhel ding, Hatchung nungin jong thu akaleh-a atan louding ahi." 
Job34:13 Leiset chunga thunei dinga kon mopohna apeh ham? ahiloule vannoi pumpi kon achunga akoiham? 
Job34:14 Aman mihem chunga alung koihen lang, alhagao le ahaina hu chu kilah taleh;" 
Job34:15 Tipumpi mangthah khomuva, chule mihem leivuija kilekit ding ahi." 
Job34:16 Tun nangma hetkhen themna nei nahile, hichehi ngaijin: kathusei hohi ngaiphan." 
Job34:17 Thudih hotbolpa chun vai ahomding hija? chule kitah chungnung pen chu nangin themmo nachan dingham? 
Job34:18 Lengpa jah-a, nangma khangse nahin, chule pipuiho jah-a, Pathen helou nahiuve, tiding kilomnam?" 
Job34:19 Ahin ama pipuiho langa alangnei chompon, chule mivaichaho sangin mihaoho ajachom dehpoi; ajehchu abonchauva akhutsem ahiuve." 
Job34:20 Amaho mitphetkah louvin thiuvintin, chule mipi ho chu jan khangkim le suhboija umdiu, chemang diu, chule mihat hochu mihem khutjao louva kaimanga umdiu ahi." 
Job34:21 Ajehchu aman mihem lamlhah avejingin, achenachan amusoh keijin ahi." 
Job34:22 Khangitlou bolho kiselna dingin, muthimle thina le-lim aumpon ahi." 
Job34:23 Ajehchu Pathen angsunga thutana-a lutna dinga, aman adih kalval mihem chunga akoilou ding ahi." 
Job34:24 Aman simthei louva mihat ho chu asuhbonga, akheluva midangho atunding ahi." 
Job34:25 Hijeh chun aman atohhou chu ahen, amaho chu suhmanga aumtheina dinguvin, jankhat sungin alehkhup heltan ahi." 
Job34:26 Aman amaho chu migilouho bangin midangho mitmu tah-in ajepmin; 
Job34:27 Ajehchu amaho ama-a konin akinung heijun, chule alampi khat jengjong agelphata pouve;" 
Job34:28 Chutichun ahenga amahon mivaichaho kana chu alhunsah-un, aman bolgentheiho kana chu angaipeh tan ahi." 
Job34:29 Aman asuhcham tengleh koiham boina boldinga? nampi douna hihen lang mikhat douna-a kibol hijongle, aman asel tengle koiham amai muthei dingah?" 
Job34:30 Chutiachu mipha lhemin vai ahomlou ding, achutiloule mipi ho thanga ohding ahi." 
Job34:31 Tahbeh-a mihemin Pathen koma, suhgimna chu kathohtan, doumah bolkit taponge," 
Job34:32 Kamu khahlou chu nangman neihilin, keiman khan gitlouna kaboljongle, bolkit taponge, tia aseiding chu kilom ahi." 
Job34:33 Keima hilouvin nangma gel bang ahidem? nangma danlang nomjongle chun, aman nalethuh ding ahi; hijeh chun nahetchu seijin." 
Job34:34 Hetthemna neihon eihilen, chule michingin kathusei ngaihen." 
Job34:35 Job'in hetna jaolouvin thu aseijin, athuseiho jong chihna jaolou ahi." 
Job34:36 Khang gilouho dinga adonbut jeh-in, Job chu akhona geija achungthu tanding hi kalung ahi." 
Job34:37 Ajehchu aman achonsetna chunga akiphin ben, aman ilah uvah akhut abengin, chule Pathen douna athu apun sah-in ahi." 
Job35:1 Hiche kalvalin Elihun aseiben, chule hitin aseije:" 
Job35:2 Kachon phatna hi Pathen'a sangin asangjoi, tia nasei chu dih dinga nagellem?" 
Job35:3 Ajehchu nangman, kachonsetna kona theng kahile, nang dinga phachom ipi hiding hija, keiman aphachom ipi kamuding ham? tin naseije." 
Job35:4 Keiman nangmale naumpi naloiho chu donbut-inge. 
Job35:5 Van lama dah inlang vetemin; chule nangsanga sangjo meibol ho khu vetemin. 
Job35:6 Nachonsetle, ama douna-a ipi nabol em? ahiloule nasuhkhelna apunbeleh, nangman ama henga ipi nabol ham?" 
Job35:7 Nachon phatna ahile ama ipi napeh-em? ahiloule nakhutna kona ipi amu-em? 
Job35:8 Naphatlouna chun nangtobang mihem khat asuna theijin, nachon phatna chun mihem chapa chu aphatchom sah thei ahi." 
Job35:9 Suhgentheinaho atamjeh-in, akisugen theiho aka sah-un, mihat ho ban thahat jeh-in, apeng doh-un ahi." 
Job35:10 Ahinla koimachan jong eisempa Pathen, janteng la eipepa chu hoija umam? atipouve." 
Job35:11 Leija gamsaho sanga eiha hiluva, chungleng vachate sanga chingjoa eisempao chu, hoija umem? atipouve." 
Job35:12 Chua chun apengun, ahinla miphalouho kiletsah jeh-in, koimachan adonbut pouve." 
Job35:13 Tahbeh-in Pathen'in pannabei chu ngai pontin, Hatchung nungin jong nahsah-a aneilouding ahi." 
Job35:14 Nangin amachu muponge tijongle chun, amasanga chu thutana umnalai ahin; hijeh chun ama chu tahsan nin." 
Job35:15 Ahinla tun hitichu ahilou jeh-in, lunghan na-in agavilin, hijongle nasabehsetnin ahehhih laijin," 
Job35:16 Hijeh-a chu Job hi pannabei ja kamka-a, hetna jaolouva athusei apunsah ahi." 
Job36:1 Elihun aseijompeh-in, hitin aseije." 
Job36:2 Neikhongai nalaijun, chule Pathen khella seiding kanei nahlai chu, vetsah-unge." 
Job36:3 Gamla tah-a konin kahetna galangting, eisempa chonphatna phongdoh inge." 
Job36:4 Ajehchu kathuhi nolnabei jou hilouhel ding ahin, hetna chamkimpa chu nangma toh uma ahi." 
Job36:5 Vetan, Pathen chu thaneitah ahin, koimacha nahsahmon akoipoi; Ama thahatna le chihna-a thaneitah ahi." 
Job36:6 Aman migilou hinkho ahoidoh pehpon, mi genthei chu dihna apen ahi." 
Job36:7 Michonpha ho-a konin amit aheimangpon, ahinla amaho lengho toh laltouna chunga atouvun; aman amaho chu a-itih-in atungdohjin, chule choisangin aumjiuvin ahi." 
Job36:8 Chule amaho bulkituh ahiuva, bolgentheina khaova kihen ahiule;" 
Job36:9 Chuteng aman athilbolule, asuhkhel nao chonvalna chu amusahjin ahi." 
Job36:10 Aman abilkolu chu sehgimna angaina diuvin ahonpeh-in, khansetna kona ahungkile theina diuvin thu apejin ahi." 
Job36:11 Amahon thu angaijuva, ama ajenule, anikhohou phattheina, chule akumhou nopsahna-a amandiu ahi." 
Job36:12 Ahinlah thu angailou vangule, chemjam'a mangthah uva, chule hetna beija thidiu ahi." 
Job36:13 Ahinla miphalhem hon lunghanna lungthima akikhol khomun, aman amaho ahen tengle atao jipouve." 
Job36:14 Amaho akhandon laijun athiuvin, ahinkhou chu mithenglouho lah-a aumjin ahi." 
Job36:15 Migenthei chu bolgentheija aumna-a konin ahuhdoh-in, suhgentheina-a anakhangu ahonpeh-e." 
Job36:16 Hitima chun aman hahsatna-a konin napuidoh intin, suhboina umlouna mun lentah-a nachon lutding, chule nadokhanga kiluiding chu nehtuitah dimset ding ahi." 
Job36:17 Ahinla nangin migiloute thutanna chu nagui lhunsahtan, thutannale thudih chun namandet tai." 
Job36:18 Lunghanna aumjeh-in chingtheijin, achutiloule ajepna-a chun nalhoh mang intin; chuteng lhatna loupitah chun nahuhdoh joulou ding ahi." 
Job36:19 Aman nahaona jabol intem? ajabol louding, sana ahiloule thaneina jouse jong angaisang louding ahi." 
Job36:20 Miho aumnao mun'a akisuhmangu janchu ngaicha hih-in. 
Job36:21 Chingtheijin, khangitlouna ngaito hih-in, ajehchu gimbolna sangin hichehi nalheng jotai." 
Job36:22 Vetan, Pathen'in athaneina-in achoisangtan, amabanga kon ahil theijem?" 
Job36:23 Alampi chu koijin aseipeh-am? ahiloule, nangin khangitlouna nabole, tia kon asei theijem?" 
Job36:24 Mihon avetjingu, anatoh choisang dingchu geldoh jingin." 
Job36:25 Mitinin hichu muthei jintin; mihemin gamlatah-a konin muthei jinte. 
Job36:26 Veuvin, Pathen chu aloupin, eihon ama ihepouve, akum jatho jong holdoh jouhoi ahipoi." 
Job36:27 Ajehchu aman twi vatneocha cha anasemin, twimeija konin go ajulhajin ahi." 
Job36:28 Hichu meibolin gomal asema, chule mihem chunga nengtah-a julhaji ahi." 
Job36:29 Meibol kithejal leho, ahiloule ahoubuh gingho khu mihemin ahetkhen thei jem?" 
Job36:30 Veovin, aman achunga chun avah ajalin, twipi todop chu akhu-in ahi." 
Job36:31 Ajehchu aman hitiho-a konhin mipi thu atanin, an neh nengtah-in apen ahi." 
Job36:32 Aman vah chu meibolin atomin, akikah-a hungdoh meibola kona avahlou nadin thu apen ahi." 
Job36:33 Chua hu gin chun aumdan chu avetsah-in, twimei umchan jong ganchaho ahetsah-e." 
Job37:1 Hichea jonghin kalung chang akihotnin, chule achomdoh dehdeh jenge." 
Job37:2 A-awgin le akama kona hungpot chu lunglut tah-in ngaijin. 
Job37:3 Aman hichu van pumpi noi-a asolin, akolphe chu leiset kolmong geija dingin aphet sah-in ahi." 
Job37:4 Hiche jouhin aw khat ahung kitumin, aloupina aw-a chun ahung ging dumdumin, chule a-aw akijahteng jongle amaho chu atuhtang louding ahi." 
Job37:5 Pathen chu kidang tah-in a-aw'in ahung kithongin; eiho hetjouhoi hilou thil loupitah abole. 
Job37:6 Ajehchu aman buhbang henga, leija umin atin; chubangma chun athahatna gophinle gohong henga jong aseijin ahi." 
Job37:7 Mijousen athilbol ahettheina diuvin, aman mitin khutchu amelchih-in ahi." 
Job37:8 Chuphatnin gamsaho akul sunguva alutnun, amuncheh-a aumtaove." 
Job37:9 Lhanglama konin huise ahungnungin, sahlama konin dap ahunge." 
Job37:10 Pathen hu-a konin buhbang aumin, chule twilentah jong akang jin ahi." 
Job37:11 Meibol satah jengjong chu twihu achun asunouvin, ameibol bangleh chu athejalin ahi." 
Job37:12 Aman athupeh jouseu vannoi leiset chung jouse-a abolna dingun, athumopma chun akipeikol lele-un ahi" 
Job37:13 Aman suhdih nading ham, agam ding ham, ahiloule hepina ding hama hichu asosah ahi." 
Job37:14 Vo Job, hichehi ngaijin; dingdet jinginlang, Pathen natoh kidangho chu ngaiton." 
Job37:15 Pathen'in itih-a amaho agoltoh-a, ameilom vah chu avahsah, nangin nahet em?" 
Job37:16 Meilhang ho gihdan, hetna chamkimpa thilbol kidangtah chu nahet em?" 
Job37:17 Lhanglam huija leiset athipsah teng, navon iti lummaham, nahet em?" 
Job37:18 Phatvet kilhajol bangtah-a nasa-a vanlaijol hi, nangin amatoh naphajal ham?" 
Job37:19 Muthim jeh-a kaseidiu kaseidoh theilou jeh-un, Ama henga kaseidiu neihilun." 
Job37:20 Kathusei dingchu hilding kangaijem? mikhatnin thu seile, thonlouva ama vallhuma umding ahi." 
Job37:21 Tun mihem hon meilhang ho lah-a vah vahtah chu amupouvin, ahinla huijin amuttheng jitan ahi." 
Job37:22 Sahlama konin van ahung thengselin, Pathen chu janale tijatnan adime." 
Job37:23 Hat chungnung thudol chu imudoh joupouve, ama thilboltheina, thutanlhahna, dihna-a chungnung pen ahin, aman sugenthei ponte." 
Job37:24 Hijeh-a chu mihon aginu ahin, milungching khatcha aman ajabol aumpoi." 
Job38:1 Chuin chimpei lah-a kon chun Pakaiyin Job ahindonbut nin, aseije." 
Job38:2 Hetna bei thuho-a thumop thimsahpa chu koiham? 
Job38:3 Pasal tah bangin nakong kigah-in; nangma thu kadoh ding nahin, neidonbut ding ahi." 
Job38:4 Leiset bul kaphupetna chu hoilai ja nana umem? hetkhen themna naneile phongdoh-in. 
Job38:5 Alet aneo koijin atotoh ham, nahet nam? ahiloule achunga khau chu kon ajandoh ham?" 
Job38:6 Abul chu ipi chunga kihendet naham? ahiloule aning song chu kon agaphu ham? 
Job38:7 Itih tengle jing valpa hon La asah khomuva, Pathen chapate jouse kipah tah-a ao dingu ham?" 
Job38:8 Ahiloule naobu-a kon potdoh ding banga, alonjal dingteng twipi kotpiho kon akha ham?" 
Job38:9 Aponsil dingin meilhang kasema, chule akitomna dingin muthim satah kasema," 
Job38:10 Hiche dinga chu akhonna kasema, kotgol hole kotpiho kasema," 
Job38:11 chule hichangei nahunga, nakhokhel louding; chule hilaija hi nahoithona twikinong chu kingading ahi kati louham?" 
Job38:12 Nakhohetna patna jingkah hi thupeh napeh khah-a, chule jingphalvah hi amun kihetnin kitikha em?" 
Job38:13 Hitia chu leiset kolmong gei atuh theija, chua kona mikhangseho thinlhah ahi nadiu nabol khah-am?" 
Job38:14 Namdet namna henga bonngan bangin heidoh in aumun; chule ponsil bangin adinguvin ahi. 
Job38:15 Migilou ho-a konin avah uchu lahpeh-in aumin, chule banjang nasatah chu kihehbong ding ahi." 
Job38:16 Twikhanglen nahho-a nalutkhah tah-em? ahiloule athuhdan kholla nachekhah tah-em? 
Job38:17 Nang dinga thina kotpiho kihongtam? ahiloule thina lim kotkhah ho namukhah tah-em? 
Job38:18 Leiset letdan hi nahet em? nahetsoh keile phongdoh temin. 
Job38:19 Vah umna lampi chu hoilai ham? chule muthim aumna mun hoilai hija," 
Job38:20 Agamgi geija chu cheding hitale chun, hiche a-in lampi chu naga hekhen nadem?" 
Job38:21 Chuche phat laija nanapen tahjeh-a chu nahet nam? ahiloule nanikho ho jong atamtah jeh-a nahet nam? 
Job38:22 Buhbangho kikhol na-a nalut khah tah-em? ahiloule gel kikholna namu khah-a; 
Job38:23 Genthei nikho, kidoule kisat nikho-a dinga kakheh hokhu namu khah-am?" 
Job38:24 Ipi lampia vah chu kikhenna, nisolam huihi leichunga kithecheh ham?" 
Job38:25 Twi lonlet nading twilam kon ahop khenna, ahiloule van ginle kehlhah nading lampi;" 
Job38:26 Mi umlouna leichung, mihem umlouna gamthipma gojuh nadinga;" 
Job38:27 Akham helsa gam donlouva umchu kidodoh sah kitdingle, hamdong hindoh sah kitdinga alampi chu kon asem ham?" 
Job38:28 Gotuijin pa aneijem? daitwi hohi koi hin ham? 
Job38:29 Buhbanghi koi naobu-a hung pengdoh ham? chule van dai bang jonghi koi hin ham? 
Job38:30 Twiho chu song bangin atah-in, chule twithuh chungchu akanin ahi." 
Job38:31 Nangman bombel khu nakan khom theija, ahiloule Juheisuhtun khu nalhap lhah theijem?" 
Job38:32 Ahsi somleng khu aphatna napuidoh theija, ahilou le sahlam Ahsilen le achate nalam kaithei jem?" 
Job38:33 Nangman van chondanho nahet em? hicheho kivaipohna chu leisetna nachesah theijem? 
Job38:34 Twi tamtah in nachup theina dinga, meilomho chu na awsoa nakou theiding ham?" 
Job38:35 Kolpheho chu achena dinguva nasol theija, chule nahenga, hilaija kaumuve ahinte thei dingu ham?" 
Job38:36 Sung gil lama chihna chu koijin akoi ham? ahiloule lungsung hetkhen themna chu koijin apeh ham? 
Job38:37 Chihna-a meibol hokhu asimtheija koiham? ahiloule van twibom khu kon alheilhah thei dingham? 
Job38:38 Itih-a leivui chu hungtah-a, chule alomho chu hung kimatchetna ham?" 
Job38:39 Keipi bahkai chu asaneh ding naholpeh theija, keipi bahkai nou gilkel chu navahva thei dingham?" 
Job38:40 Itihteng akosunguva koljiuva, achangpan naova itihleh changpang jiuham?" 
Job38:41 Va-ah noute khu Pathen henga apen penna, nehding lhasama alenlele tenguleh, kon neh apehji-ham?." 
Job39:1 Nangin songpi lah-a gam kelchaho itih-a asoding phat nahetnam? ahiloule sajuh-in nou itih-a aneiding namelchih theijem? 
Job39:2 Nangin, avoplai lhaho nasim theijem? ahiloule itih phatna asodiu nahet em?" 
Job39:3 Amaho aboh-un, anouvu asoh-in, agentheinau akoidoh jiuvin ahi." 
Job39:4 Anousenhou chu ahung maldoh-un, hamlah-a ahung khang doh-un, achedoh-un, ahungkile kitji tapouve." 
Job39:5 Gam sanganho chu kon alhadoh ham? ahiloule akihennao khao chu kon asutlhah ham? 
Job39:6 Gamthip chu a-inding, chule gamtem gamchu achenna munin kasemin ahi." 
Job39:7 Aman khopi-a mihonpi chu ima asahpon, ahoijipa husa jongchu ajajitapoi." 
Job39:8 Moljol ho chu ama lhatlena ahin, chule aman hamhingho jouse chu ahollen ahi." 
Job39:9 Sakol kinei chun nangma najennom ding hinam? ahiloule nagankula umnom ding hinam? 
Job39:10 Sakol kinei chu angonga khao nakhithei dingham? ahiloule loukaina nabuto-a, phaicham chu akaibot thei dingham?" 
Job39:11 Athahat nasat jeh-a chu nangman ama chu natahsan dingham? ahiloule natohding chu ama nanot khum ding ham? 
Job39:12 Namuchi hochu na-in'a ahinpoh lutna, nachangsala kholkhom dinga natahsan ding ham?" 
Job39:13 Vahong hochu lhaving hoitah napeh hilou ham? ahiloule vachalen chu lhaving le amulho napeh hilou ham? 
Job39:14 Aman leija atuiho adalhan, leivuijin alumsah-in," 
Job39:15 chule mikhat touvin akenga alhokhah theiding, ahiloule gamsa khat touvin asukeh theiding ahi jong ageldoh jipoi." 
Job39:16 Ama nou hilou bangtah-in anousenho chunga a-engsen, atohgimna chu kichatna beija mohseh ahi;" 
Job39:17 Ajehchu Pathen'in amanu akonin chihna chu aladoh-in, ahetkhen themna jengjong amanu apepon ahi." 
Job39:18 Amanu ama le ama sangtah-a akidopsang phatle, sakol le achunga toupa chu ataitomjin ahi." 
Job39:19 Nangman sakol khu thahatna napeh em? angonga along gingjeng jung navopeh ham? 
Job39:20 Nangman khaokhopi ho banga nakichat sah theijem? anahko loupitah chu tijat umtah ahi. 
Job39:21 Aman tolgo atinin akhotjin, athahatna-a athanomin; gal manchah choiho to kimuto dingin apotdohjin ahi." 
Job39:22 Kichat chu anuisatnin, akicha pon, chemjam'a konin jong anungchon ngaipon ahi." 
Job39:23 Livathei ama dounan aginglah lah-in, tengcha le lumho aval lahlah-in ahi." 
Job39:24 Aman leiset chu tijat-umtah le lunghang tah-in aval lhumin; hiche hi sumkon gin ahi tijong aman atahsanpoi. 
Job39:25 Aman sumkon ginho lah-a chun, haha, atin; chule gamlatah-a konin gal husa ajan, gal lamkaiho husan leh akithong gin ajan ahi." 
Job39:26 Nangma chihna jeh-a muthi chu lengji-a, alhaving teni chu lhanglam nga-a ajahji ham?" 
Job39:27 Muvanlai chu nangma thupeh-a lengtouva, chule chungsanga abuh aset ham?" 
Job39:28 Ama kol lah-a achengin, songkol chunga mundet tah-a chun acheng jin ahi." 
Job39:29 Hia konchun thading sa aholin, chule amitnin gamlatah amun ahi." 
Job39:30 Anousen houvin thisan achopmun, chule sa kithat umna mun'a chun, amanu aumjin ahi." 
Job40:1 Chukalvalin Pakaiyin Job adonbutnin, aseije:" 
Job40:2 Hatchung nungpen kinahpi pachun ama ahilding ham? Pathen themmo chansah pachun hichu donbut hen. 
Job40:3 Chule Job'in Pakai chu adonbutnin, aseije:" 
Job40:4 vetan, keima miphalou kahin, ipi kadonbut dingham? keiman kakhutnin kakam kisip tange." 
Job40:5 Khatvei kana seitan, ahinla donbut ponge, henge, nivei; hijongle seibe taponge." 
Job40:6 Chujouvin Pakaiyin chimpeija konin Job ahindonbut nin, aseije." 
Job40:7 Pasal tah bangin nakong kigah-in; nangma thu kadoh ding nahin, neidonbut ding ahi." 
Job40:8 Kathutan jonghi ima hilou neisopeh got ham? chonphat nachan theina dinga keima themmo neichan got ham? 
Job40:9 Nangin Pathen banga ban naneijem? ahiloule ama awgin banga nangma aw naginsah theijem? 
Job40:10 Tun nangma lalnale chungnun na-in kijem inlang, hoina le loipina-in nangma kijemin." 
Job40:11 Nalung hanna chungnung chu bunglhan lang, mikiletsah tapou chu venlang, sunemin." 
Job40:12 Mi kiletsah tapou chu venlang, loilha-in, chule migilou hochu aumnaova lholhan." 
Job40:13 Leivui lah-a amaho selkhomin; chule guhthimin amaiju kanpeh-in. 
Job40:14 Chutengle keiman jong nahenga nakhut jetlamin nahuhdoh jouding ahi tia kaphondoh ding ahi. 
Job40:15 Tun vetan, Behemoth khu nangma toh kasemkhom ahin, aman bongchal bangin hamhing anen ahi." 
Job40:16 Tun ven, athahat nachu akonga um ahin, chule ahatna chu a-oipoh laimu-a um ahi." 
Job40:17 Amei chu Cedar thing bangin achaloh sah-in; akhelbuh-a aphelom hochu akitomchah kheh-in ahi. 
Job40:18 Agu chu sum-eng hal tahbet tobang ahin, aguho chu thihlhon tobang ahi." 
Job40:19 Ama Pathen lampiho lah-a alupen ahin, asempa chun ama nailut nading chemjam asem thei ahi." 
Job40:20 Tahbeh-in gamsaho jouse kichepna molhochun, a-an nehding ahin sodohpeh-in ahi." 
Job40:21 Ama thingphung limnoi, pumpengle hamling neiho noija akoljin ahi." 
Job40:22 Thinglimho chun ale-limuva ama akhu-vin, vachadunga huisum hochun ama aum kimvelun ahi." 
Job40:23 Veovin, aman vadung chu achipkangin, akinopoi; aman Jordan chu akama achipkang joudingin atahsanin ahi." 
Job40:24 Amit tenin alaji-in, anahkuijin thangho chu aphujalpai jin ahi." 
Job41:1 Ngakoija Leviathan nakoidoh theiji em? ahiloule nakhao khaisuh-a chu alei nakhithei dingham? 
Job41:2 Nangin anah kohom sunga ngakoi nakoithei dem? ahiloule linga akha nasunpai thei dem? 
Job41:3 Nahenga ngehna tampi anei ding ham? nahenga aw nemma thu aseiding ham? 
Job41:4 Aman nangma toh kitepna asem dingham? a-imatih chana soh dinga nakipui thei dingham? 
Job41:5 Nangman ama chu vacha banga nakicheppi dingham? ahiloule nasoh numei ho dinga nahending ham? 
Job41:6 Agolhon golnop abolpeh dem? sumkolvei ho lah-a chu chan aneisahdiu hinam? 
Job41:7 Nangin avunchu thih hema nadimsah theija, ahiloule aluchu nga tenga nadimsah thei ding ham?" 
Job41:8 Achunga nakhut ngaminlang, galchu geldoh inlang, bolkit tahih in." 
Job41:9 Veovin, ama thajo dinga kinepna chu moh ahin; ama akimu sehseh jongleh mihem chu pailhah-a umji-a hilouham?" 
Job41:10 Ama tildoh dinga kingapcha mihang koima aumpoi, achutile koiham Ka-anga dingjou dinga?" 
Job41:11 Ama kalepeh kitna dinga koiham eikhamah? Vannoi pumpia thil umjouse hi keija ahi. 
Job41:12 Keiman atibahho hihen, athahatna hihen, amellom naho hijongle selgu ponge." 
Job41:13 Koiham aponsil chungnung hohlhah thei dinga? ahiloule kamdal ni puma akoma hung ngamding koiham? 
Job41:14 Ahaho chu tijat umtah-a kigol ahin, amaichang kotkhah hong ngamdinga koiham?" 
Job41:15 Alipho chu akiletsahna ahin, sinkhana kinamkhum banga kikha khuma ahibouve." 
Job41:16 Akah uva hu alutthei louna dingin, khat le khat hanaijin akinaijin ahi." 
Job41:17 Amaho suhkhen ahilouna diuvin, khatle khat kijom matnin, akilompelun ahi." 
Job41:18 Achit tengle vah ahung kikapdoh jin, amit ho chu jingkah ninel toh abange." 
Job41:19 Akama konin thaomei kong, chule meisi pahlahlah ahungdoh jin ahi." 
Job41:20 Belle khangbela kona twi asou bangin, anah homa konin meikhu ahungdoh jin ahi" 
Job41:21 Ahaina huchun meihol hochu ajap-am min, chule akama konin meikong apotdoh jin ahi." 
Job41:22 Angonga hatna aumin, amasanga lungkham nachu kipanan akilejin ahi." 
Job41:23 Aphe hal hochu akijop matcheh-in, amaho chu adet chetnun, suhlonghoi ahipoi." 
Job41:24 Alung chu song banga tah ahin, song sumhei noinung banga tah ahi." 
Job41:25 Ama ahung kipatdoh tengle mihat hojong akichauvin, kichatna anatsat jehchun, ama hotah jong akisutheng jiuvin ahi." 
Job41:26 Min chemjamin sat jongle ajolou ding, tengcha, tuljum, tenghem injong anang joupoi." 
Job41:27 Aman thih chu changpol bangin agelin, chule sum-eng jong thingmot bangin agel bepmin ahi." 
Job41:28 Thalpin ama ajamsah ngaipon, ahsongse jong ama dingin changkung tobang bep ahi." 
Job41:29 Tenghem hochu poljang abahsah bepmin, tengcha akilo khumteng aman anuisat jin ahi." 
Job41:30 Songhem hochu anoija aumin, aman bonlhoh chunga chun tenghem hochu athecheh jin ahi." 
Job41:31 Aman twi thuhtah chu bela twibangin asou sah-in, aman twikhanglen jong chu lou theikhat tobang asosah-e." 
Job41:32 Aman anunga lampi chu avahsah-in, min twithuh chu samkang bangin ageljiuvin ahi." 
Job41:33 Leichunga akibahpi ama tobang aumpoi, amahi kichat na beija kisema ahi." 
Job41:34 Aman thil sang kiti jouse amun, ama akiletsah chateho chunga leng ahi." 
Job42:1 Chuin Job'in Pakai adonbutnin, aseije:" 
Job42:2 Nangin ijakai nabol theijin, chule nalung ngaito jouse chu imachan adaltan theilou ahi, ti kahei," 
Job42:3 Hetna neilouva thumop sella chu koiham? hijeh chun kahetkhen theilou, keija dinga thil kidang behsehho chu kanaseidoh-in ahi." 
Job42:4 Ngaijin, nahenga katao ahi, keiman seijinge; keiman nahenga kangeh ding, chule nangin neiphondoh peh-in," 
Job42:5 Kakhojah theina nakhanga konin nangma chung changthu kanajan, tunvang kamitnin nangma amutai." 
Job42:6 Hijeh chun keima le keima kaki ki-dah in, leivuile vutlah-a kakisih-in ahi." 
Job42:7 Pakaiyin hiche thuho Job henga aseijou phatnin ahitin ahi, Pakaiyin Teman mi Eliphaz henga aseijin, nangmale nagolteni dounan kalungsatna akoujahtai. Ajehchu nanghon kasoh Job bangin keima chungthua thudih naseipouve." 
Job42:8 Hijeh chun tun nanghon bongchal sagile kelngoichal sagi kaijunlang, kasoh Job henga cheovin; nangho dinga govam thilto gatoh uvin; chule kasoh Job nangho dingin taovintin, ataona chu ama jeh-a kasanpeh ding ahi. Achutiloule kasoh Job banga kachung changthu adih-a naseilou jeh uva, nangolnao dungjuija kabolding ahi." 
Job42:9 Hitichun Teman mi Eliphaz le Shuh mi Bildad chule Naamath mi Zophar chu acheuvin, Pakaiyin athupeh dungjuijin abolun, Pakaiyin Job chu asampehtai." 
Job42:10 Chuin agolho dinga atao phatnin Pakaiyin Job asohchanna-a konin akiledoh sahtan; Pakaiyin jong Job chu anei masah sanga ajatnia tamin abetan ahi. 
Job42:11 Chujouvin asopi pasal ho jousele asopi numei ho jouse, chule masanga ama kihetpiho jouse ahenga ahungun, a-in'a chun changlhah anekhom mun; chuin amahon alunghem piuvin, chule Pakaiyin achunga thilse abol hojouse jehchun alhamonun, amitakipmin jong sumle sana bilba khatcheh apeovin ahi." 
Job42:12 Hitichun Pakaiyin Job chu ahinkho masalama sangin, ahinkho nununglama phatthei abohjon ahi. Ajehchu aman kelngoi sangsom le sangli, sangongsang gup, chule loukaithei cheh bongchal sangkhat, sanganpi sangkhat aneijin ahi." 
Job42:13 Aman chapa sagi le chanu thumjong aneijin," 
Job42:14 Chule aman apeng masapennu chu amin Jemima asah-in, chule aninanu minchu Kezia, cule athum nanu minchu Keren-happuch asah-in ahi." 
Job42:15 Chule gamsung pumpi-a chun Job chanute bangtah-a hoi aumpoi; chule amaho chu apauvin asopihou lah-a agouchan diu apecheh-in ahi. 
Job42:16 Hiche jouchun Job kum jakhatle kum somli ahingin, achapate le, achapate chate khangli geijin amun ahi." 
Job42:17 Hitichun Job tehkem keile, nikho lhingsetnin athitan ahi." 
Psalms1:1 Pathen ngaisahlouho thumopma chonlou, michonse te lamlhah-a jong dingle lou, i-sah louho touna-a jong toulou michu anun nome." 
Psalms1:2 Amavang alung lhaina chu Pakai danthu-ah aumin; adanthu chu sunle janin angaito jin ahi. 
Psalms1:3 Amachu vadung panga thingphung kiphut tobang, aphatcha aga sodoh jia, anajong gop louding; chule abol jousea lolhing ding ahi." 
Psalms1:4 Pathen ngaisah louho vang chutobang ahipoi. Ahin huijin amut mangji changvai tobang bou ahi. 
Psalms1:5 Hijeh chun Pathen ngaisahlouho chu thutan na-a ding jouloudiu, chujongle chonseho chu michonpha ho houkhom na-a pangloudiu ahi." 
Psalms1:6 Ajehchu Pakaiyin michonpha ho lampi chu ahen, hinla Pathen ngaisahlouho lampi vang mangthah ding ahi." 
Psalms2:1 Ibola Pathen hephalouho lunghanga, chule mihon mohthu homkeo angaitou ham?" 
Psalms2:2 Leiset lengho atoukhomun, vaipoho akihoutoh-un, Pakai leh athaonu dounan hitin aseijuve," 
Psalms2:3 Eihon akikana akhao holhou suhtanpeh-u hitin, akhaohou eihoa konin paimangu hite." 
Psalms2:4 Van ho-a toupa chu nui jintin, Pakaiyin amaho chu nuisat inte." 
Psalms2:5 Chutengle ahenguva lunghangin thu seijintin, lung nommo-a achunguva lunghang ding ahi." 
Psalms2:6 Hitajongle kalhang theng Zion chunga kalengpa katousah-e. 
Psalms2:7 Thupeh chu keiman phongdoh inge, Pakai chun kahenga, nangma kachapa nahin; tunia hi kahin nahi, ati." 
Psalms2:8 Kahenga thumin, keiman namtin chu nagoulo dinga kapeh ding, chule leiset kolmong geichu nagouchan dinga kapeh ding nahi." 
Psalms2:9 Nangin amaho chu thih tenggola navohcheh-a; beldengpa bel banga ahal ahala nasuhchip ding ahi. 
Psalms2:10 Hijeh chun, vo nangho lengho, tuhin kichih theijun; nangho vannoi thutan ho kihilphaovin." 
Psalms2:11 Pakai chu kichapumin jenunlang, kithing pumpumin kipah-un." 
Psalms2:12 Chapa chu chopmun; achutiloule lunghang intin lamdunga konin mahthah getnun nate, alunghan chu neocha a deujahji ahi. Ama-a atahsan koiho chu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms3:1 O Pakai, eidouhohi iti pun hitam! Eidouva kipanho chu atamlheh uve." 
Psalms3:2 Pathen ama kithopi ding aumpoi, tia kahina thudol seija chu tamtah ahi." 
Psalms3:3 Ahinla, vo Pakai, nangma chu keidinga lumdal nahin, kaloupi nale kalu eidop sangpeh-a chu nahi." 
Psalms3:4 Keima ka Pakai henga aw gingin kataovin, aman alhang thenga konin eihin houve." 
Psalms3:5 Keima kalumin, ka-imujin; Pakaiyin eihoi damjeh-in, kahung thoudoh kitne." 
Psalms3:6 Eidouva eium kimvel mipi sangsom hi kicha taponge. 
Psalms3:7 Hung thouvin, O Pakai; vo ka Pathen, neihuh doh-in! Ajehchu kamelmate jouse chu abeng gu-u najep pehjin; Pathen ngaisah louho ha chu navoh pulpeh jie." 
Psalms3:8 Huhhingna chu Pakaiya ahi. Na phatthei bohna chu namite chunga um ahi. 
Psalms4:1 Vo kachon phatna Pathen, kakou tengle neihouvin, gentheija kaum tengle nangin neipanpijie, ka chunga hepina neijinlang, kataona ngaijin." 
Psalms4:2 Vo nangho mihem chapate, kaloupi nahi itihchan jachatna a nahei diuham? Itih changei mohthu homkeo nangailut uva chule jouthu naholdiu ham?" 
Psalms4:3 Ahinla Pakai chun ama dinga Pathen ngaisahho chu amadin akhendohtai ti hethemuvin; keiman ama kakou tengle Pakaiyin ajahding ahi. 
Psalms4:4 Kichageuvin dingun lang, chonse hih un; najalkhun chunga lungthimin kihou unlang, thipbeh chan umun." 
Psalms4:5 Chonphatna le ganlhainaho chu peuvinlang, chule Pakaiya natahsanu ngamdetnun."
