Psalms4:6 Mi tamtah-in thilpha kon eimusah untem? atiuve; Pakai namaiso vah chu kachunguva hindomsangin. 
Psalms4:7 Nangin, midanghon changle lengpitwi tamtah aneilaijuva sanga chungnungjo kipana kalungsunga nakoije." 
Psalms4:8 Keima lungmong tah-a kalupma chuleh ka-imut ding ahi: Ajehchu Pakai, nangma bou bitkeija eichensah nahi." 
Psalms5:1 O Pakai, kathusei neihin ngaipeh inlang, kalunggel neingaito peh-in." 
Psalms5:2 Ka lengpa leh ka Pathen, kakouna aw hi neingaipeh-in; ajehchu nahenga katao ding ahi." 
Psalms5:3 Ka-aw hi jingkah le najah ding ahi; O Pakai jingkahle chunglam vea nahenga taona kahin lhutding ahi. 
Psalms5:4 Ajehchu nangma gitlouna-a kipahji-a Pathen nahipon; thilse tojong chengkhom thei nahipoi. 
Psalms5:5 Namitmu-a mingol dingthei louding; nangin khansetna boljouse nahot ahi. 
Psalms5:6 Nangman jou seiho chu nasuhmang ding; Pakaiyin thisanso hat le milhemlha chu athet ding ahi. 
Psalms5:7 Ahinla keivang, namilungset haotah jeh-in na insunga chun hunglut ingting; chule nangma kichapumin na houin theng lam ngan nahin houvinge." 
Psalms5:8 O Pakai, kamelmate jeh-in nadihna-a chun neipuijin; kamasanga nalampi hinlhung jangin." 
Psalms5:9 Ajehchu akam sunguva kitahna aumpon, asunglamu gitlouna adimin, alol homu lhan kihongsa ahin, aleijuvin amaho akiphatsei juve." 
Psalms5:10 O Pathen, amahohi, sumangin, athu hiluva amaho lhuhsah-in, Nangma nadoujeh ule asuhkhel nao tamtah jehchun, mipi lah-a konin amaho paidoh jengin." 
Psalms5:11 Ahinla atahsanu nangma-a ngamdet jouse kipah uhen; Nangman amaho nahonbit jal-in kipanan ao vuhen, namin ngailuho jouse jong nanga kipah uhen." 
Psalms5:12 Ajehchu Pakai, nangman, michonpha phatthei boh-in natin, khotona-a lum banga nadal kimvel ding ahi." 
Psalms6:1 Pakai lunghangin neipho danlang, lungphamon jong neijep hih-in." 
Psalms6:2 Vo Pakai kalhahsam jeh-in nei hepin, vo Pakai, kaguhon eichi natsoh jeh in neidamsah in." 
Psalms6:3 Kahinna jong agenthei behsehtai: ahinla, O Pakai, itihchan hiding ham?" 
Psalms6:4 O Pakai, hung kinunglen lang kahinna huhhingin; oh nahepinaho jal-in neihuhhing in." 
Psalms6:5 Ajehchu thina-a chun nangma geldohna aumtapon, lhankhuh sunga nangma kon nathangvah ding ham?" 
Psalms6:6 Kakhoisat satna-in kalel lhehtan; Janseh-in kajalkhun kijapnan kaneijin, kalupna kamitlhin kachap lhop-in ahi." 
Psalms6:7 Kamit jong lungkhamna jeh-in angui lhatan, Kamelmaho jouse jeh-in atehsetan ahi." 
Psalms6:8 Pakaiyin kataona eingaipeh tah jeh-in; khansetna bolteho jouse kakoma konin chemang uvin. 
Psalms6:9 Pakaiyin kathumna eijah pehtan: Pakaiyin kataona eisanpeh ding ahi. 
Psalms6:10 Kamelmate jouse jahchao henlang thohgim lheh uhen. Hungkileu henlang photlot louvin jahchao hen. 
Psalms7:1 Pakai ka Pathen, nangma-ah katahsan kangame, eibol gentheiho jouse-a konin neihuh doh-in lang, neihoidoh in." 
Psalms7:2 Achutiloule, eihuhdoh ding umloupetnahi, keipi bahkai banga kahina abotela, ahal hala akoiding ahi." 
Psalms7:3 O Pakai ka Pathen, hichehi kabol ahia, kakhutna khansetna uma ahile;" 
Psalms7:4 kaki champi khat chu thilse-a kalethuh-a ahileh, (henge, ajehbeija kaki champi khat chu kamelma dinga kapehdoh ahitan):" 
Psalms7:5 Melma chun kahinna hi bolgenthei henlang kilahjeng hen; henge, kahinkhohi, tolto lhobeh henlang, kaloupina hi leivui toh chil halhen." 
Psalms7:6 O Pakai, nalung hanna-a, hung kipat doh-in, kamelma teho lunghana jeh-in nangma hung kidomsangin; chule nangman nathupeh banga thutandin keima dingin hung thoudoh-in." 
Psalms7:7 Hijeh-a chu mipi kikhomho chun nangma naum kimvel diu ahin; amaho khohsahna jal chun chungsang lama kiletan. 
Psalms7:8 Pakaiyin mihemte thu atanding ahi: O Pakai, kachon phatna dungjuile keija um dihna dungjuijin kathu tanin." 
Psalms7:9 Oh migiloute gitlouna chu kichai hen; ahinla midihte chu tung doh-in; ajehchu Pathen chonphatna chun lungsungle lunggel apatepjin ahi. 
Psalms7:10 Eingah tupma chu, lungsung dihtah huhdohji-a Pathen'a kon ahi." 
Psalms7:11 Pathen chu michonpha ho thutan ahin, Pathen chu niseh-in migilouho chunga alunghangin ahi." 
Psalms7:12 Amachu akilehei louva ahileh, Aman achemjam anol hema, athalpi ajet kona, kigosa dema umding ahi." 
Psalms7:13 Thina manchah ho jong chu amandin agongtoh demin; misugenthei ho dounan athalchang ho asemtohtai. 
Psalms7:14 Veovin, khansetna chu naosonat in anan, thilphalou chu avopmin, thujou chu ahung penglhatai." 
Psalms7:15 Aman kotong asemin, alaithuh in, akotong sema chun ama alhalutne." 
Psalms7:16 Agitlouna chu ama luchang ngeija hungkilentin, a hunam thilbol chu alujanga hung chuding ahi." 
Psalms7:17 Achonphatna dungjuijin keiman Pakai chu vahchoi jing ting, chungnung pen Pakai minin vahchoinan la sange." 
Psalms8:1 Vo Pakai ka Pakaiyu, leiset pumpi sunga naminhi iti lula lul hitam! vanho chunga naloupina nakoijin ahi." 
Psalms8:2 Nangman melmate phulapa suhthipna dingle nangma melmaho jeh-in, naosen hole naonoichep laiho kama konin thahatna chu nasudet tan ahi." 
Psalms8:3 Keiman nakhut junga nasemsa, navan munho kavetle-a, nangman nasuhdetsaho lha leh ahsi ho kavetji teng;" 
Psalms8:4 Mihem hi ipi hija nangin hibanga nagelkhoh-a? chule mihem chapa hi ipiham hibanga nakhohsah? 
Psalms8:5 Ajehchu nangin vantil ho sangin themkhat bou nanoinun sah-in, chule jana leh loupina lallukhuh nakhuh peh-in ahi." 
Psalms8:6 Nangman ama chu nakhutsohho jouse chunga vaihomin nasemin; thiljouse ama kengto noija nakoije: 
Psalms8:7 Kelngoile bongchal jouse, henge, gamlah a gamsaho;" 
Psalms8:8 Chunga leng vachate, twikhanglen'a ngaho, chule ipi hijongleh twikhanglen'a lamlha ho jouse chunga vaipodin nasemin ahi." 
Psalms8:9 Vo Pakai ka Pakaiyu, leiset pumpi sunga naminhi iti lulla lul hitam!" 
Psalms9:1 Vo Pakai, kalung pumpin nangma vahchoi jingting; nathilbol kidang jouse katah lang ding ahi." 
Psalms9:2 Nangma-a kipah-in thanominge: Vo chungnung pen Pakai, namin vahchoilan sange." 
Psalms9:3 Kamelmate anungjam tengule, na-angsunga lhu uva mangthah diu ahi." 
Psalms9:4 Ajehchu nangman kathemnale kachungthu navetup in; dihtah-a thutanin laltouna-a chun natouve. 
Psalms9:5 Nangin Pathen hephalouho naphohjin, migilou chu nasumangin; aminu chu tonsotnadin nanoimang jin ahi." 
Psalms9:6 Vo nangho melmate, manthah na ho chu kumkho-a din suhmangin aumin; chule nangin khopi ho nasumangin; amaho hetjingna chu amahoto amantha tan ahi." 
Psalms9:7 Ahinla Pakai chu tonsotna umding ahin; Aman alaltouna chu thutanna dingin adotoh tan ahi. 
Psalms9:8 Aman chonphatna-a vannoi hi athu atanding, aman lungthengsela mipi ho thutanna aneiding ahi." 
Psalms9:9 Suhgentheija umte dingin Pakai chu kiselna ahin, lungkham laija kiselna mun ahi." 
Psalms9:10 Chule nangma min heho chun atahsanu nanga angapdiu ahi. Ajehchu nangma holte chu, Pakai, nangman nadalha ngaipon ahi." 
Psalms9:11 Zion'a chenghon Pakai vahchoi La saovin; Athilbolho chu mipi lah-a phongdoh-un. 
Psalms9:12 Aman thisan kholchilna aneiteng amaho chu ahe jingin; aman mi kineosah ho ka awgin asumil ngaipoi. 
Psalms9:13 O Pakai, kachunga hepina neijinlang; thina kotpi-a kona eikaidohpa, eihot te-a kona kathohnahi neigel peh-in." 
Psalms9:14 Zion chanu kotpi phungho-a nangma thangvahna jouse kamusah theina dingin, nami huhhingna-a chun kipah inge." 
Psalms9:15 Pathen hephalouho chu amaho sem kotong sunga alhalutnun; alenthang kamuva amaho keng mama a-oh jiuve. 
Psalms9:16 Pakai chu athutan lhah natohna-a hetdoh-in aumjin, migilou chu ama khutsohho ngeija a-oh jiuve." 
Psalms9:17 Migilou chu damuna kilehlutding, chule Pathen sumil namjouse jong kilehlut ding ahi." 
Psalms9:18 Ajehchu alhasama chu suhmilin umjing pontin, migenthei te kiholna tonsotnin mangpai ponte." 
Psalms9:19 Thouvin, vo Pakai, mihem kijosah hihhelin, namitmu tah-in Pathen hephalouho thu kitanhen." 
Psalms9:20 Vo Pakai, namtinin mihem bou akihi ti ahettheina diuvin amaho chu kichatsah-in." 
Psalms10:1 Vo Pakai, ibolla gamlatah-a ding nahim? Lungkham laija ibola kisela nahim?" 
Psalms10:2 Migilou chun ahoithona lamin mivaicha asugentheijin; athilgonu chun amaho kipalsah jinghen. 
Psalms10:3 Ajehchu migilou chun alung ngaichat asongin, Pakaiyin ahotlam kilosetna-a chun amaho anun nomui." 
Psalms10:4 Migilou chun ahoithona maiso-a konin Pathen holponte: Pathen chu ama ngaitona jouse-a aumpoi. 
Psalms10:5 Alamlhah jouse phattinin lungkhamna jeng ahin; nathutan lhahho chu sangtah-a um ahin, amuphapon; amelmate jouse chu anuisatnin ahi." 
Psalms10:6 Aman alungsunga, keima kiling ponge; ajehchu kidoupi kanei louding ahi, ati." 
Psalms10:7 Akamsung chu gaosapna, joulhepna, dohabolna adimsetnin; alei noija setnale mohthuhomkeu bou aume." 
Psalms10:8 Ama khotina kichanlhih na munho-a atoujin; munthip ho-a themona neilouho athatjin: amit tenin panpibei ho guhthimin avelhin ahi. 
Psalms10:9 Akosunga keipi bahkai bangin guhthimin akiselin achanglhi jin; migenthei chu matdin achangin, alensunga aloilutnin amanjitan ahi." 
Psalms10:10 Migenthei chu amihatpa koma alhuh nadin, ama akineosah-in tolla abohkhup jin ahi." 
Psalms10:11 Aman alungthimin, Pathen'in asumilin, amai aseltai atin, aman itih-in mutaponte, ati." 
Psalms10:12 Vo Pakai, vo Pathen, thouvin lang nakhut domsangin, mikineosah ho chu sumil hih-in." 
Psalms10:13 Ipidinga mikhang gilouvin Pathen anoise ham? Aman alungsunga, nangin hichehi ngaichapon nate atin ahi." 
Psalms10:14 Ajehchu ven thilphaloule thangthipna nakhutna phulahding chu nangin namutai. Migenthei chu nahenga ahung kipelutnin; nangma pabeiho panpi chu nahi. 
Psalms10:15 Mi engsele miphalou banjang suhboh peh-in, agitlouna naholmohel kahsen holin." 
Psalms10:16 Pakai chu atonsot atonsotna leng ahin; Agamsunga kona Pathen hephalouho amangthah uve. 
Psalms10:17 Pakai nangin mi kineosah ho ngaichat najah peh-in, nangman alungthimu nagot pehding, chule najahna dinga nakol nasun ding ahi." 
Psalms10:18 Leiset mihemin abolgenthei kitlouna dinga, paneilou leh bolgentheija umho thu chu natanpeh ding ahi." 
Psalms11:1 Pakaiya katahsan ngaminge; iti dana nanghon kahinna jah-a, vacha bangin namolsang lama jamin neitiu ham?" 
Psalms11:2 Ajehchu, veuvin, mikitah ho lungchang guhthima kapna dingin, migilou hon athalpiu ajebongun, athal changu akhaoto asuto taove." 
Psalms11:3 Abulpiho akisuh mangle, michonphan ipi abolthei tahding ham?" 
Psalms11:4 Pakai chu a-houin thenga achengin, Pakai laltouna chu van'a um ahin, amit tenin ahinven, mihem chatehi apatepmin ahi." 
Psalms11:5 Pakaiyin michonpha chu apatepjin, migiloule pumhat mangho chu ahinna in ahon ahi." 
Psalms11:6 Pakaiyin migiloute chunga chu meihol, mei le kaat ajuhsah-a, chule kichat umtah khopihui anunsah ding; Hichehi achandiu khon chu hiding ahi." 
Psalms11:7 Ajehchu chonphatna Pathen chun chonphatna chu angailun; milungthengin ama mel amujin ahi. 
Psalms12:1 Pakai, neipanpin, ajehchu Pathen he-a mi aumtapoi; ajehchu mihem chate lah-a konin tahsan um mi alosamjin ahi." 
Psalms12:2 Amitakipmin aheng akomah thumanlou jeng aseijun, pachat lhemna muh leh lungtho neipumin thu aseijui." 
Psalms12:3 Pakaiyin pachat lhemna muhle hoitho thu seina lei chu atanmui ding ahi. 
Psalms12:4 Amahon, ileijun eihon jona neiju hite, imuhhoula eihoa ahin, ichunguva Pakai koiham? atiuvin ahi." 
Psalms12:5 Pakaiyin, vaichaho kisuh gentheina jehle, lhasamho khoisatjeh-in, tun kipat ingting, noise-a nuisatpa-a konin amachu huhdoh-in koijinge atin ahi." 
Psalms12:6 Pakai thusei ho chu thu thengtah ahin; dangka leiset lhumpi sunga vel sagivei kisutheng tobang ahi. 
Psalms12:7 O Pakai, nangman amaho chingjingin natin, amaho chu tukhanga pat tonsot geijin vetupnan nate." 
Psalms12:8 Miphalouho chu akichoisang teng, khangitlouna chu muntina avahlen ahi." 
Psalms13:1 Vo Pakai, itihchan neisuhmil ding ham? Tonsot geijinem? Keima-a kona namai itihchan nasel dingham?" 
Psalms13:2 Niseh-a lungsunga lunggimna neija kahinna-a itihchan kagelgel dingham? Kamelmate kachunga itihchan choisanga umdiu ham? 
Psalms13:3 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, ngaitonlang neingaipeh in, kamitteni vahsah in, ajole mithi ihmutnin ihmu khaget inge." 
Psalms13:4 Ajole kamelma chun ama kajoutai, tintin; chule kalonle tengle eidouva chu kipah getninte." 
Psalms13:5 Ahinla nahepina ka tahsantan; nami huhhingna-a kalung kipahding ahi. 
Psalms13:6 Aman thil ninglhing set eibolpeh jeh-in, Pakai vahchoinan keiman la sange." 
Psalms14:1 Mingolin alung thimin Pathen aumpoi, tin aseije. Amaho akisuboh-un, thil thet um abolun, thilpha bola khatcha aumpoi." 
Psalms14:2 Ahetoh them milungching leh Pathen hola aumkhatle, tin Pakai chun van'a konin mihem chate ahinvesuh-in ahi." 
Psalms14:3 Amaho ahilou lama achegam taovin, abonun aboh soh gamtaove: thilpha bola aumpouve, khat jengcha jong aumpoi." 
Psalms14:4 Khangitlouna bolho jousen hetna himhim anei lou uham? Amahon achanglhah neh bangun kamite abahgamun, Pakaila akoupouvin ahi." 
Psalms14:5 Chua chun amaho kichatah-in aummui; ajehchu Pathen hi michonpha khang sunga aumin ahi. 
Psalms14:6 Nanghon migenthei thuhil chu najachat piuvin, hinla Pakai chu ama kiselna ahi." 
Psalms14:7 Israelte kihuh hingna chu Zion'a kona hitavele o! Pakaiyin amite asohchan naova kona ahin lepuikit tengle, Jacob chu thanom intin, Israel chu kipah ding ahi." 
Psalms15:1 Pakai nahoubuh-a koi aumin? nalhang thenga koi acheng tadem? 
Psalms15:2 Lungdih-a chonale, chonphatna bola, chule alungsunga thudihsei." 
Psalms15:3 Akama mi seise lou, aheng akom chunga jong thilse bollou, chule aheng akom i-sah louva douva bol hilou." 
Psalms15:4 Amitmua miphalou vetda, ahia Pakai gingho vang jabol; ama le ama kisuhkhah nadia kihahsel leh lungkhel kitlou." 
Psalms15:5 Apung dinga sumpa hom ngailou, monabei chunga nehguh la ngailou mi. Hicheng thilho bolla chu imatih-a longlou ding ahi." 
Psalms16:1 Vo Pathen neiching phan, ajehchu nangah katahsan kangamin ahi." 
Psalms16:2 Vo kahinna, nangin Pakai henga, nangma ka Pakai nahin, nangma kom tailouva thilpha kaneipoi, nati." 
Psalms16:3 Ahinla leisetna mithenghole milul ho henga, amaho-a chun kakipana jouse aumji-e nati." 
Psalms16:4 Pathen dang nung del loiho chu alung hesohnao pungding; don thilpeh dinga apeh-u thisan jong katodoh louding, ahilouleh aminu jong kaphahpoh louding ahi." 
Psalms16:5 Pakai chu kagouchanle kakhon ahi, nangman kachanvou chu neivettup peh-e." 
Psalms16:6 Tena khaoho chun munpha lai ho eikitedoh pehjin, henge, keiman gouphatah kaneitai." 
Psalms16:7 Keima thumop eipepa Pakai chu phatthei boh inge, jan tengle kalungthimin eihiljin ahi." 
Psalms16:8 Keiman Pakai chu kamasanga kaumsah jingin, ama kajetlama aumjeh-in keima kiling ponge." 
Psalms16:9 Hijeh chun kalung akipah-in, kaloupina akipah-in; Katahsa jonghi kinepna-a choldo ding ahi." 
Psalms16:10 Ajehchu nangman kahinna hi damuna nadalhah lou ding; namitheng chu mon mangna jong namusah louding ahi. 
Psalms16:11 Nangin hinna lampi neimusah-in; naumna chu kipanan adimin, nakhut jetna chu tonsot kipana uma ahi." 
Psalms17:1 Vo Pakai, adihchu ngaijin lang ka kana hi ngailhin, alhem hilou ka kama kataona ngaina din nana hinsungin." 
Psalms17:2 Kachunga thulhuhna chu nanga kon hihen lang, namit tenin thil kibangho chu vehen." 
Psalms17:3 Nangin kalungthim nakhol chilin, janteng nei vilin, nangman neipatep in, ima namu louding ahi; kakamin suhkhel aneilou dinghi kakigel lhahna ahi." 
Psalms17:4 Mihem natohho thudol, nakama thusoh jal-in, mi sumang jingho lampiho-a konin kakiveng tupmin ahi." 
Psalms17:5 Kakalsona kalhuh lounadin, nalampi ho kajotna-a neituh-in." 
Psalms17:6 Vo Pathen, keiman nangma kakouvin, nangman neingaipeh innate; keima lama nakol hinsungin lang kathusei neingaipeh-in." 
Psalms17:7 O nanga atahsanu ngam jouse, amaho douho khutna kona khut jetna huhhingji-a chun, nangailut kidang chu neimusah-in." 
Psalms17:8 Nalungset khat bangin neihongin lang, nalhalim noija neiselin," 
Psalms17:9 Eisumang thei migilouva konle, thitheina melma eium chahho-a konin neihongin." 
Psalms17:10 Amahon alungthimu thaotah chu akhahtupmun; akamun kiletsah tah-in thu aseijuve. 
Psalms17:11 Amahon tun kakalsonao chana ei-umun; tollhanga suhngem dingin, amitnun eiveuvin," 
Psalms17:12 Keipi bahkaijin asatha apetel got bangle, keipi donglaijin munthip ho-a achanlhih abanguvin ahi." 
Psalms17:13 Vo Pakai, thouvin, ama chu lunglhah sah-in, nachemjamin migilouva konin kahinkho huhdoh-in," 
Psalms17:14 Vo Pakai, nakhutna um mihemte-a konle vannoi mihem hiche hinkho-a chan neiho, atumpiu nagou sela nadip dimpeh ho-a konin kahinkho huhdoh-in; amaho chapang tamtah ahiuvin, athilu amoh chu achasen hou adalhahpeh taovin ahi." 
Psalms17:15 Keiman vang namai chu chonphatna-a kahinvet ding; Nangma bangtah-a kahungtho teng keima kalungna chimtante. 
Psalms18:1 Vo Pakai, kathahat nan, keiman nangma ngailunge." 
Psalms18:2 Pakai chu kasongpile kakulpi chule eihuh hingpa ahi; ka Pathen, kathahatna, achunga katahsana kangap ding ahi; ka lumle, kahuh hingna ki, chuleh ka kulpidet ahi." 
Psalms18:3 Vahchoi dia lomtah Pakai chu kou ingting, chutichun kamelma te-a konin huhdoh in umtange." 
Psalms18:4 Thina lung genthei nahon eiumkimvelin, Pathen nahsahlouho twisoh-in eikichatsah-e." 
Psalms18:5 Thikholkhul lung genthei nahon eiumkimvelin, thina thangho chun ei kimaito pi-e." 
Psalms18:6 Kagen theina a Pakai chu kakouvin, ka Pathen kasamin; Aman a-houin'a konin ka aw ajan, kakana chu a-angsung geijin aluttan ahi." 
Psalms18:7 Chujouvin leiset akilingin, akihottai; Ama lunghan jeh-in lhangbul ho chu achatnin akihottai." 
Psalms18:8 Anah homa konin meikhu akitung doh-in, akama kona mei chun akavam heltan, hichun meihol a-al lenglung sah-in ahi." 
Psalms18:9 Aman vanho jong asonkunin, ahung kumlhan; muthim lhangkhal chu akengto noija aumin ahi." 
Psalms18:10 Ama Cherub chunga atouvin, alenge, henge, hui lhavingho chungah alengin ahi." 
Psalms18:11 Aman muthim lhangkhal chu ama munthip min asemin; akimvela apon in chu twipi thimjejule van'a meilhang satah chu ahi. 
Psalms18:12 Amasanga vahpem puma chun meilhang satah achen, gelchangle meikong alhan ahi." 
Psalms18:13 Pakaiyin vanho jong thongjejun aginsah in, chungnung pen chun a-aw asodoh in ahile gelchangle mei alhan ahi." 
Psalms18:14 Henge, aman athal changho chu asoldoh-in ahile akithe chehtai, aman kolpheho akapdoh in, chule amaho chu ajoutan ahi." 
Psalms18:15 O Pakai nangman napho-a nanah nakhon khum tengle twilona jouse akimujin, chule vannoi leiset bulpi jouse jong akilangdoh jin ahi." 
Psalms18:16 Aman chunglama konin asolin, eituh in, twi tamtah lah-a konin eikaidoh-e." 
Psalms18:17 Aman kamelma hattah-a kon leh eihot bolho-a konin eihuhdoh-e; ajehchu amaho keidingin ahat lheh jengun ahi. 
Psalms18:18 Hamsetna kato-nin amahon eikitopiuvin, ahinla Pakai chu kaki ngaina ahi." 
Psalms18:19 Aman mun lentah khatna jong eipuidoh-in, kachunga akipajeh-in eihuh dohtan ahi." 
Psalms18:20 Kachon phatna dungjuijin Pakaiyin kipaman eipen, kakhut then dungjuijin eilethuhnai." 
Psalms18:21 Ajehchu keiman Pakai lampiho chu kajui jingin, ka Pathen'a konin giloutah-in kapotdoh khapoi." 
Psalms18:22 Athutan lhahna jouse kamasanga aumin, adan kisemho chu keija konin kapaidoh khapoi." 
Psalms18:23 Ama anga chondih jong kahin, kakhan gitlouna-a konin kakihongbit jinge." 
Psalms18:24 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin chonpha kahinale, amitmua kakhut athen dungjuijin eilethuh jin ahi." 
Psalms18:25 Mihepi themho chu hepina musah-in natin; mi chondihho chu nachondihna vetsah-in nate; 
Psalms18:26 Athenga chu nathenna musah-in natin, lung gilouho chu nalung gitlouna musah-in nate." 
Psalms18:27 Ajehchu nangin aki bolgenthei hochu huhdoh-in natin; akichoisangho chu nasotlhah ding ahi. 
Psalms18:28 Ajehchu nangin kathaomei neivah peh-in natin, Pakai ka Pathen'in keija um muthim hi salvah-inte." 
Psalms18:29 Ajehchu nang jal-in sepaihon lah-a kalhaijin, ka Pathen jal-in kulbang kachopkhupme." 
Psalms18:30 Pathen dingin alampi apha chamkimin; Pakai thu chu patepmin aumin; Ama tahsan jousedin ama chu lumdal ahi. 
Psalms18:31 Ajehchu Pakai tailou koiham Pathen? ahiloule i-Pathen'u tailou songpi koiham? 
Psalms18:32 Hatna-a kakong eigehpeh-a leh kalampi sempha chamkima Pathen ahi. 
Psalms18:33 Aman kakeng chu sajuhpi keng bangin asemin, kamunsangho chunga eiumsahjie." 
Psalms18:34 Kaban teni-a thih thalpi kaheboh theinadin, aman kakhut teni gal bolje ahile." 
Psalms18:35 Nangin nahuhhingna lumdal jong chu neipen; nakhut jetlamin neikai doh-in nanun nemna chun lentah eisoi. 
Psalms18:36 Kalhuh louna dingin, kakho lhahna ding neisem letpeh-in ahi." 
Psalms18:37 Kamelmate nung kadelin, kaphan, amaho kasuh manghel kahsen kahungkile jipon ahi." 
Psalms18:38 Amaho athodoh joulouhelna diuvin kamavon, kakengto noija alhusoh helun ahi." 
Psalms18:39 Ajehchu nangin galsatna-a ding thahatna kong neigah peh-in; keima douna-a hungkipatdohho chu kanoija nasunem hele. 
Psalms18:40 Eithetbol ho chu kasuhmang theinadin, nangman kamelmate ngong hochu neipetan ahi." 
Psalms18:41 Amaho apengun, ahinla ahuhdoh dingula khatcha aumpon; Pakai jengjong akouvun, ahinla aman adonbut dehpouve." 
Psalms18:42 Chu jouvin huinung masanga vutvai bangin amaho kavogoijin; lamlena thilboh bangin kapai doh-in ahi. 
Psalms18:43 Nangin miho kisat tona lah-a konin neihuh doh-in; chule nangin keima Pathen hepha louho luchangin neisemin, kahetkhah lou mihon eijendiu ahi." 
Psalms18:44 Kathulhut ajah jah-uleh eijoppai juntin; gamdang miho chu kahenga hungkipelut diu ahi. 
Psalms18:45 Gamdang miho chu hung lhasam untin, akulpi houva kona kithing pumpuma hung dohdiu ahi." 
Psalms18:46 Pakai ahing jinge; kasongpi chu nunnom hen; eihuh hinga Pathen chu choisangin umhen. 
Psalms18:47 Kaphu eilahpeh-a, miho kanoija sunema chu Pathen ahi." 
Psalms18:48 Aman kamelma te-a konin eihuhdoh-e; henge, keima douna-a hung kipatdoh ho chung vuma neidom sangin; hunam mipa-a konin neihuh doh tai." 
Psalms18:49 Hijeh chun O Pakai, Pathen hephalou ho lah-a chun nangma na thangvah ingting, chutengle nangma min vahchoi la sange." 
Psalms18:50 Aman huhhingna lentah chu alengpa apen, chule athaonu David leh achilhahte chunga chun ahepina tonsotna din amusah-e." 
Psalms19:1 Vanhon Pathen loupina aphong doh-un; chule vanthamjolin akhutsem amusah-e. 
Psalms19:2 Sunin sun jah-a thu aseijin, chule jan-in jan jah-a hetna amusah-in ahi." 
Psalms19:3 Hichea chun thu kisei aumpon, paole oginjong akijapoi." 
Psalms19:4 Atena khao chu leiset pumpi-a chule athu uchu vannoi leiset kolmang geijin akikhon; Hicheho-a chun aman nisa dingin ponbuh khat asongin," 
Psalms19:5 Hichu moulang a-indana kona hungdoh tobang ahin, kilhaitetna-a lhaiding pasal hat bangin athanome." 
Psalms19:6 Apotdohna chu van mong langkhatna kipan ahin, alhuna chu among langkhat chan ahi; chuche asatna-a kona kisela imacha aumpoi." 
Psalms19:7 Pakai dan chu achamkimin, hinna sempha-a ahi; Pakai thu hettohsah chu athengin, mimol ho achih sah-e." 
Psalms19:8 Pakai dan kisemchu adih-in, lungsung akipasah-in; Pakai dan thupeh chu athengin, mit teni avahsah-in ahi." 
Psalms19:9 Pakai ginchu athengin, a-imatih channa aumjingin; Pakai thutanlhahho chu thutah le chonphatna ahisoh keije." 
Psalms19:10 Hicheho chu sana sangin jong dei aumjon, henge, sana thengsel sangin jong athengjoi, khoijule khoiphang sanga jong lhumjo ahi." 
Psalms19:11 Chukalvalin nasohhi nagihsalin; chule hicheho chintupna-a chun kipaman lentah aumin ahi. 
Psalms19:12 Ama suhkhel ho kihetkhen jouva koiham? Guhthima kasuh khella konin neisuthengin. 
Psalms19:13 Nasohhi kihoitho sahna chonset ho-a konin jong neituh-in; hitiho chu kachunga vaihomsah hih-in; chutengle keima kalung thenga, chule keima suhkhelna lentah-a kona monabei kahiding ahi." 
Psalms19:14 O Pakai, kahatnale eilhandampu, kakama thupot hole kalungthim sunga kagelhi, namitmun santhei doltah hihen." 
Psalms20:1 Nalungkham nile Pakaiyin nadonbut henlang; Jacob Pathen min chun nahongbit hen! 
Psalms20:2 Munthenga konin nakithopi hinsolhen lang, Zion'a konin natha hatsahhen;" 
Psalms20:3 Nathilpeh jouse hejing henlang, chule na govam thilto jong sanghen." 
Psalms20:4 Aman nalungdei dungjuijin nape henlang, chule nathilgon jouse nabulhit peh hen." 
Psalms20:5 Keiho nami huhhingna-a chun kipah-uving ting, ka Pathen'u minin kaponlap hou tungdoh-uvinge! Nathum jouse Pakaiyin nasuh bulhitpeh hen." 
Psalms20:6 Pakaiyin athaonu ho ahuhdoh-e ti tun kahetai; akhut jetlam huhhingna thahat chun, avanthenga konchun hin ngaipeh inte." 
Psalms20:7 Abangin sakol kangtalai ho, chule abangin sakol ho atahsanun; keihon vang Pakai ka Pathen'u min chu kageldoh jingjeng diu ahi." 
Psalms20:8 Amaho suhnem ahiuvin alhuve, keihovang kithoudoh uving ting, lungtheng sela kadindiu ahi." 
Psalms20:9 Pakai, huhhingin! keihon kakou tengule lengpan neihin ngaipeh-un." 
Psalms21:1 Vo Pakai, nahatna-a lengpa kipah intin, nahuhhing na-a ama iti akipa tadem!" 
Psalms21:2 Nangin alung ngaichat napen, akama athumho chu na-it pehpoi." 
Psalms21:3 Ajehchu Nangin ama chu phatnale phattheina ho in navengbit in, sana thengtah lallukhuh alua nakhuh peh-e." 
Psalms21:4 Aman nahenga hinkho athumin, nangin tonsot hinkho saona jengjong napetan ahi." 
Psalms21:5 Nami huhhingna jana loupi chu anasata ngeijin, janale lalna chu achunga nangam tai." 
Psalms21:6 Ajehchu nangman tonsotna phattheina chungnung changdin ama nasemin; na-umpina chun kipana chungnung apen ahi. 
Psalms21:7 Ajehchu lengpan Pakai atahsanin, chule chungnung pen hepina jeh-in ama chu kiling ponte." 
Psalms21:8 Nakhutnin namelmate jouse holdoh intin, nahote chu nakhut jetnin holdoh inte." 
Psalms21:9 Nalunghan tengle amaho chu lhumsung meikong banga nasemding; Pakaiyin alunghana-a aval lhumuva, chule meichun ahalvam gamdiu ahi." 
Psalms21:10 Amaho ga chu leija konin, chule achilhah-u chu leisetna mihem chate lah-a konin sumangin nate." 
Psalms21:11 Ajehchu amahon nangma douna-in thilse bol agouvin; amahon aboldoh joulou dingu thilphalou angaitouvin ahi. 
Psalms21:12 Hijeh chun nangin nathal changho akhaoto nasuhto-a amai dungu nadoitengle, nangin amaho nakinungle sah ding ahi." 
Psalms21:13 Pakai, nathahatna achun, nangma kichoisangin, chutia chu keihon nathahatna chu vahchoina la-a kasahdiu ahi." 
Psalms22:1 Ka Pathen, ka Pathen ibola neidalhah hitam? Ipidinga eipanpi dingle gimthoh-a kapena awchenga kona nahiti gamlat hitam?" 
Psalms22:2 Vo ka Pathen, suntengle nangma kasamjin, ahinla neijah pehpoi; chule jankhon jong thiptih kanei jipoi." 
Psalms22:3 Ahinla nangma atheng nahin, Israelte pachatna-a chengjinga chu nahi." 
Psalms22:4 Kapu kapa teovin nangma natahsan uvin, amahon natahsanun, chule nangin amaho nahuhdohjin ahi." 
Psalms22:5 Amaho nangma henga ataovun, nahuhdohji-e; amahon nangma natahsan jeh-uchun, akisudong jipouve." 
Psalms22:6 Ahinla keima lungtol bep kahin, mihem kahipoi; chule mihemte i-sah loule mite nahsahlou kahi." 
Psalms22:7 Eimu chanin nahsahlouvin einuisatnun; amuh aholpumun, alu athingun, aseijiuvin," 
Psalms22:8 Aman eihuhdoh-inte tin Pakai chu atahsanin; Achunga akipa amujeh-in aman ama huhdoh tahen. 
Psalms22:9 Ahinla nangma naobu sunga kona einaloi doh-a chu nahin, kanu anga kaumlaija neina kinepsahsa ahitai." 
Psalms22:10 Keima naobu-a kona nachunga eina sekhumu ahin, kanu oisunga kona ka Pathen nahitai." 
Psalms22:11 Keija konin gamlahih-in, ajehchu lungkhamna anaije; ajehchu eipanpi ding khatcha aumpoi." 
Psalms22:12 Bongchal tamtah-in eiumkimvelun; Bashan bongchal hattahhon eiumkimvel sohtai. 
Psalms22:13 Keipi bahkai hangtah kitum bangin, akam eikat hom khumun ahi." 
Psalms22:14 Keima twibangin eikisunglhan, kagu kachang jouse akikhensoh in; kalunghi khoilu bangin kagilpi sunga ajollha tai." 
Psalms22:15 Kathahat nahi leibel chipsa bangin agolhatan; chule kalei jong kadanga abehchah in, nangin thina leivuija neipuilut tai." 
Psalms22:16 Ajehchu uicha hon eiumkimvelun; khangilou mipi kikhom hon eium naijun, kakhutle kakenghohi asunun ahi." 
Psalms22:17 Kagujouse kasimtheijin, amahon eiveovin eigaldot uve." 
Psalms22:18 Amaho kavon jouse akihomun, chule kaponsil changding jong vang akisan taove." 
Psalms22:19 Vo Pakai nangma keija konin umgamla hih-in, vo kathahatna, eipanpi dingin kinon." 
Psalms22:20 Kahinna hi chemjam'a konin huhdoh-in, kahinkho manlutah hi uicha thanei na-a konin huhdoh-in." 
Psalms22:21 Keipi bahkai kamsunga konin neihuh doh-in, ajehchu sakol kinei kiho-a konin jong neina ngaipeh-in ahi." 
Psalms22:22 Kasopite henga namin phongleng ting; mipi kikhomho lah-a nangma kavahchoi ding nahi. 
Psalms22:23 Pakai ginga nanghon ama vahchoijun, Jacob sonho jousen ama choi-anun, Israel sonho jousen ama chu gingun." 
Psalms22:24 Ajehchu aman bolgenthei thohho chu nahsahmole hotnin abol gentheipon, ama-a konin jong amai aselpoi; ahinla ahenga athumteng angaipehjie." 
Psalms22:25 Mipi kikhomho tamtah lah-a kapachatna chu nanga hintin, ama gingte angsunga kakitepna ho lhutninge." 
Psalms22:26 Minunnem hon neovintin, lunglhaijunte; ama holho chun Pakai chu vahchoi unte; nalungthim chu tonsotna hingding ahi." 
Psalms22:27 Leiset kolkimvelin Pakai ageldoh-a Pakai henga kilediu; chule chitin namtin jousen ama ahou dingu ahi. 
Psalms22:28 Ajehchu lenggam chu Pakaiya ahin; chule ama namtin lah-a vaihompa ahi. 
Psalms22:29 Leichunga khangtouho jousen neovintin chule ama ahoudiu; leivuija kileding jouse a-anga kuncheh ding; koimachan ama hinna akihuhjou louding ahi. 
Psalms22:30 Chilhah khatnin ama jenintin, hichu Pakai henga khangkhatna kisimding ahi." 
Psalms22:31 Amaho hunguva, ahung pengding miho henga hiche athilbol aumchan chonphatna hi aphondoh dingu ahi." 
Psalms23:1 Pakai chu kelngoi chinna eichingpa ahin, keima lhasamponge." 
Psalms23:2 Aman hamhing lah-a eikolsah jin, twi damdidei pang dunga eipuilei." 
Psalms23:3 Aman kalhagao akiledohsah jin; amin jallin chonphatna lampiho-a eipuilei. 
Psalms23:4 Henge, keiman thina phaicham lim jotjongleng, thilse gingtaponge; ajehchu nangman nei umpin, namol lhon le natenggolin eilhamonjin ahi." 
Psalms23:5 Nangman kamelmate angsunga dokhang neigon peh-in; kalu thao nanun, kakhon alonglet tai." 
Psalms23:6 Thonlou hella phatnale hepina-in kahinkho lhungkeija eijuiding; chule atonsotna keima Pakai in'a kachenjing ding ahi. 
Psalms24:1 Vannoi leisetle asunga cheng jouse, aboncha Pakaiya ahi." 
Psalms24:2 Ajehchu aman twipiho chunga atundoh-a, twisohho chunga aphudet ahi." 
Psalms24:3 Pakai lhanga kaldinga koi hija, amunthenga gading dinga koiham?" 
Psalms24:4 Khut thengle lungtheng neija, ahinna pannabei dinga pedohlou, jouva kihahsel louhel mi chu ahi." 
Psalms24:5 Aman Pakaiya kona vangbohna le, ahuhhingpa Pathen'a kona chonphatna amuding ahi." 
Psalms24:6 Vo Jacob hichehi ama holtele namai holte khanggui chu ahi. 
Psalms24:7 Vo kotpi ho, nanghon nalu-u domsangun, chule tonsot kotpi nangho kikhang sangun, chutile loupina leng chu hunglut ding ahi." 
Psalms24:8 Hiche loupina leng chu koiham? Pakai thahat tah le thaneitah, gal hattah Pakai chu ahi." 
Psalms24:9 Vo kotpiho, nanghon nalu-u domsangun, chule tonsot kotpi nangho kikhang sangun, chutile loupina leng chu hunglut ding ahi." 
Psalms24:10 Hiche loupina leng chu koiham? Janel Pakai, ama loupina leng ahi." 
Psalms25:1 Vo Pakai, na-anga, kalhagao kadom sange." 
Psalms25:2 Vo ka Pathen, nangma katahsane, nei jachatsah danlang, kamelmate neijosah hihhelin." 
Psalms25:3 Henge, nangma ngahjinga um chanchu jumso hih-in, ajeh beija suhkhelna neiho vangchu jachatsah-in." 
Psalms25:4 Vo Pakai, nalampi ho neimusah-in, na lamlhahho neihilin." 
Psalms25:5 Nathutah-a neipuijin lang, neihilin, eihuh hinga Pathen nahi jeh-in nilhumkeijin nangma kangeh-e." 
Psalms25:6 Vo Pakai, masang laija anaumjingsa nahi jeh-in, nahepi khotonale nangailut lungsetna chu geldoh in." 
Psalms25:7 Kakhang donlai chonset hole suhkhelnaho geldoh hih-in, Vo Pakai naphatna jehle nahepina dungjuijin neigeldoh in." 
Psalms25:8 Apha le akitah chu Pakai ahin; hijeh-a chu aman michonse te chu alampi ahilding ahi. 
Psalms25:9 Aman milungnengho thutan na-a kaihoi jintin, milungneng chu alampi ahilding ahi." 
Psalms25:10 Athulhunale athu hettohsahna tuhdet ho dingin, Pakai lamlhah jouse chu hepinale thutah ahi." 
Psalms25:11 O Pakai, namin jal-in kakhan setna nasatah hi ngaidamin." 
Psalms25:12 Pakai ginga mi chu koiham? Aman akilhending lampi chu aman ahilding ahi. 
Psalms25:13 Ahinkho-a nomtah-a chenga, achilhah ten leiset alodiu ahi." 
Psalms25:14 Pakai thuguh chu ama gingho-a uma ahin, akitepna chu amaho amusah ding ahi." 
Psalms25:15 Aman kakengteni lenna kona asutlhah ding jeh-in, kamitnin Pakai lamjeng akat jingin ahi." 
Psalms25:16 Kaheng lama hung kiheijinlang kachunga khotona neineijin, ajehchu lung thomhaole thohgima um kahitai." 
Psalms25:17 Kalunga lungkhamna ho anasa behsehtai; O kahesohna ho-a konin neipuidoh tan. 
Psalms25:18 Kahesoh nale kathoh nat nahi hin venlang, chule kachonsetna jouse neingaidamin." 
Psalms25:19 Kamelma tehi ngaito temin, ajehchu tamtah ahiuvin, nasatah in eihouvun ahi." 
Psalms25:20 Kahinna hongbit ninlang, neihuhdoh tan, nangma-a katahsan kangapjeh-in, neijachat sah hih-in." 
Psalms25:21 Nangma ngah-a kahijeh-in, lungthen le dihcham kimna chun eivengtup hen." 
Psalms25:22 Vo Pathen, alungkhamnao jouse-a konin Israel hi lhatdoh tan." 
Psalms26:1 Lungdet tah-a kachon jeh-in, Vo Pakai kathu tanin, katahsan jong Pakaiya kangaijin, hijeh-a chu keima kalhuh louding ahi." 
Psalms26:2 Vo Pakai, neikhol chilin lang neiphochenin, kalunggel leh kalungsung patepmin." 
Psalms26:3 Ajehchu nangailut lungsetna kamasanga aumin, chule nathutah-a kachonlen ahi." 
Psalms26:4 Moh mimaimaitoh katoukhom ngaipon, miphalhem ho henga jong lut hihhel inge." 
Psalms26:5 Thilse bolho kikhopna chu kahot ahin, michonse tojong toukhom ponge." 
Psalms26:6 Kakhut teni hi nolna beijin sopming ting, hitichun o Pakai, namaicham kimvela vahlenge." 
Psalms26:7 Thangvahna awgina kaphondoh theina dingin, nathilbol kidang jouse hil lenge." 
Psalms26:8 Pakai, naumna in leh loupitah nachenna mun chu kangailun ahi." 
Psalms26:9 Kalhagao hi michonseho, ahiloule kahinkhohi thisanso ho toh umkhomsah hih-in." 
Psalms26:10 Akhut houva chonphat louna aumin, akhut jetlam uva nehguh adimsetnin ahi." 
Psalms26:11 Ahinla keima vang lungdih tah-in vahleng ting, neilhatdoh inlang, neihin hepitan." 
Psalms26:12 Kakenghi muncham tah-a adingin, kikhopnaho-a Pakai choi-an inge." 
Psalms27:1 Pakai chu kameivah le eihuh hingpa ahin; koi kagin dingham? Pakai chu kahinkho-a kathahatna ahin; Koi kakichat dingham? 
Psalms27:2 Mikhangse, kamelmahole kagalte jengin jong, kasa hi nehgop dinga kachunga ahungchuh tengule akipalun alhuji taovin ahi." 
Psalms27:3 Janel hon keima dounan gebuh songjong leu, kalung kicha pontin; eidoudin gal hungkon jongle hichea jongchu tahsan um kahiding ahi." 
Psalms27:4 Keiman Pakai henga kadeichat thilkhat thuming ting; hichu kaholjing ding, chutileh Pakai insunga kahinkho lhungkeija kachen theija, Pakai melhoina kavetjing ding, chule a-houin sunga thu kakhol jingthei ding ahi." 
Psalms27:5 Ajehchu kalungkham tengle apon insunga eiselintin, ahoubuh munthip sunga aman eisela, asongpi chunga eitousah ding ahi." 
Psalms27:6 Tunvang kakimvela kamelmate chungvuma kaluhi dopsanga umding ahitan; hijeh-a chu ahoubuh-a kipa ganlhaina ho kapeh-a, la kasah ding, henge, Pakai vahchoi La tumgingto tho-a kasah ding ahi." 
Psalms27:7 Vo Pakai, ka aw gina kasap tengle neingaipeh-in, kachungah hepina neijinlang, neidonbut in." 
Psalms27:8 Kamai holun nati laichun kalungin nahenga, Pakai namai holinge kanatin ahi." 
Psalms27:9 Keija konin namai selgamla hih-in, lunghanin nasoh hi notdoh hih-in, nangma eipanpi nahin, vo eihuh hinga Pathen, neidalhah danlang, neipaidoh hih-in." 
Psalms27:10 Kanule kapan eidalhah tengle Pakaiyin eikipomding ahi. 
Psalms27:11 Vo Pakai, nalampi neihilin, chule kamelmaho jeh-in lamjolsela neipuijin." 
Psalms27:12 Kamelmate deilamin neipedoh loujenin; ajehchu keima dounan, nunset thujeng aseijun, chule hettohsah lhemho asohdoh tan ahi." 
Psalms27:13 Mihing gama chu Pakai phatna muding tahsanlou anahileng vang alhasama kahitai. 
Psalms27:14 Pakai chu ngahjingin, hangtah in umin, chutile nalungthim ahatsah ding ahi; Pakai chu ngahjingin, kati ahi." 
Psalms28:1 Vo Pakai le kasongpi, nahenga hungtaovinge, keima neithipsan le, kotong sung kijotlut ho tobang kahiding ahitai." 
Psalms28:2 Nahenga kaka-a, namun theng lam nga-a kakhut kahindop teng, kathumna aw neingaipeh-in." 
Psalms28:3 Migiloule khanset bolho chutoh neikaimangtha hih-in, amahon aheng akom henga chamna thu aseijiuvin, ahinla alunguva thilphalou aumjinge." 
Psalms28:4 Athilbollu dungjuile athil gilou bollu dungjuijin pen, akhutnuva atoh bangun lethuh inlang, aset mannu musah-in." 
Psalms28:5 Amahon Pakai natohle akhutna athilbol angaisahlou jeh un, aman amaho sumang intin, semphakit ponte." 
Psalms28:6 Kathumna eingaipeh jeh-in Pakai chu vahchoijin umhen. 
Psalms28:7 Pakai chu kathahatle kalumdal ahin; kalungin ama atahsanin, chule panpin kaumme; hijeh chun kalung akipah lheh-in, chule ama chu lan vahchoi tange." 
Psalms28:8 Pakai chu athahatnao ahin, ama chu athaonu dinga huhhingna thahat ahi." 
Psalms28:9 Namite huhhingin lang chule nagoulote phatthei boh-in; amaho chu vah inlang chule tonsotna din domsang tan. 
Psalms29:1 Pakai chu vahchoina peovin, vo, van mite Athahat aloupina chu vahchoijun, Pakai chu loupina leh thahatna peovin." 
Psalms29:2 Pakaiya amin loupina chu peuvin; athen hoina-in Pakai chu houvun. 
Psalms29:3 Pakai aw chu twiho chunga aumin; Pathen loupinachu ahung kitumjah-in; Pakai chu twiho chunga chun aumin ahi. 
Psalms29:4 Pakai aw chu thaneitah ahin; Pakai awchu lal loupina-a dimset ahi. 
Psalms29:5 Pakai aw chun Cedar thingho amanthah sah-in; henge, Pakaiyin Lebanon'a Cedar ho asumang gamtai." 
Psalms29:6 Aman amaho bongnou bangin akichopsah-in; Lebanon le Sirion chu sakol kinei nou abahsah-e. 
Psalms29:7 Pakai aw chun meika al-lenglung aphelkhen-in ahi. 
Psalms29:8 Pakai aw chun gamthip gam ahotlingjin, Pakai chun Kadesh ahotlingtai." 
Psalms29:9 Pakai aw chun sajuhpi bongnou asosahjin, gammangho jong achaisah in, a-houin sunga umho jousen aloupina aseijuve." 
Psalms29:10 Pakai chu twisohho chunga chun atouvin; henge, Pakai chu tonsot lengdin atouvin ahi." 
Psalms29:11 Pakaiyin amite henga thaneina pentin, Pakaiyin amite chu chamna-a phatthei abohding ahi." 
Psalms30:1 Vo Pakai nangin neidopsanga, kachunga kamelmate nakipasah loujeh-in, keiman nangma choi-an inge." 
Psalms30:2 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, nahenga kataovin, nangin neidamsah tai." 
Psalms30:3 Vo Pakai, nangin kahinna lhankhuh-a konin napuitouvin, kokhuh-a kakumsuh lounadin, nangin neihinghoi tan ahi." 
Psalms30:4 Vo nangho amithengte, Pakaiya tumgingto thon vahchoi La saovin lang, athenna hetdohnadin ama thangvahna peovin." 
Psalms30:5 Ajehchu alunghana chu chom chakhat bou ahin, alungsetna-a chun hinna aume; kana hi jankhatbou ahin, jingkah teng kipana ahunghiji tai." 
Psalms30:6 Chule kaphatthei laijin, itih hijongle kiling ponge, kanatin ahi." 
Psalms30:7 Pakai, nei khohsahna jal-in, kamolsang nadindet sah-in, namai nanaselin, kana lungkhame." 
Psalms30:8 Vo Pakai nangma kanasamin, chule Pakai henga kana thumin ahi." 
Psalms30:9 Kokhuh-a kakumlhah tengle, kathisan nahi ipi phatchomna umding ham? Leivuijin navahchoija nakitahna aphondoh ding ham?" 
Psalms30:10 Vo Pakai ngaijin lang, kachunga hepina neijin, Pakai nangma eipanpia chu hin." 
Psalms30:11 Nangin kalung hemna lamnan naheidoh-in, kakhaodip pon nahohlhan, kipanan kong neigahpeh tan," 
Psalms30:12 Kaloupina beikahsea nangma vahchoi La tanglouva kasah ding, kathip louding ahi. O Pakai, ka Pathen, keiman atonsot atonsotnin nangma vahchoi jinge." 
Psalms31:1 Vo Pakai, nanga katahsan kangamin, imatih-in nei jachatsah hih-in, na chonphatna-a chun neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms31:2 Kahenglama nana hin sungin, gangtah-in neihuh doh-in, keidinga songpi dettahle eihuhhing dinga hoidohna in hunghin." 
Psalms31:3 Ajehchu nangma kasongpile kakulpi nahin, hijeh chun naminjalin neikaijinlang neilamkai jin." 
Psalms31:4 Guhthima lenthang eikampeh uva konin neiloidoh-in, ajehchu nangma kahatna nahi." 
Psalms31:5 Nakhutna kalhagao kapei; Vo Pakai Pathen dihtah nangin neilhatdoh tai. 
Psalms31:6 Mohseh thil ngaisahho chu kahon; Pakai vang chu katahsane. 
Psalms31:7 Nahepina-a kipah-ing ting thanominge, ajehchu nangin kalung hesohna neigelpeh in, kahinna hi vangsetna-a aume ti nahei." 
Psalms31:8 Chule eidouho khutna neikha khumpon, kakenghohi mun lentah-a nakoije." 
Psalms31:9 Vo Pakai, lungkhama kaum jeh-in neihepin, kamit hi lunggim na-in akhamtan, ahi, kahinna leh katumpi jong ahi." 
Psalms31:10 Ajehchu hinkhohi lunggim na-in kamangin, kakum hohi khoisatna-in kamange; Kakhangitlou jallin katha abeijin, kaguho alhong lhatai." 
Psalms31:11 Kamelmate lah, adeh deh-in kaheng kakomho lah-a i-sah louvin kaumin, chule kamel hetho din kichat kaumin; Eimuho chun eijamsan taovin ahi." 
Psalms31:12 Mithi bangin suhmilin kaumin, belkehsato kabangtai." 
Psalms31:13 Ajehchu mitam tah-in eihehsetna kanajan; Kakimvelah kichatna aumtai; keima douna-a akihoukhom laijun, kahinkho lah nadin doha abolui." 
Psalms31:14 Ahinla vo Pakai nangma kanatahsane, nangma ka Pathen nahi, kanatin ahi." 
Psalms31:15 Kaphat ho nakhutna um ahin, kamelmatele eibolgiloute khutna konin neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms31:16 Nasoh chunga namai hinvahsah-in, nahepina jal-in neihuhhing in." 
Psalms31:17 Nangma kakou jeh-in, vo Pakai neijachat sah hih-in, migilouho jachatsah-in lang, thikholkhul sunga thipbeh-in umuhen." 
Psalms31:18 Jouseinale midih ho chunga, musitnale hoithona thu tamtah seina kam chu paomon umhen." 
Psalms31:19 O, naphatna, nangma gingte dinga nakhol khom, mihem chate masanga nanga atahsan ngamho dinga nanabol chu iti letna hitam?" 
Psalms31:20 Nangin amaho chu mihoitho ho-a konin naumna munthipma naselding; nangin kinelkalna-a konin pon-in sunga koithipbeh in nate. 
Psalms31:21 Pakai chu nunnom hen, ajehchu akhotona kidangtah chun khopi dettah sunga eimusahtai." 
Psalms31:22 Ajehchu namitmu-a konin paidoh-in kaumtai, kana tiloijin; hijengjongle lungset kangehna aw-a nangma kakou chun neina ngaipehtan ahi." 
Psalms31:23 Vo nangho amithengte jousen, Pakai chu ngailuvin, ajehchu tahsan umho chu Pakaiyin avetupmin, chule hoitho bol hochu lhingkeijin alethuhjin ahi." 
Psalms31:24 Hangtah-in umun, chutile nangho Pakaiya kinem jouse chu aman nalungu ahatsah ding ahi." 
Psalms32:1 Koihile asuhkhelna kingaidama, achonset kikhukhuma chu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms32:2 Pakaiyin achonset asimlou, chule alhagaova themona umlou mi chu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms32:3 Thipbeh a kauma, nilhumkeija kasunga ka-ao na lammin kaguho manlou asohgam tai." 
Psalms32:4 Sunle jannin nakhut gih-in eidelphan, kati lhop jong nipi laija gamgo asohjitai." 
Psalms32:5 Nahenga kachonsetna kahetsah in, kakhan gitlouna kaselpoi. Pakai hengah suhkhelna phongtange katin, nangin kachonset khan gitlouna chu neingaidam tai." 
Psalms32:6 Ajehchu, Pathen ngaisah jouse chu mutheija na-umpet hin nahenga taovuhen, tahbeh-in twilentah soh hon ahengu ahinnai louding ahi." 
Psalms32:7 Nangma ka kiselna mun nahin, lungkham na-a kona neiventup ding; huhdohna la ho-a nei-um kimvel ding ahi." 
Psalms32:8 Keiman nangma kahilchah ding chule nachena ding kahilding; keiman kamitna nangma kapuile ding nahi. 
Psalms32:9 Hetna neilou, kamdal le thihkola kituhtangji sakol ahiloule sangan toh banghih-un, achuti loule naheng hinnai junte." 
Psalms32:10 Migilou din lung gentheina adimin, ahinla Pakai tahsan vang chu hepina-in aumkimvelin ahi." 
Psalms32:11 Nangho michonpha ho, Pakaiya kipah unlang thanomun, milungtheng nangho jouse kipah-in ao-vun." 
Psalms33:1 Vo nangho michonpha ho Pakaiyah kipah jingun, ajehchu milungtheng dinga pachat lasah hi lomtah ahi." 
Psalms33:2 Selangdah in Pakai chu vahchoijun, manchah tumging khao somnei toh thon vahchoi La saovin." 
Psalms33:3 Ama vahchoina lathah khat saovinlang, aw thongin themtah-in tumging uvin." 
Psalms33:4 Pakai thu chu adih-in, athilbol jouse chu dihtah-a kibol ahi." 
Psalms33:5 Aman chonphatna-a thutanlhah angailun; leiset hi Pakai phatna adimin ahi. 
Psalms33:6 Pakai thua vanhohi kisema ahin, chule amaho janelpihi akamsoh ahua kon ngen ahiuve." 
Psalms33:7 Aman twipia twiho chu lomkhat bangin akoikhomin, twi thuhtah chu khol khomna in'a akholkhome." 
Psalms33:8 Leiset pumpin Pakai chu gingu hen, vannoi'a cheng jouse Pakai janan dimuhen." 
Psalms33:9 Ajehchu aman thu aseile akibol jengin, aman thu apehle aumden jenge." 
Psalms33:10 Pakaiyin Pathen hephalouho thuhil chu imahilou asosah in, mipi ho thilngaito chu phatchomna bei ahisah-e." 
Psalms33:11 Pakai thumop chu tonsotnin ading jingin, alungngaito chu akhang akhanga ding ahi." 
Psalms33:12 Pathen chu Pakaiya neija nam mite, chule ama agoulo dinga kilhen mihochu anun nom ahiuve." 
Psalms33:13 Pakai chun van'a konin ahinven mihem chate jouse chu amui. 
Psalms33:14 Aman aumna mun'a konin leisetna chengho jouse chu ahinven ahi. 
Psalms33:15 Aman alungthim melputna akibahsah-in, athilbolhou jouseu agelpeh-e." 
Psalms33:16 Mipi janelin ahuhhing thei leng aumpoi, mihat tah jong ahatjeh-a kihuhdoh aumpoi." 
Psalms33:17 Sakolhi hoidohna dingin pannabei ahin; athahatna jeh-a jong koima ahuhdoh louding ahi. 
Psalms33:18 Veovin, Pakai mit chu ama gingte chunga, chule ahepina-a kinemho chunga aumjingin;" 
Psalms33:19 Thina-a kona ahinnao huhdoh dingle, kellhah teng ahinna diu akoipeh-e." 
Psalms33:20 Ihin naohin Pakai chu angah-in; ama eipanpiule ilumdalu ahi. 
Psalms33:21 Ajehchu ama mintheng itahsan jeh uva, ama-a ilungu kipahding ahi." 
Psalms33:22 Vo Pakai nanga kakinepnao dungjuijin hepina kachung uvah umhen. 
Psalms34:1 Phat jousen Pakai chu vahchoi jingting: Ama vahchoina chu kakam toh kichat louding ahi. 
Psalms34:2 Kahinna hi Pakaiya kisong ding, mi kineosah ho chun ajah uva kipahdiu ahi." 
Psalms34:3 O, Pakai chu neichoi-atpiu vinlang, amin choi-an khom uhite." 
Psalms34:4 Pakai chu kaholin aman eingaipeh-in, kakichatna jouse-a konin eihuhdoh tai." 
Psalms34:5 Amahon ama lam aveovin ahile avah uvin; chule amaijuva jachatna-a aumpoi. 
Psalms34:6 Hiche migenthei hin akouteng, Pakaiyin angaipeh-in, alungdonna jouse-a konin ahuhhingtai." 
Psalms34:7 Ama gingho chu Pakai vantil'in aumkim velin, chule amaho ahuhdoh-in ahi." 
Psalms34:8 Pakai phatje chu patepmun lang veuvin, ama tahsan michu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms34:9 O mitheng teho Pakai chu gingun, ajehchu ama gingtedin lhahsamna himhim aumpoi." 
Psalms34:10 Keipi bahkai donglaiho jong alhasamin, agilkel jiuve; ahin Pakai holte vang chu thilpha himhim lhasamloudiu ahi." 
Psalms34:11 Hunguvin, chateho, kathu ngaijuvin; keiman Pakai ginje hiluvinge." 
Psalms34:12 Phatna amutheina dinga nikho tamtah ngailu-a, hinkho ngailu-a michu koiham?" 
Psalms34:13 Thilse-a konin nalei, chule lheplhah thusei na-a konin namuh tuhtangin." 
Psalms34:14 Ase dalhanlang apha bolin, chamna holinlang hichu nungdelin." 
Psalms34:15 Pakai mit chu michonpha ho chunga achun, ataonao ngainan ana asunge." 
Psalms34:16 Pakai maichun thilse bolho dounale, leisetna kona amaho kigeldohna suhtanga aum nadin angat jinge." 
Psalms34:17 Michonpha ho taona Pakaiyin ajahpeh in, ahesohna jouseuva konin ahuhdoh ji-e." 
Psalms34:18 Lungthim kisihte henga Pakai anaijin, lhagaova kisihho chu ahuhhingin ahi." 
Psalms34:19 Michonpha thohgimna atamin, ahinla Pakaiyin chucheho jouse-a konchun ahuhdohji." 
Psalms34:20 Aman aguho jouse aching phan, khatcha jong abongpoi." 
Psalms34:21 Thilphalouvin migilou athading; chule midih hotbola chu mangthah heldiu ahi. 
Psalms34:22 Pakaiyin asohte lhagao chu lhatdoh intin, ama tahsan ho chu mangthah loudiu ahi." 
Psalms35:1 Vo Pakai, kakidoupi ho chu neiseitohpeh-in, eikisatpiho chu kisatpin." 
Psalms35:2 Lumdal leh pho paninlang, ikithopidin dingin." 
Psalms35:3 Tengcha jong satdoh inlang eidouva eisugentheiho lampi khah in, kalhagao jah-a, nahuhhingpa kahi tin seijin." 
Psalms35:4 Kahinna suhmang dinga holho chu kisuh dongsah inlang jachat sah-in, suhset eigoho chu sunohphah inlang kinungle sah-in." 
Psalms35:5 Amaho hui nung masanga changsi bahsah-in, chule Pakai vantil nungdel sah-in." 
Psalms35:6 Alampiu thimhen lang nal hen, chule Pakai vantil'in amaho bolgimhen." 
Psalms35:7 Ajehchu amahon ajeh beijin keidingin alen'u kotong sunga aselun, ajehbeija hichu hinna lahna dinga alaiju ahi." 
Psalms35:8 Kigingman louvin manthah na achunga lhunghen lang, alenthang sela chun amatah ohhen, chuche manthah na-a chun lhalut hen." 
Psalms35:9 Chutile kahinna Pakaiya kipah intin, ami huhhing na-a thanominte." 
Psalms35:10 Ama dinga hatbeh sehpa-a kona migenthei pa huhdoh-a; henge, achomgam dingpa-a kona migenthei milhasam huhdohpa, Pakai nang tobang koi umem? tia kagu kachang houvin asei dingu ahi." 
Psalms35:11 Hettohsah lhemho akipat doh-un, kahet phahlouhel thil ho-a mo eichan uve." 
Psalms35:12 Kahinna suhmang nadin apha khelin ase kipamandin eisan sah uve. 
Psalms35:13 Keimavang amaho anat tenguleh kaponsil khaodip pon ahijin, an ngolin kahinna kasunemin, kataona ka angsung ngeija ahung kilahjin ahi." 
Psalms35:14 Kagol ham ahiloule sopi ham bangin kanaboljin, mi anu puldouho bangin kakhai khulele jin ahi." 
Psalms35:15 Ahinla kahesoh tengle akipah-un akikhom jiuvin, ahin panna beijin eidou dingin akikhomun hichu kenla kahepon, tang louvin eisam seuvin ahi." 
Psalms35:16 Golvahna-a phatlhem tothon, ahao eigel khumun ahi." 
Psalms35:17 Pakai itihchan navet thim ding ham? Kangailut tah kahinkhohi asumang ding keipi bahkaihoa konin huhdoh-in. 
Psalms35:18 Mipi kikhopna munna chun nangma thangvahna peng kating; mi tamtah lah-a nangma vahchoi jinge. 
Psalms35:19 Kamelmate chu adihlou lamin kachunga kipa daohen, ajehbeija eihotbol teho chu amitnun kihou daohen." 
Psalms35:20 Ajehchu amahon chamna thu him him aseipouvin; ahinla amahon gamsunga lungmonga um mongho dounan doha lungthim agongun ahi. 
Psalms35:21 Henge, keima dounan amaho hatah-in akam kaovin, chule amahon aha, aha, kamitnun kamutaove, atiuve." 
Psalms35:22 Vo Pakai hichehi nangin namutan, thipbeh in umhih-in, vo Pakai keija konin gamla hih-in." 
Psalms35:23 Ka Pakai leh ka Pathen, kathu tan dingin nang le nang hung kitildoh-in lang, hung thoudoh-in." 
Psalms35:24 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, chonphatna dungjuijin kathu tanin lang, amaho kachunga kipah hih uhen." 
Psalms35:25 Alunguvin amahon, kate! eiho ichandiu ahi tidaohen, eihon ama ival lhumtaove tidaohen." 
Psalms35:26 Kakisuhkhah na-a kipahho chu jahchale lungdongin umkhom sah inlang, keima douna-a kiloupisah ho chu jachatnale jalounan kivonuhen." 
Psalms35:27 Ka chonphatna natoh-a lunglhaiho chu, kipahle thanomin ao-vin la saohen: asoh phattheina chunga kipahji Pakai chu, loupitah-in umhen tin seijom jing taohen." 
Psalms35:28 Chutile kaleijin chonphatna nilhumkeijin seitante. 
Psalms36:1 Migilou suhkhelna chungchanga kalungsunga kathusei; amitmua Pathen ginna himhim aumpoi. 
Psalms36:2 Ajehchu akhan gitlouna kidah umtah chu akimudoh kahsen, ama mitmun amale ama akiseiphajin ahi." 
Psalms36:3 Akama thusoh ho chu khangitlouna leh lheplhahna ngen ahin; chihnale thilpha bolding chu adalhatan ahi. 
Psalms36:4 Aman jalkhun chunga thilse agongtoh-in, lampi phalou laitah a akitungin, thilse ahopon ahi." 
Psalms36:5 Vo Pakai, na mihepina chu van ho-a aumin, chule nakitahna chun meilom lah aphan ahi." 
Psalms36:6 Nachon phatna chu molsang lenho abangin, nathutan lhahho chu athuhlheh-e, vo Pakai, nangman mihem le gamsa navengbit nin ahi." 
Psalms36:7 Vo Pakai nangailut nahi itilutna hitam, hijeh-a chu mihem chaten na lhavingho limnoi atahsanu ahi." 
Psalms36:8 Na insung aninlhin jehchun amaho lunglhai lheh-untin, nalunglhaina vachadung twi chu amaho nadonsah ding ahi." 
Psalms36:9 Ajehchu hinna twinah nanga aumin; navah-a chu khovah kamudiu ahi. 
Psalms36:10 Nangma heho henga nangailutna chu umsah jinginlang, chule milung thengho henga chonphatna chu umsah-in." 
Psalms36:11 Mi kiletsah kengin ei chotkhahda henlang, migilou khutnin einodoh dahen." 
Psalms36:12 Khukoma engse bolho alhulhop mun, lelhah ahiuvin, kithoujou tapouvinte." 
Psalms37:1 Thilse bolho jeh-in lungkham hih-in, khangitlouna bolho chunga jong thangset bolhih-in." 
Psalms37:2 Ajehchu amaho hampa banga kivatlhu loidiu ahin, hamhing banga goploi diu ahi." 
Psalms37:3 Pakai tahsanin lang, thilpha bolin, chutile nangma gamsunga nachen ding, chule tahbeh-a suhlung lhaija naum ding ahi." 
Psalms37:4 Pakaiya jong kipah thanomin, aman nalung ngaichat jouse napeh ding ahi." 
Psalms37:5 Nalampi Pakai henga pedoh jengin; ama jong tahsanin chutile aman nabolpeh nante. 
Psalms37:6 Chutile aman nachon phatna chu vah bangin vahdoh sah intin, chule nathem chana chu sunlai bang ding ahi." 
Psalms37:7 Pakaiya cholngan, chule amachu lungneng tah-in ngah-in mi alamlhahna jouse-a akhantou jehle, thil gilou hinpodoh pa jeh-in lungkham hih in." 
Psalms37:8 Lunghan na-a konin tanginlang, chule lungsatna chu dalhan; ase bolna ding poupouvah kisugim hih-in." 
Psalms37:9 Ajehchu thilse bolte chu kipaidoh hel ding ahiuvin; hinla Pakai ngah jingte vang chun leiset chung alodiu ahi. 
Psalms37:10 Ajehchu chomkhat joule migilou umtalou ding, henge, lungthim themtah-in aum namun chu vele chun, ana umta ponte." 
Psalms37:11 Ahinla milung nengin vang leiset chung aloding, chule amaho chamna lhingset chunga kipah ding ahiuve." 
Psalms37:12 Migilouvin midih dounan thil agongjin, chule achungah aha agoiji." 
Psalms37:13 Pakaiyin ama anuisat ding ahi; ajehchu aman anikho hunglhung ding chu amun ahi. 
Psalms37:14 Migilouvin chemjam asatdoh-in, vaichale lhasam suhlhahna dingle thudih-a houlimho tha nadin athalpiu ajekonin ahi." 
Psalms37:15 Achemjamu amahotah lungchanga lutnintin, athalpihou kihebohpeh ding ahi." 
Psalms37:16 Mi chonphan lhomcha aneichu migilouho haona tamtah sangin aphajoi. 
Psalms37:17 Ajehchu migilou banjang kihebohpeh ding; midihtah ho vang Pakaiyin ageldoh jingding ahi. 
Psalms37:18 Midih nikhoho chu Pakaiyin ahen, agoulo ding chu tonsotna ding ahi." 
Psalms37:19 Amaho phat phatloulai jongle jahcha loudiu; Kel lhahlai jongle ninglhing diu ahi. 
Psalms37:20 Ahinla migilou vang chu mangthah ding chule Pakai melmaho chu kelngoinou thao tahho bangdiu; amaho meikhu lah-a manghel diu ahi. 
Psalms37:21 Migilouvin batnin alan, asakitjipoi, michonphan vang hepina amusah-in, ahomji-e." 
Psalms37:22 Ajehchu ama phattheiboh changhon leiset chung louvintin; chule ama gaosap changte chu suhmanga umdiu ahi. 
Psalms37:23 Mipha kalsonnaho chu Pakai thusah ahin; alampia chun ama akipah lhehjin ahi. 
Psalms37:24 Ama lhutajongle kilehlhapai louhel ding ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin akhutnin atuhjinge. 
Psalms37:25 Khangdong kanahin, tunvang katehtai: ahivangin michonpha akinungsun kamukhapon, achilhahte khutdo-a apanlam kamukhapoi." 
Psalms37:26 Ama a-itih-a hepina dimle hongphalji ahin, achilhahte phatthei achangun ahi." 
Psalms37:27 Setna dalhanlang chule thilpha bolin, a-imatih channin cheng jingtan." 
Psalms37:28 Ajehchu Pakaiyin thutandih angailun amithengte adalha jipoi, amaho tonsotna dinga kikheh ahiuve. Ahinla migilou chilhahte vang kisumang ding ahiuve." 
Psalms37:29 Michonpha hon gamsung louvintin, asunga tonsotna chengdio ahi." 
Psalms37:30 Michonpha ho kamsungin chihna thu aseijin, chule aleijin thutanlhah thu aseijin ahi." 
Psalms37:31 A Pathen dan chu alungsunga aumin, akalsona channa alhonal khapoi." 
Psalms37:32 Migilouvin michonpha avelhijin, chule thadin aholjin ahi." 
Psalms37:33 Pakaiyin amachu akhutna dalhapontin, athu kitanteng themosah ponte." 
Psalms37:34 Pakai chu ngah-in lang, alampi chu juijin, chutile gamsung lodinga nachoisang ding ahi: migilouho akisuhmang teng, hichu namu ding ahi." 
Psalms37:35 Migilou chu thanei tah-a, bong thinghing bahjamkai banga aum kamui." 
Psalms37:36 Ahinla ama akitol mangtai, veuvin, aumtapoi; henge, kahol holin, ahinla akimujou tapoi." 
Psalms37:37 Michamkim chu melchih inlang, milungdih chu ven, ajehchu chuche mipa kichaina chu chamna ahi." 
Psalms37:38 Ahinla suhkhelna neiho chu thakhatna kisumang diu, mikhang gilou kichaina chu, suhmanga umding ahi." 
Psalms37:39 Ahivangin michonpha huhhingna chu Pakaiya ahin; lungkham laija atha hatnao ama ahi. 
Psalms37:40 Chule Pakaiyin amaho apanpi-a ahuhhing ding, aman khangitlouho-a kona ahuhdoh-a, chule ama atahsan jeh uva, amaho ahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Psalms38:1 Vo Pakai nalunghanna-a neiphoh hih-in; nalungsat natah-a jong neisehgim hih-in. 
Psalms38:2 Ajehchu nathal changho kasungah alutnin, chule nakhutnin eimeh nasabehseh jengin ahi." 
Psalms38:3 Nalunghanna jeh-in katichung-ah damna himhim aumtapoi, kachonsetna jeh-in jong kaguho-a choldona himhim aumtapoi." 
Psalms38:4 Ajehchu kakhan gitlounahon eichuptan; poh gihsatah khat bangin keidin agihsa behseh taovin ahi. 
Psalms38:5 Kangolna jeh-in katina mahaho auijin amon lhasoh tai. 
Psalms38:6 Kalung akhamin, hatah-in kakunsuh in, nilhum keijin kalunghemin ahi." 
Psalms38:7 Ajehchu kakong dungho jouse adul soh gamin, chule kati chunga damna aumpoi." 
Psalms38:8 Keima lhasamle akisugepma chu kahitan; Kalung montheilou jeh-a peng penga chu kahitai. 
Psalms38:9 Pakai kangaichat jouse namasanga uma ahi, kakhoisat jong nanga kona kisellou ahi." 
Psalms38:10 Kalung aphulin, katha abeitan; kamit vah jengjong, keija kon achemang tan ahi." 
Psalms38:11 Eingailuho leh kagolte katina-a kon ading gamlha taovin; ka-inkote jong gamlatah-a adingun ahi. 
Psalms38:12 Kahinkho suhmang dinga hol hon jong thang eikampeh uvin, chule kasetna ding hol hon jong lamvaina thujeng aseijun, nilhum keijin thilphalou jeng ageljiuve." 
Psalms38:13 Ahin keimanla na-ngong bangin kajapon, akamka ngailou mipaomo kana bangtan ahi." 
Psalms38:14 Hiti chun kho jaloule, akama phona sohngailou bangin kana umin ahi." 
Psalms38:15 Ajeh chu o Pakai, nangah kakinemin, o Pakai ka Pathen, nangin jan nate." 
Psalms38:16 Ajehchu keiman, nei ngaipeh-in, achuti loule kachunga kipah getnunte kati ahi, kakenga kalhonalteng keima dounan amaho kiloupisah getnunte." 
Psalms38:17 Ajehchu, kalung gentheinahi tanglouvin kamasanga aumin, chule alhu paiding kahitai." 
Psalms38:18 Ajehchu kakhan gitlouna hi phonging ting, kachonsetna jeh-a kalung khamding ahi." 
Psalms38:19 Ahinla kamelmate khu ahingtheijun, ahatnuvin, dihlou tah-a eihot bolte chu apunguve." 
Psalms38:20 Thilse thilphato kilheh ho jong kakidoupi ahiuve; ajehchu keiman thildih chu kajuijin ahi. 
Psalms38:21 Vo Pakai, neidalha hih-in, vo Pathen, keija konin gamla hih-in." 
Psalms38:22 Eipanpi dingin hung kinon; Vo Pakai eihuh hingpa. 
Psalms39:1 Kaleija kachonset lounadin kalampiho-a kihong phange, kati; migilouho kamasanga aumlaijun kakamhi kamdalin tuhchah inge." 
Psalms39:2 Apha-a konin jong thipbeh-in paolouvin kana umin; chule kalung gimna apong bepmin ahi. 
Psalms39:3 Kasunga kalungchang asadoh-in, lung kangaito laijin, meijin akongdohtan; chuin kaleija thu kaseijin ahi." 
Psalms39:4 Pakai, kanikhoho teptena le kaki chaina hedin neisemin, chutile itobanga thalhom kahi hetange." 
Psalms39:5 Vetan, kanikho hohi khutpeh chanbep bangin nasemin, chule kahinkhohi namasanga imacha hilou ahi; Tahbeh-in mitinhi aphat pettah laijong abona ahomkeo bou ahi." 
Psalms39:6 Tahbeh-in mitinhi ahomkeova vahlea ahiuvin; tahbeh-in amaho ahomkeova lunglinglao ahiuve; aman haonaho ase khomin, chule kon ahin lokhom ding ahepon ahi." 
Psalms39:7 Chule Pakai tu-a hi ipi kanga em? Kakinepna nanga uma ahi. 
Psalms39:8 Ka suhkhelna jouse-a konin neihuh doh-in; mingol ho noisedin neisem hih-in. 
Psalms39:9 Nangma bol anahijeh-in kana paomon, kakam kanakehpoi." 
Psalms39:10 Namivohna keija konin ladohtan, nakhut gua athipai ja kahitai." 
Psalms39:11 Mi akhangitlou jeh-a napho-a nasuhdih teng, ahoina chu nget banga nejoudin nasemji, tahbeh-in mitinhi pannabei ahi." 
Psalms39:12 Vo Pakai, kataona ngaijin, chule kakounahi neijah peh-in; kamitlhi lonhi neithipsan hih-in, ajehchu keima kapu kapateu banga nangma toh kholjinle khopembou kahi." 
Psalms39:13 Kachemanga, kaumtah lou ding masanga, katha akiledoh theinadin, O neikhongai tadin." 
Psalms40:1 Thohhat tah-in Pakai chu kangah-in; chule aman ana eisunpeh-in, kakouna ajatai." 
Psalms40:2 Aman kokhuh gimneitah-a konle bonlhoh lah-a konin jong eiloidoh-in, chule songpi chunga kakengin eidinsah-in, kachena dingho eisuhdet peh-in ahi." 
Psalms40:3 Aman i-Pathen'u pachatna dingin jong lathah khat kakamsunga eikoipeh-in; mi tampin hichu amuva akichatdiu, chule Pakai chu atahsandiu ahi." 
Psalms40:4 Mihoitho hole joulama kiheite ngaisahlouva, Pakaiya atahsanna kisem mi chu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms40:5 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, thil kidang nanabol ho leh keiho lam nangaitona hohi atamlheh-in, hicheho chu nahenga kisimdoh joupontin; hicheho chu phondoh-a seiding tileng simjouhoi hilouding ahi." 
Psalms40:6 Ganlhaina leh thilpeh nangailu pon, kakolho neihonpeh tan; govam thilto leh chonset thilto jong nangailu poi." 
Psalms40:7 Chujouvin keiman ven kahunge kati; lekhajol bu-a chun kachung chang thu akisune," 
Psalms40:8 vo ka Pathen, nalunglhaina bolding katha anomin; henge, nadan thu chu kalung sungah aume." 
Psalms40:9 Houkhom na loupitah-a chun chonphatna thu kalhangsapmin; vetemin vo Pakai, kakamhi thip ponte ti nahei." 
Psalms40:10 Nachon phatna kalungsunga kaselpon; nakitahnale nami huhhingna keiman kaphonglen; nalungset ngailutna le nathudihna chu mipi kikhom tamtah lah-a chun ka-im jipoi. 
Psalms40:11 Vo Pakai nami hepina lutah chu keija dingin it hih-in; nangailutna leh nathutah-in neivetup jingin. 
Psalms40:12 Ajehchu simjoulou setna-in eiumkimvelin; kakhan gitlouna chun eituh-in, chutichun kadahdoh theitapoi; hicheho chu kalua sam jangho sangin atamjon, hijeh chun kalungthimin eilosam sahtai." 
Psalms40:13 Vo Pakai, lungset tah-in neihuhdoh in, vo Pakai, eipanpidin kikinno loijin." 
Psalms40:14 Kahinna manthah sah ding go-a holho chu jahchale maimoh-in umhen, kasetna ding ngaitoho chu kinungno kitnu henlang jahchao hen." 
Psalms40:15 Ajachat manuva aha, aha, eitihou kipaman chu manthah na hihen." 
Psalms40:16 Nangma naholte jouse chu nanga kipah-uhen lang thanomuhen; nami huhhingna ngailuho chun tanglouvin Pakai chu choi-atnin umhen, tiuhen." 
Psalms40:17 Ahinla keivang vaichale lhasam kahi, ahinla Pakaiyin keimading agelnai, nangma eipanpile eihuhdoh-a nahin, vo ka Pathen, geisang loujenin." 
Psalms41:1 Migenthei khotopa chu anunnom ahi; Pakaiyin boina ato phatle ahuhdoh ding ahi. 
Psalms41:2 Pakaiyin ama chu ahonbitna ahinsah ding; chule leiset chunga phattheina chang ding; chule nangman ama chu melmate deilama napehdoh louding ahi. 
Psalms41:3 Lungkhamna jalkhun chunga chu Pakaiyin ama ahatsah ding; nangman ajalkhun chunga nasemthah ding ahi. 
Psalms41:4 Keiman Pakai neihepin, nei damsah-in, ajehchu nangma dounan kachonse tai kati." 
Psalms41:5 Kamelma ten keima eisamse jingun, itihle ama athin, amin amangdem? atiuvin ahi." 
Psalms41:6 Chule eivedinga ahung jongle, manlou thu jeng aseijin alungsunga khan gitlouna adimin, apotdohle teng aseithang sohjin ahi." 
Psalms41:7 Eihotbol jouse chu keidounan akihou lhiuvin; keima dingin asecheh angaitouvin," 
Psalms41:8 Nat phalou tah-in ama aphah ahitai, alupna-a kon thoudoh talou ding ahi, atiuve." 
Psalms41:9 Henge, kagol ngaitah, katahsan pen, ka changlhah nepa tah-in jong kachunga akengto alamtai." 
Psalms41:10 Ahivangin vo Pakai, amaho kalethuh theina dingin neihepin lang neiphong dingin." 
Psalms41:11 Kamelma ten eijolou jeh-un, nangma kachunga nalung lhaije ti hichea konhin kahei." 
Psalms41:12 Chule keima vang, kadih chamkimna-a nangin neituh jingin, namai koh-a tonsotnadin neitousah tan ahi." 
Psalms41:13 Pakai Israel Pathen chu tonsotna pat tonsot geijin nunnom jinghen, Amen chule Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Sitwi ngaija sakhichal haisama bangin, vo Pathen nangma ngaijin kahinna hi ahaisam-e." 
Psalms42:2 Kahinna hi Pathen, Pathen hing ngaijin adangchah-e; itih tahle kahunga Pathen anga kakilah dingham?" 
Psalms42:3 Kamitlhi hi sunle janna ka-an ahin; amahon kahengah tanglouvin na Pathen hoibaham? eitiuvin ahi. 
Psalms42:4 Hiche thilhohi kageldoh tengle kahinna kasungah kabunglha ji-e; ajehchu mipi lah-a kachen, amahotoh kipana le vahchoina aw tothon Pathen in'a kacheuvin, nitheng nitna mihonpi chuto kahiuvin ahi." 
Psalms42:5 Vo kahinna, ipi dinga nangma kisonlha-a nahim? chule ipi dinga nangma lung olmoa nahin? Nangma Pathen'a kinemmin, ajeh chu amaiso-a kithopina jeh-a ama kavahchoi ding ahi." 
Psalms42:6 Vo ka Pathen, kasunga kahinna hi alengvaijin; hijeh chun Jordan gama kon, Harmon munsang ho-a kon, chuleh Mizar lhanga konin nangma geldoh inge." 
Psalms42:7 Natwi lon gin'a chun twithuh le twithuh akidongton, natwi kinong le husa gin chun eichuptan ahi." 
Psalms42:8 Hijongle Pakaiyin alungset ngailutna chun sunle thu pentin, janle ala chun eiumpi ding, chule kahinna Pathen henga chu katao ding ahi." 
Psalms42:9 Keiman Pathen kasongpi henga chu ibolla neisuhmil ham? kamelmate suhgentheina jeh-a ibola lunghemma vahlea kahim? katiding ahi. 
Psalms42:10 Kagusunga chemjam um banghelin, kamelma ten i-sah louvin eibolun; niseh in kahenga na Pathen hoiba ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Psalms42:11 Vo kahinna, ibolla lengvaija nahim? Chule ipidinga kasunga lung olmoa nahim? Pathen'a kinemmin, ajehchu kamel eidamsahpa le ka Pathen, ama chu vahchoi nalaiding kahi." 
Psalms43:1 Vo Pathen kathu neitan peh-inlang Pathen ngaisahlou nam mite chunga kathuhi neiseitoh peh-in, O milhem lhaho le midihlou ho-a konin neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms43:2 Ajehchu nangma kathahatna Pathen nahin, ibolla neipaidoh hitam? Kamelmateho suhgentheina jeh-a, ibola lunghemma kavale dingham?" 
Psalms43:3 O navah le nathutah chu hinsol doh-in, hicheho chun eipuile henlang, chule hichun nalhang theng le na houbuh chu eilhut hen." 
Psalms43:4 Chujou tengle Pathen maicham lamma kakipana chungnung Pathen henga chun chenge, henge, selangdah-in nangma vahchoi jinge, O Pathen, ka Pathen," 
Psalms43:5 Vo kahinna, ibolla lengvaija nahim? Chule ipidinga kasunga lung olmoa nahim? Pathen'a kinemmin, ajehchu kamel eidamsahpa le ka Pathen, ama chu vahchoi nalaiding kahi." 
Psalms44:1 Vo Pathen kapu kapa teovin khangluilaija nanatoh nathilbol einahilu chu, kanakhang houvun kajauvin ahi." 
Psalms44:2 Nangin nakhutna Pathen hephalouho chu nanano manga, chule kapu kapateu chu naphudetna, chuche gam miho chu iti nasuh gentheija, napaidoh jeng hitam." 
Psalms44:3 Ajehchu amahon achemjamuva gam chu alah uva alou ahipon, ahiloule aban thahatnuva kihuh hinga jong ahipouvin; hinla achunguva nakipa jeh-a nabanjet le namai vah-a konjoh ahi." 
Psalms44:4 Vo Pathen nangma kalengpa nahi, Jacob huhdohna dingin thu pe-in." 
Psalms44:5 Nangma jala kamelma teo kasot kundiu ahin; namin jala keiho douna-a kipatdoh ho chu kachotpha diu ahi. 
Psalms44:6 Ajehchu kathalpi hi katahsan pon, ahilouleh kachemjamin jong eihuhdoh ponte." 
Psalms44:7 Ahinla kamelma teova konin nangin neihuhhing jouvin, chule eihot bolteu chu najumso jotan ahi." 
Psalms44:8 Nilhum keijin Pathen jenga kisongung kating, chule namin chu tonsotnin vahchoi uvinge." 
Psalms44:9 Ahinla nangin neipaidoh-un, neijumso taovin; chule kagalsat mite toh nakondoh khom tapoi." 
Psalms44:10 Melma-a konin nangin neikinung lesah-un, chule eihotbol teo chun amahodin thil akichomuvin ahi." 
Psalms44:11 Nangin Pathen hephalouho lah-a neithe cheh-un, nehdinga kigong kelngoi bangin neipedoh taovin ahi." 
Psalms44:12 Namitehi imalouvin najohdoh-in, aman nu jong haonan nanei chom dehpoi." 
Psalms44:13 Nangin kaheng kakomhou noise din neisemun, kakim vel uva miho musit le nuisat nin neiumsah taove." 
Psalms44:14 Nangin Pathen hephalouho lah-a seichah dingle, miho lah-a lu thinkhum din neisem taovin ahi." 
Psalms44:15 Lunggimna tanglouvin kamasanga aumjingin, chule kamai jong jachatnan akhu tan ahin," 
Psalms44:16 Ajehchu melmale phulapa i-sah louna le taitomna aw-so jeh chu ahi. 
Psalms44:17 Hichengse chu kachunguva alhungin, ahinla nangma kasumilkha pouvin, chule nathu lhuna jong kapalkeh khapouvin ahi." 
Psalms44:18 Kalungthimu akile hei pon, kakalseu jonghi nalampi-a konin apetmang khapoi." 
Psalms44:19 Ahivangin nangin dragonho mun'a neisuchip deh-un, thina le-lim chun neikhu uvin ahi" 
Psalms44:20 Ka Pathen'u min chu kasuhmil uva, gamchom pathen henga kakhut kajahdoh uva ahile;" 
Psalms44:21 Pathen'in hiche chu aholdoh louding ham? ajehchu aman lungsung thuguhho chu ahen ahi. 
Psalms44:22 Henge, keiho nangma jeh-in nilhum keijin eikithat jingui, thadinga kigo kelngoi bangin eikisim taove." 
Psalms44:23 Vo Pakai khangin, ibola imua nahim? kithouvin tonsotnadin neipaidoh loujenun." 
Psalms44:24 Ipijeh-a namai naselmanga, chule eikibol gimnaole eiki suhgenthei naohi nasuhmil hitam?" 
Psalms44:25 Ajehchu kahinnao hi leivui lah-a akunin, ka-oiju hi leisetna abehtan ahi." 
Psalms44:26 Eipanpi diuvin kipatdoh-in, chule nahepina jal-in neilhat doh-un." 
Psalms45:1 Kalungthim sunghi thuphan akisun dimtan, lengpa chung changa thil kanabol chu kaseijin, kaleihi gotsa thusunpa lekhamol ahi." 
Psalms45:2 Mihem chate sangin nahoijon, lungsetnahi nakama akisunglutne; hijeh-a chu Pathen'in tonsotna phatthei naboh ahi." 
Psalms45:3 Vo hat chungnung, nachemjam chu nataija kigah inlang, nalalna le ja naum na-a chun kivonin." 
Psalms45:4 Chule thutah le nunnem na chule chonphatna jal-in, nalalna-a chun khangtou tah-in touvin; chule nakhut jetnin thil gimneitahho nahilding ahi." 
Psalms45:5 Lengpa melmate lung sunga nathalmuh chu ahemin, hichea chun mite nanoija alhu jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms45:6 Vo Pathen nalaltouna chu atonsot atonsotna ahin; nalenggam tenggol chu leng tenggol dihtah ahi. 
Psalms45:7 Nangman chonphatna nangailun, chule gitlouna nahot bolin; hijeh chun Pathen, na Pathen chun, nagol ho chung vuma kipana thao nanutan ahi." 
Psalms45:8 Navonho jouse chu saiha-a kisa leng inpiho sunga konin myrrh le aloe chule cassia anam hiuheu vin hicheho chun nakipa sah-in ahi. 
Psalms45:9 Lengho chanute chu numei ja-umtah ho lah-a aumun, najet lama lengnu chu Ophir sana-a kijemin adingin ahi." 
Psalms45:10 Vo chanu, ngaiphan lang geltoh-in, chule nana sungin, namite le napa insung jong chu sumilin;" 
Psalms45:11 Chutile lengpan nahoina nasatah chu adeichat ding ahi; ajehchu ama na Pakai pa ahin, chule nangman ama chu houvin." 
Psalms45:12 Chule Tyre chanu chu thilpeh khat choija hungding, miho lah-a mihaoho jengin jong nalungsetna angeh diu ahi." 
Psalms45:13 Lengpa chanu chu loupina adimin; aponsil chu sana-a kijempah ahi. 
Psalms45:14 Amanu chu lengpa henga pon kikhui pahsel kivona apuidiu; aloi anungjui nungah thengho chu nahenga ahinpuidiu ahi. 
Psalms45:15 Kipahtahle thanom tah-in amaho hin kipuijintin, amaho leng inpi sunga lutdiu ahi." 
Psalms45:16 Leiset pumpi-a leng chapa-a nasem diuchu, napateu khela nachateo hiding ahi." 
Psalms45:17 Akhang akhanga geldoh jing dingin namin seming ting, hijeh-a chu mihem ten atonsot, atonsotna navahchoi diu ahi." 
Psalms46:1 Pathen chu ikiselnao le itha hatnao ahin, lungkham pettah a eipanpiu ahi." 
Psalms46:2 Leiset hi kichon mang henlang, chule twikhanglen lailung-ah molsang hohi kipolut hen;" 
Psalms46:3 chu-a twiho chu ginglul lulin kinong henlang, chule molsangho kihotlingsoh jongle keiho kicha pouvinge." 
Psalms46:4 Vadung khat aumin, chu-a luidungho chun Pathen khopi akipasah ding, Hatchung nungpen houbuh umna muntheng chu akipasah ding ahi." 
Psalms46:5 Alailunga chun Pathen aumin, ama longlou helding; jingpi tah-a Pathen'in akithopi ding ahi." 
Psalms46:6 Pathen hephalouho alunghangun, lenggam ho akilongsoh-in; Aman a-aw aginsah le leiset ajunlha tai." 
Psalms46:7 Janel ho Pakai chun eiumpiuvin, Jacob Pathen chu ikiselnao ahi." 
Psalms46:8 Leiset hi itobanga agohkeo asosah hitam, hungun lang Pakai thilbolhohi vetemun." 
Psalms46:9 Aman kolmong geija gal kisat asutangin, thalpi ahehbongin, tengcha asubongin, sakol kangtalai meijin ahalvamtan ahi." 
Psalms46:10 Thipkhen chan umunlang Pathen kahi heuvin, Pathen helou namtin vaipi lah-a choi-at na kauma, leisetna choisanga kaum ding ahi." 
Psalms46:11 Janelho Pakai chun eiumpiuvin, Jacob Pathen chu ikiselnao ahi." 
Psalms47:1 Vo nangho mipite jousen nakhut bengun, Pathen henga galjona aw thongin samun." 
Psalms47:2 Ajehchu hat chungnung Pakai chu gimneitah ahin, leiset pumpi chunga leng loupitah ahi." 
Psalms47:3 Aman mitin chu inoijuva asuh nemding, namtin chu ikengto noijuva akoiding ahi." 
Psalms47:4 Aman angailut Jacob loupina chu igoulo diuva alhending ahi. 
Psalms47:5 Pathen chu aw ging pumin, Pakai chu sumkon gin pumin akitol toutai." 
Psalms47:6 Pathen vahchoi La tumgingto thon saovin, vahchoi La saovin ilengpao vahchoi La saovin, vahchoi La saovin." 
Psalms47:7 Ajehchu Pathen chu leiset pumpi leng ahin, hetnatoh thon tumgingin vahchoi La saovin." 
Psalms47:8 Pathen chu namtin chunga aleng changin, Pathen chu alaltouna theng chunga atouvin ahi." 
Psalms47:9 Mipi lah-a pipuho akikhom khomun, Abraham Pathen mite lah-a pipuho geijin akikhom khomun ahi. Ajehchu leisetna lumdal jouse Pathen'a ahin, ama chu nasatah-a choisanga uma ahi." 
Psalms48:1 Alen na chu Pakai bou ahin, chule athenna molsang, i-Pathen'u khopi-a chu loupi tah-a vahchoi ding ahi." 
Psalms48:2 Amun dinga hoitah, leiset pumpi kipana chu sahlam sanga Zion molsang, leng loupitah khopi chu ahi." 
Psalms48:3 Aleng inpiho sunga chun, Pathen chu kiselna-in akihei." 
Psalms48:4 Ajehchu veuvin, lengho chu akikhomun achemang gamtaove." 
Psalms48:5 Amahon hichu amuvin, chutichun adatmouvin; amaho alung khamun ache mangloi taove." 
Psalms48:6 Chuachun kichatle natna-in, numei anaoso natnin amat bangin amanchah taove." 
Psalms48:7 Nangman solama huijin, Tarshish kong inneiho chu nasumang gamtan ahi." 
Psalms48:8 Keihon kanajah bangun, janelho Pakai khopi sung, Pathen khopi sunga chun kamu taovin; Pathen'in atonsotna dinga atundoh ding ahi." 
Psalms48:9 Vo Pathen nahouin sung lailunga chun, nalungset ngailutna thu kana ngaitouvin ahi." 
Psalms48:10 Vo Pathen, namin dungjuija napachat na chu kolmong geija umding ahin, nakhut jetlam chu chonphatna-a dimset ahi." 
Psalms48:11 Nathu tanlhah naho jal-in Zion lhang chu kipah henlang, Juda chanute chu thanomu hen." 
Psalms48:12 Zion chu velkolun lang, akimvela kijotnun, chua insangho chu hilun." 
Psalms48:13 Ahung umkitding khangho henga nahil theina diuvin, nanghon akulpiho chu melchih-un lang, aleng inpiho chu ngaito temun." 
Psalms48:14 Ajehchu hiche Pathen hi tonsot atonsotna i-Pathen'u ahin; thi geija jong eipuihoi pau hiding ahi. 
Psalms49:1 Nanghon mipite jousen hichehi ngaijunlang, vannoi'a cheng nangho jousen nanau hin sungun." 
Psalms49:2 Misangle minem, ahaole avai, kigomin hichehi ngaijuvin." 
Psalms49:3 Kakamin chihna thu seijintin, chule kalung ngaito chu hetkhen themna thu hiding ahi." 
Psalms49:4 Thulem thuah kana sungin ting, kathugil sei chu selangdah-in hilchen inge." 
Psalms49:5 Nikho phatlou lai, kakhotal ho-a khanset na-in eiumchah teng ibola kakichat ding ham?" 
Psalms49:6 Anei agouvu tahsan ho, chule ahaona houva kisongho chu;" 
Psalms49:7 koimachan iti nama jongle asopi alhat thei louheldiu, Pathen henga ama lhatdohna dingjong apehthei louheldiu ahi." 
Psalms49:8 (Ajehchu alhagaovu lhatdohna ding chu manlutah ahin, hichu a-imatih chana dinga kikhah ahitai)." 
Psalms49:9 Ama chu a-imatih chana hingjinga, chule thina jong atepkhah louding ahi." 
Psalms49:10 Ajehchu aman michingho jong athiu amun, hitobangma chun angola milungselho jong amangthah-in, anei agouho midangho adalhahpeh jiuve, ti amutan ahi." 
Psalms49:11 A-in hou chu a-imatih chana umjing ding bangle achennao munho chu akhang houva umjing ding bangin, asunglamuva agelun, chule agamu chu amaho mincheh asah jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms49:12 Hijeng jongle mihem hi jatah-in aumjing jipon, ama chu amangthah ji gamsa tobang ahi." 
Psalms49:13 Hiche alampiuhi angolnao ahin; hinla, asonhouvin amaho thusei chu aphochenun ahi." 
Psalms49:14 Kelngoi bangin lhankhuh-a alumin, thinan amaho chu avahding, chule jingkah lamle michondih hon achunguva vai ahomdiu; chule achen naova kona ahoinau chu lhankhuh-a mangthah ding ahi." 
Psalms49:15 Ahinla Pathen'in kahinna hi lhankhuh thanei na-a kona alhatdoh ding ahi: ajehchu aman einasan ding ahi. 
Psalms49:16 Mi khattou ahung haova, a-insung loupina chu ahungkhan cheh cheh tengle nangman kicha hih-in;" 
Psalms49:17 Ajehchu chu ama athi tengle imacha apohtheilou ding ahin, aloupina chun ajui louding ahi." 
Psalms49:18 Adamlaijin ahinna ho chu amale ama phatthei kiboh jongle, nangman nangmatah dinga thilpha nakibol tengle min navahchoi diu ahi." 
Psalms49:19 Ama apateu chilhah ho henga chentin, a-itih-a khovah amulouding ahitai." 
Psalms49:20 Mihem choi-at changa, ahia hetkhen themna neilou chu amangthahji gamsaho bangbep ahi." 
Psalms50:1 Hat chungnung Pakai Pathen chun thu aseitan, leiset hi niso-a pat nilhum geijin akouvin ahi." 
Psalms50:2 Zion'a konin Pathen hoi chamkimna chu avahdohtai. 
Psalms50:3 I Pathen'u chu hungintin thipbeh-in umponte; Amasanglam chu meijin halvam intin, chule akimvel chu huile go kitho hiding ahi." 
Psalms50:4 Aman amite thu atan theina dinga, vanho chule leiset pumpihi chungsanga kona akoukhom ding ahi." 
Psalms50:5 Ganlhaina-a keima toh kitepna nei kami thengte chu kahenga hinkhomin. 
Psalms50:6 Chule vanho hin achonphatna chu aphon doh ding ahi; ajehchu Pathen amatah chu thutan ahi. 
Psalms50:7 Vo kamiteho ngaijun, keiman thu seijinge: vo Israel, chule nangma nahin hilchen inge, Keima Pathen, na Pathen'u chu kahi." 
Psalms50:8 Kamasanga tanglouva umjing nagan lhainaho le nagovam thilpehho jeh-in nangma naphohsal ponge. 
Psalms50:9 Na-in'a konin bongchal chule nahonga konin kelchal himhim ladoh ponge. 
Psalms50:10 Ajehchu gamlah-a gamsa jouse chule lhangho jouse chunga gancha jouse keija ahi. 
Psalms50:11 Molsang ho-a chungleng vacha jouse kahesoh keijin, loulaija gamsaho jousehi keija ahi." 
Psalms50:12 Kagil akela ahijongle nahenga seiponge; ajehchu vannoi leiset leh asunga thil um jouse keija ahi. 
Psalms50:13 Bongchal ho sa kaneh-a ahiloule kelchaho thisan kadon ding ham? 
Psalms50:14 Pathen hengah thangvahna peuvin, chungnung pen hengah nakitepnao lhutjouvin." 
Psalms50:15 Chule lungkham nile neikouvun, keiman huhdoh ingting chule nangin neichoi-at ding ahi." 
Psalms50:16 Ahinla Pathen'in migilou hengah, kadan kisunho naphon doh-a ipi-a napan sah-a, ahiloule ija pang dinga kathulhun nakama nakoiding ham? ati." 
Psalms50:17 Kihilna nahotna kathuho nanung lama napaiji kamun ahi. 
Psalms50:18 Gucha namule ama chu najopmin, chule mijonghotoh chan nanei khomjin ahi." 
Psalms50:19 Nakam chu setna-a napedoh-in, nalei chu lhep lhahnan nasemtoh-e." 
Psalms50:20 Natoumun in nasopi douna thu naseijin, nanu chapatah chu naseisejin ahi." 
Psalms50:21 Hichehohi nabolin, keima kathipbeh-in, nangin nang tobangin neingaiton ahi. Ahinla keiman kaphosala hihochu namitmu tah-a katahlang ding ahi." 
Psalms50:22 Tun nangho Pathen sumiltehon, hichehi ngaito phaovin, achutiloule ahal halla kabotel uva, nahuhdoh diu umlou ding ahi." 
Psalms50:23 Vahchoina thilto banga toh chanchun keima eichoi-at ahin; chule ahoulimna kisemtohpa henga chu Pathen mi huhhingna kavetsah ding ahi. 
Psalms51:1 Vo Pakai na ngailut phatna dungjuijin neihepin lang, nami hepi haotah dungjuijin kasuh khelnaho noimangin." 
Psalms51:2 Kakhan gitlouna-a konin neisil ngim selinlang, kachonsetna-a konin neisuthengin." 
Psalms51:3 Ajehchu kasuh khelnaho kakihet nin; chule kachonsetna chu kamasanga aumjingin ahi. 
Psalms51:4 Nangman thu naseiteng them nachan theina dingle, thu natan teng akichet theina dingin, nangmatah dounan kachonsen, hiche thilse hi namitmun kana boltan ahi." 
Psalms51:5 Vetan, gitlouna-a anakijila kahin, chule kanun chonset na-a einavop ahi." 
Psalms51:6 Vetan, nangin asung gil lama thutah chu nangailun; chule lunggil lama chu nangin chihna thu neihetsah ding ahi." 
Psalms51:7 Hyssop'in neisuthengin chutile ngimtange; neisilin chutile buhbang sanga kaban joh ding ahi. 
Psalms51:8 Nasuh bohsa guho akipana diuvin, kipana le thanopna chu neijah sah-in." 
Psalms51:9 Kachonsetna ho-a konin namai selin, chule ka gitlouna jousehi noimangin." 
Psalms51:10 Vo Pathen, keima-a lungtheng khumin lang, kasunghi lhagao dihtah-in semthah-in." 
Psalms51:11 Naum na-a konin neipaidoh danlang, keija konin nalhagao theng ladoh hih-in." 
Psalms51:12 Nami huhhingna kipana chu neipekit ninlang, chule nalhagao hongphal tah-a chun nei tuhdet jingin." 
Psalms51:13 Chutengle suhkhel neiho chu nalampi hil ingting, chule michonse hon alungu nangma heng lamma ahin aheidiu ahi."
