Psalms51:14 Vo Pathen, nang eihuh hingpa Pathen, thisanso mona-a konin neihuh doh-in chutile kalei hin nachon phatna aw thongin lan sante." 
Psalms51:15 Vo Pakai nangin kakamhi kat sah in, chutile kakamin navahchoina aphonjal ding ahi." 
Psalms51:16 Ajehchu nangin ganlhaina nangaichapoi; chutilou hile kapeh ding nahin, nangma govam thilpeh-a jong nalunglhai pon ahi." 
Psalms51:17 Pathen'in adei ganlhaina chu lhagaova kisuhchip hi ahin; Vo Pathen, lungsung pohkeh le kisih ho chu nangin nahsah louva nakoi louding ahi." 
Psalms51:18 Zion dinga apha nadeilamtah chu bolin, Jerusalem kulbang chu saphan." 
Psalms51:19 Chutengle chonphatna ganlhaina, govam thilpeh chule govam thilto pumpi-a chun lunglhai tan natin; chutengle namaicham chunga chun abongchal hou chu hintoh taovinte." 
Psalms52:1 Vo mithahatpa, nangmale nangma ibola thilphalou va naki thang-at ham? Pathen phatna chu tanglouva umjing ahi." 
Psalms52:2 Nalei hin samchem hemtah bangin jonchihna na atongin, chule lamvaina chu agongin ahi." 
Psalms52:3 Nangin thilpha sangin thilse nangailun, chule chonphatna seisangin jouthu nangailu jon ahi." 
Psalms52:4 Vo lheplhahna lei, nangman bahgam thu jouse nangailun ahi." 
Psalms52:5 Chutobanga chu Pathen'in a-itih-a dinga nagamsah-a nalahmang ding, chule na chenna mun'a kona nabodoh-a, mihing gama kona nakaldoh ding ahi." 
Psalms52:6 Michonphan jong amua, chule akichatna, anuisat ding ahi." 
Psalms52:7 Veovin, Pathen chu ahatna-a semloupa, ahi-a ninglhing setna ahaonaho tahsan na, gitlouna-a kisuhat mipa chu amahi ahi." 
Psalms52:8 Ahinla keimavang Pathen insunga olive thinghing tobang chu kahin, keiman Pathen hepina chu a-imatih channa din katahsanin ahi." 
Psalms52:9 Hichu nabol jeh-in a-imatih chanin nangma vahchoi jing ting, chule namin chu ngahjing tange; ajeh chu namithengte mitmu-a hichu phatah ahi." 
Psalms53:1 Mingolin alung sungah Pathen aumpoi atijin ahi. Amaho akisuboh-un, chule thet umtah khan gitlouna aboluvin, koimacha thilpha bola aumpouvin ahi." 
Psalms53:2 Ahethem le Pathen hola umkhat touvem tin, Pathen'in van'a konin mihem chate ahinvesuh-in ahi." 
Psalms53:3 Amaho abonun akinung heijin, abon chaovin abohgam taove; thilpha bola khatcha aumpoi, khatcha jong aumpoi." 
Psalms53:4 Khan gitlouna natongho chun hetna himhim anei lou uham? amahon changlhah aneh bangun kamite abahgam taovin; Pathen la akou him him pouve. 
Psalms53:5 Kichat umlouna-a chun amaho akicha lheh-un ahi; ajehchu Pathen'in nangma douna-a gebuh sunga umpa guho chu athechehtan; Pathen'in amaho i-asahlou jeh-in, nangman amaho najachat sahtai." 
Psalms53:6 Pathen'in amite asohchan naova kon ahin lepui teng, Israelte huhhingna chu Zion'a kon hitavele, Jacob thanomin tin, Israel kipah ding ahi." 
Psalms54:1 Vo Pathen, naminin neihuh hingin, chule natha hatnin kathu neitan peh-in." 
Psalms54:2 Vo Pathen, kataona ngaijin lang, kakama thupot ho-a hin nana neisun peh-in." 
Psalms54:3 Ajehchu gamchom miho keima doudingin akigotaovin, chule misugenthei hon kahin nahi aholun; Pathen chu amasanguvah akoipouve." 
Psalms54:4 Vetan, Pathen chu eipanpia ahin; Pakai chun kahinna eituh peh ho aumpin ahi." 
Psalms54:5 Aman kamelmate chu setna-a alelutding ahin; nangman amaho chu nathutah-a chun sumangin. 
Psalms54:6 Nahenga manbeijin ganlhaina neijinge, O Pakai, hichehi thilpha ahijeh-in, namin vahchoi jinge." 
Psalms54:7 Ajehchu aman lungkhamna jouse-a konin eihuh dohtan; chule kamelmate chunga kamitnin angaichat chu amutai. 
Psalms55:1 Vo Pathen, kataona-a nana hinsungin; chule kathumna-a konin nangma kiselmang hih-in." 
Psalms55:2 Kakoma uminlang, chule kataona nei ngaipeh-in, kagenthei na-a kalunghemin, hichun eisunoh phah-in," 
Psalms55:3 Melma aw jehle migiloupa suhgentheina jeh-in na satah-in kamaovin ahi. Ajehchu khan gitlouna kachunga eisekhumun, chule lunghang tah-in eihot boluvin ahi." 
Psalms55:4 Kalungthim sunggil lamhi analheh jengin; chule thina kichat umtah chu kachunga achutai. 
Psalms55:5 Kichatna le kithinna kachunga ahung lhungin, chule kichatna melse tah-in eichuptai." 
Psalms55:6 Chule keiman kaseije, O keima vakhu banga lhaving nei hitaveleng! lengmang ingting gakicholdo tange." 
Psalms55:7 Veovin, gamla tah-a vah lengting, gamthipma kaumding ahi." 
Psalms55:8 Huipi hattah le khopihuija kona hoidohna dingin kikin nonge. 
Psalms55:9 Vo Pakai aleiju sukhen inlang, sumangin, ajehchu khopi sunga khun hunam le kinahna kamun ahi." 
Psalms55:10 Sunle jan-in chua kulbang chunga chun amaho avahle leuvin, asunga chun lungkhamna le thilphalou jeng aumin ahi." 
Psalms55:11 Alah uva chun khan gitlouna aumin; lheplhahna le doha bolnan akhosung lamlen adalha khapoi. 
Psalms55:12 Ajehchu eiseisea chu melma ahipoi; hijo ngaple kathoh joujoh ding ahi. Keima douna-a ama kiloupi sahpa jong chu eihotbol ahipoi; hijo ngaple ama-a kona kiselding kahi. 
Psalms55:13 Ahinla kakibahpi mi, eipuija, chule kamelhet mi, nangma nahi," 
Psalms55:14 kithu hilna ngeitah ingaikhom jin, chule Pathen houin'a ichekhomji-e." 
Psalms55:15 Thinan achungu lhunkhum hen, chule thikhol khulah kumsuh loijuhen, ajehchu gitlouna chu achennao le alah uvah aume." 
Psalms55:16 Keivangin Pathen kou vingting, Pakaiyin eihuhhing ding ahi." 
Psalms55:17 Jingkah le nilhah, chule sunnin taovingting, hatah in saminge; Chule aman ka aw ajahding ahi." 
Psalms55:18 Eidounao galmuna konin aman kahinna mongtah-in eihuhdoh-in ahi; ajehchu eidouho chu tamtah ahiuvin ahi. 
Psalms55:19 Pathen, khanglui laija umjingpa tahchun, ngaijintin, abol hesohdiu ahi. Ajehchu amahon kikhelna aneilou jeh-un Pathen agingpouve." 
Psalms55:20 Amatoh kichamna neiho dounan akhut alhangin, akitepna chu asukehtan ahi." 
Psalms55:21 Akama thuho chu bongnoiha sangin analjon, alungsungla kidouna bou ahin; athuho chu thao sangin ajoljon, ahinla chemjam kisatdoh ahiuve." 
Psalms55:22 Napohgih Pakai chunga seplhan, aman napanpi ding ahi; Aman michonpha chu suhling dingin itih hijongle phal ponte." 
Psalms55:23 Ahinla vo Pathen, nangin amaho chu manthah na kokhuh sunga napuisuh ding; thisanso mile milhem lhaho chu anikhou kehkhat jong hing joulou dingu ahi; Hijongle keiman nangma katahsan ding ahi." 
Psalms56:1 Vo Pathen, neihepin, ajehchu min vallhum din eigon, aman niseh-in eikisatpin eisugenthei jinge." 
Psalms56:2 Kamelma ten niseh in vallhum dingin eigouve; ajehchu eidouho chu tamtah ahiuve, vo chungnung pen." 
Psalms56:3 Kakichat tengle nangma tahsan inge. 
Psalms56:4 Pathen chu athu-in vahchoi jinge, mihemin i-eilo theiding ham? Pathen'a katahsan kangamtan kicha ponge" 
Psalms56:5 Niseh in kathuho alakoijun, alunggel jouseu keima douna le setna ahi." 
Psalms56:6 Amaho akikhom khommun, kahinna ladinga eichan tengule, akiselun, kakholhah amelchih jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms56:7 Khan gitlouna-a kona ongthol diu hinam? Vo Pathen, nalunghanna miho chu seplhatan." 
Psalms56:8 Nangin kavalenaho namelchih-in, kamitlhiho nahai sungah nakhumin, hiho chu nalekhabu-a umcheh louham?" 
Psalms56:9 Nahenga kaka phatle, kamelmate chu anungchon jiuve; hiche hi kahei, Pathen chu keija ahi." 
Psalms56:10 Pathen chu athu-in vahchoi jinge; Pakai chu athu -in vahchoi jinge. 
Psalms56:11 Keima kicha taponge mihemin i-eilo thei dingham? Pathen'a katahsan kangam tai. 
Psalms56:12 Vo Pathen, nakihahselnaho kachungah aumin; keiman, nangma vahchoinaho peng kate." 
Psalms56:13 Ajehchu kahinna hi thina-a konin nahuhdoh tan; Pathen masanga hinna vah-a kavale theina dinga, kakenga kalhuh louna dinga nangin neihuhdoh lou ding ham?" 
Psalms57:1 Neihepin, vo Pathen, neihepin, ajehchu kahinna-in natahsanin ahi. Hiche vangsetna ho kichai kahse-a, nalhalima kahoidoh na kasemding ahi." 
Psalms57:2 Pathen thil jouse eibol pehpa, chungnung pen Pathen henga chun taovinge." 
Psalms57:3 Vallhum dinga eigopa i-sah louva konchun, aman van'a konin hinsol intin eihuhhing ding ahi. Pathen'in amihepinale athutah chu ahinsoldoh ding ahi." 
Psalms57:4 Kahinnahi keipi bahkaiho lah-a aumin, chule mei kihal khumho lahle, ahahou tengcha le thallung bang, aleiju chemjam hemtah tobang mihem chapate lah jenga jong chun kalumjin ahi." 
Psalms57:5 Vo Pathen, nangma vanho chungvuma kichoisangin, naloupina chu leiset pumpi chungvuma umhen." 
Psalms57:6 Amahon kakholhah na din lenthang aphaovin, kahinna hi alhadah-in; kamasanga kokhuh alaijun, chuche-a chun amaho alhalutnuve." 
Psalms57:7 Kalungthim dettah ahi, vo Pathen, kalungthim dettah ahi, la sang ting chule vahchoina penge." 
Psalms57:8 Thoudoh-in, kaloupina, tumging le selangdah kithou vin, keima tah jong matah-in thouvinge." 
Psalms57:9 Vo Pakai, mipi ho lah-a nangma vahchoi jing ting; namtin lah-a nangma henga la sange." 
Psalms57:10 Ajehchu nahepina chun vanho apha-in; chule nathudih chu meilhang ho aphan ahi. 
Psalms57:11 Vo Pathen, nangma vanho chungvum geijin kichoisangin, naloupi chu leiset pumpi chungvum ma umhen." 
Psalms58:1 Vo mipi ho, nanghon tahbeh-a chonphat thu naseiju hinam? Vo nangho mihem chapaten, lungtheng sela thu natanu hinam?" 
Psalms58:2 Henge, nalunguvin gitlou nabolun, leisetna hin nakhut-un hunam napan jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms58:3 Migilou chu naobu-a kona khensa ahin, apen penule jouthu seijin avahmangpai jitaovin ahi." 
Psalms58:4 Agu-u chu gulgu tobang ahin, amaho gulsum na-ngong kolseh tobang ahiuvin;" 
Psalms58:5 cheho chun guldoi themhon itobang themin lhim jongleu jou pouvinte. 
Psalms58:6 Vo Pathen, akamuva aha-u chu subongin lang, vo Pakai, keipi bahkai donglaiho hapiho chu subongsoh-in." 
Psalms58:7 Tanglouva longjing twi bangin amaho junmang sah-in, athalchang kapdoh dinga athalpi ajetkon teng, ahal ahala kisat bahsah jengin." 
Psalms58:8 Twilung ajunmang bangin amaho abonchauvin mangthah uhen, aphatlouva nupi naonei, nimel mutheilou bang hiuhen." 
Psalms58:9 Nabel houvin lingsut ahet masang uva, aman alunghana-a ahing le ago abona chimpeija alhohmang ding ahi." 
Psalms58:10 Michonpha chun phulahna amutenguleh kipah intin, migilou thisana chu akeng akisil ding ahi." 
Psalms58:11 Chutia chu mihemin michonpha din tohphat man aum mong monge atidiu ahin; tahbeh-a leiset chunga thutan Pathen chu ama ahi. 
Psalms59:1 Vo ka Pathen, kagalte-a konin neihuh doh-in, eidouva dinga kipatdoh ho-a konin neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms59:2 Khan gitlou bolho-a konin neihuhdoh in, chule thisanso mi-a konin neihuh hingin." 
Psalms59:3 Ajehchu vetan, amaho kahinna ngah-in aumjingun; Vo Pakai kasuhkhel jehle kachonset jeh jong hilouvin, mihat ho chu keima dounan akikhomun ahi." 
Psalms59:4 Kasetna beijin akigouvin alhaijun ahi. Ven kithoudoh inlang eipanpin. 
Psalms59:5 Hijeh chun vo janel Pakai, Israel Pathen, Pathen hephalouho vildin thouvin, mikitahlou suhkhel neihohi khatcha jong hepihih helin." 
Psalms59:6 Nilhahle ahung kileuvin uicha bangin apeng setsot jiuvin, chule khopi chu avelvel jiuve." 
Psalms59:7 Veovin amahon akamuvin aphong doh-un; amuh uva chemjamho aumin; hitichun, koiham ajah-a? atiuve." 
Psalms59:8 Ahinla vo Pakai nangin amaho chu nuisatjon natin, Pathen hephalouho chu nuijat nan neijinate." 
Psalms59:9 Atha hatna jeh-in nangma ngah inge; ajehchu Pathen kakihonbitna ahi. 
Psalms59:10 Eihepi Pathen chun eihoidoh intin, Pathen'in kamelmate chunga kangaichat eimusah inte." 
Psalms59:11 Amaho chu that hih in, ajole kamiten sumil getnunte, vo Pakai kalum dalu, nathaneina in thecheh inlang loi nemin." 
Psalms59:12 Ajehchu akamuva asetnao le amuh uva thuho jeh, chule athuseiju gaosapna le jouthu jeh-in, akiletsah naova matnin umuhen;" 
Psalms59:13 Amaho chu lung hana-a sumangin, aumlouna diuvin amaho chu sumangin, chule leiset kichaini geija Pathen'in Jacob'a vai ahomchu amahon heuhen." 
Psalms59:14 Chule nilhahle hungkile sah inlang; uichaho bangin peng setsot nuhen lang, chule khopi chu velleu hen." 
Psalms59:15 Amaho chu nehding holin sahle lhanga vaveisah-in, chule achim louvule phunphun taohen." 
Psalms59:16 Ahinla keiman nathahatna chu lan sangting, henge, jingkahle nahepina la gingtah in sange; ajehchu nangma lungkham ni-a kahoina le kakiselna nahi." 
Psalms59:17 Vo kathahatna, naheng-ah la sange; ajeh chu Pathen hi kahoina le eihepia Pathen chu ahi." 
Psalms60:1 Vo Pathen nangin neipaidoh-un nei thecheh taovin, nalung phamotai; O nangma keiho lammah hung kile kitan." 
Psalms60:2 Nangin leiset nahot lingin, nasukehjin; akhikeh jouse thoi bitnin, ajehchu akilingin ahi." 
Psalms60:3 Namite hi thil hahsatah namusahtan; lungdonna lengpitwi neidonsah taovin ahi. 
Psalms60:4 Thutah jeh-a tah langa aumtheina diuvin, nangma gingho chu ponlap khat napetan ahi." 
Psalms60:5 Nalungset ho nahuhdoh theinadin nakhut jetnin huhhingin lang, chule neingaipeh in." 
Psalms60:6 Pathen'in athenna-in thu aseijin, keima kipah ingting, Shechem chu kahop khenna chule Succoth phaicham chu kahopdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead le Manasseh hi keija ahin, Ephraim jonghi kalu thahatna ahin, Judah chu ka danthu pepa ahi." 
Psalms60:8 Moab hi kakisilna bel ahin, Edom chunga chu ka kengkoh kaledoh ding; Philistia, keima jal-in jona changin." 
Psalms60:9 Edom'a chu kon eilamkaija, khopi dettah-a chu kon eipuilut ding ham?" 
Psalms60:10 Vo Pathen, eina paidoh uva chu nang nahilou ham? chule kagalsat houtoh kondohji Pathen chu nang nahilou ham?" 
Psalms60:11 Lungkham na-a konin neipanpin, ajehchu mihem panpinahi ahomkeo ahi." 
Psalms60:12 Pathen jala hangsan tah-a iboldiu ahi; ajehchu kamelma teo chotpha dinga chu ama ahi. 
Psalms61:1 Vo Pathen, ka kana ngaijin lang, kataona neingaipeh-in." 
Psalms61:2 Kalungthim alhahdah tengle, leiset kolmonga patnin hinkou vingting, kei sanga sangjo songpi-a chun neipuijin." 
Psalms61:3 Ajehchu nangma bou kahoidoh na nahin, melma te-a kona insang det tah chu nahi." 
Psalms61:4 A-imatih chana keima nahoubuh sunga kaum jing ding; nalhaving noi kiselna chu tahsan inge. 
Psalms61:5 Ajehchu vo Pathen, nangin kakitepna neijah pehtan; namin gingho gamlo ding chu neipetai." 
Psalms61:6 Nangin lengpa hinkho nasaosah ding; chule akumho chu khang tamtah tobang hiding ahi. 
Psalms61:7 Ama Pathen anga tonsotna umjing ding; ama vettup ahithei nadin hepina le thutah chu gongtoh-in. 
Psalms61:8 Chutichun kitepnaho niseh-a kabol theina din, a-imatih chanin namin vahchoi La sajing tange." 
Psalms62:1 Tahbeh-in kahinna hin Pathen angah-in, huhhing-a kaum nahi ama-a kona hung ahi." 
Psalms62:2 Amabou kasongpile eihuh hingpa ahin, ama kahoidohna ahin, keima kiling louhel ding kahi." 
Psalms62:3 Itihchan mi khat douna-a thilphalou nangaito diuham? Nabon chaova kithatgam ding nahiuvin; bang on tobang le pal chim kon tobangbou nahidiu ahi. 
Psalms62:4 Ama athupina-a kona sotlhah dingbou akihouvun, jouseihi athanopnao lamtah ahin; akamun phatthei aboh-un asung gilun vang agaosapmun ahi." 
Psalms62:5 Kalhagao, na Pathen bou ngah-in, ajehchu kagin chatna chu ama-a konbou ahi." 
Psalms62:6 Amabou kasongpi le eihuh hingpa ahi; ama kahoidohna ahin, keima longlou ding kahi." 
Psalms62:7 Pathen'a kahuh hingna le kaloupina aumin, kahatna songpi, chule kahoina chu Pathen'a uma ahi." 
Psalms62:8 Phat tinin ama tahsanun lang nanghon nalung thimmu a-angah sunglhaovin, Pathen chu eiho dinga hoidoh na ahi." 
Psalms62:9 Tahbeh-in minoi nungte hi pannabei ahin, milenho jonghi jou thubuh ahibouve; khaikotna khaidin abonchauvin ahomkeo sangin ajang jouve." 
Psalms62:10 Suhgentheina tahsan hih-un, chule mohseh-a mi chom jong bolhih-un, haona apunleh, hiche chunga chun nalung koihih-un." 
Psalms62:11 Pathen'in khatvei aseitan, hiche hi nivei kana jatai; thahatna hi Pathen'a ahi." 
Psalms62:12 O Pakai hepina jonghi nangma-a ahije; ajehchu nangman mitin anatoh dungjui cheh-in lethuhna napejin ahi. 
Psalms63:1 Vo Pathen, nangma ka Pathen nahin, jingpi matah-in nangma holinge; Twi beina gamgo dangchah na gama hin, kalhagao nang ngaijin adang chah-in, katahsan jong nangma nangaichan ahi." 
Psalms63:2 Nathuneinale naloupi munadin, munthenga chun nangma kana velen ahi." 
Psalms63:3 Ajehchu nalungset ngailutna hi hinkho sanga aphat joh jeh-in, kakamin nangma navahchoi ding ahi." 
Psalms63:4 Hitichun kahinlai chansen nangma vahchoi jingting; namina kakhut kadop sang ding ahi. 
Psalms63:5 Kahinna hi lhin le thaova lunglhai ding, chule kakam hin kipah-in nangma navahchoi tante." 
Psalms63:6 Kajalkhun chunga nangma kageldoh teng, jankho lhonin nangma kangaito jin ahi." 
Psalms63:7 Ajehchu nangma eipanpi jia nahin, hijeh-a chu nalha limnoija keima kipah kahi." 
Psalms63:8 Kahinna hin nanung naichan ajuijin; nakhut jetlamin neituh jinge. 
Psalms63:9 Kahinna sumang dinga holho vang chu, leiset noinung geija kumlha diu ahi." 
Psalms63:10 Amaho chemjam'a loudingu ahiuvin; amaho sial ho chanvou dingbou hidiu ahi. 
Psalms63:11 Ahinla lengpa chu Pathen'a kipah ding, ama-a kihahsel takip chu loupi ding ahiuvin; ahinla jou thusei ho kam vang kisimbing ding ahi." 
Psalms64:1 Vo Pathen, kataona-a ka aw ngaijin, melmate ginna-a konin kahinkho hi neiventup peh-in." 
Psalms64:2 Mikhangse kithuhilna-a konle, khan gitlou natongho thilgona konin jong neiselin." 
Psalms64:3 Amahon aleiju chemjam bangin anol hemun, chule thu khatah ho kap nadin athalpihou ajekon uvin," 
Psalms64:4 Nolnabei mi chu guhthima akaptheina diuvin; amahon photlot louvin, kichalou helin ama chu akapmun ahi." 
Psalms64:5 Thilse lama amahole amaho akitil khouvun; guhthima thang kam nadin akihou jiuvin, kon amuding ham? atiuve." 
Psalms64:6 Amahon khan gitlounaho chu aholun, gunchu tah-a athil holu chu amolsouve. Amaho sunggil lam ngaitona le lungthimho chu thuhtah ahi." 
Psalms64:7 Ahinla Pathen'in amaho thalla akapding, photlot louva machangdiu ahi." 
Psalms64:8 Hitichun aleigui jeh uvin amaho mangthah-un tin, amaho mutapou chu jammang jengdiu ahi." 
Psalms64:9 Chule mijouse kichaovintin,Pathen natoh chu aphondoh diu ahi; ajehchu ama thilbol chu lungching tah-a angaitodiu ahi." 
Psalms64:10 Michonpha hochu Pakaiyah kipah untin, chule ama atahsan diu; milung dih ho jouse chu loupidiu ahi." 
Psalms65:1 O Pathen, Sion'ah pachatnan na-ngah jingin, chule kitepna chu nahenga kimolso ding ahi." 
Psalms65:2 O nangma taona sang nahin, tahsa phe jouse nahenga hungdiu ahi." 
Psalms65:3 Khan gitlouvin eijou jing jengin; ka suhkhelnaho vang nangman nasop ngim ding ahi. 
Psalms65:4 Na-in hong sunga achentheina dinga, naheng nailut dinga nalhentum mi chu anunnome. Na insung phatna na houin theng ngeija chu kalungnao chimding ahi." 
Psalms65:5 Vo eihuh hingpao Pathen, chonphat na-a gimneitah thil kibol ho-a nei donbut nin natin; nangma kolkimvela jouse le, twipi chunga gamlatah-a miho tahsan chu nahin;" 
Psalms65:6 Thanei na-a kong akigah-a, athahat na-a molsang ho tungdoh pa;" 
Psalms65:7 Twipiho husan le twikinong husan, chule mipi tamtah husa gin suthip pa nahi." 
Psalms65:8 Kolmonga chenghon jong namelchihna ho chu akichauvin; nangman jingkahle nilhah jong thanom tah-a potdoh din nasemin ahi. 
Psalms65:9 Nangin leiset hi navilin, chule twi nachap kot jin; naning lhinset sah-in, Pathen vadung chu twi dimset ahin, nangin chutabang chu napeh phat chun, chang ahung umdoh-in ahi." 
Psalms65:10 Nangin damkom ho chu twi nanen sah-in, langkon mahaho naum sah-in, hichu gohongin nachapnemin, chua kehdohho chu phatthei naboh-in ahi." 
Psalms65:11 Nangin kum chu naphatna-in nakhu-in, chule na lampiho chun sathao navat khumin ahi." 
Psalms65:12 Amaho chu gamthipma hampaho chunga avalhan, lhang neoho chu amun cheh-a akipah un ahi." 
Psalms65:13 Hamhina mun jouse-a chun gancha hon adimin; phaicham ho jong changin akhusoh-in, thanomin a-aovun, lajong asauve." 
Psalms66:1 Nangho gamjousen, Pathen na kipa aw thon sah-un." 
Psalms66:2 Amin jana la saovin, ama vahchoi chu loupi sah-un." 
Psalms66:3 Pathen henga, nathilbol chu iti gimnei hitam! nathilbol theina loupi jala, namelmate nahenga kipelut ding ahiuve, tin seijuvin." 
Psalms66:4 Leiset pumpin nangma nahouvun tin, chule nahenga la asah uva, namin vahchoi La asahdiu ahi." 
Psalms66:5 Pathen thilbol hohi hungvetemun, mihem chate chunga athilbol hohi tijat umtah ahi." 
Psalms66:6 Aman twipi tolgo asosah in, twisoh chu kengin apal galkaijun, hia chun ama-ah kakipah uvin ahi." 
Psalms66:7 Aman athaneina-in tonsotnin vai ahomin, amitnin namtin chu amui; dou bolho chu kichoisang daohen." 
Psalms66:8 Vo nangho mipin, i-Pathen'u chu vahchoijun, chule apachatna awgin chu kijahdoh sah-un." 
Psalms66:9 Aman mihing lah-a ihinnao hi eituhdet peh-un, chule ikengu achaloh ding jong aphalpoi." 
Psalms66:10 Ajehchu Pathen, nangin neipatep un, dangka bangin nei suthengun ahi." 
Psalms66:11 Nangin len sunga chun neipui lutnun, kakong uvah suhgentheina nangame." 
Psalms66:12 Nangin kalu chunguva mi natousah-in, keihon meilah le twilah kapal galkaijun; ahinla nangin munphatah khatna neipuilut taove." 
Psalms66:13 Keima govam thilpeh choija na in'a kalut ding ahin; kakitepna ho chu nangma kapeh ding," 
Psalms66:14 hichu kahesoh laitah-a kamuh-in aseidoh-a, ka kamin anaphondoh ahitai." 
Psalms66:15 Sathao tah-a govam ganlhaina le kelngoichalho gimnamtui chu nahenga toh ingting, bongchalho le kelcha hotoh tothange." 
Psalms66:16 Nangho Pathen gingho jouse, hung unlang ngaijuvin, chule kahinna dinga ipi eibol peh-em phongdoh inge." 
Psalms66:17 Kakamin ama kakouvin, kaleijin ama achoi anjin ahi." 
Psalms66:18 Keiman kalungthima gitlouna kangaitole, Pakaiyin eingaipeh ponte." 
Psalms66:19 Ahinla tahbeh-in Pathen'in eingaipeh in, aman kataona aw eingaipeh tan ahi." 
Psalms66:20 Kataona le amihepina keija kona heimanglouva Pathen chu nunnom hen. 
Psalms67:1 Pathen'in eihepiu hen, phatthei eiboh uhen, chule amaivah chu ichunguva salvah hen." 
Psalms67:2 Hichu leiset chunga nalampi akihetna ding, chule nahuhhingna damna chu namtin lah-a akihet nading ahi." 
Psalms67:3 Vo Pathen, mitinin navahchoi hen, mijousen nangma navahchoiju hen." 
Psalms67:4 O namtin kipah henlang kipanan la saohen, ajehchu nangin chonphatna-a miho thu natana, chule leisetna cheng namtin chunga vai napoh ding ahi." 
Psalms67:5 Vo Pathen mitinin navahchoi hen, mijousen nangma navahchoiju hen." 
Psalms67:6 Chutengle leisetnin aga tampi sodoh intin, Pathen, ka Pathen'u chun, phatthei eiboh taovinte." 
Psalms67:7 Pathen'in phatthei eiboh-untin, chule kolkim vella mijousen ama ging taovinte." 
Psalms68:1 Pathen chu kipat henlang amelmate kithecheh uhen, ama hote jong chu amasanga jamuhen." 
Psalms68:2 Meikhu alencheh bangin, amaho lenmang sah-in, mei koma khoilu jollha bangin, Pathen anga migilouho chu mangthah uhen." 
Psalms68:3 Ahinla michonpha ho kipah-u henlang, Pathen anga thanomuhen; henge, nasatah-in thanom uhen." 
Psalms68:4 Pathen henga la saovinlang, tumgingto thon amin vahchoi La saovin; vanho chunga touva amina JAH kitipa chu choisangun lang a-anga kipah un." 
Psalms68:5 Achenna munthenga um Pathen chu, pabeite pale meithaiho thutan ahi." 
Psalms68:6 Pathen'in michangkhat chu inko lah-a akoijin, akihenho alhadoh-in; golkehho vang chu gamgoa achensah-in ahi." 
Psalms68:7 Vo Pathen, namite nahin lamkaija, gamthip nahinjot laichun," 
Psalms68:8 Leiset akihotnin, vanho jong Pathen angah achimlhan, Israel Pathen anga chun Sinai jengjong chu akihot tan ahi." 
Psalms68:9 Vo Pathen, nangin go nengtah-in najuhsah-in, hichea chun nagoulote ahatmo laitah-un nasudet tan ahi." 
Psalms68:10 Nangma mipi ho chu chua chun anachengun, vo Pathen nangin naphatna chu mivaichate dingin nagon peh-in ahi." 
Psalms68:11 Pakaiyin thu apen; chuche thu phongjal ho chu hon lentah ahiuve. 
Psalms68:12 Lengte galmiho chu gangtah-in ajamtaovin; chule in'a um numei ho chu galla kichom dohho akihom taovin ahi. 
Psalms68:13 Belho lah-a lumji jongle chun, vakhu lha dangka-a kitom tobang le amul ho sana enga kitom tobang nahi nahlai dingu ahi." 
Psalms68:14 Hatchung nungin chua lengho athehcheh laichun, Salmon'a buhbang bangin abangin ahi." 
Psalms68:15 Pathen lhang chu Bashan lhang tobang ahin, lhang sangtah chu Bashan lhang tobang ahi." 
Psalms68:16 Nangho lhang sangho, ibolla kichom nahiuvem? Hichehi Pathen'in achenna dinga adei lhang chu ahi; henge, Pakai chu chukoma atonsotna chengding ahi." 
Psalms68:17 Pathen kangtalai chu sangsomni, vantil asang asangho ahin, Pakai chu muntheng Sinai'a tobang chun alah uva aume." 
Psalms68:18 Nangma chungsanga nakaltouvin, gal hing chu gal hingin nakaijin, nangin miho din thilpeh nasangin, henge, doubolho-a dingin jong nasangin; hitia chu Pakai Pathen chu alah uva achentheina ding ahi." 
Psalms68:19 Niseh-a iphat chomna diu eipeuva Pakai, eihuh hingpao Pathen chu nunnom hen." 
Psalms68:20 I-Pathen'u chu huhhing-a Pathen ahin, thina-a kona hoidohna chu Pakai Pathen chun anei ahi." 
Psalms68:21 Ahinla Pathen'in amelmate luchang le, suhkhel na-a chejing pa samphatna lulei chu amavoding ahi." 
Psalms68:22 Pakaiyin, Bashan gama konin hinpuikit ningting, kamite chu twikhanglen thuhtah-a konin pui kitninge, ati." 
Psalms68:23 Hitia chu nakengu namelmate thisanna nadelut uva, chule na uichateu lei jongchu chutima hiding ahi." 
Psalms68:24 Vo Pathen, amahon nache chu amuvin, ka Pathen le kalengpa, munthenga nachelaitah chu amuvin ahi." 
Psalms68:25 Lasaho amasauvin, tumging tumhon anungu ajuijun, alah uva chun nungah khongcha bengho aumuvin ahi." 
Psalms68:26 Mipi kikhom lah-a Pathen vahchoijun, tonsot Pakai chu Israel twinah-a konchun vahchoijun." 
Psalms68:27 Chua chun Benjamin phungneo leh, avaipoteu; Judah pipuiho le avaipoteu, Zebulun pipuiho chule Naptali pipuiho chu aumuvin ahi." 
Psalms68:28 Na Pathen'in nathahat chu thu apen; Vo Pathen, kadiuva neithil bolpeh-u chu hatsah-in." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalem'a na houin jala lenghon nahenga kipaman ahinchoi diu ahi. 
Psalms68:30 Mijouse dangka nongho to ahung kipehlut masang seuvin; tengcha choi mihon ho, mipi ho bongnou jaonan bongchal tamtah ho, chu phohsalin lang, galbol ding dei miho chu thecheh-in." 
Psalms68:31 Egypt'a konin pipuho hungdoh untin, Ethiopia'in Pathen lamah akhut jahdoh vah tante." 
Psalms68:32 Leiset lenggam hon Pathen vahchoi La saovin, Pakai vahchoina la saovin." 
Psalms68:33 Golluilai vanho le, vanho chunga toupa henga chun; veuvin, aman a-aw, thaneitah aw ahin lhadoh-in ahi." 
Psalms68:34 Pathen henga nahatnao chu peuvin, athupina chu Israelte chungah aumin, chule ahatna chu meilom ho lah-a aumme." 
Psalms68:35 Vo Pathen, namun thengho-a kona nangma tijat umtah nahi. Ama Israelte Pathen ngeitah chu amite thahatna le thilboltheina peji-a ahi. Pathen chu nunnom hen." 
Psalms69:1 Vo Pathen, neihuhhing in, ajehchu twi hohin kahinna gei ahin phatan ahi." 
Psalms69:2 Dinna ding umlou bonlhoh thuhtah-a chun kalhalut tan; twisoh in eichupmin, twi thuh lama chun kahunglut tan ahi." 
Psalms69:3 Kaka kanan katha acholin, kadang agotan; Ka Pathen kanga jing lai hin kamit alosam tan ahi." 
Psalms69:4 Ajeh beija eihotbol te chu kalua kasamho sangin atamjouvin; dihlou tah-a suhmang dinga eigo kamelmate chu hattah ahiuvin; hiti chun kalah khah louhel chu kalepeh jin ahi. 
Psalms69:5 Vo Pathen, nangin kangolna nahen, chule kachonsetna ho nanga konin akiselpon ahi." 
Psalms69:6 Vo tonsot Pakai, janel Pathen, nangma ngahte chu keima jeh in jachat sah hih-in, vo Israel Pathen, nangma holte chu keima jal-in maimoh daohen." 
Psalms69:7 Ajehchu nangma jal-in keima i-sah louvin ka umin, jachatnan kamai akhutan ahi." 
Psalms69:8 Kasopite lah-a maljin kasohtan, chule kanu chate lah-a gamchom mi kahitan ahi." 
Psalms69:9 Ajehchu na in dinga katom pana-in einechai jin, chule nahouse hon na housetnao chu keima chungah achutan ahi." 
Psalms69:10 Keima kaka ka-a chule an ngola kahinna kasuhgim tengle, hichu eiki houset nabep ahijin ahi." 
Psalms69:11 Khaodip pon jong kavonin kasemtan, amahodin thuchihbep kahijitai." 
Psalms69:12 Kotpi phunga touho chun keima douna thu aseijun, chule jukhamho la bou kanahi jin ahi." 
Psalms69:13 Ahinla vo Pakai, keima vang lah phatchan nahenga kataojin, vo Pathen nahepina tamtah, nahuh hingna thutah jal chun nei ngaipeh-in." 
Psalms69:14 Bonlhoh-a konin neiloidoh inlang, neilhah lhumsah hih-in, eihot bolte leh twi thuhtah-a konin neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms69:15 Twisoh chu neichupsah danlang, twithuh chu neival lhumsah hih-in, chule kotongin jong akam eichikhum hih hen." 
Psalms69:16 Vo Pakai nalungset ngailutna hi aphatjeh-in, neingaipeh in, nahepi khotona chamkim dungjuijin kaheng lama hung kiheijin." 
Psalms69:17 Nasoh-a konin namai sel hih-in, ajeh chu lungkhamin kaume; gangtah-in neingai peh-in." 
Psalms69:18 Kahinna hin naijin chule lhatdoh-in, kamelmate jeh-in neilhat doh-in." 
Psalms69:19 Nangin eikisei setnale kajachatna chule eikija louna hohi nahen; kakidoupi jouse abonun namasanga aumuve. 
Psalms69:20 Houset nahin kalungthim asukeh-in, chule lungkham na-a kadimset nin; ei khoto ding kaholin, khatchala kamupon, chule lhamon naho kaholin khatcha jong kamujoupon ahi." 
Psalms69:21 Ka-an dingin gilkha eipeuvin, chule kadang chah-a kadondin lengpitwi thuh eipeuve." 
Psalms69:22 Adokhangu chu amasanguva thang hihen, chule aphat theinadiu tahho jong chu, thang kisoh hen." 
Psalms69:23 Amulouna diuvin amitnu thimhen lang, chule akongu chu tanglouvin kithin sah-in." 
Psalms69:24 Nalungsat na chu achunguva bunglhan, chule nalunghan lungsatna chun amaho manchah hen," 
Psalms69:25 achennao chu kamhel henlang, aponbuh uva koimacha cheng hihhen." 
Psalms69:26 Ajehchu nangin navoh chu abol gentheijun, chule namavona-a lungkhamho chu houlim nan anei jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms69:27 Akhan gitlounao chu khan gitlouna-in belapmin, chule amaho chu nachon phatna sunga hunglut hih-u hen." 
Psalms69:28 Amaho chu hinna lekhabua konin noimangin, chule chonpha hotoh sunhal hih-in." 
Psalms69:29 Ahinla keima genthei tahle lunggimtah kahin, o Pathen nami huhhingna chun mun sang-ah eikoihen." 
Psalms69:30 Pathen min chu la khatnin vahchoi jingting, chule thangvah tothon choi-an inge." 
Psalms69:31 Hiche hin ki le tin nei bong ahiloule bongchal sanga Pakai chu alung lhaisah joh ding ahi. 
Psalms69:32 Mi nunnemin hichu muntin chule kipahding; chule nangho Pathen hol ho, nalungthimu hingding ahi." 
Psalms69:33 Ajeh chu Pakaiyin migenthei te angaipeh-in, chule asoh changho nahsah louvin abolpoi." 
Psalms69:34 Van le leiset, twipiho chule asunga achatle thei jousen, ama chu vahchoi cheh hen." 
Psalms69:35 Ajeh chu Pathen'in Zion ahuhhing ding, chule amaho chua achenuva, gouloa anei na dinguva, Judah khopiho asahdoh ding ahi." 
Psalms69:36 Asohte sonho jong chun hichu ahinlodiu; Amin ngailuho chu asunga chu chengdio ahi. 
Psalms70:1 Vo Pathen eihuhdoh dingin kino-inlang, vo Pakai eipanpi dingin kikinno loijengin." 
Psalms70:2 Kahinna suhgep dinga holho chu, jahchao henlang maimoh uhen; kakisuhkhah ding deiho chu, kinungle sah inlang kisudongu hen." 
Psalms70:3 Aha, aha, tiho chu ajachatnau lethuh na-in nunglama kilesahtan." 
Psalms70:4 Nangma holjouse chu nangma-a kipahle thanom muhen, na huhhingna ngailuho jouse chun tanglouvin, Pathen chu choi-at nin umhen tiuhen." 
Psalms70:5 Ahinla keivang vaichale lhasama kahi, vo Pathen, kahenga hungloijin, nangma eipanpi-ale eihuh hingpa nahi; vo Pakai, geisang loujenin." 
Psalms71:1 Vo Pakai nangma ah katahsan kangame, a-imatih chanin nei lungdonsah hih helin." 
Psalms71:2 Na chonphat na-in neihuhdoh inlang, neihoidoh sah-in, kaheng lama nana hin sung inlang, neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms71:3 Nangma kachenna dettah, kapansat jom jingna nahin, keima huhhing dingin nangman thupeh napei; ajehchu nangma kasongpile kakulpi chu nahi." 
Psalms71:4 Vo ka Pathen, migilouho, chonpha louho, chule mi-engse ho khutna konin neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms71:5 Ajehchu vo Pakai Pathen, nangma kakinepna nahin; kakhangdon laijapat nangma katahsanpa chu nahi." 
Psalms71:6 Nang jala naobu-a kona eina kituh-a ahin, kanu oisunga kona eiladoh-a jong nangma nahin; kavah choina tanglouva nanga hijing ding ahi." 
Psalms71:7 Mi tamtah-in kidang eisah-u ahin, ahinla nangma kakiselna dettah nahi." 
Psalms71:8 Nilhum keijin kakamhi nangma vahchoina le jabolna-in dimset jing hen. 
Psalms71:9 Kateh nungle neipaidoh hih-in, kathabei phatle neidalha lou jenin." 
Psalms71:10 Ajehchu kamelma ten keidouna thu aseijun, chule kahinna changlhiho akihou somun," 
Psalms71:11 Pathen'in ama adalhatan, manin lang bolgen theijun, ajehchu ahuhdoh ding koima aumtapoi, atiuve." 
Psalms71:12 Vo Pathen, keija konin gamla hih-in, vo ka Pathen, eipanpi din hung loijin." 
Psalms71:13 Kahinna douho chu kisuh dongsah-in lang sumangin, kakisuh khah nading hol ho chu seisetle maimohna-in khukhum uhen." 
Psalms71:14 Ahinla keima vang kakinep jing ding, chule nangma kaha vahchoi cheh cheh ding ahi." 
Psalms71:15 Kakamin nilhum keijin nachon phatna le nami huhhingna phongdoh inge; ajehchu keiman ijat tah mong ahi kahepoi. 
Psalms71:16 Keima Pakai Pathen thahatna songin cheng ting, nangma chonphatna, nangma-a sehbou phapoh inge." 
Psalms71:17 O Pathen, kakhangdon laija patnin nangin neina hilin, tugeijin nathilbol kidangho chu kaphong doh-in ahi," 
Psalms71:18 kahatna hi hiche khang mite hengle, nathaneina hi ahung lhung dingho jouse henga kahetsah masangsen; vo Pakai tu kateh-a kalu akan phat jonghin, nangin neidalha hih-in." 
Psalms71:19 Vo Pathen, nang thil loupitah bolpa chu, nachon phatna jong asanglheh jenge, vo Pathen nang tobang koi umintem!" 
Psalms71:20 Nangma Lungkhamna lentahle nasatah eina musah pan, neisuh hal kit ding ahin, leiset thuhtah-a kona neipuitou kitding ahi." 
Psalms71:21 Nangin kaletna punsah-in natin, lamjousea eilhamon nin nate." 
Psalms71:22 Tumging tothon navahchoi jinge, Vo ka Pathen, na thutah ngeichu vahchoi jinge; vo nang Israelte mithengpen, selangdah in nangma vahchoi jinge." 
Psalms71:23 Nangma henga la kasah tengle, kamuhhi hapan kipah intin, chule nalhatdohsa kahinna hi hapan kipah inte." 
Psalms71:24 Kalei jonghin nachon phatna nilhum keijin seijinte; ajehchu kasetna ding holho chu jachatna ah achutaovin ahi. 
Psalms72:1 Vo Pathen, nathutanna chu lengpa penlang, nachon phatna chu lengpa chapa petan." 
Psalms72:2 Aman namite chu chonphatna-a thu atanna, chule nami vaichaho chunga thudih-a thu atanding ahi." 
Psalms72:3 Molsang hon namite henga chamna hinpou vintin, chule lhang neohon chonphatna ahinpoh dingu ahi." 
Psalms72:4 Aman milah-a vaichaho chu athu-u atanna, milhasam ho chate chu ahuhdoh ding, chule misugenthei te chu ngemsela asuhchip ding ahi." 
Psalms72:5 Amahon nile lha aumlaise-a akhang akhanga nagindiu ahi. 
Psalms72:6 Ama gohongin lei achapnou banga, hampa chunga goju banga hung ding ahi." 
Psalms72:7 Ama nikholaile chonphatna chu pungin tin, chule lha aumlaisea chamna bulhing setna umding ahi." 
Psalms72:8 Aman twikhanglen'a pat twikhanglen gei, chule vadunga pat leiset kolmong geija lengvai apohding ahi." 
Psalms72:9 Gamthipma chengho chu a-anga bohkhup muntin, chule amelma teovin leivui ale diu ahi." 
Psalms72:10 Tarshish lenghole twikol gamhon thilpeh ahinchoidiu, chule Seba lengho le Seba'n thilpeh apehdiu ahi." 
Psalms72:11 Henge, lengjouse a-anga bohkhupdiu, nam jousen ama ajendiu ahi." 
Psalms72:12 Ajehchu aman angaichaho, mivaicha le panpiding neilou mi chu atao tengleh ahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Psalms72:13 Aman mivaichale lhasamho ahoidoh ding, alhasamho hinna chu ahuhhing ding ahi." 
Psalms72:14 Aman amaho hinkho chu lheplhahna le hunam na-a kona alhatdoh ding, chule athisannu chu amitmua manlutah hiding ahi." 
Psalms72:15 Chule ama hingintin, ahenga Sheba sana chu kipe ding; amadinga taona tanglouva uma, niseh-a ama kivahchoi ding ahi." 
Psalms72:16 Leiset molsang ho chungvuma chun chang ga tamtah umintin, Lebanon banga aga chu kiling ding, khopi sunga miho chu leisetna hampa banga pungdiu ahi." 
Psalms72:17 Amin chu tonsotna umding ahin; amin chu nisa umlaisea umjing ding ahi: chule ama-a mitin phattheina changding; Namtinin nunnom ati dingu ahi. 
Psalms72:18 Pakai Pathen, Israelte Pathen chu nunnom hen, ama bou thilkidang bolpa chu ahi." 
Psalms72:19 Chule amin loupi chu tonsotnin nunnom hen; leiset pumpihi aloupina in lodimhen, Amen chule Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Jesse chapa David taonaho akichai tai. 
Psalms73:1 Dihtah-in Pathen hi Israelte dingin aphan, milung thengtah hodingin jong aphan ahi." 
Psalms73:2 Ahinla keimadingin vang, kakengho amui lhagam kon ahitan, kakalsonho kalhonal ding koncha ahitai." 
Psalms73:3 Ajehchu migilouho phattheina kamuteng, mingol ho kathangse jin ahi." 
Psalms73:4 Ajehchu athi tengu jongle thohnatna himhim aneipouvin, ahin athahatnao adetjon ahi." 
Psalms73:5 Midang bangin hahsatna imacha anei pouvin, midang bangin thohgimna jong aneipouvin ahi." 
Psalms73:6 Hijeh chun kiletsahnan thihkhao bangin a-um kimvelu vin, hunam chun ponsil bangin atomuvin ahi." 
Psalms73:7 Athao jeh un amitnu alotdoh-in, lungin angaitophah kalval aneijun ahi." 
Psalms73:8 Amahon nehguh abolun, giloutah-in suhgentheina thu aseijun, hoithotah in apaovui." 
Psalms73:9 Van douna in akamkaovin, aleijun leiset pumpi achonsoh uvin ahi." 
Psalms73:10 Hijeh chun amite hilanga ahung akileuvin, chule twi khon dimset adon kangun ahi." 
Psalms73:11 Chule amahon, Pathen'in iti ahetna, chule chungnung pena chu hetna umam? atiuve." 
Psalms73:12 Veovin, hiche hohi Pathen ngaisah louho ahiuve, amaho vannoi'a alolhingun, ahao cheh cheh uvin ahi," 
Psalms73:13 Tahbeh-in keiman kalunghi mohseh-in kasuthengin, kakhut hohi mona beijin kasile." 
Psalms73:14 Ajehchu nilhum keijin kathohgimin, chule jingsehle eikisehgimjin ahi." 
Psalms73:15 Keiman, chutobang chun seijinge, tijongleng, vetan, nachate khanggui kipalsah kahiding ahi." 
Psalms73:16 Keiman hichu hetdinga kangaito tengle, keidin anabehseh-in;" 
Psalms73:17 Pathen munthenga kagalutna, akichainao kaga hetthem masangsen, kachutin ahi." 
Psalms73:18 Atahbeh-in nangin amaho mun nal ho-a nakoijin, manthah na-a napailhan ahi." 
Psalms73:19 Chomkah louva iti amaho mahthah hel jenga hitaovem! amaho tijat umtah-in akisumang heltaovin ahi. 
Psalms73:20 Mangnei khat ahung khah doh banga; vo Pakai nakhahdoh tengle, chutobang chun alimu chu geldao tannate." 
Psalms73:21 Hitichun kalungthim ahesoh-in, chule kalunggil asunalheh-in ahi." 
Psalms73:22 Keima mingol tah le kho hephalou kahin; namasanga gamsa tobangbou kahi. 
Psalms73:23 Hijeng jongle nang toh kaum khom jingin, kakhut jet lamin neituh jingnai." 
Psalms73:24 Nathumop machun neipuijin natin, chujoule loupi na-ah neisangin nate." 
Psalms73:25 Van'a nang tailou koi dang kaneijem? Chule leisetna jong nang tailou kangaichat dang aumpoi. 
Psalms73:26 Katahsa le kalungthim alosamtan; ahinla Pathen chu kalungthim thahatna le, tonsotna kachan ding chu ahi." 
Psalms73:27 Ajehchu vetan, nanga kona gamla ho mangthah diu ahin; nangma najon san jouse chu nasumang tan ahi." 
Psalms73:28 Keidin vang Pathen naihi apha ahin; nathilbol jouse kaphondoh theinadin, Pakai Pathen'a katahsana kangam tan ahi." 
Psalms74:1 Vo Pathen ibola tonsotna dia neipaidoh hitam? Ibola nahamhinga kivah kelngoite douna-a nalung hanna khudoh-a hitam? 
Psalms74:2 Masanglaija nachoh dohsa namipi kikhomho, nalhatdohsa nagou nam mite le asunga nachenna hiche Zion molsang hi hingel doh-in" 
Psalms74:3 Kumkho-a manthah helna lama chun nakal hinsongin; melmaten engse tah-in munthenga na atongun ahi. 
Psalms74:4 Namelmate chu namite kikhom ho lah-a chun akitumun, aponlap hou chu melchihnadin atungdoh taove." 
Psalms74:5 Thing lentah ho chunga aheichaho lamma mikhat tobang ahiuve. 
Psalms74:6 Ahinla tun athil suiho chu thakhat tah-in, heichale sehtumin asuchim taovin ahi." 
Psalms74:7 Namun theng jong meijin ahaluvin, namin chena ho tollah aseplhaovin, asuboh soh hel taove." 
Psalms74:8 Amahon alungthimun aseijun, eihon amaho abonchan sumangu hite; gamsunga Pathen hou khomna in jouse meijin ahalvam taove." 
Psalms74:9 Keihon kamelchihna hou kamu tapouvin, themgao himhim aumtapon; itihchan hiding ham he-a kalah uva khatcha jong aumtapon ahi." 
Psalms74:10 Vo Pathen, itihchan melman eihouset dingu ham? Namin chu tonsotna melmaten ataitom ding hitam?" 
Psalms74:11 Ipidinga nakhut natuhtanga, nakhut jetlam ngeichu ibola natuh tang ham? na-opma konin lhangdoh inlang amaho khu sumangin." 
Psalms74:12 Ajehchu Pathen chu tonna patna kalengpa ahin, leiset lailunga huhhingna na tongji chu ahi." 
Psalms74:13 Nangin nahatna-in twikhanglen chu nalheh khennin, nangin twilah-a Dragonho lu nasukeh-in ahi." 
Psalms74:14 Nangin Leviathan luchang ahal halin navochip in, amachu gamthipma cheng miho anchah din napen ahi." 
Psalms74:15 Nangin twinah le twisoh nahom khenin, vadunglen ho jongchu nasukangin ahi." 
Psalms74:16 Sunhi nanga ahin, jan jong nanga ahi; Nangin vah le nisa nanasemin ahi." 
Psalms74:17 Nangin leiset gamgiho jouse nakoijin, nipi le phalbi nasemme." 
Psalms74:18 Vo Pakai, melmate i-sah louna le, mingolin namin ataitom naohi geldoh jingin." 
Psalms74:19 Oh, navapal hinna chu migilou mipi henga pedoh hih-in, a-imatih-in namigenthei kikhom hohi sumil hih-in." 
Psalms74:20 Kitepna neija peh-in, ajehchu leiset munthim laihohi engsetna adimin ahi." 
Psalms74:21 O, akibolgimho chu jachatnan kilesah hih-in, vaicha le lhasamhon namin vahchoi hen." 
Psalms74:22 Vo Pathen, thouvin lang nathuhi seitoh-in, mingolin niseh-a iti nahouset nem geldoh jingin." 
Psalms74:23 Namelmate awgin chu sumil hih-in, nangma douna mipite husa chu tanglou helin akhang jingin ahi." 
Psalms75:1 Nangma kathangvah uve, Vo Pathen, nangma kathangvah uve, nathil kidang bolhon namin anaihi aphong doh-e." 
Psalms75:2 Phat kijenpet kalhendoh teng, dihtah-a thu katan ding ahi." 
Psalms75:3 Leisetle asunga cheng jouse ajunmang tan, keiman akhom chu dettah-in katungdoh tai." 
Psalms75:4 Mingol ho henga chun ngolhoi tah-in umhih-un katin, migilou hengah naki domsang hih-in kati." 
Psalms75:5 Naki chu domsang hih-in, ngei pukonin thu seihih-in." 
Psalms75:6 Ajehchu choisangna chu solama kon, lhumlama kon, ahiloule lhanglama kona jong hung hilou ahi." 
Psalms75:7 Ahinla Pathen chu thutan ahin; aman khat asotlhah-a chomkhat adopsangji ahi. 
Psalms75:8 Ajehchu Pakai khutna chun khon khat aumin, chule ju chu asan ahin; hichu akihalchop dimset ahin, hiche mama chu ahinsunglhan; ahinla leisetna migilouho jousen aning geija adon kanghel diu ahi." 
Psalms75:9 Ahinla kenvang a-imatih chanin phongdoh ingting, Jacob Pathen vahchoi La chu sange." 
Psalms75:10 Migilouho jouse ki kasuhlhuh ding, michonpha ho ki vang kichoisang ding ahi." 
Psalms76:1 Judah te lah a-Pathen chu hetnin aumin, Israelte lah-a amin chu aloupin ahi." 
Psalms76:2 Salem'a jong ahou buh aumin, chule Zion'a achenna mun aumin ahi." 
Psalms76:3 Hiche mun'a chun aman thalpi thalchang ho, lumdal le chemjam, chule gal asubong gamin ahi." 
Psalms76:4 Nangma sadelna molsang ho sangin naloupin nachung nungjon ahi. 
Psalms76:5 Milunglenho chu akisuse gamun, a-imut naova a-imulhu paijun; chule mihat ho koimachan akhut hou amujou tapouvin ahi." 
Psalms76:6 Vo Jacob Pathen, naphosalna jeh-in sakol kangtalai le sakol jong a-imu millhon tan ahi." 
Psalms76:7 Nang, nangmatah chu gindingtah nahin, chule nangma lunghan teng namitmu-a koiham ading theidinga?" 
Psalms76:8 Nangin nathutanna thu van'a konin najahsah-in, leiset akichan athip behtan," 
Psalms76:9 Pathen thutanlha dinga ahung kipat doh-a, leisetna gimbola um jouse ahuhdoh ding teng." 
Psalms76:10 Tahbeh-a mihem lunghanna chun nangma navahchoi ding, lunghanna amohchengse-a chu naki gah ding ahi." 
Psalms76:11 Pakai na Pathen nu henga kihahselun, chule peuvin; akimvella umjousen ginding dolpa henga chun kipaman hinchoijun." 
Psalms76:12 Aman pipuiho lhagao asuhmang ding; ama chu leiset lengho dinga kichat umtah ahi. 
Psalms77:1 Ka awn Pathen kakouve, ka aw-in Pathen ngei chu kakouvin, chule aman keilama ana asungin ahi." 
Psalms77:2 Kalung khamnin Pakai chu kaholin, kanatna kajanthoh lel-in, oltih kanei theipoi, kahinna jong lhepbi ding anompoi." 
Psalms77:3 Pathen kanageldoh-in, chuin kalungkhamin; kana kiphin in, chuin kalhagao lungdongin aumin ahi." 
Psalms77:4 Kamit nahasah jingin, thusei theilou khopmin kalungkhame." 
Psalms77:5 Khangluilai thu, masanglai kumho chu kagah gelin ahi." 
Psalms77:6 Jana kalasah chu kageldoh kitnin, kalungsunga keile kei kakihouvin, kalhagaovin gunchu tah-in aholin ahi." 
Psalms77:7 Pakaiyin a-itih-a dinga aledoh dingham? chule akhohsahna chu umkit louhel ding hitam? 
Psalms77:8 Ahepina theng chu a-itih-a dinga kichai hitam? Athutep chu atonsotna dinga thonna hitam? 
Psalms77:9 Pathen'in lungsetna aneiding chu asuhmil hitam? ahepina lainatna chu alunghanin akhachah hitam? 
Psalms77:10 Chule hichehi keima lhahsam ahi kanatin, ahinla chungnung pen khut jetlam kumho chu geljinging kate." 
Psalms77:11 Pakai thilbolho chu kageldoh ding ahi; khanglui laija nathilbol kidangho chu geldoh tahbeh ingkate. 
Psalms77:12 Nanatoh ho jouse jong ngaito ingting, nathilbol ho houlimnan neijinge." 
Psalms77:13 Vo Pathen, nalampi chu munthenga aumin; i-Pathen banguva lentah Pathen koiham?" 
Psalms77:14 Nangma thil kidangho bolji Pathen chu nahin nangman nathahat mitin lah-a naphong doh-e. 
Psalms77:15 Nabanin namite, Jacob le Joseph chate chu nalhatdohtan ahi." 
Psalms77:16 Twiho chun namutaove, vo Pathen, twiho chun namutaove; amaho akichauvin, twi thuhho jong aki tihotsoh taove." 
Psalms77:17 Meilhang hon twi ahinlha lha uvin, vanthamjol hon aw ahinsodoh-un, nathalchangho aleng lahlah jenge." 
Psalms77:18 Navan ginchu van'a akithong lhungin, kolphen vannoi asalvah soh-in, leiset akithingin, akihotnin ahi." 
Psalms77:19 Nalampi twikhanglen'a aumin, nalam lhah twilenho sunga um ahi, chule nakhonung ho het ahipoi." 
Psalms77:20 Nangin namite kelngoi hon bangin, Mosi le Aaron khutna nanapuijin ahi." 
Psalms78:1 Vo kamite kadanthu-a hin nana hinsungun, kakamsung thuho-a hin na-nakhangu hinsung uvin." 
Psalms78:2 Thulem seinan kam kangting, malai thu ki-im ho seidoh-ing kate." 
Psalms78:3 Inajah uva inahetsao, ipateovin eina hil hou chu ahi." 
Psalms78:4 Hicheho chu achateuva henga i-im loudiu, khangthah hung umdingho henga Pakai vahchoinaho le athahatna chule thilkidang ana boldohho chu ihetsah diu ahi." 
Psalms78:5 Ajehchu Jacob hengah photchetna aphutdoh-in, chule Israelte lah-a danthu atungdoh-in, hichu achateu ahetsah diuvin ipu ipateu thu apen ahi." 
Psalms78:6 Chutia chu khang hunglhung dingho, chate hungpeng dingho chun ahet diu; chutia chu amaho chu thoudoh uva achateu ahilson jing dingu ahi." 
Psalms78:7 Akinepnao chu Pathen'a angapmuva, chule Pathen natohho chu sumil louva, amavang athupeh ajui nadiu ahi." 
Psalms78:8 Apateu louchal le golkeh khangmite, alungputnu janglou khangmite, alhagaovu Pathen'a detlouho bang ahilouna diu ahi." 
Psalms78:9 Ephraim chaten galvon akivonun, chule thalpi akikenun, galsat nikhon akiheijun akinungle taove." 
Psalms78:10 Amahon Pathen thutep chu achingtup pouvin, adanthua chonding anompouve." 
Psalms78:11 Chule aman avetsah anatohho le athilkidang bolho asumilgam taovin ahi. 
Psalms78:12 Egypt gam Zoan munah apateu mitmun, Pathen'in datmo umtahtah thil anabolin ahi." 
Psalms78:13 Aman twikhanglen ahom khenin, chuin amaho chu agalkaisah-in, chule twiho chu alhuh-in adinsah-in ahi." 
Psalms78:14 Amaho chu sunle meilhangin apuijin, janle meikongin apuilejin ahi." 
Psalms78:15 Gamthipma songpiho chu akhitkeh sah-in, chule thuhtah-a kon hungdoh bangin amaho donding twi apen ahi." 
Psalms78:16 Aman songpi-a konchun luiho alondohsah-in, vadungho bangin twiho alonlhah sah-e." 
Psalms78:17 Chule gamthipma chun chungnung pen phinsetnan achonset bebe nalaijun ahi. 
Psalms78:18 Chule amahon atahsao ngaichat an thumnan alungthimun Pathen apatepmun ahi. 
Psalms78:19 Henge, amahon Pathen douna thu aseijun, gamthip mahi Pathen'in dokhang adothei dingham? atiuve." 
Psalms78:20 Veuvin, aman songpi avon, twiho ahung kikhodoh-in, vachadung chu along letset tan; changlhah jong apetheidem? amitedin sa ape theidem?" 
Psalms78:21 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hichu ajan, chuin alunghangin; Jacob dounan mei akongdoh-in, Israel dounan jong lunghanna ahung kongdoh-e." 
Psalms78:22 Pathen atahsan lou jeh-u le, ahuhhingna atahsan loujeh-u ahi." 
Psalms78:23 Aman chunga kona meilhang ho thu apeh-a, van kot ho ahonjeng vangin," 
Psalms78:24 Chule aneh diuvin mana achunguva alhahsah-in, van an chu amaho anapen ahi." 
Psalms78:25 Mihemin vantil ho an aneuvin, amaho avaset nadiuvin an anapen ahi." 
Psalms78:26 Aman solam hui chu van'a anunsah-in, chule athaneina-in lhanglam hui ahin puilutne." 
Psalms78:27 Sa chu leivui jat bangin achunguva ajuhsah-in, vacha lhaving nei chu twikhanglen'a neldi jat tobang ahi." 
Psalms78:28 Chule achennao kimvel, agebuhhou lailunga alhahsah-in ahi." 
Psalms78:29 Hitichun aneuvin, avasetnui; ajehchu mahon angaichat uchu ape ahi." 
Psalms78:30 Amaho ngaichatna toh akikhendeh pouvin, akamuva asaneh-u aumpetlai chun," 
Psalms78:31 Pathen lunghanna achunguva achun, amaho lah-a athaopenho chu athatnin, Israel pasal lhendoh ho chu asumangtan ahi." 
Psalms78:32 Ajehchu chuche geijong chun achonse jing nalaijun, chule athil kidang bol ho jong atahsan pouve." 
Psalms78:33 Hijeh chun akumhou mohseh-in, chule anikhohou lungkham na-in asuhbei pehtan ahi." 
Psalms78:34 Aman amaho atha phatnin amahon ahinholun, chule ahung kileuvin Pathen chu ahol loi uvin ahi." 
Psalms78:35 Chule amahon Pathen chu asongpiule, Pathen chungnung chu alhatdohpau ahi ahingeldoh uvin ahi." 
Psalms78:36 Ahivangin akamuvin ama apahcha lhemun, chule aleijun amachu ajoulhep jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms78:37 Ajehchu alungu ama lama aum pon, chujongle akitepna-a chun jong alungdet pouvin ahi." 
Psalms78:38 Hijongle ama lungsetna dimset ahijeh-in, akhan gitlounao angaidamin, chule asumang pouve; henge, vel tamtah alunghana aheimangjin, alunghana jouse asodoh pon ahi." 
Psalms78:39 Ajehchu tahsaphe bou ahiu ageldoh-in, khohui anunmanga hungkile kitlou ahiuchu ageldoh-in ahi." 
Psalms78:40 Gamthipma iti alunghansah jinguva, chule nelgama iti alung phatmosah jingu hitam!" 
Psalms78:41 Henge, akinung heijun Pathen alhemjiuvin, chule Israel mitheng pa chu asulung na-un ahi." 
Psalms78:42 Amahon akhut ageldoh pouvin, melma-a kona alhatdohna nikho jong chu ageldohdeh pouvin ahi." 
Psalms78:43 Egyp gama melchihna ho abola, chule Zoan phaija thil kidang iti abol hitam," 
Psalms78:44 chule aman avadunghou thisan asosah-in, chule atuisoh hou chu adonthei tapouvin ahi." 
Psalms78:45 Aman alah uva thousi jatchom chom asolin, hichun amaho anejouvun, chule uphoh chun amaho asumanguvin ahi." 
Psalms78:46 Aman amuchi hou chu lungtol apen, chule atohgau chu khaokhopi ho apen ahi." 
Psalms78:47 Alengpi guihou gellin asusen, chule atheiba phunghou buhbangin asumangtan ahi." 
Psalms78:48 Aganchahou jong gelchang henga apen, chule akelngoihou keh nasatah henga chun apen ahi." 
Psalms78:49 Aman vantil engseho asolin, alungsatna kichat umtah, alunghana le lungthahna, chule thangtom nale gentheina chu achunguva achutan ahi." 
Psalms78:50 Alunghana lampi asem peh-in, ahinnao chu thina a konin akhendoh pon, ahinkhou chu hise apedoh jotai;" 
Psalms78:51 chule Ham Houbuh ho-a ahatnau chungnung pen, Egypt cha pengmasa jouse chu athatnin ahi." 
Psalms78:52 Ahinla amite chu kelngoi banga chedoh dingin asemin, ganchahon bangin gamthipma chun alamkaijin ahi." 
Psalms78:53 Chule akichat louna diuvin bitkeijin apuijin, ahinla amelmateu chu twikhanglen'in achupgam taovin ahi." 
Psalms78:54 Chule aman muntheng gamgi gei, akhut jetlama anachoh molsang geijin, apuilhung tan ahi." 
Psalms78:55 Amasanguva Pathen hephalouho jong anodohpeh-in, chule agoulodin ahoppeh-in, Israel phungho aponbuh cheh uva achensahtai." 
Psalms78:56 Achuti vangin chungnung pen Pathen chu apatepmun, alunghansah uvin, aphotchetnaho achingtup pouvin ahi." 
Psalms78:57 Ahinla akinung heijun, apateu bangin tahsan umloutah-in akhangun, kitahlouna thalpi bangin akiheimang taovin ahi." 
Psalms78:58 Hitichun amunsang houva alunghan nachu achoh thouvun, amilim semhouvin athangsetsah taove." 
Psalms78:59 Pathen'in hichehi ajah phatnin alunghangin, Israelte chu akidah behsehtai:" 
Psalms78:60 chutichun aman Shiloh Houbuh, mihem ho lah-a akoi ponbuh chu adalha tan;" 
Psalms78:61 chuin aman athahatna chu sohchang din apedoh-in, chule aloupina chu melmate khutna apedoh tai." 
Psalms78:62 Amite chu chemjam'a loudin jong apedoh-in, chule agou lote chunga chun alunghangtai." 
Psalms78:63 Meikongin agollhanghou akavam gamin, chule anungah hou kichena himhima akipe tapouve." 
Psalms78:64 Athempuhou chemjamin alouvun, ameithai houvin jong akapouve." 
Psalms78:65 Chujouvin Pakai chu mi a-ihmut na-a kona hungkhang bangin ahung khangdoh-in, chule lengpitwi jeh-a mihat tah khat hung kisen abangin ahi." 
Psalms78:66 Amelmate ale sat kitnin, kumkho-a i-sah louva umdingin akoitan ahi." 
Psalms78:67 Chulou jong chun Joseph houbuh chu adeitapon, Ephraim phung jong alheng tapoi." 
Psalms78:68 Ahivangin angailut Zion molsang, Juda phung chu alheng jotai." 
Psalms78:69 Aman leiset a-imatih channa dinga atundoh bangin, amuntheng chu leng inpi sangtah ho bangin asadoh tan ahi." 
Psalms78:70 Aman asoh David chu, kelngoi honga konchun alheng dohtan ahi." 
Psalms78:71 Anou tamtah kai kelngoipi ho juija konin, amite Jacob phungle agoulo Israelte vahdin apuitai." 
Psalms78:72 Chutichun alungthim dihtah-in amaho chu avah-in, chule akhut themna-in amaho chu analamkaijin ahi." 
Psalms79:1 Vo Pathen, nangma helouho nagoulona sunga ahung lutnun, na houin theng asuboh uvin, Jerusalem chu alhuh-in asetaove." 
Psalms79:2 Amahon nasohte thilong chu chungleng vachate an dingin apeuvin, namithengte sa chu leija gamsaho apeuve." 
Psalms79:3 Athisanu chu Jerusalem kimvela twi bangin alongin, chule avui dingu koimacha aumpoi." 
Psalms79:4 Kaheng kakomhou housetnin kaumun, kakimvel uvaho nuisatle totnop nabep kahiuve." 
Psalms79:5 Itih channem, Pakai? Atonsotna nalunghang ding hitam? Nathangthipna chu mei banga kongding ham?" 
Psalms79:6 Nangma hephalou namho chung le, chule namin phapohlou lenggam ho chunga nalung hanna chu bunglha tan." 
Psalms79:7 Ajehchu amahon Jacob chu abah gammun, achenna mun kamhelin alha taove." 
Psalms79:8 Oh, masanglai kakhan gitlouna houchu geldoh hih-un, nahepinaho thahat chun neihoidoh loijun, ajehchu keiho hatah-a eikisu nemu ahitai." 
Psalms79:9 Vo eihuh hinguva Pathen, namin loupina dingin neipanpi uvin, namin jal-in kachonsetnahou sungimin lang, neihuhdoh uvin." 
Psalms79:10 Ipidinga Pathen hephalouhon a-Pathenu hoibaham atidiuham? Sohte thisan kiso phulah na-in, kamitmuvin Pathen hephalouho lah-a hin amachu hetnin umhen." 
Psalms79:11 Akihenho khoisatna chu na-angsung hung lhung hen, nathil bolthei natsat bangtah-in, thidinga gotsaho chu huhdoh-in;" 
Psalms79:12 Chule vo Pakai amahon nahouset nao chu, ajat sagin kaheng kakomte angsunga lethuh-in." 
Psalms79:13 Chuti chun namite keihole nahamhing lah-a kelngoiten, a-imatih chanin nangma thangvahna peuving ting, akhang akhangin napachat na musahjing taovinge." 
Psalms80:1 Vo Israel kelngoi chinna chingpa, Joseph ganhon banga ana lamkaipa nangman, nana sungin, Cherubim ho kah-a chengpa nangma vah bangin vah doh-in." 
Psalms80:2 Ephraim le Benjamin miho, chule Manasseh masanga nahatna chu hintildoh-in, chule hungin lang neihuh doh-un." 
Psalms80:3 Vo Pathen, neisemthah kitnunlang, namai vahsah-in, chutile huhhing-a kaum dingu ahi." 
Psalms80:4 Vo janelho Pakai Pathen, itihchan namite taona douva nalunghang dingham?" 
Psalms80:5 Nangin amaho chu mitlhi-a kisem changlhah-in navah-in, adon dingun tena lentah-in mitlhi napejin ahi." 
Psalms80:6 Nangin kaheng kakomhou dingin kiphinna-in neisemun, chule kamelma teo lah-a nuisat kahitaove." 
Psalms80:7 Vo janelho Pathen, neisemthah kitnunlang, namai vahsah-in, chutile huhhing-a kaum dingu ahi." 
Psalms80:8 Nangin Egypt'a konin lengpigui khat nahinpon; Pathen hephalouho nanodoh-in, hichu naphut tan ahi." 
Psalms80:9 Nangin ama dingin mun nasem peh-in, ajung thuhtah-in nakikhosah-in, gam leiset alosohtai." 
Psalms80:10 Lhangho chu alimin akhusoh-in, chule hiche abahho chu cedar thing phatah abange." 
Psalms80:11 Abahkai hochu twipi geijin asolin, chule hiche abahho chu vadung lama asole." 
Psalms80:12 Ibola apal ho chu naphet lhah-a, chuche lampi jot chanin akilou hitam?" 
Psalms80:13 Gamlah-a kon hungpotdoh ngalchangin asuse-in, chuleh gamlah-a gamsan anejou tan ahi." 
Psalms80:14 Vo janelho Pathen, katao ahi, hungkile kitnin, van'a konin hinvenlang, hiche lengpi guihi hinvilin;" 
Psalms80:15 Nangman nakhut jetna naphu lengpi leihi, chule nangma dinga dettah-a nasem abahchu ahi." 
Psalms80:16 Hichehi meijin akihallhan akiphuh lhutan; namaiso-a phosal na-a amangthah taovin ahi. 
Psalms80:17 Nakhut chu najetlama mi, nangma dinga nahatsah mihem chapa chunga chun umhen." 
Psalms80:18 Chutichun nanga konin kinunghei tapouving ting; neisuhalun, chuteng keihon namin kakoudingu ahi." 
Psalms80:19 Vo janelho Pakai Pathen neisemthah kitnunlang, namai vahsah in, chutile huhhing-a kaum dingu ahi." 
Psalms81:1 Itha hatnao Pathen hengah gingtah-in la saovin, Jacob Pathen henga kipa aw thonsah-un," 
Psalms81:2 vahchoi La saovinlang, khongcha tum gingun, selangdah ngeitoh, tumging toh tho uvin." 
Psalms81:3 Lhathah, kitepna phat, i-kutpi nikho houva sumkon mut uvin." 
Psalms81:4 Ajehchu Israelte dinga hichehi chondan kisem chu ahin, Jacob Pathen dinga dan chu ahi." 
Psalms81:5 Hichehi Joseph chunga photchetsah na-a, Egypt gam sunga achedoh laija anasuhdet chu ahin, chu-a chun kahetlou paokhat kanajan ahi." 
Psalms81:6 Alengkou chu pohgih-a konin kalahdohpeh in, akhut chu belho-a konin akihuhdoh tai." 
Psalms81:7 Lungkham nin neikouvin chule kahuh doh-e, keiman munthipma kithong lenglung ginin kahin donbutne, Maribah twija chun nangma kana patepme." 
Psalms81:8 Ngaijuvin, vo kamite kapatep dingu nahiuve, vo Israel, kathu nangai uva ahile," 
Psalms81:9 Nalah uva gamdangmi Pathen himhim umlou ding ahin, gamchom pathen himhim nahoulou dingu ahi." 
Psalms81:10 Keimahi Egypt gama kona napuidoh uva, tonsot Pakai na Pathen'u chu kahi; Nakam kalen uvin chule keiman kadipdim ding ahi." 
Psalms81:11 Ahinla kamiten ka aw angaipouvin, chule Israelte khatchan eideipouve." 
Psalms81:12 Chutichun alung ngaichat nao lama kapedoh-in, chule amahotah kithumop dungjuijin achontauve." 
Psalms81:13 Ohe, kamiten kathu ngaijuhen, chule Israel hi kalampi ho-a che hitavele!" 
Psalms81:14 Agalteu kasot kun loija, chule akidoupiteu chunga kakhut kanalap ding ahitai." 
Psalms81:15 Pakai hotbolte chu ahenga kipelut chehdiu; ahivanga aphatnu chu a-imatih channa umjing ding ahi. 
Psalms81:16 Aman suhlou chang tuipena amaho avahding; chule keiman songpi-a kon khoijua chu nangma ka lunglhaisah ding nahi. 
Psalms82:1 Pathen chu thaneitah houkhom ho lah-a chun adingin, pathen ho lah-a thu atantai." 
Psalms82:2 Itihchan dihlou tah-a thu natan uva, chule migilouho chunga langneina nanei dingu ham?" 
Psalms82:3 Vaichate le pabeite chu hongbitnun, bolgenthei thohho le lhasamte henga adih chu bolun." 
Psalms82:4 Vaichate le ngaichate chu huhdoh-un, migiloupa khutna konin amaho chu lhadoh-un." 
Psalms82:5 Amahon ahepouvin chujongle hetkhen themna jong aneipouve; muthima vahle jing ahiuvin, leiset bulho jouse akilongtai." 
Psalms82:6 Nangho pathenho nahiuvin, chule nabon uva chungnung pen chate nahiuve, kanatin ahi." 
Psalms82:7 Ahinla mihem banga nathiuva, chule pipuiho khat banga nalhuh dingu ahi." 
Psalms82:8 Vo Pathen thouvin lang leiset thuhi tanin, ajehchu namjouse hi nalo ding ahi." 
Psalms83:1 Vo Pathen, paolouvin umdan lang, thip beh-in umhih beh hih-in, chule vo Pathen umthim hihbeh-in." 
Psalms83:2 Ajehchu vetan, namelma ten thunoh aboluvin, chule nangma hotbolte akiletsah-un ahi." 
Psalms83:3 Namite dounan amahon lungthim phalou agelun, chule naselguhte dounan akihousom taove." 
Psalms83:4 Hungun namkhat ahinaova konin sumangu hitin, Israel minhi geldohkit louhel nadingin bolu hite, atiuve." 
Psalms83:5 Ajehchu amaho lungkhat kisan akihoutoh-un, nangma dounan kiloikhomna akisem taove." 
Psalms83:6 Edom le Ishmael mite houbuhho, Moab le Hagar mite," 
Psalms83:7 Gebal la Ammon chule Amalek, Philistine te le Tyre'a chengho toh," 
Psalms83:8 Assur jong amahotoh apangkhom taovin, amahon Lot chate akithopiuvin ahi." 
Psalms83:9 Midian ho nabolna bang, Sisera nabolna bangin amaho chu bolin." 
Psalms83:10 Amaho Endor'a amangthah taovin; leisetna din eh tobang ahitaove. 
Psalms83:11 Amilen hou chu Oreb le Zeeb bangin bolin; henge, apiputeu jong Zebah le Zalmunna bangin bolin," 
Psalms83:12 Pathen inho chu eiho chan dingin kilah uhite, atiuve." 
Psalms83:13 Vo ka Pathen amaho chu chimpei bangle, khohui masanga changpol bangin semin." 
Psalms83:14 Meijin gammang akah bangle, molsangho mei kihal deujeju bangin;" 
Psalms83:15 Hitichun nahuipi chun sugen theijin lang, nahuipi le gopi achun kichatsah-in." 
Psalms83:16 Vo Pakai namin aholna diuvin, amaiju jachatnan dipmin." 
Psalms83:17 A-itih-in jahchale lungdongin umsah-in, henge, jahchao henlang mangthah jengu uhen." 
Psalms83:18 Chutia chu mihem ten, nangma bouseh Jehovah minpu, leiset pumpi-a chunga chungnung pen nahi ti ahethei diu ahi." 
Psalms84:1 Vo janel Pakai, na houbuh hochu iti ngaichat umtam!" 
Psalms84:2 Kahinna hin alhangai jin, henge, Pakai inpi indan ngaijin kalhasam heltan, kalungthim le katahsa hi hingjing Pathen henga akapme." 
Psalms84:3 Henge, vasoh injong in akimun, chule pelpan jong anou akoina dingin amading bu aneije; Vo janel ho Pakai, kalengpale ka Pathen hichu namaicham ho ngei chu ahi." 
Psalms84:4 Nangma in'a chengho chu anunnom ahiuve, amahon navahchoi jing taovinte." 
Psalms84:5 Nanga hatna neipa chu anunnomin, alungthimu gamtheng jotna dinga pedoh hochu anunnome." 
Psalms84:6 Amahon Baca phaicham ajot lhungun, twikul asemun, gotwi jong chun twikhuh hochu adip dime." 
Psalms84:7 Amaho hat cheh, hatcheh-in acheuvin, Zion'a Pathen anga chun amichang cheh-in akilah-un ahi." 
Psalms84:8 Vo Pakai Janel Pathen, kataona ngaijin lang, Jacob Pathen, nana hinsungin." 
Psalms84:9 Vo kalumdal'u Pathen, vetemin, nathaonu mai hi hinven." 
Psalms84:10 Ajehchu nahong sunga chun nikhat chu kum sangkhat sangin aphajon; gitlouna pon buho-a chensangin, ka Pathen in kotngah-a pan kanomjoi." 
Psalms84:11 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen chu nisale lumdal ahin, Pakai chun lungsetna le loupina apeh ding, thildih'a chonteho-a dingin thilpha himhim it ponte." 
Psalms84:12 Vo janelho Pakai, nangma tahsana michu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms85:1 Pakai nagam chunga lungsetna naneijin; sohchanga Jacob chu nahin lepui kittan ahi. 
Psalms85:2 Nangin namite khan gitlouna nangaidamin, achonsetnao jouse namelkhutan ahi." 
Psalms85:3 Nalunghanna jouse naladoh-in, nalungsat gimneitah chu nakihei mang khumtai." 
Psalms85:4 Vo eihuh hingpao Pathen, neilehei jinlang, kachunguva nalunghan bangtan." 
Psalms85:5 A-imatih channa kachunguva nalung hanjing ding ham? Nalunghan chu khangjousea naso dohsah jing ding hitam? 
Psalms85:6 Nangman namite kakipana diuva, neisuhhal kit loudiu ham?" 
Psalms85:7 Vo Pakai nahepina chu neimusah unlang, nahuhhingna chu neipeuvin." 
Psalms85:8 Pakai Pathen'in ahin thusei ding chu ngaijing kate, ajehchu amite le amithengte henga chamna thu aseiding ahin; ahinla amaho ngolna lama kiheikit daohen." 
Psalms85:9 Adihtah-in igam uva loupina aumtheina dingin, ami huhhing na chu ama gingte henga ahungnaijin ahi." 
Psalms85:10 Hepina le thutah akimuto lhonin, chonphatna le chamna akichopto lhone." 
Psalms85:11 Leisetna konin thutah kehdoh intin, chule chonphat na-in van'a kona ahinvet suh ding ahi." 
Psalms85:12 Henge, Pakai chun thilpha chu hinpentin, chule igamuhin aga ahin punsah ding ahi." 
Psalms85:13 Chonphatna chu amasanga chentin, chule akholhahna lampia eichesah diu ahi." 
Psalms86:1 Vo Pakai nana hin sung inlang neingaipeh-in, ajehchu keima vaicha le lhasam kahi." 
Psalms86:2 Kahinna hi neikheh peh-in, ajeh chu keima atheng kahi; vo ka Pathen, nangma tahsana nasohhi huhhingin." 
Psalms86:3 Vo Pakai neihepin, ajehchu niseh-in nangma kakoujinge." 
Psalms86:4 Nasoh hinkhohi kipasah-in; ajehchu vo Pakai, nangma-a kahinna kapedoh-e." 
Psalms86:5 Ajehchu Pakai nangma naphan, ngaidam dinga kigojing nahin, nangma nakoute jouse chunga hepina dimset nahi." 
Psalms86:6 Vo Pakai kataona-a hin nana hinsungin, chule kathumna awcheng hi ngaiphan." 
Psalms86:7 Kalungjina nikho leh nangma kakou ding nahi; ajehchu nangman neidonbut ding ahi. 
Psalms86:8 Vo Pakai pathen ho lah-a nangtobang khatcha aumpon; chujongle nathilbol tobang bola jong khatcha aumpoi. 
Psalms86:9 Vo Pakai nasemsa nam jouse chu hungintin, na-anga chibai aboh uva, namin achoi-at diu ahi." 
Psalms86:10 Ajehchu nangma naloupin, thil kidangtah naboljin; Nangseh bou Pathen nahi." 
Psalms86:11 Vo Pakai, nalampi neihilin, na thutah-a chon inge, namin kagin theina ding lungthim pumkhat neipen." 
Psalms86:12 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, kalung pumpin nangma vahchoi jing ting; chule a-imatih chana namin kachoi-at jing ding ahi." 
Psalms86:13 Ajehchu nahepina keidingin alenin; chule kahinna hi thikholkhul noinung penna konin nahuhdoh tai. 
Psalms86:14 Vo Pathen, keima dounan mi kiletsahho akipanun, pumhat manga mipi kikhom mihon kahina aholun, chule amasanguva nangma nakoipouve." 
Psalms86:15 Ahinla vo Pakai, nangma lainatpina le lungsetna, thoh hat, thutah, chule hepina dimset Pathen chu nahi." 
Psalms86:16 O, kahenga hungkiheijin lang neihin hepin, nasohhi nahatna penlang, nasohnu chapahi huhhingin." 
Psalms86:17 Aphatna dingin melchihna neimusah-in, chutile eihot bolten hichu muvintin, chule jahcha taovinte; ajehchu Pakai nangman neina kithopin chule neina lhamonin ahi." 
Psalms87:1 Akibulphuna chu moltheng ho-a aumin ahi. 
Psalms87:2 Pakai chun Jacob chennaho jouse sangin, Zion kotpiho chu angailujoi." 
Psalms87:3 Vo Pathen khopi, nachung chang thu loupitah-in akiseitai." 
Psalms87:4 Keima eiheho henga Rehab le Babylon phapoh inge, Philistine le Tyre toh Ethiopia khu veuvin, hichepahi chua chu penga ahi." 
Psalms87:5 Chule Zion chungchang thu hitia kiseiding ahi; hiche mipa le khuche mipa chu amanu-a peng ahin, chule chungnung penin amanu chu atun dohding ahi." 
Psalms87:6 Pakai chun mipi ho min chu asutdoh tengle, hiche mipahi chua chu peng ahi, tia asut ding ahi." 
Psalms87:7 Lasathemho le tumging themho chua umdiu, katwisam jouse chu nanga um ahi, ati dingu ahi." 
Psalms88:1 Vo eihuh hinga Pakai Pathen, sunle jannin na-anga kanataovin ahi." 
Psalms88:2 Kataona na-angsunga hunglhung hen; kapenna-a hin nana hinsungin. 
Psalms88:3 Ajehchu kahinnahi lungkham nan adimin; chule kahinkho hin lhan khuh lam anaitan ahi. 
Psalms88:4 Kokhuh sunga kumlha ho toh eikisimtha tan, thabei hel mitoh kabangtai." 
Psalms88:5 Nangin nageldoh kit tahlou, Mithilah-a ongthol, akithatsa lhana lum tobang kahin chule amaho nakhutna kona kisatlha ahitaove." 
Psalms88:6 Kotong noinungpen, muthim lah, mun thutah-a chun neikoijin ahi." 
Psalms88:7 Nalung hanna kachunga agihsan, chule natwi kinonghon eibol gentheitan ahi." 
Psalms88:8 Kamel het ho chu keija konin gamla tah-a nakoimangin, amaho henga thet umtah in neisemin, khakhumin kaumin, kapotdoh theipoi." 
Psalms88:9 Thohgimna jeh-in kamit athimtai, Pakai, nitinin nangma kakouvin, naheng lama kakhut kajah jingin ahi." 
Psalms88:10 Mithi henga thil kidangho namusah-a, mithiho hung thouva navahchoi diu ham?" 
Psalms88:11 Vuikhuh-a chu nalungset ngailutna kiphonga, ahiloule tahsan naumna hi manthah na mun'a kiphong ding ham?" 
Psalms88:12 Muthima chu na thilkidang ho kihe theija, chule na nachon phatna chu suhmilna-a dim gama kihe ding ham?" 
Psalms88:13 Ahinla vo Pakai, nahenga kap pumin kangeh-e, chule jingkah teng kataona chu naheng ahung lhunge." 
Psalms88:14 Pakai idia kahinna hi naledoh-a, idia keija kona namai nasel hitam?" 
Psalms88:15 Kakhangdon apat kathohgimin athikoncha kahitai, kichat naum naho kathoh laijin, kapangjou him himpoi." 
Psalms88:16 Nalunghan gin umtah kachunga achun, kichat naum naho chun eisumang heltai." 
Psalms88:17 Hicheho chu twibangin niseh-in kavela ahungun, amahon eiumchah soh taove." 
Psalms88:18 Ngailut gol le paihola keija konin agamlatan, chule kamel hetho chu muthim lah-a aumtaovin ahi." 
Psalms89:1 Pakai hepinaho chu a-imatih chanin lan sangting; kakamin tahsan aumje khangjouse-a hetsah inge. 
Psalms89:2 Ajehchu hepinahi a-imatih chana dinga kisadoh ding, nakitahna chu vanmun jouse-a naphudet ding ahi, kanatin ahi." 
Psalms89:3 Keiman kamilhen chutoh kitepna kasemin, kasoh David henga kaki hahsel in," 
Psalms89:4 Nachilhah a-imatih chana dingin phutdoh ingting, chule nalaltouna chu khangjousea dinga katundoh ding ahi." 
Psalms89:5 Chule vo Pakai vanhon nathil kidang bolho avahchoi ding; nakitahna jong mitheng kikhomho lah-a umtante. 
Psalms89:6 Ajehchu Pakai toh tepithei van'a koi uma? Mihat chapate lah-a Pakai kibahpi thei koi umjou ding ham? 
Psalms89:7 Mithengte kikhopna sunga Pakai chu sangtah-a ginding, chule akimvelaho jouse lah-a jana sangpen peh ding ahi." 
Psalms89:8 Vo janelho Pakai Pathen, nang tobang Pakai hat koiham? ahiloule nakimvelaho lah-a nakitahna phading koi umam?" 
Psalms89:9 Twikhanglen chunga vai nahomin, hichu ahung kinon teng nasuthip jin ahi." 
Psalms89:10 Mi khat kithat bangin, nangman Rahab chu ahal halin nasuchipmin, namelmate chu naban thahatnin nathe cheh-in ahi." 
Psalms89:11 Vanho nanga ahin, leiset jong nanga ahi; vannoi le asunga um jouse hi nangma phudoh ahi." 
Psalms89:12 Nangin sahlam le lhanglam nasemin, Tabor le Hermon namina kipah ding ahi." 
Psalms89:13 Nangin ban thahat tah naneijin, nakhut chu thahatna ahin, chule nakhut jetlam chu choi-atna achangin ahi." 
Psalms89:14 Chonphatna le thudih chu nalaltouna kibulphuna ahin; hepinale thutah chu namasangah aumin ahi. 
Psalms89:15 Kipana hethema mite chu anunnom ahiuve! O Pakai, amaho namaivah-a vahle diu ahi." 
Psalms89:16 Amaho namina nilhum keija kipah diu; chule nachon phatna-a amaho choisanga umdiu ahi. 
Psalms89:17 Ajehchu nangma athahatnao loupina nahin; chule naphatna jeh-a ka ki'u choisanga umding ahi. 
Psalms89:18 Ajehchu Pakai chu ihoidoh nao ahin, chule Israel mithengpa chu ilengpao ahi." 
Psalms89:19 Chuin gaovin namitheng khat henga thu naseijin: mihat tah khat chunga panpina kangamin, milah-a kona kilhengdoh khat kachoi-an tai, nati." 
Psalms89:20 Keiman kasoh David kamutan, kathaotheng chu ama kanutai." 
Psalms89:21 Ama-a chun kakhut hi thahatnin umintin, kabanin jong ama ahatsah ding ahi." 
Psalms89:22 Melman achunga hunam bolpontin, chujongle gitlouna chapan jong ama sugim ponte." 
Psalms89:23 Chule amaikohtah-a amelmate kavoh lhuh-a, chule ama hote chu kasuhgim ding ahi." 
Psalms89:24 Amavang kakitahna le kahepinan ama aumpi ding; chule kamina aki chu choisanga umding ahi. 
Psalms89:25 Akhut twikhanglen chunga kangapsah ding, chule akhut jetlam chu vadunglen hochunga kangapsah ding ahi." 
Psalms89:26 Aman kahenga, nangma kapa, ka Pathen, chule eihuhhing songpi nahi tia kikou ding ahi." 
Psalms89:27 Kenjong ama kachapa masapenle, leiset lengho sanga chungnung jo-a kasem ding ahi." 
Psalms89:28 Kahepinan atonsotnin kivoppintin, kakitepna-in ama dettah-a adinpi jingding ahi." 
Psalms89:29 Achilhah jong atonsotna umdinga kasemding; alaltouna vangam nikhoho banga kasem ding ahi. 
Psalms89:30 Achate chun kadanthu apallhah uva, chule kathutan lhah banga achon lou uleh," 
Psalms89:31 Amahon kadan kisemho asuhkeh uva, chule kathupeh ho anitlou-uleh," 
Psalms89:32 Chutengle asuhkhelnau jeh-a mola kajep ding, chule akhan gitlounao jeh-a jepna-a kajep ding ahi." 
Psalms89:33 Hijeng jongle ama-a konin kalungset ngailutna hi ladoh soh hel pongting, tahsan kaumna hi thonsah ponge." 
Psalms89:34 Kakitepna chu sukehpongting, chujongle kakamsunga sohsa jong khelkit ponge." 
Psalms89:35 Kathenna-a khatvei kaki hahselsa ahin, David henga jouponge." 
Psalms89:36 Achilhah a-imatih chana umjing ding, chule alaltouna ka-anga nisa banga umding ahi." 
Psalms89:37 Hichu a-itih-a lha banga kiphutdoh ding, chule van'a hettohsah tahsan umtah banga kiphutdoh ding ahi." 
Psalms89:38 Ahinla nangman napaidoh-in nakidah tan, nathaonu chunga chun nalunghangtan ahi." 
Psalms89:39 Nangman nasohpa kitepna chu imalouvin nabolin, alal lukhuh tolla naseplhan, nasuhminset pehtan ahi." 
Psalms89:40 Nangin apaljouse navoh lhuhpeh-in, akulpidet chu manghel-in nalhatai." 
Psalms89:41 Chuche lam hopa jousen amachu achom mun, a-inhengho-a dingin i-sah louvin aumtan ahi." 
Psalms89:42 Nangman akidoupiho banjetlam chu nahatsah-in, amelmate jouse chu nakipa sahtan ahi." 
Psalms89:43 Nangman achemjam ha jong nalehei peh-in, chule galmuna chun nadindet sah tapoi." 
Psalms89:44 Nangin aloupina nasutangin, chule alaltouna tolla naseplhatai." 
Psalms89:45 Nangin akhangdonlai nikhoho nasuchomin, jachatna-in nakhutai." 
Psalms89:46 Pakai itih chanem? tonsotna nakisel mang ding hitam? nalung hanna chu meibanga kongding ham? 
Psalms89:47 Kaphat hi ichana choma ham geltemin, ipidinga mijousehi panabeija nasemham?" 
Psalms89:48 Thina mulouva hingjing dinga mi koi umam? aman lhankhuh-a konin ahinna kihuhdoh thei jintem? 
Psalms89:49 Pakai malaija nalungset ngailutna, David henga nakitah na-a naki hahselna chu hoiba hitam?" 
Psalms89:50 Pakai nasohte kihouset nahi hingeldoh temin, mijouse housetna chu ka-anga kapoh hi geltemin;" 
Psalms89:51 Vo Pakai namelma ten anoisenao, nathaonupa kholhahna chana ataitom naohi geltemin." 
Psalms89:52 Pakai chu atonsot atonsotnin nunnom tahen. Amen, chule Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Pakai nangma khangjousea kachennao mun nahi. 
Psalms90:2 Molsangho jouse kitundoh masang, leiset le vannoi jeng jong nasuhto masanga, tonsotna kipat tonsotgeija nangma Pathen nahi." 
Psalms90:3 Nangin mihem chu manthah na-a nakilesah-in, nangho mihem chate kileuvin natin ahi." 
Psalms90:4 Ajehchu nangma mitmun kum sangkhat jonghi akichai tengleh janhi bangbep ahijin, chule janna khongah ho phat dankhat bepbou ahijie." 
Psalms90:5 Nangin twisoh bangin amaho nalhoh mangjin, a-ihmu bangbep ahiuvin; jingkah-a hampa khangdoh bangbep ahiuve." 
Psalms90:6 Jingkahteng adon doh-in akhangtoujin, nilhah lamle akisatlhan agopjitai." 
Psalms90:7 Ajehchu nalungsat na-a suhmang kahiuvin, chule nalunghanna-a kalung khamun ahi." 
Psalms90:8 Kakhan gitlounao namasanga nakoijin, guhthima kachonsetnao namai vah-a natah langin ahi." 
Psalms90:9 Ajehchu kanikho hou jouse nalunghannan achemang gamtan; kakumhou jong thusim kiseibangin kamangtaovin ahi. 
Psalms90:10 Kahin kumho nikho hou chu kum somsagi, chule atha hat ho chu kum somget jong ahitheije; hijongle ahatnau chu tohgimna le lungkhamna bou ahin, akisatlha loijin kalengmangji taove." 
Psalms90:11 Nalungsat thaneina he-a koiham? nangma gin naum bangtah ngeijin nalunghan jong chuti chu ahi. 
Psalms90:12 Hitichun kalungthimu hi chihna-a kaman theina diuvin, kanikho hou simje neihilun." 
Psalms90:13 Hung kiheijin, vo Pakai itih chan em? chule nasohte chungchanga nalung hin heitan." 
Psalms90:14 Kahin laiseuva kakipauva kathanopna diuvin, O nahepinan neilunglhai sah loijun." 
Psalms90:15 Neisuh gentheinao nikhoho sungle, thilse kamu-u kumho sung dungjuijin neikipa sah-un." 
Psalms90:16 Nanatoh chu nasohte henga, chule naloupina chu achateu henga kilanghen." 
Psalms90:17 Chule Pakai ka Pathen'u hoina chu kachunguva umhen, chule kakhutsoh-u natoh chu kachunguva tung doh-in, henge, kakhutsoh-u natoh chu tung doh-in." 
Psalms91:1 Chungnung pen munthip mun'a chenga chu, hatchung nungpen dailim noija umding ahi." 
Psalms91:2 Keiman Pakai chu, kakiselna le kakulpi ahin, ka Pathen chule ama katahsan ding pa ahi, ting kate." 
Psalms91:3 Tahbeh-in aman thangkampa thanga kon, chule hise phalou tah-a konin nahuhdoh-inte." 
Psalms91:4 Aman amulho in nahui jintin, chule alhavingho noi natahsan ding, akitahna chu nalumdal le napho hiding ahi." 
Psalms91:5 Janteng tijatna kicha tapon natin, chule suna thalchang hung lengji jong," 
Psalms91:6 Ahilou jongle muthima hise lang, chule sunlaija manthah na hungleng jong kicha tapon nate." 
Psalms91:7 Nasihlama sangkhat lhu-a, chule najetlama sangsom lhuding, ahinla hichun nahin nai ponte." 
Psalms91:8 Migilou kilethuhna chu namit sehseh-a navetna namu ding ahi. 
Psalms91:9 Ajehchu nangman kakiselna Pakai, chungnung pen chu, nangma chennan naseme." 
Psalms91:10 Thilphalou himhimin nalhun khum pontin, hise himhimin jong nachenna hinnai ponte." 
Psalms91:11 Ajehchu nalampi jouse-a nachingtup dinga, aman avantilte nangma chunga mopo dinga thu apeh ding ahi." 
Psalms91:12 Songa nakeng nakisuh louna dinga, amahon akhutnuva nadop dingu ahi." 
Psalms91:13 Keipi bahkai le gulsum chung nachot ding, keipi gollai le dragon chu nakengto noija nachilding ahi." 
Psalms91:14 Ajehchu angailutna kachunga akoijeh-in amachu huhdoh ingting; kamin ahetjeh-a mun sanga kakoiding ahi. 
Psalms91:15 Aman eikou ding, keiman kadonbut ding; lungkham na-a kaumpia, kahuh doh-a, jabolna kachansah ding ahi." 
Psalms91:16 Hinkho saona-in lunglhaisah ingting, kahuh hingna chu kamusah ding ahi." 
Psalms92:1 Vo chungnung pen, namin vahchoi La sah-a, Pakai henga thangvahna peh hi thilpha ahi." 
Psalms92:2 Jingkah-a nalungset ngailutna, chule janseh-a nakitahna musah dingin," 
Psalms92:3 Manchah jang som nei toh, tumging leh, selangdah gin ngeija nangma vahchoihi thilpha ahi." 
Psalms92:4 Ajehchu Pakai nangin nathilbolla neikipasah ahin; nakhutsoh thilbolho-a jona la sange. 
Psalms92:5 O Pakai nanatoh ho iti loupia hitam! chule nalunggel ho athuh-in ahi. 
Psalms92:6 Milungsel hon hichu ahethei pouvin, mingolin jong hichu ahethem theipoi." 
Psalms92:7 Migilouho hampa banga ahung kedoh-a, khan gitlou bolho jouse aphat thei tengule, tonsot geija suhmanga umding ahitaove." 
Psalms92:8 Ahinla Pakai, nangma vang tonsotna chungnung pen nahi." 
Psalms92:9 Ajehchu, vo Pakai, namel mate khu vetan, ajehchu ven, namelmate khu mangthah untin, khan gitlou bolho jouse kithecheh diu ahi." 
Psalms92:10 Ahinla ka-ki hi sakol kinei banga nachoisang ding; keima thaotwi thah eikinuding ahi. 
Psalms92:11 Kamit hin kamel mate chunga angaichat chu muntin, chule kanakhang hin keima douna-a kipan khangitlou bolho ngaichat chu ajahding ahi." 
Psalms92:12 Michonpha chu tum phung banga khangtou ding; Lebanon lhanga Cedar thing banga khangtou ding ahiuve. 
Psalms92:13 Pakai in'a kiphut hochu i-Pathen'u hong sunga khangtou diu ahi. 
Psalms92:14 Amaho atehgeijuva jong ga jinguva, amaho chu thao uva khang toudiu;" 
Psalms92:15 Pakai chu chondih ahi avetsah diu, ama chu kasongpi ahin, chule ama-a chun chonphat louna himhim umpoi." 
Psalms93:1 Pakai chun lengvai apon, ama loupina-in akivonin, Pakai chu thahat na-in akivonin, hiche-a chun aman atai akigah-e; leiset jonghi akilin louhelna dingin akitung detnin ahi." 
Psalms93:2 Nalal touna chu malaija kiphut doh-a ahitan; nangma tonsotna umsa nahitai. 
Psalms93:3 Vo Pakai twisoh akinong sangin, twisoh akinong gingin, twisoh akinong lenin ahi." 
Psalms93:4 Twi tamtah gin sangin Pakai chungnung chu ahatjon; henge, twikhanglen kinong hattah sangin ahatjon ahi." 
Psalms93:5 Nathu hetoh sahna chu adihlheh-in; Vo Pakai a-imatih chanin thenna chu nangma in ahunghitai. 
Psalms94:1 Phulahna neija, vo Pakai Pathen, phulahna neija vo Pathen, hung kiphong doh-in." 
Psalms94:2 Leiset chung thutanpa, nangmatah kichoisangin lang, mikilet sahho lethuhna pen." 
Psalms94:3 Pakai itihchan migilou hon, itihchan migilou hon ajodingu ham?" 
Psalms94:4 Itihchan thil hahsaho aseidingu ham? chule khangitlou bolte chu amaho le amaho kiletsah dingu ham? 
Psalms94:5 Vo Pakai namite ahal hallin aheh goijun, nagouloho asugentheijuvin ahi." 
Psalms94:6 Amahon meithaile kholjin asat lih-un, chule pa neilouho athatnun ahi." 
Psalms94:7 Ahijeng vangin amahon Pakai chun mupontin, Jacob Pathen'in jong ngaisah hih inte atiuve." 
Psalms94:8 Mipi lah-a milungselho, nanghon hekhenuvin, chule mingol ho, nangho itihle nachih dingu ham?" 
Psalms94:9 Kol sempa kho jalouva uma? Mit sempa kho mulouva umding ham? 
Psalms94:10 Pathen hephalouho gimbolpan, asuhdih louding ham? Mihem chihna hilpa chun, iti ahet da ding ham?" 
Psalms94:11 Pakai chun mihem lunggel ho chu pannabei ahi ti ahenai. 
Psalms94:12 Vo Pakai nasehgimpa, nadanthu-a kona nahilpa chu anun nome;" 
Psalms94:13 migilou dinga kokhuh kilai kahse-a, akidoupi ho nikho-a kona nacholnga sah ding ahi." 
Psalms94:14 Ajehchu Pakaiyin amite paimang hel pontin, chule agoulo mite chu adalhah lou ding ahi." 
Psalms94:15 Ahinla thutanlhahna chu chonphatna-a hung kilentin, chule lungdihpu jousen hichu ajuidiu ahi." 
Psalms94:16 Thilse bolho eidoupeh dinga koi kipatdoh-a, ahiloule khanset bolho eidoupeh dinga koi dingdoh dingham?" 
Psalms94:17 Pakai chu eipanpi anahilou hileh, kahinna hi thipbeh-a ana umding ahitai." 
Psalms94:18 Kakeng kalho nale katichun, vo Pakai nahepina-in nei natuh-e."
