Psalms94:19 Kasunga lungkhamna tamtah kaneilai chun, nalhamona-in kahinna akipasah-in ahi." 
Psalms94:20 Danthu-a phatlouna semdohji khan gitlouna laltouna chun, nangma toh kiloikhomna neijin tem?" 
Psalms94:21 Michonpha hinna douna-in akikhom khomun, monabei thisan chu themo achanuvin ahi." 
Psalms94:22 Amavang Pakai chu eihong bitna ahin, chuleh ka Pathen chu kakiselna songpi ahi." 
Psalms94:23 Chule aman akhan gitlounao chu amahotah chunga alhutna, chule agitlou naova chu asuh manghel diu ahi: henge, Pakai i-Pathen'un asuh manghel diu ahi." 
Psalms95:1 Hungun, Pakai henga la saote, eihuh hingpao songpi henga kipana awthong tah-in samu hite." 
Psalms95:2 Thangvah tothon a-angsunga hungu hitin, kipana aw thongin la saohite." 
Psalms95:3 Ajehchu Pakai chu Pathen lentah ahin, pathen jouse chunga leng lenpen ahi." 
Psalms95:4 Leiset mun thuhtah ho chu akhutna um ahin, lhangho thaneina jong ama-a ahi." 
Psalms95:5 Twipihi ama-a ahin chule asemsa ahin; chule tolgo chu akhutna asuhtoh ahi. 
Psalms95:6 O hunguvin, ama houvin kun-u hitin; eisempao Pakai anga dilsu-u hite." 
Psalms95:7 Ama i-Pathen'u ahin, eiho aganlhatna mun'a amitele akhutna kelngoite ihiuve. Tunia a-awgin najah uva ahile;" 
Psalms95:8 Lunghansahna-a bangle, gamthipma kipatep ni-a bang chun nalungu tahsah hih-un." 
Psalms95:9 Hichelai chun napu napateu vin eipatepmun, eiphochenun, kathilbolho amutaove." 
Psalms95:10 Kum somli jen hiche nam mite chunga kana lungkhamin, alungthim uva lungdihlou gela mite ahiuvin, kalampi ahepouve, kanatin ahi." 
Psalms95:11 Hijeh chun amaho kacholngah na-a lutloudiu ahi, tia kalunghan na-a kana hahsel ahitaove." 
Psalms96:1 Pakaiya lathah khat saovin, leiset pumpin Pakai henga la saovin." 
Psalms96:2 Pakai henga la saovin, amin choi annun, ani anin ahuhhingna phongdoh-un." 
Psalms96:3 Pathen hephalouho lah-a aloupi, mijouse lah-a thilkidang ho phongdoh-un." 
Psalms96:4 Ajehchu Pakai chu aloupi-in, loupitah-a vahchoi ding ahi; pathen jouse chungvuma ja ding ahi." 
Psalms96:5 Ajehchu namtinho pathen jouse chu milim semthu ahin; ahinla Pakaiyin vanho asemin ahi. 
Psalms96:6 Amasanga janale lalna aumin, amuntheng sunga hatnale hoina aume." 
Psalms96:7 Vo nangho phungtina miten Pakaiya peuvinlang, Pakai henga loupina le hatna peuvin." 
Psalms96:8 Pakai chu achandia lom amin loupi chu peuvinlang, thilto hinchoijun lang, ahong sunga hunglut uvin." 
Psalms96:9 O, Pakai chu thenna le hoina-in houvun, leiset pumpi amasanga kichauvin." 
Psalms96:10 Pathen hephalouho lah-a chun Pakaiyin lengvai apoi tiuvin, vannoi leiset jong akilin louna dinga kiphutdet ding ahin, aman chonphatna-a mitin thu atanding ahi, tiuvin." 
Psalms96:11 Vanho kipah uhen, leiset jong thanom hen, twipi le asunga umjouse aodoh uhen." 
Psalms96:12 Loujao le asunga um jouse kipah uhen, chuteng gammanga thingphung jouse jong Pakai masanga thanom diu ahi." 
Psalms96:13 Ajehchu ama ahunge, amachu leiset thutan dinga hung ahi; aman vannoi chonphatna-a thu atanding chule mitin athudih na-a atanding ahi." 
Psalms97:1 Pakaiyin lengvai apotai, leiset thanom hen, twikol gamho jouse kipah uhen." 
Psalms97:2 Meilhangle muthimin aumkimvelin; chonphatna le thutandih chu alaltouna kibulphuna ahi. 
Psalms97:3 Amasanga meikong ache-in, chule akimvela amelmate akavamtai." 
Psalms97:4 Akolphehon vannoi asalvah-in, leiset hin amun, akithing thinguve." 
Psalms97:5 Leiset pumpi Pakai anga, Pakai anga chun, lhangho chu khoilu bangin ajol lhan ahi." 
Psalms97:6 Vanhon achonphatna aphong doh-un, chule mijousen aloupina amuvin ahi." 
Psalms97:7 Alim semthu jenjouse le milima kison na nejouse lungdonguhen, nangho pathen jousen, Ama houvun." 
Psalms97:8 Zion'in ajan akipah-in, chule vo Pakai nathutanlhah jeh-in Judah chanute athanomuve." 
Psalms97:9 Ajehchu Pakai, nangma leiset pumpi chunga chungnung pen nahin; pathen jouse chunga choisanga um nahi." 
Psalms97:10 Pakai ngailu-a nanghon thilse hotbolun, aman amithengte hinna akheh doh-in, amaho chu migilouho khutna konin ahuhdoh-in ahi." 
Psalms97:11 Michonphate din kho ahungvah tan, milungdihho din kipana ahunglhung tai." 
Psalms97:12 Michonpha ho Pakaiya kipah-un, chule athenna hetjingna-in ama-a thangvahna peuvin." 
Psalms98:1 Oh, Pakai vahchoinan lathah saovin, ajehchu aman thilkidang tah aboltai; akhut jetlam le abantheng chun jona achansah tai." 
Psalms98:2 Pakaiyin ami huhhing na chu ahetsahtan; Pathen hephalouho mitmun achonphatna chu phongtah-in amusahtai. 
Psalms98:3 Israel insung chunga amihepina le athutah chu ageldohtan; i-Pathen'u mihuhhing na chu leiset kolmong geija mijousen amusoh taovin ahi. 
Psalms98:4 Leiset pumpin Pakaiya kipana aw thonsah-un, aw gingtah-in sam unlang, kipah-un, chule vahchoi La saovin." 
Psalms98:5 Selangdah tothon Pakaiya la saovin, selangdahle vahchoi awgin thouvin." 
Psalms98:6 Sumkon binei le pengkulto thon lengpa, Pakai anga chun kipana aw thonsah un." 
Psalms98:7 Twipi le asunga umjouse, vannoi leisetle asunga cheng jouse aodoh uhen." 
Psalms98:8 Twisoh hon akhutnu benguhen, lhangho jouse thakhatnin Pakai masanga kipah uhen." 
Psalms98:9 Ajehchu ama leiset thutanna hungding ahin; chonphatna a vannoi chule khanggilou mite thu atanding ahi. 
Psalms99:1 Pakaiyin lengvai apotai: Mitin kihot lhu hen, ama Cherub ho kah-a atouve; leiset kilinghen." 
Psalms99:2 Pakai chu Zion'a aloupin, chule mijouse chunga chungnung pen ahi." 
Psalms99:3 Namin loupile gimneitah chu vahchoi uhen, ijeh inem itile hichu atheng ahi." 
Psalms99:4 Lengpa thahatna jongchun thutanlhahna angailun, nangin adih chu naphut doh-in, Jacob henga chonphat na-in thutanna naboldoh-e." 
Psalms99:5 Nanghon Pakai i-Pathen'u chu choi-an nun, chule akhophang bulla houvun; ijeh inem itile ama athengin ahi." 
Psalms99:6 Athempuho lah-a Mosi le Aaron apangin, chule aman amina akouho lah-a Samuel apangin ahi; amahon Pakai akouvun, chule aman amaho chu adonbutnin ahi." 
Psalms99:7 Meibang khompi-a konin ahenguva thu anaseijin, ahettoh sahho le ahoudan thuho amaho anapeh chu achingtupmun ahi." 
Psalms99:8 Vo Pakai ka Pathen nu, nangin amaho nana donbutnin; atohkhelnao chunga phu anala jongle chun, nangma amaho ngaidampa Pathen chu nahi." 
Psalms99:9 Pakai i-Pathen'u chu choi-an nun, chule alhang thenga chun ama houvun, ajehchu Pakai i-Pathen'u chu athengin ahi." 
Psalms100:1 Nangho gamjousen, Pakaiya kipa awgin thonsah-un," 
Psalms100:2 Kipahtah-in Pakai chu jennun, lasahto thon amasanga hunguvin." 
Psalms100:3 Nanghon Pakai chu Pathen ahi ti heuvin, einasem uva chu ama ahin, eiho eiho-a tum ihipouve; eiho ama mitele ahamhing mun'a akelngoite chu ihiuve." 
Psalms100:4 Thangvah pumin akotpi sunga lutnun, chule vahchoi pumin ahongsunga lutnuvin, ama thangvah unlang, amin vahchoijun." 
Psalms100:5 Ajehchu Pakai chu aphan, ahepina chu a-imatih chana umjing ahin; chule akitahna chu khangjouse geija umding ahi." 
Psalms101:1 Hepinale thutanlhahna chu lan sange, Vo Pakai naheng-ah la sange." 
Psalms101:2 Chamkimna lampia chingthei tah-in chon ingting; O itihle kahenga nahung ding ham? ka-insunga lungthim phachamkim in choninge. 
Psalms101:3 Thil gilou poupou kamitmun koiponge; vahkoiho thilbol chu kahon, hichu keija umlou ding ahi." 
Psalms101:4 Lung gitlouna keija kona kiheimang ding; keiman khang gilou kahet louding ahi. 
Psalms101:5 Aheng akom guhthima seise-a chu kasuhmang ding; mi kiletsah le hoitho lungpu chu kathohthei louding ahi. 
Psalms101:6 Keimatoh kachen khom theina dinguva, tahsan gamchu ngailutna mitna kavet ding; chamkimna lampia chepa chun, keima eijending ahi." 
Psalms101:7 Lheplhahna thilbolla chu ka insunga chenglouding; jousei jong kamitmu-a umlou ding ahi. 
Psalms101:8 Thilgilou bolho jouse Pakai khopi-a kona kasuhmang theina dinga, gamsung migilouho jouse kasuhmang loiding ahi." 
Psalms102:1 Vo Pakai kataona ngaijin lang, kakouna naheng hunglhung hen." 
Psalms102:2 Kalungkham nileh keija konin namai selmang danlang, keilam ngan nana hinsungin, nangma kakou nileh neidonbut loijin." 
Psalms102:3 Ajehchu kahin nikhoho hi meikhu bangin akitol mangin, chule kaguhohi thuhsunga mei bangin akan ahi." 
Psalms102:4 Kalunghi agentheijin hampa bangin agolhatan, ka changlhah nehding kasuhmil lotan ahi." 
Psalms102:5 Kahimsat husa gin jeh-in, kaguho jong kavunna abehchah gamtai." 
Psalms102:6 Keima gamthipma vamuhsao bang kahitan nelgama sumbupi bang kahitai. 
Psalms102:7 Kahah jingin, intingvuma pelpa changlhat bangbep kahitai." 
Psalms102:8 Kamelma ten eihouse nilhum jiuvin, chule kachunga kingolsah ho keima dounan akihahsel jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms102:9 Ajehchu vut hi changlhah bangin kanejin, chule kadon ding chu ka-na toh kachoh haljin," 
Psalms102:10 hichu nalung nopmo le nalunghan jeh ahi; ajehchu nangin neidom sangin chule neiseplhan ahi. 
Psalms102:11 Kanikhoho jong le-lim kiheimang bep ahin, chule hampa bangin kagopjitai." 
Psalms102:12 Ahinla Vo Pakai nangvang a-imatih chana umding nahin, chule nangma khang jouse-a kigeldoh jingding nahi." 
Psalms102:13 Nangma thouvinnatin, Zion chunga hepina nanei ding; ajehchu ama lungsetna phat, henge, phat kitepsa chu ahunglhung tai." 
Psalms102:14 Ajehchu nasohte amanu songho-a chun alunglhaijun, chule chua leivui chu akhohsah-un ahi." 
Psalms102:15 Chutia chu Pathen hephalouhon Pakai min chu agin diu, chule leiset lengho jousen naloupina chu agindiu ahi." 
Psalms102:16 Pakaiyin Zion asahdoh tengle, aloupi na-a hungkilah ding ahi." 
Psalms102:17 Aman milengvai ho taona angai ding, chule ataonao ngaisah louva akoi louding ahi." 
Psalms102:18 Hichehi khangkitna dinga kisun ding; chule ahung kisem ding miho chun Pakai chu avahchoidiu ahi. 
Psalms102:19 Ajehchu aman amuntheng sanga konin ahin vesuh-in, Pakaiyin van'a konin leihi ahinmui;" 
Psalms102:20 Sohchangho himsatna ngaidingle, thidinga thu kitepsaho lhadohnadin;" 
Psalms102:21 Zion'a Pakai min le Jerusalem'a ama pachatna chu phondohna dingin; 
Psalms102:22 Lenggam ho le mitin Pakai jenna dinga akikhopkhom tenguleh, hichu hiding ahi." 
Psalms102:23 Aman lamdunga kahatna asudoijin, kanikhoho asuchomin ahi." 
Psalms102:24 Keiman, Vo ka Pathen, kahinna akimtuh in neilamang hih-in, nangma kumho chu khang jouse lhumkeija uma ahi, kati." 
Psalms102:25 Leiset bul kingapna chu malaija nakoisa ahitan, chule vanho jong nakhutsoh ahi." 
Psalms102:26 Amaho mangthah diu ahin, ahinla nangvang umjing ding nahi, henge, amaho ponlui banga sesohdiu, von banga nangin amaho nakhela, chutia chu amaho kikheldiu ahitai." 
Psalms102:27 Ahinla nangvang angai nahi jingin, nakumin jong kichaitih aneilouding ahi." 
Psalms102:28 Nasohte chateho chu umjing uva, chule achilhahteu chu namasanga kitungdoh diu ahi." 
Psalms103:1 Vo kalhagao, Pakai chu choi-an nin, chule kasunga umjousen amintheng choi-an nun." 
Psalms103:2 Vo kalhagao Pakai chu choi-an nin, chule aphatchom naho jouse sumil hih-in." 
Psalms103:3 Nakhan gitlouna jouse ngaidama, nanatna jouse damsah-a," 
Psalms103:4 Nahinkho manthah na-a kona lhatdoh-a, ngailut phatna le hepina lal lukhuh banga nakhuh peh-a," 
Psalms103:5 Nakhang donlai muvanlai banga semthah ahina dinga, thilphaho-a nakamsung lunglhaisahpa chu ahi." 
Psalms103:6 Pakaiyin chonphatna atah langin, suhgentheija umho jouse dingin thu adih-in atan peh-e." 
Psalms103:7 Aman alampiho Mosi henga ahetsah-in, anatohho Israel chate ahetsah-in ahi." 
Psalms103:8 Pakai chu hepina le lungsetna-a dim, lunghangvah lou chule ngailutna-a dimset ahi." 
Psalms103:9 Aman phatjousen eiho eiphohjing pouvintin; chujongle a-itih in alunghana chingjing ponte. 
Psalms103:10 Aman ichonsetnao bangin eibol pouvin, chujongle ikhan gitlounao dungjuijin jong eilethuh pouve." 
Psalms103:11 Ajehchu leisanga van asan banga, ama gingte chunga ahepina chubanga chu lena ahi." 
Psalms103:12 Solam le lhumlam akigamlat banga, hichan gamla-a chu ikhan gitlounao eihoa kona achonmang ahitai." 
Psalms103:13 Mipan achate akhoto banga, Pakaiyin ama gingte akhoto ahi." 
Psalms103:14 Ajehchu aman ikisuhto dannu ahen, eiho leivuibou ihiu aman ageldoh jingin ahi." 
Psalms103:15 Mihem vang, anikhoho chu hampa bangbou; jaova pahcha bangbep bou ahin, hitichun ahung khangin ahi." 
Psalms103:16 Ajehchu huijin achung ahin mutle amang gamin, chule aumna mun chun ahepha ji tapoi." 
Psalms103:17 Ahinla Pakai hepina chu ama gingte chunga atonsot atonsot geija umding, chule achonphatna jong achateu chateho geija;" 
Psalms103:18 Akitepna chingtupma, chule athupehho juidinga geldoh jingho chunga umding ahi." 
Psalms103:19 Pakaiyin van ho-a alaltouna atungdoh-in, aleng gamin imajouse chunga vai apoi." 
Psalms103:20 Nangho thahat chungnung nei, athupehho bola, a-thu ngaija avantil hon, Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms103:21 Nangho ama janel ho, ama lhachaho, ama lunglhaina bolho jousen, Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms103:22 A vaihomna muntina athilbolho jousen, Pakai vahchoijun. Vo kalhagao Pakai chu vahchoijin." 
Psalms104:1 Vo kahinna, Pakai chu vahchoijin. Vo Pakai ka Pathen, naloupi lheh jengin, janale loupina-in nakijeme." 
Psalms104:2 Vanho pondal banga kaijal pan, khovah chu ponsil bangin naki sile." 
Psalms104:3 A-in danho-a inkamho chu twilah-a ajama, meilhang ho kangtalai jin akiseme, hui lhavingho chunga vahle pa." 
Psalms104:4 Avantilho lhagaoho sempa, alhachate jong meikong sosah jipa." 
Psalms104:5 Nangma tonsotna akichon lounadinga, leiset bulho anaphut detpa." 
Psalms104:6 Nangman hichu thutah-in ponsil bangin nakhu khumin, twiho chu molsangho vuma akiting uve." 
Psalms104:7 Nangman naphoh-in ahile amaho ajamun, na van ginho-a amaho ajammang loiji taove." 
Psalms104:8 Amaho molsang ho-a akaltouvun, amaho dinga nagonpeh namun, phaicham ho-a chun achesuh jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms104:9 Leiset chupdinga ahungkile louna diuvin, ahin khelthei loudiu gamgi nasempeh-in ahi." 
Psalms104:10 Aman lhang ho-a twisam longho chu, phaicham lama asolin ahi." 
Psalms104:11 Hicheho chun gama saho jouse donding apeuvin; gam sangan dangchah hon dangnou nan aneijuve. 
Psalms104:12 Apang chu chungleng vachaten chenna-in aneijun, thingbah holah-a chun la saove." 
Psalms104:13 Aman a-in danho-a konin lhangho achapnouvin, leiset hi nanatoh ga ho-a alunglhai uve." 
Psalms104:14 Aman leisetna kona nehding akondoh nadingin; ganchaho dingin hampa akedoh sah-in, chule mihem neh dingin anche akesah-in;" 
Psalms104:15 chule mihem lung kipasah lengpitwi, chule amaivahna ding thao, chule mihem lungthim hatsah-a changlhah jong ahinsodoh sah-in ahi." 
Psalms104:16 Aman Lebanon'a Cedar thing aphuho; Pakai thingphung ho chu twi akichap nou jinge; 
Psalms104:17 Hia chun vachaten bu asaovin, twiva dingin vang chahthinglah chu a-in ahi." 
Psalms104:18 Lhangsang ho chu gamkelcha ho ding ahin, jupi ho dingin songpiho chu kiselna ahi." 
Psalms104:19 Phatbih hetnading lhathah aumsah-in, nisan alhum phat akihetne." 
Psalms104:20 Muthim nasemin hichu jan ahin, hia chun gammanga sajouse ahung kitholdoh jiuve." 
Psalms104:21 Keipi donglaihon asamat dingu akitum khumun, Pathen'a konin anehdiu akiholuve." 
Psalms104:22 Nisa asoteng akikhom khomun, akulsung cheh uva akolji taove." 
Psalms104:23 Miho chu natong dingin akon doh-un, nilhah kahsen na atong jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms104:24 Vo Pakai nathilsem hohi iti tamma tam hitam! abonchauva chihna-a nasem ahin, leiset hi nahaona-a dimset ahi." 
Psalms104:25 Chutia chu hiche twikhanglen lentahle jaotah hi uma, asunga akithol thoho simjoulou uma, ganhing alen le aneo agoma uma ahi." 
Psalms104:26 Hia chun kong innei akitolin, chuche sunga kichem dinga nangin nasem Leviathan chu aume." 
Psalms104:27 Hicheho jousen aphatcha a-an'u napeh theinadin, nangahcheh uvin ahi." 
Psalms104:28 Napeh ho chu amahon akhom tupmun, nakhut najalin neh tuitah-in avaset uve." 
Psalms104:29 Namai naselin alungkham jiuvin, ahaitheinau na lahmang peh-in, athi jiuvin chule leivuijin akileji taove." 
Psalms104:30 Nalhagao nasoldoh-in amaho akisem doh jiuvin, chule leiset chunghi nasemthah kitjin ahi." 
Psalms104:31 Pakai loupina chu tonsotnin umintin, Pakai chu athil bolho-a kipahding ahi." 
Psalms104:32 Aman leiset chung aven ahile akihot jengin; lhangho atongkhan ahile mei akhun ahi. 
Psalms104:33 Kahinlaisen Pakai henga la sangting, kahinpet nin ka Pathen vahchoi la sange." 
Psalms104:34 Ama chung chang kangaito nahi ahenga lhumin tin, Pakaiya kipahding kahi." 
Psalms104:35 Michonse ho chu leija konin suh mangin umhen, chule migilou ho umkit tahih uhen. Vo kahinna, Pakai chu choi-anin. Vahchoijun Pakai chu." 
Psalms105:1 Pakai henga thangvahna peuvin! aminin taovun; mihemte lah-a athilbol hetsah-un. 
Psalms105:2 Ahenga la saovin, Ahenga vahchoi La saovin, athilkidang bol ho jouse thu kihoulimun." 
Psalms105:3 Amintheng chu loupihen, Pakai holho lungsung kipahhen." 
Psalms105:4 Pakai le ahatna holunlang, tanglouvin amai chu holjingun." 
Psalms105:5 Akamsung thutan lhahho, athil kidangho, atohsa anatoh kidangho geldoh-un," 
Psalms105:6 Vo nangho Abraham chilhah asohte, alhentum nangho Jacob chaten sumil hih-un." 
Psalms105:7 Amachu Pakai i-Pathen'u ahin, athutan lhahho chu leichung jouse-a aumme." 
Psalms105:8 Atonsotnin akitepna ageldoh jingin, kum asang asang dinga aman anatep ahitan ahi." 
Psalms105:9 Abraham toh asem kitepna, chule Isaac henga akitepna;" 
Psalms105:10 Chule hiche mama chu Jacob dinga danthua din, Israel henga tonsot kitepna din asuhdetpehtan," 
Psalms105:11 Kanaan gamchu nachan ding gouva nahenga kapeh ding ahi ati; 
Psalms105:12 Amaho lhomcha bou anahiuvin; henge, lhomcha khat le khopem mi anahiuve." 
Psalms105:13 Amaho nam khatna kona nam khatna, lenggam khatna kona midang henga achele laijun," 
Psalms105:14 Koiman jouva aboldiu aphalpon, amaho jeh-in lengho aphohsaljin;" 
Psalms105:15 Kathaonupa chu tongkha hih-un, chule kathemgao ho susehih-un, ati." 
Psalms105:16 Achung chonin chuche gama chun kel alhahsah-in; changkung jouse amanthahsah soh heltan ahi. 
Psalms105:17 Amasanguva mi khat asolmasan, sohdia kijoh-a Joseph chu ahin," 
Psalms105:18 Akengho chu bullin asunaovin, thihkul sunga ahenun ahi." 
Psalms105:19 Ama thu aguilhun kahsen, Pakai thu chun ama apatepmin ahi." 
Psalms105:20 Lengpan mi asolin alhadoh-in, miho vaihompatah chun agalha dohtai." 
Psalms105:21 Aman a-insung pakai jin apansah-in, chule aneijouse chunga vaihom din;" 
Psalms105:22 Pipuiho chu anop nopma kan dingle, vaihomho chihna hil din apansah tai." 
Psalms105:23 Israel jong chu Egypt'a ahungtan, Jacob chu Ham gama ahung jintan ahi." 
Psalms105:24 Aman amite nasatah-in apunsah-in, amelmate sangin ahatsah jotai." 
Psalms105:25 Asohte doha thuhtah-a abolna dingun, aman alungu chu amite hotbol din aheimangpeh tai." 
Psalms105:26 Aman asoh Mosi, chule amilhen Aaron chu anasolin ahi." 
Psalms105:27 Amanin amelchihnaho alah uva abol lhonin, chule thilkidang ho Ham gamsunga avetsah lhone." 
Psalms105:28 Aman muthim asolin mu athimsahtan, chuin athu chu adou tapouvin ahi." 
Psalms105:29 Aman atwi hou thisan asosah-in, anga hou athat gamtai." 
Psalms105:30 Agamu chun uphoh tamtah ahin pendoh sah-in, leng teho indan sung geijin adimtan ahi." 
Psalms105:31 Thu aseile thousi jatchom chom tamtah ahungun, chule kha jong agamkol sungu ahung dimtan ahi." 
Psalms105:32 Aman amaho chu go khelin gel apen, chule agamuva meikou jengjung apen ahi." 
Psalms105:33 Aman alengpi guihoule atheichang phunghou jepna apen, agamkol sunguva thingphung ho amanthahsah gamheltai." 
Psalms105:34 Aman thu aseile khaokhoho ahunguvin, khaokho noute simjoulou ahungdoh uvin," 
Psalms105:35 Chuin agamsung uva hampa louhing jouse anejouvun, aleisetnu theiga jouse anechai taovin ahi." 
Psalms105:36 Aman agamsung uva athahatna jouse bulpi, apengmasa jouse jongchu asumang heltan ahi." 
Psalms105:37 Aman amaho sana le dangka pumin ahinpui doh-in, aphung sunguva chun achatmo khatcha aumpoi." 
Psalms105:38 Amaho apotdoh uva chun Egypt akipah-e; ajehchu amaho kichatna chu achunguva chu-ah ahitai. 
Psalms105:39 Akhu diuvin meilhang apha jal-in, janteng asalvah diuvin meikong apen ahi." 
Psalms105:40 Mipi hochun athumun, vengke ahinpen, van changlhah-in alungu alhaisah tai." 
Psalms105:41 Songpi ahonle, twi ahung kikhodoh-in, gamgo munho-a vadung lonin alongin ahi." 
Psalms105:42 Ajehchu aman athutep thengtah le, asoh Abraham chu ageldoh jing ahi." 
Psalms105:43 Amite thanom tah-in ahin puidoh-in, chule amilhenho kipahtah-in apuidoh-e." 
Psalms105:44 Aman Pathen hephalou te gam chu amaho apen; amahon chua miho tohdohsa chu alotauve; 
Psalms105:45 Chutia chu amahon achondan kisemho ajuijuva, adan thupeh ho anit nadiuva apeh ahi. Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms106:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun. Oh, aphatna jeh-in Pakai chu thangvahna peuvin; ajehchu amihepina tonsotna umjing ahi." 
Psalms106:2 Pakai natoh thahatna chu kon seithei jintem? Avahchoina jouse kon aphondoh jouding ham? 
Psalms106:3 Thutandih tuhchah-a chule phat tinna chonphatna bolho chu anunnom ahiuve. 
Psalms106:4 O Pakai, namite chunga nanei lungsetna-a chun neigeldoh jingin, O nahuhhing nan neivilin," 
Psalms106:5 Chutile nami lhentumte hamphatna kamuthei ding, namite kipana-a kathanop thei ding, nagou chan toh kaloupi ding ahi." 
Psalms106:6 Kapu kapateu toh kana chonseuvin, kana khang gilouvun, kana khanse taove." 
Psalms106:7 Kapu kapa teuvin Egypt'a nathil kidangho ana hethei pouvin; nahepina tamtah chu ageldoh pouvin, amavang twipi le twipi san ngeija chun ama ana lungsat sah taovin ahi." 
Psalms106:8 Hijeng jongle athil boltheina loupitah chu hetdoh ahina din; amin jal-in amaho chu ana huhdoh-e. 
Psalms106:9 Twipisan jongchu apho-in ahile akang tan; chutichun amaho chu gamthip laija apui bangin, twi thuhtah-a chun apui galkai tai." 
Psalms106:10 Ahotbolteu khutna konin ahuhdoh-in, melma khutna konin alhatdoh-in ahi." 
Psalms106:11 Chuche twi chun amelmateu achupmin; khatcha asohcha aum pouve. 
Psalms106:12 Chujouvin athu chu atahsanun, ama vahchoi la asaove." 
Psalms106:13 Anatohho asumil loijun; athumop chu angah tapouvin ahi. 
Psalms106:14 Gamthipma chun tahsa ngaichatnin adimun, nelphaija chun Pathen apatep taovin ahi." 
Psalms106:15 Chuin athil thumu apen, ahivangin asunguvah gamna hise alansah in ahi." 
Psalms106:16 Amahon gebuh sunga Mosi, chule Pakai mitheng Aaron jong chu athangset taovin ahileh;" 
Psalms106:17 Leiset akhikeh-in Dathan aval lhumin, Abiram loiho akhukhum tai." 
Psalms106:18 Aloi lah uva mei ahung kadoh-in, meikong chun migilouho chu akalihtai." 
Psalms106:19 Amahon Horeb'a akilhajol bongnou lim asemun, alim semthu uchu ahou taove." 
Psalms106:20 Chutobang chun aloupinao chu bongchal hampane bangbepmin akhel taovin ahi. 
Psalms106:21 Egypt'a thil loupitah tah bola Pathen, ahuhhingpao chu asumil taovin;" 
Psalms106:22 Ham gama thilkidang tahtah le, twipisana kichat umtah bolpa chu asumil taovin ahi." 
Psalms106:23 Hijeh chun mipi chu sumang khante tia alunghana heimang dinga alhentum Mosi chu amasanga chu akah uva ding louva hile, amaho chu sumang tange anati ahitai." 
Psalms106:24 Henge, amahon gam nomtah chu i-sah louvin abulun, athu chu atahsan pouve." 
Psalms106:25 Ahivangin apon in sunguva aphunchel uvin, Pakai aw chu angai pouvin ahi." 
Psalms106:26 Hijeh chun gamthip laija amaho suhlhuhna dingin, amaho dounan akhut alam tan," 
Psalms106:27 Achilhahteu jong namtin lah-a asuhlhuh nadingle, namtin lah-a athecheh nadinga akhut alap ahi." 
Psalms106:28 Amaho Peor mun'a baal lama abeh-un, athiho dinga ganlhaina kibol chu anetaove." 
Psalms106:29 Chutichun anatohho uva chun ama aphinseuvin, chule achunguva hise alengtai." 
Psalms106:30 Chujouvin Phinehas adingdoh-in thu atantan; chuin hise chu atangtan ahi. 
Psalms106:31 Hichu ama dingin a-imatih chana khang jouse-a dingin chonphatna-a sim ahitai. 
Psalms106:32 Kinahna twiphunga jong chun alunghan sah-un, chutichun amaho jeh-in Mosi chunga thilse alhunlo helin;" 
Psalms106:33 Alhagao aphinset jeh-un, akamin thilsetah anaseitan ahi." 
Psalms106:34 Pakaiyin amaho thu apeh bangun, amahon namho chu anasumang pouve." 
Psalms106:35 Ahivangin Pathen hephalouho toh akihalun, athil bolhou chu ajil jotaovin ahi." 
Psalms106:36 Chule amilimhou chu ajenun, hichu amaho dingin thang ahung hitai." 
Psalms106:37 Henge, amaho thilha henga achapateu le achanuteu chu ganlhai thilto dingin apedoh-un," 
Psalms106:38 monabei thisan, achapateule achanuteu thisantah chu asouvin, hicheho-a chun Canaan milimho henga akilhaijun; chuche gam chu thisana suhboh-in aumtan ahi." 
Psalms106:39 Chutichun anatohtah uchun akisuboh-un, athil boldoh uva chun noti'n apang taovin ahi." 
Psalms106:40 Hichejeh-a chu Pakai lung hanna chu amite chunga meikou banga anakou doh-a, chubang tah-a agoulote tah chu athet ahitai." 
Psalms106:41 Chuin amaho chu Pathen hephalouho khutna apedoh-in, ahotbolteu chun achunguva vai ahomtai." 
Psalms106:42 Amelmateu jongchun asugentheijun, akhut noijuva suhnemin aum taovin ahi." 
Psalms106:43 Amaho chu avel velin anahuhdoh-in, ahinla alung ngaitouvin alunghan sah-un, khangitlouna jeh-in suhnemin aumjiuve." 
Psalms106:44 Hijeng jongle aka-u ajah jiteng, ahesohnau akhohsah jin;" 
Psalms106:45 Akitepna chu amahodin ageldohjin, ahepina hao dungjuijin alung aheijitai." 
Psalms106:46 Sohchanga akaihou jouse jong chun amaho akhotosah-un ahi. 
Psalms106:47 O Pakai ka Pathen'u, neihuhhing un, chule namin theng thangvah dingle navahchoi na-a galjou dingin, Pathen hephalouho lah-a konin neipui khom un." 
Psalms106:48 Pakai Israel Pathen chu tonsotnapat tonsot geijin vahchoijin umhen: chule mijousen, Amen, tiuhen. Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms107:1 O aphatna jeh-in Pakai henga thangvahna peuvin, ajehchu ahepina a-imatih chanin aum jingin ahi." 
Psalms107:2 Melmaho khutna kona alhatdoh, Pakai lhatdamsaten hitichun seijuhen;" 
Psalms107:3 chule gamtin solam le lhumlam, sahlam le lhanglama konin amaho kikhomuhen." 
Psalms107:4 Amaho gamthip mi chekhah louna lampia avahleuvin, chenna ding khopi khatcha amu pouve." 
Psalms107:5 Gilkel le dang chah-in, asunguva ahinnao alhasamtai." 
Psalms107:6 Chuphatnin Pakai henga lungkhamin ataovun, aman ahesoh naova konin anahuhdoh tai." 
Psalms107:7 Mi chenna khopi-a achetheina diuvin, lampi dih-a apuijin ahi." 
Psalms107:8 Mihemte hin mihem chate henga, aphatna jehle athil kidang bolho jeh hin Pakai chu vahchoi taveleu, o!" 
Psalms107:9 Ajehchu aman lhagao ngaichat alunglhai sahjin, lhagao gilkel an pha phan avahvajin ahi." 
Psalms107:10 Muthim le thina le-lima touva, suhgentheina le thihkhaova kihenho chu," 
Psalms107:11 ajehchu amahon Pathen thu douna-a gol akeh-un, chungnung pen thuhil anahsah pouve." 
Psalms107:12 Hijeh chun alungu tohgimna-in ason kun-in, apanpidiu khatcha aumpon, alhasuh taovin ahi." 
Psalms107:13 Chutengle lungkhamin Pakai henga apengun, aman ahesoh naova konin ahuhdoh jin ahi." 
Psalms107:14 Aman muthima konle thina lima konin apuidoh in, chule akihen nahou chu asuchip jin ahi." 
Psalms107:15 Mihemte hin mihem chate henga, aphatna jehle athil kidang bolho jeh hin Pakai chu vahchoi taveleu, o!" 
Psalms107:16 Ajehchu aman sum-eng kotpiho aphusen, thih banggolho asatkhen tan ahi." 
Psalms107:17 Mingol ho chu asuhkhel nao jehle, akhanset jeh uvin suhgentheijin aumuvin ahi." 
Psalms107:18 Ahin naovin an jatjouse atheuvin, chule thina kotpiho lam chu anai jiuvin ahi." 
Psalms107:19 Chutengle lungkhamin Pakai henga apengun, aman ahesoh naova konin ahuhdoh jin ahi." 
Psalms107:20 Ama thu asolin, amaho asudamjin, amanthah naova konin ahuhdoh jin ahi." 
Psalms107:21 Mihemte hin mihem chate henga, aphatna jehle athil kidang bolho jeh hin Pakai chu vahchoi taveleu, o!" 
Psalms107:22 Amahon thangvahna ganlhaina-in ganlhaina neiju henlang, athilbolho chu thanom tah-in phongjal uhen." 
Psalms107:23 Twikhanglen lama kong inneija chesuh-a, twipi nasatah chunga sumkolvei ho," 
Psalms107:24 Amahon Pakai thilbolho le, twi thuhtah sunga athilkidang bolho chu amuvin ahi." 
Psalms107:25 Ajehchu aman thu apeh leh huile go nasatah ahung kithojin, hichun twipi kinong chu adomsang jin ahi." 
Psalms107:26 Hicheho chu van lama akinongtou jin, twi thuhtah-a akumsuh kitjin; ahinnao lungkham jeh-in ajunlha jitai." 
Psalms107:27 Suhle tungin akipeijun, jukham bangin alon lele uvin, achihnao kichaina-a um ahitaove." 
Psalms107:28 Chutengle lungkhamin Pakai henga apengun, aman ahesoh naova konin ahuhdoh jin ahi." 
Psalms107:29 Aman huile go athipsah-in, chutichun twipi kinongchu atangtan ahi." 
Psalms107:30 Chuin athiptah jehchun akipah-un, chutichun adeinau kaimun geichun apui lhungtan ahi." 
Psalms107:31 Mihemte hin mihem chate henga, aphatna jehle athil kidang bolho jeh hin Pakai chu vahchoi taveleu, o!" 
Psalms107:32 Amahon amachu mipi kikhom lah-a jong choisangu henlang, upaho kikhopna-a ama chu vahchoi uhen." 
Psalms107:33 Aman vadungho gamthip asosah-in, twisamho tolgo asosah-in;" 
Psalms107:34 Asunga chengho khangitlou jeh-in, gam phalai chu gamtem asosoh tan ahi." 
Psalms107:35 Aman gamthip chu twikul asosah-in, tolgolai chu twinah putna asosah jin ahi." 
Psalms107:36 Chenna ding khopi akigon theina diuvin, chua chun gilkelho achensah-in;" 
Psalms107:37 Chule ga tamtah punsah dingin, lou aboluvin, chule lengpithei aphut uvin ahi." 
Psalms107:38 Amaho nasatah-a apuntheina dingun phatthei jong aboh-in, aganchahou akemsuhsah nompoi." 
Psalms107:39 Avelin, amaho suhgentheina, hesohna, chule lungdona jeh-in, amuisuh tultulun suhnemin aumuve." 
Psalms107:40 Aman lengchapate chunga noisena abunglhan, lampi kamhel gamthipma avale sahtai." 
Psalms107:41 Ahinla gentheiho chu hesohna-a konin munsanga akoijin, kelngoihon tobangin insung asempeh-in ahi." 
Psalms107:42 Michonpha hon hichu amu uva kipah diu, chule khan gitlouna jousen akam akihup diu ahi." 
Psalms107:43 Michingho jousen hiche hohi anit dingu, chule Pakai mingailut khotona chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Psalms108:1 Vo Pathen, kalunghi adetne; keiman la sangting navahchoi jinge, kaloupina jengin jong." 
Psalms108:2 Tumging le selangdah ho khangun, keiman thingjangvah chu sukhang inge." 
Psalms108:3 O Pakai mipi lah-a nangma vahchoi jingting, namtin lah jenga jong nangma vahchoi la sange." 
Psalms108:4 Ajehchu nahepina vanho sangin asangjon, nakitahna chun meibol holah aphan ahi." 
Psalms108:5 Pakai nangma vanho chungvuma choisangin umin; chule naloupina chu leiset pumpi chungvuma umhen. 
Psalms108:6 Nami ngailut ho chu huhdoh-a aumtheina dingin, nakhut jet lamin neihuhhing in lang, nei donbutnin." 
Psalms108:7 Keima kipah ingting, Shechem chu kahop khending, chule Succoth phaicham katedoh ding ahi, tin Pathen'in athenna-in anaseije." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead keija ahin, Manasseh jong keija ahi; Ephraim jonghi kalu thahatna ahin, Judah hi kadanthu pepa ahi;" 
Psalms108:9 Moab kakisilna bel ahin, Edom chunga ka kengkoh kaselhah ding, Philistine chunga jona kanei ding ahi." 
Psalms108:10 Khopi dettah-a koiham eipuilut dinga? Koijin Edom sunga eipuilut ding ham? 
Psalms108:11 Vo Pathen, eipaidoh uva nang nahi hilou ham? Vo Pathen, kajanel houtoh nakondoh khom hilou ham?" 
Psalms108:12 Lungkham na-a konin neipanpi uvin, ajehchu mihem panpina chu pannabei ahi." 
Psalms108:13 Pathen jal-in hangtah-in pangu vinge, ajehchu kagalteo chotphading ama ahi." 
Psalms109:1 Kavahchoi jing, vo Pathen, neithipsan hih-in;" 
Psalms109:2 Ajehchu kei douna-in mi khang gilouhole mi lhemlha ho akamkaovin; aleijun keima dounan jou aseijun ahi. 
Psalms109:3 Amahon hotna thun eium kimvelun, ajeh beijin eikisat piuve." 
Psalms109:4 Ajehchu kangailut amaho kamelman apangun, ahinla keima taona lama kakipen ahi." 
Psalms109:5 Amahon phatna chu setna-in, ngailutna chu hotnan eilethuh taovin ahi." 
Psalms109:6 Ama chunga mikhang gilou koijin lang, akhut jet lama Satan dinghen." 
Psalms109:7 Athu kitan tengle themmo chansah inlang, ataona chu chonset soh hen." 
Psalms109:8 Ahin nikho lhom henlang, anatohna mun midang changhen." 
Psalms109:9 Achate pabei hiuhenlang, ajinu meithai hihen." 
Psalms109:10 Achate chu tanglouva vahveile khutdo hiuhenlang, mun gohkeoho-a chun changlhah kihol uhen." 
Psalms109:11 Hunam thilchom hon aneijouse lahpeh hen, gamchom min atohgimga kichomhen." 
Psalms109:12 Ahenga hepina musah koimacha umhih hen, pabei chate lainatpi ding jong umda hen." 
Psalms109:13 Aphattheina suhtanin umhen lang, khang hunglhung dinga aminu noimangin umhen." 
Psalms109:14 Apateu khan gitlouna Pakai anga geldoh-in umhen, chule anu chonset noimangin umhih hen." 
Psalms109:15 Leisetna kona amaho hetjingna asuhtan theina dingin, amaho Pakai anga umjomjing taohen." 
Psalms109:16 Ajehchu hepina musah ding geltah sangin, vaicha lhasam abol gentheijin, aman alunghesohho jong chu athatnin ahi." 
Psalms109:17 Mi gaosap ding adeibang chun, hichu amachunga chuhen, phattheiboh adeilou bangin, hichu ama-a konin gamlahen." 
Psalms109:18 Ponsil banga gaosapna akivon ahin, chutichun hichu a-oi sunga twi bangin luthen, chule agu sunga thao bangin luthen." 
Psalms109:19 Hichu amadin akikhu khum ponsil bangin umhen lang, akigah jing konggah dingin umjing tahen." 
Psalms109:20 Hichu Pakaiya kona kamelmate leh, kahinna douna-a thuse seiho lethuhna hihen." 
Psalms109:21 Ahinla vo Pakai Pathen, namin jal-in neibol peh-in, ajehchu nahepina aphat jeh-in neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms109:22 Ajehchu keima vaichale lhasam kahin, kalung thim hi mavo-a uma ahitai." 
Psalms109:23 Keima le-lim kiheimang banga chemanga kahitan; khaokhopi banga chungle noija kipeile kahitai. 
Psalms109:24 An ngol jal-in kakhup angoijin, kasa hin thaona apu tapoi." 
Psalms109:25 Keima jengjong amaho i-sah louvin kaumtan; eiveovin alu eithinkhum jiuvin ahi. 
Psalms109:26 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, neipanpin, nami hepina dungjuijin neihuhhing in." 
Psalms109:27 Hichehi nakhut ahi ti amahon ahet theijuva, Pakai, nangman nabol ahi, ti ahetna diu ahi." 
Psalms109:28 Amahon gaosap muhen, ahinla nangin phatthei boh-in, amaho ahungtho tengule, jahchao hen, ahinla nalhachapa kipahhen." 
Psalms109:29 Eidouho chu jachatna-in kivon henlang, sangkhol len ah bangin akisuhdong naova kikhu khumu hen." 
Psalms109:30 Keiman kakamin Pakai chu nasatah-in vahchoi jinge, henge, mipi lah-a amachu ka vahchoi ding ahi." 
Psalms109:31 Ajehchu ahinna themmo chansahho-a kona huhdoh dinga, ama migenthei ho jetlama ding ding ahi." 
Psalms110:1 Pakaiyin ka Pakai hengah, namelmate nakeng chotpha-a kaneisah masangsen, kajetlama toujingin, ati." 
Psalms110:2 Pakai chun Zion'a kona nathahatna mol lhon chu ahinsolding ahi. Na melmate lah-a vaihomin. 
Psalms110:3 Jingkah naobu-a kona thenna hoinaho-a, namite chu natha neina nikho-a kiphal tah-a kipedoh diu ahi, nangman nakhang donlai daitwi chu naneije." 
Psalms110:4 Pakai chu akihahseltan, alung akhel kit louding ahi; Nangma Melchizedec banga tonsot thempu nahi." 
Psalms110:5 Pakai nakhut jetna umchun, alunghan nikho leh lengho chu avoh lhuhding ahi." 
Psalms110:6 Aman Pathen hephalouho lah-a thu tan intin, munjouse chu thilonga adipsetna, gam tamtah luchangho chu amavoding ahi." 
Psalms110:7 Aman lampi dunga vachadung twi adonding, hijeh-a chu aman luchang chu adopsang ding ahi." 
Psalms111:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun; Mi kitah ho kikhopnale mipi kikhomho lah-a, kalung pumpin Pakai chu vahchoi jinge." 
Psalms111:2 Pakai thilbolho chu alenin, chule akipah hon hihochu akholdoh sohkeijuve." 
Psalms111:3 Athilbol chu ja umtahle loupitah ahin, achonphatna chu tonsotna umjing ahi." 
Psalms111:4 Aman athil kidang bolho chu geldoh jing dingin asemin; Pakai chu lungset them le lainatna-a dimset ahi. 
Psalms111:5 Ama gingho anneh apejin, akitepna chu tonsotna ahet jingding ahi." 
Psalms111:6 Pathen hephalouho gouchu amaho apeh theinadin, anatoh thaneije amite amusahtai." 
Psalms111:7 Akhutna anatohho thutah le thutandih ahin, athupeh jouse chu atahbeh ahi." 
Psalms111:8 Hicheho chu tonsot atonsotna din dettah-in ading jingin, chuleh hicheho chu thutah le chondih na-a tohdoh-a um ahi." 
Psalms111:9 Aman amite henga lhatdamna ahinsolin, akitepna chu tonsotnadin thupeh apen, amin chu atheng le ja um ahi." 
Psalms111:10 Pakai ginhi chihna kipatna ahi; athupeh bolho jousen hetthemna phatah aneijun, ama thangvahna chu tonsotnin aumjinge." 
Psalms112:1 Pakai chu vahchoijin umhen. Pakai ginga chule athupehho jouse-a kipah-a michu anunnom ahi. 
Psalms112:2 Leichunga achilhahte hung hatdiu, mikitah ho khang chu phattheiboh changding ahi." 
Psalms112:3 A-insunga neile gou le haona umding, achonphatna chu imatih chana umding ahi." 
Psalms112:4 Mikitah ho dingin muthim lah jenga jong kho avahjin; ama lungset them, milainatpina dimset le chonphatah ahi." 
Psalms112:5 Mipha chun mi asulunglhaijin, thilpha ahomin; chingtheitah-a akhosahdan akivetphat ding ahi." 
Psalms112:6 Tahbeh-a ama a-imatih chana longlou ding; michonpha chu atonsotna hetna umjing ding ahi. 
Psalms112:7 Aman thuse akichat louhel ding; alung adetnin, Pakai atahsanin ahi." 
Psalms112:8 Alungthim kiphut detna ahin, amelmate chunga angaichat amukahse-a, ama kichalou ding ahi." 
Psalms112:9 Aman athe jal-in, mivaichate apen, achonphatna chu a-imatih chana umjing ding; aki chu jabolna-a choisanga umding ahi." 
Psalms112:10 Migilouvin hichu muntin lungkham ding, aha agela, junmang ding ahi; migilou ngaichat chu mangthah ding ahi." 
Psalms113:1 Pakai chu vahchoijin umhen; Vo Pakai sohten vahchoijun, nanghon Pakai minchu vahchoijun." 
Psalms113:2 Tua patnin tonsot geijin Pakai min chu nunnom hen. 
Psalms113:3 Niso apat nilhum geijin Pakai min chu vahchoijin umhen. 
Psalms113:4 Pakai chu namjouse chunga asangpen ahin, aloupina chu van ho jouse chungvuma uma ahi." 
Psalms113:5 Chungsanga cheng Pakai i-Pathen'u tobang koi umma," 
Psalms113:6 van'a leh leija thil umho vedinga, ama tobanga kineosah jeng koi umintem!" 
Psalms113:7 Leivuija konin mivaicha akaithouvin, alhasamho vutbol lah-a konin aphong dingin;" 
Psalms113:8 Chutia chu pipuiho toh, amite lah-a pipuiho ngeitoh atou khomsah thei nading ahi." 
Psalms113:9 Chate neija minu kipahtah bangin, aman numei ching chu in apen ahi. Pakai chu vahchoijin umhen." 
Psalms114:1 Egypt'a kona Israel ahungpot doh-u, chule paomah ho-a kona Jacob insung mite apotlai chun," 
Psalms114:2 Judah chu amuntheng anahin, Israel chu alenggam anahi." 
Psalms114:3 Twikhanglen'in hichu amun, ajam mangin, Jordan alelon kit tai." 
Psalms114:4 Molsangho chu kelngoichal bangin akichomun, lhangneohochu kelngoinou bangin akichomuvin ahi."

Psalms115:1 Keiho heng hilouvin, vo Pakai keiho heng hilouvin, amavang nami hepina le nathutah jal-in nangma minin loupina pen." 
Psalms115:2 Ibola Pathen hephalouten, a-Pathen'u tu-a hoiba hitam? atiu ham?" 
Psalms115:3 Ahinla i-Pathen'u van ho-a uma ahin, aman adeichan abol ahi." 
Psalms115:4 Amilimu chu dangka le sana ahin, mihemho khutsoh ahi." 
Psalms115:5 Amahon kam aneijun, apaothei pouvin; mit aneijun, ahinla kho amupouve." 
Psalms115:6 Amahon bil aneijun, ahinla ajapouvin; nah aneijun, ahinla imacha nam ajapouve." 
Psalms115:7 Amahon khut aneijun, imala akhoithei pouvin; keng aneijun, achethei pouvin, alolhomuva konin jong apaothei pouve." 
Psalms115:8 Amaho semho chu amaho bangbep ahin; amaho tahsan chan jong chutichu ahi. 
Psalms115:9 Vo Israel, Pakai chu tahsanun, ama chu apanpiule alumdalu ahi." 
Psalms115:10 Vo Aaron insung mite, Pakai chu tahsanun, ama chu apanpiule alumdalu ahi." 
Psalms115:11 Pakai ging nanghon, Pakai chu tahsanun, amachu apanpiule alumdallu ahi." 
Psalms115:12 Pakaiyin eikhohsah jingun phatthei eibohdiu ahi; Aman Israel insung phatthei abohding, aman Aaron insung phatthei abohding ahi." 
Psalms115:13 Aman Pakai gingho chu alen aneo agoma phatthei abohding ahi. 
Psalms115:14 Pakaiyin nangho hapuna napunsahdiu, chule nachateo apunsah chehdiu ahi." 
Psalms115:15 Nangho chu vanle leiset sem, Pakai phattheiboh nahiuve." 
Psalms115:16 Vanle vanho tah chu Pakaiya ahin, leiset vanghi mihem chate anapeh ahi." 
Psalms115:17 Mithin Pakai avahchoipon, thipchetna chesuh-in jong avahchoipoi." 
Psalms115:18 Ahivangin eihonvang tua pat tonsot geijin Pakai chu vahchoi ute. Pakai chu vahchoijun. 
Psalms116:1 Keiman Pakai kangailui; ajehchu aman ka aw leh kataona eijahpeh tan ahi. 
Psalms116:2 Ajehchu aman kahenglama ana asungin, hijeh-a chu kahin laise-a ama kakoujing ding ahi." 
Psalms116:3 Thina lung gentheina-in eium kimvelin, thilkholkhul thohlel nahon eimanin, lungkhamna le lungdonna katoh-in ahi." 
Psalms116:4 Chujouvin keiman Pakai min kakouvin, vo Pakai, kangeh nahi, kahinna huhhingin, kati." 
Psalms116:5 Pakai chu lungset themle chonphatah ahi; henge, i Pathen'u hi hepina-a dim ahi." 
Psalms116:6 Pakaiyin milhamho ahoitupmin, keima eiki sunem in, ahin aman eipanpie." 
Psalms116:7 Vo kahinna nacholngahna-a kiletan, ajehchu Pakaiyin naning lhinsah tan ahi." 
Psalms116:8 Ajehchu nangin kahinkho thina-a kon, kamit mitlhi-a kon, chule kakeng jong lhahmangna-a konin, nahuhdoh tan ahi." 
Psalms116:9 Mihing gamsunga chu, Pakai masanga kavale ding ahi." 
Psalms116:10 Keiman katahsanin, hijeh-a chu kasei ahi, nasatah-a bolgenthei kanahi." 
Psalms116:11 Mijouse hi ajouve, tin kana seiloi chelle." 
Psalms116:12 Keidinga aphatchom naho jeh-a, Pakai chu ipi kapeh ding hitam?" 
Psalms116:13 Huhhingna khon chu domsang ingting, Pakai minchu kou ing kate." 
Psalms116:14 Tun amite jouse masanga, Pakaiya kakitepna ho jouse peng kate." 
Psalms116:15 Pakai mitmu-a amithengte thichu manlutah ahi. 
Psalms116:16 Vo Pakai keima nasoh tahbeh kahi, nasohnu chapa nasohpa kahin, kakihen naho neisutlhah peh tai." 
Psalms116:17 Thangvahna chu kilhaina bangin nahenga toh ingting, Pakai minchu kouvinge."

Psalms116:19 Vo Jerusalem, nalailung laitah-a, Pakai henga kakitepna chu kapeh ding ahi, Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms117:1 Oh, namtin jousen, Pakai chu vahchoijun, mijousen ama vahchoijun." 
Psalms117:2 Ahepi lungsetna ichunguva aletjeh-in, chule Pakai thutah chu tonsotna umjing ahi. Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms118:1 Pakai chu aphat jeh-in, thangvahna peovin, ajehchu ahepina a-imatih chana umjing ahi." 
Psalms118:2 Ahepina a-imatih chana umjing ahi, tin Israel'in tun seijuhen." 
Psalms118:3 Ahepina imatih chana umjing ahi tin, tun Aaron insung miten seijuhen." 
Psalms118:4 Ahepina a-imatih chana umjing ahi tin, tun Pakai gingten seijuhen." 
Psalms118:5 Pakai chu lung gentheijin kakouvin, Pakaiyin eidon butnin mun lentah-a eikoije." 
Psalms118:6 Pakai chu keilama pang ahin, keima kicha ponge, mihemin i-eilo thei ding ham?" 
Psalms118:7 Pakai chu keimale eipanpi hoto pangkhom ahin; hijeh-a chu eihot bolte chunga kalungtup kamuding ahi. 
Psalms118:8 Mihem'a kingai sangin, Pakaiya tahsan ngap aphajoi." 
Psalms118:9 Pipuho-a kingai sangin, Pakaiya tahsan ngap aphajoi." 
Psalms118:10 Nam jousen keima eiumkim velun; ahivanga keiman Pakai mina amaho kasuhmang ding ahi. 
Psalms118:11 Amahon eiumchah taove, henge, amahon eiumchah taove; ahivanga keiman Pakai mina amaho kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Psalms118:12 Khoi bangin eitomchah un, meisi lingnei banga suhmit ahiuve; ajehchu keiman Pakai mina amaho kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Psalms118:13 Nangin kalhuhna dingin hatah-in neihin sonin; ahinla Pakaiyin eikithopin ahi. 
Psalms118:14 Pakai chu kathahatna le kala ahin, ama kahuhhingpa ahung hitai." 
Psalms118:15 Kipanale huhhingna aw ginchu, michonpha houbuho-a chun aumin; Pakai khutjet nin hangsan tah-in aboljin ahi." 
Psalms118:16 Pakai khutjet chu choisangin aumtan, Pakai khutjet nin hangsan tah-in aboljin ahi." 
Psalms118:17 Keima thilouva kahin ding, chule Pakai thilbolho chu kaphondoh ding ahi." 
Psalms118:18 Pakaiyin eisehgim behsehtan; hinla thinagei lomin eina pedohpon ahi. 
Psalms118:19 Chonphatna kotpiho chu neihon peh-in, asunguva lutning ting, Pakai chu vahchoi jinge." 
Psalms118:20 Hichehi michonpha lut nading, Pakai kotpi ahin." 
Psalms118:21 Nangma vahchoi jinge, ajehchu nangman neingaipeh-in, kahuhhingpu nahunghitai." 
Psalms118:22 In sahon anot thapmu song chu, inning songpi penin ahung pangtai." 
Psalms118:23 Hichehi Pakai thilbol ahin, imitnuva kidangtah ahi." 
Psalms118:24 Hichehi Pakai sem nikho chu ahin, hichea hi ikipa thanop diu ahi." 
Psalms118:25 Tun huhhingin, vo Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, vo Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, tun phattheina hinsolin." 
Psalms118:26 Pakai mina hungpa chu anun nome, Pakai in'a konin phatthei kahinboh uve." 
Psalms118:27 Pathen hi vah eimusah-u Pakai chu ahi; ganlhaina chu maicham kiho-a khao ho-a chun henuvin. 
Psalms118:28 Nangma ka Pathen nahin kavahchoi ding nahi; nangma ka Pathen nahin kachoi sang ding nahi. 
Psalms118:29 Oh, aphatjeh-in Pakai chu thangvah un, ajehchu ahepina a-imatih chana umjing ahi." 
Psalms119:1 Lamlhah-a kisubohlou, Pakai danthua chonpa chu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms119:2 Ahettohsah naho tuhdetna, chule lungthim pumpi-a ama holla chu anunnom ahi." 
Psalms119:3 Amahon khangitlou jong abol pouvin, ama lamlhah-a chun acheuvin ahi." 
Psalms119:4 Chingthei tah-a nachon danho nitdingin, nangin thupeh neipeuvin ahi." 
Psalms119:5 Nachon danho kajuina dinga kachon dingdan eikihila hitavele o! 
Psalms119:6 Nathupeh jouse kajabol tengle keima jahcha taponge. 
Psalms119:7 Nachon phatna thutan naho kakihil tengle, lungtheng tah-a kavahchoi ding nahi." 
Psalms119:8 Nachon danho kanitjing ding ahin; nangman neidalha manghel hih-in. BETH 
Psalms119:9 Khangdongin alampi iti asuhtheng thei ding ham? Nathu dungjuija chingthei tah-a hinkho amana kon hiding ahi. 
Psalms119:10 Kalung pumpin nangma kanaholle, O nathupeh ho-a konin neilam vaisah loujenin." 
Psalms119:11 Nangma douna-a kachonset kit lou nadin, nathu kalung sunga kaselle." 
Psalms119:12 Vo Pakai anunnom nahi, nadanthu kisunho neihilin." 
Psalms119:13 Nakama nathutan lhahho jouse, kamuh-in kaphongdoh tan ahi." 
Psalms119:14 Haona jousetoh kikotnin, nathu hettohsah naho lampi achun kana thanomin ahi." 
Psalms119:15 Nachon danho keiman ngaito ingting, nalampi ho jabolinge." 
Psalms119:16 Nachondan kisunho-a kipah jinging ting; nathu chu kasuhmil louding ahi. GIMEL 
Psalms119:17 Kahin theina dingle, nathu kanit nadin, nasoh chunga hin kiphal tah-in na tongin." 
Psalms119:18 Nachondan thua kona thilkidang ho kamu theinadin, kamit hasah inlang hin." 
Psalms119:19 Leisetna kholjin kahin, nathupeh ho chu keija konin selhih-in." 
Psalms119:20 Nathutanlhah phattina lhangai na-in kahinna hi suhlam vaijin aumtan ahi. 
Psalms119:21 Nathupeh ho-a kon vahmanga, mikiletsah sapset changho chu naphohsalin ahi." 
Psalms119:22 Keija konin i-sah lounale housetna ho lamangin; ajehchu keiman nahettohsahna ho kanit jinge. 
Psalms119:23 Pipuiho jong atouvun chule eiseiseuvin, ahinla nasoh hin nadan kisunho kangaiton ahi." 
Psalms119:24 Na hettohsahna jong chu kakipanale eithumopma ahi. DALETH 
Psalms119:25 Kahinnahi leivuija abehchah tan; nathu dungjuijin neisuhalin. 
Psalms119:26 Kalamlhah ho kaphong doh-in, nangin neijahpeh tai; Na danthu kisunho neihilin." 
Psalms119:27 Nachondan lampiho neihet them sah-in; chutichun nathilbol kidangho seichoi lenge. 
Psalms119:28 Kahinna lungkhamin ajunlha tai; nathu dungjuijin neihatdoh sah-in. 
Psalms119:29 Jouseina lampi keija konin chondoh-in; lungsettah in nadanthu neipejotan. 
Psalms119:30 Thudih lampi chu kana lhengin; Nathu tanlhah ho kamasanga kakoije. 
Psalms119:31 Nathu hettoh sahho katuh jinge, O Pakai, neijumso hih-in." 
Psalms119:32 Kalung nakhantou sah tengle, nathupeh lampia chun lhaijinge. HE" 
Psalms119:33 Vo Pakai na danthu kisunho lampi neihilin, chutile akhonna geija kachintup ding ahi." 
Psalms119:34 Nadanthu kanit theina dingin hetkhen themna neipen, henge, kalung pumpin nit ing kate." 
Psalms119:35 Na thupeho lampia neiche sah-in, Ajehchu hichea chu kipah kahi." 
Psalms119:36 Kiloset lam hilouvin, nathu hetohsahna lama chun neilunglut sah-in." 
Psalms119:37 Manmo vetna-a konin kamit heimangin, chule nalampi-a neisuhalin." 
Psalms119:38 Nangma ginna-a lunglut, nasohpa henga nathu sudetnin." 
Psalms119:39 I-eikisah louna kakichat hi heimangin, ajehchu nathu tanlhahna chu aphan ahi." 
Psalms119:40 Vetan, nachondan thuchu kalhangai jinge, nachon phatna-a neisuhalin. VAU" 
Psalms119:41 Vo Pakai nami hepina kahenga hunghen, nathudih dungjuijin nahuhhingna jong hunglhung hen." 
Psalms119:42 Nathu katahsan jala, i-sah louva eibolho chu adonbutna kaneiding ahi." 
Psalms119:43 Kakama kona thutah thu chu lamanghel hih-in, ajehchu nathu tanna-a kinema kahi." 
Psalms119:44 Chutia chu nadanthu tanglouva, atonsot atonsot geija kanit ding ahi." 
Psalms119:45 Nachondan thuho kahole jeh-in, keima chamlhat tah-in choninge." 
Psalms119:46 Lengho angsunga jong nathu hettohsah ho seijing ting, chule keima jahchaponge." 
Psalms119:47 Chule kanangailut jing, nathupeh ho-a chun kipah inge." 
Psalms119:48 Kanangailut jing, nathupeh ho lama chun kakhut jong domsang inting, nadan kisunho ngaitonge. ZAYIN" 
Psalms119:49 Achunga neikinep sahna, nasoh thusei chu geldoh-in." 
Psalms119:50 Nathun hinna eipeh jala, hichehi kahesohna-a kalhamona hiding ahi" 
Psalms119:51 Mikiletsah-in nasatah-in einuisatnin, ahinla nadanthu-a konin kalhadah dehpoi." 
Psalms119:52 Vo Pakai malaija nathu tanlhah ho chu kahejingin, lhamon nan kaneijin ahi." 
Psalms119:53 Nadanthu nungsun mikhang gilouho jeh-in, kichatnin kadimtan ahi." 
Psalms119:54 Ka kholjina insunga dinga la chu, Nadanthu kisunho chu ahi." 
Psalms119:55 Vo Pakai namin chu janteng kageldohjin, nadanthu chu kanit jingin ahi." 
Psalms119:56 Nachon danthu kavetup jeh-in, hichehi kanei ahi. HETH" 
Psalms119:57 Vo Pakai nangma keija nahi; nathu kanit ding ahi tin kanaseije. 
Psalms119:58 Kalung pumpin nalungsetna kangeh-e; nathu dungjuijin hepina neineijin. 
Psalms119:59 Kalampi ho kangaiton, nathu hettohsahna lama kakeng kahei tai." 
Psalms119:60 Nathupeh ho nitdingin kakinon, kageisangpoi." 
Psalms119:61 Mikhang gilou kiloihon eichomun; ahivangin nadanthu chu kasumil pon ahi. 
Psalms119:62 Nachon phatna thutan ho jeh-in, khangkim laijin thouving ting nangma thangvah inge." 
Psalms119:63 Nangma ginghole nachondan thu nit ho jouse dinga loile gol kahi. 
Psalms119:64 Vo Pakai, leiset hi nahepina dimset ahi; nadanthu kisunho neihilin. TETH" 
Psalms119:65 Vo Pakai nathu dungjuijin, nasohhi neibol phalheh jengin ahi." 
Psalms119:66 Thutan dihtah leh hetna neihilin, ajehchu nathupeh katahsanin ahi." 
Psalms119:67 Eiki bolgim masang chun kana vahmangin, hinla tunvang nathu kanit tai." 
Psalms119:68 Nangma naphan, thilpha nabole; Nadan kisun ho neihilin." 
Psalms119:69 Mi kiletsah-in kei dounan jou asemthun, kenvang kalung pumpin nadanthuho vetup inge." 
Psalms119:70 Alungu sathao bangin athaovin, keivang nadanthu-a kipah inge." 
Psalms119:71 Nadanthu kisun ho kahet theina dinga, eiki bolgim chu keidingin aphan ahi." 
Psalms119:72 Sanale dangka sang tamtah sangin, nakama danthu sohdoh chu keidin aphajon ahi. YOD" 
Psalms119:73 Nangman nakhutna neisema neigontoh ahin; nathupeh kahet theina din hetkhen themna neipen. 
Psalms119:74 Nathu-a kinema kaumjing jeh-in, nangma ginghon eimu tengule kipah unte." 
Psalms119:75 Vo Pakai nathu tanlhah ho adih-in, tahsan umtah-a neibolgim ahi ti kahei." 
Psalms119:76 Katao ahi, nasoh henga nathusei dungjuijin, nahepi lungsetna chu kalha mona hihen." 
Psalms119:77 Kahin theinadin, nahepina thah chu kahenga hunghen; ajehchu nadanthu chu kakipana ahi." 
Psalms119:78 Ajehbeija eibolval jeh uvin, mi kiletsahho chu jahchao hen, keiman vang, nachondan thuho chu kangaito jinge." 
Psalms119:79 Nangma gingho, nathu hetohsah heho chu keima lama hungkihei juhen." 
Psalms119:80 Kajachat louna din, kalunghi nadanthu kisun ho-a det hen. KAPH" 
Psalms119:81 Nahuhhingna ngaichan, kahinna alhasamtai; ahinla nathun kakineme." 
Psalms119:82 Nathu-a dingin kamit alosamtai, itihle neilhamon ding ham? kati." 
Psalms119:83 Meikhu lah-a hai um tobang kahitai; hijongle nadanthu kisun chu kasumilpoi. 
Psalms119:84 Nasoh nikho hohi ijat-ham, eisugentheiho chunga itihle thu natan ding ham?" 
Psalms119:85 Mi kiletsah nadanthu banga umlouhon, kokhuh eilaipeh uvin ahi." 
Psalms119:86 Nathupeh ho jouse tahsan um ahin, amahon dihlou tah-in eibolgimuve, neipanpin." 
Psalms119:87 Amahon leiset chungahi eisuhmang konu ahitan; kenvang nachondan thuho kadalhapon ahi. 
Psalms119:88 Nalungset hepina bangin neisem thah-in, chutichun nakamsung thu hettohsah chu juijinge. LAMED" 
Psalms119:89 Vo Pakai, nathuhi a-imatih chanin van'a aumjinge." 
Psalms119:90 Nakitahna chu khang jouse-a aumin; nangman leiset naphut doh-in, hichu aumjingin ahi." 
Psalms119:91 Nahou danthupeh dungjuijin amaho tulai geijin aumjinge; ajehchu abonchauva nasohte ahiuvin ahi. 
Psalms119:92 Nadanthu hi kakipana hilou hile, kalung hesoh-a chu anamangthah ding kahitai." 
Psalms119:93 Nachondan thuho chu a-itih in sumil pong kate, ajehchu hicheho-a chu hinna neina peh ahi." 
Psalms119:94 Nanga kahi, neihuhhing in, ajehchu nachondan thuho kanaholin ahi." 
Psalms119:95 Mi khangilou chun suhmang dingin eingah-e, ahivangin nathu hetohsahna ho kagel jing ding ahi." 
Psalms119:96 Chamkimna jouse akhonna kamutai; ahin nathupeh vang ajao lheh jengin ahi. MEM 
Psalms119:97 Oh, nadanthu hi iti kangailut hitam! nilhumkeijin kangaitojin ahi." 
Psalms119:98 Nathupeh ho-a kona kamelmate sanga chingjoa neisem ahi; ajehchu hichu keitoh aum jingin ahi. 
Psalms119:99 Eihilho jouse sangin hetthemna kaneijoi; ajehchu nathu hettohsah naho chu kangaiton ahi. 
Psalms119:100 Nachondan thuho kavet tup jal-in, malai miho sangin hetkhen themna kaneijoi." 
Psalms119:101 Nathu kanit theina din, setna lampi ho-a konin kakeng kakangsen ahi." 
Psalms119:102 Nathu tanlhah na-a konin kana kihei mangpoi; ajehchu nangma tah-in nei nahilsa ahi. 
Psalms119:103 Nathuhohi keija dinga iti lhuma hitam! Henge, kakama khoiju sangin alhumjon ahi." 
Psalms119:104 Nachondan thuho-a konin hetkhen themna kaneijin; hijeh chun lampi dih lou jouse kathen ahi. NUN 
Psalms119:105 Nathuhi kakeng dinga thaomei ahin, ka lampi dingin vah ahi." 
Psalms119:106 Keima nachonphat nathutan ho nit dingin, kaki hahsel in kaphut det tai." 
Psalms119:107 Vo Pakai eiki bolgim behsehtan; nathu dungjuijin neisuhalin. 
Psalms119:108 Vo Pakai kangeh ahi, kakama lungcham thilpeh hi sangin lang, nathu tanlhah naho chu neihilin." 
Psalms119:109 Kahinna kakhutna aumjingin; hijongle nadanthu kasumil dehpoi. 
Psalms119:110 Mi khang gilou chun thang eikampeh-in; hijongle na danthuho-a konin kavahmang dehpon ahi. 
Psalms119:111 Nathu hettohsah naho chu katonsot goudin kakilah-e; ajehchu hicheho chu kalung kipana ahi. 
Psalms119:112 Akhonna geija nadanthu kisunho tohdoh nadin, kalungthim kapetan ahi. SAMEK" 
Psalms119:113 Mohthil ngaitohi kahon, ahin, nadanthu vang kangailun ahi." 
Psalms119:114 Nangma kakiselna munle kalumdal nahin, nathu-a kakineme." 
Psalms119:115 Nangho khanset bolho, keijakonin potdoh-un, ajehchu ka Pathen thupeh ho chu kanga tup ding ahi." 
Psalms119:116 Kahin theinadin nathu dungjuijin neituh-in, kakinepna-a neijachat sah hih-in." 
Psalms119:117 Neituh detnin chutileh kahoidoh ding ahi; chule nadanthu kisun ho tanglouva kajabol ding ahi. 
Psalms119:118 Nadanthu kisunho-a kona vahmangho jouse chu nachotpha tai; ajehchu amilhep lhahnao chu jou ahi. 
Psalms119:119 Nangin migilouho jouse chu thih-eh bangin nasumangin, hijeh chun nathu hettohsah naho kangailun ahi." 
Psalms119:120 Katahsa nangma ginan akihotnin, chule nathutannaho chu kakichan ahi. AYIN" 
Psalms119:121 Thutandih le chonphatna kabole, eibol gentheiho hengah eidalha hih-in." 
Psalms119:122 Nasoh phatnadin kitungin lang, mihoitho chu eisuh genthei sah hih-in." 
Psalms119:123 Nahuhhing nale nachon phatna thu holna-a konin, kamit hi alhasam tai." 
Psalms119:124 Nami hepina dungjui jin nasoh hi bolin lang, nadanthu kisemho neihilin." 
Psalms119:125 Keima nasoh kahin; nathu hettohsah naho kahet khen thei nadin, het themna neipen." 
Psalms119:126 Pakai nang dinga natoh phat ahitai; ajehchu nadanthu anotthap taovin ahi. 
Psalms119:127 Hijeh chun sana sangin nathupeh kangailun; henge, sana thengsel sangin kangailu jon ahi." 
Psalms119:128 Hijeh chun nachondan thuho jouse, adih ding thil jouse kajabolin; lampi dihlou jouse kathen ahi. PE" 
Psalms119:129 Nathu hettohsahnaho chu kidangtah ahin; hijeh-a chu kahinna-in hiho chu anitding ahi. 
Psalms119:130 Nathu lutna chun vah apejin, hichun milhamho hetkhen themna apejin ahi." 
Psalms119:131 Kakam kan, kahaihai jenge; ajehchu nathupeh ho kangaichan ahi." 
Psalms119:132 Namin ngailuho nabolnaji bangchun, keima neivenlang, neihepi tan." 
Psalms119:133 Nathu-a kakholhah ho thu penlang, kachunga khansetna himhim vaipohsah hihbeh-in." 
Psalms119:134 Mihem suhgentheina-a konin neihuh doh-in, chutichun nachondan thuho nit inge." 
Psalms119:135 Nasoh chunga hin namai vahsah inlang, nadanthu kisun ho neihilin." 
Psalms119:136 Amahon nadanthu anit loujeh-un, kamit lhi vadung twi bangin alonglhan ahi. TSADDE" 
Psalms119:137 Vo Pakai nangma chonpha nahin, nathutan ho chu dihtah ahi." 
Psalms119:138 Nangin napeh nathu hettohsah naho chu, chonpha le kitah ahi." 
Psalms119:139 Kamelma ten nathu asuhmil jeh-un, katompan na-in eisumang tan ahi." 
Psalms119:140 Nathuhi athenglheh jengin, hijeh-a chu nasoh-in kangailun ahi." 
Psalms119:141 Keima neochale isahlou kahin, hijongle nachondan thuho chu kasumil pon ahi." 
Psalms119:142 Nachon phatna chu tonsot chonphatna ahin, nadanthu chu thutah ahi." 
Psalms119:143 Lungkhamnale natthoh lel-in eituhchah-in, hijongle nathupeh ho chu kakipana ahi." 
Psalms119:144 Nathu hettohsah naho chonphatna chu tonsotna ding ahin; hetkhen themna neipen, chule hingjing tange. KOPH" 
Psalms119:145 Kalung pumpin kakouve, neingaipeh-in, O Pakai, nadanthu kisun hi kanit ding ahi." 
Psalms119:146 Nangma kakouve, neihuhhing in, chutia chu nathu hettohsah naho kanit ding ahi." 
Psalms119:147 Khovah masangin kathouvin, chuin nang kakouvin, nathu-a kaki nem-e." 
Psalms119:148 Nathu kagelthei nadin, jankhon mitsing louvin kaumin ahi." 
Psalms119:149 Nalungset hepina dungjuijin ka aw ngaijin, vo Pakai nathutandih dungjuijin neisem thah-in." 
Psalms119:150 Thilphalou nung juiho chun eihin naijui; amaho nadanthu-a kona gamla ahiuve. 
Psalms119:151 Vo Pakai nangma nailamcha nahin, nathupeh jouse thudih ahi." 
Psalms119:152 Nathu hettohsah chungchanga, nangman tonsotna dinga naphudetsa ahitai, ti malaija pat kahet ahitai. RESH" 
Psalms119:153 Kathoh gimje hi ngaitonlang, neihuh doh-in, ajehchu nadanthu kasumilpon ahi." 
Psalms119:154 Kachungthu neisei lhahpeh inlang neihuh doh-in, nathu dungjuijin neisem thah-in." 
Psalms119:155 Huhhingna chu migilou ho-a kona gamlatah ahi; ajehchu amahon nadanthu kisun aholpouve. 
Psalms119:156 Vo Pakai nahepinaho chu nasatah ahi; Nathutanlhah dungjuijin neisem thah-in. 
Psalms119:157 Eisugentheile kamelma atam lheh-un; hijongle nathu hetohsah na ho-a konin kalhasam dehpoi. 
Psalms119:158 Suhkhel neiho kaven, nathu achintuplou jeh-un kalung akhamin ahi." 
Psalms119:159 Ngaito temin, nadanthuho iti kangailut hitam; vo Pakai nalungset hepina dungjuijin neisem thah-in." 
Psalms119:160 Atil abula pat nathu hi adih-in; chule nachon phatna thutan ho chu tonsotnin aumjingin ahi. SCHIN 
Psalms119:161 Ajehbeijin pipuihon eisugentheijun; ahinla kalunghi nathu-a tijatah-in ading jingin ahi. 
Psalms119:162 Thil tamtah chomdohho bangin, nathu-a hin katha anomlheh jie." 
Psalms119:163 Jouhi kathen kakidah-in, Na danthu vang kangailun ahi." 
Psalms119:164 Nachon phatna nathutan naho jeh-in, nikhatnin sagivei nangma kathangvah-e." 
Psalms119:165 Nadanthu ngailuhon chamna loupitah aneijun; imachan amaho asuhmo louding ahi. 
Psalms119:166 Pakai nami huhhingna-a kakinemin kangah-in, nathupeh ho kabolin ahi." 
Psalms119:167 Kahinna-in nathu hetohsahna ho anitjingin, nasatah-in kangailun ahi." 
Psalms119:168 Na danthu kisunhole nathu hetohsahna kanitjinge; ajehchu kalampiho jouse na masanga aumin ahi. TAU 
Psalms119:169 Vo Pakai kakana nakom hunglhung hen, nathu dungjuijin hetkhen themna neipen." 
Psalms119:170 Kataona na-ang hunglhung hen, nathu dungjuijin neihuhdoh in." 
Psalms119:171 Kakamin navahchoina aphondoh ding ahi, ajehchu nangman nadanthu kisunho neihile." 
Psalms119:172 Kaleijin nathuho aseiding ahi; ajehchu nathupeh jouse chonphatna ahi. 
Psalms119:173 Nachondanthuho kalhen jeh-in, nakhut chun eiki thopihen." 
Psalms119:174 Vo Pakai nami huhhingna kalhangaijin, nadanthu hi kakipana ahi." 
Psalms119:175 Kahinna hinsah in, chuteng kavahchoi ding nahi, chule nathutan lhahna-a chun neipanpin." 
Psalms119:176 Kelngoi mang bangin kana vahmang tai; nasohhi neihin hollin, ajehchu nathupeh kasumilpon ahi."

Psalms120:3 Jou seija leigui, nangma ipi kapeh-a, ahilouleh ipi kabolpeh dingham?" 
Psalms120:4 Mihat thalchang ho hemtah leh makeithing meihol ahi.

Psalms125:3 Ajehchu miphalouho moltum chu michonpha ho chunga chulouding, achutiloule chonphaten khangitlou na-a khut lhang getnunte."

Psalms126:1 Pakaiyin sohchangho Zion'a alepuikit laichun, eiho mang neiho toh ibangun ahi." 
Psalms126:2 Chuche laichun ikamu chu nuinale ileijuva lasahna anadimin ahi. Chujouchun amahon Pathen hephalouho lah-a Pakaiyin amaho thil loupitah abolpeh uve, anatiuvin ahi." 
Psalms126:3 Pakaiyin thil loupitah einabolpeh-un, chua chun eiho ikipah uve." 
Psalms126:4 Vo Pakai, lhanglam luidungho bangin, kasohchang hou hinlepui kitnin." 
Psalms126:5 Mitlhi puma tu hochun kipahtah-a a-atdiu ahi. 
Psalms126:6 Muchi lutah choija, kapumma kondohpa chun, achangphal ahin kipoh-a, thanom tah-a hungkile kitding ahi." 
Psalms127:1 In sa-a Pakai apanlouleh, asaho tohgimna chu moh ahin; Khopi ngah-a Pakai apanlou leh, angahpa janha chu moh ahibouve." 
Psalms127:2 Matah-a natho-a, jan sottah natouva, lungkhamna changlhah neh chu, nangdinga pannabei ahi: ajehchu aman angailut chu a-imutsah jin ahi." 
Psalms127:3 Veovin chatehi Pakaiya kon gouchan ahin, chule laigilga jonghi akipaman thilpeh ahi." 
Psalms127:4 Khangdon laija chate hi, Galhatpa khutna thalchang ho tobang ahi." 
Psalms127:5 Alivathei dimsetna hicheho neija mi chu anunnom ahi; amaho jahcha loudiu, ahivanga amelmateu toh kotpi phunga kihoujo diu ahi." 
Psalms128:1 Pakai ging jouse leh alampiho-a chonchan chu anunnom ahi. 
Psalms128:2 Ajehchu nakhutna natohgim ga naneh ding; nangman nomsan natin, chule hichu nang dinga phading ahi." 
Psalms128:3 Na inneipi chu na-in vella lengpigui ga phatah bangintin; nachate chu nadokhang kimvela Olive phung tobang hidiu ahi. 
Psalms128:4 Vetan, chutia Pakai ginga mi chu phatthei chang ding ahi." 
Psalms128:5 Pakaiyin Zion'a konin phatthei naboh intin; chule nahin laise-a Jerusalem phatna chu namu ding ahi. 
Psalms128:6 Henge, nachateo chatele Israelte chunga chamna chu namu ding ahi." 
Psalms129:1 Tuhin Israel ten seijuhen; kakhangdon laijapat tamtahvei einabol gimuve. 
Psalms129:2 Kakhangdon laijapat tamtahvei einabolgim uvin; hijongle amahon eijoudeh pouve. 
Psalms129:3 Loukaihon katungtun chunga akaijun; akainau nung saotah-in akigolin ahi. 
Psalms129:4 Pakai chu chonphatna ahin; migilouho khaojang chu aman asatan tan ahi. 
Psalms129:5 Zion hotbolho jouse chu jahchao henlang hung kinung leuhen. 
Psalms129:6 Amaho chu akhandoh kah-a goppai jia in chunga hampa tobang bep hiuhen. 
Psalms129:7 Hiche achun chang at pan akhut adip pon; chujongle changphal kanpan jong a-ang adip poi. 
Psalms129:8 Avahleho koiman, nangho Pakai phatthei boh changun, Pakai Minna phatthei kaboh nahiuve, tia seija aumpoi." 
Psalms130:1 Vo Pakai, kokhuh thuhtah-a konin nangma kahinsamme." 
Psalms130:2 Pakai ka aw ngaijin, kangehna aw hi ngai nadin nana hinsungin." 
Psalms130:3 Pakai nangin khangit lounaho namelchih-a ahile, O Pakai koiham adingjou dinga." 
Psalms130:4 Ahinla ginna naum theinadin nahenga ngaidamna chu aumme. 
Psalms130:5 Pakai chu kangah-in, kahinna hin angah jingin, athu-a chun kinemin kaume." 
Psalms130:6 Jingkhovah ngahho sangin nasajon, kahinna hin Pakai chu angah-e. Henge, jing khovah ngah ho sangin kamasajoi." 
Psalms130:7 Israel chu Pakaiya kinemhen; ajehchu Pakaiya hepina leh lhatdamna chamkim aumin ahi. 
Psalms130:8 Chule aman akhangit lounao jouse-a kona Israel chu alhatdoh ding ahi. 
Psalms131:1 Pakai kalungthim hi akiletsahpon, kamit jong akichoisangpoi. Keidinga thil len hole thil sang behsehho-a jong kakijil ngaipoi." 
Psalms131:2 Tahbeh-in anu noichep bangsa naosen bangin, thip khinkhen chan kaumin, ka hinna hi naosen noichep bangsa tobanghel ahi." 
Psalms131:3 Tu-a kipat a-imatih chana din, Pakaiya chun Israelte kinem uhen." 
Psalms132:1 Pakai David leh athoh hahsatna jouse chu geldoh-in. 
Psalms132:2 Pakai henga iti ama kitepma, chule Jacob Pathen hat chungnung henga iti ana kihahsela hitam." 
Psalms132:3 Atahbeh-in ka insunga lutpong ting, kajalkhuna jong kicholdo din lutponge;" 
Psalms132:4 Kamit ho imutsah pongting, ahiloule lulhuh jong lulhuh sah ponge." 
Psalms132:5 Pakaiya dinga munkhat kamudoh kahsen, hat chungnung Jacob Pakai dinga chendetna in kamudoh kahsen." 
Psalms132:6 Veovin, hiche thuchu Ephratah'a kajauvin; gammang lah-a chun kamutaove." 
Psalms132:7 Ama houbuh sunga eiho cheohitin; eihon akhophang bullah houvu hite. 
Psalms132:8 O Pakai, thoudoh-in, nacholdona sunga lutnin; nangmale nathahatna thingkhong toh kipatdohtan." 
Psalms132:9 Nathemputeu chonphat na-in kivonuhen; chule namithengte kipah-in ao vuhen. 
Psalms132:10 Ajehchu nasoh David jal-in, nathaonupa mai chu heimangpeh hih-in." 
Psalms132:11 Pakai chu David henga thutah in akihahselin; chua kona kiheimang lou ding; nanga kona hung doh khat, nalaltouna chunga katousah ding ahi." 
Psalms132:12 Keiman amaho kahilding kathu lhunle kathu hetohsah nahi, nachaten anit uva ahile amaho jongchu a-imatih chana nalal touna chunga touding ahiuve." 
Psalms132:13 Ajehchu Pakaiyin achenna ding anadeitan; Zion chu analhengtan ahi. 
Psalms132:14 Hichehi a-imatih channa kacholngah na ahin; kadeitah anahijeh-in, hia hin chengjing tange." 
Psalms132:15 Aneh dingu nengtah-in phungvuh ingting; ami gentheite changlhah-in vah vange. 
Psalms132:16 Athemputeu huhhingna-in von ingting, chule amithengte kipa aw-thonga ao dingu ahi." 
Psalms132:17 Chukoma chu keiman David ki kadotdoh sah ding; kathaonu dinga chun thaomei khat kaphudet pehtai. 
Psalms132:18 Amelmateu jachatna-in voning ting; ahinla ama tah chunga vang alallukhuh chu khangtou jing ding ahi. 
Psalms133:1 Veovin, sopi kitohtah-a chenkhomhi iti phatna iti nopma hitam!" 
Psalms133:2 Hichu luchunga thao mantam tah tobang ahin, khamula longlha-a, Aaron khamul geija longlhasuh tobang; aponchen mong geija jollha suhpeh tobang ahi." 
Psalms133:3 Hermon daitwi bangle, Zion molsangho chunga hunglhajia dai twiho tobang ahi. Ajehchu chua chun Pakaiyin tonsotna hinna ding phattheina thupeh chu apen ahi." 
Psalms134:1 Veovin, nangho Pakai sohte jouse, janna Pakai in'a dinghon Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms134:2 Munthenga chun nakhut domsangun lang, chule Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms134:3 Van leh leiset sempa Pakai chun Zion'a konin phatthei naboh-uhen. 
Psalms135:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun, nanghon Pakai minchu vahchoijun, vo nangho Pakai sohte, amachu vahchoijun." 
Psalms135:2 Nangho Pakai insunga dingteho, Pathen in hongsunga dingteho," 
Psalms135:3 Pakai chu aphat jeh-in, Pakai chu vahchoijun, nomtah ahijeh-in, aminin vahchoina la saovin." 
Psalms135:4 Ajehchu Pakaiyin ama ding tumin Jacob akilhenin, chule agou tum mong dingin Israel akilhentai." 
Psalms135:5 Ajehchu Pakai chu loupitah ahi kahen, chule I-Pakaiyu hi Pathen jouse chunga ahi." 
Psalms135:6 Pakaiyin alunglhaina chan chu van'a, leija, twikhanglen sunga chule mun thuhtah ho jouse-a aboljin ahi." 
Psalms135:7 Aman leiset kolmang ho-a konin twimeiho ajamdoh sah-in, go juhna dingin kolphe asemin, akholna in'a konin khohui ahin lhadohjin ahi." 
Psalms135:8 Aman Egypt gama mihem apeng masa mihem le gancha, agomin athat gamin ahi." 
Psalms135:9 Vo Egypt gam, Pharaoh chung leh asohte jouse chunga, aman melchihna le thil kidang nalah uva ahinsolin ahi." 
Psalms135:10 Namlenho asumangin, chule leng hattaho athat gamin ahi." 
Psalms135:11 Amor mite lengpa Sihon leh Bashan lengpa Og, chule Canaan lenggam ho jouse;" 
Psalms135:12 Chule agammu chu goulo din, ami Israelte gouchan din apetan ahi." 
Psalms135:13 Vo Pakai, namin chu tonsotnin aumjingin, chule vo Pakai, nahetjingna chu khangjouse lhumkeijin aumjinge." 
Psalms135:14 Ajehchu Pakaiyin amite thu atanding ahin, chule asohte chungchanga alung aheiding ahi." 
Psalms135:15 Pathen hephalouho milimhou chu dangka le sana, mihem khutna kisem ahi." 
Psalms135:16 Amahon kam aneijun ahinla apaothei pouvin, mit aneijun ahinla kho amupouvin;" 
Psalms135:17 Amahon nakhang aneijun ahinla kho ajapouvin, akam sunguva jong haina himhim aumpon ahi." 
Psalms135:18 Hicheho semho chu amaho tobangbou ahin; Chucheho tahsan chan jong chu chutima chu ahiuve. 
Psalms135:19 Vo Israel insung mite, Pakai chu vahchoijun; vo Aaron insung mite, Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms135:20 Vo Levi insung mite, Pakai chu vahchoijun; Pakai gingte nanghon, Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms135:21 Jerusalem'a cheng Pakai chu, Zion'a konin nunnom hen, Pakai chu vahchoijun," 
Psalms136:1 O aphat jeh-in Pakai henga thangvahna peuvin: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahin," 
Psalms136:2 O pathenho Pathen henga thangvahna peuvin: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:3 O pakaiho Pakai henga thangvahna peuvin: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:4 Amabou thilkidang loupitah bola ahi: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:5 Chihna-a vanho sempa henga chun: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:6 Twipi chunga leiset phajalpa henga chun: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:7 Vah loupitah sempa henga chun: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:8 Sunna vaihom dinga nisa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:9 Janna vaihom dinga lhale ahsi ho: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:10 Egypt'a apeng masa jouse thatgam pa henga: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:11 Chule amaho lah-a kona Israelte puidoh: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:12 Khut thahat tah le aban lhangdoh pa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:13 Twipisan hopni-a homkhenpa henga chun: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:14 Chule chuche lailung Israelte palgal kaisahpa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:15 Ahinla Pharaoh le ami janelho twipi san sunga lehlutpa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:16 Gamthip lhonlhunga amite puilhung helpa henga: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:17 Leng loupitah ho sumang helpa henga chun: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:18 Chule leng minthangho that gampa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:19 Amor mite lengpa Sihon: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:20 Chule Bashan lengpa Og: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:21 Chule agamu goulo dinga pe-a: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:22 Asoh Israel henga goulo dinga pepa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:23 Ilhahsam laitah uva eina geldoh pao: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:24 Chule imelmateuva kona eilhat dohpao: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:25 Tahsa-a hung jouse nehding pepa: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms136:26 O van Pathen henga thangvahna peuvin: ajehchu ami hepina tonsotna umjing ahi. 
Psalms137:1 Babylon vadungho pama chun katouvun, Zion kageldoh phatnun kakap taovin ahi." 
Psalms137:2 Huisum chungho-a chun ka selangdah hou kakhaijun ahi. 
Psalms137:3 Ajehchu chukoma gal hinga eipuimang houchun la khat angeh-un; chule eibolgenthei houchun kipahtah-in eijolun, Zion la khat neisah peh-un atiuve." 
Psalms137:4 Mi gama keihon Pakai la chu iti kasah dingu ham? 
Psalms137:5 Vo Jerusalem, nangma kasuhmila ahile, kakhut jetlam hin akhut themna sumil jenghen," 
Psalms137:6 nangma kageljing louva, kakipana pipen sanga Jerusalem kalhenjoh loule, kaleihi kadang chunga behden jenghen." 
Psalms137:7 Vo Pakai Jerusalem chim nikho-a, Edom miten anatoh-u chu geldoh-in; suchimun, a-inbul songho chu suchimun, tin asamui." 
Psalms137:8 Suhmang dinga uma vo, Babylon chanu, keiho neibolnao banga nale thuhpa chu kipah hen." 
Psalms137:9 Nachasenho man khoma songho jepna-a neipa chu kipah hen. 
Psalms138:1 Kalungthim pumpin nangma vahchoi jinge, pathenho masang-ah keiman nangma vahchoi La sange." 
Psalms138:2 Na houin thenglam ngan na houvingting, chule nalungset ngailutna le nathupeh jallin namin vahchoi jinge; ajehchu namin jouse chungvuma, nathu nachoisangtai." 
Psalms138:3 Katao nikhon nangman neidonbut in, chule kahinna thahat napen, nahatsah tai." 
Psalms138:4 Vo Pakai, amahon na kama thusoh ajah tengule, leiset leng jousen navahchoi diu ahi." 
Psalms138:5 Henge, amahon Pakai lampiho lan saovinte; ajehchu Pakai loupi nachu nasatah ahi." 
Psalms138:6 Pakai chu sanglheh jongle, mi noinungho ajaboljin, mi kiletsah vang gamlatah-in ahei." 
Psalms138:7 Lungkhamna lah-a vahle jongleng, nangin neisuhalin, kamelmate lunghanna chunga nakhut nalhan ding, chule najetlama nei huhhing ding ahi." 
Psalms138:8 Pakaiyin kachung chang thu chamkimsah inte, vo Pakai, nahepina tonsotna umjing ahi: Na khuttah-a nanatoh ho chu nungsun lou jenin." 
Psalms139:1 Vo Pakai nangin neikhochillin neihetai. 
Psalms139:2 Nangin katoulhah le kadindoh jong nahen, gamlatah-a konin ka lunggel ho jong nahen ahi." 
Psalms139:3 Nangin kalampi le kaluplhah nakhol toh-in, chule kalampiho jouse nahechen sohkeije." 
Psalms139:4 Ajehchu, vo Pakai, kaleija thu khatcha aumpon, ahinla vetan abonin na hesoh-in ahi." 
Psalms139:5 Nangin kanungle kama-a nei-um ton, kachunga nakhut nangamjin ahi." 
Psalms139:6 Chutobang hetna hi keidin akidang behseh-in, asangin, kasoh phajou poi." 
Psalms139:7 Nalhagaova kona hoilama kache-a, ahilouleh na-angsunga kona hoilama kajamding ham?" 
Psalms139:8 Van'a kaltou jongleng chu-a chun naumin, thikhol khul'a jalkhun kido jongleng, vetan, chumuna jong chun na-umme." 
Psalms139:9 Jingkah lhavingho kilah ingting, twikhanglen mongpeh-a gacheng jongleng," 
Psalms139:10 Chukom jenga jong chun nakhutnin neikaijin natin, nakhut jetna neituh ding ahi." 
Psalms139:11 Thonlouva muthimin eikhuding ahi tijongleng, jan jengjong chu kavela vah hiding ahi." 
Psalms139:12 Henge, muthim chu nanga konin akiselpon, jan chu sun bangin avahjoi, nangdia muthimle khovah ania kibang ahi." 
Psalms139:13 Ajehchu kasungil jouse jong nangma gontoh ahin, nangin kanu naobu sunga neinakhu ahi." 
Psalms139:14 Kichat um le kidangtah-a kisem kahi jeh-in, nangma Kavah choije; nanatoh hohi datmo aumin, chule hichu kahina hin ahechen lheh-e." 
Psalms139:15 Aguh-a eikisema chun ka gong hi namasanga akiselpoi, kidang tah-a leiset noinung pena eikisem ahi." 
Psalms139:16 Katibah jouse hi khatcha aum masang, chamkim loulai ka gong hi namitnin namun; nalekhabu-a chu hicheho jouse hi akisemjou masanga kisun sohkei ahitai." 
Psalms139:17 Vo Pathen nalunggel ho hi keidia iti mantam hitam! akisuhto khom chu iti natsatna hitam! 
Psalms139:18 Kasimding hitale neldi sanga tamjo ahiuvin; kakhahdoh jengin jong nangto kaum khom nalaije. 
Psalms139:19 Vo Pathen, migilou chu thonlouva nathatei ding ahin, hijeh chun nangho thisan sohatte, keija konin potdoh-un." 
Psalms139:20 Ajehchu nangma dounan giloutah-in thu aseijun, chule namelma ten mohseh-in namin apanuve." 
Psalms139:21 Vo Pakai nahote chu kahotbol louham? Chule nangma douna-a kipatdoh ho chunga kalungphatmo louham? 
Psalms139:22 Amaho chu hot atin kaho-in; kamelma-a kasimu ahitai. 
Psalms139:23 O Pathen, Neikhol chilin chule Kalungthim hi he-in; nei patepmin, chule kalunggel hohi hechenin." 
Psalms139:24 Chule ven keija hin khangitlouna lampi khattou aumdem, chule tonsot lampia chun neipuijin." 
Psalms140:1 Vo Pakai, miphalouva konchun neihuh doh-in, hunam miho-a konchun neiveng tupmin." 
Psalms140:2 Alunguvin lheplhahna angaitouvin, tanglouvin galboldin akikhom khom jiuve." 
Psalms140:3 Aleiju gul bangin anol hemun, alei noijuva gulsum gu aumme." 
Psalms140:4 Vo Pakai migilou khutna konin neingahphan, kachena suhboi ding eigo-a, hunam miho-a konin neihongphan." 
Psalms140:5 Mi kiletsah hon thang le khaohol eikampeh-un, lamsih-a lenthang aphaovin, amahon thang eikam khumuve." 
Psalms140:6 Keiman Pakai henga chun, nangma ka Pathen nahi kati, vo Pakai kataona aw hi ngaijin." 
Psalms140:7 Vo Pakai Pathen, kahuh hingna thahat; nangman gal kisat nikhon kalu neikhu peh-e." 
Psalms140:8 Vo Pakai, migilou ngaichat chu phalpeh hih-in, aduha lungthim gilou chu pilhinsah hih-in, achutiloule kichoisang getnunte." 
Psalms140:9 Eium chahho luchang chu, amaho kamtah-a lheplhahna chun khukhumhen." 
Psalms140:10 Mei am lenglung chu achunguva hungchu hen, ama ahung kithodoh kitna loudiuvin, kotong thuh tahle meikong lah-a chun kisep lutnu hen." 
Psalms140:11 Thuse seija leisetna kitungdoh hihhen, hunam mang chu setna-in suhlhuh dia anungjui ding ahi." 
Psalms140:12 Akibol gentheite thu leh vaichate dihna chu, Pakaiyin suhdih peh inte ti kahei." 
Psalms140:13 Michonphan thonlouva namin athangvah ding; Midih chu na angsunga cheng ding ahi. 
Psalms141:1 Pakai nangma kakouve, nangma kakou tengle ka aw-a hin nana hinsung loijin." 
Psalms141:2 Kataona ginnamtui bangin na-anga kitungdoh hen, chule kakhut dopsanghi nilhah lam ganlhaina bang hihen." 
Psalms141:3 Vo Pakai, kakam kamdal neikoi peh in, kakam nei ngatup peh-in." 
Psalms141:4 Kalungthim hi thilse lama lutsah hih-in, khanset bol mihem natoh phalou kijildin nopsah hih-in, chule a-anneh tuihou neinehsah hih-in." 
Psalms141:5 Michonphan eivohen, hichu lungsetna hinte, chule eiphohsal hen, hichu thao nasatah hiding ahi, hichun kalu suheh ponte, ajehchu avangsetnao sanna kataopeh ding ahi." 
Psalms141:6 Athutanhou songhol lah-a akipailhah tengle, hiche hochu alhum jeh-in, kathu ngaitao vinte," 
Psalms141:7 Khattouvin tolla thing atanna a-ea bangin, kaguhou lhankhuh kama akithecheh gamtai." 
Psalms141:8 Ahinla vo Pakai Pathen, kamitnin nangma lam akatjingin, nangma-a katahsan kangame, ka hinna hi gentheijin dalha hih-in." 
Psalms141:9 Keidinga athang kamhouva konle, khangitlou bolho-a konin neihongbit in." 
Psalms141:10 Keima kakitoldoh laitah-in, migilouho chu amahotah lensunga lhalut uhen." 
Psalms142:1 Ka aw-in Pakai kakouvin, ka aw in Pakai henga ngehna kaneije." 
Psalms142:2 Amasanga kalunglhai louna kasam phongin, a-angsunga kalung khamna kamusah-e." 
Psalms142:3 Kasunga um lhagao agenthei tengle, nangin kalampi nahejinai. Kakeng lamlhahna-a guhthimin amahon keidin thang eikampeh-un ahi." 
Psalms142:4 Kakhut jetlam kavetle, veuvin eihuhding mi khatchala aumpon; belding kaneipoi; Koimachan kahinna akhohsahpoi." 
Psalms142:5 Vo Pakai nahenga kataove; Nangma mihing gama kakiselna ding le kachan nahi katin ahi. 
Psalms142:6 Eikisuhneo behseh jeh-in, ka kana ngaijin, amaho kei sanga ahatjoh jeh-un, eibol gentheiho-a konin neihuh doh-in." 
Psalms142:7 Namin kavahchoi theinadin sohchan na-a konin kahinna puidoh in, nangman ninglhing keija neibolphat ding jeh-a, michonpha ten eiumkim veldiu ahi." 
Psalms143:1 Vo Pakai kataona ngaijin lang, kangehna-a nana sungin, nakitahna leh nachon phatna-a chun neidonbut in." 
Psalms143:2 Chule nasohhi thutan na-a nei lutpi hih-in, ajehchu namitmu-a mihing khatcha chonpha aumpoi." 
Psalms143:3 Ajehchu melman kahinna abolgimin, kahinkho hi tolla avolhun: sotna anathisaho bangin muthima eichen sah-e." 
Psalms143:4 Hijeh chun kalhagao kasunga athoh gimmin, kalungthim hi kasunga agoh ahitai." 
Psalms143:5 Khanglui nikhoho kageldoh in, nathilbol ho jouse kangaitojin, nakhut thilbolho kasutjin ahi." 
Psalms143:6 Nahenglam kakhutnin kahin sange, kahinna hi dangchah na gam bangin, nangma ngaicha-in adangchah-e." 
Psalms143:7 Vo Pakai neidonbut loijin, kalhagao alhasamtai, leiko sunga kumsuh ho kabah lounadin, keija konin namai selmang hih-in." 
Psalms143:8 Nangma katahsan jeh-in, jingkah teng nalungsetna neijah sah-in, kahinna naheng lama kadop sang jing jeh-in, chena ding lampi neihetsah-in." 
Psalms143:9 Vo Pakai kamelma te-a konin neihuh doh-in, nahenga kisel dinga hungjam kahi." 
Psalms143:10 Nangma ka Pathen nahi jeh-in nadeilam bolje neihilin, Na Lhagaohi aphai, chondihna gama neipuijin." 
Psalms143:11 Vo Pakai namin jal-in neihin sah-in, ajehchu nachon phatna jal-in, lungkham na-a konin kahinna hi puidoh-in." 
Psalms143:12 Chule nahepina-a kamelmate subei jinlang, kahinna bol gentheiteho jouse sumangin, ajehchu nalhacha kahi." 
Psalms144:1 Kakhutho galboldan, kakhut jungho galsatdan hillah; kahatna Pakai chu nunnom hen."
