Psalms144:2 Kahatnale kakulpi, ka insang le kakihuhdohna, kalumdal le katahsan kingapna, kamite kanoija kunsahpa." 
Psalms144:3 Pakai, mihemhi ipi hija, nahiti lungvil tenna! ahiloule mihem chapahi ipi hija, nahiti khohsah ham!" 
Psalms144:4 Mihemhi pannabei tobang ahin, anikhoho jong nisalim kiheimang bangbep bou ahi." 
Psalms144:5 Vo Pakai navanho sonkunin hungkum lhan lang, molsangho chu tongkha lechun, meikhun lengunte." 
Psalms144:6 Kolphetsah inlang amaho sucheh-in, nathalchangho kapdoh inlang amaho sumangin." 
Psalms144:7 Chunga konin nakhut hin lhangin lang, neilha doh-in, twipi nasatahho lah-a konle, gamdangmi chate-a konin neihuh doh-in;" 
Psalms144:8 Akamun thu manlou aseijun, akhut jetlamu chu joujou khut jetlam ahibouve." 
Psalms144:9 Vo Pathen, nahenga lathah khat sange; tumging le manchah jangsom neijin nangma vahchoi La sange." 
Psalms144:10 Lengho henga huhhingna pe-a ama ahin, aman asoh David kisuhkhahna chemjam'a konin ahuhdoh-e." 
Psalms144:11 Gamchom chate-a konin neilha doh-in, neihuh doh-in, akamun mohthu aseijun, akhut jetnu chu khutjet dihlou ahi." 
Psalms144:12 Ka chapateu khangdong ho chu thingphung khangtou bang uhen, ka chanuteu chu leng in ninga song kipotjola bang uhen." 
Psalms144:13 Kachang inhou adima, akikholna jouse anenchet nadin, ka kelngoi teovin kakholai lamlen houva sang sangle sangsom cheng hinguhen." 
Psalms144:14 Kabongchal hou natoh-a ahatnuva, kakholai houva thunoh asolouna din, golkeh louleh potdoh louvin umuhen." 
Psalms144:15 Chutobanga um miho chu avangpha ahiuve, henge, a-Pathen'u Pakai hia mite chu avangpha ahiuve." 
Psalms145:1 Ka Pathen, vo lengpa nangma vahchoi jingting, chule atonsot atonsotnin namin choi-an inge." 
Psalms145:2 Aniseh-in choi-an ningting, chule atonsot atonsotnin namin vahchoi jinge." 
Psalms145:3 Pakai chu aloupi-in, sangtah-a vahchoi ding ahi; chule aloupinahi holdoh jouhoi ahipoi." 
Psalms145:4 Nanatoh hohi khang khatnin, akhangkit geija avahchoija, chule thanei tah-a natohho aphon dohdiu ahi." 
Psalms145:5 Nalal loupina le jana chu keiman seijing ting, nathilbol kidangho seijing kate." 
Psalms145:6 Miten nathilbol gimneitahho thaneije seijuntin, chule keiman naloupina kaphonjal ding ahi." 
Psalms145:7 Amahon lhingsetnin naphatna loupitah geldoh untin, chule nachon phatna chu la'n saovinte." 
Psalms145:8 Pakai chu lungsetna le khotona-a dimset ahin, lunghang vahlou, chule hepina dimset ahi." 
Psalms145:9 Pakai chu mitin din aphan; chule ahepina chu anatoh jouse chunga aume. 
Psalms145:10 Vo Pakai nathilbol jousen navahchoi juntin, chule namitheng ten nachoi-at dingu ahi." 
Psalms145:11 Amahon nalenggam loupije seijuntin, chule nathaneije asei dingu ahi." 
Psalms145:12 Athilbol thahatje mihem chapate ahetsah ding; chule alenggam lal loupi ahetsah ding ahi. 
Psalms145:13 Nalenggam chu tonsot lenggam ahin, chule navai homna akhang khanga um jingding ahi." 
Psalms145:14 Pakaiyin alhu jouse akaidingin, chule aki sonkunho jouse akaithouvin ahi." 
Psalms145:15 Nangma velhijinga um mitjouse chu; aphatchan anehdiu napejin ahi. 
Psalms145:16 Nangin nakhut najah-in, ahingthei jouse angaichat cheh-un nalung lhaisahjin ahi." 
Psalms145:17 Pakai chu alampi jouse-a chonpha ahin, anatoh jouse-a athenge." 
Psalms145:18 Pakaiyin akoute jouse heng anaijin, dihtah-a ama koute jouse heng anaije." 
Psalms145:19 Aman ama gingte ngaichat suhbulhit peh intin, ataonao asan peh-a, ahuhhing diu ahi." 
Psalms145:20 Pakaiyin ama ngailuho jouse hongbit nintin, migilou jouse vang asuhmang ding ahi." 
Psalms145:21 Kakamin pakai vahchoina thu asei ding ahi; tahsa mihing jousen amintheng atonsot atonsotnin vahchoi uhen. 
Psalms146:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun, Vo kahinna Pakai chu vahchoijin." 
Psalms146:2 Kahinlaisen Pakai chu vahchoi jingting, limle mel kanei laisen Pakai vahchoi la sange." 
Psalms146:3 Pipuiho chunga natahsana ngam hih-in; ama-a panpina umlou mihem chapate jong tahsan hih-in. 
Psalms146:4 Ahaina achedohjin ama aleisetnah akilejin; hiche ni chuleh alunggel jouse abeiji tai. 
Psalms146:5 Akithopi dinga Jacob Pathen neikha-a; akinepna Pakai a-Pathen hikha-a michu anunnom ahi. 
Psalms146:6 Vanle leiset chule twikhanglen le asunga umjouse sempa; a-imatih channa thutah tuhjingpa chu ahi. 
Psalms146:7 Aman akijoulhepho thu atanlhah peh-in; aman agilkelho an apen ahi. Pakai chun sohchangho alhatdoh tan ahi. 
Psalms146:8 Pakaiyin mitcho ho ahasah-in; Pakaiyin akineosah hochu akaithouve: Pakaiyin michonpha ho angailui. 
Psalms146:9 Pakaiyin kholjin miho ahongbitnin, aman pabeiho le meithaiho a-olsahtai; migilouho lampi vang akhup athallin alehjin ahi." 
Psalms146:10 Vo Zion na Pakai na-Pathen tah chun khangjouse chunga lengvai apoh ding ahi. Pakai chu vahchoijun. 
Psalms147:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun, ajehchu i-Pathen'u henga vahchoi la sah hi anomin; kipa aumin, chule vahchoi dinga lomtah ahi." 
Psalms147:2 Pakaiyin Jerusalem asadoh-in; aman akinodohsa Israelte chu akhom khome. 
Psalms147:3 Aman lungthima natna neiho asudamin; chule amaha puthou atompehjin ahi. 
Psalms147:4 Aman ahsi ho jat aseijin; abonchauvin aminu avo soh keijin ahi. 
Psalms147:5 I-Pakaiyu alenin, thahat tah ahi; ahetkhen themna chu akhonna bei ahi." 
Psalms147:6 Pakaiyin mi kineosah ho adomsangin; migiloute chu tolla aseplhan ahi. 
Psalms147:7 Thangvah pumin Pakai henga la saovin; i-Pathen'u henga selangdah tothon vahchoi la saovin. 
Psalms147:8 Aman van chu meilom'in atomin, leiset dingin go agongtoh-in, molsangho chunga kehdin hampa aseme." 
Psalms147:9 Aman gamsaho a-an nehdiu apen; va-ah nou gilkelho aneh dingu apen ahi. 
Psalms147:10 Ama sakol ho hatna-a akipahpon; mihem kenga jong kipana aneipoi. 
Psalms147:11 Pakai chu ama gingte chunga akipah-in; ahepina-a kinemho chunga akipah-in ahi. 
Psalms147:12 Vo Jerusalem, Pakai chu vahchoijin; vo Zion na Pathen chu vahchoijin." 
Psalms147:13 Aman nakul kotpi kotgol ho ahamsah-in; nasunga nachate phatthei aboh-in ahi. 
Psalms147:14 Nagam gi ho-ah cham alensah-in; suhlouchang phapenin nadipdim tan ahi. 
Psalms147:15 Aman leiset chunga athupeh ahinsol doh-in; Athu chu gangtah-in alhaijin ahi. 
Psalms147:16 Aman buhbang kelngoi mul bangin apen; buhlhah chu vutvam bangin athejaovin ahi. 
Psalms147:17 Aman abuhlhang ankong bangin athejalin; hiche adap masanga chu koi dingjou dingham? 
Psalms147:18 Aman thu apehleh hichu ajunlha tan; Ahui anunsah-in ahile twi ahung longtai. 
Psalms147:19 Aman athu chu Jacob henga amusah-in; adan thuho le athutan chu Israel amusah tan ahi. 
Psalms147:20 Aman koima nam achutibol khapon; ama thutan lhahho jong amahon ahepha pouve. Pakai chu vahchoijun. 
Psalms148:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun, van ho-a konin Pakai vahchoijun; chungsang ho-a chun vahchoijun." 
Psalms148:2 Avantil jousen, Pakai vahchoijun; ami janelten ama vahchoijun." 
Psalms148:3 Nisa le lhathah-in ama vahchoijun; nangho ahsi vahho jousen ama vahchoijun. 
Psalms148:4 Nangho vanlaijola vanhon ama vahchoijun; vanho chungvuma twipihon ama vahchoijun. 
Psalms148:5 Amahon Pakai min vahchoi uhen; ajehchu aman thu apeh-a, amaho kisem ahiuve." 
Psalms148:6 Aman amaho tonsot atonsotna din aphutdetnin; apalkehlou diuvin thupeh apen ahi. 
Psalms148:7 Nangho dragon ho le twithuh ho jousen; Leisetna konin Pakai chu Vahchoijun; 
Psalms148:8 Mei le gel, buhbang le meijun; khopi huijin athu aguilhunsah-in ahi." 
Psalms148:9 Molsangho le lhangho; thingphung ga phaho le cedar thingho: 
Psalms148:10 Gamsaho le gancha jouse; tolla kitholho le chungleng vachaho: 
Psalms148:11 Leija lengho le mihem jouse; pipuiho le leiset thutan ho jouse: 
Psalms148:12 Gollhangho le nungah ho; tehse ho le chapangho: 
Psalms148:13 Amahon Pakai minchu vahchoi uhen: Ama minbou chu chungnunpen ahin; aloupina leile van chungvuma uma ahi. 
Psalms148:14 Mithengte jouse choi-at nan; Israel chate, ama kinaipi mite choi-at nan; Aman amite ki adomsangtai. Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms149:1 Pakai vahchoijun. Pakai vahchoina lathah khat saovin lang; mithengte houkhom na-a ama vahchoina la saovin. 
Psalms149:2 Israel chu ama hinsem Pa-ah kipah hen; Zion chate chu alengpao chunga thanomu hen. 
Psalms149:3 Lam to thon amin vahchoi uhen; khongchale selangdah-in avahchoila saohen. 
Psalms149:4 Ajehchu Pakai amite chunga alunglhaijin; Aman mi nunnem chu huhhingna-a ajephoi ding ahi. 
Psalms149:5 Mithengte chu loupi na-in kipah uhen; ajalkhun hou chunguva gingtah-in la saohen. 
Psalms149:6 Akamuva Pathen sangtah-in vahchoi uhen; akhutnuva hemto chemjam kidop uhen; 
Psalms149:7 Pathen hephalouho chunga phulahna chuhsah dingle mitin chunga engbolna chuhsah ding; 
Psalms149:8 Alengteu thihkhaova hen dingle, amilalteu thihbul tuh ding;" 
Psalms149:9 Thutanlhah kijihdohsa achunguva tongdoh dingin, hiche jana hi amithengte jousen aneijun ahi. Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Psalms150:1 Pakai chu vahchoijun. Amuntheng sunga Pathen vahchoijun, athil boltheina vanthamjol lah-a ama vahchoijun." 
Psalms150:2 Anatoh kidangtahho jal-in ama vahchoijun, alet loupina dungjuijin ama vahchoijun." 
Psalms150:3 Sumkon ginnin ama vahchoijun, tumgingto selangdah-in vahchoijun." 
Psalms150:4 Khongchale lamin ama vahchoijun, tumging tho-a manchah le semjang binei tho-in vahchoijun." 
Psalms150:5 Khutbeh ginnin ama vahchoijun, khutbeh gin thong jejun ama vahchoijun." 
Psalms150:6 Haitheina neijousen Pakai chu vahchoi uhen, Pakai chu vahchoijun." 
Proverbs1:1 Israel leng David chapa Solomon thuchih ho; 
Proverbs1:2 Chihna leh kihilna hetna ding, hettheina thuho kimudohna ding;" 
Proverbs1:3 Chihna, thutah, thutan lhahna chule thudih kihilnaho kisana ding:" 
Proverbs1:4 Milhamho gelchet theina, khangdongpa hetnale thil hetkhen them theina pehnading ahi." 
Proverbs1:5 Michingin ngaijin tin ahetna kibeding, chule hetthem theina nei michun themna akimuding ahi." 
Proverbs1:6 Thuchih le aledohna hetnading; miching thusei ho le giltah-a thu kiseiho hetkhenthem theina ding ahi. 
Proverbs1:7 Pakai gin kitihi hetna bulpi kipatna ahin, ahinla mingol hon vang chihna le kihilna asang pouvin ahi." 
Proverbs1:8 Kachapa napan nahilna ngaijin, chule nanu thupeh chu nahsahmon koihih-in," 
Proverbs1:9 Ajehchu hicheho chu naluchanga dinga kijep hoina hiding, chule nangonga dinga khivui tobang hiding ahi." 
Proverbs1:10 Kachapa, michonse hon jollhah ding nagot tenguleh nomhih helin." 
Proverbs1:11 Amahon naheng-ah, hungin keihotoh thisanso ding ngah-u hitin, mona neilouho chu ajeh beijin guhthimin changu hite atiuva ahileh," 
Proverbs1:12 Kokhuh sunga lhalut ho bangin, eihon amaho khu ahing sanun, apumchangin lhankhuh sunga vallutnu hite." 
Proverbs1:13 Eihon chutia chu thillu jouse ikimudoh dingu, thil kichom doh-a chu i-in'u idipdim dingu ahi." 
Proverbs1:14 Keiholah-a navang hung kisanin; ibonun sumdip khat neikhomu hite. 
Proverbs1:15 Kachapa amahotoh alamlhah uva chekhom hih-in; amaho lampia konin nakeng tuhtangin. 
Proverbs1:16 Ajehchu akenghou chu aselama alhaijin; chule thisan sona lamah ajangkai uvin ahi. 
Proverbs1:17 Tahbeh mongin vacha jouse mitmun panna beijin len chu akijal tan ahi. 
Proverbs1:18 Chule amahon amahole amaho thisan kiso dingjoh angah-un; amahole amaho hinkhojoh chu guhthimin achangun ahi. 
Proverbs1:19 Mipapseho lampi chu chutobang ding ahibouve; hichun aneiho tah hinkho jongchu alamangjin ahi. 
Proverbs1:20 Chihnan lamlhong dunga asamlen, amanun lamkon tinchenga awthongin asamlelen ahi." 
Proverbs1:21 Amanun lamthompi dungle kotpi lutna ho-a alhang samlen, khopi sunga amanun thu hitihin aseije," 
Proverbs1:22 Nangho milhamhon, itihchan milhama umding nangai nahlai dingu ham? chule mitaitom ho amitaitom naova thanom jinguva, chule mingolten hetna ahotnahlai dingu ham?" 
Proverbs1:23 Kaphosalna hi nanghon ngaijun: veuvin, keiman nachung uva kalhagao kahin buhlhah ding, chule kathu kahin hetsah ding nahiuve." 
Proverbs1:24 Ajehchu keiman kakouvin, nangho nanom pouve; Keiman kakhutnin kahinsangun, koiman nei ngaisah pouve." 
Proverbs1:25 Ahinla kahilna jouse nanghon lahlou nahisah taovin, chule kaphosalna jong iman nasep pouve." 
Proverbs1:26 Keiman jong nangho hamsetna chu kanuisat ding, natijat nao ahunglhun teng nahsah-a kaneilou ding;" 
Proverbs1:27 Natijat naochu manthah na banga ahunglhuna, chule nakisuhmang naochu chimpei banga ahung lhunteng, gentheina le lungdonna nachung uva ahungchuh tengleh khohsahna kanei louding nahiuve." 
Proverbs1:28 Chutengle amahon thonlouva keima eihinkou dingu, hijongle keiman kadonbut louding; amahon keima eihinhol loi dingu, hijongle eimudoh loudingu ahi." 
Proverbs1:29 Achuti theina dinga amahon hetna chu anahotnu ahin, chule Pakai gin kitichu anakilhen louvu ahi." 
Proverbs1:30 Amahon kathumop angainom pouvin, amahon kiphosalna jong anahsah pouvin ahi." 
Proverbs1:31 Hijeh-a chu amahon achonnau ga akineh dingu, chule athil gonhouva chu dimding ahiuve." 
Proverbs1:32 Ajehchu milhamho chu akihei mangnao chun atha dingu, chule mingol ho chu aphat theinao chun asuhmang dingu ahi." 
Proverbs1:33 Ahin koi hijongleh keima sei ngaija chu bitkeija cheng ding, chule thilphalou kichatna-a kona hoidoh teiding ahi." 
Proverbs2:1 Kachapa, nangman kathuseiho nakisana, chule kathupeh ho nakichin tupma ahile;" 
Proverbs2:2 Chutia chu chihna lama nanakhang nasun geh-a, hetkhenthem theina lama nalung naman chah-a;" 
Proverbs2:3 Chule nangman hetna ding gunchu tah-a nahola, hetkhenthem theina dinga aw thong jena nasapma;" 
Proverbs2:4 Nangman amanu chu dangka banga nahola, chule gou kiselu banga nakhol chila ahileh;" 
Proverbs2:5 Chuteng nangman Pakai gin kitihi nahet khending; chule Pathen hetna hi nakimudoh teiding ahi. 
Proverbs2:6 Ajehchu Pakaiyin chihna apen, akam sunga konin hetna leh hetkhenthem theina asodoh-in ahi." 
Proverbs2:7 Aman michonpha ho dingin chihna phatah akoipeh-in; dihtah-a chonteho dingin ama chu lumdal'in apangin ahi. 
Proverbs2:8 Aman thu adih-a kitana lampiho chu aching tupmin, chule amithengte lampi chu aveng tupmin ahi." 
Proverbs2:9 Chuteng nangman chonphatna, thutandih, thildih, chule lampipha ho jouse hethem tan nate." 
Proverbs2:10 Chihna nalung sunga alutna, chule hetna chu nahinna-a dinga kipana ahunghi tengle;" 
Proverbs2:11 Chihtheina chun nangma nahoitup ding, hetkhenthem theinan nangma naventup ding ahi." 
Proverbs2:12 Hichun migiloupa lampia konle, jouthu thilho seipa akon;" 
Proverbs2:13 Milungdih lampiho peldoh-a, muthim lampiho joh-a chepa-a kon;" 
Proverbs2:14 Thilse bolna-a kipah-a, chule khangitlouna le engsetna-a thanom ho-a kon;" 
Proverbs2:15 Alampihou koile-a, chuleh alampi houva vahlon leho-a kona, huhdoh-a naum ding ahi." 
Proverbs2:16 Nangma numei phalounu-a konle, numei phalou akama pachat lhem seinu-a kon;" 
Proverbs2:17 Akhan donlaija apuihoipa dalha-a, chule Pathen toh akitepna sumildelnu a kona huhdoh-a naum ding ahi." 
Proverbs2:18 Ajehchu amanu in chun thina lama apuijin, chule lampi chun thina alhutnin ahi." 
Proverbs2:19 Amanu koma lutapou chu koima ahung kinungle pon, amahon hinna lampiho jong chu atuhdet pouve." 
Proverbs2:20 Chutia chu nangman miphaho lampi najot theiding, chule michonpha te lampiho nakichin tup thei ding ahi." 
Proverbs2:21 Ajehchu milungdih chu gamsunga chengintin, chule michamkim chu chua chengden ding ahi." 
Proverbs2:22 Ahin migilouho vangchu leisetna kona suhgama umding, chule suhkhel neiho chu chua kona kaldoh-a umding ahiuve." 
Proverbs3:1 Kachapa keima danthu sumil hih-in, ahinla kathupeh ho nalung thimin kichintup jingin;" 
Proverbs3:2 Hichun nahin nikho, nahin kumkho, chule lungmona napehbe ding ahi." 
Proverbs3:3 Hepinale thutah chun nangma nadalha hihhel hen; hiteni chu nangonga khivui on ki-onlang, nalungthim sunga lekhajem kijihlut bangin jihlutnin." 
Proverbs3:4 Chutiachu nangman Pathen leh mihem mitmu-a, khohsahna le hetkhen themna chu nakimudoh teiding ahi." 
Proverbs3:5 Nalungthim pumpin Pakai chu tahsanin; chule nangma chang hetkhen themtheina-a kingai hihbeh-in. 
Proverbs3:6 Nalampi jouse ama hetsah-in, chutile aman nalampi ho nahil ding ahi." 
Proverbs3:7 Nangma chang mitmu-a kichihsah hih-in; Pakai chu gingin, chule agilouva konin jammangin." 
Proverbs3:8 Hichu nalaimu dinga damna, chule nagu nachang jouse dinga lhintwi hitei ding ahi." 
Proverbs3:9 Nathil lupen le nalhosoh ga masapen chu, Pakai janan tohdoh jengin." 
Proverbs3:10 Chutile nachangsal ho kidip letsetna; chule nalengpiga hehna-a chu lengpitwi thah hung longlet ding ahi. 
Proverbs3:11 Kachapa Pakai gimbolna chu nahsahmo loujenin, aman mi asuhdihna jong chu chimchah hih-in." 
Proverbs3:12 Ajehchu mipan alunglhaina chapa abolna bangin, Pakaiyin angailut mi chu asudihjin ahi." 
Proverbs3:13 Chihna kimudoh-a, chule hetkhenthem theina kisanpa chu anun nom ahi." 
Proverbs3:14 Ajehchu hichea kivei chu dangka-a kiveina sangin aphan; chule ahung gadoh chu sana thengsel sangin jong aphajon ahi. 
Proverbs3:15 Amanu chu songmantam ho sangin alujon; chule nangai chat thilho jouse jongchu amanu chutoh tekah hoi ahipon ahi. 
Proverbs3:16 Amanu khut jetlama hinkho saona aumin; chule akhut veilama haona le jana aume. 
Proverbs3:17 Amanu lampiho chu nopna lampijong ahin, chule alampiho jouse chu chamna ahi." 
Proverbs3:18 Amanu kituhchah khahte dingin amachu hinna thingphung ahin; chule amanu kichinjing tapou chu anunnome. 
Proverbs3:19 Pakaiyin achihna-in leiset anaphutdoh-in; ahetkhen themna-in van ho anatung doh-in ahi. 
Proverbs3:20 Aman ahetna-in munthuh ho ahong jal-in; chule meilomho daitwijin ahin lhahsah-in ahi. 
Proverbs3:21 Kachapa hiche hohi namit mu-a konin jam mangsah hih-in; gellhuh them theina le chihna chu ngah tupmin. 
Proverbs3:22 Hichu nalhagao dinga hinna, chule na-ngong chang dinga kijepna hiding ahi." 
Proverbs3:23 Chuteng nangma nalampi-a bitkeija nava le-a, chule nakeng jong kipal louding ahi." 
Proverbs3:24 Nangma nalup tengle nakichat tahlouhel ding, chule nangma lumin natin, nomsa tah-a na-imut ding ahi." 
Proverbs3:25 Photlot louva tijatna, ahiloule khang gilouho chunga manthah na ahunglhun teng jongle kicha hih-in." 
Proverbs3:26 Ajehchu Pakai chu nakisonna hintin; chule nakeng chu akisuh khahna dinga kona nachintup pehding ahi. 
Proverbs3:27 Nakhutna boltheina thahat aum petnin, amahon thilpha amudingu chu suhtangpeh hih-in," 
Proverbs3:28 Nahenga gahpehpai jengthei thil aumle, na-inhengpa jah-a, chetan, jingle hungkitjon, petei nange tin seihih beh-in." 
Proverbs3:29 Ama nakoma mongtah-a achen namu manin, na-inhengpa chunga thil gilou gonghih beh-in." 
Proverbs3:30 Aman nangma chunga setna abol louva ahile, ajeh beijin mikhat kidoupi hih-in." 
Proverbs3:31 Nangman misugenthei pa chu thangse hih-in; chule alampiho chu kilhen ding gohih-in. 
Proverbs3:32 Ajehchu milung dihlou chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, hinla ama thuguh chu michonpha te henga aumme." 
Proverbs3:33 Pakai sapsetna chu khan gitlouna insunga achun: ahinla aman midihtah chenna chu phatthei aboh-in ahi. 
Proverbs3:34 Tahbeh-in aman mi i-sah louva bolho chu i-sah louvin abolin; ahinla mi kineosah ho chu khotona apen ahi. 
Proverbs3:35 Miching chu loupina changding, hinlah mingol hon vang jum na ato dingu ahi." 
Proverbs4:1 Ngaijun, chateho, hetkhen themtheina nakimudoh theina dingun, napan nahilnao hi ngai phaovin." 
Proverbs4:2 Ajehchu keiman nangho thuhilpha kapeh nahiuve, ka danthu dalha hih beh-un." 
Proverbs4:3 Ajehchu keima kapa chapa kahin, khangnou chitchet le kanu mitmu-a ngailut khatseh chu kahi." 
Proverbs4:4 Aman keima hiljong einahilin, chule kahenga hitin anaseije; nalungin kathuho chu kichintup min, kathupeh ho kituh detnin lang hinnan neijin." 
Proverbs4:5 Chihna kimun, hetkhen themtheina kimun, sumil hih beh-in; kakama thusohdoh ho-a konin jong kiheidoh hihbeh-in." 
Proverbs4:6 Amanu dalha hih-in, chule amanun nangma nahoitup ding ahin; amanu ngailun chutile amanun nangma navettup ding ahi." 
Proverbs4:7 Chihna hi thil lupen ahi, hijeh chun chihna chu kimun; chule nathil mu jouse chu hetkhen themtheina toh mudohtha teijin." 
Proverbs4:8 Amanu choisangin, chutile amanun nangma nadopsang ding ahi. Nangman amanu nakikolchah teng, amanun nangma jabolna mun'a nalhut ding ahi." 
Proverbs4:9 Amanun naluchang chu ngailutna-a ajepding; amanun loupina lallukhuh nahenga ahinlhut ding ahi. 
Proverbs4:10 Ngaijin, vo kachapa, chule kaseihohi kisanin; chutile nahin kumkho sot ding ahi." 
Proverbs4:11 Keiman nangma chihna lampi kahiltan, keiman nangma lamdih ho-a chun kalamkai tai." 
Proverbs4:12 Nangma nachele teng nakalson kisudong pontin; chule nalhaiteng jongle nangma kipal lhu ponnate. 
Proverbs4:13 Hilchahna chu tuhdetkheh-in, amanu chu lhaso hih in; kivet tupmin, ijeh inem itile amanu chu na hinna ahi." 
Proverbs4:14 Khang giloute lampia nangma lut hih-in; chule miphaloute lampia cheloujenin. 
Proverbs4:15 Peldoh-in, anaija chehih in, chua konin kihei mangin, chule chemang jengin." 
Proverbs4:16 Ajehchu thilse abol louvule amaho a-imu pouvin; chule amahon khattou lhuhna ding abol masang seuvin a-imuthei pouvin ahi. 
Proverbs4:17 Ajehchu amahon khan gitlouna changlhah chu aneuvin, chule thisan sona lengpitwi adonun ahi." 
Proverbs4:18 Amavang midihtah te lampi chu vah bangin a-emselin; nikho hoitah asodoh changeija vahcheh cheh tobang ahi. 
Proverbs4:19 Mikhang giloute lampichu muthim tobang ahin; amaho ipi-a kipal lhu hiuvem aheji pouvin ahi. 
Proverbs4:20 Kachapa kathuseiho phaten ngaijin; kathusei ho-a nanakhang hin sungin. 
Proverbs4:21 Hicheho chu namitmu-a konin jam mangsah hih-in; hiche chu nalunggil sunga kichintup min. 
Proverbs4:22 Ajehchu hiche chu akimudohte dinga hinna, chule atahsa pumpi diuva damna ahi." 
Proverbs4:23 Chingthei tah-in nalungsung kivet tupmin; ajehchu chua kona chu hinkho-a thilsoh ho hungsoh doh ji ahi. 
Proverbs4:24 Nanga konin jouthu sei chu koimangin; chule alam louva muhthem nachu gamla tah-in koijin. 
Proverbs4:25 Namit chun vejangpet henlang, chule namitnel honjong namasang vejang keihen." 
Proverbs4:26 Nakeng phangin achot nading lampi kivet phatnin; chule nalampi jouse chu semtupmin umhen. 
Proverbs4:27 Jetlam ahiloule veilama kiheidoh hihbeh in; setna a konin nakeng sepdoh jengin. 
Proverbs5:1 Kachapa kachihna hi lunglut tah-in ngaiphan; chule kahetkhen themtheina lama hin nanakhang hin sungin. 
Proverbs5:2 Chutile thil datkhen je nahetding, nakamin jong hetna achintup thei ding ahi." 
Proverbs5:3 Ajehchu miphalou nu muh chu khoiju abangin; chule amanu kamsung chu thaosangin analjon ahi. 
Proverbs5:4 Ahinla amanu kichaina chu gamsai bangin akhan, hemto chemjam bangin ahemin ahi." 
Proverbs5:5 Amanu kengin thinalam ajonsuh in; akalseho chun thikholmun achonlut tan ahi. 
Proverbs5:6 Nangman hinna lampi chu lunggil tah-a nangaito louva ahile, amanu lampiho chu kikhel thipthap ahin, chutia chu nangin lampiho chu nahet theilou ding ahi." 
Proverbs5:7 Hijeh chun chateho tun kathu ngaijun, chule kakamsung thuho-a konin nangho kiheimang hih-un." 
Proverbs5:8 Amanu-a konin nalampi khin gamlan, chule amanu kotphung jong hin nailut hih-in." 
Proverbs5:9 Achuti louleh jabola naumna chu midangho kipedoh intin; chule nahinkumkho chu engseho henga kipedoh ding ahi. 
Proverbs5:10 Nahaona jouse jong gamdang mihon haonan neijuntin chule natohgim ga jouse jong gamdang mi inna lut ding ahi. 
Proverbs5:11 Natahsa leh naphe suhmanga aumteng, achaina keija lunghema naum ding;" 
Proverbs5:12 Chule nangman seijin natin, itobanga hilchahna kana hotna, chule kalungin phona donse louva anakoi hitam?" 
Proverbs5:13 Chule jilkung hon eihilnao kana ngaida-a, eithumop ho thupeh-a kanakhang kanasunlou hitam!" 
Proverbs5:14 Keima houkhom nale khoppi lah-a jong, agilouva mangthah paidin kana ume nati ding ahi." 
Proverbs5:15 Nangma twibel'a konle nangma twikhuh-a kon hung longdoh twiho bouchu donin. 
Proverbs5:16 Natwinah ho chu thejalin umhen lang, chule vadung twiho chu lamlhongpi dunga longhen." 
Proverbs5:17 Amaho chu nangma changseh-a bou hihen lang, naum khompi gamdang miho-a hida hen." 
Proverbs5:18 Natwinah chu phatthei boh-in umhen; chule nakhang donlai na-inneipitoh kipahkhom lhonin. 
Proverbs5:19 Amanu chu dei umtah sajuh leh lunglhai umtah sajuh chal tobang hihen, amanu anglum chun phatjousen nalung lhaisah hen; chule amanu ngailutna chun nangma a-imatih chanin lung mongin nakoi jinghen." 
Proverbs5:20 Chule kachapa ipi dinga hetkhahlou numei khat toh nakikolchah-a, chule hetkhahlou khatchu nangman nakikoipi ding ham?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ajehchu mihem lampi jouse Pakaiyin amu sohkei ahin; chule aman amapa chena jouse chu avelhi jingin ahi. 
Proverbs5:22 Khan gitlouna bolpa chu athepmonan amatchah ding, chule amatah chonsetna chun khao banga akanchah ding ahi." 
Proverbs5:23 Amachu hilchahna beija thiding, chule angol behseh jeh-a vahmang ding ahi." 
Proverbs6:1 Kachapa nangma nagol dinga kitepna thila kitung nahi tah-a, gamdang mitoh kikhutsan nahitahle," 
Proverbs6:2 Nakam sunga kon naseidoh thuchengho chun nangma namat den ahitai. 
Proverbs6:3 Kachapa, tun hichehi bolin, nangma le nangma kihudoh-in; nagolpa khutna chu naum tengle, chen, gakisunem min, nagolpa chu galung lhaijin." 
Proverbs6:4 Namit chu nguisah hih-in, chule namitteni jong kisin sah hih-in." 
Proverbs6:5 Gamlengpa khutna kon sajuhchal akitol doh bangle, thangkampa khutna kona vacha khat akitol doh bangin, nangma kihuhdoh in." 
Proverbs6:6 Vo mithase, sihmi henga gachen, alamlhah ho ngaiton lang, chihnan neijin." 
Proverbs6:7 Aman apuihoi, avesui, ahiloule vaihom aneipon;" 
Proverbs6:8 Aman nipilai leh nehding akisuh tupmin, chule chang at laile neh le chah akikhol khomjin ahi." 
Proverbs6:9 Vo mithase, itihchan na-imut nahlai ding ham? Itihle na-imutna-a kona nahung kithodoh ding ham?" 
Proverbs6:10 Chom chakhat na-imun nalulhu kitjin, imudingin nakhut nalhepton;" 
Proverbs6:11 Chutia chu vaichatna-in kholjin vahle banga, chule lhahsamna-in hem le thal kikenpa banga nahin lhunkhum ding ahi." 
Proverbs6:12 Seingailou mi, mikhang gilou chu jouthu seijin avah lejin ahi." 
Proverbs6:13 Aman amit teni asat lhaplhap jin, akengin thu aseijin, akhutjunghon mi ahilji;" 
Proverbs6:14 Aman alungsunga jouthu jeng agelin, thilphalou chu agongjom jingin, kitolouna atun ahi." 
Proverbs6:15 Hijeh achu achunga vangsetna phulou helouva hunglhung ding; phulou helouva ama jendam thei louva kisuse ding ahi. 
Proverbs6:16 Hiche thil gup hohi Pakaiyin ahot ahi; Henge, sagi chu amadinga thet umtah ahi." 
Proverbs6:17 Kiletsah maiso, jouseina leigui, chule mona neilou thisan sona khut," 
Proverbs6:18 Thil gilou gongji-a lungthim, agiloulam delna-a kaljanga keng," 
Proverbs6:19 Hettohsah lhem jouthu seija, chule sopite lah-a kitolouna muchi banga tulut jia mihem." 
Proverbs6:20 Kachapa napa thupeh nitnin, chule nanu danthu lhaso hih-in," 
Proverbs6:21 Hicheho chu nalungsunga kichin jingin; chule nangonga khivui on ki-o jingin. 
Proverbs6:22 Nachele teng hichun nalamkai ding, na-imut teng hichun nachintup ding; chule nakhahdoh tengle hichun nakihou limpi teiding ahi." 
Proverbs6:23 Ajehchu thupeh chu meivah ahin, danthu chu vah ahi, chule kihila kiphosalna chu hinna lampi ahi." 
Proverbs6:24 Hicheho chun numei gilounu-a konle, gamdang numeinu pachat lhemna thuho-a kona nahoitup ding ahi." 
Proverbs6:25 Amanu hoina chu nalungin ngaicha hihbeh in; chule amit hadan jong kilhep lhahsah hih-in. 
Proverbs6:26 Ajehchu jonthanhoi bol numeinu chu pasal khatnin changlhah halkhatna akichoh thei ahin; chule mijongnu chun hinkho manlu tahchu asuhmang ding ahi. 
Proverbs6:27 Mikhatnin a-opma mei achoija, apon kalouva um theijem?" 
Proverbs6:28 Mikhat song meihol kitih-am chunga chea, akeng kalouva um theijem?" 
Proverbs6:29 Hitia chu a-inhengpa inneipi henga galutna michu, koihile amanu tongkha chan chu themo changding ahi." 
Proverbs6:30 Mikhat touvin agilkel pet tah-a ahinna suhlunglhai nadinga guhchat abola ahileh, min guchapa chu amusit ngaipoi." 
Proverbs6:31 Akimatdoh vangle amachun ajat sagi-a aditding; a-insunga thiljouse apeh ding ahi. 
Proverbs6:32 Ahinla koihile numei khat toh jonga vangchu het themna lhasama ahin, chutobang bolla chun ama hinkho akisuhset ahitai." 
Proverbs6:33 Amachun mavo nale kijumsona akimuding; chule ama i-sah louva aumna chu kitheh mang joulou ding ahi. 
Proverbs6:34 Ajehchu kithangset hi mihem lunghanna ahin; hijeh-a chu phulahna nikho ahung lhunteng aman khen aneilouhel ding ahi. 
Proverbs6:35 Aman kilhatdohna thil khatcha adonpeh louding; thilpeh tamtah pejongle chun, ama lunglhai louding ahi." 
Proverbs7:1 Kachapa kathuho kichin tupmin, chule kathupeh ho kikhol khom minlang hin," 
Proverbs7:2 kathupeh ho kichintup minlang hingin, chule ka dan chu namit mu-a alupen hihen." 
Proverbs7:3 Hicheho chu nakhut jungho-a kibunlang; nalungsunga kijih lutnin," 
Proverbs7:4 nangman chihna henga chun kasopinu nahi tin, chule hetkhen themtheina chu na inkonu hisah-in," 
Proverbs7:5 Chutile hicheho chun gamchom numei nu-a konle, gamdang mi pachat lhem seinu-a kona nahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs7:6 Ajehchu ka-in bangkotna bangvang kah-a kagah ven," 
Proverbs7:7 milhamho lah chu kaven, khangdongho lah-a chun, hetkhenthem theina neilou golhang khat kagah lhengdoh theijin," 
Proverbs7:8 Amanu umna ningkoi lamlhah-a achepai jengin, chule amapan amanu inlam ajonjelin," 
Proverbs7:9 nilhah lam, khothim chipchep in, jan muthim jing noija," 
Proverbs7:10 veuvin, numei kijoh vona kivonle, dohathuh numei khatnin amapa chu ana kimupi tan ahi." 
Proverbs7:11 (Amanu chu husetah le louchaltah ahin, akengchu a-in'a angaman hihbeh-in;" 
Proverbs7:12 abang komle amanu apama aumin, abang komle lamlhah-a aumin, chule ningkoi tinchenga achanglhi jingin ahi.)" 
Proverbs7:13 Hitichun amanu chun amapa chu amanin, achopmin, chule jah motah in amapa henga aseije," 
Proverbs7:14 keiman chamna kilhaina thilto kaneije, tuni hin keiman kakitepna ho kapetan ahi." 
Proverbs7:15 Hichejeh-a chu nangma kimupi dinga, gunchu tah-a namaiso holdinga kahung vadoh ahin, chule nangma kamudohtan ahi." 
Proverbs7:16 Kajalkhun jemhoitah khaodip ponin, akigeitho thilho-in, chule Egypt tupat ponnemjetnin kajem joutan ahi." 
Proverbs7:17 Kajalkhun chu myrrh, aloes chule thingthal gimnamtuiho-a keiman kasu namtuisoh keijin ahi." 
Proverbs7:18 Hungin jingkhovah kahsen eini chimsetnin kinou hitin, mongtah-in kinou chimset hite." 
Proverbs7:19 Ka inneipao la ina aumpoi, gamlatah-a jindoh ahi." 
Proverbs7:20 Aman sum dip khat akisemin, nikho atepni lebou in hunglhung ding ahi." 
Proverbs7:21 Amanun thu ngeitah seijin, amapa chu ajol lhatan, amuh nal-heu pachatna lhemin amapa chu athujo tan ahi." 
Proverbs7:22 Bongchal khatnin akithana ding mun, ahiloule mingol khatnin bul akituh nading bangin; amapan amanu nungchu ajuijel tan;" 
Proverbs7:23 Thalchangin athinlung asutpai bangle; vacha khat kikin sah tah-a thanga a-o tobangin, amapan ahinkho manthah ding akihet pon ahi." 
Proverbs7:24 Hijeh chun vo nangho chapangho kaseihi kingaijun; chule kakama hungsoh doh thuho hi kigel phatnun. 
Proverbs7:25 Amanu chena lama chun nalung onsah hih-in; amanu lampiho a chun kiheimangin lut hihbeh-in. 
Proverbs7:26 Ajehchu amanun mi tamtah ama put sahtan; chule mihat tamtah jong alousahjou ahitai. 
Proverbs7:27 Amanu in chu thikholmun jotna lampi ahin; thina indanho jotsuhna ahi. 
Proverbs8:1 Chihna chun kholhang asapji hilouham? chule hetkhen themtheina-in a-aw ahin sodohji hilouham? 
Proverbs8:2 Amanu munsang vumlai tah-ah, lamthom tina adingin ahi." 
Proverbs8:3 Amanun kotpi phungho, khopi lutnaho chule kotna hung lutna ho-a asamlen ahi." 
Proverbs8:4 Vo miho kahinkou nahiuve, chule ka awgin hin mihem chapate chu akou ahi." 
Proverbs8:5 Vo nangho milhamte, chihna kihet themun; chule nangho mingolte, hetkhen themtheina lungthim neijun." 
Proverbs8:6 Ngaijun, ajehchu thilpha chung nungho kahinsei ding ahin; chule kakamsoh chun thilpha ngen aseiding ahi." 
Proverbs8:7 Ajehchu kakamin thutah aseiding, chule phatlouna chu kakam dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Proverbs8:8 Kakama kon sohdoh thucheng jouse chu chonphatna ahin, hicheho-a chun khan gitlouna leh vakoina aumpon ahi." 
Proverbs8:9 Ahekhen themtheipa dingin hicheho chu akicheh-in; chule hetna kimudoh tedin adih chu ahi. 
Proverbs8:10 Dangka sangin hilchahna chu kisanin lang, chule sana deitah sangin jong hetna chu kisanin," 
Proverbs8:11 ajehchu chihna hi songmantam sangin aphajon; chule deithei thilho jouse chutoh tekah theihoi ahipoi. 
Proverbs8:12 Chihna kiti keima hi datkhenthem natoh kacheng khomin, chule keiman hetna leh chihnaho kamudoh in ahi." 
Proverbs8:13 Pakai gin kitihi thilse hot bolding hi ahin; Kiletsahna, hoithona, setna lampi, chule jou seina kam hi keiman kahot ahi." 
Proverbs8:14 Chihna giltah leh thumop chu keija ahin, keima hetkhenthem theina chu kahin, chule thahatna kaneije." 
Proverbs8:15 Keima jal-in lenghon vai apouvin, chule pipuihon dihtah-in thutana abolun ahi." 
Proverbs8:16 Keima jal-in pipuiho, milal ho, leiset pumpi-a thutan ho jengin jong vai ahomun ahi." 
Proverbs8:17 Keima eingailute chu kangailun; chule matah-a eiholte chun eimudiu ahi. 
Proverbs8:18 Haonahole jana keija aumin, henge, haosatna le chonphatna jong keijah aume." 
Proverbs8:19 Kaga hi sana sangin aphajon, ahi, sana phapen sangin aphajoi, katoh dohsa jong hi dangka lhentum sangin aphajoi." 
Proverbs8:20 Chonphatna lampi-a kalamkaijin, Thutanna lampiho lah-a kalamkaije." 
Proverbs8:21 Chutia chu eingailute chu keiman gou kalosah ding; chule agouho chu kadimsetsah ding ahi. 
Proverbs8:22 Khanglui laija Pakaiyin na anatoh masang, chule alampiho kipat tilla, aman keima einanei ahitai." 
Proverbs8:23 Keima tonsotna pat, abula pat, ahilouleh leiset ana kisemdoh masanga pat eina kitungdoh ahitai." 
Proverbs8:24 Munthuh tah anaum masang, twinengtah-a akikholna twinaho ana um masanga pat, keima anakipodoh kahitai." 
Proverbs8:25 Mol le lhangho anaum masanga, keima einakipo doh-a kahitai." 
Proverbs8:26 Aman leisetle gamho, vannoi leiset sangpen asemdoh masang peh-a jong anaum kahitai." 
Proverbs8:27 Aman vanho anagona, munthuh akolkhum laichun, keima kana ummin ahi." 
Proverbs8:28 Aman chunga meilomho anaphudoh-a, twinah thuhho anahatsah laichun," 
Proverbs8:29 Aman twiho akiveina kalval akhokhel louna dinga, leiset bul aphudoh a chu twikhanglen thupeh ananei ahitai." 
Proverbs8:30 Chuti chun amatoh thilkhat hung kikhoukhah bangin ama koma kana ummin; chule ama anga kipah jingle, nitinna ama dei kanahin," 
Proverbs8:31 Pathen semsa leiset chen nathei munkhatna chun kanakipah-in; chule kalunglhaina chu mihem chapate chunga anaumin ahi. 
Proverbs8:32 Hijeh chun tun vo chateho, kathu sei hi kichintup mun; ajehchu kalampiho nit chan chu anunnom ahi." 
Proverbs8:33 Hilchahna kingaijunlang, chihnan neijun, hichu pampai hih-un." 
Proverbs8:34 Kathusei phatecha ngaija, nitina kakotpiphung velhijing, kakot bulho-a ngahjingpa chu anunnom ahi." 
Proverbs8:35 Ajehchu koihile keima eikimudoh-a chun hinna akimudoh ahitan; chule Pakai lunglhaina chu changding ahi. 
Proverbs8:36 Ahinla keima douna-a chonsepa vang chun, amatah hinkho chu dihlouva akibol ahi. Keima eihotbol chanchun thina joh angailut ahi." 
Proverbs9:1 Chihna in a-in akisah doh-in, chule khompi jong sagi atungdohtai." 
Proverbs9:2 Amanun aganchaho akitha-in; ajuho jong ahaltoh-in, adokhangho jong ajem joutai." 
Proverbs9:3 Amanun asoh numei ho asoldoh joutai; amanun khopi sunga munsangpena kon asamin," 
Proverbs9:4 Milham koi hile hilama hungkile heihen, hetthem theina ngaichaho henga chun amanun aseijin," 
Proverbs9:5 hungin, ka changlhah nenlang, kahalsa juhi hungdonin ati." 
Proverbs9:6 Ngolna chu dalhanlang hingin; chule hetkhen themtheina lampia chen. 
Proverbs9:7 Mitaitom hat ho phoh-a, adih bolsah ding gopa chu ama le ama akijumso jin, chule agilou phohsala chun gimna akimun ahi." 
Proverbs9:8 Mitaitom hatchu suhdih ding gohih-in; aman nahot loding ahi. Miching chu phoh le chun aman nangailut ding ahi. 
Proverbs9:9 Miching chu hilchah lechun ama ching cheh ding: Midihtah pa chu hil lechun, chutile ama hetna lama khangtou ding ahi." 
Proverbs9:10 Pakai gin hi chih kipatna chu ahin; Mithengpa het kiti jonghi hetkhen themna chu ahi. 
Proverbs9:11 Ajehchu keima-a nahin nikhoho kipunsah-a; chule nahinkumho kisutam ding ahi. 
Proverbs9:12 Nangma aching nahile, nangma dingabou ching nahin; ahinla nangman nataitomle, hichu nangman nachanga nakipoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs9:13 Numei ngolchu akam atamin, mimol ahin, chule hetna imacha aneipoi." 
Proverbs9:14 Amanu akotphunga atouvin, khopisunga munsang ho-a touna-a jong atouji-e." 
Proverbs9:15 Achena ding lampia jangpetna chehon ahin jotpa tengule akoujin ahi. 
Proverbs9:16 Milham koi hile hilama hungkile heihen, hetthem theina ngaichaho henga chun amanun aseijin," 
Proverbs9:17 Twi kigu chu alhumin, chule changlhah aguh a kine chu atuije." 
Proverbs9:18 Ahinla amapan hia chun thina aume, chule amanu jinho chu thikholmun thuhlaija um ahiuve ti ahepon ahi." 
Proverbs10:1 Chapa chingin apa akipasah in; amavang chapa ngol chu anu dinga hesohna bep ahi. 
Proverbs10:2 Khan gitlouna gouho chun koima aphatchom sahpon; ahinla chonphat na-in thina-a konin ahuhdoh theije. 
Proverbs10:3 Pakaiyin michonpha hinkho chu kel thoh dinga asuhgenthei louding; amavang khan giloute thil le lo vang asuhmang peh ding ahi. 
Proverbs10:4 Khut thase tah-a natongpa chu ahung vaichan, hinla migunchu khutnin haona amujie." 
Proverbs10:5 Nipi laija kikholkhoma chu chapa ching ahin, ahinla chang at laija ihmupa vangchu jachat konsah chapa ahi." 
Proverbs10:6 Phattheina chu michondih tah luchunga aumin, migiloute kamsunga vang hunama thuseijin atomchah-in ahi." 
Proverbs10:7 Midihtah hetjingna chu phattheina ahin, amavang mikhangilou chu amin mangthah ding ahi." 
Proverbs10:8 Milungching chun thupeh ho akisan ding, mingol moh paopao vangchu lhutei ding ahi." 
Proverbs10:9 Dihtah-a kalsongpa chu mongtah-in achejin; alampiho-a vahveija chu hetdoh-a umding ahi. 
Proverbs10:10 Amit satlaplap pachun gimna asosah-in; ahinla mingol moh paopao vangchu lhuding ahi. 
Proverbs10:11 Michonpha kamchu hinna twikhuh ahin; migiloute kamsunga vang hunama thuseijin atomchah-in ahi. 
Proverbs10:12 Kihotna-in kinahna akondoh sah-in; ahivangin ngailutnan chonset jouse akhujin ahi. 
Proverbs10:13 Hetkhenthem theina neipa kamsunga chun chihna akimudoh in; ahinla mol chu het khenthem theina neiloupa tungtuna ding ahibouve. 
Proverbs10:14 Miching hon hetna akikholun, ahinla mingol kam vangchu manthah na toh naicha ahi." 
Proverbs10:15 Ahaopa haona chu akhopidet ahin; migenthei ho suhgemna chu avaichatnau ahi. 
Proverbs10:16 Michonpha te tohgimna chun hinna asodoh in, agiloute toh ga vang chonsetna ahi." 
Proverbs10:17 Hilchahna kichintup pa chu hinna lampia aumin, ahinla phona sangloupa chu avahthai jin ahi." 
Proverbs10:18 Ami hotna selgu chanchu mijou ahin, chule thujouva mi seise-a chu angol ahi." 
Proverbs10:19 Thucheng tamna-a chun chonsetna alhasampon, ahin akam kihupthem thei michu miching ahi." 
Proverbs10:20 Midihtah lei chu dangka thengsel tobang ahin; migilou lungthim vang pannabei ahi. 
Proverbs10:21 Michonpha kam chun mi tampi avah-in; ahinla mingol hovang chihna lhahsam jeh-in athijin ahi. 
Proverbs10:22 Pakai phattheiboh na-in haosatna asodoh sah-in; chule hiche-a chun gimna abelap pon ahi. 
Proverbs10:23 Gitlouna hi mingol dingin kichep golseh tobang ahin; ahinla hetkhenthem theina neipan chihna aneijin ahi. 
Proverbs10:24 Migilouvin akichat jing kichatna chu amachunga hunglhung ding; ahinla michonpha ngaichat chu kipeding ahi. 
Proverbs10:25 Chimpei kitolmang bangin agiloupa chu aumtapon; ahinla michonpha chu tonsotna kiphutdet ahi. 
Proverbs10:26 Ha dinga lengpitwi thuh, mit dinga meikhu ahibangin, mithase chu asolleho dingin chutobang chu ahi." 
Proverbs10:27 Pakai ginna chun nikhoho asaosah-in ahi, ahinla agiloute kumho vangchu kisuchom ding ahi." 
Proverbs10:28 Michonpha te kinepna chu kipana hintin, migiloute kinepna vang manthah na hiding ahi." 
Proverbs10:29 Pakai lampi chu midih dingin thahatna ahi, ahinla khansetna tongho dinga suhgemna hiteiding ahi." 
Proverbs10:30 Michonpha te chu imatihchana suhlonga umlou helding, ahinla migilou ten leiset alo loudingu ahi." 
Proverbs10:31 Midih kamsungin chihna asodohsah-in; ahinla jouthusei lei vangchu ki-atdoh ding ahi. 
Proverbs10:32 Michonpha kamsung chun santhei ahen; ahinla mikhang gilou kamin vang jouthu bou aseijin ahi. 
Proverbs11:1 Khaikot dihlouva kite hi Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, ahinla dihtah-a kite chu ama lunglhaina ahi." 
Proverbs11:2 Kiletsahna ahunglhun teng, jum na ahung lhungin, ahinla mi kineosah koma chihna aum jinge." 
Proverbs11:3 Mikitahte phatna chun amaho apuihoi ding, ahinla suhkhelna neiho louchalna chun amaho asuhmang ding ahi." 
Proverbs11:4 Lungsat nikhoteng haonaho pannabei ahin, chonphat na-in vang thina-a konin ahuhdoh-e." 
Proverbs11:5 Chamkimsel mihem chu achonphatnan lamdih-a apuiding; amavang khanggilou chu akhangit louna-a lhuding ahi. 
Proverbs11:6 Milungdih ho achonphatnao chun amaho ahuhhing ding, amavang mi kitahlouho chu amahotah suhkhelna chun amatden diu ahi." 
Proverbs11:7 Migilou athiteng akinepna chu mang ding ahin; chule midihlou ho kinepna chu amangjitai. 
Proverbs11:8 Michonpha chu lungkham na-a konin huhdoh-in aumin; chule migiloupa chu michonpha pa thakhelin lungkham na-a ahunglutjin ahi. 
Proverbs11:9 Mipha lhemin aheng akom chu akamin asumangin, ahinla hetnavanga midihtah chu huhdoh-a umding ahi." 
Proverbs11:10 Michonpha ho akhantou tengle khopi akipahjin, amavang mikhangilou amanthah teng min a-eu jie." 
Proverbs11:11 Midih phatthei achan jal-in khopi choisangin aumjin; ahinla migilouho kamso jeh-in suhchimin aum jitai. 
Proverbs11:12 Chihna notthapma koi mihem chun a-inheng iman agelpon; ahinla hetkhenthem theina neipa vang chun chamna akituh chah-in ahi. 
Proverbs11:13 Guhthima thuseijin thuguhho aphong dohjin, hinla tahsan umtah mihem vang chun thuguh chu a-imjouvin ahi." 
Proverbs11:14 Kithumop umlouna-a chun mipi alhujin, ahinla mithumop tamna a chun hoidohna aume." 
Proverbs11:15 Gamdang mikhat dinga bat thila ama le ama kitunga chun lunggimna akimu teiding, hinla midinga bat thila kitunding nomlouva chu hoidoh teiding ahi." 
Proverbs11:16 Lungsetna dim numei jin jana akilamdoh-in chule pasal thahat hon haonaho akilamdoh ji-e. 
Proverbs11:17 Hepi nadim pasal'in alhagaodin napha atongin; mi engsepa vangin atahsatah ngeijong asugime. 
Proverbs11:18 Agiloupan lheplhahna dimset na atongin, ahinla chonphatna muchi tupa ding chun thonlou kipana aumme." 
Proverbs11:19 Chonphatna in hinna apuilut bangin, thilse delpa chun amatah thina dinga adel ahi." 
Proverbs11:20 Khangitlouna lung puho chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin; chutobanga chu nolnabei miho lamdih-a acheu chu ama lunglhaina ahi. 
Proverbs11:21 Migiloute khat le khat akhutnun kituhto jongleu talen manlouva umloudiu; ahinla michonpha chilhah vang kihuhdoh ding ahi. 
Proverbs11:22 Numei melhoitah hetthem theina neilou chu, vohpi nahkuija sana thengsel kibapeh tobang bep ahi." 
Proverbs11:23 Michonpha lungdei chu aphalam jengbou ahin; amavang migilou kinepna chu lungsatna ahibouve. 
Proverbs11:24 Mihem khatnin manbeijin ahomdohjin, hinlah akhangtouvin ahaocheh cheh jin; mihem khat apehdingdol jong pelouva it aumin, hinlah hiche chun vaichatna lam alhutjon ahi." 
Proverbs11:25 Mihongphal hinna chu suhthaova umding; chule midinga twi chappeh chan chu ama jong kichap pehding ahi. 
Proverbs11:26 Ahop ding chang itna michu mipin agaosap ding, ahinla chuche johdohpa lujanga chu vangbohna chuding ahi." 
Proverbs11:27 Gunchu tah-a apha holpa chun khohsahna akimudoh-a, thilphalou holpa henga vang ase hunglhung ding ahi." 
Proverbs11:28 Ahaona-a kisongpa chu lhutei ding ahin, ahinla michonpha vang thingbah banga khangtou ding ahi." 
Proverbs11:29 Ama insungtah suboipa goulo chu hui hiding; chule mingol chu milungchingpa soh-a pangding ahi. 
Proverbs11:30 Chonphat ga chu hinna thingphung ahin; chule lhagaoho huhhingpa chu miching ahi. 
Proverbs11:31 Veuvin, chonphate chu leisetna lethuh-a umding ahiuvin, migiloute leh chonsete jongchu chuche sanga tamcheh-a kilethuh ding ahiuve." 
Proverbs12:1 Koi hile hilchahna ngailu-a chun hetna angailut ahin, kiphona hotbolpa vangchu mingol ahi." 
Proverbs12:2 Mipha chu Pakai khohsahna achangin, ahinla khangitlou thil gongpa vangchu themmo achanding ahi." 
Proverbs12:3 Phatlouna-in mikhatcha atundoh louding, ahinla michonpha te kijung khona vangchu suhlonghoi hilouding ahi." 
Proverbs12:4 Numei chonchan pha chu a-inneipu dinga lallukhuh ahin, hinla jachatna hinlhut numei vangchu amapa ding aguho monlha tobang ahi." 
Proverbs12:5 Michonpha lunggel ho chu adih-in, amavang mikhangilou thumop chu kijou lhepna ahibouve." 
Proverbs12:6 Mikhang giloute kamcheng vang thisanso ding chanlhih ding thu ahin; ahinla midihte kamsungsoh vang chun amaho ahuhdoh ding ahi. 
Proverbs12:7 Agiloute chu lekhupmin aumin, abeiji taovin, ahinla michonpha in vangchu dingjing ding ahi." 
Proverbs12:8 Mikhat chu ama lungsung chihna dungjuija pachat hintin, ahinla lungdihlou kengpa vangchu isahlou hiding ahi." 
Proverbs12:9 Ama le ama kijabola nehding lhasampa sangin mi i-sah louva um, ahia soh neija michu aphajon ahi." 
Proverbs12:10 Michonphan agancha hinkho akhoh sah-in; ahinla migiloupa nemheuva mikhotona chu engsetna ahibouve. 
Proverbs12:11 Agam kilhopa chun nehle chah lhingsetna amuding, ahinla pannabei miho juilepa vangchu hetthem theina lama ahomkeo ahibouve." 
Proverbs12:12 Mikhangilou vin miphalouho lenthang adeichan, ahinla chonphatna jungchun ga asodoh-e." 
Proverbs12:13 Mikhang gilou chu ama thusei dihlouva chun a-oh jin, ahinla midihtah pachu boina-a kona ongdoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs12:14 Akamsunga thupot vanga mikhat chu aphalama lunglhai ding, chule akhut tah-a natongpa chu atohga ama kipetei ding ahi." 
Proverbs12:15 Mingolin achena lampi chu ama mitnin adih-in amun; ahinla hilchahna ngaipa chu miching ahi. 
Proverbs12:16 Mingol khat lungsatna chu apettah-a kihedoh ahin, milungchingin vang jum na akhukhumin ahi." 
Proverbs12:17 Thutah seidohpa chun chonphatna atah langin, ahinla hettohsah lhem vang chun lheplhahna avetsah-e." 
Proverbs12:18 Chemjam'a kisun banga thusei aumin, ahinla miching thusei chu damna ahi." 
Proverbs12:19 Thutah sei kamsung chu a-imatih chana kiphutdoh ding ahin, ahinla thujou seina leigui vangchu chomkhat kah dingbou ahi." 
Proverbs12:20 Lheplhahna hi ase gelho lunga aumjin, ahinla chamna thuhil ho-a vang kipana aume." 
Proverbs12:21 Midihtah chunga thilse sohlou ding ahin; ahinla agilou chu setna-a dimding ahi. 
Proverbs12:22 Thujou seina kamchu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, ahinla thutah a kimangchaho vang chu ama lunglhaina ahi." 
Proverbs12:23 Michingin hetna akikoi tupmin, ahinla mingol ho lungin vang ngolna asamlen ahi." 
Proverbs12:24 Gunchupa khutnin vaihomna achoiding ahin, hinla thasepa vangchu hunama na kitohsah ding ahi." 
Proverbs12:25 Lungsung pohgih na-in mi alungkham sah-in, ahinla thupha cheng khatnin akipasah-e." 
Proverbs12:26 Michonpha chu aheng akom sangin gamchengin apha chung nungjon, hinla migilou lampi chun amaho apuimangji-e." 
Proverbs12:27 Mithase chun agam lenna-a atha sa chu agou jipoi, hinla agunchupa thil vang chu manlutah ahi." 
Proverbs12:28 Chonphatna lampia chun hinna aumin, chule chuche lampia chun thina himhim aumpoi." 
Proverbs13:1 Chapa chingin apa thuhilna angaijin, mi i-sah loupan vang phona angaipon ahi." 
Proverbs13:2 Min akamsoh ga tuitah akineh ding ahin, hinla suhkhelna neiho hinna-in vang hunama kibol anehdiu ahi." 
Proverbs13:3 Akam kituh tuppan ahinkho akivettup ahin, hinla akamtampa vang chun suhgemna ato teiding ahi." 
Proverbs13:4 Mithasen alungin angaichan hinla aneijipoi; ahivangin migunchu pa hinna chu haosatah-a umding ahi. 
Proverbs13:5 Michonphan joule nala thu kisei aho-in; hinla migilou vang kidah umtah ahin, jachatnan achuji-e." 
Proverbs13:6 Lamdih-a chepa chu chonphat na-in avetupmin, hinla gitlou na-in michonse alehkhup jin ahi." 
Proverbs13:7 Ama kihaosah-a, imacha neilou aumin, ama kivaichatsa-a neile gou tamtah neijong aumin ahi." 
Proverbs13:8 Mihem khat hinkho chu haona-a kilhatdoh ahin, hinla vaichahon vang kiphosalna chu angai pouvin ahi." 
Proverbs13:9 Mi chonphate vah chu akipah-in; migiloute thaomei vang kisumit ding ahi. 
Proverbs13:10 Kiletsah nahin kidouna alhunsahjin, hinla kihilna pha umna-a chun chihna aume." 
Proverbs13:11 Lamdih louva kimu neile gou chu kemsuh teiding ahin, tohgimna-a kona kikholdoh neile gou vang chu pung ding ahi." 
Proverbs13:12 Kinepna thonin lungsung adammo sah-in, hinla ngaichat akimolso teng vangleh, hichu hin thingphung ahi." 
Proverbs13:13 Koi hile thu i-sah louhela koija chu suhmanga umding, hinla thupeh gingpa vangchu kipaman kipeding ahi." 
Proverbs13:14 Miching dan thupeh chu hinna twinah ahin, hichu thina thangho-a kona hoidohna ahi." 
Proverbs13:15 Thilpha hetthem theina chun khohsahna akimun; hinla suhkhelna neiho lampi chu ahahsan ahi. 
Proverbs13:16 Milung chingin hetna akisah lelpi-in; hinla mingolin vang angolna chu atahlangin ahi. 
Proverbs13:17 Thupole-a pang migilou chu boina-ah alhalut jin; hinla tahsan umtah palai chun damtheina ahinpolut jin ahi. 
Proverbs13:18 Vaichatna le jum na chu hilchahna kisan nomloupa chanding ahin; hinla phona kichin thempa vang chu ja-a umding ahi. 
Proverbs13:19 Ngaichat khat suhbulhit hi hinkho nopna ahin; hinla thilse-a kon kiheimang dinghi mingolte dinga thet umtah ahi. 
Proverbs13:20 Miching toh chekhom chu chingding ahin; hinla mingol hotoh kiloija chu suhmanga umding ahi. 
Proverbs13:21 Setna-in michonseho anungdeljin; hinla michonpha chu phatna-a kilethuh ding ahi. 
Proverbs13:22 Mipha chun achate chate ding neile gou adalhah pehjin; chule michonse te neile gou vangchu midih ho dinga kikhol khom ahi. 
Proverbs13:23 Vaichate loulhona-a neh tamtah aumin, hinla thutanna lhahsam jeh-a suhmanga umjong aumin ahi." 
Proverbs13:24 Mol panlou chun achapa ahot ahin; hinla achapa ngailupa vang chun asehgimjin ahi. 
Proverbs13:25 Michonphan alungnachim setnin anen; hinla agiloupa vangchu gilkel ding ahi. 
Proverbs14:1 Numei chingin a-in akisahdoh-in; hinla numei ngolin vang akhutnin aloilhuji-e. 
Proverbs14:2 Chondih tah-a kalsongpa chun Pakai agin ahin; hinla alampiho hokhelpa chun Pakai chu i-sah louva abol ahi. 
Proverbs14:3 Mingol kamsunga konin kiletsahna jeng apotnin; hinla miching kamin vang amaho ahoidoh sah ding ahi. 
Proverbs14:4 Bongchal umlouna-a gan ankong chu athengin; hinla bongchal thahat vanga ga tamtah kiso ji ahi. 
Proverbs14:5 Tahsan umtah hettohsah chun jou seipontin; hinla hettohsah lhemchun joule nal jeng seijinte. 
Proverbs14:6 Mi i-sah loupan chihna aholin, ahivangin amupon; hinla hetna kitihi ahekhenthem theidingin bailamtah ahi." 
Proverbs14:7 Mingol kamsunga chihna aumlou nahetdoh tengle, ama-a konin chedoh jengin." 
Proverbs14:8 Milungching chihna chu alampi akihetkhen themtheina chu ahin, hinla mingol ho ngolna chu lheplhahna ahi." 
Proverbs14:9 Mingol hon chonset hi totnan amangun; hinla chonphaho lah-a vang khohsahna aume. 
Proverbs14:10 Lungsungin amatah hesoh genthei chu akihetnin, chule midangin akipana-a jong chan aneipi poi." 
Proverbs14:11 Migilou in chu lekhupma umding ahin, hinla mikitahpa ponbuh vangchu khangtou jing ding ahi." 
Proverbs14:12 Mihem dingin adihtobang lampi khat aumin, hinla achaina le hiche lampi chu thina lampi ahiji-e." 
Proverbs14:13 Nuina jenga jong lungsung gimna aumin, chule hiche thanopna kichaina chu lunghemna ahijin ahi." 
Proverbs14:14 Lamdih-a kon kinunghei pa chu ama lunggot lampi jenga achen, chule mipha chu chunga kon kilunglhaisah ding ahi." 
Proverbs14:15 Mimolin thujouse atahsanin, hinla mi chingtheipan vang achena ding akivettup jingin ahi." 
Proverbs14:16 Miching akichajin, setna adalhan, hinla mingol vangchu alungsajin chule amale ama akisong ji-e." 
Proverbs14:17 Lunghangbai mi chu ngolhoi tah-in akimang chajin, chule thil gilou tamtah gongpa chu hotnin aumjitai." 
Proverbs14:18 Mimolin ngolna goulo bangin alon, hinla miching vang hetna chu kikhuhpeh ding ahi." 
Proverbs14:19 Migilou chu mipha anga bohkhup ding, chule migiloute chu michonpha te kotphunga bohkhup ding ahi." 
Proverbs14:20 Mivaicha chu aheng akom jengin jong ahon, hinla mihao chun gol le pai tamtah aneijin ahi." 
Proverbs14:21 Aheng akom noise-a chun chonset abol ahin, mivaicha hepina neipa vangchu anunnom ahi." 
Proverbs14:22 Thilse gongho chun asuhkhelu hilou ham? hinla hepina leh thutah chu thilpha gongho-a ahi. 
Proverbs14:23 Tohgimna jouse-a aphat chomna aumin, hinla kama seitho maimai vang chun vaichatna alhutjin ahi." 
Proverbs14:24 Michingho lallukhuh chu ahaonau ahin; hinla mingol ho ngolna chu angol naohi ahi. 
Proverbs14:25 Hettohsah tahsan umtah chun hinkho ahuhdoh-in; hinla hettohsahna lhem chun jou le nal jeng aseije. 
Proverbs14:26 Pakai ginna-a chun kisona dettah aumin, chule achate chun kiselna ding mun aneiteidiu ahi." 
Proverbs14:27 Pakai ginhi hinna twinah ahin, thina thanga kona hoidohna ahi." 
Proverbs14:28 Mipi tamtah umhi lengpa-a dinga loupina ahin; hinla mihem lhahsamna-a vangchu lengchapa-a dia manthah na ahi. 
Proverbs14:29 Milung nengchun hetkhenthem theina lentah anei ahin; hinla mikino thethun angolna achoisang ahi. 
Proverbs14:30 Lungdamsela umhi tahsa dinga hinna ahin, hinla kithang thipna hi gule chang monsahna ahi." 
Proverbs14:31 Mivaicha bolgentheija chun ama sempa anoise ahin, hinla ama jabol chanchun vaichate chunga khotona anei ahi." 
Proverbs14:32 Migilou chu ama gitlouna a delmangin aumin, hinla michonphan vang thina chunga jong kinepna aneijin ahi." 
Proverbs14:33 Hetkhen themtheina neipa lungsunga chun chihna achengin, hinla mingol ho lungthim sunga umchu akihedoh teijin ahi." 
Proverbs14:34 Chonphat na-in namkhat achoisangin, hinla chonsetna hi nampi dinga themmo chana ahi." 
Proverbs14:35 Lengpa khohsahna chu sottol milung chingpa chunga aumjin, hinla alunghana chu jachatna sodohsahpa chunga aumin ahi." 
Proverbs15:1 Aw nemheuva kidonbutna hin lungsatna aheimangin; hinla thucheng ngeimotah chun lunghanna asuthouve. 
Proverbs15:2 Miching leijin hetna chu dihtah-in amangcha jin; hinla mingolte kamin ngolna ngen aphongdoh-in ahi. 
Proverbs15:3 Pakaiyin munjouse amusoh keijin; ase leh apha ave jingin ahi. 
Proverbs15:4 Kamdam awnema thu kisei chu hinna thingphung tobang ahin; hinla thugilou sei leigui vang lhagao suse-a ahi. 
Proverbs15:5 Mingolin apan ahilchahna i-sah louvin akoijin; hinla phona kisanthem michu miching ahi. 
Proverbs15:6 Michonpha te insunga chun neile gou tamtah aumin; hinla migilouho phatchomna vangchu boinabou ahi. 
Proverbs15:7 Miching kamin hetna athejalin; hinla mingol lungin vang chutin abolpoi. 
Proverbs15:8 Migilouvin kilhaina abol chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin; hinla milungdih taonachu ama lunglhaina tah ahi. 
Proverbs15:9 Migilou lampi chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin; hinla chonphatna nung juipachu aman angailun ahi. 
Proverbs15:10 Suhdihna hi achena lampi dalhapa dingin athohhah-in; chule phona nahsah loupa chu thiteiding ahi. 
Proverbs15:11 Thikholkhul leh manthah na chu Pakai anga aumin; achutile mihem chate lungthim jong chusanga khohcheh louding ham? 
Proverbs15:12 Mi i-sah loupa chun aphohpa chu angailupon; ama michingte koma jong cheponte. 
Proverbs15:13 Lungsung kipana chun kipana maiso asosah-in; hinla lungjin nahin lhagao asusen ahi. 
Proverbs15:14 Hetkhenthem theina neipa lunggil chun hetna aholin; hinla mingol ho kam vangchu ngolna-in akivah-in ahi. 
Proverbs15:15 Suhgentheija umte dingin nikhojouse chu aphalou jeng ahin; hinla lungkipah-a umten tanglouvin golnop anei jinguve. 
Proverbs15:16 Pakai gingpuma themcha neichu, neile gou tampi boina toh neitha sanga phajo ahi." 
Proverbs15:17 Kidou puma bongchal thaotah neh sangin; ngailutna puma anche me neh aphajoi. 
Proverbs15:18 Lungsat kengpan kinahna achoh thouvin; hinla milung nengin kinahna asuchamin ahi. 
Proverbs15:19 Mithase chenalampi chu lingtho kikaitobang ahin; hinla michonpha lampi chu lamphei ahi. 
Proverbs15:20 Chapa chingin apa akipasah-in; hinla chapa ngolin anu anoise-in ahi. 
Proverbs15:21 Ngolchon kitihi chihna-a lhasampa dingin thanopna ahin; hetkhen themna neipa vang dihtah-in achon jinge. 
Proverbs15:22 Thumopna umlouna-a thil kigongho chu alhasamjin; hinla thumopthem tamna-a chun hicheho chu akimolso jin ahi. 
Proverbs15:23 Mihem chu dihtah-a donbutna akipeh jallin thanopna aneijin; chule thucheng khat aphatcha kiseidoh chu iti phatna pha hitam! 
Proverbs15:24 Noilam thikhol khul'a kona akiheimang theina dingin; hinna lampi chu milungching dingin chunglama aume. 
Proverbs15:25 Mi kiletsah insung chu Pakaiyin alhuhsah ding ahin; hinla aman meithainu gamgichu aphudoh ding ahi. 
Proverbs15:26 Migilou lunggel ho chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin; mitheng thusei ho vangchu thucheng ngeitah ahi. 
Proverbs15:27 Mikilose chun a-insung asuhboi bep ahin; hinla nehguh thilho thetbolpa chu kihinso teiding ahi. 
Proverbs15:28 Michonpha lungin adonbutna ding akigeltoh in; migilou kam invang thilseho asodoh jingin ahi. 
Proverbs15:29 Pakai chu migiloute-a konin agamlan; hinla michonpha taona vangchu aman angaipeh-in ahi. 
Proverbs15:30 Mit ha hoi selin lungsung akipasah-in; chule thulhut phatah chu gule chang ho dinga damna ahi. 
Proverbs15:31 Hinna dinga kiphona ngailha nakhang chu michingte lah-a achengin ahi. 
Proverbs15:32 Hilchahna donloupa chun amatah-in hinna chu i-sahlouva akoi ahin; phona kingaipa vang chun hetthem theina akimudoh-in ahi. 
Proverbs15:33 Chihna hilchahna chu Pakai ginding hi ahin; chule jana masanga chun kineosahna aume. 
Proverbs16:1 Mihem in alungthimin tohgon aneijin,; hinlah kamsunga kon donbutna chu Pakaiya konbou ahi." 
Proverbs16:2 Mihem khat-in ama mitvetnin alampi jouse chu athengselin amun; ahinla Pakaiyin lungsung chu akholchilin ahi. 
Proverbs16:3 Nanatoh jouse chu Pakaiya pedohjengin, chutile nalunggel ho chu lolhingtei ding ahi." 
Proverbs16:4 Pakaiyin thiljouse ama dinga asem ahi, henge, migiloute jengjong nikho phalou ni-a dinga asem ahi." 
Proverbs16:5 Lungsunga kiletsah tapouchu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, khutle khut kituhmat to jengjongle, ama chu talen manlouva umlou helding ahi." 
Proverbs16:6 Hepina leh thutah-in khangitlouna asuthengin; chule Pakai ginna jal-in mihem ten setna adalhaove. 
Proverbs16:7 Mi achondanin Pakai akipasah tengle, amelmate jengjong amatoh akichamsah-in ahi." 
Proverbs16:8 Chonphatna puma thil themcha khat neichu, alamlouva kimu thil tamtah sangin aphajoi." 
Proverbs16:9 Mihem khat lungsungin ama lampi agongin, ahinla Pakaiyin vang amapa kalsonna dingho akopeh-in ahi." 
Proverbs16:10 Pathen thutanlhahna chu lengpa kamsunga konin apotnin; akamin jong thu atankhel louding ahi. 
Proverbs16:11 Agih dihtah leh khaikot dihtah chu Pakaiya ahin; dip sunga um thilgih kitedoh jouse jong ama boljeng ahi. 
Proverbs16:12 Phatlouna tohdohhi lengte dinga thet umtah ahi, ajehchu laltounahi chonphatna-a kitungdoh ahi." 
Proverbs16:13 Dihtah-a thu kisei chu lengho lunglhaina ahin, chule amahon thudih seija chu angailuvin ahi." 
Proverbs16:14 Lengpa lunghana chu thina thupole tobang ahin, ahinla michingin vang hichu asulungdam jin ahi." 
Proverbs16:15 Lengpa maiso vah-a chun hinna aumin, chule aman akhohsah mi chu gotuilha nunung twimei tobang ahi." 
Proverbs16:16 Sana sanga chihna kimudoh hi iti phatna pha hitam! chule dangka sanga hetkhen themtheina kilhenjohhi iti phatjoh hitam! 
Proverbs16:17 Midih lamlhongpi chu agilouva kona kiheimang hi ahin, alampi kituhdetpa chun ahinkho akivettup ahi." 
Proverbs16:18 Manthah na masanga kilet sahna achen, chule lhuh nading masanga hoithona achen ahi." 
Proverbs16:19 Mikiletsahho toh thil kichomdoh kihop sangin, kineosah puma minoinung hotoh umkhom aphajoi." 
Proverbs16:20 Koihile hilchahna ngaipha-a chun thilpha akimudoh-in; chule koihile Pakai tahsan chanchu anunnom ahi. 
Proverbs16:21 Alungsunga chihna nei mi chu thil hekhen them kitiding ahin, chule nemheuva thu kiseijin hetna apunsah-e." 
Proverbs16:22 Hetthem theina hi aneijoupa dingin hinna twinah ahin, ahinla mingol ho hilchahna chu ngolna ahibouve." 
Proverbs16:23 Michingin alungsunga chihna mangchan thu aseijin; chule amuh dingin kihilna abepeh-in ahi. 
Proverbs16:24 Ngainom um thuchengho chu khoiju tobang ahin, hinna-a dinga lhumkei le gule changho dinga damna ahi." 
Proverbs16:25 Mihem dingin adih tobang lampi aumin, ahinla chuche lampi chu akhonna thina ahijin ahi." 
Proverbs16:26 Natong gimma chun amadinga atohgim ahi, ajehchu agilkel chun atohsah ahi." 
Proverbs16:27 Pathen ngaisahlou michun setna alaidohjin; chule athusei jong meikong tobang ahi. 
Proverbs16:28 Jon lunggelin kinahna atun, guhthim thu seile pan golcha phatah ho asukhenjin ahi." 
Proverbs16:29 Hunam panpa chun aheng akom atilsejin; chule lampi phalouva apuilutjin ahi. 
Proverbs16:30 Aman hoitho thil mitsing leuvin agongjin, akam achaloh sah-in thilse ahinlhutjin ahi." 
Proverbs16:31 Tehse samkang hi loupina lallukhuh ahin; Hichu chonphatna lampia kon bou kimu ahi 
Proverbs16:32 Lunghan nalama ngaikhampa chu thahattahpa sangin aphajon, chule alungsung kivaihom joupa chu khopi khat lapa sangin aphajon ahi." 
Proverbs16:33 Pheichunga chun vang akisang jin; hinla thulhahna jouse chu Pakaiya ahi. 
Proverbs17:1 Lunglhai sela an-gum kamkhat neh hi, kinah puma insung dimset golvah an neh sanga phajo ahi." 
Proverbs17:2 Soh chingtah-in jachatna semdoh chapa chunga vai ahop ding; chule sopiho goulona lah-a chu chan aneiding ahi. 
Proverbs17:3 Dangka dingin lhit thengna bel, chule sana dingin lhummei akimangin; ahinla Pakaiyin vang lungsungho apatepjin ahi." 
Proverbs17:4 Khanset bolpa chun jouthu jeng angaijin, chule mijouvin thil gilou ngaina dingin ana asunge." 
Proverbs17:5 Koihile mivaicha daichavaija chun ama asempa i-asahlou ahin, chule midang vangsetna chunga kipahpa chu talen manlouva umlou helding ahi." 
Proverbs17:6 Achate chate chu tehse hodinga lallukhuh ahin, chule achateu loupina chu apateu ahi." 
Proverbs17:7 Mingolin thugiltah aseidohle akilompon; chusanga chu leng chapan jou aseiding chu kilommo cheh ahi. 
Proverbs17:8 Kipamana kipe thil hi aneipa mitna songmantam tobang ahin, amachu akiheinalam tina akhangtouve." 
Proverbs17:9 Suhkhel khukhumpa chun ngailutna ahol ahin; ahinla thilkhat velphoh jingpa chun golphatah jong asukhenjin ahi. 
Proverbs17:10 Mingol khatnin jakhatvei jepna atosangin, miching khatnin khatvei kiphona chu na asajon ahi." 
Proverbs17:11 Mi gilouvin kiphinna ding jengbou aholin, hijeh-a chu mi engse thupole khat ama doudinga kisol ding ahi." 
Proverbs17:12 Mingol khat angolpet tosangin, vompi anouho kilohpeh khat toh kimaito abaijon ahi." 
Proverbs17:13 Koi hile apha chu ase-a lethuh chanchu, insunga kona ase kichoidoh louhel ding ahi." 
Proverbs17:14 Kinah kipatnahi mikhatnin twi agah londohsah tobang ahin, hijeh chun kinahna asodoh masangin kinelna chu dalhan." 
Proverbs17:15 Miphalouho themchan sah-a, chule midihtah ho themmo chansah-a chu anilhona Pakai dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Proverbs17:16 Chihna-a alunglut lou mingol chun, ipikhoh-a chihna chohna dinga akhutna sum achoi dingham?" 
Proverbs17:17 Loile gol chun phat jousen angailun, sopi vang genthei nikho-a dinga peng ahi." 
Proverbs17:18 Hetthem theina neiloupa chun akhut abengton, chule loile gol anga kitepna neija dingpa-in ahungpang jitai." 
Proverbs17:19 Suhkhelna ngailupa chun kinahna adei ahin, chule akotpi choisanga chun manthah na ahol ahi." 
Proverbs17:20 Khangitlouna lung neipa chun thilpha amupon; chule joule nal seijingpa vang thilphalou va alhalut jitai. 
Proverbs17:21 Mingol chu ahingpa din gimna ahin; chule mingolpa pa chun kipana aneipoi. 
Proverbs17:22 Lungsung kipana hi loule ai phatah abangin; ahinla lung gentheina vang hin gu le changho agotsah-in ahi. 
Proverbs17:23 Migilouvin thutanna lampiho heikoina dingin, guhthima thilpeh akilahjin ahi." 
Proverbs17:24 Hetkhenthem theina neipa masanga chihna aumin, ahinla mingolpa mit vang chun leiset mong gei ave lelen ahi." 
Proverbs17:25 Chapa ngolchu apa dinga gimna ahin, chule anu dinga hesohna bep ahi." 
Proverbs17:26 Chujongle midih gotna peh-a, ahiloule thu adih-a tanjeh-a pipuiho jepna kipe jongchu dihlou ahi." 
Proverbs17:27 Hetna neipa chun ngaikham tah-in thu aseijin; chule hetkhenthem theina neija michu milungchingtah ahi. 
Proverbs17:28 Mingol jengjong thipbeh-a aum tengleh michinga sim ahin; chule akam kihup pa chu hetkhenthem theina neimi ahi tin akive sange. 
Proverbs18:1 Mipi lah-a kon kikangse mihem chun, ama phatchomna ding maimai bou aholin, thudih jouse douvin apangin ahi." 
Proverbs18:2 Mingol chun chihna le hetna-a kipana aneipon, hinlah ama lunggel jengbou phondoh ding adeije." 
Proverbs18:3 Migilou ahungtengle i-sah louna jong ahung jin, chuleh minsetna ahungteng jum na ahungjin ahi." 
Proverbs18:4 Mihem khat kamsunga kon thupot chu twithuh tahho tobang ahin, chihna twinah jonghi vadung longjing tobang ahi." 
Proverbs18:5 Thutanna munna migiloupa panpi-a, chuleh michondih pa themmo chansah jongchu phaloutah ahi." 
Proverbs18:6 Mingol thusei chun kinelna asosahjin, chule akamsungin ama kijepnading akiseidoh ji-e." 
Proverbs18:7 Mingol kamsungsoh chu amadinga manthah na ahin, chule athusei chu ahinkho kisuh mangna dinga thang ahi." 
Proverbs18:8 Guhthima kisei thucheng chu nehle chah tuitah tobang ahin, chule oisunggil lampeh a alutjin ahi." 
Proverbs18:9 Anatoh na-a thasepa chu, ijakai susepa toh sopi khat ahi." 
Proverbs18:10 Pakai minchu insang dettah ahin, hia chun michonpha te alhailut alhailutnun ahoijuve." 
Proverbs18:11 Mihaopa dinga anei agouchu akhopi dettah tobang ahin, chule akiletsahpi tah kulpi sangtah tobang ahi." 
Proverbs18:12 Suhmangna masanga chun mihem lungthima hoithona aumin, chule jana masanga kineosahna aumin ahi." 
Proverbs18:13 Thu angailhah masanga donbut jengpa chu, amadinga ngolna leh jachatna ahi." 
Proverbs18:14 Mihem lhagao chun mihem adammo na-a kon adamsah jou ahin, ahinlah koiham lhagao damlouna thohjou dinga?" 
Proverbs18:15 Milung chingin hetkhena akimudoh-in, chule miching nakhangin hetna aholin ahi." 
Proverbs18:16 Mihem khat chu athilpeh-in ama dingin mun asem peh-in; chule amachu milen, milal ho masanga ahin puilut jin ahi." 
Proverbs18:17 Ama chungthu kisei masatpa chu adihtah danin akilangin; ahinla aheng akom chu ahungin ama ahung kholchiljin ahi. 
Proverbs18:18 Vang san nahin kinelnaho asuthipmin, chule mithahat te jong asukhenin ahi." 
Proverbs18:19 Sopi kisunohsa jollut kitna chu khopi dettah lahsangin ahahsajon; chule amaho kibaona chu kulpi pal kigenho bangjeng ahi. 
Proverbs18:20 Mihem chu akamsung soh jala oiva setna umding, athusei phatchomna jala ama vaset ding ahi." 
Proverbs18:21 Leigui hin thina le hinna thahatna aneijin, chule chuche ngailuho chun aga akineh dingu ahi." 
Proverbs18:22 Koihile jinu kimu-a chun thilpha akimu ahin; chule Pakai khohsahna chu changa ahitai. 
Proverbs18:23 Mivaichan taona jeng amangchan, ahinla mihaovin vang hoithotah-in adonbutnin ahi." 
Proverbs18:24 Golle pai tamtah nei mikhat chu amajong agolho dinga golphatah hiding, hinla sopi tah sanga ikinaipi goljong aumin ahi." 
Proverbs19:1 Genthei jongle kitah tah-a hinkho mangpa chu, thugilou seija mingolpa sangin aphajon ahi." 
Proverbs19:2 Hetna beija umhi aphapon, chule chonset na-a kaljangpa jongchu aphadeh pon ahi." 
Proverbs19:3 Mihem angolna chun alampi aheimangpeh-in, chule alungthim sunga Pakai adouvin ahi." 
Proverbs19:4 Neile gouvin loile gol tampi asemdoh-in, ahinla vaichapa chu aheng akom jengin jong adalha jitai." 
Proverbs19:5 Hettohsah lhem chu talen manlouva umlou ding ahin, chule jou le nala thusei jongchu hoidoh louhel ding ahi." 
Proverbs19:6 Pipuiho khohsahna chu mitam tah-in angeh dingu ahin, chule thilpepa din mitin chu agol apai ahijitai." 
Proverbs19:7 Mivaicha chu asopite jousen jong ahot boluvin, agolho chu ama-a konin iti agamlat tadiuvem? Aman amaho chu ngehna le taona pumin anung delpeh-in, hinlah amahon adon tapouve." 
Proverbs19:8 Chihna kimudohpa chun ahinna angailut ahin, hetkhen themtheina kichin pachun thilpha amuteiding ahi." 
Proverbs19:9 Hettohsah lhem chu talen manlouva umlou helding, chule jouthu seipa chu mangthah teiding ahi." 
Proverbs19:10 Nomsa tah-a hinkho mandinghi mingol dingin akilompon, soh khatnin pipuiho chunga vai ahomding jong akilompoi." 
Proverbs19:11 Mihem lunggel themnan alunghana asudamin, chuleh ama douna-a thil kibol angaidam jouchu aloupina ahi." 
Proverbs19:12 Lengpa lungsatna chu keipi kitum tobang ahin; ama mikhohsahna vang chu hampa chunga daitwi lha tobang ahi. 
Proverbs19:13 Chapa ngol chu apadinga hamsetna ahin; chule kinel kalna dimset inneipi chu tanglouva vajing gotwi tobang ahi. 
Proverbs19:14 Inle lou, chule neile gou jouse hi pate-a kon kilason gou chu ahin, chule numei ji phatah vanghi Pakaiya kon ahi" 
Proverbs19:15 Thasetna hin mihem a-imut lhuhsah-in; chule mi thase chun kel athoh ding mong ahi. 
Proverbs19:16 Thupeh nitpa chun ahinkho akichintup ahin, ahinla alamjot na-a chingtheilou chu thitei ding ahi." 
Proverbs19:17 Mivaicha chunga khotona neipa chun Pakai apeh ahin; chule aman anapehdohsah chu alepeh kitding ahi. 
Proverbs19:18 Kinepna aumpetnin nachapa bolgimin, chule suhmanga aumding jong gel hih-in." 
Proverbs19:19 Milungchomin talen amat teiding ahi; ajehchu nangman ama huhdoh jengle chun avela abolkit teiding ahi. 
Proverbs19:20 Khonunga nachih theina dingin, hilthemnale hilchahna hi ngaijin lang kisanin." 
Proverbs19:21 Mihem lungsunga thilgon tampi aumin, ahijeng vangin Pakai thilgon leh phatsah bouchu kiphutdet ding ahi." 
Proverbs19:22 Mihem khatnin angaichat chu lungsetna chan hi ahin, chule joule nal sei mihem hisangin mivaicha hiding aphajoi." 
Proverbs19:23 Pakai ginna-in hinna-a apuilutnin, chuche Pakai ging mi chu lunglhai ding ahin, thilsen alhunkhum louhel ding ahi." 
Proverbs19:24 Mithasen akhutnin abukong asohlut jin, akam sung geija hin dop ding jong angapcha poi." 
Proverbs19:25 Mitaitompa akijepleh, mimolpan chih theinan aneijin, chule hetkhenthem theina neipa chu phohsal lechun hetna-a khangtou ding ahi." 
Proverbs19:26 Apa lamlouva engbola chule anu delmanga chu jum nale jachatna hinpolut chapa chu ahi. 
Proverbs19:27 Kachapa, hetkhen themna-a kon nachekhelsah thumop ho chu ngaita hih hellin." 
Proverbs19:28 Pathen jalou hettohsahpan thutanlhahna dihtah chu ataitomin, chule migilou kamsungin khangitlouna chu avalhume." 
Proverbs19:29 Gotna hohi mitaitom ho dinga kisem ahin; chule kijepnahohi mingol ho tungtuna ding ahi. 
Proverbs20:1 Ju hi midai chavai ahin, chule akidontho khamnathei jong kinahna ahibouve. Hicheho kipui mangsah chu miching ahipoi." 
Proverbs20:2 Lengpa lungsatna hi keipi kitum tobang ahin; koihile ama lunghan sah-a chu amatah hinkho achanlo teiding ahi. 
Proverbs20:3 Mihem khat dinga kinahna-a kon akikangse thei chu, ja achan na ahin; ahinla angol tapouvin kinahna asosah theije." 
Proverbs20:4 Thasepan daplai ahijeh-in lou alhoupon, hijeh-a chu chang at tengle aman khut adolea imacha neilouva umding ahije." 
Proverbs20:5 Mihem lungsunga um hilthem theina hi twi thuhtah tobang ahin; ahinla hetkhentheina neipan akithaldoh ding ahi. 
Proverbs20:6 Mitam tah-in ama changseh phatna aphongjal len, ahinla mi kitah tah chu kon amu jouding ham?" 
Proverbs20:7 Midih chu ama kitahna-a achon lejin, ama nunga achate jong phat theina achanguve." 
Proverbs20:8 Thutanna laltouna a tou lengpan amit tenin thil gilou jouse chu athecheh-in ahi. 
Proverbs20:9 Koiham kalungsung kakisop thengtan, kachonsetna-a konin kathengtai, tia aseithei ding?" 
Proverbs20:10 Thilgih kibanglou leh thilgih tena dihlou chu, kibangtah-a Pakai dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Proverbs20:11 Chapang khat jengjong anatohchu atheng ham, adih ham, athilbola konin akihekhen jenge." 
Proverbs20:12 Khojah theina kol leh, khomutheina mit jengjong, ania Pakaiyin asem cheh ahi." 
Proverbs20:13 Imut dingjeng ngailu hih-in, vaichatlo getnin nate, namitteni hasah jingin,chutile changlhah-a naneija, nalunglhai ding ahi." 
Proverbs20:14 Thilchopan hichehi apanna aumpoi, hichehi apanna ding aumpoi, tin aseijin, ahin achedoh tengle vang akithang-at jie." 
Proverbs20:15 Sana aumin chule songmantam tampi aumnai, ahinla hetna hungsodohna kam vangchu songmantam lutah khat ahi." 
Proverbs20:16 Gamdang mikhat dinga kitepna thilla kitungpa ponsil chu lahpeh un; chule gamdang numeinu khat dingin kitepna thilin mangun. 
Proverbs20:17 Mihem khat dingin lamdih louva kimu changlhah hi atuijin; ahinla chomkhat joutengle akamsunga chu songbong dimding ahi. 
Proverbs20:18 Thilgon tapouhi thumopna in aphudoh ahin; chule kihilna phatah in gal asat ahibouve. 
Proverbs20:19 Guhthimthu seija vahlelepa chun thu ki imho aphongdoh jin; hijeh chun akama thuphalou seile hotoh kitimat hihbeh in. 
Proverbs20:20 Koihile apa ahiloule anu samse-a chu; ameivah muthim lah-a kisuhmit pehding ahi. 
Proverbs20:21 Neile gou chu abul lang gangtah-a gahlothei ahinai; ahinla akichaina chu phattheibohna hilouhel ding ahi. 
Proverbs20:22 Keiman setna chu kalethuh teiding ahi, tin seihih beh in; amavang Pakai chu ngah-in, aman nangma nahuhdoh teiding ahi." 
Proverbs20:23 Thilgih dihlou chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin; chule thilgih tena dihlou jongchu thilpha ahipoi. 
Proverbs20:24 Mihem chenahohi Pakaiya kon ahin, achutile mihemin ama lampi iti akihet khenthei ding ham?" 
Proverbs20:25 Kinotah-a thilkhat chu atheng ahi tia, chule kitepna ineijouva nungkhol kitding kiti hi mihem dinga kipal lhuhna thangkol ahibouve." 
Proverbs20:26 Leng chingtah chun migilouho athe cheh-in, chule achunguva changvohna kanglum chu atangjin ahi." 
Proverbs20:27 Mihem lhagao chu Pakai meivah ahin, hichun mihem lungsung jouse akhol chilsoh ji-e." 
Proverbs20:28 Hepinale thutah-in lengpa chu achingtup jingin, chule ngailutna-in alaltouna chu achoisang jinge." 
Proverbs20:29 Khangdongte loupina chu athahatnao hi ahin; chule tehse ho melhoina chu asam kannu hi ahi. 
Proverbs20:30 Thoh hahsatah kijepnan agilou chu asopthengjin; hibang chun kijepna-in sunggil laiho jouse asuthengin ahi. 
Proverbs21:1 Lengpa lungsung chu Pakai khutna um ahin, twi lonna vadungho bangin aman agot nalam lama aheijin ahi." 
Proverbs21:2 Mihem khat mitmun ama lampi tapouchu adih-in amun, ahinla Pakaiyin lungsungho joh akholchil jin ahi." 
Proverbs21:3 Dihtah-a thil kibole, dihtah-a thutan nahi, kilhaina sanga Pakaiya dinga santhei joh ahi." 
Proverbs21:4 Eima chang kivetsangna leh kiletsahna lungsung, chule migilou chalohna jousen chonset aboldoh jin ahi." 
Proverbs21:5 Gunchupa lunggel ho chun ninglhin namun alhunsah-in, ahinla kikinsah tapou chu lhasam dingbou ahi." 
Proverbs21:6 Joule nala kimu neile gou chu thina holho dinga pannabei suhle tunga lengle ahibouve. 
Proverbs21:7 Migilou ten aguhdoh-u thil hochun amaho asuhmang teiding ahi; ajeh chu amahon thudih ajuinom pouve 
Proverbs21:8 Chonsepa lampi chu alam jangpon, hinlah chonphapa natoh vang adihjeng ahi." 
Proverbs21:9 Inn lentah sunga numei nelhat khatto chenkhom sangin, in chung ningkoi khatna chen joh aphajoi." 
Proverbs21:10 Migilou lunggel chun thilse adeijin, aheng akomin ama mitna khohsahna amujoupoi." 
Proverbs21:11 Mitaitompa gimbolna akipeh tengle milhamin chihtheina aneilo jin; chule miching chu akihil teng aman hetna akimujin ahi. 
Proverbs21:12 Michonpha pan agiloute insung chu alungthima chingthei tah-in angaitojin; hinla Pathen'in agiloutechu agitlounau jal-in alehkhup jitai. 
Proverbs21:13 Koi hijongle vaichate kapetna akol kisipma chu, amajong hungkap mintin hinla kijahpeh talou ding ahi." 
Proverbs21:14 Aguh-a thil kipe hin lunghanna adailhah sah-in; chule pon noija nehguh kipe hin lungsatna nasatah asudaijin ahi. 
Proverbs21:15 Thu dihtah-a tanding hi midihte kipana ahin, Hinlah thilgilou bolte chunga manthah na hung lhungding ahi." 
Proverbs21:16 Hetthem theina lampia kona vahmangpa chu, athiho kikhop khom nalah-a umding ahi." 
Proverbs21:17 Nopsahna ngailu-a chu vaicha teiding ahin, koihile jule thaova lop chu haosa louhel ding ahi." 
Proverbs21:18 Migiloute chu michonpha te dinga kilhatdohna-a pangdiu, chule mikitahloute jong mikitahte lhatdoh na-a pangdiu ahi." 
Proverbs21:19 Numei nelhat jingle lunghang jingtoh chenkhom sangin, gamthipma chending aphajoi." 
Proverbs21:20 Michingtah chenna in'a chun deichatthei neile gou, chule thao aumin, ahin mingolin vang akisuhmang joujitai." 
Proverbs21:21 Koi hile chonphatna le hepina juija chun hinna, chonchan phatna chule jana akimudoh-in ahi." 
Proverbs21:22 Miching chun mithahat ho khopi jong atedoh jouvin, chule amahon akisonpiu athahatnao jousejong asuchim jouvin ahi." 
Proverbs21:23 Koi hile akamle alei kitimthem chun, alhagao lungjinna-a kona akivenbit ahi." 
Proverbs21:24 Kiletsah tah-a lunghangpa minchu kiletsah leh taitomhat ahi. 
Proverbs21:25 Mithase chu angaichat nan athatjitan ahi, ajehchu akhutnin na atonggim nompoi." 
Proverbs21:26 Nilhum keijin aman neipap leh kiloset abolin, ahinla chonpha pan vang apedoh in khen ima aneipoi." 
Proverbs21:27 Khangitloute kilhaina chu thet umtah ahin, aman lungthim phalou puma ahinchoi teng iti thet umcheh ding hitam?" 
Proverbs21:28 Hettohsah lhem-a pang michu mangthai teiding ahin, hinla thukisei ngaithempan vang tanlouhela thu aseiding ahi." 
Proverbs21:29 Migiloupa chu akimoh hansan sah-in, hinla mi kitahpa vangin alampi akigeltoh jingin ahi." 
Proverbs21:30 Chihna hihen, hetkhen themna hihen, thumopthemna hijongle Pakai douthei dinga aumpoi." 
Proverbs21:31 Sakol chu gal kisat nikho-a dinga gotsa ahitan, hinla galjona chu Pakaiya kon bou ahi." 
Proverbs22:1 Minphatna hi haona tamtah ho sanga kilhending aphajon, chule ngailutna a kikhohsah nahi dangkale sana sanga kilhenjoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs22:2 Ahaole avai aumkhomin, abonuva sempa chu Pakai ahi." 
Proverbs22:3 Milung chingin thilse hunglhung ding chu amu masan, hijeh chun akiselin, ahinla mimolhochu achepaijun talen amanjitaove." 
Proverbs22:4 Kineosahnale Pakai ginna-a chun haona, jana chule hinna aumin ahi." 
Proverbs22:5 Khanggilouho lampia chun lingle thang aumin, ahinkho kichintuppa vang hicheho-a kona chu gamlading ahi." 
Proverbs22:6 Chapang chu achena dingdol lampia khoukhah-in; chutile ama ateh teng jongle hia kona chun kiheimang taponte. 
Proverbs22:7 Mihaovin mivaicha chunga vai ahomin, chule abatpa chu abatsahpa soh-in apangin ahi." 
Proverbs22:8 Khangitlouna tupa chun ahomkeo aki at ding ahin, chule alunghana mol chu thon ding ahije." 
Proverbs22:9 Mihongphal chu phatthei kiboh teiding ahi; ajehchu aman achanglhah jengjong vaichate din apedoh jin ahi. 
Proverbs22:10 Mitaitompa chu deldoh un chutile kinelna beitante; henge, kinahnale kihousetna jong tang tante." 
Proverbs22:11 Lungthenna ngailupa chu akamdam jeh-a lengpa gol hiding ahi. 
Proverbs22:12 Pakai mit tenin hetna avetupmin, chule aman suhkhelna neipa thusei ho chu alehkhup helin ahi." 
Proverbs22:13 Mithasepa chun, polama keipibahkai aumin, lampi kahlah ho-a keima eithat ninte, tin aseije." 
Proverbs22:14 Hetkhahlou numei ho kamsung chu kotong thuhtah ahin, Pakai hotna umpa chu chua chu lhalutding ahi." 
Proverbs22:15 Chapang khat lungsunga chun ngolna aumin, ahinla sudihna molchun ama-a kona gamlatah-a anomang ding ahi." 
Proverbs22:16 Ahaonaho puntheina dinga vaichaho joulhepma, mihaoho pehbepa vangchu thonlouva lhasam teiding ahi." 
Proverbs22:17 Nanakhang hinsungin lang miching thuseihohi ngaijin, chule keima hetna lama nalungthim hinmang chan." 
Proverbs22:18 Ajehchu nangman nasunga hicheho chu nakichin tupma ahile, lunglhaina ahin, hicheho chu nakama jong naseiding ahi." 
Proverbs22:19 Pakaiya natahsana aumtheina dinga, tuni nikho-a keiman nangmatah henga hetsahna kabol ahitai." 
Proverbs22:20 Hetna thu hihen thumop phatah hijongle, thilpha chungnung chu keiman nahenga kahinsut hitalou ham?" 
Proverbs22:21 Thudihho chu thutahbeh mong ahi nangma kahetchetsah nadingle nahenga hungkisol ho henga thutah hochu nadonbut theina dinga keiman nahenga kahinsut hitalou ham? 
Proverbs22:22 Mivaichaho chu chomhih-un, ajehchu ama mivaicha ahi; kotpi phunga jong gentheiho chu bolgim hih-in." 
Proverbs22:23 Ajehchu Pakaiyin amahothu chu aseitohpeh-a, chule vaichaho chomho hinna chu aman achom ding ahi." 
Proverbs22:24 Milung hang jingtoh kigolcha hih-in; chule milungkhoh toh nangma chekhom hih in. 
Proverbs22:25 Achuti loule nangman ama lampiho hekhan natin, chule nahinkho-a din thang hikhante." 
Proverbs22:26 Kitepna chunga khut lhaho lah-a nangma khat nin jong pang hih-in, ahiloule sum kibat jeh-a midinpeh ho lah-a jong pang hih-in."
