Proverbs22:27 Nangman pehding imacha naneilou ahitahle ipi dinga aman nalupna jalkhun chu alahmang dingham? 
Proverbs22:28 Gollui laija napu napateu vin anatun dohsao, gamgi chu chon mang hih-un." 
Proverbs22:29 Atohna lama gunchu mi namu em? amachu lengho anga dingtei ding, mi maimai anga dinglou helding ahi." 
Proverbs23:1 Nangma thunei vaihomho khat toh an nedinga natoutengle, na anga ipi ummam ti phatechan gellin." 
Proverbs23:2 Chule an dutah mi nahile nalol la chemcha kidojingin. 
Proverbs23:3 A-anneh tuitahho chu ducha hih-in, ajehchu hicheho chu kilheplhahna an ahibouve." 
Proverbs23:4 Haoding tupnan kisulung gimval hih-in, nangma chang kichihsah hih-in." 
Proverbs23:5 Nangman aumlou thil chu namit teni-a navet dingham? Ajehchu thonlouvin haona hohin lhaving akisemun, van lama muvanlai bangin alengmangji taove." 
Proverbs23:6 Michip pa changlhah chu nangman nehih beh-in; ama antuiho jong ducha hih-in. 
Proverbs23:7 Ajehchu amachu alunga agel bangbang hija ahin; nenlang donin tin nahenga aseijin, ahinla alungthim chu nangma toh aumkhom pon ahi." 
Proverbs23:8 Nangman nanehsa anchu nalohdoh ding; chule thu ngeitah naseiho jong pannabei hiding ahi. 
Proverbs23:9 Mingol nakhanga imacha seihih beh-in, ajehchu chihna thu naseiho jong i-sah louva akoiding ahi." 
Proverbs23:10 Gollui laija gamgi lui melchihna ho chu ladoh hih-in, chule pabei ho gamsunga jong lutdan." 
Proverbs23:11 Ajehchu amaho lhatdohpa chu thaneitah ahin, aman athuchu nahenga aseitoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs23:12 Hilchahna lama nalungsung mangchan lang; chule nanakhang teni chu hetna thu lama mangchan. 
Proverbs23:13 Chapang kisuhdih nahi tuhtang hih-in, ajehchu nangman ama molin jep jongle chun thiponte." 
Proverbs23:14 Nangman ama mola najepding, chutile ama lhagao thikhol khul'a kona nahuhdoh johding ahi." 
Proverbs23:15 Kachapa nalung achih-a ahile, kalung kipahlheh ding ahi." 
Proverbs23:16 Henge, nangman nakama thil dihho naseidoh tengle, kalung gilla kakipa ding ahi." 
Proverbs23:17 Nalungin michonseho thangse hih-in, ahinla nangman nilhumkeijin Pakai chu gingin." 
Proverbs23:18 Ajehchu tahbeh a akichaina khat uma ahin, chule nakinepna chu kisei tanlou ding ahi." 
Proverbs23:19 Kachapa nangman ngaijin lang chihnan neijin, chule hiche lampia chun nalung puihoijin." 
Proverbs23:20 Judon hole saneh hat ho lah-a nangma lhahih in. 
Proverbs23:21 Ajehchu jukhamho leh milopho chu vaicha teiding; chule imutsona chun mipa chu ponse avonpeh ding ahije. 
Proverbs23:22 Nahinga napa thu kingai jinlang, nanu ateh phatteng jongle nahsahmon bolhih-in." 
Proverbs23:23 Thutah chu kichoh-in, chule chihna, hilchahna hetkhen themtheina, jong kichoh inlang johdoh tahih-in." 
Proverbs23:24 Michonpha chu apa hapah-in kipah intin; chule chapang ching hingpa chun amajalla kipana aneiding ahi. 
Proverbs23:25 Nanu leh napa kipah inte, chule nahinga nanu chu kipah thanom ding ahi." 
Proverbs23:26 Kachapa nalungthim neipen, chule namitnin kalampiho vetupmin." 
Proverbs23:27 Ajehchu notinu chu kokhuh thuhtah tobang ahin; chule hetlou numeinu chu kokhuhjim ahi. 
Proverbs23:28 Amanun jong gucha michom bangin mi achanglhin; chule mihem ho lah-a chun suhkhel neiho apunsah-in ahi. 
Proverbs23:29 Koiham dana nei? Koiham gimna nei? Koiham kinahna nei? Koiham kiphina-a nei? Koiham ajehbeija tina maha pu-a? Koiham mit san dehduh neija? 
Proverbs23:30 Amaho chu juphola khongaisotna ju kihalna hola vahle ho chu ahiuve. 
Proverbs23:31 Ju chu asanphat laitah vetdan, khonjong asansah-a achama naljella alonlhah jongle nangman vehih-in." 
Proverbs23:32 Akhonnale hichun gul bangle gulsum gu hattah bangin achujin ahi. 
Proverbs23:33 Namit tenin hetkhahlou numei ho avetna, chule nalunggilla jong thildihlou jeng nagelding ahi." 
Proverbs23:34 Nangma twipi lailunga lumpa nabahding, ahiloule kongsunga kitungdoh khom sangtah leh-a lumpa nabah ding ahi." 
Proverbs23:35 Amahon eivouvin ahinla keima kanapoi; amahon eidengun ahinla kahephapoi; itihle kei kakhangdoh tadem? Kaholbekit nahlaiding ahi, tia naseiding ahi." 
Proverbs24:1 Migilouho chu thangset hih-in, amahotoh umkhom ding jong ngaicha hihbeh-in." 
Proverbs24:2 Ajehchu amaho lungsungin manthah na lamjeng agelin; chule akam sungun aphalou aseijuve. 
Proverbs24:3 Chihna vangin in akisahdoh-in, chule hetkhenthem theina jal-in akiphutdetne." 
Proverbs24:4 Chule hetna jala indanho chu manlutah thil le lo, chule lungdei umtah neile gou dimsetna ahi." 
Proverbs24:5 Miching chu atha ahatnin; henge, hetna neipa thahatna chu khangtou ding ahi." 
Proverbs24:6 Ajehchu chihna puma thumopthemna vanga nangman gal nasatding ahin, thumopthem ho tamna lah-a hoidohna aume." 
Proverbs24:7 Mingol dingin chih gilnahi asang behsetnin, aman kotpi phunga akam akehpoi." 
Proverbs24:8 Thilse bolding gongdohpa chu, miphaloupa kitiding ahi." 
Proverbs24:9 Lunga ngolhoi thu geljing hi chonset ahin, chule mitaitompa chu miho dingin thet umtah ahi." 
Proverbs24:10 Kidouna nikho-a nalung alhah-a ahile, natha chu lhoma ahi." 
Proverbs24:11 Nangman thina lam jonna kijot hole, akithat dinga gotsa umteho huhdohna dinga pohnatna nanei louva;" 
Proverbs24:12 Nangman, keihon kanahepha pouve nati vangle, ven, ama milungsung vetuppa chun hichu agelkhoh louding ham? chule nahinkho hoituppa chun ahetlou dingham? chule aman mijouse chu anatoh dungjuija lethuhna apehlou ding ham?" 
Proverbs24:13 Kachapa khoiju chu ne-in, ajeh chu tuitah ahi, chule khoiju phang jongchu ne-in, nakam sung dinga lhumtah ahi." 
Proverbs24:14 Chihna le hetna jong chu nalhagao dinga khoiju tuitah tobang ahin, nangman hichu nakimudoh teng kipaman nasanding, chule nakinepna jong thon louding ahi." 
Proverbs24:15 Vo migiloupa, michonpha chenna mun dounan changlhi hih-in, akicholngahna munchu suse hih in." 
Proverbs24:16 Midihtah pa chu sagivei lhu jongle athoudohkit jin, ahinla migilou vangchu setna-a lhalut teiding ahi." 
Proverbs24:17 Namelmapa alhuhteng nangma kipah hih-in, chule ama akipal lhuh tahjongle nalung kipasah hih-in." 
Proverbs24:18 Achuti loule Pakaiyin hichu muntin, hichun ama alung hansah-a, chule ama-a kona alunghana aheimang louding ahi." 
Proverbs24:19 Thil gilou bolte jeh-in nangma lungkham hih-in, migiloute umchan jong thangse hih-in." 
Proverbs24:20 Ajehchu thil gilou bolpa dinga kipaman umlou helding, chule migiloupa meivah chu kisumit ding ahi." 
Proverbs24:21 Kachapa Pakai le lengpa chu gingin, chule vaihom gilouho lah-a jong kikumlut hih-in." 
Proverbs24:22 Ajehchu amaho chunga hamsetna photlot louva hungsoh ding ahin, amani manthah na hinlhut ding chu kon ija ahet em?" 
Proverbs24:23 Hiche thilho jonghi miching ho-a ahi. Thutan na-a sihnei langnei bolding apha poi. 
Proverbs24:24 Migiloupa jah-a, nangma michonpha nahi tia seipa chu, amachu mipin asapset ding, namtinin ahotbol dingu ahi." 
Proverbs24:25 Ahinla migilou phohsalho chunga chu kipana umtei ding, chule phattheina chu achunguva chuding ahi." 
Proverbs24:26 Dihtah-a donbutna pepa chu mijousen abengchop ding ahi. 
Proverbs24:27 Polama nanatoh ding gotsan koijin, chule naloulaija nanatohna ding jong kigottup masatnin, chujou tengle na in kisah-in." 
Proverbs24:28 Ajeh beijin naheng nakom dounan hettoh sah-in panghih-in, chule nakamin koima lhemlha hih-in." 
Proverbs24:29 Aman eibolna bangin keiman ama bolinge tin seihih-in, anatoh dungjuijin keiman lethuh inge tin seihih-in." 
Proverbs24:30 Keiman mithasepa loumun leh, hetthem theina neiloupa lengpilei chu kagah jotpan:" 
Proverbs24:31 Chule ven, apumpin lingle khaovin adipsohtai, chule sachih-in apheng alhangin akhujeng tan, chule songtho kisejong achimlha joutai." 
Proverbs24:32 Chuin keiman hichu kamu phatnin, phatechan kagelin, hiche kavetna-a konchun hilchahna kachangin ahi." 
Proverbs24:33 Chom chakhat imutna, chom chakhat lulhuh-a, chom chakhat khut gahlhepto-a imut;" 
Proverbs24:34 Hitobanga chu kholjinpa banga vaichat nan nangma nahin lhunkhum ding, galmanchah choipa banga gentheinan nahin phah ding ahi." 
Proverbs25:1 Hicheho jonghi Solomon thuchihho; Judah lengpa Hezekiah mitehon anasutdoh-u chu ahi. 
Proverbs25:2 Pathen'in thilkhat aselguh hi ama loupina ahin; ahinla thilkhat holdohhi lengho ja achan nao ahije. 
Proverbs25:3 Van asan bangle leiset athuh banga hi, lengho lungsung jong holdoh hoi ahipoi." 
Proverbs25:4 Dangka-a konin a-eh ladohle chun, thih khengpa dinga bel hung sohdoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs25:5 Lengpa angsunga konin mikhang gilou chu puidoh lechun, alaltouna chu chonphatna-a kiphutdet ding ahi." 
Proverbs25:6 Lengpa angsunga nang le nang gavahlut hih-in, chule milen milal ho umna mun'a gading hihbeh-in." 
Proverbs25:7 Ajehchu namitna namu lengchate masanga suhnema naum sanga, hilama hungtouvin tia nahin kou diuchu nang dinga phajo ahi." 
Proverbs25:8 Kinah nadinga kino tah-in che hih-in, ijemtin naheng nakomin najumso khale, achainale nangma jong bolding helouvin umkhaget in nate." 
Proverbs25:9 Nachung chang thuchu na inhengpa toh seikhom lhonin, chule midang henga thuguh himhim seidoh hih-in." 
Proverbs25:10 Achutiloule hiche thuguh hedoh chanchun nahin jumson tin, chule naminsetna chu mang talouhel ding ahi." 
Proverbs25:11 Thu dihtah-a kisei hi dangka kigol lah-a sanatum tobang ahi. 
Proverbs25:12 Thu kisei ngaipa dinga kiphona dihtah hi, sana bilba le sanathenga kisem kijepna tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:13 Tahsan umtah thupole-a mihem chu, asolpa dinga chang at laija buhbang dapjen tobang ahi; ajehchu aman alamkaite hinna asunou vin ahi." 
Proverbs25:14 Koi hile thilpeh dihlou kithang atpi-a michu, meibol jingleiloi le hui nunga go julou tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:15 Thohhat na-in vaihom khat ajol lhajouvin, chule awnema thu kiseihin gule chang jong asubong theijin ahi." 
Proverbs25:16 Nangman khoiju namu em? naneh jou khambep ne-in; achutiloule vavalin natin lodoh khagetnin nate. 
Proverbs25:17 Naheng nakom insung hachot lut behseh hih-in, injole natheichim valintin, nahotlo khante." 
Proverbs25:18 Aheng akom douna-a hettohsah lhem-a pangpa chu, moltum lentan, chemjam chule thalchang hemtah tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:19 Lungjinpetna kitahna neilou mikhat chunga kinep hi, habongle kenggu kipel tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:20 Lunggim gentheija umkhat henga la sapa chu; daplaitah-a mi ponsil lahmang pehpa tobangle, lengpitwi thuhtah kisuhkhahna maha chunga kisunglha tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:21 Namelma chu agil akela ahile nehding penlang, adang achahle donding twi pe-in;" 
Proverbs25:22 Chutia chu nabola ahile nangman ama lujanga mei-am nasunlhah peh hiding ahin, Pakaiyin nangma tohphat man napeh teiding ahi." 
Proverbs25:23 Sahlam huijin go asem mangin, hitobang chun kiseisetna hin lunghanna maiso asodohsah-e." 
Proverbs25:24 Numei hansetah toh inlen khatna chenkhom sangin, in chung ningkoija chending aphajoi." 
Proverbs25:25 Gamlatah-a kona thupha hunglhung hi, adangchahpa dinga donding twidap tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:26 Migilou angsunga michonpha abohkhup dinghi, twinah phalou le twinen putna twisam tobang ahi." 
Proverbs25:27 Khoiju tampi neh aphatlou bangin, mihem hon amachang loupina akiholu jonghi aphapon ahi." 
Proverbs25:28 Amatah lhagao thunun jouloupa chu, khopi chimlhasa le kulpi umlou tobang ahibouve." 
Proverbs26:1 Nipilaija buhbang alhah bangle, chang-at laitah-a go ajuh bangin, jana hi mingol dingin akilompoi." 
Proverbs26:2 Vacha lengle le pelpa lengle bangin, ajehbeija kisapsetna jong atang deh poi." 
Proverbs26:3 Sakol dinga jepna, sangan dinga kamdal, chule mingol tungtun dinga mol uma ahi." 
Proverbs26:4 Mingolpa chu angol dungjuijin donbut hih-in, amatoh bang khagetnin nate." 
Proverbs26:5 Mingol chu ama mitmu-a akichihsah louna dingin, angol dungjuijin donbutnin." 
Proverbs26:6 Mingol khat khutna thuthotpa chun, amatah keng akitanboh-a chule setna twi adon tobang ahi." 
Proverbs26:7 Kengbaipa keng tenichu akibang ngaipon, mingol ho kamsunga kon kisei thulem jong chutobang chu ahi." 
Proverbs26:8 Mingol jana pepa chu, ahsongse-a songchang khitpa tobang ahi." 
Proverbs26:9 Mingol ho kamsunga kon hungpot thulem chu, ling hemjet khatnin jukham khat akhut adotlut tobang ahibouve." 
Proverbs26:10 Thiljouse sema Pathen loupitah chun, mingol hole chonkhelte tohman apecheh-e." 
Proverbs26:11 Uichan aloh lhahsa anehkit ji bangin, mingol jong angolna-a akile kitjin ahi." 
Proverbs26:12 Mihem ama mitmu-a kichang chihsah namu khah em? hichepa sangchun mingolpa din kinepna aumjoi. 
Proverbs26:13 Mithasepan, lampia keipi bahkai aumin, khopi lamlen ho-a keipi bahkai aume, ati." 
Proverbs26:14 Kotkhah chu akikam na-a akiheilele bangin, mithase chu ajalkhuna akiheilelejin ahi." 
Proverbs26:15 Mithasen akhutnin abukong asohlut jin, akam sung geija hin dop ding jong angapcha poi." 
Proverbs26:16 Thil hethem le lunggel them mi sagi sanga, mithase chu ama mitmu-a chingjo-a kigel ahi." 
Proverbs26:17 Akikumna ding jong hilouva kikumma kinahna-a jaopa chu; uicha abila manpa tobang bep ahi. 
Proverbs26:18 Milung chavai thingkho-am, thalchang, chule thina, seplele pa chu," 
Proverbs26:19 aheng akom lhemlha-a, chule katot ahibouve, tia mitobang ahi." 
Proverbs26:20 Thing umlouna-a mei amitji bangin, misuto umlouna-a kidouna atangji tai." 
Proverbs26:21 Songmeihol-am min songmeihol akahvam bangle, meijin thing akahvan ji banga; minelkal hatpa chu kinahna sosah-a pang ahi." 
Proverbs26:22 Misuto hat thusei ho chu tina maha tobang ahin; oisunggil lampeh-a jong hiche hochu alutjin ahi. 
Proverbs26:23 Muhnaljetle lungsung gilouchu, leibel dangka-a kitomjol tobang ahi." 
Proverbs26:24 Koi hile mihotbola chun akamin aseithem jin, hinlah alungsunga lheplhahna ngen akikhol khom ahin;" 
Proverbs26:25 Aman damheocha thu aseidohteng, tahsan hih-in, ajehchu alungsunga thet umtah thil sagi aumin ahi." 
Proverbs26:26 Mi ahotbolna chu joulhepna-a atomkhum hijongle, mipi kikhom khom masanga kitahlang ding ahi." 
Proverbs26:27 Koi hile kokhuh laija chu, chua chu ama lhalut teiding; chule song tangpa chunga chu, asong tah chu hungkilekit ding ahi." 
Proverbs26:28 Jousei leiguijin asuhgim ho chu ahokit jin, chule pachat lhem seidoh kamsung hin manthah na atongdoh-e." 
Proverbs27:1 Jing nikho-a din kithang at hih-in, ajehchu hiche nikho chun ipi ahinlhun sah ding nangman nahepoi." 
Proverbs27:2 Nang le nang nakamsunga nakivahchoi sangin, gamdang mikhatnin nangma navahchoi johen." 
Proverbs27:3 Song agih in chule neldi agihcheh-e, ahinla mingol lungsatna chu hicheteni sanga chu gihjonalai ahi." 
Proverbs27:4 Lungsatna hi thil phaloutah ahin, chule lunghana hi thil nasatah ahi; ahinla thangthipna masanga dingjou ding koiham?" 
Proverbs27:5 Guhthima kingailut sangin phongtah-a kiphosal aphajoi. 
Proverbs27:6 Gol le paijin amavona chu tahsan umtah ahi, amavang melman eichop chu lheplhahna ahibouve." 
Proverbs27:7 An vasa hodin khoiju jengjong kidah aumin, ahinla agilkel dingin vang thilkha jouse jong alhumjie." 
Proverbs27:8 A-in'a kon vahmangpa chu, vacha abuh-a kon lengmang tobang ahi." 
Proverbs27:9 Thaole gimnamtuijin lungsung akipasah-in, chutobang chun lungsunga kona kihilna phatah chun loile gol akipasah theije." 
Proverbs27:10 Nangma loile gol ahin, napa loile gol ahin jong dalha hih-in; hamset nikhoteng jongle nasopipa in'a chelut hih-in; ajehchu gamlatah a um napenpipa sangin na-in hengpa aphachomjoi." 
Proverbs27:11 Kachapa limgeh inlang, eitamsepa kadonbut theinadin kalung kipasah-in." 
Proverbs27:12 Milung chingin thilse hunglhung ding amumasan, hijeh chun akiselin, ahinla mimolhochu achepaijun, talen amanjitaove." 
Proverbs27:13 Gamdang mikhat dinga kitepna thilla kitungpa ponsil chu lahpeh-un; chule gamdang numeinu khat dingin kitepna thilin mangun. 
Proverbs27:14 Jingkah matah-a thouva awsangtah-a agolpa phatthei bohpa chu, amadinga gaosapna-a kilading ahi." 
Proverbs27:15 Gohajuh nikho-a gomal lha jengjung toh, numei nelhat tahchu kibang bep ahi." 
Proverbs27:16 Koihile amanu tuhtang jouva chun huipi jong atuhtang jou ahin, chule akhut jetlama thao jong asip thei ahi." 
Proverbs27:17 Thih in thih mama anol hemthei bangchun, mihem khatnin agolpa maiso chu avahsah theijin ahi." 
Proverbs27:18 Koihile theichang phung kivettupma chun theichang ga chu aneh teiding ahin; chutobangma chun a-pakaipa ngahjingpa chu jana changtei ding ahi. 
Proverbs27:19 Twilah ivet le ilim akimudoh ji bangin, mihem lungthimin jong mihem hina aphongdoh jin ahi." 
Proverbs27:20 Thikholmun le manthah na chu imatih-in adim ngaipon, chutobang chun mihem mitnin jong chimtih anei ngaipoi." 
Proverbs27:21 Dangka dinga sontwina bel, chule sana dinga lhummei ahin; hinlah mihem chu mi apachat nadung juija kipatep ji ahi." 
Proverbs27:22 Mingol khatchu nangman sum sunga changbong toh suhtha jongle chun, angolna chu ama-a konin beichomdeh ponte." 
Proverbs27:23 Nakelngoi hon umdan nahet nadingle, nagancha hon phatecha navettup nadingin pontho tah-in pangin." 
Proverbs27:24 Ajehchu haonahohi tonsotna ding ahipon, lallukhuh jeng jonghi akhang akhanga umding ahipoi." 
Proverbs27:25 Changpol akilahdoh teng hamjing ahung nouthah-in, chule molsang ho-a hamhingho akichomkhom jin ahi." 
Proverbs27:26 Kelngoiho chu navonding ahiuvin, chule kelchaho chu louman ding ahiuve." 
Proverbs27:27 Chule nangman nadon khopset le na-insungmi nehkhop set, chule nanungah umpi chengse khoukhah nadinga lhingset kelcha noi nanei ding ahi." 
Proverbs28:1 Migilou chu koimacha dellouvin ajamin, midihtah pa vangchu keipibahkai bangin ahang san-e." 
Proverbs28:2 Gamkhat suhkhel jeh-in pipui tamtah ahung umji, ahinla hetkhen themtheina le hetna nei mikhat jala gamsung chu chesotding ahi." 
Proverbs28:3 Mivaicha khatnin mivaicha khatma asuhgenthei chu, nehding khenlou hela lhohmang jeng goju tobang ahi." 
Proverbs28:4 Dan pailhaho chun migilouho chu apahchaovin, ahin dan juiho chun amahochu akinelpi jiuvin ahi." 
Proverbs28:5 Miphalou hon thutanlhah nahi ahekhen themthei jipouvin, Pakai holte vang chun thiljouse ahekhen them jiuve." 
Proverbs28:6 Mivaicha chondih na-a lamjotpa chu, alampi ho-a vahkoi le mihaopa sangin aphajoi." 
Proverbs28:7 Koihile dan tuhdetna chu chapa ching ahin; ahinla boina semho toh kivoppa vang chun apa ajumsahjin ahi. 
Proverbs28:8 Lamdih louva sumpung lajia chule adihlouva nejipa chun anei apunsahbejin; hinla amapa chun vaichate khotothempa ding-a akhol khompeh ahibouve. 
Proverbs28:9 Dan thupeh ho-a kon anakhang heimangpa taona jengjong chu thet umtah ahibouve. 
Proverbs28:10 Koihile midih aselama kiheimangsahpa chu, amatah-in asem kokhuh sunga chu lhalutteiding; ahinla midihpa vang chun thilphaho aneiding ahi." 
Proverbs28:11 Mihao chu amachang mitmun akichih sah-in, ahinla hetkhenthem theina nei vaichapan ama akholdoh sohjin ahi." 
Proverbs28:12 Michonpha te akipa tengule loupina nasatah aumjin; ahin migiloute ahung letdoh tengle mi akisel gamjitai. 
Proverbs28:13 Koi hile achonsetna selguh-a chu lolhing louding; amavang koihile hicheho phongdoh jenga chule dalha jenga chun hepina akimuding ahi. 
Proverbs28:14 Pathen ging jinga umpa chu anunnom ahin; ahinla alung tahsahpa vangchu vangsetna-a chuding ahi. 
Proverbs28:15 Mivaichate chunga vaihom gilou chu, keipi bahkai kitumle vompi midel hat tobang ahi." 
Proverbs28:16 Hetkhen themtheina neilou pipuichu misugenthei tah jong ahin, hinla papsetna hotbolpa chun ahinkho akisuhsao ding ahi." 
Proverbs28:17 Pumhatna thisan so-a chu kokhuh-a jamlut ding; chule koiman apanpi louhel ding ahi. 
Proverbs28:18 Koihile nolna beija chonlea chu huhhing-a umding ahin; alampiho-a vahkoilepa vangchu lhupai ding ahi. 
Proverbs28:19 Alou kilhopa chun nehle chah ninglhingsetna aneiding ahin, ahinla pannabei miho nungjuipa vang chun vaichatna akimutei ding ahi." 
Proverbs28:20 Mikitah chu phattheiboh changintin, ahinla hetman louva haoding gopa chu themmo changtei ding ahi." 
Proverbs28:21 Sihnei langnei bolhi aphapoi, ajehchu changlhah halkhat jeh-a jong mi chonkhelji-a ahi." 
Proverbs28:22 Mikilosen hetman louva haoding jeng agelin; achunga vaichatna ahunglhun ding agelpha jipon ahi. 
Proverbs28:23 Akama pachatna lhem seipa sanga, miphohsal pa chun nungtengle khohsahna akimutam johding ahi." 
Proverbs28:24 Koihile anule apa choma hichehi chonset ahipoi tipa chu, misugampa toh golcha ahi." 
Proverbs28:25 Kiletsahna lungthim neipan kidouna achoh thouvin, Pakaiya atahsanna koipa vangchu phatthei changding ahi." 
Proverbs28:26 Ama chang lunggela kisongpa chu mingol ahin; ahinla chingtah-a kalsongpa chu huhdoh-a umding ahi. 
Proverbs28:27 Koihile mivaicha kithopi-a chu lhasam louding; mivaicha kimumosah vang chun sapsetna tampi akimuding ahije. 
Proverbs28:28 Migilou adindoh teng miho akiseljin, amaho amanthah tengule vang midih apungjin ahi." 
Proverbs29:1 Tamtahvei akihilchah nunga jong louchal nalaipa chu, hetmanlouva manthah na-a chuding, chule boldamo hella umding ahi." 
Proverbs29:2 Michonpha te vaihoma apanteng mipi akipah-in; ahinla khang gilouten vai ahomteng mipi alunghem jiuve. 
Proverbs29:3 Koihile chihna ngailu-a chun apa akipasah-in, notiho toh kivopma vang chun anei agou jouse asuhmang ahi." 
Proverbs29:4 Lengpan thutandih na-in agam aphutdetnin, ahin nehguh kilahpan vang agamchu alehkhup jin ahi." 
Proverbs29:5 A-inheng pahcha lhempa chun akeng dinga thang akampeh ahi. 
Proverbs29:6 Migilou chu asuhkhelna-a a-oh jin, ahinla michonpha hon la asaovin akipah uve." 
Proverbs29:7 Michonphan mivaicha khankho ding angaitopeh-in, ahinla migilouvin hetpeh dingjong agopoi." 
Proverbs29:8 Midaichavai hon khopi chu meijin ahal vamun, ahinla miching hon lungsatna aheidoh-un ahi." 
Proverbs29:9 Miching khatnin mingol khat chu kinahpi henglang, mingolpa chu kitomhen lang nuijongle chamna umdeh louding ahi." 
Proverbs29:10 Thisan sohatpan milungdihpa ahotbolin, ahinla midihtah pan vang alhagao huhdoh ding agon ahi." 
Proverbs29:11 Mingolin alungthima agel jouse aseidoh sohkeijin, miching pan vang akichintup-in ahi." 
Proverbs29:12 Vaihom khatnin jouthu jeng akhohsah-a ahileh, asohho jouse jong migilou asohji taove." 
Proverbs29:13 Mivaichale milhem hatpa akimuto lhonnin, amitlhon jong Pakai hasah ahicheh-e." 
Proverbs29:14 Dihtah-a mivaichate thu tanpeh lengpa laltouna chu, atonsot geija kiphudet ding ahi." 
Proverbs29:15 Mol le phosal na-in chihna ape-in, ahinla achama kilha chapang chun anu ajumson ahi." 
Proverbs29:16 Migilou apunteng dan suhkhelna apungjin, ahinla michonpha ten amaho lhuhchu amudiu ahi." 
Proverbs29:17 Nachapa nathun nunsah-in, chutile aman nangma olna napehding; chule aman nalung akipasah ding ahi." 
Proverbs29:18 Khonungthu i-atiding ngaitophah louna achun mipite amangthah jitan; ahinla dan kituhchahpa chu akipah-in ahi. 
Proverbs29:19 Soh chu kamcheng keovin akisudih theipoi, ajehchu aman hethem jongle adonbut louding ahi." 
Proverbs29:20 Ngaikham le geltoh umlouva thusei namu em? amasangin mingol din kinepna atamjon ahi. 
Proverbs29:21 Asoh aneovapat demchatah-a hinkhou khah-a chun, khonung teng hiche sohpa chu chapa-a ahin neiding ahi." 
Proverbs29:22 Milung chompan kinahna achoh thouvin, chule milungkhoh pan suhkhelna ahaolo jitai." 
Proverbs29:23 Mihem khat kiletsahna chun ama anoinunsah teiding, ahinla jana chun lungsunga kineosahpa chu atundoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs29:24 Koihile migucha toh kithokhompa chun ama hinna jong ahot ahin, sapsetna ajanan ahin imacha aseipon ahi." 
Proverbs29:25 Mihem ginna hi thangkol kido ahibouvin, ahinla koihile Pakai tahsanna chu hoidoh ding ahi." 
Proverbs29:26 Mitamtah in vaihompa khohsahna chu aholun, ahinla amitakip chunga thutanna chu Pakaiya kon ahibouve." 
Proverbs29:27 Mikitah loupa chu midihpa dingin thet umtah ahin, chule achena lampia nolnabei michu agiloupa dinga thet umtah ahi." 
Proverbs30:1 Jakeh chapa Agur thusei ho, themgao thusei ngeichu: hiche mipan Ithiel henga, Ithiel le Ucal heng ngeija thu aseijin;" 
Proverbs30:2 Tahbeh-in hi midang sangsanga ngoljo kahin, mihem khatnin hetna aneibangin keiman kaneipoi." 
Proverbs30:3 Chihna kitijong kajil khapon, mithengpa hetnajong kananeipon ahi." 
Proverbs30:4 Koiham van'a kaltouva ahiloule hungkum lha-a? Koiham hui akhutna huikhom theija? Koiham twi ponna chuntheija? Koiham leiset kolkimvel anaphut detna? Ama minchu ipi hija, chule achapa minchu ipiham, nangman nasei theijem?" 
Proverbs30:5 Pathen thu jousehi atheng ahin, chule ama tahsan ho jouse dingin ama chu lumdal ahi." 
Proverbs30:6 Nangman athuho chu belap hihbeh-in, achuti loule aman nangma phohsalin natin, thujou seipa nahilo ding ahi." 
Proverbs30:7 Keiman nanga konin thilni kangeh-in, kathi masangin hiche teni chu nei-itpeh hihbeh-in;" 
Proverbs30:8 Keija konin thumanlou le jouthu gamlatah-a neikoi mangpeh jengin; vaichatna ahin haona hijongle neipehdan, keima dinga kakitopibep an achun neivah-in." 
Proverbs30:9 Neng behsehleng nangma seilep inting, Pakai chu koiham? katiding; ahiloule vaicha behseh leng kaguhchat ding, ka Pathen min chu mohseh-a kaphah pohding ahi." 
Proverbs30:10 Apupa henga asottolpa chu hehse hih-in, aman nasapset lontin themo changkhan nate." 
Proverbs30:11 Mihem tamtah apa gaosapma, chule anu jong phatthei bohlou aumin ahi." 
Proverbs30:12 Mihem tamtah ama mitmu-a athenga kigel aumin, ahinla athenlou naova chu kisoptheng lou ahiuve." 
Proverbs30:13 Mihem tamtah aumin, Oh, amit houchu ichana sanga hitam! amit gei ujong dopsangin aumin ahi." 
Proverbs30:14 Mihem tamtah aumin, amaho hachu chemjam tobang, chule aha noinung houchu chemcha hemthet tobang ahin; leiset chunga kona vaichate vallhum dingle, mihem lah-a kona lhasamte sugam dinga kigo ahiuve." 
Proverbs30:15 Votnin chanu ni aneijin, neipen, neipen tin apengin ahi. A-itih-a chimjoulou thilthum aumin, henge, aphatai, tilouhel thil li aume." 
Proverbs30:16 Lhankhuh le nao neilou naobu; twi dim theilou hel leiset, chule aphatai tilouhel meikou ahi." 
Proverbs30:17 Apa noisena mitna vea, chule anuthua nunding i-sah loupa mit chu,, phaichama va-ah hon achuhdoh ding, chule mulaopi nouhon anehdingu ahi." 
Proverbs30:18 Keima dingin datmo umtah thil thum aumin, kahetlou thil li aume;" 
Proverbs30:19 van'a mulaopi lenna lampi, songpi chunga gul kithollena lampi, twikhanglen lailunga kong kitolna lampi, chule pasal khatle nungah khat chena lampi ahi." 
Proverbs30:20 Notinu lampi jong chutobang chu ahi; amanun anen chule amuh akitheh-in, agilou kabol hihbeh-e, atin ahi." 
Proverbs30:21 Thilthum jeh in leiset athip theipon, chule thil li athoh theipoi:" 
Proverbs30:22 Soh khatnin vai ahinpoh-a, mingol khat-in sa vasetna ahin neh-a;" 
Proverbs30:23 Mi hotbol jing numei khatnin ji ahin neija, chule soh numei khat apinu goulo dinga ahung umhi ahi" 
Proverbs30:24 Leiset chunga neocha cha thil li aumin, ahinla hicheho chu aching cheh ahiuve;" 
Proverbs30:25 Sihmi hohin mihem sanga thalhomjo ahivangun, nipilaile amahon anehdiu akigonun;" 
Proverbs30:26 Jupihohi lhasam tah ahivangun, songpiho-a buh akisah uvin;" 
Proverbs30:27 Khaokhohon leng aneipouvin, ahijeng vangin abonchauvin ahonin achelejiu ve;" 
Proverbs30:28 Maimom in akhutnin atuh-in, chule leng inpiho-a aumin ahi." 
Proverbs30:29 Phatah a chekhom thilthum aumin, chule thil li kitoh della chekhom jong aume;" 
Proverbs30:30 Keipi bahkaihi gamsa jouse lah-a ahatpen ahin, koima otdohlou ahi;" 
Proverbs30:31 Uichal ahin, kelchal ahin, chuleh ama dou dinga koima dingdoh khalou lengpa ahi." 
Proverbs30:32 Nangle nang kichoisang na-a ngolhoi tah-a nachon khah-a, ahiloule nangman thilphalou nagelleh, nakhutnin nakam kisimin." 
Proverbs30:33 Bongnoi khu icho thipthap le bongnoiha asohjin, inahlhong iheh jongle thisan apotjin, chutobanga chu ilung ihansah jingle kinahna asohjin ahi." 
Proverbs31:1 Lemuel lengpa thusei ho, anun ahung guilhung dingthu anahilho." 
Proverbs31:2 Ipiham kachapa? Iham kanaobua kon peng kachapa? Chule ipiham kakitepna ho-a kahin kachapa? 
Proverbs31:3 Nathahatna chu numei ho pedoh hih-in, nalampi ho jongchu lengte sumangho pedoh hih-in." 
Proverbs31:4 Hichehi lengho ding ahipoi, Vo Lemuel, lenghon ju adonding ahipon, leng chateho dingin jong juchih donding ahipoi." 
Proverbs31:5 Amahon donnu henlang danthu sumil taleu, suhgentheija umte chungchang thua lamdih louva thutan na aneikhah diu ahi." 
Proverbs31:6 Amangthai ding hochu juchih donsah-un, chule lunggimho chu ju donsah-un." 
Proverbs31:7 Aman don henlang avaichatna sumil hen, chule agimnaho geldohda tahih hen." 
Proverbs31:8 Mangthah dinga lhuhsahsa umho chungchanga, paomoho dingin nakam keh-in." 
Proverbs31:9 Mihem apaomo amadia thu kisei theilou jeh-a suhmanga umtadingho panpinan, nakam keh-inlang seipeh-in." 
Proverbs31:10 Numei chondihtah koijin akimujou tadem? ajehchu amanu manlutdan chu songmantam ho sangin asangjon ahi. 
Proverbs31:11 A-inneipu chun lungmong selin atahsanin, hitichun amapa dingin lhahsamna kitimong mong umponte." 
Proverbs31:12 Amanun ahinkho lhumkeijin amapa dingin thilpha bolin tin, chule thilse bolpeh ponte." 
Proverbs31:13 Amanun samul le tupat aholin, alungcham tah-in akhut tah-in na atongin ahi." 
Proverbs31:14 Amanu chu sumkolvei ho kong innei tobang ahin, gamla tahtah-a konin aman nehle chah ahin polutjin ahi." 
Proverbs31:15 Amanu janlai jengin jong athoudoh jin, chule a-insungmite chu nehding sa apen, aumpi soh numei ho jong achanding apejin ahi." 
Proverbs31:16 Amanun loumun khat avechilin, hichu achon, akhutsoh mangchan lengpilei abolin ahi." 
Proverbs31:17 Amanun thahat na-in atai akigeh-in, chule abantha ahatsah-in ahi." 
Proverbs31:18 Amanun aveipungho chu aphai ti ahen, amanu meivah jong janle amit ngaipoi." 
Proverbs31:19 Amanun akhutnin muikung atuh-in, chule akhutnin patkong kung atuh-in ahi." 
Proverbs31:20 Amanun vaichate le, lhasamte dingin akhut alhangdoh jin ahi." 
Proverbs31:21 Amanun a-insungmite dingin buhbang hunglha dingjong akichapoi; ajehchu a-insungmite jouse chu ponsanthip cheh-a kivon ahiuve. 
Proverbs31:22 Amanun amadingin ponsil jemnei akikhonin, amanu von chu lungpon le ponsandup ahi." 
Proverbs31:23 A-inneipu chu gamsung upaho toh khopi kotpiphunga atouteng mijouse het ahijin ahi. 
Proverbs31:24 Amanun tupat ponnemjet akhongin, ajohjin; chule konggah jong sumkolveipa henga akijoh jin ahi." 
Proverbs31:25 Amanu chu thahatna le jana-in akivonin, ahunglhung ding phatna jong ama kipah thanom ding ahi" 
Proverbs31:26 Amanun chingthei tah-in thu aseijin, athusei jong khotona dimset ahi." 
Proverbs31:27 Amanun a-insung chena lampiho phatechan aven, chule thasetna changlhah jong anepon ahi." 
Proverbs31:28 Achate ahung thoudoh-un anunnom nahi atiuve; a-inneipun jong amanu apahcha lheh jengin ahi. 
Proverbs31:29 Chanu tamtah-in chonphat abolin, ahinla nangman amaho chu nakhokhel sohkeije." 
Proverbs31:30 Deisahna hi kilhep lhahna ahin, chule hoinahi pannabei ahi; ahinla Pakai gingjing numei vangchu, choi-atna umding ahi." 
Proverbs31:31 Akhutsoh chu amanu peuvin, chule kotpi phunga anatoh jousechun amanu vahchoi cheh hen." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Jerusalem lengpa David chapa thuhilpa thusei ho. 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Pannabei ho pannabei ahi tin thuhilpan aseije, pannabei ho pannabei; ijakai pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mihem khatnin nisa noija atohgimna jouse-a kona ipi phatchomna aneinah em? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Khang khat achemangjin, chule khangchom khat ahunglhung kitji-e; ahinla leiset a-imatih-in aum jingin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Nisa jong ahung sohdoh-in, nisa alhumkit jin, chule ahung sodohna lam mama-a akileloi jitai." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Hui chu lhanglam ngan anungin, chule sahlam ngan ahung lennun jin; tanglouvin akipei pei jengin, chule anundan kisem dungjuijin ahunglenun kitjin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Vadung jouse twipia alonglut nun, ahijeng vangin twipi chu adimdehpoi; vadungho chu ahung londohna lama chun akile kitnun ahi." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Thil jousehi tohgimnan adimsetnin, mihemin aseidoh theipoi; mitla thilmu achinpon, nakol jong athujah-a adim theipoi." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Thil anaumsa chu, ahung um kitding mama chu ahin; chule anakibolsa chu, ahung kibol kitding chu ahije; chule nisa noijahin thilthah ima aumpoi." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ven thilkhat chungchanga, hichehi athah ahi-e, tia gahsei thei umem? Eiho masangpeh, gollui laija ana umsa jeng ahi." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Masanglai thilho geldohna aumpon; khonunga hung umding honjong ahunglhung ding thil ho geldohna neideh pouvinte. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Thuhilpa keima hi Jerusalem'a Israel chunga leng kanahi. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Chule keiman vannoi'a thil kitongdoh ho jouse chung changhi chihna-a hola kholdoh nadin kalung kanapen ahi; hichehi Pathen'in akisinsah nadiuva mihem chapate chu thohgimna nasatah hi anapeh ahi. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Keiman nisa noija nakitongsa jouse chu kamutai; chule veuvin aboncha keijin pannabei le lhagao sunohphah ahibouve. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Akonsa chu kisujang thei louding; chule akisama chu kisimtha theilou ding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Kalungthimin keima le keima kakihoulim jin, hitin kati; veuvin, keiman mun jaotah chu kahin phatai, chule Jerusalem'a keima masanga anaumho jouse sangin chihna kakimube tai: Tahbeh mongin kalungin chihna le hetnalam hetdohna lentah aneitai." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Keiman chihna, ngolna, chule ngolchona hetdoh nadin kalung kanapen; hiche jonghi lhagao sunohphah ahi ti kamudoh-in ahi." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ajehchu chihna tamna-a gimna atamin; chule hetna haopa chun lungkhamna ahaove. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Keiman kalung sunga, tun chen, keiman nangma thanop na-in napatep inge, hijeh chun nopsahna hinkho mangin, tin kaseije: ahin, veuvin, hiche jonghi pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Keiman nuina hi, ngolna ahi kati; chule thanopna hi, ipin ahin sodoh ham?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Chihna toh kalungsung kiheto-a kakoi jeng vangin, keiman kalung sunga ju lama kakipeh nading; chule mihem chapatehon ahin nikho lhumkei uva, vannoi'a amaho ding atohdoh uva pha kamudoh kahsen, ngolchon nalama kipenge tin, kangaiton ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Keiman natohlen len katongin; keima din in tampi kakisah-in; chule lengpigui hon tampi kakibolin ahi. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Keiman hon le theilei tampi kakibolin, hiche sunga chun thei namkim kaphutnin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Keiman gammang hinsodoh-a thingphung ho twichap dingin, twikul tampi jong kakilaijin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Keiman soh pasal le soh numei tampi kaki choh-in, ka-insunga pengden soh tampi kaneijin; keima masanga Jerusalem'a anaum ho jouse sangin gancha alenle aneo kanei tamjon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Keiman dangka le sana, chule lengho le gamkai ho neile gou kidang dangho jong kakichom khomin; Keiman numei lasathem le pasal lasathem, chule mihem chapate kipana thei, tumgingthei manchah ho jatkim keijin kakichom khomin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Hitichun keima kanaloupi-in, chule kamasanga Jerusalem'a ana umho jouse sangin kanakhang touvin; chule ka chihna jong aum aumpeh-in ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Chule kamit tenin amunom tapou chu musah louvin kakoipon, kipana-a konin kalungthim kakham chah poi; ajehchu katohgim najousea kalung akipah-in, chule hiche chu katoh gimna jouse-a kona kachan chu ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Chujouvin keiman kakhut teni-a kanatohdoh ho jousele, tohgimna-a katohdoh ho kaven; chule, veuvin, aboncha chu pannabei le lungthim kisuhboina anahi bouvin, chule nisa noija hin imacha aphachom aumpoi." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Chuin keima chihna le ngolna chule ngolchona ngaitodin kakiheitan ahi: ajehchu lengpa nunga hungpa chun ipi aboldoh dingham? ana kiboldoh sajeng bou hiding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Chujouvin keiman vah-in muthim akhokhel banga, chihna-in ngolchon na akhokhel chu kanamudoh tan ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Michingpa mit teni chu aluchunga aumin; ahinla mingol vang chun muthim lah-a lam ajotnin ahi. Chule thilsoh khatchu abonchau chunga asoh-e ti keima tah-in kamudoh tai. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Chujouvin keiman kalung sunga kaseijin, mingol chunga thilsoh tobang, keima chung jenga jong asoh-in; achutile ipidinga ching jep kahim? kati; chuin kalung sunga, hiche jonghi pannabei ahi kati." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ajehchu a-imatih chanin miching chu mingol sangin geldoh-in aumdehpoi; tu-a umho jousehi ahunglhung ding nikho hole suhmila umsoh keiding ahi. Chule mi michingpa chu iti thi ham? mingol tobanga thi ahi. 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Hijeh chun keiman hinkho kahon ahi; ajehchu nisa noija nakitong doh hi keima dingin lungkhamna jeng ahi. Ajehchu imajouse pannabei le lungthim kisuhboina ahi. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Dihtah-in keiman nisa noija katoh gimna jouse kahon ahi; ajehchu keiman kanunga hungpa dinga kadalhah pehding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Chule amapa chu miching ahi mingol ahiding koijin ija ahetnem? hijeng jongle keiman nisa noija kachihna vetsahna-a, gimtah-a katohdoh ho jouse chung, aman vai ahop ding ahi. Hiche jonghi pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Hijeh chun nisa noija katohgimna ho jouse-a chun kalung kathoi sah-in ahi. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ajehchu chihna, hetna chule thudih-a tong gima mi aumin; ahijeng vangin amapan tonggim louhelpa chan dinga adalhah pehding ahi. Hiche jonghi pannabei le thil phaloutah ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ajehchu mihem khatnin atohgimna jousele, alunggimna chule nisa noija atohgim naho-a ipi amu-em?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ajehchu anikhoho jouse chu gentheina ahin, chule athohgimna jong lunghemna ahi; tahbeh-in, janteng jongle alungsung aolpoi. Hiche jonghi pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mihem khatnin an aneh-a, twi adona, chule ahinna-in atohgimna chunga nop asah sanga phajo aumpoi. Hiche jonghi Pathen khutna kon anahi ti, keiman kana mudoh-e." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ajehchu keima sanga koijin an neh akimu joh-a, ahiloule koijin nom asah joh-am?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ajehchu Pathen'in ama mitmun mipha chu chihna le hetna chule kipana apen; ahinla michonse vang chu, Pathen ang sunga miphapa peh ding chomkhom ding le sevum dingin, thoh hahsa apen ahi. Hiche jonghi pannabei le lungthim kisuhbohna ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Thil jouse din phat aumcheh-in, chule vannoi'a chule thil kigong jousen phat anei cheh-e." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Penphat aumin, chule thi phat aume; aphu phat aumin, chule akiphutsa bodoh phat aume." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Thaphat aumin, chule boldam phat aume; phetlhah phat aumin, chule sahdohna phat aume." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Ka phat aumin, chule nui phat aume; lunghem phat aumin, chule lam phat aume." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Songho paidoh phat aumin, chule songho lokhom phat aume; kikolchah phat aumin, chule kilhakang phat aume." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Amu phat aumin, chule mansahna phat aume; chintup phat aumin, chule paidoh phat aume." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Bo-eh phat aumin, chule khuibit phat aume; thipchetna umphat aumin, chule paodoh phat aume," 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Kingailut phat aumin, chule kimuda phat aume; kigal phat aumin, chule kicham phat aumin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Atongpa chun atohgimna-a kona ipi phatchomna aneijem? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Keiman mihem chapate kisinsahna dinga Pathen'in apeh thoh hahsat nachu keiman kamutai. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Aman thil ijakai jouse aphatchan hoitah-in asemin ahi: chujongle koimachan Pathen'in abula patna ajona geija ipi atoh doh-em ahetdoh joulouna dingun, alungthim sunguva vannoi thu akhumpeh tan ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ahinla mihem chu akipa thanopma, ahinkho-a thilpha abol tilouvin, amaho-a thilpha aumpoi ti keiman kahen ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Chujongle mihem jousen aneh-a, adona chule atohgimna jouse-a kona thilpha nomtah-a amanchah ding ahi, hichu Pathen thilpeh ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Pathen'in abol tapou chu a-imatih chana ding ahi, ti keiman kahei; chuche chunga chu belapthei, chule lahdohthei jong aumpoi. Chule hichehi Pathen'in mihemte ama angsunga kicha tah-a aumna diuva abol ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ana umsa chu tu-a umhi ahi; chule ahung umding jong chu anaumsa chu ahin; chule Pathen'in achesa chu anung holin ahi. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Chule chuche chungchon chun keiman nisa noija thutan na mun chu kamun, chua phatlouna aum; chule chonphatna mun'a khangit louna aum kamun ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Pathen'in michonpha hole migiloute chung thu atanding ahi; ajehchu thil kigong le thil kiboldoh chengse dingin phat khat aumcheh-e, tin keiman kalungsunga kaseijin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Mihem chapate umdan chungchanga hin, Pathen'in amaho hinphong doh henlang, chule amahotah in jong sahem ahiuhi kimudoh theileu, tin kalung sunga kaseijin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ajehchu mihem chapate chunga thil lhungchu sahemho chunga alhungin; thilkhat jeng jong amaho chunga alhung gellin ahi: khat athi bangin, khatjong athin; tahbeh-in, abonchauva haitheina kibang neicheh ahiuve; chutichun mihemin sahem chunga chungnunna aneipoi. Ajehchu aboncha pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Abon chaovin munkhat ajon cheh-un, abon chaova vutvaija kon ahiuvin, chule abon chaovin vutvai asoh kit jiuve." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mihem lhagao chunglama kaltouva, chule sahem lhagao leisetna akumsuh koijin ahet khah-em?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Hijeh chun mihem chu anatoh ho-a kipah thanoma aumding sanga phajo adang aumpoi ti keiman kahedoh tai; ajehchu hichu ama chan ahin; chule ama nunga ipi asoding ve dinga koijin ama apui ding ham? 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Chuti chun kahung kilen, nisa noija suhgentheina jouse chu kangaitoi: chule veuvin, joulhepma umte mitlhi chu, amahon lhamonsah aneipouvin; chule amaho sugentheite henga chun thaneina aume, ahinla amahon lhamonsah aneipouve." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Hijeh chun keiman ahingho tu-a hing nalaiho sangin, athiho tu-a athisaho kapah chajon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Tahbeh-in, amani sangin, tuchan geija umkha loulai, chule nisa noija thilse kibol mukhalou laipa chu aphajoi." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Avelin, keiman mihem khat aheng akomin amit thip lona thohgimnaho jouse le natohphaho jouse chu kangaiton; hiche jonghi pannabei le lungthim kisuhboina ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Mingolin akhut asim tumin, chule ama le ama tahsa akineh jin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Thohgim tahle lungthim kisuhboi puma khut ni dimsei neisangin, lungdam sella tah-a khut khat dim nei aphajoi." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Chujouvin keima kahung kile kitnin, chule nisa noija pannabei chu kamu doh-e." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Khatsehbou aumin, anina aumpoi: henge, aman cha aneipon sopi pasal jong aneipoi; ahinla atohgimna aki ngahtih aumpon; amit jong chu haonaho-a alunglhai joupon; koidinga katoh-a, chule kahinna thilpha kachansah louham? tin aseidehpoi. Hichejonghi pannabei ahin, nasatah-a thohgimna ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Khat sangin ni aphajoi; ajehchu atoh gimna lhona kipaman phatah amulhonin ahi. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ajehchu alhuh hon jongle, khat chun aloipa aphohding ding ahi; ahinla achanga umpa chu alhuh teng ada ahi; ajehchu aman akithopi ding aneipon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Chukitle mi ni alupkhom lhonle, akinehlum to lhonin; ahinla khat changseh chu iti kisuh lum thei ding ham?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Chule khat touvin ama hindou taleh, mi nin amapa chu anan jouding ahi; chule khaohol thum kiheh kop chu atanbai pon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Leng tehse ngoltah, thumop sangthei lou hisangin; chapang vaichatah le chingtah hi aphajoi." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ajehchu amachu songkul'a konin leng chang dingin ahungpot doh-in; hijongle ama lenggam sung mama-a peng khatchu ahung vaicha theije. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Keiman nisa noija kalsong hinna neiho jouse chu, ama khela lenga hung pangding cha ni lhinna chutoh kagah ngaito khomin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Mipi jouse leh amaho masanga anaumho jouse kichaitih aumpoi; nunga hung dingho jong ama chunga kipah deh loudingu ahi. Tahbeh-in hiche jonghi pannabei le lungthim kisuhboina ahi. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Pathen in'a nache tengle nakeng kivet phatnin, chule mingol ho longlhenna thilpeh sangin thu ngai dingin kigo jingin umjon; ajehchu amahon thilse aboluve ti angaito phapouve." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Nakam tamsah hih-in, chule Pathen angsunga thilkhat phongdoh dingin nalung kino dahen; ajehchu van'a Pathen aumin, nangma leiset chunga uma nahi; hijeh chun nathu seidoh chu lhom sah-in." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ijeh inem itile kisah lelna tamtah jala mang umji ahin, chule mingol aw chu athu tamseija konin akihen ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pathen henga kitepna khatna nakitep teng, peh ding ngongkai hih-in; ajehchu aman mingol ho-a kipana aneipoi; nathutep chu pe jengin." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Nakitepna pelouva naum sangin, nakitep louma apha jon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Nakam chu natahsa chonsetsah nadingin phal hih-in; vantil masanga jong hichehi suhkhel ahi tin seihih in. Ipidinga Pathen chu na aw-soa lunghanga, nakhutsoh thilho asuh manghel dingham?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ajehchu mang tamnale thu tamna-a chun pannabei tampi jong aumjie; ahinla nangman Pathen chu gingin. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Nangman gamsunga mivaichate kisuh gentheina, chule thutanlhahna le thudih pumhatna akibol namu-a ahile hichu datmo hih-in; ajehchu asang penpa sanga sang jopan akhohsah nan; chule amaho sanga sangjo aumnai." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Hiche chungchon chun leiset phatchomna hi mijouse dinga ahi, lengpa tah jengjong louma-a hinga ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Dangka ngailupa chu dangka-a lunglhai joulou ding, ninglhin na ngailupa chu punbe na-a lunglhai louding ahi; hiche jonghi pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Thil le lo apunbe teng, aneding jong apunben; chule chuche neiho dinga chu, amitnuva amu-u tilouva aphat chomna ipi umam?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Tamtah nehen lhomcha nejongle natong gimpa imut chu anomin; ahinla mihaopa haosatna chun ama a-imut sahpon ahi. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Keiman nisa noija thil phaloutah khat kamu aume; hichu haonahi aneipa kisuhkhah nadinga kikoija ahi. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Ahinla chuche haonaho chu thoh hahsatna phaloutah jeh-in amangthah jin, chule aman chapa khat ahingin, chule imacha akhutna aumpoi." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Amapa anu naobu-a kona ahungpot banga chu, ahung bang banga sagoh keova kile kitding, chule akhutna akichoi mang thei, atohgimna-a kona ima aki kenthei louding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Chule hiche jonghi thilsetah ahin, lamjouse-a ahung bang banga, kinungle cheh ding ahi. Chule ahomkeo dinga tonggimpan ipi phatchomna aneijem?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Aman ahin nikho jousen muthim lah-a an anen, chule hesoh tampi, lungsatna tampi chu anatna to athoh than ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Veovin, keiman kamudoh hi; Pathen'in mihem khat apeh ahinkho lhumkeija; nisa noija atohgimna jouse-a, an aneh-a, twi adona, akipa thanop dinghi thil phatah le kilomtah ahi; ajehchu hichu ama chan ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Amitakip henga Pathen'in haona le neile gou apen; chule chuche-a kona chu neding le, achan kilah nading, chule atohgimna-a akipa theina dingin thaneina apen ahi; Hichehi Pathen thilpeh ahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ijeh inem itile aman ahinlai nikhoho chu hageldoh theiponte; ajehchu Pathen'in alungsung kipana-in adonbut tan ahi. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Nisa noija thilse khat keiman kamui; chule hichu mihemte lah-a umjing thil ahi. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Pathen'in mihem khat ahinan angaichat jouse imacha alhahsam louna dinga haosatna, neile gou, chule jana apen, ahijeng vangin Pathen'in chuche ho-a kona chu aneh theina ding tha apepon, ahinla gamdang min bou anen ahi. Hichehi pannabei, nat phaloutah ahi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mihem khatnin cha jakhat hinghen lang, chule kum tampi hing hen, hitichun ahin nikhoho tamtah hihen lang, ahin ahinna chun thilpha-in lungkimna neihih hen, chule vui louvin jong umtaleh; keiman amapa sangchun aphat louva pen aphajoi kati." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ajehchu ama pannabei to ahung lutnin, chule muthim lah-a achemang tan, chule aminchu muthimin akhukhum ding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Chukal valin aman nisa anamu pon, imacha jong anahe poi; aman khatjopa sangin olna akimu joh-in ahi." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Henge, kum sangkhat nivei hing henlang, thilpha mu hihleh, mijouse abonchauva munkhatna checheh hilouham?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Mihem tohgimna jousehi akamsung ding ahin, ahijeng vangin aduchat achim dehpoi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ajehchu michingin mingol ho sanga ipi atamnei deh em? ahing nalaiho masanga kalsonje he-a vaichaten, ipi aneideh em?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Gamtin ngaichat sangin, mitna mu joh chu aphajoi; hiche jonghi pannabei le lungthim kisuhgimna ahi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Aumsa chu minvosa ahitan, chule hichu mihem ahije ti akihen; ama sanga thahatjo toh ama kitet theihoi ahideh poi." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Pannabei punsah-a thil tampi akimudoh tolhonin, mihem dinga hichu ipiham aphat chomna?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ijeh inem itile mihem hinkhon nisa lim banga kitol mang loithei sung ajot laija, ama dia aphachom koijin ahetdoh ding ham? Ajeh chu ama athi nungle hiche nisa noija ipi ahungso ding koijin aseitheijem?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Minphat hi thao mantam tah sangin aphajon; chule thi nikhohi pen nikho sangin aphajon ahi. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Lunghemna in'a gachehi, golvahna in'a gache sangin aphajoi; ajehchu hiche chu mijouse hinkho kichaini ahin, chule ahing nalai chun alung sunga achin jing ding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Hesohna hi nuina sangin aphajoi; ajehchu lunghemna melput vangin lungsung semphat cheh in aum jie. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Miching lungsung chu lunghemna insunga aumin, ahinla mingol ho lungsung vang chu kipana inabou aum jie." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mihem dinga michingin mi aphona jah chu, mingol lasah kijah sangin aphachom jon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ajehchu mingol nuigin chu linga belto kikhot gin poh lenglung tobang ahin; hiche jonghi pannabei ahi. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Tahbeh-in suhgentheina hin miching asungolin, chule nehguh thilpeh hin lungsung asusen ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Thilkhat kichaina chu akipatna sangin aphajoi; chule lhagaova thohhat chu lhagaova kiletsah sangin aphajoi. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Lunghang dingin nalungthima kino loihih-in, ajehchu lunghan hi mingol ho angsunga bou auma ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Tulai sanga malai nikho ho aphatjoh chu ipi jeh hintem, tin nangman seihih-in; ijeh inem itile nangman hiche chung changhi chingthei tah-in nakhol pon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Chihna hi gou kilo bangin dingin aphan; chule hiche jal hin nisa mute dingin phatchomna aume. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ajehchu sum hi kihon bitna ahibangin, chihna jonghi kihon bitna ahin; ahinla hetna achungchon na chu, chihna hin ama neiho chu hinna ape-in ahe." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Pathen natoh hohi gah ngaiton, ajehchu aman akhonsa-a asem chu, kon ajansah thei dingham?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Hamphat nikhon kipah thanomin, ahinla hahsat nikhole ngaiton; mihemin khonung leh amanunga imacha amudoh louna dingin, Pathen'in mihem khatjoh banga achom joh jong chu asem cheh ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Keiman pannabei nikhoho sunga hin imajouse kamusohtai. Midih khat achonphatna-a mangthah aumin, chule migilou khat agitlou vanga sottah hinga aumin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Tamtah chunga kichon phatsah hih-in; chih jong kichihsah hih-in; ipidinga nangma nangle nang nakisuhset dingham? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Phatlou bolval hih-in, ngoljong ngolval hih-in; ipidinga naphat masanga nathi jeng ding ham?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Hichehi nangman nakimat khah a pha ahi; henge, nakhut jong hichea konchun loidoh hih-in: ajehchu amaho jouse lah-a kona Pathen ginga chu hungdoh teiding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Khopi sunga um mithahat som sangin, chihna hin miching athahatsah jon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ajehchu leiset chunga thilpha bolla, chonselou, midihtah khatcha aumpon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Chujongle thu kiseiho jousehi abonchan ngaikhoh hih-in, ajole nasohpan nasapsetna kijah getnin nate." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Ajehchu chutobanga chu nangman jong midangho masapsetji chu nalung sungin ahe matchet jin ahi. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hitiho jousehi keiman chihna-a kaphot chet ahitai. Keiman ching taveleng kanatin, ahinla chihna chu keija konin anagamla lheh-e." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Gamlatah-a um, chule hathuh-a thuh chu, kon amudoh jou dingham?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Hetna dingle kholchil nading, chule chihna holdohna ding le thilho umjedan holdoh nading, ngolna phatlou dan hetdohna dingle ngolna le lung chatvaina hetdoh nadingin, keiman kalungthim kana mangchan ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Chule keiman alungsung Thangkol le Len ho ngen hia, chule akhut teni khaohol ho bangjeng, thina sanga khajo numei kamudoh-in ahi. Koi hileh Pathen lung lhaisahpa chu amanu-a kona hoidoh jouding, ahinla chonse vangchu amunun amat khahding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Veuvin, hiche hi kamudoh ahi, tin thuhilpan aseije: thil ahung kipat dan mudoh ahina dingin, khat khatnin kasimin;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Kahinnan ahol nahlai pentah chu keiman kamudoh poi. Sangkhat lah-a pasal khat kamudoh-in; ahinla amaho jouse lah-a chun keiman numei khat jengjong kamudoh poi. 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Veovin, hibouhi kamu doh-e, Pathen'in mihem dihtah-a asem ahin, ahinla amahon semdoh thu tamtah aholdoh-un ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Miching tobang ding koiham? chule thilkhat aledohna he-a koiham? mihem khatchu achihna-in amai avahsah-in; chule amai ngalna jongchu kikhel jengding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Keiman, nangma kathumop nahi, Pathen'a nakitepna jalchun, lengpa thupeh chu chingtupmin." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Amitmua kona chedoh dingin kikinsah hih-in; thilse-a pang teitei hih-in; ajehchu aman adeichan chu aboljeng ahi. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Lengpa thu umna-a chun thahatna aumin; chule amahenga nangman ipi nabol ham tia seithei dinga koiham? 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Koi hileh ama thupeh nitchan chun thilse atolouding ahi; Chule michingpa lungthim chun phat le thu tanlhahna adatkhen theije. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Thil kigong jouse-a dingin phat le thutanlhahna aumcheh-in, hijeh chun mihem hamsetna hi amachunga lentah in aumjingin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Ijeh inem itile aman ipi ahung soding ahepoi; ajehchu itih phatna ahungso ding koijin ama aseipeh theidem? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Lhagao henden na dinga lhagao chunga tha neija mihem koimacha aumpon; thi nikhon jong aman thaneina aneideh poi. Chule hiche gal kisat sunga jong chun ontholna aumpon; khangit louna-in jong chuche-a kipelut hochu ahuhdoh louding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Hicheho jousehi keiman kamutan, chule nisa noija thil kibol jouse gelnan kalungsung kamangchan; mikhatnin ama le ama kisuh khahna dinga midang khat chunga thunei phat khat aumjin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Hitichun keiman migilou akivui kamun, amaho chu munthenga kona hunglut uva potdoh-u ahin, chule amaho chu chutobang abolnao khopi sunga chun suhmilin aumun ahi. Hiche jonghi pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Natoh phalou chunga thu kitanlha chu gangtah-a tohdoh-a aumloujeh-in, mihem chapate lungsung chu thilse boldingin kigojou depmin aumjin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Michonse khatnin thilphalou jakhat veijen bolhen lang, chule ahin nikho kisaosah jongleh, Pathen ginga, ama anga gingkhen cha umho vang chun phatna amutei dingu ahi ti keiman kahei." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Ahinla migilou dinga vang phalou helding ahi; ajehchu aman Pathen anga kichatna aneilou jeh-a, nilim tobang ahin nikhoho chu sao louding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Leiset chunga pannabei ja kitongdoh thil aume; hichu mihem khat chu midih tah ahivanga, migiloute chunga thilsoh tobang achunga soh umin; chukitle, migilou tah ahivanga, michonpha te chunga thilsoh tobanga achunga soh aumin ahi. Hiche jonghi keiman pannabei ahije kati." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Chujouvin mihemin aneh-a, adona, chule nomtah-a aum sanga phajo nisa noija aneilou jeh-in, keiman nopsahna kalheng jotai. Ijeh inem itile Pathen'in nisa noija apeh ahinkho lhumkeija, hiche hi atoh gimna-a umjing ding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Keiman chihna hetna dingle, leiset chunga kin kitongdohho mun'a dinga kalungthim kimanchah phatnin; (ajehchu sun hile jan hijongle amitsing lou aume);" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Keiman mihem khatnin nisa noija na kitonga kona amudoh joulou, Pathen natoh jouse chu kamun ahi. Ajehchu mihemin tonggim tah-in holdoh ding go jongle, amudoh louding ahin, chukal valin; miching khatnin het dingin ngaito jongle, aman amudoh joulouhel ding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ajehchu hitiho jouse hi gah phondoh jeng dingin keiman kalungin kagelin, michonpha te le michingho chule anatoh houchu Pathen khutna um ahin; mihem koimachan amaho angsunga thil umho jouse jal-in kingailutna hile kihotna hile ahedoh thei pouvin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Thil jouse kibangin mijouse henga alhung cheh-e: michonpha le migilou chunga; apha chung le atheng chung chule athenglou chunga; ganlhai bolpa le ganlhai bol loupa chunga thilkhat alhung khom cheh-in ahi: michonse pa jong miphapa tobang ahin; chule akihahselpa jong kihahsel kichapa tobang ahi. 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Nisa noija kitongdoh jouse lah-a hin ase khat aumin, mijouse henga thilsoh khat aumin ahi: Tahbeh-in mihem chapate lungsunghi setna-in adimsetnin, chule ahinlai jengun jong alungsung uva lung chatvaina aumin, chujouteng amaho athiho henga acheji taove." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ahinla mihingho jousetoh kijopmat pa dingin kinepna aume; ajehchu uicha hingchu keipi bahkai athisa sangin aphachom jon ahi. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ijeh inem itile ahingho chun athidingu akihetnuve; ahinla athihon vang imacha akihet pouvin, amahon tohman jong anei tapouve. Ajehchu amaho suhmila um ahi taove." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Chujongle tu-a hi amaho mingailutna, mihotna, chule mi mitthipna chu manga ahitan; Nisa noija kitongdoh thil ipi hileh, amahon a-imatih chana dinga chan anei louvu ahitai." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Chen, kipah thanomin na an kineh inlang, chule lungnom selin nalengpi twi kidonin; ajehchu tun Pathen'in nanatoh ho asangtai." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Naponsil ho chu bangleh jing jenghen; chule nalujanga jong thao lhasam hihhel hen. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Pathen'in nisa noija napeh, pannabei nahinkho lhungkeijin, nangailu tah na-inneipi toh kipah thanomin chengkhom lhonin; ajehchu hichehi nahinkho sunga nisa noija nanatoh gimna-a nachan chu ahi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ipi hijeng jongle nakhutnin tohdinga amaiphah chan chu, natha jesal teh-in tongin; ajehchu nangman najot jing lhankhuh asunga chun, tohding jong, tohgon jong, hetna jong, chihna jong aumtapoi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Keima kahung kile kitnin, nisa noija kamudoh tai: kilhaitet jong alhai ajangkhaipa-a ahipon, gal kisat jong ahatpa-a ahipon, changlhah jong michang pa-a ahipon, haona jong hetthemna neipa-a ahipon, khohsahna jong khut thempa-a ahipoi; Ahinla abonchauva dinga phat le phatpha kitoh khaji ahibouve." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ajehchu mihemin ama phat akihet theipoi: thina thei lenthang giloutah sunga ngaho akimat bangle, vachaho thangkol sunga oh bangin; hicheho chu photlot louva achunguva achuhteng, mihem chapate chu phat phalouva a-ohji taove." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Hiche chihna jonghi keiman nisa noija kamu ahitan, hichehi keidin sangtah abange." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Khopi neocha khat ana umin, chule asunga jong mi lhomcha anachenge; chuin leng lentah khat hiche khopi dou dingchun ahungin, aumkim veltan, chule pal nasatah tampi atungdoh tai." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tun hiche khopi sunga chun mivaicha miching khat anaumin, amapan achihna jal-in hiche khopi chu ahuhdohtan ahi. Achuti jeng vangin koimachan chuche mivaichapa chu geldoh-in aneipoi." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Hichun keiman kanaseije, chihna hi thahat sangin aphajoi; ahijeng vanginla mivaichapa chihna chu i-sah louvin anaumin, chule athuseiho jong ngaipeh louvin aume." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mingol ho lah-a vaihompa khosap awgin sangin, michingho thusei chu thipbeh chan akingaipeh jon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Chihna hi galmanchah tampi sangin aphachomjoi; ahinla michonse khatnin thilpha tampi asusen ahi. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Thousi thisahon thao namtui sempa thaonam a-uisah-in, chutobang chun ngolna themkhat-in achihna le aja umna jeh-a kijabolpa chu asuminsen ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Miching lungthim chu akhut jetna aumin, ahinla mingol lungthim chu aveilama aume." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Mingol chu alampia akalsonteng jongle, achihna chun alosam sah-in; chule mijouse henga mingol kahi tin aseilen ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Vaihompa lungthim chu nangma douna-a ahung kipatdohle, nangman naum namun dalha hih-in, ajehchu kipehlutna hin suhkhelna lentah asemphan ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Vaihompa-a kona suhkhel hungdoh banga, keiman nisa noija thilse kamudoh aume:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Ngolchon nahi jatah-in akikoi sangin; chule mihao chu mun nema atouvin ahi. 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Sakol ho chunga soh ho atouva, chule pipuiho tolla soh ho banga avaleu kamun ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Koi hile khuh laija chu, akokhuh laija ama lhalut ding; chule koi hile tho kikai tumsepa chu, gul'in achuhding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Koihile songho ladoh-a chu, chua chu kisukha ding; chule koihile thing chenna chu, chua chu kisukha ding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Heicha chu amola, amangcha pa chun aha chu akinol hem loule, atha ahaje ding ahi; ahinla chihna hi lamhil dinga phatah ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Tahbeh-a gul'in lhimlouva achuh pai bangin, kamtam jonghi aphat chomna aumpoi." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Miching kamsoh thuchengho chu lungsetna ahin, hinla mingol kamsoh vang chun amatah aval lhum ding ahi;" 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Akamsoh thubul hochu ngolna ngen ahin, ahoulim kichaina chu lung bulhinglou setna ngol thubuh ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Mingol jong chu thua dim ahi; mihemin ipi ahunglhun ding asei theipon, chule ama nunga ipi ahunglhung ding kon aseipeh theijem?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Mingol tohgimna chun amaho jouse asulung jing game; ajehchu aman khopisung jona iti che dingham ti ahepoi. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Vo gamsung, nalengpa chapang neocha ahia, chule napipui hon jingkah-a nehkhom na aneijule, ohe ada nahi!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Vo gamsung, nalengpa chu milunlaiho chapa ahi-a, chule napipui hon khamna ding hilouva, thaneina dingjoh-a, aphatcha nehkhom na aneijule, anunnoma nahi!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Thaset behset jeh-in in angot lhajin, chule khut thaset vangin in alhujin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Golvah hi nuina dinga kibol ahin, chule ju hin mi akipa sah-in ahi; ahinla sumin thiljouse ahisah theijin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Nalungthim jengin jong lengpa chu samse hih in; chule nalupna dansunga jong mihao samse hih-in: ajehchu chungleng vachan na aw po khan tin, chule lhaving neikhatnin athu galhut khante." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Nachanglhah twi chunga seplhan; ijeh inem itile nikho tamtah jouteng namu kitding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Mi sagi henga, chule get henga jong chanvou pe-in; ajehchu nangman leiset chunga itobang thilse ahunglhun ding nahe poi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Meilomho go adimset tengle, amaho le amaho leiset chunga ahung kilhei-ong jiuve; chule thingphung chu lhanglam ngan, ahiloule sahlam ngan lhutaleh, alhuhna mun laitah-a chu, kijamden jengding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Huinun vejing pa chun muchi atulouding, chule meilomho khohsah jing pa chun chang a-at louding ahi." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nangman hui chena lampi nahetlou bangle, numei naovop sunga aguho iti khanlet ham nahetlou bangin; ijakai sema Pathen natoh ho jong nahepon ahi." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Jingkah lamle namuchi kitun, chule nilhah lam jongle nakhut umthimsah hih-in; ajehchu hichepa ham, khuchipa ham, hoichepen chu hung phatou dingham, ahiloule ania kibanga phading ham ti nangman nahepoi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Tahbeh-in vahhi anomin, chule mit dingin nisa vet hi anomta ngeije." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Hijongle mihem chu kum tampi ahina, hicheho jouse-a chu akipa le; muthim nikhoho chu kigeldoh hen, ajehchu hicheho chu tamtah hiding ahi. Ahunglhung jouse chu pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Vo gollhang, nakhangdon na-a kipah-in; chule nakhangdon lai nikhon nalung thimin nakipasah jinghen, nalungin adeilam le namitnin amu nomna lam chu juijin; amavang thil hichengse jeh-a hi Pathen'in thupi tanna-a napuilut ding ahi, tihi nangman kihet nin." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Hijeh chun nalungthima konin hesohna koidoh in, chule natahsa-a konin aphalou koimangin; ajehchu chapanlai le khangdonlai hi pannabei ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Nikho phalouho hunglhun masang, hicheho-a hin thanopna himhim kaneipoi, tia nasei nading kum phalouho ahung nai masangin; tu nakhangdon lai nikho sunghin nasempa geldoh-in." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Nisa ahin, vah ahin, lha ahin, ahsi ho ahin, athimsoh masang, meilom ho jong gojuh jouva akilekit masang;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 In ngahho kithing thinga ahung um nitengule, mihat ho amaho chama ahung kunlhah diu, sumhei hehhon alhom behseh jeh uva atoh-u angahdiu, chule bangkotna kona khodahho thimdela umdingu," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Chule khopi lamlena kot ho kha-a hung umding, sumhei kiheh gin anemsuh teng, chule mihem khat chu vacha husa-a hung thoudoh ding, chule lathem chanuho jouse suhnema hung umdingu ahi;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Chujongle amahon munsang akichat tengule, kichatna lamtina hung umding, almond thing hung pahdoh ding, khao khopi chu pohgih hung hiding, chule ngaichat hungbei ding ahi. Ijeh inem itile mihemin atonsot in chu ajot ahin, chule lunghemho chu lamlhah ho-a acheleuvin ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Ahiloule dangka khao ahung kilhap, ahiloule sana lheng ahung kisuhkeh masang, twinah phunga bel ahung kisukeh, ahiloule twikhuh phunga twikhai dohna kang ahungbal masangin, nasempa geldoh-in." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Chuteng leivui chu ahina ngai leisetna kile kitding; chule lhagao chu apepa Pathen henga kilekit ding ahi. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Pannabei ho pannabei, ijakai pannabei ahije, tin thuhilpan aseije." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Chule achungchonin, thuhilpa chu miching ahi jeh-in, miho chu hetna anahil nalaijin; henge, aman phatah-in alungin angaiton, aholdoh-in, chule thuchih tamtah asutoh-in ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thuhilpan, santhei thuho, chondihna thu kisunho, thutah ho jengjong anaholdoh-in ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Miching thusei ho chu thihtul monghem tobang ahin; kelngoi chingpa khatnin apehdoh-a, khoppi lamkaihon akhet detnu thingkil tobang ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Chujongle, kachapa, hicheho-a hin kitil khouvin; lekha tamtah semsem jong achaina aumpon, chule lekha hasim behset jonghi tahsa cholna ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Eihon athu pumpi khumkhana chu ngaiju hite: Pathen gingin, chule athupeh chengse nitsoh keijin; ajehchu hichehi mihem tohding pumpi chu ahi." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Ajehchu Pathen'in nakitong jouse chu, thil kiselguh jouse toh, apha hihen ase hijongle, thupi tana-a ahin pohlut ding ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Laho lah-a la, hichehi Solomon la ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Aman ami chopna akama chun eihinchop hen, ajehchu nangailutna chu lengpitwi sangin atuijon ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Nangma thaotwi phatah ho namtui jeh-in, na min chu thaotwi hung longdoh abangin; hiche jehchun nungah thenghon nangma nangailu uve." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Neikai jin, keihon nanunga hung lhaijunge; lengpan keima a-indan sung eilhuttai. Keiho nangma-a kakipaova kathanop diu ahin, chule neingailut nao chu lengpitwi sanga kageldoh jingdiu ahi, lungdih tah-in nangma nangailu uvin ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Keima kavome, ahinla vo nangho Jerusalem chanute, keima Cedar ponbuh ho le Solomon pondal hobangin kamellome." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Kavom jehle, nisan eisah jeh-in, neive hih-un; kanu chapateho alung hangun; lengpilei ho eingah sah-un; ahinla keima tah-in lengpilei kangahpoi." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Vo kalhangai, nangman nakelngoi hon hoilaija navah-a, sun teng hoija nagakol sah jiham, neisei peh-in; ipijeh-a nagol ho kelngoihon lah-a mikhat vahlele banga kaum dingham?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Vo numei ho lahlah a melhoipennu, nangman nahetlouva ahile, nakelngoihonho cheche nalama chenlang, chule kelngoi chingpa ponbuho komdunga chun nakelngoi nouho chu vah-in." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Vo kangainu, keiman Pharaoh kangtalai kai sakol honkhat toh nangma kahin tekah-e." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Nabeng teni-a kijepna kigolho chu nakilompin, nangonga sana khivuiho chun namel lomsah-e." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Keihon sana-a kijepna kasem pehdiu, chule akilmatnaho dangka-a kasem dingu ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Lengpa adokhanga atou chun, kathao namtui namchu ahung potdoh-in ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Kangaitah chu keija din myrrh lomkhat ahin, jankhovah-a kanoi teni kah-a lumding ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Kangai chu keijadin Engadi lengpilei honsunga ponlou thingphung abilla kehto bang ahi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Kangainu, ven, namel ahoije, ven, namel ahoije, namit teni vakhu mit abange." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Kangaipa, ven, namel ahoije; henge, dei-umtah nahi! ijalkhun jong a-eng selin ahi." 
SongOfSongs1:17 I-inkam jouse cedar thingjeng ahin, chule i-insung jouse jong chahthing jeng ahi." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Keima Sharon pah le, phaicham ho-a lily pah chu kahi." 
SongOfSongs2:2 ling le khaoho lah-a Lily pah bangin, chutobang chun kangainu chu nungah ho lah-a aume." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Theithup thing gammang thinglah-a aumbangin, chutobang chun kangaipa chu golhangho lah-a aume. Keima alimnoija chun kipah tah-in katouvin, chule aga chu kateple alhum keijin ahi." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Amapan keima nehkhom na ina eipuilutnin, chule kachunga apondal chu ngailutna ahi." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Lengpitwi jin neilhon lang, theithup changhon neilung monin, ajehchu ngailut natna-a na-a kahitai." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Akhut veilam kalu noija aumin, chule akhut jetlama chun eikoije." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Vo nangho Jerusalem chanute, loulaija sakhigol anuho le achalho panna kathupeh nahiuve, ngailutna hi ama chamtah-a ahung um tilouvin, nanghon suhthou tho dingle suhkhah thoding gohih-un." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Kangaipa aw kajai! Veovin, ama molsang ho chunga kichom pumle, lhangho chopkhup pumin kaheng lama ahunge." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Kangaipa chu sakhigol ahiloule sakhinou tobang ahi; ven, ama kabang tomuva adinge, bangkot ho-a konin aven, bang vangkah-a konin ahung khodah-e." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Kangaipa chun thu ahin seijin, chule keima henga: hungthouvin, kangainu, keija dia melhoinu, hungpot dohtan." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ajehchu vetemin, phalbi akichaitan, gojuh phat akichaijin chule kho aphatan ahi." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Leiset chunga pahchaho ahung kilang doh-in, lasah phat ahung lhung tan, chule igam sunguva vahui ham gin akijatai." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Theichang phung jong ahung gadohtan, chule lengpiguiho jong aga dongset toh agim namtuitah ahin pedoh tai. Thouvin kangainu, keidia melhoinu, hungpotdoh jengtan." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Vo ka vakhu, songpi khikehkah le, songkol kalbi kidona mungil laiho-a chengnu, namaiso neimu sah inlang, na aw neijah sah temin, ajehchu na aw angeijin, chule namaiso jong amel lomin ahi, ati." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Lengpilei suse-a sial ho, chule sial nouho neimatpeh un, ajehchu kalengpigui gahou adongset nalaijin ahi." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Kangaipa chu keija ahin, chule kei ama-a kahi. Aman Lily pahho lah-a akelngoi hon avah-in ahi." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kho ahung vah-a, chule le-limho akitolmang kahsen, hung kiheijin, kangaipa, Bether mol chunga lhale sakhi chalgol, ahiloule sakhinou bangin hung umin." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Janle kajalkhun chunga keiman kalhangaipa chu kaholjin; ama kahol lelen, ahinla kamu joupon ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Keima, tun thouving ting, khopi sunga vahleng ting, kholai dung le lamlen ho-a kalhangaipa gaholinge, katin; ama kahol lelen, ahinla kamu joupon ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Khopi vil le-a khongah ho chun eimuvin, keiman ahenguva, keiman kalhangaipa nanamu uvem? tin kadongin ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:4 Amaho themcha khatbou kagahkhel panbep nalaijin, keiman kalhangaipa chu kakimudoh paitai: keiman amapa chu eihinga kanu in, eina vopna indan sung kalhut kahsen katuh detnin kalhakang pon ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Vo nangho Jerusalem chanute, loulaija sakhigol anuho le achalho panna kathupeh nahiuve, ngailutna hi ama chamtah-a ahung um tilouvin, nanghon suhthou tho dingle suhkhah thoding gohih-un." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Meikhu khompi banga, myrrh le thao namtui gim namsela, sumkolvei pa thao namtui jouse pumma gamthipma kon hungdoh-a khu koiham?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Veuvin, Solomon talai ahi; chuche kimvella chun pasal hangsan cheh somgup aumuvin, Israel lah-a ahangsan cheh ahiuve." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Galsat themsa cheh ahijeh-un, abonchauvin chemjam akichoijun; Jan kichat tijatna jeh-in, amijousen achemjamu ataijuva akiko cheh-un ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Solomon lengpan Lebanon thingin, talai khat akisemin ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Aman akhom jouse dangka-in, alhong sana-in, chule achung khuse chu ponsandup min asemin, alailung chu Jerusalem chanuten dei umtah-in asemun ahi." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Vo nangho Zion chanute, potdoh unlang, ajinei nikho, alungsung kipa nikho-a anun lallukhuh akhuhpeh kikhuh-ah Solomon lengpa khu gaveovin." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ven, kangainu, namel ahoije! ven, nahoilheh jenge, namai khuna pon kah-a namit teni vakhu mit abangin, nasam jong Gilead molsanga kona hungkumlha kel hon abange." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Nahaho chu kelngoipi hon amul akivojoutil akisil joutil uva ahungpot doh-u toh abangun; amaho asohkop cheh ahiuvin, alah uva nouneilou khatcha aumpoi." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Nane teni jong patsan abangin, nakam jong ahoilheh jengin; nadeh pang jong nasamlom lah-a kolbuthei uma abangin ahi." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Na-ngong jong mihat ho lumdal sangkhat kikhaina, David'in galvon koinadinga asah insang abangin ahi." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Na noi teni jong sakhinou ni pengkop, lily pah lah-a lhale abange." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kho ahungvah-a nilimho akitolmang kahsen, keima myrrh molsang lama chule bego molsanga gaum ingkate." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Namel akilome, kangainu, natichung-ah nolnading ima aumpoi." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Labanon'a konin chekhom hite, kajiholnu, Lebanon'a konin kilhon hite; Amana lhangvuma konin, Shenir le Hermon lhangvuma konin, keipi bahkaiho kul-a konin, chule lutnu molsang ho-a konin vetemin." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Kasopinu, kajiholnu, nangman kalungsung nalajoutai; nangman namitna khatvei neihinvet le, na ngonga khivui khatna konin kalungsung nalajoutan ahi." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Kasopinu, kajiholnu, nei ngailutna hi iti noptam! na ngailutna hi lengpitwi sanga iti phatjoh hitam! Nathao kinujol jong gimnamtui jouse sanga iti namtui joh-a hitam!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Vo kajiholnu, nane teni, khoiphanga kon khoiju tobangin ahung valhan; khoijule bongnoi naleigui noija aume; chule naponsil ho namtui dan Lebanon gimnamtui abang jengin ahi." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Kasopinu, kajiholnu chu hon kiget khum ahin; twisam kiting, twinah kihuh ahi." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Na thingphung ho jong kolbuthei hon, aga hoitah-a ga, ponlou namtui thing le thao namtui thing," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Thao namtui le thing namtui, Aigeju le thingthal, begothing jouse toh; myrrh le aloe, chule anamtui penhotoh," 
SongOfSongs4:15 Twiputna honleiho, hintwi twikhuh, chule Lebanon'a hungkona luidungho abang jengin ahi." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Vo sahlam hui, khangin, chule lhanglam hui, hungin; kahon sunghi gimnam tuihon alosohna dingin hung nungin. Kangaipa chu ahon sunga hunglut henlang, atheiga hoitahtah hohi hung nehen." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Kasopinu, kajiholnu, keima kahonsunga kahunglut tan; ka myrrh le ka gimnamtui kakikhol khomtan; kakhoibal le kakhoiju kanetan; kalengpitwi le kabongnoi kadontai. Neovin, vo loile golte; donun, nengtah-in donun, vo kangailut teho." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Keima kalumin, ahin kalungthim akhangjinge; kangailutpa aw kajai, aman kot akiuvin, kot neihonin, kasopinu, kangailutnu, ka vakhu, keija dia chamkimnu; ajehchu kaluchang daitwijin atomin, kajang sam kisom jong jandaitwi lha-in adimtai." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Kasangkhol chol kasutlha tai; iti kaki-ah ding hitam? Kakeng kakisop joutai; iti kasuhbohkit ding ham? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Kangaipan kot-hom kah-a akhut ahin lhunglut nin, ama gelnan kalungsung akihot jengin ahi." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Kangaipa kot honpeh dinga kathodoh leh, kakhutna myrrh avalha-in, chule kakhutjung ho-a gimnamtui avalhan, kotkilna chunga chun achu-in ahi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Kangaipa chu kot kahonpehtan, ahinla kangaipa chu akihei mangin, anachetai. Aman thu aseichun kahinna alhasam jengin ahi. Keiman ama kahol holin, ahinla kamujou dehpoi; keiman ama kakouvin, ahinla eidonbut tapoi." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Khopi sunga vahle khongah hon eimudoh-un, eivouvin, eimavo taove; kulpi ngahhon kaponlukhu eilah mangpeh uvin ahi." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Vo Jerusalem chanute, keiman thu kapeh-u nahi, nanghon kangaipa namu-ule, ama ngaina-a na-a kahitai, tin neinasei peh-un." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Midangin adeipa sanga nangin nadeipa chungnungjo dehham, Vo nangma numei lah-a hoichungnung nu? Midangin adeipa sanga nangin nadeipa chungnungjo dehham, nangman chuto bangtah-a nei gahchah-u chu?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Kangaipa chu angou seh-in avouso asan heovin, sangsom lah-a achungnung penin ahi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Aluchang jong sana thengset abangin; asamho jong aboh litlet nin, chule va-ah bangin avomsetnin ahi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amit teni jong vadung panga uma vakhu mit, bongnoija kisop thenga kitoh chetna kibut abangin ahi." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Abeng teni jong gimnamtui kikholna, pahcha namtuitahho abangin; aneho jong myrrh gimnamtui tah valha le, lily pahcha abange." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Akhutteni jong sana khutjem achunga khisong engdum abangin; atahsa jong saiha kisuitoh bangleh khisong duma kilut abange. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Akengteni chu songval khompi bangleh sana thengset khom tunna chunga kitung abangin; Amelput chu Lebanon thing bangle cedar thing hoipentah toh abange. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Akam jong aphata ngeijin, amachu lamjousea dei aumin ahi. Vo Jerisulem chanute, hichehi kangaipa chu ahi, hichehi kagolpa ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Nangaipa chu hoilamma chemanga hitam? Vo nang numei lah lah-a hoichungnung nu, keihon ama kaholhu theina diuvin, nangaipa hoilanga kihei manga ham?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Kangaipa chu Gimnamtui umna honsunga, aganhonho vah dingle, lily pahho loukhom dingin, ahon sunga achelutnin ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Keima kangaipa-a kahi, chule kangaipa chu keija ahi; ama lily pah lah-a aganhon avah-in ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Vo kangai Tirzah bangin nangma nahoije, Jerusalem bangin namellomin, ponlap dom galmi honpi bangin tijat na-ume." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Keijakonin namit teni heidoh-in, ajehchu hiho chun eisuboije. Nasam chu Gilead'a kona hungkumlha kel hon abangin ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Nahaho chu kelngoipi hon amul akivojoutil akisil joutil uva ahungpot doh-u toh abangun; amaho asohkop cheh ahiuvin, alah uva nouneilou khatcha aumpoi." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Nadeh pang jong nasamlom lah-a kolbuthei uma abangin ahi. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Lengnu somgup, thaikem somget, chule nungah theng simjoulou aume." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Kavakhu, keija dia chamkim, keija dia khatseh bou ahi; anu-a dia cha changkhat ahin, chule ahingnu deilhenpen ahi. Nungah ho, lengnu ho chule thaikem hon amanu amuvin, nunnomnu atiuvin, chule apahchao vin ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Jingkah banga hung vahdoh-a, lhabanga hoi, nisa banga thengset, chule galmi ponlap domhon khat banga tijat umhi, koi numei ahitabep dem?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Phaicham theiga ho ve dingin, lengpiguiho mumtam ve dingle, kolbuthei ho pahtam ti ve dingin, keima beleilut honsunga kachesuh-in ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Kahetmanlou hellin kahinna-in, Amminadib sakol kangtalai bangin eina semtan ahi." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Hungkilen, hungkilen, vo Shulam nungahnu; keihon nangma kavet theina dingun; hungkilen, hungkilen. Shulam nungah nu-a hi ipi navet dingu ham? Galsatmi hon ni umkhom banga?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Vo leng chapa chanu, nakeng teni chu kengkoh naseteng iti hoija hoi hitam! namalbul teni kisuhtona jong sana-a kisem abangin mikhut themtah ho khutsem abange." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Nalai jong jutuitah lhasam khalouhela dimjing khon bempel abangin; na-oi jong suhlouchang kihuivum lily pah-a kijem abange. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Na noi teni jong sakhinou ni pengkop, lily pah lah-a lhale abange." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Na-ngong jong saiha insang abangin; namit teni jong Heshbon'a Bath Rabbim kotpiphunga twikul abangin; nanah jong Lebanon insang Damascus lam nga-a abange. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Nachunga naluchang chu Karmel abangin, naluchanga nasamjong ponsandup abangin; Nasam lom phatah chun lengpa soh henin ahenin ahi." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Iti hoija nahoija chule iti dei naum hitam, Vo kangainu, kipana dinga!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Natun jong tumphung bangin asangin, chule nanoi teni jong lengpiga bohthet abang jenge." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Keima tumphung chunga kalingting, abahho gatuh inge, katin: Tun nanoi teni chu lengpiga lomho bangen lang, nanah-a hu hungpot gimnam chu theithup namtui banghen," 
SongOfSongs7:9 Chule nakam chung chu lengpitwi phapen tobang hihen. Lengpitwi chu kangaipa-a dingin tuitah-in alongsuh'in, a-imu pa muh chu nemheu chan achaloh sah-in ahi." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Keima kangaipa-a kahin, chule angaichat chu keima-a uma ahi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Hungo, kangaipa, loulama chedoh hitin; khoneo ho-a gageh hite." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Jingpi matah-in lengpi hona chehitin; lengpigui mumtam gave hitin, lengpiga mumho pahlha tam gave hitin, chule kolbuthei ho pahtam gavetem hite; chua chu kangailut na kapeh ding nahi." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Kangaipa, Joldei-ai hon jong anam tuitah alhadoh-un, chule ka kelkot phunguva theiga tuitahtah namkim athah le alui nanga dia kakoisa aume." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Oh, nangma kanu noi hinchepma kapenpipa ana hitavele chun katitave! Pamlama kahinmu teng jongle kahinchop ding nahi; henge, i-sah louva kaumlou ding ahi."
