SongOfSongs8:2 Keiman nangma kalamkaija kapui puiding eina hil jinga kanu insunga kapui lutding, ka kolbuthei twija kon kisem ju gimnamtui kadonsah ding nahi." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Akhut veilam kalu noija aumin, chule akhut jetlama chun eikoije." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Vo nangho Jerusalem chanute, keiman nangho kathupeh nahiuve, ngailutna hi ama chamtah-a ahung um tilouvin, nanghon suhthou tho dingle suhkhah thoding gohih-un." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Angainu chunga kingaija gamthipma kona hungdoh khu koi ahitadem? Theithup phung noija kathodoh nahi; chua chu nanun nanahin ahin, chua chu nahingnun nahin hindoh ahi." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Suhdetna kinamkhum bangin nalungsunga neinam detnin lang, nabanna jong neinam detnin; ajehchu ngailutna hi thina bangin athaneijin, thangthipna jong lhankhuh bangin a-engse-e; amei chu meikong ahin, meikong nasa pentah ahi." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Twi tamtah in ngailutna asudai joupoi, twisang lenho jengin jong alhoh joupoi; min ngailutna dingin a-insunga anei jouse pedohsoh jongle, ima-a simkham hilou lai ding ahi." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Keihon sopi numeinu khat kaneijuve, amanun noi aneihih laije; amanu min ahungdoh nikho teng kasopinu diuvin keihon ipi kabolpeh tadiuvem?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Amanu hi bang hitale, achunga leng inpi dangka-a kasah diu ahi. Chule amanu hi kotkhah hitale, cedar thingpeh-a katom dingu ahi." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Keima bang kahi, chule kanoi teni jong insang tobang ahi; chuin keima ama mitteni-a lungmonna mu-a tobang kahung hitai" 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomon'in Baal-hamon'a lengpihon khat ananeijin; aman lengpihon chu angahho angansen; mitinin ahonsoh ga man dangka sangkhat cheh ahin pehlutdiu ahi. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Kalengpihon keima angsunga aumme. Vo Solomon, nangma sangkhat nachan ding, chule aga ngahho chu jani changding ahiuve." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Nangho hon leilaija chengho, golle paiten na aw angai juve hichu keijong nei jahsah-in." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Hung kikinsah in kangaipa, gimnamtui molsang ho chunga chun nangma sakhi chalgol ahiloule sakhinou tobangin hung umin." 
Isaiah1:1 Judah lengho Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz chule Hezekiah nikholaija Judah leh Jerusalem chungchang thudolla, Amoz chapa Isaiah munei;" 
Isaiah1:2 Vo, vanho ngaijun, chule vo leiset, nana hinsungin. Ajehchu Pakaiyin thu aseitai: keiman chapangte chu kahinkhoukhah-a kahinseilet dohsah ahitan, hinlah amahon keima dounan na atong taove." 
Isaiah1:3 Bongchal'in apu akihetnin, chule sanganin apun an apehna kong akihet-in; ahinla Israel'in vang ahepon, kamiten angaitopha himhim pouve." 
Isaiah1:4 Ohe chonse nam mite, khansetna pohgihpo mite, thilsebol chilhahte, manthah sah chate; amahon Pakai chu adalhaovin, Israel dinga Mithengpa chu lunghan sahdin achoh thouvun, nunglama akitolmang taove." 
Isaiah1:5 Ipidinga nangho kivoto jingjeng nalai nahiuvem? Nakisatto nahlai ding'uham? luchang apumin anatan, chule lungthim apumin acholtai." 
Isaiah1:6 Kengto apat luchang geijin adamkom aumtapon; ahinla mapule kivodup, chule tina monsa ahin; amahon jenla ajen pouvin, tomla atom pouvin, thaojong anu pouve." 
Isaiah1:7 Nagam sungu akamdeltan, nakhopihou jong meijin akihalha gamtai. Gamdang mihon nagamu na-angsung tah uva abahgamun, chule akamhelin, gamdang mihon alehkhuphel taove." 
Isaiah1:8 Zion chanu chu lengpi leija buhcha bangle changmai leija buh kisong bang, khopi kiumkim vel tobang ahitai." 
Isaiah1:9 Janel Pakai chun amoh themcha khat eikhen louvu hileh, Sodom toh ibah uva, Gommorah dung isun jengdingu ahi." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodom kho-a vaihomten, Pakai thuhi ngaijun! Gommorah mite nanghon i-Pathen'u danthupeh-a nanau hinsung uvin!" 
Isaiah1:11 Pakai chun, naganlhai nao hijatpihi keidia iphatsah naham? ati. Keiman kelngoichal govam thilto lhingset le gancha kivah thao tahtah kaneije. Keima bongchalho thisan hihen, kelngoinou ho thisan ahilouleh kelchate thisan'ah kalunglhaipon ahi." 
Isaiah1:12 Nangho ka-angsunga nahung kilah tenguleh, ka inpi chonthanghoi dinga koiham nangai chaovah?" 
Isaiah1:13 Thilto pannabei ho chu hinchoikit tahih hel'un; gimnamtuijong keidia thet umtah ahibouvin; lhathah nikhoho le cholngah nikhoho chule khoppi kikouho jong kadou theipon, chujongleh khoppitheng kikouho jong gitlouna ngen ahibouve." 
Isaiah1:14 Nalhathah nikhohoule naphat kitepmu kutho chu kahin nan ahot ahi. Eilunggim sahbep ahiuvin abonchan kapochim set tai. 
Isaiah1:15 Chule nakhut nahin lhandoh tengu jongle, nangho-a kona kamit kaselding, tamtahvei taona hinnei jeng jongleu chun kangaipeh louding nahiuve; ajehchu nakhut hou thisan dimset ahi." 
Isaiah1:16 Kisilthengun lang, kisuthengu vin; kamitmu-a konin nathilbol phalouhou chu koimang unlang; thilse bolda taovin," 
Isaiah1:17 thilphabol kithemchuh-un, thu adih-a tanding gouvin, akibol gentheiho panpiuvin, panei loute thu tandih unlang, meithaiho seihuvin." 
Isaiah1:18 Pakaiyin hitin aseije: tun hungun lang gelkhomu hite, Nachonset nao santhip bangjongle, buhbang banga bangding; sandup jeju tajongleh kelngoimul bangding ahi." 
Isaiah1:19 Nangho nanop uva thu nangai ule, gamsung phatna chu nanehdiu ahi." 
Isaiah1:20 Ahinla nadaova nadeh uvangle, chemjam'a nalou gamdiu ahi. Ajehchu Pakai kamin aphondoh ahitai." 
Isaiah1:21 Khopi tahsan umtah chu i-atile noti hungsoh-a hitantem! Thudih tanna anadimin, chonphatna analengin; hinla tun tolthat jeng ahitaove." 
Isaiah1:22 Nadangka thih eh asoh in, nalengpi twila twitoh kihal ahitai." 
Isaiah1:23 Napipui houla dou lungpu jeng ahiuvin, chule guchaho kiloipi ahiuve. Amitin-in pehguh angailuvin, chule kipaman del le ahiuve. Amahon panei loute thu atanpeh pouvin, meithaiho thujong atan diuvin ahengu ahunglhung khatapoi." 
Isaiah1:24 Hijeh chun janel ho Pakai, Israel dia mihatpa chun hitin aseije; Ahi! Keiman kakidoupi teho lhadoh ingting kamelmate phu kalah teiding ahi." 
Isaiah1:25 Keiman nachungah kakhut lam ingting, chule nathih eh chu thengtah a kalhah thenga, nasum lhahjol jouse kalah mangding ahi." 
Isaiah1:26 Chule keiman nathutan ho kaki ledoh sah-a, chule nathuhil ho jong akipat tilla banga kaumsah kitding ahi. Chuche joutengle chonphatna khopi, tahsan um khopi tia naki minvo ding ahi." 
Isaiah1:27 Zion chu athu kitanlha-a kilhatdoh ding, chule amanu kisihna chu chonphatna hiding ahi." 
Isaiah1:28 Ahin doumah bolteho le achonseho chu mangthah khomintin, chule Pakai dalhahho chu suhmang hela umdiu ahi." 
Isaiah1:29 Ajehchu nangaichatnu gangpi phungho chu ajachat piuvin, naki lhensao honlei chu nalungjinpi diu ahi." 
Isaiah1:30 Ajehchu nangho gangpido pulsa bangle, twi umlouhel honlei tobang nahi dingu ahi." 
Isaiah1:31 Chule mihat chu saikhao nem bangintin, hiche sempa chu meisipah bangding, chutia chu kavam lhonding, koimachan aphelmit louding ahitai." 
Isaiah2:1 Amoz chapa Isaiah'in Judah le Jerusalem chungchang thudol chu anamu. 
Isaiah2:2 Ninunung lamle hitiding ahi, Pakai inmun molsang chu molsang chung vum ho-a hung kiphutdoh ding ahin, lhang vum ho-a kichoisanga; chutengle namtin vaipi chu kijotlutdiu ahi." 
Isaiah2:3 Hiteng chule chitin, namtin hunguva hitia aseidingu ahi; hungun Pakai Molsang chunga kaltouvu hitin, Jacob Pathen inna chun cheu hite; chutia chu aman alampi thudol eihil uva, ama lampia chu ichediu ahi, tiuvinte. Ajehchu Zion'a kona dan thupeh le Jerusalem'a kona Pakai thuchu hungpotdoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah2:4 Chutia chu aman namtin vaipi kah-a thu atana, mitamtah aphosalding; amahon achemjamhou loukaina, chule atengchahou kangkuija akikhendiu; namkhat douna-a namkhat nin chemjam lamtalou ding, galbolje jong kijilna umlou ding ahitai." 
Isaiah2:5 Vo Jacob insung miteho, hunguvin, Pakai vah-a chun cheleu hite." 
Isaiah2:6 Ajehchu nangman nami Jacob insung chu napaitai, ajehchu amaho solam mite chona dimset ahiuvin, Philistine ho bangin gaothu aseijun chule gamdang mite chate toh kipa thanop abolkhom jiuve." 
Isaiah2:7 Agamujong sanale dangka adimsetnin, chule agou khol hou jong angahna bei ahin; agamsungu jong sakol adimset'in, chule asakol kangtalai hou jeng jong akichaitih aumpoi." 
Isaiah2:8 Agamsung jong milim semthu adimsetnin; akhut tah uva aboldoh-u akhutjung ngeijuva asemsao chu ahouvun ahi. 
Isaiah2:9 Milham hon chibai aboh-un, milen ama le ama akisuneovin, hijeh chun ngaidam changlou diu ahi." 
Isaiah2:10 Thahat tah Pakai ginna le alal loupi masanga chun songko sunga lutning lang leivui lah-a gakiselin. 
Isaiah2:11 Mihem kivetsangna chu kisunem intin, mihem kiletsahna chu kisulha ding, chule Pakai changsehbou chuche niteng chule choisanga umding ahi." 
Isaiah2:12 Ajehchu ahoithole akiletsah chan chule akichoisang chan chunga chu janel Pakai nikho hunglhung ding, chule amaho chu kisunem ding ahi." 
Isaiah2:13 Lebanon Cedar thingsang hole adoh sangho jouse chung le Bashan gangpiho jouse chunga," 
Isaiah2:14 molsang ho jousele lhang kichoisangho chunga," 
Isaiah2:15 in-song sangtin hole galpal kikaiho chunga," 
Isaiah2:16 Tarshish kong inneiho jouse chungle, khutthem kisem thilho jouse chunga hunglhung ahi." 
Isaiah2:17 Chule mihem kichoisang nachu kisulhantin, mihem kiletsahna chu kisunem ding ahi. Chule chuche ni chule Pakai changsehbou choisanga umding ahi." 
Isaiah2:18 Chutengle semthu milimho jouse asuhmanghel ding ahi. 
Isaiah2:19 Tijat umtah a leiset hotling dinga akipatdoh tengle, Pakai ginjehle alal loupina jeh-a, amahochu songpiho kohomsung le leikoho sunga lutding ahiuve." 
Isaiah2:20 Hicheni chule mihon adangka milimhou le asana milimhou, ama ama houding cheh-a akisem houchu, bui hole bah ho henga ahinse manguva," 
Isaiah2:21 tijat umtah-a leiset hotling dinga ahung kipatdoh tengle Pakai ginjehle alalna loupijeh-a songpiho khikeh sungle songpiho pohkeh sunga chu lutdiu ahi. 
Isaiah2:22 Mihem anah-a hai maimaipa-a konin kikangseuvin, ajehchu ama ijapang dingham?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ijeh-inem itile, veuvin, Pakai janel Pakai chun, Jerusalem'a konle Judah a konin, anehnao lampile adonnao lampi jouse aladohsoh heltai." 
Isaiah3:2 Mihatpa le gal hatpa thutanpa le themgao, milungching le upapa ahin," 
Isaiah3:3 mi somnga kaihoipa le mija umpa, thumopthempa le khutthempa, chule kamthem mitpheldoi thempa ahiuve." 
Isaiah3:4 Chule keiman chapangho chu apipuiho diuva kapeh ding, naosen hon achunguva vai ahomdiu ahi." 
Isaiah3:5 Chule mipichu suhgentheija umding, amitakip chu midangin chule amitakip aheng akomin asuhgenthei ding; Chapang chu upa chunga chule pannabei michu ja-umtah chunga kiletsah tah-a umding ahi." 
Isaiah3:6 Min apa insungmi asopi khat atuh-a, nangin ponsil naneijin, kavaihom-un panginlang hiche amangsahi nakhut noija umhen atitengle," 
Isaiah3:7 hiche nikhoteng chule aman asap phonga, keima midamsah hiponge; ajehchu ka in'a nehdingle ponsil ding aumpoi. Mipi vaihomin neipansah hih-in, hin tinte." 
Isaiah3:8 Ajehchu athuseijule anatoh-u chu Pakai dounale aloupi mithipsah bou ahitah jeh-in, Jerusalem kipal lhu-a chule Judah chu lhu-a ahitai." 
Isaiah3:9 Amel lhona kilang chun amaho adou ahettohsah-in; hicheho chun Sodom'a tobang achonsetnao aphongjalin, aselpeh pouve. Amanitah-in thilse akilamthu lhon jeh-in ahinna lhonchu ohe ada na-e!" 
Isaiah3:10 Michonpha chu seipeh-un, hichu ama dinga apha ahi, Ajehchu amahon atohgao chu anehtei dingu ahi." 
Isaiah3:11 Migilou chu ada ahi! amadin hamsetna ahi. Ajehchu akhut teni-a atohdoh chu kipeding ahi. 
Isaiah3:12 Kamitehi amaho bolgentheija pang chate jeng ahitaovin, numei hon achunguva vai ahom uve. Vo kamite, napuihouvin napuiseuvin, nachennao lampiho asumanguve." 
Isaiah3:13 Pakai chu thutan din ahung kipanin, miho thutan ding chun adingtai." 
Isaiah3:14 Pakai chu amite upaho le milen milal ho toh thutanlha dinga lutding ahi. Ajehchu nanghon lengpilei chu nanejouvun; migenthei ho thil kichomdoh chu na-in uva aumme. 
Isaiah3:15 Kamite navoh ngem uva migenthei te maichangtah sumheija natahgoijiu chu ipi natinao ham? tin janelho Pakai chun aseije. 
Isaiah3:16 Chuche kalvallin Pakaiyin aseije; Zion chanute chu hoithotah-a aumuva, ngong vaiputna le jonmit puma avaleuva, akengu jangjet jetna chule gingdet detna achejeh-u ahi." 
Isaiah3:17 Hiche jeh-a chu Pakaiyin Zion chanute lujang khichet chutna ajepma, Pakaiyin atahsao aselguh laihou chu ahodoh pehdiu ahi." 
Isaiah3:18 Hiche nikho chule Pakaiyin akenguva jephoina gingselsel, haona a alukophou, lhathah tobang angong ou chu asutlhah ding ahin," 
Isaiah3:19 Sumgui ho, chaojangho chule ngongvei ho," 
Isaiah3:20 Lutomna ho, keng jephoina ho chule lukanna ho, gimnamtui ho bomho, chule bilba ho," 
Isaiah3:21 khutjem ho le nahkuiba sana ho," 
Isaiah3:22 von khelthei ho, sangkhol chol ho, ponsil ho chule dipho," 
Isaiah3:23 phatvet ho, tupat ponnem ho, delkop ho chule ponlukhuh ho, asutlhah peh diu ahi." 
Isaiah3:24 Chule hunghiti ding ahi: gimnamtui khella a-ui; konggah khella khaojang; sam pojolsel khella lutol leolou; ponchol hoitah sanga khaodip pon; melhoina sanga meikah umjoding ahi. 
Isaiah3:25 Napasal hou chemjam'a, namihat hou galla thigamdiu ahi." 
Isaiah3:26 Chule amanu kul kotpiho chu lunghema kapdiu; amanu ahomkeo ahitahjeh-a tolla touding ahi. 
Isaiah4:1 Chule hiche nikho chule numei sagin pasal khat atuh uva, keihon ka-annu kineh uving ting, kaponnu kisil naovinge; eiki housetnao lahmangna dingin namin sehseh neiput sah-un, atidiu ahi." 
Isaiah4:2 Hiche nikho chule Pakaiya kona abah jamdoh chu hoitahle loupitah hiding ahin, chule Israel, ahoidoh hodinga leiset gachu nasatahle hoitah hiding ahi." 
Isaiah4:3 Chule hunghiti ding ahi, Zion'a kadalha-a, Jerusalem'a umdenpa chule Jerusalem'a ahingho lah-a kisunlut chasun geija chu atheng kitiding ahin," 
Isaiah4:4 Pakaiyin Zion chanute nen asoplhah-a, chule Jerusalem lailunga patna lhagao thutanlhah nale, lhagao meikonga Jerusalem'a thisan behho chu asopthengsoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah4:5 Chule Pakaiyin Zion lhanga chenna jouse chungle, akikhopnahou chunga chun, sunle meilhangle, meikhu janle meikong vahtah asempeh ding ajehchu loupi jouse chunga chu ahongah umding ahi." 
Isaiah4:6 Chutengle sun nisatna kona limding le belding khopihuile gellhah a kona hoinading houbuh khat umding ahi. 
Isaiah5:1 Tun keima kangailutpa henga alengpilei thudollin kangailut nan la sange. Kangailuttah pan thinglhang leiphalaija lengpilei khat aneije. 
Isaiah5:2 Aman alhou ngimin, chua songho alohdoh in lengpigui phapentah aphutnin, alaitah-a insang khat asan, asunga chun lengpiga chilna khatjong asemin; chule aman hichun lengpi ga hinsepdoh teijinte tin angah jingin; ahin hichun gam lengpi ga ahin sepdoh tai." 
Isaiah5:3 Chule tun, vo Jerusalem'a chenghole, Judah pasal ho keile kalengpilei kah-a thuhi neihin tanpeh temun tia kangeh nahiuve," 
Isaiah5:4 kalengpilei dinga bolthei kanabol loulai ipi uma ham? Lengpithei ahung gadohding kingah-a ibolla gam lengpithei ga ahinsepdoh ham? 
Isaiah5:5 Chule tun, kalengpi leija kabolding chu hil unge; alingtho kaphetlhah'a, min anehjou ding; asongpal chu kasuhchima, michot pha-a umding ahitai." 
Isaiah5:6 Chule keiman agoh a kakoija, lho-ngimlou le lailouva uma; lingle khao hung kehdoh ding ahin; meibol ho jong thu kapeh-a achunguva go ahinjuhsah louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah5:7 Ajehchu janel Pakai lengpilei chu Israel insungle adeitah a aphu Judah mitehi ahiuvin; aman thudih joh aven, ahinla veuvin bolset najoh ahin; chonphatna chu veuvin ka najoh ahitai." 
Isaiah5:8 Ohe! ada ahiuve, in le in jopmatho, lou keh bebe ho, mun beihela koiho, leiset lailunga achangseh uva chengding ahiuve." 
Isaiah5:9 Janel Pakai chun kanabenga aseitai, atahbeh-in; in tamtah, lentah tahle hoitahtah chu achengding beija kamhel gamding, ahi tin aseije," 
Isaiah5:10 chule lengpilei ching soma bath khatbou sohding, muchi homer khat kituna ephah khatbou soh ding ahi." 
Isaiah5:11 Ohe! ada ahiuve, Khamnathei dondinga jingkah matah-a thouva, lengpitwi jin achupkah seuva jankhang geija touho." 
Isaiah5:12 Amahon selangdah chule semjang, khongcha, kuli, chule lengpitwi jin golnop abollun; ahinla Pakai thilbol lah akhohsah pouvin, akhutna atohdohho jong angaito himhimpouve." 
Isaiah5:13 Hijeh chun kamiten hetna aneilou jeh-un sohchangin acheuvin, amija-umteu agilkelun, amipiteu dangchah in adango gamtaove." 
Isaiah5:14 Hijeh chun, te joulou khopma lenin thikholkhul chu akam akahommin; aloupinahou, amipiteu, akichoisangho, chule athanompa jengjong chuche sunga chu kumsuh diu ahi." 
Isaiah5:15 Minoinung chu kisonkun ding, mithaneipa jong kisunem ding, mikiletsah te mit jong nguilha ding ahi" 
Isaiah5:16 Ahinla janel Pakai chu thutanlhahna-a choisanga umding ahin, chule Pathen, athenga chu chonphatna-a suhthenga umding ahitai." 
Isaiah5:17 Chuteng kelngoinou ho chu hamhing lah-a lhaleuvintin, chule mun gohho-a leiphalaiho chu gamdangmin anehdiu ahi." 
Isaiah5:18 Ohe! ada ahiuve, imacha hilou khaoholla khangitlouna chule kangtalai khaova kiheh chonsetna kaikhomho." 
Isaiah5:19 Keihon kamutheina diuvin kigansah henlang, anatoh kino hen; chule kahet theina diuvin Israel mithengpa thumopna chu hungnai hen, tia seiho chu!" 
Isaiah5:20 Ohe! ada ahiuve, aphalou apha tia, apha aphalou tia; khovah dinga muthim koija, muthim dinga khovah koiji, alhum dinga akha koija, akha dinga alhum koiho." 
Isaiah5:21 Ohe! ada ahiuve, ama mitna ching kisa-a, ama mitmu-a lungching kisaho." 
Isaiah5:22 Ohe! ada ahiuve, lengpitwi donna mihat tah hija, khamnathei donding halna-a thahat tah ho." 
Isaiah5:23 Chuho chun migilouho kipaman peh them achanun, midihtah dohna chu ama-a konin aladohjiuve." 
Isaiah5:24 Hijeh chun meijin chang ki-atna kung akahvam bangle, meikongin changsi aleumang banga, chutia chu ajungu monlha a, apah-u leivui banga kitungdoh diu ahi. Ajehchu amahon janel Pakai danthupeh apaimangun, Israelte mithengpa thu chu anahsahpouve." 
Isaiah5:25 Hijeh-a chu Pakai lunghan amite douna-a deujah jeng ahi. Amaho douna-a chun akhut alamin adengtan, chule athi longu khopi lamlen laidunga akisat telin ahi. Ajehchu hiche jousehin alunghan naho chu abeidehpon, akhut chu akilamjing nalaije." 
Isaiah5:26 Aman gamlatah-a kona namtin dinga ponlap atahsang ding, kolmonga kona amaho asapkhom tengle amaho gangtah-a hung lhungloi jengdiu ahi." 
Isaiah5:27 Alah uva athacholle akipalhu khatcha umpou vinte; khatcha alulhu, a-ihmu umpontin, akonguva konggah kikang ahiloule akengkoh khao tanna umlou helding ahi." 
Isaiah5:28 Athalmuh-u ahemthet-in, athalpi jouseu kaosan akichoijun, asakol tin houchu meituh song bangjeng, chule asakol kangtalai kanghou chu chimpei kiheh bangding ahi." 
Isaiah5:29 Akitum ginu keipibahkai bang hiding, keipi noute banga kitumdiu; hitia chun kitum muntin, sahing kimat untin, phatecha alhoh manga, koimachan ahuhdoh louding ahi." 
Isaiah5:30 Hiche nikho chule amaho twikhanglen kitumgin banga amaho douna-a kitumdiu ahi. Khatouvin hiche gamchu gahvele, veuvin muthimle lung hesohna, khovah chu van'a muthimin ahin lekhuding ahi." 
Isaiah6:1 Uzziah lengpa athikum chun Pakai chu laltouna sangtah chunga atouva alalpon chun houin alodimset chu kana mun ahi. 
Isaiah6:2 Achunga chun alha gupcheh nei Seraphim'ho anadingun; alhaving ni in amai akhun, ni in akengteni akhun, ni in alengin ahi." 
Isaiah6:3 Chule khatchun khat henga, ATHENG, ATHENG, ATHENG, chu janelho Pakai chu ahi. Leiset pumpihi aloupina adimsetne tin asamin ahi." 
Isaiah6:4 Chuin ahinsampa Ogin chun kotpi khomho akihotnin, chule in chu meikhun adimtai." 
Isaiah6:5 Chujouvin kaseitai: ohe ada kahi! ajehchu keima kamtheng lou kahin, mi kamtheng loute lah-a cheng kahi. Ajehchu kamitnin leng janel Pakai chu amutai, kati." 
Isaiah6:6 Chuin maicham-a kona akhutna mei-am chaichea hinchoija, Seraphim holah-a khat kahenga ahung lengin," 
Isaiah6:7 chuin kakam-ah ahinkoijin aseitai; ven, hiche hin nane teni atongkhatan; nakhansetnaho akilamangin nachonset naho jong suhthengin aumtai." 
Isaiah6:8 Hichun Pakai awginin hitia asei kajai: keiho dinga koi chedingham? Hichun keiman kaseijin; keima hia kaume, neisolin kati." 
Isaiah6:9 Chuin aman chenlang, hiche mitehi gahilin, nanghon jaovin natin, ahinla nahetkhen theilou dingu; chule mu uvin natin, ahinla nahetdoh loudiu ahi, ati." 
Isaiah6:10 Hiche mite lunghi thao tomsah inlang, anao ngonsah in, chule amitnujong kisinghen; achutiloule amitnun muvintin, anaovin jauvintin, alungun hekhen-uvintin, lung heijuntin, chule damget nunte." 
Isaiah6:11 Chuphatnin keiman Pakai itih chan hiding ham? Katile aman eidonbutnin; khopiho acheng beija agohkeo ahikahsele, inho-a mi acheng abeihela, agamchu akamhel kahse-a," 
Isaiah6:12 chule Pakaiyin mite chu gamlatah a achon manga, agamlailunga mun kidalha lentah umding ahi." 
Isaiah6:13 Ahinla hiche sunga chun somlah-a khat umintin, hichu kile-a kinejouding, chahthing phungle gangpi thing ana apultengle akungbul umnalai banga muchi theng chu akungbul umjing ding ahi." 
Isaiah7:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jotham chapa, Uzziah chapa, Judah lengpa Ahaz lallaijin, Syria lengpa Rezinle lengpa Pekah Remaliah Israel lengpa chapa chu Jerusalem satdingin akontou lhonin, ahivangin anajou joulhon tapoi." 
Isaiah7:2 Syria chu Ephraim toh apangkhome ti David insungmite akihiltai. Chuin amale amite lungchu gammang thingho huijin amutling bangin alinglao gamtai. 
Isaiah7:3 Hichun Pakaiyin Isaiah henga, nangle nachapa Shear-jashub chu twikul sahnung twilam monga ponsoppa lamlhonga khun Ahaz to kimutodin potdoh lhoninlang;" 
Isaiah7:4 Ahenga, chingtheijin lang thipbeh-in Syria toh Rezin le Remaliah chapa engset lunghanna maiso mei khuthethu ni tobang chu kicha hih-in, lunglhah nanjong neihih beh-in ati." 
Isaiah7:5 Ajehchu, Syria, Ephraim, chule Ramaliah chapan nangma dounan thil gilou angaitouvin aseijuve," 
Isaiah7:6 Judah doudingle nokhum dingin chetou uhitin, khopi chu suchimu hitin, chutengle alaija chun Tabel chapa chu lengin tung uhite." 
Isaiah7:7 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, hichu ding joulou ding, guijong guilhung louding ahi." 
Isaiah7:8 Ajeh chu Syria luchang chu Damascus ahin, Damascus luchang chu Rezin ahin; kum somgup le kumnga sunga Ephraim chu namkhat hiloudinga kisucheh ding ahitai." 
Isaiah7:9 Chule Ephraim luchang chu Samaria ahin, Samaria luchang chu Remaliah chapa ahi. Natahsan lou uleh atahbeh-a naki phudet louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah7:10 Chukalvalin Pakaiyin Ahaz henga aseijin," 
Isaiah7:11 Nangman Pakai na Pathen henga melchihna kithumin; hathuh-a thuh ahiloule hasana sangkhat kithumin, ati." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahinla Ahaz in, keiman thumponge, Pakai jong patep hihhel ing kate, ati." 
Isaiah7:13 Chuin aman aseitai, David insung mite, tun nanghon ngaitemun! mihem cholsah hi thilneova nagel uva, ka Pathen sana nacholsah jeng dinguham?" 
Isaiah7:14 Hijeh chun Pakai amatah-in melchihna khat hinpeu vinate; veuvin, nungah theng khat gai jintin chapa khat ahinding, aminchu Immanuel kitiding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah7:15 Aman bongnoi thaole khoiju aneh ding ahi, chutia chu aman aselam hotbola aphalam lhenje ahetding ahi." 
Isaiah7:16 Ajehchu chapang chun aselam thetbol dingle aphalam kilhen dingje ahetthei masanga nanaginu gamhochu aleng teniu chun adalhah diu ahitai. 
Isaiah7:17 Judah'a kona Ephraim achemanga patna ana lhungkhalou nikhoho chu Pakaiyin nangle namite chung, chutengle napa insung mite chunga Assyria lengpa nahin lhutpeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah7:18 Chule hiche nikho teng chule hung hiti ding, ahi. Pakaiyin Egypt vadunga thousi ho mutkhom minintin, chule Assyria gamsunga khoiho akoukhom ding ahi." 
Isaiah7:19 Chule amaho hunguntin, abon chaova phaicham gohkeu laija songpi kohomho-a, lingho chung jouse-a, chule hamhing ho chung jouse-a umdiu ahi." 
Isaiah7:20 Hicheni mama-a chu Pakaiyin samchem alap'a vadung gal lamho toh Assyria lengpa chu aluchangle akengmul ho ahet namding ahi; chule akhamul sanna jong ahet chaiding ahi. 
Isaiah7:21 Chuche nikhole hung hitiding ahi, pasal khatnin bongla khatle kelngoi ni avulding ahin;" 
Isaiah7:22 chule hung hiti ding ahin, chuche teng chule bongnoi nengtah-a apehdiu jeh-a amapan bongnoi thao anehji ding ahi. Ajehchu chuche gama kidalha chanchun bongnoi thaole khoiju jeng anehdiu ahi." 
Isaiah7:23 Chule chuche nikholai chule hung hitiding ahi, dangka sangkhat man cheng, lengpilei sangkhat umna munchana chu lingle khao jengbou kehding ahitai." 
Isaiah7:24 Agam pumpi lingkhaole lingphung ahung dimtah ding jeh in chulama chu thalpi le thalchang puma miho hungdiu ahi. 
Isaiah7:25 Chule tuphenga kilai lhang jouse chunga linglekhaoho ginna-a chulama hunglou ding, ahin, bongchalho le ganchaho lhatna hung hiding ahitai." 
Isaiah8:1 Chukalvallin Pakaiyin kahenga Maher-shalal-hash-baz chung thudol, lekha jol lentah khat lanlang asunga chun mihem twi-mollin sunin eiti." 
Isaiah8:2 Chuin thuching ding hettohsah tahsan umtah Uriah thempulen le Jaberekiah chapa Zekeriah chu kapansah in ahi. 
Isaiah8:3 Chuin themgaonu henga kagachen; ahile amanu ahung gaijin chapa khat ahinge. Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga amin Maher-shalal-hash-baz sah-in ati. 
Isaiah8:4 Ajehchu naosen chun hepa heno tije hetna anei masanga, Damascus haonale Samaria thilchomdohho chu Assyria lengpa anga kipomang ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah8:5 Pakai chun kahenga thu ahinsei kitnin," 
Isaiah8:6 hiche mite hin Shiloah twi longdel delho adeimouva, Rezin le Remaliah chapa akipapi jeh uvin;" 
Isaiah8:7 hijeh tahchun tun vetan, Pakai chun vadung twiho hattahle tamtah, Assyria lengpa le aloupina jouse jengjong achunguva alonvuhsah ding, twilam jouse ahinchupma avakam jouse-a letlha ding," 
Isaiah8:8 chule Judah gama longlutna achupsoh-a letlha ding, ngong geihel aphahding chule alhaving jahchun nagamu avai akhokhong ding ahi, vo Immanuel, ati." 
Isaiah8:9 Vo miteho nangho ahal hala chiplhading nahiuve! gamlhatah miho nabonchaovin nanau hinsungun, natai kigah-uvin, achutiloule ahal halla nachipdingu ahi," 
Isaiah8:10 Ngaito khomun phachomponte, thuchu seijun dingjou pouvinate. Ajehchu Pathen'in eiumpiuve." 
Isaiah8:11 Ajehchu khut thahat tah-in, Pakaiyin kahenga aseijin, hiche mite lamlhah a kavale lounadin eithumop in, hitin aseije;" 
Isaiah8:12 hiche miten guhthima thilphalou agonu ahi tia asei-ujong guhthim tohgon ahi tin seidao henlang, agihnao jong kichat nale gentheinan neidaohen." 
Isaiah8:13 Janel Pakai amatah chu thensah-un lang, naginnu ama hisah unlang, natijat naochu ama hihen." 
Isaiah8:14 Chule amachu muntheng hiding, Israel insungteni dinga vang kipalna songle kisuhmona songpi hiding, Jerusalem'a chengho dinga thangle pel hidingbou ahi." 
Isaiah8:15 Alah uva mi tamtah kipala lhuhna le kisuhgepna hiding; thanga oh-uva kimandohdiu ahi. 
Isaiah8:16 Hettohsahna chu kantup minlang danthupeh chu kaseijuite lah-a namdet jengin," 
Isaiah8:17 chule keiman Jacob insunga kona amai selmangpa Pakai chu ngah ingting, amabou vengkate." 
Isaiah8:18 Veuvin keile Pakaiyin eipeh chapangtehi, Israel insunga melchihna leh thilkidang hidinga Zion molla cheng janel Pakaiya hungkon kahiuve." 
Isaiah8:19 Chule amahon naheng uva mithisa lha kouho le doithemho guhthima vea, phuisam ho chu hollun atitengule miten athi khella ahina dinga a-Pathen'u chu ahollou dingu ham?" 
Isaiah8:20 Amahon dan thupeh le hettohsahna thu dungjuija asei lou uleh, asunguva khovah umlou ahi." 
Isaiah8:21 Chule amahon hesohtahle gilkeltah in gamchu jotpaovintin, chule hitiding ahi. Gilkella aumtenguleh, lungsa tuntun untin, alengpaole a-pathen'u gaosap untin chunglam avetdiu ahi." 
Isaiah8:22 Hiteng chule amahon tollam hinveuvintin, lungkhamnale muthim, lungnat khojin amudiu chule amahochu muthim lah-a kinolutding ahiuve." 
Isaiah9:1 Ahijeng vangin lunglha-a ana um amanu dingin nguina umta ponte. Phatmasa laija chu aman Zebulun gam le Naphtali gam chu olla ana gimbol ahin, chule khonungle Jordan gal, twikhanglen lampi-a namdangte Galilee chu nasatah-a abolgim be cheh ding ahi." 
Isaiah9:2 Muthima vahle mihochun vah loupitah amutaove, thina lim gama chengho chunga chun kho avahtai." 
Isaiah9:3 Nangman namtin vaipi chu napunsah-in, kipana napunsahtai; nangma masanga chang-at laija kipana bangin akipah-un, chule thilkichom akihoptenguva akipau bangin akipah uve." 
Isaiah9:4 Ajehchu nangman amapa pohgih namkoljon le alengkouva mol lhon, chule sugentheipa moltum chu Midian ho nikho laija bangin nasuhbohpehtai." 
Isaiah9:5 Ajehchu gal hatpa galbol jouse ginchu kisuhnohna awginin ajuijin, chule galvonho chu thisan abehjin, ahinla hichehi kavama meikhu sohding ahi." 
Isaiah9:6 Ijeh inem itile eihodingin naosen khat apengin, chapa khat eikipeuve, chule vaipohna chu alengkouva aputding, chule aminchu kidangtah, thumopthem, hat chungnung Pathen, tonsot Pa, chamna leng chapa kitiding ahi." 
Isaiah9:7 David laltouna chung leh alenggam chunga avaipohna le chamna khangtou ding, akichaitih umlou ding ahi. Tua pat atonsot geija thutanna le thudih atundoh ding ahi. Janel Pakai tompanna chun hichehi abolding ahi." 
Isaiah9:8 Pakaiyin Jacob thukhat athotnin, hichu Israel chunga alhungtai." 
Isaiah9:9 Chule mijousen hichu aboncha ahetdiu ahin, Ephraimle Samaria'a cheng hoithotah le kiletsah tah-a seija:" 
Isaiah9:10 cheh ho achimlhatan ahinla song kikheng in kisah taovinge; Theiba akiphuhlhun ahinla cedar thingin kheltao vinge, tihochun hetao vinte." 
Isaiah9:11 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Rezin kidoupiho chu ama doudin tungdoh intin, amelmate chu apankhompi ding ahin;" 
Isaiah9:12 amasanga Syria ho, anunglama Philistine hon kamka-a Israelte avallhumdiu ahi. Hicheng jouse jehhin alunghan abeidehpon akhut alamjing nalaijin ahi." 
Isaiah9:13 Chuteng jongleh mipi ho chu abolgimpao heng lama akihei dehpouvin, janel Pakai jongchu aholdeh pouve." 
Isaiah9:14 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israel'a kona alu le amei, abah le apumpeng chu nikhatleh asatlhah ding ahi." 
Isaiah9:15 Miluile mija-um, amachu alu ahin. Jouthuhil themgao amachu amei ahi." 
Isaiah9:16 Ajehchu hiche mite lamkaihon asuhkhelsah uvin, chule alamkai houchu suhmangin aumuve." 
Isaiah9:17 Hijeh chun agollhangho chunga chun Pakai chu akipahpon, apabeiho le ameithaiteu hepinajong anei louhel ding ahi. Ajehchu amitakip aphalhemle khansetbol ahiuvin, akamuvin ngolthu aseicheh uve. Hicheng jouse jehhin alunghan abeidehpon, akhut alamjing nalaijin ahi." 
Isaiah9:18 Ajehchu dihlou nahi mei bangin akadohjin; hichun lingle khaoho akahvam ding, chule gammang thim letlut lah-a kongdoh a; chule meikhu kitungdoh banga kaltou diu ahi." 
Isaiah9:19 Janel Pakai lunghan na-a kona gamsunga thim jinga, mihochu meija tiding thing tobang hidiu ahin, koimachan asopipa jong akhen louding ahi." 
Isaiah9:20 Aman akhut jetnin manloi chelintin, hijongle agilkel phachom louding; Chule akhut veilamin nentin, oivadeh louding ahi, amitakipmin ama banphe cheh akineh dingu ahi." 
Isaiah9:21 Manasseh, Ephraim; chule Ephraim, Manasseh: pangkhoma Judah te adoudiu ahi. Hicheng jouse jeh hin alunghana abeidehpon akhut alamjing nalaijin ahi." 
Isaiah10:1 Ohe! ada ahiuve, adihlouva thu lhuhsahhole athu gonsao dihloutah a sun miho;" 
Isaiah10:2 Alhasamho thutanlhah dih-a kona hoidoh a, kami gentheite-a kona achanu suhchatvaipeh, meithaiho abahgam theina diule paneiloute chomding goho chu!" 
Isaiah10:3 Chule vilna nikhoteng chule gamlatah-a kona suhmangna hung nikhotengle ipipen naboldiuvem? Napanpi diu, koipen henga najam uva naloupi nao hoija nadalhah diuham?" 
Isaiah10:4 Keima beija amaho sohchangho noija kun uva, chule akithat ho noija lhumat diu ahi, Hicheng jouse jehhin alunghan abeidehpon, akhut alamjing nalaijin ahi." 
Isaiah10:5 Vo, Assyria, kalunghana moltum? akhut uva um tenggol khu kathangtomna ahi." 
Isaiah10:6 Keiman kiphat lhemsah nam mite le kalunghana mite doudinga, chule thil suhchat vaisaho ladingle bahgam dinga, chule hicheho chu kholai bonlhoh banga chotpha dinga amachu kasolding ahi." 
Isaiah10:7 I-hijongle aman chutobang chu atup ahipon, alungin jong chutin agelpon; ahinla namtin chu themkhat hilouva suhmang hel dinghi hiche-a alunggel chu ahi." 
Isaiah10:8 Ajehchu aman aseije, kalengchapate chu abonchauva lengho hilou uham?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno chu Karchemish tobang hilou hija? Hamath chu Arpad tobang hilou hija? Samaria chu Damascus tobang hilouham? 
Isaiah10:10 Kakhut hin amilim houho lenggam, Jerusalem le Samaria ho-a sanga nasajo ahin holdohtan;" 
Isaiah10:11 Keiman Samaria le ahou milimhou kabolna banga chu, Jerusalem le amilim houho kabollou ding ham?" 
Isaiah10:12 Hijeh-a chu hunghiti ding ahi, Pakaiyin Zion molchungle Jerusalem chunga anatoh pumpi achai tengle, Assyria lengpa lung hoithona ga, chule akichungvet loupina-a chu talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah10:13 Ajehchu aman, hetkhenna kathemjeh-a kakhut thahatna le kachihna a hichehi kanabol ahin, miho gamgi kachonpeh in, agou khollu kanachom in, mihangtah bangin achengho chu kanasonlhan ahi." 
Isaiah10:14 Chule kakhutnin mite haona chu vacha buh bangin amudoh-in; chule min vacha tui kidalha alokhom bangin leiset pumpi kachom khom sohkei tai; Ahin alhaving hinjapma le akam ka-a avelhia jong khatcha aumpon ahi, ati." 
Isaiah10:15 Heicha chu amangpa chunga kithang-at ngaijem? Ahiloule thing-at chu a-atpa chunga kichoisang ngaijem? Moltum chu adomsangpa khutna kon akithinlhah got banga, ahiloule tenggol chu thing hilou, adomsang beija akikhantou banga chu!" 
Isaiah10:16 Hijeh chun Pakai, janel Pakai chun, amithaote lah-a chun gonna solintin, chule aloupi na noija chun meikong bangin ama meijin konginte." 
Isaiah10:17 Chule Israelte salvah chu mei hung hintin, mitheng chu meikonga hung pangding ahin chule hichun nikhatle lingle khaohi akahvama aval lhumding ahin;" 
Isaiah10:18 Chule gammang loupi nale agamphalai hinna le tahsa agoma asuhmanga, amaho chu ponlap dompa tha angoilhahpet bang hidiu ahi." 
Isaiah10:19 Chule agam manga thing aumsun chu chapang lekha jih-in ajih kham bepma lhom hiding ahi. 
Isaiah10:20 Chule hiche nikholai chule hung hitiding ahi, Israel amoh chengsele Jacob insungmi asohchaho chu amaho sumangpa chunga kingaikit louheldiu Israel mithengpa Pakai chung joh-a dihtah-a kingaidiu ahitai." 
Isaiah10:21 Amoh chengse Jacob mite amoh chengse chu Hat chungnung Pathen henga hungkilediu ahi. 
Isaiah10:22 Ajehchu nami Israelte chu twikhanglen neldi bangjongleu alah uva amoh chengbou hungkilediu ahi. Amangdinga umsaho chu chonphatna-a longletdiu ahi. 
Isaiah10:23 Ajehchu janel Pakai Pathen chun suhmangna ahinlhun sah ding hichu gamjouse lailung tah-a bol dinga agelhuh ahitai. 
Isaiah10:24 Hijeh chun janelho Pakai Pathen'in hiti hin aseije, Zion'a cheng kamite, Assyria ho chu kicha loujenun, aman Egypt mite abol banga chu moltum khatna navoh uva nachung uva atenggol alapsang ding ahi." 
Isaiah10:25 Ajehchu chomkhat kahlouva lung hilouna hi kichaija, kalungsatnahi amaho manthah na hiding ahi." 
Isaiah10:26 Ajehchu janel Pakaiyin Oreb songpi-a Midian ho athachaplai banga chu mivohna achothouva; chule amoltum twikhanglen chunga adopma, chutia chu Egypt'a banga chu adopsang ding ahi." 
Isaiah10:27 Chule hiche nikholai chuleh hunghiti ding ahi. Ama pohgih chu nalengkouva kona chule anamkoljon chu nangonga kona kilamang ding ahi. Chule thao kinujeh-a chu anamkoljon chu kisumang ding ahi. 
Isaiah10:28 Ama Aiath'a ahungin, ama Migron'a agalkaijin; Michmash'a apoh asekhomin;" 
Isaiah10:29 Amahon lampi ajot galkaijun, amaho Geba'a ajangeh taove, Ramah ho akichan; Saul khopi Gibeah mite ajamtaovin ahi." 
Isaiah10:30 Vo Gallim chanu, awging tah-in samin, Laish lama kijahsah-in, vo khoto um Anathoth." 
Isaiah10:31 Madmenah ho akichontan; Gebim'a chengho jamdingin akichomkhom taove. 
Isaiah10:32 Chuche ni chuleh ama Nob'a anaumden nalaijintin; Jerusalem lhang Zion chanu molsang douna-a akhut athin khum ding ahi. 
Isaiah10:33 Veovin, Pakai, janelho Pakaiyin tijat umtah a abah chu asatlhah ding ahin; adunglang sangtah kiphuh lhu-a, chule akiletsah kisunem ding ahitai." 
Isaiah10:34 Chule aman thih-a gammang thimletlut chu atuhlhuh-a, Lebanon chu mihat tah-a kona lhuding ahi." 
Isaiah11:1 Jesse phungbula konin adon khat hungdoh intin, ajunga kona abahkhat hung khangdoh ding ahi;" 
Isaiah11:2 Chule Pakai lhagao chihna le hetkhenna lhagao, thumopthem le hatna lhagao, hetnale Pakai ginna lhagao achunga hung chuding ahin;" 
Isaiah11:3 chule amachu Pakai ginna-a hetna gangtah asem ding, chule amitna amubanga thu atan louding, anakhanga ajahbang maimaija jong aphosal louding ahi." 
Isaiah11:4 Amavang chonphatna-a vaichate thu atanding, leisetna mi nunnem te chu dihtah-a aphoding ahi. Chule aman leiset hi akamsung molla ajepma migiloute chu akam hu-a athading ahi." 
Isaiah11:5 Chonphatna chu akonggah hintin, kitahna chu alunggil gahna hiding ahi." 
Isaiah11:6 Ngeile kelngoinou chengkhom intin, lutnu chu kelnoutoh kolkhom ding ahin; chule bongnoule keipibahkai gol chule gan kivahthaoho lhakhoma; chapang neuchan apuilediu ahi." 
Isaiah11:7 Chule bongpile vompi kivahkhomintin; anouteo kolkhom ding ahin; chule keipi bahkai jengin jong bongchal banga changpol ahin nehding ahi. 
Isaiah11:8 Nao noicheplai gulse ko kotna kichema, noichep bang naosen in gulsum kosung asoding ahi." 
Isaiah11:9 Amaho kalhangthenga chu kisukha louhel le kisumang louhel ding ahiuve. Ajehchu twijin twikhanglen akhusoh banga leiset hi Pakai hetna-a dimset ding ahitai. 
Isaiah11:10 Chule hicheni chule Jesse jung hung umdoh intin; hichu mitin melchihna dinga hung dingdoh-a, chidang namdang hon ahinholdiu ahi. Chule acholdona chu loupitah hiding ahi." 
Isaiah11:11 Chule hicheni chule hitiding ahi, Pakaiyin amite amoh chengse, akidalha dingho, Assyria'a kon Egypt, Pathros, Kush, Elam, Shinar, Hamath'a kon, twikol gamho-a kona lakit dingin aniveina-a akhut alhankit ding ahi." 
Isaiah11:12 Chule namtin vaipi dingin aman melchihna tungdoh intin, Israel nodohsa ho achomkhoma, chule leiset ningli-a kona Judah mi kithecheh ho chu akhopkhom ding ahi." 
Isaiah11:13 Ephraim mite thangsetna jongchu kitol manga, Judah te douho chu kisatlha ding, Ephraim min Judah thangset dantin, Judah'in jong Ephraim sutan taponte." 
Isaiah11:14 Ahinla amaho lhumlang sanga Philistinte lengkouho chunga leng uva, kigomuva solam miho achom dingu ahi, amahon Edom le Moab chunga akhutnu alhah uva, chule Ammon chaten amaho thu angai dingu ahitai." 
Isaiah11:15 Chule Pakaiyin Egypt vadunglen Lei chu asuh manghela chule huipi hattah-a luipi chunga akhut athinkhuma, luidung sagiho chu ajepma, chutengle achunga chu mihon kengto kot louva lam ajot dingu hi." 
Isaiah11:16 Chule Egypt gama kona ahungdoh niuva Israel ten lampi ahin jui banguva; amite amoh kidalha ho dinga chu, lamlhongpi khat Assyria'a kona hungki lhung ding ahi." 
Isaiah12:1 Hicheni chule nanghon vo Pakai keiman nangma vahchoi jinge, kachunga analunghang tajongle chun nalunghanna akichonmangin neilhamon tai;" 
Isaiah12:2 Vetan Pakai chu eihuh hinga ahin; keiman tahsaning ting kichataponge, Ajehchu Pakai Jehovah chu kahatnale kala ahin; amachu eihuh hingpa jong ahunghitai." 
Isaiah12:3 Hijeh-a chu huhhingna twikul'a kona kipahtah-a twi nathaldiu ahitai. 
Isaiah12:4 Hiche nikhoteng chule nanghon Pakai chu vahchoijun lang aminin taovun, athilbolho mitinlah a phongjalun lang aminchu choi-atnin aumtai, tin seijuvin, natidiu ahi." 
Isaiah12:5 Aman thil loupitah aboltahjeh-in Pakaiya la saovin; hichehi leiset pumpi het ahi. 
Isaiah12:6 Nangho Zion'a chengten kho sam unlang aovun ajehchu nalah uva um Israelte mithengpa chu loupitah ahi. 
Isaiah13:1 Babylon pohgih, Amoz chapa Isaiah'in amuchu ahi." 
Isaiah13:2 Milalte kotpi phunga aluttheina diuvin, molsang chunga chun ponlap domsangun lang, awsang tah-in sam unlang, khutnin japmun." 
Isaiah13:3 Kathensosa mihochu thu kapen, Kalunghana-a dingin kamihat ho jong kakouvin, kaloupina eikipapiho jengjong kakouve." 
Isaiah13:4 Molchunga mitamtah husan chu mipi nasatah husan tobang ahin; namtin lengam kikhomkhomho kinah kisao husan toh abangin ahi. Janel Pakai chun galmi janel ho chu galmuna din akhomtup tai. 
Isaiah13:5 Amaho gamlatah gama kon, van monga konin, Pakai amatahle lung hilouna manchah hotoh chuche gampumpi sumang dingin ahunguve atiuve." 
Isaiah13:6 Penguvin, ajehchu Pakai nikho chu ahungnai tai; Hatchung nunga kona manthah na tobang chu hunglhung ding ahi." 
Isaiah13:7 Hijeh-a chu khut jouse ngoilha-a mitin lungsung junlhading ahi. 
Isaiah13:8 Chule amaho kichaovintin; natna le lungkham na-in manchom untin; numei naosonat thoh banga thohgima umdiu amaho khatnin adang chu adatmouva, amaiju meikong bangjeng ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah13:9 Vetan, Pakai nikho lunghanale lungsatna khohtah toh kithokhom engsetna, chuche gam sugamhel dingchu ahunglhung tai. Aman chuche-a kona michonseho chu asuhmang helding ahi." 
Isaiah13:10 Ajehchu van'a ahsi ho le chua bombel ho chun avah-u apehtahloudiu, nisa chu asodohna-a thimdeldul jengding ahitan, chule lhavah injong avahchu asalvah louding ahitai." 
Isaiah13:11 Chule keiman vannoihi asetnao jeh-a chule migiloute chu akhansetnao jeh-a talen kapeh ding; mikiletsahho ahoithanau kasuhbei ding, chule kiletsahna tijat umtah chu nemcha kakoipeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah13:12 Keiman sanatheng sanga lujo mihem khat, Ophir sanahal sanga lujohel mihem khat kasemding ahi." 
Isaiah13:13 Hijeh-a chu janel Pakai lunghan ni-a alungsat khohtah nikho chule vanho kaho lingsoh-a, leiset jong amuna kona kichondohding ahi." 
Isaiah13:14 Chule hichu sakhi nung kidel bangle, ahoitupbei kelngoi tobang hiding ahin; mitin chu amaho mite cheh lama, kiheija, ama gamcheh-a jamlutdiu ahi." 
Isaiah13:15 Koihile akimudoh chanchu kidot kamhel helding, chule amaho jopchan chu chemjam'a loudiu ahi." 
Isaiah13:16 Achateu jong amitmu tah uva kichil ngema a-inho kichom theng ding, chule ajiteu jong achamlou uva kisusedingu ahi." 
Isaiah13:17 Vetan, amaho doudin Mede mite tildoh ingting, amahon dangka angaisah loudiu; chule sana-a jong kipahlouding ahiuve." 
Isaiah13:18 Athalpihou chun gollhangho hinkaplih untin; laigil gaho chunga khotona himhim aneilou diu; amitmuva naosen ho jong akheh louheldiu ahi. 
Isaiah13:19 Chule Babylon lenggam ho loupina Chaldea mite melhoina chungnung chu Pathen'in Sodom le Gomorrah asuhmang tobang chu hiding ahi. 
Isaiah13:20 A-itih a jong koima cheng talouhel ding, akhang akhanga jong chengkit talouhel ding. Arab miten jong chuche munna chu apon innu asonloudiu; kelngoi chinghonjong chua akelngoi hongu asemlouheldiu ahitai." 
Isaiah13:21 Amavang nelgama gamsaho chua chu koldiu; a-inhou chu kichat um ganhingho dimsetna; sumbupi ho chua chu chenga, lhomiho hunglam diu ahi." 
Isaiah13:22 A-in homhou sunga chu twikol gamsaho chule aleng in nomhou sunga chu Dragonho hung hamdiu ahin; chule amanu phat hunglhun nading chu anaitan, anikhoho jong kijopsao talouhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah14:1 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Jacob hepintin, chule Israelte chu lheng nalaijintin, agamsung tah uva achensahdiu chule gamdang mihon amaho ahinjopmuva, Jacob insunga behdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah14:2 Chule mihochun amaho ahinpuijuva, apate mun ahinlhut ding, chule Israel insung chun Pakai gama amahochu sohpale sohnu-a avuluva; chule gal hinga akaihouchu gal hinga akaijuva; asugentheiteu chunga chu vai ahomdingu ahi." 
Isaiah14:3 Chule nalungkham na-a konle nakichat na-a kona chule soh suhgenthei natoh hahsa naki tohsah na nasohchanna-a kona Pakaiyin nacholdosah nile hung hitiding ahi. 
Isaiah14:4 Chutia chu nangman Babylon lengpa douna-a hiche thuchih hi naman chah-a naseiding ahi. I-atileh misugenthei pa chu iti beija hitam! sana khopi chu kichai hitam! 
Isaiah14:5 Pakaiyin mikhang giloupa tenggol le vaihomho laltengdop chu aheboh pehtai. 
Isaiah14:6 Miho lunghanna tanlouva veijingpa, lungsa tah-a namtin chunga vaihompa chu bolgimin aumin, koimachan asutangpoi." 
Isaiah14:7 Leiset pumpi akicholdon, athipdeltan; amahon la asadoh-uvin ahi." 
Isaiah14:8 Ahi, nachunga chah thinghole Lebanon'a cedar thingho akipah-un, suhlhah-a na-uma patnin eiphuh lhudiu khatcha kahenguva ahungtapoi, atiuve." 
Isaiah14:9 Noilama konin thikholkhul chu nahunglhun lamdot dingin ahung kichonnin; hichun nangma dingin mithihole leiset pipui jouse jong achoh thouvin; namtin lengho jouse alaltounaova konin akaithou tan ahi. 
Isaiah14:10 Amahon nahenga, nangjong keiho banga nahung lhahsam hitam? keihotoh nahungbah hitam? atidingu ahi." 
Isaiah14:11 Naloupina le naselangdah husa chu lhankhuh-a poh lhah-in aumin; lungtol chu nanoija akiphan, hiche lung chun natomchah tan ahi." 
Isaiah14:12 Vo Lucifer, jingkah chapa! van'a kona iti hunglhahmanga nahim! namtinho hatmosahpa chu leisetna iti nahung kisatlhah jeng hitam?" 
Isaiah14:13 Ajehchu nangin nalungsunga keima van'a kaltouving ting; Pathen ahsi ho chungvuma kalaltouna kidopsanging katin; mipi kikhomho lhangchung sahlam sanga touving kate, natin ahi." 
Isaiah14:14 Meilhang ho chungvuma kaltouving katin; chungnung penpa toh banging kate, nanatin ahi." 
Isaiah14:15 Ahinla nangma kotongthuh lama thikholkhula kipui lhading nahijobouve. 
Isaiah14:16 Namu jousen neochan namuvintin, leiset kithinsah-a lenggam ho hotlinga ngaito-a chu hiche mipahi hijaham? tin ngaitouvinte;" 
Isaiah14:17 Amachun vannoihi gamthip banga asema, chule akhopihou sumanga sohchangho in honpehlou chu hiche mipahi hilouham? atiuve." 
Isaiah14:18 Namtin vaipi lengho jouse abonchauvin, ama ama insungcheh-a loupitah-in alum ihmuvin ahi." 
Isaiah14:19 Ahinla nangma thet umtah abah khatna hungkon chemjam'a kisatlih, akithatsaho ponsil, kokhuh-a songho lah-a kipailha, kenga kichonpha thilong bangin, nalhana konin paidoh-in na-umtan ahi." 
Isaiah14:20 Nangin nagam nasuhmanga, namite nathagam jeh-in, amahotoh nakivuitha louhel ding ahi. Khanset bolho chilhahte chu kiminphah kitlouhel ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah14:21 Amaho akipatdoh lounadiule, gam alo lounadiu, leiset chung khopiho achendim louna diuvin apateu khansetna jal-in achateu chu thagamdin gotan." 
Isaiah14:22 Ajehchu janel Pakaiyin amaho dounan kipat ingting, Babylon'a konin kachapa le katupa amohchengse minchu kasuhtan ding ahi, ati, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah14:23 Keiman vakang chenna mun le twikulho-a kasema, manthah na muntheh-a katheh doh ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah14:24 Kangaito bang banga guilhunga, kagon bang banga ding teiding ahi; tin janel Pakai chu aki hahselin aseitai." 
Isaiah14:25 Chutia chu keiman kagamsunga Assyria mite kasuhmanga, kamolsangho chunga kachotpha ding; chujou tengle anamkoljon chu amaho-a kona kiheimanga, apohgih-u alenguva kona aselhah dingu ahitai." 
Isaiah14:26 Hiche thilgonhi leiset pumpi chunga thilgon ahin; chule hichehi namtin vaipi jouse chunga kijahdoh khutchu ahi. 
Isaiah14:27 Janel Pakai gonsa ahin, koiham ajahda dingah? Chule akhut kijahdohsa chu kon atimsahkit dingham?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ahaz lengpa thi kum-a chu hiche pohgih hi uma ahitai. 
Isaiah14:29 Nangma kivohna mol abohtah jeh-in, nang Palestine pumpi kipah hih-in, ajehchu gul sonna kona chu gulsum hungsoh-a, chule ama guchu meija lengthei gul hunghi ding ahi." 
Isaiah14:30 Chutengle migenthei cha pengmasa kivah intin, milhasam mongtah-in lumintin; najung chu kella katha-a, nami amoh chengchu aman athading ahi." 
Isaiah14:31 Vo kotpi samin; vo khopi pengin; nangma Palestine pumpi najun lhatai. Ajehchu sahlama kona meikhu hungdoh-a; aphattep sunga chu koimacha achanga umlou ding ahi. 
Isaiah14:32 Nampi thupole ho chu khatnin iti adonbut dingham? Pakaiyin Zion aphutdoh tan, hijeh-a chu mivaichaten hichu atahsan dingu ahi." 
Isaiah15:1 Moab gam pohgih chungchanga, chuche jana chun Moab khopi Ar chu suhmangle kamdelin akilhan; chuleh Moab gama Kir khopi jong kamhel leh thipdelin akikoitai." 
Isaiah15:2 Bajith le Dibon munsang ho-a chun ama kapdingin achetoutan: Nebo chungle Medeba chunga Moab peng pengding, aluchung jouseu chaijin tin akhamulhou jouse kivou ngim ding ahi." 
Isaiah15:3 Akhopi lamlen dunguva amahon khaodip pon akigah uva, a-inchunghou le alamlen houva amitin penguva haka-a kapdingu ahiuve." 
Isaiah15:4 Chule Heshbon le Elealeh te kapmuva, Jahaz geisana a-aw kijading ahi. Hijeh-a chu galvon kivon Moab sepaiho chu awsangtah-a pengdoh uva; ahinna chu amadinga lungkham umtah hiding ahi." 
Isaiah15:5 Kalungsung Moab dingin kapdoh intin; ajamleleho chu kumthum kijoma Zoar'a jamlutdiu ahi. Ajehchu Luhith kaltouna-a chu kap puma chetoudiu chule Heronaim lampia chu suhmangna-a pengjahdiu ahi. 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim twiho akangin, hamdongho agopmin; hampa akehpon; hamhing himhim aumtapoi." 
Isaiah15:7 Hijeh chun amahon amujouseu le akholkhom jouseu chu huisum vachadung lama akipoh mangdiu ahitai. 
Isaiah15:8 Ajehchu Moab gamgi muntina kana aumin. Eglaim le Beerelin'a jong apen ginu chu akithangsoh tai. 
Isaiah15:9 Ajehchu Dimon twiho thisan dimding ahin, ajehchu Dimon chunga chu akhoh jocheh kalhunsahbe ding, Moab gama hoidohnale chuche gama amoh chengse chunga keipi bahkai kalhalut ding ahi." 
Isaiah16:1 Gamsung vaihomho dingin, Sela a konin, gamthip lam Zion chanu lhanga chun kelngoinou ho chu hinsolun." 
Isaiah16:2 Chutia chu Moab chanute chu vacha abuh-a kona kinodoh leng lele banga, Arnon kaimuna chutidiu ahi." 
Isaiah16:3 Thumop unlang, thutan boldoh-un; sunkim laija nalelim chu jan bangin seminlang; akinodohsa selinlang; vahvei chu matsah hih-in." 
Isaiah16:4 Akinodohho chu chenkhompin, Moab misumang pa maija akiselnao hitan, hunama lapa chu akichaija, migamsah pa akingah jehchun gamsunga konin misugenthei ho akisumang tai." 
Isaiah16:5 Chule hepina-in laltouna chu kitungdet nintin, hiche chunga chu thudih-a David ponbuh sunga vai ahomding, thu atanding, thutana dih aholding chule chonphatna-a kinoding ahi." 
Isaiah16:6 Moab hoithonahi thu kanajaovin; ama ahoitho lheh jengin; akiletsah nale ahoithona chule alunghan naho jengjong kanajaovin; ahinla ajounaho chu chutilou dingdol ahi. 
Isaiah16:7 Hijeh chun Moab pengjah hen, mitinin Moab ka cheh hen. Ajehchu Kirhareseth kiphudoh jala nalunghempiu; amaho chu akivolhu tahmonga ahiuve." 
Isaiah16:8 Ajehchu Heshbon loujao le Sibmah lengpigui alhasamtai, aphung lhungpiho chu Pathen hephalou pakai hon anasubongun, Jazer alhung taove. Chuin gamthip lailunga ajamle leuvin ahi. Abahho ajamdoh un, twikhanglen galla ajamgalkai taove." 
Isaiah16:9 Hijeh chun Sibmah lengpigui chu Jazer chunga kana bangin kacham-inge; vo Heshbon le Elealeh kamitlhi-in twichap nange; nanipi lai theiho dingleh nachang at nadinga khosap chu athip tai. 
Isaiah16:10 Chule lou phatah-a kona kipanale thanopna akilamang tan; lengpilei laija penga lasah le khosap jong umlou ding ahitai. Achilhon jong lengpitwi achildoh loudiu ahitai. Alengpiga lonao khosap jong atansahtai. 
Isaiah16:11 Hijeh chun kagiljang hohi Moab te dingin, chule kasung hohi Kirhares dingin selangdah bangin ging'inte." 
Isaiah16:12 Chule hitiding ahi. Moab chu munsanga alungkham akimutengle munthenga tao dingin hungintin, hijongle lolhing louding ahi." 
Isaiah16:13 Hichehi Pakaiyin chuche laija patna Moab chungchang thu aseichu ahi. 
Isaiah16:14 Ahinla tun Pakaiyin ana seijin, natongho kumsim dungjuija, kumthum sung Moab loupina chu amipite tamtah puma kinoise ding; amoh umsun chu lhomchale doitah hidiu ahi, ati." 
Isaiah17:1 Damascus pohgih veuvin, Damascus hi khopi khat ahina-a konin akilamang tan, in-gem kiselom hunghidingbou ahi." 
Isaiah17:2 Aroer khopichu dalhah-in aumtan, kelngoihonte kolna ding maimaibou hung hintin, koimachan akichatsah loudiu ahi." 
Isaiah17:3 Ephraim'a konin kulpidet beijintin, Damascus'a lenggam le Syria amoh chengjong beiding ahitai. Amaho chu Israel chate loupina tobang hidiu ahi, atin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah17:4 Hicheni chule hitiding ahi. Jacob loupina chu kemsuh-in tin, chule atahsa thaotah chu jol lha-a gongding ahi." 
Isaiah17:5 Hiche chu chang atpan changho ahuikhom, akhutna changvuiho a-at banga Rephaim phaichama changvuiho alokhom tobang hiding ahi." 
Isaiah17:6 Ahinla olive thingphung kihotlinga, abah sangpen tah vuma aga nile thum umdenna, abah ga phapena lile nga umden bep banga lengpigui kidalha ding ahi, tin Israel Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Isaiah17:7 Hicheni chule min asempa ahinvet ding, chule amitnin Israel mithengpa chu ajabol ding ahi." 
Isaiah17:8 Chule aman amakhutsem maicham ho chu avet tahlou ding, akhutna asemsa thingbomho hihen, milimho hijengjongle, ajaboltah louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah17:9 Hicheni chule akhopi dettahho chu thingbah kidalha Israelte jeh-a abah chungnung pen adalhah-u tobang hiding ahin, hikom chu kamdel ding ahitai." 
Isaiah17:10 Ajehchu nahuhhingpa Pathen nasumilin, nahatna songpi nageldohtapoi. Hijeh chun thingkeh hoihoi kiphun natin, hetkhah lou kiselhuhna koijinate." 
Isaiah17:11 Naphuni maman khandohsah in natin, natu jingkah mama chun khantul tulsah-in nate, ahinla aga lokhomchu lungkhamna kisekhomle lungdon ngahnabei hiding ahi." 
Isaiah17:12 Mipi tamtah twikhanglen kitumging banga ahusao kitol guiguile, twipi kinong lullul banga kinonga, namtin kinongho chu ohe adau ahi!" 
Isaiah17:13 Namtin vaipi chu twipi kinong tamtah bangin kingong untin, hijongle Pathen'in amaho phoh intin, amaho gamlatah-a jamdiu; chule lhanga huipin changsi amutlonle bangle chimpei masanga thil kipeimang bangdiu ahi." 
Isaiah17:14 Chule vetan nilhah lamle lungkhamna ahijin, jingkah masangin ama anaumjitapon ahi. Hichehi eisuchavai hou chanchu ahin chule eigumang hou vangchan chu ahi." 
Isaiah18:1 Pathen'in Sudan Jepna Apehding: 
Isaiah18:2 Nam thechehsa le ahomsa henga, akipatnuva lhah tugeija tijat umtah mite henga, twikhanglen le vadunglen chunga lekha thing kongsaova palai kisolho tedohsa le kengto chotbehsa, twijin agamu asuhsette nam henga chun thupole kaljangho cheovin ati-e." 
Isaiah18:3 Nangho vannoi'a umho jouse le leichunga chenghon, lhang chunga galponlap ahung kidopsang tengle, veovin lang aman sumkon ahinmut tengle ngaijuvin." 
Isaiah18:4 Ajehchu Pakaiyin kahenga, keima kicholdong ting, kachenna mun hampa louhing chunga hin chang-at kholum laija daitwi meikai bangin hingel nange ati." 
Isaiah18:5 Ajehchu aga lophat masang, amum ahung pilhina, apahjong lengpiga minsa ahunghi tengle, aman abah sipah jam hole abah lenho chu agoma hampa vatna chema abahho asat lhah-a, apaidoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah18:6 Hicheho chu molsang ho-a vachaho dingle leisetna ganchaho kidalhah peh ding ahiuvin, vachate chun hichehochu nipilai man na-a, chule gamsaho chun phalbilai man na-a, aneidingu ahitai." 
Isaiah18:7 Hichephat teng chule janel Pakai heng, Janel Pakai min umna Zion lhanga a chu: mipi thechehsa le ahomsaho-a kon, akipat uva lhah tugeija tijat umtah mite-a kona, tedohsa le kengtoa chotbehsa nam mite-a kon, twijin agamu asuhsetho-a kona, thilpeh chu hung kipelut ding ahitai." 
Isaiah19:1 Egypt pohgih chu veuvin, Pakai chu mei kitol gangtah chunga touva, Egypt gama hungding: chule ama angsunga Egypt gama milim ho chu kichon diu, Egypt mite lungchang chu asunga jun lhading ahi." 
Isaiah19:2 Keiman Egypt mite doudin Egypt mite ma tilingting, amitakipmin asopi adoudiu, amitakipmin aheng akom adouva, khopile khopi, lenggamle lenggam hungkidouto diu ahi." 
Isaiah19:3 Hichesung chule Egypt mite lhagao chu hungthon nintin, chule hilchahna chu kasuhbei ding ahi. Chutengle amahon milimho le ailhimho, lhakou ho le doithemho henga aholdiu ahi." 
Isaiah19:4 Chule keiman Egypt mite chu vaipo engsetah khat khutna kapehdoh-a; kichat umtah pakai khatnin achunguva vai ahomding ahi; tin Pakai janel Pakai chun aseitai. 
Isaiah19:5 Chule vadunglen ho-a kona twiho hungkanga; vadungho longmanga gothetding ahi. 
Isaiah19:6 Chule amahon vadunglen ho chu gamlatah-ah heimang untin, kinga tupna luidunga chu kanga gothet ding: Pumpeng hole aigeho jong golha ding ahi." 
Isaiah19:7 Luidung pang le vapangho akeova kijamding; chule luidung panga kithe chanchu golha-a huija lengmang ding; umkit louhel ding ahitai. 
Isaiah19:8 Ngamanho jong lunghemuva, luidung ho-a ngakoiho jouse lunghem untin; chuhtwi chunga lensep ho lhasamdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah19:9 Hiche chungchon chun tupat pon khongho le ponvang khongho chu lungjing diu ahi. 
Isaiah19:10 Akibulphuna songho kisubong ding; natong dinga kigongho jouse jong lungjinga umdiu ahitai. 
Isaiah19:11 Thonlouva Zoan lengchapate chu ngoldiu; Pharaoh thumopthem michingho thuhil chu lungsetna neilou ahung hitai. Keima miching cha leng luiho chapa kahi tia, Pharaoh henga iti naseiju ham?" 
Isaiah19:12 Amaho hoilamba hitaovam? namichingho hoiba hitaovam? Amahochu tun kihilsah inlang, Egypt chunga janel Pakaiyin ipi agon chu amaho hetsah in." 
Isaiah19:13 Zoan lengchapate chu angoltaovin, Noph lengchapate akilhemlha gamtai; amahon jong Egypt mite, chuche phung mite chendetnaho geijin apuimanguve." 
Isaiah19:14 Alah uva chun Pakaiyin lamvaina lhagao achoh halin; chutichun jukhama alohna-a lonlele bangin Egypt mite chu atohnao channa asuhkhelsah uve. 
Isaiah19:15 Egypt dingin alu hihen amei hijongle, lusu bah hihen phaipheng phung hijongle, abolpeh theiding aumpoi." 
Isaiah19:16 Hicheni chule Egypt chu numei tobang hidiu ahin; janel Pakai khut thin chu achunguva athin ahijeh-a kichaova tijading ahiuve. 
Isaiah19:17 Chule Judah gamchu Egypt tedin tijat umtah hintin, chuche douna dinga janel Pakaiyin agontoh athuhiljeh-a aminphah chu kichacheh diu ahi." 
Isaiah19:18 Hiche nikho chule Egypt gama khopi nga in Kanaan pao athouva, janel Pakai henga chu kihahsel ding ahiuvin; khatchu manthah na khopi kitiding ahi." 
Isaiah19:19 Hicheni chule Egypt gamlailunga chu Pakai maicham khat, chule agamsunga chu Pakaiya songphu khat umding ahi." 
Isaiah19:20 Chule Egypt gamsunga janel Pakai dinga hichu melchihna le hettohsahna hiding ahi; ajehchu misugenthei ho jeh-a Pakai henga taoding ahiuvin, chule aman huhhingna le hat chungnung khat ahinsolpeh-a, amahochu ahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah19:21 Chutengle Pakai chu Egypt ho het hitantin, hiche nikho chule Egypt ten Pakai chu ahetdohdiu, chule ganlhaina le thilpeh aneidiu ahi; ahi, Pakai henga kitepna khatna kitep uva asuhbulhitdiu ahi." 
Isaiah19:22 Chule Pakaiyin Egypt ajepding, ajepna-a asuhdam ding ahi. Amaho Pakai hengtah-a chu hungkileuva, chule aman ataonao angaipeh-a, chule aboldamdiu ahi." 
Isaiah19:23 Hiche nikho chule Egypt'a kona Assyria geija lamlhongpi khat umding Assyria te Egypt'a, Egypt Assyria a, hunguva Egypt mite chun Assyria mite toh ajenkhomdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah19:24 Hiche nikho chule Israel hi Egypt le Assyria bana athumna hiding, chule gamlailunga phattheiboh changtah hunghi ding ahi." 
Isaiah19:25 Janel Pakai chun kami Egypt te leh kakhutsoh Assyria te chule kagoulo Israelte chu phattheiboh changu hen tia aseiding ahi. 
Isaiah20:1 Tartan Ashdod na ahunga (Assyria lengpa Sargon in asol lai) Ashdod asatna alah kumchun; 
Isaiah20:2 Hichephat mama chun Pakaiyin Amoz chapa Isaiah hengah aseijin, chenlang nataija khaopon chu sutlhan lang, nakeng phanga konin nakengkoh sutlhan, ati. Chuin aman chutichun abolin, asagoh-in akeng keuvin lam ajottai." 
Isaiah20:3 Chutin Pakaiyin, kasoh Isaiah Egypt le Ethiopia te chunga melchihna le thilkidang dinga kumthum sunga sagohle akeng keuva aumbangchun;" 
Isaiah20:4 chutia chu Assyria lengpan Egypt te sohchang dinga, Ethiopia gal hing ding, khangdong laile tehse cheng, sagohkeu le kengkeuva Egypt mite jachatsah dinga akhelbuhgei san uva kihohdoh-a, apuimang ding ahi, tin aseije." 
Isaiah20:5 Chule amaho akinepnao Ethiopia le aloupinao Egypt jala kichaova jahchadiu ahi. 
Isaiah20:6 Chule hiche twikol gama umho hin hicheni chule, vetaovin ikinepnao chutichu ahi, Assyria lengpa-a kona ikihuhdoh nadiuva kithopina hola hoilama ijamdiu hija, iti ihoidoh diuham? atidiu ahi." 
Isaiah21:1 Twipi nelgam pohgih, lhanglam chimpei hungkipei bangin chutichun nelgamle tijat umtah gama konin ahunge." 
Isaiah21:2 Lungkham umtah thilmu khat kahenga akiphongin, kitahlou bolpan kitahlouvin abolin, misumang pan mi asumange. Vo Elam kaltouvin, vo Media gaum kimvelun, khoisatna jouse kasuhtang ahitai." 
Isaiah21:3 Hijeh chun kataihohi natna-in adimin; numei naosonat in aheh bangin, natna chun eiman chomtai. Hichu kajan kakunin kho mutheilou jennin kalungkhamtan ahi." 
Isaiah21:4 Kalungsung ahaisamtan, thil gimneitah khatnin eikichat sahtai. Kanopna janchu aman kadingin kichatnan aleheitai." 
Isaiah21:5 Dokhang chu dovin, daiveina insanga chun ve jingin, neuvin, donun; kipat un, nangho pipuiho, lumdal chu thao uvin." 
Isaiah21:6 Ajehchu hitihin kajah-a aseijin, Pakaiyin kahenga, chen, khongah khat koijin amu muchu phondoh sah-in ati." 
Isaiah21:7 Chuin aman kangtalai khat sakola tou mi kopkhat toh, sangan kangtalai khat, sangongsao ho kangtalai khat amun, chuin gunchu tahle lunglut tah in angaijin ahi." 
Isaiah21:8 Chuin ama keipi bahkai bangin apengin, Pakai keima insang chunga kading jingin, chule jankhovah in kapansatna-a kaume." 
Isaiah21:9 Chule vetan, hiche munahin miho kangtalai khat, sakol chungtou kopkhat toh ahungin ahi. Chuin aman ahindonbut nin, Babylon achimtai, achimtai, amanu pathen semthu milim jouse aman tolah avobong gamtai, ati." 
Isaiah21:10 Vo kachang mola kavohsa kaphola kachang ho, Israel Pathen, janel ho Pakaiya kona kanajah chu naheng uva kaphondoh ahitai." 
Isaiah21:11 Dumah pohgih chu, Aman Seir'a konin eihin kouvin, khongahpa, jana ipi soh am? Khongahpa jana ipi soh am? ati." 
Isaiah21:12 Khongahpa chun jingkah, chule janjong ahung naitai. Nakholtoh nomule kholtoh-un, hungkileuvin, hungun, ati." 
Isaiah21:13 Arabia te pohgih chu, Vo Dedanim kholjinho, nangho Arabia gammang sunga nagedingu ahi." 
Isaiah21:14 Tema gama chengho chun adangchahpa twi ahindop peh-un, galjampa chu amahon changlhah-in avah uve." 
Isaiah21:15 Ajehchu amaho chemjam'a kon, chemjam kisatdohsa-a kon, chule thalpi kijebongsa-a kon, chule gal nasatah-a kona hungjam ahiuve." 
Isaiah21:16 Ajehchu Pakaiyin kahenga hitihin aseije; kithalah kumho dungjuija kumkhat sunga Kedarte loupina jouse beisohding ahi. 
Isaiah21:17 Ajehchu Kedar chate thal kapthem le galhat hochu kilhomsah ding ahi. Ajehchu Pakai Israel Pathen'in hichehi aseisa ahitai. 
Isaiah22:1 Thilmuna phaicham pohgih. Tu-a ipi hahsatna uma, in chunga nabon chaova nakalu hitam?" 
Isaiah22:2 Nangma husagin na dimset, khopi pohcheichoi, kipahtah khopi; napasal kithat ho chu chemjam'a kithat le galsatna a thi ahipouve." 
Isaiah22:3 Navaihom hou abonun ajamkhomun, thalthem hon amaho akan khomun; nanga kona gamlha tah-a jamdoh jouse chu abonin akangomun ahi." 
Isaiah22:4 Hijeh-a chu kati ahi, keija konin achomlam veuvin; kamite chanu kisuhmang jeh-a haka-a kakading ahi, lhepbi dingin neigo hih-un." 
Isaiah22:5 Ajehchu tuni hi lungkhamna le kengto-a kichil thangna chule gao thilmuna phaichama janelho Pakai Pathen dinga lungnohphahna le, kul bangho kisuhchimna le mol chungho-a kana nikho chu ahi." 
Isaiah22:6 Elam mihon livathei akengun, mihem touna sakol kangtalai le sakolchung touhotoh alhonuvin, Kir mihon lumdal chu ahohdoh-uvin ahi." 
Isaiah22:7 Chule hung hitiding ahi, Na phaicham deichungnung chu kangtalai dimset ding ahi, sakolchung touho chu kotpiphunga galvonpuma kigoldiu ahi." 
Isaiah22:8 Chuin aman Judah pondal kikhuna chu ahohdoh-in, chule hiche nikho chun gammanga galmanchah in chu navetai." 
Isaiah22:9 Nanghon David khopi selaiho jongchu namutaove, hichu tamtah ahi. Chuin twikul noinunga twiho chu nagom khom taove." 
Isaiah22:10 Chuin Jerusalem in hochu nasim uvin, chule in hochu kulbang semna dingin naphe lhaove." 
Isaiah22:11 Twikul luija hunglong dingin kulbangho kah-a chun twilam khatjong nalaijun; ahinla chuche sempa lamchu nave hih-un, sotna patna hingong tohpa jong chu nanahsah pouve." 
Isaiah22:12 Hiche laichun janel Pakai Pathen'in akapdin, alunghemdin, alu voutoldin chule khaodip ponna atai kigahdin mi akouve." 
Isaiah22:13 Chule ven thanopnale kipanaho, bongchal ho kithana le kelngoi ho kithana, sanehna le lengpitwi dona hohi hungun neuhitin, donuhite, ajehchu jingle ithidiu ahitai." 
Isaiah22:14 Chule hichehi janel Pakaiyin kanabenga anaphondohsa ahin, thonlouhella hiche khansetnahi nathi kahseuva nangho-a kona kisutheng louhel ding ahi, tin janel Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Isaiah22:15 Janel Pakai Pathen chun hitin aseije, chenlang hiche neichingpa hengle insung chunga vaipo, Shebna heng ngeija chun gaseijin," 
Isaiah22:16 Ama dinga sangtah-a lhan kilaija, amadinga songpi sunga chendetna in kisem banga, hichemunahi ipi naneija, koi naneija lhan nakilai ham?" 
Isaiah22:17 Vetan, Pakaiyin thahat tah-a gal hinga nakaimanga, nakhu khum teiding ahi." 
Isaiah22:18 Aman nangma thonlouva pumhatna gamlen lama lumbeng banga kipeibong bonga napeiding ahin, chua nathiden ding, chua chu naloupina kangtalai chu napupa insung jachatna sohding ahi." 
Isaiah22:19 Keiman naum na-a konin nangma deldoh ingting, napipui na-a kona aman naloilhah ding ahi." 
Isaiah22:20 Chule hiche nikho chule hitiding ahi: Keiman kalhacha Hilkiah chapa Eliakim chu kakouding ahi. 
Isaiah22:21 Keiman nasangkhol chol ama ahpeh ingting, nakonggah-in ama hatsah ingting navaipoh na akhutna kapeh ding ahi. Chule ama Jerusalem'a chenghole Judah insung mite pa-a pangding ahitai." 
Isaiah22:22 Chule David insung kot heh alengkouva kakhaija, chutia chu aman ahonle koimachan akha theilou ding, aman akhale koimachan ahontheilou ding ahi." 
Isaiah22:23 Chule keiman amachu mundet tah-a kikilbeh banga kasuhdet ding; amachu apa insung dinga laltouna loupi chu hiding ahi. 
Isaiah22:24 Chule amahon amachunga chu apa insung loupina jouse, atu achate le asonho, bel neocha jouse belcha khonho-a pat twipai geija achunga akhaidiu ahi." 
Isaiah22:25 Janel Pakaiyin aseije, hiche nikho chule, mundet tah-a kikildet thihkil chu kibotdoh intin, kisatlha-a lhamang ding ahi. Chule achunga um pohgih chu kisatlhading ahi. Ajehchu hichehi Pakaiyin aseisa ahitai." 
Isaiah23:1 Tyre pohgih. Nangho Tarshish kongho, pengun! Ajehchu in umlou hel, alutna ding umlouhel ahinadinga hiche chu kisukamhela ahitai. Chittim gama kona hichehi ahenguva hung kiphonga ahi." 
Isaiah23:2 Twikol gama cheng nangho thipchetnin umun, Zidon mi sumkolvei, twikhanglen palgalkai lehon alodimsoh taove." 
Isaiah23:3 Chule twilenho panga Sihor muchi, luipang dunga chang ki-at chu amanu chanding ahin, amanu chu namtin kailhang ahi." 
Isaiah23:4 Vo Zidon, jahchan umin; ajehchu twipin thu aseijin, twipi hatna ngeichun naoso natna kathoh khapon, chate jong kahingkhapoi, gollhangho jong kavahdoh khapoi, nungahthengho jong kaseiletsah khapoi, atin ahi." 
Isaiah23:5 Egypt thudol thulhut kijabanga chu, Tyre thulhut na chu amaho lungna lhehdiu ahi." 
Isaiah23:6 Nangho twikol'a chengte, Tarshish a galkai junlang samun." 
Isaiah23:7 Hichehi gollui khanglui nikho-a mi chuham? Akengphangin gamlatah-a chedinga alhohmang ding ahi. 
Isaiah23:8 Lallukhuh khuh khopi, chua sumkolvei ho pipuiho jeng hija chua kiveihojong leisetna ja umtejeng hija, hiche Tyre khopi douna gong'a chu koiham?" 
Isaiah23:9 Janel Pakai chun leisetna kiletsah le ja-umtah ho suhnemna dinga hichehi anagon ahi. 
Isaiah23:10 Vo Tarshish chanu, vadung khat bangin nagamsung chu jotpaitan, nahatbe nading dang aumtapoi." 
Isaiah23:11 Aman twikhanglen chunga akhut ajah-in, lenggam ho ahotlinge. Pakaiyin chuche sumkolveipa khopi douna kulpidet suhmangna dingin thu apetai." 
Isaiah23:12 Chuin aman vo genthei thoh nungah theng, Zidon chanu, nangma nakipajom louhel ding ahi. Kipat inlang, Chittim'a galkaijin, chua jongchu choldona namulouhel ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah23:13 Chaldea gamhi vetan! Assyria miten amaho dinga gamthipma chengho amu kahseuvin hiche mitehi aumtapouve. Amahon insangho leng inpiho asauvin, ahin hichun manthah na-a ahin lhuttai." 
Isaiah23:14 Nangho Tarshish kong inneiho; pengun, ajehchu nathahatna beihela suhmang ahitai." 
Isaiah23:15 Chule hiche nikho chule hitiding ahi, lengkhat nikhoho dungjuija Tyre chu kum somsagi suhmila hung umding, kum somsagi kichaitengle noti banga Tyre'in la asahding ahi." 
Isaiah23:16 Suhmila anaum notinu, nangman selangdah choi jinlang, khopichu velin, nangma geldoh-a naum theina dingin aw nguiheu vin, la tamtah san." 
Isaiah23:17 Chule kum somsagi akichai joutengle hung hitiding ahi. Pakaiyin Tyre chu vilintin, amanu athalahnu henga hungkile ding, chule leiset chunga vannoi lenggam ho jouseto jong hungchonthanghoi ding ahi." 
Isaiah23:18 Chule amanu kiveina thilho le athalah chu Pakaiya dinga atheng hiding: hichu kikhol louding, koijong kikoikhom louding ahi; ajehchu kiveina thilho chu Pakai masanga chenghon nengtah-a anehdiu chule sottah aneidiu ponsiljoh hiding ahi." 
Isaiah24:1 Veuvin, Pakaiyin leiset hi keuhel le agoh-in anasemin, chule akhup athalin aleh-in, chua chengho chu athecheh tai." 
Isaiah24:2 Chutia chu, mipi aum banga thempu uma; sohpa aum banga pakaipa uma; sohnu aum banga pakainu uma; achopa aum banga ajohpa uma; ahompa aum banga abatpa uma; sumthoi lapa aum banga sumthoi pepa uma; batna lapa aum banga batna pepa umah ahi." 
Isaiah24:3 Leiset chu keuhela suhchatvai gam hela umding ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin hiche thuhi anasei ahitai. 
Isaiah24:4 Vannoihi alunghemin agolhatai. Vannoihi akemsuh-in agolhatai. Leisetna mikiletsahho akemsuh taove. 
Isaiah24:5 Leiset hi achengho noija suhboh-in aumtai; ajehchu amahon danho chu asukhelun, chondanthu akhelun, tonsot thulhun asukehtaove." 
Isaiah24:6 Hijeh chun leiset hi gaosapmin avalhumtai, asunga chengho chu akamdeltai; hijeh chun leija chengho akavamun, mi lhomcha bou aumtai." 
Isaiah24:7 Lengpitwi thah alunghemin, lengpitwi alhasamin, lungsunga kipahho jouse akhoisataove." 
Isaiah24:8 Khongchaho thanopna akichaijin, kipahtah-a umho husa chu abeijin, selangdah thanopna atangtai." 
Isaiah24:9 Amahon judon le lasah akop loudiu ahi; khamnathei donhi adonho dinga khatah ahi. 
Isaiah24:10 Lung nohphahna khopi chu akisumang tai; Koimacha alunglut thei louna dingin in jouse akikhahchahtai. 
Isaiah24:11 Ju jeh-in lamlhongpi ho-ah kho akisame; kipana jouse athimin, gamsung thanopna jouse abeitai." 
Isaiah24:12 Khopisung ahomkeovin akidalhan, chule kotpi chu manthah na-in akivosen ahi." 
Isaiah24:13 Gam lailung miholah-a hitia ahung um tengtah le, Olive thingphung kihotling tobangle lengpiga loujaova apul kilohkhom tobanga chu hung umding ahi." 
Isaiah24:14 Amahon a-aw hinsam doh-un tin, Pakai loupina lan saovintin; twikhanglen'a kona gingtah-a asapdohdiu ahi." 
Isaiah24:15 Hijeh chun nanghon Pakai, Israel Pakai Pathen min ngeichu mei le twipi chule twikol gamho-a chun choi-an uvin." 
Isaiah24:16 Leiset kolmonga konin la kisaho ijaovin, michonpha te henga loupina umhen. Ahinla keima kalhasam tultul, kalhasam tultul tai; ohe! ada-a kahi, jouva mibol hon jouvin eiboluvin; adihlouva mibol hon jouvin eihabol lheh-un ahi, katin ahi." 
Isaiah24:17 Vo leisetna chengho, kichatna le kokhuh, chule thang nachung uva aume." 
Isaiah24:18 Chule hitiding ahi: Tijatna husa-a kona jam-a chu kokhuh-a lhalutding, chule kokhuh-a kona hungdoh-a chu thanga ohding ahi; ajehchu chungsanga bangkot ho akihongin, chule leiset bulho akihotlinge." 
Isaiah24:19 Leiset nasatah-in akehlhan, leiset hi ajunlha thengin, leiset hi nasatah-in akilong tai." 
Isaiah24:20 Leiset hi jukham banga kipei lonle-a, buh neocha banga kichon mangding ahi. Chule chua suhkhelna chu gihsatah-a achunga umding, chule hichu lhu-a kiphongkit louhel ding ahitai." 
Isaiah24:21 Chule hicheni chule hitiding ahi, Pakaiyin chunga um janel le leiset lengho chu talen apehding ahi." 
Isaiah24:22 Chule sohchangho kokhuh sunga akikoikhom banga, amaho kikhom khomdiu, songkul sunga kikhachah khumdiu, nitamtah joule amaho kivil ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah24:23 Chutengle janel Pakai chu Zion lhang le Jerusalem'a chule upaho anga loupitah-a alengchan tengle lha thimintin, nisa maimoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah25:1 Vo Pakai, nangma ka Pathen nahin, nangma choi-an ningting, namin vahchoi jinge; ajehchu nangin datmo um thilho nabolin; malaija nathumop ho chu tahsan umle thudih ahi." 
Isaiah25:2 Ajehchu khopijong leivui nasosah-in, hoidohna khopi chu nasumangin, khopi umlouna dinga gamdang mite leng in-piho chu nasusen, hichu kisadohkit louhel ding ahitai." 
Isaiah25:3 Hijeh chun mihatten nangma loupisah-un natin, tijat um namtin vaipiho khopi'n nagindiu ahi." 
Isaiah25:4 Ajehchu nangma vaichate din thahatna nahin, alhasamte hesoh laija thahatna nahin, khopihui hatlaija belding nahin, nisa noija lim nahin, khopihuijin kulbang anuh tobangkhu nahije." 
Isaiah25:5 Gamdang miteho husa chu mun go laija nisa sat banga nasuhnem ding; meilhang lima asa jengjong chu nasuhnem ding ahi. Kichat umtah abahho chu kisunem ding ahi. 
Isaiah25:6 Hiche molsanga hi janel Pakaiyin, lengpituichih-a mijouse golvah, thil thaova golvah, thil thao lhintwi dimsetna, lengpitwi chih kilhithengsella golvah abolding ahi." 
Isaiah25:7 Aman hiche molsang hi namtin jouse chunga kikhukhum maikhule, namtin jouse chunga kidah ponlukhuh chu asuhmang ding ahitai." 
Isaiah25:8 Aman thina chu jona-a aval lhuma; chule Pakai Pathen'in mai jouse-a kona mitlhiho atheh hulding, chule leiset pumpi jouse-a kona amite kiphona alahmang ding ahi: ajehchu Pakaiyin hichehi asei ahi." 
Isaiah25:9 Chule hiche nikho chule hitia kisei ding ahi. Veuvin, hichehi i-Pathen'u eihon ingao, eihuhhing dinguva amahi ahi. Hichehi eihon ina ngajingu Pakai chu ahi. Ami huhhing na-a eiho ikipaova itha nopdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah25:10 Ajehchu Pakai khutchu hiche lhanga hi kingama, changpol eh-molla kon akilholhah banga, ama noija Moab chu chotbeh-a umding ahitai." 
Isaiah25:11 Twijap pan twijapna dinga akhut ajah banga, aman alah uva akhut ajahding ahi. Chule aman akiletsah naochu akhutnuva achomdoh houtoh asotlhahtha ding ahi." 
Isaiah25:12 Chule akulpidet kulbang sangho chu asuhnempeh-a akoinema, tolgeija, leivui changeija asotlhah ding ahi." 
Isaiah26:1 Chuche nikho tengchule hiche la hi Judah gamma kisading ahi; keihon khopi dettah khat kaneijun; Pathen'in huhhingna chu kulbanghole kulpiho dinga agetding ahi. 
Isaiah26:2 Nam chonphate, thutah nit mite alut theina dingun, nanghon kotpi chu hong lennun." 
Isaiah26:3 Nachunga alungthim chensah chu chamna kimkeija navet tupding ahi. Ajehchu aman nangma natahsanin ahi. 
Isaiah26:4 Nanghon Pakai chu a-imatih chanin tahsanun. Ajehchu Pakai Jehovah'a chu tonsot thahatna chu uma ahi. 
Isaiah26:5 Ajehchu sangtah-a chengho chu aman ahinpolhan; khopi sangtah chu akoinemin, tol geija akoinemtai; aman leivui geijin ahinpolhai." 
Isaiah26:6 Mivaichate kenghole, lhasamte kalsonho, ngeichu akenga achotbeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah26:7 Michonpha te lampi chu kitahna ahin, nang, lungdihpen chun mikitah lampi chu naleptohjin ahi." 
Isaiah26:8 Ahi, nathutanlhahna lampia chun, vo Pakai, nangma kangah jingui; kahinnaovin alha ngaipen chu namin le nangma geldohjing ding ahi." 
Isaiah26:9 Janteng kahinna-in nalhangaijin ahi. Ahi, kasunga um lhagao chun jingkah matah-in nangma nahol inge. Ajehchu nathutanlhahnaho leija aumteng, vannoi'a chengten chonphatna chu kijil unte." 
Isaiah26:10 Migilou khohsahna musah jengle chun chonphatna kimudoh dehponte; lungdihna gama chun aman dihlou tah-in thilbol'intin Pakai lalna chu mudohponte. 
Isaiah26:11 Pakai, nakhut nadopsang tengle amahon mupouvinnate. Ahinla mihochunga athangset jeh-un mudoh untin; jahchadiu ahi. Ahi, namelmate meichun amaho akahlih gamdiu ahi." 
Isaiah26:12 Pakai, nangman keiho dinga chamna neisuhdet peh dingu ahi. Ajehchu nangman kanatoh jouseu jong neitohpeh taove." 
Isaiah26:13 Vo Pakai, ka Pathen'u nang hilou pakai danghon kachunguva vai ahomtai." 
Isaiah26:14 Amaho athi ahiuvin, hing loudiu ahiuve: Amaho athi ahiuvin, thou talou ding ahiuve. Hijeh chun nangin amaho navilin, nasumangin, ahettheinao jouse jong naman sah-in ahi." 
Isaiah26:15 Hiche nam mite chu napunsah-in; O Pakai, nangman hiche nam mite chu napunsah tan; Nangma choi-atnin na-umtai; Nangin hichu gamlatah leiset kolmang geijin nakithan sahtai." 
Isaiah26:16 Pakai, lungkhamin amahon nangma naholun, nagimbolna achunguva aumteng hatah-in ataovun ahi." 
Isaiah26:17 Nupi naovop asophat ahung naija, anatna nachoi choija ahung pendoh bangin; Vo Pakai, nangma mitmun chutobang chu kanahiuve." 
Isaiah26:18 Keihon nao kavopmun, kana-uvin, hui lhohdohle kabangui, leijahin huhhingnadol ima kabolpouvin; vannoi'a cheng hojong lhujong alhupouve." 
Isaiah26:19 Namithiho chu kamithilong toh thoudoh uva, hing khomdiu ahi. Leivuija cheng nangho thou vunlang la saovin. Ajehchu nadaitwi chu hampa louhingho daitwi bang ahin, leijin mithiho chu ahinledoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah26:20 Hungun kamite, na-indan sunguva lutnun lang, nakotnu kikha khum uvin; lungnat natah akichai kah-in, chomkhat tobang kiselmang uvin." 
Isaiah26:21 Ajehchu veuvin, leisetna chengte akhansetnao jeh-a talen pedingin Pakai chu aumna mun'a konin ahung potdoh tai. Leisetnin jong athisan chu asellou ding ahin; chule amithiho jong akhutah louding ahi." 
Isaiah27:1 Hiche nikho chule Pakaiyin achemjam hemtah lentahle lhoutah-a chu leviathan gul ngongle leviathan gul kiveikol ngeng nung chu talen apeh-a; chule twikhanglen'a um dragon chu athading ahi. 
Isaiah27:2 Hiche nikho chule; lengpitwi san lengpilei, amanu henga la saovin." 
Isaiah27:3 Pakai kiti keimahi, tuhdetpa kahin; phat tinin twichapminge, achutiloule min sukhante, tia sunle jana kavettupding ahi." 
Isaiah27:4 Keija lungsatna aumpoi, galla eidou dinga koijin lingle khao chu akoiding ham? Keima alah uva kache-a, kahalchap ding ahi." 
Isaiah27:5 Ahiloule eikichampi theina dingin, kahatnahin kivonhen, chutile eikichampi ding ahi." 
Isaiah27:6 Aman Jacob mite ahungho chu ajung khosah ding ahin; Israelte mum doh-a pahlhading, chule leiset chunghi aga dimset ding;" 
Isaiah27:7 Ama jepho ajep bangtah a chu avoh hitam? Ahiloule ama thatte kitha banga chu amachu kithatna hitam? 
Isaiah27:8 Solam hui anun banga, nangman amanu chu nalungsat na-a nanodoh-a, chule gal le sohchan na-a naumsah ding ahi" 
Isaiah27:9 Hijeh chun hiche hin Jacob khansetna chu asop ngima, hichehi achonset lahmangna ding chu ahin, ngunsong kivochip jengjung banga maicham songho abol tengle thingbong hole, milimho dingdoh talou ding ahi." 
Isaiah27:10 Kulpi kikhokhum khopi jongchu kamhel intin, chenna munchu kidalha-a gamthip banga umding; chua bongnou kivah-a, chua chu kolding, hichea thingbaho chu anehjou ding ahi." 
Isaiah27:11 Abahho chu agot tengle mangthah intin, numei ho hunga meija atidiu ahi. Ajehchu hetkhen themna neilou mite ahijeh-un, asempao chun achunguva hepina aneilouding, agongdoh paovin khohsahna amusah louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah27:12 Chule hiche nikho chule hitiding ahi: Pakaiyin vadunglen kama pat Egypt vachadung geijin long'intin, chule vo Israel chate nangho khat khatna naki khopdiu ahi." 
Isaiah27:13 Chule hiche nikho chule hitiding ahi: Sumkon lentah chu hung kimut intin, Assyria gama mangthah dehdeh hole, Egypt gama akinodohho chu hunguva, Jerusalem lhangthenga Pakai chu ahoudiu ahi." 
Isaiah28:1 Ohe Ephraim, jukhamho hoithona lallukhuh chu ada ahi! Ahoina loupi chu pahcha pultheibou ahin, hichu phaicham gampha ho-a anemsesa ho luchung chu ahi." 
Isaiah28:2 Vetan, Pakaiyin thahat le hat chungnung khat aneijin, hichu huile gelin, thil sumangthei khopihui tobang, twilen nasatah let thethu banga akhutna tolla aselhah ding ahi." 
Isaiah28:3 Ephraim jukhamho hoithona lallukhuh chu kengtonoija kilhobeh ding ahiuve. 
Isaiah28:4 Chule damphai, amel hoina loupitah chu pahcha pullha hung hintin, nipi masanga theiga masa pulbang hiding; hichu avepan amua akhutna um nalaija anehjoupai tobang ahi." 
Isaiah28:5 Hiche nikho chule janel Pakai chu loupina lallukhuh le, amite amoh umcha sun dinga hoina lallukhuh-a hungpang ding ahi." 
Isaiah28:6 Chule thutanlhahna-a toupa dinga thutanna lhagao le, kotpi phunga gal lenokit ho dinga thahatna hungpang ahi." 
Isaiah28:7 Ahinla amahon jong ju-a konin jong setna aneijun; jukhama konin lampama apetnun, thempuho le themgao hon ju-a konin setna aneijun; jukhama konin lampan apetnun amaho athilmuhouva aseuvin, amaho thutan na-a akipaluve." 
Isaiah28:8 Ajehchu dokhang jouse chu loh le thilboh adimin; hitichun muntheng aumtapoi. 
Isaiah28:9 Koichun hetna ahila, koichun tahsan lhongpi ahetkhensah dingham? Noichep banghole noija kona kiloidohho chu ahiuve." 
Isaiah28:10 Ajehchu chondan chunga chu chondan, umtei ding, chondan chunga chodan, thugol chunga thugol, thugol chunga thugol; hia themkhat khu-a themkhat." 
Isaiah28:11 Ajehchu hiche mite hengahi aman kam-oh le paochoma thu aseiding ahi. 
Isaiah28:12 Aman ahenguva, hichehi thachol te nakicholdo sah theinao choldona chu ahin, hichehi kilha jangna ahi. Amahonla angaisahdeh pouve, ati." 
Isaiah28:13 Ahinla amaho henga Pakai thu vangchu; chondan chunga chondan, chondan chunga chondan; thugol chunga thugol, thugol chunga thugol; chule hia themkhat, khu-a themkhat, amaho cheova nunglhuh uva, chule mangthah diu, thanga oh-uva akimatdoh theinadiu ahi." 
Isaiah28:14 Hichejeh chun nangho nahsalou mite, Jerusalem'a chengho chunga vaihomten Pakai thuchu ngaijun."
