Isaiah28:15 Ajehchu nanghon thina toh kitepna kasemun, thikholkhul toh kitepna kaneitaovin; kivohna twipi alonlet teng jongle kahengu ahinphah tahlou dingu ahi. Ajehchu keihon jouthu beldingin kamangun, jouthun kakisel uve nati uve." 
Isaiah28:16 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin ati, veuvin keiman Zion'a inbul songkhat patepna song, manlutah in-ning song, inbulphu tahbeh khat kakoije, atahsanchan chu kicha louding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah28:17 Thutandih chu gol kaina-a kaman ding, chonphatna chu thil vettohna-a kaman ding ahi. Gellin jouthu umna mun chu alhohmang ding, kiselna ding munchu twijin achup mangding ahi." 
Isaiah28:18 Chule thina toh nakitepnao chu kisubeija, thikholkhul toh nakinopto nao chu dinglou ding ahi; vohna twipi alonlet tengle hiche chun nachotpeh dingu ahi." 
Isaiah28:19 Hichu ahung kitola patna, hiche chun nalah khah jing dingu ahi. Ajehchu jingkahsim jingkah seh-a; asun ajanna hung kitolding; thulhut hetkhen dingchu kisuh boina bou hiding ahitai." 
Isaiah28:20 Ajehchu jalkhun chu mikhat kilhon nathei sangin achomjon; akichuna jongchu ama kijelnathei sanga neojo ahi. 
Isaiah28:21 Ajehchu aman anatoh kidangchu atohthei nadingle, athilbol kidangchu amolso theina dinga; Pakai chu Perazim molsang banga hungthouva, Gibeon phaija banga chu lunghang ding ahi." 
Isaiah28:22 Hijeh chun tun nelpeh hat ho chu hidaovin, nakihen nao lhoucheh sah getninte, ajehchu janel Pakai Pathen'a konin, leiset pumpi geija suhmang nading kigong chu kajatan ahi." 
Isaiah28:23 Nana sung unlang, ka aw ngaijun; ngaijunlang, kathusei jaovin." 
Isaiah28:24 Muchi thena dinga loukaipan nilhum keija akai hinam? Aman aleilhangho akaldoh-a avohngem hinam? 
Isaiah28:25 Aman atol alaicham tengle lengmusel le Pathikhom athehih-a, sakol changpi le suhlouchangpi, chule butun jong amuncheh-a athe hilou ham?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ajehchu a-Pathen'in ama ahila, gellhuh theinadia amachu ahilchah ahi." 
Isaiah28:27 Ajehchu lengmusel ho chu changmola kivo ngailou; pathikhom chunga chu kangtalai kang kitang jilou ahi. Ahinla lengmusel chu tenggola chule pathikhom chu moltuma bou kivoji ahi. 
Isaiah28:28 Changlhah ding changchu akisubongjin; ajehchu a-itih-a vohtho louding, akangtalai kanga jong kitangkeh louding, asakol chungtouho jong asuh bongsah deh louding ahi." 
Isaiah28:29 Hiche jonghi thumopthem kidangtah; thilbol lama nasapenpa janel Pakaiya hung kondoh ahi. 
Isaiah29:1 Ohe Ariel, Ariel, David chenna khopi nada ahi! Akum kum-in belap unlang, ganlhaina sa thasah uvin." 
Isaiah29:2 Ariel chu kabolgentheija, chua gihsalnale lungdonna umding ahin, chule hichu keija dinga Ariel tobanga hiding ahi." 
Isaiah29:3 Chule nangma dounan nakimvela ngahmun sangting, galkul sangtah kakaikhuma, kulpiho kakhokhum ding nahi." 
Isaiah29:4 Chutia chu kisulha ding nahin, tolla kona nahung paodoh-a nathusei chu leivuija konin olcha gingding, na aw chu tolla kona thilhavop khat aw bang hintin, nathusei chu leivuija kona aw thopma gingdoh dingbou ahi." 
Isaiah29:5 Chukalvalin nagamchom mipi ho chu leivui sipahbep hintin, tijat umtah mipite chu changsi lengmang bangbep hintin: henge, gangta-a chutiphung ding ahi." 
Isaiah29:6 Janel Pakaiyin van ginna, chule inlingle husa kithong, hui le go chule khopihuija, chule kavam helthei meikonga nahungvil ding ahi." 
Isaiah29:7 Chule Ariel douna-a galsat namjouse-a kon mipi ho, amale agal manchah sat ho jouse, chule abolgenthei jouse geija janmang bangbep hiding ahiuve." 
Isaiah29:8 Chule mi gilkelin mang aneija, chule veuvin, amanga chu an aneh-a, ahivanga akhahdoh phatna la vachom dehlou: ahiloule midangchah in mang aneiteng vetan twi ana donna, ahivanga akhahdoh phatna la ngoideh jeng, asunga adangchah abangbep ahijing jeng banga: Zion lhang douna-a galsat namjouse mipi chu chutobangbep hiding ahiuve." 
Isaiah29:9 Nanghotah khongai unlang, datmouvin; kapmun lang, pengdoh uvin; amaho akhamun, ju-a konvang ahipouve; alon lele uvin khamnatheija konvang ahipoi." 
Isaiah29:10 Ajehchu Pakaiyin nachung uva imutsetna lhagao abuhlhah-a, namitnu asinsah ahitai. Themgaoho le navaipo hou, mitvah neiho akhuchahtan ahi." 
Isaiah29:11 Chule nanghodin mu neijousehi lekhabua thuchengho kisinkha khum tobang ahung hitan, hichu lekhathem khat henga kichoija; hichehi simin, tia nahenga katao ahi: Chule aman akisinkha jeh-in kasimtheipoi, ati tobang ahitai." 
Isaiah29:12 Chuin lekhabu chu athemlou khat akipen, katao ahi, hichehi simtemin atile, aman keima kathempoi, atin ahi." 
Isaiah29:13 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin aseije: hiche mite hin akamuvin einaijun, amuh uvah eijabollun, ahinla alungu vang keija kona gamlatah ahin, keima eiginu jong mihem chondan thuhila konbou ahi, ati." 
Isaiah29:14 Hijeh chun ven, hiche mite lah-a hi thilbol kidangtah, thilbol kidangle datmo umtah jong kasodoh ding ahi. Ajehchu amichingteu chihna chu mangthah ding, chule ahegilho hetnachu kiselding ahitai." 
Isaiah29:15 Pakaiya kona selding giltah-a holtechu ohe adau ahi. Anatoh-u chu muthim lah ahin, kon eimuvem? kon eihetnum? atiuvin ahi." 
Isaiah29:16 Tahbeh-in thil akhup athala naleu chu beldengpa khutna hahlei banga naki ngaitou ahi. Ajehchu athilsem chun asempa chu aman eisem hibeh am? atia ahiloule thil gontohsa chun agongtohpa chu aman hetkhenna aneipoi atiji em? 
Isaiah29:17 Lebanon chu leiphatah sosah-a aumdingle, leiphatah chu gammang banga akigelding chu chom chakhat kahbou hung hitalou dingham?" 
Isaiah29:18 Hiche nikho chule na-ngongin lekhabua thuchu ajah-a, mitcho ho mitnin khojinle muthim lah-a kona jong amudiu ahi." 
Isaiah29:19 Minunnemho jong Pakaiya halna-a akipanao pungding, milah a mivaichate jong Israel mithengpa-a kipahdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah29:20 Ajehchu gin umtah khatchu imalou akisotan, mi i-sah loupa chu akisutanin, khan-gitlouna velhi jingho chu akisubeitan ahi." 
Isaiah29:21 Hicheho chun thu cheng khatnin mi akipalsahjin, kotpi phunga phosal achan nadin thang akampehjin, midihtah chu ima hilouhela koijin aumtan ahi." 
Isaiah29:22 Hijeh chun hitihin Jacob insung thudolla Abraham lhatdoh-a Pakai chun aseitai, tu-a Jacob jahcha talou ding, amaijong dang talou ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah29:23 Ahinla achate kakhutsohho chu alah-a amutengle, kamin thensah-un tin, Jacob'a mithengpa chu athen sah uva, Israel Pathen chu agindiu ahitai." 
Isaiah29:24 Lhagaova suhkhel neihon jong ahin hetkhen themuva, aphunchel ho jong tahsan lhongpi kihildiu ahi." 
Isaiah30:1 Pakaiyin doubolnom chate, midang kithumop kisan-a, keija nahsahlouva koiho, chonset chunga chonset bolbe theina dinga keima lhagaova hilouva khukhumna dang khatna khukhum ho; ohe, adau ahi!" 
Isaiah30:2 Kathusei ngaicha louva Egypt'a chengdinga chesuh ho, Pharoah hatna-a kihatsah dingle, Egypt le-lim tahsan dinga cheho, ohe, adau ahi!" 
Isaiah30:3 Hijeh-a chu Pharoah hatna chu najachat nao hungsoh-a, Egypt le-lim tahsan nachu nakisuhmo nao hung hiding ahitai." 
Isaiah30:4 Ajehchu amilenteu Zoan'a aumun, apalaihou Hanes-a ahunguve." 
Isaiah30:5 Amaho jousen amaho phatchomsah joulou miho chu ajachat piuvin, panpina le phatchomna hilouvin jachatnale housetna joh ahi." 
Isaiah30:6 Lhanglam gamsaho pohgih; lungkhamnale lungnatna gam, chua konchun keipi noule keipitah, gulse le gulsum ahungin, amahon aphatchom sah loudiu miho henga, sangan golho lengkou chunga ahao naole, sangongsao tinghem chunga agouho chu pouvinte." 
Isaiah30:7 Ajehchu Egypt miten pannabei jin panpiuvintin, chule apanajong umponte. Hijeh-a chu keiman hiche thua kasei ahi, athahatnao chu thabei pannabei ahi." 
Isaiah30:8 Tun chenlang, atonsot atonsot phat hunglhung dingin, amasanguva dokhanga chun suninlang, lekhabua chingin." 
Isaiah30:9 Hichehohi kiphin mite, joubol chate, Pakai danthupeh ngailouding chate ahiuve." 
Isaiah30:10 Amahon mitvah neiho jah-a, muhih un; themgaoho henga thildih neigaopeh hih-un lang, kahenguva thungei ngei neisei peh-un alhembou neigaopeh-un." 
Isaiah30:11 Lampi dalhan, lamsih-a kiheidoh unlang, Israel mithengpa chu keiho masanga konin phapoh tahih-un atiuve." 
Isaiah30:12 Hijehhin Israel mithengpan aseitai, nangho hiche thu nanah sahmo uva suhgenthei nale golkehna natahsan uva chua na-umden jeh un;" 
Isaiah30:13 hiche jehchun hiche khangitlouna chu nachung uva bang sangtah aselai pohjah dingkon, photlot mitphet kahlouva hung chimlha ding tobang nahidiu ahi, ati." 
Isaiah30:14 Chule aman hiche beldengpa bel suhkeh ahal halla achip banga asuhchipma; akhen louding, apokehna halchu meithuh-a kona mei-am lonading, ahiloule kokhuh-a kona twi thaldohna ding jeng jong kimulouding ahi." 
Isaiah30:15 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen Israel mithengpan, hungkilea choldona chu huhhing nachan na hiding; thipbehnale tahsanna chu nahatnao hiding ahin, nangho nanompouve, ati." 
Isaiah30:16 Ahinla nanghon ahipoi sakol chunga katou uva kajamdiu ahi, nati uvin, hijeh-a chu nangho najamdiu, chule gangtah-a kajamdiu ahi nati uvin, hijeh-a chu nanungdel hou jong gangtah hidiu ahi." 
Isaiah30:17 Mikhat phosala; sangkhat jamding, minga phosala; molvum'a melchihna kitah bangle, lhang chunga galponlap banga nakidalhah kahseuva najamdiu ahi." 
Isaiah30:18 Hijeh-a chu nangho nakhoto theinadiuva Pakaiyin nangao ahi, ajehchu nachung uva hepina aneitheina dinga ama kichoisang ding ahi. Ajehchu Pakai chu thutan Pathen ahin; ama ngahte jouse anunnom ahiuve." 
Isaiah30:19 Ajehchu mitechu Jerusalem'a Zion'a chenguntin: nakakit louheldingu ahitan; napennao awginna chu aman nakhoto lheh dingu ahin; aman hichu ajahtengle nadonbut jengdiu ahi. 
Isaiah30:20 Chule Pakaiyin hesohna changlhah, suhgimna twi napejeng jongleu, nahil hou chu ningchonga kichonlut louheldiu, namitnun nahil hou chu amujoh dingu ahi." 
Isaiah30:21 Chule nangho nakijet heijuva chule nakiveihei tengule, nanunglam uva thakhatna hichehi lampi ahi, jotnun, tia nanunglam uva thukhat kiseichu nanauva najahdiu ahi." 
Isaiah30:22 Nanghon dangka milim kikhegho tomnale, sana milim kilhaho kijepna nasuhboh diu ahin, pon thenglou napai uva, ahenguva hia konin chemangin tia naseidingu ahi." 
Isaiah30:23 Chutengle aman namuchi diuvin gotwi hinpeuvin natin, chutia chu nangin leisetna nathe-a, leija anneh pungding, hichu phatahle nengtah hiding ahin; chuche nitengle na ganchate chu ganlhaina munlen tah-a kivahdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah30:24 Chutobangma chu bongchal hole sangan nou lou kaihon, chang japnale changlona-a kijapchilsa ngen gancha antheng anehdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah30:25 Chule kithana nasatah nikho-a insangho chimtengle, molsang chungle lhangsang chung tina, vapile vadungho chule luidungho hung longdiu ahi." 
Isaiah30:26 Chukalvala jong Pakaiyin amite maput atoma, akijepnau mahaho adamsah nitengle, lhavah chu nisa vah bangjenga, nisa vah chu ajat sagi jenna nisagi vah kigom bangkhopma vahding ahitai." 
Isaiah30:27 Veuvin Tonsot Pakai minchu gamlatah-a konin lunghang tah-in ahunge, chule hiche pohgih chu gihtah ahi. Akamsung chu thangtomna adimsetnin; alei chu kavamjengthei meikong tobang ahi." 
Isaiah30:28 Ahu hai chu ngong geija longlet vadungsoh abangin, namtin vaipi manthah na tengsa-a lochildin agon, chule suhkhelsah nadinga mitin kama kamdal umcheh ding ahi." 
Isaiah30:29 Nanghon kutpitheng kimanjan banga la khat najah dingu ahin, chule mikhat kuli mutpum ma; Israelte thahatpa Pakai molchunga chebanga lungkipa najong nanei dingu ahi." 
Isaiah30:30 Pakaiyin a-aw loupitah kijahna ding bolintin, lunghan nasatah toh, halvam thei meikong toh, huipi le gopi toh, chule gel'a alunghana khut chu alhahding ahi." 
Isaiah30:31 Ajehchu Pakai awgin'a kona Assyria te chu molla kinolhu ding kisumang ding ahiuve. 
Isaiah30:32 Chule Pakaiyin achunga angapding kivohna tenggolin aphahding, munjouse-a chu khongchale selangdah kithoding ahi. Aman gal mun kihotling mun'a chu akisatpi ding ahi." 
Isaiah30:33 Ajehchu Tophet hi malaija anakisudetsa ahitan; ahi, hichu lengpa dinga kigongsadem ahin; thuh tahle lentah-a asem ahi. Chua kikhol chu meile thing tamtah ahin, Pakai hu-hai chu meile kaat luija long deujeju bang ahi." 
Isaiah31:1 Panpi hola Egypt'a chesuh-a, sakol ho chunga kingaija, sakol kangtalai ho tamjeh-a tahsan; sakol touthemho hatbehseh jeh-a tahsana, Israel mithengpa lam velou, Pakai hollou helho chu, ohe! ada ahiuve." 
Isaiah31:2 Achuti vangin amajong michingtah ahin, thilse hinlhun sah intin, athu ho chu alekou louding: thilsebol insungho douva hung kipana, khanset bolte panpiho chu adoujoh ding ahibouve." 
Isaiah31:3 Tun Egypt mite chu mihem bou ahiuvin, Pathen ahipouve; Asakol-hou jong tahsaphe bou ahin, lhagao ahipouve. Pakaiyin akhut ahinlhandoh tengle mipanpipa chu lhu-a, chule akipanpipa jong lhuding ahin, ania lhukop lhonding ahi." 
Isaiah31:4 Ajehchu Pakaiyin aseitai, keipi bahkai chule anou asaneh hon chunga akitumhon banga, kelngoi chingho tamtah adou dinga akikoudoh tengle, a-aw uchu kichadeh pontin, ahusaova jong nemlha deh louding ahi. Chutia chu janel Pakai chu Zion mol le alhang dinga galsatna hung kumlha ding ahi." 
Isaiah31:5 Vachate alenlele banga, chutia chu janel Pakaiyin Jerusalem ahonbit ding ahin; ahonbitna ahuhdoh ding; chule akalchuh-a akhehdoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah31:6 Israel chaten nasatah-a adoupao heng lama hung kilekit teijuvin. 
Isaiah31:7 Ijeh inem itile, hiche nikho chule mitinin nadangka milimhou le nasana milimu chonsetna dinga nakhut tah uva nakisem muchu ahin paimang cheh dingu ahi." 
Isaiah31:8 Chutengle Assyria chu chemjam'a louding, mihatpa chemjam jong hilou, minoinung pa chemjam jong hilou chun ama avallhum ding; ahinla ama chemjam'a kona jamdoh-a, akhangdongteu chu suhnohphah-a umding ahiuve." 
Isaiah31:9 Chule aman tijatna-a akulpidet akalchuh-a, chule pipuihon ponlap chu akichatdiu ahi, tin Zion'a ameikong uma, Jerusalem'a alhumpi umpa Pakai chun aseije." 
Isaiah32:1 Veuvin, leng khatnin chonphatna-a vai ahomding, chule pipuihon thutan dihtah-a vai ahomdiu ahi." 
Isaiah32:2 Chule mikhat chu khohuija kona kiselna munle huipi le gopi-a kona kivenbitna hiding; gamgolaija twi umna vadung le cholna gama songpi lenkhat lim tobang hunghi ding ahi. 
Isaiah32:3 Chule khomuho mit chu thimlouva, khojaho chun angaidiu ahi." 
Isaiah32:4 Lungkinon jong hetkhen themtheina hetna aneija, pao oh hon jong kichentah-a thu aseidingu ahitai." 
Isaiah32:5 Mikhangse chu mihongphal kiti talou ding, migenthei chu ninglhing dehlouhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah32:6 Migilou chun gitlou thujeng aseijin, ajehchu phatlhemna kijil dingle, Pakai douna-a adihlou seidingin, gilkelte oisung akeova umsahdingle dangchah te donding thonsah dingin mi nunse chun thusese seijintin, alungsunga khan gitlou abolding ahi." 
Isaiah32:7 Migenthei chu amanchahho jong phaloutah ahin, milhasam hon thudihtah aseiteng jongle, mivaichaho suhmang hela aum nadingin, thujouva jona thet umtah lungthim giloutah apodohjin ahi." 
Isaiah32:8 Ahinla mihongphal tah-in hongphalin, hongphalna thilho agongdohjin; ama hongphalna thilho-a chu ding jingding ahi." 
Isaiah32:9 Nangho numei ho thoudoh uvin; khohsahna bei chanuten ka-aw ngaijunlang; kathusei jahin nana sungun. 
Isaiah32:10 Khohsahbei numei nangho nikhoho le kumho tamtah-a nalungkham diu ahi. Ajehchu lengpithei hungga louding, aga lona hung umlou ding ahitai." 
Isaiah32:11 Numei nangho kithinguvin, khohsah bei nangho lungkham mun, kihoh lhaovin, nakeuvin umun lang, nakong uvah khaodip pon kigah-un." 
Isaiah32:12 Loumun pha le, lengpigui gapha dinga, lunghem ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah32:13 Kamite gama lingle khao hungpou doh ding ahin; henge, khopi kipana pena insung kipah jouse-a jong chutiding ahi." 
Isaiah32:14 Ajehchu leng inpiho kidalha-a; mitamna khopi chu dalhah-a umding; galkul hole daivei insangho jong a-itih-a dinga gam sanganho, kinomtol nale ganchahon ho hamnehna mun hung hiding ahi." 
Isaiah32:15 Chunga kona lhagao ichunguva ahung kibuh lhah-a, gamthip lou mun pha ahungsoa, lou mun pha gammanga akigel kahse-a;" 
Isaiah32:16 Chutengle gamthipma chu thutan lhahna uma, loumun pha-a chu chonphatna umden ding ahi." 
Isaiah32:17 Chonphatna natohchu chamna hintin; chule hiche chonphatna chun a-itih-a ol-heuna le aphotchena asodohsah ding ahi. 
Isaiah32:18 Kamite chu chamdela umnale dettah-a chendetna inmun, chule ol-heuva choldona mun'a cheng taovintin;" 
Isaiah32:19 gellhah tengle gammang chunga hunglhantin; chule khopi chu mun nema kikoiding ahi. 
Isaiah32:20 Twipang dunga muchi tu-a nangho anunnom nahiuvin; chukoma bongchal le sangan lhatlutsah-a nangho anunnom nahiuve. 
Isaiah33:1 Nangla kichom khalouva michompa; amahonla nangma tahsanlel louva, mikitahlou pa; nada ahi. Michom nangah phatle, nangma nakichom ding; nangman kitahlouna nangah phatle, amahon nangma natahsan leldiu ahi." 
Isaiah33:2 Vo Pakai, neilungset in, keihon nangma kangah jinguve, jingkahsehle aban nu hinlang, thohgenthei laile eihuh hingpao vin hung pangin." 
Isaiah33:3 Thunoh husagin chun miho ajam mangun; nangma nakichoi sangna-a chun namtin thecheh-in aumtai. 
Isaiah33:4 Nathil chomdoh chu lungmul kikhol khom banga kikhol khom ding ahi. Khaokhopi suhle tunga achoplele banga achunguva lhai lele ding ahi. 
Isaiah33:5 Chungsanga um ahijeh-in Pakai chu akichoisangtai. Aman Zion chu thutandih nale chonphat na-in adipsohtan ahi. 
Isaiah33:6 Chihnale hetna chu nahinkhodetna le nahuhhingna thahat hunghi ding ahin, Pakai gin chu ama-a dinga goukhol ahi." 
Isaiah33:7 Veuvin, amihangsan hou pama penguntin; chamna palaiho chu lhasetah-in kapmunte." 
Isaiah33:8 Lamlhongpiho chu akeoheltan, chule vahlea athipdeltai. Aman thulhuna asukeh-in, khopiho i-asahpon, koimacha anahsahtapoi." 
Isaiah33:9 Leiset hi alunghemin ahesoh-e, Lebanon ajahchan lhamlhah ahitai, Sharon chu gamthip abangin; Bashan le Karmel'in aga hou ahotpul taovin ahi." 
Isaiah33:10 Tonsot Pakaiyin; tun keima thouving ting; tun kichoisang inting; tun kidomsang tange; ati. 
Isaiah33:11 Nanghon changsi navop uva, chang kung nahindingu, nahaiju husa chun mei tobanga nakahvam dingu ahi." 
Isaiah33:12 Mitin chu ngunsong kihal kong banguntin, ling kisatlha-a meija kihal tobang hidiu ahi." 
Isaiah33:13 Gamlatah-a um nanghon ipi kabol em ngaijun; chule naicha umhon jong kathahatdan heuvin. 
Isaiah33:14 Zion'a michonseho akichauvin, miphalhem ho tijatnin alungdongun ahi. Ilah uva halvamna meikongto chengdinga koiham, ilah uva tonsotna kongjing meito chengdinga koiham?" 
Isaiah33:15 Chonphatna-a vahlea dihtah-a thuseipa, bolgentheija kona phatchomna i-sah loupa, nehguh lahna-a kona akhut thinglhapa, thisona ding thu jah-a kona akol kisipma, thilse mu-a kona amit singpa chu;" 
Isaiah33:16 amachu chungsanga chengintin; akihuhna munchu songa kisem kulpi hiding, nehding changlhah ama kipe-a adonding twi jong amuteiding ahi." 
Isaiah33:17 Namitnin lengpa hoina amu-a, gamlatah-a um gamchu amudoh dingu ahi." 
Isaiah33:18 Nalungsungin kichatna nasatah nangaito ding ahi. Danthusunpa hoiba hitam? Alalutpa hoiba hitam? Daivei insangho simtohpa hoiba hitam? 
Isaiah33:19 Nangin kichat umtah mi namutahlou ding, giltah-a paodoh mi nahetchen theilou lei-oh mi namutah louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah33:20 Kut loupiho kiman nading Zion khopi chunglam chu vetemin, namit tenin mongtah-a chenna Jerusalem; phetlhah louding houbuh kisonna akhom khatcha kibotdoh louhel ding; akhaojang jong khatcha kibottan louding chu munnate." 
Isaiah33:21 Ahinla loupi Pakai chu eiho dinga luidung lenho le luidung neoho hiding ahin, Chua chu kong innei kongtol ho chelouding ahin, kong innei hattah jong chelouding ahi." 
Isaiah33:22 Pakai chu ithu tanpao ahin, Pakai chu danthu eipepao ahin, Pakai chu ilengpao ahin; aman eihuh hingdiu ahi." 
Isaiah33:23 Nakong tolna ponkhao ho akikangin; apondalu khombul chu ahendet theipouvin, pondal chu ajahthei pouve. Chuin gala thil kichom tamtah akihomun, elbaijin jong akilah-e." 
Isaiah33:24 Chule chua chenga chun kadampoi atilouding, chua cheng mitechu akhansetnao kingaidam ding ahi." 
Isaiah34:1 Namtin vaipi thungaidin hungnai junlang, nangho mipite ngai phaovin, leisetle asunga cheng jousen, vannoi le ama-a kon hungkondoh thiljousen ngaijuhen." 
Isaiah34:2 Ajehchu Pakai thangtomna chu namjouse chunga, chule alunghana chu agalsat jousete chunga aumtan, amaho chu asumangsoh helin, thagamheldin mithat ho hengah apedohsohtan ahi." 
Isaiah34:3 Amiteu kithat ho jong kipaidoh ding, chule athilonguva kona a-uiju kikhong doh-a, lhangho chu athisan utoh junlhah thading ahi." 
Isaiah34:4 Chule vanlaijola thil um jouse junlha-a, vanho chu lekha kijelbanga hung kijelding; chule avan janel jouse chu lengpiguija kona ana pulbanga, chule theichang phunga aga apulhah banga pullha diu ahitai." 
Isaiah34:5 Ajehchu kachemjam chu van'a notvala umding, veuvin, hichu Edom chungle kagaosap te chunga thutanlha dinga hung khumlha ding ahi." 
Isaiah34:6 Pakai chemjam chu thisanin adimtan, chule chemjam chu thaovin atomtan; hichu kelngoi le kelchal thisanto, kelngoichal kal thao ahi. Ajehchu Pakai chun Bozrah'a ganlhaina aneijin, Edom gama kithana nasatah aume." 
Isaiah34:7 Chule gambongchal kineiho chu amahotoh hungsuh thantin, bongchal til kilalouho chu bongchal atil kilaho toh, chule agamu chu thisanin chup mintin, aleivui chu thaova jollha ding ahi." 
Isaiah34:8 Ajehchu hichehi Pakai phulahna nikho ahin, chule Zion kinepna le khohsahna kum chu ahi." 
Isaiah34:9 Chule chua vachadung ho chu thingnaivom hungsoh-a, chule aleivuiho chu kaatsong hungsoh ding, chuche gamchu thingnaivom kadeujeju hungsoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah34:10 Hichu sunle jana mitlouhel ding, ameikhu chu tonsotna kitungdoh ding, akhang akhanga agoh-a uma, atonsot atonsotna koimachan ahopa louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah34:11 Ahinla twivamuhsao le vakeng'in lo intin; sumbupi le vavom asunga chengdio ahin; hiche chunga chu lungnohna khaole khaidihna songho kikhaiding ahi. 
Isaiah34:12 Chua milal ho chu lenggama dingin kou untin; koimacha vang umtalou ding, chule aleng chapate jouseu imacha hilouding ahitaove." 
Isaiah34:13 Amanu leng inpiho-a lingphung, chule akulpidet hou sunga sachah le theimi hung kehdoh ding, Dragonho chennale sumbupi ho honsung hung hiding ahi." 
Isaiah34:14 Neldi gam, gamsaho jong twikol gama gamsahoto kitoh untin, chule lhomi chun agol kou intin, sumbupi chu chua chun kicholdontin, amadinga choldona mun amuding ahi." 
Isaiah34:15 Chua chu sumbupi lentah-in buh ase-a, atwi athah ding, alhaving noija ahuikhom ding ahi. Chua chu muthong ho jong akopcheh-a hung kikhom ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah34:16 Pakai lekhabu holdoh-un lang simun; hichehohi khatcha thonlou ding ahi; akopto lhasam umlou ding ahi. Ajehchu kam'in thu apeh-a ama lhagao ngeichun akhopkhom ahitai. 
Isaiah34:17 Chule aman amahodin vang asanin, akhut tah-in khaovin aten, ahopkhen pehtai. Amahon hichu atonsotna alouva, akhang akhanga hichea chu chengding ahiuve." 
Isaiah35:1 Gammang lah le gamthip lah chu amaho dingin hungkipah intin, chule neldigam chu thanoma pahchapah banga pahding ahi." 
Isaiah35:2 Nengchetnin pah-intin, kipah le lasah-in thanominte. Lebanon loupina ama kipeding, Karmel le Sharon ahoinapen, Pakai loupina le i-Pathen'u gunchena chungnung penchu amudingu ahi." 
Isaiah35:3 Khut hatlouho hatsah-un lang, khup ngoiho chu dindet sah-un." 
Isaiah35:4 Mi meidoite chu hitin seipeh-un, kicha hih-un! veuvin, phula dingle lethuh dinga na Pathen'u hungding; ama hunga nangho nahuhdoh diu ahi." 
Isaiah35:5 Chutengle mitchote mit kihasah intin, chule na-ngongte kho kijahsah ding ahitai." 
Isaiah35:6 Chutengle elbai chu sakhi banga kichoma, paomo leichun la asahding, ajehchu gamthipma twiho chule neldi gama vachadung ho hungput doh ding ahi." 
Isaiah35:7 Chule tolgo chu twikul hungsoh doh-a, chule dangchah na gama chu twisam hungsoh ding, Dragon ho chenna le akolnaova chu hampa toh pumpeng le phaipheng hungkeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah35:8 Chua chun lamlhongpi khatle lampi khat umintin, chuche lampi chu thenna lampi kitiding ahi. Atheng louvin achung aho louding; amavang hichu amaho ding ahi. Chule vahle ho ngoljong leu hichea chu adihlou abolloudiu ahi." 
Isaiah35:9 Chua chu keipi khatcha umtalou ding; sahingne gamsa khatcha jong hichea chu kaltou louding; hichea chu kimulouhel ding ahitai. Ahinla hichemun chu lhatdamsaten bou aho dingu ahi. 
Isaiah35:10 Chule Pakai lhatdohsate hungkileu vintin, Zion'a hunguva tonsot kipana aluchung uva umding ahi. Amahon kipanale thanopna aneijuva, lungdon nale khoisatna jam mangding ahitai." 
Isaiah36:1 Tun, Hezekiah lengpa lengchankal kumsom le kumli alhinin, ahitin ahi, Assyria lengpa Sennacherib chu Judah gam khopi satdin ahungtouvin, alasohtan ahi." 
Isaiah36:2 Chuin Assyria lengpan Lachish'a konin Rabshakeh chu sepai tamtah toh Jerusalem'a Hezekiah lengpa henga asoltan ahi. Chuin ama ponsoppa lou lamlhongpia twikul sahnung twilam panga chun anadinge. 
Isaiah36:3 Chuphatnin insung vaipo Hilkiah chapa Eliakim le Danthusunpa Shebna chule thuchingpa Asaph chapa Joah toh ahunguve. 
Isaiah36:4 Chuin Rabshakeh-in ahenguva aseijin, tun nanghon Hezekiah jah-a, leng loupitah Assyria lengpa chun hitin aseije, natahsan kingapna chu ipi ham? ati, tin gaseijun ati." 
Isaiah36:5 Keiman kati ahi, nangin (ahinla hicheho chu mohthu maimaibou ahi) galsatnadin lunggelna le thahatna kaneije natin ahi. Tun koichunga natahsana, keima douna-a gal naboljeng hitam?" 
Isaiah36:6 Ven, nangin hiche peng tenggol chipsa Egypt mitehi natahsan ahin, achunga chu mi akingaile akhutna lutna asutding ahi. Egypt lengpa Pharoah chu ama tahsan jouse chunga chutiji ahi." 
Isaiah36:7 Ahinla nangin kahenga keihon Pakai ka Pathen'u katahsanu ahi, tijongleu chun; ama chu Hezekiah'in amunsangho le amaichamho alahmangpeh-a, Judah le Jerusalem mite jah-a nanghon hiche maicham masanga bou nahoudiu ahi ati hilouham?" 
Isaiah36:8 Hijeh chun tun kangeh nahi, ka Pakai pa Assyria lengpa henga kitepna neijin, nangin achunguva touding mi naneiding poule sakol sangni pengkate." 
Isaiah36:9 Kapu sohte sepai lamkai neopen khat maichu iti naheimanga, sakol kangtalai le sakol galmiho jeh-a Egypt chunga natahsan na-ngap jeng ham?" 
Isaiah36:10 Tu-a keima Pakai panglouva hiche gam douva sumang dinga hungtouva kahiham? Pakaiyin kajah-a hiche gam doudin chetou vinlang, gasumangin eiti." 
Isaiah36:11 Chujouvin Eliakim le Shebna, chule Joah chun Rabshakeh jah-a nahenga katao ahi, nasohte hengahin Syria te paovin thu seijin; ajehchu hichu keihon kaheuve, palvuma um miho hetthei Judah paovin seihih-in, atiuve." 
Isaiah36:12 Ahinla Rabshakeh chun kapu chun napule nang hengabou hiche thuho seidinga eihinsol ham? Aman palvuma touho khun aeh-u akineh theina diule, ajunu akidon theina diuva ahenguva eihinsol hilouham?" 
Isaiah36:13 Chuin Rabshakeh adingin gingtah-in, Juda te paovin asamin; lengloupi Assyria lengpa thuseihohi ngaijun:" 
Isaiah36:14 Assyria lengpan hitihin aseije; Hezekiah'in nahuhdoh jouloudiu jeh in ama kilheplhahsah hih-un. 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekiah chun nangho Pakaiyin thonlouvin eihuhdoh untin hiche khopihi Assyria lengpa khutna kipedoh louhel ding ahi, tin natahsan sah daohen." 
Isaiah36:16 Hezekiah thu ngaihih un; Assyria lengpan thilpeh khatnin kinoptona neipeuvinlang, kahenga hungdoh-un; nalengpilei cheh kineh unlang, natheichangphung cheh kineh-un, chule mitinin natwikula twicheh kidonun;" 
Isaiah36:17 keiman nagam tobangu gam khatna changle lengpitwi umna gam changlhah le lengpitwi umna gam khatna kahungpui kahseuvin ati. 
Isaiah36:18 Chingtheijun, achutiloule Hezekiah'in Pakaiyin eihuhdoh naovinte tintin najollha getnunte. Assyria lengpa khutna kona namtin vaipi pathenho khattou agam huhdohpeh-a umkha tam?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamath le Arphad mite pathenho hoiba ham? Sepharvaim pathenho chu hoija umam? Amahon kakhutna kona Samaria ahuhdoh beh-um? 
Isaiah36:20 Hiche gamho pathen lah-a kakhutna kona agamu huhdoh-a koiham? Hitia chu Pakaiyin kakhutna kona Jerusalem ahuhdoh dingham? ati. 
Isaiah36:21 Ahinla amaho athipchetnun, thucheng khatchan adonbut pouve, ajehchu amachu donbut hih-un tin lengpa thulhahna aumtai." 
Isaiah36:22 Hitichun insung vaipo Hilkiah chapa Eliakim le lekhasunpa Shebna chule thuchingpa Asaph chapa Joah chun aponu kibottel pumin, Hezekiah henga ahungun Rabshakeh thusei ho chu ahung seipeh un ahi." 
Isaiah37:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Hezekiah lengpan hiche thuho chu ajah phatnin, apon abottelin, khaodip pon akikhuh-in, Pakai insunga aluttai." 
Isaiah37:2 Chuin insung vaipo Eliakim le danthusunpa Shebna, chule upa thempuho chu khaodip pon silpumin, Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao henga asoltai." 
Isaiah37:3 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Hezekiah'in hitin aseije, tunihi hesoh nikho, kipho nikho chule taitom nikho ahi. Ajehchu chate pengding ahitan, ahinla apenlhah nadiu thahat aumpoi." 
Isaiah37:4 Pakai na Pathen'in Rabshakeh thusei ho ajah theina dinga, amachu apu Assyria lengpan Pathen hing jumso dinga ahinsol ahin, Chule Pakai na Pathen'in athujahho chu abehlhah ding ahi. Hijeh chun akidalha amoh chengse dingin hatah-in taovin." 
Isaiah37:5 Chutichun Hezekiah lengpa sohte chu Isaiah henga ahungtaove. 
Isaiah37:6 Chuin Isaiah'in, ahenguva, napupao henga hiti ahi nasei dingu ahi, Pakai chun hitin aseije, Assyria lengpa sohten eitaitom nathu najah hou jehchun kichahih beh-un." 
Isaiah37:7 Veuvin, keiman achunga hui hattah solingting, chule aman thuthang khat jantin, agamlama kilekit ding, ama agamsung tah-a chemjam'a kalousah ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah37:8 Chutichun Rabshakeh chu akilekitnin ahile Assyria lengpa Libna douna-a agalsatpet agatohtai. Ajehchu aman Lachish adalhatai ti thu anajatan ahi. 
Isaiah37:9 Chuin Ethiopia lengpa Tirhakah nangtoh kisatdin ahung kondoh-e ti chungchang thukisei ajatai. Hichu ajah phatnin Hezekiah henga thupo khat asollin, ajah-a;" 
Isaiah37:10 Hitia hi Judah lengpa Hezekiah henga naseiding ahi. Assyria lengpa khutna Jerusalem kipedoh louding ahi tin nangin natahsan pa Pathen chu kilheplhahsah hihbeh-in. 
Isaiah37:11 Veuvin, Assyria lengten gamjouse iti asuhmang hellem, tithu najatai. Hichu ahile nangma huhdohna hideh ding hinam?" 
Isaiah37:12 kapateuvin anasuh mangho Gozam, Haran, Rezeph chule Telassar'a anaum Eden chate banga chu namtin vaipite pathenho chun amaho chu anahuhdoh nah um?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamath lengpa, Arpad lengpa, Sepharvaim khopi lengpa Hena chule Ivah khopi lengpa hoija umtam?" 
Isaiah37:14 Chuin Hezekiah'in lekhathot chu thupole ho khutna konchun alan hichu asimtai. Chuin Hezekiah Pakai inlama achetouvin Pakai angsunga chun aphajaltai. 
Isaiah37:15 Chuin Hezekiah Pakai henga ataovin aseije," 
Isaiah37:16 Vo janel Pakai, Israel Pathen, Cherubim ho kah-a chengjing pa, leiset lenggam jouse-a nangma Pathen nahin; nangma ngeibou nahi. Nangin vanle lei nanasemme." 
Isaiah37:17 Vo Pakai, nana sungin lang ngaijin, vo Pakai, namit hasah inlang hinvetan, chule Senacherib'in hingjing Pathen housetna-a ahinthot thu jousehi ngaijin." 
Isaiah37:18 Atahbeh in Pakai, Assyria lenghon namjousele agamsunghou ahomkeovin akoi gamtaove." 
Isaiah37:19 Chule apathenhou meilhum sunga alehlutnuve, ajehchu amaho pathen hilouva mihem khutsem thingle songbou ahiuvin, hijeh-a chubou asuhmangu ahi." 
Isaiah37:20 Hijeh chun tuhin, vo Pakai, ka Pathen nu, akhutna konin nei huhdoh-un, chutile leiset lenggam jousen nangma Pakai, nangma sehbou Pakai nahichu hethei taovinte, ati." 
Isaiah37:21 Chujouvin Amoz chapa Isaiah chun Hezekiah henga mi asolin, Assyria lengpa Sennacherib douna-a kahenga nataona chu, Israel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije," 
Isaiah37:22 ama chungchang Pakaiyin aseithu chu hichehi ahi. Nungah theng Zion chanun nangma nanoisen, nahsahmonan nanuisat in, Jerusalem chanun alu nathin khume." 
Isaiah37:23 Nangin koi nahousetna nataitom ham? Koi douna-a na aw nasansah-a chungsang lam nangatna navettou ham? Israel mitheng patah douna ahi. 
Isaiah37:24 Nasohte-a konin Pakai chu nahousen hitin naseije, ka kangtalai tamtah toh molsang ho geijin Lebanon lhang pangho-a hungtou vingting, cedar thingphung sanghole chahthing hoiho phuhlhung ting, agamgi munsang ho le Karmel gammanga kalhut ding ahi." 
Isaiah37:25 Keiman kotong kalaijin twi kadontai. Chule kakengton aki-umkul munho-a vadung jouse kalho kangtai. 
Isaiah37:26 Hichehi iti kanabol hija, malaija patna iti kagontohsah-am, tichu sotna nanajah hitalou ham? Tu-a hi kagui lhunsah ahitai, Kulpi kikaikhum khopi ho akeova umsah-a, manthah na-a sevum dinga chu nangma nahiding ahi." 
Isaiah37:27 Hijeh chun achengho chu thalhom tah ahiuvin, amaho alungthoijun alungdonguve. Amaho chu loujaova hampa tobangle chang aphung lhin masanga huise semgot tobang ahiuve." 
Isaiah37:28 Hinla keiman naumna, napotdoh, nahunglut chule kachunga nalunghan kahenai." 
Isaiah37:29 Ajehchu kachunga nalunghannale, nahusa ginchu kanasunga ahunglut tai. Hijeh chun ka ngakoi nanah homa sutongting, nakama kakamdal kabuding, nahungna lampia chu kalehei kitding nahi." 
Isaiah37:30 Hichehi nangdinga amelchihna hiding ahi. Tukum achama kehho naneh ding, kum nina jongle chuche-a dondoh chu nen natin, chule kumthum nateng nanghon kitun lang, ki-atnun, chule lengpilei kibolin lang aga nen." 
Isaiah37:31 Chule Judah insungmi asohcha ahoidoh chengsen, jung akhosuh-a chule achunglamin ga aneiding ahi." 
Isaiah37:32 Ajehchu Jerusalem'a kona ahoidoh chengsele Zion'a kona asohchaho hung sohdoh ding ahiuve. Janel Pakai tompana-in hiche aboldoh ahi. 
Isaiah37:33 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Assyria lengpa thudol hitihin aseijin, ama hiche khopi sunga hunglut louding, thalchang khatjong akap louding, amasanga lumdal puma jong hunglou ding, hiche satna dinga leikul jong asetlouding ahi." 
Isaiah37:34 Ahungna lampi mama-a chu kinungle-a, hiche khopiahi hung louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah37:35 Ajehchu hiche khopihi keimajeh le kasoh David jeh-a kahuhdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah37:36 Chuin Pakai vantil chu apotdoh-in, Assyria ho ngahmuna sang jakhatle sangsomget le sanga athattai. Chuin jingpi-a ahungtho phatnun vetan; mithilong jeng anahitaove." 
Isaiah37:37 Chutichun Assyria lengpa Sennacherib chu apotdoh-in achen akilekitnin Nineveh'a achengtai. 
Isaiah37:38 Chutichun ahitin ahi. Aman a-pathen Nisroch insunga pathen ahoupetnin achapateni Adram-melech le Sharezer'in chemjamin athatlhonin, Armania gama ajamlut lhontai. Chuin achapa Esar-haddon chu akhelin alengchang tai." 
Isaiah38:1 Hichelai chun Hezekiah chu thidingin anatan ahi. Chuin Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao chu ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, na-insung kisemtuptan, ajehchu nangma damdoh joulouva nathiding ahitai, ati." 
Isaiah38:2 Chujouvin Hezekiah'in banglama amai aheijin, Pakai henga ataovin." 
Isaiah38:3 Vo Pakai kengeh nahi, namasanga thutah le lungdih po-a, chule namitmu-a thilpha kanabolho chu tun neigeldoh peh tan, ati. Chuin Hezekiah hakan akaptai." 
Isaiah38:4 Chuin Pakai thuchu Isaiah henga ahung lhungin. 
Isaiah38:5 Hezekiah henga chun chenlang gaseijin, Pakai napa David Pathen'in hitin aseije, nataona kajan, namitlhi lon kamutai; vetan, keiman nahinkho kum somle kumnga kajopbe ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah38:6 Chule keiman nangmale hiche khopihi Assyria lengpa khutna kona kahuh doh-a hiche khopihi kahonbit ding ahi. 
Isaiah38:7 Pakaiyin aseisa chu aboltei ding ahi, tihi Pakaiya kona namelchihna ding chu ahi;" 
Isaiah38:8 Vetan, keiman nisa lim chu hinlepui kitningting, Ahaz maikoh-a lhumsuhsa chu kalsoma kanungchon ding ahi. Chutichun alhumsuhsa-a konchun nisa chu kalsom anungchontan ahi." 
Isaiah38:9 Judah lengpa Hezekiah damlouva auma ahung damdoh phatna athilsut chu hichehi ahi. 
Isaiah38:10 Kahin nikho kisumanga thikholkhul kam jonding kahitan, kahin kumkho umnalai ho chu lahpeh kahitai, kanatin ahi." 
Isaiah38:11 Pakai muponge, chule mihing gamachun Pakai le vannoi'a cheng mihemchu mukit taponge kanatin ahi." 
Isaiah38:12 Kakhanghi achemangin, kelngoi chingpa pon in bangin akichonmangtai. Kahinkhohi pon kikhong bangin akijel doh tai. Natah-a kisuh natna-a eisuhmang ding ahi. Sun-apat jankhang geija neikichai sah ding ahitai." 
Isaiah38:13 Jingkah geijin kakou kouvin, keipi bangin chutichun kagu jouse subongintin, sun-apat jangeija neikichai sah ding ahitai." 
Isaiah38:14 Chule pelpa le vakengsang bangin kaham hamin, vahui bangin kamao maove. Chunglam vetnan kamit teni akhamtai. Vo Pakai eiki sugenthei tai, neivesui jin." 
Isaiah38:15 Ipi seitang em? Aman kahenga aseijin, ama maman abolchai tai. Kahinna hi gimtah-in kahinkho lhumkeijin oltah-in chejingjeng tange." 
Isaiah38:16 Vo Pakai hitiho jal hin mite ahingjingin, hicheng thil jouse-a hi kalhagao hinna hi uma ahi. Chutichun nangin neidamsah kitnin natin, neihinsah kitnin nate." 
Isaiah38:17 Vetan chamnahi kana hotbol lheh-e; Ahinla kalhagao hi ngailutna-in setna kokhuh-a konin nahuhdoh tai. Ajehchu kachonsetna jouse nanung lama nasep mangtai. 
Isaiah38:18 Ajehchu thikhol khulin navahchoi theipon, thina in nakipapi theipoi. Kokhuh-a kumlha hon jong nathudih akineppi theipouve." 
Isaiah38:19 Mihing, mihingin vang tunia kabol banghin vahchoi jinnate, pan chate chu nathudih hetsah unte." 
Isaiah38:20 Pakai chu eihuhhing dinga phasadem ahi. Hijeh chun tumging tothon kahinkho lhumkeijun Pakai insunga la saovinge. 
Isaiah38:21 Ajehchu Isaiah'in theichang bohkhat laohen lang uilut chunga chun louvin nu-uhen chutile damkit tante, ati." 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiah'in Pakai inna kachetou nading melchihna ipiham? tinjong anaseije. 
Isaiah39:1 Hichelai chun Babylon lengpa Baladan chapa Merodach-baladan'in Hezekiah anan adamkit tai, ti thu ajah jeh-in lekhathot tampile thilpeh agahthotnin ahi." 
Isaiah39:2 Chuin Hezekiah'in hicheho chu akipapin, amaho chu athil lu ho in chu avetsah sohkeijin; sana, dangka, gimnamtui mantamho chule agal manchah ho in, chule agou kholna-a umjouse avetsahsoh heltan ahi. A-insung le avaihomna sunga Hezekiah'in avet sahlou khatcha jong aumtapoi." 
Isaiah39:3 Chuin Isaiah themgao chu Hezekiah lengpa henga ahungin, ajah-a, miho hin ipi aseijuva? hoija kona nahenga hunga hiuvam? atin ahi. Chuin Hezekiah'in, amaho gamlatah Babylon gamlampeh-a kona kahenga hunga ahiuve, ati." 
Isaiah39:4 Chuin aman, amahon na-insunga ipipi amuvem? ati. Chuin Hezekiah'in adonbutnin, amahon ka-insunga umjouse amuvin, kagou thil lah-a amaho kamusahlou khatchabeh aumpoi, ati." 
Isaiah39:5 Chuin Isaiah'in Hezekiah henga, janel Pakaiyin asei thuhi ngaijin." 
Isaiah39:6 Vetan, na-insunga umjouse le napu napaten tunigeija akhol khomho jouse Babylon'a akipoh mangna nikho hung lhungding ahi; imacha akikhena umlou helding ahi, Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah39:7 Chule nachate, nanga kona pengdoh dingle nangin nahindingho jong apuimangdiu ahin; chule amahochu Babylon lengpa inpisunga nukiso hiding ahiuve." 
Isaiah39:8 Chuin Hezekiah'in Isaiah henga, nangin naseidoh Pakai thuchu aphai, ati. Aman chukalvalin keima hinkho sungin chamnale thudih lenghen, ati." 
Isaiah40:1 Nangho lungmongun, nangho lungmongun, kamite, tin na Pathen'un aseijin ahi." 
Isaiah40:2 Jerusalem henga damheochan seijun, agalbol lah molso ahitan, akhan git louna akingaidamtai tin ajah-a samun, ajehchu amanun achonsetna jouse jal-in Pakaiya konin ajat ni akimutai." 
Isaiah40:3 Gamthipma khosam aw chun nanghon Pakai lampi semtoh-un, nelgama chun i-Pathen'uva din lamlhongpi semjangun, ati." 
Isaiah40:4 Damphai jouse kidomsanga, molsangtin le lhang jouse kisunem ding ahi. Akonlai kisujanga, aphonlai chu kisunamding ahi" 
Isaiah40:5 Chuteng Pakai loupinachu hungkilang intin, tahsaphe jousen amukhom sohkei diu ahi. Ajehchu Pakai kamin hichu asei ahitai." 
Isaiah40:6 Ogin chun samin, atin ahi. Chuin aman ipi kasap dingham? ati. Tahsaphe jousehi hampa tobang ahin, aphatna jouse jong loujaova pahcha pah tobang bou ahi." 
Isaiah40:7 Hampa agopjin, pahcha apuljie, ajehchu Pakai lhagaovin ahinsemji ahi. Tahbeh mongin mihem hi hampa tobang ahi." 
Isaiah40:8 Hampa agopjin, pahcha apuljie, ahinla Pathen thu vang atonsotna ding jingjeng ding ahi." 
Isaiah40:9 Kipana thupha hinpo-a, vo Zion, molsanga khun kaltouvin; kipana thupha hinpo-a, vo Jerusalem, nathanei chasunin na aw sansah-in, sansah-in; kicha hih-in, Judah khopiho henga, veuvin, na Pathen'u khu? tiuvin." 
Isaiah40:10 Veuvin, Pakai Pathen chu khut thahat tah-a hungding ahi, chule abantha-a avai ahomding, atohphat man chu akoma uma chule anatoh chu amasanga umding ahi." 
Isaiah40:11 Aman kelngoi chingpa banga aganchahon avah ding ahi. Aman abana akelngoiho chu ahoikhoma, a-opma akipomding, anousen puma hicheho chu olchacha apuile ding ahi." 
Isaiah40:12 Akhut phang tonga twivei ho tetheija, akhapma van tethei, leija leivuiho tena khatna hedohtheija, tena-a molsangho tedoh-a, chule lhangho khaikotna khaija koiham?" 
Isaiah40:13 Pakai Lhagao chu hila, thumopma panga, hilchah-a koiham?" 
Isaiah40:14 Koito kithumoptoa, ama kon ahila, thutandan lampi kon ahila, chule chihna thu ahila, chule hetkhen themna lamlhah kon ama amusah khah-em?" 
Isaiah40:15 Vetan, namtin vaipihi baltina twi vatkhat bangbep ahin, chule khaikotna leivui sipah bangbepma asim ahin, vetan, twikol gamho chu thil neochakhat bangin alan ahi." 
Isaiah40:16 Chule Lebanon chu meija tikham ahipon, asunga ganhingho jeng jong govam thil to-a tokham ahipouve." 
Isaiah40:17 Namtin vaipi a-angsunga ima ahipouvin; amaho chu amadinga imacha hilou, agohkeo ahiuve." 
Isaiah40:18 Achutile Pathen chu koito nakibahsah uva? Ipi akibahpito natekah dingu ham? 
Isaiah40:19 Mikhut themin milim asemjin, sana khengin achunga sanan atomjin, chule dangka sumgui akhengjin ahi." 
Isaiah40:20 Todoh ding neiloi mivaicha tah chun amotlouding thing akilhenin; achatloh theilou ding semthu milim semsah dingin, mikhut themtah akiholjin ahi." 
Isaiah40:21 Nahet khah, najahkhah loulai uham? Semtila patna kihilkha loulai nahiuvem? Leiset bulkiphu-a pat nahetkhen thei loulai uham?" 
Isaiah40:22 Leiset kikol lum chunga touva ama ahin, asunga cheng ho jong khaokhopi tobang ahiuvin; vanho ponjal banga jeldoh-a, chenna inding pon-in banga jahdoh-a ama ahi." 
Isaiah40:23 Aman leng chapate imalouvin akoijin; aman leiset thutan ho agohkeovin asemtai. 
Isaiah40:24 Henge, amaho kiphut lou ding ahiuvin; tu jong kitulou dingu; aphungu leija jungkho manlou ding; chule Aman amaho amut teng jongle amaho gop lhading, chule changpol banga chimpeijin apeimang dingu ahi." 
Isaiah40:25 Achutile koito neikibah sah uva, ahiloule koito kakibah dingham? tin mithengpan aseijin ahi." 
Isaiah40:26 Namtinin chungsang lam nganlang, hichengse sempale ajanelu ahon hona puidohpa khu vetemun; aman aletnale athahatnan amincheh-in akouvin, Ama thanei na-a hattah ahijeh in khatcha akhenpoi." 
Isaiah40:27 Vo Jacob, vo Israel, kalampihi Pakaiya kona kisel ahin, kathutanhi ka Pathen'a kon ahipoi tia ipidinga naseiham?" 
Isaiah40:28 Pathen, Pakai, leiset kolmong geija sempa, nahetkhah-a najahkhah louham? Lhasam khalou, choljong cholkhalou, ama hetkhen themna holdoh jouhoi hilou ahi." 
Isaiah40:29 Aman milhasam chu hatna apen; chule thaneilou chu athahat nao akalsahjin ahi. 
Isaiah40:30 Khangdongho jengjong lhasama choldingu, gollhangho jong kipala lhuding ahiuve." 
Isaiah40:31 Ahinla Pakai ngahjingho chun athao kisem thah-un tin; muvanlai bangin alhaovin lengtou untin; amaho lhaijuva chollou dingu; chule vahleuva lhasam louding ahiuve. 
Isaiah41:1 Vo twikol gamho, ka-anga thipchetnun; miten athao semthah-uhen; amaho hungnaiju henlang, chuteng thu seijuhen, thutanna mun chu naicheh-u hite." 
Isaiah41:2 Solama kona michonpha pa chu hintungdoh-a, akhophang bulla kou-a, namtin vaipi a-angsunga pe-a, lengho chunga ama vaihomsah chu koiham? Amahochu leivui kisoh dingin chemjam ma apedoh-in; changpol kithethang bang thethang din athalpi henga apedoh tan ahi." 
Isaiah41:3 Amaho chu anungdelin bitkeijin agalkaijin; lampia chun akengin jong achepoi. 
Isaiah41:4 Hichehi koijin atoh-a chule abol hintem; semtila patna akhang akhanga miho kou-a natong jouva chu koiham? Keima Pakai amasale anukhah, ama chu keihi kahi." 
Isaiah41:5 Twikol gamhon hichu amuvin, akichauve; leiset kolmangho jong akitihot hot-un, ahung kikhin naijun ahing taove." 
Isaiah41:6 Amaho amitakipmin aheng akomcheh akithopiuvin; chule amitakipmin asopipa jah-a, hangtah-in pangin, atiuve." 
Isaiah41:7 Chutichun khut thempan sana khengpa atilkhouvin, chule sehcha-a khenpan thihnoidou khenpa atilkhouvin, ajah-a, solmat dinga phasadem ahitai atin, akilon lounadin thihkilin akildetne." 
Isaiah41:8 Ahinla, Israel nangma kagolpa Abraham chilhah-a kalhacha Jacob chu nahi." 
Isaiah41:9 Leiset kolmonga kona kalah-a, chukoma milenho-a kona kakouva, najah-a kasei ahi." 
Isaiah41:10 Nangma kaumpi jeh-in kicha hih-in, keima na Pathen kahijeh-in lunglha hih-in; henge, keiman kahatsah ding nahin; Keiman nakithopi nange, chule keiman nangma kachon phatna khutjetna katuh ding nahi." 
Isaiah41:11 Vetan, nangma douva lunghansah jouse chu jahchaova, kisudongdiu ahi. Amaho imalouhel banguntin, nakinahpiho chu mangthah ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah41:12 Nangman amahole nakinahpiho ngeichu nahola namu louding; nangma douva galbolho chu imalouhel leh pannabei sohding ahiuve. 
Isaiah41:13 Ajehchu keima Pakai na Pathen'in nakhutjetna katuh-a, kicha hih-in, keiman nangma panpi nange kati ding ahi." 
Isaiah41:14 Nangma lungtol Jacob, chule nangho Israel mite kicha hih-un; keiman panpinange, tin Pakai nalhandam pu Israel Mithengpan aseije." 
Isaiah41:15 Vetan, keiman nangma chang chilna manchah hanei hemtah-a kasemthah ding nahi. Nangin mol ho nachila, navoh ngemding, chule lhangho chu changvai nabahsah ding ahi." 
Isaiah41:16 Nangin amaho najapma, huichun alhoh mangdiu, chule chimpei chun athecheh diu ahi. Chule nangma Pakaiya halna-in kipah-in natin, Israel Mithengpa-a chun loupitan nate." 
Isaiah41:17 Avaichale alhasamin twi athuma, koimachan pelouva aleiju dangchah-a agotteng, Pakai keiman nousah ingting, Israel Pathen keiman amaho kapaidoh louding ahi." 
Isaiah41:18 Keiman munsang ho-a vadunglen holeh phaicham lailunga twinahho kahonding ahi. Keiman gamthiplai twikul'a chule gam golai twisam putna-a kasemding ahi. 
Isaiah41:19 Keiman gamthipma cedar thing, thinggi thing, le pahcha thing chule thao thing kaphua; neldi gama chahthing, phan thing chule thingkhang thing kaphu ding ahi." 
Isaiah41:20 Chutia chu amahon amuva, ahetnuva, angaitouva, chule ahetthem cheh theina diuva Pakai khutnin hichu abola, chule Israel mithengpan hichu anasem ahi." 
Isaiah41:21 Pakaiyin nakibaonao hinpolutnun ati; nathu hahsao hinpolutnun tin Jacob dinga lengpan aseije. 
Isaiah41:22 Amahon hicheho chu hinpolutnu henlang thil hunglhung ding eimusah uhen; amahon thil masaho chu ipiham? kangaitouva, akichaina kahet theina dingun eimusah-uhen; ahiloule ahunglhung dingho eiphon dohpeh uhen." 
Isaiah41:23 Nangho pathen ho nahiuve ti kahet theina dingun, tununga thil hunglhung dingho tahlangun; ahi, kalung thoijuva kamucheh nadiuvin apha ham aseham boluvin." 
Isaiah41:24 Veuvin, imacha hilou nahiuvin, natoh-u jong pannabei ahi. Naki lhanpao chu thet umtah ahi." 
Isaiah41:25 Keiman sahlam gama konin mikhat katungin, ama chu hungding ahi: aman niso-a pat kamin akouding; Songchung kichonpha tobangle beldengpan leingan achil banga ama pipuiho chunga hungchu ding ahi." 
Isaiah41:26 Ihettheina diuleh ama chonpha ahi iti theina diuva abula patna kon aphonkhah-em? ahi, khatchan atahlangpon; ahi, khatchan aphongdoh poi; ahi, nathu ja-a khatcha ana umpoi." 
Isaiah41:27 Amasan Zion henga, ven, ven, amahokhu tinnate; Jerusalem chu kipana thupha pole-a khat kapeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah41:28 Ajehchu kagah vetleh koimacha kamupon; amaho kadohjongle thukhat donbut theijong alah uvah kamupoi, khatcha aumpouve." 
Isaiah41:29 Vetemun, abonun pannabei jeng ahiuvin; atoh-u jong mohseh ahin; amilim kilhajol ujong hui lhi le ahomkeo ngen ahiuve." 
Isaiah42:1 Veovin, kasottol, katuhjing, kalhentum; achunga kalung kipanakhu; achunga kalhagao kakoijin; aman chidang namdang ho henga thutanna anei ding ahi." 
Isaiah42:2 Aman kho asaplouding, a-aw asodoh louhel ding, khopi lamlena jong a-aw kija louhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah42:3 Pumpeng kihehchip ahebohpai louding, thaomei patkhu athamit pailou ding ahi. Aman thudih-a thutanna apohdoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah42:4 Leiset chunga thutanna aumsah masangse-a losam louding chule lungjong lunglhalouding; twikol gamhon ama danthupeh angaidiu ahi. 
Isaiah42:5 Vanho sema jahdohpa, leiset le asunga kona hungsoh ho phajaopa; chule achunga mite henga haina hule asunga vahle miho henga lhagao pe-a Pakai Pathen chun hitin aseije." 
Isaiah42:6 Keima Pakai hin chonphatna-a kakou nahin, nakhut katuh-a kavet tupma, mitin dinga kitepna chule chidang namdangte vah hidinga kasem ding nahin;" 
Isaiah42:7 mitcho ho mit hasah ding, sohchangho songkulla kon puidoh ding, chule songkulsung muthim lah-a touho puidoh dinga kapansah nahi." 
Isaiah42:8 Keima Pakai chu kahin; hichu kamin ahi. Kaloupina chu midang kapehlouding, eiki vahchoina jong milim semthuho henga pelouding kahi." 
Isaiah42:9 Veuvin, phatmasa thilho chu ahung lhungtan, thilthah ho kaphong doh-in; ahung dotdoh masanga athu dollu kahil masatdem nahiuve." 
Isaiah42:10 Nangho twikhanglen'a kumsuh hole asunga umho jousen; twikol gamle asunga cheng, leiset kolmonga patnin Pakai henga lathah khat saovin." 
Isaiah42:11 Gamthip le akhopiho Kedar chan geija kho ho pengu hen a-aw sansah uhen, songpi-a chenghon kipa la saohen lang, molsang hon chungvuma konin samu hen." 
Isaiah42:12 Amahon Pakaiya loupina peuhenlang, twikol gamho-a chun a thangvahna phongjal uhen." 
Isaiah42:13 Pakai chu mihat tah bangin kondoh intin, galsat mi banga thangthipna acho thouva, kholhang asapding; ama hat tah-a kituma, amelmate ajoding ahi." 
Isaiah42:14 Sottah thipbeh-in kaumtan; kathipbeh-in, kakitimkit hamhame, tunvang naosonat thohlel bangin peng ingting; kasuhmanga kavalhum ding ahi." 
Isaiah42:15 Mol le lhangho agoh-in koi jingting, ahampaho gotsah gaming ting, vadungho twikol gammin semingting, chule twikulho kansah soh inge." 
Isaiah42:16 Mitcho ho chu ahetkhah lounao kenglampia puijing ting; ahetkhah louvu lampia kaijinge; amasanguva muthim chu vahsah ingting, akonlaiho ka jansah ding ahi. Hicheng hi ahenguva kabolding, kadalhah louding ahiuve." 
Isaiah42:17 Milim semthu tahsan ho, milimho jah-a, nangho kapathen'u nahiuve tiho chu hung kinungle uva, jahcha lheh ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah42:18 Na-ngong ho, nanghon ngaijunlang, nangho mitcho hon namutheina dinguvin veuvin." 
Isaiah42:19 Mitcho koiham, kalhachapabou hilouham? atiloule kasottol kasolpa banga nangonga koiham? michamkim pa banga mitcho koi hijam? Pakai sohpa banga mitcho koiham?" 
Isaiah42:20 Thiltampi namun ahinla najuipoi; nakhangho chu avangnan ahinla ajapon ahi. 
Isaiah42:21 Achonphatna jal-in Pakai alunglhai tangeije; aman danthupeh chu aloupisah-a ja uma asemding ahi. 
Isaiah42:22 Ahinla amahohi agumanga leh asuthanghoi ahiuvin; amaho jouse kohoma thangkol ho ahiuvin, songkul inho-a kisela ahiuve. Amaho akithatgam ding ahiuvin, ahuhdoh dingu khatcha aumpon; suhchatvai ding ahiuvin, lepeh kitnun tia khatcha aumpoi." 
Isaiah42:23 Hichea nakhang sungdinga nalah uva koi nahiuvem? Ahunglhung ding phat ho dinga kon nangai uva, najahdiu ham?" 
Isaiah42:24 Galthil kichom banga chomdinga Jacob pe-a, guchaho henga Israelte pedoh-a koiham? chonset iboluva idoupao Pakai chun apehdoh hilouham? ajehchu amaho alampiho-a achenom pouvin, adanthu jong ajuipouve." 
Isaiah42:25 Hijeh-a chu achunguva alunghana meikongle galkisat hattah chu abuhlhah khum ahi. Hichun akimvel meija ahalin, ahin amanla ahethei dehpon; hichun aka-in, ahivanga alungsungah aching dehpon ahi." 
Isaiah43:1 Ahinla tun, Vo Jacob, nasempao Pakaiyin, vo Israel natungdoh paovin kicha hih-un atin ahi. Ajehchu keiman kalhatdoh nahin, naminin kakouvin, keija nahitai." 
Isaiah43:2 Twipi napalteng jongle umping ting; vadunghon jong nachup louding; meilah najot teng jongle, nakah louding ahi. Meikou deujejun jong naleogop louding ahi." 
Isaiah43:3 Ajehchu keima Pakai na Pathen, Israel mithengpa nahuhhingpa chu kahi nangma lhatnadin Egypt kapen, nangma khelin Ethiopia le Seba kapei." 
Isaiah43:4 Kamitmu-a lutah nahin, ja-umtah nahina jeh-in kangailun ahi. Hijeh chun nakhelin miho pengting nahinna dinga mitin kapeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah43:5 Kicha hih-in, ajehchu keiman kaumpi nai, nachilhah solama konin hinpui jingting, lhumlama konin dongkhom inge." 
Isaiah43:6 Keiman sahlam jah-a, hin pedoh-in, lhanglam jah-a, henden hih-in; gamlatah a konin kachapate, leiset kolmonga konin kachanute hinpuijin tinge." 
Isaiah43:7 Kamina kikouchan chu kaloupina dinga kasema kagon ahin; henge, keiman ama kasem ahi." 
Isaiah43:8 Mit neija khomulou leh, nakhang neija khojalou ho chu hinpui doh-un." 
Isaiah43:9 Namtin vaipi jouse kikhom khomuhen, chule mipite kikhom khomuhen, alah uva koiham hiche phongdoh dingle thil um masa cheng eivetsah thei uva koiham? Athem chana dingun ahettohsah ho hinpuijuhen; ahiloule ngaijuhen chule adih ahi, tiuhen." 
Isaiah43:10 Nangho keima hettohsah nahiuve tin Pakaiyin aseije: chule kalhendohsa kalhacha nahi; hitia chu keima neihet uva neitahsan uva, keimahi Ama kahi neihet nadinguva: keima masanga Pathen dang akisempon, keima nunga jong khatcha kisem louding ahi." 
Isaiah43:11 Kei, keima bou Pakai chu kahi, keima tailou huhhingpu dang aumpoi." 
Isaiah43:12 Nalah uva gamdang pathen aum masangin keiman kaphong doh-in, kahuhhingun, chule kamusah-un ahi. Hijeh chun nangho keima hettohsah nahiuve, tin keima Pakaiyin aseije, keima Pathen kahi." 
Isaiah43:13 Ahi, nikhoho umasanga keima Ama chu kahi; kakhutna kona ladohjou khatcha ana umpoi; keiman katohding chu koiham ajada dinga?" 
Isaiah43:14 Pakai na lhatdampu Israel mithengpan hitin aseije; nangho khohsahna jal-in Babylon'a sepai kasolin, amilaltehou jousele Chaldea ho kong-innei sunga peng jenjunin kahin puisuh-e." 
Isaiah43:15 Keima Pakai na Mithengpao, Israelte sempa nalengpao chu kahi." 
Isaiah43:16 Pakai twikhanglen'a kenglampi semaleh twihat sunga lampi sempan hitin aseije; 
Isaiah43:17 Sakol kangtalai le sakol, sepaiho le athahat ho puidohpa Pakai chun hitin aseije. Amaho lumkhom uva thoutaloudiu ahin; amaho amit adelun, thaomei pat bangin akimutmit taove." 
Isaiah43:18 Thil masaho geldaovin lang, tonlai thil jong ngaito daovin." 
Isaiah43:19 Veuvin, keiman thilthah khat kabolding ahin, tu-a hungpotdoh ding ahitan; nahetlou diuham? Gamthiplai geija lampi khat kasema, nelgama jong vadungho kalonsah ding ahi." 
Isaiah43:20 Kamite, kalhentumho dondinga gamthipma twiho chule nelgama vadung ho kapeh jeh-a, gamlah-a gamsaho, dragon ho chule sumbupi hon eijabol dingu ahi." 
Isaiah43:21 Hiche mitehi keiding tumtah-a kasem ahin; amahon keima vahchoina atahlang lediu ahi. 
Isaiah43:22 Ahinla Vo Jacob, nangmanla neikou pon, Vo Israel, nanghon neitheichim un ahi." 
Isaiah43:23 Nagovam thilpeh-a din ganchaneo neihin choipehjipon, ganlhaina injong neijabol jitapon ahi. Thilpeh-in nangma kana kijenkhahsah pon, gimnamtui jinjong kasugim khapoi." 
Isaiah43:24 Nangin sumin kolchulhum nachokhapon, naganlhai na sathaovin jong neivahva khapon ahi. Ahinla nachonset nao neipohsah-un, nakhangitlou naova neisugimun ahi." 
Isaiah43:25 Kei, keimong monghin, keile kei kikhohsah najala nasuhkhelnao thehmanga chu kahin, nachonset nahou kageldoh kit tahlou ding ahi." 
Isaiah43:26 Neigeldoh jingun; hungun ngaito khomu hite; them nachan theina dingun kisei phongun. 
Isaiah43:27 Napa masapen anachonsen, chuin nahil hou keima douna-in anasukhelun ahi." 
Isaiah43:28 Hijeh chun munthenga pipuiho chu kanasuboh-in, Jacob chu sapsetna-a, Israel chu i-sah louvin kana umsah tai." 
Isaiah44:1 Tuvangin Vo kalhacha Jacob, Vo kalhenchom Israel, ngaijun;" 
Isaiah44:2 Nasema leh naobu-a kona nahin gonga napanpi ding Pakai chun hitin aseije; Vo kalhacha Jacob chule vo kalhenchom Jerusalem, kicha hih-in." 
Isaiah44:3 Ajehchu adangchah chunga twi kasuna, tolgolaija twi kasosah ding ahi. Nachilhah ho chunga kalhagao chule nasonho chunga kaphat theina kabuh lhah ding ahi." 
Isaiah44:4 Amaho hampalah banga hungdon doh diu, twipanga huisum thingho bangdiu ahi." 
Isaiah44:5 Khatnin, keima Pakaiya kahin; achomkhatma Jacob mina kikou ding; chule adang khatnin akhut tah-a Pakaiya ding tia ajih ding, chule Israel mina kiminvo ding ahi." 
Isaiah44:6 Pakai Israelte leng, alhatdampu janel Pakai chun hitin ati; Keima amasale anukhah kahin, kei tailou Pathen dang aumpoi, ati." 
Isaiah44:7 Malai miho katundoh laija chu keima bolbanga koiham aboldingle aphongdoh dinga? chule abancha umsah ding? chule thil ahunglhung dingle ahunglhung saho chu amaho musah-u hen. 
Isaiah44:8 Tija hih-un, kijong kicha hih-un; chuche laija patna kahilkhahlou, kaseipeh khahlou nahiuvem? Nangho kathu hettoh sahmong nahiuvin ahi. Keitailou Pathen dang umem? ahi, Pathen dang aumpoi, khatcha jong kahepoi." 
Isaiah44:9 Alim semthuho abonun ahomkeo ahiuvin; anopsahnao thilho jong pannabei ahin; amaho chu amaho hettohsah ahiuve, ajachat theina diuvin amahon amupouvin, hejong ahepouve." 
Isaiah44:10 Aphat chomna bei pathen le alim semthu milim sema koiham? 
Isaiah44:11 Vetan, aloiho jouse jahchao vintin, chule anatong amaho jong mihem bou ahiuve." 
Isaiah44:12 Thih khengpan achoiche toh meihola agouvin, sehcha'n avotoh-in, aban thahatnin atongjin ahi; henge, ama agilkelin, ahatna angoilhajin, twila adonpon, alhadahjitai." 
Isaiah44:13 Thingthem bolpan agolkaina ahinladoh-in; gol akaijin, amelchih-in; tolnam na-in atoltoh-in, vettohna-in amelchih-in, mihem gong bangin mihem hoina dungjuijin a-insunga aumden nadingin amelchih-in ahi." 
Isaiah44:14 Aman cedar thingho aphuh lhun, khengthing le gangpi thing amadingin gammang lah-a akhansah-in ahi. Aman meila thing aphutnin gotuijin achapnoujin ahi." 
Isaiah44:15 Chujoule hichu mihem dinga tiding hintin; ajehchu aman thing lah-a akehkhat chu akitikouvin a-oilumjin; changlhah akangjin; a pathen lim sem angsunga chun abohkhupmin ahoujin ahi. 
Isaiah44:16 Aman phabep chu meija atih-in; sa go nan aneijin oiva nan anen; meisa chu a-oilumin, katejo, keiman lum kasatai, meimu-a kahitai atijin ahi." 
Isaiah44:17 Chule thing moh chu pathen khatnin semthu milim ngeijin asemjin, a-anga aboh khupmin, ahouvin, ahenga ataovin, ka-pathen nahi jeh-in neihuh doh-in atijin ahi." 
Isaiah44:18 Amahon anahepouvin, hetjong ahethem pouve; ajehchu amulouna diuva amitnu achotsah-a, ahetkhen themlouna diuva alungthimu akhachah ahi." 
Isaiah44:19 Abang meija katih-in, henge, chua mei mama chun changlhah kakangin, sa kakigon kanei; achutile amohchu thet umtah khatna kasema, thingbul khat anga kabokhupma kahou diham? tin koiman alungin chihnale hetkhenna injong angaitopoi." 
Isaiah44:20 Ama vutna kivah ahin; lheplhahna lungthimin aheikon ahin, ahinna aman ahuhdoh theilouna dia kakhutjetna jou uma hilouham, atin ahi." 
Isaiah44:21 Nangma kalhacha nahi jeh-in vo Jacob, le Israel hichehohi geldoh-in; kasemsa nahin, kalhacha nahi, Vo Israel, nangma kasuhmil theihoi nahipoi." 
Isaiah44:22 Keiman meilhang satah tobang nasuhkhelnaho le nachonset naho meibol tobang chu katheh mang tai; kahenga hung kile kitnin, keiman kalhatdoh nahitai." 
Isaiah44:23 Vo vanho hichu Pakai ahijeh-in la saovin; lei noilama umhon aovun; nangho mol ho, Vo gammang chule chua thingphung tinnin la san aodoh uvin, ajehchu Pakaiyin Jacob alhatdoh-in, Israel lentahle loupitah-in akichoi antai." 
Isaiah44:24 Pakai nalhatdohpao naobu-a kona nagongtoh paovin hitin aseije, keihi thiljouse sema, Pakai achangseh-a vanho jahdoh-a, leiset phajaopa chu kahi, ati." 
Isaiah44:25 Mi jouho melchihna imalou so-a, doi-aithemho ngolsah-a; michingho nungnokit na, ahetnao ngolna-a sosah-a;" 
Isaiah44:26 Asohpa thusei sudetpa, asottol ho thumop molsopeh-a; Jerusalem jah-a nangho chenna ding ahin; chule Judah khopiho jah-a, nangho kasahdoh kitna, alhusa munho kaphoh ding kitding ahi atipeh-e." 
Isaiah44:27 Twithuh jah-a kangin, navadung ho jong kakansah kitding ahi tipa," 
Isaiah44:28 Cyrus jah-a, ama kakelngoi chingpa ahin, kadeijouse asuhbulhit ding ahi, Jerusalem heng jenga jong nangma, kisapha ding nahi tin, chule houin jah-a, na-inbul kisem phading ahi tipa chu kahi, ati." 
Isaiah45:1 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, athao nu Cyrus jah-a namtin vaipi a-anga sunem dingle, lengho konggah lhamkang ding, amasanga pehni kisuto kotpiho hongdingle, khahkit loudingin, akhut jetna katuh chahpa henga chun hitin aseijin;" 
Isaiah45:2 keima namasanga chengting, akonlaiho kajansah ding; sum-eng kotpiho kavohchima, thih kotgol ho kasatkhen ding ahi." 
Isaiah45:3 Chule keima Pakai, namina nakoupa, Israel Pathen chu kahin, keima neihet theina dinga goukhol le munthipma kiselgu sumjong kapeh ding nahi." 
Isaiah45:4 Kalhacha Jacob le kalhen chom Israel jala namin monga kakou nahi, nangin neihetlou vanga keiman kaminvo nahi." 
Isaiah45:5 Keihi Pakai chu kahin, adang aumpoi, kei tailou Pathen dang himhim aumpoi; neihetlou vanga nakong kagahpeh nahin;" 
Isaiah45:6 Kei tailou adang aumpoi. Keima Pakai chu kahi, adang him him aumpoi, ti nisolama pat nilhum lam geija miten ahet theina diu ahi." 
Isaiah45:7 Keiman khovah kagong doh-in, muthim jong kaseme, chamna kasemin, setna jong kaseme, kei Pakaiyin hitiho jousehi kabol ahi." 
Isaiah45:8 Nangho vanho, chunga konin hung julhaovin, chule vandum hon chonphatna hinsunglhaovin, leiset kihonghenlang huhhingna sodoh-u hen, chonphat nato hung kedoh thaohen; keima Pakaiyin hichu kasem ahi." 
Isaiah45:9 Asempa kinelpi chu ohe! ada ahi: beldengpa bel hal chu leiset bel hal to kinel hen. Bon nganin asempa henga, ipi sema nahim? ahiloule nathilbol chun aman khut kaneipoi tintem?" 
Isaiah45:10 Apa jah-a ipi hinga nahim? ahiloule anujah-a ipi nana hindoh hitam? tiachu ada ahi. 
Isaiah45:11 Pakai Israel mithengpa le asempaovin hitin ati, kachate chungchanga thil hunglhung dingchu neidongun, chule, kakhut natoh chungchang thu neipeuvin." 
Isaiah45:12 Leiset hi kasem ahin, achunga mihem jonghi kasem ahi, Kakhut ho-a vanho kajahdoh-a, janelho jong kathupeh ahi." 
Isaiah45:13 Ama chu chonphat na-in kakhou khah-in, alampi jouse hilinge. Aman kakhopi asahdoh-a, kasohchang ho alhadoh ding, kipamanle tohphat man thil peh-a ding ahipoi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah45:14 Pakaiyin hitin, ati, Egypt tohgimna le Ethiopia le Sabea mite sumkolvei ho, misang tahtah ho chu naheng lama hunguva nanga hidiu ahitai. Nanung ahin juijuva, thihkhaova kihenpuma hung galkaijuva, na-anga bohkhup uva, chibai nabohdiu, nahenga lungsetna angeh uva tahbeh-in Pathen nangma-a aum monge, adang aumpoi, Pathen dang himhim aumpoi atidiu ahi." 
Isaiah45:15 Vo Israel Pathen, huhhingpa kisel thipbeh Pathen tahbeh mongchu nahi." 
Isaiah45:16 Amaho jahchaova abonchauva kisudongdiu; milimsem amaho chu lungnoh phah puma lutkhom diu ahi. 
Isaiah45:17 Israel vangchu Pakaiya tonsot huhhingna-a huhhing-a umdiu ahin; nangho tonsot geija jahchalouva akhonna beija kisudong louding nahiuve. 
Isaiah45:18 Ajehchu vanho sempa, Pakai, leiset sutoh-a, sema tungdohpa, aman agohkeo asem hilouva chenna dinga anagong dohpa Pathen amatah chun hitin ati; Keima Pakai chu kahin koima cha dang aumpoi," 
Isaiah45:19 keiman leiset munthim mun'a guhthimin thu kaseipoi, keiman Jacob chilhahte henga agohkeovin neiholun katipoi, Pakai keiman chonphatna kaseijin, thudih bou chu kaphondoh ahi." 
Isaiah45:20 Nangho namtin lah-a asohcha chengse kikhom munlang, hungun, hinnai cheh-un. Thing semthu milim tungdoh-a, ahuhhing theilou diu Pathen henga taoho, amahonla hetna aneipouvin ahi." 
Isaiah45:21 Seipeh unlang hinpui naijun; thu kimopna chu sang uhen, masang laija patna kon aphondoh khah em? chulai apat kon nanahil um? Pakai keimahi kahilou ham? Pathen dihle huhhing-a Pathen dang aumpoi, kei tailou adang aumpoi." 
Isaiah45:22 Leiset kolkimvela mi jousen keilam hinveuhen lang huhhingin umuhen; keima Pathen kahin, koimacha dang aumpoi." 
Isaiah45:23 Keile kei kaki hahsel in, kakama kona chonphatna thu potnachu hungkilekit louding ahi. Chutia chu khup jouse ka-anga dilsua, lei jouse kihahsel ding ahi," 
Isaiah45:24 dihtah-in min Pakaiya chun chonphat nale thahatna kaneije tin seijinte; ama henga mi hunga; ama douva lunghansah jouse chu jahcha ding ahiuve. 
Isaiah45:25 Israel chilhah jouse chu Pakaiya them changa loupidiu ahi. 
Isaiah46:1 Bel chu akunin, Nebo chu abungin, amilim hou chu sahole aganchahou chunga aumuve; nathilpoh-u pohgih tah ahin, gancha thachol dinga pohgihsa ahi." 
Isaiah46:2 Amaho abungun, akuncheh uve; amaho pohgih-a chun ahoidoh pouvin, gal hinga kaimangin aumjo taove." 
Isaiah46:3 Vo Jacob insungle Israel insung amohchengse, ka-oisunga patna kavopma, naobu-a kona kapensah hon kathu ngaijun." 
Isaiah46:4 Nateh geija jong kei Ama chu kahin; nasamkan geija jong kapoh ding nahi; kasemsa nahin, chule keiman vop ingting kapoh-a; kahuh hingding nahi." 
Isaiah46:5 Koito kilo neisah uva, neikibah sah uva, neitekah uva, chule kakibah thei dinguham?" 
Isaiah46:6 Amaho dipma kona sana anopnopma manga, dangka akitena-a kitedoh-a, sana khengkhat thalah-a; pathen akisemsah-a, a-anga bohkhup jia chibai bohjia ahiuve." 
Isaiah46:7 Amahon hichu aleng kou uva adomdoh uvin, apojiuvin, ama munna atungjiove, ama akitung denin; aumna-a konin akichon jitapon ahi. Ahi, min ama kou intin, amanla donbut theilou ding, agimna-a kona jong ahuhdoh theilou ding ahi." 
Isaiah46:8 Vo suhkhel neiho, hichehi geldoh-un; miho kimusah unlang lungin geldoh kitnun." 
Isaiah46:9 Khanglui laija thilmasaho geldoh-un, keima Pakai kahijeh in adang khatcha aumpoi, keima Pathen kahin, keitobang himhim aumpouve." 
Isaiah46:10 Abula pat akichainagei, chule masang laijapat akibol loulaiho jong kaseiphong ahitai, kathumop ding jingintin, kanopchan kabolding ahitai, ati." 
Isaiah46:11 Solama kona vacha lol hattah khat gamlatah-a kona kathumopsa tongdoh dingpa chu kouvin; henge, kaseisa ahin, kagui lhunsah ding ahin, kangaitosa ahin boljong kaboldoh ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah46:12 Chonphatna-a kona gamla-a lungtah-a nanghon kathu ngaijun; 
Isaiah46:13 kachon phatna hi kahinpo naitan, hichu gamla talou ding, ka huhhingna jong umjing louding ahi. Kaloupina Israelte dinga huhhingna chu Zion'a kakoiding ahi." 
Isaiah47:1 Vo nungah theng chanu, hungkum lhanlang leivuilah-a touvin, laltouna aumpon, Vo Chaldea mite chanu; ajehchu nangma nouchetle nomsa kitikit talou ding nahi." 
Isaiah47:2 Sumhei songho lanlang chang goijin napon lukhuh hoh-inlang, kengkeuvin umin, na pheipi hohdoh inlang, vadungho palgalkai jin." 
Isaiah47:3 Nasagohkeo chu khulouvin umintin; najamo kisel chu kimuding ahi. Phu langting, mihembanga nangma kakimupi louding ahi." 
Isaiah47:4 Eilhatdohpao chu Israel mithengpa, janelho Pakai chu amin ahi." 
Isaiah47:5 Chaldea te chanu thipbeh in touvin lang, muthima lutnin, ajehchu lenggam ho pakainu kitijom louding nahitai." 
Isaiah47:6 Kamite chunga kalungsan, kagouloho kasuboh-in, amaho chu nakhutna kanapeluttai; nanginla hepina nanamusahpon; golluiho chunga napohgih tah namkoljon chu na-ngapkhum tai." 
Isaiah47:7 Nangin imatihchanna pakainu kahijing ding ahi nanatin; chutichun nangin hiche hohi nalunga nanakoi pon khonunga akichaina diujong nanageldoh him himpoi. 
Isaiah47:8 Hijeh chun tun anop nopma uma, chavaitah-a chengnu, alungsunga keitailou adang aumpon, keibou kahin; meithai banga toulou ding kahi, chate thi thu jong hehih helinge, tia seinun ngaijin;" 
Isaiah47:9 ahinla hiche thilni, chate thinale meithai hinahi nikhatsunga hetmanlouva nachunga hungchu ding ahi. Hicheho chu namitpheldoi ho tamjeh le, kilhim ngolna bulhin lheh jeh-a nachunga lhingsetna hungchu ding ahi." 
Isaiah47:10 Ajehchu nakhansetna natahsanin, koiman eimupoi natin ahi. Nachihnale nahetna in naheimangtan; nalungsunga keima kahi keitailou adang himhim aumpoi natin ahi." 
Isaiah47:11 Hijeh-achu thilse nachunga hungchua hi hoija hung kipan ahi nahetlouding; setna nachunga hungchu ding; hichu nasuhmang joulou ding; chule nahet loubeh ding manthah na nachunga hung chuphung ding ahi. 
Isaiah47:12 Tun naki lhim ngolnale namitpheldoi themna tamtah, naneolaija patna nahinjilna chun naphat theipi jouva, najo thei khattou dingle dinpi tan," 
Isaiah47:13 nathumop tamjeh-in nacholtan ahi. Tun ahsi lekhathem ho, ahsi velhi jingho, lhatina khonunga hunglhung ding melchih themho dingdoh uhenlang, nachunga hung chudingho-a konin kihuhdoh sah-in." 
Isaiah47:14 Veuvin, amaho changpol bangbep hiuvintin; meijin akahvamdiu; meikong thahat na-a kona amahole amaho kihuhdoh loudiu; kisahlum nading mei-am tobang hilouva, amasanga tounangam mei tobang jong hilouding ahi." 
Isaiah47:15 Nangdinga naneolaija patna nasumkol veipiho, chule nanatoh gimpi amaho jengtah jong chutichu hintin, amaho khatcheh-a a-inlam cheh-a vahmanga, koimachan nahuhhing louding ahi." 
Isaiah48:1 Vo Jacob insung Israel mina kivo-a Judah twiho-a kona sohdoh-a, Pakai mina kihahsel, thutah le chonphatna-a hilouva Israel Pathen min panho: hichehi ngaijun." 
Isaiah48:2 Ajehchu amahole amaho khopitheng mi akihisah-un, Israel Pathen chunga akingaijui; ama minchu janel ho Pakai ahi." 
Isaiah48:3 Masanglai thilto chu abula patnin kaseiphongin; kakama kona sohdoh ho chu amaho kamusahtai; hiche ho chu kabol phunga guilhung jeng ahi. 
Isaiah48:4 Ajehchu nangma milouchal nahi ti kahen, na-ngong chu thih khao ahin, nachalpang chu sum-eng ahin;" 
Isaiah48:5 Hichu atila patna nahenga kaseija, ahung guilhun masanga kamusah nahitai. Achutiloule nangin kahou milim, alim semthu, kamilim kilhajolin abol ahi tikhan nate," 
Isaiah48:6 nanghon najataovin, hicheho jousehi namutaovin; chule naseiphong loudiu ham? tua patnin thilthah ho, thil kisel ho, nanghon nanahetlouho chu kamusah ahitai." 
Isaiah48:7 Amaho tun akisemtai, abula patna ahipoi; najah masang nikho jongchu ahipoi; achutiloule nangin, veuvin, ken amaho kahei, tikhan nate." 
Isaiah48:8 Ahi, nanaja khapon, nanahe khapoi; hichelaija patchun nanakhang ana kihongpon ahi; tahsanlel nahin, naobu-a patna suhkhelnei nakiti dingchu kanahen ahi." 
Isaiah48:9 Ajehchu kamin jala kalungsatna-a kakitima, eikipachat nading jeh-a nangma kasuhtana dinga kona kitima kahi." 
Isaiah48:10 Vetan, keiman nangma kalhah theng nahitai, sum-eng bang hilouvin, suhgentheina meilhum sunga kalhah nahi." 
Isaiah48:11 Keimajal leh keimatah jala kabolding ahi; Ajehchu kaminhi ibola suhboh a umding ham? 
Isaiah48:12 Vo Jacob le kakou Israel, kathu ngai phaovin; keihi amachu kahin; amasale anukhah jong kahi." 
Isaiah48:13 Kakhutnin leiset bul jong hi aphudoh ahin, kakhut jet hin vanho chu akaijala, amahochu kakoutengle dingdoh khom jengjiuva ahi." 
Isaiah48:14 Nangho nabon chaovin kikhomun lang ngaijun; hiche thil ho hi alah uva koipenin aphondoh khah em? Pakaiyin ama alungsetnin; aman Babylon chunga anopnop abolin, akhut chu Chaldea miteho chunga chuding ahi." 
Isaiah48:15 Kei, keimatah mongin kasei ahitai; amachu kakouvin; kahinpuijin, aman alampi akhantousah ding ahi." 
Isaiah48:16 Nanghon neihin naijun lang hichehi ngaijun; atila patnin keiman guhthimin thu kaseipon; phat aumtila patnin hia chun keima kaumin; chule tuhin Pakai Pathen le alhagaovin eisoltai. 
Isaiah48:17 Pakai nalhatdohpao Israel mithengpan hitin aseije, keihi Pakai na Pathen, naphatnadiuva hila, nachenadiu lampia puihoipa chu kahi." 
Isaiah48:18 Vo nanghon kathu peh ho chu nangaiju hitavele! nachung uva chamna vadung banga longa, nachon phatnao twikhanglen kinong bang hitading!" 
Isaiah48:19 Nachilhah-u jong neldi jat phantin, nalaigilgao sonho jong nel bongsilsel bang ding, kamasanga kona aminu kithai mang louding, suhtanga jong umlouheldiu ahi." 
Isaiah48:20 Babylon'a konin potdoh-un, Chaldea mite-a konin jam mangun, hichehi lasah ginnin phongjal unlang, leiset kolkimvel geijin seiphongun, Pakaiyin asoh Jacob chu alhatdohtai tiuvin." 
Isaiah48:21 Aman nelgam jotpaija apuilaijin adangchah pouvin; songpi-a konin amahodin twi alondohsah-in, songpijong akesah-in, twi chu ahung kikhodoh jengin ahi." 
Isaiah48:22 Pakaiyin migiloute dingin chamna himhim aumpoi, ati." 
Isaiah49:1 Vo twikol gamho, kathusei ngaijun; gamlatah-a konin miten ngaijuvin; Pakaiyin naobu-a kona einakouva; kanu oisunga kona kamin anasah sa ahitai." 
Isaiah49:2 Aman chemjam hemtah bangin kakam anasemin; chule aman akhut lima einaselin, thalchang kinot dulin einasemin, alivathei sunga einaselin ahi." 
Isaiah49:3 Kahenga, Vo Israel, nangma kalhacha kaki choi-atna dingpa chu nahi anatin ahi." 
Isaiah49:4 Chuin keiman, mohseh-a tonggima kahitan, kathahatna imacha hiloule mohseh-a kaman ahitai. Hitajongle kathutana chu Pakai toh um ahin, kathilbol chu Pathen to uma ahi, kati." 
Isaiah49:5 Chule tun Israel chu anakikhom khomlou hitajongleu, naobu-a patna alhacha-a pangdinga einagonga, Jacob chu ahenga hinlepuikit dinga, Pakai mitmu-a keima loupinalai dingle ka Pathen chu kathahat hidinga einagongpa Pakai chun aseije." 
Isaiah49:6 Chuin aman Jacob phungho tungdoh dingle, Israel vetupma lepehkit dinga kalhacha-a napanding chu thil jangkhaicha ahi, ati. Leiset kolmong geija nangma kahuhhing nahiding, chidang namdangte salvahna dingjong kapeh ding nahi." 
Isaiah49:7 Tahsan umtah Israel lhatdohpale, amithengpa, mite i-sah loupa, namtin hotbolpa, vaipoho sohpa henga chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Tahsan umtah Pakai Israel mithengpa aman nang nalhendingjehin: lenghon amuteng thoudohdiu, leng chapatenjong chibai abohdiu ahi." 
Isaiah49:8 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, lahphat chan natao nao kangaijin, huhhing nikhon nangma kapanpin, chule nangma nahongbit ningting, Leiset tungdoh dingle goulo kamhelsa gam lodinga miho thulhun hidinga kapeh ding nahin;" 
Isaiah49:9 chutia chu sohchangho jah-a potdoh taovin, chule muthima umho jah-a hungkilahdoh un natiding ahi. Lamdunga kivah-untin, munsang jouse-a alhatlenao mun umding ahi." 
Isaiah49:10 Amaho gilkel dangchah talou ding; alumle nisanjong akahnat loudiu ahi. Ajehchu ahepi paovin puihoi jintin, twisam putna pang dunga apuilediu ahi." 
Isaiah49:11 Chule kamolsang jouse lampin semingting, kalamlhongho kadop sang ding ahi." 
Isaiah49:12 Veovin, hiche hohi gamlatah-a kona hungdiu ahin; chule vetan, hiche hohi sahlamle lhumlama kon; chule hiche hohi Sinim gama kona hungdiu ahi." 
Isaiah49:13 Vo vanho; kipala saovin; Vo leiset, thanomin umin; Vo molsang ho awthong jeju-a lasahnan pohjah-un. Ajehchu Pakaiyin amite alhamonin, akibol gentheinao chunga ahepiding ahi." 
Isaiah49:14 Ahinla Zion'in, Pakaiyin eidalhan, ka Pakaiyin eisumil tai, ati." 
Isaiah49:15 Numei jin anao noicheplai asuhmiljouva, ataijola peng achapa lainat louva umthei dingham? henge, amahon sumil theijunte, hijengjongle kenvang nangma kasuhmil louhel ding nahi." 
Isaiah49:16 Ven, kakhut phang chunga kasemdoh nahin, nakulbang ho kamasanga aumjinge." 
Isaiah49:17 Nachate chu ki kino uvintin; nasumanghole panabeija nakoi houchu nanga kona potdoh ding ahiuve. 
Isaiah49:18 Khoda-in lang nakimvel vetemin, hiteho jousehi akikhom khomun, nahenga ahunguve. Pakaiyin keima kahingjingnai, nangin amaho jousehi thonlouhela kijepna-a naneiding, mounu kijep banga nachunga kijepna-a nanei ding ahi, ati." 
Isaiah49:19 Ajehchu mun ongle namun kamhelsa ho, chule namanthah nao gamhochu tu-a chengho dinga chu neo behseh ding ahin, chule naval lhum hou chu gamlatah-a kitolmangdiu ahitai." 
Isaiah49:20 Adangho namansah nunga nacha nahin dingho chun, munhi kadingin aneubehseh-in, kachenna ding mun neipen tia nanakhanga aseikitdiu ahi." 
Isaiah49:21 Chuteng nangin nalungsunga, kon eihinpeh hitantem? Kachatela kachan joutan, akamhela kahin, sohchanga suhle tunga kichonlea kahilouham? vetan, kachang seh-a eikidalha-a, amahohi hoija anaum hiuvintem? natiding ahi." 
Isaiah49:22 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, veuvin chidang namdangho chunga kakhut kadopsanga, miho dinga kaponlap katundoh ding; chule amahon nachapateo akhutnuva ahinpuijuva, alenguva nachanuteu ahinkitot dingu ahi." 
Isaiah49:23 Lengho chu nadontup uva pate hung hiuvintin, chule lengnu ho jong chu nadontup nu-u hiding ahiuve. Amaho na-ang uva amaiju tolam ngatna bohkhup uva, nakenga leivui ahinle ngimdiu ahin; chutia chu keihi Pakai chu kahi ti nahet jengding ahi. Ajehchu keima eingah ho chu jahcha louhel ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah49:24 Mihatpa-a kona anehban kilahpeh theija, ahiloule dandih-a gal hinga kikai chu, sohchathei ding ham?" 
Isaiah49:25 Ahivangin Pakaiyin hitin aseije, sohchang mihat tahho jeng jong kilamanga, gin umtah nehban jong kisalhah peh ding ahi. Ajehchu nangma kinelpipa chu kinelping ting, nachate chu kahuhhing ding ahi." 
Isaiah49:26 Chule nangma sugenthei hochu amaho tahsa tah-a kavah-a, ju lhumtah banga amaho thisantah chu adonkhamdiu ahi. Chutengle tahsa hing jousen keima Pakai chu nahuhhingpa, nalhatdohpa le Jacob mihatpa kahi ahetdiu ahi." 
Isaiah50:1 Pakaiyin hitin, ati, nanu kadana lekha chu hoija umtam? ahiloule kalei-bapa koipen koma kajohdoh nahiuvem, veuvin nakhangitlou jeh uva nanghole naho nakijoh uva, chule nasuhkhelnao jeh-a nanu kida ahi." 
Isaiah50:2 Ipijeh-a kahunga chu pasal khatcha naum lou uham? Kakouva chu eihouding khatcha umlou ham? Kakhut hin mi ahuhdoh lelhel nadinga kisuchoma ham? veuvin, twipi kaphoh-in agohelin, vadungho chu gamthip kasosah-in, anga'u hochu twi beijeh-in a-uijin, dang chah-in athiuvin ahi." 
Isaiah50:3 Keiman vanho avomin kajemin, akhunaovin khaodip pon kaseme." 
Isaiah50:4 Athachol ho chu aphatcha thukhat seipehje kahetnadin Pakai Pathen'in seithemna lei eipen; jingseh-in eisukhangin mithem banga ngainadin kakol avansah-e. 
Isaiah50:5 Pakai Pathen'in kakol eihonpeh in, kahuhelpon, kakinung heikit tahih helle." 
Isaiah50:6 Katungtun mivoho kadopeh-in, sambot ho kabengteni kadopeh-in, jachatnale chil setkhuma konin kamai kaselpoi." 
Isaiah50:7 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in eipanpin tin, hijeh chun kisudong ponge. Hijeh chun kamaihi meituh song bangin kadon, jachatna kato louding chu kahei." 
Isaiah50:8 Them eichan sahpan einaije, koiham eikinelpi dinga? Eiho dingkhomu hite; koiham eikidoupia chu? kahenga hungnai hen." 
Isaiah50:9 Vetan, Pakai Pathen'in eipanpi ding ahin; themmo eichan dinga amachu koiham? Veovin, amaho abonuva pon banga chuldiu ahin, ngetnin aneh chaidiu ahi." 
Isaiah50:10 Nalah uva Pakai ginga alhachapa thusei jopma, muthima vahlea, vah himhim neilouva chu koiham? Pakai minchu tahsan henlang, a-Pathen chunga kingaihen." 
Isaiah50:11 Meisel de-a meisia kiumkim vel nangho jouse; nameivah-ule nameisel detnu mei sipahlah-a chun vahleuvin. Hichehi kakhutna namudingu chu ahin, lungkham tah a nalup dingu ahi." 
Isaiah51:1 Chonphatna nung juija Pakai holte nanghon kathu ngaijun; nakikhendoh nao songpile nakilaidoh nao kokhuh lamchu veuvin. 
Isaiah51:2 Napao Abraham le nahingu Sarah lam veuvin; ajehchu achang seh-in kakouvin, phatthei kanaboh-in kapunsah-e." 
Isaiah51:3 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Zion lhamon nintin, amunthip jouse lhamon inte, agamthip chu Eden bangin semintin, chule aneldigam chu Pakai hon bangin semintin, asunga chu kipanale thanopna, thangvahnale la ngei gin kijading ahi." 
Isaiah51:4 Kamiten kathu ngaijunlang, Vo kanam mite nanakhang hinsung uvin; ajehchu keija kona danthu hung kondoh-a, mitin salvah dinga kathutan na chu kakicholdo sah ding ahi." 
Isaiah51:5 Kachon phatna nikho ahungnaijin; kahuh hingna apotdohtan, kabantenin mitin thu atanding; twikol gamhon eingah untin, kabanna hi atahsan nao angap dingu ahi." 
Isaiah51:6 Van lama khodah-un lang, chule noilam leiset chung hinveuvin; ajehchu vanho chu meikhu banga jam manga, leiset hi ponsil banga chulding ahin, chutobanga chu asunga chengho thidiu ahin, kahuh hingna vang atonsotna umjinga, kachon phatna kisumang louding ahi." 
Isaiah51:7 Chonphatna he-a alunga kadanthu he-ah nanghon kathusei ngaijun; mihem seiset ginghih-un, ahousetnau jong kicha hih helun." 
Isaiah51:8 Ajehchu ponsil banga amaho ngetnin aneh uva, samul banga lungin anehdiu ahin, kachon phatna vang a-imatih chana uma, kahuh hingna akhang akhanga umding ahi." 
Isaiah51:9 O Pakai banjang; Khangin, khangin, thahat na-in kivonin; masanglai nikhole khanglui laija bangin khangin, Rahab sat na, Dragon mavo-a chu nang nahilouham?" 
Isaiah51:10 Nanghi twipi thuh nasatah twikhanglen kansah-a, lhatdohsate galkai nadinga twikhanglen thuhtah laija lampi sema chu nahilouham?" 
Isaiah51:11 Hijeh-a chu Pakai lhatdohsate hungkileuva, lasahpuma Zion lama hungdiu, aluchung uva tonsot kipana chu umding ahi; amaho kipanale thanopna chang-un tin; lungkhamnale lunghemna jam mangding ahitai." 
Isaiah51:12 Keima, keimong monghi nangho lhamon na chu kahin; athiding mihem, hampa bangbepma kisem mihem chapa kichading koi nahiuvam;" 
Isaiah51:13 Vanho kijaldoh sah-a, leiset bul phutdetpa, nasempa Pakai na Pathen sumila, suhmang dinga nanago jing misugenthei pa lungsatna jeh-a niseh-a tanglouva kichajing nang koi nahim? Misugenthei pa lungsatna chu hoiba hitam?" 
Isaiah51:14 Kokhuh sunga athilouna dingle anehjong alhahsap lounadingin, gal hinga kikaimang chu lhadoh-a aumna din ama akinon ahi."
