Isaiah51:15 Ahinla akinong ginglellul twipi homkhenpa Pakai na Pathen chu kahin, kamin janelho Pakai ahi." 
Isaiah51:16 Vanho kaphudetna, leiset bul kavui detna, Zion henga nangma kamite nahi kati theina din, kathuho nakam sunga kakhumin, kakhut limmin nangma kakhu khumin ahi." 
Isaiah51:17 Pakai khutna alungsatna khona dona, vo Jerusalem, khangin, khangin, dingdoh-in, kichat jeh-a kitihona khona kon aningkai geijin nadonin, nadon kang hele." 
Isaiah51:18 Amanun ahindoh chapa jouse lah-a, amanu puihoi ding khatcha aumpoi; ahin vahdoh chapaho jouse lah-a jong akhutna akaile khatcha aumpoi." 
Isaiah51:19 Hiche thilni hin nahin lhunkhum ding ahin, kon nalungkham peh tantem? Gamnale suhmangna, kel lhahna le chemjam; koijin nang nalhamon tan tem?" 
Isaiah51:20 Nachapate alhadah taovin, gam bongchal len thanga oh bangin khosung lamlen laija alumchap mun; amaho Pakai lungsatnale na Pathen'u phosalna dimset changa ahitaove." 
Isaiah51:21 Hijeh chun tun lengpitheija hilouva, suhgentheina-a khampan hichehi ngaijin." 
Isaiah51:22 Pakai na Pakai, amite thu seitohpeh-a na Pathen chun hitin ati, vetan, lamvaina khonle, kalungsatna ningkai khontah chu nakhutna konin kaladohtai; nadonkit tahlouhel ding ahitai, ati." 
Isaiah51:23 Ahinla nahinna jah-a, nachunga kache theinadiuvin bohkhupmin, tia nasugenthei ho khutna chun tollhang bangle kholai lamlen bangin nachunga lamjot ho dingin natahsa nadotan ahi." 
Isaiah52:1 Khangin, khangin, vo Zion nathahatnin kivonin; Vo Jerusalem, khopitheng navon hoijin kivonin; ajehchu tua pat cheptanloule aboh nasunga lutlou hel ding ahitai." 
Isaiah52:2 Vo Jerusalem, leivuija konin kithing ngimin, thoudoh-in lang, toulhan. Vo sohchang Zion chanu, nangonga nakihenna khaoho-a konin kisut lhamin." 
Isaiah52:3 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin ati, ima hilouhel dinga kijoh nahiuvin, sumbeija kilhatdoh ding nahiuve, ati." 
Isaiah52:4 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin ati, masangin kamite Egypt'a khopemdin anachesuh uvin; ajeh beijin Assyria ten abol gentheijun ahi." 
Isaiah52:5 Hijeh chun tun Pakaiyin aseitai, hikoma hi keiman ipi kanei tah-em? Kamitela ima hilouhelin apuimang taovin, achunguva vaipoten la apensahsah uvin, chule ka min jong niseh-in tanglouhelin ataitom jinguve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah52:6 Hijeh chun kamiten keima min heovintin; hicheni chule amahon thuseipa chu keima kahi hetaovinte; veuvin keima kahi, ati." 
Isaiah52:7 Molsang chungho-a kipana thupha pole pa kengphang chu iti hoi hitam? chamna thu phongle; thupha-a kipana thupha pole-a, huhhingna thu phonglea, Zion henga, na Pathen alengchang tai, tia seilepa chu!" 
Isaiah52:8 Khopi ngahhon aw sangtah-a asapdohdiu ahi: thakhat tah-a penga la asahdiu ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin Zion ahinpuikit tengle amitcheh uva akimudiu ahi. 
Isaiah52:9 Jerusalem mun kamhelsa ho thanomun lang, kipa la sakhom un, ajehchu Pakaiyin amite alhamonin Jerusalem alhatdohtai." 
Isaiah52:10 Pakaiyin abantheng chu namtin jouse mitmun agohkeo ahisah-in; chule leiset kolmong jousen i-Pathen nu mihuhhing na amudiu ahi. 
Isaiah52:11 Potdoh-un, potdoh-un, hiche-a konin chedoh-un lang, thilboh tongkha hih-un; alah-a konin potdoh-un, Pakai manchah ho choija nangho kisuthengun." 
Isaiah52:12 Ajehchu kintah-a, napotdoh loudiu, jamtho-a jong nache louheldiu, ajehchu Pakai nama sang uva chentin; Israel Pathen'in nanungu adelding ahi." 
Isaiah52:13 Vetan, kasohpan chingthei tah-in bolintin, ama choi-at le choisanga uma, sangtah-a umding ahi." 
Isaiah52:14 Mitam tah-in adatmou bangin, amaiso mihem dang jouse-a sangin ase-in, chule apendan amelput mihem chapate ngaija sangin suhmelsetnin aumin ahi." 
Isaiah52:15 Chutia chu aman namtin vaipi tamtah athe khuma; ama chungchanga leng hon akamu akisip dingu ahi. Ajehchu akihil khahlouhelu amuva, ajahkhah louhelu jong agelthem dingu ahi." 
Isaiah53:1 Kathulhut nu kon atahsana? Pakai bantha koihenga kilah-am? 
Isaiah53:2 Ajehchu ama amasanga chun hamdong kehthah bangle leigo-a ajung kikhodoh bangin hungkhangdoh-in tin, aman limle melhoina himhim aneipon, ideina diu hoina himhim aumpon ahi." 
Isaiah53:3 Ama chu mihemte nahsahmole paidoh-in aumin; lungdon le lung genthei he mi ahin; eihon ama-a konin imaiju ina selmangun, amachu nahsahmon ana umin, eihonjong ina gelsangdeh pouve." 
Isaiah53:4 Atahbeh-in aman ilungkhamnahou apon, chule ilung gentheinahou apotai, ahinla eihon aki engbol, Pathen vohle sugentheijin ingaitouve." 
Isaiah53:5 Ahinla ama eiho suhkhel jeh-in akimavon, eiho khangitlou jeh-in akisugepmin, eiho lungmona dingin gimbolna chu amachunga achutai. Ama kijepna chun eidamsah taove." 
Isaiah53:6 Eiho ibon chaovin kelngoi bangin ivah mangun, eiho amitakip inop nalam cheh-a ikiheijun, ahin Pakaiyin eiho khangitlouna jouse achunga angamtai." 
Isaiah53:7 Ama akisugen theijin, ama akibolgimtai, ahijeng vangin ama akamkapoi. Ama thadinga kikai kelngoi bangin akaijun, kelngoi amulvouho anga athipbeh bangin chutichun akamkapoi." 
Isaiah53:8 Ama sohchan nale thutan na-a konin akilamang tai. Kon ama khanggui thu asut thei dingham? Ajehchu ama mihing gama kona kisumanga ahitai. Ajehchu kamite suhkhel jeh-a ki-engbola ahitai. 
Isaiah53:9 Aman hunamin ima abolpon, akamin jong lheplhahna thu khatcha aseikhapoi; aman alhankhuh chu migiloute-a toh asemgomin, athi-a chun mihaopa toh aumkhom me." 
Isaiah53:10 Hitajongle suhgep dingchu Pakai lunglam chu ahitan; aman natna athohsahtai. Nangin ahinna chonset thilto-a nasemtengle, aman achilhah kimuntin, anikhoho asaosah ding, Pakai lunglhaina chu akhutna khangtou ding ahitai." 
Isaiah53:11 Aman ahinna thohgimna chu amua, lunglhai ding ahitai. Aman agitlounau apohpeh dingjeh-a kasohdih tah chun ahetna-a mitamtah them achanding ahi." 
Isaiah53:12 Hijeh-a chu keiman amachu milenhotoh chan kahop peh-a, aman mihat ho chu thil kichom akihoppi ding ahi. Ajehchu aman thina geijin ahinna abunglhan ahi. Chutichun ama suhkhel hotoh akisimthatan; mitamtah chonsetna apon, achonkhelho dingin ataopeh-in ahi." 
Isaiah54:1 Vo achinga chaneilou nun kipah-in la san lang, hatah-in samin; naosonat thohkhalou nu nangma, ajehchu jineiho chate sangin achingnu chate atamjoi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah54:2 Napon in mun kehlenin lang, chule nachen detna pon in chungchu kijalsah-in, khen neilouvin nakhao chu saosah-in lang, chule ahenna mol ho chu khendetnin;" 
Isaiah54:3 Ajehchu jetle veija kithejah intin, nachilhah hon chidang namdangte chu louvintin, khopi gamho chu chenna-a aneidiu ahitai." 
Isaiah54:4 Kicha hih-in; ajehchu najachat louding, nakisuhdong louhel ding ahi. Ajehchu naneo laija najachatna nasuhmila, na meithai nahsah louva aumna chu nageldoh kit louhel ding ahitai." 
Isaiah54:5 Ajehchu nasempa chu najipa ahin, janelho Pakai chu amin ahi. Nalhatdohpa chu Israel mithengpa ahin, ama chu leiset pumpi Pathen kitiding ahi." 
Isaiah54:6 Ajehchu akidalha lhagaova lungnatah neogol ji kideitalou numei khat tobanga Pakaiyin nakoukit ahitai, tin na Pathen'in aseije." 
Isaiah54:7 Phat chomcha dinga kadalhahsa nahitan, ahinla hepina lentah-a kakhopkit ding nahi." 
Isaiah54:8 Lungkhamna neochakhat jeh-in mitphehkah louvin nanga kamai kanaselin, ahinla tonsot khotona-a kahepi nahi, tin nalhat doh-a Pakai chun aseije." 
Isaiah54:9 Ajehchu keidin hichu Noah nikho tobang ahi, Ajehchu Noah twi chun leiset achupkit louding ahitai, tia kahahsel bangchun nachunga lunghangkit, phohsal kit taponge tia kaki hahsel ahitai." 
Isaiah54:10 Ajehchu lhangho kitoldoh-a, mol ho kitolmang ding ahin, ahinla kakhotona chu nanga kona kitoldoh louding; kachamna jong nanga kona kichondoh louhel ding ahi, tin, nahepi-a Pakai chun aseije." 
Isaiah54:11 Vo nang bolgenthei khopi hui mutlon lele, lhamong lou, vetan, nasongho chu ajemhoija kaphua, na inbul chu saphir songa kaphu detding ahi." 
Isaiah54:12 Chule nabangkot ho song sandang, chule nakotpiho song santhip, chule nagamgi jouse song hoitah-a kasemding ahi." 
Isaiah54:13 Chule nachate jouse chu Pakai hildoh hidiu, nachate chamna chu nasatah hiding ahitai." 
Isaiah54:14 Chonphatna-a naki phudetna, suhgentheija kona gamlatah nahiding ahi. Ajehchu tijatna-a kona nakichat louding ahi. Ajehchu hichun nahin nailouding ahitai." 
Isaiah54:15 Vetan, amaho kikhom khom teidiu ahin, keija konvang hiloudiu ahi. Nangma douna-a kikhom chanchu nangma vanga lhudiu ahi." 
Isaiah54:16 Vetan, keiman pummeija meihol japma, thihkhengpa anatoh nading manchah kikhendohpa chu kanasem ahin, asumang ding thilsumanghelpa jongchu kanasem ahi." 
Isaiah54:17 Nangma douna-a galmanchah kigon ho chu lolhing louding; chule thutan na-a nangma douva leigui takipchu themmo nachang ding ahi. Hichu Pakai sohte goulo ahin, achonphatnao chu keija ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah55:1 Khaije, adangchah channin twiphung hinjon hen, chule sum neilou chan hungun lang kichoh-un, chule neovin; henge, hungun, lengpitwi le bongnoi sum beija manbeijin hung kichoh-un." 
Isaiah55:2 Ipijeh-a changlhah hilouva sum nasuh manguva? chule van'a louhella natohgim uham? Kaseihi lunglut tah-in ngaijun, nanghon apha chu neuvin, chule nahinnao chu thaona-a chun kipah hen." 
Isaiah55:3 Nanakol-u hinsungun lang kahenga hungun; ngaijun, chutile nahinnao chu hing ding ahi. Chutile David kihepina tahbeh chu naheng uva tonsot kitepna-a kasem ding ahi." 
Isaiah55:4 Vetan, miho dinga hettohsah hidingin amachu kapen, miho dinga lamkainale thuneina amachu kapei." 
Isaiah55:5 Ven, nahetkhahlou namkhat kouvin natin, Pakai Pathen vangle Israel mithengpa jala nangma hekhalou namhochu nahenga hungjam diu ahi. Ajehchu aman nachoi-at ahitai." 
Isaiah55:6 Mutheija aumpetnin Pakai chu hollun, nailama aumpet nin amachu kouvun." 
Isaiah55:7 Migilouvin alampi dalha hen chule chonpha loupan alungngaito dalhahen; Pakai hengle i-Pathen'u henga hung kilehen, chutile hepina changa chamkimtah-a ngaidam hiding ahi." 
Isaiah55:8 Ijeh inem itileh kangaito hohi nangho ngaito ahipon, nalampi hou jong kalampi ahipoi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah55:9 Ajehchu leiset sanga vanho asanjoh bangin, keima lampiho jong nangho lampi ho sangin asangjon, chule keima ngaito hojong nangho ngaito ho sangin asangjoi." 
Isaiah55:10 Ajehchu gotwi le buhbang van'a kona ahunglhah-a, chunglama kilekitlouva, leiset achapnou joh-a thil akedohsah-a chule amumdohsah ahin, muchi thepa muchi-a apeh nadingle, anneh-a hingpa changlhah apehnadinga ahi." 
Isaiah55:11 Kakam sunga kona potdoh thuchu chutiding ahin, hichu agoh-a hungkile louhel ding, kadeichu asuhbulhitna, kasolna thilla chu lolhingjo ding ahi." 
Isaiah55:12 Ajehchu kipah-a kondoh a chamdela nakipuidoh diu, molle lhanghon namasanguva penga la asahdoh jenguva, chule loujaova thingphung jousen khut abehcheh diu ahi." 
Isaiah55:13 Lingthing khella chahthihg kehdoh-a, khao lingnei khella lenmuipah phung kehdoh ding, chule Pakai dinga minphatnale suhtan hi louhel ding tonsotna melchihna ding chu hiding ahi." 
Isaiah56:1 Tonsot Pakaiyin hitin ati, thukitan chu nit uvin lang, adih chu bollun; ajehchu keima mihuhhing na hunglhung loiding ahitai, chule kachon phatna hungkiphong doh ding ahitai." 
Isaiah56:2 Hiche bolpa hi anunmon ahi; mihem chapa hiche tuhchah jingpa; suboh louva cholngah nikho nitjingpa, chule akhut thilse bolna-a kona tuhtang jingpa chu ahi." 
Isaiah56:3 Gamdangmi chapa, Pakai to kijop matsa chun Pakaiyin amite-a konin eichom khomheltai tin seida hen, nukiso jongchun, vetan, keima thinggo kahitai tin seidahen." 
Isaiah56:4 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nukiso keima choldo nikho jouse nitjinga, kalungdeilam kilhenna, chule kakitepna tuhjingpa chu;" 
Isaiah56:5 keiman amahotah chu ka-insungle kakulbang sunga munkhat, chapate le chanute sanga phajohel munkhat le minkhat kapeh ding ahi. Keiman amaho amangkit louheldinga tonsotna umjing ding min kapeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah56:6 Gamdang mi chapate Pakai toh kijopmat ho, ama jenna dingle Pakai min ngailutna dinga, ama soh hidinga, choldoni suhbohlouva nitjinga, chule kakitepna tuhchah chanjong chu;" 
Isaiah56:7 amaho ngei chu kalhangthenga kapuija, kataona insunga kipana kadimsah ding; agovam thiltohoule akithoina houchu ka maicham chunga sanpeh hiding ahi. Ajehchu ka-in chu mijouse dinga taona in kitiding ahi." 
Isaiah56:8 Israel kinodohho chomkhom Pakai Pathen chun aseije, ahenga kichomsaho tailouva, adangho jong ahenga kachom khombe nahlai ding ahi." 
Isaiah56:9 Loujaova gamsaho jousen hungne jouvun; ahije, nangho gam manga gamsaho jousen jong hungneovin." 
Isaiah56:10 Akhongah hou chu mitcho ahiuve, ima heloucheh, abonchauva uicha hamma hamtheilou, mijong haptheilou cheh ahiuvin; lumma ihmunom ahiuve." 
Isaiah56:11 Ahi, amaho chimtih neilou uichalop le hetkhenna neitheilou kelngoiching ahiuvin; abonun achennaova koncheh-in, ama deilam chehle aphat chomna dingcheh akivet taove." 
Isaiah56:12 Amahon, hungun keiman lengpitwi galangting, khamnatheija idimsoh diu ahin, jing jongkhu tuni tobang hintin, nengjocheh ding ahi, atiuve." 
Isaiah57:1 Michonpha amangthah jin, koiman lunga akoipoi. Mihepiho akipui mangin, thilphalou hunglhung dinga kona michonpha kipuimanga ahi, tin koiman agelpoi." 
Isaiah57:2 Ama chamna-a lutnintin: amaho ajalkhun uva choldodiu, ama dihsahna-a lamjotcheh ahiuve." 
Isaiah57:3 Nangho gaothusei them chapate, mijigem le mijong sonho hilama hungnai jun," 
Isaiah57:4 koi douna-a golsehbol nahiuvem? Koi douna-a kamka-a leilha doh-a nahiuvem? Nangho suhkhel neiho chate, mijouho son nahi lou uham?" 
Isaiah57:5 Thing hing phung noi tina milim hotoh Nachon thanghoi juva, phaicham dunga songpi khikeh ho noija naosen ho thatgama nahilou uham?" 
Isaiah57:6 Vachadung song jolpet ho lah-a nachan aumin; amaho, amahotah chu navang chan ahin, amaho hengtah-a chun donding thilto nalhei lhan anneh thilto natohji-e. Hicheho-a hi lhamon na kamu ding ham?" 
Isaiah57:7 Nangin munsangle molsang chunga najalkhun nadon; chulamtah-a chun ganlhaina tohdingin nakaltouve. 
Isaiah57:8 Kot hole khomho nunglama chun naki melchihna natung doh-e; ajehchu keisanga achom nahi chu nangle nangin neikhe doh-in, nakaldoh-e. Nangin najalkhun nakeh lenin amahotoh kitepna nasemin ahi, nangin nagahmu ajalkhun hou chu nangaichan ahi." 
Isaiah57:9 Chule nangma lengpa henga nuding thao nachoijin nachen, nanamtui behseh-in, chule nasottol gamlatah-a nasolin, thikholkhul geijenin naki suneme." 
Isaiah57:10 Nalampi saojeh-in nachol lhehtai, ahinla nangin kinepna aumpoi natidehpoi. Nangin nakhutna hinna nakimutai; hijeh chun nalungkham poi." 
Isaiah57:11 Chule koi nakichat na ahiloule naginna jou nasei hija, keima neigeldoh louva, nalunga jong koilouva nahim? sottah kathipbeh hilou hija neigin louhel ham?" 
Isaiah57:12 Nachon phatna le nanatoh phongdoh inge, ajehchu hicheho chun phatchomsah ponnate." 
Isaiah57:13 Nakatengle naloihon nahuhdoh-u hen; ahinla amaho abonuva huijin alhohmang gamuva, mohseh-a alenmang pidiu, ahinla atahsan keija ngampan bou gamsung chu aneija, kalhangtheng chu aloding ahi." 
Isaiah57:14 Chule sepsangun, sepsangun, lampichu semtoh-un, kamite-a konin kipalna bul ladoh-un tinte." 
Isaiah57:15 Ajehchu tonsot munlo-a asangle chungnung pen amin atheng chun, hitin aseije; keima munsangle mun thenga cheng kahi, lhagaova lungnempa suhal dingle, chonset lungkham pipa lung suhhalna dingin, chonset lungkhampipa le lhagaova lungnempa kachen khompi-e." 
Isaiah57:16 Ajehchu tonsotnin doujing pongting, lungjong lunghang jingponge, ajehchu kasemsa lhagaole hinna chu kamasanga hungthon getnunte." 
Isaiah57:17 Ajehchu akhangit louna kilosetna-a chun kana lunghangin, kanavon ahi; kamai kasela kalunghan ahin, amachu alung gotna lampia seingailou hella chepeh-a, ahi." 
Isaiah57:18 Keiman alampiho kamutan, kadamsah ding ahi, ken amajong chu kapuija, amale alhaset piho chu lhamona kapeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah57:19 Keiman kamsung ga chu kasem ahin, gamlatah-a umpale naija umpa henga chamna, chamna umhen, keiman ama kadamsah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah57:20 Ahinla migilouho chu twikhanglen kinong tobang ahiuvin, aumthimbeh louteng bonlhohle bohse jong anuhdohjin ahi." 
Isaiah57:21 Ka Pathen chun migilouho dinga chamna himhim aumpoi ati. 
Isaiah58:1 Khenlou helin ging tah-in kho samin, sumkon bangin na aw sansah-in, kamite suhkhelnale Jacob insung mite chonsetna chu musah-in." 
Isaiah58:2 Chonphatna bolla, a-Pathen chondanho dalhakhalou namkhat tobangin, amahon nitinin eihol holun, kalampiho hetding anomuve. Amahon thutah chondan ho angeh jiuvin, Pathen hinnai dingjong athanomun ahi." 
Isaiah58:3 Ibolla an ka ngolule neimupeh daova, ibola kahinnao kasuh gentheijule neihetpeh daoham? atiuve. Veuvin, na-anngol niuchun nopsahna naholun, namigoihou jouse nabolseuve." 
Isaiah58:4 Veuvin, nanghon kinahnale kinelnan, chule gitlouna khut tuma kisuhto nan an na ngoluve. Chunglama na aw kijahna dinga, tunia banga hi an na ngol loudingu ahi." 
Isaiah58:5 Keiman kalhen chu hitobang an ngol hi hija ham? mikhatnin ahinkho asuhgentheiding nikho chu hibanghi hia ham? Lekha phaipheng banga alu kun-a, anoija khaodip pon le vut pha chu an ngol kiti theija ham? Chule hichu Pakai dinga santhei nikho hiding hinam?" 
Isaiah58:6 Keiman kanalhen an-ngolchu hitihi hilouham? Khansetna-a kikanho lhaplhah ding, pohgih poho doplhah ding, suhgentheija umho jalensah ding, namkoljon tincheng suhboh dinghi hilouham?" 
Isaiah58:7 Agil kelho nachanglhah nahoppeh-a, genthei inna kon kikaidoh ho na-inna napuilut ding hilouham? asagoh-a um namuteng pon nasilpeh-a, nangma tahsa tobang neiho-a kona nakiselmanglou chu hilouham?" 
Isaiah58:8 Chutengle jingkah bangin navah kikhodoh-in tin, nadamtheina gangtah-in hung kilang doh-intin, nachon phatna namasanga chentin, Pakai loupina chu nanungdal hiding ahi." 
Isaiah58:9 Chuteng nangin kouvin natin, Pakaiyin nahouding, nangin samin natin, aman hikoma kaume atiding ahi. Nangin nalah uva kona namkoljon le khutjunga kikotona, chule pannabei thu kisei nalah manga;" 
Isaiah58:10 Nahinna chu agilkelte henga nabuh lhah-a, akibol gentheiho nalung lhaisah leh, navah chu athimlah-a vahdoh intin, navela muthim jong sunlai bangding ahi." 
Isaiah58:11 Chule Pakaiyin tanglouvin puijin natin, nahinna chu gamgo laija jong lunglhaijintin, naguho athaosah ding: nangma twi kichapnou jing honsung bangin natin, twinah banga atuichu kanglou ding ahi," 
Isaiah58:12 chule nangma-a hidingho chun munsesa luiho chu sephaovintin, khang tamtah-a inbul kiphut chu natundoh ding ahin; nangchu aselai semphapa, chena ding lampiho semphapa nakitiding nahi." 
Isaiah58:13 Nangin nakeng chu cholngah nikho kanitheng ni-a nadeilam bolna dinga kona naheimanga; cholngah nichu kipani nati-a, Pakaiya atheng chu ja-uma nagela, ama najabola, nangma nopna lam bolouva, nangma nopsahna dinglam holouva, nangma thu seilouva na-umle:" 
Isaiah58:14 Pakaiyah kipah-in natin, leichung munsang ho-a chun tousah ingting; napa Jacob gou lo-a chu kavahding nahi. Ajehchu Pakai kamin hichu aseidoh ahitai." 
Isaiah59:1 Veuvin, Pakai khutchun mi ahuhhing joulou dingin akisuchompon; anakhang jong kho ajah theilouna dingin angong hih hele." 
Isaiah59:2 Ahinla nakhansetnao chun nanghole na Pathen'u kikah-a nachomkhenu ahin, nachonset nao chun ajahlouna dinga nangho-a kona amai asel ahibouve." 
Isaiah59:3 Ajehchu nakhut hou thisanna, chule nakhut junghou khansetna-a kisuboh-ah ahitai; namuh-un thujou aseijin, naleigui uvin jong thukaleh jeng asodoh jin ahi." 
Isaiah59:4 Koiman adihtah aseipon, koima thutah dinpi aumpoi. Amahon ahomkeo atahsanun, thujou aseijuve. Amahon umchan phalou avopmun, khansetna ahin jiuve." 
Isaiah59:5 Amahon gulse tui a-opkeuvun, maimom pan akhongjiuve; hiche tui nechanchu athijin, akikhedoh penpen chu gulse-in akeujiuve." 
Isaiah59:6 Amompan ho chu ponsil sohdoh louding, athilbollu chu kihuina anei louheldiu ahi. Athilbol hou khansetna thilbol ahin, hunam thilbol chu akhutnuva um ahi." 
Isaiah59:7 Akengu thuphalou lama alhaijin, amaho thisan sonan akinojiuve. Angaitou chu suhmangna ngaito ahin, alampiuva gamnale manthah na aumme." 
Isaiah59:8 Amahon chamna lampi ahepouvin, achele naova thudihtah aummong mongpoi. Amahon lampikon akisemun, chua che chanchun chamna ahet loudingu ahi." 
Isaiah59:9 Hijeh chun thutah chu eihoa konin agamlan, thudih-in jong eipha joupouve. Eihon khovah ingah-un, ahinla muthim akimui, khovah khelin muthim lah joh-a ivahle taove." 
Isaiah59:10 Keihon mitcho bangin bang kachulun, mit neilou bangin kakimai lele uvin ahi. Janlai bangin sunlai tah-in kakipalun; mithiho bangin mungemsa laitah-a kaum jiuve." 
Isaiah59:11 Vompi bangin kakitum letlut cheh-un, vakhuho bangin lhasetah-in kamao mao-uve, thutanna kangah-un, khatcha aumpoi. Huhhingna kangah-un, keiho-a kona gamlatah ahijoi." 
Isaiah59:12 Ajehchu kakhangit lounao namasanga apungcheh cheh-in, kachonsetnu hin eiphochen jiuvin ahi. Ajehchu suhkhelna hoto kaum khomun, kakhan setnao dolchu kakihetnun ahi;" 
Isaiah59:13 Pakai douna-a chonkhelnale thujouva, ka Pathen uva kona chemangin, suhgenthei nale kidouna thuseijin, jouthu kalunguva kavopmun, kasodoh jiuve." 
Isaiah59:14 Chule thutanna chu akinung chonin, thudih chu gamlatah-a adingtai. Thutah chu lamdunga alhupan, adih chu alut joutapoi." 
Isaiah59:15 Ahi, thutah chu athonjin, aphalouva kona kikangse chu anchah-in apangjitai. Hichu Pakaiyin amun, thudih tanna himhim umlou chun alung phamotan ahi." 
Isaiah59:16 Chuin mi aumlouhel chu amun, midinga taopeh abeihel chu adatmo lheh-e, hijeh chun abantenin huhhingna apohpeh-in; ama chonphatna chun adinsahtai." 
Isaiah59:17 Hichechun aman chonphatna ompho bangin akivonin, alua huhhingna lukhuh akhuh-in, phulahna ponin akivonin, tompanna chu sangkhol chollin aki ah-e." 
Isaiah59:18 Anatoh-u dungjuijin kibang tah-in lethuh unte, akidoupiho chu lungsat na-in, amelmate lethuh inte, twikol gamhojong lethuhna-in lethuh inte." 
Isaiah59:19 Kichaovintin, chutia chun amahon lhumlama konin Pakai minchu, chule nisolama kona aloupisah diu ahi. Melma chu twisoh banga ahung kondoh tengle chuche douna-a Pakai lhagao chun ponlap khat atundoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah59:20 Chule lhatdampu chu Zion huhdoh dingle Jacob sunga suhkhelna-a kona kilete henga hungding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah59:21 Keidin vang hiche hi amahotoh kakitepna ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Nachunga um kalhagao chule nakamsunga kathuho chu, nachilhahte kama konle nachilhahte chilhahte kama kona jong tua pat atonsot ageija potdoh louding ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah60:1 Thoudoh inlang Salvah tan; ajehchu navah chu ahunge, Pakai loupi chu nachunga ahungsohtai." 
Isaiah60:2 Ajehchu ven, muthimin leiset ahinkhu-a, muthim lhangkhal in amite ahinkhu ding; hijongle nachunga Pakai chu hungsohdoh-intin, aloupina chu nachunga hungkilang ding ahi." 
Isaiah60:3 Chule chidang namdangte chu navah-a hungun tin, chule lengho navah dohna vah-em lama hungdiu ahi." 
Isaiah60:4 Khodah inlang vekimvel temin, chule vechenin; akichom khomun, nahenga ahunguve. Nachapate gamlatah-a konin hunguntin, nachanute chu nakoma kijending ahiuve." 
Isaiah60:5 Chuteng nangin munatin, hicheho chu thakhatnin hungsoh doh inte. Chule nalungsung kicha-a, suhjaova umding ahi. Ajehchu twikhanglen ninglhina chu nahenga hungding, chidang namdangte hatna chun nahinphah ding ahi." 
Isaiah60:6 Sangongsao tamtah le, Midian le Ephah gam sangongsao golbepho chun nahinlonvuh ding ahin; abonuva Sheba-a kona hungdiu ahin, amahon sanale gimnamtui ahinchoidiu; abonuva Pakai loupina chu atahlangdiu ahi." 
Isaiah60:7 Kedar te gancha honho jouse nahenga hung kichom khomuntin; Nebaioth kelngoichal hon najendiu ahi. Amahochu ka-maicham chunga santhei doltah-a hungtou uva, chule ka loupina in chu kachoi-at ding ahi." 
Isaiah60:8 Meilhang banga lengle-a, vakhuho banga abangkot dunguva lengle-a hichehohi koi hiuvaham?" 
Isaiah60:9 Aman loupina-a nachoi-at tahjeh-in, Pakai na Pathen mindingle, Israel mithengpa ding jala nachapate chu adangka hou le asana houtoh gamlatah-a kona puidinga, thonlouhela twikol gamhon einga dingu ahin, Tarshish konglen ho chu masapen dingu ahi." 
Isaiah60:10 Chule gamdangmi chapaten nakul banghou hinsa doh-uvintin, chule alenghouvin jong nangma najendiu ahitai. Ajehchu kalunghana-a kajep nahin, hijeng jongle khohsah na-a nachunga kanahepi nahi." 
Isaiah60:11 Hijeh chun miten chidang namdangte thaneina chu nahenga ahinpoh lutnuva, alenghou ahinpui theina diuvin nakotpiho tanglouvin kihong intin, sunle jana kikhah louhel ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah60:12 Ajehchu nangma jenlou ding nam le lenggam chu mangthah diu ahin; henge, hiche namho chu mahthah helding ahiuve." 
Isaiah60:13 Kamun theng jephoina dinga Lebanon loupina chu nahenga hunglhunga, chahthing, phanthing, meila thingho kehkhoma, kakeng ngapna munchu loupina-a kaki choi-atna ding ahi." 
Isaiah60:14 Nabolgenthei ho chapate nahenga kun uva, i-nasahlouho jousechu nakengto noija hungkun uva chibai nabohdiu ahi. Amahon Pakai khopi Israel mithengpa Zion chu nangma nahi, atidiu ahi." 
Isaiah60:15 Koiman nahin jotpa lou khopma dalhahle hotna nana um ahin, tonsot chungnunna khangtamtah kipana-a kasemding nahi." 
Isaiah60:16 Nangin chidang namdangte noitwi jong nachepma, lengho noijong nachep ding ahi. Nangin keima Pakai chu nahuhhingpa le nalhatdohpa Jacob mihatpa kahichu nahetding ahi," 
Isaiah60:17 keiman sum-eng khela sana, thih khela dangka, thing khela sum-eng chule songho khela thih kahinpohlutpeh-a, navaipo te jong chamna kapeh-a, navaihom te chonphatna kapeh ding ahi." 
Isaiah60:18 Nagamsunga thuse kija louding, chule nagamgi sunga gamna le suhmangna kijalouhel ding ahitai. Nangin nakulbang ho chu huhhingna ahin, nakotpiho chu pachatna ahi, nahin tiding ahi." 
Isaiah60:19 Sun teng nisa chu navah-a pangchom talouva, vahdinga lhathah-in jong vah napehchom louding ahitai. Ahinla Pakai chu natonsot vah leh na Pathen loupina-a pangding ahitai." 
Isaiah60:20 Na nisa lhumtalouhel ding, na lhathah mangtalouhel ding ahi. Ajehchu Pakai chu natonsot vah hija, nalunghemna nikhoho kichaisoh ding ahitai." 
Isaiah60:21 Namite jouse michonpha hiuvintin, atonsotna gamsung alodingu ahin, choi-atna kaum theina dinga amahochu kathingphu bah kakhutsoh chu hiuva ahi." 
Isaiah60:22 Lhom chakhat chu sangkhat hungsoh intin, aneucha khat chu nam hattah khat hunghi ding ahi. Keima Pakaiyin aphatcha kalhunsah loiding ahi." 
Isaiah61:1 Pakai Pathen lhagao chu kachunga aume; ajehchu Pakaiyin milung nengte henga kipana thupha seiphong dinga thao einu ahin; lungna teho suhdampeh dinga eisol ahi, sohchangte henga chamlen nathu lhangsam ding, chule sohchang ho henga songkul kihondoh thu hillhang dinga eisol ahin," 
Isaiah61:2 Pakai santhei kumle, i Pathen'u phulah nikho hillhanga, alunghemte jouse lhamonsah dinga;" 
Isaiah61:3 Zion'a lunghemte henga lhamonsahna, vut khella hoina, lunghemna khella kipana thaotwi, lhagao pohgih khella pachatna ponsil pe dinga, hitia chu amaho Pathen thingphu, chonphatna thingphung tia akikouna diu, hitia chu ama choi-atna amutheina dinga eihinsol ahi." 
Isaiah61:4 Chule amahon agamlui sesao asah phatnuva, masanga akamhelsa atundoh kitdiu, chule khopi gamsaho khangtamtah-a kamhelsa asemphat dingu ahi." 
Isaiah61:5 Chule gamdangmi hung kipatdoh uva nakelngoi honnu avah uva, gamdangmi chapate chu nalou kaijule nalengpilei lhouvuva hungpang ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah61:6 Ahinla nangho Pakai thempuho nakisah uva, mihon Pathen kinbolho natidiu ahin; nanghon chidang namdangte haona naneh uva, aloupinao chu nakisonpi diu ahi." 
Isaiah61:7 Najachat nao khella ajatni namudiu, chule lungnoh phah khella achanuva kipahdiu ahin, hijeh-a chu agamsung uva chu chan nijen alodiu, achunguva tonsot kipana umding ahi." 
Isaiah61:8 Ajehchu Pakai keima hin thutah kangailun, govam thilto dinga thil kichom kimangcha kathen; chule dihtah-a anatoh-u lamkai jingting, amahotoh tonsot kitepna kasemding ahi." 
Isaiah61:9 Chule achilhahteu chu chidang namdangte lah-a hetna uma, chule achateu chu mipite lah-a hetdoh-a umdingu ahi. Amaho mujousen amaho ahetkhendiu, hitia chu Pakai phatthei boh chilhahte hidiu ahi." 
Isaiah61:10 Keima Pakaiya hapan kipah ingting, kahinna ka Pathen'a kipah inte. Ajehchu aman huhhingna pon eisilpehtan, moulang akijep bangle, mounu sana vona akivon bangin aman chonphatna ponlenin eihuije." 
Isaiah61:11 Ajehchu leisetnin apahmum ahinsodoh bangle, honin asunga thil kituho adondohsah banga, hitia chu Pakai Pathen'in chonphatna le vahchoina namjouse masanga ahinsepdoh ding ahi." 
Isaiah62:1 Ajehchu chonphatna chu vah banga asodoh-a, huhhingna chu meivah banga akondoh masangsen, Zion jal-in umthimbeh pongting, chule Jerusalem jallin cholnga ponge." 
Isaiah62:2 Chule chidang namdang ten nachon phatna, leng jousen naloupina amuteidiu, chule nangma Pakai kama kisah minthah khatna nakikou ding ahi." 
Isaiah62:3 Nangma Pakai khutna loupina lal lukhuh leh, na Pathen khutna leng lukhuh jong nahi ding ahi." 
Isaiah62:4 Nangma akidalha naki tikit talou ding, nagam jong agohkeo kitikit talouhel ding ahi. Ahinla nangma Hephzi-bah nakisah-a, chule nagam Beulah kisah ding ahi. Ajehchu Pakai nangma chunga akipah-in, chule nagam chu hung jineiding ahi." 
Isaiah62:5 Ajehchu gollhangin nungah theng khat akichenpi banga, hitia chu nachapaten nahin kichenpi diu ahin; chule moulang mounu chunga akipa banga hita chu na Pathen nachunga kipahding ahi." 
Isaiah62:6 Vo Jerusalem, nakulbang ho chunga khongah ho kakoije, amahon sunle jana thiptih aneiloudingu, Pakai geldoh jinga nangho thip hih helun." 
Isaiah62:7 Aman Jerusalem atundoh-a, leisetna phatthei chang khatna asemdoh kahsen, kicholdosah hihhelun." 
Isaiah62:8 Pakai chu akhutjetlam leh aban thahatnin akihahseltai. Tahbeh-a nachang chu namelmate an dinga kapehkit tahlou ding ahi, chule gamdang mi chapaten natohgim ga lengpitwi chu adonloudiu ahi." 
Isaiah62:9 Ahinla alhoh khom hon hichu aneh uva, Pakai chu avahchoidiu ahin, chule ahin pokhom hon kathenna in hongsunga adondiu ahi." 
Isaiah62:10 Jotpaijun, kotpiho chu jotpaijun; mipi ho lampi gontohpeh uvin; dipsangun, dipsangun lamlhongpi chu; song hochu loh doh-un, mipidin ponlap khat domsangun." 
Isaiah62:11 Veuvin, vannoi leiset kolmong geijin Pakaiyin ahillhangtai. Nanghon Zion chanu jah-a seijun ven, nahuhhingna ahung lhungtai; vetan, atohphat man le anatoh ahin kengin a-anga aume." 
Isaiah62:12 Chule amahon amaho chu mithengho Pakai lhatdamsate atidiu, chule nangma holdohsa, dalhahlou khopi khat kitiding nahi." 
Isaiah63:1 Edom'a kona hungpa Bozrah-a kona ponsandup kisila hungahi koiham? Akivon na loupi tah, thahatna nasatah banga hunga chu, Keima chonphatna-a thuseija, huhhingna dinga hattah chu kahi." 
Isaiah63:2 Ipidinga naponsil hitisan hija; chule naponsil chu lengpithei chilpa-a tobanga ham? 
Isaiah63:3 Keiman kachangin lengpithei kachillin, miholah-a khatchan eihupoi. Ajehchu amaho chu kalunghana-a kachotpha-a, chule kalungsatna-a kachil ngem ding; athisannu kaponsil ho-a kithekhuma, kavon jouse-a kasuhmat ding ahi." 
Isaiah63:4 Ajeh chu phulahna nikho chu kalunga uma ahin, kalhatdam kum chu ahung lhunge." 
Isaiah63:5 Chuin keiman kaven, eipanpi ding koimacha aumpon, eikai ding ding koimacha aumlou chu kalungdonge: hijeh chun kakhut tah-in keima dingin huhhingna eihin pohpeh-in, kalunghan na chun eikaiding tai." 
Isaiah63:6 Chule kalung hana-in miho chotphang ting, kalunghan na-in amaho khamsah ingting, ahatnau tolsena kanei ding ahi." 
Isaiah63:7 Ichunguva Pakai thilpeh jouse dungjuile, Israel insung mite dinga aphatna nasatah dungjuija, amihepina dungjuija athilpeh ho jalleh, ami lungset phatna ho jallin; keiman Pakai lungset phatna chu seijing ting, Pakai vahchoina thu kaseiding ahi." 
Isaiah63:8 Ajehchu aman aseije, amahohi keima mite mongmong, chule jouloubeh ding chate ahiuve, ati. Chutichun ama amaho huhhingpu anahi." 
Isaiah63:9 Amaho kibol gimna channa ama jong kibolgimji ahin, a-anga um vantil chun amaho ahuhhing tai. Aman angailutna leh akhotona-in amaho chu alhatdoh-in; aman khangluilai jousen amaho avopmin, apolen ahi." 
Isaiah63:10 Ahinla amahon adouvun, alhagao theng chu ana lungphatmosah-ui. Hijeh chun ama amaho melmadin ahung kihei doh-in, amatah-in amaho akisatpitai." 
Isaiah63:11 Chuphatnin aman khanglui lai, Mosi le amite ageldoh-in, twikhanglen'a kona akelngoihon chingpatoh puidohpa chu hoija umham? asunga A-Lhagao Theng khumpeh pachu hoija umtam?" 
Isaiah63:12 Loupitah-a Mosi khut jetlama amaho puilea, tonsot amin aumjing nadinga amasanguva twipi sukhenpa hoilam ham?" 
Isaiah63:13 Amaho akipal louna dinguva gamthip laija sakol banga twi thuhtah laija puigalkai pa hoiba hitam? 
Isaiah63:14 Phaichama gancha kumsuh bangin, Pakai lhagaovin ama acholdosah-in; chutichun namin loupina dingin namite nakaihoijin ahi." 
Isaiah63:15 Van'a konin hinvesuh inlang, chule nathen nale naloupina umna mun'a konin hinven; natompan nale nagunchuna keidinga nalainatnale nahepina hoi hitam? kituhtanga hitaovam?" 
Isaiah63:16 Abraham'in eihe hih-u henlang, Israel'in eihehih jongleu, nangma kapau nahi-e. Vo Pakai nang kapau eilhandampu nahi; naminhi a-itih-a patna umjing ahi." 
Isaiah63:17 Vo Pakai ibolla nalampi ho-a kona nei chekhel sah uva, nangma kakichatna diuva kona neilungtah sah-u ham? nagoulo phungho, nasohte jal-in hungkiletan." 
Isaiah63:18 Nathenna miten hichu chomcha khatbou aneijun; kakidoupi teovin namun thengchu achotpha taove. 
Isaiah63:19 Keiho nanga kahiuvin, amaho chunga vai nahom khapoi; amaho namina kikou ahipouve." 
Isaiah64:1 Molsang jouse chu na-angsunga twi lonna alonlhah suh theina dinga, O nangin van ho chu nasatella, nahung kumlhah nom hileh," 
Isaiah64:2 nakidoupi ho namin hetsahna dingle, na angsunga namtin kithingthinga aumna diuva, meijin akahjola akonbanga, meijin twi asousah bangin!" 
Isaiah64:3 Kakinep pilouvu tijat umtah thil naboltengle, nahung kumlhajin na-angsunga molsang ho alonglha jeng jiuve." 
Isaiah64:4 Ajehchu vannoi kipatna pat nangma tailou Pathen dang, ama ngah ho dinga natonga; mihemin aja khapon, nakhangin jong ajahkhapon, mitnin jong amukhapoi." 
Isaiah64:5 Kipahtah-a uma chonphatna bolpa, nangma hejing puma nalampi jotpa nakimupin, vetan, kachonset jeh-un, nalung ahangin, chuho-a chun kaum jom jingun, huhhing kahidiu ahi." 
Isaiah64:6 Ahinla kabonun thilboh kabang sohkeijun, kachon phatna jouse jong ponsenen bangbou ahin, kabon chaovin nathel bangin kamol lhaovin, kakhanset naovin huibangin eilhohmang gamtaove." 
Isaiah64:7 Chule namin panna nangma kolchah dinga kitilkhouva khatcha aumtapoi, ajehchu keiho-a konin namai naselin; kakhan setnao jeh-in neisumangtaovin ahi." 
Isaiah64:8 Ahinla tun, vo Pakai, nangma kapao nahin; keiho bel kiden na leiset kahiuvin, nangma beldengpa nahi; chule keiho kabonun nang khutsoh jeng kahiuve." 
Isaiah64:9 Vo Pakai, lunghang behseh hih-in, khanset najong tonsotnin geldoh jinghih-in; ngaijin, vetemin, kangeh-u nahi, keiho namite jeng kahiuve." 
Isaiah64:10 Nakhopi thengho gamthip asohgamin, Zion jong gamthip ahin, Jerusalem jong akamheltai." 
Isaiah64:11 Kapu kapa teovin nangma navahchoi nao ka-inthenghou leh ka inhoi houjong meijin akavam gamtan; kathildeihou jouse jong manlou asoh gamtai. 
Isaiah64:12 Vo Pakai, hicheho-a dingahi nangma nakitim ding hinam, nangma nathip beh-a, neisuhgenthei teitei diuham?" 
Isaiah65:1 Kahenga thumlou hon eiholun, eihol louhon eimuve; kamina kikoulouhel nam mite henga chun, neiveuvin, neiveuvin, kati." 
Isaiah65:2 Amaho lunggella achona lampi phalou houva vahlea, doupanho chunga chun kakhut kajah nilhum lhumjin ahi;" 
Isaiah65:3 Tanglouva lung hansah dinga kamaija eilung phatmo sah-a; honsunga kithoija, chehsong maicham chunga gimnamtui hal mite;" 
Isaiah65:4 Lhanho lah-a umdena, songko sung ho-a geh-a, vohsa ne-a, Abel sunguva thet umtah satwi kitunna;" 
Isaiah65:5 Nachang seh-in dingin, neihin nai hih-in; ajehchu keima nang sangin kathengjoi, tiho chu ahiuve. Hicheho chu kanahko homsunga meikhu jing ahiuvin, nilhumkeija kongjing meikou ahiuve." 
Isaiah65:6 Veuvin, hichehi kamasanga akisune: Thipbeh in umponge. Ahinla lethuh ingting, a-opkong sungtah uva kalethuh ding ahi." 
Isaiah65:7 Nakhanset naole napu napateu khansetna agoma, molsang ho chunga gimnamtui ahal uva, lhangho chunga eitaitomu ahin, hijeh-a chu anatoh masah hou chu a-opkong sunguva katepeh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah65:8 Pakaiyin hitin ati, lengpiga lomlah-a kon lengpitwi akimu bangin, mikhat touvin asungahi phattheina aumjeh-in sumang hih-un ati banga: chutobanga chu kasohte jala abonchauva kasuhmang louding ahiuve." 
Isaiah65:9 Chule keiman Jacob'a kona sonkhat, chule Judah'a kona kalhangtheng loding khat ka hinpuidoh ding; chule kamilhen hon hichu lovintin, chua kasohte chengden diu ahi." 
Isaiah65:10 Chule Sharon chu ganchahon dinga hongsung hintin, chule Achor phaicham chu ganchaho dinga kolna mun hiding; ajehchu keima eihola kamite jong chutobang ding ahi." 
Isaiah65:11 Ahinla nangho Pakai dalha-a, Ka molsang theng sumila, chuche sepaihon ho dinga dokhang gonpeh-a, chule chuche mijat ho donding thilpeh bulhitpeh nahiuve." 
Isaiah65:12 Hijeh chun chemjam'a kasimding nahiuvin, athatpa anga nakundiu ahi. Ajehchu kakoupetnin neihou pouvin, kahoupet un neingaipeh pouvin; ahinla kamitmun thilse nabol jouvin, keima deilou joh nakilhen taove." 
Isaiah65:13 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin ati, veuvin, kasohten anehdiu, nangho vang gilkela naum diu; veuvin, kasohten adonuva, nangho vang nadangchah diu ahi. Veuvin, kasohte kipah untin nangho vang najachatdiu ahi." 
Isaiah65:14 Veuvin, kasohten lungsung kipa la saovintin, nangho vang gentheijeh-a nakadiu ahi. Chule lhagao bolsetjeh-a napenjah diu ahi." 
Isaiah65:15 Chule naminu chu kamilhendohpa henga sapsetna-a nadalhah diu ahi. Ajehchu Pakai pathen'in nangma natha-a, asohte minchoma akouding ahi." 
Isaiah65:16 Leisetna amale ama phatthei kiboh-a chu, Pathen dihna-a amale ama phatthei kiboh ding ahin, chule leisetna kihahsela chu Pathen dihna-a kihahsel ding ahi. Ajehchu lungkhamna masaho akisumilin, chule kamitmu-a konin akisel mang taove." 
Isaiah65:17 Ajehchu veuvin, vanho leh leithah kasemin ahi. Chule thilmasa chu kiheta louhel ding, lunga jong langtalouhel ding ahi." 
Isaiah65:18 Ahinla kathilsema chun nangho a-itih-in halna in kipah unlang thanomun; ajehchu veuvin keiman Jerusalem chu kipa na-in, amite chu thanop na-in kasemtai." 
Isaiah65:19 Chule Jerusalem'a chun kipah ingting, chule kamite lah-a jong thanominge, Chule hia chu kana aw gin, penna aw gin jong kijalouding ahitai." 
Isaiah65:20 Chuteng chua chun naosen nikho lhomcha bou hinga leh tehse adamsung hin nikho lhinglouho umta ponte. Ajehchu chapang chu kum jakhatna thiding; ahinla michonse kum jatamtah hingho chu sapset chang hiding ahiuve. 
Isaiah65:21 Amahon inho saovintin, hiho-a chu chengdio, chule amahon lengpihon bolluntin, aga anehdingu ahi." 
Isaiah65:22 In asah uva midang cheng talou ding; thingphung aphu uva midangin aneh tah louding: Ajehchu thingphung khat hinkho banga chu kamite hinkho jong hiding, kalhendohten akhut tah uva atohgao phatsotpi anopsahpidiu ahi." 
Isaiah65:23 Amahon moh-a atohgim loudiu, lungjina dingbepma jong cha ahinloudiu ahi, ajehchu amaho Pakai phattheiboh son ahiuvin, ason apah houtoh umkhoma ahiuve." 
Isaiah65:24 Chule hung hitiding ahi, amahon keima eikou masang uva kahouding, chule thu aseijing nahlai uva jong kajahpai ding ahitai." 
Isaiah65:25 Kamkeile kelngoinou lhakhoma, bongchal banga keipin changpol anehding, leivui chu gulho dinga sa hiding ahi. Kalhangtheng chung jouse-a chu amahon asukhah-u, asuhmangu umlou ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah66:1 Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, vanhi kalaltouna ahin, leihi kakengto ngapna ahi. In nei sahpeh-u chu hoi ham? Kacholdona ding mun hoiba ham?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ajehchu thiljouse chu kakhutna kasema, thiljouse chu uma ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ahivangin hiche migenthei pa, lungsung kisih-a kathua kihot hotpa bouhi kavet ding ahi." 
Isaiah66:3 Bongchal thatpa chu mithat tobang ahin, kelngoinouva kithoipa chu ui ngong sattan tobang ahi; Pathen'a thilpeh toh-a chu vohcha thisan tobang ahin, gimnamtui halpa jong chu milim semthu pathen phattheiboh tobang ahi. Ahi, amahon alampidiu akilhenun, thet umtah ahinaova chun alungu akipah-in ahi." 
Isaiah66:4 Keiman amaho bolgentheina lhenpeh ingting, chule achunguva akichatnao chuhsah inge, ajehchu kakoupetnin khatchan eidonbut pouvin, thu kaseipetnin angaipouve. Ahinla kamitmun thilse bou abollun, kakipana louhelbou akilhenuvin ahi." 
Isaiah66:5 Pakai thuhi ngaijuvin, athua kithing thinga nangho, nasopiu nangho nahotbol houle keima min jeh-a nangho napaidoh hou chun, Pakai chu choisangin umhen tiuhen; ahinla ama nakipa naova hung kilah-in tin, chule amaho jahchajo ding ahiuve." 
Isaiah66:6 Khopi-a kona husagin, houin'a kona husagin chu Pakai husagin ahin, amelmate lethuhna dinga Pakaiyin hiche chu asodoh ahi." 
Isaiah66:7 Naosonat athoh masangin cha ahingin, anat thohgim masangin, naosen pasal khat ahingtai." 
Isaiah66:8 Hitobang chu kon ajahkhah-a, hitobang chu kon amukhah-em? Leiset nikhat sunga kisemdoh-a, namkhat hi khatvei so-a sohjeng theijem? Ajehchu Zion hin naosonat athoh thoh-in achate ahingdoh jenge." 
Isaiah66:9 Pakaiyin cha kahindoh sah-a, kapen lhahsah louding ham? ati. Keiman kasolhah sahji ahin, naobu kakha-ji dingham? tin na Pathen'in aseije." 
Isaiah66:10 Nangho ama ngailu jousen Jerusalem kipa thanop piuvin lang, ama lunghempi nanghon halna-in kipa thanop piuvin." 
Isaiah66:11 Hitia chu nangho ama lunghempi ho jousen alhepbina noitwi chu nachep uva, nachim theina diuva, aloupi chamkimna lhingset chu nakipapi theina dingun, ati." 
Isaiah66:12 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin ati, veuvin, amanu henga chamna vadung long banga, chule chidang namdangte loupina chu twilong banga kalonsah-a, chuteng nachep uva nangho amanu pangteni-a nakipoh uva, akhup chunga nakichop diu ahi." 
Isaiah66:13 Anun alhepbi mikhat banga hitia chu kalhepbiuva, Jerusalem'a lhamonga naum dingu ahitai." 
Isaiah66:14 Hichehi namu tengule nalungu kipah-a, nagu nachang jouse jong hamhing banga nouding, Pakai khutchu asohte lama kilanga, alung himona amelmate chunga kilangding ahi." 
Isaiah66:15 Ajehchu vetan, Pakai chu meikong banga, huipi nung tobanga akangtalai ho puma, alunghana lungsatna sodoh dingle, aphosalna meikong banga hungding ahi." 
Isaiah66:16 Ajehchu Pakaiyin meile achemjama tahsahing jouse thu atanding, chule Pakai mitha chu tamtah hiding ahi." 
Isaiah66:17 Amaho acham chama kisuthenga, chule honsung lailunga thingphung khat nunglama amale ama kisuthenga, vohsa phe thet umtah chule juchasa neho chu mangthah khomdingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah66:18 Ajehchu athilbol houle alung ngaitohou kahenai, keiman namjousele paojouse kakhopkhoma, kaloupina amunadiuva hunglhung ding ahi." 
Isaiah66:19 Chutengle keiman alah uva melchihna khat koijing ting, chuleh alah uva asohcha hochu namtin vaipi keima minthan jakha louhel ho, kaloupina mukha loulaiho: Tarshish lam, Put lam, chule thalthem Lud lam ahin, Tubal leh Javan lam chule gamlatah twikol gamho geija kasolding ahiuve. Chuteng chule amahon chidang namdang lah-a kaloupina aphonjal dingu ahi." 
Isaiah66:20 Chule amahon, Israel chaten Pakai insunga lheng thengsel sunga thilto ahinchoi banguva, nasopiteu jouse Pakai henga thilto toh dinga namtina kona, sakol kangtalai chunga, talaija, sakol pol ho chunga, ganhing gangho chunga ka mol theng Jerusalem'a ahintollut dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah66:21 Chule kenjong alah uva chu thempuho dingle, Levi ho ding kalhen ding ahi, tin, Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah66:22 Van thah hole leithah kasem dingchu kamasanga aumjing bangin, nasonhoule naminu chu umjing ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah66:23 Chule hung hitiding ahi, lha ahungthah-a patna ahungthah kitchan, choldoni-a patna choldoni kit chan mijouse kamasanga keima hou dinga hung dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Isaiah66:24 Chutengle amaho chedoh uva, kachunga chonkhelna neiho thilong chu avetjing dingu ahi. Ajeh chu alungu thilouhel ding, ameikong jong mitlouhel ding, chule amaho tahsa hing jouse dinga kidah umtah hiding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah1:1 Benjamin gamsunga Anathoth'a um thempuho lah-a Hilkiah chapa Jeremiah thuho," 
Jeremiah1:2 Judah te leng Amon chapa Josiah nikholaija alengchan kal kum somle thumna in akoma Pakai thu ahung lhunge. 
Jeremiah1:3 Judah te leng Josiah chapa Jehoiakim nikholai jin jong, Judah te leng Josiah chapa Zedekiah kum somlekhat kichailam gei, Jerusalem gal hinga kikaimang lha nga lhinna geijin hiche thuhi ahung lhungin ahi." 
Jeremiah1:4 Chuin Pakai thu chu kakoma ahung lhungtan," 
Jeremiah1:5 Keiman nangma naobu sunga kasem masanga kanahetsa nahin, naobu-a kona nahung potdoh masanga kanasuh thengsa, chule namtin themgao dinga kapansah nahitai." 
Jeremiah1:6 Chuin keiman, kate, Pakai Pathen! ven, chapang kahi jeh-in, ima kasei theipoi katin ahi." 
Jeremiah1:7 Ahinla Pakai chun, chapang kahi tihih-in, ajehchu keiman nangma kasolna jouse-a nache ding, keiman kathupeh chan naseidoh ding ahi, tin kajah-a aseitai." 
Jeremiah1:8 Chuin aman, amaho mai khu kicha hih-in, ajehchu keiman nang huhdoh dingin kaumpi e, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah1:9 Chuin Pakai chun akhut alhangin, kamuh akhoije. Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, Ven, keiman kathuhohi nakam sungah kakhum luttai, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah1:10 Ven, tunia hi ajungho kaldoh dingle, aloilhu ding, asumang ding, asuchim ding, chule aphutdoh dinga namtin vaipihole lenggam ho chunga kapansah nahitai." 
Jeremiah1:11 Chukalvalin, Pakai thuchu kakoma ahung lhungin, Jeremiah, ipi namu em? eiti e, chuin keiman, Almond thing tenggol khat kamu e, katin ahi." 
Jeremiah1:12 Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, namuchen lheh-e, ajehchu kathu tohdoh-a aumna dinga kavetlhih jing ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah1:13 Chuin Pakai thu chu aniveinan kakoma ahung lhungin, ipi namu em? eiti e, keiman bel soulahlah amai sahlam ngat khat kamui, tin kaseije." 
Jeremiah1:14 Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, sahlama pat thilphalou khat hungpotnintin, gamsunga chengho jouse chunga hung chuding ahi, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah1:15 Ajehchu ven, keiman sahlam lenggam ho jouse kakou ding, amaho hung dingu, Jerusalem lutna kotpiho phungle akimvele kulbangho, chule Judah khopiho jouse douna-a alaltounao atundoh cheh dingu ahi, tin Pakai jin aseije." 
Jeremiah1:16 Chule keiman, keima eidalhah uva pathen dangho houna-a gimnamtui ahalu, chule akhut uva kisemho joh ahou uva, agitlounau chunga thutanlhahna kanei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah1:17 Hijeh chun, nangman nakong kigah-in, chule kipatdoh-in lang, keiman kathupeh jouse chu amaho lah-a seijin, a-angsung uva meidoi hih-in, achutiloule keiman amasanguva nangma kisuh dongsah get inge." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ijeh inam itile, ven, tunin keiman nangmahi kihuh dohna khopi kasema, chule thihkhompi, gamsung pumpi, Judah lengho, pipuiho, thempuho chule agam miteu douna sum-eng kulpi detna kasem nahitai." 
Jeremiah1:19 Amahon nangma nadou diu, hijongle najolou dingu ahi. Ajehchu nangma huhdoh dinga keiman kaumpi nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah2:1 Chukalvalin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah2:2 Chenlang Jerusalem nakhanga gasamin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije; tin seijin; nakhangdon laija namikhotonale, najite nangailutna, lholou gama, gamthipma kanung najuilai chu kahe jinge." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israel chu Pakaiya atheng ahin; Ama puntheina ga masaho anahi. Ama vallhum jouse themo changa; achunguva thilse chuding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah2:4 Vo Jacob insungle Israel insungho jouse, Pakai thuhi ngaitemun," 
Jeremiah2:5 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, napateu vin kagitlouna ipi amu uva, keija kona chegam lhaova, pannabei nung ajuijuva, pannabei soh-u hitam?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Egypt gama kon eipuidoh uva, gamthip nelgam lhunga, nelgamle kokhuhho lah-a, gamgo gama, thina limnoi, koima chekhah lounale mihem chenlouna gam lhungkeija einapuihoi leuva Pakai chu hoijaba um hitam? tin jong aseipouve." 
Jeremiah2:7 Chule keiman nangho ninglhinna gam, chu-a gamga le aphatnaho nedingin kanapuilutnin; ahinla nangho chu-a nalut phatnun kagam nasuboh-un, kagouho chu kidah um nasosah taove." 
Jeremiah2:8 Thempuhon, Pakai chu hoija umtam? atipouve, dan tuhhon keima eiheta pouve. Hou lamkaiho jong kachunga achonkhel taove, chule themgao hon Baal thu aseijun phatchomna bei thilho nung ajuijun ahi." 
Jeremiah2:9 Hijeh achu, Pakai keiman nathu kasei jingding, chule nachateo chateho thu jong kasei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah2:10 Ajehchu Chittim twikol gam chonsoh in lang ven, Kedar geijin mi solin, hitobang thilhi umnam, gunchu tah-in ngaiton." 
Jeremiah2:11 Nam khatnin pathen hilou a-pathen ho akhelkhah uvem? Kamiten vang aphachom lou dingin aloupi nao chu akikhel taove. 
Jeremiah2:12 Vo nangho vanhon, hiche hi datmouvin, tijat umtah in kichauvin, nangho kamhelun, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah2:13 Ajehchu kamiten manthah na thil ni aboluve; amahon hinna twinah keima eidalhaovin, twi veithei louna twikul akilaijuve." 
Jeremiah2:14 Israel chu soh khat ham? In le lou neilou soh hija ham? Ijeh-a ama suhsetna uma hitam? 
Jeremiah2:15 Keipibahkai chalgolin angih-in, ahamin chule agam chu asumangin; akhopiho acheng beihelin ahalvamin ahi." 
Jeremiah2:16 Noph le Tahapanes chaten jong nalu-a lallukhuh asukeh taove. 
Jeremiah2:17 Hichehi Pakai na-Pathen'in lamdunga napuihoile laija ama nadalhah jeh-a nangle nangin nakilamdoh hilouham? 
Jeremiah2:18 Chule nangin Egypt lampia hi Sihor twi dona dinga ipi nabol dingham? Ahiloule vadung twiho donna dinga Assyria lampia hi ipi nabol ding ham? 
Jeremiah2:19 Nangmatah gitlouna chun nangma nasuhdih ding, nanungchona chun nangma naphosal ding ahi, hijeh achu Pakai na-Pathen nadalhah-a, keima ginna nasunga aumlouhi thilphaloule thilkha ahi, ti nahetna namu ding ahi, tin janel Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Jeremiah2:20 Ajehchu sotlaipeh-a na namkoljon kasuhboh-a, naloiho kasuhmangthah ahitai. Chule nangin, keima chonval taponge natin, molsang chung takiple thingphung hing noi takipma numei kijoh bangin navahlen, nakijoh-in ahi." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ahinla keiman lengpigui pha, muchi dihtah-a kanaphu nahi. Achutile ibola keidinga mansuhna, gamlah lengpigui keh naso jeng hitam?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Ajehchu nangma chang-alin kisopmin lang, sabon tamtah mangjong lechun, nakhangitlouna chu kamasanga kimelchih ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Jeremiah2:23 Nangman kakisuboh poi, Baal kajuipoi iti nati ngam ding ham? phaichama nalampi ven, ipi nabol kihetnin, nangmahi mangang tah sangongsang nu acham chama che;" 
Jeremiah2:24 Gamthipma um gamlah sangan anopnopma hui donlele, ahuhlai chu kon asuhkih thei ding ham? Aholte jouse lungkham daohen, alha lhinteng amutei dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah2:25 Kengchot beija naum louna din chule nadang gotlouna din umin, ahinla nangman, Kinepna aumtapoi, Aumtapoi, ajehchu keiman gamdang mi kangailun, anungu kajui ding ahi, tin naseije." 
Jeremiah2:26 Gucha akimatdoh phatle ajachat bangin, Israel insung mite ajahcha taove. Amaho, alenghou, aleng chapatehou, athempuhou chule athemgao houvin," 
Jeremiah2:27 Thingbul jah-a, nangma kapa nahin, song jah-a nangin neihin vahdoh ahi, atiuve. Ajehchu amahon eimaingat louvin einungsun taove. Ahivangin amahon agenthei phattah ule, kipat in, neihuh doh-un, tiuvinte." 
Jeremiah2:28 Ahinla nangman nakisemthu na-pathen ho chu hoija umtaovem? Amaho chu kipatdoh uhen, nagenthei pet uva nahuhdoh jou uvem? ajehchu vo Judah, nakhopi jouse jatna na-pathen ho umsa ahije." 
Jeremiah2:29 Ijeh-a nangho keimatoh kinelkal ihiuvem? Nangho nabonchaovin keima dounan nachonkhel taove, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah2:30 Nachateo chu mohseh-a kajep bep ahitai, kisuhdihnan anei tapouve. Nangho chemjam maman nathemgao hou chu, misugam keipibahkai bangin asugamtan ahi." 
Jeremiah2:31 Vo, khang mite, nangman Pakai thuhi veuvin, Keima Israel dinga gamthiple muthim gam kahi hitam? Ijeh-a kamiten, keihohi pakaiho kahiuve, nahenga kahunglou dingu ahitai, atiu hitam?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nungah in akivona ho asuhmil theija, ahiloule, mouvin avonho asuhmil theijem? Hinla kamiten nikho simjoulou khopmin eisumil taove." 
Jeremiah2:33 Ijeh-a dongma holna-a nalampi nakisuhjol ham? Hijeh chun migilou chu nalampi ho nahiltan ahi. 
Jeremiah2:34 Chule napon mongho-a jong chaga monabei hinnaho thisan beh akimun ahi. Keiman hichehi holguh-a kamu ahipon, phongtah-a kamudoh ahi." 
Jeremiah2:35 Ahinla nangman, themona bei kahi jeh-in alunghana keija konin kiheimang teijinte nati-e. Ven, keima kachonsepoi nati jeh-a nathu katan ding ahi." 
Jeremiah2:36 Nalampi khelna dinga ibola vahle humhal nahim? Assyria-a najachat lheh banga Egypt jeh-a jong najachat ding ahi. 
Jeremiah2:37 Ahi, nakhut naluchunga nangapma, ama-a kona nachedoh ding ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin natahsan ho jouse chu alahlousa ahin, amaho-a chu lolhinna nanei lou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah3:1 Amahon, pasal'in ajinu dahenlang, amanu ama-a konin pot hen, pasal chom khatna hitale, amapa chu amanu koma akilekit dem? Chuche gam chu hatah-a suhboh-a umlou ding ham? atiuve. Ahinla nangma dongma tamtah toh noti'n nakichemin, kahenga nahung kilekit nalaije, tin Pakai jin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:2 Munsang ho lam ngan dah-in, pasal tincheng to nalup louna mun umam? Gamthipma Arab ho bangin, amaho din lam tinna natoulen, najon thanhoi nale nagitlou nan gamsung chu nasuboh tan ahi." 
Jeremiah3:3 Hijeh chun gohong tuhtangin aumtan, go nunung jong ajutapoi; noti dehpang naneijin, jachat ding nanompon ahi." 
Jeremiah3:4 Nangman tu-a patnahi, Hepa, nangma hi kakhangdon laija patna eipuihoija chu nahi, tia neikou louding ham?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Ama a-itih-a lunghang jing ding ham? Akhonna geija akoiding ham? vetan, hihochu naseijin thilse najo chanin naboltan ahi." 
Jeremiah3:6 Leng Josiah nikholaijin Pakai chun keikoma jong anaseijin, Israel kinungchonin abolkhu namu tah-em? Amanu molsang chung jousele thingphung hing noi tina achelen chule akijoh-in ahi." 
Jeremiah3:7 Chuin keiman, amanun hicheho jousehi aboljou phatnin, keilama hungkilen, kanatin ahi. Ahinla ahung kihei dehpoi, mikitahlou asopinu Judah'in hichu amutan ahi." 
Jeremiah3:8 Chule keiman, kinungchon Israel chu jonthanhoi jouse jeh-a kapaidoh-a, kadana thu kapeh jing vangin, mikitahlou asopinu Judah chu kichadeh louva, noti'a akichepjing jong kamun ahi." 
Jeremiah3:9 Chuin ahitin ahi, numei kijoh ahina jalchun gamsung chu asubohtan; chule thingle songhotoh ajongin ahi." 
Jeremiah3:10 Chule hicheng jouse jeh-in tahsanbei asopinu Judah chu alung pumpin kahenga ahung kilehei dehpoi; akilepjo bouvin ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:11 Pakaiyin kajah-a, nungchon Israel chu mikitahlou Judah sangin them akichanjoi, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:12 Chenlang hiche thuho hi sahlam sanga seiphonglen, tin Pakaiyin aseije, Kitahna neilou Israel, hungkinungle kitnin, chule kalunghana nachunga chuhsah taponge. Ajehchu keima mikhoto them kahin, a-itih-in lunghang jing ponge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:13 Nakhangitlouna bou kihetnin, nangma Pakai na Pathen dounan nasukheltai. Chule nalampi ho chu gamchom miho ding thingphung hing noi tina nathe jah-in, keima aw nangai pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:14 Vo, nungchon chate hung kileuvin, ajehchu nangma kakichenpi nahin, keiman nangho khopi khatna kon khat, insung khatna kon ni ladoh ingting, Zion'a kapui ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:15 Keiman kalungtoh kelngoiching ho peuvinge, amahon chihnale hetthemna-a nangho navah dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah3:16 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, chuche nikho laiteng, chuche gama nahung punuva, nahungtam phatnile, amahon Pakai thulhun thingkhong tia aseitah lou dingu, geljong ageldohtah lou dingu, viljong avillou diu chule semphatna jong umtalou ding ahi, tin Pakai chun aseije." 
Jeremiah3:17 Chuphatle Jerusalem chu Pakai laltouna atidiu, namtin jouse chu, Jerusalem'a Pakai mina kikhom dingu, alungu gitlouna ngaitona banga chontalou ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah3:18 Chu nikho chule Judah insung chu Israel insungtoh lhakhom uva, sahlam gama kona hungpot khomdiu, napateu vin alodiuva kapeh gam lamchu ahin jot dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah3:19 Ahinla keiman chate lah-a nangma iti kaumsah-a, namtin janelho gouhoile gam nom chu kapeh ding ham? kanatin ahi. Chule nangin, Hepa tia neikouva, keija kona nakihei mang lou ding ahitai, kanatin ahi." 
Jeremiah3:20 Tahbeh-in mikitahlou in-neipi khat, ajipa-a kon apotdoh bangin, Israel insungin jong keima angsunga gilouna aboltai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah3:21 Israel chate kanale taona munsang ho chunga akijadoh tan ahi, ajehchu amahon alampio akaleh-in akisemun, Pakai a-Pathen'u chu asumil taove." 
Jeremiah3:22 Hung kileuvin, nungchon Israel chate, chutile nanung chon nao suhdampeh tange. Ven, keiho nahenga kahunguve, ajehchu nangma Pakai ka Pathen'u nahi." 
Jeremiah3:23 Adihtah-in, lhang ho-a konle mol tamtah ho-a kona huhhingna mudin kakinem kheluve. Dihtah-in, Pakai ka Pathen uva Israel huhhingna chu aume." 
Jeremiah3:24 Ajehchu kakhang donlai juva pat kapateule achapateu, achanuteu le aganchahon hou chu jachatnan avallhumtan ahi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Eiho jahchan i-umun, lungnoh phahnan eikhu taove. Ajehchu eihole ipateu, ikhangdon uva pat tuni geihin Pakai i-Pathen'u dounan ichonseu vin, Pakai i-Pathen'u awchu inangai tapouve." 
Jeremiah4:1 Pakaiyin, Vo Israel nangma nahung kile-a, kahenga nahunga nalampi kidah umho chu kamitmu-a kona naheidoh leh, nangma kichonle tapon nate, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah4:2 Chule nangman, Pakai chu thutah-a, thutan na-a chule chonphatna-a hinga ahi tia nakihahsel ding ahi. Chutengle namtinho chu ama-a phatthei changa, ama-a loupi ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah4:3 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Judahte le Jerusalem jah-a, hitin ati, naleiset lholouhou chu kal let uvin, chule ling lah-a tu hih-un, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah4:4 Nangho Judah mitele Jerusalem'a chengten Pakaiya nachep tanunlang, nalungsung chep kitanun, ajole nathilbolu phatlou jeh-in, keima kalungsatna phelmit joulouvin mei bangin kongdoh getninte, ati." 
Jeremiah4:5 Judah'a seichoijin lang, Jerusalem'a phongjalin, gamsunga sumkon mut un pengun lang kikhom khomun, khopi kulneiho-a lutnuhite, tiuvin." 
Jeremiah4:6 Zion lama ponlap tahdoh-un, kikhin unlang umden hih-un, ajehchu keiman sahlama kona thilphalou, manthaina kahin pohlut ding ahi." 
Jeremiah4:7 Keipibahkai chu aumna hamthing lah-a konin ahungdoh-in, chule chidang namdangte sumang dingpa ahung pheitai, nagam sungu kamhelsah dingin aumna-a konin akipatdoh tai. Chule nakhopihou chu chenna louva agoh-a umding ahi." 
Jeremiah4:8 Hijeh hin khaodip pon kisilun, kapmun lang pengun, ajehchu Pakai lungsat tijat umtah chu eihoa kona kiheimang lou ahi." 
Jeremiah4:9 Chuni chule hung hiti ding ahi, lengpa le pipuiho lungthim mang intin; thempuhon adatmouva, themgao hon kidang asahdiu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah4:10 Chuin keiman, hekate, Pakai Pathen! nangman hiche mitele Jerusalem hi nalhep tahbeh ahitai. Chamna naneidiu ahi natin, hinlah chemjamin ahinnao chu asunkhatai, katin ahi." 
Jeremiah4:11 Chuchephatle hiche mitele Jerusalem jah-a, gamthip munsang ho-a huigo chu kamite chanu umna lama, ajap ngim dingle athehngim ding hilouhel," 
Jeremiah4:12 chuche munho-a kona huipi hattah kahenga hungnung ding; tu-a jong keiman achunguva thu katanlhah ding ahi, hung kiti ding ahi." 
Jeremiah4:13 Ven, amachu meibol ho banga hung touva, akangtalai chu chimpei bang ding, asakolho chu mulaopi ho sanga gangjo ding ahiuve. Suhmanga um ihi jeh-un, ohe idau ahi!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Vo Jerusalem, huhhing-a naum theina din, gitlouna-a konin nalung sopthengin. Nalung ngaito pannabei ho chu itihchan nasunga umding ham?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ajehchu Dan-a konin awkhatnin aphongdoh-in, Ephraim mola kon suhgentheina hung lhading aphongjale." 
Jeremiah4:16 Namtinho jah-a seilen; veuvin Jerusalem dounan phongdoh-un, gamlatah-a konin galbolho ahungun, Judah khopiho dounan ahinsam uve." 
Jeremiah4:17 Keima eidou jeh uvin, loujao hongho bangin, amahon dounan a-umkimvel taove, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah4:18 Nachonnale nathilbolin hichehohi nachunga ahinsodoh ahin; hichehi nagitlouna ahin, anasalheh jenge, ajehchu hiche hin nalungsung ahinphah ahitai." 
Jeremiah4:19 Vo kalungsung, kalungsung! kalungchang tah anai; kalungphut husa aginge; kigalgin husa sumkon ginchu, vo kahinna, nangin najah jeh-in kaumthim thei tapoi," 
Jeremiah4:20 suhmangna chunga suhmangna in kho asamin, gamsung pumpi chu suhsetnin aumin, photlotnin kaponbuh, mitphet kahin kapondal akisusetai." 
Jeremiah4:21 Itih chanpi hiche ponlap hi kavetna, sumkon gin chu kangai jing ding ham?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Kamitehi angol jeh-un eiheta pouvin, ju-ngolvei chate ahiuvin, hetchet aneipouve. Thilse bolna din achingun, thilpha bolnadin hetna aneipouve." 
Jeremiah4:23 Leiset chu kagahven, vetemin, alimle agong bei ahin; chule vanho chu, amahon vah anei pouve." 
Jeremiah4:24 Molsangho kagahven, vetemun, akihot hotnun, lhang jouse kangchan akitol tolun ahi." 
Jeremiah4:25 Kagahvetle, vetemun, mihem aumtapoi, chungleng vachate jouse alengmang gamtaove." 
Jeremiah4:26 Kagahvetle, vetemun, gamphalai chu gamthip asohtan, khopiho jouse chu Pakai le alungsatna tijat umtah anga chun achimlha gamtan ahi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ajehchu gamsung pumpi chu kamhel ding; achainahel vang kahisah loulai ding ahi, tin Pakai chun aseije." 
Jeremiah4:28 Hiche jeh ahi leiset lunghema, chunga vanho hung thim ding ahiuve; hichehi kaseisa ahijeh-in kalunggot ahin, kisih ponge, nungjong kinung heideh ponge." 
Jeremiah4:29 Sakol chung touhole thal choiho husa-a khopi jamgam diu ahin; hamhing lah-a lutnuva, songpiho chunga kaldiu ahi, khopi tin kidalha-a, chua koimacha cheng lou ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah4:30 Nangma nakisuhmang phatle ipi nabol ding ham? Ponsandup min kivonin lang, sana jemin kijemin lang, namai jempol jongle chun, mohseh-a kihoisah nahiding ahi, nadongma hon nanah sahmo uva, tha dinga nahol diu ahi." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ajehchu numei naosonat thoh tobangle, chanei masapen natthoh pet banga Zion chanu aw kajai, amanu natthoh in apengin, akhut ajahdoh-in, ohe tuhin ada kahitai! ati. Ajehchu tolthat ho jeh-in kahinna alhasamtai, ati." 
Jeremiah5:1 Nangho Jerusalem kholaiho-a suhle tungin lhaijun, tun veuvin lang heuvin, chule munlen ho-a holun, dihtah'a thutan mi khattou namule, keiman amanu ngaidaminge." 
Jeremiah5:2 Chule amahon, Pakai chu ahinge tinama jongleu, jouva kihahsel tahbeh ahiuve." 
Jeremiah5:3 Vo Pakai, thutah chu navet lhihjing hilou ham? Nangin amaho chu najepjin; amahola alunghem pouve; nangin nachaihel tan, ahinla kisuhdihsah ding anomdeh pouve, amaiju songpi sangin atahsah cheh-un, kile ding anompouve." 
Jeremiah5:4 Hijeh achu keiman, hitehohi vaicha tahbeh; mingol tahbeh ahiuve kati ahi. Ajehchu amahon Pakai lampi le a-Pathenu thutanna ahepouve." 
Jeremiah5:5 Keima miloupiho henga chengting, ajah uva thu seijinge; ajehchu amahon Pakai lampi, a-Pathenu thutanlhahna ahethemun, ahinla hiteho hin anamkoljon'u ahehbongun, akikan gomnahou atumtan taove." 
Jeremiah5:6 Hijeh achu gamlah-a keipibahkai'in athaova, nilhah lang sial'in asuhmang diu, lutnu in akhopihou anga-a, chua kona vahdoh tapou chu asitel jeng ding ahije. Ajehchu asuhkhel nao atamin, anungchon nao apungin ahi." 
Jeremiah5:7 Hijeh-achu nangho iti kangaidam diu ham? Nachateovin eidalhaovin, pathen hilouho-ah akihahseluvin; amaho kavahva petnin jonthanhoi abolun, ahon honin notiho ina akikhomun ahi." 
Jeremiah5:8 Amaho jingkah kivahva sakol ho abangun; mitin aheng akom inneipi henga angih lhehlhut-uve. 
Jeremiah5:9 Hitiho jeh-a hi kavil lou dingu ham? Hitobang nam mitehi kahinnan aphulah lou ding ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije. 
Jeremiah5:10 Akulbang hou chunga kaltouvin lang suchimun; achaina helvang hisah hih-un; apal hou lamangun; ajehchu hiho chu Pakaiya ahipouve. 
Jeremiah5:11 Ajehchu Israel le Judah insung chu keima dounan akhangse lheh taove, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah5:12 Amahon Pakai chu ajoulhep mun, amahi ahipoi, ichunguva thilse jong chupontin; chule chemjam ahiloule kellhah jong tohpouhite atiuvin ahi." 
Jeremiah5:13 Chule themgaoho chu hui hungsoh uva, asunguva thu umlou ding ahi; hitia chu amaho kibol ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah5:14 Hijeh chun janel ho Pakai Pathen chun hitin aseije, nanghon hitia nasei jeh-un, veuvin, kathuhohi nakam uva mei kahisah-a, hiche mitehi thing hiuva, meichun akahvam dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ven, vo Israel insung, gamlatah-a kona vaipi khat kahinpoh khumding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ama chu nam hattah ahin, khangluilai nam, a-pauvu jong nahetlou, chule ipi aseiju jong nahethei lou nam hiding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah5:16 Alivatheiju lhankot kihong tobang ahin, amaho mi hattah jeng ahiuve." 
Jeremiah5:17 Chule nachanuteu le nachapateo nehding, nalousohle changlhah chu aneh chaidiu, nakelngoi hon, nagancha hon aneh chaijuva, natheichang phung hou anehjou dingu, natahsan tah-u kul kithodet nakhopihou chu chemjam'a asuhchatvai dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah5:18 Hijengta jongle, chuche nikhoho-a chu kichaihel loulai dingu nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah5:19 Chule Pakai i-Pathen'un ibola hicheho jousehi ichunguva alhunsah ham? tia nasei tengule hung hiti ding ahi, Chuteng amaho chu nadonbutna, nanghon neidalhah uva, nagamsunguva gamchom pathenho nahou banguva chutobanga chu nangho-a hilou gamchom khatna midangho najen diu ahi." 
Jeremiah5:20 Hichehi Jacob insunga phongdoh unlang, Judah gama phongjalun lang, hitin seijun," 
Jeremiah5:21 Tun hichehi ngaijun, lungthimbei, mit neija mulou; nakhang neija jalou; vo mingol ho," 
Jeremiah5:22 neigin louvu ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije. Agalkai joulouna dinga, twipi gamgi dinga, a-itih-a thupeh-a neldi umsahpa keima anga nakithin loudiu ham? Twinong chu kinuh nuh jongle ajolou ding, kitum lullul jongle achunga galkaijou loulai diu ahi." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ahinla hiche mite hin dounale lungchang huhel aneijuvin; dou apanun, achemangji taove." 
Jeremiah5:24 Amahon alungthim uva, go masale go nunung aphatcha eipeuva, eiho dinga chang-at phat ho eikheh tuppeh uva Pakai i-Pathen'u ama chu tun gingtao hite, tinjong aseidoh pouve." 
Jeremiah5:25 Nakhan gitlouna houvin hiche hohi aheimanga, chule nachonsetna houvin nangho-a kona thilpha ho atuhtang ahitai." 
Jeremiah5:26 Ajehchu kamite lah-a, migilouho aumin, thang kam bangin mi achang lhiuvin, thang akamun, mi apojiuve." 
Jeremiah5:27 Bom sung vachaho adimset abangin, a-in jouseu lheplhahna adimsetne, hijeh chun amaho alendoh-un, chule ahaodoh gamtaove." 
Jeremiah5:28 Amaho athaovun, akiti theijun; chule amahon khang gilouho natoh chu akhokhelun, pabeiho ding agelpouve, ahinla aphatheijun, alhasamho chanding agelpeh pouve." 
Jeremiah5:29 Hitiho jeh-a hi kabolgim louding ham? Hitobang nam chungahi kahinna-in phu alah louding ham? tin Pakai chun aseije. 
Jeremiah5:30 Datmo umtahle tijat umtah thilkhat gamsunga hin akiboltai. 
Jeremiah5:31 Themgaoho jouvin agaovun, themputen anopnop mun vai apouvin, kamiten chutia bol ding adeijuve, ajonale ipi nabol diu hitam?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Vo Benjamin chate, Jerusalem lailunga kona jamdoh dingin kikhomun lang, Tekoah'ah sumkon mut un chule Beth-haccerem 'ah melchih mei domsangun. Ajehchu sahlama konin thilphaloule suhmangna lentah khat ahung kilang doh-e." 
Jeremiah6:2 Keiman Zion chanu chu numei hoitah le nouchet toh kakilo sah-e. 
Jeremiah6:3 Kelngoi chingho chu akelngoihon utoh amanu henga hungun tin, amanu doudinga akimvela ponbuh asondiu, amahon ama ama muncheh a avahdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah6:4 Amanutoh kisatdin kigouvin, kipat un, chule sunin kontouvuhite. Ohe! idau ahitai; ajehchu sun achemangin nilhah lam alep heihoi tai." 
Jeremiah6:5 Kipat un, janle cheohitin, aleng inpihou gasuseu hite." 
Jeremiah6:6 Ajehchu janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, thingho phuhlhu uvin lang, Jerusalem dou nadin kul khouvin, hichehi hunama gotna kipeding khopi chu ahi. Amanu apumpia kisugenthei ahi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Twinah in twi asodoh bangin, agitlounaho ahinsodoh jin ahi. Hunamle suhmangna amanu-ah akijadohin, kamasanga hin thohgimnale maha aum jingin ahi." 
Jeremiah6:8 Vo Jerusalem, kichih theijin, ajole nanga konin kahinna kichondoh khantin, chennalou gam akamhel kaso lounadin, gamgoh-in umsah khange." 
Jeremiah6:9 Janel Pakaiyin hitin ati, amahon Israelte amoh-aumsun chu lengpigui khai banga alokhumuva, lengpiga loupan pochaho sunga alelut banga nakhutnu ale kaleh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah6:10 Ajahtheina diuva koi henga kaseija kagihsal dingham? Veuvin, akol aseh-un, ajathei pouve, veuvin, Pakai thu chu isahlou vin aneijun, kipanan anei pouvin ahi." 
Jeremiah6:11 Hijeh chun Pakai lunghanna chun kadimsetnin, kakitim timnan kacholtai. Keiman hichehi pama um chate chungle khangdong kikhomho chunga kabuh lhah ding ahi, ajehchu ajipa ajinu geija, tehse le atehkem geija kikaidoh ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah6:12 A-inhou chu alouhou puma midangho kipe ding ahiuve. Ajehchu gamsunga chengho chunga kakhut kalhandoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah6:13 Ajehchu amaho aneopena pat alenpen geija, amitakip kilosetna lama akipeuvin, chule themgaova pat thempu geijin dihloutah in akimangun ahi." 
Jeremiah6:14 Amahon chamna umlou petnin chamna, chamna atiuvin, amite chanu kisuhkhahna chu adamsah bolluve." 
Jeremiah6:15 Amahon thil thet um abol tengule jahcha jiuvem? achutipoi, ajahcha naisai pouve, amaiju jong asanji poi. Hijeh chun amaho alhu ho lah-a lhu-u vintin; keiman amaho kagasuh gim phat tengle amaho sotlhah-a umdiu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah6:16 Pakai chun hitin aseije, keng lampiho-a dingun lang, veuvin, chule lamluiho chu dongun, hia chun lampha aume, nahinnaova choldona namu dingu ahi. Ahinla amahon, hichea chun chepouving-e, atiuve." 
Jeremiah6:17 Nachung uva khongah ho jong katundohpeh un, sumkon gin chu ngaijun, atiuve. Ahivangin amahon ngaipou vinge, atiuvin ahi." 
Jeremiah6:18 Hijeh chun nangho namtin hon ngaijun, chule vo Houkhom ho, alah uva ipi um ahi, heuvin." 
Jeremiah6:19 Ngaijin, vo leiset, ven, hiche mite chungahi thilphalou, alungputnu ga thilse kalhutkhum ding ahi. Ajehchu amahon kathule kadanthupeh nitlouvin, anotthap jotaove." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ipi ngaitona-a Sheba'a kon bego le gamlatah-a kona kolchu lhum kahenga hung kipolut ham? Nagovam thiltoule naganlhai nao tuitah jong chu kei dinga santhei ahitapoi. 
Jeremiah6:21 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, vetan, hiche mite anga kipal lhuh naho kakoipeh ding, achunga chu pate le chapate lhukhom diu, aheng akomle agolhou mangthah diu ahi." 
Jeremiah6:22 Pakai chun hitin aseije, Veuvin, sahlam gama kon mipi ahung kitolin, leiset ningtin ho-a kona namlentah khat tundoh-a umding ahi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Vo Zion chanu, amahon thal le teng apat diu, mi engse le hepinabei ahiuvin, ahusao twipinong abangin, nangma dounan galsat miho bangin sakol chunga atou vun akigoltoh taove." 
Jeremiah6:24 Aminthanjeu kajataovin, kakhut hou angoilha gamin, hesohnan kadimtauve, chule numei naosonat bangin kanasoh taovin ahi." 
Jeremiah6:25 Loujaova potdoh hih-un, lampia jong vahle hih-un, ajehchu melmate chemjamle tijatna-in ningtin alotai." 
Jeremiah6:26 Vo kamite chanu, khaodip pon kigah-in, vut kinun, chapa changkhat jeh-a lunghem lheh jeng bangin lunghemin, ajehchu michomgampa chu phulou helouva ichunguva hunglhung ding ahi." 
Jeremiah6:27 Nangin alampiu nahetna, napatep theina dinga kamite lah-a inchungsang khatle kulpidet khatna katun nahitai." 
Jeremiah6:28 Amaho abonchauva lunggim umtah chohchi bol, miseisea vahlea, sum engle thih ahiuvin, abonuva misuboh ahiuve." 
Jeremiah6:29 Pumlong teni akatan, ngen chu meijin ahaljol lhan, asuhthengna bul chu amoh junlhah jengin ahi, ajehchu migilouho akipaidohpoi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Amaho chu mihon dangka lahtheilou asahdiu ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin amaho chu adeilou ahitai. 
Jeremiah7:1 Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hung lhung chun, hitin aseije." 
Jeremiah7:2 Pakaiyin kotpi phunga dingin lang, hiche thuhi phongjalin chule seijin, nangho Judah mijouse, Pakai hou dinga hiche kotpi phungho sunga lut hon Pakai thu chu ngaijun." 
Jeremiah7:3 Janelho Pakai, Israelte Pathen chun hitin aseije, nalampiule nanatoh hou kisem phatnun, chule keiman hiche munahin chensah unge." 
Jeremiah7:4 Pakai houin, Pakai houin, Tonsot Pakai houin tia jouthu seiho chu tahsan hih-un;" 
Jeremiah7:5 ajehchu nanghon nalampiu chule nathil bolhou chu apuma nakisem phatnuva, mikhatle aheng akom kah-a thudih nasodoh uva," 
Jeremiah7:6 kholjin mi, pabeiho leh meithaiho sugenthei louva, hiche munahi monabeiho thisan nasodauva, chule nasuse dingu pathen dangho jong najoulhepmuva ahile," 
Jeremiah7:7 chutengle keiman napateu kanapeh nagam hiche munahi atonsot atonsotna kachensah ding nahiuve. 
Jeremiah7:8 Veuvin, phatchomna bei thujouho chu natahsanun ahi." 
Jeremiah7:9 Nanghon guchat, toltha, jouva kihahsel, Baal houna-a gimnamtui hala, nahetlouvu pathen dangho najuijuva," 
Jeremiah7:10 chule naheng uva kamina kivo hiche in'a kamasanga nadin uva, chule thet umhohi bol dinga eikipedoh uva ahitai, nati dingu ham?" 
Jeremiah7:11 kamina kivo hiche inhi nangho mitmu-a michomho kokhuh hitam? Veuvin, hiti chun kamubepme, tin Pakai chun aseije." 
Jeremiah7:12 Ahinla tun nangho kamina kaphudoh masahna Shiloh-a kaumna mun'a chun cheovin, chule kami Israelte gitlou jeh-a chua ipi kanabolem gaveovin." 
Jeremiah7:13 Chule Pakaiyin aseije, nanghon hitobang jousehi naboltah jeh-un, chule matah-a katho-a kanaseipeh vanguva nangaitahlou jeh-un, chule kakou vang uva neina donbut tahlou jeh-un," 
Jeremiah7:14 hijeh achu nanghole napu napateu kanapehna mun, nanghon nana tahsanu, kamina kivo hiche in'a hi Shiloh a kabol tobang chu kabol ding ahi." 
Jeremiah7:15 Keiman nasopiteu Ephraim chilhah apumpia kana paidoh banga nangho jong kamitmu-a kona kapaidoh ding nahiuve. 
Jeremiah7:16 Hijeh chun, hiche mite dingin taohih-in, amaho dingin kho samhih-in, taojong taohih-in, kahenga jong thumpeh hih-in, ajehchu kajahpeh louding nahi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Amahon Judah khopiho sungle Jerusalem lamlen ho-a ipi abolu chu mulou nahiuvem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Chaten thing achomun, paten mei atih-un, numei hon changbong ameh-un van lengnu din changlhah asem gouve, chule keima phin lunghan theinadin pathen dangho din donthei thilto alheilha jiuve." 
Jeremiah7:19 Amahon keima eiphin lunghanu ham? Amaho maiso kisuhmona ding bepma amahole amaho kiphin lunghangu hilouham? tin Pakai chun aseije. 
Jeremiah7:20 Hijeh chun tonsot Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, veuvin, kalunghana hiche mun chunga, mi chunga, sa chunga, thingphung ho leiset gaho chunga kabuh lhah ding, hichun akah-a kasuhmit tahlou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah7:21 Israelte Pathen janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, naganlhai naova govam thiltoho chu kikoijun lang apheho chu neuvin." 
Jeremiah7:22 Ajehchu napateu Egypt'a kona kipuidoh nichun govam thilto le ganlhai thudol amaho jah-a kanaseipon, thupeh jong kananeipon ahi." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ahinla hichehi amaho thu kanapen, ka aw ngaijun chutile keima na Pathen'u hing ting, nangho kamite nahi dingu ahi. Nangho thu kapeh jouse-a chun chonun, chutile nangho dinga phathei ding ahi, katin ahi." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ahinla angai hih-un, anau asungpouve, alung gilou ngaitonaole alunggelun achon jouvin, machon louvin anungchon jotaove." 
Jeremiah7:25 Napateu Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh uva pat tuni geihin kasoh themgao jouse naheng uva, kahinsolin, jingkah matah-in athouvun kasolen," 
Jeremiah7:26 Hinla amahon kathu angai hih-un, anau jong asungpouve, angei apukonun, alouchal uvin, apateu sangin asejouvin ahi." 
Jeremiah7:27 Hijeh chun, nangin ajah uva thu jousehi seijin natin, na ngaipeh loudiu, Nangin amaho kouvin natin, amahon nadonbut louding ahi." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ahinla nangin ajah uva hiti ahi nasei ding ahi, hiche nam mitehi Pakai a-Pathen aw ngailou, hilna jong sangdeh lou nam ahiuve, thutah chu amanghelin, akamuva konin pailhah helin aumtai." 
Jeremiah7:29 Vo Jerusalem, nasam kitanin lang, munsang ho-a kapmin, ajehchu Pakaiyin alunghana khang mitehi adeitapon, adalhatai." 
Jeremiah7:30 Ajehchu Judah chaten kamitmun thilphalou aboluve, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Kamin kivona insung suhbohna dingin, athet umtah hou chu apolut taove." 
Jeremiah7:31 Chule keiman kanathupeh louhel, kalung sunga jong umlouhel, achapateule achanuteu meija gona dingin Hinnom chapa phaicham, Topheth munsang ho asadoh taove." 
Jeremiah7:32 Hijeh chun Tonsot Pakaiyin, veuvin hiche munchu Tophet kiti talou ding, Hinnom chapa phaicham jong kitikitlouva, tolthana phaicham kiti johna ding nikho ahung lhunge, Ajehchu mun abeihel kahse-a Topheth'a kivuigam ding ahiuve, ati." 
Jeremiah7:33 Hiche mite thilongho chu chungleng vachaho, tolla gamsaho an hiding ahi. Chule koimachan amaho anomang lou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah7:34 Chutahle Judah khopiho-a chule Jerusalem lamlen ho-a thanopna aw chule kipana aw, moulang le Mounu aw beisoh ding ahi. Ajehchu gamsung chu kamhel ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah8:1 Hiche phatchule amahon Judah te lengho, leng chapateho, thempuho, themgaoho chule Jerusalem'a chengho guho chu abuikhuh uva kona ahinpoh doh dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah8:2 Chule amaho chu nisa le lhathah chule vanmi janel jouse, amahon anangailutnu, anajenu, anajuijuva, anaholu chule anahouvu ho angsunga ahinthejah dingu ahi. Amaho kigomlou ding, kivuilou ding ahiuve, chule leiset chunga eh-a umding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah8:3 Chule keiman kanodohna mun jouse-a hiche insung phalou sunga umden amohho jouse chun hin sanga thina akilhenjoh dingu ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah8:4 Hiche kalvalchun, nangman amaho jah-a nasei ding ahi, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, amaho lhuva thoudoh talou diu ham? Aman aheimanguva, hung kinungle lou dingu hitam?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Chuti ahile, hiche Jerusalem mitehi ijeh-a tanglouhel nungchon na-a nungchon uva ham? Thujou atuhchah-un, hung kinungle ding anompouve." 
Jeremiah8:6 Keiman kangaijin kajai, ahinla thudih aseipouve. Ipi kabol beh em? atiuvin agitlou naova kona kisih-a koima aumpoi. Sakol galmuna alhailut jeng bangin, mitin ama ama lampia akiheitai." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ahi, van'a leng twiva injong ama phat kitepsa akihetnin, vakhu, vakengsang chule vasilih hon amaho hungna phat akihet uve. Ahivangin, kamiten Pakai thupi tanlhahna dinghi ahepha pouve." 
Jeremiah8:8 Nanghon kachinge, Pakai dan chutoh kaum khomnai, iti natiu ham? Veuvin tahbeh-in, aman hichehi mohseh-a abol ahin, danthupeh sunho lekhamol chu moh ahi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Michingho chu ajahchauvin, alungthoijun, akiman taove, veuvin, amahon Pakai thu chu athetbolun chule amaho-a ipi chihna umem?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Hijeh chun a-inneipi teo midangho kapeh-a chule alouhou chu ahinlo dinghou kapeh ding ahi. Ajehchu amitakip aneopena pat alenpen geijin kilosetna-a akipeuvin, themgaova pat thempu gei sanin jou aboluve." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ajehchu amahon kamite chanu kisuhkhahna chu adamsah boluvin, chamna umlou helin, chamna, chamna, atiuve." 
Jeremiah8:12 Thet umtah thil aboluva chu jahchabeh uvem? Achutipoi, ajahchahih beh uve, amaiju jong asan sinpoi. Hijeh chun alhuho lah-a lhuhtha diu, gotna akipeh phatnule kipailha ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah8:13 Keiman amaho kasuhmang tei ding, lengpiguiho-a aga umlou ding, theichang phungin jong ga neilouva, ado pulding, amaho kapeh thilho chu amaho-a kona kitol mang ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah8:14 Ibola itou thim beh-u ham? Hung kikhomun, kul kikhodet khopiho-a lutnu hite. Ajehchu Pakai douna-a ichonset jeh uva Pakai i-Pathen'un thipchetna eikoijuva, donding thinkha twi eipeh-u ahitai." 
Jeremiah8:15 Lungmona kaholun, ahin thilpha ahungpoi, chule damtheina phat kaholun, veuvin gentheina bou ahi!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Asakolho nahkhon gin Dan'a pat akijan, asepai hat ho kholhah ginin gam pumpi akihottai. Ajehchu amaho ahungun, gamsungle asunga umho jouse, chule khopihole asunga chengho jouse abahgamuve." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ajehchu veuvin, keiman nalah uva, gulho chule suhngoi theilou gulsumho kahin sollutna amahon nachuh dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah8:18 Lungdona-a kona kilhamon kagot teng kalungsung alhoplha jitai. 
Jeremiah8:19 Veuvin, gamlatah-a chengho jeh-a kamite chanu ka awgin khu, Pakai chu Zion'a umlouva hitam? Alengpa asunga umlou hitam? Amahon ipijeh-a semthu milimhole mohthil kidangho-a eiphin lunghangu ham?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Chang-at phat akichaijin, nipi phatla akichaitan, eihola huhhingin i-um tapouve." 
Jeremiah8:21 Kamite chanu kimavo jeh-in mavon kaumin kadup lhatai, lungdona-in eikolchah-in ahi." 
Jeremiah8:22 Gilead gamsunga damna dinga, nuding thingnai lou umlou hitam? Achutile ipijeh-a kamite chanu chu suhdam louva uma hitam?" 
Jeremiah9:1 Ohe, kamite chanu kithajeh hin sunle jana kaka theina din kalu twijeng hihen lang chule kamit tenihi mitlhi luipi sohjeng tavele kati!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Ohe, kamite dalha-a, amaho-a kon kapotdoh theina dinga gamthipma chele vahle ho gebuh khat kanei hitavele! ajehchu abonchauva mijong ngen, misumang kisukhom bou ahiuve."
