Jeremiah9:3 Chule amahon jou seinan athalpiu bangin aleiju amangun, ahinla leiset chunga thutah dingin ahangsan pouve. Ajehchu amahon aphalouva konin aphalou asodohun, keima eiheta pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mitin aheng akoma chingtheihen, asopi tahsan hih hen, ajehchu sopi takipmin ahinson manghel ding, henglekom chu misumin se-a vahle ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah9:5 Amaho mitinin ahenglekom cheh alheplhah diu, thutah aseilou dingu ahi; Aleiju jou seije ahilun, dihloutah bolna-in akisuchol uve." 
Jeremiah9:6 Nachenna chu lheplhahna lah ahin; lheplhahna jeh-in keima eihetnom pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah9:7 Hijeh chun janelho Pakaiyin hitin aseije, veuvin, keiman amaho junlhahsah ingting, kapatep ding ahi, ajehchu kamite chanu chu iba kalo ding ham?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Aleiju thalchang kikapdoh abangin, hichun lheplhahna thu aseije. Khatnin aheng akom jah-a akamin chamna thu aseijin, hinla alungsungin achanglhi keovin ahi." 
Jeremiah9:9 Hitiho jeh ahi keiman amaho gotna pelouva kakoi dingham? Hitobang namho chungahi hitia hi kahinna-in phu alahlou ding ham? tin Pakai jin aseije. 
Jeremiah9:10 Molsangho dinga kaka-a kamao ding, gamthipma umho dinga kalunghem ding ahi. Ajehchu amaho akavamtan, koimachan ajotpai thei tapon, ganchaho hamgin jong akijatapoi. Chungleng vachate le gamsaho ajamun, achemang taove." 
Jeremiah9:11 Keiman Jerusalem chu ingem jeng kasoa, dragon kokhuh-a kasem ding, chule Judah khopiho chu acheng beihela kakam helsah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah9:12 Hiche hekhenthem thei dinga miching koiham? Hiche gam chu amanthaija, gamthip banga akahvama, koimachan ajotpai thei louding ahi, tia phongdoh dinga Pakai kamin aseinapa chu koiham?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Chule Pakaiyin aseije, ajehchu amahon amasanguva kakoipeh kadan thupeh chu adon tapouve, chule ka aw angaipouve, hia chun chonjong achonpouve." 
Jeremiah9:14 Amaho lungsuhto-a bou achonjo taove, apateuvin anahilu, Baal houna nung ajuijo taovin ahi." 
Jeremiah9:15 Hijeh chun janel Pakai, Israel Pathen'in hitin aseitai! Veovin keiman amaho, hiche miho tahhi thinglungin vah ingting, thinkha twi kadonsah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah9:16 Keiman amaho chu, apateule amahon anahetkhah louvu, Pathen helouho lah-a kathecheh ding, chule amaho kasuh manghel kahse-a anungu chemjam kajuisah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah9:17 Hitihin janel Pakai chun aseije, nanghon ngaitouvin, ahung theina dingun numei lunghemho chu kouvun lang, ahung theina dingun numei dohathuh ho gakou sah-un." 
Jeremiah9:18 Amaho chu kinouhen lang, chule eiho dingin himsao hen, chutiachu imitnuva kon mitlhi alonlhah-a, imit nel uva kona twiho akikhodoh jeng nadingin," 
Jeremiah9:19 ajehchu Zion'a konin maon'a aw chu akijan, suhmanga iti i-umu hitam? Igamu idalhah uva ichendetna houvin einotthap jeh-un, ikisumo lheh taove." 
Jeremiah9:20 Ahinla, vo numei ho, Pakai aw chu ngaijun, nanakhang uva akam thucheng chu lutsah-un, chule nachanuteu chu maoje, chule amitakipmin aheng akomho lunghemje hilun." 
Jeremiah9:21 Ijeh-inem itile chate polama umhole khangdong lamlen ho-a umho sumang dingin, thina chu bangkot ho-ah ahungkal touvin chule ileng inpihouva ahung luttan ahi." 
Jeremiah9:22 Seijin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Mihem thilongho chu gam onga eh tobanga pul lhadiu, chule chang atpa nunga khutdim khat chang kidalha banga koiman amaho aga chomkhom lou ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah9:23 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, michingho chu achihnauva, mihat ho chu ahatnauva, chule mihaoho chu ahaonauva kithang-at daohen." 
Jeremiah9:24 Ahinla akithang-at michu hichea hin kithang at-uhen, keimahi leiset chunga ngailut lungsetna, thutanlhahna, chule chonphatna a vaihom Pakai chu kahi ti hehen chule hethemhen, ajehchu hitiho ahin keima kakipahjie, tin Pakaiyin seije." 
Jeremiah9:25 Veovin Pakaiyin hitin aseije, keiman cheptanho jouse chu cheptan louho toh kagimbol thading nikho ahung lhunge!" 
Jeremiah9:26 Egypt, Judah, Edom, Ammon chate, Moab chule gam ningchong penaho, gamthipma chengho jouse chunga, ajehchu hiche nam miho jousehi cheptanlou loi chu ahiuvin chule Israel insung jouse jong lungsunga cheptanlou ahiuve." 
Jeremiah10:1 Israel insung naheng uva Pakai thusei chu ngaijun. 
Jeremiah10:2 Hitihin Pakaiyin aseije, Pathen hephalouho lamlhah chu kihil hih-un, van melchihna ho jeh-in jong lungthoi hih-un, ajehchu Pathen helouho hitiho ahin alungthoi jiuve." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ajehchu miho puchon pachon chu moh ahi. Ijeh-inem itile khatnin gammanga konin thing aphuh-in, hichu heicha-a natongpa khutsoh ahi." 
Jeremiah10:4 Amahon hichu dangkale sanan ajemuvin, akilonlou nadin thihkille seh-in amandetnuve." 
Jeremiah10:5 Amaho lusu thingphung bangin akitung jangpetnun, ahinla apaothei pouve. Achetheilou jeh uva poh ngaitei ahiuve. Amaho ginghih uvin, amahon thilse abolthei pouve, thilpha bolna dingjong amaho-a aumpoi." 
Jeremiah10:6 Vo Pakai, nangma tobangtah koimacha aumpoi, nangma loupitah nahin, naminhi thanei na-a loupi ahi." 
Jeremiah10:7 Vo namtin vaipi lengpa, nangma kichalou ding koi ham? Ajehchu nangma-a hichu uma ahin, ajehchu nampiho michingte jouse lahle alenggamhou jouse-a, nangma tobang khatcha aumpoi." 
Jeremiah10:8 Amaho lungselle angol ahiuvin, lim semthu ahouvu jong chu manthah na lhongpi ahibouve." 
Jeremiah10:9 Tarshish'a konin dangka kikhen pheng chule Uphaz'a konin sana ahinpouvin, khutthemho khutsohle thihkheng themho khutsohho, adumle asandup akivonun, aboncha chu doha thuh khutthemho khutsoh ngen ahi." 
Jeremiah10:10 Pakai vang chu Pathen dihtah ahin, ama hingjing Pathen le tonsot leng ahi. Alunghana-a leiset kihot ding! athangtomna chu namtin vaipin anan joulou diu ahi." 
Jeremiah10:11 Hiti ahi nanghon ajah uva, vanle lei sem hilou pathenho, amahotah chu leisetna konle hiche vanho noija konahi mangthah ding ahiuve, natidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah10:12 Aman athaneina-in leiset asemin, achihna-in vannoi atungdoh-in, ahetthem na-in vanho ajandoh-e." 
Jeremiah10:13 Aw aso tengle, van'a twi tamtah aging lullul jin, kolmonga pat twimei ajamtousah jin, kolphele gotwi asemin, agou boma konin hui ahin nundoh sah jin ahi." 
Jeremiah10:14 Mitinhi ahetna-a lungsel ngen ahin, asemdoh takip milim kilhah tho-a akisudongun ahi. Ajehchu amilim kilhahtho hochu jouthubuh ahin, asunguva haitheina aumpoi." 
Jeremiah10:15 Amaho pannabei le natoh dihlou ahiuvin, gotna akipeh tengule mangthah ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah10:16 Jacob chan chu hicheho bangchu ahipoi; ajehchu Ama thil jouse sempa hin; Israel hi agoulo nam tenggol ahin, amin chu janel Pakai ahi." 
Jeremiah10:17 Vo kulpi sunga chengho, gamsunga konin nakiveina thilho chom khomin." 
Jeremiah10:18 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, vetan, agamsunga chengho chu khatveihi hinpaidoh inting, amahon chutia amutheina diuva amaho kasuhgenthei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah10:19 Kakisuh natna jeh-in ada kahitai, kamaha put hi analheh jenge, ahinla keiman, hichehi thohgimna tahbeh ahin, chule kathoh teiding ahi kati." 
Jeremiah10:20 Kahoubuh asetan chule kakhao jouse atantai. Keija konin kachate achedoh-un, aumtapouve chule kahoubuh songdoh dingle kapondal ho tungdoh ding koima aumtapoi." 
Jeremiah10:21 Ajehchu kelgnoi chingho la alungsel ngen ahiuvin, Pakai hola aumpouve. Hijeh-a chu lolhing loudiu, akelngoiteu jouse chehchao ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah10:22 Veuvin, Judah khopiho kamhelsah dingle, Dragon ho kokhuh sosah dingin, sahlam gama konin thuthang le husa nasatah ahunge." 
Jeremiah10:23 Vo Pakai mihem chondanhi ama-a um ahipoi ti kahetai, akalson hil dinga chu mihem sunga um ahipoi." 
Jeremiah10:24 Aw Pakai imacha hilou munna neilhut louna dingin, nalunghanna-a hilouvin nathu tan najoh-in neisu dih-in." 
Jeremiah10:25 Nangma hephalouho chungle, namina taolou insungho chunga nalungsatna bunglha tan, ajehchu amahon Jacob anejouvun, abahgamun, asumangun, chule achenna mun kamhelin alhauve." 
Jeremiah11:1 Jeremiah henga Pakai thu hunglhung chun aseije," 
Jeremiah11:2 hiche thulhun thuhi ngaijun lang, Judah mitele Jerusalem'a chengho henga seipeh-un." 
Jeremiah11:3 Chule nangman amaho jah-a seijin, Israel Pathen Pakai chun hitin aseije, hiche thulhun thuho ngailoupa chu sapset changhen." 
Jeremiah11:4 Hichu napateu Egypt gamma thih meilhuma kona kahin puidoh ni-a kana thupeh a kanasei, Ka aw ngaijun lang chule kathupeh ho dungjuijin bollun. Hitia chu nangho kamite nahiuva, chule keima na Pathen'u kahi ding ahi." 
Jeremiah11:5 Chutia chu napateu henga, khoijule bongnoi lonna gamkhat pehdinga tunia bangahi kakitepma kahahselna chu katohdoh thei ding ahi, ati. Chuin keiman, hihen, Pakai tin kadonbutne." 
Jeremiah11:6 Chujouvin Pakaiyin kahengah aseije, Judah khopihole Jerusalem khopi lamlen ho-a hiche thuho hi phongjalun lang, hiche thulhun thuho hi ngaijunlang, boluvin, ati." 
Jeremiah11:7 Egypt gama kona amaho kanapuidoh nikhon napateu henga hatah-in kana kiphin in, tuni chan geijin jong, matah-a kipatdoh pumin kagihsal lin, ka-aw ngaijun katijingin ahi." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ahinla angaipouvin, anau jong sunglouvin, amitakip alungaito gitlouna-a achonun, hijeh chun abol dinguva kana thupeh-a, ahivanga ana bolou-u, hiche thulhuna thucheng ho jouse hi achunguva kahin lhunsah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah11:9 Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, Judah mitele Jerusalem'a cheng mite lah-a thilguh kigong akimudoh-in ahi." 
Jeremiah11:10 Apu apateu, kathu ngainomlouho khangitlouna lama akilehei gamun, pathen dangho jen dingin anungu ajuijun, Israel insungle Judah insungin, apateutoh kanasem thulhun chu asukeh taove, ati." 
Jeremiah11:11 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, veuvin, ahoidoh theilou hel nadiu thilse achunguva kalhunsah-a, kahenga hungpeng jongleu kangaipeh louding ahi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Chuteng Judah khopihole Jerusalem'a chengho chu, gimnamtui ahalnau pathenho henga chun cheovintin, ahenguva pengdiu, hijongle alungdon petnuva hiho chun ahuhdoh louhel diu ahi." 
Jeremiah11:13 Ajehchu vo Judah, nakhopihou jat dung juijin pathen naneijun, Jerusalem khosung lamlen jat dung juijin jachat umtah Baal henga gimnamtui halna maicham natung doh-un ahi." 
Jeremiah11:14 Hijeh chun hiche mite dinghin taohih-in, kanale thumna jong bolhih-in, ajehchu alungkham jeh uva kahenga atao tengu jongle kangaipeh louding ahi." 
Jeremiah11:15 Kangainun thil thet um tahtah bolpumle, nanga kona tahsa theng achemang munasasa a ka-insunga ipi abol nahlai dingham? Nangin aphalou nabol tengle nakipah jilheh-e." 
Jeremiah11:16 Pakaiyin namin chu Olive thingphung hing, ga hoitahle phatah tin nanaminvon, mipi hugin thong chu achunga meijin akongin, ahin abahho chu abong gamtai." 
Jeremiah11:17 Ajehchu Kei phinset na-a lunghansahna dia Baal henga gimnamtui hal Israel insung le Judah insung setna jeh'in, Janel Pakai nangma phutpa chun, nachunga thilgilou ahinbol ding aphongdoh tai." 
Jeremiah11:18 Chuin Pakaiyin eihetsah-in, kahetan, chuphatnin nangin athilbolu neimusah tai." 
Jeremiah11:19 Ahinla keima kelngoinou, ahiloule bongchal tha dinga kikai bangbou kahin, amin kihetkit louhel nadin mihing gama konin ama chu sumangu hitin, thingphung chu aga pumin subeiju hite, tia kachunga adoha bolu chu kanahe hihhelin ahi." 
Jeremiah11:20 Ahinla Vo janel Pakai dihtah-a thutanpa, lungsung gille lungthim sung patep jipa, achunguva naphulahna chu neimusah tan, ajehchu kachung chang thu nangma-a kaphondoh ji ahi." 
Jeremiah11:21 Kakhut uva nalou louna dingin Pakai minin gao thu seitahih-in tia kahin na suhmang dinga chang lhijing Anathoth mite chungchanga Pakaiyin hitin aseije. 
Jeremiah11:22 Hijeh chun janel Pakai chun hitin aseije, vetan, amaho chu talen pengting, gollhangho chu chemjam'a louvuntin achapateule achanuteu chu kela thidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah11:23 Chule amaho amoh himhim umpou vinte. Ajehchu Anathoth mite chunga thilse kalhunsah ding, gotna achan kum-u jong hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah12:1 Nahenga kaphun teng jongle vo Pakai, nangma chonphatah nahin, hijongle nathutan dol neiseisah tadin, ipi dinga migiloute lamlhah lolhinga? hatah'a kitahlouhon nom asahsoh keiju ham?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Nangma phu ahiuvin, henge, ajungkho gam taove, akeh-un, henge, ga asodoh taove. Amahoto naichan naumin, alung giluva konin nagamlan ahi." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ahinla Vo Pakai keima neihetan, neimutan, chule nangma lama kalung napatep ahitai. Amaho chu tha dinga kigo kelngoi bangin kaidoh'in lang, athana ding nikho gotpeh tan." 
Jeremiah12:4 Chua chengho gitlouna jeh-a gamsung chu itihchan lunghema loujao tina hampaho golha dingham? Aman kaki chainao amulou ding ahi ati jeh-un, gamsahole vachate amangthah gamtaove." 
Jeremiah12:5 Nangma kenga lhai miho toh nalhaikhoma amahon nachol sah-u leh, sakolto iti naki lhaitet thei ding ham? Nangman natahsan, Chamna gama bon amahon nachol sah-u leh, achutile Jordan kinonga chun iti tan natem?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ajehchu nasopihole napa insung mite tah-in jong, kitahloutah-in nabol uve; henge, amahon nanungsanga mipi akouvuve. Amahon nahenga thungei tah seijongleu tahsan hih-in." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ka-inle kagoulo kadalhatai, kahinna ka-itchah kangaitah chu amanu melmate khutna kapedohtai." 
Jeremiah12:8 Kei dinga kagoulo chu gammang sunga keipi tobang ahin, keima dounan apengdoh-in, hijeh-a chu kahot ahi." 
Jeremiah12:9 Kagoulohi vacha pol litlet tobang ahin, akimvela um vachaten ama adouvun ahi, hunguvin, gama gamsa jouse hung kikhomun lang anegamdin hungtauvin." 
Jeremiah12:10 Kelngoiching tamtah-in kalengpilei asumangun, kachan achotphauvin, kachan deitah chu gamthip gohkeo asosah taove." 
Jeremiah12:11 Amahon hiche akamhel sah-un, hichu kahenga alunghemin, agam pumpi agohkeo asotaove, ahinla koimachan anahsah poi." 
Jeremiah12:12 Gamthip lhonlhung munsang jouse-a thilsuseho ahunglhung taove. Gammong langkhatna pat gammong langkhat gei Pakai chemjamin bahgam intin, mi koimachan chamna aneilou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah12:13 Amahon suhlouchang atheuvin, hijongle lingho bou a-atdiu, amahole amaho akisucholun, ahinla phachom ponte, Pakai lungsat nasatah jeh-a chu, nalhosoh-u ajachatpi diu ahi." 
Jeremiah12:14 Kami Israelte losah dinga kagotsa gou tongkha-a, ka-inheng gilouho jouse douna-in Pakai chun hitin aseije, vetan, keiman agamuva konle Judah insung mite lah-a kona kalolhah ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah12:15 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, amaho kalolhah joutengle kahung kile-a, amaho kalungsetna, amitakip agoulo nale agamcheh-a kalepui ding ahi." 
Jeremiah12:16 Chule hiti ding ahi, Baal henga kamite kihahselje ahil banguva, ahingjinga Pakai kamina, kihahselna dinga kamite chondan gunchu tah-a akijiluva ahile, chuteng amaho kamite lah-a kisadoh ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ahinla amahon kathu angailou vangule, hiche nam mite chu kabodoh-a, kasuh manghel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah13:1 Pakaiyin kahenga, tupatpon konggah gakilah-in lang, twija sukot louvin, nakonga kigah-in, ati." 
Jeremiah13:2 Hitichun Pakai thu dungjuijin konggah khat kaga kilah-in, kakonga kaki gah-in ahi." 
Jeremiah13:3 Chuin anivei channan Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin aseije," 
Jeremiah13:4 Nagalah nakonga um konggah chu choijin lang, kipat in, Euphrates lama chenlang, chukoma songpi kosung khatna gaselin, ati." 
Jeremiah13:5 Hitichun Pakaiyin thu eipeh bangin kachen, Euphrates koma kagaseltai." 
Jeremiah13:6 Chuin ni tamtah jouvin Pakaiyin kajah-a, kipat in Euphrates lama chenlang chua konin, chukoma sel dinga thu kanapeh konggah chu hinchoijin, ati." 
Jeremiah13:7 Chuin Euphrates lama kachen kalaidoh-in, kaselna mun'a kon chun konggah chu kaladoh-in, chule vetan, konggah chu anangot tan, imachan aphachom tapoi." 
Jeremiah13:8 Chuin Pakai thu kahenga ahung lhungin aseije," 
Jeremiah13:9 Pakai chun, Judah hoithonale Jerusalem hoithona chu hiti ahi kasuhset ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah13:10 Kathu ngailouva alung ngaito to-a chonna, pathen dangho jenna, chule houva, hiche nam phaloutehi imacha phachom lou konggah tobang bepbou chu ahiuve." 
Jeremiah13:11 Ajehchu konggah mikonga abechah banga Israel insung pumpile Judah insung pumpi chu keima-a kabechahsah ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, hitia chu amaho kei dinga kamitele kaminthana, kahoinale kaloupina dinga kasem ahin, ahinla amahon angainom pouve." 
Jeremiah13:12 Hijeh-a chu ajah uva hiche thuhi naseija, Israelte Pakai Pathen'in hai jouse chu lengpitwi sung dimun, ati, nati ding ahi. Chuteng amahon najah-a, hai jouse lengpitwi dim dinghi kahetchen lou uham? atidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah13:13 Chuteng nangin ajah uva, Pakai jin hitin aseije, vetan, hiche gama chengho jouse David laltouna-a tou lengho, thempuho, themgaoho, chule Jerusalem'a chengho jouse chu khamna-a kadip ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah13:14 Chule keiman amaho khatle khat, pate leh chapate tahjong kahin tato ding, kalainat louding, kakhen louding, ahiloule kahepi louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ngaijun, nanau sungun, kithahatsah hih-un, ajehchu Pakaiyin thu aseitai." 
Jeremiah13:16 Aman kho ajinsah-a, chule molchung muthim lah-a nakipal lhuh masangin, Pakai na Pathen chu loupina peuvin, chule vah nangaichat laitah-un, thina le-lim asosah-in, muthim lhangkhal in aseme." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ahinla hichu nangailou diule, nahoitho jeh uva kahinna sunthipma kap kapmin tin, Pakai kelngoite gal hinga kikaimang jeh-a kamit teni jong mitlhin achupding ahi." 
Jeremiah13:18 Lengpa le Lengnu jah-a, kineosah lhonin, toulha lhonin, ajehchu nathupina lhonle naloupina lallukhuh lhon jengjong lhamang ding ahitai, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah13:19 Lhanggam khopi lenho kikhah chah gamintin, koimachan ahontheilou ding, Judah aboncha gal hinga kikaimanga, apumpiuva gal hinga kikaimang diu ahitai." 
Jeremiah13:20 Dahdoh-un lang sahlama kona hungho khu veuvin, nangma kipe kelngoihon, nakelngoi hon hoitah ho chu hoi hitam?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Aman nangma na-engbol teng ipi nasei ding ham? Ajehchu nangin gal lamkai dia nanahil chu, nachunga vaipon apangtai. Numei naosonat banga na nasah louding ham?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Nangin nalunga hiche thilho ibola kachunga hung lhung ham? tia naseile, hichehi nangma nakhansetna alet behset jeh ahin, hijeh-a chu nanih kihoh-a, nakhotal doh-a ahi." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ethiopia min avun akheltheija ahiloule lutnun ajem akhel theijem? Achutile angaina-a thilse boljing nanghon jong thilpha nabol thei diu ahi. 
Jeremiah13:24 Hijeh chun gamthipma huijin pol amutcheh banga chu kathecheh diu nahi. 
Jeremiah13:25 Hichehi keija kona nakite-a navang chanchu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, ajehchu nangin neisumilin, joubulom joh natahsan tai." 
Jeremiah13:26 Hijeh-a chu najachat kilahna dinga, namai changa nanih kahodohpeh ding nahi." 
Jeremiah13:27 Loujao lhangchung dunga najon thanhoina, nanahkhon, nahuhna awgin, na noti chon naho, nathet um thilbolho chu kamutai. Ohe Jerusalem, nada ahi, naki suhtheng louding ham? Itih tahle ahitadem?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Twihah thudola Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin ahi. 
Jeremiah14:2 Judah alunghemin, akotpihou chu anguije, amaho tolla aduplha taovin, Jerusalem khopi ka ogin akitol toutai." 
Jeremiah14:3 Amilal houvin asohteu twikhaijin asolun, luikhuh-a ahungun, twi amupouve. Atuibelu keo pumin akileuvin, amaho jahchan akisujumuvin ponlu akikhuvin ahi." 
Jeremiah14:4 Leija go juhlou jeh-a, leiset akhit jeh-in, loukaiho ajahchauvin ponlu akikhuh taove." 
Jeremiah14:5 Henge, sajuh pin jong hamlah-a nou aneijin, hamhing umlou jeh-in adalhatai." 
Jeremiah14:6 Gam sanganho munsang ho-a adingun, dragonho bangin hui ahoplut helhol-un, hamhing umlou jeh-in amitnu athabei gamtai." 
Jeremiah14:7 Vo Pakai kakhangitlou naovin eilansan jongleu, namin jal-in hichu boljengin, ajehchu kakinungtol nao atamin, nangma dounan kachonse taove." 
Jeremiah14:8 Vo Israel kinepna pa, lungkham laija huhhingpu, ibola gamsungahi kholjin banga jankhat gehdia kiheimang lamjot nabah ding hitam?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Ibola milungthoile pasal hat kihuh hing theilou bang bepma naum ding ham? Vo Pakai kalah uva naum nalaijin, naminin katao jiuve, neidalha hih-un." 
Jeremiah14:10 Pakaiyin hiche mite thudol hitin aseije, amahon vavei ding adeijun, akengu atuhtang pouvin, hijeh chun Pakai jin amaho asang tapouve. Tu-a aman akhang gitlounao ageldoh-a, asetnao jeh-a gotna apehding ahitai." 
Jeremiah14:11 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, hiche mite phattheina dingin taopeh hih-in," 
Jeremiah14:12 an ngola apennau kangaipeh louding, govam thilto atotengu jongle kasanpeh louding, chemjamle kela chule hise-a kasuhmang johdiu ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah14:13 Chuin keiman kaseije, Pakai Pathen vetan, themgaoho chun ahenguva, chemjam nato loudiu, keljong nahet loudiu, chamna mong mong kapehjoh ding nahiuve, atiuve." 
Jeremiah14:14 Chuphatnin Pakaiyin kahenga, themgaoho chu kamina jouva ahiuve, keiman kasolpon, thujong kapepoi, houjong kakihoupi poi. Naheng uva thilmu dihloule, gaothu chule mohthu pannabei aseijuva, alungu alheplhah-u ahi." 
Jeremiah14:15 Hijeh chun hiche gama hin chemjamle kellhah chuponte tia, keiman kasol louva gaothusei themgaoho chungchang chu chemjamle kellhah in hiche themgaoho chu asuhmang ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah14:16 Chule agao thuseinao miho chu kel lhahle chemjam jeh-a, Jerusalem khosung lamlena kipaidoh diu, amaho ajiteu ahiloule achapateule achanuteu vuiding koimacha aneilou diu ahi. Ajehchu agitlounau achunguva kabuh lhah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah14:17 Hijeh-a chu nangin hiche thuhi ajah uva nasei ding ahi: sunle jan-in kamitlhi longhen lang, kanghih behhen. Ajehchu kamite chanu nungah theng chun mavona hoisetah, manthah na nasatah athohtai." 
Jeremiah14:18 Keima loujaova kagapot dohle, chemjam'a kithat ho pikhu vetan! chuin khopi sunga kagalut le kel lhah naho pikhu vetan! henge, themgaoho le thempuho chu ahetlou nau gama avah leuve, nati ding ahi." 
Jeremiah14:19 Judah chu napaidoh hel hitam? Zion chu nahinnan akidah hitam? Kadamna diu umlou hela ibola neivoh-u hitam? Chamna kaholun apha imacha aumpoi, damna ding phat chu, vetan lungkhamna bep ahitai." 
Jeremiah14:20 Vo Pakai kagitlou naole kapateu khangitlou naho kakihet taove. Ajehchu nangma douna-in kachonse taove. 
Jeremiah14:21 Namin jal-in neithet bol hih-un, naloupina laltouna chu jaboldan umhih hen, keihotoh nasem nathulhun chu hejingin lang, sukeh hih-in." 
Jeremiah14:22 Chidang namdang pannabei ho lah-a, go juhsah theija umam? ahiloule van'in gohong ajuhsah theijem? Vo Pakai ka Pathen ama chu nangma nahilou ham? Hijeh-a chu nangma kanga diu ahi. Ajehchu hicheho jouse nangma sem ahi." 
Jeremiah15:1 Chuphatnin Pakaiyin kahenga, Mosi le Samuel ka-anga dinglhon jongle kalunghi hiche mite lama umthei ponte. Kamitmu-a konin paidoh-un lang chemang taohen, ati." 
Jeremiah15:2 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, amahon nahenga hoilama ipotdoh diuham? atiuva ahile, nangman amaho chu naseipeh ding ahi, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, athidingho chu thina-a, chemjam'a loudingho chu chemjam'a, kelhah-a thiding hochu kelhah-a, sohchang dingho chu sohchan na-a," 
Jeremiah15:3 Chule achunguva thil jatli, athana diu chemjam, abottel diu uichate, abahgam diule asumang dingu chungleng vachate le gamsaho chu kasol ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah15:4 Chule keiman Judah leng Hezekiah chapa Manasseh in Jerusalem'a athilbol jeh-a, leiset lenggam jouse-a amaho kachao lesah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah15:5 Ajehchu Vo Jerusalem, koijin nangma nakhotoa, koijin nalhasetpi-a, ahiloule iti nahi hitam tia dongle dinga koi chedohle dingham?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Pakai chun, nangin neidalhan, nanung chontai, hijeh-a chu nachunga kakhut kajah-a, kasuhmang ding nahi, kakitimtim jong kakhoptai." 
Jeremiah15:7 Amahohi gamsung kotpiho-a changjapmin japming ting, achonnau akhel loujeh uva, chate-a kona kakhena, kamite kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Twipi lah-a neldi sanga tamin ameithaihou apungin, sunchang laijin gollhangho nute chunga misumang kapuilut khumin, chucheho leh khopi chunga chun photlotnin tijatna kachuhsah jin ahi." 
Jeremiah15:9 Cha sagi hingnun, alhagao alhan, sun ahipetnin nisa alhumin, ajah achan akisudongtai. Amoh umnalai ho chu amelmateu chemjam'a kapehdoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah15:10 Leiset pumpi-a kinahnale kikalsetna-a neina hinhi, Ohe heno, kadatave! sumthoila kalha khapon, minjongla sumthoi eilahsah khapon, ahinla amitakipmin eigaosap uve." 
Jeremiah15:11 Pakaiyin, tahbeh-a nunga naphatna ding hintin, tahbeh-a melmaten phat hahsat laile genthei laija nabolphatna diu ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah15:12 Thih-in sahlam thihle thihtah chu asuhboh dingham? 
Jeremiah15:13 Nachonsetna jouse jeh-a, naneile nagouho, nagam pumpi sung jouse geija, gallaija thil kichom khom banga manbeija kapehdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah15:14 Nahetlou gama namelmate toh kachesah ding nahi, ajehchu kalunghana mei akongin, hichun nakahvam ding ahi." 
Jeremiah15:15 Vo Pakai nangin nahenai, neigel doh-in lang neivilin, eibolgimho phu neilahpeh-in, nathahatna-a neipuimang hih-in, nangma jala houset kato neihet peh-in." 
Jeremiah15:16 Nathu kamun, keiman kanetai, nathu chu keidin kipanale lungsung thanopna ahi. Ajehchu vo janel Pakai Pathen, keima namina kikou kahi." 
Jeremiah15:17 Minelpehho kikhopna-a katoupon, pahjong kakipah poi; nakhut jeh-in kachangin katouve, ajehchu nalung hilouna-in neina dipsettan ahi." 
Jeremiah15:18 Ibola kanat kumkho sotna, katina damthei louva damding nomlou ham? Nangma kei dinga mijoule akangthei twi tobang nahi ding hitam?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nahung kile-a ahileh keiman puikit ningting, kamasanga nadin ding ahi. Thilse-a kona thil lutah nasodoh-a ahile, kakam sung bang ding nahi. Amaho nahenga hungkileu hen, nangvang amaho henga kile hih-in." 
Jeremiah15:20 Chule keiman nangma hiche mite dinga sum-eng kulbang kigena kasema, amahon nakisatpi diu ahi. Ajehchu keima nahuhhing dingle nahuhdoh dinga um kahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah15:21 Chule keiman migiloute khutna kona kahuh doh-a, tijat umtahho khutna kona kalhatdoh ding nahi." 
Jeremiah16:1 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahunglhung kitnin aseije. 
Jeremiah16:2 Nangin hiche munnahi ji naneilou ding, chapate chanute jong naneilou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah16:3 Ajehchu Pakaiyin, hiche munna pengho chapatele chanute thudol, chule ahinguva anuteo thudol le hiche gama ahinguva apateu thudol hitihin aseije." 
Jeremiah16:4 Amaho hesohtah-a thiuva, kikalou diu, vuijong kivui louva tollhanga ehbang bep hidiu, amaho chemjamle gilkela mangthah uva alongu chu chunga leng vachate le leija gamsaho anneh hiding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah16:5 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, lunghemna insunga lut hih-in, akapi dingle alunghempi dingin jong che hih-in, ajehchu keiman hiche mite-a konin kacham nale kahebolna chule kahepina kaladohtai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah16:6 Alen aneu hiche gamahi thicheh diu, amaho kivuilou diu, minjong aka loudiu, atahsao jong ki-at pop louding, luchaija jong umlou diu ahi." 
Jeremiah16:7 Thi jeh-a lhamonsahna dinga mite kapma lhisoh lou ding, koimachan anu ahiloule apa lungmonsahna dinga donding khon apeh louhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah16:8 Nang jong amaho toh nedingle dondinga golvahna insunga nalut louhel ding ahi. 
Jeremiah16:9 Ajehchu Israel Pathen janel Pakai chun hitin aseije, vetan, namitmule nahinkho uva hiche nuina oginle kipana ogin, moulang nopna oginle mounu ogin katansah hel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah16:10 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, thu jousehi hiche mite nahetsah tengle, amahon najah-a, ipijeh-a Pakaiyin thilse nasatahhi keiho douna-a aphondoh hitam? Pakai ka-Pathen'u douna-a kakhangit lounao leh kachonsetnau ipiham? ati dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah16:11 Chuteng nangin ajah uva nasei ding ahi, ajehchu napateu vin eidalhaovin, pathen dangho nung ajuijun, amaho ajenun, ahouvun keima eidalhaovin, kadan thupeh anitpouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije, natiding ahi." 
Jeremiah16:12 Nanghon napateu sanga sejocheh nabol taove, ajehchu veuvin, amahon kathu angaida theina diuvin amitakip ama ama lunggel gilou dungjuijin achonuvin," 
Jeremiah16:13 hijeh-a chu keiman hiche gama kona nahetkhah louvu, nanghole napateu vin ahetkhah louvu gama kapaidoh-a, chua chu sunle jana pathen dangho najen diu, hia chu lungsetna kamusah loudiu nahiuve." 
Jeremiah16:14 Hijeh chun vetan, Egypt gama kona Israel chate puidoh-a Pakai chu ahing jinge, tia akiseikit tahlouhel na nikho hochu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah16:15 Ahinla, Israel chate sahlam gama konle, aman anochehna gamho-a kona hinpuidoh-a Pakai chu ahing jinge. Chule apateu kanapehsa amaho gama chu kahin lepuikit dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah16:16 Ven, ngamanho tamtah kasol ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, amahon ahinmat dingu, chujoule sadelho tamtah solingting, amahon moltinle lhangtin chule songkoho-a kona adel lele dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah16:17 Ajehchu alampiu jouse kamitnin amun, amaho kamaija konin akisel pouvin, akhangit lounao kamitmu-a konin akiselpoi." 
Jeremiah16:18 Chule amasatah-a keiman akhangitlou naole achonsetnao ajatnia kalethuh ding ahi. Ajehchu amahon kagam asuboh un, kagoulo chu ki-dah le thet umtah athilongu chun adipset taove." 
Jeremiah16:19 Vo Pakai kahatnale kakuldet, chule bolgenthei ni-a jamlutna, leiset kolmonga konin chidang namdangte nahenga hunguntin, ipateovin jouthule ahomkeo phatchomna beihel ana kisan-u ahi atidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah16:20 Pathen la hilou, pathenho mihemin akisem dingham?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Hijeh chun vetan, keiman amaho hichehi khatvei hetsah ingting, kakhutle kathahat hetsah inge, chutile amahon kamin hi Pakai ahi ti hetao vinte." 
Jeremiah17:1 Judah chonset nahi thih lekhamol le song mantam muhhema kisunlut ahin, alungsungu dokhang chungle namaicham sakiho chunga kikhenga ahi." 
Jeremiah17:2 Achateuvin thinghing phungho leh molsang chungho-a amaicham hou leh adoikhom hou ageldoh jiuve. 
Jeremiah17:3 Vo gama kamolsang, naneile nagou jouse gal laija thil kichom banga kapehdoh ding chule nagam pumpi lhung keija namun sangho, chonset mana kapeh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah17:4 Chule nangma, nangma ngeijin, nagoulo kapehsa chu nalo jomlou ding, nahetphah lou gama namelmate jena kapansah ding nahi. Ajehchu kalunghana meikong nakou sah-un, a-itih-a kongjing ding ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah17:5 Pakaiyin hitin ati, mihem'a atahsan na ngama, atichunga abantha kisema, chule Pakaiya kona alungthim petmang mipa chu sapset chenghen." 
Jeremiah17:6 Ajehchu ama nelphaija phaipheng keh banga thilpha ahungteng amulou ding, ahinla gamthipma gambeh neoho chi umna gamle mihem chenlouna gama cheng ding bou ahi." 
Jeremiah17:7 Pakai tahsana, akinepna Pakai hia mipa chu anun nom ahi." 
Jeremiah17:8 Ajehchu ama twipanga thing kiphut, vapanga ajung jamdoh-a, nisa satnin sangkha louva ana jong hingjing tobang chu hiding ahi, gamgot kum-a olmo louva, aga jong geongai louding ahi." 
Jeremiah17:9 Lungthimhi thil jouse chunga joulhepna dimset, gitlouna-a sesoh hel ahin, hichehi kon hethei jintem?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Mitin ama ama lamlhah dungjuile atohga dungjui cheh-a kapeh theina dingin, keima Pakaiyin lungsung kakholin, lunggil ho kapatepjin ahi," 
Jeremiah17:11 vabuh-in atwi athah-a khelouva adalhah banga, adihlouva haojong chu chutobang ahin; chule ahinkho kimtuh-a adalha-a, akichaina chu mingol hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah17:12 Atila pat laltouna sang loupi khat umchu kamun theng laiju chu ahi. 
Jeremiah17:13 Vo Israelte kinepna Pakai, nangma dalha jouse jahchaova keija kona kidalseho chu tolla kijihlut ding ahiuve, ajehchu amahon Pakai hinna twi longjing chu adalha taove." 
Jeremiah17:14 Neidam sah-in, Vo Pakai, chutile dam tange, neihuh-in chutile huhhing hitange, ajehchu nangma kavahchoi jing pa nahi." 
Jeremiah17:15 Vetan, amahon kajah-a, Pakai thusei chu hoiba ham? Tuhin hung guilhung hen, atiuve." 
Jeremiah17:16 Keima vang, kelngoichingpu kahina-a nakoma kon kavah mangpon, dana nikho jong kangaichapoi, namasanga kakama thupot chu, adih ahi nangin nahenai." 
Jeremiah17:17 Kei dingin manthah na hihih-in, nikho phalou ni-a kakinepna nahi." 
Jeremiah17:18 Eibolgimho jahchaohen lang, keivang nei jachatsah hih-in, amaho lungthoijuhen lang, keivang neilungthoi sah hih-in, achunguva nikho phalou lhunsah inlang, manthah na jatni-in sumangin." 
Jeremiah17:19 Pakaiyin kajah-a hitihin aseije, Jerusalem kotpi jouse, Judah lengte lutle potlena, mihem chate kotpi phunga khun gadingin," 
Jeremiah17:20 Chule ahenguva, hiche kotpi-a lutji nangho Judah leng tele, Judah mite, chule Jerusalem'a chenghon Pakai thusei hi ngaijun." 
Jeremiah17:21 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, kichihtheijun lang cholngah nin pohgih pohdaovin, chule hichu Jerusalem kotpi-a jong hinpolut hih-un." 
Jeremiah17:22 Na inhouva konin jong cholngah nile pohgih podoh hih-un, najong imacha tong hih-un, napateu thu kapeh bangin cholngahni chu jabol uvin." 
Jeremiah17:23 Ahinla amahon ajuipouve, anaujong asungpouvin ahi, ajahlouna diule hilchahna asanlouna diuvin alouchal uve." 
Jeremiah17:24 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Pakai jin cholngah ni-a hiche khopi kotpi-a pohgih pohlut louna dingle, na imacha tohlouna dinga choldoni najabol joh uva, lunglut tah-a neijop ule," 
Jeremiah17:25 David laltouna-a tou lenghole lengchate, kangtalai le sakolchung chongho, amahole amilenteu Judah mitele Jerusalem'a chengho chu, hiche khopi kotpi sunga lutnuntin, hiche kotpihi a-imatih-a umjing ding ahi." 
Jeremiah17:26 Chule amaho Judah khopiho-a konle, Jerusalem kimvela konin, Benjamin gama konle phaichama konin molsang ho-a konle, lhanglama konin govam thil tole ganlhaiho Pakai ina hinpouvinte." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ahinla nanghon choldoni jabolna dingle, choldoni-a Jerusalem kotpi-a lutna-a, pohgih pohlouna dinga kathu nangai lou uleh, chuche kotpiho phunga chu mei kakonsah-a, hichun Jerusalem'a leng inpiho akahvama, mitlouhel ding ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah18:1 Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hung lhung chun hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah18:2 kipat in, beldengpa ina chesuh-in, hikoma chu kathu kajahsah ding nahi, ati." 
Jeremiah18:3 Chuin beldengpa ina kachesuhle, vetan, aman bel dena akang kikola chun na anatonge." 
Jeremiah18:4 Chuin bonngana abelden chu beldengpa khutna chun asedentan, hitichun beldengpan den dinga aphatsah bangin, belchom khatnin adengtai." 
Jeremiah18:5 Chujouvin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin aseije," 
Jeremiah18:6 Vo Israel insung, beldengpa banga kabolmo nahiu vem? tin Pakaiyin aseije. Veuvin, beldengpa khutna bonngan banga khu kakhutna um nahilouvu ham? Vo Israel insung." 
Jeremiah18:7 Itih phat hama namkhat ham ahiloule lenggam khat ham chungchanga, bodoh ding, suhlhuh ding, suhmang ding tia kaseija," 
Jeremiah18:8 adouna-a kana seisa, chuche nam chu asetnaova kona akisih uva ahile, achunguva thilse bolding kagotsa-a kona kalung kakhelkit ding ahi." 
Jeremiah18:9 Itih phat hama namkhat ham ahiloule lenggam khat ham chungchanga semdoh dingle phudet dinga kaseina ding techun," 
Jeremiah18:10 kamitmu-a thilse aboluva, kathu angailou-ule, phatchom sah-u vinge kana tisa, thilpha-a kona chu kalung kisihkit jengding ahi." 
Jeremiah18:11 Hijeh chun tun, Judah mitele Jerusalem'a chengteho henga Pakai jin hitin aseije, veuvin, nangho dounan thilse kagongin, nangho dounan thil gilou kagonge. Tuhin mitin nakhangitlou naova konin hung kileuvin lang, nachonnaole nathil bolu aphacheh hisah-un, ati." 
Jeremiah18:12 Chuin amahon, kinepna aumpoi, kalung gotnu bang chehle mitin ama lung gilou ngaito bang cheh-a kachonjoh dingu bou ahi atiuve." 
Jeremiah18:13 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, tun nanghon Pathen helouho lah-a dong temun, hitobang chu kon ajah khah em? Israel nungah theng chun thil tijat umtah khat aboltai." 
Jeremiah18:14 Loujao songpi-a kona Lebanon buhbang hunglong chu, min dalhantin, twidap jenjen munchoma kona hunglong chu kidalhan tem?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Ajehchu kamiten eisumilun, pannabei jin gimnamtui ahalun, chule keng lampiho-a chena din, lamluiho-a konin apetnun alampi houva akipalun ahi." 
Jeremiah18:16 Agamu kamhelna dingle, a-itih-a leihit khongleu dingin asemun, ajotpa chanchu king vutna alu apei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Melma masanga solam hui thecheh banga amaho kathecheh uva, ahamset niule ang-ngat louva kanungsun ding ahi." 
Jeremiah18:18 Chuin amahon, hungun, Jeremiah dounan thilgon khat gong-u hite, ajehchu thempu-a kona danthupeh chu manglou ding ahin, miching ho-a kona thumop, themgaova kona jong thu beilou ding ahi. Hungun kamsungin ama vouhitin, athu khatcha ngaipou hite, atiuve." 
Jeremiah18:19 Neikhoh sah-in, Vo Pakai, eikinahpiho ogin khu ngaitemin." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ase chu aphan kilethuh intem? Ajehchu amahon kei thana dingin ko alaitauve. Amaho-a kona nalunghana nalahdohna dinga, amaho dinga thupha kisei chu geldoh-in." 
Jeremiah18:21 Hijeh chun achate chu kellhah na-a pedoh-in lang, athisanu chemjam hatna-a bunglha tan, chule ajiteu chu meithai soh uhen, apasalteu thisah inlang, agollhanghou gala chemjamin lousah-in." 
Jeremiah18:22 Photlot louva achunguva galmihon napuilut tengle, a-inhouva jong kana kijahen, ajehchu kei thana din ko alaijun, kakeng o-nadin thang akamuve." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ahijengvangin Pakai kei thana dinga kachunga akihousomu nangin nahenai, akhangit lounao ngaidam hih-in lang, achonsetnao jong namitmu-a konin noimang hih-in. Namasang-ah gal lelsahjon lang, nalunghan tengle hitichun bolin." 
Jeremiah19:1 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, chenlang beldengpa lei halkhat galanlang, miho lah-a tehse ho le thempu luiho gapuijin." 
Jeremiah19:2 Solam kotpi lutna-a Hinnom chapa phaicham lama potdoh-in lang, kaseipeh ding thuho chu gaphong jal-in." 
Jeremiah19:3 Chule Vo Judah lengte le Jerusalem'a cheng nanghon, Pakai thu chu ngaijuvin, janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, vetan, hiche mun chungahi thilse kalhunsah-a, ajachan akolu thah tuntun ding ahi, tin seijin;" 
Jeremiah19:4 Ajehchu amahon eidalhaovin, hiche munhi ahotbolun, asunga chun amahole apateu chule Judah lengten anahetkhah louvu pathen dangho din gimnamtui ahalun, hiche munhi setna neilouho thisan adiptauve." 
Jeremiah19:5 Amahon kei thupeh loule kei seilou, kalunga jong lutkhalou Baal henga govam thilpeh nadingle, achateu meija gona dingin Baal munsang ho jong asemun," 
Jeremiah19:6 hijeh chun vetan, hiche munhi Tophet, ahiloule Hinnom chate phaicham kiti talouva kithana phaicham joh kitina ding nikhoho hunglhung ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah19:7 Chule keiman hikoma Judah le Jerusalem kithumopna moh kahisah-a, amelmateu masangle ahinnao holte khutna chemjam'a kalousah-a, alongu chu chunga vachate le leija ganhingho anneh hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah19:8 Keiman hiche khopiho akamhel le leihit khongleuva kasema, hiche suhgamnaho jouse jeh-a chu ajotpa chan king vutna chesa diu ahi." 
Jeremiah19:9 Chule achapateu sa leh achanuteu sa kanehsah-a, khopi kiumkim vel sunga mitinin agolpa sa aneh uva, hikoma chu amelmateule ahinnao holten ano chinto diu ahi." 
Jeremiah19:10 Chutengle nangman nalhonpi ho mitmu-a hai chu nasuhkeh ding ahi. 
Jeremiah19:11 Chule ajah uva, janel Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, min beldengpa bel bitkit theilou dinga asuhkeh tobang ngeija hiche mitele khopihi kivuina ding abeihel kahse-a kasuhsetna Topheth'a kivui ding ahiuve, nati ding ahi." 
Jeremiah19:12 Hiti achu hiche khopile asunga chengho chunga kabola, Tophet khopi kabahsah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah19:13 Amahon inho jouse chunga van janelpi houna-a gimnamtui ahal uva, pathen dangho henga don thilpeh asunlhah jeh uvin Jerusalem inhole Judah lengte inho chu Tophet mun banga kisuboh ding ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah19:14 Chuphatnin Topheth'a konin Jeremiah chu Pakaiyin gaochanga asolna lama chun ahungin, Pakai inhong sunga chun adingin, mijouse henga aseitai." 
Jeremiah19:15 Israelte Pathen'in hitin aseije, amahon kathusei ngailouna dinga angongu avaiput jeh-un, veuvin, hiche khopile akhopi jouse adouna-a kaseisa thilse jouse chu kalhunsah ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah20:1 Tun Pakai insunga vaipo pipuija pang Immer chapa Pashhur Thempu'n, Jeremiah hiche thuho-a agao chu ajatan," 
Jeremiah20:2 chuin Pashhur in Jeremiah Themgao chu avon, Benjamin kotpi sunga soulah-a ahenin, hichu Pakai inkom ahi." 
Jeremiah20:3 Chuin ajingin ahitin ahi, Pashhur in soulah-a kon chun Jeremiah chu ahin puidohtai. Chuin Jeremiah in ajah-a, Pakaiyin namin Pashhur hilouvin “Magor-missabib” asahtai, ati." 
Jeremiah20:4 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, ven, nangma tahle nagol ho jouse dinga tijat umtah-a kasem ding nahin, amaho chu amelmateu chemjamin louvuntin, nangin namitna navet ding, chule Judah te jouse Babylon lengpa khutna kapeh-a, aman gal hinga Babylon'a akaija, amaho chu chemjam'a atha ding ahi." 
Jeremiah20:5 Chukalvala chu hiche khopi haona jouse, atohdoh jouseu, thil manlu jouse, Judah lengte gou jouse chu amelmateu khutna kapehdoh-a, hichu asuh chatvaijuva akilah uva, Babylon'a apoh diu ahi." 
Jeremiah20:6 Chule nang, Pashhur na-insunga cheng jousetoh gal hinga Babylon gama nacheuva, chuachu nathi ding, nangle jouthu nanaseipeh nagol ho jousetoh chu-a nakivuiden diu ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah20:7 Vo Pakai, nangin neijou lhepmin, joulhep kahitai, nangma kei sangin nahatjon, neinajou tai. Keima nisehle i-sah louvin kaumin, mitinin eitotnop naove." 
Jeremiah20:8 Kathusei chanin kapeng doh-in, hunamle suhmang jeng katijin ahi. Ajehchu Pakai thu chu kei dingin niseh-a mihouset nale i-sah louna ahitai." 
Jeremiah20:9 Chuin keiman ama chu phahpoh dangting, aminin jong thu seitaponge kati. Ahinla ama thu chu kalungsunga hin, kaguho sunga meikong kilhakhum abangin, kathohlel behsetnin kaumthei tapoi." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ahinla mi tamtah-in eiminset sahnao kajan, ningtina tijatna adime, amahon hehseuvin, hehseuhite akitiuve. Kakihet gilpiho jousen eichanglhi uvin, ijemtin lheplhah-in umintin, eihon ama jouvuhitin, achunga iphu kilah uhite akitiuve." 
Jeremiah20:11 Ahinla Pakai chun mihangsan tijat umtah bangin eiumpin, hijeh achu eibolgimho kipal lhuva eijo lou diu, alolhin loujeh uva chu jahcha lheh diu ahin, tonsotna akisuh dongnao chu suhmila umlou ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ahinla Vo janel Pakai, midih patepna lungsungle lunggil muletsohji, achunguva naphulahna neimusah-in. Ajehchu kachung chang thu nahenga kakhe lhahsoh ahi." 
Jeremiah20:13 Pakai henga la saovin, Pakai chu vahchoijun, ajehchu aman thilse bolho khutna konin migenthei ho hinna-a ahuhdoh-e." 
Jeremiah20:14 Kapenni chu sapset hihen lang, kanun eihin ni chu vangboh hidahen." 
Jeremiah20:15 Kapa henga nang dingin chapa khat apengtai tia thu hung lhutna, kapa kipasah pa chu sapset changhen." 
Jeremiah20:16 Hiche mipa chu Pakaiyin asuhchim, lungheilou khopiho toh banghen lang, jingkahle kana, sunphatle kho kisap jahen." 
Jeremiah20:17 Ajehchu kanu chu kalhankhuh anahi theina dingle, chule phattina anaobu keima dinga alet jingna dingin, aman naobu-a konin einathat tapon ahi." 
Jeremiah20:18 Kahinkho jachatna-a lhum mang ding, tohgimna le lunggimna mubep dinga, ibola naobu-a kona kahung pendoh hitam?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Zedekiah lengpan Jeremiah henga Melchiah chapa Pashhur le Maaseiah thempu chapa Zephaniah asol laija Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hunglhung chun aseije," 
Jeremiah21:1 Zedekiah lengpan Jeremiah henga Melchiah chapa Pashhur le Maaseiah thempu chapa Zephaniah asol laija Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hunglhung chun aseije," 
Jeremiah21:2 Kangeh nahi, keiho dingin Pakai chu neidoh peh-un, ajehchu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in kachunguva gal abolin, chuti ahile athilbol kidangho jouse dungjuijin Pakaiyin eihuvintin, ama keiho-a konin chetouthei nante, ati." 
Jeremiah21:3 Chuin Jeremiah'in ajah lhona, nangnin Zedekiah henga hitin seilhonin:" 
Jeremiah21:4 Israelte Pakai Pathen'in vetan, kul polama nangho na-umkol khumuva, Babylon lengpa le Chaldea mite nadouna diu, nakhut uva gal manchah ho chu kanung heiding, chule amaho chu hiche khopi sungahi kahin khopkhom ding ahi." 
Jeremiah21:5 Chule keimatah-in khut lhangdoh le banthahat toh, lunghangle lungsa tah-a, chule lungnatah puma nangho kasatdiu nahiuve." 
Jeremiah21:6 Chule hiche khopi sunga chengho mihem le ganhing agoma katha ding, hise nasatah-a kona thiding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah21:7 Hichejou chun Pakaiyin aseije, keiman Judah lengpa Zedekiah le asohte, chule mipi ho, chule hiche khopi-a hise-a, chemjam'a, kela kona hoidohho chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khutna, amelmateu khutna, ahinnao holte khutna kapehdoh ding, aman amaho chemjam'a atha-a, akhenlou diu, achunga hepina anei louhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah21:8 Chule hiche mite henga hiti ahi nasei ding ahi, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, veuvin, keiman namasanguva hinna lampile thina lampi kakoije." 
Jeremiah21:9 Hiche khopi sunga uma chu chemjam'a, kela, hise-a thiding: ahinla chedoh-a nangho hin um khuma Chaldea miho henga kipelutpa chu hingintin, chule ahinna chu ama dinga gala kichomdoh bangbep hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ajehchu keiman hiche khopi hin thilse atona dinga kamaingat ahitai, thilpha dinga ahipoi, tin Pakai jin aseije. Hichehi Babylon lengpa khutna kipedoh-a, aman meija ahalvam ding ahi." 
Jeremiah21:11 Judah lengpa insung thudola, Pakai thu ngaijun, tin seijin." 
Jeremiah21:12 Vo David insung mite, jingkahle thu tannun lang, misugenthei pa khutna konin hunama kichompa chu huhdoh-un, ajole thilse nabol jeh uvin, koima phelmit theilou kalunghana meikong tobang potdoh getninte, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah21:13 Vetemin, eidou diuva koi hungsuh-a, ichen naova koi hunglut dingham? tia seija, vo damphaija chengpa, chule phaicham songpi, Pakai keiman nangma kadouve, ati." 
Jeremiah21:14 Ahinla Pakaiyin natohga dungjuija kabolgima, gammang sunga mei kakousah-a, hichun akimvela thil jouse akahvam ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah22:1 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Judah lengpa ina chesuh-in lang, hiche thuhi gaseijin," 
Jeremiah22:2 Vo David laltouna-a tou Judah lengpa, nangle hiche kotpiho sunga lut nasohte le namite, Pakai thu chu ngaijuvin:" 
Jeremiah22:3 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nanghon thutan nale chonphatna bolunlang, nanghon mibolgima konin hunama kichompa chu huhdoh un: gamdang mi paneilou ahiloule meithai henga adihloule pumhat boldaovin, hiche mun'a hin setnabei thisan jong sohih-un." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ajehchu nanghon hitichu nabol uva ahile, kangtalai le sakola amale asohte, chule amite hiche kotpi ahi hunglut uva, David laltouna-a toudiu ahi." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ahinla hiche thuho hi nangai louvule, keimatah kaki hahsel ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, hiche inhi akeohela hung umding ahi." 
Jeremiah22:6 Ahinla Pakaiyin, Judah leng insung jah-a hitin aseije, nangma kei dinga Gilead nahin Lebanon luchang nahi: hijengjongle gamthiple mi chenlouna khopi-a kasem teiding nahi." 
Jeremiah22:7 Chule nadou ding misumang ho, gal manchahto kithocheh kagona, na cedar thing deichomho aphuh uva, mei sunga aselut dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah22:8 Nam tamtah-in hiche khopihi ahin hopaova, amitakip min aheng akom henga, ibola Pakaiyin hiche khopi lentah hi ahitibol hitam? atidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah22:9 Chuteng amahon, ajehchu amahon Pakai Pathen thulhun adonpouvin, pathen dangho ahouvuva ajen jeh-u ahi, tia adonbut dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah22:10 Nangho mithi dingin kaphih-un, lunghempi jong bolhih-un: apotdohpa ding joh-in lhasetah-in kapmun, ajehchu ama hung kilekit talou ding, apenna gam jong mukit lou ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin ati, hiche mun'a kona potdoh apa Josiah khela lengchang Judah leng Josiah chapa Shallum thudola, ama chulama hung kilekit louhel ding ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah22:12 Ahinla gal hinga akaina lamu mun'a chu thia, hiche gamhi amukit louding ahitai." 
Jeremiah22:13 Chonphat louna-a a-in kisah-a, adihlouva a-indan kisempa, aheng akom manbeija goija, atohman peloupa chu, Ohe! ada ahi." 
Jeremiah22:14 In lentahle indan lentah chule bangkot ho umin kisah inge, tia cedar thinga sa-a, sandul jetna naloi ahi." 
Jeremiah22:15 Nangin cedar jenga najo jeh-a chu nalengchan ding ham? Napa chun aneh-a, adonna, thutannale thudih anabolla, hichu ama dinga anaphalheh hilou ham?" 
Jeremiah22:16 Aman vaicha lhasamho thu anatandih jin, hichu amadin anaphalheh ji-e: hichehi keima hetna hilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah22:17 Ahinla namitle nalungthim chu nakiloset na dingle, setnabei thisan sona, suhgenthei nale pumhat manna ding bep ahi." 
Jeremiah22:18 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin, Judah leng Josiah chapa Jehoiakim thudol hitihin aseije, amahon Vo kasopipa, vo kasopinu tia alunghempi loudiu, amahon ama dinga, vo pakai, ahiloule vo jana-a aloupina, tia alunghempi loudiu ahi." 
Jeremiah22:19 Ama sangan kivui banga kivui ding, Jerusalem kotpi kallama kikaija kipaidoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah22:20 Lebanon'a chetouvin lang, gakap temin, chule Bashana gakisenin lang, Abarim'a konin gakapmin. Ajehchu nangai jouse kimanthahsah ahitai." 
Jeremiah22:21 Keiman naphatna ding kasei ahin, ahinla nangman ngaiponge nati. Hichehi naneolaija na-umchan ahin, hitia chu kathu nangailou ahi." 
Jeremiah22:22 Huijin nakelngoi chin jouse semlih intin, nalungsette gal hinga chediu, nagitlouna jouse jeh-a najachat ding, chule nakisuhdong ding ahi." 
Jeremiah22:23 Vo cedar phunga bu kiset, Lebanon'a chengte, numei naosonat banga natna nachunga ahungchuh phungteng, iti lungset naum tadem?" 
Jeremiah22:24 Keima kahing jinge tin Pakaiyin aseije, Judah leng Jehoiakim chapa Koniah chu kakhut jetlama melchihna hijongle chun, kasutlhah ding nahin:" 
Jeremiah22:25 Nahinna holtehole amaiju nagin jingho, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khut ngeija, chule Chaldea miho khutna kapehdoh ding nahi." 
Jeremiah22:26 Chule keiman nangmale nahinga nanu chu napenna hilou gamchombeh-a kapuilutna, hia chu nathi ding ahi." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ahinla amaho akilekit nomnao gama chu kilekit louhel ding ahiuve. 
Jeremiah22:28 Hiche mipa Koniah hi mi isahlou milim chipsa chu hijam? Amahi deilouhel hitam? Ibola amale achilhahte kipaidoh-a, amahon ahetlouvu gama kipaidoh-a hiuvaham?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Vo leiset, leiset, leiset, Pakai thu chu ngaitemin." 
Jeremiah22:30 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hiche mipahi chaneilou, ahinkho sunga lolhing lou ding ahi, tin suntaovin: ajehchu achilhah khatcha lolhing lou ding, David laltouna-a touva Judah gama vaihom umlou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah23:1 Kakelngoite hamset na-a sugamle thecheh-a kelngoiching ho adau ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:2 Hijeh chun kamite vah-a kelngoiching ho douna-in Israelte Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, nanghon ka kelngoi hon nathe cheh-un, nano mangun, navil pouve: veuvin, nathil gilou bolu chunga gotna kapeh ding nahiuve, tin Pakai jin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:3 Chule ka kelngoi hon amohho chu kadeldohna gamho jouse-a kona kachom khoma, ahong sunguva kalepui kitna, amaho gatheijuva pungthei diu ahi." 
Jeremiah23:4 Keiman amaho vahdinga achunguva kelngoiching ho katundoh ding, amaho kichatalou ding, lungjong lungthoitalou diu: imacha jong lhasam talou diu ahi, tin Pakai jin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:5 Vetan, keiman David dinga chonphatna bah khat katundoh-a, leng khatnin vai ahoma lolhing ding, leisetna thudih-a thu atan ding nikhoho ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ama nikho sunga Judah kihuh hinga, Israel bitkeija cheng ding ahin: chule ama kikouna ding min chu Ichon phatnao Pakai kitiding ahi." 
Jeremiah23:7 Hijeh chun ven, Egypt gama kona Israel chate hinpui dohpa Pakai chu ahing jinge, atikit louna diu nikhoho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:8 Ahin sahlam gamkaija kona kanadelmangna gamkaiho jouse-a kona, Israel insung chilhah hinpui touva, kaihoipa chu ahing jinge, chule amaho agamtah uva cheng dingu ahiuve." 
Jeremiah23:9 Themgaoho jeh-in kalunghi kasunga apohkeh tan, kagu jouse akilong gamin, Pakai jehle athenna thuho jeh-in, jukhampa jun ajo mipatoh kabangtan ahi." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ajehchu gamsunghi jonthanhoi adimsetnin, kihehsetna jeh-in gamsung alunghemin, gamthip nomlaiho agolhan, alamlhah-u asetan, ahetnao adihtapoi." 
Jeremiah23:11 Themgaole Thempu agomin aboh geltan ahi; henge, ka-insunga jong agitlounau kamudohtai, tin Pakai chun aseije." 
Jeremiah23:12 Hijeh-a chu alampiu chu amaho dinga muthima lamnal tobang hintin, amaho kino lele uva, chua lhugam diu: achunguva thilse kapohlut ding, gotna achan kum-u hiding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:13 Samaria Themgaoho lah-a ngolna kamudoh-in, amaho Baal jenga agao vun, kami Israelte achonsetsah taove." 
Jeremiah23:14 Jerusalem themgaoho lah-a jong tijat umtah thil kamu doh-e: amahon jonthanhoi abolun, jou amangun agitlounauva kona khatcha ahung kile louna din, thilse bolho khuttha ahatsah-un, amaho abonun kei dingin Sodom abangun, chule asunga chengho chu Gomorrah tobang ahiuve." 
Jeremiah23:15 Hijeh chun janel Pakaiyin themgaoho thudol chu hitin aseije, ven, keiman amaho thinglunga kavah-a, thinkha twi kadonsah diu ahi. Ajehchu Jerusalem themgaoho-a konin gamsung pumpi-a kisuhbohna ajaltai." 
Jeremiah23:16 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, naheng uva gao thusei themgaoho thu chu ngaihih-un, amahon manmo nasouva agaothu seiju jong amaho lunggela kon ahin, Pakai kamsunga kon ahipoi." 
Jeremiah23:17 Amahon einahsah louho henga, Pakaiyin asei ahi, nanghon chamna nanei diu ahi, atiuve. Chule amahon amaho lungngaito banga chonho mitin henga chun, nachunga thilse imacha chuponte, atiuve." 
Jeremiah23:18 Ajehchu Pakai thumop na-a koi gadinga, athu ja-a koiham?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Vetan, Pakai lungsatna chimpei khohtah ngeichu ahung nunge, hichu migilou luchunga khohtah-a chuding ahi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Pakai lunghanna chu atohdoh kahsehle, alung ngaito amolso kahse-a kilekit louding ahin, ninunung tengle chamkimtah-a nahet them diu ahi." 
Jeremiah23:21 Hiche themgaohohi kasol ahipon, hijongle alhaijun, kenla amaho thu kamoppon, ahinla agaochanguve." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ahinla amaho kathumopna-a dinga hiuhenlang, kamite kathu ajahsah-u hile, amahon alampiu phalouva kon chule athilbolu phalouva kona alehei diu ahi." 
Jeremiah23:23 Keima naitah-a um Pathen, gamlatah-a umlou Pathen chu kahilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:24 Kamuthei louna dinga munthipma kiseljouva mi umintem? Pakai jin ati. Keima vanle leisetna dimsoh kahilouham? tin Pakaiyin aseije. 
Jeremiah23:25 Kamina jouva gaova themgaoho thusei kajan, mang kaneije, mang kaneije, atiuve." 
Jeremiah23:26 Jouva gaothusei themgaoho lungsunga itih chanpi hichehi umding ham? Henge, amaho alungsung uva mijoulhep themgaoho ahiuve." 
Jeremiah23:27 Apateuvin Baal jeh-a kamin asuhmil banguva, aheng akomuva mitinin amang aseijuva, kamite chu kamin suhmilsahna ding angaitou ahi." 
Jeremiah23:28 Mangnei themgaovin mangthu seihen lang, kathu neija chun kathu tahsan umtah-in seihen: suhlouchang dinga asi chu ipi ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:29 Kathuhi meikong tobang hilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije. Songpi disela vokeh sehtum tobang hilou ham? 
Jeremiah23:30 Hijeh chun vetan, keiman aheng akoma kona kathu gumang themgao takip chu kadou ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:31 Veovin, aman aseije, tia aleiju mangcha-a themgaoho chu keiman kadouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:32 Veovin, mang dihlou gaothua seija miho hille-a, ajounaole anahsahmo naova kamite puise-a, keisola hilou, thu kapeh jong hilouho chu kadou ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Hijeh achu hiche mitehi aphatchom sah louhel diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah23:33 Hiche mitele themgao, ahiloule thempu khattouvin, Pakai pohgih chu ipiham? tia nadoh ule, chuteng nangin ajah uva, ipi pohgih ham? Nangho tahhi kapaidoh ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije, tin seijin." 
Jeremiah23:34 Chule Pakai pohgih, tia seiding themgaole thempu mipa thudol chu, chuche mipa tahle a-insung chu talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah23:35 Mitinin aheng akomchehle asopipa cheh henga, Pakaiyin ipi adonbut nem? Chule Pakaiyin ipi aseijem? tia nasei diu ahi." 
Jeremiah23:36 Chule Pakai pohgih tia naphahpoh kit loudiu ahitai. Ajehchu amitakip thu chu ama pohgih hiding, ajehchu i-Pathen'u janel Pakai Pathen hingjing thu chu akaleh-in nahei gamtaove." 
Jeremiah23:37 Themgaopa henga chu hiti ahi nasei ding ahi, Pakaiyin ipi nadonbut nem? Chule Pakaiyin ipi aseijem?" 
Jeremiah23:38 Ahinla Pakai pohgih chu, nati uva pat hiche thu nasei jeh-un, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Pakai pohgih chu tia nasei jeh-un, Pakai pohgih chu natikit loudiu ahi, tia naheng uva thu kahinthot ahi." 
Jeremiah23:39 Hijeh chun, ven kei keimatah-in nangho kasuhmil uva, nanghole napateu kapehsa khopi chu kapaidoh-a, ka-angsunga kona kaledoh diu nahiuve." 
Jeremiah23:40 Chule a-itih-a nachung uva housetnale tonsot jachatna kahin pohlut khumuva, hichu suhmiltih umtalou ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah24:1 Babylon lengpa Nabuchadnezzer in, Judah leng Jehoiakim chapa Jeconiah le Judah milenho, thingthem hole thihthem ho Jerusalem'a kona Babylon'a apuimang nungin Pakaiyin Pakai houin maija chun theichang pocha ni einamu sah-in ahi." 
Jeremiah24:2 Pocha khat chu theichang phatah, theichang gamasapen tobang hel ahin, pocha khatjoh chu theichang phaloubeh, nehthei louhel, phamo behseh jeng ahi." 
Jeremiah24:3 Chujouvin Pakai chun kajah-a, Jeremiah ipi namu em? eiti, chuin keiman theichang ho kati; theichang phaho chu aphalheh-in, chule phaloutah nehthei louhel, chuti phatmo jeng ahi, kati." 
Jeremiah24:4 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin aseije," 
Jeremiah24:5 Pakai Israelte Pathen'in hitin aseije, hiche theichang phamoho bangahi Judah mite, hiche mun'a kona Chaldea gama kasoldohho, gal hinga kikaiho chu aphatna diuva kahet ding ahi." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ajehchu achunguva aphatna diuva kavet lhih jinga, hiche gamahi kahinlepui ding: kasahdoh-a kasotlhuh lou ding, kaphudetna kabodoh lou ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah24:7 Keima Pakai kahi ahetdohna diu lungthim khat kapeh-a, amaho kamite hiuva, keima a-Pathen'u kahi ding ahi. Ajehchu amaho alung pumpiuva kahenga hungkile diu ahitai." 
Jeremiah24:8 Theichang phalou, nehthei hilou, chuti phatmo bang chun tahbeh-in Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Judah lengpa Zedekiah le amilenho Jerusalem'a umden, hiche gama amohho, chule Egypt gamsunga chengho chu, chutia chu kapehdoh ding:" 
Jeremiah24:9 chule kanomangna ding mun jouse-a, seisetle thuchih dinga seichahle gaosap dinga, leiset lenggam jouse-a akisuh khahna diuva chaulele dinga kapehdoh ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah24:10 Chule keiman amahole apateu kanapehsa gama kona amanthah hel kahseuva alah uva chemjam, kellhah, hiset kasolpeh ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah25:1 Judah lengpa Josiah chapa Jehoiakim lengchan kal kumli channa-a, Judah mite jouse chungchang thudol Jeremiah henga hung lhung chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kumkhatna ahin," 
Jeremiah25:2 hichu Jeremiah themgaovin Judah mite jousele Jerusalem'a chengte jouse henga aseije. 
Jeremiah25:3 Judah leng Amon chapa Josiah kum somle kumthum na-a pat tuni geijin hichu kum somni le kumthum ahin, Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, keiman naheng uva kaseijin, matah-in kathouvin, kaseijin, ahinla nangaipouve." 
Jeremiah25:4 Chule Pakaiyin naheng uva asohte themgaoho jouse ahinsolin, jingpi-a thouvin ahinsolin, ahinla nanghon nangaipeh pouvin, jahdin jong nanau nasung pouve." 
Jeremiah25:5 Amahon aseijun, amitakip tuhin alampi phalouva konle thilphalou nabol uva konin hungkileu hen lang, Pakaiyin nanghole napateu atonsot tonsotna dinga anapeh gama chun chengtauvin." 
Jeremiah25:6 Chule pathen dangho chu jendingle hou dingin juidaovin lang, nakhutsoh uva lunghansah din neiphinse hih uvin, chutile bolsetda taovinge." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ahijengvangin kathu nangaipouvin, hitichun nakisuh khahna diuva nakhutsoh uva lunghansah din neiphinse uvin, ahi tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah25:8 Hijeh chun janel Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, nanghon kathu nangailou jeh un:" 
Jeremiah25:9 Veuvin, mi solingting sahlam gama insung jousele kasoh Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar hiche gam dou dingle asunga chengho, chule akimvela namho jouse sumanghel dinga kahinpuija, amaho chun kidang asah-va cheh sasa diu, chule a-itih-a kamhela kalha ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah25:10 Chukalvala amaho-a kona kipana ogin, thanopna ogin, moulang ogin, mounu ogin, sumhei song kiheh gin, chule thaomeivah kasuhbei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:11 Hiche gam pumpihi kamhelle datmotah-a umding, hiche namho chun Babylon lengpa chu kum somsagi ajendiu ahi." 
Jeremiah25:12 Chule kum somsagi lhinteng hiti ding ahi, akhangit lounao jeh-a Babylon lengpa chule hiche Chaldea mite gam chu talen kapeh-a a-itih-a dinga kamhela kalha ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah25:13 Chule hiche gam douna-a kaseisa thuho jouse nam jouse douna-a Jeremiah themgaovin anasei, hiche lekhabu kisun jouse ngei chu kahin lhunsah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ajehchu amahon nam tamtah le leng lenho ajendiu, atoh-u dungjuile akhuttah uva athilbolu dungjuija kalethuh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:15 Ajehchu Israelte Pathen Pakai chun kahenga hitin aseije, kakhutna lunghanna khonhi lanlang, kasolna ding namho jouse chu donsah in." 
Jeremiah25:16 Chule amahon adonuva alah uva kasol ding chemjamho jeh-a chu lonle leuva ngoldiu ahi. 
Jeremiah25:17 Chuin Pakai khutna khon chu kalan, Pakaiyin eisolna namho jouse chu kadonsah in ahi." 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerusalem le Judah khopiho, chua lenghole milenho chu tulai bangahi kamhela, datmo uma, leihit khongleuva gaosapma umsah dingin," 
Jeremiah25:19 Egypt lengpa Pharaoh le asohte, chule amilentele amipite:" 
Jeremiah25:20 Mi kichoh hal ho jousele Uz gamsunga lengho jouse, Philistine gamsunga lengho jouse, chule Ashkelon, Azzah, Ekron chule Ashdod na amoh um jouse," 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom le Moab, chule Ammon chate," 
Jeremiah25:22 Trye lengte jousele Zidon lengte jouse, chule twipi gala twikol gamho lengte," 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan, Tema, Buz chule gamningkoi kikhonnaho jouse," 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabia lengho jousele nelphaija cheng michoplop ho jouse," 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri lengte jousele Elam lengte jouse, chule Media lengte jouse," 
Jeremiah25:26 Chule naija gamla sahlam gamkai lengho jouse khat khatna, lei chunga vannoi lenggam jouse, chule amaho nunga chu Sheshach lengpan adon ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:27 Hijeh achu ajah uva Israel Pathen janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, donun lang kham uvin, chule phidohun lang lhu uvin, thoukit tahih un. Nalah uva kahinsol ding chemjam jehchun, tia nasei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:28 Chule hiti ding ahi, amahon nakhutna khon chu lah-a donding adaova ahile, nangman ajah uva, janel Pakaiyin nadon teidiu ahi ati, nati ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:29 Ajehchu ven, kamina kivo hiche khopi chunga thilse kahin pohlut patding ahitan, nangho talen manlouvin umun natem? Nangho talen manlouvin umpouvin nate: ajehchu leiset chung cheng jouse chunga chemjam kakou ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah25:30 Hijeh chun amaho jouse dounan hiche thuho hi gaovin, ajah uva seijin, chunga konin Pakai hung kitumin tin, achenna munthenga konin a-aw hinsodohin tin, thanei tah-a muntheng chunga kituma, lengpiga chilho banga, leiset chunga cheng jouse douna-a aoding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:31 Leiset kolmong geija aw khat kitollele ding ahi, ajehchu Pakaiyin nam jouse toh kinelna aneijin, aman tahsa hing jouse thu atanna, migiloute jouse chemhema apehdoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah25:32 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, vetan, setna chu nam khatna kona nam khatna kitollele ding, chule leiset kolmonga kona chimpei nasatah hungnung ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:33 Chule chuche ni-a Pakai mitha chu leiset kolmong langkhatna pat langkhat gei hiding ahin, amaho chu kilunghempi louding, kichom khom lou dingu, vui jong kivui louding, amaho leichunga eh-a pangdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah25:34 Nangho kelngoiching ho pengun lang kapmun, nangho kelngoihon lah-a pipuiho vut lah-a kilih leuvin, ajehchu nakithana diule naki thecheh na diu nikho abulhing tai. Chule dei umtah um le bel banga nalhahmang diu ahi." 
Jeremiah25:35 Kelngoichingpan jamna ding ahetlou ding, kelngoihon lah-a pipuipan jong hoidohna ding aneilou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah25:36 Kelngoiching ho ka awgin le, kelngoihon pipuipa pen awgin kija ding ahi. Ajehchu Pakaiyin ahamhing jouse asuhmang pehtai." 
Jeremiah25:37 Chule tijat umtah Pakai lungsat jeh-in mongtah-a chennaho akisumang tai. 
Jeremiah25:38 Aman keipibahkai chal bangin akiselna adalhatai. Ajehchu suhgentheina tijat umjehle, alungsatna tijat umtah jeh-in gamsung chu akamheltai." 
Jeremiah26:1 Judah lengpa Josiah chapa Jehoiakim lengchan kipat in, Pakaiya konin hiche thuhi ahung lhungin," 
Jeremiah26:2 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Pakai houin leitola dingin lang, Pakai insunga chibai boh-a hung, Judah khopiho jouse jah-a, ajah uva sei dinga kathupeh thujouse chu cheng khatcha lhajah louvin seijin." 
Jeremiah26:3 Hiti achu amahon angaijuva, alampi phalouva kona amitakip akileheijule, amaho thilse bol jeh-a achunguva bol dinga kagotsa thilse akona kalung kisih thei ahi." 
Jeremiah26:4 Chule nangin ajah uva, Pakaiyin hitin ati, nanghon namasanguva kakoi kadanthupeh najuidinguva;" 
Jeremiah26:5 naheng uva kahinsol kasohte themgaoho, matah-a thouva hungkisol ho thuho ngai ding golouva nadon daole," 
Jeremiah26:6 chuteng hiche inhi Shiloh kabahsah-a, leiset nam jouse gaosap kahisah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Hitichun thempuho le themgaoho chule mijousen Pakai insunga Jeremiah thusei chu ajataove. 
Jeremiah26:8 Tun ahitin ahi, mipi ho jouse henga sei dinga Pakaiyin athupeh Jeremiah in aseichai phatnin, thempuho le themgaoho, chule mijouse chun ama chu amanun, nathitei ding ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah26:9 Ibola nangma Pakai mina nagao chana, hiche inhi Shiloh bang ding, chule hiche khopiho chenna louva kamhel ding ahi natiham? atiuve. Chuin mipi ho chu Pakai insunga chun Jeremiah dounan akikhom taove." 
Jeremiah26:10 Judah milenhon hiche thu chu ajah phatnun, leng ina konin Pakai ina ahung touvun, Pakai in lutna kotpi thah-a chun atoutaove." 
Jeremiah26:11 Chuin thempuho le themgaoho, milenhole mipi jouse jah-a chun, hichepahi thi dinga lom ahi. Ajehchu nanghon nanauva najah bangu chun hiche khopi dounan gaothu aseije, atiuve." 
Jeremiah26:12 Chuin Jeremiah in milenho jousele mipi jouse jah-a, Pakaiyin hiche inle hiche khopi douna-a nanghon najah-u thu jousehi gao dinga eihinsol ahi." 
Jeremiah26:13 Hijeh chun tun nalampiule nathil bolu kisem phatnun lang, Pakai na-Pathen'u thu ngaijun, chutile Pakaiyin nangho douna-a thilse aphondohsa chu alung kisih kit ding ahi." 
Jeremiah26:14 Keidin vang, veuvin, nakhut uva um kahi. Pha nasah bangule nadei bangun neibol taovin." 
Jeremiah26:15 Ahinla kichentah-in heuvin, keima neithauva ahile nanghotah leh hiche khopi chule asunga chengho chungahi setnabei thisan nakipohlut teidiu ahi. Ajehchu hiche thu jouse naheng uva sei dinga Pakaiyin eihinsol tahmong ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah26:16 Chujouvin milenhole mipi jousen thempuho le themgaoho henga chun, hichepahi thi dinga lom ahipoi. Ajehchu aman ihenguva Pakai i-Pathen'u mina thu asei ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah26:17 Chujouvin gamsunga upa phabep akipatdoh- un, mipi akikhomho jouse henga chun aseijun," 
Jeremiah26:18 Judah lengpa Hezekiah nikho laijin Morasthih mi Micah anagao changin, Judah mite jouse jah-a janel Pakaiyin hitin anati, Zion chu lou banga kikaija, Jerusalem chu alhuh-a umding, chule insahna mol chu gammang munsang bang ding ahi, anatin ahi." 
Jeremiah26:18 Judah lengpa Hezekiah nikho laijin Morasthih mi Micah anagao changin, Judah mite jouse jah-a janel Pakaiyin hitin anati, Zion chu lou banga kikaija, Jerusalem chu alhuh-a umding, chule insahna mol chu gammang munsang bang ding ahi, anatin ahi." 
Jeremiah26:19 Judah lengpa Hezekiah le Judah mijouse chun anatha beh monguvem? Aman Pakai agingin, Pakai chu angeh in, Pakaiyin amaho douna-a thilse anaphondohsa chu alung kisih kit hilouham? Hiti achu ihinnao douna-a thil setah ikilhut khumdiu ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah26:20 Chule Kirjath-jearim mi, Shemaiah chapa Urijah kiti mi khat jong Pakai minin anagaovin, aman hiche khopi dounale hiche gam douna in, Jeremiah thusei dungjuijin anagaovin:" 
Jeremiah26:21 Chuin Jehoiakim lengpan, agal hat ho jousele milenho jousen ajah phatnun, lengpan ama chu thadin aholtai. Ahinla Urijah in hichu ajah phatnin, akichatan, ajamin Egypt gama achetai." 
Jeremiah26:22 Chuin Jehoiakim lengpan Achbor chapa amin Elnathan chu mi phabep khatto Egypt gama chun asolin ahi. 
Jeremiah26:23 Chuin Urijah chu Egypt gama konin agamandoh-un, Jehoiakim lengpa henga ahinpuijun, aman chemjamin athatnin milhamho lhan sunga athilong chu asepluttai." 
Jeremiah26:24 Ahijengvangin amahon ama chu mipi khutna tha dinga apehdoh louna dingun Shaphan chapa Ahikam khut chun Jeremiah chu aumpin ahi. 
Jeremiah27:1 Judah leng Josiah chapa Jehoiakim lengchan kipat in Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga hiche thuhi ahung lhungin aseije. 
Jeremiah27:2 Pakaiyin kahenga hitin aseije, namkoljon kisemin lang nangonga kivonlang," 
Jeremiah27:3 hiho chu Edom lengpa, Moab lengpa, Ammon lengpa, Tyre lengpa, Zidon lengpa henga, Jerusalem'a Judah lengpa Zedekiah henga palai hungjiho khutna gahthot temin," 
Jeremiah27:4 chule apakaiteu henga asei diuvin thu pen, janel Pakai Israelte Pathen'in hitin aseije, tia apakaiteu henga nasei diu ahi." 
Jeremiah27:5 Keiman kathilboltheina nasatahle kaban lhang doh-a, leiset chule achunga um mihemle ganhinghohi kasema, hichu pha kasahsah kapehji ahi." 
Jeremiah27:6 Chule tuahi keiman hiche gamhohi kasohpa Babylon leng Nebuchadnezzar khutna kapehdoh ahitai. Chule gamlah-a, ganhingho jong ama jen dinga kapehtha ahitai." 
Jeremiah27:7 Chule ama gam mongmong chu ahunglhun kahsen nam jousen ama, achapa, achapa chapa ajen diu ahi." 
Jeremiah27:8 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar jen nomlou chuche namle lenggam, chule Babylon lengpa namkoljon noija angong donomlou, chuche nam chu chemjam'a, kela, hise-a, ama khutna chu kasuh manghel kahse-a talen kapeh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseijin ahi." 
Jeremiah27:9 Hijeh chun nathemgao hou, na-aisan hou, namang neihou, ailhim themho, doithemho, naheng uva Babylon lengpa najen lou diu ahi, tiho thu ngaihih-un." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ajehchu amahon, nagam uva kona gamlatah-a nakichona diu, kanomangna diu, namanthaina diuva thujouva gaova ahiuve." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ahinla Babylon lengpa namkoljon noija angong do-a, jenho chu, agamuva kaumden sah-a, aleisetnu akilhouva, chengden diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah27:12 Hiche thuho jouse banghin Judah lengpa Zedekiah henga jong kaseijin, Babylon lengpa namkoljon noija na-ngong donlang amale amite jenin lang, hingin tin kaseije." 
Jeremiah27:13 Babylon lengpa jen nomlou nam douna-a Pakaiyin anasei chemjam, kel, chule hise-a kona nanghole namite ibola nathi jeng diuham?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Hijeh chun, Babylon lengpa najen lou diu ahi, tia themgaoho thusei chu ngaihih-un, ajehchu amahon naheng uva jouva gao ahiuve." 
Jeremiah27:15 Ajehchu keiman amaho kasolpoi, tin Pakaiyin aseije; ahijengvangin amahon kaminin, nangho kanomang theina dingule namanthah theina dinguva, nanghole naheng uva gaochangho, namanthah theina dinguva jouthu-a gaochang ahiuve, ati." 
Jeremiah27:16 Keiman thempuho le hiche miteho jouse henga jong kaseijin Pakaiyin hitin ati, veuvin, Pakai ina umle belho chu Babylon'a kona hung kiletol vahding ahitai, tia gaova themgaoho thu ngaihih-un, amaho thujouva gao ahitaove, kati." 
Jeremiah27:17 Amaho thu ngaihih-un, Babylon lengpa jenun lang, hinguvin, ibola hiche khopi kamhela umding ham?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Ahinla amaho themgao ahiuve, Pakai thu amaho-a auma ahile, janel Pakai henga tuhin Pakai ina kidalha umle bel ho, chule Judah lengpa insungale Jerusalem'a ho Babylon'a akitol louna dingin, tuhin taovuhen." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ajehchu khomho, twikongho, akitun naho, chule hiche khopi sunga um le bel amoh kidalha ho chungchang thu chu janel Pakaiyin aseijin;" 
Jeremiah27:20 Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in, Jerusalem'a kona Babylon gamgeija Judah lengpa Jehoiakim chapa Jeconiah le Jerusalem'a umle bel ho, milenho jouse gal hinga akai laija anapoh lou ahi." 
Jeremiah27:21 Pakai ina kidalha, Judah lengpa inle Jerusalem'a umle bel ho chungchang thu chu janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije." 
Jeremiah27:22 Hitiho chu Babylon'a kipoding, keiman amaho kavil kahse-a, chuachu umdiu ahi, tin Pakai chun aseije; chujoule keiman kale poh-a hiche munahi avela kakoi kitding ahi." 
Jeremiah28:1 Chuin Judah lengpa Zedekiah lengchan kipat, kum mama chun ahitin ahi, akumlina lha nga lhina-a chun, Gibeon'a mi Azur chapa Hananiah themgao chun, Pakai insunga thempuho le mipi ho angsung tah-a kahenga thu aseijin," 
Jeremiah28:2 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitihin aseije, keiman Babylon lengpa namkoljon kasubong tai, atie ati." 
Jeremiah28:3 Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in hiche mun'a kona alahdoh-a, Babylon'a apoh Pakai ina umle belho jouse chu, kumni lhin sunga hiche munahi kahin pohlut kit ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah28:4 Keima Judah leng Jehoiakim chapa Jeconiah le Judah mi sohchang jouse Babylon'a cheho chu, hiche munahi kahin puikit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, ajehchu Babylon lengpa namkoljon kaheboh ding ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah28:5 Chuin Jeremiah themgaovin Hananiah themgao henga chun themgaoho le Pakai insunga ding mipi jouse mitmu tah in aseijin: 
Jeremiah28:6 Jeremiah themgao tahchun, hihen, Pakaiyin chutin bolhen, Pakai ina umle belhole gal hinga kikai jouse chu, Babylon'a kona hiche mun'a hinlelhut kit dinga nagaona thu chu Pakaiyin molsohen." 
Jeremiah28:7 Hijongle tu-a hiche nangle mijouse nakhanga jah dinga kaseihi ngaitemin. 
Jeremiah28:8 Nangle kei masanga themgao luiho chun, gam tamtah le lenggam tamtah douna thule thilse chule hise thu anagao jiuve." 
Jeremiah28:9 Themgao chamna thu gaopa chu, chuche themgaovin asei chu aguilhun tengle, themgaopa chu Pakai hinsol tahbeh ahi akihejie, ati." 
Jeremiah28:10 Chuin Hananiah themgaovin Jeremiah themgao ngonga kona namkoljon chu alan, ahehbongtai." 
Jeremiah28:11 Chuin Hananiah-in mijouse anga chun, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar namkoljon chu nam jouse ngonga kona kumni lhingset sunga hiche bang ngeijahi kasuhboh ding ahi ati. Chuin Jeremiah themgao chu alampia akichetai." 
Jeremiah28:12 Chuin Jeremiah themgao ngonga namkoljon chu Hananiah themgaovin aheboh jouvin Jeremiah themgao henga Pakai thu chu ahung lhungin aseije. 
Jeremiah28:13 Chenlang Hananiah gahilin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije. Nangman thing namkol ho chubou naheboh ahin, hicheho khela chu keiman thih namkol kahin semdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Ajehchu janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije. Amahon Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar kin aboltheina diuva hiche namho jouse ngonga thih namkoljon hi kabucheh ahitai. Amahon ajencheh diu ahi, gamsa jouse jong kapeh ahitai, ati ahungtin ahi." 
Jeremiah28:15 Chuin Jeremiah themgaovin Hananiah themgao henga, ngaijin tun Hananiah, Pakaiyin nang nasolpoi, nangin hiche mitehohi jou khat natahsan sah ahibouve." 
Jeremiah28:16 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin ati, vetan, leiset chunga kona kapaidoh ding nahi: Pakai douna-a douna thu nahil jeh-in, tukuma nathitei ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah28:17 Hitichun Hananiah themgao chu chuche kum mama lha sagina in athitan ahi. 
Jeremiah29:1 Tun Nebuchadnezzar'in Babylon gama gal hing akaimangho, sohchang upaho, thempuho, themgaoho chule mipi ho jouse henga Jeremiah themgaovin Jerusalem'a kon lekha athot thuchengho chu hichehohi ahi." 
Jeremiah29:2 (Jeconiah lengpa le lengnu, nukiso ho, Judah le Jerusalem'a milenho, thingthemho, thih suho, Jerusalem adalhah nungu chun):" 
Jeremiah29:3 Shaphan chapa Elasah, Hilkiah chapa Gemariah khutna lekha chu apohsah-in ahi (amani chu Judah lengpa Zedekiah'in Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar henga asol ahin):" 
Jeremiah29:4 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in Jerusalem'a kona Babylon gama puimanga aumsah, akipuimang sohchangho henga hitin aseije." 
Jeremiah29:5 Nanghon in kisah-un lang, hia chun chengun, chule hon kibolun lang aga chu neuvin." 
Jeremiah29:6 Ji neijun lang chanu chapa hingun, nachapateo jiding puipeh unlang, nachanu teo inneipu ho peovin, chutile chanu chapa hinguntin, hia chun pungun natin kemsuh pouvin nate." 
Jeremiah29:7 Sohchanga kapuimang sahna lama khopi ho-a chun chamna chu holun, chule hiche ding chun Pakai henga taovun, ajehchu chukom cham na-a chu nanghon jong chamna nanei diu ahi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ajehchu janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, nalah uva um nathemgao hou le na-aisan hou chu kilheplhah sah hih helun; nahin mangmat diu namang hou jong nahsah hihhelun." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ajehchu amaho thujouva kamina aisan ahiuvin, amaho kasol ahipouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah29:10 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Babylon'a kum somsagi alhin jouteng, kahin viluva hiche munahi nahung kilekitna dinguva, nangho dinga kathupha kasuh bulhit ding ahi." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ajehchu nangho dinga kagon chu thilse hilou chamna, khonunga peh dinga kagon chu kahenai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah29:12 Chuteng neikouvun natin, kahenga hung taovun natin, keiman sanpeh taovinge." 
Jeremiah29:13 Nanghon neiholun natin, nalung pumpi-a neihol tengule neimu diu ahi." 
Jeremiah29:14 Namudoh-u hitange, tin Pakaiyin aseije, chule kadel mangnao mun jouse-a konle nam jouse-a konin chomkhom ungting, nasoh chanao kaheimang ding, kasoh chansah naova kona kahin lepui kit ding nahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah29:15 Ajehchu nanghon Babylon gama jong Pakaiyin themgao eitundoh peh uve, nati uve." 
Jeremiah29:16 David laltouna-a tou lengpa le hiche khopi sunga cheng mijouse, chule nang hotoh sohchanga chekhom lou nasopiteu Pakai chun hitin aseije, tiuvin." 
Jeremiah29:17 Janel Pakai chun hitin aseije, vetan, amaho chunga chemjam'a, kel lhah-a, chule hise kasola, nehthei hilouhel aphatna phamo theichang banga kasem diu ahi." 
Jeremiah29:18 Chule amaho chu chemjam, kel lhah-a, hise-a kasuhgentheija, leiset lenggam jouse-a chaulele dinga keiman kanochehna nam jouse lah-a chu gaosap dinga, datmo umleh chehsatna, seisetna tohding bepma kapehdoh diu:" 
Jeremiah29:19 Ajehchu jingpi-a thouva kisoldoh kasohte themgaoho-a kona ahenguva kathu kathotho chu angaipouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ahinla nangainom pouve, tin Pakai jin aseije." 
Jeremiah29:20 Hijeh chun Pakai thu chu, nangho Jerusalem'a kona Babylon'a sohchang hon ngaijun," 
Jeremiah29:21 Israel Pathen janel Pakai chun Kolaiah chapa Ahab le Maaseiah chapa Zedekiah kamina jouthu-a gaoho chungchang thua chun hitin aseije, veuvin, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khutna amaho chu kapehdoh ding, aman namitmu tah uva atha diu:" 
Jeremiah29:22 Amanu thu chu Babylon'a Judah sohchang jousen, Babylon lengpan meija asahgop Zedekiah le Ahab bang helin Pakaiyin nachunga bolhen." 
Jeremiah29:23 Ajehchu Israel gama setkhona hel amahon abolun, aheng akom jiteutoh ajongun, kathupeh louva kamina jou asei jeh-un, keima ngei ahe ale hettohsah kahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelam mite le Shemaiah henga jong hiti ahi nasei ding ahi, atin:" 
Jeremiah29:25 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, ajehchu nangin Jerusalem'a um mijouse hengale Maaseiah chapa Zephaniah thempu chule thempu jouse henga naminin lekha nathotnin hitin naseije." 
Jeremiah29:25 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, ajehchu nangin Jerusalem'a um mijouse hengale Maaseiah chapa Zephaniah thempu chule thempu jouse henga naminin lekha nathotnin hitin naseije." 
Jeremiah29:26 Pakaiyin Jehoiada thempu khelin thempun napansahtan, Pakai insunga vaipole-a pang ding nahin, ngolla kithemput sah tapou chu songkul'a nakhuma nahen ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah29:27 Hijeh chun tun ibola amale ama neheng uva kithemput sah Anathoth mi Jeremiah chu napholou ham? 
Jeremiah29:28 Ajehchu Babylon gama kahenguva sohchana hi asotnin, in kisah unlang asunga chengun, hon kibolun lang aga neuvin, tin thu eihin thotnuve." 
Jeremiah29:29 Chuin Jephaniah thempun Jeremiah themgao jahdia lekhathot chu asime. 
Jeremiah29:30 Chuin Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin, aseije." 
Jeremiah29:31 Sohchangho jouse henga chun Nehelam mi Shemaiah thudol chu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Shemaiah'in kasol louva naheng uva jouthu natahsan sah jeh uvin:" 
Jeremiah29:32 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, veuvin, keiman Nehelam mi Shemaiah le achilhah ho talen kapeh-a, hiche mite lah-a cheng ding khatcha aneilou ding, kamite dinga thilpha kabol ding jong chu amulou ding ahi, tin Pakai chun aseije. Ajehchu aman Pakai dounan thu anahilin ahi." 
Jeremiah30:1 Jeremiah henga Pakaiya kona thu hunglhung chu," 
Jeremiah30:2 Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseije, nahenga kathusei jouse chu lekhabu khatna sunin." 
Jeremiah30:3 Vetan, nikhoho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije, kamite Israel le Judah sohchangho chu kalepui kit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin ati. Apateu kapehna gama kakilesah kitna hichu alo dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah30:4 Hichehohi Israel le Judah chungchanga Pakai thusei chu ahi. 
Jeremiah30:5 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, keihon chamna thu hilou tijatna, awgin kithing selsul khat kajauve." 
Jeremiah30:6 Dong leuvin lang veleuvin, pasal'in nao avop ngaijem? I-atile pasal tapouvin numei naosonat thoh banga atai akisot cheh uva, amaiju dangdih deh-a sohdoh gama hitam?"
