Jeremiah30:7 Ohe, hiche nichu aloupi lheh-in, hitichun akibahpi aumpon, hichu Jacob hesoh phattah chu ahin, ahinla hichea kona chu ama huhdoh-a umding ahi." 
Jeremiah30:8 Ajehchu hiche ni chule hiti ding ahi, nangonga kona namkoljon chu kaheboh-a, ahennaho kasuhtan ding, chule gamdang min amaho soh-a aneitah lou diu ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah30:9 Ahinla Pakai a-Pathen'ule, katundohpeh ding alengpao David ajenjoh diu ahi." 
Jeremiah30:10 Hijeh chun Vo kasoh Jacob, kicha hih-in, chule vo Israel, lungthoi hih-in, ajehchu ven gamlatah-a kona nangmale nachilhahte kahuhdoh ding, Jacob chu hungkile kitna koimachan akichatsah lou ding ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ajehchu nahuhhing dingin kaumpi jinge, tin Pakaiyin aseije: nangho kathecheh nao nam jouse akichainao boljong leng nangho kichaina vang bolhih laijing ting atin, ahinla thutah-a kasuhdih ding nahin, hijongle talen pelouva kalhadoh louhel ding nahi." 
Jeremiah30:12 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nakimavona chu damdoh theilou namaput chu nase behset ahi." 
Jeremiah30:13 Nakikanchah theina din nathu seilhap pehdinga khatcha aumpoi, damna ding lou nanei hihhele." 
Jeremiah30:14 Nangailu jousen nasumil tan, nadon tapouve; nakhangitlouna atam behset jeh le nachonsetna punbe jing jeh-in, melma kimavona in kamavon, mi engse gimbolna in kagimboltai." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ibola nagim jeh-a kap nahim? nakhangit louna tambehset jeh-a, nalungkham nachu suhdam theihoi hilou ahitai. Nachonsetna apun jeh-a hichehi kabol ahitai." 
Jeremiah30:16 Hijeh achu nabahgamho jouse chu kibahgama, nakidoupi jouse khat khatna sohchanga chediu, chule nachomgam ho kichomgama, anchah-a nanei jouse chu anchah-a kapehdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ajehchu nachunga damna kalhunsah kitna, namaha ho kadamsah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ajehchu amahon nangma akinodoh ahi nati uvin, hichehi koimachan adonlou Zion chu ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah30:18 Pakaiyin hitin ati, Ven keiman Jacob ponbuh sohchangsa chu kahin puikitna, achenna mun'a kahepi ding, akisetvumna chunga chu khopi chu kasahdoh-a, leng inpi chu aumdan bang banga umkit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah30:19 Amaho-a kon chun thangvahnale kipana husa gingdoh-in tin, amaho chu punsah ingting, lhomcha hilou diu, loujong loupisah ingting, neocha hilou diu ahitai." 
Jeremiah30:20 Achateu jong masanga bangin umuntin, akikhopnao kiphutdet ding, chule amaho sugenthei hojouse talen kapeh ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah30:21 Amilunhou chu amaho-a kontah hiuvintin, avaipopau chu amaho lah-a hung hiding, ama chu kinaisah ingting, aman eihin naija hung lutngam jengthei ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah30:22 Chuteng nangho kamite nahiuva, keima na-Pathen'u kahi ding ahi." 
Jeremiah30:23 Ngaijun Pakai lungsatna huipi, tanglouva nungjing huipi chu ahung nunge, hichun migiloute luchang asuhnat ding ahi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Hichu abolchai kahsehle alunggot phalou chu amolso kahse-a, Pakai lungsat tijat umtah chu dailha louhel ding ahi. Ninunung lamteng hin ngaito taovinate." 
Jeremiah31:1 Hiche phat tah chule, keihi Israel pumpi Pathen hingting, amaho jong kamite hitaovinte, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:2 Israel choldosah dia kachelaitah chun, chemjam'a thimoh hochun, gamthipma lungsetna akimutaove, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:3 Masangin Pakai kahenga akilah-in, hitin aseije, keiman nangma tonsot lungsetna-in kalungsetnin: hijeh chun lainatna-in kakaile jinge." 
Jeremiah31:4 Vo nungah theng Israel, keiman nasaphang ting sahphat nahi ding ahitai: na cha'ngeng ho-a nakijephoi kitna, kipah thanop bolho lamna-a nachedoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah31:5 Samaria molsangho chunga lengpigui nakiphuna laija aphuthon aphuva, agachu aneh diu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ajehchu Ephraim mol chunga khongah hon, nangho kipat un Pakai i-Pathen'u heng, Zion'a chetou vuhite, tia asapna diu nikho khat hungum ding ahi." 
Jeremiah31:7 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Jacob din kipah-in la saovin lang, namtin haosaho lah-a aodoh-un: phongjalun, vahchoijun lang, Vo Pakai, Israel amoh umsun namitehi huhdoh-in, tiuvin." 
Jeremiah31:8 Veuvin, sahlam gama konin hinpuijing ting, leiset kolmonga konin khoming ting, alah uva chun mitcho elbai, numei naovop, numei naoso natna na, mihon atama tam hung kilekhom diu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:9 Kappum pumin hunguntin, kalhep lhepma kapui ding, vadunglen twilah lamdih tah-a chesah ungting, hia chu kipalhu loudiu ahi. Ajehchu keima Israel pa kahin Ephraim chu kachapa lenpen ahi." 
Jeremiah31:10 Vo nangho namtinho, Pakai thusei ngaijun lang, twikol gam gamlatah-a phongjalun, Israel thechehpa chun achopkhom kitna, kelngoi chingpa banga amaho chu achin ding ahitai, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:11 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Jacob alhatdoh-in, asanga hatjopa khutna konin alhatdohtai." 
Jeremiah31:12 Hijeh achu hunguva Zion chungvuma la ahinsah diu, Pakai phatna, suhlouchang, lengpitwi, thaotwi, kelngoihon noutele ganchahon noute chunga kipah uva, ahinkhou chu hon twi kichapnou jing bang hiuva, lunghem kit talou hel ding ahitaove." 
Jeremiah31:13 Chuteng nungah theng chu gollhanghole tehse ho toh lamna-a kipah khomdiu ahi. Ajehchu alunghem nao kipana-a kaheidoh-a, kalhamona, alunghem naova kona kakipasah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah31:14 Thempuho hinna chu tahsa damtheina-a kalunglhai sah-a, kamite chu kaphatna-a lunglhai diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:15 Pakaiyin hitin ati, Ramah-a lunghemnale nasatah-a kana awgin akijai, Rachel'in achate aka akan, aumlou jeh uvin lhepbi ding anomtapon ahi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, naka awginle namitlhi lonna-a konin haijin, ajehchu nathilbol kipaman umding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, chule amaho amelmate gama kona hung kilekit diu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Nakhonung ding thua kinepna aume, tin Pakaiyin aseije, chutia chu nachate agamsung lamuva hungkit teidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:18 Keiman Ephraim kagin kaja monge, nangin neiseh gimin, bongchal namkoljon pokhalou bangin neiseh gimtai. Nei lehei lechun kihei kit tange, ajehchu Pakai ka Pathen nahi." 
Jeremiah31:19 Tahbeh-in kakilehei nungin kakisih tai. Eikihil nungin kapheipi kabengin, kajah achan, kaneo laija minsetna chu kapohjing jeh-in, kakisudong heltai." 
Jeremiah31:20 Ephraim kachapa deitah ham? Ama kalungtoh kacha ham? Ajehchu ama douna-a thu kasei chanin lungset tah-in kageldoh jing nalaije, hijeh chun ama dingin kasung akithingin, ama kahepi mongding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:21 Lampi melchihna kisemin lang, sangtah-in kiset vumin, nagachena lampi, lamlhongpi lam geljingin, Vo nungah theng Israel, hung kihei kitnin, hiche nakhopi lama hung kiheijin." 
Jeremiah31:22 Vo nang chanu nungchonnu, itihchan navale ding ham? Pakaiyin leisetna thilthah khat asemin, numei jin pasal adei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah31:23 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, asohchan naova kona kalepui kit tengle, Judah gamle akhopiho-a chu hitobang kamso, Vo thudihtah chenna, Vo thenna mol, Pakaiyin phatthei boh-in, tihi amankit diu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:24 Chuachu Judah tele akhopi jouse-a mite, loubol mihole kelngoihon vahho chengkhom diu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:25 Ajehchu cholte kavahva-in, lungkhamte kahaldohsah tai." 
Jeremiah31:26 Hiche thua hin kahung khangin, kavelen, chule ka-imut chu anomlheh-e." 
Jeremiah31:27 Vetan, Israel insungle Judah insunga mihem muchile sahem muchi katuna ding nikho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:28 Chule hiti ding ahi, amaho botdoh-a, subonga, pailha-a, sumanga chule suhgenthei dinga kachan jing bangahi, sadoh dingle phutpha dinga kachan jing ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:29 Hiche nichule paten lengpiga thuh aneuvin, chate ha ajatai atikit louhel dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah31:30 Ahinla amitakip ama amacheh khangitlouna-a thia, lengpi ga thuh nechan chu, ama hacheh jading ahitai." 
Jeremiah31:31 Vetan, Israel insungle Judah insungtoh thulhun thah khat kasemna ding nikho ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:32 Keima amaho dinga ajipau hijongleng, apateu Egypt gama kona puidoh dinga akhutnuva kakai ni-a thulhun kanasem asuhkeh-u tobang chu hilou ding ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:33 Ahinla chuche nikhoho jouva Israel insungtoh thulhun kasem ding chu hichehi ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Asunguva kadanthupeh koijing ting, alungsung uva kasutlut ding, chule a-Pathen'u kahia, amaho kamite hidiu ahitai." 
Jeremiah31:34 Chule koimachan aheng akomle asopi takip jah-a Pakai chu hen, atilou diu ahitai. Ajehchu aneopena pat alenpen geija eihet soh hel diu ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ajehchu akhangit lounao kangaidam-a, achonsetnao kageldoh kit louhel ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah31:35 Suna vahdinga nisa pe-a, jana vahdinga lhathahle ahsi ho vahding dan sempeh-a pepa, twipi kinong ginglul lula homkhenpa, Pakai chun hitin aseije, janel Pakai chu amin ahi." 
Jeremiah31:36 Hiche danho chu kamasanga keija kona achemangle, Israel chilhah jong namkhat ahina-a kona, a-itih-a dinga kamasanga beihel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:37 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, chunga van khu akite theija, noija leiset kingapna hohi holdoh thei ahilebou, kenjong Israel chilhah jousehi, athilbolhou jouse jeh-a kapaidoh diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:38 Vetan, Hananeel insanga patna kul ning kotpi geija Pakai khopi kisahdohna ding nikho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah31:39 Chule thil tena khao chu Gareb lhangchung jona kilhung jangpetna chule Goath akolkhum ding ahi. 
Jeremiah31:40 Thilonghole vut kinotna damphai pumpile Kidron luipi gei loujao jouse, solam sanga sakol kotpi, ning geija chu Pakai dinga atheng hiding ahin, a-imatih-a kibotdoh-a kiseplha kit louhel ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah32:1 Judah lengpa Zedekiah lengchan kum som lhin kum, hichu Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kal kum somle kum get lhin kum chun, Jeremiah henga Pakaiya konin thu ahung lhungin ahi." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ajehchu hichelai chun Babylon lengpa sepaihon Jerusalem aumkulun, Jeremiah chu Judah lengpa inhong sunga, mihenna ina akulkhupmun ahi." 
Jeremiah32:3 Ajehchu Judah lengpa Zedekiah chun ama chu ahentupma hitia asei ahi, ibola nangman gaothu naseija, Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Veuvin, keiman hiche khopihi Babylon lengpa khutna kapeh-a, aman ahinlah ding ahi;" 
Jeremiah32:4 Chule Judah leng Zedekiah chu Chaldea miho khutna kona hoidoh lou ding, Babylon lengpa khutna kapehdoh joh-a, akamtah-a akihoupia, amitnin ama mit avet ding ahi." 
Jeremiah32:5 Chule Zedekiah chu Babylon'a apuija, keiman kavil kahse-a chu umding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Chaldea miho chu kisatpi jongleu chun lolhing pouvinte, tin Pakaiyin aseije, tia naseiham? ati." 
Jeremiah32:6 Chuin Jeremiah chun Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitihin aseije, ati." 
Jeremiah32:7 Vetan, napangah Shallum chapa Hanameel nahenga hungintin, Anathoth'a um kalou kichoh-in, ajehchu chohna ding lhatdohna thahat naneije ati ding ahi." 
Jeremiah32:8 Hitichun kapangahpa chapa Hanameel chu, Pakai thu dungjuijin kihenna hongsunga kahenga ahungin, kajah-a aseije, Benjamin gama Anathoth a kalou chu goulo thei nahijeh-a nalhatdoh ding ahi, nang dingin kichoh-in, ati. Hichun hichehi Pakai thu ahi kahetai." 
Jeremiah32:9 Chuin kapangahpa chapa Hanameel lou, Anathoth a um chu kachon, sumchu katepeh-in dangka shekel somlesagi jen ahi." 
Jeremiah32:10 Chuin lekha kajih-in kamin kasunin, namdet kanamun ahetoh kakouvin, sumchu agihdan katepehtai." 
Jeremiah32:11 Chuin kichohna lekha chu chondanle angai dungjuijin, akichohdan kisutna namdet kinamsa lekha chu kaladoh-in hichu akiphong dohsa ahi." 
Jeremiah32:12 Chuin kichohna lekhabu chu Maaseiah chapa Neriah chapa Baruch chu, kapangahpa chapa Hanameel mitmule akichohna-a minchong ahettohho mitmun chule kihenna hongsunga tou Judah te jouse anga chun kapetan ahi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Chuin amasanguva Baruch chu thu kapen," 
Jeremiah32:14 Israel Pathen janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hiche kichohna lekha, sinkhana kinamle kichohna lekha kihonghi akopmin lanlang, sottah aumtheina dingin leibel sung khatna koijin." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ajehchu janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin ati, hiche gama inho, louho, lengpilei ho hi hinkilo kit ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah32:16 Tun kichohna lekha chu Neriah chapa Baruch kapeh phatnin Pakai henga kataovin," 
Jeremiah32:17 Vo Pakai Pathen, vetan, nathilboltheina nasatahle naban jahdoh-in, leile van nasemin, nangma dingin ahahsa ima aumpoi." 
Jeremiah32:18 Asang asang henga lungset le khotona namusah-in, chule pate khangitlouna chu anunguva achateu chunga nalethuh jin: Loupitah, Pathen Hattah, janel Pakai chu amin ahi." 
Jeremiah32:19 Thumop themtah, thilbol hattah, mihem chapate jouse atoh dunjui cheh-a lethuhna pedinga alamlhah jouseu vejing nahi," 
Jeremiah32:20 Egypt gama melchihna le datmo bola, tuni geija Israel le midangho lah-a boljom jinga, tunia bang banga min khat hin kiboldoh-a," 
Jeremiah32:21 Egypt gama kona nami Israelte melchihna hole datmoho-a, khut thahattahle banjahdoh-a, chule tijatna nasatah puma hinpuidoh-a," 
Jeremiah32:22 hiche khoijule bongnoi lonna gam, apateu pehdinga anakihahsela, amaho anapepa," 
Jeremiah32:23 chuin ahung lutnun alotauve, ahinla nathu angai hih-un, nadanthupeh-a jong achonpouve. Aboldiuva napeh jouse khatcha abolpouve. Hijeh achu hiche thilse jousehi achunguva nalhunsah ahitai." 
Jeremiah32:24 Mol ho khu vetemin, khopi lodingin amaho ahungtaove, chemjamle kellhah, chule hise jeh-in, galla hinsatna Chaldea mite khutna khopihi pehdoh-in anaumtan, naseisa chu aguilhung tai, vetan, nangin namun ahi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Chule Vo Pakai Pathen, nangin kahenga, lou chu sumin kichoh inlang, khopihi Chaldea mite akipehdohtah jeh-in, ahetoh ding mi kikoijin, natin ahi." 
Jeremiah32:26 Chuin Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Jeremiah32:27 Ven, keima Pakai tahsahing jouse Pathen kahi, keima dinga thil hahsa behseh ipi umam? ati." 
Jeremiah32:28 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, vetan, hiche khopihi Chaldea mite khutna, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khutna pengting, aman alah ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah32:29 Chule hiche khopi hinsat Chaldea mite chu hunguntin, hiche khopihi ahal uva, lunghansahna dinga eiphinset nao, Baal dinga gimnamtui ahalnau, inchunghole Pathen dang dinga don thilpeh asunlhah nao chu akahvam gamding ahitai." 
Jeremiah32:30 Ajehchu Israel chatele Judah chaten aneulaijuva pat kamasanga thilse jengbou aboluve. Ajehchu Israel chaten akhutnuva athilbol jaluvin eiphin lunghang jinguve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah32:31 Ajehchu hiche khopihi asahdoh uva pat tuni geija kalunghana le kalungsatna dinga phinsetna khopi anahin, kamasanga kona kachon mang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah32:32 Israel chatele Judah chate amaho, alengteu, amilenhou, athempuhou, athemgaohou, chule Judah mihole Jerusalem'a chengten, keima lunghan sah-a phinsetna dinga thilse abol jeh-u ahi." 
Jeremiah32:33 Matah-a thouva kahil vangin, akihilnao kisanding agelkhoh pouve, anung eingatnun, eimaingat pouve." 
Jeremiah32:34 Kamina kivo in chu suhbohna dingin, thet umhou chu atunglut jiuvin ahi." 
Jeremiah32:35 Amahon Hinnom chapa phaicham, kathupeh louhel kalunga jong chengkhalou, Judah chonsetsah nadingin thil thet umtah abolun, achapateule achanuteu Molech henga meija pehdohna dingin Baal munsang ho asadoh-un ahi." 
Jeremiah32:36 Hijeh chun tuhin Pakai Israelte Pathen'in, hiche khopihi chemjam, kel, hiset jeh-a Babylon lengpa khutna kipedoh ahitai, natiu thudola chun hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah32:37 Vetan, keiman amahohi kalungnatna, kalungsatna, kalunghana nasatah jeh-a, kana nomangna gamtina kona kakhop khom kitna, hiche munahi kahinpui kitna, mongtah-a kachensah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah32:38 Chule amaho kamite hiuva, Keima a-Pathen'u kahi ding ahi." 
Jeremiah32:39 Keiman amahole amaho nunga achateu phatna dinga, a-itih-a eigin theina diuva lungthim khatle lampi khatseh kapeh diu ahi." 
Jeremiah32:40 Chule amaho phatna ding kabolpeh-a kona kakiheimang louna dinga, amahotoh tonsot thulhuhna kasemdoh-a, amaho keija kona akiheimang louna diuva, alung sunguva eikichatnao kakhum peh dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ahi, aphatnao bolpeh chu kakipana lam hintin, kalung pumpile kahinna pumpi-a hiche gamhi kaphudet mongding ahi." 
Jeremiah32:42 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hiche mite chunga thilse nasatah jouse kahin pohlut khum bangahi, amaho kanateppeh thilpha jouse chu kahin pohlut peh ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah32:43 Nanghon mihemle ganhing beina gamgo hi, Chaldea mite khutna kipedoh ahitai, tia nasei laiju gamho chu kichodoh soh ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benjamin gamle Jerusalem khopi vel munho-a, chule Judah khopiho-a, lhang gama khopiho-a, chule phaicham khopiho-a louho chu mihon suma achoh uva, kichohna lekha asutnuva, namdet anamuva, hettohsah ho akoicheh diu ahi. Ajehchu keiman asohchannau chu kakilesah kit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah33:1 Chukalvalin kihenna hongsunga akulkhup laijun Jeremiah henga, Pakai thu chu aniveina in ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Jeremiah33:2 Leiset hinsempa, ijakai hingong tohpa Pakai chun hitin aseije, Pakai kiti chu ama min ahi." 
Jeremiah33:3 Neihin kouvin, keiman donbut-ing ting, nahetkhah louvu thil lentahle loupitah vetsah inge," 
Jeremiah33:4 Ajehchu molhole chemjam'a kisuchim hiche khopi inhole Judah lengte inho chungchang thudol chu Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah33:5 Amaho Chaldea mite toh kisat dingin ahungun, ahinla kalungnatnale kalungsatna-a kathagam thilongho chun adipjoh dingu, chule agitlounahou jouse jeh-a hiche khopi-a kona kamai kasel ahitai." 
Jeremiah33:6 Vetemin, damtheina le damdohna hinpong ting, amaho damsah ingting, chamnale thudih lhingset kamusah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Keiman Jadah le Israel sohchana chu kinunglesah ingting, amasa-a banga kasahphat kitding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:8 Keima douna-a achonsetnao, athemo nao jouse-a konin thensah ingting, akhangit lounao jouse kachunga achonsetnao leh kachunga asuhkhelnau jouse ngaidam tange." 
Jeremiah33:9 Chule hiche khopihi leiset nam jouse, adiuva kabolphat jouse muho masanga chu, kei dinga kipanale vahchoina, chule loupina hintin, phatnale khantouna kalhunsah jouse jala kicha-a kithing thing diu ahi." 
Jeremiah33:10 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hiche mun, nanghon mile sa umlouna ahomkeo ahi natinao mun Judah khopihole Jerusalem khosung lamlen mile sa, acheng beina natiu mun ahi," 
Jeremiah33:11 thanopnale kipana aw, moulangle mounu aw, janel Pakai chu vahchoijun tia aseidiu aw, ajehchu Pakai chu aphan, ahepina itih-in aumjinge, chule Pakai in'a vahchoina ganlhaina hinchoiho hugin kija kit ding ahi. Ajehchu masanga banga, gamsunga sohchangho chu kakinungle sah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah33:12 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, mile sa umlouna gamgoh, hiche munahi, chule chuche khopiho jouse sung chu, kelngoihon ho kolsah nale kelngoiching ho chenna mun hung hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mola khopiho-a, phaicham khopiho-a, lhanglam khopiho-a, Benjamin gamsunga, Jerusalem kimvel munho-a, Judah khopiho-a chu ahilteu khutnoija kelngoihonho kijotjot jengdiu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah33:14 Vetan, Israel insungle Judah insung chungchanga thilpha kathutep chu kamolso ding ahi, ati nikhoho chu hunglhung ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah33:15 Chuche nikhoho-a, chuche phatteng David dinga chonphatna bah kajamdohsah-a, aman gamsunga chu thutannale chonphatna apohdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Hiche laichule Judah huhhingin umintin, Jerusalem bitkeija umding ahi; chule akihouna ding min chu Ichon phatnao Pakai kitiding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:17 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Israel insung laltouna-a touding chu David lhasamkha louhel ding ahi," 
Jeremiah33:18 Ahiloule thempuho, Levi ho jong kamasanga govam thilto chule anneh thilto le tanglouva ganlhaina bolding lhasamkha louhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:19 Chuin Pakai thu chu Jeremiah heng ahung lhungin, aseije." 
Jeremiah33:20 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, nanghon sun le jantoh kakitepna nasukeh jou uva chule hiti achu sunle jan aphatcha aumthei louva ahile," 
Jeremiah33:21 Chuteng kalhacha David toh kakitepna jong kehthei bouvinte, alaltouna-a touding chapa aneilou ding bou ahin, Levi ho thempuho, kalhachaho toh kakitepna jong chuti ding ahi." 
Jeremiah33:22 Van janelpi kisim joulou bangle, twipi neldi kitejoulou banga, kasoh David chilhahle kahenga kinbol jing Levi te chu, hitobanga chu kapunsah ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah33:23 Chukalvalin Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin, aseije." 
Jeremiah33:24 Insung ni Pakaiyin alhen chu apaidoh geltai, tia hiche miten aseiju chu nangaito khahlouvu ham? Amahon kamite i-sah louvin abolun, chutia chu amaho masanga namkhat hikit louhel diu ahitai." 
Jeremiah33:25 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, sun le jantoh kakitepna chu aumdet louva, leile van umding dan kana gontoh lou hile," 
Jeremiah33:26 Jacob chilhahhole kasoh David chu kapaidoh hella, Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob chilhah chunga vaihom ding achilhah khatcha kalhen louding ahi. Ajehchu keiman asohchannau kakinungle sah-a, achunguva hepina kanei ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah34:1 Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hunglhung chu, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar le asepaite jouse alengvai pohna leiset lenggam jousele amijousen, Jerusalem le khopiho jouse chu asatnun, aseijui." 
Jeremiah34:2 Pakai, Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, Judah lengpa Zedekiah henga chenlang hitin gaseijin, vetan, hiche khopihi Babylon lengpa khutna kapeh ding, aman meija ahallhah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije gatin ati." 
Jeremiah34:3 Chule nangma akhutna kona nahoidoh louhel ding, nakiman na, ama khutna kipedoh ding nahi, namitnin Babylon lengpa mit chu avetna, aman akamtah-a nakihoupi ding, chule Babylon'a nache ding ahi." 
Jeremiah34:4 Ahinla Vo, Zedekiah, Judah lengpa, Pakai thusei ngaijin, Pakaiyin nachung thu hitin aseije, chemjam'a nathi lou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah34:5 Lungmong tah-a nathi ding ahi, namasanga leng masaho, napate gimnamtui ahalpeh banguva, nangma dinga jong gimnamtui ahaluva, ohe hepu atiuva, nakacham diu ahi. Ajehchu keiman thu kaphongdohtai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah34:6 Chujouvin Jeremiah themgaovin, thujousehi Jerusalem'a um Judah te lengpa Zedekiah henga aseitan ahi." 
Jeremiah34:7 Babylon lengpa sepaihon Jerusalem le Judah khopi aumuva, Lachish le Azekah asat laijuva chu kulpi kikai khum hichengse chu Judah khopiho lah-a umnalai ahi." 
Jeremiah34:8 Zedekiah lengpan Jerusalem'a um mipi jouse toh, jalenna thu phongdoh dinga thulhun asem jouva Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hunglhung chu hichehi ahi." 
Jeremiah34:9 Hitihin mijousen asohnu ham, asohpa ham chu Hebrai numei ham, Hebrai pasal ham ahile lha-ong hen, asopipa Hebrai mi kijensah-a koimacha umlou ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah34:10 Tun mitinin asohpale asohnu alha-ong ding, koimachan amaho akijensah kit louding ahi, ti ja-a thulhuna-a lut milen ho jousele mipite jouse chun ajuijun, alhadoh taove." 
Jeremiah34:11 Ahinla khonungin akileheijun, alhadohsao soh pasal hole soh numei ho chu avelin soh na atohsah kitnun, sohpa le sohnu hidingin thununna noija akoitaove." 
Jeremiah34:12 Hijeh chun Pakai thu chu Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin aseije," 
Jeremiah34:13 Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, keiman Egypt gama sohchana in'a kona amaho kapuidoh ni chun, napateu toh thulhun kanasemin, hitin kanaseije." 
Jeremiah34:14 Hitihin asopipa, Hebrai mi, ahenga kijohsa, kum gup ama anajensa chu kum sagi kichaile alha-ong ding ahin, chule aman kum gup najen tengle nanga kona nalha ong ding ahi, kanatin: ahinla napateu vin kathu angaihih un, anau jong asungpouve." 
Jeremiah34:15 Chuin nangho nahung kiheijun, adih chu nabolun, mitinin asopi henga jalenna naphongun: kamina kivo in'a kamasanga chun kitepna nasem uvin ahi." 
Jeremiah34:16 Ahinla nakilehei kitnuvin, kamin nasuboh-un, anoptah uva nalha-ong nungun, nasohnule nasohpao chu napuipha kitnun, nasohpaole nasohnu hidingin thununna noija napuilut kitnuve." 
Jeremiah34:17 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije, mitinin asopipale aheng akom henga chamlhatna thu phong dingin kathu nangai hih un, veuvin, keiman chemjam'a din, hise-a din, chule kel lhah-a din, chamlhatna kaphong doh-e. Leiset lenggam jouse-a kichonlele dingin semtao vinge, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah34:18 Chule keiman thulhun suhkeh-a, kamasanga kitepna asemsao nitlouho chu, bongnou kihapsatna, akah-a mi kijotpai jengtheija uma," 
Jeremiah34:19 bongnou kihapsat kah-a kijotpai Judah milenhole Jerusalem'a milenho, nukiso ho, thempuho, chule gamsung mipite jouse;" 
Jeremiah34:20 Keiman amelmateu khutna, chule ahinnao holte khutna amaho chu kapehdoh-a, athilongu chu chunga leng vachate le, leija ganhingho anneh dingbep hiding ahitai." 
Jeremiah34:21 Chule Judah lengpa Zedekiah le amilenho chu, amelmateu khutna, ahinnao holte khutna, chule nangho-a kona kinungtol louva Babylon lengpa sepaiho khutna kapehdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah34:22 Vetan, keiman thu kapeh-a, amaho chu hiche khopi-a kahin kilesah kit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Amahon hiche khopihi ahinsat naova, alahdiu chule meija ahaldiu, chule keiman Judah khopihohi chenna louva kamhela kalha ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah35:1 Judah lengpa Josiah chapa Jehoiakim nikho laija, Pakaiya kona Jeremiah henga thu hung lhung chun hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah35:2 Rechab mite insunga chenlang, kihoupinlang, Pakai insunga indan khatna amaho chu puilut inlang, lengpitwi donding pen, ati." 
Jeremiah35:3 Chuin Habazziniah chapa, Jeremiah chapa Jaazaniah le asopite, achapate jouse, chule Rechab mite insung pumpi kapuijin," 
Jeremiah35:4 Pakai insung kotngah-a pang Shallum chapa Masseiah indan chunga, milenho indan koma um, Pathen mi Igdaliah chapa, Hanan chapate indan-a kapuilutnin," 
Jeremiah35:5 Rechab mite insung chapate anga chun lengpitwi dimset cheh belhole, khonho katungin, ajah uva, lengpitwi donuvin, kati." 
Jeremiah35:6 Ahinla amahon lengpitwi donpou vinge. Ajehchu kapau Rechab chapa Jonadab'in, nanghole nachapa teovin a-itih-a lengpitwi nadon louhel diu," 
Jeremiah35:7 in nasah loudiu, muchi natu loudiu, lengpilei jong nabol louhel diu, imacha nanei loudiu, napennao leisetna nitamtah nachen theina dinguva, nahinkhou lhumkeija pon in'a bou nachen diu ahi, tin thu eipeuve atiuve." 
Jeremiah35:8 Keihon kapau Rechab chapa Jonadab'in, kahinkhou lhumkeija, keiho, kajiteu, kachapa teole kachanu teovin lengpitwi don louhel dinga eithupeh-u kanitnun," 
Jeremiah35:9 Kachenna diuvin in jong kakisah pouvin, lengpilei hihen, loumun hihen, muchi hijongle kaneipouvin ahi." 
Jeremiah35:10 Kapau Jonadab eithupeh-u jouse banga kaboluva, kanit uva, pon in'a bou kachenu ahi." 
Jeremiah35:11 Ahinla ahitin ahi, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar gamsunga ahunglut phatnin, Chaldea mihole Syria miho kichat jeh-in, hungun Jerusalem'a cheohite katiuvin, hitia chu Jerusalem'a kachenu ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah35:12 Chuin Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije;" 
Jeremiah35:13 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, kathu ngaina dinga kahilna nasan loudiu ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije, tin Judah mitele Jerusalem'a chengho gahilin, ati." 
Jeremiah35:14 Rechab chapa Jonadab thu achate henga apeh, lengpitwi donlou ding chu anitnun, tuni geijin imacha adon hih-un, apau thupeh bou chu anit tup chetnun, ahijengvangin naheng uva thu kaseijin, matah-a kathouvin kahilun, ahinla neingaipeh pouve." 
Jeremiah35:15 Kalhachate themgaoho chu matah-a thouvin naheng uva kasolin, pasal tapou alamlhah phalouva konin tuhin hung kileuvin lang, nachonnao kisem phatnun, pathen dangho jen dingin anung lejui hih-un, nanghole napu napateu kapeh gamachu nachen diu ahi. Ahinla nanau nasung hih-un, ngai jong neingaipeh pouve." 
Jeremiah35:16 Ajehchu Rechab chapa Jonadab chapaten, apau thupeh amaho thu apeh chu anit-uvin, hiche miten vang hin kathusei angai pouve." 
Jeremiah35:17 Hijeh chun, Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, ahenguva thu kaseija angai louvu, amaho kakouva eidonbut lou jeh-un, vetan, Judah le Jerusalem'a chengho jouse chunga, kaphondohsa thilphalou jouse chu achunguva kahin lhunsah ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah35:18 Chuin Jeremiah chun Rechab insung mite jah-a chun, janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije ati, napau Jonadab thupeh nanit uva, adanho naman uva, aman thu napeh-u jouse dungjuija nabol lun ahi." 
Jeremiah35:19 Hijeh chun janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, Rechab chapa Jonadab chu a-itih-a kamasanga ding ding mi lhasam louhel ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah36:1 1 Judah lengpa Josiah chapa Jehoikim lengchankal kumli lhina in ahitin ahi, Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga hiche thuhi ahung lhungin, hitin aseije." 
Jeremiah36:2 Lekhajol bukhat lanlang, nahenga Israel thudol, Judah thudol, chule nam jouse thudol Josiah nikho laija patna tuni geija nahenga kanasei jouse chua chun sunlutnin." 
Jeremiah36:3 Achunguva thilse bol dinga kagot jouse Judah insung miten ajah theina diuva, hiti achu mitin achonphatlou naova kona akiletheijuva, akhangitlou naole achonsetnao kangaidam theina diu ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah36:4 Chuin Jeremiah chun Neriah chapa Baruch chu akouvin, Baruch chun Pakai thu jouse ahenga anaseisa chu Jeremiah kama konin lekhajol bukhatna ajihlut tai." 
Jeremiah36:5 Chuin Jeremiah chun Baruch chu akouvin, keima kikulkhup kahin, Pakai insunga kache theipon ahi." 
Jeremiah36:6 Hijeh chun chenlang, kakama kona najah Pakai thu lekhajol nasut chu anngol nile, Pakai ina mipi ho jahdin gasim doh-in, akhopiuva kona hungdoh Judah te jouse jahdia nagasim doh ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah36:7 Chutile ataonao Pakai angsung hung lhungintin, amitakip achonphatlou naova kona hung kilehei thei diu ahi." 
Jeremiah36:8 Chuin Neriah chapa Baruch chun Jeremiah themgao thupeh jouse bangtah chun, Pakai in'a Pakai lekhabua thu chu asimdohtai." 
Jeremiah36:9 Chuin Judah leng Josiah chapa Jehoiakim lengchankal kum nga lhina lhako na-in ahitin ahi. Jerusalem'a mijousele Judah khopiho-a kona Jerusalem'a hungho jouse jahdin Pakai masanga, anngol thu aphong taove." 
Jeremiah36:10 Chuin Baruch in Pakai in'a chun Jeremiah thu chu lekhabua, lekhasun Shaphan chapa Gemariah indan-a, inhong chungnung jo-a, Pakai in kotpithah lutna-a chun, mijouse jahdin asimdohtai." 
Jeremiah36:11 Shaphan chapa Gemariah chapa Michaiah chun, Pakai thu jouse lekhabua kona ajahdoh phatnin," 
Jeremiah36:12 Lengpa insunga lekhasunpa indan sunga chun achesuh-in ahile, vetan hia chun milen jouse lekhasun Elishama tahjong, Shemaiah chapa Delaiah, Achbor chapa Elnathan, Shaphan chapa Gemariah, Hananiah chapa Zedekiah chule milen jouse anatouvun ahi." 
Jeremiah36:13 Chuphatnin Michaiah chun mipi ho jahdinga lekhabu asim, athu jouse chu ajah uva aphongdoh tai." 
Jeremiah36:14 Hijeh chun Kushi chapa, Shelamiah chapa, Nethaniah chapa Jehudi chu milenho jousen Baruch henga asolun, mipi jahdinga nasim lekhajol bu chu hinchoi jinlang, hungin, atiuve. Hitichun Neriah chapa Baruch chun lekhajol chu ahenguva ahinchoijin ahi." 
Jeremiah36:15 Chuin amahon, tun touvin lang, keiho jahdin hinsimin, atiuve. Hitichun Baruch chun amaho jahdin asimtai." 
Jeremiah36:16 Tun ahitin ahi, amahon thu jouse chu ajah phatnun, amaho khatle khat akicha taovin, Baruch jah-a chun keihon hiche thu jousehi lengpa kaseipeh tei dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah36:17 Chuin amahon Baruch chu adongun hitin aseijuve, hiche thu jousehi akama kona itijong najih ham? neihilun atiuve." 
Jeremiah36:18 Chuin Baruch chun, hiche thu jousehi akamin eihilin, lekhatuija lekhabua kasutjeng ahi, tin adonbutne." 
Jeremiah36:19 Chuin milenho chun Baruch henga, chenlang nangle Jeremiah kisel lhonin, koiman na-umnao hetdahen, atiuve." 
Jeremiah36:20 Chuin inhong sunga lengpa henga alut lhonin, lekhajol vang chu lekhasunpa Elishama indan sunga adalha lhonin, thu jouse chu lengpa jahdin ahil lhone." 
Jeremiah36:21 Hitichun lekhajol ladin lengpan Jehudi chu asolin, lekhasunpa Elishama indan-a konin agaladoh tai. Chuin lengpa le lengpa vela ding milenho jah dingin Jehudi chun asimin ahi." 
Jeremiah36:22 Tun lhako na-in lengpa Phalbi laile aumjina insunga atouvin, amasanga meikhuh-a chun mei akongin ahi." 
Jeremiah36:23 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jehudi'n phengthum phengli asimjouvin, chemcha khatnin a-at tanin, thuh-a mei chun akahvamhel kahsen, thuh meija chun asepluttan ahi." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ahinla lengpa le akinbolho, hiche thu jouse ngaiho koimacha akicha pouvin, apon bottela jong aumpouve." 
Jeremiah36:25 Ahijengvangin lekhajol chu ahal louna din Elnathan, Delaiah chule Gemariah chun lengpa chu angeh un, ahinla amaho thu angaipehpoi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Ahin lengpan lekhasun Baruchle Jeremiah themgao mandin, Hammelech chapa Jerahmeel, Azriel chapa Seraiah, Abdeel chapa Shelemiah thu apen, ahinla Pakaiyin amani chu aseltai." 
Jeremiah36:27 Chuin lekhajol le Jeremiah kama kona Baruch in ajih thuho jouse lengpan ahalvam jouvin, Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahung lhungin ahi." 
Jeremiah36:28 Lekhajol bu adang lanlang, lekhajol bu masa-a thu jouse, Judah lengpa Jehoiakim ahalvam saho chu jihdoh kitnin ati." 
Jeremiah36:29 Chule Judah lengpa Jehoiakim henga chu hiti ahi nasei ding ahi. Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Babylon lengpa chu hungtei ding hiche gamhi asuhmanga, hichea patna chu mile sa kisubei ding ahi, tia kijihna chu, ibola chutobang thu najih ham? natin lekhabujol kisun chu nana halvamtan." 
Jeremiah36:30 Hijeh chun Judah lengpa Jehoiakim thudol chu Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, aman David laltouna-a touding, koimacha aneilou ding, along jong sun nisatah noile jan buhdap lah-a kipaidoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah36:31 Akhangit lounao jeh-a, amale achilhah chule asohte talen kapeh-a, amahole Jerusalem'a chengho, chule Judah mite chunga chu, achunguva kaphondohsa anahsah louvu, thilphalou jouse chu kalhunsah ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah36:32 Chuin Jeremiah chun lekhabujol dang alan Neriah chapa Baruch chu apen, hia chun aman Jeremiah kama kona lekhabu jihsa jouse, Jehoiakim'in meija ahalsa thuho chu ajih-in, chuche tilou jong akibahpi tamtah abelapme." 
Jeremiah37:1 Chuin Josiah chapa Zedekiah chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in Judah gam lenga anasem Jehoiakim chapa Koniah khelin alengchang tai. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ahinla ama ahin, asohte ahin, gamsunga mite ahin, Jeremiah themgao kama asei Pakai thuho chu angai pouvin ahi." 
Jeremiah37:3 Chuin Zedekiah lengpan Shelemiah chapa Jehucal le Maaseiah chapa Zephaniah thempu chu Jeremiah themgao henga Pakai ka Pathen'u henga tuhin neitao peh-un, ti dingin asole." 
Jeremiah37:3 Chuin Zedekiah lengpan Shelemiah chapa Jehucal le Maaseiah chapa Zephaniah thempu chu Jeremiah themgao henga Pakai ka Pathen'u henga tuhin neitao peh-un, ti dingin asole." 
Jeremiah37:4 Tun Jeremiah chu mipi ho lah-a chun alutle apotle in ahi. Ajehchu ama songkul'a akhum loulaiju ahi. 
Jeremiah37:5 Chuin Pharaoh sepaiho Egypt'a konin ahung kondoh taove; chuin Jerusalem kul-a Chaldea miten amaho thulhut ajah phatnun, Jerusalem adalha taove." 
Jeremiah37:6 Chuin Pakai thu chu Jeremiah themgao henga ahung lhungin aseije; 
Jeremiah37:7 Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, eidop dinga nahinsolpao Judah lengpa henga hitihin seijun, vetan, nahu dinga hungkondoh Pharaoh sepaiho chu, agam lamu Egypt'a kilekit diu ahitai." 
Jeremiah37:8 Chule Chaldea mite hungkit uva, hiche khopihi ahin satnuva, meija ahallhah diu ahi." 
Jeremiah37:9 Pakaiyin hitin ati, Chaldea mite chun eidalhah teidiu ahi, tin nanghole nangho kilhemlha hih-un, nadalhah louhel diu ahi." 
Jeremiah37:10 Ajehchu nahin dou uva Chaldea sepai pumpihi satchai jongleu chun, alah uva machang umnalai ho jengjong, apon ina kona kipatdoh uva, hiche khopihi meija ahaldiu ahi, tin seijin." 
Jeremiah37:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Pharaoh sepaiho ginna Chaldea sepaiho Jerusalem'a kona akitoldoh phatnun," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremiah chu, mipi ho lah-a kona chom umdingin, Jerusalem'a konin apotdoh-in, Benjamin gam lama achetai." 
Jeremiah37:13 Chuin Benjamin kotpi agei phatnin, chuche veng lamkai khat, Hananiah chapa, Shelemiah chapa, amin Irijah chu anaumin, ama chun Jeremiah chu amanin, Chaldea miho henga jam nahi, ati." 
Jeremiah37:14 Chuin Jeremiah chun, jou ahi, Chaldea mite henga jammang kahipoi ati. Ahinla aman angaipeh hih-in: hitichun Irijah chun Jeremiah chu amanin, lamkaiho henga apuitai." 
Jeremiah37:15 Hijeh chun pipuiho chu Jeremiah chunga analunghang lheh-un, avouvin, lekhasun Jonathan insunga songkul'a chun akhumtaove. Ajehchu hichu songkul'a akisemu ahi." 
Jeremiah37:16 Jeremiah chu leinoi'a, lhambuh sunga alutphatnin, chua chun nisottah aumtan ahi." 
Jeremiah37:17 Chujouvin Zedekiah lengpan mi asolin, Jeremiah chu agapuidoh tai. Chuin lengpan a-insunga guhthim chan adongin, Pakaiya kona ipi thu umam? ati. Chuin Jeremiah chun, aume, atin ahi; ajehchu Babylon lengpa khutna kipedoh ding nahi, tin aseije." 
Jeremiah37:18 Chukalvalin Jeremiah chun Zedekiah lengpa henga, nangma chungle nasohte chunga, ahiloule namite chunga ipi kasuhkhel uma songkul'a neikhum ham?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Babylon lengpa nangma satdin ahiloule hiche gam satdin hungponte tia gaochangho nathemgao ho chu tu-a hoijaba um hitaovam? 
Jeremiah37:20 Hijeh chun tun, ngaijin, katao ahi. Vo kapu lengpa, katao ahi, kangeh nahi na-angsunga neisanpeh in, hitichun lekhasun Jonathan ina neikilesah hih-in, ajole chukoma thidenget inge, ati." 
Jeremiah37:21 Chuin Zedekiah lengpan Jeremiah chu songkul hongsunga akoina dingun, chule changlhah semho lamlena kona changlhah halkhat, khopi sunga changlhah abeihel kahse-a niseh-a apehjing diuvin thu apen ahi. Hitichun Jeremiah chu songkul hongsunga chun aumdentan ahi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Chujouvin Mattan chapa Shephatiah, Pashhur chapa Gedaliah, Shelemiah chapa Jucal, chule Malchiah chapa Pashhur in mijouse henga Jeremiah thusei ho chu ajaovin," 
Jeremiah38:2 hiche khopi sunga umdenpa chu chemjam'a, kella, chule, hise-a thiding ahi. Ahin Chaldea miho henga chedohpa chu hingding ahi. Ajehchu ahinkho chu gal anchah-a anei ding ahin, hijeh-a chu hingding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah38:3 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hiche khopihi Babylon lengpa sepaiho khutna kipe-a, amahon alahdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah38:4 Hijeh chun pipuiho chun, lengpa henga, kangeh-u nahi, hiche mipahi thatjengin, ajehchu aman hiche khopi sunga umnalai ho henga chutobang thu sei jeh-in sepaiho khutle mipi ho jouse khut hi angoisah-e, hiche pan hiche mite phatna ding aseipon, akisuhmona diu bou aseije, atiuve." 
Jeremiah38:5 Chuin Zedekiah lengpan veuvin, ama nakhut uva um ahi. Lengpa hi nabolgot-u sutang thei ahipoi." 
Jeremiah38:6 Chujouvin amahon Jeremiah chu amanun, songkul hongsunga Hammelech chapa Malchiah leiko-a chun alehlutnun ahi. Ahin leiko-a chun twi aumpon, bonngan bou aumin, hitichun Jeremiah chu bonngan lah-a alhalut tai." 
Jeremiah38:7 Tu-a lengpa in'a um Ethiopia mi, nukiso ho lah-a mi khat Ebed-melech chun, amahon Jeremiah chu leiko sunga akhum taove ti ajatan, hiche petna chu lengpa chu Benjamin kotpi phunga touva ahin," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebed-melech chu leng in'a konin apotdoh-in lengpa akihoupin aseije; 
Jeremiah38:9 Kapu lengpa, hitehon Jeremiah themgao chunga abol jouseu khu thilsetah abolu ahitai. Amahon leiko sunga alehlutnun, aumna mun'a chu thiding kon ahitai. Ajehchu khopi sunga changlhah umlou ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah38:10 Chujouvin lengpan Ethiopia mi Ebed-melech chu thu apen, hia konin mi thum kipuijin lang Jeremiah themgao chu, athi kah-in leiko-a konin gapuidoh un, ati." 
Jeremiah38:11 Hitichun Ebed-melech chun miho chu akipuijin, lengpa ina thil kholna noija chun achen, ponlui ehsaho chu ahinlan, hicheho chu Jeremiah henga leiko-a chun khaovin agah khailhan ahi." 
Jeremiah38:12 Chuin Ebed-melech Ethiopia mipa chun Jeremiah henga hiche ponluihole asesahohi najahnoija khaohi ngapsah-in, ati. Chuin Jeremiah chun chutichun aboltai." 
Jeremiah38:13 Hitichun Jeremiah chu khaovin aloidoh-un, leiko-a kon chun aladoh-un, Jeremiah chu songkul honsunga chun aumdentai." 
Jeremiah38:14 Chuin Zedekiah lengpan Jeremiah chu akouvin, Pakai in-lutna thum na-a chun ahenga apuilut tai. Chuin lengpan Jeremiah jah-a, thilkhat donging ting, keija konin imacha imhih-in, ati." 
Jeremiah38:15 Chuin Jeremiah'in Zedekiah jah-a, nahenga kaphondohle neithada mongding hinam? Chule thu kamopma nahile neingaipeh mongding ham? atin ahi." 
Jeremiah38:16 Hitichun Zedekiah lengpan Jeremiah henga guhthim tah-in hiche hinna eisempeh pau, Pakai chu ahinlaisen, nangma that ponge, nahinna hola hiche mite khutna jong pedoh ponge, tin akihahselin ahi." 
Jeremiah38:17 Chuphatnin Jeremiah chun Zedekiah henga Pakai, janel Pathen Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, nangma Babylon lengpa pipuho henga nakipehlut poupouva ahile hingin natin, hiche khopi jong meija kihal lou ding, nangle na-insung mite nahindiu ahi." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ahinla Babylon pipuiho lengpa henga nakipehlut loule vang, hiche khopihi Chaldea mite khutna kipedoh intin, meija ahaldiu, amaho khutna kona nahoidoh louhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah38:19 Chuin Zedekiah lengpan Jeremiah henga, Chaldea miho khutna lutsa Judah ho khu kakichai, ajole amaho khutna eipedoh khauvintin eijapi getnunte, ati." 
Jeremiah38:20 Ahinla, Jeremiah chun pedoh pouvin nate, najah-a kasei Pakai aw hi juijengin, kangeh nahi, chutile nang din phantin, nahin ding ahi." 
Jeremiah38:21 Nakipehlut nomloule vang, hichehi Pakaiyin thu eimusah chu ahi." 
Jeremiah38:22 Chule vetan, Judah lengpa ina numei um jouse chu Babylon lengpa pipuho henga kipuija, hiche numei ho chun, aseidio ahi, nagolten natung doh-un, amahon najou taove. Nakengho bon lah-a alhalut tan, amaho akinungle taove." 
Jeremiah38:23 Hiti achu najite jousele nachate jouse Chaldea miho henga apuidoh diu, akhutnuva kona nasochat louhel diu, Babylon lengpa khutna kikaijo ding nahin, nang jeh-a hiche khopihi meija kihal lhading ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah38:24 Chuin Zedekiah chun Jeremiah henga, hiche thuho hi koimacha hetsah hih-in, nangma nathi lou ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ahinla pipuhon nangma kakihoupihi heleu, nahenga hunguva, najah-a, lengpa henga naseijouse leh lengpan nakoma aseijouse tun keiho henga phongdoh-in, keiho-a konin imhih-in, nangma that pouvinge," 
Jeremiah38:26 chuteng nangin ajah uva, Jonathan in'a eikilesah da-a, chua kagathiden louna dinga lengpa henga ngehna kanei jeng ahi, nati ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah38:27 Chujouvin pipuho jouse Jeremiah henga ahungun, ama adong taove. Aman amaho chu lengpan thu apeh jouse bang chun ahiltai. Hitichun akihouvu chu anga taove. Ajehchu amani kihouna chu ajahlou-u ahitai." 
Jeremiah38:28 Hitichun Jeremiah chu Jerusalem kilahni geijin songkul hongsunga chun aume. Chule Jerusalem kilahni geijin aumin ahi. 
Jeremiah39:1 Judah lengpa Zedekiah lengchan kal kumko lhinna, lha som alhinna chun, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar le asepaite Jerusalem satdin ahungun, aumkul taove." 
Jeremiah39:2 Chule Zedekiah lengchankal kum somlekhat lhina, lha li na-a ni ko lhinnin, khopi chu akeh tan ahi." 
Jeremiah39:3 Chuin Babylon pipuiho jouse ahung lutnun, Nergal-sharezer, Samgar-nebo, Sarsechim, Rab-saris, Nergal-sharezer, Rabmag, Babylon lengpa pipuiho dang jouse toh kulpi lailha penachun atoutaove." 
Jeremiah39:4 Chuin ahitin ahi, Judah lengpa Zedekiah le asepaiho jousen, amaho amu phatnun, jan-in khopi-a kon chun apotdoh-un, lengpa honlei lampia acheuvin, kulbang teni kikah-a kotpi-a chun ajamdoh taove; chule ama phaicham lampia achetai." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ahinla Chaldea sepaihon anung delun, Zedekiah chu Jericho phaichama aphapao vin, ama amat phatnun Hamath gama Riblah ah Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar henga apuijun, hia chun aman athu atanlhatai." 
Jeremiah39:6 Chuin Babylon lengpan Riblah'a Zedekiah mitmu tah-in achapate chu athatnin, Babylon lengpan Judah milun jouse jong athatgam heltai." 
Jeremiah39:7 Chukalvalin Zedekiah mitchang teni jong akaldoh-in, Babylon gama kaidin thihkhaova ahentai." 
Jeremiah39:8 Chuin Chaldea mihon lengpa inle mipi ho inho chu ahalun, Jerusalem kulbangho asuchimgam taove." 
Jeremiah39:9 Chuin sepaiho lamkai Nebuzaradan chun khopi-a mipi umnalai ho, ahenga hungkipelut hole mipi amoh chengse chu Babylon'a sohchang din akaitai." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ahin sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan chun, Judah gamsunga imacha neilou mivaichaho chu adalhan, amaho chu apetpetnin lengpilei le loumun apen ahi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Tun Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in Jeremiah chungchanga sepai lamakai Nebuzaradan henga," 
Jeremiah39:12 amahi puijin lang, vetupmin, bolse hihhelin, nahenga asei ding bang bangin bolpeh-in, tin thu apei." 
Jeremiah39:13 Hitichun sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan chun Nebushazban, Rab-saris, Nergal-sharezer, Rabmag chule Babylon lengpa pipuiho jouse asolin," 
Jeremiah39:14 amaho ngeijin Jeremiah chu songkul hongsunga konin mikhat agapuidoh sah-un, Shaphan chapa, Ahikam chapa, Gedaliah chu a-in'a puidin anganse uvin, hitichun miho lah-a achengtai." 
Jeremiah39:15 Tun songkul hongsunga akulkhup laijun Jeremiah henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Jeremiah39:16 Ethiopia mi Ebed-melech henga janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitihin aseije, vetan aphatna ding hilouva, hiche khopi setna ding joh-a kathu kahinlhut ding ahi. Hicheho chu namasanga hicheni chule guilhung ding ahi." 
Jeremiah39:17 Hicheni chule nangvang huhdoh nange, chule nakichat miho khutna kipedoh pon nate, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ajehchu tahbeh-a kahoidohsah-a, chemjam'a naloulou ding, nahinkho chu gal anchah banga naneijoh ding ahi. Ajehchu kachunga natahsan na-ngap ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah40:1 Judah le Jerusalem'a kon sohchang jouse, sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan chun Babylon gama sohchang dia kikaiho lah-a Jeremiah chu thihkhaova kihenpuma apuija Ramah a kona alhadoh nungin Pakaiya konin Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin ahi." 
Jeremiah40:2 Chuin sepai lamkaipan Jeremiah apuijin ajah-a, Pakai na Pathen'in hiche mun'a thilphalouhi aphondoh ahitai." 
Jeremiah40:3 Tun Pakaiyin ahinlhun sahtan, asei bangin aboltai. Pakai douna-a nachonset uva, athu nangailou jeh uva hiche thil hi nachung uva hunglhung ahitai." 
Jeremiah40:4 Chule tun, vetan, tuni hin nakhutna thihkhaova konin kalha-ong tai. Babylon'a kei toh hung nanople hungin, ken nangma vetup nange, ahinla Babylon'a kei toh hung nanop loule hung datan, ven, gam jouse namasanga aume, nang dinga phale kitup nasahna lama chun chejengtan, ati." 
Jeremiah40:5 Tun ama akilekit masangin, Babylon'a lengpan Judah khopiho-a vaipo dinga atun Saphan chapa Ahikam chapa Gadaliah toh gacheng khomtan; ahiloule pha nasah-a nache nomna lam lama chetan, ati. Hitichun sepai lamkai chun nehtheihole tohphat man apen asoltai." 
Jeremiah40:6 Chuin Jeremiah chu Ahikam chapa Gedaliah heng Mizpeh-ah achen, akidalha miho lah-a ama toh achengtai." 
Jeremiah40:7 Tun gamlah-a um sepai gallamkai jouse le amiteuvin, Babylon lengpan Ahikam chapa Gedaliah chu gamsung vaipon apansah-in, pasal ho, numei ho, chapangho chule Babylon'a sohchanga kipuilou gamsung vaichaho vetupdin angansetai ti thu ajah phatnun," 
Jeremiah40:8 Amaho Nethaniah chapa Ishmael, Kareah chapa teni Johanan le Jonathan, Tanhumeth chapa Seriah, Netophah mi Ephai chapaho, Maachath mi chapa Jezaniah, amahole amiteu chu Mizpah'a um Gedaliah henga ahung taove." 
Jeremiah40:9 Chuin Shaphan chapa, Ahikam chapa Gedaliah chu amahole amiteu henga akihahselin, Chaldea mite jending kicha hih-un, gamsunga chengun lang, Babylon lengpa kin bolun, hichu nangho dinga phading ahi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Keidin vang veuvin, ihenguva hung ding Chaldea miho jendin Mizpah a cheng ingting, nangho vang lengpitwi, nipilai theiga ho le thao holkhom unlang nabel sunguva kikoijun, chule nalahsao khopiho-ah chengtauvin, ati." 
Jeremiah40:11 Hibang chun Moab'a Judah te jouse Ammon mite lah-a umho, Edom mite lah-a umho chule gamsung jouse-a umhon, Babylon lengpan Judah mi phabep adalhan, achunguva vaipodin Shaphan chapa, Ahikam chapa Gedaliah apansah-e, ti ajah phatnun," 
Jeremiah40:12 Judah te jouse akino mangnao gamho-a konin, Judah gama, Gedaliah heng Mizpah-ah ahungun lengpitwi le nipilai theiho tamtah akiholkhomun ahi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Chukalvalin Kareah chapa Johanan le gama um sepaiho gallamkai jouse, Gedaliah heng Mizpah a ahungun," 
Jeremiah40:14 Ahenga, Ammon lengpa Baalis chun Nethaniah chapa Ishmael chu nangma that dinga asol chu nahet chennem? atiuve. Ahinla Ahikam chapa Gedaliah chun amaho atahsanpon ahi." 
Jeremiah40:15 Chujouvin Kareah chapa Johanan chun Mizpah a Gedaliah henga, katao ahi, neisol jengin, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael chu gathat jeng'inge, koiman heponte, Judah mi nahenga umkhomho jouse acheh chauna dingle Judah'a amohho manthah na ding bepma ibola aman nangma natha ding ham? tin guhthim chan ahung seije." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahinla Ahikam chapa Gedaliah chun Kareah chapa Johanan henga, nangin hichehi nabol lou ding ahi; ajehchu Ishmael thu naseihi adihlou ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah41:1 Tun lha sagi lhinin ahitin ahi, lengte chilhah lah-a Elishama chapa, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael le lengpa pipuiho, amatoh mi somjen, Mizpah ah Ahikam chapa Gedaliah henga ahungun, chukom Mizpah a chun changlhah anekhomuve." 
Jeremiah41:2 Chuin Nethaniah chapa Ishmael le alhonpi mi som akipatnun, chemjamin Shaphan chapa, Ahikam chapa Gedaliah Babylon lengpan vaipo-a apansah chu athat taove." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishmael'in Mizpah a Gedaliah toh um Judah miho jousele chua anaumkha Chaldea te sepai jong athatgam helin ahi. 
Jeremiah41:4 Chuin aman Gedaliah athajou nini na-a chun ahitin ahi, chule hichu koiman ahetlou ahin," 
Jeremiah41:5 Shechem'a kon, Shiloh'a kon, Samaria'a konin mi somget jen, akhamul hetsa cheh aponsilu kibot tela, amale ama ki-atchen chenna, akhutnuva thilpehle gimnamtui choija, Pakai in'a tohdoh din ahunguve." 
Jeremiah41:6 Chuin Nethaniah chapa Ishmael chu Mizpah a konin amaho kimupi din, kappum pumin ajah uva, Ahikam chapa Gedaliah henga hungun, ati." 
Jeremiah41:7 Hitichu anahin, khopi lailung ahunggei phatnun, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael'in, amipuiho toh amaho chu athatnun kotong lailunga alehlut taove." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ahinla alah uva, mi somho chun Ishmael jah-a, neithat hih-un, ajehchu keihon suhlouchang, sakol chang, thao, chule khoiju selguh kaneijuve, atiuve. Hitichun ama atangin, amaho chu asopihou lah-a chun athat tapon ahi." 
Jeremiah41:9 Tun Ishmael'in Gedaliah jeh-a amithaho long apaina kotong chu Asa lengpan Israel lengpa Baasha agin jeh-a alai ahin, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael'in amithaho longin adippeh in ahi." 
Jeremiah41:10 Chuin Ishmael'in Mizpah a amoh umsun leng chanute, Mizpah a sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan'in Ahikam chapa Gedaliah apehdohho, Mizpah a um jouse apuimangin, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael'in amaho chu sohchangin akaimangin, Ammon mite gam kalpeh-a din akipatdoh tai." 
Jeremiah41:11 Ahinla Kareah chapa Johanan le aumpi sepai gallamkai jousen, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael thilbol phalou jouse ajah phatnun," 
Jeremiah41:12 mijouse apuijun Nethaniah chapa Ishmael satdin akonun, Gibeon'a twi tamtah umna-a chun aphapa taove." 
Jeremiah41:13 Chuin ahitin ahi, Ishmael umpi mi jousen Kareah chapa Johanan le ahinpui sepai gallamkai jouse amu phatnun akipah behseh jenguve." 
Jeremiah41:14 Hitichun sohchanga Mizpah a kona Ishmael'in apuimang mi jouse ahung kinunghei cheh uvin, Kareah chapa Johanan heng lama achetauve." 
Jeremiah41:15 Nethaniah chapa Ishmael vang chu mi get toh Johanan'a konin ahoidoh-un Ammon mite henga achetauve. 
Jeremiah41:16 Chuin Kareah chapa Johanan le aumpi sepai gallamkai jouse chun, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael'in Ahikam chapa Gedaliah atha jouva Mizpah a kona Nethaniah chapa Ishmael''a kona Johanan'in ahuhdoh mijouse, gal hat ho, numei ho, chapangho, nukiso ho, chu Gibeon'a konin ahin lepuisoh kit tai." 
Jeremiah41:17 Akipat doh-un, Egypt jotlutna Bethlehem koma Chimham achun acheng taove." 
Jeremiah41:18 Ajehchu, gamsunga vaipo dinga Babylon lengpan anapansah Ahikam chapa Gedaliah chu, Nethaniah chapa Ishmael'in anatha jeh-a chu Chaldea miho akichatnu ahi." 
Jeremiah42:1 Chujouvin sepaiho gal lamkaiho le Kareah chapa Johanan, Hoshaiah chapa Jezeniah, chule mipi ho jouse, chule mijouse aneopena pat alenpen gei ahung naijun," 
Jeremiah42:2 Jeremiah themgao jah-a nahenga kangeh-u ahi, kataonaohi neisan peh-un lang Pakai na Pathen henga neitao peh-un, ajehchu neimu-u banga hi keihohi tamtah lah-a themcha bou kidalha kahitao vin;" 
Jeremiah42:3 chutia chu Pakai na Pathen'in kachena diu lampile kabol diu thil eihil theina diuvin, atiuve." 
Jeremiah42:4 Chuin Jeremiah themgaovin ajah uva, nathu-u chu kahei, veuvin, nathu-u bangin Pakai na-Pathen'u henga thuminge, chule hiti ding ahi, Pakaiyin nadonbutna diu thil chu ipi hijongle naheng uva phongdoh nange, nangho-a konin imacha imponge, ati." 
Jeremiah42:5 Chuin amahon Jeremiah henga Pakai na-Pathen'in kahenguva nasolna thu jouse banga kabol louvule kalah uva Pakai chu hettohsah dihtahle tahsan umtah hihen. 
Jeremiah42:6 Ahenga kasolnapao Pakai ka-Pathen'u aw chu apha hihen ase hile juinao vinge, hitia chu Pakai ka-Pathen'u aw kajui tengule keiho dinga phattheina hiding ahi, atiuve." 
Jeremiah42:7 Chuin nisom jouvin ahitin ahi, Pakai thu chu Jeremiah henga ahungtai." 
Jeremiah42:8 Chuin Kereah chapa Johanan le aumpi sepaiho gallamkai jousele sepai jouse, aneopena pat," 
Jeremiah42:9 alenpen geijin akouvin, ajah uva, Pakai na Pathen'u a-anga nathumnao lhut dinga neisolna pao chun hitin aseije." 
Jeremiah42:10 Hiche gamahi tuni geija naum jing nahlai diule, tungdoh ungting sonlhu ponge, chule naphutnu vingting, botdoh pouvinge, ajehchu nachung uva thilphalou kalhunsah chu kakisih tai." 
Jeremiah42:11 Babylon lengpa naginnu chu ging tahih-un, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, ajehchu ama khutna kona huhhing dingle huhdoh dinga kaumpi nahiuve." 
Jeremiah42:12 Chule nachung uva hepina anei theina dinga, naheng uva hepina kavetsah-a, nangho naleiset uva kakilesah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah42:13 Ahinla nanghon, hiche gama cheng pouvinge, Pakai na Pathen thu jong ngai pouvinge, nati uve," 
Jeremiah42:14 kanom pouve, Egypt gama chejovinge, chua galthu jata pouvinge, sumkon gin jong, changlhah-a gilkelna jong umta ponte, chua kache diu ahi, nati uve." 
Jeremiah42:15 Hijeh chun tun, nangho Judah te amoh chengin Pakai thu chu ngaijun, janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin ati, Egypt'a lutdingle chua pem dinga namaiju napum ngat helu ahitahle," 
Jeremiah42:16 hung hiti ding ahi, naginnu chemjam chun Egypt gama nahinphah diu, chule nakichatnu kel chun naitah-a Egypt gama nahin juijuva, chua chu nathi diu ahi." 
Jeremiah42:17 Egypt gama pem dinga amaiju pumngat hel ho chunga chutobanga chu umding ahi. Amaho chemjam'a, kela, hise-a thiuva, achunguva thilse kalhunsah dinga kona chu khatcha amohle asohcha umlou helding ahi." 
Jeremiah42:18 Ajehchu janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, kalunghana le kalungsatna Jerusalem'a chengte chunga kasunlhah jeng banga chu, nachung uva kalungsatna chu Egypt gam nalhun tengule kasunlhah-a ki-dah le datmo, sapsetle mi houset nahiuva, hiche gamhi namukit loudiu ahi." 
Jeremiah42:19 Vo nangho Judah amoh chengse, Pakaiyin nachung chang thu-u hitin aseije, Egypt'a che hih-un: tunia kahin hilchah naohi kihet chenun." 
Jeremiah42:20 Pakai ka-Pathen'u henga neitao peh-un tia Pakai na Pathen'u henga neisol petnu chun nalung gelu na-im uvin, Pakai ka-Pathen'un asei ding jouse dungjuijin, neiphondoh peh-un, juijuvinge, nati uve." 
Jeremiah42:21 Keiman tuni hin naheng uva kaphongdohtan, Pakai na Pathen'u aw ahiloule naheng uva eihinsol lona khatcha najui pouvin ahi." 
Jeremiah42:22 Hijeh chun tun pemna dinga nache nomnao mun'a chu chemjam'a, kela, hise-a nathi teidiu ahi ti kihetchen jotaovin, ati." 
Jeremiah43:1 Chuin Jeremiah chun miho jouse henga Pakai a-Pathen'u thu jouse Pakai Pathen'in sei dinga asolna thu, hicheng thu jouse chu aseichai phatnin ahung hitin ahi." 
Jeremiah43:2 Chuin Hoshaiah chapa Azeriah le Kereah chapa Johanan chule mihoitho ho jouse chun Jeremiah henga, Pakaiyin Egypt gama pem dinga nache loudiu ahi tia sei dingin nasolpoi." 
Jeremiah43:3 Tha dinga Babylon'a eipui theina diuva, Chaldea miho khutna pedoh dinga, Neriah chapa Baruch in natun ahibouve, atiuve." 
Jeremiah43:4 Hitichun Kareah chapa Johanan le sepaiho gallamkai jouse chule mipite jouse chun, Judah gama chenna dingin, Pakai thu chu angai tapouve." 
Jeremiah43:5 Hitichun Kareah chapa Johanan le sepaiho gallamkai jouse chun; amoh umsun Juda ho jouse, Judah gama cheng dinga akinomang nao namtin lah-a kona hungkileho," 
Jeremiah43:6 pasal ho, numei ho, chapangho, leng chanute chule Shaphan chapa, Ahikam chapa, Gedaliah toh sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan'in adalhah amitakip, chule Jeremiah themgao le Neriah chapa Baruch jaonan abonchauvin apuidoh taove." 
Jeremiah43:7 Hitichun Egypt gamsung ahung lhung taove. Ajehchu amahon Pakai thu angai pouvin, hitichun Tahpanhes mun ngei chu ahung lhung taove." 
Jeremiah43:8 Chuin Tahpanhes achun Jeremiah henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Jeremiah43:9 nakhutnin songchang len hochu lanlang Juda mite mitmu tah-in Tahpanhes a Pharaoh inlutna lampi-a kipha songpeh noija khun gavuijin," 
Jeremiah43:10 chule ajah uva hitin seijin, janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, ngaijun kalhacha Babylon leng Nebuchadnezzar chu kakouva, hiche songchang kivuisaho chungahi alaltouna atundoh-a, chule aleng pondal loupi chu ajahdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah43:11 Chule ama ahung teng Egypt gam ahin bolset ding athi dinga chu thina-a, sohchang dinga chu sohchan na-a, chemjam'a loudingho chu chemjam'a apehdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah43:12 Chule keiman Egypt gama pathenho insunga mei kachokaija, hichun ahallhah ding, amaho chu sohchanga akaimang ding, kelngoichingpan avon chunga hit le kha aphetngim banga amanjong Egypt gam chu asuhtheng hella, chua kona mongtah-a potdoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah43:13 Aman Egypt gama Beth-shemesh'a um song milimho jong chu asuhchima, Egypt mite pathen inho chu meija ahallhah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah44:1 Egypt gama Judah umjouse Migdol gama chengho, Tahpanhes chule Noph khoho, Pathros gama chengho chungchanga Jeremiah henga thu ahung lhungin hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah44:2 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin ati, Jerusalem le Judah khopi jouse-a thilphalou kalhunsah jouse chu namutaovin, chule veuvin, amaho tuhin akamhelun, chuachun koimacha acheng tapouve." 
Jeremiah44:3 Lunghansahna dinga eiphinset uva, agitlou jehu'n, amahon ahetphah louvu amahole nangho, chule napateu vin jong ahetkhah louvu pathen dangho jen dingin gimnamtui hal dingin acheuve." 
Jeremiah44:4 Hijengjongle naheng uva kalhacha themgaoho jouse chu, Ohe, hiche thil thet um kakidah tahhi bolhih helun, tidingin matah-a thouvin kahinsolin ahi." 
Jeremiah44:5 Ahinla amahon angaideh pouve, Pathen dangho henga gimnamtui ahallouna dingule, agitlounauva kona akileheina dingun anao jong asungdeh pouve." 
Jeremiah44:6 Hijeh chun kalunghana le kalungsatna chu Judah khopihole Jerusalem khopi lamlena kabunglhan, akadohtai. Chule hichu tunia banghin akisumangin, akamheltan ahi." 
Jeremiah44:7 Hijeh chun tun Pakai janel Pathen, Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, ibola nalah uva kona pasal le numei, naosen le nao noicheplai Judah gamsunga kona paidoh-a aum nading bepmin hiche thilsehi nabol uve," 
Jeremiah44:8 chenna dinga nachenao Egypt gamsunga pathenho henga gimnamtui nahal uva, leiset chunga nam jouse lah-a sapsetle seiset nachan theinadiu le satlhah nahitheina diuva nakhutsoh tah uva neiphin lunghangu ham?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Judah gamsungle Jerusalem khosung lamlena napateu leh Judah lengte gitlouna, ajiteule nanghotah gitlouna, chule najiteuvin gitlouna anabolhou chu nasuhmilu hitam?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Amaho tuni geijin jong akineo sahdeh pouvin, akichadeh pouve, nanghole napateu masanga kakoijing keima danthu le chondan ho-a jong achon pouve." 
Jeremiah44:11 Hijeh chun janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin ati, keiman nangho douna-a thilse dingle Judah te satlhahna dinga kamaingat diu ahi." 
Jeremiah44:12 Egypt gamsunga pem dinga maingat Judah amoh umsun chu kamatna kasuh manghel soh ding, Egypt gama lhalut uva, chemjam le kela thigamhel diu, aneopena pat alenpen geija chemjam le kela thidiu, thet le datmoa, gaosap le seisetna umdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah44:13 Keiman Jerusalem chu chemjam'a, kela, chule hise-a talen kapeh banga Egypt gamsunga chengho chu talen kapeh ding ahin," 
Jeremiah44:14 Hitichun Egypt gamsunga cheng dinga che Judah mi a-umsun hochu, chenna dinga angaitun tunu Judah gama chu kilekit dinga khatcha ahoidoh le avaldoh umlou ding, aguh-a jamdoh ho tilou khatcha akilekit umlouhel dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah44:15 Chule pathen dangho henga ajiteuvin gimnamtui ahaluve ti he-a mijousen akoma ding numei jouse mihonpi atama tam, Egypt gama cheng mijouse, Pathros-a chun Jeremiah chu adonbutnun, aseijun," 
Jeremiah44:16 Pakai mina kahenguva nathusei chu ngaipou vinge, atiuve." 
Jeremiah44:17 Keihole kapateu, kalengteo le kapipui houvin, Judah khopihole Jerusalem khopi lamlen dunga anabol banguva, van lengnu henga gimnamtui hal le, ahenga don thilpeh sunlhah ding kakamsung tah uva kaseinao bangcheh-a kaboltei teidiu ahi. Ajehchu hichelai chun nehding tamtah kaneijun, aphan, thilse imacha kamupouve." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ahinla van lengnu henga gimnamtui halla don thilpeh sunlhah katan uva pat ijakai kalhasamun, chemjam le kelin eiki sumangun ahi." 
Jeremiah44:19 Chule van lengnu dinga gimnamtui kahal uva, don thilpeh kasunlhah laijuva chu, kapasalteu thu louva amanu houna dinga changlhah kasemuva, don thilpeh kasunlhah-u hibeh-em? atiuve." 
Jeremiah44:20 Chujouvin Jeremiah chun mijouse hengale pasal ho, numei ho, ama donbutho jouse henga chun aseijin," 
Jeremiah44:21 Judah khopihole Jerusalem khopi lamlen ho-a, nanghole napateu nalengteu chule gamsunga miten, gimnamtui nanahalu chu, Pakaiyin ahetlou hija alungsunga akhumlou hibeh-am?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Nathilse boljeh-u le nathilbolu kidah um jeh-a, Pakaiyin athohjou tahlou ahin, hiche jeh-a chu, nagamu tu-a bangahi kamdela, datmo uma, sapset changa achenga umlouhel ahitai." 
Jeremiah44:23 Gimnamtui nahal uva, Pakai douna-a nachonset uva, Pakai thu nangai daova, adan kisun thupeh le achondan najuilou jeh uva, hiche jeh-a chu tu-a bangahi nachung uva hiche thilsehi hungchua ahitai, ati." 
Jeremiah44:24 Chukalvalin Jeremiah chun mijousele numei jouse jah-a aseijin, Egypt gama um Judah te jousen Pakai thuhi ngaijun." 
Jeremiah44:25 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, nanghole najiteuvin van lengnu henga gimnamtui hal le don thilpeh sunlhah ding, kanakitepnao banga kabol teitei dingu ahi, tin nakamun naseijun, nakhut un namolso taove. Nakitepnao bulhitnun lang, nakitepnao molsouvin." 
Jeremiah44:26 Hijeh chun Egypt gama cheng Judah te jousen Pakai thu chu ngaijun, veuvin, Egypt gamsung pumpi-a Judah mi koimachan kamin aphahpoh tahlou ding ahi tia kamin thengtah pana kakitep ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije, Pakai ahing jinge." 
Jeremiah44:27 Veuvin, aphatna ding hilou, asetna dinga kachan jingding, Egypt gamsunga Judah mijouse akichai soh hel kahseuva chemjam le kel lhah-a kisumanghel ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ahinla chemjam'a sohcha themcha khat Egypt gama konin Judah gama kileuvintin, Judah mi umsun jouse Egypt gama cheng dinga chesate chun, kei thuham, amaho thuham, koi thujoh atah ahiding hetaovinte." 
Jeremiah44:29 Hichehi nangho dinga melchihna hiding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, hiche munahi nangho talen kapeh uva, nanghon kathuhi nangho douna-a, aselama dingjing ding ahi ti nahet theidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah44:30 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, vetan, Judah leng Zedekiah chu ama thadinga holjing amelmapa, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khutna kapeh banga, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh hophra jong amelmate, ama that dinga holjingho khutna kapehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah45:1 Judah leng Josiah chapa Jehoiakim lengchankal kumli channa-a Jeremiah kama hiche thuho asutlaija Keriah chapa Baruch henga Jeremiah themgaovin asei thu chu," 
Jeremiah45:2 Vo Baruch, Pakai Israel Pathen'in nahenga hitin aseije," 
Jeremiah45:3 Nangman Ohe, tun ada kahitai, Pakaiyin kalungkhamna chunga lung gentheina eibelappeh-in, khoisatna-in kalhutan, choldona kaneipoi, nati-e." 
Jeremiah45:4 Nangin ajah-a hiti ahi nasei ding ahi, Pakaiyin vetan, keiman kasah chu kaphelhan, kaphu chu hiche gam pumpi geijahi kabodoh ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah45:5 Nangin thil lenlen nachangseh dinga nahol ham? Bol hih-in, ajehchu mihing jouse chunga thilse kalhunsah ding ahi, Pakaiyin nahinkho hi nachena muntina nangma dinga anchah bepma bou kapeh ding nahi, ati." 
Jeremiah46:1 Chidang namdangho chungchanga Jeremiah henga Pakai thu hunglhung chun; 
Jeremiah46:2 Egypt chungchang Euphrates luipi kama Karchemish kho-a chun, Judah leng Josiah chapa Jehoiakim lengchankal kumli lhinna in Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar chun Egypt lengpa Pharaoh-Neko sepaiho chu anajoutan ahi." 
Jeremiah46:3 Pho leh lum kigotnun lang, gal lam nailutnun." 
Jeremiah46:4 Sakol phoho semtupmun lang, nangho sakol chungchongho kipatdoh-un, nathih lukhuh-u toh dingdoh uvin, tengcha kinol hemun lang, thih sangkhol ki-ah uvin." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ibola lungthoija anungjamu kamuham? Agal hatteu alhugamun, nunglam velouvin gangtah-in ajamuve. Avelu tijatnan alotai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah46:6 Akaljanga jammang dahen, mihat jong sohcha hihhen, amaho Euphrates luipi kom sahlama kipat uva lhugam diu ahi." 
Jeremiah46:7 Vadung banga atwi pomtultula, twisoh banga hung kinong lullul khu koiham?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Egypt hi twisoh atuiho pomtultul luipi abangin, kakhan touva leiset kalosoh ding, akhopile asunga chengho kasuhmang ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah46:9 Sakol nangho hung touvun, kangtalai nangho kino uvin, mihat ho hungdoh-u hen, lum choija Ethiopia mite le Egypt mite, thalpi kaosa-a choija Lydia mite." 
Jeremiah46:10 Ajehchu hichehi janel Pakai Pathen nikho phulah nikho ahin, akidoupiho chunga phu chu alah theina ding ahin, chemjamin aneh chaija, lungnachima athisanu adonkham ding ahi. Ajehchu Euphrates luipi pang sahlam gamkaijah janel Pakai Pathen'in ganlhaina abolin ahi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Vo Egypt chanu nungah theng, Gilead'a chetouvin, nuding thingnailou gakilah-in, ajehchu nadampi louding loule ai tampi naman ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:12 Namtin vaipin najachatna ajauvin, nakana in gamsung alosohtai. Mihatle mihat atatton, tolla alhugel lhontai." 
Jeremiah46:13 Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar iti ahunga Egypt gam ajo ding thudol chu Pakai chun Jeremiah henga aseije. 
Jeremiah46:14 Egypt gama seichoijun lang, Migdol le Noph chule Tahpanhes ah phongjalun, dingdet unlang, kigal ginun, ajehchu chemjamin nakimvel uva miho ahinsatgam ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:15 Ipi jeh-a namihatteu kiphet manga hitaovam? Amaho Pakaiyin anojeh uva ding joulou ahiuve. 
Jeremiah46:16 Aman mi tampi alhuhsah-in ahi, khat chunga khat alhuvin, amahon, kipat un, suhgentheina chemjam'a konin imiteu heng, igam lamuvah chekit taohite, atiuve." 
Jeremiah46:17 Hia chun amahon asamun, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh vang ahu gin keubou ahin, phat kitepsa amoh suhmange, atiuve." 
Jeremiah46:18 Amin janel Pakai lengpa chun keima kahing jinge, tahbeh-in mol ho lah-a Tabor bangle luipi panga Karmel banga ama hung ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:19 Vo Egypt'a cheng chanu, nangma sohchanga chedin kigojengtan, ajehchu Noph chu keuhela chenna louva kamhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:20 Egypt hi bongla hoitah abangin, ahinla manthah na ahungin, hichu sahlama kona hunga ahi." 
Jeremiah46:21 Bongchal thaotah bangin amithalah houjong chu alah uva aumin, ajehchu amaho jong akinung heijun, ajamkhom taove. Ajehchu amanthah nau nikhole atosetnao phat achunguva ahung lhun jeh-a ding joulou ahitaove." 
Jeremiah46:22 Chua husa chu gul kitholgin abangin, amaho chu gammang thingtuho banga heicha kenga galmiho toh hungdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah46:23 Amaho khaokhoho sanga tam ahiuvin, simjouhoi ahilou jehu'n, kholtoh hoi hihih jongleu agammang chu atuhchaihel diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah46:24 Egypt chanu kijumso-a, sahlam gamkai mite khutna kipedoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:25 Janel Pakai Israelte Pathen'in aseije, vetan, Amon mi No mihonpi, Pharaoh le Egypt chu a-pathenho le alengteu puma, Pharaoh amatah le ama tahsan jouse talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:26 Keiman amaho chu ahinnao holtele Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar le asohte khutna kapehdoh ding, chujou tengle masanga banga Egypt gama chu mi cheng ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah46:27 Ahinla Vo kalhacha Jacob, nangma kicha hih-in, ajehchu vetan, nangma gamlatah-a kona chule nachilhahte asohchannau gama kona kahuhdoh ding, Jacob chu hung kinungle-a ongthol tah-a choldoa, koimachan akichatsah lou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah46:28 Kicha hih-in, Vo kalhacha Jacob, tin Pakaiyin ati, ajehchu keiman kaumpinai, keiman nangma kadel mangna namho jouse kichaina chu kabolpeh ding ahin, nangma kichaina vang kabolpeh lou ding, tena-a vang kasuhdih ding nahi, hijengjongle talen manlouva vang kakoi louhel ding nahi, ati." 
Jeremiah47:1 Pharaoh'in Gaza ajo masangin Philistine te thudola themgao Jeremiah henga Pakai thu ahung lhunge. 
Jeremiah47:2 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, vetan sahlama kona twisang hunglena, gamsungle asunga um jouse akhopile asunga chengho achup gamhel ding, chuteng miho chu kapmuva gamsunga chengho jouse pengdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah47:3 Asakol hat hou kholhah ginin, akangtalai ho lhaiginle akangho kipei pohlahlah chun, pate khut ngoisah-in tin, achateu cheng nungvet pouvinte." 
Jeremiah47:4 Hichu Philistine te kisuhgamna le Tyre le Zidon'a panpi umsunho suhmanghel nikho ahijeh in, Pakaiyin Philistine te Caphtor gamsunga amoh umsun chu asuhmanghel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza chunga luchaina alhungin, Ashkelon chu phaicham amoh umsun pumin akisumang heltai. Itihchan naki-at chenchen ding hitam?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Vo nangma Pakai chemjam, itihchan mong nathip dingham? Napaija kikhumlutnin lang, kicholdon lang thipchet tan." 
Jeremiah47:7 Pakaiyin Ashkelon le twipi pamma ho sat dinga thu apeh-a, apansah ahile, iti umthim thei ding ham? ati." 
Jeremiah48:1 Janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in Moab dounan hitin aseije; Ohe Nebo, ada ahi, ajehchu akisusea nahitai; Kiriathaim akijumson, akilatai; Misgab ajahchan, alungthoi tai." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab kivahchoina umta ponte, Heshbon dounan thilse agonguve, hungun, namkhat ahina-a konin sutanhel uhite. Vo Madmen namho, nangho jong kisatlha ding nahiuvin, chemjamin najuidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim'a kona chomna le suhmangna nasatah kana awgin sohdoh ding ahi. 
Jeremiah48:4 Moab akisumang tai, achasen hou ka-na akijan," 
Jeremiah48:5 Ajehchu Luhith chetouna-a kap kapmin acheuvin, Horonaim kumsuh na-a melmaten asuhmangna jeh-a kana ajaove." 
Jeremiah48:6 Jamun, nahinna kihuhhingun lang, gamthip hamhing bangin umun," 
Jeremiah48:7 Ajehchu nathilbol le nahaona natahsan jeh-a, nangma jong kiman ding nahin, Chemosh chu athempuhou le apipuiho puma sohchanga chediu ahi." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khopi tina misumang hungintin, khopi khatcha hoilou ding, Pakaiyin asei banga damphai jong mangthah-a phaicham jong kisumang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:9 Alenmang theina din Moab chu lhaving peuvin, ajehchu acheng beija akhopi chu kamhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:10 Jonchihtah-a Pakai na tonga chu sapset changhen, thisan sona dinga achemjam tuhkihpa jong chu sapset chenghen." 
Jeremiah48:11 Moab hi aneuva pat nomsa ahin, ajuninga kivah-a, ajubel khatna khat jong keukhalou, ama jong sohchanga chekhalou ahi, hijeh achu atuina ama-a umden dena, anamtui jong kikhel lou ahi." 
Jeremiah48:12 Hijeh chun veuvin, nikho chu hunglhung ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, ahenga vahveiho kasola, amahon avaveisah dingu, chule jubelho avoh chippeh uva ahaihou asuhchippeh diu ahi." 
Jeremiah48:13 Israel insungin atahsan Bethel ajachatpiu banga Moab miten Chemosh ajachatpi diu ahi. 
Jeremiah48:14 Keiho gal hat le mihang kahiuve, iti natiu ham?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab akisumang tan, akhopiho-a konin abeidoh tai. Alhentum khangthah ho jong akithat ho lah-a apanggam taove, tin amin janel Pakai hija lengpa chun aseije." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moab hamsetna chu hunglhung vah ding ahitai, chule athohgimna chu kinoloi chela ahitai." 
Jeremiah48:17 Nangho avela um jousen lunghem piuvin, amin heho jousen, mol lhon hamtahle moltum hoitah chu iti boh-a hitam? tiuvin!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Dibon'a cheng chanu nangma, naloupi na-a konin hungsuh-in lang, dang chah-in touvin, ajehchu Moab sumanga chun nahin satna, nakulpi det ho asuhmang diu ahitai." 
Jeremiah48:19 Vo Aroer'a cheng lampia dingin lang velhin, ajampale ahoidoh nu chu ipi soh-a hitam? tin dongin lang seijin." 
Jeremiah48:20 Moab chu achimlhah jeh-in ajahchatai. Pengchoi choijin kapmun, Moab akisumang tai tin Arnon hilleuvin." 
Jeremiah48:21 Phaicham gama Holon le Jahazah chu chule Mephaath chunga, thutanlhahna aumin," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon le Nebo, chule Beth-diblathaim chunga," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaim le Beth-gamul, chule Beth-meon chunga," 
Jeremiah48:24 Kerioth le Bozrah chule Moab khopiho jouse naijale gamla-a chunga thutanna ahung lhungtai. 
Jeremiah48:25 Moab ki akisatlhan, abanjang akihehbongtai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah48:26 Pakai douna-a akiloupisah jeh-in, ama chu khamsah uvin, Moab jong alohlhahna-a kibola anuiho totna jong ahi." 
Jeremiah48:27 Israel chu nang dinga nuijatna bep hilou ham? Ama gucha lah-a kimukha am? Ama thudol nasei poupoule kipah-in nakichom chomjin ahi. 
Jeremiah48:28 Vo Moab gama chengho, Khopiho dalhauvin, songkoa chengun, kohom panga bu kiset vakhu bangin umun." 
Jeremiah48:29 Keihon Moab kiletsahna thu, ama akiletsah lheh-e; akichoisangin, ahoithoji-e, akiletsah jeh le alung hoithodan kamuvin ahi." 
Jeremiah48:30 Alungsatna chu kahei, tin Pakaiyin aseije; ahinla chutilou ding ahi, ajounaho chun ima sodoh ponte." 
Jeremiah48:31 Hijeh chun Moab din penging ting, Moab pumpi din kapdoh inge, Kirheres mite chu lunghem pinge." 
Jeremiah48:32 Vo Sibman lengpigui Jaazar ka-na in nangma dingin kapminge, naguiho twipi ajam galkaijin, Jaazar twipi chan geihel ajame, na nipitheile lengpiga sumangpa nachunga achutai." 
Jeremiah48:33 Neh nenna le Moab gama konin thanopnale kipana akilamang tan, lengpiga chilna-a konin lengpiga kabeisahtai. Koimachan kipa awgin to tho-a achiltah louding, a-ao nau chu kipana hitalou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:34 Heshbon'a kona Elealeh gei peh-a kho kisam chu Jahaz gei peh-in a-awginu athongin, Zoar apat Horodnaim geijin kum thum bongla abangin, ajehchu Nimrim twiho jong kamhel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:35 Chukalvalin Moab'a munsang ho-a thilto bolpale a-pathen hou henga gimnamtui halpa kasuhthip ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah48:36 Hijeh chun kalunghi Moab te dingin thih bangin gingintin, kalunghi Hirheres mite dingin theile ho bangin ginginte, ajehchu aman anei haonaho beigama ahitai." 
Jeremiah48:37 Ajehchu lu jouse chaija, khamul jouse kivou ding, khut jouse-a ki-at ding, kongho chunga khaopon akiveitai." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab intingvum jousele khosung lamlen ho-a tanggola lunghemna jeng umding ahin, ajehchu asunga lunglhaina umlouhel bangin kavochiptai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah48:39 Amaho penguva, iti hichu kisu chipma, Moab chu jahcha geuva iti kinungheija hitam atidiu ahi. Hitia chu Moab chu nuisat le akimvella umho dinga lungthoina hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:40 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Veuvin, ama mulaopi bangin hunglengin tin, Moab chunga alhaving ahinjah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:41 Kerioth chu akila ahitan, akuldet hou achim sohtan, chuche ni-a Moab mihangsan ho lungthim chu numei naonei pet lungthim tobang bep ahi." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moab chu Pakai douna-a amale ama akichoisang jeh-a mite khat ahinaova kona kisumang ding ahitai. 
Jeremiah48:43 Vo Moab'a cheng, nachunga tijatna le kokhuh chule thang hungchu ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah48:44 Tijatna-a kona jam-a chu kokhuh-a lhalutnin tin, kokhuh-a kona hungdoh-a chu thanga ohding ahi. Ajehchu achunga Moab chungtah-a talen kapeh kum kalhunsah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah48:45 Heshbon lim noija galmiho jeh-in ajamho adingden taovin; ahinla Heshbon'a konin mei chule Sihon'a konin meikong hungintin, Moab ningkoile samel mula umho lallukhuh akahvam ding ahi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Vo Moab ada nahitai! Chemosh mite amangthah taove. Ajehchu nachapate sohchangin akikaijin, nachanute asohchang taove." 
Jeremiah48:47 Hijongle ninunung lamle Moab sohchangho chu kahinlepui kit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Hichan geihi Moab thu kitanlha chu ahi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ammon mite thudol chu Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Israel'in chapa aneilou ham? Aman goulo aneilou ham? achutile ibola alengpauvin Gad alo-a, amite akhopiho-a chenguva ham?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin aseije, Vetan, nikho ahung lhunge, Ammon mite kho Kabbah a galkisat thuthang kajahsah ding, hichu agohkeo kisevum hija, achanuteu meija kigou ding; chuteng ama gouloho chu Israel ten alodiu ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah49:3 Vo Heshbon, Ai kisuhmang jeh-in pengun, Rabbah chanute kapmun, khaodip pon kigah-un lang lunghemun, hamkhul lah-a suhle tungin lhaijun, ajehchu alengpaule athempuhou chule apipuiteu agoma sohchanga chediu ahitai." 
Jeremiah49:4 Vo chanu nungchonnu, ibola na phaichamm phalai chuleh phaicham ho-a nakiloupi sah-a nagoukhol ho-a nakisona, kahenga koi hung ding hija? nati ham?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Vetan, nachunga tijatna, navela umho jouse-a kona kahinlhunsah-a, nangho amitakip kinomang jeng ding, alamvaipa chu koimachan akhopkhom lou ding ahitai, tin janel Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Jeremiah49:6 Khonungle Ammon chate sohchangho kalepui ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah49:7 Edom thudol chu janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Teman'a chihna beihela hitam? Milungchinga kona thumopna mangthah-a hitam? ahetkhen themnao mangdela hitam?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Vo Dedan'a chengte, jamun, kinung leuvin, chengdetnun, ajehchu keiman Esau chunga hamsetna kahinlhut ding, ama gotna kapeh ding phat kahin lhunsah ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Lengpiga louho nahenga hungleu akhai themkhat dalha pouvintem? Jan-in guchaho hungu le achim kahseuva aneh mang loudiu ham? 
Jeremiah49:10 Ahinla Esau ahomkeovin kalhan, amunthip ho kahohdoh gamtan, kisel thei lou ding ahitai. Achilhahte leh asopiho, chule aheng akomho akisumang sohtan, ama abeihel tai." 
Jeremiah49:11 Paneilou nachateho chu dalhan, keiman hinso nange, chule nameithai hon eitahsanu hen." 
Jeremiah49:12 Ajehchu Pakaiyin hitin ati, Vetan, khona kon adonlou dinga athu kitanlhah hon adonjeng tah-ule, talen manlou ding pa chu nangma nahim? Talen manlouvin chepon nate, ahinla hichea chu nadon tei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:13 Keima kaki hahsel tai, tin Pakaiyin aseije, Bozrah chu kamhela, seisetna uma, keohela, sapsetna umding; chuche khopi jouse a-itih-a keohel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:14 Pakaiya konin thuthang khat kajan, Pathen helouho henga palai khat akisolin, kipun khomun, chule ama satnun, galbol din kipatdoh-un." 
Jeremiah49:15 Ajehchu vetan, keiman nangma Pathen helouho lah-a kaneosah-a, mite nahsahmo-a kasem ding nahi." 
Jeremiah49:16 Vo nang lhangsanga song khikah-a cheng, kichat umtah banga nakigelna le nalunga kiletsahna chun nalheplhah ahitai. Nangman muvanlai banga sangin nabu sepjongle chun, chua kona kaloilhah ding nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edom jong kamhel intin, koi hile ajotpa chan atosetna jeh-a chehsa diu ahi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sodom le Gomorrah chule avela khopiho akisuhmang helbanga, chua koimacha umlou ding, mihem chapa jong cheng louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin ati." 
Jeremiah49:19 Veuvin, Jordan twisoh akonin ama chu kuldet nokhum dingin keipibahkai bangin hungtouvintin, ahinla ama-a kona hetman louva kadelmang ding ahi, chule achunga vaipo dinga kalhenthei pasal lhentum koiham? Kei tobang koi umam? Koijin phat eiteppeh ding ham? Ka anga dingding kelngoi chingpa chu koi ham?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Hijeh chun Edom douna Pakai thumopte, Teman'a chengte chunga athilgon, bol dinga agot ho chu ngaijun, thonlouva ganhon neopen geija kilhoh manga amaho puma achennao akamhelsah tei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:21 Alhuh-u ginin leiset ahot lingin, aka ginu jong twipi geijin akijaphan ahi." 
Jeremiah49:22 Veuvin, mulaopi bangin ama hungleng touvintin, Bozrah chunga alha ajah ding ahin, hiche nikho chuleh mihat te lungthim jong numei jin naosonat athoh petna alungthim tobang hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:23 Damascus thudola chun Hamath le Arpad akisudongtai; amahon thuse ajah jeh-un alungu alha lhoptai; twipi chunga lungkhamna aumin, hichu athip thei tapoi." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damascus hi angoilhatan, jam dingin kigon akiheijin, tijatna-in amanchomtai; lungkhamnale natnan numei naosonat bangin abomtai." 
Jeremiah49:25 Kanopsahna khopi, vahchoina khopi chu iti kikhen louva ham?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Hijehchu agollhanghou khosung lamlena chu lhugama, hicheni chule agal hat hou jouse kithatgam hel ding ahiuve, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah49:27 Chule Damascus kulbanga mei kachokonga Benhadad leng inpi akahvam ding ahi.
