Jeremiah49:28 Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in asuhmang ding Kedar thudolle Hazor lenggam thudol chu Pakaiyin hitin ati. Kipat un Kedar a chetouvun lang, solama miho chu gachomun." 
Jeremiah49:29 Aponbuh houle agancha honnu atol manguva, apondal houle aumlebel jouseu, asangongsao ho akilah uva, amahon ajah uva, ningtina tijatna jeng ahi, tia ahenguva asap diu ahi." 
Jeremiah49:30 Vo Hazor a cheng mite, jamun, gamlatah-a umun lang, chengdetnun, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ajehchu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in nachung thu agel lhutan, nangma douna-in ngaito aneitai." 
Jeremiah49:31 Kipat un, khohsah louhela cheng kul kotpile thih kotgol jong neilouva achanguva cheng, nam haotah ho sat ding khun kontouvun, tin Pakaiyin aseijin ahi." 
Jeremiah49:32 Asangongsao ho chu galthil chomding hija, aganchau tampi chu chomgam dingbep hintin, kolmong geija hui jouse-a amaho kathecheh-a, ningtina kona ahamsetnau kahinpoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor chu dragon ho chenna hiding, a-itih-a kamhel ding ahin, chua mihem khatcha umlou ding, mihem chapa khatcha jong cheng lou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:34 Judah lengpa Zedekiah leng chantila Elam douna-a Jeremiah themgao henga Pakai thu hunglhung chun hitin aseije. 
Jeremiah49:35 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Veuvin, Elam thalpi athahatnao kona pen chu kaheboh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:36 Elam dounan chua van ningli-a konin huilhi hinlhun sah ingting, chuche huiho lama chu kathecheh ding, akinodoh Elam mite lhunlouna nam umlou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ajehchu Elam mite chu amelmateu masangle ahinnao holte masanga kalungthoisah-a, achunguva thilse kalunghana, tijat umtah ngeichu kapohlutna, kasuh manghel kahse-a, anung nunguva chemjam kasol ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin ati." 
Jeremiah49:38 Chua kona lengpa le pipuiho kasuhmanga, Elam'a chu kalaltouna kado ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah49:39 Ahinla ninunung lamle hung hiti ding ahi, Elam sohchangho chu kalepui kit ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:1 Babylon le Chaldea te gam chungchanga Jeremiah themgaova kona Pakai thusei chu ahi. 
Jeremiah50:2 Namtin lah-a phongjalun lang thejah-un, ponlap domsangun, thejah-un, imhih-un, Babylon akilatai, Bel akisudongtai, Merodach ahal halin achiptai; asong milimhou ajahchatan, amilimhou ahal hallin achiptai, tiuvin." 
Jeremiah50:3 Sahlama konin nam khatnin ahinsatnun, hichun agam akamhelsah-a, koimacha chua chenglou ding, mile sa agoma kichonuva adalhah diu ahi." 
Jeremiah50:4 chuche nikhole chuche phatna chu, Israel chate, amahole Judah chate chu kappuma hungkhom uva, Pakai a-Pathen'u chu agahol diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:5 Zion lam amaingat uva alampi adoh dingu, hungun, suhmil kit louhel dingin tonsot thulhunna eihotah-in Pakai chu jomuhite, atidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah50:6 Kamite chu kelngoi mang ahiuvin, achinghouvin alamvaisah-uvin, molchung ho-a akihei manguvin, mola konin lhang danga acheuvin, ahongsungu asumil taove." 
Jeremiah50:7 Amuchanin amaho avallhumun, akidoupihouvin hitin aseijuve, keihon kasukhel pouve, ajehchu amaho thudihtah chenna Pakai, apateu kinepna Pakai ngei douna chun achonseuvin ahi." 
Jeremiah50:8 Babylon lailunga konin potdoh unlang, Chaldea te gama konin chedoh-un, chule kel hon lah-a kelchal bangin umun." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ajehchu, veuvin, Babylon satding sahlama konin namho loupitah-a kikhom khom chu choh thouving ting, ama dou dinga kigoltoh uva, chua patna alah diu ahin, athalchangu chu mihat galbol thema tobang hintin, khatcha kimohle lou ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:10 Chaldea chu kichom ding ahin, achom jouse chu lunglhaisel diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:11 Nakipa jeh-un, nathanop jeh-un, Vo kagoulo sumanga nangho, hamhing ne bongla banga hung thaodoh-in bongchal bangin naham lutlut jenge." 
Jeremiah50:12 Nanu chu hatah-a kijumsah ding ahi, nahingnu chu jahcha lheh ding ahi; Veuvin, namho lah-a anukhah pen chu gamthip gam, gamgo, chule neldi gam hiding ahitai." 
Jeremiah50:13 Pakai lunghan jeh-a chenna mun hilou ding, apuma kamhel joding, Babylon'a chechan asetnaho jouse jeh-a adatmouva chehsasa cheng ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah50:14 Babylon kimvela kigolun lang, thalpi kamsa kichoi jousen ama chu kapmun, thalchang khatcha khen hih-un; ajehchu Pakai dounan achonsetai." 
Jeremiah50:15 Akimvela hatah-in aovun, aman akhut apedohtai, akhopibul jouse alhutan, akulpihou achimlhatai, Pakai phulah ahijeh in achunga phu lauvin, aman abol bangin ama jong bolun." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babylon'a konin muchi thepa chule chang atlaija koite choipa sumang uvin, suhgentheina chemjam jeh-a amaho amitakip amite lamcheh-a kiheija, amitakip agamcheh-a jamdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israel hi keipin adelmang kelngoi vahcheh chu ahin, Assyria lengpan abahgam masapenin, achainan Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in aguho asubongin ahi." 
Jeremiah50:18 Hijeh chun janel Pakai Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, Veuvin, Babylon lengpa le agam chu Assyria lengpa talen kapeh banga talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:19 Chule Israel chu aumna-a kapuikitna Karmel le Bashan'a kivah-a, Ephraim le Gilead mol chunga ahinnao lunglhaisel ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Pakaiyin, chuche nikhole chuche phat tengle Israel khansetna chu kikhola, khatcha kimu lou ding, Judah setna jong kimu lou ding ahi. Ajehchu keiman kakhehho chu kangaidam ding ahi, ati." 
Jeremiah50:21 Merathaim le Pekod'a chengho tah chu doudin kontouvun, amaho chu thatnun, sumanghelun, kathupeh jouse bangin bolun, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:22 Chuche gama gal kisatle suhmangna nasatah husa aginge. 
Jeremiah50:23 Leiset pumpi sehtum iti kikehso-a, kisu bonga hitam? Namtinho lah-a Babylon iti hung kamhela hitam?" 
Jeremiah50:24 Vo Babylon thang kakampeh-in, na-ohtan, nangin nakihetpon; nangma nakiholdoh-in nakimantai. Ajehchu Pakai nakisatpin ahi." 
Jeremiah50:25 Pakaiyin agalvon kholna chu ahongin, alungsatna galvonho aladohtai. Ajehchu hichehi Chaldea te gamsunga janel Pakai Pathen natoh ahi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Gamgi monglhapena konin adouvin hungun, athilkholna inho hongun, sepkhomun lang sumang helun, a-imacha khen hih-un." 
Jeremiah50:27 Abongchal jouse akisuhmang nao nikho ahunglhun jeh-in, Ohe adao ahi!" 
Jeremiah50:28 Pakai i-Pathen'u phulahna, a-houin dinga phulahna Zion'a phongdoh dinga Babylon'a kona hungjamdohho awgin khu ngaijun." 
Jeremiah50:29 Babylon doudin thalthem ho koukhom un; thalkap jousen akimvela ponbuh kisonun, koimacha hoidohsah hih-un; athilbol dungjuijun lethuh un, athilbol jouse dungjuijin achunga bolun, ajehchu ama Pakai dounale, Israel mithengpa douna-a ahoithon ahi." 
Jeremiah50:30 Agollhanghou kholaija lhulhop diu, chuche nile agal hat jouseu kisumanghel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:31 Vetan, mihoitho penpa, kadou nahi, ajehchu nangma gotna kapeh ding phat, nanikho chu ahung lhungtai, tin janel Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Jeremiah50:32 Mihoitho pen chu kipala lhuding, koimachan akaithou lou ding ahi. Chule akhopi sunga mei kachokonga, akimvel jouse akahchai ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:33 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Israel chate leh Judah chate suhgentheijin aumkhomun, sohchanga kaiho jousen atuhdetnun, lhadoh ding anompouve." 
Jeremiah50:34 Alhatdohpao chu ahatnin, janel Pakai chu amin ahi. Gamsunga olna aumtheina dingle Babylon'a chengte asuhboi theina dinga, ama amaho lama pang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:35 Chaldea te chungle Babylon'a chengte chule apipuiteu, amichingteu chunga chemjam achutai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:36 Mijouho chunga chemjam achun, amaho lunglhom diu; amihatteu chunga chemjam achun, amaho lungthoi diu ahi." 
Jeremiah50:37 A sakol houle akangtalaihou, chule alah uva michoplop ho chunga chemjam achutan, amaho numei ho bang diu ahitai. Agoukhol hou chunga chemjam achun, chule hicheho chu kichom mang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:38 Atuiho chunga twikana alhungin, hichu kanghel ding ahi. Ajehchu milim semthu gam ahin, asong milimhouvah angolgam taove." 
Jeremiah50:39 Hijeh achu nelphai gamsahole twikol gamsaho chua chenguva, sumbupi jong cheng ding ahin, a-itih-a kilokit talou ding, akhang akhanga kilo talouhel ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah50:40 Pathen'in Sodom le Gomorrah chule nai vela khopi ho asuhmang banga, chuachu koimacha umlou ding, mihem chapa jong khatcha cheng louhel ding ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah50:41 Veovin, sahlama kona mipi honkhat hunguntin, chule nam lentahle leng tamtah, leiset kolkimvela konin hung kitol touvunte." 
Jeremiah50:42 Amahon thalle teng apatdiu ahi. Engsetahle hepina beihel twipi kinong banga kitum lenglunga, sakola touvuva, mitin galbolmi banga kivona, Vo Babylon chanu, nahin satdiu ahitai." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babylon lengpan athulhutnu ajan, akhut tha angoilhatai. Numei naosonat bangin, hesohnale natna-in naman chomtai." 
Jeremiah50:44 Veuvin, ama Jordan twi kinonga kona mihat umna lama keipibahkai banga hungtou ding, ahinla keiman ama-a kona kajam mangsah paiding ahi. Achunga vaihomna katun ding pasal lhentum koiham? Keitobang koi umam? Koijin phat eiteppeh ding ham? Ka anga dingding kelngoichingpa chu koiham?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Hijeh chun Babylon douna-a Pakai thumop, Chaldea te douna-a alunggot, anangaito chu ngaijun, kelngoihon lah-a aneopen jong kikai manga, thonlou hella aumnao chu amaho toh kamhela alhatei ding ahi." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babylon kilah dohna hu-ginin leiset ahot lingin, akanao namtin vaipi lah-a akijai." 
Jeremiah51:1 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Babylon chunga chule alah uva cheng Keima eidouva pangho chunga, suhmangna huipi katildoh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:2 Keiman Babylon'a chang jap ho kasola, amahon ajap childiu; ajehchu lungkham nile aveluva adouvuva pang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:3 Ama douva thal choile ama douva janel lah-a kisong thal hemin athal lhahen; agolhanghou khen hih-un, ajanelpi chu sumangsoh helun." 
Jeremiah51:4 Hitia chu Chaldea gamsungle khosung lamlen ho-a akithatho lhuchap ding ahiuve. 
Jeremiah51:5 Ajehchu Israel mithengpa douna-in agamu chonsetnin dimjongle, Israel le Judah chu a-Pathen'u janel Pakaiyin adalhapoi." 
Jeremiah51:6 Babylon na konin jamdoh un lang, mitinin ahinna kihuh hinghen; akhangit lounao thipi hih-un, ajehchu hichehi Pakai phulah phat ahin, aman alethuh ding mong ahi." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babylon chu leiset pumpi khamsah, Pakai khutna sana khon chu ahi, namtin vaipin aju chu adon khamuva, hichea chu ngolgama ahitaove." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babylon chu alhu phungin akisumang tai; ama chu kouvin, ama chu damthei ding ahile, anatna nuding thingnailou lauvin." 
Jeremiah51:9 Babylon chu kadamsah nom-in, ahinla adam chompoi; dalhauvin, igam cheh-a kicheo hite. Ajehchu athu kitan lhah na-in van asun, vandum gei sana kidomsang ahitai." 
Jeremiah51:10 Pakaiyin ichon phatnao aphongdoh tai. Hungun, Pakai i-Pathen'u thilbol Zion'a seichoi juhite." 
Jeremiah51:11 Thalchang ho notvalun, lumho chom khomun, Pakaiyin Mede lengte lung asuthoutai. Ajehchu atup chu Babylon dinga suhmang ding chu ahi, ajehchu hichu Pakai phulah, a-houin phulahna ahi." 
Jeremiah51:12 Babylon kulbang vuma ponlap tungdoh-un, khongah hatsah-un, khongah ho tungdoh-un, ajehchu Babylon mite douna-a Pakaiyin asei chu agongtoh-in, atong chaitai." 
Jeremiah51:13 Vo nang twi tamtah chunga chenga, gou haotah pa, nakichainale nakiloset tetohna chu ahung lhungtai." 
Jeremiah51:14 Janel Pakai chu amatah akihahselin, aseije, khaokhoho tobang hela mihem'a kahindip teitei ding nahi, amahon nangma douna-a ahin aodiu ahi." 
Jeremiah51:15 Pathen'in athaneina-a leiset asema, achihna-a vannoi atundoh-a, ahetchetna-a kona jong aphajal ahitai." 
Jeremiah51:16 Aman a-aw asodoh teng, van ho-a twipi tamtahpi ahung umjin, kolmong ho-a konin twimei akaltou sahjin, kolphele go asemin, hui chu akikholna-a konin alhadoh jin ahi." 
Jeremiah51:17 Mitin ahetnaova ngola ahiuvin, thil podoh takip semthu milima kijumso ahiuve. Ajehchu amilim semthu uchu joubulom ahin, amaho-a haitheina hu aumpoi." 
Jeremiah51:18 Hicheho chu mohseh, thilbol dihlou ahin, gotna akipeh phat tengule mangthah cheh diu ahi." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jacob chanvang hicheho tobang chu ahipoi, thil jouse kipatna ahi. Israel chu agoulo moljol ahin, amin chu janel Pakai ahi." 
Jeremiah51:20 Nangma kagal heichale kagalvonho chu nahi. Ajehchu namdangho chu nangma-a kasuhchipma, nangma-a lenggam ho kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:21 Chule nangma-a sakolle achunga toupa kasuh chip ding, chule nangma-a kangtalai le achunga atoupa kasuhchip ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:22 Nangma-a pasal le numei kasuhchipma, tehse le khangthah kasuhchip ding ahi, chule nangma-a nungah le gollhang jong kasuhchip ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:23 Nangma-a kelngoichingpa le akelngoihon jong kasuhchip ding, nangma-a loubolpa le abongchalho koljon, chule agal lamkaiho le vaihomho kasuhchip ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:24 Chule nangma mitmu tah-a Zion chunga athilsebol jouseu chu Babylon'a le Chaldea te chunga kachuhsah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah51:25 Leiset pumpi sumanga vo suhmangna mollen, vetan kadou nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, nachunga kakhut kalhan doh-a, songpi ho-a kona kejel lhah-a, akavamsa mol kaso ding nahi." 
Jeremiah51:26 Nanga kona in-ning song dingle inbul song ding alah lou diu ahitan, ahinla a-itih-a kamhel ding nahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah51:27 Gamsunga ponlap khat tahdoh-un lang, namtin vaipi lah-a sumkon mut un lang, ama doudin namho gongun lang, Ararat, Minni, chule Ashchenaz lenggam ho ama doudin gallamkai semun lang, khaokhoho bangin sakol ho hungtou sah-un." 
Jeremiah51:28 Ama doudin namho, Mede lengte, agal lamkaihou, avaihomho jouse, aloinehna gam jouse gonguvin." 
Jeremiah51:29 Chuche Babylon gam chu kihot hotna lungdong diu ahi. Ajehchu Babylon gam chu chenna louva akamhelna dinga Pakai thilgon jouse guilhung ding ahi. 
Jeremiah51:30 Babylon gal hat ho galsat ahaijun, akul sunguva aumden taove. Ahatnau adailhatan, numei asohgam taove. Achendetnau ahal lha uvin, akotgol hou abong gamtai." 
Jeremiah51:31 Thusep khat chu achomto kisuto ding, thangkou khat chu achom khatto kisuto-a, akhopi chu among khatna konin akilatai ti hil dingin Babylon gama alhaijun ahi." 
Jeremiah51:32 Lampiho atutanun, pumpeng aneihou meija akihal lhan, gal hat ho akichagam taove." 
Jeremiah51:33 Ajehchu janel Pakai, Israel Pathen'in hitin aseije, Babylon chanu chu phol tobang ahin, ama kivoh phat ahitai. Hijengjongle chomcha khat joule achang atphat hunglhung ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah51:34 Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in einechaijin, eisugoijin, belhomkeo eisotai, dragon bangin eival lhumin, kasa atuilai jouse anevasetnin, aman eipaidoh tai." 
Jeremiah51:35 Keile katahsa chunga hunama eikibol naho, Babylon chunga umhen tia Zion'a chengten aseijuva, Jerusalem in kathisan Chaldea te chunga chuhen, atidiu ahi." 
Jeremiah51:36 Hijeh-a chu Pakaiyin, Veovin, nangma lama pangin ting, naphu lahpeh inge, chule atuipi gotsah ingting, atuinah kansah inge, ati." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babylon chu hung kilhu vuma, dragonho chenna mun, datmo umle chehsatna, mi chen louna hung hiding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Amaho keipiho banga kitum khomuva, keipibahkai nouho banga ngih ngihdiu ahi." 
Jeremiah51:39 Akhampetnule agolvah-u kabolsah-a kakhamsah ding, hitia chu kipah thanomuva, a-itih-a ihmuva, thoukit talouhel ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah51:40 Athat dingpa henga kelngoinou kakaisah-a, kelngoi chalto kelchal kikai banga amaho chu kapuisuh ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sheshach chu iti kimat ham? Leiset pumpi vahchoipa chu iti datmo um hitam? Babylon chu datmo um iti hungsoh hitam? 
Jeremiah51:42 Babylon chu twipin achuptan, chuche twinong tamtah chun akhutai." 
Jeremiah51:43 Akhopiho chu akamhelin, gamgo, gamthip, mi khatcha chenlouna gam, mihem chapa khatchan ajotpa louhel asohtai." 
Jeremiah51:44 Chule Babylon sunga Bel chu talen kapeh-a, aval lhumsapa kamsunga kona kiloidoh ding; chule namtin vaipi chu ahenga hung kilhonlut khomkit talou ding ahiuve, Babylon kul chu chimlha ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah51:45 Kamite, alah-a konin potdoh-un lang, Pakai lungsat tijat umtah-a konin nangma cheh hinna kihuhhingun." 
Jeremiah51:46 Ajole nalungu hopmintin, chuche gama kijading thuthang jeh in tijagetnun nate, kum khatle thuthang khat hung lhungin tin, chujou kum khatle thuthang khatma, chule gamsunga hunam patna, vaipole vaipo kidouna hunglhung ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Hijeh chun veuvin, Babylon'a milim kikhengho thu katanna ding nikho ahung lhunge, agam pumpi jahcha-a, ami kithat jouse agamlaija lhuchap ding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:48 Chuteng vanle lei, chule asunga umjousen Babylon jeh-a penga la asahdiu ahi. Ajehchu sahlama kona asumangho ahenga hung ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babylon'in Israel atha-a alhuhsah banga chu, leiset pumpi kithat chu Babylon'a chudiu ahi." 
Jeremiah51:50 Nangho chemjam'a hoidohho chemangun, dingden hih-un, gamlatah-a konin Pakai galdoh un, nalunguva Jerusalem chu geldoh jingun." 
Jeremiah51:51 Houset kajah jeh-un kajum-un, jachatna-in kamaiju akhutai. Ajehchu Pakai ina muntheng sunga gamdang mi ahung lutnuve." 
Jeremiah51:52 Hijeh chun veuvin, nikho alhunge, Pakaiyin aseije, amilimhou chunga thu katan ding, chule agam pumpi-a mapuho peng ding ahiuve." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon chu van'a kaltouhen lang, akulsung chu detsah jengjongle, keija kona ahenga misumang ho hungnalai diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah51:54 Babylon'a kona kana le Chaldea gama kona suhmangna nasatah husa athongin," 
Jeremiah51:55 Pakaiyin Babylon asim jeh-a, a-awginu nasatah chu athipsah-a, akinon ginu chu twi tamtah nasatah kinon gin tobang ahin, a-awginu chu a-ong jeju jengin ahi." 
Jeremiah51:56 Ajehchu misugam ahenga ahungin, Babylon chungtah-a chun achun, amihatteu aman gamun athalpiu cheh-u abong gamtan, ajehchu lethuhji Pakaiyin alethuh tei ding ahitai." 
Jeremiah51:57 Chule apipuitele amichingte, agal lamkaiho le avaihomte, chule amihatte kakhamsah gam ding ahi, amaho tonsot imutna ihmuva, thoukit talouhel ding ahiuve, tin lengpa amin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Jeremiah51:58 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Babylon kul nasatahho chu chimsoh hela, akotpi bangho kavamsoh ding ahi, miten mohseh-a atohgimuva, amahon mei dinga bou acholpi dingu ahi." 
Jeremiah51:59 Judah lengpa Zedekiah Alengchan kal kum lina-a Maaseiah chapa Neriah Chapa Seriah, Zedekiah to Babylon lama achepet lhona Jeremiah themgao'in athupeh; chule hiche Seriah hi lenga thil le lo ching pipuipen ahi." 
Jeremiah51:60 Hitichun Jeremiah chun Babylon chunga thilse hung chuding jouse, Babylon chungchang thu kisun jouse jong lekhabu khatna asunlutne." 
Jeremiah51:61 Chuin Jeremiah chun Seriah jah-a, Babylon'a nahunga, hiche thuho hi namu ding, chule aboncha nasimding ahi." 
Jeremiah51:62 Chuteng nangman nasei ding ahi, Vo Pakai, nangman, asunga mile sa khatcha jong umlouhel dinga kisumang hela, a-itih-a kamheljo ding ahi, tin hiche mun douna-a thu naseitan ahi." 
Jeremiah51:63 Chule hiti ding ahi, lekhabu hi nasim joutengle, song khat toh nakanbeh-a, Euphrates lailunga naselut ding ahi:" 
Jeremiah51:64 Achunga kahinpohlut ding thilse-a kona thoudoh lou dinga, hiti ahi Babylon lhalut ding ahitai, nati ding ahi. Chule amaho chollheh diu ahi. Hichanhi Jeremiah thuho chu ahi." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah chu leng ahung channin kum somni le khat ahin, Jerusalem'a kum somlekhat alengchange, anu min chu Hamutal ahin, Libnah kho-a Jeremiah chanu ahi." 
Jeremiah52:2 Chuin aman Jehoiakim boljouse bangin Pakai mitmun thilse abolin ahi. 
Jeremiah52:3 Hitichun Pakai lunghanna konin Jerusalem le Judah gamsung chu amasanga kona apaidohhel kahsen ahung hitin ahi, Zedekiah chu Babylon lengpa dounan akiphinin ahi." 
Jeremiah52:4 Chuin alengchan kumko lhinkum, lhasom channa, nisom na-a chun ahitin ahi, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar chu asepaite jouseto Jerusalem satdin ahungun, amaidon na chun ponbuh asongun, akhopi kimvela galkul akaikhum taove." 
Jeremiah52:5 Hitichun Zedekiah lengpa lengchankal kum somlekhat lhin geijin khopi chu aumchah taove. 
Jeremiah52:6 Chuin lhalina niko nin khopi sunga chun kel akhohtan, gamsung mite din nehding abeitei." 
Jeremiah52:7 Chuin khopi chu akehtan, galbol miho jouse chu khopi-a konin jan-in, kulbang ni kah-a lengpa hon lampi kotpi-a chun ajamdoh-un, (tun Chaldea te chu khopi pam kimvela panga ahiuvin) Phaicham lampi chu ajon taove." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ahinla Chaldea sepaiten lengpa chu anungdelun, Jericho phaichama Zedekiah chu aphapao vin, asepaite jouse ama-a konin akithecheh taove." 
Jeremiah52:9 Chuin lengpa chu amanun, Hamath gama Riblah a Babylon lengpa henga apui taove. Hia chun achunga thu atanlhatai." 
Jeremiah52:10 Chuin Babylon lengpan Zedekiah chapate chu amitmu tah-in athatnin, Judah pipuiho jouse jong Riblah a chun athat gamtai." 
Jeremiah52:11 Chujouvin Zedekiah mitchang teni chu akaldoh peh-in, Babylon lengpa chun thihkhaovin akanin, Babylon lama akaijin, athi nikho geijin songkul'a ahentai." 
Jeremiah52:12 Tun lhanga na, chuche lha nisom na-a chun, hichu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kum somleko lhinna ahin, Babylon lengpa kinbol, sepai gal lamkai Nebuzaradan chu Jerusalem'a ahungin," 
Jeremiah52:13 Pakaiyin le lengpa in, chule Jerusalem'a in ho ahalin, milenho in jouse jong meijah ahalvam soh heltai." 
Jeremiah52:14 Chuin sepai gal lamkai toh hung kilhon Chaldea sepai jouse chun Jerusalem kimvela kulbang jouse avochim soh hel taove. 
Jeremiah52:15 Chujouvin sepai gal lamkai Nebuzaradan'in miho lah-a migenthei phabeple khopi sunga umnalai amohho, Babylon lengpa henga kipelut ho, chule mipi dangho chu sohchangin akaimangtai." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ahinla sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan'in gamsunga genthei phabep chu lengpilei lhoudingle ngahdin adalhatai. 
Jeremiah52:17 Pakai insunga um sum-eng khompihole akitun naho, Pakai insunga sum-eng twikong jong chu Chaldea ten avoseovin, asum-eng jouse Babylon'a apotaove." 
Jeremiah52:18 Khangbel lenho jong, vutloho, chaicheho, kongtong ho, meivah khomho, thihkheho, akinbolnao sum-eng lheng, lhengkong ho apomangsoh taove." 
Jeremiah52:19 Chule khon neoho le vutloho, kongtong ho, khangbel lenho, meivah khom ho, thihkhe ho, chule khon ho, sana-a kisem chu sana in, dangka-a kisem chu dangka-in, sepai lamkaipa chun akilah-in ahi." 
Jeremiah52:20 Khompi ni, twikong khat, atunna noija sum-eng bongchal somleni, hichu Solomon lengpan Pakai insunga asem ahin, hiche lheng le khonho jouse sum-eng chu te jouhoi ahipoi." 
Jeremiah52:21 Khompi thudol; khompi khat chu asandan tong somleget, akimvel tong somlenin akol khumin, hichu bel li sa-a ahin, asung hom ahi." 
Jeremiah52:22 Achunga sum-eng luboh khat aumin, aluboh khat chu tong nga sanga, alubohho chung chu kolbuthei lima themneltah-a kijempah ahin, aboncha sum-eng jeng ahi. Sutpi nina jong chu hiche tobangahi kolbutheija kijempah ahi." 
Jeremiah52:23 Apang khatna kolbuthei somko le gup cheh aumin, themneltah-a kijem chunga chu kolbuthei jakhat-in akimvel ahi." 
Jeremiah52:24 Chuin sepai lamkaipan thempulen Seraiah le thempu ni channa Zephaniah chule kotngah thumho chu akaijin; 
Jeremiah52:24 Chuin sepai lamkaipan thempulen Seraiah le thempu ni channa Zephaniah chule kotngah thumho chu akaijin; 
Jeremiah52:25 Aman gal hat ho chunga vaipo nukiso pa, khopi sunga um lengpa koma umjing le akivoppi jing mi sagi, sepai janelho lekhasunpa, khopi lailunga kimudoh gamsung mi somgup jong khopi-a konin akaidoh in ahi." 
Jeremiah52:26 Hitichun sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan'in amaho chu Babylon lengpa henga Riblah ah akaijin ahi. 
Jeremiah52:27 Chuin Babylon lengpan amaho chu ajepmin, Hamath gama Riblah mun'a athatgamtai. Hitobang chun Judah chu amatah gama konin sohchangin akaimangtan ahi." 
Jeremiah52:28 Hichehi Nebuchadnezzar'in sohchanga akaimangho chu ahi. Alengchan kum sagina chun Judah te sangthum le somni le thum ahiuve. 
Jeremiah52:29 Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kum somlegetna in Jerusalem'a konin mi jagetle somthumle ni akaimangin ahi. 
Jeremiah52:30 Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kum somni le thum lhinna in sepai lamkai Nebuzaradan'in Judah te jasagi le somli le nga akaimangin, abonun mi sangli le jagup ahiuve." 
Jeremiah52:31 Judah lengpa Jehoiachin sohchan kum somthumle sagi lhinna, lha somlenina, chuche lha nisomni le nga nin ahitin ahi, Evil-Merodach Babylon lengpa chu alengchan kum khatna chun, Judah lengpa Jehoiachin lu chu adomsangin, sohchan na-a konin apuidoh-in ahi." 
Jeremiah52:32 Ama chu lungset tah-in ahoupin, Babylon gamsunga alengchanpi ho laltouna vuma alaltouna adosangpeh penin," 
Jeremiah52:33 asohchanna vonho akhelpeh-in, ahinkho lhumkeijin amasangah changlhah anejom jingpehtan ahi." 
Jeremiah52:34 Chule aneh le chah dingin, Babylon lengpan tahsa phatnading anpha ape jingin; ahinkho lhumkei, athini geijin tanglouvin niseh-in apejing tan ahi." 
Lamentations1:1 I-ahungtile mipi dimsetna ana umna khopi chu thomhao tah-a hung uma hitam! I-atile amanu meithainu hung bangdoh-a hitam! namtin vaipi lah-a apipen chule gamkaiho lah-a leng chanu bang anahia chu i-ahungtile tu-a soh hungsoh-a hitam! 
Lamentations1:2 Amanu janteng hakan akapjin, abeng teni mitlhin achupjin, ama ngailuho lah jenga jong alhem lungmong ding khatcha aneijoupoi. Agolte jousen jong ama adoha bolun, amaho amanu melma asohgam taove." 
Lamentations1:3 Judah chu hesoh gentheina jehle, bolgentheina jeh-in gal hingin kaimangin aumtai. Amanu Pathen helouho lah-a achengin, olna himhim amujou tapoi. Amanu bolgim hon alungdon pettah in aman taove." 
Lamentations1:4 Zion lampiho chu alhasetai, ajehchu kut loupitah mang dingin koimacha ahung tapouvin; akotpi phung jouseu akamheltai. Athempuhou akhoisan, anungah thenghou athohgimun, chule amanu jong lung gimin aumtai." 
Lamentations1:5 Amanu kidoupiho apipu ahitaovin, amelmate ahung lolhing taovin ahi; ajehchu asuhkhel nao tampiho jeh-a Pakaiyin amanu asuhgenthei ahi. Achateho jong amelmateu masanga gal hingin achegam taove." 
Lamentations1:6 Zion chanu-a konin ahoinaho jouse achemang tai. Amanu pipuiho jong sakhigol lhatna mun mujoulou abangtauvin, chule amaho adelpao masanga thabeijin achetauve." 
Lamentations1:7 Amelmate khutna amite alhuh-a, koimachan akithopi lou phatnin, akisuh gentheina nikhole avangsetna nikhoho chun Jerusalem'in masanglaija akut nopsahnahou chu ahingeldoh-e; akidoupihon amanu amuvin, acholngah nikho hou anuisat bepmui." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem melse tah-in achonsen; hijeh-a chu amanu kiladoh-a ahi. Amanu anajabolho jousen i-asahtapoi, ajehchu amahon amanu sagohkeo ahina chu amudoh taove. Ahi, amanu akhoisasan chule akinunghei kit tai." 
Lamentations1:9 Amanu thenlounaho anih ho-a abeh-in; akhonung phat ding jong ageldoh poi. Hijeh chun kidang tah-in ama akemsuh-in, alhamonsah ding koimacha aneipoi. Vo Pakai, kahesoh gentheina hinven; ajehchu melma chu amale ama akiloupi sahtan ahi." 
Lamentations1:10 Akidoupipan amanu thilpha neiho jouse chunga akhut ahinlhang doh-e, ajehchu nangman namite houkhom ho lah-a luttheilou dinga nanathupeh Pathen heloute chu, amanu muntheng mun'a alutnu amanun amutai." 
Lamentations1:11 Amite jouse akhoisa gamtaovin, neh akiholuvin; amahon akihinso theina diuvin thilpha aneijouseu chu akijoh doh gamtaove. Vetan, vo Pakai, chule ngaiton, ajehchu keima thet umtah kahung hitai." 
Lamentations1:12 Khola vahle ho hiche mun hinjotpaho dinga hichehi imacha hilouva ham? Veuvin, chule heuvin, keima chunga gim gentheina hunglhung, Pakaiyin alunghan khaotah nikho-a eisuhgentheina tobang gim gentheina aum khapoi." 
Lamentations1:13 Chunga konin aman kaguho sunga mei ahinsol lutnin, hichun kaguho achansoh keijin ahi. Aman kakeng teni-a dingin len ajah-in, keima eikinung heisah kitnin ahi. Aman nilhumkeijin keima eilunglhah sah-in, chule eilhah lhopsah-e," 
Lamentations1:14 kasuhkhelna namkoljon chu aman akhut tah-in atuh-in; hicheho chu aman khivuija athilin kangongchanga ei-o pehtai. Aman katha alhahsamsah-in, Pakaiyin amaho khutna keima eipedoh-in, amaho-a konin keima kathoudoh jou tapoi." 
Lamentations1:15 Keima angsung tah-a kamihat ho chu Pakaiyin achotpha tai. Aman keima douna-a kagollhang ho suhmang nadin mipi akhomin ahi. Judah chanu nungah theng chu Pakaiyin lengpiga chilna bangin achiltai. 
Lamentations1:16 Hiche thilho jeh hin kakaptai; kamit ngeihi twijin along lhatai. Ajehchu kahinna kidosah kit thei ding lhamonsah chu keija konin gamlatah-a aumtan; galte ahattah jeh-un, kachate jong athomhaosoh taove." 
Lamentations1:17 Zion'in akhut teni ajahdoh-in, ahinla ama lhamonsah ding koimacha aumtapoi. Pakaiyin Jacob chungchanga chun akidoupiten aumkimvel diuvin thu anapen ahi. Amaho lah-a Jerusalem hi numei nihboh nei abang jengtai." 
Lamentations1:18 Pakai chu chonpha ahi, ajehchu keiman athupeh kanadouvin ahi. Ngaijun, katao ahi, mipite, chule kalung gimnahi veuvin, kanungah thengle gollhangho jong gal hingin akikai taove." 
Lamentations1:19 Keiman kangailut ho chu kakoujin, ahinla amahon eijoulhep taove. Kathempuhole ka-upahon khopi sunga ahinnao kidokitna dinga neh ahol nalam uvin alhagao alhagam taove." 
Lamentations1:20 Vo Pakai neihin ven; keima lung genthei jin kaumtai; kasung akithing tai, kalung sung akipei jengtai. Ajehchu keiman nasatah-in kanadouve, polama chemjamin mihem athatnin, insung jong thina in tobang jeng ahitai." 
Lamentations1:21 Amahon kakhoisat ajauvin, koimacha eilhamon ding aumpoi. Kamelmate jousen kalunggentheina ajasohkei juvin, nangman naboldoh na-a hin amaho akipah uve; nangman naphon dohsa nikho hinlhun sah-in natin, chutengle amaho keima tobang hung hitaovinte." 
Lamentations1:22 Amaho gitlouna jouse na-anga hunglhung hen; chule kasuhkhelna ho jouse jeh-a kachunga nabol bangin amaho chunga jong bolin, ajehchu kakhoisatna atame, chule kalung jong alha lhoptai." 
Lamentations2:1 Itobang tah-a Pakaiyin Zion chanu chu alunghana meiloma akhu khuma, chule Israel hoinaho chu van'a kona leisetna ahin lelhah-a, chule alunghanlai nikho-a akeng ngapna jeng jong ageldoh lou hitam!" 
Lamentations2:2 Pakaiyin Jacob chenna mun jouse aval lhumtai, chule khotona aneipoi, alunghana jeh-in aman Judah chanu kulpidet ho chu asonlhan, chule hicheho chu toltoh alhobehtai; aman agam sungle chuche sunga pipuiho jong asubohtai." 
Lamentations2:3 Aman tijat umtah alunghan na-in Israel ki jouse asubongin, amelmate maija konin akhut jetlam anung loidoh-in, chule akimvel dung meikong hattah bangin aman Jacob dounan mei akondoh sah-in ahi." 
Lamentations2:4 Aman melma khat bangin athal akamsalin, kidoupi khat bangin akhut jetlamin apangin, Zion chanu ponbuh sunga chun mitvetna hoijouse chu athatgamtai; aman alunghana chu mei bangin asunglhatan ahi." 
Lamentations2:5 Pakai chu melma bang ahin; aman Israel avallhum tan, aleng inho jouse jong aval lhumtai; aman amaho amundet jouseu jong asuhset peh-in, chule Judah chanu ka nale maona jong asupung cheh-in ahi." 
Lamentations2:6 Aman honlei khat bangin ahoubuh chu pumhatnin alamang tai. Aman mipi akikhopnao munho jong asuhsetpeh tai, Pakaiyin kut loupitah hole cholngah nikho jong Zion sunga suhmilin aumsahtai, chule alunghana nasatah jeh-in lengle thempu jong i-asah tapon ahi." 
Lamentations2:7 Pakaiyin amaicham apaidoh-in, amun theng jong akidahtai. Aman leng inpi bangho jong melma khutna alehdohtan ahi; hitichun kut loupitah kibol nikho bang helin amahon Pakai insunga chun husa asosah taovin ahi." 
Lamentations2:8 Pakaiyin Zion chanu kulbang suhset ding agongtai, Aman gamgi khat alhungdoh-in, akhut jong suhsetna lama konin akihsah tapon, hijeh chun aman kul vumle kulbangho chu lunghem na-in asemin amaho lhanguijin aumtaove." 
Lamentations2:9 Amanu kotpigolho leisetna alhalut tai, amanu thihlhonho chu asuhboh peh-in, asuhmangpeh-e. Alengpale apipuho chu chidang namdangte lah-a aumtaove. Dan thupeh jong aumtapoi, athemgaohon jong Pakaiya kona mu anei tapouve." 
Lamentations2:10 Zion chanu upate chu tolla atouvun, thipbeh-in aumtaove. Amahon alujang uvah leivui akinuvin, khaodip pon jengin akivon taove. Jerusalem nungah thenghon jong alu-u tolah asulutnun akuntaove." 
Lamentations2:11 Kamit lhi jeh-in kho kamuthei tapoi. Kasung akithingin, kamite chanuho kisuhmang jeh-in kalungthim jeng jong leiset chunga akisunglha tai. Chapanghole noichep laiho khopi lamlen ho-a anguilha gamtaovin ahi." 
Lamentations2:12 Khopi lamlen ho-a gala kisukhaho banga ahaisamuva, anuteo phei chunga ahinnao abuhlhah lhah laiju chun amahon anuteo jah-a, bule lengpitwi hoibaham? atiuve." 
Lamentations2:13 Vo Jerusalem chanu nangma hettohsahna dinga ipi thil kamana, katekah ding nahim? Vo nungah theng Zion chanu, ipitoh nakibange kati ding ham? Ajehchu nasetna twikhanglen banga len ahi, koijin damsah theijin natem?" 
Lamentations2:14 Nathemgao hon nang dingin pannabei le ngolhoi ngen namudoh peh uve. Chule amahon nasohchanna-a kona nakitoldoh theina dinga nakhanset naho amudoh dinghou chu amudoh pouvin, ahinla nangma dingin pohgih dihloule kikai mangna bou namudoh peh-un ahi." 
Lamentations2:15 Nahinjotpa jousen akhutnu nahin behkhumun, Jerusalem chanu chu anuisatnun, chule akhasuh-un, hiche khopihi hilouham, mihem ten hoina chamkimna, leiset pumpi kipana ahi atiu chu? atiuve." 
Lamentations2:16 Namelmate jouse nangma dounan akam kauvin, amaho a-eng hamun, aha-u agoijun, meihon amanu aval lhum jou taove, adihtah-in inanga jingu nikho chu hichehi ahitan, eihon ihol doh-un, imudoh taove, atiuve." 
Lamentations2:17 Pakaiyin agon chu atungdohtai. Aman masang laija athupeh chu asubulhing tai. Aman aseplhan akhotopoi. Chule aman nachunga namelma kipana asosahtai, aman nakidoupi te ki chu atungdohtan ahi." 
Lamentations2:18 Alungsungu Pakai henga apengin, Vo Zion chanu kulbang, sunle jan-in mitlhi lui bangin longhen, kicholdo hihbeh-in, namit lhi lon banghih hen, atiuve." 
Lamentations2:19 Thouvin janle pengdoh jengin: Jan phat ahung kipatle Pakai maija nalungsung twi bangin sunglhan lang, khopi lamlhah bul tina nachate chapang khangdongho gilkela lhasamho hinna dingin nakhut teni domsangin, ama lam chu sang jengin." 
Lamentations2:20 Vetan, vo Pakai, koi chunga hitobanghi nabol em, geltemin. Numei hon alaigilgau khap khat bep chapangho chu anehdiu hitam? Thempuho le themgaoho chu Pakai muntheng sunga kithattei ding hitaovem?" 
Lamentations2:21 Ateh akhang lamlen ho-a tolla alumtaove, nungah theng kanei hole gollhangho chemjamin alougam taove, nangman nalunghan niho-a amaho natha ahitai. Nangman nathatnin khotona naneitapon ahi." 
Lamentations2:22 Nangman nikho loupi ni-a bangin katijat naho nasam khomin, hitichun Pakai lunghanna nikhon koimacha ajamdoh theile aumden theija aumpoi. Keiman kahuiluma kavahdoh ho chu kamelma hon asumang heltai." 
Lamentations3:1 Alungsatna tenggola hesohna ana mu-a chu keima kahi. 
Lamentations3:2 Aman vah hilouvin, muthima keima eipuilutnin ahi." 
Lamentations3:3 Tahbeh-in aman keima eikidoupin, nilhum keijin kachunga akhut alamin ahi." 
Lamentations3:4 Aman kaphele kavun avoilhah sah-in, kaguho jong asubongtan ahi." 
Lamentations3:5 Aman kei dounan kul agenin, thoh hahsa nasatahle gimna-in eiumkhum tan ahi." 
Lamentations3:6 Aman khanglui laipeh-a anathisaho bangin, munthim lah-a eiumsah-in ahi." 
Lamentations3:7 Aman keima tho eikai khumin, kapot thei tapoi. Aman kakihenna thihkhao agihsah-e." 
Lamentations3:8 Keima kapma kepen teng jongle aman kataona akhahchah jitai. 
Lamentations3:9 Aman song kikheng ho-a ka lampiho akhah-in, kalampiho akonsah gam ahitai." 
Lamentations3:10 Ama chu keidin vompile keipi bahkai muthim laija um abange. 
Lamentations3:11 Aman kalampiho ahei mangin, chule eimaltel jengin; aman kamhellin eisotai." 
Lamentations3:12 Aman athal akamsalin, thalchang chuhna ding lama keima eikoitai." 
Lamentations3:13 Aman alivatheija thalchang ho chu kalung changa chudin akaplutsoh tai. 
Lamentations3:14 Keima kamite jouse henga totnopna bep kahitan, chule nilhum keija alasah-u kahitai." 
Lamentations3:15 Aman keima thil akhatna kha-in eidipmin, chule gamsai twijin eivahkham tai." 
Lamentations3:16 Aman songbong hemho mangcha-in kahaho eisuhboh peh-in, vutvaijin eivuhkhum tai." 
Lamentations3:17 Chule chamna-a konin kahina gamla tah-in nachon mangin, phattheina jong kasumiltai." 
Lamentations3:18 Keiman Pakaiya konin kathahat nale kakinep naho amang heltai, kati." 
Lamentations3:19 Kahesoh nale gentheina chule kathohgimna, gamsaile gil kha chu kagel doh-in ahi." 
Lamentations3:20 Kahin nahin hicheho chu ageldoh-in, chule keima suhnemin kaumin ahi." 
Lamentations3:21 Hichehi kalungin kagah gelin, keiman hichea chun kinepna kaneitai." 
Lamentations3:22 Pakai khoto them naho jala bou suhgama umlou ihiuve, ajehchu amihepina chu alhasam ngaipoi." 
Lamentations3:23 Hicheho chu jingkah seh-in athah jingin, nakitahna chu alenin ahi." 
Lamentations3:24 Kachan ding chu Pakai ahi, hijeh-a chu ama-a kakinep ding ahi, tin kahinna hin aseije." 
Lamentations3:25 Pakai chu ama ngahjing tele, ama holjing mite dingin aphan ahi." 
Lamentations3:26 Mihem khat dinga Pakai mi huhhingna chu kinema thipbeh-a nga chu thilpha ahi. 
Lamentations3:27 Mihem dingin akhandon laija namkoljon poh hi aphan ahi. 
Lamentations3:28 Ama achang seh-in thipbeh-in atouve, ajehchu aman hichu achunga apoh ahi." 
Lamentations3:29 Kinepna-a aumtheina dingin, aman leivui lah-a akam asulutnin ahi." 
Lamentations3:30 Aman adengpa chu abengphe adopeh-in; housetna-a jong adimin ahi. 
Lamentations3:31 Ajehchu Pakaiyin a-imatih-a apaidoh louhel ding ahi. 
Lamentations3:32 Amavang aman sugim jengjongle, amihepi themna tamtah jala chu hepina anei ding ahi." 
Lamentations3:33 Ajehchu aman, mihem chate chu aphat sah jeh-a asuhgentheija, ahiloule asuhgimji ahipoi." 
Lamentations3:34 Leisetna sohchangho chu akengtoa chil goija umding ahiuvin," 
Lamentations3:35 Chungnung pen masang tah-a mihem khat thaneina lahdohna dinga," 
Lamentations3:36 Mihem khat ama hina noisehi, Pakaiyin pha asapon ahi." 
Lamentations3:37 Pakai jin thu apeh louleh, athusei lhunsah theija chu koiham?" 
Lamentations3:38 Asele apha hungdoh nahi chungnung pen kama kon hilou ham? 
Lamentations3:39 Mihem khatnin achonset jeh-a talen amat chu, mihing khatnin ipi dinga aphunpi ham?" 
Lamentations3:40 Eihon ilampihou kiholu hitin, chule kipatepmu hitin Pakai lama kihei kitnu hite." 
Lamentations3:41 Eihon ilungsung houle ikhut houvin van ho-a um Pathen lam sangu hite. 
Lamentations3:42 Keihon kana sukhelun, chule kanadoutaove, nangman neingaidam tapouve." 
Lamentations3:43 Nangma lunghan na-in nakikhu-in, chule neisugimun ahi. Nangman nathatnin, khotona naneipoi." 
Lamentations3:44 Nangman kataona hou ahunglutpai thei louna din nangle nang meilom'in nakitomin ahi. 
Lamentations3:45 Nangman miho lah-a keiho deiloule bohnen bangin neisem taove," 
Lamentations3:46 Kamel mate jouseu keiho dounan akam kataovin ahi. 
Lamentations3:47 Tijat nale thangkol chule suhgamna le kachunguva kamhelna chu ahung lhungtai. 
Lamentations3:48 Kamipite chanu kisuh gamna jeh-in kamitlhi luijin along jenge. 
Lamentations3:49 Kamitlhi apulin, tanglou helin alongdoh doh jenge," 
Lamentations3:50 Pakaiyin van'a kona ahin suhvetna ahinmu kahsen," 
Lamentations3:51 Kakhopi sunga chanute jouse jeh-in kamitnin kalung atong khatan ahi. 
Lamentations3:52 Kamelma ten ajeh beijin vacha bangin nasatah-in eidel lele jeng taove. 
Lamentations3:53 Amahon leinoi kotong sunga kahinkho asumangun, chule kachung song khatnin adelphaove." 
Lamentations3:54 Twiho kalu chunga alongin, hichun keiman amangthah-a kahitai, kati." 
Lamentations3:55 Vo Pakai leinoi kotong thuhtah-a konin keiman namin kahinsamin ahi. 
Lamentations3:56 Nangman ka awgin najai, kakana le kahai ginna konin nanakhang heimang hih-in." 
Lamentations3:57 Keiman nangma kahinhou nikhon nahung naijin: kicha hih-in, neitin ahi." 
Lamentations3:58 Vo Pakai, kalung sunga thil umho neisei hun, nangman kahinkho neilhatdoh pehtai." 
Lamentations3:59 Vo Pakai, nangin kathemmona namutai, kathu neitan peh-in." 
Lamentations3:60 Nangman kei douna-a alunggel houle aphulahnao jouse namutan ahi. 
Lamentations3:61 Vo Pakai, amahon eihouset naole eidehnaova alunggelu nangman najatai." 
Lamentations3:62 Keima douna-a hung kipandoh ho muhle, nilhum keija keima dehna-a agonu abonchan nangman najasoh tai." 
Lamentations3:63 Amaho toulhahle kipatdoh khu vetan, alasah-u jong keima jontai nabep ahitai." 
Lamentations3:64 Vo Pakai, akhutnuva athilbolu dungjuijin amaho lethuhna pen." 
Lamentations3:65 Nangin amaho nasapsetna le lungthim natna chu pen. 
Lamentations3:66 Pakai vanho noija konin lunghanna in amaho bolgimin lang sumangin. 
Lamentations4:1 I-atile sana mol lha-a hitam! I-atile sana thengtah kikhel jenga hitam! Munthenga songho chu lamlhah tin chenga akisunglha tai. 
Lamentations4:2 Manlutah Zion chapate chu sana thengtah toh tethei ahin, i-atile amaho beldengpan leibel aden bangbepma umu hitam!" 
Lamentations4:3 Twi saiho jengin jong anoi adon, anoute avah-in ahi. Kamite chanuho hi gamthipma vacha lengho bangin alungselun ahi." 
Lamentations4:4 Noi cheplai naosen lei chu dang chah-in adanga abehden tai. Chapang khangdong laihon an athumun ahinla koiman apepouve. 
Lamentations4:5 Annem ne-a hung kivahho chu khopi lamlen ho-a amahthah gamtaovin; ponsanthip silla hung kivahdohho chun eh kisungvum adeijuve. 
Lamentations4:6 Ajehchu kamite chanute khangitlouna talen chu mitphet kah louva kisumang Sodom chonsetna talen sangin alenjoi, chule amanu chunga chun koimacha khut achupoi." 
Lamentations4:7 Amanu Nazire mi hina chu buhbang sangin atheng jon, bongnoi sangin abang jon, avouso chu songmantam sangin ahoijon, ahoidan chu Saphir song tobang ahi." 
Lamentations4:8 Amaho mel chu meihol sangin avom jotan, lamlen ho-ah amaho hetphah-in aumtapouve. Avunhou chu aguhouva abeh-in, molkangto abang jengtai." 
Lamentations4:9 Chemjam'a kithat ho chu kela thiding hosangin aphajotai. Ajehchu hichehohi lou gasoh ngaichatnan anguijin amangthah jitauve. 
Lamentations4:10 Khotona nei numei ho khut chun achateu achul chulun, kamite kisuh mangna-a chun amaho chu a-an uvin apang taovin ahi." 
Lamentations4:11 Pakaiyin alungsatna chu amolso tan; aman alunghana nasatah chu ahin bunglhatai, chule Zion'a mei akongdoh tai, chule hichun thil bulho chu asumangtan ahi." 
Lamentations4:12 Leisetna lenghole vannoi'a chengho jousen, akidoupi amelmau chu Jerusalem kotpiho sunga alut jou taove ti anaginchat louhel dingu ahi." 
Lamentations4:13 Ajehchu amanu lailung tah-a chu themgaoho chonsetna le thempuho khangitlou jeh-a chondihho thisan kiso-a ahi. 
Lamentations4:14 Amaho mitcho ho bangin khopi lamlen ho-a avah leuvin, mihon avonhou atohkhah nomlouna diuvin thisanin akisuboh-un ahi." 
Lamentations4:15 Amahon ajah uva, nangho chemangun, potdoh-un, potdoh-un, hiche hi tongkha hih-un, athengpoi tin asamui, amaho ajam manguva avalele phatnun, amahon Pathen heloute lah-a, amaho chua chun chele tapouvinte tin aseijuve." 
Lamentations4:16 Pakai lunghanna chun amaho asukhentan, aman amaho khohsah kit taponte, amahon thempuho ajabol tapouvin, chule upaho jong angaisah tapouvin ahi." 
Lamentations4:17 Eiho dingin vang, kithopi pannabei ivetna lamun imitnu athontai, ivetvet naovahin eihuhdoh jou louvu nam khat ivedoh taove." 
Lamentations4:18 Amahon ikalson nao ahindel peh-un, ikhopi lamlen hou ijot thei tapouve, ikichainao anaijin, inikhohou alhingin, ajehchu ikichainao chu ahung lhungtai." 
Lamentations4:19 Eiho eisugenthei hou chu van'a mulaopi ho sangin agang jouvin, amahon lhangsang ho chunga eidelun, amahon gamthipma eiho eichang lhiuve." 
Lamentations4:20 In'ah homuva hu, Pakai thaonu, eihon ama lim noija Pathen heloute lah-a chenginge itiu chu, amahon akokhuh sunguva eikoi taove." 
Lamentations4:21 Uz gama chenga, vo Edom chanu kipah-in lang thanomin; khon jong chun nangma nahinphah ding ahi. Nangma nakham ngoldel ding; ahi, chule nangle nang sagohkeo nakiso ding ahi." 
Lamentations4:22 Vo Zion chanu, nakhangitlouna talen namu chu akimolso tai. Aman nangma gal hingin nakai kit taponte, aman nakhangit louna jeh-a gotna napehding ahin, Vo Edom chanu, aman nachonset naho ahung mudoh ding ahi." 
Lamentations5:1 Hingel doh-in, vo Pakai, kachunguva ipi hung lhunga hitam, ngaiton, chule ven keiho kiphosalnahi." 
Lamentations5:2 Kagouhou le kainhou hetlou mite hengle gamdang miho heng lama akiheitai. 
Lamentations5:3 Keiho naochaga le paneilou kahitaove, kanuteu jong meithaiho abang taove." 
Lamentations5:4 Katwihou man neijin kadonun; kathinghou keiho henga akijoh-in ahi. 
Lamentations5:5 Kangonghou suhgentheina noija aumtan; katong gimun olna himhim kanei tapouve. 
Lamentations5:6 Keihon neh le chah lonan kakhutnu Egypt mite leh Assyria mite henga kapetaove. 
Lamentations5:7 Kapateu anachonseuvin, tun aum tapouve, chule keihon amaho khangitlouna kapouvin ahi." 
Lamentations5:8 Soh hon kachunguva vai ahomun, amaho khutna kona eihuhdoh uva koimacha aumpoi." 
Lamentations5:9 Gamthipma chemjam jeh-in thina geijin neh kakilouvin ahi. 
Lamentations5:10 Kel hoisetah jeh-in kavunu jong lungthu bangin avom jeng tai. 
Lamentations5:11 Amahon Zion'a numei ho le Judah khopiho-a nungah ho asuseuvin ahi. 
Lamentations5:12 Leng chapate akhutnun akikhaisangin; upaho mai jong jana akipepoi. 
Lamentations5:13 Amahon gollhangho sumhei hehdin apuijun, chule chapangho thing noija alhugam taove." 
Lamentations5:14 Kotpi phunga kon upaho, chule tumging theija konin gollhangho abangtauve." 
Lamentations5:15 Kalung sunguva kipana abangtai, kalamnao jong lunghemna asohtai." 
Lamentations5:16 Kalu uva konin lallukhuh alhatai; kanachonset jehu'n, Ohe ada kahiuve!" 
Lamentations5:17 Hichejeh hin kalungu alhamang tan; ajehchu hicheho jeh-a kamit hou thima ahitai. 
Lamentations5:18 Zion molsang kamhela aumtah jeh-in, sial ho achunga avahleuvin ahi." 
Lamentations5:19 Vo Pakai, nangma a-imatih chana umjing nahi, nalaltouna chu akhang akhanga umjinga ahi." 
Lamentations5:20 Chutia chu nangman keiho imatih chana dinga neisuhmilu hija, chule hitihchan pihi neidalhah-u hitam?" 
Lamentations5:21 Vo Pakai, naheng lama keiho neiheijun, chutile hung kihei taovinge, malaija bangin kanikho hou neisemthah peh-un." 
Lamentations5:22 Ahinla nangman keiho neipaimang hel taovin; keiho dounan kachunguva nalung ahanglhehtan ahi. 
Ezekiel1:1 Tun ahung hitin ahi, kum somthum lhinkum, lhali channa ani nga channin, sohchangho lah-a Chebar vadunglen panga kaumpet tah-in, vanho anakihongin chule keiman Pathen'a kon thilmuho kanamun ahi." 
Ezekiel1:2 Chuche lhasung ninga channi, leng Jehoiachin sohchan kal akum nga channa-in," 
Ezekiel1:3 Pakai thu chu kilangtah-in, Buzi chapa Ezekiel thempu henga, Chaldea miho gamsung Chebar vadunglen panga ahung lhungin, Pakai khut chu ama chunga ahung kingame." 
Ezekiel1:4 Chuin keiman kagahvetle, veuvin chimpei khat sahlama konin ahungdoh-in, meilom lentah khat achama vahjeng, akimvel vah pempum, chuche lailunga meilah-a kon chun a-eng dum banga vahjeng aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:5 Hicheho lailung tah-a kon chun ganhing toh kiloutah li ahungdoh-in, chule hichehi amaho melputdan chu ahi; amaho chun mihem melput tobang apuvin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:6 Chule khatcheh-in mai li aneijuvin, chule khatcheh-in lhaving li aneijuve." 
Ezekiel1:7 Chule amaho keng khophang chu ajangpetnin, akeng khophang hou chu bongnou keng khophang tobang ahin; chule hicheho chu sum-eng kinotval bangin avalsetnin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:8 Chule amahon apang li uva alhaving hou noija chun mihem khut tobang aneicheh uvin; chule amaho li chun mai le lhaving aneicheh uve. 
Ezekiel1:9 Alhaving hou chu khatle khat akisumat cheh-in, amaho chu ache tengule kiheile louvin, abonchauvin jang petnin angat nalang uva ache jiuve." 
Ezekiel1:10 Amaho li maiso melput dan chu, mihem maiso apucheh uvin, chule ajetlam panguva keipi bahkai maiso apu uvin; aveilam panguva bongchal maiso apu uvin; chule ali uvin mulaopi maiso jong apucheh uve." 
Ezekiel1:11 Amaho maiso chu hitobang hi ahin, alhavinghou chu chunglam ngan akijal touvin, lhaving ni chu khatle khat akisumatnin, chule ni chun amaho tahsapum akhu khume." 
Ezekiel1:12 Chule amaho abonchauvin jangpetnin malama acheuvin, lhagao chena ding lam lama chun amaho acheuve; chule amaho ache tengule akiheile pouve." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ganhingho chu hitobang ahiuve, alimso dan chu song meihol kou lenglung abangin, chule thaomei vah jong abange. Hiche thaomei vah chu ganhingho lah-a achesuh achetouvin; chule meikou chu avahsetnin, meikouva kon chun kolphe asohdoh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel1:14 Chule ganhingho chu kolphe vah bangin alhaijun, chule ahung kileuve." 
Ezekiel1:15 Tun keiman ganhingho kavet petchun, veuvin leiset chunga um mai li nei ganhingho kom cheh-a chun, kangtalai kang khat cheh ahung ume." 
Ezekiel1:16 Hiche kangtalai kangho lim umdan le akisemdan chu khisong engdum abangin; chule amaho li hin kibahna khat aneijuve. Amaho limdan le amaho kisemdan chu, kangtalai kang lailung tah-a kangtalai kang um abange." 
Ezekiel1:17 Amaho ache tengule, apangli uvah acheuvin; amaho ache tengule akiheile pouve." 
Ezekiel1:18 Kangtalai kang kikol ho chu ahile, amaho chu asang behseh un tijatjat aum jengin; chule amaho li kimvela hiche kangtalai kang kol ho-a chun mit adimset jengin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:19 Chule ganhingho chu ache tengule Kangtalai kang ho chun ajuijin, chule ganhingho chu leisetna kona dopsanga aumtengle, kangtalai kang hojong dopsangin aum jiuve." 
Ezekiel1:20 Hoilam hile lhagao chenom nalam lama amaho acheuve; ajehchu chulam chu amaho lhagao chena ding chu ahin; chule amaho chutoh kangtalai kang chu dopsangin aume. Ijeh inem itile ganhingho lhagao chu kangtalai kang ho-a chu uma ahi. 
Ezekiel1:21 Chucheho acheteng, hicheho acheuvin; chule chucheho adinteng, hicheho adinguvin; chule leisetna kona dopsanga aumteng, kangtalai kang ho chu amahotoh dopsangin aumuvin ahi. Ijeh inem itile ganhingho lhagao chu kangtalai kang ho-a chu uma ahi." 
Ezekiel1:22 Chule ganhingho luchunga vanthamjol banga umchu songval abangin, hichu alu chunguva akikhang jengin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:23 Chule hiche vanthamjol noija chun alhavinghou jangpetnin khatle khat akingat to uvin, atahsao pang khatlam chu lhaving nin akhu khumin, atahsao langkhat lampang chu lhaving ni ma-in akhu khumin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:24 Chule amaho ache tengule, alhavinghou hugin chu twipiho gin tobang, Hatchung nungpen awgin tobang, thukisei awgin tobangle, janel ho husa gin tobangin kajan ahi. Amaho adin tengule alhavinghou chu amahon akoilha jiuvin ahin." 
Ezekiel1:25 Chule amaho adinuva, alhavinghou atimlhah tengule, alu vumuva um vantham jola kon chun awgin khat ahung gingdoh jin ahi." 
Ezekiel1:26 Chule alu vumuva vanthamjol um chunga chun laltouna tobang khat aumin, khisong dumjet to abangin; chule hiche laltouna tobang chunga chun mihem tobang khat aume." 
Ezekiel1:27 Chule keiman akong chunglamse chu a-engdum tobang, asung akimvelse chu meikou bang jengin kamun; chule akonga pat anoilamse chu meikou tobang, akimvelse vah lenglung bangin kamun ahi." 
Ezekiel1:28 Gojuh nikho-a meilhang lah-a lhagui lim kimu bang khun, akimvel chu avahpempum jengin ahi. Hiche chu Pakai loupi limso kilang chu ahi. Chuin hichu kamu phatnin, tolla kamai kasulut jengin, chule thu kisei awgin khat kajatan ahi." 
Ezekiel2:1 Chuin aman kajah-a, Mihem chapa, nakengin dingdoh-in, chule keiman nahenga thu kasei ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel2:2 Aman kahenga thu asei phatnin lhagao chu kasunga ahung lutnin, chuin kahenga athusei chu kajah theina din, kakengin eidinsah-e." 
Ezekiel2:3 Chule aman kajah-a, Mihem chapa keima douna-a kiphinjing, thungailou Israel chate henga kasol nahi. Amahole apu apateuvin keima dounan tunikho geijin chonset abol jingun ahi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ajehchu amahohi jumle jalam helou lungtah chate ahiuve. Keiman nangma kasol nahin, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, tia amaho naseipeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel2:5 Chule amahohin, ngaiju henlang ngaihih tajongleu, (ajehchu amahohi kiphin nom insung ahiuvin,) amaho lah-a themgao khat anaum nalaije ti ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel2:6 Chule nangma mihem chapa, amaho chu kicha hih-in, athuseiju jong kicha hih-in; ling le khaovin nabom henlang, aipi lah-a cheng hijongle chun; amaho thungailou insung hijongleu, athuseijun kicha hih-in, chule amit vetnun jong lungthoi hih-in." 
Ezekiel2:7 Chule amahon ngaijuhen, ahiloule ngaihih jongleu, keima thuhi ahenguva naseitei ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itile amahohi mikiphin nomte mong ahiuve." 
Ezekiel2:8 Ahin nangma mihem chapa, keiman nahenga kaseihi ngaijin; nangma chutobang thungailou insung bangin, thungailouvin umhih beh-in. Nakam hinkan, chule keiman kapehhi nen, ati." 
Ezekiel2:9 Hichun keiman kagahven ahile, veuvin, kahenga khut khat ahung kilhang doh-in, chule ven, hiche sunga chun lekhabu jol khat aume." 
Ezekiel2:10 Chuin aman hichu ka anga apha jal-in ahi, hichu asungle apoa kisun ahi. Hiche sunga chun kana le lunghemna chule dana thu akisune." 
Ezekiel3:1 Chukal valin aman kahenga, Mihem chapa, namu chu nejengin; hiche lekhajol hi nen, chule chenlang Israel insung henga thu gaseijin, ati." 
Ezekiel3:2 Hitichun keiman kakam kakan, chule aman chuche lekhajol chu einehsah tai." 
Ezekiel3:3 Chuin aman kahenga, Mihem chapa na oisunga lutsah-in, chule keiman kapeh hiche lekhajol hin nasung dimsah in, tin aseije. Hichun keiman kanen ahile, kakam sunga khoiju lhumin alhumin ahi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Chuin aman kahenga aseije, Mihem chapa, chen, Israel insung henga gachen, chule keima thuho hi amaho henga gaseijin." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ajehchu gamdang paole pao hahsa mite henga kisol nahipon, ahinla Israel insung heng joh-a nangma kisola nahibouve." 
Ezekiel3:6 Ajehchu hetkhahlou paole ham tho nam mite leh pao hahsa nam mite henga kisola nahipoi. Tahbeh-in, amaho henga chun keiman nangma anasol leng, amaho chun nangma thu anangai diu ahi." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ahinla Israel insungin vang nangma thu angailou dingu ahi; ajehchu amahon keima thusei jong angailou dingu ahi. Ijeh-inem itile Israel insung pumpihi jachat helou ahiuve. 
Ezekiel3:8 Ven, keiman amaho maitoh kitatto dinga namai kasuhtah-a, chule amaho chalpang toh kitatto dinga nachalpang kasuhtah ahitai." 
Ezekiel3:9 Keiman meituh song sanga tahjo thiltah bangin nachalpang kasempehtai. Amaho ginghih beh-in, amaho thungailou insung khat hijeng jongleu, amelput aumdanhou jeh-in nangma lunglhalou jenin, ati." 
Ezekiel3:10 Chukal valin, aman kahenga hitin asei kitnin, Mihem chapa, keiman nahenga kahinsei ding kathuho abonchan nalung sunga kisan lutnin lang, nanakhangin ngaijin." 
Ezekiel3:11 Chule chen, sohchanga um namite le achateu henga nangma galutnin lang, amahon ngaijuhen lang ngaihih jongleu, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, tin amaho henga gaseijin lang gahilin, tin aseije." 
Ezekiel3:12 Chuin lhagaovin eilatouvin, kanung lama chun aw sangtah-a kisei thu khat kajan, hiche aw chun, Amun thenga Pakai loupi chu vahchoijin umhen, ati." 
Ezekiel3:13 Chujongle keiman ganhing ho lhavingho khatle khat akitoh khahto ginle, amaho koma um kangtalai kang ho kitol nasatah gin kajan ahi." 
Ezekiel3:14 Hiti chun lhagaovin keima eilatoutan, chule eipui mangtan, chuin lung nommo tahle ka lhagao lunggim tah-in kachetai; ahivangin kachunga Pakai khut chu ahatnin ahi." 
Ezekiel3:15 Chujouvin keiman Chebar vadunglen panga cheng, Tel-abib'a sohchanga umho heng kalhungtan, chule keima amaho touna-a katouvin, kidang satah in amaho lah-a ni sagi kaumin ahi." 
Ezekiel3:16 Chuin ni sagi kichainin ahitin ahi, hitichun Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin," 
Ezekiel3:17 Mihem chapa, keiman nangma Israel insung dinga avesui diuva kasem nahitai. Hijeh chun keima kamsunga kon thupot ngaijin, chule keima-a konin amaho gihsalin, ati." 
Ezekiel3:18 Keiman mi khang gilou henga, nangma thonlouva nathi teiding ahi kati-a; nangman ama chu gihna pelouva, ahiloule agilou chu agitlouna lampiho-a kona ahinkho akihuhdohna dinga thu imacha ama gihna-a naseipeh loule; chutobang agiloupa chu akhansetna-a chu thitei ding ahin; amavang ama thisan chu keiman nangma khutna kahin ngeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel3:19 Nangman agiloupa chu nanagih nah-a, ama agitlouna-a konle agitlouna lampia kona akiheidoh loule, akhansetna-a chu thitei ding ahin; amavang nangman nahinna nakihuh doh ahi." 
Ezekiel3:20 Chukitle, michonpha chu, achonphatna-a kona kihei manga, gitlouna abolteng, keiman amasanga kipal lhuhna kakoija, ama thitei ding ahi; ajehchu nangman gihsalna nanapeh loujeh-a achonsetna-a thiding, chule achonphatna thilbolho chu kigeldoh lou ding ahitai; amavang ama thisan chu keiman nangma khutna kangeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel3:21 Hijeng jongle, nangman michonpha chu gihna napeh-a, chonphan chonset abolji poi nati-a, chonset bol louva aumle, thonlouva hingtei ding ahi; ajehchu ama chun kigihna asangin; nangman jong nahinna nakihuh doh ahi." 
Ezekiel3:22 Chukoma chun Pakai khut chu kachunga akingamin, chule aman kahenga, thoudoh inlang phaichama khun gachen, chule chukoma chu keiman nangma kakihoupi ding nahi, ati." 
Ezekiel3:23 Chuin kakipatdoh-in, phaichama chun kachetai. Chuin veuvin, Chebar vadunglen panga kanamu loupina, Pakai loupina chu anadingin ahi. Hichun keiman tolla kamai kasulut tai." 
Ezekiel3:24 Hichun lhagao chu kasunga ahung lutnin, kakengin eidin sah-in, chule keima eikihoupin, kajah-a, Chen, na insunga gaum chahbeh-in, ati." 
Ezekiel3:25 Hijongle Vo nangma mihem chapan, vetan, amahon nachunga khaohol ho ahinkoi diu, hicheho-a chu nakandiu ahin, chule amaho lah-a nagache dohle louding ahi." 
Ezekiel3:26 Chule keiman napaomona dingle amaho dinga aphohsalpao nahilouna dinga, nalei chu nadanga kabesah ding ahi. Ajehchu amaho thungailou insung ahiuve." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ahinla nahenga thu kasei tengle, keiman nakam kahona, chule nangman amaho henga, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, tia nagasei ding; angainom pan angaiding, chule angainomlou pan angaida ding ahi. Ajehchu amahohi thungailou insung ahiuve." 
Ezekiel4:1 Mihem chapa, nangman leingan kigoutah khat lanlang, hichu namasanga koijin, chule hiche chunga chun khopi lim, Jerusalem lim chu semin." 
Ezekiel4:2 Chule hichu galmiho umkimvel sah inlang, hiche khopi dounan kulbang sah khumin, chule adounan molsang khat tundoh khumin lang, gebuh jong sah khumin, chule akimvela chun kulbang suhsetna manchah ho tung doh-in." 
Ezekiel4:3 Chukal valin nangman thihpheng tupeh khat lanlang, hichu nangmale hiche khopi kah-a chun thihbang kidal bangin dalin; chule hiche lam chu mai ngatnin, chule hichu ki-um kimvel ding, nangman naum kimvel ding ahi. Hichehi Israel insung dinga melchihna hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:4 Naveilam pang delphan lumin, chule hiche chunga chun Israel insung khangitlouna ho chu koijin; chutobanga hiche chunga nalup nikho jat dungjuija chu nangman amaho khan gitlouna chu napohpeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ajehchu anikho jat dungjuija ni jathum le somko, keiman nachunga akhansetnao kumho chu kakoi ahitai. Hitia hi nangman Israel insung khan gitlouna chu napoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:6 Chule nangman hiho chu nasuhbulhit tengle, nangma najetlam panga nalup kitna, chule Judah insung khan gitlouna chu nisomli napoh ding ahi. Keiman nangma dinga nikhat chu kum khatna kasimpeh nahi." 
Ezekiel4:7 Hijeh-a chu nangman Jerusalem ki-um kimvel lam chu namai ngat ding, chule naban chu nahodoh-a, hiche khopi douna-a chu gaothu naseiding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:8 Chule ven, keiman khaohol ho-a kakanna, chule naki-um kimvelna nikhoho nasuhbei kahse-a, nangma langkhatna kona langkhatna kihei theilouva naum ding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:9 Chujongle nangman, suhlouchang le sakolchang, chule bepi le bepal, chule butun le lengmusel lan lang umbel khatna koijin, chule hicheho-a kon chun nasih-a nalup ding nikhoho dungjuijin changlhah kisemin, hichu nikho jathum le somko sunga chu nangman naneh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:10 Chule nangman nikhatna nanehding anchu agihdan shekel somni hiding; chule aphat phatna hichu naneh ding ahi. 
Ezekiel4:11 Nangman twi jong teptena neija nadon ding, hin dimkhat hopgupma kihom hopkhat hiding; hichu aphat phatna nadon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Chule nangman amaho mitmu dinga mihem'a kona hungdoh eh chu changlhah-a nakana, hichu sakol changa kisem changlhah banga naneh ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel4:13 Chuin Pakaiyin aseije, Hitobanga chu Israel chaten, keiman amaho kanodohna chidang namdangho lah-a chu suhbohsa changlhahho aneh dingu ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel4:14 Hichun keiman, Pakai Pathen, vetan, kahinna suhboh-in ana um khapoi; ijeh inem itile kakhang dona pat tuchan geijin athikam, ahiloule akimaltelsa kiti kanehih laije; kakam sunga jong thet um saphe alutkha hih laijin ahi, tin kaseitai." 
Ezekiel4:15 Chuin aman kahenga aseijin, Ven, mihem eh khelin bong eh kape-e, nangman hichea chu changlhah nakisem ding ahi." 
Ezekiel4:16 Chukalvalin aman kahenga aseijin, Mihem chapa, vetan, keiman Jerusalem'a changlhah hung kipohlutna bul chu kasuhtan ding; chule amahon changlhah agih-a ateova chule itcha tah-a aneh dingu; chule amahon twi jong teptena neija chule kidang satah-a adon dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel4:17 Chutia chu amahon changlhah le twi ahin ngaichat uva, chule khatle khat kidatmoto diu, akhan gitlounao jeh-a mangthah diu ahi." 
Ezekiel5:1 Chule nangma, mihem chapa, chemcha hemthet khat kilah-in, samvoupa samchem kilah-in, chule hichun naluchang le nakhamul vouvin; chuteng atenadin khaikot lanlang, sam chu homkhenin." 
Ezekiel5:2 Khopi akiumna nikhoho chu alhin tengle, hop thuma hopkhat chu khopi lailung tah-a meija nahal ding; chule hopthum-a hopkhat nalah-a, hichu chemcha khatna nasat bong ding; chule hopthum-a hopkhat chu hui lah-a nathejal ding; chule anungu chemjam'a kajui ding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:3 Nangman hicheho lah-a kona chu phabep khat nalah-a, chule hicheho chu naponsil monga nakhi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:4 Chuteng nangman hicheho chu nalahkit ding, chule hicheho chu meikong lailung tah-a naselutna, chule hicheho chu meisunga nahalvam ding ahi, ajehchu hichea kona chu meikou khat hungdoh-a, Israel insung pumpi sunga lutding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:5 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Hichehi Jerusalem ahi; Keiman amanu hi akimvela um namho le gamho lailung tah-a katundoh ahi." 
Ezekiel5:6 Chule amanun namdangho sangin kathutana hi gitlounan asodoh-in, chule akimvela um gamho sangin kadan kisunho chu gitlounan aha sodoh-in ahi. Ajehchu amahon kathutana hole kadan kisunho alapouvin, hicheho chu ajuipouvin ahi." 
Ezekiel5:7 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, nangho nakimvel uva um namtin ho sanga napunjoh jeh-ule, kadan kisunho jong najui tahlou jeh-un; chule kathutanho jong nanit tahlou jeh-ule, nakimvel uva um namtin ho thutan ho dungjuija jong na natoh tahlou jeh-un;" 
Ezekiel5:8 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Ven, keima, keimatah ngeijong nangho douva pang kahitan, chule namtinho mitmu chang tah-a nalah uva thutanna kalhut ding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:9 Chule keiman kanabol khahlou, chule atobang jong avela kabolkit louding chu, thet umtah nathilbol hou jeh-a nachung uva kabolding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:10 Hijeh-a chu nalah uva paten chapate ahin neh uva, chule chapaten apateu ahin neh dingu; chule keiman nachunga thutanna kalhunsah ding, chule nalah uva ahingdoh amoh chengse chu abonchauva hui lah-a kathecheh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:11 Hijeh chun, Pakai Pathen'in, keima hing jingjeng kahito lhonin, nangman kamun theng chu ningset umtahle, thilbohho jouse-a nasuhboh tah jeh-a, thonlouva keiman jong nangma ka kemsuh sah ding; kamitnin jong khen aneideh lou ding, khotona kiti imacha jong kaneilou ding ahitai." 
Ezekiel5:12 Nangma-a hopthum-a hopkhat chu hise-a thidingu, chule nalah tah-a amaho chu kella suhmanga umdiu; chule hopthum-a hopkhat chu nakimvela chemjam'a lou dingu; chule hopthum-a hopkhat chu keiman huija kathecheh ding, chule chemjam'a kanungdel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:13 Chutia chu kalunghana chu kasuh bulhitna, kalungsatna achunguva chuding, chuteng kalungmon ding ahi, chutia chu kalungsatna achunguva kabulhit teng, Pakai kitipa keiman katom panna-a hichehi kasei ahi ahetdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel5:14 Chukalvala keiman nakimvela um namho lah le achele jouse mitmu-a, khopi chimsa le noise umtah-a kasemdoh ding nahi." 
Ezekiel5:15 Keiman lunghanna le lungsat na-a, chule lungsa tah-a phona-a nachunga thutanna kahinnei tengle, nakimvela um namtin ho dinga noise umtah le isahlou, kihilna le datmo um nahiding ahi. Keima Pakaiyin kaseidoh ahitai." 
Ezekiel5:16 Keiman amaho dinga manthah na, chule nangma sumang dinga kel lhahna thalchang giloutah kahinsol tengle; keiman nachung uva kel lhahna kapunsah ding, nachang lhah-u hungkondohna chu kasuhtan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel5:17 Chutia chu keiman kel le gamsa gilou nachung uva kahinlan sah ding, hicheho chun nachateo ahinsuhmang ding; chule hisele thisanin nangma nahinphah ding; chule keiman chemjam chu nachunga kahinchuhsah ding ahi. Keima Pakai Pathen'in kaseidoh ahitai." 
Ezekiel6:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel6:2 Mihem chapa, Israel molsang ho lam nganlang, amaho dounan gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel6:3 Nangho Israel molsang ho, Pakai Pathen thu ngaijun; Pakai Pathen'in molsang ho, lhangho, vadungho chule phaicham ho henga hitin aseije; Vetan keima, keimatah ngeijin nangho chunga chemjam kahin chuhsah ding, chule keiman namun sang hou chu kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel6:4 Chule namaicham hou chu hung kamhel ding, semthu milimho jong suhsetna umding; chule keiman akithatsa namite chu namilimhou masanga kaselhah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel6:5 Chule keiman Israel chate thilongho chu alim semthuhou angsunga kalelhah ding; chule naguhou chu namaicham hou kimvela kathechap jeng ding ahi. 
Ezekiel6:6 Namaicham hou akeohel le akamhela aumna ding, na pathen semthuhou suhkeh le suhmanga aum nading, namilim semthuhou satlhah-a auma, chule nanatoh hou suhmanga aum theina dinga; nangho chenna mun jouse-a khopiho chu ahom keuva kilha ding, chule munsang jouse chu kamhela umding ahi." 
Ezekiel6:7 Chule akithat ho chu nalah tah uva lhujeng ding ahiuvin, chuteng keima Pakai chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel6:8 Ahijeng vangin nangho gamho-a thecheh-a nahung umtengule, namtinho lah-a chemjam'a asohcha phabep nanghon nanei theina dinguva keiman ahingdoh amoh honkhat kadalhah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel6:9 Chule nalah uva asohchase vang chun gal hinga akikai lutna lam lamu namtinho lah-a chu keima eihin geldoh jing dingu ahi, ajehchu keija kona anapetmang jonlung poho lungsung, chule amit hou jonmit po-a alim semthuhou juiho chutoh kakikhen ahitai. Chule amaho akisuh bohnao jouse-a agilou anaboldoh jouseu jeh-a chu amahole amaho kikidah ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel6:10 Chule keima Pakai kahi leh, hiche thilse amaho chunga kahinbol ding chu moh-a kasei ahipoi ti amahon ahetdiu ahi." 
Ezekiel6:11 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Nakhutnin jepmin, chule nakengin lhonlang seijin, ohe, ada ahiuve! ijeh inem itile Israel insung gilou thet umtahho jeh-a, amaho chemjam'a, kella, chule hise-a lougam ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel6:12 Koihileh gamlatah-a umchu hise-a thitei ding, chule koihile anaija uma chu chemjam'a loutei ding, chule koihile aumden le umkimvel khuma uma chu kella thitei ding ahiuve. Hiti ahi keiman kalungsatna chu amaho chunga kamolso ding ahi." 
Ezekiel6:13 Chutengle amilimhou hou lah-a, amaichamu kimvela, lhangsung chung tina, molsang ho chungvum tina, chule thinghing phungnoi tina, gangpi phungnoi tina, amilimhou henga gimnamtui apehnao munho jouse-a chu akithat ho sechu ahung umtengle, nanghon keima Pakai kahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel6:14 Hiti ahi keiman achunguva kakhut kalhah-a, agamu kamhela kalha ding; chule Diblath lama gamthip sanga jong kamhel jo-a kalha ding ahi. Chule amahon keima Pakai kahi chu eihin hetdoh dingu ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel7:1 Hiche chungchon chun Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel7:2 Nangma mihem chapa, Pakai Pathen'in Israel gam henga hiti jonghin aseije; Achaina, achaina chu gam ningliho chunga ahung lhungtai." 
Ezekiel7:3 Tuhin achaina chu nangma chunga hunglhunga ahitai, chule keiman nachunga kalunghana kahin lhunsah ding, chule nalam lhah dungjuija nathu katan ding ahi, chule thet umtah nahinaho jouse chu nachunga kalethuh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:4 Chule kamitnin nangma nakhehchah louding, khotona jong kaneilou ding ahi. Ahivangin nalam lhah ho keiman kalethuh cheh ding, chule thet umtah nahina ho chu nalah tah-a umding; chuteng nangman Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:5 Hitihin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, Veuvin, thilgilou, thilgilou sehseh bou ahunge." 
Ezekiel7:6 Achaina chu ahungin, achaina chu ahung lhungtan; hichun nangma navelhi jingin, ven, hichu ahung lhungtai." 
Ezekiel7:7 Vo gamsunga cheng nangma, jingkah chun nahinphatan, phat chu ahung lhungtai; hamsetna nikho chu ahung naitai, molsang ho gin athongkit tapoi." 
Ezekiel7:8 Tu-a chomlou kah-a nachunga kalungsatna kahinbuhlhah ding, chule kalunghana chu nachunga kamolso ding ahi. Chule keiman nalam lhah dungjuija nachunga thu katan ding, chule thet umtah nahinaho jouse jeh-a kalethuh ding nahi." 
Ezekiel7:9 Chule kamit nin nangma nakhehcha pontin, keiman khotona jong kanei louding ahi. Nalam lhah hole nalah tah uva thet umtah nahinaho dungjuija nangma kahinlethuh ding; chutengle nangman najepma chu Pakai keima kahi hi nahin hetding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:10 Vetan nikho chu, vetan ahunglhunga ahitai. Jingkah chu achemangtan; tenggol pahcha bangin apah lhatan, kiletsahna chu pahchamum bangin amum dohtai." 
Ezekiel7:11 Hunam nahi gitlouna tenggolin ahung umdoh tan; amaho khatcha umden loudiu, ahaona jouseu ahin, anei agou jouse jong khatcha umden louding; chujongle koiman amaho pul adou louding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:12 Phat chu ahung lhungtan nikho chu ahung naitai. Thil chopa chu kipah hihhen, thil johpa jong lunghem hihhen; ajehchu amihonpiu chunga lunghanna chua ahitai." 
Ezekiel7:13 Ijeh-inem itile amaho hingnalai jongleu, ajohdohsao chu ahenguva hungkile kit louding ahi. Ajehchu gaothilmu hin amihonpiu jouse atongkha cheh-in, hichu kile kit louhel ding ahi; chujongle khan gitlouna-a hingjouse koima ama le ama thahat kipethei louding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:14 Amahon amijouse gotsa ahitheinan sumkon amut taovin; ahinla koimacha galmun jona chea aumpoi. Ajehchu kalunghana hi amihonpiu chunga chu chua ahitai. 
Ezekiel7:15 Chemjam chu polama aumin, natset le kellhah chu asunga aume; loujaova um chu chemjamin thintin, chule khopi sumga um chu kel le natsetna thiding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ahinla alah uva kona jamdoh ho chu sohchao vintin, phaicham vakhuho banga molsang ho chunga umdiu, abonchauva amacheh khan gitlouna alunghempi diu ahi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Khut jouse chu ngoijin tin, chule khup jouse chu twi banga lhoplha ding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Amahon khaodip pon jong akigah dingu, chule tijatnan atoma, amaiju jum-a, aluchanghou tolsoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:19 Amahon adangka hou lamlena aselhah dingu, asana hou jong akiladoh dingu ahi. Pakai lunghanna nikho nile adangka houle asanahou chun amaho alhatdoh joulou dingu ahi. Hicheho chun ahinkhou jong alungkimsah joulou ding, a-oiju jong avasah joulou ding ahi. Ajehchu hicheho chu akhan gitlou naova akipalnao hija ahi." 
Ezekiel7:20 Akivona hoina dingun, amaho lultah in akijemun; ahinla hicheho-a chun akisuhboh nao amilimhou, chule kidah umtah thilho chu asemuve. Hijeh-a chu amaho-a kona kakoi gamlat ahi." 
Ezekiel7:21 Chule keiman hiche chu hetlou miho khutna kivahna dinga kapeh-a, chule leiset mikhang gilouho henga galthila kapeh ding; chule amahon hichu asuhboh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel7:22 Kamai amaho-a kona kaheimang ding, chule amahon kamun theng chu ahinsuhboh dingu ahi. Ijeh inem itile gucha michomho hiche sunga chu lut uva, chule hichu asuhboh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel7:23 Khaokol vuikhat semin, ijeh-inem itile gamsung chu thisan kisona gitlouna-in adiptan; chule khopi chu hunamin adiptai." 
Ezekiel7:24 Hijeh-a chu keiman Pathen helou lah-a aphamopen chu kahinpui ding, amahon a-inhou chu alodiu, athahatnao kiloupisahna jong kasuhbei ding; chule amuntheng hou chu suhboh-a umding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:25 Manthah na ahung lhungtai; amahon chamna ahinhol dingu, amavang chamna umlou helding ahi." 
Ezekiel7:26 Setna chunga setna hunglhung ding, chule thuthang chunga thuthang chuding; chuteng amahon themgao thilmu ahin holdingu; ahivanga danthu chu thempu-a kona, chule thumop chu upaho-a kona mangsoh ding ahitai." 
Ezekiel7:27 Lengpa chu lunghem ding, leng chapa jong manthah na-a kivon ding, chule gamsung mite khut ho chu ngoilha ding ahi. Keiman amaho achonnau dungjuija kabola, achan dinguva lom dungjuija athu-u katan ding; chuteng amahon keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel8:1 Chule kumgup channa, alhagup channa, chule hiche lhasung ninga nin, keima ka in sunga katouvin; chule Judah upaho ka-anga atou laijun, Pakai Pathen khut chu keima chunga ahung chun ahi." 
Ezekiel8:2 Hichun kaven ahile, veuvin, meikou limso bangjeng, akonga pat noilamse meikou; chule akonga pat chunglamse chu lhe lahlah-a a-engdum tobang vouso kamun ahi." 
Ezekiel8:3 Chuin aman khutlim khat ahin lhahdoh-in, chule kaluchunga kasam lomkhatnin eimanin; chule lhagaovin leile van kah-a eidom touvin, Pathen gaothil musahna-a Jerusalem'a kotpi sungnungjo sahlam nga kotphung, thangthipna milim touna, thangthipna dinga lunghansahna touna chu eihin lhuttan ahi." 
Ezekiel8:4 Chule veuvin, phaichama gaothilmu kamu dungjuijin, Israel Pathen loupi chamkimna chu hia chun anaume." 
Ezekiel8:5 Hichun aman kahenga, Mihem chapa, tun sahlam ngan gakhodah-in, eiti. Hitichun keima sahlam ngan kagakhodah-in ahile, veuvin, maicham kotpi sahlam pang lutna-a chun thangthipna milim aume." 
Ezekiel8:6 Aman kahenga aseibe kitnin, Mihem chapa, hiche hohin ipi abolu ahi namu em? Kamunthenga kona kagamlat nadinga Israel insungin nasatah-a thet um hilai mun'a aboluhi? Ahinla nangma gakihei kit nin, chutile nangman thet umcheh namukit ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel8:7 Chuin aman keima hongsung kotna chun eihin puijin, chuin keiman kagahven ahile, veuvin, banga chun ahom khat anaume." 
Ezekiel8:8 Chujouvin aman kahenga, Mihem chapa, bang chu lai temin eitin; chuin bang chu kalaija ahile, kotkhah kamu doh-e." 
Ezekiel8:9 Chuin aman kahenga, Lutnin, chule hikoma chun khangitlouna thet umtah abolu chu gaven eiti." 
Ezekiel8:10 Hitichun keima kalutnin ahile, a-opma kithol ganhing jouse, chule thet umtah gamsaho, Israel insung semthu milimho akimvela bangho-a jihtho-a aum chu kagamun ahi." 
Ezekiel8:11 Chule amaho anga chun malaija Israel insungmi pasal somsagi hochu adinguvin, chule amaho lailung tah-a chun Shaphan chapa Jaazaniah chu adingin, mitinin akhutna ama lhengcheh akichoijun; chule gimnamtui meikhulom satah chu chunglama akal touve." 
Ezekiel8:12 Chujouvin aman kahenga hitin seije, Mihem chapa, malaija Israel insung miten muthim lah-a ipi abol, chule mitinin ama ama lunggelna indan sunga ipi abolu namu em? Ajehchu amahon, Pakaiyin eimupouve, Pakaiyin leiset adalhatai atiuve." 
Ezekiel8:13 Chule aman kahenga hitin jong aseije, Gah kiheikit tadin, chutile amaho thilbol thet umjocheh namu ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel8:14 Chujouvin aman keima Pakai in kotpi sahlampang nga-ah kotna chun eihin puitan; chule veuvin, hia chun Tammuz dinga kap numei ho anatouvun ahi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Chujouvin aman kahenga aseijin, Vo mihem chapa, nangman hichehi namunah em? Nangma gakihei kitle chun hicheho sanga thet umjocheh namu ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel8:16 Chuin aman Pakai indan sungnungjoa eipui lutnin ahile, veuvin, Pakai houin kotphung, hongcha le maicham kikah-a chun mi somni le nga, Pakai houin nung ngatna, amaiju solam ngacheh aumu vin; amahon solam ngan nisa ahouvun ahi." 
Ezekiel8:17 Chujouvin aman kahenga aseije, Vo mihem chapa, hichehi namutah em? Judah insungin hilai mun'a abolu thet umtahho hi thil neocha hintem? Ijeh inem itile amahon gamsung hi hunam adiptauvin, chule amaho keima phinse-a lunghansah din ahung kileuve. Ven, amahon abah chu anahkuiju toh asutouve." 
Ezekiel8:18 Hijeh-a chu kenjong lungsa tah-a kabol ding; kamitna jong kadeplou ding, hejong kahepi louding; chule amaho awsang tah-in kana benga kap jongleu, kangaipeh dehlou dingu ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel9:1 Aman kana benga aw sangtah-in asamin, Khopi dunga thunei ho chu hinnailut sah-in, chule amitakipmin akhutna suhsetna amanchah cheh kichoihen, ati." 
Ezekiel9:2 Chule, veuvin, sahlam panga um kotpi sangjo lama konin mi gup ahunguvin, amitinin akhutnuva mithana manchah achoijun; chule amaho lah-a khat chu tupat ponin akivonin, chule apanga lekha jihho lekhatwi thei khat akikhaije. Chuin amaho achelutnun, sum eng maicham koma adingun ahi." 
Ezekiel9:3 Chule Cherub chunga um Israel Pathen loupina chu kotphung geijin akitol toutan ahi. Chuin aman tupatpon kivon apanga lekha jihho lekhatwi thei khai mipa chu agah kouvin; 
Ezekiel9:4 Chuin Pakai chun ama henga hitin aseije, Khopi lailung, Jerusalem lailung jotpaijin lang, alah uva thet umtah kibol jeh-a khoisa-a kap ho dehpanga melchihna nata ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel9:5 Chule keima jah dingin adangho henga aseijin, khopi sunga chun amanung juijun lang, nakhut lha uvin, chule namitnun demchah hih-un, khotona jong neihih un, ati." 
Ezekiel9:6 Ateh akhang, numei ho le chapang neoho, chule nupiho thatgam keijun, ahinla koihile achunga melchihna umchan chu ganai hih-un; chule kamunthenga konhin panjengun, ati. Hichun amahon inmaija um tehse ho-a chun apanpai jeng taove." 
Ezekiel9:7 Chuin aman amaho henga, In chu suboh unlang, hongsungho chu akithat ho-a chun dipmun; chule nangho kondoh-un, ati. Chuin amaho akondoh-un, khopi sunga miho chu athat taove." 
Ezekiel9:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, amahon amaho atha laitah-un, keima kahoidohtan, hitichun keima kaboh khupmin kalhun, kapengin, kaseije, O Pakai Pathen, Jerusalem chunga nalungsatna nasunlhah na-a hi, Israel lah-a amohho jouse jonghi nasuhmang sohding hitam? kati." 
Ezekiel9:9 Hichun aman kahenga, Israel le Judah insung khan gitlounahi alen valtai, chule gamsung thisan adimin, khopisung khelna-in adimtan ahi. Ajehchu amahon, Pakaiyin leiset adalhatai, chule Pakaiyin amutapoi, atiuve, tin aseije." 
Ezekiel9:10 Kei hijong leng, kamitnin adepchah lou ding, khotona jong keiman kaneilou ding, akiman chahnao alu chunguva kalethuh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel9:11 Chule, veuvin, tupat pon kivon, apanga lekha jihho lakhatwi thei khai mipa chun, athu chu keima neithupeh bangin kaboltai, tin alhut tai." 
Ezekiel10:1 Chujouvin keiman kagahven ahile, Cherub ho luchunga um vanthamjol lah-a chun, khisong dumjet laltouna lhehlheh khat aume." 
Ezekiel10:2 Chule amapa chun tupat pona kivon mipa jah-a chun thu aseijin, chule hitin ati, Cherub noitah-a kangtalai kangho kikah-a chun chelutnin, chule Cherub ho kah-a konin songmeihol nakhut dimsetnin hamdoh-in lang, hicheho chu khopi chunga gathe jah-in, ati. Chuin amapa chu kamuta-in achelut tai." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tun mipa achelut phatnin Cherub ho chu chuche in jetlam panga chun adingtauvin; chule inhong sungnung chu meilom'in adimtai. 
Ezekiel10:4 Chuin Pakai loupina chu Cherub'a kon chun akaltouvin, chule in lutna kotchunga chun adingtan; chule a-in chu meilom adimin, chule ahongsung chu Pakai loupina vah chun alosohtai." 
Ezekiel10:5 Chule Cherub ho lhaving gin chu Hat chungnung Pathen'in thu aseitenga a-awgin bangin, in ponung geijin akijan ahi." 
Ezekiel10:6 Chule Cherub hole kangtalai kang kikah-a kona mei-am galan tia tupat ponnema kivonpa henga thu apeh chun ahitin ahi; chujouvin ama alutnin kangtalai kangho koma chun agadingtai. 
Ezekiel10:7 Chuin Cherub khatnin, Cherub ho kahlah-a kon chun Cherub ho kahlah-a um meikou lama chun akhut ahinlhang doh-in, chuin hichu alan, chule tupat ponnema kivon mipa khutna akoijin ahile, amapan hichu alan achedohtai." 
Ezekiel10:8 Chuin hiche Cherub ho lhaving noija chun mihem khut tobang khat ahungdohtan ahi. 
Ezekiel10:9 Chule keiman kagahvet phatnin, veuvin, Cherub ho panga chun kangtalai kang li, Cherub khat panga kangtalai kang khat, chule Cherub dang khat panga kangtalai kang dang khat aume. Chule hiche kangtalai kang ho limdan chu khisong engdumtoh abangin ahi." 
Ezekiel10:10 Chule kangtalai kangho limso dan chu, aliuvin kibahna khat aneijuve, hichu kangtalai kang khat lailung tah-a kangtalai kang khat kibut abangin ahi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Amaho ache tengule amaho apang li in acheuvin; amaho achepumun akiheile pouve, amavang aluchangun avetna lama lamu amahon ajuijuvin; amaho achepumun akiheile pouve." 
Ezekiel10:12 Chule amaho tahsa pumpi, atungtunhou, akhuthou, alhavinghou, chule kangtalai kang, chule ali uva aneiju kangtalai kangho geijin akimveluchu mitjeng adimsetnin ahi." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kangtalai kangho chu ahile, keima jah in, Vo kangtalai kang tin akisame." 
Ezekiel10:14 Chule khatcheh in mai li aneijuvin; mai masa chu Cherub mai, mai nina chu mihem mai, chule athumna chu keipi bahkai mai ahin, chule alina chu mulaopi mai ahi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Chuin Cherub ho chu dopsangin aumtaove. Hiche ganhing hi Chebar vadunglen panga kanamu chu ahi.
