Ezekiel10:16 Chule Cherub ho chu acheteng kangtalai kangho chun amaho ajuijuve; chule Cherub hon leisetna kon kaltouving tia alhavinghou adoptou tengule, hiche kangtalai kangho jonghi amaho panga konin akiheile pouve." 
Ezekiel10:17 Amaho adin tengule hicheho adinguvin, chule amaho dopsanga aum tengule, hicheho jonghi amahole amaho akidomsang jiuve. Ajehchu ganhing lhagao chu amaho sunga uma ahi." 
Ezekiel10:18 Chujouvin Pakai loupina chu chuche in kotphunga kon chun achemangin Cherub ho chunga agadingtai. 
Ezekiel10:19 Chuin kamitmu tah-in Cherub hon alhavinghou adomsangun, leisetna konin akaltou taove. Amaho achedoh phat chun kangtalai kangho jong apanguva abeh-in, chule khatcheh chu Pakai in solam kotpi phunga adingcheh uvin; chule Israel Pathen loupina chu amaho chunga aume." 
Ezekiel10:20 Hichehi ganhing, Israel Pathen noija Chebar vadunglen panga keiman kanamu chu ahi. Chule amaho chu Cherubim ahi ti kahei." 
Ezekiel10:21 Khatcheh in mai li aneicheh uvin, chule khatcheh in lhaving li aneicheh-un, chule alhavinghou noija mihem khut tobang aumcheh-e." 
Ezekiel10:22 Chule amaisou hung kilah chu Chebar vadunglen panga kamu tobang maiso mama chu ahin, chule amaho malama jangpetnin ache cheh uve." 
Ezekiel11:1 Chukalvalin lhagaovin keima eidom touvin, chule Pakai in solam kotpi, solam maingatna chun eilhuttai. Chule veuvin, kotpi kotphunga chun mi somni le nga aumin, amaho lah-a chun keiman mipi ho pipui Azur chapa Jaazaniah chule Benaiah chapa Pelatiah chu kamun ahi." 
Ezekiel11:2 Hichun aman kajah-a aseijin, Mihem chapa, amahohi thilphalou gong miho, chule hiche khopi sunga thil gilou thumop leho chu ahiuve." 
Ezekiel11:3 Amahohin, phat chu anai hihlaije, eihon inho satadiu hite, hiche khopihi khangbel len chu ahin, chule eiho asaphe chu hiuhite, atiuve." 
Ezekiel11:4 Hijeh chun amaho dounan gaovin, Vo mihem chapa, gaovin, ati." 
Ezekiel11:5 Chuin Pakai lhagao chu kachunga ahungchun, chule kajah-a aseijin, Seijin; Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Vo Israel insung, nanghon hitihin naseitaove; ajehchu keiman nalung sunguva hunglut thil chu abonin kahesoh keijin ahi." 
Ezekiel11:6 Nanghon khopi sunga mihem tampi nathat taovin, chule nanghon khosung lamlen jouse mithi nadip taove." 
Ezekiel11:7 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Nanghon namitha hou khopi lailung tah-a nalupsah hou chu sa chu ahiuvin, hiche khopi hi khangbel len chu ahi. Ahivangin keiman hiche lahtah-a kona nangho kapuidohtei ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel11:8 Nanghon chemjam chu nakichaove; chule keiman nangho chunga chemjam khat kahin chuhsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel11:9 Chule keiman hiche lailung tah-a kona nangho kapuidoh ding, chule nangho hetlou miho khutna kapeh doh-a, chule nalah uva thu katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel11:10 Nangho chemjam'a nalou dingu; keiman Israel gamgi-a nathu katan ding, chule nanghon keima Pakai chu kahi ti nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel11:11 Hiche khopihi nangho khangbel chu hilouhel ding, alailungtah-a sa jong chu nangho nahilouhel dingu ahi; amavang Israel gamgi-a nachung thu katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel11:12 Chule nanghon keima Pakai chu kahi ti nahet dingu ahi. Ajehchu nangho kadan kisun ho-a nache tapouvin, kathutanho jong natongdih pouvin, ahinla Pathen helou nakimvel uva umho umdan bangin nanghon naboljo taove, ati." 
Ezekiel11:13 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, keiman gaothu kasei petnin, Benaiah chapa Pelatiah chu athitai. Chuin kalhun kamai tolla kasulutnin, aw gingtah-in ka pengin, Ohe Pakai Pathen, nangman Israel ho lah-a ahingdoh amoh hohi nasuh manghel jeng ding hitam! tin kaseije." 
Ezekiel11:14 Pakai thu chu keima henga ahung kitnin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel11:15 Mihem chapa, nasopi ho, nasopi ho mongmong, na-insung miho, chule Israel insung pumpi jouse chungchanga hi ahi Jerusalem'a cheng miten, Nangho Pakaiya konin gamlaovin: hiche gamhi keiho lodinga eikipeuva ahi, tia aseina chu ahi." 
Ezekiel11:16 Hijeh chun seijin, Pakai Pathen'in aseije; Keiman amaho gamlatah-a Pathen helou miho lah-a lehdoh jengjong leng, chule keiman amaho gamdang danga thecheh jengjong leng, alhunao gamho-a chu amaho dinga keima muntheng neokhat tobang kahiding ahi." 
Ezekiel11:17 Hijeh chun seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; keiman nangho mipi ho lah-a kona kachopkhom dingu, nakithe chehnao gamsungho-a kon kapuikhom dingu, chule keiman Israel gam chu nangho kapeh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel11:18 Chule amaho khulama hungdingu, chule amahon hichea kona chu, chua um ningset umtah thilho jousele thet umtahho chu alahdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel11:19 Chule keiman amaho chu lungthim khat kapeh ding, chule nasunguva lhagao thah khat kakoipeh dingu; chule keiman atahsaova kona song banga tah alungchangu chu kalah doh-a, chule amaho chu tahsa phe-a kasem lungchang kapeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel11:20 Chutia chu amahon kadan kisun ho ajuijuva, kachonna danho anitdiu, chule hicheho chu anatoh-a atohdoh dingu; chutengle amaho chu kamite hiuva, keima amaho Pathen kahi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ahinla ningset umtah le thet umtah thil ho lama alungu chesahho vang chu, keiman aluchung cheh uva achenau lampi chu kalethuh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel11:22 Chujouvin Cherub ho chun alhavinghou ajah touvun, chule kangtalai kangho apanguva abeh-in; chule Israel Pathen loupina chu amaho chungvuma aume." 
Ezekiel11:23 Chuin Pakai loupina chu khopi lailung tah-a kon chun achetouvin; chule khopi solama um molsang chunga chun adingtan ahi. 
Ezekiel11:24 Hiche nunghin lhagao chun eilatouvin, chule gaothil muna-in Pathen lhagaovin Chaldea gama gal hinga kikaiho henga eipuitan ahi. Hitichun keiman thilmu kanamu chu keija konin achetoutai." 
Ezekiel11:25 Chuin keiman Pakaiyin eimusah thilho jouse chu gal hinga kikaiho henga kaseisoh keijin ahi. 
Ezekiel12:1 Pakai thu jong kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel12:2 Mihem chapa, nangma kiphinjing insung lahtah-a chenga nahi; amahon mun'a ding mit aneijun, amuthei pouvin; jahna ding kol aneijun, ajathei pouve; ajehchu amaho kiphinjing insung ahiuve." 
Ezekiel12:3 Hijeh chun mihem chapa, nakichon doh nadingin nathilkeo kigon tupmin, chule amaho mitmun sunlai tah-in kichondoh-in; chule nangma naumna mun'a kona munchom dang khatna amaho mitmu-a nakichon doh ding ahi. Amaho thungailou insung hijongleu, angaito maithei dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel12:4 Chujouteng nangman sunlai tah-a nathilkeuho chu amaho mitmu tah-a kichondohna thilkeu banga nahinpoh ding; chule nangma amaho mitmu tah-a nilhah tahle gal hinga kikailut ho che banga nachedoh ding ahi. 
Ezekiel12:5 Nangman amaho mitmu tah-a bang chu natuh vang paiding, chule chutia chu napohdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel12:6 Amaho mitmu tah-a nangman hichu nalengkou teni chunga napoh-a, chule hichu khomu chipchet tahle napohdoh ding, tol namuthei louna dinga nangman namai nakikhu ding ahi; ajehchu keiman Israel insung dinga melchihna khatna katun nahitai, ati." 
Ezekiel12:7 Chuin keiman eikithupeh bangin kaboltai, keiman sunlaitah in kathilkeoho chu gal hinga kikaiho thilkeo bangin kahin podoh tan, chule nilhah lamin kakhut tah-in bang chu katuvang paijin, keiman hichu khomut chipchep nin kapodoh-in, amaho mitmu tah-in kalengkou chunga kapun ahi." 
Ezekiel12:8 Chuin jingkah in Pakai thu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel12:9 Mihem chapa, Israel insung thungailou insung chun nahenga, Ipi nabol ham tia asei hilouham?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Amaho henga nangman hitin seijin, Hitihin Pakai Pathen'in aseije; hiche pohgih hi Jerusalem vaipopa le, amaho lah-a um Israel insung pumpi vetsahna ahi." 
Ezekiel12:11 Seijin, keima nangho dinga melchihna kahin; keiman kabol banga amaho henga jong kabolding ahi. Amaho chondoh-in umuntin, chule sohchang dinga cheding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel12:12 Chule alah uva leng chapa chun khomut chipchep tengle athilkeoho alengkouva aputna chedoh ding; amahon hicheho chu pohdohna dinga bang chu atuhvangpai dingu; ama chun amitna tol amu theilouna dinga amai akikhu ding ahi. 
Ezekiel12:13 Keiman kalen jong achunga kajal ding, chule ama chu kathangkola ohding; chule keiman ama chu Chaldea mite gam Babylon kalhut ding; chukoma chu ama thi ding, hijongle hichu amulou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel12:14 Chule keiman ama panpi dinga ama kimvela umho jousele, ama galsat mihon ho chu hui nunna channa kathecheh ding; chule keiman amaho chemjam'a kanungdel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel12:15 Chule keiman amaho namtin lah-a kathecheh-a, chule gamsungho-a kasuhcheh tengle, amahon keima Pakai kahi chu akihet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel12:16 Ahijeng vanga amahon agalhun nahou Pathen helouho lah-a thet umtah ahinahou akiphondoh theina dinguva, keiman amaho lah-a themkhat chemjam'a kona, kella kona, chule hise-a kona kakhendoh ding; chule amahon keima Pakai kahi ahin het dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel12:17 Chukalvalin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, aseije," 
Ezekiel12:18 Mihem chapa na-anneh chu kihot pumpumin nenlang, natwi chu kithing thingpumin, chingthei tah-in donin;" 
Ezekiel12:19 Chule gamsung mipi ho henga seijin, Jerusalem le Israel gamsunga chengho Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; agam sunguva chengho jouse hunam thilbol jeh-a, asunga chengjouse-a kona kamhela aumtheina dinguva; a-anneh-u chingthei tah-a aneh dingu, chule atuiju kidangsa tah-a adon dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel12:20 Chule mihem chenna khopiho chu manlou sohding, chule gamsung chu kamhel ding; chule nanghon keima Pakai kahi chu nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel12:21 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel12:22 Mihem chapa, nanghon Israel gamsunga naneiju thuchih, Nikhoho chu akisaosah-in, chule thilmu jouse athontai, tia kiseija chu ipi kiseina ham?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Hijeh chun amaho chu seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Keiman hiche thuchih hi kasuhbei ding, chule amahon hichehi Israel sunga thuchih-a amankit tah loudiu ahitai; amavang, Nikhoho ahung naijin, gaothilmu jouse ahung guilhungtai, tin amaho seipeh-in." 
Ezekiel12:24 Ajehchu pannabei gaothilmu le joule nala Pathen thu kisei kiti himhim chu Israel insunga umkit talou ding ahi. 
Ezekiel12:25 Ajehchu keima Pakai kahin; keiman kaseiding, chule keiman kaseidoh ding thuho chu hung guilhungtei ding; hichu geisang louding ahitai. Ajehchu vo kiphinhat insung, nangho nikho sunga hi keiman athu chu kaseiding, chule hichu katohdoh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Ezekiel12:26 Pakai thu chu avelin kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel12:27 Mihem chapa, ven, Israel insung miten hitin aseijuve, Amapan gaova thil amuho ahunglhun nading nikho tampi avat nalaije, chule khonung peh-a hung guilhung ding thua gaothu aseimasah ahibouve, atiuve." 
Ezekiel12:28 Hijeh chun amaho henga seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, kathuho khatchabeh jong kisuhsaobe louding, amavang keiman kaseidoh thu chu tohdoh-a umding ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel13:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel13:2 Mihem chapa, Gaothu seija Israel themgaoho, amaho lungdei deija gaothu seidoh ho dounan gaothu hitihin seijin, Nanghon Pakai thu chu ngaijun;" 
Ezekiel13:3 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Ohe, ama lhagao lunggela chonna chule ima muneilou themgao ngol hochu ada nahiuve!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Vo Israel, nathemgao ho vang neldi gama sial ho bangbep ahiuve." 
Ezekiel13:5 Nangho a-onglaiho-a nachetou pouvin, chujongle Pakai nikho tengle galkisatna-a Israel insunga din theinadin tho nakai pouve." 
Ezekiel13:6 Amahon pannabei amuvin, jouva aisan ahiuvin, Pakaiyin aseije, atiuve: ahinla Pakaiyin amaho asolpoi. Chule amahon athusei houchu kisudet ding ahi tin midangho akinepsah uve." 
Ezekiel13:7 Nanghon pannabei gaothil namu-u hilou ham? Chule nanghon jouva aisan nathu nanaseileu hilouham? Nanghon hichu Pakaiyin aseije nati uvin; ahinla keiman kanaseipoi. 
Ezekiel13:8 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, nanghon pannabei nana seijuvin, chule jouthu jeng namu uve; veuvin, hijeh-a chu keima nang hotoh kidouva kahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel13:9 Chule kakhut hi pannabei jeng mu-a themgaoho chungle jouva aisanho chunga kachuhsah ding ahi. Amaho chu kamite kiloikhomna-a lhalou dingu, Israel insung kisutna-a jong amahohi kisun loudingu, chule Israel gamsunga jong lutlou dingu ahi; chutengle nanghon keima Pakai Pathen kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ajehchu amahon kamite chu chamna aume tin ajoulhep mun, ahin chamna aumpon; chule khatnin bang khat atungdoh-in, chule ven, adanghon hichu chilminlou leingan nin aloijol uve." 
Ezekiel13:11 Chilminlou leingana loijol ho henga seipeh-in, Hichu lhutei ding ahi; gohong longlet hela hung juding; chule, O gelchanglen ho, nangho nahung lhah dingu; chule hichu huipi leh gopin asuhtel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ven, bang chu ahunglhuh tengle, chilminlou leingana naloi bang chu hoilamba hitam? tia kiseilou dingham?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keiman kalungsatna-a hichu gopi leh huipi-a kasuhchim ding ahin; hiche suhmangna dinga chu kalunghana gohong juh-a longlet hela juding; chule kalungsatna gelchang lentah ho-a juding ahi. 
Ezekiel13:14 Hitia chu nanghon chilminlou leingana naloijolu bang chu kasuhchim ding akitunna chu holdoh-a aumna dinga hichu toltoh kasuhmat ding, chule hichu lhutei ding, chule hicheho lah-a chu nangho suhmanga naum dingu ahi. Chutengle nanghon keima Pakai kahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel13:15 Chutia chu chuche bang chungle, chilminlou leingana loijol ho chunga chu kalunghana kasuhbulhit ding, chule nangho jah-a, Bang chu aumtapoi, chule chuche loijol ho jong chu aumtapoi, tia kasei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel13:16 Hicheho chu Jerusalem chung chang gaothu seija themgaoho le, chamna umlou petna amanu dinga chamna gaothil mupehho themgaoho ahiuve, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel13:17 Chutobangma chun nangma mihem chapa, namite chanute lam nganlang amaho lungdei lama gaothu seiho dounan amaho chunga gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel13:18 Chule Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije tin seipeh-in, Sangkhol tinchenga mitpheldoi khao kikhuibeh ho, mihem hinna sumang dinga kisalel milen tahtah ho delkop khuipeh numei ho, ada nahiuve! Nangho kamite lhagao chu nadel lele uva, naheng uva hunga lhagaoho chu nahinghoi diuham?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Chule nanghon kamite lah-a sakolchang khutdim khat, chule changlhah pheng halkhatna athilouding hinnaho thana dingle, ahing louding hinnaho huhdohna dinga, kamiteho najouseiju jaho henga, najou thu-u seija suhboh ding neigot-u ham?" 
Ezekiel13:20 Chuti ahi jehchun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Veuvin, nanghon hinnaho lenmang sah nadinga namanu mitpheldoi ho chu kaki doupin, chule amaho chu keiman nakhut uva kona kamaltela, hinnaho kalhadoh ding, chule lensah dinga nadelu hinnaho jeng jong chu kalhadoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel13:21 Na ultheh pon hou jong keiman kabotela kamite nakhut uva kona kahuhdoh ding, chule amaho chu nangho khutna dellea umkit talou ding ahiuve; chule nanghon keima Pakai kahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel13:22 Keiman kasuh gimlouho michonpha ho lungthim jong nanghon jouvin nasulung gimun, chule agitlounau lampia kona akilekit louna diuvin hinna anei dingun thutep nape-un, migilouho khut natha hatsah-un ahi." 
Ezekiel13:23 Nanghon pannabei mu nanei tahlou diu, doile ai nasan kitlou dingu ahitai. Ajehchu keiman kamite chu nakhut uva kona kahuhdoh ding; chule nanghon keima Pakai kahi chu nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel14:1 Chujouvin Israel mite upaho lah-a loikhat keima henga ahunguvin, ka-anga ahung touvun ahi." 
Ezekiel14:2 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel14:3 Mihem chapa, hiche miho hin asemthu-u milimho chu alungsung uva atundoh cheh uva, akhan gitlounao kipal lhuhna chu amasanguva akoiju ahitai. Keima amaho kholle ding kahim?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Hijeh chun amaho henga hitihin thu seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Israel insungmi amitakip alungsunga semthu milimho tungdoh-a, chule akhan gitlouna akipal lhuhna-a chu amaichanga koija, themgao henga hunga chu; Pakai keiman ahung penpen chu asemthu milimho tam dungjuija kadonbut ding ahi;" 
Ezekiel14:5 Ajehchu Israel insung chu asemthu-u milimho jeh-a keija kona gamla ahitah jeh uva, keiman alunglam tah uva matding kati ahi." 
Ezekiel14:6 Hijeh chun Israel insung henga seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; nalung heijun, nasemthu-u thilho-a konin kihei mangun, chule nangho thet umtah nahinnaova konin namaiju heimangun." 
Ezekiel14:7 Ajehchu Israel insung mitele gamdang mi Israel lah-a pemlut tapou, ama chama keija kona chom um, chule asemthu-u milimho alungsunga tungdoh-a, akhan gitlouna kipal lhuhna chu amaichanga koija, chule themgao khat henga keima thudol dong dinga hunga chu, Pakai keimatah-in ama chu kadonbut ding ahi." 
Ezekiel14:8 Chule keiman amapa chu kakimaitopi ding, chule amachu melchihna khatle thuchih khatna kasemding, chule amachu keiman kamiteho lah-a kona kasatlhah-a, chule nanghon keima Pakai kahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel14:9 Chule themgao chun thilkhat aseija lheplhah-a aumtahle, Pakai keiman themgao chu kalheplhah hiding; chule keiman ama chunga chu kakhut kajah-a, ama chu kami Israelte lah-a kona kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel14:10 Chule amahon akhan gitlounao talen chu akipohdoh dingu ahin; themgao talen chu ama gaholpa talen chutoh kibang ding ahi. 
Ezekiel14:11 Chutia chu Israel insung chu keija kona petmang kit talou ding, chule asuhkhelnau jouse-a kona jong suhboh-a umkit talou dingu; ahivanga amaho kamite hitheijuva chule keima amaho Pathen kahiding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:12 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungkitnin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel14:13 Mihem chapa, agam pumpi nasatah-a keima douna-a suhkhelna anei tengule, keiman achunguva kakhut kajah-a, changlhah hungkondohna chu kasuhtan ding, chule achunga kel kahin lhunsah-a, mihem le sahem agoma kasatlhah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Chule hiche mi thumho, Noah, Daniel chule Job chu asunga umnama jongleu, amahohin achonphatnao jala amahon hinna akihuhdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:14 Chule hiche mi thumho, Noah, Daniel chule Job chu asunga umnama jongleu, amahohin achonphatnao jala amahon hinna akihuhdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:14 Chule hiche mi thumho, Noah, Daniel chule Job chu asunga umnama jongleu, amahohin achonphatnao jala amahon hinna akihuhdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:15 Keiman gamsunghi gimneitah sahemho kapal sah-a, amahon asuhsetnuva, sahemho jeh-a chu gamsung chu koiman apalthei lou dinga akamhela ahile;" 
Ezekiel14:16 Hiche mi thum hohi asunga umnama jongleu, keima kahinjing jeh-in, amahohin chapaho le chanuho ahuhdoh loudingu; amaho vang huhdoh-a umuva, gamsung chu kamhel ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:17 Ahiloule keiman mihemle sahem hichea kona chu kasuhmang nadinga, agam chunga chemjam kahin lhunsah-a, chule chemjam jah-a, agamsunghi satnin tia kaseija ahile;" 
Ezekiel14:18 Hiche mi thum hohi hiche sunga hin umnama jongleu, keima kahin jeh-in, amahohin chapaho hihen chanuho hijongle ahuhdoh loudingu, amavang amahole amaho bou kihuhdoh ding ahiuve, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:19 Ahiloule keiman hiche gamsunga natset kahin lansah-a, hichea kona mihemle sahem sugam dinga kalungsatna chu thisana achunga kahin sunlhah-a ahile;" 
Ezekiel14:20 Noah, Daniel chule Job, asunga anaum nama jongleu, keima kahinjing jeh-in, amaho chun chapaho le chanuho ahuhdoh loudingu, ahivangin amahon achonphatnao jala amaho hinna akihuhdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:20 Noah, Daniel chule Job, asunga anaum nama jongleu, keima kahinjing jeh-in, amaho chun chapaho le chanuho ahuhdoh loudingu, ahivangin amahon achonphatnao jala amaho hinna akihuhdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:20 Noah, Daniel chule Job, asunga anaum nama jongleu, keima kahinjing jeh-in, amaho chun chapaho le chanuho ahuhdoh loudingu, ahivangin amahon achonphatnao jala amaho hinna akihuhdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel14:21 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Mihemle sahem suhgamna dinga keiman Jerusalem chunga kathutana nasatah liho: chemjam, kel, hugingtah sahem chule natset kahinsol tengle, ichana nasading hitam?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Hijeng jongle, veuvin, hiche sunga kona puidoh-a umding chapaho le chanuho, ahingdoh amoh hung umdingu ahi. Veuvin, amaho nangho henga hungdoh dingu, chule nanghon amaho lamlhah le anatoh-u namu dingu ahi. Chule keiman Jerusalem chunga kilhut thil gilou chung chang le, amaho chunga kalhunsah jouse chungchanga hi lungmon sah-a naum dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel14:23 Chule nanghon amaho lamlhah le natoh ho namu tengule, amahon nangho nalhamon dingu ahi. Chule keiman asunga kabolho jousehi ajehbeija kahinbol ahipoi, ti nanghon nahet dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel15:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel15:2 Mihem chapa, lengpigui bah chu thingphung dang ahiloule gammanga um thingphung ho bah khat sanga, ipi hichom deh-a ham?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Chua kona chu thilkhat tou semna dinga thing kilatei ding ham? Ahiloule min chuche-a kona chu umle bel khattou khaina dinga alah ding ham? 
Ezekiel15:4 Veuvin, hiche hi meikou sunga mei tikong nadingin akiseplutnin; meijin amongteni akavamin, chule akimlai chu akan ahi. Hichu thilkhat tou semna dinga kiloma hinam?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Veuvin, hichu apum ahi petna bon thilkhat tou semna dinga alhinlela ahile, meijin akahvam tengle ichanna lhinglel cheh ding hitam?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; gamlah thingphung ho lah-a kona meija tidinga lengpigui bah kapeh banga, Jerusalem'a chengho chu kapeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel15:7 Chule keiman amaho douna kamai kaheiteng; amaho meikou khatna kona potnuva, ahivanga meikou dang khatnin amaho akahvam ding; chutia chu keiman amaho douna-a kamai kaheiteng, nanghon keima Pakai kahi neihet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel15:8 Chule amahon asuhkhel jeh uva, keiman agammu kamhela kalhading ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel16:1 Pakai thu chu avelin kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel16:2 Mihem chapa, Jerusalem thet umtah ahinaho kihetdoh sah-in," 
Ezekiel16:3 Chule Pakai Pathen'in Jerusalem henga hitihin aseije, tin seijin; Napenna le nagam mi hina chu Canaan gam ahin, napa chu Amor mi ahin chule nanu chu Hit mi ahi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Chule napen dan chu ahile, nahung pen nikho chun nalaigui anakitanpon, twija jong silngimin nana-umpon; chi-in jong jutnin nana-umpon, chule ponin jong nana kitompon ahi." 
Ezekiel16:5 Nachunga hitobang bolpehna dinga amitna khotona nei koima anaumpoi; ahin nahungpen nikho-a kidah umtah nahi jeh-in, nangma gam onga paidoh-in nana umtai." 
Ezekiel16:6 Chule keiman nakom kahin hopa chun, nangma nathisana nana kisuhboh kamun, nangman nathisan lah-a nana umpet chun keiman nahenga, Hingin, tin kanaseije. Henge, nangma nathisan lah-a nana umpet chun Hingin, kanatin ahi." 
Ezekiel16:7 Keiman nangma gama thil mumdoh khat bangin kapunsah-in; chuin, nangma nahung khangin, nahung pilhingin, chule melhoitah nahunghin ahi. Nanoi teni ahung kigongdoh-in, chule nasam ahung khangin, ahin nangma sagoh le ponbei nahi nalaije." 
Ezekiel16:8 Tun keiman nangma kahinho pa-a, kahinvet chun, ven, nangma dei naum phat tah chu ahi; hijeh chun keiman kaponlha-a kahin khun, nasagoh hina kakhu khumpeh tai keima nahenga kaki hahsel in, chule nangma toh kitepna khatna kalutnin, chule nangma keija nahung hitai tin, Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel16:9 Chuin nangma twijin kasilin, henge, keiman nangma-a konin nathisan chu hoitah-in kasop thengin, chule thao kanun ahi." 
Ezekiel16:10 Keiman nangma ajemneija kikhui ponin kana vonin, chule satuilut vun kengchot kasepeh-in, tupat ponnemin natai kagah-in, lungpon kasilpeh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel16:11 Keiman nangma kijepnaho-in jong kajemin, nakhut teni-a chaokol kabupeh-in, nagonga sumgui ka-o peh tai." 
Ezekiel16:12 Chule keiman nanahkuija sumkol kabapeh-in, nabil teni-a bilba kabapeh-in, chule naluchunga lallukhuh hoitah khat kakhuh peh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel16:13 Hitichun nangma sanale dangka-a nakijemin, chule navon chu tupat ponnem, lungpon, chule ajem neija kikhui pona kon ahin; na anneh chu changbong neljet, khoiju, chule thao ahi. Chule nangma nahoi lheh jengin, chule lenggam khat bangin nakhang toutan ahi." 
Ezekiel16:14 Chule namelhoi chun Pathen heloute lah geija naminthan sahtai; ajehchu keima hoina nachunga kavonpeh jala chamkima nahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseijin ahi." 
Ezekiel16:15 Ahinla nahoina chu nakisonpin, naminthan jeh-in noti'n napangin, chule najon thanhoina jouse chu nahinjotpa jouse chunga nabung lhatan, hichu ama-a ahijitai." 
Ezekiel16:16 Chule nangman von phabep nakilah-in, nangma-a dingin munsang ho najem polin, chule hicheho chunga chun noti'n napangin ahi. Hitobang chu hunglhung kittalou ding, chutobang chu hikit louhel ding ahitai." 
Ezekiel16:17 Keiman nangma kanapeh ka sanale dangka kijepna hoitahtah ho chu nakilah-in, chule nangma-a dingin semthu pasal ho lim nakisemin, hicheho tochun nangman jongthan hoi naboltan ahi." 
Ezekiel16:18 Chule ajem kikhui navonho chu nalan, hicheho chu nakhu khumin; chule kathao le kagim namtui chu amaho anga nakoipeh tai." 
Ezekiel16:19 Keima anneh nangma kapeh changbong neljet, thao, chule khoiju nangma vahna-a kanei jengjong chu, nangman amaho anga gimnamtuijin nakoipeh-in; hitichu anahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel16:20 Chukalvalin nangman nachapate le nachanute, keima dinga nahinho chu, nakipuijin chule amaho chu nangman ganlhaina-in napedoh tai. Hiche najon thanhoinahi thilneo ham?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Nangman kachate nathat gamtan, chule amaho chu amaho dinga meikou palsah-a manchah dingin napedoh tai." 
Ezekiel16:22 Chule thet umtah nahinaho, najonnaho jouse-a, nangman nakhang donlai nikhoho, sagoh keole pon beija na-umlai, chule nathisana nangle nang suhboh nahilai chu nageldoh tapoi." 
Ezekiel16:23 Chule nakhan gitlouna jouse nungin ahung hitin ahi, (Ohe, ohe, ada nahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije.)" 
Ezekiel16:24 Hitichun nangman nang dingin mun kilang khat nakisah doh-in, chule muntina munsang nakisemin ahi." 
Ezekiel16:25 Nangman namun sangho chu lamthom tinna nakisah doh-in, chule namel hoina chu kidah umtah nason, koihile nahin hopa tapou henga nakeng teni nakah-in, chule najon thanhoinaho napunsah-in ahi." 
Ezekiel16:26 Nangman na inheng Egypt miho tahsapum lentah ho toh nanajongtan, Keima phinsetna lunghansahna dingin, najon thanhoina nasuh tamben ahi." 
Ezekiel16:27 Vetan, hijeh-a chu keiman kakhut nachunga kajah-a, naneh ngai anneh kasuhlhom peh-a, jonthanhoi jeh-a jahcha-ah, naho-a Philistine chanute lunggot lama nangma kapehdoh nahitai." 
Ezekiel16:28 Nangman najon thanhoina nakhoplou jeh-in, Assyria miteto jong najong khomin, henge, amaho dingin noti'n nakisan, ahinla nalungna achim joupoi." 
Ezekiel16:29 Nangma chukalvalin Canaan gamsunga Chaldea miteto najonben, ahijeng vangin chua jong chun nalunglhai dehpon ahi." 
Ezekiel16:30 Nangman hitiho thil jouse, jachat helouva numei jongthang hoi kimanchah bangin nakimangchan; ichana nalungthim lhasama hitam, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel16:31 Nangman lamthom tina namun kichoiho, chule lamlhah tinna namun sangho nasadoh-in, ahin nangman aman iman nalah loujeh-in, nangma noti bangin na-umpon;" 
Ezekiel16:32 Amavang inneipi khat a-inneipu khela hetlou miho jonpia tobang nahi. 
Ezekiel16:33 Amahon numei notiho thilpeh apeuvin; ahinla nangman nakingaipiho jouse nathanhoi na-a nahenga ahung theina diuvin thilpeh napen nathalah-in ahi. 
Ezekiel16:34 Chule najon thanhoi na-a nangma numei danghotoh nakibahlouna aumin, amaho koimachan jonpi dingin nangman nahinjui pouve. Nangman tohman napehji-a, chule nangma peh-a na-umlouhi mitoh nakibahlouna ahi." 
Ezekiel16:35 Hijeh chun, vo notinu, Pakai thu ngaijin," 
Ezekiel16:36 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; nangma bohna sunlhah-a ahung umjehle, nakingaipi ho le thet umtah namilim semthuho toh najon thanhoina jeh-a sagohkeo nahina hodoh-a ahung um jeh, chule amaho napeh nachateho thisan jeh-a;" 
Ezekiel16:37 Ventan, keiman nakingaipiho jouse, nanopsah khompiho jouse toh, nangailut ho jouse toh, nana thet ho jouse chu kakhop khom ding; keiman amaho chu nakimvela kakhop khom ding, chule amahon nangma sagohkeo nahinaho amudoh theina dinguva, ahenguva sagohkeo nahina chu kahodoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:38 Chule keiman nachung thu chu numei kichen sukeh ho le thisanso ho chungthu akitan banga katan ding, chule keiman lungsatna le thangthip na-a thisan kapeh ding nahi." 
Ezekiel16:39 Chule keiman nangma amaho khutna jong kapehdoh ding, chule amahon namun kichoilaiho chu asuhlhuh uva, chule namun sang laiho chu asuhchim dingu ahi. Chule amahon nangma naponho jouse naholhahpeh dingu, chule nasongmantam hoitahho chu nalahpeh uva, sagohkeo le pon beija nadalhah dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel16:40 Amahon nangma doudinga honkhat jong ahinpui dingu, chule amahon nangma songa naseuva, achemjamuva nasutpai dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel16:41 Chule na-inhou chu meija ahalvamuva, numei tampi mitmu-a nachung thu atandingu; chule keiman nangma noti'a napanna chu kasuhtana, nangman thalah nabol louding ahitai." 
Ezekiel16:42 Hitia chu keiman nachunga kalungsatna chu ka kicholdo sah-a, chule kathangthipna chu nanga kona chemanga, kathipbeh ding; chule kalung hangkit talou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:43 Nangman nakhangdon lai nikhoho geldoh louva, hiti thilho jouse-a neisuh lungjing jeh-a hi; vetan, hijeh-a chu keiman jong nachondan jouse naluchunga kalethuh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije. Chutengle thet umtah nabolna jouse chungvuma jonthanhoi nabolkit louhel ding ahitai." 
Ezekiel16:44 Ven, koihile thuchih mangcha jouse chun nachunga hiche thuchih, anu hinabang banga, achanu jong hia ahi, kitihi amanchah dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel16:45 Nangma nanu chanu, a-inneipu le achateho theida-a chu nahi, chule nangma a-inneipu teho le achateho theida nasopinu teho sopinu nahi; nanu chu Hit mi ahin, chule napa chu Amor mi ahi." 
Ezekiel16:46 Chule nasopi alenjonu nakhut veilama amale achanute chenga chu Samaria ahin, chule nasopi aneojonu nakhut jetlama chenga chu Sodom le achanu teho ahiuve." 
Ezekiel16:47 Ahijeng vangin nangman amaho lampiho najuipon, amaho thet umtah ahinao jong nabolpoi. Ahivangin hichu thilneo khat bangin, nalam lhah ho jouse-a amaho sangin gamchengin suhboh-in na-ume." 
Ezekiel16:48 Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, nanaonu Sodom le achanuten jong nangle nachanuten nabol tobang lomin abolpouve." 
Ezekiel16:49 Ven, hichehi nasopinu Sodom khangitlouna ahi, kiletsah, nehle chah ninglhing set, chule thasetna dimset chu amale achanuteu ho-a anaumin, chujongle vaichate le ngaichate khut chu anahatsah poi." 
Ezekiel16:50 Chule amaho akibolthei sah-un, ka-anga thil thet umtah anaboluve. Hijeh chun pha kasah dungjuijin amaho chu kalamangtan ahi." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria jengin jong nangma chonset naho keh khat jong anabolpon; ahinla nangman thet umtah nahinaho chu amahoa sangin napunsahtan, chule natohdoh thet umtah nahinnaho jouse-a chun nangman nasopinute them nachan sah-in ahi." 
Ezekiel16:52 Nasopinuteho chunga thutan nangma tah-in jong, amaho-a sanga tamjo thet umtah thil nanabol nachonset naho jeh-a jum na chu nakipoh ahi. Amaho nangma sangin adihjouve; henge, nangma kisudongin jong uminlang, chule nasopinute nathemchansah na-a chun jum na kipohtan." 
Ezekiel16:53 Keiman amaho asohchan naova, Sodom le achanute sohchana, chule Samaria le achanute sohchan na-a kon kahin lepui kit teng, keiman nasohchanghou chu asohchan naova kona amaho lah-a kahin lepui kit ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:54 Chutia chu amaho dinga lhamona nahi tengle, nangman najachatna chu nakipoh ding, chule nanatoh ho jouse-a chu nakisuhdong ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Nasopinuteho, Sodom le achanu teho, malaija anachen nao munna ahung kilekit tenguva, chule Samaria le achanu teho malaija anachen nao munna ahung kile kit tengule, chutengle bou nangle nachanuteho malaija nanachen nao munna nakile kit diu ahi." 
Ezekiel16:56 Ajehchu nasopinu Sodom chu nakiletsah nikho laitah chun nakamin jong nana phapoh pon; 
Ezekiel16:57 Hichu Syria chanute le akimvela um jouse, nakimvela nangma nahsahlouva nabol Philistine chanuteho-a kon housetna natolai banga, nakhangitlouna kiphondoh masang chu ahi." 
Ezekiel16:58 Nangman na jonthanhoina le thet naum naho chu nanakipoh tai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Ezekiel16:59 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; kihahselna nanahsah louva kitepna nasuhkeh jeh-a, nangin nabol bang banga ken jong kahinbol ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:60 Hijeng jongle keiman nakhangdon laija nangma toh kitepna kanei chu kahingeldoh ding, chule nangma-a dinga tonsot kitepna katundoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:61 Chuteng nangman nachunga le nanoija nasopinuteho chu nakisan tengle, nachon danho chu nahin geldoh-a najachat ding ahi. Chule keiman amaho chu nachanute hidinga kapeh ding, nakitepna jeh-a vang hilou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel16:62 Chule keiman nangma toh ka kitepna katundoh ding; chutengle nangman keima Pakai kahi nahinhet ding," 
Ezekiel16:63 Chutia chu keima nanatoh ho jouse jala kalungdam teng, nangman nageldoh-a najah chading, chule najachat jeh-a nakam nakahkit louhel ding ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel17:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel17:2 Mihem chapa, hetmo thu phongdoh-in, chule Israel insung henga thulem khat seipeh-in." 
Ezekiel17:3 Chule Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije tin seijin; Lhaving lentah nei muvanlai lentah, lhaving saotah, amul dimset, vouso tintang nei khat Lebanon'a ahungin, chule Cedar thing bah sangpena chun ahung toutai." 
Ezekiel17:4 Aman hiche thingbah leh adonglai chu achu tanin, chule hichu sumkol veina gamsung khatna apolutnin; sumkolvei ho khopi khat sunga aphuttan ahi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Aman agamsoh muchi khat jong alan, chule hichu ga tamtah so na loulai khatna atu-in; aman hichu twipiho panga akoijin, chule huisum thing khat bangin aphutnin ahi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Chuin hichu ahung khangin, abahho ama henglama kikho-a, chule ajungho ama noija jam lengpigui nemcha ahung hitan, hitichun lengpigui ahung hi-in, chule bahho ahin neijin, chule adonho ahin sodoh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel17:7 Lhaving lentah le mul tamtah nei muvanlai lentah dang khat jong aumin, chule ven, akiphuna gamsung twilamho-a kon atuichap theina dingin, hiche lengpigui hin amapa lam ngan abahho aloi onin ajamlutsah-in, chule abahho jong amapa lam ngan akikhosuh-e." 
Ezekiel17:8 Hichu abahho ahungjam doh theina dingle, aga ahung umdoh theina ding, chule lengpigui pha ahunghi theina dinga, twipiho panga loumun phalaija kiphutna ahi." 
Ezekiel17:9 Nangman gaseijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; hichehi khangtou ding hinam? Aman hichu agopna dinga ajungho chu abodoh-a, chule aga jong chu apul lhahsah lou ding ham? Hiche ama-a dondoh anaho jouse chu goplha ding, ajung geija bodohna dinga, thaneina lentah le mi tamtah ngailou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:10 Henge, vetan, kiphut jongle lolhing nantem? Solam huijin ahin semkhah teng gop lhahel jenglou ding ham? hichu akhandohna honsunga chu goplha ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:11 Chukal valin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel17:12 Tun kiphinjing insung henga hitihin seijin; Hiti thil hohin ipi aseina ahi nanghon nahet uvem? Amaho seipeh in, veuvin, Babylon lengpa chu Jerusalem'a ahungin, chule chuche mun'a lengpa le pipuiho chu amanin, amato lhonin Babylon'a gal hingin akaitai." 
Ezekiel17:13 Chule lengpa chilhah chu akaijin, amato kitepna asemin, ama chu akihahselsah-in, chule aman gam sunga thahat ho jong akai mangin ahi." 
Ezekiel17:14 Chutia chu lenggam chu kisunema, achama kiphong dingthei talou ding, aman kitepna anit jala bou dingthei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ahinla aman, amahon sakol ho le mi tamtah apeh theina dingun apalaiho Egypt'a asol lutnin, ama chu adoutan ahi. Ama chu akhangtou nadem? chutobang thilho bola amachu hoidoh nantem? ahiloule huhdoh-a aumna dingin kitepna chu asukeh dem?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Pakai Pathen'in aseije, Keima kahinjing bangin, tahbeh-in akihahselna nahsah louva akoija, akitepna asuhkehpa, ama lenga anasem lengpa chenna mun'a chu, amatah chutoh Babylon lailung tah-a chu thitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:17 Amahon mitha nadinga molsang banga kulbang asetnuva, pal akai tengule, Pharaoh'in agalsat sepai mihat hole mihonpi tamtah toh gal kisatna-a chu ima abolthei lou dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Aman kihahselna i-sah louna-a kitepna asuhkeh-a, chule vetan, aman akhut alapma hitiho jouse abol jeh-a hi, ama hoidoh louhel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:19 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keima kahinjing bangin, tahbeh-in kaki hahsel na aman i-sah louva abola, kakitepna asuhkeh ahin, keiman amatah lujang kalethuh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:20 Chule keiman achunga ka lenthang kajal-a, kathanga ohding, chule keiman ama Babylon kahinlhut ding; chuteng hia chu asuhkhelna, keima dehna-a asuhkhelna thua ama chu kakihoupi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:21 Chule amite jamleho jouse chu ama loiho chutoh chemjam'a loudingu, chule amaho aum nalaiho chengse chu hui nunna lam jouse-a kithecheh dingu; chutengle keima Pakaiyin kaseisa ahi ti nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel17:22 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keiman Cedar thingphunga kon abah sangpen chu kalah-a, chule kaphu ding; ajih donho dongset khat kasilhah-a, hichu lhangsang akichoilai khatna kaphu ding ahi." 
Ezekiel17:23 Israel molsang chunga hichu kaphu ding, hichun bahho hinsepdoh intin, ga ahin neija, Cedar hoitah hung hiding; chule anoija chu lhavingnei vacha namkim chenga, abahho lima chu cheng ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel17:24 Chule gama thingphung ho jouse chun, Pakai keiman thingphung sang chu kaloilhun, thingphung nem chu katung sangin, thingphung hing chu kagotlhahsah-in, chule thingphung go chu kahindohsah-e, ti ahin het dingu ahi. Pakai keiman kasei ahitan chule kabol ahitai." 
Ezekiel18:1 Pakai thu chu avelin kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel18:2 Nanghon Israel gamsung chungchanga naman chah-u thuchih, Paten lengpithei thuh aneovin, chate aha ajai kitihi ipi natinao ham?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Keima hinjing kahijeh-in, nanghon Israel sunga, hiche thuchih manchahna phat naneikit louhel dingu ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel18:4 Veuvin, hinkho jouse chu keija ahi, mipa hinkho keija ahibanga, chapa hinkho jong keija ahi; chonset bolla hinna chu thitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:5 Ahinla mikhat chu achondih-a, chule thilpha le adih abola," 
Ezekiel18:6 Chule molsang ho chunga ima nelouva auma, Israel insung semthu limho jong amit teni-a khoda-a ve louva, a-inhengpa ji jong asuhboh louva, numei thichelai jong aganai louva," 
Ezekiel18:7 Koimacha sugenthei louva, amavang abatpa henga athiltun alepeh-a, hunama koima achom louva, gilkelte achanglhah apeh-a, chule sagohkeo chu pon akhu-a," 
Ezekiel18:8 Athoi dinga sumpa homlouva, apung jong lalouva, khangitlouna-a kona akhut atuhtanga, mihem le mihem kah-a thutan lhahna dihtah atohdoh-a," 
Ezekiel18:9 Kadan kisun ho ajuija, chule kathutanho adihtah bolna dinga anitna ahile; ama chu midih ahin, hingtei ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel18:10 Amapa chun chapa khat ahina, achapa chu gucha michom, thisanso hat ahi-a, chule hicheho lah-a hitobang khat penpen abola ahile," 
Ezekiel18:11 Chule chutobang tohding dolho khat chabeh tonglouva auma, amavang molsang chung dunga ima aneh-a, chule a-inhengpa ji asuhboh-a," 
Ezekiel18:12 Vaicha le lhasamte asuhgentheija, hunama mi achoma, thil kitung lepehlouva, chule semthu limho chu amittah ngeija vea chun thet umtah chu abol ahin," 
Ezekiel18:13 Athoi dinga sumpa ahopma, apung akilah-a ahileh; ama chu ahing nadem? Hinglou helding ahi; aman hiche thet umtah ho jouse aboltan; ama thitei ding; ama thisan chu ama chunga chuding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:14 Tun, veuvin, aman chapa khat neihenlang, achapa chun apan abol chonsetna ho jouse muhen, hichu ngaitohen, chule chutobang chu bolda henlang," 
Ezekiel18:15 Molsang ho chung dunga ima nelou, amitna jong khodah-a Israel insung semthu limho velou, a-inhengpa jinu suboh lou," 
Ezekiel18:16 Koima jong sugentheilou, thil kitung jong itcha lou, hunama jong mi chomlou, achanglhah gilkel le lhasamte pejo-a, sagohkeote ponsil pe-a," 
Ezekiel18:17 Vaichate-a kon akhut tima, sumthoi homa chule apung jong lalouva, kathutan atohdoh-a, kadan kisunho ajopma ahile; ama chu apa khangitlou jeh-a thilou ding, ama chu tahbeh-a hing ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:18 Apa thudol ahile, aman engsetah-a anasuh gentheija, asopipa hunama anachoma, chule amite lah-a aphalou anabol jeh-a chu veuvin, amatah chu akhangit louna-a thitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:19 Ahijengvangin nanghon, i-atile chapan apa khangitlouna apohlou ham? tin naseijuve. Chapa chun dandunguija adih chu abola, kadan kisemho jouse achintupma hicheho chu abolteng, ama tahbeh-a hing ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:20 Chonset bola hinna chu thitei ding ahi. Chapan apa khangitlouna apoh louhel ding, panjong chapa khangitlouna chu apoh louhel ding ahi. Chonphat nachu chonphapa chunga umding, chule agiloupa gitlouna chu ama chunga umding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:21 Ahivangin agiloupa chu aman anabol achonsetnaho jouse-a kona ahung kileheija, kadan kisun ho jouse anitna, thilpha le adih chu abola ahile, ama hing teitei ding, thilou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Chule aman anabolsa suhkhelna ho chu, ama henga kiphapoh louding ahin; aman anabolsa chonphatna-a chu hing ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:23 Keiman migilou athi ding chu kakipapi dingham? amavang ahina dinga achena lampiho-a kona ahungkile kit ding johchu kakipana hilouham? tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije. 
Ezekiel18:24 Amavang michonpha chu achonphatna-a kona akiheimanga, setna abola, agiloupa thilbol thet umtah ho jouse chu abola ahile, ama hingin tem? Aman anabolsa chonphatna ho jouse chu kiphapoh talou ding ahi. Suhkhelna-a anabol suhkhelna leh chonset na-a anabol chonsetna jeh-a, ama thitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:25 Achutijeng vangin nanghon, Pakai lampi chu akibangpoi, nati uve. Tun ngaijun, Vo Israel insung, Keima lampi kibanga hilou ham? nangho lampijoh hilouham akibang louva chu?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Chonpha khat chu achonphatna-a kona akihei manga, chule khangitlouna abola, chua chu athi dena ahile; khangitlouna anaboldoh jeh-a chu ama thia ahi." 
Ezekiel18:27 Chujongle, migilou khatnin gitlou anabola kona ahung kihei manga, thildih le apha chu abola ahile, aman ahinna akihuhhing ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:28 Ajehchu ama kingaito-a, anabolsa sukhelna ho jouse-a kona akiheimanga ahin, ama tahbeh-a hingtei ding, thilouhel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Achuti vangin Israel insung chun, Pakai lampi chu akibangpoi atiuve. Vo Israel insung, Keima lampiho kibanga hilouham? Nangho lampijoh hilouham akibang louva chu?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Hijeh-a chu, Vo Israel insung, mitin achonna dungjui cheh-a athu-u katan ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije. Nalung heijun, nakhangitlou naova konin nangho le nangho kihei mangun, chutile chu setna chu namanthah nao hilouding ahi." 
Ezekiel18:31 Khan gitlouna nabolho jouseu nangho-a konin paimangun; chule lungthah le lhagao thah kengun, ajeh chu ipidinga nathi jeng diuham? Vo Israel insung." 
Ezekiel18:32 Ajehchu athipa thina-a chunga chun kipana kaneipoi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije. Hijeh chun kiheijun lang hinnan neijun." 
Ezekiel19:1 Chujongle nangman Israel pipuiho dingin ka la bolin lang," 
Ezekiel19:2 Chule seijin, Nanu chu ipi ham? Keipi bahkai nu ahin; keipi bahkai ho lah-a akolin, keipi bahkai chalgol ho lah-a anoute avah-in ahi." 
Ezekiel19:3 Aman anoute lah-a khat avahdoh-in; keipi bahkai chalgol ahung hitan, samatje ahinhetan, mihem ahin thattan ahi." 
Ezekiel19:4 Namtinin ama thu aja taovin; ama chu akokhuh uva matnin aumin, chule amahon akihena thihkhao pumin Egypt gam alhut taove." 
Ezekiel19:5 Tun keipinu chun angah-in, akinepna abeitai ti amu phatnin, aman anouho lah-a achomkhat alakitnin, keipi bahkai chalgol-in asemtai." 
Ezekiel19:6 Chuin ama chu keipiho lah-a atouche asuhchen, ama keipi bahkai chalgol ahung hitan, samatje ahung themin, chule mihem ahin that tan ahi." 
Ezekiel19:7 Aman akamhel aleng inpihou chu ahen, aman akhopihou chu manlou asotan; chule gamsung le asunga cheng dimsetho chu akitum gina chun akamheltai." 
Ezekiel19:8 Chujouvin namtin chun lam tina konin ama ahindouvun, alenthangu chu ama chunga ahinjah taovin, ama chu akokhuh uva amantaove." 
Ezekiel19:9 Chule amahon thihkhaova akanun, ahentupmun, Babylon lengpa heng ahin lhutnun: a-awgin chu Israel molsang ho-a akijah kitlouna dingin, amahon ama chu kotong sunga ahentauve." 
Ezekiel19:10 Nanu chu twi panga kiphut, nathisana um lengpigui tobang ahin, twi tamjeh-in amanu aga aphan, abah jong tamtah ahi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Chule amanun vaihomna leng tenggol dingin mol tahbet khat aneijin, chule amanu sanje chu thingbah tamtah lah-a dopsangin aumin, amanu sandan chu abah tamtah ho chuto ahung kilahdoh than ahi." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ahijeng vangin amanu chu lungsat na-a bodoh-in ahung umin, amanu chu tolla selhah-in ahung umtan, chule solam huipin aga chu agotlhah sahtai. Amanu mol tahbet chu akisu bongin, agoplhan meikouvin akavamtai." 
Ezekiel19:13 Tunvang amanu chu gamthipma, gamgole dangchah na gam leisetna akiphut tan ahi." 
Ezekiel19:14 Chule amanu bahho lah-a mol khatna konin meikou ahungdoh-in, hichun agaho akavamtan; chuti chun amanun vaihomna tenggol ding mol tahbet aneitapoi. Hichehi kala ahin, chule kala khat hung hiding ahitai." 
Ezekiel20:1 Chuin kumsagi lhinna alha ngana nisom lhinnin ahung hitin ahi, Israel upaho lah-a konin loikhat Pakai henga thudoh nei dingin ahunguvin, ka-anga atouvun ahi." 
Ezekiel20:2 Chujouvin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel20:3 Mihem chapa Israel upaho henga seipeh-in, chule amaho henga seijin, hitihin Pakai Pathen'in aseije; Nangho keima dongdinga nahungu ham? Keima kahinjing bangin, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, nangho thudoh le-a kaumlou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:4 Nangman amaho thu natan dingham, mihem chapa, nangman amaho thu natan dingham? Apu apateho thet umtah thilbolho chu amaho hetdohsah-in lang;" 
Ezekiel20:5 Chule amaho henga seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keiman Israel kalhena, Jacob insung chilhah henga kakhut kadopsanga, Egypt gama Keima amaho henga kakihetsah-a, ahenguva kakhut kadopsanga, keihi Pakai na Pathen'u kahi tia kasei nikho," 
Ezekiel20:6 Chuche Egypt gama kona hinpuidoh-a amaho dinga kavetpehna gam, khoiju le bongnoi lona gama, gamjouse loupina-a chu amaho puilut dingin ahenguva kakhut kadop sang nikho;" 
Ezekiel20:7 Hiche nikho chun keiman ahenguva, Mitinin namitmu uva thet umho paimang uvin, chule Egypt gam milim ho-ah kisuboh hih-un, keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahi, tin kanaseije." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ahinla amahon eina douvun, chule kathu angaipouve. Amaho mitinin amitmuva thet umho anapaimang pouvin, Egypt gam milimho jong adalhadeh pouve. Hichun keiman Egypt gam lailung tah-a, achunguva kalunghana kamolso nadingin achunguva kalungsatna bung lhange, tin kaseijin ahi." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ahinla aumpihou Pathen heloute, Egypt gama kon kahinpuidoh uva kona ahenguva kakihetsahna miho anga kamin suhboh-a aumlouna dinga, kamin jala kanabol ahi." 
Ezekiel20:10 Hijeh-a chu keiman amaho Egypt gama kona kapotdoh sah-a, gamthip sung kahinlhut ahi." 
Ezekiel20:11 Chule keiman kadan kisunho amaho kanapen, chule kathutanho kanavetsah-in, hichu min abola ahile ama chu hingding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:12 Chukalvalin, keiman amaho suthengpa Pakai kahi ahet theina dingun, keima le amaho kah-a melchihna khat hidingin kacholngah nikhoho kanapen ahi." 
Ezekiel20:13 Ahinla Israel insung chun gamthipma keima einadouvun; mihemin hichu abola ahile, chuche-a chu ama hing ding ahi tia kanasei, kadan kisunho ajui pouvin, kathutanho angaisah pouvin; chule kacholngah nikhoho chu hatah-in asuboh-un ahi. Chuin keiman gamthipma amaho sugam dingin kalungsatna achunguva bung lhange kanatin ahi." 
Ezekiel20:14 Alah uva kon kahin puidohna Pathen hephalou mite mitmu-a kamin suhboh-a aumlouna dinga, kamin jala na katoh ahi." 
Ezekiel20:15 Achuti vangin, keiman amaho kanapeh gam jouse lah-a gam loupi, khoijule bongnoi lonna gam chu kalhut louna din gamthipma kakhut kanadom sangin ahi." 
Ezekiel20:16 Ajehchu amahon kathutanho anahsah pouvin, chule kadanthu kisunho ajuipouvin, amavang kacholngah nikhoho asubohtauve. Ajehchu alungsungun amilimhou nung ajuitai." 
Ezekiel20:17 Hijeng jongle, kamitnin suhmangna dinga konin amaho anahoidoh-in, gamthip jenga jong chun kana subei pouve." 
Ezekiel20:18 Amavang gamthipma chun achateu henga hitin kanaseije, Nanghon napu napateu dan kisunho chu juihih beh-un, athutanhou jong nit hih-un, asemthu milimhouva jong kisuboh hihbeh-un" 
Ezekiel20:19 Keima Pakai na Pathen'u kahin, kadan kisunho-a chonun, kathutanho nitnun lang bolun," 
Ezekiel20:20 Chule kacholngah nikhoho jabolun, hiho chu keima le nangho kah-a melchihna khat hiding, chutia chu nanghon keima Pakai le na Pathen'u kahi nahet dingu ahi, kanati." 
Ezekiel20:21 Ahijeng vangin achateu keima dounan agolkeh-un; mihemin hichu abola ahile, chuche-a chu ama hing ding ahi tia kanasei kadan kisunho-a ajui pouvin, kathutanho angaisah pouvin; kacholngah nikhoho asuboh-un ahi. Hichun keima gamthipma achunguva kalunghana molsona din, amaho chunga kalungsatna bung lhange tin kana seijin ahi." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ahijeng vangin alah uva kon kahin puidohna Pathen hephalou mite mitmu-a kamin suhboh-a aumlouna dinga, kakhut kanatima, na kanatoh ahi." 
Ezekiel20:23 Keiman amaho Pathen heloute lah-a kasuhcheh nadingle, gamtina kathecheh-na dingin gamthipma jong chun kakhut kanalam in ahi." 
Ezekiel20:24 Ajehchu amahon kathutanho anatongdoh pouvin, kadan kisunho anahsah pouvin, kacholngah nikhoho asuboh-un, chule amit houchun apu apateu milimho ajuijun ahi." 
Ezekiel20:25 Hijeh chun keiman amaho apha loutah chondan kanapen, chule hinna-a aneilou diu thutan naho kanapen;" 
Ezekiel20:26 Chule keiman amaho kakamhel sah-a, akhonnale keima Pakai kahi ahetdoh theina dinguvin, naobu phukeh jouse meikou apal galkai sahnao, athilpeh uva chun amaho kasuboh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel20:27 Hijeh chun mihem chapa, Israel insung henga seijin, chule ahenguva, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Napu napa teovin hiche-a hin eina taitomun, khuche-a chun keima dounan suhkhel ananeijun ahi." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ajehchu, keiman amaho pehdinga kakhut kadop sangna gamsunga kapuilut phatnun, amahon lhangsang jousele thingphung lentah ho jouse amuvin, chua chun athiltohou chu apeuvin, athilto houva chun eilunghan sah-un ahi. Chua chun amahon agimnamtui hou jong ahalun, chule hia chun donding thilpehho alhei lha uvin ahi." 
Ezekiel20:29 Chuin keiman amaho henga, Nagachenao munsang chu ipiham? tin kaseijin, hiche munchu tuni geijin Bamah akiti nalaije." 
Ezekiel20:30 Hijeh chun Israel insung jah-a seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Napu napateu chonna dungsuna nakisuh boh-u hitam? chule thet umtah athilbol hou banga jonthanhoi nabolu hitam?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ajehchu nathilpeh-u natouva, nachateo meikou napal galkaisah tengule, tuni changeija namilimho uva kisuboh nahiuve. Chuti ahile keima nangho gahdoh ding kahim, Vo Israel insung? Keima kahinjing bangin, tin Pakaiyin aseije, keima nangho dohding kahi louhel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:32 Chule nalungsunguva hunglut, Keiho Pathen heloute bang kahi dingu, gamsung miho insung tobang kahi dingu, thingle song kajendiu ahi, natiu chu guilhung louhel ding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:33 Keima kahinjing bangin, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije; tahbeh-in khut thahat tahle, ban jahdoh-a, chule lungsatna sunlhah to tho-a, nachung uva vai kahomding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:34 Chule keiman khut thahat tahle, ban jahdoh-a, chule lungsatna sunlhah totho-a, mipi ho-a kon le, nakithe chehnau gamho-a kona kahinkhop khom ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel20:35 Chule mipi gamthip sunga nangho kahin puilutna, chukoma chu nangho kimaito-a kakihoupi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:36 Egypt gamthip sunga napu napateu to kanakihou banga, keiman nangho kakihoupi ding nahiuve, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel20:37 Chule keiman nangho mol lhon noi kapalsah uva, chule nangho kikankhomna kitepna sunga kahinpuilut ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel20:38 Chule keiman nalah uva kona doumah bolho le keima douna-a suhkhel ho chu kasuhtheng ding, amaho chu agapemnau gamsunga kona kahin puidoh-a, Israel gam sunga lutlouhel ding ahiuve. Chutengle nanghon keima Pakai kahi chu nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel20:39 Nangho vang, vo Israel insung, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Cheovin, tunung jongle kasei nangaisah lou dinguva ahile, mitinin namilim cheh gakijenun; tukallin nathilpeh hou le namilim houva chun kamin theng suboh tahih-un." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ajehchu kamolsang thengtah, Israel sanna molsanga chu, Israel insungho jouse, agamsunga um jousen chuachu eijen dingu ahi. Hia chu keiman amaho kasan ding, nathilpeh hou le nakipehdoh nau gamasapenho, chule nathil thenghou jouse kangeh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel20:41 Keiman nangho mipi ho-a kona kahin puidoh-a, nakithe chehnau gamho-a kona kakhop khom teng, keiman nagim namtuiju puma kasan ding; chule Pathen heloute angsunga nangho-a suhthenga kaum ding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:42 Chule keiman nangho Israel gamsung, napu napateu penge tia kakhut kanadop sangna gam chu kahinlut tengule, nanghon keima Pakai kahi neihin hetdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel20:43 Chule hia chu nana kisuhbohnao nalampi hou le nathilbol jouseu nahin geldoh dingu; chule thilgilou nanabol hou jouseu jeh-a nangho mitmu ngeija jong nanghole nangho jong nakikidah dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel20:44 Chule keiman nakhangitlou nau dungjuija hilouva, nathilbol thenlou jeh-u jong hideh louva, kamin khohsahna jala nachung uva na katoh tengle, vo nangho Israel insung, keima Pakai kahi chu nahinhet dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel20:45 Chukalvalin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije." 
Ezekiel20:46 Mihem chapa, lhanglam maingatnin lang, nathu chu lhanglam sanga phongdoh-in, chule lhanglam gammang dounan gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel20:47 Chule lhanglam gammang henga chun seijin, Pakai thusei hi ngaijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Ven, keiman nasunga mei kachokonga, hichun nangma-a thingphung hing tinleh thingphung go tin chu ahalvam ding: meikou deojeju chu kiphelmit louding, lhanglama pat sahlam geija maichang jouse hichun akahvam sohding ahi." 
Ezekiel20:48 Chule tahsa-a hing jousen Pakai keiman hichu kachokou ahi ti amucheh dingu; hichu kiphelmit louhel ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel20:49 Chuin keiman, Vo Pakai Pathen, amahon keima thudol aseijun, Amapa khun thulem asei hilou ham? atiuve, kati." 
Ezekiel21:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel21:2 Mihem chapa, Jerusalem lam maingatnin lang, nathu chu muntheng ho lama phongdoh-in lang, Israel leiset dounan gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel21:3 Chule Israel gamsung jah-a seijin, Pakaiyin hitihin aseije; Vetan, nangma kadou nahi, chule kachemjam apaija kona kasadoh ding, nangma-a kona michonpha le migilou kibanga kasatlhah ahi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Keiman nanga kona michonpha le migilou kasuhbei ding ahitan, hijeh-a chu kachemjam chu apaija kona lhanglama pat sahlam geija tahsa-a hing jouse dou dinga kondoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel21:5 Chutia chu tahsa-a hing jousen keima Pakaiyin kachemjam apaija konin kasatdohtai ti ahet dingu; hichu kilekit louhel ding ahi. 
Ezekiel21:6 Hijeh chun mihem chapa, nangma nakong bong pumin khoisan lang; amitmu uva lhasetah-in khoisan." 
Ezekiel21:7 Chule hung hiteiding ahi, amahon nahenga ibola nakhoisat ham? ati tengule, nangman, thu jeh ahi, ajehchu hichu hunglhung kon ahitai: lungthim jouse junlha ding, khut jouse joilha ding, lhagao jouse lhasam ding, khup jouse twi banga lhasam ding ahi: ven, hichu ahunge, kimolso tei ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, tia nadonbut ding ahi." 
Ezekiel21:8 Pakai thu chu avelin kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije." 
Ezekiel21:9 Mihem chapa, gaovinlang seijin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije; chemjam khat, chemjam khat akinol hemin, akinotval ahitai." 
Ezekiel21:10 Hichu nasatah-a thagamna dinga kinol hem ahin; aduljetna dinga kinotval ahi. Achutile eihon eltol ibol jing diuham? hichun kachapa tenggol chu thingphung ho bangin ima asahpoi. 
Ezekiel21:11 Chule aman hichu choithei ahina dingin, notval dinga apen: hiche chemjam hi mithatpa khutna pehdinga, kinol hema, kinotval ahitai." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mihem chapa, kapmin lang peng lhuh lhuh-in, ajehchu hichu kamite chunga chuding ahin, Israel pipuiho jouse chunga chuding ahi. Chemjam le tijatnaho kamite chunga chuding ahin; hijeh chun naphei chung bengin." 
Ezekiel21:13 Ajehchu hichehi patepna ahin, chemjam chun tenggol jengjong chu i-asah loule iti tantem? chemjam chu umlou ding ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel21:14 Hijeh chun mihem chapa, gaovin, nakhut teni chu bengton, chule athumvei nan chemjam ajatni hisah-in, mithana chemjam chu: hichu akithat milenho chemjam ahin, achangvalu indan sunglama lut chu ahi." 
Ezekiel21:15 Keiman alungu lhahsamna dingle, amanthah nau punsahna dingin, chuche chemjam muhhemho chu akotpihou dou dingin kaphutne: O! hichu duljetna kisema, mithana dinga kichuntup ahitai." 
Ezekiel21:16 Nangma lampi khat ahiloule adang khatna, jet lam hihen vei hijongle, namaijin angatna lamlama chetan." 
Ezekiel21:17 Keijong kakhut votongting, kalungsatna kingahsah tange; Pakai keiman kasei ahitai." 
Ezekiel21:18 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung kitnin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel21:19 Mihem chapa, nangman Babylon lengpa chemjam ahunglhun theina dingin, lampi ni semdoh-in; hichu gamkhatna kona hungdoh hiding ahi; chule nangman lampi komuna khat semin, khopi sungjotna lambul tah-a chun semin." 
Ezekiel21:20 Ammon mite kho Rabbath, chule aki umkul Judah gam Jerusalem'a chemjam chu ahunglhun theinadin, lampi khat gongin." 
Ezekiel21:21 Ajehchu Babylon lengpa chu lampi kikhen nalaitah, lampi ni bomtah-a, aisan din anadinge. Aman athalchang ho anotvalin, milimho adongin, sathin chu avetan ahi." 
Ezekiel21:22 Akhut jetlama chun gal lamkaiho pansahna ding, mithana-a kam katna ding, thong jeju-a ao na ding, kotpiho nolhuhnaho koina ding, kulbang setsangna ding, chule galkul khat sahdoh nadinga Jerusalem dinga aisan na aumin," 
Ezekiel21:23 Chule akihahsel ho dinga, amitmuva aisan lhem banga kilang ding; ahia amaho chu kaimanga aum theina dinguva, aman akhan gitlounao ageldoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel21:24 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; nanghon nathemmonao geldoh-a naumsah kit jeh uva, hiche-a chu nasuhkhel nahou kihedoh-a, nabol jouseuva nachonset nao kilanga ahitai: Nangho geldoh-a nahung umtah jeh-un, khutna kaija umding nahitaove, tia kasei ahi." 
Ezekiel21:25 Chule nang miboh khanggilou Israelte pipuipa, khansetnan kingahna aneiphatna, nanikho hung lhunga ahitai." 
Ezekiel21:26 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, nalal delkop chu ladoh-in lang, nalal lukhuh hohdoh-in; hichehi angai banga umjing louding ahi: anema chu choisangin lang, asanga chu sunemin." 
Ezekiel21:27 Keiman hichu kalekhup ding, kalekhup ding, kelekhu ding; achang dingdol hungkahsea umkit talou ding ahi, chule keiman hichu ama kapehdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel21:28 Chule mihem chapa, nangma gaovinlang seijin, Pakai Pathen'in Ammon chilhah mite thudolle, amaho seisetna thudola hitihin aseije: Nangmatah in seijin, Chemjam, chemjam chu akisatdoh tai, suhmangna dinga kisuval ahin, hichu mithana dinga kinot duljet ahi." 
Ezekiel21:29 Amahon pannabei namupeh uva, doi aithemhon jouva nalhep uva, agilou kithat ho ngonga chuhsah ding nagot laijun, akhansetna houvin kingahna phat ahinnei tan, anikhou chu hunglhunga ahitai." 
Ezekiel21:30 Keiman hichu apaija kakile sahkit dingham? Keiman nakisem dohna mun, napen nagama nathu katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel21:31 Chule keiman nachunga kalunghimona kasunlhah-a, kalungsatna meikou chu nangma lama kamutkhum ding, chule nangma mi engseho le misumang themho khutna kapehdoh ding nahi." 
Ezekiel21:32 Nangma meikouna dinga kito thinga napan ding; gamsung lailung tah-a nathisan longding: nangma geldoh-a naum kit louding ahi: ajehchu keima Pakaiyin kaseidoh ahitai. 
Ezekiel22:1 Chukalvalin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel22:2 Tun nangma mihem chapa, nangman thu natan ding hija, thisan lonna khopi thu natan ding ham? Henge, nangman amanu chu athet umnaho jouse namusah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel22:3 Chule hitin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Amanu phat ahunglhun nadingin khopi hin alailungtah-a thisan ason, amale ama kisuhbohna dingin amato kidouding semthu limho akisemtan ahi." 
Ezekiel22:4 Nangma nathisan nasona-a chu themmo chang nahitan, chule nasemthu limho-a chu kisuboh nahitai; chule nanikho ho jong nakisuh naijin, nakumho jengjong ahung lhungtai. Hijeh-a chu Pathen heloute henga seiset le gamsung jouse totnopna-a kasem nahitai." 
Ezekiel22:5 Nangma kom naija umho le gamla umhon, aminse-a le hesohna-a dim banga nanuisat dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel22:6 Vetan, Israel pipuho, thisan sona thahat neijouse chu nangma-a um ahiuve." 
Ezekiel22:7 Nangma-a chun amahon nu le pate anoiseuvin, nalailung tah-a maljinho asugentheijun, nangma-a chun pabei le meithai chu asulung gimun ahi." 
Ezekiel22:8 Nangman kathil thengho nanahsahpon, kacholngah nikhoho nasuboh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel22:9 Nangma-a chun thisan sona ding thupole ho aumun, nangma-a um molsang ho chunga chun aneuvin, nalailung tah-a chun jonthanhoi abolun ahi." 
Ezekiel22:10 Nangma-a chun apateu sagohkeo hina ahohdoh-un; nangma-a chun numei boh kikoidoh hojong asuboh taove. 
Ezekiel22:11 Chule khatnin a-inhengpa inneipito thet umtah abolun; adang khatnin jonthanhoi thet umtah-in amounu asuhboh tan; chule nangma-a chun adang khatnin asopinu, apa chanu asusen ahi." 
Ezekiel22:12 Nangma-a amahon thisan sonadin thilpeh alauvin; nangman sumthoi nahomin apung nakilah-in, chule nangman papse tah-in suhgenthei tothon na inhengpa-a nalah peh-in, keima neisumil tai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel22:13 Vetan, hijeh-a chu keiman lamdih louva nanalambe hole, nalailung tah-a thisan kisoho chu kakhut kajel khumin ahi." 
Ezekiel22:14 Keiman nangma kabolchah nikho teng nalungsungin athoh jouva, nakhut teni chu hatjou ding hinam? Pakai keiman hichu kasei ahin, chule hichu katohdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel22:15 Chule keiman nangma Pathen heloute lah-a kathecheh-a, gamsungho-a kacheh chao sah ding, chule nanga kona nathenlounaho chu kasuh mangding ahi." 
Ezekiel22:16 Chule nangmatah in nagou chu Pathen heloute mitmu-a nakilah ding, chule nangman keima Pakai chu kahi nahin hetdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel22:17 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel22:18 Mihem chapa, Israel insung chu keima dingin thih eh ahung hitai. Amaho abonchauvin lhum lailung tah-a um sum eng, langva, thih chule ngen ahitaove. Amaho chu dangka eh ahiuve." 
Ezekiel22:19 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; nangho nabon chaova thih eh nahitah jeh-un, veuvin, hijeh-a chu keiman Jerusalem lailung tah-a nangho kachopkhom ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel22:20 Amahon dangka, sum eng, thih, ngen chule langva, lhumsunga achunga mei amutnuva hichu suhjun dinga achopkhom banguva; chutia chu keiman kalunghan nale kalungsatna-a chu nangho kachopkhom dingu, chule keiman chua chu nangho kadalhah den dingu, kajunlhah sah dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel22:21 Henge, keiman kachom khom dingu, nachung uva kalungsatna lhummei chu kamut am ding, chule hiche sunga chu nangho najunlhah dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel22:22 Lhummei lailunga dangka ajunlhah banga, chuche lailunga chu nangho najunlhah dingu; chutengle nanghon Pakai keiman nachung uva kalungsatna kasunlhah ahi chu nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel22:23 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel22:24 Mihem chapa, amanu henga seijin, nangma lunghanna nikho-a achunga go jengjong julou, suhthenglou gam chu nahije." 
Ezekiel22:25 Keipi bahkaijin anehding abotela akitum bangin, amanu lailunga themgaoho lah-a guhthim thilgon aumin; amahon hinna ho aval lhumun, haonaho le thil lutahho alauvin; chuin amahon amanu lailung tah-a meithai tamtah asemdoh uve." 
Ezekiel22:26 Amanu thempuhon keima dan asukeh uvin, kathil thengho asuboh-un; amahon atheng le athenglou akhen pouvin, angim le anen jong akhen pouvin, chule kacholngah nikho ho-a konin amitnu aselmangun, alah uva suhboh-in kaumtai." 
Ezekiel22:27 Amanu lailunga pipuiho chu thisan sodingle, hinna ho sumang ding, chule alamlouva neibe nadingin, aneh dingu bottela ngeihon abangun ahi." 
Ezekiel22:28 Chule amanu themgaoho chu chilminlou leinganin akijutnuvin, pannabei jeng amuvin, jouvin ai asanpeh uvin, Pakaiyin aseilou jongle, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, atiuve." 
Ezekiel22:29 Gamsung mipi ho chun suhgentheina amang chaovin, guchat michom abolun, vaicha le lhasamho chu asugimun; henge, amahon dihlou tah-in gamchom miho asugenthei jiuvin ahi." 
Ezekiel22:30 Chule gamsung chu kasuhmang louna dingin, amaho lah-a khattou apal gending le, kamasanga gam huhna-a aonglaija dingding kanaholin, hinlah koima kana mujoupoi." 
Ezekiel22:31 Hijeh chun kalung himona achunguva kasunglhan; kalunghana meikonga amaho kasumangin; achonnau dungjuija lethuh nachu achunguva kapeh ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel23:1 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung kitnin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel23:2 Mihem chapa, numei ni aumin, minu khat chanu ahilhone." 
Ezekiel23:3 Amanin Egypt'a jonthanhoi anabol lhonin, akhangdonlai lhonin jonthanhoi anabol lhone; hia chun anoi lhon ameh peh-un, nungah theng ahilhona anoimuh hon chu ameh peh-un ahi." 
Ezekiel23:4 Chule amani min chu alenjonu Aholah ahin, chule asopinu chu Aholibah ahi; amani chu keija ahilhonin, amanin chapate le chanuteho anahing lhone. Amin lhon chu hitihi ahi; Samaria chu Aholah ahin, chule Jerusalem chu Aholibah ahi." 
Ezekiel23:5 Chule Aholah hi keija ahi laijin noti'n anapangin, chule amanun aheng akom Assyria miho akingaipin;" 
Ezekiel23:6 Amaho ponduma kivon gal lamkaiho le vaihomho, deichat umtah gal hang sakol chunga tou, sakol touthemho sakol chunga tou ngen ahiuve." 
Ezekiel23:7 Hitichun amanu chu amaho, Assyria lhendoh tum miho, chule akhohsahho jouse chutoh jonthanhoi anabolin; Alim semthuhou jouse-a chun amanu ana kisuboh tai." 
Ezekiel23:8 Amanun Egypt'a ahin kondohpi ajonthanhoina chu apailhadeh poi: ijeh-inem itile amanu chu akhangdon laija amahon ana luppiuva, anungah theng hina anoi teni amehpeh uva, chule ajonthanhoinao chu amanu chunga ana buhlhah-u ahi." 
Ezekiel23:9 Hijeh-a chu keiman amanu chu akingaipiho khutna kapehdoh ahitan, akhohsah Assyria mite khutna kapehdoh ahitai." 
Ezekiel23:10 Hiteho hin amanu sagohkeo chu ahoh lha uvin; achapate le achanu teho chu akilah-un, amanu chu chemjamin athat taove. Chutichun amanu numei lah-a ahung minthang tai; ajehchu amanu chunga thutanlhahna aneiju ahitai." 
Ezekiel23:11 Chule asopinu Aholibah chun hichu amu nungin, amingaina chu asopinu-a sangin akhoh cheh-in, chule asopinu jonthanhoina sangin amanu jonthanhoina chu akhohcheh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel23:12 Amanun aheng akomho Assyria mite, vethoi tah-a kivon lamkaiho le vaihomho, sakol chunga tou sakol touthemho, deidei um gollhangho jouse chu angaichan ahi." 
Ezekiel23:13 Chujouvin amanu suhboh-a auma, anilhona lampi khat ajuihon kanamui." 
Ezekiel23:14 Chuin amanun pasal ho lim banga kitah, Chaldea miho lim bangchunga sanpeh-a kijih-a amu phatnin, ajonthanhoi naho apunsahbe cheh-in," 
Ezekiel23:15 Amahon ataija konggah akigah cheh-un, alu-a delkop hoitah akikop cheh-un, apennau Chaldea gam Babylon miho umdan dungjuija amaho gahvet dinga pipuiho mel pucheh ahiuve." 
Ezekiel23:16 Amanun amaho amit teni-a agahmu mu chun, achunguva ngaichatna aneipai jengin, chule Chaldea gamsunga amaho henga thupo ho asoltan ahi." 
Ezekiel23:17 Chule Babylon miho chu amanu henga ahungun kingailutna jalkhuna alut uvin, amahon amanu chu ajonthanhoinao vin asuboh uvin; chuin amanu chu amahoto suhboh-in aumin, chule amanu lunggel chu amaho-a konin khendoh ahitan ahi." 
Ezekiel23:18 Hitichun amanun ajonthanhoina le sagohkeo ahina ahohdoh tan; hichun kalunggel asopinu-a kona khendoh-a anaum bang bangin, amanu-a konin khendoh-in aumtan ahi." 
Ezekiel23:19 Achutijeng vanginla, amanun akhangdonlai nikhoho, Egypt gama noti'a anakicheplai chu agahgeldoh kitnin, ajonthanhoina ho apunsah cheh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ajehchu amanun adongmaho, atahsao jong sangan tahsa tobang, chule abotwi ujong sakol botwi tobang ho chu angaicha lheh jengin ahi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Hitichun nangman nakhangdon laija najon thanhoina le, nakhangdon laija nanoi teni Egypt miten ameh chu nageldoh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel23:22 Hijeh chun, Vo Aholibah, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Ven, keiman nakingaipiho, nalunggel khendoh-a anaum naho chu nangma dou dinga katundoh ding, chule nangma dou dinga gamkai jouse-a kona kahinpui ding," 
Ezekiel23:23 Babylon miho le Chaldea miho jouse, Pekod, Shoa, Koa, chule Assyria mite jouse toh; abonchauva son umtah gollhangho, gal lamkaiho chule vaihomho, milenho le mi minthangho, abonchauva sakol chunga tou ahiuve." 
Ezekiel23:24 Chule amaho nangma doudinga sakol kangtalai ho, thilpo kangtalai ho, kangtalai kangho toh, mihonpi kiloikhom toh hungkon uva, amaho chun lum le pho, chule thih lukhuh atho uva naum kimvel dingu; chule keiman amaho masanga thutanna kapeh ding, chule amahon amaho thutanlhah dungjuija nachung thu atan dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel23:25 Chule keiman nangma chunga kathangthipna kachuh sah-a, amahon nangma lunghang tah-a nabol dingu; amahon nanah lhongle nabil teni aloilhah dingu, chule nangma-a ahingdoh umnalai chu chemjam'a louding ahi. Amahon nachapa te le nachanute akilahdiu; chule nangma-a ahingdoh amoh umchengse chu meikouvin avallhum dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel23:26 Amahon naponho nahodohpeh uva, chule nasongmantam hoiho nalahpeh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel23:27 Chutia chu nangma amaho heng lama nakhodah louna dingle, Egypt mite jong nageldoh kit tahlou dinga; keiman najon thanhoina chule Egypt gama kona nahinpoh najon thanhoina chu nanga kona kasuhtang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel23:28 Ijeh inem itile Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; ven, keiman nangman namuda ho khutna, amaho jeh-a nangma lungsung khendoh-a aumnaho khutna kapehlut ding nahi." 
Ezekiel23:29 Chule amaho chun nangma thet umtah-a nahinbol dingu, chule nalodoh jouse nalahpeh dingu, sagohkeo le keohela nahinlha uva: chule najon thanhoina le nahuhna chu agoma sagohkeova kihohdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel23:30 Keiman hicheho hi nachunga kabol ding ahi, ajehchu nangma Pathen helouho bangin jonthanhoi nabolin, amaho semthu limho-a chun naki suhboh tai." 
Ezekiel23:31 Nangma nasopinu lampia nachetan, hijeh-a chu amanu khon chu nangma khutna kapeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel23:32 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Nangman nasopinu khon thuhtah le lentah chu nadonjou hel ding, nangma i-sah louva nuisatna chule nahsahmo-a naum ding ahi, hichun tamtah adol ahi." 
Ezekiel23:33 Nangma nasopinu Samaria khon, kidangsahna le thomhaona khona kon, lunggimna le lunghemna nadon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel23:34 Nangman hichu nadonna nachep kanghel ding, chule akhon chu teldeh-a nalha ding, chule na noi teni ngeijong chu naloidoh ding ahi. Ajehchu keiman kasei ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel23:35 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Nangman neisuhmila, nanung lama neipaitah jeh-in, nahuhna le najon thanhoi naho nangman kipohtan." 
Ezekiel23:36 Pakaiyin kahenga aseibe kitnin, Mihem chapa, nangman Aholah chule Aholibah chunga thu natan ding ham? Henge, thet aumnalhon ho chu phondoh pehtan." 
Ezekiel23:37 Amanin jon abol lhonin, akhut lhona thisan aumin, amilim hon hotoh ajonglhonin, chule amanin keima eihinpeh lhon achapatehou jong kahvam sahdin meikong apalsah lhone." 
Ezekiel23:38 Chukalvalin amanin hiche jonghi kahenga abolhone: chule hiche nikho mama chun kamun theng asuboh lhonin, kacholngah nikhoho asuboh lhontai." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ajehchu amanin achateu alim semthu henga athajou lhon chun, hiche nikho mama chun ahunglhonin ka-intheng asuboh lhonin ahi; chule veuvin, amanin ka-insung laitah-a hitichun abolhonin ahi." 
Ezekiel23:40 Chubanin jong, gamlatah-a kona pasal ho ahungna dingun, ahenguva thupole khat nasolhonin; chule veuvin, amaho ahunguvin ahi. Chuin amaho dingin nangma nakisil theng selin, namit teni najemin, chule jephoina-a nakijemin ahi." 
Ezekiel23:41 Chule jalkhun guntah khat chunga natouvin, hiche masanga chun dokhang khat nagongin, chule achunga chun nangman keima gimnamtui ho le thao chu natung doh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel23:42 Chule khohsahna bei mipi honkhat awgin amanu koma aumuvin; chule akhutnuva chao kibuho chule aluchung uva lallukhuh hoitahtah-a kikhuh gamthipma kona Sebia mite chu milham pasal ho toh ahin puijuvin ahi. 
Ezekiel23:43 Chujouvin keiman ajonthanhoi bolna-a tehtasa amanu chungchanga chun, Tun amahon amanu chutoh, amanun amaho chuto jonthanhoi aboldiu vem? kati." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ahijeng vangin amaho chu noti numei khat henga lut bangin amanu henga alut taove. Hitichun amaho numei huh teni, Aholah le Aholibah henga alut taove." 
Ezekiel23:45 Chule pasal chonphatah hon amanu chunga numei jongho chondan dungjui le, numei thisanso ho dungjuija athu-u atan dingu ahi; ajehchu amani numei jong ahilhonin, chule akhutlhona thisan abeh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel23:46 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; keiman mi honkhat amani chunga kahinpui ding, chule amani chu toldoh dingle chomgam dinga kapehdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel23:47 Chule hiche mihonpi chun amani songa ase dingu, chule chemjam'a atha dingu; amahon achapateu le achanuteu athagam dingu, chule a-inhou chu meija ahalvam dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel23:48 Hitia chu gamsunga jonthanhoina kasuh tanga, najon thanhoina lhon chu ajuilouna dinguva numei ho jouse kihilchah ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel23:49 Chule amahon najon thanhoina lhon chu nachung lhona alethuh uva, nalim semthu lhonin chonset naho chu nakipoh lhon ding ahi; chutengle keima Pakai Pathen kahi nahet lhon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel24:1 Avelin, kumko lhinna, alha somna sunga nisom lhinni chun Pakai thu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije." 
Ezekiel24:2 Mihem chapa, nangman nikho min chu jihdoh-in, tuni nikho tah hin jih-in; hiche nikho-a hi Babylon lengpan Jerusalem adoupat ahi." 
Ezekiel24:3 Chule golkehjing insung henga thulem khat seipeh-in lang, ahenguva hitin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Belkhat songin, hichu songdoh-in, chule asunga chun twi jong sunglutnin." 
Ezekiel24:4 Sa halho asunga chun henglutnin, ahal aphalai jouse, apheipi le adahbul ngei chu asunga chun henglutnin; hichu agu phaho-a chun bel chu dip dimin." 
Ezekiel24:5 Gancha hon lah-a konin deilhen ho chu lanlang, anoija chun aguho chu gouvin, chule hichu phatechan honin lang, hichun aguho chu honsouhen." 
Ezekiel24:6 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, thisanso khopi, beltonat asunga umnalai, chule beltonat asunga kona lheidoh loulai chu, ohe ada ahiuve! asunga konin khat khatnin ladoh-in, vang sanin lheng hih-in." 
Ezekiel24:7 Ijeh-inem itile amanu thisan chu amanu lailung tah-a aumin, hichu amanun songpi khat chunga atungdoh-in, leivuija khu dingin tollah alheilhapoi." 
Ezekiel24:8 Chutia chu hichun phula dinga lungsatna ahinsodoh sahna ding, chule amanu thisan chu khukhum ahilouna dinga, keiman songpi chunga kalonsah ahitai." 
Ezekiel24:9 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; thisanso khopi chu ohe adana-e! keiman nasatah-a meikou ahina dinga thing kasetvum ding ahi. 
Ezekiel24:10 Thing sevumun, mei choh kongun, aphe chu phatechan honun, chule phatechan namtui sah-un, chule aguho chu gouvamun." 
Ezekiel24:11 Chutengle hiche sum-eng chu ahungsat doh-a akahtheina ding, chule asunga athenglou chu ajunlhah-a, atonat chu akahvam theina dingin, mei chunga chun belkeo chu songdoh-in." 
Ezekiel24:12 Amanu jouvin akisuchol tan, chule amanu-a konin atonat nasatah chu apotdohpoi; atonat chu meikouva umden hen." 
Ezekiel24:13 Nathenlouna-a chun huhna aumin ahi; ajehchu nangma kasuh thengin, hinla nangma nathengpoi, kalungsatna nachunga kangap kahse-a, nathenlouna-a kona nathen kit louding nahitai." 
Ezekiel24:14 Pakai keiman hichehi kasei ahitai. Hichu hung guilhung ding, chule keiman hichu kaboltei ding, kakinungtol louding, khenjong kakhen louding, kisihjong kisih louding, nalampi ho dungjuile na natohho dungjuija amahon nachung thu atantei dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel24:15 Chujongle Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, aseije," 
Ezekiel24:16 Mihem chapa, ven, keiman namit tenin avetnom chu khatvei jepmin nangma-a konin kaladoh tai; hijeng jongle nangma lungjong nalunghem louding, ka jong naka louding, namitlhi jong nalonlhah sah louding ahi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Kap hih-in, athiho dingin lunghem jong bolhih-in, nalukop nalu-a kikopmin, nakengto teni-a nakengchot kisen, nane jong huphih-in, chule mihem anneh jong nehih-in, ati." 
Ezekiel24:18 Hitichun jingkah-in mipi ho henga thu kaseijin, nilhang kaijin ka-inneipi athitan; chule jingkah-in thu eikipeh bangin kaboltai." 
Ezekiel24:19 Chuin mipi chun kahenga hitin aseijuve, hiche nathilbol hohi keiho dinga ipi ahiding neiseipehlou dingu ham? atiuve." 
Ezekiel24:20 Chuin keiman amaho kadonbut nin, Pakai thu chu kehenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel24:21 Israel insung henga seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Veuvin, keiman kamun theng, nangho nathahat naloupi nao, namitnun avetnomhou, chule nahinnaovin akhoto chu kasuhboh ding, chule nadalhah-u nachapateo le nachanuteu chu chemjam'a loudingu ahi." 
Ezekiel24:22 Chule keiman kabol bang nabol dingu, nanghon namuh-u nahup loudingu, mihem anneh jong naneh loudingu ahi." 
Ezekiel24:23 Chule nalu chunguva delkop nakikop uva, chule nakenguva kengchot nakise uva, nalunghem loudiu kajong nakalou dingu; ahia nagitlounaova nalhahsuh uva khatle khat nakilunghem to diu ahi." 
Ezekiel24:24 Hitia chu Ezekiel hi nangho dinga melchihna ahi; aman abol hojouse dungjui cheh-a nanghon naboltei dingu ahin; chule hichehi ahunglhun teng, nanghon keima Pakai Pathen kahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel24:25 Chujongle nangma mihem chapa, keiman amaho-a kona athahatnao, aloupi naova akipanao, amit teniu deichat, chule amahon alunggelu kingapna-a aneihou, achapateu le chanuteu kalahmang nikho tengle," 
Ezekiel24:26 Hiche nikho-a asohcha chapa chu hunga, nanakhanga nahung jahsah louding ham?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Hiche nikho chule ahung sohchapa henga nakam kihong ding, chule nangman thu naseidoh ding, chule paomo-a naum kit tahlou ding; chule nangma amaho dinga melchihna khat nahung hiding; amahon keima Pakai kahi ahinhet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel25:1 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung kitnin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel25:2 Mihem chapa, Ammon mite dounan namai ngatnin lang, amaho dounan gaothu seijin." 
Ezekiel25:3 Chule Ammon mite henga seijin, Pakai Pathen thuhi ngaijun; akisuhboh laija nangman kamun theng douna-a, chule akamhel laija Israel gamsung douna, chule gal hinga akikai mang laijuva Judah insung douna-a Aha, tia nasei jeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel25:4 Ven, hijeh chun keiman solam mite alo diuva nangma kapehdoh teiding, chule amahon nangma insunga aleng inpihou atundoh dingu; nangma insunga achendetna inhou akisah dingu, amahon naga chu aneh uva chule nanoitwi adontei dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel25:5 Chule keiman Rabbah chu sangongsang ho gena buh, chule Ammon mite ganchaho kolna munkhat kahinso ding ahin; chutengle nanghon keima Pakai chu kahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Nangman Israel gam douna-a nakhut teni nabeh-a, nakeng teni-a nalho-a, chule nalungthima i-sah louna jousetoh nakipa jeh-in," 
Ezekiel25:7 Vetan, hijeh-a chu keiman nangma chunga kakhut kajah-a, chule Pathen helouho henga galthil chom dinga kapehdoh ding; chule keiman mipi lah-a kona kasatlhah-a, gamjousea kona kamanthah sah ding; nangma kasuhmang ding; chutengle keima Pakai kahi nahin hetding ahi." 
Ezekiel25:8 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Veuvin, Moab le Seir jengin jong, Judah insung chu Pathen heloute jouse tobang ahi tia, asei jeh uvin," 
Ezekiel25:9 Hijeh chun, veuvin, keiman Moab khopi jet le vei jouse, khopi sunga gam nomcheh Beth-jeshimoth, Baal-meon chule Kiriathaim-a jong kamhela kalha ding ahi." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ammon mite chu namtin lah-a geldoh-a aumkit louna dinguva, solam mite chu Ammon mite toh alo dinguva kapehdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel25:11 Chule keiman Moab chunga thu katan ding; chuteng amahon keima Pakai kahi akihet dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel25:12 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Edom'in phulah na-a Judah insung douna abola, hatah-a asuhmoa, ama tah-in achunguva phu alah jeh-in," 
Ezekiel25:13 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen chun hitin aseije; Kenjong Edom chunga kakhut kalapma, ama-a kona mi le sa katha gama, Teman kho-a patna kakamhelsah-a, Dedan'a miho chu chemjam'a louding ahiuve."
