Ezekiel25:14 Chule Edom chunga kaphulahna chu kami Israel khutna kangap ding ahin, chule amahon Edom chunga kalunghana le kalungsatna dungjuija aboldingu; chule kaphulahna chu amahon ahet dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel25:15 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Philistine ten phulahna anaboluva, chule taitomna lunggel totho-a malai kihotna jeh-a susehel khop dinga anakiphulah jeh-un," 
Ezekiel25:16 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Veuvin, keiman Philistine te chunga kakhut kajahdoh-a, Cherethim ho chu kasuhtana, twipi panga um amohho chu kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel25:17 Chule keiman lungsa tah-a phosalnaho toh tho-a amaho chunga nasatah-a phu kalah ding, keiman amaho chunga phulahna kachuhsah teng, amahon keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel26:1 Chuin kum somle kum khatna, lhasunga ni masapen nin ahung hitin ahi, Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel26:2 Mihem chapa, Tyre'in Jerusalem douna-a, Aha, amanu mite kotpiho anahisa chu achimlhatai! amanun keilam ahin ngatai: tun amanu kitung thop ahitan, keima kapun theiding ahitai, ati." 
Ezekiel26:3 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Vo Tyre, ven keiman nangma kodou nahi, twipin twi akinon tousah banga, nangma kidoupi dinga nam tamtah kahin toltou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:4 Chule amahon Tyre kulbang jouse asuhsetnuva, amanu insangho asuhchim diu, keiman amanu-a kona vutvai kaphet thenga, chule amanu chu songpi chungvum tobang kaso ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:5 Hichu twipi lailunga lenho kijalna ding mun hung hiding ahi. Ajehchu keiman kaseidohsa ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, chule hichu namtin dinga kivahna hung hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:6 Chule amanu chanute loulaija umho chu chemjam'a kithat gamdiu, amahon keima Pakai kahi ahinhet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel26:7 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; veuvin, lengho leng, Babylon lengpa, Nabuchadnezzar chu sakol ho, kangtalai ho, chule sakolchung touho, chule loi tampile mipi tamtah toh lhona sahlam sanga kona Tyre chunga kahinchuhsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Ama chun loulaija nachanute chu chemjam'a atha ding; nangma douna-a kulpi asahdoh-a, nangma douna-a molsang khat ase sang ding, chule nangma douna-a apho adop sang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Chule aman nakul bangho douna-a gal manchah ho atundoh-a, chule aheichaho-a na insangho aphuh lhuh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:10 Ama sakol ho atambehseh jeh-a amaho vutvai chun nangma nakhu khum ding; mihon kohom akisemuva khopi sung alut banguva, ama nakelkot ahunglut tengleh sakol chungtou mihole, kangtalai kangho, chule sakol kangtalai ho hugin-a nakul bangho chu kihot ling ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:11 Asakolho kengin nakhopi lamlenho achotpha ding; aman namiteho chemjam'a atha ding, chule nagalsat miho umna mun dettahho chu chimlha ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel26:12 Chule amahon nahaonaho chu akichom diu, nakiveinaho anehmanguva, nakul bangho asuhchimdiu, na in nomtah ho chu asuhset dingu: amahon nasongho, nathingho, chule navutvai ho chu twi lailunga akoidiu ahi." 
Ezekiel26:13 Chuteng keiman nalasah ginho kasuhthip ding, chule naselangdah gin chu kijakit louding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Chule keiman nangman songpi chungvum banga kasemding; miho lenthang jalna mun nahiding, sahphatna naum lou ding ahitai; ajehchu Pakai keiman kaphohdoh ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel26:15 Pakai Pathen'in Tyre henga hitin aseije; mahapuho apena, nalai lunga mithiho aumtengle, nangma lhuh ginna chu twikolho kihotlou dingu ham?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Chuteng chule twikhanglen'a leng chapate jouse chu alaltounaova kona hung kumlha dingu, chule asangkhol hou akoidoh uva, akijephoinau avonhou chu asutlhah dingu ahi. Amaho chu kithing thinguva tol lhanga tou dingu, chule amaho tanglou hela kihot hot dingu, chule nangma nadatmo dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel26:17 Chule amahon nangma dinga kala aboluva, hitia asei dingu ahi; Itidana twipi chunga lamlhale miho chenna mun, khopi minthang tah, twipi chunga hattah, amale asunga chengho, akimaitopi jouse tijatsah jeng nangma iti kisuhmang nahi hitam!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Tu-a nangma lhuhna nikho-a hi twikolho chu kihot hot dingu; chule twipi sunga um twikolho chu nadalhah jeh-a lunggim lheh dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel26:19 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; keiman nangma chennalou khopiho, akamhel khopi khatna kahinsem teng; keiman twithuh chu kahinlah touva nachunga kahinlhutna, twi lentah ho chun nahinchup teng;" 
Ezekiel26:20 Chule keiman nangma kokhuh sunga lhalut ho leh, malaija mipi ho toh kapuilhah khoma, kokhuh sunga chelut ho toh thakhatna nangma chenlouna mun nahina dinga, malaija patna anakamdel leiset mun nempena kakoiteng; mihing gama chu loupina kaumsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel26:21 Keiman nangma tijatna khatna kasemdoh ding, chule nangma naum kit tahlou ding ahi; nangma nahung kihol jeng jongle, kimukit louding nahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel27:1 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung kitnin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel27:2 Mihem chapa, Tyre dingin kala gabolin," 
Ezekiel27:3 Chule Tyre henga hitin gaseijin, O nangma twipi lutna laitah-a um, twikol tamtah-a chengho dinga kiveina, Vo Tyre, Pakai Pathen'in aseije; nangman, Keima melhoi chamkim kahi, tin naseije." 
Ezekiel27:4 Nangma gamgi chu twikhanglen lailunga aumin, nasadoh hon nangma melhoi asuchamkim taove." 
Ezekiel27:5 Amahon nakong lhongho jouse chu Senir gamsung chahthingho ngenin asemun; amahon nangma ding kong khom kitung sangpen ho semna dingin Lebanon'a konin cedar thingho alauve. 
Ezekiel27:6 Nakong kheho chu Bashan gangpiho-a konin asemun, Ashur mi kiloikhom hon Chittim twikolho-a kona kipodoh saiha mangchan tongkham saoho nasempeh taove." 
Ezekiel27:7 Egypt'a kona kijempah tupatpon neljet chu nangman nakong ponjal dinga namang chan, Elishah twikolho-a kon pondum le ponsandup chu nangma nakhu-a chu ahi." 
Ezekiel27:8 Nakong tol ho chu Zidon le Arvad'a cheng miho ahiuvin, vo Tyre nangma sunga um na michingho chu nakong tolho ahiuve." 
Ezekiel27:9 Gebal'a upalui hole amaho lah-a michingho chu nangma sunga kong thoibit ho ahiuvin; twipia um kong jousele atol ho jouse chu nasumkol veina thilho najohpeh dingin nanga aumuve. 
Ezekiel27:10 Persia le Lud chule Phut miho chu nasipai le nagalsat miho ahiuvin, amahon nangma lumle thih lukhuh navonpeh-un, amahon namel lomna atahlang uve." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arvad miho chu nagalsat miho toh nakul bangho chung kimvela aumuvin, chule Gammadim miho chu na insangho-a aumui; amahon alumhou nakul bangho kimvel chunga akhaijun, nangma mel hoina achamkimsah-un ahi." 
Ezekiel27:12 Haona tincheng; dangka, thih, langva chule ngen atam jal-in Tarshish chu nangma sumkolveina ahin; nangma kailhang-ah akiveijun ahi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan, Tubal chule Meshech, amaho nasumkol vei miho ahiuvin; amahon nasumkol veina thilho toh mihem le sum-eng kongle bel ho alheh-un ahi." 
Ezekiel27:14 Togarmah insunga kon amaho chu nakailhang munho-a sakol ho le sakol chung touho chule sangan hon akiveijun ahi. 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedan miho chu nasumkol veiho ahiuvin; twikul tamtah chu nangma khutna sumkolvei ahiuve. Amahon nangma saiha, sakiho le thinggai thilpeh-in nahinpohpeh-un ahi." 
Ezekiel27:16 Syria chu nangma thilsemdoh tincheng jal-in nasumkol veipa anahin; amahon khisong eng, ponsandup, ponjem kikhuipah, tupat ponnem, song mantam jolsel le song san joh-in nakiveina munho alouve." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judah le Israel gam chu nangma sumkol veiho ahiuvin; amahon nangma kailhanga Minnith le Pannang suhlouchang, khoiju le thao, chule thingnailou namtuijin akiveijuve." 
Ezekiel27:18 Nangma thilsem tam jal, Helbon'a ju le samul kang nahaona jouseho jal-in Damascus chu nangma sumkol veina ahitai." 
Ezekiel27:19 Dan le Javan nakailhang munho lodingin achesuh achetou lhonin; thih valset, thingle aigeju nakailhanga akimue." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan chu pon lutahho kangtalai ho-a dinga nasumkol vei ahi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia le Kedar pipuiho jouse chun kelngoiho, kelngoi chalho, chule keltah hon nakailhang alouvin; hiche thilho-a hi amaho nangma sumkol veiho hia ahiuve." 
Ezekiel27:22 Sheba le Raamah'a sumkol veiho chu nangma sumkol veiho ahiuvin; amahon nakailhang ho chu song mantam jousele sana in nakailhang ho alotauve. 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kanneh, Eden, chule Sheba sumkol veiho, Asshur chule Chilmad chu nasumkol veiho ahiuve." 
Ezekiel27:24 Hichehohi thil namkim nasumkol veina thilho lah-a pang ahiuve, pondum ho-a, thil kijempah ho-a, cedar thinga kisem, khao hola kikhit, thingkhongho sunga um von lutahho ahi." 
Ezekiel27:25 Tarshish konghon nakailhangah nalachoijun; chule twipiho lailunga nangma nadimset tan, loupitah-a jabolin na-umtai." 
Ezekiel27:26 Nakong tol hon twilen sung nahin lhuttan, solam huipin twipi lailunga nasukehtan ahi." 
Ezekiel27:27 Nahaonaho, nakailhang ho, nakiveinaho, nakong tolho le nakong jap ho, nakong thoibit ho, chule nasumkolveina thil le loho, nasepai gal hat nangma-a umho, nasunga nakiloipiho jousehi, nakisuhmang nikhoteng twipiho lailunga lhalut soh hel dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel27:28 Akimvela miho chu nakongtol ho pen hugin-a kithing thing ding ahiuve. 
Ezekiel27:29 Chule kongkhe tuhho jouse, kong jap ho, chule twipi chunga kongtol ho jouse chu, akonghouva kona hung kumlha uva tolla ding ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel27:30 Chule amahon a-awginu nangma douna-a najahsah diu, lhasetah-a penguva, alu chungvum uva leivui athediu, chule leivui lah-a kilih lelediu ahi." 
Ezekiel27:31 Amaho nangma dinga kivou toluva, khaodip pon akigah diu, lungna tah le lhasetah-a nakapi diu ahi." 
Ezekiel27:32 Amahon kap puma nangma-a dinga kala ahin semuva, nama dinga kala asah dingu, twipi lailunga kisumang Tyre khopi tobang umkha am? tia aseidiu ahi." 
Ezekiel27:33 Nathil semdoh ho twipi ho-a kona akitoldoh teng, mi tamtah nadip dimjin; nahaonaho tamtah le nakiveina thilho chun leiset lengho nahaosahjin ahi." 
Ezekiel27:34 Twipihon twi thuhtah ho sunga nahinsuhset tengule, nasumkolveina thilho le nangma lailunga nakiloipiho jouse lhutei dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel27:35 Twikol gamho-a chengho jousen nadatmo dingu, alenghou kicha lheh jenguva, amaisouva jong lunggim maiso kilang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel27:36 Mipi ho lah-a sumkol veihon nachehsat khum diu, nangma tijat umtah khat nahi-a, chule imatih-a umkit louhel ding nahitai." 
Ezekiel28:1 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhung kitnin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel28:2 Mihem chapa, Tyre pipuipa henga hitihin seipeh in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Ajehchu nalungthim akichoi sangin, keima Pathen kahi, Pathen touna twipiho lailunga katouve tin naseije, ahin nalungthim Pathen Lungthim tobang hisah jongle chun, nangma mihem nahibouvin, Pathen nahipoi;" 
Ezekiel28:3 Ven, nangma Daniel sangin nachingjon, amahon nangma-a kona aseljouvu thilguh khatcha aumpoi." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ven, nangma Daniel sangin nachingjon, amahon nangma-a kona aseljouvu thilguh khatcha aumpoi." 
Ezekiel28:4 Nachihna le nahet themna-in nangman haonaho nakimutan, chule sanale dangka nagouho lah-a nakoitai." 
Ezekiel28:5 Nachihna sangtah jal le nakiveina jal-in nahaonaho apungin, nahaonaho jeh-in nalungthim akichoisang tai." 
Ezekiel28:6 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Nangman nalungthim Pathen lungthim tobang nahisah jeh-in; 
Ezekiel28:7 Ven, hijeh-a chu keiman nachunga gamchom mi namtin lah-a tijat umpenho kahin puilut ding: amahon nachihna melhoi kidoupi dinga achemjam asadoh uva, navah emsel chu asuhboh diu ahi." 
Ezekiel28:8 Amahon nangma kokhuh sunga nasotlut diu, nangma twiho lailunga kithat ho thi banga nathitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel28:9 Nathatpa anga chun, Pathen kahi tin seijin natem? ahinla nathatpa anga chu Pathen hilouva mihem bou nahi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel28:10 Gamdang miho khutna cheptan louho thia nathitei ding ahi: ajehchu keiman kaseidoh ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel28:11 Chubanin jong Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel28:12 Mihem chapa, Tyre lengpa chunga kala bolinlang, ahenga hitin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Nangma chamkimna mahor, chihna dimset, hoina chamkim chu nahi." 
Ezekiel28:13 Nangma Pathen hon Eden'a nana umtan; song mantam jat jouse, songsan, song-eng, song mantam, song engdum, songgel, chule song sanpol, song dum, song engdang, song santhip chule sana in nakitomin; chule nakhongcha le natheile ho akisemdan chu nangma nakisem nikho-a nangma-a kigonga ahitai." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nangma akhukhuma pang thao kinu chu nahin; chutia chu katundoh nahi; nangma Pathen molsang theng chunga nana umin, meisong lah-a nachesuh nachetou vin ahi." 
Ezekiel28:15 Nangma nakisemdoh nikho-a pat, nangma-a themona akimudoh kahsen, nalampi ho-a chamkim nanahin ahi." 
Ezekiel28:16 Nasumkol veina thilho tamjeh-in hicheho chun nasunggil chu hunamin adipmuvin, nangma nachonse tai. Hijeh-a chu, Vo akhukhuma pang Cherub, nangma thilboh banga Pathen molsanga kona kapai doh-a; keiman nangma meisongho lah-a kona kasuhmang ding nahi." 
Ezekiel28:17 Nahoi jeh-in, nalungthim akichoisang tan, navah emsel jeh-in nachihna nasuboh tai; keiman tolla kalelhah ding, lenghon navet theina dinguva, a-angsung uva kajam ding nahi." 
Ezekiel28:18 Nakiman chahna-a nakhangitlouna tamtah hole, nakiveina khang gilouho-in, namun thengho chu nasuboh tan; hijeh-a chu nalah-a kona mei kahin kondohsah-a, hichun nakahvam ding, chule naveho jouse mitmu-a, vutvai kahin sosah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel28:19 Mipi lah-a nangma nanahesa jousen nadatmo dingu; nangma tijat umtah nahiding, a-itih-a naum kit louding ahitai." 
Ezekiel28:20 Avelin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel28:21 Mihem chapa, Sidon lam chu maingatnin lang, adounan gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel28:22 Chule hitin seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Vetan, Vo Sidon, keiman kadou nahi, keima nalailung tah-a kaloupi ding ahi; chule keiman amanu chungthu katanna, amanu-a suhthenga kaum tengle, amahon keima Pakai kahi ahetdohdiu ahi." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ajehchu keiman amanu sunga hise, chule akhopi lamlen ho-a thisan kalhalut ding; chule maha puho chu amanu lailung tah-a chemjam'a lamjouse-a athu-u kitan ding; chutengle amahon keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel28:24 Chule Israel insung dinga misunthei lingboh, ahiloule akimvela um amaho isahlou jouse-a kona asunna theiju ling kiti khatcha umtalou ding ahi. Chule amahon keima Pakai Pathen kahi ahinhet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel28:25 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Keiman Israel insung chu ana kithecheh nau mipi ho-a kona kahin khopkhom tengle, Pathen hepha louho mitmu-a alah uva suhthenga kaumding; chutengle keiman kasoh Jacob kapeh amaho gamsunga chu chengding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel28:26 Chule amaho hiche sunga chu bitkeija chengdio, inho akisahdoh uva, chule lengpi honho akibol dingu; henge, keiman akimveluva um amaho i-sah louva bolho jouse chunga thutannaho katohdoh tengle, amaho lung noma chengtei ding ahiuve, chule amahon keima Pakai amaho Pathen kahi ahin het dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel29:1 Kum som channa, alhasomna, nisomle nini lhinnin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije." 
Ezekiel29:2 Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh lam maingatnin lang, amale Egypt pumpi dounan gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel29:3 Seiphongin, chule seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin seijin; Ven, ama vadungho lailunga lum dragon len, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh, keiman nangma kadou nahi, nangman, Kavadung chu keima-a ahin, keima dinga kakisem ahi, tin naseije." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ahin, keiman nakha teni-a ngakoi kabupeh-a, chule navadung ho-a nga jouse chu nalip ho-a kabedetsah ding, chule keiman nangma navadung ho lailunga kona kapuidoh-a, chule navadung ho-a nga jouse chu nalip sunga behden ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel29:5 Chule keiman nangmale navadung ho-a nga jouse chu, gamthipma kaselutna kadalhah ding; nangma gam ongho lah-a naga chuh-a, nangma nakiloh khom talou ding, nakichom khom talou ding ahi. Keiman nangma gamlah-a sahole, chunga leng vachaho henga a-anneh dinguva kapehdoh nahitai." 
Ezekiel29:6 Chule Egypt'a chengho jousen keima Pakai Pathen kahi chu ahetdoh dingu ahi, ajehchu amaho chu Israel insung dinga peng tenggol ana hiuva ahi." 
Ezekiel29:7 Amahon nangma nakhutna natuh uchun, nangman amaho dahbul jouse nasubongin, nabot telin; chule amaho nachunga akingaiju chun, nangman akongbuhhou jouse chu dingjang theilouvin nasubongin ahi." 
Ezekiel29:8 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Ven, keiman nachunga chemjam kahin chuhsah ding, chule nangma-a kona mihem le sahem kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel29:9 Chule Egypt gam chu kamhela agohkeo hung hiding; chule amahon keima Pakai kahina chu ahin het dingu ahi. Ajehchu aman, Vadung chu keija ahin, chule keiman kanasem ahi, tin anaseijin ahi." 
Ezekiel29:10 Ven, hijeh chun keiman nangmale navadung ho kadouvin, chule keiman Egypt gam chu Syene insanga pat Ethiopia gam pumpi geija kamhela agohkeohel kahisah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Mihem koimachan akenga ajot tah louding, sahem kengin jong apaltahlou ding, kum somli sung koima cheng louding ahi." 
Ezekiel29:12 Chule keiman Egypt gam chu agoh-a um gamho lailunga kakamhelsah-a, chule akhopiho chu ahomkeo lah-a kum somli kamhela umding ahi. Chule Egypt miho chu namtin lah-a kithecheh ding, gamho chansoh-a kathe thang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel29:13 Ahijeng vangin Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Kum somli ahung beitengleh keiman Egypt miho chu thecheh-a aumnao miho lah-a kona kachopkhom ding ahi." 
Ezekiel29:14 Chule keiman Egypt sohchana chu kahin lepui kitna, chule amaho chu Pathros gamsung, amaho chenkhum gamsungtah ngeija kakile sahkit ding; chule amaho hichea chu lenggam nemcha hiding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel29:15 Hichu lenggam ho lah-a anempen hiding, ahiloule namho chunga jong ama kichoisang joukit talou ding ahi. Ajehchu keiman amaho chu kasuhnem ding, chutia chu amahon namtin chunga vai ahom kit tah lou dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Chule amaho Israel insung dinga tahsanna umkit taloudiu, amavang amahon ajuigot tengule akhangit lounao geldohna bep hidingu ahitai. Chutengle amahon keima Pakai Pathen kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel29:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, kum somni le sagi lhinna lha masapen, alhasunga nimasa pen ni chun Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel29:18 Mihem chapa, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in Tyre dounan agalmiho natoh lentah anatohdoh sah-in; Luchang takip chu veltolin aumtan, chule lengkou takip akoh-in ahi. Ahijeng vangin ama ahin, agalsat miho ahiuvin, Tyre'a konin hiche douna-a anatohnauva hin tohman asangpouvin ahi." 
Ezekiel29:19 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Ven, keiman Egypt gam chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar henga kapeh ding; aman ahaonaho jouse chu alahding, galthil achomding, chule achomgam helding; hicheho chu agalmiho dinga thaman hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel29:20 Keiman atohman dinga Egypt gam chu ama kapeh ahitai, ajehchu keima dinga na eitoh peh-u ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel29:21 Chuche nikho tengchule keiman Israel insung ki chu kadondoh sah ding, nangma amaho lailung tah-a paodoh jouna kapeh ding; chule amahon keima Pakai kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:1 Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung kitnin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel30:2 Mihem chapa, gaovinlang seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Ohe hiche nikho chu adana-e!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Nikho chu ahung naitai, Pakai nikho ngei chu ahung naitai, hichu meikai nikho hiding, Pathen helouho phat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:4 Chule Egypt chunga chemjam hung lhung ding, chule akithat ho Egypt'a alhuhgem phat teng, Ethiopia sunga thohnatna nasatah hung umdoh ding, chule amahon amanu mitampi ho chu alahmang uva, akibulphu naochu kisuchim ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:5 Ethiopia, Libya le Lydia, chule mipi choplopho jouse, Chub, chule gamsunga miho apangkhomho chu, amahotoh chemjam'a lhukhom dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:6 Pakaiyin hitihin aseije, Egypt tuhdet hojong chu lhutei ding; chule amanu kiletsahna athaneina chu lhasuh ding ahi: Syene insanga kona amaho hia chu chemjam'a loudiu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel30:7 Chule akamhel gamho lailunga amaho kamhel diu, chule akhopihou chu agohkeosa khopiho lailunga umding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel30:8 Chule keiman Egypt gamsunga mei kati-a, chule apanpiho jouse kahin suhmang tengle; amahon keiman Pakai kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:9 Hiche nikho chule mikituplou Ethiopia mite kichatsahna dinga, keija kona thupole ho kong inneija chedoh diu, chule Egypt nikho-a banga, thohnatna nasatah hunglhung ding ahi; ajehchu ven, hunglhung ding ahitai." 
Ezekiel30:10 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Keiman Egypt mihonpi jong chu, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar khutna katansah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:11 Amale aumpi mite, namtin lah-a kichat umtahho chu gamsung sumang dinga kapuilut ding, amahon Egypt douna-a achemjamu aloidoh uva, gamsung chu mithi adip dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:12 Chule keiman vadungho kakansah-a, agam chu migilouho khutna kajohdoh ding; chule agam chu asunga umho toh, gamdang miho khutna agoh-a kalha ding ahi; Pakai keiman hichu kaseidoh ahitai." 
Ezekiel30:13 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keiman lim semthuho jong kasuhset ding, chule Noph gama amilimhou kasuhbei ding; chule Egypt gam pipui kiti chu umkit talou ding ahi. Chule Egypt gamsunga tijatna kachuhsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:14 Pathros chu agoh-a kakoija, Zoan gamsung meija kahal ding, chule No khopi-a thu katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Chule keiman kalungsatna chu Egypt thahatna Sin chunga kasunlhah-a; No mite tampiho chu kasuhbei ding ahi. 
Ezekiel30:16 Chule keiman Egypt meija kahal ding; Sin'in nat genthei athoh ding, No chu kehso-a umding, Noph'in nitina gimgenthei naho anei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:17 Aven le Pibeseth'a gollhangho chu chemjam'a lou dingu, hiche khopiho hi sohchanga cheding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel30:18 Egypt namkoljon ho kavohboh teng, Tehaphnehes'a jong nisa thim ding; chule alungtahna thahat chu kisubei ding; amanu vang chu meibolin tomintin, achanute sohchanga chediu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:19 Hitia chu Egypt sunga thutanna kabol ding, chuteng amahon keima Pakai kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:20 Chule kum somle kum khat lhinna, alha masapen nisagi nin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel30:21 Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh khut chu kahehbong tai; chule ven, hichu adamdoh dinga kitom kitlou ding, akanjang nadinga molbong kimang louding, akhutchu chemjam tuhkit thei dinga kihatsah louding ahitai." 
Ezekiel30:22 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Ven, keiman Egypt lengpa Pharaoh kadouvin, chule aban janga aban thahat kasuhboh kit ding; chule akhutna kona chemjam kalhah mangsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Chule keiman Egypt miho chu namtin lah-a kathecheh-a, gam jouse-a kathe thang ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:24 Chule keiman Babylon lengpa ban teni kahatsah-a, kachemjam akhutna kakoi ding; amavang keiman Pharaoh ban teni kasuhboh-a, ama thina khopma mahapuho banga ama anga peng ding ahi." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ahinla keiman Babylon lengpa khut teni kahatsah-a, Pharaoh ban teni lhasuh ding; chule keiman kachemjam Babylon lengpa khutna kakoi teng, amahon keima Pakai kahi ahet dingu, chule aman hichu Egypt gam chunga ajah teng, Keima Pakai kahi ahetdingu ahi." 
Ezekiel30:26 Chule Egypt miho chu namtin lah-a kathecheh-a, gam jouse-a kathe thang ding, chule amahon keima Pakai kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel31:1 Chule kum somle kum khat lhinna, lha thum channa, alhasunga nikho masapen nin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, aseije." 
Ezekiel31:2 Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh le amihonpi henga seipeh-in, Nalet na-a hi koito nakibah em?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ven, Assyria chu Lebanon'a um cedar thing ahin, abahho ahoija hoi, gam manglah limsah jou, chule sangtah ahin; ajihhui chu abahho jouse sangin asangjon ahi." 
Ezekiel31:4 Twiho chun lentah ahisah ahin; leinoi'a twihon sangtah ahisah-a aphung kimvela chu avadung lenho longkimvela, chule gamlah thingphung jouse-a dinga avadung neoho alon sah ahi." 
Ezekiel31:5 Hijeh chun asan chu gama thingphung ho jouse chungvuma akitung sangin, chule abohho jong apungin, twi atam jeh-in abahho ahung kikapdoh phatnule asaotheijun ahi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Chunga leng vacha jouse aboh lah-a abusan; chule abahho noija chun gamsa jousen nou aneijun, chule alim noija chun namlenho jouse achenguve." 
Ezekiel31:7 Abahho saona chun aloupina chu aletna-a amel lomsah-e: ajehchu ajung chu twilenho panga kikho ahi. 
Ezekiel31:8 Pathen hon sunga cedar thingphung hon ama aseljoupoi: chahthingho chu ama bahho tobang ahipon, belkanho jong ama bahho tobang ahipon; Pathen hon sunga thingphung khatcha jong ama tobanga hoi aumpoi." 
Ezekiel31:9 Eden'a thingphung jouse, Pathen hona kehho chun ama athang thipna dingun, keiman abah tamtah-a chun thingphung chu kasem hoijin ahi." 
Ezekiel31:10 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Nangma sangtah-a nakidop sanga, abah bit lah-a alehhui akikhodoh-a, asanna-a chu alungsung akichoi sang jeh-a;" 
Ezekiel31:11 Hijeh-a chu keiman Pathen helou thaneitah khat khutna ama kapehdoh ahin; ama chun tahbeh-a ama abolset ding ahi. Keiman ama chu agitlouna jeh-a kadeldoh ahitai. 
Ezekiel31:12 Chule gamdang miho, namtin lah-a tijat umchun ama asuhmanga, adalhah ahitai: molsang ho chungle phaicham jouse-a abahho jouse alhatan, chule abahkai hochu gamsung vadungho jousen asubongtan, chule leiset mite jouse alima konin apotdoh-un, adalha taove." 
Ezekiel31:13 Ama manthah na chunga chu chungleng vacha jouse umden ding, chule gamsa jouse chu abahho chunga chu umding ahi." 
Ezekiel31:14 Khonung le twiho panga thingphung ho jouse atunu asan vanga akichoisang louna diu, alehhui ju abahhou chunga adodoh louna ding, twi dona thingphung jouse hichan geija chu asanlouna dinga chutia chu uma ahi. Amaho leiset noilama kumsuh-a mihem chate lah-a kokhuh-a kumlha ho toh abonuva thina-a thakhatna kipelutna ahitaove." 
Ezekiel31:15 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Ama thikholkhul sunga akumlhah ni chun kalunghemin ahi. Amaho dingin twi thuhlai kanakhu khumin, twi sohlai kanatuh tangin, twilen tahtah ho akitingden tai. Chule keiman ama dingin Lebanon kalunghem sah-in, gama thingphung jouse ama dingin angoilha-un ahi." 
Ezekiel31:16 Keiman ama kokhuh sung lut ho toh thikholkhula kalelut tha phat chun, ama lhuh ginin nampiho kakithinsah-in; Eden'a thingphung jouse, Labanon'a thingphung pha jouse, chule twi don jouse chu, leiset noilam gambehho-a lhep lungmonga umding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel31:17 Amaho jong chu amatoh thakhatnin chemjam'a kithatsaho henga thikhol khul'a akumsuh-un; chule amaho chu ama khutna pangho, Pathen helou lah-a ama le-lima chengho ahiuve." 
Ezekiel31:18 Eden'a thingphung hoitah ho lah-a hoichepen tochu nangma loupi le letna toh kibang am? hijeng jongle nangma Eden'a thingphung ho toh leiset noilama pohlhah-a naum ding; nangma cheptan louho lailung tah-a chemjam'a kithat ho toh nalup ding ahi. Hichehi Pharaoh le amihonpi jouse chu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel32:1 Chuin kum somle kumni, lha somle lhani channa, alhasunga nikho masapen nin ahitin ahi, Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, aseije." 
Ezekiel32:2 Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh dingin kala bolin lang, ahenga seipeh-in, Nangma nampiho keipi bahkai chal donglai tobang nahin, twipi noija ngapi tobang nahi: nangma na vadunglen hotoh nahung doh-in, nakengin twiho chu nachoh lingin, chule avadunglen hou nasuneh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel32:3 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Hijeh-a chu keiman nangma chunga mihonpi toh kalen kahinkhu ding, amahon nangma kalen sunga nahin kaidoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel32:4 Chuteng keiman nangma tolla kadalha-a, gam onga kapaidoh ding, chule keiman chungleng vacha jouse nachunga kachuh sah-a, leiset pumpi-a gamsa jouse vahna-a kanei ding nahi." 
Ezekiel32:5 Chule keiman molsang chungho-a natahsa kalupsah ding, chule phaicham ho chu nalongin adip ding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:6 Keiman natwi japna gamsung chu molsang ho geija nathisana kachap ding; chule vadungho chu nangma-a dim ding ahi. 
Ezekiel32:7 Chule keiman nangma kapuidoh tengle, van chu kakhu khuma, ahsi ho chu kathimsah ding; nisa meiloma kakhu-a, lhathah-in jong avah asodohsah louding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:8 Van'a vahho jousen nachunga thim ajinsah ding, nagamsunga thimjing ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel32:9 Keiman namtinho lah-a, nangman nanahet khahlou gamsungho-a nangma suhmangna kahin lhunsah teng, mihem tamtah kalungjin sah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:10 Henge, keiman mihem tamtah chu nangma kadatmosah-a, chule alenghou jong a-anguva kachemjam kapei tengle, nangma jeh-a hatah-a tija dingu; chule nalhuh nikhoteng chule amitakip ama amacheh hinkho dinga aphat tina kithing thing dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel32:11 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, Babylon lengpa chemjam chu nachunga hung chuding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:12 Galhat ho chemjam'a namihonpi chu abonchauva, namtinin akichat penhou chu kalhuhsah gamdiu; amahon Egypt mite hoithona asuhbeijuva, chua mihonpi chu asuhmanghel diu ahi." 
Ezekiel32:13 Keiman atuilen pangho-a sahem jouse kasuhmang ding; mihem kengton jong achotneh tahlou ding, sahem kengphangin jong achotneh tahlou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:14 Chuteng keiman atuiho kathuhsah-a, avadunghou chu thao banga kalonsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel32:15 Keiman Egypt gam chu agoh-a kahinlha-a, agam sunga dimsetna um thiljouse kalahdohpeh-a kasuh lamvaija, keiman chuche sunga chengho jouse kathagam tengle, amahon keima Pakai kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel32:16 Hichehi alunghempi dingu lunghemna chu ahi: namtin chanuten amanu alunghempi dingu: amaho amanu dinga lunghemdiu, Egypt dinga jong chule amanu mihonpi jouse dinga jong lunghemdiu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseijin ahi." 
Ezekiel32:17 Hitijong hin kum somle kumni lhinna, alhasunga nisom le ninga ni chun ahung hitin, Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel32:18 Mihem chapa, Egypt mihonpi ho dingin pengin, chule amaho ahin, amanu tahngei jong, chule nampi minthangho chanute chutoh, kokhuh-a chelut ho toh, leinoi gamleiset lama seplut khomtan." 
Ezekiel32:19 Melhoina-a nangman koi nakhokhel em? kumsuh-in lang, cheptan louho toh lumkhom tan." 
Ezekiel32:20 Amaho chu chemjam'a kithatsaho lah-a lhudiu, amanu chemjam'a kipedoh ahitai; amanu le amilhonpi jouse loilutnin." 
Ezekiel32:21 Mihat ho lah-a mihatpa chun thikholkhul lailunga kona, ama anakithopiho chutoh ama thu aseidiu: amaho akumsuh-un, chemjam'a kithat cheptan louho toh alumtaove, atidiu ahi." 
Ezekiel32:22 Asshur le amanu loiho hia chun aumun; amapa lhankhuh ho chu akimvela aumin; abonchauva akithatsa, chemjam'a lou ahiuve." 
Ezekiel32:23 Alhankhuhho kokhuh pangho-a aumin, chule amanu loiho chu amanu lhankhuh kimvela aumuve; abonchauva akithatsa, chemjam'a lou ahiuvin, mihing gama tijatna sosah ahiuve." 
Ezekiel32:24 Chuachun Elam aumin chule amihonpi chu alhankhuh kimvela aumun, abonchauva akithatsa, chemjam'a lou, leinoi gama cheptan louva kumsuh ho, mihing gama tijat sosah ho ahiuve: ahijengvangin amahon ajumnau chu kokhuh-a kumsuh ho toh apokhomun ahi." 
Ezekiel32:25 Amahon akithatsaho lailunga chun amihonpi toh amanu chu jalkhun adopeh-un ahi. Amanu lhankhuh ho chu akimvela aumin, amaho abonchauva cheptanlou, chemjam'a lou ahiuve: mihingho gama chu mi atijatsah jeng vangun, amahon ajumnau chu kokhuh sunga lhalutho chutoh apokhomun, amapa chu akithatsaho lailunga chun akoijun ahi." 
Ezekiel32:26 Chuachun Meshech, Tubal chule amanu mihonpi chu aumin; amanu lhankhuh ho chu akimvela aumin, amahon atijatsahnau chu mihing gama asosah jeng vangun, amaho chu abonchauva cheptanlou, chemjam'a lou ahiuve." 
Ezekiel32:27 Chule amaho chu agalmanchah hou toh thikholkhula kumsuh cheptanlou thaneitah ho toh lumkhom louding ahiuve. Amahon achemjamhou akikhap cheh-un, amaho mihingho gamsunga thahat tahho tijatsah hijeng jongleu, akhangit lounao chu aguhou chunga chuding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:28 Henge, nangma cheptan louho lailunga suhgepma naum ding, chule chemjam'a kithatsaho toh nalupkhom ding ahi." 
Ezekiel32:29 Chua chun Edom, amanu lengho le apipuiho jouse, athahat lheh vanguva chemjam'a kithatsaho alupsah naova chu lum ahiuve: amaho chu cheptan louho, chule kokhuh-a lhalut ho toh lumkhom dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel32:30 Sahlama pipuiho abonchauvin, chule Sidon mite jouse, akithatsaho toh kumsuh ho chu chua chun aumuvin; athahat jeh uva tijatna aboldoh-u chun amaho ajumso taove; chule amaho cheptan louvin chemjam'a kithatho toh alumkhomun, chua chun ajumnau chu kokhuh-a kumsuh ho toh athoh khomun ahi." 
Ezekiel32:31 Pharaoh chun amaho amuding, chule amihonpi jouse chunga Pharaoh tahngei le agalsatmi achemjama kithat ho jouse chu lhep lung monga umdingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel32:32 Ajehchu keiman kasuh tijatna chu mihing gamsunga kalensahtan; chule ama Pharaoh tahngei jong chule amihonpi jouse chu cheptan louho lailunga, chemjam'a kithatsaho toh kilupkhomsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel33:1 Avelin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel33:2 Mihem chapa, namite chate henga seijin, Keiman gamkhat chunga chemjam kahin lansah-a, agam sunga mipite chun amaho gamkol sunga mikhat alhendoh uva, chule ama chu amaho ngahtupma atundoh tenguleh, ama chu seipeh in;" 
Ezekiel33:3 Aman gam chunga chemjam ahunglan amu-a ahile, sumkon chu amutna, chule mipi ho chu akiginsah ding;" 
Ezekiel33:4 Chutengle koi hileh sumkon gin chu jana-a, gihsalna donlou chu; chemjam chu ahung lhunna, ama chu alahmang tah-a ahile, ama thisan chu ama luchunga bou chuding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:5 Aman sumkon gin chu jahenlang, ahinla kigin ding anadon tahihle; ama thisan chu ama chunga bou chuding ahi. Ahinla gihsalna anakisanpa chun ahinna akihoidoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ahinla ngahtuppa chun chemjam hunglang ding chu amua, ahia sumkon amutlouva, chule mipite chu gihsal louva auma: chemjam chu ahunglhun tah-a, amaho lah-a khatpen pen chu alahtah-a ahile, ama chu ama khangitlouna-a kilamanga ahitai; ahinla ama thisan chu keiman ngahtuppa khutna kangeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Chuobang chun nangma, vo mihem chapa, keiman nangma Israel insung dinga ngahtup pa-a katundoh nahitan; hijeh-a chu nangman kakama thu chu najah ding, chule amaho chu keija kona nagihsal ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Keiman migiloupa henga, Vo migilou, nangma nathi teiding ahi, tia kasei teng; nangman migilou chu alampia kona akihei mangna dinga nagihsal louva ahile, ama chu akhangit louna-a chu thitei ding ahi; ahinla ama thisan chu nangma khutna kangeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:9 Ahivanga nangman migilou chu alampia kona akihei mangna dinga nagihsala; ahivanga ama chu alampia kona akihei mang loule, ama chu akhangit louna-a chu thitei ding ahi; ahinla nangman nahinna nakihuh doh ahitai." 
Ezekiel33:10 Hijeh chun, vo mihem chapa, nangman Israel insung henga seijin; nanghon, Keiho suhkhel naho le chonset naho chu kachung uva achuh-a, hicheho-a chu kichaipai ding kahiule, iti kahinjou dingu ham? tin naseijuve." 
Ezekiel33:11 Amaho henga chun seijin, Keima kahin bang ngeijin, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije; Keiman migilou thina-a hin lunglhaina kaneipon; migilou chu alampia kona ahung kiheija hina anei dingjoh chu kalungdei ahi. Vo Israel insung, nangho kiheijun, nangho nagitlounahou lampia kon chun kihei mangun, ajehchu ipi dinga nathi diuham?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Hijeh chun nang mihem chapa, namite chate henga chun seijin, michonpha chonphatna chun suhkhel nikho-a ama alhatdoh lou ding ahi. Migilou gitlouna chu ahile, agitlouna-a kona ama akiheimang nikho-a chu chuche jala chu ama lhulou ding; michonpha chu ahung chonset nikhole achonphat vanga chu hing louding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:13 Keiman michonpha henga ama hingtei ding ahi, tia kasei tengle; aman ama chonphatna akisonpi-a, khangit louna abola ahile, achonphatna jouse chu kigeldoh lou ding; ahinla khansetna abol jeh-a chu, ama thitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:14 Chule keiman migilou henga, Nangma nathitei ding ahi, tia kaseipeh tengle; ama achonsetna-a kona akiheimanga, chule danin aphal le adih chu abola;" 
Ezekiel33:15 Migilou chun thil kitung chu alepehkitna, achomdoh chu alepeh kitna, hinkho dan kisem ho-a chu achea, khangitlouna abolda le; ama tahbeh-a hingtei ding, thilou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Chonset naho anabolho khatcha jong ahenga kiseipeh louding ahitai. Aman danin aphal le adih chu abol ahitan, ama tahbeh-a hingtei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:17 Hijongle namite chaten, Pakai lampi chu akibangpoi atiuve, ahinla amaho-a dinga chu amaho lampi joh chu kibanglou ahi." 
Ezekiel33:18 Michonpha chu achonphatna-a kona akiheimanga, khansetna chu ahinbol le, hia chu ama thitei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ahinla migilou chu agitlouna-a kona akiheimanga, chule danin aphal le adih chu abola ahile, ama hichea chu hingtei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ahijengvangin nanghon, Pakai lampi chu akibangpoi nati uve. Vo nangho Israel insung mite, keiman nangho nabon chaova khatcheh-a nachonnao dungjuija nathu-u katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel33:21 Chuin kasoh channao kum somleni lhinna, lhasomna, chuche lha ani nga nin, Jerusalem'a kona hoidoh mi khat kahenga ahungin, Khopi chu achimtai, ati." 
Ezekiel33:22 Tun nilhah lamin ahung sohchapa hung masangin Pakai khut chu kachunga ahung kingamin, chule kakam akihon sahtai; chutichun jingkah-a sohchapa kahenga ahung chun, kakam akihongin, paomon kaum tapoi." 
Ezekiel33:23 Chujouvin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel33:24 Mihem chapa, Israel gam agohkeosa loho chun aseijun, Abraham chu khat ahin, aman agam chu gouva analo ahin; ahinla keiho tampi kahiuvin, gamsung hi keihon gouva kalodiuva eikipeuva ahi, atiuve." 
Ezekiel33:25 Hijeh chun amaho henga seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Nanghon thisantoh naneh thaovin, chule namilim semthu-u henglam namitnun nagah veuvin, thisan nasouvin; achutile gam chu nalo dingu hinam?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Nangho nachemjam chunguva nakisong un, thet umtah natong doh-un, chule amitakipmin a-inhengpa inneipi nasuboh-un; achutile gam chu nalo dingu hinam?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Amaho henga nangman hitihin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keima kahinjing bangin, tahbeh-in akisuse gamsungho-a umho chu chemjam'a lhutei dingu, chule koihile gam onga uma chu keiman gamsaho vallhum dinga kapeh ding, chule kulpihole song kohom sunga umho chu hise-a thitei ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ajehchu keiman agam chu hatah-a kasuh kamhel ding, chule amanu hoithona chu kasuhtang ding; chule Israel molsang ho chu kamhel ding, koiman apalpa louding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel33:29 Chutengle keiman amahon atohdoh-u thet umtahho jouse jeh-a, agam chu kamhela kalha teng; amahon keima Pakai kahi chu ahinhet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel33:30 Chujongle, nangma mihem chapa, namite chate chun bang panghole in kot ho sunga nangma dounan akihoulimun, chule khatnin khat henga, amitakipmin asopipa henga, Hungin, nahenga katao ahi, Pakaiya kona hungsoh doh thu chu ipi ahi hung jatemin, akitiuvin ahi." 
Ezekiel33:31 Chule amaho nahenga mipi ho hung bangin ahungun, chule amaho kamite bangin namasanga atouvun, chule nathuseidoh ho angaijun, ahinla amahon hicheho chu abol loudiu ahi. Ajehchu amahon akam sungun hatah-in ngailutna avetsah-un, ahinla alungsunghou chu apapsetnao lama achegam tan ahi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Chule vetan, nangma amaho-a dingin aw ngeitah neija, la ngeitah sa-a, chule tumging phatah-a tumthei tobangbou nahije; ajehchu amahon nathuseiho angaijun, ahinla hicheho chu abol pouve." 
Ezekiel33:33 Chule hichehi ahunglhun tengle, (ven hichehi hunglhung tei ding ahi,) chuteng amahon amaho lah-a themgao khat anaume ti ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel34:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel34:2 Mihem chapa, Israel kelngoi chingho dounan gaothu seijin, gaovin lang amaho henga hitin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in kelngoi chingho henga hitihin aseije; Israel kelngoi chingho amahole amaho kivahho chu Ohe adau ahi! kelngoiching ho chun kelngoiho chu avah dingu hilouham?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Nanghon athaothao nane uvin, chule amuluva chun nangho le nangho nakivon un, alah uva athao thao nathat uvin; hinlah kelngoi hon chu navah pouve." 
Ezekiel34:4 Veise-a nathahatsah pouvin, adamlouva nasudam pouvin, akisukhaho jong natompouvin, akinomangho jong nahin lepui kit pouvin, amanga jong nagahol pouvin; ahinla hunam le engsetnin vai nahomjiuve." 
Ezekiel34:5 Chule amaho kelngoi ching umlou jeh-in achehchau uvin; achehchau phatnun, gama gamsaho jouse anneh ahunghi taove." 
Ezekiel34:6 Kakelngoite molsang ho jouse le lhangsang tin chunga avahle taove: henge, ka kelgnoi hon chu leichung jouse-a akithe thangun, amaho chu gahol le-a gamudoh-a koimacha aumpoi." 
Ezekiel34:7 Hijeh chun, nangho kelngoiching ho, Pakai thusei ngaijun;" 
Ezekiel34:8 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Keima kahinjing bangin, Veuvin, kelngoi ching umlou jehle, kelngoi chinghon ka kelngoi ho ahol loujeh-u, chule kakelngoi honho vah tahsanga, amahole amaho akivahjoh jeh-un; kakelngoi honho gamsa tincheng anneh le anchah ahung hitaove;" 
Ezekiel34:9 Hijeh chun, vo nangho kelngoi chingho, Pakai thu ngaijun;" 
Ezekiel34:10 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije, Keima kahinjing bangin; Veuvin, keiman kelngoi chingho chu kadou ahi; Keiman amaho khutna kakelngoi honho kangeh-a, kakelngoi hon avah naojong kasuhtang ding; kelngoi chingho chu amahole amaho kivahkit louding ahi; ajehchu, ka kelngoi ho chu amaho anneh ahilouna dinguva, kelngoihon chu akamuva kona kahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:11 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Veuvin, keima, keimatah-in, ka kelngoi ho chu kahol le-a, kamudoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:12 Kelngoi chingpan akelngoiho chehchau nikho-a akelngoi honho aholdoh banga; keiman jong ka kelngoi ho kaholdoh-a, meijinle thimjin nikho-a jong acheh chaunau mun jouse-a kona kahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:13 Chule keiman amaho milah-a kona kahinpuidoh-a, gamkaiho-a kona kahin chopkhom ding; amaho gamsung ngeija kahin puilutna, amaho chu Israel molsang ho chung vadungho panga le, mi chenna gamsung mun jouse-a kavah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:14 Keiman amaho chu hamhing phalah-a kavah-a, Israel molsang ho chung chu amaho hongsung hiding ahi. Chuachu amaho hong phatah-a kol uva, Israel molsang ho chung hamhing phatna-a kivahding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel34:15 Keiman kakelngoi honho vah ingting, chule amaho chu kakolsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel34:16 Keiman amangsa chu kahola, anakinomangsa chu kahin lepui kit ding, akeng anabongho chu katom kitna, chule ana-a chu kathahatsah ding ahi. Ahinla keiman athaoho le ahat ho chu kasuhmanga, amaho chu thutan na-a kavah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:17 Chule, Vo ka kelngoi ho, nangho chungthua Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Veuvin, keiman ganchaho le ganchaho kikah, chule kelngoi chalho le keltah chalho kah-a thu katane." 
Ezekiel34:18 Hamhing phatah gah nehchai jenga, hamhing pha nanehmoh chengse nakengtouva nachil dingu chu thil neocha-a nangaitouva, chule twi thuhtah ho-a kona nadon uva, amoh chu nakengtouva nasuhneh dingu chu thil neocha-a nangaitou ham?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Keima kelngoihon vang, nakengtouva nachilu hamhing chu aneh-u ahin, nanghon nakengtouva nasuhneh-u twi chu adonu ahi." 
Ezekiel34:20 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in amaho henga hitihin aseije; Veuvin, keima, keima tah-in, gancha athaoho le agongho kah-a thu katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:21 Nanghon napang hou le nalengkou uva nano uva, chule adamlou jouse gamtina achehchau kah seuva naki houva nata jeh-un;" 
Ezekiel34:22 Hijeh chun keiman kakelngoi honho kahuh doh-a, anchah-a pangkit talou dingu; chule keiman gancha le ganchakah-a thu katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:23 Chule keiman amaho chunga kelngoiching khat katundoh ding, aman amaho chu avah-a, kasoh David ngei jong avah ding; chule aman amaho chu avah ding, chule ama amaho chingpa hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:24 Chule Pakai keima hi amaho Pathen kahia, chule kasohpa David chu amaho lah-a pipui hiding ahi; Pakai keiman hichehi kaseidoh ahitai." 
Ezekiel34:25 Chule keiman amahotoh chamna thulhun khat kasem ding, chule agamsunga kona sahem gilouho kasuhthip ding; chule amaho gammang sunga ihmuva, gamthip sunga bitkeija cheng dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel34:26 Chule keiman amahole kalhangho kimvela munho chu phattheina khatna kasem ding; chule keiman gohong chu aphatcha kajuh lhah sah-a, phattheina gohong hungju ding ahi." 
Ezekiel34:27 Chule gama thingphungin aga ahinsosah ding, chule leisetnin aga ahinsosah-a, agam sunguva bitkei diu; keiman anamkoljon khaovu kasuhtana, soh-a bolho khutna kona kahuhdoh tengle, keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel34:28 Chule amaho Pathen heloute anchah hikit taloudiu, ahiloule gamsung sahon jong amaho abahgam kit tahlou dingu; amavang bitkeija chenguva, koimachan amaho asuh tijat lou dingu ahitai." 
Ezekiel34:29 Chule keiman amaho dinga thingnou minthang tah khat katundoh ding, chule amaho chu gamsunga kelin athagam lou dingu; chule Pathen hephaloute khutna kon jum le ja athohkit lou dingu ahitai." 
Ezekiel34:30 Chutia chu amahon keima Pakai amaho Pathen kahin, amaho kaumpi ji-e ti ahet dingu, chule amaho, Israel insung ngei jonghi keima mite ahiuve, ti akihetdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel34:31 Chule ka kelngoihon, ka hamhing lah-a kelngoihon chu mihem ahiuvin, chule keima nangho Pathen kahi tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel35:1 Chukalvalin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin ati," 
Ezekiel35:2 Mihem chapa, Seir molsang chu maingatnin lang, ama dounan gaothu seijin;" 
Ezekiel35:3 Chule hitihin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Ven, Vo Seir molsang, keiman nangma kadouvin, chule nangma douna kakhut jah-a, nangma kakamhelsah ding nahi." 
Ezekiel35:4 Keiman nakhopihou agohkeova kalha-a, nangma nakamhel ding, chule nangman keima Pakai kahi chu nahet ding ahi." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ajehchu nangman kumkho-a mudana naneijin, ahamset nikho laijun, chule akhangit lounao kichai phatnin jong nangman chemjam thahatnin Israel chate thisan nason ahi." 
Ezekiel35:6 Hijeh chun, keima kahinjing bangin tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, nangma thisan sona lama kagontei ding nahin, thisanin nanungdel peh ding; nangman thisan jong nahot tahlou jeh-in, thisan ngeijin nanung delpeh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel35:7 Hitia chu keiman Seir molsang chu kasuhkamhela, ama-a kona potdohpa le ahung kilekitpa chu kasuhbei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel35:8 Chule keiman ama molsang ho chu ami kithat ho-a kadip ding; nalhangho le na phaicham ho, chule vadungho jouse sunga chemjam'a kithat ho chu lhudingu ahiuve." 
Ezekiel35:9 Keiman nangma kumkho-a kamhela kalha-a, chule nakhopiho chu hungkile kit louding; chutengle nangman keima Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel35:10 Ajehchu nangman, hiche nam teni le hiche gam tenihi keija hiding ahin, chule chua Pakai umnaho chu keihon kalo diu ahi, tin naseije." 
Ezekiel35:11 Hijeh chun, keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, nangma amaho hotna-a namanchah nalunghan dungjuile nathangthipna dungjuija nachunga kaboltei ding ahin; chule keiman nathu katan tengle, alah uva keile kei kakihetsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel35:12 Chule nangman keima Pakai kahi chu nahet ding ahi. Chule Israel molsang ho douna-a, amaho agoh-a um ahitai, amaho suhmang dinga eiho eipeh-u ahitai, tia taitomna thu nanasei jouse chu kanajah ahitai." 
Ezekiel35:13 Hiti chun nakam sungin keima dounan nahoithon, chule keima dounan nathusei napunsah-in, hicheho chu kajasohtai." 
Ezekiel35:14 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Leiset pumpi ahung kipa tengle, keiman nangma kamhela kalha ding nahi." 
Ezekiel35:15 Israel insung goulo akamhel jeh-a nakipa banga, nangjong kamhela kalha ding nahi. Vo Seir molsang, chule Edom mite jouse, nabon uva kamhel ding nahiuve; chutengle amahon Pakai kahi chu ahetdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel36:1 Chujongle nangma mihem chapa, nangman Israel molsang ho henga chun gaothu seijin lang, chule hitin seijin, Nangho molsang hon Pakai thu chu ngaijun:" 
Ezekiel36:2 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Namelma ten nangma douna-a, Aha, khanglui laija mun sangho jeng jong eiho loding ahitai tin aseijun ahi." 
Ezekiel36:3 Hijeh chun, gaovinlang seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Ajehchu Pathen heloute neile gouva pangdingle, thusei ho kam nopna le japi seithanga naum theina dinguva, amahon nangho kamhela nalhauva, chule muntin-ah naval lhum jeh-un;" 
Ezekiel36:4 Hijeh chun Israel molsang ho nanghon Pakai Pathen thuseihi ngaijun; Pakai Pathen'in molsang ho henga, lhangho henga, vadungho henga, phaicham ho henga, ahomkeova moh-umho henga, akidalhasa khopiho henga, akimvela Pathen helouho anchah le nuisat bep hiho henga hitihin aseije." 
Ezekiel36:5 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; tahbeh-a lungthim kipahtah le hatah-a noisena lungthim puma kagam agoulo dinguva amahole amaho chanvou akihoma Pathen helou chidang namdangho le Edom mite jouse douna-a kathangthipna meikonga kasei ahi. 
Ezekiel36:6 Hijeh chun Israel gamsung chungchanga gaovinlang, molsang ho henga, lhangho henga, vadungho henga, chule phaicham ho henga seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; vetan, nanghon Pathen heloute jum na chu napoh jeh uva, keiman kathangthipna le kalungsatna-a kasei ahi:" 
Ezekiel36:7 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keiman kakhut kadomsangtan, tahbeh-a nakimvel uva um Pathen helouten ajumnau akipoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel36:8 Ahivangin nangho, vo Israel molsang ho, nanghon nabah hou chu nahin jam dohsah uva, nagao chu kami Israelte henga nasosah dingu ahi; ajehchu amaho ahung ding koncha ahitaove." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ijeh inem itile, veuvin, keima nangho ding kahin, chule naheng lamuva hungkile heijing ting, chule nangho kaibot le tu-a umding nahitaove:" 
Ezekiel36:10 Chule Israel insung pumpile nabonchao chunga mihem kapunsah ding; chule khopiho chenna hikitna, achimsaho chu kisadoh kit ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:11 Chule keiman nachunga mihem le sahem kapunsah-a, amaho punguva ga ahinsosah dingu; chule keiman nachenna mun lui dungjuija kachensah-a, chule nahung kipat tila sanga phajoa kabol ding: chutengle keima Pakai kahi chu nahet ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:12 Henge, keiman mihemte nachunga kachele sah ding, kami Israelte ngei chu nachung uva kachelesah ding; amahon nangma nahin lo dingu, nangma amaho goulo nahi ding, tua patna achate nasuhmang louding ahitai." 
Ezekiel36:13 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; amahon nangma henga, Gamsung nangman mihem naval lhumin, nanam mihemho chate jouse nasumang tai, tia asei jeh-un;" 
Ezekiel36:14 Hijeh chun nangman mihemho naval lhum kit louding, chule nanam mite chate jong nasuhmang kit louding ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel36:15 Keiman Pathen heloute jum na chu nangma-a um mite kajahdohsah louding, mipi ho seiset jong napoh kit louding, chule nanam mite lhuhna nasodohsah kit louding ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel36:16 Chukal valin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel36:17 Mihem chapa, Israel insung chu amaho gamsunga anachen laiju chun, amaho le amaho deija achonnau le athilbolun hichu anasuboh-un: achonnau chu kamasanga numei athinei laija thenglou bangin anaumuve." 
Ezekiel36:18 Hijeh-a chu gamsunga thisan aso jeh-ule, semthu milim jeh-a gamsung asuhboh jeh uva, achunguva kalungsatna kasunlhah ahin;" 
Ezekiel36:19 Chule keiman amaho Pathen heloute lah-a kathecheh-in, chuin gamdangho-a anakithe thangun ahi. Achonnau dungjuile anatoh-u dungjuija athu-u katan ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:20 Chule amaho achenna lamu, Pathen helouho gamsunga alut phatnun, chumuna miho chun amaho henga, Amahohi Pakai mite ahiuvin, ahivangin ama gamsunga kona potdoh ahitaove, ati tengule kamin theng asuboh-un ahi." 
Ezekiel36:21 Ahinla achena lam jouseuva, Pathen heloute lah-a asuhboh-u kamintheng chu khotona kaneijin ahi." 
Ezekiel36:22 Hijeh chun Israel insung henga seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Hichehi nangho jala kabol ahipoi, ahinla vo Israel insung, nangho Pathen helouho lah-a nache nalam channuva nasuh boh-u kamintheng jala kabol ahi." 
Ezekiel36:23 Chule Pathen helou lah-a kisuboh, nanghon amaho lah-a nasuhboh-u, kamin loupitah chu kasuhtheng ding; chule Pathen helouho mitmu-a keima nangho-a suhtheng kahi tengle, Pathen hephalouhon Pakai Pathen kahi ahet dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ajehchu, keiman nangho Pathen helouho lah-a kona kapuidoh-a, gamjouse-a kona kakhop khom ding, chule nagam uva kapuilut ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel36:25 Chutengle keiman nachung uva twitheng kachap khuma, nangho nangim dingu ahi. Nathen lounao jouse-a konle namilim semthu-u jouse-a kona keiman nangho kasuhngim ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel36:26 Lungthim thah kapeh uva, lhagao thah nasunguva kakhum peh ding; chule keiman natahsaova kona song banga tah lungthim chu kalah doh-a, tahsaphe lungthim kapeh ding nahiuve." 
Ezekiel36:27 Chule keiman kalhagao nasunguva kakhuma, kadan kisunho-a kachonsah dingu, chule nanghon kathutanho nanit uva, hichu nabol dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel36:28 Chule napu napateu kanapeh gamsunga nachen dingu; nangho kamite nahiuva, chule keima na Pathen'u kahi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:29 Keiman nangho nathenlounao jouse-a kona jong kahuhdoh dingu: chule changle mim kakouva kapunsah ding, chule nachung uva kel kachuhsah louding ahitai." 
Ezekiel36:30 Chule Pathen heloute lah-a kellhah jeh-a jum na nato kitlouna dinguva, keiman thingphung ga le lousoh ga kapunsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:31 Chutengle nanghon nagitlou nao lampiho, chule nanatoh-u phalouho chu nahin kigeldoh uva, chule nakhan gitlounao hole thet umtah nahinahou jouse jeh-a nangho le nangho mitmu jenga jong nakikidah dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel36:32 Nangho jala hichehi kabol ahipoi, nanghon kihet un, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, Vo Israel insung, nachonnahou jeh-in jahchaovin chule kisudongun." 
Ezekiel36:33 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Keiman nangho nachonkhelna hou jouse-a kona kasuhtheng nikho tengle, keiman nangho khopi sungho-a jong kachensah uva, chule achimsaho jong kisadoh kit ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:34 Chule apal leho jouse mitmu-a kamhel, akamhela um gam chu kilhou kit ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:35 Chule amahon, Hiche akamhel anahisa gam chu Eden hon abang jeng tan; chule agoh-a um le anakamhel chule anakisusesa khopiho chu kul kikai khum le chenna ahung hitai, tia asei dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel36:36 Chutengle nakimvela um akidalha Pathen hephaloute chun, Pakai keiman akisuse munho chu kasemphatna, akamhelsa chu kaphudoh ahi ti ahet dingu ahi. Keima Pakaiyin kaseidoh ahin, chule hichu kaboltei ding ahi." 
Ezekiel36:37 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; keima hiche dingle, hiche hi amaho dinga tohdohpeh ahina dinga Israel insungin eidoh nahlai dingu ahi; keiman amaho chu kelngoihon banga mihem'a kapunsah ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel36:38 Kelngoihon theng tobanga, kut thupi laija Jerusalem'a kelngoihon tobanga; chutia chu agoh-a umsa khopiho chu mihem ahon honna kisudim ding; chutengle amahon keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel37:1 Pakai khut chu kachunga ahung chun, chuin Pakai Lhagaovin eipuidoh-in, chule guho dimsetna aumna phaicham lailunga eikoijin," 
Ezekiel37:2 Chuin alah uva chun eiche kimvelsah len; chule veuvin, chuche phaichama chun gu atama tam aumin, chule veuvin, agoset jenguvin ahi." 
Ezekiel37:3 Chuin aman kahenga, mihem chapa, hiche guhohi ahingthei diuvem? ati. Chuin keiman, Vo Pakai Pathen nangman nahenai, tin kadonbutne." 
Ezekiel37:4 Avelin kahenga hitin aseije, hiche guho henga hin gaovinlang, ajah uva seijin, Vo nangho gu gosaho, Pakai thuhi ngaijuvin." 
Ezekiel37:5 Pakai Pathen'in hiche guho henga hitihin aseije; veuvin, keiman nasunguva haitheina hu kalutsah ding, chule nangho nahin dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel37:6 Chule keiman nachung uva thagui ho kalhuna, phe kahin besah ding, chule nangho vunna kahintoma, nasunguva haitheina hu kakhum ding; chule nangho nahung hin uva, keima Pakai Pathen kahi chu nahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel37:7 Hitichun keima eikithupeh dungjuijin gaothu kaseitan ahi. Chuin keiman gaothu kasei chun, husa khat ahung gingin, chule veuvin ahung gingpoh sotsotnin, chuin guho chu ama ama gucheh-a ahung kisuto uvin ahi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Chuin keiman kaven ahile, veuvin, thajung ho le phe chu achunguva ahung umin, chule vunin amaho chung chu ahin tomtan: ahinla amaho sunga chun haitheina hu aumpon ahi." 
Ezekiel37:9 Chujouvin aman kajah-a, mihem chapa, hui jah-a chun gaothu seijin, gaovin, hui jah-a chun seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Kolning li-a konin hungin, vo haitheina hu, hiche thilongho hi ahin theina dingun hai khumin, ati." 
Ezekiel37:10 Hitichun aman eithupeh bangin gaothu kaseitai, haitheina hu chu amaho sunga ahung lutnin, amaho ahung hingdoh taovin, ahung dingdoh uvin ahile, sepaihon tamtah ahiuvin ahi." 
Ezekiel37:11 Chuin aman kahenga, Mihem chapa, hiche guhohi Israel insung pumpi chu ahiuve; Ven, amahon, kaguhou agolhan, chule kakinepnao amangtai, keiho ahal halla sattel kahitaove, tin aseijuve." 
Ezekiel37:12 Hijeh chun gaovinlang ahenguva hitin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Veuvin, Vo kamite, keiman nalhankhuh hou chu kahona, chule nalhanhouva kona nangho kahung dohsah dingu, chule nangho Israel gamsunga kahin puilut dingu nahiuve." 
Ezekiel37:13 Chule keiman nalhankhuh hou kahin honna, Vo kamiteho, nalhankhuh houva kona kahin puidoh tengule, keima Pakai kahi nahetdingu ahi." 
Ezekiel37:14 Chule kalhagao nasunguva kakhuma, nahin dingu, keiman nangho nagamsung tah uva kakoi dingu; chuteng nanghon, Pakai keiman hichu kasei ahitan, chule hichu kabol ahitai, ti nahet dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Ezekiel37:15 Pakai thu chu avelin kahenga ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel37:16 Chukalvallin, mihem chapa, tenggol khat lanlang, achunga chun Judah le akiloipi Israel chate ding tin sunin; chujou tengle tenggol chomkhat lanlang, achunga chun, Joseph ding, Ephraim tenggol, chule akiloipi Israel insung pumpi ding, tin sunnin." 
Ezekiel37:17 Chule hiteni chu khatle khat jopmin lang, tenggol khat hisah-in, chule hiteni chu nakhutna khat hungsoh lhon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel37:18 Chule namite chatehon nahenga, Hichehi ipi natina ahi keiho neivetsah lou dingu ham? ati tengule," 
Ezekiel37:19 Ahenguva seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Veuvin, keiman Ephraim le agolho Israel phungho khutna um Joseph tenggol chu kalah-a, hiho chu Judah tenggol ngei chutoh kakoikhom ding, hiche teni chu tenggol khat kasoa, hiteni chu kakhutna khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel37:20 Chule nangman achung najih tenggol teni chu amaho mitmu tah-a nangma khutna umding ahi. 
Ezekiel37:21 Chule amaho jah-a seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Veuvin, keiman Israel chate chu Pathen heloute lah-a agachenau munho-a kona kalahdoh ding, chule amaho ningtina kachom khoma, chule amaho chu amaho gamsung ngeija kalhut ding ahi." 
Ezekiel37:22 Chule keiman gamsunga chu, Israel molsang ho chunga amaho chu nam khatna kasema, leng khat chu amaho jouse dinga alengpau hiding; chule amaho chu nam ni hitalou ding, chule lenggam ni-a a-itih-a kikhen kit talouhel ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ahiloujongle amaho chu asemthu-u milimho ningset umtah thilho le achonkhelna houva jong amahole amaho kisuboh talou dingu; anachon setnaova achennao munho-a kona keiman amaho kahuh doh-a, kasuhtheng dingu ahi. Chutia chu amaho kamite hiuva, keima a-Pathen'u kahi ding ahi." 
Ezekiel37:24 Chule kasoh David chu amaho chunga leng hiding; abonchauva kelngoiching khat anei dingu ahi. Amaho chu keima thutan danho-a chonuva, kadan kisunho anitdiu, chule hiho chu atohdoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel37:25 Chule amaho chu keiman kalhacha Jacob kanapehna, napu napateu anachenau gama chu cheng diu; chule hia chu amaho, amahotah chule achateu, chule achateu chate a-itih-a chenguva, kasoh David chu a-itih-a apipu-u hiding ahitai." 
Ezekiel37:26 Chukalvalla keiman amahotoh chamna thulhun kasema, hichu amahotoh a-itih-a thulhun hiding; chule amaho kachensah-a, chule kapunsah-a, alah uva atonsotna kamun theng katundoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel37:27 Kahoubuh jong amahotoh umkhom ding; henge, keima amaho Pathen kahia, amaho kamite hidingu ahi." 
Ezekiel37:28 Chule kamun theng chu amaho lahtah-a a-imatih chana aumtengle, Pathen helouhon Pakai keiman Israel kasuhtheng ahi ahet dingu ahitai." 
Ezekiel38:1 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, hitin aseije," 
Ezekiel38:2 Mihem chapa, Meshech le Tubal vaipo pipen Magog gama Gog lam chu maingatnin lang, ama dounan gaothu seijin," 
Ezekiel38:3 Chule seipeh-in, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; Vo Gog, Meshech le Tubal pipu, ven, keiman nangma kadou nahi." 
Ezekiel38:4 Chule keima nangma ka nungchon kitding, chule nakhalhang teni-a ngakoi kakoija, nangma galsat mihon jouse, sakol ho le sakol chungtouho, galvon jat kima kivonho jouse, lum le pho tho-a chemjam kichoija mihonpi ho chu aboncha keijuva kahin puidoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel38:5 Persia, Ethiopia chule Libya toh pangkhom, abonchauva lumle thih lukhuh tho cheh;" 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer le aloiho jouse, sahlam sanga Togarmah insungmite le apankhom piho; chule mipi tampi tah-in aumpiho." 
Ezekiel38:7 Kigosan umin, nangle nang, nangmale nahenga kikhom naloiho jouse kigochaisan umun, chule nangma amaho ngahtupmin pangin." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ni tampi joule nakivil ding; ninunung lamle, chemjam'a kona kinung puidoh-a, mipi tampiho lah-a kona kichom khom ho chenna mun, sottah kamhela anaum Israel molsang ho dou dinga nahung kon ding ahi; amaho chu namtin lah-a kona kihin puidoh ahin, amaho abonchauvin bitkeichan achengun ahi." 
Ezekiel38:9 Nangma huipi le gopi banga nakal touva nahung ding, nangmale naloiho jouse, chule nangma toh um mihonpi chu agam khujouhel ding meilompi tobang nahidingu ahi." 
Ezekiel38:10 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; chule hung hitiding ahi, hiche nikhotah chule nalungsunga lunggel tamtah hungsoh doh ding, hiche phat mama chule lunggel gilou khat nahin gelding ahi." 
Ezekiel38:11 Chuteng nangman seijin natin, Keima kulpibei khoho-a chetou vingting; mongtah-a uma, bitkeija chengho, aboncha keijuva kulbang bei, kotgolhole kotpiho jong neilouho henga chengting;" 
Ezekiel38:12 Galthil kichomdoh ho ladingle, anchah lading; chule agoh-a anaumsa tu-a mi chenna mun, namtin lah-a kona kichom khom mite chenna mun, gam lailung tah-a cheng, ganchale thilkeo haotahho, chunga kakhut kalap ding ahi nati." 
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba le Dedan chule Tarshish sumkolvei ho, amaho keipi bahkai chal donglai jouse chun nahenga, Galthil chom dinga hung nahim? mihonpi chu thilkeo podinga nakou khom ham? sanale dangka pomang dinga, ganchale thilkeo pomang dinga, thilchom tamtah podinga nahung ham? atidiu ahi." 
Ezekiel38:14 Hijeh chun mihem chapa, gaovinlang Gog henga hitihin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Kami Israelte bitkeija achen nikho tengule, nangman nahetlou dingham?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Chule nangma naumna sahlam gamho-a kona, nangle naumpi mipi tamtah, sakol chungtou cheh, mipi tamtah le galmi hattahho toh kilhona nahungdoh ding ahin," 
Ezekiel38:16 Chule nangma kami Israelte kidoupi dinga, meilhangin gamsung akhu banga nahung kon ding; ninunung lamle hiti ding ahi, Vo Gog, kagam doudinga nangma kahinpui ding, Pathen heloute mitmu-a nangma-a kona suhthenga kaumteng, amahon Pathen kahi ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel38:17 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; malaija keiman kasoh Israelte themgaoho kama kanaseisa, amahon kum tampi nikhoho sunga gaothu anaseiju, amaho kidoupi ding kahinpui ding ahi tia kanaseipa chu nangma nahi louham?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Chule Israel gamsung doupi dinga Gog ahungtengle, chuche phattahchule hung hitiding ahi, kalungsatna chu kamaija hung kilangdoh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ajehchu kathangthipna le kalunghana meikouva kasei ahi, tahbeh-in hiche nikho chule Israel gamsunga nasatah-a tijat umtah ling kihot ding ahin;" 
Ezekiel38:20 Chutia chu twipia ngaho, chunga leng vachaho, gama gamsaho, a-opma tolla kithol ganhing jouse, leiset chunga um mihem kiti jouse chu kamai koh-a kihot hot dingu, molsang ho kisunema, kolho lhanem suh ding, chule kulbang jouse chimlha ding ahi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Chule keiman Gog kidoupi dinga kamolsangho jouse-a kona chemjam kakou ding, mijousen asopi chunga chemjam alap ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel38:22 Chule hise le thisanna athu katan ding; amale ahonho, chule aumpi tamtah ho chunga alonglet jeng gotwi, song lentah ho, meikou, chule kat kajuhsah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel38:23 Chutia chu keima kei le kei kakichoisanga, chule kakisuhtheng ding; namtin vaipi mitmu-a het kahi ding, chule amahon keima Pakai kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:1 Hijeh chun, nangma mihem chapa, Gog dounan gaothu seijin, chule hitihin seijin, Pakai Pathen'in aseije; Meshech le Tubal pipu pen O Gog, ven, keiman nangma kadou nahi." 
Ezekiel39:2 Keiman nangma kanungno kitna, nangma-a um hop gupma hopkhat kadalhah sah-a, sahlam gambehho-a kona nangma nahungtouva, Israel molsang ho chunga kahinpuiding nahi." 
Ezekiel39:3 Chule keiman nakhut veilama um nathalpi chu kajepset peh-a, nathal changho chu nakhut jetna kona kakhehlhah sah ding ahi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Nangma Israel molsang ho chunga nalhuh-a, nangma le naloiho jouse, chule naumpi mipite jouse nalhuh dingu; keiman nangma sahingne vacha namkim le gama saho valhum dinga kapeh ding nahi." 
Ezekiel39:5 Nangma gam ong laija nalhuh ding ahi: ajehchu keiman kasei ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel39:6 Chule Magog chungle twikol sunga olmo louva chengho lah-a meikou kasol ding; amahon keima Pakai kahihi ahet dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel39:7 Chutia chu keiman kamin thenghi kami Israelte hetna kaumsah-a; kamintheng chu amaho kasuhboh sah kit louding ahitai. Chule Pathen helou ten keima Pakai, Israel mithengpa kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:8 Veuvin, hichehi aguilhungin, akitong dohtai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, hichehi keiman kanaseidohna nikho chu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:9 Israel khopiho sunga chengho chu potdoh uva, gal manchah ho, lum le phoho, thalpi le thalchang ho, chule tengpaineiho le tengcha ho chu meija ahaluva, hiho chu kum sagi meija akiti dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:10 Chutia chu gama kona thing achomlou dingu, gamanga kona jong thing khatcha atuhlhuhtah loudingu ahi: ajehchu amahon gal manchah ho chu meija akiti dingu; amaho sumangho chu amahon asuhmang dingu, amahon asuhsethou chu achomgam dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel39:11 Chule hiche niteng chule hung hiti ding ahi, keiman Israel gamsung, twipi solama vahle ho phaicham kiti chu, Gog lhankhuh mundinga kapeh ding; hichun vahle ho lampi ahuh ding, chule chuachu amahon Gog le amihonpi jouse avui dingu: hiche mun chu Hamon-Gog phaicham asah dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Chule gamsung chu suhtheng ahina dinga, lhasagi jen Israel insung chun amaho chu avui dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:13 Henge, agama mipite jousen amaho avui dingu; keima choisanga kaumna dinga hichu amaho dinga minthana nikho khat hiding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel39:14 Chule gamsung suhtheng nadinga, vahle ho to kitho-a gamsung chonchaija leichunga umnalai thilongho holdoh-a vuidinga, natoh-a neiding mi alhendoh diu; lha sagi joule akholpat diu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:15 Chule gamsunga vahle ho mi khat touvin mihem gu amuteng, avui dinghon Hamon-Gog phaichama avui kahseuva melchihna khat atundoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Chujongle chuche khopi min chu Hamonah hiding ahi. Hiti achu amahon gamchu asuhtheng dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel39:17 Chule nangma mihem chapa, nangman chungleng vachate jouse le gama gamsaho jouse henga hitin seijin, Nangho kikhom khomun lang hunguvin; kaganlhaina, nangho ding katodoh ganlhaina, Israel molsang ho chunga ganlhaina lentah kabolna-a, saphe naneh uva, thisan nadon theina dingun, nangho ningtina konin hung kikhom khomun, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel39:18 Nanghon mihat ho sa naneh uva, chule leiset vaipipo ho thisan, abonchauva Bashan'a kivah thaochet kelngoichalho, kelngoinou ho, keltahho, bongchalho thisan nadon dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:19 Chule nangho dinga ganlhaina-a katodoh ganlhaina chu nanghon navaset kahseuva athao naneh dingu, chule nakhamset kahseuva thisan chu nadon dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:20 Chutia chu nangho kadokhang chunga sakolhole sakol kangtalai ho, mihat ho le gal hat ho sa naneh vaset dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel39:21 Chule kaloupina chu Pathen helouho lah-a katundoh ding; chuteng Pathen heloute jousen kathutana kamolso le achunguva kakhut kalhah chu amu dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel39:22 Hiti achu Israel insungin chunikho-a patle akalsea chu Keima Pakai, amaho Pathen kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:23 Chule Pathen heloute chun Israel insung chu akhangit lounao jeh-a gal hinga kikai anahiuve ti ahet dingu ahi. Ajehchu amahon keima dounan asukhelun, hijeh-a chu amaho-a kona kamai kasela, chule amaho chu amelmateu khutna kanapehdoh ahin; chutiachu amaho chemjam'a louva ahiuve." 
Ezekiel39:24 Athenlou nao le asuhkhel nao dungjuija kanabola, amaho-a kona kamai kanasel ahi." 
Ezekiel39:25 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in aseije; tuahi keiman Jacob chu asohchanna-a kona kahinlepui kitna, Israel insung pumpi chunga hepina kanei ding, chule kamintheng dinga katompan ding ahi;" 
Ezekiel39:26 Amahon ajachatnau, keima douna-a suhkhelna-a asuhkhelna hou jouse akipohjou uva, aleisetnuva bitkeija achen tengule, koimachan akichatsah lou dingu ahitai." 
Ezekiel39:27 Keiman amaho mipite-a kona kahin puikitna, amelmateu gama kona kahin chopkhoma, chule nam tamtah mitmu-a amaho-a keima kahung umtengle," 
Ezekiel39:28 Chuteng amahon keimahi Pathen heloute lah-a amaho sohchang dinga pedohpa, ahivanga agamsung tah ngeijuva hin chomkhom kit, khatcha sohchanga dalhah-a umdensah loupa Pakai amaho Pathen kahi chu ahet dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel39:29 Keiman amaho-a kona kamai jong kaselkit tahlou ding ahi: ajehchu keiman kalhagao chu Israel insunga kabuh lhah ahitai, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel40:1 Kasoh channau kum somni le kum nga, alha sunga nisom lhin nikho, khopi suhsetna ahung umjoukal kum somle kum li lhin nikho tah-in, Pakai khut chu kachunga ahung kingamin, chule keima khulama eipuitai." 
Ezekiel40:2 Chuin Pathen'a kon muneinaho-a chun, aman keima Israel gamsunga eihin puitan, chule lhanglam sanga khopi khat bang jeng molsangtah khat chunga eitousahtan ahi." 
Ezekiel40:3 Chuin aman keima chumun chu eilhuttan, veuvin, chuachun alimso sum-eng bang jeng, akhutna tupat khaojang khatle thil tena penglhon khat choi mipa khat anaumin, kotpi-a chun anadinge." 
Ezekiel40:4 Chuin mipa chun kahenga, Mihem chapa, keiman nangma kavetsah dingho jousehi namit tenin ve-inlang, nanakhang tenin ja-in, chule kavetsah ding jousehi nalung gilin ngaiton; ajehchu hicheho chu nangma vetsah ding ngaitona-a nangma hilama kipui nahin; nangman namuho jouse chu Israel insung henga naphondoh ding ahi, tin aseije." 
Ezekiel40:5 Chule veuvin, a-in kimvela chun bang khat aumin; chule mipa chun akhutna thil tena pengmol tong gupma sao achoijin, khatcheh chu tongkhat cheh mihem khut chan chet ahin; hitichun aman in bang sadan chu aten ahile pengmol khat ahin, chule asandan jong pengmol khat ahije." 
Ezekiel40:6 Chujouvin ama solam maingat kotpi-a chun ahungin, chuche kalbiho chu ajot touvin, kotpi phung chu aten ahile, tena pengmol khatnin alenin, chule kotpi phung dang chu pengmol khatma-in alenin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Chule indan neo jouse chu pengmol khat asao cheh-in, pengmol khat alen cheh-in; chule indan neoho kikah chu tong nga ahicheh-in, chule kotpi sungnung hongcha-a kotpi phung chu pengmol khat ahi." 
Ezekiel40:8 Aman kotpi sungnung hongcha jong agaten, pengmol khat ahi." 
Ezekiel40:9 Chujouvin aman kotpi hongcha chu aten, tong get ahin; chule hichea akhomho chu tong ni ahi. Kotpi hongcha chu sunglama aume." 
Ezekiel40:10 Chule solam kotpi indan neoho chu hilam panga thum aumin, chule khulam panga thum aume. Hiche thumho chu akibang cheh uvin; chule akhomho chu alangto-in akibang cheh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel40:11 Chule aman galutna lai kotpi chu availam aten ahile tong som ahin, chule kotpi dunglam chu tong somlethum ahi." 
Ezekiel40:12 Indan neoho maija chun mun ong aumin, hiche chu hilam panga tong khat, chule khulam panga tong khat ahi; chule indan neoho chu hilam pang tong gup, khulam pang tong gup cheh ahi." 
Ezekiel40:13 Chujouvin aman kotpi chu indan neo khat tingvuma patnin adang khat tingvum chan geijin aten ahile, kotle kot kikah letdan chu tong somni le tong nga ahi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Aman kotpi kimvela inhongsung khom gei tah-a chun khom tong somgup jong asemin ahi. 
Ezekiel40:15 Chule galutna kotpi maitah-a kipat, kotpi sungung hongcha mai gei chu tong somnga ahi." 
Ezekiel40:16 Kotpi sunglam kimvela khomho geijin indan neoho-a chun bangkot neoho aumpeh-in, kemho-a jong hitobangma chu ahi; asunglam kivela jong bangkot ho aumin, khom khat cheh chunga chu tumthing aum cheh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel40:17 Chujouvin inhong ponung lama eipuitan; veuvin hia chun indanho, chule inhongsung kimvel dinga kisem keng lampi aumim; indan somthumin keng lampi chu amaingatnin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:18 Chule keng lampi kotpiho panga um ahin, kotpi sao dung juija kilhunga, hichu keng lampi noinung hija ahi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Chujouvin aman kotpi noinung masang lama patnin sunglam inhong ponung geijin avai chu aten, solam pangle sahlam pang gei chu tong jakhat ahi." 
Ezekiel40:20 Chule inhong ponung sahlam nga-a kotpi khat aumin, aman adung le avai aten ahi." 
Ezekiel40:21 Chule chuche indan neochaho chu hilam panga thum, khulam panga thum aumim, chule chuche akhomhole kem kidoho chu adung avai kotpi masapena toh akibangin; hichu adung tong somnga, chule avai tong somni le nga ahi." 
Ezekiel40:22 Chule abang kot ho, kem kidoho, atumthingho chu solamsang nga-a kotpiho to kibang ahi; hichu kalbi sagi-a kaltou ahin, chule kem kidoho chu amasanga chun aume." 
Ezekiel40:23 Chule inhong sungnung kotpi chu solam kotpi banga, sahlam ngat kotpi toh kimai ngat ahin, chule aman kotpile kotpi kah aten ahile, tong jakhat ahi." 
Ezekiel40:24 Chujou phatnin aman lhanglam sanga eipuitan; chule veuvin, chukoma chun kotpi khat aumin lhanglam sanga angan ahi. Chuin aman chuche-a akhomhole kem kidoho chu hiche tenaho dungjui chun aten ahi." 
Ezekiel40:25 Chule hiche sunga chun bangkot ho aumin, chule chuche bangkot ho tobang chun kemkidoho chu akimvela aume; adunglam chu tong somnga ahin chule avai tong somni le tong nga ahi." 
Ezekiel40:26 Chule chua chetouna ding chun kalbi sagi aumin, chule kem kidoho chu hicheho masanga chun aume. Chule chuche-a khomho chunga chun tumphungho aumin, hilam panga khat chule khulam panga khat aume." 
Ezekiel40:27 Chule inhong sungnunga chun lhanglam sang nga-a kotpi khat aumin; chule aman lhanglam sang kotpi phunga pat kotpi phung chu aten ahile, tong jakhat ahi." 
Ezekiel40:28 Chuin aman keima lhanglam kotpi-a inhong sungnunga eipuijin; chuin aman lhanglam sang kotpi chu hiche tenaho dungjui chun aten ahi. 
Ezekiel40:29 Chule indan neoho le akhompiho, chule kem kidoho chu hiche tenaho dungjuijin aten; hiche-a chun bangkot ho aumin, chule akimvela kem kidosangho-a jong chun bangkot aumin ahi; hichu tong somnga asaovin, chule tong somni le tong nga alenin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:30 Akimvela chun kem kidosang aumin, tong somni le tong nga asaovin, tong nga alenin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:31 Chuche kem kidosangho chun inhong ponung lam chu amaingatnin, chule akhompiho chunga chun tumthingho aumin, chule chua gakaltouna chun kalbi get aneije." 
Ezekiel40:32 Chule aman keima solamsang nga-a inhong sungnung lama eihin puijin; chule aman hiche tenaho dungjuijin kotpi chu aten ahi. 
Ezekiel40:33 Chule indan neoho le akhompiho, chule kem kidosangho chu hiche tenaho dungjuijin aten ahi. Chule hiche-a chun bangkotho aumin, chule akimvela kem kidosangho-a jong chun bangkot aumin ahi; hichu tong somnga asaovin chule tong somni le tong nga alenin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:34 Chule chuche kem kidosangho chun inhong ponung lam amaingatnin, chule akhompiho chunga chun tumthingho hilam pangle alangkhat panga aume; chule chua gakaltouna chun kalbi get aneije." 
Ezekiel40:35 Chuin aman keima sahlam kotpi-a eipuijin, chule hichu hiche tena ho dungjuija chun aten," 
Ezekiel40:36 Chule indan neoho le akhompiho, chule kem kidosangho jongchu aten ahi. Akimvela chun bangkot ho aumin, asaodan chu tong somnga ahin avai tong somni le tong nga ahi." 
Ezekiel40:37 Chule khompiho chun inhong ponung lam amaingatnin, chule chuche khompiho chunga chun tumphungho hilam pangle khulam panga aume; chule chua gakaltouna chun kalbi get aneije." 
Ezekiel40:38 Chule indanhole chuche-a lutnaho chu kotpi khomho panga chun aumin, hia chun amahon govam thilto asop uvin agou jiuvin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:39 Chule kotpi hongcha-a chun hilam panga dokhang ni, khulam panga dokhang ni, halvam thilto le suhkhel thilpeh chule suhkhel thilpehho thana ding aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Chule khattou sahlam kot galutna geija achetoule, polam panga chun dokhang ni aumin, chule kotpi hongcha lang khat panga dokhang ni aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:41 Kotpi pang hilam sanga dokhang li, chule khulam sanga dokhang li aumin; hiche dokhang getho chunga chun amahon aganlhaina hou athat jiuvin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:42 Chua chun govam thiltona ding songa kikheng dokhang li aumin, dokhangho chu tong khatle akeh asaovin, tong khatle akeh alenin, tong khat asangin; chuche chunga chun amahon govam thilto le ganlhaina athanajiu manchah ho chu akoijun ahi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Chule asung kimvela chun khutpeh tebep koikaho akilbeh kimvelun, chule dokhangho chunga chun thilto sa chu aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:44 Chuche kotpi sungnung polama chun inhong sungnunga lasaho dingin indanho aumin, khatchu sahlam kotpi panga umin lhanglam angan, chule khat chu lhanglam kotpi panga aumin sahlam angan ahi." 
Ezekiel40:45 Chuin aman kahenga, hiche indan lhanglam maingat hi, hiche in ngahtupma pang thempu ho-a ahin;" 
Ezekiel40:46 Chule indan sahlam maingat hi maicham ngahtup thempu ho-a ding ahi; amahochu Levi chapateho lah-a Zadok chapate, Pakai jen dinga aheng hin nailut ho chu ahiuve, tin aseije." 
Ezekiel40:47 Hitichun aman inhong chu aten, ningli ahin, tong jakhat asaovin, tong jakhat alenin ahi. Chule maicham chu in maija chun aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel40:48 Chuin aman keima houin hongcha-a chun eipuijin, chuin hongcha khom jouse chu aten, hilam sang tong nga chule khulam sang tong nga ahin; chule kotpi chu avai hilam sang tong thum, khulam sang tong thum ahi." 
Ezekiel40:49 Hongcha chu adung tong somni ahin, chule availam chu tong somle tong khat ahi. Chule aman amaho agakaltouna jiu kalbiho-a chun eihin puijin, chule khomho panga chun khompiho hilam panga khat chule khulam panga khat aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Chujouvin aman keima houin'a eihin puijin; chule khomho chu aten ahile, hilam pang tong gupmin alenin, chule alang khat pang tong gupma-in alene; hichu houbuh letdan chu ahi." 
Ezekiel41:2 Chule kotvai chu tong som ahin, chule kot pangho chu hilam sang tong nga, chule khulam sang tong nga ahi. Chule aman adung aten tong somli ahin chule avai tong somni ahi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Chuin ama asunga alutnin, kotkhom chu aten, tong ni ahin; chule kotkhah chu tong gup ahin, chule kot vailam chu tong sagi ahi." 
Ezekiel41:4 Chuin aman adunglam aten ahile, tong somni ahin; chule avai lam chu tong somni ahi. Chule aman kahenga, hichehi muntheng chungnung pen chu ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel41:5 Chujouvin aman houin bang chu aten, tong gup ahin; chule indan pang jouse vailam, inpang jouse kimvel chu tong li cheh ahi." 
Ezekiel41:6 Chule apanga indanho chu songthum ahin, khat chunga khat kisa, songkhat cheh-a chun dan somthum aumin ahi. Chule hicheho chu adet theina dingin in kolkhum soh-a panga indanho bang chutoh akisumatne; ahivangin a-in bangto vang akisumat pon ahi." 
Ezekiel41:7 Chule hiche indanho chu asancheh cheh phatchun apanga indanho chu akisulenin ahi; ajehchu inpanga lampi kihehtou chu achunglam peh geija a-in kimvela achedoh peh-in, hijeh chun a-in letdan chu asancheh chehle alet beben indan noinung pena patnin indan lailha le indan chungnung pen geijin alet beben ahi." 
Ezekiel41:8 Chule keiman a-in sandan jong chu kamun; indanho pang inbulho chu pengmol lhon tong gup lhingset ahi. 
Ezekiel41:9 Indan ponung panga bang sadan chu tong nga ahin, chule akidalha chu sunglama um indanho panga mun chu ahi." 
Ezekiel41:10 Chule a-in kimvel jousele indanho kikah-a chun mun ong tong somni-a len aume. 
Ezekiel41:11 Chule indan pang kot ho chun akisei mun onglai chu amaingatnin, kotkhat nin sahlam, kot dang khatnin lhanglam angan ahi. Chule akidalha mun availam chu akimvel tong nga ahi." 
Ezekiel41:12 Tun mun kikhendoh masanga, lhumlam pang maingatna in kisa chu aletdan tong somsagi ahin, chule a-in bang kimvel chu tong nga-in asan, chule adung chu tong somko ahi." 
Ezekiel41:13 Hitichun aman houin chu aten, tong jakhat asaovin, chule mun kikhendoh le in kisa abangho jong tong jakhat asaovin;" 
Ezekiel41:14 Chujongle houin mailam letdanle, solam sanga mun kikhendoh letdan chu tong jakhat ahi."
