Ezekiel41:15 Chuin aman innung lama um, mun kikhendoh jonna in kisa chu adunglam aten, hilam pang le khulam panga indanho kem kidosangho, houin sungnung le ahongsunga kempum," 
Ezekiel41:16 Kot khomho le bangkot neoho chan gei chu tong jakhat ahi. Chule kot jonna um kem kidosang dan thum chu tolla pat bangkot ho geijin thingpeh-in akikhenbeh-in; bangkot ho chu," 
Ezekiel41:17 Kot chunglama pat indan sungnung le ponung changei, chule akimvela bang jouse apolam le asunglam abona kite-a ahi." 
Ezekiel41:18 Chule hiche chu Cherub hole tumthinga kisem ahin, Cherub le cherub kikah-a tumthing umah ahi. Cherub jouse chun mai ni cheh aneijun," 
Ezekiel41:19 Chutichun mihem maiso pu-a chun tumthing lampang amaingatnin chule keipi bahkai chal khangdong maiso pu-a chun achom langkhatna tumthing lam chu amaingatnin ahi; chutia chu houin pumpi kimvel chu kisema ahi. 
Ezekiel41:20 Houin bang chung chu, tolla patna kotchung geija Cherub ho le tumthingho lim kisema ahi." 
Ezekiel41:21 Houin khomho chu ningli kitohchet ahin, chule muntheng mai chu khat limso chu adang khat limso tobang cheh ahi." 
Ezekiel41:22 Maicham chu thinga kisem ahin, tong thum asangin, chule adunglam chu tong ni ahi. Chuche-a aninghole adung chule abangho chu thinga kisem cheh ahi; chuin aman kahenga, Tonsot Pakai anga kido dokhang chu hichehi ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel41:23 Chule houin le muntheng chun kot ni aneije. 
Ezekiel41:24 Chule kot ho chun pehni cheh, akiheithei pehni, pehni kot khatna ding, chule pehni ma kotchom khatna ding, aneicheh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel41:25 Chule banga kisem banga chun, hicheho chungle houin kot ho chunga chun Cherub hole tumthingho akisem cheh-e. Chule hongcha ponung chunga chun thingpeh satah akibeh-e." 
Ezekiel41:26 Chule tumthingho hongcha pangho hilam pangle khulam panga chun bangkot neochaho aumin, chule hongcha panghole, insung danho pang chunga chun thingpeh satah ho akibeh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel42:1 Chujouvin aman keima sahlam sanga patnin inhong ponunga eipui doh-in; chule aman keima in kisa maitoh kigalsai sahlam sanga mun kikhendoh indanho sunga eipuilut tai. 
Ezekiel42:2 Tong jakhatna sao masanga chun sahlam sang kotpi chu aumin, chule availam chu tong somnga ahi." 
Ezekiel42:3 Inhong sungnung tong somni maingat, chule inhongsung ponung keng lampi-a chun kempumle kempum kimai ngatnin dan thum cheh-in aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel42:4 Indanho masanga, sunglam jotna-a chun lampi availam tong soma len le, adunglam tong khatna len aumin, chule akot ho chun sahlam angan ahi." 
Ezekiel42:5 Tun indan chungnung joho chu anemjep uve, ajehchu kem kidosangho chu in kisa anoinung le alailha penho sangin asangjon ahi." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ajehchu amaho dan thuma um ahiuvin, ahinla inhongsung khompiho bangin khomho aneipouve; hijeh chun in kisa indan chungnung pen chu tolla patna anoinungpen le alailha penho sangin ajum jouve." 
Ezekiel42:7 Chule indanho toh kingatto chule indanho maija inhongsung ponung lam sanga bang ponung chu, adung tong somnga ahi." 
Ezekiel42:8 Ajehchu inhong ponung sunga indanho adung tong somnga ahi, chule veuvin houin mai chu tong jakhat ahi." 
Ezekiel42:9 Inhon ponunga kona mihem dia aban chelutna ding hiche indan noiho-a kon chun solam sanga lutna chu aume. 
Ezekiel42:10 Indanho chu mun kikhen doh jonna, chule in kisa masanga solam sanga inhong dung bang satah-a chun aume." 
Ezekiel42:11 Chule amaho masanga lampi chu sahlam sanga indanho asaojedan le aletdan limso bangin akilange, chule potdohna ho chu akot ho dungjui le alimsoho dungjuija um ahi." 
Ezekiel42:12 Chule indanho-a kot ho dungjui chun, lhanglam sanga lamlhongpia chun kot khat aumin, khattou chuche sunga agalut tengle solam sanga bang maitah-a chun lamlhah khat aume." 
Ezekiel42:13 Chujouvin aman kahenga, sahlam sanga indanho le lhanglam sang indanho, mun kikhen doh toh kingatto chu indan thengho, Pakai heng jotlutna thempu hon thiltheng chung nungho anehna dingu mun chu ahi; chuachu amahon thilthengpen, chule anneh thilpeh, chonset thilpeh, chule suhkhelna thilpeh chu akoi dingu ahi. Ajehchu amun chu muntheng ahi." 
Ezekiel42:14 Chule hiche sunga chu thempuho alut tengule, amaho chu munthenga kona inhong ponung sunga potdoh lou dingu, amavang hiche laija chu amahon anaman chah-u avonhou chu akoilhah dingu ahi; ajehchu hicheho chu atheng ahin: chule amaho mipi anga ache masang uva amahon von dangho akivontei dingu ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel42:15 Tun aman insung atejou phatnin, keima solamsang ngat kotpi lama chun eihin puijin, chule aning jouse chu aten ahi." 
Ezekiel42:16 Aman thil tena pengmolin solamsang aten ahile, pengmol janga alhinge." 
Ezekiel42:17 Aman sahlam sang aten ahile, pengmol janga ahi." 
Ezekiel42:18 Aman lhanglam sang chu aten ahile, pengmol janga ahi." 
Ezekiel42:19 Ama lhumlam sanga agakihei kimvelin, pengmol kitena-a chun aten ahile, pengmol janga ahi." 
Ezekiel42:20 Hitichun aman hichu aning li in aten ahi; hichun akimvela bang aneijin, munthengle milham umna mun kikah sekhena dingin, pengmol janga saole janga len aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel43:1 Chujouvin aman keima kotpi phunga solamsang ngat kotpi phung gei chun eipuijin," 
Ezekiel43:2 Chuin veuvin, Israel Pathen loupina chu solamsang lampia konin ahung kilah-in, a-awgin chu twi tamtah gin abangin, aloupina chun leiset asalvah-in ahi." 
Ezekiel43:3 Chule hichu keiman kanamu gao thilmu tobangle, hiche khopi sumang dinga kahunglaija kanamu gao thilmu dungjui ngeijin akilangin ahi. Chule gaothil muho chu Chebar vadunglen panga kanamu toh akibangin; chuin tolla kamai kasulut tai." 
Ezekiel43:4 Chuin Pakai loupina chu solam sanga kotpi-a konin inpi sunga ahung luttai. 
Ezekiel43:5 Hitichun lhagaovin keima eiphong dingin, chule inhong sung lama chun eipui lutnin; chule vetan, insung chu Pakai loupina adimtan ahi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Chuin keiman insunga kon chun kahenga thu kisei kajan, chule mipa chu kakoma anadingin ahi." 
Ezekiel43:7 Chuin aman kahenga, Mihem chapa, kalaltouna munle kakengto ngapna mun, a-itih-a Israel chate lah-a kachenna ding mun, chule Israel insung mite, amaho ahiuvin, alengtehou ahin, ajonthanhoi naova, ahilouleh amunsang houva alengtehou longin jong kamintheng asuhboh kitlou dingu ahitai." 
Ezekiel43:8 Akotbulu kakotbul ho koma aboluva, akhomu kakhomho koma atunuva, chule keimale amaho kah-a bang akigen tanin, amahon thet umtah abolu chun kamintheng asubohtauve; hijeh-a chu kalung hanna-a amaho kasuhmang ahitai." 
Ezekiel43:9 Tun ajonthanhoi naole, alengtehou thilongho chu keija konin gamla tah-a koidoh taohen, chutengle a-itih-a akomuva kachen jing ding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:10 Mihem chapa, nangman akhanset naova ajachat theina dingun, in chu Israel insung vetsah-in, chule a-inlim chu amaho tesah-in." 
Ezekiel43:11 Amahon athilbol jouseu chu ajachat piuva ahile, amaho chu in limle agong, chule apotdohna hole achelutnaho, chule alimpoh jousele amandan jouse, chule alimpoh jousele adanthu jouse vetsah-in; alimpoh pumpileh adanthu jouse anitnuva abolna dingun amitmuva hichu sunin." 
Ezekiel43:12 Hichehi in'a dinga dan ahin; molchung vum kimvel pumpi hop chu atheng chungnung hiding ahi. Veuvin hichehi in'a dinga dan chu ahi. 
Ezekiel43:13 Hichehohi thil tena tong ho dungjuija maicham tena ahi; tong khat chu tong khatle khutpeh khat, atodop ngei jong chu tong khat hiding, aveilam tong khat, agei pumpi mong kimvel chu khap khat hiding, chule hichehi maicham sangjo mun chu hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:14 Atodop tol chunga akitunna noinunga pat tong ni hiding, availam tong khat hiding, atodop neopa-a pat atodop lenpa gei chu tong li hiding, chule asalam pang tong khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:15 Hiti achu maicham chu tong li hiding, maichama pat chunglam chu aki li umding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:16 Chule maicham chu tong somleni sao, somleni len, aning li kibang hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:17 Chule atodop chu tong somle tongli hiding, aninglia aletdan chu tong somle tongli hiding; akimvel geisihho chu tong kehkhat hiding, chule atodop kimvel chu tong khat hiding; chule akalbiho chun solam angat dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel43:18 Chuin aman kajah-a, mihem chapa, Pakai Pathen'in hitihin aseije; amahon govam thilpehho achunga chu aboluva, thisan athin khumni tengule, hichehohi maicham boldan thupeh hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:19 Nahenga kalhacha kinbol dinga eihin naija Zadok chilhah, Levi thempuho henga, chonset thilto dinga bongchal gol khat nangman napeh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel43:20 Chule nangman hiche thisan chu nalah-a, hiche aki liho chungle atodop ning liho chunga, chule ageisih kimvela nakoi ding; hiti achu maicham chu nasuh thenga nathenso ding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:21 Nangman chonset thilpeh bongchal jong chu nalah ding, aman hichu muntheng polam, lhendoh sa-a kikoi in'a chu agovam ding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:22 Chule nini chan nileh nangman kelcha nou nolnabei khat, chonset thilto dinga nato ding; amahon maicham chu bongchala asuhtheng banguva, asuhtheng dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel43:23 Nangman hiche suhthengna chu nachai tengle, nolnabei bongchalgol khatle, ahonlah-a nolnabei kelngoichal khat natodoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel43:24 Nangman hiho chu Pakai masanga natodoh-a, thempuhon achunguva chi atheova, Pakai henga govam thilto atodoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ni sagi sunga chonset thilto ding niseh-a kelcha khat nagon ding; amahon jong bongchalgol khatle ahon lah-a nolnabei kelngoichal khat akigon dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel43:26 Amahon maicham chu ni sagi asopthenguva asuhtheng diu; chule amaho jong kithenso dingu ahi. 
Ezekiel43:27 Chule hiche nikhoho kichai tengle, hiti ding ahi, niget channi chule aban banna thempuhon maicham chunga chu govam thiltoho le chamna thiltoho atodiu, chuteng keiman kasanpeh ding nahiuve, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel44:1 Chuin solam ngatna muntheng ponung kotpi lama chun eilepui kitnin; hichu anakikhah-in ahi. 
Ezekiel44:2 Chuin Pakai chun kajah-a, hiche kotpihi kikhah ding kihong louhel ding, koimacha hichea lutlouhel ding ahi; ajehchu Israel Pakai Pathen chu hiche-a hi hung lutna ahin, hijeh-a chu hichehi kikhah jing ding ahitai." 
Ezekiel44:3 Hichehi leng chapa ding ahin, leng chapa chu Pakai anga an nedinga asunga tou ding; chuche kotpi hongcha lampia chu ama lutding, chule chuche lampi mama-a chu potdoh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel44:4 Chuin aman keima sahlam kot lampi inmaija chun eipuijin; chuin kavetle, veuvin, Pakai in chu Pathen loupinan adimsetnin, chuin kamai tolla kasulutai." 
Ezekiel44:5 Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, mihem chapa, melchih phan lang, namitnin ven, Pakai insunga kimanchah ding dan jouse chungchang nahenga kasei jousele, dan jouse chu nanan ngaiphan; chule in'a lut jousele munthenga pot jouse chu phaten melchih in." 
Ezekiel44:6 Chule nangman thungailou ho, Israel mite ngei henga naseipeh ding ahi; vo Israel insung mite, thet um nabol jouseu chu ngataovin, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel44:7 Nanghon kamun theng sunga gamdang mi, atahsao le alungsunga cheptan louho, kamunthenga nahinpuilut tengule ka in jengjong nasuboh-un, nanghon ka changlhah, thao, chule thisan nato tengule amahon kakitepna asukeh un ahi." 
Ezekiel44:8 Nanghon kathil theng thupeh ho nachingtup pouvin; ahinla nanghon nangho khelin kathupeh nitding midang kamuntheng sunga nakoijo taove. 
Ezekiel44:9 Pakai Pathen'in, gamdang mi, lungsunga cheptanlou ahilouleh tahsa-a cheptanlou, Israel chate lah-a gamdang mi cheptanlou khatcha kamun theng lutlou dingu ahi, tin aseije." 
Ezekiel44:10 Chule Israel avaveija, keija kona amilim semthu nung ajuijuva avamang laijuva, keija kona gamla tah-a anavahmang Levi ho chun, akhangit lounao akipoh teidiu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:11 Hijeng jongle amahon kamun theng sunga kin aboluva, inpi kotpiho ngah-a pang diu, inpia chu kin aboldiu; mipi ho dinga govam thilto ganlhainaho chu athaova, akinu bol dinga amasanguva dingdiu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ajehchu amaho amilimhou masanga amaho dinga lhachana atoh uva, Israel insung khansetna achuhsah jeh uva; hijeh-a chu amaho douna-a kakhut kalhah ahin, akhangit lounao chu akipoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel44:13 Amaho kahenga thempu natoh tong dinga, kahenga hungnailut lou dingu, ahilouleh muntheng chungnung sunga kathil thengho khatcha anailut thei loudiu; amavang ajumnau leh thet umtah abolu chu akipohjoh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:14 Ahinla in'a bolding jousele asunga tohding jouse vetup dinga amaho chu kapansah ding ahi. 
Ezekiel44:15 Ahinla Israel chate keija kona avavei laijuva, kamun theng vetupma anapang thempuho, Levi ho, Zadok chapate amaho chu kahenga kakinbol dinga hungnaijuva, thaole thisan tohdoh dinga kamasanga ding diu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel44:16 Amaho kakinbol dinga kamunthenga lutnuva, kakin bol dinga kadokhang phung anailut diu, kathupeh achintup diu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:17 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, amaho inhong sungnung kotpi ho-a alut tengule, tupat ponnem ho-a kivon diu; inhong sungnungle asung lama kin abol sunguva achunguva samul himhim kailou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel44:18 Alu uva tupat delnem akikopmuva, ataijuva tupat ponchol akichen diu; ulsa sona thei imacha akigah loudiu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:19 Chule inhong ponung, japi inhon ponunga ahungdoh tengule, akin bolnao vonho chu asutlhah uva dantheng sunga akoidiu, vondang akivon diu; mipi ho chu avonuva asuhtheng loudiu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:20 Amahon asamu akivotol loudiu, ajangtelu jong ahoisao loudiu, alu-u akisemtup jing diu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:21 Inhong sungnunga alut tengu jongle, thempu koimachan lengpitwi adon loudiu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:22 Amahon meithai ahilouleh akidasa ji-a anei loudiu; Israel insung chilhah nungah, ahilouleh thempun ji-a ananeisa meithai akichenpi dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:23 Chule amahon kamite chu athengle akisuboh akibah louna chu ahildiu, chule athengle athenglou akibah louna ahetkhen sahdiu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:24 Chule kinelna aumteng, thutan na-a dinguva, kathutan dungjuija thu atan dingu; chule keima mina kikhop khomna jouse-a kadan thupeh le kadan kisunho anitdiu, kacholngah ni ajabol dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:25 Kisuhbohna dinga thilong phunga hung lou dingu; ahinla apa, ahiloule anu, ahiloule chapa, ahiloule chanu, ahiloule sopipa, ahiloule jinei loulai asopinu dinga vang kisuboh theiju ahi." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ama akisuhtheng jouteng, ama dinga nisagi asimdohpeh diu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:27 Chule inhong sungnung, muntheng sunga kinbol dinga alut nikho tengle ama dinga chonset thilto ato ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel44:28 Chule amaho agoulo dingdolu chu hiti ding ahi: Keimahi agoulou kahi; Israel insunga amaho gou napeh lou dingu ahi; Keimahi agouvu kahi. 
Ezekiel44:29 Amahon neh thilto, chonset thilto, suhkhelna thilto aneh diu ahin; Israel sunga Pathen'a dinga kitohho jouse chu amaho-a hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel44:30 Thil jouse aga masapen lah-a gamasapen le thilto jouse lah-a nathiltou takip chu thempu ho-a ding ahi: aman na insunguva phatthei na aumdensah theina dinga, thempu chu nachanglhah lum masapenu jong napeh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel44:31 Thempuhon sa hihen lang vacha hijongle, akihehtel le achama thikam anehlou dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:1 Chukalvalin nanghon vang vetna-a gamlo ding nakihop tengule, Pakai henga gambih theng khat natodoh dingu ahi. Adunglam chu pengmol sangsomni le sangnga hiding, availam chu sangsom hiding; hichehi gamsung kimvel jouse-a atheng hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:2 Hichehi muntheng dinga adunglam janga, availam janga kimvel hiding, chule akimvela gam ong tong somnga umding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:3 Chule hiche tena-a hi adunglam sangsomni le sangnga, chule availam sangsom natedoh-a, hiche sunga chu munthengle muntheng chungnung umding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:4 Gambih theng chu muntheng kinbol, Pakai kinbol dinga hungnai thempuho chanding hiding; hichu a-inhou sahna ding mun hiding, chule munthenga dinga atheng hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:5 Chule adunglam sangsomni le sangnga, vailam sangsom jong chu in'a kinbola Levi mite chang diu, indan somni dinga alodiu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:6 Gambih theng kipedoh chu khopi dinga adunglam sangsomni le sangnga, availam sangnga hiding, hichu Israel insung pumpi-a ding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:7 Leng chapa chanding chu gamtheng kitohdoh-a kona hilamle khulam panga umding ahin, chule khopi chanding chu, gamtheng kipedoh masanga aumin, chule khopi sungle lhum lama kon chu lhum lama, solama kon solama kijompeh ding; chule adunglam chu lhum lama pat solam gamgi ngahna, gambehho lah-a khattoh kigalsai chan gei chu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:8 Hichu Israel gamsunga ama chanding ahi; kapipui hon kamite asuhgimbe tahlou diu, chule gam amoh chu aphungu dungjuija Israel insung apeh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:9 Hitihin Pakai Pathen'in aseije; vo Israel Leng chapaho, phaset tahen; hunamle thilchom haijun lang, thudihle thutanna pandoh-un, kamiteho-a konin hunam haijun tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel45:10 Nanghon khaikot dihho, ephah dihtah, bath dihtah naman diu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:11 Ephah le bath chu tena kibang hiding, bath chun homer hop soma hop khat adolding, chule ephah chun homer hop soma hop khat adolding, thil tena chu homer dungjuija teding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:12 Shekel chu gerah somni hiding, shekel somni, shekel somni le nga, shekel somlenga chu nangho dinga mina khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:13 Hichehi Pathen'a thilto napehdiu chu ahi, suhlou chang homer khat le ephah hop gupma hop khat, sakol chang homer khat le ephah hop gupma hop khat napeh diu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:14 Thaotwi chungchang dan thupeh chu ahile, thaotwi bath khat chu cor a kona bath hop soma hop khat ahin; cor khat chu homer ahiloule bath som ahi. Ajehchu bath som chu homer khat ahi." 
Ezekiel45:15 Anneh thilto dingle govam thilto ding, chamna thilto dingle miho kichamna semna dinga Israel hamhing phatna ho-a kon, kelngoihon lah-a kon khat, jani lah-a kona kelngoinou khat napeh diu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseijin ahi." 
Ezekiel45:16 Gamsunga mi jousen Israel sunga leng chapa-a dinga hiche thilpeh hi apehcheh diu ahi. 
Ezekiel45:17 Chule hichehi leng chapa kin ding chu; lhathah nikho-a, cholngah nikho-a, Israel insunga lhentum kut jouse-a govam thilpeh, anneh thilpeh, don thilpeh, govam thilpeh, chule chamna thilpeh, Israelte insung dinga chamna thilpeh agon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:18 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, lhamasa alhasunga nimasa nileh, bongchal gol nolnabei khatna muntheng chu nasuhtheng diu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:19 Chule thempu chun chonset thilto thisan chu alah-a, inkhom chunga, maicham kitunna ningli chunga, chule inhong sungnung kotpi khom chungchu anu ding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:20 Chule chuche lha nisagi ni chule suhkhel neitapou dingle milham dinga nabol ding; chutiachu insung nasuhcham diu ahi. 
Ezekiel45:21 Lha masapen-a chuche lha nisomle nili tengchule, nanghon kalchuh kut naman uva, nisagi golvah naboldiu, cholsolou changlhah naneh dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel45:22 Hicheni chule lengchapan ama dingle gamsunga mipi jouse dinga chonset thilto dinga bongchal khat agon ding ahi. 
Ezekiel45:23 Chule nisagi kut sunga chu Pakai henga govam thilto dinga aman nolnabei cheh bongchal sagile kelngoichal sagi niseh-a anisagi-a dinga chu agon ding, chule chonset thilto dinga kelchaho lah-a anou khat atoding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:24 Chule aman anneh thilto dinga, bongchal khat dinga ephah khat, kelngoichal khat dinga ephah khat, ephah khat dinga thaotwi hin dimkhat agon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel45:25 Lha sagi lhinna, alha sunga nisomle ninga nikho teng, nisagi kut kiman bang banga chu abolding, chonset thilto, govam thilto le, anneh thilpeh, chule thaotwi agon ding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:1 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije, solam ngat inhong sungnung kotpi chu nigup sunga kikhah jing ding, cholngah nikho le vang kihong ding, chule lhathah nikho nile jong kihong ding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:2 Leng chapa chu apolama hongcha kotpi-a chu hunglutna, kotpi khom phunga chu ding dena, ama govam thilto le chamna thilto ding chu thempu chun agonpeh ding; ama kotpi bula chu chibai aboh-a, chuteng potdoh ding, nilhah kahse-a kotpi chu kikhah lou ding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:3 Hiche banga chu gamsung miten hiche kotpi phunga hi choldo nile lhathah nikho ni-a Pakai anga chibai abohdiu ahi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Chule choldoni-a Pakai anga lengchapan atoding govam thilto chu, nolnabei kelngoinou gup le kelngoichal nolnabei khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:5 Chule kelngoichal khat dinga anneh thilpehho chu ephah khat hintin, kelngoinou ho ding chu apehjou kham cheh, chule ephah khatna dinga thaotwi hin khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:6 Chule lhathah nikho nileh nolnabei bongchalgol khat, chule kelngoinou gup, kelngoichal khat hiding, nolnabei cheh hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:7 Aman anneh thilpeh apehding, bongchal khat dinga ephah khat, kelngoichal khat dinga ephah khat, kelngoinou ho ding vang atamto theichan hiding, chule ephah khat dinga thaotwi hin khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:8 Leng chapa alut dingteng, hongcha kotpi lama chu lutna, hiche lampia chu potkit ding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:9 Ahin Kutpi nikho-a gamsung mite Pakai anga ahung tengule, sahlam kotpi-a lutna chu lhanglam kotpi-a pot ding; lhanglam kotpi-a lutna chu sahlam kotpi-a pot ding, ahunglutna kotpi lama kilelouva, amalama chepaipai joding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:10 Alah uva leng chapa chu, amaho alut tengule lutna; amaho achedoh tengule chedoh ding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:11 Chule kut sungle anipi niho-a anneh thilpeh chu bongchal khatna ephah khat, kelngoichal khatna ephah khat, chule kelngoinou ho dinga apehjou khambep, chule ephah khatna thaotwi hin khat hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:12 Tun leng chapan ama chama govam thilpeh abola, ahiloule Pakai dinga ama chama thilpeh agon tengle, solam nga-a kotpi chu mikhatnin ahonpeh ding, cholngah nikho-a abol banga, aman agovam thilto le achamna thilpeh akigon ding; chuteng ama potdoh ding, ama potdoh joule kotpi khatnin akhading ahi." 
Ezekiel46:13 Nangman nolnabei kum khat lhingbep kelngoinou khat niseh-a Pakai dinga govam thilpeh nagon ding ahi. Hichu jingkah seh-a nagon ding ahi. 
Ezekiel46:14 Hiche dinga hi jingkah seh-a anneh thilpeh nagon ding, ephah hop gupma hop khat le thaotwi hin khat hop thuma hopkhat chu changbongnel toh namehtha ding; Pakaiya dinga kumkho-a houdan anneh thilpeh jomjing chu hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Hiti achu amahon kelngoinou le anneh thilpeh, chule thaotwi chu jingseh-a tanglouva govam thilto dinga agon jing dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel46:16 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; lengchapan achapate khattou thilpeh apehle, chuche goulo chu achapatea hiding ahi; hichu agoulou thilkeo hiding ahitai." 
Ezekiel46:17 Aman agouloa kona asohte khattou thilpeh apeh ahilevang, achamlhat kum geija ama-a hintin; chuchejou tengle lengpa chapa kilepeh kitding ahi. Ahinla agoulo chu achapate bou changding ahi." 
Ezekiel46:18 Chukalvalin leng chapa chun mipi ho chu aneijuva kona nodoh nadinga, hunama agoulo-u chu alahpeh louding; amavang aman achapate chu aneija kona alahdoh-a agoulo dingu apeh dingjoh ahi. Chutile kamite jouse aneijuva kona kithecheh loudiu ahi." 
Ezekiel46:19 Chujouvin aman kotpi panga um, lutna-a chun, sahlam sang nga-a thempuho indan theng sunga chun eipuilutin; chuin veuvin, lhumlam sihtenia chun mun khat kamun ahi." 
Ezekiel46:20 Chuin aman kajah-a, hichehi thempuhon suhkhel thilto le chonset thiltoho ahon nadiu mun chu ahin, hia chu amahon anneh thilto chu akandiu; chutiachu amahon inhongsung ponunga, mipi ho thensona dinga ahinpoh doh loudiu ahi." 
Ezekiel46:21 Chujouvin aman inhong ponung sunga chun eipuidoh-in, inhongsung ning li-a chun eipuilen; chuin veuvin, inhongsung ning tina chun inhongsung khat cheh aumin ahi." 
Ezekiel46:22 Inhongsung ning li-a chun tong somli sao, tong somthum len, inhongsung kijopmat aumin, hiche ning li hohi tena kibang ahi." 
Ezekiel46:23 Asungu kimvel, amaho li kimvela chun agola kisa in aumin, atogola chun mei tina thuhho akisemin ahi." 
Ezekiel46:24 Chuin aman kajah-a, hichehohi anhonho dinga munho ahin, hia chu houin'a lhachahon mipite kilhainaho chu ahondiu ahi, ati." 
Ezekiel47:1 Chujouchun aman inkot phung lama eipui kitnin; chuin, veuvin, solam ngat kotbul noija konchun twiho ahung longdoh-in ahi. Ajehchu inmai chun solam angat ahin, twiho chu maicham lhanglam sang, in jetlam sanga noija kon hung longlha ahi." 
Ezekiel47:2 Chuphatnin aman sahlam kotpi-a chun eipuidoh-in, polang lampia, kotpi ponung, pamlam solam ngat lampia chun eipuijin, chule veuvin, jetlam sanga chun twiho ahung longdoh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel47:3 Chuin akhutna khao choipa chu solam nga-a achedoh phatnin, tong sangkhat atedoh-in, twilah-a chun eipuijin ahile, twi chun kakeng khochong aphan ahi." 
Ezekiel47:4 Chuin tong sangkhat atedoh kitnin, twilah-a chun eipuijin ahile, twi chun kakhup aphan ahi. Chuin aman tong sangkhat atedoh kitnin, twilah-a chun eipuidoh kitnin ahile, twi chun kakong aphan ahi." 
Ezekiel47:5 Chujouchun tong sangkhat atedoh kitnin ahile; kapal galkai joulou vadung anahitai. Ijeh inem itile twi chu akhangin, ajapma japtho ding ahitan, palgalkai joulou ding vadung ahitai." 
Ezekiel47:6 Chuin aman kajah-a, mihem chapa, hichehi namu-em? eiti. Chuin aman eipuijin, vadung panga chun eikinung lesah tai." 
Ezekiel47:7 Tun keima kakinungle phatnin, veuvin, vadung apang teni-a chun alangto-in thingphung tampitah akeh-in ahi." 
Ezekiel47:8 Chuin aman kajah-a, hiche twihohi solam gama longlha-a, nelgam lama longsuh-a, twipia longlut ahin; twi hin twipi aphah phahle, twi chu damding ahi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, vadung lonna lamjousea, ahing theija chatloh thei jouse chu hing dingu ahi. Ajehchu twiho chu khulama ahunglon jeh-a, nga atama tam umding ahi; ijeh inem itile amaho kisudam dingu, chule vadung lon nalam jouse-a chu imajouse hingding ahi." 
Ezekiel47:10 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Engedi apat Eneglaim chan geija ngamanho chu kipatdoh dingu, hiche munho chu len sena mun hung hiding; angahou chu amaho jat dungjuija twipi lenho-a nga banga hatama hung tamdiu ahi." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ahinla chua bonnganle bonlhoh munchu damlou ding ahi, amaho chi henga kipedoh ding ahiuve." 
Ezekiel47:12 Chule chua vadung pang, hilam pangle khulam panga chu, nehdinga thingphung jouse kehding, anaho pullou ding, agao jong beithei louding; atwi chu munthenga kona hunglong doh ahijeh-a, lhathah dungjuija gathah ahin sepdoh ding; atheiga chu anneh hija, athingna chu damna hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel47:13 Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Israel phung somle phung ni dungjuija agam lo dingu gamtum chu hichehi hiding ahi: Joseph chu chan ni chang ding ahi. 
Ezekiel47:14 Nanghon hichu, khat cheh-in kibang cheh-a nalodiu; hiche thudol chu napu napateu pehdinga kakhut kanadopsa ahitan, hiche gamhi nangho goulo dinga hungum ding ahi." 
Ezekiel47:15 Hichehi sahlam sanga gamgi chu hiding ahi: twipilen'a pat Hethlon lampia, Zedad'a mi chena gei," 
Ezekiel47:16 Hamath, Berothah, Sibraim, hichu Damascus le Hamath kikah-a gamgi ahin, Hazarhatticon, hichu Hauran gamkol kom ahi." 
Ezekiel47:17 Chule twipia patna gamgi chu Hazarenan gei Damascus gamsung hintin, chunglam sahlam sanga um chule Hamath gamsung gei hiding ahi. Hichehi sahlam sang gamgi ahi." 
Ezekiel47:18 Chule solamsang chu nanghon Hauran'a pat Damascus apat, Gilead'a pat chule Jordan solam twipi gamgia pat le Israel gamgia pat nate diu ahi. Chule hichehi Solamsang ahi." 
Ezekiel47:19 Chule lhanglam sanga lhanglam chu, Tamar apat Kadesh a twiho, twipilen vadung gei ngei chu hiding ahi. Chule hichehi lhanglam sanga lhanglam ngat chu ahi." 
Ezekiel47:20 Lhumlam sang chu gamgia pat twipilen, Hamath a mi hung galkai theina gei chu hiding ahi. Hichehi lhumlam sang ahi." 
Ezekiel47:21 Hiti-a hi Israel phungho dungjuija gam chu nakihop diu ahi. 
Ezekiel47:22 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, hiti achu vang vetna nangho goulo dingle nalah uva hung pemlut gamdang mi, nalah uva chate hinhing dingho chu nakihop diu ahi. Chule amaho Israel chate lah-a gamsunga pengden nalah uva um tobang hidiu ahin, amahon Israel phung lah-a nang hotoh gou alokhom dingu ahi." 
Ezekiel47:23 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, gamdang mi ipi phung sunga hung pemlut hijongle, nanghon ama chu chua agoulo ding napeh diu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen chun aseije." 
Ezekiel48:1 Tun hichehohi phung minho chu ahiuve. Sahlam mong Hethlon gamkol lampi, Hamath'a chena, Hazarenan, sahlam sang Damascus gamsung le Hamath gamkol chan hiding ahi, ajehchu hichehohi solam le lhumlama ama gamkai ahin, Dan chanvou chu ahi." 
Ezekiel48:2 Chule Dan gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, Asher chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:3 Chule Asher gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, Naphtali chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:4 Chule Naphtali gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, Manasseh chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:5 Chule Manasseh gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, Ephraim chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:6 Chule Ephraim gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, Reuben chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:7 Chule Reuben gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, Judah chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:8 Chule Judah gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu, avai pengmol sangsomni le sangnga, gamchan dangho khat banga sao, solama pat lhumlam gei chu natodoh dinguva um natodoh-u chu hiding ahi. Hiche lailunga chu muntheng chu umding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:9 Pakai houna dinga natodoh dingu chu adung sangsomni le sangnga, avai sangsom hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:10 Chule amaho ding, thempuho ding ngei chu, hiche kipedoh theng chu hiding; sahlam sang sangsomni le sangnga sao, chule solamsang sangsoma len, chule lhanglam chu sangsomni le sangnga sao hiding ahi. Chule Pakai muntheng chu alailunga chu umding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:11 Hichehi Israel chate anavavei laijuva, Levi miho anavavei banguva anavah veilou, kathupeh anaching tupma ana kisuthengsa Zadok chapate thempu ho-a hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Chule hiche akipedoh gam chu, amaho dinga Levi mite gamsung thiltheng chungnung hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Chule thempuho gamsung jonna chu Levi miten gam adung sangsomni le sangnga, avai sangsom anei dingu ahi, adung jouse chu sangsomni le sangnga hiding, chule avai chu sangsom hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Chule amahon hichehi ajoh loudiu, ahiloule alhet loudiu, gamga masaho jong midang apeh loudiu ahi; ajehchu hichehi Pakai dinga atheng ahi." 
Ezekiel48:15 Chule sangsomni le sangnga jonna avai sanga kidalha chu khopi dinga manchah thei hiding, chule mipi dinga chenna dingle khovel hiding ahi. Chule hiche alailunga chu khopi umding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:16 Chule hichehi akite dan hiding ahi: sahlam sang chu sangli le janga, lhanglam sang sangli le janga, solamsang sangli le janga, chule lhumlam sang sangli le janga hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:17 Chule khopivel chu sahlam sangjani le somnga, lhanglam sangjani le somnga, solam sangjani le somnga, lhumlam sang chu jani le somnga hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:18 Chule akipedoh gambih theng jona avalchu adunglam chu solamsang sangsom, lhumlam sang sangsom hiding ahi. Chule hichu akipedoh gambih theng jona umding ahin, chule chua aga sohdoh chu khopi kinbolho kivahna hiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:19 Khopi kinbol ho chu Israel phungho-a kona bou aboldiu ahi. 
Ezekiel48:20 Akipedoh pumpi adung avai chu sangsomni le sangnga cheh hiding ahi, khopi chan puma aningli kibanga akipedoh theng chu natodoh thadingu ahi." 
Ezekiel48:21 Chule amoh akipedoh theng pang jetle vei chu lengchapa-a hiding, akipedoh sangsomni le sangnga solam gamsung jona, chule lhumlam sang gamsung jona sangsomni le sangnga, hiche chanho jongchu lengchapa-a ahi. Chule hichehi akipedoh theng chu hiding ahi. Chule hiche lailunga chu houin muntheng chu umding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:22 Hiche chungchona chu Levi mite chanvouho le khopi chanvouho-a pat alailunggei lengchapa-a hija, Benjamin gamsungle Judah gamsung kikah chu lengchapa-a ding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:23 Aumnalai phungho thudol chu, solam sanga pat lhumlam gei chu, Benjamin phungin chan khat aneiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:24 Chule Benjamin gamsung, solama pat lhumlam geija Simeon'in chan khat aneiding ahi." 
Ezekiel48:25 Chule Simeon gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu Issachar chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:26 Chule Issachar gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu Zebulun chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:27 Chule Zebulun gamsung, solama pat lhumlam gei chu Gad chan ahi." 
Ezekiel48:28 Chule Gad gamsung chu, lhumlam sanga lhanglam panga gamgi chu Tamar'a pat Kadesh'a longlut twiho geile twipilen lama long vadung gei chu ahi." 
Ezekiel48:29 Hichehi nanghon Israel phung mite goulo dinga vangvetna nahoppeh dingu gamchu ahin, chule hiche hohi achanvou uchu ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Ezekiel48:30 Hichehohi khopi-a kona sahlam panga gamgi ngahna kilhungdoh ahin, tenaho-a sangli le janga ahi." 
Ezekiel48:31 Khopi kotpiho chu Israel phungho min dungjuija sah ding ahin, sahlam panga kotpi thum aumin, Reuben kotpi khat, Judah kotpi khat, Levi kotpi khat ahi." 
Ezekiel48:32 Chule solam sanga sangli le janga, chule kotpi thum, Joseph kotpi khat, Benjamin kotpi khat, Dan kotpi khat ahi." 
Ezekiel48:33 Chule lhanglam sanga sangli le janga, chule kotpi thum, Simeon kotpi khat, Issachar kotpi khat, Zebulun kotpi khat ahi." 
Ezekiel48:34 Lhumlam sanga sangli le janga, akotpiu thum toh, Gad kotpi khat, Asher kotpi khat, Naphtali kotpi khat ahi." 
Ezekiel48:35 Akimvel chu tena sangsom le sangget ahin, chuche ni-a patna chuche khopi min chu, chumuna Pakai aume, hiding ahi." 
Daniel1:1 Judah lengpa Jehoiakim leng chan kal kum thum lhinna-in, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar chu Jerusalem lama ahungin, ahung umkimvel tan ahi." 
Daniel1:2 Pakaiyin Judah lengpa Jehoiakim chu ama khutna, Pathen insunga kongle bel phabep toh apehdohthan; hichu aman Shinar gamsunga a-pathen insunga apolutnin; chule aman kongle bel ho chu a-pathen'u thillu koina insung alhut tan ahi." 
Daniel1:3 Chuin lengpa chun nukiso ho lamkaipa Ashpenaz jah-a chun Israel chate, leng chilhah, leng chapate lah-a kon mi phabep ahinpui dingin ahetsah-in," 
Daniel1:4 Amaho chu, ama-a nolna kimulou golhang, ahivanga melhoi, chihna lam jouse-a bulhing, hetna giltah nei, ijakai hethem bai, lengpa insunga dingthei ding, Chaldea mite themna le pao hilthei dingho ahiuve." 
Daniel1:5 Chule lengpan amaho chu lengpa anneh le adonji ju chu nitina achan diuvin agotpeh-in: chutia chu kum thum khoukhah-a aumjou tengule lengpa anga akilah diuvin agongtan ahi. 
Daniel1:6 Tun hiche miho lah-a hin Judah chate, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael chule Azariah apanguve." 
Daniel1:7 Amaho chu nukiso pipupa chun aminvon: hitichun aman Daniel chu Belteshazzar, Hananiah chu Shadrach, Mishael chu Meshach, chule Azariah chu Abednego asahtai." 
Daniel1:8 Ahivangin Daniel'in lengpa anneh le adonji ju-a akisuhboh lou dingin alungsunga kigel lhahna aneijin: hijeh chun aman akisohboh louna dingin nukiso pipu henga chun ataotan ahi. 
Daniel1:9 Tun Pathen'in Daniel chu nukiso pipupa mitmu-a khohsahna le ngailutna giltah ahin chansah tai. 
Daniel1:10 Chuin nukiso pipupa chun Daniel henga, Nangho dinga nehding le donding hinteppeh ka pakai lengpa chu keiman kaginge. Ajehchu ibola nakhangol golhangho maiso sanga nangho maiso phamo jo-a amu ding ham? Chuti taleh nanghon lengpa henga kaluchanghi tijat um nasodiu ahi, tin aseitai." 
Daniel1:11 Chujouvin Daniel'in nukiso pipupan Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael chule Azariah vesui dinga akoipa Melzar henga aseitai;" 
Daniel1:12 Nisom sungin nasohte neipatep un tia kangeh nahi, chule amahon keiho neh dingin anche, chule don dingin twisih eipeuhen." 
Daniel1:13 Chujou tengle nangma angsunga keiho mel leh lengpa an neh ne-a golhangho mel vet kah-in umhen; chule namu dungjuijin nasohte chunga hin boljengin, ati." 
Daniel1:14 Hitichun hiche thua hin amapan aseiju chu anoppehtan, chule amaho chu nisom sung apatep tai." 
Daniel1:15 Chuin nisom ahung kichaijin, lengpa an neh ne-a golhangho jouse sangin amaho chu mel hoijo le tahsa phajon ahung kilangtan ahi." 
Daniel1:16 Hitichun Melzar'in achan dinguva kipe, aneh diu an le adon diu ju chu alamangin; chule amaho chu anche apejotan ahi." 
Daniel1:17 Hiche golhang liho vangchu, Pathen'in themna jouse le chihna lam jouse-a hetna le boltheina apen; chule Daniel'in gaothilmu le mangho jouse lama hetthem theina ananeijin ahi." 
Daniel1:18 Tun lengpan amaho nahinpuilut ding ahi tia asei nikho alhun phatnin, nukiso pipupan amaho jouse chu Nebuchadnezzar anga apuilut tan ahi." 
Daniel1:19 Chuin lengpan amaho chu akihoupin, chule amaho lah-a chun Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael chule Azariah tobang akimupon ahi. Hijeh chun amaho lengpa anga ading taovin ahi." 
Daniel1:20 Chule chihnale hetthem theina lam jouse-a lengpan amaho chu adongin ahile, alengvai pohna gam pumpi-a mitpheldoi choiho le ahsi lekhathem ho jouse sanga chan soma sangjon amutan ahi." 
Daniel1:21 Hitichun Daniel chu Cyrus lengpa lengchan kum masapen geijin ahung umpeh tan ahi. 
Daniel2:1 Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kum ni alhin na-in, Nebuchadnezzar'in mangho aneijin, hichun alung asugimin, a-imut asuboitan ahi." 
Daniel2:2 Chujouvin lengpan doithemho, ahsi lekhathem ho, aisanho chule Chaldea miho chu amangho hilchen dinga kou dingin thu khau tah-in apetai. Hitichun amaho ahungun lengpa anga ahung ding taove." 
Daniel2:3 Chuin lengpan ajah uva, Keiman mang khat kaneijin, hichu hetdohna dingin kalung agimlheh tai, ati." 
Daniel2:4 Chuin Chaldea mihon Syrian paovin lengpa henga, Vo lengpa, hing jingin: mang chu nasohte neisei peh-un, chutile keihon aledohna navetsah naovinge, atiuve." 
Daniel2:5 Chuin lengpan adonbutnin Chaldea miho henga chun, Athil chu keija kona chemanga ahitai: nanghon mangle aledohna chu keima neihetsah louvule, nangho ahal hala tanboh-a naum dingu, chule na-inhou jong eh kikholna kasosah ding ahi." 
Daniel2:6 Ahinla nanghon mang le aledohna chu nahilchet thei vangule, keija kona manbeija thilpeh le kipaman chule jana lentah namu dingu ahi. Hijeh chun mangle aledohna chu neimusah-un, ati." 
Daniel2:7 Amahon adonbut kitnun hitin aseijuve, Lengpan amang chu asohte eiseipeh uhen, chule keihon hiche aledohna chu vetsah-ung kate, atiuve." 
Daniel2:8 Lengpan adonbutnin, Nanghon thil chu keija kona achemang namu jeh uva, phat mube theina ding bouva naseiju ahi, ti keiman kahechentai, ati." 
Daniel2:9 Ahin nanghon mang chu keima neihetsah louvule, nangho dingin dan thupeh khat bou uma ahi: ajehchu aphat akikhel theina dinga ka-anga jou le thudihlou sei dinga nakigotnu ahi. Hijeh chun mang chu neisei peh-un, chule keiman hiche aledohna chu neimusah theidingu ahi ti kahet ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel2:10 Chaldea miho chun lengpa anga adonbutnun, hitihin aseijuve, Leiset chunga lengpa thu musahthei mihem khatcha aumpoi: hijeh-a chu chutobang thilchu mitphel doithem, ahiloule ahsi lekhathem, chule Chaldea mi anadongjia leng, pakai, ahiloule thuneija khatcha ana um khalou ahi." 
Daniel2:11 Chule lengpan angaichat hi thil kikhat ahin, lengpa anga hichu tahlang jou ding tahsa-a hing hilou pathen ho tailou adang koimacha aumpoi, atiuve." 
Daniel2:12 Hichejeh hin lengpa alunghangin chule alungsalheh tan, chule Babylon'a miching jouse suhmang dingin thupeh apetan ahi." 
Daniel2:13 Chuin michingho thagam dinga dan thupeh kipe chu hopjalin aumtan; chule amaho Daniel le aloiho chu tha dingin aholtauve. 
Daniel2:14 Chujouvin Daniel'in thumop le chihna to thon lengpa ngahtupho lamkaipa, Babylon michingho that dinga chedohpa Arioch chu adonbutnin ahi." 
Daniel2:15 Aman lengpa sepai lamkaipa Arioch chu adonbutnin, ipi dinga lengpa-a kona hiche dan thupeh hi hung hiti ganna ham? ati. Hichun Arioch-in athil umchan chu Daniel ahetsah tai." 
Daniel2:16 Chujouvin Daniel alutjelin, aledohna chu lengpa amusah theina dinga, lengpan ama phat apehna dingin agathum tai." 
Daniel2:17 Chuin Daniel a-in'a achen, athil umdol chu aloiho Hananiah, Mishael chule Azariah henga ahetsah-in ahi;" 
Daniel2:18 Hiche thuguh chungchang thua hi Babylon michingho jouse toh thakhatna Daniel le aloiho chu suhmanga aumlouna dinguva van Pathen hepina athum theina dingun ahetsah-in ahi. 
Daniel2:19 Chujouvin thuguh chu jan-in gao thilmu in Daniel henga phondoh-in ahung umtan ahi. Chujouvin Daniel'in van Pathen chu athangvah tan ahi. 
Daniel2:20 Daniel'in adonbutnin, Atonsot atonsotnin Pathen min chu vahchoijin umhen, ajehchu chihna le thahatna chu ama-a ahi." 
Daniel2:21 Chule aman phat hole kum kiheichinho akheljin; aman lengho aladoh-in, lengho atungdoh-in, aman achingho henga chihna apen; chule hetthem theina neiho hetna apei." 
Daniel2:22 Aman thugille thuguhho aphongdoh-in; muthima ipi aum aman ahen, chule vah chu amatoh aum khomin ahi." 
Daniel2:23 Chihna le hatna eipe-ah, chule keihon nangma-a kona kangeh-u keima eihin hetsah-a, Vo Nangma kapate Pathen, keiman nangma kathangvah-in, kavah choije: ajehchu nangman tun lengpa ngaichat chu keiho neihin hetsah taove, ati." 
Daniel2:24 Hijeh chun lengpan Babylon michingho thatgam dinga athupehsa Arioch henga chun Daniel achelutnin: ahenga, Babylon michingho sumang hih-in; lengpa anga keima neipuilut nin, chule keiman aledohna chu lengpa vetsah ingkate, tin agaseije." 
Daniel2:25 Chuin Arioch-in Daniel chu lengpa anga kintah-in apuilutnin, ajah-a, Keiman lengpa henga ledohna pe-a hilchen ding mi khat Judah sohchangho lah-a konin kamutai, agati." 
Daniel2:26 Lengpan adonbutnin, Belteshazzar tia kiminvo Daniel chu adonbutnin, Keiman kananei mang le aledohna chu neihetsah thei ding ham? ati." 
Daniel2:27 Lengpa angsunga Daniel'in adonbutnin, hitin aseije, Lengpan na-ngeh khoh thuguh chu michingho, ahsi lekhathem ho, mitpheldoi choiho, chule khonung thusei ho chun lengpa avetsah thei pouve." 
Daniel2:28 Ahinla thuguhho phongdoh jia van'a Pathen khat aumin, ama chun ninunung lamle ipi hungsoh dingham tichu Nebuchadnezzar lengpa ahin hetsah ahi. Namang le najalkhun chunga naluchang nangapma na gaothilmu chu hichehohi ahi:" 
Daniel2:29 Nangma vang, vo lengpa, najalkhun chunga naum chun, tunungle ipi hunglhung ding ham ti ngaitona nalungthima ahung umin ahi. Chule thuguhho phongdoh ji-a ama chun ipi hunglhung ding ham ti nangma nahin hetsah ahi." 
Daniel2:30 Ahinla keima hina-in vang, hiche thuguhhi keiman midang jouse sanga chihna kaneitam jeh-a kahenga kiphonga ahipon, amavang lengpa henga aledohna hetsah dingho jal leh, chutia chu nangman nalungsunga nalunggel chu nahetdohna ding joh ahibouve." 
Daniel2:31 Vo lengpa, nangman milim lentah khat nanamun chule nanaven ahi. Hiche milim lentah avah-a vah pempum jeng chu na-angsunga adingin; chule alimdan chu tijat umtah ahi." 
Daniel2:32 Hiche milim luchang chu sana thengsel ahin, a-ople abanho chu dangka, a-oile apheiho chu sum-eng," 
Daniel2:33 Akeng teni chu thih, akengphang teni chu thih le leiset kihala kisem ahi." 
Daniel2:34 Nangman mihem khutna kisem hilou song khat ahungdoh-a, hichun milim chu akengphang teni thih le leiset kihala kisem laitah ase khah-a, hiho chu ahal hala achipsoh nanamun ahi." 
Daniel2:35 Hichun thih, lei, sum-eng, dangka chule sana chu abonin thakhatnin ahal halin achiplhan, chule nipi laija phola changsiho bang ahunghitai; chule huijin hicheho chu amut mangin, agei nalamu akihe tapoi. Chule milim sepma song chu mol lentah ahung soh-in, chule leiset pumpi alodim tai." 
Daniel2:36 Hichehi mang chu ahin; chule chuche ledohna chu lengpa masanga keihon seijung kate. 
Daniel2:37 Vo lengpa, nangma lengho leng nahi; ajehchu van Pathen'in lenggam, thaneina, thahat, chule loupina nangma napen ahi." 
Daniel2:38 Chule aman mihem chate chenna jouse, gama saho chule chunga leng vachaho nangma khutna napedoh-in, chule amaho jouse chunga thuneijin nasemtai. Nangma hiche sana luchang chu nahi." 
Daniel2:39 Chule nangma nungtengle nangma sanga hatmojo lenggam khat, chule athum channa sum-eng lenggam adang khat hung umdoh ding, hichun leiset pumpi hi vai apoh ding ahi." 
Daniel2:40 Chule lenggam lina chu thih banga hat ding; thih in thil jouse ahal hala asuhgema anoija akoi banga; chule thih-in hitiho asuhngem banga, hichun asuhngema asuhchip ding ahi." 
Daniel2:41 Chule nangman akengphangho le kengjungho, akehkhat beldengpa lei abang thih-a namu bang ngeija hi, lenggam chu hung kikhen ding; ahinla nangman thihle leingan kihal namu bang ngeija, hiche chun thih tha aken ding ahi." 
Daniel2:42 Chule keng jungho chu abang thih-a chule abang leija ahibanga, hiche lenggam chu akeh khat hatnintin, akeh khat chu lhasam ding ahi." 
Daniel2:43 Chule nangman thihle leingan kihal namu banga, amaho mihem chilhah ho toh kichoh hal dingu; ahivanga thihle lei akihalthei lou banga, amaho khatle khat kitimat thei lou diu ahi." 
Daniel2:44 Chule hiche lengho nikholai tengchule van Pathen'in lenggam khat atundoh ding, hiche chu a-imatih chana suhmanga umlou ding ahitai. Chule hiche leggam chu midangho kidalhah peh lou ding, amavang hichechun hiche lenggam ho jousehi ahal hala asuhngema chule asuhmang ding, chule hichu a-itih-a ding jing ding ahitai." 
Daniel2:45 Nangman khutna hilou molsanga kona khendoh-a song manu-a, chule hichun thih, sum-eng, lei, dangka chule sana ahal hala asuhngem namu banga; loupi Pathen'in tununga ipi ahungso ding lengpa ahinhetsah ahi. Chule mang chu atahbeh ahi, chule aledohna chu thonlou ahi, ati." 
Daniel2:46 Chuin Nebuchadnezzar lengpan tolla amai asulutnin, Daniel chu chibai aboh-in, chule amahon ama henga thilto le gimnamtui apeh diuvin thu apetan ahi." 
Daniel2:47 Lengpan Daniel chu adonbutnin, Hichehi thutah ahimonge, hitichun nangma Pathen hi pathen ho Pathen le lengho Pakai ahin, chule nangman hiche thil kisel guhho naphondoh thei jal-in, thil kisel guhho phongdoh-a chu ahi, ati." 
Daniel2:48 Chuin lengpan Daniel chu miloupi tah-in asemin, chule thilpeh tamtah ho chu apen, chule Babylon gam pumpi chunga thuneile, Babylon'a michingho jouse chunga vaihomho pipui ahisah tai." 
Daniel2:49 Chujouvin Daniel'in lengpa henga ngehna aneijin, hitichun aman Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego chu Babylon gamkaiho chunga vaibolin apansahtai. Ahinla Daniel vang chu lengpa kotpi phunga atouvin ahi." 
Daniel3:1 Nebuchadnezzar lengpan sana milim khat asemin, hichu tong somgup asangin, chule availam chu tong gup ahi. Aman hichu Babylon gamkai sunga Dura phaichama chun atungdoh-in ahi." 
Daniel3:2 Chujouvin Nebuchadnezzar lengpan pipuiho, gamvaipoho, chule gal lamkaiho, thutan ho, gouchingho, thumopthem ho, kho vesuiho, chule gamsungho-a thunei ho jouse chu khopkhoma, Nebuchadnezzar lengpan atundoh milim thensona-a hunglha cheh dingin thu athot tai." 
Daniel3:3 Hitichun pipuiho, gamvaipoho, chule gal lamkaiho, thutan ho, gouchingho, thumopthem ho, kho vesuiho, chule gamsungho-a thunei ho jouse chu Nebuchadnezzar lengpan atundoh milim thensona-a ding chun khopkhomin ahung um taovin; chule Nebuchadnezzar'in atundoh milim maija chun adingun ahi." 
Daniel3:4 Chujouvin khosam khatnin gingtah-in ahinsamin, Vo mipiteho, namtin, chule paotin paotangho, hichehi naheng uva thupeh ahi." 
Daniel3:5 Hitia chu nanghon sumkon binei, theile, selangdah, sumkonsao, tumging, chule agingthei jouse gin najah phatnule, nabohkhup uva Nebuchadnezzar lengpan atundoh milimhi nahou dingu ahi." 
Daniel3:6 Chule koihile bohkhupma hou louva chu chuche nidan mama chu meilhum sunga kiseplut ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel3:7 Hijeh chun mipi ho jouse chun sumkon binei, theile, selangdah, sumkonsao, tumging, chule agingthei jouse gin ajah jah-un, mipi ho jouse, namtin, chule paotin paotangho chu aboh khupmun, chule Nebuchadnezzar lengpan atundoh sana milim chu ahou taovin ahi." 
Daniel3:8 Chuti ahin chuche pettah chun Chaldea mi phabep ahung naijun, chule Judah miho chu ahung hehseuvin ahi." 
Daniel3:9 Amahon Nebuchadnezzar lengpa henga, Vo lengpa, hingjingin." 
Daniel3:10 Vo lengpa, nangman mitinin sumkon, theile, selangdah, sumkonsao, tumging, chule agingthei jouse gin ajah tengule bohkhup cheh uva, chule sana milim chu ahou diuvin thupeh nanapen ahi." 
Daniel3:11 Chule koihile bohkhupma houlou chan chu meilhum deujeju sunga kiseplut ding ahi, natin ahi." 
Daniel3:12 Nangman Judah mi phabep Babylon gamkai sunga vaipo-a natun aumun, amaho chu Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego ahiuvin; vo lengpa, hiche miho hin nangma nahsah-in nanei pouvin ahi. Amahon nangma pathen ho ajen pouvin, chule nangman natundoh sana milim jong ahou pouvin ahi, atiuve." 
Daniel3:13 Chuin Nebuchadnezzar'in lungsatah le lunghang tah-in, Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego ahinpui diuvin thupeh aneitai. Chuin amahon hiche miho chu lengpa anga ahinpui taovin ahi." 
Daniel3:14 Nebuchadnezzar'in ahenguva, Vo Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego, nanghon keima pathen ho najen pouvin, chule keiman katundoh sana milim jong nahou pouve, kitihi tahbeh ham?" 
Daniel3:15 Tu-a hi nanghon sumkon binei, theile, selangdah, sumkonsao, tumging, chule agingthei jouse gin najah phatnule nabohkhup uva chule keiman katundoh milim chu hou dinga kigosa um nahi vangule, aphai: ahinla nanghon nahou louvule vang, apetpetna nangho meilhum deujeju sunga kiseplut ding nahiuvin; chule kakhut teni-a kona nahuhdoh thei diu Pathen chu koi ham? tin aseitan ahi." 
Daniel3:16 Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego'n lengpa adonbutnun, ajah-a, Vo Nebuchadnezzar hiche thua hin keihon nangma donbut ding ngaikhoh kasapouve." 
Daniel3:17 Hitichu ahi tah-a ahi jongle, Vo lengpa, kajenpao keiho Pathen hin keiho meilhum deujejua kona eihuhdoh theiju ahin, chule nangma khutna kona jong eihuhdoh dingu ahi." 
Daniel3:18 Ahinla achutilou jongle, Vo lengpa nangman hichehi he-in, keihon nangma pathen ho kajenlou diu, chule nangman natundoh sana milim jong kahoulou dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Daniel3:19 Chutahchun Nebuchadnezzar chu lungsatnan adimtan, chule Shadrach, Meshach, chule Abednego dounan amel akikhel jengtai. Hijeh chun aman meilhum chu asatdan ajat sagi-a sajo-a satsah bena dingin thu apetai." 
Daniel3:20 Chuin aman agalsat miho lah-a hatdang lhadeh ho chun Shadrach, Meshach, chule Abednego akantumuva, chule meilhum deujeju sunga alelut diuvin thu apetai." 
Daniel3:21 Chuin hiche miho chu asangkholchol hou, asangkhol sungnung, alukhuhhou, chule avonu adang dangin akantumun, meilhum deujeju sunga chun aseplut taovin ahi." 
Daniel3:22 Hitichun Lengpa thupeh chu mangang tah ahi jehle, lhum chu asat behseh jeh-in, chuche meikong chun Shadrach, Meshach, chule Abednego seplutna miho chu akalihtan ahi." 
Daniel3:23 Chule hiche pasal thumho Shadrach, Meshach, chule Abednego chu, meilhum deujeju lailunga chun kantum san alhalut taove." 
Daniel3:24 Chujou chun Nebuchadnezzar lengpan kidang asan, gangtah-in akipatdoh-in, chule athumop themho henga chun, Eihon meilhum sunga chu pasal thum ikantum uva iselutnu hilou ham? ati. Amahon adonbutnun, lengpa jah-a, Ahinai lengpa, atiuve." 
Daniel3:25 Aman adonbutnin, Veuvin keiman pasal li kilhamlha-a mei lailunga avaleu kamun, chule amaho ima ati pouve; chule ali channapa lim khu Pathen chapa abangin ahi, ati." 
Daniel3:26 Chujouvin Nebuchadnezzar chu meilhum deujeju kot koma chun ahungin, ajah uva, Nangho chungnung pen Pathen sohte, Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego, hungdoh-un, chule hilama hungun, ati. Chuin Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego chu mei lailunga konin ahungpotdoh taove." 
Daniel3:27 Chuin pipuiho, gamvaipoho, gal lamkai, chule lengpa thumopthem ho, khopkhoma umho chun hiche pasal ho meikouvin atahsao chunga tha aneijou lou, asamu jang khat jengjong kinlouva, asangkholhou jong kikhel dehlou, chule meikhu gim himhim jong achunguva anamlou chu amutaove." 
Daniel3:28 Chuin Nebuchadnezzar'in hitin aseitai, Avantil ahinsola, ama tahsan-ah asohte ahuhdoh-a Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego Pathen chu nunnom hen: amahon amaho Pathen tailou pathen adang anei loudiu le ahoulouna dinguvin lengpa thupeh jengjong apalkeh-un, atahsao apedoh jengun ahi." 
Daniel3:29 Hijeh-a chu keiman thupeh kapeh ahi, amitakip, namtin, chule paotin paotangin Shadrach, Meshach chule Abednego Pathen douna-a seikhel khat neija chu, ahal hala kichenna, chule a-inhou jong chu eh kholna kiso ding ahi. Ajehchu hitobanga huhdoh jou Pathen adang aumpon ahi, ati." 
Daniel3:30 Chujouvin lengpan Shadrach, Meshach, chule Abednego chu Babylon gam sunga chun atohmunu adomsangtan ahi." 
Daniel4:1 Nebuchadnezzar lengpan, Mipi, namtinho, chule paotin paotang, leiset pumpi sunga chengho henga; nachung uva lungmona punghen." 
Daniel4:2 Chungnung pen Pathen'in kachunga melchihna le thilkidang atohdohho phondoh ding pha dingin kagelin ahi. 
Daniel4:3 Amelchihnaho iti loupia hitam! chule athilbol kidangho itobanga thaneija hitam! alenggam chu tonsot lenggam ahin, chule avaihomna chu akhang akhanga umjing ahi." 
Daniel4:4 Keima Nebuchadnezzar hi ka-in sunga kakicholdon, chule kaleng inpia sunga khangtou tah-in kaumin ahi." 
Daniel4:5 Keiman mang khat kananeijin, hichun eikichat sah-e, chule kajalkhun chunga kalunggelho le kathilmu chun eilungkham sah lheh-in ahi." 
Daniel4:6 Hijeh chun keiman ka-anga Babylon michingho jouse puilutna aumuva, amahon kamang ledohna eihetsah diuvin thupeh khat kaneitai." 
Daniel4:7 Hichun mitpheldoi themho, ahsi lekhathem ho, Chaldea miho, chule khonung thusei ho ahunguvin: keiman amaho anga kamang chu kanaseijin, ahinla amahon kamang aledohna chu eihetsah thei pouve." 
Daniel4:8 Ahinla akhonna-in Daniel keima anga ahunglutnin, ama min chu ka-pathen min dungjuijin Belteshazzar kisah ahin, chule ama-a hi pathen thengho lhagao chu uma ahin; chule ama anga keiman kamang chu kaseijin," 
Daniel4:9 Vo Belteshazzar, mitpheldoi themho pipui, keiman nangma-ah pathen thengho lhagao aume, chule thuguh imachan nangma nasulung jingpoi ti kahet jeh-in, kamanga kathilmuho chule hiche aledohna chu keima neisei peh-in kati ahi." 
Daniel4:10 Hicheho hi kajalkhuna mu kananeiho chu ahi; Keiman leiset lailung tah-a thingphung khat kanamun, chule asanlam chu asang tangei jenge." 
Daniel4:11 Thingphung chu ahung khangin, ahung det lheh-in; chule asan chu van aphan, leiset mong jouse-a konin hichu akimu phan ahi." 
Daniel4:12 Ado ho chu ahoijin, chule aga atam lheh-in, chule hichu ahingthei jouse dinga an ahi: gama saho alim noija aumun, chule chungleng vachaho abahho-a achengun, chule tahsa hing jouse hichea kon chun khoukhah-in anaumin ahi." 
Daniel4:13 Keiman kajalkhuna kalupma mu kanei chun, veuvin, angahpa, mitheng khat van'a kona hungkumlha kanamun;" 
Daniel4:14 Ama chun gingtah-in asamin, thingphung chu phuhlhu uvin, chule abahho jong tanbongun; anaho malngim un, chule aga chu thecheh-un: anoija konchun gamsaho chu chedoh uhen, chule abahho-a konin vachaho chu lengdoh uhen." 
Daniel4:15 Hijengjongle abul le ajung chu leija thihle sum-eng khaovin kanunlang, gamlah-a hamdongho lah-a dalhauvin; chule hichu van daituijin chapkot hen, chule ama chan chu hampa lah-a saho chan toh umtha hen." 
Daniel4:16 Alungthim chu mihem lungthima konin kikhel henlang, sahem lungthim kipehen: chule achung chu phat sagin lhunkhum hen." 
Daniel4:17 Hiche thuhi angahho thupeh jal leh, mithengho thun angehkhoh jal ahi: mihemte lenggam sunga hin Chungnung pennin vai ahomin, chule hichu koihile alung lhainapa chu apen, chule mihemte lah-a anoinungpen jong chu hiche chunga chun atungdohjin ahi, ti mihing hon ahet theina dinguva kibol ahi." 
Daniel4:18 Hiche manghi keima lengpa Nebuchadnezzar'in kanamat ahi. Tun nangma, Vo Belteshazzar, aledohna phongdoh-in, kalenggam sunga michingho jousen aledohna keima eihetsah jou pouve: amavang nangman naledoh theiding ahi; ajehchu nangma-a pathen thengho lhagao aumin ahi." 
Daniel4:19 Hichun Belteshazzar kitipa Daniel chu nidan khat jen kidang satah-in aumin, chule aluggel chun asulung gimin ahi. Hichun lengpan, Belteshazzar, mang le aledohna chun nasulunggim hihhen, tin aseije. Belteshazzar'in adonbutnin, Ka pakai mang hi nahot te-a hihen, chule aledohna jonghi namelmate ho-a ding hijo hileh!" 
Daniel4:20 Thingphung nanamu-a, khang cheh cheh, hung kiphutdet, asan van gei phajeng, chule kolmong geija kimupha;" 
Daniel4:21 Chuche thingdo hoisel ho, ga tamtah nei, chua ahingthei jouse dinga an aumna, anoija gamsaho achen na, chule abahho-a chungleng vachaho achen nachu:" 
Daniel4:22 Vo lengpa, hiche hung khang cheh cheh-a chule kiphut detna chu nangma nahi. Ajehchu naletna ahung khangin, chule van aphan, chule navaihom nan leiset mong aphatan ahi." 
Daniel4:23 Chule lengpan angah-a mitheng khat van'a kona ahung nanamu-a, Thingphung chu phuhlhu uvin, chule sumangun, ahinla leija abul chu thihle sum-eng khaovin kanun lang, gamlah-a hamnou lah-a dalhauvin, chule hichu van'a daitwi chapkotnin umhen lang, chule achung chu phat sagin alhunkhum masangsen, ama chan chu gamlah-a saho chan hithahen, tia asei chu ahile," 
Daniel4:24 Hichehi aledohna ahi, Vo lengpa, hichehi chungnung pen thupeh, ka lengpa pakai chunga hunglhung thupeh chu ahi." 
Daniel4:25 Hitia chu amahon nangma mihem lah-a kona nadel mang dingu, chule nachenna mun chu gamlah-a gamsaho toh hitha ding, chule amahon bongchalho banga nangma hampa nanehsah dingu, chule amahon nangma van daitwija nasuhchet dingu, chule hiti achu nachunga phat sagi lhungding; nangman chungnung penin mihemte lenggama vai ahomin, chule hichu aman apehnompa chu apen ahi ti nahet masangse-a chuti ding ahi." 
Daniel4:26 Chule amahon hiche thingbul chu hoidenun tia athupeh chu, vanhon vai ahomna aneijui ti nahetdoh jou tengle nalenggam chu nangma-a hikit tei ding ahi." 
Daniel4:27 Hijeh chun, Vo lengpa, kathumop nahi nangma dingin santhei hihen; chonphat na-in nachonset naho subeijin, chule vaichate hepina-in nakhan gitlou naho subeijin. Chuti henlang hile nalung olna suhsaova umthei maithei ahi, ati." 
Daniel4:28 Hicheho jousehi leng Nebuchadnezzar chunga ahung lhungtan ahi. 
Daniel4:29 Lha somle lhani ahung kichaijin ama Babylon lenggam leng inpia avahlen ahi. 
Daniel4:30 Lengpan thu aseijin, Hiche Babylon loupitah hi, kalenggam in dinga keiman kathahat kathaneina-a, chule kalalna hi jabola aumna dinga kasahdoh hilouham? ati." 
Daniel4:31 Lengpan thu asei nalaijin, van'a konin aw khat ahung gingin, Vo Nebuchadnezzar lengpa, hichehi nangma henga kisei ahi; lenggam hi nangma-a kona kitol manga ahitai." 
Daniel4:32 Chule amahon nangma miho lah-a kona nadeldoh dingu, chule nachenna chu gamsaho lah hiding, amahon bongchalho banga nangma hampa nanehsah dingu, chule mihemho lenggam-ah Chungnung penin vai ahomin, chule hichu aman apehnompa chu koihile apejie, ti nahet tokahse-a phat sagi nachunga lhung ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel4:33 Hiche nidan mama chun hichu Nebuchadnezzar chunga aguilhungin ahi. Chule ama chu mihem lah-a konin delmangin aumin, chule bongchalho bangin hampa anen, chule amulho muvanlai mul abah-a, chule atinho vachaho tin banga akhan geijin, atahsa chu van'a daitwi suhchetnin aumtan ahi." 
Daniel4:34 Chuin nikhoho chu ahungbei phatnin, keima Nebuchadnezzar van lama kakhodah-in, chule kahetthem theina chu keima-a ahung kilekit tan, keiman chungnung pen chu kathangvah-in, chule keiman a-imatih chana hingjing, alengvai homna tonsotna lengvai homna hia, chule alenggam chu akhang akhanga hijingpa chu kavah choijin, jana kapen ahi." 
Daniel4:35 Chule leisetna chengho jouse chu imacha hilouva sim ahiuvin; Chule aman van'a galsat miho lahle, leisetna chengho lah-a alung deilam abolin: chule koimachan ama khut akhamtang joupon, chule ama henga, ipi nabol ham? jong ati theipon ahi." 
Daniel4:36 Hiche phat mama chun kalunggel theina chu kahenga ahung kilekitnin, chule kalenggam loupina dingin, jabol kahinale kaloupina chu kahenga ahung kilekitnin: chule kathumop themho le kapipui hon keima eihung holdoh-un; chule nasatah-a jabolna chu keima-a eikibe peh-in ahi." 
Daniel4:37 Tunvang keima Nebuchadnezzar'in van lengpa chu kavah choijin, kachoisangin, chule jana kapetai, Ama natoh jouse thutah ahin, chule alampiho jouse thudih ahi. Chule koihile kiletsahna-a kalsongho chu, aman asunem theijin ahi." 
Daniel5:1 Belshazzar lengpan semang sangkhat ho din golvah lentah khat anabolin, chule chuche sangkhat maija chun ju adonin ahi." 
Daniel5:2 Belshazzar'in ju atep pumchun, apa Nebuchadnezzar'in Jerusalem houin'a kona anapohdoh sana le dangka khonho chu; lengpa, chule apipuiho, a-inneipiho, chule athaikemhon ju adonna diuva agalahdoh diuvin thu apetan ahi." 
Daniel5:3 Chuin amahon Jerusalem'a um Pathen houin'a kona anakiladoh sana khonho chu ahinpodoh taovin; chule hicheho-a chun lengpa, chule apipuiho, ajite le athaikemho chun ju adon taovin ahi." 
Daniel5:4 Amahon ju adonun, chule sana, dangka, sum-eng, thih, thing chule songa kisem pathenho chu avahchoi taovin ahi." 
Daniel5:5 Hiche pettah chun mihem khutjungho ahung kilah-in, lengpa inpi bang kiloijol meivah gahsalna laitah chu ahin jihtan; chule lengpan bang hin jih-a khut keuseh chu amutan ahi." 
Daniel5:6 Chuin lengpa maiso akikhel jengtan, chule alung gimlheh jengtan ahile, akong kisuhtonaho akilong gamin, chule akhup teni khatle khat akitatto jengtan ahi." 
Daniel5:7 Lengpan ahsi lekhathem ho, Chaldea miho, chule khonung thuseidoh ho chu ahinpuilut nadiuvin awging tah-in asamtan ahi. Chule lengpan thu aseijin, Babylon michingho jah-a chu, koihile hiche akijih simdoh-a, chule aledohna eivetsah theija chu, ponsandupma kivon ding, chule angonga sana vui ki o-peh ding, chule lenggam sunga thunei thum channa-a kipansah ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel5:8 Chuin lengpa michingho jouse chu ahunglut taove. Ahinla amahon akijih chu asimdohthei pouvin, chule aledohna jong lengpa ahetsah thei tapouvin ahi." 
Daniel5:9 Hichun Belshazzar lengpa chu hatah-in alungkham chehtan, ama-a chun amaiso akikhehtan, chule asemanghon kidang asataovin ahi." 
Daniel5:10 Tun lengnu chu lengpa le asemangho thusei ho jeh-in golvah insunga ahunglutnin, chuin lengnun hitin aseije; Vo lengpa, hing jingin: nalunggel ho chun nangma nagimsah hihhen, chule namaiso jong kikhelsah hih-in:" 
Daniel5:11 Nalenggam sunga hin pathen thengho lhagaoho umna pasal khat aumin ahi. Chule napa nikho laijin ama-a chun pathenho chihna tobang, salvahna, hetthem theina, chule chihna akimudoh-in; kaseipeh nahi, amachu Nebuchadnezzar lengpa, napa lengpa chun mitpheldoi choiho, ahsi lekhathem ho, Chaldea miho chule khonung thusei ho pipuija anapansah ahi." 
Daniel5:12 Ajehchu lhagao kidangtah, hetna, hetthem theina, mangho ledohna, thulhuh hahtahho mudohsahna, chule lung opkai naho suhbeina chu, lengpan amin Belteshazzar anasah Daniel'a chun ana kimudoh-in ahi: tun Daniel chu kousah-in, chule aman aledohna navetsah ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel5:13 Chuin Daniel chu lengpa anga puilutnin aumtai. Chuin lengpan Daniel henga aseijin, Judah gama kona kapan ahinpuidoh, Judah sohchangho chate lah-a Daniel kiti chu nangma nahim?" 
Daniel5:14 Keima nangma-a pathenho lhagao nangma-a aumin, vah le hetthem theina chule chihna nasatah nangma-a akimue, ti kanajan ahi." 
Daniel5:15 Chule tutah chun michingho le ahsi lekhathem ho chu hiche akijih simdoh dingle, aledohna keima eihetsah dingin ka-angsunga ahung kipuilut un; ahinla amahon hiche thil ledohna chu avetsah thei pouve." 
Daniel5:16 Chule nangman ledohnaho nabol theijin, chule lung opkai naho jong nasubei theije, ti nachung chang thu keiman kanajan ahi. Tun nangman hiche akijihhi nasimdoh theija, chule hiche aledohna chu neihetsah theija ahile, nangma ponsandup naki silpeh ding, nangonga sana khivui naki-o pehding, chule lenggam sunga thunei thum na-a nakipansah ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel5:17 Chujouvin Daniel'in lengpa adonbutnin, lengpa angsunga hitin aseije, Nathilpeh ho chu nangma-a hihen, chule nakipaman ho chu midang khat pejon; hijeng jongle lengpa henga keiman akijih chu kasimdoh ding, chule akoma aledohna kahetsah ding ahi." 
Daniel5:18 Vo nangma lengpa, Chungnung pen Pathen'in napa Nebuchadnezzar chu lenggam, lalna, loupina, chule jana anapen ahi." 
Daniel5:19 Chule aman lalna anapeh jalchun, mipi ho, namtin, chule paotin paotang jouse amasanga anakithing thingun, chule anakichauvin ahi. Aman athanom athatnin, chule ahinghoinom ahinghoijin, chule atundoh nom atungdoh-in, chule asuhlhuh nom asulhun ahi." 
Daniel5:20 Ahivangin ama alungsung ahung kichoi sanga, chule kiletsahna-in alungthim atahsah phatnin, ama aleng laltouna-a konin sotlhah-in ana umin, chule amahon ama-a konchun loupina ana lahdoh peh-un ahi." 
Daniel5:21 Chule ama chu mihem chate lah-a konin deldoh-in ana umin; chule ama lungthim chu gamsaho lungthim tobangin akisemtan, chule achenna jong gam sanganho chenna chu anahi. Chule Chungnung pen Pathen'in mihem lenggam chunga hin vai ahomin, chule aman koi hile alunggot chanchu chuche chunga thunei dingchun atungdohjin ahi ti ahetdoh kahsen, amahon ama chu bongchalho bangin hampan avah-un, atahsa chu van'a kon daitwi suhchetnin aumin ahi." 
Daniel5:22 Chule achapa, vo Belshazzar, nangman hitiho jousehi nahet jeng vangin, nalungsung nasunempoi;" 
Daniel5:23 Nangma van Pakai dounan nakichoi sangin, chule amahon Pathen in'a khonho chu namasanga ahinchoijun, hicheho-a chun nangma le nasemangho, najite le nathaikem hon jun adonun; chule nangman khomulou, khojalou, chule, khohelou, dangka, sana, sum-eng, thih, thing, chule song pathen ho chu navahchoi jin: chule nahaina hu akhutna choipa, chule nalampi jouse neipa Pathen chu loupina napepon ahi." 
Daniel5:24 Chuin Pathen'a konin khut khat ahung kisolin, chule akijihhi ahinjih-in ahi." 
Daniel5:25 Chule hiche hi akijih ahung kisundoh chu ahi, MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPHARSIN." 
Daniel5:26 Hichehi athil ledohna ahi: MENE; Pathen'in nalenggam chu asimin, chule akichai sahtai." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL; khaikot ho-a nangma nakilep in, nalhahsamna akimudoh tai." 
Daniel5:28 PERES; nalenggam akihom khenin, chule Medes te leh Persia te akipetai, ati." 
Daniel5:29 Hichun Belshazzar'in thupeh apen, chule amahon Daniel chu ponsandup asilpeh-un, chule sana khivui angonga a-opeh-un, chule ama chu lenggam chunga chu thunei thumna hiding ahi tin ama chungchang chu aphongjal taovin ahi." 
Daniel5:30 Hiche jan tahchun Chaldea mite lengpa Belshazzar chu akithat tai. 
Daniel5:31 Chule Media mi Darius chun kum somgup le kumni vel ahi-in lenggam chu alatai. 
Daniel6:1 Darius'in lenggam pumpi hopsoh-a, lenggam chunga chu pipui jakhatle somni koiding pha asan ahi." 
Daniel6:2 Lengpa chun kisuhmona aneilouna dingle, pipuiho chun suhtohna apeh theina dingun, hicheho chunga chun vaipipo thum akoijin, amaho lah-a chun Daniel hi akhatna ahi." 
Daniel6:3 Chuin ama-a chu Pakai lhagao dihtah aum jeh-in, hiche Daniel hi vaipipo hole pipuiho jouse chunga deitumin ahung umtan; chule lengpan ama chu gam pumpi chunga tundoh ding tia agel ahi." 
Daniel6:4 Chuphatnin vaipipo hole pipuiho chun lenggam chungchanga Daniel themona mudohna dingin agomkom aholtauvin; ahinla amahon phat gomkomle amona amujou pouve; ajehchu ama tahsan umtah ahin, suhkhel le mona jong ama-a akimulou ahi." 
Daniel6:5 Chuin hiche miho hin, a-Pathen danthu chungchanga ama douna-a athemmo nading imulou ngalule, eihon Daniel douna-a athemona imulou dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Daniel6:6 Chuin hiche vaipipo hole pipu ho chengse chu lengpa henga ahung kikhomun, chule ahenga hitin aseijuve, Darius lengpa, hing jingin." 
Daniel6:7 Lenggam sunga vaipipo ho, gamvai poho, chule pipuiho, thumopthem ho, chule gal lamkai ho jousen, Vo lengpa, koihile nisomthum sunga lengpa nangma heng tailou Pathen le mihem dang henga taona neichan chu, keipi bahkai hong sunga selut jeng dingin, leng thupeh khat phudoh-a, thugahna dettah semdingin kihoukhomna kaneijun ahi." 
Daniel6:8 Tun, Vo lengpa, thupeh chu phutdoh-in, chule kikhel ngailou Mede le Persia mite thupeh dungjuija khela aum louna dingin, akijih chu soi kai khumin, atiuve." 
Daniel6:9 Hitichun Darius lengpan akijih le thupeh chu soi akai khum tan ahi. 
Daniel6:10 Tun Daniel'in akijih chu soi akikai khumtai ti ahet phatnin, ama a-insunga alutnin; chule aumna indan bang kot ho chu Jerusalem lam nga-a kihong ahito lhonin, nikhatnin thumvei akhupma adilsun, ataovin, chule masanga abolji bangin, aman Pathen anga thangvahna aneijin ahi." 
Daniel6:11 Chuin hiche mihem hohi ahung kikhomun, chule a-Pathen ang sunga Daniel'in taona le thumna anei chu amudoh taove." 
Daniel6:12 Chuin amaho ahung naijun, chule lengpa angsunga chun lengpa thupeh chung changthu aseitaovin; Vo lengpa, nangman koihile nisomthum sunga nangma heng tailouva, Pathen le mihem dang koma taona neichan chu, keipi bahkaiho kosunga selutna umding ahi, tia na soi nakai hitalou ham? atiuve. Lengpan adonbutnin, kikhel ngailou Mede le Persia mite dan dungjuijin, akisei chu adih-e, ati." 
Daniel6:13 Hichun amahon adonbutnun, lengpa anga chun, Vo lengpa, Judah sohchang chateho lah-a Daniel'in nangma, chule soi nakaikhum nathupeh chu nahsah-in aneipon, amavang nikhatnin thumvei taona anei jinge, atiuve." 
Daniel6:14 Chuin lengpan hiche thuho hi ajah phatnin, amale ama aki oimo lheh jengin, chule Daniel huhdoh tei nading lungthim angaiton; chule nilhum kahsen ama huhdohna dingin athohgim lheh-in ahi." 
Daniel6:15 Chuin hiche mihohi lengpa henga ahung kikhomun, lengpa henga, Vo lengpa, thupeh hile dankisun hile lengpan aphudoh chu kikhel thei lou ahi tia Mede mite le Persia miten dan anei ahi, tihi he-in, atiuve." 
Daniel6:16 Hichun lengpan thu apen, amahon Daniel chu ahinpuijun, keipi bahkaiho hong sunga aseplut taovin ahi. Tun lengpan Daniel jah-a, Tantih neilouva najen jing na-Pathen chun nahuhdoh hen, ati." 
Daniel6:17 Chuin song khat ahin domun, keipi bahkai hongsung akama chun akoijun; Daniel chungchanga tohgon chu akikhel thei louna dingin, lengpa amatah-in akhutjema sinkhana le asemangho khutjema sinkhana chu anam khum tan ahi." 
Daniel6:18 Chujouvin lengpa chu aleng inpia achen, chuche jan chu an ngolna-in amangtan; tumging thei manchah ho jong ama anga akipolut thei tapon; chule a-imu tapon ahi." 
Daniel6:19 Chuin lengpa chu jingkah matah-in athoudoh-in, chule keipi bahkaiho hong sung lam jonin gangtah-in achetai." 
Daniel6:20 Chule keipi bahkai hong chu agah phah phah-in, Daniel henga lunghemtah aw chengin agahsamin, Daniel henga, Vo Daniel, hingjing Pathen sohpa, nahinjen jing na-Pathen chun keipi bahkai ho-a kona nahuhdoh jou hinam? ati." 
Daniel6:21 Chuin Daniel'in lengpa henga, Vo lengpa, hing jingin." 
Daniel6:22 Ka Pathen'in avantil ahinsolin, amahon keima eisukhah louna dingun, keipi bahkaiho kam asip peh-in ahi: Ama angsunga monabei kahi akimu bangin, vo lengpa nangma angsunga jong keiman thilse kabolpon ahi, ati." 
Daniel6:23 Hichun lengpa chu akipah tangeijin, chule Daniel chu keipi hongsunga kona agalahdoh dingun thupeh apetai. Hitichun Daniel chu keipi hongsunga kon chun aladoh-un, chule aman a-Pathen atahsan jeh-in, achunga kisuhkhahna imacha akimupoi." 
Daniel6:24 Chuin lengpan thupeh apen, amahon Daniel hehseho chu agapuijun, amaho toh, achateu toh, chule a-inneipi teo chu keipi bahkai hongsunga aseplut taovin; chuin keipi bahkai hon amaho chunga thanei tah-in, aguho jouseu tol chuman louvin asungemsel taove." 
Daniel6:25 Chujouvin Darius lengpan leiset pumpi-a cheng mipite, namtinho, chule paotin paotangho henga hitihin lekha ajihtan ahi; nachung uva lungmonna punghen." 
Daniel6:26 Keiman thulhah khat kanei ahitai, kalenggam le kalalna gamsungse-a mihemte jouse Daniel Pathen anga kithing thingle ging geh-a naum dingu ahi. Ajehchu ama hingjing Pathen ahin, chule tonsotna longlou, alenggam chu suhmanga umlou ding lenggam ahin, chule alalna jong akhonna geija umjing ding ahi." 
Daniel6:27 Aman alhatdoh-in ahuhdoh-in, chule vanle leiset chunga melchihna ho le thil kidangho abolin, keipi bahkaiho thanei na-a konin Daniel ahuhdoh-in ahi." 
Daniel6:28 Hitichun hiche Daniel hi Darius lallai sungse, chule Persia mipa Cyrus lal laijin anaphatouvin ahi." 
Daniel7:1 Babylon lengpa Belshazzar kum masapenin, Daniel'in ajalkhun chunga alupna-a mang le gaothilmu ho aneijin: chuin aman amang chu ajihdoh-in, chule athilho umdol chu aseijin ahi." 
Daniel7:2 Daniel'in hitihin aseije, jana gaothilmu kamu chun jan ahin, chule veuvin, van'a kon hui li chu twipilen chun achoh thouvin ahi." 
Daniel7:3 Chuin twipia kon chun sahem len tahtah jatchom cheh li ahungdoh-in ahi. 
Daniel7:4 Amasapen chu keipi bahkai toh abangin, chule muvanlai lhavingho aneijin; alhavingho chu bodoh-a auma, chule ama chu leisetna kona dopsanga auma, mihem khat banga akenga akidinsah, chule mihem lungchang akipeh gei chu kanaven ahi." 
Daniel7:5 Chule veuvin sahem chomkhat, anichanna chu vompi toh abangin, chule amale ama alang khatna ahung kidom sangin, chule akam sunga ahakah-a chun nahgu thum aumin ahi: chule amaho chun chuche henga, thouvin lang saphe tamtah nen, atiuvin ahi." 
Daniel7:6 Hiche jouchun keiman kaven, veuvin atungtuna vacha lhaving li neija lutnu tobang achomkhat kamui; hiche sahem chun luchang li jong aneijin, chule thuneina chu ama akipen ahi." 
Daniel7:7 Hiche jouchun jana kathilmuho-a chun, Veuvin, sahem lina, tijat le kichat umtah, nasatah-a hat kamun; hichun thih-a kisem ha lentah aneijin; hichun anen ahalhalin achip bongin, chule amoh chu akengton achilin: hiche sahem chu amasa-a sahemho sangin achombeh-in, chule ki som aneijin ahi." 
Daniel7:8 Keiman akiho chu kangaiton ahile, veuvin, alah uva chun kineo chom khat ahung mum doh-in, chuche masanga chun ki masa thumho chu ajunga konin bodoh-in aumin: chule veuvin, hiche ki-a chun mihem mit ho tobang aumin, chule thulen tahtah seidohna kam jong aume." 
Daniel7:9 Keiman laltounaho tundoh-a auma, chule khanglui laija patna umpehpa, avon buhbang banga bang, chule aluchang sam jong samul thengseh bang jengpa ahungtou geijin kagahmun ahi. Ama laltouna chu meikou deujeju, chule akang kolho jong chu mei-al tah toh abangin ahi." 
Daniel7:10 Meikou luidung bangin ahung longdoh-in chule ama angsunga konin ahungdoh-in ahi. Asang asangin ama ajenun, chule sangsom jat sangsom ama anga adingun: thutanna chu gonsa ahitan, chule lekhabu ho chu akiphong kehtai." 
Daniel7:11 Chujouvin keiman hiche ki chun thu len tahtah aseiho jeh-in kagahven: chule sahem akitha-a, atahsa suhmanga, meikou deujeju henga akipehdoh geijin kaven ahi." 
Daniel7:12 Sahem dangho sechu ahile, amaho thuneina chu lahdoh-in aumin; ahijeng vangin ahinkhou vang chu phatbihle phat khatna dingin akisusaovin ahi." 
Daniel7:13 Keiman jana thilmuho kaneija chun, veuvin, mihem chapa tobang khat van meilomho toh ahungin, chule khanglui laija patna umpehpa koma ahungin, chule amahon ama chu ama anga ahinpui naijun ahi." 
Daniel7:14 Chuin mitin, namtin, chule paotin paotang jousen ajen theina dingin, ama chu thuneina le loupina chule lenggam khat akipei: ama thuneina chu tonsot thuneina ahin, chule hiche chu mangtalou ding, chule alenggam chu suhmanga umlou ding ahitai." 
Daniel7:15 Keima Daniel hi katahsa lunggila lunggimin kaumtai, chule kalupna-a thilmu kaneiho hin eisugenthei jin ahi." 
Daniel7:16 Keiman adingho lah-a khat chu kagahnaijin, hicheho thudol jouse-a thutah chu ama kadongtan ahi. Hichun aman keima eiseipeh-in, chule thil ho ledohna chu keima eihetsahtan ahi." 
Daniel7:17 Hiche sahem lentah lihohi, leisetna kona hung umdoh ding, leng liho ahiuve." 
Daniel7:18 Ahinla chungnung penpa mithengte chun lenggam chu alahpeh ding, chule amahon lenggam chu tonsot, atonsot chule tonsot geija alo dingu ahi." 
Daniel7:19 Chujouvin keiman sahem lina, adang jouse sanga chomdeh-a, tijat umtah, aha thih-a kisem, chule atinho sum-enga kisem; ahal halla chipgoija, chule amoh akengho-a chila;" 
Daniel7:20 Chule alua ki som umho, chule adang khat hungkeh doh-a, chule amasanga thum lhu-a; chule aki mitnei, chule akama thulen tahtah seidoh, akibahpiho sanga thahatjo thudola thutah chu het kanomin ahi." 
Daniel7:21 Keiman kaven ahile, hiche kimama chu mithengte toh akisatna, chule amaho chu ajoa," 
Daniel7:22 Khanglui laija pat ana umpa ahunga, chule chungnung penpa mithengho themchan na-a thutanna akibol masangse chu kaven; chule mithengten hiche lenggam chu alo phatnu ahung lhungtan ahi." 
Daniel7:23 Chuin aman hitihin aseije, sahem lina chu leiset chunga lenggam lina chu hiding ahin, hichu lenggam ho jouse sanga achombeh hintin, chule leiset pumpi avallhum ding, chule achotnem ding, chule ahalhalla asuhngem ding ahi." 
Daniel7:24 Hiche lenggama kona ki som hung umdoh chu leng li hung umdoh dingho ahiuve: chule amaho nunga chu adang khat hung umdoh ding, hichu amasapa toh banglouva achombeh hiding, chule aman leng thumho chu asuhlhuh ding ahi." 
Daniel7:25 Chule ama chun chungnung pen douna-a thu len tahtah aseidoh ding, chungnung pen mithengho chu asuhgenthei ding, chule phathole danho khelding ahinngaito ding ahi. Chule mithengho chu ama khutna phat khat, phat ho, chule phat kehkhat sunga kipedoh ding ahiuve." 
Daniel7:26 Ahinla thutanna chu toutei ding ahin, chule amahon athuneina chu akhonna geija suhgam dingle suhmanghel dinga alahpeh dingu ahi." 
Daniel7:27 Chuche lenggam le thuneina, vannoi pumpi-a lenggam loupina chu chungnung penpa mithengte hochu kipe ding, chuche lenggam chu tonsot lenggam ahin, chule lenggam jousen ama ajenuva athu angai dingu ahi." 
Daniel7:28 Hichanhi athu kichaina ahitai. Ahin keima Daniel vang, kalunggel hin eisugim lheh-in, chule kamel jong akikhel jengin ahi; hijongle athuhi keiman kalunggil sunga kakichin tupmin ahi." 
Daniel8:1 Belshazzar lengpa lengchan kal kum thum lhinna-in, keima Daniel, keima tah henga thilmu khat, amasa hung kilangdohpa nungin, ahung kilangdoh kitnin ahi." 
Daniel8:2 Chuin keiman gaothilmu-a chun: chule ahitin ahi, keiman kamu-a chun, keima Elam gamkai sunga um Shushan leng inpia kana umin; chule keiman gaothilmu-a chun, keima Ulai vadung kama kanaum kamun ahi." 
Daniel8:3 Chuin keima kakhodah-in, chule veuvin, vadung panga chun aki ni nei kelngoi chal khat anading kanamun: chule chuche ki teni chu asangin; ahin khat chu khat sang chun asangjon, chule asangjopa chu ahungdoh nunung jon ahi." 
Daniel8:4 Chuin kelngoi chal ama anga gamsaho khatcha ading thei aumlouna dinga lhumlam, sahlam, lhanglama, ano-a; imacha ama khutna kona huhdoh jou aumlou; ahivanga aman alung deilam lam abola, ahung letdoh lheh jengchu kamun ahi." 
Daniel8:5 Chule keiman kalung kagel laitah-in, veuvin, lhumlama konin keltah chal khat leiset pumpi chunga ahungin, chule amachun tol atongkha pon: chule hiche keltah hin amit teni kah-a ki kilangtah khat aneije." 
Daniel8:6 Chule ama chu keiman kamu aki ni nei kelngoi, vadung panga anading heng lama chun ahungin, chule aman athaneina pumpin ama chu adel jengin ahi." 
Daniel8:7 Chule aman kelngoi chal henglam ahinnai kamun, chule achunga alunghang lheh jengin, kelngoi chal chu atatnin, aki teni asuhbohpeh tan ahi. Chule kelngoi chal chun ama anga din jouna ding thaneina aneipon, ahinla aman ama chu tolla asulhun, achungu chu achilin: chule ama khutna kona kelngoi chal huhdoh ding koima aumpoi." 
Daniel8:8 Hitichun keltah chal chu ahung loupi lhehtan: chuin ama ahunghat phatnin, aki lentah chu abongtan; chule akhelin kilangtah ki li van'a hui li nunna lam ngan ahung kehdoh-in ahi." 
Daniel8:9 Chule amaho lah-a khatna konin kineo khat ahungdoh-in, hichu lhanglam, solam, chule gam nomtah lam ngan hatah-in ahung lenin ahi." 
Daniel8:10 Chuin hichu van janel ho lah geijin ahung lenin; chule hichun janel phabep le ahsi phabep tolla ahin pailhan, achungu chu achilin ahi." 
Daniel8:11 Henge, amale ama chu janel ho pipupa toh kibang khopmin akichoi anin, chule aman nitin ganlhaina thilpeh chu alamangin, chule Ama muntheng umna jong chu asulhun ahi." 
Daniel8:12 Chule ama chu, suhkhel jeh-a nitin ganlhaina thilpeh douna dingin janel khat akipen, chule hichun thutah chu tolla aseplhan: aman hichu abolin, chule aphatouvin ahi." 
Daniel8:13 Chujouvin keiman mitheng khatnin thu asei kajan, chule mitheng dang khatnin mitheng thuseipa henga chun, nitin ganlhaina, suhkhelna jeh-a manthaina, muntheng le galmi janel agoma kenga chotpha-a umdinga pehdohna phat chungchanga gaothilmu hi itihchan hiding ham? ati." 
Daniel8:14 Chuin aman kahenga, ni sangni le ni jathum gei hiding; chujouteng muntheng chu kisutheng ding ahi, tin aseije." 
Daniel8:15 Chuin ahung hitin ahi, kei, Daniel keimatah ngeijin thilmu chu kanamua, chule ipi kiseina ahi kahol chun, hichun veuvin, ka-ansunga mihem melput tobang pu khat anadingin ahi." 
Daniel8:16 Chule keiman Ulai vakam chekah-a mihem khat awgin kajan, awgin chun akouvin, ahenga, Gabriel, hiche gaothilmu hi hiche mipahi hetthem sah-in, ati." 
Daniel8:17 Hitichun ama kadinna mun koma ahungin ahi: chuin ama ahung phatnin kakichatan, kalhun tolla kamai kasulut tai. Ahinla aman keima henga, Vo mihem chapa, hethemin: ijeh inem itileh gaothilmu hi phat kichai tenga ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel8:18 Tun aman eihoupi laijin, keima kamai tollam ngan nomtah-in ka-imun ahi. Ahinla aman eihin tongkhan, chule eidindoh sah-in ahi." 
Daniel8:19 Chuin aman kahenga, ven, keiman nangma lungdamlouna akichaina lamle ipi hunglhung ding ham ti kahetsah ding nahi: ajehchu akitep phatna chu achaina hunglhung ding ahi." 
Daniel8:20 Kelngoi chal ki ni nei namu chu Media le Persia lengte ni ahiuve.
