Daniel8:21 Chule keltah sousetah chu Greek lengpa chu ahi: chule amit teni kah-a ki lentah um chu leng masapenpa ahi. 
Daniel8:22 Tun hiche ki kisuhbong le akhela li hung dondoh chu, hiche nam'a kona chu lenggam li hung umdoh ding; ahivang ama thahatna vanga hilou ding ahi." 
Daniel8:23 Chule amaho lenggam kichailam, suhkhelna neiho ahung pilhin teng, amel tijatjat umtah le thuguh hetthemna nei leng khat hung dingdoh ding ahi." 
Daniel8:24 Chule ama thaneina chu lenlheh ding ahin, ahinla amatah thaneina jal ahipoi. Chule aman kidangtah-a asuhmanga, chule khangtou ding, chule hitia chu abola thahat hole mithengho asuhmang ding ahi." 
Daniel8:25 Chule ama thilgon jala jong akhut noija doha le joule nal apunsah ding; chule alunggil sunga amale ama kichoi-an ding, chule chamna-a kona mi tamtah asuhmang ding ahi. Ama chu pipuiho pipuipa douna-a hung dingdoh ding, ahivanga ama chu khut panglouva kisubong ding ahi." 
Daniel8:26 Chule nilhah le jingkah gaothilmu-a kimu kisei chu atahbeh ahi. Hijeh chun nangman gaothilmu hi imchah-in, ajehchu nikho tamtah nunga hunglhung ding ahi." 
Daniel8:27 Hichun Daniel keima lhasamin kalhu-in, ni ijat ham damlouvin kaumtan; chujouvin keima kathoudoh-in, chule lengpa na chu katong kit tai. Chule hiche gaothil muhi kidang kasan, ahinla koimachan ahethempoi." 
Daniel9:1 Chaldea gam pumpi chunga lenga kipansah, Medes chilhah Ahasuras chapa Darius lengchankal kum khatna-in," 
Daniel9:2 Aman lengvai apoh akum khatna-in, Daniel keiman Pakai thu Jeremiah themgao henga ahunga, Jerusalem manthah na-a kum somsagi aman asuhbulhit ding ahi tia aseina lekhabu ho-a akumho jat chu kahechentan ahi." 
Daniel9:2 Aman lengvai apoh akum khatna-in, Daniel keiman Pakai thu Jeremiah themgao henga ahunga, Jerusalem manthah na-a kum somsagi aman asuhbulhit ding ahi tia aseina lekhabu ho-a akumho jat chu kahechentan ahi." 
Daniel9:3 Chuin keiman an kangol-in, khaodip pon kakisil in, vut kakinun, taona le thumna neidingin Pakai Pathen lam kangatnin ahi." 
Daniel9:4 Chuin keima Pakai ka Pathen henga kataovin, chule kamona kaphongin, kaseije; Vo Pakai, loupitah le tijat umtah Pathen, ama ngailuho le athupeh ho nit te-a dinga kitepna le hepina koipa;" 
Daniel9:5 Keiho kachonse taovin, kachonkhel taovin, giloutah-in na katongun, chule kakiphin un, nadan thupeh ho le nathutan naho geijin kajamsan taove:" 
Daniel9:6 Nangma mina kaleng hou, kavaipo hou, kapate hou, chule gamsunga miteho jouse henga thu hinsei nalhacha themgaoho thusei jong ngaisah-in kaneipeh pouvin ahi." 
Daniel9:7 Vo Pakai, chonphatna chu nangma-a ahin, hinla keiho, Judah mite, Jerusalem'a cheng miho, chule Israel pumpi naija hihen gamla-a hijongle, amahon nangma douna-a dan asuhkeh uva, adan suhkehna hou jeh uva nangman nana nodohna gam jouse-a umho dingin vang, kachanu hi tunikho-a banghin mai jum na ahi." 
Daniel9:8 Vo Pakai, nangma douna-a kachonset jeh uvin, keiho, kalenghou, kavaipohou chule kapu kapatehou ahin, mai jum na kachang taove." 
Daniel9:9 Ama kadou jeng vanguvin, hepinaho le ngaidamna chu ka Pakai Pathen uva ahin;" 
Daniel9:10 Aman alhacha athemgaoho-a kona kamasanguva akoi dan thupeh ho-a kalamlha pouvin, ka Pakai Pathen'u aw jong chu kanangai pouvin ahi." 
Daniel9:11 Ahi, Israelte jousen na aw angailouna dingun nadan thupeh apalkeh-un, achemangun; hijeh-a chu sapsetna le Pathen soh Mosi dan thupeh-a kisun hahselna chu kachunguva kisunglha ahitai, ajehchu ama dounan kachonse taove." 
Daniel9:12 Chule aman kachunguva thilse nasatah alhunsah-in, keiho le kathu-u tana kathutan hou douna-a athusei dohho chu kachunguva asuhdetnin ahi; ajehchu Jerusalem chunga kibol tobanghi vannoi pumpi-a anakibol khapon ahi." 
Daniel9:13 Mosi danthupeh-a kisun bang ngeija, hiche thilse jousehi keiho chunga lhunga ahitai. Ahijeng vangin kakhan gitlouna houva kona kakiheidoh theina dingule, nangma thutah kahetthem theina dingun, Pakai ka-Pathen'u anga keiho kanatao pouvin ahi." 
Daniel9:14 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin thilse chu aven, kachunguva alhunsahtai. Ajehchu Pakai ka-Pathen'u chu aman atohdoh thil jouse-a chonphatah ahi: keihon athu kangailou jeh-u ahibouve." 
Daniel9:15 Chule tun, Vo Pakai ka-Pathen'u, khut thahat tah-a namite Egypt gama kona hinpuidoh-a, chule tunia banga amin ana kithangpa; keiho kachonse taovin, chule giloutah-in na katong taove." 
Daniel9:16 Vo Pakai, nachon phatna ho jouse dungjuija kangeh nahi, nalunghanna le nalungsatna chu nalhang theng, Jerusalem khopi-a konin kiheidoh tahen: ajehchu keiho chonset jehle kapu kapateu khan gitlou jeh-in, Jerusalem le namite hi kaveluva umho jouse i-sah louvin kaum taove." 
Daniel9:17 Hijeh chun tun, Vo ka Pathen'u, nasoh taona le athumna hi ngaipeh-in, chule amangthahsa namun theng lama hin Pakai jal-in namaiso chu hinvah sah-in." 
Daniel9:18 Vo ka Pathen, nana hinsungin lang ngaijin; namit teni hin hasah inlang, kaman thainao le namina kivo khopi hi hinven: ajehchu kachon phatnao jeh-a na-anga kathumna hou hi hinlhutna kahipouve; ahinla nami hepina haotah jaljoh ahibouve." 
Daniel9:19 Vo Pakai, ngaitemin; vo Pakai, ngaidamin; vo Pakai, ngaijin lang tongdoh-in; Vo ka Pathen nangma jal-in geisang hih-in, ajehchu nakhopile namitehi namina kivo kahiuve." 
Daniel9:20 Chuin keiman thu kaseija, kataova, chule keima chonsetna le kami Israelte chonsetna kaphona, chule ka Pathen lhangthenga dinga kathumnaho Pakai ka Pathen ang kalhut petchun;" 
Daniel9:21 Ahi, keiman taona-a thu kasei petnin, keiman gaothilmu kanei tila kipatna kamu mikhat Gabriel chu gangtah-in ahung lengin, nilhah ganlhaina phat velin keima eihung thamin ahi." 
Daniel9:22 Chuin aman keima eihetsah-in, eiki houlimpin, aseije, Vo Daniel, tuahi keima nangma hetgilnale hetthem theina pedinga kahungdoh ahi." 
Daniel9:23 Nangman thumna naneipat tila chu thupeh chu hung kipedoh-a, chule nangma hetsah dinga keima hunga kahi; ajehchu nangma ngailut umtah nahi. Hijeh chun thil umdan hi hethemin lang, na gaothilmu chu ngaitophan." 
Daniel9:24 Suhkhelna kichaina ding, chonset suhbeina ding, khan gitlou jeh-a kichamna kisem nading, tonsot chonphatna hinpohlutna ding, gaothilmu le gaothu kisei sinkhana ding, chule theng chungnung pen thao kinuna dinga, namite chungle nakhopi theng chunga hapta somsagi kiteppeh ahitai." 
Daniel9:25 Hijeh chun henlang chule hethemin, Jerusalem sahphatna aumkit dingle akiledoh kitna dinga thupeh ahungdoh-a patna leng chapa Messiah gei chu, hapta sagile hapta somgupleni hiding ahi. Khopi lamlen le kulbang chu phat hahsa sunga kisadoh kit ding ahi." 
Daniel9:26 Chule hapta somgupleni jouteng Messiah chu kisatlha ding, ahinla ama le ama ding ahipoi: chule ahung umding mipiteho leng chapa chun khopile muntheng chu asuhbei ding; chule hichu twisangletna hung kichai ding, chule gal hungkichaina geija dinga manthaina kiteppeh ahitai." 
Daniel9:27 Chule aman kitepna chu mi tampi toh hapta khatna dinga asudet ding, chule chuche hapta kimtuhtah chule aman ganlhaina le thilpeh asuh haiding, chule thet umtahho akithejal behseh jeh-a aman akhonna geija suhmanga aumsah ding, chule hiche gotsa suhmangna chu amanthainao chunga kisunlhah beding ahi." 
Daniel10:1 Persia lengpa, Cyrus lengchan kal kum thum na-in thilkhat Daniel, Belteshazzar tia kimin vopa henga phondoh-in ahung umin; chule athil chu tahbeh ahin, ahinla aphat kitep vang chu asaove. Chule aman athil chu ahethemin, chule athilmu chunga chun hetthem theina aneije." 
Daniel10:2 Chuche laichun keima Daniel'in hapta thum lhingset kana lunghemin ahi. 
Daniel10:3 Keiman hapta thum alhin kahsen, anneh tuijong kanepon, jule sa jong kakama alutpon, chule hapta thum alhin kahsen thao jong kakinu khapoi." 
Daniel10:4 Chule lha masapen nisomni le nili nin keima Hiddekel kite vadung lentah panga kana ume. 
Daniel10:5 Chuin kagakhoda-a, kagahvetle, pasal khat tupat pona kivona, uphaz sana thengsetna atai kigeh khat kamun ahi." 
Daniel10:6 Atahsa chu songmantam engdum abangin, chule amaiso chu kolphe abangin, amit teni chu meikou kide abangin, abanho le akengphangho chu sum-eng kinot valset abangin, chule apaodoh gin jong mipi tamtah awgin abang jengin ahi." 
Daniel10:7 Keima Daniel'in bou thilmuhi kamun; kana umpi pasal hon thilmuhi amupouve; ahinla kichatna nasatah achunguva achun, chutichun amaho gakisel dingin ajammang gam taove." 
Daniel10:8 Hitichun kachangin eikidalhan, chule hiche thilmu loupitah hi kamun, tha himhim kanei tapoi; ajeh chu kamel lomna jouse asesoh-in, katha jouse jong abeiheltan ahi." 
Daniel10:9 Achutijeng vang chun keiman ama thusei awgin chu kajan; chule ama thusei awgin kajah petchun keima nomtah-in ka-imun, kamai tolla kasulutnin ahi." 
Daniel10:10 Chuin veuvin, khut khatnin eihin thamin, hichun kakhup teni le kakhut phang teni kingamin eidindoh sah-in ahi." 
Daniel10:11 Chule aman kahenga, ngailut umtah, vo Daniel, nahenga kathuseiho hethemin, chule ding jangin: ajehchu nangma henga keima eihin kisol ahi, tin aseije. Aman hichu asei phatnin, keima kithing pumpumin kadingin ahi." 
Daniel10:12 Chujouvin aman kahenga, Daniel kicha hih-in: ajehchu nalunga nahet them theina dinga chule na Pathen angsunga kisehgim dinga nalung napehpat nikho-a patna chu nathuseiho kingaipeh-a nahitan, chule nathuseiho jala chu keima hunga kahi." 
Daniel10:13 Ahinla Persia lenggam pipuipan nisomni le nikhat eina lamtine; ahinla veuvin, pipuiho lah-a khat Michael eipanpi dingin ahungin, chule chua chun Persia lengho toh kanaum khome." 
Daniel10:14 Tuahi phat nunung lama namite chunga ipi hunglhung ding ham ti nangma hetsah dinga keima hunga kahi: ajehchu gaothilmu chu nikho tamtah nunga ding ahinalaije, ati." 
Daniel10:15 Aman hiche thuho kahenga asei chun, kamai tollam kangan, chule keima paomon kaumtan ahi." 
Daniel10:16 Chule veuvin, mihem chapate kilopi khatnin kamuh ahin thamin ahi: chuin keima kakam kan, ka-anga dingpa henga chun, Vo ka Pakai, thilmu hin kachunga lunggimnaho eihinlhut peh-in, tha himhim jong kanei tapoi." 
Daniel10:17 Ajehchu hiche ka pakai sohpa hin ka pakai hi iti akihoupi theiding ham? Keima kahile vang, hiche pettah chun keima-a tha le haina thei himhim aumtapoi, katitai." 
Daniel10:18 Chuin mihem melput tobang pu-a khat ahung kitnin, eithamin, eihatsah-in," 
Daniel10:19 Chule kajah-a, Vo ngailut umtah mihem, kicha hih-in; nachunga lungmon umhen, hatnin, henge, hatnin ati. Aman kahenga thu ahinsei phatnin kahung hatdohtan, chule ahenga, nangman neisuh hattah jeh-in, ka Pakaiyin seitan, kati." 
Daniel10:20 Chujouvin aman kahenga, nahenga kahung lona ajeh nahet em? Chule tuahi keima Persia pipuipa toh kisat dinga kakile kit ding ahi: chule keima kachedoh nungle, veuvin, Greek pipuipa hung ding ahi." 
Daniel10:21 Ahinla thutah thutheng bu-a kijihlutsa anaum chu keiman nangma kavetsah ding nahi. Chule hiche thilho-a hin napipui pao Michael tailou keima eipanpi koima aumpon ahi, ati." 
Daniel11:1 Mede mipa Darius lengchan kum masapa sungin, keima ngei jong ama sudet dingle suhat dingin kanadingin ahi." 
Daniel11:2 Chule tu-a hi keiman thutah chu nangma kahin vetsah ding ahi. Veuvin, Persia gama leng thum hung dingdoh kit nalai ding; chule amaho jouse sanga alina chu gam chenga hung haosajo ding ahi. Chule aman ahaonaho le athahatna jala Greek lenggam doudinga mijouse achothou ding ahi." 
Daniel11:3 Chule leng thahat tah hung dingdoh-in tin, ama chun thaneina lentah toh tho-a vai ahinhoma, aman alungdei dungjuija abolding ahi." 
Daniel11:4 Chule ama ahung dindoh teng, alenggam chu hung kehding, leiset kolningli-a hopkhena umding; ama sonle pahho henga hilou ding, chule ama vaihomna gamkai dungjuija jong hilou ding ahi. Ijeh inem itile hicheho chengse tilouva adangho dinga jong ama lenggam chu suhlhah-a umding ahi." 
Daniel11:5 Chule lhanglam lengpa chu hung hatdoh ding, chule apipuiho lah-a khat toh; chule ama chu amapa sanga hung hatjoa, lenggam anei ding; alenggam chu lenggam lentah hung hiding ahi." 
Daniel11:6 Chule kumho ahung kichai lamteng amahole amaho hungkigom khom ding ahi; ajehchu lhanglam lengpa chanu chu sahlam lengpa henga kinoptona sem dinga hung ding; hijongle amanu chun ban thahatna chu atuhden lou ding; amapa ahia, chule amapa ban ahia ding lou ding ahi. Amavang amanu chu amanu hinpuiho, amanu hingpa, chule hicheho phat laija amanu ana suhatpa toh pehdoh-a umding ahiuve." 
Daniel11:7 Hijongle amanu jungho bahkhatna kona amapa mun lo ding khat hung dingdoh intin, ama chun galmi hon khat ahin kilhonpia, chule sahlam lengpa kulpi sunga hunglut uva, amaho akidoupi dingu, chule ajo dingu ahi." 
Daniel11:8 Chule Egypt gama sohchang dinga a-pathen hou, apipuihou toh, sana le dangka-a kisem akong le belu manlutah ho chu apohlut ding; chule amapa chu sahlam lengpa sanga kum tamjo umpeh nalai ding ahi." 
Daniel11:9 Chutia chu lhanglam lengpa chu amapa lenggama chu hunglut ding, chule ama agama kilekit ding ahi." 
Daniel11:10 Ahinla achapate chu suh thouvin hung umuntin, chule galsatmi mihonpi nasatah ahin khopkhom dingu: chule khat chu thonlouva hunga, ahinlonvuh ding, chule ajotpai peh ding: chuteng akulpi-a hungkile kitna, kitomona asuhthou ding ahi." 
Daniel11:11 Chuteng lhanglam lengpa chu alaigil kisun bangin tin, chule hungkon doh-a sahlam lengpa chu akisatpi ding: aman mihon tamtah ahintoldoh ding, hijongle mihonpi chu ama khutna kipelut ding ahiuve." 
Daniel11:12 Aman mihonpi chu apuimang teng, alungsung hung kichoisang ding; chule aman sangsom tamtah asuhlhuh ding: hijongle hichun ama asuhhat chom louding ahi." 
Daniel11:13 Ijeh-inem itile sahlam lengpa chu hung kile kitnin tin, chule amasa-a sanga mihonpi tamjocheh ahintoldoh ding, chule thonlouva kum phabep joutengle galsat mi nasatah le haona tamcheh toh hungtei ding ahi." 
Daniel11:14 Hiche phatlai teng chule mi tamtah lhanglam lengpa kidoupi ding dingdoh dingu ahi. Namite lah-a gucha michomho jong agaothilmu-u guilhunsah dinga hung kichoisang dingu; hijongle amaho lhuding ahiuve. 
Daniel11:15 Hitichun sahlam lengpa chu hungintin, chule molsang khat atundoh ding, chule kulpi kikai khum dettah khopiho chu alah ding: chule lhanglam mite hatna ananjou louding, alhentum mihon jong anan joulou dingu, nanjouna tha himhim aneilou dingu ahi." 
Daniel11:16 Hijongle ama kidoupi dinga hungpa chun alungdei deija abolding, chule koimacha ama anga dingjou umlou ding ahi. Chule ama gam loupitah sunga chu hung ding ding, hichu akhut ngeija asuhmang ding ahi." 
Daniel11:17 Ama chun alenggam pumpi thahatna le chondihho toh kitho-a hung lutding agot ding, hitia chu ahinbol ding ahi. Chule aman hiche sumang dinga chu numei ho chanu chu amapa apehding; ahivanga amanu amapa langa panglou ding, chule amapa-a ding jong hilou ding ahi." 
Daniel11:18 Hichejou tengle aman twikolho lam ahin maingat ding, chule tamtah ahinlah ding ahi. Ahivanga pipui khatnin ama kihousetna chu asuhtang ding; ama kihousetna umlouva hichu amapa chunga chukit ding ahi." 
Daniel11:19 Chutengle amapan amatah gamsung kulpilam chu ahin maingat ding: ahivanga ama chu kipal lhuding, chule kimu lou ding ahitai." 
Daniel11:20 Chujou tengle amapa mun'a chu lenggam loupina-a kai dong khat hung dingdoh ding ahi. Hijongle ni phabep sunga lunghanna jeh le gal kisatna jeh-a jong hilouva, ama chu suhmanga umding ahi." 
Daniel11:21 Chule ama mun'a chu thet umtah mi khat hung dingdoh ding, lenggam jana chu amahon ama apeh lou dingu ahi: ahinla ama chu chamna choijin hungintin, chule lenggam chu aman phatlhem na-a akimu ding ahi." 
Daniel11:22 Chule amaho chu a-angsunga kona twisanglen thahatnin alonvuh uva, chule suhsetna umding ahiuve; henge, kitepna pipuipa jong chutiding ahi." 
Daniel11:23 Chule amato kiloikhomna akisem joujoule aman jonchihtah-a na ahintoh ding ahi. Ajehchu ama hung kipandoh-in tin, mi phabep khat toh hunghat dohding ahi." 
Daniel11:24 Ama chu gamkai sunga mun phatah ho-a chu chamna ahin choija hungding; chule ama chun apate, chule apate pateuvin jong anabolkhah louvu chu ahinbol ding ahi. Aman galthil kilaho, galthil kichomdoh ho, chule haonaho chu amaho lah-a ahinthejal ding ahi. Henge, phat khat sunga dinga mundet ho douna dinga thilgonho angaito ding ahi." 
Daniel11:25 Aman lhanglam lengpa kidoupi dinga galsat mihonpi nasatah toh kitho-a athaneinale ahansanna chu ahinsuhthou ding; chule galsat mihonpi nasatah le thahat tah toh kidou dinga lhanglam lengpa chu suhthouva hungum ding; hijongle ama dingjou lou ding ahi. Ajehchu amahon ama douna-a thilgon tampi ahinnei dingu ahi. 
Daniel11:26 Henge, ama chan anneh neho chun ama asuhmang dingu, chule agalsat miho chu lonvuh-a hungum uva, chule tamtah tha-a umding ahi." 
Daniel11:27 Chule hiche leng teni lungthim chu setna bolna dinga hung kipeding, chule amanin dokhang khatna jouthu aseilhon ding; ahivanga hichu lolhing lou ding ahi. Ajehchu akichaina chu phat kitep alhun teng guilhung ding bou ahi." 
Daniel11:28 Chujou tengle ama haona thil tamtah toh agamsunga kile kitnin tin; chule alungsung chu kitepna theng douna hung hiding; chule aman suhsetna na atoh-a, ama gamsung ngeija kile ding ahi." 
Daniel11:29 Phat kitepsa ahunglhun tengle ama hung kilentin, chule lhanglam jonna hung ding; ahivanga hichu amasa ahiloule anunungjo tobang hilou ding ahi." 
Daniel11:30 Ijeh-inem itile Chittim kong inneiho chu ama toh kidou dinga hungding ahiuve. Hijeh-a chu ama lungphamo ding, hungkile kit ding, chule kitepna theng douna-a thangtom lhehding; chutia chu abolding ahi. Ama hungkile kitna, chule kitepna theng jamsanho khohsahna ahinnei ding ahi." 
Daniel11:31 Chule galsat miho chu ama lama hung dingdoh uva, chule amahon thahatna muntheng chu ahin suhboh dingu, nitin ganlhaina chu alahmang uva, chule chumuna chu suhgamna boldoh-a thet umtah chu akoi dingu ahi." 
Daniel11:32 Chule kitepna douna-a gilou tah-a thilbol hochu aman pachat lhem-a asuhboh ding: amavang a-Pathen he-a mipi hochu hatdoh uva, chule natoh lentah ho atohdoh dingu ahi." 
Daniel11:33 Chule mipi lah-a ahethemho chun mi tamtah ahilchet dingu: ahijeng vanga amaho nikho tamtah chemjam'a, meikouva, sohchan na-a, chule galthil kichomna-a lhuding ahiuve." 
Daniel11:34 Chule amaho ahunglhuh tengule kithopina themcha bou amu dingu: ahivanga mi tamtah chu pachatlhema amaho-a beh dingu ahi. 
Daniel11:35 Chule hetthem theina neiho lah-a phabep chu akichaina phatchan geija lhitchil, suhtheng, soptheng, chule bansah ahi nadinguva lhuding ahiuve; ajehchu aphat kitepsa chu ngah jinga umnalai ahi." 
Daniel11:36 Chule lengpa chun ama lunglam lamin thil ahinbol ding; chule ama chu amale ama hung kidomsanga, chule amale ama pathenho jouse sanga hung kichoisang ding, chule pathen ho Pathen douna-a thil kidang dang ahinseidoh ding, chule thangtomna chu suhbulhit ahi kahse-a phatou ding ahi. Ajehchu ahidinga kigel lhusa chu kitongdoh tei ding ahi." 
Daniel11:37 Ama chun apu apa teho Pathen ahin, numei ho lungdeilam ahin, chule ipi pathen hijongle ngaisah-a aneilou ding ahi. Ajehchu imajouse chunga amale ama kichoisang ding ahi." 
Daniel11:38 Ahivanga aman aumna mun'a hatna Pathen chu jana apeh ding; chule apu apa tehon anahet khah louvu pathen khat chu aman sana, dangka, chule songmantam ho chule dei umtah thilho-a jana apeh ding ahi." 
Daniel11:39 Chutia chu aman gamdang pathen toh kitho-a kulpidet ho douna-a na atohding, aman hichu ahetpeh-a chule aloupina aphatou sah ding: chule aman amaho chu tampi chunga thuneina aneisah-a, chule leiset chu man neija ahopkhen ding ahi." 
Daniel11:40 Chule akichaina phat teng lhanglam lengpan ama chu ahin nokhum ding: chule sahlam lengpa chu ama doudinga chimpei banga, sakol kangtalai ho toh, sakol chung chongho toh, kong innei hotoh hung dingu; chule ama chu gamsungho-a hunglut ding, chule alonvuh khuma, chepai ding ahi." 
Daniel11:41 Ama gam loupi sunga jong hunglut ding, chule gam tamtah suhlhuh-a umding ahi. Ahinla hiche Edom, Moab chule Ammon chateho bulpi ngeihi ama khutna kona hoidoh ding ahiuve." 
Daniel11:42 Aman gamho chunga jong aban ahinjah ding: chule Egypt gam hoidoh lou ding ahi. 
Daniel11:43 Aman Egypt gam thil manlutah ho, sana le dangka gouho jouse chunga tha aneiding; chule Libya mitele Ethiopia mite chu ama kalsona channa umding ahiuve." 
Daniel11:44 Hijongle solamle sahlama kona thusoh ho chun ama alungkhamsah ding: hijeh achu ama lungsa tah-a asumang dingle mihem tampi gamsahhel dinga kipandoh ding ahi. 
Daniel11:45 Chule aman aleng inpi houbuhho chu twipiho le loupitah molsang theng kikah-a ahin tundoh ding: ahijeng vanga ama akichaina hunglhung ding, chule koimachan ama akithopi lou ding ahi." 
Daniel12:1 Chule chuche phat teng chule namite chate-a dinga dingjing pipui lentah Michael chu hung dingdoh ding; chule nam khat ahung umdoh-a patna chuche phat changeija ana umkhalou gim hesohna phat khat hungum ding ahi. Chule chuche phat teng chule namite chuche lekhabua amin kijih kimuse chu huhdoh-a umding ahi. 
Daniel12:2 Chule leivui lah-a imuho chu, kimkhat tonsot hinna, chule kimkhat jachatna le tonsot themmo na-a hung thoudoh dingu ahi." 
Daniel12:3 Chule michingho chu vanthamjol vah banga vah ding ahiuvin; chule mi tamtah chonphatna lama lepuite hochu atonsot atonsotna ahsi ho toh bangdiu ahi. 
Daniel12:4 Ahinla Vo Daniel, nangman phat kichai tokah-a din thuho hi khah chah-in, chule lekhabu chu sinkha khumin: mi tamtah hung suhlhai hungtou lhaijuntin, chule hetna hung khangtou ding ahi, ati." 
Daniel12:5 Chujouvin keima Daniel'in kaven ahile, veuvin, achomdang ni ana dingin, khat chu vadung pang hilam sanga aumin, chule khat chu vadung pang khulam sanga aumin ahi." 
Daniel12:6 Chuin khat chun tupat pona kivona vadung twiho chunga umpa henga chun, hiche thil kidangho kichaina ding chu ichan sot nalai dingham? ati." 
Daniel12:7 Chuin keiman tupat ponna kivon vadung twiho chunga umpa chun akhut jetlam le veilam chu van lama adop sanga, atonsotna hingjingpa mina akihahsela, Hiche thilho jouse kichaina dingle, aman mithengho thahat asuhcheh nading phat lhina ding chu phat khat, phat ho, chule phat keh hiding ahi, tia asei kajan ahi." 
Daniel12:8 Chuin keiman thu kisei chu kajan, ahinla kahetheipon ahi: chujouvin keiman, Vo ka pakai, hiche thilho kichaina dinghi ipi hintem? kati." 
Daniel12:9 Chuin aman, Daniel nachena dinga chetan: ajehchu phat kichai kah-a dinga thuho hi kikhah-a, kisinkha-a ahitai." 
Daniel12:10 Mitamtah kisuhthenga, bangsetna ki-umsah-a, chule kisuchil ding ahi; hijongle khanggilou chu gilou jing ding: khanggilou koimachan ahetthem louding; amavang michingin ahetthem ding ahi." 
Daniel12:11 Chule nitin ganlhaina lahmanga ahung uma, chule suhgamna thet umtah ahung kitundoh-a patna chu ni sangkhat le nijani le somko umding ahi." 
Daniel12:12 Ni sangkhat le ni jathum le somthumle nga ngah jinga, chua hunglutna michu anunnom ahi." 
Daniel12:13 Ahinla akhonna ni ahikah-in nangma nachena dinga chetan; ajehchu nangma nakichol do-a, chule nikhoho kichaini leh navang channa-a nadin ding ahi, ati." 
Hosea1:1 Israel lengpa Joash chapa Jeroboam nikho laile, Judah lengte ho Hezekiah, Ahaz, Jothan, Uzziah nikho laijin, Beeri chapa Hosea henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin ahi." 
Hosea1:2 Hosea henga Pakai thu hung lhung kipatna chu ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin Hosea henga, chenlang numei noti ho chate lah-a konin noti numei khat naji dingin gakipuijin; ajehchu gamsung hi Pakaiya kona petmanga, noti'a pang gamma ahitai, ati." 
Hosea1:3 Hitichun ama achen, Diblaim chanu Gomer chu aga kipuijin; amanu agaijin, chapa khat ahinpeh-in ahi." 
Hosea1:4 Chuin Pakaiyin ahenga, amin Jezreel sah-in; ajehchu chomkhat joule keiman Jehu insunga Jezreel phu kalahna ding ahin, chule keiman Israel insung leng gam hi kasuhbei ding ahi." 
Hosea1:5 Chuche nikhole hung hiti ding ahi, Israel thalpi chu Jezreel phaichama kaheboh ding ahi, ati." 
Hosea1:6 Chuin amanu agaikitnin, chanu khat ahingin ahi. Hichun Pathen'in ahenga, amanu min chu Lo-ruhamah sah-in; ajehchu keiman Israel insung chunga hi hepina kaneilou hel ding ahitai; keiman amaho aboncha kalahmang hel ding ahitai." 
Hosea1:7 Ahin keiman Judah insung chunga vang hepina neijing ting, Pakai a-Pathen'un amaho chu ahuhhing ding ahin, chule amaho chu thalpi, chemjam, gal, sakol ho, chule sakol chunga tou miho mangcha-a ahuhdoh louding ahi, ati." 
Hosea1:8 Tun Lo-ruhamah'in anoichep aban phatnin, amanu agaijin, chapa khat ahingin ahi." 
Hosea1:9 Chujouvin Pathen'in ajah-a, amin Lo-ammi sah-in; ajehchu nangho kamite nahi tapouvin, keima na Pathen'u kahitapoi." 
Hosea1:10 Ahivangin Israel chate chu twikhanglen'a neldi jat, tejoulou le simsenglou hung hidiu; chule hung hiti ding ahi, amaho kamite nahitapouve tia ana kiseipehnao mun'a chu, nangho Pathen hing chapate nahiuve tia kiseipeh ding ahiuve." 
Hosea1:11 Chutengle Judah chatele Israel chate chu kigom khom ding, alamkaidiu khat apansah diu, chule amaho gamsunga kona chu hungpotdoh ding ahiuve: ajehchu Jezreel nikho chu loupitah hiding ahi." 
Hosea2:1 Nasopipa Ammi le nasopinu Ruhamah jah-a seijin," 
Hosea2:2 Nanu henga ngehna neijun, ngehna neijun; ajehchu amanu kaji ahipoi, keijong ama inneipu kahipoi: amanun amitmua konin akijohnaho, chule anoi teni kah-a konin ajonthanhoina chu paimang hen." 
Hosea2:3 Achuti loule amanu sagoh kahodoh ding, apenlhah nikho banga kakoiding, chule amanu gamthip banga kasema, gamgo banga kakoiding, chule dangchah-a katha ding ahi." 
Hosea2:4 Chule keiman amanu chate chunga hepina kanei louding ahi; ajehchu amaho kijohnu chate ahiuve. 
Hosea2:5 Ajehchu anu-u chu noti'n apangtan: amaho oisunga vopnu chu jachat umtah in achontai: Ajehchu amanun, ka changlhah le ka twi, ka samulpon le ka ponnem, ka thaotwi le ka donding eipe-a kakideipi ho nung juijinge, tin aseije." 
Hosea2:6 Hijeh chun, veuvin, keiman nalampi-a ling tho kagetding, chule amanun kenglampi ho amuthei louna dinga pal kaget ding ahi." 
Hosea2:7 Chule amanun adeiho nungjui jintin, hijongle amaho chu aphah jou louding; chule amanun amaho chu holintin, hijongle amu louding ahi. Chutahle, amanun, Chengting kaji masapa koma kile kittange; ajehchu hiche phatlai chu keija dingin tu sangin aphajoe, ati ding ahi." 
Hosea2:8 Ajehchu amanun Baal houna dinga agot chang, ju, chule thaotwi chu keima peh ahi ahepon, chule adangka le sana chu keiman kapunsah ahilam ahepon ahi." 
Hosea2:9 Hijeh-a chu keima kaki nungle-a, ka chang chu a-at phat tengle kanung lah-a, ka ju jong alhophat tengle kanung lah ding, chule asagoh selna dinga kapeh kasamulpon, chule ponnem jong kanung lahpeh ding ahi." 
Hosea2:10 Chule akideipiho mitmu-a amanu jamo kahodoh pehding, chule koimachan kakhutna kona amanu ahuhdohlou ding ahi." 
Hosea2:11 Keiman anopsahna jouse, akut nikhoho, alhathah niho, acholngah nikhoho, chule akut thupi ho jouse kasuhbei ding ahi." 
Hosea2:12 Chule amanun, Kakideipi hon katohman dinga eipeh-u ahi tia asei alengpiguiho le atheichang phungho chu keiman kasuhmang ding: keiman hicheho chu gammang kasosah-a, chule gamsa hon anehdiu ahi." 
Hosea2:13 Chule keiman Baal doi houna-a gimnamtui ahal nikhoho jeh, bilba le sana jempah-a akijepma akideipiho nung ajuija, keima eisuh mil jeh-a amanu chunga gotna kapeh ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Hosea2:14 Hijeh chun, veovin, keiman amanu chu jolingting, gamthipma kapuiding, chule lungdam sella akoma thu kasei ding ahi." 
Hosea2:15 Chule keiman chukoma chu amanu alengpileiho kapeh-a, chule akinepna kot dinga Achor phaicham kapeh ding ahi: chule chumuna chu amanun akhangdon laile Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh nikholai banga la asah ding ahi." 
Hosea2:16 Chuche nikho chule hitiding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije; Nangman Ishi tia neikou ding, Baali tia neikou tahlou ding ahi." 
Hosea2:17 Ajehchu keiman amanu kamsunga kona Baal doi minho chu kalah dohding, chule aminhou chu geldoh-a umkit louding ahitai." 
Hosea2:18 Hiche nikho chule keiman amaho dinga gamsaho, chungleng vacha ho, chule leiset chunga akithol thoho toh kitepna kasemding; chule thalpi, chemjam, chule gal kisat leisetna kona kasuhmang ding, chule amahochu bitkeicha kaumsah dingu ahi." 
Hosea2:19 Chule keiman nangma a-itih chana keima-a dinga kajihol ding; keiman nangho chonphatna-a, thutan dih-a, ngailut phatna-a, chule hepina-a keima-a dinga kajihol ding nahi." 
Hosea2:20 Keiman nangma kitah tah-a keima-a dinga kajihol ding; chule nangman Pakai chu nahet ding ahitai. 
Hosea2:21 Chule hicheni chule hung hitiding ahi, keiman kangai pehding ahi tin Pakaiyin aseije, keiman vanho thu kangaipeh-a, chule amahon leiset thu angaipeh diu ahi;" 
Hosea2:22 Chule leisetnin changle mimho thu, lengpitwi thu chule athaotwi thu angaija, chule amahon Jezreel thu angaidiu ahi." 
Hosea2:23 Chule amanu chu keimadin leisetna tu-ingting, hepina changlou amanu chu kahepiding, chule keima mite anahilou ho jah-a, nangho kamite nahitaove katiding; chule amahon, Nangma ka Pathen nahi, eitidiu ahi." 
Hosea3:1 Chujouvin Pakaiyin kahenga aseijin, Pathen dangho velhijinga, lengpiga changlhah ho ngailujing Israel chate Pakaiyin angailut jing bangin, chekitnin lang angailu pan angailut mongmong numei jonthan hoija kichem khat ga ngailun, ati." 
Hosea3:2 Chutichun keiman amanu chu keija dingin dangka somlenga, suhlou chang homer khatle akeh manin kakichoh tan ahi." 
Hosea3:3 Chuin keiman amanu jah-a chun, nitamtah keima dinga naum ding, noti'a napan louding, chule pasal danga ding nahilou ding; chutima-a chu keima jong nangma-a kahiding ahi, kati." 
Hosea3:4 Ajehchu Israel chate chu nikho tamtah leng le pipui beija, gan lhaina neilouva, milim neilouva, thempu boitong sangkhol le milim houna beija umding ahiuve." 
Hosea3:5 Khonung tengle Israel chate chu hung kilehei juntin, Pakai a-Pathen'ule David alengpau ahinhol dingu; chule ninunung tengleh Pakai le aphatna chu ahin gin dingu ahi." 
Hosea4:1 Nangho Israel chaten Pakai thuhi ngaijun; ajehchu gamsunga chu thutah, hepina, chule Pathen hetna aumtahlou jeh-in, Pakai chun chuche gama chengte toh kinelkalna aneitai." 
Hosea4:2 Amaho akihahselun, ajouvun, athatnun, aguvin, chule jon apanun, achonkhel taovin, chule thisanin thisan asouvin ahi." 
Hosea4:3 Hijeh achu gamsung chu lunghem ding, chua cheng jouse gamsaho le chungleng vachaho puma lhasam ding; chule twipia ngaho tolmanga umding ahiuve." 
Hosea4:4 Ahinla mi koima kinah dahen, khatnin khat phosal dahen; ajehchu namiteu chu thempu kinahpijiho tobang ahiuve." 
Hosea4:5 Hijeh-a chu nangho sunlaija nalhuh diu, themgao jong chu nangho toh janle lhuhtha diu; chule keiman nanu chu kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Hosea4:6 Kamite hetna alhahsam jehu'n suhmangin aumtaove: ajehchu nanghon hetna chu napampai tahjeh uva, keiman jong nangho kapampai ding, chutia chu nangho keima thempu nahilou diu; nanghon na Pathen'u danthu peh nasuhmil tah jeh uva, keiman jong nachateo kasuhmil ding ahi." 
Hosea4:7 Amaho apuncheh cheh ule, keima dounan achonse chehcheh-un; hijeh-a chu keiman jong aloupi nao chu jachatna-a kakhel pehding ahi." 
Hosea4:8 Amahon kamite chonsetna anechai helun, chule amahon akhangitlou nao chunga alungthimu akoijun ahi." 
Hosea4:9 Chule hitiding ahi, mipi le thempu kibang diu, keiman alamlhah hou jeh-a talen kapeh ding, chule atohmanu kasansah ding ahi." 
Hosea4:10 Ajehchu amahon neovintin, valoudiu; amahon jonthanhoi boluntin, punglou ding ahiuve: ajehchu amahon Pakai ngaisah ding chu adalha taovin ahi." 
Hosea4:11 Kijohnale lengpitwi chule lengpitwi thah-in alungu alamangtai. 
Hosea4:12 Kamite chun amilim hou koma thumop angeh jiuvin, chule atenggolun amaho henga aphongdoh jie: ajehchu kijoh lungput chun amaho achonkhel sah taovin, chule a-Pathen'u thunoija konin apotnun kijoh-in apang taovin ahi." 
Hosea4:13 Amahon molchung ho-a ganlhaina aneijun, chule lhangvum ho-a gangpi phung, belkan phung, chule penal thingphung noiho chu alim anop jeh-in, gimnamtui ahaluvin ahi: hijeh chun nachanuteu kijoh dingu, chule naji teovin jonthanhoi aboldiu ahi." 
Hosea4:14 Nachanu teo akijoh uva, chule naji teovin jonthanhoi abol tengule, keiman talen kapeh louding ahi: ajehchu amaho kijoho-a konin akikhin doh-un, chule mijongho toh ganlhaina anei khomuvin ahi: hijeh-a chu ahethemlou mite chu lhuding ahiuve." 
Hosea4:15 Israel nangman jonthanhoi panjong lechun, Judah kipal lhuhsah hih-in; chule nangho Gigal'a hunghih-un, Beth-aven'a jong chetouhih-un, chule Pakai ahing jinge tin jong kihahsel hih-un." 
Hosea4:16 Ajehchu, bongla nungkih bangin Israel anungkih tai: Pakaiyin tuahi amaho chu munlen khatna kelngoinou banga avahding ahi." 
Hosea4:17 Ephraim'in milimho ajoptai: aum umin umsah-un. 
Hosea4:18 Amahon adonu chu athuh-in; amahon kijoh hinkho amang jingun ahi: avaihomhou vin jong jachat umtah-in angaichaove, nanghon peovin." 
Hosea4:19 Huijin alhaving teni-a amaho achepchah-in, chule akithoi nahou jeh-a jahcha ding ahiuve." 
Hosea5:1 Vo thempuho, hichehi ngaijun; chule nangho Israel insung mite, ngaijun; vo leng insung mite, nanau hin sungun; ijeh inem itile thupi tanna chu nachung uva chuding ahi: ajehchu nangho Mizpah chunga thang nahiuvin, Tabor chunga lenthang kijah chu nahiuve." 
Hosea5:2 Keima amaho jouse phoh-a kahung panpeh vangin, thununglou ho chu tolthat hattah ahigam taove." 
Hosea5:3 Keiman Ephraim kahenai, chule Israel chu kakoma konin akiseldehpoi; ajehchu tun, vo Ephraim nangma kijoh-in napangin, chule Israel suhboh-in aume." 
Hosea5:4 Amahon a-Pathen'u heng lama kihei lutna dinga anatoh jouseu chu asemphat lou diu ahi: ajehchu noti hina chu amaho lah-a aumin, chule amahon Pakai chu ahepouve." 
Hosea5:5 Chule Israel kiletsahna chun amaikoh-a ahettoh sah-in: hijeh-a chu Israel le Ephraim chu akhangitlou naova lhuding; Judah jong amani toh lhuhtha ding ahi. 
Hosea5:6 Amaho aganchahou le akelngoi honhou toh Pakai holdinga chediu; hijongle amulou dingu ahi: Ama chu amaho-a konin akichon dohtai. 
Hosea5:7 Amahon Pakai chunga kitahlou tah-in achon taove: ajehchu amahon gamchom chate ahing taovin ahi; tu-a hi amaho chu anei agou houtoh lhakhat sunga vallhuma umding ahiuve. 
Hosea5:8 Nanghon Gibeah'a sumkon binei mut un, Ramah'a sumkon mut un: chule Beth-aven-a hasapmin samun, nanunglam ven, Vo Benjamin." 
Hosea5:9 Kiphona nikhole Ephraim chu kamhel ding ahin; ahung umtei ding thilchu Israel phungho lah-a kahetsah ahitai. 
Hosea5:10 Judah pipuiho chu gamgi chon mang hotoh abangun ahi: hijeh achu achunguva kalung hana twibanga kabuh lhah ding ahi. 
Hosea5:11 Lung thanom tah-a danthupeh ajui jeh-in; Ephraim aki suhgentheijin, thutan na-a suhsetnin aumtai." 
Hosea5:12 Hijeh achu keima Ephraim dinga nget kabah ding, chule Judah insung dinga lung kabahding ahi." 
Hosea5:13 Ephraim'in anatna amua, Judah'in amaputna amuphatnin, Ephraim chu Assyria te koma ache-in, chule leng Jareb koma akisolin ahi: ahinla aman nadamsah joupon, chule namaha hojong asudam joupon ahi." 
Hosea5:14 Ajehchu keima Ephraim dinga keipi bahkai tobang kahia, Judah insung dinga keipi bahkai khangdong tobang kahiding ahi: Keima, keima tah-in kabotela kache mang ding; kalah manga, koiman ahuhdoh louding ahi." 
Hosea5:15 Amahon agitlounau akihetdoh uva chule kamai ahinhol tokah seuva, keima kache-a kaumna mun'a kakile kitding ahi: agenthei naova keima eihin hol paidiu ahi." 
Hosea6:1 Hunguvo, Pakai koma kile taohite, ajehchu aman abotel ahin, aman eidamsah dingu ahi; aman eijepmu ahin, aman eitompeh diu ahi." 
Hosea6:2 Nini joule aman eisuhhal diu ahi; nithum nile eikai thoudiu, chule eiho ama mitmu-a ihindiu ahi." 
Hosea6:3 Eihon Pakai chu het dinga ijuijuva ahile ihet diu ahi; ama vaikon doh chu jingkah banga gontupsa ahin; leisetna go masale go nunung ajuh banga, ama ichunguva go banga hung juding ahi." 
Hosea6:4 Vo Ephraim, keiman nangma i-kalo ding nahim? Vo Judah, keiman nangma i-kalo ding nahim? Ajehchu naphatna chu jingkah meibol tobang ahin, chule jing daitwi bangin achemang jitai." 
Hosea6:5 Hijeh achu keiman amahochu themgaoho mangcha-a kalhamlhah ahitan; kakamsung thuchenga amahochu katha ahitai: chule nathu tanhou chu khovah kikhodoh tobang ahi. 
Hosea6:6 Ajehchu keiman ganlhaina sangin hepina kadei jon; govam thilto sangin Pathen hetna chu kadeijon ahi. 
Hosea6:7 Ahivangin amahon mihemte bangin kitepna apalkeh-un; keiman dounan kitahlou tah-in achonuvin ahi. 
Hosea6:8 Gilead chu khangitlou bolho khopi ahin, chule thisanin akisuhboh-in ahi." 
Hosea6:9 Gucha michom hon mi angailhih bangun, hiti chun thempu hon Shechem lampia athatnun ahi: ajehchu amahon jonthanhoina abolun ahi." 
Hosea6:10 Keiman Israel insunga tijat umtah thil kamui; chua chun Ephraim kijohna aumin, Israel suhboh-in aume." 
Hosea6:11 Chujongle, Vo Judah, keiman kamite sohchan na-a kona kahin lepui kit phatle, aman nangma dinga chang atding nakoipeh ding ahi." 
Hosea7:1 Keiman Israel kasuhdam phat tengle, Ephraim khangit louna le Samaria gitlouna chu kimudoh ding ahi: ajehchu amahon jou abolun; chule gucha alutnin, chule michom hon polama achomun ahi." 
Hosea7:2 Chule keiman akhansetnao abonchan kahei tihi alungun ageldoh pouve; tun athilbol houchun amaho aumchah-u ahitai; amaho kamai koh-a akilange. 
Hosea7:3 Amahon akhansetna houvin lengho akipa sah-un; chule pipuiho chu ajousei uvin akipasah uvin ahi. 
Hosea7:4 Amaho abonchauva mijong ahiuvin, changlhah kangpan achangbong ameh jouva, chol achansoh masangse-a, thingkho chumlouva thuhsung ahulsat tobang ahiuvin ahi." 
Hosea7:5 Kalengpao nikholaijin pipuihon amachu juhaijin ana natsah-un; aman mijontai ho toh akhut ajahkhomin ahi. 
Hosea7:6 Ajehchu amahon alupmuva mi angailhih sungun, alungsungu chu thuhsung bangin kigosa demin akoijun: achanglhah kangpao chu jankhovah-in a-imun; jingkah-in meikong bangin ana ka-in ahi." 
Hosea7:7 Amaho abonchauvin thuhsung bangin asa-un, athutanhou aval lhumun; alenghou alhu gam taovin: amaholah-a keima eikouva khatcha aumpon ahi." 
Hosea7:8 Ephraim amatah miho toh akichohhal tai; Ephraim chu changlhah kilehlou ahi. 
Hosea7:9 Gamchom mihon athahatna aval lhumpeh-un, ahin aman hichu ahepon ahi: henge, achunga samho adon donna akhangtan, ahinla aman ahedoh dehpon ahi." 
Hosea7:10 Israel akiletsahna chun amai koh-a ahettohsah-in; ahin Pakai a-Pathen'u henga chun akile pouvin, chule hicheng jeh hin holjong aholdeh pon ahi." 
Hosea7:11 Ephraim jonghi lungthimbei vakhu ngoltah tobang ahi: amahon Egypt akouvun, Assyria henga acheuve." 
Hosea7:12 Amaho ache phatnule, achunguva kalen kajahkhum ding; amaho chu chungleng vachaho banga kahin puilhah ding, chule houkhom hon ana jahsao banga, amaho chu kasehgim ding ahi." 
Hosea7:13 Ohe amaho ada ahiuve! ajehchu amaho keija konin ajam mangun ahi. Manthah na chu amaho-a ahi! ajehchu keima dounan asukhelun: keiman amaho kalhatdoh vangin, amahon keima dounan jouthuho aseijun ahi." 
Hosea7:14 Amaho ajalkhun chunguva apenu chun, alungsung tah-un keima eikou pouvin; amaho nehle chah le ju ngaitonan akikhomun, chule keima dounan akiphinun ahi." 
Hosea7:15 Keiman amaho gotna kapeh-a abanthau kahatsah vangin, amahon keima dounan thilphalou lungin agelun ahi." 
Hosea7:16 Amaho ahung kiheijun, ahivangin hat chungnung pa lam ahipoi; amaho lheplhahna dim thalchang tobang ahiuve. Apipui houchu aham hoithou jeh-a chemjam'a lhuding ahiuve. Hichehi Egypt gamsunga amaho kinuisatna hiding ahi." 
Hosea8:1 Sumkon chu namuhto suton. Ama Pakai insung douna-a muvanlai banga hungding ahi; ajehchu amahon kakitepna apalkeh-un, chule ka danthu dounan asukhel taove." 
Hosea8:2 Ka Pathen, keihon nangma kaheuve, tia Israel chu kaheng lama hung pengding ahi." 
Hosea8:3 Israel'in thilpha chu alemang ahitan; melma chun ama anungdel ding ahi. 
Hosea8:4 Keima-a kon hilouvin, amahon lengho akitundoh uvin; amahon apipuiho akisemun, hichu keiman kahepha poi; paidoh-a aum nadiuvin, adangka le sana houvin milim akisemun ahi." 
Hosea8:5 Vo Samaria, nabongnou vin nangma napampai ahitan; kalung hana nangma douna-a koudoh ahitai: monabei ahina dingu chu itih chan hinalai dingham?" 
Hosea8:6 Ajehchu Israel'a kona jong chuti ahi: khutthem miho thilsem ahin, hijeh chun Pathen ahipoi: ahin Samaria bongnou chu ahal hala kisu chipding ahi." 
Hosea8:7 Ajehchu amahon hui chu muchi tu-a atu-u ahin, chimpei aki-at diu ahi: hichun kung aneipon, adonjong chun nehding agadoh sah louding ahi: hung gadoh nama jongle, hichu gamdang mihon avalhum ding ahi." 
Hosea8:8 Israel vallhumin aumtai; tun amaho chu vannoi'a chidang namdangho lah-a lunglhaina umlou bel tobang hiding ahiuve. 
Hosea8:9 Ajehchu amaho gamlah-a sangan changlhat bangin, Assyria heng lama achetouvun ahi: Ephraim'in kideipi ding akithalah-e." 
Hosea8:10 Henge, amaho namtinna kon thalah lajongleu, tu-a hi keiman amaho kapuikhom ding, chule leng le pipuiho pohgih jeh-a phat chomkhat lunghem ding ahiuve." 
Hosea8:11 Ephraim'in chonsetna dinga maicham tamtah asem jeh-in, maicham hochu amadinga chonsetna ding ahung hitai." 
Hosea8:12 Keiman ama henga kadan thu lentah ho chu kasut ahitan, hijongle hicheho chu hetphahlou bangin akingaito tai." 
Hosea8:13 Amahon kahenga ganlhai thilto dingin sa atoh-un, chule hichu amahon aneuvin; ahinla Pakaiyin hihochu asanpeh pon ahi. Tun aman amaho khangitlouna ageldoh-a, chule achonset nau chunga thu atanding ahi. Amaho Egypt'a kinung leding ahiuve." 
Hosea8:14 Ajehchu Israel'in asempa sumilin, houin ho asan; chule Juda'in kulpi nei khopi apunsah-in ahi; hijongle keiman akhopihou chunga mei kasol ding, hichun chua aleng inpihou akahchai ding ahi." 
Hosea9:1 Vo Israel, midangte kipa bangin kipah hih-in; ajehchu nangma na Pathen'a konin napotdoh-in nakijoh-in, changphol takip chunga tohman nangai chan ahi." 
Hosea9:2 Changphol le lengpitwi chilna chun amaho avasah louding, chule amanu-a chu lengpitwi thah thonding ahi." 
Hosea9:3 Amahochu Pakai gamsunga cheng louding ahiuvin; Ephraim vangchu Egypt gama kile ding, chule Assyria gamsunga thilthenglou anehdiu ahi." 
Hosea9:4 Amahon Pakaiya dinga lengpitwi thilto atoloudiu, chujongle amaho ama-a dinga lunglhaina hideh loudingu ahi. Aganlhaina hou jong amaho dinga lunghemho changlhah bangding; anejouseu suhboh-a umding ahi: ajehchu achanglhah-u chu ahinna dingu maimai hiding, hichu Pakai insung hunglut louding ahi." 
Hosea9:5 Nanghon chuche niloupi, Pakai kut loupi nikho chule ipi boltauvin natem?" 
Hosea9:6 Ajehchu, veovin, amaho kisuhgamna jeh-a chemang ahitaove: Egypt'in akhop khomuva, Memphis in avuidingu ahi. Adangka kholnau mun nomho chu sachah ling dimding, chule ahoubuh sung houva lingho kehding ahi." 
Hosea9:7 Gotna kipeh nading nikhoho ahung lhungtan, kilethuhna nikhoho ahung lhungtai; Israel'in hichu ahet ding ahi: nakhan gitlounao dimset jehle, hotna lentah umho jeh chun, themgao chu mingol ahin, lhagaomi chu angol ahi." 
Hosea9:8 Ephraim khongahpa chu ka-Pathen toh umkhom ahin, amavang themgao chu alampi jouse-a vachathang kampa thang ahin, chule kihot bolna a-Pathen insunga aume." 
Hosea9:9 Sibeah nikholaia bangin amahole amaho akisuseuvin: hijeh-a chu aman akhan gitlounao amelchih ding, chule achonsetnao chunga gotna apeh ding ahi." 
Hosea9:10 Keiman Israel chu lengpithei ga banga gamthipma kanamu ahin; napateu chu theichang phunga ga min masa banga kakimudoh ahi. Ahivangin amaho Baal-peor lama acheuvin, chule hiche jachat umtah mun'a chun akikhinlut taove; amaho thet umtah ahinao chu adeichat banguva umdoh ahitai." 
Hosea9:11 Ephraim dinga vang, apen napat, naobu sunga pat, chule akijila pat, aloupina hochu vacha banga lengmang ding ahi." 
Hosea9:12 Amahon achateu lentah-in vahdoh jongleu, keiman amaho chu kalahmang ding, hitia chu mikhat jengjong kidalha lou ding ahi: henge, keima amaho-a kona kapotdoh tengle, ohe amahochu ada ahiuve!" 
Hosea9:13 Tyre kanamu banga, Ephriam chu leimun nom laija kiphut ahin; ahinla Ephraim'in achate chu tolthatpa koma apuiding ahi." 
Hosea9:14 Vo Pakai amaho chu pen; nangin napeh ding chu ipiham? amaho chu naojul lhahna naobu le noitwi kanna chu pen. 
Hosea9:15 Agitlouna jouseu chu Gilgal'a aume: ajehchu hiche mun'a chu keiman amaho kanathet ahi. Agitlounau jeh-a keiman amaho ka-in'a kona kanodoh ding, kangailut kit tah louding ahi: apipuihou abonuva thununglou ahiuve." 
Hosea9:16 Ephraim chu akivon, ajungu jong agolhatai, amahon ga aneilou diu ahi: henge, hinsepdoh jongleu, angailut alaigilgau jengjong kathading ahi." 
Hosea9:17 Amahon athu angailou jeh uva, ka Pathen'in amaho apaidoh ding ahi: chule amaho namtin lah-a vahvei dingu ahi." 
Hosea10:1 Israel chu agabei lengpigui ahi, aman agachu ama dingseh-in asosah-in ahi. Aga atam dungjuijin maicham ho apunsah-in; agamsung phatna dungjuijin milim hoitahtah akisemuve." 
Hosea10:2 Alungthimu akikhen tai; tu-a hi adihlouna kimudoh ding ahi. Aman amaicham hou asuhkeh ding, amilim semthuhou asuhmang ding ahi." 
Hosea10:3 Ajehchu tu-a hi amahon, Pakai chu igin tahlou jeh-un eiho leng bei ihiuve, achutile lengchun eiho ipi eibol pehdiu ham? tia asei dingu ahi." 
Hosea10:4 Amahon thu aseijun, kitepna asemun jouvin akihahselun ahi. Hijeh chun thutanna chu lou kikaina nunga kehdoh hampa gunei bangin, ahung kehdoh-in ahi." 
Hosea10:5 Samaria chengho chu Beth-aven'a bongnouho jeh-a kicha ding ahiuve. Ajehchu chuche-a kona loupina kitoldoh jeh-a chu, mipi ho lunghemuva, thempuhon hichu akipapi dingu ahi." 
Hosea10:6 Hichu leng Jareb pehdinga Assyria henga kipuiding; Ephraim jachat changding, chule Israel jong amatah thumop jeh-a jahchading ahi." 
Hosea10:7 Samaria ahile, alengpa chu twi chunga twiphon banga kisat lhading ahi." 
Hosea10:8 Israel chonsetna, Aven munsang ho jong chu kisumang ding: amaicham hou chunga lingle meithai sel tholing hung kehdoh ding; chule amahon molsangho jah-a, neikhu khumun; chule lhangho jah-a, neilhuh khumun, ati dingu ahi." 
Hosea10:9 Vo Israel, nangho Gibeah nikholai japat chonsea nahitaovin; amaho chuachun ading jingun ahi. Khanggilou chate douna-a Gibeah mun'a gal kisat chun amaho anaphapon ahi." 
Hosea10:10 Amaho sehgim dingchu keima lungdei ahi; chule amaho achonkhelnao thil ni jeh-a akikan tengule, amaho doudinga mipi hung kikhom ding ahiuve." 
Hosea10:11 Chule Ephraim bongla lahsa tobang ahin, chang childing atha anomin ahi; ahinla keiman amanu ngong hoitah chung chu kapal galkaijin ahi: Ephraim chu achunga touna dinga kasema; Judah'in lou akaiding, chule Jacob'in aleilhangho asuhbong ding ahi." 
Hosea10:12 Nangma nangma-a dingin chonphatna muchi tun kitun, hepina in at-nin; naleiset khoikeh louchu khoikeh-in: ajehchu ama ahunga chonphatna nachunga gojuh-a ajuhsah masangse-a, tuhi Pakai holphat tah chu ahi." 
Hosea10:13 Nanghon gitlouna lou kaijin nakaijun, khangit louna na-at nun; lepche ga naneuve: ajehchu nanghon nangho lampi sehsehle, namihat tamtah hou bou natahsanun ahi." 
Hosea10:14 Hijeh-a chu namite lah-a lungling laona khat hung sohding, Shalman'in galsat nikho-a Beth-arbel asuhmang banga, nakulpiu det jouse kisuseding ahi: Minu chu achate chunga ahal halin akitat kehtai." 
Hosea10:15 Hiche banga chu nakhan gitlouna aletjeh-a Bethel'in nachunga na atoh ding ahi; jingkah lamle Israel lengpa chu kisumang helding ahi. 
Hosea11:1 Israel chu chapang cha ahilaijin, keiman kana ngailun, chule Egypt gama konin kachapa kakou doh-in ahi." 
Hosea11:2 Amahon akou bangun, chutichun amaho-a konin achemangun; Baal henga ganlhaina anabolun, chule semthu limho henga gimnamtui ahalun ahi." 
Hosea11:3 Keiman Ephraim jong akhut uvin katuh-in, cheje dan kana hilin; ahivangin keiman kadamsah-u ahilam ahepouve." 
Hosea11:4 Keiman amaho pasal khaohol le, ngailutna khaoguijin kanakaije: keima amaho dinga angong uva kona anamkoljon'u lahdoh pehpa tobang kanahin, chule anehdiu kana luipeh-in ahi." 
Hosea11:5 Ama Egypt gama kinungle louding, amaho hung kile ding ada jeh uva, Assyria te chu alengpa hiding ahi." 
Hosea11:6 Chule akhopihou chunga chemjam umding, amaho le amaho kithumopna jeh-a, abahho jouse akahvama, asuhmang ding ahi." 
Hosea11:7 Chule kamite keija kona kinungtol kitdin akonsuh uvin: amahon amaho chu hat chungnung penpa koma dinga akou vangun, khatchan jong achoisang pouvin ahi." 
Hosea11:8 Ephraim, keiman nangma iti kadonda dingham? Israel, keiman nangma iti kapehdoh dingham? keiman nangma iti Admah tobang kasosah dingham? keiman nangma iti Zeboiim tobanga kakoi dingham? Kasunga kalungthim akileh-in, kakisih naho meijin akonge." 
Hosea11:9 Keiman kalungsat tijat umtah chu sodohsah pongting, Ephraim sumang dingin hung kinungle ponge: ajehchu keima Pathen kahin, mihem kahipoi; nalah uva Atheng chu kahi: chule khopi sunga lutponge." 
Hosea11:10 Amaho Pakai deija chonding ahiuvin: ama keipi bahkai banga kitumding ahi. Ama akitum phatle, lhumlama kona achate kithing puma hungding ahiuve." 
Hosea11:11 Amaho Egypt gama kona vacha bangle, Assyria gama kon vakhu banga kithing puma hungding ahiuve. Chule keiman a-incheh uva kachensah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Hosea11:12 Ephraim chun joule nalin, chule Israel insungin lepchenan eikim velun ahi. Ahin Judah vang Pathen toh avaihom khomin, chule mitheng hoto tahsana-in aumin ahi." 
Hosea12:1 Ephraim huijin akivah-in, chule solam huichu anung ajuije: aman niseh-in joule gamna apunsah-in, amahon Assyria te toh kitepna asemun, chule thaotwi Egypt gama apolut uve." 
Hosea12:2 Pakaiyin Judah to jong kinel kalna aneijin, chule Jacob chu achonnaho dungjuija talen apehding; atoh dungjuija alethuhding ahi." 
Hosea12:3 Aman naobu sunga aumpetnin asopipa khotaljum atuh-in, chule athahatna-in Pathen toh akibonin ahi." 
Hosea12:4 Henge, aman vantil toh akibonin, ajouvin; ama akapmin, ahenga ngehna ananeije: aman amachu Bethel'a amudoh-in, chule aman hia chun eiho henga thu aseije." 
Hosea12:5 Janel ho Pakai Pathen ngeichu, Pakai kiti chu ama hetjingna min ahi." 
Hosea12:6 Hijeh chun, na-Pathen heng lama kiheijin; hepina le thutana nitnin, chule na-Pathen ngahjing jengin." 
Hosea12:7 Amachu sumkolvei ahin, lepchena khaikot akhutna aume; aman mi suhgenthei ding adeijin ahi." 
Hosea12:8 Chule Ephraim'in hitin aseije, keima kahaotan, thilpha kakimu dohtai; chule katoh naho jouse-a amahon keima-a chonset kiti khangitlouna amudoh loudingu ahi, ati." 
Hosea12:9 Egypt gama kipatna keima Pakai na-Pathen hia kahin, kut loupi nikho laiho banga, houbuh sunga kachensah ding nahi." 
Hosea12:10 Keiman themgao ho-a konin jong thu kaseijin, chule themgao thilmuho kapunsah-in, chule themgaoho lhacha natoh na-a konin, limle mel kibahpiho kamangchan ahi." 
Hosea12:11 Gilead gamsunga khangitlouna umem? tahbeh-in amaho ahomkeo ahiuve. Amahon Gilgal'a bongchalin ganlhaina aboluvin; henge, amaicham semhou chu louva leilhang kisetoh abanguve." 
Hosea12:12 Chule Jacob Syria thinglhang lama ajamlutnin, Israel jiding lonan sohna atongin, chule jiding lonan kelngoi chingin apange." 
Hosea12:13 Chuin Pakaiyin themgao amangchan Israel chu Egypt gama konin apuidoh-in, chule themgao mangchan venbitnin aume." 
Hosea12:14 Ephraim'in amachu nasatah-in alunghan sah-in: hijeh-a chu athisan chu amachunga adalhah ding, chule ami phosalna chu Pakaiyin ama alepeh ding ahi." 
Hosea13:1 Ephraim'in kithing pumpuma thu asei laijin, amale ama Israel sunga akidomsangin; ahivangin Baal houna-a akipal phatnin, athi tan ahi." 
Hosea13:2 Chule tun amaho achonse chehcheh-un, adangka hou milim din akisemun, chule ahetnao dungjuijin alim semthu akisemun, aboncha chu khut themhon asemu ahi: chule amahon, ganlhaina neihochun hiche bongnou limho chu chophen, tin aseijun ahi." 
Hosea13:3 Hijeh-a chu amaho jingkah meibol, amangloi chelji matah-a um daitwi, changphola kona chimpeijin alhohmangji changsi, chule thuhsunga kona potdoh meikhu tobang hiding ahiuve." 
Hosea13:4 Ahinla keima Egypt gama kona Pakai le na-Pathen'u hunghipeh kahin, chule nanghon keima tailou Pathen dang nahetlou dingu ahi. Ajehchu keima tailou huhhingpu dang aumpoi." 
Hosea13:5 Keiman nangho gamthip gam, nasatah-a gojuh louna gama kanahetsa nahiuve." 
Hosea13:6 Agamuva hamhingho dungjuijin, amaho a-oiva uvin, amaho a-oiva uvin, alungthimun akichoisangun; hijeh chun keima eisumil taove." 
Hosea13:7 Hijeh-a chu keima amaho dinga keipi bahkai toh kabah ding, chule lampi-a lutnu banga kavet lhihdiu ahi." 
Hosea13:8 Keiman anou kilahpeh vompi banga amaho kakimaito piding, anahgu bomlah-u kabo jalding; chule chumuna chu keipi bahkai banga amaho kabah gamding: gamsa hon abotel dingu ahi." 
Hosea13:9 Vo Israel, nangmale nangma kisumang nahi; ahivangin keima-a nangma panpi ding aume." 
Hosea13:10 Keima nalengpau kahiding: nakhopiu pumpi sungahi nahuhhing theidiuva koidang hoija umem? chule, lengpa le pipuiho neipeuvin, tia naseinao navaipo hou chu hoija um hiuvem?" 
Hosea13:11 Keiman kalunghana-in nangho lengkhat kapeuvin, chule kalungsatna-in amachu kalahmang peh uve." 
Hosea13:12 Ephraim khansetna chu kanchah-in aumin; achonsetna chu selin aumin ahi. 
Hosea13:13 Numei naovop hesohnaho chu amachunga hung lhungding ahi. Ama chapa chinglou ahi; ajehchu ama chate hungpen dohna mun'a chu umsot louding ahi. 
Hosea13:14 Keiman amahochu lhankhuh thanei na-a kona man kapeh-a kachoh dohding; keiman thina-a kona kalhatdoh dingu ahi. Vo thina, keima nanatna kahiding, Vo thikholkhul keima nakisuh manga kahiding ahi! kamit mu-a kona lungheina chu kiselmang ding ahi." 
Hosea13:15 Ama asopite lah-a ga phatah hijongle, solam hui hungnung ding, gamthip gama kon Pakai hui chu hungnung ding, chule atuisam putna hung kanga, chule atuibul hung kangding: aman agou kholnau bel hoitahho jouse asuhset ding ahi." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria kamhel ding ahi; ajehchu amanun a-Pathen adouvin ahi. Amaho chemjam'a lhudiu, achasen hou ahal hala kitat chipding, chule anumei naovop hou chu kikhejal ding ahi." 
Hosea14:1 Vo Israel, Pakai na-Pathen koma kile kitnin, ajehchu nangma nakhan gitlouna-a lhu nahitai." 
Hosea14:2 Thuho chu ponlang, Pakai henga kile kitnin. Ahenga, Khangitlouna jouse lamangin, lungset tah-in nei sangun: hitia chu keihon kakamuva kilhaina kapeh dingu ahi." 
Hosea14:3 Asshur in eihuhhing pouvintin; keiho sakol ho chunga tou pouvinge: chule kakhutsoh hou henga chun, nangho ka-pathen'u nahiuve tinjong seitapou vinge. Ajehchu nangma-a bou panei louten hepina amuvin ahi, tin seijun." 
Hosea14:4 Keiman akinung tolnao chu kasuhgampeh-a, manbeija amaho kangailut dingu ahi; ajehchu kalungsatna amaho-a konin akihei mangtai." 
Hosea14:5 Keima Israel dingin daitwi tobang hing ting; ama lily pahcha banga khang tou ding, chule ajungho chu Lebanon banga jamdoh ding ahi." 
Hosea14:6 Abahho chu jamdoh-in tin, ahoina chu olive thingphung bang hiding, chule Lebanon banga namtui ding ahi." 
Hosea14:7 Ama lhalim noija chengte chu hung kileuvintin; chang banga kidodoh kitnuva, lengpitwi banga khang dingu ahi. Chule chu-a anamtui chu Lebanon'a lengpitwi tobang hiding ahi." 
Hosea14:8 Ephraim'in, alim semthu ho-a hi ipi-a kapansah nahlai ding ham? Keiman athusei kajan, chule ama kamutai. Keima theichang phung adohing tobang kahi, atiding ahi. Keima-a kona naga kimu-a ahi." 
Hosea14:9 Koiham miching? chule hiche thil ho hi hethem hen. Koiham milungching? hicheho chu hehen; ajehchu Pakai lampi ho chu adih ahin, chule midih chu hiho-a chu lamlha ding ahi. Ahinla suhkhelna neihochu hiche-a chu lhuding ahiuve." 
Joel1:1 Pathuel chapa Joel henga Pakai thu hung lhung chu ahi. 
Joel1:2 Nangho tehse hon hichehi ngaijun, chule gamsunga cheng miten nabonun nanakol sungun. Hichehi nangho nikholai, ahiloule napu napateu nikho laijenga jong anasoh khamong nam?" 
Joel1:3 Hichehi nachateo seipeh unlang, nacha teovin jong amaho chate seipehson uhen; chule amaho chun khangkitna achateu chu seipehson kit uhen." 
Joel1:4 Lusu lung hon anehmoh-u chu khaokhohon anen, khaokho ho nehmoh chu thinglungin anen, thinglung nehmoh chu lungmulin aneh ahi." 
Joel1:5 Jukham nangho thouvun lang kapmun, chule lengpitwi thah jeh-in, lengpitwi don jouse pengun, ajehchu hichu nakam uva kona kisatlha ahitai." 
Joel1:6 Ajehchu thahat tah namkhat, amijat simjoulou, kagamsunga ahung umdoh-in; ahaho keipi bahkai ha tobang ahin, chule keipi bahkai lentah khalhang aneijin ahi" 
Joel1:7 Aman kalengpigui asumangin, kathei chang phung thinghoh akhoh doh-e, aman hichu akhohtheng selin, chule apaimange, hitichun abahho jong agotsahtai." 
Joel1:8 Akhang donlai a-inneipu dinga khaodip pon kisila nungah theng bangin kapmin. 
Joel1:9 Neh thilpeh le don thilpeh chu Pakai ina konin akipaidoh tan, Pakai lhachaho, thempuho alunghemuve." 
Joel1:10 Loujao manlou ahitan, gamsungin pul adou tan ahi; ajehchu chang agamtai, lengpitwi thah akangin, chule thaotwi alhasam tai." 
Joel1:11 Vo loulhouho, nangho jahchaovin; vo lengpilei malngim ho, suhlou changle sakolchang jehchun maovun; ajehchu louva chang atding chu abeiheltan ahi." 
Joel1:12 Lengpigui chu agoptan, theichang phung chu agatapoi; kolbuthei phung, lusuphung, theithup phung, chule loulaija thingphung jouse geijin agop gamtai; ajeh chu mihem chate-a konin kipana kitichu abeitan ahi." 
Joel1:13 Nangho thempuho, nakong kigah-un chule kapmun; maicham phunga natongho maovun; hungun, Pathen natong nangho khaodip pon kisilun lang jan khovah in lumun; ajehchu nehledon thilpeh chu na Pathen in'a kona kiladoh ahitai." 
Joel1:14 Nangho, an ngolin kisuthengun, khoppi theng khat kouvun, Pakai na Pathen insunga upaho chule gamsung mi abonchan khomun lang Pakai henga taovun." 
Joel1:15 Ohe, chuche nikho chu da aume! ajehchu Pakai nikho chu ahung naitai, chule Hat chungnung Pakaiya kona suhmangna khat hunglhung ding ahi." 
Joel1:16 Imaikoh laitah uva anneh kisatlha hitalou ham, henge, kipa thanopna chu Pakai i-Pathen'u insunga kona kiladoh-a hitalou ham?" 
Joel1:17 Muchi chu leilhang noija amontan, chang kholna ahomkeo ahitan,chule changsal ho asegamtai; ajehchu changchu goplha-a ahitai." 
Joel1:18 Gamsaho chu iti penpen jeng hitaovam! ganchaho le ganhonho hamhing umlou jeh-in alung dongun; henge, kelngoi honho jong kinepna bei ahitaove." 
Joel1:19 O Pakai, nahenga katao ahi; ajehchu gamthipma hamhing jong meijin akan, chule loujaova thingphung jouse jong meikongin akachai tan ahi." 
Joel1:20 Vadung twiho akan gamtah jehle, gamthipma hamhingho meijin akahgam tahjeh-un, loulaija gamsaho jengjong nangma kounan apengun ahi." 
Joel2:1 Nanghon Zion'a sumkon chu mut un, chule keima moltheng chunga kiginan hasapmin samleuvin, gamsung mite jouse kihot hen, ajehchu Pakai nikho chu anaitai, hichu hung lhung ding ahitai." 
Joel2:2 Muthim nikhole lungjina nikho, meibol kai nikhole satah-a thimjina nikho chu, jingkho vah-in molchung ho ahinsal banga hunglhung ding ahi; tumasanga ana umlou, tunungteng jongle akhang akhanga hungum kit louhel ding, mipi nasatah le hattah khat hung kisepdoh ding ahi." 
Joel2:3 Amaho masang chu meijin ahalvam peh-in, anunguva mei akongin; amasanguva gamsung chu Eden hon abangin, anunguva manthah na neldi gam abange; amaho-a kona chu koimacha jamdoh theilou ding ahi." 
Joel2:4 Amelu chu sakol ho melso tobang ding, chule sakol chung toumi bangin alhaijun ahi." 
Joel2:5 Amaho chu molsang chunga sakol kangtalai lhaigin banga kichom dingu, changpol mei kahgin banga gingthethu le, mihat tah galvon kivona galsat dingkon bangding ahiuve." 
Joel2:6 Amaho masanga mite chu thohgim lheh dingu; chule mihem maijouse thimlha ding ahi. 
Joel2:7 Amaho chu mihattah ho banga lhaidingu, galsat miho banga kul chunga jong kaldoh dingu; chule amaho ama ama lampi cheh-a chediu, adinmunhou asuhkhel lou diu ahi." 
Joel2:8 Amaho khatle khat kisatto lou dingu, ama lamlhongpi cheh-a chediu; chule chemjam achunguva achuh tengle, amaho kisukhalou dingu ahi." 
Joel2:9 Amaho khopisunga suhlhai toulhai juntin, kulbang chunga lhaidiu, amaho in chung ho-a kaldoh uva, bangkot ho-a gucha banga lutdingu ahi." 
Joel2:10 Amaho masanga leiset kihotling ding; vanho kithing ding, nile lha thim ding; chule ahsi ho vahdoh talou ding ahiuve." 
Joel2:11 Chule Pakai chun agalmite anga thu aseiding ahi: ajehchu agebuh chu loupitah ahin, athu tong molsoji ama jong hattah ahi; ajehchu Pakai nikho chu loupitah le tijat umtah ahin chule koi ham ading jou dinga?" 
Joel2:12 Hijeh chun tun, nangho nalungthim pumpiuvin, an ngol pumin, kaple lhasepum in keima henglama hung kiheijun, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Joel2:13 Navonhou hilouvin nalung sungu botkeh unlang, Pakai na Pathen'u henga kileuvin, ajehchu ama khotonale hepina-a dimset, lunghang vahjilou, lungsetna lentah nei ahin, chule thilphalou aboldinga kona alung aheiji ahi." 
Joel2:14 Ama ahung kileheija alung ahinhei kitna, Pakai Pathen dinga an neh thilto le don thilto, itobang phattheiboh nadalhah pehding kon ija ahetnem?" 
Joel2:15 Zion sumkon chu mut un, an ngolin kisuthengun, khoppi loupi khat kouvun." 
Joel2:16 Mipi khomuvin lang, houkhom ho suthengun, upaho khom khomuvin lang, chapanghole naosen noichep nalaiho geijin khomun; moulang chu a-indan sunga konin chedohhen, chule mounu jong alupna dana konin hungpotdoh hen." 
Joel2:17 Thempuho, Pakai lhachaho chu maicham phungle hongcha kah-a kapmuhen, chule amahon, Vo Pakai namite hinghoijin, chule Pathen hephalouten nagoulo mite chunga i-sah louvin vai hom daohen, ipi jeh-a amaho chun miho lah-a a-Pathen'u hoija uma ham ati dingu ham; tin seiju hen" 
Joel2:18 Chutengle Pakai chu agamsung dinga hung thang thipma, chule amite chu alungset ding ahi." 
Joel2:19 Henge, Pakai chun adonbutna amite jah-a, veuvin, keiman nangho dinga chang, lengpitwi chule thaotwi kahinsol ding, chule nangho hicheho-a chu nalunglhai diu, chule keiman nangho Pathen heloute lah-a i-sah louva kabolkit louding nahiuve, tin aseije." 
Joel2:20 Hinla keiman sahlam galmiho chu nangho-a kona gamlatah-a kachondoh ding, gam galou le manthah na gama kanolut ding, amai chu solam twipi lama, chule anunga hochu lhumlam twipi lama kanolut ding, chule auile anamset hung kikhodoh ding ahi; ajeh chu aman thil lentah anaboltan ahi." 
Joel2:21 Kicha hih in, vo leiset, kipah inlang thanomin, ajeh chu Pakai in thil loupitah abolding ahi." 
Joel2:22 Nangho gama um gamsaho kicha hih-un, ajehchu gamthip gama hampaho chu hungdon doh ding, thingphungin aga ahin sepding, lengpi guile theichang phung jong agathei chana hung gading ahi." 
Joel2:23 Chuti ahile, nangho Zion chate kipah-un, chule Pakai na Pathen'a thanomun, ajehchu aman nangho dinga gomasa chu ahin juhlhah sah ding, aphabep seuva napeh diu; go nunung jong lhamasa sunga ahin juhlhah sah ding ahi." 
Joel2:24 Ajehchu changphol chu sakolchang dimset ding, chule bel jouse jong lengpitwi le thaotwi letsoh ding ahi" 
Joel2:25 Chule keiman ka sepai nasatah chu nalah uva kahin sole, thinglung, lungmul chule tum lungle khaokhohon, kum tamtah-a ananeh jouse-a chu kakile dohsah kitding ahi." 
Joel2:26 Chule nanghon ninglhing tah-a naneh uva, nalungu lhaisel ding, chule kidangtah-a nanabol pau Pakai na Pathen'u min navahchoi diu ahi: chutia chu kamiten jachatna tohtalou helding ahiuve." 
Joel2:27 Chule nanghon keima Israelte lah-a um, koima dang hilou Pakai na Pathen'u kahi nahet diu, chutia chu kamite jachatna-a chuta louhel ding ahiuve." 
Joel2:28 Chule khonungle hung hiti ding ahi, Keiman tahsa hing jouse chunga kalhagao kabuh lhah ding, nachapateo le nachanu teovin gaothu aseidoh dingu, na-upa houvin mang amatdiu, chule nakhang dong houvin mu aneidingu ahi." 
Joel2:29 Chule hiche niteng chule soh pasalhole, soh numei ho chunga jong kalhagao kabuh lhah ding ahi." 
Joel2:30 Chule keiman vanho le leiset chung, thisan, mei chule meikhu khompiho chunga thil kidang kavetsah ding ahi." 
Joel2:31 Loupitahle tijat umtah Pakai nikho hunglhun masanga chu, nisa thimsoh-a, lha thisan sohding ahi." 
Joel2:32 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, Pakai min pana tao chan chu koi hijongle huhhing-a umding ahi. Ajeh chu Zion molsang le Jerusalem'a huhdohna umding, Pakaiyin asei banga, akou amoh moh ho lah-a hoidohna lhung ding ahi." 
Joel3:1 Ajehchu, veuvin, chuche nikhole, hiche phat sung, keiman Judah le Jerusalem sohchana-a kon kahin lepui teng," 
Joel3:2 Ken jong nam jouse kakhopma, Jehoshaphat phaichama kapuisuh ding, chule kagou, kami Israelte vannoi namtin holah-a athecheh uva, kagam asuhkeh jeh uva athu-u katan ding ahi." 
Joel3:3 Amahon kamite-a dingin vang ave-un, pasal chapang chu noti mandin apedoh-un, judon nadin numei chapang chu ajoh-un ahi." 
Joel3:4 Ahi, keima dinga ipi nabol dingu ham, Vo Tyre, Zidon chule Palestine gamkol sunga umho, nanghon keima neilethuh dingu ham? neilethuh ule, neilethuh naochu, kintah-a naluchung cheh uva kalethuh kitding nahiuve." 
Joel3:5 Ajeh chu nanghon keima dangkale sana nakilah-un, chule kathil manluho chu nahouin sunguva napolutnun ahi." 
Joel3:6 Nanghon agamgiuva kona gamlatah-a natolmang thei nadiuvin, Judah chatele Jerusalem chate chu Greek mite henga najoh doh-un ahi." 
Joel3:7 Veovin, keiman najohdohnao mun laitah-a chu amaho kadindohsah ding, chule achunga nachonnao chu keiman nalu chunguva kalethuh ding nahiuve." 
Joel3:8 Chule keiman nachapateo le nachanuteu chu Judah chate khutna kajoh ding, chule amahon gamlatah-a Shebea mite henga ajohson diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Joel3:9 Chidang namdangho lah-a hichehi phongjalun, gal din kigouvin, mihat hochu thou uhen, galsat mi jouse hungnai juhen lang, hungdoh-u hen." 
Joel3:10 Nalangkon hou chu chemjamin khengun, nahampa chetannao chu tengchan semun, hatmohon keima kahatne tiuhen." 
Joel3:11 Nangho Pathen hephalouho, kikhomun lang, hungun, chule hungkikhom kimvelun, Vo Pakai, chua chun nangman namihat ho chu hungsuh sah-in." 
Joel3:12 Pathen hephalouho thou uhen lang Jehoshaphat phaichama hungdoh uhen, ajehchu chua chu keima katouva akimvela um Pathen hephalouho thu katanding ahi." 
Joel3:13 Nakoiteu pannun, ajehchu chang amintan; hungin, hungkum lhan; lengpitwi hehna chu adimtan, athaoho alonglet tai; gitlouna chu alenlheh tai." 
Joel3:14 Mipi tamtah, kigel lhuhna phaichama chun mipi tamtah aumtaove; ajehchu kigel lhuhna phaichama chun Pakai nikho ahung naitai." 
Joel3:15 Nisale lhathah thimsoh intin, chule ahsi ho vahlou ding ahiuve." 
Joel3:16 Pakai chu Zion'a kon hung kitumintin, chule Jerusalem'a kona aw hunging ding; chule vanho le leiset kihot ding; ahivanga Pakai chu amite kinepna hintin chule Israel chate thahat kona hiding ahi." 
Joel3:17 Hiti achu keimahi Pakai na Pathen'u, kamolsang theng Zion'a chengpa kahichu neihet dingu ahi: chutengle Jerusalem chu athenga uma, chule amaho lah-a chu jindangho vahle louding ahitai." 
Joel3:18 Chule hiche nikho chule hung hiti ding ahi, molsang dunga lengpitwi thah hunglong lhading, chule lhang dunga kona jong bongnoi hunglong ding; Judah gamsunga vadung long jouse-a twi longdima, Pakai insunga kona twinah khat hunglong doh-a, hichun Shittim phaicham dung twi achapnou ding ahi." 
Joel3:19 Juda chate chunga akhanset jeh ule, agamsung uva monabei thisan asosahjeh uva, Egypt chu hakamna mun hiding, chule Edom chu hakamna gamthip sohding ahi." 
Joel3:20 Hijongle Judah chu a-imatih-a chenna mun hiding, chule Jerusalem chu akhang akhanga chendenna mun hiding ahitai." 
Joel3:21 Ajehchu keiman kana suhtheng loulai athisan chu kasuhtheng ding ahi: ajehchu Pakai chu Zion'a chengah ahi. 
Amos1:1 Ling kiho kumni masang, Israel leng Joash chapa Jeroboam nikholai, chule Judah leng Uzziah nikho laija Israel chungchang thu; Tekoa mi, kelngoi ching holah-a pang Amos'in anamu thuho chu ahi." 
Amos1:2 Chule aman aseije, Pakai chu Zion'a kona hung kitumding, Jerusalem'a kona aw ginga thu aseiding; kelngoi chingho chenna chu lunghem ding, chule Carmel molvum chu golha ding ahi." 
Amos1:3 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Damascus suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu amahon Gilead chu changchilna thih manchah-in achilun ahi." 
Amos1:4 Ahinla keiman Hazael insunga meikong kahinsol ding, hichun Ben-hadad leng inpiho ahalvam ding ahi." 
Amos1:5 Keiman Damascus jol jong kaheboh ding, Aven phaichama chengho le, Eden insunga kon leng tenggol tuhpa chu kasat lhah ding ahi. Chule Syria mite chu Kir chana gal hinga kikaidiu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos1:6 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Gaza suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu amahon Edom mite pehdoh dingin, sohchangho chun abonun gal hingin akaijun ahi." 
Amos1:7 Ahivangin keiman Gaza bang chunga meikong kahinlelhah ding, hichun leng inpiho chu ahalvam ding ahi." 
Amos1:8 Chule keiman Ashdoh kho-a chengho le Ashkolon'a kon leng tenggol choipa chu kakaidoh ding, chule keiman Ekron chunga kakhut kalhah ding ahi: chule Philistine mite ahingdoh amoh chengse chu mangthah ding ahiuve, tin Pakai chun aseije." 
Amos1:9 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Tyre suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu amahon gal hinga kimanho jouse chu Edom apetan; hiti chun sopi hina-a kitepna chu ageldoh tapouve." 
Amos1:10 Ahinla keiman Tyre bang chungna meikong kahin lelhah ding, hichun leng inpi chu ahalvam ding ahi." 
Amos1:11 Pakaiyin hitihin aseije; Edom suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu aman asopipa chu chemjamin adelin, khotona kiti himhim adontapoi, hitichun alunghana-a chun suhset aneijingin, chule alungsatna chu a-itih in avopjingin ahi." 
Amos1:12 Ahinla keiman Taman chunga meikong kahinlelhah ding, hichun Edom sunga um Bozrah leng inpi chu akahvam ding ahi." 
Amos1:13 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Ammon chate suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu amahon gamsung kehlet ding deinan Gilead'a um numei ho naovop lai ho chu akhe jalun ahi." 
Amos1:14 Ahivangin keiman Rabbah bang chunga mei kakonsah ding, galsat nikho-a kisen awgin toh, chimpei kipei nikho-a huipi toh tho-a, aleng inpi hou ahalvam ding ahi." 
Amos1:15 Chule alengpau chu gal hinga kikai mangding, ama le apipuihou puma kaimanga umding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos2:1 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Moab suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu aman Edom lengpa guho chu lungngou vin ahal vamin ahi." 
Amos2:2 Hijongle keiman Moab chunga meikong kahin sollhah ding, hichun Kerioth leng inpiho ahalvam ding, chule Moab chu boina le kisen awgin chule sumkon ginna thiding ahi." 
Amos2:3 Chule keiman chua kona thutanpa chu kasatlhah ding, chule pipuiho jouse ama puma kathading ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos2:4 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Judah suhkhelna thumle liho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu amahon Pakai dan thu anahsah pouvin, adan thupeh anit pouve, chule apu apateu dung asunnun, ajouseinao chun atohkhel sah-un ahi." 
Amos2:5 Hijongle keiman Judah chunga meikong kalelhah ding, chule Jerusalem'a leng inpiho chu ahalvam ding ahi." 
Amos2:6 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Israel suhkhelnaho thumle li ho jeh-a, Keiman achunguva chuding talen chu kalahdoh lou ding ahi; ajehchu amahon chonphat chu dangka manin ajoh-un, chule vaichat kengchot to khatnin ajoh un ahi;" 
Amos2:7 Amahon vaichaho luchanga leivui chu amutnun, milungneng lampi akihei mang sanun ahi: chule keima mintheng asubohna dingin, pale chapa numei khat akikopmun ahi." 
Amos2:8 Amaho maicham takipma kitepna-a kipha ponho chunga chun nomtah in alumlhaovin, chule themmo channa ju chu a-pathen'u insunga adonun ahi." 
Amos2:9 Ahin Cedar thingphung banga sangtah, gangpi phung banga dettah Amor mite chu amaho maikoh-a kasumangin; aga chu chunglama konin kasumangin, ajung chu noilama patnin kasumangin ahi." 
Amos2:10 Chujongle keiman nangho Egypt gama konin kapuidoh-un, chule Amor mite gam nalo theina dingun, gamthip laija kum somli kahin puileu vin ahi." 
Amos2:11 Chule keiman nachapateo chu themgao dingin, chule nakhang dong hou chu Nazir mi hidingin kakhou khah-in ahi. Vo Israel chate, hichehi dih hina louham? tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos2:12 Ahivangin nanghon Nazir miho don dingin lengpitwi napeuvin, chule themgaoho chu gaothu seihih-un tin thu napeuvin ahi." 
Amos2:13 Veovin, changphal dimsetnin bongkang adelpha bangin, keima nangho noija delphan kaume." 
Amos2:14 Hijeh-a chu ajama chu akikinsah-a kona mangthah ding, chule athahatnin jong athaneina asuhhat louding, chule mihat tah jong ama kihuhdoh joulou ding;" 
Amos2:15 Thalpi choipa jong chu dingjou dehlou ding, mikaljang jong amale ama kihuhdoh jou louding; chule sakol chunga touva jong ama le ama kihuhdoh joudeh louding ahi." 
Amos2:16 Chule hiche nikho chule hatchung nungho lah-a ahangsan pa jong sagoh-a jam mangding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos3:1 Vo, Israel chate, Egypt gama kona kapuidoh insung pumpi, Pakaiyin nangho douna-a thu aseihi ngaijun;" 
Amos3:2 Leiset chunga um insung jouse lah-a hi keiman nangho sehbou kahet nahiuve; hijeh-a chu nakhan gitlounao jouse jeh-a keiman nangho talen kamatsah ding nahiuve. 
Amos3:3 Kinopto louva mini chekhomthei lhonem? 
Amos3:4 Keipi bahkai khun sa nehding aneilouteng, gammang sunga akitumdem? Keipi bahkai donglai khun nehding aneiloule, akulsunga kona hungham ji-em?" 
Amos3:5 Tolla thang anchah umlouva, vacha thanga oh theijem? Thang chu asupel beija, tolla kona kipel theijem?" 
Amos3:6 Khopisunga sumkon akimutle, miho kichalou ding ham? Khopi sunga thilse alhuna ahile, hichu Pakaiyin abollou hilou dingham?" 
Amos3:7 Tahbeh-in Pakai Pathen'in athuguh asoh themgaoho koma phongdoh masalouvin ima abolpoi. 
Amos3:8 Keipi bahkai akitum tai, koiham akichalou ding? Pakaiyin thu aseitai, koijin aphondoh da thei dingham?" 
Amos3:9 Ashdoh leng inpiho le Egypt gamsung leng inpiho-a chun phongle uvin, chule nangho Samaria molsang ho chunga kikhomun lang, alailunga mipi linglaoho le suhgentheija umho khu veuvin." 
Amos3:10 Aleng inpihou sunga hunamle gucha michom akholkhom jeh-un, amahon thildih bolje ahetapouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos3:11 Hijeh chun Pakai Pathen'in aseije; gamsungle akimvel chu melmaten aumkimvel ding, aman nahatna chu nanga kona aloilhah ding, chule naleng inpihou chu suhchatvaija umding ahi." 
Amos3:12 Kelngoi chingpan keipibahkai kamsunga kona akelngoi kengni ahiloule abil hal beh hijongle asalhah tei banga, Samaria gamsunga cheng Israel chate, jalkhun ningchonga umho le, Damascus'a umho chu alupnaova kona kiladoh ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin ati." 
Amos3:13 Pakai Pathen, janel Pathen chun, nanghon ngaijunlang hichehi Jacob insunga hettohsah un, tin aseije." 
Amos3:14 Israel chunga asuhkhelna hou jala gotna kapeh nikho chuleh Bethel maicham ho jong gotna kapeh ding, chule maicham ki hochu kisatlha ding, tolla lhading ahiuve." 
Amos3:15 Chule keiman phalbi in le nipi lai in chu kavoh lhuh-a, sai mola kisa inho chu mangthah ding, chule inloupiho chun kichai dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos4:1 Vaichate bolse-a, panpi ngaite sugentheija, a-pakai teo henga hinchoijun donu hite tijia, Samaria molsanga um Bashan bongpi hi, hiche thuhi ngaijun." 
Amos4:2 Pakai Pathen chu athenna-a kitep ahitai, Veovin, aman nangho thihkoija, chule nason napah hou ngakoija akaimang diu nikho chu nachung uva hunglhung ding ahi." 
Amos4:3 Nangho ahomlai ho-a kona napotdoh diu, mijouse ama ama mailam cheh-a cheding, chule nanghon amaho chu leng inpi sunga nalelut dingu ahi, tin Pakai chun aseije." 
Amos4:4 Bethel'a hungun, chule sukhelun; Gilgal'a hungun lang suhkhelna punsah-un; na ganlhaina houchu jingkah sehle hinchoijunlang, nahopsom ho kum thum jou sehle hinchoijun." 
Amos4:5 Chol panna-in thangvahna ganlhaina peuvin, chule manbei thilpehho phongdoh unlang samphong leuvin: ajehchu chutia bolding chu vo Israel chate, nangho deilam ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije." 
Amos4:6 Chule Keiman nakhopi jouseuva kel kalhahsah ding, na-umnao jouse-a changlhah kalhah samsah-in, Ahivangin kahenga nahung kiledeh pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos4:7 Chule keiman chang atding phat lha thum masangin, nangho-a konin gotwi katuh tangin; khopi khat chunga go kajuhsah-in, khopi danghoa kajuh sahpon; gambih khat chunga go ajun, chule gojuh louna munho chu agojin ahi." 
Amos4:8 Hijeh chun khopi ni ahiloule thumho chu khopi khatna twi dondin acheleuvin, ahinla adang chah-u achimdeh pon; ahivangin kahenga nahung kiledeh pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos4:9 Keiman nangho huise le daitwi jin jepna kape-in, nahon leihou, nalengpi leihou, natheichang phung hou, chule na olive phung hou apun laitah-in, lungmul lenhon anechaijun; ahivangin kahenga nahung kile deh pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos4:10 Keiman Egypt'a kabolna bangin nalah uva hise kalansah-in; nakhang donghou chemjamin kasatlih-in, nasakol hou katolmangin; chule nagebuh sungu namse chu kanah sah-un; ahivang kahenga nahung kiledeh pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos4:11 Pathen'in Sodom le Gomorrah anasuhmang bangin, keiman nangho lah-a phabep kasumangin; chule nangho meikong lah-a meisel kiladoh kongnalai nabangun; ahivangin kahenga nahung kiledeh pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos4:12 Hijeh-a chu, Vo Israel, keiman hitia hi kabolding ahi: chule hitia kabol ding jehchun, Vo Israel, na Pathen toh kimutodin kigon." 
Amos4:13 Ajehchu, ven, mol le lhangho ana tungdoh-a, chule hui sempa, mihemte henga alunggel phongdoh-a, jingkah jong muthim sosahji chule leiset chung munsang ho chunga dingpa, Pakai, janelho Pathen, kiti chu amin ahi." 
Amos5:1 Vo Israel insung, nangma douna-a kathusei, kacham hela nachung chang thu kaseihi ngaiphan." 
Amos5:2 Israel nungah theng chu alhutan, thoudoh joulou ding ahitai: amanu agamsunga kidalha ahitan, chule amanu kaithou ding koimacha aumtapoi." 
Amos5:3 Ajehchu Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Israel insunga dinga, khopi mi sangkhat kitoldoh lah-a chu jakhat bou kida lhah pehding; chule mi jakhat kitoldoh nalah-a som bou kida lhah pehding ahi." 
Amos5:4 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israel insung mite jah-a hitin aseije, Keima neiholun chutile nahin dingu ahi;" 
Amos5:5 Ahin Bethel hol hih-un, Gilgal'a jong lut hih-un, chule Beersheba hopa hih un; ajehchu thonlouva Gilgal chu sohchang teiding, chule Bethel chu imalou hungsoh ding ahi." 
Amos5:6 Pakai chu holun, chutile nahin dungu ahi; achuti loule Joseph insung chunga ama meikong banga hungchu ding, akahvam ding, Bethel'a aphelmit ding umlou ding ahi." 
Amos5:7 Nangho thutanna gamsai sosah-a, chule chonphatna leisetna dalha jenghon," 
Amos5:8 Ahsi sagi hole bombel sempa, thina le-lim jingkah sosah-a, sunlai jengjong jan banga thimsahpa: huipi twiho kou khoma, chule leiset chunga sunglha pa Pakai chu holun." 
Amos5:9 Aman kulpidet chunga gamna achuhsah nadingin, ahat chunga manthah na achuhsah-in ahi." 
Amos5:10 Amahon kotpi phunga miphohho athet bolun, chule dihtah-a thusei ho chu ahot bolun ahi." 
Amos5:11 Nanghon vaicha chu nachotpha jeh-u le, ama-a kona suhlou chang pohgih nalahpeh jeh-un; nanghon songa kikhengin in sajong leuchun, asunga nachenlou diu, lengpilei hoitah neijuna tin, hijongle lengpitwiho chu nadonlou dingu ahi." 
Amos5:12 Ajehchu keiman nasuhkhelnao tamtah le na chonsetnao aletje chu kahei: amahon mikitah ho asugentheijun, sum nehguh abolun, chule kotpi phunga vaichate chu achanvou-u aheimang peh-un ahi." 
Amos5:13 Hijeh-a chu milungchingho chu chuche nikho chule thipding ahiuve: ajehchu hichu phat phalou hiding ahi. 
Amos5:14 Nahin theina dingun, thilse hilouvin thilpha holun; chutile nanghon nasei banguva, Pakai Pathen chun naumpi dingu ahi." 
Amos5:15 Janel Pakai Pathen'in Joseph insung amohho chunga lungsetna anei theinadin; thilse chu hotbolun, thilpha chu ngailuvin, chule kotpi phunga thutana dih phutdoh-un." 
Amos5:16 Hijeh chun Pakai, janel ho Pathen, Pakai chun hitihin aseije; khopi lamlen jouse-a kalemao umding; lamlhongpi jouse-a Ohe! Ohe! atidingu, amahon loulhoupa chu lunghem dinga, chule kapthemho chu kapdinga akoudiu ahi." 
Amos5:17 Chule lengpilei jouse-a kana umding ahi: ajehchu naheng kahin jotpa ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos5:18 Pakai nikho ngaicha-a nangho ada nahiuve! hiche nikho chu ipiding natiu ham? Pakai nikho chu muthim ahin, vah ahipoi." 
Amos5:19 Mihem chu keipi bahkai kicha-a ajamle, vompi toh kitoh ding; insunga lutna, akhut banga angaile, gul'in achuh ding ahi." 
Amos5:20 Pakai nikho chu khovah hilouva muthim joh hilouham? hichu hathima thim asunga vah beihel hilou ham? 
Amos5:21 Keiman nakut nikho hou chu kakidah-in, kahoi, chule nakhoppi len houva jong kakipa louding ahi." 
Amos5:22 Nanghon govam thilto le neh thiltoho neipe jongleu chun, keiman hicheho chu kasan lou ding: chule chamna thilto-a dinga gancha thaotah tah nato houjong, nahsah-a kanei louding ahi." 
Amos5:23 Kakoma nalasah-u awginho jong chu chon mangun, ajehchu keiman natumging ngeitah hou jong chu kangailou ding ahi." 
Amos5:24 Ahinla dihtah-a thutanna chu twiho bangin longlhahen, chule chonphatna chu luidung hattahto banghen." 
Amos5:25 Vo Israel insung mite, nanghon gamthip gama kum somli sunga chu ganlhainaho le thiltoho neinapeh uvem?" 
Amos5:26 Ahinla nanghon nangho dinga nakisemu na pathen hou ahsi, Moloch ponbuh le namilim semthu-u Chiun chu napo leuvin ahi."
