Amos5:27 Hijeh chun Pakai, amin janelho Pathen chun, keiman nangho Damascus khellam peh-a, gal hinga kache sah ding nahiuve, tin aseije." 
Amos6:1 Zion'a nomsa tah-a umho, chule Samaria molsanga atahsan ngamho, namtinho lah-a pipua kiminvo, Israel insung mite hungkon dohna, ohe ada-a ahiuve!" 
Amos6:2 Nangho Calneh-a cheovin lang veuvin; chule chua kon chun Hamath loupi-a chun cheovin; chujoule Philistinte khopi Gath'a chun chesuh-un; amaho chu hiche lenggam ho sanga phajonam? ahiloule agamgiu chu nangho gamgi sanga lenjonam? 
Amos6:3 Nangho nikho phalou gamlatah-a koidoh-a, chule hunama thuneina naicha-a loilut ho;" 
Amos6:4 Saiha-a kisem jalkhun chunga luma, chule atouna nomtah chunga kithaljam ho, kelngoi nou ahonlah-a kon mandoh-a, chule bongnou ho akula alah uva kona mandoh-a nejia nangho;" 
Amos6:5 Selangdah-a la manthei louva sa-a, chule David tumging banga tumgingthei kisemthu-a nangho;" 
Amos6:6 Lhengkonga judon ji-a, amaho le amaho thao hoipen pen kinuji; ahivanga Joseph kisuh gentheina-a lunghempi louho." 
Amos6:7 Hijeh-a chu tu-a hi amaho gal-hinga kikai masa hotoh gal hinga chekhom diu, chule nomsa tah-a kithaljamho golvah jong kisubei ding ahi." 
Amos6:8 Pakai Pathen amatah akihahselin, janel Pakai Pathen'in hitin aseije; Jacob kiletsahna chu kakidah-in, aleng inpiho chu kathe-e: hijeh-a chu akhopi chu asunga umho jouse puma kapehdoh ding ahi." 
Amos6:9 Chule hung hitiding ahi, insung khatna mi som auma ahileh, amaho chu thiding ahiuve." 
Amos6:10 Chule agu chu haldinga apa-ngah pa leh athiho hal pa chun alah-a, insunga kona ahinpoh doh ding, chule insunga um mikhat henga chu, khattou nangma toh umkhoma umnalai em? tia aseiding; chule ama chun, koima aumtapoi, atiding ahi. Chutengle aman, nakam kihupmin; ajehchu eihon Pakai minchu iphahpoh theilou diu ahi, tia asei ding ahi." 
Amos6:11 Ajehchu veuvin, Pakai chun thu apeh ahi: chule aman inpi chu avohsetna asuhchip ding, chule inneoho chu ahal hala asoding ahi." 
Amos6:12 Sakol ho chu songpi chunga lhainao vin tem? Mihon chumun chu bongchalin kainao vin tem? Ajehchu nanghon thutandih chu thinkha naso-un, chule chonphatna ga chu thing gunei nasosah taove." 
Amos6:13 Nangho imacha hilou thil khatna kipah jia, chule sakiho chu ithahat naova ikilah-u hilou ham? tia seijiho." 
Amos6:14 Hijongle, veuvin, vo Israel insung, keiman nangho douva nam khat katun dohding ahi, tin janel Pakai Pathen'in aseije; chule amahon Hamath lutna-a pat, gamthip vapidung geija nangho nasuhgenthei dingu ahi." 
Amos7:1 Pakai Pathen'in keima hitihin eina musah-e: veuvin, aman hamhing kehdoh nunung ho ahung kedoh kipat tilin khaokho tamtah asemin, veuvin, hichu lengpa-a hamhing at dan dungjuija akehdoh nunung ho ahi." 
Amos7:2 Chuin ahitin ahi, amahon gamsunga hampaho anehchai phatnun, keiman, Vo Pakai Pathen nahenga katao ahi, ngaidamin, Koi jala Jacob chu dingdoh kit ding ham? Ajehchu ama neocha ahi, tin kaseijin ahi." 
Amos7:3 Hijeh hin Pakaiyin alung aheijin; chuti taponte, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos7:4 Pakai Pathen'in keima hitihin eimu sah-e: veuvin, Pakai Pathen'in engbolna din mei akouvin, hichun twipi lentah akagon, chule tolgo phabep jong akavamin ahi." 
Amos7:5 Chuin keiman, Vo Pakai Pathen, khongaijin tia nahenga katao ahi; Koi jala Jacob chu dingdoh kit ding ham? Ajehchu, ama neocha ahi, tin kaseije." 
Amos7:6 Hichun Pakai lung akisihsah tan, hiche jonghi chuti taponte, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos7:7 Hitihin aman eimusah-e, chule veuvin, Pakai chu tetohna khao akhutna achoijin, tetohna-a kisem bang chung khatna adingin ahi." 
Amos7:8 Chuin Pakaiyin kajah-a, Amos, nangin ipi namu em? eiti. Chuin keiman, tetohna khao kamui katin ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Ven, keiman kami Israelte lah-a tetohna khao kakoiding, keiman amaho lah kapal kit tahlou ding ahi." 
Amos7:9 Chule Isaac munsang ho chu kamhel ding, Israel muntheng ho chu kisumang ding; chule keiman Jeroboam insung douna-a chemjam kapat ding ahi, ati." 
Amos7:10 Chuin Bethel'a thempu Amaziah chu Israel leng Jeroboam henga thu athotnin, hitin aseije; Israel insung mite lah-a nangma dounan Amos'in guhthim thilgon aneije. Athusei jouse chu gamsung mite pohjou ahipoi." 
Amos7:11 Ajehchu Amos'in hitin ati, Jeroboam chemjam'a thiding, chule Israelte hi agam sunguva kona sohchang dinga kitolmang ding ahiuve, tin aseijin ahi." 
Amos7:12 Amaziah jong chun Amos jah-a, vo nangma mitvahnei, chenlang Judah gama jamlut-in, chumuna chun changlhah nenlang gaothu seijin." 
Amos7:13 Ahin Bethel'a hin gaothu seikit tahih-in: ajehchu hikom hi lengpa houin le lengpa leitol ahi, ati." 
Amos7:14 Chuin Amos'in adonbutnin, Amaziah jah-a, keima themgao kahipoi, themgao chapa jong kahipoi; ahinla keima kelngoi vah-a le theiba ga lohkhom bou kahi." 
Amos7:15 Chule kelngoi hon nung kajui petnin, Pakaiyin eipuijin, kajah-a, Chen, kami Israelte lah-a gao thu gaseijin eitin ahi." 
Amos7:16 Hijeh chun, tun nangin Pakai thusei hi ngaijin; nangman kajah-a, Israel dounan gaothu seihih-in, chule Isaac insung dounan thu seihih-in tin naseije." 
Amos7:17 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije; najinu chu khopi sunga noti'a pangding, nachapate le nachanute chu chemjam'a lou dingu, nagam leiset chu tena khaova kihomtel ding; chule nangma gam thenglou mun'a nathi ding ahi: chule thonlouva Israel chu agamsunga kona munchoma sohchanga cheding ahi." 
Amos8:1 Pakai Pathen'in hitihin eimusah-e; veuvin, nipilai thei paipeh khat aumin ahi." 
Amos8:2 Chuin aman, Amos ipi namu em? eiti. Chuin keiman, nipilai thei paipeh khat kamui kati. Chuin Pakai chun kajah-a, Kami Israelte chunga achaina chu ahunglhung tai; Keiman amaho lah kajotpa kit tahlou ding ahi." 
Amos8:3 Chule chuche nikhole houin'a laho chu kale maon'a hiding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije. Muntina thilong tamtah umding; amahon amaho chu thipbeh-a apaidoh dingu ahi." 
Amos8:4 Hichehi ngaijun, Vo nangho, panpi ngaite vallhumjia, gamsunga vaichate losamsah jiho," 
Amos8:5 Nanghon, Itihle lhathah akichaijin, chang le mim ijohthei diuvem? chule cholngah ni akichaijin, ephah isuneovun, shekel iletsah-un, chule jouvin khaikot ilepmun, sakolchang joh din ikipanthei diuvem?" 
Amos8:6 Chuti chun vaicha chu dangka khatnin, panpi ngaichu kengchot tokhatnin icho uvin; chule sakolchang vaiho jengjong ijoh thei diuvem? nati uve." 
Amos8:7 Pakai chu Jacob chungnunna-a chun akihahselin aseije, keiman, anatohhou khatcha jong kasuhmil louhel ding ahi." 
Amos8:8 Hiche jeh-ahi, gamsung kihotling louding hija, chua cheng amitakip chu lunghem louding ham? Hichu twisoh banga apumchanga hungsoh doh ding; Egypt'a twiso banga chu, paidoh le lhohsah-a umding ahi." 
Amos8:9 Chuche nikho chule hung hiti ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, keiman sunlaile nisa kalhum sah ding, chule khovah laitahle thim kajin sah ding ahi." 
Amos8:10 Chule keiman na kut hou lunghemna kasosah ding, chule nala hou jouse kala kaso ding; taijol jouse chunga khaodip pon kahin lhun sah ding, chule luchang jouse kachaisah ding; chapa changkhat chunga lunghemna tobang chu kalhun sah-a, chule achaina chu lungnatna nikho hiding ahi." 
Amos8:11 Veovin, nikhoho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakai Pathen'in aseije, hitia chu keiman gamsunga kel kahin lansah ding, changlhah ngaichatna jeh-a kel hilou, twi ngaichatna jeh-a dangchah jong hilou ding, amavang Pakai thujah nomna kel hiding ahi." 
Amos8:12 Chule amaho twilen khatna kona twilen khat, chule sahlama pat solam gei, amaho Pakai thu holna suhle tunga lhaile diu, ahivanga amujoulou dingu ahi." 
Amos8:13 Hiche nikho chule nungah theng hoitahho le gollhang ho chu dangchah jeh-a lhalhop diu ahi. 
Amos8:14 Samaria chonset na-a kihahsela, Vo Dan, na Pathen ahinge; Chule Beersheba umdan ahingin; tia seiho jengjong chu lhu uva, thoudoh kit talouhel dingu ahitai." 
Amos9:1 Keiman Pakai chu maicham chunga adin kanamui; chule hitin aseije, akhom ho chu akilon theina din kotbeng chu jepmin; chule alu-u chu ban sattanin, alah uva anukhahpen chu Keiman chemjam'a kasatlhuh ding; alah uva jam-a chu jammang theilou ding, chule ahoidoh-a kihuhdoh louding ahi." 
Amos9:2 Amahon thikhol khul'a leiko laijongleu, hia kona chu kakhutna kaloidoh ding; amaho van'a kaltou jongleu, hia kona chu kapuilhah kit ding ahi." 
Amos9:3 Chule amaho chu Carmel molvum'a kisel jongleu, kahol doh-a hia kona chu kakaidoh ding; chule amaho kamitmu-a konin twikhanglen todopma kisel jongleu, chumuna chu keiman gul thu kapeh-a, aman amaho chu achuh ding ahi." 
Amos9:4 Chule amaho amelmateu masanga gal hingin kitol jongleu, chumuna chu Keiman chemjam thu kapeh-a, hichun amaho athagam ding; Chule Keiman amaho thilpha-a ding hilouva, thilse-a dinga kavetlhih jing dingu ahi." 
Amos9:5 Chule gamsung sukha jia chu janel ho Pakai Pathen ahin, hichu junlha-a, chua chengho jousen alung hempi diu: Hichu twisoh banga apumchanga hungsoh doh ding; Egypt'a twiso banga chu, paidoh le lhohsah-a umding ahi." 
Amos9:6 Vanchunga indanho kisah-a, leisetna galmihon kisemdoh-a chu ama ahin; twipia twiho kou khoma, hihochu leiset chunga hinsung lha-a chu ama ahi. Pakai kiti chu amin ahi." 
Amos9:7 Vo Israel chate, nangho Keima dinga Ethopia chateho tobang nahiu hilou ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije. Keiman Israel chu Egypt gama kona kapuidoh hilou ham? Philistine te chu Caphtor-a kona, chule Syria techu Kir'a kona kapuidoh hilou ham?" 
Amos9:8 Veovin, Pakai Pathen mit teni chu chonsetna dim lenggam chunga achujin, chule keiman hiche leiset chunga kona kasuhmang helding; Jacob insung vang kasuhmang hel louding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Amos9:9 Ajehchu, veuvin, Keiman thu kapeh ding, godalla chang akisep banga, Keiman namtinho lah-a Israel chu kasep chil ding ahin, achang neopen jeng jong tolla lhalou ding ahi." 
Amos9:10 Setna-in eiphapou vintin, mai jong eikimaitopi pouvinte tia sei Kami chonseteho jouse chu abonuva chemjam'a louding ahiuve." 
Amos9:11 Hiche nikho teng chule keiman David houbuh lhusa chu kaphoh ding kitna, aselai ho kasemphat kitding; chule achimsa chu katundoh kitna, gollui laija banga kasah doh kit ding ahi." 
Amos9:12 Chutiachu Edom mite amoh chengse le, Pathen hephaloute kamina kikou chengse chun alo theidiu ahi, tin hiche tongdoh-a Pakai chun aseije." 
Amos9:13 Veovin, nikhoho chu ahung lhunge, tin Pakaiyin aseije, loukaija pangpan chang atpa ahinphah ding, lengpithei chilpan muchi tupa ahinphah ding; molsang hon lengpitwi lhumtah ahinvat lhahsah-a, chule lhangho jouse junlha dingu ahi." 
Amos9:14 Chule keiman kami Israelte chu asohchan naova kona kahin lepui kit ding, amahon akamhelsa khopiho asahdoh kitnuva, hiho chu chenna-a aneidiu; chule lengpitheiho aphu uva, chuche-a lengpitwi chu adondiu; chule honho jong abolluva, chuche-a agaho chu anehdiu ahi." 
Amos9:15 Chule keiman amaho chu agamuva kaphulut dingu, keiman kapehsao gamsunga kona chu amaho kibotdoh kit louding ahitaove, tin Pakai na Pathen'un aseije." 
Obadiah1:1 Obadiah gao thilmu chu ahi. Edom chung changa Pakai Pathen'in hitin ati; keihon Pakaiya konin thuthang khat kajaovin, palai khat Pathen hephaloute henga akisolin: Nangho thoudoh-un, chule amanu douva galla satdin kipatdoh-u hite." 
Obadiah1:2 Ven, keiman nangma Pathen hephalou ho lah-a neocha kasem nahin; nangma isahlou tah-a kibol ding nahi." 
Obadiah1:3 Nalung sunga kiletsahna chun nalhemlhatan, nangma song khikeh kah-a chenga, mun sangtah lo-a chu nahin; nangman nalungin, koijin tolla eiloilhah thei ding ham? tin naseijin ahi." 
Obadiah1:4 Nangma muvanlai bangin kichoisangin lang, ahsi ho lah-a nabuh gase jongle chun, hia kona chu nangma kaloi lhah ding nahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Obadiah1:5 Gucha ho nahenga hungu henglang, michom ho jan-in hungleu, (ichana suhmanga naum ding hitam!) amaho aninglhin tokah uva thil chu akichom lou diu ham? lengpi ga loujiho chu nahenga hungleu, amahon lengpiga phabap beh adalhah lou dingu ham?" 
Obadiah1:6 Esau thil ho chu iti kiholdoh theija, athil akisel ho chu iti kikhol doh ding ham?" 
Obadiah1:7 Nangman nakiloipi miho chun nangma gamgi chan geija nahin lhutnu ahitan; nakichampi miho chun nalhep lhah-u ahitan, jojong najou ahitai. Nachanglhah neho tah jong chun nanoija mahaput theina akoijun; ama-a het themna aumpoi." 
Obadiah1:8 Edom'a kona miching ho kasuhmang louding hija, Esau molsanga kona hetthemna kasuhmang louding ham? tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Obadiah1:9 Vo Teman, Edom molla amitin chu tolthatna pang hon akhona channa athagam theina diuva, nami thahat tahtah hochu lunglha diu ahi." 
Obadiah1:10 Ajehchu nasopipa Jacob douna-a pumhat tah-a nathilbol jeh-a jum nan nahinkhu ding, chule a-imatih channa dinga nangma sat lhah-a naum ding ahi." 
Obadiah1:11 Nangma agal lang khatna nadin nikho, gamchom mihon agalmiteu gal hinga akaimangu nikho, chule gamdang miho chu akotpi ho-a alutnuva, Jerusalem chunga vang asanuva chun, amaho lah-a khat bangin nangma napangin ahi." 
Obadiah1:12 Ahinla nasopipa gamchom mi akiso nikho chu, nangman navet louding; chujongle Juda chate kisuhmang nikho-a chu nakipa lou ding; chule hahsatna nikho-a chu kiletsah tah-a thu jong nasei louding ahi." 
Obadiah1:13 Amaho vangsetna nikho-a chu nangma kamite kotpi-a nalut lou ding; chule amaho hamsetna nikho-a chu nangman akibol gentheinao navet lou ding, avangsetnao nikho-a chu athilkeu hou chunga jong nakhut nasuhnat lou ding ahi;" 
Obadiah1:14 Nangma ajamdoh-a miho suhmang dinga lamthom ho-a jong nanadin lou ding; hahsatna nikho-a hoidoh-a umden ho chu peh jong nanapeh doh louding ahi. 
Obadiah1:15 Ajehchu Pakai nikho chu Pathen hephaloute chunga chu din ahung naije; nangman nabol bang banga nachunga hung kibol ding; natohman chu nangma tah luchunga hungkile ding ahi. 
Obadiah1:16 Ajehchu nangman keima molsang theng chunga nana don banga, chutobanga chu Pathen hephalouten adon jing jengdiu; chule amahon adonuva, avallut diu, chule a-itih-a ana umkhalou banga umdiu ahi." 
Obadiah1:17 Ahinla Zion molsang chunga chun kihuh dohna umintin, chule hia chu thenna umding, chule Jacob insungin agouvu chu akilo kitdiu ahi." 
Obadiah1:18 Chule Jacob insung chu mei hunghi ding, Joseph insung chu meikou hunghia, Esau insung vang polkung hungsoh ding, amahon amaho chu meija ahal dingu, Esau insunga chu amoh ahinga khatcha umlou ding ahi; ajehchu hiche hi Pakaiyin asei ahi." 
Obadiah1:19 Chule lhanglam sang miho chun Esau molsang chu ahin lodiu; chule phaicham mihon Philistine alodiu; amaho chun Ephraim phaileiho le Samaria phaileiho ahinlouva, chule Benjamin'in Gilead ahinlo ding ahi." 
Obadiah1:20 Chule sohchanga hiche janel Israel chate hin Kanaan gam alodiu, Zarephath chan gei ngeija ahinlo diu ahin; chule Sepharad'a um gal hinga kikai Jerusalem mite chun, lhanglam sang khopi ho chu alodiu ahi." 
Obadiah1:21 Esau molsang chunga thutan dinga huhhingpu chu Zion molsanga kon hungdoh ding; chule lenggam chu Pakaiya hiding ahi. 
Jonah1:1 Tun Amittai chapa Jonah henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Jonah1:2 Kipat in lang, khuche khopi lentah Nineveh'a khun chen, chule ama dounan hiche thuhi gasam phongin; ajehchu akhansetnao chu kahenga ahung lhung touve." 
Jonah1:3 Ahin Jonah akipatdoh-in Pakai angsunga konin Tarshish lama jam dingin Joppa-a achesuh tan ahi; chuin aman kong khat Tarshish lam cheding amun: hitichun touna man chu apen, Pakai angsunga konin Tarshish lama chedingho toh chekhom din, asunga akumsuh tan ahi." 
Jonah1:4 Ahin Pakaiyin twikhanglen'a chun hui hattah ahinsoltan, huile go kitho nasatah ahung chutan, hitichun chuche kong chu keh dingin aumtan ahi." 
Jonah1:5 Chujouvin kong tol ho chu akicha taovin, amitin chu a pathen heng cheh uva ataovun, chule kong sunga um thil ho chu kong ajankhai theina din alauvin, twikhanglen'a aseplha taovin ahi. Ahin Jonah vangchu kong sung ning khatna ana kumsuh-in; hia chun alumin, a-imumil deltan ahi." 
Jonah1:6 Hitichun kong pipuipa chu ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Vo ihmumil delpa, nangma ipi ngaito nahim? thoudoh-in lang eiho imanthah louna diule Pathen'in ichunguva lunggel ahin neitheina din, na Pathen henga taovin ati." 
Jonah1:7 Chuin amaho amitakipmin aloi agol kom cheh-a chun, Hungun, koipen jeh-a hiche thilse hi ichunguva chua ham ti ihetdoh theina diuvin vang sannu hite atiovin ahi. Hitichun amahon vang chu asantaovin ahile, Jonah chunga achutan ahi." 
Jonah1:8 Hichun amahon ajah-a, Nahenga kangeh-u ahi, neisei peh-un, koijeh-a hiche thilse hi ichunguva chua ham; ipi natonga nahim? hoija hungkon nahim? ipi gam mi nahi ham? chule ipi nam mi nahim? atiuvin ahi." 
Jonah1:9 Chuin aman ajah uva, Keima Hebrew mi kahin, twikhanglen le leiset sempa Pakai van Pathen chu kakichan ahi, ati." 
Jonah1:10 Chuin miho chu nasatah-in akicha cheh taovin, ahenga, Ipi dinga hitobang hi nabol hitam? atiuvin ahi. Ajehchu amaho aseipeh jeh chun, Pakai angsunga kona jama mi ahi ti chu amahon ahetauvin ahi." 
Jonah1:11 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Twipi hi kadinguva athip theina dinga nachunga hi ipi kaboldiu hitam? atiovin ahi, ajehchu twipi chu akinongin hui leh go akithotai." 
Jonah1:12 Chuin aman ahenguva, Neidom uvin lang twipia chun neiseplha taovin; chutile nangho dinga twipi hi thipding ahitai: ajehchu keima jeh-a hiche huipi gopihi nachung uva chua ahi ti keiman kahei, ati." 
Jonah1:13 Ahijeng vangin miho chun kong chu tolgo lam lhutna teidin hatah-in atolun, ahinla ajoutapouvin ahi. Ajehchu twipi chu akinongin, huipi leh gopi chu amaho chunga akhoh cheh-in ahi." 
Jonah1:14 Hijeh chun amaho Pakai henga ataovun, Nahenga kataovu ahi, Vo Pakai, nahenga kahung taovu ahi; hiche mihempa hinkho jeh hin neimanthah sah hih-un, chule themona bei thisan chu kachunguva kikoi hihhen; ajehchu Vo Pakai, nangin nalungdei banga nabol ahi, atiuve." 
Jonah1:15 Hitichun amahon Jonah chu adomun, twipia aseplha taovin ahi: chutah-in twipi chu akinon na-a konin athiptan ahi." 
Jonah1:16 Chuin amahon Pakai chu kichat mainan akicha tapouvin, Pakai henga ganlhaina abolun, chule kitepna aneijun ahi." 
Jonah1:17 Tun Pakaiyin Jonah val dingin ngapi lentah khat gotsan anakoijin ahi. Chuin Jonah chu ngapi oisunga ni thumle jan thum aumin ahi. 
Jonah2:1 Chujouvin Jonah ngapi oisunga konin Pakai a-Pathen henga ataovin," 
Jonah2:2 Hitin aseije, Eikibol gimna jeh-in Pakai henga kataovin ahile, aman eingaipeh-in; keima thikholkhul tobang ngapi oisunga konin kataovin ahile, nangman ka aw neingaipeh-in ahi." 
Jonah2:3 Ajehchu nangman twithuh tah, twipi lailunga neiseplut nin; twisoh ho chun eium kimveltan: natwi kidil hole twikinong ho chun eichuptan ahi." 
Jonah2:4 Chujouvin keiman, Namitmu-a kona keima kipaimanga um kahitan; hijongle nahouin theng lam chu kahin galdot kit ding ahi, kati." 
Jonah2:5 Twihon keima eiumkimvelin, kahinna chan geijin; twithuh-in kakimvel akhah chah-in, hamdong hon kalu kimvel atomin ahi." 
Jonah2:6 Keima molsang ho bul geijin kakumsuh-in, leiset le agol kijam ho chu a-imatih-a dingin kakimvela aume; hijongle Vo Pakai ka Pathen, nangman kahinkho hi thina kokhuh-a konin napui dohtan ahi." 
Jonah2:7 Kasungila kahinna hi alhahlhop tengle Pakai kageldohjin; chule kataona hi nangma heng, nahouin theng sunga ahung lhungjin ahi." 
Jonah2:8 Pannabei jouthu kisei nitna miho chun akihepinao chu adalhah-u ahitai. 
Jonah2:9 Ahinla keiman vang thangvahna awging puma nahenga kilhaina kaneiding, chule kakitepna jong chu kapeh ding ahi. Huhhingna hi Pakaiya kon ahi." 
Jonah2:10 Chuin Pakaiyin Ngapi henga thu aseijin ahile, Jonah chu vapam leigo chunga ahin lodoh tan ahi." 
Jonah3:1 Chuin anivei channan Pakai thu chu Jonah henga ahungin, aseije," 
Jonah3:2 Kipatdoh-in, khuche khopi lentah Nineveh'a khun chen, chule keiman seiphong dinga kapeh thuhi gaseiphongin, ati." 
Jonah3:3 Hitichun Jonah akipatdoh-in, Pakai thu dungjuijin Nineveh'a chun achetan ahi. Tun Nineveh chu khopi lentah ahin, ni thum sung kijot ahi." 
Jonah3:4 Chuin Jonah chu khopi sung alutnin, ni khat lampi ajot panin, aman, Tua pat nisomli joule Nineveh kisumang ding ahi, tin asamin ahi." 
Jonah3:5 Hitichun Nineveh miten Pathen chu atahsan taovin, an ngolna ding aphongun, amaho alenpenna pat aneopen chan geijin khaodip pon akisilun ahi." 
Jonah3:6 Chule thu chu Nineveh lengpa henga ahung lhungtan, chuin ama alaltouna-a konin akipatdoh-in, alalvon chu akoilhan, khaodip pon akikhun, vut lah-a atoutan ahi." 
Jonah3:7 Chuin aman lengpa le amilalte minna Nineveh khopi pumpi-a phonjala sapphong dingin thupeh aneijin, hitin ati, Mihem hihen sahem hijongle, bonghon hihen kelngoihon hijongle imacha atep louhel diu ahi: amahon an jong anehlou diu, twi jong adonlou diu ahi." 
Jonah3:8 Ahin mihem le ganchaho chun khaodip pon kikhu-u henlang, Pathen henga nasatah-in taovuhen. Ahi, amitin athilse bolna lampile akhutnuva pumhat thilbol ho-a konin hung kilekitnuhen." 
Jonah3:9 Eiho imanthah louna dinguva, ijemtia Pathen ahung kihei kitna alung aheija, alungsatna khohtah-a kona akiheimang kit thei ding kon aseithei ding ham? ati." 
Jonah3:10 Chuin Pathen'in anatoh hou, athilse bolnao lampi ho-a kona ahung kilehei kitnu chu amun; chule Pathen'in achunguva kabol ding ahi tia asei thilse-a kon chun alung aheijin, aboltapon ahi." 
Jonah4:1 Ahinla hiche hin Jonah chu hatah-in alunglhaisah tapon, ama alunghang lheh jengtan ahi." 
Jonah4:2 Chuin ama Pakai henga ataovin, Vo Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, kachenna gamsunga kaum petna kanasei chu hiche hi ana hilouham? Hijeh-a chu namasanga kona Tarshish lama kanajam ahi. Ajehchu nangma lungsetna dim Pathen, hepina dim, lunghang vahlou, khotona lentah nei, thilse-a kona lungheiji Pathen nahi kahet ahi." 
Jonah4:3 Hijeh chun tun Vo Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, keima-a konin kahinkho hi latan; ajehchu keima dingin hinsangin thi aphajoi, ati." 
Jonah4:4 Hichun Pakaiyin, Nalunghan hi pha nasah ham? ati." 
Jonah4:5 Hitichun Jonah khopi-a konin apotdoh-in, khopi solam sanga atouvin, hia chun buhkhat asongin, khopi chunga chu ipi hung lhungem ti amutheina din buhlim noija chun atouvin ahi." 
Jonah4:6 Chuin Pakai Pathen'in umgui khat ahin kedohsah-in, alung hesohna-a kona huhdoh-a aumna dingle, aluchunga nilima pang dingin, Jonah chungvuma akhandoh sah-in ahi. Hitichun umgui jal chun Jonah akipah lheh jengin ahi." 
Jonah4:7 Ahinla akit nikho jingkah ahunghi phatnin, Pathen'in lung khat ahinsolin, hichun umgui chu anegamin ahile agolhatai." 
Jonah4:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, nisa ahungso phatnin, Pathen'in solam hui gimsetah-a sa chu ahin nunsah-in; chule nisan Jonah luchung chu ahinkhon ahile ama alha lhoptan, chuin aman thiding alhangai tan, Keima dingin hinsangin thi ding aphajoi, ati." 
Jonah4:9 Chuin Pathen'in Jonah henga, Umgui jeh-a nalunghan hi dih nasah ham? ati. Chuin aman, Thina chan geija dinga kalunghan hi dih kasai, ati." 
Jonah4:10 Hichun Pakaiyin, Nangman natohgim jong hilou, nakhansah jong hilou, jankah-a hungkeh doh-a jankah-a mangthah-a umgui chunga bon hepina naneija ahile;" 
Jonah4:11 Achutile chuche Nineveh khopi lentah, asunga akhut jetlamu le akhut veilamu jong hekhen theilou mihem sangjakhat le sangsomni hole, gancha tamtah ho khu keiman khendoh louva kakoi ding ham? ati." 
Micah1:1 Judah lengho Jotham, Ahaz chule Hezekiah nikholaijin Moresheth mi Micah henga Pakai thu hunglhung, Samaria le Jerusalem chung chang thudolla athilmu." 
Micah1:2 Ngaijun nangho mijousen; Vo leisetle asunga um jousen, ngaitemun; Pakai Pathen chu nangho douna-a ahetoh hihen, a-houin thenga kona Pakai chu ahetoh chu hihen." 
Micah1:3 Ajehchu veuvin, Pakai chu aumna munna kona hung potdoh-a, leiset munsang ho chu achotpha ding ahi." 
Micah1:4 Chule mei koma khoilu jun bangle, twiho mun nema akisunlhah bang hella, phaicham ho chu khikeh-a, molsangho chu anoija junlha ding ahi" 
Micah1:5 Hicheho jousehi Jacob khan gitlou jehle, Israel insung chonset jeh ahi. Jacob suhkhelna ipi ham? Samaria chu hilou ham? Chule Judah munsang ho chu ipi ham? Jerusalem chu hilou ham?" 
Micah1:6 Hijeh-a chu keiman Samaria chu gamlah-a thilnen kisekhom banga kasema, chule lengpi leija kibol ding; Chule chua songho chu damphaija kasunlhah-a, abul ho chu kadosah ding ahi." 
Micah1:7 Chule alim semthu milim jouse chu kavohchip gam hella, noti mana amu jouse chu meija kahal vam gamhel ding, chule milim jouse chu kasuh manghel ding ahi; ajehchu amanun noti mana kon alokhom ahijeh-in, hicheho chu noti man mama-a kilekit ding ahi." 
Micah1:8 Hijeh-a chu kaka-a kapen ding, kakisut lha-a sagoh keova kaumding ahi. Dragon ho bangin penging ting, sumbupi bangin haminge." 
Micah1:9 Ajehchu amanu maput chu damkit theilou ahi: ajehchu hichehi Judah gam alhungtan, kamite kotpi phung ahung lhungtan, Jerusalem jengjong ahung lhungtai." 
Micah1:10 Hichehi Gath kho-a seiphong hih-un, kapjong kaphih hellun; Aphrah insunga leivui lah-a chun kitangle leovin." 
Micah1:11 Vo Shaphir'a chengpa nangma, sagoh keovin jahcha tah-in chemangtan, Zaanan miho chu Bethe-zel miho lunghemna-a dingin apotdoh pouvin, aman nangma-a kona dinmun akimuding ahi." 
Micah1:12 Maroth mihon chingthei tah-in chanpha angahuvin, ahinla Pakaiya konin thilse chu Jerusalem kotpi phung ahunglhung suhtai." 
Micah1:13 Vo, nangho Lachish mite, kangtalai chu gamsa hattah toh sutouvin; amanu hi Zion chanute chonset kipatna ahin, ajehchu Israel suhkhelna chu nanga akimudoh-in ahi." 
Micah1:14 Hijeh-a chu nangin Moresheth-gath henga thilpeh napeh ding, Achzib inho chu Israel lengho dinga lheplhahna hiding ahi." 
Micah1:15 Ahinla vo Mareshah mi, nangma goulo ding khat nahenga kahin puiding; Israel loupi nachu Adullam geija hung ding ahi." 
Micah1:16 Nasam kivel tollin, nacha ngaitahho jallin kivel tollin; mulaopi lumui bangin kivou muijin, ajehchu amaho nanga kona gal hinga che ahitaove." 
Micah2:1 Khangitlouna thilgongho, ajalkhun chunga thilse bolho chu ohe adao ahi! akhutnuva boltheina umma ahijeh-in, jingkah kho hungvah teng hichu aboljiuve." 
Micah2:2 Chule amahon mi lou athang setnun, pumhatnin alahpeh-un; chule inho athangset nun, alahpeh-un; chutichun amahon mihem le a-in, amihem le anei agouho asugenthei jin ahi." 
Micah2:3 Hijeh chun veuvin, hiche insung douna dingin thil gilou kagongin; hiche phat hi phat phalou ahijeh-a chua kona chu nangongu naheithei lou dingu, hoitho tah-a naumthei lou dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Micah2:4 Hicheni chule mikhatnin nangho douna-a thulem khat aseija, lunghem tah-a ka la-a nakacham uva; eikisumang theng helluva ahitai, kamite gouchan chu akheldoh tai; Aman hichu keija kona iti ana chon mang ahitadem! aman kagam hou chu akaleh in eihop khenpeh taove, tia aseidiu ahi." 
Micah2:5 Hijeh-a chu nangin Pakai houkhom na-a khaova vang kisanna chan homding koima naneilou dingu ahi. 
Micah2:6 Gao hih-un, tin gao thusei ho henga seijuvin; amaho henga chu amahon gaothu aseiloudiu, chule amahon jachatna atoloudiu ahi." 
Micah2:7 Vo nangho Jacob insung tia kiminvote, Pakai lhagao chu nahsah mo-a uma ham? hichehi ama natoh hi jaham? Kitah-a chonpha chunga chu kathu hohin thilpha abolji hilou ham?" 
Micah2:8 Ahinla tumapan louvin kamitehi melma bangin nabolun; nangman gal deilou mongtah-a vahle ho chu galmuna kon hung kileho bangin avonu le asangkhol cholu nasutlhah peh-in ahi. 
Micah2:9 Kamite numei ho chu a-in'u nomtah ho-a konin nanodoh un, kaloupina chu achateuva konin a-itih-a dingin naladoh taove." 
Micah2:10 Hikom munhi nakicholdo nao mun ahilou jeh-in, kipat un lang potdoh-un; ajehchu hichehi akisuboh ahin, hichun nangho nasuhmanguva, melse tah-a nasuh gamheldiu ahi." 
Micah2:11 Mikhat chun lhagaovin vahle hen adihlouvin jou bol henlang, keiman lengpitwi le ju thu-in naheng uva gaothu seijinge, tile, ama chu hiche mite themgao hiding ahi." 
Micah2:12 Vo Jacob, keiman nabon chaova kakhop khom teidingu ahi. Keiman thonlouva Israel amoh chengse chu kakhop khom ding, keiman amaho Bozrah kelngoi banga kakoi khoma, hongsunga kelngoihon banga kakoi khomding; amaho mipi tamtah jeh-a husan nasatah aso dingu ahi." 
Micah2:13 Asusepa chu amasanguva ahungdoh-e; amahon asuseuvin, chule kotpi chu ajotpaijun, chua chun achedoh taove; chule alengpao chu amasanguva chea, Pakai chu amaho luchang hiding ahi." 
Micah3:1 Chuin keiman, Vo Jacob luchangho, chule Israel insunga pipuiho, ngai phaovin, naheng uva katao ahi, nanghon thutandih nahet dingdolu hilou ham? kati." 
Micah3:2 Nangho apha hot bolla ase ngailuho, amaho-a kon avunu naleolhah peh-un, aguhouva konin atahsapheo nakhoh lha uvin;" 
Micah3:3 Kamite sajong nane uvin, amaho-a kon avunu naliplhauvin; chule bella lhah ding bangle belpi sunga lhahding bangin aguhou navochip un, aphe-u nachen bong selun ahi." 
Micah3:4 Chuteng amaho Pakai henga penguntin, hijongleh aman amaho angaipeh lou ding; athil bollule amaho tah chonna phatlou jeh-a, aman amaho-a kona amai jengjong aselding ahi." 
Micah3:5 Kamite lamvai sah-a, chamna umhen tia samma, aha uva pet; akamuva ima henglouva pa douna-a galsat dinga kigo themgaoho thudolla; Pakaiyin hitin aseije." 
Micah3:6 Hijeh chun mu naneilou helna diuva nangho dinga jan hunglhung ding, chule ai nasan theilouna dinguva nachung uva mu thim ding, chule themgaoho chunga nisa lhumma, amaho chunga chu sun jong thim ding ahi." 
Micah3:7 Chutengle themgaoho chu jahchao vintin, Ai themho chu maimoh dingu; henge, Pathen'a kona donbutna aumtah loujeh-a, amahon akamu akisipdiu ahitai." 
Micah3:8 Ahinla Jacob henga asuhkhelna, Israel henga achonsetna phonpeh dingin, Pakai lhagaova konin tahbeh-in thilboltheina, thutanna chule hatna-in kadimset tan ahi." 
Micah3:9 Nangho Jacob insung luchangho leh Israel insung pipuho, thutanna hotbola, thudih akaleh-a heiho, naheng uva katao ahi, hichehi ngai phaovin." 
Micah3:10 Amahon Zion chu thisan aso uvin, Jerusalem chu khangitlouna asouve." 
Micah3:11 Chukoma vaipoho chun thilpeh kineppi na-in thu atannun, chule thempuhon tohman mun'a dingin ahilun, themgaoho chun sum deinan agaovui. Achutijeng vangin, Pakai chu eiho lah-a uma hilou ham? Ichunguva thilphalou hunglhung ponte, atiuvin Pakaiya akingaijun ahi." 
Micah3:12 Hijeh-a chu Zion chu nangho jala lou banga kikaija, Jerusalem chu thilboh kisevum hung hiding, houin umna molsang chu gamlah-a munsang ho bangding ahi." 
Micah4:1 Ahinla ninunung lamleh hunghiti ding ahi, Pakai in umna molsang chu molsang ho chung vuma hung kisadoh ding, lhangvum hoa choisanga hung umding; chule hia chu mipi ho twilona longlut dingu ahiuve." 
Micah4:2 Chule namtinho chu hunguvin tin, hungun, Pakai molsanga kaltouvu hitin, Jacob Pathen in'a chun kaltouvu hite; aman alampiho chu eihil untin, eiho alampia chu ichediu ahi; Zion'a kon chun danthupeh potdoh intin, Pakai thu chu Jerusalem'a kona hungpotdoh ding ahi." 
Micah4:3 Chule aman mitamtah thu atana, chule gamla tah-a nam hattahho chu aphosal ding; chuleh achemjamu chu lou kaina ha-a akhendiu, chule atengcha hou chu kangkuija akhendiu ahi; nam khatnin nam khat chunga chemjam lamtapontin, galsat jejong kithemchuh tapouvinte." 
Micah4:4 Ahivangin mi jouse ama ama lengpi theile theichang phung noija touvuntin, koima chan kichatsah tapou vinte; ajehchu janel Pakaiyin akamcheng tah-a aphondoh ahi." 
Micah4:5 Ajehchu mi jouse ama Pathen min cheh-a chonuntin, chule eiho Pakai i-Pathen'u mina atonsot atonsotna ichon lediu ahitai." 
Micah4:6 Pakaiyin hitin aseije, hicheni chuleh keiman elbaiho khom ingting, akinomang saho kakhopkhoma, chule kasuhgentheiho chu kakhop khom ding ahi;" 
Micah4:7 Chule elbaiho chu ahingdoh amoh-a kasemding, gamla tah-a kipaidoh ho chu nam hattah khatna kasem ding ahi; tua patna Pakaiyin Zion molsanga tonsotna achunguva vai ahomding ahi." 
Micah4:8 Chule Vo nangma, ganchaho insang, Zion chanu umna kuldet, nahenga hunglhung ding ahi, navaihom na masa jongchu hunglhung ding ahi; lenggam chu Jerusalem chanute henga hunglhung ding ahi." 
Micah4:9 Tu-a ibolla awthong jeju-a naka ham? nalah uva leng umlou ham? nangma nathumop ji-a chu mang thah-a hitam? ajehchu numei naosonat banga natna-in naphah ahitai. 
Micah4:10 Vo Zion chanu, naonei dingin chanei dinga naosonat thohgim bangin thohgimin; ajehchu khopi-a kona tu-a napotdoh-a, loujaova nachen ding, chule Babylon geipeh-a nache ding ahi. Chukoma chu huhdoh-a naum ding; chukoma chu namelmaho khutna kona Pakaiyin nahuhdoh ding ahi." 
Micah4:11 Tunjong nangma doudin nam tamtah akikhom taovin, amanu suhboh-in umhen lang, imitnu hin Zion vehen, atiuve." 
Micah4:12 Ahinla amahon Pakai lunggel ho chu ahepouvin, athumopna jong ahethem pouve; ajehchu pholla changphal ho banga amaho chu akhop khomding ahi." 
Micah4:13 Vo Zion chanu, thouvin lang chillin, naki chu thih banga kasem ding, natin chu sum-eng banga kasem ding ahi; chule mi atama tam ahalhalla nasuhchip ding; chule ahamphatnao Pakaiya dinga kakatdoh ding, chule athilluhou chu leiset pumpi Pakaiya dinga kakatdoh ding ahi." 
Micah5:1 Vo galsat mihonpi chanu, tun nangman galsatmi ahona din kigom khomin; aman eiho dounan kulpi eikaikhum taovin; amahon Israel thutanpa chu molla angeiphe avohdiu ahi." 
Micah5:2 Ahinla nangma, Bethlehem Ephrathah, nangma Judah gam sang tamtah lah-a neocha hijongle chun, nangma-a kona kami Israelte lah-a vaipo ding khat hungsoh doh ding; ahung kipatna chu masanglaipeh, tonsotna pat ahitai." 
Micah5:3 Hijeh-a chu aman naosonat thohnun cha ahindoh kahse-a, amaho chu donlouva akoija adalhah ding ahitai; chutengle asopite ahingdoh amoh chengse chu Israel chate henga hung kile kit dingu ahi." 
Micah5:4 Chule ama chu dingin tin Pakai thahat na-a chu kivah ding; Pakai a-Pathen loupina-a minna chu kivah ding; chule amaho umjing dingu ahitai; ajehchu tu-a ama chu leiset kolmong geija loupi ding ahitai. 
Micah5:5 Chule Assyria miho chu igam sunguva hi ahunglut tengule, hiche mipahi kichamna chu hintin; chule aman ileng inpihou ahin chotpha tengleh, eihon ama doudinga kelngoi ching sagi le pipui get itun dohdiu ahi." 
Micah5:6 Chule amahon Assyria gam chu chemjam'a asuhgamuva, Nimrod gam chu ahunglut na-a asuhgam diu; chutia chu ama igam sunguva ahunglutna, igamgisung hou achotpha tengle, Assyria mite-a kona eihuhdoh dingu ahi." 
Micah5:7 Chule Jacob'a ahingdoh amoh chengse chu, mipi tamtah lah-a Pakaiya kon daitwi le hamhing chunga goju banga umding ahiuve; hichun mihem angahpon, chule mihem chapate jong angah pon ahi." 
Micah5:8 Chule Jacob'a ahingdoh amoh chengse chu mipi tamtah lah chidang namdangte lah-a gammang lah gamsaho lah-a keipi bahkai tobang hidiu, chule kelngoi hon lah-a keipi bahkai khangdong tobang hi ding ahi; Amachu avahlen ahile, achonlhun chule abottelin, koima ahuhdoh jou aumpoi." 
Micah5:9 Nakhut chu nakidoupi te chunga kidomsang ding, chule namelmaho chu kisatlha ding ahi." 
Micah5:10 Chule hiche ni chule hunghiti ding ahi, Keiman nalah uva kona nasakol hou chu kasat chapma, chule nakangtalai hou chu kasuhmang ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Micah5:11 Chule keiman nagam uva khopiho chu kasat gama, chule nakhopi det jouseu kasuhchim ding ahi." 
Micah5:12 Chule keiman nakhutna mitpheldoi themho chu kasatlhah ding, chuleh nangman phunsan ho naneilou ding ahitai." 
Micah5:13 Nalah uva kona namilim semthu hou kasatlhah ding, chule namilimu dinglaiho kasat lhah ding ahi; chule nanghon nakhutsemhou chu nahou kit tahlou heldiu ahi." 
Micah5:14 Nalah uva kona nathing milimhou chu kabodoh ding, chutiachu nakhopihou chu kasuhmang ding ahi." 
Micah5:15 Chule Pathen hephalouho chunga, anajahkhah louvu lunghang tah-a phulahna le lungsatna kalhunsah ding ahi." 
Micah6:1 Tun nanghon Pakai thuseihi ngaijun; kipat doh unlang molsang ho masanga nachung thu galhutnun, lhangho chun na aw-u ngaijuhen." 
Micah6:2 Vo nangho, molsang jousen, Pakai nelkalna chu ngaijun, chule nangho leibul dettahhon ngaijuvin, ajehchu Pakai chun ami Israelte toh kinel kalna aneijin, chule ama Israelte toh kinel ding ahi." 
Micah6:3 Vo kamiteho, nangho-a dinga ipi kanabolem? chule hoilaija kana suhchol khah uvem? neihin donbutnun." 
Micah6:4 Ajehchu keiman Egypt gamma konin nangma kahin puidoh-in, chule soh hina insunga konin kalhat doh-in, namasanguva Mosi, Aaron chule Miriam kasole." 
Micah6:5 Vo, kamiteho, Pakai chonphatna chu nahet theina dinguva, Moab lengpa Balak thumop le, Beor chapa Balam'in Shittim'a kona Gilgal geija adonbut dan chu, tuhin geldoh uvin." 
Micah6:6 Pakai anga chu ipitoh kahunga, Pathen chungnung anga chu kakunding ham? kum khatbep bongnou leh govam thilto toh ama anga chu kahung ding ham?" 
Micah6:7 Pakai chu kelngoichal sang tamtah jeh-a lunglhaija, ahiloule thaotwija long vadung sangsoma lunglhai dingham? Kasuhkhel jeh-a kacha masapen chu kapeh-a, kahinna chonset jeh-a kalaigil ga chu kapeh ding ham?" 
Micah6:8 Vo mihem, aman apha chu navetsahsa ahitan; Pakaiyin nangma-a kona angeh chu navetsah ahitai; dihtah-a na natoh-a, hepina nakhoh sah-a, chule kineosah tah-a na-Pathen toh lam najotkhom ding chu hilou ham?" 
Micah6:9 Pakai aw chu khopi heng lama akisamin, chihna nei mihon namin amu dingu ahi; Nanghon tenggol le alheng dohpa thu ngaijuvin." 
Micah6:10 Migiloupa ina chu gitlouna goubom um nalaija, thil tena dihlou thet umtah chu um nalaijem?" 
Micah6:11 Khaikot dihlou pumle lheplhahna khaodip gihtah puma chu amaho athenga kasim ding ham? 
Micah6:12 Ajehchu chukoma mihaoho chu hunam dimset ahiuvin, chule chua chengho chun jou thu aseijun, akamuva aleiju chu lheplhah na dimset ahi." 
Micah6:13 Hijeh-a chu kenjong nang kavoh-a kanatsah ding, nachonset naho jeh-a agohkeova kalha ding nahi." 
Micah6:14 Nangman nen natin, ahivanga nava louding; chule lhahsamna chu nalai lunga umding ahi; nangman tuhdet ding somin natin, ahivanga nahuhdoh jou louding ahi; nahuhhing chasun jongchu keiman chemjam henga kapeh doh ding ahi." 
Micah6:15 Nangman tun natin, ahivanga na-at louding, olive gaho chu chillin natin, ahivanga athao chu nakinu lou ding, lengpitwi lhumkeija nasemding, ahivanga nadon lou ding ahi." 
Micah6:16 Ajehchu Omri dan kisunho akinit jingin, Ahab insung miho thilbol jouse chu akibol jingin, chule athumop houva nachon jingin ahi; hijeh-a chu keiman nangma ahomkeova kasema, chule chua chengho chu nuijat nopna bep kahisah ding, chutia chu kamite ikisah louna chu napohdiu ahi." 
Micah7:1 Ohe ada kahi! ajehchu keima nipilai theiga ho kilohkhom bangle, lengpiga kilo lhahna nung bangin kaumtai; nehding thei bohla aumtapon, ka hinna'in theiga min masapen angaichan ahi." 
Micah7:2 Mipha chu leisetna konin amangthah tan; mihemte lah-a kitah khatcha aumtapoi: abonchauvin thisanso ding ngahin aumun, mitin asopi mandin lenthang toh anung delen ahi." 
Micah7:3 Lung luttah-a akhut niuva thilse aboltheina dingu vin, pipuihon thilpeh angeh-un; Thutan hon nehguh angeh-un chule milenpa chun alung ngaichat dihlou chu aseidoh-in, chutichun amaho akithutoh soh uve." 
Micah7:4 Alah uva miphapen chu khaogui lingnei bang ahin, mikitahpen jong chu meithai seltholing sangin ahemjoi; nakinga tup nikho leh nakivilna nikho chu ahung lhunge, tuhi amaho dinga lungdona hiding ahi." 
Micah7:5 Loi legol chunga natahsan ngam hih-in, lamhil chunga jong kingai hih-in, na-anga lumnu henga jong namuh kihupmin." 
Micah7:6 Ajehchu chapan apa ajatapon, chanu anu doudin akipan tan, mouvin atehpi adouvin, mihem dinga amelmaho chu ama insung miho tah ahitai." 
Micah7:7 Hijeh chun keiman Pakai henglam vengting, eihuh hingpa Pathen chu kanga ding ahi; ka Pathen'in kataona eingaipeh ding ahi." 
Micah7:8 Vo kamelma, kachunga kipah hih-in, keima kalhuh teng thou kitding kahi; muthima katouteng, Pakai chu keija dinga vah hiding ahi," 
Micah7:9 Ama douna kachonset jeh-in, kathu eiseipeh-a, kadinga thu atan masangsen, Pakai lunghana chu potange; aman khovah-a eipuidoh intin, achonphatna chu kamuding ahi." 
Micah7:10 Pakai na Pathen chu koiham? tia sei kamelma nun amu ding, jachat na-in amanu akhuding ahi; kamit tenin amanu chu avetding, lamlena bonlhoh banga amanu chotpha-a umding ahitai." 
Micah7:11 Nabangho kisahna ding nikho, hiche nikho chule thupeh chu gamla tah-a kichondoh ding ahi." 
Micah7:12 Hiche nikho chule ama Assyria gama konle khopi det ho-a kon, chule kulpi-a pat vadung gei, twipi apat twipi gei, amol alhanga kona nahenga hungding ahi." 
Micah7:13 Ahijeng vangin, chuche gam chu asunga chengho jehle, athilbol ga hou jeh-a agohkeova umding ahi." 
Micah7:14 Carmel gammang lailunga, lunghem tah-a achanga cheng nagoulo kelngoihonho, chule namite chu namoltumin vah-in; masang laija bang chun, Bashan le Gilead na kivah uhen." 
Micah7:15 Egypt gama kona nahung potdoh laija banga chu ahenga thil kidangtah kavetsah ding ahi. 
Micah7:16 Namtinin hichu muvintin, athahatna jouseu chu ajachat pidiu; amahon akhutnuva akamu akisip diu, anao ngong ding ahi." 
Micah7:17 Amahon gul bangin leivui leh untin, leija ganhingho banga akohouva kona hung kitholdoh diu; amahon Pakai i-Pathen'u chu akichatnuva, nangma jeh-a agindiu ahi." 
Micah7:18 Nang banga khangitlouna ngaidama Pathen koi uma, chule agoulo amoh chengse suhkhelna chelep sah-a koi umam? hepina akipapi jeh-in, alunghana a-itih-in aching jingpoi." 
Micah7:19 Ama hungkilekit nintin, ichunguva khotona aneiding, ikhangit lounao hochu anemse ding; chule nangman achonset nahou jouse twipi thuh tah-a nalelut ding ahi." 
Micah7:20 Nangman khanglui laija kapu kapateu henga nathu tepsa, Jacob henga thutah le Abraham henga hepina chu namolso ding ahi." 
Nahum1:1 Nineveh khopi pohgih. Elkosh mi Nahum themgao thilmu lekhabu. 
Nahum1:2 Pathen hi thangthip tah le phulaji Pakai ahin; Pakaiyin phu alanjin, chule alungsajin ahi; Pakaiyin akidoupite chunga phu alahding, chule amelmate din alunghana akholin ahi." 
Nahum1:3 Pakai hi lunghang vahlou, thahat nasatah nei ahin, chule mi khangilou chu talen pelouva akoilouhel ding ahi. Pakaiyin chimpei le khopi hui lah-a lampi aneijin, chule meilhang hohi akeng phang dinga leivui tobang ahi." 
Nahum1:4 Aman twipi aphoh-in, akansahjin, vadung jouse akansah jin ahi; Bashan le Karmel agolhatan, Lebanon pahcha amol gamtai." 
Nahum1:5 Amasanga molsang ho akihotnin, lhangho ajunlha tan, chule a-angsunga leiset akalhan, vannoi leiset le asunga cheng jouse jong ahi." 
Nahum1:6 Alunghana masanga ding thei dinga koiham? chule alungsatna khoh tah-a um thei dinga koiham? alungsatna chu meikong bangin ahung kibung lhan, chule songpi ho chu aman asonlha jin ahi." 
Nahum1:7 Pakai hi apha ahin, lungkham nikho-a kulpidet ahi; ama tahsanna mite chu aman ahejingin ahi." 
Nahum1:8 Ahinla twisoh longlet lhaleova amun chu akichaihel sah ding, chule muthimin ama melmate chu adelding ahi." 
Nahum1:9 Nanghon Pakai douna-a ipi nagelu ham? Aman akhonna hela achaina asemding; anivei chana dinga kisuh gentheina sohdoh kit lou ding ahitai. 
Nahum1:10 Ajehchu ling banga amaho thakhatna akihelkop laijule, jukham ho banga ju akham laijuva, changkong gosel banga amaho mahthah ding ahiuve." 
Nahum1:11 Pakai douna-a thilse ngaito jing, mi khanggilou thumopthem khat, nanga kona hung peng doh ding ahi." 
Nahum1:12 Pakaiyin hitin ati; amaho lung mongin umu hen, chutobang chun tamtah hijongleu, aman alah-u ahinjotpa tengle chutobang ma-a chu suhmanga umding ahiuve. Keiman nangma nanasulunggim jongleng, kasuh lunggim kit louding nahitai." 
Nahum1:13 Ajehchu tu-a hi keiman ama namkoljon chu nanga kona kaheboh ding, chule nakihena chu kasa tanding ahi." 
Nahum1:14 Chule namin hi a-itih-a akiphah pohkit louhelna dingin, Pakaiyin nachung changa hin thupeh apen ahi. Na pathen ho insunga kona akikhentho le akilhahtho milim ho chu kasuhmang helding; nangma thet umtah mi nahijeh-a, nalhan kasempeh ding nahi." 
Nahum1:15 Vetan molsang chung ho-a chamna thu phonglea, kipana thupha polepa keng chu! Vo Judah, na kut thupi ho chu phaten nitnin lang, nakitepna ho chu tong doh-in. Ajehchu mikhang gilou chu nahenga hung louhel ding ahitai; ama chu mit hella kisumanga ahitai." 
Nahum2:1 Ahal halla suchipjipa chu namasanga ahungtai: kulpi chu kiven phatnin, nalampi vephan, natai kigah detnin, nathahatna chu nasatah-in kisem phatnin." 
Nahum2:2 Ajehchu Pakaiyin Israel chungnunna alahmang banga, Jacob chungnunna jong alahmang ahitai: ajehchu michom gam hon amaho achomgamu ahitan, chule alengpigui bahhou chu suhmanga uma ahitai." 
Nahum2:3 Amihat hou lum chu aki susan gamtan, mihangsan ho von chu asanthip tan ahi; akigot nikho le asakol kangtalai hou chu meikou vahleng lung tobang hiding, chule chah thingphung ho chu tijat umtah-a kihot ling ding ahi." 
Nahum2:4 Sakol kangtalai ho chu khopi lamlen ho-a lung hang tah-a lhaile diu, amaho khatle khat lam lhongpi ho-a kineh todiu: amaho meivah lengle bangdiu, chule kolphe banga lhaile diu ahi." 
Nahum2:5 Aman amilen ho chu ahetdoh ding; amaho alamjot naova kipal lhudiu; amaho kulbang lam jona chu kino tah-a chediu, kivenbitna chu kisemtup ding ahi." 
Nahum2:6 Vadung ho-a kotpi ho hondoh-a hung umding, leng inpi chu suhmanga umding ahi." 
Nahum2:7 Chule Huzzab chu gal hinga kipui mang ding, khoukhah-a hung umding, chule asoh numeiten a-op achup dingu, vakhu aw banga maopuma apuilediu ahi." 
Nahum2:8 Ahinla Nineveh hi masang laija chu twikul tobang anahin, hijongle amaho jam mang ding ahiuve. Dingun, dingun tia amahon asapdio, hijongle koiman anungvet lou ding ahi." 
Nahum2:9 Nanghon akichom doh dangkale sana chu kilah-un; ajehchu neile gou hin beitih aneipon, Thil manlut tahtah honjong beitih aneipon ahi." 
Nahum2:10 Ama ahomkeo, pannabei le man theilou chu ahitai: Chule lungthim ajunlha tan, khup teni akitatton, tai jouse-a natna khohtah achun, chule amaiju abonchan adup gamtan ahi." 
Nahum2:11 Koimachan asuh linglaolou keipi bahkai, keipi teh, chule anou valena mun, Keipi bahkai ho chenna mun le keipi donglai ho kivahna mun chu hoilai hitam?" 
Nahum2:12 Keipi bahkaijin anoute ding khambep-in ahal hallin asat telin, chule keipi nu-a din alolla apet lih-in, akosungho chu asamat ho-a adipmin, chule akulsung chu sa adimin ahi." 
Nahum2:13 Ven, keiman nangma kadouve tin janel ho Pakai chun aseije, keiman asakol kangtalai ho chu meikhu-a kahal lhah ding, chemjamin na keipi bahkai donglai ho chu asat chapding: chule leisetna kona nasamat ho chu kasuhmanga, nathupolepa awgin chu kijakit louhel ding ahitai." 
Nahum3:1 Thisan sona dim khopi chu ohe adana-e! hiche-a chun mijoule michom ho adimsetnin, thil kichom ho abei khapon;" 
Nahum3:2 Molla kijepna husa, kangtalai kang lhaigin, sakol ho lhaigin le sakol kangtalai ho kichop gin atangpon ahi." 
Nahum3:3 Sakol chunga tou mihon achemjamu val lahlah le atengcha hou pahlahlah chu adomsangun; akithatna mihem tamtah aumin, mihem thisa long simjoulou akijamin; alongu kiphong chu abeitih aumpon, amithi long hou chunga chun akipalun;" 
Nahum3:4 Hichu kihoisah-a jonthanhoi bol simjoulou notiho, ajonthanhoi bolna-a namtin johmanga doichoi nu, chule adoi choina-a a-insung johmangnu jeh ahi." 
Nahum3:5 Ven, keima nangma douva kahi tin janel ho Pakai chun aseije; keiman nanih chu namaikoh chunga kahodoh pehding; chule nasagohkeo hina chu namtin kamusah ding chule najumna chu lenggam ho kamusah ding ahi." 
Nahum3:6 Chule keiman kidah umtah thilboh nachunga kahin selhah-a, jachat umtah-a kasoding, chule nangma vetset umtah-a kakoiding ahi." 
Nahum3:7 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, mihem namu jouse chu nanga konin jamuntin, chule Nineveh ahomkeovin akijamtai atidiu ahi: chutengle koijin ama akapi ding hitam? Nangma nalhamon dinga chu hoija kahol ding hitam?" 
Nahum3:8 Vadungho lah-a ana chengah, akimvel twijin aumkol, twipilen chu akulpia panga, chule akulbang twipilen'a kona umdoh miminthang No-amon mite sanga nangma phajo nahim?" 
Nahum3:9 Ethiopia le Egypt chu amanu thahatna ahin, hichu akhonna bei ahi; Put le Lubim chu napanpi-a ahilhone." 
Nahum3:10 Hijongle amanu puimangin aumin, gal hinga kaimangin aumtan ahi. Achate donglai hojong chu khopi lamlen ho chungvuma ahal halla chilngemin aumtaove; chule amahon ja um miho-a din vang asanun, chule amilen hou chu thihkhaovin akanun ahi." 
Nahum3:11 Nang jong ju nakham ding; nangma sela naum ding, melma jeh-a jong nangman thahatna nahol ding ahi." 
Nahum3:12 Namundet ho jouse chu theichang phunga amin masapen theichang ho tobang hiding; hicheho chu akiholinga ahile, anedingpa kamsunga chu khelut dingu ahi." 
Nahum3:13 Vetan, nalah-a um namite hi numei ngen ahiuvin; nagamsunga um kotpi ho chu namelmate ho-a dinga lentah-a hung kihong ding; nabanggol ho meijin akahvam ding ahitai." 
Nahum3:14 Umkhuma naum nikho-a dingin twi kithalin, namundet ho chu khodetnin, leingan umna-a chenlang bon ngan chilin, chule cheh kiseho chu sudetnin." 
Nahum3:15 Chua chu meijin nakahvama, chemjamin nasat tanding, hichun nangma thinglung banga naneh chaiding ahi. Nangma thinglung banga tamin kisemin, khaokhote banga tamin kisemin." 
Nahum3:16 Nangman nasum kolvei ho chu van'a ahsi ho sanga tamjon nasupung tan; thinglungin anesen, aleng mangtai." 
Nahum3:17 Napipui hou jong khaokhote bangbep ahiuvin, nagal lamkaite chu nilhah nidaija honpal chunga umji-a khaokhopi ho abangun ahi. Ahin nisa ahungso tengle alengmangun, hoilaija aumu akiheji tapoi." 
Nahum3:18 Vo Assyria lengpa, nakelngoi ching ho a-imulhu gamtaove: namilen namilalte chu vutvai lah-a cheng ding ahiuve: namite hi molle lhang chung dungho-a akithecheh gam taovin, chule amaho koiman apui khom pouvin ahi." 
Nahum3:19 Nakisuh khah na hin damna aneipon, namaput hi asesoh tan; nakisuh khah thu jajousen nachunga akhut abehdiu ahi. Ajehchu nakhangitlou boljingna koichunga alhun khah louna umem?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Habakkuk themgaovin anamu pohgih. 
Habakkuk1:2 Vo Pakai, itihchan kakouva, ngaipeh louva neikoi ding ham! hunam-a natoh chungchanga nangma kakouva, nangman huhdoh louva nakoi dingham!" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ipi dinga khangitlouna neimusah-a, gentheinaho neivetsah ham? Ajehchu gamna le hunama natoh kamasanga aumin, kinah nale kidouna ahung sohdoh tai." 
Habakkuk1:4 Hijeh chun danthu athahat jou tapon, chule thutana dih himhim aum tapoi: ajehchu migilou hon michonpha chu aumchah taovin; hijeh chun thutan dihlou amachaltan ahi." 
Habakkuk1:5 Nanghon Pathen hephalou lah khu veovin, ngaitouvin lang, kidang satah-in datmouvin; ajehchu nanikho hou sunga na khat katohding, hichu nangho nakiseipeh jongleu, natahsan lou diu ahi." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ajehchu, veuvin, keiman nam gangtah le engsetah, Chaldea mite katungdoh-e, amaho chun leiset chung achot leova, amaho-a hilou chena munho chu alo dingu ahi." 
Habakkuk1:7 Amaho chu kichat umtahle tijat umtah ahiuvin; athutan nule aja-umnao chu amahole amaho-a kona sohdoh ahi. 
Habakkuk1:8 Asakolhou jong lutnuho sangin akaljang jouvin, nilhah lam ngeiho sangin gin aumjouve; asakol chung touhou chu kithejal uva, asakol chung touhou chu gamlatah-a kona hungdiu; amaho chu an nedinga kinotah-a leng muvanlai banga leng dingu ahi." 
Habakkuk1:9 Abonchauva hunam-a natong dinga hungkon diu; amaiju chu solam hui banga hungdoh ding, chule amahon sohchangho chu neldi banga akhopkhom diu ahi." 
Habakkuk1:10 Amahon lengho chu nahsahmon neijuntin, pipuiho chu amaho totnopna hidingu: amahon kuldet jouse chu anuisat diu; ajehchu leivui avuh khumuva alahjeng diu ahi." 
Habakkuk1:11 Chuteng alungthim kikhel ding, apal galkal paipai ding, asuh lungjing ding athahatna chu a-pathen'a kona angaito ding ahi." 
Habakkuk1:12 Vo Pakai ka Pathen, keija athengpen, nangma atonsotna pat umjing nahilou ham? keiho thipou vinge. Vo Pakai, nangman amaho chu thutan dingin nana sudetnin; chule vo hat chungnung Pathen, nangman suhdih nadingin amaho natungdoh tan ahi." 
Habakkuk1:13 Nangma thilse vethei louhel mit thengpen, chule khansetna vetheilou nahin; iti danna dihlou tah-a chonho navetthima, mikhang gilouvin amasanga chonphajo michu suhmang ding atiteng thipbeh-a naum ham?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Chule iti dana mihemte hi twikhanglen'a ngaho, achunguva vaihom neilouho a-opma kithol thoho, bangbepma nasem ham?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Amahon amaho chu abonchan ngakoijin akoidoh-un, alennuva amanun, alen khon houva ahuikhomun; hijeh chun amaho akipah-un athanomun ahi." 
Habakkuk1:16 Hijeh chun amahon alennu henga ganlhaina abollun, alen khonhou henga gimnamtui ahaljiuve; ajehchu hiche ho-a kona chu haodoh uva, anneh nenga ahiuve." 
Habakkuk1:17 Hijeh-a chu amahon alennu chu asuhthenguva, namtin vaipi chu khenlou hella athajom jingdiu ham?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Keima galvena mun'a kadina, insang chunga kapansat ding, aman kahenga ipi ahinseija, chule suhdih-a kaumteng, iti kadonbut dingham gavenge." 
Habakkuk2:2 Chuin Pakaiyin eidonbutnin, hitin ati, gaothilmu chu asimpan lhaipuma asimthei nadin, songpheng chunga kichehtah-in sunin." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ajehchu gaothilmu chu phat kitepsa sunga ding ahin, hijongle achainale thu asei ding, jou louding ahi; geijep jongleh ngah tadin; ajehchu hunglhung teiding ahin, geisang louding ahi." 
Habakkuk2:4 Veovin, ama kichoisanga chu, ahinna ama-a achondih poi; Ahinla midih chu atahsan vanga hing ding ahi." 
Habakkuk2:5 Chukitmale ama ju-a suhkhelna anei jeh-in, mikiletsah ahin, chule in'a jong aum pon, angaichat chu thilkholkhul bangin akehlenin, chule athi tobang ahin, chimtheilou ahi, ahinla nam jouse ahenga akhom khomin, mijouse chu ahenga asekhomin ahi." 
Habakkuk2:6 Hicheho jousehin ama douna-a thulem aseijuva, ama douna-a jontaina thuchih, ama-a hilou kholkhompa chule bonlhoh satah-a pohding kisempa chu ohe ada na-e! itih chanpi ahiti theidem? tia aseilou dingu ham?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Nangma napet dingho chu kipatdoh phunguva, nasugenthei dingho chu thoudoh uva, nangma amaho dinga gal thila kichomdoh nahilou ding ham?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Nangman nam tamtah nachomgam jehle, miho thisan naso-a, gamsung, khopi le asunga cheng jouse chunga hunam namanchah jeh-a, mihem ahingdoh amoh chengsen nangma nachom dingu ahi." 
Habakkuk2:9 Thaneina dihlouva kona akihuhdoh theina dingle, abu sangtah-a akisah theina dinga, kilosetna phalouva a-insung dinga kilosepa chu ohe ada ahi!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Mitamtah nasuhgama konin na-insung najumsah-in, chule nahinna dounan chonsea nahitai." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ajehchu banga kona song chu pengdoh ding, thinga kon inkam chun ahindonbut ding ahi." 
Habakkuk2:12 Thisanna khopi sahdoh-a, khan gitlouna-a khopi tungdohpa chu ohe ada ahi!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Veovin, mihon meikong vahna dinga atohgimu chu, janel Pakaiya ding ahipoi; mipi ho chu pannabei dinga kisulung gim dingu ham?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Ajehchu twijin twipi akhubanga, Pakai loupi hetna chun leiset hi alodim ding ahi." 
Habakkuk2:15 Aheng akom asagoh keovu mutheina dinga ju pe-a, juhai tunpeh-a, kham jong khamsah-a michu, ohe ada ahi!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Loupina khelin jachatnan nadimtai: nangman jong don inlang, nachep jong chu kihohdoh hen; Pakai khut jetlam khon chu nangma douna-a hungkihei ding, naloupina chunga jachatna sangtah chu ding ahi." 
Habakkuk2:17 Gamsung, khopi sung, chule asunga cheng jouse chunga pumhat naman jeh-a, Lebanon chunga pumhat thilbol, chule miho thisan kiso jeh-a gamsaho kichatsah suhgamna chun nangma nakhu khum ding ahi." 
Habakkuk2:18 Asempan asemthu milim, chule akilhah tho milim, jouthu hila pang, asemtengle asempa chun hichu atahsan, chuche paomo milim chu ipi-a phachom em?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Thingjah-a thouvin, song paotheilou jah-a kipat in, hichun ahilding ahi, tipa chu ohe ada ahi! Veovin, hichu sanale dangka-a kiloijol ahin, asunga haitheina hu umlouhel ahi." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ahinla Pakai vang chu a-houin theng sunga um ahin, leiset pumpi a-anga thipchet hen." 
Habakkuk3:1 Shigionoth chunga Habakkuk themgao taona ahi. 
Habakkuk3:2 Pakai, nathusei kajan, kakicha lheh-e: O Pakai, kumho sunga hin nanatoh hinsuhalin, kumho sungin kihetdohsah in; lunghan na-a hepina geldoh in." 
Habakkuk3:3 Pathen chu Teman'a konin ahungin, chule Athengpa chu Paran molsanga konin ahunge. Aloupinan vanho atomin, leiset hi avahchoi na-in adime." 
Habakkuk3:4 Chule ama vahdan chu nisa vah abangin; akhutna konin vahgui akikhodoh in, chule hichea chun athahat akiselin ahi." 
Habakkuk3:5 Amasanga hise achen, akengtoa natset khohsetah apohdoh-in ahi." 
Habakkuk3:6 Ama adingin leiset chu aten; aman aven, chule namtin chu anocheh-in; tonsot molsang ho chu akithe cheh-un, tonsot lhangho chu abohkhupmuve. Alampiho chu tonsotna ahi." 
Habakkuk3:7 Keiman Cushan ponbuh gimthoh-a aum kamun, Midian gama ponjal ho chu akithingin ahi." 
Habakkuk3:8 Pakai chu vadungho chunga lunglhailou ham? Nalunghanna chu vadungho chunga uma hitam? Nalungsatna chu twikhanglen chung, nasakol ho, nahuhhingna sakol ho chunga natouna chunga chu uma hitam?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Nathu dungjui, phungho kihahselna dungjuijin nathalpi chu akeoseh-in aumtai. Nangman leiset hi vadungho-in nahomkhene." 
Habakkuk3:10 Molsang ho chun nangma namun, akihot jenguve: twi longlet chu ahin jotpan ahi. Twi thuh chun a-aw ahinsodoh sah-in, chule akhut chunglama adomtouvin ahi." 
Habakkuk3:11 Nisa le Lhathah chu aumna-a adingden honin; athalpi chang vah leh, natengcha phelitlet vah-a chun ache honin ahi." 
Habakkuk3:12 Lungphamo pumin gamsung najotsoh-in, nalunghana-in Pathen hephalou mite nachilgoi tai." 
Habakkuk3:13 Namite huhhingna dingin nakon doh-in, nathao nusapa huhhing dingin nakondoh tai; abula pat angong geijin nahodoh peh-in, migiloupa inna konin alu namaputsah tai." 
Habakkuk3:14 Nangman ama tenggol ho-a chun akhosung lamkaiteo luchang navohpeh-in; keima sucheh dingin chimpei bangin ahungdoh uve: amaho kipana chu guhthima mivaichaho bahgam dingbou chu ahi. 
Habakkuk3:15 Nangman nasakol'in twikhanglen napal galkaijin, twipi kinong nasatah lah chu napal galkaije." 
Habakkuk3:16 Keiman kajah phat chun ka-oipi akithingin; awgin chun kaneteni akihotnin; kagusunga monna alutnin, lungkhamna nikho-a kakicholdo theina dingin keima kakithingtai. Mipi ho henga ama ahungtou tengle, aman agalsat miho toh amaho chu asat ding ahi." 
Habakkuk3:17 Theichang phung pahhih henlang, lengpi gui aga umhih jongle; olive kibolna tohgimna chu thon henlang, phaileijin anneh sodoh hih jongle; ganhonga konin ganchaho kisugamhel henlang, gan inho-a gancha umhih jongleh;" 
Habakkuk3:18 Keivang Pakaiyah kipah jing inting, eihuh hingpa ka Pathen'a kathanop ding ahi." 
Habakkuk3:19 Pakai Pathen chu kathahatna ahin, aman kakeng hi sajuhpi keng banga asemding; chule aman kamun sangho-a eivale sah ding ahi. La lamkaipa henga, ka tumgingthei akhaonei mangcha-a sah ding." 
Zephaniah1:1 Judah lengpa, Amon chapa Josiah nikho laija Hizekiah chapa, Amariah chapa, Gedaliah chapa, Kushi chapa Zephaniah henga Pakai thu hunglhung chu." 
Zephaniah1:2 Leiset na kon thil jouse kasuhmang ding ahi tin Pakaiyin aseije. 
Zephaniah1:3 Mihem le gamsaho kasuhmanga; chungleng vachaho, twipia nga ho, chule kipal lhuhna chu migiloute toh kasuhmang ding; chule leisetna kona mihem kasuhgam ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zephaniah1:4 Keiman Judah chung le Jerusalem'a chengho jouse chunga kakhut kajahdoh ding; chule hiche mun'a kona hi Baal hou amoh chengsele, Chemarim ho min chu thempuho puma kapaidoh ding;" 
Zephaniah1:5 Chule in chung vum ho-a van janel ho chibai bohho; Pakai houva amin panna kihahsel ho, chule Malcham min pana kihahsel ho;" 
Zephaniah1:6 chule Pakaiya kona kinung heiho; chule Pakai hollouho le ama dong louho chu kapaidoh ding ahi. 
Zephaniah1:7 Pakai Pathen anga chun thip chetnin umun, ajehchu Pakai nikho chu anaitai. Ajehchu Pakaiyin ganlhaina agongin, ajinho chu akoutai." 
Zephaniah1:8 Chule Pakai ganlhaina nikhole hung hiti ding ahi, keiman pipuiho le lengpa chateho, chule gamchom miho vona kivonho jouse chu talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Zephaniah1:9 Hiche ni mama chule chang phola kichom ho, apupao in pumhat le lheplhah na-a dipho chu talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Zephaniah1:10 Chule hiche nikho chule hunghiti ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije, nga kotpi-a kona ka awgin, kotpi nichana-a kona ka awgin, chule lhang ho-a kona thil kisukeh gin nasatah kijading ahi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Maktesh'a chenga nangho penguvin, ajehchu kivei miho jouse akisugamin; chule dangka choiho jouse akisugam tai." 
Zephaniah1:12 Chuche phat chule hung hiti ding ahi, keiman Jerusalem chu thaomei mangcha-a kahol ding, juheh-a hingho, alunguva Pakai chun thilpha jong thilse jong bolponte tia seiho chu talen kapeh ding ahi." 
Zephaniah1:13 Hijeh chun athil hou chu thil kichomdoh soh intin, a-inhou chu kamhel ding: amahon in jong saovintin, alolou dingu, chule amahon lengpilei ho boluntin, hia kona chu lengpitwi adonlou diu ahi." 
Zephaniah1:14 Pakai niloupi tah chu ahung naijin, ahung naijin, akikino lheh-in, chule Pakai nikho husa gin jengjong chu akinolheh-e; chuche nikho chule mihatpa jong chu haka-a kapding ahi." 
Zephaniah1:15 Chuche nikho chu lungsat nikho, lungkham nikho le lung hesoh nikho, manthah na le kisuh kamhelna nikho, muthim le genthei nikho, chule meibol le muthim lhangkhal kiheh nikho ahin," 
Zephaniah1:16 Chule kulpi kikai khum khopi hole, insangho douna-a, sumkon kimut nikho le gal kisap phongna nikho ahi." 
Zephaniah1:17 Chule keiman mihemte chunga hesohna kapohlut ding, amahon Pakai douna-a achonset jeh uva, mitcho banga lam ajotdiu: chule athisanu chu leivui banga kisunglha-a, atahsao chu eh banga kisunglha ding ahi." 
Zephaniah1:18 Pakai lunghan nikho lechun asana hou le adangka houvin alhatdoh theilou diu; amavang agam pumpi chu athang thipna meikongin ahalvam ding ahi. Ajehchu aman chuche gama cheng jouse gangtah-a asuhmang ding ahi. 
Zephaniah2:1 Nangho kikhom khomun, henge, nangho kikhom khomun, vo dei umlou nampi mite;" 
Zephaniah2:2 Thupeh ahung kipohdoh masang, nikho chu changsi banga alen mang masang, Pakai lunghanna nasatah nachung uva ahunglhun masangin, nachung uva Pakai lunghanna nikho ahunglhun masangin, kikhom khomun." 
Zephaniah2:3 Nangho leisetna mikineosah jousen, athutan dihna domsanga Pakai chu hollun; chonphatna holun, kineosahna hollun: chuti henlang hile Pakai lunghan nikho le sella naumthei dingu ahi." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ajehchu Gaza chu dalhah-a uma, Ashkelon kamhel ding: amahon sunchang laija Ashdod anodoh diu, chule Ekron chu bodoh-a umding ahi." 
Zephaniah2:5 Twikhanglen panga cheng Chereth nam miteho, ohe ada nahiuve ahi! Pakai thun nangho nadouvun ahi; Vo Canaan, Philistine te gam, koimacha achenga aumlouna dinga, keiman nangma jengjong kasuhmang ding nahi." 
Zephaniah2:6 Twikhanglen pang chu kelngoi chingho dinga chenna inle, kelngoi honho dinga hong hiding ahi." 
Zephaniah2:7 Luipang chu Judah insung amohho ding ahin; chua chu amahon akelngoi honhou avahdiu: amaho Ashkelon inho-a chu nilhahle lumjidiu ahi. Ajehchu Pakai a-Pathen uvin aviluva asohchan nao aheimang ding ahi. 
Zephaniah2:8 Keiman kamite i-sah louva abolnao, Moab mite i-sah louna leh, Ammon mite housetna kajan, chule agamgiu douna-in akichoisangun ahi." 
Zephaniah2:9 Hijeh chun Israel janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, keima kahin jing bangin, thonlouva Moab chu Sodom bang ding, Ammon chate chu Gomorrah bangdiu, ling nangbohle chi khuhlah hiuva, a-itih-a kamhela umdiu ahi. Kamite kim khat hon amaho chu achomuva, kami amoh chengsen amaho chu alodingu ahi." 
Zephaniah2:10 Hichehohi ahoitho jeh uva aneidiu ahi, ajehchu amaho janel Pakai mite dounale i-sah louna-in akichoi sangun ahi." 
Zephaniah2:11 Pakai chu amaho dinga tijat umtah hiding ahi: ajehchu Aman leiset pathen jouse asuhmanga, chule mihem ten ama ahou dingu, mitinin ama mun cheh-a konle twikol gam ho-a milim houho sanin ahoudiu ahi." 
Zephaniah2:12 Nangho Ethiopia mite jong, kachemjama kithat ding nahiuve." 
Zephaniah2:13 Aman sahlam douna-a akhut alhana, Assyria asuhmang ding, chule Nineveh mite chu, gamthip gamgo banga akamhel sah ding ahi." 
Zephaniah2:14 Chule amanu lailunga chu kelngoi honle namtina kon gamsa jouse kol dingu ahi. Twikhanglen vacha hole twivamuhsao ho a-inkam chunga chenguntin; bangkot ho-a a-aw uvin la asahding; kotsangkil jong chu agohkeo hiding ahi; ajehchu aman Cedar thinga kisa jouse ahodoh ding ahi. 
Zephaniah2:15 Hichehi alung sunga, keibou kahi, koima dang aumpoi, tia sei khohsahna neilou tah-a cheng kipahjing khopi ahi: iti dana ama ahomkeova hung uma, ganhingho kolnabep hungsoh-a ahitadem! ajotpa jousen ahuisat khumuva, akhut ajapkhum dingu ahi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Mi sugenthei khopi, athengloule akisuboh nu chu ohe ada ahi!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Amanun aw chu angaipon; suhdihna chu asangpon; Pakai chu atahsanpon; a-Pathen chu anaipon ahi. 
Zephaniah3:3 Amanu sunga um pipuiho chu keipi bahkai kitum tobang ahiuvin; athutanhou chu nilhah ngeiho jingkah geijin saguho nehmoh koilou tobang ahiuve. 
Zephaniah3:4 Amanu themgaoho chu imacha hiloule tahsan umlou mi jeng ahiuvin; Athempuho chun muntheng asuhboh-un, amahon danthupeh chunga pumhat abolun ahi." 
Zephaniah3:5 Chondih Pakai chu alah uva aumin; aman khangitlouna abol louding ahi. Jingkah sehle athutana vah-a apodoh jin, ahinla midih lou chun jumlam ahepon ahi." 
Zephaniah3:6 Keiman namtinho kasugamin, a-insanghou akamhel tai: akhosung lamlenhou agoh-in kakoijin, koimachan ahotapoi, akhopihou kasumangin, koimacha aumtapon, acheng jong aumtapoi." 
Zephaniah3:7 Keiman, Tahbeh-in nangman neiging teijin natin, nangman hilna sangin nate; chutichun itobangin amaho talen pejongleng, achennao kisumang ponte, kati ahin; ahinla amaho jingpin athouvun, anatoh jouseu asuboh-un ahi." 
Zephaniah3:8 Hijeh chun achom gam dinga kahungkondoh nikho kahsen neingah-un, tin Pakaiyin aseije; ajehchu namtinho gop khoma, leng gamho khopkhom ding, chuleh kalung hanna le kalung satna jouse geija achunguva sunlhah dinghi kalung got ahi; ajehchu leiset pumpihi kathang thipna meija kahal vam ding ahi." 
Zephaniah3:9 Ajehchu amahon Pakai min chu akouvuva, lung khat tah-a ama ajentheina diuvin, mipi ho chu paotheng ka pehding ahi." 
Zephaniah3:10 Ethiopia vadung ho gallama kona kahenga tao hole, anavah chehsa kachanu ngeijin jong, kahenga thilto ahinchoi ding ahi." 
Zephaniah3:11 Hiche nikho chuleh keima douna nasuhkhelna, nathilbol jouse jeh-a najachat louding ahi: ajehchu chuteng chule keiman nakiletsah na-a kipahho chu nalah uva kona kalahdoh ding, chule kamolsang theng jeh-a chu nangma nakihoitho sahkit louding ahitai." 
Zephaniah3:12 Keiman nalah uva migenthei le mivaichaho jong kadalhah ding, amahon Pakai minchu atahsan dingu ahi." 
Zephaniah3:13 Israel amohho chun khangitlou abol loudiu, jou aseilou diu, akamuva kona lheplhah kimulou ding ahi: Ajehchu amahon akelngoi hou avah uva lum diu ahin, chule koimachan akichat sah loudiu ahi." 
Zephaniah3:14 Vo Zion chanu, La san; Vo Israel, kho hasapmin samin; Vo Jerusalem chanu, nalungthim pumpin kipah inlang thanomin." 
Zephaniah3:15 Pakai chun nachung thu kitana ding chu aladohtan, namelmate anodoh tai: Israelte lengpa Pathen tahchu nalah uva aume; nangman thilse namukit louding ahitai." 
Zephaniah3:16 Hicheni chule Jerusalem henga, Kicha hih-in, tia kisei ding; chule Zion henga, nakhut ngoisah hih-in, kiti ding ahi." 
Zephaniah3:17 Nalah-a um Pakai na-Pathen chu tha neitah ahin; aman ahuhhinga, nachunga kipah tah-a thanom ding; aman angailutna-a nacholdohsah intin, aman nachunga la asah-a kipah ding ahi" 
Zephaniah3:18 Keiman nalah-a um, i-sah louva akibolna chu ama dinga pohgih hia, kikhopna loupitah-a dinga lunghemho chu, kakhop khom ding ahi." 
Zephaniah3:19 Veovin, chuche phatteng chule nasugenthei ho jouse chu kalahdoh ding; elbai chu kahuh hinga, akidel mangho kachopkhom ding; jahcha tah-a akikoinao gamtina amaho vahchoina le minthana kamusah ding ahi." 
Zephaniah3:20 Keiman kachopkhom phat tengu chule, nanho kalepuikit ding nahiuve; ijeh inem itile namitmu tah uva nasohchan naova kona kalepui kitteng, keiman leisetna mijouse lah-a minthana le vahchoina kabolpeh dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai1:1 Darius lengchan kal kum nina, alhagup channa, nimasa nin Judah gamvaipo Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel hengle, Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua henga, Haggai themgaova konin Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Haggai1:1 Darius lengchan kal kum nina, alhagup channa, nimasa nin Judah gamvaipo Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel hengle, Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua henga, Haggai themgaova konin Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Haggai1:2 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Hiche mite hin, Pakai houin sahna ding phat chu ahung lhunghih laije, atiuve." 
Haggai1:3 Chuin Haggai themgaova konin Pakai thu chu ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Haggai1:4 Vo nangho, Hiche houin ahomkeova auma, nangho siling in'a nachenu chu, nangho dinga aphat hinam?" 
Haggai1:5 Hijeh chun tun janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; nalampi hou ngaito temun. 
Haggai1:6 Nanghon tamtah natu uvin, themcha nahin polutnun; naneovin, ahinla na oiva pouvin; nadonun, ahinla nadang nou pouve; pon nakisilun, ahinla lum nasa dehpouve; atha paija lopan sumdip tovanga khum dinga alo ahi." 
Haggai1:7 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; nalampi hou ngaito temun. 
Haggai1:8 Molsang chunga kaldoh-unlang thing hinpuvin, chule houin chu saovin; chutile hichea chun lunglhai jing ting, choisanga kaumding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai1:9 Nanghon tamtahdin nakinem un, ahinla veuvin, themchan bou ahunge; nanghon in nahinlhut tenguleh achung chu kamutji ahi. Ipi din-em? tin janel Pakaiyin aseije. Ajehchu ka-in agohkeova uma, nangho amitakipmin na-in lamcheh nadel jeh-u ahi." 
Haggai1:10 Hijeh-a chu nachung uva van chun daitwi atuhtanga, chule leiset chun aga atuhtang ahi." 
Haggai1:11 Chule keiman gamsung chunga, molsang ho chunga, changle min chunga, lengpigui thah ho chunga, thao chunga, chule aga sodohji leiset chunga, mihem chunga, gancha chunga, chule khutna tonggim ho jouse chunga gamna kakou ahi." 
Haggai1:12 Chujouvin Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel le Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua, chule mipi amoh chengse chun Pakai a-Pathen'u aw le, Pakai a-Pathen'un ahinsol Haggai themgao thuho chu angaijun, chule mipi chu Pakai angsunga akicha lheh-un ahi." 
Haggai1:12 Chujouvin Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel le Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua, chule mipi amoh chengse chun Pakai a-Pathen'u aw le, Pakai a-Pathen'un ahinsol Haggai themgao thuho chu angaijun, chule mipi chu Pakai angsunga akicha lheh-un ahi." 
Haggai1:13 Chuin Pakai thupole Haggai chun miho henga Pakai thulhah chu aseijin, Keiman nangho kaumpi naove tin Pakaiyin aseije, ati." 
Haggai1:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Judah vaipo Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel lungthim le, Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua lungthim, chule miho lah-a amoh umho jouse lungthim chu asuthouvin; chule amaho ahungun a-Pathen'u, janel Pakai in'a chun na ahung tongun ahi;" 
Haggai1:14 Chuin Pakaiyin Judah vaipo Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel lungthim le, Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua lungthim, chule miho lah-a amoh umho jouse lungthim chu asuthouvin; chule amaho ahungun a-Pathen'u, janel Pakai in'a chun na ahung tongun ahi;" 
Haggai1:15 Hichu Darius lengchan kal kum nina, lhagup channa, nisomni le nili ni ahi." 
Haggai2:1 Lha sagina, chuche lha nisomni le ni khatnin, Haggai themgaova konin Pakai thu ahung lhungin, hitin aseije," 
Haggai2:2 Tun Judah gamvaipo, Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel, Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua, chule mipi amoh aumsun henga seijin," 
Haggai2:2 Tun Judah gamvaipo, Shealtiel chapa Jerubbabel, Josedech chapa thempu chungnung Joshua, chule mipi amoh aumsun henga seijin," 
Haggai2:3 Masang laija hiche houin loupina masa mukha-a nalah uva koi umem? chule tu-a hi itobanga namu uvem? Hichu akitekah-a ahile namitmuva dinga imachalou hilouham? 
Haggai2:4 Hijongle tun Vo Jerubbabel, hatnin, tin Pakaiyin aseije; chule Josedech chapa, Vo thempu chungnung Joshua, hatnin; chuleh gamsunga mi jousen jong hatnunlang na tongun, tin Pakaiyin aseije; ajehchu keiman kaumpi naove tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai2:4 Hijongle tun Vo Jerubbabel, hatnin, tin Pakaiyin aseije; chule Josedech chapa, Vo thempu chungnung Joshua, hatnin; chuleh gamsunga mi jousen jong hatnunlang na tongun, tin Pakaiyin aseije; ajehchu keiman kaumpi naove tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai2:5 Egypt gama kona nahungdoh laijuva kakitepna thu dungjuijin, nalah uva kalhagao acheng jinge, nangho kicha hih-un." 
Haggai2:6 Ajehchu janel Pakaiyin hitin ati; Khatvei, chomkah louva, keiman van le leiset, chule twipi le gamgo hi kaholing ding ahi;" 
Haggai2:7 Chule nam jouse kaholinga, nam jouse ngaichat chu hunglhung ding; chule keiman hiche inhi loupi na-a kadip ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai2:8 Dangka chu keija ahin, sana jong keija ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai2:9 Hiche in nunung hi amasa sanga lujo ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije: chuleh hiche mun'a hi chamna kapeh ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai2:10 Darius lengchan kal kum nina, alha ko channa, nisomni le nili nin Pakai thu chu Haggai themgao heng ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Haggai2:11 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Tun thempuho chu danthupeh thudol dongin lang, seijin," 
Haggai2:12 Mi khattouvin asangkhol chola satheng chun henlang, asangkholchol chun changlhah ham, meham, lengpitwi ham, thao ham, nehthei poupou ham tongkha taleh, hiche atohkhah thilho chu atheng hintem? tin ati. Chuin thempuho chun adonbutnun, Thengponte, atiuve." 
Haggai2:13 Chuin Haggai'in, Khattou thilonga kisuhboh hen, hicheho khat hi tongkha taleh, hichu boh intem? ati. Chuin thempuho chun adondutnun, Boh ding ahi atiuve." 
Haggai2:14 Chuin Haggai'in adonbutnin aseije, Hiche mite leh hiche namhi kamasanga chuto bang chu ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseije; chule chutobang machu akhutnuva atoh jouseu, chule chua athilto hou chu thenglou ahi." 
Haggai2:15 Chule tun, naheng uva katao ahi, Pakai houin'a song khat chunga song khat akiset thop masangin, tunia kipat khonung changei ding ngaitouvin." 
Haggai2:16 Chuche nikho laija patchun, mikhat thil tena somni kite dinga ahungleh, sombou anaumin; mikhat lengpithei chilna-a bel somnga thaldoh dinga ahungleh, somni bou anaumin ahi." 
Haggai2:17 Nakhut soh natoh gimna jouseova lungle nget chule gelchangin kabol gimmun, ahinla keima lama nahung kile deh pouve tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Haggai2:18 Tuni hiche lhako chana, nisomni le nili ni-a kipat khonung geiding ngaitouvin, houin bul kiphudoh ni-a pat jengjong hin ngaitouvin." 
Haggai2:19 Changsalla chu changchi um nalaijem? Lengpigui le theichang phung chule kolbu theiphung galou hiuva, chule olive thingin aga asodoh loulai ham? Tunia pat nangma phatthei kabohding nahi ati." 
Haggai2:20 Chule chuche lha nisomni le nili nin, Haggai henga Pakai thu chu ahunglhung kitnin, aseije." 
Haggai2:21 Judah gam vaipo Jerubbabel henga hitin seijin, Keiman vanle lei kaholing ding ahi;" 
Haggai2:22 Chule keiman lenggam ho laltouna chu kalekhup ding, chule keiman Pathen hephalou lenggam thahatna hochu kasuhmang ding; akangtalai hou le achunga touho kale khupding; chule sakol holeh achunga touho hungkum lhadiu, mitin asopiho chemjam'a lou dingu ahi." 
Haggai2:23 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije, Hiche ni chule, Vo Shealtiel chapa Kasoh Jerubbabel, keiman kalahding nahi tin Pakaiyin aseije; chule mahor banga kasem ding nahi, ajehchu kalhen nahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah1:1 Darius lengchan kal kum nina, lhaget lhina-in, Iddo themgao chapa Berechiah chapa Zechariah themgao henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije:" 
Zechariah1:2 Pakai chu napu napateu chunga chun alungnom mo lheh jengin ahi. 
Zechariah1:3 Hijeh chun nangman ahenguva, Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; keima lam hin ngauvin tin janel Pakaiyin aseije, chutileh kenjong nangho lam kahin ngat ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah1:4 Napu napateu toh banghih-un, amaho henga chun themgao masahon anasamuvin, Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; lamdih louva kon le natoh phalouva konin hung kiheijun, tin aseijun ahi: ahinla amahon angai pouvin, kathu jong alapouve tin, Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah1:5 Napu napateu hoiba hitam? chule themgaoho chu tonsotna hinguvam? 
Zechariah1:6 Ahinla kasoh themgaoho kana thupeh, kathule kadan kisunho chun napu napateu chu atuhtang louham? Chule amaho ahung kileuvin, janel Pakaiyin ichunguva bolding agot bangin, ilampiu dungjuile, itoh-u dungjuijin ichunguva atong chaitai atiuve." 
Zechariah1:7 Darius lengchan kal kum nina, lha somlekhat channa, hichu Sebat lha ahin, nisomni le nili nin, Iddo chapa Berechiah chapa Zechariah themgao henga, Pakai thu ahung lhungin, aseije:" 
Zechariah1:8 Keiman jan-in, sakol san chunga mikhat touva, amachu noilama huisum thing lah-a adina; anunga sakol sanho, apolchetchut, chule akang aum kamun ahi." 
Zechariah1:9 Chuin keiman, Vo Ka Pakai, hichehohi ipiham? kati. Hichun vantil eikihoupi chun kahenga, hichehohi ipi ahiu vetsah inge, ati." 
Zechariah1:10 Chuin huisum thing lah-a ding mipa chun adonbutnin aseije, hicheho hi leiset pumpi suhle tunga chonle dinga Pakaiyin ahinsol ho ahiuve ati." 
Zechariah1:11 Chuin amahon thingphung lah-a ding Pakai vantil chun adonbutnun, keihon leiset hi suhle tungin kachonun, veuvin, lei pumpi chu atouthip beh-in, akicholdon ahi, atiuve." 
Zechariah1:12 Chujouvin Pakai vantil chun adonbutnin aseije, Vo janel Pakai, kum somsagi jen adouna-a nalunghan khum Jerusalem le Judah khopiho chunga itihchan hepina beija naum ding hitam?" 
Zechariah1:13 Chuin Pakaiyin eikihoupi vantil chu thupha le lhamona thun adonbutnin ahi. 
Zechariah1:14 Chuti chun kajah-a thusei vantil chun kahenga, hitihin samphongin, janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; keima Jerusalem le Zion din thangthipna lentah in kathang thipmin ahi." 
Zechariah1:15 Chule nomtah-a uma Pathen hephalou ho chunga kalung phamolheh jengin ahi: ajehchu keima themkhat bou kalung phamo ahin, ahinla amahon suhgimna chu amasot uvin ahi." 
Zechariah1:16 Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseije; keima Jerusalem henga hepina toh kahungkile kit tai: asunga chu ka-in kisading ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije, chule Jerusalem chunga tetohna khao kijan ding ahi." 
Zechariah1:17 Samphong nalaijin, Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije tin aseijin; kakhopiho phattheina vanga kikehbe nalai ding; Pakaiyin Zion alhamon nalaiding, chule Jerusalem adeilhen nahlai ding ahi." 
Zechariah1:18 Chujouvin kakhodah-in ahile, veuvin saki li kamun ahi." 
Zechariah1:19 Chuin keima eikihoupi vantil jah-a chun, hihohi ipi tina ham? kati. Hichun aman, hichehohi Judah, Israel chule Jerusalem thecheh-ah aki li neiho chu ahi tin eidonbutne." 
Zechariah1:20 Chuin Pakaiyin thingthem bol mili eimusah-in ahi. 
Zechariah1:21 Chuin keiman, hichehohi ipi bol dinga hung hiuvam? kati. Hichun aman, hiche ki li hohi Judah thecheh-a, koimacha alu dahdoh ngamlou hela lhaho chu ahiuve: ahinla hiche thingthem bol hohi amaho jamsah dingle, akithecheh na dinguva Judah gam chunga aki-u domsanga chidang namdangho ki hochu suhlhahpeh dinga hunga ahiuve, tin aseije." 
Zechariah2:1 Keima kakhodah kitnin, kaven, chule akhutna tena khao kichoi khat kamun ahi." 
Zechariah2:2 Chuin kenjong, hoija che nahim? kati. Hichun aman kahenga, Jerusalem avai ite hija, adung ite ahi hetna dinga ate dinga che kahi, ati." 
Zechariah2:3 Chuin veuvin, eikihoupi vantil chu achedoh-in, chule vantil chom khat ama kimupi dingin apotdoh-in," 
Zechariah2:4 Chule ahenga hitin aseije, lhaijin, hiche gollhangpa henga khun, Jerusalem chu asunga mihemle gancha atamval jeh-a kulbang neilou khopiho banga chenna hiding ahi, tin gaseijin." 
Zechariah2:5 Ajehchu keima ama dinga akimvela mei kulbang banga kauma, chule asunga loupina kahi ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah2:6 Hei, hung doh-un, chule sahlam gama konin jamdoh uvin tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ajehchu kol ningli-a hui bangin kathejao taove tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah2:7 Babylon chanutoh chengkhom Vo Zion, nangma kihuh doh-in." 
Zechariah2:8 Ajehchu, janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; loupina jou chun, nachom gamuva namho henga chun keima eisolin ahi. Ajehchu nangho tongkha-a chun amit laivom atohkhah ahi." 
Zechariah2:9 Ajehchu veuvin, keiman achunguva kakhut kathin ding, chule amaho asohteu dinga galthil kichom hidiu ahi: chutengle nanghon keimahi janel Pakai hinsol kahi nahetna dingu ahi." 
Zechariah2:10 Vo Zion chanute, la saovin lang kipah-un: ajehchu veuvin, kahunge, chule nalah uva kachen ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah2:11 Hiche ni chule nam tamtah-in Pakai chu jop untin, kamite hidiu: chule keima nalah uva kachen ding, chutengle keimahi janel Pakaiyin naheng uva eihinsol ahi nahet dingu ahi." 
Zechariah2:12 Chule Pakaiyin gamtheng sunga achanvou dinga Juda chu alo ding, chule Jerusalem adeilhen kitding ahi." 
Zechariah2:13 Vo tahsa hing jouse, Pakai anga thipchetnun: ajehchu ama amunthenga konin akithou doh-in ahi." 
Zechariah3:1 Chuin aman, Pakai vantil anga ding thempu chungnung Joshua chule ama doudal ding go-a ajetlama Satan adin chu eivetsah-e." 
Zechariah3:1 Chuin aman, Pakai vantil anga ding thempu chungnung Joshua chule ama doudal ding go-a ajetlama Satan adin chu eivetsah-e." 
Zechariah3:2 Chuin Pakaiyin Satan henga, Vo Satan, Pakaiyin naphoh-e; Pakai Jerusalem kilhenpa tahchun naphoh-e: hichehi meija kona meikho kiloidoh hilou ham? atin ahi." 
Zechariah3:3 Tun Joshua chu ponsil nentah kivonin, vantil anga chun adinge."
