Zechariah3:3 Tun Joshua chu ponsil nentah kivonin, vantil anga chun adinge." 
Zechariah3:4 Aman amasanga dingho chu adonbutnin, ajah uva chun, ponsil nen chu ama-a konin ladoh-un, tin aseije. Chule ama jah-a chun, ven, nakhan gitlouna nanga kona kabeisah tan, chule keiman ponsil hoitah kavonpeh ding nahi, ati." 
Zechariah3:5 Chuin keiman, aluchunga lukhuh hoitah khuhpeh uhen, kati. Chutichun alua lukhuh hoitah akhuh peh-un, ponsil avonpeh taove. Chule Pakai vantil chu akoma adinge." 
Zechariah3:6 Chuin Pakai vantil chun Joshua henga aphongdoh-in, aseije." 
Zechariah3:6 Chuin Pakai vantil chun Joshua henga aphongdoh-in, aseije." 
Zechariah3:7 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; kalampi najotna, kathupeh nanit leh, ka-in sunga vai nahom ding, kahong sung jong navetsui ding, chule hikoma dingho lah-a hi vahle theina mun kapeh ding nahi." 
Zechariah3:8 Vo Joshua thempu chungnung, nangma le na-anga touhon, tun ngaijun; ajehchu amaho datmo umtah miho ahiuve: ajehchu veuvin, keiman kalhacha ABAH chu kahin puidoh ding ahi." 
Zechariah3:8 Vo Joshua thempu chungnung, nangma le na-anga touhon, tun ngaijun; ajehchu amaho datmo umtah miho ahiuve: ajehchu veuvin, keiman kalhacha ABAH chu kahin puidoh ding ahi." 
Zechariah3:9 Ajehchu Joshua masanga kasong set chu veuvin, song khat chunga mit sagi umding ahi: veuvin, keiman hia chu thucheng kajih ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije, chule keiman nikhat tengle chuche gam khangitlouna chu katolmang ding ahi." 
Zechariah3:9 Ajehchu Joshua masanga kasong set chu veuvin, song khat chunga mit sagi umding ahi: veuvin, keiman hia chu thucheng kajih ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije, chule keiman nikhat tengle chuche gam khangitlouna chu katolmang ding ahi." 
Zechariah3:10 Hiche nikho chule mitinin alengpigui le atheichang phung noija, aheng akomcheh akou dingu ahi." 
Zechariah4:1 Chuin vantil eina kihoupi chu ahungkitnin, mi khat a-ihmutna kona kisuthou bangin eisuthouvin," 
Zechariah4:2 kajah-a, ipi namu em? eiti. Hichun keiman kadonbutnin, kavei, chule vetan, achungvuma sumlheng um, chule akhoma thaomei sagi nei, chuche thaomei sagi-a chu akam sagi um, sana jenga kisem meivah khom:" 
Zechariah4:3 Chule akoma Olive thingphung ni, sumlheng jetlama khat chule aveilama khat um kamui, kati." 
Zechariah4:4 Chuti chun, kadonbut nin, eina kihoupi vantil jah-a chun, ka pakai hichehohi ipi ham? katin ahi." 
Zechariah4:5 Chuin eina kihoupi vantil chun eidonbutnin, hichehohi ipi ahi nahetlou ham? ati. Hichun keiman kahepoi ka Pakai, katin ahi." 
Zechariah4:6 Chuin aman eidonbutnin kahenga aseije, Hichehi Zerubbabel henga Pakai thusei ahi: thahat jeh hilou, thilboltheina jeh jong hilou, kalhagao vang jeh ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah4:7 Vo molsang lenpitah, nangma koi nahim? Zerubbabel masanga phaicham naso jeng ding ahi: chule aman a-aw puma songpi athupipen chu lungsetna, lungsetna tia sampuma ahintoldoh ding ahi." 
Zechariah4:8 Chukal valin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahungin, aseije," 
Zechariah4:9 Zerubbabel khutnin hiche in bul hi ana phudoh ahin, ama khut maman ajoding ahi: chutengle nanghon keimahi janel Pakaiyin naheng uva eisol ahi nahetdingu ahi." 
Zechariah4:10 Ajehchu koijin thilneocha nikho i-sah louva akoijem? ajehchu amaho kipah-un tin, Zerubbabel khutna ngentum chu hiche sagiho chutoh amuthadiu ahi; hiche sagiho chu leiset pumpi-a suhle tunga lhaile Pakai mit ahiuve." 
Zechariah4:11 Chule keiman kadonbut nin, ajah-a, hiche meivah khom jetle veija olive thingphung teni hi ipi hetna ham? katin ahi." 
Zechariah4:12 Chuin keiman kadonbut kitnin, ahenga kaseijin, sana long tenin amani le amani-a kon sana thaotwi alhitkang lhona olive thingbah teni khu ipi hetna ham? kati." 
Zechariah4:13 Aman eidonbut nin, kajah-a, hichehohi ipi hetna ahi nahetlou ham? eiti. Chuin keiman, kahepoi ka pakai kati." 
Zechariah4:14 Chuin aman aseijin, hitenihi thao kinusa, leiset pumpi Pakai koma ding teni ahi lhone ati." 
Zechariah5:1 Chujouvin kakiheijin, kakhodah-in, chule kaven ahile, lekhajol leng lele khat kamun ahi." 
Zechariah5:2 Chule aman kahenga, ipi namu em? eiti. Chuin keiman, lekhajol khat kamun, adung chu tong somni ahin, chule avai chu tong som ahi, tin kadonbutne." 
Zechariah5:3 Chuin aman kajah-a, hichehi leiset pumpi chunga dinga potdoh-a gaosapna chu ahi: ajehchu gucha tapou chu lekhajol hiche lampang dungjuija kisumanga, chule akihahsel tapou chu lekhajol khuche lampang dungjuija kisumang ding ahi, ati." 
Zechariah5:4 Keiman kahin puidoh ding ahi tin Janel Pakaiyin aseije, chule hiche guchapa insung le jouva kamina kihahselpa insunga chu lutding; hichu a-insunga chu umdena, chua uma thingpeh le songho puma chu asuhmanghel ding ahi." 
Zechariah5:5 Chujouvin keima eina houpi vantil chu ahung potdoh-in, kajah-a, tun khodah inlang apotdoh khu ipiham vetemin, ati." 
Zechariah5:6 Chuin keiman, ipiham? kati. Chuin aman aseijin, hiche hi apotdoh-a ephah chu ahi. Aman aseibe kitnin, hiche hi leiset pumpi-a akhan gitlounao chu ahi, ati." 
Zechariah5:7 Chuin veuvin, ngen talen khat akidom sangin; chule hichehi numei khat ephah sunga tou chu ahi." 
Zechariah5:8 Chuin aman aseijin, hichehi khan gitlouna ahi. Chuin aman ephah sunga aseplutnin, chule aman ngen gih-a chun chuche kam chu asingtan ahi, ati." 
Zechariah5:9 Chujouvin keiman kakhodah-in, kaven ahileh, veuvin, numei ni ahungdoh in, alhaving hona chun hui aumin ahi; ajehchu amanin twilungva bangin lhaving aneilhonin ahi. Chuin amanin ephah chu leile van kikah-a adomsang lhonin ahi." 
Zechariah5:10 Chujouvin keiman einaki houpi-a vantil jah-a chun, hiche ephah hi hoilama adoplhon dingham kati?" 
Zechariah5:11 Chuin aman kahenga, Shinar gama a-in sahpeh nading lama: chule hichu kisadoh intin, amanu mun ngeija kitungdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Zechariah6:1 Chule keima kakiheijin, kakhodah-in, kaven ahileh, veuvin, molsang ni kikah-a sakol kangtalai li ahungdoh-in; chule hiche molsang teni chu sum-eng molsang ahi." 
Zechariah6:2 Sakol kangtalai masa-a sakol ho chu asan ahin, sakol kangtalai nina-a sakol ho chu avom ahi;" 
Zechariah6:3 Chule sakol kangtalai thum na-a sakol ho chu akangin, chule sakol kangtalai lina-a sakol ho chu abongpol jeng ahiuve." 
Zechariah6:4 Chujouvin keiman kadonbut nin eihoupi-a vantil jah-a chun, ka pakai, hichehohi ipiham? kati." 
Zechariah6:5 Chuin vantil chun kajah-a, hichehohi van lhagao liho, leiset pumpi Pakai anga adin naova kona chedohho ahiuve." 
Zechariah6:6 Chua um sakol vomho chu sahlam gama akitolun; akangho chun amaho chu ajuijun; abongpol ho chu lhang lam gama akitolui. 
Zechariah6:7 Asan pengho jong apotdoh-un, leiset pumpi-a suhle tunga vale ding agouvin ahi: chuin aman ajah uva, nangho hia konin cheovinlang, leipumpi suhle tungin gakhol taovin, ati. Hitichun amaho leiset pumpi-a suhle tunga avahle taove." 
Zechariah6:8 Chujouvin aman kachunga apeng jah-in, chule kahenga aseije, ven, hiche sahlang gama cheho khun sahlang gama kalhagao acholdo sah uve, ati." 
Zechariah6:9 Chuin Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, aseije;" 
Zechariah6:10 Sohchang Babylon'a kona hungho lah-a, Heldai, Tobijah, chule Jedaiah'a kon thilpeh chu la inlang, chuche ni mama chule hungin lang, Zephaniah chapa Josiah ina chun lutnin;" 
Zechariah6:10 Sohchang Babylon'a kona hungho lah-a, Heldai, Tobijah, chule Jedaiah'a kon thilpeh chu la inlang, chuche ni mama chule hungin lang, Zephaniah chapa Josiah ina chun lutnin;" 
Zechariah6:11 Chujouteng dangkale sana lanlang lallukhuh khat semin, chule hichu thempu chungnung Josedech chapa Joshua luchunga khuhpeh-in;" 
Zechariah6:11 Chujouteng dangkale sana lanlang lallukhuh khat semin, chule hichu thempu chungnung Josedech chapa Joshua luchunga khuhpeh-in;" 
Zechariah6:12 Chule ajah-a hitin seijin, Janel Pakaiyin aseijin, hitin aseije, ven Mi amin ABAH kitipa chu: Ama aumna mun'a konin khangtouvin tin, chule aman Pakai houin asahdoh ding ahi." 
Zechariah6:13 Aman Pakai houin geija asahdoh-a, loupina chu chang ding, chule ama touva alaltouna chunga vai ahomding; alaltouna chunga chu thempu'a pang ding ahi: chule chamna thumopna chu akikah lhona umding ahi." 
Zechariah6:14 Chule lallukhuh ho chu Helem, Tobijah, Jedaiah, chule Zephaniah chapa hetna dinga Pakai houin sunga umding ahi." 
Zechariah6:14 Chule lallukhuh ho chu Helem, Tobijah, Jedaiah, chule Zephaniah chapa hetna dinga Pakai houin sunga umding ahi." 
Zechariah6:15 Chule gamlatah-a umho hunguva Pakai houin chu asahdiu, chutengle nanghon keimahi janel Pakaiyin naheng uva eisol ahichu nahetdiu ahi. Hichehi nanghon genngai tah-a Pakai na Pathen'u aw chu nangai ule bou hung guilhung ding ahi." 
Zechariah7:1 Chule ahitin ahi, Darius lengchan kal kum lina, Chisleu kiti alhakoh chana, ni li chanin, Zekeriah henga Pakai thu chu ahung lhungin ahi." 
Zechariah7:2 Hichu amahon Pathen in'a Sherezer le Regem-Melek le amiteu chu Pakai anga taodingin asol uvin," 
Zechariah7:3 Chule janel Pakai in'a um thempuho le themgaoho henga, kum tamtah kahin bolngai banga, kachom uma, lha nga channa-a chu kaka ding ham? tia aga dohsah petnu ahi." 
Zechariah7:4 Chuin janel Pakai thu chu kahenga ahung lhungin, aseije," 
Zechariah7:5 Gamsunga um miho jousele, thempuho jouse jah-a chun seijin, nanghon lha nga nale lha sagina-a an nangol uva chule nalunghem tengule, chuche kum somsagi sung jenga jongchu kahenga, keima henga an ngolla nahibeh um?" 
Zechariah7:6 Chule nanghon naneh uva nadon tengu jongleh, nangho dinga bou naneh uva nadonu hilou ham?" 
Zechariah7:7 Jerusalem le akimvel khopiho mihon alo dimsetnuva aphattou laile, mihon lhanglam le phaicham alodimlai juva themgao masaho-a Pakai thusei ho chu nangaidiu hilou ham? ati." 
Zechariah7:8 Chuin Pakai thu chu Zekeriah henga ahung lhungin, aseije." 
Zechariah7:9 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Thutan dih mangun lang, mitinin asopi henga hepina le khotona musah hen." 
Zechariah7:10 Chule meithai le pa neilou, kholjin mi le migenthei ho chu bolgim hih-un, koima chan asopi dounan alungthimin aphalou ngaito hihhen, ati." 
Zechariah7:11 Ahinla amahon angainom pouvin, chule alengkouvu aheimangun, ajahlouna dingun akol asimuvin ahi." 
Zechariah7:12 Henge, amahon janel Pakaiyin themgao masaho lhagaova ahin thuseidoh ho le adan thupeh ho chu kijakhante tin alungu song bangin atahsah-un ahi. Hijeh chun janel Pakaiya konin alunghana nasatah ahung lhungin ahi." 
Zechariah7:13 Hijeh chun, ahitin ahi, aman akouva, amahon angailou banguvin; amahon eikouvu keiman kangai lou ding ahi tin, janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah7:14 Ahinla keiman amaho ahetkhah louvu namtin lah-a chimpeijin kathecheh taove. Hijeh chun amaho nungin agamu chu akamheltan, koima ajotpa le akinungle aumpoi: ajehchu gam nomtah chu kamhela akoiju ahitai." 
Zechariah8:1 Janel Pakai thu kahenga ahunglhung kitnin, aseije;" 
Zechariah8:2 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Keima Zion din thangthipna nasatah-in kathangthipmin, amadin lunghan chungnungin kathangthipme." 
Zechariah8:3 Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Keima Zion henga kahung kilekitna, Jerusalem lailunga kachen ding ahi. Chule Jerusalem chu thutah khopi kitiding, janel ho Pakai molsang chu molsang theng kitiding ahi." 
Zechariah8:4 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Jerusalem lamlena chu tehse numei le tehse pasal cheng nalai ding ahin, chule akum tambehseh jeh-a mitinin akhutna tenggol akiphu dingu ahi." 
Zechariah8:5 Chule khopi lamlena chu pasal chapang le numei chapang dimset ding, akhopi lamlena chu kichem dingu ahi." 
Zechariah8:6 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; hiche nikho-a hiche mite amohho mitmu-a hichu datmo aumin, chule keima mitmu-a jong datmo aumdem? tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah8:7 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; veuvin, keiman kamite chu solam le lhumlam gama kona kahuhdoh ding;" 
Zechariah8:8 Chule amaho chu kahin puija, Jerusalem lailunga cheng ding ahiuve. Chule amaho kamite hiuva, thutah le chonphatna-a keima a-Pathen'u kahiding ahi." 
Zechariah8:9 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; Houin kisahdoh theina ding, janel Pakai houin bul kiphudoh nikho-a themgaoho kama thu kisei cheng, tukhanga anakola jajousen naban thau hatsah-un." 
Zechariah8:10 Ajehchu tumasangin mihem kithalah manle, gancha kigoi man jong akipepoi; hesohna jeh-in alutle apotle dingin jong chamna aumpoi: ajehchu mijouse aheng akomtoh kana kidou sah-in ahi." 
Zechariah8:11 Ahinla tunvang, hiche miho amoh cheng henga hin, masang laija chutoh bang taponge tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah8:12 Ajehchu muchi chu pha theijin tin, lengpiguijin aga pentin, leijin aga sepdoh intin, vanhon adaitwi hou apehdingu ahi; chule keiman hiche mite amohho chu hicheho jousehi kalosah ding ahi." 
Zechariah8:13 Chule hung hitiding ahi, Pathen helouho lah-a sapsetna nachan jeh uvin, Vo Judah le Israel insung miteho; hijeh-a chu kahuhdoh uva phatthei channa nahidiu ahi. Kicha hih-un, ahin nabantha hatsah jouvin." 
Zechariah8:14 Ajehchu janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; napateu vin eilung hansah uva, nangho engbol dinga kana gotlai bangin, kalung kaheipoi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah8:15 Chuti chun tulai nikhon vang Jerusalem le Judah insung mite chunga thipha bolding kangaito kit tai: nangho kicha hih-un. 
Zechariah8:16 Hichehi nanghon naboldiu chu ahi; mitinin aheng akom jah-a thutah jeng seijun; nakotpi phunguva thutah le chamna-in thu tanun. 
Zechariah8:17 Koimachan aheng akom chunga lungse ngaito hihhen, jouva kihahselna ngailu hih-un. Ajehchu hicheho jousehi keiman kahot ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah8:18 Chule janel Pakai thu chu kahenga hungin, aseije;" 
Zechariah8:19 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; lha lina an ngol, lha ngana an ngol, lha sagina an ngol, chule lhasom na-an ngol chu Judah insung mite dinga akipanale thanopna, chule nopsahna kut hiding ahi; hijeh chun thutah le chamna ngailuvin." 
Zechariah8:20 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; hung hiti ding ahi, mipi ho, khopi tamtah-a chengho chu hungding ahiuve." 
Zechariah8:21 Khopi khatna chenga miho chu achom khatna cheovintin, ajah uva, Pakai henga tao dingle, janel Pakai holdingin cheloiju hite: keijong kache ding ahi, ati dingu ahi." 
Zechariah8:22 Henge, mi tamtah le nam hat ho chu Jerusalem'a janel Pakai holding le Pakai henga taodinga hung diu ahi." 
Zechariah8:23 Janel Pakaiyin hitin aseije; hiche nikho chule hung hitiding ahi, namtinle paotin jouse-a kona misomin Judah mi khat pon atuh uva, keiho jong nangtoh kilhona kachediu ahi; ajehchu Pathen'in na-umpiuve ti kajauve, atidingu ahi ati." 
Zechariah9:1 Israel phungho jouse banga mihemte mit ho chun Pakai lam ahin ngat tengle; Hadrach gamsunga Pakai thua pohgih, chule Damascus chu akicholdona hiding ahi." 
Zechariah9:2 Chule Tyrus le Zidon chu chinglheh jongle, Hamath'in jong hichu agamgit ding ahi." 
Zechariah9:3 Chule Tyrus'in ama dingin kuldet akisemin, dangka chu leivui bangin asevumin, sana thengsel jong khopi lamlena bonlhoh bangin asevume." 
Zechariah9:4 Veovin, Pakaiyin amanu apaidoh ding, chule athahatna chu twipia alehlut ding; chule meijin akahvam ding ahi." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashkelon'in hichu amua kicha ding; Gaza'n jong amua lunggim lheh ding, chule Ekron'in jong; ajehchu akinepna chu kijumso ding; lengpa chu Gaza-a kona mangthah ding, Ashkelon chu chenna lou hiding ahitai." 
Zechariah9:6 Chule Ashdod'a chu jaocha khat cheng ding; keiman Philistine hoithona chu kasuhtan ding ahi. 
Zechariah9:7 Chule akamsunga kon athisan kalahmanga, chule aha kah-a kona thet umtah ahina chu kalahmang ding ahi. Ahinla aumdenpa, ama tah jengjong chu i-Pathen uva ding hintin, Judah gamsunga chu vaipipo banga umding ahin, Ekron chu Jebus mite tobang hiding ahi." 
Zechariah9:8 Galmiho jehle, ajotpa jeh le ahung kilepa jeh-a, ka-in hi kaum kimvel ding; chule misugenthei koiman ahin jotpa lou ding ahitai; ajehchu tun kamit tah-in kamutai." 
Zechariah9:9 Vo Zion chanu, hapan kipah-in; Jerusalem chanu, aovin: ven nalengpa nahenga ahunge: ama chondihtah ahin, chule huhhingna aneije; kineosah tah-in sangan chunga, sangan nou chunga atouvin ahi." 
Zechariah9:10 Chule keiman Ephraim'a kona sakol kangtalai kasuhmanga, Jerusalem'a kona sakol ho chu kasuh mangding, chule gal thalpi jong kisat bongding ahi. Chule aman Pathen hephalou ho jah-a chamna thu aseiding, alenggam chu twipia pat twipi gei, chule vadunga pat kolmong gei hiding ahi." 
Zechariah9:11 Nangma dingin jong, nathisana kitepna vangin, twi beina kokhuh-a konin nasohchangho chu kasoldohtai." 
Zechariah9:12 Kinepna nei sohchang nangho kuldet lama kileuvin; tuni tah-a hi ajatnia kapehdiu ahi tia kaphondoh ahi. 
Zechariah9:13 Keiman kathalpi Judah kajebongin, Ephraim chu thalchang bangin thal'a kadipme, nachapate chu thoudoh-in, vo Zion, nachapate doudingin, vo Greek, nangma mihat ho chemjam bangin kaseme." 
Zechariah9:14 Pakai chu achunguva kimuntin; athalchang ho chu kolphe banga leng ding ahi: Pakai Pathen'in sumkon mut intin, lhanglam chimpeitoh kilhonding ahi." 
Zechariah9:15 Janel Pakaiyin amaho ahonbit dingu; chule amahon abahgamuva, ah songse songa ajodiu ahi, amahon adondiu, chule lengpitwi kham banga pohchei choidiu; amaho sumlheng ho banga dimuva, maicham ningho bang dimdiu ahi." 
Zechariah9:16 Chule hiche nikho chule a-Pathen'un amite ganchahon banga ahuhdoh ding ahi: ajehchu amaho alua lallukhuh chunga songho bang dingu, agamsunga ponlap banga choisanga umdiu ahi." 
Zechariah9:17 Ajehchu aphatna hi ichana lenna, ahoina hi ichana len hitam? changin gollhangho athanopsah ding, lengpitwi thah-in nungah ho akipasah ding ahi." 
Zechariah10:1 Goju nunung laihin nanghon Pakai henga go thumin; chutile Pakaiyin meilom vahsah intin, loulaija hampa tin cheng chu gotwi apehding ahi." 
Zechariah10:2 Ajehchu semthu milimhon pannabei thu aseijun, doi-aithem hon jouthu amuvin, mang dihlou aseijuvin; amahon ahomkeovin alhamonun ahi. Hijeh chun kelngoihon bangin ama ama lampia acheuvin, kelngoi chingpa umlou jeh-in, amaho alungkham taove." 
Zechariah10:3 Kelngoi chingho chunga chun kalung hang behsehnin, kelchaho chu ka-engbol tai. Ajehchu janel Pakaiyin akelngoihon Judah insung avilin, galbolna sakol phatah bangin aseme." 
Zechariah10:4 Ama-a konin inning songpi ahungdoh-in, ama-a konin thihkil, ama-a konin galkapna thalpi, ama-a konin misuh gentheina ho jouse chu ahungdoh-e." 
Zechariah10:5 Amaho chu gal kisatna-a amelmate lamlena bonlhoh toh chotbeh-a mihat tah tobang hunghidiu ahi. Chule Pakaiyin aumpi jeh uva gal asatnuva, sakol chung chongho chu kijumso diu ahi." 
Zechariah10:6 Keiman Judah insung kahatsah-a, Joseph insung kahuhhing ding: keiman amaho chensah dinga kahin lepui kitding ahi; ajehchu keiman amaho kakhoto-in ahi. Amaho kanapai manglou tobang hidiu ah; ajehchu keima Pakai a-Pathen'u kahin, chule kangaipeh dingu ahi." 
Zechariah10:7 Ephraim miho chu mi hattah banguntin, alungu chu lengpitwi kham tobanga thanom ding: achateu vin hichu amuva, kipah dingu; Pakaiya alungu kipah ding ahi." 
Zechariah10:8 Keiman amaho dinga huisatding, chule kakhop khomding ahi; ajehchu keiman amaho kalhatdoh ahitan: anapunthei banguva chu pungthei diu ahi." 
Zechariah10:9 Chule keiman amaho chu mite lah-a katulut ding: amahon gamlatah-a eihin geldoh dingu ahi; chule achateutoh cheng khomuva, hung kilekit dingu ahi." 
Zechariah10:10 Keiman amaho Egypt gama konin jong hinle puidoh kitning ting, Assyria'a kona kakhop khom ding; Chule Gilead le Lebanon gama kona kapuilutna, amaho dinga mun akimulou geija kapuilut ding ahi." 
Zechariah10:11 Chule ama gimbolna pumin twipi chu galkaijin tin, twipi kinong chu avoh ding, luipi thuhtah jouse kanggam helding ahi: Chule Assyria hoithona kisunema, Egypt te leng tenggol jong kitolmang ding ahi." 
Zechariah10:12 Chule ken amaho chu Pakaiya hatsah ingting, ama minna chesuh chetoudiu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah11:1 Vo Lebanon, meijin na Cedar thingho akahvam theina ding, nakot ho hongin." 
Zechariah11:2 Vo chahthing, pengin; ajehchu cedar thingho alhugamtai; ajehchu thing thupi tahtah ho akisuse gamtai: Vo Bashan gangpiho, nangho pengun; ajehchu gammang thingho alhugamtai." 
Zechariah11:3 Kelngoi chingho pen awgin akijai, ajehchu aloupinao akisuhmang tai: keipi bahkai donglai kitumgin akijai, ajehchu Jordan kiletsahna suhsetnin aumtai." 
Zechariah11:4 Pakai ka Pathen'in hitin aseije; tha ding kelngoihon ho chu vah-in. 
Zechariah11:5 Aneiho tah-in amaho athatjiuvin, themmo akisaji pouve: chule amaho joh-a panghon, Pakai chu nunnom hen; ajehchu keima kahao tai, atijiuve. Amaho achinga pangho tah-in jong akhotoji pouve." 
Zechariah11:6 Ajehchu gamsunga chengho chu khoto taponge, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ahinla veuvin, keiman mitin chu aheng akom khut le alengpau khutna kapehdoh ding ahi. Amahon gamsung chu asat dingu, akhutnuva kona kahuh dohlou ding ahi." 
Zechariah11:7 Chule thading kelngoihon ho chu kavahding, vo kelngoihon lah-a genthei, nangma tahjong kavah ding nahi. Chuin keiman keima dingin tenggol ni kalan, khat chu Ahoi kasah-in, khat chu Kikan khom kasah-in; chuin kelngoihon chu kavahtai." 
Zechariah11:8 Lha khat sungin kelngoi ching thum jong kasumangin; chule kahinna-in amaho athetnin, amaho hinna-in jong keima eihouve." 
Zechariah11:9 Chujouvin ken kaseijin, ken nangho vahponge, athi ding chu thi hen; akisumang ding chu kisumang hen; adang chu amahole amaho sa kinetohen, katitai." 
Zechariah11:10 Chuin katengol Ahoi kiti chu kalan, mijousetoh kitepna kananei chu kasuhkeh nadingin, katan bonghel tai." 
Zechariah11:11 Chule hiche ni chun hichu abongtai: chule ganhon lah-a agenthei keima eina ngahho chun, hichu Pakai thu ahi, ti ahetauve." 
Zechariah11:12 Chuin keiman ahenguva, pha nasah ule, kalo neipeu vinlang; pha nasah lou uleh neipeh daovin, kati. Hichun amahon kalo dingin dangka somthum eitedoh peh taove." 
Zechariah11:13 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, kaman dinga manpha tah amahon eipeh-u chu, beldengpa henga petan eiti. Chuin dangka somthum chu kalan, Pakai in'a beldengpa chu kapetai." 
Zechariah11:14 Chujouvin Judah le Israel kah-a kisopitna chu kasuhkehthei nadingin, katengol dang Kikan khom kiti chu kalan, kasu bongheltai." 
Zechariah11:15 Chuin Pakaiyin kahenga, kelngoiching mingolpa manchah chu lakit nalai jin eiti." 
Zechariah11:16 Ajehchu vetan, keiman gamsunga kelngoiching khat kahin tundoh ding, amachun akisumang dingho avil lou ding, anouho jong ahol lou ding, agu bongho jong aboldam lou ding, adinglaiho jong avahlou ding ahi. Ahivanga aman athaoho phe chu anehding, chule atinho chu ahal hala asat telding ahi." 
Zechariah11:17 Phatchomna bei kelngoiching kelngoihon dalha-a chu ohe ada ahi! aban le amit jetlama chemjam chuding: abanchu gotheng hela, chule amit jetlam jong thimdel ding ahi." 
Zechariah12:1 Israel dinga Pakai thu pohgih chu, vanho jahdoh-a leiset bulpi phutdeh-a, mihem sunga lhagao umsah-a Pakai chun aseije," 
Zechariah12:2 Judah le Jerusalem agoma douna dinga aki-um tengle, veovin, Jerusalem chu akimvela mijouse dinga lungvaina khonna kasem ding ahi." 
Zechariah12:3 Chule hiche nikho chule Jerusalem chu mijouse dinga pohgih tah songa kasem ding; chuche douna-in leiset mijouse kikhom jongleh, chuche pohgih domkang dinga kigo jouse chu ahal hala kisat telding ahi." 
Zechariah12:4 Pakaiyin aseije, hiche nikho chule sakol jouse kidangsah na-a, chule achunga touho chu ngolna-a kajep ding; chule Judah insung chunga kamit kaha sah-a, miho sakol jouse mit chotna-a kajep ding ahi." 
Zechariah12:5 Chule Judah vaipoho chun alungthim uva, Jerusalem'a chengho chu janel Pakai a-Pathen'u jala kathahatnao ahi, atidiu ahi." 
Zechariah12:6 Chuche nikho chule Judah vaipoho chu thing lah-a meithuh bangle, changphal lah-a meisel banga kasem ding; amahon akimvela mijouse jetle veija akahvam ding ahi. Jerusalem vang chu ama mun Jerusalem ngeija chu chenna kinei kitding ahi." 
Zechariah12:7 David insung loupina le Jerusalem'a chengho loupina chu Judah chunga akichoisang louna dinga, Pakaiyin Judah ponbuh ho chu ahuhdoh masah ding ahi." 
Zechariah12:8 Chuche nikho chule Jerusalem'a chengho chu Pakaiyin hongin tin, alah uva chuche nikho-a alhasampen jong chu David bang ding; chule David insung chu Pathen tobang hiding, a-angsung uva Pakai vantil um banghel hidiu ahi." 
Zechariah12:9 Chule hiche nikho chule hunghiti ding ahi, Jerusalem douva hungkon nam jouse chu suhmang dinga kahol ding ahi." 
Zechariah12:10 Chule David insung chungle Jerusalem'a chengte ho chunga lungsetna lhagao le taona lhagao kahin buhlhah ding ahi. Chule amahon tenga anasutpao keima eivet diu, chule mi achapa changkhat jeh-a alunghem banga amaho lunghemdiu, mikhat acha pengmasa pen chunga lhasetah-a aka banga ama jala kana nasatah umding ahi." 
Zechariah12:11 Hiche nikho teng chule Megiddo phaichama Hadad-rimmon pul kidou banga, Jerusalem'a puldouna lentah umding ahi." 
Zechariah12:12 Chule gamsungin pul adouding, insung jousen atuma; David insungin mitin atuma, ajiteuvin atuma; Nathan insunga miten atuma, chule ajiteuvin atuma;" 
Zechariah12:13 Levi insunga mite atuma, chule ajiteuvin atuma; Shimei insungin atuma, chule ajiteuvin atuma;" 
Zechariah12:14 Amoh umnalai insung jousen, insung jousen atuma, chule ajiteuvin atuma pul adou chehdiu ahi." 
Zechariah13:1 Chuche nikho teng chule chonsetna le thenlouna jeh-a David insung dingle Jerusalem'a chengteho-a dinga twinah khat hung putdoh ding ahi. 
Zechariah13:2 Hiche nikho chule hunghiti ding ahi, gamsunga kona alim semthuho min chu kasuhbeija, geldoh-a umkit talouhel ding ahi. Chule athemgao houle lhagao bohho chu gamsunga kona kapotdoh sah ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah13:3 Chule hung hitiding ahi, mi khattou gao thusei aumle, ama hinga anule apa chun ahenga, Pakai mina jou nasei jeh-a nahinlou ding ahi, atilhon ding ahi. Chule ahinga anule apan agao thusei petna chu paihela asutlhon ding ahi." 
Zechariah13:4 Chule hiche nikho chule hunghiti ding ahi, themgaoho chu gaothu aseitengule agaothilmu jeh uva jahcha dingu; mi lheplhahna dinga ponham jong akisil tahloudiu;" 
Zechariah13:5 Amavang, Keima themgao kahipoi, loubol mi kahi; ajehchu kakhangdon apatna gancha chinje min einahil ahitai, atijoh ding ahi." 
Zechariah13:6 Chule khat touvin, nakhut ho-a maha hohi ipi itiham? atile, aman, kagol ho in'a kona machang kahi, atiding ahi." 
Zechariah13:7 Vo chemjam, kakelngoi chingpa dounan, kakiloipi pa dounan hung thouvin, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije. Kelngoiho jamchehna dingin, achingpa chu volhun: chule keiman anoute chunga kakhut kalhah ding ahi." 
Zechariah13:8 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, gamsung jouse-a hopthum-a hopni kisumanga thidiu, hopthum-a hopkhat bou kikhen ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Zechariah13:9 Chule hopthum na chu meija kahin pui galkai ding, dangka kilhatheng banga kalhahthenga, sana kipatep banga kapatep ding ahi. Amahon kamin kou untin, ken kadonbut ding ahi. Keiman, hichehi kamite ahi, katiding, amahon, Pakai chu ka Pathen ahi, atidiu ahi." 
Zechariah14:1 Veovin, Pakai nikho chu hunglhung ding ahitai, chule nathil chomdoh chu nalah uva kihomjal ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:2 Ajehchu Jerusalem galla dou dinga kigo nam jouse kakhop ding; khopi chu kila-a, inho chu kichoma, numei ho kisuse ding; khopi kehkhat chu sohchanga potdoh diu, mipi amohho chu khopi-a kona kisumang louding ahiuve." 
Zechariah14:3 Chutengle Pakai chu potdoh intin, galsat nikho-a gal asat banga, chuche namho douna-a gal asatding ahi." 
Zechariah14:4 Chule chuche nikho chule Jerusalem mai solama um Olive molsanga chu akenga hung ding ding, chule Olive molsang chu solam le lhumlama alaitah-a kehlha-a phaicham lentah hungsoh ding; mol kehkhat chu sahlama, chule kehkhat chu lhanglama kichondoh ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:5 Chule nangho molsang phaicham lama najam diu ahi; ajehchu molsang Phaicham chun Azal gei aphah ding ahi. Henge, Judah lengpa Uzziah nikho laija inling kihot masanga najam banguva najam diu ahi: chule Pakai ka Pathen chu hungding, chule mitheng jouse chu nangma toh hungdingu ahi." 
Zechariah14:6 Chule hiche nikho chule hunghiti ding ahi, vah chu thenglou ding, thimjong thimlou ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:7 Ahinla hichehi Pakai kihetna nikho khat chu hiding, sunjong hilou janjong hilouding ahi: ahinla hunghiti ding ahi, nilhah phatle vah umding ahi." 
Zechariah14:8 Chule hiche nikho chule hiti ding ahi, Jerusalem'a konin hintwi longdoh ding; akeh khat chu solam twipi lama longa, akeh khat lhumlam twipi lama longding, hichu chuhle khala long ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:9 Chule leiset pumpi chunga Pakai chu leng chang ding ahi. Hiche nikho chule Pakai khat hintin, amin chu khat hiding ahi." 
Zechariah14:10 Gam jouse Geba'a pat Jerusalem lhanglam Rimmon gei chu phaicham tobang hungsoh ding ahi. Jerusalem chu kidom sanga, Benjamin kotpi-a pat kotpi masagei le kotpi ningchong gei; chule Hananeel insanga pat lengpa lengpitwi chilna geija chenna hiding ahi." 
Zechariah14:11 Chule asunga chu miho chenga; avela suhmang hela umkit talou ding, Jerusalem chu bitkeija chenna joh hiding ahitai." 
Zechariah14:12 Chule hichehi Jerusalem douna-a gal hinbol mipi jouse chunga Pakaiyin hise alansah chu hiding ahi; Akenga adin laijule apheu junmang ding, amitko sunguva amitnu junmang ding, chule aleiju akam sunguva junmang ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:13 Chule hiche nikho chule hung hitiding ahi, Pakaiya kona thunoh lentah alah uva umding; amaho mitinin aheng akom khut amatna, chule akhut chu aheng akom khut douna alap ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:14 Chule Judah ten jong Jerusalem asatdiu; chule akimveluva Pathen helouho haona sana, dangka, chule ponsil nengtah-a kichom khom ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:15 Chule chutobang ma chu sakol natna hise, sangan hise, sangongsang hise, sanganchal hise, chule ponbuh ho sunga ganchaho jouse chunga, hitobanga chu natna hise umding ahi." 
Zechariah14:16 Chule hung hiti ding ahi, nam jouse Jerusalem doudinga hungho lah-a panglouse chu, kumseh-a lengpa, janel Pakai houdinga cheova, chule houbuh kut mang dinga chejidiu ahi." 
Zechariah14:17 Chule hitiding ahi, leiset chunga inko jouse, lengpa Janel Pakai hou dinga Jerusalem'a hungtou lou chan chunga chu go julou ding ahi." 
Zechariah14:18 Chule Egypt gam inko achetou lou uva, ahung daoleh, amahon go amu loudingu; houbuh kut mang dinga chetoulou Pathen houlou ho kijepna ding hise chu chang dingu ahi." 
Zechariah14:19 Hichu Egypt mite engbolnale, houbuh kut manga hunglou nam jouse engbolna hiding ahi." 
Zechariah14:20 Hiche nikho chule sakol ho ki-o long chunga chu PAKAIYA DINGA ATHENG tia kijih ding; chule Pakai houin sunga bel ho jong maicham angsunga um sumlheng ho tobang hidiu ahi. 
Zechariah14:21 Henge, Jerusalem le Judah gama bel ho jouse chu janel Pakai dinga atheng hiding ahitai. Chule ganlhaina neijouse chun hung laovintin, an hona-a aman diu ahi. Chule hicheni chule janel Pakai in'a chu Canaan mi himhim umtalou ding ahi." 
Malachi1:1 Israelte henga Malachi'a kona kiseidoh Pakai thu pohgih. 
Malachi1:2 Keiman nangho kangailui tin Pakaiyin aseije, ahin nanghon iti neingailut nuham? nati uve. Esau chu Jacob sopi hilouham? tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ahinla keiman Jacob kangailun," 
Malachi1:3 Esau vang kahon, amolsangho le agou chanho chu kasusen gamthipma dragonho dingin kakoitai." 
Malachi1:4 Edom chun, keiho suhmangin umjong leuveng, kahung kilekit uva, agemsaho chu kasahphat kit diu ahi ati; ahinla janel Pakai chun hitin ati, amahon saovintin, hijongle keiman kasuhchim ding; mihon amaho chu khangitlouna gamgi, tonsotna Pakai lung hanna miteho atidiu ahi." 
Malachi1:5 Chule namit tah-un mu uvin natin, Israel gamgi-a kona Pakai chu choi-atna umding ahi, natidiu ahi." 
Malachi1:6 Chapan apa ajaboljin, chule soh-in a pakai ajaboljin ahi. Chutia chu keijong pa kahia ahile, eiki jabolna hoiba ham? Chule Pakai kahile eikiginna hoibaham? tin Janel Pakaiyin nangho jah-a aseije, Vo kamin nahsahlou thempuho. Ahinla nanghon hoija chu kanahsah mouvem? nati uve." 
Malachi1:7 Ka-maicham chunga changlhah thenglou natoh-un, ahinla nanghon, hoilaija nangma kasuhboh uvem? nati uve. Pakai dokhang chu nahsahmo-a bolthei ahi tia nasei naova chu nasuh boh-u ahi." 
Malachi1:8 Nanghon ganlhaina dinga amitcho natoule, hichu ase hilouham? chule nanghon a-elbai le adamlou natoule, hichu ase hilou ham? tun nagam vaipopao chu hichu gapeuvin, nachunga alung lhaidem, ahiloule nangma nanasang nadem? tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi1:9 Eilungset theina diuvin, tun Pathen henga taovun tia kangeh nahiuve. Hichehi nangho themo ahin, aman nangma nana khohsah nadem? tin janelho Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi1:10 Ka maichama moh jenseh-a mei natilou nadinguva, nangho lah ngeija moh jenseh-a kot khah ding koi nahiuvem? Nangho-a lunglhaina kaneipon, nakhut uva nathil peh-u jong laponge tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi1:11 Ajehchu nisa sona-a kipatna alhumna changeija, chidang namdangte lah-a kamin kithang ding ahin, amun tina gimnamtui le thilpeh theng kamina kitoh ding ahi. Ijeh inem itile Pathen heloute lah-a kamin kithang ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi1:12 Ahin nanghon hichu nasuboh-un, hia chun nanghon, Pakai dokhang chu suhboh ahitai; chukoma aga hole asaho sanin nahsahmon aumtai, tin naseijuve." 
Malachi1:13 Chujongle nanghon, veuvin, iti ningkitel um hitam! nati uvin, nanah nakhon khumuve, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije; chule nanghon akibot telsa, elbai, chule adamlou chu thilto dingin nahin choijiuve; hichehi nakhut uva kona kasan dingham? tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi1:14 Ahinla aganhon lah-a achal umjena, chule kihahsela, Pakaiya dinga nol-um toh-a chu gaosap changhen! ajehchu keima leng lentah kahin, chule kaminhi Pathen helouho lah-a kichat umtah ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi2:1 Chule tun, vo thempuho, hiche thupeh hi nangho ding ahi." 
Malachi2:2 Hichehi nangai lou uva, kamin loupi sahna dinga, nalunga nachin louvule, Janel Pakaiyin aseije, nachung uva gaosapna kahin solding, naphatthei nahou chu kagaosap ding ahi. Nanghon nalunguva nachinlou jeh uva, amaho chu kagaosap sajong ahitai." 
Malachi2:3 Veuvin, keiman nachilhah-u kasuhboh-a, namai uva eh kanu ding, na kut loupi houva eh ngeijong chu kanu diu; chule khatnin hiche puma chu napuimang diu ahi." 
Malachi2:4 Kakitepna Levi mite henga aumjing theina dinga, hiche thupeh hi naheng uva kahinsol ahi ti nahetdiu ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi2:5 Kakitepna hinna le chamna chu amatoh anaumin; aman eigin theina dingin hicheho chu ama kapen, chule kamin masanga akichan ahi." 
Malachi2:6 Thutah danthu chu akama aumin, amuh-a khangitlouna akimupoi. Lung mongtah le lungdih tah-in keima toh alhon khomin, mi tamtah akhan gitlou naova konin aleheije." 
Malachi2:7 Ijeh inem itile thempu muh chun hetna achintup ding, akama danthu aholding dol ahi. Ajehchu ama janel Pakai thupole ahi." 
Malachi2:8 Ahivangin nangho lampia konin nakihei doh-un; mi tamtah dan thua nakipal lhuh sah-un, Levi toh kitepna chu nasuboh uve, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi2:9 Hijeh-a chu nanghon kalampi najotlou dungjuiju le dan thua nalangneiju dungjuija, keiman jong nangho mi jouse anga nahsah mole noise umtah-a kasemu nahi." 
Malachi2:10 Ibonuva Pa khatbou ineiju hilou ham? Pathen khatnin eisem cheh-u hilouham? Ipi dinga ami takipmin asopi kitahlou tah-a iboluva, ipu ipateu kitepna isuhboh-u ham?" 
Malachi2:11 Judah'in kitahlouna ana mangin, Israel le Jerusalem'a thet umtah ana kibole; ajehchu Judah'in Pakaiyin angailut athen nachu asuboh-in, hetkhahlou pathen chanu ana kichenpin ahi." 
Malachi2:12 Hitobang bolpa chu, mihilpa chule ajilpa hihen, janel Pakai henga thilto boljipa hijongle, Jacob houbuh-a kona Pakaiyin asatlhah ding ahi." 
Malachi2:13 Chule hiche jonghi nabolkit uve: Pakai maicham chu mitlhiho chule kana le pen na-in nakhu khum taovin, hijeh-a chu thilto chu aman ima agel da-a, nakhut uva chu kipah tah-a asanlou ahi." 
Malachi2:14 Ahinla nanghon ipijeh inem? nati uve. Ajehchu Pakai chu kitah loutah-a nabol, nakhangdon laija na-inneipi le nangma kikah-a ahetoh ahijeh ahi. Hijongle ama chu nakiloipi, chule kitepna-a na-inneipi hija ahi." 
Malachi2:15 Chule Lhagao chu achunga aumsah-a, Aman amani chu khatna anasem hilouham? Ipijeh-a khat hijaham? Pathen ngaisah ding chilhah aholna ahi. Hijeh-a chu asenji chunga koimacha kitahlou tah-a aumlouna dingin, nalhagaovin ching theijun." 
Malachi2:16 Ajehchu Pakai, Israelte Pathen'in kida kaho-e tin aseije; ajehchu mihem khatnin aponsilin pumhat akhukhumin ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije. Hijeh chun kitahlou tah-a nachon louna diuvin, nalhagaovin chingthei jun." 
Malachi2:17 Nanghon nathuseijun Pakai chu nathachol sah uvin ahi. Hinla hoija kathachol sah-um? nati uve; nanghon, thilse bolchan chu Pakai mitmu-a apha ahin, ama hiche ho-a chun akipah jie nati uva, ahiloule thutan Pathen chu hoija umam? nati tengule nathachol sah-u ahi." 
Malachi3:1 Veovin, keiman kasottol soling ting, aman kamasanga kalampi asem ding; nanghon naholu Pakai, achunga nakipanao kitepna thupole pa ngei chu, photlot louva a-houin'a hung ding ahi. Veovin, hungding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi3:2 Ahivangin ahung ni chu koiham athohjou ding, ahungkilah teng koiham adingthei dinga? ama chu suhthengna meile sopthengna savon tobang ahi." 
Malachi3:3 Ama dangka lhahtheng le suthengpa banga touding; Levi chate chun chonphatna-a Pakai henga thilto atotheina diuva asuhthenga, sana dangka banga alhahtheng dingu ahi." 
Malachi3:4 Chuteng khangluilai le kum masaho banga, Judah le Jerusalem ganlhaina chu Pakai dinga lunglhaina hikit ding ahitai." 
Malachi3:5 Chule keiman thutan dinga naheng kahin naiding: doichoiho, jon panho, jouva kihahsel ho, sum thalo ho le meithaiho chule pabeiho bolgimho, maljinho kiheimang khumho, chule keima eiging louho douna-a hettohsah gangtah kahi ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi3:6 Ajehchu keima kikhel lou Pathen kahin; vo Jacob chateho, hijeh-a chu nangho suhmanga umlou nahiuve." 
Malachi3:7 Napu napateu nikholaija patnin kahoudan thupeh ho-a konin nache mangun, hicheho chu nitjong nanitpouvin ahi, kahenga hung kileovin, keima jong naheng uva hungkilenge, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije. Ahinla nanghon iti kahungkile diuham? nati uve." 
Malachi3:8 Mihem'in Pathen achom ngaijem? Ahin nanghon keima neichom uve. Ahinla nanghon hoija nang kachomun? nati uve. Hopsom le thilto-a neichomun ahi. 
Malachi3:9 Nanghon neichom jeh-u leh, hiche nam pumpi jeng jonghin eichom jeh uva, gaosapna-a gaosap chang nahitaove." 
Malachi3:10 Ka-in'a nehle chah aumna dingin, hopsom jouse thilkholna insung hinlhutnun, van kot ho kahona asunga akoina ding indan aumlou geija phattheina kahin buhlhah hih-em, tun hiche-a hin neipatep untin, janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi3:11 Chule nangho khohsahna jala bahgampa chu kaphosal ding, aman naleisetna gahou chu asuhmang tahlou ding; loulaija lengpiga injong aphat masanga aga apulsah louding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi3:12 Chule nangma kipa umtah gam nahitah ding jeh-a, nam jousen anunnom nati diu ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi3:13 Nathu houchu kachunga akhouthei lheh-e, tin Pakaiyin aseije. Ahin nanghon nangma douna-a chutiloma ipi kaseibeh uvem? nati uvin ahi." 
Malachi3:14 Nanghon, Pathen kinbol hi pannabei ahi: eihon ahoudan thupeh initnuva, chule lunghem tah-a janel Pakai anga ivaleova ipi phachomam? nati uve." 
Malachi3:15 Chule tun nanghon mikiletsah ho chu akipah-e natiuvin; henge, khangilou tah-a lamlha ho chu choisangin aumin; Pathen lhem patep ho jengjong ahoidoh-un ahi." 
Malachi3:16 Chuin Pakai gingho chu khatle khat akihouvun; Pakaiyin angaijin ajatan; Pakai ginga, amin geldoh jingho dingin, a-angsunga geldoh jingna lekhabu khat akisunin ahi." 
Malachi3:17 Kasongmantam ho kasemdoh nikho leh, amaho keima-a hidiu ahi tin janel Pakaiyin aseije; chuteng mipa khatnin alhacha-a pang achapa akhendoh banga, keiman jong amaho chu kakhendoh ding ahi." 
Malachi3:18 Chutengleh hungkile heijun natin, michonpha le mikhangilou nahet khendiu, Pathen jen le ajenlouho nahekhen diu ahitai." 
Malachi4:1 Ajehchu, veuvin, meilhumpi banga kading nikho chu ahung lhunge; chule mi hoitho jouse le thilse bol ho jouse kipallhudiu ahi; hiche nikho hunglhung ding chun amaho akahvam heldiu, hichun ajungjong abah jong akhenlou ding ahi, tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi4:2 Ahinla kamin ginga nangho din vang chonphatna nisa chu alhaving teni-a damna puma hungsoh ding; chule nangho bongkula bongnou kivah ho banga napotdoh uva, nakhandoh diu ahi." 
Malachi4:3 Hiche kabol ding nikho chule, mikhangilou ho chu nachot phaova, amaho chu nakengto noijuva leivui hidiu, ahi tin janel Pakaiyin aseije." 
Malachi4:4 Kasohpa Mosi dan, Horeb mun'a Israel mite jouse dinga ahenga kathupeh, dan kisunho le thutanna chu geldoh jingun." 
Malachi4:5 Veovin, Pakai nikho loupi le kichat umtah ahunglhun masanga Elijah themgao kahin solpeh ding nahiuve." 
Malachi4:6 Ama chun pate lungsung chate lama, chate lungsung pate lama alehei ding ahi, achuti loule keima hungin ting leiset hi gaosap na-a kajep ding ahi." 
Matthew1:5 Salmon'in Rahab toh Boaz ahingin; Boaz'in Ruth toh Obed ahingin; Obed chun Jesse ahingin; 
Matthew2:17 Hichun themgao Jeremiah thusei," 
Matthew3:3 Isaiah themgaovin, Gamthipma khosam aw khatnin, Pakai lamlen semtohsan koijun, Alampi semjangun, tin aseije, tia asei chu ama hi ahi." 
Matthew4:14 Isaiah themgaovin asei," 
Matthew8:17 Isaiah themgaovin, Amatah-in ihatmonau alan, inat jouseu apomangtai, tia asei chu guilhuna dinga chuti ahi." 
Matthew12:17 Isaiah themgaovin asei: 
Matthew12:39 Ahin Aman adonbutnin, ajah uva, Migilou le mijong khanga miten melchihna aholui, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipe lou ding ahi." 
Matthew12:40 Ijeh-inem itile, Jonah ni thum le jan thum ngapi oisunga aum banga, mihem chapa jonghi ni thum le jan thum leigila umding ahi." 
Matthew12:41 Nineveh khopi-a miho chu thupi tanna-a tulai khang mite toh hung ding khoma, tulai khang hi themmo ahinchan dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Jonah thuhil chun alung aheijun ahi; ahin, veuvin, Jonah sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume." 
Matthew13:14 Chule Isaiah themgaovin khonunga thusoh ding asei: Nanghon ja vang janaovin natin, angainaje nahet lou dingu, mu vang munao vin natin, nahetdoh lou dingu ahi." 
Matthew15:7 Miphalhem ho, Isaiah'in nangho khanchan ding thu aseija:" 
Matthew16:4 Migilou le mijong khanga miten melchihna aholuve, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipelou ding ahi, ati. Chuin amaho chu adalhan achemang tai." 
Matthew16:14 Chuin amaho, Kimkhatnin, John Baptist ahi, atiuvin; kimkhatnin Elijah ahi, atiuvin; kimkhatnin Jeremiah ahi, ahiloule themgaoho lah-a khatpen ahi, atiuve; tin aseijun ahi." 
Matthew24:15 Chuti ahijeh chun mi sumang thet umtah thil thudol Daniel themgao sei chu mun thenga adin namu tengule, (asim siman hehen,)" 
Matthew27:9 Hichu themgao Jeremiah thusei, Israel chate lah-a kona aman asahsao, aman kisahpa man chu dangka somthum alauvin ahi;" 
Mark7:6 Aman amaho chu adonbutnin, ajah uva, Isaiah themgaovin miphalhem nangho thudol aseije, Hiche phung mite hin akam sunguvin eichoi-anun, alungthimula keija konin gamlatah ahi." 
Mark13:14 Amavang themgao Daniel seibangin, misumang thet umtah chu adinna dol louva adin namu tengule (asim siman hehen), chutengle Judah gama um chengse thinglhang lamah jamuhen:" 
Luke3:4 Isaiah themgao lekhabua kisunbang chun, Gamthipma khosam aw khatnin, Pakai lamlen semtohsan koijun, alampi semjangun." 
Luke3:25 Joseph chu Mattathias chapa ahin, Mattathias chu Amos chapa ahin, Amos chu Nahum chapa ahin, Nahum chu Esli chapa ahin, Esli chu Nagge chapa ahin," 
Luke3:25 Joseph chu Mattathias chapa ahin, Mattathias chu Amos chapa ahin, Amos chu Nahum chapa ahin, Nahum chu Esli chapa ahin, Esli chu Nagge chapa ahin," 
Luke4:17 Chuin Isaiah themgao lekhabu apeuvin ahi. Chuin aman lekhabu chu aphongin ahile, hitia kisun laitah amudoh-in ahi:" 
Luke11:29 Chuin mipi ho ahenga ahung kikhopkhop phatnun, aman, Tulai hiche khang hi khanggilou ahin; melchihna aholun, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipe lou ding ahi." 
Luke11:30 Ijeh-inem itile Jonah Nineveh mite dinga melchihna ahi banga chu, Mihem Chapa jong tulai khanga ding ahi." 
Luke11:32 Nineveh khopi-a miho chun thupi tanna-a tulai khang mite toh hung ding khoma, tulai khang hi themmo ahinchansah dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Jonah thuhil chun alung aheijun ahi; ahin, veuvin, Jonah sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume." 
Luke11:54 Amoso theina diuvin akama kona phabep khat jahdingin aholun, chule achangun ahi." 
John1:23 Aman, Keima Isaiah themgao sei, Pakai lampi sem jangun tia, gamthipma khosam-a mi khat aw gin chu kahi, ati." 
John12:38 Hiche hi Isaiah themgaovin, Pakai, kathuseiju kon atahsanem? Chule Pakai ban thahat koi henga kilangam? tia asei chu guilhun theina ding ahi." 
John12:39 Hiche thua hin Isaiah'in asei kitleuvin," 
John12:41 Hiche hi Isaiah'in ama loupina chu ana mu-a, ama thudol aseina-a kona, asei ahi." 
John21:15 Chuin ajing anneh-u achaijun, Jesu'n Simon Peter jah-a, Jonah chapa, Simon, nangman hicheho sanga hi neingailut joh-em? ati. Aman ajah-a, Henge Pakai; kangailut nangin nahenai, ati. Aman ajah-a, Ka kelngoi nouho vah-in, ati." 
John21:16 Ani veinan ajah-a, Jonah chapa, Simon, nangman neingailut em? ati. Aman ajah-a, Henge Pakai; kangailut nangman nahenai, ati. Aman ajah-a, Ka kelngoiho chingin ati." 
John21:17 Chuin athum veinan ajah-a, Jonah chapa, Simon, nangin neingailut em? ati. Aman thum veijen, Neingailut em? ati jeh chun Peter alungnom motan, ajah-a, Pakai, nangman ijakai nahenai; keiman nangma kangailut nangman nahenai ati. Jesu'n ajah-a, Ka kelngoi ho vah-in." 
Acts2:16 Ahin hiche hi Joel themgaovin anasei; 
Acts7:45 Chujouvin ipu ipateu le Joshua'in hichu aneisonpeh-un, ipu ipateu masang sanga Pathen'in anodohho vaipiho gam alo laiju chun apo lutpeh-un, David nikho lai geijin aumin;" 
Acts8:28 Akile kit lama kangtalai ja akitol puma themgao Isaiah lekhabu chu asim ahi. 
Acts8:30 Chuin Philip ahenga alhaijin ahile, Isaiah themgao lekha chu asim ajan, ahengah, Nasim chu nahet nah-em? ati." 
Acts28:25 Chuin amahole amaho akilol thei lou phatnun, Paul'in thu khat asei jouvin apotdoh taove; athusei chu hiche hi ahi. Lhagao Thengin themgao Isaiah kama napu napateu jah-a, asei chu adih lheh jenge," 
Romans9:25 Chutobang chun Hosea lekhabua, Kamite hikhalouho chu keiman kamite kati ding, kadeilounu chu kadeinu kati ding ahi." 
Romans9:27 Israelte thudol Isaiah'in asamlen, Israel chate twikhanglen kama neldi jatnin tam jongleu, amoh thembou sohcha ding ahi." 
Romans9:29 Hiche thudol hi Isaiah'in masangin aseije, Janel Pakaiyin chikhai ding einakhen louvu hile, Sodom dung isun diu ahin, Gomorrah toh ibah dingu ahi, ati." 
Romans10:16 Ahivangin mi jousen Kipana Thupha angaipouve. Ajeh chu Isaiah'in jong, Pakai, kathuphonle-u koiham atahsana, ati." 
Romans10:20 Isaiah'in jong hakattah-in aseijin, Eihol louten eimudoh-un, Eidong loute hengah kakiphongtai, ati." 
Romans15:12 Chule Isaiah'in jong, Jesse jung chu umding ahin, Chule chidang namdangte chunga vaipo dinga hung sohdoh ding ahi; Ama chu chidang namdang ten kinepna-a anei dingu ahi, ati." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua'n amaho chu acholngahsah hitahenlang hile, khonunga nikho chom thu chu asei lou ding ahi." 
James5:11 Veuvin, dingdet jinga thoh lhumho khu eihon anunnom itiuve. Nanghon Job thohhat thu chu najaove; chule Pakaiya achaina umchan jong namu taove; Pakai chu khotonale mihepina-a dimset ahi."
